Genesis1:1 A kipatciilin Pathian in vaannuai bup bitphua hi," 
Genesis1:2 tualai in leitung sia lim le meal nei ngawlin awngthong hi. Na theampo a tuam tuipi kihual sia khuazing in siin bikbek a, Pathian Thaa sia tui tungah diang hi." 
Genesis1:3 Tuaciang Pathian in, “Khuavak om hen” ci in thupia a — khuavak piang hi." 
Genesis1:4 Pathian in tuasia a mu ciang phasa a, lungkim hi. Tuasia ciang ama in khuazing pan khuavak khen hi," 
Genesis1:5 ama in khuavak sia ‘Sun’ ci a, khuazing sia ‘Zan’ ci hi. Nitak hun bo in zingsang hong theng a — a ni khat ni ahi hi." 
Genesis1:6 Tua zawkciang Pathian in, “Tui sia mun nii in a kikhen tuam natu mun kuampi khat om hen” ci in thupia a — tuaciang tuabangin piang hi. Pathian in tuabang mun kuampi khat vawt a, tuasia in a tung tui sia pan a nuai tui sia khen hi." 
Genesis1:7  
Genesis1:8 Ama in mun kuampi sia “Van” ci hi. Nitak hun bo in zingsang hong theng a — a ni nii ni ahi hi. 
Genesis1:9 Tua zawkciang Pathian in, “Leitang pian natu in, van ii nuai a om tui teng mun khat ah kingawm hen” ci in thupia a — tuaciang tuabangin piang hi." 
Genesis1:10 Ama in leitang sia “Leitung” ci a, a kikaikhawm tui teng sia “Tuipi” ci hi. Pathian in tua bang a mu ciang phasa a, lungkim hi." 
Genesis1:11 Tua zawkciang ama in, “Leitang in thingkung lopa nam theampo, tang a neite le nga a neite piangsak hen” ci in thupia a — tuaciang tuabangin piang hi." 
Genesis1:12 Leitang in thingkung lopa nam theampo piangsak a, Pathian in tuabang a mu ciang phasa a, lungkim hi." 
Genesis1:13 Nitak hun bo in zingsang hong theng a — a ni thum ni ahi hi. 
Genesis1:14 Tua zawkciang Pathian in, “Sun le zan kikhen natu, nite, kumte le biakna poaite kipatna lak natu in van ah khuavakte piang hen a;" 
Genesis1:15 leitung khuavak pia tu in van taang hen” ci in thupia a — tuaciang tuabangin piang hi. 
Genesis1:16 Tua ahiciang Pathian in khuavak a lian zaw nii vawt a, sun a uk tu ni le zan a uk tu tha ahi hi; ama in aksite zongh vawt hi." 
Genesis1:17 Ama in leitung a taangsak tu in van ah khuavakte koi a," 
Genesis1:18 sun le zan a uk tu le khuazing le khuavakte a khen tu ahi uh hi. Pathian in tuabang a mu ciang phasa a, lungkim hi." 
Genesis1:19 Nitak hun bo in zingsang hong theng a — a ni li ni ahi hi. 
Genesis1:20 Tua zawkciang Pathian in, “Tui sia a nungta nganhing nam tam mama te taw kidim hen a, vui sia vacimte taw kidim hen” ci in thupia hi." 
Genesis1:21 Tua ahiciang Pathian in tuipi nganhing liante, tui sung a nungta nganhing nam theampo le vacim nam theampo bitphua hi. Pathian in tuabang a mu ciang phasa a, lungkim hi." 
Genesis1:22 Pathian in tuate theampo thupha pia a, tui sung a teang nganhingte no nei in tuipi sung dim tavun, tuaciang vacimte pungin tam mama pha vun, ci hi." 
Genesis1:23 Nitak hun bo in zingsang hong theng a — a ni nga ni ahi hi. 
Genesis1:24 Tua zawkciang Pathian in, “Nganhing nuntakna a nei nam theampo: innsa le ngamsa, a lian le a no leitang in piangsak hen” ci in thupia a — tuaciang tuabangin piang hi." 
Genesis1:25 Tuabangin tuate Pathian in vawtsiat hi, tuaciang ama ii mu teng sia phasa a, lungkim hi." 
Genesis1:26 Tua zawkciang Pathian in, “Tu in eite in mihing ih vawt tu hi, amate sia eima taw kibang tu a hong suun tu hi. Amate in, ngasa, vacim le innsa ngamsa, a lian a note tungah vaang nei tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis1:27 Tua ahiciang Pathian in ama mama taw a kibang mihingte bitphua hi. Ama in pa le numei bitphua a," 
Genesis1:28 thupha pia in, “Na suan na paalte leitung mun theampo ah teangin, amate in leitung a uk tu in, ta tam mama nei tavun. Keima in ngasate, vacimte le nganhingte theampo tungah ukna za kong pia hi." 
Genesis1:29 Keima in note neak tu in antang nam theampo le thingnga nam theampo kong pia a," 
Genesis1:30 ahizong ngamsate theampo le vacimte theampo ii an tu in lopa le a tee nei a kungte ka pia hi,” a ci ciang — tuabangin piang hi." 
Genesis1:31 Pathian in a vawtsa theampo a et ciang phasa in lungkim mama hi. Nitak hun bo in zingsang hong theng a — a ni luk ni ahi hi. 
Genesis2:1 Tuabangin vaannuai buppi sia kikhuangkhim hi. 
Genesis2:2 A ni sali ni ciangin Pathian in a nasep teng man siat a, nasep tawlnga hi." 
Genesis2:3 Tua ni in ama in a bitphua nasep a khuangkhim a, a nasep tawlnga ahi hu in, a ni sali sia thupha pia a, ni thupi khatin tuam koi hi." 
Genesis2:4 Tuaciang vaannuai bitphuana sia tuabang teng ahi hi. Topa Pathian in vaannuai bup a vawt lai in," 
Genesis2:5 leitung ah thingkung lopate om ngawl a, thaicii a po zongh om ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile ama in nguazusak ngawl a, lotho tu khat zongh om ngawl hi," 
Genesis2:6 ahizong leinuai pan tui pusuakin, lei kawtsak hi." 
Genesis2:7 Tuasia ciang Topa Pathian in lei pan leivui pawlkhat la in tuasia taw mihingpa khat vawt hi; ama in a naak sungah nuntakna a piangsak hu mopin tua mihingpa hong nungta hi. 
Genesis2:8 Tua zawkciang Topa Pathian in nisuana sang Eden ah huan khat vawt a, tua munah ama ii vawtsa mihingpa koi hi." 
Genesis2:9 Ama in a et hoi thingkung namcin tua munah posak in, ngaphate ngasak hi. Huan laizang ah nuntakna a pia thingkung le a pha a sia heak theina a pia thingkung posak hi." 
Genesis2:10 Eden huan sungah lui khat luang a, huan sung tui kawtsak hi; Eden puasang a thet ciang tua sia ngun li in kikhen hi." 
Genesis2:11 A masabel ngun sia Pishon hi a; Havilah ngam kiimvealin luang hi. ( 
Genesis2:12 Tualai ah khamh ciitak om a, a om vazaak ngawl paaknamtui le suang manphate zongh om hi.)" 
Genesis2:13 A niina ngun sia Gihon hi a; Cush ngam kiimvealin luang hi. 
Genesis2:14 A thumna ngun sia Tigris hi a, Assyria ngam nisuana sangah luang hi, tuaciang ngun a lina sia Euphrates ahi hi." 
Genesis2:15 Tuaciang Topa Pathian in Eden huan sungah a tho tu le a cing a keam tu in, mihingpa koi hi." 
Genesis2:16 Pathian in ama tungah, “Huan sung thingkung khat pawpo ii nga na ne thei tu a," 
Genesis2:17 a pha le a sia heak theina thingnga ngawlbuang na ne thei tu hi. Tua thingkung ii nga na ne buahet tu a; na ne le na neak ni ma in na thi tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis2:18 Tuaciang Topa Pathian in, “Mihingpa sia ama nguak a om tu pha ngawl hi. Ama a hu tu in a kilawm koppui tu khat ka vawt tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis2:19 Tua ahiciang Pathian in lei pan leivui pawlkhat la in, nganhing theampo le vacim theampo vawt hi. Tua zawkciang tua teng min a vaw tu in mihingpa ii mu tu in paipui a; ama ii min vaw bangin min nei siat uh hi." 
Genesis2:20 Tuabangin mihingpa in vacim theampo le nganhing theampo min vaw siat a, ahizong ama a panpui thei tu a kilawm a koppui tu khat zongh om ngawl hi." 
Genesis2:21 Tuasia ciang Topa Pathian in mihingpa mutthipsak a, a mut lanin a telngu khat laaksakin tua mun a sa khak kik hi." 
Genesis2:22 Pathian in tua telngu taw numei khat vawt a, ama ii kungah paipui hi." 
Genesis2:23 Tuasia ciang mihingpa in, “Tu pepeet ciang, hisia in keima ii nam bang mihing khat — ka ngu pan a kila ngu le ka sa pan a kila sa ahi hi. Mihingpa sung pan a kila nu ahikom ama ii min ‘numei’ hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis2:24 Tua ahi hu in mihingpa khat in a nu le a pa nusia in a zi taw kingawm tu a, amate pumkhat suak tu uh hi." 
Genesis2:25 Tua mihingpa le tua numei a pumnguak hi uh a, ahihang maizum ngawl uh hi." 
Genesis3:1 Tu in ngul sia Topa Pathian vawtsa nganhingte sung pan a thiimthelbel nganhing ahi hi. Ngul in numei tungah, “Pathian in, huan sung thingkung khat pawpo ii nga ne thei ngawl tu nu hi, hong ci takpi ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Genesis3:2 Numei in, “Huan sung thingkung pawpo ii nga ne thei tu khu hi." 
Genesis3:3 Ahizong Pathian in huan laizang a om thingkung ii nga sia na ne buatu uh hi, tham zongh na tham buatu uh hi, hong ci hi; ka ne ka tham uh le ka thi tu uh hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis3:4 Ngul in, “Tuasia thumaan hi ngawl hi; thi ngawl tu nu hi." 
Genesis3:5 Banghang ziam cile na neak uh ciang, Pathian taw kibangin, a pha le a sia na heak tu hunlam uh he ahikom Pathian in tuabangin hong ci hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Genesis3:6 Numei in thingkung hoizia le a nga a limtuakziate mu a, tuaciang miciim sua tu sia bangza in pha tu ziam ci in, ngaisun hi. Tua ahikom thingnga pawlkhat loin, ne hi. Tuaciang pawlkhat a pasal pia a, a pasal zongh in ne hi." 
Genesis3:7 A neak zawk po ciang amate teltheina kipia a, a pumnguak ahi hunlam kiphawk uh hi; tua ciang amate in theitee te khui khawmin kiseal uh hi." 
Genesis3:8 Tua nitakin, amate in huan sungah Topa Pathian khuasuan nging za uh a, ama ii mu ngawl natu thingkungte kawmah buu uh hi." 
Genesis3:9 Ahizong Topa Pathian in mihingpa sam a, “Nang koi sungah om ni ziam?” ci hi." 
Genesis3:10 Ama in, “Huan sungah na khuasuan nging ka za a; ka pumnguak om ka hikom lau in ka buu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis3:11 Pathian in, “A kua in na pumnguak om ni hi, hong ci ziam? Ne heak in kong ci thingnga sia ne ni ziam,” ci in dongh hi." 
Genesis3:12 Mihingpa in, “Kei taw a omkhawm tu nong piak numei in thingnga hong pia a, ka ne hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis3:13 Topa Pathian in numei tungah, “Banghang hi bang ngamta ni ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Ama in, “Ngul in hong theam a, ka ne hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Genesis3:14 Tuasia ciang Topa Pathian in ngul tungah, “Hi thu hangin nang daan hong kipia tu a; nganhing theampo sung pan nangma bek in hi haamsiatna na thuak tu hi: tu a kipan awmtaalin na vak tu a, na nuntak lai teng leivui na ne tu hi." 
Genesis3:15 Numei taw khat le khat kong kihuatsasak tu a; ama ii hin le toaite le nang aa te a tawntungin na kingal tu uh hi. Ama ii hin le toaite in na lutang hong sucip tu a, nang in a khuatul na tuksak tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis3:16 Tuaciang ama in numei tungah, “Nau na paai ciang na ngimna le nau na sua ciang na natna kong khangsak tu hi. Tua kawm pan na pasal ma na it veve tu a, ama in nang hong uk lai tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis3:17 Tuaciang ama in mihingpa tungah, “Na zi thu son ni in, ne heak in, kong ci thingnga sia ne ni hi. Tuabang ngamta na hikom nang hangin leitangh in haamsiatna thuak hi. Leisung pan nangma atu an a khom a pian natu in, na nuntak sung tawntung haksa takin na na seam tu hi." 
Genesis3:18 Lei sung pan ling le lopa te hong po tu a, duisung thingkung pan a piang ngamh ante na ne tu hi." 
Genesis3:19 Hong kipiansakna leitang ah na cia kik mateng leitang tung pan na a pian thei natu in, haksapi tak le khua ulsa suak in na na seam tu hi. Lei taw hong kivawt na hikom lei ma na suak kik tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis3:20 Adam in a zi min sia Eve phuak hi, banghang ziam cile ama in mihing theampo ii nu ahi hi." 
Genesis3:21 Tuaciang Topa Pathian in Adam le a zi atu in savun puan vawtin amate silhsak hi. 
Genesis3:22 Tuaciang Topa Pathian in, “Tu in, mihingpa sia eima khat bang hong suakin a pha le a sia he hi. Nuntakna thingkung ii nga sia ne in a tawntungin a nuntak tu ki oai ngawl het tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis3:23 Tua ahiciang Topa Pathian in mihingpa sia, Eden huan pan hawlkhia in ama a kipiansakna leitang thosak hi." 
Genesis3:24 Tua ciang huan ii nisuana sangah Cherub te le a kiim mun theampo ah a kiheak, meikuang namsau khat koi hi. Tuasia kuama in nuntakna thingkung nai a neak thei ngawl natu in a khaamna ahi hi." 
Genesis4:1 Tuaciang Adam in a zi ompui a, a zi naupaai hi. Ama in tapa khat nei a, “ Topa huna taw tapa khat ka nei hi,” ci hi. Tua ahikom ama in a min Cain phuak hi." 
Genesis4:2 Nungsang ciang tapa khat nei kik a, Abel ahi hi. Abel sia tuucingpa khat suak a, ahizong Cain sia lothopa khat ahi hi." 
Genesis4:3 Hun khat zawkciang Cain in a lo sung pan a piang ante hong paipui a, Topa tungah biakpiakna pia hi." 
Genesis4:4 Tuaciang Abel in a tuute khat pan a suak a taciil sia ngoin a sa limci belna teng taw biakpiakna pia hi. Abel biakpiakna tungah Topa lungkim hi," 
Genesis4:5 ahizong ama in Cain le a biakpiakna nial hi. Cain sia a thin uuk mama a, lungkim ngawlin a mainguum hi." 
Genesis4:6 Tuaciang Topa in Cain tungah, “Banghang thin uuk ni ziam? Banghang na mai nguumsak ni ziam?" 
Genesis4:7 A maan seam na hile na maitai tu a, ahizong a sia na vawt hu in, mawna in na innkha ah bok nginge hi. Tua in nang hong uk nuam a, ahizong nangma in tuasia na zaw kul tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis4:8 Tuaciang Cain in a suapuipa Abel tungah, “Dui sungah pai tawng,” ci hi. Amate dui sung a thet ciang Cain in a suapuipa ngalvawtin thatlum hi." 
Genesis4:9 Topa in Cain tungah, “Na suapuipa Abel koi sungah om ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Cain in, “He ngawl khi hi. Ka suapuipa a cingpa hi na khi ziam?” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis4:10 Tuasia ciang Topa in, “Banghangin hi bang a, a sia mama na seam thong ni ziam? Phula nuam a, a au aw khat bangin na suapuipa chisan in lei pan kei hong biakpui hi." 
Genesis4:11 Nang sia haamsiat thuakpa na hi a, leitangh tho thei nawn ngawl tu ni hi. Na thalup lai in na naupa chisan dong tu in a kamkaa sa bang keakin tua lei in na naupa chisan huup zo hi." 
Genesis4:12 An ciin tu na hanciam zong lei pan bangma piang ngawl tu a, inn nei ngawlin leitung ah na vakthap tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis4:13 Tuaciang Cain in Topa tungah, “Hi daanpiakna sia kei thuak tu in haksa leih hi." 
Genesis4:14 Ka omna ngam pan nong hawlkhia a, nong ompuina pan a khualana ah nong notkeak hi. Inn nei ngawlin leitung ah a vakthap ka hi tu a, hong mu po in kei hong that tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis4:15 Ahizong Topa in, “Hi ngawl hi. Khat po in nang hong that le phu kilamna in nuntakna sali kila tu hi,” ci in zo hi. Tua ahikom a kisik pui khat po in a thalup ngawl natu in, Cain tungah Topa in tepteena khat koi hi." 
Genesis4:16 Tuaciang Topa omna panin Cain paikhia a, Eden ii nisuana sang “Vakkot” a kicina ngam le lei ah teang hi." 
Genesis4:17 Cain le a zi in tapa khat nei a, a min Enoch phuak hi. Tuasia ciang Cain in khuapi khat saat a, a min tu in a tapa min vaw in Enoch ci hi." 
Genesis4:18 Enoch in tapa khat nei a, a min Irad ci hi, Irad sia Mehujael ii pa hi a, Mehujael in tapa Methushael nei a, ama sia Lamech ii pa ahi hi." 
Genesis4:19 Lamech in zi nii nei a, Adah le Zillah ahi hi." 
Genesis4:20 Adah in ta Jabal nei a, ama sia puanbuk sungah a teang ngankhoaite ii taanghpupi ahi hi." 
Genesis4:21 A suapuipa sia Jubal hi a, ama sia tengtongh le tamngai a tum thei, music thiamte theampo ii taanghpupi ahi hi." 
Genesis4:22 Zillah in Tubal Cain nei a, ama in thik le taau panin nazak namcin vawt hi. Tubal Cain ii suapuinu sia Naamah ahi hi." 
Genesis4:23 Lamech in a zite tungah, “Adah le Zillah awng, hong ngai tavun: tangvalno khat thatlum zo khi hi, banghang ziam cile ama in kei hong vua hi." 
Genesis4:24 Cain kithalup manin a nuntakna sali taw kithuk kik ahile, kei hong thatlum a om le a sawmsali le salivei in kithuk kik tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis4:25 Adam le a zi in tapa dang khat nei hi. A zi in, “Cain ii a thalup Abel taang tu in, Pathian in tapa khat hong pia hi,” ci hi. Tua ahikom a min Seth phuak hi." 
Genesis4:26 Seth in Enosh kici tapa khat nei hi. Tua hun panin mihingte in biakpiakna ah Topa ii min thiangtho law kipan uh hi. 
Genesis5:1 A nuai a teng sia Adam suan le paalte ahi hi. (Pathian in mihing a bitphua lai in, ama taw a kibangin vawt hi." 
Genesis5:2 Ama in pa le numei bitphua a, thupha pia in, “Mihing” ci hi.)" 
Genesis5:3 Adam kum 130 a phak ciang, ama a suun tapa khat nei a, a min Seth phuak hi." 
Genesis5:4 Tua zawkin, Adam kum 800 nungta lai hi. Ama in ta dang zongh nei a," 
Genesis5:5 kum 930 a phak ciang thi hi. 
Genesis5:6 Seth kum 105 a phak ciang tapa Enosh nei a," 
Genesis5:7 tua zawkin kum 807 nungta lai hi. Ama in ta dangte zongh nei a," 
Genesis5:8 kum 912 a phak ciang thi hi. 
Genesis5:9 Enosh kum 90 a phak ciang tapa Kenan nei a," 
Genesis5:10 tua zawkin kum 815 nungta lai hi. Ama in ta dangte zongh nei a," 
Genesis5:11 kum 905 a phak ciang thi hi. 
Genesis5:12 Kenan kum 70 a phak ciang, tapa Mahalalel nei a," 
Genesis5:13 tua zawkin kum 840 nungta lai hi. Ama in ta dangte zongh nei a," 
Genesis5:14 kum 910 a phak ciang thi hi. 
Genesis5:15 Mahalalel kum 65 a phak ciang, tapa Jared nei a," 
Genesis5:16 tua zawkin kum 830 nungta hi. Ama in ta dangte zongh nei a," 
Genesis5:17 kum 895 a phak ciang thi hi. 
Genesis5:18 Jared kum 162 a phak ciang, tapa Enoch nei a," 
Genesis5:19 tua zawkin kum 800 nungta hi. Ama in ta dangte zongh nei a," 
Genesis5:20 kum 962 a phak ciang thi hi. 
Genesis5:21 Enoch kum 65 a phak ciang tapa Methuselah nei hi. 
Genesis5:22 Tua zawkciang Enoch in Pathian taw kum 300 kithawlin, ta dangte zongh nei hi." 
Genesis5:23 Ama sia kum 365 nungta hi. 
Genesis5:24 Pathian taw a nuntak sung kithawl khawm a, tuaciang ama bo hi, banghang ziam cile Pathian in ama la hi." 
Genesis5:25 Methuselah kum 187 a phak ciang, tapa Lamech nei a," 
Genesis5:26 tua zawkin kum 782 nungta lai hi. Ama in ta dangte zongh nei a," 
Genesis5:27 kum 969 a phak ciang thi hi. 
Genesis5:28 Lamech kum 182 a phak ciang tapa khat nei a," 
Genesis5:29 ama in, “ Topa ii haamsiatsa leitang tung mama panin hi tano in ih nasep haksatna theampo panin hong dawn tu hi,” ci ahikom a min Noah phuak hi." 
Genesis5:30 Lamech kum 595 nungta lai hi. Ama in ta dangte zongh nei a," 
Genesis5:31 kum 777 a phak ciang thi hi. 
Genesis5:32 Noah kum 500 a phak zawkciang, tapa thum nei a, Shem, Ham le Japheth ahi uh hi." 
Genesis6:1 Leitung theampo ah mihing kizel a, tanumeite hong piang hi," 
Genesis6:2 Van mite pawlkhat in tua tanumeite phasa ahikom a dei po teenpui hi. 
Genesis6:3 Tuasia ciang Topa in, “Mihingte sia a nuntak tawntung tu ka oai bua hi; amate cii le sa hi. Tu a kipan kum za le kul kaanin nungta ngawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis6:4 Tua hun sung le tua zawkciang zonghin mihing tanumeite le van mite ii suan le paal mihing thatang lian namte leitung ah om hi. Amate sia taanghlai a ngalhangte le mihing minthangte ahi uh hi. 
Genesis6:5 Leitung ah mihing theampo bangzata seksol a, khua ngaisut a sia bebek a nei tawntungna thu Topa in a mu ciang," 
Genesis6:6 amate vawt a leitung ah a koisia khuangai hi. Ama hee mama a," 
Genesis6:7 “Hi ka bitphua sa mihingte, tuaciang nganhingte le vacimte zongh ka bosak siat tu hi, banghang ziam cile amate ka piansak sia ka khuangai hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis6:8 Ahizong Noah tungah Topa lungkim hi. 
Genesis6:9 Hi sia Noah taanghthu ahi hi. Ama in tapa thum nei a, Shem, Ham le Japheth te ahi hi. Noah in khialna nei ngawl a, ama ii hun lai in ama bekma mipha om hi. Pathian taw kithawlin nungta a," 
Genesis6:10  
Genesis6:11 ahizong mi theampo Pathian muna ah a sia hi a, koima po ah ngoltol ngamtatna kizel hi." 
Genesis6:12 Pathian in leitung en a, a sia in mu hi, banghang ziam cile mihing theampo siatna taw kidim in nungta hi." 
Genesis6:13 Pathian in Noah tungah, “Mihing theampo bosak tu in ka khensat zo hi. Leitung sia amate ngoltolna taw kidim ahikom amate ka mon siat tu hi." 
Genesis6:14 Nang atu in thingpha taw teambaw khat vawt in a; a sungah inndoite vawtin, a sung a pua thingnaai taw zut in." 
Genesis6:15 Tuasia metre 133 a sau, metre 22 a zai, le metre 13 a saangin vawt in." 
Genesis6:16 Teambaw khuvum vawt in a, a khuvum le a pangh te kilaklaw centimetre 44 vangsak in. Dawl thum in vawt in a, a pangh ah kongkha khat koi in." 
Genesis6:17 Nuntakna a nei theampo a lalcip tu in leitung ah tuipi ka liimsak tu hi. Leitung a om theampo thi siat tu a," 
Genesis6:18 ahizong nang taw thuciamna khat ka vawt tu hi. Teambaw sungah na zi, na tapate le a zite taw tum vun." 
Genesis6:19 Amate a nuntak natu in, nganhing namcinte le vacim namcinte sung pan anu khat le apa khat veu la in teambaw sungah khum in." 
Genesis6:20  
Genesis6:21 Noma le tua teng atu in an namcinte zongh la in khol in,” ci hi." 
Genesis6:22 Pathian thupiak bangin Noah in na theampo vawt siat hi. 
Genesis7:1 Topa in Noah tungah, “Na innkuan bupin teambaw sungah tum vun; leitung theampo ah a maanin a seam sia nangma bekma kong mu hi." 
Genesis7:2 Biakna taw kisai a thiangtho nganhingte kop sali tek paipui in a, ahizong a thiangtho ngawl nganhingte ahile kop khat tek bek paipui in." 
Genesis7:3 Vacimte zongh nam khat ciang kop sali tek paipui in. Leitung ah vacim le nganhing nam theampo no nei kikin a nuntak natu hi bang vawt in. 
Genesis7:4 Tu zo ni sali zawkciang, ni sawmli sung sun le zan ngua kong zusak tu a, ka vawtsa nuntakna nei theampo a mon natu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis7:5 Tuaciang Noah in Topa thupiak theampo vawt siat hi. 
Genesis7:6 Leitung ah tuipi a liim lai in Noah kum zaluk pha hi. 
Genesis7:7 Tuipi liimna pan a suakta tu in Noah le a zi, a tapate le a zite teambaw sungah tum uh hi." 
Genesis7:8 Nganhing le vacim namkim anu le apa kopkhat tek, biakna taw kisai a thiangtho ahizong a thiangtho ngawl ahizong," 
Genesis7:9 Pathian thupiak bangin Noah taw teambaw sungah tum khawm uh hi. 
Genesis7:10 Ni sali zawkciang tuipi liim hi. 
Genesis7:11 Noah kum zaluk a phak zawk, a tha nii na ni sawm le ni sali ni in, leinuai a om tui teng puaktham in kihongkeak a, mun theampo pan tui phuul hi, van ii tui kongpi theampo kihongin," 
Genesis7:12 sun sawmli le zan sawmli tawntung leitung ah nguazu hi. 
Genesis7:13 Tua ni ma in Noah le a zi sia a tapate thum Shem, Ham, Japheth le a zite teng taw teambaw sungah tum uh hi." 
Genesis7:14 Amate taw in nganhing nam theampo, innsate le ngamsate, a lian a no, le vacim nam theampo tum uh hi." 
Genesis7:15 Pathian thupiak bangin nganhing nungta peuma ii a nam khat sim sung pan anu khat le apa khat veu Noah taw teambaw sungah tum uh hi. 
Genesis7:16 Noah a tum zawkciang Topa in kongkha khak hi. 
Genesis7:17 Tuipi liim ni sawmli a ngei ciang teambaw a laam khom tu in tui hong thuk hi. 
Genesis7:18 Tui thuk vaial a, tui tungah teambaw laam hi." 
Genesis7:19 Tui thuk mama a, mualsaangbelte zong khum hi;" 
Genesis7:20 mualsaangbelte ii dawn tungsia ah metre sali a phak dong bang tui khang hi. 
Genesis7:21 Leitung ah a om a nungta teng — vacim theampo, nganhing theampo le mihing theampo thi siat hi." 
Genesis7:22 Leitung ah om husang theampo thi hi. 
Genesis7:23 Topa in leitung ah a nungta theampo — mihing, nganhing le vacimte theampo mongsak siat hi. Noah le ama taw teambaw sungah a om teng bek taang hi." 
Genesis7:24 Ni 150 sung tui kiamsuk tu kipan ngawl hi. 
Genesis8:1 Pathian in Noah le ama taw teambaw sungah a om nganhingte theampo mangil ngawl hi; ama in vuivasak a, tuaciang tui kiamsuk tu kipan hi." 
Genesis8:2 Leinuai pan tui phulna vangte le van ii tui kongpite kikhak siat hi. Nguazu nawn ngawl hi," 
Genesis8:3 tuaciang ni 150 sung dadam in tui kiamsuk hi. 
Genesis8:4 A tha sali na, ni sawm le ni sali ni in, teambaw sia Ararat mual tungah hong tawlnga hi." 
Genesis8:5 Tui kiam susuk a, a tha sawmna, ni khat ni in mualdawnte kilangh hi." 
Genesis8:6 Ni sawmli zawkciang Noah in khelki khat hong a," 
Genesis8:7 va-ak khat tha hi. Va-ak hong heak kik ngawl a, ahihang tui a kiam siat mateng leang kawkoai hi." 
Genesis8:8 Tua hun sungin, tui kiam siat zo ziam ci sia a heak natu in, Noah in vakhu khat tha a," 
Genesis8:9 ahizong lei theampo tui in khum lai ahikom vakhu in a tuk natu mun mu ngawl hi. Teambaw kungah vakhu hong leang kik a, Noah in manin sungtan pui hi." 
Genesis8:10 Ama in a dang ni sali a ngak zawkciang tua vakhu tha kik hi. 
Genesis8:11 Nitak sang ciangin ama kungah olive tee hing khat a muk ah pu in tua vakhu hong heak kik hi. Tua ahiciang tui kiamsuk zo a hina thu Noah in he hi. 
Genesis8:12 Tua zawk ni sali ngak lai in khatvei ma tua vakhu tha kik hi; tu sia ciang, vakhu hong heak kik nawn ngawl hi." 
Genesis8:13 Noah kum 601 a phak zawk, a tha khatna, ni khat ni in tui kiam siat hi. Noah in teambaw sitna hongin khua en kawkoai a, leikote mu hi." 
Genesis8:14 A tha niina, ni kul le ni sali ni ciang leitung ko thiang hi." 
Genesis8:15 Pathian in Noah tungah," 
Genesis8:16 “Na zi, na tapate le a zite taw teambaw sung pan pusuak vun." 
Genesis8:17 No nei kik a leitung theampo ah a kizel natu in, vacim theampo le nganhing theampo nangma pusua pui in,” ci hi." 
Genesis8:18 Tua ahiciang Noah sia teambaw sung pan a zi a tapate le a zite taw pusuak uh hi. 
Genesis8:19 Nganhing theampo le vacim theampo a nam zui in, a pawl a pawl in teambaw sung pan pusuak uh hi." 
Genesis8:20 Noah in biaknatau khat Topa atu vawt hi; biakna taw kisai a thiangtho nganhing nam le vacim nam sim pan khat tek la in, biaknatau tungah pum bup meihal biakpiakna in pia hi." 
Genesis8:21 Topa sia biakpiakna ngimnamtui in lungdamsak hi, tuaciang a thinsung ah, “Mihing ngamtatna hangin leitung ka haamsiat kik ngei buatu hi; a no lai pan a khuangaisutnate a siat hunlam ka he hi. Tu a ka vawt bangin nuntakna nei theampo ka mon kik ngei buatu hi." 
Genesis8:22 Leitung a om laiteng lopoai hun le anlaak hun om tu hi. A vot le a sa, khuakhaal le phalbi, sun le zan om tawntung tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis9:1 Pathian in Noah le a tapate thupha pia in, “Na suan na paalte leitung theampo ah teang tu in ta tam mama nei tavun." 
Genesis9:2 Nganhing theampo, vacim theampo le ngasa theampo in no hong kiita in nungta tu uh hi. Tuate theampo noma khutnuai ah kikoi hi." 
Genesis9:3 Tu in tuate na ne thei tu uh a, ankung hingte zong na ne thei tu uh hi; note an tu in tuate theampo kong pia siat hi." 
Genesis9:4 Na neak ngawl tu khat sia chi om lai sa na ne bua het tu uh hi; banghang ziam cile nuntakna sia chi sungah om ahi hu in neak tu kong khaam hi. 
Genesis9:5 Khat pawpo in mihing nuntakna a thisak le ama daan kipia tu hi. Mihing nuntakna a thisak nganhing sia kithisak tu hi. 
Genesis9:6 Mihing sia Pathian taw kibangin kivawt ahikom mihing khat a that pawpo sia ama ii mipuipa in thatlum tu hi. 
Genesis9:7 “Leitung theampo ah na suan le na paalte a teen thei natu in, ta tam mama na nei tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis9:8 Pathian in Noah le a tapate tungah," 
Genesis9:9 “Tu in noma tung le na suan na paalte tung ahizong," 
Genesis9:10 note taw teambaw sung pan a pusuak khawm nuntakna a nei theampo — vacim theampo le nganhing theampo taw — thuciamna kong vawt hi. 
Genesis9:11 Note taw ka vawt thuciamna sia hi kammalte hi: nuntakna nei a minpiang peuma tuipi liimna taw ka mon kik ngei buatu a; tuipi liimin leitung ka lalsak kik ngei buatu hi, ci in kong kamciam hi." 
Genesis9:12 Nang le nuntakna nei a minpiangte taw ka vawt a tawntung a kip tu ka thuciamna lim tu in 
Genesis9:13 meei sungah ka sangun ka koi tu hi. Tua in leitung taw ka thuciamna lim hi tu hi. 
Genesis9:14 Van ah meei ka kaaisak simin le sangun hong kilangh simin," 
Genesis9:15 tuipi liimna in nuntakna nei peuma mon kik ngeingawl tu hi ci in, note le nganhing theampo tungah kong kamciamna ka phawk tu hi." 
Genesis9:16 Meei sungah sangun a kilangh ciang ka mu tu a, tuaciang keima le leitung ah nuntakna nei a minpiangte kilaklaw ah a kho tawntung thuciamna sia ka phawk tu hi." 
Genesis9:17 Tuasia in nuntakna nei a minpiang theampo tungah kamciam ka piakna lim ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis9:18 Teambaw sung pan a pusuak Noah tapate sia Shem, Ham le Japheth ahi hi. (Ham sia Canaan ii pa ahi hi.)" 
Genesis9:19 Hi Noah ii tapa thumte sia simleitung mi theampo ii taanghpupite ahi uh hi. 
Genesis9:20 Noah sia lothopa khat hi a, sapit ciing masabelpa ahi hi." 
Genesis9:21 Ama in sapittui ne in kham a, a puante suutin a puanbuk sungah a pumnguakin lum hi." 
Genesis9:22 Canaan ii pa Ham in, a pa a pumnguak a lup a mu ciang, a suapuite nii kungah pai in son hi." 
Genesis9:23 Tuasia ciang Shem le Japheth in puantual khat la in amate ii liangko nungsang ah baang uh hi, a nung leelam in puanbuk sungah tum uh a, a pa sia puantual taw siin uh hi. A pa uh a pumnguak a om a mu ngawl natu in amate in a lu heak uh hi." 
Genesis9:24 Noah a sapittui kham theau kik a, a tungah a tapa nobel ii a vawtna teng a heak ciang" 
Genesis9:25 ama in, “Canaan tungah haamsiatna khat tung tahen! Ama sia a suapuite ii sila khat hi tu hi." 
Genesis9:26 Shem ii Pathian, Topa pok vun! Canaan sia Shem ii sila hi tu hi." 
Genesis9:27 Pathian in Japheth pungsak tahen! A suan a paalte le Shem mite teang khawm tahen! Canaan sia Japheth ii sila hi tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis9:28 Tuipi liim zawkciang Noah kum 350 nungta a," 
Genesis9:29 kum 950 a phak ciang thi hi. 
Genesis10:1 Hite sia Noah ii tapa ahi Shem, Ham le Jepheth te ii suan le paalte ahi hi. Tuipi liim zawkciang hite thum in tapate nei uh hi." 
Genesis10:2 Japheth ii tapate — Gomer, Magog, Madai, Javan, Tubal, Meshech le Tiras — sia amate ii min a pu mite ii taanghpupite ahi hi." 
Genesis10:3 Gomer ii suan le paalte sia Ashkenaz, Riphath, le Togarmah mite ahi uh hi." 
Genesis10:4 Javan suan le paalte sia Elishah, Spain, Cyprus le Rhodes mite ahi uh hi;" 
Genesis10:5 amate sia tuikulhte tung le tuipi dung a, a teangte ii taanghpupite ahi uh hi. Hite sia Japheth ii suan le paalte hi a, a mihon simin amate kampau tek zangh a, ngam tuatuam ah minam tuam tekin teang uh hi." 
Genesis10:6 Ham ii tapate — Cush, Egypt, Libya le Canaan — sia amate ii min a pu, mite ii taanghpupite ahi hi." 
Genesis10:7 Cush ii suan le paalte sia Seba, Havilah, Sabtah, Raamah le Sabteca mite ahi uh hi. Raamah ii suan le paalte sia Sheba le Dedan mite ahi uh hi." 
Genesis10:8 Cush in Nimrod a kici tapa khat nei a, leitung ah a masabel a minthang ngalzopa ahi hi." 
Genesis10:9 Topa huna taw savai minthang khat hi a, tua ahi hu in mihingte in “ Topa in nang sia Nimrod bangin savai minthang khat hong suaksak tahen!” ci uh hi." 
Genesis10:10 A masa phitin ama ii kumpi ngam sia, Babylon ngam sungah a om Babylon, Erech le Accad ngam thum teng ahi hi." 
Genesis10:11 Tua ngam panin Assyria ah pai a, Nineveh, Rehoboth Ir, Calah khuapite," 
Genesis10:12 tuaciang Nineveh le Calah khuapi lian kilaklaw ah a om, Resen khuapi saat hi." 
Genesis10:13 Egypt suan le paalte sia Lydia, Anam, Lehab, Naphtuh," 
Genesis10:14 Pathrus, Casluh mite, tuaciang Philistine te ii pianna Crete mite ahi uh hi." 
Genesis10:15 Canaan ii tapate — a ubel Sidon le Heth — sia amate ii min a pu mite ii taanghpupite ahi uh hi. 
Genesis10:16 Canaan mite sia Jebus te, Amor te, Girgash te," 
Genesis10:17 Hiv te, Ark te, Sin te," 
Genesis10:18 Arvad te, Zemar te le Hamath te ii taanghpupi zongh ahi hi. Canaan mite kithethaang a," 
Genesis10:19 amate ngam sia, Sidon panin thangsang ah Gaza nai Gerar ngam dong hi a, nisuana sang ah Sodom, Gomorrah, Admah, tuaciang Lasha khua nai Zeboiim dong ahi hi." 
Genesis10:20 Hite sia Ham ii suan le paalte hi a, amate kampau tek zanghin ngam tuatuam ah a minam tuam tekin teang uh hi." 
Genesis10:21 Japheth ii upa Shem sia Hebrew mi theampo ii taanghpupi ahi hi. 
Genesis10:22 Shem ii tapate — Elam, Asshur, Arpachshad, Lud le Aram — sia amate ii min a pu mite ii taanghpupite ahi uh hi." 
Genesis10:23 Aram suan le paalte sia Uz, Hul, Gether le Meshek mite ahi hi." 
Genesis10:24 Arpachshad sia Shelah pa hi a, Shelah sia Eber ii pa hi." 
Genesis10:25 Eber in tapa nii nei a: khat ii min sia Peleg ci hi, banghang ziam cile ama ii hun sungin leitung mihingte kikhenthaang hi; a khat sia ii min Joktan kici hi." 
Genesis10:26 Joktan suan le paalte sia Almodad, Sheleph, Hazarmaveth, Jerah," 
Genesis10:27 Hadoram, Uzal, Diklah," 
Genesis10:28 Obal, Abimael, Sheba," 
Genesis10:29 Ophir, Havilah le Jobab mite ahi hi. A vekpi in Joktan suan le paalte ahi hi." 
Genesis10:29 Ophir, Havilah le Jobab mite ahi hi. A vekpi in Joktan suan le paalte ahi hi." 
Genesis10:30 Amate teenna ngam sia Mesha pan nisuana sang mualtung ngam Sephar dong kithung hi. 
Genesis10:31 Hite sia Shem ii suan le paalte hi a, amate kampau tek zanghin ngam tuatuam ah a minam tuam tekin teang uh hi." 
Genesis10:32 Hi mite theampo sia Noah ii suan le paalte hi a, a khang simna taw kizui in, minam tuam veu suak hi. Leitung minam theampo sia tuipi liim zawkciang Noah tapate ii suan le paalte ahi hi." 
Genesis11:1 A masa phitin leitung buppi mihingte in kampau khat bek kinei a kammal kibang zangh uh hi. 
Genesis11:2 Amate nisuana sangah vak kawkoai a, Babylon ngam zaanglei mun khat a thet ciang tua munah khua saat uh hi." 
Genesis11:3 Amate khat le khat, “Hong pai tavun! uksuang seakin a sahin hal tawng” kici uh hi. Tua hi a, amate inn sak natu in uksuang te a kimat natu in kattaza zangh uh hi." 
Genesis11:4 Amate in, “Eite ii min nga thei natu le leitung theampo ah ih kithethaang ngawl natu in khuapi khat saatin van a baan tu tausaang khat ciang to tawng,” ci uh hi." 
Genesis11:5 Tuasia ciang tua mite ii a vawt khuapi le tausaang a en tu in Topa hong paisuk a," 
Genesis11:6 ama in, “Tu ciangin, hite sia a vekpi in mihing ci khat sa khat hi a, amate kam nam khat pau hi; a nasep tute a kipatna hi pheang hi. Hai ngawlin a nasep nop pawpo hong seam suak thei tu uh hi!" 
Genesis11:7 Eite paisuk in khat le khat a kam kitel ngawl natu in a kampau toknoaisak tawng,” ci hi." 
Genesis11:8 Tua ahiciang Topa in amate leitung mun theampo ah kithethaangsak hi, tuaciang amate in a khuapi saat tawlnga hi." 
Genesis11:9 Tua khuapi sia Babylon ci uh hi, banghang ziam cile Topa in tua munah mihingte theampo ii kampau kitoknoai a, tua mun panin leitung mun theampo ah amate kithethaangsak hi." 
Genesis11:10 Hite sia Shem ii suan le paalte hi. Shem kum 100 a phak, tuipi liim zawk kum nii a phak ciangin ama in Arpachshad kici tapa khat nei hi." 
Genesis11:11 Tua zawk in ama kum 500 nungta lai a, ta dangte zongh nei hi." 
Genesis11:12 Arpachshad kum 35 a phak ciang, ama in Shelah kici tapa khat nei hi;" 
Genesis11:13 Tua zawk in, ama kum 403 nungta lai a, ta dangte zongh nei hi." 
Genesis11:14 Shelah kum 30 a phak ciang, ama in Eber kici tapa khat nei hi;" 
Genesis11:15 tua zawkciang, ama kum 403 nungta lai a, ta dangte zongh nei hi." 
Genesis11:16 Eber kum 34 a phak ciang, ama in Peleg kici tapa khat nei hi;" 
Genesis11:17 tua zawk in, ama kum 430 nungta lai a, ta dangte zongh nei hi." 
Genesis11:18 Peleg kum 30 a phak ciang, ama in Reu kici tapa khat nei hi;" 
Genesis11:19 tua zawk in, ama kum 209 nungta lai a, ta dangte zongh nei hi." 
Genesis11:20 Reu kum 32 a phak ciang, ama in Serug kici tapa khat nei hi;" 
Genesis11:21 tua zawk in, ama kum 207 nungta lai a, ta dangte zongh nei hi." 
Genesis11:22 Serug kum 30 a phak ciang, ama in Nahor kici tapa khat nei hi;" 
Genesis11:23 tua zawk in, ama kum 200 nungta lai a, ta dangte zongh nei hi." 
Genesis11:24 Nahor kum 29 a phak ciang, ama in Terah kici tapa khat nei hi;" 
Genesis11:25 tua zawk in, ama kum 119 nungta lai a, ta dangte zongh nei hi." 
Genesis11:26 Terah kum 70 a phak zawkciang, ama sia Abram, Nahor le Haran ii pa suak hi." 
Genesis11:27 Hite sia Terah ii suan le paalte hi a, Terah sia Abram, Nahor le Haran te ii pa ahi hi. Haran sia Lot ii pa hi a," 
Genesis11:28 ama ii pa Terah a nuntak lai in, a suana Babylon ngam Ur khuapi ah Haran thi hi." 
Genesis11:29 Abram in Sarai teenpui a, Nahor in Haran ii tanu Milcah teenpui hi. Haran sia Iscah ii pa zongh ahi hi." 
Genesis11:30 Sarai in ta nei thei ngawl hi. 
Genesis11:31 Terah in a tapa Abram, Haran ii tapa ama ii tupa ahi Lot le a tapa Abram ii zi ahi a monu Sarai sam a, amate taw Canaan ngam ah pai tu in Babylon ngam Ur khuapi nusia uh hi. Amate Haran dong pai in tua munah teang uh hi." 
Genesis11:32 Terah kum 205 a phak ciang tua munah thi hi. 
Genesis12:1 Pathian in Abram tungah, “Na ngam, na bee le phungte le na pa inn nusia in a, kong lak natu ngam ah pai in." 
Genesis12:2 Suan le paal tam mama kong pia tu a, amate minam lian khat suak tu uh hi. Nang sia thupha naak na hi natu in, thupha kong pia tu a, na min kong thangsak tu hi." 
Genesis12:3 Nangma thupha hong piate thupha ka pia tu a, Ahihang nangma hong haamsiatte ka haamsiat tu hi. Nang tungtawnin minam theampo thupha ka pia tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis12:4 Abram kum sawmsali le kum nga a phak ciang Topa ci bangin Haran pan dingkhia hi; tuaciang Lot in zui hi. 
Genesis12:5 Abram in a zi Sarai, a naupa ii tapa Lot, amate nei le lamh theampo le Haran pan a nga sila theampo Canaan ngam zotpui hi. Amate Canaan ngam a thet ciang" 
Genesis12:6 Abram sia tua ngam kaantan in Shechem khua ah om mun thiangtho ahi Moreh ii thingkung thiangtho a thet dong paisuak hi. (Tua hun in Canaan te tua ngam ah teang lai hi.) 
Genesis12:7 Abram kungah Topa kilangh a, “Na suan le na paalte tungah hi ngam ka pia tu hi,” ci hi. Tua zawkciang Abram in, ama ii kungah a kilangh Topa atu in biaknatau khat vawt hi." 
Genesis12:8 Tua zawkciang Abram sia thangsang Bethel khuapi ii nisuana sang mualtung ngam ah kikhiin in nitumna sangah Bethel, nisuana sangah Ai khuate kilaklaw ah a ngiaphual saat hi. Tua mun zongh ah ama in biaknatau khat vawtin Topa bia hi." 
Genesis12:9 Tua zawkciang ama mun khat pan mun khat kikhiin in Canaan ngam thangsang ah pai hi. 
Genesis12:10 Ahihang Canaan ngam sungah kialpi tung a, tua kialpi nasia ahikom tawmvei sung a teang tu in thangsang a om Egypt ah Abram paisuk lai hi." 
Genesis12:11 Egypt ngamsung tum tu in ngamngi a kan dek ciang a zi Sarai tungah, “Nang sia numei mealpha khat na hi hi." 
Genesis12:12 Egypt te in nang hong mu ciang nang sia keima zi hi hong ci tu uh a, amate in keima hong thatin nang hong nungtasak tu hi." 
Genesis12:13 Amate tungah a suapuinu khi hi na ci in; tuasia ciang nang hangin kei ka suakta tu a, pha takin hong vawt tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis12:14 Ama ngamngi kaanin Egypt ngam a tum ciang Egypt te in a zi mealphat hunlam mu uh hi. 
Genesis12:15 Zum uliante pawlkhat in ama a mu ciang a mealphatna kumpipa tungah son hi; tua ahikom kumpi inn sungah kipaipui hi. 
Genesis12:16 Tua nu hangin kumpipa in Abram phat vawt a, ama ii tungah tuu, keal, khui, laa, silate le kalaohte a hon a hon in pia hi." 
Genesis12:17 Ahizong kumpipa in Sarai a laak hu in Topa in ama le a kumpi inn sungah a teang mite tungah natna ngilote tungsak hi. 
Genesis12:18 Tuasia ciang kumpipa in Abram sam a, “Banghangin hi bang hong vawt thong ni ziam? Ama na zi ahi sia banghang hong son ngawl ni ziam?" 
Genesis12:19 Banghangin na suapuinu hi ci a, ama ka zi tu in ka laak tu hong oai ni ziam? Hi sungah na zi om hi; ama la in a, pusuak vun!” ci hi." 
Genesis12:20 Kumpipa in a mite thupia a, amate in Abram sia a zi le a neisa theampo taw a ngam pua sangah pusuaksak uh hi." 
Genesis13:1 Abram sia a zi, a neisa theampo le Lot taw Egypt panin saksang zuanin Canaan thangsang mun khat ah pai hi." 
Genesis13:2 Abram sia a hau mama khat hi a, tuute, kealte le khuite bek dom ngawlin khamh le ngunn zongh nei hi." 
Genesis13:3 Tua zawkciang tua mun nusia in mun khat pan mun khat ah kikhiin in Bethel sang zuan hi. Bethel le ama ii ngiaphual a saat maksakna, biaknatau khat a sak ngeina mun Ai kilaklaw ah ama theng hi." 
Genesis13:4 Tua munah ama in Topa bia hi. 
Genesis13:5 Lot zongh in tuute, kealte le khuite a nei bek dom ngawlin innkuanpui le naseamte zongh nei hi." 
Genesis13:6 Tua hi a, ngan tha natu mun kicing ngawl ahikom mun khat ah a nii in teenkhop tu suak thei ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile amate in nganno hau mama uh hi." 
Genesis13:7 Tua hikom Abram ii ngancingte le Lot ii ngancingte kilaklaw ah kihauna piang hi. (Tua hunin Canaan te le Periz te tua ngam ah teang lai uh hi.) 
Genesis13:8 Tuasia ciang Abram in Lot tungah, “Eite sia mealheak khat ih hikom, na mite le ka mite a kihau tute hi ngawl hi." 
Genesis13:9 Tua ahikom kikhen zaw heu tawng. Na deina ngam pawpo teal in. Nang mun khat sang na zuan le kei mundang khat ka zuan tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis13:10 Tuaciang Lot khuadak a, Topa ii Huan ahibuale Egypt ngam taw a kibang Jordan kuam buppi le Zoar sang theampo, tui tam mama a omna mun teng mu hi. (Tua hun sia Sodom le Gomorrah khuapite Topa ii a lalsak ma ahi hi.)" 
Genesis13:11 Lot in Jordan kuam buppi ama atu in teal a, nisuana sangah kikhiin hi. Tuabangin amate nii kikhen hi." 
Genesis13:12 Abram sia Canaan ngam ah teang a, Lot sia tua ngam kuam sung khuapite sungah teangin, Sodom khua hui ah ngiaphual saat hi," 
Genesis13:13 Sodom mite sia seksol a, Topa tungah nasia takin a maw a khialte ahi uh hi." 
Genesis13:14 Lot ii a nusiat zawkciang Abram tungah Topa in, “Na omna mun panin mun theampo pha tak en in." 
Genesis13:15 Na muna ngam theampo nang le na suan na paalte tungah kong pia tu a, a tawntungin noma aa hi tu hi." 
Genesis13:16 Suan le paal tam mama kong pia tu a, kuama in sim siat zo ngawl tu hi; tua sia sim tu sia leitung ah leivui theampo sim siat tu ol zaw tu hi!" 
Genesis13:17 Tu in, pai ta'n a, ngam buppi va en ta'n, banghang ziam cile a vekpi nang tungah kong pia siat tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis13:18 Tua ahikom Abram in a ngiaphual khiinin, Hebron ngamsung Mamre thingkung thiangthote kungah teang a, tua munah Topa atu in biaknatau khat sa hi." 
Genesis14:1 Babylon kumpipa Amraphel, Ellasar kumpipa Arioch, Elam kumpipa Chedorlaomer le Goiim kumpipa Tidal, hi kumpi lite in" 
Genesis14:2 a dang kumpi ngate: Sodom kumpipa Bera, Gomorrah kumpipa Birsha, Admah kumpipa Shinab, Zeboiim kumpipa Shemeber le Bela ahibuale Zoar kumpipa te sim uh hi." 
Genesis14:3 Hi kumpi ngate in kipawlna vawtin tu in Tuipi Thi a kici Siddim Kuam ah a ngalkapte ngawmtua uh hi. 
Genesis14:4 Amate kum sawm le kum nii sung Chedorlaomer khutnuai ah om uh a, ahizong kum sawm le kum thum kum ciang amate in ama leedo kik uh hi." 
Genesis14:5 A kum sawm le li kum ciangin Chedorlaomer le ama taw a kipawl kumpite in a ngalkaphonpite taw sim kik a, Ashteroth Karnaim ah Rephaim, Ham ah Zuzim, Kiriathaim zaanglei ah Emim" 
Genesis14:6 le Edom mualte tungah Hor te zo in, sennealngam mong ah a om Elparan ciang dong del uh hi." 
Genesis14:7 Tua zawkciang amate kiheak a Kadesh (tua hun in Enmishpat kici) ah pai kik hi. Amalek te ngam theampo le Hazazon Tamar ah a teang Amor te zo uh hi. 
Genesis14:8 Tuaciang Sodom, Gomorrah, Admah, Zeboiim le Bela kumpi ngate in, a ngalkaphonpi nei teng ngalsim tu in kaikhawm a," 
Genesis14:9 kumpi nga teng in Elam, Goiim, Babylon le Ellasar kumpi lite taw Siddim Kuam ah kido uh hi." 
Genesis14:10 Tua kuam sia kattaza dumte taw kidim a, Sodom le Gomorrah kumpite ngal kisimna pan a tai uh ciangin tua dumte sungah taakin, a dang kumpi thum teng sia mual tungah suakta uh hi." 
Genesis14:11 Kumpi lite in Sodom le Gomorrah ah omna theampo, a an teng zongh la in paipui uh hi." 
Genesis14:12 Sodom ah Abram suapuipa ii tapa Lot teang ahikom amate in a neisa teng taw paipui uh hi. 
Genesis14:13 Ahizong ngalte khut sung pan a suakta khat in Hebrew mi Abram kungah pai in hi thu theampo son hi, Abram sia Amor mi Mamre ii neisa thingkung thiangthote kungah teang hi. Mamre le a suapuipate Eshcol le Aner sia Abram kipawlpui te ahi uh hi." 
Genesis14:14 Abram in a suapuipa tapa a kimatna thu a zaak ciang, ngalsim tu ngalkap 318 teng a ngiaphual ah kaikhawmin, tua kumpi li te Dan ciang dong del uh hi." 
Genesis14:15 Tua munah a mite a pawlin khen a, zan in ngal a sim ciang zo uh hi. A ngalte sia Damascus saksang Hobah ciang dong del uh a," 
Genesis14:16 tuaciang a kisuttol vanh teng nga kik hi. Ama in a suapuipa tapa Lot le a neisa teng, numeite le thongtaak dang teng zongh ciapui kik siat hi." 
Genesis14:17 Abram in kumpipa Chedorlaomer le kumpi dangte a zawna pan a cia kik ciang, Sodom kumpipa in Shaveh Kuam (Kumpipa Kuam zong kici) ah ama taw kisi tu in pai hi." 
Genesis14:18 Tuaciang Saangbel Pathian ii thiampi zongh ahi, Salem kumpipa Melchizedek in zongh anluum le sapittui Abram kungah puak a," 
Genesis14:19 ama in “Vantung le leitung a vawt Saangbel Pathian in Abram thupha pia tahen! 
Genesis14:20 Na ngalte hong zosak Saangbel Pathian sia kipok tahen!” ci in Abraham thupha pia hi. Tuaciang Abram in a kisuttol a nga kik vanh theampo sung pan sawm a khat Melchizedek tungah pia hi. 
Genesis14:21 Sodom kumpipa in Abram tungah, “Sutol vanh teng tang in a, ahizong ka mi teng hong pia kik ta'n,” ci hi." 
Genesis14:22 Abram in, “Vantung le leitung Vawtpa, Saangbel Pathian, Topa mai ah" 
Genesis14:23 khauzam khat ahizong, peangdap khau ngawngawn ahizong, na neisa bangma ka la buatu hi, ci in ciliapna taw ka kiciam hi. Tuasia ahibuale nangma in, ‘Abram a hausak pa keima khi hi,’ ci tha tu ni hi." 
Genesis14:24 Ka mite ii zak sa teng ngawl buang keima tan tu in bangma ka la buatu hi. Ahizong keima hong panpui Aner, Eshcol le Mamre te in amate tel tu teng la tahen” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis15:1 Hi teng zawkciang Abram in mukholna nei a, Topa in, “Abram awng, lau heak in, Keima in lauhuaina panin nang kong dal tu a, thaman lian khat kong pia tu hi,” a cisia za hi." 
Genesis15:2 Ahizong Abram in, “Vaanglianpipa Topa awng, ta nei ngawl ka hi ciang nong piak tu thaman sia kei atu in bang phatuam tu ziam? Ka innlua tu pa sia Damascus khua mi Eliezer bekma ahi hi." 
Genesis15:3 Ta hong pia ngawl na hi ciang ka sila khat in ka neisa teng lua tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis15:4 Tuasia ciang Topa in ama paupui kik a: “Hi sila, Eliezar in na neisate lua ngawl tu a; nangma tapa tatak ma na innlua hi tu hi,” a cisia za hi." 
Genesis15:5 Topa in ama doipua sangah pusuapui a, “Van en in a, aksite sim sin in; tuaza a tam suan le paal na nei tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis15:6 Abram in Topa pummuan a, hisia hangin Topa lungkim in ama saang hi." 
Genesis15:7 Tuaciang Topa in ama tungah, “Hi ngam teng nangma hong pia tu in, Babylon ngam Ur khua pan hong masuanpa sia Keima Topa ka hi hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis15:8 Ahizong Abram in, “Vaanglianpipa Topa awng, tua ngam teng kei atu ahi sia bangbangin he thei tu khi ziam?,” ci in dongh hi." 
Genesis15:9 Topa in “Kum thum a pha khuipui khat, kum thum a pha keal khat, kum thum a pha tuutal khat, tuaciang inn vakhu khat le ngam vakhu khat hong paipui ta'n,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis15:10 Abram in hi nganno teng Pathian kungah paipui a, phel nii veu sua a phel khat teng le phel dang khat teng ngual nii a kinungngat in koisak hi; ahizong vacimte pheltham ngawl hi." 
Genesis15:11 Tua saluangte tungah vaciikte tuaksuk hi, ahizong Abram in bengkeak hi." 
Genesis15:12 Ni tum ciang Abram mutthip a, ama tungah launa le patauna theng hi." 
Genesis15:13 Topa in ama tungah, “Na suan na paalte ngamdang ah khualmi suak tu hi; amate sia tua munah kum zali sung sila kaai in kivawtsia tu hi." 
Genesis15:14 Ahizong amate sila in a khoai minam sia daan ka pia tu a, tua ngamdang a nusiat ciang nei le lam tam mama hong ciapui tu uh hi." 
Genesis15:15 Nangma na hile kicing takin huaikut teakkut in na nungta tu a, nuam takin thi in, hong kivui tu hi." 
Genesis15:16 Khang li zawkciang na suan na paalte hi ngam ah hong cia kik tu hi, banghang ziam cile hi sungah Amor te sia hong seksol mama tu a, daan a kipiak mateng hi mun pan ka notkeak buatu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis15:17 Ni tumin khua a zin ciang meikhu a suak meibeal le meisip kuang sia thakhat thu in kilangh a, nganhing sabekte kilaklaw kaantan hi." 
Genesis15:18 Tuasia ciang tua munah Topa in Abram taw thuciamna khat vawt hi. Ama in, “Na suan na paalte tungah Egypt ngamngi pan Euphrates ngun dong," 
Genesis15:19 tua ngamte sungah Ken te ngam, Keniz te ngam, Kadmon te ngam," 
Genesis15:20 Hit te ngam, Periz te ngam, Rephaim te ngam," 
Genesis15:21 Amor te ngam, Canaan te ngam, Girgash te ngam le Jebus te ngam teng a kihel hi leitang theampo piak tu kong kamciam hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis16:1 Abram zi Sarai in ta khat zongh nei ngawl hi. Ahizong ama in Egypt te Hagar a kici sila numei khat nei hi," 
Genesis16:2 tua ahiciang Sarai in Abram tungah, “ Topa in keima ta hong neisak ngawl hi. Ka silanu taw banghang lumkhawm ngawl tu ni ziam? Ama in kei atu in ta khat hong neisak thei tha tu hi,” ci hi. Abram sia Sarai ii ci bang thukim hi." 
Genesis16:3 Tua ahiciang Sarai in Hagar sia Abram tungah a zino tu in pia hi. (Canaan ngam ah Abram kum 10 a teen zawkciang hi thu piang hi,)" 
Genesis16:4 Abram in Hagar ompui a, ama naungil om hi. Ama in a ngai hunlam a heak ciang, hong kiphasak a, Sarai zawngsak hi." 
Genesis16:5 Tuaciang Sarai in Abram tungah, “Hagar ii hong zawnsakna sia nangma khialna hang hi. Keima mama in nangma tungah ama kong pia a, ama in a ngai hunlam a heak pan kipan, kei hong zawngsak hi. Topa in nang ahibuale kei, akua a maan ci sia thu hong khen tahen,” ci hi." 
Genesis16:6 Abram in, “Pha mama hi, ama sia na sila nu hi a, nangma khutnuai ah om hi; na uuk bang po vawt in,” ci in zo hi. Tua zawkciang Sarai in Hagar vawtsia mama ahikom Hagar tai hi." 
Genesis16:7 Topa vantunglalang sia Shur paina lampi senneal ngamsung ciktui khat ah Hagar taw kisi a," 
Genesis16:8 ama in, “Sarai sila nu Hagar awng, koisung pan hong pai a, koisung zot sawm ni ziam?” ci hi. Ama in, “Ka tonu kung pan a tai ka hi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis16:9 Vantunglalang in, “Na tonu kungah cia kik ta'n a, ama sila ma in om ta'n,” ci hi." 
Genesis16:10 Tua zawkciang ama in, “Suan le paal tam mama kong pia tu a, kuama in sim zo ngawl tu hi." 
Genesis16:11 Tapa khat na nei tu a, a min Ishmael na phuak tu hi, banghang ziam cile thinngim in na kaana Topa in za zo hi." 
Genesis16:12 Ahizong na tapa sia ngamlaa khat taw kibang tu hi, ama in mihingte theampo langpan in, mihingte theampo in zongh, ama langpan tu hi. A mealheakte theampo om ngawlna ah ama teang tu hi, ci hi." 
Genesis16:13 Tuaciang Hagar in, “Pathian a mu tatak khi ziam, tua thu son tu in nungta lai khi ziam?,” ci in ama le ama kidongh hi. Tua ahikom ama a paupui Topa sia, “Hong Mu Pathian khat” ci hi" 
Genesis16:14 Tua ahi hu in mite in Kadesh le Bered kilaklaw ah tuikhuk sia, “A Nungta Hong Mu Pa ii Tuikhuk, ‘Beer Lahai Roi’ ” ci uh hi." 
Genesis16:15 Hagar in Abram taw tapa khat nei a, Abram in a min Ishmael, phuak hi." 
Genesis16:16 Tua hun in, Abram sia kum sawmliat le kum luk pha hi." 
Genesis17:1 Abram kum sawmkua le kum kua a phak ciang ama tungah Topa kilangh a, “Keima in Vaanglianbelpa Pathian ka hi hi. Ka thu hong ni ta'n a, a maan in seam tawntung in." 
Genesis17:2 Nangma taw ka thuciamna ka vawt tu a, suan le paal tam tatak kong pia tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis17:3 Abram sia a maitang lei a phak dong kunsuk a, Pathian in," 
Genesis17:4 “Nang taw hi thuciamna ka vawt hi: nang in minam tam mama te ii taanghpupi na hi tu hi ci in kong kamciam hi. 
Genesis17:5 Na min, Abram hi nawn ngawl tu a, Abraham kici zaw tu hi; banghang ziam cile minam tamte ii taanghpupi tu in kong siam zo hi." 
Genesis17:6 Keima in suan le paal tam mama kong pia tu a, kimkhatte kumpi suak tu hi. Nangma in suan le paal tam mama na nei tu a, amate sia minamte suak tu uh hi." 
Genesis17:7 “Ka kamciam ka kipsak tu a, nangma le na suan na paal khangkikte tungah, tawntung thuciamna hi tu hi. Keima in na Pathian ka hi tu a, na suan na paalte ii Pathian ka hi tu hi." 
Genesis17:8 Tu in ngamdangmi khat bangin na omna hi leitang sia nangma le na suan na paalte tungah kong pia tu hi. Canaan ngam bup sia na suan na paalte in a tawntungin lua tu a, keima in amate ii Pathian ka hi tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis17:9 Pathian in Abraham tungah, “Nangma le na suan na paal khangkikte in keima taw ih thuciamna sia a zui tu in nangma zongh na thukim kul hi." 
Genesis17:10 Nangma le na suan na paalte theampo in no sung pan pa a minpiang ii vunteap at tu na thukim uh kul hi. 
Genesis17:11 Tu pan kipan note sung pan a sua zawk ni liat a pha pano peuma, vunteap ki at tu a, na inn sungsuak silate le ngamdang pan na lei silate zongh kihel tu hi." 
Genesis17:12 Note vunteap ki atna in, no le kei kilaklaw a thuciamna khat a om hunlam lak tu hi." 
Genesis17:13 A mi simin vunteap ki at nanak tu hi, hisia in note taw ka thuciamna kip tawntung hi ci in a lak tu na pumpi tungah limlakna khat hi tu hi." 
Genesis17:14 Pasal a minpiang vunteap a ki at ngawl peuma keima mi khatin kingaisun nawn ngawl tu hi, banghang ziam cile keima taw ka thuciamna ama in paltan hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis17:15 Pathian in Abraham tungah, “Na zi sia Sarai na ci nawn bua het tu hi; tu pan kipan ama min Sarah hi." 
Genesis17:16 Ama thupha ka pia tu a, ama taw tapa khat kong pia tu hi. Ama thupha ka pia tu a, ama in minamte ii nu hi tu hi, tuaciang ama suan le paal sung pan kumpite piang tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis17:17 Abraham sia a maitang lei a phak dong kunsuk a, ahizong hi bang thu teng a ngaisut ciang a nuiza hi; a thinsung ah, “Kum zakhat a pha pasal khat in ta khat nei thei tu ziam? Kum sawmkua a pha Sarah in ta khat nei thei tu ziam?” ci hi." 
Genesis17:18 Ama in Pathian tungah, “Banghangin, Ishmael sia ka inn lua tu suaksak ngawl tu ni ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Genesis17:19 Ahizong Pathian in, “Hi ngawl hi, na zi Sarah in nang atu in tapa khat hong nei tu a, a min Isaac na phuak tu hi. Ama tung ahizong a suan a paalte tung ahizong ka thuciamna sia a tawntungin ka kholet tu hi. Tua in a tawntung a kip thuciamna khat ahi hi." 
Genesis17:20 Ishmael huvau nong ngetna ka za zo hi, tua ahiciang ama thupha ka pia tu a, ta tam mama, suan le paal tam mama ka pia tu hi. Ama in kumpi sawm le nii te ii pa hi tu a, a suan a paalte sia minam lian khatin ka siam tu hi." 
Genesis17:21 Ahizong mai kum tu hun khawng ciangin Sarah sung pan hong suak tu na tapa Isaac taw ka thuciamna ka kholet tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis17:22 Abraham tungah a thuson tu teng a man ciang, Pathian in ama nusia hi." 
Genesis17:23 Tua ni mama in, Abraham in Pathian thu ni a, ama tapa Ishmael, a inn sungsuak pasal dang theampo, a inn sungsuak silate le a lei silate zongh vunteap atsak hi." 
Genesis17:24 Abraham vunteap a ki at lai in kum sawmkua le kum kua pha a," 
Genesis17:25 a tapa Ishmael kum sawm le kum thum pha hi. 
Genesis17:26 Ni khat sungin, amate nii sia" 
Genesis17:27 Abraham ii silate theampo taw vunteap at khawm uh hi. 
Genesis18:1 Topa sia Mamre thingkung thiangthote kungah a om Abraham tungah kilangh hi. Abraham sia a puanbuk kongbiang ah sun nisatbel laitakin to hi," 
Genesis18:2 ama khua a etto le tuak san ah mihing thum a ding mu hi. Ama in amate a mu po ciang kimu tu in tai hi. A maitang lei a phak dong kunsuk in," 
Genesis18:3 ama in, “Syate awng, nong hesuakna in hong baang ngawlin ka inn hong kaantan heak vun; hi sungah note leangna hong do tu in om khi hi." 
Genesis18:4 Na peang sil natu tui kong toai tu a; hi thingkung nuai ah na tawlnga tu uh hi. 
Genesis18:5 An tawm kong pia tu a, tua an in na khualhawna ah hong thahatsak tu hi. Vaang nong piakna taw ka inn hong zuan zo na hi uh ciang, zin hong dosak tavun,” ci hi. Amate in, “Lungdam ung; hong saang khu hi,” ci in zo kik uh hi." 
Genesis18:6 Abraham a puanbuk sungah tai in Sarah tungah, “Na anvui a pha belte ip khat la in anluum in em paih in” ci hi." 
Genesis18:7 Tua zawkciang ama in a nganhon omna ah tai in khuino thau a limcibel khat tealin, a naseampa tungah aap a, neak thei tu in vawtsak memeang hi." 
Genesis18:8 Ama in amate mai ah khuinoai diat, khuinoai, khuisa le an hong lui hi. Ama mama in tualai thingkung nuai ah leangna do in an nesak hi." 
Genesis18:9 Tua zawkciang leangnate in ama tungah, “Na zi Sarah koisung om ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Ama in, “Puanbuk sungah ama om hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis18:10 Amate khat in, “Tu zo tha kua ciang kong pai kik tu a, na zi Sarah in tapa khat nei tu hi,” ci hi. Sarah in a pasal nungsang puanbuk kongkha pan ngai hi." 
Genesis18:11 Abraham le Sarah sia huai mama zo a, Sarah sia a tha sim numei ngeina kang zo hi." 
Genesis18:12 Tua ahikom Sarah ama nguakin nui a, “Tu in kei sia ka kum tamin huai zo a, numei le pa nopsakna nei thei lai tu khi ziam? Ka pasal zongh le huai zo si hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis18:13 Tuasia ciang Topa in Abraham tungah, “Banghang Sarah nui a, ‘Ka kum a haam mama zawkciang ta nei thei takpi lai tu khi ziam?’ banghang ci ziam?" 
Genesis18:14 Na khat pawpo Topa atu in a haksa leilam om na ziam? Kong ci sa bangin tu zo tha kua ciang kong pai kik tu a, Sarah in tapa khat nei tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis18:15 Sarah lau ahikom, tuasia nial hi. Ama in, “Kei ka nui bua hi” ci hi. Ama in, “Ahi ma hi, nui ni hi” ci in zo kik hi." 
Genesis18:16 Tua zawkciang leangnate in nusia a Sodom khua a etsuk thei natu munah pai uh hi, Abraham in amate tha hi." 
Genesis18:17 Tuaciang Topa in, “Ka hi tu thu teng Abraham tungah ka iim buatu hi." 
Genesis18:18 Ama ii suan le paalte minam lian khat le a thahat minam khat suak tu a, ama tungtawnin minam theampo thupha ka pia tu hi." 
Genesis18:19 A tapate le a suan a paalte tungah ka thu ni a, thumaan thutang a vawt natu, thu a piak natu in ama ka teal zo hi. Tuabang a vawt uh le ka kamciamsa bangin ama ta tu ka hisak siat tu hi,” ama le ama kici hi." 
Genesis18:20 Tuasia ciang Topa in Abraham tungah, “Sodom le Gomorrah a kimawsiatna, nasia mama a, a mawna uh lian mama hi." 
Genesis18:21 A kimawsiatna ka zaak teng maan ziam maan ngawl ziam kantel tu in ka paisuk kul tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis18:22 Tua zawkciang Abraham ii leangnate nii sia Sodom sangah pai a, ahizong Topa sia Abraham taw taanglai hi." 
Genesis18:23 Abraham in Topa neak a, “A mawbaang ngawlte a mawte taw susia khawm takpi tu ni ziam?" 
Genesis18:24 Sodom khuapi sungah mawbaang ngawl mihing sawmnga om le khuapi bup lalsak tu ni ziam? Tua sawmnga te huu tu in tua khuapi khoaikhe ngawl tu ni ziam? 
Genesis18:25 Mawbaang ngawlte a mawte taw thatlum khawm ngeingawl het tu ni hi. Tuasia suak thei ngawl hi! Tuabang vawt thei ngawl tu ni hi. Tuabang vawt thong lete a mawte bangma in a mawbaang ngawlte zongh daan thuak tu hi thong hi. Hi thei ngawl tu hi. Leitung theampo ii thukhenpa in thu a maan in a khen kul tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis18:26 Topa in, “Sodom khuapi sungah a mawbaang ngawl mihing sawmnga mu leng, amate hangin khuapi bup ka khoaikhe tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis18:27 Abraham in, “ Topa awng, hi bangin hangsan takin kong ci kik sia nong hesuakna in hong maisak ta'n. Kei mihing khat hi lel a, nang tungah thu khat pawpo son natu thu ka nei bua hi." 
Genesis18:28 Ahihang a mawbaang ngawl mihing sawmnga om zo ngawlin sawmli le nga bek om thei tha tu hi. Mihing nga a kisapna hangin khuapi bup na lalsak veve tu ziam?” ci kik hi. Topa in mimaw ngawl sawmli le nga mu leng tua khuapi ka lalcipsak buatu hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Genesis18:29 Abraham in, “Sawmli bek om le eh!” ci kik hi. Topa in sawmli om le ka lalsak buatu hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Genesis18:30 Abraham in, “ Topa awng, nong hesuakna in na thin uuk heak in a, thu khat kong dongh lai tu hi. Sawmthum bek om le bangbang ahi tu ziam?” ci hi. Ama in, “Sawmthum ka mu le ka lalsak buatu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis18:31 Abraham in, “ Topa awng, nong hesuakna in nang tungah kong ci ngam lalai na hong maisak ta'n. Kul bek kimu luilam le eh!” ci hi. Ama in, “Kul ka mu le khuapi ka lalsak buatu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis18:32 Abraham in, “ Topa awng, nong hesuakna in thin uuk heak in a, khatvei bek hong pausak lai ta'n. Sawm bek kimu le eh?” ci hi. Ama in, “Sawm a om le ka lalsak buatu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis18:33 Abraham taw a thu son tu teng a man zawkciang, Topa paisuak a, Abraham sia inn ah cia kik hi." 
Genesis19:1 Vantunglalangte nii Sodom a thet nitakin khuapi kongpi ah Lot to hi. Lot in, amate a mu po ciang dingin muak hi. Amate mai ah Lot kunin," 
Genesis19:2 “Syate awng note leangna hong do tu in kei hi sungah ka om hi. Nong hesuakna in, ka inn ah hong tung tavun. Na peang uh sil in zan hong ngiak thei tu nu hi. Zingsang ciang tho palin na pai natu uh na pai suak thei tu uh hi,” ci hi. Ahizong amate in, “Hi ngawl hi, khuapi khawlmun ah tu zan ka taam tu uh hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis19:3 Lot in amate kunh top ahikom a khakbel ciang a inn ah zui uh hi. Lot in a naseamte anluum pawlkhat emsak in a zinte anlim vaak hi. 
Genesis19:4 A zinte a lup ma in Sodom te in a inn kiim uum uh hi. Tua munah khuapi sung pan a moi a haam pasal theampo hong pai hi. 
Genesis19:5 Amate in Lot sam a, “Tu nitak na inn ah a taam tu in hong tung pasalte koisungah om ziam? Ko kungah hong pusuaksak ta'n” ci uh hi. Sodom pasalte in amate khialpui nuam hi." 
Genesis19:6 Lot pusuak in innkha kha san hi. 
Genesis19:7 Lot in amate tungah, “Lawmte awng, hong thuum khi hi, hi bang a seksol in ngamta heak vun!" 
Genesis19:8 En vun, ngaknu thiangtho ta numei nii ka nei hi. Note kungah amate kong paipui tu a, na uuk babang vawt thei tu nu hi. Ahizong hi mite bangma lawsak heak vun; keima zinte ahikom ka huuk kul hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis19:9 Ahihang amate in, “Nang ngamdangmi awng, hong pial ta'n! Ko, bang seam tu ci hong sawl sia akua ni ziam? Hong pial ta'n, tua ahibuale amate tung ka vawt tu uh sangin a sia zaw in nang kong vawt tu uh hi,” ci uh hi. Amate in Lot a nungsangah sawnin, innkha sutham tu in pai uh hi." 
Genesis19:10 Ahizong inn sung a om a zinte nii hong thengin amate omna inn sungah Lot kai a, innkha khak uh hi." 
Genesis19:11 Tuaciang amate in innkha a mu thei ngawl natu in innpua sangah a om mi theampo a mit uh tawsak hi. 
Genesis19:12 Tua pasalte nii in Lot tungah, “Hi sungah a dangkhat pawpo — tapate, tanute, maakte — ahibuale khuapi sungah a teang mealheak dangte na nei lai le hi mun panin pusua pui in;" 
Genesis19:13 banghang ziam cile hi mun lalcipsak tu khu hi. Topa in hi mihingte a kimawsakna thute za zo ahikom Sodom khua lalcipsak tu in ko hong puak hi,” ci in son hi." 
Genesis19:14 Tuaciang Lot va pai in a tanute ii a teenpui tu pasal, a maak tute tungah, “Manlang in hi mun pan pai vun; Topa in hi mun lalcipsak tu hi,” ci hi. Ahihang amate in ama ciammui thu son in ngaisun uh hi." 
Genesis19:15 Zingsang khuavak ciang a manlan natu in vantunglalangte in Lot thawn hi. Amate in “Manlang in khuapi a kilalcipsak ciang na suatak thei natu in, na zi le na ta numeite nii taw tai tavun,” ci hi." 
Genesis19:16 Lot sia a thinkaa in om lai hi. Bangbang hikale Topa in ama hesuak hi; tua ahikom tua pasalte in ama, a zi le a tanute nii a khut lenin khuapi pua sangah masuan hi." 
Genesis19:17 Tua zawkciang vantunglalang khat in, “Na nuntak natu in tai vun! Nungsang en kik heak vun a, munkuam ah tawlnga heak vun. Hong kithalup ngawl natu in mualte sangah tai tavun,” ci hi." 
Genesis19:18 Ahizong Lot in, “Hi ngawl hi, syapa awng, tuabangin hong ngamtasak heak in." 
Genesis19:19 Nangma in maipha nong pia zo a, ka nuntakna nong hun zo hi. Ahizong mualte khuala leih hi; lalna siatna in kei hong pha tu a, tua mun ka thet ma ka thi tu hi." 
Genesis19:20 Ngalkhat ah khuano sia na mu ziam? Tua khua sia nai lel hi. Tualai ah hong paisak tan — tua mun sia khuano khat ahi sia na mu thei hi — tua hile ngammuang tu khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis19:21 Ama in, “Pha hi, na ci bangin ka thukim hi. Tua khua ka lalsak buatu hi." 
Genesis19:22 Manlang in! Tai in! Tua khua na thet mateng bangma ka vawt thei buatu hi,” ci in zo hi. Banghang ziam cile Lot in tua khua sia, no hi ci ahikom, a min Zoar kici hi." 
Genesis19:23 Zoar ah Lot a thet ciangin ni suak hi. 
Genesis19:24 Topa in thakhat thu in Sodom le Gomorrah khuapite tungah kaan meikuang zusak a," 
Genesis19:25 tuaciang tua khuapite le a ngamkuam bup laltham in, tua munah a teang mihingte theampo le leitung ah a po theampo mon siat hi." 
Genesis19:26 Ahizong Lot ii zi sia nungsang en kik ahikom cikhuam khat suak hi. 
Genesis19:27 A zing ciang zingtuung in Abraham sia Topa taw a kisik ngeina a dinna munah manlang takin pai hi. 
Genesis19:28 Ama in Sodom le Gomorrah le a ngamkuam bup ensuk a, meiphualpi khat pan meikhu suak taw a kibang, lei pan meikhu a suakto mu hi." 
Genesis19:29 Ahizong Pathian in Lot ii teenna ngamkuam ii khuapite a lalcipsak ciangin a thinsung ah Abraham mangil ngawl ahikom Lot sia suaktasak hi. 
Genesis19:30 Lot in Zoar khua ah teen tu lauhuai sa ahikom a tanute nii taw mualte kawm ah kikhiinto in suanghawng khat sungah teang uh hi. 
Genesis19:31 A unu in a nau tungah, “Ih pa huai zo a, ta ih nei thei natu in leitung bup ah ei hong teenpui tu pasal om ngawl hi." 
Genesis19:32 Hong pai ta'n, ih pa taw lumkhawmin ta hong neipui natu in ih pa sapittui khamsak tawng,” ci hi." 
Genesis19:33 Tua zanin amate in a pa sapittui pia a, a tanu uzaw taw lumin omkhawm hi. Ahizong a pa in sapittui kham leih ahikom a omkhop hunlam he ngawl hi." 
Genesis19:34 A zing ciang a unu in a suapuinu tungah, “Zeini zan in ama taw ka lumkhawm hi; tu nitak zong sapittui ih khamsak kik tu a, nangma taw na lumkhawm tu hi. Tuasia ciang ih unau in ih pa taw ta khat veve ih nei tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis19:35 Tua hi a, tua zanin, a pa sapittui khamsakin, a naunu le a pa lumin khial hi. A pa sapittui kham leih kik ahikom tuasia hunlam he ngawl hi." 
Genesis19:36 Tuabangin Lot ii ta numeite ngeal sia a pa taw naupaai uh hi. 
Genesis19:37 A tanu uzaw in tapa khat nei a, Moab ci in minphuak hi. Ama in tu hun a, Moab te ii pianna taanghpupi ahi hi." 
Genesis19:38 A tanu nozaw zongh in tapa khat nei a, Benammi ci in min phuak hi. Ama in tu hun a Ammon te pianna taanghpupi ahi hi." 
Genesis20:1 Mamre pan Canaan thangsang ah Abraham kikhiin suk a, Kadesh le Shur kilaklaw ah teang hi. Tua zawk Gerar ah a teen lai in," 
Genesis20:2 Abraham in a zi Sarah sia ka suapuinu hi, ci hi. Tua hu in Gerar kumpipa Abimelech in a zi tu in la hi." 
Genesis20:3 Zan khat Abimelech ii mang sungah Pathian kilangh a: “Hi numei na laak hu in, nang na thi tu hi, banghang ziam cile ama in pasal neisa ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis20:4 Ahizong Abimelech in Sarah nai neak ngawl hi, tuaciang ama in, “ Topa awng, kei mawbaang ngawl khi hi. Kei le ka mite hong that tu ni ziam?" 
Genesis20:5 Abraham ama mama in ka suapuinu hi hong ci a, Sarah in tuabang ma hong ci hi. Tua ahikom kithasunna nei ngawlin ngamta ka hi a, ka khial bua hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis20:6 Pathian in a mang sungah, “Hi hi, kithasunna nei ngawlin na ngamtatna thu kong he a; tua ahikom kei tungah nong maw ngawl natu in kong keam a, ama kong thuthasak bua hi." 
Genesis20:7 Ahihang tu in, numeinu sia a pasal aap kik in. A pasal sia kamsaang khat hi a, na thi ngawl natu in thu hong ngetsak tu hi. A zi na pia kik bua ahile nangma a kipan na mite theampo na thi siat natu thu kong telkholsak hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Genesis20:8 A zing ciang zingsang tuungin Abimelech in a uliante samin, thupiang teng son a, amate lau mama uh hi." 
Genesis20:9 Tua zawkciang Abimelech in Abraham samin, “Kote tungah bang teng hong vawt ni ziam? Kei le ka kumpi ngam sungah hi siatna nong tunsak natu in nang tungah bang khialna hong vawt khi ziam? Kei tungah nong vawt bangin kuama in hong vawt ngeingawl hi." 
Genesis20:10 Banghangin hi bang hong vawt ni ziam?” ci in dongh hi. 
Genesis20:11 Abraham in, “Hi sungah Pathian a thasia khat zongh om ngawl tu ahikom ka zi a dei manin kei hong thatlum tu hi, ci in ka ngaisun hi." 
Genesis20:12 Ama sia ka suapuinu tatak hi; pa khat ii ta ka hi uh a, ka nu uh kibang ngawl ahikom ka teenpui hi." 
Genesis20:13 Pathian in ka pa inn pan ngamdang ah hong pusuaksak ahiciangin Sarah tungah, ‘Kei sia mi theampo tungah ka suapuipa hi nong cina taw kei tungah na thumaanna nong lak thei tu hi,’ ka ci sa hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis20:14 Tuaciang Abimelech in Abraham tungah Sarah aap kik a, tuu, khui le silate taw zong pia khawm hi." 
Genesis20:15 Ama in Abraham tungah, “Hi ngam bup keima aa hi; na ukna po ah teang in,” ci hi." 
Genesis20:16 Ama in Sarah tungah, “Na suapuipa tungah ngunntang tulkhat ka pia hi; nang taw a om mi theampo mai ah mawbaang ngawl na hina, a kilak natu hi a; khialna bangma vawt ngawl hi, ci in a kuama po in hong he tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis20:17 Abraham ii zi Sarah tungah tubang teng a pian hu in, Topa in Abimelech inn sung a om numei theampo, ta a nei thei ngawl tu in vawt hi. Tua ahiciang Abraham in Abimelech atu thu ngetsakin, Pathian in ama damsak hi. Amate in hin le toaite a nei thei natu in a zi le a sila numeite zongh damsak siat hi." 
Genesis20:18  
Genesis21:1 A kamciamsa bangin Topa in Sarah thupha pia hi," 
Genesis21:2 tuaciang Sarah naupaai in Abraham huai zawkciang ama atu tapa khat nei hi. Tua tapano sia Pathian in ama piang tu a ci hun ma in suak hi. 
Genesis21:3 Abraham in a tapa min Isaac phuak hi," 
Genesis21:4 tuaciang Pathian thupiak bangin Isaac ni liat a phak ciang Abraham in a vunteap atsak hi. 
Genesis21:5 Isaac a sua in Abraham kum zakhat pha hi. 
Genesis21:6 Sarah in, “Pathian in lungnopna le nuina hong pia zo hi. Hi thu a za peuma in hong nuipui tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis21:7 Tua zawkciang, “Sarah in patangte noaitui taw vaakin a omh tu hi, ci in akua in Abraham tungah son ngei natu ziam? Ahizong a huai ciang ama atu in tapa khat ka nei zo hi,” Sarah in ci thua hi." 
Genesis21:8 Nauno hong khang a, noai a kitensak ni in Abraham in anneakpoai lian khat vawt hi." 
Genesis21:9 Ni khat ni in, Egypt mi Hagar ii Abraham atu a nei a tapa Ishmael le Sarah tapa Isaac kimai hi." 
Genesis21:10 Sarah in amate a mu ciang Abraham tungah, “Hi sila numei le a tapa hawlkhia in. Ka tapa Isaac ii lua tu nei le lamh khen khat zongh hisia nu ii tapa in nga thei ngawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis21:11 Tua in Abraham thinngimsak mama hi, banghang ziam cile Ishmael zongh ama ta ma ahi hi." 
Genesis21:12 Ahizong Pathian in Abraham tungah, “Hi tapano sia le na sila Hagar huvau in thinngim heak in. Sarah hong ci bang pawpo in seam in; banghang ziam cile kong kamciamsa suan le paalte Isaac tungtawnin na nei tu hi." 
Genesis21:13 Na silanu ii tapa tung zongh ah amate minam khat a suak tu in ta tam mama ka pia tu hi. Ama zongh nangma tapa ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis21:14 A zing ciang zingtuung in, Abraham in Hagar tungah an pawl khat le savun thawl khat dim tui pia hi. Ama in a tapa, a nu nungzaang ah suanhin paikhiasak hi. Hagar pai in Beersheba duisung tengah vak kawkoai hi." 
Genesis21:15 A tui ken teng a bo ciang ama in sawlpaang nuai khat ah a tapa nusia a," 
Genesis21:16 meter zakhat bang a khuala na mun khat ah tosuk hi. Ama le ama, “Ka tapa a thi ka en ngam buatu hi,” ci hi. Tualai ah to in kap hi." 
Genesis21:17 Pathian in patang kaana aw za hi. Pathian vantunglalang in vantung pan Hagar paupui a, “Hagar awng, bang in nang hong thinngimsak ziam? Lau heak in! Pathian in patang kaana aw za zo hi." 
Genesis21:18 Ding in, pai in a, ama la in va theam ta'n. Ama ii suan le paal sia minam lian khat ka suaksak tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis21:19 Tua zawkciang Pathian in Hagar mit vaaksak a, ama in tuikhuk khat mu hi. Ama pai in savun tuithawl sia dim a, pawlkhat tua patang pia hi." 
Genesis21:20 Patang sia hong khangin Pathian in ompui hi; ama Paran dui sungah teang a, savai thiam khat suak hi." 
Genesis21:21 A nu in Egypt numei khat a zi tu in zonsak hi. 
Genesis21:22 Tua hun in Abimelech sia a ngalkaphonpi ukpa Phicol taw Abraham kungah pai in, “Na nasepna theampo ah Pathian in hong ompui hi." 
Genesis21:23 Tua ahikom keima, ka tate ahibuale, ka suan ka paalte kong theam buatu hi ci in hisung Pathian mai ah kiciamna khat vawt in. Nang tungah kong thumaan zo hi, tua ahiciang kei tung le na teenna hi ngam zong ah nong thumaan natu in kamciam hong pia ta'n,” ci hi." 
Genesis21:24 Abraham in, “Kamciam kong pia hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis21:25 Abimelech naseamte ii a sutol tuikhuk khat taw kisai, Abraham in a lungkim ngawlna thu Abimelech tungah son hi." 
Genesis21:26 Abimelech in, “Akua in hong sut ziam, ka he bua hi. Nangma nong son bua a, tu a sia ka zaak ciilna hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis21:27 Tuaciang Abraham in tuu le khui pawlkhat Abimelech pia in, amate nii in thukimna khat vawt uh hi." 
Genesis21:28 Abraham in a tuuhon sung panin tuuno sali tuamkoi hi," 
Genesis21:29 tuaciang Abimelech in ama tungah, “Banghang tuabang hi ni ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Genesis21:30 Abraham in, “Hi tuuno salite hong sang ta'n. Hi bang nong saanna in hi tuikhuk a to sia keima ka hina thu nong pualaak na ahi hi” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis21:31 Tua ahikom in tua mun sia, Beersheba kici hi, banghang ziam cile amate nii tua munah kiciamna khat vawt uh hi." 
Genesis21:32 Beersheba ah hi thukimna a vawt zawk uh ciang, Abimelech le Phicol, Philistia ah cia kik uh hi." 
Genesis21:33 Tuaciang Abraham in Beersheba ah makeang kung khat suan a, Tawntung Pathian, Topa bia hi." 
Genesis21:34 Philistia ngam ah Abraham khuangei ma teang hi. 
Genesis22:1 Hun khat zawkciang Pathian in Abraham ze et a; “Abraham awng!” ci in sam hi. Tuasia ciang Abraham in, “Hi khi hi, keima hi sungah om ing,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis22:2 Pathian in, “Na it mama, tapa khat bek na nei Isaac sia Moriah ngam ah paipui in. Tualai kong lak tu mual khat tungah keima biakpiakna in ama nong pia tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis22:3 A zing ciang zingsang tuungin Abraham in biakpiak natu in thing pawlkhat tan a, a laa tungah suanh in a tapa Isaac le a naseamte nii taw, Pathian ii sawlna munah pai tu in ding uh hi." 
Genesis22:4 A ni thum ni ciangin Abraham in tua mun ngalmu hi. 
Genesis22:5 Tuaciang ama in a naseamte tungah, “Hi lai ah laa taw na om vun. Kei le ka tapa sia zialai ah Pathian ka bia tu uh a, tua zawkciang kong cia kik tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis22:6 Abraham in biakpiak natu thing teng Isaac in puasak a, ama in nam khat le meitaw natu meikam keng hi. Amate a pata a paikhop kawkawm in" 
Genesis22:7 Isaac in, “Pa awng!” ci hi. A pa in, “Bang ziam ka ta awng,” ci in zo hi. Isaac in, “Mei le thing na ken ka mu a, ahizong biakpiak natu tuuno koisungah om ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Genesis22:8 Abraham in, “Pathian in hong sik tu hi,” ci in zo hi. Tuaciang amate pata pai khawkhawm uh hi." 
Genesis22:9 Pathian ii a sonkholna mun a thet ciang, Abraham in biaknatau khat vawt a, a tungah thing koi hi. Ama in a tapa heencip in biaknatau tung thing tungah koi hi." 
Genesis22:10 Tuaciang ama in a tapa thatlum tu in a nam dok hi. 
Genesis22:11 Ahizong Topa vantunglalang in vantung pan, “Abraham awng, Abraham awng!” ci in sam hi. Ama in, keima hi sungah om ing,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis22:12 Vantunglalang in, “Patangpa sia liamsua heak in, ama bangma law heak in. Pathian thu na nitna le na zatakna, tu in ka he hi, banghang ziam cile tapa khat bek na nei kei atu in na haza bua hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis22:13 Abraham khuadak kawkoai a, sawlpaang sungah a kii pan a awk tuutal khat mu hi. Ama pai in tua tuutal man a, a tapa taangin meihal biakpiakna khatin pia hi." 
Genesis22:14 Abraham in tua mun sia, Topa in hong sik hi “Jehovah Jireh” ci in min phuak hi. Tuni dong ciang mihingte in “ Topa ii mual tungah ama in hong sik hi,” ci uh hi." 
Genesis22:15 Topa vantunglalang in vantung pan Abraham a nii veina sam a," 
Genesis22:16 “ Topa cina ah — Keima min taw kiciamna khat ka vawt hi — thupha tam tatak kong pia tu hi. Banghang ziam cile hisia na vawt zo a, na tapa khat bek na nei kei atu in na haza bua hi," 
Genesis22:17 na suan na paalte van ah aksi za, tuipivaal senvui za in tam mama ka phasak tu hi, ci in kamciam kong pia hi. Na suan na paalte in a ngalte zo tu uh hi." 
Genesis22:18 Nangma suan le paalte tungah thupha ka piak bangin minam theampo in thupha ka piak tu hong ngen tu uh hi — tu teng sia nangma in ka thupiak na nit hang ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis22:19 Abraham sia a naseamte kungah cia kikin, Abraham teenna mun ahi, Beersheba ah amate taw ciakhawm tek uh hi." 
Genesis22:20 Hun khat zawkciang Abraham in, a suapuipa Nahor in a zi Milcah taw ta liat a neina thu he hi." 
Genesis22:21 Uz sia a piang phit hi a, a suapuite sia Buz, Aram ii pa Kemuel," 
Genesis22:22 Chesed, Hazo, Pildash, Jidlaph le Bethuel ahi hi," 
Genesis22:23 Bethuel sia Rebecca ii pa ahi hi. Milcah in Abraham suapuipa Nahor taw hi tapa liat teng nei hi. 
Genesis22:24 Nahor zino Reumah in ta, Tebah, Gaham, Tahash le Maacah te nei hi." 
Genesis23:1 Sarah sia kum 127 nungta hi. 
Genesis23:2 Canaan ngam Hebron ah ama thi a, Abraham khuangai hi." 
Genesis23:3 Ama in tua mun a zi luang kisialna nusia in, Hit te kungah pai a," 
Genesis23:4 “Keima in note sungah ngamdangmi hong teang khat ka hi a; ka zi ka phum thei natu in, leitang tawm hong zuak tavun,” ci hi." 
Genesis23:5 Amate in," 
Genesis23:6 Syapa awng, kote ci bang hong ngai ta'n. Nangma in kote sungah lampui thahat khat in hong mu khu hi; ka thaan nei uh a phabel sungah na zi phum in. Na zi phum thei natu thaan ahile kote khat pawpo in hong pia thanuam khu hi,” ci in zo uh hi." 
Genesis23:7 Tuasia ciang Abraham in amate mai ah kunin," 
Genesis23:8 “Hi munah ka zi nong phumsak nuam uh le nong hesuakna in Zohar tapa Ephron tungah," 
Genesis23:9 Machpelah Suanghawng hong zuak natu in hong ngetsak tavun, tuasia ama lo king ah om hi. Thaan leitang ka nei thei natu in, note theampo mai ah, a manh a cing taw kei hong zuak natu in hong ngetsak tavun,” ci hi." 
Genesis23:10 Hit te kikhoptua na khuapi kongbiang ah Ephron zongh om hi; tua mun a omte theampo ii zaakin a zona pan," 
Genesis23:11 “Syapa awng, hong ngai ta'n; suanghawng omna tua ka lo buppi nang kong pia tu hi. Hi munah a om, ka mipuite ii mai ah tua ka lo sungah na zi na phum thei natu nang tungah kong pia tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis23:12 Ahizong, Hit te mai ah Abraham kun a," 
Genesis23:13 mi theampo zaak tu in Ephron tungah, “Hesuakna taw hong ngai ta'n. Na lociing bup kong lei tu hi. A manh kong piak za hong saang ta'n, tuaciang tua munah ka zi ka phum tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis23:14 Ephron in," 
Genesis23:15 “Syapa awng, tua leitang in ngunntang zali bek manh a — nang le kei kilaklaw ah son thamman na ziam? Tua munah na zi phum ta'n,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis23:16 Mipite zaak a, Ephron ii a sonna bang Abraham thukim in — sumzuakte ii a teena in a zak ngei toaisuangte zanghin ngunntang 400 pia hi." 
Genesis23:17 Tuabangin, Mamre nisuana sang, Ephron ii neisa Machpelah longam sia Abraham neisa suak hi. A lo bup le lo sungah a om suanghawng le thingkung theampo kihel in ama ii neisa hi siat hi." 
Genesis23:18 Tua munah a kikhawm Hit te theampo in Abraham neisa a hina thu heakpui siat uh hi. 
Genesis23:19 Tua zawkciang Abraham in Canaan ngamsung tua suanghawng ah a zi Sarah phum hi. 
Genesis23:20 Tua hi a, Hit te neisa ahi tua lo le suanghawng sia thaan mun khat tu in Abraham neisa suak hi." 
Genesis24:1 Tu in Abraham huai mama a, Topa in a sepna theampo ah thupha pia hi." 
Genesis24:2 Ama in a neisa theampo a uk, a naseam haambelpa tungah, “Ka phei kawmah na khut koi in a, kiciam in." 
Genesis24:3 Hi sung a, Canaan mihingte sung pan ka tapa zi tu na teal ngawl natu in, vantung le leitung Pathian Topa min taw na kiciam tu ka dei hi." 
Genesis24:4 Ka pianna ngam ah pai kikin, ka beete sung pan ka tapa Isaac zi tu na pui tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis24:5 Ahizong a naseampa in, “A numei in a inn nusia nuam ngawlin hi ngam ah kei hong zui nuam buathong le banglaw tu khi ziam? Nong paina ngam ah na tapa puak kik tu khi ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Genesis24:6 Abraham in, “Tualai ah ka tapa na paipui thak ngawl natu, in kidawm in!" 
Genesis24:7 Vantung Pathian, Topa in ka pa inn pan le ka beete ngam pan hong paipui a, ama in ka suan ka paalte tungah hi ngam kong pia tu hi, ci in ciliaphuai takin kamciam hong pia hi. Tualai ah ka tapa atu zi khat na nga thei natu in ama in na mai ah ama ii vantunglalang sia sawl tu hi." 
Genesis24:8 A numei in hong zui nuam bua ahile hi kamciam panin, nang na suakta tu hi. Bangbang po ahizong tua munah ka tapa na heak pui kik ngei buatu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis24:9 Tuaciang a naseampa in, a topa Abraham ii phei kawmah a khut koi in Abraham ci bang seam tu in kiciam hi." 
Genesis24:10 Abraham neisa a uk, a naseampa in a topa kalaoh sawm la in, Mesopotamia saksang Nahor teenna khuapi ah pai hi." 
Genesis24:11 A thet ciang khuapi puasang tuikhuk ah a kalaohte khupdinsak hi. Tua hun in nikai zawk nitak sang hi a, numeite pusuak in a tuitoai hun ahi hi." 
Genesis24:12 Ama thungen a, “Ka topa Abraham ii Pathian, Topa awng, ka topa tung na kamciam kholet in tuni in hong taangtungsak ta'n." 
Genesis24:13 Hi sung, ka omna mun tuikhuk ah khuapi sung pan ngaknunote tuitoai in hong pai tu uh hi." 
Genesis24:14 Keima in amate khat ii tungah, ‘Tui hong nesak ta'n, hesuakna taw na tuibeal niamsuksak in,’ ka ci tu hi. ‘Ne in, na kalaohte atu zongh tui kana toai tu hi,’ hong ci le tua nu sia, na naseampa Isaac atu in na teal kholsa numei hi tahen. Hi bangin hong hi takpi le ka topa tungah na kamciam na kholetna kong tel tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis24:15 A thunget a man ma in, a liangko ah tuibeal a pua Rebecca hong theng hi. Tua nusia, Abraham suapuipa Nahor le a zi Milcahte ii tapa Bethuel ii tanu ahi hi." 
Genesis24:16 Tua nu sia, ngaknu thiangtho hi lai in, a mealpha mama ngaknuno khat hi. Ama tuikhuk ah tuaksuk a, a beal tui dimin hong kaato kik hi." 
Genesis24:17 Naseampa, tua nu taw kimu tu in tai a, “Hesuakna taw na tuibeal sung panin ka neak tu tui hong pia ta'n,” ci hi." 
Genesis24:18 Ama in, “Ne in, syapa awng” ci in, a liangko pan a tuibeal niamsuksak paih a, tui a neak laitakin letsak hi." 
Genesis24:19 Ama, tui a neak zawkciang, Rebecca in, “Na kalaohte ii a du zaza a neak tu tui zongh ka na toai tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis24:20 Ama in, a tuibeal taw tuitoai in ngan tui piakna kuang sungah sung memeang in, tuikhuk ah tui nawnin tai a, ama ii kalaohte theampo tui a kham mateng tui toaisak hi."
