Genesis24:21 Tua pa huthe ngawlin, Topa in hong taangtungsak tu ahi katawm maw, ci in ama encik nginge hi." 
Genesis24:22 Ngaknu nu sia tua teng a man zawkciang, tua pa in a manham khamh kual khat la in, ama naak ah baasak a, khamh hak lian nii zongh la in a baan ah bunsak hi." 
Genesis24:23 Ama in, “Na pa akua ziam, nong hesuakna hong son ta'n, na pa inn ah tu zan ka mite le keima ngia natu mun a om tu ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Genesis24:24 “Ka pa sia Nahor le Milcah ii tapa Bethuel ahi hi. 
Genesis24:25 Koma inn ah na ngannote atu taangphaw le lopa ko tam mama om a, na ngia natu mun zongh om hi,” ci in ama in zo hi." 
Genesis24:26 Tuasia ciang tua pa khupdin in Topa bia hi. 
Genesis24:27 Ama in, “Ka topa Abraham ii Pathian, Topa kipok tahen. Topa in ka topa Abraham tungah a kamciam sia thumaan takin kholet zo hi. Ka topa Abraham ii beete kungah Topa in hong masuan hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis24:28 Ngaknu nu sia a nu inn ah tai a, thupiang theampo son hi." 
Genesis24:29 Tu in Rebecca ii suapuipa Laban sia Abraham ii naseampa omna tuikhuk ah pai tu in tai hi. 
Genesis24:30 Laban in a suapuinu naakba le a baan tungah haakte mu zo a, tua pa in Rebecca tungah a son teng a zaaksa hi. Ama sia a kalaohte kung tuikhuk ah a ding Abraham naseampa kungah pai in," 
Genesis24:31 “Kei taw inn ah cia tawng. Nang sia Topa ii thupha piakpa khat na hi hi. Banghangin hi lai ah ding ni ziam? Ka inn ah nangma om natu inndoi khat le na kalaohte om natu mun om hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis24:32 Tua ahiciang tua pa inn sungah tum a, Laban in kalaohte vanh sua in, kalaohte taangphaw le lopa ko pia hi. Tua zawkciang ama in Abraham naseampa le a mite peang sil natu tui paipui hi." 
Genesis24:33 An a kilui ciang tua pa in, “Kong son tu teng kong son phot mateng an ka ne buatu hi,” ci hi. Laban in, “Na thuson zom in,” ci hi." 
Genesis24:34 Ama kipan in, “Keima sia Abraham naseampa khi hi." 
Genesis24:35 Topa in ka topa nasia takin thupha pia a, a hau khat suaksak hi. Ama in, tuuhon, kealhon, khuihon, ngunn, khamh, sila pate le sila numeite, kalaohte le laate pia hi." 
Genesis24:36 Ka topa ii zi Sarah a huai zawkciang ka topa atu tapa khat nei a, tua tapa tungah ka topa in a neisa theampo pia hi." 
Genesis24:37 Ka topa in ama ii thupiak a zui tu in hong kiciamsak hi. Ama in, ‘Canaan ngam numeite sung pan ka tapa zi tu na teal buatu hi." 
Genesis24:38 Tua sangin, ka pa ii mipuite le ka beete kungah na pai tu a, ama zi tu na teal tu hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Genesis24:39 Tuaciang, keima in ka topa tungah, ‘A numei in kei hong zui nuam buathong le banglaw tu khi ziam?’ ci in ka dongh hi." 
Genesis24:40 Ama in, ‘A thu ka nit tawntung Topa in na koppui tu a vantunglalang hong paisak tu a nangma hong taangtungsak tu hi. Nangma in ka mipuite, ka pa innkuan sung panin ka tapa zi tu na nga tu hi." 
Genesis24:41 Na kiciamna pan na ton natu lampi khat bek om hi: ka beete kungah na pai ciangin amate in nang hong nial le tuasia ciang nang na tong tu hi,’ ci in hong zo hi." 
Genesis24:42 “Tuni in, tuikhuk kung ka thet ciang, ka thungetna in, ‘Ka topa Abraham ii Pathian Topa awng, nong hesuakna in ka sep tu teng hong taangtungsak ta'n." 
Genesis24:43 Hi sung tuikhuk ah om khi hi. Ngaknu khat tuitoai tu hong pai ciang a tuibeal sung pan tui neak tu hong piak natu in ka ngen tu hi. 
Genesis24:44 Ama lungkim in, ka kalaohte atu zongh tui hong pia le, tua nu sia ka topa tapa ii zi tu in na tealsa sia hisak in,’ ka ci hi." 
Genesis24:45 Thim dide a ka thunget ka man ma in, Rebecca in a liangko tungah tuibeal pua in hong pai a, tuitoai tu in tuikhuk ah hong tuaksuk hi. Keima in ama tungah, ‘Nong hesuakna in ka neak tu tui hong pia ta'n,’ ka ci hi." 
Genesis24:46 Ama in, manlang takin a liangko pan a tuibeal niamsakin, ‘Ne in, na kalaohte zongh tui ka pia tu hi,’ hong ci hi. Tua ahiciang kei zongh tui ne a, ka kalaohte zongh ama in tui pia hi." 
Genesis24:47 Keima in ama tungah, ‘Na pa akua ziam?’ ci in ka dongh hi. Ama in, ‘Ka pa sia Nahor le Milcah ii tapa Bethuel ahi hi,’ ci in hong zo hi. Tuasia ciangin, a naak ah naakba ka khai a, a baante tungah haakte ka bunsak hi." 
Genesis24:48 Khupdin in Topa ka bia hi. Ka topa Abraham ii Pathian, Topa ka pok hi. Ama in ka topa ii beepa kung ma ah hong masuan zo a, hi lai ah ka topa ii tapa atu a tanu ka mu zo hi." 
Genesis24:49 Tu in hi bang ka topa tungah vaipuak na nei teng na khuangkhim tu na ngaisun uh a, ama tungah a kilawm bangin vawt na sawm uh le nong hesuakna in hong son tavun; hi thei bo na ci uh le zong hong son tavun, tua hile ka nasep tu zia ka khensat tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis24:50 Laban le Bethuel in, “Hi thu Topa kung pan hong pai ahiciang, kote khensat tu hi ngawl hi." 
Genesis24:51 Hi sungah Rebecca om hi; ama ciapui tavun. Topa mama ii cisa bangin na topa tapa ii zi hi tahen,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis24:52 Abraham naseampa in hi thu teng a zaak ciang, kunsuk in Topa bia hi." 
Genesis24:53 Tua zawkciang ama ii ken nikteen puansilh, ngunn le khamh kizepna teng sua khia in Rebecca pia hi. A suapuipa le a nu zongh a manham letsongte pia lai hi." 
Genesis24:54 Tuasia zawkciang Abraham ii naseampa le a mite anne tuidawn in, tua munah zan ngiak uh hi. Amate zingsang a thaw uh ciangin ama in, “Ka topa kungah hong ciasak kik tavun,” ci hi." 
Genesis24:55 Ahizong, Rebecca suapuipa le a nu in, “Ngaknu nu taw nipi khat ahibuale ni sawm hong omkhawmsak lai ta'n, tua zawkciang hong cia thei tu hi,” ci uh hi." 
Genesis24:56 Ahizong ama in, “Kote hong taamsak heak vun. Topa in ka khualhawna hong zosak hi; ka topa kungah hong cia kiksak tavun,” ci hi." 
Genesis24:57 Amate in, “Ngaknu nu samin ama in bang a ci ziam, ih dongh tel tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis24:58 Tua ahiciang amate in Rebecca samin, “Hi pasalpa na zui paih nuam ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Ama in, “Ka zui paih nuam hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis24:59 Tua ahikom amate in Rebecca le a innkuan ii naseam ngei sia nu zongh Abraham ii naseampa le a mite taw paisak uh hi. 
Genesis24:60 Tuaciang amate in hi bangin Rebecca thupha pia uh hi: “Suapui nu, nang, a tul a thente ii nu suak ta'n! Na suan na paalte in, a ngalte ii khuapite zo tahen!”" 
Genesis24:61 Tua zawkciang Rebecca le a numei khangmoite Abraham ii naseampa taw paikhawm tu in, kithoai a, kalaoh tungah to uh hi. Tuaciang amate vaiding siat uh hi." 
Genesis24:62 Isaac sia, “A Nungta Hong Mu Pa ii Tuikhuk” a kici duisung ah pai in Canaan thangsang ah teang hi." 
Genesis24:63 Nikai zawk nitak sangin a lo sungah lam a seau le kalaohte hong pai mu hi. 
Genesis24:64 Rebecca in Isaac a mu ciang a kalaoh tung pan tuaksuk a," 
Genesis24:65 Abraham ii naseampa tungah, “Lo sungah lamseau a, ei sang hong zuan pa akua ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Naseampa in, “Ama sia ka topa hi,” ci in zo hi. Tua ahiciang ama in, a mai khuna puan la in, a mai khu hi." 
Genesis24:66 Naseampa in Isaac tungah a nasepna theampo son siat hi. 
Genesis24:67 Tua zawkciang Isaac in a nu Sarah teenna ngei tuipuanbuk sungah Rebecca paipui in ama sia a zi hong suak hi. Isaac in Rebecca it a, tua ahikom a nu thi huvau in ama a kihenepna suak hi." 
Genesis25:1 Abraham in zi dang khat nei a, a min Keturah ahi hi." 
Genesis25:2 Ama taw ta Zimran, Jokshan, Medan, Midian, Ishbak le Shuah nei hi." 
Genesis25:3 Jokshan sia Sheba le Dedan ii pa hi a, Dedan ii suan le paalte sia Asshurim, Letushim le Leummim te ahi hi." 
Genesis25:4 Midian tapate sia Ephah, Epher, Hanoch, Abida le Eldaah ahi uh hi. Hite theampo sia Keturah ii suan le paalte ahi hi." 
Genesis25:5 Abraham in a neisa theampo Isaac nusiat hi. 
Genesis25:6 Ahizong ama nuntak sungin zi dangte taw a nei a tapate tungah letsongte pia hi. Tua zawkciang hi a tapate sia a tapa Isaac kung panin a khuala nisuana ngam ah paisak hi. 
Genesis25:7 Abraham sia kum 175 a phak ciang thi hi. 
Genesis25:8  
Genesis25:9 A ta Isaac le Ishmael te in Mamre nisuana sangah a om, Hit mi Zohar ii tapa Ephron ii lo sung, Machpelah Suanghawng sungah ama phum uh hi." 
Genesis25:10 Tua lo sia Hit te tung pan Abraham ii a lei hi a; Abraham le a zi Sarah tua munah kiphum khawm hi. 
Genesis25:11 Abraham thi zawkciang, “A Nungta Hong Mu Pa ii Tuikhuk” nai ah a teang a tapa Isaac sia Pathian in thupha pia hi." 
Genesis25:12 Abraham ii zi Sarah ii sila nu ahi, Egypt mi Hagar ii Abraham taw a nei Ishmael in" 
Genesis25:13 amate ii suana taw kizui in a nuai a bang tapate nei hi: Nebaioth, Kedar, Adbeel, Mibsam," 
Genesis25:14 Mishma, Dumah, Massa," 
Genesis25:15 Hadad, Tema, Jetur, Naphish le Kedemah ahi hi." 
Genesis25:16 Amate sia minam sawm le nii te ii taanghpupite hi a, amate minte la in khuanote le ngiaphual munte ii min in a kipia ahi hi." 
Genesis25:17 Ishmael sia kum 137 a phak ciang thi hi. 
Genesis25:18 Ishmael ii suan le paalte sia Egypt nisuana sang Assyria paina lampi, Havilah le Shur kilaklaw ah teang uh hi. Abraham suan le paal dangte taw kikhenin a tuamin teang uh hi." 
Genesis25:19 Hi teng sia Abraham ii tapa Isaac ii taanghthu ahi hi. 
Genesis25:20 Isaac sia, Laban suapuinu, (Mesopotamia ngam Arameante) Bethuel tanu Rebecca taw a kiteen in kum sawmli pha hi." 
Genesis25:21 Rebecca in ta nei ngawl ahikom Isaac in Topa tungah thungetsak hi. Topa in ama thungetna zo a, Rebecca naupaai hi." 
Genesis25:22 Ama in naupeang nei tu a, a sua ma in a naubu sungah amate khat le khat kihau hi. Ama in, “Banghangin kei tungah hi bang thu hong piang thong ziam?” ci hi. Tua ahiciang ama in Topa kungah pai in, ahang dongh hi." 
Genesis25:23 Topa in ama ii tungah “Minam nii na sungah om a; A kidem minam niite nang sung pan piang tu hi. Khat sia a dang khat sangin hat zaw tu a; A u zaw in a nau zaw sia ii na sepsak tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis25:24 A nau sua hun hong cing a, ama in tapa peang nei hi." 
Genesis25:25 A suak masa sia a ci san a, a vun sia mul nei puantual taw kibang hi, tua ahikom a min Esau kiphuak hi." 
Genesis25:26 A niina pa in Esau khuatul len cinten sa in hong suak ahikom ama min Jacob kiphuak hi. Amate a sua lai in Isaac kum sawmluk pha hi. 
Genesis25:27 Tua patangte hong khang a, Esau sia ngamsung vak a uuk sakap thiam khat suak hi. Ahizong Jacob sia mihing cinghkamh khat hi a, inn ah om hi." 
Genesis25:28 Isaac in Esau ii a samatte ii sa nene ahikom Esau diksa zaw a, ahizong Rebecca in Jacob diksa zaw hi." 
Genesis25:29 Ni khat Jacob in be mee huanin a om laitak Esau a savaina pan hong theng hi. Ama a ngilkial a," 
Genesis25:30 Jacob tungah, “Ngilkial in pukhong khi hi; na meetui san tawm hong pia ta'n,” ci hi. (Tua ahikom ama Edom kici hi.)" 
Genesis25:31 Jacob in, “Tapaciil hina taw na nga na innluaza hong pia lete kong pia tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis25:32 Esau in, “Hi hen! A thi tu ka hi hi; tua ahiciang ka innluaza bang a mang tu khi ziam?” ci hi." 
Genesis25:33 Jacob in, “Ka innluaza hong pia tu khi hi ci in kiciam masa in,” ci in zo hi. Esau kiciam in a taciil innluaza Jacob tungah pia hi." 
Genesis25:34 Tuaciang Jacob in anluum pawlkhat le antui pawlkhat Esau pia hi. Esau in a an le antuite ne in, dawnin, tua zawkciang dingto in paisan hi. Esau in taciil a hina innluaza a awlmawk ngawlna sia tu a bang ahi hi." 
Genesis26:1 Abraham hun lai in kialpi masa a tun bek dom ngawlin tua ngam sungah kialpi dangkhat tung hi. Philistine kumpi Abimelech kung Gerar ah Isaac pai hi. 
Genesis26:2 Isaac kungah Topa kilangh a, “Egypt ah pai heak in; om a kong sonna mun hi ngam sungah om po in." 
Genesis26:3 Hi lai ah teang in, nang taw kong omkhawm tu a, thupha kong pia tu hi. Nang le na suan na paalte tungah hi ngam theampo kong pia tu hi. Na pa Abraham tungah ka kamciam ka kholet tu hi." 
Genesis26:4 Na suan na paalte van ah aksi za in, ka tamsak tu a, amate tungah hi ngam theampo ka pia tu hi. Na suan na paalte thupha ka piak bangin leitung minam theampo in thupha ka piak natu kei tungah hong ngen tu uh hi." 
Genesis26:5 Abraham in ka thu ni a, ka thukhamte le ka thupiakte theampo kholet ahikom, nangma thupha kong pia tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis26:6 Tua ahiciang Isaac sia Gerar ah teang hi. 
Genesis26:7 Tua munah om mite in a zi taw kisai thu a dok ciang, ka suapuinu hi, ci hi. Ama in ka zi ci ngam ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile Rebecca sia a mealpha mama a, tua mite in Rebecca a nga nop manin, ama a thalup tu lau hi." 
Genesis26:8 Tualai ah Isaac tawmvei sung a om zawkciang Abimelech kumpipa in a khelki pan khua a etsuk le, Isaac le Rebecca a kino laitak mu hi." 
Genesis26:9 Abimelech in Isaac samsak a, “Rebecca sia na zi hi! Banghangin ka suapuinu hi ci ni ziam?” ci hi. Ama in, “Ama ka zi hi ci leng kei hong kithatlum tu ci in ka ngaisun hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis26:10 Abimelech in, “Ko tungah banghang hi bang hong vawt ni ziam? Ka mite khat in olno takin na zi luppui thong le ko mawna sia nangma hang ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis26:11 Abimelech in mihingte theampo kidop natu thupia a: “Hisia pa ahizong, a zi ahizong a vawtsia peuma, kithatlum tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis26:12 Isaac in tua leitang ah thaicii poai a, tua kum in a thaicii poai za sangin a za zakhat in an a tamzaw la hi, banghang ziam cile Topa in ama thupha pia hi." 
Genesis26:13 Ama nuamsa paisuak a, mihau mama khat suak hi." 
Genesis26:14 Banghang ziam cile ama in tuuhon, khuihon le naseam tam mama nei ahikom Philistine te in ama eang uh hi." 
Genesis26:15 Tua ahikom a pa Abraham nuntak lai a, a naseamte ii a tawsa tuikhuk theampo Philistine te in lei huk siat hi." 
Genesis26:16 Tuasia zawkciang Abimelech in Isaac tungah, “Ko ngam pan tai vun. Ko sangin thahat zaw zo nu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis26:17 Tua ahiciang Isaac in tua mun nusia in Gerar Kuam ah ngiaphual saatin, tua munah tawmvei sung om hi." 
Genesis26:18 Abraham hun lai a, a taw, Abraham thi zawkciang Philistine te ii lei a huk siat tuikhukte ama in khatvei to kik hi. Tuate a pa ii min a phua sa bangin Isaac in min vaw hi." 
Genesis26:19 Isaac ii naseamte in tua kuam ah tuikhuk khat to in tui mu hi. 
Genesis26:20 Gerar tuucingte in Isaac tuucingte taw kihau uh a, “Hi tui koma aa hi,” ci uh hi. Tua ahikom Isaac in tua tuikhuk, “Kihauna” ci in min phua hi." 
Genesis26:21 Isaac ii naseamte in tuikhuk dangkhat to a, kihauna om kik leleau ahikom ama in, “Kingal vawtna” ci in minphua hi." 
Genesis26:22 Tua mun pan kiinin tuikhuk dangkhat to hi. Tua tungtaang ah kikamtamna om ngawl ahikom ama in, “Suatakna” ci in min phuak hi. Ama in, “Tu in hi leitang ah teen thei natu in, Topa in suatakna hong pia zo ahiciang hi munah eite ih nuamsa tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis26:23 Isaac in tua mun nusia in, Beersheba zuan hi." 
Genesis26:24 Tua zanin Topa ama tungah kilangh a, “Keima in na pa Abraham ii Pathian ka hi hi. Lau heak in; nang taw kong omkhawm hi. Nang thupha kong pia tu a, suan le paal tam mama kong pia tu hi, banghang ziam cile ka naseampa Abraham tungah ka kamciamna hang ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis26:25 Isaac in biaknatau khat tua munah vawtin Topa bia hi. Tua zawkciang tualai ah a ngiaphual saatin, a naseamte in tuikhuk dang khat to hi." 
Genesis26:26 Isaac taw kimu tu in Gerar pan Abimelech sia a thudokpa Ahuzzath le a ngalkaphonpi ukpa Phicol taw pai hi. 
Genesis26:27 Tua ahikom Isaac in amate tungah, “Kei taw kisi tu in banghang hong pai nu ziam, tu masia in nong pawl vawt peuma bua a, na ngam pan hong not hi ngawl nu ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Genesis26:28 Amate in, “Nang taw Topa a om hunlam tu in ka he uh a, eite kilaklaw ah thukimna pha khat nei tu in ka ngaisun uh hi. Ko deina ah," 
Genesis26:29 kote in nang kong natsak ngawl bangma in, nang zongh in kote nong natsak ngawl natuin kamciam nong piak natu ahi hi. Na tungah kong thuthiam uh a, nuam takin kong paisak uh hi. Topa in nang thupha hong piak sia tu in kitelthiang hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis26:30 Isaac in amate atu in anneakpoai khat vawtsak a, amate anne in tuidawn uh hi." 
Genesis26:31 A zing ciang zingtuung in mi simin kiciamna nei a, kipsak uh hi. Isaac in amate mangpha thaakin pawl le lawm khat bangin kikhen uh hi." 
Genesis26:32 Tua ni in, Isaac ii naseamte hong pai in amate tawsa, tuikhuk thu ama tungah son hi. Amate in, “Tui ka mu zo uh hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis26:33 Ama in tuikhuk sia, “Kiciamna” ci in minphua hi. Tuabangin Beersheba khuapi in a min nga hi." 
Genesis26:34 Esau kum sawmli a phak ciang, Hit te numei te nii Beeri ii tanu Judith le Elon ii tanu Basemath teenpui hi." 
Genesis26:35 Amate in Isaac le Rebecca nuntak sung in thinngim pia uh hi. 
Genesis27:1 Tu in Isaac huai zo a, a mittaw hi. Ama in a ta uzaw Esau samin, “Ka tapa awng!” ci hi. A tapa in, “Hi ing” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis27:2 Isaac in, “Nong mu bangin kei huai zo a, thi pal tha tu khi hi." 
Genesis27:3 Na thal le thaltangte la in a, ngamvakin kei atu ngamsa khat hong kap ta'n." 
Genesis27:4 Ka du ngei anlim tawm hong huan ta'n a, hong paipui ta'n. Tuasia ka neak zawkciang, ka thi ma in, ka thupha khakbel nang kong pia tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis27:5 Isaac in Esau a paupui laitakin, Rebecca in ngai nginge hi. Tua ahikom Esau savai tu in a kuan ciang," 
Genesis27:6 Rebecca in Jacob tungah, “Na pa ii Esau tungah a son teng ka zaak zawk bek hi." 
Genesis27:7 ‘Ngamsa khat hong ciapui ta'n a, hong huansak ta'n, tuasia ka neak zawkciang, ka thi ma in Topa mai ah thupha kong pia tu hi,’ ci hi." 
Genesis27:8 Rebecca in a thuson zom a, “Tu in ka tapa awng, hong ngai ta'n a, kong ci bang seam in." 
Genesis27:9 Nganhon sungah pai in, kealno a thau nii hong man ta'n, tua hile na pa du mama ngei tua an sia kong huan thei tu hi." 
Genesis27:10 Tuasia a neak tu in na pa kungah na paipui thei tu a, a thi ma in a thupha nang hong pia tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis27:11 Ahizong Jacob in a nu tungah, “Na heak bangma Esau in mul hau a, ahizong kei ka vun neal hi." 
Genesis27:12 Ka pa in hong tham luilam thong le, ama ka theamna hong tel tu hi; hi bangin keima tungah thupha luangin haamsiatna ka thengsak zaw tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis27:13 A nu in, “Ka tapa awng, nang tungah haamsiatna khat pawpo sia kei tungah hong tung tahen; kong ci bangin ngamta in; va pai ta'n a, keima atu in kealte hong paipui ta'n,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis27:14 Tua ahiciang kealte man tu in pai a, a nu kung then hi, tuaciang a nu in a pa du bangin huansak hi." 
Genesis27:15 Tua zawkciang ama in inn sungah a kep Esau ii puan phabelte la in, Jacob silhsak hi." 
Genesis27:16 Ama in, kealvunte a baan tung le a ngawng mul om ngawlna teng ah koisak hi." 
Genesis27:17 Ama ii huan anlim le anluumte a tapa khut ah aap hi. 
Genesis27:18 Tuaciang Jacob sia a pa kungah pai in, “Pa!” ci hi. A pa in, “Hi ing, ka tapate akua hi zaw ni ziam?” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis27:19 Jacob in, “Keima in na tapa u zaw Esau khi hi; nong sawl bangin vawt zo khi hi. Hesuakna taw hong to ta'n a, na thupha nong piak thei natu in, sa pawlkhat kong paipui sia ne in,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis27:20 Isaac in, “Ka tapa awng, hi bang manlang takin bangbang nga thei ni ziam?” ci hi. Jacob in, “ Topa na Pathian in ka nga natu hong hu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis27:21 Isaac in Jacob tungah, “Hesuakna taw kong tham thei tu in hong neak lai ta'n. Nang Esau ma hi takpi ni ziam?” ci hi." 
Genesis27:22 Jacob sia a pa nai hong neak zaw hi, a pa in tham a, “Na aw ahile Jacob awsua taw kibang a, ahizong na baan sia Esau baan tham taw kibang hi” ci hi." 
Genesis27:23 A pa in Jacob a hina tel zo ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile Esau baan bangma in baanmul nei hi. A thuphate ama pia tu ahihang," 
Genesis27:24 “Nang Esau ma hi takpi ni ziam?” ci in dongh kik hi. Ama in, “Hi khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis27:25 Isaac in, “Na sa huan tawm hong paipui ta'n. Ka neak zawkciang ka thupha hong pia tu khi hi,” ci hi. Jacob in a pa kungah a sa huan paipui in, a neak tu in sapittui zongh paipui hi." 
Genesis27:26 Tuasia ciang a pa in ama tungah, “Ka tapa awng, hong neak ta'n a, hong namh ta'n,” ci hi." 
Genesis27:27 Ama in a pa namh tu hong pai le, a pa in a puan ngimnam za a — tua ahiciang ama thupha pia hi. Ama in, “Ka tapa ngimnamtui sia Topa ii thupha a piaksa lo khat ii ngim taw kibang hi." 
Genesis27:28 Pathian in na tungah vantung daaitui hong pia hen a, na lote lei phasak tahen! An le sapittui tam mama hong pia tahen!" 
Genesis27:29 Minamte na naseam suakin mihingte na mai ah kun tahen. Na beete theampo uk in, na nu suan le paalte na mai ah kun tahen. Nang hong haamsiatte haamsiatna thuak hen a, nang thupha hong piate thupha nga tahen,” ci hi." 
Genesis27:30 Isaac in thupha pia siat zo a, Jacob ii a nusiat zawk po ciang, a suapuipa Esau a savaina panin theng hi." 
Genesis27:31 Ama zongh in anlim pawl khat huan a, a pa kungah paipui hi. Ama in, “Pa awng, hesuakna taw hong to ta'n a, na thupha kei nong piak thei natu in na tapa ii kong paipui sate ne in,” ci hi." 
Genesis27:32 Isaac in, “Nang akua ni ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Ama in, “Na tapa u zaw Esau khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis27:33 Tuaciang Isaac a ci liing ngawpin, a pumpi bup ngawk a, ama in, “Tua ahile, ngamsa khat kaplumin kei kungah hong paipui sia akua ziam? Nang nong thet mahiat in ka ne hi. Ama tungah ka thupha khakbel ka pia zo a, tua ahikom a tawntungin ama aa hi zo hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis27:34 Esau sia hi thu a zaak ciang, nging takin kapngawp a, “Pa awng, kei zongh na thupha hong pia ta'n!” ci hi." 
Genesis27:35 Isaac in, “Na suapuipa hong pai in kei hong theam hi. Ama in na thupha hong laaksak zo hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis27:36 Esau in, “Tu a sia kei hong theam a nii veina hi. A min Jacob ahi sia lamdang ngawl hi. Ama in ka taciil innluaza la zo a, tu in ka thupha hong laksak leleau hi. Kei atu in thupha khat khe ngawl ni ziam?” ci hi." 
Genesis27:37 Isaac in, “Ama sia nangma to ka suaksak zo a, a beete theampo a ma sila te ka hisak zo hi. An le sapittui ama ka pia zo hi. Ka tapa awng, tu in nang atu kong vawtsak thei tu, bangma om nawn ngawl hi!” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis27:38 Esau in a pa tungah ngen veve lai a: “Pa awng, thupha khat bek ma nei ni ziam? Kei zongh thupha hong pia ta'n, Pa awng!” ci in ama kap hi." 
Genesis27:39 Tuaciang Isaac in ama tungah “Nang atu vantung pan daaitui om ngawl a, Nang atu a leipha lote om ngawl hi." 
Genesis27:40 Na namsau suangin na nungta tu a, Ahizong na suapuipa ii sila na hi tu hi Ahihang ama na leedo ciangin ama ii ukna panin na peng tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis27:41 Esau in Jacob ngaimaw hi, banghang ziam cile a pa in a thupha Jacob pia zo hi. Ama in “Ka pa thina hangin khuangai tu hun hong nai zo hi: tuasia zawkciang Jacob ka that tu hi,” ci in ngaisun hi." 
Genesis27:42 Ahizong, Esau ii sawmna thu Rebecca in a zaak ciang Jacob sam a, ama in “Ngai in, na suapuipa Esau in nang thatlumin phulaak hong sawm hi." 
Genesis27:43 Tu in ka tapa awng, kong ci bangin ngamta in. Haran ah a teang ka suapuipa Laban kungah thakhatin tai zawzok ta'n," 
Genesis27:44 na suapuipa thin uuk thai dong tawmvei sung Laban taw omkhawm ta'n," 
Genesis27:45 tua hile ama tungah na vawtnate mangil tu hi. Tuasia ciang mihing khat po sawlin nang kong samsak kik tu hi. Banghangin ka tate nii, ni khat thu in khuai tu khi ziam?” ci hi." 
Genesis27:46 Rebecca in Isaac tungah, “Esau ii ngamdang zite hangin cimtakin ka nat law hi. Jacob zongh Hit te numei khat taw kiteang thong le, thi law liang tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis28:1 Isaac in Jacob samin a nukset zawkciang, “Canaan numei peuma teenpui heak in." 
Genesis28:2 Tua sangin Mesopotamia ngam na pupi Bethuel inn ah pai in, na pu Laban tanute khat teenpui in." 
Genesis28:3 Minam tam te ii pa na sua natu in Vaanglianbelpa Pathian in na mopoai ah thupha hong pia hen a, ta tam mama hong pia tahen!" 
Genesis28:4 Pathian in, Abraham thupha a piak bangin nang le na suan na paalte thupha hong pia tahen a, Abraham tungah a piak, na teenna leitang sia nang neisa hisak tahen!” ci hi." 
Genesis28:5 Isaac in Laban teenna Mesopotamia ah Jacob paisak a, Laban sia Arameante Bethuel tapa hi a, Jacob le Esau te ii nu, Rebecca suapuipa ahi hi." 
Genesis28:6 Isaac in Jacob thupha pia a, Mesopotamia ah zi zong tu in a paisakna thu Esau in he hi. Isaac in Jacob thupha a piak ciang Canaan numeite a teenpui ngawl natu in a thupiak zongh ama in he hi." 
Genesis28:7 Jacob in a nu le a pa thu ni in Mesopotamia ah a paina thu Esau in tel hi. 
Genesis28:8 Tua zawkciang Esau in a pa Isaac ii Canaan numeite a lungkim ngawlna thu tel hi. 
Genesis28:9 Tua ahiciang ama in Abraham tapa Ishmael kungah pai in a tanu Mahalath, Nebaioth ii suapuinu teenpui hi." 
Genesis28:10 Jacob in Beersheba nusia in Haran sang zuan hi. 
Genesis28:11 Nitum ciang mun thiangtho khat theng a, tua munah ngiaphual saat hi. Ama mu tu in, suang khat khamhin lumsuk hi." 
Genesis28:12 Ama in mangman a, keallei khat leitung pan vantung dong kidawto in, vantunglalangte tua keallei ah a tuaksuk a kaato mu hi." 
Genesis28:13 Tuaciang ama kungah Topa ding hi. Ama in, “Keima in Abraham le Isaac te ii Pathian, Topa ka hi hi. Nang le na suan na paalte tungah na lupna hi leitang kong pia tu hi." 
Genesis28:14 Amate leitung ah leivui za in tam tu hi. Amate in mun theampo ah ngamkeak tu uh a, nang le na suan na paalte tungtawnin minamte theampo thupha ka pia tu hi." 
Genesis28:15 Ciamtee ta'n, na paina po ah nang taw om in, kong dal tu a, hi leitang ah kong thet pui kik tu hi. Kong kamciamsa teng ka vawt siat mateng in, nang kong nusia buatu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis28:16 Jacob khanglo in, “ Topa hi sungah om hi! Ama hi munah om hi, keima in hi thu ka he bua hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis28:17 Ama lau in, “Hi mun bangza in lauhuai ziam! Hi sia Pathian inn hi nanak tu hi; hi mun in vantung tum natu kongpi hi nanak tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis28:18 A zing ciang zingtuungin Jacob tho a, a suang lukham la in khansuang khat in phut hi. Tua zawkciang ama in khansuang sia olive thau buakin Pathian tungah aap hi." 
Genesis28:19 Ama in tua mun sia Bethel ci hi. (Nidangin tuak ah om khua sia Luz kici hi.) 
Genesis28:20 Tua zawkciang Jacob in Pathian tungah kiciamna khat vawt a: “Nangma in kei taw nong om a, ka khualhawna ah hong dalin, an le puan nong pia a," 
Genesis28:21 tuaciang ciidam in ka pa inn ah ka cia kik le, tuasia ciang nangma in ka Pathian na hi tu hi." 
Genesis28:22 Hi khansuang ka phuna sia nangma hong kibiakna mun hi tu hi, tuaciang nong piak theampo sung pan sawm a khat, nang kong pia tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis29:1 Jacob sia a pai natu mun nisuana ngam sang manaw in paisuak hi. 
Genesis29:2 Thakhatin lo sungah a om tuikhuk khat kung theng a, tuikhuk paam ah tuuhon, hon thum lum hi. Ngannote in hi tuikhuk pan tui ne hi, tuikhuk sitna suangtum sia lian mama hi." 
Genesis29:3 Tualai ah tuuhonte hong thet hon ciang tuucingte in tua suang liikin, tuute tui pia hi. Tua zawkciang amate in a omna ngei ah tua suang koi kik hi." 
Genesis29:4 Jacob in tuucingte tungah, “Ka lawmte awng, koisung pan nu ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Amate in, “Haran pan hi ung,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis29:5 Ama in, “Nahor ii tapa Laban na he uh ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Amate in, “He khu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis29:6 Ama in, “Ama a ciidam ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Amate in, “Ama a ciidam hi. En in, a tanu Rachel zongh a tuuhonte taw hi sungah hong pai hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis29:7 Jacob in, “Ni sang lai a, ngan hawl hun ngawl lai ahikom, tuute tui pia in tha kik ngawl tu nu ziam?” ci hi." 
Genesis29:8 Amate in, “Tuuhon theampo hi lai ah om siat in, suangtum a kiliik kik mateng ngan ka tha thei buatu uh hi; tua zawkciang tuuhonte tui ka pia tu uh hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis29:9 Jacob sia amate taw kipaupui in a om laitak, Rachel, tuuhon taw hong theng hi." 
Genesis29:10 Jacob in a pu Laban tuuhon le Rachel a mu ciang tuikhuk ah pai in, suangtum liik in, tuute tui pia hi." 
Genesis29:11 Tua zawkciang Jacob in ama namh a, lungdamin kap hi." 
Genesis29:12 Ama in Rachel tungah, “Keima in Rebecca ii tapa, na pa ii mealheak ka hi hi,” ci hi. Ama sia a pa tungah thu ko tu in tai hi;" 
Genesis29:13 Laban in a tupa Jacob ii thu a zaak ciang ama muak tu in tai a, koai in namh a, inn ah ciapui hi. Jacob in thupiang theampo Laban tungah a son zawkciang," 
Genesis29:14 Laban in, “Hi hi, nangma in keima chi le sa na hi tatak hi,” ci hi. Tualai ah Jacob tha khat bup taam hi." 
Genesis29:15 Laban in Jacob tungah, “Nangma sia ka mealheak na hi manpo in, a thongin ka na nong sepsak buatu hi. Thasum bangza dei tu ni ziam?” ci hi." 
Genesis29:16 Laban in ta numei nii nei a; a unu min Leah hi in, a naunu min Rachel ahi hi." 
Genesis29:17 Leah sia a mit haa ngaibaang a, Rachel ahile a khan pha in a mealhoi hi." 
Genesis29:18 Jacob sia Rachel taw ki it ahikom a pu tungah, “Rachel taw nong kiteangsak tu ahile, kum sali sung noma na kong sepsak tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis29:19 Laban in, “Midang khat po ka piak sangin ama nang kong pia nuam zaw hi; hilai kei kungah hong om ta'n,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis29:20 Jacob in Rachel a nga thei natu in kum sali sung naseam a, ama a itna hangin tua hunte ni tawmno taw kibang sa hi." 
Genesis29:21 Tuaciang, Jacob in Laban tungah, “Ih hun cing hi; na tanu taw hong teangsak ta'n,” ci hi." 
Genesis29:22 Tua ahiciang Laban in mopoai vawtsakin ngual theampo sam hi. 
Genesis29:23 Ahizong tua zanin a pu in Jacob tungah Rachel taangin Leah pia a, Jacob in Leah luppui hi. (" 
Genesis29:24 Laban in ama ii silanu Zilpah, a tanu Leah tungah a naseam tu in pia hi.)" 
Genesis29:25 A zingsang ciang Leah a hina thu Jacob in he pheang hi. Ama in Laban kungah pai in, “Banghangin hi bang hong vawt thong ni ziam? Rachel nga nuam in hong thalaw hi ngawl khi ziam? Banghangin kei hong theam ni ziam?,” ci hi." 
Genesis29:26 Laban in, “A u kan in a nau pasal a nei tu sia ko ngeina hi ngawl hi." 
Genesis29:27 Nipi khat sung mopoai vawt hun ngak phot in a, tuaciang a dang kum sali sung ka na nong sepsak lai tu ahile, Rachel kong pia tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis29:28 Jacob lungkim a, nipi khat sung mopoai hun a bo ciang, Laban in a tanu Rachel, Jacob zi tu in pia hi. (" 
Genesis29:29 Laban in a sila nu Bilhah sia a tanu Rachel tungah a naseam tu in pia hi.) 
Genesis29:30 Jacob in Rachel zongh luppui a, ama in Leah sang Rachel it zaw hi. Tuasia ciang ama in a dang kum sali sung Laban atu naseam thua lai hi." 
Genesis29:31 Rachel sangin Leah a it ngawl zawkna thu Topa in a heak ciang, Leah sia ta nei thei tu in siam a, ahizong Rachel sia ta neisak ngawl lai hi." 
Genesis29:32 Leah ngai in tapa khat nei hi. Ama in, “Ka thinngimna Topa in hong mu a, tu in ka pasal in hong it tu hi,” ci a, tua ahiciang a min Reuben phuak hi." 
Genesis29:33 Ama ngai kik a, tapa dang khat nei hi. Ama in, “Kei hong ki it ngawlna thu Topa in za zo ahikom Topa in hi tapa zongh kei hong pia zo hi,” ci a tua ahiciang a min Simeon phuak hi." 
Genesis29:34 Khatvei ma ama ngai kik a, tapa dang khat nei hi. Ama in, “Tu in ka pasal in kei hong kholet zaw tu hi, banghang ziam cile tapa thum ka neisak zo hi,” ci a, tua ahiciang a min Levi phuak hi." 
Genesis29:35 Tuaciang Leah hong ngai kik a, tapa dang khat nei hi. Ama in, “Tu hile Topa ka pok tu hi,” ci a, tua ahiciang a min Judah phuak hi. Tuasia ciang ama ta tawp hi." 
Genesis30:1 Ahihang Rachel in Jacob taw ta khat zongh nei ngawl hi, tua ahikom ama in a suapuinu Leah eangin Jacob tungah, “Ta hong pia tan tua ahibuale ka thi tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis30:2 Rachel tungah Jacob thin uuk a, “Pathian dinmun ka la thei buatu hi. Ta nei tu hong khak pa sia ama hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis30:3 Ama in, “Hi lai ah, ka silanu Bilhah om hi; ama taw lumkhawm lete kei atu in ta nei thei tu hi. Hi bangin kei sia ama tungtawnin nu khat ka suak thei tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis30:4 Tua ahiciang ama in a pasal tungah Bilhah pia a, a pasal in ama ompui hi." 
Genesis30:5 Bilhah ngai in Jacob taw tapa khat nei hi. 
Genesis30:6 Rachel in, “Pathian in thukhen a, maipha hong pia hi. Ama in ka thungetna hong za in tapa khat hong pia hi,” ci a, tua ahiciang a min Dan phuak hi." 
Genesis30:7 Bilhah ngai kikin, Jacob taw tapa a niina nei hi." 
Genesis30:8 Rachel in, “Haksa takin ka suapuinu ka do a, ahizong keima in ka zo zo hi,” ci a tua ahiciang a min Naphtali phuak hi." 
Genesis30:9 Leah in a tatawp hunlam a kiheak ciang, a sila nu Zilpah sia Jacob ii zi tu in pia hi." 
Genesis30:10 Tuasia ciang Zilpah in Jacob taw tapa khat nei hi. 
Genesis30:11 Leah in, “Ka kaampha zo hi,” ci a, tua ahiciang a min Gad phuak hi." 
Genesis30:12 Zilpah in Jacob taw tapa dang khat nei hi. 
Genesis30:13 Leah in, “Bangza in ka lungdam ziam! Tu in, numeite in a lungdam nu hong ci tu hi,” ci a, tua ahiciang a min Asher phuak hi." 
Genesis30:14 Zungtaang laak hun laitakin Reuben sia lo sungah pai a, mandrake ai ngate mu in a nu Leah puak hi. Rachel in Leah tungah, “Hesuakna taw na tapa ii mandrake ai ngate tawm hong pia ta'n,” ci hi." 
Genesis30:15 Leah in, “Ka pasal nong laaksak sia pha zo ngawl ziam? Tu in ka tapa ii mandrake ai ngate ngawngawn laaksak nong sawm lai hi,” ci in zo hi. Rachel in, “Na tapa ii mandrake ai ngate nong pia le, tu zan Jacob taw lumkhawm thei tu ni hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis30:16 Nitakin lo pan Jacob hong cia ciang, Jacob taw kimu tu in Leah pai a, “Tu zan kei kung hong lum tu ni hi, banghang ziam cile ka tapa ii mandrake ai ngate taw nang kong thapsa hi,” ci hi. Tua ahikom tua zanin Jacob le Leah omkhawm hi." 
Genesis30:17 Pathian in Leah ii thungetna zo a, ama ngai in Jacob taw tapa a ngana nei hi." 
Genesis30:18 Leah in, “Ka silanu ka pasal pia ka hikom Pathian in keima thaman hong pia zo hi,” ci a, tua ahiciang a tapa min Issachar phuak hi." 
Genesis30:19 Leah ngai kik a, Jacob taw tapa a lukna nei hi." 
Genesis30:20 Ama in, “Pathian in letsong pha khat hong pia zo hi. Tu in ka pasal in kei hong saang tu hi, banghang ziam cile ama atu in tapa luk ka neisak zo hi,” ci a, tua ahiciang a min Zebulun phuak hi." 
Genesis30:21 Tua zawkin ta numei khat nei a, ama in a min Dinah phuak hi." 
Genesis30:22 Tua zawkciang Pathian in Rachel phawk hi; ama ii thungetna zo in, ta nei thei tu in siam hi." 
Genesis30:23 Rachel ngai in tapa khat nei hi. Ama in, “Pathian in tapa khat hong piakna taw ka maizumna teng bosak zo hi." 
Genesis30:24 Topa in tapa dang khat hong pia lai tahen,” ci a, tua ahiciang a min Joseph phuak hi." 
Genesis30:25 Joseph a sua zawkciang Jacob in Laban tungah, “Ka inn ah a cia kik tu in hong paisak ta'n." 
Genesis30:26 Nang atu naseamin kong thalawsa ka zite le ka tate hong pia ta'n, cia tu khi hi. Pha takpi na kong sepsak na he hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis30:27 Laban in ama tungah, “Thu hong son tong: Topa in nang hangin kei thupha hong piak hunlam mukholna nei in, ka he zo hi." 
Genesis30:28 Na thaman hong son lete kong pia tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis30:29 Jacob in, “Na na kong sepsakna thu le keima sep sungin na nganhonte a pun mama na thu na he hi." 
Genesis30:30 Kei kong thet ma in nganno tawm bek na nei hi, tu in tam mama in khang hi. Ka va ka ciana po ah Topa in nang thupha hong pia zo hi. Tu in keima phattuam natu ka ngaisut tu hun zo hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis30:31 Laban in, “Bang hong pia tu khi ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Jacob in, “Thaman bangma dei bong. Hi ka ngaisutna bang na thukim le na nganhonte ka cing lai tu hi:" 
Genesis30:32 Tuni in na nganhon theampo sungah hong paisak ta'n a, tuu a vom teng, kealno a ngial teng ahibuale a pawl teng hong theisak ta'n. Tua teng ka thaman tu in dei khi hi." 
Genesis30:33 Ka thumaanna sia mai sangah ol takin hong mu thei tu ni hi. Ka thamante sit tu in nong pai ciang kealte sung pan a pawl ngawl, a ngial ngawl khat, tuute sung pan a vom ngawl khat pawpo ka nei le ka nguk ahi hunlam he tu ni hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis30:34 Laban in, “Thukim ing. Nangma ci bangin ih vawt tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis30:35 Ahizong tua ni in Laban in kealtal a ngial, a pawl teng le kealnu a ngial, a pawl ahibuale a kaang kihel teng khenkhia hi; tuu vom teng zongh khentuam hi. Ama in, tua teng a tapate kep tu in koi a," 
Genesis30:36 tua zawkciang, Jacob kung pan ni thum paina munah hi nganhon teng paipui hi. Jacob in Laban ii nganno a taanglai teng keam hi." 
Genesis30:37 Jacob in hiang, thuangthi le pakngiam kungte pan a baak hingte saatin, a haw tawm ngiam a, a pawlin vawtin, a kaang ngialte kimusak hi." 
Genesis30:38 Ama in tua thingbaakte sia nganhonte ii mai, a tui neakna kuangte ii kungah koisak hi. Ama in tua munah thingbaak pawlte banghangin koi ziam cile ngannote tui ne tu in hong pai ciang a nu le a pa omkhopna mun ahihang hi." 
Genesis30:39 Tua ahikom, kealte tua thingbaak pawlte mai ah omkhawm a, no a nei uh ciang a ngial, a pawl veu piang uh hi." 
Genesis30:40 Jacob in tuute le kealte khenin tuam koi a, Laban ii nganno a ngial le a vom honte omna sang maingatsak hi. Hi bangin ama in a ngannote pungtosakin Laban ii ngannote taw kihelsak ngawl hi." 
Genesis30:41 Nganno ciidamte tua thingbaakte sungah a omkhop ciang, a no a pawlte a nei thei natu in thingbaak pawlte sia a maingatna uh tuikuang kungah Jacob in koi hi." 
Genesis30:42 Ahizong ama in tua thingbaakte sia nganno thazawmte mai ah koi ngawl hi. Hai ngawlin nganno thazawm teng Laban neisa suak a, nganno ciidam teng Jacob neisa suak hi." 
Genesis30:43 Hi bangin Jacob sia a hau mama suak hi. Ama in nganhonte, silate, kalaohte le laate tam mama nei hi." 
Genesis31:1 Laban tapate in, “Ih pa ii neisa theampo Jacob in la siat hi. A hauna theampo sia ih pa ii neisa tungtawnin a nga hi,” a cina thu Jacob in za hi." 
Genesis31:2 Nidang bang a Laban ii a pawlvawt nawn ngawlna thu zongh Jacob in mu hi. 
Genesis31:3 Tuasia ciang, Topa in ama tungah, “Na beete kung le na pate ii ngam le lei zuan kik in. Nang taw kong omkhawm tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis31:4 Tua ahikom Jacob in a tuute omna lo sungah ama taw kimu tu in, Rachel le Leah kam vaitha hi." 
Genesis31:5 Ama in a zite tungah, “Na pa ii nidang lai hong pawlvawt ngei bang ahi nawn ngawlna thu ka he hi; ahizong ka pa ii Pathian in kei hong ompui hi." 
Genesis31:6 Ka tha neiza taw na pa ii na ka sep sia na heak uh hi. 
Genesis31:7 Ahizong ama in kei hong theamin ka thamante sawmvei hong khealsak zo hi. Ka tungah siatna hong vawt tu sia Pathian in oai ngawl hi. 
Genesis31:8 Laban in, ‘Keal a pawl iim-iam teng na thaman tu hi,’ hong ci ciang nganno theampo a pawl iim-iam in piang hi. Ama in, ‘Keal a ngial teng na thaman tu hi,’ hong ci ciang nganno theampo a ngialin piang hi." 
Genesis31:9 Pathian in na pa kung pan ngannote la a, kei hong pia hi." 
Genesis31:10 “Ngannote a ta nei tu hunin, mang khat ka man a kealpuite sia kealtal a ngial, a pawl te taw omkhawmin ka mu hi." 
Genesis31:11 Pathian vantunglalang in ka mang sungah hong paupui in, ‘Jacob!’ hong ci a, ‘Om khi hi,’ ci in ka zo hi." 
Genesis31:12 Tuaciang ama in, ‘En in’ kealpuite a ompui kealtalte sia a ngial, a pawl vive hi. Hi bang a piang tu in, keima vawt hi, banghang ziam cile nang tungah Laban ii hong vawtna teng ka mu zo hi." 
Genesis31:13 Keima in Bethel ah nang tung a hong kilangh Pathian ka hi hi, tua munah nong phaw tawntung natu khansuang phutin olive thau na buak a, aapna nei in kei tungah kiciamna khat na vawt hi. Tu in kithoai in a, na pianna ngam le lei zuan kik in’ hong ci hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis31:14 Rachel le Leah in Jacob tungah, “Ka pa uh kung pan ka lua tu bangma taang nawn ngawl hi." 
Genesis31:15 Ama in ko sia ngamdangmite bangin hong vawt hi. Ama in ko hong zuak a, hong kileina sum teng zongh zangh siat zo hi." 
Genesis31:16 Ka pa uh kung pan Pathian ii a laak sa hi nei le lamh theampo sia ko le ka tate aa ahi hi. Pathian hong sawl pawpo seam in,” ci in zo uh hi." 
Genesis31:17 Tua ahiciang Jacob sia Canaan ngam a pa kung zuan kik tu in kithoai hi. Ama in a tate le a zite, kalaohte tungah tosak hi, Mesopotamia ngam pan a nga na theampo taw a nganno theampo a mai ah hawl hi." 
Genesis31:18  
Genesis31:19 Laban sia a tuute mul meet tu in pai a, ama om ngawl lanin Rachel in a pa ii neisa innkuan pathian milimte nguksak hi." 
Genesis31:20 Jacob in Laban theam a, a cia natu vai hesak ngawl hi." 
Genesis31:21 Ama in a neisa theampo la in paisan vingveng hi. Ama in Eupharates ngun kaantan in, Gilead mualtung ngam sang manaw hi." 
Genesis31:22 Jacob taina thu ni thum zawkciang Laban tungah kison hi. 
Genesis31:23 Ama in a mite samin a mite taw Gilead ngam mual tungah Jacob a phak dong ni sali sung del uh hi. 
Genesis31:24 Tua zanin Laban mang sungah Pathian kilangh in Laban tungah “Bangbang po ahizong Jacob na lauthawn ngawl natu in kidawm ta'n,” ci hi." 
Genesis31:25 Jacob sia mual tungah ngiaphual saat a, Laban sia a mipuite taw Gilead mualtung ngam sungah ngiaphual saat hi." 
Genesis31:26 Laban in Jacob tungah, “Banghangin hong theam a, ngal sungah ngalmat numeite bangin ka tanute taipui ni ziam?" 
Genesis31:27 Kei hong theam a, kei hong son ngawlin banghang ngelku ni ziam? Hong son hi lete lungdam in lasa a, daalkual khuangnote, tengtongh tumin hong tha tu khu hi." 
Genesis31:28 Ka tute le ka tanute mangpha thaakin, nong namhsak beak bua hi. Tua in a mawmawthuai ngamtatna ahi hi!" 
Genesis31:29 Nang kong vawtsiat thei natu in tha nei khi hi, ahizong tu zanin na pa ii Pathian in bangbang po ahizong nang kong lauthawn ngawl natu in kidop tu thu hong pia hi." 
Genesis31:30 Hi bang nong nusiat sia na inn na thet kik tu thintoi mama na hina kong he hi, ahizong ka innkuan pathian milimte banghang ngu nu ziam?” ci hi." 
Genesis31:31 Jacob in, “Kei kung pan na tanute nong lee kik tu ka lau hang hi." 
Genesis31:32 Ahizong na pathian milimte hi sung khat pawpo tungah na mu le ama kithatlum tu hi. Hi lai ah ih mite sia ih tetti tu hi, zong in a, nangma neisa pawpo la in,” ci in zo hi. Laban ii pathian milimte Rachel nguk hunlam Jacob in he ngawl hi." 
Genesis31:33 Laban pai in, Jacob puanbuk sung zong hi; tua zawkciang Leah puanbuk sung le sila numei niite puanbuk sung teng zong a, ahizong a pathian milimte mu ngawl hi. Tuasia ciang Rachel puanbuk sungah pai hi." 
Genesis31:34 Rachel in innkuan milimte ngu a, kalaoh tung tona ip sungah koi in topha hi. Laban in buk sung bup zong a, ahizong mu ngawl hi." 
Genesis31:35 Rachel in a pa tungah, “Na mai ah hong ding thei ngawl ka hikom topa awng, thin uuk heak in; numei ngeina ka nei laitak hi,” ci hi. Laban in zong a, ahihang a innkuan milimte mu ngawl hi." 
Genesis31:36 Tuaciang Jacob a thin uuk hi. “A bang khialna lian vawt khi ziam?” ci a, thin uuk tatakin dongh hi. “A bang thukham ka palsat hu in, bang thu nga a, hong zuizen thei ni ziam?" 
Genesis31:37 Tu in ka vanh nei theampo tok siat zo ni hi, na neisa na innkuan vanh bang mu ni ziam? Tuasia, hi lai ah na mite le ka mite mu thei tu in hong pusua ta'n, akua maan hi ziam, thukhensak tawng." 
Genesis31:38 Nangma kungah tu in kum kul sung kong om a; na tuu le na kealte a ciing om ngawl hi, tuaciang na nganhonte sung pan tuutal khat pawpo ka ne bua hi." 
Genesis31:39 Ngamsate in tuu khat hong matsak simin keima supna vive hi. Kei khialna hi ngawl hi, ci sia a lak tu in na kungah kong paipui ngei bua hi. Sun ahizong zan ahizong a kingute peuma, a taang nong ngen hi." 
Genesis31:40 Tamvei tatak sun nisa le zan khuadap ka thuak hi. Ka mu thei bua hi. 
Genesis31:41 Tuabangin kum kul sung tawntung nang kungah kong om hi. Kum sawm le kum li sung na tanute nii — kum luk sung na ngannote ka nga natu in na ka seam hi. Tua zawk ngawngawn in ka thaman sawmvei nong kheal hi. 
Genesis31:42 Ka pate ii Pathian, Abraham le Isaac ii Pathian in kei taw omkhawm buathong le khut hawm nguakin nong hawlkhia zo tu hi. Ahizong Pathian in ka thinngimna le ka nasepna te mu zo a, tu zanin nang tungah thukhenna hong pia hi.”" 
Genesis31:43 Laban in Jacob tungah, “Hi numeite sia ka tanute hi; a tate keima neisa hi, nganhonte keima neisa hi. A tatakin ci leang hi sungah na mu theampo keima neisa hi. Ahizong ka tanute le a tate ka kep natu in bangma ka vawt thei tu om ngawl ahikom" 
Genesis31:44 nang taw thukimna khat vawt tu in ka kinging hi. Ih thukimna phaw kik natu in suangtumte ciang tawng,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis31:45 Tua ahiciang Jacob in suangtum khat la a phaw kik natu khansuang in phut hi. 
Genesis31:46 Jacob in a mite suang pawlkhat khawmsak in ciangto hi. Tuaciang a suang cianna hui ah amate an ne uh hi. 
Genesis31:47 Laban in Jegar Sahadutha ci in min vaw ahihang Jacob in Galeed ci in min pia hi. 
Genesis31:48 Laban in Jacob tungah, “Hi ih suangcian sia nang le kei atu in phawk sakna hi tu hi,” ci hi. Tua ahiciang tua mun sia Galeed kina hi." 
Genesis31:49 Laban zongh in, “Eite khat le khat ih kikhen hangin Topa in ei hong mitsuan tahen,” ci hi. Tua ahikom tua mun zongh Mizpah ci in min phuak hi." 
Genesis31:50 Laban in, “Ka tanute na vawtsia a, ahibuale numei dang na teenpui le kei kong he bua zong Topa in eite hong en nginge ci in, ciamtee ta'n." 
Genesis31:51 Hi lai ah ka suang ciante ih kilaklaw ah om hi, hi sungah phawna khansuang om hi." 
Genesis31:52 Hi suangcian le phawna khansuangte ngeal in ih kiciamnate hong phawksak kikte ahi hi. Nangma hong sim tu in hi suangcian kong kaantan ngei buatu a, nangma zongh in keima hong sim tu in hi suangcian ahibuale hi phawna khansuang nong kaantan ngei buatu hi." 
Genesis31:53 Abraham ii Pathian le Nahor ii Pathian in eite kilaklaw ah thukhen tu hi,” ci lai hi. Tua zawkciang Jacob in a pa Isaac ii biak Pathian min taw hi kamciamna keamcing tu in ciliap huai takin kiciam hi." 
Genesis31:54 Ama in ngan khat ngo a, mual tungah sangaw biakpiakna pia in, an ne tu in a mite sam hi. Amate an a neak zawkciang mual tungah zankhuateak om uh hi." 
Genesis31:55 A zing ciang zingtuung in, Laban in a tute le a tanumeite namhin mangpha thaak a, tuaciang nusia in a inn ah cia hi." 
Genesis32:1 Jacob a papai laitak lampi ah vantunglalang pawlkhat in ama muak hi. 
Genesis32:2 Jacob in amate a mu ciang ama in, “Hi sia in Pathian ii ngiaphual hi,” ci hi; tua ahiciang tua mun sia ama in Mahanaim naa hi." 
Genesis32:3 Jacob in Edom ngam a om a suapuipa Esau kungah kamtaite paisak khol hi. 
Genesis32:4 Ama in kamtaite tungah: “Na thumaan naseam keima Jacob in, ka topa Esau tungah thu kong puakna panin, Laban kungah ka om a, tu in kong heak kik thei pheang hi." 
Genesis32:5 Keima in khuite, laate, tuute, kealte le silate ka nei hi. Topa awng nangma maipha ka nga tu lamen in hi bangin kam kong vaitha hi,” na ci vun, ci in sawl hi." 
Genesis32:6 Kamtaite Jacob kungah hong heak kik ciang amate in, “Na suapuipa Esau kungah ka pai uh a, nangma muak tu in ama hong pai zo hi. Ama in mihing zali nei hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis32:7 Jacob lau in, a thinngim hi. Ama in a mihingte ahizong, a tuute, a kealte, a khuite le a kalaohte ahizong pawl nii in khen hi." 
Genesis32:8 Ama in, “Esau hong pai in a masa pawl teng hong sim le zong, a dang teng suakta thei tu hi,” ci in ngaisun hi." 
Genesis32:9 Tuasia ciang Jacob thungen a, “Ka pu Abraham ii Pathian le ka pa Isaac ii Pathian awng hong ngai ta'n! Topa awng, nangma in kei tungah na ngam na lei le na beete kungah cia kik in, tua hile nang atu na theampo phasak in na ma kong vangsak tu hi, nong ci hi." 
Genesis32:10 Na naseampa keima sia nong laksa na cikna le na thumaanna taw ka kilawm bua hi. Bangma dang nei ngawlin, ciangkhut khat bek ma taw Jordan ngun ka kaantan a, tuni in hi pawl niite taw in ka cia kik zo hi." 
Genesis32:11 Ka suapuipa Esau khut sung pan nong hut natu in thu kong ngen hi. Kei lau khi hi — kote hong sim tu in ama hong pai laitak hi a, numei patang ngawngawn hong thalup siat tu ka lau hi." 
Genesis32:12 Nangma in na ma kong vangsak tu a, tuipivaal senneal za in a tam, kuama sim zawk ngawl za dongin suan le paal kong pia tu hi, ci in nong kamciamnate phawk kik in,” ci hi." 
Genesis32:13 Tua munah tua zan a ngia zawkciang Jacob in a suapuipa Esau letsong a piak tu in a ngannote sung pan hi bang teng teal hi: keal anu 200 le keal apa 20, tuu anu 200 le tuu apa 20, kalaoh noaisuuk 30 le a note teng, khui anu 40 le khui apa 10, laa anu 20 le apa 10 te ahi hi." 
Genesis32:14  
Genesis32:15  
Genesis32:16 Ama in nganno teng a pawl a pawlin khen a, hon khat sim a uk tu in a naseamte khat tek koi hi. Ama in amate tungah, “Ka mai ah paikhol tavun a, honkhat le honkhat kilaklaw kihalsak in a nung kizuisak tavun,” ci hi." 
Genesis32:17 Ama in a masabel naseampa tungah, “Ka suapuipa Esau taw na kisik ciang, ‘Na topa akua ziam? Koisung pai tu nu ziam? Na mai a ngannote akua neisa ziam?’ ci in hong dok ciang," 
Genesis32:18 ‘Hite sia na naseampa Jacob neisa hi. Ama in hi teng a topa Esau letsong in hong puak hi. Jacob zongh ka nung ma ah om hi,’ ci in zo nanak tavun,” ci in thupia hi." 
Genesis32:19 Ama in tuabang ma in a niina, a thumna le nganno hon a uk dangte theampo tungah hi bangin thupia hi: “Esau taw na kimu uh ciang tu a bangin ci tu nu hi." 
Genesis32:20 ‘Hi hi, na naseampa Jacob ka nung uh ma ah om hi’ na ci tu uh kisamh hi.” Jacob in, “Ka letsong piak teng taw a thin ka zosak tu a, ama taw ka kimu ciang hong maisak thei tha tu hi,” ci in ngaisun hi." 
Genesis32:21 Ama in a letsong teng mai ah paikholsak a, ama ahile tua zanin ngiabuk ah taam lai hi." 
Genesis32:22 Tua zan Jacob tho in, a zite nii, a zinote nii le a tate sawm le khat taw Jabbok Ngun kaantan uh hi." 
Genesis32:23 Amate teng a paisak zawkciang, a neisa theampo zongh kaantansak a," 
Genesis32:24 ahizong ama nguak nung sangah taang hi. Tuaciang mi khat hong pai in zingsang khuavak mahiat dong Jacob taw kibuan hi. 
Genesis32:25 Mipa in a zaw ngawlna thu a mu ciang Jacob khealbul suksak a, a khealngu kiloai hi." 
Genesis32:26 Tua pa in, “Hong tha ta'n; khua hong vak tu hi,” ci hi. Jacob in, “Thupha nong pia buale kong tha buatu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis32:27 Tua pa in, “Na min akua ziam?” ci in dongh hi. “Jacob” ci in ama in zo hi." 
Genesis32:28 Tua pa in, “Na min Jacob hi nawn ngawl tu hi. Nangma in Pathian le mihingte taw na kibuan a, nangma in zo ni hi; tua ahikom na min Israel hi tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis32:29 Jacob in, “Tua le na min hong son ta'n,” ci hi. Ahizong ama in, “Banghangin ka min he nuam ni ziam?” ci in zo hi. Tua zawkciang ama in Jacob thupha pia hi." 
Genesis32:30 Jacob in, “Maitang kisi in Pathian ka mu zo a, ahizong kei hong kihingkhoai lai hi,” ci ahikom ama in tua mun sia Peniel ci in min phuak hi." 
Genesis32:31 Jacob ii Peniel a nusiat laitakin ni suak a, ama a khealbai hi, banghang ziam cile ama a khealngu kiloai hi." 
Genesis32:32 Tuni dong ngawngawnin Israel ii suan le paalte in khealbul a, a om sakhaal ne ngawl uh hi, banghang ziam cile hi sakhaal sia Jacob khealbul a kisuksakna mun ahihang hi." 
Genesis33:1 Jacob in, Esau le a mi zali hong pai a mu ciang ama in a tate teng sia Leah, Rachel le a zinote nii kawmah khenin koi hi." 
Genesis33:2 Ama in a zinote le a tate teng masasak a, tua zawkciang Leah le a tate, a khakbel in Rachel le Joseph tonsak hi." 
Genesis33:3 Jacob sia amate mai ah pai a, a suapuipa kung a thet tu ciang salivei lei ah kun hi." 
Genesis33:4 Ahizong Esau sia ama muak tu in hong tai a, ama koai in namh hi. Amate kap khawm hi." 
Genesis33:5 Esau in a kiim a paam a et ciang numeite le patangte mu a, “Nang taw a om hi mihingte a kuate ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Jacob in, “Hite sia Pathian ii a phatna hangin keima hong piak ka tate hi topa awng,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis33:6 Tua zawkciang a zinote le a tate teng pai in kun hi; 
Genesis33:7 tua zawkciang Leah le a tate teng pai in kun a, a khakbel in Joseph le Rachel pai in kun uh hi." 
Genesis33:8 Esau in, “Ka kisik puisa pawldang sia bangbangziam? Bang cinopna ahi ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Jacob in, “Tuate sia na mai kong etna hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis33:9 Ahizong Esau in, “A kicing nei ing, suapui awng, na nei teng keam po ta'n,” ci hi." 
Genesis33:10 Jacob in, “Hi ngawl hi, hesuakna taw, na maipha a nga ka hile ka letsong hong saang ta'n. Tu in kei hong pawlvawt mama zo na hikom na maitang kong mu sia, Pathian maitang mu bang ka hi hi." 
Genesis33:11 Nang atu kong ken hi letsong sia hesuakna taw hong saang ta'n; Pathian in kei tungah hong thuthiam a, ka taangsap theampo hong pia hi,” ci hi. A saan mateng Jacob in sonpui top hi." 
Genesis33:12 Esau in, “Kithoai vun a, pai tek tawng. Na mai ah kei pai tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis33:13 Jacob in, “Patangte thazawm a, tuute, ngannote le a note atu ka ngaisut a kul sia na he hi. Amate hawlngawp thong leng ni khat sung ngawngawn zong thi siat tu hi." 
Genesis33:14 Hesuakna taw paikhol ta'n, ngannote le patangte pai zawk babangin Edom ah kong phak dong dadam in kong zui tu uh hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis33:15 Esau in, “Tua ahile ka mite pawlkhat nang taw ton tu in hong nusiat tong,” ci hi. Ahizong Jacob in, “Tuabang kisamh bo, na maipha ka nga tu uuk bek khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis33:16 Tua ahiciang Esau sia, Edom ah cia kik tu in tua ni in kipan hi." 
Genesis33:17 Ahizong Jacob in Sukkoth ah pai a, tua munah ama atu inn khat le ngannote atu thaampheangte sa hi. Tua ahikom tua mun sia Sukkoth kici hi." 
Genesis33:18 Jacob sia Mesopotamia pan hong heak kik ciang Canaan ngam Shechem khuapi ciidam takin hong theng a, tua khuapi hui lo khat sungah ngiaphual saat hi." 
Genesis33:19 Ama in Shechem ii pa Hamor suan le paalte tung pan tua lo ii khen khat sia ngunntang zakhat taw lei hi. 
Genesis33:20 Ama in tua munah biaknatau khat ciang in, a min El, Israel ii Pathian, ci in phuak hi." 
Genesis34:1 Ni khat ni in Jacob le Leah te ii tanu Dinah sia Canaan numei pawlkhat kungah haw tu in pai hi. 
Genesis34:2 Tua ngam ukpi, Hiv te Hamor ii tapa Shechem in ama a mu ciang manin buanin khialpui hi." 
Genesis34:3 Ama in tua numei sia deihuai mama sa a, it ahikom tua nu ii a it natu in zongh hanciam hi." 
Genesis34:4 Ama in a pa tungah, “Hi numei ka zi tu in hong puisak ta'n,” ci hi." 
Genesis34:5 Jacob in a tanu Dinah ii minsiatna thu za ahihang a tapate duisung ah ngan cingin om ahikom amate hong cia mateng bangma vawt ngawl hi. 
Genesis34:6 Shechem ii pa Hamor sia Jacob taw thu son tu in a pai le," 
Genesis34:7 Jacob ii tapate duisung pan hong cia taw kisi hi. Amate in a thu teng a zaak ciangin Shechem ii hi bang tengin ngamta a, Jacob ii tanu a buanna taw in Israel mite a zawnsak manin thuak zo ngawl a, amate thin uuk ngawp uh hi." 
Genesis34:8 Hamor in Jacob tungah, “Ka tapa Shechem sia na tanu taw ki it zo hi; nong hesuakna in kiteangsak tawng." 
Genesis34:9 Ko mite le no mite kiteen natu in thukimna khat ih vawt tu hi. 
Genesis34:10 Tuasia ciang ko ngam hi sungah ko taw nong om thei tu uh a; na teen nopna mun po ah teangin, na uuk bangin sum vawtin, nei le lamh na heang thei tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis34:11 Tua zawkciang Shechem in Dinah ii pa le a suapuipate tungah, “Kei maipha hong pia tavun, na dei pawpo kong pia tu hi." 
Genesis34:12 Bang letsong teng dei nu ziam hong son tavun; mo man tu na deiza po hong ngen tavun; hong kiteangsak tu hi pole uhte nong nget zaza kong pia tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis34:13 Shechem in, a suapuinu uh Dinah min siasak zo ahikom Jacob ii tapate in Shechem le a pa Hamor kam a zona ah theambawl uh hi." 
Genesis34:14 Amate in Shechem tungah, “Vunteap at ngawl khat tungah ka suapuinu kong teangsak thei buatu uh hi; hong teangsak hi le ung ko atu in min siatna khat hi tu hi." 
Genesis34:15 Koma taw na kiban natu uh in, pa theampo vunteap na at uh ciang bekin thukim thei tu khu hi." 
Genesis34:16 Tua zawkciang tuabang a kiteen tu thukim tu khu hi. Note sungah kong teang tu uh a, ci khat sa khat ih suak tu hi." 
Genesis34:17 Ahizong ko ii ci teng hong saang ngawlin vunteap na at nuam bua uh le, ka suapuinu la in ka ciapui tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis34:18 Hamor le a tapa Shechem in hi thu teng pha tuak sa a," 
Genesis34:19 tangvalpa in hai ngawlin a ci bangin a vunteap at paih hi, banghang ziam cile Jacob ii tanu a dei hang ahi hi. Shechem sia amate innkuan sungah a thupibel ahi hi." 
Genesis34:20 Hamor le a tapa Shechem in taangpi kikhopna khuapi kongpi ah pai a, a khuapuite tungah thu a sonna panin:" 
Genesis34:21 “Hi mite sia ih lawmte hi a, ih ngam sungah eima taw teang khawmin a ukna po ah paisak tawng. Ih ngam zongh lian a, amate atu taw in kicing lel hi. A tanute ih teenpui tu a, ei a te zongh ih pia tu hi." 
Genesis34:22 Ahihang hi mihingte ei sungah hong teen tu a thukim thei natu le eima taw ci khat sa khat a sua natu in amate vunteap a ki at bangin ei, pa a minpiang vunteap ih at kulsak hi." 
Genesis34:23 A nganno teng le a neisa dang theampo ei aa hi lel tu ngawl ziam? Tua ahiciang thukim in amate ei sungah teangsak tawng,” ci hi." 
Genesis34:24 Hamor le Shechem ii son thu teng a khuapuite theampo in lungkim pui a, pa theampo vunteap ki at siat hi." 
Genesis34:25 Ni thum zawkciang amate vunteap atna meima nat saanin a om laitak, Jacob tapa teng sung pan niite, Dinah ii suapuipate ahi Simeon le Levi te in a namsau tek la in, muanmawk khol ngawlin khuapi sungah tum a, pasal theampo thatlum siat uh hi," 
Genesis34:26 Hamor le a tapa Shechem zongh kihel hi. Tua zawkciang Shechem inn pan Dinah la in ciapui uh hi. 
Genesis34:27 Tuabang a thalup zawkciang Jacob tapa dangte in, a suapuinu a kiminsiatsak huvau in a phula tu in a khua phuul uh hi." 
Genesis34:28 Amate in a tuuhonte, a khuite, a laate, khua sung le lo sung a om na theampo laaksak siat uh hi." 
Genesis34:29 Amate in na manpha theampo la in, numei patang theampo man a, inn sung vanh theampo pua in ciapui uh hi." 
Genesis34:30 Jacob in Simeon le Levi tungah, “Kei thinngim haksatna sungah hong then zo nu hi; tu in Canaan te, Periz te le mi dang theampo in kei hong ngaimaw tu hi. Kei la mihing tam nei ngawl a; amate teng kikop in kei hong sim thong le ih innkuan bup in hong mon tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis34:31 Ahizong amate in, “Ka suapuinu uh sia pumpi kizuak khat bangin a kivawt tu sia suaksak thei mama ngawl khu hi,” ci in zo uh hi." 
Genesis35:1 Pathian in Jacob tungah, “Bethel ah pai paih ta'n a, tua munah teang ta'n. Na suapuipa Esau kung pan na tai lai in, nang tungah hong kilangh Pathian, keima atu in tua munah biaknatau khat sa in,” ci hi." 
Genesis35:2 Tua ahiciang Jacob in a innkuan puite le a ompui teng tungah, “Ngamdang pathian milim na nei te vawk vun a; noma le noma kithiansua in, puanthiang silh vun." 
Genesis35:3 Hi mun nusia in Bethel ah ih pai tu hi, tua munah ngim ka nga hunin hong hu a, ka paina sa theampo ah hong ompui Pathian atu in biaknatau khat ka sa tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis35:4 Tua ahiciang amate in a ngamdang pathian milim a nei theampo le a baa lai bilbaate zongh Jacob tungah pia uh hi. Jacob in Shechem khuahui oak thingkung sia nuai ah tua teng phum hi. 
Genesis35:5 Jacob le a tapate vaiding tu a kipat lai in, khua naina tengah a teang mite tungah launa lian tung ahikom khua mite in amate del ngawl uh hi." 
Genesis35:6 Jacob sia a mihingte theampo taw Canaan ngam sung, tu in Bethel a kici Luz khua theng uh hi." 
Genesis35:7 Ama in tua munah biaknatau khat sa hi, a suapuipa kung pan a tai lai in ama kungah Pathian a kilangh na mun ahikom tua mun sia Bethel ii Pathian min tapsakin Bethel ci hi." 
Genesis35:8 Rebecca a omh nu Deborah thi a, Bethel ii thangsang oak thingkung nuai ah kiphum hi. Tua ahikom, “Kaana Oak Thingkung” ci in min kiphuak hi." 
Genesis35:9 Mesopotamia pan Jacob hong heak kik ciang ama tungah Pathian kilangh kik a, thupha pia hi." 
Genesis35:10 Pathian in ama tungah, “Na min Jacob hi, ahizong tu pan kipan Israel hi tu hi,” ci hi. Tuabangin, Pathian in ama min Israel phuak hi." 
Genesis35:11 Tuaciang Pathian in ama tungah, “Keima in Vaanglianbelpa Pathian ka hi hi. Ta tam mama nei ta'n. Minamte nang sung pan hong piangsuk tu a, kumpite taanghpupi na hi tu hi." 
Genesis35:12 Abraham le Isaac ka piak ngam le lei sia nangma kong pia tu a, nang nung pan na suan na paalte tung zongh ah ka pia tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis35:13 Tua zawkciang Pathian in ama nusia hi. 
Genesis35:14 Pathian ii ama a paupuina tua munah Jacob in khansuang khat phut a, tua khansuang sia sapittui le olive thau buakna taw in aapna vawt hi." 
Genesis35:15 Ama in tua mun sia Bethel ci hi. 
Genesis35:16 Jacob le a innkuanpuite Bethel pan ding uh a, Ephrath khua a thet ma hiatin Rachel a nau nei tu hun tung a, nautun zo in ngim mama hi." 
Genesis35:17 Ama nautut a haksatbel hun ciang nausuaksak syanu in ama tungah, “Rachel awng, lau om nawn bo; tapa dang khat nei ni hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis35:18 Ahizong a nu thi dektak zo hi, a thi ma a hui a tat tu ciang a tapa min Benoni ci in phuak hi, ahizong a pa in a min Benjamin phuak hi." 
Genesis35:19 Rachel a thi ciang Eprath paina lampi hui, tu in Bethlehem a kici na munah kiphum hi." 
Genesis35:20 Jacob in tua munah khansuang khat phut a, tuasia tuni dongin Rachel thaanmual tepteena ahi hi." 
Genesis35:21 Jacob kikhiin kik a, Eder tausaang langkhat ah a ngiaphual saat hi." 
Genesis35:22 Tua ngam ah Jacob a teen laitakin, Reuben in a pa zinote khat ahi Bilhah taw omkhawm hi; Jacob in tua thu za a, thin uuk mama hi. Jacob in tapa sawm le nii nei hi." 
Genesis35:23 Leah ii tapate sia Reuben (Jacob ii tapa lianbel), Simeon, Levi, Judah, Issachar le Zebulun ahi hi." 
Genesis35:24 Rachel ii a tapate sia Joseph le Benjamin ahi hi. 
Genesis35:25 Rachel sila Bilhah ii a tapate sia Dan le Naphtali ahi hi. 
Genesis35:26 Leah sila Zilpah ii tapate sia Gad le Asher ahi hi; hi tapate teng sia Mesopotamia ah suak hi. 
Genesis35:27 Abraham le Isaac teenna ahi Hebron khua nai Mamre khua ah a om a pa Isaac kungah Jacob pai hi. 
Genesis35:28 Isaac kum za le sawmliat nungta in," 
Genesis35:29 a huai tatakin thi hi; ama sia a tate Esau le Jacob in vui hi. 
Genesis36:1 Hi mite sia Edom zongh a kici, Esau ii suan le paal te ahi hi." 
Genesis36:2 Esau in Canaan numeite teenpui a: tuate sia Hit te Elon ii tanu Adah; Hiv te Zibeon tapa Anah ii tanu Oholibamah 
Genesis36:3 le Nebaioth ii suapuinu, le Ishmael ii a tanu Basemath ahi uh hi." 
Genesis36:4 Adah in ta Eliphaz nei a; Basemath in ta Reuel nei hi; 
Genesis36:5 Oholibamah in ta Jeush, Jalam le Korah nei hi. Hi teng sia Canaan ngamsung pan a nei Esau ii tapate ahi hi." 
Genesis36:6 Tua zawkciang Esau in a zite, a tapate, a tanute le a inn sung a teang mihingte theampo, a nganno theampo le Canaan ngam sungah a nga a neisa theampo la in a suapuipa Jacob kung pan ngamdang khat zuan khawm tek hi." 
Genesis36:7 Ama le Jacob te kivaak kitaa natu in a teenna ngam le lei kicing zo ngawl ahi hu in paisan hi; amate ii neisa nganno tam leih ahikom teang khawm thei nawn ngawl uh hi. 
Genesis36:8 Tua ahikom Edom mualtung ngam ah Esau teang hi. 
Genesis36:9 Hite sia Edom te ii taanghpupi Esau suan le paalte ahi hi. 
Genesis36:10 Esau in a zi Adah taw tapa khat Eliphaz nei a, Eliphaz in tapa nga nei hi: tuate sia Teman, Omar, Zepho, Gatam le Kenaz ahi hi. Tuaciang a zi dang Timna taw tapa Amalek neithua hi. Esau in a zi Basemath taw Reuel nei a, Reuel in tapa li nei hi: tuate sia Nahath, Zerah, Shammah le Mizzah ahi hi." 
Genesis36:11  
Genesis36:12  
Genesis36:13  
Genesis36:14 Esau in Zibeon tapa Anah ii tanu Oholibamah taw tapa thum nei a: Jeush, Jalam le Korah ahi hi." 
Genesis36:15 Esau suante sia hi minamte ahi uh hi. Esau ii ta masabel Eliphaz sia a nuai a minamte ii pianna taanghpupi ahi hi. Tua minamte sia Teman, Omar, Zepho, Kenaz," 
Genesis36:16 Korah, Gatam le Amalek te ahi hi. Hite sia Esau ii zi Adah ii suan le paalte ahi hi." 
Genesis36:17 Esau ii tapa Reuel sia a nuai a minamte ii pianna taanghpupi ahi hi. Tuate sia Nahath, Zerah, Shammah le Mizzah te ahi hi. Hite sia Esau ii zi Basemath ii suan le paalte ahi hi." 
Genesis36:18 Anah ii tanu, a zi Oholibamah taw a hin Esau ii suan le paalte sia a nuai a minamte hi a: Jeush, Jalam le Korah te ahi hi." 
Genesis36:19 Hi minamte theampo sia Esau ii suan le paalte ahi hi. 
Genesis36:20 Edom ngam sungah a teang ciilte sia a minam in kikhen a, tuate ii pianna sia a nuai a bangin Hor te Seir ii suan le paalte taw kinguizui hi: tuate sia Lota'n, Shobal, Zibeon, Anah, Dishon, Ezer le Dishan ahi hi." 
Genesis36:21  
Genesis36:22 Lotan sia Hori le Heman beete ii pianna taanghpupi ahi hi. (Lotan in Timna a kici suapuinumei khat nei hi.) 
Genesis36:23 Shobal sia Alvan, Manahath, Ebal, Shepho le Onam beete ii pianna taanghpupi ahi hi." 
Genesis36:24 Zibeon in tapa nii nei a, Aiah le Anah ahi hi. (Anah sia duisung ngampa ah a pa laate a cin lai in, ciktui sa te a mu pa ahi hi.)" 
Genesis36:25 Anah sia Dishon ii pa hi a, Hemdan, Eshban, Ithran le Cheran te ii taanghpupi ahi hi. Anah zongh in Oholibamah a kici ta numei khat nei hi." 
Genesis36:26  
Genesis36:27 Ezer sia Bilhan, Zaavan le Akan beete ii pianna taanghpupi ahi hi." 
Genesis36:28 Dishan sia, Uz le Aran bee le phungte pianna taanghpupi ahi hi." 
Genesis36:29 Edom ngamsung Hor minamte sia: Lota'n, Shobal, Zibeon, Anah, Dishon, Ezer le Dishan te ahi hi." 
Genesis36:30  
Genesis36:31 Israel ngam sungah kumpi khat zongh a om ma in a nuai a kumpite in a kizomin Edom ngam uk uh hi: tuate sia Dinhabah khua pan Beor tapa Bela Bozrah khua pan Zerah tapa Jobab Teman ngamkhen pan Husham Avith khua pan Bedad tapa Hadad (Ama in Moab ngamsung a kisimna ah Midian te zo hi.) Masrekah khua pan Samlah Rehoboth-Ngun-tung-khua pan Shaul Achbor ii tapa Baal Hanan Pau khua pan Hadad (A zi sia Mehetabel hi a, Matred tanu, Mezahab ii tunu ahi hi.)" 
Genesis36:31 Israel ngam sungah kumpi khat zongh a om ma in a nuai a kumpite in a kizomin Edom ngam uk uh hi: tuate sia Dinhabah khua pan Beor tapa Bela Bozrah khua pan Zerah tapa Jobab Teman ngamkhen pan Husham Avith khua pan Bedad tapa Hadad (Ama in Moab ngamsung a kisimna ah Midian te zo hi.) Masrekah khua pan Samlah Rehoboth-Ngun-tung-khua pan Shaul Achbor ii tapa Baal Hanan Pau khua pan Hadad (A zi sia Mehetabel hi a, Matred tanu, Mezahab ii tunu ahi hi.)" 
Genesis36:32  
Genesis36:33  
Genesis36:34  
Genesis36:35  
Genesis36:36  
Genesis36:37  
Genesis36:38  
Genesis36:39  
Genesis36:40 Esau sia a nuai a Edom minamte ii pianna taanghpupi hi a: tuate sia, Timna, Alvah, Jetheth, Oholibamah, Elah, Pinon, Kenaz, Teman, Mibzar, Magdiel le Iram ahi hi. Hi minamte teenna, a mun a ngam tek sia minam min zui in kilo hi." 
Genesis36:41

Genesis37:1 Jacob sia a pa teenna ngei Canaan ngam ah teang suak hi," 
Genesis37:2 hisia sia Jacob innkuan taanghthu ahi hi. Joseph sia tangvalno kum sawm le kum sali pha a, a pa zinote ahi Bilhah le Zilpah ii tapate taw tuu le kealte cing khawm hi. Ama in a suapuite ngamtat siatna teng a pa tungah ko hi." 
Genesis37:3 Jacob in a tapa dang teng sangin Joseph it zaw hi, banghang ziam cile a huai zawkciang a nei tapa ahi hi. Ama in puantual baansau khat Joseph atu in khuisak hi." 
Genesis37:4 A pa in amate sang in Joseph a it zawkna thu a suapuite in a mu uh ciang a suapuipa ngaimaw mama a, pha takin paupui ngawl hi." 
Genesis37:5 Zan khat Joseph in mang khat man a, tua a mangmat teng a suapuipate tungah a son ciang amate in ngaimaw seseam uh hi." 
Genesis37:6 Ama in, “Ka mangmat sia hong ngai tavun." 
Genesis37:7 Ei teng lo sungah zungtaang vawngte sawm in ih om a, keima taangvawng hong tho in dingtang hi. Keima taangvawng sia noma taangvawngte in kiim uumin a kun uh hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis37:8 A suapuipate in ama tungah, “Nang kumpi khat suakin kote hong uk tu in kingaisun ni ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi. Ama ii mangmatte hu le a thuson teng hu in amate in ngaimaw seseam uh hi." 
Genesis37:9 Tuasia zawkciang Joseph in mang dangkhat man leleau in a suapuipate tungah, “Mang dangkhat ka man a, tua ka mang sungah ni, tha le aksi sawm le khat te in keima hong kunsuk ka mu hi,” ci in son hi." 
Genesis37:10 Ama in a pa tungah zongh a mang son a, a pa in: “Tuasia bangbang mang hi thong ziam? Na nu, na suapuipate le kei, na mai ah pai in hong kun tu in ngaisun ni ziam?” ci in teih hi." 
Genesis37:11 Joseph ii suapuipate in ama eang uh hi, ahizong a pa in hi thute theampo a thinsung ah ngaisun nginge hi." 
Genesis37:12 Ni khat ni in Joseph ii suapuipate a pa tuuhon cing tu in Shechem ah a pai zawkciang," 
Genesis37:13 Jacob in Joseph tungah, “Na suapuite tuu cinna Shechem ah pai lete kong oai hi,” ci hi. Joseph in, “Kithoai zo ing,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis37:14 A pa in ama tungah, “Va pai ta'n a, na suapuite a ngammuang na ziam, a nganhonte a dam na ziam va en ta'n; tua zawkciang hong cia kikin hong son ta'n,” ci hi. Tua ahikom a pa in Hebron Kuam pan pai tu in ama sawl hi. Joseph sia Shechem theng a," 
Genesis37:15 ngam sungah a va kawkoai sia pasal khat in a mu ciang, “Bang zong ni ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Genesis37:16 Ama in “A tuuhon a cing ka suapuite ka zong hi. Amate omna mun nong son thei tu ziam?,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis37:17 Tua pa in, “Amate hi mun nusia zo hi. Dothan ah ka pai tu uh hi, a ci ka za hi,” ci hi. Tua ahiciang Joseph in a suapuite nungzui in Dothan ah amate mu hi." 
Genesis37:18 Amate in a ngal khat ah Joseph mu a, amate kung a thet ma in, Joseph thalup tu in vaihawm a thukhensat uh hi." 
Genesis37:19 Amate khat le khat, “Hi sungah mangmanpa hong pai hi." 
Genesis37:20 Tu in hong pai tavun, ama thatin tuikhuk kang sa khat sungah a luang vawk tawng. Ngamsa khat in ama petlum hi, ih ci thei hi. Tuasia ciang a mangmatte bang a suak ziam ih en tu hi,” kici uh hi." 
Genesis37:21 Reuben in a thuson teng a zaak ciang Joseph a suatak natu hanciam hi. Reuben in, “Joseph that bua tawng," 
Genesis37:22 duisung ah a om hi tuikhuk sungah ama khia vun ahizong ama liamsua heak vun,” ci hi. Ama suatakin a pa kungah puak kik nuam ahikom ama in tubangin a ci ahi hi." 
Genesis37:23 A suapuite kungah Joseph hong thet ciang ama silh lai a puantual baansau laaikeaksak uh hi. 
Genesis37:24 Tuaciang amate in Joseph manin tuikhuk kang sa sungah khia uh hi. 
Genesis37:25 An a neak laitak Gilead pan Egypt ah khual a haw Ishmael te honkhat thakhat thu in mu uh hi. A kalaohte sia hel namtui le thingnaai te puasak uh hi. 
Genesis37:26 Judah in a suapuite tungah, “Ih suapuipa that a tua thu ih ip hu in a bang meetna nga tu hi ziam?" 
Genesis37:27 Hi Ishmael te tungah zuak heu tawng. Tuabang hi leang ama bangma law kul ngawl tu hi; tua bek dom ngawlin ama sia ih suapuipa hi a, eima chi le sa tatak ahi hi,” ci hi. A suapuite zongh lungkim a," 
Genesis37:28 Midian te sum vawt pawlkhat hong thet nai ciang a suapuite in Joseph tuikhuk sung pan kaito kikin, Ishmael te tungah ngunn dangka kul taw zuak a, amate in Egypt ah paipui uh hi." 
Genesis37:29 Reuben hong theng kik a, tuikhuk sungah Joseph a mu ngawl ciang khuangai in a puan balkeak hi." 
Genesis37:30 A suapuite kungah ama heak kikin, “Tangvalpa om ngawl hi! Bang law tu khi ziam?” ci hi." 
Genesis37:31 Tuaciang amate in keal khat ngo a, tua chi sungah Joseph puantual pap hi." 
Genesis37:32 Amate in tua puan la a ciapui in a pa tungah, “Hi puan mu ung. Na tapa puan ahi ziam?” ci uh hi." 
Genesis37:33 A pa in tua puan tel a, “Hi hi, ama puan hi! Ngamsa khat in thatlum zo hi. Ka tapa Joseph kibalneen zo hi!” ci hi." 
Genesis37:34 Jacob khuangai in a puan balkeak a, khau-ip puan silh hi. A tapa hangin khuangai a ngei hialma kaikut hi." 
Genesis37:35 A tapate le a tanute theampo in ama heeneam tu in hong pai hi, ahizong heenep tu nuam ngawlin, “Mithi khua ah ka tapa atu khuangai sa in ka paisuk tu hi,” ci hi. Tua ahiciang a tapa Joseph hangin ama khuangai top hi." 
Genesis37:36 Tua hun sungin Egypt ngam ah Midian te in Joseph sia Potiphar tungah zuak uh hi, ama sia kumpipa ii ulian khat hi a, kumpi inncing ngalkap hon ukpa ahi hi." 
Genesis38:1 Tua hun khawng in Judah sia a suapuipate nusia a, Adullam khua mi Hirah a kici pa taw teang khawm hi." 
Genesis38:2 Tualai ah Judah in Canaan mi Shua ii tanu ngaknu khat taw kimu hi. Ama in tua nu teenpui a," 
Genesis38:3 tapa khat nei in a min Er phuak hi. 
Genesis38:4 Ama ngai kik a, tapa dangkhat nei in a min Onan phuak hi." 
Genesis38:5 Tapa khat nei kik a, a min Shelah phuak hi. A tapa a sua laitakin Judah sia Achzib ah om hi." 
Genesis38:6 Judah in a tapaciil Er atu in Tamar kici zi khat puisak hi. 
Genesis38:7 Er ngamtat pha ngawl a, Topa lungkimsak ngawl ahikom Topa in ama thatlum hi." 
Genesis38:8 Tua zawkciang Judah in Er ii suapuipa Onan tungah, “Pai in, na suapuipa zi meingong nu taw lumkhawm ta'n. Na suapuipa in suan le paal a nei thei natu in, a pasal suapui na hi bangma na vaipuak tu teng khuangkhim ta'n,” ci hi." 
Genesis38:9 Ahizong Onan in a tate sia ama aa ahi ngawl tu he ahikom a upa zi taw a omkhop simin, a suapuipa atu ta kuama a pian ngawl natu in a bawtui lei ah taaksak hi." 
Genesis38:10 A ngamtatna Topa lungkim ngawlin Topa in ama zongh thatlum hi. 
Genesis38:11 Tuasia ciang Judah in a monu Tamar tungah, “Na nungsang na pa inn zuan kik ta'n a, ka tapa Shelah a tangval mateng meingong in va om phot ta'n,” ci hi. Shelah zongh a suapuite bangma in a kithalup tu a lau hangin Judah in hi bangin a ci ahi hi. Tua ahiciang Tamar a nungsang zuan hi." 
Genesis38:12 Tua zawk hun khat ciang Judah ii zi thi hi. A khuangai hun a ven ciang, ama sia Adullam khua mi a lawmpa Hirah taw a tuute mul meetna mun Timnah ah pai uh hi." 
Genesis38:13 Mi khat in Tamar tungah na topasal a tuute mul meet tu in Timnah ah pai hi, ci in son hi." 
Genesis38:14 Tuasia ciang ama silh lai a meingong puante laih a, maituamna puanpaa khat taw a mai tuamin Timnah khua paina lampi tung, Enaim khua sung tumna ah to hi. Tu in Judah ii tapa nobel Shelah sia tangval zo ahi hunlam Tamar in he hi, ahizong ama sia Shelah taw kiteangsak ngawl lai hi." 
Genesis38:15 Judah in Tamar a mu ciang ama sia a mai tuam ahikom numei pumpi kizuakte khat in ngaisun hi. 
Genesis38:16 Lampi hui ama omna ah pai in, “Pha hi, bangza ngen ni ziam?” ci hi. (Tua nu sia a monu ahi hunlam ama in he ngawl hi.) Tamar in, “Bang hong pia tu ni ziam?” ci hi." 
Genesis38:17 Ama in, “Ka nganhon sung pan kealno khat kong puak tu hi,” ci in zo hi. Tamar in, “Tua keal nong puak dong kei tungah kiciamna kho khat nong pia tu ahile thukim tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis38:18 Ama in, “Kiciamna bang hong pia tu khi ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Tamar in, “Na min tupna le a khau, na khut sungah a om na ciangkhut,” ci in zo hi. Ama in tua teng pia hi. Tua zawkciang amate omkhawm a, ama naupaai hi." 
Genesis38:19 Tamar inn ah cia in, a maituamna puan hawkin, a meingong puan teng silh kik hi." 
Genesis38:20 Judah in a kiciamna vanh teng tan kik tu in keal khat taw a lawmpa Hirah paisak a, ahizong Hirah in tua nu mu zo ngawl hi." 
Genesis38:21 Ama in Enaim ah pasal pawlkhat dongh a, “Hi sung lamhui ah a om pumpi kizuak nu sia koi sungah om ziam?” ci hi. Amate in, “Hi sungah pumpi kizuak numei om ngeingawl hi,” ci in zo uh hi." 
Genesis38:22 Ama cia kikin Judah tungah, “Ama ka mu zo bua hi. Tua munah pasalte in hi sungah pumpi kizuak numei om ngeingawl hi, hong ci hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis38:23 Judah in, “Vanhte ama in keamsak lel tawng, Mite in nuisansak nuam bua hing. A man piak ka sawm hang ama mu zo ngawl ni hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis38:24 Tha thum bang zawkciang mihing khat in Judah tungah, “Na monu Tamar sia pumpi kizuak khat bang ngamta a, tu in ama naupaai hi,” ci in son hi. Judah in, “Ama paipui vun a, hallum tavun,” ci in thupia hi." 
Genesis38:25 Ama a kipaipui ciang, a topasal tungah kam vaitha a: “Hi vanh teng a neipa taw naupaai khi hi. Hi khau kivaw min tupna le hi ciangkhutte — en hen, akua neisa ziam?,” ci hi." 
Genesis38:26 Judah in tua vanhte ciamtee a, “Ama maan hi. Ka tapa Shelah taw ka teensak tu hi napi ka teangsak bua hi — ama atu ka vaipuak a lel ka hi hi,” ci hi. Tuaciang Judah in ama omkhop pui kik ngei nawn ngawl hi." 
Genesis38:27 Nausua hun a thet ciang naupeang a nei tu sia kimu hi. 
Genesis38:28 Nausuak tu a tut laitak naute khat in a baan kilawtsak hi; nausuaksak syanu in tua baan zamhin khausan khat a khut tung khii a, “Hisia suak masa hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis38:29 Ahizong a khut dawk kik a tuaciang a suapuipa hong suak masa hi. Tuasia ciang nausuaksak syanu in, “Hi bangin na sua natu lampi nangma in hong tawm ni hi,” ci hi. Tua ahikom ama min Perez kiphuak hi." 
Genesis38:30 Tua zawkciang a khut tung a khausan taw a suapuipa hong suak a, ama min Zerah kiphuak hi." 
Genesis39:1 Ishmael mite in Egypt ah Joseph paipui a, kumpipa ii uliante sung pan khat ahi, kumpi inncing ngalkap bupa Potiphar tungah zuak hi." 
Genesis39:2 Topa in Joseph panpui a, nasep zosak hi. Ama sia Egypt mi a topa inn ah teang a," 
Genesis39:3 Topa in Joseph panpui ahikom a nasepna theampo ah a zawsakna thu a topa in mu hi. 
Genesis39:4 Ama tungah Potiphar lungkim a, ama aituam naseam tu in koi hi; tua ahikom a inn le a neisa theampo uksak hi." 
Genesis39:5 Tua hun a kipan Joseph hangin Egypt mi Potiphar te innkuan, a inn sung le a lo sungah a neisa theampo Topa in thupha pia hi." 
Genesis39:6 Potiphar in a na theampo Joseph et tu in aap siat a, a anneak tu ngawl buang bangma dang thinbot in nei ngawl hi. Joseph sia a khanpha in a mealhoi a," 
Genesis39:7 tawmvei zawkciang a topa zi in Joseph lungngul in luppui tu in kunh hi. 
Genesis39:8 Ama in nial a, “En in, hi sungah keima om ka hikom ka topa in inn sungah bangma thintoi ngawl hi. A neisa theampo ka et tu in hong aap siat hi." 
Genesis39:9 Hi inn sungah ama taw kibangin a thu neiza ma ka nei a, nangma simngawl buang kei atu in khaam hong nei ngawl hi. Tua ahiciang hi bang ngamtat pha ngawl vawtin Pathian tungah maw thei tu khi ziam?” ci hi." 
Genesis39:10 A topa zi in Joseph luppui tu ni khat zawk ni khat in kunh hi napi ama in luppui nuam ngawl hi. 
Genesis39:11 Ahizong ni khat ni in Joseph sia inn sungah ama ii na seam tu in a tum ciang tualai ah inn naseamte kuama om ngawl hi. 
Genesis39:12 A tonu in Joseph puantual pan man a, “Kei taw lumkhawm tawng,” ci hi. Ahizong a tonu khut sungah a puantual nusiat a, suakta in a pua sangah tai hi." 
Genesis39:13 A tonu in a puantual nusia in inn pan a tai a mu ciang," 
Genesis39:14 ama in a inn naseamte samin, “Hi sia en vun! Ka pasal ii inn ah hong ciapui, hi Hebrew sia pa in ei hong zawnsak vawt hi. Ama ka inndoi sungah hong tum a, buanin khialpui tu in hong kipan hi, ahizong a nging theiza in ka cik-au hi." 
Genesis39:15 Ama in ka cik-au a zaak ciang a puantual kei kungah nusia in doipua ah tai hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis39:16 Joseph ii topa, inn ah hong cia dong ama in Joseph puantual keam hi." 
Genesis39:17 Tuaciang a pasal tungah ama in thupiang a son ngei teng ma son a: “Hi lai ah nong ciapui Hebrew sila pa in ka inndoi sungah tumin, kei hong zawnsak vawt hi." 
Genesis39:18 Ahizong ka cik-au ciang a puantual ka kungah nusia in doipua ah tai hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis39:19 Joseph ii topa a thin uuk mama a," 
Genesis39:20 Joseph mansak in kumpipa ii thongtaakte a koina thong sungah khum hi. 
Genesis39:21 Ahihang thong ukpa ii Joseph tungah a lungkim natu in Topa in Joseph panpui a, thupha pia hi." 
Genesis39:22 Ama in Joseph sia thongtaak dang theampo uk tu in koi a, thong sungah nasep theampo vaipuak neisak hi." 
Genesis39:23 Joseph ii nasepnate thong ukpa ii et kik kul ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile Topa in Joseph panpui a, a nasepna theampo zosak hi." 
Genesis40:1 Tua zawk hun khat ciangin Egypt kumpipa ii sapittui piapa le anluum empipa in kumpipa thin uuksak hi. 
Genesis40:2 Hi naseam ulian niite tungah kumpipa thin uuk in," 
Genesis40:3 Joseph kikhumna mun, kumpi inncing ngalkap bupa inn sungah thongtaaksak hi." 
Genesis40:4 Amate khuangeipi ma thong sungah om a, tua ngalkap bupa in Joseph sia amate naseamin koi hi." 
Genesis40:5 Zan khat tua thong sungah sapittui piapa le anluum empipa in mang khat veve man a, a mangte in khiakna tuam tetek nei hi." 
Genesis40:6 Zingsang in amate kungah Joseph a pai ciang thinngim a, a om sia mu hi." 
Genesis40:7 Joseph in amate tungah “Banghangin tuni in na thin uh ngim tuak mama ziam?” ci in dongh hi. 
Genesis40:8 Amate in, “Mang khat veve ka man uh a, tua mangte ii khiakna hong son thei tu hi sungah kuama dang om ngawl hi,” ci in zo hi. Joseph in, “Mang khiak theina hong pia sia Pathian hi, na mang uh hong son tavun,” ci hi." 
Genesis40:9 Tuasia ciang sapittui piapa in, “Ka mang sungah sapitkung khat ka mai ah om a," 
Genesis40:10 tua tungah sapitbaak thum om hi. A teete a meen po ciang hong mom in sapitngate min hi. 
Genesis40:11 Kumpipa hai ka toai a; sapitngate ka lo a, hai sungah suukin ama ka pia hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis40:12 Joseph in, “A khiakna hi bang hi: sapitbaak thum sia ni thum hi." 
Genesis40:13 Ni thum sungin kumpipa in nang hong suatak tu a, hong maisakin na nasep ngei hong pia kik tu hi. Ama sapittui piapa na hi lai a, na sep ngei bangma in a hai na pia tu hi." 
Genesis40:14 Ahizong na dau a pai ciang nong hesuakna in kei hong phawk kik ta'n a, hi thongsung pan ka suatak thei natu in kumpipa tungah ka thu teng hesuakna taw hong sonsak ta'n." 
Genesis40:15 A tatakin ci leang Hebrew ngam panin kei hong kiman hi a, hi lai Egypt ngam zongh ah thong sung hong kikhum natu in bangma ka vawt bua hi” ci hi."
