Genesis40:16 Anluum empipa in sapittui piapa ii mang a khiakna sia thupha hi ci in a mu ciang ama in Joseph tungah, “Kei zongh mang khat man khi hi; anluum law thum thuapin ka lu tungah ka pua hi." 
Genesis40:17 A tungbel law sungah kumpipa atu in moh namcin om a, vacimte in tuate ne uh hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis40:18 Joseph in, “A khiakna hi bang hi: law thumte sia ni thum ahi hi." 
Genesis40:19 Ni thum sungin kumpipa in nang hong pusua tu a, — tuaciang na ngawng hong tan tu hi! Tua zawkciang ama in na luang khuam khat tungah hong khai tu a, vacimte in na sa ne tu uh hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis40:20 Ni thum zawkciang kumpipa suani in, ama in a uliante theampo atu in poai khat khaam a; sapittui piapa le anluum empipa sia ama in tha in, a uliante mai ah paipui hi." 
Genesis40:21 Ama in sapittui piapa sia a nasep ngei ma pia kik a," 
Genesis40:22 ahizong anluum empipa sia thatlum hi. Joseph son bang tatakin hi teng theampo piang siat hi. 
Genesis40:23 Ahizong sapittui piapa in Joseph phawk ngei nawn ngawl hi — ama ii thu theampo mangil cip hi. 
Genesis41:1 Tua zawk kum nii zawkciang Egypt kumpipa in mang man a, a mang sungah Nile ngunhui ah ding a," 
Genesis41:2 Nile ngun sung panin khuipui a thau, a zol sali pusuak to in, lopa ne tu kipan uh hi." 
Genesis41:3 Tua zawkciang a ngawm, a ngu nguak a om khuipui salite pusuak to hi. Tua teng hong pai a, Nile ngunhui a khuipui dangte kungah dingin," 
Genesis41:4 a ngawm khuipui salite in a thau khuipui salite netum uh hi. Tuasia ciang kumpipa khanglo hi. 
Genesis41:5 Ama mu kikin mang dang khat man hi. A hui bup taknei in a min, taanghui sali sia kung khat tung pan hui hi." 
Genesis41:6 Tuaciang senneal vui in theapsak in a ngeau singseng taanghui dang sali hong po hi," 
Genesis41:7 a theap taanghui teng in a tak nei taanghui teng valhtum hi. Kumpipa khanglo a, mang maman ahi sia tel hi." 
Genesis41:8 A zingsang ciang ama thinngim ahikom mitbum thiamte le Egypt mipil miciim theampo samsak hi. Ama in amate tungah a mang teng son a, ahizong kuama in a mang khiaksak thei ngawl hi." 
Genesis41:9 Tuasia ciang sapittui pia pa in kumpipa tungah, “Tuni in ka khialna kong pualaak kul hi." 
Genesis41:10 Kei le anluum empipa tungah na thin uuk a, kumpi inncing ngalkap bupa inn sung thong sungah nong khum hi." 
Genesis41:11 Zan khat ka nii in mang khat veve ka man uh a, ka mangte uh in khiakna tuatuam nei hi." 
Genesis41:12 Tua munah kumpi inncing ngalkap bupa ii silapa, Hebrew tangvalno khat kote taw omkhawm hi. Ama tungah koma mangte ka son uh ciang a khiakna hong son hi." 
Genesis41:13 Ama son bang tatakin piang a: kei sia ka nasep nong pia kik a, ahizong anluum empipa sia na thatlum hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis41:14 Kumpipa in Joseph samsak a, thong sung pan thakhat ma in hong kipaipui hi. Joseph a mul meet thiangin, a puante a laih zawkciang kumpipa omna ah pai hi." 
Genesis41:15 Kumpipa in ama tungah, “Mang khat ka man a, kuama in a khiakna hong son thei ngawl hi, nang sia mangkhia thei ci in hong kison hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis41:16 Joseph in, “Kumpipa awng, kei hi thei hi ngawl hi, ahizong Pathian in mang khiakna maan hong son tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis41:17 Kumpipa in, “Ka mang sungah Nile ngunhui ah ka ding a," 
Genesis41:18 limci in a thau khuipui sali, ngun sung pan hong pusuak to a, lohingte ne tu in kipan hi." 
Genesis41:19 Tua zawkciang a ngawm a ngu nguak a om a dang khuipui sali hong pusuak to hi. Tuate sia Egypt ngam sungah ka mu ngei khuipui zawngkhal belte ahi hi. 
Genesis41:20 Khuipui ngawmte in khuipui thaute netum a," 
Genesis41:21 ahizong kuama in a neak hunlam he ngawl tu hi, banghang ziam cile amate sia nidang bangma in ngawm veve hi. Tuasia ciang ka khanglo hi." 
Genesis41:22 Mang ka man kik a, taangkung khat tung pan a hui bup taknei in a min taanghui salite ka mu hi." 
Genesis41:23 Tuaciang senneal vui in theapsakin a ngeau singseng taanghui sali hong po a," 
Genesis41:24 tuaciang a theap taanghuite in a taknei taanghuite valhtum hi. Mitbum thiamte tungah ka mang ka son a, ahizong amate khat zongh in ka mang khiakna hong son thei ngawl hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis41:25 Joseph in kumpipa tungah, “Na mangte nii ii a khiakna sia kibang hi; Pathian in a sep tu teng nang tungah hong son zo hi." 
Genesis41:26 Khuipui thau salite sia kum sali hi a, taanghui a taknei salite zongh kum sali ma hi; a khiakna kibang hi." 
Genesis41:27 A khak sang a hong pusuak khuipui ngawm sali le senneal vui ii a ngeausak singseng taanghui theap salite sia kialpi kum sali ahi hi. 
Genesis41:28 Tuasia kong sonsa bangma hi — Pathian in a sep tu teng nang tungah hong lak zo hi. 
Genesis41:29 Egypt ngamsung theampo ah kum sali sung an kihau mama tu hi. 
Genesis41:30 Tua zawkciang kum sali sung kialpi tungin an hau hun kum teng kimangil cip tu hi, banghang ziam cile kialpi in ngam lalsak tu hi." 
Genesis41:31 An hau hun teng kimangil bit tu hi, banghang ziam cile hong zui tu kialpi sia lauhuai mama tu hi." 
Genesis41:32 Mang nii a kipee in na matna sia Pathian in hi thu kipsak zo a, hai ngawlin tungsak tu cinopna ahi hi." 
Genesis41:33 “Tu in mipil miciim thuhe pasal khat teal in a, ngam uk tu in koi in." 
Genesis41:34 A dang vaihawm uliante ngam sungah koi kul a, kum sali an hau hun sungin lo ante ii see nga sua see khat la khol in." 
Genesis41:35 Thu pia in a, hong tung tu kumphate sungah an theampo kaikhawmsak in, tuaciang amate thuneina taw khuapite sungah an kholin a, cingsak in." 
Genesis41:36 Hi ante sia Egypt ngam ah hong tung tu kialpi kum sali sungah ngam sungah zeak tu in, a kikhol kholsa suak tu hi. Hi bang vaihawmna taw mihingte pukthi ngawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis41:37 Kumpipa le a uliante in hi vaihawmna lungkim a," 
Genesis41:38 kumpipa in amate tungah, “Joseph sangin a phazaw mi ih mu ngei buatu hi, ama sia a sungah Pathian thaa a nei mihing khat ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis41:39 Kumpipa in Joseph tungah, “Pathian in nang tungah hite theampo hong lak zo hi, tua ahikom nang saang a, a ciim zaw le thu thuk mu zaw kuama dang om ngawl ahi sia kilangh hi." 
Genesis41:40 Ka ngam ukpa tu in nang kong koi tu a, nangma thupiakte ka mihingte theampo in zui tu hi. Nangma thuneina tungsia ah keima bek ka om tu hi." 
Genesis41:41 Tu in Egypt ngamsung theampo a ukpa tu in panmun kong pia hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis41:42 Kumpipa in a min tupna khutzungbu, a khutme pan suutin Joseph khutme ah bunsak hi. Ama in puantual neal a pha khat silhsakin a ngawng ah khamh khi khat awsak hi." 
Genesis41:43 A to natu in kumpi siphu ngalleang niina sia pia a, ama a cing ngalkapte a mai ah pai in, “Lam na awn vun! Lam na awn vun!” ci in ausak hi. Tuabangin Joseph sia Egypt ngamsung theampo a ukpa in panmun pia hi." 
Genesis41:44 Kumpipa in ama tungah, “Keima in kumpi ka hi hi — nangma oaina om ngawlin Egypt ngamsung theampo ah kuama in a khut a peang ngawngawn laam thei ngawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis41:45 Ama in Joseph sia Zaphenath Paneah ci in Egypt min thak pia a, a zi tu in Heliopolis khua thiampi khat ahi Potiphera ii tanu Asenath pia hi. Joseph sia Egypt kumpipa na a sep kipatin kum sawmthum pha hi. Ama sia kumpi zum nusia in ngamsung theampo ah khualhaw kawkoai hi." 
Genesis41:46  
Genesis41:47 An hau hun kum sali sung in leitang pan an tam mama piang a," 
Genesis41:48 tua teng theampo Joseph in kaikhawmin khuapi tengah kholsak hi. Ama in khua kiim a lote panin a piang ante sia a khuapi tek ah khol hi. 
Genesis41:49 A ankholte sia tamlei ahikom Joseph in sim vanglak ngawlin, tee nawn ngawl hi — tua teng sia tuipi vaal senvui taw kibang hi." 
Genesis41:50 Kialpi kumte hong tun ma in Joseph in Asenath taw tapa nii nei hi. 
Genesis41:51 Ama in, “Pathian in ka thuakna theampo le ka pa innkuanpui theampo hong mangilsak hi,” ci hi. Tua ahikom a tapa masa min Manasseh phuak hi." 
Genesis41:52 Ama in, “Ka ngim thuakna munah Pathian in tate hong pia hi,” ci ahikom a tapa niina ii min sia Ephraim phuak hi." 
Genesis41:53 An hau in Egypt ii nopsakna hun kum salite hong bo a," 
Genesis41:54 Joseph sonsa bangin kum sali kialpi kipan hi. Ngamdang theampo ah kialpi tung a, ahizong Egypt ngamsung teng ah an om hi." 
Genesis41:55 Egypt te ngilkial tu hong kipat ciang kumpipa tungah an ngen uh hi. Tuaciang kumpipa in amate Joseph kungah pai in, ama ci bang a vawt natu in thupia hi." 
Genesis41:56 Kialpi nasia vaial in ngam bup ah hong kizel a, tua ahiciang Joseph in ankholna inn theampo hongin Egypt te tungah antang zuak hi." 
Genesis41:57 Mun theampo ah kialpi nasia mama tung ahikom leitung mun theampo pan mihingte Joseph kungah antaw tu in Egypt ah hong pai uh hi. 
Genesis42:1 Jacob in Egypt ngam ah an a omna thu a heak ciang a tapate tungah, “Banghang hi bang om thawthong nu ziam?" 
Genesis42:2 Egypt ah an a omna thu za khi hi, ih pukthi ngawl natu in va pai in antaw tavun,” ci hi." 
Genesis42:3 Tua ahiciang Joseph ii suapui sealh sawmte Egypt ah antaw tu in pai hi," 
Genesis42:4 ahizong Jacob in Joseph suapui laipee Benjamin in amate zuisak ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile ama tungah bang khat pawpo a pian thaak tu lau hi." 
Genesis42:5 Canaan ngam sungah kial tung ahikom midangte taw Jacob tapate antaw tu in pai hi. 
Genesis42:6 Egypt ngamukpa a hina taw Joseph in leitung mihing theampo tungah antang zuak hi. Tuabangin Joseph suapuipate hong pai a, a maitang uh leipha in ama mai ah kun uh hi." 
Genesis42:7 Joseph in a suapuite a mu ciang tel hi, ahizong a he ngawl bangin kivawt hi. Ama in a suapuite tungah kamngam taw, “Koisung pan hong pai nu ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Amate in, “Canaan ngam pan antaw tu in kong pai uh hi,” ci in zo uh hi." 
Genesis42:8 Joseph in a suapuipate a tel hang a suapuipate in ama tel ngawl uh hi. 
Genesis42:9 Joseph in amate taw kisai a mangmatnate phawk kikin, “Note sia thukankute na hi uh a; koma ngamsung thaneamna mun teng a dawp tu in hong pai nu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis42:10 Amate in, “Hi ngawl hi, topa awng, antaw tu in na silate bangin hong pai khu hi." 
Genesis42:11 Ko teng unau khat hi ung. Topa awng, ko sia thukankute hi ngawl a, mi thumaante ka hi uh hi,” ci in zo uh hi." 
Genesis42:12 Joseph in amate tungah, “Hi ngawl hi! Ngamsung thaneamna mun teng a dawp tu in hong pai nu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis42:13 Amate in, “Topa awng, ka vekpi unau sawm le nii ka pha uh a, Canaan ngammi khat ii tapate ka hi uh hi. Ka suapui khat thi a, a nobel sia tu in ka pa uh taw om hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis42:14 Joseph in, “Kong cisa bangma hi. Note thukankute nu hi." 
Genesis42:15 Note hi bangin hong kisit tu hi: kumpipa min taw ka kiciam a, na nau nobel sia hi mun hong thet mateng note cia ngeingawl tu nu hi." 
Genesis42:16 Note sung pan khat pawpo in na pui tavun. Na thu uh a thian dong, thumaan son na hi hunlam a kisit thei mateng a dang teng sia thong sungah kong khum tu hi. Tuabang ahibuale a nungta kumpipa min lo in ka sonsa bang hi, note sia thukankute hi nanak tu nu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis42:17 Tuabangin Joseph in ni thum sung amate thong sungah koi hi. 
Genesis42:18 A ni thum ni in Joseph in amate tungah, “Keima in Pathian kiita mihing khat ka hi a, thu khat hangin na nuntakna uh kong khoaikhe tu hi." 
Genesis42:19 Thumaan mi na hina a kilak natu in note hong kikepna mun thong sungah khat om tu nu hi, a dang teng in ngilkial a om na innkuanpuite, na an leisa teng puak thei tu nu hi." 
Genesis42:20 Tua zawkciang na nau nobel uh sia kei kungah nong paipui tu uh hi. Tuabangin note thumaan son na hi uh sia hong kilangh tu a, kong that buatu hi,” ci hi. Tuasia bangin amate lungkim uh hi." 
Genesis42:21 Tuaciang khat le khat tung ah, “Hi hi, ih suapuipa Joseph tuabang ih vawtsiat hu in tu in ih thuak hi; ngimna lian a thuak ih mu a, hu ngen in hong thuum napi ih nadon bua hi. Tua hu in tu in hi ngimna sungah ih om hi,” ci uh hi." 
Genesis42:22 Reuben in, “Ih naupa vawtsia heak vun hong ci khi hi, ahihang ka thu hong ni ngawl nu hi. Tu in ama ii thina thaman hong lo kiksak hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis42:23 Tuabang a pau sia Joseph in tel siat hi, ahihang amate in tuasia hunlam he ngawl uh hi, banghang ziam cile amate in kampheen zanghin Joseph a paupui hang ahi hi." 
Genesis42:24 Joseph sia mundang ah pai in kap hi. Tua zawk a pau thei kik tu ciang hong heak kik a, amate sung pan Simeon tangkal in a mai ah khaukhitsak hi." 
Genesis42:25 Joseph in a suapuite ip teng dim antang a hensak natu, mi khat sim ii sum sia a ip sung tek ah a koisak kik natu le lampi ah a neak tu nguai an a piak natu in thupia hi. Tuabang ma in kivawtsak hi." 
Genesis42:26 Tua unaute in a antang lei teng a laate tungah suanhin vaiding uh hi. 
Genesis42:27 Tua zan a ngiana munah amate sung pan khat in a laa an pia tu in a ip a hon le a tungbel ah a sum mu hi. 
Genesis42:28 Ama in a suapuite tungah “Ka sum hong kikoisak kik hi, hilai ka ip sungah om hi!,” ci hi. Amate thinkiam in lau a, “Pathian in eite tungah bang hong vawt thong ziam?” ci in khat le khat kidongh hi." 
Genesis42:29 Canaan ngam a pa Jacob kung a thet ciang amate in thupiang theampo a pa tungah son hi: 
Genesis42:30 “Egypt ngamukpa in kamngam taw in hong paupui a, a ngam thu kanin hong mawsiat hi." 
Genesis42:31 ‘Kote thukankute hi ngawlin mi thumaante ka hi uh hi. 
Genesis42:32 Kote unau sawm le nii ka pha uh a, pa khat ii ta ka hi uh hi. Ka suapuipa khat thi a, a nobel sia ka pa uh taw Canaan ah om lai hi’ ci in ka zo uh hi." 
Genesis42:33 Tua pa in, ‘Hi bangin na thumaanna uh kong kan tu hi: note khat hi sungah kei taw om tu nu hi; a dang teng na innkuanpui ngilkialte atu in antang puakin cia tu nu hi." 
Genesis42:34 Na nau nobel sia hong paipui tavun. Tuasia ciang note thukanku hi ngawlin thumaan mi na hina uh kong he tu hi; na suapuipa kong pia kik tu hi, tuaciang hi munah om in, sumlei sumzuak thei tu nu hi,’ hong ci hi.”" 
Genesis42:35 Tua zawkciang a ipte a sua uh ciang amate khat simin a sumbawm tek mu a; a sum a mu uh ciang amate le a pa Jacob patau uh hi. 
Genesis42:36 A pa in amate tungah, “Ka tate theampo hong sumsisak nuam nu ziam? Joseph bo zo; Simeon bo zo a; tu in Benjamin paipui nuam nu hi. Kei sia a thuakbelpa ka hi hi!” ci hi." 
Genesis42:37 Ahihang Reuben in a pa tungah, “Benjamin kong ciapui kik bua ahile ka tapate nii thatlum in. Ama sia keima kep tu in koi in a, kong ciapui kik tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis42:38 Ahizong Jacob in, “Ka tapa no taw paisak thei ngawl tu khi hi; a upa thi zo a, ama bek taang hi. Lampi ah bang khat po tawk thei tha tu hi. Kei ka huai zo a, tuabang nong khuangaisaknate in kei hong thatlum tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis43:1 Canaan ah kialpi nasia seseam a," 
Genesis43:2 Jacob innkuanpuite in Egypt pan a antang lei teng a neak siat zawkciang, Jacob in a tapate tungah, “Pai kik tavun a, antawm va taw tavun,” ci hi." 
Genesis43:3 Judah in a pa tungah, “Tua mipa in na naupa nong paipui bua uh le ka mai nong mu thei buatu uh hi, ci in ka kidop natu uh ngat takin hong vaitha zo hi." 
Genesis43:4 Ka naupa nong zuisak le kote pai in nang atu an ka taw tu uh hi. 
Genesis43:5 Tuabang na oai buale pai ngawl tu khu hi, banghang ziam cile tua pa in na naupa nong keng bua uh le ka mai nong mu thei buatu uh hi, hong ci sa hi” ci hi." 
Genesis43:6 Jacob in, “Tua pa tungah suapui dang nei lai khu hi ci in na sonna uh taw banghangin hi zata thinngim hong pia thong nu ziam?” ci hi." 
Genesis43:7 Amate in, “Tua pa in eite thu le ih innkuan thu hong dongh top a, ‘Na pa uh nungta lai ziam? Suapui dang na nei uh ziam?’ hong ci hi. Ama thu dokte ka zo nanak uh kul hi. Na naupa hong paipui tavun, ama hong ci tu sia bangbangin hekhol thei tu khu ziam?,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis43:8 Judah in a pa tungah, “Tangvalpa kei taw paisak in, ding kik pai tu khu hi. Tua hile eite ih pukthi buatu hi." 
Genesis43:9 Ka naupa atu in ka nuntakna taw kong kiciam hi. Nang kungah ciidam in kong ciapui kik bua ahile a tawntungin mawsiatna ka thuak tu hi. 
Genesis43:10 Eite ngei mama ngakin vaikai bualeang tu in niivei kilee a, ih thet kik natu hi zo hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis43:11 A pa in amate tungah, “Tuabang hi tu ahile ngamsung pan a piang a phabel te: thingnaai tawm, khuaitui tawm, hel namtui tawm, pistachio nga le almond ngate tun in ngamukpa tungah piak tu in keng tavun." 
Genesis43:12 Na ip ngong sungah nong ciapui uh na sumte na ken kik uh kul tu ahiciang na sum uh a zaa nii in keng vun. Sum hong khiak khial zong hi thei tu hi. 
Genesis43:13 Na suapuipa paipui vun a, hong ciapui kik pai tavun." 
Genesis43:14 Ama in na suapuipa le Benjamin sia no hong piak kik natu in Vaanglianbelpa Pathian in tuasia pa, no tungah hesuakna thin neisak tahen. Kei, ka tate a khuai siat tu ka hile zong thuak ka heu tong,” ci hi." 
Genesis43:15 Tua ahiciang unaute sia letsongte le dangka a zaa nii in keng a, Egypt ngam ah Benjamin taw pai uh hi. Joseph kungah amate ki aap uh hi." 
Genesis43:16 Joseph in amate taw a om Benjamin a mu ciang, ama in a inn uk naseampa tungah, “Amate ka inn ah paipui in. Sun ciang amate kei taw an nekhawm tu ahikom ngan khat ngo in a, kinging in,” ci hi." 
Genesis43:17 Ama thupiak bangin naseampa in Joseph inn ah unaute paipui hi. 
Genesis43:18 Inn ah amate a kipaipui ciang amate lau a, “A masa lai a sumte ih ip sungah a om kik hu in hi munah hong kipaipui hi. Amate in thakhat thu hong sim tu a, ih laate hong laaksak zawkciang sila hong suaksak tu hi,” ci in ngaisun uh hi." 
Genesis43:19 Tuaciang amate Joseph a inn uk naseampa omna kongkha ah pai in 
Genesis43:20 “Topa awng hi lai ah antaw tu in khatvei kong pai zo uh hi. 
Genesis43:21 Inn ka cia lam ka ngiaphual ah ka ipte ka hon uh ciang ka ipngong sung tek ah ka sumte — a vekpi ma in ka mu uh hi. Tua sumte kong keng kik uh hi. 
Genesis43:22 An a tamzaw lei natu in sum dang zongh kong keng thua uh hi. Ka ip sungah ka sumte uh akua in hong koisak kik ci sia ka he bua uh hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis43:23 Naseampa in, “Thinngim om bo, lau heak vun. Note ii Pathian, na pa ii Pathian in na ip sungah note atu in sum hong koisak hi nanak tu hi. Na antang man uh a cingin ka nga hi,” ci hi. Tua zawkciang ama in amate kungah Simeon paipui hi." 
Genesis43:24 Naseampa in unaute inn sungah paipui hi. Ama in a peang sil natu in tui pia a, a laate an pia hi." 
Genesis43:25 Amate ni sun ciang inn ah hong cia Joseph taw an nekhawm tu ci ahikom a piak tu letsong teng kinging khol uh hi. 
Genesis43:26 Joseph inn hong thet ciang amate in a letsong puakte inn sung ama kungah paipui in ama mai, lei ah kunsuk uh hi." 
Genesis43:27 Ama in amate tungah na dam uh ziam ci in a dok zawkciang, “A thu nong sonsa na pa huai — ama bangbang ahi ziam? Cidam in a nungta lai na ziam?” ci hi." 
Genesis43:28 Amate in, “A kiniamkhiak na naseam pa, ka pa uh nungta lai in a ciidam hi,” ci in zo uh hi. Tuaciang amate khupdin in ama mai ah kunsuk uh hi." 
Genesis43:29 Joseph in a naupa Benjamin a mu ciang, “Tua ahile, hisia kei tung a nong son uh na nau nobel sia ahi ziam? Ka tapa awng, Pathian in nang thupha hong pia tahen,” ci hi." 
Genesis43:30 Tua zawkciang Joseph sia a naupa ciliaphuai sa in a neno ahikom thakhat thu in pusuak hi. Ama in thuak zo nawn ngawl ahiciang a inndoi sungah pai in kap hi. 
Genesis43:31 A mai a phia zawkciang hong pusuak a, ama le ama tha la tawmin an thuukin sawl hi." 
Genesis43:32 Joseph atu sabuai khat ah an kilui in, a suapuite atu sabuai dang khat ah an kilui hi. Tualai ah an a ne Egypt te sia a tuamin kinesak hi, banghang ziam cile Egypt te in Hebrew te taw ankuang uum khop sia zano kisa hi." 
Genesis43:33 Joseph mai sabuai ah a suapuite ama maingat in a haambel pan a moibel dong a kizomin tosak hi. Tuabangin amate a kitosak a mu uh ciang lamdang sa in khat le khat ki en uh hi. 
Genesis43:34 Joseph ii sabuai tung pan amate an kipia a, Benjamin sia a dangte sangin a zaa nga tamzaw in kipia hi. Tuabangin amate Joseph taw anne tuidawn in nuamsa uh hi." 
Genesis44:1 Joseph in a inn uk naseampa tungah, “Hi pasalte ip sungah a puak zawk zaza nguai an hensak in a, amate sum tek a ipngong sungah koisak in." 
Genesis44:2 Ka ngunn hai sia a moibelpa ii ipngong sung a tungbel ah antawk natu sumte taw koikhawmin,” ci in thupia hi. Ama in a kisawl bangin seam hi." 
Genesis44:3 Zingsang tuungin a laate uh taw unaute ciasak uh hi. 
Genesis44:4 Khuapi pan tawm a pai zawkciang Joseph in ama inn uk naseampa tungah, “Manlang in tua pasalte del ta'n. Na phak ciang amate tungah, ‘Thupha sia banghang a sia taw hong thuk nu ziam?" 
Genesis44:5 Banghangin ka topa ngunn hai ngu nu ziam? Ka topa tui neakna hai hi a, aisaan na in a zak hi. Khialna nasia mama khat vawt nu hi!’ na ci ta'n,” ci hi." 
Genesis44:6 Naseampa in amate a phak ciang, hi kammal teng ma son kik hi." 
Genesis44:7 Amate in, “Topa awng, hi bang teng na pau bang na cinopna ziam? Hi bang lawlawmin ngamta ngawl khu hi ci in ka kiciam uh hi." 
Genesis44:8 Na heaksa bangin ka ipngong sungah ka mu uh sumte Canaan ngam panin nang kungah kong paipui kik uh hi. Tuabang hi a, na topa ii inn pan ngunn ahizong khamh ahizong banghangin ngu tu khu ziam?" 
Genesis44:9 Topa awng, khat pawpo tung pan na mu le tua pa kithat tu a, ko a dang teng na sila kong suak tu uh hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis44:10 Ama in, “Hi hen; ahizong tua hai a la sia bek ka sila suak tu a, no a dang teng na pai vahial thei tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis44:11 Tua ahiciang amate in manlang takin a vanhte lei ah khiasuk uh a, amate ip tek hong uh hi." 
Genesis44:12 Joseph naseampa in a haambel pan a moibel dong pha takin tok a, tua hai Benjamin ii ip sungah mu hi." 
Genesis44:13 Unaute in khuangaina taw a puante balkeak in, laate tungah a vanhte suanhin khuapi ah heakkik uh hi." 
Genesis44:14 Judah le a suapuite Joseph inn a thet uh ciang tua munah Joseph om lai hi. Amate Joseph mai ah kunsuk a," 
Genesis44:15 Joseph in, “Bang seam thong nu ziam? Keima dinmun ah a om mihing khat in aisaanna zanghin note hong man zo veve tu cisia he ngawl nu ziam?” ci hi." 
Genesis44:16 Judah in, “Topa awng, nang tungah bang hong ci thei tu khu ziam? Bangbangin hong nial thei tu khu ziam? Bangbangin kiphel thei tu khu ziam? Pathian in ka mawna uh hong kilanghsak hi. Tua hai a kimuna pa bek hi ngawlin kote theampo zongh tu in na sila ka hi uh hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis44:17 Joseph in, “Oh, hi ngawl hi! Tuabang vawt ngeingawl tu khi hi! Hai a kimuna pa bekma ka sila hi tu hi. No a dang teng na pa kungah ciidam ludam in cia thei nu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis44:18 Judah in Joseph kungah paito a, “Topa awng nong hesuakna in, na tungah hi vahial in thu hong sonsak ta'n. Kei tungah hong thin uuk heak in; Nang sia kumpipa tatak bang na hi hi." 
Genesis44:19 Topa awng, nangma in, ‘Pa ahizong suapui dang ahizong na nei uh ziam?’ ci in nong dongh hi." 
Genesis44:20 Kote in, ‘Pa huai khat le a huai zawkciang a nei suapui naupa khat ka nei uh hi. Ama ii suapuipa thi a, nu khat tate sung pan ama bek nungta lai hi; a pa in ama it mama hi,’ kong ci uh hi." 
Genesis44:21 Topa awng, nangma in ama na mu thei natu in hi lai ah hong paipui tavun nong ci a," 
Genesis44:22 tangvalpa in a pa nusia thei ngawl tu hi; nusia le a pa thi tu hi ci in kong zo uh hi. 
Genesis44:23 Tuasia ciang nangma in, ‘A nobel na suapuipa uh taw nong pai bua uh le ka mai nong mu thei buatu uh hi,’ nong ci hi." 
Genesis44:24 “Ka pa kungah ka cia kik uh ciang nangma ci bangin ka son uh hi. 
Genesis44:25 Tuasia ciang ama in, pai kikin, antawm taw lai tu in hong sawl hi." 
Genesis44:26 Koma in, ‘Ka nau nobel ngawl taw tua pa kung hong kitumsak ngawl tu ahikom ko pai thei ngawl tu khu hi. Ka nau nobel zongh hong pai le tuasia ciang bek pai thei tu khu hi,’ ci in ka zo uh hi." 
Genesis44:27 Ka pa uh in ko tungah, ‘Ka zi Rachel in tapa nii bek hong neipui sia na he uh hi." 
Genesis44:28 A khat sia in keima hong nusia zo hi. Ama hong nusiat a kipan tu dong mu kik ngawl ka hikom, ngamsate in ama balneen zo hi nanak tu hi." 
Genesis44:29 Tu in, hisia kei kung pan paipui in bang khat po tawk thong le haam zo ka hi bangma nong khuangaisakna in kei hong thatlum tu hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Genesis44:30 Judah in, “Tua hi a, tu in topa awng, ka nau ngawl taw ka pa kungah cia kik thong leng ka naupa kei taw cia khawm ngawl hong mu po ciang ama thi tu hi. Ka pa nuntakna sia ka naupa nuntakna bek mitsuan in nungta a, ama haam mama zo ahikom ama ka khuangaisakna in thisak tu hi." 
Genesis44:31  
Genesis44:32 Tua bek dom ngawlin ka naupa atu in ka pa tungah ka nuntakna ka khaam hi. Ka naupa ama kungah ka ciapui kik bua ahile ka nuntak sung theampo mawsiatna ka thuak tu hi, ci in ka son hi." 
Genesis44:33 Tuaciang tu in topa awng, ka naupa taangin keima na sila in hi sungah kong om tu a; ama a suapuite taw paisak in." 
Genesis44:34 Ka naupa kei taw hong om buale bangbangin ka pa kungah cia kik thei tu khi ziam? Ka pa tungah hi tuasiatna a tun ka mu tu sia kei thuak zo ngawl tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis45:1 Joseph in a naseamte mai ah a nenona khaam zo ngawl ahikom a inndoi sung pan a naseam theampo a pusua natu in thupia hi. Joseph in a suapuite tungah ama akua ci in a kison laitak kuama dang om ngawl hi. 
Genesis45:2 Joseph nasia tak kap ahikom Egypt te in za a, tua thu kumpi inn sungah thang hi." 
Genesis45:3 Joseph in a suapuite tungah, “Keima Joseph khi hi. Ka pa nungta lai ziam?” ci hi. Ahizong hi thu a suapuite in a zaak ciang amate lau mama ahikom zo thei ngawl uh hi." 
Genesis45:4 Tua zawkciang Joseph in amate tungah, “Hesuakna taw hong neak tavun,” ci hi. Amate in neak a, ama in, “Egypt te tungah na zuak uh na suapuipa Joseph khi hi." 
Genesis45:5 Hi lai ah nong zuak uh manin nuammaw sa in kimawsiat heak vun. Mihingte nuntakna ngum tu in note mai ah Pathian in kei hong paisak khol hi. 
Genesis45:6 Tu kum sia ngam sungah kialpi tun kum niina hi pheang a, lotho ngawl, anlaak ngawl tu hun kum nga sung om lai hi." 
Genesis45:7 Note le na suan na paalte nuntak thei natu le hi bang a lamdangin note kong suatak thei natu in note mai ah Pathian in kei hong paisak khol hi. 
Genesis45:8 Tua hi a, hi munah kei hong then sia no hi ngawl het a Pathian ahi hi. Pathian in kumpipa ii ulianbel in hong koi hi. Ama ngam bup thuzeakpa ka hi a; Egypt ngam theampo a ukpa ka hi hi." 
Genesis45:9 “Tu in, ka pa kungah manlang in cia tavun a, na tapa Joseph in hi bang hong ci hi ci in son tavun: ‘Pathian in Egypt ngam theampo a ukpa in hong koi zo hi; kei kungah hai ngawlin hong pai ta'n." 
Genesis45:10 Kei taw nong kinai thei natu in Goshen ngam ah — nangma, na tate, na tute, na tuute, na kealte, na khuite le na neisa theampo taw na teang thei tu uh hi." 
Genesis45:11 Goshen ah nong om le kong khoi thei tu hi. Kialpi hun kum nga bang om lai hi; nangma, na innkuanpuite le na ngannote na pukthi tu uh ka dei bua hi” ci hi." 
Genesis45:12 Joseph in a thuson zom a, “Tu in note theampo le Benjamin awng, nang zongh in Joseph tatak ka hi sia nong mu thei hi." 
Genesis45:13 Hi lai Egypt ngam sungah ka vaang neizia le na mu theampo ka pa tungah son tavun. Tua zawkciang manlang in ama hi munah hong paipui tavun,” ci hi." 
Genesis45:14 Joseph in a suapuipa Benjamin koai in kap a; Benjamin zongh in koai in kap hi. 
Genesis45:15 Tuaciang Joseph in a suapui teng khat zawkciang khat kap kawmin ngawngkoai in namh hi. Tua zawkciang a suapuite ama taw thuson tu kipan hi. 
Genesis45:16 Joseph suapuite hong paina thu kumpi inn sung dongah theng a, kumpipa le a uliante lungdam hi." 
Genesis45:17 Kumpipa in Joseph tungah, “A ngante vanh suanhin, Canaan ngam ah a heak kik natu in na suapuite sawl in." 
Genesis45:18 A pa le a innkuanpuite puisak in a, hi lai ah pai kiksak in. Egypt ngam sungah leitang phabel sia amate ka pia tu a, amate nuntak khomna za sangin a tamzaw nei tu uh hi." 
Genesis45:19 A zite, a tanote le a pa to natu in Egypt pan leang a ken natu zongh son in." 
Genesis45:20 Amate in a neisa te a nusiat tu sia thinbot heak hen; Egypt ngam bup leitang phabel sia amate aa hi tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis45:21 Jacob tapate in a kisawl bangin ngamta hi. Kumpipa thupiak bangin Joseph in leangte le lampi a neak tu nguai an pia hi. 
Genesis45:22 Joseph in amate puan laih natu zongh puansilh khat tek pia a, ahizong Benjamin sia ngunn dangka 300 le puan laih natu silh nga pia hi." 
Genesis45:23 Ama in Egypt ngam pan a piang na phabelte laa sawm ii puakkhop le antang, anluum le lampi a neak tu nguai an laa sawm ii puakkhop ma a pa thaak hi." 
Genesis45:24 Ama in a suapuite tha a, amate tungah, “Lampi ah kihau heak vun,” ci in vaitha hi." 
Genesis45:25 Amate Egypt ngam pan dingin Canaan ngam a pa Jacob inn ah cia kik uh hi. 
Genesis45:26 Amate in a pa tungah, “Joseph nungta lai hi! Ama sia Egypt ngam theampo ukpa hi!” ci in son hi. Jacob in lamdangsa mama in um zo ngawl hi." 
Genesis45:27 Ahizong Joseph ii kam vaithak teng a son ciang le ama Egypt ngam ah a pai natu in a kipuak, leangte a mu ciang, a pa ingh liangin a omna teng veng hi." 
Genesis45:28 A pa in, “Ka tapa Joseph nungta tatak lai ziam! Ka kat sia tu teng ma hi ei! Ka thi ma in pai in va kimu nanak tong,” ci hi." 
Genesis46:1 Jacob in a vanh nei theampo heangin Beersheba ah pai a, tua munah a pa Isaac ii Pathian tungah biakpiakna nei hi." 
Genesis46:2 Tua zanin Jacob ii mukholna sungah Pathian in paupui a, “Jacob, Jacob awng!” ci in sam hi. Jacob in, “Hi hi, hi sungah om ing,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis46:3 Ama in, “Keima in Pathian, na pa ii Pathian ka hi hi,” ci hi. “Egypt ah na pai tu sia lau heak in; na suan na paalte tualai ah minam lian khat in ka siam tu hi." 
Genesis46:4 Egypt ah nangma taw kong paikhawm tu a, na suan na paalte hi ngam le lei ah kong ciapui kik tu hi. Na thi ciang Joseph sia nangma taw om tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis46:5 Beersheba pan Jacob vaiding hi. A tate in a ma, a tanote le a zite, Egypt kumpipa ii a puaksak leangte tungah tosak hi." 
Genesis46:6 Canaan ngam pan ngannote le a vanh nei teng taw kithoai in Egypt ngam zuan hi. Jacob in a suan a paal theampo ahi: 
Genesis46:7 a tapate, a tupate, a tanute le a tunute a vekpi in paipui hi." 
Genesis46:8 Ama taw Egypt a zuan Jacob ii innkuanpui teng sia a tapa lianbel Reuben," 
Genesis46:9 tuaciang Reuben ii tapate: Hanoch, Pallu, Hezron le Carmi," 
Genesis46:10 Simeon le a tapate: Jemuel, Jamin, Ohad, Jachin, Zohar le Canaan numeinu ii tapa Shaul," 
Genesis46:11 Levi le a tapate: Gershon, Kohath le Merari," 
Genesis46:12 Judah le a tapate: Shelah, Perez le Zerah, (Judah ii tapa dangte Er le Onan hi a, Canaan ah thi uh hi.) Perez ii tapate: Hezron le Hamul," 
Genesis46:13 Issachar le a tapate: Tola, Puah, Jashub le Shimron," 
Genesis46:14 Zebulun le a tapate: Sered, Elon le Jahleel ahi hi." 
Genesis46:15 Hi tapa teng sia a tanu Dinah banah Jacob atu Leah ii Mesopotamia ah a nei tate ahi hi. Leah taw a nei a suan le a paal a vekpi in 33 pha hi. 
Genesis46:16 Gad le a tapate: Zephon, Haggi, Shuni, Ezbon, Eri, Arod le Areli ahi hi." 
Genesis46:17 Asher le a tapate: Imnah, Ishvah, Ishvi, Beriah le a suapuinu uh Serah ahi hi. Beriah ii tapate sia Heber le Malchiel ahi hi." 
Genesis46:18 Hi sawm le luk te sia Laban ii a tanu Leah a piak, a sila nu Zilpah taw a nei Jacob ii suan le paalte ahi hi." 
Genesis46:19 Jacob in a zi Rachel taw tapa nii nei a: Joseph le Benjamin ahi hi. 
Genesis46:20 Joseph in Heliopolis khua thiampi Potiphera ii tanu Asenath taw Egypt ah tapa nii nei a, Manasseh le Ephraim ahi hi." 
Genesis46:21 Benjamin ii tapate sia Bela, Becher, Ashbel, Gera, Naaman, Ehi, Rosh, Muppim, Huppim le Ard ahi hi." 
Genesis46:22 Hi sawm le lite sia Jacob le Rachel suan le paalte ahi uh hi. 
Genesis46:23 Dan le a tapa Hushim. 
Genesis46:24 Naphtali le a tapate: Jahzeel, Guni, Jezer le Shillem ahi hi." 
Genesis46:25 Hi salite Laban ii a tanu Rachel a piak a sila nu Bilhah taw a hin, Jacob ii suan le paalte ahi hi." 
Genesis46:26 Egypt ah a pai Jacob ii a suan le a paalte a vekpi in 66 hi a, tuate sungah a tapate ii zite kihel ngawl hi." 
Genesis46:27 Joseph in Egypt ah tapa nii nei a, Jacob innkuanpuite tua mun a thet ciang a vekpi in 70 pha uh hi." 
Genesis46:28 Goshen ah Joseph ii amate a mua natu a son tu in, Jacob in Judah pai kholsak hi. Amate a thet ciang," 
Genesis46:29 Joseph, a siphu ngalleang tung to in a pa muak tu in Goshen ah pai hi. A kimu ciang Joseph in a pa ngawngkoai in ngei hialma kap hi." 
Genesis46:30 Jacob in Joseph tungah, “Tu hile na meal kong mu zo a, na nuntak lai hunlam hong he zo ka hikom kei a thi tu kinging khi hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis46:31 Tua zawkciang Joseph in a suapuite le a pa innkuanpui dang teng tungah, “Kumpipa kungah ka na pai tu a, Canaan ah a teang ka suapuite le ka pa innkuanpui theampo ka kung hong zuan zo hi, ci in ka son tu hi." 
Genesis46:32 Note sia tuucingte le ngan khoaite hi a, na tuute na ngante le na neisa dang teng theampo nong paipui uh sia ka son tu hi." 
Genesis46:33 Kumpipa in note hong samin, bang na seam nu ziam ci in hong dok ciang," 
Genesis46:34 ka taanghpupite bangma in ka khan tawntungin ngankhoai na seam ung, na ci tu uh hi. Tuabang na ci uh ciang ama in Goshen ngam ah hong teangsak tu hi,” ci hi. Egypt te in tuucingte sia thu a sim ngawl ahikom Joseph in tu a bangin a ci ahi hi." 
Genesis47:1 Tua ahiciang Joseph sia a suapuite nga taw kumpipa kungah pai hi. Ama in, “Ka pa le ka suapuite Canaan ngam pan a tuute, a ngannote le a neisa teng theampo taw hong pai zo hi. Tu in amate Goshen ngam ah om uh hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis47:2 Tua zawkciang ama in kumpipa mai ah a suapuite paipui hi. 
Genesis47:3 Kumpipa in, “Bang na seam nu ziam?” ci in amate dongh hi. Amate in, “Topa awng, ka taanghpupite bangma in tuucingte hi ung." 
Genesis47:4 Canaan ngam ah nasia tak kialpi tung a, ngantha natu mun om ngawl ahikom hi ngam ah a teang tu in kong pai uh hi. Hesuakna taw Goshen ngamkhen ah ka teen thei natu uh in thu hong pia ta'n,” ci in zo uh hi." 
Genesis47:5 Kumpipa in Joseph tungah, “Tu in na pa le na suapuite hong theng zo ahiciang" 
Genesis47:6 Egypt leitang sia amate aa hi. Leitang phabelna mun ahi, Goshen ah teang tahen. Amate sung pan naseam thiam a om le ka ngannote a uk tu in koi in,” ci hi." 
Genesis47:7 Tuasia ciang Joseph in kumpipa mai ah a pa Jacob paipui in aap hi. Jacob in kumpipa thupha pia hi," 
Genesis47:8 tuaciang kumpipa in ama tungah, “Kum bangza pha ni ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Genesis47:9 Jacob in, “Vak kawkoai in ka nuntak zawk kum za le kum sawmthum pha zo hi. Ka taanghpupite ii kum tampi a vak kawkoai sia za zongh hi ngawl lai in, kum tawm napi ka haksa hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Genesis47:10 Jacob in kumpipa sia vaithakna thupha pia in nusia hi. 
Genesis47:11 Tuaciang Joseph in a pa le a suapuite kumpipa thupiak bangin Egypt ngamsung lei phabelna Rameses khuapi nai ah mun pia in teangsak hi. 
Genesis47:12 Joseph in a pa, a suapuite le a pa innkuanpui dang teng theampo a moibel dongin an pia hi." 
Genesis47:13 Kialpi nasia mama ahikom in mun theampo ah an om ngawl a, Egypt te le Canaan mite ngilkial in a tha hong zawm uh hi." 
Genesis47:14 Joseph in mite ii an leina sum teng kaikhawmin kumpi inn sungah koi hi. 
Genesis47:15 Egypt le Canaan ah sum teng a kizak siat zawkciang Egypt te Joseph kungah pai in, “Ko an hong pia ta'n! Hong thisak heak in. Khat pawpo hong vaihawmpui ta'n! Ka sum uh teng bo siat zo hi,” ci uh hi." 
Genesis47:16 Joseph in, “Na sumte a bo siat zo le na ngannote hong paipui tavun; an taw kitheak tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis47:17 Tua ahiciang a ngannote Joseph kungah paipui uh a, ama in a siphute, a tuute, a kealte, a khuite le a laate thena in an pia hi. Tua kum in ama in a ngannote theampo a thena in an pia hi." 
Genesis47:18 A kum kik ciang amate Joseph kungah pai in, “Topa awng, thumaan sia na maitang ah ka iim thei bua uh hi; ka sum uh theampo bo siat zo a, nganno theampo nangma aa hi zo hi. Ka pumpi uh le ka leitangte simngawl, kong piak tu bangma taang ngawl hi." 
Genesis47:19 Hong thisak heak in. Khat pawpo hong vaihawmpui ta'n! Koma lote vaalthongsak heak in. Koma le ka leitang an taw hong lei ta'n. Kote, kumpipa ii sila suakin, ka leitang uh ama ii neisa hi tu hi. Ka nuntak natu in an hong pia ta'n a, lote ah ka ciin tu uh thaicii hong pia ta'n,” ci hi." 
Genesis47:20 Joseph in Egypt leitang theampo kumpipa atu in lei hi. Kialpi nasia mama ahikom Egypt mi theampo a leitang a zuak ngawlin phamaw a; tuaciang leitang theampo kumpipa ii neisa suak siat hi. 
Genesis47:21 Joseph in Egypt ngam mong khat pan mong khat dong mihingte sila suaksak hi. 
Genesis47:22 Ama in thiampite neisa leitang bekma lei ngawl hi. Kumpipa in amate nuntak khom natu an pia ahikom a leitangte zuak kul ngawl hi. 
Genesis47:23 Joseph in mite tungah, “Na mu uh bangin, tu in note le na leitangte kumpipa atu in kong lei zo hi. Na lo ah na ciin tu anciite hi sungah om hi." 
Genesis47:24 Anlaak hun ciang see nga sua see khat kumpipa na pia tu uh hi. A om lai teng sia, thaicii tu le noma le na innkuanpuite ii anneak tu in zangh thei tu nu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis47:25 Amate in, “Nangma in kote nuntakna nong hun zo a; kote tungah nong thuthiam hi, topa awng, tuaciang kote sia kumpipa ii sila ka hi tu uh hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis47:26 Tua ahiciang Joseph in Egypt leitang taw kisai, lo an a piangte ii see nga sua see khat kumpipa ii neisa a sua thei natu thukham khat vawt hi. Hi thukham sia tuni dongin kizangh lai hi. Thiampite leitang bek kumpipa ii neisa suak ngawl hi." 
Genesis47:27 Israel te Egypt ngam Goshen ah teang a, tua munah amate hau in, ta tam mama nei uh hi." 
Genesis47:28 Jacob kum 147 a phak dong Egypt ah kum sawm le kum sali sung teang hi. 
Genesis47:29 A thi tu hun a nai ciang ama in a tapa Joseph samin, “Ka phei kawmah na khut koi in, Egypt ah nong phum ngawl natu in kiciamna khat vawt in." 
Genesis47:30 Ka pate thaan ah kiphum nuam khi hi; Egypt ngamsung pan hong tua ta'n a, amate thaan ah hong phum ta'n,” ci hi. Joseph in, “Nong ci bangin ka vawt tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis47:31 Jacob in, “Ka vawt nanak tu hi ci in hong kiciam ta'n,” ci hi. Joseph in kiciamna vawt a, tuaciang Jacob sia a lupna tungah lungdamko hi." 
Genesis48:1 Hun khat zawkciang a pa dam ngawlna thu Joseph tungah kison hi. Tua ahiciang a tapate nii, Manasseh le Ephraim taw a pa ve tu in pai uh hi." 
Genesis48:2 Jacob tungah na tapa Joseph in hong ve tu in hong pai hi, ci in a kison ciang, ama in a tha saanin lupna tungah toto hi." 
Genesis48:3 Jacob in Joseph tungah, “Canaan ngam Luz khua ah Vaanglianbelpa Pathian in kei tungah hong kilangh a, thupha hong pia hi." 
Genesis48:4 Pathian in kei tungah, ‘Ta tam mama kong pia tu hi, tuabangin na suan na paalte sia minam tam mama te suak tu uh hi; keima in na suan na paalte tungah a tawntung a nei tu in hi leitang ka pia tu hi,’ hong ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis48:5 Jacob in a pau zomin, “Joseph awng, hi lai ah kong pai ma in Egypt ah na nei na tapa niite keima aa hi; Reuben le Simeon bangma in Ephraim le Manasseh te sia keima tapate ma ahi hi." 
Genesis48:6 Tapa a tamzaw na nei lai le amate sia kei aa ci in kingaisun ngawl tu a; a nga uh ngamhluana sia Ephraim le Manasseh tungtawnin hong pai tu hi. 
Genesis48:7 Na nu Rachel hangin hi bangin ka vawt ahi hi. Mesopotamia pan ka heakkik lai in, Canaan ngamsung Ephrath khua taw kikhuala ngawlna ah ka khuangaibel natu in na nu hong thi hi. Ephrath paina lamhui ah ama ka phum hi,” ci hi. (Ephrath sia tu in Bethlehem kici hi.)" 
Genesis48:8 Jacob in Joseph tapate a mu ciang, “Hi panote akua te ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Genesis48:9 Joseph in, “Ka tapate hi, hi lai Egypt pan Pathian hong piak hi,” ci in zo hi. Jacob in, “Thupha ka piak thei natu in ka kungah hong paipui ta'n,” ci hi." 
Genesis48:10 A kum tam zo ahikom Jacob ii mitte mang zo a, pha takin khuamu thei nawn ngawl hi. Joseph in a tapano te a kungah paipui a, a pa in amate koai in namh hi." 
Genesis48:11 Jacob in Joseph tungah, “Nang hong mu kik tu in ka kimuangmaw ngei bua a, tu in Pathian in na tate ngawngawn hong musak hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis48:12 Tua zawkciang Joseph in Jacob kaang pan a amate la in, a pa mai lei ah kun hi." 
Genesis48:13 Joseph in Jacob veisang ah Ephraim, a ziatsang ah Manasseh koi hi." 
Genesis48:14 Ahizong Jacob in a khutte kithatheaksak in, a nau zaw hi napi Ephraim lu tungah a khut ziatsang nga in, a uzaw Manasseh tungah a khut veisang nga hi." 
Genesis48:15 Tua zawkciang ama in Joseph thupha pia hi; “Ka pate ahi Abraham le Isaac te ii a na a sepsak Pathian in hi panote thupha pia tahen! Tuni dongin keima lam hong pui Pathian in amate thupha pia tahen! 
Genesis48:16 Natna satna theampo panin keima hong suatak vantunglalang in amate thupha pia tahen! Hi panote tungtawnin keima min le ka pate ahi Abraham le Isaac min nungta top tahen! Amate in ta tam mama nei in suan le paal tam mama nei tahen!” 
Genesis48:17 A pa in a khut ziatsang Ephraim lu tungah a koi, a mu ciang Joseph a thinnuam ngawl hi; tua ahikom Joseph in a pa khut, Ephraim lu tung pan Manasseh lu tungah khiin tu in la hi." 
Genesis48:18 Ama in a pa tungah, “Pa awng, tuabang hi ngawl hi. Hi sia ta uzaw hi a, na khut ziatsang a lu tungah koi in,” ci hi." 
Genesis48:19 A pa in nial a, “He khi hi, ka tapa awng, he khi hi. Manasseh ii suan le paalte zongh minam lian khat suak veve tu hi. Ahizong a naupa in ama sang in lian zaw tu a, ama suan le paalte minam liante suak tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis48:20 Tuabangin Jacob in tua ni in amate thupha pia a, “Israel mite in thupha a piak uh ciang na minte zangh tu hi. Amate in, ‘Ephraim le Manasseh taw kibangin Pathian in note hong siam tahen,’ ci tu uh hi,” ci hi. Hi bangin Jacob in Manasseh mai ah Ephraim koi hi." 
Genesis48:21 Tua zawkciang Jacob in Joseph tungah, “Nong mu bangin kei thi nai tu khi hi, ahizong Pathian in nang hong panpui tu a, na taanghpupite ii ngam le lei ah hong ciapui kik tu hi." 
Genesis48:22 Amor mite tung pan ka namsau le ka thal taw ka laak, leipha ngam Shechem sia na suapuipate atu hi ngawlin nangma atu kong piak ahi hi." 
Genesis49:1 Jacob in a tapate samin, “Hong kikhawmtua tavun, mai sangah note tung a hong piang tu thu kong son tu hi:" 
Genesis49:2 “Jacob ii tapate awng hong paikhawm tek tavun a, hong ngai tavun. Na pa Israel thu son ngai vun." 
Genesis49:3 “Ka taciil Reuben awng, nang sia ka thahatna Tuaciang pasal ka tanna in, ka ta masabel na hi a, ka tapa teng sung pan a kiphasakbel le a thahatbel na hi hi." 
Genesis49:4 Nang in tuipawm khat taw na kibang a, Ahizong a thupibel na hi buatu hi, Banghang ziam cile ka zino na luppui a, na pa ii lupna na paksak hi." 
Genesis49:5 “Simeon le Levi unau khat na hi uh hi. A ngalhiamte ngongtatna in zangh uh hi. 
Genesis49:6 A thuku sonna ah ka kihel buatu a, A kikhopna ah ka kipawl buatu hi, Banghang ziam cile a thin uuk uh ciang mihing that a, Kimaina in khuitalte ii a peangbaisak hi." 
Genesis49:7 A thin uukna ah haamsiatna thuak hen, banghang ziam cile a thin uukna nasia leih hi. A thinsona ah haamsiatna thuak hen, banghang ziam cile a thinso nasia leih hi. Israel ngam sungah amate ka thethaang tu hi. A mipuite sungah amate ka khentham tu hi." 
Genesis49:8 “Judah awng na suapui te in nang hong pok tu hi. Na ngalte a ngawng pan na man hi. Na suapuite in na mai ah hong kun tu hi. 
Genesis49:9 Judah sia, Sa manin a kuahawng zuan kik a, Kizia in a lumsuk tawpi khat taw kibang hi. Kuama in ama nawngkaisak ngam ngawl hi." 
Genesis49:10 Judah in kumpi ciangkhut len tu a, A suan a paalte in ngamuk tawntung tu hi. Minamte in ama tungah phiangshia puak tu a, Thunitna taw ama mai ah kun tu uh hi." 
Genesis49:11 Ama in a laano sia sapitkung khat ah khit a, Sapitkung phabel sia tung ahi hi. Ama in a puante chi bangin a san sapittui sungah sawp hi." 
Genesis49:12 Sapittui a neakna in a mitte san ngingu a, Noai a neakna in a hate paak hi." 
Genesis49:13 “Zebulun sia tuipi hui ah teang tu hi. A tuipi vaal sia teambawte tawlngakna khat hi tu hi. A ngam Sidon ciang dong theng tu hi. 
Genesis49:14 “Issachar sia a tung tona ipte kawm ah kizia in a lum, Laa khat sangin phazaw ngawl hi." 
Genesis49:15 Ahizong ama in a tawlngakna mun ii phatna mu a A ngam a lei nuamsa hi. Tua ahiciang a nungzaang ah vanh pua tu in ama kunsuk a, Sila khat bangin na kiseamsak hi." 
Genesis49:16 “Dan sia a mipuite ii a ukpa hi tu hi. Amate Israel minam dangte bangma hi tu hi. 
Genesis49:17 Dan sia lampi hui ah a om ngul khat, lamzin hui ah a om ngul ngu nei khat hi tu a, Tua ngul in siphu khuatul pan tu hi, A tungto pa a nung sangah a kilot thal natu hi." 
Genesis49:18 “ Topa awng, nong hut tu ka ngak hi." 
Genesis49:19 “Phalakte pawlkhat in Gad sim tu a, ahizong Gad in amate kileesak kikin sul zui tu hi." 
Genesis49:20 “Asher ii leitang pan an tam mama piang tu hi. Kumpi khat ii neak tu in a kilawm an, ama in pia tu hi." 
Genesis49:21 “Naphtali sia a ithuai tanote a nei, a tai vavil sangai khat ahi hi." 
Genesis49:22 “Joseph sia ciktui hui khat ah a om ngamlaa khat taw kibang a, Mualpangh ah a om ngam siphuno khat taw kibang hi." 
Genesis49:23 A ngalte in nasia takin sim a, A thal le a thaltangte taw del hi." 
Genesis49:24 Ahizong Jacob ii Pathian Vaanglianbelpa ii vaangletna le Israel a Dal pa, Tuucingpa hangin A thal kinging top a, A khutte a tha kihatsak hi." 
Genesis49:25 Nang hong hu, na pa ii Pathian, Thupha hong pia Vaanglianbelpa Pathian in Vantung pan thupha ngua taw Leinuai tawngh pan tui taw Khoai le vul tam mama, tu le ta tam mama thuphate taw," 
Genesis49:26 thupha antangte le paakte, Taanghlai mualte ii thuphate, Tawntung mualte panin, nopsakna te, Hi thupha teng Joseph ii lu tungah A suapuite sung pan a kituam koi pa ii mitkhu tungah tawlnga in, tung siat tahen." 
Genesis49:27 “Benjamin sia a hang mama ngiapui khat taw kibang hi. Zing le nitak sa thatlum in ne tum hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis49:28 Hi te sia Israel minam sawm le niite hi a, hi thu sia amate tetek taw a kiphu a kilawm tu in a son a pa ii a tapa khat sim tungah vaithakna kammal ahi hi." 
Genesis49:29 Tua zawkciang Jacob in a tapate tungah, “Tu in ka mipuite thina ah a pai tu ka hi a, ka pate taw in suanghawng thaankhuk ah hong phumkhawm tavun, tua thaankhuk sia Hit mi Ephron ii lo sung hi a," 
Genesis49:30 Canaan ngam Mamre ii nisuana sang Machpelah ah om hi. Abraham in hi thaankhuk le lo sia thaan mun tu in Ephron tung pan lei hi. 
Genesis49:31 Tua munah amate in Abraham le a zi Sarah; Isaac le a zi Rebecca phum a; tuaciang keima in Leah ka phum hi. 
Genesis49:32 Tua lo le thaankhuk sia Hit mite tung pan a kilei ahi hi. Tua munah hong phum tavun,” ci in thupia hi." 
Genesis49:33 Jacob in a tapate a vaithak zawkciang, ama lumsuk kikin thi hi." 
Genesis50:1 Joseph, a pa tungah kisepsuk a, kapin a pa maitang namh hi." 
Genesis50:2 Tuaciang Joseph in a pa luang a muat ngawl natu vawt tu in thupia hi. 
Genesis50:3 A luang muat ngawl natu nasepna sia a ngeina bangin ni 40 sung hai hi. Egypt mite sia ama atu in ni 70 sung khuangai in kap uh hi. 
Genesis50:4 Khuangai hunte a ven ciang, Joseph in kumpipa ii uliante tungah, “Hesuakna in kumpipa tungah hi thu hong sonsak tavun:" 
Genesis50:5 ‘Ka pa a thi mahiat in Canaan ngamsung, ama atu in a kinginna sa thaankuul ah ka phum natu in kamciamna hong vawtsak hi. Tua ahiciang hesuakna in ka pa a phum tu in hong paisak ta'n, tua zawkciang kong cia kik tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis50:6 Kumpipa in, “Kamciamna na vawt bangin, pai in na pa phum ta'n,” ci in zo hi." 
Genesis50:7 Tua ahiciang Joseph a pa phum tu in pai hi. Kumpipa ii ulian theampo, ama zumsung upate le Egypt ngam lampuite theampo Joseph taw pai uh hi." 
Genesis50:8 Ama ii innkuanpui, a suapuipate le a pa ii innkuanpui a om lai teng theampo ama taw pai uh hi. A tanote, a tuute, a kealte le a khuite bek ma Goshen ngam ah taang hi." 
Genesis50:9 Siphu ngalleang tung le siphu tung a to mihingte zongh ama taw pai tek uh a; mihing tam peuma hi. 
Genesis50:10 Jordan ngun nisuana sangah a om Atad ancilna mun a thet ciang, amate ngei hialpo khuangai in nging takin kap uh hi, tuaciang Joseph in ni sali sung khuangai kaana hun in zangh hi." 
Genesis50:11 Canaan ngammite in Atad ah tua mihingte khuangai in kap a mu ciangin, “Egypt te in a ciliap huai khuangai kaana nasia takin vawt hi ta a!” ci uh hi. Tua ahikom tua mun sia Abel Mizraim kici hi." 
Genesis50:12 Tua ahiciang Jacob thupiak bangin a tapate in seam uh hi; 
Genesis50:13 amate in Canaan ngam ah a pa luang pua in thaan mun tu in Abraham ii Hit mi Ephron tung pan a lei, Mamre nisuana sangah a om Machpelah lo sung thaankuul ah phum uh hi." 
Genesis50:14 A pa a phum zawkciang Joseph, a suapuite le mithi phumna ah a zui theampo taw Egypt ah cia kik uh hi." 
Genesis50:15 A pa thi zawkciang Joseph suapuite in, “Joseph in hong ngaimaw lai hen a, ama tungah siatna ih vawt theampo thuk kik hong sawm thong le bang law tu ziam?” ci uh hi." 
Genesis50:16 Tua ahikom amate in Joseph tungah, “Ih pa a thi ma in," 
Genesis50:17 ama in, ‘Na suapuite ii nang tung a kong vawt khialna lian sia hesuakna taw maisak ta'n,’ ci in nang tungah hesuak ngen vun hong ci hi. Tu in na pa ii Pathian naseam kote ii vawt khialna sia pan hesuakna taw hong maisak ta'n,” ci in kam vaitha uh hi. Joseph sia hi kam vaithak a zaak ciang kap hi." 
Genesis50:18 Tua zawkciang a suapuite hong pai in, ama mai ah kun uh hi. Amate in, “Hi lai na mai ah na silate bangin om ung,” ci uh hi." 
Genesis50:19 Ahizong Joseph in amate tungah, “Lau heak vun; Pathian dinmun ah keima le keima kikoi thei ngawl khi hi." 
Genesis50:20 Note in a sia nong sawm uh hi, ahizong tua thupiang sia hu in tuni a, a nungta mihing tam mama te ii nuntakna a huu tu in, Pathian in tuasia a pha lam in hong heisak hi." 
Genesis50:21 Bangma no lau natu om ngawl hi. Note le na tate kong khoi tu hi,” ci hi. Tuabangin Joseph in a suapuite thinsung lungsung kha tu in kamthiam kamneam zanghin a suapuite thinnuamsak hi." 
Genesis50:22 Joseph, a pa innkuanpuite taw Egypt ah teang khawm tan a; kum 110 a phak ciang thi hi." 
Genesis50:23 Ama in Ephraim ii tate le tute a mu dong nungta hi. Ama in Manasseh ii tapa Machir ii tate zongh a nuntak lai in ama innkuanpui in nei hi. 
Genesis50:24 Ama in a suapuite tungah, “Kei a thi nai tu ka hi hi, ahizong Pathian in note hong keam tatak tu a, hi ngam pan, Abraham, Isaac le Jacob te tungah a ciliap huai takin a kamciamna ngam ah hong paipui nanak tu hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis50:25 Tua zawkciang Joseph in a mite kiciamna khat vawt tu in sawl hi. Ama in, “Pathian in tua ngam ah hong paipui ciangin noma taw ka luang paipui tu khu hi ci in hong kamciam tavun,” ci hi." 
Genesis50:26 Tuabangin Joseph kum 110 a phak ciang Egypt ngam ah thi hi. Amate in Joseph luang a muat thei ngawl natu in vawtin, mithi kuang khat sungah koi hi." 
Exodus1:1 Egypt ah a innkuan puite tek le Jacob taw a pai, Jacob tapate sia," 
Exodus1:2 Reuben, Simeon, Levi, Judah," 
Exodus1:3 Issachar, Zebulun, Benjamin," 
Exodus1:4 Dan, Naphtali, Gad le Asher ahi hi." 
Exodus1:5 Jacob suan hi mite a vekpi in 70 pha hi. A tapa Joseph sia Egypt ah omkhol zo hi. 
Exodus1:6 Khua hong ngei vaial ciang Joseph, a suapuite le a khanngual a om laite theampo thi siat hi," 
Exodus1:7 ahizong amate suan le paal Israel te in ta tam mama nei in pung a, Egypt ngam sungah dimin thahat mama uh hi." 
Exodus1:8 Tua zawkciang Joseph ii thu a he ngeingawl kumpi thak khat Egypt ngam ah hong khang hi. 
Exodus1:9 Ama in a mite tungah, “Hi Israel te pung mama in, thahat ahiciang ei atu in lauhuai hi." 
Exodus1:10 Ngal om luilam thong le, ei hong sim tu in ih ngalte taw kipawl in, ngamsung pan suakta tha tu hi. Amate hong tam vaial ngawl natu in, ih khaam zawk natu lampi zong tawng,” ci hi." 
Exodus1:11 Tua ahikom, Egypt te in a thinno thei natu in nasep ham seamsak a, amate tungah sila ukte koi hi. Kumpipa an khol natu in Israel te in Pithom le Rameses khuapite saat uh hi." 
Exodus1:12 Ahizong Egypt te in Israel te a nenniam vaial ciang, Israel te pung vaial in, ngamsung teng ah kizel seseam hi. Egypt te in Israel te hong kiita hi," 
Exodus1:13 tuaciang nuntak man om ngawl za dongin zawthawk vawt a, sal ngimngate suaksak uh hi. Amate in a inn saknate ah le a lote sungah naseamsakin, hesuak vet ngawl uh hi." 
Exodus1:14  
Exodus1:15 Tuaciang Egypt kumpipa in Hebrew nupite nausuaksak syama niite ahi, Shiphrah le Puah tungah thu sonpui hi." 
Exodus1:16 Ama in, “Hebrew nupite nau na suasak uh ciang, a nau sia pa ahile thatlum vun a; ahizong numei ahile nungtasak vun,” ci hi." 
Exodus1:17 Ahizong nausuaksak syamate in Pathian kiita ahikom kumpipa thu ni ngawl hi; amate in panote nungtasak hi. 
Exodus1:18 Tuaciang kumpipa in nausuaksak syamate samin thu dongh a, “Banghang hi bang ngamta nu ziam? Banghangin panote nungtasak nu ziam?” ci hi." 
Exodus1:19 Amate in, “Hebrew numeite Egypt numeite taw kibang ngawl hi; amate ol takin nausuak a, ko thet ma in a nau suak zo uh hi,” ci in zo uh hi." 
Exodus1:20 Nausuaksak syamate in Pathian kiita ahikom, Pathian amate tungah pha in, amate suan le paal pia in innkuan tek neisak hi. Tuaciang Israel te pung tawto in, thahat hi." 
Exodus1:21  
Exodus1:22 A khakbel ciang kumpipa in a mite theampo thupia a: “Hebrew pano suaktuung theampo la vun a, Nile ngun sungah vawk vun, ahizong numei theampo nungtasak vun,” ci hi." 
Exodus2:1 Tua hunsung in Levi minamte pasal khat in ama minampui numei khat teenpui a," 
Exodus2:2 tua nu in tapa khat neipui hi. A tasen bangza in pha cisia a nu in a mu ciang tha thum sung a tapa phual hi. 
Exodus2:3 Ahizong a nu in a tapa a phual zawk nawn ngawl ciangin, pumpa taw kivawt khum khat la in, tui a tum thei ngawl natu in, kattaza taw zut hi. A nu in tuasung ah nauno sialin, ngunhui lopa thukna ah koi hi." 
Exodus2:4 Nauno ii suapuinu in a khuala thithimna ah dingin, bang a tat ziam ci in en hi." 
Exodus2:5 Kumpipa tanu kibual tu in ngun sungah tuak hi, tua laitakin a naseamte ahile ngundung ah vak uh hi. Thakhat thu in ama in lopa thukna ah a om tua khum mu a, a sila numei khat tua khum la tu in sawl hi." 
Exodus2:6 Kumpipa tanu in tua khum hong a, nausen pano khat mu hi. Tua nauno kakap ahiciang ama in khuangaihuai sa hi. Ama in, “Hi sia Hebrew nausen khat hi ta a,” ci hi." 
Exodus2:7 Tuasia ciang nauno suapuinu in, “Hi nauno a omh tu in, Hebrew nupi khat kong sam tu ziam?” ci in tua nu dongh hi." 
Exodus2:8 Kumpipa tanu in, “Hesuakna taw hong sapsak ta'n,” ci in zo hi. Tuaciang numeino sia pai in nausen ii a nu hong paipui hi." 
Exodus2:9 Kumpipa tanu in tua nu tungah, “Hi nausen la in a, kei atu in hong opsak ta'n, na thaman kong pia tu hi,” ci hi. Tua ahiciang tua nu in nausen la a, opsak hi." 
Exodus2:10 Patang hong khan ciang, a nu in kumpipa tanu kungah paipui a, kumpipa tanu in ama tapa sua hi. Kumpipa tanu in, “Tui sung pan ka laak ahiciang a min Moses ka phuak hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus2:11 Moses hong let ciang, a mipui Hebrew te kungah haw in, zawthawk thu taw a kisawl nasep haksa a sepsaknate mu hi. Egypt te khat in Moses ii mipui Hebrew mi khat a thalup ngawngawn mu hi." 
Exodus2:12 Moses in a kiim a paam enin, ama a en kuama a mu ngawl ciang Egypt mi pa thatlum in a luang sen sungah phual hi." 
Exodus2:13 A zing ciang ama pai kik a, Hebrew te nii kihau mu hi. Ama in a khial pa tungah, “Banghangin na Hebrew mipui sia pa saat ni ziam?” ci hi." 
Exodus2:14 Tua pa in, “Kote hong uk tu le thukhen tu in, akua in nang hong koi ziam? Egypt mipa na thalup bangin kei hong that tu ni ziam?” ci in zo hi. Tuasia ciang Moses lau a, “Ka ngamtatna teng ngual in hong mu zo hi ta a maw,” ci hi." 
Exodus2:15 Tua thupiang teng kumpipa in a zaak ciang Moses thalup tu in zongsak a, ahizong Moses sia Midian ngam ah teang tu in tai hi. Ni khat, Moses tuikhuk khat paam ah a to laitak, Midian thiampi Jethro ii tanu salite tuitoai tu in hong pai uh a, a pa ii tuu le kealte atu in tuikuang teng tui dimh hi." 
Exodus2:16  
Exodus2:17 Ahizong tuucing pawlkhatte in Jethro tanute notkeak uh hi. Tuaciang Moses in amate suatakin, a ngannote tui piaksak hi." 
Exodus2:18 Amate a pa kungah a cia uh ciang, a pa in, “Banghang tuni hong cia pal nu ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Exodus2:19 Amate in, “Egypt te khat in tuucingte khut sung pan hong suatakin, ko atu in tui ngawngawn hong toaisak a, ih ngannote tui hong piaksak hi,” ci in zo uh hi." 
Exodus2:20 A pa in a ta numeite tungah, “Tua pa koi sungah om ziam?” ci in dongh hi. “Banghangin tua pa tualai ah nusia nu ziam? Pai tavun a, eima taw an nekhawm tu in sam tavun,” ci hi." 
Exodus2:21 Tuabangin tualai ah a teang tu in Moses thukim ahikom, Jethro in a tanu Zipporah taw kiteangsak hi," 
Exodus2:22 Zipporah in tapa khat neipui hi. Moses in, “Hi ngam ah ngamdangmi khat suak ka hi ciang, a min Gershom ka phuak tu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus2:23 Kum tampi zawkciang Egypt kumpipa thi a, ahizong Israel te a saltanna hangin thuumin, tau a, hu ngenin kap lai uh hi. A kaana awte Pathian kung thengin," 
Exodus2:24 ama in amate taunate a zaak ciang Abraham, Isaac le Jacob taw a thuciamna phawk hi." 
Exodus2:25 Ama in Israel te saltanna mu in, amate atu in thinbot hi." 
Exodus3:1 Moses in Midian thiampi, a sunghpa Jethro ii tuu le kealte cingin a om laitak ni khat ni in a ngannote sennealngam kaantanpui in mual thiangtho Sinai theng hi." 
Exodus3:2 Tualai ah Topa vantunglalang sia sawlpaang khat ii sung pan a pusuak meikuang khat bangin ama kungah kilangh hi. Moses in sawlpaang a kaangh in mu a, ahizong sawlpaang sia kaanghtum ngawl hi." 
Exodus3:3 Ama in, “Hi sia paw lamdang ei! Banghang sawlpaang sia kaanghtum ngawl ziam? Kei pai in, a nai neakin va en tong,” ci in ngaisun hi." 
Exodus3:4 Moses ii a nai a neak vaial Topa in a mu ciang Topa in sawlpaang sung pan, “Moses! Moses!” ci in sam hi. Ama in, “Hi khi hi, keima hilai ah om khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Exodus3:5 Pathian in, “A naizaw in hong neak heak in. Na peangdap suut in, banghang ziam cile mun thiangtho tungah ding ni hi." 
Exodus3:6 Keima in na taanghpupite ii Pathian, Abraham, Isaac le Jacob te ii Pathian ka hi hi,” ci hi. Tua ahiciang Moses in a mai hum hi, banghang ziam cile Pathian en ngam ngawl hi." 
Exodus3:7 Tua zawkciang Topa in, “Egypt ah ka mite bang zata vawtsiatna thuak cisia ka mu zo hi, sila ukte khut sung pan suakta nuam in a kaana aw zongh ka za zo hi. A ngim thuakna theampo ka he siat hi," 
Exodus3:8 tua ahiciang Egypt te khut sung pan a hun tu le Egypt pan la in lei phana le ngam zaina munah a paipui tu in kong tuaksuk zo hi, tua ngam sia a zai, a hau le leihoi leipha hi a, tu in Canaan mite, Hit mite, Amor mite, Periz mite, Hiv mite le Jebus mite teang uh hi." 
Exodus3:9 Ka mite kaana aw ka za takpi zo a, Egypt te ii a zawthawk vawtzia zongh ka mu zo hi." 
Exodus3:10 Tu in ka mite Egypt ngam pan lam na pui thei natu in, a kumpipa kungah nangma kong puak tu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus3:11 Ahizong Moses in Pathian tungah, “Kei sia bangma ka hi bua hi. Kumpipa kungah pai in Israel te Egypt pan bangbang paipui thei thong tu khi ziam?” ci hi." 
Exodus3:12 Pathian in, “Nang taw kong omkhawm tu a, Egypt pan Israel te na paipui ciang, hi mual tungah nong bia tu hi. Tuasia in nangma hong paisak tatak ka hina, a kilakna hi tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Exodus3:13 Ahizong Moses in, “Kei Israel te kungah pai in, ‘Na taanghpupite ii Pathian in note kungah kei hong paisak hi,’ ka ci ciang, ‘Ama min akua ziam’ ci in amate in kei hong dongh tu hi. Tua ahikom bangbang son thei tu khi ziam?” ci kik hi." 
Exodus3:14 Pathian in, “Keima sia Keima ka hi hi. Amate tungah hisia na son hamtang tu hi: ‘KEIMA a kici khat in note kungah kei hong paisak hi.’" 
Exodus3:15 Keima, Topa a taanghpupite ii Pathian, Abraham, Isaac le Jacob te ii Pathian in amate kungah nang kong paisak sia Israel te tungah son in. Hi sia in a tawntung ka min hi; maisang hong piang tu khang theampo in hi bangin keima hong sam tu hi." 
Exodus3:16 Pai in a, Israel lampuite kaikhawmin, Keima Topa a taanghpupite ii Pathian, Abraham, Isaac le Jacob te ii Pathian in note mai ah hong kilangh ka hi sia amate tungah son in. Amate kungah ka pai zo a, Egypt te ii amate tungah a vawtna teng ka mu hunlam amate son in." 
Exodus3:17 Nasia tak vawtsiat a thuakna Egypt pan amate ka pusua pui tu a, leihoi leiphana mun — Canaan mite, Hit mite, Amor mite, Periz mite, Hiv mi te le Jebus mite teenna ngam ah amate paipui tu in ka khensat zo hi." 
Exodus3:18 “Ka mite in nangma thuson hong ngai tu uh hi. Tua zawkciang Israel lampuite taw Egypt kumpipa kungah pai in a, ama tungah, ‘Hebrew te ii Pathian Topa sia kote tungah ama le ama hong kilaak zo hi. Tu in sennealngam sungah Topa, kote Pathian tungah sangaw biakpiakna ka piak thei natu uh in, kote ni thum sung khual hong hawsak ta'n,” ci tu ni hi." 
Exodus3:19 Zawthawk thu taw a kisawl bua nale Egypt kumpipa in note hong paisak ngawl tu cisia ka he hi. 
Exodus3:20 Ahizong ka vaangletna zanghin, a lauhuai nate tua munah ka vawtna taw Egypt daan ka pia tu hi. Tua zawkciang ama in note hong paisak tu hi." 
Exodus3:21 “Ka mite a pai ciang, khut nguak masuan in a pai ngawl natu in Egypt te in note kong upatsak tu hi." 
Exodus3:22 Israel numei theampo in a innpaam Egypt te le a innkuanpui Egypt numei pawpo kungah pai in nik le puan, khamh le ngunn, suang manphate na ngen tu uh hi. Israel te in tua nate a tapate a tanute in silhsakin, Egypt te hauna teng laaksak siat tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus4:1 Tuasia ciang Moses in Topa tungah, “Ahizong Israel te in kei hong um ngawlin ka thuson hong ngai ngawl tu ci tawng. Amate in nang tungah Topa hong kilangh ngawl hi, hong ci thong le bangbang hi tu khi ziam?” ci in zo hi." 
Exodus4:2 Tua ahiciang Topa in, “Nang bang toai ni ziam,” ci in dongh hi. Ama in, “Ciangkhut khat toai khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Exodus4:3 Topa in, “Na ciangkhut lei ah lawn in,” ci hi. Moses in a ciangkhut a lot ciang ngul khat suakin, tua sia kung pan Moses tai hi." 
Exodus4:4 Tuasia ciang Topa in Moses tungah, “Kunsuk in a, a mei pan zamh in,” ci hi. Tuaciang Moses in kunsuk in man a, ciangkhut suak kik hi." 
Exodus4:5 Topa in, “Amate taanghpupite ii Pathian, Abraham, Isaac le Jacob te ii Pathian nang tungah hong kilangh ahi hunlam sia Israel te ii tel natu in hi bangin vawt in,” ci hi." 
Exodus4:6 Topa in Moses tungah, “Na khut na puan sungah koi in,” ci kik hi. Moses in a thu ni hi; a khut a laak kik ciang a khut tungah vuuk bangin a kaangpawl ciptepte in tuam hi." 
Exodus4:7 Tuasia ciang Topa in, “Na khut na puan sungah koi kik in,” ci hi. Moses in koi kikin, a laak kik ciang a pumpi dangte taw kibangin dam kik hi." 
Exodus4:8 Topa in, “Amate in nalamdang lakna a khatna sia taw hong um thei buale zong tu a sia taw in nang hong um tu uh hi." 
Exodus4:9 Hi nalamdang lakna niite taw zongh hong um zo bualai a, na thu hong ngai ngawlin hong nial le, Nile ngun pan tui tawm la in lei ah sung in. Tua tui sia chisan suak tu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus4:10 Ahizong Moses in, “Hi thei bo, Topa awng kei hong sawl heak in. Thu son ka thiam ngei bua a, nangma nong paupui ciil a kipan tu dong thuson ka thiam tuan bua hi, kampau ka thiam bua hi, ka aw tawn in ka pau awk hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus4:11 Topa in Moses tungah, “Mihingte ii kam le muk akua in pia ziam? Akua in nangong le kampau thei ngawlin vawt ziam? Akua in khua musak a, akua in mittawsak ziam? Tua in Topa Keima ka hi hi." 
Exodus4:12 Tu in, va pai ta'n! Na kampau kong hu tu a, na thuson tu kong hil tu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus4:13 Ahizong Moses in, “Hi thei bo, Topa awng, nong hesuakna in midang khat pawpo sawl zaw ta'n,” ci in zo hi." 
Exodus4:14 Tuasia ciang Moses tungah Topa thin uuk a, “Levi mi, na suapuipa Aaron bangbangziam? Ama pha tak a pau thei sia ka he hi. A tatakin ci leang nang taw kimu tu in, tu in ama hong pai a, nang hong mu tu lawp mama tu hi." 
Exodus4:15 Ama tungah thu son thei tu ni hi, a son tu teng hil in. Na nii in na thuson kong hu tu a, na vawt tu uh teng kong hil khawm tu hi." 
Exodus4:16 Ama sia nang taang in a paupa hi tu a, mite tungah thuson tu hi. Tuasia ciang nangma Pathian bang na hi tu a, a ci tu teng na son tu hi." 
Exodus4:17 Hi ciangkhut keng ta'n; banghang ziam cile tuasia taw nalamdang laknate na vawt tu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus4:18 Tuasia ciang Moses sia a sunghpa Jethro kungah pai kik in ama tungah, “Egypt ngam ah ka mealheakte a nungta lai ziam maw a vil tu in nong hesuakna in hong ciasak ta'n,” ci hi. Jethro thukim a ciidam in va cia ta'n ci hi." 
Exodus4:19 Midian ah Moses a om lai in Topa in, “Egypt ah heak kik ta'n, nang hong that nuamte thi siat zo hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus4:20 Tuaciang Moses in a zi le a tapate a laate tungah tosakin Egypt zuan uh hi, Pathian ii a sawl ciangkhut sia keng hi." 
Exodus4:21 Topa in Moses tungah, “Tu in Egypt ah cia kik tu na hi ciang nalamdang lakna theampo a vawt thei tu in vaangletna kong piaksa hi a, kumpipa mai ah vawt tatak tu ni hi. Ahizong kumpipa thin ka sahsak tu a, ama in mihingte paisak ngawl tu hi." 
Exodus4:22 Tuasia ciang nangma in kumpipa tungah, keima Topa in ‘Israel sia ka tapaciil hi." 
Exodus4:23 Keima hong biak thei natu in ka tapa paisak in, hong ci khi hi, ahihang nong nial hi. Tu in, na tapaciil thatlum tu khi hi,’ ci in na son tu hi” ci kik hi." 
Exodus4:24 Egypt paina lampi, ngiaphual ah Topa in Moses taw kimu in thalup sawm hi." 
Exodus4:25 Tuasia ciang a zi Zipporah in suanghiam khat la in a tapa ii vunteap attansak a, tuasia taw Moses ii peang kithuthasak hi. Vunteap at ngeina zeksa hangin a zi in Moses tungah, “Nang sia kei tungah chisan taw kipawl ka pasal hi ni hi!” ci hi. Tua ahikom, Topa in Moses ii nuntakna khoaikhe hi." 
Exodus4:26  
Exodus4:27 Tua hunsung in Topa in Aaron tungah, “Moses taw kimu tu in, sennealngam sungah pai in,” ci hi. A sawl bangin mual thiangtho ah pai a; Moses taw a kimu ciangin namh hi." 
Exodus4:28 Tuaciang Moses in Egypt ah heakkik in a ci lai a, Topa kam vaithak theampo le Topa ii sep tu in a sawl nalamdang lakna tu thute zongh Aaron tungah son siat hi." 
Exodus4:29 Tua ahiciang Moses le Aaron Egypt ah paikhawmin Israel lampuite theampo kaikhawm uh hi. 
Exodus4:30 Topa ii Moses tungah a thuson teng Aaron in amate tungah son kik siat hi, tua zawkciang Moses in mite mai ah nalamdang lakna theampo vawt hi." 
Exodus4:31 Amate in um uh hi. Amate kungah Topa pai in kivawtsiatna a thuaknate Topa ii a mu sakna thu teng a zaak uh ciang amate kunin Topa bia uh hi. 
Exodus5:1 Tuaciang Moses le Aaron Egypt kumpipa kungah pai in, “ Topa Israel te ii Pathian in, ‘Ka mite sennealngam ah kei zatak piakna poai khat a khaam thei natu in paisak in’ hong ci hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus5:2 Kumpipa in, “ Topa sia akua ziam? Banghangin ama thu ngai in Israel te paisak tu khi ziam? Tua Topa ka he bua hi; Israel te ka paisak buatu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus5:3 Moses le Aaron in, “Hebrew te Pathian sia kote tungah ama le ama hong kilangh zo hi. Topa ka Pathian tungah sangaw biakna pia tu in ni thum sung sennealngam ah hong paisak ta'n. Tuabang ka hi bua uh le ama in natna taw ahibuale ngal taw in kote hong thatlum tu hi,” ci in zo kik uh hi." 
Exodus5:4 Kumpipa in Moses le Aaron tungah, “Mipite in a nasep a nusiat natu in na vaihawm uh sia bang na cinopna uh ziam? Naseam tu in hi salte kuansak kik vun!" 
Exodus5:5 Egypt te sangin no tam phazaw zo nu hi. Tu in a nasep tawlngasak nuam nu ziam!” ci hi. 
Exodus5:6 Tua ni ma in kumpipa in sal a uk Egypt te tung le Israel naseam ukte tungah thupia a: 
Exodus5:7 “Uksuang vawt natu in mihingte tungah taangphaw na piak uh tawlnga vun. Amate paisak in zongtawmsak vun. 
Exodus5:8 Ahizong uksuang nidang a den za ma, khat zongh kiam ngawlin deangsak vun. Amate in a sep khom tu nasep nei ngawl ahikom a Pathian tungah sangaw biakna pia tu in ka paisak natu hong ngen tan viuveu hi!" 
Exodus5:9 Hi mite nasep haksa zaw seamsakin, komlasak vun, tua hile leilot thusonte ngai man ngawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus5:10 Sal ukte le Israel naseam ukte pai in Israel te tungah, “Kumpipa in taangphaw ka pia nawn buatu hi." 
Exodus5:11 Noma pai in na mutheina mun pawpo ah zongtawm tavun, ahihang uksuang na den ngeiza uh ma vawt tu nu hi hong ci hi,” ci uh hi." 
Exodus5:12 Tua ahiciang mite sia Egypt ngamsung theampo ah taangphaw zongin kuan uh hi. 
Exodus5:13 Sal ukte in taangphaw a kipiak lai a, uksuang a den ngeiza ma ni sim uksuang a den natu in sawl ngawp hi." 
Exodus5:14 Egypt mi sal ukte in nasepna uk tu in a koi Israel naseam ukte saat hi. Amate in “Nidang a uksuang na vawt za uh banghang vawt zo ngawl nu ziam?” ci hamtang uh hi. 
Exodus5:15 Tuasia ciang naseam ukte kumpipa kungah pai in, “Kumpipa awng, banghangin kote tungah hi bang hong vawt thong ni ziam?" 
Exodus5:16 Taangphaw hong kipia ngawl hi, ahizong uksuang deang tu ma hong kisawl veve hi! Tu in ko hong kisaat hi. A khial sia na mite hi,” ci in a lungkim ngawlna teng son uh hi." 
Exodus5:17 Kumpipa in, “Note datham in na seam nuam ngawl nu hi, tua hangin Topa tungah sangaw biakna pia in pai tu hong ngen nu hi." 
Exodus5:18 Tu in na nasepna zuan kik tavun! Taangphaw hong kipia ngawl tu a, ahizong uksuang na den ngeiza ma deang veve tu nu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Exodus5:19 Nidangin na den ngeiza ma ni simin na deang tu uh hi ci thu, naseam ukte in a heak ciang thinngim uh hi." 
Exodus5:20 Amate hong pusua ciang, amate a ngak Moses le Aaron taw kimu uh hi." 
Exodus5:21 Amate in Moses le Aaron tungah, “Na nasepnate uh Topa in hong mu zo hi, kumpipa le a uliante in kote hong ensansak na hi uh kom, daan hong pia tu hi. Kote hong thalup natu in a paulap tu khat a pia na hi uh hi,” ci uh hi." 
Exodus5:22 Tuasia ciang Topa sangah Moses kiheak in, “ Topa awng, na mite banghangin vawtsia ni ziam? Banghang hi sungah kei hong paisak ni ziam?" 
Exodus5:23 Nangma atu thu son tu in kumpipa kung ka pai pan kipan amate vawtsia hi. Tua hi a, nangma in amate hu natu bangma na seam bua hi!” ci hi." 
Exodus6:1 Tuasia ciang Topa in Moses tungah, “Tu in kumpipa tungah ka sep tu te na mu tu hi. Ka mite a paisak natu in ka seam nanak tu hi. A tatakin ci leang a leitang pan ka mite a hawlkeak tu in ka sawl nanak tu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus6:2 Pathian in Moses tungah, “Keima in Topa ka hi hi." 
Exodus6:3 A Vaanglianbel Pathian in Abraham, Isaac le Jacob tungah ka kilangh a, ahizong Topa ci in ka min thiangtho taw amate ka hesak bua hi." 
Exodus6:4 Ngamdangmite bangin a teenna Canaan ngam sia amate tung piak tu kamciam in amate taw thuciamna zongh ka vawt hi. 
Exodus6:5 Tu in Egypt te ii salin a mat Israel te tauna ka za zo a, ka thuciamna ka phawk hi." 
Exodus6:6 Tua ahiciang Israel te tungah, ‘Keima in Topa ka hi hi; Egypt te sal panin note kong hun tu a, kong suaktasak tu hi. A thahat ka khut laamin amate tungah a lauhuai daan ka tungsak tu a, note kong hun tu hi." 
Exodus6:7 Note keima mihing kong suaksak tu a, keima in note Pathian ka hi tu hi. Egypt saltanna pan kong suataksak ciang na Topa na Pathian ka hina nong he tu uh hi." 
Exodus6:8 Abraham, Isaac le Jacob tungah piak tu in ka ciamsa ngam ah kong paipui tu a; tua ngam sia note neisa tu in kong pia tu hi. Keima in Topa ka hi hi,’ ci in, son ta'n,” ci hi." 
Exodus6:9 Moses in Israel te tungah hi thu teng son a, ahizong amate in nadon ngawl uh hi, banghang ziam cile a sila tanna ah kivawtsia in a thin uh tamhtham zo hi." 
Exodus6:10 Tuasia ciang Topa in Moses tungah," 
Exodus6:11 “Egypt kumpipa kungah va pai ta'n a, Israel te na ngamsung pan pusuaksak hamtang in ci ta'n” ci hi." 
Exodus6:12 Ahizong Moses in, “Israel te ngawngawn zongh in ka thuson hong ngai ngawl tu ci leang bangbangin kumpipa in hong ngai tu ziam? Kampau thiam ngawl mama pa ka hi hi,” ci kik hi." 
Exodus6:13 Topa in Moses le Aaron tungah: “Egypt ngam pan Israel te pusuana ah lampui tu in noma thu kong piak sia Israel te le Egypt kumpipa tungah son tavun.” 
Exodus6:14 Jacob taciil Reuben in tapa li nei a: Hanoch, Pallu, Hezron, le Carmi hi a; amate min a putsak bee le phungte ii pianna taanghpupite ahi uh hi." 
Exodus6:15 Simeon in tapa luk nei a: Jemuel, Jamin, Ohad, Jachin, Zohar le Canaan numei khat taw a tapa Shaul hi; amate min a putsak bee le phungte ii pianna taanghpupite ahi uh hi." 
Exodus6:16 Levi in tapa thum nei a: Gershon, Kohath le Merari hi; amate min a putsak bee le phungte ii pianna taanghpupite ahi uh hi. Levi sia kum 137 nungta hi." 
Exodus6:17 Gershon in tapa nii nei in: Libni le Shimei hi a, amate in suan le paal tam mama nei hi." 
Exodus6:18 Kohath in tapa li nei a: Amram, Izhar, Hebron, le Uzziel ahi uh hi. Kohath kum 133 nungta hi." 
Exodus6:19 Merari in tapa nii nei a: Mahli le Mushi ahi hi. Hite sia Levi bee le phungte le a suan a paalte ahi hi. 
Exodus6:20 Amram in a pa suapuinu Jochebed teenpui in, Aaron le Moses nei hi. Amram sia kum 137 nungta hi." 
Exodus6:21 Izhar in tapa thum nei in: Korah, Nepheg, le Zichri ahi uh hi." 
Exodus6:22 Uzziel zongh in tapa thum nei a: Mishael, Elzaphan, le Sithri ahi hi." 
Exodus6:23 Aaron in Amminadab ii tanu, Nahshon ii suapuinu Elisheba teenpui a; Nadab, Abihu, Eleazar le Ithamar nei hi." 
Exodus6:24 Korah in tapa thum nei a: Assir, Elkanah le Abiasaph ahi hi; amate Korah bee le phung hong pianna taanghpupite ahi uh hi." 
Exodus6:25 Aaron ii tapa Eleazar in Putiel ii tanute khat teenpui in, Phinehas nei hi. Hite sia innkuan lutangte hi a, Levi minamte ii pianna bee le phungte ahi uh hi." 
Exodus6:26 Aaron le Moses tungah Topa in, “Israel minamte lampui in Egypt pan pusuapui vun,” ci in a sawl ahi hi." 
Exodus6:27 Amate sia Israel te suatak natu in, Egypt kumpipa tungah thusonte ahi uh hi." 
Exodus6:28 Egypt ngamsung Moses tungah Topa in thu a son lai in," 
Exodus6:29 ama in, “Keima in Topa ka hi hi. Kong son theampo Egypt kumpipa tungah son in,” ci hi." 
Exodus6:30 Ahizong Moses in, “Nong heak bangin kampau ka thiam bua hi; banghangin kumpipa in ka thuson hong ngai thong tu ziam?” ci in zo hi." 
Exodus7:1 Topa in, “Kumpipa mai ah nang, Pathian bangin kong vawt tu a, na suapuipa Aaron in na kamsaang bangin ama paupui tu hi." 
Exodus7:2 Kong thupiak theampo Aaron tungah na son tu a, ama in kumpipa tungah Israel te a ngamsung pan a pusuasak natu in son tu hi." 
Exodus7:3 Ahizong kumpipa a thin ka sahsak tu a, Egypt ah a lauhuai na tam mama vawt kaleng awlmawk ngawlin na thuson hong ngai ngawl tu hi. Tuasia ciang Egypt te tungah nasia takin daan ka pia tu a, ka mite ii minamte tua ngam pan ka pusuapui tu hi." 
Exodus7:4  
Exodus7:5 Keima in ka khut laam in Egypt te tungah ka thahatna ka lak ciang le Israel te a ngam pan ka pusuapui ciang, Egypt te in Topa ka hina hong he tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus7:6 Topa thupiak bangin Moses le Aaron in seam uh hi. 
Exodus7:7 Kumpipa tungah a thuson hunin, Moses kum sawmliat pha in, Aaron kum sawmliat le kum thum pha hi." 
Exodus7:8 Topa in Moses le Aaron tungah," 
Exodus7:9 “Kumpipa in, hong ki up thei natu in, nalamdang khat hong lak tavun, hong cile, nangma Moses in Aaron tungah a ciangkhut la a sawl in kumpipa mai ah lawnsak lete, tuasia ngul khat suak tu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus7:10 Tua ahiciang Moses le Aaron kumpipa kungah pai in Topa thupiak bangin seam uh hi. Aaron in kumpipa le a uliante mai ah a ciangkhut lawn a, ngul khat suak hi." 
Exodus7:11 Tuasia ciang kumpipa in a mipilte le mitbum thiamte samin a mitbum thiamna taw a kibangma in vawt uh hi. 
Exodus7:12 Amate in a ciangkhutte lawnin ngul suak siat hi. Ahizong Aaron ciangkhut in amate aa teng valh hi. 
Exodus7:13 Bangbang hikale kumpipa thinsak veve a, Topa cisa bangma in kumpipa in Moses le Aaron thu ngai ngawl hi." 
Exodus7:14 Tuasia ciang Topa in Moses tungah, “Kumpipa thin sah mama a, Israel te paisak tu nial hi." 
Exodus7:15 Tua ahiciang zingsang in kumpipa Nile ngun ah a pai ciang, pai in a kimu ta'n. Ngul a suak thei na ciangkhut kengin ngunvaal pan ama ngak in." 
Exodus7:16 Tua zawkciang kumpipa tungah, ‘ Topa Hebrew te Pathian in amate ii sennealngam sungah ama a biak thei natu in, a mihingte na paisak natu a son tu in kei hong sawl hi. Ahizong tu dong ciang a thu na ni bua hi." 
Exodus7:17 Tu in kumpipa awng, Topa akua hi cisia ama nasep tu sia taw na mu tu hi Topa in hong ci hi. En in, hi ciangkhut taw nguntui ka saat tu a, nguntui chisan suak tu hi." 
Exodus7:18 Ngasate thi tu a, nguntui uih mama in Egypt te in tua tui ne thei ngawl tu uh hi,’ ci in, son ta'n,” ci hi." 
Exodus7:19 Topa in Moses tungah, “Aaron tungah na ciangkhut la in a, Egypt ngamsung ngunte, a kitotawm tuiluamte le tuicingte theampo tungah na ciangkhut vaan in. Tuite chisan hong suak tu a, ngamsung mun theampo le thingbealte, suangbealte sung ngawngawn ah chisan om tu hi, ci in son in,” ci hi." 
Exodus7:20 Tua zawkciang Topa thupiak bangin Moses le Aaron te in seam uh hi. Kumpipa le a uliante mai ah Aaron in a ciangkhut laamin nguntui saat a, tui theampo chisan suak hi." 
Exodus7:21 Ngun sungah a om ngasate thi in, ui mama ahikom Egypt te in tua tui ne thei ngawl uh hi. Egypt ngamsung mun theampo chisan om hi." 
Exodus7:22 Tuasia ciang kumpipa ii mitbum thiamte in a mitbum thiamna uh taw tuabang tatak ma in vawt a, kumpipa sia a thinsak ngei bangma in sak veve hi. Topa cisa bangin kumpipa in Moses le Aaron thu ngai ngawl hi." 
Exodus7:23 Hi zata in thupiangte ngawngawn zongh kumpipa in awlmawk vet ngawlin a kumpi inn ah heakkik zaw hi. 
Exodus7:24 Egypt te theampo in tua nguntui ne thei ngawl ahikom ngundung ah a tui neak tu tuikhuk to uh hi. 
Exodus7:25 Topa ii Nile nguntui a saat zawk ni sali pha zo hi. 
Exodus8:1 Tuaciang Topa in Moses tungah, “Kumpipa kungah va pai ta'n a, Topa in, ‘Keima hong biak thei natu in ka mite paisak in." 
Exodus8:2 Ka thu nong nial le na ngam sungah ulol dimsakin daan kong pia tu hi. 
Exodus8:3 Nile ngun sungah ulol dimleet tu a, ngun sung pan pusuak in na kumpi inn sung, na lupna inndoi sung, na lupna tung, na uliante le na mite inn sung, tuaciang na meikhuk le na kuangte sung ngawngawn dongah hong zuan tu hi." 
Exodus8:4 Ulolte in nangma tung, na mihingte tung le na uliante theampo tungah hong leangto tu ci hi,’ ci in na son tu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus8:5 Topa in Moses tungah, “Ngun tung, a kitotawm tuiluam tung, tuicingte tungah a ciangkhut vaan in, ulolte pusuaksak in a Egypt ngamsung dimsak in ci in Aaron tungah son ta'n” ci hi." 
Exodus8:6 Tua ahiciang Aaron in a ciangkhut tui omna theampo tungah vaan a, ulolte pusuak in ngamsung dim hi." 
Exodus8:7 Ahizong mitbum thiamte zongh in mitbum thiamna zanghin ngam sungah ulolte pusuaksak hi. 
Exodus8:8 Kumpipa in Moses le Aaron samin, “Hi ulol teng a laakkeak natu in, Topa tungah thungen vun, Topa tungah sangaw biakna a piak thei natu in, na mite ka paisak tu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus8:9 Moses in kumpipa tungah, “Nang atu in thu kong ngetsak tu ka lungdam hi. Nangma, na uliante le na mite atu thu kong ngetsak tu hun ciangtan in. Tuasia ciang, hi ulolte sia Nile ngun sung simngawl mundang ah om nawn ngawl tu hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Exodus8:10 Kumpipa in, “Zing ciangin thu hong ngetsak ta'n,” ci in zo hi. Moses in, “Nong sawl bangin ka seam tu a, tuaciang kote Pathian Topa taw a kibang pathian dang a om ngawl hunlam he tu ni hi." 
Exodus8:11 Ulolte sia nangma, na uliante le na mite taw kipeal in Nile ngun sung bek ah om tu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus8:12 Tua zawkciang Moses le Aaron te kumpipa nusia in ama ii kumpipa tung dongah a puak ulolte a laak kik natu in, Moses in Topa tungah thungen hi." 
Exodus8:13 Moses ii nget bangin Topa in naseam a, inn sung suumsung le lote sungah a om ulolte thi hi." 
Exodus8:14 Egypt te in ulol thite a lom a lom in seng a, ngamsung theampo uihsak hi." 
Exodus8:15 Kumpipa in ulol thite a mu ciang a thinsak kikin Topa ci sa bangma kumpipa in Moses le Aaron thu ngai ngawl hi. 
Exodus8:16 Topa in Moses tungah, “Aaron in a ciangkhut taw lei a saat natu sawl in a, tua hile Egypt ngamsung leivui theampo thokaang suak siat tu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus8:17 Tua ahiciang Aaron in a ciangkhut taw lei saatin, Egypt ngamsung leivui theampo thokaang suak a mihingte le nganhingte tungah dim hi." 
Exodus8:18 Mitbum thiamte in a mitbum thiamna zanghin thokaang piansak tu hanciam a, ahizong vawt thei ngawl uh hi. Thokaang mun theampo ah hong om hi," 
Exodus8:19 tuaciang mitbum thiamte in kumpipa tungah, “Hi sia in Pathian nasepna hi zo hi!” ci uh hi. Ahizong kumpipa thinsakin, Topa ci bangma kumpipa in Moses le Aaron thu ngai ngawl hi." 
Exodus8:20 Topa in Moses tungah, “Ngun ah kumpipa a pai ciang kimu tu in zing ciang zingsang tuungin pai in a, Topa in, ‘Amate in kei hong biak thei natu in ka mite paisak hen." 
Exodus8:21 Na kidop natu panin ka thu nong nial le daan kong pia tu a, nangma tung, na uliante tung, le na mite tungah tho honpite kong puak tu hi. Egypt te ii inn te tho taw kidim tu a, lei sia tho honpi taw kituamcip tu hi." 
Exodus8:22 Ahizong ka mite teenna Goshen ngam sia tho om ngawl tu in ka khe tu hi. Keima Topa in hi ngam le lei ah naseam hi ci in nong heak natu in hi bangin ka vawt tu hi.
