Exodus8:23 Ka mite le na mite kilaklaw ah kilamdanna khat ka vawt tu hi. Hi nalamdang lakna sia zing ciang in hong piang tu hi,’ ci in son ta'n,” ci hi." 
Exodus8:24 Topa in, kumpipa inn sung le a uliante inn sungah tho honpite puak hi. Tho in Egypt ngamsung buppi lalsak hi." 
Exodus8:25 Tuasia ciang kumpipa in Moses le Aaron samin, “Pai in hi ngam sungah na Pathian sangaw biakpiakna pia vun,” ci hi." 
Exodus8:26 Moses in, “Tuabang hi tu pha ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile Topa ka Pathian tungah nganhingte taw biakpiakna in Egypt te thin uuksak tu hi. Egypt te mu theina ah hi ngannote taw biakpiakna vawtin amate thin uuk thong le kote suang taw hong deanglum tu uh hi." 
Exodus8:27 Ama hong thupiak bangin Topa ka Pathian tungah sangaw biakpiakna pia tu in, ni thum khualhaw in sennealngam sungah ka pai uh kul tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Exodus8:28 Kumpipa in, “A khuala mama na ah pai bua po le uh te, sennealngam sungah Topa na Pathian bia tu in kong paisak tu hi. Kei atu in thu hong ngetsak tavun,” ci hi." 
Exodus8:29 Moses in, “Ka pusua po ciang, zing ciang tho honpite in nangma, na uliante le na mihingte kung pan a tai siat natu in Topa tungah thu ka ngen tu hi. Ahizong mite ii Topa tungah sangaw biakpiakna a vawt tu khaamin, hong theam kik peuma ngawl tu ni hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Exodus8:30 Moses in kumpipa kung pan pusuakin Topa tungah thungen hi," 
Exodus8:31 Moses nget bangin Topa in pia hi. Tho honpite kumpipa, a uliante le a mihingte kung panin khat zongh kikhe ngawlin tai siat hi." 
Exodus8:32 Ahizong hi hun zongh ah kumpipa thin sah veve in, ama in tua mite paisak ngawl leleau hi." 
Exodus9:1 Topa in Moses tungah, “Kumpipa kungah pai in, Hebrew te ii Pathian Topa in, ‘Kei hong biak thei natu in ka mite paisak hen." 
Exodus9:2 Na paisak nuam bua leleau ahile," 
Exodus9:3 no daan kong pia tu a, na ngannote — siphu, laa, kalaoh, khui, tuu le kealte tungah a lauhuai natna ka tungsak tu hi." 
Exodus9:4 Israel ngannote le Egypt ngannote kilaklaw ah kilamdanna khat ka vawt tu a, Israel te nganno ngawl teng ka thisak tu hi." 
Exodus9:5 Keima Topa in, hi teng zing ciang mama in ka seam tu hi hong ci hi,’ va ci ta'n,” ci hi." 
Exodus9:6 A sonsa bangin a zing ciangin Topa in naseam a. Egypt te nganno theampo thi siat hi, ahizong, Israel te nganno khat zongh thi ngawl hi." 
Exodus9:7 Kumpipa in bang thupiang ziam ci in dongh a, Israel te nganno khat zongh a thi ngawlna thu teng ama tungah kison hi. Ahizong a thin sah veve a, tua mite paisak tuan ngawl hi." 
Exodus9:8 Tuasia ciang Topa in Moses le Aaron tungah, “Meikhuk pan khutpham dim vut la vun; kumpipa mai vui sungah Moses in tua vutte lawn tu hi." 
Exodus9:9 Tuate Egypt ngamsung theampo ah leivui bangin kithethaang tu a, a thetna mun po ah uilut meima piangsak in, mite le nganhingte uilut veeisak tu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus9:10 Tua ahiciang amate in vut tawm la in kumpipa mai ah ding uh hi; Moses in tua vutte vui sungah lawnin tua vutte in mihingte le nganhingte tungah uilut meima piangsak hi. 
Exodus9:11 Mitbum thiamte Moses mai ah kilaak thei ngawl uh hi, banghang ziam cile a dang Egypt te theampo taw kibangin uilut meima veei siat uh hi." 
Exodus9:12 Ahizong Topa in kumpipa thin sahsakin, Topa cisa bangma kumpipa in Moses le Aaron thu ngai nuam ngawl hi." 
Exodus9:13 Tuasia ciang Topa in Moses tungah, “Zing ciang zingtuung in kumpipa taw kimu in a, Hebrew te Pathian Topa in, ‘Kei hong biak thei natu in ka mite paisak hen." 
Exodus9:14 Leitung theampo ah keima taw kibang khat beak a om ngawl hunlam na heak natu in tu tungin na uliante le na mihingte bek daan pia ngawlin nangma zongh daan kong pia tu hi. 
Exodus9:15 Nangma le na mite tungah ka khut laamin natna hong tungsak leng note na mong siat tu uh hi. 
Exodus9:16 Ahizong leitung bup ah ka minthanna a kizel natu in nang tungah ka vaangletna hong lak nuam in kong nungtasak zo hi. 
Exodus9:17 Ahizong nangma na kisathei veve a, ka mite na paisak bua hi." 
Exodus9:18 Zing ciang, tu hunin Egypt ngam taanghthu sungah a kihe ngeingawl, vui le ngial kithua a nasia mama khat ka piangsak tu hi." 
Exodus9:19 Tu in na ngannote le nadang tuatuam a pua sangah na nei theampo kidalna buk sungah a koi natu in thupia in. A pua sangah a om lai kidalna nei ngawl mihingte le ngannote tungah ngial kia tu a, amate thi siat tu hi,’ ci in va son ta'n,” ci hi." 
Exodus9:20 Topa thusonte hangin kumpipa ulian kimkhatte lau in a silate le a ngannote kidalna buk sungah paipui uh hi. 
Exodus9:21 Ahizong pawlkhatte in Topa thupiakte awlmawk ngawlin, a silate le a ngannote doipua sangah nusia uh hi." 
Exodus9:22 Tuasia ciang Topa in Moses tungah, “Na khut van ah laamto in tua hile Egypt ngamsung buppi — mihing, nganhing le lo sung ankung theampo tungah ngial kia tu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus9:23 Tua ahiciang Moses in a ciangkhut van ah laamto a, Topa in vantosak, ngial kiasakin khualengsak hi. Topa in" 
Exodus9:24 a tee vazal kawkoai khualeng taw a kithua vuipi le ngial kithua nasia mama khat piangsak hi. Tua in Egypt te taanghthu sungah a heak ngei sung pan a nasiabel vuipi suangval ahi hi. 
Exodus9:25 Egypt ngamsung theampo doipua sangah a om mihingte theampo le nganhingte theampo ngial in deangcip hi. Lo sung ankung theampo puksakin, thingkung theampo talsak siat hi." 
Exodus9:26 Israel te teenna Goshen ngam bekma ngial kia ngawl hi. 
Exodus9:27 Kumpipa in Moses le Aaron samin, “Tutungin keima maw khi hi; Topa maan a, ka mite le keima khial khu hi." 
Exodus9:28 Topa tungah thungen vun! Hi vanto le ngialkiate kicing zo hi. Note paisak tu in kamciam kong pia a; hi lai ah no om tu kul nawn ngawl hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus9:29 Moses in ama tungah, “Khuapi pan ka pusua po ciang ka khutte laamin Topa tungah thu ka ngen tu hi. Vanto nawn ngawl tu a, ngialkia nawn ngawl tu hi. Tuasia ciang hi leitung sia Topa aa hi ci in na he tu uh hi." 
Exodus9:30 Ahizong nangma le na uliante in Topa Pathian na kiitak ngawl lai uh sia ka he hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus9:31 Ngial in anthul le mangtaangte lalsak siat hi, banghang ziam cile mangtaang a min laitak hi in, anthul sia a mom laitak ahi hi." 
Exodus9:32 Ahizong zungtaang a lal om ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile tuate min ngawl lai hi." 
Exodus9:33 Kumpipa kung pan Moses khuapi pua sangah pai in a khutte laamin Topa tungah thungen hi. Vanto le ngialkia tawlnga in nguazu nawn ngawl hi. 
Exodus9:34 Kumpipa sia thupiang teng a mu ciang khial kik leleau hi. Ama le a uliante thin a sak ngei in sak a," 
Exodus9:35 Topa in Moses tungtawnin a sonkhol bangma in kumpipa in Israel te paisak ngawl hi. 
Exodus10:1 Tuaciang Topa in Moses tungah, “Kumpipa kungah pai in a, va kimu ta'n. Hi bangin amate sungah nalamdang laknate ka vawt thei natu in ahizong" 
Exodus10:2 nalamdang ka lak ciang, Egypt te a mawmaw bang ka sua sakna thute, na tu na tate tungah na son thei natu ahizong ama le a uliante thin ka sahsak hi. Note theampo in Topa ka hina nong he tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus10:3 “Tua ahiciang kumpipa kungah Moses le Aaron pai in, “ Topa, Hebrew te ii Pathian in, ‘Kei tungah nong kiniamkhiak tu, bang tanvei hong nial lai tu ni ziam? Kei hong biak thei natu in, ka mite paisak in." 
Exodus10:4 Nong nial lai le, zing ciangin na ngam sungah khaumaw kong puak tu hi." 
Exodus10:5 Khaumawte tam mama tu a, lei maitang teng siincip tu hi. Ngial ii a lalsak ngawl, thingkung a taanglaite ngawngawn tuate in netum siat tu hi." 
Exodus10:6 Tuate sia na kumpi innte, na uliante le na mihingte inn teng theampo dim tu hi. Tuate sia na taanghpupite mu ngeite sangin sia zaw tu hi,’ hong ci hi” ci uh hi. Tua zawkciang Moses kiheak in paisan hi." 
Exodus10:7 Kumpipa uliante in kumpipa tungah, “Bang tanvei hisia pa in eite ngimna hong pia tu ziam? Topa a Pathian a biak thei natu in, Israel mite paisak in. Egypt ngam lal zo ci sia tel ngawl ni ziam?” ci uh hi." 
Exodus10:8 Tua ahiciang Moses le Aaron kumpipa kungah kipaipui kikin kumpipa in amate tungah, “Note pai in, na Topa Pathian uh bia thei tu nu hi. Ahizong akua teng tatak pai tu nu ziam?” ci hi." 
Exodus10:9 Moses in, “Koma patangte le khanghaamte zongh pai siat tu khu hi. Kote in ka tapate le tanute, ka tuute le kealte, le ka khuite keng tu khu hi, banghang ziam cile Topa zatak piakna in poai khat vawt tu kul hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Exodus10:10 Kumpipa in, “Na numeite le patangte kong paisak ngeingawl tu sia Topa min taw ka kiciam hi! Note in kei leedo nong sawm uh hunlam kician hi." 
Exodus10:11 Suak thei ngawl hi! Na deina uh tuabang ahile pasal teng bek pai in Topa bia thei nu hi,” ci hi. Tua teng taw Moses le Aaron, kumpipa kung pan kihawlkeak hi." 
Exodus10:12 Tuaciang Topa in Moses tungah, “Khaumawte hong kipuak natu in, Egypt ngam le lei tungah na khut laamto in. Tuate hong pai tu a, thingkung po theampo le ngial ii lalsak mong theampo netum tu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus10:13 Tua ahiciang Moses in a ciangkhut laamto a, Topa in nisuana sang pan sun le zan tawntung ngamsung vui vasak hi. Tuasia in a zingsang ciang khaumawte hong puak hi." 
Exodus10:14 Khaumawte a hon a hon in hong theng a, Egypt ngamsung bup ah teang hi. Tua in a kimu ngeingawl le a kimu kik ngeingawl tu khaumaw hon tambel ahi hi." 
Exodus10:15 Tuate in lei maitang vom mitmet in siin siat hi; ngial ii den mong theampo le thingkung tung thingnga theampo ne siat hi. Egypt ngamsung theampo ah thingkung le ankung tungah a hing khat zongh taang ngawl hi. 
Exodus10:16 Tuasia ciang kumpipa in manlang takin Moses le Aaron samin, “ Topa na Pathian le note tungah ka maw zo hi." 
Exodus10:17 Tu in, khatvei ka mawna hong maisak tavun a, hi a nasia daan piakna kei tung pan a laak keak natu in, Topa na Pathian tungah thu hong ngetsak tavun,” ci hi." 
Exodus10:18 Moses in kumpipa nusia in Topa tungah thungen hi. 
Exodus10:19 Tuaciang Topa in nisuana sang vui sia, a hat mama nitumna sang hui suaksak a, tua vui in khaumawte lento in Suez Tuidok sungah muutkeak hi. Egypt ngamsung theampo ah khaumaw khat zongh om nawn ngawl hi." 
Exodus10:20 Ahizong Topa in kumpipa thin sahsakin ama in Israel te paisak ngawl hi. 
Exodus10:21 Tuasia ciang Topa in Moses tungah, “Van ah na khut laamto in, tuaciang a saa mama hunlam a kiphawk tham liang khuazing taw Egypt ngam hong kituam siat tu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus10:22 Moses in a khut van ah laamto in, Egypt ngamsung theampo ni thum sung khuazing bikbek hi." 
Exodus10:23 Egypt te khat le khat kimu thei ngawl a, tua hun sung kuama pusuak ngawl hi. Ahizong Israel te teenna munah khuavak nga hi." 
Exodus10:24 Kumpipa in Moses samin, “Note pai in, Topa bia thei nu hi; numeite le patangte zongh keng tavun. Ahizong na tuu na keal le na khuite hi lai ah nusia tu nu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus10:25 Moses in, “Tuabang ahile Topa ka Pathian tungah meihal biakpiak natu le sangaw biakpiak natu ngannote nong sik kul tu hi." 
Exodus10:26 Hi ngawl hi, ka ngannote paipui tu khu hi; khat zongh kinusia ngawl tu hi. Topa ka Pathian sangaw biakpiak natu in ngannote koma ii teal kul hi. A mun ka thet mateng, a bang nganno taw ama bia tu cisia ka he buatu uh hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Exodus10:27 Topa in kumpipa thin sahsak a, amate paisak nuam ngawl hi." 
Exodus10:28 Kumpipa in Moses tungah, “Ka muna ah om heak in! Nang hong musak kik nawn heak in! Kong mu kik ni in thi tu ni hi!” ci hi." 
Exodus10:29 Moses in, “Nangma maan ni hi. Kei nong mu kik ngei nawn buatu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Exodus11:1 Tuaciang Topa in Moses tungah, “Egypt kumpipa le a mihingte tungah khatvei bek daan ka pia lai tu hi. Tua zawkciang note hong paisak tu hi. A tatakin ci leang ama in, hi lai pan note theampo hong hawlkeak tu hi." 
Exodus11:2 Tu in Israel mite theampo in a innpaamte tungah khamh le ngunn suangmanphate a nget natu in son ta'n,” ci hi." 
Exodus11:3 Topa in Israel te sia Egypt te in zaktasak hi. Uliante le mihingte theampo in Moses sia mi thupi mama khatin ngaisun takpi uh hi. 
Exodus11:4 Tuaciang Moses in kumpipa tungah, “ Topa in, ‘Zankim hun khawngin Egypt ngamsung teng ah ka pai tu a," 
Exodus11:5 Egypt te tapaciil theampo, kumpi tokhum a lua tu, kumpipa tapa a kipan an ngoaina ah naseam sila numei ii tapa dongin thi tu hi. Nganhing a no suakciil theampo zongh thi tu hi." 
Exodus11:6 Nidangin a om ngeingawl le mai sangah a om kik ngei nawn ngawl tu kaana awnging Egypt ngamsung theampo ah om tu hi. 
Exodus11:7 Ahizong Israel te ahibuale, a ngannote ahile ui ngawngawn in nak ngawl tu hi. Tuasia ciang Keima Topa ii Egypt te le Israel te kilaklaw ah kilamdanna khat ka vawt na he tu uh hi, hong ci hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus11:8 Moses ii a thukhupna panin, “Na ulian theampo hong pai tu a, ka mai ah kunin ka mite theampo ka paipui natu in hong thuum tu hi. Tua zawkciang ka pai tu hi,” ci hi. Tuaciang Moses thin uuk mama in kumpipa nusia hi." 
Exodus11:9 Topa in Moses tungah, “Egypt ngam sungah nalamdang lakna tamzaw ka vawt thei lai natu in kumpipa in na thu hong ngai ngawl veve tu hi,” a ci sa hi." 
Exodus11:10 Moses le Aaron in kumpipa mai ah nalamdang hi zata lak zo hikale, Topa in a thin sahsak ahikom, a ngam sia Israel te in nusiasak nuam ngawl hi." 
Exodus12:1 Egypt ngam sungah Topa in Moses le Aaron tung a cina ah: 
Exodus12:2 “Tu tha sia note atu in kum kipat tha hi tu hi. 
Exodus12:3 Israel mi bup tungah hi bang kihilna te son tu ni hi: Tu tha ni sawm ni in pasal sim in tuuno khat ahibuale kealno khat a innkuan atu in teal nanak tu hi. 
Exodus12:4 Nganno pum bup khat a ne tu in a innkuan a tawm leih le, mihing khat ii neak zawkza taw kizui in mihing phaza en in a innpaamte hawm thei tu hi." 
Exodus12:5 Nganno sia kum khat a pha, a talno na teal thei tu a, ahihang a mealhem ngawl tuu ahibuale keal hi tu hi." 
Exodus12:6 Tuaciang tua tha ni sawm le ni li nitak ciang Israel mi bup in tua ngante ngo tu uh hi. 
Exodus12:7 Mipite in a chisan pawlkhat la in, tua sa a kineak natu inn kongkha khuamte nii le a vathaang tungah noai tu nu hi." 
Exodus12:8 Tua zanin a sa na em tu uh a, tol saw ngawl anluum le a kha meeteete taw na ne tu uh hi." 
Exodus12:9 A sate a sial ahizong tuihuan ahizong na ne buatu uh a, a lu, a peangte le a sungkua dong takin a vekpi em in ne tu nu hi." 
Exodus12:10 Zingsang dongin neakmong peuma na omsak buatu uh hi; neakmong a om le na hal kul tu hi. 
Exodus12:11 Hi ante manlang takin na ne tu uh hi, banghang ziam cile khualhaw tu in peangdapte thua in, na khut sungah ciangkhut toai a, na kithoai uh kul tu hi. Tua in keima Topa tungah zatak piakna Paisan Poai ahi hi." 
Exodus12:12 “Tua zanin Egypt ngamsung tengah ka pai tu a, mihing le nganhing te ii tapaciil teng thatin, Egypt pathian theampo daan ka pia tu hi. Keima in Topa ka hi hi." 
Exodus12:13 Kongkha khuamte tungah chisan a kinoai teng noma teenna inn teptee natu lim ahi hi. Chisan ka mu ciang note kong kaantan tu a, Egypt te daan ka piak ciang note bangma kong law buatu hi." 
Exodus12:14 Keima Topa in bang vawt khi ziam ci na phaw natu in hi ni sia biaknapoai khatin vawt tu nu hi. Mailam hun theampo ah tua poai vawt suak tavun,” ci hi." 
Exodus12:15 Topa in, “Ni sali sung tol kisaw anluum peuma na ne buatu uh hi — tol kisaw ngawl anluum bekma na ne tu uh hi. Ni masa ni in na inn uh pan tol theampo heam tu nu hi, banghang ziam cile tua ni sali hunsung khat po in tol kisaw anluum a ne le, ama keima mi in a kisim nawn buatu hi." 
Exodus12:16 Ni masa ni le ni sali ni in biak kikhopna nei tu nu hi. Tua ni nii sung, na na seam buatu uh a, ahizong an neak tu vawt thei nu hi." 
Exodus12:17 Hi poai bosak ngawl tu nu hi, banghang ziam cile tua ni in na minamte Egypt pan kong pusuapui hi. Mailam hun ah zongh tua ni in poai vawt nanak tu nu hi." 
Exodus12:18 Tha masabel ni sawm le ni li nitak pan ni kul le ni khat nitak sang dong tol kisaw anluum ne ngawl tu nu hi. 
Exodus12:19 Ni sali sung tol peuma na inn sungah koi ngawl tu nu hi, banghang ziam cile tualmi ahizong, ngamdangmi khat pawpo in tol kisaw anluum a ne le keima mi khat in kingaisun nawn ngawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus12:20  
Exodus12:21 Moses in Israel lampui teng samin amate tungah, “Na innkuan tek in Paisan Poai na vawt thei natu in, tuuno khat ahibuale kealno khat tealin ngo vun." 
Exodus12:22 Hyssop sip khat la vun a, kuang sungah a om nganhing chisan sungah papin, na inn kongkha khuamte nii le a vathaang tungah noai vun. Zingsang khuavak mateng inn pan khat zongh pusuak ngawl tu nu hi." 
Exodus12:23 Egypt te a that tu in Egypt ngamsung teng ah Topa a pai ciang, kongkha khuamte le a vathaangte tungah a kinoai chisan mu tu a, Thina ii Vantunglalang sia na inn te sungah hong that tu in tumsak ngawl tu hi." 
Exodus12:24 Hi zui tu ngeinate nangma le na tate in a tawntung zui tu nu hi. 
Exodus12:25 Topa ii kamciam hong piakna ngam ah na tum uh ciang hi a zeksa ngeina sia seam hamtang tu nu hi. 
Exodus12:26 Na tate in, ‘Hi, a zeksa ngeina sia, bang a khiakna ziam’ ci in hong dok ciang," 
Exodus12:27 ‘ Topa tungah zatakna in ih piak Paisan Poai sangaw biakpiakna hi, Egypt ah Israel te ii innte hong paisatna hang ahi hi. Ama in Egypt te that a, ahizong eite hong khoaikhe hi,’ na ci tu uh hi,” ci hi. Israel mite in khupdin in bia uh hi." 
Exodus12:28 Tua zawkciang Topa ii Moses le Aaron tungah a thupiak bangin amate pai in seam uh hi. 
Exodus12:29 Zankim laitak Topa in Egypt ngamsung tapaciil theampo, kumpi tokhum a lua tu kumpipa tapa pan kipan leinuai khuazing sung thongtaakte ii tapate dongin that siat a; nganno suakciil theampo zongh that hi." 
Exodus12:30 Tua zanin kumpipa, a uliante le a dang Egypt mite theampo khanglo siat hi. Tapa thi ngawl inn khat beak om ngawl ahikom Egypt ngamsung teng ah kaana awnging nasia mama hi." 
Exodus12:31 Tua zan ma in kumpipa in Moses le Aaron samsak in, “Nangma le na Israel mite pusuak tavun! Ka ngam nusia tavun a; nong nget bangin pai in, Topa bia tavun." 
Exodus12:32 Na tuu, na keal le na khuite la in pai tavun. Kei atu zongh thupha hong ngetsak tavun,” ci hi." 
Exodus12:33 Egypt te in a ngam manlang tak a nusiat natu in tua mite sawl a; “Na pai bua uh ahile ka thi siat tu uh hi,” ci uh hi." 
Exodus12:34 Tua ahiciang Israel te in tol saw ngawl anvuite anluum emna bealpeute sungah heangin, puan taw tunin a liangko ah pua uh hi." 
Exodus12:35 Moses ii a ci bangin Israel te in Egypt te tungah khamh le ngunn kizepna, le puansilhte ngen uh hi." 
Exodus12:36 Topa in Israel te sia Egypt te in zaktasak ahikom Israel te nget bangin pia uh hi. Tuabangin Egypt te hauna teng Israel te in paipui uh hi. 
Exodus12:37 Israel te a peangin pai a, Rameses pan Sukkoth zuan uh hi. Amate numei le patang kihel ngawl pasal tulzaluk bang pha hi." 
Exodus12:38 Midang tam mama le tuu, keal le khui tam mama te zongh amate taw paikhawm uh hi." 
Exodus12:39 Amate in Egypt pan a ken tol saw ngawl anluum em uh hi, banghang ziam cile thakhat thu in amate Egypt pan kihawlkeak ahikom a an neak tu ahizong tol saw anluum ahizong kinging man ngawl uh hi." 
Exodus12:40 Israel te Egypt ah kum 430 sung teang hi. 
Exodus12:41 Kum 430 a bo ni in Topa mite ii minam theampo in Egypt nusia uh hi. 
Exodus12:42 Tua zan sia amate Egypt pan pusua pui tu in Topa ii kep ni zan hi a; tua zan sia ma Israel te ii mailam hun theampo ah a kepcing nanak tu zan khat in Topa tungah aap uh hi. 
Exodus12:43 Topa in Moses le Aaron tungah, “Hite Paisan Poai ah zui tu ngeinate ahi hi: Ngamdangmite kuama in Paisan Poai an ne thei ngawl tu hi," 
Exodus12:44 ahizong na leisa sila pawpo a vunteap atsak masa po le uhte ne thei tu hi. 
Exodus12:45 A peam pak khat, a kicial naseam khat in ne thei ngawl tu uh hi." 
Exodus12:46 An theampo a kihuanna inn sung bek ah kine tu a; a pua ah kipusua pui ngawl het tu hi. Tuaciang tua nganno ii ngute khat zongh thiaktan heak vun. 
Exodus12:47 Israel mi bup in hi poai vawt tu a," 
Exodus12:48 ahizong vunteap at ngawl sia in ne thei ngawl tu hi. Note sungah hong teang ngamdangmi khat in Topa zatakna Paisan Poai a vawt nuam le amate innkuan sung pan pa peuma vunteap atsak masa tu nu hi. Tuasia ciang Israel mi tualsuak khat taw a kibangin poai sungah kihel thei tu hi. 
Exodus12:49 Hi zui tu ngeinate sia ma, Israel mi tualsuakte le note sungah hong teang ngamdangmite a kibangin na zui tu uh ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus12:50 Topa ii Moses le Aaron tungah a thupiak bangin Israel te theampo in thu ni in, seam uh hi." 
Exodus12:51 Tua ni in, Topa in Israel minamte Egypt pan pusuapui hi." 
Exodus13:1 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Exodus13:2 “Tapaciil theampo kei tungah aapna hong nei tavun, banghang ziam cile Israel tapaciil theampo le nganno suakciil apa theampo keima aa ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus13:3 Moses in a mihingte tungah, “Egypt ngam sal na tanna mun na nusiat ni — tuni phawk tavun. Tu ni sia Topa in ama ii vaangletna taw hong pusua pui ni ahi hi. Tol saw ngawl anluum ne tu nu hi." 
Exodus13:4 Tha masabel Abib tha, tu ni in note Egypt nusia nu hi." 
Exodus13:5 Topa in na taanghpupite tungah Canaan mite, Hit mite, Amor mite, Hiv mite, le Jebus mite teenna ngam piak tu in ciliap huai takin hong kamciam hi. Tua ngam leihoi leiphana ngam ah hong paipui ciang kum sim tha masabel sungin hi poai vawt nanak tu nu hi." 
Exodus13:6 Ni sali sung tol saw ngawl anluum na ne tu uh a, ni sali ni in Topa tungah upatna poai na vawt tu uh hi." 
Exodus13:7 Ni sali sung tol kisaw anluum peuma na ne buatu uh a, tol ahizong tol kisaw anluum peuma na ngam sungah a om buatu hi." 
Exodus13:8 Tua poai na vawt uh ciang na tapate tungah Topa in Egypt pan note hong paipui ahi hu in hi bangin poai kivawt hi, ci in son tu nu hi." 
Exodus13:9 Hi ngeina poai vawtna in na khut ah ahibuale na tal tungah na khat a kikhit bangin, tua in Topa thukham hong phawksak tawntung tu hi. Tua in Topa thukham na sin tu le na sim tawntung natu in hong phawksak tu hi. Banghang ziam cile Topa in a vaangletna taw Egypt pan note hong pusuapui hi." 
Exodus13:10 Kum sim a ciangtan hun a tun simin poai vawt tu nu hi. 
Exodus13:11 “ Topa in na taanghpupite tungah a kamciamsa Canaan ngam ah note hong paipui tu hi. Tua ngam note tungah hong piak ciang," 
Exodus13:12 tapaciil theampo Topa tungah pia nanak tu nu hi. Na ngannote a pa suakciil theampo Topa neisa hi a," 
Exodus13:13 ahizong ama tung pan laa pa a suakciil theampo sia tua taang in tuuno khat piakna taw tan kik tu nu hi. Tua laa na tan kik nuam bua ahile a ngawng thiaktan in. Na tapaciil peuma tan kik tu nu hi. 
Exodus13:14 Mailam sangah na tapa in hi bang a ih sepnate bang a khiakna ziam ci in hong dongh le, ‘ Topa in a vaangletna zanghin ih saltanna Egypt pan eite hong paipui hang ahi hi." 
Exodus13:15 Egypt kumpipa a thinsakin eite hong paisak nop ngawl ciang Topa in Egypt ngamsung tapaciil theampo le nganhing suakciil a pa theampo thatlum siat hi. Tua ahi hu in tapaciil le nganhing suakciil a pa theampo Topa tungah sangaw biakna in kipia a, ahizong ih tapaciilte sia kitan kik hi." 
Exodus13:16 Hi bang ngeina poai vawtna sia nung thu hong phawksak kik tu in ih khut tungah ahibuale ih tal tungah tepteena a kikhit bang hi tu hi; tua in Egypt pan Topa in a vaangletna taw hong pusuapuina thu hong phawksak tu hi,’ ci in son tu nu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus13:17 Egypt kumpipa in Israel te a paisak lai in, Philistia tuipi hui ah a paito lampi sia lam banbel hikale, Pathian in totpui ngawl hi. Pathian in, “Amate ngal a sim kul tu ci in a mu ciang a thin kikheal a, Egypt ah a heak kik tu ka oai bua hi,” ci in ngaisun hi." 
Exodus13:18 Tua lampi taangin ama in sennealngam kiimkot a, San Tuipi sangah masuan hi. Israel te in ngalsim natu ngalhiamte pua uh hi." 
Exodus13:19 Joseph in Israel te tungah a sep tu in ciliap huai kamciam a vawtsak bangin, Moses in Joseph ii luang tonpui hi. Joseph in, “Pathian in note hong suatak ciang, hi mun pan ka luang nong pua hamtang tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus13:20 Sukkoth nusia in Israel te dingin, sennealngam mong Etham ah ngiaphual saat uh hi." 
Exodus13:21 Amate sun ahizong, zan ahizong a khualhaw thei natu in sun hunin lam a lak tu meeikaai khuam khat taw, zan hunin khuavak a pia tu in meitaang khuam khat taw amate mai ah Topa pai hi." 
Exodus13:22 Israel te mai ah sun hunin meeikaai khuam le zan hunin meitaang khuam om tawntung hi. 
Exodus14:1 Tuaciang Topa in Moses tungah," 
Exodus14:2 “Israel te heak kikin Baal Zephon nai, Migdol le San Tuipi kilaklaw Pi Hahiroth ii mai ah ngiaphual a saatna tu in son in." 
Exodus14:3 Kumpipa in Israel te ngam sungah vak kawkoai a, senneal in khakcip in ngaisun tu hi." 
Exodus14:4 Ama thin ka sahsak tu a, nang hong del tu hi. Kumpipa le a ngalkaphonpi ka zawna pan pataakna ka nga tu hi. Tuasia ciang Egypt te in Topa ka hina hong he tu uh hi,” ci hi. Israel te a kisawl bangin ngamta uh hi." 
Exodus14:5 Israel te a suatakna thu Egypt kumpipa tungah a kison ciang ama le a uliante a thin khealin, “A bang teng seam thong hi ziam? Israel te ih suaktasak zo a, ih sila te ih bosua zo hi!” ci uh hi." 
Exodus14:6 Kumpipa in siphu ngalleang le a ngalkaphonpi kithoaisak hi. 
Exodus14:7 Ama in a siphu ngalleang phabel 600 kihel in a leang theampo taw a ngalkapmangte in uksakin kuan uh hi. 
Exodus14:8 Topa ii a thin a sahsak kumpipa in zawna taw in a pusuak Israel te del hi. 
Exodus14:9 Egypt ngalkaphonpi in a siphu theampo taw, siphu ngalleangte le a hawlte in Israel te del a, Pi Hahiroth le Baal Zephon nai San Tuipi hui a ngiaphual saatna ah pha uh hi." 
Exodus14:10 Israel te in kumpipa le a ngalkaphonpi in a del a mu ciang lau mama a, Topa tungah huna ngen in au uh hi." 
Exodus14:11 Amate in Moses tungah, “Egypt ah thaan om ngawl ziam? Hi lai sennealngam ah a thi tu in nang hong paipui kul ziam? Egypt pan nong pusuapuina, na nasepna sa teng en in!" 
Exodus14:12 Ih pusua ma in, hi bang teng piang tu ci hong son zo hi ngawl khu ziam? Egypt te sal ahi tan tu in ko nguak hong nusia lel ta'n kong ci uh hi. Hi lai sennealngam ah thi sangin tua munah sila hi tu phazaw lai hi,” ci uh hi." 
Exodus14:13 Moses in, “Lau heak vun! Kip takin ding vun a, tu ni in Topa hong hutna mu tu nu hi; hi Egypt te mu kik ngeingawl tu nu hi." 
Exodus14:14 Topa in no atu ngal hong simsak tu a, note sep tu bangma kisam ngawl hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Exodus14:15 Topa in Moses tungah, “Banghangin huna dei in au nu ziam? Israel te maisang a pai natu in sawl in." 
Exodus14:16 Na ciangkhut laamin, tuipi tungah vaan in. Tui hong kikhen tu a, Israel te leiko tung tawnin paisuak thei tu uh hi." 
Exodus14:17 Egypt te thin ka sahsak mama tu a, Israel te del veve tu uh hi, tuaciang kumpipa, a ngalkaphonpi, a siphu ngalleangte le a hawlte ka zawna taw patoaina ka nga tu hi." 
Exodus14:18 Amate ka zaw ciang Egypt te in keima Topa ka hina hong he tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus14:19 Israel ngalkaphonpi mai ah a om Pathian vantunglalang sia kikhiin in nungsangah pai hi. Meeikaai khuam zongh 
Exodus14:20 Egypt te le Israel te kilaklaw dong hong kikhiin hi. Meei in Egypt te atu in khuazingsak a, Israel mite atu in khuavaksak ahikom zankhuateakin ngalkaphonpite khat le khat kineak thei ngawl uh hi." 
Exodus14:21 Moses in tuipi tungah a khut a vaan ciang, Topa in nisuana sang pan vui thahat khat taw tuipi kinilsak hi. Tua vui sia zankhuateak va in, tuipi leiko suaksak hi. Tui kikhen a," 
Exodus14:22 Israel te in leiko tung tawnin tuipi kaantan a, a lang le a lang ah tui pangte hong om hi." 
Exodus14:23 Egypt te in a siphu theampo, a siphu ngalleangte le a hawlte taw tuipi sung dongin del uh hi." 
Exodus14:24 Topa in khuavak mahiat in meitaang le meeikaai khuam tung pan Egypt te ensuk in, patausak ek hi." 
Exodus14:25 Topa in a ngalleang muite awksak ahikom haksa takin kikhiin hi. Egypt te in, “ Topa in Israel te sang pangin eite hong do hi. Hi lai pan tai tawng,” ci uh hi." 
Exodus14:26 Topa in Moses tungah, “Tuipi tungah na khut vaan in, tua hile Egypt te le a siphu ngalleangte le a hawlte tungah tui hong kinil kik tu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus14:27 Tua ahiciang Moses in tuipi tungah a khut vaan a, khuavak ciang tui hong heak kikin a ngeina bangin om hi. Egypt te in a suatak natu hanciam a, ahizong Topa in tuipi sungah amate lawn hi." 
Exodus14:28 Tui heak kikin tuipi sung dongah Israel te a del Egypt ngalkap theampo, a siphu ngalleangte le a hawlte khuum hi; khat zongh kikhe ngawlin khuum siat hi." 
Exodus14:29 Ahizong tuipi kaantan in leiko tungah Israel te pai uh a, a lang le a lang ah tuipangte om hi." 
Exodus14:30 Tua ni in Topa in Egypt te khut sung pan Israel mite hun a, tuipivaal ah a thite Israel te in mu uh hi." 
Exodus14:31 Vaangletna lianpi taw Topa in Egypt te a zawna thu Israel te in a mu uh ciang amate in Topa lamdang sa a; Topa le a naseampa Moses muanna nei uh hi. 
Exodus15:1 Tuaciang Moses le Israel te in hi la Topa tungah sak uh hi: “Ama in a minthang ngalzawna khat nga ahikom, Topa tungah la ka sa tu hi; ama in siphute le a tung tote tuipi sungah lawn hi." 
Exodus15:2 Topa sia a thahat hong dalpa hi a; Ama in kei hong hunpa hi. Ama in ka Pathian hi a, ka pok tu hi, ka pa ii Pathian hi a, ama ii letna thu la in ka sa tu hi." 
Exodus15:3 Topa sia ngalhangpa hi a; ama min Topa ahi hi. 
Exodus15:4 “Ama in Egypt ngalkaphonpi le a siphu ngalleangte tuipi sungah lawn hi; a phabel a ulian teng San Tuipi sung tuitaasak hi. 
Exodus15:5 Tuipi thuk in amate khuum hi; tuipi taw ah suangtum bangin tumsuk uh hi. 
Exodus15:6 “ Topa awng na khut ziatsang, thahat in lamdang a; tua khut in ngalte semtham hi." 
Exodus15:7 A tuanngen na ngualzawna taw na ngalte na lawn thal hi; na thin uukna a kuan ciang taangphaw bangin amate kaanghtum hi. 
Exodus15:8 Tuipi tungah na hu na muut ciang, a sang in tui kiciangto hi; tuasia pang khat bangin dingtang hi; tuipi a thukbelna mun sia leitang ko suak hi." 
Exodus15:9 A ngalpa in, “Amate ka del tu a, ka pha tu hi; a hauna teng ka hawm tu a, ka dei theampo ka la tu hi; Ka namsau ka dok tu a, a nei theampo ka la tu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus15:10 Ahizong khatvei na husan taw Topa awng, Egypt te tuita siat hi; A kiitakhuai tui sungah haak khiak bangin amate tumsuk uh hi." 
Exodus15:11 “ Topa awng, pathiante sung pan akua in nang taw kibang ziam? Nang taw a kibang, a thiangtho, a lamdang akua om ziam? Akua in nangma aa bangin nalamdang laknate le a nasia sepnate seam thei ziam?" 
Exodus15:12 Na ziatsang khut na vaan a, leitang in ih ngalte valhlum hi." 
Exodus15:13 Na kamciam bangin na thumaan a, na suatak sa mite lam na pui hi; na thahatna taw na ngam thiangtho ah amate lam na pui hi." 
Exodus15:14 Minamte in za zo a, amate lau in liing uh hi; Philistia mite lau in patau mama uh hi." 
Exodus15:15 Edom lampuite lau mama uh a; Moab mi thahat te liing uh hi; Canaan mite in a thinhanna teng bosua hi. 
Exodus15:16 Launa le patauna amate tungah theng hi; Topa awng, amate in na thahatna mu uh hi, saltanna pan na suatak na mite ii a kaantan zawk mateng amate launa taw cimaw in ding uh hi." 
Exodus15:17 Nangma in amate paipui in na mual tungah na omsak hi, Topa awng, tua mun sia nangma tatak ii na saksa Biakinnpi, na inn atu in na tealna mun ahi hi." 
Exodus15:18 Topa awng, nangma sia a tawntung le a tawntungin kumpi na hi tu hi.”" 
Exodus15:19 Israel te leiko tawn in tuipi kaantan hi. Ahizong Egypt siphu ngalleangte, siphute le a hawlte taw tuipi sungah a pai ciang, Topa in tui kingawm kiksak in, amate khuumcip hi." 
Exodus15:20 Aaron suapuinu, kamsaang Miriam in a daalkual khuangno la in, numei theampo in a nung zui uh a, daalkual khuangnote tumin laam uh hi." 
Exodus15:21 Miriam in amate lasak hi: “ Topa tungah lasa vun banghang ziam cile, Ama in a minthang zawna khat zo zo hi; Ama in siphute le a tung tote tuipi sungah lawn zo hi.”" 
Exodus15:22 Tuaciang Moses in Israel mite San Tuipi pan Shur sennealngam ah paipui hi. Ni thum sung sennealngam sungah pai a, ahizong tui mu ngawl uh hi." 
Exodus15:23 Tuaciang amate Marah kicina munah pai a, ahizong tua munah tui khaa mama ahikom tui ne thei ngawl uh hi. Tua ahikom tua mun sia Marah kici hi." 
Exodus15:24 Mipite in Moses phunsan in, “Bang tui ne tu khu ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi." 
Exodus15:25 Moses in thinsung tak taw, Topa tungah thungen hi, Topa in thingbek khat lak a, tua thingbek tui sungah a lot ciang tua tui neakthei suak hi. Topa in tua munah a nuntakpui tu thukhamte pia in, amate ze et si hi." 
Exodus15:26 Ama in, “Keima ii maan ka sak sia na vawtna uh taw ka thu nong ni siat uh a, ka thupiakte na zui uh le Egypt te tungah ka tunsak natnate khat zongh kong tungsak buatu hi. Keima in Topa note hong damsakpa “Jehovah Rapha” ka hi hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus15:27 Tua zawkciangin amate sia ciktui sawm le nii le palm kung sawmsali a omna mun Elim theng a; tua mun tui hui ah ngiaphual saat uh hi. 
Exodus16:1 Israel mi buppi Elim pan ding kik a, Egypt pan a pusua zawk a tha niina, ni sawm le ni nga ni in Elim le Sinai kilaklaw Sin sennealngam theng uh hi." 
Exodus16:2 Tua sennealngam ah amate theampo in Moses le Aaron phunsan a," 
Exodus16:3 amate tungah, “ Topa in Egypt ah hong that le uuk zaw ung. Tualai ah thildang a vaal lai, to in sa le an ka du za ka ne thei tu uh hi. Ahizong noma in hi lai sennealngam ah a pukthi tu in hong paipui nu hi,” ci uh hi." 
Exodus16:4 Topa in Moses tungah, “Tu in note theampo atu van pan an, ngua bangin kong zusak tu hi. Mihingte ni sim pusuak nanak in tua ni a khamkhop tu tawm tu hi. Tuabangin, kong sonnate a zui ziam, ka sit thei tu hi." 
Exodus16:5 Ni luk ni in, na top ngeiza ii a zaa nii kaikhawm tu in kinging vun,” ci hi." 
Exodus16:6 Tua ahiciang Moses le Aaron in Israel te theampo tungah, “Egypt pan hong pusuapuipa sia Topa a hina, tu nitakin he tu nu hi." 
Exodus16:7 Zingsang ciangin Topa ii ompuina khuavak taang velvol mu tu nu hi. Ama langpanin noma phutsatna thu hong za zo hi — hi hi, ama langpan nu hi, banghang ziam cile kote in ama hong sawlna teng a seam suak ka hi bek uh hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus16:8 Tua zawkciang Moses in, “Noma phutsatna teng ama in hong za zo ahikom, nitakin na neak tu uh sa le zingsangin anluum na deiza po hong pia tu sia Topa ahi hi. Ko nong phutsat uh ciang Topa a phunsan hi nginge nu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus16:9 Moses in Aaron tungah, “ Topa in amate phutsatna za zo ahikom taangpi bup hong pai in Topa mai ah a din natu in son ta'n,” ci hi." 
Exodus16:10 Aaron in taangpi bup tungah thu a son ciang amate sennealngam sang nga in, thakhat thu in meei sung pan Topa ii khuavak taang velvol hong taang hi." 
Exodus16:11 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Exodus16:12 “Israel te hong phutsatna ka za zo hi. Khuangial ciang a neak tu sa a nga natu, zingsang ciang anluum a deiza a nga natu son in. Tuasia ciang Keima sia Topa, amate ii Pathian ka hina thu he tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus16:13 Nitak ciangin ngiaphual a dim tu vamim honpui khat hong leangin, zingsang in ngiaphual kiimkot ah daaitui kia hi." 
Exodus16:14 Daaitui a ko ciang senneal tungah a khalno bang veu om hi. Tua in nip a, vuuk taw kibang hi." 
Exodus16:15 Israel te in tuasia a mu ciang he ngawl ahikom khat le khat kidongh in “Hisia bangziam?” ci uh hi. Moses in amate tungah, “Hisia in Topa ii note neak tu in hong piak an ahi hi." 
Exodus16:16 Topa in noma kisap za tek, innkuan sungah mihing sim litre 2 tek na top tu in thu hong pia zo hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus16:17 Israel te in tuabang vawt a, pawlkhat in a tamzaw tawmin, pawlkhat in a tawmzaw tawm uh hi." 
Exodus16:18 Amate in a tee uh ciang tam a tawmte tam leih ngawlin, tawm zaw a tawmte tawm leih tuan ngawl hi. Amate ii kisap za lian tek tawm uh hi." 
Exodus16:19 Moses in amate tungah, “Kuama in zing ciang atu bangma koikhol ngawl tu nu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus16:20 Ahizong pawlkhat in Moses thu ngai ngawlin pawlkhat koikhol uh hi. A zing ciang tuasia thanh dimin muat nam a, amate tungah Moses thin uuk hi." 
Exodus16:21 Zing simin a kisap za tek tawm a, ni hong sat ciang lei ah a nusiatte tuitham hi." 
Exodus16:22 Ni luk ni in an a zaa nii in a tamzaw tawmin, mihing khat ciang litre 4 tek tawm uh hi. Taangpi lampuite theampo hong pai in tua thu Moses tungah son uh hi," 
Exodus16:23 Moses in amate tungah, “ Topa in zing ciang sia ama tungah a ki aap tawlngakna ni thiangtho ni khat hi, ci in thu hong pia hi. Tuni in na em nop teng le na huan nop teng em in huan tavun. A taanglai teng peuma zing ciang atu in koituam vun,” ci hi." 
Exodus16:24 Moses ii thupiak bangin a om lai teng zing ciang dongin keam a; lal ngawl, a sungah thanh tu ngawl hi." 
Exodus16:25 Moses in, “Hite tuni in ne vun, banghang ziam cile tuni sia Sabbath hi a, Topa tungah a ki aap tawlngakna ni khat hi in, ngiaphual pua sangah an bangma mu ngawl tu nu hi." 
Exodus16:26 Ni luk sung an na tawm nanak tu uh a, ahizong ni sali ni, tawlngak ni in bangma om ngawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus16:27 Ni sali ni in mihing pawlkhatte in an a tawm tu in pusuak a, ahizong bangma mu ngawl uh hi." 
Exodus16:28 Tuaciang Topa in Moses tungah, “Banghun dong ka thupiakte note in hong nial lai tu nu ziam?" 
Exodus16:29 Tawlngak ni hong pia pa sia keima Topa ka hina phawk tavun a, tua ahi hu in ni nii sung na khom tu uh an, ni luk ni in kong pia tawntung tu hi. Ni sali ni in a kuama po a omna munah om tu a, inn pan pusuak ngawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus16:30 Tua ahiciang mite in ni sali ni in naseam ngawl uh hi. 
Exodus16:31 Israel mite in tua an sia manna ci uh hi. Tua manna sia ancii kaang no khat taw kibangin, khuaitui taw kivawt moh bangin lim hi." 
Exodus16:32 Moses in, “Ama ii Egypt pan eite hong paipui ciangin sennealngam ah eite neak tu hong piak an sia ih suan ih paalte in a mu thei natu in manna pawlkhat amate atu na keam tuam tu uh hi, ci in Topa in thu hong pia hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus16:33 Moses in Aaron tungah, “Beal khat la in, tua ii sungah manna litre 2 dim koi in a, ih suan ih paalte atu in Topa ompuina ah koi ta'n,” ci hi." 
Exodus16:34 Topa in Moses tungah a thupiak bangin tuasia a kikepcing natu in Aaron in Thuciamna Thingkuang mai ah koi hi. 
Exodus16:35 Israel te in a teenna mun Canaan ngam a thet mateng kum sawmli sung manna an ne uh hi. 
Exodus16:36 (Tua hun lai, na ko teena in a zak sia litre 20 taw kikim hi.)" 
Exodus17:1 Israel mi bup in Sin sennealngam nusia in Topa thupiak bangin mun khat pan mun khat ah kikhiin uh hi. Rephidim ah ngiaphual saat a, ahizong tua munah neak tu tui om ngawl hi." 
Exodus17:2 Amate in Moses tungah, “Neak tu tui hong pia ta'n,” ci in phun uh hi. Moses in, “Banghangin hong phunsan nu ziam? Banghangin Topa ze et nu ziam?” ci hi." 
Exodus17:3 Ahizong a mihingte dangko mama ahikom Moses tungah phuul veve uh hi. Amate in, “Banghang Egypt pan hong paipui ni ziam? Kote ka tate le ka ngannote dangko in hong thisak nuam ni ziam?” ci uh hi." 
Exodus17:4 Moses in nasia takin Topa tungah thungen in, “Hi mihingte bang law tu khi ziam? Suang taw hong deang dektak zo uh hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus17:5 Topa in Moses tungah, “Israel lampuite pawlkhat samin a, mipite mai ah paikhol vun. Nile ngun na saatna ciangkhut keng in." 
Exodus17:6 Na mai Sinai Mual suangpi tungah ka ding tu hi. Suangpi saat in, tua hile mihingte neak tu tui hong pusuak tu hi,” ci hi. Israel lampuite mai ah tuabangin Moses in vawt hi." 
Exodus17:7 Tua mun sia Massah le Meribah ci hi, banghang ziam cile Israel te in phun in Topa ze et a, “ Topa eite taw om ziam, hong ompui ngawl ziam?” ci in, a dokna mun ahi hi." 
Exodus17:8 Amalek mite hong pai in Rephidim ah Israel te sim uh hi. 
Exodus17:9 Moses in Joshua tungah, “Zing ciang Amalek mite a do tu in mi pawlkhat teal in. Kei sia mual dawnah ka ding tu a, Pathian ii keng a hong sawl ciangkhut ka toai tu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus17:9 Moses in Joshua tungah, “Zing ciang Amalek mite a do tu in mi pawlkhat teal in. Kei sia mual dawnah ka ding tu a, Pathian ii keng a hong sawl ciangkhut ka toai tu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus17:10 Moses thupiak bangin Joshua in Amalek mite do tu in a kuan hunsung in Moses, Aaron le Hur te mual dawnah kaato uh hi." 
Exodus17:10 Moses thupiak bangin Joshua in Amalek mite do tu in a kuan hunsung in Moses, Aaron le Hur te mual dawnah kaato uh hi." 
Exodus17:11 Moses ii a khut a lap hunsung theampo Israel te in ngalzo a, ahizong a khut a khiaksuk ciang Amalek mite in zo tu in kipan uh hi." 
Exodus17:12 Moses ii khut a toi ciang Aaron le Hur in a to natu in suangtum khat laaksak in amate a lang le a lang ah dingin nitum dong a khutte lapsak uh hi. 
Exodus17:13 Hi bangin Joshua in Amalek mite zo siat hi. 
Exodus17:13 Hi bangin Joshua in Amalek mite zo siat hi. 
Exodus17:14 Tuaciang Topa in Moses tungah, “Hi ngalzawna thu teng a kiphaw natu in tepteena lai at in. Amalek mite ka mot natu thu Joshua tungah son in” ci hi." 
Exodus17:14 Tuaciang Topa in Moses tungah, “Hi ngalzawna thu teng a kiphaw natu in tepteena lai at in. Amalek mite ka mot natu thu Joshua tungah son in” ci hi." 
Exodus17:15 Moses in biaknatau khat sa a, a min phuakin, “ Topa sia ka Zawna Dial hi “Jehovah Nissi” ci hi." 
Exodus17:16 Ama in, “ Topa zawna dial saangkhai vun! Topa in Amalek mite a tawntungin do suak tu hi!” ci hi." 
Exodus18:1 Moses ii sunghpa, Midian thiampi Jethro in Moses ii Israel te Egypt ngam pan a pusuapui lai Pathian ii Moses le Israel mite atu a sepna thu theampo za hi." 
Exodus18:2 Tua ahiciang, Moses kungah ama pai in, nungsangah a kinusia Moses ii zi Zipporah," 
Exodus18:3 le a tapate nii Gershom le Eliezer tonpui hi. (Moses in, “Ngamdang khat ah ngamdangmi khat hi zo khi hi,” ci hi; tua ahiciang a tapa khat ii min Gershom phuak hi." 
Exodus18:4 Ama in, “Egypt kumpipa ii hong thalup natu pan ka pa ii Pathian in hong hu in, hong hun hi,” ci si hi; tua ahikom a tapa khat sia ii min, Eliezer phuak hi.)" 
Exodus18:5 Moses ii ngiaphual saatna mual thiangtho, sennealngam ah Jethro sia Moses ii zi le a tapate nii taw hong pai uh hi." 
Exodus18:6 Ama in amate paina thu Moses tungah zasak hi," 
Exodus18:7 tua ahikom a muak tu in Moses pai a, ama mai ah kunin namh hi. Khat le khat nat le dam teng a kidok zawkciang Moses ii puanbuk sungah tum uh hi." 
Exodus18:8 Moses in Jethro tungah Topa ii Israel te a hut natu in kumpipa le Egypt mihingte tungah a vawt theampo son hi. Lampi ah mihingte in haksatna a thuakna le Topa ii a hutna teng zongh son hi. 
Exodus18:9 Jethro in hi thu teng a zaak ciang lungdam in," 
Exodus18:10 “Kumpipa le Egypt mite khut sung pan hong hun Topa pok vun! Ama ii mite saltanna pan a hun Topa pok vun! 
Exodus18:11 Topa sia pathian theampo sangin a let zawkna tu in ka he hi, banghang ziam cile Egypt te in Israel te tua bang a zawnsak vawt ciang Topa in hi bang seam hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus18:12 Tuaciang Jethro in meihal biakpiakna buppi le a dang sangaw biakpiaknate Pathian tungah pia a; Aaron le Israel lampuite theampo, ama taw biakpiakna an thiangtho nekhawm tu in pai uh hi." 
Exodus18:13 A zing ciang Moses, a mite kihaunate lemtua in, zing pan nitak dong komla hi." 
Exodus18:14 Moses ii nasep tu theampo Jethro in a mu ciang, “Mipite atu in na sep teng bang hi thong ziam? Banghangin na theampo nangma bek in seamin, hi lai ah thu hong dongh tute zing pan nitak dong dingsak ni ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Exodus18:15 Moses in, “Mihingte in Pathian ii deina a heak natu in, kei kungah hong pai ahikom hi bangin ka sep kul hi." 
Exodus18:16 Mihing nii thu a nei ciang kei kungah hong pai uh a, a maw le a tang thukhensakin amate tungah Pathian thupiakte le thukhamte ka son hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Exodus18:17 Tuaciang Jethro in, “Na nasepzia maan ngawl hi." 
Exodus18:18 Nangma le hi mihingte in na tha uh zawm law tu nu hi. Hite nang nguak sep tu in tam leih hi. 
Exodus18:19 Tu in ngaisutna pha pawlkhat hong piasak ta'n, tuaciang Pathian in nangma hong ompui tu hi. Mipite atu in palai na hi tu sia pha hi, amate thu kineinate Pathian mai ah na puak tu hi." 
Exodus18:20 Topa thupiakte na hil tu a, a nuntak tu zia le a nasep tu teng ama tungah na son tu hi." 
Exodus18:21 Tua banah mipil mithiam pawlkhat tealin a, mihingte lampui tu in koi in: tuate sia mihing a tul, a za, a sawmnga le a sawm sim te ii lampuite hi tu hi. Amate sia Pathian a kiita mihing muanhuai le sumnguk ne thei ngawlte ahi kul tu hi." 
Exodus18:22 Amate sia mihingte atu a seam top tu thukhenpa hisak in. Thu nozaw teng amate in khensak in a, ahizong thu haksa theampo nangma kungah puaksak in. Tuasia in na vanhngitte hong dawn tu a, nang atu in olzaw tu hi." 
Exodus18:23 Pathian thupiak bangin, seam lete nangma zongh na thazawm ngawl tu hi, mihing theampo zongh a thu thiang in inn ah cia thei tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus18:24 Moses in Jethro ii ngaisut piakna saang a," 
Exodus18:25 Israel te sung pan mipil mithiamte teal hi. Ama in tua te sia mihing a tul, a za, a sawmnga le a sawm sim te ii lampui tu in panmun pia hi." 
Exodus18:26 Amate in mite atu a seam top tu thukhenmangte hi a, thu haksate Moses tungah puakin thu nozaw te ahile amate in khen hi." 
Exodus18:27 Tua zawkciang Moses in Jethro mangpha thaakin, Jethro a inn ah cia hi." 
Exodus19:1 Israel mite in Rephidim nusia a, tuaciang Egypt a nusiat zawk a tha thumna, ni masabel ni in, Sinai sennealngam theng uh hi. Tualai Sinai Mualpeang ah amate in ngiaphual saatin," 
Exodus19:2  
Exodus19:3 Pathian taw kimu tu in mual tungah Moses kaato hi. Topa in mualtung pan Moses samin, Jacob suan le paal Israel te tungah hi bang na son tu hi ci hi:" 
Exodus19:4 “Keima, Topa in Egypt te tungah ka vawtte le muvanlai in a note a tha tungah a puak bangin note hi munah kong puak mu nu hi." 
Exodus19:5 Tu in ka thu hong ni in ka thuciamnate na zui uh le keima aituam mite hi tu nu hi. Leitung buppi keima aa hi a, ahizong note sia keima tealtuam mite na hi tu uh hi," 
Exodus19:6 keima tung bek ah hong ki aap minam khat na hi tu uh a, thiampite bangin ka na nong seam tu uh hi.”" 
Exodus19:7 Tua ahiciang Moses tuaksuk a mipi lampui teng khawmin Topa thupiak theampo sonsiat hi. 
Exodus19:8 Tuasia ciang mi theampo in, “ Topa ii ci theampo seam tu khu hi,” ci in zo a, Moses in Topa tungah hi a zona thu teng puak hi." 
Exodus19:9 Topa in Moses tungah, “Nangma taw ih kipaupuinate mipite in a zaak natu le tu pan kipan nang hong up natu in meeilom saa khat taw kong pai tu hi,” ci hi. Mipite zona sa teng Moses in Topa tungah son a," 
Exodus19:10 Topa in ama tungah, “Mipite kungah va pai ta'n a, biakna pia tu in tuni le zing ciang a kithiansua natu in son in. A puante sawp hamtang in," 
Exodus19:11 thai ciang atu kingingkhol sa in om hen. Tua ni in Sinai Mual ah kong tuaksuk tu a, tualai ah mi theampo in hong mu thei tu uh hi." 
Exodus19:12 Mipite ii a kaantan ngawl natu in mual kiimkot ah ngamngi tepteena khat vawt tavun a, mual tungah kaato ngawl, tuasia nai zongh a neak ngawl natu in son ta'n. Khat po in tuasia tung a siik le tua pa kithatlum tu hi;" 
Exodus19:13 ama kuama in thutha ngawl tu a, suang taw kideanglum ahibuale thal taw kikaplum tu hi. Hi thu in mihingte le nganhingte huam khawm a; tuate kithatlum nanak tu hi. Ahizong lemle hong kitum ciang mipite mual tungah kaato tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus19:14 Tuasia ciang mual tung pan Moses tuaksuk a, biakna vawt tu in mite kithoaisak hi. Tua ahiciang amate a puan uh sawp hi," 
Exodus19:15 tuaciang Moses in amate tungah, “Thai ciang atu kinging khol tavun a, hi hun sungin numei le pa omkhopna nei heak vun,” ci hi." 
Exodus19:16 A ni thum ni zingsang ciang vanto in khualeng a, mual tungah meeilom saa khat hong kilangh in lemle aw nging mama khat kiza hi. Ngiaphual ah a om mihing theampo liingin lau uh hi." 
Exodus19:17 Moses in amate, Pathian taw kimu tu in ngiaphual pan pusua pui a, mualpeang ah amate ding uh hi." 
Exodus19:18 Sinai Mual buppi meikhu in siincip hi, banghang ziam cile Topa tua mualtung ah mei sungah hong tuaksuk hi. A khu sia mei phualpi khu bangin kaato in, mi theampo liinglawng ngawp uh hi." 
Exodus19:19 Lemle aw hong nging vaial hi. Moses in paupui a, Pathian in vanto taw in zo kik hi." 
Exodus19:20 Sinai Mualdawn ah Topa hong tuaksukin, mualdawn ah Moses sam hi. Moses kaato a," 
Exodus19:21 Topa in ama tungah, “Keima en tu in mite hong pai ciang ngamngi tepteena a kan ngawl natu in paisuk in va son ta'n; tuasia hong kan le tam mama thi tu hi." 
Exodus19:22 Kei kung hong pai tu thiampite zongh a kithiansua phot kul tu hi, a kithiansua buale daan ka pia tu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus19:23 Moses in Topa tungah, “Mipite hong paito thei ngawl tu hi, banghang ziam cile nangma in mual sia thiangtho hi ci in ngaisut tu le tua ii kiimkot ah ngamngi tepteena khat vawt tu in thu nong pia hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus19:24 Topa in, “Tuaksuk ta'n a, Aaron hong paipui kik ta'n. Ahizong thiampite le mipite in kei kungah paito tu in tua ngamngi kaan ngawl het tu hi, tuabang a kaantan le amate daan ka pia tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Exodus19:25 Tuasia ciang mipite kungah Moses tuaksuk a, Topa ii ci teng amate tungah son hi." 
Exodus20:1 Pathian in hi bang kammal teng son hi: 
Exodus20:2 “Keima in note saltanna Egypt pan hong pusuapui Topa na Pathian ka hi hi. 
Exodus20:3 “Keima simngawl pathian dang bia heak vun. 
Exodus20:4 “Vantung ahizong, leitung ahizong leinuai tui sungah ahizong note atu in na khat pawpo ii lim vawt heak vun." 
Exodus20:5 Milim khat pawpo mai ah kun heak vun, ahibuale bia heak vun, banghang ziam cile keima in Topa na Pathian ka hi a, hong demte ka dual bua hi. Kei hong ngaimawte le amate ii a suan a paalte tungah khang thum khang li dongin daan ka pia tu hi." 
Exodus20:6 Ahizong kei hong it in, ka thukhamte a zuite ahile ka itna a khang tul tampite tungah ka lak tu hi." 
Exodus20:7 “Keima min, a sia vawt natu in zangh heak vun, banghang ziam cile keima Topa na Pathian in ka min a zangh khial pawpo daan ka pia tu hi." 
Exodus20:8 “Sabbath tang vun a, tua ni thiangthosak vun." 
Exodus20:9 Note na na sep natu in ni luk na nei uh a," 
Exodus20:10 ahizong a ni sali ni sia keima atu a kikoituam tawlngak ni ahi hi. Tua ni in kuama — nangma, na tate, na silate, na ngannote le na ngam sungah hong teang ngamdangmite khat zongh in naseam ngawl tu uh hi." 
Exodus20:11 Ni luk sungin Keima Topa in leitung, vantung, tuipi le tuate sung a om theampo ka vawt a, ahizong ni sali ni in ka tawlnga hi. Tua ahi hu in Keima, Topa in Sabbath thupha pia in tua ni ka thiangthosak hi." 
Exodus20:12 “Keima kong piak ngam le lei ah khansau in na nuntak thei natu in na nu le na pa zakta vun. 
Exodus20:13 “Mihing that heak vun. 
Exodus20:14 “Palngul mawna vawt heak vun. 
Exodus20:15 “Nguta heak vun. 
Exodus20:16 “A maan ngawlin khat pawpo mawsiat heak vun. 
Exodus20:17 “Midang khat ii inn lungngul heak vun: a zi, a silate, a khuite, a laate ahibuale a neisa khat pawpo lungngul heak vun,” ci hi." 
Exodus20:18 Mipite in khualeng vanto le lemle awngingte za in, khualeng le meikhu suak mual a mu ciang, lau in liing a, a khualana ah ding uh hi." 
Exodus20:19 Amate in Moses tungah, “Nangma in ko nong paupui le kong ngai tu uh hi; ahizong Pathian in kote hong paupui le ka thi tu lau khu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus20:20 Moses in, “Lau heak vun! note na khial ngawl natu hong sit tu in Pathian hong pai hi bek a, ama thu ni tawntung tu in hong vawt hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Exodus20:21 Ahizong mipite a khualana ah ding veve a, Pathian omna meeivom nai ah Moses bek pai hi." 
Exodus20:22 Israel te tungah Moses ii son tu in Topa in thupia a: “Keima, Topa in vantung pan note kong paupui na zia mu zo ni hi." 
Exodus20:23 Keima nong biak banah note biak tu in ngunn le khamh pathiante vawt heak vun. 
Exodus20:24 Lei taw kivawt biaknatau khat kei atu in vawt vun a, na tuute le na khuite taw meihal biakpiakna le kipawlkhop biakpiaknate tua biaknatau tungah pia vun. Kei nong biak natu in kong koi tuamsak mun teng ah kong pai tu a, thupha kong pia tu hi." 
Exodus20:25 Kei atu in suang taw biaknatau na vawt uh ahile, a ki attan suang taw sa heak vun, banghang ziam cile suang tungah sikkhu na zak uh ciang tua suang sia kei atu in zak tham man ngawl sua nu hi." 
Exodus20:26 Kei atu biaknatau na sak uh ciang a tungah kaato natu in keallei vawt heak vun; na vawt uh le a tung na kaato uh ciang noma sealno teng kilanghsak tu nu hi. 
Exodus21:1 “Israel te tungah a nuai a thukhamte pia in: 
Exodus21:2 Hebrew mi sila in na lei uh le, kum luk sung na hong sepsak tu hi. Kum sali kumin bangma pia ngawlin kisuaktasak tu hi." 
Exodus21:3 Na silapa sia na sila a sua lai in zi nei ngawl ahile hong nusiat ciang a zi tonpui ngawl tu a, ahizong zi neisa ahile a zi tonpui thei tu hi." 
Exodus21:4 A topa in zi neisakin, tanu tapa a nei le a zi le a tano teng a topa ii neisa hi tu a, ama nguak pai tu hi." 
Exodus21:5 Ahizong silapa in ka topa, ka zi, ka tate ka it hi ci in suataksak tu a nop ngawlna thu hong pualaak le," 
Exodus21:6 a topa in ama biakpiakna munah paipui tu hi. Tualai kongkha ahibuale kongkha khuam neal in ama dingsak tu a, a bil vutvangsak tu hi. Tuaciang a nuntak tawntung ama sila hi tu hi." 
Exodus21:7 “Mihing khat in a tanu sia sila tu in a zuak le, pa silate bangin suakta thei ngawl tu hi." 
Exodus21:8 Tua nu a zi tu in a nei nuam khat ii tungah kizuak a, ahizong tua pa in a dei bua le, tua nu sia a pa kungah kizuak kik tu hi; a topa in ngamdangmite tungah zuak thei ngawl tu hi, banghang ziam cile ama in tua nu a phatvawt ngawl sa ahihang hi." 
Exodus21:9 Pasal khat in a tapa a piak tu in sila numei khat a lei le tanu khat bangin vawt tu hi. 
Exodus21:10 Mihing khat in zi ni a nei le a zi masa sia nidang a piak ngeiza an, puan le a nga tuakte a kibangin pia suak tu hi." 
Exodus21:11 Ama in a zi masa tungah hi bangin a vawt tu te a khuangkhim buale liausum bangma la ngawlin a suataksak kul tu hi. 
Exodus21:12 “Mihing khat vua in a that sia peuma kithatlum tu hi. 
Exodus21:13 Ahizong thalup sawm ngawlpi khutkhial tha ahile ama atu ka tealsa munah ngammuangin om tu a, suakta thei tu hi." 
Exodus21:14 Ahizong mihing khat thin uuk in midang khat a thatlum lui le ka biaknatau beal tu in a tai zong kithat veve tu hi. 
Exodus21:15 A nu ahibuale a pa a vua sia kithatlum tu hi. 
Exodus21:16 Mihing khat zuak tu ahizong, sila in khoai tu ahizong a ngu sia kithatlum tu hi." 
Exodus21:17 A nu ahibuale a pa a haamsiat sia kithatlum tu hi. 
Exodus21:18 Mihing nii kihau in, khat pa in a dang khat pa suangtum taw suu ahibuale a khuttum taw thong a, ahizong a thatlum buanale tua pa daan kipia ngawl tu hi. Tua a thuakpa sia lupmuntung ngak ahihang, tua zawkciang tho thei in doipua a paina ah ciangkhut zak a kul le, dam ngawlin a om hun sung a supna teng a thaman liau tu a, a dam dong ou tu hi." 
Exodus21:19  
Exodus21:20 Mihing khat in a silapa ahibuale a silanu mol khat taw saatin thakhat thu a thi paih le, a saatpa daan kipia tu hi." 
Exodus21:21 Ahizong a sila sia ni khat, ni nii in a thi bua le, a topa daan kipia ngawl tu hi. A neisa a sup sia a kicing daan ahi hi." 
Exodus21:22 Mihingte kihau a naupaai numei khat nasakin, a tuamdang khat pawpo taw a liam hi ngawl napi a nau a lal le, a nasakpa in tua numei nu pasal ii a ngetza, thukhente thu khen bangin liau tu hi." 
Exodus21:23 Ahihang tua numei a kiliamsua le tua daan sia nuntakna atu nuntakna ma," 
Exodus21:24 mittang atu mit, hatang atu ha, khut atu khut, peang atu peang," 
Exodus21:25 meikaang atu meikaang, liamna atu liamna, chidup atu chidup ma hi tu hi." 
Exodus21:26 Mihing khat in a silanu ahibuale a silapa saatin a mit a taw le, a mittang atu in tua sila sia suaktasak tu hi." 
Exodus21:27 A ha tang khat a tongsak le a ha taangin tua sila sia suatakna pia tu hi. 
Exodus21:28 Khuital khat in mihing khat a siilum le tua khuital suang taw kideanglum tu a, a sa kine ngawl tu hi; ahizong a neipa daan kipia ngawl tu hi." 
Exodus21:29 Ahizong tua khuital in ngual a sik zongsang sa hi in, a neipa tungah a kidop natu kison zo napi khum ngawlin — mihing khat a siilum le tua khuital sia suang taw kideanglum tu a, a neipa zongh kithatlum tu hi." 
Exodus21:30 Ahizong tua a neipa sia a nuntakna a kihuukna in liausum a kipiasak le, a nget zaza a piak kul tu hi." 
Exodus21:31 Khuital khat in patangno khat ahibuale numeino khat a silum le tua zui tu ngeina sia taw ma a kibang hi tu hi. 
Exodus21:32 Khuital in sila numei khat ahibuale sila pa khat a silum le ngan neipa in sila topa tungah sum ngunntang sawmthum pia tu a, tua khuital suang taw kideanglum tu hi." 
Exodus21:33 Mihing khat in dum sitna a hon hang ahibuale dum to in a sit ngawl hu in, khuital ahibuale laa khat tua dum sungah a taak le," 
Exodus21:34 ama in tua nganno ii man liau nanak tu hi. Ngan neipa tungah a sum pia tu a, tua nganhing thi sia ama in tang thei tu hi." 
Exodus21:35 Mihing khat ii khuital khat in midang khat ii khuital a silum le amate nii in a nungta khuital sia zuakin, a sum hawm tu hi; khuital thi sia ii sa zongh hawm tu uh hi." 
Exodus21:36 Ahizong tua khuital sia ngual sik tu a zongsang khat hi ci in, kihe a, a neipa in khum ngawl ahile a dang khat pa tungah ama khuital nungta khat taw lo kik hamtang in sumsisak ngawl tu hi, ahizong khuital thi sia ama in tang tu hi." 
Exodus22:1 “Mihing khat in khuipui ahibuale tuu khat ngu in a ngo, a zuak le ama in khuipui khat taangin khuipui nga, tuu khat taangin tuu li pia hamtang tu hi." 
Exodus22:2 Ama in a nguk sia atu liau hamtang tu hi. Ama in bangma a nei buale a nguk sa teng a liau natu in ama sila in kizuak tu hi. A nguk nganhing sia khui, laa, tuu a nungta in ama khut sungah a kimu le ama in a zaa nii in liau tu hi. “Nguta khat in zan lai in inn phuul a, a kithatlum le a that pa sia mithat in kimawsak ngawl tu hi. Ahizong tuasia sun hun sung a piang ahile mithat in kimawsak tu hi." 
Exodus22:3  
Exodus22:4  
Exodus22:5 “Mihing khat in a ngannote lo ahibuale sapithuan khat ah tha in a tatsak laitak a ngante puapial in midang khat ii lo ah ankungte a neaksak le, ama lote ahibuale a sapithuante pan a bo teng lo kik tu hi." 
Exodus22:6 “Mihing khat in ama lo pan meikuang khat kipan a, ngual dangkhat ii lo kipeesak in a kikhol ante ahibuale ankungte a kaangh le mei a kaanghsakpa in a lal teng liau tu hi." 
Exodus22:7 “Mihing khat in midang khat ii sum ahizong, na manpha dangte ahizong kepsak tu in thukim a, ama inn pan kingu in, a ngupa a kikan zo le a zaa nii in kiliausak tu hi." 
Exodus22:8 Ahizong a ngupa a kimu buale vanh manphate a keampa sia biakna munah kipaipui tu a tua munah a nguksak ngawlna thu kiciam tu hi. 
Exodus22:9 “Khui, laa, tuu, puansilh ahibuale nadang a bo khat pawpo taw kisai thuneina theampo ah tua na a kituu te nii sia biakna munah kipaipui tu hi. Pathian ii maw hi a ci sia pa in a langkhat pa tungah a zaa nii in liau tu hi." 
Exodus22:10 “Mihing khat in ngual laa, khui, tuu nganhing dang khat kepsak tu thukim a, tua nganno thi, liam ahibuale a kitaipuisak ahihang tetti a om buale" 
Exodus22:11 biakna munah ngan keampa paipui tu a, ngual ngan a nguksak ngawlna thu a kiciam kul tu hi. A kingu ahibuale a neipa a sumh hi tu hi, tua pa in liau ngawl tu hi;" 
Exodus22:12 ahizong a kingu ahile a nei pa tung liau hamtang tu hi. 
Exodus22:13 Ngamsate ii thalup ahile a neakmongte tetti in a lak kul hi; ama in ngamsa ii thalup sia atu liau kul ngawl hi. 
Exodus22:14 “Mihing khat in ngual ngan zawng a, a nei pa om ngawl sungin a liamsak ahibuale, a thisak le tua pa in liau tu hi." 
Exodus22:15 Ahizong a nei pa om sungin, tuabang thu piang ahile liau kul ngawl hi. Man piak tu in a kizawng ahile a zawn man teng taw kisi tu hi." 
Exodus22:16 “Mihing khat in a kidongh ngawl lai ngaknu thiangtho khat zolin a ompui le moman teng a piak kul a, tuaciang teenpui tu hi." 
Exodus22:17 Ahizong a numei ii pa in a kiteen tu a oai buale tua ngaknu khat atu moman za sia a sum in a pa tungah pia nanak tu hi. 
Exodus22:18 “Bum le ai toai numei peuma kithatlum tu hi. 
Exodus22:19 “Nganhing khat taw a khialpa peuma kithatlum tu hi. 
Exodus22:20 “Keima., Topa simngawl, pathian dang tungah sangaw biakpiakna a vawt peuma kithatlum tu hi." 
Exodus22:21 “Ngamdangmi khat vawtsia ahibuale zothaw heak vun; Egypt ah ngamdangmite na hina uh phawk vun. 
Exodus22:22 Meingong ahibuale tanga peuma na vawtsia heak vun. 
Exodus22:23 Na vawtsia uh le Keima Topa in amate ih hu hong ngetna aw ka zaak ciang ka zo tu a," 
Exodus22:24 ka thin uukin ngal sungah kong that tu hi. Na zite meingong tu a, na tate sia pa sel tu uh hi." 
Exodus22:25 “Keima ii mi ahi a zawng khat pawpo tungah sum na pukthaak uh le sum pukthaak pa bangin om heak vun a, summeet na la heak vun." 
Exodus22:26 Hong lo kik natu kikhapna in khat po ii puanvan silh lai na laaksak le, nitum ma in pia kik tu ni hi," 
Exodus22:27 banghang ziam cile a khualumna tu in a neisun sia tua puanvan bek ahi hi. Ama bangdang silhin mutthip thei tu ziam? Ama in kei tungah hu ngen a, hong au ciang zo tu khi hi, banghang ziam cile ngual hesuak thei khi hi." 
Exodus22:28 “Pathian na sonsia heak vun a, na minam lampuite na haamsiat heak vun." 
Exodus22:29 “Na lo an, na sapittui le na olive thau sung pan kei nong piak tute hong pia tavun. “Na tapaciilte kei hong pia tavun." 
Exodus22:30 Na khui le na tuu a no suakciilte hong pia tavun, Tua a suakciil a pa sia ni sali sung a pui taw omsak in a, a ni liat ni in kei hong pia tavun." 
Exodus22:31 “Note sia keima mihing na hi uh ciang ngamsate ii matsa nganhing ii sa peuma ne ngawlin uite pia zaw vun. 
Exodus23:1 “A maan ngawl kamdawn kizelsak heak vun a, a maw sia hu nuamin leilot tetti pang heak vun." 
Exodus23:2 Mihing a tamzawte ii khialna a vawt ciang le thutang khenna pan lam a pialsak tetti a pan ciang amate zui heak vun. 
Exodus23:3 Mizawng khat thu a kisitna ah ngum tuan heak vun. 
Exodus23:4 “Na ngalpa ii khui ahibuale a laa a tai na mu uh le ama kungah puak kik vun. 
Exodus23:5 Ama ii laa a vanh taw a puk na mu le a laa phokpui vun a; paisan heak vun. 
Exodus23:6 “Mizawng khat thukhenzum a thet ciang thutang khenna taansak heak vun. 
Exodus23:7 A maan ngawlin ngual mawsiat heak vun a, mawnei ngawl khat that heak vun, banghang ziam cile tuabangin a sia a vawt peuma ka mawsak tu hi." 
Exodus23:8 Sumnguk ne heak vun, banghang ziam cile sumnguk in mihingte a maan bang musak ngawlin, a maw ngawlte mailam lalsak hi." 
Exodus23:9 “Ngamdangmi khat vawtsia heak vun; ngamdangmite ii a thinsung thuakzia na he uh hi, banghang ziam cile Egypt ah note ngamdangmite na hi uh hi." 
Exodus23:10 “Kum luk sung na lo ah thai na ciing tu uh a, an piang teng na kaikhawm tu uh hi." 
Exodus23:11 Ahizong kum sali kum sia tawlngasakin tua lo pan a piangte bangma la heak vun. Lo sung pan a lipote mizawngte in ne tahen a, a taanglai teng ngamsate in ne tahen. Na sapithuan le na olive kungte zongh tuabang ma in hi tavun." 
Exodus23:12 “Nipi khat sung ni luk naseam in, ahizong ni sali ni in naseam heak vun, tua hile note na hong sepsak na silate le ngamdangmite, na ngannote zongh tawlnga thei tu uh hi." 
Exodus23:13 “Keima, Topa ii kong son theampo hong ngai tavun. A dang pathiante tungah thungen heak vun a; a min zongh lo heak vun." 
Exodus23:14 “Keima patoaina in kum khat sung thumvei poaipi khaam vun. 
Exodus23:15 Kong thupiakna sa taw kizui in Egypt na nusiat tha ahi, Abib tha sungin Tol saw ngawl Anluum Poaipi khaam vun. Tua poaipi ni sali hun sung tol taw kivawt anluum peuma ne heak vun. Biakpiak natu khat keng ngawlin kei hong bia tu in hong pai heak vun." 
Exodus23:16 “Anlaak tu na kipat uh ciang Anlaak Poaipi khaam vun. ‘Na sapithuan le na thingnga huan pan thingngate na kaikhop uh ciang tangngam hun sungin Anlaak Poaipi khaam vun. 
Exodus23:17 Kum sim hi poaipi thumte ah keima, Topa na Pathian hong bia tu in na mite theampo hong pai nanak tu uh hi." 
Exodus23:18 “Nganhing khat taw biakpiakna nong vawt uh ciang tol saw anluum hong pia heak vun. Hi poaipi te sungah sangaw biakpiakna nong vawt uh ciang nganhing thaute sia a zingsang ciang dongin koi heak vun. 
Exodus23:19 “Kum simin na lo anpal sia Topa na Pathian inn sungah hong paipui tavun. “Tuuno ahibuale kealno sa, a nu noaitui sungah huan heak vun." 
Exodus23:20 “Na khualhawna ah hong cing tu le ka vawtkholsa munah hong paipui tu in na mai ah vantunglalang khat ka paisak tu hi. 
Exodus23:21 Ama thudon in, a thu ni tavun. Ama leedo heak vun, banghang ziam cile keima sawl hi a, tuabang leedona sia hong maisak ngawl tu hi." 
Exodus23:22 Ahizong ama ii thu ni in kong thupiak theampo na seam uhle na ngalte theampo kong simsak tu hi. 
Exodus23:23 Na mai ah ka vantunglalang pai in, Amor te, Hit te, Periz te, Canaan te, Hiv te le Jebus te ngam ah hong paipui tu a, tuaciang amate ka sucip siat tu hi." 
Exodus23:24 Amate ii pathiante mai ah kunin bia heak vun, amate ii biakna ziate zui heak vun. A pathiante suksiat sakin a suangkhuam thiangthote sutham vun." 
Exodus23:25 Topa na Pathian keima nong bia uh le an le tui taw thupha kong pia tu a, note natna theampo kong laaksak siat tu hi." 
Exodus23:26 Na ngam na lei ah numei nautol om ngawlin, a tasel zongh om ngawl tu hi. Keima in note khansauna kong pia tu hi." 
Exodus23:27 “No hong langpan mihingte in keima hong kiitak natu in ka vawt tu hi; na do ngalte sungah buaina ka omsak tu a, note kung pan na ngalte theampo kilee in ka taisak siat tu hi." 
Exodus23:28 Na ngalte ka patausak tu hi; note maisang nawt in na pai uh ciang Hiv mite, Canaan mite, le Hit mite ka notkeak tu hi." 
Exodus23:29 Kum khat sungin amate ka notkeak siat buatu hi; notkeak siat thong leng tua ngam sia ngamtongta suak tu a, note atu in ngamsate tam leih tu hi." 
Exodus23:30 Tua sangin tua ngam a lua khom tu mihing na om thei mateng tawtawm in ka not tu hi. 
Exodus23:31 Na ngamngi uh kong vawtsak tu a, Aqaba Tuidok pan Mediterranean Tuipi dong le sennealngam pan Eupharates Ngun dong hi tu hi. Tua ngam ah a teangte tungah vaang neina kong pia tu a, maisang na manaw uh ciang na notkeak tu uh hi." 
Exodus23:32 Amate taw ahizong a pathiante taw ahizong thukimna peuma vawt heak vun. 
Exodus23:33 Tua mihingte na ngam sungah teangsak heak vun; na teangsak uh le amate in kei tungah na maw na khial natu hong vawt tu hi. A pathiante na bia uh le note atu in hong thisak thei thaang hi tu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus24:1 Topa in Moses tungah, “Nangma le Aaron, Nadab, Abihu le Israel lampui sawmsalite ka kung mual tungah hong kaato tavun a; a khuala thithimna ah na om uh laitak kunin hong bia tavun." 
Exodus24:2 A dangte hi ngawl, nangma bek in ka kung nong pai tu hi, midangte kuama in hong neak ngawl tu hi. Mipite sia mualtung ngawngawn zong ah kaato ngawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus24:3 Moses pai in a mipite tungah Topa thupiak teng le zui tu thu teng son a, mihing theampo in, “ Topa ci theampo ka vawt siat tu uh hi,” ci in zo uh hi." 
Exodus24:4 Topa thupiak theampo Moses in at siat hi. A zing ciang zing tuungin mualpeang ah Moses in biaknatau khat sa in, Israel minam sawm le niite atu in suangtum sawm le nii phut hi." 
Exodus24:5 Tua zawkciang ama in tangvalte sawl a. amate in meihal biakpiaknate le khui pawl khat ngoin kipawlkhop sangaw biakpiakna te Topa tungah vawt uh hi. 
Exodus24:6 Moses in nganhing te ii chisan a lang la in kuang sungah koi a; a lang sia biaknatau ah the hi. 
Exodus24:7 Tua zawkciang Moses in Topa thupiak teng a ki at, thuciamna laibu la in mipite tungah nging takin sim hi. Amate in, “ Topa thu ka ni tu uh a, ama thupiak theampo ka vawt siat tu uh hi,” ci uh hi." 
Exodus24:8 Tuasia ciang Moses in kuangte sung pan chisan la in mipite the hi. Ama in, “Hi chisan sia Topa ii hi thu teng hong piak lai in, ama ii note taw a vawt thuciamna a kipsak chisan ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus24:9 Moses, Aaron, Nadab, Abihu le Israel lampui sawmsalite mual tungah kaato a," 
Exodus24:10 amate in Israel te ii Pathian mu uh hi. A peang nuai ah vancii bang ahi, sapphire suangpheak khat taw a kibang om hi." 
Exodus24:11 Pathian in Israel lampuite bangma law ngawl hi; amate in Pathian mu a, tua zawkciang amate an nekhawm tui dawnkhawm uh hi." 
Exodus24:12 Topa in Moses tungah, “Keima kung mual tungah hong kaato ta'n a, hi lai ah na om sungin mihingte kihil natu in keima at sa thukham teng theampo a om suangpheak nii kong pia tu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus24:13 Moses le ama a hupa Joshua kithoai a, mual thiangtho ah kaato tu in Moses kipan hi." 
Exodus24:13 Moses le ama a hupa Joshua kithoai a, mual thiangtho ah kaato tu in Moses kipan hi." 
Exodus24:14 Moses in lampuite tungah, “Kong heak kik uh mateng hi lai ngiaphual pan hong ngak tavun. Aaron le Hur, note taw hi lai ah om hi; tua ahikom thukhen tu buaina a nei pawpo in amate kungah pai thei tu nu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus24:15 Sinai Mual ah Moses kaato in, meei in tua mual tuamcip hi." 
Exodus24:16 Topa ompuina khuavak taang velvol sia mual tungah hong theng suk hi. Tua khuavak taang sia Israel mite atu in mualdawn ah a taang meikuang khat taw kibang hi. Ni luk sung meei in mual tuamcip in, a ni sali ni in meei sung pan Topa in Moses sam hi." 
Exodus24:17  
Exodus24:18 Mualtung meei sungah Moses kaato hi. Tua munah Moses sun sawmli le zan sawmli om hi. 
Exodus25:1 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Exodus25:2 “Kei tungah sumpi hong piak natu in Israel te son in. A pia nuam khat pawpo ii sumpite saang in. 
Exodus25:3 Hi sumpite sia: khamh, ngunn le taau;" 
Exodus25:4 puanneal, vancii, a sandup le a san samulpuan; kealmul taw kivawt puan;" 
Exodus25:5 a san a kinimh tuuvun, savun neal, acacia thing;" 
Exodus25:6 meidet sathau, noi sathau le ngimnamtui atu hel namtuite;" 
Exodus25:7 Thiampi Lianbel ii ephod tung le awmdal te tungah bul tu suangsante le suangmanpha dangte ahi hi. 
Exodus25:8 Amate sungah ka teen thei natu in, kei atu in mite in puanbuk thiangtho khat vawt tahen." 
Exodus25:9 Tuasia le a sung nazak tu te theampo kong lak tu ngealna bangin vawt tahen. 
Exodus25:10 “Acacia thing taw thingkuang a sau centimetre 110, a zai centimetre 66, a saang centimetre 66 khat vawt in." 
Exodus25:11 A sung a pua khamh ciitak taw tuam in a, a mong kiimkot khamh taw zial in." 
Exodus25:12 A zawn natu khamh kual li vawt in a, a pangh lang le lang ah nii veve, a peang lite tungah bul in." 
Exodus25:13 A zawn natu in acacia thingpum sui in a, khamh taw tuamin," 
Exodus25:14 thingkuang pangh veve ah a kibul khamh kualte sungah thun in. 
Exodus25:15 Tua thingpumte khamh kualte sungah kinusia tu a, kila nawn ngawl het tu hi." 
Exodus25:16 Tuaciang nang kong piak tu thupiak teng a ki at suangpheak niite thingkuang sungah koi in. 
Exodus25:17 “A sitna khamh ciitak taw vawt in, a sau centimetre 110, a zai centimetre 66 hi tu hi." 
Exodus25:18 A kiseakpeak khamh taw cherub nii ii lim vawt in a," 
Exodus25:19 a sitna mong veve ah koi in. A sitna taw kipee, a sakhat tu in vawt in." 
Exodus25:20 Cherub niite ii lim sia a sitna tungah khat le khat kimaingat tu a, a tha kiphalte in tuasia liap tu hi." 
Exodus25:21 Suangpheakte nii thingkuang sungah koi in a tungah a sitna koi in. 
Exodus25:22 Tualai ah kong kisikpui tu a, cherub te ii a thate nii kilaklaw, a sitna tung panin Israel mite atu, ka thukhamte theampo nang kong pia tu hi." 
Exodus25:23 “Acacia thing taw a sau centimetre 88, a zai centimetre 44, a saang centimetre 66 sabuai khat vawt in." 
Exodus25:24 khamh ciitak taw tuamin, a mong kiimkot khamh taw zial in." 
Exodus25:25 A kiil kiimkot millimetre 75 zaisakin, khamh taw tuam in." 
Exodus25:26 Khamkual li vawt in a, a peang omna king li ah bul in." 
Exodus25:27 Tua khamh kualte sabuai zawn natu thingpumte thun natu hi a, sabuai kiil ah bul tu ahi hi." 
Exodus25:28 A thingpumte acacia thing taw vawt in a, khamh taw tuam in." 
Exodus25:29 Sapittui biakpiakna ah a kizangh tu pakante, haite, haitungte le kuangte vawt in. Hi teng khamh ciitak taw kivawt tu hi." 
Exodus25:30 Sabuai sia Thuciamna Thingkuang mai ah kikoi tu a, kei hong kipia anluum thiangtho sia tua sabuai tungah kilui tawntung tu hi." 
Exodus25:31 “Khamh ciitak taw meivakna khuam vawt in. A tawdap le a khuamte a kiseakpeak khamh taw vawt in; a zepna paakte, a momte le paakpalhte zongh meikhuam taw sakhat hi tu hi." 
Exodus25:32 A khuam panghte pan baak luk kaasak tu a, a lang le lang ah baak thum veve om tu hi." 
Exodus25:33 A baak luk te khat simin almond paak bangin a mom le a palh taw a kithua paak nam thum nei tu hi. 
Exodus25:34 A meikhuam sia almond paak bangin a mom le a paakpalh taw a kithua kizepna paak pha nam li nei tu hi. 
Exodus25:35 Kop thum a pha a baakte sim ii nuai ah a mom khat tek om tu hi. 
Exodus25:36 A momte, a baakte le meikhuam sia a kiseakpeak khamh ciitak bek khat taw a kivawt hi tu hi." 
Exodus25:37 A mai sang a taan thei natu in tua meivak khuam tungah meivak sali de in. 
Exodus25:38 Taiteete le kuangdalte khamh ciitak taw vawt in. 
Exodus25:39 Hi meikhuam le a nadang teng vawt natu in khamh ciitak kilogramme 35 zangh in. 
Exodus25:40 Mual tungah kong lak ngealna sia bang tatak in, tua nate pha takin vawt in." 
Exodus26:1 “Kong ompuina Puanbuk, a thiangtho puanbuk sungsang sia vancii, a sandup, le a san tuumul taw a kitak puanneal bek sawm taw vawt in. Tua puante cherub limte taw zeam in." 
Exodus26:2 Tua puante a letna kikim tu a, metre 12 sau in metre 2 zai veu hi tu hi." 
Exodus26:3 Tua puan ngate khatin khuikhawmin, a dang nga teng zongh tuabang ma khuikhawm in." 
Exodus26:4 Na puan pee khop khat simin a puasang puanbek ii mong tung teng ah vancii puan kualte vawt in. 
Exodus26:5 A puan masa sia tungah kual sawmnga koi in a, a niina puan sia tung zongh ah a kibangin kual sawmnga ma koi in kisituasak in." 
Exodus26:6 Tua puante nii sia puan khai khat in na pe thei natu khamh taw kivawt a khilna koaite sawmnga vawt in. 
Exodus26:7 “Puanbuk ii a tung sit natu in kealmul taw kivawt puanbek sawm le khat vawt in. 
Exodus26:8 Tua teng a letna kibangsak in, metre 13 sausak in, metre 2 zaisak in." 
Exodus26:9 Tua puanbek nga teng khatin khui khawm in a, a dang luk teng khatin khuikhawm in. A lukna puanbek sia Puanbuk mai ii tung san ah thep nii in thep in." 
Exodus26:10 Na khuikhop puankhai khat ii puanbek khakbel sia ii mong tungah a kual sawmnga vawt in a, a dang khat sia mong zongh ah a kual sawmnga vawt in." 
Exodus26:11 Puante kipee khop natu in taaukoai sawmnga vawt in a, a sitna khat suak tu in a kikhui khawmsa puante nii ii a kualvangte sungah thun in a pe in." 
Exodus26:12 Puanbuk nungsangah tua puanbek vaal ii a lang sia kaaisuksak in. 
Exodus26:13 Tua puankhai sia a sau lamin a mong vaal centimetre sawmnga veve sia Puanbuk pangh tek ah kaaisuksak in. 
Exodus26:14 “Puanbuk sit natu a sanin a kinimh tuutal vun taw kivawt a sitna khat le savun neal taw kivawt a sitna dangkhat te ngeal vawt lai in. 
Exodus26:15 “Acacia thing taw Puanbuk a kalpheak dingtangte vawt in. 
Exodus26:16 Tuate khat sim a sauna metre 4, a saana centimetre 66 hi tu a," 
Exodus26:17 a kipee thei natu in a meang nii vawt in. A kalpheak theampo tuabangin vawt siat in. 
Exodus26:18 Thang sang atu a kalpheak kul," 
Exodus26:19 a nuai phaa tu ngunn taw kivawt tawdap sawmli vawt in a, a meangte a len tu in ngunn tawdap nii tek koi in." 
Exodus26:20 Puanbuk saksang atu a kalpheak kul," 
Exodus26:21 a kalpheak khat ciang tawdap nii veu, ngunn tawdap sawmli vawt in." 
Exodus26:22 Nitumna sang Puanbuk nungsangah a kalpheak luk," 
Exodus26:23 le a kingte atu in a kalpheak nii vawt in. 
Exodus26:24 Hi a king a kalpheakte sia a bul pan pe in a dawn dong kizom siat tu hi. Tua king nii a piangsak a kalpheakte nii sia, tubangin kivawt tu hi." 
Exodus26:25 Tuabangin a kalpheakte liat om tu a, khat simin tawdap nii veu, ngunn tawdap sawm le luk om tu hi." 
Exodus26:26 “Acacia thingzawl sawm le nga vawt in, Puanbuk a kalpheakte atu in a pangh khat ah zawl nga veu," 
Exodus26:27 a langkhat ah a kalpheak nga le a nungsang nitumna sang khakbel ah a kalpheak nga vawt in. 
Exodus26:28 A lai zawlsau, a kalpheakte nii ii lang kikhenna ah a kithung sia Puanbuk langkhat pan langkhat dong, a tuantung hi tu hi." 
Exodus26:29 A kalpheakte khamh taw tuamin, a zawlte tum natu khamh kualte bulin a, a zawlte zongh khamh taw tuam in." 
Exodus26:30 Mual tungah kong lak ngealna sa om bangin Puanbuk sa in. 
Exodus26:31 “Vancii, a sandup le a san samul taw a kitak puanneal puankhai khat vawt in. Tuate cherub te ii limte taw zeam in." 
Exodus26:32 Ngun tawdap li tungah a kiphut, vanh khaina a koaite a kithua khamh taw a kituam acacia thing khuam li tungah tua puan khai in." 
Exodus26:33 Puanbuk innciing nuai ah puankhainate pan puankhai khaksuk in a, tua puan nungah suangpheak niite koina Thuciamna Thingkuang koi in. Tua puan in Thiangtho Mun le Thiangthobel Mun kidaakna ahi hi." 
Exodus26:34 Thuciamna Thingkuang sitna thua in. 
Exodus26:35 Thiangthobel Mun ii pua sang, Puanbuk ii saksang pangh ah sabuai koi in a, thangsang pangh ah meidetna khuam koi in." 
Exodus26:36 “Puanbuk sung tumna puankhai tu in vancii, a sandup le a san samul taw a kitak thiamngelte taw a kizeam puanneal puankhai khat vawt in." 
Exodus26:37 Hi puankhai atu in khamh taw a kituam le puankhaina khamh koai a kibul acacia thing khuam nga phut in; tua khuamte atu in taau tawdap nga vawt in. 
Exodus27:1 “Acacia thing taw biaknatau khat vawt in. Tua in king li nei tu a, a sauna metre 2.2, a zaina metre 2.2, a saanna metre 1.3 hi tu hi." 
Exodus27:2 A king li dawn teng doksak in. Tua a dok teng biaknatau taw sakhat suak tu in, taau taw kituam siat tu hi." 
Exodus27:3 Sathau baang vut koi natu in bealpeute le kawkeaute, kuangte, thikkoaite le meikam luana daalpheakte vawt in. Hi nazakte theampo taau taw kivawt tu hi." 
Exodus27:4 Taau taw saaksai khat vawt in, a king li ah toai natu taaukual li koi in." 
Exodus27:5 Tua taau saaksai sia biaknatau ii a lang dong a bat natu in biaknatau bitha nuai ah koi in. 
Exodus27:6 A zawn natu Acacia thingpumte vawt in, taau taw tuam in." 
Exodus27:7 Biaknatau a kizawn ciang a panghte nii ah a om a kualte sungah thingpumte thun in. 
Exodus27:8 Mual tungah ngealna kong laksa bangin biaknatau sia thingpheak taw vawt in a, a sung vangsak in." 
Exodus27:9 “Kong ompuina Puanbuk tu sia puanneal puankhaite taw doituam khat uum in. Thangsang pangh puankhaite sia metre 44 sau tu hi. 
Exodus27:10 Tua puan sia taau tawdap khat tek a nei taau khuam kul tungah na khak tu uh a, tua khuamte tungah ngunn taw a kivawt puankhainate le a zawlte om tu hi." 
Exodus27:11 Doituam ii saksang pangh zongh ah tuabang ma in vawt in. 
Exodus27:12 Nitumna sangah metre 22 a sau puankhaite, khuam sawm le a dap sawmte taw om tu hi." 
Exodus27:13 Nisuana sang, kongbiang omna ah a doituam zongh metre 22 zai tu hi." 
Exodus27:14 Kongbiang ii a pangh veve ah puankhaite metre 6.6 veu, khuam thum le a tawdap thumte taw om tu hi." 
Exodus27:15  
Exodus27:16 A tumna kongbiang san ah vancii, a sandup, le a san samul taw a kitak thiamngelte taw a kizeam metre 9 a sau puanneal puankhai khat om tu hi. Tua in tawdap li taw a kiphut khuam li tungah kikhak tu hi." 
Exodus27:17 A kiimkot uumna khuam teng ngunnzawlte taw kizom a, vanh khainate ngunn taw a kivawt hi in a tawdapte taau taw a kivawt hi tu hi." 
Exodus27:18 A doituam sia metre 44 sau, metre 22 a zai le metre 2.2 a saang hi tu hi. Puankhaite puanneal taw kivawt tu a, a taw teng taau taw kivawt tu hi." 
Exodus27:19 Puanbuk atu a kizangh vanh theampo le puanbuk atu le a doituam tu in, a kizangh khetphin theampo taau taw kivawt tu hi." 
Exodus27:20 “Nitak simin meiinn a kidet thei natu in olive thau phabelte nang kung hong puak natu in Israel mite thupia in. 
Exodus27:21 Kong ompuina Puanbuk sung, Thuciamna Thingkuang mai, puankhai pua sangah Aaron le a tapate in meiinn koi tu uh hi. Tua mun keima omna ah nitak pan zingsang dong mei de tu uh hi. Hi thupiak sia Israel te le a suan a paalte in a tawntung a zui tu uh ahi hi." 
Exodus28:1 “Na suapuipa Aaron le a tapate Nadab, Abihu, Eleazar le Ithamar te sam in. Keima tungah thiampi na a sep thei natu in amate Israel mite sung pan tuamkoi in." 
Exodus28:2 Na suapuipa Aaron sia a vaang nei natu le a et hoi natu in thiampi puante vawtsak in. 
Exodus28:3 Keima na a seam tu in a ki aap thiampi khat a sua thei natu in thiamna ka piaksa khut thiam naseamte theampo samin Aaron ii puansilhte khui tu in sam in. 
Exodus28:4 Amate in awmdal khat, ephod puan khat, puantual khat, thiamngel taw kizeam laktong khat, dialkhip khat le kawngsawmna khau khat a vawt natu in sawl in. Amate in ka na a seam thei thiampite a sua natu in khutthiamte in na suapui pa Aaron le a tapate atu in hi thiampi puante khuisak tu hi." 
Exodus28:5 Khutthiamte in vancii, a sandup, a san samul, khamh khau le puanneal phate zangh tu hi." 
Exodus28:6 “Amate in ephod sia vancii, a sandup, le a san samul, khamh khau le puanneal phate taw vawtin, thiamngel taw zeam tu hi." 
Exodus28:7 A kikhit thei natu in, a liangko lang le lang ah a sawmna khau nii om tu hi." 
Exodus28:8 A dangte taw a vawtdan a kibang, pha tak a kitak kawng sawmna khau sia ephod taw sakhat tu in a tungah thuap tu hi." 
Exodus28:9 Suangmanpha san nii la in, a tungah Jacob tapa sawm le niite min at in," 
Exodus28:10 amate pianna suana taw kizui in a min luk te suang khat tungah at in, a dang luk te ii min teng suang dang khat tungah at in."
