Exodus28:11 Suang manpha a zeamthiamte khat in hi suangte nii tungah Jacob tapa sawm le niite min atsak in a, tua suangte khamh dapphate tungah suang in." 
Exodus28:12 Tuate Israel minam sawm le niite taangin ephod liangkhai puan tungah koi in. Tuabangin Aaron in a minte a liangko tungah pua tu a, tuasia ciang keima Topa in ka mite ka phawk tawntung tu hi." 
Exodus28:13 Khamh dappha nii na vawt zawk uh ciangin," 
Exodus28:14 khamh ciitak taw a kivawt zam nii te khau bang a kipheak sa in ngui nii vawt in, khamh dappha sia taw na khii khawm tu uh hi." 
Exodus28:15 “Pathian ii deina heak thei natu in, a kizangh awmdal khat Thiampi Lianbelpa atu in vawt in. Tuasia ephod vawtnate taw ma kibangin a kivawt, thiamngel taw a kizeam hi tu hi." 
Exodus28:16 A tung a phei a kikim king li nei thep nii in kithep tu a, centimetre 22 sau, centimetre 22 zai hi tu hi." 
Exodus28:17 Tua tungah suangmanpha ngual li in na suan tu a; ngual khatna ah ruby khat, topaz khat le garnet khat hi tu hi;" 
Exodus28:18 Ngual niina ah emerald khat, sapphire khat le diamond khat;" 
Exodus28:19 ngual thumna ah turquoise khat, agate khat le amethyst khat;" 
Exodus28:20 le ngual lina ah beryl khat, carnelian khat le jasper khat hi tu hi. Hite khamh dapphate sungah kisuang tu hi." 
Exodus28:21 Israel minamte taangin Jacob tapa khat tek ii min a ki at suang sawm le nii na koi tu hi. 
Exodus28:22 Awmdal atu in khauhual taw kibangin a kipheak khawm khamh ciitak khi ngui vawt in. 
Exodus28:23 Khamkual nii vawt in, awmdal tung sang kingte veve ah suan in." 
Exodus28:24 Tua khamh khauhual te nii sia, a kual te nii tungah khit in." 
Exodus28:25 A khauhual ii mong te nii sia dappha te nii tungah khit in a, tuaciang ephod ii liangkhai maisang ah thua in." 
Exodus28:26 Tuaciang khamh kual nii vawt in, awmdal a nuai king veve ephod mong sung sangah suan in." 
Exodus28:27 Khamkual nii vawt in, ephod maisang liangkhai nuai ah khitin pha tak a kitak kawngkhau tungah sawm in." 
Exodus28:28 Kawngkhau tungah pha tak a om thei natu le awmdal a kol ngawl natu in, awmdal khaute ephod khaute tungah khau vancii khat taw sawm khawm in." 
Exodus28:29 “Keima Topa in ka mite ka phawk tawntung natu in, Thiangtho Mun ah Aaron a tum ciang Israel minamte min a ki at awmdal silh tu hi." 
Exodus28:30 Tuabangin a thiangtho kong ompuina sungah Aaron hong pai ciang a ken thei tu in ama awmdal sungah Urim le Thummim koi in. Israel mite atu in ka deina a heak thei natu in tuabang hun ciangin tua awmdal ama in silh tawntung tu hi. 
Exodus28:31 “Ephod puan nuai ah silh tu puantual sia vancii samulpuan siuseu taw kivawt tu hi. 
Exodus28:32 Lu thun natu a vang om tu a, tua a vang kiimkot sia a ek ngawl natu in a kitak sa puan taw tuam thua tu hi." 
Exodus28:33 A nuai kiimkot ah vancii, a sandup le a san samul puan taw a kivawt talee nga te khamh tengeng te taw a kithatheak in koi in." 
Exodus28:34  
Exodus28:35 Aaron in thiampi na a sep ciang tua puantual silh tu hi. Ka ompuina Mun Thiangtho ah ama hong pai ciang ahibuale a pusua ciang tengeng nging kiza tu a, ama kithatlum ngawl tu hi." 
Exodus28:36 “Khamh ciitak taw kizepna khat vawt in a, a tungah ‘ Topa atu Kitavaw’ ci in at in." 
Exodus28:37 Tua kizepna sia lu khipdial mai ah vancii meal khau khat taw khit in. 
Exodus28:38 Mite in biakpiakna a vawt ciang khialna pawlkhat a vawt hial zong, Israel te ii kei tung hong aap biakpiakna theampo ka san natu in Aaron in tua kizepna sia a tal ah suang tu hi." 
Exodus28:39 “Puanneal pha taw Aaron laktong le lu khipdial le thiamngel taw a kizeam kawngsawmna khat zongh vawt in. 
Exodus28:40 “Aaron tapate ii vaang nei natu le et hoi natu in, laktong, kawngsawmna le lukhu vawt in." 
Exodus28:41 Hi puante na suapuipa Aaron le a tapate silhsak in. Tuaciang amate in ka na a seam thei thiampite ahi natu in thupha piak kipsakna le aapna in olive thau taw zut in. 
Exodus28:42 A ci a sa a kimu ngawl natu in a kawng pan a pheizang ciang a pha ngoaipuante khuisak in. 
Exodus28:43 Aaron le a tapate in a sealno teng a kimu hu in, thalupna a thuak ngawl natu in ka omna Puanbuk ah hong pai ciang ahibuale Mun Thiangtho ah thiampi naseam tu in biaknatau hong neak ciang tua ngoaipuan teang tawntung tu hi. Tua in Aaron le a suan a paalte atu in a zui tu ngeina kip ahi hi." 
Exodus29:1 “Aaron le a tapate ka na a seam thiampi tu in na aap ciang hi bangin na vawt tu hi. A mealhem ngawl khuital moi khat le tuutal nii keng in. 
Exodus29:2 Tol saw ngawl zungtaang vui phabel zangh in olive thau taw anluum pawlkhat, olive thau ngawl taw anluum pawlkhat le sathau taw a kizut moh pawlkhat vawt in." 
Exodus29:3 Tuate khum sungah koi in, khuital le tuutalte nii biakpiakna in na ngaw uh ciang hong pia tavun." 
Exodus29:4 “Aaron le a tapate kong ompuina Puanbuk tumna kongbiang ah hong paipui in, amate a zeksa kibualna neisak in." 
Exodus29:5 Tuaciang Aaron sia thiampi puante — laktong, ephod, ephod nuai ah a kisilh puantual silhsak in, awmdal le kawngkhau thuasak in." 
Exodus29:6 A lu tungah dial khimsakin, tua tungah, ‘ Topa atu Kitavaw’ a kici a thiangtho ki aapna lim kizepna sia suang in." 
Exodus29:7 Tuaciang noi sathau la in, a lu tungah buakin, noai in." 
Exodus29:8 “A tapate paipui in puante silhsak in; 
Exodus29:9 a kawng ah kawngsawmna khau sawm in, a lu tungah lukhu khusak in. Hi bangin Aaron le a tapate thiampi naseam tu in thupha pia in kipsak tu hi. Amate le a suan a paalte in a tawntungin thiampi panmun taw ka na seam tu uh hi." 
Exodus29:10 “Ka omna Puanbuk mai ah khuital hong paipui ta'n a, khuital lu tungah a khut a ngak natu in Aaron le a tapate son in." 
Exodus29:11 Tualai a thiangtho ka ompuina Puanbuk tumna kongbiang ah khuital ngo in. 
Exodus29:12 Khuital chi tawm la in, biaknatau dokte tungah na khutme taw noai in. Tuaciang a om lai teng biaknatau bul ah sung in." 
Exodus29:13 Tua zawkciang a sungthau theampo, a thin sa phabel na mun le, a nauta te nii le nauta a tuam a thaute la in, keima biakna in biaknatau tungah hal in." 
Exodus29:14 Ahizong khuital satak, a vun le a sungkua theampo ngiaphual pua sangah hal in. Tua in thiampite mawna teng phelsak natu biakpiakna ahi hi." 
Exodus29:15 “Tuutal khat hong paipui ta'n a, Aaron le a tapate in tuutal lu tungah a khut a ngak natu in sawl in." 
Exodus29:16 Tua tuutal ngoin, a chi la in biaknatau pangh li teng ah the in." 
Exodus29:17 A sa semin; a sungkua le a nung peangte sil in a, a lu le a sa dangte tungah koi in." 
Exodus29:18 Tuutal sa theampo biaknatau tungah an biakpiakna in hal in. Tua biakpiakna ii a ngimnam in keima hong lungkimsak hi. 
Exodus29:19 “Ki aapna in a kizangh tuutal — tuutal dangkhat sia — la in a, Aaron le a tapate in tua sia ii lu tungah a khut a ngak natu in sawl in." 
Exodus29:20 Tua tuutal ngoin, a chi tawm la in Aaron le a tapate bil ziatsang dawn, a ziatsang khutpi tung, le a ziatsang peangpi tungah noai in. A om lai chi teng biaknatau pangh li tengah the in." 
Exodus29:21 Biaknatau tungah a om chi tawm le noi sathau tawm la in Aaron le a puante tung, a tapate le a puante tungah the in. Aaron, a tapate le amate ii puante kei tungah hong ki aap tu hi." 
Exodus29:22 “Tuutal thau, a meici thau, a sungthau, a thinsa phabelna, a thau, a nautate nii le nauta a tuam a thau, a ziatsang phei hoaikeak in." 
Exodus29:23 Kei tungah nong piaksa anluum khum sung pan a nam simin: olive thau taw kivawt anluum khat, olive thau kihel ngawl anluum khat le moh phaang khat tek la vun." 
Exodus29:24 “Hi an theampo Aaron le a tapate khut sungah koi in a, kei tungah a letsong tuam khat in hong aap natu in son in." 
Exodus29:25 Tua zawkciang amate tung pan anluumte la in a, biaknatau tung, meihal biakpiakna tungah an taw keima nong biakpiakna in hal in. Hi biakpiakna ngimnam in keima hong lungkimsak hi." 
Exodus29:26 “Tuutal awmsa la in, kei tungah letsong tuam khat in nong aap tu hi. Hi tuu awmsa baak sia nangma atu ahi hi." 
Exodus29:27 “Thiampi khat thupha pia in a kikipsak ciang, a kizangh tuu awmsa le a pheisate sia keima tungah letsong tuam khat in nong aap tu a, thiampite atu in kikoituam tu hi." 
Exodus29:28 Hi thu a kikheal ngawl ka thukhenna hi a, ka mite in kipawlkhop biakpiakna a nei ciang, nganno awmsa le a pheisate thiampite neisa hi tu hi. Tua sa sia amate ii keima Topa tungah hong piak letsong ahi hi." 
Exodus29:29 “Aaron ii thiampi puante ama thi zawkciang a tapate tungah ki aap tu a, amate thupha piak kipsakna a kinei ciang a silh tu ahi hi." 
Exodus29:30 Thiampi seam tu in Aaron tapa in keima ompuina Puanbuk sung Thiangtho Mun ah hong pai ciang ni sali sung tua puante silh tu hi. 
Exodus29:31 “Aaron le a tapate thiampi kipsakna in a kizangh tuutal sate la in mun thiangtho ah huan in. 
Exodus29:32 Keima omna Puanbuk tumna kongbiang ah tua sate le khum sungah a taang anluumte nekhawm tu uh hi. 
Exodus29:33 Amate in thiampi kikipsak na ah, mawmaisakna taw kisai in a zeksa vawtna ante ne tu uh hi. Tua ante an thiangtho ahikom thiampite bek in ne tu hi." 
Exodus29:34 Sa ahizong, anluum ahizong zingsang dongin neakmong a om lai le kihal tu hi; tuate sia an thiangtho ahikom kine ngawl tu hi." 
Exodus29:35 “Aaron le a tapate atu in thupha piak kipsakna ngeinate kong thupiak bang linlian in ni sali sung vawt in. 
Exodus29:36 Mawna a kimaisak thei natu in ni simin khuital khat biakpiakna in pia nanak tu ni hi. Tua in biaknatau thiansua tu hi. Tua zawkciang a thiantho natu in olive thau noai in. 
Exodus29:37 Tuabangin ni sali sung ni simin vawt in. Tuasia ciang biaknatau sia thiangtho sitset tu a, tuasia a thutha mihing khat ahibuale na khat peuma biaknatau ii thianthona vaang in ngim ngasak tu hi." 
Exodus29:38 “Hong pai tu hun theampo ah ni simin biaknatau ah kum khat a pha tuuno nii biakpiakna in pia in. 
Exodus29:39 Zingsang in khat, nitakin khat biakpiakna in pia in." 
Exodus29:40 A masa tuu sia taw in olive thau thiang litre khat taw kihel anvui kilogramme khat pia khawm in. Biakpiakna in sapittui litre khat buak in. 
Exodus29:41 A niina tuu sia nitak biakpiakna in nei in, zingsang a bangma in anvui, olive thau le sapittui biakpiakna in pia in. Hi sia keima Topa an biakpiakna hi a, tua ii ngimnam in keima hong lungkimsak hi." 
Exodus29:42 Hong pai tu hun theampo ah hi meihal biakpiakna sia ka ompuina Puanbuk tumna kongbiang, keima mai ah hong kipia tu hi. Tua munah ka mite kong mu tu a, kong paupui tu hi." 
Exodus29:43 Tualai ah Israel mite ka mu tu a, kong ompuina khuavak taang velvol sia in tua mun thiangthosak tu hi." 
Exodus29:44 Puanbuk le biaknatau ka thiangthosak tu a, Aaron le a tapate in thiampi na seam tu in ka tuam koi tu hi." 
Exodus29:45 Israel mite sungah ka teang tu a, amate ii Pathian ka hi tu hi." 
Exodus29:46 Israel mite sungah ka teen thei natu in keima in Egypt pan amate a pusuapui Topa a Pathian ka hina amate in he tu uh hi. Keima in amate ii Pathian Topa ka hi hi. 
Exodus30:1 “Paaknamtui hal natu in biaknatau khat acacia thing taw vawt in. 
Exodus30:2 A sau centimetre 45, a zai centimetre 45, le a saang centimetre 90 hi tu a, a pangh kikim in kiing li nei tu hi. A kiing li in a dokte biaknatau taw sakhat hi tu hi." 
Exodus30:3 A sitna tung, a pangh li teng le a dokte khamh ciitak taw tuam in a, a mong kiimkot teng khamh taw zial in." 
Exodus30:4 A zawn natu thingpumte thun natu in khamh kual nii vawt in, a tungsang pangh a kiingte nii nuai ah bul in." 
Exodus30:5 A zawnna thingpumte acacia thing taw vawtin, khamh taw tuam in." 
Exodus30:6 Thuciamna Thingkuang mai ah a kikhai puankhaite pua sangah tua biaknatau koi in. Tua mun sia no kong mu natu mun ahi hi. 
Exodus30:7 Aaron in zing simin meivakte kinging tu hong pai ciang biaknatau tungah ngimnamtui hal tu hi. 
Exodus30:8 Ama in nitakin mei a det ciang tuabang ma in vawt tu hi. Hi ngimnamtui biakpiakna sia hong pai tu hun theampo tatsat ngawlin a vawt tu ahi hi. 
Exodus30:9 Hi biaknatau tungah a kikhaam ngimnamtui biakpiakna, nganhing biakpiakna ahibuale, antang taw biakpiakna bangma pia heak vun, Sapittui biakpiakna zongh buak heak vun." 
Exodus30:10 Mawphelna in a kipia nganhing chi, tua biaknatau dok lite tung a noina taw Aaron in kum khatin khatvei a zeksa biaknatau thiansuana vawt tu hi. Hi biakpiakna sia hong pai tu hun theampo kum simin kivawt tu hi. Keima Topa tungah hong ki aap hi biaknatau sia thiangtho sitset tu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus30:11 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Exodus30:12 “Israel mite ii mihing simna a nei ciang, a mi phaza a kisim laitak amate tungah tuasiatna a thet ngawl natu in mi theampo in a nuntakna ii man kei tungah hong pia tu uh hi." 
Exodus30:13 Mihing simna ah a kihel peuma in, a kizangh ngei khaikhin taw tee in a kinget za sum pia tu hi. A kuama po in tua sumte kei tungah biakpiakna in hong pia tu hi." 
Exodus30:14 Kum kul pan a tungsia a pha peuma mihing simna ah a kihel theampo in kei tungah tua sum hong pia tu hi. 
Exodus30:15 A nuntakna ii man hi sum a piak uh ciang a haute in a tamzaw, a zawngte in a tawmzaw ci bangin pia ngawl tu hi." 
Exodus30:16 Israel mite tung pan hi sum khon in a, ka ompuina Puanbuk puuaphatna in zangh in. Hi phiangshia sia a nuntakna ii man tu hi a, tuasia taw amate ka cin ka kep tu ka phawk tu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus30:17 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Exodus30:18 “Taaukuang khat le taau taw kivawt a ngakna khat vawt in. Puanbuk le biaknatau kilaklaw ah koi in a, a sungah tui koi in." 
Exodus30:19 Aaron le a tapate in tua tui a khut le a peangte silna in a zak tu hi a," 
Exodus30:20 amate puanbuk sung ahibuale biaknatau nai ah biakpiakna ante pia tu in a pai ma in kisil tu hi. Tuasia ciang amate kithatlum ngawl tu hi. 
Exodus30:21 Amate a thi ngawl natu in a khut le a peangte a sil kul hi. Hi ngeina sia amate le a suan a paalte in a tawntung a zui tu ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus30:22 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Exodus30:23 “A phabel hel namtuite — Myrrh paaknamtui tui kilogramme 6, a ngimnamtui thingzungthum kilogramme 3, tu ngimnamtui kilogramme 3," 
Exodus30:24 le cassia kilogramme 6 la in. (A vekpi in a ngitna sia a kizangh ngei khaikhin taw kitee hi tu hi.) Olive thau litre 4 belap in," 
Exodus30:25 paaknamtui hel bangin noi sathau thiangtho vawt in. 
Exodus30:26 Hi sathau sia ka ompuina Puanbuk, Thuciamna Thingkuang," 
Exodus30:27 sabuai le a na theampo, meikhuam le a na theampo, paaknamtui halna biaknatau," 
Exodus30:28 meihal biakpiakna biaknatau le a na theampo le kisilna kuang le a ngakna teng noai in. 
Exodus30:29 Hi nate hi bangin na aap tu uh a, tua hile thiangtho sitset tu hi. Tuate a thutha peuma tua thianthona vaang in ngim ngasak tu hi." 
Exodus30:30 Tuaciang Aaron le a tapate sathau noai in a, keima na a seam thiampi tu in thupha taw kipsak in." 
Exodus30:31 Israel mite tungah, ‘Hi a thiangtho noi sathau sia ka nasepna sung hong pai tu hun theampo ah kizangh top tu hi." 
Exodus30:32 Hi sathau sia nautaangte tungah na buak buatu uh a, hisia taw a kibang khat po vawt natu in hi sathau helzia sia ma na zangh buahet tu uh hi. Tuasia in thiangtho a, a thiangtho in na vawt kul hi." 
Exodus30:33 Hi sathau taw a kibang a vawt khat po ahibuale thiampi ahi ngawl khat pawpo tungah a zangh sia keima mi in kisim nawn ngawl tu hi,’ ci in” ci hi." 
Exodus30:34 Topa in Moses tungah, “A nuai a hel namtuite — stacte, onycha, galbanum le frankincense paaknamtui ciitak te a khen kikim tekin la in." 
Exodus30:35 Tua nate paaknamtui hel bangin, ngimnamtui vawtna ah zangh in. A sit ahi natu le a thiantho natu in ci saw in." 
Exodus30:36 Aheap sia suuvui in a, ka ompuina Puanbuk ah paipui in, Thuciamna Thingkuang mai ah the in. Hi ngimnamtui sia a thiangtho sinsen in ngaisun in." 
Exodus30:37 Tua paaknamtui taw kibangin noma atu khat po sia a helnazia sia ma zangh in na vawt buatu hi. Kei tungah hong ki aap a thiangtho na khat bangin ngaisun in. 
Exodus30:38 Tua paaknamtui taw kibangin zak tu khat po a vawt a om le keima mi in kisim nawn ngawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus31:1 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Exodus31:2 “Judah minam sung pan Hur ii tupa ahi, Uri ii tapa Bezalel ka teal zo a," 
Exodus31:3 ka vaangletna taw ama ka dimsak zo hi. Teltheina, thiamna, thiamneal tuatuam hi theina —" 
Exodus31:4 pungsaan ngeal thiamna tuatuamte le tuate sia khamh, ngunn, le taaute taw vawt theina ka pia zo hi." 
Exodus31:5 Suangmanpha atna, thing ngelhna; le a dang thiamneal tuatuamte sep thiamna zongh ka pia zo hi." 
Exodus31:6 Ama taw naseam khawm tu in Dan minam sung pan Ahisamach ii tapa Oholiab zongh ka teal zo hi. Vawt tu in kong thupiak theampo a vawt thei natu in a dang khutthiamte zongh thiamna nasia tak ka pia zo hi: 
Exodus31:7 a vawt tute sia ka ompuina Puanbuk, Thuciamna Thingkuang le a sitna, Puanbuk sung vanh theampo," 
Exodus31:8 sabuai le a vanhte, khamh ciitak taw kivawt meikhuam le a vanh theampo, ngimnamtui hal natu biaknatau," 
Exodus31:9 meihal piak natu biaknatau le a na zak theampo, khut silna kuang le a ngakna," 
Exodus31:10 Aaron le a tapate ii thiampi a sep ciang a silh tu thiampi puan manphate," 
Exodus31:11 noi sathau le Mun Thiangtho ah zak tu ngimnamtuite ahi hi. Hi teng a vawt ciang, na tungah kong thupiak bang tatakin amate in vawt tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus31:12 Topa in Moses tungah 
Exodus31:13 Israel mite tungah a son tu in, “Ka tawlngak ni ahi Sabbath na tang vun, banghang ziam cile tua ni sia hong pai tu hun theampo sung Keima, Topa in note keima mi in kong vawt hunlam a kilangh natu in keima le note kilaklaw ah lim khat ahi hi." 
Exodus31:14 Tawlngakna ni sia na tan kul tu hi, banghang ziam cile tua ni sia thiangtho hi. Khat po in tua ni tang ngawlin na a seam le, kithatlum tu hi." 
Exodus31:15 Ni luk sung nasep tu hun na nei uh a, ahizong ni sali ni sia a ciliap huai tawlngak ni, keima atu in a kikoituam ni ahi hi. Khat po in tua ni in na a seam le, kithatlum tu hi." 
Exodus31:16 Israel mite in tua ni sia thuciamna lim khatin tang tu hi. 
Exodus31:17 Tua thu in keima le Israel mite kilaklaw ah a kip tawntung lim ahi hi, banghang ziam cile Keima, Topa in vantung le leitung ni luk sung ka vawt a, ni sali ni in na seam ngawlin ka tawlnga hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus31:18 Sinai Mual tungah Pathian in Moses a paupui zawkciang, Pathian ama tatak ii thupiak teng a tungah a at sa suangpheakte nii sia Moses pia hi." 
Exodus32:1 Moses mual tungah ngei hialma om in hong tuaksuk ngawl sia mipite in a mu ciang Aaron kungah kikhawmin ama tungah, “Egypt pan lam hong pui Moses hisia pa bang tat ziam ih he bua hi; tua ahikom eite lam hong pui tu in pathian khat hong vawtsak ta'n,” ci uh hi." 
Exodus32:2 Aaron in amate tungah, “Na zite, na tapate le na tanute ii a baa khamh bilbaate suutin kei kungah hong paipui tavun,” ci hi." 
Exodus32:3 Tuaciang mi theampo in a khamh bilbaate suutin Aaron kungah paipui uh hi. 
Exodus32:4 Aaron in tua bilbaate la in tuisak a, khui milim vawtna sungah sung in khamh khuitalno khat vawt hi. Mipite in, “Israel awng, hisia in Egypt pan hong pusuapui ih pathian ahi hi!” ci uh hi." 
Exodus32:5 Tua zawkciang Aaron in khamh khuital mai ah biaknatau khat vawtin, “Zing ciangin Topa patoaina in poai kikhaam tu hi,” ci in taangko hi." 
Exodus32:6 A zing ciang zingtuungin amate in nganhing pawlkhat sangaw meihal biakpiak natu le a dangte sia kipawlkhop biakpiakna ah neak tu in hong paipui uh hi. Tua poai ah mite tokhawm in etlawm ngawl za dongin neakna dawnna le numei le pa paktatna suaksak uh hi. 
Exodus32:7 Topa in Moses tungah, “Manlang in ciasuk ta'n, banghang ziam cile Egypt pan na paipui na mite khialin kei hong nial uh hi." 
Exodus32:8 A zui tu in ka thupiak lampi pan pial zo hi; khamh khuital vawtin bia uh a, sangaw biakpiakna pia zo uh hi. Amate in hisia Egypt pan a pusua pui amate ii pathian hi ci uh hi." 
Exodus32:9 Hi mihingte thinpuizia ka he hi. 
Exodus32:10 Tu in, kei hong tho tu hanciam heak in. Amate tungah ka thin uuk a, ka mongsak tu hi. Tua zawkciang nangma le na suan na paalte minam lian khatin kong vawt tu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus32:11 Ahizong Moses in Topa a Pathian tungah hesuak ngenin, “ Topa awng, na thahatna le na vaangletna taw Egypt pan na suatak, na mite tungah banghangin na thin uuksak mama thong ni ziam?" 
Exodus32:12 A mite mual tungah that in a mot nop manin, nangma in Egypt pan pusua pui hi banghang Egypt te in ci theisak tu ni ziam? Na thin uuk thaisak in; na ngaisutna kheal in a, na mite tungah tuasiatna tungsak heak in." 
Exodus32:13 Na naseamte ahi, Abraham, Isaac le Jacob phawk in. Amate tungah ciliap huai takin na kamciam ahi, a suan a paalte van ah aksi za in tam tu a, a suan a paalte in na khapsa ngam theampo a tawntungin amate ii neisa hi tu hi, na ci thute phawk in,” ci hi." 
Exodus32:14 Tua ahiciang Topa in a ngaisutna khealin, a mite tungah a tawn bangin tuasiatna tungsak ngawl hi." 
Exodus32:15 Mualtung pan Moses tuaksuk a, thupiakte a mai lang le lang ah a ki at suangpheakte nii toai hi." 
Exodus32:16 Hi suangpheakte Pathian vawt hi a, a tungah thupiakte ama mama ii khet sa ahi hi." 
Exodus32:17 Mipite auna Joshua in za a, Moses tungah, “Ngiaphual sungah ngal kisimna aw ka za hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus32:17 Mipite auna Joshua in za a, Moses tungah, “Ngiaphual sungah ngal kisimna aw ka za hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus32:18 Moses in, “Tua aw sia ngalzawna aw le hi ngawl, ngallelna aw zongh hi ngawl a; tua sia lasakna aw hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus32:19 Moses ngiaphual nai ah hong pai in khuital milim le mihingte lap a mu ciang a thinso hi. Tualai mualpeang ah, a toai suangpheakte nii lei denna nei in tamhthamsak hi." 
Exodus32:20 Moses in amate vawt khuital no la in, tuisak a, ngoaivui in tui taw hel hi. Tua zawkciang ama in tua tui Israel mite nesak hi." 
Exodus32:21 Ama in Aaron munah, “Amate in tuabang a cizathuai mawna na vawtsak natu in nang bang hong law ziam?” ci hi." 
Exodus32:22 Aaron in, “Kei tungah hong thin uuk heak in; hi mihingte ii siatna a vawt nop hamtang sia he ni hi." 
Exodus32:23 Amate in kei tungah, ‘Egypt pan hong pusuapui hi mipa Moses bang tat ziam, ih he bua hi; tua ahiciang kote hong lampui tu in pathian khat hong vawtsak ta'n, hong ci uh hi.’" 
Exodus32:24 Amate ii kizepna manpha khamhte hong paipui natu in ka sawl a, a nei peuma in suutin kei hong pia uh hi. Tua a manpha kizepnate mei sungah ka vawk a, khuitalno milim suak hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Exodus32:25 Aaron in a mite uk zawk pang ngawl a omsak sia le, a ngalte mai ah a mawmaw bangin a omsakna thu Moses in mu hi." 
Exodus32:26 Tua ahiciang Moses in ngiaphual kongpi ah dingin au a, “ Topa sangah a pang peuma hi lai ah hong pai tavun!” ci hi. Tuasia ciang Levi mite theampo ama kungah kikhawm uh a," 
Exodus32:27 Moses in amate tungah, “Israel te Topa Pathian in na namsau tek taw hi ngiaphual kongpi pan a langkhat dong pai in, na suapuite, na ngualtamhte le na innpaamte thatlum tu in note theampo hong sawl hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus32:28 Levi mite in a thu ni a, tua ni in mihing tulthum bang thatlum uh hi." 
Exodus32:29 Moses in Levi te tungah, “ Topa ii nasepna sungah thiampite a seam tu in na tapate, na suapuite na thalupna uh taw in noma tek tuni in kipumpiak zo na hi uh kom, Topa in note a thupha hong pia zo hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus32:30 A zing ciang Moses in mipite tungah, “A cizathuai mawna khat vawt zo nu hi. Ahizong tu in mualtung Topa kungah ka na paito kik tu a; note mawmai natu nga thei tha tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus32:31 Tuaciang Topa kungah Moses heakkik in, “Hi mite in a cizathuai mawna vawt zo hi. Amate in khamh taw pathian khat vawt in bia uh hi." 
Exodus32:32 Nong hesuakna in a mawna maisak in; ahizong na maisak zo buatu le, na mite min na khumna laibu sung pan ka min hong phiat ta'n,” ci hi." 
Exodus32:33 Topa in, “Ka tungah mawna a neite bek ka laibu sung pan a min ka phiat tu hi." 
Exodus32:34 Tu in pai in kong sonna munah mihingte paipui in. Ka vantunglalang in lam hong lak tu phawkin a, ahizong a hun a cin ciang hi mihingte a mawna daan ka pia tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Exodus32:35 Tua ahikom, Topa in mite tungah natna tungsak hi, banghang ziam cile amate in Aaron khamh khuitalno milim a vawtsak hang ahi hi." 
Exodus33:1 Topa in Moses tungah, “Nangma le Egypt pan na pusuapui mite in hi mun nusia in, Abraham, Isaac, Jacob le a suan a paalte tungah piak tu a, ka kamciamna munah pai tavun." 
Exodus33:2 Vantunglalang khat note lam hong lak tu in kong puak tu a, Canaan te, Amor te, Hit te, Periz te, Hiv te le Jebus te ka notkeak tu hi." 
Exodus33:3 Note ngampha le ngamnuam ah pai tu nu hi. Ahizong kei note taw kong pai buatu hi, banghang ziam cile mihing thinpuite na hi uh a, lampi ah kong mon tha tu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus33:4 Hi thu mite in a zaak uh ciang amate khuangai in, suangmanpha kizepna te bun nawn ngawl uh hi." 
Exodus33:5 Amate tungah Moses ii a son natu in Topa in, “Note sia mihing thinpuite hi nu hi. Note taw tawmveino sung ih kithawl bek zong kong mon tha tu hi. Tu in na suangmanpha kizepnate suut vun, tuaciang note tungah ka sep tu sia ka khensat tu hi,” ci in a thupiak hang hi." 
Exodus33:6 Tua ahikom, Sinai Mual a nusiat zawkciang, Israel mite in suangmanpha kizepnate bun nawn ngawl uh hi." 
Exodus33:7 Israel mihingte ii ngiaphual a saat simin Moses in a Puanbuk thiangtho la in ngiaphual pan a khuala thithim na munah koi hi. Tua in Topa ii ompuina Puanbuk kici a, Topa thu a dongh nuamte in tua munah pai uh hi." 
Exodus33:8 Tualai ah Moses a pai simin, mipite a Puanbuk kongbiang ah ding tek a, Moses a sungtan dong en uh hi." 
Exodus33:9 A sungah Moses a tum zawkciang, meeikhuam tuaksuk in Puanbuk kongbiang ah tawlnga a, Topa in meei sung pan Moses paupui hi." 
Exodus33:10 Mipite in Puanbuk kongbiang ah meeikhuam a mu po ciang kun uh hi. 
Exodus33:11 Ngualtamh khat thuson tu bang keakin maitang kisi a Topa in Moses paupui hi. Tuaciang Moses ngiaphual ah heak kik hi. Ahizong Nun ii tapa, ama a hu, tangvalpa Joshua sia Puanbuk sungah om lai hi." 
Exodus33:11 Ngualtamh khat thuson tu bang keakin maitang kisi a Topa in Moses paupui hi. Tuaciang Moses ngiaphual ah heak kik hi. Ahizong Nun ii tapa, ama a hu, tangvalpa Joshua sia Puanbuk sungah om lai hi." 
Exodus33:12 Moses in Topa tungah, “Tua ngam ah hi mihingte lampui tu in nong sawlna thu thumaan ahi hi, ahizong kei taw a paikhawm tu sia nong son bua hi. Nangma in kei, nong telthiang a, dik kong sa hi nong ci zo hi." 
Exodus33:13 Tu in tuabang na hile, na tupnate hong son ta'n, tua hile nangma na seamin, kong lungkimsak tawntung tu hi. Hi minam nangma atu in na tealsa a hina thu zongh phawk in,” ci hi." 
Exodus33:14 Topa in, “Nang taw ka paikhawm tu a, zawna kong pia tu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus33:15 Moses in, “Kote taw nong paikhawm bua ahile, hi mun hong nusiasak heak in." 
Exodus33:16 Kote nong tonpui bua ahile, keima le na mite tungah na lungkimna thu akua in bangbangin hong he tu ziam? Kote nong ompuina in leitung midangte sung pan kote hong kilamdangsak tu hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Exodus33:17 Topa in Moses tungah, “Nong nget sa bangin kong seam tu hi, banghang ziam cile nang kong tel sitset a, na tungah ka lungkim hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus33:18 Tuasia ciang Moses in, “Hesuakna taw nong ompuina khuavak taang velvol sia hong musak ta'n,” ci in ngen hi." 
Exodus33:19 Topa in, “Note mai ah, ka phatna teng kong paipui tu a, noma omna ah ka min thiangtho kong thangsak tu hi. Keima in Topa ka hi a, mulkimna le hesuakna ka teal mite tungah ka lak hi." 
Exodus33:20 Ka maitang kong musak buatu hi, banghang ziam cile ka maitang a mu peuma, nungta ngawl tu hi." 
Exodus33:21 Ahizong suang khat tungah na din thei natu in, ka kungah mun khat om hi." 
Exodus33:22 Kong ompuina khuavak taang velvol sia in nang hong kaantan ciang, suanghawng sungah nang kong koi tu a, kong kaantan zawk mateng ka khut taw nang kong hum tu hi." 
Exodus33:23 Tua zawkciang ka khut ka dok tu a, ka nung teng na mu tu hi, ahizong ka mai na mu buatu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Exodus34:1 Topa in Moses tungah, “A masate taw kibangin suangpheak nii vawt in a, na tapsak suangpheak masate tungah kammal teng tuate nii tungah ka at tu hi." 
Exodus34:2 Kithoai in a, Sinai Mualdawn ah kei taw kimu tu in zingsang ciang hong paito ta'n." 
Exodus34:3 Khat zongh kaato pui heak in a; mual tung koima ah kuama omsak heak in; tuu ahizong, khui ahizong, mualpeang ah tha heak in,” ci hi." 
Exodus34:4 Tuaciang Moses in suangpheak nii vawt a, Topa thupiak bang tatakin a zing ciang zingtuung in Sinai Mual tungah puato hi." 
Exodus34:5 Meeilom khat sungah Topa hong tuaksuk a, tualai ah ama taw ding khawmin, Topa ci in a min thiangtho thangsak hi." 
Exodus34:6 Topa in Moses mai kaantan a, tuaciang ama samin, “Keima in mulkimna le hesuakna taw a kidim Topa Pathian khat ka hi hi, ka thin uuk hakin, itna lian le thumaanna a lakpa ka hi hi." 
Exodus34:7 Ka kamciamte khang tul tam mama te tungah ka len a, siatna le mawna ka maisak hi; ahizong a pate a nute mawnate hangin tate le tute tungah, khang thum khang li dongin daan ka pia tu hi,” ci in pualaak hi." 
Exodus34:8 Moses in lei ah manlang tak kunsuk in bia hi. 
Exodus34:9 Ama in, “ Topa awng, kei tungah nong lungkim takpi ahile kote taw hong paikhawm ta'n. Hi mihingte thinpui hi, ahizong kote siatna le mawna hong maisak ta'n a, nangma aituam mihing in hong saang ta'n,” ci hi." 
Exodus34:10 Topa in Moses tungah, “Tu in Israel mite taw thuciamna khat ka vawt hi. Hi leitung minamte sungah a kivawt ngeingawl na thupite amate mai ah ka vawt tu hi. Keima, Topa ii na thupi ka vawt theinate mihing theampo in hong mu tu uh hi, banghang ziam cile note atu in nalamdang khat ka vawt tu hi." 
Exodus34:11 Tuni in kong piak thukhamte zui vun. Note maisang na manaw uh ciangin Amor te, Canaan te, Hit te, Periz te, Hiv te le Jebus te ka notkeak tu hi." 
Exodus34:12 Na thetna ngam ah a teang mihingte taw thukimna khote vawt heak vun, banghang ziam cile tuasia in note atu in thi theina thaang suak tu hi." 
Exodus34:13 Tua luangin a biaknataute baltham in, a khuam thiangthote lalcipsakin numeipathian Asherah milimte saattan vun." 
Exodus34:14 “Pathian dang bia heak vun, banghang ziam cile Keima, Topa in kidempui dang ka dei bua hi." 
Exodus34:15 Tua ngammite taw thukimna khote bangma vawt heak vun, banghang ziam cile doai biate ii pathiante tungah sangaw biakpiakna a nei ciang, pathian biakpiakna an ne tu in hong sam tu a, note hong ze et tu hi." 
Exodus34:16 Na tapate in tua ngamdang numeite teenpui tha tu a, amate in kei tungah a thumaan ngawl natu le a doai pathiante a biak natu in na tapate lam khialpui tha tu hi." 
Exodus34:17 “Thik taw kivawt pathiante vawtin bia heak vun. 
Exodus34:18 Tol saw ngawl Anluum Poaipi vawt suak vun. Kong thupiak bangin, Abib tha ni sali sung tol saw ngawl anluum ne vun, banghang ziam cile tua tha in Egypt pan pusuak nu hi." 
Exodus34:19 Tapa suakciil le inn nganhing no suakciil a pa theampo keima aa ahi hi. 
Exodus34:20 Ahizong laa a suakciil pawpo sia a taangin tuu khat pia in lei kik tu nu hi. Na lei kik bua uh ahile a ngawng thiaktan vun. Tapaciil peuma lei kik vun. Biakpiakna khat a keng ngawl peuma ka mai ah hong kilaak heak hen. 
Exodus34:21 Ni luk sung noma na sep tu hun na nei uh a, ahizong lothaw hun le anlaak hun ngawngawn in ni sali ni in naseam heak vun." 
Exodus34:22 Na mangtaang anpal na laak kipat ciang Anlaak Poaipi khaamin, tangngam sung thingnga na kaikhop ciang Buk Poaipi khaam vun." 
Exodus34:23 Kum khatin thumvei, Keima Topa Israel te ii Pathian bia tu in na mi, pasal a minpiang nong pai tu uh hi." 
Exodus34:24 Note mai ah minamte notkeak in, na ngam kong keaksak zawkciang, poai khaam thumvei hun sung teng kuama in na ngam hong zaw tu hanciam ngawl tu hi." 
Exodus34:25 Nganhing taw biakpiakna nong nei uh ciang tol saw anluum hong pia heak vun. Paisan Poaipi hunsung na ngaw uh nganhing sa peuma a zingsang ciang dong koi heak vun. 
Exodus34:26 Kum simin na laak anpal sia Topa inn sungah hong paipui tavun. Tuuno ahizong kealno ahizong a pui noaitui sungah huan heak vun. 
Exodus34:27 Topa in Moses tungah, “Hi kammalte at in, banghang ziam cile nangma le Israel mite tungah thuciamna ka vawt sia, hi kammalte kibulphu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus34:28 Tualai ah Moses an le tui ne ngawlin, sun sawmli le zan sawmli sung Topa taw omkhawm hi. Moses in Thupiak Sawmte ahi- thuciamna kammalte suangpheak tungah at hi." 
Exodus34:29 Moses in Thupiak Sawmte toai in, Sinai Mual pan hong tuaksuk ciang Topa taw kipaupui ahikom a maitang taang hi; ahihang ama in a taan hunlam he ngawl hi." 
Exodus34:30 Aaron le mihingte theampo in Moses maitang taang a mu ciang lau in neak ngam ngawl uh hi. 
Exodus34:31 Ahizong Moses in amate sam a, Aaron le taangpi lampuite theampo ama kungah pai in Moses in paupui hi." 
Exodus34:32 Tua zawkciang Israel mite theampo ama kungah kikhawm in, Topa ii Sinai Mual ah a piak thukham theampo Moses in amate tungah pia hi." 
Exodus34:33 Moses in thuson a man zawkciang dial khat taw a mai seal hi. 
Exodus34:34 Topa paupui tu in Topa ompuina Puanbuk sungah Moses a pai simin, a dial hawk hi. Hong pusua ciang son tu in, a thupiak theampo Israel mite tungah son a," 
Exodus34:35 amate in a maitang taang sia mu uh hi. Tuaciang Topa paupui tu in a pai kik dong dial taw a mai seal hi. 
Exodus35:1 Moses in Israel taangpi taangta bup kaikhawm in amate tungah, “Hi thu sia na ngamtat natu uh Topa thupiak ahi hi:" 
Exodus35:2 ni luk sung noma na, na seam tu uh a, ahizong ni sali ni sia ni thiangtho hi tu a, keima, na Topa atu a kikoituam, a ciliaphuai tawlngak ni hi tu hi. Tua ni in na a seam peuma kithatlum tu hi." 
Exodus35:3 Sabbath ni in na inn uh ah mei ngawngawn thut ngawl tu nu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus35:4 Moses in Israel mite theampo tungah, “Hisia Topa thupiak ahi hi:" 
Exodus35:5 Topa tungah piakkhiat khat nei vun. A pia nuam peuma in, khamh, ngunn, taau;" 
Exodus35:6 puan neal; vancii, a sandup le a san samul puan; kealmul taw a kivawt puan;" 
Exodus35:7 a san kinimh tuutal vun; savun neal; acacia thing; 
Exodus35:8 meidet sathau; noi sathau atu le ngimnamtui atu hel namtuite; 
Exodus35:9 ephod le Thiampi Lianbel ii awmdal ah bul tu suangmanpha san le a dang suangmanphate paipui tu nu hi. 
Exodus35:10 “Note sung pan thiamna nei naseam mi theampo hong pai in Topa thupiak theampo vawt hen: 
Exodus35:11 Puanbuk, a sitna le a puasang sitna, a vanh khaina koaite le a kalte, a zawlte, a khuamte le a tawdapte;" 
Exodus35:12 Thuciamna Thingkuang, a puakna thingpumte, a sitna le a dalna puankhai;" 
Exodus35:13 sabuai, a puakna thingpumte le a vanh theampo; Pathian a piak anluum;" 
Exodus35:14 meidet natu meikhuam le a vanhte, meiinnte le meidet sathau," 
Exodus35:15 ngimnamtui halna tu biaknatau le a puakna thingpumte; noi sathau; ngimnamtui; Puanbuk kongbiang puankhai; 
Exodus35:16 meihal biakpiak natu biaknatau le a saaksai, a zawnna thingpumte le a vanh teng; kisilna kuang le a ngakna;" 
Exodus35:17 a doituam atu puankhaite, a khuamte le a tawdapte; a doituam tumna kongbiang puankhai;" 
Exodus35:18 Puanbuk le doituam atu khetphinte le khaute; 
Exodus35:19 Tuaciang Thiangtho Mun ah thiampite in na a sep ciang a silh tu a tuanngen, a et hoi puante — thiampi Aaron le a tapate atu puan thiangthote a vawt tu ahi hi." 
Exodus35:20 Israel mite theampo cia siat a," 
Exodus35:21 tuaciang Topa ii ompuina Puanbuk a vawt nuam peuma in Topa tungah piakkhiatna khat keng tek hi. Amate in biakna tu in a kisamh le thiampi puante vawt natu in a kisamh vanhte theampo hong paipui uh hi. 
Exodus35:22 Piak nopna thin a nei numei le pasal te in kizepna phinte, bilbaate, khutzungbute, khite le khamh suang manpha namcinte paipui in, Topa tungah aap uh hi." 
Exodus35:23 Puan neal; vancii, a sandup, a san samul puan; kealmul puan; a san a kinimh tuutal ii vun; ahibuale savun neal paipui uh hi." 
Exodus35:24 Ngunn ahizong, taau ahizong a pia theite in Topa atu in pia tek a, nasep natu khat pawpo ah a kizangh thei tu acacia thing a nei peuma in hong paipui tek uh hi." 
Exodus35:25 Thiamneal vawt thei numei theampo in amate vawtsa puan neal, khau le samul khau vancii, a sandup le a sante hong paipui uh hi." 
Exodus35:26 Amate in kealmul taw khauzam zongh vawt uh hi. 
Exodus35:27 A lampuite in ephod le awmdal ah a bul tu in suangmanpha san le a dang suangmanpha te," 
Exodus35:28 tuaciang meidet sathau, noi sathau le a ngimnamtuite atu in hel namtuite le sathau hong paipui uh hi." 
Exodus35:29 Topa in Moses tungah nasep tu a thupiak bangin, a pia nuam Israel mite theampo in Topa tungah a piakkhiatna tek hong paipui uh hi." 
Exodus35:30 Moses in Israel te tungah, “Judah minam sung pan Hur ii tupa ahi, Uri ii tapa Bezalel Topa in teal zo hi." 
Exodus35:31 Topa in Bezalel sia ama ii vaangletna taw kidimsakin, khutthiamna, hi theina, le thiamneal nasep tuatuamte heaktheina," 
Exodus35:32 pungsaan ngeal thiamna tuatuamte le tua teng khamh, ngunn, le taaute taw vawt theina;" 
Exodus35:33 kizepna suangmanpha tat thiamna; thingngel thiamna le thiamneal nasep tuatuamte pia hi. 
Exodus35:34 Topa in ama, Bezalel le Dan minam sung pan Ahisamach ii tapa Oholiab tungah midangte khutthiamna a hil tu in pilna pia zo hi." 
Exodus35:35 Topa in amate tungah khutthiamte, a ngeal thiamte, le thiamtak thiamte, vancii, a dup au le a san tuumul le a dang puante theampo sep thiamna pia zo hi. Amate in nasep namkim seam thei in, a ngeal thiamte ahi uh hi." 
Exodus36:1 “Bezalel, Oholiab, le Puanbuk thianthosak natu a kisamh theampo vawt tu zia a he te, Topa ii thiamna le heaktheina a piak khutthiam dangte theampo in Topa thupiak bang linlianin na theampo seam tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus36:2 Moses in Bazalel, Oholiab le Topa ii hi theina a piak khutthiamna a nei midangte le nasep a hu nuamte sam a, nasep kipan tu in sawl hi." 
Exodus36:3 Amate in Israel te ii Puanbuk thianthosak natu in a paipui piakkhiatna theampo Moses tung pan nga siat hi. Ahihang Israel mite in a piaksate zing simin Moses tungah pia tawntung lai hi. 
Exodus36:4 Tua zawkciang khutthiamna nei tua nasep a seam mite pai in," 
Exodus36:5 Moses tungah, “ Topa ii hong thupiak nasepna atu in a kisamh za sang a tamzaw vanh, mihingte in hong paipui uh hi,” ci in zasak uh hi." 
Exodus36:6 Tua ahiciang, Moses in ngiaphual tengah Puanbuk thiangtho atu in kuama ii a piak thua ngawl natu thupia hi; tuasia ciang, mihingte in pia nawn ngawl hi." 
Exodus36:7 Hong paipui sa teng, nasep theampo zaw natu in kicing vaal liang hi." 
Exodus36:8 Naseamte sung pan khutthiambel teng in Topa ii ompuina Puanbuk vawt uh hi. Amate in tua puanbuk sia vancii, a sandup, le a san samul taw a kitak cherub limte taw thiamngel puanneal bek 10 taw vawt uh hi." 
Exodus36:9 Tua puante a letna kibangin, metre 12 sau in, metre 2 beak hi." 
Exodus36:10 Amate in puandal nga teng khuikhawmin, a dang nga teng zongh a kibangin khuikhawm uh hi." 
Exodus36:11 Amate in tua puante nii puasang mong tengah vanci puan taw bilvangte vawt uh hi. 
Exodus36:12 Puan khat tungah bilvang sawmnga vawtin, a khat sia tung zongh ah sawmnga ma vawt uh hi." 
Exodus36:13 Amate in tua puante nii a pe natu in khamh kual sawmnga vawt uh hi. 
Exodus36:14 Tuaciang amate in Puanbuk sitna tu in kealmul taw kivawt puan sawm le khat vawt uh hi. 
Exodus36:15 Tua puante kikimsak siatin, metre 13 sau in, metre 2 beak hi." 
Exodus36:16 Amate in tua puante nga ciang khatin khuikhawmin, a dang luk teng khatin khuikhawm uh hi." 
Exodus36:17 Amate in tua puante a khakbel sia mong ah bilvang sawmnga vawt uh a, a dang khat sia tungah bilvang sawmnga ma vawt uh hi." 
Exodus36:18 A sitna sa khat a suak tu in tua puante nii a pe natu in amate in taaukual sawmnga vawt uh hi. 
Exodus36:19 Puanbuk sitna tu in amate in a san taw a kinimh tuutal ii vun taw a kivawt khat le savun neal taw a kivawt a puasang sitna khat, a sitna nii vawt thua uh hi." 
Exodus36:20 Amate in Puanbuk a kalpheak tu in acacia thing zangh uh hi. 
Exodus36:21 A mungte metre li saangin, centimetre 66 beak hi," 
Exodus36:22 a kalte khat le khat a kipee natu in a meang nii neisak hi. A kalpheakte tuabangin kivawt siat hi. 
Exodus36:23 Amate in thang sang atu a kalpheak kul," 
Exodus36:24 a meangte khat le khat a kipee natu in khat ii nuai ah ngunn tawdap nii veu, ngunn tawdap sawmli vawt uh hi." 
Exodus36:25 Puanbuk saksang atu a kalpheak kul," 
Exodus36:26 a mung khat ii nuai ah ngunn tawdap nii veu, ngunn tawdap 40 vawt uh hi." 
Exodus36:27 Puanbuk nitumna nungsang atu in a kalpheak luk 
Exodus36:28 a kingte ah a kalpheak nii vawt uh hi. 
Exodus36:29 A king ah a kalpheakte a bul pan pee in a dawn dongin kizomsak hi. Tua king nii a piangsak a kalpheakte nii sia tuabang ma in kivawt hi. 
Exodus36:30 Tuabangin a kalpheak liat om in, mung khat ciang tawdap nii tek ngunn tawdap sawm le luk om hi." 
Exodus36:31 Amate in acacia thingzawl sawm le nga, puanbuk a kalpheakte atu in pangh khat ah zawl nga veu," 
Exodus36:32 a langkhat ah a kalpheak nga le a nungsang nitumna sangah a kalpheak nga vawt uh hi. 
Exodus36:33 A kalpheakte ii lang khenna san pan a kithung zawlsau sia puanbuk mong khat pan mong khat dong a tuantung hi. 
Exodus36:34 Amate in a kalpheakte khamh taw tuamin, khamh taw ma a kituam a zawlte a len tu in khamh kualte thua uh hi." 
Exodus36:35 Amate in vancii, a sandup le samul san taw a kitak cherubim lim taw thiamngel puanneal puankhai khat vawt uh hi." 
Exodus36:36 Amate in puankhai khat khak natu in khamh taw a kizut, khamh koai taw a kithua acacia thing khuam li vawt uh hi. Tuaciang khuamte a len tu in ngunn tawdap li vawt uh hi." 
Exodus36:37 Amate in Puanbuk tumna kongbiang tu in vancii puan neal, a sandup le a san samul taw a kitak, thiamngel taw a zep puankhai khat vawt uh hi." 
Exodus36:38 Tua puankhai atu amate in a koaite taw a kithua, a dawn teng le a ciangte khamh taw a kituam khuam nga vawtin, tua khuamte atu in taau tawdap nga vawt uh hi." 
Exodus37:1 Bezalel in a sau centimetre 110, a zai centimetre 66 le a saang centimetre 66 a pha Thuciamna Thingkuang sia acacia thing taw vawt hi." 
Exodus37:2 Ama in khamh ciitak taw a sung a pua tuamin, a kiil kiimkot teng khamh taw zial hi." 
Exodus37:3 Tua thingkuang puak natu in ama in khamh kual li vawtin, a lang ah kual nii veve khuam peang li tungah bul hi." 
Exodus37:4 Ama in a puak natu in acacia thingpumte vawt a, khamh taw tuamin," 
Exodus37:5 kuang pangh ah a kibul a kualte sungah thun hi. 
Exodus37:6 Ama in a sitna sia a sau centimetre 110, a zai centimetre 66 in khamh ciitak taw vawt hi." 
Exodus37:7 Ama in sek taw a kiseak khamh taw cherub niite lim vawtin," 
Exodus37:8 a sitna mong ah khat veu koi hi. Ama in a sitna taw sakhat suak tu in vawt hi. 
Exodus37:9 Cherub te thingkuang sitna tungah khat le khat kimai ngatin a tha phalh a, kuang sitna liap siat hi." 
Exodus37:10 Ama in a sauna centimetre 88, a zaina centimetre 44, le a saanna centimetre 66 a pha sabuai sia acacia thing taw vawt hi." 
Exodus37:11 Ama in tuasia khamh ciitak taw tuamin, a king kiimkot teng khamh taw zial hi." 
Exodus37:12 A kiimkot millimetre 75 zai a mong tuamna vawt a, khamh taw zuut hi." 
Exodus37:13 Ama in tua sabuai zawnna tu in khamh kual li vawtin, a peang omna king li teng ah bul hi." 
Exodus37:14 A kualte sabuai zawnna thingpumte thun natu ahikom a mong tuamna taw a kinaina ah koi hi. 
Exodus37:15 A zawnna thingpumte acacia thing hi a, khamh taw tuam hi." 
Exodus37:16 Ama in sabuai atu a vawt khamh taw kivawt kuangte: pakante, haite, haitungte, le bealte sia sapittui taw biakpiakna in zak tu ahi hi." 
Exodus37:17 Ama in khamh ciitak taw meikhuam vawt hi. A bul le a khuam sia a kiseak khamh taw vawtin, a zepna paakte, a mom le a paakpalhte zongh a khuam taw kisakhat siat hi." 
Exodus37:18 A pangh pan baak luk zaamsakin, a lang le a lang ah baak thum veve om hi." 
Exodus37:19 Baak luk te khat simin almond paakmom le a paakpalhte taw a kibang a zepna paakte thum tek nei hi. 
Exodus37:20 Tua meikhuam in almond paakmom le a paakpalh taw a kibang a zepna paakte li nei hi. 
Exodus37:21 A baak kop thum sim ii nuai ah a mom khat tek om hi. 
Exodus37:22 Paakmomte, a baakte le meikhuam sia a kiseak khamh bekno khat bekma taw a kivawt sakhat ahi hi." 
Exodus37:23 Ama in meikhuam atu in meiinn sali vawtin, khamh ciitak taw taitee le kuangdaite vawt hi." 
Exodus37:24 Ama in meikhuam le a vanh teng khamh ciitak kilogramme 35 taw vawt hi. 
Exodus37:25 Ama in ngimnamtui hal natu in acacia thing taw biaknatau khat vawt hi. Tua in a dung a vai a kikim hi a, a sauna centimetre 45, a zaina centimetre 45 le a saanna centimetre 90 ahi hi. A kingdok li teng kipee siatin, sakhat suak hi." 
Exodus37:26 Ama in a tung, a pangh li teng, le a kingdok teng khamh ciitak taw tuamin, a kiil kiimkot teng khamh taw zial hi." 
Exodus37:27 Ama in a zawnna thingpumte thun natu in khamh kual nii vawt a, a pangh nii ii kiil nuai ah bul hi." 
Exodus37:28 Ama in acacia thingpumte vawtin, khamh taw tuam hi." 
Exodus37:29 Ama in paaknamtui bangin a kihel a thiangtho noi sathau le ngimnamtui ciitak zongh vawt hi. 
Exodus38:1 Ama in meihal biakpiak natu in acacia thing taw biaknatau khat vawt hi. Tua in a dung a vai a kikim hi a, a sauna metre 2.2 le a zaina metre 2.2 le a saanna metre 1.3 ahi hi." 
Exodus38:2 Biaknatau taw sakhat a suak tu in ama in a king li te dawn doksak hi. Ama in tua a dokte taau taw tuam hi. 
Exodus38:3 Biaknatau ah vanh zak tu in bealte, keaute, kuangte, a koaite le vut luana kuangte zongh vawt hi. Hi vanh teng theampo taau taw vawt hi." 
Exodus38:4 Ama in taau saaksai khat vawtin biaknatau saanna a lang bansuk in biaknatau ii ngong nuai ah koi hi. 
Exodus38:5 Ama in zawn natu kual li vawtin a kingte li ah koi hi. 
Exodus38:6 Ama in acacia thing taw zawnna thingpumte vawtin, taau taw tuam a," 
Exodus38:7 biaknatau lang le lang ah a om kualte sungah thun hi. Biaknatau sia thingpheak taw vawtin a sung hawmsak hi. 
Exodus38:8 Ama in Topa ii ompuina Puanbuk tumna kongbiang ah naseam numeite neisa limlanghte taw taau kuang le taau tawdap vawt hi. 
Exodus38:9 Ama in puanneal puankhaite taw Topa ompuina puanbuk atu doituam vawt hi. A thangsang pangh doina puankhaite sia metre 44 sau a," 
Exodus38:10 tua puankhaite sia ngunn taw kivawt puankhaina koaite le a ciangte taw taau tawdap kul a nei taau khuam kul tungah kikhak hi. 
Exodus38:11 A saksang pangh doina zongh tuabang ma ahi hi. 
Exodus38:12 Nitumna sang a pangh doina puankhaite sia metre 22 sau in, ngunn taw a kivawt puankhaina koaite le a ciangte taw ngunn tawdap sawm a nei khuam sawm tungah kikhak hi." 
Exodus38:13 A kongbiang omna nisuana sang teng doina sia metre 22 ma zai hi. 
Exodus38:14 Kongbiang langkhat veve puankhaite metre 6.6 veu zai a, tawdap thum a nei khuam thum tungah kikhak hi." 
Exodus38:15  
Exodus38:16 Doituam kiimkot puankhai theampo puanneal phate taw kivawt hi. 
Exodus38:17 Khuam tawdapte taau taw kivawtin, vanh khaina koaite, ciangzawlte le khuam tung sitnate ngunn taw kivawt hi. Doituam kiimkot khuam theampo ngunn ciangzawlte taw kizom siat hi." 
Exodus38:18 Doituam tumna kongbiang puankhai sia vancii, a sandup le a san samul taw a kitak, thiamngel in a kizeam puanneal puan pha taw kivawt hi. Tua puankhai sia doituam ii puankhaite bangma in metre 9 sau a, metre 2 saang hi." 
Exodus38:19 Tua puankhai sia taau tawdap li a nei khuam lite tungah kikhak hi. Puan khaina koaite, a dawn tuamnate le a ciangzawlte ngunn taw kivawt hi." 
Exodus38:20 Puanbuk le doituam kiimkot letna khetphin theampo taau taw kivawt hi. 
Exodus38:21 Thupiak sawmte a ki atna suangpheak niite koina ahi, Topa ii ompuina Puanbuk sungah na zakte a nuai a bang ahi hi. Tua tepteena lai vawt tu Moses in sawl a, thiampi Aaron ii tapa Ithamar khutnuai a naseam Levi mite in vawt hi." 
Exodus38:22 Judah minam sung pan Hur ii tupa, Uri ii tapa Bezalel in Topa ii thupiak bangin seam siat hi." 
Exodus38:23 Ama a hupa Dan minam sung pan Ahisamach ii tapa Oholiab sia suang tung laikhen thiam, a ngeal thiam, le vancii, a sandup, a san samul puan le puanneal pha a tak thiam khat ahi hi." 
Exodus38:24 A thiangtho puanbuk atu Topa tungah a ki aap khamh teng a kizangh ngei khaikhin taw a kitee ciang kilogramme tul khat ngit hi. 
Exodus38:25 Misimna bangin a kipia ngunn teng a kizangh ngei khaikhin taw a kitee ciang kilogramme 3,430 ngit hi." 
Exodus38:26 Hite sia mihing kisim lai in mi sim ii 22 a piak teng kingawm in biakinn khaikhin taw a kitee ahi hi. Kum kul pan a tungsia teng a kisim ciang a vekpi mi 603,550 pha hi." 
Exodus38:27 Tua ngunnte sung pan kilogramme 3,400 teng a thiangtho Puanbuk le puankhai atu tawdap zakhat te vawt natu in kizangh a, tawdap khat ciang kilogramme 34 veu kizangh hi." 
Exodus38:28 Bezalel in, a taanglai ngunn kilogramme 30 taw a ciangzawlte, a khuamte tungah vanh khaina koaite le a dawn tuamnate vawt hi." 
Exodus38:29 Topa tungah a ki aap taau theampo kilogramme 2,425 ngit hi." 
Exodus38:30 Ama in tua taaute taw Topa ompuina Puanbuk tumna kongbiang tawdapte, taau saaksai a nei biaknatau, biaknatau atu vanh theampo vawt hi." 
Exodus38:31 Doituam kiim le a tumna kongbiang tawdapte le Puanbuk le doituam kiimkot letna in a kizangh khetphin theampo ama in taau taw vawt hi. 
Exodus39:1 A Thiangtho Mun ah thiampite na a sep ciang a silh tu in vancii, a sandup le samul san taw a tuanngen puansilhte vawt uh hi. Moses tungah a thupiak bangin amate in Aaron atu in thiampi puante vawt uh hi." 
Exodus39:2 Ephod sia puanneal; vancii, a sandup le a san samulpuan le khamh khauzam taw vawt uh hi." 
Exodus39:3 Amate in khamh dalte seakin, a paa in zen a, puanneal phate le vancii, a sandup le a san samulpuante taw khui khawm uh hi." 
Exodus39:4 Amate in a sawm natu liangkhai nii vawt a, ephod a kho thei natu in a pangh ah khii hi." 
Exodus39:5 Topa in Moses tungah a thupiak bangin a vanhzak kibang, pha takin a kitak kawngkhau sia ephod taw sakhat tu in, a tungah khii hi." 
Exodus39:6 Amate in carnelian suangsante taatin khamh dapphate tungah suang hi; tuate tungah Jacob tapa sawm le niite min teng suanglai khen thiamte in khensak hi. 
Exodus39:7 Topa in Moses tungah a thupiak bang tatakin Israel minam sawm le niite taang tu in, amate in tua suangsante ephod liangkhai puan tungah suang uh hi." 
Exodus39:8 Amate in thiamngelna le ephod vawtna in a kizangh vanhte taw ma in awmdal vawt uh hi. 
Exodus39:9 Tua in a kikim king li nei in thuap nii in kithep a, centimetre 22 sau, centimetre 22 zai hi." 
Exodus39:10 Amate in tua awmdal tungah suangmanpha ngual li in suang a, ngual khatna ah ruby, topaz le garnet;" 
Exodus39:11 ngual niina ah emerald, sapphire le diamond;" 
Exodus39:12 ngual thumna ah turquoise, agate, le amethyst;" 
Exodus39:13 le ngual lina ah beryl, carnelian le jasper te ahi hi. Tua suangte khamh dapphate tungah suang uh hi." 
Exodus39:14 Israel minam sawm le niite taang tu in, suang sawm le niite tungah Jacob tapa sawm le niite khat tek ii min khen hi." 
Exodus39:15 Awmdal atu in khauhualte bangin a kipheak khamh ciitak khi nguite vawt hi. 
Exodus39:16 Amate in khamh dappha nii le khamh kual nii vawtin, khamh kual niite awmdal a tungsang king veve ah belh uh hi." 
Exodus39:17 Amate in khamh khau niite sia kual niite tungah khit a," 
Exodus39:18 a dappha niite tungah a mong niite khit hi, tuabangin ephod liangkhai puan mai sangah tuate belh uh hi." 
Exodus39:19 Amate in khamh kual nii vawtin, ephod zawkciang sungsang awmdal ii nuaisang mongte nii ah belh uh hi." 
Exodus39:20 Amate in khamh kual nii vawt thua in, ephod liangkhai puante nii ii nuai, a maisang a kipeena kungah pha takin a kitak kawngkhau tung san ah belh uh hi." 
Exodus39:21 Topa in Moses tungah a thupiak bang tatakin kawngkhau tungah awmdal sia a kawm ngawl natu in amate in awmdal kualte ephod kualte tungah vancii khau taw sawm uh hi. 
Exodus39:22 Amate in ephod nuai ah a kisilh puantual sia vancii samul khau ngitnget taw tak uh hi. 
Exodus39:23 Lu thun natu in a vang sia a ek ngawl natu in puan kitak sa taw kikhui thua hi. 
Exodus39:24 Topa in Moses tungah a thupiak bang tatakin puantual mong nuai sang kiim tengah amate in puanneal pha taw a kivawt le vancii, a sandup le a san samul puan taw kivawt talee ngate, khamh ciitak taw a kivawt tengeng te taw kithatheak in koi hi." 
Exodus39:25  
Exodus39:26  
Exodus39:27 Topa ii Moses tungah a thupiak bang tatakin amate in Aaron le a tapate atu in laktong," 
Exodus39:28 dial, lukhu, puanneal ngoaipuan tom le" 
Exodus39:29 puanneal, vancii, a sandup le a san samul taw a kivawt thiamngel in a kizeam kawngkhau vawtsak hi." 
Exodus39:30 Amate in khamh ciitak taw Topa tungah ki aapna lim lakna thiangtho a hi, kizepna vawtin tua tungah, “ Topa atu Kitavaw” ci in khen uh hi." 
Exodus39:31 Topa ii Moses tungah a thupiak bang tatakin amate in tua kizepna sia dial mai sangah vancii khau khat taw khii uh hi. 
Exodus39:32 Topa ompuina Puanbuk nasep theampo kizo siat zo hi. Topa ii Moses tungah a thupiak bang tatakin Israel mite in na theampo seam uh hi. 
Exodus39:33 Amate in Moses kungah Puanbuk le a vanh theampo, a vanh khaina koaite, a kalte, a zawlliang a tuukpite, a khuamte le a tawdapte;" 
Exodus39:34 a sanin a kinimh tuuvun taw a kivawt a sitna; savun ciitak taw a kivawt a sitna; puankhai; 
Exodus39:35 suangpheakte a kikoina Thuciamna Thingkuang, a thingpumte le a sitna;" 
Exodus39:36 sabuai le a vanhte theampo, Pathian a piak anluum;" 
Exodus39:37 khamh ciitak meikhuam, a meiinnte, a vanhzak theampo le meidet sathau;" 
Exodus39:38 khamh biaknatau; noi sathau; ngimnamtui; Puanbuk kongbiang puankhai; 
Exodus39:39 taau saaksai taw kithua biaknatau, a thingpumte, a vanhzak theampo; khut silna kuang le a ngakna;" 
Exodus39:40 doituam atu puankhaite, a khuamte le a tawdapte; kongbiang puankhai le a khaute; Puanbuk khetphinte; puanbuk sungah a kizangh tu vanhzak theampo;" 
Exodus39:41 tuaciang a Thiangtho Mun ah thiampite silh tu puansilh tuanngente — thiampi Aaron le a tapate atu in puan thiangthote hong paipui uh hi. 
Exodus39:42 Topa ii Moses tungah a thupiak bang tatakin Israel mite in nasep theampo seam siat uh hi. 
Exodus39:43 Moses in a nasepna teng sit siat a, Topa thupiak bangin a sep siatna thu mu hi. Tua ahiciang Moses in amate thupha pia hi." 
Exodus40:1 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Exodus40:2 “Tha masa, a ni khat ni in Topa ii ompuina Puanbuk sia lemh in." 
Exodus40:3 Thupiak Sawmte koina Thuciamna Thingkuang tua buk sungah koi in, a mai ah puankhai khai in." 
Exodus40:4 A sungah sabuai tumpui in a tungah vanhte koi in. Meikhuam zongh la in a, meivakte bul in." 
Exodus40:5 Thuciamna Thingkuang mai ah ngimnamtui hal natu in khamh biaknatau koi in a, Puanbuk kongbiang ah puankhai khai in." 
Exodus40:6 Puanbuk mai ah meihal biakpiak natu in biaknatau koi in. 
Exodus40:7 Puanbuk le biaknatau kilaklaw ah khut silna kuang koi in a, tui dim in." 
Exodus40:8 A doituam kiimkot puan taw uumin a kongbiang ah puankhai khai in. 
Exodus40:9 “Tuaciang Puanbuk le a vanhzak theampo a thiangtho sathau noina taw aap in, tua hile thiangtho tu hi." 
Exodus40:10 Tua zawkciang biaknatau le a vanhte theampo a thiangtho sathau noina taw aap in, tua hile thiangtho sinsen tu hi." 
Exodus40:11 Ta bangma in khut silna kuang le a ngakna zongh aap in. 
Exodus40:12 “Aaron le a tapate puanbuk kongbiang ah paipui in a, a zeksa kibualna neisak in." 
Exodus40:13 Aaron in keima na a seam thiampi a sep thei natu in thiampi puante silhsak in, sathau buakin, hi bangin ama aap in." 
Exodus40:14 A tapate paipui in, laktong silhsak in." 
Exodus40:15 Tuaciang thiampite bangin keima na hong sepsak thei natu in, a pa sathau na buak bangma, a tate zongh sathau buak in. Hi bang sathau buakna in amate maisang hun theampo ah thiampi suaksak tu hi,” ci hi." 
Exodus40:16 Topa thupiak bangin Moses in na theampo seam hi. 
Exodus40:17 Egypt pan a pusua zawk a kum niina, a tha masa, a ni khat ni in, Topa ii ompuina Puanbuk kilemh hi." 
Exodus40:18 Moses in a tawdapte pha sukin, a kalpheakte thua a, zawlliang le tuukpite thungin, a khuamte phut hi." 
Exodus40:19 Ama in Topa thupiak bangin puanbuk tungah a sitna phalhin, a puasang tuipuan sia a tung pan khu hi." 
Exodus40:20 Tuaciang ama in suangpheakte nii la in Thuciamna Thingkuang sungah koi hi. Ama in a zawnna thingpumte a bilvang sungah thun in, Thuciamna Thingkuang sitna khak hi." 
Exodus40:21 Tua zawkciang ama in Puanbuk sungah Thuciamna Thingkuang koi a, puankhai khak hi. Topa thupiak bangin, Moses in Thuciamna Thingkuang hi bangin seal hi." 
Exodus40:22 Ama in Puanbuk sung saksang, puankhai pua sangah sabuai koi a," 
Exodus40:23 Topa thupiak bangin Topa a kipia anluumte, tua sabuai tungah lui hi," 
Exodus40:24 ama in Puanbuk sung thangsang king, sabuai taw kingalsai in meivak khuam koi hi." 
Exodus40:25 Topa thupiak bangin tualai Topa ii ompuina ah ama in mei de hi. 
Exodus40:26 Ama in Puanbuk sung puankhai mai ah khamh biaknatau koi a," 
Exodus40:27 Topa thupiak bangin ngimnamtui hal hi. 
Exodus40:28 Ama in Puanbuk kongbiang ah puankhai khak a," 
Exodus40:29 tua mun puankhai mai ah meihal biakpiak natu in biaknatau koi hi. Topa thupiak bangin tua biaknatau tungah ama in sangawna taw meihal biakpiakna le antang taw biakpiakna te seam hi. 
Exodus40:30 Ama in Puanbuk le biaknatau kilaklaw ah kisilna kuang koi in tui dim hi. 
Exodus40:31 Moses, Aaron, le a tapate in tualai ah" 
Exodus40:32 Topa thupiak bangin, Puanbuk sung le biaknatau ah a pai simin a khut le a peangte sil uh hi." 
Exodus40:33 Moses in Puanbuk le biaknatau kiimkot teng uumin a doituam kongbiang ah puankhai khai hi. Tuabangin ama in nasep theampo man zo hi. 
Exodus40:34 Tuasia ciang meei in Puanbuk tuam a Topa ii ompuina khuavak taang velvol sia in tua puanbuk dim hi. 
Exodus40:35 Hi bang ahi hu in Puanbuk sungah Moses tum thei ngawl hi. 
Exodus40:36 Puanbuk pan meei a kilapto ciang bekin Israel te in a ngiaphual mun dangah khiin uh hi. 
Exodus40:37 Tualai ah meei a kaai laiteng a ngiaphual khiin ngawl uh hi. 
Exodus40:38 Duisung ah a vathap sung tawntungin amate in Topa ii ompuina ahi, Puanbuk tungah sunin meei le zanin meikuang mu thei uh hi." 
Leviticus1:1 Topa ompuina Puanbuk sung pan Topa in Moses sam a," 
Leviticus1:2 Israel te ii biakpiakna a nei ciang a zui tu in a nuai a ngeinate pia hi. Mihing khat pawpo in nganhing taw biakpiakna a nei ciang, a khuihon ahibuale, a tuuhon ahibuale a kealhonte sung pan khat pia tu hi." 
Leviticus1:3 A khuihonte sung pan khat taw meihal biakpiakna a pia ahile, a mealhem ngawl khuital khat hi tu hi. Topa ii a saan natu in Topa ompuina Puanbuk kongbiang ah pia tu hi." 
Leviticus1:4 Ama in khuital lu tungah a khut nga tu a, tuasia ama mawphel natu biakpiakna in kisaang tu hi." 
Leviticus1:5 Tualai ah ama in tua khuital ngo tu a, Aaron suan thiampite in khuital chi sia Topa tungah a piak zawkciang Puanbuk kongbiang ah a om biaknatau pangh li ah a chi the tu hi." 
Leviticus1:6 Tua zawkciang ama in a vun hoai in a sa sem tu a," 
Leviticus1:7 thiampite in biaknatau tungah thing seng in mei taw tu hi. 
Leviticus1:8 Amate in a kisemsa sabak teng, a lu le a thau taw mei tungah koi tu hi." 
Leviticus1:9 Ama in a sungkua le a nungpeangte nii, sil tu a vaipuak nei thiampipa in sa teng biaknatau ah hal tu hi. Tua an taw biakpiakna ii ngimnam sia in Topa lungkimsak hi." 
Leviticus1:10 Mihing khat in a tuu ahibuale a kealte sung pan khat taw biakpiakna a nei le, a mealhem ngawl a tal khat hi tu hi." 
Leviticus1:11 Ama in biaknatau saksang ah tuasia ngo tu a, biaknatau pangh li ah thiampite in a chi the tu hi." 
Leviticus1:12 A sa a sem zawkciang thiampipa in a sa teng mei tungah koi tu a, a lu le a thau zongh kihel tu hi." 
Leviticus1:13 Ama in a sungkua le a nungpeangte nii sil tu a, thiampipa in Topa tungah biakpiaknate pia in biaknatau tungah hal tu hi. Tua an taw biakpiakna ngimnam in Topa lungkimsak hi." 
Leviticus1:14 Mi khat in vacim khat taw meihal biakpiakna a pia le, ngam vakhu khat ahi buale, inn vakhu khat hi tu hi." 
Leviticus1:15 Thiampipa in tua biakpiakna sia biaknatau ah paipui tu a, a ngawng meaktan in, biaknatau tungah a lu hal tu hi. Biaknatau pangh ah a chi taaksak tu hi." 
Leviticus1:16 A longtawl le a tawl sungah a om teng la tu a, vut koina, biaknatau ii nisuana sangah vawk tu hi." 
Leviticus1:17 Ama in a thate nii pan len tu a, a thate tatsak ngawlin a pum balkeak tu a, biaknatau tungah a pum bup hal tu hi. Tua an taw biakpiakna ii ngimnam in Topa lungkimsak hi." 
Leviticus2:1 Mihing khat pawpo in antang taw Topa biakpiakna a nei ciang, antang ngoaivui masa nanak tu hi. Ama in olive thau le ngimnamtui buak tu a," 
Leviticus2:2 Aaron suan thiampite kungah paipui tu hi. Thiampipa in anvui khutdim khat, sathau le ngimnamtui theampo la in, Topa tungah kipia siat zo hi ci in a kiheak thei natu in biaknatau ah hal tu hi. Tua an biakpiakna ii ngimnam in Topa lungkimsak hi." 
Leviticus2:3 A taanglai antang teng thiampite neisa hi a, Topa a kipia an sung pan a laak ahikom, thiangtho mama hi." 
Leviticus2:4 A kipia anluum sia, anluum emna bealpeu sungah em ahile, tol saw ngawl hi nanak tu hi. Tuasia olive thau taw a kihel a anluum liante ahibuale olive thau taw a kizut a muhpaate hi thei tu hi." 
Leviticus2:5 A kipia anluum sia moh emna taw minsak ahile, olive thau le anvui a kihel hi tu a, ahizong tol saw ngawl hi tu hi." 
Leviticus2:6 Biakpiakna in na nei ciang, tuasia balneen in a tungah sathau na buak tu hi." 
Leviticus2:7 Beal baannei taw a kihuan anluum a kipia ahile, olive thau le anvui taw huan hi tu hi." 
Leviticus2:8 Hi an sia Topa tungah biakpiakna khat in paipui a, thiampipa tungah pia in, biaknatau ah paipui tu hi." 
Leviticus2:9 A vekpi in Topa tungah a kipia a hina thu limlakna in thiampipa in tawm la a, biaknatau tungah hal tu hi. Tua an biakpiakna ii ngimnam in Topa lungkimsak hi." 
Leviticus2:10 A taanglai biakpiaknate thiampite neisa hi a; Topa a kipia an sung pan a kila ahikom, thiangtho mama hi." 
Leviticus2:11 Topa a kipia antang taw biakpiaknate tol kisaw ngawl tu a; Topa tungah na piak an sungah khuaitui ahibuale tol na zangh ngei buatu hi. 
Leviticus2:12 Anpal taw biakpiakna khat kum simin na paipui tu uh a, ahizong biaknatau ah na hal buatu uh hi." 
Leviticus2:13 Antang taw biakpiakna theampo ah ci saw vun, banghang ziam cile ci sia noma le Pathian kilaklaw ah thuciamna lim ahi hi. (Biakpiakna theampo ah ci saw nanak vun.)" 
Leviticus2:14 Anpal taw Topa tungah biakpiakna na nei uh ciang, kan sa antang ahibuale ngoaivui sa an hi tu hi." 
Leviticus2:15 Tua tungah olive thau helin ngimnamtui na buak tu uh hi. 
Leviticus2:16 Topa tungah an taw biakpiakna a hina, limlakna in antawm, sathau le ngimnamtui theampo zongh thiampipa in hal tu hi." 
Leviticus3:1 Mihing khat pawpo in kipawlkhop biakpiakna in a khuite khat a piak ciang a mealhem ngawl a tal ahibuale a nu hi tu hi. 
Leviticus3:2 Ama in tua nganhing lu tungah a khut nga tu a, Topa ompuina Puanbuk kongbiang ah ngo tu hi. Aaron suan thiampite in biaknatau pangh li ah a chi the tu a," 
Leviticus3:3 a nuai a sa teng Topa tungah an taw biakpiakna in pia tu hi: a sungthau theampo," 
Leviticus3:4 a nautate le a nauta tuam a thau teng le a thinsa phabel teng pia tu hi. 
Leviticus3:5 Thiampite in hi teng theampo meihal biakpiaknate taw biaknatau tungah hal khawm tu hi. Hi an taw biakpiakna ii ngimnam in Topa lungkimsak hi. 
Leviticus3:6 Kipawlkhop biakpiakna khat ah tuu ahibuale keal a kizangh le; anu zongh apa zongh hi thei a, ahizong a mealhem ngawl het hi tu hi." 
Leviticus3:7 Mihing khat in tuu taw a bia le," 
Leviticus3:8 tuu lu tungah a khut nga tu a, Puanbuk mai ah ngo tu hi. Thiampite in biaknatau pangh li ah a chi the tu a," 
Leviticus3:9 a nuai a, nganhing sanam teng Topa tungah an taw biakpiakna in pia tu hi: a thau, a cingpingu dongin a kitan a meici thau buppi, a sungkua a tuam a thau theampo," 
Leviticus3:10 a nauta le a nauta tuam a thau teng le a thinsa phabel teng pia tu hi. 
Leviticus3:11 Topa tungah an taw biakpiakna khat ahi bangma vaipuak nei thiampipa in biaknatau tungah hal siat tu hi. 
Leviticus3:12 Mihing khat in keal a pia le," 
Leviticus3:13 a keal lu tungah a khut nga tu a, Puanbuk mai ah ngo tu hi. Thiampite in biaknatau pangh li ah a chi the tu a," 
Leviticus3:14 a nuai a sa teng Topa tungah an taw biakpiakna in pia tu hi: a sungthau theampo," 
Leviticus3:15 a nauta le a nauta tuam a thau teng, a thinsa phabel teng ahi hi." 
Leviticus3:16 Topa a lungkimsak an taw biakpiakna ahi bangma, thiampipa in biaknatau tungah hal siat tu hi. A thau teng Topa neisa ahi hi." 
Leviticus3:17 Israel te in a thau ahizong, a chi ahizong, ne thei ngawl tu hi; hi thu in Israel te theampo ii a teenna mun pawpo ah a tawntung a zui tu ngeina khat ahi hi." 
Leviticus4:1 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Leviticus4:2 a maw a khial mihing khat in tupkhol ngawlin Topa thupiakte khat pawpo a paltan ciang, a zui tu a nuai a ngeinate Israel mite tungah a son natu in thupia hi." 
Leviticus4:3 A maw a khial sia Thiampi Lianbelpa hi a, mipite tungah mawna khialna hong then ahile, ama mawna khialna hangin a mealhem ngawl khuital no khat Topa tungah sangaw biakpiakna in pia tu hi." 
Leviticus4:4 Ama in Puanbuk kongbiang ah khuital paipui tu a, a lu tungah a khut nga in Topa mai ah ngo tu hi." 
Leviticus4:5 Tuaciang Thiampi Lianbelpa in khuital chi pawlkhat la in, Puanbuk sungah tumpui tu hi." 
Leviticus4:6 Ama in a khutme, chi sungah pap tu a, a thiangtho puankhai mai ah salivei the tu hi." 
Leviticus4:7 Tuaciang ama in chi pawlkhat, Puanbuk sung ngimnamtui biaknatau kingte ii a dokna teng noai tu hi, a taanglai chi teng Puanbuk kongbiang ah a om, meihal biakpiakna in a kizangh biaknatau bul ah sung tu hi." 
Leviticus4:8 Hi khuital tung pan a thau teng theampo, a sungthaute," 
Leviticus4:9 a nauta le a nauta tuam a thaute, le a thinsa phabel la tu hi." 
Leviticus4:10 Thiampipa in tua a thau teng la tu a, kipawlkhop biakpiakna in a kingo nganhingte tung pan a thaute a hal bangin meihal biakpiak natu in a kizangh biaknatau tungah hal tu hi." 
Leviticus4:11 Ahizong ama in a vun, a tak teng, a lu, a peang teng, a ngil le a ngilzangte a kihel a sungkua teng la tu a," 
Leviticus4:12 ngiaphual puasang ah paipui in vut buakna, biakna a zeksa taw kisai a thiangthona munah thingthut in hal tu hi." 
Leviticus4:13 Tupkhol ngawlin Israel taangpi bup in Topa thupiakte khat paltan in a maw a khial in ahile," 
Leviticus4:14 a maw a khial a kiheak po ciang taangpi taangta in khuital khat taw mawphel biakpiakna nei tu hi. Amate in Topa ompuina Puanbuk ah paipui tu a," 
Leviticus4:15 taangpi lampuite in a khui lu tungah a khutte nga in, tualai ah ngo tu uh hi." 
Leviticus4:16 Thiampi Lianbelpa in khuital chi tawm Puanbuk sungah paipui tu a tua ii sungah 
Leviticus4:17 a khutme papin puankhai mai ah salivei the tu hi. 
Leviticus4:18 Ama in Puanbuk sung ngimnamtui biaknatau king, a dokna tengah chi tawm noai tu a, a taanglai teng Puanbuk kongbiang ah a om, meihal biakpiakna in a kizangh biaknatau bul ah sung tu hi." 
Leviticus4:19 Tua zawkciang ama in a thau teng la in biaknatau tungah hal tu hi. 
Leviticus4:20 Ama in mawphel biakpiakna in a kizangh khuital sia taw a vawt bangma in hi khuital zongh taw a kibangin vawt tu a, mipite ii mawna hu in hi bangin sangaw biakpiakna vawt tu hi, tuaciang amate mawna kimaisak tu hi." 
Leviticus4:21 Tua zawkciang ama in tua khuital ngiaphual pua sangah paipui in, ama mawmai natu biakpiakna khuital a hal bangin hal tu hi. Hisia in taangpite mawna maisak natu biakpiakna khat ahi hi." 
Leviticus4:22 Ngam uk khat in tupkhol ngawlin Topa thupiakte paltan in mawna a vawt le," 
Leviticus4:23 a mawna a heak po ciang, a mealhem ngawl kealtal khat taw biakpiakna nei tu hi." 
Leviticus4:24 Ama in kealtal lu tungah a khut nga tu a, meihal biakpiakna in nganhing a kingawna mun biaknatau saksang ah ngo tu hi. Hisia in mawphel biakpiakna khat ahi hi." 
Leviticus4:25 Thiampipa in a chi sungah a khutme pap tu a, biaknatau king a kidokna tengah noai in, a taanglai teng biaknatau bul ah sung tu hi." 
Leviticus4:26 Tua zawkciang ama in kipawlkhop biakpiakna in a kingo nganhing thaute kihal bangma in, biaknatau ah a thau teng hal tu hi. Ngam uk khat ii mawmai natu in hi bangin thiampipa in sangaw biakpiakna nei tu a, ngamukpa mawna kimaisak tu hi." 
Leviticus4:27 Tupkhol ngawlin nautaang mi khat in Topa thupiakte paltan in, mawna a vawt le," 
Leviticus4:28 a mawna a heak po ciang a mealhem ngawl kealnu khat taw biakpiakna nei tu hi. 
Leviticus4:29 Ama in keallu tungah a khut nga tu a, meihal biakpiak natu nganhing kingawna mun, biaknatau saksang ah ngo tu hi." 
Leviticus4:30 Nganhing chi sungah thiampipa in a khutme pap tu a, biaknatau king a dokna teng noai in, a taanglai teng biaknatau bul ah sung tu hi." 
Leviticus4:31 Tua zawkciang ama in kipawlkhop biakpiak natu in a kingo nganthaute laak bangin a thau teng la tu a, Topa a lungkimsak ngimnam ahi natu in biaknatau tungah hal tu hi. Hi bangin thiampipa in tua pa ii mawmai natu in, sangaw biakpiakna neisak tu a, a mawna kimaisak tu hi." 
Leviticus4:32 Mihing khat in mawphel biakpiakna in tuu khat hong paipui le, a mealhem ngawl a nu khat hi tu hi." 
Leviticus4:33 Ama in tuu lu tungah a khut nga tu a, meihal biakpiak natu in ngan kingawna mun biaknatau ii saksang ah ngo tu hi." 
Leviticus4:34 Thiampipa in a chi sungah a khutme pap tu a, biaknatau king ah a om a dokna teng chi noai in, a taanglai teng biaknatau bul ah sung tu hi." 
Leviticus4:35 Tua zawkciang ama in kipawlkhop biakpiak natu in a kingo tuu thau laak bangin a thau teng la tu a, Topa tungah a kipia an taw biakpiaknate taw biaknatau tungah hal khawm tu hi. Hi bangin thiampipa in tua pa mawmai natu in sangaw biakpiakna nei tu a, ama mawna kimaisak tu hi." 
Leviticus5:1 A nuai a thute ah mawphel biakpiaknate kisamh hi. Mihing khat sia thukhenzum ah tetti pang tu in kisam a, ama muna bang le a zaakna bangin a son buale ama in a piang bang a thuak kul tu hi." 
Leviticus5:2 Tup khol ngawlin, mihing khat in sathaang thi ci bang, biakna zeksa sang panin a thiang ngawl khat po a thamtha le, a vawt hunlam a phaw po ciang ama sia a thiang ngawl, a maw a khial ahi hi." 
Leviticus5:3 Tup khol ngawlin mihing khat in mihing sung pan a piang a thiang ngawl na khat pawpo a thamtha ahile bang po ahizong ama in a vawt hunlam a heak po ciang a maw a khial hi tu hi. 
Leviticus5:4 Kidawm ngawlin, mihing khat in thu khat po ah a kiciam tha le zong a vawt hunlam a phaw po ciang ama a maw a khial ahi hi." 
Leviticus5:5 Mihing khat in a khial ciang a khialna pualaak nanak tu a," 
Leviticus5:6 mawna daan tu in Topa tungah tuu anu khat ahibuale keal anu khat pia tu hi. Tua pa mawmai natu in thiampipa in sangaw biakpiakna neisak tu hi. 
Leviticus5:7 Mi khat in tuu ahibuale keal a pia zo buale, a mawmai natu in ngam vakhu nii ahibuale inn vakhu niite Topa tungah paipui tu a, a khat sia mawphel biakpiakna hi tu a, a dangkhat sia meihal biakpiakna hi tu hi." 
Leviticus5:8 Ama in tuate thiampipa kungah paipui tu a, thiampipa in tua vacim taw mawphel biakpiakna nei masa tu hi. Ama in a lu tatsak ngawlin a ngawng meak tu a," 
Leviticus5:9 a chi pawlkhat biaknatau pangh the tu hi. A taanglai chi teng biaknatau bul ah sung tu hi. Hisia in mawphel biakpiakna khat ahi hi. 
Leviticus5:10 Tua zawkciang a niina vacim taw ngeina om bangin meihal biakpiakna pia tu hi. Hi bangin thiampipa in tua pa mawmai natu sangaw biakpiakna vawtsak tu a, tua pa mawna kimaisak tu hi." 
Leviticus5:11 Mi khat in ngam vakhu nii le inn vakhu nii a pia zo buale mawphel biakpiak natu in anvui kilogramme khat paipui tu hi. Antang taw biakpiakna hi ngawl a, mawphel biakpiakna ahikom, ama in olive thau ahibuale ngimnamtui a tungah buak ngawl tu hi." 
Leviticus5:12 Ama in thiampipa kungah paipui tu a, Topa tungah a vekpi a piak a lakna in thiampipa in khutdim khat la tu a, an taw biakpiakna in biaknatau tungah hal tu hi. Tua in mawphel biakpiakna ahi hi." 
Leviticus5:13 Hi bangin thiampipa in tua pa mawmai natu biakpiakna neisak tu a, ama mawna kimaisak tu hi. Antang taw biakpiakna bangma in a taanglai anvui teng thiampipa aa ahi hi." 
Leviticus5:14 Topa in Moses tungah a nuai a zui tu ngeinate pia hi. 
Leviticus5:15 Mihing khat pawpo in tup khol ngawlin Topa tungah biakna taw kisai a thiangtho nate pia ngawlin a khial le ama in khialphel biakpiakna in a mealhem ngawl tuutal ahibuale kealtal khat Topa tungah pia tu hi. A man sia a khensat ngeina om bang kikhensat tu hi. 
Leviticus5:16 A piak ngawl vanh teng ama in pia kik tu a, zakhat ciang kul taw in belap nanak tu hi. Ama in thiampipa tungah pia tu a, tua pa mawmai natu in nganhing taw biakpiakna khat thiampipa in neisak tu a, ama mawna kimaisak tu hi." 
Leviticus5:17 Mihing khat pawpo in tup khol ngawlin Topa thupiakte a paltan le, ama a khial hi a, a khialna daan thuak tu hi." 
Leviticus5:18 A khialphel natu in a mealhem ngawl tuutal khat ahibuale kealtal khat thiampipa tungah paipui tu hi. A man sia a ngeina om bangin kikhensat tu hi. Thiampipa in tupkhol ngawlin a khialpa khialphel natu in sangaw biakpiakna neisak tu a, ama khialna kimaisak tu hi." 
Leviticus5:19 Hisia ama ii Topa tungah a khialna hu a, khialphel biakpiakna ahi hi." 
Leviticus6:1 Topa in Moses tungah a nuai a ngeinate pia hi. 
Leviticus6:2 Mihing khat tungah Israel a mipui khat in sum koi a, a koina pa in pia kik nuam ngawl ahizong, ama na nguksak ahizong, a theam ahizong," 
Leviticus6:3 a bo vanh khat mu napi leilot a mu bong ci in a kiciam ahile zong, Topa tungah maw ahikom biakpiakna khat a vawt kul hi." 
Leviticus6:4 Hi bang khat pawpo taw mihing khat in a maw a khial ciang thumaan ngawlin a nga vanh pawpo pia kik hamtang tu hi. A khialna a kimu ni in, a neipa tungah a cingin pia kik tu a, zakhat ciang kul taw belap tu hi." 
Leviticus6:5  
Leviticus6:6 Ama in Topa tungah ama ii khialphel biakpiak natu in a mealhem ngawl tuutal ahibuale kealtal khat thiampipa kungah paipui tu hi. A man sia khensat ngeina om bang hi tu hi. 
Leviticus6:7 Tua pa mawmai natu in, thiampipa in biakpiakna piaksak tu a, ama khialna kimaisak tu hi." 
Leviticus6:8 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Leviticus6:9 Aaron le a tapate ii meihal biakpiaknate a piak ciang a nuai a ngeinate a zui tu in thupia hi. Meihal biakpiakna sia zankhuateak biaknatau tungah kinusia tu a, tuaciang tua mei sia kuang tansak tu hi." 
Leviticus6:10 Tuaciang thiampipa in puanneal ngoaipuan tom le puanneal puantual sil a, biaknatau ah vut teng luakin, biaknatau pangh ah sung tu hi." 
Leviticus6:11 Tuaciang ama in a puan laih tu a, ngiaphual puasang biakna taw kisai a thiangthona munah vutte bua tu hi." 
Leviticus6:12 Biaknatau ah mei kuang topsak tu a, mitsak ngeingawl tu hi. Zing simin thiampipa in thing thut thua tu a, meihal biakpiakna vawtin, kipawlkhop biakpiakna sathaute hal tu hi." 
Leviticus6:13 Biaknatau ah mei kuang topsak tu a, mitsak ngeingawl tu hi." 
Leviticus6:14 A nuai a te sia antang biakpiakna ah zui tu ngeinate ahi hi. Aaron suan thiampipa in biaknatau mai Topa tungah antang biakpiakna pia tu hi. 
Leviticus6:15 A vekpi in Topa tungah a kipia a hina thu heaksakna in ama in khutdim khat anvui le sathau, a tungah ngimnamtuite buakin, biaknatau ah hal tu hi. Hi biakpiakna ii ngim in Topa lungkimsak hi." 
Leviticus6:16 A taanglai teng thiampite in ne tu hi. Tuate tol kisaw ngawl anluum in ki em tu a, Topa ompuina Puanbuk suumsung a thiangtho munah kine tu hi. Tua sia an taw biakpiaknate a khensak bangin Topa ii thiampite a piaksa hi. Tua in mawphel biakpiakna le khialphel biakpiaknate bangin thiangtho mama hi." 
Leviticus6:17  
Leviticus6:18 Maisang hun theampo atu in Aaron suan le paal peuma in Topa tungah a kipia ante amate nga bangin ne tan thei tu uh hi. Midang khat pawpo tua biakpiakna an a thutha sia, a thianthona vaang in ngim ngasak tu hi." 
Leviticus6:19 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Leviticus6:20 Aaron suan thiampi khat thupha piak kipsak natu taw kisai ngeinate pia hi. Thupha piak kipsakna a nga ni in Topa tungah anvui kilogramme khat (ni sim antang biakpiakna za taw a kikim) zingsangin a lang, nitakin a lang pia tu hi." 
Leviticus6:21 Tuate sathau taw hel tu a, moh emna taw minsak in, balneen tu a, Topa tungah antang biakpiakna in pia tu hi, a ngim in Topa lungkimsak hi." 
Leviticus6:22 Maisang hun theampo ah Aaron suan peuma Thiampi Lianbel a sep ciang hi biakpiakna vawt tu hi. Tua antang sia Topa tungah sangaw biakpiakna bangin kihal tum tu hi. 
Leviticus6:23 Thiampipa ii a piak antang biakpiaknate tawm zongh kine thei ngawl hi; tua teng a kihal siat kul tu hi. 
Leviticus6:24 Topa in Moses tungah Aaron le a tapate in 
Leviticus6:25 a nuai a ngeinate mawphel biakpiakna a piak ciang a zui tu in thupia hi. Meihal biakpiak natu in sa a kingawna mun, biaknatau saksang ah mawphel biakpiak natu in nganhing kingo tu hi. Tua in a thiangtho mama biakpiakna ahi hi." 
Leviticus6:26 Sangaw biakpiakna a pia thiampipa in a piak nganhing sate, Topa ompuina Puanbuk suumsung mun thiangthona ah ne tu hi." 
Leviticus6:27 Mihing khat pawpo ahibuale na khat pawpo in tua nganhing sa a thutha le tuasia ii thianthona vaang in ngim ngasak tu hi. Tua sachi puan khat po tungah a baang tha le tuasia mun thiangtho na ah sawp kul tu hi. 
Leviticus6:28 Sa huanna leibeal khat pawpo sia kisutham tu a, thikbeal a kizangh le nawt thiang in, tui taw silthiang tu hi." 
Leviticus6:29 Thiampi innkuanpui pa pawpo in hi biakpiakna sa ne thei tu hi; tua biakpiakna sia thiangtho mama hi. 
Leviticus6:30 Ahizong Puanbuk sungah sachi kipaipui in, mawmai natu in a zeksa vawtna ah a kizangh le tua sa kine ngawl het tu a; tuasia a kihal kul tu hi." 
Leviticus7:1 A nuai a te sia khialphel biakpiaknate atu zui tu ngeinate hi a, thiangtho mama hi." 
Leviticus7:2 Meihal biakpiak natu in nganhing kingawna mun, biaknatau saksang ah hi biakpiakna ngan kingo tu a, biaknatau pangh li tengah a chi kithe tu hi." 
Leviticus7:3 A thau theampo la in biaknatau tungah kipia tu a, tuate a meithau, a sungthau," 
Leviticus7:4 a nauta le a tuam thau teng, le a thinsa phabel teng hi tu hi." 
Leviticus7:5 Topa tungah an taw biakpiakna bangin thiampipa in a thau theampo biaknatau tungah hal tu hi. Tua in khialphel biakpiakna khat ahi hi. 
Leviticus7:6 Thiampi innkuanpui, pa peuma in tua sa ne thei tu a, ahizong tua sa thiangtho mama ahikom mun thiangthona ah kine tu hi." 
Leviticus7:7 Mawphel biakpiakna le khialphel biakpiakna ah a kibangin zak tu ngeina khat om a, tua in a sa sia sangaw biakpiakna a pia thiampipa ii neisa hi, cina ahi hi." 
Leviticus7:8 Meihal biakpiakna in a kipia nganhing vun sia biakpiakna a pia thiampipa ii neisa ahi hi. 
Leviticus7:9 Thik bealpeu sungah a ki em, ahibuale beal baannei le moh emna sungah a kivawt antang biakpiakna peuma, Pathian tungah a pia thiampipa ii neisa hi." 
Leviticus7:10 Ahizong a kihuan ngawl antang a kipia theampo, sathau taw a kihel ahizong a kihel ngawl ahizong, Aaron suan thiampite neisa hi a, a kikim in a hawm tek tu ahi hi." 
Leviticus7:11 A nuai a te Topa tungah a kipia kipawlkhop biakpiakna ah zui tu ngeinate ahi hi. 
Leviticus7:12 Mihing khat in Pathian tungah lungdamko biakpiakna in hi biakpiakna a vawt le biakpiakna ah a zak tu nganhing taw in, tol saw ngawl anluum piakhawm tu hi, tuate anvui le olive thau a kihel a saa anluumte ahibuale olive thau taw a kizut muhte, ahibuale olive thau taw kihel muhte ahi hi." 
Leviticus7:13 Tua dom ngawlin tol kisaw anluumte zongh pia tu hi. 
Leviticus7:14 Ama in anluum nam simin khen khat tek a tuam vilvel in Topa tungah pia tu a; tuate nganhing chi la a, biaknatau tungah a the thiampipa ii neisa ahi hi." 
Leviticus7:15 Biakpiakna nganhing sa sia biakpiakna vawt ni in kine tu a; a zingsang ciang dong koi ngawl tu hi. 
Leviticus7:16 Mihing khat in kamciam taangtut natu ahizong ama thinzaw biakpiakna taw ahizong a piak pawlkhop biakpiakna hong paipui le biakpiak ni in ne siat ngawl tu a, a taanglai pawpo a zing ciang ne thei tu hi." 
Leviticus7:17 A ni thum ni in sa taanglai pawpo kihal tu hi. 
Leviticus7:18 A ni thum ni in a taanglai sa a kine le tua pa biakpiakna Pathian in saang ngawl tu hi. Tua biakpiakna sia ama atu in phattuamna om ngawl tu a, a thiangtho ngawlin kingaisun in, tua sa a ne pawpo in a piang babang thuak tu hi." 
Leviticus7:19 Tua biakpiakna sa sia biakna taw kisai a thiang ngawl khat pawpo taw a kithutha le kine ngawlin a kihal kul tu hi. Biakna zeksa taw kisai in a thiang khat pawpo in tua sa ne thei tu hi," 
Leviticus7:20 ahizong a thiang ngawl khat pawpo in tua sa a ne le Pathian mi in kingaisun nawn ngawl tu hi. 
Leviticus7:21 Mihing khat pawpo in mihing ahibuale nganhing tung pan biakna taw kisai in a thiang ngawl khat pawpo a tham zawkciang hi biakpiakna sa a ne le, ama sia Pathian mi in kingaisun nawn ngawl tu hi." 
Leviticus7:22 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Leviticus7:23 a nuai a, zui tu ngeina teng Israel mite atu in pia hi. Khuithau, tuuthau le kealthau kine ngawl tu hi."
