Leviticus7:24 Ama thu in a thi thawthong nganhing ahibuale ngamsa ii a mat nganhing sia ii thaute kine ngawl tu a, ahizong na dangin kizangh thei tu hi." 
Leviticus7:25 Mihing khat pawpo in Topa tungah an taw biakpiakna in a kizangh thei nganhing thau a ne le, ama sia Pathian mi in kingaisun nawn ngawl tu hi." 
Leviticus7:26 Koisung po ah a teang zong Israel te in vacim chi le nganhing chi ne ngawl tu hi. 
Leviticus7:27 Hi thukham a paltan pawpo Pathian ii mi khat in kingaisun nawn ngawl tu hi. 
Leviticus7:28 Topa in Moses tungah 
Leviticus7:29 a nuai a, zui tu ngeina teng Israel mite atu in pia hi. A kuama po in kipawlkhop biakpiakna a piak ciang tua ii sung pan pawlkhat sia Topa tungah a tuam vilvel letsong in puak hamtang tu a," 
Leviticus7:30 tua letsong sia an taw biakpiakna bangin ama khut vateak taw paipui tu hi. Ama in nganhing thau sia a awmsa taw paipui tu a, Topa tungah a tuam vilvel letsong in pia tu hi." 
Leviticus7:31 Thiampipa in a thaute biaknatau ah hal tu a, ahizong a awmsa sia thiampite in tang tu hi." 
Leviticus7:32 A ziatsang phei bup sia a tuam vilvel letsong in," 
Leviticus7:33 a chi le a thau taw in kipawlkhop biakpiakna a pia thiampipa tungah pia tu hi. 
Leviticus7:34 A awmsa sia a tuam vilvel letsong hi a, a ziatsang phei sia Israel mite tung pan Topa ii a laak, thiampite tungah a piak a tuam vilvel letsong ahi hi. Hisia maisang hun theampo ah Israel mite ii thiampite tungah a piak tu ahi hi." 
Leviticus7:35 Hisia in Aaron le a tapate thiampi in a kikipsak ni a, Topa tungah a kipia an sung pan amate a kipia an khen khat ahi hi." 
Leviticus7:36 Tua ni in hi biakpiakna sung pan khen khat thiampite tungah piak tu in Israel mite tungah Topa in thupia hi. Hi sia in Israel mite ii mai sang hun theampo ah a zui tu ngeina khat ahi hi. 
Leviticus7:37 Tua ahiciang, hite in meihal biakpiakna, antang biakpiakna, mawphel biakpiakna, khialphel biakpiakna, kipsakna biakpiaknate, le pawlkhop biakpiakna atu in ngeinate ahi hi." 
Leviticus7:38 Hite sia sennealngam Sinai Mual ah, Israel mite ii zui tu biakpiaknate a vawt natu a son ni in Topa ii Moses tungah a thupiakte ahi hi." 
Leviticus8:1 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Leviticus8:2 “Aaron le a tapate ka ompuina Puanbuk kongbiang ah paipui in, tuaciang thiampi puante, noi sathau, mawphel biakpiak natu in khuital moi sia, tuutal niite le tol saw ngawl anluum khum sia hong paipui ta'n." 
Leviticus8:3 Tua zawkciang tualai ah taangpi bup khawm in,” ci hi." 
Leviticus8:4 Topa thupiak bangin Moses in seam a, taangpi a kikhop uh ciang," 
Leviticus8:5 amate tungah Moses in, “Tu in ka sep tu sia, Topa hong thupiak ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Leviticus8:6 Moses in Aaron le a tapate mai sangah paipui a biakna zeksa om bangin, kibualsak hi." 
Leviticus8:7 Moses in Aaron laktong le puantual silhsak a, a kawng ah kawngsawmna sawm hi. Ama in ephod silhsak a, a pha mama a kitak kawngkhau taw a kawng sawmsak hi." 
Leviticus8:8 Ama in awmdal thuasakin, a tungah Urim le Thummim koi hi." 
Leviticus8:9 Topa thupiak bangin ama in a lu ah dial khimsak a, a dial mai sangah a thiangtho ki aapna lim, kizepna khamh sia belh hi." 
Leviticus8:10 Tua zawkciang Moses in noi sathau la in Topa ompuina Puanbuk tung le a sungah a om nazak theampo noai siat a, hi bangin Topa tungah aap siat hi." 
Leviticus8:11 Topa tungah tua teng aap natu in ama in sathau pawlkhat la in biaknatau tung, a vanh zakte tung, kuang tung le a ngaknate tungah salivei the hi." 
Leviticus8:12 Moses in Aaron lu tung sathau buakna taw Aaron sia thiampi a hina kipsak hi. 
Leviticus8:13 Tua zawkciang Moses in Topa thupiak bangin Aaron tapate mai sangah paipui a, laktongte silsakin a kawng uh ah kawngsawmte sawmsakin a lu uh ah lukhute khusak hi." 
Leviticus8:14 Tua zawkciang Moses in mawphel biakpiak natu in khuital moi sia paipui a, Aaron le a tapate in khui lu tungah a khutte nga uh hi." 
Leviticus8:15 Tua biaknatau aap natu in Moses in tuasia ngo a, a khut taw a chi tawm la in biaknatau kingdokte noai hi. Tuaciang a taanglai chite biaknatau bul ah sung hi. Hi bangin ama in biaknatau aapin thiansua hi." 
Leviticus8:16 Moses in a sungthau theampo, a thinsa a phabel teng le a nauta le a tuam a thau teng la in biaknatau tungah hal siat hi." 
Leviticus8:17 Ama in a taanglai khuital sa teng, a vun, a tak le a ngilpi a ngilzangte la in Topa thupiak bangin ngiaphual pua sangah hal hi." 
Leviticus8:18 Tuasia zawkciang Moses in meihal biakpiak natu in tuutal paipui a, Aaron le a tapate in a lu tungah a khutte nga uh hi." 
Leviticus8:19 Moses in tua tuu ngo a, biaknatau pangh li tengah a chi the hi." 
Leviticus8:20 Ama in Topa thupiak bangin tuusa sem a, a sungkua le a nung peangte tui taw silin, a lu, a thau, le a taanglai tuusa teng biaknatau tungah hal hi. Hi meihal biakpiakna sia an taw biakpiakna hi a, a ngimnam in Topa lungkimsak hi." 
Leviticus8:21  
Leviticus8:22 Tua zawkciang Moses in thiampite a kipsak natu in tuutal a niina sia paipui a, Aaron le a tapate in a lu tungah a khutte nga uh hi." 
Leviticus8:23 Moses in tuutal ngo a, a chi tawm la in Aaron ziatsang bil tung, a ziatsang khutpi tung le a ziatsang peangpi tungah noai hi." 
Leviticus8:24 Tuaciang ama in Aaron ii tapate mai ah paipui a, tuutal chi pawlkhat a ziatsang bil tung, a ziatsang khutpi tung le a ziatsang peangpi tung tek ah noai hi. A taanglai chi te Moses in biaknatau pangh li tengah the hi." 
Leviticus8:25 Ama in a thau, a meithau, a sungthau theampo, a thinsa phabel teng, a nauta le a tuam a thau teng le a nung peang ziatsang la hi." 
Leviticus8:26 Tua zawkciang ama in Topa tungah a ki aap khum sung pan tol saw ngawl anluum khat, sathau taw kivawt anluum khat, le moh phang khat la in a thau tung le a nung peang ziatsang tungah koi hi." 
Leviticus8:27 Ama in Aaron le a tapate khut tungah hi an teng koi a, amate in Topa tungah a tuam vilvel letsong in pia uh hi." 
Leviticus8:28 Tuaciang Moses in amate tung pan tua an teng la in kipsakna biakpiakna in nei a, meihal biakpiakna ii tungbel biaknatau tungah hal hi. Hisia in an taw biakpiakna hi a, a ngimnam in Topa lungkimsak hi." 
Leviticus8:29 Tuaciang Moses in a awmsa la in Topa tungah a tuam vilvel letsong in pia hi. Tua in kipsakna biakpiakna tuutal sa sung pan Moses ii satel ahi hi. Topa thupiak bangin Moses in seam siat hi. 
Leviticus8:30 Moses in noi sathau tawm le biaknatau tungah a om sachi tawm la in, Aaron le a tapate le a puante tungah the hi. Hi bangin amate le a puante Topa tungah aap hi." 
Leviticus8:31 Moses in Aaron le a tapate tungah, “ Topa thupiak bangin Topa ompuina Puanbuk kongbiang ah sate paipui in huan vun a, tuaciang khum sungah a om kipsakna biakpiakna anluum taw tualai ah ne vun." 
Leviticus8:32 A sa le anluum neakmongte hal vun. 
Leviticus8:33 Kipsakna biakpiakna a zeksa teng a cin mateng ni sali sung Puanbuk kongbiang pan puapial ngawl tu nu hi. 
Leviticus8:34 Na mawna uh a mai natu in Topa thupiak bangin tuni in ih vawt zo hi. 
Leviticus8:35 Topa thupiak bangin seamin, sun taw zan taw ni sali sung Puanbuk kongbiang ah om hamtang tu nu hi. Na om bua uh le thi tu nu hi. Hi thu in kei tungah Topa hong thupiak ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Leviticus8:36 Topa ii Moses tungtawnin a thupiakte Aaron le a tapate in tuabangin vawt siat uh hi. 
Leviticus9:1 Thiampi kipsakna a zeksa teng a man khuavak ni in Moses in Aaron le a tapate le Israel lampuite sam hi. 
Leviticus9:2 Ama in Aaron tungah, “A mealhem ngawl khuital khat le tuutal khat paipui in, Topa tungah pia in a, mawphel biakpiak natu in khuital le meihal biakpiak natu in tuutal hi tu hi." 
Leviticus9:3 Tua zawkciang Israel mite tungah mawphel biakpiak natu in kealtal khat, meihal biakpiak natu in a mealhem ngawl kum khat a pha khuino khat le kum khat a pha tuuno khat," 
Leviticus9:4 pawlkhop biakpiakna khat atu in khuital khat le tuutal khat a ken natu son in. Sathau taw a kihel antang taw biakpiakna taw in amate in Topa tungah sangaw biakpiakna pia tu uh hi. Amate in hi teng vawt nanak tu uh hi, banghang ziam cile tuni in amate kungah Topa kilangh tu hi,” ci hi." 
Leviticus9:5 Moses thupiak bangin amate in Puanbuk mai ah na theampo paipui a, Topa a bia tu in taangpi bup tua munah kikhawm uh hi." 
Leviticus9:6 Moses in, “ Topa ompuina khuavak taang velvol sia no tungah a kilangh thei natu in hi sep tu theampo Topa in note thu hong pia zo hi,” ci hi." 
Leviticus9:7 Tua ahiciang ama in Aaron tungah, “Biaknatau ah pai in na mawnate le na mite mawnate a mai natu in, mawphel biakpiakna le meihal biakpiakna pia in. Topa thupiak bangin, mite mawnate a mai natu in hi biakpiakna pia in” ci hi." 
Leviticus9:8 Aaron in biaknatau ah pai a, a ma mawphel biakpiakna in khuital moi khat ngo hi." 
Leviticus9:9 A tapate in sachi puak a, ama in sachi sungah a khutme papin biaknatau king a dok teng sachi pawlkhat noai in, biaknatau bul ah a taanglai teng sung hi." 
Leviticus9:10 Tua zawkciang Moses tungah Topa thupiak bangin Aaron in a thau, a nautate le a thinsa a phabel teng biaknatau tungah hal hi." 
Leviticus9:11 Ahizong ama in a satak le a vun sia ngiaphual pua sangah hal hi. 
Leviticus9:12 Ama ii aituam meihal biakpiakna in ama in ngan ngo hi. A tapate in sachi puakin tuasia biaknatau pangh li tengah the hi. 
Leviticus9:13 Amate in a lu le a sabek dangte a khut sungah pia a, ama in tua sate biaknatau tungah hal hi." 
Leviticus9:14 Tua zawkciang ama in a sungkua teng le a nung peangte nii silin biaknatau tung, a om lai meihal biakpiaknate ii tungbel ah hal hi." 
Leviticus9:15 Tua zawkciang ama in mipite atu biakpiaknate pia hi. Ama in ama mawphel biakpiakna a vawt bangin mipite mawmai natu in a kipia keal sia kai in ngo a, biakpiakna in pia hi." 
Leviticus9:16 Ama in meihal biakpiak natu in nganno zongh paipui a, ngeina om bangin biakpiakna in pia hi." 
Leviticus9:17 Ama in antang biakpiakna pia a, anvui khutdim khat la in biaknatau tungah hal hi. (Hisia ni sim meihal biakpiakna belapna ahi hi.)" 
Leviticus9:18 Ama in mipite atu kipawlkhop biakpiakna in khuital le tuutal ngo hi. A tapate in sachi puak a, ama in biaknatau pangh li tengah the hi." 
Leviticus9:19 Aaron in khuithau le tuutal thaute," 
Leviticus9:20 nganhingte ii awmsa tungah koi in biaknatau ah paipui siat hi. Ama in biaknatau tungah a thaute halin 
Leviticus9:21 Moses thupiak bangin a awmsate le a nung peang ziatsangte thiampite atu in Topa tungah a tuam vilvel letsong in pia hi. 
Leviticus9:22 Aaron in sangaw biakpiakna teng a man ciang mipite tungah a khutte laamin thupha pia a, tua zawkciang tuaksuk hi." 
Leviticus9:23 Topa ompuina Puanbuk sungah Moses le Aaron tum in, hong pusua ciang amate in mipite thupha pia a, Topa ompuina khuavak taang velvol sia mipite tungah kilangh hi." 
Leviticus9:24 Thakhat thu in Topa in meikuang puak a, biaknatau tungah a om meihal biakpiakna le a thau teng haltum hi. Mipite sia tua meikuang a mu uh ciang au siat a lei maingat in kunsuk uh hi." 
Leviticus10:1 Aaron ii tapate Nadab le Abibu in amate mei lakna kuang tek la in a sungah meikam koi a, ngimnamtui helin Topa tungah pia hi. Ahizong tua mei thiangtho ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile Topa in tuasia a piak tu in amate thupia ngawl hi." 
Leviticus10:2 Thakhat thu in Topa in mei puak a, Topa ompuina munah tua mei in amate kaanghlum hi." 
Leviticus10:3 Tuasia ciang Moses in Aaron tungah, “ Topa in ‘Ka na a seamte theampo in ka thianthona zakta tu hi; ka mite tungah ka vaangletna ka pualaak tu hi’ a ci ciang a deina sia, tubang ahi hi,” ci hi. Ahizong Aaron bangma pau ngawl hi." 
Leviticus10:4 Moses in Aaron pano, Uzziel tapate ahi, Mishael le Elzaphan sam a, amate tungah, “Hi sungah hong pai tavun a, a thiangtho Puanbuk sung pan ngiaphual pua sangah na suapuisealte ii luang pusuapui tavun,” ci hi." 
Leviticus10:5 Moses thupiak bangin amate in a luangte puan taw tunin ngiaphual pua sangah pusuapui uh hi. 
Leviticus10:6 Tua zawkciang Moses in Aaron le a tapate Eleazar le Ithamar tungah, “Na khuangaina na lakna in sam pot ngawl ahibuale puan balkeak in om heak vun. Tuabang na om uh le, na thi tu uh a taangpi bup tungah Topa thin uuk tu hi. Ahizong Topa ii puak mei taw a kaanghlumte hu in na Israel mipuite theampo in a khuangaina lak thei tu uh hi." 
Leviticus10:7 Puanbuk kongbiang nusia heak vun, na nusia uh le na thi tu uh hi, banghang ziam cile Topa ii noi sathau taw a ki aap sate na hi uh hi,” ci hi. Tua ahiciang amate in Moses ci bangin seam uh hi." 
Leviticus10:8 Topa in Aaron tungah," 
Leviticus10:9 “Nangma le na tapate sapittui ahibuale beer na neak zawk uh ciang kong ompuina Puanbuk sungah tum ngawl tu nu hi; na tum uh le thi tu nu hi. Hi thukham na suan na paalte theampo ii zui tu ahi hi. 
Leviticus10:10 Note in Topa neisa le zak ngengei vanhte sia, biakna taw kisai in a thiangtho le a thiangtho ngawl khentel tu nu hi." 
Leviticus10:11 Moses tungtawn a kong piak thukham theampo note in Israel mite tungah hil nanak tu nu hi,” ci hi." 
Leviticus10:12 Moses in Aaron le a taanglai a tapa niite Eleazar le Ithamar tungah, “ Topa tungah a kipia ante sung pan a taanglai antang biakpiakna teng la vun a, tol saw ngawl anluum vawtin, biaknatau pangh ah ne vun, banghang ziam cile biakpiakna sia thiangtho mama hi." 
Leviticus10:13 A thiangtho munah ne vun; tua in Topa tungah a kipia an sung pan hong khensak nangma le na tapate ii tan tu ahi hi. Tua in Topa ii kei tungah hong thupiak ahi hi. 
Leviticus10:14 Ahizong nangma le na innkuanpuite in thiampite atu a Topa tungah a kituam piak letsong le a sa tel, a awmsa le a pheisate ne thei tu nu hi. Biakna taw kisai a thiangthona mun pawpo ah tua sate ne thei tu nu hi. Tuate Israel mite ii pawlkhop biakpiakna te sung pan hong khensak nangma le na tate tan tu in hong kipia biakpiaknate ahi hi," 
Leviticus10:15 Topa tungah an biakpiakna in a thau a kipiak hun ciang amate in a pheisa le a awmsa paipui tu uh hi. Topa thupiak bangin hi sanamte nangma le na tate neisa hi tawntung tu hi,” ci hi." 
Leviticus10:16 Mawphel biakpiak natu ahi keal sia ii thu Moses in a dok ciang tua keal, kihal tum zo ci sia he hi. Hi thu hangin Eleazar le Ithamar tungah thin uuk a, ama in," 
Leviticus10:17 “Banghangin mawphel biakpiakna sa a thiangtho munah ne ngawl nu ziam? Tuasia in a thiangtho mama an hi a, taangpi taangta mawmai natu in Topa ii no hong piaksa ahi hi." 
Leviticus10:18 A chi sia Puanbuk thiang sungah a kipaipui ngawl hu in, kong thupiak bangin biakpiakna sate tua munah na neak tu uh ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Leviticus10:19 Aaron in, “Mawphel biakpiakna sa sia tuni in ne hi leng Topa in hong saang tu ziam? Tuni in Topa tungah mipite in mawphel biakpiakna le meihal biakpiakna pia zo napi, kei tungah hi bang a lauhuai nate hong tung lalai hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Leviticus10:20 Moses sia hi thu a zaak ciang lungkim hi. 
Leviticus11:1 Topa in Moses le Aaron tungah," 
Leviticus11:2 Israel mite atu a nuai a ngeinate pia hi. Leitung nganhing," 
Leviticus11:3 peangcin kaa a, eakkha zongh a thai pawpo ii sa na ne thei tu uh a," 
Leviticus11:4 ahizong kalaohte, sakihte, ahibuale bilpite sa na ne bua het tu uh hi. Tuate a thiang ngawlin ngaisut tu ahi hi; hite eakkha a thai hangin a peangcin kaa ngawl hi." 
Leviticus11:5  
Leviticus11:6  
Leviticus11:7 Voksa ne heak vun. Tuate a thiang ngawlin ngaisut tu ahi hi; Vok sia a peangcin kaa hikale eakkha thai ngawl hi. 
Leviticus11:8 Tua nganhingte ii sa ne heak vun, a thite zongh tham heak vun; tuate thiangtho ngawl hi." 
Leviticus11:9 Tha le hawlip a nei ngasa nam peuma ne thei tu nu hi," 
Leviticus11:10 ahizong tuisung nganhing, tha le hawlip a nei ngawlte na ne buahet tu uh hi." 
Leviticus11:11 Hi nganhingte a thiang ngawlin ngaisut tu ahi hi. Na ne buahet tu uh a, a thite zongh na tham buatu uh hi." 
Leviticus11:12 Tuisung a nungta, tha le hawlip a nei ngawl peuma na ne bua het tu uh hi." 
Leviticus11:13 A nuai a vacimte: muvanlai, simbu, muthi, mupui; mumeikaa, vaciik, va-ak; kalaoh vacim; tuipiva, hilniang vacimlian, vakaang, tuingumpai, vanungak; vasuangui le bak sate na ne buahet tu uh hi." 
Leviticus11:14  
Leviticus11:15  
Leviticus11:16  
Leviticus11:17  
Leviticus11:18  
Leviticus11:19  
Leviticus11:20 Peang luk a nei tha nei lungnote," 
Leviticus11:21 a leang vakeu theite simngawl po thiang ngawl hi. 
Leviticus11:22 Khaumaw, khuangbai le sim khaumawte na ne thei tu uh hi." 
Leviticus11:23 Ahizong tha nei a, a bokvak nganhing no dang theampo a thiang ngawl het in ngaisut tu ahi hi." 
Leviticus11:24 A kuama po in a nuai a nganhing thite a tham peuma nitak dongin nin tu hi: tuate peangcin nei ahihang a kaa ngawl, eakkha a thai ngawl nganhing theampo le, a peangbom a, peang li nei nganhing theampo ahi hi. Tua nganhing a thite a pua peuma in a puan sawp nanak tu a, ahizong nitak dongin a thiang ngawl hi lai tu hi." 
Leviticus11:25  
Leviticus11:26  
Leviticus11:27  
Leviticus11:28  
Leviticus11:29 Savokphualte, ngam zunamte, sanchiimte le, thankhik namte a nin in kingaisun hi." 
Leviticus11:30  
Leviticus11:31 Hi nganhingte ahibuale a thiluangte a tham pawpo nitak dongin a thiang ngawl hi tu hi. 
Leviticus11:32 Hi sa a thite na khat pawpo tungah a taak le, a tukna tua vanhte a thiang ngawl hi tu hi. A kizakna taw kisai ngawlin thing, puan, savun, ip cite hisia in huam siat tu hi. Tuasia tui sungah dia tu a, ahizong nitak dongin a thiang ngawl hi tu hi." 
Leviticus11:33 Tua sathi luangte leibeal khat sungah a taak le, tua ii sungah a om na theampo a thiang ngawl hi tu a, a beal sutham hamtang tu nu hi." 
Leviticus11:34 A kine thei an pawpo tungah tuabang beal sung pan tui a kisung le a nin hi tu a, tuabang beal sungah a om a kidawn thei pawpo nin tu hi." 
Leviticus11:35 Sa thiluangte ii taakna khat pawpo sia thiang ngawl a, lei taw kivawt meibung ahibuale bealpeu sia kiseaktham tu hi." 
Leviticus11:36 Hi sathi luangte ii a thuthaak dang pawpo a thiang ngawl hi tu a, ahizong tuinaak ahibuale tuibeam sia thiang veve hi." 
Leviticus11:37 A kiciing tu thaicii tungah sathi luang khat a taak le, tua thaicii thiang veve hi." 
Leviticus11:38 Ahizong thaicii sia tui sungah kidia in tua tungah sathi luang khat a taak le tua thaicii thiang ngawl hi. 
Leviticus11:39 A kine thei nganhing khat a thi le, tuasia a tham pawpo nitak dongin thiang ngawl tu hi." 
Leviticus11:40 Tua nganhing sate a ne a om le, a puan sawp hamtang tu a, ahizong nitak dongin a thiang ngawl hi lai tu hi; tua sathi luang a pua pawpo in a puan sawp hamtang tu hi, ahizong ama sia nitak dongin a thiang ngawl hi lai tu hi." 
Leviticus11:41 Lei ah a vak nganhing note," 
Leviticus11:42 a awmtaal ahizong, peang li taw a vak ahizong, peang tam mama a neite ahizong ne ngawl het tu nu hi." 
Leviticus11:43 Hi sate ne in noma le noma a thiang ngawl kisua heak vun. 
Leviticus11:44 Keima in Topa na Pathian ka hi a, keima thiangtho ka hikom note zongh na thiangtho uh kul hi." 
Leviticus11:45 Na Pathian ka hi thei natu in Egypt pan hong pusuapui Topa ka hi hi. Keima thiangtho ka hikom note na thiangtho uh kul hi. 
Leviticus11:46 Tua ahiciang hisia in nganhingte, vacimte, tuisung a nungtate theampo le leitung a vakte theampo taw a kisai thukham ahi hi." 
Leviticus11:47 Note in biakna taw kisai a thiang le a thiang ngawl, neak thei le neak thei ngawl nganhingte na khentel thei tu na kidop uh kul hi." 
Leviticus12:1 Topa in Moses tungah Israel mite atu in," 
Leviticus12:2 zui tu a nuai a ngeinate pia hi. Numei khat in tha sim nin a nei hunsung bangma in tapa khat a nei zawk ni sali sung sia biakna taw kisai in thiangtho ngawl hi. 
Leviticus12:3 Ni liat ni in a tapa vunteap ki at tu hi. 
Leviticus12:4 Tuaciang numei in a chi luanna pan biakna taw kisai in a thiantho dong ni sawmthum le ni thum sung ngak tu hi. Ama in a kithiansuana hun a cin mateng a thiangtho na khat zongh tham thei ngawl tu a, a thiangtho Puanbuk sungah tum ngawl het tu hi." 
Leviticus12:5 Numei khat in tha sim nin a nei hunsung bangma in tanu khat a nei zawk ni sawm le ni li sung biakna taw kisai in thiangtho ngawl hi. Tuaciang a chi luanna pan biakna taw kisai in a thian natu in ni sawmluk le ni luk ngei lai tu hi. 
Leviticus12:6 Tapa ahizong tanu ahizong nei in a thiansua na hun a cin zawkciang, ama in Topa ompuina Puanbuk kongbiang ah a om thiampipa tungah meihal biakpiak natu in kum khat a pha tuuno khat le mawphel biakpiak natu in inn vakhu ahibuale ngam vakhu khat paipui tu hi." 
Leviticus12:7 Thiampipa in Topa tungah tua nu ii a zeksa biakpiakna piaksak tu a, ama thiantho ngawlna teng thiansuana in a zeksa teng vawtsak a, tuaciang ama biakna taw kisai in thiangtho tu hi. Hi thu in numei khat ii a naunei zawkciang a zui hamtang tu ahi hi." 
Leviticus12:8 Numeinu in tuuno khat a nei zo bua ahile inn vakhu nii ahibuale ngam vakhu nii, meihal biakpiak natu in khat, mawphel biakpiak natu in a dang khat paipui tu a, tuaciang thiampipa in tua nu a thiantho ngawlna pan a thiansua tu in a zeksa teng vawtsak tu a, tuaciang ama biakna taw kisai in thiangtho tu hi." 
Leviticus13:1 Topa in Moses le Aaron tungah hi thukhamte pia hi. 
Leviticus13:2 Mihing khat pawpo in a vun tungah, a lauhuai vun natna dong a suak thei tu meima khat ahibuale uilut khat ahibuale a tum thei meima khat a nei le, ama sia Aaron suan thiampite kungah kipaipui tu hi." 
Leviticus13:3 Thiampipa in a meima etsak tu a, a meima sung multe kaangin a meima kiimkot sangin a sa a dum zaw le tua meima sia a lauhuai vun natna hi a, thiampipa in tua pa a nin in thangsak tu hi." 
Leviticus13:4 Ahizong tua meima kaangin, a kiimkot zongh dum zaw ngawl a, a multe zongh a kaang buale thiampipa in tua pa ni sali sung koituam tu hi." 
Leviticus13:5 Thiampipa in ni sali ni in en kik tu a, a meimate beak ngawlin, kibang lai in, a ngaisun le a dang ni sali sung ma koituam lai tu hi." 
Leviticus13:6 Thiampipa in ni sali ni in en kik tu a, a meima thipin tuasia a beak buale ama sia biakna taw kisai in thiangtho hi ci in thangsak tu hi; tuasia meima thawthong bek hi. Tua pa in a puante sawp tu a, biakna taw kisai in a thiang hi tu hi." 
Leviticus13:7 Ahizong thiampipa in en a, thiang hi ci in a thansak zawkciang a meima a beak le thiampipa kungah kilak kik hamtang tu hi." 
Leviticus13:8 Thiampipa in en kik tu a, a meima a beak le ama sia a thiang ngawlin thangsak tu hi. Tua in a lauhuai vun natna ahi hi." 
Leviticus13:9 Mihing khat pawpo in a lauhuai vun natna a nei le tua pa thiampipa kungah kipaipui tu a," 
Leviticus13:10 thiampipa in en tu hi. A vun tungah meima kaang khat om in, a multe kaang a, a nai a dim le," 
Leviticus13:11 tua meima sia a dam thei ngawl vun natna ahi hi. Thiampipa in tua pa a thiangtho ngawlin thangsak tu a, a thiang ngawl a kimusa hi zo ahikom koituam kul ngawl hi." 
Leviticus13:12 Tua vun natna beakin a lu pan a peang dong a theng le," 
Leviticus13:13 thiampipa in en kik tu hi. A pumpi tung bup beak zo in a mu le thiampipa in biakna taw kisai in a thiang in thangsak tu hi. A vun theampo hong kaang ahile ama sia biakna taw kisai in a thiang ahi hi. 
Leviticus13:14 Ahizong a meima balh a kimu po ciang ama sia a thiang ngawl ahi hi. 
Leviticus13:15 Thiampipa in en kik tu a, a meima a balhin a mu le a thiang ngawlin thangsak tu hi. A meima balh sia vun natna cinopna hi a, tua pa sia a thiang ngawl ahi hi." 
Leviticus13:16 Ahizong a meima damin a kaan kik ciang, thiampipa kungah tua pa pai tu a," 
Leviticus13:17 thiampipa in en kik tu hi, tua meima a kaang zo le, a ma biakna taw kisai in a thiang hi a, thiampipa in a thiangin thangsak tu hi." 
Leviticus13:18 Uilut vei khat a dam zawkciang," 
Leviticus13:19 a ma santak kang in ahibuale a san le a kang kithua in, hong tum le thiampipa tungah kilak tu hi." 
Leviticus13:20 Thiampipa in en tu a, tua a tum sia, a kiim a vunte sang dum zaw in a sungah a multe a kaang le, thiampipa in ama sia a thiang ngawlin thangsak tu hi. Tuasia in uilut pan a kipan a lauhuai vun natna ahi hi." 
Leviticus13:21 Ahizong thiampipa in en in a sung a, a multe kaang ngawlin, a kiim a vunte sangin a dum zaw tuan bua a, ahizong daang pian in a mu le thiampipa in ama ni sali sung koituam tu hi." 
Leviticus13:22 A meima a beak le thiampipa in ama a thiang ngawlin thangsak tu a; ama sia vun natna vei ahi hi. 
Leviticus13:23 Ahizong a meima a ngei bangma hi in a beak tuan buale uilut mapawn hi lel a, thiampipa in ama biakna taw kisai a thiangin thangsak tu hi." 
Leviticus13:24 Mihing khat pawpo mei in kaanghin, a sa kaang in ahibuale a san le a kaang a kithua le," 
Leviticus13:25 thiampipa in en tu hi. A meima sung multe kaangin, a kiim a vunte sangin a dum zaw le, mei kakna pan a kipan a lauhuai vun natna hi a, thiampipa in tua pa a thiang ngawlin thangsak tu hi." 
Leviticus13:26 Ahizong a meima santak multe kaang ngawlin, a kiim vunte sangin dumzaw tuan ngawl a, ahizong a daang pian le thiampipa in ama ni sali sung koituam tu hi." 
Leviticus13:27 Ni sali ni in thiampipa in ama en kik tu a, a meima a beak le vun natna ahikom thiampipa in a thiang ngawlin thangsak tu hi." 
Leviticus13:28 Ahizong a meima beak ngawlin, kilamdang tuan ngawl a, a daang pian bek ahile a lauhuai vun natna hi ngawl hi. Mei kakna mapawn khat bek ahikom thiampipa in biakna taw kisai in a thiangin thangsak tu hi." 
Leviticus13:29 Pa ahizong numei ahizong a lu tung ahibuale a kha ah meima a nei ciang," 
Leviticus13:30 thiampipa in en tu hi. A kiim a, a vunte sangin dum zaw in, a sung a multe engin a mal a no le, tua in a lauhuai vun natna hi a, thiampipa in a thiang ngawlin thangsak tu hi." 
Leviticus13:31 Thiampipa in a et ciang a kiim a, a vunte sangin a meima dum zaw tuan ngawlin, ahizong ama sung a multe mul dang taw a kibang buale, thiampipa in ama ni sali sung koituam tu hi." 
Leviticus13:32 Thiampipa in ni sali ni in a meima en kik tu a, beak zaw ngawl, a sungah mul eng om ngawlin, a kiim a vunte sangin a dum zaw tuan buale," 
Leviticus13:33 tua pa in a meima kiim simngawl teng, a sam le a mul meet tu hi. Thiampipa in ama ni sali sung koituam tu hi." 
Leviticus13:34 Ni sali ni in thiampipa in a meima en kik tu a, a meima beak ngawlin a kiim a vunte sang a dum zaw tuan buale thiampipa in ama biakna taw kisai a thiangin thangsak hi tu hi. Tua pa in a puante sawp tu a, ama a thiangtho tu hi." 
Leviticus13:35 Ahizong a thiang in a thansak zawkciang a meima a beak le," 
Leviticus13:36 thiampipa in en kik tu hi. A meima a beak le, a mul engte et kul nawn ngawl a; tua pa a thiang ngawl ahi hi." 
Leviticus13:37 Ahizong thiampipa in a meima beak ngawlin, a sung a multe ciidam in po a, a meima a damin a ngaisun le thiampipa in ama biakna taw kisai a thiangin thangsak tu hi." 
Leviticus13:38 Pa ahizong numei ahizong a vun tungah a kaangpawlte a om le," 
Leviticus13:39 thiampipa in en tu hi. Tua munte a kaang philphel ahile, vun mealhem natu bekin a piang hi a; tua pa biakna taw kisai in a thiang ahi hi." 
Leviticus13:40 Mihing khat a nung sam ahizong, a maisam ahizong a pul hangin tua in ninsak ngawl hi." 
Leviticus13:41  
Leviticus13:42 Ahizong a lu kolhna ah a san le a kaang a kithua meima a piang le, tua in a lauhuai vun natna ahi hi." 
Leviticus13:43 Thiampipa in en tu a, a san le a kaang kithua meima a om le," 
Leviticus13:44 a lu tungah a lauhuai vun natna vei ahikom thiampipa in ama a thiang ngawlin thangsak tu hi. 
Leviticus13:45 A lauhuai vun natna a veipa in puan ek silh tu a, a sam pot ngawlin, a mai nuaisang teng seal a, “A thiang ngawl, a thiang ngawl ka hi hi!” ci in au tu hi." 
Leviticus13:46 Tua natna a vei hun sung a thiang ngawl hi a, midangte taw a kikhualana ngiaphual pua sangah teang tu hi." 
Leviticus13:47 Samul ahibuale puanneal puansilh tungah," 
Leviticus13:48 puanneal puanbek, ahibuale samul puan, ahibuale savun, ahibuale savun taw kivawt khat pawpo tungah a pawl a om ciang," 
Leviticus13:49 a hing ahibuale a sanin a beak le thiampipa tung lak tu hi. 
Leviticus13:50 Thiampipa in en tu a, tua puan ni sali sung koituam tu hi." 
Leviticus13:51 Thiampipa in ni sali ni ciang en kik tu a, tua a pawl sia a beak le, tua puan a nin ahi hi." 
Leviticus13:52 Thiampipa in hal tu hi, banghang ziam cile a beak thei ahikom mei taw haltum tu ahi hi." 
Leviticus13:53 Ahizong ama in a ettel ciang, a pawl sia puan tungah kizel ngawlin a mu le," 
Leviticus13:54 ama in tua puan a sawp natu le a dang ni sali sung a koituam natu in thupia tu hi. 
Leviticus13:55 Tuaciang ama in en tu a, tua a pawl na ii a pianzia a kilaih buale a kizel bua zong nin veve hi; a pawl te omna mun a nung ahizong a mai ahizong mei taw hal tu hi." 
Leviticus13:56 Ahizong thiampipa in a et ciang a pawl teng a bo zo le, tua puan ahibuale savun sia tua san tak teng eaukeak tu hi." 
Leviticus13:57 Tua zawkciang a pawl te hong piangkik in a kizel kik le a neipa in tua sia hal tu hi. 
Leviticus13:58 Ama in tua na sia silthiang in a pawlte a bo le, ama in tuasia silthiang kik tu a, biakna taw kisai in a thiang hi tu hi." 
Leviticus13:59 Hisia in samul ahibuale puanneal ahibuale samul puan, savun taw kivawt na khat pawpo tungah a om a pawlte taw kisai zui tu thukham ahi hi; hisia in biakna taw kisai a thiang le a thiang ngawl khensatna daan ahi hi." 
Leviticus14:1 Topa in a lauhuai vun natna pan a dam mihing khat a zeksa thiansua natu in," 
Leviticus14:2 a nuai a zui tu ngeinate Moses tungah pia hi. Ama a thiang hi ci in a kithansak tu ni in, thiampipa kungah kipaipui tu a," 
Leviticus14:3 thiampipa in ngiaphual pua sangah ama paipui in en tu hi. 
Leviticus14:4 A natna a dam le, thiampipa in biakna taw kisai a thiang vacim nii sia cedar thing, khausan, hyssop meangte taw a kipaipui khop natu in thupia tu hi." 
Leviticus14:5 Tuaciang thiampipa in vacimte khat ciktui thiang a kidim leibeal khat tungah a thalup natu in thupia tu hi. 
Leviticus14:6 Ama in vacim dang khat sia la in a kithat vacim ii chi sungah cedar thing, khausan le hyssop taw, pap khawm tu hi." 
Leviticus14:7 Ama in vun natna vei a kithiansua tu pa ii tungah salivei a chi the tu a, tua zawkciang ama thiang hi ci in thiampipa in thangsak tu hi. A nungta vacim sia dui sungah leangsak tu hi." 
Leviticus14:8 Tua pa in a puan sawp tu a, a multe theampo meetin kibual tu a, tua zawkciang ama biakna taw kisai in a thiang hi tu hi. Ama ngiaphual sung tum thei tu ahihang, buk pua sangah ama ni sali sung a teen kul tu hi." 
Leviticus14:9 Ni sali ni in ama in a sam, a khamul, a mitmul le a taanglai a pum tung mul teng theampo meet kik siat tu a; a puante silthiang in kibual tu a, tuaciang ama biakna taw kisai in a thiang hi tu hi." 
Leviticus14:10 A ni liat ni in kum khat a pha, a mealhem ngawl tuutalno nii le tuu anu khat olive thau taw kihel anvui kilogramme thum le olive thau litre khat ii khenthum sua khenkhat, ama in paipui tu hi." 
Leviticus14:11 Thiampipa in tua pa le biakpiaknate Topa ompuina Puanbuk kongbiang ah paipui tu hi. 
Leviticus14:12 Tuaciang thiampipa in sathau litre khat ii khenthum sua khenkhat taw tuutal note khat khialphel biakpiakna in pia tu hi. Ama in thiampipa atu in tua te Topa tungah a tuam vilvel letsong in pia tu hi. 
Leviticus14:13 Ama in mawphel biakpiak natu le meihal biakpiak natu in nganhing kingawna mun, a thiangthona munah tuuno ngo tu hi. Ama in hi bangin vawt tu hi, banghang ziam cile khialphel biakpiakna sia mawphel biakpiakna taw kibangin thiampipa ii neisa hi a, thiangtho mama hi." 
Leviticus14:14 Thiampipa in tuuno chi tawm la in, biakna taw kisai a kithiansua pa ii a ziatsang bildawn, a ziatsang khutpi dawn le a ziatsang peangpi dawn noisak tu hi." 
Leviticus14:15 Thiampipa in olive thau tawm la in a veisang khutpheak sungah sung tu a," 
Leviticus14:16 a ziatsang khutme khat a sungah papin, Topa ompuina tualai ah tua sathau pawlkhat salivei the tu hi." 
Leviticus14:17 Ama in a khutpheak sung a om sathau tawm le tuuno chi tawm la in biakna taw kisai thiang hi, ci in a kithangsak tu pa ii a ziatsang bildawn, a ziatsang khutpi, a ziatsang peangpi tungah noai tu hi." 
Leviticus14:18 A khutpheak sungah a taanglai sathaute tua pa lu tungah thisak tu hi. Tuabangin thiampipa in a zeksa thiansuana vawt tu hi. 
Leviticus14:19 Tuaciang thiampipa in mawphel biakpiakna pia in a zeksa thiansuana vawt tu hi. Tuasia zawkciang ama in meihal biakpiak natu in ngan ngo tu a," 
Leviticus14:20 antang biakpiakna taw biaknatau tungah pia tu hi. Hi bangin thiampipa in a zeksa thiansuana vawt tu a, tua pa biakna taw kisai in thiang tu hi." 
Leviticus14:21 Tua pa zawngin a dang bangma a pia zo buale a kithiansua natu bekin, tuutal khat khialphel biakpiak natu, thiampipa atu in Topa tungah a tuam vilvel letsongin pia tu hi. Ama in antang biakpiak natu in olive thau taw a kihel anvui kilogramme khat le olive thau litre khat ii khenthum sua khenkhat paipui tu hi." 
Leviticus14:22 Ama in inn vakhu nii ahibuale ngam vakhu nii zongh keng tu a, mawmai biakpiak natu in khat, le meihal biakpiak natu in khat hi tu hi." 
Leviticus14:23 A kithiansua zawk ni liat ni in, Puanbuk kongbiang ah a om thiampipa kungah tuate paipui tu hi." 
Leviticus14:24 Thiampipa in tuu le olive thau keng tu a, thiampipa atu in Topa tungah a tuam vilvel letsongin pia tu hi." 
Leviticus14:25 Ama in tuu ngo tu a, a chisan tawm la in tua pa ii ziatsang bildawn, a ziatsang khutpi tung le ziatsang peangpi tungah noai tu hi." 
Leviticus14:26 Thiampipa in a veisang khutpheak tungah sathau tawm sung tu a," 
Leviticus14:27 a ziatsang khutme taw Topa ompuina tualai ah tua sathau pawlkhat salivei the tu hi. 
Leviticus14:28 Ama in chisan a noina mun tengma ahi, a ziatsang bildawn, a ziatsang khutpi tung le a ziatsang peangpi tungah sathau tawm noai tu hi." 
Leviticus14:29 A khutpheak sungah a taanglai sathau teng sia tua pa lu tungah thisak tu a, hi bangin a zeksa thiansuana vawt tu hi." 
Leviticus14:30 Tuaciang ama in inn vakhu khat ahibuale ngam vakhu khat sia," 
Leviticus14:31 mawphel biakpiakna in pia tu a, a dang khat sia meihal biakpiakna in antang biakpiakna taw pia tu hi. Hi bangin thiampipa in a zeksa thiansuana vawt tu hi." 
Leviticus14:32 Hisia in a kiitakhuai vun natna vei a ahihang ama kithiansua natu in a kisamh biakpiaknate a pia zo ngawl sia ii zui tu thukham ahi hi. 
Leviticus14:33 Topa in Moses le Aaron tungah," 
Leviticus14:34 inn sungah cipawl natna kizel in a om ciang a nuai a zui tu ngeinate pia hi. (Hite sia Israel mite ii lua tu in Topa ii a piak tu Canaan ngamsung a tum zawkciang a zak tu ngeinate ahi hi.) Topa in a inn sungah cipawl natna puak hi ci in mihing khat pawpo in a mu le pai in thiampipa tungah son nanak tu hi. 
Leviticus14:35  
Leviticus14:36 Thiampipa in cipawlnatna en tu a pai ma in inn sung vanh theampo a pusua natu in thupia tu a; tua ahibuale inn sung vanh teng thiang ngawl hi, ci tu hi. Tuaciang ama sia inn ah pai tu a," 
Leviticus14:37 cipawl natna sittel tu hi. Tuate in ahingpian ahibuale a sanpawl hi a, innpang a nesuk tu bang ahile," 
Leviticus14:38 tua inn sia ni sali sung tawkalh cip in ama in nusia tu hi. 
Leviticus14:39 Ni sali ni ciang ama heak kikin sittel kik tu hi. Tua cipawl natna a beak le," 
Leviticus14:40 tua cipawl natna a baanna suangte la in khuapi puasang a ninna munah a vawk natu in thiampipa in thupia tu hi. 
Leviticus14:41 Tua zawkciang ama in pang sungsang belna teng kiatsak tu a, a kiatna vuite khuapi pua sang a ninna ah vawksak tu hi." 
Leviticus14:42 Tuaciang tua suangte a kilaakna munah suang dangte koi kik tu a, a zutna thak taw zut kik tu hi." 
Leviticus14:43 Suangte la in pangte kiat a, za a zut kik zawkciang cipawl natna tua inn sungah hong om kik veve le," 
Leviticus14:44 thiampipa in pai in en tu hi. Tua cipawl natna a kizel ahile tua inn a thiang ngawl ahi hi. 
Leviticus14:45 Tua inn phel tu a, a suangte, a thingte le a zutnate khua puasang a ninna munah vawk tu hi." 
Leviticus14:46 Tua inn sia taw a kikalh laitakin a sungah a tum khat pawpo sia nitak dong a thiang ngawl hi tu hi. 
Leviticus14:47 Hi inn sungah a lum ahibuale an a ne sia in ama puante sawpthiang tu hi. 
Leviticus14:48 Thiampipa in inn sia za a kizut zawk in a et ciang cipawl natna a om kik nawn buale, cipawl natna bo thiang zo ahikom ama in biakna taw kisai a thiang inn ci in thangsak tu hi." 
Leviticus14:49 Inn thiansua natu in ama in vacim nii, cedar thing tawm, khausan le hyssop baakno meang khat paipui tu hi." 
Leviticus14:50 Ama in cik tuithiang koina leibeal tungah vacimte khat ngo tu hi. 
Leviticus14:51 Tuaciang ama in cedar thing, hyssop, khausan le a nungta vacim paipui in, a kithat vacim chi sung le tuithiang sungah pap tu hi. Tuaciang ama in tua inn salivei the tu hi." 
Leviticus14:52 Hi bangin vacim chi, tuithiang, a nungta vacim, cedar thing, hyssop le khausante taw ama in inn thiansua tu hi." 
Leviticus14:53 Tuaciang ama in a nungta vacim sia khuapi puasang dui sungah leangsak tu hi. Hi bangin ama in a zeksa inn thiansuana vawt tu a, biakna taw kisai in inn thiang hi tu hi." 
Leviticus14:54 Hiteng sia a kiitakhuai vun natnate; 
Leviticus14:55 meimate, uilutte ahibuale a tum meimate, le puan tung ahibuale inn sungah cipawl natnate taw kisai zui tu thukhamte ahi hi." 
Leviticus14:56  
Leviticus14:57 Hi thukhamte in na khat sia thiang ziam thiang ngawl ziam khensat hi. 
Leviticus15:1 Topa in Moses le Aaron tungah," 
Leviticus15:2 Israel mite atu in a nuai a zui tu ngeinate pia hi. Pasal khat pawpo a zang pan a tui a naai a pusuak le," 
Leviticus15:3 tawlnga ngawlin a luang ahizong, a kikhak ahizong tua sia thiang ngawl hi." 
Leviticus15:4 Lupna tungah a to ahibuale a lum le tua lupna thiang ngawl hi. 
Leviticus15:5 Tua pa lupna a tham pawpo," 
Leviticus15:6 ahibuale a tona tungah a to pawpo in a puante sawp in kibual nanak tu a, ahizong ama nitak dongin thiang ngawl veve hi." 
Leviticus15:7 Tua naai a neipa a tham pawpo in a puante sawp in kibual nanak tu a, ahizong ama nitak dongin thiang ngawl veve hi." 
Leviticus15:8 Tua naai a neipa in biakna taw kisai in a thiang khat pawpo cil a phii le tua pa sia ama puan teng sawp in, kibual nanak tu a, ahizong ama nitak dongin thiang ngawl veve hi." 
Leviticus15:9 Tua naai a neipa tona siphukungh ahibuale tokhum sia thiang ngawl hi. 
Leviticus15:10 Hi sia pa tona a tham pawpo nitak dongin thiang ngawl hi. Hi sia pa tona a pua pawpo in ama puante sawp in, kibual nanak tu a, ahizong ama nitak dongin thiang ngawl veve hi." 
Leviticus15:11 Tua naai a neipa in a khut sil masa ngawlin mihing khat po a tham le ama puan teng sawp in kibual nanak tu a, ahizong ama nitak dongin thiang ngawl veve hi." 
Leviticus15:12 Hi sia pa ii a tham leibeal pawpo kisutham tu a, ama thamsa thing taw kivawt kuang pawpo kisilthiang hamtang tu hi." 
Leviticus15:13 Tua naai a neipa a dam zawkciang ni sali sung ngak tu a, tuaciang a puante sawp in cik tuithiang sungah kibual nanak tu a, tuaciang ama biakna taw kisai in thiang tu hi." 
Leviticus15:14 A ni liat ni in ama in inn vakhu nii ahibuale ngam vakhu nii Topa ompuina Puanbuk kongbiang ah paipui in thiampipa pia tu hi. 
Leviticus15:15 Thiampipa in mawphel biakpiakna in khat, meihal biakpiakna in a dang khat pia tu hi. Hi bangin tua pa atu a zeksa thiansuana ama in vawt tu hi." 
Leviticus15:16 Mihing khat sia a bawtui a pusuak le a pum bupin kibual tu a, ahizong ama nitak dongin nin veve hi." 
Leviticus15:17 Tua bawtui a taakna puan taw ahibuale savun taw kivawt na khat pawpo sia silthiang tu a, ahizong nitak dongin tua na sia nin veve hi." 
Leviticus15:18 Numei le pa omkhopna a nei zawkciang a nii in kibual nanak tu a, ahizong amate nitak dongin thiang ngawl veve hi." 
Leviticus15:19 Numei khat tha sim nin a nei ciang ama ni sali sung thiang ngawl hi. Tua nu a tham pawpo nitak dongin thiang ngawl hi. 
Leviticus15:20 Tua numei ii a nin nei sung a tona ahibuale a lupna sia thiang ngawl hi. 
Leviticus15:21 Ama lupna ahizong a tona ahizong a tham pawpo in ama puante silthiang in kibual tu a, ahizong nitak dongin ama nin veve hi." 
Leviticus15:22  
Leviticus15:23  
Leviticus15:24 Pa khat in numei khat a nin nei sungin a omkhoppui le tua pa niinsak a, ni sali sung thiang ngawl hi, tua ciang a lupna pawpo zongh thiang ngawl hi." 
Leviticus15:25 Numei khat tha sim a nin nei zawkciang ni tam mama sung a chi a luang le, ahibuale numei nin nei ngei hun sangin a chi luan hun a tamzaw le, nin a nei hunsung teng bangma in a chi luan laiteng tua nu sia nin hi." 
Leviticus15:26 A nin nei hun sungin a lupna le a tona pawpo sia nin hi. 
Leviticus15:27 Tuate a tham pawpo nin a, a puante sawp in kibual nanak tu a; ahizong ama nitak dongin thiang ngawl veve hi." 
Leviticus15:28 A chi luan a kan zawkciang ama in ni sali ngak tu a, tuaciang ama biakna taw kisai in thiang tu hi." 
Leviticus15:29 A ni liat ni in ama in inn vakhu nii ahibuale ngam vakhu nii Topa ompuina Puanbuk kongbiang ah a om thiampipa kungah paipui tu hi. 
Leviticus15:30 Thiampipa in mawphel biakpiakna in khat le meihal biakpiakna in a dang khat pia tu a, hi bangin ama in tua nu a zeksa kithiansuana vawtsak tu hi." 
Leviticus15:31 Ngiaphual laizang ah a om Topa ompuina Puanbuk a nitsak ngawl natu in Israel mite tungah a thiantho ngawlna taw kisai in, a kidopna tu thu a son tu in Topa in Moses thupia hi. A ninsak ahile amate kithatlum tu hi." 
Leviticus15:32 Hiteng sia, a zang pan naai a pusuak pa khat ahibuale a bawtui a luang pa khat," 
Leviticus15:33 numei khat tha sim a nin nei hunsung ahibuale, biakna taw kisai in a thiang ngawl numei khat taw a khialpa ii zui tu ngeinate ahi hi." 
Leviticus16:1 Topa tungah a thiangtho ngawl mei taw biakpiakna a piak ciang a kithat Aaron tapate nii thi zawkciang Topa in Moses paupui hi. 
Leviticus16:2 Ama in, “Thiangtho Bel Mun sung puankhai ii nungah a hun lian ciang a tum natu in na suapuipa Aaron son in, banghang ziam cile tua mun sia Thuciamna Thingkuang sitna tung meei sungah ka kilaakna mun ahi hi. Tua thu a ni buale ama kithatlum tu hi." 
Leviticus16:3 Ama mawphel biakpiakna in khuitalno khat le meihal biakpiakna in tuutal khat a paipui zawkciang bek in Thiangtho Bel Mun ah tum thei tu hi,” ci hi." 
Leviticus16:4 Tuaciang Topa in a nuai a zui tu ngeinate pia hi. Aaron, Thiangtho Bel Mun ah a pai ma in kibual nanak tu a, thiampi puante: puanneal puantual silhin, ngoaipuan tom teang tu a, kawngkhau sawm in dial khim tu hi." 
Leviticus16:5 Israel taangpite in mawphel biakpiak natu in kealtal nii le meihal biakpiak natu in tuutal khat Aaron tungah pia tu hi. 
Leviticus16:6 Aaron in ama mawna le a innkuanpuite mawna a mai natu in khuital khat sangaw biakpiakna in pia tu hi. 
Leviticus16:7 Tuaciang ama in Topa ompuina Puanbuk kongbiang ah keal nii paipui tu hi. 
Leviticus16:8 Tualai ah, “ Topa atu” ci a, a kiciamtee suang khat le “Azazel atu” ci in a kiciamtee suang dang khat, suang nii zanghin ama in lai meetang sawk tu hi." 
Leviticus16:9 Topa atu in meetang taw a teal kealtal khat sia Aaron in mawphel biakpiakna in pia tu hi. 
Leviticus16:10 Azazel atu a kiteal keal sia a nungta in Topa tungah pia tu a, mipite mawmai natu in sennealngamsung Azazel kungah paisak tu hi." 
Leviticus16:11 Aaron in ama le a innkuanpuite atu mawphel biakpiakna in khuital a piak ciang," 
Leviticus16:12 ama in biaknatau pan meikam kuang khat dim le ngimnamtui phate khutdim nii la tu a, Mun Thiangtho Bel ah paipui tu hi." 
Leviticus16:13 Tualai Topa ompuina munah ama in ngimnamtui sia mei tungah koi tu a, a khu in Thuciamna Thingkuang sitna sia seal tu hi, tua hile ama in tuasia mu ngawl tu a, thi ngawl tu hi." 
Leviticus16:14 Ama in khuital chi tawm la tu a, a khutme taw a sitna mai teng the in, tuaciang Thuciamna Thingkuang mai teng salivei the tu hi." 
Leviticus16:15 Tua zawkciang, ama in mipite mawphel biakpiakna in kealtal ngo tu a, Thiangtho Bel Mun ah a chi paipui in khuital chi a the bangma, a sitna tung le Thuciamna Thingkuang mai teng the tu hi." 
Leviticus16:16 Tuabangin Israel mite ii thiantho ngawlna le mawna theampo ii nitsakna panin Thiang Bel Mun sia a zeksa thiansuana vawt tu hi. Biakna taw kisai in a thiang ngawl ngiaphual laizang ah tua Puanbuk om ahikom Aaron in Puanbuk sia tuabangin a thiansua kul tu hi. 
Leviticus16:17 Thiangtho Bel Mun ah a zeksa thiansuana vawt tu in Aaron a tum pan kipan a pusua kik dong, Puanbuk sungah kuama om ngawl tu hi. Ama atu, a innkuanpuite atu le Israel taangpi bup atu a zeksa teng a vawt zawkciang," 
Leviticus16:18 meihal biakpiakna pia tu le biaknatau thiansua tu in biaknatau ah ama pai tu hi. Ama in khuital chi tawm le keal chi tawm la in biaknatau king a dokna teng noai tu hi. 
Leviticus16:19 Ama in a khutme taw sachi pawlkhat biaknatau tung salivei the tu hi. Hi bangin ama in tua biaknatau Israel mite mawna pan thiansua in, thiangthosak tu ahi hi." 
Leviticus16:20 Aaron in Thiangtho Bel Mun le Topa ompuina Puanbuk sung mundang teng le biaknatau atu in a zeksa thiansuana a vawt zawkciang, Azazel atu in a kiteal keal nungta lai sia Topa tungah pia tu hi." 
Leviticus16:21 Ama in tua keal lu tungah a khutte nii nga tu a, Israel mite siatna, mawna le leedona teng theampo pualaak in, tuabangin keal lu tungah suan siat tu hi. Tua zawkciang tua keal sia tuabang a seam tu, a kisep pa in sennealngam sungah beng tu hi." 
Leviticus16:22 Tua keal in kuama teen ngawlna ngam sungah amate mawna theampo pua in paipui tu hi. 
Leviticus16:23 Tuaciang Puanbuk sungah Aaron tum tu a, Thiangtho Bel Mun sung a tum ma in a silh thiampi puan teng suutin tua munah nusia tu hi." 
Leviticus16:24 Ama in mun thiangtho ah kibual tu a, ama puante silh tu hi. Tua zawkciang pusuak in ama mawna le mite mawna teng a mai natu in meihal biakpiakna pia tu hi." 
Leviticus16:25 Ama in mawphel biakpiak natu in nganthau sia biaknatau tungah hal tu hi. 
Leviticus16:26 Sennealngam sung Azazel kungah keal a beng pa in ngiaphual ah hong cia kik ma in a puante sawp in kibual nanak tu hi. 
Leviticus16:27 Mawphel biakpiak natu in a kizangh khuital le keal ii chi, mawmai natu in Thiangtho Bel Munah a kipaipui sia ngiaphual pua sangah paipui in kihal tu hi. A vun, a sa le a ngilzangte theampo kihal tu hi." 
Leviticus16:28 A hal pa ngiaphual hong heak kik ma in a puante sawp in kibual nanak tu hi. 
Leviticus16:29 A nuai a ngeinate maisang hun theampo ah zui tu ahi hi. A tha salina, ni sawm ni in Israel te le a teen khoppui ngamdangmite in an tang tu a, na seam ngawl het tu hi." 
Leviticus16:30 Tua ni in biakna taw kisai in a thian natu in amate mawna theampo a thiansua tu in a zeksa teng vawt tu hi. 
Leviticus16:31 Tua ni sia a thiangtho mama ni khat hi tu a, tua ni in an tang tu a, na seam ngawl tu hi. Hi ngeinate maisang hun theampo ah zui tu ahi hi." 
Leviticus16:32 A pa za a laih tu in thupha piak kipsakna a vawtsak sa le a ki aap sa, Thiampi Lianbelpa in a zeksa thiansuana vawt tu hi. Ama in thiampi puante silh tu a," 
Leviticus16:33 Thiangthobel Mun Topa ii ompuina Puanbuk a taanglai teng, biaknatau, thiampite le taangpi taangta theampo, thiansua natu in a zeksa teng vawt tu hi." 
Leviticus16:34 Hi ngeinate maisang hun theampo ah zui tu ahi hi. Israel mite mawna theampo thiansua natu in hi zeksa ngeina sia kum khat in khatvei kivawt hamtang tu hi. Tuabangin Moses in Topa thupiak bangin seam hi. 
Leviticus17:1 Topa in Moses tungah Aaron le a tapate," 
Leviticus17:2 le Israel mite theampo tungah a nuai a zui tu ngeinate a piak tu in thupia hi. 
Leviticus17:3 Israel te khat in khui khat ahibuale tuu khat ahibuale keal khat Topa tungah biakpiakna khat bangin Topa ompuina Puanbuk kongbiang simngawl mundang ah a ngo le, Thukham paltan zo hi. Ama in chisan luangsak zo ahikom Pathian mi khat in kingaisun nawn ngawl tu hi." 
Leviticus17:4  
Leviticus17:5 Hi thupiak ii a khiakna sia tu in Israel mite ii ngam sungah a ngaw bul ngannote Topa kungah paipui tu cinopna ahi hi. Amate in tu in tua ngannote Puanbuk kongbiang ah a om thiampipa kungah paipui tu a, pawlkhop biakpiakna in ngo tu hi." 
Leviticus17:6 Thiampipa in Puanbuk kongbiang ah a om biaknatau pangh tengah a chi the tu a, a thau sia Topa ii a lungkim ngimnamtui a piangsak tu in hal tu hi." 
Leviticus17:7 Israel mite in Topa tungah hong thumaan in, lo sung keal doaite biakna in sa ngo nawn ngawl tu hi. Israel mite in maisang hun theampo ah hi ngeina zui tu hi." 
Leviticus17:8 Israel khat ahibuale a teen khoppui ngamdangmi khat pawpo in meihal biakpiakna ahizong a dang biakpiakna ahizong," 
Leviticus17:9 Topa tungah biakpiakna a piak ciang Puanbuk kongbiang simngawl mundang ah a pia le, Pathian mi khat in kituat nawn ngawl tu hi." 
Leviticus17:10 Israel te khat pawpo ahibuale a teen khoppui ngamdangmi khat pawpo in a sungah chi om lai sa a ne le, Topa in ama nungngat tu a, ama mi in sim nawn ngawl tu hi." 
Leviticus17:11 A nungta theampo ii nuntakna sia chi sungah om hi, tua ahikom mihingte mawmai natu in chi theampo biaknatau tungah a kisun natu Topa thupiak ahi hi. Nuntakna a hi chisan in mawna teng lakeak hi." 
Leviticus17:12 Tua ahi hu in, amate ahizong a teen khoppui ngamdangmite khat pawpo ahizong, a sungah chi om lai sa pawpo a neak ngawl natu in Topa in Israel mite tungah son zo hi." 
Leviticus17:13 Israel te khat pawpo ahibuale a teen khoppui ngamdangmi khat pawpo in biakna taw kisai a thiang nganhing khat ahibuale vacim khat a man le ama in a chi lei ah sung nanak tu a lei huk tu hi. 
Leviticus17:14 A nungta theampo ii nuntakna sia chi sungah om ahi hu in a sungah chi om lai sa pawpo a neak ngawl natu in, Israel mite tungah Topa in son zo a, a ne pawpo ama mi khat in kingaisun nawn ngawl tu hi." 
Leviticus17:15 Israel te ahibuale ngamdangte khat pawpo in ama thu in a thi thawthong nganhing khat ahibuale ngamsa ii a mat khat ii sa a ne le, a puante sawp in kibual nanak tu a, biakna taw kisai in a thian mateng nitak dong ngak tu hi." 
Leviticus17:16 Tuabang a vawt buale thupiangte a thuak kul tu hi. 
Leviticus18:1 Topa in," 
Leviticus18:2 Israel mite a sonsawn tu in Moses tungah, “Keima in Topa na Pathian ka hi hi," 
Leviticus18:3 Na om ngeina uh Egypt mite omziate ahizong ahibuale tu in note kong paipuina Canaan ngamsung a teang mihingte ii omziate ahizong zui heak vun. 
Leviticus18:4 Ka thukhamte zui in kong thupiakte seam vun. Keima in Topa noma Pathian ka hi hi. 
Leviticus18:5 Sep tu kong sawl te seam vun a, kong piak thukhamte zui vun; tuabang na hina uh taw na nuntakna na hu tu uh hi. Keima in Topa ka hi hi,” ci hi." 
Leviticus18:6 Topa in a nuai a zui tu ngeinate pia hi. Na mealheakte khat pawpo taw omkhop khialna vawt heak vun. 
Leviticus18:7 Na nu taw numei le pa khialna vawtin na pa maizum pia heak in. Na nu maimawlsak heak in. 
Leviticus18:8 Na pa zino dangte khat pawpo taw numei le pa khialna vawtin na pa maizum pia heak in. 
Leviticus18:9 Inn khat sungah khangkhawm na hi uh zong, na hi bua uh zong, na suapuinu ahibuale na suapuisealnu taw numei le pa khialna vawt heak in." 
Leviticus18:10 Na tunu taw numei le pa khialna vawt heak in; na maizum natu hi tu hi. 
Leviticus18:11 Na suapuisealnu taw numei le pa khialna vawt heak vun, ama zongh na suapuinu ma ahi hi." 
Leviticus18:12 Na pa suapuinu ahibuale na nu suapuinu taw omkhop khialna vawt heak in. 
Leviticus18:13  
Leviticus18:14 Na pa suapuipa ii zi khialpui heak in; ama zongh na nu khat ma ahi hi. 
Leviticus18:15 Na tapa zi khialpui heak in. 
Leviticus18:16 Na suapuipa zi khialpui heak in. 
Leviticus18:17 Na khialpui nu ii tanu ahibuale a tunu khialpui heak in; na mealheakte ma hi a, chi kinai omkhop khialna ahi hi." 
Leviticus18:18 Na zi nuntak laiteng na zi tu in na nuphal nu la heak in. 
Leviticus18:19 Numei khat nin a nei laitak omkhoppui heak in, banghang ziam cile ama biakna taw kisai in thiang ngawl hi." 
Leviticus18:20 Ngual zi khialpui heak in; na khialpui le biakna taw kisai in hong ninsak tu hi. 
Leviticus18:21 Molech pathian biakna ah zak tu in na tate khat zongh pia heak in, banghang ziam cile tua in Topa ahi Pathian ii min daisak tu hi." 
Leviticus18:22 Pa le pa omkhop khialna vawt heak in; Pathian in ngaimaw hi. 
Leviticus18:23 Pa ahizong numei ahizong kuama in nganhing taw omkhop khialna vawt heak hen; tuabang khialna in biakna taw kisai in no hong ninsak hi. 
Leviticus18:24 Hi ngamtatnate taw a thiang ngawl kisua tawm heak vun, hi ngam na thet ma a, a teangsa doai biate in hi bangin amate kininsak ahikom noma tum thei natu in Topa in bengkeak hi." 
Leviticus18:25 Amate ngamtatna in ngam le lei ninsak ahikom Topa in leitang daan pia in tualai ah a teang mite leitang in nialsak hi. 
Leviticus18:26 Amate in hi bang a kiihuainate taw a leitang ninsak uh a, ahizong note tuabang na hi bua het tu uh hi. Note theampo, Israel te ahibuale no taw teang khawm ngamdangmite in Topa thukhamte le thupiakte zui hamtang tu nu hi," 
Leviticus18:27  
Leviticus18:28 tua hile note mai ah a teang doai biate leitang ii a nial bangin, no hong nial ngawl tu hi." 
Leviticus18:29 Hi bangza in a thasiathuai in a ngamta peuma sia Pathian mi khat in kingaisun nawn ngawl tu a hina thu na he uh hi. 
Leviticus18:30 Tuaciang Topa in, “Kong thupiakte zui in hi ngam le lei ah note mai a teang masate ii ngamtat luheaknate na zui heak vun a, hi bang khat pawpo vawtna taw na kininsak heak vun. Keima in Topa note ii Pathian ka hi hi,” ci hi." 
Leviticus19:1 Topa in," 
Leviticus19:2 Israel taangpite tungah a sonsawn tu in Moses tungah, “Thiangtho vun, banghang ziam cile Keima Topa na Pathian thiangtho khi hi." 
Leviticus19:3 Kong thupiak bangin note in na nu le na pa zakta vun a, Sabbath tang vun. Keima in Topa na Pathian ka hi hi." 
Leviticus19:4 “Kei hong taisan in milim bia heak vun; pathiante thik taw vawt tawm in bia heak vun. Keima in Topa na Pathian ka hi hi. 
Leviticus19:5 “Kipawlkhop biakpiak natu in nganhing na ngaw uh ciang kong piaksa ngeinate zui vun, tua hile tua biakpiakna kong saang tu hi." 
Leviticus19:6 Sa na ngaw uh sia na ngaw ni ahibuale a zing ciang na neak nanak kul hi. Ni thum ni in a taanglai sa pawpo kihal tu hi," 
Leviticus19:7 banghang ziam cile tua sa in biakna taw kisai in nin a, a ne a om le tua biakpiakna kong saang buatu hi." 
Leviticus19:8 Tuasia a ne pawpo sia in ka tungah hong ki aap ante nadang thawthong bang suaksak ahikom mawnei suak a, keima mihing khat in kingaisun nawn ngawl tu hi." 
Leviticus19:9 “Na lo ante na laak uh ciang lo kiil ah ante la heak vun, na nusiatsa ante a la tu in pai kik heak vun." 
Leviticus19:10 Na makngil uh sapit bom ahibuale lei ah a taak sapitngate tawm kik tu in, pai kik heak vun; tuate mizawngte le ngamdangmite atu in nusiat vun. Keima in Topa na Pathian ka hi hi." 
Leviticus19:11 “Nguta heak vun a, ngualtheam ahibuale leilot thu son heak vun." 
Leviticus19:12 Na zui ngawl tu po ka min taw kamciam pia heak vun; tua in ka min daisak hi. Keima in Topa na Pathian ka hi hi. 
Leviticus19:13 “Noma meet natu in midangte vanh suttol heak vun. Noma cial sa mihing khat ii thamante, zan khat bek zongh khak heak vun." 
Leviticus19:14 Nangongte haamsiat heak vun a, mittawte lutu natu in a mai ah na khat zongh koi heak vun. Kei hong kiita tavun; keima in Topa na Pathian ka hi hi." 
Leviticus19:15 Zum tung thusonnate na khen uh ciang “Thumaan le thutang taw thu khen vun; mizawngte ngum tuan heak vun, ahibuale sumhaute kiita heak vun." 
Leviticus19:16 Khat pawpo taw kisai in leilot thu sonsawn heak vun a, mihing khat ii nuntakna le thina thu a kison ciang na tetti panna in ama a hu thei tu a ahile, son khe in. Keima in Topa ka hi hi." 
Leviticus19:17 “Mihing khat pawpo ngimhuat heak vun, ahizong ama hangin na maw na khial ngawl natu in na kithukim ngawl nate ama taw maitang kisi in pha tak son zaw vun." 
Leviticus19:18 Kuama tungah phula heak vun a, kuama ngaimaw top heak vun. Noma le noma na ki it uh bangin na innpaamte it vun. Keima in Topa ka hi hi." 
Leviticus19:19 “Kong thupiakte zui vun. Inn ah khoai ngannote nam dang taw ta neisak heak vun. Lo khat sungah thaicii nam nii ciing heak vun. Puan nam nii taw a kivawt puan silh heak vun. 
Leviticus19:20 “Mi khat ii a zino ahi ama sila nu sia a kitan sa a suakta sa hi ngawl lai in, midang khat in a khialpui le a nii in daan pia tu a, ahihang a thu kikan ngawl tu a, tua nusia a sila khat ahi hu in amate kithatlum ngawl tu hi," 
Leviticus19:21 Tua pa in ama khialphel biakpiak natu in ka ompuina Puanbuk kongbiang ah tuutal khat hong paipui tu a," 
Leviticus19:22 thiampipa in a khialphel natu in tua tuutal taw a zeksa thiansuana vawt tu a, Pathian in ama khialna maisak tu hi." 
Leviticus19:23 “Canaan ngam sungah tumin thingno kung nam khat pawpo na suan uh ciang a masa kum thum sung tua thingngate biakna taw kisai in a thiang ngawlin ngaisun vun. Tua hun sung teng tua thingnga ne heak vun. 
Leviticus19:24 A kum lina ciang thingnga theampo, Keima na Topa tungah na lungdamna a lak biakpiakna in nong aap tu uh hi." 
Leviticus19:25 Ahizong a kum ngana ciang tua thingnga ne thei tu nu hi. Tuabang na hi uh le na thingno te in nga tamzaw nga tu hi. Keima in Topa na Pathian ka hi hi. 
Leviticus19:26 “Chisan a om lai sa ne heak vun. Mitbum aisaanna tuatuamte zangh heak vun. 
Leviticus19:27 Mithite atu khuangai in na pangh samte meet heak vun, ahibuale na khamul meet heak vun," 
Leviticus19:28 ahibuale noma le noma thulkawng sun ahibuale na taksa kiliamsua heak vun. Keima in Topa ka hi hi. 
Leviticus19:29 “Na tanute biakinn ah pumpi kizuakna taw a min daisak heak vun; tuabang na hisak uh le pathian dangte sang ah a pial na hi tu uh a, ngamsung teng numei le pa paktatna taw kidim tu hi." 
Leviticus19:30 Sabbath tang vun a, keima nong biakna mun zakta vun. Keima in Topa ka hi hi." 
Leviticus19:31 “Mithisate ii thaate thu a dongh thei te kungah thu dongh tu in pai heak vun. Na pai uh le, note biakna taw kisai in a thiang ngawl na hi tu uh hi. Keima in Topa na Pathian ka hi hi." 
Leviticus19:32 “Khanghaamte zatakna lak vun a, upat vun. Keima hong thasia in ka thu ni vun; keima in Topa ka hi hi." 
Leviticus19:33 “Noma ngam sungah hong teang ngamdangmite vawtsia heak vun. 
Leviticus19:34 Na lawm Israel te na vawt uh bangin vawt vun a, noma na ki it uh bangin amate it vun. Khatvei lai in Egypt ngam ah ngamdangmi na hina thu phawk vun. Keima in Topa na Pathian ka hi hi." 
Leviticus19:35 “A man ngawl a sauna, a ngitna ahibuale a phakza teena taw khat pawpo theam heak vun." 
Leviticus19:36 A man pikhau, toaisuang le khaikhin zangh vun. Keima in Topa na Pathian ka hi a, Egypt pan kong pusua pui hi." 
Leviticus19:37 Ka thukhamte le kong thupiakte theampo zui vun. Keima in Topa ka hi hi,” ci hi." 
Leviticus20:1 Topa in," 
Leviticus20:2 Israel mite tungah hi bang a sonsawn tu in Moses tungah, “Note khat pawpo ahibuale note taw a teang khawm ngamdangmi khat pawpo, Molech pathian biakna in a zak tu in a ta a pia pawpo sia, taangpi in suang taw deanglum tu uh hi." 
Leviticus20:3 Mihing khat pawpo a tate khat Molech tungah pia in, ka Puanbuk thiangtho ninsak a, ka min thiangtho a daisak le ka nungngat tu a, ka mi khat in ka ngaisun nawn buatu hi." 
Leviticus20:4 Ahizong tua pa ngamtatna taangpite in awlmawk ngawlin a thatlum bua le," 
Leviticus20:5 tua pa, a innkuan bup le Molech bia in ka tungah hong thumaan ngawl theampo ka nungngat tu hi. Amate ka mi in ka ngaisun nawn buatu hi." 
Leviticus20:6 “Mithite ii thaate tungah thu a dongh thei mihingte kungah mi khat pawpo pai in thu a dongh le ama ka nungngat tu a, ka mi khatin ka ngaisun nawn buatu hi." 
Leviticus20:7 Note thiangtho tavun, banghang ziam cile keima in Topa na Pathian ka hi hi." 
Leviticus20:8 Ka thukhamte hong zui tavun, banghang ziam cile Keima in Topa hi a, kong thiangthosak hi,” ci hi." 
Leviticus20:9 Topa in a nuai a zui tu ngeinate pia hi. A nu le a pa a haamsiat peuma kithatlum tu hi; ama ii thina sia ama kivawt ahi hi. 
Leviticus20:10 Mi khat in Israel mipui khat ii zi a khialpui le a nii in kithatlum tu hi. 
Leviticus20:11 Mi khat in a pa zite khat a khialpui le a pa maimawlsak hi a, a nii in kithatlum tu hi. Amate thina in amate kivawt ahi hi." 
Leviticus20:12 Mihing khat in a tapa zi a khialpui le a nii in kithatlum tu hi. Mealheak kuung sung numei le pa omkhop khialna vawt ahiciang amate thina in amate kivawt ahi hi. 
Leviticus20:13 Pa khat in a dang pa khat taw a khial le a kiihuai ngamtatna hi a, a nii in kithatlum tu hi. Amate thina in amate kivawt ahi hi." 
Leviticus20:14 Mi khat in numei khat le tua nu ii nu a teenpui le a thum in kihallum tu hi, banghang ziam cile amate in a min daihuai ngamtatnate vawt uh hi; note sungah hi bang ngamtatnate omsak ngawl het tu nu hi." 
Leviticus20:15 Mi khat in nganhing taw a khial le, a nii in kithatlum tu hi." 
Leviticus20:16 Numei khat in nganhing khat taw khial nuamin a hanciam le a nii in kithatlum tu hi. Amate thina in amate kivawt ahi hi. 
Leviticus20:17 Mi khat in a suapuinu ahibuale a suapuisealnu a teenpui le, amate mipite mai ah a maizumhuai le a thasiathuai in kivawt tu a, a mihuam sung pan kihawlkhia tu hi. A suapuinu khialpui ahikom a piang bang a thuak kul hi." 
Leviticus20:18 Mi khat in numei khat a nin nei laitak a khialpui le a nii in a mihuam sung pan kihawlkhia tu hi, banghang ziam cile biakna sang pan a thiang ngawl thu taw kisai ngeinate paltan ahi hi." 
Leviticus20:19 Mi khat in a ni taw a khial le, mealheak kuung ahi hu in a piang bang a nii in a thuak kul tu hi." 
Leviticus20:20 Mi khat in a pa suapuipa zi taw a khial le, a pa suapuipa maimawlsak hi a, a nii in daan thuak tu a; tasel tu hi." 
Leviticus20:21 Mi khat in a suapuipa zi a teenpui le, tasel in amate thi tu hi. Ama in biakna taw kisai a thiang ngawl na seam hi a, a suapuipa maimawlsak ahi hi." 
Leviticus20:22 Topa in, “Kong paipuina Canaan leitang ii note hong nial ngawl natu in ka thukham le ka thupiakte theampo zui vun." 
Leviticus20:23 Tualai ah a teang mite ii ngeinate zui heak vun; hi ngamsung na tum thei natu in hi ngam pan tua doai bia te not keak tu khi hi. A ngamtat siatnate in hong thasiasak hi. 
Leviticus20:24 Ahizong hi ngamhoi ngampha lua tu in, hong ciam zo ka hi ciang kong pia tu hi. Keima in Topa na Pathian ka hi a, minam dangte sung pan kong tuamkoi zo hi." 
Leviticus20:25 Tua hi a, nganhing le vacimte biakna taw kisai in a thiang le a thiang ngawl na khentel tu uh hi. A nin ahi nganhing le vacimte ne heak vun. Nin hi ka ci sa hi a, na ne uh le a nin hong suaksak tu hi." 
Leviticus20:26 Note na thiangtho tu uh a, keima neisa bek na hi tu uh hi, banghang ziam cile keima in Topa ka hi a, ka thiangtho hi. Keima neisa bek na hi thei natu in minam dangte sung pan kong tuamkoi hi." 
Leviticus20:27 “Pa ahizong nu ahizong mithisate thaa tung thu a dongh peuma suang taw kideanglum tu hi; hi bang a ngamta pawpo ama ii thina in ama kivawt ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Leviticus21:1 Aaron suan thiampite tungah a son tu in Topa in Moses thupia a, “Thiampi peuma sia a nu, a pa, a tapa, a tanu, a suapuinu, a suapuipa le inn ah a om pasal nei ngawl a suapuinu a thi ciang simngawl a dang mealheak khat mithi vuina ah a kihelna hu in, biakna taw kisai in a nin kisua heak hen." 
Leviticus21:2  
Leviticus21:3  
Leviticus21:4 Kiteenna hu in a kinai pui a mealheak te a thi ciang mithi sungah a kihel hu in ama le ama kininsak ngawl tu hi. 
Leviticus21:5 “Thiampi peuma khuangaina lakna in a sam mun khat zongh meet ngawl tu a, a khamul zongh tan ngawlin, a ci tung kiliamsua ngawl tu hi." 
Leviticus21:6 Ama thiangtho tu a, ka min daisak ngawl het tu hi. Ama in an taw biakpiaknate hong pia ahiciang ama a thiangtho kul hi." 
Leviticus21:7 Thiampi khat in pumpi kizuak ngei numei khat, ngaknu thiangtho ngawl, ahibuale pasal ii khul numei khat teenpui ngawl tu hi; ama thiangtho hi." 
Leviticus21:8 Mite in thiampipa a thiangtho in ngaisun tu hi, banghang ziam cile an taw biakpiaknate kei tungah hong pia hi. Keima in Topa ka hi hi; keima ka thiangtho a, ka mite ka thiangthosak hi." 
Leviticus21:9 Thiampipa tanu khat pumpi kizuak numei a suak le, a pa maimawlsak hi; ama kihallum tu hi." 
Leviticus21:10 “A lu tung sathau buak sa le thiampi puan silh tu in a ki aapsa Thiampi Lianbel khat in khuangaina lakna in a sam pot ngawlin, a puante balkeak in om ngawl het tu hi." 
Leviticus21:11 Ama kei tungah hong ki aapsa ahiciang biakna taw kisai a thiangtho ngawl kisuaksak heak hen a, a nu a pa tatak thi le zong ka Puanbuk nusia in mithi koina inn ah a tum hu in a thiangtho ka Puanbuk ninsak heak hen." 
Leviticus21:12  
Leviticus21:13 Ama in ngaknu thiangtho khat teenpui tu a," 
Leviticus21:14 meingong ahibuale pasal taw kikhen sa numei, ahibuale pumpi kizuak ngei numei teenpui ngawl tu hi. Ama suante sung pan ngaknu thiangtho bekma teenpui tu hi." 
Leviticus21:15 Tuabang ahibuale a thiangtho tu a tate sia biakna taw kisai in a thiang ngawl suak tu hi. Keima in Topa hi a, ama sia Thiampi Lianbel in ka koituam zo hi,” ci hi." 
Leviticus21:16 Topa in Moses ii 
Leviticus21:17 Aaron tungah a son tu in a thupiakna pan, “Na suan na paal sung pan pumpi mealhemna khat pawpo a neite in ka tungah an taw biakpiakna hong pia heak hen. Hi thu in maisang hun theampo ah zui tu ahi hi." 
Leviticus21:18 Pumpi mealhem peuma in biakpiakna pia thei ngawl tu hi, tuate in mittaw, peangbai, mealhem ahibuale pumpi sitbaang;" 
Leviticus21:19 khutkon peangkon te; 
Leviticus21:20 cingkuul ahibuale mihing khansamh te; mit natna nei ahibuale vun natna nei; cil kingette ahi uh hi. 
Leviticus21:21 Thiampi Aaron suan pumpi mealhemte in kei tungah an taw biakpiakna hong pia thei ngawl tu hi. 
Leviticus21:22 Tuabang mihing khat in ka tungah hong kipia biakpiakna, a thiangtho biakpiakna le a thiangtho mama biakpiakna ante ne thei tu a," 
Leviticus21:23 ahizong ama pumpi sitbaang ahikom a thiangtho puankhai kungah pai ngawl tu a, ahibuale biaknatau neak ngawl tu hi. Ama in hi a thiangtho nate ninsak ngawl het tu hi, banghang ziam cile Keima in Topa ka hi a, amate ka thiangthosak hi,” ci hi." 
Leviticus21:24 Hi thu Moses ii Aaron, Aaron ii tapate le Israel mite theampo tungah a son thu ahi hi." 
Leviticus22:1 Topa in Moses ii Aaron le a tapate a son tu in 
Leviticus22:2 thupia a, “Ka min thiangtho na daisak ngawl het natu in Israel mite ii ka tungah hong aaptuam a thiangtho biakpiaknate ciliap tavun. Keima in Topa ka hi hi." 
Leviticus22:3 Na suan na paal khat po in biakna taw kisai a thian ngawl laitak, Israel mite ii ka tungah hong aaptuam a thiangtho biakpiaknate nai ah hong pai in ahile biaknatau ah naseam kik thei ngeingawl tu hi. Hisia maisang hun theampo ah a kizangh tu ahi hi. Keima in Topa ka hi hi." 
Leviticus22:4 “Aaron suan le paalte sung pan a kiitakhuai vun natna veite, ahibuale meima naai neite in biakna taw kisai in a thiantho mateng a thiangtho biakpiakna ante ne ngawl tu hi. Thiampi khat pawpo in mithiluang taw a kithutha a nin khat pawpo, ahibuale bawtui a tee pa khat," 
Leviticus22:5 ahibuale a thiang ngawl nganhing, ahibuale mihing khat a tham le ama thiang ngawl hi." 
Leviticus22:6 Thiampi khat pawpo a thiang buale nitak dongin a nin hi tu a, a kibual mateng a thiangtho biakpiakna ante ne thei ngawl tu hi." 
Leviticus22:7 Nitum zawkciang ama thiang a, tuaciang ama an ahi a thiangtho biakpiakna ante ne thei tu hi." 
Leviticus22:8 Ama in, ama thu in a thi thawthong nganhing ii sa ahibuale ngamsa ii thalup sate ne ngawl tu hi; tua in ama ninsak tu hi. Keima in Topa ka hi hi." 
Leviticus22:9 “Thiampi theampo in kong piaksa ngeinate zui tu hi. Tuabang a zui bua uh le amate a maw hi tu a thi tu uh hi, banghang ziam cile amate in a thiangtho ngeinate a zui ngawl hang ahi hi. Keima in Topa ka hi a, amate ka thiangthosak hi." 
Leviticus22:10 “Thiampi innkuanpuite bek in a thiangtho biakpiakna an pawpo ne thei tu a; kuama dang — thiampi taw a omkhawm khat, ahibuale a thacial khat zongh in ne thei ngawl tu hi." 
Leviticus22:11 Ahizong ama ii sum taw a lei silate ahibuale tualsuak silate in thiampi ii a nga ante ne thei tu hi. 
Leviticus22:12 Thiampi khat ii tanu in thiampi ahi ngawl khat a teenpui le a thiangtho biakpiakna an khat pawpo ne thei ngawl tu hi. 
Leviticus22:13 Ahizong thiampi khat ii tanu sia a pasal thi in meingong, ahibuale ta nei ngawlin a pasal in khul a, a pa inn ah bealhin a cia kik le a pa ii nga thiampi ante ne thei tu hi. Thiampi innkuanpuite bek in hi ante ne thei tu hi." 
Leviticus22:14 “Thiampi innkuanpui ahi ngawl khat in a thiangtho biakpiakna ante a heak ngawlin a ne tha le ama in thiampipa tungah a man a cingin liau kik tu a, zakhat ciang kul taw belap tu hi." 
Leviticus22:15 Thiampite in tua ante a ne thei ngawl tu midang khat pawpo a neaksakna taw," 
Leviticus22:16 a thiangtho biakpiakna ante ninsak ngawl tu hi; a ninsakte a maw hi tu a, daan thuak tu hi. Keima in Topa ka hi a, biakpiaknate ka thiangthosak hi,” ci hi." 
Leviticus22:17 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Leviticus22:18 Aaron le a tapate le Israel mite theampo ii zui tu in a nuai a ngeinate a piak tu in thupia hi. Israel mite khat pawpo in ahibuale Israel sung a teang ngamdangmi khat pawpo in meihal biakpiakna a piak ciang, kamciam taangtutna in a piak ahizong, thinzaw biakpiakna taw a piak ahizong, a mealhem ngawl nganhing zangh tu hi." 
Leviticus22:19 A kisaang thei tu in, a mealhem ngawl a tal hi nanak tu hi." 
Leviticus22:20 A mealhem nganno khat po na pia le Topa in saang ngawl tu hi. 
Leviticus22:21 Mi khat pawpo in kipawlkhop biakpiakna Topa tungah a piak ciang, kamciam taangtutna, ahibuale thinzaw biakpiakna a piak ciang, Topa ii saan thei tu in a mealhem ngawl nganhing hi tu hi." 
Leviticus22:22 Topa tungah a mittaw, a peangbai, a mealhem, meima vei, vun meima balh, a khiik nei meima vei nganhing khat pawpo pia heak vun. Hi bang nganhingte biaknatau ah an biakpiakna in pia heak vun." 
Leviticus22:23 Thinzaw biakpiakna ah a khansamh ahibuale a limci tatak ngawl nganhingte pia thei tu nu hi, ahizong kamciam taangtut natu in tuate kisaang ngawl hi." 
Leviticus22:24 A ciltang a tamhsa, a kingetsa, a kisuthamsa, a kilakeaksa nganhing khat pawpo Topa tungah pia heak vun. Hite sia na ngam sungah zak tu ki oai ngawl hi." 
Leviticus22:25 Ngamdangmite tung pan a kinga nganhing taw an biakpiakna pia heak vun. Hi bang nganhingte a sitbaang in kingaisun a, kisaang thei ngawl hi." 
Leviticus22:26 Khui, tuu, kealte a no a sua ciang ni sali sung a pui taw na khen buatu uh hi, ahizong tua zawkciang an biakpiakna in kisaang thei hi." 
Leviticus22:27  
Leviticus22:28 Ni khat sungin khuipui le a no, tuupui le a no, kealpui le a no, sangaw biakpiakna in piakhawm heak vun." 
Leviticus22:29 Topa tungah lungdamko biakpiakna na piak uh ciang hong san thei tu in ngeinate zui vun; 
Leviticus22:30 tua ni in a sa ne in, a khuavak ni zingsang dong bangma khe heak vun." 
Leviticus22:31 Topa in, “Ka thupiakte zui vun; Keima in Topa ka hi hi." 
Leviticus22:32 Ka min thiangtho daisak heak vun; Israel mite theampo in thiangtho ka hina hong saan kul hi. Keima in Topa ka hi a, note kong thiangthosak hi;" 
Leviticus22:33 na Pathian ka hi natu in Egypt pan note kong pusuapui hi. Keima in Topa ka hi hi,” ci hi." 
Leviticus23:1 Topa in Moses tungah 
Leviticus23:2 Israel mite ii a biak kikhop ciang, biakna poaite atu in a zui tu a nuai a ngeinate pia hi." 
Leviticus23:3 Note in na nasep natu in ni luk sung nei nu hi, ahizong ni sali ni, Sabbath sia tawlngakna ni ahi phawk vun. Tua ni in naseam heak vun, ahizong biakpiakna vawt tu in kikhawm vun. Koisung po na teang uh zong Sabbath sia Topa neisa ahi hi." 
Leviticus23:4 A kisee hun a tun simin a nuai a poaite thangsak vun. 
Leviticus23:5 Topa patoaina in a kivawt Paisan Poai sia tha masabel ni sawm le ni li ni, nitum ciang kipan hi." 
Leviticus23:6 Ni sawm le ni nga ni in Tol saw ngawl Anluum Poai kipan a, ni sali sung tol kisaw anluum peuma na ne buatu uh hi." 
Leviticus23:7 Poai sung ni masabel ni in biakna vawt tu in na kikhawm tu uh a, kuama in noma ii ni sim nasep bangma seam ngawl het tu nu hi." 
Leviticus23:8 Ni sali sung Topa tungah an taw biakpiaknate pia vun. A ni sali ni in biakna vawt tu in kikhawm kik vun, ahizong kuama in noma ni sim nasep bangma seam heak vun." 
Leviticus23:9 Topa hong piakna ngam thengin an na laak uh ciang anpal taangvawng sia thiampipa pia vun. 
Leviticus23:10  
Leviticus23:11 No hong kisaan thei natu in thiampipa in Topa tungah tuasia a tuam vilvel biakpiakna in pia tu hi. Tuasia Sabbath khuavak ni in thiampipa in pia tu hi. 
Leviticus23:12 Antang biakpiakna na piak ni in meihal biakpiakna in a mealhem ngawl kum khat a pha tuutal khat zongh na pia tu uh hi. 
Leviticus23:13 Tua taw an biakpiakna in olive thau taw a kihel anvui kilogramme nii na pia tu uh hi. Hi biakpiakna ii ngimnam in Topa lungkimsak hi. Biakpiakna in sapittui litre khat zongh pia tu nu hi. 
Leviticus23:14 Pathian tungah hi biakpiakna na piak uh mateng anthak peuma, a sial, a kan ahibuale anluum em ne heak vun. Hi ngeina sia na suan le na paalte theampo ii maisang hun theampo ah a zui tu ngeina ahi hi." 
Leviticus23:15 Topa tungah anpal na piak ni, Sabbath khuavak ni pan nipi sali a cin dong simto vun." 
Leviticus23:16 Sabbath salivei a cin zawk ni sawmnga ni in Topa tungah a dang antang biakpiakna thak pia vun. 
Leviticus23:17 Innkuan simin anluum lum nii tek keng tu a, a tuam vilvel letsong in Topa tungah pia tu hi. Anluum khat sia anvui kilogramme nii tol kisaw in a ki em hi tu a, laak pheang tu anpal biakpiakna in Topa tungah pia tu nu hi." 
Leviticus23:18 Tua anluum taw taangpite in a mealhem ngawl kum khat a pha, tuuno sali, khuital khat le tuutal nii pia tu uh hi. Tuate Topa tungah meihal biakpiakna in antang biakpiakna le sapittui biakpiakna taw kipiakhawm tu hi. Hi biakpiakna ii ngimnam in Topa lungkimsak hi." 
Leviticus23:19 Mawphel biakpiakna in kealtal khat le kipawlkhop biakpiakna in kum khat a pha tuutalno nii zongh pia vun. 
Leviticus23:20 Thiampipa in thiampite atu in Topa tungah a tuam vilvel letsong in anluum sia tuunote nii taw pia tu hi. Hi biakpiaknate thiangtho hi. 
Leviticus23:21 Tua ni in kuama in noma ii ni sim nasep bangma seam heak vun, ahizong biak kikhopna nei vun. Koisung po ah na teang uh zong na suan na paalte in hi ngeina sia maisang hun theampo ah zui tu uh hi." 
Leviticus23:22 Na lo ante na laak uh ciang lomong a om ante la heak vun a, na nusiat sa ante at kik tu in pai kik heak vun; tuate sia mizawngte le ngamdangmite atu in nusia vun. Topa sia na Pathian ahi hi." 
Leviticus23:23 A tha salina ni masabel ni sia a tuam vilvel tawlngakna ni in tang vun a, lemle hong kitum ciang biakna vawt tu in kikhawm vun." 
Leviticus23:24  
Leviticus23:25 Topa tungah an taw biakpiakna pia vun a, noma ii ni sim nasep bangma seam heak vun." 
Leviticus23:26 Tha salina ni sawm ni sia mite mawmai natu in kumcin biakna a zeksa sep ni tu ahi hi. Tua ni in bangma ne heak vun a; biak kikhopna ah pai tekin Topa tungah an taw biakpiakna pia vun. 
Leviticus23:27  
Leviticus23:28 Tua ni in naseam heak vun, banghang ziam cile tua ni sia mawna a mai natu a zeksa sep ni ahi hi." 
Leviticus23:29 Tua ni in an khat pawpo a ne sia, Pathian mi khatin kingaisun nawn ngawl tu hi." 
Leviticus23:30 Tua ni in na seam a om le Topa ama mama in thisak tu hi. 
Leviticus23:31 Koisung po ah a teang zong hi ngeina sia na suan na paalte theampo atu ahi hi. 
Leviticus23:32 Tua tha ni kua ni nitum pan kipan ni sawm ni nitum dong sia a tuam vilvel tawlngakna ni in na tan tu uh hi a, tua hun sungin bangma kine thei ngawl tu hi." 
Leviticus23:33 Buk poai sia tha salina, ni sawm le ni nga ni pan kipan ni sali sung hi tu hi." 
Leviticus23:34  
Leviticus23:35 Ni masabel ni in biakna vawt khawm vun a, kuama in noma ii ni sim nasep bangma seam heak vun." 
Leviticus23:36 Ni sali sung ni simin an taw biakpiakna na vawt tu uh hi. A ni liat ni in a bia tu le an taw biakpiakna pia tu in na kikhawm kik tu uh hi. Tua ni sia biak kikhop ni hi a, kuama naseam ngawl tu nu hi." 
Leviticus23:37 (Hi biakna poaite sia a kisamh bangin biakna vawt khopna nei a, ni khat zawk ni khat an taw biakpiakna, meihal biakpiakna, antang biakpiakna, sangaw biakpiakna, le sapittui biakpiakna te taw Topa patoaina poaite ahi hi." 
Leviticus23:38 Hi poaite in Sabbath tan ngeina sia belapna hi a, hi biakpiaknate sia Topa tungah na piak ngengei letsongte le kamciam taangtut biakpiaknate le thinzaw biakpiaknate belapna ahi hi.)" 
Leviticus23:39 Lo an na laak zawk uh ciang, tha salina ni sawm le ni nga ni pan kipan ni sali sung hi poai khaam tu nu hi. Ni masabel ni sia a tuam vilvel tawlngakna ni hi tu hi." 
Leviticus23:40 Tua ni in na thingnote ii nga phabelte, palm baakte, thingtee baakboaite pawlkhat la in Topa na Pathian patoaina in biakna poai kipan tu nu hi." 
Leviticus23:41 Tua poai ni sali sung vawt tu nu hi. Hi ngeina sia na suan na paalte ii maisang hun theampo ah a zui tu ahi hi. 
Leviticus23:42 Israel mite theampo ni sali sung bukte sungah teang tu a," 
Leviticus23:43 tua hile Topa in Egypt pan hong pusuapui lai in Israel mite ii buk sak tawmte sungah hong teensakna thu na suan na paalte in hong he thei tu hi. Ama in Topa na Pathian ahi hi. 
Leviticus23:44 Hi bangin Topa patoaina in biakna poaite a khaam ciang Israel mite zui tu ngeinate Moses in pia hi. 
Leviticus24:1 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Leviticus24:2 Israel mite in Puanbuk sungah meiinnte a kidet ngei bangin a taan suak thei natu in olive thau phabelte hong paipui natu thupia in sawl hi. 
Leviticus24:3 Topa ompuina Thiangthobel Mun sungah a om Thuciamna Thingkuang mai puankhai pua sangah meite, nitak sim Aaron in de a, zingsang dong kuangtopsak tu hi. Hi ngeina sia maisang hun theampo ah zui tu ahi hi." 
Leviticus24:4 Khamh ciitak taw kivawt meikhuamte tungah meite Aaron in keamcing tu a, Topa ompuina ah a ngeina bangin taangsak nanak tu hi." 
Leviticus24:5 Anvui kilogramme sawm le nii la in, anluum sawm le ni vawt in." 
Leviticus24:6 Topa ompuina mun khamh ciitak taw a kituam sabuai tungah luk veu ngual nii in koi hi. 
Leviticus24:7 Anluum taangin Topa tungah a kipia an taw biakpiakna a kilakna in, tua a ngualte tungah ngimnamtui a thiang tawm koi in." 
Leviticus24:8 Sabbath ni sim, maisang hun theampo ah tua anluumte Topa ompuina ah kikoi tu hi. Hisia a tawntungin Israel te sep tu ahi hi." 
Leviticus24:9 Hi anluumte Aaron le a suan a paalte neisa hi a, amate in mun thiangthona ah ne tu hi, banghang ziam cile thiampite atu in Topa tungah a kipia a thiangtho mama ante ahi hi." 
Leviticus24:10 Pasal khat om a, a pa sia Egypt te, a nu sia Israel te Dan minam sung pan Dibri tanu Shelomith a kici sia ahi hi. Tua ngiaphual sungah tua pa sia Israel te khat taw kihau hi. A kihau sungin tua pa in Pathian haamsiat ahikom, Moses kungah paipui uh hi," 
Leviticus24:11  
Leviticus24:12 tua pa kikhumcip a, bangbang hi tu ci sia Topa ii amate a son tu ngakin om uh hi." 
Leviticus24:13 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Leviticus24:14 “Tua pa ngiaphual pua sangah paipui vun. Pathian a haamsiat lai in a za theampo in maw hi ci tetti lakna in tua pa lu tungah a khut uh nga tek tu a, tuaciang taangpi bup in suang taw deanglum tu uh hi." 
Leviticus24:15 Tuaciang Pathian a haamsiat peuma in a piang bangin thuak tu a," 
Leviticus24:16 kithatlum tu hi, ci in Israel mite tungah na son tu hi. Israel te khat pawpo ahibuale Israel te sungah a teang ngamdangmi khat pawpo Topa a haamsiat sia taangpi bup in suang taw deanglum tu hi." 
Leviticus24:17 “Mihing a that sia peuma kithat tu hi," 
Leviticus24:18 ngual nganno khat a that sia peuma in liau kik tu hi. Nuntakna khat sia nuntakna khat taw lo tu ci thu ahi hi. 
Leviticus24:19 “Mihing khat in midang khat a liamsua le, ama vawt babangin a tungah kivawt tu hi." 
Leviticus24:20 Ama in ngu khat a talsak le ama ngu khat kitalsak tu hi; ngual mittang khat a tawsak le ama mittang khat kitawsak tu hi. Ha tang khat a tongsak le ama hatang khat kithoksak tu hi. Midang khat a liamsua babangin ama tungah kithuk kik tu hi. 
Leviticus24:21 Nganno khat a that sia in liau tu a, ahizong mihing a that sia peuma kithatlum tu hi." 
Leviticus24:22 Hi thukham sia no Israel te le note sungah hong teang ngamdangmite theampo ii zui tu ahi hi, banghang ziam cile Keima in Topa na Pathian ka hi hi,” ci hi." 
Leviticus24:23 Hi thu Moses in Israel mite tungah a son zawkciang, tua pa ngiaphual pua sangah paipui in suang taw deanglum uh hi. Topa ii Moses tungah a thupiak bangin Israel mite in vawt uh hi." 
Leviticus25:1 Topa in Sinai Mual tungah Moses paupui a," 
Leviticus25:2 Israel mite tungah a nuai a zui tu ngeinate a piak tu in thupia hi. Topa hong piak tu ngam ah na tum uh ciang a kum sali kum simin lothaw ngawlna taw Topa na upat tu uh hi. 
Leviticus25:3 Kum luk sung lo na poai tu uh a, na sapitbaakte tan a puuapha in, lo ante na kaikhawm tu uh hi." 
Leviticus25:4 Ahizong a kum salina sia na leitang ii tawlngak kum hi tu a, Topa tungah a ki aap kum hi tu hi. Tua kumin lo an ciing heak vun a, sapitkung zongh pua heak vun."
