Leviticus25:5 Na lo sungah a lipo ante zongh la ngawlin na pua ngawl sapitngate zongh lo heak vun. Tua kum sia na leitang ii tawlngak hiithiat kum ahi hi. 
Leviticus25:6 Tua kumin lo a kithaw ngawl hang tua lo in note, na silate, na naseamte, no taw a teang khawm ngamdangmite," 
Leviticus25:7 na ngannote le ngamsate zongh hong vak tu hi. Tua lo pan a piang theampo kine thei tu hi. 
Leviticus25:8 Kum sali mun salivei simna a kingawm ciang kum 49 ci in sim vun. 
Leviticus25:9 Tua zawk tha salina, ni sawm ni, Mawsuutna Ni in ngamsung tengah lemle tum tu in mi khat na paisak tu hi." 
Leviticus25:10 Hi bangin kum sawmngana kum sia na koituam tu a, ngam sungah a teang theampo tungah suatakna thu na thangsak tu uh hi. Tua kum in na zuak sa uh vanhte theampo, a nei sia kungah, ahibuale a suan a paalte kungah kipia kik tu hi, sila in a kizuaksa te zongh a innkuanpuite kungah cia kik tu hi." 
Leviticus25:11 Lo na tho buatu uh a, a lipo ante zongh na la buatu uh hi, na ho ngawl sapitngate zongh na lo buatu uh hi." 
Leviticus25:12 Tua kum bup note atu in kum thiangtho hi tu a; lote pan a piang tawm teng bek na ne tu uh hi. 
Leviticus25:13 Hi kum sungin a kizuaksa na theampo a neite kungah kilee kiksak siat tu hi. 
Leviticus25:14 Tua hi a, Israel na mipuite tungah na lo na zuak ciang, ahibuale ama tung pan lo na lei ciang a kilawm ngawlin kison heak vun." 
Leviticus25:15 A man sia Piakkikna Jubilee Kum kik dong hi lo pan kum bangza sung, an bangza piang tu cisia tuatin a man kitan tu hi." 
Leviticus25:16 A kum a tam le a man tam tu a, ahizong a kum a tawm le a man tawm zaw tu hi, banghang ziam cile a kizuak lo sia pan a piang thei an phaza tungah kibulphu zaw hi." 
Leviticus25:17 Israel na mipuite theam heak in a, Topa na Pathian ii thu ni in." 
Leviticus25:18 Hi ngam sungah ngammuang tak na nuntak thei natu in Topa thukhamte le thupiakte theampo zui in. 
Leviticus25:19 Leitang pan an hong piang tu a, na du theampo nei in, ngammuang takin na nungta tu uh hi." 
Leviticus25:20 Ahizong mihing khat po in tuabang lothaw ngawl, anlaak ngawl bulin, a kum sali kumin bang ne tu hi ziam, hong ci om thei tu hi." 
Leviticus25:21 Kum nii sung an na khom thei natu uh in Topa in a kum luk kumin leitang thupha pia tu hi. 
Leviticus25:22 A kum liat kumin lo na thaw ciang a kum lukna kumin na laak ante na ne lai tu a, tua kumin na thaw ante na laak dong neakkhom tu na nei tu uh hi." 
Leviticus25:23 Na leitang sia a tawntung atu in kizuak thei ngawl tu hi, banghang ziam cile nang neisa hi ngawl hi; Pathian neisa hi a, no sia thaw khuan a nga ngamdangmite taw na kibang uh hi." 
Leviticus25:24 Leitang a kizuak ciang a neipa ii tat kik thei natu a thuneina sia heak tek kul hi. 
Leviticus25:25 Israel te khat zawng a, a leitang zuak tu a kul le a mealheak kinaibel sia in tan kik tu hi." 
Leviticus25:26 A tan kik tu mealheak a nei ngawl khat sia hong hau kikin a tan kik zo zongh suak thei tu hi. 
Leviticus25:27 Tua thu ah a lei kik thei ni in Piakkikna Jubilee kum dong a leitang pan a nga kik tu za taw tuatin a zuakna pa tungah a man pia in tuasia tan kik tu hi. 
Leviticus25:28 Ahizong a tat kik natu sum a cin zo buale Piakkikna Jubilee kum kik dong a leipa khut sungah om lai tu hi. Tua kum ciang tuasia a neipa tungah kipia kik tu hi. 
Leviticus25:29 Mihing khat in kulh taw ki uum khuapi sungah a om inn khat a zuak le, a zuak hun pan kum khat sung teng tan kik thei tu hi." 
Leviticus25:30 Ahizong tua kum sungin a tan kik zo buale tan kik thei nawn ngawl tu a, a inn sia a leipa le a suan le a paalte neisa hi suak tu hi; Piakkikna Jubilee kum ciang zongh in kipia kik tuan ngawl tu hi." 
Leviticus25:31 Ahizong uumna a nei ngawl khuanote sungah innte sia lote bangin kingaisun tu a, a neipa in tan kik thei tu hi, Jubilee kum ciang kipia kik tu hi." 
Leviticus25:32 Ahizong Levi suante in a nasepna khuapite sungah a neisate bang hun po in tat kik thei natu thu nei hi. 
Leviticus25:33 Hi khuapite khat sung pan inn khat sia Levi khat in zuak a, a tan kik buale Piakkikna Jubilee kum ciang kipia kik nanak tu hi, banghang ziam cile a khuapi sungah Levi te ii innte sia Israel mite sungah a kip a kho in amate ii neisa ahi hi." 
Leviticus25:34 Levi khuapite kiimkot ah nganthana leitang ahile kizuak ngeingawl tu hi; tuasia a tawntung amate ii neisa ahi hi. 
Leviticus25:35 Na nai a, a teang Israel mipui khat zawngin ama le ama a kivaak zo buale na nai ah hong teen suak thei natu in na cial naseampa khat bangin sum na puk tu hi." 
Leviticus25:36 Ama tung pan a meet la heak in a, ahihang Pathian thu ni in na Israel mipuipa na nai ah teangsak in." 
Leviticus25:37 Ama, sum na pukna tung pan summeet la heak in a, na anzuakte tung pan a meet la heak in." 
Leviticus25:38 Hi thu sia Canaan ngam hong piak natu le noma Pathian ahi natu in Egypt ngam pan hong pusuapuipa Topa na Pathian uh ii thu piak ahi hi. 
Leviticus25:39 Na nai a, a teang Israel na mipui khat a zawn mama hu in sila khat bangin ama le ama hong kizuak le sila nasepte na seamsak buatu hi." 
Leviticus25:40 Ama in kuli khat bangin na kungah om tu a, Piakkikna Jubilee kum dong nangma ii na seam tu hi." 
Leviticus25:41 Tuasia hun ciang ama le a tate in nangma hong nusia tu a, a innkuanpuite le a taanghpupite neisa omna ah cia kik tu uh hi." 
Leviticus25:42 Israel mite sia Topa ii silate hi a, ama in Egypt pan pusuapui hi; amate sila in kizuak ngawl het tu hi." 
Leviticus25:43 Na Pathian kiita vun a, amate vawtsia heak vun." 
Leviticus25:44 Sila na kisamh le na kiim a om minamte tung pan lei vun. 
Leviticus25:45 Note taw teang khawm ngamdangmite ii tate zongh lei thei tu nu hi. Na ngamsung pan piang tuabang patangte noma neisa suak thei a," 
Leviticus25:46 amate na tapate ii lua tu in na nusiat thei tu a, na tapate ii a nuntak laiteng a na sepsak tu hi. Ahizong Israel na mipuite peuma na vawtsia buatu uh hi." 
Leviticus25:47 Sonteena in note taw teang khawm ngamdangmite khat hong hau a, ahihang na Israel mipui khat zawngin tua pa tung ahibuale a innkuanpuite khat tungah sila in ama le ama hong kizuak hi." 
Leviticus25:48 Ama a kizuak zawk hang kitan kik thei lai hi. A suapuite khat," 
Leviticus25:49 ahibuale a pano, a suapuiseal, a kinaipui a beete khat pawpo in tan kik thei tu hi; tua ahibuale ama mama in sum a khom a thalaw le kitan in suakta thei tu hi." 
Leviticus25:50 Ama in a leipa taw kikum tu a, a lei hun a kipan Piakkikna Jubilee kum kik dong a kum simto tu a, naseampa khat a kipia nitha za taw ama suatak natu a man tan tu hi." 
Leviticus25:51 Kum sim kuli naseam khat bangin ngaisun in, a taanglai kumte taw tuatin a lei man baang teng pia kik tu hi." 
Leviticus25:52  
Leviticus25:53 A topa in vawtsia ngawl het tu hi. 
Leviticus25:54 Hi bang lam khat pawpo taw a kisuaktasak buale ama le a tate sia Piakkikna Jubilee kum kik ciang kisuaktasak nanak tu hi. 
Leviticus25:55 Israel mi khat sia sila hi top thei ngawl tu hi, banghang ziam cile Israel mite sia Topa silate ahi uh hi. Ama in amate Egypt pan pusuapui hi; ama sia Topa, amate ii Pathian ahi hi." 
Leviticus26:1 Topa in, “Biak tu in milimte vawt heak vun, ahibuale suangkhuamte, ahibuale a kizeam suangte phut heak vun. Keima in Topa na Pathian ka hi hi." 
Leviticus26:2 Biakna poaite vawt vun a keima nong biakna mun ciliap vun. Keima in Topa ka hi hi. 
Leviticus26:3 “Ka thukham bang nungta in ka thupiakte na zui uh le," 
Leviticus26:4 Keima in nguatui hun maanin kong pia tu a, tua hile leitang in an piangsak tu a, thingkungte a nga nga tu hi." 
Leviticus26:5 Na lo ante tam mama tu a, sapitngate law hun dongin lo ante na la lai tu a, thaicii tuu kik hun dongin sapitnga na lo lai tu uh hi. Na du theampo na nei tu a, na ngam sungah ngammuang takin na teang thei tu uh hi." 
Leviticus26:6 “Na ngam sungah kilemna kong pia tu a, kuama kiita ngawlin na mu thei tu uh hi. Na ngamsung pan ngamsa ngilote ka hawlkeak tu a, tua munah ngal le sa om ngawl tu hi." 
Leviticus26:7 Na ngalte na zo tu uh hi; 
Leviticus26:8 note mi nga in mi zakhat na zo thei tu uh a, zakhat in tulsawm na zo thei tu uh hi." 
Leviticus26:9 Thupha kong pia tu a, ta tam mama kong pia tu hi; note taw ka vawt thuciam sia keima sang pan ka len tu hi." 
Leviticus26:10 An tam mama na la tu uh a, kum khat na khom tu uh hi, tua zawkciang zong saal sungah a taanglai an kumlui teng anthakte koi natu in na heam tu uh hi." 
Leviticus26:11 A thiangtho ka Puanbuk sungah note taw ka teang tu a, note kong nungngat ngei buatu hi." 
Leviticus26:12 Noma taw kong om tu a, na Pathian hi in, note keima mi na hi tu uh hi." 
Leviticus26:13 Keima Topa na Pathian in sila na hi nawn ngawl natu in Egypt pan kong pusuapui hi. Keima in no hong neng suk vaangletna sia ka sumai zo a, vandak sa in hi vaviau in kong kalsuansak zo hi." 
Leviticus26:14 Topa in, “Ka thu piakte na zui bua uh le daan kong pia tu hi." 
Leviticus26:15 Note taw ka vawt ka thuciam paltan in, ka thukham le ka thupiakte na nial uh le," 
Leviticus26:16 note daan kong pia tu hi. Na mit hong tawsak tu le na nuntakna a bo tu in note tungah tuasiatna — a dam thei ngawl natnate le cisa natnate kong tungsak tu hi. Lo na thaw ancii na poai hangin na phattuamna om ngawl tu hi, banghang ziam cile na ngalte in hong zo in na ciin po hong neaksak tu hi." 
Leviticus26:17 Ngal na lel natu in kong nungngat tu a, hong ngaimaw te in hong uk tu hi; na patau mama tu uh a, hong del om ngawl napi na tatai tu uh hi." 
Leviticus26:18 “Hi bang teng zawkciang ka thu nong ni bua veve uh le, na thuak tu uh daan a zaa sali in ka khangsak tu hi." 
Leviticus26:19 Na thinpui kiphatsakna ka sumai tu hi; nguatui hang a, na leitangte ko in thik bangin sak tu hi." 
Leviticus26:20 Hanciam in na nasepna theampo a luithawthong hi tu hi, banghang ziam cile na leitang pan an piang ngawl tu a, thingnote a nga nga ngawl tu hi." 
Leviticus26:21 “Nong nalh veve lai a, ka thu nong ni bualai uh le, na thuak daan a zaa sali in ka khangsak kik tu hi." 
Leviticus26:22 Note sungah a kiitakhuai ngamsate kong puak tu a, na tate, na ngannote hong thalupsakin, note tawm bek taanglai in na lampite uh kinusia tu hi." 
Leviticus26:23 “Hi bang teng daan na thuak zawk uh ciang ka thu nangai ngawlin nong nial veve lai uh le," 
Leviticus26:24 kong nungngat tu a, a masa lai sangin salivei a nasia zaw daan kong pia tu hi." 
Leviticus26:25 Ih thuciamna na palsat manin daan hong pia tu in no tungah ngalpi kong thengsak tu hi. Na ngammuan natu in khuapi sung na zuan zonghin a dam maw natnate kong tungsak tu a, na ngalte na lel hamtang uh kul tu hi." 
Leviticus26:26 Nupi sawm ii a nei anluum theampo a em natu sia anluum emna khat bek a kisap natu zaa dongin na anneak nga natu kong khaktan tu hi. Amate in hong hawmsak tu uh a, na neak zawk uh ciang ngawngawn in na ngilkial lai tu uh hi." 
Leviticus26:27 “Hi bang teng zawkciang ka thu ni ngawlin nong nial veve lai uh le," 
Leviticus26:28 no tungah ka thin uukin a masa na daan thuak uh sangin, a salivei a nasia zawin daan kong pia tu hi." 
Leviticus26:29 Na ngil uh kial leilam in, na tate sa na ne tu uh hi." 
Leviticus26:30 Mual tungah om noma biakna munte ka lalsak tu a, ngimnamtui biaknataute baltham in milim a lalte tungah na mithiluangte ka lawn tu hi. A thasiathuai tatakin," 
Leviticus26:31 na khuapite ka lalcipsak tu a, na biakna munte siasak in, na sangaw biakpiaknate kong saang buatu hi." 
Leviticus26:32 Na leitang ka lalcipsak tu a, tuasia a lua na ngalte inghsak tu hi." 
Leviticus26:33 Ngal kong thengsak tu a, ngamdang ah kong thethaang tu hi. Na leitang kitaisan tu a, na khuapite lalcip in kinusia tu hi." 
Leviticus26:34 Tuasia ciang tawlngak hun na piak ngawl, na leitang ii nuamsa in a tawlngak hunnuam kumte hi tu hi. Tuasia kinusia in ngam thimtham hong suak tu a, na ngalte ngam ah sal na tan hun sung teng na leitang tawlnga tu hi." 
Leviticus26:35  
Leviticus26:36 “Saltaangin a om note kong patausak mama tu a, vui ii seam thingtee nging sia in note hong taisak tu hi. Ngal kisimna ah ngalte ii del bangin na tai tu uh a, na kiim ah ngal om ngawl napi na liik tu uh hi." 
Leviticus26:37 Kuama hong del om ngawl napi kipaltha in na liik tu uh a, ngalte khat zongh na sim zo buatu uh hi." 
Leviticus26:38 Na saltanna ah na thi tu uh a, na ngalte ii leitang in hong valhlum tu hi." 
Leviticus26:39 Na ngalte ngam le lei ah a taanglai sun tawmte zongh noma mawna le na taanghpupite mawna hangin na mangthang veve tu uh hi. 
Leviticus26:40 “Ahizong na suan na paalte in amate mawnate le hong nalh a hong leedo hu in amate mawnate le a taanghpupite mawnate pualaak tu uh hi," 
Leviticus26:41 amate sia keima ii ka nungngat, a ngalte ngam ah salin hong puaksakte ahi uh hi. A khakbel in na suan na paalte a mawna hangin kiniamkhiak a, daan zong thuak zo ahiciang," 
Leviticus26:42 Jacob, Isaac, le Abraham taw ka thuciamna ka phawk kik tu a, ka mite Canaan ngam piak tu in ka kamciamna ka thaksua kik tu hi." 
Leviticus26:43 Ahizong hi leitang, a tawlngak hithet thei natu in a ngammite in a masabel in ngam le lei a taisat kul hi, ka thukham le ka thupiakte nial ahikom amate daan ka piak kul hi." 
Leviticus26:44 Tuabang ahitazong a ngalte ngam sungah a om hun sung zonghin ka nusia bup buatu a, ka mon buatu hi. Tuabangin vawt leng amate taw ka thuciamna bo tu hi, keima in Topa, amate ii Pathian ka hi hi." 
Leviticus26:45 Keima in Topa amate ii Pathian ka hi natu in Egypt ngam pan ka mite ka pusuapui na taw minam theampo tungah ka vaangletna ka lak ciang a taanghpupite taw ka vawt thuciamna ka thaksua tu hi,” ci hi." 
Leviticus26:46 Hi thukhamte le thupiakte theampo sia Israel mite atu in Sinai Mual tungah Topa ii Moses tungah a piakte ahi hi. 
Leviticus27:1 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Leviticus27:2 Israel mite atu a nuai a zui tu ngeinate pia hi. A tuam vilvel kiciamna khat taangtutna in Topa tungah a kipiasa mihing khat sia, a nuai a bangin sumpiakna taw tua pa kisuaktasak thei tu hi." 
Leviticus27:3 Tua sumte Biakinn zak ngei khaikhin taw kitee hi: — pasal khanthin kum kul pan kum sawmluk dong: ngunntang 50 — numei khanthin: ngunntang 30 — pa a khangmoi, kum nga pan kum kul dong: ngunntang 20 — numei a khangmoi: ngunntang 10 — patangno kum nga nuaisia: ngunntang 5 — numeino: ngunntang 3 — Pasal kum sawmluk tungsia: ngunntang 15 — Nupi kum sawmluk tungsia: ngunntang 10" 
Leviticus27:4  
Leviticus27:5  
Leviticus27:6  
Leviticus27:7  
Leviticus27:8 Kamciamna a vawtpa sia zawng leih in a ngeina bangin a pia zo buale ama sia thiampipa kungah kipaipui tu a, thiampipa in a piak zawkza dong khepsak tu hi." 
Leviticus27:9 Kamciamna a vawt sia Topa biakpiakna in a saan thamman nganno khat ahile Topa tungah a kipia letsong theampo biakna taw kisai in a thiangtho hi a," 
Leviticus27:10 kamciamna a vawtpa in nganno dang taw laih thei ngawl tu hi. Nganno dang taw a laih le ngannote nii sia Topa neisa hi tu hi. 
Leviticus27:11 Ahizong kamciamna in a piak tu nganno sia biakna taw kisai in a thiang ngawl hi a, Topa biakpiakna in saan thei ngawl tu ahile, tua pa in tua nganno sia thiampipa kungah paipui tu hi." 
Leviticus27:12 Thiampipa in nganno phatna le siatna taw kizui in a man tan tu a, a tan babangin kip tu hi." 
Leviticus27:13 Tua pa in a lei kik nuam le, a man za le tua man tungah zakhat ciang kul veu belapin lei tu hi." 
Leviticus27:14 Mi khat in a inn Topa tungah a aap ciang, thiampipa in a phatna le a siatna zui in a man tan tu a, a tan babang kip tu hi." 
Leviticus27:15 Tua pa in a inn a lei kik nuam le a man za le tua man tungah zakhat ciang kul veu belapin pia tu hi. 
Leviticus27:16 Mihing khat in a leitang khen khat Topa tungah a aap le, a thai ciin thei tu za tungtawnin a man kitan tu a, mangtaang kilogramme kul ciang ngunntang sawm in kituat tu hi." 
Leviticus27:17 Piakkikna Jubilee kum zawk po ciang a leitang a aap le, a man a cingin tan tu hi." 
Leviticus27:18 Piakkikna Jubilee kum zawk pek ciang a aap le, thiampipa in Jubilee kum kik dong a om lai kumte taw kizui in a man za see tu a, a man khiam tu hi." 
Leviticus27:19 Mi khat in a aapsa lo a lei kik nuam ahile a lo man za le tua man tungah zakhat ciang kul veu belap thua in pia tu hi. 
Leviticus27:20 Topa tung pan tuasia lei kik masa ngawlin mi dang khat tungah a zuak le lei kik theina thu sia a bo hi tu hi. 
Leviticus27:21 Piakkikna Jubilee kum a cin kik ciang tua lo a tawntungin Topa neisa suak tu a; thiampite in tang tu hi. 
Leviticus27:22 Mihing khat in ama leisa lo Topa tungah a aap le," 
Leviticus27:23 thiampipa in mai Piakkikna Jubilee kum dong a kum tuatin a man see tu a, a see zaza tua pa in tua ni in pia nanak tu hi; tua sum teng Topa aa ahi hi." 
Leviticus27:24 Piakkikna Jubilee kum a cin ciang tua lo a neiphitpa tungah ahibuale a suan a paalte tungah ki aap kik tu hi. 
Leviticus27:25 Biakinn zak ngei khaikhin taw kizui in na man theampo a man kitan tu hi. 
Leviticus27:26 Nganhing no suakciil peuma Topa neisa hi zo ahiciang, kuama in thinzaw biakpiakna in Topa tungah aap thei ngawl tu hi. Khuino, tuuno, ahibuale kealno khat Topa neisa hi a," 
Leviticus27:27 ahizong a thiang ngawl nganhing no suakciil ahile, a man a kitan za le tua a man tung zakhat ciang kul veu belapin lei kik thei tu hi. A kilei kik buale tua nganhing sia a man a kitan za taw midang khat pawpo tungah kizuak thei hi." 
Leviticus27:28 Topa tungah thudang om ngawl tu in a aap thiang sitsetsa, mihing, nganhing, ahibuale leitang khat sia kuama in zuak kik, lei kik thei ngawl tu hi. A tawntungin Topa neisa ahi hi." 
Leviticus27:29 Mihing ngawngawn tuabang a ki aap thiang sitset sa te tat kik thei tu hi ngawl hi; ama sia kithatlum nanak tu hi. 
Leviticus27:30 Na leitang pan a piang theampo, an le thingngate sawm a khat Topa ii neisa ahi hi." 
Leviticus27:31 Mi khat in tuate a tan kik nuam le, a man za le a man tungah zakhat ciang kul veu belapin tan tu hi." 
Leviticus27:32 Na khoai sa ngannote sawm a khat Topa ii neisa ahi hi. Na nganno na sim ciang a sawmna nganno sia veu Topa ii neisa ahi hi. 
Leviticus27:33 A neipa in a sim ciang a sawmna nganno sia a tha zawmbel a teal thei natu in vawt kaltang ngawl tu a, a kitealsa khat theak kik thei ngawl tu hi. A theak kik ahile tua nganhingte nii sia Topa ii neisa hi tu a, kilei kik thei ngawl tu hi." 
Leviticus27:34 Hite Israel mite atu in Sinai Mual tungah Topa ii Moses tungah a thupiakte ahi hi. 
Numbers1:1 Israel mite Egypt pan a pusua zawk a kum niina, a tha niina ni masabel ni in, Sinai Sennealngam sung tua mun Pathian ompuina Puanbuk sungah Topa in Moses paupui hi. Topa in," 
Numbers1:2 “Nangma le Aaron in Israel mite ii bee le phungte le a innkuante zui in mihing simna nei tu nu hi. Pa a minpiang," 
Numbers1:3 kum kul le a tungsia ngalkap seam thei tu peuma a min sazian la vun. 
Numbers1:4 Hong hu tu in bee le phung khat sung pan ukpi khat veu ngen tavun,” ci hi." 
Numbers1:5 Hi mihingte sia hi na seam tu in taangpite sung pan a kiteal minam lampuite ahi uh hi: 
Numbers1:6  Minam Bee le phung ukpi Reuben Shedeur tapa Elizur Simeon Zurishaddai tapa Shelumiel Judah Amminadab tapa Nahshon Issachar Zuar tapa Nethanel Zebulun Helon tapa Eliab Ephraim Ammihud tapa Elishama Manasseh Pedahzur tapa Gamaliel Benjamin Gideoni tapa Abidan Dan Ammishaddai tapa Ahiezer Asher Ochran tapa Pagiel Gad Deuel tapa Eliasaph Naphtali Enan tapa Ahira 
Numbers1:7 Hi pasal sawm le niite ii huna taw Moses le Aaron in," 
Numbers1:8 a tha niina, ni masabel ni in, taangpi bup sam a, bee le phungte le innkuante zui in mihing theampo tepteena lai vawt hi," 
Numbers1:9 Topa thupiak bangin, kum kul le a tungsia pa peuma, kisimin a min kiciamtee hi. Sinai Sennealngam ah Moses in mihingte min tepteena lai vawt hi." 
Numbers1:10 Ngalkap na a seam thei tu kum kul pan a tungsia pa peuma bee le phungte le innkuante zui in min kikhum a, Jacob tapa lianbel Reuben minam taw kipan hi. A vekpi in a nuai a bang ahi hi." 
Numbers1:11  Minam Mihing phaza Reuben 46,500 Simeon 59,300 Gad 45,650 Judah 74,600 Issachar 54,400 Zebulun 57,400 Ephraim 40,500 Manasseh 32,200 Benjamin 35,400 Dan 62,700 Asher 41,500 Naphtali 53,400 A vekpi: 603,550" 
Numbers1:12 Levi te sia nam dangte min kikhumna ah kihel ngawl hi, 48banghang ziam cile Topa in Moses tungah, 49“Ngalkap na a seam thei tu mihingte na sim ciang, Levi namte kihelsak heak in. 50Ahizong Levi te ka ompui na Puanbuk le a vanhzak nate theampo a uk tu in koi in. Amate in Puanbuk le a vanhte pua tu uh a, a sungah naseam in tua Puanbuk kiim ah ngiaphual saat tu uh hi. 51Na ngiaphual na khiin simin Levi te in Puanbuk phel tu a, ngiaphual thak ah thua kik tu uh hi. Midang khat pawpo Puanbuk nai ah a pai le kithatlum tu hi. 52A taanglai Israel te in amate tek ii, laandial nuai ah a hon a hon in ngiaphual saat tu uh hi. 53Khat po in puanbuk nai ah pai in a neak le ka thin uuk tu a, Israel taangpite daan ka pia tu hi, tua ahikom Levi te in Puanbuk kiim ah ngiaphual saatin cing tu uh hi,” ci hi. 54Tuabangin Topa ii Moses a thupiakte theampo Israel mite in seam siat uh hi." 
Numbers2:1 Topa in Moses le Aaron tungah a nuai a bangin thupia hi. 
Numbers2:2 Israel te in ngiaphual a saat uh ciang a pawlkhenna sung tek le a bee le phung ii laandial nuai tek ah om tu uh hi. Puanbuk kiimkot ah a ngiaphual kisaat tu hi. 
Numbers2:3 Nisuana sang, Judah pawlkhen ii laandial nuai ah a omte in a lampuite khutnuai ah a nuai a bangin, a pawl a pawl in ngiaphual saat tu uh hi. Judah Amminadab tapa Nahshon 74,600 Issachar Zuar tapa Nethanel 54,400 Zebulun Helon tapa Eliab 57,400 A vekpi: 186,400 Judah pawlkhen ah a omte pai masa tu uh hi."

Numbers2:18 Nitumna sang, Ephraim pawlkhen ii laandial nuai ah a omte in a lampuite khutnuai ah a nuai a bangin, a hon a hon in ngiaphual saat tu uh hi: Ephraim Ammihud tapa Elishama 40,500 Manasseh Pedahzur tapa Gamaliel 32,200 Benjamin Gideoni tapa Abidan 35,400 A vekpi: 108,100 Ephraim pawlkhen ah a omte a thumna in pai tu uh hi."

Dan Ammishaddai tapa Ahiezer 62,700 Asher Ochran tapa Pagiel 41,500 Naphtali Enan tapa Ahira 53,400 A vekpi: 157,600 Dan ii pawlkhen ah a omte a khak belin pai tu uh hi."

Numbers2:32 Pawlkhen te sungah a pawl a pawl zui in, Israel mite kisim a, a vekpi 603,550 pha hi." 
Numbers2:33 Moses tungah Topa thupiak sa bangma in Levi te sia Israel dangte taw kisim khawm ngawl hi. 
Numbers2:34 Tuabangin Moses tungah Topa thupiak sa theampo Israel mite in vawt siat uh hi. Amate sia a laandial nuai tek ah ngiakin, tuaciang amate bee le phung zui in pai uh hi." 
Numbers3:1 Hiteng sia, Topa ii Sinai Mual tungah Moses a paupui hun lai a, Aaron le Moses ii innkuanpuite ahi hi." 
Numbers3:2 Aaron in tapa li nei a: a tapa lianbel Nadab hi a, Abihu, Eleazar le Ithamar te ahi hi." 
Numbers3:3 Amate thiampi suak tu in sathau kinoai a, thupha piak kipsakna a ngate ahi hi." 
Numbers3:4 Ahizong, Nadab le Abihu te sia Sinai Sennealngam ah a thiangtho ngawl meihal biakpiakna Topa tungah a piak ciang, kithatlum hi. Amate in ta nei ngawl ahikom Aaron nuntak hunsung teng Eleazar le Ithamar in thiampi na seam uh hi." 
Numbers3:5 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Numbers3:6 “Levi minamte paipui in a, thiampi Aaron ii naseam tu in panmun pia in." 
Numbers3:7 Amate in keima ompuina Puanbuk atu in a kisamh bang le thiampite atu le taangpite atu a kisamh bang seam tu uh hi. 
Numbers3:8 Amate in Puanbuk sungah a om vanh theampo keamcing tu uh a, a taanglai Israel te atu in naseam tu uh hi." 
Numbers3:9 Levi mite ii vaipuak sia Aaron le a tapate ii na a sepsak tu bek ahi hi. 
Numbers3:10 Thiampi na a seam tu in Aaron le a tapate nasep na pia tu a; midang khat pawpo hi na a seam nuam sia kithatlum tu hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers3:11 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Numbers3:12 “Tu in Levi mite keima aa hi tu hi. Egypt te ii taciil theampo ka thalup lai in Israel te innkuan tek pan tapa upabel le a ngannote sung pan a suakciil theampo keima atu in ka thiangthosak hi. Tu in Israel mite tapaciilte taangin Levi mite keima aa ahi hi; amate keima neisa hi tu hi. Keima in Topa ka hi hi.” ci hi. 
Numbers3:13  
Numbers3:14 Sinai Sennealngam ah Topa in Moses tungah," 
Numbers3:15 Levi mite ii bee le phungte le innkuante zui in, tha khat pan a tungsia a pha pa peuma a min la in tepteena vawt tu in sawl a," 
Numbers3:16 a thupiak bangin Moses in seam hi. 
Numbers3:17 Levi in tapa thum nei a: Gershon, Kohath le Merari ahi hi. Tuate amate min a kivaw bee le phungte ii taanghpupite ahi hi. Gershon in tapa nii nei a: Libni le Shimei ahi hi; Kohath in tapa li nei a: Amram, Izhar, Hebron le Uzziel ahi hi; Merari in tapa nii nei a; Mahli le Mushi ahi hi. Amate sia amate min a kivaw innkuante ii taanghpupite ahi uh hi." 
Numbers3:18  
Numbers3:19  
Numbers3:20  
Numbers3:21 Gershon ii bee le phung sia Libni innkuante le Shimei innkuante ahi hi. 
Numbers3:22 Tha khat pan a tungsia a pha pa peuma kisim a, a vekpi in 7,500 pha hi." 
Numbers3:23 Hi bee le phung sia nitumna sang Puanbuk nungsangah ngiaphual saat tu a," 
Numbers3:24 Lael tapa Eliasaph in bee le phung ii ukpi seam tu hi. 
Numbers3:25 Amate in Puanbuk, a sungsang sitna, a puasang sitna, a sung tumna kongbiang puankhai," 
Numbers3:26 biaknatau le Puanbuk kiim kikhop na munah a om puankhakte le tuasia sung tumna kongkha puankhaite vaipuak la tu hi. Amate in hi nate taw a kipee-aw nasep theampo vaipuak la tu uh hi. 
Numbers3:27 Kohath bee le phungte sia Amram innkuante, Izhar innkuante, Hebron innkuante le Uzziel innkuante ahi uh hi," 
Numbers3:28 Tha khat pan a tungsia pa peuma sazian kila a, a vekpi in 8,600 pha hi." 
Numbers3:29 Hi bee le phung te sia Puanbuk thang sangah ngiaphual saat tu a," 
Numbers3:30 Uzziel ii tapa Elizaphan in bee le phung ukpi seam tu hi. 
Numbers3:31 Amate in Thuciamna Thingkuang, Sabuai, meidetna khuam, biaknataute, Mun Thiangtho ah thiampite ii zak vanhte le Thiangthobel Mun sung tumna ah puankhai vaipuak la tu uh hi. Amate in hi nate taw a kipee-aw nasep theampo vaipuak la tu uh hi." 
Numbers3:32 Levi mite ii ukpi sia thiampi Aaron tapa Eleazar hi. Ama sia Mun Thiangtho ah naseamte a ukpa ahi hi. 
Numbers3:33 Merari bee le phung sia Mahli le Mushi innkuante a kingawm ahi hi. 
Numbers3:34 Kum khat pan a tungsia pa peuma sazian kila a, a vekpi in 6,200 pha hi." 
Numbers3:35 Hi bee le phung sia Puanbuk saksang ah ngiaphual saat tu a, Abihail tapa Zuriel in bee le phung ii ukpi seam tu hi." 
Numbers3:36 Amate in Puanbuk sakna thingpheakte, a zawlte, a khuamte, a tawdapte le a kipeepui theampo vaipuak la tu uh hi. Ama te in hi nate taw a kipee-aw nasep theampo vaipuak la tu uh hi." 
Numbers3:37 Amate in khuamte, tawdapte, khetphinte le a puasang kikhopna mun atu khaute zongh vaipuak la tu uh hi." 
Numbers3:38 Moses le Aaron le Aaron tapate in nisuana sang Puanbuk mai ah ngiaphual saat tu uh hi. Amate in Israel mite atu in Mun Thiangtho ah sep tu nasep theampo vaipuak la tu uh hi. Mihing khat pawpo tua nasep sep tu a sawm sia kithatlum tu hi. 
Numbers3:39 Topa thupiak bangin Moses in Levi te bee le phung zui in tha khat pan a tungsia a pha pa peuma sazian la a, a vekpi in 22,000 pha hi." 
Numbers3:40 Topa in Moses tungah, “Israel te tapa a suakciil theampo keima aa hi. Tua ahiciang tha khat pan a tungsia Israel te tapa a suakciil theampo min tepteena lai vawt in. Ahizong amate tapa suakciil theampo taangin Levi te theampo keima aa ka suaksak hi! Keima in Topa ka hi hi! Tua banah nganno suakciil theampo taangin Levi te ngannote keima aa ka suaksak hi.” ci hi." 
Numbers3:41  
Numbers3:42 Moses in a thu ni a, tapa suakciil tha khat pan a tungsia theampo sazian la in," 
Numbers3:43 a vekpi kingawm in 22,273 pha hi." 
Numbers3:44 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Numbers3:45 “Tu in Israel te tapa suakciil theampo taangin Levi te keima atu in hong aap ta'n a, Israel te nganno suakciil theampo taangin Levi te ii ngannote zongh hong aap ta'n." 
Numbers3:46 Israel te tapa a suakciilte sia Levi te sangin 273 in tamzaw ahikom a vaal tapate lei kik nanak tu ni hi. 
Numbers3:47 Biakbuk ah a kizangh ngeina om bangin tapa khat ciang ngunntang nga pia in a," 
Numbers3:48 hi sumte Aaron le a tapate tungah pia in” ci hi. 
Numbers3:49 Moses in a thu ni a," 
Numbers3:50 ngunntang 1,365 la in," 
Numbers3:51 Aaron le a tapate tungah pia hi. 
Numbers4:1 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Numbers4:2 Levi nam Kohath bee le phung ii a bawng le a innkuante zui in mi simna vawt tu le," 
Numbers4:3 Topa ompui na Puanbuk sungah naseam thei tu kum sawmthum le kum sawmnga kilaklaw pa theampo sazian la tu in sawl hi. 
Numbers4:4 A nasep sia a thiangthobel nate kihel hi. 
Numbers4:5 Topa in a nuai a bangin thuhilnate Moses tungah pia hi. Ngiaphual na phel tu uh hun a tun ciang Aaron le a tapate Puanbuk sungah tum tu a, Thuciamna Thingkuang mai ah a om puankhai la in tuasia taw tua Thingkuang siin tu uh hi." 
Numbers4:6 Amate in tuasia savun pha khat taw siin tu a, a tungbel ah vancii puan khat taw siinin, tua zawkciang a zawn natu thingpumte thun tu uh hi." 
Numbers4:7 Topa tung anluum piakna sabuai tungah amate in vancii puan pha tu a tua tungah pakante, ngimnamtui bungte, biakpiakna kuangte le sapittui biakpiakna thawlte koi tu uh hi. Sabuai tungah anluum om tawntung tu hi." 
Numbers4:8 Amate in tuate theampo puansan khat taw siin tu a, savun pha khat taw tuate siin thua in, a zawn natu thingpumte thun tu uh hi." 
Numbers4:9 Amate in vancii puan khat la in, meiinnte taw meidetna khuam, taitee, kuangte le olive thau koina bung theampo siin tu uh hi." 
Numbers4:10 Amate in tuasia le a vanhte theampo savun pha khat sungah tunin puak natu thingzawl tungah koi tu hi. 
Numbers4:11 Tua zawkciang amate in vancii puan khat taw khamh biaknatau siin tu a tua tungah savun pha khat koi in, tuaciang zawn natu thingpumte thun tu uh hi." 
Numbers4:12 Amate in Mun Thiangtho ah a kizangh vanh theampo la tu a vancii puan khat taw tunin savun pha khat a tungah koi in tuaciang puakna tu thingzawl sia tungah tuate koi tu uh hi. 
Numbers4:13 Amate in sathau a nel vutte biaknatau pan luak tu a, a tungah puan sandup khat pha tu hi." 
Numbers4:14 Amate in biaknatau nasepna ah a kizangh vanhte: meihalna kuangte, thikkoaite, kawkeaute le kisilna kuangte theampo tua tungah koi tu uh hi. Tuaciang amate in savun pha khat tua tungah koi tu uh hi, tuaciang a zawnna thingpumte thun tu uh hi." 
Numbers4:15 Ngiaphual kiphel tu hun a cin ciang a thiangtho nate le vanhzakte theampo Aaron le a tapate in a sit zawkciang a pua tu in Kohath bee le phung pan hong pai tu uh hi. Kohath bee le phung in a thiangtho nate thutha ngawl tu a, a thutha le amate thi tu uh hi. Puanbuk a kikhiin simin hite sia Kohath bee le phung ii vaipuak ahi hi." 
Numbers4:16 Puanbuk bup le meidet tu sathau, ngimnamtui, antang biakpiakna, noi sathaute le Topa tungah a ki aapsa puanbuk sungah a om theampo thiampi Aaron tapa Eleazar ii vaipuak hi tu hi." 
Numbers4:17 Topa in Moses le Aaron tungah," 
Numbers4:18 “Kohath ii bee le phung sia 
Numbers4:19 hi biakna taw kisai a thiangthobel nate nai ah a paina hu in thalup thuaksak heak in. Hisia a pian ngawl natu in Aaron le a tapate a sungah tumin, mi simin a sep tu te pia in, a vawt tu te son tu uh hi." 
Numbers4:20 Ahizong Kohath mite puanbuk sungah tumin biakna taw kisai a thiangtho nate tua tu in a kithoai thiampite a mu le amate thi tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers4:21 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Numbers4:22 Levi nam Gershon bee le phungte a innkuan le a beete taw kizui in mihing simna vawt tu le," 
Numbers4:23 Topa ompui na Puanbuk sungah na a seam thei tu kum sawmthum pan kum sawmnga kilaklaw pa peuma sazian la in sawl hi. 
Numbers4:24 Amate in a nuai a vanhte puak tu vaipuak nei uh hi: 
Numbers4:25 Puanbuk, a sung sitna, a pua sitna, a tung sitna a kipha savun, a sung tumna puankhai," 
Numbers4:26 biaknatau le puanbuk kiimkot ah a om kikhopna mun puankhakte le khauhualte, tuasia sung tumna puankhakte le tua nate thua natu vanhzakte theampo ahi hi. Amate in hi nate atu a kisamh theampo vawt tu uh hi." 
Numbers4:27 Aaron le a tapate ii Gershon suante tungah puak tu le sep tu vaipuak a piak theampo a sep siat natu in Moses le Aaron in pha takin en tu hi. 
Numbers4:28 Hite sia Puanbuk sungah a sep tu Gershon bee le phungte ii vaipuak ahi hi; amate in tua nasepte thiampi Aaron tapa Ithamar ii thupiakna bangin seam tu uh hi. 
Numbers4:29 Topa in Moses tungah Levi nam Merari bee le phung ii bawngte le innkuante zui in mihing simna nei tu le," 
Numbers4:30 Topa ompui na Puanbuk sungah na a seam thei tu kum sawmthum pan kum sawmnga kilaklaw, pa peuma sazian la in sawl hi." 
Numbers4:31 Amate in puanbuk ii thingpheakte, zawlte, khuamte, le tawdapte," 
Numbers4:32 tuaciang khuamte, tawdapte, khetphinte le puanbuk kiim kikhop na munah khaute, tuate taw a kizom nate theampo puak tu vaipuak nei uh hi. A puak tu vanhte mi simin vaipuak tekin nei tu hi." 
Numbers4:33 Hite sia Puanbuk sungah Merari bee le phungte ii vaipuak hi a: amate in thiampi Aaron tapa Ithamar thupiakna bangin seam tu uh hi. 
Numbers4:34 Topa thupiakna taw kizui in, Moses, Aaron, le taangpi lampuite in Levi mi nam thumte ahi, Kohath, Gershon, le Merari suan teng a mihing simna nei hi, amate in Topa ompui na Puanbuk sungah na a seam thei tu kum sawmthum le kum sawmnga kilaklaw, pa peuma a bawngte le innkuante zui in sazian la a, a nuai a bang ahi hi." 
Numbers4:35 Bee le phung Mihing phaza Kohath	2,750 Gershon 2,630 Merari 3,200 A vekpi in: 8,580" 
Numbers4:36 Topa in Moses tungah a thupiak bangin mi simin min sazian kila hi; Topa in Moses tungtawnin a thupiak bangin, a nasep tu le a puak tu vaipuakte mihing sim tungah kipia hi." 
Numbers5:1 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Numbers5:2 “A kiitakhuai vun natna veite ahibuale pumtung meima naai neite le mithi luang thamna taw a thiang ngawl peuma, ngiaphual pan a hawlkhiat natu in Israel mite thupia in." 
Numbers5:3 Amate sungah ka teenna hi ngiaphual, a nitsak ngawl natu in biakna taw kisai a thiang ngawl hi mihingte theampo hawlkhia in,” ci hi." 
Numbers5:4 Israel te in thu ni a, tua mihingte ngiaphual pan hawlkhia uh hi." 
Numbers5:5 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Numbers5:6 Israel te atu in a nuai a kihilnate pia hi. Mihing khat pawpo in Topa tungah thumaan ngawlin khat pawpo tungah khialna a vawt ciang 
Numbers5:7 a thuak pa tungah a mawna pualaak hamtang in, a maw a khial man a cingin a liau zawkciang zakhat tungah kul veu belapin pia thua tu hi." 
Numbers5:8 Ahizong tua pa thi zo a, a liausum piak natu in mealheak nai a nei bua ahile, tua liausum sia thiampipa atu in Topa tungah kipia tu hi. Hi liausum sia, a maw a khialpa biakna taw kisai in thiansua natu a kizangh tuutal belapna ahi hi." 
Numbers5:9 Israel te ii Topa tungah a tuam vilvel in a piak letsongte zongh tua letsong a saang thiampipa ii neisa ahi hi. 
Numbers5:10 Thiampi khat simin ama tungah a kipia biakpiaknate keam tu hi. 
Numbers5:11 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Numbers5:12 Israel te tungah a nuai a kihilna teng a piak tu in sawl hi. Tua thu sia pasal khat in ama tungah a zi thumaan ngawl a, pasal dang khat taw khialin ama pumpi ninsak ci a, muang la hi. Ahizong a khial laitak a kiman hi ngawl, tetti om ngawl a — a zi zongh in iim thei ahikom a pasal in thiang takin tel ngawl hi. Tua ahibuale hi thu sia a zi in thumaan ngawlna nei ngeingawl napi, a pasal in muang la thawthong zongh hi thei hi." 
Numbers5:13  
Numbers5:14  
Numbers5:15 Hi bang thu khat sasang a piang le, a pasal in a zi sia thiampipa kungah paipui tu hi. A pasal in biakpiak natu in a kisamh mangtaang vui kilogramme khat keng tu a, ahizong olive thau ahibuale ngimnamtui khat pawpo a tungah buak ngawl tu hi, banghang ziam cile hi biakpiakna sia a muang la pasal in thumaan thutak a heak nop manin a piak biakpiakna ahi hi." 
Numbers5:16 Thiampipa in tua numei, mai ah paipui in biaknatau mai ah dingsak tu hi." 
Numbers5:17 Thiampipa in leibeal sungah tui thiangtho tawm sung tu a, Topa ompui na Puanbuk sung suat tungah a om leivui tawm la in, tua tui a kha a sua natu a sungah tha tu hi." 
Numbers5:18 Tuaciang thiampipa in numei ii sam phelsak tu a, tua numei khut sungah biakpiakna anvui koi tu hi. Thiampipa in a khut sungah haamsiatna tuikhaa a om beal sia toai tu hi." 
Numbers5:19 Tuaciang thiampipa in tua numei ii thukimna la in, “Na pasal na palngul bua ahile hi haamsiatna tui neakna taw ngim na thuak buatu hi." 
Numbers5:20 Ahizong na pasal na palngul ahile," 
Numbers5:21 Topa in na min sia na mite sungah haamsiatna khat suaksak tahen. Topa in na numei thilte kinsakin, na ngil puaksak tahen." 
Numbers5:22 Hi tui na ngil sungah tum a, na ngil khangin, na numei thilte kinsak hen” ci in kiciamna vawtsak tu hi. Tua numei in, “Ka thukim hi; Topa in tuabang vawt tahen,” ci kik tu hi." 
Numbers5:23 Tuaciang thiampipa in hi haamsiatna teng lai taw at tu a, tua tuikhaa beal sungah sil tu hi." 
Numbers5:24 Tua tui sia numeinu ngil sungah a bot mama natna a piangsak thei tu in a neaksak ma in," 
Numbers5:25 thiampipa in numei nu khut sungah a om biakpiakna anvui sia la tu a, Topa tungah aapin, biaknatau tungah koi tu hi." 
Numbers5:26 Tuaciang biakpiakna khat hi a cina in thiampipa in anvui khutdim khat la tu a, biaknatau tungah hal tu hi. A khakbel in tua tui sia numei in nesak tu hi." 
Numbers5:27 Tua numei in a pasal a palngul le tua tui in a bot mama natna piangsak tu a; a ngil khangin, a numei thilte kin tu hi. A min sia a mite sungah haamsiatna suak tu hi." 
Numbers5:28 Ahizong tua nu a khial buale bangma tat ngawl tu a, nau nei thei tu hi." 
Numbers5:29 Hi thu sia a zi in hong palngul hi ci in thuum a, a muang la pasal khat ii thute ah zui tu thukham ahi hi. Tua numei sia biaknatau mai ah kidingsak tu a, thiampipa in hi a zeksa teng seam tu hi." 
Numbers5:30  
Numbers5:31 Hi khialna pan a pasal suakta tu a, ahizong tua numei a khial le a piang babang a thuak kul tu hi." 
Numbers6:1 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Numbers6:2 a nuai a kihilnate Israel mite a piak tu in thupia hi. Pa ahizong numei ahizong Nazirite mi suak tu khi hi, ci in kiciamna nei a, Topa tungah a ki aap sia in" 
Numbers6:3 sapittui le kham thei ngui theite ten tu hi. Ama in sapitnga taw dawn tu a kivawt bangma dawn ngawl tu a, sapitnga sia a hingin ahizong a ko in ahizong ne ngawl tu hi." 
Numbers6:4 Ama in Nazirite te ahi hun sungin sapitkung pan a piang peuma, sapit mu le a haw dong ciangin ne ngawl tu hi." 
Numbers6:5 Ama in Nazirite kiciamna nuai ah a om hun sung theampo a sam meet ngawl tu a, a mul meet ngawl tu hi. Ama Topa tungah a kipiak hun a cin dong kiciamna in heencip ahikom a sam le a khamul hoai tu hi." 
Numbers6:6 Ama sam sia Pathian tungah ki aapna lim hi a, tua ahiciang mithi luang kung, a nu a pa, a suapuite luang ahi hial zong a neak na taw in ama le ama kininsak ngawl het tu hi." 
Numbers6:7  
Numbers6:8 Ama in Nazirite te ahi laiteng Topa tungah a kipum aap ahi hi. 
Numbers6:9 Thakhat thu in a thi pa khat ii kungah a om hu in Nazirite pa in a kipum aap sa, a sam a ninsak le ni sali sung ngak nanak tu a, tua zawkciangin a sam le a khamul meet tu hi; tuabangin ama biakna taw kisai a thiang suak tu hi." 
Numbers6:10 Ni liat ni in ama in Topa ompuina Puanbuk sung tumna ah a om thiampipa kungah inn vakhu nii ahi buale ngam vakhu nii paipui tu hi. 
Numbers6:11 Thiampipa in khat sia mawphel biakpiakna in, a dang khat sia meihal biakpiakna in nei tu a, mithi luang tham ahikom ama thiansua natu in a zeksa teng vawtsak tu hi. Tua ni ma in, ama in a sam pum aap kik tu a," 
Numbers6:12 Nazirite ahi na bangin Topa tungah amate hun sia aap kik tu hi. A masa hun teng kisimsak ngawl tu hi, banghang ziam cile a aapsa ama ii sam sia ninsak hi. Ama in khialphel biakpiakna in kum khat a pha tuu khat keng tu hi." 
Numbers6:13 Nazirite khat a kiciam hun a cin ciang ama in a zeksa teng vawt tu hi. Ama in Puanbuk tumna ah pai in," 
Numbers6:14 a mealhem ngawl nganhing thum Topa pia tu hi: meihal biakpiakna in kum khat a pha tuutalno khat, mawphel biakpiakna in kum khat a pha tuula khat, pawlkhop biakpiakna in tuutal khat hi tu hi." 
Numbers6:15 Ama in tol saw ngawl anluum law khat: olive thau taw hel in a vawt, anluum saate, olive thau noai in a paa in a vawt anluumte le a kisamh antang le sapittui taw biakpiaknate zongh pia lai tu hi." 
Numbers6:16 Thiampipa in hi teng theampo Topa kungah paipui tu a, mawphel biakpiakna le meihal biakpiakna pia tu hi." 
Numbers6:17 Ama in pawlkhop biakpiakna in tuutal khat sia Topa tungah anluum law khat taw pia tu hi; ama in antang le sapittui biakpiakna zongh pia tu hi. 
Numbers6:18 Puanbuk tumna ah tua nazirite in a sam meet tu a, pawlkhop biakpiakna a kihalna mei tungah tuasia hal tu hi." 
Numbers6:19 Tuaciang thiampipa in a kihuan tuutal liang la tu a, anluum saa khat le law sung pan muhphaang khat taw Nazirite ii khut sungah piakhawm tu hi." 
Numbers6:20 Tuasia zawkciang thiampipa in tua teng Topa tungah a tuam vilvel letsong in pia tu hi; tuate thiampipa atu in a thiangtho biakpiakna hi a, thukham om bangin thiampipa ii neisa tuutal phei le a awmsa belapna ahi hi. Tua zawkciang Nazirite in sapittui ne thei tu hi." 
Numbers6:21 Hite Nazirite mite zui tu ngeina hi a; ahizong Nazirite khat in a kulza sangin a tamzaw piak tu in kiciamna a nei le ama kamciam piak bang linlian in cingsak hamtang tu hi. 
Numbers6:22 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Numbers6:23 Aaron le a tapate in Israel mite thupha a piak ciang a nuai a kammalte a zak natu a sonsawn tu in thupia hi: 
Numbers6:24 Topa in note thupha hong pia in, hong keamcing tahen;" 
Numbers6:25 Topa in no tungah dikna le cikna thiamna hong nei tahen; 
Numbers6:26 Topa in note maipha hong pia in, thinnopna hong pia tahen;" 
Numbers6:27 Tuaciang Topa in, “Amate in Israel mite tungah thupha piakna in ka min a lo le, keima in amate thupha ka pia tu hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers7:1 Moses in Topa ompuina Puanbuk sak a man ni in, ama in Puanbuk le a vanhte theampo le biaknatau le a vanhte theampo, sathau noai in aapna nei hi." 
Numbers7:2 Tuaciang Israel minamte sung pan a lampui bee le phung ukpi te ahi, mihing simna ukte in," 
Numbers7:3 Topa tungah a biakpiaknate: leang luk le khuital sawm le ni, lampui nii ciang in leang khat veu le lampui khat ciang in khuital khat tek paipui uh hi. Amate in tuate a piak siat zawkciang," 
Numbers7:4 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Numbers7:5 “Puanbuk atu, nasepna ah zak tu in hi letsongte saang in a; tua teng amate nasepna tu taw kizui in Levi mite tungah pia in,” ci hi." 
Numbers7:6 Tua ahiciang Moses in leangte le khuitalte Levi te tungah pia hi. 
Numbers7:7 Ama in leang nii le khuital li Gershon te tungah pia a," 
Numbers7:8 leang li le khuital liat Mera te tungah pia hi. Amate ii nasep theampo Aaron tapa Ithamar ukna nuai ah kiseam tu hi. 
Numbers7:9 Ahizong Moses in Kohath te tungah leangte ahibuale khuitalte pia ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile amate ii kepcing a thiangtho vanhte a liangko tungah a puak kul hi." 
Numbers7:10 Biaknatau aapna vawt natu in lampuite zongh in biakpiaknate paipui uh hi. Amate in a letsongte biaknatau ah pia tu in a kingin ciang," 
Numbers7:11 Topa in Moses tungah, “Biaknatau aap natu in, lampuite khat in a letsongte ni sawm le ni nii hun sung ni sim pia tu hi ci in amate son in,” ci hi." 
Numbers8:1 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Numbers8:2 “Aaron in meiinn salite meikhuam tungah a koi ciang a maisang a taang tu in koi tahen ci in son in.” ci hi. 
Numbers8:3 Aaron in a thu ni a, meikhuam ii maisang maingatin meiinnte koi hi." 
Numbers8:4 Topa in Moses tungah a laksa pianzia bangin tua meikhuam a dawn pan a bul dong a kiseak khamh taw kivawt hi. 
Numbers8:5 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Numbers8:6 “Levi te sia Israel dangte taw khen in a, hi bangin thiansua in:" 
Numbers8:7 thiansuana tui amate tungah the in a, a pum tung bup multe meet hen a, a puante a sawp natu sawl in. Tua sia ciang amate thiangtho tu uh hi." 
Numbers8:8 Tua zawkciang amate in khuital moi khat le antang biakpiak natu a, a kisamh olive thau taw kihel anvuite kengsak in a; nangma in mawphel biakpiak natu in a dang khuital khat na keng tu hi." 
Numbers8:9 Tuaciang Israel taangpi bup khawm in a, ka ompuina Puanbuk mai ah Levi te dingsak in." 
Numbers8:10 Israel mite in Levi te lu tungah a khut uh nga tu a," 
Numbers8:11 tuaciang Levi te in ka na a sep thei natu in Israel te tung pan a tuam vilvel letsong bangin amate Aaron in keima tungah hong aap tu hi. 
Numbers8:12 Levi te in khuital niite lu tungah a khut uh nga tu uh a; Levi te atu a zeksa thiansuana vawt natu in, khui khat mawphel biakpiakna in kipia tu a, a dang khat sia meihal biakpiakna in kipia tu hi." 
Numbers8:13 “Levi te kei tungah a tuam vilvel letsong in hong aap ta'n a, Aaron le a tapate in amate uksak in." 
Numbers8:14 Levi te sia keima aa ahi tu in Israel dangte tu a bangin khen in. 
Numbers8:15 Levi te thiansua in aapna na vawt zawkciang, amate Puanbuk sungah naseam tu in a kiphu a kilawmte suak tu hi." 
Numbers8:16 Israel te tapa suakciil theampo ii dinmun ah amate ka laaksa hi a, amate keima bek ii neisa ahi hi." 
Numbers8:17 Egypt ah taciil theampo ka thalup lai in, Israel innkuan sim ii tapa lianbel tek le a nganhing suakciil theampo keima neisa in ka tuam koi hi." 
Numbers8:18 Tu in keima in Levi te sia Israel te taciil theampo taangin ka la hi," 
Numbers8:19 Puanbuk sungah Israel te atu in naseam tu le Mun Thiangtho ah Israel te in hong neak a, ngimna a thuak thaak ngawl natu a dal tu in, Israel te sung pan letsong bangin Levi te sia Aaron le a tapate tungah ka pia hi.” ci hi." 
Numbers8:20 Tua ahiciang Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin, Moses, Aaron le Israel mite theampo in Pathian tungah Levi te aap uh hi." 
Numbers8:21 Levi te amate le amate kithiansua in, a puante uh silthiang a, tua zawkciang Aaron in Topa tungah amate a tuam vilvel letsong in aap hi. Aaron in amate atu in kithiansuana a zeksa teng zongh vawtsak hi." 
Numbers8:22 Levi mite taw kisai, Topa ii Moses tungah a thupiak theampo mipite in vawt siat hi. Tua hi a, Levi mite sia Aaron le a tapate khutnuai ah Puanbuk sung naseam tu in a kiphu a kilawm hong suak uh hi." 
Numbers8:23 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Numbers8:24 “Levi te a mi simin kum 25 a phak pan kipan keima ompuina Puanbuk sungah a vaipuakte seam tu uh a," 
Numbers8:25 kum 50 a phak ciang tawp tu uh hi. 
Numbers8:26 Tua zawkciang ama in Puanbuk sungah a Levi mipuite ii nasep hu thei tu hi, ahizong ama tatakin seam ngawl het tu hi. Hi bangin Levi te ii nasep tu teng seesak tu ni hi.” ci hi." 
Numbers9:1 Israel mite Egypt a nusiat zawk a kum niina, tha masabel in Sinai Sennealngam ah Topa in Moses paupui hi." 
Numbers9:2 Ama in, “Israel mite in sep tu le zui tu ngeina om bangin tu tha ni sawm le ni li ni, nitum ciang kipanin Paisan Poai vawt tu uh hi.” ci hi." 
Numbers9:3  
Numbers9:4 Tua ahikom, Moses in mipite tungah Paisan Poai vawt tu son a," 
Numbers9:5 amate in Sinai Sennealngam ah tha masabel ni sawm le ni li ni nitakin, poai vawt uh hi. Topa in Moses tungah a thupiak bangin mihingte in vawt tu teng vawt siat uh hi." 
Numbers9:6 Ahizong mihing pawlkhatte mithi luang tham a, biakna taw kisai in thiang ngawl ahikom tua ni Paisan Poai ah kihel thei ngawl uh hi. Amate in Moses le Aaron kungah pai a," 
Numbers9:7 “Kote in mithi luang khat thamin, ka thiang bua uh hi, ahizong Israel dangte ii Topa tung biakpiakna ah banghang hong kihelsak ngawl nu ziam?” ci uh hi." 
Numbers9:8 Moses in, “ Topa tung pan sawlna thu ka nga dong ngak zii vun,” ci in zo hi." 
Numbers9:9 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Numbers9:10 Israel mite tungah a son tu in, “Note khat po, ahibuale na suan na paalte ii mithi luang a tham hu in thiang ngawl a, ahibuale khual khuala haw in, ahihang Paisan Poai a siim nuam veve le," 
Numbers9:11 tha khat zawkciang, a tha niina ni sawm le ni li ni, nitakin poai vawt thei tu nu hi. Tol saw ngawl anluum le antee khaa taw poai vawt vun." 
Numbers9:12 A zingsang dongin anneakvaal koi heak vun a, tua a kingo nganhing ii ngute khat zongh thiaktan heak vun. Zui tu ngeina theampo om bangin Paisan Poai vawt vun." 
Numbers9:13 Ahizong mihing khat po biakna taw kisai in thiang a, khual zongh haw ngawl napi Paisan Poai a vawt bua ahile ka mi khat in kingaisun nawn ngawl tu hi, banghang ziam cile a hunin biakpiakna hong piak ngawl hang ahi hi. Ama in a mawna hu in thuak nanak tu hi." 
Numbers9:14 “Note sungah ngamdangmi khat in Paisan Poai a vawt nuam ahile sep tu le zui tu ngeina om theampo vawt tu hi. Ngamdangmi hikale ngamsung mi hikale a kuama po zui tu in a kibang thukham ahi hi,” ci in sawl hi." 
Numbers9:15 Topa ompuina Puanbuk a kisak ni in, meei hong kaai a Puanbuk tuamcip hi. Zan in tua meei sia mei bangin taang hi." 
Numbers9:16  
Numbers9:17 Tua meei a kikhaangto simin Israel te in Puanbuk phel a, meei a tuaksukna munah Puanbuk sa kik uh hi." 
Numbers9:18 Topa thupiak bangin mite in ngiaphual phelin, ama thupiak bangin ngiaphual saat uh hi. Puanbuk tungah meeikaai a taam laiteng tua ngiaphual sung ma ah amate taam uh hi." 
Numbers9:19 Khuangei mama Puanbuk tungah meeikaai a taam ciang amate in Topa thu ni in kikhiin ngawl uh hi. 
Numbers9:20 Khat vevei ni tawmvei sung bek Puanbuk tungah meeikaai om a; bangbang po hikale Topa thupiakna bangin amate taam a, ahibuale kikhiin uh hi." 
Numbers9:21 Khat vevei nitak pan zingsang dong bek meei om a, meei a kilapto po ciang amate kikhiin uh hi. Meei a kilapto hun simin amate kikhiin tan uh hi." 
Numbers9:22 Ni nii ahizong, tha khat ahizong, kum khat ahizong, khuangei zaw ahizong, Puanbuk tungah meei a om laiteng, amate zongh kikhiin ngawl hi; ahizong meei a kilapto ciang amate kikhiin uh hi." 
Numbers9:23 Topa ii Moses tungtawn a, a thupiak bang ni in, amate in ngiaphual saatna, ngiaphual phelna te seam uh hi." 
Numbers10:1 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Numbers10:2 “Mipite kikhop tu sapna le ngiaphual phel natu zaaksakna a zak tu in sek taw a kiseak ngunn taw lemle nii vawt in. 
Numbers10:3 Lemlete nii, awsau in a kitum ciang keima ompuina Puanbuk tumna kongbiang, nangma kiimkot ah taangpi bup kikhawm tu uh hi." 
Numbers10:4 Ahizong lemle khat bek a kitum le bee le phungte pan lampui teng bek nangma kiimkot ah kikhawm tu uh hi. 
Numbers10:5 Lemlete aw a tawngin a kitum ciang nisuana sangah ngiaphual a saat minamte kikhiin tu uh hi. 
Numbers10:6 Lemlete aw a tawngin nii veina a kitum ciang thangsang a om minamte kikhiin tu uh hi. Tua ahikom ngiaphual phel natu in lemle aw a tawngin kitum tu a," 
Numbers10:7 ahizong taangpi kikhop natu ahile aw sau in kitum tu hi. 
Numbers10:8 Aaron tapa thiampite in lemlete tum tu uh hi. “A nuai a ngeina sia maisang hun theampo ah zui tu ahi hi. 
Numbers10:9 Na ngam sungah ngal hong om ciang, no hong sim na ngalte do tu in ngal phawnna lemle na tum tu uh hi. Keima, Topa na Pathian in kong hu tu a, na ngalte khut sung pan kong ngum tu hi." 
Numbers10:10 Lungnop hunte sung zongh ah — na Thadet Poaite le a dang na biakna poaite ah — meihal biakpiaknate le pawlkhop biakpiaknate na piak uh ciang lemlete tum tu nu hi. Tuasia ciang no kong hu tu hi. Keima in Topa na Pathian ka hi hi.” ci hi. 
Numbers10:11 A mipite Egypt ngam a nusiat zawk a kum nii a tha niina, a ni kul ni in, Topa ompuina Puanbuk tung pan meei kilaamto a," 
Numbers10:12 Israel te a khualhawna kipanin Sinai Sennealngam pan pusuak uh hi. Tua meei sia Paran duisung ngampa ah tawlnga hi. 
Numbers10:13 Moses tungtawn a, Topa thupiak bangin amate vaiding tu kipan a," 
Numbers10:14 a kikhiin simin, tua a kizui ngeina om bangin ngamta uh hi. Judah nam ii lampuina laandial nuai ah a om khen khat sia Amminadab tapa Nahshon in uk a, a hon a honin pai masa uh hi." 
Numbers10:15 Zuar ii tapa Nethanel in Issachar nam sia uk a," 
Numbers10:16 Helon ii tapa Eliab in Zebulun nam uk hi. 
Numbers10:17 Tuaciang Puanbuk phelin Gershon le Merari bee le phung in pua in pai uh hi. 
Numbers10:18 A zom ah, pawlkhenna laandial nuai ah a om Reuben namte sia Shedeur ii tapa Elizur in uk a, a hon a hon in pai uh hi." 
Numbers10:19 Zurishaddai ii tapa Shelumiel in Simeon nam uk a," 
Numbers10:20 Deuel ii tapa Elisaph in Gad nam uk hi. 
Numbers10:21 Tuaciang Levi nam Kohath bee le phung in a thiangtho vanhte pua in ding uh hi. Amate a Ngiaphual saa kik natu a thet hunin, Puanbuk saksa in om kik zo hi." 
Numbers10:22 A zom ah pawlkhenna laandial nuai ah a omte sia Ephraim nam in lampui a Ammihud ii tapa Elishama uk a, a hon a hon in pai uh hi." 
Numbers10:23 Pedahzur ii tapa Gamaliel in Manasseh nam uk a," 
Numbers10:24 Gideoni ii tapa Abidan in Benjamin nam uk hi. 
Numbers10:25 A khakbel in pawlkhenna laandial nuai ah a omte Dan nam in lampui a, pawlkhen theampo ii a vaihuai seam a, Ammishaddai ii tapa Ahiezer in uk a, a hon a hon in pai uh hi." 
Numbers10:26 Ochran ii tapa Pagiel in Asher nam uk a," 
Numbers10:27 Enan ii tapa Ahira in Naphtali nam uk hi. 
Numbers10:28 Tu a bang teng sia, Israel te ngiaphual phel in a kikhiin simin a hon a honin a paizia ahi hi." 
Numbers10:29 Moses in Midian mi Jethro ii tapa, a zi ii suapuipa Hobab tungah, “ Topa ii piak tu hong cina munah kote a pai tu ka ahi uh hi. Ama in tu in Israel te a nuamsa tu in hong kamciam zo ahikom, hong zui ta'n, ka nopsaknate nang taw ih hawm khawm tu hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers10:30 Hobab in, “Hingawl hi, ka pianna ngam ah ka heak kik tu hi.” ci in zo hi." 
Numbers10:31 Moses in, “Nong hesuakna taw kote hong nusia heak in. Duisung ngampa ah ko ngiaphual saat thei natu mun he na hi ciang kote lam hong lak thei tu ni hi." 
Numbers10:32 Ko hong zui lete Topa hong piak thupha theampo nang taw ih hawm tu hi.” ci hi. 
Numbers10:33 Israel mite in mual thiangtho ahi Sinai nusia a, ni thum sung pai uh hi. Topa Thuciamna Thingkuang sia ngiaphual mun tu a zong tu in amate mai ah paikhol tawntung hi." 
Numbers10:34 Amate ngiaphual khat sim pan a kikhiin laitak, sun hunin Topa ii meei amate tungah om hi." 
Numbers10:35 Thuciamna Thingkuang a din pui hun simin Moses in, “ Topa awng, tho in a; na ngalte kithethaangsak in, nang hong ngaimawte taisak in!” ci bul hi." 
Numbers10:36 A tawlngak hun simin ama in, “ Topa awng, Israel innkuan a tul sim te kungah hong heak kik ta'n,” ci bul hi." 
Numbers11:1 Mipite in amate ngimnate Topa tungah phun uh hi. Tua thu a zaak ciang Topa thin uuk a, amate tungah meikuang khiak hi. Amate sungah tua mei kuang a, ngiaphual mong khat kaanghtum hi." 
Numbers11:2 Mipite in Moses tungah huna ngenin au a; Moses in Topa tungah thungen in tua mei mit hi. 
Numbers11:3 Tua ahikom tua mun Taberah kici hi, banghang ziam cile tua mun amate sungah Topa ii mei kuang hi." 
Numbers11:4 Israel te taw khual a haw khawm ngamdang mite pawlkhat om hi. Amate in sa lungngul mama uh a, Israel te ngawngawn zongh phun kipan in: “Neak tu sa tawm beak nei thei thong leang maw!" 
Numbers11:5 Egypt ah man piak ngawlin ngasa theampo ih du bang po ih ne hi. Ih neak tawntung tangmaite, tangmaisante, lonamsiate, kaisonsante, kaisonkaangte phawk kik vun." 
Numbers11:6 Ahizong tu in ih tha bo zo hi. Neak tu bangma om ngawl a — ni sim ni simin manna bebek hi!” ci uh hi. 
Numbers11:7 (Manna sia thaicii no taw kibang a, a meal a kaang le a eng kithua bang ahi hi." 
Numbers11:8 Tua mannate zan lai in ngiaphual tungah daaitui taw taak khawm hi. A zingsang ciang a mipite pai in tawm a, ngoaivui in ahibuale sum sungah suuvui hi, tua zawkciang huanin muhphaang in vawt uh hi. A limna olive thau taw a ki em anluum bangin lim hi.)" 
Numbers11:9  
Numbers11:10 Mipite theampo a ngiaphual kongbiangte tek ah a hon a hon in ding in, a phun uh sia Moses in za hi. Amate tungah Topa thin uuk ahikom Moses a thinngim a," 
Numbers11:11 ama in Topa tungah, “Banghangin kei hong vawtsia mama ni ziam? Banghangin kei tungah lungkim ngawl ni ziam? Banghangin hi mihingte theampo kei ii vaipuak laak tu in hong pia ni ziam?" 
Numbers11:12 Amate kei bitphua hi ngawl a, kei piansak le hi ngawl hi. Amate ii taanghpupite tungah na kamciamsa ngam sang paina lam tawntung ah nau omh khat bang ahi tu le amate nausen te bangin ka baan taw a toai tu in banghang kei hong sawl ni ziam?" 
Numbers11:13 Hi mihingte theampo khamkhop tu sa sia koisung pan nga thei tu khi ziam? Amate in sa hong ngenin phiing tawntung hi. 
Numbers11:14 Keima nguak in hi mihingte theampo atu vaipuak ka la thei bua hi; Kei atu in nasia leih hi! 
Numbers11:15 Hi bangin nong vawt tu ahile nong ngitlona ka thuak nawn ngawl natu in hong hesuak ta'n a kei hong that heu ta'n,” ci hi." 
Numbers11:16 Topa in Moses tungah, “Mipite lampui in a kiciamtee a zatak huai mihing sawmsali khawm in a, ka ompuina Puanbuk ah hong paipui ta'n, tua munah nangma kiim ah dingsak in." 
Numbers11:17 Kong paisuk tu a, tualai ah kong paupui tu hi. Nang kong piaksa thaa pawlkhat la in, amate ka pia tu hi. Tuasia ciang amate in hi mihingte atu vaipuak teng hong hu thei tu a, nangma bek in tua vaipuak na la buatu hi." 
Numbers11:18 Tu in, mipite tungah son in, ‘Zing ciang atu in kithiansua tavun; neak tu sa na nei tu uh hi. Note phiingin sa tawm ne nuam ung ci in, Egypt ma nuamsa in na lungngulna thu uh Topa in za zo hi. Tu in, Topa in sa hong pia tu a, na ne tu uh hi." 
Numbers11:19 Note in sa na ne tu uh a ni khat, ni nii, ni nga, ni sawm ahibuale ni kul sung bek zongh hi ngawlin," 
Numbers11:20 tha khat bup na zaknop ngawl liang uh dong, na nim uh dongin na ne tu uh hi. Banghang hi bang hi tu ziam na ci uh le hilai note sungah a om Topa na nial uh a, Egypt ngam pan pusuak bualeang ci in na phunsan uh hang hi,’ ci in son in” ci hi." 
Numbers11:21 Moses in Topa tungah, “Hi sungah mihing 600,000 ka lampui a, tha khat sung a kham tu sa a kicing ka pia tu, ci ni ziam?" 
Numbers11:22 Khui le tuute amate kham tu in ngo zo tu hi ziam? Tuipi sungah ngasa theampo amate atu in kicing tu ziam?” ci hi. 
Numbers11:23 Topa in, “Ka vaangletna a kiciangtan ziam? Ka ci bangin a pian le a pian ngawl hai ngawlin na mu tu hi!” ci in zo hi." 
Numbers11:24 Tuaciang Moses pusuak in Topa ci teng mite tungah son hi. Ama in lampui 70 te kaikhawm in Puanbuk kiim ah omsak hi. 
Numbers11:25 Tuaciang Topa meei sungah tuaksuk in Moses paupui hi. Ama in Moses tungah a piaksa thaa pawlkhat la in, lampui 70 te tungah pia hi. Amate tungah tua thaa a pai ciang kamsaangte bangin amate au uh a, ahizong khuangei au ngawl uh hi." 
Numbers11:26 Lampui sawmsalite sung pan niite ahi, Eldad le Medad in Puanbuk ah pai ngawlin ngiaphual ah om uh hi. Tua ngiaphual ah amate tungah thaa pai a, amate zongh kamsaangte bangma in a au uh hi." 
Numbers11:27 Tangvalno khat sia, Eldad le Medad omdan teng Moses tungah son tu in tai hi." 
Numbers11:28 Tuaciang a no lai panin Moses a hu tawntung pa Nun tapa Joshua pau in Moses tungah, “Topa awng, amate tawlngasak in!” ci hi." 
Numbers11:28 Tuaciang a no lai panin Moses a hu tawntung pa Nun tapa Joshua pau in Moses tungah, “Topa awng, amate tawlngasak in!” ci hi." 
Numbers11:29 Moses in, “Kei ngaisut tu teng hong thinnuammaw ni ziam? Topa in a mite theampo tungah a thaa pia in, kamsaangte bangin amate theampo ausak le ka uuk hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Numbers11:30 Tuaciang Moses le Israel lampui 70 te ngiaphual ah cia kik uh hi. 
Numbers11:31 Topa in thakhat thu in tuipi pan vamimte a puak vui vasak a, tua vamimte lei pan meter khat sangin a niamzaw in leang hi. Vamimte ngiaphual tung le a kiim a paam kilometre tam mama sung teng ah om uh hi." 
Numbers11:32 Tua hi a, mipite in tua ni bup, zankhuateak le a zing ciang sunkhua in vamim man uh a; kilogramme tulkhat nuaisia a man om ngawl hi. Amate in vamimte ngiaphual kiimkot theampo ah a ngeam tu in pho uh hi." 
Numbers11:33 Vamim sa neak tu tam mama a nei lai hun sung ma in, mipite tungah Topa thin uuk ahikom amate sungah a kilaw thei natna tungsak hi." 
Numbers11:34 Tua munah sa du in a longthak mi tam mama phum ahikom tua mun sia Kibroth Hattaavah (a khiakna “Longthakte Thaan”) kici hi. 
Numbers11:35 Mipite tua mun pan Hazeroth ah kikhiin a, tualai ah ngiaphual saat uh hi." 
Numbers12:1 Moses in Cush mite numei khat teenpui a, tua hu in Miriam le Aaron in sonsia hi." 
Numbers12:2 Amate in, “ Topa in Moses tungtawn bekin thuson ziam? Eite tungtawn zong thuson hi ngawl ziam?” ci uh hi. Amate cisia Topa in za hi." 
Numbers12:3 (Moses sia a kiniamkhiak mihing hi a, leitung ah a om midang khat pawpo sangin kiniamkhiak zaw hi.)" 
Numbers12:4 Thakhat thu in Topa in, Moses, Aaron le Miriam paupui a, “Note thum keima ompuina Puanbuk ah hong pai tavun,” ci hi. Amate pai a," 
Numbers12:5 tuaciang Topa sia meeikhuam khat sungah tuaksuk a, Puanbuk kongbiang ah dingin, “Aaron awng! Miriam awng!” ci in sam hi. Amate nii mai sangah pai a," 
Numbers12:6 tuaciang Topa in, “Tu in kong thuson tu te ngai vun! Note sungah kamsaangte a om ciang, keima le keima amate kungah mukholnate sung pan ka kilangh a, mangte sung pan amate ka paupui hi." 
Numbers12:7 Ka naseampa Moses taw ka kipaupui ciang sia a tuamdang khat ahi hi; Israel ka mite theampo ama in ka uksak hi. 
Numbers12:8 Tua ahikom ama taw kimaingat in kam soaiheamte zangh ngawlin thiang takin ka paupui hi; a ma in ka pianlim ngawngawn hong mu hi! Ka naseampa Moses langpanin bangbang pau ngam nu ziam?” ci hi. 
Numbers12:9 Amate tungah Topa thin uuk hi; tua hi a ama in a paisat po ciang," 
Numbers12:10 Puanbuk pan meei in nusia a, Miriam vun tungah thakhat thu in a kiitakhuai natna theng in, vuuk bangin hong kaang hi. Miriam sia hi natna taw a kituamcip Aaron in a mu ciang," 
Numbers12:11 ama in Moses tungah, “Ka topa awng, a mawmawthuai ka mawna uh hangin hesuakna taw hi bang daan hong thuaksak heak in." 
Numbers12:12 A thisa in a suak, a taksa a lang a kine khawng khat bangin ama suaksak heak in” ci hi." 
Numbers12:13 Tua ahiciang Moses in Topa biakpui a, “Pathian awng, Miriam damsak in!” ci hi." 
Numbers12:14 Topa in, “Tua nu maitang ah a pa in cil a phii le ama in ni sali sung maizum thuak tu hi. Tua ahikom ama sia nipi khat sung ngiaphual pua sangah kikoi tu a, tuasia zawkciang ngiaphual sungah kitumpui kik thei tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Numbers12:15 Miriam sia ngiaphual pua sangah ni sali sung kikoi a, ama a kitumsak kik mateng mipite kikhiin ngawl hi." 
Numbers12:16 Tua zawkciang amate in Hazeroth nusia in, Paran duisung ngampa ah ngiaphual saat uh hi." 
Numbers13:1 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Numbers13:2 “A minam sawm le niite ii lampuite sung pan khat tek veu teal in a, thudawpkute bangin Israel te ka piak Canaan ngam a vil tu in paisak in,” ci hi," 
Numbers13:3 Moses in a thu ni a, a nuai a lampuite Paran duisung panin paisak hi." 
Numbers13:4 Anam Lampui Reuben Zaccur ii tapa Shammua Simeon Hori ii tapa Shaphat Judah Jephunneh ii tapa Caleb Issachar Joseph ii tapa Igal Ephraim	Nun ii tapa Hoshea Benjamin Raphu ii tapa Palti Zebulun Sodi ii tapa Gaddiel Manasseh Susi ii tapa Gaddi Dan Gemalli ii tapa Ammiel Asher Michael ii tapa Sethur Naphtali Vophsi ii tapa Nahbi Gad Machi ii tapa Geuel 
Numbers13:5 Hi teng sia Moses ii a ngamvil tu in a sawl thudawpku teng ahi hi. Ama in Nun tapa Hoshea sia Joshua ci in a min laih hi. 
Numbers13:5 Hi teng sia Moses ii a ngamvil tu in a sawl thudawpku teng ahi hi. Ama in Nun tapa Hoshea sia Joshua ci in a min laih hi. 
Numbers13:6 Moses in amate a paisak ciang, amate tungah, “Hi sung pan saksang zuanin Canaan ngam thang sangah pai tavun a, tuaciang mualtung ngam ah pai tavun." 
Numbers13:7 A ngam sia bangbang ngam hi a mihing bangza teang a, bangza thahat ziam cite hong tel tavun." 
Numbers13:8 A ngam pha ziam sia ziam, mite a dongdai khuate sungah teangzau ziam, a muanhuai a ki uum khuapite sungah teang ziam cite hong kantel tavun." 
Numbers13:9 A lei pha ziam, thingkung tamna taamngam ahi ziam hong en tavun. Tualai ah a ciin thingno nga pawlkhat hong ciapui nanak tavun,” ci in vaitha hi. (Tua hun sia sapit min tu kipat laitak ahi hi.)" 
Numbers13:10 Tuaciang, thangsang ngam Zin duisung ngampa pan, amate saksang zuanin, saksang ah a om Hamath Mualciangh nai Rehob dong ngamvil in pai uh hi." 
Numbers13:11 Amate thangsang ngam tengah pai masa a, Anakim a kici mihing thatang lian nam ii suan le paal ahi, Ahiman, Sheshai le Talmai bee le phung teng teenna Hebron theng uh hi. (Hebron sia Egypt ngam Zoan khua saat ma kum 7 lai in kisaat hi.)" 
Numbers13:12 Amate Eshcol Kuam theng a, tua munah amate in sapit bom khat a nga sapitbaak khat saattan in, ngit mama ahikom mol thaakin mihing nii in zawng liang uh hi. Amate in talee nga le theinga pawlkhat zongh ciapui uh hi." 
Numbers13:13 (Tua mun sia Israel te ii sapitnga bom a saattanna mun ahikom Eshcol Kuam kici hi.) 
Numbers13:14 Ni sawmli sung ngam a vil zawkciang, thudawpkute sia," 
Numbers13:15 Moses, Aaron le Israel taangpi bup omna Paran duisung ngampa Kadesh ah heak kik uh hi. Amate ii a mu bang teng son in, a thingnga puakte lak uh hi." 
Numbers13:16 Amate in Moses tungah, “Kote in ngam ka vil uh a, a hauna le a lei phatnate ka mu uh hi; a thingnga pawlkhat zongh hilai ah kong ciapui uh hi." 
Numbers13:17 Ahizong tualai ah a teang mite hat mama uh a, a khuapite lian mama in kul taw pha takin ki uum hi. Tua sangin zongh a poizaw sia thatang liante ii suan le paalte tua munah ka mu uh hi." 
Numbers13:18 Thangsang ngam ah Amalek te teang a, Hit te, Jebus te, le Amor te mualtung ngam ah teang a; Canaan te ahile Mediterranean tuipi hui le Jordan ngundung ah teang uh hi,” ci in son uh hi." 
Numbers13:19 Caleb in Moses langpanin a phunsan mipite thimsak a, “Tu in eite in simin a ngam la tawng; tua ngam a zo zo tu in ih tha hat khop hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers13:20 Ahizong Caleb taw a paikhawm pasalte in, “Hi ngawl hi, amate sim tu in ih thahat tham ngawl hi; eite sangin tualai ah a om mite thahat zaw hi,” ci uh hi." 
Numbers13:21 Tua ahiciang amate in a ngam vilna thute ahi ngawl lamin Israel te sungah zelsak uh hi. Amate in, “Tua leitang pan tua munah a teang sa mihingte neakkhop tu ngawngawn zongh an piang ngawl hi. Ka mu uh mihingte theampo sia saang mama a," 
Numbers13:22 Anak suan le paal, mihing thatang liante ngawngawn ka mu uh hi. Eite sia khaumaw bang lelin no ih kisa a, amate muna zongh ah tuabang lel ma ih hi tu hi,” ci uh hi." 
Numbers14:1 Mipite lungmang a thinkiam in zankhuateak kap in au hi. 
Numbers14:2 Amate in Moses le Aaron langpanin phunsan uh a, “Egypt ah ahibuale hi lai duisung ngawngawn ah thi le ung phazaw hi!" 
Numbers14:3 Banghangin eite tua ngam ah Topa in hong paipui ziam? Eite ngal sungah hong kithat tu a, ih zite le ih tate kiman tu hi. Egypt ah cia kik leang phazaw ngawl ziam?” ci uh hi." 
Numbers14:4 Tua ahiciang amate khat le khat tungah, “Lampui khat tealin Egypt ah cia kik tawng!” kici uh hi." 
Numbers14:5 Tua zawkciang Moses le Aaron sia mihonpite mai lei ah kun uh hi. 
Numbers14:6 Tuaciang Nun tapa Joshua le Jephunneh tapa Caleb, thudawpkute sung pan nii in khuangaina taw a puante balkeak in," 
Numbers14:6 Tuaciang Nun tapa Joshua le Jephunneh tapa Caleb, thudawpkute sung pan nii in khuangaina taw a puante balkeak in," 
Numbers14:7 mipite tungah, “Ka ngam vilna uh leitang sia leitang pha mama khat ahi hi." 
Numbers14:8 Eite tungah Topa hong lungkim pole ama in tua munah hong paipui tu a, tua ngampha le ngamnuam hong pia tu hi." 
Numbers14:9 Topa leedo heak vun a, tualai a teang mihingte kiita heak vun. Eite in olno takin amate ih zo tu hi. Eite taw a omkhawm Topa in amate a dal a pathiante zo zo a; tua ahikom lau heak vun,” ci hi." 
Numbers14:10 Taangpi buppi in Joshua le Caleb suang taw denlup tu in tawng uh hi, ahizong Topa ompuina khuavak taang velvol sia Puanbuk tungah thakhat thu in kilangh sia, mipite in mu uh hi." 
Numbers14:10 Taangpi buppi in Joshua le Caleb suang taw denlup tu in tawng uh hi, ahizong Topa ompuina khuavak taang velvol sia Puanbuk tungah thakhat thu in kilangh sia, mipite in mu uh hi." 
Numbers14:11 Topa in Moses tungah, “Hi mipite in bang tanvei kei hong nial lai tu ziam? Amate sungah nalamdang lakna tam mama vawt zo napi, hong muang ngawlin bang tanvei hong nial tu ziam?" 
Numbers14:12 A kilaw thei natna puakin amate ka mon tu a, ahizong nang sia amate sangin a lian zaw le a thahat zaw minam khat ii pa in kong vawt tu hi!” ci hi." 
Numbers14:13 Ahizong Moses in Topa tungah, “Nangma vaangletna taw hi mipite Egypt pan na pusua pui hi. Na mihingte tungah na nasepnate Egypt te in a zaak uh ciang, amate in" 
Numbers14:14 hi ngam a teang mite tungah son tu uh hi. Topa, nangma in kote taw nong om a, kote tungah na meei a tawlngak ciang in, thiang sitset a hong kimu na thu le sun in meeikhuam taw, zan in meikhuam taw ka mai uh ah na pai na thute hi mite in za siat zo hi." 
Numbers14:15 Tu in na mite theampo thatlum thong lete na minthanna a za sa minamte in 
Numbers14:16 a Pathian ii piak tu a, a khapsa ngam ah a mite then zo ngawl ahikom duisung ah thatlum hi hong ci tu uh hi." 
Numbers14:17 Tua ahiciang, tu in Topa awng thu kong ngen hi, na vaangletna hong lak ta'n a," 
Numbers14:18 ‘Keima Topa sia thin uuk hak a, itna lian le thumaanna a lak, mawna le leedona a maisakpa ka hi hi. Ahizong a pate mawna hangin tate le tute tungah khang thum, khang li dongin daan ka pia tu hi’ ci in nong ciamsate taangtungsak in." 
Numbers14:19 Tuaciang tu in Topa awng, a kikheal ngawl a lian, na itna taw kizui in Egypt ngam pan na pusuapui a kipan a mawna na maisak bangin, hi mite mawna na maisak natu in thu kong ngen hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers14:20 Topa in, “Nong nget bangma in amate mawna ka maisak tu hi." 
Numbers14:21 Ahizong keima in a nungta takpi Pathian ka hi a ka ompuina in leitung theampo a dim takpi bangin," 
Numbers14:22 hi mite khat zongh Canaan ngam tum tu in nungta ngawl tu hi cisia kong kamciam hi. Amate in ka ompuina khuavak taang velvol sia le Egypt ngam le duisung ah nalamdang lakna ka vawtte mu zo napi ka thu ni nuam ngawlin hong nial a, pehial pehial in ka thin uai na hong ze et uh hi." 
Numbers14:23 A taanghpupite tungah ka khapsa ngam ah amate tum ngeingawl tu hi. Kei hong nial peuma in tua ngam ah tum ngeingawl tu hi. 
Numbers14:24 Ahizong ka naseampa Caleb ii khuangaisutna sia a tuam hi a, kei tungah thumaan lai ahikom a ngam vilna leitang ah ka paipui tu a, tuaciang a suan a paalte in" 
Numbers14:25 Amalek te le Canaan te ii tu a, a teenna ngamkuamte lua tu hi. Zing ciang heak kik vun a, Aqaba Tuipidok sang duisung ah pai vun,” ci in zo hi." 
Numbers14:26 Topa in Moses le Aaron tungah," 
Numbers14:27 “Hi mihing seksolte in bang tanvei kei hong phunsan lai tu ziam? Hong phutsatnate ka zaak tam zo hi! 
Numbers14:28 Tu in amate tungah, ‘Keima in a nungta takpi Pathian ka hi bangma, nong nget uh bangin kong pia tu hi, ci in ka kiciam hi. Keima Topa pau zo khi hi." 
Numbers14:29 Na thi tu uh a, hi duisung ngampa ah na luangte kithethaang tu uh hi. Kei nong phunsan uh hu in, note kum kul tungsia peuma, tua ngam ah tum ngawl tu nu hi." 
Numbers14:30 Teangsak tu in kong kamciamsa ngam ah Joshua le Caleb simngawl note khat zongh na teang buatu uh hi. 
Numbers14:30 Teangsak tu in kong kamciamsa ngam ah Joshua le Caleb simngawl note khat zongh na teang buatu uh hi. 
Numbers14:31 Na tate kiman tu na ci uh hi, ahihang na nialna ngam ah amate ka paipui tu a, tua ngam sia amate inn le lo suak tu hi." 
Numbers14:32 Note sia hi lai duisung ah na thi tu uh hi. 
Numbers14:33 Note na thi siat uh dong na thumaan ngawlna uh hangin ngimthuak in na tate uh duisung ah kum sawmli sung vakthap tu hi. 
Numbers14:34 Na ngamvil uh ni phaza, ni khat ciang kum khat, ni sawmli atu kum sawmli sung note in na mawna thaman na thuak dipdeap tu uh hi. Kei in no kong langpan ciang bangbang hi ziam ci sia na he tu uh hi!" 
Numbers14:35 Kikaikhawm in kei hong langpan no mi seksolte tungah hisia kong tungsak tatak tu hi, ci in ka kiciam hi. Hi lai duisung ah note theampo thi siat tu nu hi. Keima, Topa pau zo khi hi,’ ci in ka zona teng na son in,” ci hi." 
Numbers14:36 Moses ii ngamvil tu a, a sawl mihingte ii thumaan ngawl a son kikna in mipite ii Topa a phutsatna piangsak hi. Tua hu in, Topa in amate tungah natna tungsakin thi tu uh hi." 
Numbers14:37  
Numbers14:38 Thudawpku sawm le niite sung pan Joshua le Caleb bek suakta uh hi. 
Numbers14:38 Thudawpku sawm le niite sung pan Joshua le Caleb bek suakta uh hi. 
Numbers14:39 Moses in Topa thusonte Israel te tungah a son ciang, amate nasia takin khuangai uh hi." 
Numbers14:40 Mualtung ngam la tu in a zing ciang zingtuungin amate kipan a, “Tu in Topa hong sonsa ngam ah pai tu in ih kinging hi. Mimaw mikhial hi hing ci in ih pualaak hi,” ci uh hi." 
Numbers14:41 Ahizong Moses in, “Tua ahile banghangin tu ciang Topa thu ni ngawl nu ziam? Zo ngawl tu nu hi!" 
Numbers14:42 Pai heak vun, note taw Topa omkhawm ngawl a, na ngalte in hong zo tu hi." 
Numbers14:43 Amalek te le Canaan te taw na kisim uh ciang ngal sungah na thi tu uh hi; Topa sia note taw omkhawm ngawl tu hi, banghang ziam cile ama nung zui tu na nial zo uh hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers14:44 Topa Thuciamna Thingkuang ahizong, Moses ama mama ahizong ngiaphual nusia ngawl napi amate sia mualtung ngam ah kaato ngam veve lai uh hi." 
Numbers14:45 Tuasia ciang, tualai ah a teang Amalek te le Canaan te in amate simin zo a, Hormah dong zuizen uh hi." 
Numbers15:1 Topa in Moses tungah, a piak tu ngamsung ah" 
Numbers15:2 Israel mite ii zui tu in a nuai a ngeinate pia hi. 
Numbers15:3 Meihal biakpiakna, kiciamna taangtutna biakpiakna, thinzaw biakpiakna ahibuale a hun zui a na vawt biakna poaite biakpiakna ah ngaw tu in khuital khat, tuutal khat, tuu khat ahibuale keal khat Topa tungah kipia thei tu hi; hi an taw biakpiaknate ii ngimnamtui sia in Topa lungkimsak hi." 
Numbers15:4 Meihal biakpiakna in tuu ahizong keal ahizong Topa mai ah a pia pawpo in antang biakpiakna ah nganno khat ciang olive thau litre khat taw a kihel anvui kilogramme khat, sapittui litre khat taw paipui khawm tu hi." 
Numbers15:5  
Numbers15:6 Tuutal khat a kipiak ciang, antang biakpiakna in olive thau litre khat le lang taw a kihel anvui kilogramme nii" 
Numbers15:7 le sapittui litre khat le lang taw pia khawm tu hi. Hi sangaw biakpiaknate ii ngimnam in Topa lungkimsak hi. 
Numbers15:8 Meihal biakpiakna ahibuale, kiciamna taangtunna biakpiakna ahibuale pawlkhop biakpiakna in Topa tungah khuital khat a kipiak ciang" 
Numbers15:9 antang biakpiakna in olive thau litre nii taw a kihel anvui kilogramme thum," 
Numbers15:10 le sapittui litre nii taw kipia khawm tu hi. Hi sangaw biakpiakna ngimnam sia in Topa lungkimsak hi. 
Numbers15:11 Biakpiakna in khuital khat, tuutal khat, tuu ahibuale keal khat taw tuabangin piakhawm tu hi." 
Numbers15:12 Nganhing khat sang a tamzaw a kipiak ciang nganhing a phaza zui in vanh dangte zongh kikhan to tu hi. 
Numbers15:13 Israel mi tatak theampo in a ngimnam taw Topa lungkim na ahi, an taw biakpiakna a nei ciang tuabangin seam tu hi." 
Numbers15:14 Ngamdangmi khat note sungah tawmvei sung ahizong a tawntung ahizong a teang pa in hun khat pawpo ah Topa ii a ngim dik a sak an taw biakpiakna a nei le tua ngeinate ma zui tu hi. 
Numbers15:15 Noma na hi uh zong, note sungah hong teang ngamdangmite ahizong, hi ngeinate ma maisang hun theampo ah zui tu hi. Note le amate Topa muna ah a kibang na hi uh a;" 
Numbers15:16 thukhamte le ngeinate a kibang ma in note le amate zui tu ahi hi. 
Numbers15:17 Topa ii a piak tu ngamah 
Numbers15:18 Israel mite ii zui tu a nuai a ngeinate Topa in Moses tungah pia hi. 
Numbers15:19 Tua ngam pan a piang ante a neak uh ciang pawlkhat sia Topa aituam atu in kikoituam tu hi. 
Numbers15:20 Anthak na laak uh ciang anluum na em maksakbel uh sia Topa tungah a tuamin kipia tu hi. Na ancilna sung pan antang na piaktuam bangin hisia kipia tu hi. 
Numbers15:21 Na anluum emte sung pan hi a tuam vilvel letsong sia Topa tungah maisang hun theampo ah kipia tu hi. 
Numbers15:22 Ahihang Topa in Moses tungah a piak zui tu ngeina pawlkhat sia, mihing khat po in a zui ngawl thaak ciang ahizong," 
Numbers15:23 Topa ii Moses tungtawn a, a thupiak theampo sia maisang ah Israel taangpi taangta te in a zui ngawl hun om tu in ngaisun tawng," 
Numbers15:24 taangpite ii a heak ngawlna hu in, tuabang khial tha ahile amate in meihal biakpiakna, Topa a lungkimsak ngimnamtui, antang biakpiakna le sapittui biakpiakna taw in khuital khat pia tu hi. Amate in mawphel biakpiakna in kealtal khat pia thua tu hi." 
Numbers15:25 Thiampipa in taangpite atu in a zeksa thiansuana vawt tu a, amate khialna kimaisak tu hi, banghang ziam cile vawt thaak khialna hi a, amate in Topa tungah an taw biakpiakna khat bangin mawphel biakpiakna hong paipui hi." 
Numbers15:26 Israel taangpi bup le amate sungah a teang ngamdangmite a vekpi in a khialna kimaisak tu hi, banghang ziam cile tua vawt thaak khialna sungah mihing theampo kihel siat hi." 
Numbers15:27 Mihing khat in ama aituamin mawna khialna a vawt tha ahile, ama in mawphel biakpiakna in kum khat a pha kealla khat pia tu hi." 
Numbers15:28 Thiampipa in biaknatau ah tua pa a mawna a khialna pan thiansua natu in a zeksa thiansuana teng vawt tu a, tuaciang ama ii mawna khialna kimaisak tu hi." 
Numbers15:29 Hi ngeina sia Israel mi tatak te ahizong, ngam sungah a teang ngamdangmite ahizong, a kuama po in mawna khialna khat a vawt thaak ciang zui tu ahi hi." 
Numbers15:30 Ahizong ngammi ahizong, ngamdangmi ahizong mawna khialna a vawt kaltangte sia Topa a thusim ngawl mawna a nei hi a, kithatlum tu hi," 
Numbers15:31 banghang ziam cile ama in Topa ci bang nialin a thupiakte khat a palsat kaltang hang ahi hi. A thina in ama kivawt ahi hi. 
Numbers15:32 Khatvei, Israel te duisung ngampa ah a om lai in pasal khat Sabbath ni in thingtom kimu hi." 
Numbers15:33 Ama sia Moses, Aaron le taangpi bup mai ah kipaipui a," 
Numbers15:34 ama bangbang vawt tu ci, kihe thiang ngawl ahikom thong sungah kikoi hi." 
Numbers15:35 Tuasia ciang Topa in Moses tungah, “Hi sia pa thisak kul tu hi; ama ngiaphual pua sangah taangpi bup in suang taw deanglum tu hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers15:36 Topa thupiak bangin taangpite in ama sia ngiaphual pua sangah pusuapui in suang taw deanglum uh hi. 
Numbers15:37 Topa in Israel mite tungah a son tu in Moses thupia hi: 
Numbers15:38 “Na puante ii mong a king teng ah puanteap kaai vawt vun a, puanteap kaai sim ah vancii khauhual khat veu koi thua vun. Hite maisang hun theampo ah na vawt tu uh ahi hi." 
Numbers15:39 Puanteapkaaite in nung thu hong phawksak kik tu a, tuate na mu simin, ka thupiakte theampo phawk kikin na zui tu uh hi; tua sia ciang note deinate le uuknate zui nuam ngawlin, kei nong taisan buatu uh hi." 
Numbers15:40 Puanteapkaaite in kong thupiakte theampo na zui tu hong phawksak tu a, tuaciang note keima aa na hi siat tu uh hi." 
Numbers15:41 Keima in Topa na Pathian ka hi hi; na Pathian hi tu in Egypt ngam pan kong pusua hi. Keima in Topa ka hi hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers16:1 Levi mi Kohath bee le phung pan Izhar tapa Korah in Moses ii lampuina langpanin leedo hi. Ama sia Reuben nam mihing thumte — Eliab tapate Dathan le Abiram, le Peleth tapa On — tuaciang mihonpite ii teal a minthang Israel lampui 250 te in pawlpui hi." 
Numbers16:2  
Numbers16:3 Amate teng Moses le Aaron mai ah kikhawm in, amate tungah, “Pai leet zo nu hi! taangpi theampo Topa aa hi a, eite theampo taw Topa omkhawm hi. Tua hikasap Moses awng banghangin Topa ii taangpite tungah om in thu kineisak tuan ni ziam?” ci uh hi." 
Numbers16:4 Moses hi thu a zaak ciang lei ah kilumliik in thungen hi. 
Numbers16:5 Tuaciang ama in Korah le a nungzuite tungah, “Zing ciang zingsang in Topa in ama mihing sia akua ziam ei hong lak tu a; ama in a teal sa, a mi sia biaknatau ah ama kung neaksak tu hi." 
Numbers16:6 Zing ciang zingsang in nangma le na nungzuite in meikam kuangte kengin tuate sungah meikam le ngimnamtui koi in, biaknatau ah paipui vun. Tuaciang Topa in eite akua hong teal ziam ci ih mu tu hi. A pai leet sia noma Levi te na hi uh hi!” ci hi." 
Numbers16:7  
Numbers16:8 Moses in Korah tungah a thuson zomin, “Levi mite awng, ngai vun!" 
Numbers16:9 Ama kung na neak thei natu, Topa Puanbuk sungah na nasep thei natu uh le taangpite atu na a seam tu in Israel te ii Pathian in taangpi dang teng sung pan note hong tuam koina thu sia thuno in ngaisun nu ziam?" 
Numbers16:10 Ama in nang le a dang Levi mi theampo hi bang hong upat zo a — tu in thiampi za zongh nga nuam in hanciam nu ziam! 
Numbers16:11 Aaron na phutsat uh ciang a tatakin ci leang nangma le na nungzuite in Pathian langpan na hi uh hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers16:12 Tuaciang Moses in Dathan le Abiram sam a, ahizong amate in, “Hong pai bua vak ung!" 
Numbers16:13 Hilai duisung ah a thi tu in Egypt ngamnuam pan nong pusuapui sia pha zo hi ngawl ziam? Kote tungah to hong seam nuam lai ni ziam? 
Numbers16:14 Ngamnuam leiphana ah nong paipui bua het a, kote neisa tu in lote le sapithuante zongh nong piak ngawl banah tu in theam tu hong hanciam lai ni hi. Hong pai bua vak ung!” ci uh hi."
