Numbers16:15 Moses thin uuk in Topa tungah, “Hi mihingte ii hong ken biakpiakna khat zongh saang heak in. Amate khat tungah zongh ka khial ngei bua a; a laate khat zongh ka laaksak ngei bua hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers16:16 Moses in Korah tungah, “Zing ciang Topa ompuina Puanbuk ah nangma le na nungzui 250 te hong pai nanak tu nu hi; Aaron zongh tua munah om tu hi." 
Numbers16:17 Na meikamkuang tek kengin, a tungah ngimnamtui buakin, biaknatau ah pia tu nu hi ci hi." 
Numbers16:18 Tuaciang a meikamkuang keng tek a, meikam le ngimnamtui a tungah koi in Puanbuk kongbiang ah Moses le Aaron taw ding uh hi." 
Numbers16:19 Tua zawkciang Korah in taangpi bup kaikhawm in amate Puanbuk kongbiang ah Moses le Aaron maingat in ding uh hi. Thakhat thu in Topa ompuina khuavak taang velvol sia taangpi bup tungah kilangh a," 
Numbers16:20 Topa in Moses le Aaron tungah," 
Numbers16:21 “Hi mihingte kung pan nungkin vun, thakhat thu amate thatlum tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers16:22 Ahizong Moses le Aaron lei ah kunsuk a, “Aw, Pathian awng, nuntakna theampo ii naak na hi hi. Mihing khat a maw a khial ciang taangpi bup tungah thin uuk ni ziam?” ci uh hi." 
Numbers16:23 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Numbers16:24 Mipite sia Korah, Dathan le Abiram te ii buk pan a kikhiin natu in son in,” ci hi." 
Numbers16:25 Tuasia ciang Moses sia Israel lampuite in zui in, Dathan le Abiram kungah pai hi." 
Numbers16:26 Moses in mipite tungah, “Hi mi seksolte buk pan kiheam vun a, a neisa khat zongh tham heak vun. Tuabang na hi bua uh le a maw a khialnate hangin amate taw hong kimaimot khawm tu hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers16:27 Tua ahiciang Korah, Dathan le Abiram te ii buk pan amate kiin uh hi. Dathan le Abiram hong pusuak in a buk kongbiang ah a zite le a tate taw dingkhawm uh hi." 
Numbers16:28 Moses in mipite tungah, “Hi bang teng seam tu in Topa in kei hong sawl a, keima deiteal bangin a seam ka hi ngawlna thu na heak natu uh ahi hi." 
Numbers16:29 Pathian daan pawlkhat thuak ngawlin hi mite thi ngeina in, a thi le Topa hong sawl ka hi buatu hi." 
Numbers16:30 Ahizong Topa in a kiza ngeingawl thu khat a sepna taw in amate le a neisa theampo sia lei in valh ahi hu in amate a hingtangin mithi khua a zot ciang amate in Topa nial a hina thu na he tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers16:31 Hi thu teng a son zawk po ciang Dathan le Abiram dinna leitang kihongin 
Numbers16:32 amate le a innkuanpuite, Korah nungzui theampo le a neisate theampo taw valh siat hi." 
Numbers16:33 Tuabangin, a neisa theampo taw a hingtangin mithi khua zuansuk uh hi. A tung pan lei in huk a, amate bomang siat hi." 
Numbers16:34 Amate auna aw a zaak ciang tualai a om Israel mipite theampo tai siat uh hi. Amate in, “Tai vun! Ei zongh lei in hong valhlum tha tu hi!” ci in au uh hi." 
Numbers16:35 Tua zawkciang Topa in mei puak a, ngimnamtui a pia mi 250 te sia a meileng in haltum hi." 
Numbers16:36 Tuaciang Topa in Moses tungah," 
Numbers16:37 “Thiampi Aaron tapa Eleazer tungah taau meikamkuangte thiangtho ahikom mei ii kaklup mithi luangte kung pan taau meikamkuangte heam tu le tua kuangte pan meiholte mundang ah thethaang tu in son in. 
Numbers16:38 Tuate Topa biaknatau ah a kipiak ciang a thiangtho suak hi. Tua ahiciang a mawna hangin thina a thuakte ii meikamkuangte la in biaknatau sit natu in pakan a paa in seak in. Hisia Israel mipite kidop natu thu hi tu hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers16:39 Tua ahiciang thiampi Eleazar in meikam kuangte la a, biaknatau sit natu in pakan a paa in seaksak hi." 
Numbers16:40 Hi thu sia Aaron suan le paal simngawl kuama in biaknatau ah Topa atu in ngimnamtui hal in a pai ngawl natu, Israel te kidop natu ahi hi. Tua bangin a kidawm buale Korah le a mite bangin kithatlum tu hi. Moses tungtawnin Topa ii Eleazar tung, a thupiak bangin hite theampo kiseam hi." 
Numbers16:41 A zing ciang taangpi bup in Moses le Aaron phunsan a, “ Topa ii mihing pawlkhat that zo nu hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers16:42 Moses le Aaron langpan tu in a kikhop zawk, amate teng Puanbuk sang a maingat ciang, meei in Puanbuk tuam a, Topa ii ompuina khuavak taang velvol sia mu uh hi." 
Numbers16:43 Moses le Aaron pai in Puanbuk mai ah ding uh a," 
Numbers16:44 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Numbers16:45 “Hi mihingte kung pan kiheam vun, amate thakhat thu in thatlum siat tu khi hi!” ci hi. Amate nii lei ah kunsuk in," 
Numbers16:46 Moses in Aaron tungah, “Na meikam kuang la in a, biaknatau pan meikamte a sungah koi in, tua tungah ngimnamtui buak in. Tuaciang manlangin mihingte kungah paipui in, amate atu a zeksa thiansuana vawt in. Manlang in! Topa a thin uuk keak zo a, natna ngilo sia kipan zo hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers16:47 Aaron in a thu ni a, a meikamkuang la in mihonpite kikhopna laizang ah tai hi. Tua natna kipan zo ci in a mu ciang, Aaron in meihol tungah ngimnamtui buakin mihonte atu in a zeksa thiansuana vawt hi." 
Numbers16:48 Tua in natna ngilo sia vengsak a, a thi le a hingte kilaklaw ah Aaron ding hi." 
Numbers16:49 Korah ii leedona sungah a thite sim ngawlin a thi 14,700 pha hi." 
Numbers16:50 Natna ngilo a ven zawkciang Moses omna Puanbuk kongbiang ah Aaron heak kik hi. 
Numbers17:1 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Numbers17:2 “Israel mite tungah anam sim ii lampui sia tung pan ciangkhut khat tek, ciangkhut sawm le nii nang tungah hong piak natu in son in. A ciangkhut tungah a min tek at in," 
Numbers17:3 Levi nam ii a piak ciangkhut tungah Aaron min at in. A nam lampui khat ciang, ciangkhut khat tek hi tu hi." 
Numbers17:4 Ka ompuina Puanbuk ah tuate paipui in a, kong kisik puina mun, Thuciamna Thingkuang mai ah koi in." 
Numbers17:5 Tuasia ciang ka teal pa ii ciangkhut sia meang tu hi. Hi bangin Israel te ii nangma hong langpanin a phuphunna ka thimsak tu hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers17:6 Tuabangin Moses in Israel te tungah son a, a nam sim pan ciangkhut khat tek, a lampuite in ama tungah pia a, a vekpi ciangkhut sawm le nii pha hi, tuate taw Aaron ciangkhut kikoi khawm hi." 
Numbers17:7 Tua zawkciang Moses in ciangkhut teng Topa ii Thuciamna Thingkuang mai Puanbuk sungah koi siat hi. 
Numbers17:8 A zing ciang Puanbuk sungah Moses a tum ciang Levi nam ii a piak Aaron ciangkhut a meang sa in mu hi. Tuasia in mom zo, a paak palh zo a, almond nga minte piangsak hi!" 
Numbers17:9 Moses in ciangkhut theampo la in Israel te lak hi. Amate in thupiang teng mu a, a lampui sim in a ciangkhut tek la kik hi." 
Numbers17:10 Topa in Moses tungah, “Thuciamna Thingkuang mai ah Aaron ciangkhut koi kik in. Hi ciangkhut sia, a leedo nuam Israel te ii phunna a tawp buale amate thi tu a hisia a kidop natu in kepcing tu ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers17:11 Topa thupiak bangin Moses in vawt hi. 
Numbers17:12 Israel mite in Moses tungah, “Ko ka hi uh le man sa hi zo ung!" 
Numbers17:13 Puanbuk nai a neak te ngawngawn thi hamtang tu ahile, ko teng theampo zong a thi bang ka hi zo uh hi!” ci uh hi." 
Numbers18:1 Topa in Aaron tungah, “Nangma, na tapate le Levi te in ka ompuina Puanbuk sung nasepna taw kisai in sepkhialna khat pawpo taw kizomin a piangte na thuak uh kul a; ahizong thiampi nasepna taw kisai in a piangte sia, nangma le na tapate bek in thuak tu nu hi." 
Numbers18:2 Nangma le na tapate Puanbuk sungah nasep laitakin, na seppui tu le nasep hong hu tu in Levi nam na beete tumpui in." 
Numbers18:3 Amate in no atu in hong sepsak tu te le Puanbuk atu in a nasep tu te khuangkhim tu a, ahizong biaknatau taw ahibuale Mun Thiangtho ah a om a thiangtho vanhte peuma thutha ngawl tu hi. A thutha le amate le nangma hong kithisak khawm tu hi." 
Numbers18:4 Amate sia nangma taw na seam tu a, Puanbuk sungah sep tu a vaipuakte theampo khuangkhim tu hi. Ahizong a kiphu ngawl peuma nang taw seam khawm thei ngawl tu hi." 
Numbers18:5 Israel mite tungah ka thin uukna a puathap kik ngawl natu in nangma le na tapate bek in biaknatau le Mun Thiangtho vaipuak teng khuangkhim nanak tu nu hi. 
Numbers18:6 Israel te sung pan na beete ahi Levi te teal a, letsong in hong pia pa sia keima ka hi hi. Amate in Puanbuk sungah a nasepte a sep thei natu in kei tungah hong ki aap uh hi." 
Numbers18:7 Ahizong nangma le na tapate bek in biaknatau le Thiangthobel Mun ah a om sia taw kisai thiampi nasep teng theampo khuangkhim tu nu hi. Nang, thiampi za letsong in hong pia zo ka hikom hi teng nangma ii vaipuak tu ahi hi. Hi nasepte seam tu a kiphu ngawl khat pawpo hong pai in, vanh thiangthote a neak le kithisak tu hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers18:8 Topa in Aaron tungah, “Kei hong kipia tuamte theampo sung pan biakpiakna sungah a kihaltumte simngawl po nangma kong piak sia ciamtee in. Hite nangma le na suan na paalte atu in a tawntung atu kong piak ahi hi." 
Numbers18:9 Biaknatau ah a kihal ngawl, a thiangthobel biakpiaknate panin a nuai a teng nangma aa ahi hi: antang biakpiakna, mawphel biakpiakna le khialphel biakpiakna te ahi hi. Kei tungah hong kipia a thiangtho biakpiakna te a vekpi in nangma le na tapate aa ahi hi." 
Numbers18:10 Hite mun thiangthona khat ah na neak uh kul hi, pa te bek in ne thei a; tua teng a thiangtho in ngaisun vun." 
Numbers18:11 “Tua bek dom ngawlin, Israel te ii a tuamin hong piak dangte pawpo zongh noma atu ahi hi. Nangma, na tapate le na tanute atu in maisang hun theampo atu in kong pia hi. Na inn sung pan biakna taw kisai a thiang mite theampo in tuate ne thei tu uh hi." 
Numbers18:12 “Israel te ii kum simin keima hong piak a anpal sung pan a phabel theampo: olive thau, sapittui le antangte nangma kong pia hi." 
Numbers18:13 A vekpi in nangma aa ahi hi. Na innkuan sung pan biakna taw kisai in a thiang theampo in tuasia ne thei tu hi. 
Numbers18:14 “Israel ngam sungah kei tung hong ki aap thiang na theampo, nangma neisa hi." 
Numbers18:15 “Israel te ii keima hong piak mihing taciil, ahibuale nganhing nosuakciil theampo nangma aa ahi hi. Ahizong mihing taciil hikale, biakna taw kisai a thiang ngawl nganhing nosuakciil hikale a kitat kik ciang a tatna sumte saang nanak tu ni hi." 
Numbers18:16 Patangte tha khat a phak ciang, biakinn zakngei khaikhin taw kizui in ngunn dangkatang nga linlian taw kitan kik tu hi." 
Numbers18:17 Ahizong khui, tuu le keal nosuakciil ahile kitan kik ngawl tu hi; a vekpi in keima aa hi a, sangaw biakpiak na tu ahi hi. A chi te biaknatau ah the in a; an taw biakpiakna in a thau halin, tua ngimnam in kei hong lungkimsak tu hi." 
Numbers18:18 A tuam vilvel biakpiakna in a kizangh a awmsa le a ziatsang phei taw kibangin tuate ii a sa sia nangma aa ahi hi. 
Numbers18:19 “Israel te ii keima hong piaktuamte theampo maisang hun theampo atu in, nangma, na tapate le na tanute kong pia hi. Hi thu sia nangma le na suan na paalte taw ka vawt a kipaltan thei ngawl thuciamna ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers18:20 Topa in Aaron tungah, “Nangma in a kilua thei na khat pawpo saang ngawl tu ni hi, Israel leitang khen khat zongh nang hong kipia ngawl tu hi. Keima, Topa sia nangma ii na kisap buppi ka hi hi.” ci hi." 
Numbers18:21 Topa in, “Israel mite ii kei tungah hong piak sawm a khat sumpi theampo Levi te ka pia zo hi. Hisia sia keima ompuina Puanbuk a kepcing hu in a nasep thaman ahi hi." 
Numbers18:22 Israel dangte in Puanbuk neak nawn ngawl het tu uh a, tuabangin a neak a om le thina daan thuak tu uh hi." 
Numbers18:23 Tu pan kipan Levi te bek in Puanbuk keamcing tu a, tua atu vaipuak theampo la siat tu uh hi. Hi thu na suan na paalte tung zongh ah a kizangh tu ngeina kip ahi hi. Levi te in Israel ngam sungah a kip a kho neisa bangma nei ngawl tu hi," 
Numbers18:24 banghang ziam cile Israel te ii kei tungah a tuam vilvel a hong piak sawm a khat sumpi sia amate ii neisa tu in ka pia zo hi. Tua hu in Israel ngam sungah a kip a kho in a neisa bangma nei ngawl tu hi, ci in amate ka son hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers18:25 Topa in Levi te tungah a son tu in Moses thupia hi: 
Numbers18:26 “ Topa in note neisa tu in hong piak sawm a khat sumpi sia Israel te tung pan na san uh ciang, sawm a khat a tuamin Topa tungah pia tu nu hi." 
Numbers18:27 Hi a tuam vilvel piakna sia lothote ii anthak le sapittui thak piakna taw kibangin kingaisun tu hi. 
Numbers18:28 Hi bangin Israel te tung pan na nga uh sawm a khat sumpite theampo sung pan zongh a tuamin Topa tungah pia tu nu hi. Hi bang a tuamin Topa atu piakna sia thiampi Aaron tungah pia tu nu hi. 
Numbers18:29 Tua sia a phabel na nga uh sung pan pia vun. 
Numbers18:30 A phabel khen khat sia na piak zawk uh ciang a om lai teng, lothote ii biakpiakna a nei zawkciang a om lai teng a kepcing bangin keam thei nu hi." 
Numbers18:31 Puanbuk sungah na nasep thaman uh ahikom, noma le na innkuan puite in a taanglai teng na ukna mun pawpo ah ne thei tu nu hi." 
Numbers18:32 Topa tungah a phabel na piak zawk uh nungsang na neak uh ciang maw ngawl nu hi. Ahizong Israel te ii a piak letsong a thiangtho te a phabel khen khat sia Topa tungah a piak ma in na neakna uh taw tua letsong ninsak heak vun; na ninsak uh le hong kithatlum tu hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers19:1 Topa in Moses le Aaron tungah 
Numbers19:2 a nuai a ngeinate Israel te a piak tu in thupia hi. A mealhem ngawl le na a kiseamsak ngeingawl lai khuipui san khat paipui in," 
Numbers19:3 thiampi Eleazar tungah pia hen. Tua khui ngiaphual pua sangah kipusua pui in, ama omna ah kingo tu hi." 
Numbers19:4 Tuaciang Eleazar in a chi pawlkhat la in, Puanbuk sang ah a khutme taw salivei the tu hi." 
Numbers19:5 Tua nganhing buppi, a vun a kipan, a sa, a chi le a ngilzang te thiampipa omna ah kihal tu hi." 
Numbers19:6 Tuaciang thiampipa in cedar thing tawm, hyssop dawn le khauzeen san khat la in mei sungah lawn tu hi." 
Numbers19:7 Tua zawkciang ama in a puante sawp a, ama le ama tui a kibuak zawkciang ngiaphual ah tum thei tu hi; ahizong nitak dong biakna taw kisai in thiang ngawl lai tu hi." 
Numbers19:8 Khui a halpa zongh a puante sawp in ama le ama tui kibuak hamtang tu a, ahizong ama zongh nitak dong thiang ngawl tu hi." 
Numbers19:9 Tuaciang biakna taw kisai a thiang mihing khat in khuipui halna vaam teng luak tu a, ngiaphual puasang biakna taw kisai in a thiang na munah koi tu hi, tua te sia Israel taangpite a zeksa kithiansua na tui vawtna ah a hel tu in tualai ah kikeamcing tu hi. Hi a zeksa sia mawna silh natu in a kivawt ahi hi." 
Numbers19:10 Tua vaamte a luak pa in a puante sawp nanak tu a, ahizong ama nitak dong thiang ngawl lai tu hi. Hi ngeina sia Israel te le amate sung a teang ngamdangmite ii maisang hun theampo ah zui tu ngeina ahi hi." 
Numbers19:11 Mithi luang a tham pawpo, ni sali sung biakna taw kisai in thiang ngawl hi." 
Numbers19:12 Ama sia ni thum ni le ni sali ni in kithiansuana tui taw kithiansua nanak tu a, tuaciang ama a thiang hi tu hi. Ahizong ni thum ni le ni sali ni te ngeal sung ah, a kithiansua bua ahile ama thiang ngawl tu hi." 
Numbers19:13 Mithi luang tham a, ama le ama a kithiansua ngawl pawpo sia a nin ahi hi, banghang ziam cile kithiansuana tui ama tungah kibuak ngawl hi. Ama in Topa Puanbuk ninsak ahikom Topa ii mi khat in kingaisun nawn ngawl tu hi." 
Numbers19:14 Mihing khat buk sungah a thi le, a thi laitak buk sung a om pa ahizong, buk sung a tum pa ahizong, ni sali sung biakna taw kisai in a thiang ngawl ahi hi." 
Numbers19:15 Sitna nei ngawl buk sungah a om bungte le bealte zongh a nin suak hi. 
Numbers19:16 Doipua sangah mihing khat a kithatlum ahibuale thi ngei in a thi khat sia mihing khat pawpo in a tham le, ahibuale mihing khat pawpo in mithi ngu ahibuale mithi thaan a tham le, ama ni sali sung thiang ngawl hi." 
Numbers19:17 Hi bang mihingte a thian natu in, mawphel natu in a kihal khuipui san ii vaamte tawm la tu a, beal sungah koi in, tuithiang pol thua tu hi." 
Numbers19:18 A masa in biakna taw kisai a thiang mihing khat in, hyssop dawn khat la tu a, tua hyssop dawn tui sungah papin, Puanbuk le a sung a om na theampo le mite the tu hi. A niina in, biakna taw kisai a thiang mihing khat in, mithi ngu, mithi luang ahibuale thaan a tham pawpo tungah tua tui the tu hi." 
Numbers19:19 Biakna taw kisai a thiang mihing khat in ni thum ni le ni sali ni in mihing a thiang ngawl pa sia tua tui the tu hi. Ni sali ni in ama in tua pa thiansua tu hi, tua pa sia a puan sawp a, ama le ama tui a kibuak zawkciang, nitum ciangin biakna taw kisai a thiang suak hi." 
Numbers19:20 Mihing khat pawpo biakna taw kisai thiang ngawlin, ama le ama a kithiansua buale thiang ngawl veve hi, banghang ziam cile kithiansuana tui ama kibuak ngawl lai hi. Ama in Topa ii Puanbuk ninsak a, Pathian ii mi khat in kingaisun nawn ngawl tu hi." 
Numbers19:21 Hi zui tu thu sia maisang hun theampo ah na zui tu ahi hi. Kithiansuana tui a the pa in zongh a puante sawp nanak tu hi; tua tui a tham peuma nitak dongin biakna taw kisai in thiang ngawl lai hi. 
Numbers19:22 A thiang ngawl mi khat ii a tham na khat pawpo sia thiang ngawl a, tua na a tham peuma nitak dongin thiang ngawl lai hi." 
Numbers20:1 Tha masabel sungin Israel taangpi bup Zin duisung theng a, Kadesh ah ngiaphual saat uh hi. Tua munah Miriam thi in kiphum hi." 
Numbers20:2 Tua ngiaphual ah tui om ngawl ahikom Moses le Aaron kiim ah mite kikhawm in," 
Numbers20:3 “ Topa Puanbuk mai ah ih Israel mipuite taw thi khawm le ung phazaw tu hi. 
Numbers20:4 Banghangin hi duisung ngampa ah hong paipui nu ziam? Hi lai ah ka ngannote taw a thi khawm thei tu in hong paipui nu ziam? 
Numbers20:5 Banghangin bangma a po ngawl na ngam a thinkiam huaina hi munah pai tu in, Egypt pan hong pusuapuinu ziam? Hi lai ah taang, thei, sapit, talee ngate om ngawl hi. Tui neak tu ngawngawn zongh om ngawl hi!” ci in mawsiat uh hi." 
Numbers20:6 Mipite kung pan Moses le Aaron pai vingveng in, Puanbuk kongbiang ah ding uh hi. Amate lei ah kunin, Topa ompuina khuavak taang velvol sia amate kungah kilangh hi." 
Numbers20:7 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Numbers20:8 “Thuciamna Thingkuang mai ah a om ciangkhut la in a, nangma le Aaron in taangpi bup kikhawmsak vun. Tualai amate theampo mai ah a om suangpi sia paupui in, tuaciang tua ii sung pan tui phuulkeak tu hi. Hi bangin mipite le a ngannote neak tu in suangpi pan tui na suaksak tu hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers20:9 Topa thupiak bangin Moses pai in, tua ciangkhut la hi." 
Numbers20:10 Moses le Aaron in tua suangpi mai ah taangpi bup kikhawmsak a, Moses in, “Ngai vun, ngual langpante awng! Note atu in hi suangpi pan tui kong suaksak tu uh ziam?” ci hi." 
Numbers20:11 Tuaciang Moses in a ciangkhut laamin suangpi niivei saat a, tuaciang tui tam mama hong luang vahe in, mite le ngannote theampo in dawn uh hi." 
Numbers20:12 Ahizong Topa in Moses le Aaron teih zazaan hi. Ama in, “A thiangtho ka vaangletna Israel mite mai ah na telsak natu in upna a kicing nei ngawl na hi uh komin amate ka khapsa ngam ah note in amate lampui in na tumpui buatu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers20:13 Israel mite ii Topa langpanin a phutsatna mun le ama thianthona a lakna mun ahi, Meribah ah hi thu teng piang hi." 
Numbers20:14 Moses in Kadesh pan Edom kumpipa tungah kamtaite paisak hi. Amate in, “Na mealheak uh ahi Israel minamte in hi bangin thu kong puak uh hi. Haksatna ka thuak uhte le," 
Numbers20:15 ih taanghpupite bangbangin Egypt ah pai a, kote kum tam mama ka teenna uh thu na heak ahi hi. Egypt te in ih taanghpupite le kote hong vawtsia a," 
Numbers20:16 Topa tungah hu ngenin ka kiko uh hi. Ama in kote ngetna aw za a, vantunglalang khat hong puak in Egypt pan hong pusua pui hi. Tu in, na ngamngi Kadesh khua ah ka om uh hi." 
Numbers20:17 Nong hesuakna in na ngam hong kaantansak ta'n. Kote le ka ngannote in lampial ngawlin, na lote le na sapithuante sungah pai ngawlin, na tuikhuk tuite kong neaksak buatu uh hi. Na ngamsung ka kaantan mateng, lamziikpi tung teng ka tawn tu uh hi,” ci uh hi." 
Numbers20:18 Ahizong Edom te in, “Koma ii ngam kong kaantansak buatu uh hi! Nong kaantan uh le kuanin kong sim tu uh hi,” ci in zo uh hi." 
Numbers20:19 Israel mite in, “Lamziikpi tung ka tawn tu uh a, kote, ahibuale ka ngannote in na tui kong neaksak uh le a man kong pia tu uh hi — ko a paitan nuam ka hi bek uh hi,” ci in zo uh hi." 
Numbers20:20 Edom te in, “Oai ngawl khu hi!” ci kik a, amate Israel te sim tu in a thahat ngalkaphonpi taw kuan uh hi." 
Numbers20:21 Edom te in Israel te ii a ngam a kaantan tu oai ngawl ahikom Israel te heak kikin lamdang tawn uh hi. 
Numbers20:22 Israel taangpi bup in Kadesh nusia a, Edom ngamngi Hor Mual theng uh hi." 
Numbers20:23 Tualai ah Topa in Moses le Aaron tungah," 
Numbers20:24 “Israel te piak tu in ka ciamsa ngam ah Aaron tum ngawl tu hi; banghang ziam cile no nii in Meribah ah kong thupiak sia hong langpan na hi uh ciang Aaron thi tu hi. 
Numbers20:25 Hor Mual ah, Aaron le a tapa Eleazar paipui to in a," 
Numbers20:26 tualai ah Aaron ii a thiampi puante sutin Eleazar silhsak in. Aaron sia tualai ah thi tu hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers20:27 Topa thupiak bangin Moses in seam hi. Taangpi bup muna ah amate Hor Mual ah paito uh a," 
Numbers20:28 Moses in Aaron ii thiampi puante sutin Eleazar silhsak hi. Tua Mualdawn ah Aaron thi a, Moses le Eleazar ciasuk kik hi." 
Numbers20:29 Tangpi bup in Aaron thina thu he a, amate theampo ni sawmthum sung khuangai in om uh hi." 
Numbers21:1 Canaan ngam thangsang ah a om Canaan mi Arad ngam ii kumpipa in Israel te Atharim lam tawnin hong pai a zaak ciang amate simin pawlkhat man hi. 
Numbers21:2 Tuasia ciang Israel te in Topa tungah kiciamna khat vawt a: “Hi mihingte nong zosak le amate le a khuapite nangma tungah kong aap tu a, tuate ka lalcipsak tu hi,” ci uh hi." 
Numbers21:3 Amate ii pauna Topa in za a, Canaan te zosak hi. Tuaciang Israel te in Canaan te le a khuapite lalcipsak siat a, tua mun Hormah ci uh hi." 
Numbers21:4 Israel te Hor Mual nusia in Edom ngam kiimveal in Aqaba Tuipi sangah pai uh hi. Ahizong lampi ah amate a thin vei zo ngawlin," 
Numbers21:5 Pathian le Moses langpanin sonsia uh hi. Amate in, “An le tui om ngawlna hi mun sennealngam sungah a thi tu in banghang Egypt ngam pan hong pusuapui ni ziam? An lim ngawl hi bang te po ka ne zo buatu uh hi!” ci in phunsan uh hi." 
Numbers21:6 Tuasia ciang Topa in amate sungah ngul ngu neite tha a, Israel te tam mama ngul tukin thi hi." 
Numbers21:7 Mite Moses kungah pai in, “ Topa le nang langpanin kong sonsiat uh sia maw khu hi. Tu in hi ngulte a laak natu in Topa tungah thu ngen in,” ci uh hi. Tua ahiciang a mite atu in Moses in thungen hi." 
Numbers21:8 Tua zawkciang Topa in Moses tungah, taau ngul khat vawt in a, ngul tuk thuak mihing khat pawpo in tuasia a et ciang damna a nga thei natu in, khuam tungah khai in ci hi." 
Numbers21:9 Tuaciang Moses in taau ngul khat vawtin khuam tungah khai hi. Ngul tuk thuak pawpo in tua taau ngul en a damna nga hi. 
Numbers21:10 Israel te kikhiin in Oboth ah ngiaphual saat uh hi. 
Numbers21:11 Tua mun a nusiat zawkciang, Moab ngam nisuana sang a lalsa Abiram ngam duisung ah ngiaphual saat uh hi." 
Numbers21:12 Tua zawkciang Zered Kuam ah ngiaphual saat uh hi. 
Numbers21:13 Tua mun pan kikhiin kik leleau a, Arnon Ngun ii saksang Amor ngam dong a zai duisung ah ngiaphual saat uh hi. (Arnon sia Moab le Amor mite ngamngi ahi hi.)" 
Numbers21:14 Tua ahi hu in Topa ii Ngal donate Laibu sungah, “… Suphah huamsung Waheb khua, le a kuamte; Arnon Ngun," 
Numbers21:15 tuaciang Ar khua dong a ban ngamkuam dungsuk teng le Moab ngamngi sang dong in,” ci in son hi." 
Numbers21:16 Tua mun pan Tuikhuk kicina munah amate paitanin, tualai ah Topa in Moses tungah, “Mipite kikhawmsak in, amate tui pia tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers21:17 Tua laitakin Israel mite in hi la sak uh hi: “Tuikhuk te awng, na tui phuulsak vun; Lasakna taw muak tu khu hi —" 
Numbers21:18 Kumpi tate ii kumpi ciangkhut taw, Mipi lampuite ii a ciangkhut taw in a kito Tuikhuk na hi hi,” ci hi. Amate duisung panin Mattanah ah kikhiin uh a," 
Numbers21:19 tua mun pan Nahaliel zuanin, Nahaliel pan Bamoth ah," 
Numbers21:20 Bamoth panin sennealngam a kimu theina Pisgah Mualdawn nuai Moab ngamkuam theng uh hi. 
Numbers21:21 Tua zawkciang Israel mite in Amor te kumpi Sihon kungah kamtaite paisak a: 
Numbers21:22 “Na ngam hong kaantansak tavun. Kote le ngannote in lampial in na lote, ahibuale na sapithuante sungah pai ngawl tu khu hi. Na tuikhukte pan tui ka ne buatu uh hi; na ngam ka kaantan mateng, lamziikpi tung teng ka tawn tu uh hi,” cisak hi." 
Numbers21:23 Ahizong Sihon in Israel mite ii a ngam a kaantan tu oai ngawl hi. Ama in a ngalkaphonpi khawm a, duisung Jahaz ah pai in Israel te sim hi." 
Numbers21:24 Ahizong ngal kidona ah Israel te in a ngalte tam mama that a, Arnon ngun pan Jabbok saksang dong laaksak hi, banghang ziam cile tua mun sia Ammon ngam hi a, Ammon te in a ngamngi nasia takin hung uh hi." 
Numbers21:25 Tuaciang Israel mite in Amor khuapi theampo la siat a, Heshbon le a kiim a om khuate zongh la in tua khua teng theampo sungah teang uh hi." 
Numbers21:26 Heshbon sia Amor te kumpipa Sihon teenna khuapi hi a, Sihon sia Moab kumpi masa a do pa le Arnon Ngun dong a ngam theampo a laaksak pa ahi hi." 
Numbers21:27 Tua hu in laphuakte in, “Kumpipa Sihon ii khuapi Heshbon ah hong pai tavun! Tua khuapi a kisa kik le a kipua kik mu nuam khu hi." 
Numbers21:28 Khatvei lai, Heshbon khuapi panin Sihon ngalkaphonpi sia meikuang khat taw kibangin pai a; Moab ngamsung Ar khuapi lalcipsakin Arnon thunghsang mualte kaanghtum hi." 
Numbers21:29 Moab mite awng, no atu bang zata lauhuai ziam! No Chemosh a bia te lal siat nu hi! Na pathian in pate ngaltaite suaksak a, Numeite Amor kumpipa ii ngalmatte suaksak hi." 
Numbers21:30 Ahizong tu in a suan a paalte Heshbon pan Dibon lam tawntung Nashim pan Medeba khua nai Nophah dong kimon hi,” ci in phua uh hi." 
Numbers21:31 Tuabangin Israel mite Amor te ngam sungah teang a," 
Numbers21:32 Moses in Jazer khuapi sim natu lampi phabel a zong tu in mihingte paisak hi. Israel te in tua khuapite le a kiim ah khuate la in tua mun ah a teang Amor te not keak uh hi. 
Numbers21:33 Tua zawkciang Israel te Bashan lam tawnin heakkik a, Bashan Kumpi Og sia amate sim tu in a ngalkaphonpi taw Edrei ah kuan uh hi." 
Numbers21:34 Topa in Moses tungah, “Ama kiita heak in. Hi kumpipa, a mihing theampo le a ngam a lei kong zosak tu hi. Heshbon khua a uk Amor Kumpipa Sihon tungah na vawt bangin ama tungah vawt in,” ci hi." 
Numbers21:35 Tua ahikom Israel te in Og, a tapate le a mite theampo khat zongh khoaikhe ngawlin thatlum siat a, tua zawkciang amate in a ngam lua uh hi." 
Numbers22:1 Israel te kikhiin kikin, Jericho ngalkhat Jordan nisuana sang Moab zaangtam ah ngiaphual saat uh hi." 
Numbers22:2 Israel te in Amor te tungah a vawtna teng le Israel te bangza tam ci sia Zippor tapa Balak, Moab kumpipa in a zaak ciang," 
Numbers22:3 ama le a mihingte theampo patau mama uh hi. 
Numbers22:4 Moab te in Midian lampuite tungah, “Khuital in a tatna ah lopa a neak bangin hi mihonpi in, ih kiim ih paam teng hai ngawlin lalcipsak siat tu hi,” ci uh hi. Tua ahiciang Balak Kumpipa in" 
Numbers22:5 Amaw ngam Euphrates Ngun hui Pethor ah a om Beor tapa Balaam sam tu in kamtaite paisak hi. Amate in Balak ii kam vaithak hi teng Balaam puak hi: “Kong heaksak nop thu panin, Egypt pan minam bup khat hong pai a; a mite sia mun theampo ah kithethaang in, ih ngam hong laksak tu kithoai zo hi." 
Numbers22:6 Amate eite sangin tamzaw ahikom nong hesuakna in hong pai ta'n a, kei atu hong haamsiatsak ta'n. Tuasia ciang kote in amate zo in, ngamsung pan notkeak thei tha tu khu hi. Nangma ii thupha na piak ciang mihingte in thupha nga a, na haamsiat ciang amate haamsiatna khat thuak hi, ci in ka he hi.”" 
Numbers22:7 Tua hi a, Moab te le Midian te ii lampuite in a haamsiat natu a thap man tu kengin Balaam kungah pai in, Balak kam vaithak teng son uh hi." 
Numbers22:8 Balaam in amate tungah, “Tu zan hi lai ah taam vun a, Topa hong son pawpo, zing ciang kong son kik tu hi,” ci hi. Tua ahikom Moab lampuite Balaam kungah taam uh hi." 
Numbers22:9 Balaam kungah Pathian pai in, “Nang kungah hong ngiakte a kuate ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Numbers22:10 Balaam in, “Moab Kumpipa Balak ii kamtaite hi a," 
Numbers22:11 Egypt pan hong pai mite ngamsung bup ah a kizelna thu hong sonsak hi. Ama in amate do in a nawkeak thei natu in haamsiatsak le hong oai hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Numbers22:12 Pathian in Balaam tungah, “Hi mite zui heak in a, Israel mite haamsiat heak in, banghang ziam cile amate sia ka thupha piakte ahi uh hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers22:13 A zingsang ciang Balaam sia Balak ii kamtaite kungah pai in, “Cia kik tavun; Topa in note kong zui tu oai ngawl hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers22:14 Tua ahiciang amate Balak kungah cia kik a, Balaam ii zui nop ngawlna thu teng son uh hi." 
Numbers22:15 Tuasia ciang Balak in a masa lai sang a, a tamzaw le a thupi zaw lampuite thataak hi." 
Numbers22:16 Amate Balaam kungah pai in, “Nong hesuakna in ka kungah nong pai tu bangma peuma in khaksak heak in!" 
Numbers22:17 Thaman tam mama kong pia tu a, nong son babang ka vawt tu hi. Nong hesuakna in hong pai ta'n a, kei atu hi mite hong haamsiatsak ta'n,” ci in Balak ii kam vaithak teng son uh hi." 
Numbers22:18 Ahizong Balaam in, “Balak in a kumpi inn sung a om ngunn le khamh theampo hong pia zong, Topa ka Pathian ii thupiak a nobel zongh ka nial thei bua hi." 
Numbers22:19 Ahizong nong hesuakna in ngualdangte bangma, tu zan taam vun, tua hile Topa in thudang son tu hong nei ziam hong nei bua ziam ka he tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Numbers22:20 Tua zanin Balaam kungah Pathian pai a, “Nangma sam tu in hi mite hong pai ahile, kithoai in zui ta'n, ahizong kong son teng bek vawt in,” ci hi." 
Numbers22:21 Tua hi a, a zingsang ciang Balaam in a laa tung to in Moab lampuite zui hi." 
Numbers22:22 Tuabang Balaam in zui ahikom Pathian thin uuk hi. Balaam sia a naseam niite tonpui a, a laa tung to in a pai laitak a lampi khak tu in Topa vantunglalang khat lamlai ah ding hi." 
Numbers22:23 Tua laa in namsau khat a toai vantunglalang tua munah ding a mu ciang lampial in lo sung zuan hi. Balaam in a laa saatin lampi ah hawl kik hi. 
Numbers22:24 Tuaciang lamciakna sapithuan nii kilaklaw, a lang le a lang suangpang omna munah vantunglalang sia ding hi." 
Numbers22:25 A laa in vantunglalang a mu ciang leangin suangpang phul a, Balaam ii peang suangpang taw kingoai hi. Balaam in a laa saat kik hi." 
Numbers22:26 Khatvei ma vantunglalang a mai ah kiin leleau a; paitan natu a om ngawl het lampi ciakna mun khat ah ding hi. 
Numbers22:27 Tu ciang, laa sia vantunglalang a mu ciang boksuk hi. Balaam a thin vei zo ngawlin, a ciang taw a laa saat hi." 
Numbers22:28 Tuasia ciang Topa in laa sia kampau theina vaang pia a, laa in Balaam tungah, “Nang bang hong law na khi ziam? Banghangin thumvei hong saat ni ziam?” ci hi." 
Numbers22:29 Balaam in, “Banghang ziam cile kei nong mawmawt vawt hang hi! Namsau nei leng hong thatlum tu khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Numbers22:30 Laa in, “Na khan tawntung, nong tona laa sia ma hi ngawl kana khi ziam? Nidangin hi bangin hong vawt ngei na khi ziam?” ci in zo kik hi. Balaam in, “Nong vawt ngei bua hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Numbers22:31 Tuaciang, Topa in Balaam, tua munah namsau taw a ding vantunglalang sia musak a; Balaam lei ah boksuk hi." 
Numbers22:32 Vantunglalang in, “Banghang hi bang na laa thumvei saat ni ziam? Hi bang a pai tu hi ngawl na hikom, na mai khak tu in kong pai zo hi." 
Numbers22:33 Ahizong na laa in kei hong mu a, thumvei hong pial hi. Tuabang hong pial buale nangma hong thatin, na laa a khoaikhe tu ka hi hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers22:34 Balaam in, “Maw zo khi hi. Kei hong pangin lampi ah na din hunlam ka he bua hi; ahizong tu in ka paisuak tu khial nong sa ahile ka heak kik tu hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Numbers22:35 Ahizong vantunglalang in, “Hi mite taw paisuak in a, ahizong son a kong sawl teng bek son in,” ci hi. Tuabangin Balaam in amate zui suak hi." 
Numbers22:36 Balak in Balaam a pai hunlam a zaak ciang Moab ngamngi Arnon Ngun tung a om Ar khuapi ah muak hi. 
Numbers22:37 Balak in Balaam tungah, “Kong samsak maksak lai in banghangin hong pai ngawl ni ziam? A kicing thaman pia zo ngawl tu in hong um ni ziam?” ci hi." 
Numbers22:38 Balaam in, “Hong pai zo hi ngawl khi ziam? Ahizong tu in a bang vaang nei na khi ziam? Pathian ii son a hong sawl teng bekma son thei khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Numbers22:39 Tuaciang Balaam sia Balak taw Huzoth khua ah pai in," 
Numbers22:40 tualai ah Balak in khui le tuu ngoin, a sa pawlkhat Balaam le a tonpui lampuite pia hi." 
Numbers22:41 A zingsang ciang Balak in Balaam sia Bamoth Baal ah paipui to hi, tua mun panin Balaam in Israel mite khen khat mu thei hi." 
Numbers23:1 Balaam in Balak tungah, “Hi lai ah biaknatau sali kei atu in hong vawtsak ta'n a, khuital sali le tuutal sali hong paipui ta'n,” ci hi." 
Numbers23:2 A ci bangin Balak in seam a, ama le Balaam in biaknatau sim ah khuital khat le tuutal khat veu pia uh hi." 
Numbers23:3 Tua zawkciang Balaam in Balak tungah, “ Topa in kei hong mu nuam ziam hong mu nuam ngawl ziam, pai in ka na et laanin, nang na meihal biakpiakna hui ah na ding zii in. Ama ii kei tungah hong pualaakna babangin kong son kik tu hi,” ci hi. Tuaciang Balaam sia mualdawn ah ama nguak kaato a," 
Numbers23:4 Pathian taw kimu hi. Balaam in Topa tungah, “Biaknatau sali ka vawt a tuate tungah khuital khat le tuutal khat veu biakpiakna in ka pia zo hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers23:5 Topa in Balaam tungah, Balak atu a kam vaithak teng a son tu in heak kik sak hi." 
Numbers23:6 Tua ahiciang ama heak kik a Balak, a meihal biakpiakna hui ah Moab lampui theampo taw ding khawm lai sia mu hi." 
Numbers23:7 Balaam in hi kamsaanna pualaak hi: “Moab kumpipa Balak in Syria pan, nisuana mualte panin hong paipui hi. Balak in, ‘Hong pai ta'n a, kei atu in Israel mite haamsiat in’ hong ci hi," 
Numbers23:8 Pathian ii haamsiat ngawl sia bangbang haamsiat thei tu a, Topa ii a ci ngawl po bangbang kei lalsak na thu son tu khi ziam?" 
Numbers23:9 Suangpi saang tung pan amate ka mu thei a; Mualtung pan amate ka en thei hi. Amate minam khat in nungta bek a; Minam dangte sangin thupha a nga zawkna thu amate in he uh hi. 
Numbers23:10 Israel suan le paalte leivui bangma hi a — a phakza sim tu tamleih lawlawm hi. Pathian mite khat bangin ka ni ka hunte hong bosak ta'n a; Mihing thutakte bangin nuam takin hong thisak ta'n.” 
Numbers23:11 Tua zawkciang Balak in Balaam tungah, “Kei tungah bang hong vawt ni ziam? Hi lai ah ka ngalte haamsiat tu in kong paipui a, ahizong amate thupha na pia pumsai hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers23:12 Ama in, “ Topa ii son tu a hong sawl teng bek son thei khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Numbers23:13 Tuasia zawkciang Balak in Balaam tungah, “Israel te pawlkhat bek na mu thei natu mundang khat ah hong zui ta'n. Tua mun pan amate hong haamsiatsak ta'n,” ci hi." 
Numbers23:14 Ama in Balaam sia Zophim lo sung Pisgah Mualdawn ah paipui hi. Tua mun zongh ah ama in biaknatau sali vawtin tua tungah khuital khat le tuutal khat veu biakpiakna in pia hi. 
Numbers23:15 Balaam in Balak tungah, “Na meihal biakpiakna hui hi sungah na ding in a, tua munah Pathian taw ka na kimu tu hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers23:16 Topa sia Balaam taw kimu a, a kam vaithak teng a son zawkciang Balak tungah a son tu in ciasak kik hi." 
Numbers23:17 Tua ahiciang ama heak kik a, Balak meihal biakpiakna hui ah Moab lampuite taw dingkhawm lai sia mu hi. Topa in bang hong ci ziam ci in Balak in dongh a," 
Numbers23:18 Balaam in hi kamsaanna pualaak hi: “Zippor ii tapa Balak awng hong pai ta'n, Kong son tu thute hong ngai ta'n." 
Numbers23:19 Pathian sia a leilot thei mihingte taw kibang ngawl a; Ama sia a thin a kheal papai mihing hi ngawl hi. A kamciamna babang seam a; A pau bangin taangtung hi. 
Numbers23:20 Thupha pia tu in hong kisawl a, Pathian in thupha a piak ciang ka khealsak kik thei bua hi." 
Numbers23:21 Israel te mai sangah bangma kaamsiatna ahibuale ngimna a thuak tu ka mu kholsak bua hi. Topa a Pathian in amate ompui a; Ama sia a kumpipa hi ci in thangsak uh hi. 
Numbers23:22 Pathian in Egypt pan amate pusuapui a; Ama in ngam khuital khat bangin amate panpui hi. 
Numbers23:23 Israel minam langpan natu a kizangh thei bum ahizong, ai ahizong om ngawl hi. Tu in mihingte in Israel te thu son tu a, ‘En vun Pathian nasepna paw!’ ci tu uh hi." 
Numbers23:24 Israel minam sia a thahat tawpi khat taw kibang a: A sa matte ii sa, balneen in a valh mateng, A chi a dawn mateng in, tawlnga ngawl hi.”" 
Numbers23:25 Tua zawkciang Balak in Balaam tungah, “Israel mite haamsiat tu nong nial a, tua ahile amate thupha pia heak ka lam in!” ci hi." 
Numbers23:26 Balaam in, “ Topa hong sawl theampo a seam tu ka hisia hong son zo hi ngawl khi ziam?” ci in zo hi." 
Numbers23:27 Balak in, “Hong pai ta'n, mundang khat ah kong paipui tu hi. Tua mun pan kei atu in, amate na haamsiat tu Pathian in hong oai zongh hi thei tha tu hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers23:28 Tua ahiciang Balak in sennealngam a ki ensuk theina Peor Mualdawn ah Balaam paipui hi. 
Numbers23:29 Balaam in Balak tungah, “Hi lai ah biaknatau sali kei atu in sa in a, khuital sali le tuutal sali kei atu hong paipui ta'n,” ci hi." 
Numbers23:30 Ama ci bangin Balak in seam a, khuital khat le tuutal khat veu biaknatau khat sim tungah biakpiakna in pia hi." 
Numbers24:1 Israel mite thupha pia tu in Topa ii ama a dei hunlam tu in Balaam in he ahikom, nidang a vawt ngei bangin aisaan tu in pai nawn ngawl hi. Ama sennealngam sang ngaa a," 
Numbers24:2 Israel mite anam anam in ngiaphual a saat sia mu hi. Pathian thaa in ama uk a," 
Numbers24:3 ama in hi kamsaanna pualaak hi: “Beor tapa Balaam ii thupuak, Thiang takin a mu theipa ii kammalte," 
Numbers24:4 Pathian son bang a za theipa ahi hi. Mit hak kiukiau in mangmuna khat ka mu a, Vaanglianbelpa Pathian tung pan mukholna hi." 
Numbers24:5 Israel Puanbukte et hoi a," 
Numbers24:6 A ngual sau in a kiciing palm kungte, ahibuale ngunhui ah huante taw kibang a, Topa ii a ciin aloe kungte ahibuale tui hui a po cedar kungte taw kibang hi." 
Numbers24:7 Amate in nguatui cing takin nga tu uh a, nguatui zen lote ah a thaiciite ciing tu hi. A kumpipa sia Agag kumpipa sangin lian zaw tu a, Ama ukna ngam sia zaikeak tu hi." 
Numbers24:8 Pathian in amate Egypt ngam pan pusua pui a; Ama in ngam khuital khat bangin amate ngaldo pui hi. Amate in a ngalte lopvalh a, A ngute khimtham in a thaltangte thiaktan hi." 
Numbers24:9 Tua minam sia a thahat tawpi khat taw kibang a; A mut laitakin kuama in phong ngam ngawl hi. Israel thupha a pia pawpo thupha kipia tu a, Israel a haamsiat pawpo kihaamsiat tu hi.”" 
Numbers24:10 Balak thin uukin a khut tumin Balaam tungah, “Ka ngalte haamsiat tu in kong sam a, ahizong tu in amate na haamsiat sangin thumvei tak thupha na piazaw pum hi." 
Numbers24:11 Tu in, inn ah cia in! Thaman piak tu in kong kamciam a, ahizong na thaman nga tu sia Topa in hong khak hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers24:12 Balaam in, “Ka kungah kamtai nong paisakte tungah ka sonsa bangin," 
Numbers24:13 na kumpi inn sungah a om ngunn le khamh theampo nong pia zong, Topa thupiakna nialin keima thu taw bangma ka seam buatu hi. Topa in son a hong sawl teng bek ka son tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Numbers24:14 Balaam in Balak tungah, “Tu in ka mipuite kungah ka cia kik tu a, ahizong ka cia ma in, mailam sangah Israel mite ii na mite tungah a vawt tu teng na kidop natu in kong sonkhol tu hi.” ci hi." 
Numbers24:15 Tuaciang ama in hi kamsaanna pualaak hi: “Beor tapa Balaam ii thupuak; Thiang takin a mu thei pa ii kammalte," 
Numbers24:16 Pathian son bang a za thei pa in A Saang Belna pan hong pai thuheakna nga hi. Vaanglianbelpa Pathian tung pan mangmuna khat mit hak kiukiau in ka mu hi. 
Numbers24:17 Maisang hun tu ka en a, Israel minam ka mu hi. Tua minam sungah, Aksi taang taw kibang kumpi khat piang tu hi. Thazau bangin Israel sungah ama hong khang tu hi. Ama in Moab lampuite saat tu a, Seth mite theampo saatvawk tu hi." 
Numbers24:18 Ama in Edom ngam ah a ngalte zo tu a, A ngalte ngam le lei ama ii neisa sua tu a, Israel sia a ngualzo hi tawntung tu hi." 
Numbers24:19 Israel minam in amate tuanhcil tu a, A suakta khakbel teng mon tu hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers24:20 Tua zawkciang Balaam ii mukholna sungah Amalek te mu a, hi bangin kamsaanna pualaak hi: “Amalek sia minam theampo sung pan a thahatbel hi a, ahizong a khakbel ciang a tawntung maaimang tu hi.”" 
Numbers24:21 Ama mukholna sungah Balaam in Ken te mu a, hi kamsaanna pualaak hi: “Na teenna mun muanhuai a, Suangliang saang tungah a om vacimbu bangin bit hi," 
Numbers24:22 Ahihang Assyria in note salin hong mat ciang, no, Ken te hong kilalcipsak tu hi.”" 
Numbers24:23 Balaam in hi bang kamsaanna pualaak hi: “Sak sangah a kikhawm hi mihingte a kuate ziam? 
Numbers24:24 Cyprus pan ngalsim tute teambaw taw hong pai tu a; Amate in Assyria le Eber zo tu hi, Ahizong amate zongh a tawntungin lalcip tu uh hi.”" 
Numbers24:25 Tua zawkciang Balaam kithoai in inn ah ciakik a, Balak sia a pai natu ah paisuak hi." 
Numbers25:1 Israel te Acacia Kuam ah ngiaphual a saat lai in, pate in tua munah a om Moab numeite khialpui uh hi." 
Numbers25:2 Tua numeite in Moab pathian a kibiakna mun sangaw biakpiakna poai ah amate sam uh hi. Israel te in an ne in," 
Numbers25:3 Peor ii Baal pathian bia uh hi. Tua ahikom amate tungah Topa thin uuk a," 
Numbers25:4 Moses tungah, “Israel lampui theampo sam in a, ka thu nong nitna in suntangin amate thatlum siat in, tua hile a mite tungah ka thin uuk nawn ngawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers25:5 Moses in uliante tungah, “Note khat simin na nam sungah Peor ii Baal pathian a bia teng peuma thatlum tu nu hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers25:6 Moses le Israel taangpi bup khuangai in Topa ompuina Puanbuk kongbiang ah kapin a om laitak, amate mu tangin Israel te khat in Midian numei khat ama puanbuk sungah tumpui hi." 
Numbers25:7 Tua thu Eleazar tapa, thiampi Aaron tupa, Phinehas in a mu ciang a kikhopna pan dingin pusuak hi. Ama in tei khat la a," 
Numbers25:8 tua pa le tua nu ii nung pan zui in Puanbuk sungah a nii in khawlet hi. Hi bangin Israel te tungah a tung natsiatna sia kivengsak a," 
Numbers25:9 ahizong mihing 24,000thisak zo hi." 
Numbers25:10 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Numbers25:11 “Phinehas ngamtatna hangin Israel mite tungah ka thin a uk nawn bua hi. Ama in keima simngawl Pathian dang biak tu peuma a dei ngawlpa hi a tua thu hangin thin uuk hi kaleng amate ka mon bua hi. 
Numbers25:12 Tua ahiciang maisang hun theampo ah a kip tu thuciamna khat Phinehas taw ka vawt tu sia ama tungah son in,"

Numbers26:3 Moses le Eleazar in a thu ni a, kum kul pan a tungsia a pha, pa theampo kaikhawm hi. Amate sia Jericho pan Jordan Ngunngal khat Moab zaangtam ah kikhawm uh hi. Hite sia Egypt pan a pusuak Israel mite ahi hi."

Numbers26:62 Levi mite tha khat pan a tungsia pa 23,000 pha hi. Amate Israel ngam sungah neisa bangma kipia ngawl ahikom Israel midangte taw kihel ngawlin a tuamin kiciamtee hi."

Numbers27:1 Joseph tapa Manasseh, Manasseh tapa Machir, Machir tapa Gilead, Gilead tapa Hepher, Hepher tapa, Zelophehad ii tanute sia Mahlah, Noah, Hoglah, Milcah le Tirzah te ahi hi." 
Numbers27:2 Amate pai in Moses, thiampi Eleazar, lampuite le taangpi bup ii mai, Topa ompuina Puanbuk kongbiang ah ding a," 
Numbers27:3 “Ka pa uh in tapa nei ngawlin duisung ah hong thi san hi. Ama sia Topa a langpan Korah ii nungzuite sungah kihel ngawl a; ama mawna hangin thi hi. 
Numbers27:4 Tapa a nei ngawl hu bekin ka pa ii min banghangin Israel sung pan bo tu ziam? Kote ii pa ii mealheakte taw in ko zongh ngamh hong pia tavun,” ci hi." 
Numbers27:5 Moses in amate thu Topa tungah ko a," 
Numbers27:6 tuaciang Topa in," 
Numbers27:7 “Zelophehad tanute ii ngetna maan hi; a pa mealheakte taw in ngamh piakhawm in. A pa ngamh amate in lua tahen. 
Numbers27:8 Pasal khat in tapa nei ngawlin a thi ciang a tanu in a neisa lua tu hi, ci in Israel mite son in." 
Numbers27:9 Ama in tanu a nei buale ama ii suapui pate in lua tu hi. 
Numbers27:10 Ama in suapui pa a nei buale, a pa ii suapui pate in lua tu hi." 
Numbers27:11 Ama in suapui pa ahibuale papi, pano a nei buale a bee kuungbel khat in lua tu a, ama ii neisa suak hi. Hi thu sia Keima Topa ii kong thupiak hi a, Israel mite zui tu thukham ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers27:12 Topa in Moses tungah, “Abarim Mualte tungah kaato in a, Israel te ka piak tu ngam le lei sia ngal et in."

Meribah ah Israel taangpi bup in keima hong phutsat lai in, a thiangtho ka vaangletna amate mai ah ahi tubangin nong saang nuam bua uh hi,” ci hi. (Meribah sia Zin duisung Kadesh khua ah a om ciktui naak ahi hi.)" 
Numbers27:15 Moses thungen a," 
Numbers27:16 “Nuntakna theampo ii naak ahi Topa Pathian awng," 
Numbers27:17 na mipite tuucing nei ngawl tuute bang ahi ngawl natu in a lampui thei tu le ngal kisimna ah thu a pia thei tu mihing khat nong tealsak natu in, thu kong ngen hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers27:18 Topa in Moses tungah, “Kicinna a nei Nun tapa Joshua sam in, a lu tungah na khut nga in." 
Numbers27:18 Topa in Moses tungah, “Kicinna a nei Nun tapa Joshua sam in, a lu tungah na khut nga in."

Numbers27:20 Israel taangpi bup in a thu a nit thei natu in, na thuneina pawlkhat ama pia in." 
Numbers27:21 Joshua in thiampi Eleazar suang tu a, Eleazar in keima deina a heak natu in Urim le Thummim zangh tu hi. Tuabangin Joshua le Israel taangpi bup sia thu theampo ah Eleazar in vaihawm tu hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers27:21 Joshua in thiampi Eleazar suang tu a, Eleazar in keima deina a heak natu in Urim le Thummim zangh tu hi. Tuabangin Joshua le Israel taangpi bup sia thu theampo ah Eleazar in vaihawm tu hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers27:22 Topa thupiakna bangin Moses in seam hi. Ama in Thiampi Eleazar le taangpi bup mai ah Joshua dingsak hi.

Numbers28:1 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Numbers28:2 Israel te in a kisee hunin ama a lungkimsak ahi, a kitaangsamh an biakpiaknate Pathian tungah a piak natu a sawl natu in thupia hi." 
Numbers28:3 Hite sia Topa tungah a kipia tu an piakkhiatnate ahi hi: ni sim meihal biakpiak natu in a mealhem ngawl kum khat a pha tuutalno nii hi tu hi. 
Numbers28:4 Tuuno a khatna sia zingsang in kipia tu a, a niina sia nitakin kipia tu hi." 
Numbers28:5 Tua tuuno khat sim taw antang piakkhiatna khat ahi a phabel olive thau litre khat a kihel anvui kilogramme khat kipia khawm tu hi. 
Numbers28:6 Hisia in Sinai Mual tungah a masabel an biakpiakna in a kipia sa, a kihaltum ni sim biakpiakna hi a, tua in Topa a lungkimsak ngimnam ahi hi." 
Numbers28:7 A masa tuuno sia taw sapittui biakpiakna na piak uh bangin biaknatau ah sapittui litre khat buak vun. 
Numbers28:8 Sapittui taw zingsang biakpiakna a kipiak khop bangma in, nitakin a niina tuuno sia pia vun. Tuasia zongh a ngimnam taw Topa a lungkimsak an taw biakpiakna ahi hi." 
Numbers28:9 Sabbath ni in a mealhem ngawl, kum khat a pha tuutal no nii, antang biakpiakna in olive thau taw a kihel anvui kilogramme 2 le sapittui biakpiakna pia vun." 
Numbers28:10 Hi meihal biakpiakna sia ni simin sapittui biakpiakna belapna in Sabbath ni simin piak tu ahi hi. 
Numbers28:11 Tha sim a ni khat ni in, Topa tungah meihal biakpiakna a nuai a bangin pia vun: khuitalno nii, tuutal khat, kum khat a pha tuutalno sali, a vekpi in a mealhem ngawl hi tu hi." 
Numbers28:12 Antang biakpiakna in olive thau taw a kihel anvui pia vun: khuital khat ciang anvui kilogramme 3 veu; tuutal sia anvui kilogramme 2 
Numbers28:13 le, tuuno khat ciang anvui kilogramme khat veu taw pia vun. Hi meihal biakpiaknate sia an biakpiakna hi a, Topa a lungkimsak ngimnam khat ahi hi." 
Numbers28:14 Piak ngengei sapittui biakpiakna sia khuital khat ciang sapittui litre 2, tuutal sia sapittui litre khat le lang le tuuno khat ciang sapittui litre khat veu taw piak tu ahi hi. Hisia kum khat tawntung tha sim, a ni khat ni in meihal biakpiakna ah zui tu ngeina ahi hi." 
Numbers28:15 Tuaciang sapittui biakpiakna taw ni sim meihal biakpiakna belapna in, mawphel biakpiakna in kealtal khat pia vun." 
Numbers28:16 Topa patoaina Paisan Poai sia tha masabel, ni sawm le ni li ni in, kivawt tu hi." 
Numbers28:17 A ni sawm le ni nga ni in, biakna poai kipan a, ni sali sung poai kikhaam tu hi, tua hunsung teng tol saw ngawl anluum bek kine tu hi." 
Numbers28:18 Poaikhaam a ni masabel ni in, biakna vawt tu in na kikhawm tu uh a, na kiseam ngawl tu hi." 
Numbers28:19 Topa tungah an taw biakpiakna in meihal biakpiakna pia vun: khuitalno nii, tuutal khat le kum khat a pha tuutal sali, a vekpi in a mealhem ngawl hi tu hi." 
Numbers28:20 Olive thau a kihel anvui taw piak ngei antang biakpiakna pia vun: Khuital khat ciang anvui kilogramme 3 veu, tuutal sia anvui kilogramme 2" 
Numbers28:21 le tuutalno khat ciang anvui kilogramme khat veu taw pia tu nu hi. 
Numbers28:22 Mawphel biakpiakna in keal tal khat zongh pia vun a, hi bangin mipite atu in a zeksa thiansuana vawt vun." 
Numbers28:23 Hite sia zing simin meihal biakpiakna belapna in pia vun. 
Numbers28:24 Tuabang ma in ni sali sung ama a lungkimsak ngimnam, an taw biakpiakna Topa tungah pia vun. Hi biakpiakna sia ni sim meihal biakpiakna le sapittui biakpiakna belapna in pia thua vun." 
Numbers28:25 A ni sali ni in, biakna vawt tu in kikhawm vun a, na seam heak vun." 
Numbers28:26 Anlaak Poai a ni masabel ni in Topa tungah anpal biakpiakna na piak uh ciang biak kikhopna nei in, bangma seam ngawl tu nu hi." 
Numbers28:27 Topa a lungkimsak ngimnam, meihal biakpiakna pia vun: khuital moi nii, tuutal khat le kum khat a pha tuutalno sali hi tu a, a vekpi in a mealhem ngawl hi tu hi." 
Numbers28:28 Olive thau le anvui a kihel piak ngengei antang biakpiakna pia vun: khuital khat ciang anvui kilogramme 3 veu, tuutal sia anvui kilogramme 2," 
Numbers28:29 le tuutalno khat ciang anvui kilogramme khat veu taw pia vun. 
Numbers28:30 Mawphel biakpiakna in kealtal khat zongh pia vun a, hi bangin mipite atu in a zeksa thiansuana vawt vun." 
Numbers28:31 Ni sim meihal biakpiakna le antang biakpiakna belapna in hite le sapittui biakpiakna pia vun. 
Numbers29:1 Tha salina a ni khat ni in, biak kikhopna na nei tu uh a, na naseam buatu uh hi. Tua ni in lemle kitum tu hi." 
Numbers29:2 Topa a lungkimsak ngimnam ahi meihal biakpiakna khat Topa pia vun: khuital moi khat, tuutal khat, kum khat a pha tuutalno sali hi tu a, a vekpi in mealhem ngawl hi tu hi." 
Numbers29:3 Olive thau le anvui a kihel piak ngei antang biakpiakna pia vun: khuital khat le anvui kilogramme 3, tuutal khat le kilogramme 2," 
Numbers29:4 le tuuno khat sim le kilogramme khat veu taw pia vun. 
Numbers29:5 Mawphel biakpiakna in kealtal khat zongh pia vun a, hi bangin mipite atu a zeksa thiansuana vawt vun." 
Numbers29:6 Hi biakpiaknate tha sim a ni khat ni in piak ngengei meihal biakpiakna le antang biakpiakna, ni sim meihal biakpiakna le antang biakpiakna le sapittui biakpiaknate belapna in pia vun. Hi an taw biakpiaknate sia Topa a lungkimsak ngimnam khat ahi hi." 
Numbers29:7 Tha salina a ni sawm ni in biak kikhopna nei vun; an ne heak vun a, naseam heak vun." 
Numbers29:8 Topa a lungkimsak ngimnam ahi meihal biakpiakna khat Topa tungah pia vun: khuitalno khat, tuutal khat, le kum khat a pha tuutalno sali hi tu a, a vekpi in mealhem ngawl hi tu hi." 
Numbers29:9 Olive thau le anvui kihel ngeina biakpiakna pia vun: khuital sia anvui kilogramme 3, tuutal sia anvui kilogramme 2," 
Numbers29:10 le tuutalno khat ciang kilogramme khat veu taw pia vun. 
Numbers29:11 Mipite atu a zeksa thiansuana in a kipia keal, le ni sim meihal biakpiakna, antang biakpiakna le sapittui biakpiakna belapna in kealtal khat taw mawphel biakpiakna pia thua vun." 
Numbers29:12 Tha salina a ni sawm le ni nga ni in biak kikhopna nei vun. Topa patoaina in tua poaipi ni sali sung khaamin, naseam heak vun." 
Numbers29:13 Hi a ni khat ni in Topa a lungkimsak ngimnam ahi an biakpiakna Topa tungah pia vun: khuital no sawm le thum, tuutal nii le kum khat a pha tuutal no sawm le li hi tu a, a vekpi in mealhem ngawl hi tu hi." 
Numbers29:14 Olive thau le anvui a kihel ngeina antang biakpiakna pia vun: khuital khat ciang anvui kilogramme 3 veu, tuutal khat ciang kilogramme 2 veu," 
Numbers29:15 le tuutalno khat ciang kilogramme khat veu, a kisamh za sapittui biakpiaknate taw pia vun." 
Numbers29:16 Mawphel biakpiakna in kealtal khat zongh pia vun. Hi biakpiaknate ni sim meihal biakpiakna, antang biakpiakna le sapittui biakpiakna belapna in pia thua vun." 
Numbers29:17 A ni nii ni in, a mealhem ngawl khuital no sawm le nii, tuutal nii le kum khat a pha tuutal no sawm le li pia vun." 
Numbers29:18 Tuate taw a ni khat ni atu a, a kisamh biakpiakna dang theampo pia khawm vun." 
Numbers29:19  
Numbers29:20 A ni thum ni in, a mealhem ngawl khuital no sawm le khat, tuutal nii, le kum khat a pha tuutalno sawm le li pia vun." 
Numbers29:21 Tuate taw a ni khat ni atu a kisamh biakpiakna dangte theampo pia khawm vun. 
Numbers29:22  
Numbers29:23 Ani li ni in, a mealhem ngawl khuital moi sawm, tuutal nii, le kum khat a pha tuutalno sawm le li pia vun." 
Numbers29:24 Tuate taw a ni khat ni atu, a kisamh biakpiakna dang theampo pia khawm vun." 
Numbers29:25  
Numbers29:26 Ani nga ni in a mealhem ngawl khuital no kua, tuutal nii, kum khat a pha tuutalno sawm le li pia vun." 
Numbers29:27 Tuate taw a ni khat ni atu a kisamh biakpiakna dang theampo pia khawm vun. 
Numbers29:28  
Numbers29:29 Ani luk ni in, a mealhem ngawl khuital no liat, tuutal nii, le kum khat a pha tuutalno sawm le li pia vun." 
Numbers29:30 Tuate taw a ni khat ni atu in a kisamh biakpiakna dang theampo pia khawm vun. 
Numbers29:31  
Numbers29:32 Ani sali ni in, a mealhem ngawl khuital sali, tuutal nii, le kum khat a pha tuutalno sawm le li pia vun." 
Numbers29:33 Tuate taw a ni khat ni atu a kisamh biakpiakna dang theampo pia khawm vun. 
Numbers29:34  
Numbers29:35 Ani liat ni in, biak kikhopna nei vun a, na seam heak vun." 
Numbers29:36 Topa a lungkimsak ngimnam ahi an biakpiakna khat in Topa tungah meihal biakpiakna pia vun: khuital no khat, tuutal khat, le kum khat a pha tuutalno sali, a mealhem ngawl hi tu hi." 
Numbers29:37 Tuate taw a ni khat ni atu a kisamh biakpiakna dang theampo taw pia khawm vun. 
Numbers29:38  
Numbers29:39 Hite sia, vawt tu a kisee poaite ah Topa tungah na sep tu meihal biakpiakna, antang biakpiakna, sapittui biakpiakna le pawlkhop biakpiaknate taw kisai zui tu ngeinate ahi hi. Hite sia kiciamna khat taangtutsakna ahibuale thinzaw biakpiaknate in na piak biakpiaknate belapna ahi hi." 
Numbers29:40 Tuabangin Moses in ama tungah Topa thupiak sa theampo Israel mite tungah son hi. 
Numbers30:1 Moses in Israel minamte ii lampuite tungah a nuai a zui tu hilnate pia hi. 
Numbers30:2 Pasal khat in Topa tungah na khat piak tu in kam kiciamna khat a vawt ciang ahibuale na khat pawpo ten tu in kiciamna a vawt ciang ama in ciam peal ngawl tu a, a ci theampo taangtungsak hamtang tu hi." 
Numbers30:3 A pa inn ah a om lai ngaknu khat in Topa tungah na khat piak tu in kamkiciamna khat a vawt ciang ahibuale bang ziam khat ten tu in kamciam a piak ciang," 
Numbers30:4 tua sia a pa in a zaak ciang a nial buanale, tua a kamkiciamna ahibuale a kamciamna taangtungsak hamtang tu hi." 
Numbers30:5 Ahizong a kamkiciamna sia a pa in a zaak ciang, a khaam le ama in tuasia taangtunsak kul nawn ngawl hi. A kamciam bang a sep tu a pa in oai ngawl ahikom Topa in maisak tu hi." 
Numbers30:6 Pasal nei ngawl lai ngaknu khat in a thin takpi taw, ahibuale ngaisun phot ngawlin na khat ten tu in kamciamna a vawt zawkciang pasal a nei le" 
Numbers30:7 tua thu a pasal in a zaak ciang a khaam buale, a kamkiciamna ahibuale a kamciam theampo ama in seam nanak tu hi." 
Numbers30:8 Ahizong a pasal in tua kamkiciamna a zaak ciang a sep tu a khaam le ama in tuasia taangtutsak kul ngawl hi. Topa in ama maisak tu hi. 
Numbers30:9 Meingong khat ahibuale a pasal ii khul numei khat in kamkiciamna a vawt theampo le na khat ten tu in kamciamna a vawt theampo taangtungsak tu hi. 
Numbers30:10 Pasal a nei numei khat in kamkiciamna khat vawt a, ahibuale na khat ten tu in kamciamna a vawt le," 
Numbers30:11 a pasal in tua thu a zaak ciang a khaam buanale ama kamkiciamna ahibuale a kamciam theampo taangtungsak nanak tu hi. 
Numbers30:12 Ahizong a pasal in tua thu a zaak ciang, a sep tu a khaam le ama in a kamkiciamna bang sep kul ngawl hi. A pasal in ama kamkiciamna bang a sep tu khaam ahikom Topa in ama maisak tu hi." 
Numbers30:13 A pasal in a zi kamkiciamna ahibuale a kamciam khosak natu ahizong, phiat natu ahizong thu nei hi." 
Numbers30:14 Ahizong a pasal in a zi ii kamkiciamna a zaak ni in a khaam buale a kamkiciamna bangin a zi in seam tu hi. A zaak ni in khaam ngawl ahikom a lungkimpui sa suak hi. 
Numbers30:15 Ahizong ama in tua kamkiciamna sia a zawk pek ciang a phiatsak kik pheang le, tuasia a taangtut ngawl hu in thupiang teng ama in thuak tu hi." 
Numbers30:16 Hi thute pasal nei numei ahibuale, pasal nei ngawlin a pa inn ah a om lai ngaknu khat ii kam kiciamnate taw kisai in, Topa ii Moses tungah a piak zui tu ngeinate ahi hi." 
Numbers31:1 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Numbers31:2 “Israel mite tungah a vawtna hangin Midian te daan pia in. Tuasia na sep zawkciang thi tu ni hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers31:3 Tua ahiciang Moses in mipite tungah, “ Topa tungah a vawtnate hangin Midian te sim a daan a pia thei tu in ngalsim tu kinging vun." 
Numbers31:4 Israel ii nam sim pan pasal tulkhat tek ngalsim tu in kuansak vun,” ci hi." 
Numbers31:5 Tuaciang Israel ii nam khat sim pan pasal tulkhat tek kiteal a, a vekpi in tulsawm le tulnii ngalsim tu in kithoai hi." 
Numbers31:6 Moses in thiampi Eleazar tapa, van thiangthote le thu kikona lemle a keam pa Phinehas in uksakin amate kuansak hi." 
Numbers31:7 Topa in Moses tungah a thupiak bangin amate in Midian te simin, pa theampo that siat hi." 
Numbers31:8 Tuate sungah Midian kumpi ngate: Evi, Rekem, Zur, Hur, le Reba kihel hi. Amate in Beor tapa Balaam zongh thatlum hi." 
Numbers31:9 Israel mite in Midian numeite le patangte manin, a khuite le a ngannote, a nei a lamh theampo sut a," 
Numbers31:10 a ngiaphual le a khuapi theampo halsak uh hi. 
Numbers31:11 Amate ii a sutol nate theampo, a ngalmatte le a nganno teng zongh," 
Numbers31:12 Jericho pan Jordan ngunngal khat Moab zaangtam ah ngiaphual a saat Moses, Eleazar le Israel taangpi bup omna ah paipui uh hi." 
Numbers31:13 Moses, Eleazar le taangpi lampui dang theampo in ngalkaphonpi muak tu in ngiaphual pan pai uh hi." 
Numbers31:14 Moses sia ngalsimna pan hong heak kik ngalkap bu teng, tulkhat a ukte le zakhat a ukte tungah thin uuk hi." 
Numbers31:15 Moses in amate tungah, “Banghang numei theampo hing khoai nu ziam?" 
Numbers31:16 Balaam thu zui in Peor ah mipite Topa mai ah thumaan ngawl a suaksak sia, hi numeite ahi hunlam phawk vun. Tuasia in Topa ii mihonte tungah natsia a kizelsak sia ahi hi." 
Numbers31:17 Tua ahiciang, tu in pano teng le pa taw a khial ngeisa numei teng thatlum vun a," 
Numbers31:18 ahizong ngaknuno teng le numei thiangtho theampo noma atu in khoaikhe vun. 
Numbers31:19 Tu in mihing a that peuma le mithiluang a tham peuma, ni sali sung ngiaphual pua sangah om tu nu hi. A ni thum ni le ni sali ni in noma le na mat uh numeite kithiansua vun." 
Numbers31:20 Note in puanbek theampo, savun, kealmul ahibuale thing taw kivawt nate theampo thiansua hamtang tu nu hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers31:21 Thiampi Eleazar in ngalsimna pan hong heakkikte tungah, “Hite sia Topa ii Moses tungah a piaksa zui tu ngeinate ahi hi." 
Numbers31:22 Mei ii a kak ngawl tute, khamh, ngunn, taau, thik, daan le haak ci bangte mei sung kaantansakin kithiansua tu hi. Nadang teng ahile thiansuana tui taw in kithiansua tu hi." 
Numbers31:23  
Numbers31:24 Ani sali ni in na puante sawp vun a, tuaciang note biakna taw kisai a thiang in ngiaphual sungah hong kitumsak tu hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers31:25 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Numbers31:26 “Nangma le Eleazar in taangpi lampuite taw kopin ngal sungah ngalmatte le ngannote a kipan a kiman theampo sim siat tu nu hi. 
Numbers31:27 Tua te a kikim in khen nii sua vun a, khen khat sia ngalkapte atu le khen dang khat sia a taanglai taangpite atu hi tu hi." 
Numbers31:28 Ngalkapte ii khen sung pan ngalmat za nga ciang khat veu Topa atu phiangshia in la vun, khui, laa, tuu le keal te zongh tuabang ma in la vun." 
Numbers31:29 Topa tung a kituam piak tu te thiampi Eleazar tungah pia vun. 
Numbers31:30 A taanglai mipite ii khen sung pan ngalmat sawmnga ciang khat la in a, khui, laa, tuu le keal zongh tuabang ma in la vun. Tuate Topa Puanbuk uk Levi mite pia vun,” ci hi." 
Numbers31:31 Topa thupiak bangin Moses le Eleazar in seam uh hi. 
Numbers31:32 A nuai a teng sia ngalkapte ii mat te hi a, amate atu in a kep tuam banah a kibelap teng ahi hi. Tuu le keal 675,000, khui 72,000, laa 61,000, numei thiangtho 32,000 ahi hi."

Numbers31:34  
Numbers31:35  
Numbers31:36 Hite sung pan a lang ngalkapte ii a tel sia; tuu le keal 337,500 hi a tuasung pan Topa tungah phiangshia in a kipia 675 hi; ngalkapte atu in khui 36,000 hi a, tuate sung pan Topa tungah phiangshia in a kipia 72 hi; Ngalkapte atu in laa 30,500 hi a, tuate sung pan Topa tungah phiangshia in a kipia 61 hi; ngalkapte atu in numei thiangtho 16,000 hi a, tuate sung pan Topa tungah phiangshia in a piak 32 ahi hi."

Numbers31:48 Tuaciang ngalkaphonpi a uk bute sia Moses kungah pai in," 
Numbers31:49 thupuak a, “Topa awng, kote khutnuai a om ngalkapte ka sim siat uh a khat zongh kisamh ngawl hi." 
Numbers31:50 Tua hi a, kote tek ii ka laak sa uh khamh taw kivawt kizepnate, baanbulte, haakte, khutzungbute, bilbaate le khite kong paipui uh hi. Kote nuntakna hong kep bit natu in hi vanhte Topa tungah kote nuntakna kitatna in ka pia uh hi.” ci uh hi." 
Numbers31:51 Moses le Eleazar in khamh taw kivawt tua kizepnate theampo saang uh hi. 
Numbers31:52 Ngalkap bute ii a piak teng a kingawm ciang kilogramme 200 dektak ngit hi. 
Numbers31:53 Ngalkapbu ahi ngawlte in amate ii mat vanh tek keam uh hi. 
Numbers31:54 Tua ahiciang Topa in Israel mite a kepcing natu in Moses le Eleazar in khamh teng Puanbuk sungah paipui in sot uh hi. 
Numbers32:1 Reuben le Gad namte in nganno tam mama nei uh hi. A ngannote atu in Jazer le Gilead ngam le lei bangza pha ci in a mu ciang," 
Numbers32:2 Moses, Eleazar le taangpi lampui dangte kungah amate pai in," 
Numbers32:3 “ Topa huna taw Israel te ii laksa hi khuate — Ataroth, Dibon, Jazer, Nimrah, Heshbon, Elealeh, Sibmah, Nebo le Beon khuate — nganno khoai natu in pha a, nganno tam mama ka nei uh hi." 
Numbers32:4  
Numbers32:5 Nong hesuakna in hi ngam le lei kote hong pia tavun a, tualai ngun ngalkhat ah a teang tu in Jordan Ngun hong kaantansak heak vun,” ci uh hi." 
Numbers32:6 Moses in, “Na Israel mipuite ngalsimin a kuan laitak note hi lai ah om nuam nu ziam?" 
Numbers32:7 Topa in amate a piaksa ngam sungah a tum tu Israel mite ii Jordan ngun a kaantan tu sia, bang bang thinkiamsak ngam zen nu ziam?" 
Numbers32:8 Tuasia in na pate Kadesh Barnea pan ngamvil tu ka paisak lai in a ngamtat uh bang keak ahi hi. 
Numbers32:9 Amate Eshkol Kuam dongah pai in tua ngam mu uh a, ahizong a heak kik ciang Topa piaksa ngam ah Israel te a tum nop ngawl natu in a thin kiamsak uh hi." 
Numbers32:10 Tua ni in Topa thin uukin kamciam khat pia hi: 
Numbers32:11 ‘Kei tungah hong thumaan tan ngawl ahikom, Egypt ngam pan a pusuak mite sung pan kum kul pan a tungsia pa a minpiang kuama Abraham, Isaac le Jacob tungah ka khapsa Canaan ngam tum ngawl tu hi, ci in kiciamna ka vawt hi.’" 
Numbers32:12 Hi sungah Keniz mi, Jephunneh tapa Caleb le Nun tapa Joshua simngawl, a dang teng kihel siat hi: amate hile Topa tungah thumaanna nei uh hi." 
Numbers32:12 Hi sungah Keniz mi, Jephunneh tapa Caleb le Nun tapa Joshua simngawl, a dang teng kihel siat hi: amate hile Topa tungah thumaanna nei uh hi." 
Numbers32:13 Mite tungah Topa thin uuk a, ama a lungkimsak ngawlte a khang buppi in a thi siat dong, duisung ngampa ah kum sawmli sung vakthapsak hi." 
Numbers32:14 Tu in, mawnei khangthak note in na pate dinmun la in, Israel tungah a nasia mama Topa thin uukna thengsak kik tu in kithoai nu hi." 
Numbers32:15 Tu in no Reuben le Gad mite in Topa nungzui tu na nial uh le ama in hi mipi theampo duisung ah khatvei ma nusia kik tu a, amate a lalsak sia noma na hi tu uh hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Numbers32:16 Amate Moses kungah pai in, “A masa in, hi lai ah ka tuute atu in suang taw doituamte hong uumsak ta'n a, ko hong bealhte atu in a ki uum khuapite hong sasak ta'n." 
Numbers32:17 Tuasia ciang ko sia Israel mipuite taw ngalsimin a kuankhawm tu le, amate lua tu ngam le lei ah ka teensak zawk mateng in, koma lampui in a sim tu ka kinging tu uh hi. Tua hun sungin ko hong bealhte in hilai a ki uum khuapite sungah teang thei tu uh a, hi ngammite panin ngammuangin om tu uh hi." 
Numbers32:18 Israel dangte theampo in a nga tu ngam teng a laak zawk mateng in, ka cia buatu uh hi." 
Numbers32:19 Kote in hi lai Jordan nisuana sangah tel nga zo ka hi uh kom Jordan langkhat amate sungah tel dang ka la buatu uh hi,” ci uh hi." 
Numbers32:20 Moses in, “Na ci uh sia a takpi ahile hi lai Topa mai ah ngalsim tu in kithoai paih vun." 
Numbers32:21 Na ngalkapte theampo in Jordan ngun kaantan in, Topa thupiakna nuai ah, Topa in ngalte a zaw mateng," 
Numbers32:22 le ngam le lei a laak zawk mateng ih ngalte sim tu uh hi. Tuasia zawkciang Topa tung le Israel mipuite sungah na vaipuak teng zo siat zo tu na hikom na cia thei tu uh hi. Tua zawkciang Topa in hi Jordan nisuana ngam sia note aa hi ci in hong tepteesak tu hi. 
Numbers32:23 Ahizong, na kamciam na len bua uh le, Topa langpanin mawnei na hi tu uh sia kong hesak hi. Hi thu taw kisai in khial tha heak vun; na mawna daan thuak tu nu hi." 
Numbers32:24 Tua ahiciang khuapite le na tuute atu in doituamte na vawt vun, ahihang na kamciamsa uh bangin vawt vun!” ci in zo hi." 
Numbers32:25 Gad le Reuben mite in, “Topa awng, nong thupiakna bangin ka seam tu uh hi." 
Numbers32:26 Ka zite, ka tate, ka khui le ka tuute hi lai Gilead khuapite ah ka nusia tu uh hi." 
Numbers32:27 Ahizong kote theampo Topa thupiakna nuai ah ngalsim tu in ka kinging uh hi. Nangma ci bangin kote Jordan kaantan in ngal ka sim tu uh hi.” ci uh hi. 
Numbers32:28 Tua ahiciang Moses in Eleazar, Joshua le Israel lampui dangte tungah hi bang thupia hi:" 
Numbers32:28 Tua ahiciang Moses in Eleazar, Joshua le Israel lampui dangte tungah hi bang thupia hi:" 
Numbers32:29 “Gad le Reuben mite in Jordan kaantan in Topa thupiakna taw ngalsim tu in kinging a, amate huna taw note in ngam na la zo uh le, Gilead ngam sia amate atu in pia vun." 
Numbers32:30 Ahizong amate in Jordan kan ngawlin, ngal hong simpui buale, noma bangin Canaan ngam ah amate ii tel nga tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers32:31 Gad le Reuben mite in, “Topa awng, Topa thupiak bangin ka seam tu uh hi." 
Numbers32:32 Kote in hi lai Jordan nisuana mun ka neisa ka nga kik thei natu uh in ama thupiakna nuai ah Canaan ngam kaantan in ngal ka sim tu uh hi,” ci in zo uh hi." 
Numbers32:33 Tua ahiciang, Moses in Amor Kumpi Sihon, le Bashan Kumpi Og ngam theampo le a kiim a paam khua le ngamte Gad le Reuben namte tung le Manasseh ii nam a khenlang tungah ngam khen hi." 
Numbers32:34 Gad namte in a ki uumcip khuapite ahi Dibon, Ataroth, Aroer," 
Numbers32:35 Atroth Shophan, Jazer, Jogbehah," 
Numbers32:36 Beth Nimrah le Beth Haran khuate luphung ciang kik uh hi. 
Numbers32:37 Reuben namte in Heshbon, Elealeh, Kiriathaim," 
Numbers32:38 Nebo, Baal Meon (Hi min sia kilaih zo), le Sibmah khuate sa kik uh hi. Amate in a sakkik uh khuate minthak pia uh hi." 
Numbers32:39 Manasseh tapa Machir bee le phung in Gilead ngam simin a laak zawkciang tua ngam ah a teang Amor te hawlkeak uh hi. 
Numbers32:40 Tua ahiciang Moses in Gilead ngam sia Machir bee le phungte pia a, tualai ah amate teang uh hi." 
Numbers32:41 Manasseh nam Jair in khuano pawlkhat simin la a, “Jair Khuanote” ci in a min vaw hi." 
Numbers32:42 Nobah in Kenath le a kiim a khuanote simin la a, ama min tapin Nobah ci in min phuak kik hi." 
Numbers33:1 Moses le Aaron lampuina taw Israel te, Egypt ngam pan amate nam tek ii lampuina nuai ah a pusua zawk uh ciang a ngiaphual saatna mun minte sia a nuai a bang ahi hi." 
Numbers33:2 Topa thupiakna bangin, Moses in ngiaphual a saat simin a mun min veu ciamtee hi." 
Numbers33:3 Paisan Poai masabel a zing ciang, tua kum tha masabel ni sawm le ni nga ni in Israel mite in Egypt ngam nusia uh hi. Topa kepna taw amate Rameses khuapi pan in" 
Numbers33:4 Topa ii a thalup a tapaciilte phumin a om Egypt mite mu tangin amate in paisan uh hi. Hi bangin a sepna taw Topa in Egypt pathiante sangin vaanglian zaw a hina lak hi. 
Numbers33:5 Israel mite Rameses nusia in Sukkoth ah ngiaphual saat uh hi. 
Numbers33:6 A ngiaphual kik sia sennealngammong Etham ah saat uh hi. 
Numbers33:7 Tua mun pan amate, Baal Zephon nisuana, Pi Hahiroth ah heak kikin Migdol nai ah ngiaphual saat uh hi." 
Numbers33:8 Amate Pi Hahiroth nusia in, San Tuipi kaantan in Shur sennealngamsung theng uh hi; ni thum sung a pai zawk uh ciang Marah ah ngiaphual saat uh hi." 
Numbers33:9 Tua mun pan Elim ah pai in ngiaphual saat uh hi, banghang ziam cile tualai ah ciktui sawm le nii le palm kung 70 om hi." 
Numbers33:10 Amate Elim nusia in, Suez Tuipidok paam ah ngiaphual saat uh hi." 
Numbers33:11 A ngiaphual kik sia Sin sennealngam sungah saat uh hi. 
Numbers33:12 Tuaciang Dophkah ah ngiaphual saatin," 
Numbers33:13 tua zawkciang Alush ah saat uh hi. 
Numbers33:14 A ngiaphual kik sia Rephidim hi a, tualai ah amate neak tu tui om ngawl hi."

Numbers34:3 Thangsang ngamngi sia Zin duisung pan kipan tu a, Edom ngamngi dung zui in pai tu hi. Nisuana sang ngamngi sia Tuipi Thi thangsang mong pan kipan tu hi." 
Numbers34:4 Tuaciang thangsang zuan in Akrabbim Mualciangh sangah kotin Zin kaantan suak tu a, thangsang Kadesh Barnea dong kipee hi. Tuaciang nitumna saksang zuan in Hazar Addar ah paito a, Azmon dong hi tu hi,"

Numbers34:8 tua mun pan Hamath Mualciangh dong hi tu hi. Tuasia Zedad le 
Numbers34:9 Ziphron dong paisuak in Hazar Enan ah tawp tu hi. 
Numbers34:10 “Nisuana sang ngamngi sia Hazar Enan pan Shepham dong kithung tu hi.

Numbers35:1 Jericho khua pan Jordan ngun ngalkhat Moab zaangtam ah Topa in Moses tungah," 
Numbers35:2 “Israel te ii a nga a neisate sung pan Levi te teen natu in khuapi pawlkhat le a khuapite kiimkot ah ngan tha natu leitang a piak nanak tu in son in. 
Numbers35:3 Hi khuapite Levi te neisa hi tu a, tua munah amate teang tu uh hi. Tua nganthana mun sia a khui le a nganno dangte theampo atu hi tu hi." 
Numbers35:4 Nganthana mun sia khuapi luphungte pan a kiimkot metre 450 veu zai tu hi," 
Numbers35:5 Tua hile ngantha natu sia khuapi kiimkot teng hi a, a pangh kikim kiing li nei, a pangh khat metre 900 veu zai tu a, a laizang ah khuapi om tu hi." 
Numbers35:6 Levi te tungah bukna khuapi luk na pia tu uh a, mi khat pawpo in mihing khat a that tha le a buk natu hi tu hi. Tuasia belapna in a dang khuapi sawmli le nii zongh a nganthana taw kop in amate pia thua vun," 
Numbers35:7 a vekpi in sawmli le liat hi. 
Numbers35:8 A nam khat sim ii sungah Levi te ii khuapi phaza tu sia, a ngam letna taw kizui in kikhensat tu hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers35:9 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Numbers35:10 Israel mite a sonsawn tu in thupia a: “Jordan Ngun kaanin Canaan ngamsung na tum uh ciang," 
Numbers35:11 ngaisut khol ngawlin mi khat in ngual a that tha le ama suatak thei natu in a buk natu khuapite teal tu nu hi. 
Numbers35:12 Tua munah mithi pa mealheak a phula nuam sia ii khut sung pan suakta tu hi. Mihing that hi ci in a kimawsak pa sia mipi mai ah thu a kikhensat mateng kithat ngawl tu hi. 
Numbers35:13 Khuapi luk," 
Numbers35:14 Jordan nisuana sangah thum le Canaan ngam sungah thum teal vun. 
Numbers35:15 Hi khuapi luk te sia Israel mite le tawmvei sung ahizong a tawntung ahizong a teang ngamdangmite atu in bukna hi tu hi. Ngaisut khol ngawlin mi khat a that tha pawpo in tua khuapi khat pawpo zuan thei tu hi. 
Numbers35:16 “Ahihang mihing khat in thik, suang ahibuale moltawng zanghin ngual khat a that le, ama sia mihing that mawna nei a kithatlum tu hi." 
Numbers35:17  
Numbers35:18  
Numbers35:19 Thalup a thuak pa ii a mealheak kinai puibel sia in tua mi that pa a thalup tu vaipuak nei hi. Tua mi that pa a mu po ciang ama in that tu hi. 
Numbers35:20 “Mihing khat in ngual khat ngaimaw in sawnvawk ahibuale bang khat po taw deangin," 
Numbers35:21 ahibuale a khuttum taw thongin a that le ama sia mihing that mawna nei a, kithatlum tu hi. Thalup a thuakpa ii a mealheak kinaipuibel sia in mi that pa a thalup tu vaipuak nei hi. Tua pa a mu ciang ama in that tu hi." 
Numbers35:22 “Ahizong sonteena in mihing khat in a ngaimawk ngawl ngual khat po sawnvawk a, ahibuale bang khat po taw deang in that tha hi." 
Numbers35:23 Ahibuale a liamsua nuam hi ngawl, a ngal zongh hi ngawl napi khua en ngawlin a suang den khat taw midang khat kha in that tha hi." 
Numbers35:24 Tuabang thute ah taangpite in a thi sia ii bee pa, a phula nuam sia pa panpui ngawlin mihing a thisak pa panpui in thukhen tu hi." 
Numbers35:25 Taangpite in mihing that mawna nei pa sia, mithi pa beete kung pan ama suatakna a bukna khuapi ah heak kiksak tu hi. Thiampi Lianbelpa ii thi dong tualai a bukna khuapi ah ama teang nanak tu hi." 
Numbers35:26 Mihing that mawna nei pa sia a suatakna a bukna khuapi nusia a," 
Numbers35:27 tuaciang mithi pa ii beepa in mu in a thatlum le hi phulaakna sia mi that hi ngawl hi. 
Numbers35:28 Mihing that mawna nei pa sia a bukna khuapi ah Thiampi Lianbelpa thi dong teang hamtang lai tu a, ahizong tuasia zawkciang cia thei tu hi." 
Numbers35:29 Hi ngeinate na teenna mun po ah nangma le na suan na paalte ii zui tu ahi hi. 
Numbers35:30 “Mihing that in, a kimawsiat pa sia a mu tetti nii, ahibuale tetti a tamzaw a om ciang bekin mawnei hi ci in kithatlum thei bek tu hi: tetti khat bek sia mi that hi ci in kimawsiat natu in kicing ngawl hi." 
Numbers35:31 Mihing that pa sia kithatlum tu hi. Ama mawna daan pan a suatak natu in sum taw kitan thei ngawl tu hi. 
Numbers35:32 Bukna khuapi ah tai in a buu sa khat sia Thiampi Lianbelpa thi ma in, inn ah a ciakik natu in kitansak heak vun." 
Numbers35:33 Na kitansak uh le na teenna ngam le lei a ninsak hi tu nu hi. Mihing thalupna in ngam le lei ninsak a, biakna taw kisai in mihing khat kithalupna mun thiansua natu in mi that sia pa ii a thi tu ngawl buang thudang om ngawl hi." 
Numbers35:34 Na teenna ngam le lei ninsak heak vun, banghang ziam cile Keima in Topa ka hi a, Israel mite sungah ka teang hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers36:1 Joseph ii tapa ahi Manasseh ii tupa, Machir ii tapa le Gilead bee le phung sung innkuan lutang teng sia, Moses le lampui dangte kungah pai hi." 
Numbers36:2 Amate in, “ Topa in ngam le lei Israel mite tungah lai meetang sawk a hawmsak tu in note thu hong pia hi. Ama in no tungah ka suapuipa uh Zelophehad ii neisa teng a tanute piak natu in thu hong pia si hi." 
Numbers36:3 Ahizong a tanute in nam dang taw a kiteang le, a neisate tua nam dangte neisa suak tu a, ko ii nga tu theampo kikhiam tu ahi sia phawk vun." 
Numbers36:4 Kipiak kikna Jubilee kumin, a kizuaksa theampo a nei ciilte tungah a kipiak kik ciang, Zelophehad tanute neisa sia a teenna nam ii neisa belapna hi paisuak tu a, ko nam ii supna hi tu hi,” ci uh hi." 
Numbers36:5 Tua ahiciang Moses in Israel mite tungah Topa ii Thupiak om bangin thupia sawn hi. Ama in, “Manasseh namte ii a ci teng maan hi." 
Numbers36:6 Tua ahiciang Topa in Zelophehad tanute in a dei po teenpui thei tu hi, ahizong amate nam sung pan bek hi tu hi, ci hi." 
Numbers36:7 Israel mi peuma ii neisate ama ii nam sungah kip tu hi. 
Numbers36:8 Israel nam khat sungah ngamhlua numei peuma in tua nam sung pan pasal khat teenpui hamtang tu hi. Tu a bangin Israel mikim in a taanghpupite neisa teng lua tu a," 
Numbers36:9 nei le lam sia minam khat pan nam dang khat tung theng ngawl tu hi. A neisate a nam tek in neisuak tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Numbers36:10 Tua ahiciang Zelophehad tanute, Mahlah, Tirzah, Hoglah, Milcah le Noah te in Moses tungah Topa thupiak bangin a suapui sealhte teenpui uh hi." 
Numbers36:11  
Numbers36:12 Amate in Joseph tapa Manasseh nam ii bee le phungte taw kiteang uh a, a neisate a pa ii nam sungah kip hi." 
Numbers36:13 Hite sia Jericho khua pan Jordan Ngun ngalkhat Moab zaangtam ah Topa ii Moses tungtawnin a piak Israel mite zui tu ngeinate ahi hi. 
Deuteronomy1:1 Hi thubu sung a thute sia Israel mite Jordan ngun nisuana sang duisung ah a om laitak Moses ii amate tungah a pau kammalte ahi hi. Amate sia Suph khua nai Jordan Kuam sung a langkhat ah Paran khua, a langkhat ah Tophel, Laban, Hazeroth le Dizahab khuate kilaklaw ah om hi." 
Deuteronomy1:2 (Sinai Mual pan Kadesh Barnea sia Edom mualtung ngam paina lam zui leang ni sawm le ni khat kipai hi.) 
Deuteronomy1:3 Egypt pan a pusua zawk a kum sawmli kum, a tha sawm le khatna a ni khat ni in Topa ii amate tungah son a, a sawl theampo Moses in mipite tungah son hi." 
Deuteronomy1:4 Hi thu a son sia Topa in Heshbon khua a uk, Amor Kumpi Sihon, Ashtaroth le Edrei khua teng a uk Bashan Kumpipa Og, a zaw zawkciang ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy1:5 Jordan ngun nisuana Moab ngam sungah a om uh sungin Moses in Pathian ii thukhamte le hilciannate sonthiang tu in kipan hi. Ama in," 
Deuteronomy1:6 “Sinai Mual ah ih om lai, Topa ih Pathian in eite tungah, ‘Hi mual ah khuangei ma om zo nu hi." 
Deuteronomy1:7 Ngiabuk phelin kikhiin vun. Amor mualtung ngam le a kiimkot ngamkuamte theampo — Jordan Kuam, mualtung ngam le a lei niamnate, thangsang ngamkuam le Mediterranean tuipi vaal dongin pai tavun. Canaan ngam le Lebanon Mualte langkhat kalh in Euphrates Ngun lian dong pai tavun." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Hi ngam theampo sia Keima Topa in na taanghpupite Abraham, Isaac le Jacob te le a suan a paalte tungah piak tu in ka kamciam ahi hi. Tuasia pai in la tavun’ hong ci hi,” ci hi." 
Deuteronomy1:9 Moses in mipite tungah, “Sinai Mual ah ih om lai in note kong son zo a, ‘Note lam kong pui tu vaipuak sia kei atu in haksa lei hi. Kei nguak in ka seam zo buatu hi." 
Deuteronomy1:10 Topa na Pathian in note van ah aksi za in hong tamsak hi. 
Deuteronomy1:11 Na taanghpupite ii Pathian Topa in hong kamciam bangin note a tulkhatvei in hong khangsak hen a, hong nuamsasak tahen!" 
Deuteronomy1:12 Ahizong kei nguak in no thu kisik ngawlnate thukhen tu in vaipuak lian sia bangbang pua zo thong tu khi ziam? 
Deuteronomy1:13 Na nam uh sim pan a pil a ciim, thu he, a son a hawm ngeite pawl khat teal vun a, note hong uk tu in amate ka koi tu hi,’ kong ci hi." 
Deuteronomy1:14 Hi sia sep tu in a pha khat hi, ci in na lung uh kim hi." 
Deuteronomy1:15 Tua ahiciang na nam uh pan na tealsa a pil a ciim le a hawm a son ngei lampuite in kong uksak hi. Pawlkhat in mihing tulkhat, pawlkhat in zakhat, pawlkhat in sawmnga le pawlkhat in sawm uk tu in vaipuak ka pia hi. Minamte sung pan a dang lampuite zongh panmun ka pia hi." 
Deuteronomy1:16 “Tualai in amate tungah, ‘Na mite sung pan thu kisik ngawl na thu hong sonnate pha tak ngaisak vun a, na mite bek ahizong, note sungah a teang nam dangte a kihel zong pha takin thukhen vun." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Thukhenna te ah nguptuam paaituam nei heak vun; akua akua ahizong a vekpi a kibangin khensak vun. Kuama kiita heak vun, banghang ziam cile na thukhenna te sia Pathian kung pan hong pai hi. Thu khat pawpo note atu in a haksa lei le, hong paipui tavun a, keima ka khen tu hi,’ kong ci sa ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy1:18 Tua hun laitak ma in, na nasep tu dangte theampo atu kong hil siat zo hi." 
Deuteronomy1:19 “Eite in Topa ih Pathian hong thupiak bangin ih seam hi. Sinai Mual nusia in tua a zai, a lauhuai sennealngam kaantan in Amor ngam mualtung ngam lampi tawn in ih pai hi. Kadesh Barnea ih thet ciang," 
Deuteronomy1:20 Keima in, ‘Tu in ih taanghpupite ii Pathian, Topa ih Pathian ii eite hong piaksa Amor mualtung ngam theng zo nu hi. En vun, zia lai hi. Ama thupiak bangin pai in la vun. Haisaang heak vun, lau heak vun,’ kong ci hi." 
Deuteronomy1:21  
Deuteronomy1:22 “Ahizong note ka kungah hong pai in, ‘Ih mai ah thudawpkute ngamvil in pai masa sak tawng, tua hile amate in ih zui tu lampi phabel le khuapite omzia hong son thei tu hi,’ nong ci uh hi." 
Deuteronomy1:23 “Tuasia pha tuak sa ka hikom nam sim pan khat tek mihing sawm le nii ka teal hi. 
Deuteronomy1:24 Amate Eshcol Kuam dong mualtung ngam sungah paito in ngam vil uh hi. 
Deuteronomy1:25 Amate in tualai ah a mu thingnga pawlkhat hong ciapui kik a Topa ih Pathian hong piak ngam sia lei pha mama hi, hong ci uh hi." 
Deuteronomy1:26 “Ahizong Topa na Pathian ii thupiak sia na langpan uh a, tua ngam sungah na tum buatu uh hi."
