Deuteronomy1:27 Note phun teaptuup in khat le khat tung ah: ‘ Topa in eite hong ensan hi. Hi Amor te ii hong thalup thei tu in ama in Amor te khut sungah aap tu in Egypt pan hong paipui hi. 
Deuteronomy1:28 Banghang tua munah pai tu hi ziam? Ih lau hi. Thu dawp a ih paisakte in tua munah a teang mihingte ei sangin hat zaw, saang zaw a, van banin a ki uum khuapite sungah teang hi, ci in hong son hi. Amate in tualai ah mi thatang liante mu hi!’ na kici uh hi." 
Deuteronomy1:29 “Ahizong keima in, ‘Tua mihingte kiita heak vun." 
Deuteronomy1:30 Topa na Pathian in no lam hong pui tu a, Egypt le sennealngam ah a vawt na mu uh bangin, noma atu ngal hong simsak tu hi." 
Deuteronomy1:31 A pa in a tapa a toai bangin, hi ciang dong lam tawntung ah bit takin hong paipuina thu na mu uh hi,’ kong ci hi." 
Deuteronomy1:32 Ahizong hi bangza in kong ci kawm pan note in Topa sia 
Deuteronomy1:33 na mai ah pai masa in ngiaphual tu mun hong zonsak tawntung hi napi na muang bualai uh hi. Na pai natu lam hong lak tu in zanin meikhuam sung, sunin meeikhuam sung noma mai ah pai hi." 
Deuteronomy1:34 “ Topa sia na phunna uh a zaak ciang thin uukin, kiciam in," 
Deuteronomy1:35 ‘Hi khang ngilo sia sung pan note khat zongh, na taanghpupite tung piak tu a ka kamciamsa lei phana ngam na tum buatu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy1:36 Jephunneh ii tapa Caleb bek tum tu hi. Ama in kei tungah hong thumaan top a, ama le a suan a paalte ama vilsa ngam ka pia tu hi,’ ci hi." 
Deuteronomy1:37 Note hangin Topa kei tung zongh ah hong thin uuk a, ama in ‘Moses awng, nang ngawngawn tua ngamsung tum ngawl tu ni hi." 
Deuteronomy1:38 Ahihang nang hong hu khutdawn pa Nun ii tapa Joshua a thin khensatna a kho natu in hanthawn in. Ama in Canaan ngam a la tu in Israel te lampui tu hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Deuteronomy1:38 Ahihang nang hong hu khutdawn pa Nun ii tapa Joshua a thin khensatna a kho natu in hanthawn in. Ama in Canaan ngam a la tu in Israel te lampui tu hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Deuteronomy1:39 “Tua zawkciang Topa in eite theampo tungah, ‘Moi lei lai ahiciang a pha le a sia a he ngawl lai na tate — ngalte in man tu na ci uh na tate teng, tua ngam ah tum tu hi. Amate tungah tua ngam ka pia tu a, amate in la tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy1:40 Ahizong note heak kikin Aqaba Tuipidok sang lampi tawn in sennealngamsung zuan kik tavun,’ hong ci hi." 
Deuteronomy1:41 “Note in, ‘Moses awng, kote Topa tungah maw zo khu hi. Ahizong tu in Topa ih Pathian hong thupiak bangin sim tu khu hi,’ ci in nong zo kik uh hi. Tuasia ciang tua mualtung ngam sim zawk tu sia ol tu ngaisunin, mi sim ngalsim tu in na kithoai uh hi." 
Deuteronomy1:42 “Ahizong Topa in kei tungah ‘Ngal a sim ngawl natu kidawmsak in banghang ziam cile amate ka ompui buatu a, a ngalte in zo tu hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Deuteronomy1:43 Topa hong ci bang kong son hi, ahizong nong nangai bua uh hi. Ama leedo in kiphatsakna taw mualtung ngam sungah na kuan uh hi." 
Deuteronomy1:44 Tuasia ciang tua mualte tungah a teang Amor te in khuaihon bangin note hong uum hi. Amate in note Hormah dong hong del a, Edom mualtung ngam ah hong zo hi." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Tuasia ciang Topa tungah kapin huna na ngen uh a, ahizong ama in hong nangai ngawlin, hong awlmawk ngawl hi." 
Deuteronomy1:46 “Tuabangin Kadesh ah ngei hialma ih om zawkciang," 
Deuteronomy2:1 a khakbel ciang, Topa thupiak bangin heak kikin Aqaba Tuipidok sang lampi tawnin sennealngam ah ih pai a, Edom mual tung ngam ah ngei hialma ih vakthap hi." 
Deuteronomy2:2 “Tuasia ciang Topa in kei tungah 
Deuteronomy2:3 tua mual teng ah khuangei ma vak zo ih hi ciang, saksang ah paito in, hong sawl hi." 
Deuteronomy2:4 Ama in a nuai a hilnate note tungah son tu in keima hong sawl a: ‘Na bee dawnte ma ahi Esau ii suan le paalte ngam, Edom mualtung ngam kaantan in na pai tu uh hi. Amate in no hong kiita tu uh a," 
Deuteronomy2:5 ahizong amate sim tu in kipan heak vun, banghang ziam cile a ngam metre khat zongh kong pia buatu hi. Edom ngam sia Esau ii suan le paalte ka piaksa ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy2:6 Amate tung pan an le tui lei thei tu nu hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Deuteronomy2:7 “ Topa na Pathian in na sepna theampo ah thupha hong pia a hina thu phawk tavun. Hi zata a zai sennealngam kaantan in na vakkot sung uh theampo ama in hong keam hi. Ama in hi kum sawmli sung tawntung note hong ompui a, na kisap theampo na nga zo uh hi." 
Deuteronomy2:8 “Tua zawkciang Elath le Eziongeber khuate pan Tuipi Thi sang paina lampi pan lampial in nisuana saksang Moab ngam sang ih zuan hi. 
Deuteronomy2:9 Topa in kei tungah, ‘Lot ii suan le paalte ahi Moab mite ngim pia heak vun a, ngal phuangin langpan heak vun. Amate tungah Ar khuapi ka pia zo a, a ngam bangma note kong pia buatu hi,’ hong ci hi,” ci hi. (" 
Deuteronomy2:10 Ar khuapi ah Emim a kici mihing thahat thatang lian nam khat teang ngei hi. Amate sia a tha lian nam dang ahi Anakim te bangin a tun uh saang hi. 
Deuteronomy2:11 Anakim te bangma in amate sia Rephaim zongh kici a; ahizong Moab te in amate Emim ci uh hi. 
Deuteronomy2:12 Edom ngam sungah Hor te teang ngei ahihang Esau suan le paalte in amate notkeak in a minam lalcipsak a, tua munah amate teang uh hi. Israel te in Topa ii a piakna ngam pan a ngalte nungsang ciang a nawkeak bangma ahi hi.)" 
Deuteronomy2:13 “Tuaciang Topa ii eite hong sawl bangin Zered Ngun ih kaantan hi. 
Deuteronomy2:14 Hisia hunin Kadesh Barnea ih nusiat zawk kum sawmthum le kum liat pha hi. Topa in thi siat tu hi a ci bangma in tua khang sungah ngalsim thei pasal theampo thi siat zo hi. 
Deuteronomy2:15 Amate a mot siat mateng Topa in langpan top hi. 
Deuteronomy2:16 “Amate a thi siat zawkciang," 
Deuteronomy2:17 Topa in eite tungah," 
Deuteronomy2:18 ‘Tuni in Ar lampi tawnin Moab ngam kaantan vun. 
Deuteronomy2:19 Tuasia ciang note in Lot ii suan le paalte ahi Ammon te ii ngam nai na theng tu uh hi. Amate ngim pia heak vun, amate tungah ngal zongh phuang heak vun, banghang ziam cile amate ka piaksa ngam bangma note kong pia buatu hi’ hong ci hi,” ci hi. (" 
Deuteronomy2:20 Hi ngam sia tualai ah a teang ngei mite ii min vaw in Rephaim ngam zongh kici hi; Ammon te in Zamzummim ci uh hi. 
Deuteronomy2:21 Amate sia Anakim te bangin a tun saang hi. Amate tam mama a, a thahat nam ahi hi. Ahizong Topa in amate mon siat a, tua hu in Ammon te in a ngam la in teang uh hi." 
Deuteronomy2:22 Tuabang ma in Edom mualtung ngam ah a teang Esau suan le paal ahi Edom te tungah Topa in vawt hi. Ama in Hor te mon a Edom te in a ngam la in tualai ah tuni dongin teang lai uh hi. 
Deuteronomy2:23 Crete tuikulh mite Mediterranean tuipivaal tengah teang uh hi. Amate in a teang ciil Avvim te mon in thangsang Gaza khuapi dongin a ngam theampo laaksak hi.) 
Deuteronomy2:24 “Moab ngam ih kaantan zawkciang Topa in eite tungah, ‘Tu pan kipan Arnon Ngun kaantan vun. Amor mi Heshbon Kumpipa Sihon sia a ngam taw kopin na khut sungah kong pia khawm hi. Ama simin, a ngam lua tu kipan vun." 
Deuteronomy2:25 Tuni a kipan mun theampo ah mihingte in note hong kiita tu in ka vawt tu hi. Na min uh a kilaw ciang mihing theampo lau in liing tu uh hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Deuteronomy2:26 “Tua zawkciang Kedemoth sennealngam pan Heshbon Kumpipa Sihon tungah a nuai a kilemna thu puakin kamtaite ka paisak hi. 
Deuteronomy2:27 ‘Na ngamsung hong kaantansak ta'n. Ka tot uh lampi pan lampial ngawlin paisuak tu khu hi. 
Deuteronomy2:28 Ka neak tu uh an le tuite a man kong pia tu uh hi. Ka uuk uh sia noma ngam kaantan a," 
Deuteronomy2:29 Topa kote Pathian ii hong piak natu ngam ah a tum tu in Jordan Ngun ka kaantan uh dong na ngamsung hong tawn nuam ka hi bek uh hi. Edom ah a teang Esau suan le paalte le Ar ah a teang Moab te in a ngam uh hong kaantansak hi, ka cisak hi.’" 
Deuteronomy2:30 “Ahizong Kumpipa Sihon in a ngam a kaantan tu uh oai ngawl hi. Ama zo zo a, tu laitak ih omna, ama ngam sia ih laak thei natu in Topa na Pathian in ama a thin sahsakin ngal thin neisak hi." 
Deuteronomy2:31 “Tuasia ciang Topa in kei tungah, ‘En in, Kumpipa Sihon le a ngam sia na mai ah ka cimawsak zo hi; a ngam la in lua in’ hong ci hi." 
Deuteronomy2:32 Sihon sia a mi teng theampo taw Jahaz khua hui ah eite sim tu in hong pai hi," 
Deuteronomy2:33 ahizong Topa ih Pathian in ama sia eite khut sungah hong koi a, a tapate le a mi theampo ih that siat hi." 
Deuteronomy2:34 Tua hun laitak ma in khua theampo la in ih lalcipsak a, pasal, numei, patang ih thatlum siat hi. Khat zongh ih khoaikhe bua hi." 
Deuteronomy2:35 A nganno teng le a khua teng ih laaksak hi. 
Deuteronomy2:36 Topa ih Pathian in Arnon kuam mong ah a om Aroer khua pan kipan khua theampo le tua kuam laizang ah a om khuapi, Gilead dong hong zosak hi. A khua uumna luphungte in ei hong nang zo ngawl hi." 
Deuteronomy2:37 Ahihang Topa ih Pathian ii pai ngawl a hong sawlna Ammon ngam nai teng, Jabbok Ngunhui teng, mualtung khuate le mun dang khat pawpo ah ih pai bua hi." 
Deuteronomy3:1 “Tua zawkciang saksang Bashan ngam sang ih manaw a, Edrei khua hui ah eite hong sim tu in Og Kumpipa sia a mi theampo taw hong pai hi." 
Deuteronomy3:2 Ahizong Topa in kei tungah, ‘Ama kiita heak in. Ama, a mi teng le a ngam theampo nang kong pia tu hi. Heshbon a uk Amor Kumpipa Sihon tungah na vawt bangin, ama tungah vawt in,’ hong ci hi." 
Deuteronomy3:3 “Tuabangin Topa in Kumpipa Og le a mite eite khut sungah hong koi a, eite in amate ih thatlum siat hi." 
Deuteronomy3:4 Tua hun laitak ma in eite in a khua theampo ih la siat a — ih laak ngawl khua khat zongh om ngawl hi. A vekpi khuapi 60 eite in ih la a — Bashan Kumpipa Og ukna, Argob ngam buppi ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy3:5 Hi khuate theampo luphung saangte, a kalhna taw a kithua kongpite taw ki uum hi, tuaciang luphung a nei ngawl khuano tam mama zongh om hi." 
Deuteronomy3:6 Khua theampo eite in ih susia siat a, Heshbon Kumpipa Sihon ii khuate ih vawt bangin pasal, nupi le patang theampo ih that siat hi." 
Deuteronomy3:7 A ngannote le khuate eite in ih laaksak hi. 
Deuteronomy3:8 “Tua hun laitak ma in Jordan Ngun ii nisuana sang ngam Arnon Ngun pan Hermon Mual dong, tua Amor kumpi niite khut tung pan eite in ih la hi." 
Deuteronomy3:9 (Sidon te in Hermon Mual sia Sirion ci uh a, Amor te in Senir ci uh hi.)" 
Deuteronomy3:10 Bashan Kumpipa Og ii ngam theampo eite in ih la a: mual zaangtam tungah khuapite, Gilead le Bashan ngamte nisuana sang Salecah le Edrei khuate dong ahi hi,” ci hi. (" 
Deuteronomy3:11 Kumpipa Og sia Rephaim kumpi khakbel ahi hi. Ama ii thaankuang, suang taw kivawt sia a kitee ngeina bang a tee ciang, metre 4 sau in metre 2 dedek zai hi. Tuasia sia Ammon te khuapi Rabbah ah kimu thei lai hi.)" 
Deuteronomy3:12 “Tua ngam eite in ih laak zawkciang Arnon ngun hui ah a om Aroer khua ii saksang ngam le Gilead mualtung ngam khenkhat, a khuate taw in Reuben le Gad namte tungah ka pia hi." 
Deuteronomy3:13 A taanglai Gilead ngam le Bashan ngam buppi, Og ukna ngam buppi, Argob ngam theampo Manasseh minam a langte tungah ka pia hi.” (Bashan sia Rephaim te ii ngam kici hi." 
Deuteronomy3:14 Bashan a kici, Argob ngam buppi sia Geshur le Mascah ngamngi dongin Manasseh nam Jair in la hi. Tua khuanote sia ama min tapsakin minphuak a Jair khuanote kici lai hi.)" 
Deuteronomy3:15 “Manasseh nam Machir bee le phung tungah Gilead ka pia hi. 
Deuteronomy3:16 Gilead khua pan Arnon Ngun dong ngam le lei sia Reuben le Gad namte tungah ka pia hi. Ngunpi laizang sia amate ii thangsang ngamngi hi a, Jabbok Ngun sia a saksang ngamngi hi a, Ammon te ngamngi khen khat zongh ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy3:17 Nitumna sangah a ngam sia Jordan Ngun dong hi a, saksang ah Galilee Tuili, tualai pan thangsang ah Tuipi Thi dong, nisuana sang ah Pisgah Mualpeang dong ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy3:18 “Tua hun laitak ma in amate tungah a nuai a kihilnate ka pia hi: ‘ Topa ih Pathian in Jordan nisuana ngam sia na laak tu uh in no hong pia zo hi. Tu in na ngalkapte ngalhiam pia vun a, a dang Israel namte ii a ngam laak a hu tu in tuate ih mai ah Jordan kan in puak vun." 
Deuteronomy3:19 Na zite, na tate le na nganno teng — nganno tam na nei uh kong he hi — bek kong piakna khuate ah taang tu hi." 
Deuteronomy3:20 Hi lai ah note atu hong vawtsak bangma in Topa ii amate a piak tu Jordan nitumna sang ngam teng a laak mateng le amate tua munah thinnuam takin Topa in a teensak mateng in na Israel mipuite hu vun. Tuasia zawkciang kong piaksa ngam hi munah nong cia kik thei tu uh hi.’ 
Deuteronomy3:21 “Tuaciang keima in Joshua ka hil a: ‘ Topa na Pathian ii kumpi niite ahi, Sihon le Og tungah a vawtna theampo na mu siat zo hi; tuaciang nangma in sim a na laak tu ngam a neite theampo tung zongh ah ama in tuabang ma in vawt tu hi." 
Deuteronomy3:21 “Tuaciang keima in Joshua ka hil a: ‘ Topa na Pathian ii kumpi niite ahi, Sihon le Og tungah a vawtna theampo na mu siat zo hi; tuaciang nangma in sim a na laak tu ngam a neite theampo tung zongh ah ama in tuabang ma in vawt tu hi." 
Deuteronomy3:22 Amate kiita heak in, banghang ziam cile Topa na Pathian in no atu ngal hong simsak tu hi,’ ka ci hi." 
Deuteronomy3:23 “Tua hunlai ma in thintakpi taw thu ka ngen a," 
Deuteronomy3:24 ‘Vaanglianpipa Topa awng, na lian le nalamdang na vawt tu te ii kipatna bek nong lak pheang hunlam ka he hi. Nangma sepna sa bangin nalamdang nasiate a seam thei, vantung ah ahizong leitung ah ahizong pathian om ngawl hi!" 
Deuteronomy3:25 Topa awng, Jordan Ngun hong kaantansak ta'n a, a langkhat lei phana, mualtung ngamhoi le Lebanon Mualte hong musak tan’, ka ci hi." 
Deuteronomy3:26 “Ahizong no mipite hangin Topa in kei tungah hong thin uuk a, ka thungetna hong ngai ngawl hi. Tua sangin ama in kei tungah, ‘Pha zo hi! hi thu son kik nawn heak in!" 
Deuteronomy3:27 Pisgah Mualdawn ah pai in a saksang le a thangsang, nisuana sang le nitumna sang teng va en ta'n. Na mu teng pha tak en in banghang ziam cile Jordan ngun kaantan ngeingawl tu ni hi." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Joshua a pha takin na hil in. Ama tha pia in, a thin khosak in, banghang ziam cile na mu ngam teng a la tu in ama in mipite lampui tu hi,’ hong ci zaw hi." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Joshua a pha takin na hil in. Ama tha pia in, a thin khosak in, banghang ziam cile na mu ngam teng a la tu in ama in mipite lampui tu hi,’ hong ci zaw hi." 
Deuteronomy3:29 “Tuabangin eite Bethpeor khua ngalkhat kuam sungah ih taam hi,” ci hi." 
Deuteronomy4:1 Tuaciang Moses in mipite tungah, “Kong hil thukham theampo zui vun, tua hile na nungta tu uh a, Topa na taanghpupite ii Pathian ii note hong piak tu ngam na la tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy4:2 Ka thupiakte bangma belap heak vun a bangma vawk heak vun. Keima kong piaksa, Topa na Pathian uh ii thu piakte zui vun." 
Deuteronomy4:3 Peor Mual ah Topa nasepte noma mama in na mu uh hi. Ama in tualai ah Baal a bia theampo mon a," 
Deuteronomy4:4 ahizong Topa na Pathian tungah a thumaan note tuni dongin nungta lai nu hi. 
Deuteronomy4:5 “ Topa ka Pathian hong sawl bangin thukham theampo note kong hil zo hi. Na sim tu uh le na laak tu uh ngam ah hi thute zui vun. 
Deuteronomy4:6 Thumaan takin zui vun, tua hile hisia in minam dangte tungah, na ciimna uh lak tu hi. Hi thukhamte theampo a zaak uh ciang, amate in, ‘Hi minam liante sia bangza in ciim a thu he zen ziam?’ ci tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy4:7 “Bang zata minam lian hikale Topa ih Pathian ii ih kitaangsap sim hong nai bangin minam dangte in tuabangin a hu tu pathian khat nei tuan ngawl hi. Ama in hong hu tu in ih ko simin hong zo hi. 
Deuteronomy4:8 Bangzata minam lian hikale kuama in tuni in kong hil thukhamte bangin a maan thukham nei ngawl tu hi. 
Deuteronomy4:9 Na kihuukna in kidawm tavun! Na mit taw na mute na nuntak lai teng mangil peuma heak vun. Na tate le na tute tung na son tu thu khat sia 
Deuteronomy4:10 Sinai mual ah Topa na Pathian ii mai ah noma dingin na om uh ni in hong kison thu hi a, ama in kei tungah, ‘Mipite ka kungah hong khawm tavun. Leitung ah a nuntak laiteng in amate in kei thu hong nit thei natu, a tate tung zongh ah tuabang ma in a hilsawn thei natu in, amate ka son tu te za le ka oai hi,’ ci in hong son thu ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy4:11 “Meikhu vom bangin meisate le van ah meikuang lengto te taw a kituam, tua mualpeang ah pai in, na dindan uh khawngte, na tate tungah son tavun." 
Deuteronomy4:12 Tua mei sung pan Topa in hong paupui ciang, a paunate za a, ahizong ama lim le meal na mu ngawlna thu zongh son tavun." 
Deuteronomy4:13 Ama in note taw thuciamna a vawt sia na kep natu in bang vawt hamtang tu nu ziam ci in hong son hi — tua in suangpheak nii tungah a at Thupiak Sawmte na zui hamtang tu uh ahi hi. 
Deuteronomy4:14 Na sim tu le na laak tu uh ngam ah na zui tu thukham theampo a hil tu in Topa in kei hong sawl hi. 
Deuteronomy4:15 “Sinai Mual meikuang sung pan Topa ii noma hong paupui lai in, a lim a meal na mu bua uh hi. Tua ahiciang noma phattuam natu in," 
Deuteronomy4:16 bangbang lim khat pawpo — pasal ahibuale numei meal 
Deuteronomy4:17 nganhing ahibuale vacim meal," 
Deuteronomy4:18 awmtaal nganhing ahibuale ngasa meal bang milim vawtna taw na maw heak vun. 
Deuteronomy4:19 Note in van ah na mu — ni, tha le aksi te bia tu in hong kitheam thaak ngawl natu uh kidawm tavun. Hite sia Topa na Pathian in midangte theampo tungah a biak tu in pia zo hi." 
Deuteronomy4:20 Ahihang note sia Egypt meikhuk linghna sung pan hong suatak mite na hi uh hi. Tuni na dinmun ahi, ama mihing na sua thei natu uh in note hong pusuapui hi." 
Deuteronomy4:21 Note hangin Topa na Pathian sia kei tungah hong thin uuk a, ama ii note hong piak leipha ngam ah a tum tu in Jordan ngun kaantan ngawl tu ni hi ci in hong thiang son hi." 
Deuteronomy4:22 Kei hi lai ngam ah thi tu khi hi, ngun kaantan ngeingawl tu khi hi, ahizong note in na kaantan dek tak zo uh a, tua leipha ngam la tu in a pai tu na hi uh hi." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Topa na Pathian ii note taw thuciam a vawt sia na mangil peuma heak vun. Noma mama in milim nam peuma na vawt ngawl tu in hong thupiak sia zui tavun," 
Deuteronomy4:24 banghang ziam cile Topa na Pathian sia meikuang khat taw kibang a; a dem dangte dual ngawl hi. 
Deuteronomy4:25 “Tua ngam ah kum tam mama om in, tu le ta na nei uh ciang zong noma atu in bangbang milim khat pawpo vawtna taw na maw heak vun. Hisia in Topa muna ah a sia hi a, ama thin uuksak tu hi." 
Deuteronomy4:26 Ka thu nong ni bua uh ahile hi ngam pan a mangthang pal tu na hina thu note langkhat ah ka tetti tu in tuni in vantung le leitung ka ko hi. Ngam na laak natu Jordan ngalkhat ah khuangei na nungta buatu uh hi. Note hong kimon siat tu hi. 
Deuteronomy4:27 Minam dangte sungah Topa in hong thethaang tu a, no tawm bek na suakta tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy4:28 Note in tualai ah mihingte khut taw a kivawt pathiante, thing le suang taw a kivawt pathiante, khuamu thei ngawl, khuaza thei ngawl, an ne thei ngawl, a nam za thei ngawl pathiante na na seam tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy4:29 Tualai ah Topa na Pathian na zong tu uh a, na thinsung theampo taw na zong uh le na mu tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy4:30 Note ngim thuak in, tua thute no tung hong tun ciang, a khakbel in Topa kungah na heak kik tu uh a, a thu na ni tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy4:31 Ama in hong hesuak thei Pathian ahi hi. Note hong nusia ngawl tu a, hong mon ngawl tu a, na taanghpupite taw a vawt thuciamna mangil ngawl tu hi." 
Deuteronomy4:32 “A bosa hunte, na sua ma hun le leitung ah Pathian ii mihing a piansakna thute kan kik vun. Leitung buppi ah kan vun. Hi bang na lian khat pawpo nidang in piang ngei na ziam? Hi bang thute akua in za ngei ziam?" 
Deuteronomy4:33 Meikuang sung pan pathian ii pauna a zaak zawkciang no bangin, a nungta mihing om ngei na ziam?" 
Deuteronomy4:34 Topa na Pathian in Egypt ah note atu hong vawtsak bangin pathian khat pawpo in minam dangte khut sung pan la in ama mi sua ngam ngei na ziam? Ama in note mitmu in a hatna le a vaangletna hong kilanghsak a; natna le ngal thengsakin, nalamdang laknate le a lamdangte vawt a, a lauhuai nate piangsak hi." 
Deuteronomy4:35 Ama bek Pathian hi a, a dang a om ngawlna thu hi nate taw Topa in hong lak vateak ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy4:36 Ama in thu hong hil thei natu in vantung pan a aw hong zasak a; hi leitung ah ama ii a thiangtho meikuang hong musak in, tua sia pan hong paupui hi." 
Deuteronomy4:37 Na taanghpupite a it manin note hong teal a, a vaangletna taw Egypt ngam pan hong pusuapui hi." 
Deuteronomy4:38 Tu ma zonghin noma neisa ahi, hi ngam sungah hong paipui natu le tua ngam noma hong piak natu in na mainawt kawkawm in ama in note sang a lianzaw le a thahat zaw minamte notkeak hi." 
Deuteronomy4:39 Tua ahiciang vantung le leitung ah Topa sia Pathian a hina thu, tuni in phawk vun a, mangil heak vun: Pathian dang om ngawl hi." 
Deuteronomy4:40 Tuni in kong piaksa ama thukhamte theampo zui tavun, tua hile nangma le na suan na paalte theampo na nuamsa tu uh hi. Topa na Pathian ii a tawntung na lua tu in hong piakna ngam ah na teang top tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Deuteronomy4:41 Tua zawkciang Moses in Jordan Ngun nisuana sangah khuapi thum koituam a," 
Deuteronomy4:42 tua te sia mihing khat in a ngal a hi ngawl khat a thatlum tha le ngammuangin a suatak thei natu khuapite ahi hi. Hi khuapite khat sungah tai thei tu a, ama kithat ngawl tu hi." 
Deuteronomy4:43 Reuben nam atu in senneal mual zaangtam tungah Bezer khuapi om a; Gad nam atu in Gilead ngam sungah Ramoth om a; tuaciang Manasseh nam atu in Bashan ngam ah Golan khuapi om hi. 
Deuteronomy4:44 Moses in Pathian thukham le a hilciannate Israel mite tungah pia hi. 
Deuteronomy4:45 Hi thukhamte sia Egypt pan a pusua zawk, Bethpeor khua ii langkhat Jordan ngun nisuana sang kuam ah a om lai in pia hi. Tua mun sia Heshbon khua a uk Amor Kumpipa Sihon ii ngam sungah om hi. Egypt pan a pusua zawkciang Moses le Israel mite in ama zo uh hi." 
Deuteronomy4:46  
Deuteronomy4:47 Amate in ama ngam le Jordan ngam nisuana ah a teang Amor kumpi dangkhat ahi Bashan Kumpipa Og ii ngam teng laaksak hi. 
Deuteronomy4:48 Tua ngam sia Arnon Ngun hui ah a om Aroer khua pan saksang Sirion Mual ahi Hermon mual dong kipee hi. 
Deuteronomy4:49 Tuate sungah Jordan Ngun nisuana sang theampo, thangsang pan Tuipi Thi dong, le nisuana sang pan Pisgah Mualpeang dong kihel hi." 
Deuteronomy5:1 Moses in Israel mite theampo samin amate tungah, “Israel mite awng, tuni in kong piak thukham theampo ngai vun. Sin vun a, pha tak zui vun." 
Deuteronomy5:2 Topa ih Pathian in Sinai Mual tungah thuciamna khat vawt a," 
Deuteronomy5:3 ih pate bek taw hi ngawlin, tuni in a nungta ei teng taw zong a vawt ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy5:4 Tualai mual tungah meikuang sung pan kimaingat in Topa in note hong paupui hi. 
Deuteronomy5:5 Tua meikuang kiita in mual tungah kaato ngam ngawl na hi uh kom Ama citeng, hong son tu in tua hunin note le Topa kilaklaw ah ka ding hi. “ Topa in," 
Deuteronomy5:6 ‘Keima in Topa na Pathian, na saltanna Egypt pan hong suatakpa ka hi hi." 
Deuteronomy5:7 “ ‘Keima simngawl pathian dang bia heak vun. 
Deuteronomy5:8 “ ‘Vantung ahizong, leitung ahizong leinuai, tui sungah ahizong a om na khat pawpo taw a kibang milim note atu in vawt heak vun." 
Deuteronomy5:9 Milim khat pawpo mai ah kun heak vun, ahibuale bia heak vun, banghang ziam cile keima in Topa na Pathian ka hi a, hong demte ka dual bua hi. Kei hong ngaimawte le amate ii a suan a paalte tungah khang thum khang li dongin daan ka pia tu hi." 
Deuteronomy5:10 Ahizong kei hong it a, ka thukhamte a zuite tungah ka itna khang tul tam mama dongin ka lak hi." 
Deuteronomy5:11 “ ‘Keima min, a sia vawt natu in zangh heak vun, banghang ziam cile keima Topa na Pathian in ka min a zangh khial pawpo daan ka pia tu hi." 
Deuteronomy5:12 “ ‘Keima Topa na Pathian ii kong thupiak bangin Sabbath tang vun a, thiangthosak vun." 
Deuteronomy5:13 Note na na sep natu in ni luk na nei uh a," 
Deuteronomy5:14 ahizong ni sali ni sia kei atu in a kikoituam tawlngak ni ahi hi. Tua ni in kuama — nangma, na tate, na silate, na ngannote na ngamsung hong teang ngamdangmite in naseam ngawl tu uh hi. Nangma tawlngak bangin na silate zongh tawlnga nanak tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Egypt ah sila na hi na le keima Topa na Pathian in ka vaangletna le ka thahatna taw kong suatakna thu ciamtee vun. Tua hu in Sabbath tang tu in thu kong pia hi. 
Deuteronomy5:16 “ ‘Keima Topa na Pathian ii kong thupiak bangin na nu le na pa zakta vun, tua hile na ma vang tu a, kong piak natu ngam ah khuangei mama na nungta tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy5:17 “ ‘Mihing that heak vun. 
Deuteronomy5:18 “ ‘Palngul mawna vawt heak vun. 
Deuteronomy5:19 “ ‘Nguta heak vun. 
Deuteronomy5:20 “ ‘A maan ngawlin khat pawpo mawsiat heak vun. 
Deuteronomy5:21 “ ‘Midang khat ii zi lungngul heak vun, a inn, a lo, a silate, a khui, a laa, ahibuale a neisa khat pawpo lungngul heak vun." 
Deuteronomy5:22 “Hite sia mual tungah na kikhop uh lai in Topa ii note theampo tungah hong piak thupiakte ahi hi. Meikuang sung pan le meeisaa te sung panin ama in a vaanglian aw taw hong paupui a, hi thupiakte hong pia in thudang hong son ngawl hi. Tuaciang ama in tua teng suangpheak nii tungah at in, kei tungah hong pia hi." 
Deuteronomy5:23 “Mualtung bup meikuang a khuazing sung pan aw na zaak uh ciang, na lampuite le na nam lutangte kei kungah hong pai in," 
Deuteronomy5:24 ‘Meikuang sung pan hong paupuina aw ih zaak ciang Topa ih Pathian in ama ii letna le a minthanna hong lak hi! Pathian in mihing khat paupui zo hi napi ama nungta suak thei lai veve ahi hunlam eite in tuni in ih mu zo hi. 
Deuteronomy5:25 Ahizong banghangin thina tu masuan in om kik tu khu ziam? A lauhuai tua meikuang in hong kaanghlum tu hi. Topa ih Pathian hong paupuina aw ih za kik le ih thi takpi tu hi. 
Deuteronomy5:26 A nungta Pathian ii meikuang sung pan a paupuina a zaak zawkciang a nungta mihing om ngei na ziam? 
Deuteronomy5:27 Moses awng, pai kik in a, Topa ih Pathian ii ci theampo ngai in. Tua zawkciang hong heak kikin nang tungah hong ci teng ko hong son ta'n. Kote in hong ngai in kong ni tu uh hi,’ nong ci uh hi." 
Deuteronomy5:28 “Hi thute Topa in a zaak ciang ama in kei tungah, ‘Hi mihingte pauna ka za a, amate maan hi." 
Deuteronomy5:29 Amate in hi bangin phawk tawntung thong le pha hi! Amate le a suan a paalte, a ma vangin a daupai thei tawntung natu in, keima hong zakta tawntungin ka thupiak theampo hong zui pole pha hi." 
Deuteronomy5:30 A buk uh ah a heak kik natu in, pai in va son ta'n." 
Deuteronomy5:31 Ahizong Moses awng, nang sia keima taw hi lai ah om in a, ka thukhamte le thupiakte theampo kong pia tu hi. Ka piak tu ngam sungah hi thute a zui thei natu in tua teng mipite hil in,’ hong ci hi." 
Deuteronomy5:32 “Israel mite awng, Topa na Pathian ii hong thupiak theampo, pha tak zui vun. Ama thukhamte bangma paltan heak vun." 
Deuteronomy5:33 Na laak tu ngam sungah na teen suak thei natu le na nopsak tawntung thei natu in tuate theampo zui tavun. 
Deuteronomy6:1 “Hi thukham theampo note kong hil tu in Topa na Pathian in thu hong pia hi. Note tumin na laak tu uh ngam sungah tua teng zui tavun. 
Deuteronomy6:2 Tua ngam ah khuangeipi na teen thei natu uh in noma nuntak lai teng noma le na suan na paalte in Topa na Pathian zakta in, kong piak a thukham theampo zui vun." 
Deuteronomy6:3 Israel mihingte awng, tuate ngai in zui vun! Tuasia ciang na ma uh vang tu a, ih taanghpupite Topa Pathian ii hong kamciamsa bangin a thahat minam lian na suak tu uh a, tua ngamnuam le lei phana munah na teang tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy6:4 “Israel awng hi thu ciamtee vun! Topa — tuaciang Topa bek — eite Pathian ahi hi. 
Deuteronomy6:5 Topa na Pathian sia na thin theampo, na thaa theampo le na thahatna theampo taw it vun." 
Deuteronomy6:6 Tuni a kong piak hi thupiakte mangil ngei heak vun. 
Deuteronomy6:7 Tua thupiakte na tate hil vun. Inn ah ahizong, a pua sang na paina ah ahizong, na tawlngak ciang le na nasep ciang ahizong tuate hil kik suut kik vun." 
Deuteronomy6:8 Tuate hong phawksak kik tu in na baan ah khit vun a, na talki ah suang vun." 
Deuteronomy6:9 Na innkha khuamte le na kongbiangte tungah at vun. 
Deuteronomy6:10 “ Topa na Pathian in na taanghpupite ahi Abraham, Isaac le Jacob tungah a kamciam bangin ama in note ii saat ahi ngawl a lian a nuamsa khuapite a om ngam khat note hong pia tu hi." 
Deuteronomy6:11 A innte sia noma khol ngawl naphate taw kidim tu a, na taw ngawl uh tuikhukte om in, na ciin ngawl uh sapithuan le olive huante om tu hi. Topa in hi ngam ah hong paipui ciang le na neak nop theampo na nei uh ciang," 
Deuteronomy6:12 sila in na omna Egypt pan hong suatak Topa mangil peuma heak vun. 
Deuteronomy6:13 Topa na Pathian zatak vawtin ama bek bia tavun a, ama min taw bekin kamciamnate vawt tavun." 
Deuteronomy6:14 A dang pathiante le na kiim na paam ah a teang mite ii pathiante khat pawpo bia heak vun. 
Deuteronomy6:15 A dang pathian na bia uh le na tungah Pathian thin uukna meikuang bangin hong theng tu a, hong lalcipsak tu hi, banghang ziam cile note taw a omkhawm Topa na Pathian in a ma a demte dual ngawl hi." 
Deuteronomy6:16 “Massah ah na ze et uh bangin Topa na Pathian ze et heak vun. 
Deuteronomy6:17 Ama ii hong piak thukham theampo pha takin zui vun. 
Deuteronomy6:18 Topa ii maan hi, pha hi, a ci teng seam vun, tua hile na ma uh vang tu hi. Na taanghpupite tungah Topa ii a kamciamsa ngam phana sia na tang thei tu uh a," 
Deuteronomy6:19 ama kamciam bangin na ngalte na notkeak tu uh hi. 
Deuteronomy6:20 “Mailam sangah na tate in, ‘Banghangin Topa ih Pathian in hi thukhamte theampo zui tu in thu hong pia ziam?’ ci in hong dongh tu hi." 
Deuteronomy6:21 Tuasia ciang amate tungah, ‘Eite sia Egypt kumpipa sila ih hi a, Topa in ama ii vaangletna taw hong suatak hi." 
Deuteronomy6:22 Ama in nalamdang lakna te vawt a, Egypt te le a kumpipa, tuaciang a uliante theampo tungah a lauhuai nate a vawt sia ka mittang taw ka mu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy6:23 Ama in ka taanghpupite tungah a kamciam omsa bangin hi ngam hong pia tu le hi lai ah hong paipui tu le hi ngam lua tu in Egypt pan hong suatak hi. 
Deuteronomy6:24 Tua zawkciang Topa ih Pathian in hi thukham theampo zui tu le ama zatak vawt natu in thu hong pia hi. Tuabangin ka vawt uh le ama in ih ngam hong cing tawntung tu a, hong nuamsasak tu hi." 
Deuteronomy6:25 Pathian ii hong thupiak theampo thumaan takin ih zui le ama eite tungah lungkim tu hi,’ ci in son tavun." 
Deuteronomy7:1 “ Topa na Pathian in na laak tu uh ngam ah hong paipui tu a, ama in tua ngam pan minam tam mama notkeak tu hi. Mainawt in na pai uh kawmin ama in note sang a lianzaw le a thahat zaw minam salite ahi: Hit te, Girgash te, Amor te, Canaan te, Periz te, Hiv te le Jebus te notkeak tu hi." 
Deuteronomy7:2 Topa na Pathian in, hi mite na khutnuai ah hong koi a, noma in na zaw uh ciang a vekpi that nanak tu nu hi. Amate taw kipawlna vawt heak vun a, hesuak peuma heak vun." 
Deuteronomy7:3 Amate kuama teenpui heak vun, tuaciang na tate in amate kuama teenpuisak heak vun," 
Deuteronomy7:4 banghang ziam cile tuasia ciang, amate in na tate uh pathian dang a bia tu in, Topa kung pan lam pialpui tu uh hi. Tua bangin a piang le Topa thin uukin thakhat thu noma hong thatlum tu hi." 
Deuteronomy7:5 Tuabang ahiciangin amate ii biaknataute baltham vun, a suangkhuam thiangthote saattham vun, a numeipathian Asherah lim zentham in, a milimte haltum vun." 
Deuteronomy7:6 Hi bang vawt vun, banghang ziam cile note Topa na Pathian neisa hi nu hi. Leitung mi theampo sung pan ama aituam mi in note hong teal hi." 
Deuteronomy7:7 “Midangte sang na tam zawk uh manin Topa in hong it a, hong teal hi ngawl hi; leitung ah minam citawm belte na hi uh hi." 
Deuteronomy7:8 Ahizong Topa in note hong it a, na taanghpupite tungah a kamciam taangtungsak nuam hi. Tua ahikom ama in note a thahatna lian taw hong hun a, Egypt kumpipa sila panin hong suaktasak hi." 
Deuteronomy7:9 Topa na Pathian sia Pathian khat bek ahi hunlam le ama ii thumaanna phawk vun. Ama in a thuciam keamcing tu a, ama a itte le a thupiakte a zui mihingte khang tulkhat dongin a itna kip lak tu hi," 
Deuteronomy7:10 ahizong ama a ngaimaw te daan a piak tu haisaang ngawl tu hi. 
Deuteronomy7:11 Tu ciangin, hong kihilna sate ni tavun a; tuni a kong piak thukham theampo zui tavun." 
Deuteronomy7:12 “Hi thupiakte ngai in, thumaan takin na zui uh le, na taanghpupite tungah a kamciam bangin Topa na Pathian in noma taw a thuciamna keam suak tu a, a itna kip hong lak tu hi." 
Deuteronomy7:13 Ama in hong it in thupha hong pia tu a, pungin ta tam mama na nei tu uh hi; ama in na lote thupha pia tu a, lo ante, sapittui le olive thaute na nei tu uh hi; ama in khuite le tuu tam mama piakna taw thupha hong pia tu hi. Noma hong piak tu in na taanghpupite tungah a kamciamsa ngam le lei ah hi thupha theampo hong pia tu hi." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Note bangin thupha tamzaw a saang hi leitung ah kuama om ngawl tu hi. Note na hi uh zong, na ngannote ahizong taciing om ngawl tu hi." 
Deuteronomy7:15 Topa in natna theampo pan hong dal tu a, Egypt ah na thuak uh a kiitakhuai natnate khat zongh no tungah hong tungsak ngawl tu a, ahizong na ngalte theampo tungah tuate tungsak tu hi." 
Deuteronomy7:16 Topa na Pathian ii na khut sungah hong piak minam theampo mon vun, hesuak heak vun. A pathiante bia heak vun, banghang ziam cile thitheina piang tu nu hi." 
Deuteronomy7:17 “Hi mite ei sang tamzaw a, ih notkeak zo buatu hi ci heak vun." 
Deuteronomy7:18 Amate kiita heak vun; Topa na Pathian in Egypt kumpipa le a mite tungah a vawt thute phawk vun. 
Deuteronomy7:19 Na mittang taw na mu a kiitakhuai natnate, nalamdang lakna te, a lamdangte le Topa na Pathian ii no hong suataksakna, a vaangletna le a thahatna phawk vun. Egypt te a thalup bangma in ama in tu a na kiitak uh hi mihingte theampo mon tu hi." 
Deuteronomy7:20 Ama in amate sungah patauna ngawngawn piangsak tu a, suakta in a buu mihingte zongh mon siat tu hi." 
Deuteronomy7:21 Tua ahiciang hi mite kiita heak vun. Topa na Pathian sia note taw omkhawm hi; ama sia a lian Pathian hi a, ih kiitak tu pa ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy7:22 Mainawt in na pai uh kawmin ama in hi minamte tawtawm, tawtawm in notkeak tu hi. Note in thakhat thu in amate theampo na mon thei buatu uh hi, banghang ziam cile tuabang na hi uh le ngamsate hong tam seseam tu a, note atu in lauhuai vaial tu hi." 
Deuteronomy7:23 Topa in na ngalte na khut sungah hong pia tu a, amate a kilalcipsak siat mateng in amate patausak tu hi." 
Deuteronomy7:24 Ama in a kumpite na khut sungah hong koi tu hi. Na thatlum tu a, amate kimangil tu hi. Kuama in note hong khaktan zo ngawl tu hi; a vekpi na lalcipsak siat tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy7:25 A milimte hal vun. Tua milim tungah a om khamh le ngunnte dei heak vun a, noma atu in la heak vun. Na la uh le note atu in thina piang tu hi, banghang ziam cile, milim biaknate Topa in huatsa hi." 
Deuteronomy7:26 Hi milimte khat zongh na inn ah ciapui heak vun, na ciapui uh le amate tungah haamsiatna sia ma note tungah tung tu hi. Hi milimte zawngsak in na ensan tu uh hi. banghang ziam cile tuate sia Topa haamsiatna nuai ah om hi." 
Deuteronomy8:1 “Note nungta in pungin na khanto thei natu uh le na taanghpupite tungah piak tu a, Topa kamciamna ngam na nga thei natu uh in tuni in kong piak thukham theampo thumaan takin zui vun." 
Deuteronomy8:2 A bosa kum sawmli sung Topa na Pathian in sennealngam hong kaantan pui in, hi khual khuala hong hawsak a, hong thupiakte zui nuam ziam, zui nuam ngawl ziam ci in, na thinsung na ngaisutnate he nuamin haksatna hong tunsaknate phawk vun." 
Deuteronomy8:3 Ama in note hong ngilkialsak a, tua zawkciang noma le taanghpupite neak ngeingawl manna na neak tu in hong pia hi. Hi mihingte in a nuntak natu an bek suang ngawl het tu a, Topa ci theampo suang tu a hina thu hong hil nuamin ama in hi bang hong vawt hi." 
Deuteronomy8:4 Hi kum sawmli sungah na puante siacip ngawl a, na peangte tum ngawl hi." 
Deuteronomy8:5 Pa in a tate a hil a tek bangin Topa na Pathian in hong hilin daan hong piak hunlam phawk vun. 
Deuteronomy8:6 Tuabang ahiciang Topa hong thupiak bangin vawt vun: a thukhamte bangin nungta vun a, zui vun." 
Deuteronomy8:7 Topa na Pathian in leiphana ngam — ngunte le ciktuite, mualtung le leikuam ah a luang leinuai luituite omna ngam;" 
Deuteronomy8:8 zungtaang, mangtaang, sapit, thei, talee, olive le khuaitui te a pianna ngam phana ah hong paipui hi." 
Deuteronomy8:9 Tualai ah na ngilkial ngeingawl tu a, kisapna na nei ngei buatu uh hi. A suangte sungah thik om a, mualte panin taausan na to thei hi." 
Deuteronomy8:10 Na du theampo na nei tu uh a, ngampha hong piakna hangin Pathian tungah lungdam na ko tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy8:11 “ Topa na Pathian na mangil peuma heak vun. Tuni in kong piak a thukham khat zongh khe ngawlin zui vun. 
Deuteronomy8:12 Na du theampo nei a, na teen natu uh innphate na sak uh ciang," 
Deuteronomy8:13 noma khui le tuu, ngunn le khamh, tuaciang a dang na neisa theampo a khanto ciang," 
Deuteronomy8:14 kiphasak heak vun a, na saltanna, Egypt pan hong suatak Topa na Pathian mangil peuma heak vun." 
Deuteronomy8:15 Ama in note sia a ngu nei ngulte le aikamte omna tua a lauhuai sennealngam zai hong kaantan pui hi. Tui om ngawlna, tua lei kona ngam sungah note atu in suangpi sung pan tui luangsak hi." 
Deuteronomy8:16 Sennealngam sungah na taanghpupite ii a neak ngeingawl uh ahi manna sia na neak tu in hong pia hi. Ama in a khak sangah thupha hong piak thei natu in haksatnate taw hong ze et hi. 
Deuteronomy8:17 Tua hi a, noma vaangletna le na thahatna uh taw hau khu hi, ci in ngaisun ngei heak vun." 
Deuteronomy8:18 Na hau natu in vaangletna hong pia pa sia Topa na Pathian a hina thu phawk vun. Ama in hi bangin hong sep sia na taanghpupite taw a vawt thuciam tungah tuni dongin a thumaan laina hang ahi hi. 
Deuteronomy8:19 Topa na Pathian mangil heak vun, pathian dangte bia in a na seam heak vun. Tuabang na hi uh le note hong kithatlum nanak tu a hina thu tuni in kidop natu kong hil hi." 
Deuteronomy8:20 Topa thu na ni bua uh le mainawtin na pai uh kawmin tua na mai hong suak minamte a lalcipsak tu bangma in note hong lalcipsak tu hi. 
Deuteronomy9:1 “Israel mite awng, ngai vun! Tuni in Jordan Ngun na kaantan tu uh a, note sangin a lian zaw le a thahat zaw minamte neisa ngam le lei na la tu uh hi. Amate ii khuapite lian in, a luphungte van ban hi." 
Deuteronomy9:2 Tua mihingte a tun saangin thahat a; a thatang lian a, kuama ii zaw zawk ngawl a ci sia na zaaksa uh ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy9:3 Ahizong tu in Topa na Pathian sia note mama in meikuang bangin na mai ah a pai na mu tu uh hi. Mainawtin na pai uh kawmin, ama hong kamciam bangin, na ngalte na nawkeak tu uh le, manlang takin na mot natu in tua mite hong zawsak tu hi." 
Deuteronomy9:4 “ Topa na Pathian in note atu in amate a nawkeak zawkciang, note ii kilawm manin hi ngam nga tu in hong paipui hi ci heak vun. Note ii kilawm man hi ngawl a, hi mite a siat hu in no atu in Topa in notkeak tu ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy9:5 Na phatna le a maan na sepna uh hangin Topa in amate ngam hong lasak tu hi ngawl hi. Hi mite seksolna hang le na taanghpupite Abraham, Isaac le Jacob tungah a kamciam a taangtutsak nop manin Topa in amate notkeak tu hi." 
Deuteronomy9:6 Note ii kilawm manin Topa in hi ngampha hong pia ahi ngawlna thu telthiang vun. Tuabang hi ngawl hi, note sia mihing thinpuite na hi uh hi." 
Deuteronomy9:7 “Sennealngam ah Topa na Pathian na thin uuksaknate mangil ngei heak vun. Egypt na nusiat ni a kipan, hi lai na thet uh dong ama langpanin na leedo zo uh hi." 
Deuteronomy9:8 Sinai Mual ah zongh Topa a thin na uksak uh a — hong mot siat tu za dongin thin uuk hi. 
Deuteronomy9:9 Topa ii note taw thuciam a vawt sia a ki atna suangpheakte a saang tu in mual tungah ka kaato hi. Tualai ah sun sawmli le zan sawmli ka om a, an le tui ka ne bua hi." 
Deuteronomy9:10 Tuaciang Topa in ama ii khut taw ma a at suangpheak niite hong pia a, tuate sia mual tungah na kikhop uh ni in meikuang sung pan hong son thute ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy9:11 Hi hi, sun sawmli le zan sawmli zawkciang thuciam a atna suangpheak niite Topa in keima hong pia hi." 
Deuteronomy9:12 “Tua zawkciang Topa in kei tungah, ‘Mualtung pan thakhatin tuaksuk in, banghang ziam cile Egypt pan na paipui na mihingte lalthaangin, a sia ngamta uh hi. A sep a vawt tu in ka thupiaknate pan amate lampial zo uh a, amate atu in milim khat vawt zo uh hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Deuteronomy9:13 “ Topa in kei tungah, ‘Hi mihingte thin puizia ka he hi." 
Deuteronomy9:14 Hong khaam heak in. Kuama ii a phawk nawn ngawl natu in amate lalcipsak tu ka sawm hi. Tuasia ciang amate sangin a lian zaw le a thahat zaw minam khat ii pa kong suaksak tu hi,’ hong ci lai hi." 
Deuteronomy9:15 “Tua ahiciang thuciam ki atna suangpheakte nii toai in mualtung pan ka tuaksuk hi. Mualtung panin meikuang hong pai hi. 
Deuteronomy9:16 Topa na Pathian ii hong thupiak sia na zui ngawlna uh le leisung sumpiang khat taw khuitalno milim vawtin Topa tungah na mawna uh kong mu hi. 
Deuteronomy9:17 Tua ahikom, tua mun note mai ah suangpheakte nii lei denna in ka nei a, tamhthamsak khi hi." 
Deuteronomy9:18 Tua zawkciang khatvei ma ni sawmli le zan sawmli sung, anne ngawl tuidawn ngawlin Topa mai lei ah ka bok kik leleau hi. Tuabang ka hina sia Topa tungah maw in a thin na uuksak uh hang ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy9:19 Note hong lalcipsak tu za dongin a thinso ahikom Topa ii thin uuk mama na sia ka kiita hi; ahizong khatvei ma Topa in ka thu hong ngai kik hi. 
Deuteronomy9:20 Topa sia Aaron tung zongh ah thalup tu za dongin thin uuk ahikom Aaron atu zonghin tua hun laitak ma in thu ka ngetsak hi. 
Deuteronomy9:21 Note ii na vawt uh hong mawsak thil — leisung sumpiang taw na vawt uh khuitalno milim — la in mei sung denna ka nei hi. Tuaciang tua milim sia semneen in ka ngoaivui a, a vuite mualtung pan a luang suk lui sungah ka vawk hi." 
Deuteronomy9:22 “ Topa na Pathian sia Taberah, Massah, le Kibroth Hattaavah ah na om lai uh zonghin a thin na uksak uh hi." 
Deuteronomy9:23 Ama hong piak tu ngam sia a la tu in thupiaknate taw Kadesh Barnea pan hong paisak lai in, ama na langpan uh a; a thu um ngawlin na ni bua uh hi." 
Deuteronomy9:24 No kong heak pan kipan Topa na langpan uh hi. 
Deuteronomy9:25 “Ama ii note mot tu a khensat sia he ka hikom, Topa mai ah sun sawmli le zan sawmli sung lei ah ka bok hi." 
Deuteronomy9:26 Tuaciang keima in, ‘Vaanglianpipa Topa awng, na thahatna le na vaangletna taw Egypt pan pusua in, na suatak sa na mite mon heak in." 
Deuteronomy9:27 Na naseam Abraham, Isaac le Jacob te phawk in a, hi mihingte ii thin puina, a seksolna le a mawnate awlmawk heak in." 
Deuteronomy9:28 Tuabang ahi buale amate tungah na kamciam omsa bangin na mite tua ngam ah thetpui zo ngawl hi, Egypt te in hong ci tu hi. Amate na ngaimawk manin na mite thalup tu in sennealngam ah paipui hi, hong ci tu hi." 
Deuteronomy9:29 Bangbang po ahitazong, hi mihingte sia nangma atu na tealsa te hi a, na vaangletna le na thahatna taw Egypt pan na pusuapui mihingte ahi hi,’ ci in thu ka ngen hi." 
Deuteronomy10:1 “Tuasia ciang Topa in kei tungah, ‘A masa a te bangma in suangpheak nii vawt in a, a koi natu thingkuang khat vawt in. Keima kung mual tungah hong kaato ta'n a," 
Deuteronomy10:2 na tapsak suangpheakte tungah ka at tengma tua suangpheakte tungah ka at tu a, tua zawkciang tuate thingkuang sungah na koi tu hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Deuteronomy10:3 “Tua ahiciang acacia thing taw thingkuang khat ka vawt a, a masa lai a sia taw a kibang suangpheak nii vawt in mual tungah ka paipui to hi." 
Deuteronomy10:4 Tuaciang Topa in tua suangpheakte tungah a masa a at kammalte, mualtung na kikhop uh ni in meikuang sung pan note tungah hong son Thupiak Sawmte at hi. Topa in tua suangpheakte kei hong pia a," 
Deuteronomy10:5 tuaciang kiheakin mualtung pan ka tuaksuk hi. Tua zawkciang Topa thupiak bangin ka vawtsa thingkuang sungah tuate ka koi a — tua hun pan kipan tualai ah om hi,” ci hi. (" 
Deuteronomy10:6 Israel te sia Jaakan mite ii tuikhukte pan pai in Moserah zuan uh hi. Tua munah Aaron thi in kivui a, a tapa Eleazar in a thiampi za laih hi." 
Deuteronomy10:7 Tua mun pan amate Gudgodah ah pai uh a, tua mun pan tui tam omna mun Jotbathah theng uh hi." 
Deuteronomy10:8 Mual tungah Topa in Thuciamna Thingkuang a cing tu, thiampi na a seam tu, tuaciang ama min suangin thupha a pia tu in Levi namte nasep pia hi. Hi nasepte tu dongin amate nasep hi lai hi." 
Deuteronomy10:9 Tua ahikom Levi nam in nam dangte nga bangin lo ngam nga ngawl hi; amate ii nga sia Topa na Pathian ii kamciam bangin Topa ii thiampite a hina hamphatna sia ahi hi.) 
Deuteronomy10:10 “A masa lai bangma in mual tungah sun sawmli le zan sawmli ka om hi. Topa in khatvei ka thu hong ngai lai a, note hong mot ngawl tu thukim hi." 
Deuteronomy10:11 Tuasia ciang ama in na taanghpupite tungah piak tu in a kamciamsa ngam le lei na nga thei natu uh note lampui in a pai tu kei hong sawl hi. 
Deuteronomy10:12 “Tu in Israel mite awng, Topa na Pathian ii note tungah hong nget thute pha tak ngai vun: Topa bia vun a, hong thupiak theampo zui vun. Na thin theampo uh taw ama it in, a na seam tavun a," 
Deuteronomy10:13 a thukham theampo zui vun. Note phattuam natu in tuni in tuate kong pia hi. 
Deuteronomy10:14 A saangbel vantungte ngawngawn Topa neisa hi a, leitung le a tung a om na theampo zongh ama ii neisa ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy10:15 Ahizong Topa in na taanghpupite a itna lian mama ahikom midangte taangin note hong teal a, note sia ama tealsa te na hi lai uh hi." 
Deuteronomy10:16 Tua ahiciang tu pan kipan Topa thu ni tavun a, na thinpuisak nawn heak vun." 
Deuteronomy10:17 Topa na Pathian sia pathiante theampo tung le a vaang nei theampo tungah thu neibel hi. Ama lian in thahat a, kiitak tu ahi hi. Ama in nguptuam nei ngawl a, sumnguk saang ngawl hi." 
Deuteronomy10:18 Ama in tangate le meingongte a pha in vawt a, eite sungah a teang ngamdangmite it in, an le puansilhte pia hi." 
Deuteronomy10:19 Tua ahikom tua ngamdangmite tungah itna lak vun, banghang ziam cile note khatvei Egypt ngam ah ngamdangmi ma hi ngei nu hi." 
Deuteronomy10:20 Topa na Pathian ii thu ni in ama bek bia vun. Ama tungah thumaan in ama min bek suangin na kamciamna te vawt vun. 
Deuteronomy10:21 Ama pok vun — ama na Pathian uh hi a, noma atu a vawt a lian le a lamdang nate na mit mama uh taw mu nu hi." 
Deuteronomy10:22 Na taanghpupite Egypt ngam ah a pai lai in mihing sawmsali bek pha hi. Ahizong tu in Topa na Pathian in note van ah aksi bangza in tam mama hong phasak zo hi. 
Deuteronomy11:1 “ Topa na Pathian it vun, a thukham theampo zui tawntung vun." 
Deuteronomy11:2 Topa tung pan na sin sate tungtawnin ama taw kisai na heak thute tuni in phawk vun. Tuabangin a hete sia na tate hi ngawlin, noma na hi uh hi. Topa letna, a vaangletna, a thahatna," 
Deuteronomy11:3 le nalamdang lakna a vawtte mu nu hi. Ama ii Egypt kumpipa tung le a ngamsung theampo ah a nasepna sa te mu nu hi. 
Deuteronomy11:4 Egypt ngalkapte ii hong del lai in Topa in Egypt ngalkaphonpi sia a siphute le a siphu ngalleangte taw San Tuipi sungah tuitaa in a bo siat sakna thu mu nu hi. 
Deuteronomy11:5 Hi mun na thet uh ma in sennealngam sungah Topa in note atu hong sepsaknate na he uh hi. 
Deuteronomy11:6 Reuben nam Eliab ii tapate Dathan le Abiram tungah Topa ii nasepna phawk kik vun. Mihing theampo ii mu in leitang kihong a ama sia a innkuan puite, a puanbukte le a naseamte le a ngannote theampo taw valhtum hi." 
Deuteronomy11:7 Hi hi, Topa ii nasep lian theampo a mute noma nu hi." 
Deuteronomy11:8 “Tuni in kong piak thukham theampo zui vun. Tua hile na tum natu ngam sia ngun kaantan in lua thei tu nu hi. 
Deuteronomy11:9 Tuaciang Topa ii na taanghpupite tung le a suan a paalte tungah piak tu in a ciam ngampha le ngamnuam ah khansau in na nungta tu uh hi. 
Deuteronomy11:10 Noma laak tu ngam sia nidang in na teenna uh Egypt ngam bang hi ngawl hi. Tualai ah thaicii na poai uh ciang lo sungah tui piak natu luam to in haksa takin na na seam uh hi; 
Deuteronomy11:11 ahizong na tum natu ngam sia mualte le leikuamte omna ngam hi a, nguatui nga na ngam ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy11:12 Topa na Pathian in hi ngam keamcing a, kum tawntungin cing hi." 
Deuteronomy11:13 “Tua hi a, tuni in kong thupiakte zui vun; Topa na Pathian sia na thin theampo taw it in, a na seam vun." 
Deuteronomy11:14 Tuabang na hi uh le, Topa in na ngam sungah a kisap ciangin tuuk ngua, khaal ngua hong zusak tu a, note atu in antang, sapittui le olive thaute," 
Deuteronomy11:15 le na ngannote atu in lopa om tu hi. Na du an pawpo na nei tu uh hi. 
Deuteronomy11:16 A dang pathiante biakna le a na sepna taw in Topa kung pan noma le noma lam kipialsak heak vun. 
Deuteronomy11:17 Tuabang na hi uh le no tungah Topa thin uuk tu hi. Ama in nguatui hangsak tu a, leiko leih in an piang ngawl tu hi. Tuaciang Topa in note hong piak ngam le lei sia pha napi tua munah na thi pal tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy11:18 “Hi kong thupiakte na thin le na lung sungah ciamtee vun. Na baan ah sawm tavun a, hong phawksak tu in na tal ah suang vun." 
Deuteronomy11:19 Na tate tungah hil vun. Inn ah na om ciang ahizong na va ciang ahizong, na tawlngak ciang le na nasep ciang ahizong na tate sonpui vun." 
Deuteronomy11:20 Na innkha khuamte tung le na kongbiangte tungah at vun. 
Deuteronomy11:21 Tuasia ciang Topa na Pathian ii na taanghpupite tungah piak tu in a ciamsa ngam sungah noma le na tate, kum tam mama na nungta tu uh hi. Lei ii tungah van a om lai teng tua munah na teang tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy11:22 “No kong piaksa thukham theampo thumaan takin zui vun: Topa na Pathian it vun a, a thupiak theampo seamin, ama tungah thumaan vun." 
Deuteronomy11:23 Tuasia ciang, mainawt in na pai uh kawmin tua minamte theampo ama in notkeak tu a, note sangin a lianzaw le a hatzaw mite ii leitang na la tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy11:24 Na sina lei theampo note neisa hi tu hi. Na ngam zaina uh sia thangsang sennealngam pan saksang Lebanon mual dong, nisuana sang Eupharates ngun dong, nitumna sang Mediterranean tuipi dong hi tu hi." 
Deuteronomy11:25 Tua ngamsung na paina po ah Topa na Pathian ii hong kamciam bangin ama in, mihingte ii kiitak hong hisak tu uh a, kuama in note hong khaam zo buatu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy11:26 “Tuni in note na teal tu in thupha khat le haamsiatna khat kong pia hi — 
Deuteronomy11:27 Tuni in kong piak Topa na Pathian thupiakte na zui uh le thupha khat hi a," 
Deuteronomy11:28 ahizong Topa na Pathian thupiakte zui ngawlin na biak ngeingawl pathian dangte na bia uh le haamsiatna khat ahi hi. 
Deuteronomy11:29 Na laak tu uh ngam sungah Topa in hong paipui ciang, Gerizim Mual pan thupha na thangsak tu uh a, Ebal Mual pan haamsiatna na thangsak tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy11:30 (Hi mualte nii sia Jordan Kuam ah a teang Canaan mite ngamsung Jordan ngun ii nitumna sangah om hi. Tua mualte sia nitumna sangah om a, Gilgal khua nai Moreh thingkung thiangthote taw kikhuala ngawl hi.)" 
Deuteronomy11:31 Topa na Pathian ii hong piakna ngam a lua tu in Jordan ngun na kaantan tu uh hi. Tua ngam la in na teen uh ciang," 
Deuteronomy11:32 tuni in kong piak thukhamte theampo pha takin zui vun. 
Deuteronomy12:1 “Na pu na pate Pathian, Topa ii note hong piak ngam ah na teen hunsung teng na zui tu uh sia hi thukhamte ahi hi. Tuate na ngai vun!" 
Deuteronomy12:2 Na laak tu ngamsung mihingte ii a pathian biakna mun ahi mualsaangte tung, mualnote tung le thingkung hing nuai theampo suksiatsak vun." 
Deuteronomy12:3 A biaknataute baltham vun a, a suangkhuam thiangthote sutham vun. Tua munte ah tuate a kibiak nawn ngawl natu in Asherah numeipathian limte mei taw halin, a milimte semneen vun." 
Deuteronomy12:4 “Hi mihingte ii a pathiante a biak bangin Topa na Pathian bia heak vun. 
Deuteronomy12:5 Topa in noma nam teng ii ngamsung pan mun khat teal tu a, tua mun ama ompuina mai ah a mihingte pai in bia tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy12:6 Tualai ah na biakpiakna theampo, meihal biakpiakna le a dang sangaw biakpiaknate, sawm a khat le na sumpite, Topa tungah na kamciam letsongte, thinzaw biakpiaknate, le na khui le na tuute sung pan a no suakciilte pia vun." 
Deuteronomy12:7 Tua munah note thupha hong pia Topa na Pathian mai ah nangma le na innkuanpuite in an ne in na vawt sa thuphate tungtawnin na lungdam tu uh hi. 
Deuteronomy12:8 “Tua hun hong thet ciang na sep ngei uh bangin na seam nawn bua het tu uh hi, tu ciang dong noma lungkim bang pawpo in na bia uh hi," 
Deuteronomy12:9 banghang ziam cile Topa na Pathian ii hong piakna ngam, nuam takin na teen thei natu uh mun na theng bua lai uh hi." 
Deuteronomy12:10 Jordan ngun na kan uh ciang Topa in tua ngam hong ngasak tu a, tualai ah hong teangsak tu hi. Ama in na ngalte theampo khut sung pan hong keamcing tu a, lungmuangin na teang tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy12:11 Topa in ama a kibiak natu in mun khat tealtuam tu a, kong thupiak bangin tua munah na theampo na puak tu uh hi: tuate in meihal biakpiakna le a dang sangaw biakpiaknate, na sawm a khat le na sumpite le Topa tungah na kamciam a tuam vilvel letsongte ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy12:12 Tua mun Topa mai ah na tate, na naseamte le na khuate sungah a teang Levi te taw lungnuam khawm tavun; Levi te in lo ngam a nei ngawl natu thu phawk tavun." 
Deuteronomy12:13 Na tealna mun pawpo ah sangaw biakpiakna na pia buatu uh hi; 
Deuteronomy12:14 Topa in noma nam khat ii ngam sungah mun khat teal tu a, tua mun bek ah na pia tu uh hi. Tua mun bek ah meihal biakpiakna na pia tu uh a, ka thupiak bangin a dangte theampo na vawt siat tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy12:15 “Ahizong na teenna mun po ah na ngannote ngoin, na ne thei tu uh hi. Topa hong piak zaza na ne thei tu uh hi. Na vekpi in biakna taw kisai a thiangte zongh, a thiang ngawlte zongh in sangai sa le sathak sa na neak uh bangin ne thei nu hi." 
Deuteronomy12:16 Ahizong a chi na ne bua het tu uh a; tuasia lei ah tui sun bangin na sung tu uh hi. 
Deuteronomy12:17 Na teenna munte ah Topa tungah na piak uh nate na ne buatu uh hi: tuate in sawm a khat in na piak antang, sapittui, olive thau, na khui le na tuu a no suakciilte, Topa tungah na kamciam letsongte, thinzaw biakpiaknate, ahibuale a dang biakpiaknate ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy12:18 Nang le na tate in na naseamte le na khuate sungah a teang Levi te taw Topa na Pathian ii tealsa biakna mun, Topa na Pathian ompuina mun bek ah hi biakpiaknate nekhawm tu nu hi. Na nasepna sa theampo hu in tua munah na lungdam tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy12:19 Na ngam sungah na teen uh laiteng Levi te zongh na ngaingon peuma heak vun. 
Deuteronomy12:20 “Ama kamciamsa bangin, Topa na Pathian in na ngam hong keaksak ciang, na du hun pawpo ciang sa na ne thei tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy12:21 Tua biakna mun sia a khuala lei ahile, kong cisa bangin Topa hong piaksa khui ahibuale tuute khat pawpo na uuk hun po ngoin inn ah a sa na ne thei tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy12:22 Sangai sa le sathak sa a neak uh bangin biakna taw kisai a thiang khat zongh, a thiang ngawl khat zongh in tua sa ne thei tu hi." 
Deuteronomy12:23 A sungah chi om lai sate ne heak vun; banghang ziam cile chi sungah nuntakna om a, nuntakna sia sa taw nekhawm peuma heak vun." 
Deuteronomy12:24 Chi sia an in nei heak vun, tui bangin lei ah sung zaw vun." 
Deuteronomy12:25 Hi thupiak na zui uh le Topa lungkim tu a, nangma le na suan na paalte theampo na ma uh vang tu hi." 
Deuteronomy12:26 Na biakpiaknate le Topa na kamciamsa letsongte biakna munah paipui vun. 
Deuteronomy12:27 Topa biaknatau tungah a kihaltum tu in sangaw biakpiaknate tua munah pia vun. A sa na neak tu uh sangaw biakpiakna zongh biaknatau tungah pia vun a, biaknatau tungah a chi sung vun." 
Deuteronomy12:28 No tungah kong thupiak theampo thumaan takin zui vun, tua hile nangma le na suan na paalte a tawntungin na ma uh vang tu hi, banghang ziam cile noma in a maan nate le Topa na Pathian a lungkimsak nate a seam tu na hi uh hi." 
Deuteronomy12:29 “A ngam na sim uh ciang Topa na Pathian in hi minamte mon tu a, a ngam la in na teang tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy12:30 Topa in tua minamte a mot zawkciang a biakna vawtziate na zui ngawl natu uh in kidawm vun, banghang ziam cile tua in thina bona hi tu hi. Amate biak bangin na biak thei natu in a pathian te, a biakna vawtzia te kan sese heak vun." 
Deuteronomy12:31 Amate ii a pathiante a biakzia bangin Topa na Pathian bia heak vun, banghang ziam cile a pathiante a biak uh ciangin Topa ii ngaimawk, a kiihuai nate theampo vawt uh hi. Amate in a tate ngawngawn pia in a biaknataute tungah mei taw hallum uh hi." 
Deuteronomy12:32 “Kong thupiak theampo zui siat vun; khat zongh belap heak vun a khat zongh vawk heak vun. 
Deuteronomy13:1 “Kamsaang khat ahibuale mang khia thei khat in," 
Deuteronomy13:2 nidang in na biak ngeingawl pathiante a bia tu le a naseam tu in hong zolna in nalamdang lakna khat ahibuale a lamdang na khat hong kamciam thei tu hi. Ama hong kamciamte tak suakin a maan hial zong," 
Deuteronomy13:3 ama awlmawk heak vun. Topa sia na thin theampo taw na it takpi ziam ci in hong heak nop manin, Topa na Pathian in tua pa zangh in hong ze et ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy13:4 Topa zui in zatak vawt vun; a thu ni in a thupiakte zui vun. Ama bia in, a tungah thumaan vun." 
Deuteronomy13:5 Ahizong na saltanna Egypt pan hong suatak Topa langpan tu in hong sawl mangkhia theite ahibuale kamsaangte peuma thatlum vun. Tua bang mite sia misia hi a, noma nuntak natu a Topa ii hong thupiak nuntakna sia pan hong pialpui nuam hi. Hi siatna taw na kipeal natu in amate thalup kul tu hi." 
Deuteronomy13:6 “Na suapui, na tapa, na tanu, na it na zi, na lawm phabel te ngawngawn in noma le na taanghpupite ii na biak ngeingawl uh pathian dangte bia tu in hong hanthawn ku thei tu hi." 
Deuteronomy13:7 Amate khat pawpo in na nai a teang mite ii pathiante ahibuale a khualana ah a teang mite pathiante bia tu in hong hanthawn thei tu hi. 
Deuteronomy13:8 Ahizong ama in zolsak heak vun a; a thu zongh ngai heak vun. Khuangaihuai sa in hesuak heak vun a, amate sungsia heak vun." 
Deuteronomy13:9 Amate that vun! Suang taw a deang masabel hi vun a, tua zawkciang midangte theampo zongh in deangsak vun." 
Deuteronomy13:10 Amate suang taw deanglum vun! Na saltanna Egypt pan hong suatak Topa na Pathian kung pan lam hong pialpui nuam hi. 
Deuteronomy13:11 Tua hile Israel mite theampo in thupiang teng za tu a; lau tu uh hi, tuaciang kuama in hi bang a sia ngamta kik nawn ngawl tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy13:12 “ Topa na Pathian hong piak khuate sungah na teen uh ciang," 
Deuteronomy13:13 a masa na biak ngeingawl uh pathiante a bia tu in na minam sung pan mihing ngina ngawl pawlkhat in amate khua puite a lampui khialna thu na za thei tu uh hi. 
Deuteronomy13:14 Tuabang kamleang na za uh le a maan le a maan ngawl kantel vun a; hi bang thu pha ngawl piang takpi ahile," 
Deuteronomy13:15 tua khua mite theampo le a ngannote theampo zongh thatlum siat vun. Tua khua lalcipsak vun. 
Deuteronomy13:16 Tua munah a teang mihingte ii neisa theampo khawmtua in khua laizang khawlmun ah seng vun. Topa na Pathian tungah biakpiakna in tua khua le a sungah a om teng hal siat vun. A tawntungin tua khua sia a lal in kinusia tu a, khua kisaat kik ngei nawn ngawl tu hi." 
Deuteronomy13:17 A kisusia nate sung pan note atu in na khat zongh la heak vun, tuasia ciang Topa thin uukna thai in hong hesuak tu hi. Tuni in kong piak ama thupiakte theampo zui in, a deina bang na seam uh le," 
Deuteronomy13:18 na taanghpupite tungah a kamciamsa bangin note hong hesuak in, note hong pungsak tu hi." 
Deuteronomy14:1 “Note sia Topa na Pathian ii mite na hi uh hi. Tua hi a, mithi na kaa uh ciang midangte ii vawt bangin, na pumpi noma le noma ki at heak vun a, na mai samte meet heak vun." 
Deuteronomy14:2 Topa na Pathian neisa na hi uh a; leitung ah a teang mihing theampo sung pan ama mi tu in hong tealsa na hi uh hi. 
Deuteronomy14:3 “ Topa ii thiang ngawl hi a ci peuma ne heak vun. 
Deuteronomy14:4 Hi nganhingte ne thei tu nu hi: tuate sia khui, tuu, keal," 
Deuteronomy14:5 sangai, ngamtuu, ngamkeal le sathak —" 
Deuteronomy14:6 a peangcin kaa in eakkha zongh a thai nganhing pawpo ahi hi. 
Deuteronomy14:7 Ahizong a peangcin kaa ngawl le eakkha zongh a thai ngawl nganhingte na ne buatu uh hi. Kalaoh, bilpi le ngalhvang te ii sa ne heak vun. Tuate sia eakkha thai ahihang a peangcin kaa ngawl ahikom a thiang ngawlin kingaisun tu hi." 
Deuteronomy14:8 Voksa ne heak vun. Amate peangcin kaa hikale eakkha thai ngawl ahikom a thiang ngawlin kingaisun hi. Hi nganhingte peuma ne heak vun a, a thisate ngawngawn tham heak vun." 
Deuteronomy14:9 “Ngasate sung pan a hawlip le a tha neite na ne thei tu uh a," 
Deuteronomy14:10 ahizong tui sungah a nungta hawlip le tha a nei ngawlte peuma ne heak vun; Tuate sia a thiang ngawlin kingaisun tu hi. 
Deuteronomy14:11 “A thiang vacimte ne thei tu nu hi. 
Deuteronomy14:12 Ahizong a nuai a vacimte ne ngawl tu nu hi: tuate sia muvanlai, simbu, muthi, mupui, mumeikaa, musan, va-ak, kalaoh vacim, tuipiva, hilniang vacimlian, vakaang, tuingumpai, ngun va, vasuangui le bak ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy14:13  
Deuteronomy14:14  
Deuteronomy14:15  
Deuteronomy14:16  
Deuteronomy14:17  
Deuteronomy14:18  
Deuteronomy14:19 “Tha a nei lungno theampo thiang ngawl hi; ne heak vun. 
Deuteronomy14:20 Lungno a thiang pawpo ne thei tu nu hi. 
Deuteronomy14:21 “Ama thu in a thi thawthong nganhing sa ne heak vun. Note sungah a teang ngamdangmite in nesak thei tu nu hi, ahibuale ngamdangmite tungah zuak thei tu nu hi. Ahizong note sia Topa na Pathian neisa na hi uh a; ama mite na hi uh hi. “Tuuno sa ahibuale kealno sa sia a pui noaitui sungah huan heak vun." 
Deuteronomy14:22 “Kum simin na lo pan an a piang theampo ii khen sawm sua khen khat — sawm a khat a tuamin koi vun. 
Deuteronomy14:23 Tua zawkciang Topa na Pathian ii ama biak natu in a tealna munah paipui vun. Tua mun ama mai ah sawm a khat na piak uh antang, sapittui le olive thau, tuaciang tuu le keal no suakciilte ne vun. Topa na Pathian a tawntung na zatak thei natu in tuabangin hi vun." 
Deuteronomy14:24 Topa thupha piak hangin a piang sawm a khat te puak natu in tua biakna mun khat sia na inn pan a khuala lei le, hi bangin vawt vun:" 
Deuteronomy14:25 Tua ante zuakin, a sum teng biakna munah paipui vun." 
Deuteronomy14:26 Na du pawpo — khuisa, tuusa, sapittui, beer lei in tua mun Topa na Pathian mai ah nangma le na innkuanpuite in nuam takin ne in dawn vun." 
Deuteronomy14:27 “Na khuate sungah a teang Levi te en thong heak vun; amate tuamin neisa bangma nei ngawl hi. 
Deuteronomy14:28 Kum thum cin simin na piak uh sawm a khat an teng hong paipui in na khua sung uh ah khol vun. 
Deuteronomy14:29 Hi an sia neisa bangma a nei ngawl Levi te atu le, na khua sungah a teang ngamdangmite, tangate, le meingongte atu ahi hi. Amate hong pai in a kisap bangin la tu hi. Tuabangin vawt vun, tua hile na Topa Pathian in na nasep theampo thupha hong pia tu hi." 
Deuteronomy15:1 “Kum sali a cin simin note tungah sum hong kiba theampo maisak tu nu hi. 
Deuteronomy15:2 Hi bangin vawt tu ahi hi. Israel a mipui khat pawpo tungah sum a puk sia in a sumpuk teng maisak tu hi; leiba siik nawn ngawl tu hi; banghang ziam cile Topa in tua leiba kimaisak zo hi, ci in thangsak zo hi." 
Deuteronomy15:3 Ngamdangmite ii hong batte na siik thei tu uh a, ahizong na mipuite ii hong batte siik ngawl het tu nu hi." 
Deuteronomy15:4 “ Topa na Pathian ii hong piakna ngam ah ama in thupha hong pia tu hi. Tuni in kong thupiakte theampo pha takin zui in, ama thu na ni uh le," 
Deuteronomy15:5 no mipite sung pan khat zongh zawngkhal ngawl tu hi. 
Deuteronomy15:6 Hong kamciamsa bangin Topa in nang thupha hong pia tu hi. Minam tam mama te tungah sum na pukthaak tu uh a, ahizong kuama tung pan sum na pu buatu hi. Minam tam mama na uk tu uh a, ahizong kuama in no hong uk buatu hi." 
Deuteronomy15:7 “ Topa na Pathian ii hong piakna ngamsung khua khat pawpo ah kisapna a nei Israel na mipui khat po a om le, haza heak vun a, na hu thada heak vun." 
Deuteronomy15:8 Tua sangin a taangsap za ngo takin sum puk vun. 
Deuteronomy15:9 Leiba maisak kum nai ahitazong sumpuk nuam ngawlin om heak vun. Tuabang khua ngaisutna siate na thinsung uh ah tumsak heak vun. Sum na puk nuam bua uh le amate in note hong langpanin Topa tungah ko tu a, tuaciang no a maw na suak tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy15:10 Ama tungah haza ngawlin deisakna taw pia vun, tua hile na nasepna theampo ah Topa in thupha hong pia tu hi." 
Deuteronomy15:11 Israel te sungah a zawng le a cimaw pawlkhat om tawntung tu ahiciang, tuate tungah ngo takin na piak natu uh in thu kong pia hi." 
Deuteronomy15:12 “Na mipui Israel te, pa ahibuale numei khat sia sila in na tungah ama le ama hong kizuak le, kum luk sung na hong sepsak zawkciang na tha tu hi. A kum sali ciang ama na suaktasak nanak tu hi." 
Deuteronomy15:13 Na inn pan na suataksak ciang khut hawm nguakin pusuaksak heak in. 
Deuteronomy15:14 Topa ii thupha hong piakte sung pan — tuute, antangte, le sapittui te ngo takin ama tungah pia in." 
Deuteronomy15:15 Noma Egypt ngam ah sal na tanna uh le Topa na Pathian ii hong suataksakna thu phawk vun; tua ahi hu in hi thupiakna tu in kong pia hi. 
Deuteronomy15:16 “Ahizong na silapa in hong nusia nuam ngawl tha tu hi; nangma le na innkuanpuite it in hong om suak nuam tha tu hi. 
Deuteronomy15:17 Tuasia ciang, na innkha ah paipui in a, tua munah a bil vut in; tuaciang a nuntak sung tawntung na sila hi tu hi. Na sila numeite zongh tuabang ma in vawt vun." 
Deuteronomy15:18 Na sila khat na suataksak ciang na thinnasak heak vun; a tatakin ci leang a kicial naseam khat ii thaman lang taw ama in kum luk sung na hong sepsak zo hi. Hi bangin vawt vun, tua hile, Topa na Pathian in na nasepna theampo ah thupha hong pia tu hi." 
Deuteronomy15:19 “ Topa na Pathian atu in na khui le na tuu sung pan a tal a suakciilte theampo tuam koi vun; hi khuite khat zongh naseam in zangh heak vun a, tuute khat zongh a mul meet heak vun." 
Deuteronomy15:20 Kum simin Topa ompuina ahi tua biakna mun khat sia ah nangma le na innkuanpuite in tuate ne tu nu hi. 
Deuteronomy15:21 Ahizong tua ngannote sitbaanna khat pawpo, a peangbai, a mittaw, mealhemna a nasia khat pawpo a nei le tuate Topa na Pathian tungah sangaw biakpiakna in zangh ngawl het tu nu hi." 
Deuteronomy15:22 Tuabang ngannote na inn ah ne thei tu nu hi. Note theampo biakna taw kisai in na thiang uh zong na thiang bua uh zongin sangaisa le sathaksa na neak uh bangin tuate ne tu nu hi. 
Deuteronomy15:23 Ahizong a chi ne heak vun; tui sun bangin lei ah sung zaw vun. 
Deuteronomy16:1 Abib tha sungah Paisan Poai vawtna taw in “ Topa na Pathian patoai vun; tua tha sung zan khatin ama in Egypt pan note hong suatak hi. 
Deuteronomy16:2 Biakna mun khat sia ah pai vun a, tua munah Topa na Pathian patoai natu in Paisan poai an in na tuu ahibuale na khui khat ngo vun." 
Deuteronomy16:3 Hi an na neak uh ciang tol kisaw anluum ne heak vun. Egypt pan hi bingbungin, na pusua uh lai na neak uh bangin ni sali sung tol saw ngawl anluum na ne tu uh hi. Thuakna mun ahi Egypt ngam pan na pusua ni uh sia na nuntak lai teng na phawk thei natu in hi anluum ne vun — tuasia thuakna anluum kici tu hi." 
Deuteronomy16:4 Na ngam sungah kuama in a inn ah ni sali sung tol koi ngawl tu hi; a ni masabel ni, nitak a na ngaw uh nganno ii sa sia tua zan ma in ne siat tu nu hi." 
Deuteronomy16:5 “Paisan Poai sung a kizangh ngannote sia Topa na Pathian ii hong piak tu ngamsung mun khat po ah ngo ngawlin — biakna mun khat sia bek ah ngo vun. Egypt na nusiat hun, nitum hunin ngo vun." 
Deuteronomy16:6  
Deuteronomy16:7 A sa huanin tua biakna munah ne vun a; a zingsang ciang inn ah cia vun. 
Deuteronomy16:8 Tua zawk ni luk sung tol saw ngawl anluum na ne tu uh a, tuaciang ni sali ni in Topa na Pathian bia tu in kikhawm vun a, tua ni in naseam heak vun." 
Deuteronomy16:9 “Anlaak na kipat hun pan kipan nipi sali sim vun a," 
Deuteronomy16:10 Topa na Pathian patoai natu in ama hong piak thupha taw kizui in thinzaw biakpiakna paipui in Anlaak Poai vawt vun. 
Deuteronomy16:11 Topa mai ah na tate, na naseamte le Levi te, ngamdangmite, tangate le noma khua ah a teang meingongte taw lungnuam khawm vun. Biakna mun khat sia ah lungdam takin biakna vawt vun." 
Deuteronomy16:12 Egypt ah na saltannate uh mangil heak vun a; hi thupiakte pha takin zui vun. 
Deuteronomy16:13 “Taang na cil siat zawkciang le sapittui na suuk siat zawkciang ni sali sung Buk Poai khaam vun. 
Deuteronomy16:14 Na tate, na naseamte, Levi te, ngamdangmite, tangate le na khua sungah a teang meingongte taw lungdam in poai vawt khawm vun." 
Deuteronomy16:15 Biakna mun khat sia ah ni sali sung hi poai vawtin, Topa na Pathian patoai vun. Topa in na lo an le na nasepna ah thupha hong piak hu in lungdam vun." 
Deuteronomy16:16 “Na minam sung pan pa theampo in kum khat sung thumvei tua biakna munah Topa bia tu in pai tu hi: tuate sia Paisan Poai, Anlaak Poai, le Buk Poai te ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy16:17 Topa na Pathian ii hong piak thuphate taw kizui in, amate kitunna zaza taw mi simin letsong khat tek keng tu hi." 
Deuteronomy16:18 “ Topa na Pathian ii hong piak thukhente le ulian dangte khua sim ah koi vun. Hi mite in thu lang khen ngawl, nguptuam nei ngawlin mipite tungah thukhen tu hi." 
Deuteronomy16:19 Amate in a thukhenna ah thumaan ngawlin khen ngawl tu a, nguptuam nei ngawl tu hi; amate in sumnguk la ngawl tu hi, banghang ziam cile letsong te in mipilte le a thumaante ii mit ngawngawn tawsak in, a maan ngawlin thu khensatsak hi." 
Deuteronomy16:20 Topa na Pathian ii hong piak tu ngam lua a, tualai ah na teen tawntung thei natu in, thutang in thumaan tawntung vun." 
Deuteronomy16:21 “ Topa na Pathian atu in biaknatau na vawt ciang, a kungah thing taw a kivawt Asherah numeipathian lim khat koi heak vun." 
Deuteronomy16:22 Tuaciang milim biak natu in suangkhuam khat pawpo na phut heak vun; Topa in tuate ngaimaw hi. 
Deuteronomy17:1 “ Topa na Pathian sia mealhemna khat pawpo a nei khui ahibuale tuu taw bia heak vun; Topa in tuasia ngaimaw hi. 
Deuteronomy17:2 “Sonteena in na khuate uh khat sungah pa ahibuale numei khat sia pathian dangte ahibuale ni, tha, aksite a biakna taw" 
Deuteronomy17:3 Topa tungah maw in a thuciamna palsat in, Topa thupiak a langpan ahi hi," 
Deuteronomy17:4 tuabang thu na za uh le, pha takin kantel vun. Hi bang thusiate Israel te sungah a piang takpi le," 
Deuteronomy17:5 tua pa khua pua sangah paipui in suang taw deanglum vun. 
Deuteronomy17:6 Ahizong tetti nii ahibuale a tamzaw in ama khial hi ci in tetti a pang le bekma tua pa kithatlum thei tu a; tetti khat bek a om le ama kithatlum ngawl tu hi. 
Deuteronomy17:7 Tetti te in ama suang taw deang masa tu a, tuaciang a taang lai mite in deang tu hi; hi siatnate hi bangin bosak tu nu hi." 
Deuteronomy17:8 “Khua sung thukhente atu in khensat haksa ahi, neisa kituuna, pumpi kiliamsuana, mihing thalupna le mihing thisakna a khentel tu thute hong om tu hi. Hi bang thute a om ciang Topa na Pathian ii tealsa biakna mun khat sia ah pai in," 
Deuteronomy17:9 tua thu sia Levi mi thiampite le tua laitak a seam thukhenmangte mai ah puak vun a, amate in khensatsak vun." 
Deuteronomy17:10 Amate in thu khensatna nei tu a, amate hong son bang linlian in noma seam tu nu hi." 
Deuteronomy17:11 A thu khensatna saang vun a, a son bangin a khawng a kheakin zui vun." 
Deuteronomy17:12 Vaipuak nei thukhenpa ahibuale thiampipa thu ni ngawlin a ta ngam pawpo sia kithatlum tu hi; tuabangin Israel te sung pan hi bang thusiate nilkeak tu nu hi. 
Deuteronomy17:13 Tuasia ciang hi thu a za theampo lau tu uh a, kuama dang tuabangin ngamta ngam nawn ngawl tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy17:14 “ Topa na Pathian ii hong piak tu ngam la in, na teen zawk uh ciang na kiim na paam a om minamte theampo bangma in kumpi khat kisamh sa in nei tu na khensat tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy17:15 Kumpi tu in na teal uh sia Topa ii a tealsa mi hi hamtang sak vun. Ama sia na mipui khat hi nak tu a; ngamdangmi khat, na kumpi in koi heak vun." 
Deuteronomy17:16 Kumpipa in ama ngalkaphonpi atu in siphu tampi nei thei ngawl tu hi, siphu lei tu in Egypt ah mite sawl ngawl tu hi, banghang ziam cile Topa in a mite tualai ah heak kik ngeingawl tu hi, ci in a sonsa hi." 
Deuteronomy17:17 Kumpipa in zi tam nei ngawl tu hi, banghang ziam cile hisia in ama Topa kung pan lampialsak tu hi; tuaciang ama le ama khamh le ngunn taw hau heak hen." 
Deuteronomy17:18 Kumpi a sua ciang ama in Levi mi thiampite ii kep thubu ciil sia pan la in a kikhum kik Pathian thukhamte le hilciannate a ki at thubu khat nei tu hi. 
Deuteronomy17:19 Tua laibu sungah thupiak theampo thumaan takin a zui natu le Topa zatakna zia a heak thei natu in, ama kungah tua thubu koi in a khan tawntungin sim tu hi." 
Deuteronomy17:20 Tuabang a hina taw a Israel mipuite sangin ama phazaw tuan kisa ngawlin Topa thupiakna te a zui ngawl natu khaamsak tu hi. Tuasia ciang ama kum tampi mang tu a, a suan a paalte in Israel ngam, khang tam mama uk tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy18:1 “Israel ngam sungah thiampi nam ahi Levi te in leitang tel khat zongh nga ngawl tu hi; tuasia taangin amate sia Topa tungah a kipia sumpite le a dang biakpiaknate taw nungta tu uh hi. 
Deuteronomy18:2 Nam dangte nei bangin amate in leitang nei ngawl tu hi; Topa kamciamsa bangin amate tel sia Topa ii thiampite a hina sia ahi hi. 
Deuteronomy18:3 “Khui ahibuale tuu taw biakpiakna a kivawt simin thiampite tungah a liang, a kha le a ngilpi kipia tu hi." 
Deuteronomy18:4 Thiampite in a masabel a kila anpal, sapittui, olive thau le tuumul te nga tu hi." 
Deuteronomy18:5 Topa in noma nam theampo sung pan Levi nam sia ama atu thiampi a seam tawntung tu in teal hi. 
Deuteronomy18:6 “Levi te ahi khat pawpo Israel ngam khua khat po pan biakna mun khat sia ah a pai nuam sia tua munah seam thei tu a," 
Deuteronomy18:7 tualai ah na a seam Levi dangte bangma in, Topa a Pathian ii thiampi na seam thei tu hi." 
Deuteronomy18:8 Ama in thiampi dangte ii an nga za ma nga tu a, tuaciang a innkuanpuite ii a thaak pawpo keam thei tu hi." 
Deuteronomy18:9 “ Topa na Pathian ii hong piak tu ngamsung na tum uh ciang, tualai ah a om minamte ii a kiihuai ngamtatnate zui heak vun." 
Deuteronomy18:10 Biaknataute tung mei sungah na tate biakpiakna in pia heak vun; na mite in aisaanna, dei ai, bum" 
Deuteronomy18:11 le phuisamnate zanghsak heak vun a, mithisa ii thaate thu donghsak heak vun." 
Deuteronomy18:12 Hi bangin a kiihuai na a zangh mite Topa na Pathian in huatsa a, tua hu in mailam na manaw uh ciang tua ngamsung pan tuabang minamte hawlkeak tu hi." 
Deuteronomy18:13 Topa tungah thumaan tatak vun,” ci hi." 
Deuteronomy18:14 Tua zawkciang Moses in, “Na laak tu ngam ah mite in aisaan theite le ai toaite thu ngai in a nungzui uh hi, ahizong Topa na Pathian in tuabangte na vawt tu uh hong oai ngawl hi." 
Deuteronomy18:15 Tuate taangin ama in kei taw a kibang kamsaang khat na mite sung pan no hong puak tu a, ama thu na ni tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy18:16 “Sinai Mual ah note na kikhop ni in Topa hong paupuina aw na zaak kik ngawl natu, ahibuale ama ompuina meikuang na mu nawn ngawl natu in ngen nu hi, banghang ziam cile na thi tu uh lau nu hi." 
Deuteronomy18:17 Tua ahiciang Topa in kei tungah, ‘Amate ngetna maan hi." 
Deuteronomy18:18 Amate mi sung pan nang taw a kibang kamsaang khat amate ka puak tu hi; a ci tu thute ka son tu a, ka thupiak theampo mipite tungah sonsawn tu hi." 
Deuteronomy18:19 Ama in ka min suangin thuson tu a, ama thu a nial peuma daan ka pia tu hi." 
Deuteronomy18:20 Ahizong kamsaang khat pawpo in ka thupiak ngawl thu khat ka min suangin a son ngam le ama thi tu a, pathian dangte min suangin a son kamsaang khat pawpo zongh a thi kul tu hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Deuteronomy18:21 “Kamsaang pa ii thuson sia Topa tung pan hong pai ahile ahi ngawl na lungman hun uh om tu hi. 
Deuteronomy18:22 Kamsaang khat in Topa min taw thuson a, tua thu hong taangtung buale Topa ii kammal hi ngawl hi. Tua kamsaang pa sia ama uk thu in thuson hi a, ama kiitak tu hi ngawl hi." 
Deuteronomy19:1 “ Topa na Pathian ii hong piak tu ngam sungah a teang mihingte Topa na Pathian in a mot siat zawkciang le a khuapite le a innte la in, tua munah na teen zawk uh ciang," 
Deuteronomy19:2 tua ngam sia khen thum in khen vun a, a khen simin ol takin a kihaw thei khuapi khat tek nei tu hi. Tuasia hun ciang mihing khat in ngual khat po a thalup ciang, a buk natu in tua khuapite khat pawpo zuan thei tu hi." 
Deuteronomy19:3  
Deuteronomy19:4 Mihing khat in a ngal ahi ngawl khat a thatlum tha ahile, tua khuapite khat pawpo zuanin suakta tu hi." 
Deuteronomy19:5 Sonteena in, mihing nii duisung ah thingtom tu in kuankhawm a, khat pa ii thing a siik laitak a heitang zuukin a lawmpa sia a khalum tha le ama tua khuapi thumte khat sungah tai in suakta tu hi." 
Deuteronomy19:6 Bukna khuapi khat bek om thong hile a tai natu khuala leih tu ahiciang, a phulam nuam a mealheak pa in mawnei ngawl a innpaam pa pha tu a, thin uuk tutna in thatlum tha tu hi. Tua hi a, ama in a ngal pa ahi ngawl mihing khat thatlum tha ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy19:7 Tua ahikom bukna khuapi thum koi tu in thu kong pia hi. 
Deuteronomy19:8 “ Topa na Pathian in na taanghpupite tung a sonsa bangin na ngam uh keak vaial in, ama kamciamsa ngam theampo no hong piak ciangin," 
Deuteronomy19:9 khuapi thum na teal thua tu uh hi. (Tuni in kong thupiak theampo vawt a, Topa na Pathian it in, hong hil bangin na nungta uh le ama in hi ngam note hong pia tu hi.)" 
Deuteronomy19:10 A maw ngawlte in thina a thuak ngawl natu le, Topa ii hong piak tu ngam sungah a thi uh hu in mawsiatna a thuak ngawl natu in hi bangin seam vun." 
Deuteronomy19:11 “Ahizong sonteena in, mihing khat in a ngal pa thatlum lui a, tua zawkciang a suakta tu in khuapi thumte khat zuan hi." 
Deuteronomy19:12 Tuabang thu a om ciangin ama khua lampuite in tua pa a kithalup thei natu in, ama samsak tu a, a thalup pa ii mealheakte tungah phulam in a thalup tu in aap tu hi." 
Deuteronomy19:13 Ama hesuak heak vun. Israel te sung pan mihing that pa bosak vun, tua hile na ma uh vang tu hi." 
Deuteronomy19:14 “ Topa na Pathian ii hong piak tu ngam sungah nidang lai pekin a kiphut, na innpaam na lopaam te ii ngisuang khiin heak vun." 
Deuteronomy19:15 “Khialna lian a vawt khat mawsak natu in tetti khat bek taw kicing ngawl a; mihing khat maw piak natu sia a tawmbel in tetti nii kisamh hi. 
Deuteronomy19:16 Mihing khat in midang khat a natsak nopna hangin thumaan ngawl taw maw a suan le," 
Deuteronomy19:17 a nii in biakna mun khat sia ah pai tu a, tua laitak vaipuak nei thiampite le thukhente in a thu khensak tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy19:18 Thukhente in tua thu a pha takin kantel tu a; a Israel mipuipa sia thumaan ngawl taw a mawsak thawthong ahile," 
Deuteronomy19:19 mawsiat a thuak pa ii a thuak tu daan sia ama in thuak tu hi. Tuabangin thumaan ngawl ngitlona bosak tu nu hi. 
Deuteronomy19:20 Tuasia ciang a kuama po in tua thupiang za tu a, lau in, kuama in tuabang a sia vawt kik ngeingawl tu hi." 
Deuteronomy19:21 Hi bang thute ah hesuakna lak heak vun a; daan piak natu sia nuntakna khat luangin nuntakna khat, mittang khat luangin mittang khat, hatang khat luangin hatang khat, khut khat luangin khut khat, peang khat luangin peang khat hi tu hi." 
Deuteronomy20:1 “Na ngalte sim tu in na kuan uh ciang, ngalleangte, siphute le ngalkaphonpi khat sia note neiza sangin a tamzaw in na mu uh ciang tuate kiita heak vun. Egypt pan hong suatak Topa na Pathian sia note taw hong omkhawm tu hi." 
Deuteronomy20:2 Ngalsim tu na kipat ma in, thiampi khat sia mai sangah hong pai tu a, ngalkaphonpi tungah," 
Deuteronomy20:3 ‘Israel mite awng ngai vun! Tuni in ngal simin na kuan tu uh hi. Na ngalte kiita heak vun a, lau in liing heak vun." 
Deuteronomy20:4 Topa na Pathian in note hong tonpui tu a, zawna hong pia tu hi,’ ci tu hi." 
Deuteronomy20:5 “Tuasia ciang ngalkap bute in a mite tungah, ‘Hi sungah inn thak a sak zawk bek hi a, aapna a vawt ngawl lai khat pawpo a om ziam? A om le a inn ah cia kik tahen. Tua hi ngawlin ngal sungah ama a kithat le a inn sia mi dang khat pawpo in aapna vawt tu hi." 
Deuteronomy20:6 Hi sungah sapithuan thak a vawt zawk bek hi a, ahizong sapitnga a lo ngawl lai khat pawpo a om ziam? A om le a inn ah cia kik tahen. Tua hi ngawlin ngal sungah ama a kithat le mi dang khat pawpo in tua sapittui taw nuamsa tu hi." 
Deuteronomy20:7 Hi sungah zi nei tu in mo dongh sa khat pawpo a om ziam? A om le a inn ah cia kik tahen. Tua hi ngawlin ngal sungah ama a kithatlum le midang khat pawpo in a dok sa numei sia teenpui tu hi,’ ci tu hi." 
Deuteronomy20:8 “Tuaciang ngalkap bute in a mite tungah, ‘Hi sungah patau in a lauthauh khat pawpo a om ziam? A om le, a inn ah cia kik tahen. Tua ahi buale ama in a dangte thin lalsak tu hi,’ ci si tu hi."
