Deuteronomy20:9 Ngalkap bute in ngalkaphonpi tungah a thuson a man zawkciang a pawl sim atu in lampuite kiteal tu hi. 
Deuteronomy20:10 “Khuapi khat sim tu in a pai uh ciang a masa phit belin tua khua mite na khutnuai ah hong tum thei natu in hun pia vun. 
Deuteronomy20:11 Amate in kongpite hong honin hong ki aap ahile, a vekpi in na sila suak tu a, na na hong sepsak tu hi." 
Deuteronomy20:12 Ahizong tua khua mite hong ki aap nuam ngawlin do tu hong sawm zaw le tua khuapi na ngalkaphonpite taw uumci vun. 
Deuteronomy20:13 Topa na Pathian in tua khuapi zawna hong piak ciang a sung a om pa theampo thatlum siat vun. 
Deuteronomy20:14 Ahizong noma atu in numeite, patangte, ngannote, le khua sung a om nadang theampo la thei tu nu hi. Na ngalte neisa theampo zangh thei tu nu hi. Topa in note tungah hong pia zo hi." 
Deuteronomy20:15 Note teen natu ngam pan a khualana khuapite tungah tu a bangin vawt tu nu hi. 
Deuteronomy20:16 “Ahizong Topa na Pathian ii hong piak ngam sungah a om khuapite na laak uh ciang, mihing theampo thatlum siat vun." 
Deuteronomy20:17 Topa ii hong thupiakna bangin a mihing theampo, Hit te, Amor te, Canaan te, Periz te, Hiv te le Jebus te mon vun." 
Deuteronomy20:18 A pathiante a biak ciang a kiihuai nate sep tu hong hil na taw, Topa tungah a maw na sua ngawl natu in amate thatlum siat vun." 
Deuteronomy20:19 “Khuapi khat na laak nop uh ciang khuangei mama sung na kiim uum ta uh zong a thingnga kungte phuktan heak vun. A thingnga ne vun a, ahihang a kungte lalsak heak vun; a kungte sia na ngalte uh hi ngawl hi." 
Deuteronomy20:20 Thingkung dangte na phuk thei tu uh a, khuapi a kilaak mateng in kulh uumna in zangh thei tu nu hi." 
Deuteronomy21:1 “Sonteena in, Topa na Pathian ii hong piak natu ngamsung lo khat ah mihing khat kithatlum a, a that sia he ngawl nu hi." 
Deuteronomy21:2 Na lampuite le thukhente pai in mithi luang a kimu na mun pan a naina khua teng khat sim taw a kikhualatna tee tu hi. 
Deuteronomy21:3 Tuaciang mithi luang a kimu na pan a naibel khua sia ii lampuite in na a kiseamsak ngeingawl lai khuila khat teal tu hi. 
Deuteronomy21:4 Amate in tua khui sia tui a kang ngeingawl luihui, a kitho ngeingawl, an a kiciing ngeingawlna munah paipui tu a, tua munah a ngawng meaktan tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy21:5 Levi suan thiampite zongh tua munah pai tu hi, banghang ziam cile ngongtatna huvau thuneina theampo amate in thukhen tu uh hi. Topa na Pathian in ama naseam tu le ama min suangin thuphate a pia tu in amate teal zo hi." 
Deuteronomy21:6 Tua zawkciang a mithi luang a kimuna mun taw a kinaibel khua lampuite theampo in khuila tungah a khut sil tu uh a," 
Deuteronomy21:7 tuaciang, ‘Hisia pa ka that bua uh a, a that sia ka he bua uh hi." 
Deuteronomy21:8 Topa awng, Egypt pan na suatak Israel, na mite maisak in. A maw ngawl mihing khat a kithalupna hangin maw hong pusak heak in a, hong maisak ta'n,’ ci tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy21:9 Tuasia ciang, Topa ci bangin na vawtna uh taw mihing thalupna huvau hong kimawsak ngawl tu hi." 
Deuteronomy21:10 “ Topa na Pathian in ngalzawna hong pia in ngalte na mat uh ciang," 
Deuteronomy21:11 amate sungah dik na sak le na teenpui nop numei mealpha khat mu thei tu ni hi. 
Deuteronomy21:12 Tua nu na inn ah ciapui ta'n a, ama in na inn ah a sam meetin a khutcinte tan tu a," 
Deuteronomy21:13 a puante laih tu hi. Tua nu sia na inn sungah a nu le a pa ngai in tha khat sung hee in om tu hi; tua zawkciang teenpui tu ni hi. 
Deuteronomy21:14 Hun khat ciang ama na dei nawn buale ama suaktasak tu ni hi. Zawthawk thu taw ama ompui zo na hi ciang sal bangin na vawt thei buatu a, na zuak thei buatu hi." 
Deuteronomy21:15 “Sonteena in pa khat in zi nii nei a, a zite in tapa veve neipui hi, ahizong a tapaciil sia dik a sak zawk a zi taw a ta hi ngawl hi." 
Deuteronomy21:16 Tua pa in a tate tungah a neisate hawmsak tu a khensat ciang hamphat tuam nei heak hen, a tapaciil ii nga tu tel sia ama diksak zawk a zi taw a nei tapa tungah pia heak hen." 
Deuteronomy21:17 Ama ii diksak zawk a zi ii tapa hi ngawl ahihang a tapaciil tungah ama ii neisa sung pan tel a see nii in pia tu hi. Pasal khat in a tapaciil sia a thusim kul a, tapaciil ahi hu in a nga tu tel sia a piak kul hi." 
Deuteronomy21:18 “Sonteena in mihing khat in a thinpui, ngual a langpan vilvel tapa khat nei in, daan a piak hang a nu a pa thu ni ngawl hi." 
Deuteronomy21:19 A nu le a pa in a tapa sia a teenna khua lampuite mai ah thusit thuak tu in paipui tu hi. 
Deuteronomy21:20 Amate in lampuite tungah, ‘Ka ta uh sia thinpui in hong langpan a, thu ni nuam ngawl hi; ama in dangka pakvawt in zu ne hi,’ ci in son tu hi." 
Deuteronomy21:21 Tuasia ciang khua mite in tua pa suang taw deanglum tu a, tuabangin hi siatna bosak tu nu hi. Israel ngam sungah mihingte theampo in tua thupiang za in lau tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy21:22 “Mihing khat ama ii khialna hangin kithat in a luang sia khuam tungah a kikhai le," 
Deuteronomy21:23 tualai ah zan ngiaksak heak vun. Tua a luang sia tua ni ma in kiphum tu hi, banghang ziam cile khuam tungah a kikhai mithi luang khat in tua leitang tungah Pathian haamsiatna tungsak hi. Topa na Pathian ii hong piak ngam le lei na nitsak ngawl natu in a luang phum vun." 
Deuteronomy22:1 “Na Israel mipui khat ii khui ahibuale tuu sia suakta in a tai laitak na mu le en thong heak in a; a nei pa kungah paipui kik in. 
Deuteronomy22:2 Ahizong a neipa a teenna khuala a, a neipa na he buale na inn ah ciapui in. A neipa hong pai in hong kat ciang pia in." 
Deuteronomy22:3 Na Israel mipui ii a laa, a puan ahibuale a bosua na khat pawpo na mu uh le tuabang ma in vawt vun." 
Deuteronomy22:4 “Israel na mipui khat ii laa ahibuale a khui a puk le en thong heak in a; a neipa na huna in phongto kik in. 
Deuteronomy22:5 “Numeite in pate puan silh ngawl tu a, pate in numeite puan silh ngawl tu hi; Topa na Pathian in tuabang a silhte ngaimaw hi." 
Deuteronomy22:6 “Thingkung tung ahibuale lei ah vacim bu khat nangma in mu luilam in, a pui sia a tuuite op a, ahibuale a note uapin a om le a pui laaksak heak in." 
Deuteronomy22:7 Vacim note ahile la thei ni hi, ahihang nuamsa in na khansau natu in a pui tha nanak tu ni hi." 
Deuteronomy22:8 “Innthak na sak uh ciang na innkhum kiil kiimkot ah taangban zawl thungin uum hamtang vun. Tua hile mihing khat taakin a thi hial zong mawsiat thuak ngawl tu nu hi. 
Deuteronomy22:9 “Lo khat sungah sapit le thaicii dang khat pawpo ciingkhawm heak vun; na ciingkhawm uh le sapit ahizong, an piang dangte ahizong ne thei ngawl tu nu hi." 
Deuteronomy22:10 “Khuital khat le laa khat a kaap in lotho khawmsak heak vun. 
Deuteronomy22:11 “Samul le puanneal a kitak khawm puan silh heak vun. 
Deuteronomy22:12 “Na puan king li ah zepna teapkaaite koi vun. 
Deuteronomy22:13 “Sonteena in mihing khat in numei khat teenpui a, hun khat ciang dei nawn ngawl hi." 
Deuteronomy22:14 Tua ahiciang, a maw natu zongin a kiteen lai in ngaknu thiangtho hi ngawl hi, ci in mawsiat hi." 
Deuteronomy22:15 “Hi bang thu a piang le tua nu ii nu le pa in ngaknu thiangtho a hina a heaksak natu in, a kiteen ni zan a, a delpha chi baang puan sia thukhenzum ah a lak tu in khua sung lampuite kungah paipui tu hi." 
Deuteronomy22:16 Tua numei ii pa in amate tungah, ‘Ka tanu sia hisia pa taw ka teangsak a, ahizong tu in dei nawn ngawl hi." 
Deuteronomy22:17 Ama in ka tanu sia a maan ngawlin mawsiat a, a kiteen lai in ngaknu thiangtho hi ngawl hi, ci hi. Ahizong ka tanu ngaknu thiangtho khat a hina sia hi sungah tetti om hi; a kiteen lai a delpha chibaang puan sia en vun!’ ci tu hi." 
Deuteronomy22:18 Tuaciang khua lampuite in a pasal samin saat tu hi. 
Deuteronomy22:19 Amate in ngunntang zakhat zongh liausak tu a, tua sumte numei ii pa tungah pia tu hi, banghang ziam cile tua pa in Israel numei khat mindaisak ahi hu hi. Tua bek dom ngawlin tua nu sia ama zi ma hi suak tu a, tua pa in ama nuntak laiteng tua nu khul thei ngawl tu hi." 
Deuteronomy22:20 “Ahizong a mawsakna thu sia maanin, ngaknu thiangtho a hina thu tetti a lak thei buale," 
Deuteronomy22:21 a pa inn kongbiang ah ama kipaipui tu a, tua khua pasalte in suang taw deanglum tu hi. A pasal nei ma a pa inn ah a om lai in numei le pa khialna taw ih mipuite sungah a maizumhuai vawt zo hi. Tuabangin hi siatnate bosak tu nu hi." 
Deuteronomy22:22 “Mihing khat sia midang khat ii zi taw a khial laitak a kiman le, amate ngeal kithat tu hi. Hi bangin hi siatna bosak tu nu hi." 
Deuteronomy22:23 “Sonteena in khua sungah mihing khat sia a kidongh sa numei khat a khialpui zawkciang kiman hi. 
Deuteronomy22:24 Amate ngeal khua pua sangah paipui in deanglum tu nu hi. Tua nu sia khua sungah a om hi a, midangte zaak thei tu in hu ngenin au thei tu hi napi a au ngawl hu in thina thuak tu ahi hi. Tua pa ahile a kidongh sa numei taw a khial hu in a thi kul hi. Hi bangin hi siatna bosak tu nu hi." 
Deuteronomy22:25 “Sonteena in, midang khat in a kidongh sa numei khat daaipaam duisung ah buan hi, tuabang ciang tua pa bek kithatlum tu a;" 
Deuteronomy22:26 tua numei sia bangma kilaw ngawl tu hi, banghang ziam cile thisak natu za in mawna vawt ngawl hi. Hi thu sia mihing khat in midang khat ngalvawtin a thalup thu taw ma kibang hi." 
Deuteronomy22:27 Tua pa in a kidongh sa numei khat daaipaam duisung ah buanin, tua nu in ngalko in au napi a hun tu kuama om ngawl hi." 
Deuteronomy22:28 “Sonteena in mihing khat in a kidongh ngawl lai numei khat buanin a khialpui laitakin kiman hi. 
Deuteronomy22:29 Tua pa in tua numei ii pa tungah mo man in ngunntang sawmnga pia tu a, tua nu sia ama zi suak tu hi, banghang ziam cile tua pa in zawthawk thu taw a khialpui hang ahi hi. Tua pa in ama nuntak sung teng tua nu khul thei ngeingawl tu hi." 
Deuteronomy22:30 “Kuama in a pa ii zite khat pawpo taw khialin a pa maimawl sak heak hen. 
Deuteronomy23:1 “Cil kingetsate ahibuale zang a ki attansate peuma Topa ii mite sungah kihel thei ngawl tu hi. 
Deuteronomy23:2 “Lamlakta ahibuale tuate ii a suan a paal pawpo a khang sawmna dong keak ahizong kuama peuma Topa ii mite sungah kihel thei ngawl tu hi. 
Deuteronomy23:3 “Ammon te ahibuale Moab te — ahibuale amate ii suan le paalte khat pawpo a khang sawmna dong keak ahizong — Topa ii mite sungah kihel thei ngawl tu hi. 
Deuteronomy23:4 Amate in Egypt pan na pusua uh lai in lampi ah an le tui hong pia nuam ngawl a, note hong haamsiat tu in Mesopotamia ngam Pethor khuapi pan Beor tapa Balaam cial uh hi." 
Deuteronomy23:5 Ahizong Topa na Pathian in Balaam thu ngai ngawl a; note hong it hu in a haamsiatna sia thupha suaksak zaw hi. 
Deuteronomy23:6 Minam khat na hi uh laiteng, hi minamte hu natu ahibuale a nopsak thei natu bangma seam ngei heak vun." 
Deuteronomy23:7 “Edom te zawngsak heak vun; na beete uh hi. Tuaciang Egypt te zawngsak heak vun; amate ngam ah teang ngei nu hi. 
Deuteronomy23:8 A khang thumna pan kipan a suan a paalte Topa ii mite sungah kihel thei tu uh hi. 
Deuteronomy23:9 “Ngalsim hun sung ngiaphual ah na om uh ciang, biakna taw kisai a thiangtho ngawl hong suaksak tu peuma pial vun." 
Deuteronomy23:10 Pasal khat zan a mut lanin a bawtui tee in a thiang ngawl a suak le, ama ngiaphual pua sangah pusuakin tualai ah om tu hi." 
Deuteronomy23:11 A nitak sangin ama kibual tu a, nitum ciang ngiaphual sungah tum thei tu hi." 
Deuteronomy23:12 “Ngiaphual pua sangah awnghaw nop ciang pai thei natu mun khat na nei tu uh hi. 
Deuteronomy23:13 Lei taw natu thingbaak khat keng vun a, na awnghaw zawkciang lei huk kik vun." 
Deuteronomy23:14 Na ngiaphual sia biakna taw kisai in thiangsak vun, banghang ziam cile hong keam tu le na ngalte hong zosak tu in Topa na Pathian sia na ngiaphual sungah note hong ompui hi. Topa ii hong nungngat natu za dongin a deihuai ngawl bangma vawt heak vun." 
Deuteronomy23:15 “Sila khat sia a topa kung pan tai in nang hong beal le puak kik heak in. 
Deuteronomy23:16 Amate ii tealna khua khat pawpo ah teang thei tu a, vawtsia ngawl tu nu hi." 
Deuteronomy23:17 “Israel mi, pa ahizong numei ahizong biakinn ah pumpi zuak khat suak thei ngawl tu hi." 
Deuteronomy23:18 Hi bangin a thalaw sumte zongh kiciamna taangtutsakna in Topa na Pathian inn sungah kipaipui thei ngawl tu hi. Topa in biakinn ah pumpi kizuakte ensan hi. 
Deuteronomy23:19 “Dangka, an, ahibuale na khat pawpo Israel na mipuite tungah na pukthaak uh ciang a meet la heak vun." 
Deuteronomy23:20 Ngamdangmite tungah na pukthaak uh ciang a meet na la thei tu uh a, ahizong Israel na mipuite tungah na pukthaak uh ciang a meet la heak vun. Hi ngeina zui vun, tua hile na laak tu uh ngam sungah na sep na vawt theampo Topa na Pathian in thupha hong pia tu hi." 
Deuteronomy23:21 “ Topa na Pathian tungah kiciamna na vawt uh ciang na kamciam sia peal heak vun; Topa in na kamciamna len tu a, na len bua uh le mawna ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy23:22 Topa tungah kiciamna vawt ngawl sia mawna hi ngawl hi," 
Deuteronomy23:23 ahizong thin zawna taw na vawt le len nanak vun. 
Deuteronomy23:24 “Midang khat ii sapithuan sungah lampi na tot ciang, sapitnga na du zaza na ne thei tu a, ahizong na bawm sungah heangin bangma ciapui ngawl het tu nu hi." 
Deuteronomy23:25 Midang khat ii lo sungah lampi na tot ciang na khut taw na deiza taanghuite sik in ne thei tu nu hi, ahizong phiau taw taanghui bangma attan heak vun." 
Deuteronomy24:1 “Sonteena in pa khat in numei khat teenpui a, hun khat ciang dei nawn ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile tua numei tungah ama diksak ngawl thu khat mu hi. Tua ahiciang ama in kikhulna lai vawt a, tua nu pia in a inn pan ciasak hi." 
Deuteronomy24:2 Tuaciang sonteena in tua nu in pasal dang nei kik hi. 
Deuteronomy24:3 Tua pa in zongh dei ngawlin kikhulna lai vawt a, ama pia in, a inn pan ciasak hi. Tua ahibuale, sonteena in a pasal niina thi hi." 
Deuteronomy24:4 Hi bang thute tungtaang ah a pasal masa in ama teenpui kik ngawl tu hi; tua pa atu in a numei sia a thiang ngawl ahi hi. Tua pa in a teenpui kik ahile Topa a do suak tu hi. Topa na Pathian ii hong piak tu ngam ah hi bang a cizathuai mawna vawt ngawl tu nu hi. 
Deuteronomy24:5 “Zi nei tuung khat sia ngalkap kitumsak ngawl tu a, taangpi nasep khat pawpo zongh kiseamsak ngawl tu hi; a inn ah om in, a zi a lungdamsak thei natu in ama sia kum khat sung na kiseamsak ngawl tu hi." 
Deuteronomy24:6 “Mihing khat tungah na khat na zawn le, khapna in, a zak lai an ngoaina suangte na laaksak buatu hi. Tua in amate innkuan ii nuntak natu in a anneak vawtna ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy24:7 “Israel a mipui khat ngu a, sal in a khoai pawpo ahibuale sal in a zuak pawpo kithatlum tu hi. Tuabangin hi siatnate na bosak tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy24:8 “A lauhuai mama vun natna na vei uh ciang, Levi thiampite ii hong son bang linlian in vawt vun; amate tungah ka thupiakte zui vun." 
Deuteronomy24:9 Egypt pan nong pai uh lai, Topa na Pathian ii Miriam tungah a vawtnate phawk vun." 
Deuteronomy24:10 “Ngual tungah na khat na zawn le khapna in hong piak tu a puansilh sia a inn sungah tumin la heak vun. 
Deuteronomy24:11 A puasang pan ngak vun a, ama in piasak vun." 
Deuteronomy24:12 Ama sia mizawng khat ahile, tuasia zan taamsak ngawlin," 
Deuteronomy24:13 a mut thei natu in nitak simin ama pia kik vun. Tuasia ciang ama lungdam tu a, Topa na Pathian sia na tungah hong lungkim tu hi." 
Deuteronomy24:14 “Israel na mipuite ahibuale na khua sungah a teang ngamdang mite, zawngin a cimaw na cial uh naseamte theam heak vun." 
Deuteronomy24:15 Ni sim nitum ma in a nitha pia vun. Ama sum kisamh in, a nga nanak tu sia muang nginge hi. Na pia bua uh le ama in Topa tungah hong khia tu a, noma a maw na hi tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy24:16 “A tate khialna liante hangin a nu le a pa thina thuak ngawl tu a, a nu le a pa ii khialna liante hangin a tate thina thuak ngawl tu hi; Mihing khat sia ama ii khialna lian a vawt hang bekin thina thuak tu hi." 
Deuteronomy24:17 “Ngamdangmite le tangate ii a nga tu te khaktan heak vun a; meingong nu ii puansilh sia leiba khapna in la heak vun. 
Deuteronomy24:18 Egypt ngam ah sal na hina uh le Topa na Pathian ii hong suataksakna thu phawk vun; tua hu in hi thupiakna sia kong pia hi. 
Deuteronomy24:19 “Lo ante na laak uh ciang na laak sa na puak ngawl uhte pai in la kik heak vun; Topa na Pathian in na nasepna po ah, thupha hong piak natu in, tuate ngamdangmite, tangate le meingong nupite atu in kinusiat tu hi." 
Deuteronomy24:20 Olive kungte khatvei na law zawk uh ciang a taanglaite pai in lo kik heak vun; tuate ngamdangmite, tangate le meingong nupite atu ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy24:21 Na sapitngate khatvei na law zawk uh ciang, sapithuan ah a nii veina lun kik heak vun; tua sapit a taanglaite ngamdangmite, tangate le meingong nupite atu ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy24:22 Egypt ngam ah sila na hina uh mangil ngei heak vun; tua hu in hi thupiakna sia kong pia hi. 
Deuteronomy25:1 “Sonteena in Israel te nii sia thu kinei in zum kithen a, thu a khen ciang khat sia maw ngawlin a dang khat sia maw hi." 
Deuteronomy25:2 A maw pa sia saat thuak tu in thu a kikhen le, thukhenpa in ama, lei ah boksakin saatsak tu hi. Bang tanvei saat tu cisia ama khialna lian a vawtna bang hi tu hi." 
Deuteronomy25:3 Ama sia sawmlivei dong kisaat thei tu a, ahizong tuaza sangin tamzaw ngawl tu hi; tuaza sangin a tamzaw le mipite mai ah maizum a pia suak tu nu hi." 
Deuteronomy25:4 “Khuital khat an na cilsak laitakin a muk tuamsak heak vun. 
Deuteronomy25:5 “Unau nii inn khat ah teang khawm a, khat sia tapa nei ngawlin a thi le, a zi sia innkuan dangah pasal nei thei ngawl tu hi; mithi pa ii suapuipa in ama a teenpui tu sia a vaipuak ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy25:6 Mithi pa ii bee le ngui Israel minam sungah a bo ngawl natu in amate ii nei a tapaciil sia mithipa ii tapa in kingaisun tu hi. 
Deuteronomy25:7 Ahizong mithi pa ii suapuipa in ama a teenpui nuam buale tua nu sia khua lampuite mai ah pai tu a, ‘Ka pasal suapuipa in a vaipuak seam ngawl hi. Ama in Israel mite sungah a suapuipa atu in suan le paal pia nuam ngawl hi,’ ci in son tu hi." 
Deuteronomy25:8 Tuaciang khua lampuite in tua pa samin thu sonpui tu hi. Tua pa in a teenpui nuam bualai ahile," 
Deuteronomy25:9 a suapuipa zi in khua lampuite mai, ama kungah pai in tua pa ii peangdap langkhat suutsak in, a maitang cilphii in, ‘A suapuipa atu in suan le paal a pia nuam ngawl sia tungah hi bangin kivawt hi,’ ci tu hi." 
Deuteronomy25:10 Israel sungah tua pa ii innkuan sia, ‘A peangdap a kisuusak pa ii innkuan,’ kici tu hi." 
Deuteronomy25:11 “Pasal nii kihau a, a khat sia pa ii zi in a pasal hun nuamin, a khat sia pa ii cil le zang a zapsak ahile," 
Deuteronomy25:12 tua nu hesuak ngawlin; a khut tansak vun. 
Deuteronomy25:13 “Toaisuangte le piciangte na zak uh ciang theam heak vun. 
Deuteronomy25:14  
Deuteronomy25:15 Topa na Pathian ii hong piak tu ngam ah na khan a sau thei natu in toaisuangte le piciangte thumaan thutak taw zangh vun. 
Deuteronomy25:16 Topa in ngualtheamte ngaimaw hi. 
Deuteronomy25:17 “Egypt ngam pan nong pai uh lai in, Amalek te ii hong vawtnate phawk vun." 
Deuteronomy25:18 Amate in Pathian kiita ngawl ahiciang noma toi in na tha uh a bo ciang na nung pan hong simin, nungsangah a toi a baa theampo hong thatlum siat hi." 
Deuteronomy25:19 Tua ahikom, Topa na Pathian in ngam hong pia in, na kiim ah a teang na ngalte kung pan ngalmuanna hong piak ciang Amalek te theampo thatlum siat vun, tua hile kuama in amate phawk nawn ngawl tu hi. Tuasia mangil heak vun!" 
Deuteronomy26:1 “ Topa na Pathian hong piak tu ngam la in na teen zawk uh ciang," 
Deuteronomy26:2 note khat simin na laak maksak uh na lo anpalte sung pan khen khat tek khum khat sungah koi in, biakna mun khat sia ah paipui tu nu hi." 
Deuteronomy26:3 Tua hun lai in, vaipuak a nei thiampipa kungah pai in, ‘Ka taanghpupite tungah ko hong piak tu a kamciamsa ngam ah ka tum zo uh hi, ci in Topa ka Pathian tungah tu in ka kona uh ahi hi,’ ci vun." 
Deuteronomy26:4 “Thiampipa in nangma tung pan tua khum hong saang tu a, Topa na Pathian biaknatau mai ah koi tu hi." 
Deuteronomy26:5 Tuaciang Topa mai ah hi kammal teng a lot in son in: ‘Ka taanghpupi sia a vak kawkoai Aram mi hi a, a innkuanpuite Egypt ngam ah teang tu in a paipui pa hi. Amate tualai ah a pai lai in mihing tawm bek hi a, ahizong amate tam pha in a thahat minam suak hi." 
Deuteronomy26:6 Egypt te in kote hong vawtsia in zawthawk thu taw sal nasep hong seamsak uh hi. 
Deuteronomy26:7 Tuasia ciang ka taanghpupite ii Pathian, Topa tungah hu ngenin ka au uh hi. Ama in hong za a, kote thuakna, haksatna le buainate hong mu hi." 
Deuteronomy26:8 Ama in a vaangletna le a thahatna taw Egypt ngam pan hong suatak hi. Ama in nalamdang lakna te le a lamdangte vawtin a kiitakhuai nate piangsak hi. 
Deuteronomy26:9 Ama in hi munah hong paipui a, khuinoai le khuaitui a luanna hi ngampha le ngamnuam hong pia hi." 
Deuteronomy26:10 Tua ahiciang tu in ama hong piaksa anpalte Topa kungah kong paipui hi,’ na ci tu hi. “Tuaciang Topa mai ah na khum nga suk vun a, tualai ah na bia vun." 
Deuteronomy26:11 Topa na Pathian in nang le na innkuanpuite hong piak naphate hangin lungdamko vun; Levi te le note sungah hong teang ngamdangmite zongh taw lungdamko khawm vun. 
Deuteronomy26:12 “Kum thum simin na lo ante — sawm a khat sumpite — sia Levi te, ngamdangmite, tangate le meingong nupite tungah pia vun, tua hile mipite omna theampo ah amate neak tu a kisap za tek nei tu uh hi. Tuabang na vawt zawk uh ciang," 
Deuteronomy26:13 Topa tungah, ‘A thiangtho sawm a khat sumpite ka inn ah bangma taang ngawl hi; nong thupiak bangin Levi te, ngamdangmite, tangate le meingongte tungah ka pia zo hi. Sawm a khat sumpi tungtaang ah na thupiakte khat zongh ka nial bua a ka mangil bua hi." 
Deuteronomy26:14 Hee in kaikut a ka om ciang zong, sumpi peuma ka ne bua hi; biakna taw kisai in a thiang ngawl ka hi hun ciang zong, bangma ka inn pan ka pusua bua hi; mithi an siana in ka zangh bua hi. Topa awng na thu hong ni khi hi; sawm a khat sumpi taw kisai nong thupiak theampo ka vawt siat zo hi." 
Deuteronomy26:15 Vantung na omna thiangtho mun pan hong ensuk ta'n a, Israel na mite thupha hong pia ta'n; ka taanghpupite tungah na kamciam bangin nong piaksa ngamnuam le ngampha zongh thupha hong piaksak ta'n,’ ci vun." 
Deuteronomy26:16 “Tuni in Topa na Pathian in ama ii thukham theampo zui tu in no tungah thu hong pia hi; tua ahiciang tuate na thin na lung theampo taw thumaan takin zui vun. 
Deuteronomy26:17 Tuni in Topa sia note Pathian in na saang zo uh hi, a thu ni a, ama ngeinate theampo zui tu le a thupiak theampo seam tu in kamciam na pia zo uh hi." 
Deuteronomy26:18 Ama hong kamciam bangin tuni in Topa in note sia ama mihing in hong saang zo a; ama thukham theampo zui tu in thu hong pia hi. 
Deuteronomy26:19 Ama ii piansak minam dang theampo sangin a lianzaw in note hong vawt tu a, ama min pokin na patoai tu uh hi. Ama kamciam bangin note ama mihing na hi tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Deuteronomy27:1 Tuaciang Moses in Israel lampuite taw kopin mipite tungah, “Tuni a kong piak kihilna theampo zui vun." 
Deuteronomy27:2 Jordan ngun kaantan in Topa na Pathian ii hong piakna ngamsung na tum uh ni in, suang lian pawlkhat phut in, buan taw zut vun a," 
Deuteronomy27:3 tuate tungah hi thukhamte le hilnate theampo at vun. Na taanghpupite ii Pathian, Topa ii hong kamciamna ahi ngamnuam le ngampha sungah na tum uh ciang," 
Deuteronomy27:4 le Jordan ngun langkhat na thet uh ciang tuni in kong hil bangin Ebal Mual tungah hi suangte phut vun a, buan taw zut vun." 
Deuteronomy27:5 Tua munah thik hiamh taw a kitan ngawl suang taw a kivawt biaknatau khat ciang vun," 
Deuteronomy27:6 banghang ziam cile Topa na Pathian atu in na cian biaknatau peuma a ki attan ngawl suangte taw bekin kivawt tu hi. Tualai ah meihal biakpiaknate na pia tu uh a," 
Deuteronomy27:7 sangaw biakpiakna pia in pawlkhop biakpiaknate ne in Topa na Pathian mai ah lungdamko vun. 
Deuteronomy27:8 Buan taw a kizut suangte tungah Pathian ii thukham kammal theampo a kician in at vun,” ci hi." 
Deuteronomy27:9 Tuaciang Moses in Levi thiampite taw Israel mite theampo tungah, “Israel mite awng, pha tak hong nadon tavun. Tuni in Topa na Pathian ii mi na suak zo uh hi;" 
Deuteronomy27:10 tua ahiciang tuni in kong piak ama thukham theampo zui in keamcing tavun,” ci uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:11 Tuaciang Moses in Israel mite tungah," 
Deuteronomy27:12 “Jordan ngun na kaan zawk in, mipite tungah thupha a kipiak ciang a nuai a minamte sia Gerizim Mual tungah ding tu uh hi: tuate sia Simeon, Levi, Judah, Issachar, Joseph le Benjamin namte ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy27:13 A kihaamsiat ciang a nuai a minamte Ebal mual tungah ding tu uh hi; tuate sia, Reuben, Gad, Asher, Zebulun, Dan le Naphtali namte ahi uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:14 Levi te in hi kammalte nging takin pau tu hi: 
Deuteronomy27:15 “ ‘Suang, thing ahibuale leisung sumpiangte taw milim vawt a, tuasia a bia ku pawpo tungah Pathian haamsiatna tung tahen; Topa in milim biakna ngaimaw hi.’ “Tuasia ciang mipi theampo in ‘Amen!’ ci in zo tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:16 “ ‘A pa ahibuale a nu a zatak vawt ngawl pawpo tungah Pathian haamsiatna tung tahen.’ “Tuasia ciang mipi theampo in, ‘Amen!’ ci in zo tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:17 “ ‘A innpaam khat ii ngisuang a khiin pawpo tungah Pathian haamsiatna tung tahen.’ “Tuasia ciang mipi theampo in, ‘Amen!’ ci in zo tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:18 “ ‘Mittaw khat a lamlak khial pawpo tungah Pathian haamsiatna tung tahen.’ “Tuasia ciang mipi theampo in, ‘Amen!’ ci in zo tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:19 “ ‘Ngamdangmite, tangate le meingong nupite ii nga tute a khaktan pawpo tungah Pathian haamsiatna tung tahen.’ “Tuasia ciang mipi theampo in, ‘Amen!’ ci in zo tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:20 “ ‘A pa zite khat pawpo khialpuina taw a pa a maimawlsak pawpo tungah Pathian haamsiatna tung tahen.’ “Tuasia ciang mipi theampo in ‘Amen!’ ci in zo tu uh hi. 
Deuteronomy27:21 “ ‘Nganhing taw a khial pawpo tungah Pathian haamsiatna tung tahen.’ “Tuasia ciang mipi theampo in, ‘Amen!’ ci in zo tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:22 “ ‘A suapuinu ahibuale a suapui sealhnu a khialpui pawpo tungah Pathian haamsiatna tung tahen.’ “Tuasia ciang mipi theampo in, ‘Amen!’ ci in zo tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:23 “ ‘A sunghnu a khialpui pawpo tungah Pathian haamsiatna tung tahen.’ “Tuasia ciang mipi theampo in, ‘Amen!’ ci in zo tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:24 “ ‘Mihing a that ku pawpo tungah Pathian haamsiatna tung tahen.’ “Tuasia ciang mipi theampo in, ‘Amen!’ ci in zo tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:25 “ ‘Mawnei ngawl mihing khat thatlum tu in sumnguk a saang pawpo tungah Pathian haamsiatna tung tahen.’ “Tuasia ciang mi theampo in, ‘Amen!’ ci in zo tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:26 “ ‘Pathian thukham theampo le hong hilna teng a zui ngawl pawpo tungah Pathian haamsiatna tung tahen.’ “Tuasia ciang mipi theampo in, ‘Amen!’ ci in zo tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:1 “Tuni a kong piak Topa na Pathian thupiak theampo thumaan takin zui in, a thu na ni uh le ama in leitung minam dangte sangin a lian zaw in note hong siam tu hi." 
Deuteronomy28:2 Topa na Pathian thu ni vun, tua hile hi thupha theampo noma aa hi tu hi:" 
Deuteronomy28:3 “ Topa in na khua te na lote thupha hong pia tu hi. 
Deuteronomy28:4 “ Topa in ta tam, an tam mama, le khui le tuu tam mama taw note thupha hong pia tu hi." 
Deuteronomy28:5 “ Topa in na lo ante le tuate sung pan na vawt uh ante thupha hong pia tu hi. 
Deuteronomy28:6 “ Topa in na sep na vawt theampo thupha hong pia tu hi. 
Deuteronomy28:7 “Na ngalte in note hong sim ciang Topa in amate zo tu hi. Amate in mun khat pan hong sim tu a, ahizong no kung pan mun theampo ah taikeak tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:8 “ Topa na Pathian in na nasepna uh thupha hong pia tu a, na ansaalte antang taw hong dimh tu hi. Ama ii hong piak na ngamsung uh ah thupha hong pia tu hi." 
Deuteronomy28:9 Topa na Pathian ii thu ni in, ama thupiak theampo na seam uh le, ama kamciamsa bangin ama mihing hong suaksak tu hi." 
Deuteronomy28:10 Tuaciang leitung mihingte theampo in note Topa ii a teal ama mihingte na hi uh hunlam hong mu tu uh a, hong kiita tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:11 “ Topa in no tungah hong piak tu in na taanghpupite tungah a kamciamsa ngam sungah ta tam mama, nganno tam mama, le an tam mama hong pia tu hi." 
Deuteronomy28:12 Ama in a na kholna van pan a hun zui in nguatui hong zusak tu a, na na sepna theampo uh thupha hong pia tu hi, tua hile note in minam tam mama te tungah sum na pukthaak tu uh a, ahizong kuama tung pan sum na pu buatu hi." 
Deuteronomy28:13 Topa na Pathian in minamte sungah lampui hong suaksak tu a, ngual nungzui na hi buatu hi; tuni in kong piak ama thupiak theampo thumaan takin na zui uh le note na nuamsa tawntung tu uh a, na kiamsuk ngei buatu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:14 Bangbang po ahizong hi thupiakte na nial ngei buatu uh a, a dang pathiante bia in a na na seam ngei buahet tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:15 “Ahizong tuni in kong piak Topa na Pathian ii hong thupiak theampo le thukham theampo thumaan takin zui ngawlin ama thu na ni bua uh le, hi siatna theampo note tungah hong tung tu hi." 
Deuteronomy28:16 “ Topa in na khuate le na lote haamsiat tu hi. 
Deuteronomy28:17 Topa in na lo ante le tuate sung pan na vawt uh ante haamsiat tu hi. 
Deuteronomy28:18 “ Topa in ta tawm bek a nei tu, an a zawng tu, le khui le tuu tawm bek a nei tu in note hong haamsiat tu hi." 
Deuteronomy28:19 “ Topa in na sep na vawt theampo haamsiat tu hi. 
Deuteronomy28:20 “A sia vawtin Topa na nial uh le, manlang takin na lalcip uh dong ama in tuasiatna, buaina le na sepna theampo ah ngimnate tungsak tu hi." 
Deuteronomy28:21 Ama in na laak tu ngam sungah khat zongh na taan nawn ngawl uh dongin natna khat zawkciang khat hong tungsak tu hi. 
Deuteronomy28:22 Topa in a kilaw thei natnate, citum le cisa natnate no tungah hong tungsak tu hi; ama in na lo ante a lalsak tu in nguatui kangsak a, vuisa vasak tu hi. Hi bang tuasiatnate na thi dong thuak tu nu hi." 
Deuteronomy28:23 Nguazu ngawl tu a, na leitangte thik bangin sak tu hi." 
Deuteronomy28:24 Na lalcip siat uh dong Topa in nguatui taangin leivui le senneal vuipite hong puak tu hi. 
Deuteronomy28:25 “ Topa in na ngalte in hong zosak tu hi. Note in mun khat pan na sim tu uh a, ahizong mun theampo ah na tai tu uh hi, note tungah thupiangte a mu uh ciang leitung mihingte theampo lau mama tu hi." 
Deuteronomy28:26 Na thi uh ciang vacimte le ngamsate hong pai in hong ne tu uh a, tuate a beng tu kuama om ngawl tu hi." 
Deuteronomy28:27 Topa in Egypt te tungah a tunsak bangma in note uilut hong veisak tu hi. Ama in na pumpite matum veisak tu hi. Cithak natna vei in thak na sa tu uh a, ahizong dam thei ngawl tu hi." 
Deuteronomy28:28 Topa in na thin hong kiamcipsak tu a; mittaw lungmangin hong buaisak tu hi. 
Deuteronomy28:29 Mittaw bangin sun lai in na zawt tu a, na lampi na mu thei buatu uh hi. Na sepna pawpo ah na maa uh a vang buatu hi. Note hong kinengcip in hong kisuttol tawntung tu a, hong hu tu kuama om ngawl tu hi." 
Deuteronomy28:30 Zi tu in ngaknu khat doksa in na koi tu a — ahizong midang khat in ama teenpui tu hi. Inn khat na sa tu a — ahizong a sungah na teang ngei buatu hi. Sapit na ciing tu a — ahizong a nga na ne ngei buatu hi. 
Deuteronomy28:31 Na khui sia na mu tangin kingo tu a, ahizong a sa bangma na ne buatu hi. Na laa sia na mu tangin kikai tu a, hong kipia kik nawn ngawl tu hi. Na tuu sia na ngalte tungah kipia tu a, hong hu tu kuama om ngawl tu hi." 
Deuteronomy28:32 “Na tapate le na tanute na mu tangin ngamdang mite tungah salin kipia tu hi. Na tate hong cia kik tu en in ni simin na mit zung na liang ahihang a luithawthong hi tu hi. 
Deuteronomy28:33 Haksa takin na ciin sa lo ante ngamdang minam khat in hong laksak tu a, bangma nga ngawlin nencipna le vawtsiatna bek na thuak tawntung tu hi." 
Deuteronomy28:34 Na thuaknate in na thin hong kiamcipsak tu hi. 
Deuteronomy28:35 Topa in na peangte a dam thei ngawl, a bot mama meimate dimsak tu hi; na lu pan na peang dong uilut dimsak tu hi." 
Deuteronomy28:36 “ Topa in nangma le na kumpipa sia nangma le na taanghpupite ii a teen ngeingawlna ngamdang ah hong paipui tu hi; tua munah thing le suang taw a kivawt pathiante ii na, na seam tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:37 Topa ii hong thethaang natu ngam tuatuam ah note tungah thupiangte hangin mihingte in lamdang sa tu uh hi; amate in note hong nunau in hong ciammui vawt tu uh hi. 
Deuteronomy28:38 “Thaici tam mama na ciing tu hi, ahizong tawm bek na la tu uh hi, banghang ziam cile na lo ante sia khaumawte in ne tu hi." 
Deuteronomy28:39 Sapitkung ciingin na pua tu a, ahizong na sapitnga lo ngawlin, sapittui na ne buatu uh hi, banghang ziam cile lungte in sapitkungte ne tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:40 Na ngamsung theampo ah olive kungte na ciing tu uh hi, ahizong olive thau peuma na nei buatu uh hi, banghang ziam cile a ngate pul siat tu hi." 
Deuteronomy28:41 Tapate le tanute na nei tu uh hi, ahizong no aa hi ngawl tu hi, banghang ziam cile amate in ngalmat thuak tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:42 Na thingkungte le na ankungte theampo lung in netum tu hi. 
Deuteronomy28:43 “Na ngam sungah a teang ngamdangmite in vaang nei vaial tu a, note na hi uh le dadamin na vaang bo tu hi." 
Deuteronomy28:44 Amate in no hong pukthaak tu sum nei tu a, ahihang note in na pukthaak tu sum bangma na nei buatu uh hi. A khakbel ciang amate in no hong uk tu hi." 
Deuteronomy28:45 “ Topa na Pathian thu ni ngawlin hong piak thukham theampo na zui ngawl hu in, hi tuasiatna teng no tungah hong tung tu a, na lal siat uh dong tuasiatnate hong om tu hi." 
Deuteronomy28:46 Tuate nangma le na suan na paalte tungah a tawntungin Pathian ii thukhenna tetti hi tu hi. 
Deuteronomy28:47 Topa in a nanam in thupha hong pia hi, ahizong lungdam, lungnuam in ama na na seam bua uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:48 Tua ahikom, Topa ii note kungah hong paisak tu ngalte ii na, na seam tu uh hi. Na theampo kitaangsamh in — ngilkial dangtaak le pumnguakin na om tu uh hi. Na lal siat uh dong Topa in nasia takin hong nengniam tu hi." 
Deuteronomy28:49 Topa in no hong langpan tu in a kampau na heak ngawl uh minam khat leimong panin hong puak tu hi. Muvanlai khat bangin amate in no hong man tu hi. 
Deuteronomy28:50 Amate ngongtat tu a, khangmoi, khanghaam, a kuama po hesuak ngawl tu hi." 
Deuteronomy28:51 Amate in na ngannote le na lo ante hong neaksak tu a, na pukthi tu uh hi. Amate in note atu in antang, sapittui, olive thau, khui ahibuale tuu hong nusiat ngawl tu a; na thi tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:52 Amate in Topa na Pathian ii no hong piak tu ngamsung khua theampo sim tu a, na muan na suan luphung saangte cimhtham tu hi." 
Deuteronomy28:53 “Na ngalte in na khuapite hong uumci ciang anneak tu cimaw in Topa na Pathian ii hong piak na tate sa ngawngawn na ne tu uh hi. 
Deuteronomy28:54 Nampi suan miphabel pa ngawngawn zongh ngalte ii hong uumci laitak cimaw mama tu a, neak tu dang om ngawl ahikom a tate pawlkhat ii sa ne tu hi. Ama in a tate sa sia a suapuipa, a it a zi, a taanglai a tate khat zongh hawm ngawl tu hi." 
Deuteronomy28:55  
Deuteronomy28:56 A hau lei hu in a peang in a vak ngeingawl nampi suan numei phabel ngawngawn zongh in tuabang ma in ngamta tu hi. Ngalte in a khua a uumci ciang anneak tu cimaw mama ahikom, a suak tung le a suaksa a nausente sa zongh ama in ne ku tu hi. Ama in a it a pasal le a tanote khat zongh hawm ngawl tu hi." 
Deuteronomy28:57  
Deuteronomy28:58 “Hi thubu sungah a ki at Pathian ii hong hilciannate theampo thumaan takin ni ngawlin a lamdang a kiitakhuai Topa na Pathian ii min na zatak vawt bua uh le," 
Deuteronomy28:59 ama in na suan na paalte tungah a dam thei ngawl natnate le a kikhaam zo ngeingawl a lauhuai a kilaw thei natnate tungsak tu hi. 
Deuteronomy28:60 Egypt ah noma thuaksa a lauhuai natnate theampo ama in khatvei hong tungsak kik tu a, na dam kik ngei buatu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:61 Hi Pathian thukhamte le kihilnate tepteena thubu sungah a kison ngawl natna namcin le a kilaw thei natnate zongh ama in tungsak tu a, na mong tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:62 Van ah aksi za in tam napi, Topa na Pathian thu na nit ngawl hu in, tawm bek nungta tu nu hi." 
Deuteronomy28:63 Note hong lapsaang na le hong punsak na thu ah Topa a lungkim bangma in, note hong mot natu le hong lalsak natu thu zongh ah ama lungkim veve tu hi. Na laak tu uh ngam pan note hong kilongkeak tu hi." 
Deuteronomy28:64 “ Topa in note sia leimong khat pan mong khat dong, minamte theampo sungah hong thethaang tu a, tualai ah noma le na taanghpupite ii biak ngeingawl pathiante, thing le suang taw a kivawt pathiante na, na seam tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:65 Koima ah thinnopna na mu buatu a, noma ngam ci tu in mun khat zongh na nei buatu uh hi; Topa in no sia thinngimna, lam et nei ngawlna le thinkiamna taw hong khuplup tu hi." 
Deuteronomy28:66 Na nuntakna uh lauhuai tawntung tu hi. Sun le zan in na patau tawntung tu uh a, thi tu lau in na nungta tawntung tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:67 Na mu theampo in na thin uh lausak tu hi. Zing simin nitak na thangai tu uh a, nitak simin zingsang na thangai tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:68 Ama in tua munah na pai kik ngei nawn buatu uh hi, hong cisa hikale Topa in teambawte taw Egypt ah hong puak kik tu hi. Tua munah sila in na ngalte tungah noma le noma na kizuak tu uh a, ahizong kuama in no hong lei nuam buatu hi,” ci hi." 
Deuteronomy29:1 Hite sia Moab ngam ah Israel mite taw a vawt tu thuciamna taw kisai in, Topa ii Moses tungah a sawl thute ahi hi; hi thuciamna theampo sia Topa ii amate taw Sinai Mual ah a vawt thuciamna belapna ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy29:2 Moses in Israel mite theampo sam khawmin amate tungah, “ Topa ii Egypt kumpipa, a uliante tung le a ngam bup ah a vawt nate noma ma in mu nu hi." 
Deuteronomy29:3 A lauhuai natnate, nalamdang laknate le Topa ii a vawt a lamdang thuliante mu nu hi." 
Deuteronomy29:4 Ahizong na sinsa thute tuni dong mama in ama in no hong telthiangsak ngawl lai hi. 
Deuteronomy29:5 Kum sawmli tawntung Topa in sennealngam hong kaanpui a, ahizong na puansilhte le na peangdapte uh sia ngeingawl hi." 
Deuteronomy29:6 Neak tu in anluum, dawn tu in sapittui ahibuale beer nei ngawl nu hi, ahizong ama sia na Pathian a hina thu hong hil nopna in na kisap bangin Topa in hong pia hi." 
Deuteronomy29:7 Tuaciang hi mun ih thet ciang ei hong sim tu in Heshbon kumpipa Sihon le Bashan kumpipa Og te hong pai hi. Ahizong eite in amate ih zo a," 
Deuteronomy29:8 a ngam la in, Reuben nam, Gad nam le Manasseh nam a lang teng nga tu in kihawmsak hi." 
Deuteronomy29:9 Na sep na vawt theampo na zaw natu in hi thuciam sungah a om theampo thumaan takin zui vun. 
Deuteronomy29:10 “Tuni in note theampo — na lampuite le na uliante, na pasalte," 
Deuteronomy29:11 nupite, patangte le no atu in thing hong tomsak, tui hong toaisak a, note sungah a teang ngamdangmite taw Topa na Pathian mai ah na ding siat uh hi." 
Deuteronomy29:12 Hi lai ah tuni in Topa na Pathian ii no taw a vawt hi thuciamna sungah a tum tu le, tuasia taw kisai sep tu te a saang tu in na om uh hi," 
Deuteronomy29:13 tuasia ciangin, note le na taanghpupite ahi, Abraham, Isaac, le Jacob tungah a kamciamsa bangin Topa in no ama mi na hina uh le ama note Pathian a hina kipsak thei tu hi." 
Deuteronomy29:14 Hi thuciamna le sep tu te sia note taw bekin Topa ii a vawt hi ngawl hi. 
Deuteronomy29:15 Tuni in ama mai ah a ding eite theampo le a suak ngawl lai ih suan ih paalte taw zong ama in hi thuciamnate a vawt ahi hi. 
Deuteronomy29:16 “Note in Egypt ah nuntakzia le minam dangte ngam sungah khualhawzia na phawk uh hi. 
Deuteronomy29:17 Thing, suang, ngunn le khamh taw a kivawt a kiihuai a milimte na mu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy29:18 Tuni in hi lai ah a ding, pa, numei, innkuan ahibuale minamte, kuama in Topa ih Pathian nungngat in minam dangte ii pathiante bia peuma heak vun. Hisia in a khaa le ngu a nei thingkung a hinna a zung khat taw kibang tu hi." 
Deuteronomy29:19 Tuni in hi lai ah a ciliaphuai hong nget tangkalnate za napi a thinpui in keima uuk bang pai leng ka ma vang tu zam a ci omsak peuma heak vun. Tuasia in note theampo a pha, a sia a kibangin hong lalsak siat tu hi." 
Deuteronomy29:20 Topa in tuabang mihing khat ii mawna maisak ngawl tu hi. Tua luangin Topa thin uukna sia tua pa atu in meileng bang hi tu a, Topa in ama a lalsak mateng in hi thubu sungah a ki at tuasiatnate theampo tung tu hi." 
Deuteronomy29:21 Topa in ama Israel nam theampo mai ah teengatna khatin nei tu a, Topa ii hilcianna thubu sungah a ki at ahi, thuciamna ah a kikoi haamsiatna theampo taw kizui in tuasiatna tungsak tu hi." 
Deuteronomy29:22 “Mailam khang kikte sungah na suan na paalte le ngam khuala pan ngamdangmite in na ngam sungah Topa ii hong puak tuasiatnate le ngim thuaknate mu tu uh hi. 
Deuteronomy29:23 Na lote kolh siat tu a, kaan le ci taw kidim tu hi; bangma kiciing thei ngawl tu a, lopa ngawngawn po ngawl tu hi. Na ngam uh sia, Topa ii a thinso lai in a lalcipsak Sodom le Gomorrah, Admah le Zeboiim khuapite taw kibang tu hi." 
Deuteronomy29:24 Tuasia ciang leitung buppi in, ‘Banghang Topa in amate ngam hi bang vawt ziam? Bang thu hangin Topa a thin uuk ziam?’ ci in dongh tu hi." 
Deuteronomy29:25 Tuaciang, ‘A taanghpupite ii Pathian in Egypt ngam pan a pusuapui lai in amate taw a vawt thuciamna sia Topa ii mite in a palsat hang ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy29:26 Topa ii a biak ngawl tu in a khaam pathiante, nidang a biak ngeingawl pathian dangte ii na seam uh hi." 
Deuteronomy29:27 Tua ahikom Topa in a mite tungah thin uuk in, hi thubu sungah a ki at tuasiatnate theampo amate ngam sungah tungsak hi." 
Deuteronomy29:28 Topa thin uuk mama a, a thin uukna lian ahikom a ngamsung pan longhkeak in ngamdang denna in nei a, tuni dongin tua munah amate om uh hi,’ ci sia a kizo kikna hi tu hi." 
Deuteronomy29:29 “ Topa ih Pathian ii a kep tuam thuku pawlkhat om hi; ahizong ama in a Thukham hong pualaak zo a, eite le ih suan ih paalte in tuasia a tawntungin a zui tute ih hi hi." 
Deuteronomy30:1 “Tu in note thupha le haamsiatna khat sasang na teal tu in kong pia zo hi. Hi thu theampo note tungah hong pian zawkciang le Topa na Pathian ii hong thethaang na mun minamte sungah na teen uh ciang, na teal tu in kong piak sia na phawk kik tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy30:2 Note le na suan na paalte in Topa kungah heak kikin, tuni a kong piak ama thupiakte na thin theampo taw na zui uh le," 
Deuteronomy30:3 Topa na Pathian in no hong hesuak tu hi. Ama in note hong thethaang na ngamte pan hong pui kik tu a, hong nuamsasak kik tu hi." 
Deuteronomy30:4 A khualabel leimong tengah na kithethaang keak uh zongin Topa na Pathian in note hong kaikhawm in hong pui kik tu a," 
Deuteronomy30:5 khatvei lai na taanghpupite ii teenna ngam le lei na nga kik tu uh hi. Tuaciang ama in na taanghpupite om ngei bang sangin a nuamsa zaw le a pung zaw in hong siam tu hi. 
Deuteronomy30:6 Na thin theampo taw ama na it natu uh le tua ngam ah na teen suak thei natu uh in Topa na Pathian in note le na suan na paalte tungah thu nit nopna thin hong pia tu hi. 
Deuteronomy30:7 Ama in no hong ngaimaw le hong nengniam na ngalte tungah hi haamsiatna theampo tungsak tu hi," 
Deuteronomy30:8 tuni in kong piak ama thupiakte theampo na keamcing tu uh a, ama thu na ni kik tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy30:9 Na nasepna theampo ah Topa in hong nuamsasak tu a; ta tam le nganno tam mama nei in, na lote pan an tam tatak piang tu hi. Na taanghpupite bangma in no zong a nuamsa in hong siam tu sia ama lungdam tu hi," 
Deuteronomy30:10 ahizong ama hilciannate a kikhumna hi thubu sungah a ki at a thukham theampo zui in a thu na nit uh kul tu hi. Note in na thinsung theampo uh taw ama na zot uh kul tu hi. 
Deuteronomy30:11 “Tuni kong thupiak sia haksa lei ngawl a, zui laak tu zongh hi ngawl hi." 
Deuteronomy30:12 Tuasia van ah a om hi ngawl hi. ‘Eite zaak thei tu le zui thei tu in akua kaato in tua thu hong puaksuk tu ziam?’ ci in kidok kul ngawl hi. 
Deuteronomy30:13 Tuipi ngalkhat ah a om thu zongh hi ngawl hi. ‘Eite zaak thei tu le ih zui thei tu in akua in tuipi kaantan in ei kungah hong paipui tu ziam’ ci in dok kul ngawl hi. 
Deuteronomy30:14 Tuabang hi ngawl hi, hi lai ah note taw omkhawm hi. Note in na he uh a, zongh, na son kaak thei uh hi, tua ahiciang tu in zui vun." 
Deuteronomy30:15 “Tuni in a pha le a sia, nuntakna le thina khat sasang na teal tu kong pia hi." 
Deuteronomy30:16 Tuni in kong piak Topa na Pathian ii thupiakte na zui uh le, tuaciang ama it in, a thu ni in a thukham theampo na zui uh le, note na nuamsa tu uh a, a pung minam khat na suak tu uh hi. Note laak tu ngam ah Topa na Pathian in thupha hong pia tu hi." 
Deuteronomy30:17 Ahizong a thu ni ngawl nangai ngawlin, pathian dangte a bia tu in lam na pial uh le," 
Deuteronomy30:18 tu in hi lai ah kidop natu in kong son hi — note hong kilalcipsak siat tu hi. Na laak tu uh ngam, Jordan ngun ngalkhat ah khuangei nungta ngawl tu nu hi." 
Deuteronomy30:19 Tu in khat sasang na teal tu uh nuntakna le thina, Pathian ii thupha le Pathian ii haamsiatna kong pia a, na teal uh sia hong heakpui tu in vantung le leitung ka ko hi. Nuntakna teal vun." 
Deuteronomy30:20 Topa na Pathian it vun, a thu ni vun, ama tungah thumaan vun, tuasia ciang, na taanghpupite ahi Abraham, Isaac, le Jacob tungah piak tu a, a kamciamna ngam sungah noma le na suan na paalte khansau in na nungta tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Deuteronomy31:1 Moses in Israel mite tungah a thuson zom lai a," 
Deuteronomy31:2 “Tu in kum za le kum kul ka pha a, note ii lampui hi zo nawn ngawl tu khi hi. Tua bek dom ngawlin Topa in Jordan ngun kan ngawl tu ni hi, hong ci hi." 
Deuteronomy31:3 Amate ngam na laak thei natu uh in Topa na Pathian ama mama na mai uh ah pai tu a, tua ngam ah a teang minamte lalcipsak tu hi; Tuaciang Topa ci sa bangin Joshua sia note lampui hi tu hi." 
Deuteronomy31:3 Amate ngam na laak thei natu uh in Topa na Pathian ama mama na mai uh ah pai tu a, tua ngam ah a teang minamte lalcipsak tu hi; Tuaciang Topa ci sa bangin Joshua sia note lampui hi tu hi." 
Deuteronomy31:4 Topa in Amor kumpipate ahi Sihon le Og zo in, a ngam a lalcipsak bangma in tua mite lalcipsak tu hi." 
Deuteronomy31:5 Topa in amate hong zosak tu a, kong sonsa bang linlian in amate na vawt tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy31:6 Na thin khosak vun a, kimuang vun. Amate kiita heak vun. Na Pathian, Topa ama mama in note hong ompui tu hi. Ama in note hong lelsak ngawl tu a, hong taisan ngawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
Deuteronomy31:7 Tuaciang Moses in Joshua sam a, Israel mite theampo ii mai ama tungah, “Na thin khosak in a, kimuang in; a taanghpupite tungah Topa kamciam omsa ngam a la tu hi mite a lampui tu sia nangma ni hi." 
Deuteronomy31:7 Tuaciang Moses in Joshua sam a, Israel mite theampo ii mai ama tungah, “Na thin khosak in a, kimuang in; a taanghpupite tungah Topa kamciam omsa ngam a la tu hi mite a lampui tu sia nangma ni hi." 
Deuteronomy31:8 Topa ama mama in nangma lam hong pui in, hong ompui tu hi. Ama in nang hong nusia ngawl tu a, hong taisan ngawl tu hi, tua ahiciang thinno heak in a, lau heak in,” ci hi." 
Deuteronomy31:9 Tuaciang Moses in Pathian Thukham at in, Topa Thuciamna Thingkuang a keam Levi thiampite le Israel lampuite tungah pia hi." 
Deuteronomy31:10 Moses in amate thupia a, “Kum sali a cin sim, leiba maisak kum hong thet ciang Buk Poai ah hisia a ngingin sim vun." 
Deuteronomy31:11 Biakna mun khat sia ah Israel mite Topa na Pathian bia tu in hong pai uh ciang hi thukham sia amate tungah sim vun. 
Deuteronomy31:12 A kuama po in hisia za thei a, Topa na Pathian a zatak vawt thei natu le ama ii thuhilte thumaan takin a zui thei natu in pa, numei, patang te le noma khuate ah a teang ngamdangmite a vekpi in sam khawm vun." 
Deuteronomy31:13 Topa na Pathian ii Thukham a za ngeingawl na suan na paalte in hi bangin za tu uh hi. Tuasia ciang Jordan ngun ngalkhat na laak tu ngam sungah a teen laiteng ama thu a nit thei natu in amate in sin tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Deuteronomy31:14 Tuaciang Topa in Moses tungah, “Khuangei nungta nawn ngawl tu ni hi. Keima in Joshua thu ka hil thei natu in ama samin Puanbuk ah hong paipui ta'n,” ci hi. Moses le Joshua Puanbuk ah pai a," 
Deuteronomy31:14 Tuaciang Topa in Moses tungah, “Khuangei nungta nawn ngawl tu ni hi. Keima in Joshua thu ka hil thei natu in ama samin Puanbuk ah hong paipui ta'n,” ci hi. Moses le Joshua Puanbuk ah pai a," 
Deuteronomy31:15 tualai Puanbuk kongbiang ah meeikhuam khat sung pan amate tungah Topa hong kilangh hi. 
Deuteronomy31:16 Topa in Moses tungah, “Thi pal tu ni hi, na thi zawkciang mihingte kei tungah hong thumaan ngawl tu a, amate taw ka vawt thuciamna sia palsat tu uh hi. Amate in kei hong taisan tu a, a tum natu ngamsung doai biate ii pathiante bia tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy31:17 Tuabang teng a pian ciang amate tungah ka thin uuk tu hi; amate ka taisan tu a, amate kimon tu hi. A lauhuai natna tuatuamte amate tungah theng tu hi, tuasia ciang keima a Pathian sia amate taw omkhawm nawn ngawl ka hikom hi thu teng piang hi cisia amate in tel tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy31:18 Tuasia hun ciang amate ka hu buatu hi, banghang ziam cile amate a sia in ngamta zo a, pathian dangte bia uh hi." 
Deuteronomy31:19 “Tu in, la hisia at in. Amate langpanna tetti ahi natu in la hisia Israel mihingte hil in." 
Deuteronomy31:20 A taanghpupite tungah ka kamciamsa bangin hi ngampha le ngamnuam ah amate ka pui tu hi. Tualai ah amate du an theampo nei tu uh a, nuam takin teang tu uh hi. Ahizong amate in hong nungngat in pathian dangte bia tu uh hi. Amate in kei hong nial tu a, ka thuciam palsat tu uh hi," 
Deuteronomy31:21 tuaciang, a lauhuai natna tuatuamte amate tungah tung tu hi. Ahizong hi la kisa lai tu a, tuasia in amate a kilangpanna tetti hi tu hi. Tu laitak amate piak tu in ka khapsa ngam ah ka tumpui ma ngawngawn in amate ngaisutna ka he hi,” ci hi." 
Deuteronomy31:22 Tua ni ma in Moses in tua la at a, Israel mite hil hi." 
Deuteronomy31:23 Tua zawkciang Topa in Nun tapa Joshua a paupuina sungah, “Kimuang in a, na thin khosak in. Ka khapsa ngam sungah Israel mite lam na pui tu a, nangma taw kong omkhawm tu hi,” ci hi." 
Deuteronomy31:23 Tua zawkciang Topa in Nun tapa Joshua a paupuina sungah, “Kimuang in a, na thin khosak in. Ka khapsa ngam sungah Israel mite lam na pui tu a, nangma taw kong omkhawm tu hi,” ci hi." 
Deuteronomy31:24 Moses in laibu khat sungah Pathian Thukham at a, khat zongh a kheet ngawl natu in kidawm hi." 
Deuteronomy31:25 A man zawkciang, Topa Thuciamna Thingkuang a keam Levi thiampite tungah ama in," 
Deuteronomy31:26 “Pathian ii Thukham hi thubu sia la vun a, ama mite langkhat ah tetti in tua munah a om top thei natu in Topa na Pathian ii Thuciamna Thingkuang hui ah koi vun." 
Deuteronomy31:27 Amate bang zata thinpui in bangbang hong langpan nuam cisia ka he hi. Ka nuntak sungin amate in Topa sia hi zata langpan ahile ka thi zawkciang langpan seseam tu uh hi. 
Deuteronomy31:28 Hi thute amate tungah ka son thei natu in na nam lampuite le uliante a vekpi in ka mai ah khawmtua vun; Amate langkhat ah ka tetti tu in vantung le leitung ka ko tu hi. 
Deuteronomy31:29 Ka thi zawkciang, amate ka hil sa thute a nial mi seksol a sua tu sia ka he hi. Amate in Topa ii a khaamte a vawtna taw in ama thin uuksak ahi hu in mai sangah tuasiatna thuak tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Deuteronomy31:30 Tuaciang Moses in a nuai a la teng theampo suut a, Israel mite theampo in ngai uh hi." 
Deuteronomy32:1 “Van le lei awng, ka kammalte za vun a, ka ci teng hong ngai cinten tavun." 
Deuteronomy32:2 Kong hilcianna nguamal bangin taak tu a, leitung ah daaitui kia bang hi tu hi. Ka kammalte sia thingkungnote tungah nguamal phiin bangin lopa moite tungah dam takin a zu nguatui bangin taak tu hi." 
Deuteronomy32:3 Topa min ka pok tu a, a mite in a letna son tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy32:4 “ Topa sia note hong dal a hatbelpa hi a, A sepzia theampo kicing in maan hi; Na Pathian thumaan in thutak a; Ama in a maan le a pha in seam hi." 
Deuteronomy32:5 Ahizong note sia thumaan ngawlin ama ii mi tu in na citaak bua uh a, mawnei le a ngualtheam thei minam na hi uh hi." 
Deuteronomy32:6 A mawmaw, khuangaisut nei ngawl mite awng, hi bangin Topa vawt tu nu ziam? Ama sia no hong Bitphua pa, na pa uh hi a, minam khatin hong vawt pa ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy32:7 “A bosa hunte, nidang lai hunte, ngaisun tavun; Thupiangte hong son tu in na pate dongh tavun, a bosa thute son tu in khanghaamte dongh tavun." 
Deuteronomy32:8 A Saangbel Pa in minamte a ngam a lei tu pia a; mite teen natu mun khensatsak hi. Ama in minam simin vantung mi khat tek pia a," 
Deuteronomy32:9 ahizong Jacob suan le paalte sia ama atu in teal hi. 
Deuteronomy32:10 “Ama in a ngamtongta vuipi vakna duisung ngampa sennealngam sungah amate vakkotna mu hi. Ama in ama le ama a kikep bangin amate keamcing hi. 
Deuteronomy32:11 Muvanlai in a note len tu sinpui a, manin a kiphal thakhuite tungah bit tak a koi bangin, Topa in Israel te a taak natu pan keamcing hi." 
Deuteronomy32:12 Topa bek in ama mite lampui a, ngamdang pathian khat ii huna kihel ngawl hi." 
Deuteronomy32:13 “ Topa in amate mualtung munte uksak a, amate in lo pan a piangte ne uh hi. Amate in suang kawmah khuaitui mu uh a, suanghol lei sungah a olive kungte limci hi." 
Deuteronomy32:14 A khuipuite le a kealpuite in noai tam tatak ma pia a, amate in tuu, keal le khui phabel, zungtaang phabel le sapittui deitealte nei uh hi." 
Deuteronomy32:15 “ Topa ii mite hau uh a, ahizong Topa leedo uh hi; amate an khamin thau uh hi. Amate in a Bitphuapa Pathian taisan uh a, a vaanglian hunpa nial uh hi." 
Deuteronomy32:16 A milim biakna Topa in ensan a; a pha ngawl a sepna in Topa thin uuksak hi. 
Deuteronomy32:17 Amate in pathian tatak ahi ngawl pathiante, a taanghpupite ii a heak ngawl pathian thakte Israel te ii a thu a nit ngeingawl pathiante tungah sangaw biakpiakna vawt uh hi;" 
Deuteronomy32:18 Amate in a vaanglian ngumpa, amate nuntakna a pia pa, a Pathian mangil uh hi." 
Deuteronomy32:19 “Hi thu teng Topa in a mu ciang a thin uuk a, a tapate le a tanute nial hi." 
Deuteronomy32:20 ‘Amate ka hu nawn buatu hi,’ ama in ci hi; ‘tuasia ciang a thinpuite le a thumaan ngawl mite tungah bang piang ziam ka en tu hi." 
Deuteronomy32:21 Amate in a milimte taw ka thin hong uuksak a, Pathian tatak a hi ngawlte amate ii pathian a ci uhte taw ka etsat natu hong vawt uh hi. Tua ahikom amate thin a uuksak tu in minam a kici thawthong khat ka zangh tu hi; a mawmaw minam khat in amate ka ensansak tu hi." 
Deuteronomy32:22 Ka thin uukna sia mei bangin kuang a, leitung a om na theampo kaangh siat tu hi. Leinuai dong thengsuk tu a, mualpeangte zongh kaanghtum siat tu hi." 
Deuteronomy32:23 “‘Keima in amate tungah a bo thei ngawl tuasiatnate ka tungsak tu a, ka thaltang theampo taw amate ka kap tu hi." 
Deuteronomy32:24 Amate ngilkial le cisa natna taw thi tu a; a lauhuai natnate taw thi tu uh hi. Ngamsa ngilote in amate ka simsak tu a, ngul ngu neite in ka tusak tu hi." 
Deuteronomy32:25 Ngalpi hangin amate lam lai ah thi tu uh a; a bangkua uh sungah patauna tung tu hi. Tangvalno le ngaknuno te thi tu uh a; nausente le khanghaamte zongh kikhoaikhe ngawl tu hi. 
Deuteronomy32:26 Keima in amate ka mon siat tu a, tua hile kuama in amate ciamtee ngawl tu hi." 
Deuteronomy32:27 Ahizong amate a hualcip pa keima ma ka hi ciang a ngalte in ka mite a zawna thu sia kiphatsakna in ka neisak thei buatu hi,’ ci hi." 
Deuteronomy32:28 “Israel sia khua ngaisutna nei ngawl minam khat hi a; ciimna bangma nei ngawl hi. 
Deuteronomy32:29 Amate in a ngallelna ii ahang sia mu ngawl a; thupiangte tel zo ngawl uh hi. 
Deuteronomy32:30 Banghangin mi khat in tulkhat zo a, mi nii bek in tulsawm zo thei ziam? Topa a Pathian in amate nusia zo hi; a thahat Pathian in amate koithong zo hi." 
Deuteronomy32:31 A ngalte in amate ii pathiante thazawm a, a thahat Israel te ii Pathian taw a kiban ngawlna thu he uh hi." 
Deuteronomy32:32 A ngalte Sodom le Gomorrah bangin tatsia a, a ngate khaa in ngu a nei sapitkungte taw kibangin," 
Deuteronomy32:33 sapittui sia ngulngu taw vawt bang ahi hi. 
Deuteronomy32:34 “ Topa in a ngalte ii vawtna teng ciamtee a; daan a piak hun tu ngak nginge hi. 
Deuteronomy32:35 Topa in amate phula in daan pia tu a; a kiamsuk tu hun hong pai tu a; a lal tu ni nai hi. 
Deuteronomy32:36 A thahatna teng a bo a mu ciang Topa in a mite suatak tu hi. Ama in a naseamte a panpui tu a om ngawl hunlam a mu ciang, ama na a seamte hesuak tu hi." 
Deuteronomy32:37 Tuasia ciang Topa in a mite tungah, ‘Na suan na muan tua a thahat pathiante koisungah om ziam’ ci in dongh tu hi." 
Deuteronomy32:38 Noma in na sangaw biakpiakna sathau taw amate na vaak uh a, a neak tu in sapittui na pia uh hi. Tu in amate hong hu tu in paisak vun. Noma hong suatak tu in delsak vun." 
Deuteronomy32:39 “ ‘Keima, keima bekma Pathian ka hi hi; pathian tatak a dang om ngawl hi. Ka thatlum a, nuntakna ka pia hi, ka liamsak a, ka damsak hi, ka nasepte kuama in hong nalh thei ngawl tu hi." 
Deuteronomy32:40 Keima in a nungta Pathian ka hi takpi bangma in, ka khut laamin," 
Deuteronomy32:41 a tee vazal ka namsau ka taat tu a, thutang khenna ka musak tu hi, ci in ka kiciam hi. Ka ngalte tungah phu ka la tu a, keima hong ngaimawte daan ka pia tu hi." 
Deuteronomy32:42 Ka thaltangte amate chi sungah kidia tu a, ka namsau in kei hong nalh theampo that tu hi. Kei hong dote kuama ka khoaikhe buatu a; a liamte le thongtaakte ngawngawn thi tu uh hi.’" 
Deuteronomy32:43 “Minamte awng Topa ii mite pok hamtang tu nu hi — ama in ama ii mite a thatte theampo daan pia hi. Ama in a ngalte phula a, a mite mawnate maisak hi.”" 
Deuteronomy32:44 Moses le Nun tapa Joshua in Israel mite zaak thei tu in, hi la suut uh hi." 
Deuteronomy32:44 Moses le Nun tapa Joshua in Israel mite zaak thei tu in, hi la suut uh hi." 
Deuteronomy32:45 Moses in mite tungah Pathian ii hilnate a son zawkciang," 
Deuteronomy32:46 ama in, “Tuni in kong piak thupiakte theampo zui hamtang vun. Pathian ii hilnate theampo thumaan takin a zui thei natu in na tate tungah son kikik vun." 
Deuteronomy32:47 Hi hilnate kammal thawthong hi ngawl a; na nuntakna tatak uh ahi hi. Tuate zui vun, tua hile na laak tu uh Jordan ngalkhat ngam ah khansau in na nungta tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Deuteronomy32:48 Tua ni ma in Topa in Moses tungah," 
Deuteronomy32:49 “Jericho khuapi ii langkhat a om Moab te ngamsung Abarim Mual te ah pai in a, Nebo Mual tungah kaato in, Israel mite ka piak tu Canaan leitang en in." 
Deuteronomy32:50 Na suapuipa Aaron ii Hor Mual tungah a thi bangin tua mual tungah na thi tu hi," 
Deuteronomy32:51 banghang ziam cile note ngeal in Israel mite mai ah keima hong melsia in nong thumaan bua uh hi. Zin ngampa sung Kadesh khua nai tui omna Meribah ah na om uh lai in, mite mai ah kei nong zatak vawt bua uh hi." 
Deuteronomy32:52 Tua ngam sia na ngal et tu a, ahizong Israel mite ka piak tu ngam sungah na tum buatu hi,” ci hi." 
Deuteronomy33:1 Hite sia Pathian ii teal pa Moses in a thi ma in Israel mite tungah a thansak thuphate ahi hi. 
Deuteronomy33:2 Sinai Mual pan Topa hong pai a; Edom ngam tungah ni bangin suak in, Paran Mual pan a mite tungah taang hi. Vantunglalangte tulsawm ama taw omkhawm a, a ziatsang khut taw meikuang khat toai hi." 
Deuteronomy33:3 Topa in a mite it a, ama ii neisa mite sungsia hi. Tua ahikom, eite a peang ah kunin ama thupiakte ih zui hi." 
Deuteronomy33:4 Ih minam ii neisa a manphabel Moses ii hong piaksa thukham ih zui hi. 
Deuteronomy33:5 Tua nam teng le a lampuite a kikaikhop ciang, Topa sia ama ii Israel mite kumpi suak hi." 
Deuteronomy33:6 Moses in Reuben nam huvau hi bangin ci hi: “A mite a tawm hangin Reuben nam mong ngei heak hen. 
Deuteronomy33:7 Ama in Judah nam huvau hi bangin ci hi: “ Topa awng, amate ii hu hong ngetna aw ngai in; Nam dangte taw ngawm khawm kik in. Topa awng, amate atu ngaldosak in. Tuaciang a ngalte ii a sim ciang amate hu in,” ci hi." 
Deuteronomy33:8 Ama in Levi nam huvau hi bangin ci hi: “ Topa awng, nangma deina sia Urim le Thummim taw pualaak in. A thumaan na Levi naseamte tungtawnin pualaak in; Massah ah amate na ze et a Meribah tui ah amate ii a maanna thu na lak hi." 
Deuteronomy33:9 Amate in nangma tungah a nute a pate, a suapui pate le a tate tung sangin a lian zaw thumaan na lak hi. Amate in na thupiakte ni in, na thuciam tungah thumaan uh hi." 
Deuteronomy33:10 Amate in na thukham a zui thei natu in na mite hil tu hi; Na biaknatau tungah sangaw biakpiaknate pia tu uh hi. 
Deuteronomy33:11 Topa awng, amate nam ii a thahat natu in hu in; A nasepna ah lungkim in. A ngalte theampo hualcip in; tuate tho kiksak ngei heak in,” ci hi." 
Deuteronomy33:12 Ama in Benjamin nam huvau hi bangin ci hi: “Hite Topa ii it le a kepcing nam ahi hi. Ama in sunkhuateakin amate cing a, tuaciang amate sungah ama teang hi,” ci hi." 
Deuteronomy33:13 Ama in Joseph nam huvau hi bangin ci hi: “ Topa in a ngam a lei sia nguatui le leinuai tui taw thupha pia tahen. 
Deuteronomy33:14 A ngam a lei in thupha nga hen a, ni taw a min thingngate le khuahun zui in a nga thingnga phabelte taw kidim tahen." 
Deuteronomy33:15 A taanghtawng mualte sia deiteal thingngate taw kidim tahen. 
Deuteronomy33:16 A ngam a lei sia napha theampo taw kidim hen a, Sawlpaang kuang sung pan a pau Topa ii phatna taw thupha nga tahen. Hi thuphate Joseph ii nam tungah tung tahen, Banghang ziam cile ama sia a suapuipate sungah lampui ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy33:17 Joseph in khuital khat ii thahatna nei a, Ngam khuital kiite nei hi. Ama kiite sia Manasseh mi a tul a tul le Ephraim mi tulsawmte ahi hi. Tuate taw minamte sii a, leimong dongah nawk hi,” ci hi." 
Deuteronomy33:18 Ama in Zebulun le Issachar minamte huvau hi bangin ci hi: “Zelubun sia tuipi tungah sum vawtna taw nuamsa tahen a, Issachar ii hauna sia inn sungah khang tahen." 
Deuteronomy33:19 Amate in a mual tungah ngamdang mite sam a, tualai ah a maan sangaw biakpiaknate pia hi. Amate in a hauna sia tuipi pan le tuipi hui sen panin nga uh hi,” ci hi." 
Deuteronomy33:20 Ama in Gad nam huvau hi bangin ci hi: “Amate ngam a zaisak pa Pathian pok vun. Gad in tawpi khat bangin a lu a baan khat balkeak tu in pang hi. 
Deuteronomy33:21 Amate in amate atu in ngam phabelna mun la tu hi; Lampui khat ii tel amate kipia hi. Israel lampuite a kikaikhop tek ciang, amate in Topa ii thupiakte le thukhamte zui uh hi,” ci hi." 
Deuteronomy33:22 Ama in Dan nam huvau hi bangin ci hi: “Dan sia tawpi no khat ahi hi; Ama sia Bashan panin leang hi,” ci hi." 
Deuteronomy33:23 Ama in Naphtali nam huvau hi bangin ci hi: “Naphtali sia Topa ii maipha nga in nasia takin thupha kipia hi, A ngam sia Galilee tuili pan thangsang dong thengsuk hi,” ci hi." 
Deuteronomy33:24 Ama in Asher nam huvau hi bangin ci hi: “Asher sia nam dangte sangin thupha kipia zaw hi. Ama a suapuipate ii diksakbel hi hen a, a ngam olive kungte taw kidim tahen." 
Deuteronomy33:25 A khuate thik kongpite taw kidal hen a, Ngammuang in nungta tawntung tahen,” ci hi." 
Deuteronomy33:26 Israel mite awng, noma hong hu tu in meei tungah a to, a vaangletna taw van kaantan in a pai Noma ii Pathian taw a kibang pathian peuma om ngawl hi." 
Deuteronomy33:27 Pathian in note hong dal tawntung zo a; A tawntung a om ama ii khutte in no hong panpui hi. Ama in maisang na manaw kawkawmin na ngalte notkeak a, Amate a mon tu in no hong sawl hi." 
Deuteronomy33:28 Tuabangin Jacob suan le paalte van pan a taak daaitui ii a kawtsakna mun, an le sapittui taw a kidimna ngamah ngammuang thinnuam in teang uh hi." 
Deuteronomy33:29 Israel awng, bangza in lungdam nu ziam! Topa ii a ngup note taw kibang minam khat zongh om ngawl hi. Topa ama mama na lum le na namsau hi a, note hong dal tu le zawna hong pia tu ahi hi. Na ngalte in hesuak ngenin hong pai tu a, tuaciang amate na tuanhcil tu uh hi." 
Deuteronomy34:1 Moses sia Moab zaangtam pan Nebo Mual, Jericho nisuana sang Pisgah Mual dawn ah paito a, tualai ah Topa in ngam le lei buppi lak hi: Gilead ngam saksang Dan khua dong;" 
Deuteronomy34:2 Naphtali ngam bup, Ephraim le Manasseh ngam teng; Judah ngam nitumna sang ah Mediterranean tuipi dong;" 
Deuteronomy34:3 Judah ngamkhen thangsang; tuaciang Zoar zaangtam panin palm pona khuapi Jericho dong zaangtam teng lak hi. 
Deuteronomy34:4 Tua zawkciang Topa in Moses tungah, “Hi ngam le lei sia a suan a paalte tungah piak tu in Abraham, Isaac, le Jacob tungah ka kamciamsa ahi hi. Nang kong musak zo a, ahizong tua munah kong paisak buatu hi,” ci hi." 
Deuteronomy34:5 Tua ahiciang Topa ii naseampa Moses sia, Topa ii a cisa bangin tua mun Moab ngam sungah thi hi." 
Deuteronomy34:6 Topa in Moses sia Bethpeor khua langkhat, Moab kuam sungah phum a, ahizong tuni dongin ama a kiphumna mun san tatak kuama in he ngawl hi." 
Deuteronomy34:7 Moses sia kum za le kum kul a phak ciang thi a; a tha a ngal zongh a hat ngei za ma in hat lai in, a mit khua muna zongh pha lai hi." 
Deuteronomy34:8 Israel mite Moab zaangtam ah ama atu in ni sawmthum sung khuangai in om uh hi. 
Deuteronomy34:9 Nun tapa Joshua sia ciimna taw kidim hi, banghang ziam cile Moses in ama zalaih tu in koi zo hi. Israel mite in Joshua thu ni a, Topa ii Moses tungtawnin a thupiakte zui uh hi." 
Deuteronomy34:9 Nun tapa Joshua sia ciimna taw kidim hi, banghang ziam cile Moses in ama zalaih tu in koi zo hi. Israel mite in Joshua thu ni a, Topa ii Moses tungtawnin a thupiakte zui uh hi." 
Deuteronomy34:10 Topa in ama taw maitang kisi in paupui hi. Moses bang ahi Israel mite sungah kamsaang khat zongh om ngeingawl hi; 
Deuteronomy34:11 Topa in Moses sawlin Egypt kumpipa, a uliante tung le a ngamsung tengah nalamdang laknate le a lamdangte a vawt bangin a vawt ngei kamsaang dang om ngawl hi." 
Deuteronomy34:12 Israel te theampo ii mit mu in Moses ii na lianpi le a lauhuai nate a vawt bangin a vawt thei kamsaang dang om ngawl hi. 
Joshua1:1 Topa ii naseam Moses thi zawkciang, Moses a hu, Nun ii tapa Joshua sia Topa in paupui hi." 
Joshua1:2 Ama in, “Ka naseampa Moses thi zo hi. Tu in kithoai in, nang le Israel mite theampo awng, amate tungah ka piaksa ngam ah a tum tu in Jordan ngun kaantan vun." 
Joshua1:3 Moses tungah ka ci sa bangma in nang le ka mite theampo ii na si natu leitang a buppi in kong pia zo hi. 
Joshua1:4 Na ngamngi te sia thangsang sennealngam panin saksang Lebanon Mualpite dong kithung to tu hi; nisuana sang Ngunpi lian Euphrates pan Hit te ngam kaantan in, nitumna sang Mediterranean Tuipi dong hi tu hi." 
Joshua1:5 Joshua awng, na nuntak lai teng nang sia kuama in hong zo zo ngawl tu hi. Moses ka ompui bangma in nang kong ompui tu hi. Nang taw a tawntungin kong omkhawm tu hi; nang kong nusia buatu hi." 
Joshua1:6 Na thin khosak in a kimuang in, banghang ziam cile a taanghpupite tungah ka kamciamsa hi ngam le lei a laak uh ciang hi mite ii lampui pa na hi tu hi." 
Joshua1:7 Na thin khosak in a kimuang po in; tuaciang ka naseampa Moses ii hong piak Thukham a buppi in na zui hamtang in. Tuate khat zongh na ngaingon heak in, tua hi le na paina theampo ah zawna na nga tu hi." 
Joshua1:8 Na biakpiakna sungah Thukham Laibu sia sim vateei tawntung tu ni hi. Sun taw zan taw tuasia kantel in a ki at theampo na zui hamtang vun. Tuasia ciang na nuamsa tu a, zawna na nga tu hi." 
Joshua1:9 Thin takkhana le kimuanna nei tu in kong thupiak sia ciamtee in! Lau heak in a, na thin kiamsak heak in, banghang ziam cile Kei, Topa na Pathian sia na paina theampo ah nang taw kong omkhawm hi,” ci hi." 
Joshua1:10 Tua zawkciang Joshua in lampuite ngiaphual sungah 
Joshua1:11 pai kawkoai in sawl a, mite tungah hi bangin thupiasak hi, “Nguai an pawlkhat taw kinging vun, banghang ziam cile tu zo ni thum sung, Topa na Pathian ii hong piak ngam le lei a la tu in Jordan ngun na kaantan tu uh hi.”" 
Joshua1:12 Reuben le Gad ii namte le Manasseh ii nam khenlang tungah Joshua in," 
Joshua1:13 “ Topa na Pathian in Jordan ngun nisuana ngam sia na inn na lo tu in hong pia tu hi ci in Topa naseampa Moses ii a ci teng ciamtee vun. 
Joshua1:14 Na zite na tate le na ngannote sia hi lai munah taang tu a, ahihang ngalhiam toaisa na ngalkapte sia Israel mipuite mai ah a hu tu in ngun kaantan tu hi." 
Joshua1:15 Topa na Pathian ii amate a piaksa Jordan nitumna sang ngam teng a laak uh mateng tuabangin ngamta tu nu hi. Ama in Israel nam teng a vekpi in ngammuanna a piak zawkciang Topa naseampa Moses ii no hong piak Jordan nisuana ngam, hi lai ah a teang tu in nong cia kik thei tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Joshua1:16 Amate in Joshua tungah, “Nong sawl theampo ka vawt tu a, nong puakna mun theampo ah ka pai tu hi." 
Joshua1:17 Moses ii thu ka nit uh bangma in na thu hong ni tu khu hi, Moses a ompui bangma in Topa na Pathian sia nang taw hong omkhawm tahen!" 
Joshua1:18 Na thuneina hong thusim ngawlte le na thupiakna khat pawpo hong ni ngawlte in thina thuak tu hi. Na thin khosak in a kimuang in,” ci in zo kik uh hi." 
Joshua2:1 Tua zawkciang Joshua in thudawpkute nii sia Acacia ngiaphual panin paisak a, Canaan ngam, a tuanin Jericho khuapi vilku tu in thupia hi. Amate ngeal sia khuapi sung hong thet uh ciangin pumpi kizuak numei Rahab ii inn ah zan taam uh hi." 
Joshua2:2 Jericho khua kumpipa in ngal vil tu Israel mi pawlkhat tua zanin hong pai hi ci in za hi," 
Joshua2:3 tua ahikom ama in Rahab tungah thu puak a: “Na inn ah hong tung mite in ih ngam bup hong enkuu tu in hong pai hi! Amate hong pusua ta'n!” ci hi. 
Joshua2:4 “Mihing pawlkhat ahile ka inn ah hong pai peu hi, ahihang amate sia koisung pan hong pai ziam ka he bua hi. Khuapi kongpi a kikha ma nitum hunin amate heak kik zo hi. Amate zot natu kan se ngawl ka hi hang amate nung pan del memeang le uhte pha thei lai tu nu hi,” ci hi. (Tu in Rahab in hi thukankute nii sia a innkhum tungah huankhau kuung pawlkhat a koi te ii nuai ah seal hi.)" 
Joshua2:5  
Joshua2:6  
Joshua2:7 Kumpipa mite in khuapi nusia a, tua zawkciang kongpi sia kikhak hi. Lamziikpi ii Jordan ngun a kaanna mun dong amate in Israel thudawpkute zong uh hi." 
Joshua2:8 Thudawpkute zan a lup ma in Rahab sia innkhum tungah kaato a," 
Joshua2:9 hi bangin ci hi; “ Topa in hi ngam sia no hong pia zo hi ci in ka he hi. Ngamsung mite khat simin no hong kiita vadil hi. 
Joshua2:10 Topa in Egypt ngam na nusiat uh ciangin na mai a om San Tuipi sia kangsak ci in ka za uh hi. Jordan nisuana sang Amor te ii kumpite nii Sihon le Og na thalup uh zongh ka za uh hi. 
Joshua2:11 Ka zaak uh po ciang ka lau uh hi; no hu in ka thin letna teng ka bosua uh hi. Topa na Pathian sia vantung le hi lai leitung ii Pathian ahi hi. 
Joshua2:12 No tungah kong dik bangin ka innkuanpui te tungah dikna taw nong ngamtat natu in ama min taw hong kiciam tavun a, no kong muan thei natu in lim khat po hong pia tavun." 
Joshua2:13 Ka pa le ka nu, ka suapuipate ka suapuinute le a innkuanpui theampo nong suataksak natu kamciam hong pia tavun. Ko hong kithatlumsak heak vun!”" 
Joshua2:14 Tua mite in ama tungah, “Koma pau bangin ka ngamta bua uh le Pathian in koma nuntakna hong la tahen! Koma ngamtatna teng kuama munah na son bua nale Topa in hi ngam hong piak ciangin pha takin kong vawt tu uh hi ci in kamciam kong pia uh hi,” ci uh hi." 
Joshua2:15 Rahab sia khuapi luphung pang sungah inn vawtin teang ahi bangma ama in pasal te nii khauzeen taw kongvang no panin khiasuk hi. 
Joshua2:16 “Mual tung ngam sang zuan tavun, tua ahi bua na po le kumpipa mihingte in hong mu tu hi. Tua munah amate ii hong heak kik dong ni thum sung buu tavun. Tuasia zawkciang na lampi na tawn thei kik tu uh hi” ci hi." 
Joshua2:17 Pasalte in ama munah, “Kamciam nong vawtsak teng sia kholet tu khu hi. Hi bangin na ngamtat kul tu hi." 
Joshua2:18 Na ngam uh kong sim uh ciang khauhual san hisia khitin nong khiaksukna kongvang no panin kaaisuksak in. Na pa na nu le na suapuite na pa innkuanpuite theampo na inn sungah khawm siat tu ni hi. 
Joshua2:19 Khat po doipua ah a pusuak le ama ii thina sia ama ii khialna hi tu a, ko taw kisai ngawl tu hi; ahihang na inn sungah om khat pawpo sia bang khat po a kitawksak ahile ko khialna hi tu hi." 
Joshua2:20 Ahizong ko ii ngamtatna sia khat po tungah na son a, ahile kamciam pia a nong sawl sia len ngawl tu khu hi.”" 
Joshua2:21 Numei in tua thu lungkim in amate a paisak hi. Amate pai zawkciang numei nu in khauhual san khat a kongvang no panin a kaai suk tu in khit hi. 
Joshua2:22 Thukankute mual kawm ah pai in buu uh hi. Kumpipa mite in amate sia ni thum tangciing mun theampo ah zong uh hi, ahihang mu ngawl ahikom amate Jericho khua ah heak kik uh hi." 
Joshua2:23 Tua zawkciang thudawpkute nii sia mual tung pan hong tuaksuk uh a, ngun kaantan in Joshua kungah a heak kik uh hi. Ama tungah amate in thupiang theampo son uh hi," 
Joshua2:24 tuasia zawkciang, “ Topa in ngam buppi sia ei hong pia zo hi ci in um khu hi. Tua munah a om mipi theampo sia ei hong kiita vadil hi,” ci uh hi." 
Joshua3:1 A zing ciang zingsang in Joshua le Israel te tho pal a, Acacia ah a ngiaphual sia nusia in Jordan ah pai in, a kaantan tu ngakin tua munah ngiaphual saat uh hi." 
Joshua3:2 Ni thum zawkciangin lampuite ngiaphual sung tengah pai in," 
Joshua3:3 mipite tungah, “ Topa na Pathian ii Thuciamna Thingkuang sia thiampite in a puak na mu uh ciang, ngiaphual pan vaiding in zui vun." 
Joshua3:4 No hi sungah a om ngei kuama om ngawl nu hi, tua ahiciang amate in na pai natu lampi hong lak tu hi. Ahihang Thuciamna Thingkuang nai neak heak vun; kilometre khat bang kihal in a nungah om vun,” ci hi." 
Joshua3:5 Joshua in mipite tungah, “Noma le noma kithiansua vun, banghang ziam cile zing ciang Topa in note sungah nalamdang laknate vawt tu hi,” ci hi." 
Joshua3:6 Tua zawkciang Joshua in thiampite sia, Thuciamna Thingkuang la in mipite mai ah pai a sawl hi. A ci bangin amate ngamta uh hi." 
Joshua3:7 Topa in Joshua munah, “Tu ni a ka sep tu sia nangma sia mihing thupi mama khat in Israel theampo ii hong zatak vawt tu a kipatna hi tu a, Moses ka ompui bangin nang zongh kong ompui hunlam amate in hong tel tu uh hi." 
Joshua3:8 Thuciamna Thingkuang pua thiampite ngun a thet uh ciang, ngun sung tansakin a, ngunvaal taw a kinaina ah dingsak in,” ci hi." 
Joshua3:9 Tuasia ciang Joshua in mipite munah, “Hong pai tavun a, Topa na Pathian ii pauna ngai vun." 
Joshua3:10 Maisang ah na manaw uh ciang ama in Canaan te, Hit te, Hiv te, Periz te, Girgash te, Amor te le Jebus te notkeak takpi tu hi." 
Joshua3:11 Leitung theampo ii Topa Thuciamna Thingkuang sia no mai ah Jordan a kaantan tak ciang, a nungta Pathian sia no sungah hong om hi ci in na tel tu uh hi." 
Joshua3:12 Tu in, no Israel namte khat sim sung pan khat tek mihing sawm le nii teal vun." 
Joshua3:13 Leitung theampo ii Topa ii Thuciamna Thingkuang a pua thiampi te in tui sung hong si tak ciang, Jordan ngun sia a luan tawlnga tu hi, tuaciang hong luangsuk tuite sia mun khat ah cing tu hi” ci hi." 
Joshua3:14 Tua hun sia anlaak hun hi a, nguntui pawm hi. Jordan ngun kan tu in mipite ngiaphual a nusiat uh ciang, thiampite sia Thuciamna Thingkuang pua in pai masa uh hi. Thiampite ngun sungah a kalsuan suk po ciang" 
Joshua3:15  
Joshua3:16 tui luan tawlnga a, Zarethan khua mawk Adam khuapi dong tuilu sangah tui hong cingto hi. Tuipi Thi sungah a luangsuk tui sia kikhaktan ik-ek a mipite in Jericho khua hui panin kaantan thei uh hi." 
Joshua3:17 Mipite in leiko tung tawn tan in a pai uh laitakin, Topa ii Thuciamna Thingkuang a pua thiampite sia mi theampo ii kaantan zawk mateng Jordan ngun laizang lei kona ah ding uh hi." 
Joshua4:1 Minam buppi Jordan a kaantan zawk uh ciang Topa in Joshua mun ah," 
Joshua4:2 “Nam khat pan mihing khat veu, mihing sawm le nii teal in," 
Joshua4:3 Jordan ngun laizang thiampite ii dinna san tak panin suangtum sawm le nii lasak in. Amate in hi suangtumte pua in zan ciang ngiaphual na saat natu munah koi in sawl in,” ci hi." 
Joshua4:4 Tuaciang Joshua in mihing sawm le nii a teal teng sam a," 
Joshua4:5 “ Topa na Pathian ii Thuciamna Thingkuang ii mai Jordan ngun sungah na pai tavun a, Israel namte khat sim atu suangtum khat tek na liang uh ah hong pua tavun." 
Joshua4:6 Topa in bang seam zo ci in hi suangtumte in mipite phawksak tu hi. Mai sangah na tate in hi suangte ii a cinopna bang ziam ci hong dok ciangin 
Joshua4:7 Topa Thuciamna Thingkuang ii ngun a kaantan ciangin Jordan ngun sia a luan tawlnga hi, ci in na son tu uh hi. Hi lai munah bang thu piang ci sia hi suangte in Israel mite phawksak tawntung tu hi,” ci hi." 
Joshua4:8 Tua pasalte in Joshua ii thupiakna te zui uh hi. Topa ii Joshua thu a piak bangma amate in suangtum sawm le nii Jordan ngun sung pan la a, Israel nam khat atu suangtum khat veu pua in a ngiaphual saat na munah koi uh hi." 
Joshua4:9 Thuciamna Thingkuang a pua thiampite ii dinna san Jordan ngun laizang ah Joshua zongh in suangtum sawm le nii ciang hi. (Tua suangtumte tua munah om lai hi.) 
Joshua4:10 Topa ii Joshua tungah a thupiak, mite ii sep tu vawt tu a ci teng theampo a kizaw dong thiampite sia Jordan ngun laizang ah ding uh hi. Hi sia Moses ii thupiak sa ahi hi. Mipite sia ngun kaantan in pai memeang uh hi." 
Joshua4:11 Amate ngun langkhat a thet siat zawk uh ciang Topa Thuciamna Thingkuang a pua thiampite sia mipite mai ah pai uh hi. 
Joshua4:12 Reuben le Gad namte le Manasseh nam a khenlang sung pan ngal sim tu in a kinging te sia Moses ii sawl bangin a taang lai mipite mai ah ngun kan masa uh hi. 
Joshua4:13 Topa ii a ompui ngal sim tu in a kinging sa mihing 40,000 bang sia ngun kaantan in Jericho hui zaangtam theng uh hi." 
Joshua4:14 Topa ii tua ni a sep a vawt teng in Joshua sia Israel te ngaisutna ah mihing thupi mama khat suaksak hi. Amate ii Moses a zatak vawt uh bangma, ama zongh a khan tawntungin zatak vawt uh hi." 
Joshua4:15 Tua zawkciang Topa in Joshua munah," 
Joshua4:16 Thuciamna Thingkuang a pua thiampite Jordan ngun sung pan hong kaato natu thupia tu in sawl hi. 
Joshua4:17 Joshua in tuabang ma in seam hi," 
Joshua4:18 Tuaciang thiampite ngun vaal a thet uh ciang, nguntui luansuk kipan kik a, ngun vaal teng tuiliim hi." 
Joshua4:19 Mipite sia a tha khatna ni sawm ni in Jordan kaantan uh a, Jericho ii nisuana sangah a om Gilgal ah ngiaphual saat uh hi." 
Joshua4:20 Tua munah Jordan ngun sung pan a laak uh suangtum sawm le nii teng sia Joshua in ciang hi. 
Joshua4:21 Ama in Israel te mun ah, “Mai sangah na tate in hi suangtumte sia bang a cinopna ziam ci in hong dok ciang" 
Joshua4:22 Jordan ngun sia leiko tungah Israel te ii kaantan hun lai thute na son tu uh hi. 
Joshua4:23 Topa na Pathian in ei atu San Tuipi sung leiko a suasak bangma in Jordan ngun zongh ih kaantan siat dong leiko a suasakna thu na son tu uh hi. 
Joshua4:24 Hi sia hu in leitung mi theampo in Topa ii vaangletna sia bangza in lian ci in he tu a, tuaciang note in Topa na Pathian sia a tawntungin na zatak vawt tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Joshua5:1 Jordan nitumna sangah a om Amor kumpite theampo le Mediterranean Tuipi hui susuk ah a om Canaan kumpite theampo in, Israel te ii kaantan dong Topa in Jordan ngun leiko suaksak hi ci in za uh hi. Amate lau a, Israel te hangin a thin letna uh bo hi." 
Joshua5:2 Tuaciang Topa in Joshua munah, “Thau suang taw naam pawlkhat vawt in a, Israel te vunteap atsak in,” ci hi." 
Joshua5:3 Joshua sia Topa sawl bangin ngamta hi, tuaciang ama in Vunteap atna Mual a kici na munah Israel te vunteap atsak hi." 
Joshua5:4 Israel te ii Egypt a nusiat lai in pa a minpiang vunteap ki at siat zo hi. Ahihang kum sawmli sung sennealngam a kaantan hun sungin a piang pano te kuama vunteap ki at ngawl hi. Egypt ngam a nusiat lai in ngal sim thei tu kumcingsa te theampo zongh tua hun bo kuan ciang Topa ii thu a nit ngawl hu in thi siat zo hi. A taanghpupite tungah a khapsa tua ngam hau, lei phana ngam sia a kiciamna om bangin, amate musak ngawl hi." 
Joshua5:5  
Joshua5:6  
Joshua5:7 Hi mite ii tapate sia vunteap ki at ngeingawl hi; Joshua ii vunteap a atsak te sia hi khangthak te ahi hi. 
Joshua5:8 Vunteap a at zawkciang minam bup sia a ki atna ma a dam dong ngiaphual ah taam uh hi. 
Joshua5:9 Topa in Joshua mun ah, “Tu ni in Egypt ngam ah saltaang in na min daina uh teng ka bosak hi,” ci hi. Tua hu in tua mun sia Gilgal kici hi, tu dong ma in kina lai hi." 
Joshua5:10 Jericho hui zaangtam, Gilgal ah Israel te ngiaphual a saat laitakin, tua tha a ni sawm le ni li ni nitak sangin Paisan Poai khaam uh hi." 
Joshua5:11 A khuavak ni sia Canaan ngam ah a kiciing ante a neak phit ni hi: antang kan le anluum tol saw ngawl te ne uh hi. 
Joshua5:12 Tuasia hunin manna an hong taak nawn ngawl a, Israel te in bangma a nei nawn bua uh hi. Tua hun pan kipan Canaan ngam ah a kiciing ante a ne uh hi."
