Joshua5:13 Joshua sia Jericho nai ah a om lai in pasal khat namsau toai in ama mai ah a ding sia thakhat thu in mu hi. Joshua sia ama kungah paito a, “Nang sia ko ii ngalkap khat ni ziam maw ka ngal ni ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Joshua5:14 “Khat zongh hi bong, kei sia hi lai ah Topa ii ngalkaphonpi uk pa in om khi hi,” ci in zo hi. Joshua sia ama bia tu in lei ah bok a, “Syapa awng, kei na naseampa khi hi, bang hong vawtsak nuam ni ziam?” ci hi." 
Joshua5:15 Tuaciang Topa ii ngalkaphonpi uk pa in, “Na peangdap suut in; a thiangtho munah ding ni hi,” ci hi. Joshua in a sawl bangin vawt hi." 
Joshua6:1 Israel te a tum thei ngawl natu in Jericho khua kongpi kikhak in, kicing hi. Khuapi sungah kitum thei ngawl kipusuak thei ngawl hi." 
Joshua6:2 Topa in Joshua tungah, “Jericho khua sia a kumpipa le a ngalhang ngalkap theampo taw kopin na khut sungah koi zo khi hi." 
Joshua6:3 Nang le na ngalkapte khuapi kiimkot ah ni khat in khatvei veu ni luk sung pai tu nu hi. 
Joshua6:4 Thiampi sali sia lemle khat tek toai in Thuciamna Thingkuang mai ah pai tu hi. A ni sali ni ciangin nang le na ngalkapte sia khuapi kiimkot salivei pai tu nu hi, tuasia laitak thiampite in lemle tum tu uh hi." 
Joshua6:5 Tua zawkciang, amate in lemle aw a sau in khatvei muut tu hi. Tuasia na zaak po ciang pasalte a vekpi in a nging tak au khat sua tu uh a, tuasia ciang khuapi uumna luphungte cimhtham tu hi. Ngalkap hon bup sia a taangtan in khuapi sungah tum tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Joshua6:6 Joshua in thiampite sam a, amate tungah, “Thuciamna Thingkuang la vun a, no sung pan sali sia lemle khat tek toai in a mai ah pai vun,” ci hi." 
Joshua6:7 Tua zawkciang a mite khuapi kiimkot ah a pai natu thupia hi, a cing ngalkap madawk pawlte sia Topa Thuciamna Thingkuang mai ah paisak hi." 
Joshua6:8 Tua ahikom, Joshua ii thupiak sa bangma in ngalkap madawk pawlte sia lemle tum thiampite ii mai ah kipaisak hi. Hite ii nung panin Thuciamna Thingkuang a pua thiampite kipaisak a, tuate ii nung pan ngalkap nungdal pawl in zui uh hi. Hi hunsung bup sia lemle aw nging hi." 
Joshua6:9  
Joshua6:10 Ahihang Joshua in a mite au ngawl natu in thupia hi, thu a piak mateng kammal khat zongh a pau ngawl natu in tho hi." 
Joshua6:11 Tua ahikom ama in hi mipawlte sia Thuciamna Thingkuang pua in khuapi khatvei a kiimveal natu sawl hi. Tua zawkciang amate ngiaphual ah hong cia kik uh a, tua munah zan ngiak uh hi." 
Joshua6:12 Joshua sia a zing ciang zingtuungin tho a, thiampite le ngalkapte sia a nii veina khuapi kiimkot ah a zeini a pai uh bang tatakin pai uh hi: a masa in ngalkap madawk pawl teng, a zomin lemle sali a tum thiampite; tua zom ah Thuciamna Thingkuang a pua thiampite; a khakbel in nungdal ngalkapte pai uh hi. Hi hun sung teng lemle aw nging tan hi." 
Joshua6:13  
Joshua6:14 Hi a ni nii ni in amate sia khuapi kiimkot khatvei pai kik in, ngiaphual zuan kik uh hi. Ni luk sung hi bang veu in vawt uh hi." 
Joshua6:15 Amate sia a ni sali ni khuavak po ciang tho in khuapi kiimkot ah salivei tuabang ma in hong pai uh hi — tua ni bekma in khuapi salivei kiimkot in pai hi. 
Joshua6:16 A salivei a kiimkotna, thiampite in lemle tum tu in a kipat ciang, Joshua in a mite a au keak natu thupia a, “ Topa in khuapi sia no hong pia zo hi!" 
Joshua6:17 Khuapi le a sungah a om theampo sia, Topa tungah piakkhiatna khat bangin kilalcipsak siat tu hi. Numei pumpi kizuak Rahab le a innkuanpuite bek kikhoaikhe tu hi, banghang ziam cile ama in ih thudawpkute hong sealsak hi." 
Joshua6:18 Ahizong a kisusia tu nate khat zongh la thei ngawl tu nu hi; tuabang na ngamta uh le ngimna le lalna Israel te ngiaphual ah tungsak tu nu hi. 
Joshua6:19 Ngunn, khamh, taau ahi buale thik taw a kivawt na theampo sia Topa atu in kikoituam hi. Tuabangte sia Topa sum kholna ah kikoi tu hi,” ci hi." 
Joshua6:20 Tua ahikom thiampite in lemle tum hi. Mipite in tuasia a zaak poma ciang nging takin au uh a, tuaciang luphung pangte cimhtham hi. Tuaciang ngalkap hon bup sia a maisan tek mual tungah kaato in khuapi sungah tum a, tua khuapi la uh hi." 
Joshua6:21 A namsau uh taw khuapi sung a om mi theampo, nupi, pasal, a moi, a haam thatlum siat uh hi. Amate in khui, tuu le laa te zongh thatlum siat uh hi." 
Joshua6:22 Joshua in thudawpku in a paisak te nii sam a, “Pumpi zuak numei nu inn sungah tum tavun a kamciam na piaksa uh bangma, ama le a innkuanpuite hong pusua tavun,” ci hi." 
Joshua6:23 Tua ahiciang amate in Rahab sia a pa, a nu, a suapui pate le a innkuanpui dang teng taw hong pusua uh hi. Amate in tua innkuante le a silate dongin a vekpi la in Israel te ngiaphual nai ngam muanna khat ah koi uh hi." 
Joshua6:24 Tua zawkciang amate in khuapi sia a sung a om theampo taw cip in haltham a, khamh, ngunn, taau le thik taw a kivawt vanhte ahile hal ngawl hi, tuate amate in la in Topa sum kholna ah koi uh hi." 
Joshua6:25 Joshua in pumpi zuak Rahab le a mealheakte sia khoaikhe hi, banghang ziam cile tua nu in Jericho khua ah a paisak thudawpkute nii phual hi. (Ama ii suan le paalte sia Israel ngam ah tu ni dongin teang hi.)" 
Joshua6:26 Tua hun laitakin Joshua in a ciliap huai kidop natu thupia hi: “Mihing khat pawpo Jericho khuapi saat kik tu in a hanciam sia Pathian haamsiat nuai ah om tu hi. A kuama po khuapi phungkawng a ciang sia in a tapa lianbel sia thisua tu hi. A kuama po kongpite a sa kik sia in a tapa nobel sia thisua tu hi.” 
Joshua6:27 Tuabangin Topa sia Joshua taw omkhawm a, ama ii minthanna sia ngam bup ah kizel hi." 
Joshua7:1 A kisusia tu na khat pawpo Jericho pan a laak ngawl natu Topa ii thupiakna kizui ngawl hi. Achan a kici pasal khat in tua thupiak sia ni ngawl hi, tua ahikom Topa sia Israel te tungah a thin so hi. (Achan sia Carmi ii tapa, Zabdi ii tupa hi a, Zerah ii bee le phung, Judah nam sungah a kihel khat ahi hi.)" 
Joshua7:2 Joshua in mihing pawlkhat Jericho pan Ai khua ah paisak hi, tua khuapi sia Bethel ii nisuana sangah om a, Bethaven taw kinai hi, tua munah ngam vil tu in sawl hi. Amate in a sawl teng a sep zawk uh ciang" 
Joshua7:3 Joshua tungah hi bangin thu puak kik hi: “Ai khua sim natu in mihing theampo kuan kul ngawl hi. Pasal tulnii, tulthum khawng bek kuansak lel in. A sim tu in ngalkap hon bup puak heak in; a khua sia khuapi lian hi ngawl hi.”" 
Joshua7:4 Tua ahikom Israel te 3,000 khawng in sim uh a, ahizong amate hong nungkin kik kul hi." 
Joshua7:5 Ai mite in amate sia khuapi kongpi panin suangkhuk pawlkhat omna dong uum uh a, mihing 36 khawng mual tung pan del suk in thatlum uh hi. Tuasia ciang Israel te sia a thin letna bo a, lau uh hi." 
Joshua7:6 Joshua le Israel lampuite hee a, a puansilh lai te baltham in, Topa ii Thuciamna Thingkuang mai ah leiliik uh a, khuangaina lakna in a lu tungah leivui kithe in, tua munah nitak sang dong lum uh hi." 
Joshua7:7 Tuaciang Joshua in, “Vaanglianpipa Topa awng! Banghang peuma in Jordan ngun hong kaantansak ni ziam? Amor mite khut sungah hong aap tu in maw? Hong mot tu in maw? Banghangin Jordan ngun langkhat ah om po ngawl ka na khu ziam?" 
Joshua7:8 Tu in Israel te sia ngalmai pan nungkin zo ci leang bang son thei nawn tu khi ziam, Topa awng." 
Joshua7:9 Canaan mite le ngam sungah om midang theampo in hi thu za tu hi. Amate in hong kiim uum tu a, kote hong that siat tu hi. Tuasia ciangin nangma min kihuk natu in bang vawt tu ni ziam?” ci hi." 
Joshua7:10 Topa in Joshua mun ah, “Thoto in! Banghangin hi bangin lei ah lum ni ziam?" 
Joshua7:11 Israel te in mawna vawt zo hi! Amate ii let tu in ka thupiak, kei taw thukimna sia len ngawlin paltan zo hi. Suksiat tu in a kiningkhiin na pawlkhat amate in la zo hi. Amate in ngu a, tuate huvau iim in amate ii vanh taw koi khawm hi." 
Joshua7:12 Hi sia hu in Israel te in a ngalte nang zo ngawl hi. Tuate ii mai pan amate nungkin hi, banghang ziam cile amate mama sia tu in a lalcip tu in kinil zo hi! Laak ngawl tu in thu a kipiak vanhte na suksiat cip uh mateng no taw omkhawm nawn ngawl tu khi hi." 
Joshua7:13 Thoto in! Mipite thiansua in a, ka mai ah hong pai tu in kingingsak in. Zing ciang a kinging kholsa in a om natu son in, banghang ziam cile Kei, Israel ii Topa, Pathian in hi teng son tu ka nei hi: ‘Israel awng, suksiat tu a thu kong piak vanh pawlkhat la nu hi! Hi nate na suksiat uh mateng na ngalte na zo buatu uh hi.’" 
Joshua7:14 Tua ahikom zingsang ciangin amate sia nam khat zawkciang nam khat, mai ah a kipaipui tu sia son in. A nam ka teal sia phung khat zawkciang phung khat mai ah hong pai tu uh hi. A phung ka teal sia innkuan khat zawkciang khat mai ah hong pai tu uh hi. Innkuan ka teal sia pasal khat zawkciang khat mai ah hong pai tu uh hi." 
Joshua7:15 Pasal khat kiteal in a kiningkhiin vanhte taw kiman pa sia a innkuanpuite le a neisa theampo taw kihal tu hi, banghang ziam cile ama in a kiitakhuai mama maizumna Israel te tungah tungsak a ka thuciam paltan hi." 
Joshua7:16 A zing ciang zingtuungin Joshua in Israel te nam khat zawkciang nam khat mai ah a paisak ciang Judah nam kitealtuam hi. 
Joshua7:17 Ama in Judah namte, mai ah paisak a, phung khat zawkciang phung khat a paisak ciang Zerah bee le phung kitealtuam hi. Tua zawkciang ama in Zerah beeta sung innkuan khat zawkciang innkuan khat, mai ah a paisak le Zabdi ii innkuan kitealtuam hi." 
Joshua7:18 Tua zawkciang ama in Zabdi ii innkuan pan pasal khat zawkciang khat mai ah paisak a, Zabdi ii tupa, Carmi ii tapa Achan sia tealtuam hi." 
Joshua7:19 Joshua in ama mun ah, “Ka tapa awng Topa Israel te ii Pathian mai, hi sungah thumaan son in a pualaak in. Tu in na vawt teng hong son ta'n. Kei kung panin phualseal tu hanciam heak in,” ci hi." 
Joshua7:20 Achan in, “ Topa Israel te ii Pathian tungah maw peu khi hi, tuaciang ka ngam tatna sia hi bang teng hi." 
Joshua7:21 Vanh ih mat te sungah Babylon te puantungsilh hoi mama khat, ngunn kilogramme nii tu khawng le khamh tawn kilogramme lang vaal ka mu hi. Tuate dei leilam ka hikom ka la hi. Ka tuipuan buk sungah kiphumin a ngunn teng sia a tawbel ah na mu tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Joshua7:22 Tua ahikom Joshua ii sawl pasal pawlkhat tai in tuipuan buk sung, tualai ah a kiningkhiin vanhte kiphumin om takpi a, ngunnte a taw nungbel ah om hi." 
Joshua7:23 Amate in tua vanhte puanbuk pan la in Joshua le Israel mi theampo ii kung Pathian mai ah lui uh hi. 
Joshua7:24 Joshua le Israel mi theampo in Achan, ngunnte, a puantungsilh, khamh tawn teng le Achan ii tapate, tanute, a khui, a laa, a tuu le a tuipuanbuk, tuaciang a neisa dang teng theampo man uh hi; tuaciang amate in tuate a vekpi in Ngimna Leikuam ah paipui uh hi." 
Joshua7:25 Joshua in, “Banghangin tazata ngimna ko tungah hong tungsak ni ziam? Topa in tu in nang ngim hong pia tu hi!” ci hi. Mi theampo in Achan sia suangtum taw deanglum hi; amate in a innkuanpuite le a neisa theampo zongh deangin haltum uh hi." 
Joshua7:26 Amate in ama luang tungah suangtum khawlpui khat seng uh hi, tuasia tu ni dongin om hi. Tua hu in tua mun sia Ngimna Kuam kici lai hi. Tuasia ciang Topa a thinso nawn ngawl hi." 
Joshua8:1 Topa in Joshua munah, “Ngalkapte a vekpi in keng in a, Ai khua ah va pai to tavun. Lau heak vun a thinkiam heak vun. Ai kumpipa kong zosak tu hi; a mite, a khuapi le a ngam a lei nang aa hi tu hi." 
Joshua8:2 Jericho le a kumpipa tungah na vawt uh bangin Ai le a kumpipa tungah na vawt tu uh hi; ahihang tu sia hun ciang vanhte le ngannote noma neisa tu in na keam thei tu uh hi. A muanmawk ngawl het tu in khuapi sia a nungsang pan sim tu in kithoai vun.” 
Joshua8:3 Tua ahikom Joshua sia a ngalkap theampo taw Ai khua ah kuan tu in kinging hi. Ama in a ngalkapte sung pan a phabel 30,000 tealtuam a," 
Joshua8:4 thupiakna hi teng taw zan in kuansak hi, “Khuapi ii langkhat ah na buu vun a, ahizong tua khua taw kikhuala leih heak vun; a sim tu in na kinging vun." 
Joshua8:5 Ka mite le keima in khuapi kong neak tu uh hi. Ai khua mite in ko sim tu hong pai uh ciang a masa ih ngamtat bangin kiheak in kong tai tu uh hi. 
Joshua8:6 Khuapi pua ah kong thetpui uh dong delsak tu khu hi. A masa lai bangma in amate kung pan a taikeak in hong ngaisun tu hi. 
Joshua8:7 Tuasia ciang no sia na bukna uh pan hong pusuak in, khuapi nong la tu uh hi. Topa na Pathian in tua khua sia no hong pia tu hi." 
Joshua8:8 Khuapi na laak zawk uh ciang, Topa thupiak bangin na haltham tu uh hi. Hi teng sia no atu thu piakna hi.”" 
Joshua8:9 Tua ahikom Joshua in amate kuansak a, Ai le Bethel kilaklaw, Ai ii nitumna sang a bukna tu mun zuanin tuak sung pan ngak uh hi. Joshua sia ngiaphual ah zan ngiak hi." 
Joshua8:10 Zingsang tuungin Joshua tho a, ngalkapte khawmtua hi. Tuaciang ama le Israel lampuite in amate Ai khua zotpui hi." 
Joshua8:11 Ama taw a kithua ngalkapte sia khuapi tumna kongpi sangah pai in, Ai le amate kilaklaw leikuam khat ii halna saksang ah ngiaphual saat uh hi." 
Joshua8:12 Ama in mihing tulnga bang khuapi ii nitumna sang Ai le Bethel kilaklaw ah buusak hi. 
Joshua8:13 Ngalkapte sia a kido hun tak ciang ngiaphualpi a om teng khuapi ii saksang ah, a dang teng nitumna sangah ngalsim tu in hawm hi. Joshua ahile leikuam ah zan ngiak hi." 
Joshua8:14 Ai kumpipa in Joshua ii mite a mu ciang manlang takin diang hi. Ama le a mite sia Jordan Kuam sangah a masa a lai bangma in Israel te do tu in hong pai uh hi, amate ii nungsang panin a kisim tu hunlam a he meal bua uh hi." 
Joshua8:15 Joshua le a mite sia a nungkin bangin hong kiheang a, mun awngna sangah hong taimang uh hi." 
Joshua8:16 Khuapi sungah a om pasal theampo sia ngalte del tu in kisam a, Joshua a del uh ciang, amate sia khuapi pan a khuala vaialna hong theng uh hi." 
Joshua8:17 Ai khua mi pasal a minpiang in Israel te del ahikom khuapi kihong keak a, kuama a hung tu om ngawl hi." 
Joshua8:18 Tuasia ciang Topa in Joshua mun ah, “Na teipalh sia Ai khua kawksak in; nang tungah tua khua hong pia khi hi,” ci hi. Joshua in ama a kisawl bangin ngamta hi," 
Joshua8:19 tuaciang a khut a lapto po ciang, a buu ngalkapte ding to in, khuapi sungah tai a tua khuapi la uh hi. Tua zawk po ciang khuapi hal uh hi." 
Joshua8:20 Ai mite in a lee et kik uh ciang, meikhu van ah a kaato mu uh hi. Amate atu in suatak natu lampi om ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile Israel te ngam kolhna sangah a taite sia tu in a sim tu in hong kingeilee kik uh hi." 
Joshua8:21 A dang teng in khuapi la zo in, a kaanghtham sia Joshua le a mite in a mu uh ciang heak kik in, Ai mite a thatlum tu in kipan hi." 
Joshua8:22 Khuapi sungah a om Israel te sia tu in ngalsim pui tu in hong paisuk uh hi. Tuabangin Ai mite sia Israel te in kiim uum cip zo ci in kimu a, tua zawkciang amate a vekpi in thalup thuak uh hi. Kuama tai ngawl a," 
Joshua8:23 Ai kumpipa simngawl kuama nungta in a suakta om ngawl hi. Ai kumpipa ahile kiman a Joshua kungah kipuak hi. 
Joshua8:24 Israel te in ngamkolna sungah amate a del ngalte thatlum siat uh hi. Tua zawkciang amate Ai ah heak kikin tua munah a om theampo thatlum siat uh hi. 
Joshua8:25 Joshua in a teipalh sia Ai khua kawk topsak a, tua munah a om mihing theampo a kithalup mateng in a tei a khia bua hi. Tua ni in Ai khua mite a vekpi in kithatlum siat hi — numei pasal a kingawm 12,000 pha uh hi." 
Joshua8:26  
Joshua8:27 Topa ii Joshua a sawl bangin Israel te in khuapi sung pan a mat vanhte le ngannote amate ii neisa tu in keam uh hi. 
Joshua8:28 Joshua in Ai sia haltum a, a zaancip in nusia hi. Tuni in tuabang ma in om lai hi." 
Joshua8:29 Ama in Ai kumpipa sia thingkung khat tungah awklumsak a, nitak sang dong a luang tualai ah nusia hi. Nitum ciangin Joshua in a luang a laak natu thupia a, khuapi tumna kongpi ah kivawksuk hi. Amate in a luang sia suangtum honpui khat taw del a, tu ni dongin tua munah om lai hi." 
Joshua8:30 Tuaciang Joshua in Ebal Mual ah Topa Israel te ii Pathian atu biaknatau khat vawt hi. 
Joshua8:31 Topa naseampa Moses ii Israel te a hilna bangin Moses ii Thukham sungah: “Thik vanhzakte taw a kitan ngawl suang taw a kivawt biaknatau” sia vawt hi. Tua tungah amate in Topa atu meihal biakpiaknate le pawlkhop biakpiaknate pia uh hi. 
Joshua8:32 Tua munah Israel te mu tangin Joshua in Moses at sa Thukham sia taw a kibang linlian khat suangte tungah at hi. 
Joshua8:33 Israel mite in a lampuite, a uliante, a thukhente le amate sung a om ngamdangmite teng taw Topa Thuciamna Thingkuang lang le lang ah tuasia a pua Levi thiampite maingat in ding uh hi. A mite sung pan a lang in Gerizim Mual nungngat in, a lang in Ebal Mual nungngat in ding uh hi. Amate thupha saan hun a tun ciangin tu a bangin ngamta vun ci in Topa ii naseampa Moses in thupia zo hi." 
Joshua8:34 Tua zawkciang Joshua in Thukham laibu sungah a ki at bangin, thuphate le haamsiatna te kihel in Thukham buppi a ngingin sim hi." 
Joshua8:35 Moses ii thupiakte theampo, numei, patang, ngamdangmi, amate sung a teangte zongh a kihel, a kikhawm buppi tungah Joshua in sim siat hi." 
Joshua9:1 Israel te ngalzawnate Jordan nitumna sang kumpi theampo — mualte, mualpeangte le Mediterranean Tuipi vaal zaangtam theampo saksang Lebanon dong kihe hi; hite sia Hit, Amor, Canaan, Periz, Hiv le Jebus kumpipa te uk sung ngamte ahi uh hi." 
Joshua9:2 Amate teng kingawmtua in a kisawl ngalkapte taw Joshua le Israel te sim tu in hong pai uh hi. 
Joshua9:3 Ahihang Jericho le Ai khuate Joshua in bang law ci sia Hiv minam Gibeon mite in za uh hi," 
Joshua9:4 tuaciang amate in Joshua theam sawm uh hi. Amate pai in nguai an pawlkhat sia ip sia sa le, savun thawl a kiphaw sa sungah heang uh hi." 
Joshua9:5 Amate in puansia ngapkaai silhin phaw zazaan sa peangdapte bul uh hi. A anluum kente ko in ap hi. 
Joshua9:6 Tua zawkciang amate in Gilgal ngiaphual ah pai in Joshua le Israel mite mun ah, “Ngam khuala na pan hong pai khu hi. Ko taw kilemna kamciam kho khat nong vawt tu uh dei khu hi,” ci hi." 
Joshua9:7 Ahihang Israel te in, “A banghang peuma no taw kilemna kamciam kho khat vawt tu khu ziam? Note sia a nai no na ah a teangte po hi tha thei tu nu hi,” ci uh hi." 
Joshua9:8 Amate in Joshua mun ah, “Ko sia nangma ii nong sawl pawpo seam tu khu hi,” ci hi. Joshua in, “No a kuate nu ziam? Koisung pan hong pai nu ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Joshua9:9 Tuasia ciang amate in hi bangin son uh hi: “Topa awng, ko sia ngam khuala mama na khat pan hong pai khu hi, banghang ziam cile Topa na Pathian huvau za khu hi. Egypt ngam a, a sep a vawt theampo ka za uh hi," 
Joshua9:10 Jordan ngam nisuana a teang Amor kumpipate nii: Hesbon kumpipa Sihon le Ashtaroth ah a teang Bashan kumpipa Og tungah a vawtna teng zongh ka za uh hi. 
Joshua9:11 Koma lampuite le ka ngam sungah a teang mite theampo in no taw kimu tu in nguai an taw khualhaw in hong sawl hi. Noma ii sawl po seam a, kipawl thei natu kilemna kamciam kho khat vawtin hong sawl hi." 
Joshua9:12 Ka anluumte uh en vun. No taw kimu tu in tuate pua in inn pan ka pusua uh lai in lum lai hi. Ahihang en vun! Tu in kocip a ap zo liang hi. 
Joshua9:13 Hi savun thawlte ka dip uh lai in thak sitset lai hi, ahihang en le uhte! Tu in ekkeak zo hi. Ka puansilhte ka peangdapte lamkhuala hu in paat zo hi!” ci hi." 
Joshua9:14 Israel te in an pawlkhat amate tung pan saang hi, ahihang tua taw kisai in Topa a dongh bua uh hi." 
Joshua9:15 Joshua in tua Gibeon mite taw kipawl thei natu kilemna kamciam kho khat vawt in, amate khoaikhe hi. Israel taangpi lampuite in tua kilemna thuciam kho sia a kholet natu kamciam pia uh hi." 
Joshua9:16 Kamciam kho a vawt zawk ni thum ni ciangin Israel te in hi mite sia a nainona ah a teangte hi takpi hi ci in phawk uh hi. 
Joshua9:17 Tua ahikom Israel te dingkhia in ni thum a pai zawkciang hi mite ii teenna khuapi ahi Gibeon, Chephirah, Beeroth, le Kiriath Jearim ah theng uh hi." 
Joshua9:18 Ahihang Israel te in amate that thei ngawl uh hi, banghang ziam cile Israel lampuite sia Topa Israel te ii Pathian min suangin amate taw a ciliap huai kamciam kho khat vawt zo uh hi. Mipite theampo in lampuite tungah hi thu huvau in lungkim ngawlna a pau tek uh hi," 
Joshua9:19 ahihang amate in “ Topa Israel te ii Pathian min suangin amate taw ciliap huai kamciam ih pia zo hi. Tu in amate bangma kilaw thei ngawl hi. 
Joshua9:20 Ih kamciam vawt hu in amate a nuntak kul tu hi; tuabangin ih hi buale Pathian in ei sia daan hong pia tu hi. 
Joshua9:21 Tua ahiciang nungta tahen, ahizong ei atu thing hong tomsak in tui hong toaisak tahen,” ci in zo hi. Tuasia lampuite ii ngaisut piakna ahi hi." 
Joshua9:22 Joshua in thupia a, ama mai ah hong kipaipui Gibeon mite tungah “Hi sung teng ma a teang napi banghangin a khuala mama na ah ka teang uh ci in hong theam nu ziam?" 
Joshua9:23 Hi bangin na ngamtat uh hu in Pathian in no sia hong ningkhiin zo hi. Na mite uh sia sal hi tawntung tu a, ka Pathian biakna mun khat sia atu thingtom in tui toai tu nu hi,” ci hi." 
Joshua9:24 Amate in, “Topa awng, hi bangin ka ngamtat uh sia Topa na Pathian uh in a naseampa Moses tungah thupia zo a, ngam le lei buppi no hong pia in, a sung a teang mite sia maisang na mainawt uh kawmin thatlum siat tu ci thu maan takpi hi ci in ka tel uh hang hi. Tuabangin ngamta khu hi. Banghang ziam cile ko sia nasia takin lau khu hi; ka nuntakna atu mama in patau khu hi." 
Joshua9:25 Tu in ko sia nangma thuneina nuai ah om khu hi; Tang na sak bangin ko tungah hong vawt ta'n,” ci in zo hi." 
Joshua9:26 Tua ahikom Joshua in hi bangin vawt hi: ama in amate hung a, Israel te ii thalup tu a oai bua hi." 
Joshua9:27 Ahihang tua hunin amate sia sal suaksak hi, Topa biaknatau atu le Israel mite atu thing tomsakin tui toaisak hi. Tu ni dongin Topa ii ama ih biak natu a tealsa mun pawpo ah amate in hi nasep seam tan uh hi." 
Joshua10:1 Jerusalem kumpipa Adonizedek in Joshua ii Ai khua la zo a, Jericho khua le a kumpipa a vawt bangma in, a zaancip sakna, a kumpipa a thalupna thu teng za hi. Ama in Gibeon mite sia Israel mite taw kilemna vawt a, amate taw teang khawm hi ci in za si hi." 
Joshua10:2 Jerusalem mite sia nasia takin patau uh hi, banghang ziam ci le Gibeon sia kumpi a nei khuapi lian khat pawpo cia ma pha hi; Ai sangin zongh lian zaw a, a mite zongh ngalsim thiam vive hi." 
Joshua10:3 Tua ahikom Adonizedek in Hebron kumpipa Hoham, Jarmuth kumpipa Piram, Lachish kumpipa Japhia, Eglon kumpipa Debir te tungah thu puak a:" 
Joshua10:4 “Hong pai tavun, Gibeon hong sim pui tavun, banghang ziam cile amate in Joshua le Israel te taw kilemna vawt hi,” ci hi." 
Joshua10:5 Hi Amor kumpi nga ahi Jerusalem, Hebron, Jarmuth, Lachish le Eglon te kumpipa te ii ngalkap teng kingawmtua a, Gibeon khua kiim uum in sim uh hi." 
Joshua10:6 Gibeon mite in Gilgal ngiaphual ah Joshua atu kam thaak a: “Topa awng, ko hong nusia heak in! A manlang in hong pai tavun a hong hu tavun! Hong hun tavun! Mualtung ngam a teang Amor kumpite theampo in a ngalkap teng ngawmtua in ko hong sim uh hi!” cisak hi." 
Joshua10:7 Tua ahikom Joshua le a ngalkaphonpi bup, ngalkap phabel te kihel a, Gilgal panin kuan uh hi." 
Joshua10:8 Topa in Joshua munah, “Amate kiita heak in. Keima in nang zawna hong pia zo khi hi. Amate khat zongh in nang hong nang zo ngawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
Joshua10:9 Zankhuateakin Joshua le a ngalkaphonpi sia Gilgal pan Gibeon khua sang zuanin kuan uh a, Amor te heakkhol ngawlin sim uh hi." 
Joshua10:10 Topa in Amor te sia Israel ngalkaphonpi a mu po ciang patau keaksak hi. Israel te in amate Gibeon ah a thatlup kawmin, Beth Horon mualciangh ah delsuk a, thang sangah Azekah le Makkeda dong simsuk lai hi." 
Joshua10:11 Amor te mualciangh zui in Israel ngalkaphonpi mai ah a taisuk laitak, Topa in ngialtang puite Azekah lampi tawntung kiasak hi. Israel te ii thalup sangin ngialtang ii denlup tamzaw hi." 
Joshua10:12 Topa in Amor te tungah Israel te zawna a piak ni in, Joshua in Topa paupui hi. Israel mai ah ama in “Ni awng, Gibeon tung san ah ding zii in; Tha awng, Aijalon Kuam tungah tawlnga in,” ci hi." 
Joshua10:13 Ni zongh tawlnga a, tha zongh Israel te ii a ngalte a zaw thal dong a kiin bua hi. Hisia sia Jashar Thubu sungah ki at hi. Ni sia van laizang ah ding zii a, ni khat bup a tum suk bua hi." 
Joshua10:14 Tua masia hikale a zawkciang hikale Topa in mihing khat ii thu a nit hun, tuabang ni khat om ngeingawl hi. Topa sia Israel sangah pangin ngalsim hi." 
Joshua10:15 Hi sia zawkciang Joshua le a ngalkaphonpi Gilgal ngiaphual zuan kik uh hi. 
Joshua10:16 Amor kumpi nga teng ahile suakta in Makkedah suanghawng sungah buu uh hi. 
Joshua10:17 Pawlkhat in amate mu a, a bukna mun Joshua hil uh hi." 
Joshua10:18 Ama in, “Suang hawng mai ah suangtum pawlkhat lumliik vun. A cing tu pawlkhat koi vun," 
Joshua10:19 ahihang noma tatak tua munah om heak vun; ngalte zuizen vun a, a nungsang pan sim vun; a khuapite ah thengsak kik heak vun! Topa na Pathian in amate tungah noma zawna hong pia zo hi,” ci hi." 
Joshua10:20 Joshua le Israel mite in amate thatlum hi, ahihang pawlkhatte sia a khuapi luphung pangte sung sang theng thei a, kithatlum ngawl hi." 
Joshua10:21 Joshua ii mite a vekpi in bangma tat ngawlin Makkedah ngiaphual, ama kungah hong cia kik uh hi. Ngam sungah a om mite kuama in Israel te sia sonsia ngam ngawl liang hi." 
Joshua10:22 Tua zawkciang Joshua in, “Suanghawng tumna sia hong keak vun a, tua kumpi nga teng ka kungah hong paipui tavun,” ci hi." 
Joshua10:23 Tua ahikom suanghawng sia hong keakin, Jerusalem, Hebron, Jarmuth, Lachish le Eglon kumpipa nga teng pusua a," 
Joshua10:24 Joshua kungah paipui uh hi. Joshua in Israel mi theampo sam a, ama taw a kuankhawm ngalkap bute munah, tua kumpite ngawng ah a peang uh nga in sawl hi. Tuabangin ngamta uh hi." 
Joshua10:25 Tuaciang Joshua in a ngalkap bute munah, “Kiita heak vun a, thinkiam heak vun. Na thin khosak vun a kimuang vun, banghang ziam cile hisia in na ngalte theampo tungah Topa sep tu sia ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Joshua10:26 Tua zawkciang Joshua in kumpi nga teng thatlum in thingkung nga tungah a luangte nitak sang dong khai uh hi. 
Joshua10:27 Nitum ciangin Joshua in thupia a, amate buk maksakna suanghawng sungah a luangte lawnsak hi. Suangtum puite suanghawng tumna ah koi uh a, tuate tua munah om lai hi." 
Joshua10:28 Joshua in Makkedah khua sim a, a zaw ni in a kumpipa man hi. A khua mi theampo khat zongh hingkhoai ngawlin that siat hi. Jericho kumpipa a vawt bangma in Makkedah kumpipa tungah vawt hi." 
Joshua10:29 Tua zawkciang Joshua le a ngalkaphonpi Makkedah panin Libnah ah pai in sim hi. 
Joshua10:30 Topa in Israel te hi khuapi le a kumpipa zosak leleau hi. Amate in kuama khoaikhe ngawlin a sungah a om mi theampo thatlum siat uh hi. A kumpipa tungah Jericho kumpipa a vawt bangin amate in vawt uh hi. 
Joshua10:31 Tua zawkciang Joshua le a ngalkaphonpi Libnah panin Lachish ah paitanin tuasia kiim uum in sim uh hi. 
Joshua10:32 A kido zawk ni nii ni ciang Topa in Israel te Lachish khua zosak hi. Libnah ah a vawt uh bangma in kuama khoaikhe ngawlin khuapi sungah a om mi theampo thatlum uh hi. 
Joshua10:33 Gezer kumpipa Horam in Lachish hu tu hong pai ahihang Joshua in a ngalkaphonpi zothal in, amate kuama hingkhoai ngawl hi." 
Joshua10:34 A kizomin Joshua le a ngalkaphonpi sia Lachish panin Eglon ah pai suak a, tua khua kiim uum in sim uh hi." 
Joshua10:35 Tua ni ma in a khuapi la in, tuasung ah a om theampo Lachish ah a vawt bang keak ma in thatlum uh hi," 
Joshua10:36 Hisia zawkciang Joshua le a ngalkaphonpi Eglon panin mual tungah kaato in Hebron sim uh a," 
Joshua10:37 tua khua la uh hi. A kumpipa le a dang khuapi sungah a om theampo ahi zong khua nai nate sungah a om theampo ahi zong thatlum uh hi. Joshua in tua khuapi sia Eglon a vawt lai bangma in zaancipsak hi. Kuama a hingkhoai bua hi. 
Joshua10:38 Tua zawkciang Joshua le a ngalkaphonpi sia Debir ah heak kik in, tua khua sim uh hi." 
Joshua10:39 Ama in tua khua le a kumpipa, tuaciang a naina khua theampo la hi. Tua mun a om theampo thatlum siat uh hi. Hebron, tuaciang Libnah a kumpipa tungah a vawt bangin Joshua in Debir le a kumpipa tungah vawt hi." 
Joshua10:40 Tua ngam le lei buppi sia Joshua in zothal hi. Mualtung ngam, nisuana sang mualpanghte le nitumna sang mualpeangte ii kumpite ahizong, thangsang mun kona ngam kumpite ahizong zo siat hi. Kuama khoaikhet nei ngawlin thatlum siat hi. Hisia sia Topa Israel te ii Pathian thupiak ahi hi." 
Joshua10:41 Joshua ii ngalsimna sia thangsang Kadesh Barnea pan tuipi hui Gaza, Goshen ngamkhen teng kihel in, saksang pan Gibeon dong ahi hi." 
Joshua10:42 Joshua in hi kumpite le a ngam a lei teng theampo nawk khat in zo siat hi, banghang ziam cile Topa Israel te ii Pathian sia Israel atu in ngal sim hi." 
Joshua10:43 Hisia zawkciang, Joshua le a ngalkaphonpi Gilgal ngiaphual zuan kik uh hi." 
Joshua11:1 Hazor kumpipa Jabin in Israel te ii ngalzawna thuthang a zaak ciang, ama in Madon kumpipa Jobab, Shimron kumpipa le Achshaph kumpipa," 
Joshua11:1 Hazor kumpipa Jabin in Israel te ii ngalzawna thuthang a zaak ciang, ama in Madon kumpipa Jobab, Shimron kumpipa le Achshaph kumpipa," 
Joshua11:2 saksang mualtung ngam kumpite, Galilee Tuili thangsang Jordan Kuam, mualpeangte le tuipi hui Dor nai a kumpite munah kam taw thu zasak hi." 
Joshua11:3 Jordan ngun lang le lang a teang Canaan te tung le Amor te, Hit te, Periz te, mual tungah a teang Jebus te, Mizpah ngam Hermon Mual nuai a teang Hiv te munah zongh thu zasak hi." 
Joshua11:4 Amate in a ngalkap nei theampo — tuipivaal a, sen vui za in mihing a tam ngalkaphonpi taw kuan uh hi. Amate in ngal siphu leangte le siphute zongh tam ma nei hi." 
Joshua11:5 Hi kumpi teng in a ngalkap teng ngawmtua a, Israel te sim tu in hong kuan khawm tek in, Merom Lui ah ngiaphual saat uh hi." 
Joshua11:6 Topa in Joshua munah, “Amate kiita heak in. Zing ciang tubang hunin Israel atu in amate thatlum siat tu khi hi. Noma in a siphute a peang baisak in, a siphu ngalleangte haltham tu nu hi,” ci hi." 
Joshua11:7 Tua ahikom Joshua le a mi theampo in a ngalte sia Merom Lui ah a muanmawk ngawl laitakin sim uh hi. 
Joshua11:8 Topa in Israel te zawna pia hi; Israel te in ngalte sia saksang ah Misrephoth Maim le Sidon dong nisuana sang pan Mizpah kuam dong simin del uh hi. A ngalte khat zongh a nungta a om nawn ngawl dong kido tan uh hi. 
Joshua11:9 Joshua in Topa thupiak bangin a siphu uhte a peang baisakin, a siphu ngalleang uhte halthapsak hi." 
Joshua11:10 Tua zawkciang Joshua heak kik a Hazor la in, a kumpipa thatlum hi. (Tua hun lai in Hazor sia kumpi nei ngam teng pan a hatbel ahi hi)." 
Joshua11:11 Tua munah a om theampo thisak uh hi; kuama kihingkhoai ngawl a, a khuapi kihaltum hi." 
Joshua11:12 Joshua in hi khuapi teng la a, kumpipate manin, Topa naseam Moses ii thupiakna bangin, mi theampo thisak uh hi." 
Joshua11:13 Ahihang Israel te in Joshua ii halthap Hazor khua simngawl leivumte tungah a kisa khuapite khat zongh hal ngawl hi. 
Joshua11:14 Israel mite in hi khuapite sung pan vanh manphate le ngannote theampo amate atu in la uh hi. Ahihang amate in mihing theampo thatlum uh a, khat zongh khoaikhe ngawl hi." 
Joshua11:15 Topa in a naseampa Moses tungah thupia in, Moses in Joshua tungah tua thupiaknate sonsawn a, Joshua in ni hi. Ama in Topa ii Moses thu a piak theampo vawt hi." 
Joshua11:16 Joshua in ngam le lei theampo — la hi, mualtung ngam le mualpeangte ii sak le thang, Goshen ngam theampo le a thangsang kongaw ngam teng le Jordan ngun kuam teng la hi." 
Joshua11:17 A ngam sia thangsang Edom hui Halak Mual panin kithungsuk a, saksangah Baalgad, Lebanon leikuam sung Hermon Mual thangsang dong zai hi. Joshua sia hi ngam a kumpite taw khuangeipi ma kisim ahihang tuate la in amate thatlum siat hi." 
Joshua11:18  
Joshua11:19 Israel te taw kilemna a vawt khuapi khat bek sia Gibeon hi a, tua munah Hiv te teang hi. A dang khuapite theampo sia kidona sungah kizo thal hi." 
Joshua11:20 Topa in amate sia Israel te a do natu a thin khosak mama a, tua in a lalcip natu le hesuak ngawlin a kithalup siat natu ahi hi. Hi sia in Topa ii Moses tungah thu a piaksa ahi hi." 
Joshua11:21 Hisia hun in Joshua pai a, Judah le Israel mualtung ngam theampo — Hebron, Debir, Anab le tua mualtung ngam theampo sungah a teang thatang lian mama Anakim a cite minam sia mongsak siat hi. Joshua in amate le a khuapi te a lalcip dipdeap dong susia hi." 
Joshua11:22 Anakim te khat zongh Israel ngam sungah om nawn ngawl hi; ahihang tawm khawng sia Gaza, Gath le Ashdod ah taanglai hi." 
Joshua11:23 Topa ii Moses a thu piaksa bangma in Joshua in ngam le lei bup la hi. Joshua in tua ngam sia Israel mite neisa tu in pia a, amate in nam sim khat tek khen in hawm hi. Tuabangin a mite sia ngal simna panin tawlnga uh hi." 
Joshua12:1 Israel mite in ngal teng zo thal zo in Jordan nisuana Arnon Kuam pan Jordan Kuam le saksang Hermon Mual dong ngam le lei la hi. Amate in hi kumpipate nii zo hi. 
Joshua12:2 Khat sia Amor te kumpipa Sihon hi a Heshbon ah maang hi. Ama ii kumpi ngam sia Gilead ii a ngam lang kihel hi: Aroer (Arnon kuam ii kiil a om) le a kuam laizang a om khuapi pan Amon ngamngi Jabbok ngun dong ahi hi; 
Joshua12:3 tua ii sungah Jordan Kuam, Galilee tuili ii thang pan Beth Jeshimoth (Tuipi Thi ii nisuana sang) dong, tuaciang Pisgah Mual ii mualpeang sang teng kihel hi." 
Joshua12:4 Amate in Rephaim nam pan a khakbel ahi Bashan kumpipa Og zongh zo uh hi; ama sia Ashtaroth le Edrei ah maang hi. 
Joshua12:5 Ama ii kumpi ngam ah Hermon Mual, Salecah, tuaciang Bashan ngam theampo Geshur le Maacah ngamngite dong le Gilead ngam lang khen, Heshbon kumpipa Sihon ii ngam dong kihel hi." 
Joshua12:6 Hi kumpite nii sia Moses le Israel te in zo hi. Topa naseampa Moses in amate ngam sia Reuben nam, Gad nam le Manasseh nam a langte tungah amate ngam le lei tu in pia hi." 
Joshua12:7 Joshua le Israel mite in Jordan nitumna ngam, Lebanon kuam sung Baalgad pan thangsang Edom hui Halak Mual dong a kumpipate theampo zo siat hi. Joshua in hi ngam le lei sia a minamte atu in hawmsak in a kip a kho neisa tu in pia hi." 
Joshua12:8 Hi ngamkhenna sungah mualtung ngam, nitumna sang mualpeangte, nisuana susuk le thangsang kongaw ngam teng kihel hi. Hi ngam le lei sia Hit te, Amor te, Canaan te, Periz te, Hiv te, Jebus te ii teenna hi ngei hi." 
Joshua12:9 Israel mite in hi kumpite ii khuapi hi teng zo siat uh hi: Ai (Bethel khua hui)," 
Joshua12:10 Jerusalem, Hebron," 
Joshua12:11 Jarmuth, Lachish," 
Joshua12:12 Eglon, Gezer," 
Joshua12:13 Debir, Geder," 
Joshua12:14 Hormah, Arad," 
Joshua12:15 Libnah, Adullam," 
Joshua12:16 Makkedah, Bethel," 
Joshua12:17 Tappuah, Hepher," 
Joshua12:18 Aphek, Lasharon," 
Joshua12:19 Madon, Hazor," 
Joshua12:20 Shimron Meron, Achshaph," 
Joshua12:21 Taanach, Megiddo," 
Joshua12:22 Kedesh, Jokneam (Carmel ngam sungah)" 
Joshua12:23 Dor (Tuipi hui ah), Goiim (Galilee ngam sungah)" 
Joshua12:24 le Tirzah — a vekpi kingawm kumpi 31 ahi hi. 
Joshua13:1 Joshua sia tu in huai mama zo hi. Topa in ama munah, “Nang huai mama zo ni hi, ahihang ngam le lei tam mama laak tu om lai hi:" 
Joshua13:2 Philistia le Geshur te ngam theampo," 
Joshua13:3 thang sangah Avvim te ngam theampo zongh ahi hi. (Shihor lui pan Egypt te ngamngi dong, saksang pan Ekron te ngamngi dong leitang teng sia Canaan te ngam in kingaisun hi; Philistine kumpite sia Gaza, Ashdod, Ashkelon, Gath, le Ekron ah teang hi.)" 
Joshua13:4 Canaan te ngam theampo le Mearah (Sidon te neisa hi) om lai a, Amor te ngamngi a om Aphek dong hi a;" 
Joshua13:5 Gebal te ii ngam; nisuana ah Lebanon bup, Hermon Mual ii thangsang Baalgad pan Hamaath Mualciangh dong ahi hi." 
Joshua13:6 Hisia Lebanon Mualte le Misrephoth Maim kilaklaw mualtung ngam a teang Sidon te ngam theampo kihel hi. Israel mite a mai sang a nawk kawmin hi mite theampo ka notkhia tu hi. Kong sawl sa bangma in ngam le lei te sia Israel mite sungah na hawmsak tu uh hi. 
Joshua13:7 Tua ahiciang tu in, Israel nam kua le Manasseh ii nam a lang teng ii tan tu in hawmsak in” ci hi." 
Joshua13:8 Reuben le Gad nam te le Manasseh ii nam a lang teng in Topa naseampa Moses ii piaksa ngam le lei tek nga zo a; tuasia Jordan ngun ii nisuana sangah om hi. 
Joshua13:9 Amate ii ngam sia Aroer (Arnon Kuam ii kiil ah a om) le tua kuam ii laizang a om khuapi dong zai a, Medeba pan Dibon dong mual zaangtam theampo kihel hi." 
Joshua13:10 Tuasia Ammon te ngamngi dong hi a, Heshbon pan a uk Amor te kumpipa Sihon ii khuapi theampo zongh kihel siat hi." 
Joshua13:11 Gilead, Geshur le Maacah ngamte, Hermon Mual bup le, Bashan bup Salecah dong kihel hi." 
Joshua13:12 Ashtaroth le Edrei panin a uk Rephaim kumpi nam a khakbel ahi Og ii kumpi ngam kihel hi. Moses in hi mite sia zo in notkeak hi. 
Joshua13:13 Ahihang Israel te in Geshur le Maacah mite not ngawl uh a; amate Israel ngam ah teang lai uh hi. 
Joshua13:14 Moses in Levi nam sia ngam le lei a pia bua hi. Topa ii Moses tungah a sonsa bangma in Israel ii Topa Pathian biakpiakna tau tungah a hal sangaw biakpiaknate sung pan tel khat sia amate in tang tu hi. 
Joshua13:15 Moses in ngam khen khat sia Reuben ii nam innkuante tan tu in pia hi. 
Joshua13:16 Amate ngam sia Aroer (Arnon Kuam kiil a om) le tua kuam laizang a om khuapi dong hi a Medeba mual zaangtam kiim teng kihel hi. 
Joshua13:17 Tuasia sungah Heshbon le mual zaangtam tung a om khuapite: Dibon, Bamoth Baal, Beth Baalmeon," 
Joshua13:18 Zahaz, Kedemoth, Mephaath," 
Joshua13:19 Kiriathaim, Sibmah, tua kuam sung mual tung a om Zereth Shahar," 
Joshua13:20 Bethpeor, Pisgah Mual pangh suk teng le Beth Jeshimoth kihel hi." 
Joshua13:21 Heshbon pan a uk Amor te kumpipa Sihon kumpi ngam bup le mual zaangtam a om khuapite kihel hi. Moses in ama zo a, Midian a ukte: Evi, Rekem, Zur, Hur le Reba te zongh zo hi. Amate theampo in Kumpipa Sihon atu in ngam uk uh hi." 
Joshua13:22 Israel te ii thalupte sungah Beor tapa Balaam, aisaan thei pa kihel hi." 
Joshua13:23 Jordan sia Reuben nam ii nitumna ngamngi ahi hi. Hi khuapite le khuate sia Reuben nam innkuante tan tu in kipia hi. 
Joshua13:24 Moses in zongh ngam khen khat sia Gad nam innkuante tan tu in a piaksa hi. 
Joshua13:25 Amate ii ngam sia, Jazer le Gilead khuapi theampo, Ammon ngam a lang, Rabbah ii nisuana sang Aroer dong ahi hi;" 
Joshua13:26 amate ngam sia Heshbon panin Ramath Mizpeh le Betonim dong, Mahanaim pan Lodebar ngamngi dongin kithung hi." 
Joshua13:27 Jordan Kuam sungah Beth Haram, Bethnimrah, Sukkoth, le Zaphon, Heshbon kumpipa Sihon ii kumpi ngam a om lai teng ahi hi. Amate ii nitumna sang ngamngi sia Jordan ngun hi a, saksang ah Galilee Tuili dong hi to hi." 
Joshua13:28 Hite sia Gad nam innkuante tan tu a kipia khuapite le khuate ahi hi. 
Joshua13:29 Moses in Manasseh nam a lang ii innkuante tan tu in ngamkhen khat a piaksa hi. 
Joshua13:30 Amate ngam sia Mahanaim dong kithung a, Bashan theampo huam hi — Bashan kumpipa Og ii kumpi ngam bup le Bashan sungah Jair khuano 60 teng ahi hi." 
Joshua13:31 Bashan kumpipa Og ii kumpi ngamsung khuapi thupibel te Astaroth le Edrei, le Gilead ngam khenlang zongh tua ii sungah kihel hi. Hite theampo sia Manasseh tapa Machir ii suan innkuan te ii lang atu a kipia ahi hi." 
Joshua13:32 Tuasia Jericho le Jordan nisuana sang ngam le lei teng Moses ii Moab zaangtam ah a om lai in a khensakna bang ahi hi. 
Joshua13:33 Ahihang Moses in Levi nam sia leitang a pia bua hi. Israel ii Topa Pathian tungah a piak biakpiaknate sung pan tel khat amate ii neisa ahi sia ama sonsa hi. 
Joshua14:1 Jordan nitumna sang Canaan ngam le lei, Israel mite sungah a kihawmna thu a nuai a bangin kizom hi. Thiampi Eleazar, Nun tapa Joshua le Israel nam innkuante ii lampuite in tuasia a mite teng tungah hawmsak hi." 
Joshua14:2 Topa ii Moses tungah a thupiak bangma in nam kua le nam lang te ii nga tu ngamte sia laimee sawkin khensat uh hi. 
Joshua14:3 Moses in Jordan nisuana ngam sia nam nii le namlangte atu a seesak sa hi. (Joseph ii suante sia Manasseh nam le Ephraim nam ci in nam nii in kikhen hi.) Ahihang Moses in Levi te sia ngam bangma a pia bua hi. Tua taangin a teen natu khuapite, a khui le a tuu honte tat natu lote nga hi." 
Joshua14:4  
Joshua14:5 Israel mite in Topa ii Moses tung a thupiak bangin ngam khen uh hi. 
Joshua14:6 Ni khat ni in Judah nam pan mihing pawlkhat sia Gilgal, Joshua kungah hong pai hi. Amate sung pan khat Keniz mi Jephunneh tapa Caleb in, “Kadesh Barnea ah Topa in nang le kei huvau Pathian mihing ahi Moses tungah a ci teng na heak hi." 
Joshua14:7 Topa naseampa Moses ii hi ngam a vil ku tu hong paisak lai in kei sia kum sawmli ka pha zo hi. Ahi bang tatak teng ama tungah thu ka puak kik hi. 
Joshua14:8 Kei taw a paikhawm pasal dangte in ahile ih mite lauthawn hi. Ahihang keima in Topa ka Pathian thu ka mang hi. 
Joshua14:9 Tuabang ka ngamtat hu in, Moses in kamciam hong piakna pan, ka paina sa ngam le lei sia kei le ka tate neisa in hong kipia tu ci hi." 
Joshua14:10 Ahihang tu in en in! Topa in Moses tungah a ci sia tu in kum sawmli le kum nga pha zo hi. Tuasia Israel te ii sennealngam kaantan in a pai hun hi a, tuaciang Topa in ama kamciam bangma hong nungtasak lai hi. Hong en ta'n! Kum sawmliat le kum nga pha khi hi," 
Joshua14:11 Moses ii hong paisak lai bangma in thahat ngawp lai khi hi, ngal sim tu ahizong bangdang khat po seam tu ahizong naap lai khi hi." 
Joshua14:12 Ka ngalvilpui pasalte taw thu ka puak ni in, Topa kei hong kamciamsa mualtung ngam teng, tu in hong pia ta'n. Tuasia lai in Anakim a kici thatang lian mama minamte sia luphung taw a ki uum khuapite sungah teang hi ci in kong son uh hi. Topa sia kei taw hong omkhawm po tahen, Topa ci bangma in amate ka hawlkhia tu hi,” ka ci hi." 
Joshua14:13 Joshua in Jephunneh tapa, Caleb thupha pia in Hebron khuapi sia ama tan tu in pia hi." 
Joshua14:14 Hebron khuapi sia Keniz mi Jephunneh tapa Caleb suante ii neisa in om lai hi, banghang ziam cile ama in Topa, Israel ii Pathian tung thumaan in a thu ni hi." 
Joshua14:15 A masa in Hebron sia Arba khuapi kici hi (Arba sia Anakim te sung pan a lianbel ahi hi). Ngam sungah tu in kilemna om hi. 
Joshua15:1 Judah nam innkuante in a nuai a, a kison bangin ngam le lei khen khat nga hi: Tua leitang sia Zin duisung thangsang khakbel mun Edom te ngamngi dong kithungsuk hi." 
Joshua15:2 Hi thangsang ngamngi sia Tuipi Thi thangsang mong panin," 
Joshua15:3 Akrabbin Mualciangh zui suk a, Zin ah sun hi. Tuasia Kadesh Barnea thang sangah paisuk a, Hezron kaantan in Addar dong, Karka sangah kiheak a," 
Joshua15:4 Azmon sangah paitanin, Egypt ngamngi ah a luang lui sia zui a, Mediterranean Tuipi ah a ngamngi tawp hi. Tuasia Judah thangsang ngamngi hi." 
Joshua15:5 Nisuana sang ngamngi sia Tuipi Thi hi a, Jordan ngun ii tumna dong tuipi hui to teng ahi hi. A saksang ngamngi sia tua mun panin kipan a," 
Joshua15:6 Beth Hoglah dong kithungin Jordan Kuam etsuk theina mualbawk saksang ah pai hi. Tua zawkciang Bohan ii Suangphuna ah (Bohan sia Reuben ii tapa hi) paito hi. 
Joshua15:7 Ngimna Kuam panin Debir ah, tua zawkciang saksang ah kiheak a, tua kuam ii thangsang a om Adummim Mualciangh sia a maingat Gilgal sang sun hi. Tua zawkciang Enshemesh ciktuite ah paitanin, tua mun pan Enrogel ah paisuak hi," 
Joshua15:8 tuaciang Jebus te khuapi Jerusalem omna mual ii thang Hinnom Kuam kaantan to hi. Tua zawkciang ngamngi sia Rephaim Kuam saksang mong, Hinnom Kuam ii nitumna a om mual dawn dong paito suak hi." 
Joshua15:9 Tua mun pan Nephtoah Ciktui te ah pai in, Ephron mual nai a om khuapite ah paitan hi. Tua mun panin Baalah (ahibuale Kiriath Jearim) sangah kiheak a," 
Joshua15:10 tua mun Baalah mual saksang ah paisuak in, nitumna sang teng kiimveal a, Edom mualtung ngam sangah, Jearim mual (ahibuale Chesalon) saksang ah paisuak in, tua mun pan Beth Shemesh ah paisuk a, Timnah kaantan hi." 
Joshua15:11 Ngamngi sia Ekron saksang mual ah paisuak a, Shikkeron sangah kiheak in, Baalah Mual kaantan hi, tuaciang Jamnia ah paitan hi. Tuasia Mediterranean Tuipi ah tawp a," 
Joshua15:12 tua in a nitumna sang ngamngi ahi hi. Hi ngamngite ii huam sung sangah Judah innkuante ii mi teng teang hi. 
Joshua15:13 Topa in Joshua a thupiak bangma in Judah nam Jephunneh tapa Caleb tungah Judah ngamkhen khat kipia hi. Ama in Anak ii pa Arba ii khuapi Hebron nga hi. 
Joshua15:14 Caleb in Anak ii suan le paal te khuapi panin hawlkhia hi — tuate sia Shesai, Ahiman le Talmai bee le phungte hi." 
Joshua15:15 Tua mun pan ama in Debir a teang mite sim hi. (Hi khuapi sia Kiriath Sepher kici ngei hi). 
Joshua15:16 Caleb in, “Kiriath Sepher a la zo pa sia a zi tu in ka tanu Achsah ka pia tu hi,” ci hi." 
Joshua15:17 Caleb suapuipa Kenaz ii tapa Othniel in tua khuapi la zo ahikom Caleb in a tanu Achsah sia a zi tu in pia hi. 
Joshua15:18 A kiteen ni in Othniel in a zi tungah a pa tung pan lo khat ngen in ci in sawl hi. A tanu sia a laa tung pan tuaksuk a, tuaciang Celeb in bang dei ni ziam ci in dongh hi." 
Joshua15:19 Ama in, “Tuicing pawlkhat omna mun dei khi hi, leitang nong piakte sia munko hi thong hi,” ci in zo hi. Tua ahikom Caleb in ciktui omna a thunghsang le a dopsang teng pia hi." 
Joshua15:20 Judah nam innkuante ii nga, ngam le lei sia hi teng ahi hi." 
Joshua15:21 Amate ii neisa a thangsang khakbel khuapite, Edom ngamngi taw a kinai teng sia Kabzeel, Eder, Jagur," 
Joshua15:22 Kinah, Dimonah, Adadah," 
Joshua15:23 Kedesh, Hazor, Ithnan," 
Joshua15:24 Ziph, Telem, Bealoth," 
Joshua15:25 Hazor Hadattah, Kerioth Hezron (ahibuale Hazor)," 
Joshua15:26 Amam, Shema, Moladah," 
Joshua15:27 Hazar Gaddah, Heshmon, Bethpelet," 
Joshua15:28 Hazar Shual, Beersheba, Biziothiah," 
Joshua15:29 Baalah, Iim, Ezem," 
Joshua15:30 Eltolad, Chesil, Hormah," 
Joshua15:31 Ziklag, Madmannah, Sansannah," 
Joshua15:32 Lebaoth, Shilhim, Ain le Rimmon hi a: a kiim a om khuate taw a vekpi in khuapi 29 pha hi." 
Joshua15:33 Mualpeang ah a om khuapite sia, Eshtaol, Zorah, Ashnah," 
Joshua15:34 Zanoah, Engannim, Tappuah, Enam," 
Joshua15:35 Jarmuth, Adullam, Socoh, Azekah," 
Joshua15:36 Shaaraim, Adithaim, Gederah le Gederothaim hi a: a kiim a om khuate taw khuapi sawm le li pha hi." 
Joshua15:37 Tuasung zongh ah, Zenan, Hadashah, Migdalgad," 
Joshua15:38 Dilean, Mizpah, Joktheel," 
Joshua15:39 Lachish, Bozkath, Eglon," 
Joshua15:40 Cabbon, Lahmam, Chitlish," 
Joshua15:41 Gederoth, Bethdagon, Naamah le Makkedah hi a: a kiim a om khuate taw a vekpi khuapi sawm le luk pha hi." 
Joshua15:42 Tuasung ah a om a dang pan Libnah, Ether, Ashan," 
Joshua15:43 Iphtah, Ashnah, Nezib," 
Joshua15:44 Keilah, Achzib le Mareshah hi a: a kiim a om khuate taw khuapi kua pha hi." 
Joshua15:45 Tuasung ah Ekron sia a khuate le a khuanote taw om hi," 
Joshua15:46 tuaciang Ashdod nai, Ekron pan Mediterranean Tuipi dong a, a om khuapite le khuate theampo ahi hi." 
Joshua15:47 Tualai ah Ashdod le Gaza om a, tuate ii khuate le khuanote taw om a, Egypt ngamngi ahi lui le Mediterranean Tuipi vaalbo dong ahi hi." 
Joshua15:48 Mualtung ngam ah Shamir, Jattir, Socoh," 
Joshua15:49 Dannah, Kiriath Sepher (ahibuale Debir)" 
Joshua15:50 Anab, Eshtemoa, Anim," 
Joshua15:51 Goshen, Holon le Giloh om a: a kiim a om khuate taw khuapi sawm le khat pha hi." 
Joshua15:52 Tuate sungah Arab, Dumah, Eshan," 
Joshua15:53 Janim, Beth Tappuah, Aphekah," 
Joshua15:54 Humtah, Hebron le Zior om a: a kiim a om khuate taw khuapi kua ahi hi." 
Joshua15:55 Tuate sungah Maon, Carmel, Ziph, Juttah," 
Joshua15:56 Jezreel, Jokdeam, Zanoah," 
Joshua15:57 Kain, Gibeah le Timnah om a: a kiim a om khuate taw khuapi sawm ahi hi." 
Joshua15:58 Tualai ah Halhul, Bethzur, Gedor," 
Joshua15:59 Maarath, Bethanoth le Eltekon om a: a kiim a om khuate taw khuapi luk ahi hi." 
Joshua15:60 Kiriath Baal (ahibuale Kiriath Jearim) le Rabbah om a: a kiim a om khuate taw khuapi nii ahi hi. 
Joshua15:61 Sennealngam sungah Beth Arabah, Middin, Secacah," 
Joshua15:62 Ci khuapi Nibshan le Engedi om a: a kiim a om khuate taw khuapi luk ahi hi. 
Joshua15:63 Ahihang Judah mite in Jerusalem a teang Jebus te notkeak zo ngawl hi. Tualai ah Jebus te sia Judah mite taw teang lai uh hi. 
Joshua16:1 Joseph suan le paalte a kipia ngam le lei ii thangsang ngamngi sia Jericho hui Jordan panin kipan a, Jericho cikte ii nisuana sangah pai in sennealngam sung sun hi. Jericho pan Bethel dong mualtung ngam ah paito hi." 
Joshua16:2 Bethel pan a ngamngi sia Luz ah pai a, Ataroth Addar, Archit te teenna kaantan hi." 
Joshua16:3 Tua zawkciang nitumna Japhlet te ii ngam ah pai a, Beth Horon Nuainung ngam dong pai hi. Tua mun panin Gezer ah paisuakin tuaciang Mediterranean Tuipi ah tawp hi." 
Joshua16:4 Joseph ii suan le paalte Ephraim nam le nitumna Manasseh namte in hi ngam sia amate ii neisa in saang uh hi. 
Joshua16:5 Ephraim innkuante ii ngam sia hisia ahi hi: a ngamngi paizia sia, Ataroth Addar pan nisuana sangah Beth Horon Tungnung ah," 
Joshua16:6 tua mun panin Mediterranean Tuipi dong ahi hi. Michmethath sia a saksang ah om hi. Tua ii nisuana sangah ngamngi sia Taanath Shiloh sangah koai a, tuasia kaantan in nisuana sang Janoah dong paitan hi." 
Joshua16:7 Tua zawkciang paisuk a Janoah pan Ataroth le Naarah ah, Jericho pha in Jordan ah tawp hi." 
Joshua16:8 Ngamngi sia Tappuah pan nitumna sang Kanah lui ah pai in Mediterranean Tuipi ah tawp hi. Hi leitang sia Ephraim nam innkuante tan tu in kipia a," 
Joshua16:9 Manasseh ngamngite ii sungsang a om khuate le khuano pawlkhat taw kopin Ephraim te kipia khawm hi. 
Joshua16:10 Ahihang amate in Canaan mi Gezer a teangte sia notkeak ngawl ahikom Canaan mite sia Ephraim mite sungah tu ni dong teang khawm uh hi, ahihang amate sia salte bangin na kiseamsak hi." 
Joshua17:1 Jordan ii nitumna sang leitang khen khat sia Joseph ii tapa lianzaw Manasseh suan innkuan pawlkhat tan tu in kipia hi. Gilead ii pa Machir sia Manasseh tapa lianbel hi a, ngalhang khat ahi hi, tua ahikom Jordan nisuana sang Gilead le Bashan sia ama kipia hi." 
Joshua17:2 Jordan nitumna sang leitang sia Manasseh innkuan dang teng: Abiezer, Helek, Asriel, Shechem, Hepher le Shemida te kipia hi. Hite sia Joseph tapa Manasseh suan pasalte hi a, a innkuan tek ii pabel veu ahi hi." 
Joshua17:3 Zelophehad sia Hepher tapa hi a, a pu Gilead, Machir, Manasseh te ii suan hi, ahizong ama in tapa nei ngawlin tanu bebek nei hi. Amate min sia Mahlah, Noah, Hoglah, Milcah, le Tirzah ahi hi." 
Joshua17:4 Amate sia thiampi Eleazar le Nun ii tapa Joshua le lampuite kungah pai in, “ Topa in Moses tungah, koma le ka mealheak pate zongh ii ka tan tu uh leitang khen khat hong kipiak natu thupia hi,” ci hi. Tua ahikom, Topa sawl bangma in, amate sia a mealheakte taw leitang kipia khawm hi." 
Joshua17:5 Tua hu in Manasseh in Jordan Ngun ii nisuana sangah Gilead le Bashan belapna in leitang tel sawm nga hi," 
Joshua17:6 ama suan le paal numeite le pate tel a kipiak khop hang ahi hi. Gilead ngam le lei sia Manasseh suan a taang laite kipia hi. 
Joshua17:7 Manasseh ngam sia Shechem nisuana sang Asher pan Michmethath dong ban hi. Tua zawkciang ngamngi sia Entappuah mite sungsuam tu in thangsang ah pai hi. 
Joshua17:8 Tappuah ii kiim a leitangte sia Manasseh neisa hi, ahizong Tappuah khua, ngamngi tung a om sia Ephraim suante neisa ahi hi." 
Joshua17:9 Ngamngi sia tua mun pan Kanah lui dong paisuk hi. A ngam sia Manasseh ngamsung ahisaap hang lui ii thangsang a om khuapite sia Ephraim te neisa ahi hi. Manasseh ngamngi sia lui ii saksang ah paitan a, Mediterranean Tuipi ah tawp hi." 
Joshua17:10 Ephraim sia thang sangah, Manasseh sia saksang ah om a, Mediterranean Tuipi sia amate ii nitumna sang ngamngi hi." 
Joshua17:11 Issachar le Asher ngamte ii sungsang ah Manasseh in Beth Shan le Ibleam, a kiim a om khuate taw, tuaciang Dor (tuipi hui a om sia), Endor, Taanach, Megiddo le a kiim a khuate taw zongh nei hi." 
Joshua17:12 Manasseh mite in tua khuapite ah a teang mite not zo ngawl ahikom Canaan mite sia tuasung ah teang suak uh hi. 
Joshua17:13 Israel te a hat zawk hun ciang ngawngawn in Canaan mi theampo notkeak ngawl uh hi, ahizong amate atu in zawthawk thu taw naseamsak uh hi." 
Joshua17:14 Joseph suan le paalte in Joshua munah, “Banghangin ko neisa tu leitang khen khat bek hong pia ni ziam? Topa in thupha hong pia a, ko mihing tam mama pha khu hi,” ci uh hi." 
Joshua17:15 Joshua in, “No mihing tam mama a Ephraim mualtung ngam sia no atu no leih ahile Periz te le Rephaim te ngam a thingtang sungah pai in noma atu in vaat tavun,” ci in zo hi." 
Joshua17:16 Amate in, “Mualtung ngam sia ko atu lian ngawlin kicing zo ngawl hi, ahihang zaanglei a teang Beth Shan le a kiim khuate le, Jazreel Kuam sungah teangte Canaan te in thik siphu ngalleang nei tek uh hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Joshua17:17 Joshua in Ephraim nam le nitumna Manasseh nam tungah, “No sia tam mama takpi a, hat zongh hat mama nu hi. Tel khat sangin a tamzaw nga tu nu hi." 
Joshua17:18 Mualtung ngam sia no neisa hi tu hi. Duithuk hikale na vaat tham tu uh a mong khat pan mong langkhat dong la in tang tu nu hi. Canaan mite ahile thik siphu ngalleang te nei in a hat mite ahitazong hawlkhia tu nu hi,” ci hi." 
Joshua18:1 Ngam a zawthal zawk uh ciang Israel taangpi bup sia Shiloh ah kikhawm in, Topa ompuina Puanbuk sa uh hi." 
Joshua18:2 Amate tel saan tu leitang a piak ngawl lai Israel mite nam sali om lai hi. 
Joshua18:3 Tua ahikom Joshua in Israel te mun ah, “ Topa, na taanghpupite ii Pathian ii hong piaksa ngam le lei sia va pai in na laak uh ma in bang tanvei ngak tu nu ziam?" 
Joshua18:4 Noma nam sim panin mihing thum veu hong pia tavun. Ngam bup sungah ka vaksak kawkoai tu a, amate ii neisa tu in a dei uh ngam le lei ii ngamlim ka suaisak tu hi. Tua zawkciang amate kei kungah hong heak kik tu hi." 
Joshua18:5 A ngam sia khen sali kisua tu hi; Judah sia thangsang a ngam sungah om tu a, Joseph sia saksang a ngam sungah om tu hi." 
Joshua18:6 Hi ngam khen salite ii thu hong at tavun a, ka kungah hong paipui tavun. Tuasia ciang laimee sawkin Topa ih Pathian tungah no atu in thu ka dongh tu hi." 
Joshua18:7 Levi te ahile no a dangte bangin leitang tel a saang buatu hi, banghang ziam cile amate tel sia Topa ii thiampi a sepna ahi hi. Tuaciang Gad, Reuben le Nisuana Manasseh namte in, Topa naseampa Moses ii Jordan nisuana ngam a piaksa sia nga zo hi.”" 
Joshua18:8 Tua pasalte ngamlim suai tu in a pai ciang, Joshua in hi bangin thupia hi: “Ngamsung theampo ah va pai tavun a, ngamlim na suai zawk uh ciang ka kungah hong cia kik tavun. Tuaciang hi lai Shiloh ah Topa kong dongh tu a, no atu in laimee ka sawk tu hi.”" 
Joshua18:9 Tua ahikom pasalte sia ngamsung mun theampo ah vak a, khen sali in a khenna lai taw at in, khua om teng min zong ngual uh hi. Tua zawkciang amate sia Shiloh ngiaphual, Joshua kungah heak kik uh hi." 
Joshua18:10 Joshua in amate atu laimee sawk in Topa dongh hi, a taanglai Israel namte khat sim tungah leitang khen khat tek pia hi." 
Joshua18:11 Benjamin nam sung innkuan te ii neisa ngam sia a khatna in kipia hi. Amate ngam sia Judah le Joseph namte ii kilaklaw ah om hi. 
Joshua18:12 Saksang ah a ngamngi sia Jordan panin kipan a Jericho saksang munkhamna ah paito a, mualtung ngam nitumna sang kaantan in Bethaven sennealngam dong ahi hi." 
Joshua18:13 Ngamngi sia tua mun pan thangsang munkhamna ah paisuk a, Luz (Bethel zongh kici) pangh ah, tua zawkciang Beth Horon Nuainung ii thangsang mual tungah a om Ataroth Addar dong paisuk hi." 
Joshua18:14 Ngamngi sia tua mun pan mundang khat ah pai a, hi mual ii nitumna pangh panin thang sangah kiheak in, Judah nam ii neisa Kiriath Baal (ahibuale Kiriath Jearim) dong ahi hi. Hi sia nitumna sang ngamngi hi." 
Joshua18:15 Thangsang ngamngi sia Kiriath Jearim ngammong panin kipan a Nephtoah ciktui sun hi. 
Joshua18:16 Tua mun pan paisuk a, Rephaim Kuam saksang mong Hinnom Kuam etsuk theina mualpeang ah paisuk hi. Tua mun pan Hinnom Kuam kaantan in thangsang ah paisuk a, Jebus mualbawk ii thangsang Enrogel sang sun hi." 
Joshua18:17 Tua mun panin saksang ah kiheak in Enshemesh sangah, tuaciang Adumim Mualciangh ii langkhat Geliloth ah paitan hi. Ngamngi sia Bohan Suangphu (Bohan sia Reuben ii tapa khat hi) ah paisuk hi," 
Joshua18:18 tuaciang Jordan Kuam a kimu suk thei mualbawk saksia ah kaantan hi. Tua mun pan mualkuam sungah paisuk in," 
Joshua18:19 Beth Hoglah mualbawk saksang kaantan in pai a, Jordan Ngun ii tumna mun Tuipi Thi saksang ah tawp hi. Hisia sia a thangsang ngamngi hi." 
Joshua18:20 Jordan sia nisuana ngamngi hi. Hiteng sia Benjamin nam innkuante nga tu ngam ii ngamngite ahi hi. 
Joshua18:21 Benjamin nam innkuante ii a nga khuapite sia Jericho, Beth Hoglah, Emek Keziz," 
Joshua18:22 Beth Arabah, Zemaraim, Bethel," 
Joshua18:23 Avvim, Parah, Ophrah," 
Joshua18:24 Chepharammoni, Ophni, le Geba hi a; khuapi sawm le nii le a kiim a khuate zongh ahi hi." 
Joshua18:25 A dang khuapite sia Gibeon, Ramah, Beeroth," 
Joshua18:26 Mizpah, Chephirah, Mozah," 
Joshua18:27 Rekem, Irpeel, Taralah," 
Joshua18:28 Zela, Haeleph, Jebus (ahibuale Jerusalem) Gibeah le Kiriath Jearim hi a: khuapi sawm le li le a kiim a om khuate taw ahi hi. Hi ngam sia Benjamin nam innkuante ii nga ngam ahi hi." 
Joshua19:1 A niina a kipia sia Simeon nam innkuante atu hi. A ngam sia Judah nam atu a kipia ngam sungah kithungsuk hi. 
Joshua19:2 Tuasung ah Beersheba, Sheba, Moladah," 
Joshua19:3 Hazar Shual, Balah, Ezem," 
Joshua19:4 Eltolad, Bethul, Hormah," 
Joshua19:5 Ziklag, Beth Marcaboth, Hazar Susah," 
Joshua19:6 Beth Lebaoth le Sharuhen kihel a: a kiim a khuate taw khuapi sawm le thum ahi hi. 
Joshua19:7 Tuaban ah, Ain, Rimmon, Ether le Ashan om a: khuapi li le a kiim a khuate taw ahi hi." 
Joshua19:8 Hi khuapite kiim ah a om khuate theampo kihel a thang sangah Baalath Beer (ahibuale Ramah) dong ahi hi. Hi ngam sia Simeon nam innkuante ii nga ngam ahi hi. 
Joshua19:9 Judah a kipia sia amate kisapna sangin lianzaw ahikom a ngam khen khat Simeon nam kipia hi. 
Joshua19:10 A thumna a kipia sia Zebulun nam innkuante atu hi. Amate nga leitang sia Sarid dong ban hi. 
Joshua19:11 Tua mun panin ngamngi sia nitumna sang Mareal ah pai in, Dabbesheth le Jokneam nisuana ah a om lui sia ban hi." 
Joshua19:12 Sarid ii langkhat panin nisuana Chisloth Tabor te ngamngi ah, tua zawkciang Daberath le Japhia dong pai hi." 
Joshua19:13 Tua mun pan nisuana sangah paisuak a, Gath Hepher le Ethkazin ah, tuaciang Neah sangah kiheak in, Rimmon paina sang zuan hi." 
Joshua19:14 Saksang ngamngi sia Hannathon sangah kiheak, Iphtahel Kuam ah tawp hi." 
Joshua19:15 A ngam sungah Kattath, Nahalal, Shimron, Idalah le Bethlehem kihel a: a kiim a khuate taw kopin khuapi sawm le nii ahi hi." 
Joshua19:16 Hi khuapite le a khuate sia Zebulun nam innkuante ii a nga ngam sia sungah om hi. 
Joshua19:17 A lina ah a kipia sia Issachar nam innkuante atu ahi hi. 
Joshua19:18 A ngam sungah Jezreel, Chesulloth, Shunem," 
Joshua19:19 Hapharaim, Shion, Anaharath," 
Joshua19:20 Rabbith, Kishion, Ebez," 
Joshua19:21 Remeth, Engannim, Enhaddah le Bethpazzez te kihel hi." 
Joshua19:22 Ngamngi sia zong Tabor, Shahazumah le Beth Shemesh ban a, Jordan ah tawp hi. A kiim a om khuate taw khuapi sawm le luk ahi hi." 
Joshua19:23 Hi khuapi te le a khuate sia Issachar nam sung a innkuante neisa tu in a nga ngam sungah om hi. 
Joshua19:24 A ngana a kipia sia Asher nam innkuante atu ahi hi. 
Joshua19:25 Tua ngam ah Helkath, Hali, Beten, Achshaph," 
Joshua19:26 Allam Melech, Amad le Mishal kihel hi. Nitumna sangah a ngamngi in Carmel le Shihor Libnath baan hi." 
Joshua19:27 Nisuana sang a zot ciang, ngamngi sia Bethdagon ah pai in, Zebulun le Iphtahel Kuam baan in saksang Bethemek le Neiel ah pai hi. Tuasia a saksang Cabul," 
Joshua19:28 Ebron, Rehob, Hammon le Kanah, Sidon dong paisuak hi." 
Joshua19:29 Ngamngi sia Ramah ah kiheak a, a khua kulhpi taw a ki uum Tyre dong theng hi; tua mun pan Hosah ah kiheak a, Mediterranean Tuipi ah tawp hi. A ngam sia Mahalab, Achzib," 
Joshua19:30 Ummah, Aphek le Rehob kihel a: khuapi kulh le nii le a kiim khuate taw ahi hi." 
Joshua19:31 Hi khuapite le a khuate sia Asher nam innkuante neisa tu in a nga ngam sungah om hi. 
Joshua19:32 A lukna a kipia ngam sia Naphtali nam innkuante atu ahi hi. 
Joshua19:33 A ngamngi sia Heleph pan pai a, Zaanannim ah a po oak thingkung ah, Adaminekeb le Jamnia ah, tuaciang Lakkum dong paitanin Jordan ngun ah tawp hi." 
Joshua19:34 Tua mun pan ngamngi sia nitumna sangah kiheak a, Aznoth Tabor ah, tua mun pan Hukkok ah, tuaciang thang sangah Zebulun, nitumna sangah Asher, nisuana sangah Jordan taw kipha hi." 
Joshua19:35 Kulhpi taw ki uum a khuapite sia Ziddim, Zer, Hammath, Rakkath, Chinnereth," 
Joshua19:36 Adamah, Ramah, Hazor," 
Joshua19:37 Kedesh, Edrei, Enhazor," 
Joshua19:38 Yiron, Migdalel, Horem, Bethanath le Beth Shemesh hi a: a kiim khuate taw kopin khuapi sawm le kua ahi hi." 
Joshua19:39 Hi khuapite le a khuate sia Naphtali nam innkuante neisa tu in a kipia ngam sungah om hi. 
Joshua19:40 A sali na a kipia ngam sia Dan nam innkuante atu ahi hi. 
Joshua19:41 A ngam sia Zorah, Eshtaol, Irshemesh," 
Joshua19:42 Shaalbim, Aijalon, Ithlah," 
Joshua19:43 Elon, Timnah, Ekron," 
Joshua19:44 Eltekeh, Gibbethon, Baalath," 
Joshua19:45 Jehud, Beneberak, Gathrimmon," 
Joshua19:46 Mejarkon le Rakkon, tuaciang Joppa kiim a ngam zongh kihel hi." 
Joshua19:47 Dan mite in a ngam a taan uh ciang, amate Laish ah pai in sim uh hi. Amate in a khua la in, a mite that a, tuaciang amate ii neisa suaksak hi. Amate sia tua munah teang in, a khuapi min sia Laish pan a taanghpupi Dan min taw laih uh hi." 
Joshua19:48 Hi khuapite le a kiim a khuate sia Dan nam innkuan te neisa tu in a nga ngam le lei ah om hi. 
Joshua19:49 Israel mite in ngam le lei a hawmna teng a man uh ciang Nun tapa Joshua ii neisa tu in ngam khen khat pia uh hi. 
Joshua19:50 Topa thupiak bangin, ama ii nget khuapi: Timnath Serah kipia a, Ephraim mualtung ngam sungah om hi. Ama in khuapi puua kik in tua munah teang hi." 
Joshua19:51 Thiampi Eleazar, Nun tapa Joshua le Israel nam teng ii innkuan lampuite in hi ngam le lei sia a hawm uh ciang, Topa ii ompuina Puanbuk kongbiang Shiloh ah, Topa a dokna in laimee sawk uh hi. Hi bangin amate in a ngam hawmna teng man uh hi." 
Joshua20:1 Tua zawkciang Topa in Joshua munah," 
Joshua20:2 Israel mite a son tu in, “Moses ii hong sonsawn tu ka sawl bukna khuapite teal vun." 
Joshua20:3 Mihing khat in ngual dang khat a thalup thaak ciang, a phulam tu in a zong pa khut pan a suatak natu in tua munah pai thei hi." 
Joshua20:4 Ama in hi khuapi te khat pawpo ah tai thei a, hi khuapi tumna kongbiang thukhenna munah a om lampuite tungah thupiang babang son thei tu hi. Amate in khuapi sungah a om thei natu in ama tumsak a, a teen natu mun khat pia tu hi." 
Joshua20:5 A phulam nuam pa in tua mun dongah a zuizen le khuapi mipite in ama ii khut sungah a tai pa sia aap ngawl het tu hi. Amate in ama hung nanak tu hi, banghang ziam cile ama thin uukna hang hi ngawlin a thalup thaak ahi man hi." 
Joshua20:6 Taangpi mai ah thu a kikhen dong le tua laitak Thiampi Lianbel a seam sia ii thi dong ama sia tua munah om thei tu hi. Tua zawkciangin tua pa hong taina a khua a inn ah cia kik thei tu hi,” ci hi." 
Joshua20:7 Tua ahikom amate in Jordan nitumna sang Naphtali mualtung ngamsung Galilee ngam ah Kedesh; Ephraim mualtung ngam ah Shechem; Judah mualtung ngam ah Hebron tuamkoi hi; 
Joshua20:8 Jordan nisuana, Jericho nisuana sang sennealngam mualtung, Reuben ngam sungah Bezer; Gad ngamsung Gilead ah Ramoth; Manasseh ngamsung Bashan ah Golan teal uh hi." 
Joshua20:9 Hi teng sia bukna khuapi tu in Israel te theampo le ngamdangmi amate sungah a teangte atu a kiteal teng ahi hi. Khat po in midang khat a thatlum tha le phulam tu in ama a zong sia ii khut pan dalna nga thei tu hi; taangpi mai ah thukhenna a thuak phot buale ama kithatlum thei ngawl hi. 
Joshua21:1 Levi innkuan lampuite sia thiampi Eleazar, Nun ii tapa Joshua le Israel nam theampo te ii innkuan lutangte kungah pai uh hi." 
Joshua21:2 Tualai Canaan ngam Shiloh ah hi bangin kison hi, “ Topa ii Moses tungtawnin a thupiakna pan, ko sia khuapite hong kipia tu a, ngan tat natu tua khuate ii kiim le paam lozaute zongh hong kipia tu ci hi.”" 
Joshua21:3 Tua ahikom Topa ii thupiakna taw kizui in Israel te in Levi te sia amate ngamsung pan khuapi pawlkhat le ngan tat natu leitang pia uh hi. 
Joshua21:4 Kohath bee le phung pan Levi innkuante sia a masabel in khuapite kipia hi. Thiampi Aaron suan le paal innkuante sia Judah ngam, Simeon ngam, le Benjamin ngamsung panin khuapi sawm le thum kipia hi." 
Joshua21:5 Kohath beete sung a om lai teng sia Ephraim, Dan le Nitumna Manasseh ngam teng sung pan khuapi sawm kipia hi." 
Joshua21:6 Gershon bee le phung sia Issachar, Asher, Naphtali, Nisuana Manasseh ngam teng sung pan khuapi sawm le thum kipia hi." 
Joshua21:7 Merari phung sung pan innkuante sia, Reuben, Gad, le Zebulun ngam teng sung pan khuapi sawm le nii kipia hi." 
Joshua21:8 Topa ii Moses tung thu a piak bangin Levi te sia khuapite le ngan tha natu lozaute Israel mite in laimee sawkin pia uh hi. 
Joshua21:9 Levi suan, Kohath ii bee le phung pan Aaron suan le paal te atu in Judah ngam le Simeon ngamsung pan a kipia khuapite min teng hi teng ahi hi. Amate a kipiakna sia a masabel ahi hi." 
Joshua21:10  
Joshua21:11 Amate tungah Arba khuapi (Arba sia Anak ii pa hi), tu in Hebron kici, Judah mualtung ngam a om khuapi le a kiim nganthana leitang taw kop in kipia hi." 
Joshua21:12 Ahihang khuapi ii lote le a kiim a khuate sia Jephunneh tapa Caleb a kipiasa ahi hi. 
Joshua21:13 Hebron (bukna khuapite sung pan khat) taw kikop in a nuai a khuapi teng sia thiampi Aaron suante kipia hi: Libnah," 
Joshua21:14 Jattir, Eshtemoa," 
Joshua21:15 Holon, Debir," 
Joshua21:16 Ain, Juttah le Beth Shemesh a ngan tatna leitangte taw: Judah le Simeon namte pan khuapi kua ahi hi." 
Joshua21:17 Benjamin ngam panin amate sia khuapi li: Gibeon, Geba," 
Joshua21:18 Anathoth le Almon, nganthana mun teng taw kipia hi." 
Joshua21:19 A vekpi in khuapi sawm le thum, a ngan tat natu leitangte taw Aaron ii suan thiampi te kipia hi." 
Joshua21:20 Kohath ii phung sung Levi innkuan dangte atu Ephraim ngamsung pan khuapi pawlkhat kipia hi. 
Joshua21:21 Amate tungah khuapi li: Shechem le a nganthana Ephraim (bukna khuapi khat hi), mualtung ngam Gezer," 
Joshua21:22 Kibzaim le Beth Horon, a nganthana leitangte kipia hi." 
Joshua21:23 Dan ngamsung pan amate tungah khuapi li: Eltekeh, Gibbethon," 
Joshua21:24 Aijalon le Gathrimmon, a nganthana leitangte taw kipia hi." 
Joshua21:25 Nitumna Manasseh ngam pan amate tungah khuapi nii: Taanach le Gathrimmon, nganthana leitangte taw kipia khawm hi." 
Joshua21:26 Hi Kohath bee le phung innkuante in a kingawmin khuapi sawm le a nganthana teng nga hi. 
Joshua21:27 Levi mi pawl dangkhat Gershon ii bee le phungte in Nisuana Manasseh ngam pan khuapi nii: Bashan ah Golan (bukna khuapi khat) le Beeshterah, a nganthana leitangte taw nga khawm uh hi." 
Joshua21:28 Issachar ngam panin amate in khuapi li: Kishion, Daberath," 
Joshua21:29 Jarmuth le Engannim, a nganthana leitangte taw kopin nga khawm uh hi." 
Joshua21:30 Asher ngam panin amate in khuapi li: Mishal, Abdon," 
Joshua21:31 Helkath le Rehob, a nganthana leitangte taw nga khawm uh hi." 
Joshua21:32 Naphtali ngam pan amate in khuapi thum: Galilee ah Kedesh, a nganthana leitangte taw (bukna khuapi khat), Hammoth Dor, le Karta'n, a nganthana leitang taw nga khawm uh hi." 
Joshua21:33 Gershon bee le phung pan innkuante in a vekpi a kingawm khuapi sawm le thum le a nganthana leitang teng taw nga khawm uh hi. 
Joshua21:34 Merari bee le phung pan Levi mi a taanglaite in Zebulun ngam panin khuapi li: Jokneam, Kartah," 
Joshua21:35 Dimnah le Nahalal, a nganthana leitang taw nga khawm uh hi." 
Joshua21:36 Reuben ngam panin amate in khuapi li: Bezer, Jahaz," 
Joshua21:37 Kedemoth le Mephaath, a nganthana leitang taw nga khawm uh hi." 
Joshua21:38 Gad nam tung pan amate in khuapi li: Gilead pan Ramoth, a nganthana leitang taw (bukna khuapi khat) Mahanaim," 
Joshua21:39 Heshbon le Jazer, a nganthana leitang taw kopin nga khawm uh hi." 
Joshua21:40 Tua ahikom Merari bee le phung a kipia khuapi sia sawm le nii ahi hi. 
Joshua21:41 Israel te neisa ngam le lei panin a kingawm khuapi sawmli le liat le a kiim nganthana leitang teng sia Levi te kipia hi. 
Joshua21:42  
Joshua21:43 Tua ahikom, Topa in Israel te sia a taanghpupite tungah a ciliap huai kamciam a piaksa ngam le lei theampo pia hi. Amate in tuasia a nga zawk uh ciang, tua munah teang uh hi." 
Joshua21:44 Topa in a taanghpupite tungah kamciam a piaksa bangma in, ngamsung bup ah kilemna pia hi. A ngalte theampo sung pan khat zongh in amate nalh zo ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile Topa in a ngalte theampo zaw zawkna Israel te pia hi." 
Joshua21:45 Topa in Israel mite tungah kamciam a piak theampo kholet hi. 
Joshua22:1 Tua zawkciang Joshua in Reuben, Gad, le nisuana Manasseh nam teng pan mipite sam khawm hi." 
Joshua22:2 Amate tungah, “ Topa naseampa Moses thupiak theampo vawt siat zo nu hi, tuaciang keima thupiak theampo hong ni zo nu hi." 
Joshua22:3 Hi hun bup sungah na Israel mipuite khatvei zongh na taisan ngei bua uh hi. Topa na Pathian ii thupiakna pha takin na ni uh hi. 
Joshua22:4 Tu in ama kamciam bangma in, Topa na Pathian in na Israel mipuite kilemna hong pia zo hi. Tua ahikom Topa naseampa Moses ii hong piak Jordan nisuana sangah noma atu na laak na inn na lo uh ah cia kik tavun." 
Joshua22:5 Moses ii hong thupiak bangin thukham na zui natu khuangaisun hamtang tavun: Topa na Pathian it vun, ama deina bang ngamta vun, a thupiakte ni vun, ama tungah thumaan vun, tuaciang ama atu na thin theampo le na thaa theampo taw seam vun,” ci hi." 
Joshua22:6 Joshua in thupha pia in hi kammalte taw amate ciasak hi: “No sia a hau mama in nganno, ngunn, khamh, taau, thik, silh le teen tam mama taw cia kik nu hi. Na ngalte tung pan na laak uh vanhte sia na nam pui mite hawm tavun,” ci hi. Tua zawkciang amate inn ah cia uh hi. Moses in Manasseh nam a khenlang sia Jordan nisuana sangah ngam pia zo hi, ahihang a dang khenlang sia Joshua in nam dangte taw Jordan nitumna sangah ngam pia hi." 
Joshua22:7  
Joshua22:8  
Joshua22:9 Tua hi a, Reuben, Gad, le Nisuana Manasseh nam teng sia inn ah cia kik uh hi. Amate in Israel mi a taanglai teng sia Canaan ngam Shiloh ah nusia uh hi, tuaciang amate in Topa ii Moses tungah a thupiakna tungtawnin a laak sa Gilead ngam le lei zuan uh hi." 
Joshua22:10 Reuben, Gad, le Nisuana Manasseh te nitumna sang ma ahi lai Geliloth a thet uh ciang, tuasung ngun hui ah a lian a munophuai biaknatau khat sa uh hi." 
Joshua22:11 Israel mi a taang lai teng munah, “Ngai vun! Reuben, Gad, le Nisuana Manasseh namte in Geliloth, Jordan ii ei sangah biaknatau sa uh hi!” ci uh hi." 
Joshua22:12 Israel mite in hi thu a zaak uh ciang, a taangpi bup sia, nisuana sang minamte sim tu in Shiloh ah kikaikhawm uh hi." 
Joshua22:13 Tua zawkciang Israel mite in thiampi Eleazar ii tapa Phinehas sia Reuben, Gad, le Nisuana Manasseh te kung Gilead ah paisak uh hi." 
Joshua22:14 Lampui pasal sawm sia Phinehas taw paikhawm uh hi, nitumna sang a minamte khat ciang khat veu le bee le phung sungah a innkuan papi khat tek kihel uh hi." 
Joshua22:15 Amate in Gilead ngam ah Reuben, Gad, le Nisuana Manasseh namte kungah a pai uh hi, Topa ii huam taangpi bup taangin amate tungah hong pau hi." 
Joshua22:16 “Banghangin Israel te ii Pathian tungah hi bang ngamtatna siatna vawt nu ziam? Noma atu hi bang biaknatau na sak uh ciang Topa a langpan na hi uh hi. No in ama nung zui nawn ngawl nu hi! 
Joshua22:17 Peor ah ih mawna te phawk kik vun, Topa in ama mite sia tua munah pul natna taw daan hong pia hi kana ngawl ziam? Tua hu in eite in tu dong ma in ih thuak lai hi. Tua mawna sia pha zo sa ngawl lai nu ziam?" 
Joshua22:18 Tu in ama nung na zui tu uh nial lai nu ziam? Tu ni in Topa na langpan uh le ama in zing ciang Israel mi khat sim tungah hong thin uuk tu hi. 
Joshua22:19 Tu in, na ngam na lei uh sia biakpiak natu in citaak sa ngawl na hi uh le ama Puanbuk omna Topa ii leitang tungah hong pai tavun. Ko sungah leitang pawlkhat sia ko aa hi hong ci tavun. Ahizong Topa ih Pathian biaknatau sia belapna in biaknatau khat a kisakna taw in Topa langpanin leedo heak vun, ahibuale ko zongh a leedote hong suaksak heak vun." 
Joshua22:20 Zerah tapa Achan phawk vun, ama in a kiningkhiin nate taw kisai thupiakna sia ni nuam ngawl hi; Israel taangpi bup sia tua huvau in daan hong kipia hi. Achan mawna hu in a thi sia ama bek hi ngawl hi.”" 
Joshua22:21 Nitumna sang minamte ii innkuan papi te munah Reuben, Gad, le Nisuana Manasseh te in:" 
Joshua22:22 “A Thahatpipa sia Pathian hi! Ama sia Topa hi! A Thahatpipa sia Pathian hi! Ama sia Topa hi! Ama in hisia banghangin vawt khu ziam ci in hong he hi, tuaciang no zongh in he le uhte kong oai hi. Topa ka upna keamcing ngawlin, ka langpan uh le hong nungtasak heak vun!" 
Joshua22:23 Topa thu ni ngawlin koma aituam atu hi biaknatau sia sa in, meihal biakpiakna ahibuale antang biakpiakna, pawlkhop biakpiakna tu in sa ka hi uh le Topa ama mama in daan hong pia tahen." 
Joshua22:24 Hi ngawl hi! Biaknatau ka sak uh ahang sia mai sangah noma suan le paalte in koma suan le paalte tungah, ‘Israel te ii Pathian Topa taw no bang kisai nu ziam?" 
Joshua22:25 Ama in Jordan ngun sia no Reuben le Gad te taw ih kilaklaw ah ngamngi hong khen sa hi. No le Topa sia na kisaina uh om ngawl hi,’ hong ci thaak tu ka lau uh hang hi. Tuaciang noma suan le paalte in koma suan le paalte sia Topa biak tu hong khaam tu hi." 
Joshua22:26 Tua ahikom biaknatau khat sa khu hi, meihal biakpiaknate ahibuale piakkhiatnate atu hi ngawl hi," 
Joshua22:27 tua sangin, koma mite le noma mite atu, tuaciang khangkikte atu in ama ii a thiangtho Puanbuk mai ah koma in Topa sia meihal biakpiaknate, sangaw biakpiaknate le pawlkhop biakpiakna te taw bia tatak khu hi ci heaksakna lim khat hi tu hi. Hi sia in noma suan le paalte in koma suan le paalte tungah Topa sia no taw bang kisai ziam hong ci ngawl natu ahi hi." 
Joshua22:28 Ko ngaisutna pan hi bang thu hong piang zezen le, koma suan le paalte in, ‘En vun! ka taanghpupite in Topa biaknatau taw a kibang biaknatau khat vawt hi. Tua biaknatau sia meihal biakpiakna ahibuale sangaw biakpiakna vawt natu kici ngawl hi, koma mite le noma mite kilaklaw ah lim khat in kivawt hi,’ ci thei tu hi." 
Joshua22:29 Kote in Topa langpan ngawl het tu khu hi, tua ahibuale meihal biakpiaknate, antang biakpiaknate ahibuale sangaw biakpiaknate vawt natu in biaknatau khat a kisakna taw tu in ama nungzui tu a tawp hi ngawl khu hi. Ama hong ompuina Puanbuk mai ah Topa ih Pathian biaknatau sia ngawl a dang biaknatau khat pawpo vawt ngawl tu khu hi,” ci uh hi." 
Joshua22:30 Reuben, Gad, le Nisuana Manasseh nam pan mite ii pauna teng sia thiampi Phinehas le ama taw a paikhawm taangpi lampuite sawm le nitumna sang a teang namte ii innkuan papite in za a, a lung uh kim hi." 
Joshua22:31 Eleazar thiampipa ii tapa Phinehas in amate tungah, “Tu in ka heak uh thu pan Topa sia ei taw hong omkhawm hi, tua ahikom noma in Topa ii daan hong piak natu panin Israel mite hong suatak nu hi,” ci hi." 
Joshua22:32 Tua zawkciang Phinehas le lampuite in Reuben, le Gad mite Gilead ngam ah nusia uh a, Canaan ngam ah cia kikin Israel mipuite tungah thu a puak uh hi." 
Joshua22:33 Israel te lungkim in, Pathian pok uh hi. Reuben, le Gad mite teenna ngamte lalcipsak tu in ngalsim tu thu, a son nawn bua uh hi." 
Joshua22:34 Reuben le Gad mite in, “ Topa sia Pathian hi ci in hi biaknatau in eite theampo atu tetti hi ci uh hi. Tua ahikom amate in a min sia “Tetti” a phuak uh hi." 
Joshua23:1 Khuangei mama zawkciang Topa in Israel te sia a kiim a paam ngal launa panin ngammuanna pia hi. Tua hun in Joshua sia huai mama zo hi," 
Joshua23:2 tua ahikom Israel theampo, upate, lampuite, thukhente, mipite sung pan a uliante sam a, ama in, “Tu in kei sia huai mama zo khi hi." 
Joshua23:3 Noma hu in hi minam teng tungah Topa na Pathian ii a sep a vawt theampo na mu zo uh hi. Topa na Pathian sia no atu in ngal do hi. 
Joshua23:4 Ngamsung minam a taanglai te ii leitang sia noma namte atu kong pia zo a, nisuana Jordan ngun pan nitumna Mediterranean Tuipi dong ka zawthal sa minam teng ii ngam zongh kong khensak zo hi." 
Joshua23:5 Topa na Pathian in no kung pan amate nungkinsak tu a, tuaciang mai sang na manaw uh ciang amate hawlkeak tu hi. Topa na Pathian ii hong kamciamsa bangin amate ngam sia na tang tu uh hi." 
Joshua23:6 Tua ahikom Moses Thukham laibu sung a ki at theampo na zui natu na kikhuangkho tavun. Tuasung thute khat zongh na ngaingon heak vun," 
Joshua23:7 tuasia ciang note kawm ah a taanglai mite taw na kipawl buatu uh hi, amate ii pathian minte thuson in na nei buatu uh hi, ahibuale tuate ii min lo in thuciamte na vawt buatu uh a, tua pathiante bia in na kun suk buatu uh hi." 
Joshua23:8 Tua taangin tu dong ciang na thumaan sa uh bangma Topa tungah thumaan tu nu hi. 
Joshua23:9 Topa in a thahat minam liante sia na mai sang na manaw uh ciang hong nawkeaksak zo a, kuama no hong nalh zo om ngeingawl hi." 
Joshua23:10 No sung pan pasal khat pawpo in pasal tulkhat taikeaksak zo tu nu hi, banghang ziam cile Topa na Pathian sia, hong kamciamsa bangma in, no atu ngal hong simsak hi." 
Joshua23:11 Tua ahikom, Topa na Pathian na it tu uh kingaisun vun." 
Joshua23:12 Na thumaan bua uh a, no sungah a taanglai minamte taw kipawlkhawm in na kiteang uh le," 
Joshua23:13 Topa na Pathian in hi minamte sia maisang na manaw uh ciang hong nawkeaksak nawn ngawl het tu ahi sia na he thei hi. Amate sia no atu in thaang bang, vuum bangin hong lauhuai zaw tu a, thibin pan kivel bang, mittang sung ling do bangin hong na zaw tu hi. Topa na Pathian ii hong piaksa hi leitang hoi tungah note kuama na om nawn ngawl uh dong hisia kipee tan tu hi." 
Joshua23:14 “Tu in ka thi tu hun theng zo hi. Topa na Pathian in na pha theampo hong kamciamsa bangin hong pia zo ci sia na thinmuu na lungmuu le na thaa sungah a kuama po in na he uh hi. A kamciam khat simin kikeamcing a; khat zongh vaalthongsak ngawl hi. 
Joshua23:15 Ahihang, no tung a kamciam hong kipia theampo a kepcing bangma in, hong tawnnate theampo zongh tungsak tu hi." 
Joshua23:16 Topa na Pathian ii na kepcing tu in hong thupiak thuciam sia keam ngawlin pathian dangte na seamin na bia uh le ama in a thin uuk tutna in note daan hong pia tu a, ama hong piaksa hi ngam hoi ngam phana ah hai ngawlin kuama na om nawn buatu uh hi." 
Joshua24:1 Joshua in Israel nam teng theampo Shechem ah khawmtua hi. -Ama in upate, lampuite, thukhente, Israel uliante sam a, Pathian ompuina munah hong pai tek uh hi." 
Joshua24:2 Joshua in mipite theampo tungah, “ Topa Israel te ii Pathian ii a ci sia hi teng hi: ‘Khuangeipi hun lai in noma taanghpupite sia Euphrates ngun langkhat ah teang a, pathian dang bia uh hi. Tua taanghpupite sung pan khat sia Terah hi a, Abraham le Nahor ii pa ahi hi." 
Joshua24:3 Tuaciang noma ii taanghpupi Abraham ka la a, Euphrates ngunngal ngam pan Canaan ngam buppi kaantan in ka paipui hi. Suan le paal tam mama ka pia hi. Ama Isaac ka pia a," 
Joshua24:4 tuaciang Isaac tungah Jacob le Esau ka pia hi. Esau tungah a neisa tu in Edom mualtung ngam ka pia a, ahihang na taanghpupi uh Jacob le a tate ahile Egypt ah paisuk hi." 
Joshua24:5 A zawkciang Moses le Aaron ka paisak a, Egypt tungah ngimna lianpi ka pia hi. Ahihang no sia kong pusua pui hi." 
Joshua24:6 Egypt panin na taanghpupite uh ka pusua a, tuaciang Egypt te in siphu ngalleang le siphu ngalkapte taw del uh hi. Ahihang na taanghpupite uh San Tuipi a thet uh ciang," 
Joshua24:7 amate au in kei tungah hu hong ngen uh hi, tuasia ciang amate le Egypt te kilaklaw ah khua ka zingsak hi. Egypt te tungah tuipi ka kihualsak a, amate tuitaa siat hi. Egypt tungah ka vawt ka sep teng na he uh hi. “ ‘Sennealngam sungah khuangei ma na teang uh hi." 
Joshua24:8 Tua zawkciang Jordan ngun ii nisuana sang a om Amor te ngam ah kong paipui hi. Amate in no hong do ahihang amate kong zosak hi. Amate ngam la in, maisang na manaw uh ciang, amate ka mon hi." 
Joshua24:9 Tua zawkciang Moab kumpi pa, Zippor ii tapa Balak in no hong do hi. Ama in Beor tapa Balaam samin no hong haamsiat tu in sawl hi." 
Joshua24:10 Ahihang Balaam ii kam ka nangai bua hi, tua ahikom ama in no thupha hong pia hi, tuabangin Balak khut sung pan kong suatak hi." 
Joshua24:11 Jordan ngun kaantan in, Jericho khua theng nu hi. Jericho mite in Amor te, Periz te, Canaan te, Hit te, Girgash te, Hiv te le Jebus te ii hong do bangma in no hong do hi. Ahihang amate tung theampo ah zawna kong pia hi." 
Joshua24:12 Maisang na manaw uh ciang Amor kumpipa te nii ka nawkeak natu in amate nasia takin ka lausak hi. No ma namsau te le thal te hang hi ngawl hi.
