Joshua24:13 Na thaw ngeingawl uh leitang kong pia a, na saat ngawl uh khuapite kong pia hi. Tu in note tua munah teangin noma suan ngawl sapitkungte pan sapitngate le na ciin ngawl uh olive kungte pan olive thaute na ne uh hi.’ ”" 
Joshua24:14 “Tua ahiciang, tu in, Topa zatak vawt vun a, thintak le thumaanna taw a na seam vun,” ci in Joshua in a thu son zom a, “Mesopotamia le Egypt a na taanghpupite ii biak pathiante vawk vun, Topa atu bek seam vun." 
Joshua24:15 Ama na, na seam nuam bua uh le, tu ni in khensat vun, akua atu seam tu nu ziam, ih taanghpupite ii Mesopotamia ah a biak pathiante atu ziam maw, tu laitak na teenna leitang a nei Amor pathiante atu ziam? Ka innkuan puite le kei ka hi le Topa atu ka seam tu uh hi.”" 
Joshua24:16 Mipi te in “ko Topa nusia in pathian dangte na seam ngeingawl tu khu hi! 
Joshua24:17 Topa ih Pathian in ih pate le ei sia Egypt ngam saltanna pan hong pusuapui a, nalamdang lakna a vawtte ih mu hi. Ih paina po ah ih kaantan sa minamte khut sung panin hong keamcing hi." 
Joshua24:18 Hi ngam sungah maisang nawk in ih pai ciang hi munah a teang Amor te a vekpi in Topa in hong nawkeaksak hi. Tua ahikom ko zongh Topa na seam tu khu hi; ama ih Pathian hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Joshua24:19 Joshua in mipite tungah, “Ahihang Topa na seam zo ngawl tha tu nu hi. Ama sia a thiangtho Pathian hi a, ama in na mawnate uh hong maisak ngawl tu hi. Ama in ama a demte kuama dual ngawl hi," 
Joshua24:20 Tuaciang ngamdang pathiante ii na seam tu in ama na nusia uh le ama in note hong langpan tu a, daan hong pia tu hi. Nidangin no tungah hong dik hikale ama in note hong mon tu hi,” ci hi." 
Joshua24:21 Mipite in Joshua munah, “Hi ngawl hi! Topa na seam tu khu hi,” ci uh hi." 
Joshua24:22 Joshua in amate munah, “ Topa na seam tu a, na teal huvau in no mama a tetti hi tu nu hi,” a ci ciang, “Hi hi, koma tetti hi khu hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Joshua24:23 “Tua ahiciang ngamdangte pathian na kep uhte vawk vun, tuaciang Topa Israel te ii Pathian tungah na thumaanna kamkho pia vun,” ci in ngen hi." 
Joshua24:24 Tuasia ciang Mipite in Joshua munah, “ Topa ih Pathian naseam tu khu hi. A thu piakte ni tu khu hi,” ci uh hi." 
Joshua24:25 Tua ahikom Joshua in tua ni in mipite atu thuciamna khat vawt a, Shechem ah thukhamte le ngeina zui tute pia hi." 
Joshua24:26 Joshua in hi thupiakna te Pathian Thukham laibu sungah at hi. Tua zawkciang ama in suangtum pui khat la in, Topa biakna mun oak thingkung nuai khat ah phut hi." 
Joshua24:27 Mipite theampo tungah ama in, “Hi suang sia ih tetti hi tu hi. Topa ii ei tungah hong pau kammal theampo tuasia in za siat zo hi. Tua ahikom tuasia in note ii lang ah tetti hi tu a, Topa na langpan ngawl natu hi tu hi." 
Joshua24:28 Tua zawkciang Joshua in mipite ciasak a, mi theampo in a neisa ngam le lei ah heak kik uh hi." 
Joshua24:29 Tuasia zawkciang Nun ii tapa Topa naseampa Joshua sia kum za le kum sawm a phak ciang thi hi. 
Joshua24:30 Ama sia ama ii neisa leitang, Ephraim mualtung ngam, Gaash Mual saksang Timnath Serah ah kiphum hi." 
Joshua24:31 Joshua nuntak lai teng Israel mite in Topa na seam uh hi, tuaciang ama thi zawkciang zong, Topa ii Israel atu a sep a vawt theampo a mu lampuite nuntak lai teng tuabang ma na a sepna zom suak uh hi." 
Joshua24:32 Egypt pan Israel mite ii a paipui uh Joseph luang sia Shechem ii pa Hamor tapate tung pan ngunntang zakhat taw Jacob leisa leitang no khat sung Shechem ah kiphum hi. Hi leitang sia Joseph suante in lua hi. 
Joshua24:33 Aaron tapa Eleazar thi a, Ephraim mualtung ngam ah a om, a tapa Phinehas tungah a kipia Gibeah khua ah kiphum hi." 
Judges1:1 Joshua thi zawkciang Israel te in Topa dongh a, “Akuate nam pai masa in Canaan te sim tu khu ziam?” ci uh hi." 
Judges1:1 Joshua thi zawkciang Israel te in Topa dongh a, “Akuate nam pai masa in Canaan te sim tu khu ziam?” ci uh hi." 
Judges1:2 Topa in, “Judah nam pai masa tu hi. Amate ngam uksak tu khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Judges1:3 Judah mite in Simeon mite tungah, “Ei hong kipia ngam sungah ko taw hong pai tavun, Canaan te ih sim khawm tu hi. Tua zawkciang no hong kipia ngamte sia ko zongh kong sim pui tu uh hi,” ci hi. Tua ahikom Simeon namte le" 
Judges1:4 Judah namte sia ngalsim tu in kuan khawm hi. Topa in amate sia Canaan mite le Periz mite zosak a, Bezek ah mi 10,000 zo uh hi." 
Judges1:5 Amate in tua munah Adonibezek mu in sim uh hi. 
Judges1:6 Ama tai hi, ahihang amate in del a, pummat in a khutpite le a peangpite tansak uh hi." 
Judges1:7 Adonibezek in, “Kumpi sawmsali, a khutpite le a peangpite a kitante in ka sabuai nuai ah antaakte tawm uh hi. Amate tung a ka vawt teng Pathian in kei tungah tu in hong vawt hi,” ci hi. Jerusalem ah ama kipaipui a, tua munah thi hi." 
Judges1:8 Judah mite in Jerusalem simin la uh hi. A mite thatin a khuapi haltham hi. 
Judges1:9 Hisia zawkciang amate in mualtung ngam, mualpeang le thangsang ngam kona ah a teang Canaan mite sim uh hi." 
Judges1:10 Amate in, Kiriath Arba a kici ngei Hebron khuapi kiim a teang Canaan mite kuan in sim uh hi. Tua munah amate in Sheshai, Ahiman le Talmai bee le phungte zo uh hi." 
Judges1:11 Tua mun panin Judah mite sia tua hun lai in Kiriath Sepher a kici Debir khuapi sim tu in kuan uh hi. 
Judges1:12 Amate sung pan khat ahi Caleb in, “Kiriath Sepher a la zo pa sia ka tanu Achsah taw teangsak tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
Judges1:13 Caleb naupa Kenaz ii tapa Othniel in khuapi la zo hi, tua ahikom Caleb in a tanu Achsah sia a teenpui tu in pia hi." 
Judges1:14 Mo kiteen ni in Othniel in ama munah, a pa tung pan lo khat ngenin sawl hi. Ama sia a laa tung pan hong tuak a, Caleb in bang dei ni ziam ci in dongh hi." 
Judges1:15 “Tuicing pawlkhat dei khi hi, leitang nong piak sia mun kona hi thong hi,” ci hi. Tua ahikom Caleb in ama cik tungnung le cik nuainung pia hi." 
Judges1:16 Moses sunghpa ii suan Ken mite sia Judah mite taw paitanin palm thing pona Jericho pan mualkolna ngam Judah ngamsung Arad thangsang zuan uh hi. Amate sia Amalek te taw tua munah teang khawm uh hi. 
Judges1:17 Judah mite le Simeon mite kuan khawm in Zephath khuapi a teang Canaan mite zo uh hi. Amate in khuapi tomlaw a, susia in, Hormah ci in min phua uh hi." 
Judges1:18 Topa in Judah mite hu a, amate in a neisa tu in mualtung ngam la uh hi. Ahihang amate in Gaza, Ashkelon, ahibuale Ekron le a kiim a ngamte a la bua uh hi. Hi mite tuipi hui ah teangin thik siphu ngalleang nei ahikom Judah mite in a nawtkeak zo bua uh hi." 
Judges1:19  
Judges1:20 Moses ii thupiak bangin, Hebron sia Caleb kipia a, ama in khuapi sung pan Anak suan bee le phung thum teng notkeak hi." 
Judges1:21 Ahihang Benjamin nam mite in Jerusalem khua a teang Jebus te notkeak ngawl ahikom Jebus mite sia Benjamin mite taw tua hun a kipan teang khawm hi. 
Judges1:22 Ephraim le Manasseh namte sia tua hun lai in Luz a kici Bethel khuapi sim tu in kuan uh hi. Topa in amate hu hi. Amate in khuapi sungah thudawpkute paisak uh a," 
Judges1:23  
Judges1:24 pasal khat khua pan a pusuak a mu ciang, “Khuapi sung tumna hong lak le te bangma hong law ngawl tu khu hi,” ci uh hi." 
Judges1:25 Tua ahikom ama in lak a, tuasia ciang Ephraim le Manasseh mite in tua pasal pa le a innkuanpui teng simngawl mon siat uh hi." 
Judges1:26 Ama in tua zawkciang Hit te ngam ah pai in, khuapi khat tua munah saat hi, Luz ci in a min phuak a, tu dong ma tua min taw kina lai hi." 
Judges1:27 Manasseh namte in Beth Shan, Taanach, Dor, Ibleam, Megiddo, le a nai a khuate sung a teang mite a notkhia bua uh hi; Canaan mite tua munah teang suak uh hi." 
Judges1:28 Israel mite a thahat vaial a, Canaan te zawthawk thu taw amate ii na seamsak hi, ahihang notkeak siat ngawl lai hi." 
Judges1:29 Ephraim namte in Gezer khuapi panin Canaan mite notkeak ngawl ahikom Canaan mite sia amate taw teang khawm suak uh hi. 
Judges1:30 Zebulun namte in Kitron khuapi le Nahalal khuapi sung a teang Canaan mite notkhia ngawl ahikom Canaan mite sia amate taw teang khawm top a, zawthawk thu taw amate ii na seamsak hi." 
Judges1:31 Asher namte in Canaan mite sia Acco, Sidon, Ahlab, Achzib, Helbah, Aphek, le Rehob khuapite sung teang mite a notkeak bua uh hi." 
Judges1:32 Asher mite in Canaan tualsuak mite notkeak ngawl ahikom amate taw teang khawm hi. 
Judges1:33 Naphtali namte in Beth Shemesh le Bethanath khuapite sung a teang mite a notkeak bua uh hi. Naphtali mite in Canaan tualsuakte taw teang khawm uh hi, ahizong zawthawk thu taw amate ii na seamsak hi." 
Judges1:34 Amor mite in Dan namte sia mualtung ngam ah not to uh a, zaanglei ah a tuaksuk tu khaam uh hi." 
Judges1:35 Amor mite sia Aijalon, Shaalbim, le Heres Mual ah teang suak a, ahihang Ephraim le Manasseh te in amate uk in, zawthawk thu taw amate ii na seamsak hi." 
Judges1:36 Sela saksang ah Edom te ngamngi sia Akrabbim Mualciangh kaantan in pai hi. 
Judges2:1 Topa ii vantunglalang sia Gilgal pan Bochim ah pai a, Israel te munah, “Egypt ngam panin no kong lakhia a, na taanghpupite tungah ka kamciamsa leitang tungah kong then hi. ‘Nang taw ka thuciamna ka peal ngei buatu hi." 
Judges2:2 Hi ngam a teang te taw thuciamna vawt ngawl het tu nu hi. Amate biaknataute na baltham nanak tu uh hi,’ ka ci hi. Ahihang kong sawl bangin na ngamta bua uh hi. A lee lalam in na ngamta uh hi!" 
Judges2:3 Tua ahikom tu in kong cina pan, mai sang na manaw kawmin hi mite not nawn ngawl tu khi hi. Amate sia na ngalte uh hong hi tu a, tua ciangin amate ii pathian biakpiakna in no thaang hong sia tu hi,” ci hi." 
Judges2:4 Vantunglalang in hi teng a ci zawkciang, Israel mite theampo kap hi," 
Judges2:5 tua hu in tua mun sia Bochim kici hi. Tua munah amate in Topa tungah sangaw biakpiakna pia uh hi. 
Judges2:6 Mi sim in ama ii neisa ngam le lei tel a nga tu in Joshua in Israel te paisak hi. 
Judges2:6 Mi sim in ama ii neisa ngam le lei tel a nga tu in Joshua in Israel te paisak hi. 
Judges2:7 Joshua nuntak lai tengin Israel mite in Topa na seam uh hi, tuaciang a thi zawkciang zong, Topa ii Israel atu na lianpi a vawt teng a mu lampuite nuntak lai teng tuabang ma seam tan uh hi." 
Judges2:7 Joshua nuntak lai tengin Israel mite in Topa na seam uh hi, tuaciang a thi zawkciang zong, Topa ii Israel atu na lianpi a vawt teng a mu lampuite nuntak lai teng tuabang ma seam tan uh hi." 
Judges2:8 Topa naseampa Nun ii tapa Joshua sia kum za le kum sawm a phak ciang thi hi. 
Judges2:8 Topa naseampa Nun ii tapa Joshua sia kum za le kum sawm a phak ciang thi hi. 
Judges2:9 Ama sia Ephraim mualtung ngam Gaash Mual saksang ama ii leitang ahi Timnath Serah a kicina ah kiphum hi. 
Judges2:10 Tua khang bup mi theampo zongh thi siat zo a, tuaciang a khang kikte in Topa le ama ii Israel atu a sep a vawtte mangil uh hi." 
Judges2:11 Tua zawkciang Israel mite in Topa tungah mawna vawtin, Baal pathiante bia tu in hong kipan uh hi." 
Judges2:12 A taanghpupite ii Pathian, Egypt ngam panin amate a pusua pui Pathian, Topa bia nawn ngawlin a kiim le a paam mihingte ii pathiante, pathian dangte bia tu in kipan uh hi." 
Judges2:13 Topa a biak uh nusia in, Baal le Astarte te bia uh hi." 
Judges2:14 Tua ahikom Topa sia Israel tungah nasia takin thin uuk a, a simthamte in simsak a, suttolsak hi. Kiim le paam a ngalte in Israel te zosak a, amate le amate kihung zo nawn ngawl uh hi." 
Judges2:15 Ngal kidona ah a kuan uh simin, a ci sa bangma, Topa in amate langpan hi. Amate sia thinkiam in hee mama uh hi." 
Judges2:16 Tuasia ciang Topa in a simthamte ii khut pan a hung tu Israel lampuite pia hi. 
Judges2:17 Ahihang Israel te in a lampuite sia awlmawk vawt ngawl uh hi. Israel te Topa tungah thumaan ngawlin pathian dangte bia uh hi. Amate ii pate in Topa thupiakte ni hi, ahihang hi khangthakte in thu ni nawn ngawl paih uh hi." 
Judges2:18 Israel te tungah Topa in lampui khat a piak simin, tua lampui pa ii nuntak lai teng Topa in ama hu a, mite sia ngalte khut sung pan hung hi. Nenniamna le ngim thuakna taw a tau hu in Topa in amate hesuak hi." 
Judges2:19 Ahihang lampui sia a thi ciangin amate ngamtat ngeite ngamta kik in, a khang masa te sangin a ngamtatna uh sia zaw hi. Amate in pathian dang bia in a na sepsak uh a, amate ii khansiatna te a thasua nuam peuma bua uh hi." 
Judges2:20 Tuasia ciang Topa sia Israel te tungah thin uuk mama a, “Hi minam in a taanghpupite tungah a kepcing tu in thu ka piaksa thuciam sia paltan hi. Amate in kei thu hong ni ngawl ahikom," 
Judges2:21 Joshua ii thi hun dong a ngam sungah a om lai minamte notkeak nawn ngawl tu khi hi. 
Judges2:21 Joshua ii thi hun dong a ngam sungah a om lai minamte notkeak nawn ngawl tu khi hi. 
Judges2:22 A taanghpupite vawt bangma in hi Israel mite in ka zia hong zui ziam hong zui bua ziam ka heak natu in amate zangh tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
Judges2:23 Tua ahikom Topa in tua minamte sia a ngam sungah teangsak lai a; Joshua in a zosak bua hi, Joshua ii thi zawk po ciang zong amate a notkeak bua hi."
