Judges3:1 Tua ahikom, Topa in Canaan ah ngal kisimnate a he ngawl Israel te a ze et natu in minam pawlkhat taangsak lai hi." 
Judges3:2 Hi bangin ahi sia Israel te khang simin ngal huvau a hil natu bek hi a, a tuanin kidona sungah a kihel ngeingawlte a hil natu ahi hi." 
Judges3:3 A ngamsung a taanglai teng sia Philistine te khuapi nga hi a, Canaan te, Sidon te a vekpi le Lebanon Mualte tung, Baal Hermon Mual pan Hamath Mualciangh dong a teang Hiv te ahi hi." 
Judges3:4 Moses tungtawnin Israel mite in a taanghpupite tungah Topa ii thupiakte a ni ziam a ni bua ziam ci in Israel a ze et natu in amate a taanglai ahi hi. 
Judges3:5 Tuabangin Israel mite sia Canaan te, Hit te, Amor te, Periz te, Hiv te le Jebus te kawmah teang uh hi." 
Judges3:6 Amate sia tua mite taw kiteang tetekin, a pathiante bia uh hi." 
Judges3:7 Israel mite in Topa amate ii Pathian mangil ta uh hi; Ama tungah amate maw a, Baal le Asherah milimte bia uh hi." 
Judges3:8 Tua ahikom Topa sia Israel tungah thin uuk a, Mesopotamia kumpipa Cushan Rishathaim in zothal sakin, kum liat sung uk hi." 
Judges3:9 Tuasia ciang Israel te in Topa tungah a ko ciang, Topa in amate a suatak tu mihing khat paisak hi. Hisia Caleb ii naupa, Kenaz ii tapa, Othniel ahi hi." 
Judges3:10 Topa thaa sia ama tung hong theng a, ama Israel lampui hong suak hi. Othniel in ngal sim a Topa in Mesopotamia kumpipa zosak hi." 
Judges3:11 Kum 40 sung ngam le lei ah kilemna om a, tua zawkciang Othniel thi hi." 
Judges3:12 Israel te sia Topa tungah mawna vawt leleau hi. Hisia hu in Topa in Moab kumpipa Eglon sia Israel te sangin hatsak zaw hi. 
Judges3:13 Eglon sia Ammon te le Amalek te kikop hi; amate in Israel zo in, palm khuapi Jericho la hi." 
Judges3:14 Israel te sia kum sawm le kum liat sung Eglon khutnuai ah om uh hi. 
Judges3:15 Tuasia ciang Israel te in Topa ko uh a, amate a suatak tu in mihing khat paisak hi. Hisia Ehud hi a, a veilawng pasal khat hi, ama in Benjamin nam Gera ii tapa hi. Israel mite in Ehud sia Moab kumpipa Eglon kungah letsong pia tu in paisak hi." 
Judges3:16 Ehud in a lang nii hiam centimetre 50 dektak a sau namsau khat vawt hi. Ama in a ziatsang pangh a puan nuai ah tua namsau khit hi. 
Judges3:17 Tua zawkciang ama in Eglon kungah a letsong paipui hi, Eglon sia a thau mama pasal khat hi." 
Judges3:18 Ehud in letsongte a piak zawkciang, tua letsong a pua mite inn ah cia kik sak hi." 
Judges3:19 Ahihang Ehud ahile Gilgal khua hui suangngelte omna pan heak kik a, Eglon kungah pai kikin, “Kumpipa awng, nang atu thuku khat nei khi hi,” ci hi. Tua ahikom kumpipa in a naseamte mun ah, “Ko nguak hong omsak tavun!” ci hi. Tuasia ciang amate a vekpi pusuak hi." 
Judges3:20 Tua zawkciang, kumpipa sia innkhum tung a votna, ama inndoi sungah ama nguak a to laitak Ehud pai in, “Pathian kung pan nang atu thupuak khat kong nei hi,” ci hi. Kumpipa dingto hi." 
Judges3:21 Ehud in a khut veisang taw a ziatsang pangh pan namsau la a, kumpipa ngil hol hi." 
Judges3:22 Namsau bup a kuung taw cipin tum hi, tuaciang a thau in a namsau tuam hi. Ehud in kumpipa ngil panin a namsau dok kik ngawlin a kalka kawm pan a nungsangah let hi." 
Judges3:23 Tua zawkciang Ehud pusuak hi, a nungah kongkhate khakin taw kilh a," 
Judges3:24 tuabangin nusia hi. Naseamte hong pai uh ciang kongkhate taw kikilh mu uh hi, ahihang amate in kumpipa sia a sungah om nginge a, awng po haw hi tu in um uh hi." 
Judges3:25 Amate in ngak tuak tanvei a ngak zawk uh ciang kumpipa in kongkhate hong peang ngawl ahikom tawtang la in hong uh hi. Tua munah a topa sia a thisa in suat tungah om hi. 
Judges3:26 A naseamte ii ngangaa lanin Ehud sia tai man hi. Suangngelte omna kaantan in pai a, Seirah ah suakta hi." 
Judges3:27 Ephraim mualtung ngamsung a thet ciangin Israel mite ngalsim tu in a samna lemle tum hi; tuaciang ama in amate lampui in mualtung pan kuansuk hi. 
Judges3:28 Ama in, “Hong zui tavun! Moab na ngalte Topa in hong zosak zo hi,” ci hi. Tua ahikom amate in Ehud zuisuk a, Moab te ii Jordan ngun a kan natu mun sia la uh hi; mihing khat zongh kaantansak ngawl uh hi." 
Judges3:29 Tua ni in amate in Moab te ii ngalkap phabel 10,000 bang that uh hi; khat zongh a suakta om ngawl hi." 
Judges3:30 Tua ni in Israel te in Moab zo a, ngam sungah kum 80 kilemna om hi." 
Judges3:31 Lampui a zom sia Shamgar hi a, Anath ii tapa hi. Ama zongh in khuital hawlna ciangzum taw Philistine te 600 that in Israel te suatak hi." 
Judges4:1 Ehud thi zawkciang Israel mite Topa tungah mawna vawt leleau uh hi. 
Judges4:2 Tua ahikom Topa in amate sia Hazor khuapi a uk Canaan kumpipa Jabin in zosak hi. A ngalkaphonpi ukpa sia Gentile te ii Harosheth ah a teang Sisera ahi hi. 
Judges4:3 Jabin in thik siphu ngalleang 900 nei a, ama in Israel te sia ngitlona le ngoltolna taw kum kul uk hi. Tuasia ciang Israel mite in Topa tungah hu ngen in au uh hi." 
Judges4:4 Tu in, Lappidoth ii zi Deborah sia kamsaang khat hi a, tua hun laitakin ama in Israel te ii thukhen seam hi." 
Judges4:5 Ama sia Ephraim mualtung ngamsung Ramah le Bethel kilaklaw palm thingkung khat nuai ah to bul hi, tuaciang ama kungah Israel mite in ama ii khensatnate la tu in pai bul uh hi." 
Judges4:6 Ni khat ni ciang ama in Naphtali ngam Kadesh khuapi pan Abinoam ii tapa Barak sam sakin ama tungah, “ Topa, Israel te ii Pathian in nang sia hi thu hong pia hi, ‘Naphtali le Zebulun namte panin pasal tulsawm la in a, Tabor Mual zot pui in." 
Judges4:7 Keima in Jabin ii ngalkaphonpi ukpa Sisera sia Kishon ngun ah nang taw kido tu in kong paipui tu hi. Ama in a siphu ngalleangte le ngalkapte nei hi, ahihang zawna nang kong pia tu hi,’ ci in son hi.”" 
Judges4:8 Tuasia ciang Barak in, “Nangma in kei nong paipui le ka pai tu a, nong paipui buale ka pai buatu hi,” ci zo kik hi." 
Judges4:9 Ama in, “Pha hi, nang hong paipui tu khi hi, ahihang nangma in zawna tungah bangma min na nga buatu hi, banghang ziam cile Topa in Sisera sia nupi khat aap tu hi,” ci in zo hi. Tuabangin Deborah sia Barak taw Kedesh ah pai hi." 
Judges4:10 Barak in Zebulun le Naphtali namte Kedesh ah sam a, pasal 10,000 samin ama zuisak hi. Deborah sia ama taw paikhawm hi." 
Judges4:11 Tua hun sungin Ken mi Heber in Kedesh khua hui Zanannim a om oak thingkung nai ah a puanbuk sa hi. Moses sunghno Hobab ii suan le paalte a dang Ken mite kung pan ama kikhiin zo hi. 
Judges4:12 Barak sia Tabor Mual ah paito zo hi ci in a zaak ciang 
Judges4:13 Sisera in a thik siphu ngalleang 900 teng le a mite theampo sam a, Gentile-te-ii-Harosheth pan Kishon ngun ah paisak hi." 
Judges4:14 Tuasia ciang Deborah in Barak munah, “Pai in! Topa in nang hong lampui hi! Tu ni in ama in Sisera tungah zawna nang hong pia zo hi,” ci hi. Tua ahikom Barak sia ama mi 10,000 teng taw Tabor Mual panin paisuk uh hi." 
Judges4:15 Barak in a ngalkaphonpi taw a sim tak ciang Topa in Sisera sia a siphu ngalleangte le a mite theampo taw kinuaisak a, a nokkhak bialbual tu in vawt hi. Sisera sia a siphu ngalleang tung panin tuaksuk a, a peangin tai hi." 
Judges4:16 Barak in tua siphu ngalleang le ngalkaphonpi sia Gentile-te-ii-Harosheth dong del a, tuaciang Sisera ngalkaphonpi bup thatlum hi. Mihing khat zongh a kikhe bua hi." 
Judges4:17 Ken mi Heber ii zi, Jael ii puanbuk dong Sisera tai hi, banghang ziam cile Hazor kumpipa Jabin sia Heber bangkua taw kilem hi." 
Judges4:18 Jael pusuak in Sisera hong muak hi, “Hong pai ta'n, topa, ka tuipuan buk sungah hong tum ta'n. Lau heak in!” ci hi. Tuabangin ama tum hi, tuaciang innteaknu in puankhakna lia ah phual hi." 
Judges4:19 Ama munah, “Nong hesuakna tuidam dawn tu hong pia ta'n; ka dangko hi,” ci hi. Ama in noai koina savun ip khat hongin a dawn tu in pia hi, tuaciang seal kik hi." 
Judges4:20 Tua zawkciang ama mun ah, “Puanbuk kongbiang ah ding in a, khat po hong pai in hi sungah a om, om ziam ci in hong dongh le om bo na ci in,” ci hi." 
Judges4:21 Sisera sia toi mama ahikom mutthip paih hi. Tuasia ciang Jael in sek khat le puanbuk khetphin khat la in, ama kungah pai vadeen a, tuasia a thaideap pan khenin leisung dong pailetsak a, thatlum hi." 
Judges4:22 Barak in Sisera zongin hong pai ciang Jael in ama muak a, “Hi sungah hong pai ta'n! Na zon sia pa hong lak tu khi hi,” ci hi. Tuabangin ama a sungtan pui le Sisera sia lei ah a thisa in om a, puanbuk khetphin khat taw a lutang na kikhenlet hi." 
Judges4:23 Tua ni in, Pathian in Israel te in Canaan kumpipa Jabin zosak hi." 
Judges4:24 Canaan kumpipa a suksiat diipdeap dong amate in a nasia vaial, a nasia vaial in phul a, sim uh hi." 
Judges5:1 Tua ni in Deborah le Abinoam ii tapa Barak in la hisia sa uh hi: 
Judges5:2 Topa pok vun! Israel te sia ngal do tu in a thin khensat zo uh hi; mipite sia lungdam takin hong kipia uh hi. 
Judges5:3 Ngai vun, no kumpipate awng! No ngamukte awng, hong nadon tavun! La ka sa tu a, tum thei te ka tum tu hi Israel ii Pathian, Topa tungah." 
Judges5:4 Topa awng, Seir mualpite na nusiat ciang, Edom ngam panin nong pusua ciang, lei liingin van pan nguatui hong taak suk hi. Hi hi, meei sung panin tui hong bua hi." 
Judges5:5 Sinai ii Topa mai, Topa Israel ii Pathian mai ah mualpite liing hi." 
Judges5:6 Anath ii tapa Shamgar khan sung, Jael ii khan sung, kalaoh hon vanh puate sia ngam kaanin pai nawn ngawl hi, tuaciang khualhaw te in lamzinte tawn uh hi." 
Judges5:7 Israel khuate kinusia hi, Deborah awng; nang nong pai mateng amate sia a hawmpi in ding hi, Israel atu in nu bangin nong pai hi." 
Judges5:8 Tuaciang ngam sungah ngal hong om hi Israel te in pathian thakte hong teal uh ciang ahi hi. Israel ngam a om pasal tul sawmli sungah, lum ahibuale tei toai akua om ziam?" 
Judges5:9 Ka thin sia Israel a ukte taw omkhawm hi, lungdam takin a kipia mite taw om hi. Topa pok vun!" 
Judges5:10 Laa kaang tungah a to note awng, a kunghte tungah a tote awng, na pai natu mun theampo ah peang taw a paite awng, hi thu son tek vun." 
Judges5:11 Ngai vun! Tuikhuk kiim ah a ngamlum mihonte in Topa ii ngalzawnate Israel mite ii ngalzawnate a son uh hi! Tuaciang Topa ii mite in a khuapite uh pan, hong kuan suk hi." 
Judges5:12 Lampui in, Deborah awng, lampui in! Lampui in! La khat sa in! Lampui in! Abinoam ii tapa Barak awng, mai sangah na ngalmatte paipui in!" 
Judges5:13 Tuasia ciang a thumaan te sia a lampuite kungah hong pai a; Topa ii mite ama kungah ngal sim tu kithoai sa in hong pai uh hi. 
Judges5:14 Amate sia Ephraim panin a kuam sungah, Benjamin nam le a mite ii nungsang pan hong pai hi. A ukte Machir pan hong pai suk hi, a uliante Zebulun pan hong kuan suk hi." 
Judges5:15 Issachar ii lampuite Deborah taw hong pai uh hi; hi hi, Issachar hong pai a, Barak zongh hong pai hi, tuaciang amate in a kuam sungah ama a zui uh hi. Ahihang Reuben nam sia kikhen a; amate in hong pai tu uh sia a khensat thei bua uh hi." 
Judges5:16 Banghangin amate nungsang ah tuute taw taang khawm ziam? Tuucingte ii tuuhonte a sam ngai tu in maw? Hi hi, Reuben nam kikhen hi; amate in hong pai tu uh sia a khensat thei bua uh hi." 
Judges5:17 Gad nam sia Jordan ii nisuana sangah om hi, tuaciang Dan nam sia teambawte kungah om suak uh hi. Asher nam sia tuipi hui ah om hi; amate tuipi vaalbo teng ah om suak uh hi." 
Judges5:18 Ahihang Zebulun le Naphtali mite in, ngal kisimna phual ah a nuntakna aitaa uh hi." 
Judges5:19 Megiddo luihui Taanach khua ah, kumpite hong pai in kido hi; Canaan kumpite in ngalsim uh a; ahihang amate in ngunn bangma ciapui ngawl hi." 
Judges5:20 Aksite in, van pan ngaldo uh hi; van kaantan in a pai uh ciang, tuate in Sisera sim hi." 
Judges5:21 Kishon ah namthuam a — Kishon ngun pawm sia in amate taaikeak hi. Mai ka nawt tu, ka nawt tu, thahatna taw ka paitan tu hi!" 
Judges5:22 Tua zawkciang siphute hong kinuntaw uh a, a peangcinte taw lei tuan uh hi." 
Judges5:23 Topa ii vantunglalang in, “Meroz tomlaw in” ci hi, “Tomlaw vun, tua munah a teangte tomlaw vun. Amate sia Topa hu tu in hong pai bua a, ama atu ngalkapte bangin ngal sim tu hong pai ngawl hi,” ci hi." 
Judges5:24 Numei a hamphabel sia Jael hi, Ken mi Heber ii zi — puanbuk sung a teang numei teng po pan, a kaamphabel hi." 
Judges5:25 Sisera in tui ngen a, ahihang ama in khuinoai pia hi; ama in kuang hoi khat taw noaidiat puak hi." 
Judges5:26 Ama in a khut lang taw puanbuk khetphin toai in, a langkhat taw naseampa ii sekpui toai hi; Ama in Sisera lutang seakin a lu sutham hi; ama in a lutang vutlet hi." 
Judges5:27 A khupte top suk in, puksuk a, ama peang kungah tung ngawlin lum hi. Ama ii peang ah a khupte top sukin puk hi; lei ah pukin thi hi." 
Judges5:28 Sisera ii nu in khelki pan khua en a; puankhak sia nung panin salh hi. “Banghangin a siphu ngalleang hong cia kik tu haisaang mama ziam?” Banghangin a siphute a heak kik tu vai hai leih thong ziam?” ci in ama in dongh hi. 
Judges5:29 Ama ii numei ciimbel te in zo a, ama le ama zongh a kison kikik na ah," 
Judges5:30 “Amate in a mat tu le a hawm tu nate bek a mu dong zong hi, ngalkap khat sim atu ngaknu khat ahibuale nii, Sisera atu puan manham kumpinu ngawng aw tu a kingelh puan hi tu hi,” ci hi." 
Judges5:31 Topa awng, na ngalte theampo tuabang veu in thi tahen, ahihang na lawmte sia nisuak bangin taang tahen! Tuaciang ngam sungah kum 40 kilemna om hi." 
Judges6:1 Khatvei ma Israel mite in Topa tungah mawna vawt hi, tua ahikom Midian mite in amate kum sali uk hi." 
Judges6:2 Midian te sia Israel te sangin hat zaw ahikom Israel te suanghawng te le mualtung a dang ngammuanna munte ah buu uh hi. 
Judges6:3 Israel te in thaicii a poai uh ciang, Midian te, Amalek te le sennealngam minamte taw paikhawm in sim uh hi." 
Judges6:4 Amate sia ngam sungah ngiaphual saat in, Gaza kiim thangsang ngam dong ankungte susia hi. Amate in khuite, tuute, laate la in, Israel te nuntak natu bangma kheet ngawl uh hi." 
Judges6:5 Amate in a puanbukte le a ngannote taw hong pai uh ciang khaumaw za in tam uh hi. Amate le a kalaoh te tam leih a, sim zawk hi ngawl hi. Amate hong pai in," 
Judges6:6 ngamsung susia ngawp a, tuaciang Israel te in amate nalh zo ngawl uh hi." 
Judges6:7 Tuasia ciang Israel mite sia Midian te a nalh zawk natu in Topa tungah hu ngen in au uh hi," 
Judges6:8 tuaciang ama in kamsaang khat paisak a, Topa Israel te ii Pathian ii thupuak hisia kengsak hi: “Egypt ngam na saltanna uh panin kong pusua pui hi." 
Judges6:9 Egypt te le hi lai ngam sungah hong sim mite kung pan kong suatak hi. Maisang na manaw uh ciang amate sia ka notkeak hi, tuaciang amate ii ngam, no kong pia hi." 
Judges6:10 Keima in Topa na Pathian khi hi, tuaciang tu in amate ngam ah na teen uh laitakin Amor te ii pathiante na bia buatu uh hi, kong ci hi. Ahihang kei nong nadon bua uh hi.”" 
Judges6:11 Tua zawkciang Topa ii vantunglalang sia Ophrah khua ah hong pai a, Abiezer phung sungah a pasal khat ahi Joash ii neisa oak thingkung nuai ah hong to hi. A tapa Gideon sia Midian te mu ngawl natu in sapittui suukna munah zungtaang tawm hong cil ku hi." 
Judges6:12 Topa ii vantunglalang sia tua mun ama mai ah hong kilaak a, “ Topa sia nang taw omkhawm hi, ngalhang, a thahat pa awng!” ci hi." 
Judges6:13 Gideon in ama munah,” Kong dongh thei tu ahile, topa awng, Topa in hong ompui ahile hite theampo banghangin piang ziam? Ka pate ii hong son Topa sep ngei nalamdang te — amate Egypt ngam pan a pusua puina thu theampo bang suak ziam? Topa in ko, hong taisan zo a, Midian te khut sungah hong nusia zo hi,” ci hi." 
Judges6:14 Tuaciang Topa in ama thupia a, “Na thahatna theampo taw kuan in a, Israel te Midian te khut sung pan suatakin. Keima tatak ma in nang kong paisak hi,” ci hi." 
Judges6:15 Gideon in, “ Topa awng, bangbangin Israel suatak thei tu khi ziam? Ka bee ka phung sia Manasseh nam sung pan a zawngkhalbel hi a, keima zongh ka bangkua sung pan a thupi ngawlbel ka hi hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Judges6:16 Topa in, “Suatak thei tu ni hi, banghang ziam cile keima in hong hu tu khi hi. Midian te sia mihing khat vawt tu bang bekin ol takin na sucip tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Judges6:17 Gideon in, “Kei dik nong sa le nang sia Topa na hi takpina tawm hong lak ta'n." 
Judges6:18 Nong hesuakna in an taw biakpiakna kong paipui dong hong nusia heak in,” ci hi. Ama in, “Nong pai kik dong om tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
Judges6:19 Tua ahikom Gideon inn sungah tumin, kealmoi khat huan a, mangtaang vui kilogramme 10 taw tol saw ngawlin anluum vawt hi. Ama in a sa sia khum sungah koi in, a satui sia beal sungah a koi zawkciang Topa vantunglalang kung oak thingkung nuai ah paipui a, tua ante ama pia hi." 
Judges6:20 Vantunglalang in, “A sa le anluum teng hi suang sia tungah koi in a, a tungah satui buak in,” ci in sawl hi. Gideon in tuabangin vawt hi." 
Judges6:21 Tua zawkciang Topa vantunglalang in ama ii toai ciangkang ii dawn taw sa le anluumte kithuthasak hi, tuaciang suang sung panin meikuang pusuak a, sa le anluum kaanghtum hi. Tuasia ciang vantunglalang bo hi." 
Judges6:22 Tuasia ciang Gideon in Topa vantunglalang mu ahi hunlam phawk in, launa lianpi taw, “Vaanglianpipa Topa! Na vantunglalang taw maitang kisii in mu zo khi hi,” ci hi." 
Judges6:23 Ahihang Topa in, ama munah, “Na thinnuamsak in. Lau heak in. Thi ngawl tu ni hi,” ci hi." 
Judges6:24 Gideon in tua munah biaknatau khat sa in,” Topa sia thinnopna hi,” (“Jehovah Shalom”) ci hi. (Tuasia tu dong ma in Ophrah ah ding lai a, Abiezer ii bee le phung neisa ahi hi.)" 
Judges6:25 Tua zanin Topa in Gideon munah, “Na pa khuital le khuital dang khat la in a, na pa ii Baal biaknatau sia baltham in, tuaciang a kung a om Asherah numeipathian ii lim sia zongh phuktan in." 
Judges6:26 Topa na Pathian atu in biaknatau khat leivum tungah a pha takin sa in. Tuaciang khuital a niina sia la in, biakpiak na in a bup in hal in, Asherah thingngel na phuktan sia thing in thut in,” ci hi." 
Judges6:27 Tua ahikom Gideon in a naseamte sawm taw Topa sawl teng seam hi. Ama in a innkuanpuite le khua mite kiita lei ahikom sunin seam ngam ngawlin zanin seam hi. 
Judges6:28 Tua khua mite a zing ciang zingtuungin hong thaw uh ciang, Baal biaknatau le Asherah lim a kiphuktan teng le, tuaciang khuital a niina sia a saksa biaknatau tungah biakpiakna in a kihal mu uh hi." 
Judges6:29 Amate khat le khat kidongh a, “Akua in hisia vawt ziam?” ci hi. Amate in a kat uh ciangin Joash tapa Gideon vawt ahi sia he uh hi." 
Judges6:30 Tuasia ciang amate in Joash mun ah, “Na tapa hi sungah a kithalup thei natu in hong paisak ta'n! Ama in Baal biaknatau sia baltham a, a kungah a om Asherah lim sia phuktan hi,” ci uh hi." 
Judges6:31 Ahihang Joash in ama a nalhte theampo tungah, “Baal panpui in ding tek nu ziam? Ama hung nu ziam? Ama a panpui khat pawpo sia zingsang khuavak ma in thalup thuak tu hi. Baal sia pathian ahile ama le ama kihung tahen. A kibaltham biaknatau sia ama aa hi,” ci hi." 
Judges6:32 Tua hun pan kipan Gideon sia Jerubbaal kina hi, banghang ziam cile Joash in, “Baal sia ama le ama kihung tahen; biaknatau a kibaltham sia ama aa hi,” a ci hu hi." 
Judges6:33 Tuasia ciang Midian mite theampo, Amalek te, le sennealngam sung teang minamte hong kikhawmtua a, Jordan ngun kaantan in, Jezreel Kuam ah ngiaphual saat uh hi." 
Judges6:34 Topa ii thaa in Gideon uk a, tuaciang ama in Abiezer bee le phungte sung pan pasalte ama zui tu a samna lemle tum hi." 
Judges6:35 Ama in kamtaite Manasseh ngam khente ngeal ah paisak a, ama a zui tu in samsak hi. Ama in kamtaite sia Asher, Zebulun, le Naphtali namte kungah paisak a, amate zongh Gideon taw kipawl tu in hong pai uh hi." 
Judges6:36 Tua zawkciang Gideon in Pathian munah, “Israel te a suatak tu in kei nong zak tu in khensat zo khi hi, ci ni hi." 
Judges6:37 Pha hi, tuumul pawlkhat ka zungtaang cilna ah koi tu khi hi. Zingsang ciangin daaitui kia sia tuumul tung bek ah om in, lei ah a om buale, Israel suatak tu in hong zangh takpi tu na hina ka tel tu hi,” ci hi." 
Judges6:38 Tuabang tatak ma in hong piang hi. A zing ciang khuavak tuungin Gideon hong thaw ciang, ama in tuumul hong meak a, kuang khat dim tu za daaitui om hi." 
Judges6:39 Tuaciang Gideon in Pathian munah, “Kei tungah na thin uuksak heak in; khatvei lian bekma pau lai tong. Nong hesuak na in tuumul taw khatvei hong sinsak lai ta'n. Tusia hun ciang tuumul kosak in a, a lei kawtsak in,” ci hi." 
Judges6:40 Tua zanin Pathian in tuabang tatak ma in vawt hi. A zingsang ciang tuumul sia ko a, lei ahile daaitui kawt hi." 
Judges7:1 Ni khat ni in Gideon le a mite tho pal in Harod Cik paam ah ngiaphual saat uh hi. Midian te ii ngiaphual sia Moreh Mual nai amate ii saksang kuam sung ahi hi. 
Judges7:2 Topa in Gideon munah, “Midian te kong zawsak natu in na mihing nei teng sia kei atu tam lei hi. Tuate in amate ii zaw zawk khawng ma sa in kei min hong pusak ngawl tu uh hi." 
Judges7:3 Mihingte tungah, ‘A lau khat pawpo sia inn ah cia kik thei tu hi, tuaciang ko sia hi lai Gilead Mual ah ka na om tu uh hi,’ ci in taangko vun” ci hi. Tuabang ahiciang 22,000 cia kik a, ahihang 10,000 taanglai hi." 
Judges7:4 Tua zawkciang Topa in Gideon munah, “Na mite tam lei lai hi, tui omna ah paipui in a, tua munah nang atu amate kong khen tu hi. Mihing khat sia nangma munah nang taw pai tu hi ka ci le pai tu hi. Nangma munah pai ngawl tu hi ka ci le pai ngawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
Judges7:5 Gideon in tui omna ah paipui suk a, tuaciang Topa in ama munah ‘Ui bangin a leei uh taw tui a liak theampo sia khupdin a tui a ne suk teng sung panin khen tu ni hi,” ci hi." 
Judges7:6 A khutpheak uh taw tui suakin a leei uh taw a liakte zathum pha hi; a dang teng sia tui ne tu in khupdin a boksuk uh hi. 
Judges7:7 Topa in Gideon munah, “Midian te khut sung pan nang kong suatak tu a, a leei uh taw tui a liak mihing zathum teng taw zawna kong pia tu hi. A dangte theampo ciasak in” ci hi." 
Judges7:8 Tua ahikom nguai an le lemle theampo a keam mihing zathum simngawl po Israel mi teng Gideon in inn ah ciasak hi. 
Judges7:9 Tua zanin Topa in Gideon thupia a, “Tho in a ngiaphual sim in; tuasia zawna nang hong pia khi hi." 
Judges7:10 Ahihang na sim ngam buale, na naseampa Purah taw ngiaphual ah paisuk tavun." 
Judges7:11 Amate ci teng na za tu a, tuasia ciang sim natu na thin hong lian tu hi,” ci hi. Tua ahikom Gideon le a naseampa Purah sia ngalte ngiaphual mong dong hong pai uh hi." 
Judges7:12 Midian te, Amalek te le sennealngamsung a minamte sia tua kuam sungah khaumaw hon bangin kizel uh hi, tuaciang a kalaoh te zong tuipivaal a senvui za in tam hi." 
Judges7:13 Mihing khat in a lawmpa tungah a mang a son teng Gideon hong thet ciangin za hi. Ama in, “Ka mang in zungtaang taw a kivawt anluum khat ih ngiaphual ah hong liiksuk a, puanbuk khat kha hi. Puanbuk sia cimh in lei ah kipheangpha hi,” ci in a mang son hi." 
Judges7:14 A lawmpa in, “Tuasia Israel te Joash ii tapa Gideon ii namsau hi! Khiakna dang mama nei thei buan te! Pathian in Midian le a ngalkap bup tungah zawna sia ama pia zo hi!” ci in zo kik hi." 
Judges7:15 Gideon in tua pa ii mang le a khiakna a son teng a zaak ciang khupdin in Pathian bia hi. Tua zawkciang ama Israel te ngiaphual ah heak kikin, “Tho vun! Midian ngalkaphonpi tungah no sia Topa in zawna hong pia zo hi!” ci hi." 
Judges7:16 Ama in mihing zathum teng sia pawl thum in khen a, lemle khat le meisip a kikoi tungbeal khat tek pia hi." 
Judges7:17 Amate tungah, “Ngalte ngiaphual mong ka thet ciang, hong en nginge tavun a, keima hi babang hi vun." 
Judges7:18 Ka pawlte le keima in lemle kong tum uh ciang, no zongh ngiaphual kiimkot panin lemle tum in, ‘ Topa atu le Gideon atu’ ci in hong au tavun,” ci hi." 
Judges7:19 Zankim mahiat, a cingte kilaih zawk bek ciangin Gideon le a mi zakhat teng sia ngiaphual mong hong theng hi. Amate in lemle tumin, a beal toai te sutham uh a," 
Judges7:20 tuaciang pawl dang nii te zongh in tuabang ma in hong ngamta uh hi. Amate a vekpi in meisipte a veisang khut taw len in, a ziatsang ah lemle toai in, “ Topa atu le Gideon atu namsau khat!” ci in a au uh hi." 
Judges7:21 mi simin ngiaphual kiim ah ama din natu san tek ah hong ding tek in, ngalte ii ngalkaphonpi sia au in a taikeak uh hi." 
Judges7:22 Gideon mite ii a lemle tum sungin, Topa in ngalte sia amate le amate khat le khat namsau taw kisimsak uh hi. Amate sia Zarethan sang ah Beth Shittah dong, Tabbath hui Abel Meholah khua dong tai uh hi." 
Judges7:23 Tua zawkciang, Naphtali nam, Asher nam le Manasseh nam khente ngeal pan mite kisam khia in Midian te del uh hi." 
Judges7:24 Gideon in Ephraim mualtung ngam a omte theampo kungah kamtai paisak a, “Midian te sim tu in hong pai suk tavun. Midian te kaantan thei ngawl tu in Jordan ngun le luite Bethbarah dong cing vun,” cisak hi Ephraim mite kikhawm tua in, tuaciang amate in Jordan ngun le luite Bethbarah dong simin topha uh hi." 
Judges7:25 Amate in Midian te ukpite nii, Oreb le Zeeb pummat uh a; Oreb sia Oreb Suangpi ah thatin, Zeeb sia Zeeb ii Sapittui suukna munah that uh hi. Amate in Midian te del paisuak a, Oreb le Zeeb ii lutangte sia Jordan nisuana a om Gideon ii kungah hong paipui uh hi." 
Judges8:1 Ephraim mite in Gideon munah, “Midian te na sim tu lai in banghang hong sam ngawl ni ziam? Banghangin ko hi bangin hong vawt nu ziam?” ci in nasia takin phun uh hi." 
Judges8:2 Ahizong ama in, “Kei ii tawm ka sep teng sia no ii septe taw teengat taak ngawl hi. No Ephraim te ii tawm na sep uh teng sia ko minam bup ii sep sang zong man nei zaw hi." 
Judges8:3 A dang son ta bualeang, Pathian thahatna taw Midian ukpite Oreb le Zeeb that nu hi. Tua taw a kiteengat thei tu kei sep bang om thong na ziam?” ci hi. Hi bangin a ci zawkciang amate sia tuaza pi in thin uuk nawn ngawl hi." 
Judges8:4 Hisia hun ciang Gideon le a mihing zathum teng in Jordan ngun ah hong pai in kaantan uh hi. Amate sia toi mama hi, ahihang Midian te ma del tan lai hi." 
Judges8:5 Amate Sukkoth hong thet uh ciangin a khua mite munah, “Nong hesuakna in ka mite anluum hong piaksak tavun. Amate sia toi mama zo a, tuaciang Midian kumpipate ahi Zebah le Zalmunna te del suak lai tu khu hi,” ci hi." 
Judges8:6 Ahihang Sukkoth lampuite in, “Banghang peuma na ngalkapte an hong piaksak tu khu ziam? Zebah le Zalmunna zongh na mat pepeu ngawl lai uh po,” ci uh hi." 
Judges8:7 Tua ahikom Gideon in, “Pha hi! Topa in Zebah le Zalmunna ka khut sungah hong aap ciangin, sennealngam pan ling le ngeaukal te taw hong saat tu khu hi!” ci hi." 
Judges8:8 Gideon pai suak a Penuel ah, tua mite munah an a nget ciang, Sukkoth te ci bangma in Penuel te zongh in a na ci uh hi." 
Judges8:9 “Cidam ludam in hong heak kik tu khi hi, tuasia ciang na tausaang uh baltham tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
Judges8:10 Zebah le Zalmunna sia a ngalkaphonpi taw Karkor ah om hi. Sennealngam minamte ii ngalkap bup sung pan 15,000 khawng bek taanglai hi. Ngalkap 120,000 kithatlum hi." 
Judges8:11 Gideon in sennealngam hui Nobah le Jogbehah ii nisuana sang lampi zui in, ngalkaphonpi sia heakkhol ngawlin sim hi." 
Judges8:12 Midian kumpite nii, Zebah le Zalmunna te taikeak ahihang ama in del in pummat hi, a ngalkaphonpi bup patau keaksak hi." 
Judges8:13 Gideon sia ngalphual panin hong heak kik ciang Heres Mualciangh tawn a," 
Judges8:14 ama in Sukkoth pan khangmoi tangval khat manin thu dongh hi. Tangvalpa in Gideon atu in Sukkoth khua lampui 77 teng ii min atsak hi. 
Judges8:15 Tua zawkciang Gideon sia Sukkoth khua mite kungah hong pai a, “Nong hu nop ngawl uh sia na ciamtee lai uh ziam? Zebah le Zalmunna ka mat zawk ngawl lai hu in, a toi mama ka ngalkapte an kong piaksak buatu ci nu hi. Pha hi, hi sungah amate om hi!” ci hi." 
Judges8:16 Ama in tuasia zawkciang sennealngam pan ling le ngeaukal la in tuate taw Sukkoth khua lampuite vel in daan pia hi. 
Judges8:17 Ama in Penuel khua a tausaang sia pheltham in tua khua mite thatlum hi. 
Judges8:18 Zebah le Zalmunna munah Gideon in, “Tabor a na thalup uhte bangbangziam?” ci in dongh hi. Amate in, “Amate nangma taw kibang hi — khat simin kumpipa tapate taw kibang hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Judges8:19 Gideon in, “Ama sia ka suapuite hi, ka nu ii tapate hi. Amate that buale uhte no zongh hong thatlum ngawl tu in ka kiciam hi,” ci hi." 
Judges8:20 Tuaciang a tapa lianbel Jether munah, “That in” ci in sawl hi. Ahihang patang sia in a namsau a dok bua hi. Ama sia patangno hi lai ahikom a khensat thei zok bua hi." 
Judges8:21 Tuaciang Zebah le Zalmunna in Gideon munah, “Hong pai ta'n a, nangma hong that ta'n. Pasal nasep a seam tu sia pasal ma kul hi,” ci uh hi. Tua ahikom Gideon in thatlum a, a kalaoh ngawng ah kizepnate laaksak hi." 
Judges8:22 Tuasia zawkciang Israel mite in Gideon munah, “Ko hong uk ta'n, nang le na suan na paalte Midian te khut sung pan hong hun khia zo ni hi,” ci uh hi." 
Judges8:23 Gideon in, “Kei ka hi zong ka tapa ahizong no ii uk pa hong suak ngawl tu khu hi, Topa sia no hong uk pa hi tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Judges8:24 Ahizong ama in a kampau zomto a, “No tung pan na khat hong ngensak tavun. mi simin na bilbaa laak uhte kei hong pia tavun. (Midian te in sennealngam midangte bangma in bilbaa a baa uh hi.)" 
Judges8:25 A mite in, “Lungdam takin tuate hong pia tu khu hi,” ci in zo hi. Amate in puan khat pha in, mi simin bilbaa a laak tek koi uh hi." 
Judges8:26 Gideon ii saan bilbaate a kingawmin kilogramme 20 pha a, tuate sungah kizepna dang, le Midian kumpipa puan silh sandup le, kalaoh ngawng aw te kihel ngawl lai hi." 
Judges8:27 Gideon in khamh milim khat vawt a, a pianna khua Ophrah ah koi hi. Israel te theampo in Pathian nusia in tua munah milim bia tu in pai uh hi. Tuasia in Gideon le a bangkua atu in thaang khat hong suak hi." 
Judges8:28 Tuabangin Midian te sia Israel te in zo a, amate sia ngual a lauthawn zo tu ahi nawn bua uh hi. Gideon thi dong ngam sungah kum 40 kilemna om hi." 
Judges8:29 Gideon sia a inn ah heak kik in tua munah teang hi. 
Judges8:30 Ama in tapa 70nei hi, banghang ziam cile zi tam ma nei hi." 
Judges8:31 Ama in Shechem ah zino khat nei a, tua taw a tapa sia a min Abimelech phuak hi." 
Judges8:32 Joash ii tapa Gideon sia a huai a teakin hong thi a, Abiezer bee le phung ii khua Ophrah khua a pa thaan ah kiphum hi." 
Judges8:33 Gideon thi zawkciang Israel mite sia Pathian tungah thumaan ngawl leleau a, Baal te bia uh hi. Thuciamna-ii-Baal sia amate ii pathian in hong nei hi," 
Judges8:34 tuaciang amate in Topa a Pathian ii a kiim a paam a ngalte khut sung pan a hunpa na a seam nawn bua hi. 
Judges8:35 Israel atu in phatna a vawtna teng huvau in Gideon bangkua tungah amate in lungdamna a nei meal bua uh hi. 
Judges9:1 Gideon tapa Abimelech sia a nu ii nungsang a mealheak theampo te teenna Shechem khua ah pai a, ama in Shechem mite munah," 
Judges9:2 “Koi sia na uuk zaw uh ziam? Gideon tapa sawmsali teng ii hong uk tu uuk zaw nu ziam, ahibuale pasal khat bek ii hong uk tu uuk zaw nu ziam? Na teptee tu uh sia Abimelech sia noma chi le sa hi,” ci in donghsak hi." 
Judges9:3 A nu ii nungsangte in Shechem a mite hi thu huvau ama atu a sonpui ciang, Shechem mite in Abimelech nungzui tu khensat zaw uh hi, banghang ziam cile ama sia a mealheak ahi hi." 
Judges9:4 Amate in Abimelech sia Thuciamna-ii-Baal biakinn panin ngunntang sawmsali pia uh hi, tuaciang tua sum taw ama in mi ngina ngawl honkhat ama taw koppui tu in cial hi." 
Judges9:5 Ama in a pa inn Ophrah ah pai in, tua mun suangpheak khat tungah Gideon tapate, a suapui 70 teng thatlum hi. Ahihang Gideon tapa nobel Jotham sia, buu ahikom a that bua hi." 
Judges9:6 Tua zawkciang Shechem le Bethmillo a om pasal theampo kikhawm in, Shechem a thiangtho oak thingkung sia ah pai a, tua nai ah Abimelech sia kumpi suaksak hi." 
Judges9:7 Jotham in hi thu a zaak ciang Gerizim Mual tungah pai in, amate oksan hi. “Shechem mite awng, ka aw hong ngai tavun, tuaciang Pathian in no aw hong ngai tu hi." 
Judges9:8 Khatvei lai in thingkung theampo kikhawm in, amate kumpi tu teal sawm uh hi. Amate in olive kung tungah, ‘Kote ii kumpipa hong hi ta'n,’ ci uh hi." 
Judges9:9 Olive kung in, ‘No kong uk thei natu in pathiante le mihingte zatak a pia sathau ka piansak sia ka tawp kul tu hi,’ ci in zo hi." 
Judges9:10 Tuasia ciang thingkungte in theikung munah, ‘Hong pai ta'n a, kote ii kumpi hong suak ta'n’ ci uh hi." 
Judges9:11 Ahihang theikung in, ‘No kong uk natu in ka nga a thumte nga nawn ngawlin ka tawp kul tu hi,’ ci hi." 
Judges9:12 Tua ahiciang thingkungte in sapitkung tungah, ‘Nang hong pai ta'n a kote ii kumpi hong suak ta'n,’ ci uh hi." 
Judges9:13 Ahihang sapitkung in, ‘No kong uk natu in pathiante le mihingte a lungdamsak sapittui ka piansak teng ka tawp kul tu hi,’ ci hi." 
Judges9:14 Tua ahikom thingkungte theampo in lingkung munah pai a, ‘Kote ii kumpi tu in hong pai ta'n,’ ci uh hi." 
Judges9:15 Lingkung in, ‘Na kumpi tu in nong dei takpi uh le hong pai tavun a, ka lim ah hong bealh tavun. Tuabangin na hi bua uh le ka baakte panin meikuang hong pusuak tu a, Lebanon a cedar thingkung te dongin kaanghtum tu hi,’ ci in zo hi." 
Judges9:16 Jotham in “Tua ahile Abimelech kumpipa na suasak uh ciang thin thiangtho le thin takpi taw ma ahi na ziam? Ama sepsa te taw kilawm in Gideon sia zatakna taw na phawk uh ziam, a innkuanpuite tungah pha takin na vawt uh ziam?" 
Judges9:17 Ka pa ii no atu ngal hong dosak sia phawk vun. Midian te khut sung pan na nuntakna uh hong hutkhiat natu in ama in a luang kham hi. 
Judges9:18 Ahihang tuni in ka pa ii innkuante sia na langpan uh hi. Ama tapate — sawmsali sia suang tungah ni khat thu in na thatlum uh hi, tuaciang a innteang nu taw a tapa Abimelech sia na mealheak uh ahikom Shechem kumpipa in na koi uh hi." 
Judges9:19 Tua ahiciang tu in, Gideon le a innkuanpuite tungah na vawt uh teng sia thin thiangtho le thin takpi taw ahile Abimelech taw lungdam khawm vun a, Abimelech zongh no taw lungdam khawm tahen." 
Judges9:20 Ahihang tuabang ahi bua ahile, Abimelech tung pan meikuang hong lengkeak tahen a Shechem le Bethmillo mite hong haltum tahen. Shechem le Bethmillo te tung pan meikuang hong lengkeak tahen a, Abimelech haltum tahen,” ci hi." 
Judges9:21 Jotham in a suapuipa Abimelech kiita ahikom Beer ah a teang tu in tai hi. 
Judges9:22 Abimelech in Israel kum thum sung uk hi. 
Judges9:23 Tuaciang Pathian in Abimelech sia Shechem mite taw a kilem ngawl natu in vawt a, amate in ama langpanin tualngal tho hi." 
Judges9:24 Hi bangin hong pianna sia Gideon tate 70 a kithalupna thu taw kisai Abimelech le ama a hanthawn Shechem mite thuak natu a piang thu ahi hi. 
Judges9:25 Shechem mite in mualdawnte ah Abimelech a suam tu in pasalte in pangsak a, amate kaantanin a pai peuma suttol uh hi. Abimelech tungah hi thu kison hi." 
Judges9:26 Tua zawkciang Ebed ii tapa Gaal sia a suapuite taw Shechem ah hong pai uh a, Shechem mite in ama muang uh hi." 
Judges9:27 Amate sia a sapithuante sungah pai siat in sapitnga lo a, sapittui a vawt zawk uh ciang poai khaam uh hi. A pathian biakinn sungah amate tumin tua munah ne in dawn in om a, Abimelech simmawkna kam pau uh hi." 
Judges9:28 Tuaciang Gaal in, “Ei Shechem ah bangbang mi hi thong hi ziam? Banghangin Abimelech na sepsak tu hi ziam? Ama akua hi peang na ziam? Gideon tapa hi! Tuaciang Zebul in ama thupiakte seam hi, ahihang eite in ama na banghangin sepsak hi ziam? Noma bee le phung a piangsak na taanghpupi Hamor tungah thumaan vun!" 
Judges9:29 Hi mite ii lampui hi leng uuk meak ing! Tua hile Abimelech ka heam tu hi. Ama munah na ngalkapte belap thua in kisim tu in hong kuan ta'n, ka ci tu hi,” ci hi." 
Judges9:30 Khuapi uk pa Zebul in Gaal ii pauna a zaak ciang a thin uuk hi. 
Judges9:31 Ama in Arumah a om Abimelech kungah kamtai te paisak a, hi bangin cisak hi, “Ebed ii tapa Gaal le a suapuite Shechem ah hong pai a, amate in nang sia khuapi sungah tumsak ngawl tu hi, ci hi." 
Judges9:32 Tua ahikom tu in nang le na mite sia zanin ngelin lo sungah na buu tu uh hi. 
Judges9:33 Zing ciang zingsang ni sua ciang tho in, khuapi sia heakkhol ngawlin sim vun. Tuaciang Gaal le a mite hong sim tu in hong pusua po ciang, na tha neiza in do vun!”" 
Judges9:34 Tua ahikom Abimelech le a mite theampo sia pawl li kisua in, zanin hong ngel uh a, Shechem khua pua ah buu uh hi." 
Judges9:35 Gaal hong pusuak a, khuapi kongpi ah a ding a mu uh ciang, Abimelech le a mite a bukna uh pan hong dingto uh hi." 
Judges9:36 Gaal in amate mu a, Zebul mun ah, “En in! Mualdawn panin mihing hong paisuk om hi!” ci hi. Zebul in, “Tuate mihing hi bo, mualtung ah a om limhte hi lel hi” ci in zo hi." 
Judges9:37 Gaal in, “En in! Mualdawn panin mihing hong pai hi, tuaciang pawlkhat sia aisaan theite ii oak thingkung sia pan lampi tawnin hong pai hi!” ci kik hi." 
Judges9:38 Tuasia ciang Zebul in ama tungah, “Tu in na kam khakngal teng koisung then ni ziam? Hi Abimelech sia banghangin a na sepsak tu hi ziam ci in a dongh sia nangma hi ka na ngawl ni ziam? Hi mite sia simmawkna taw na ci ngawpte hi. Tu in pai in a, va sim ta'n!” ci hi." 
Judges9:39 Gaal in Shechem mite lampui a, Abimelech sim hi." 
Judges9:40 Gaal sia tai in, Abimelech in del hi. Khuapi kongpi ngawngawn ah mi tam ma liam hi." 
Judges9:41 Abimelech sia Arumah ah teang a, tuaciang Zebul in Gaal le a suapuite Shechem ah a teen thei nawn ngawl natu in not hi." 
Judges9:42 A khuavak ni ciangin Abimelech in Shechem mite, lo sung zot a sawm uh sia phawk hi," 
Judges9:43 tua ahikom ama in a mite pawl thum in khen a, lo sungah buusakin ngaksak uh hi. Ama in mihingte khuapi sung pan hong pusua uh a mu ciang amate that tu in a bukna pan hong pusuak hi." 
Judges9:44 Abimelech le a pawlte in khuapi kongpi cing tu in manlang in hong pai laitak, a pawl dangte nii in lo sungah tua mite thatlum siat uh hi." 
Judges9:45 Ngal kidona sia sunkhuateak ma ahi hi. Abimelech in khuapi la a, a khua mite thatlum in, khuapi nuaitham a, a leitang ci buak nelh hi." 
Judges9:46 Shechem khua a lampuite theampo in khuapi kulh sung panin hi thu a zaak uh ciang, amate ngammuan natu in Thuciamna-ii-Baal biakinn, ngalnanna mun sia hong tu uh hi." 
Judges9:47 Tua munah amate kikaikhawm hi ci in Abimelech tungah kison hi," 
Judges9:48 tua ahikom ama in Zalmon Mual ah a mite taw paito hi. Tua munah ama in hei khat la a, thingbaak khat siiktan a, a liang ah hong pu hi. Ama in a mite munah manlang takin ama hi babangin hi vun ci in sawl hi." 
Judges9:49 Tua ahikom mi simin thingbaak khat tek siiktan a; Abimelech nung zui in, kulhpi pangh ah a thingte seng uh hi. Amate in kulhpi sia a sungah om mihingte taw cipin hal a, mihing a om theampo — pasal le numei a kingawm tulkhat bang thi siat uh hi." 
Judges9:50 Tua zawkciang Abimelech sia Thebez ah pai a, tua khuapi kiim uum in la hi." 
Judges9:51 Tua munah tausaang muanhuai khat om a, khuapi sung a om pasal le numei theampo, lampuite zongh kihel in, tua mun zuanin tai uh hi. Amate teng a sungsang pan kikalh in, innkhum tungah kaato uh hi." 
Judges9:52 Abimelech sia tausaang sim tu in hong kuan ciang, tausaang sia a kongkha pan hal tu in hong paito hi." 
Judges9:53 Ahihang nupi khat in an ngoaina suang khat sia ama lu tungah lawnsuk a, a lu ngu tamh hi." 
Judges9:54 Tuasia ciangin a ngalhiamte a pua tangval sia samin, “Na namsau dok in a, hong hollum ta'n. Numei khat ii thalup hi hong kici tu sia ka dei bua hi,” ci hi. Tua ahikom tangvalpa in namsau taw hollet a, thi hi." 
Judges9:55 Abimelech a thi a mu uh ciang Israel te inn ah cia siat uh hi. 
Judges9:56 Hi bangin Abimelech ii a suapuite 70 a thalupna taw a pa tungah khialna lian a vawt sia Pathian in thuk kik hi. 
Judges9:57 Pathian in Shechem mite zongh a seksolna hu in thuaksak a, Gideon ii tapa Jotham in amate a tomlaw lai in, piang tu hi a ci bang keakin piang hi." 
Judges10:1 Abimelech thi zawkciang Dodo ii tupa, Puah ii tapa Tola sia Israel te suatakna pia tu in hong pai hi. Ama sia Issachar nam hi a, Ephraim mualtung ngam Shamir ah teang hi." 
Judges10:2 Ama sia Israel te ii lampui in kum 23 sung seam hi. Tua zawkciang ama thi a Shamir khua ah kiphum hi. 
Judges10:3 Tola pai zawkciang Gilead panin Jair hong pai hi. Ama in Israel sia kum 22 lampui hi. 
Judges10:4 Ama in tapa 30 nei a laa 30 tungah to uh hi. Amate in Gilead ngam ah khuapi 30 nei in, tuate sia Jair khuanote kici lai hi." 
Judges10:5 Jair thi in Kamon khua ah kiphum hi. 
Judges10:6 Khatvei ma Israel te in Baal te, Astarte te, Syria te, Sidon te, Moab te, Ammon te le Philistia te ii pathiante zongh a biakna uh taw Topa tungah maw uh hi. Amate in Topa nusia uh a, ama a biak uh tawp hi." 
Judges10:7 Tua ahikom Topa sia Israel te tungah thin uuk a, Philistine te le Ammon te in amate zothalsak hi." 
Judges10:8 Amate in Gilead ngam Jordan nisuana Amor ngam a teang Israel te sia nengniam in kum sawm le kum liat sung vawtsia uh hi. 
Judges10:9 Ammon te in Judah, Benjamin, le Ephraim namte sim tu in Jordan ngun ngawngawn hong kaantan uh hi. Israel sia ngim nga mama hi." 
Judges10:10 Tua zawkciang Israel te au in Topa tungah, “Nangma tungah hong maw zo khu hi, nang ka Pathian uh kong nusia a, Baalte ka bia uh hi,” ci uh hi." 
Judges10:11 Topa in hi bangin zo hi: “Egypt te, Amor te, Ammon te, Philistine te," 
Judges10:12 Sidon te, Amalek te le Maon te in hun bosa sungah hong nengniam a, tuaciang in keima ko in nong au uh hi. Tuate khut sung pan hong suatak ngawl ka na khi ziam?" 
Judges10:13 Ahihang nong nusia veve uh a, pathian dangte na bia uh hi, tua ahikom hong suatak kik ngawl tu khi hi." 
Judges10:14 Pai tavun a, na teal uh pathiante munah ko tavun. Amate in ngim na nga uh ciang hong suatak tahen.”" 
Judges10:15 Ahihang Israel mite in Topa tungah, “Ko maw zo khu hi. Na uuk po hong vawt ta'n. Ahizong, nong hesuakna in, tu ni in hong hun ta'n,” ci uh hi." 
Judges10:16 Tua ahikom amate in ngamdang pathiante vawkin, Topa bia uh hi; tuasia ciang ama sia Israel te ii ngim ngana tungtaang ah a thinnuam ngawl hi." 
Judges10:17 Tua zawkciang Ammon ngalkaphonpi sia Israel te sim tu in Gilead ah ngiaphual saat hi. Israel mite zongh hong kikaitua uh a, Gilead ngamsung Mizpah ah ngiaphual saat uh hi." 
Judges10:18 Tua munah mipite le Israel namte ii lampuite in amate khat le khat kidongh in, “Ammon te taw kidona sungah akua in hong lampui tu ziam? Hong lampui pawpo sia Gilead ah a om mihing theampo ii lampui hi tu hi,” ci uh hi." 
Judges11:1 Gilead pan ngalhang ngalkap Jephthah sia, pumpi kizuak numei khat ii tapa ahi hi. A pa Gilead in" 
Judges11:2 a zi taw tapa dang nei a, amate hong khan uh ciang Jephthah sia inn panin hawlkhia uh hi. Amate in ama mun ah, “Nang in ih pa ngamh bangma lua thei ngawl tu ni hi; nang sia nu dang khat ii ta ni hi,” ci uh hi." 
Judges11:3 Jephthah zongh a suapuite kung pan tai in Tob ngam ah teang hi. Tua munah mihing mannung ngawl pawlkhat ama in pawlvawt a, tuate taw kithawl uh hi." 
Judges11:4 Ammon te ii Israel te sim tu in a kuan sia tua zawk hun tawmvei zawkciang ahi hi. 
Judges11:5 Hi thu hong pian ciangin Gilead ngam lampuite in Tob ngam panin Jephthah cia pui kik tu in hong pai hi. 
Judges11:6 Amate in, “Ammon te ih do zawk natu in hong pai ta'n a, hong lampui ta'n,” ci uh hi." 
Judges11:7 Ahihang Jephthah in, “Nong etsat lawlawm hu in ka pa inn sung pan hong hawlkhia nu hi. Tu in na ngim nga uh ciang banghangin kei kungah hong pai nu ziam?” ci in zo hi." 
Judges11:8 Amate in Jephthah mun ah, “Nang kungah tu in kong pai uh sia banghang ziam cile, ko taw pawlin Ammon te nong sim pui natu le Gilead mi teng nong lampui tu dei khu hi” ci uh hi." 
Judges11:9 Jephthah in, “Ammon te sim tu in nong ciapui uh a, Topa in zawna hong pia le no hong ukpa suak tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
Judges11:10 Amate in, “Lungkim khu hi. Topa sia koma tetti hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Judges11:11 Tua ahikom Jephthah sia Gilead lampuite taw tonkhawm a, mipite in ama sia lampuipa le a ukpa in koi uh hi. Jephthah in Mizpah khua Topa mai ah a deina teng son hi." 
Judges11:12 Tuaciang Jephthah in Ammon kumpipa kungah kamtaite paisak a, “Ko nong kihau puina sia bang thu ziam? Banghangin ka ngam uh hong sim ni ziam?” cisak hi." 
Judges11:13 Jephthah ii kamtaite tungah Ammon kumpi pa in, “Egypt panin Israel te hong pusua lai in, amate in ka ngam sia Arnon ngun pan Jabbok ngun le Jordan ngun dong hong laaksak hi. Tu in tuasia kam tam ngawlin nong piak kik uh kul tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Judges11:14 Jephthah in Ammon kumpipa kungah kamtaite paisak kik a," 
Judges11:15 hi bangin zo kik hi: “Israel in Moab ahibuale Ammon te leitang laaksak ci thu sia maan ngawl hi. 
Judges11:16 A thupiang tatak sia hi bang hi: Israel te in Egypt a nusiat uh ciang, sennealngam kaantan in pai a, Aqaba Tuidok ah, tua mun pan Kadesh hong theng uh hi." 
Judges11:17 Tuasia ciang Edom kumpipa tungah kamtaite paisak a, a ngam kaantan thei natu ngen hi. Ahihang Edom kumpipa in amate a kaantansak bua hi. Amate in Moab kumpipa tungah zongh ngen uh hi, ahihang kuama in a ngam kaantan tu a oai bua uh hi. Tua ahikom Israel te sia Kadesh ah taam uh hi." 
Judges11:18 Tuaciang amate sia sennealngam kaantan in, Edom le Moab ngamte kiimkot a, Moab ii nisuana sang Arnon ngun langkhat a thet dong paitan uh hi. Amate in tua munah ngiaphual saat ahihang Arnon a kaantan bua hi, banghang ziam cile tuasia Moab ngamngi ahihang hi." 
Judges11:19 Tuasia ciang Israel te in Heshbon a om Amor kumpipa Sihon tungah kamtaite paisak a, a ngam kaantan in amate ngamsung a tot natu ngen uh hi." 
Judges11:20 Ahihang Sihon in Israel te tuabangin a paisak bua hi. Ama in a ngalkap buppi khawmtua in kuan a, Jahaz ah ngiaphual saat in, Israel te sim hi." 
Judges11:21 Ahihang Topa, Israel te ii Pathian in Sihon ngalkaphonpi sia Israel te in zosak hi. Tua ahikom Israel te in tua ngam a teang Amor te ii ngam nei theampo la uh hi." 
Judges11:22 Amate in Amor te ii ngam theampo, thangsang Arnon pan saksang ah Jabbok dong, tuaciang nisuana sang sennealngam pan nitumna Jordan dong la uh hi." 
Judges11:23 Tua hi a, Israel a mite atu Amor te a notkeak sia Topa Israel te ii Pathian ahi hi." 
Judges11:24 Tuasia la kik tu in hanciam tu ni ziam? Na pathian Chemosh ii hong piak teng keam thei ni hi. Ahihang ko ka hi uh le Topa ka Pathian hong piaksa teng keam tu khu hi. 
Judges11:25 Zippor ii tapa Moab kumpipa Balak sangin nangma phazaw kisa ni ziam? Ama in Israel sia thato ngeingawl hi, ahi ziam? Ama in ko hong sim tu in hong kuan ngei na ziam?" 
Judges11:26 Kum zathum tawntung Israel te in Heshbon le Aroer, tuaciang a kiim a paam khuate le Arnon ngun vaal a khuapi teng la hi. Hi hunte theampo sungah banghangin la kik ngawl ni ziam?" 
Judges11:27 Kei sia no tungah bangma tat khial hong nei ngawl khi hi. Kei tungah ngal nong phot uh sia noma khial zaw nu hi. Topa sia thukhenpa hi. Ama in tuni in Israel te le Ammon te kilaklaw ah thu khensat tu hi.” 
Judges11:28 Ahihang Jephthah ii kam thaak huvau Ammon kumpipa in awlmawk ngawl hi. 
Judges11:29 Tuasia ciang Topa ii thaa sia Jephthah tungah hong theng hi. Ama in Gilead le Manasseh kaantan in pai a, Gilead ngam Mizpah ah hong heak kikin, Ammon ah paitan hi." 
Judges11:30 Jephthah in Topa tungah kamciam pia a: “Ammon te nong zosak le," 
Judges11:31 zawna taw ka cia ciang, ka inn panin kei hong muak tu in hong pusuak phit mihing sia meihal biakpiakna in kong pia tu hi. Ama sia sangaw biakpiakna in nang kong pia tu hi,” ci hi." 
Judges11:32 Tuabangin Jephthah in Ammon te sim tu in ngun kaantan a, Topa in zawna pia hi." 
Judges11:33 Ama in amate sia Aroer pan Minnith kiim ngamte, a vekpi in khuapi kul teng Abel Keramim dong vaat pheang hi. Tua kithalupna nasia mama a, Ammon te sia Israel te in zo hi." 
Judges11:34 Jephthah sia Mizpah ah hong cia kik ciangin ama muak tu in a tanu sia daalkual khuangno tum kawmin laam a hong pusuak hi. Ama sia Jephthah ii khat bek a hin ta ahi hi. 
Judges11:35 Ama in a tanu a mu ciang heena taw a puansilh eautham a, “Aw, ka tanu! nang in ka thin hong tamhthamsak ni hi! Kei hong thinnasak tu sia banghang nang keak hi luilam ni ziam? Topa tungah a ciliap huai kamciam ka piaksa hi a, tuasia dawk kik thei nawn ngawl khi hi!” ci hi." 
Judges11:36 A tanu in, “ Topa tungah kamciam pia zo na hi le Ammon na ngalte tungah Topa in phulamna hong pia zo ahiciang kei tungah vawt tu na ci bangin vawt in,” ci hi." 
Judges11:37 Ahihang ama in a pa mun ah, “Hi na khat kei atu hong hisak lai ta'n. Ngaknu thiangtho in ka thi tu sia, ka lawmte taw mual tungah vak kawkoai a, khuangai in ka om thei natu, keima a tuamin tha nii hun hong pia ta'n” ci hi." 
Judges11:38 Ama in a tanu sia tha nii sung, a paisak hi. Ama le a ngualtamhte sia mual tungah kaato uh a, khuangai in om uh hi, banghang ziam cile ama sia pasal nei ngawl le ta nei ngawlin thi tu ahihang hi." 
Judges11:39 Tha nii zawkciang ama a pa kungah hong cia kik hi. A pa in Topa tungah a kamciam bangin vawt a, ama sia ngaknu thiangtho in thi hi. Hi sia in Israel ngam ah ngeina khat hong pianna hi a," 
Judges11:40 kum simin Israel ngaknute sia ni li sung veu Gilead khua mi Jephthah ii tanu atu a khuangaina lakna in pusuak uh hi. 
Judges12:1 Ephraim pasalte sia ngal kido natu kinging hi; amate in Jordan ngun kaantan in, Zaphon sangah zuan a, Jephthah mun ah, “Ammon te sim tu ngamngi kaantan in pai napi, banghangin ko hong paa ngawl ni ziam? Na inn taw hong halcip tu khu hi!” ci hi." 
Judges12:2 Ahihang Jephthah in amate munah, “Ka mite le kei sia Ammon te taw nasia takin kihauna nei khu hi. Hong sam khi hi, ahihang kei hong suatak ngawl nu hi." 
Judges12:3 Hong suatak ngawl tu ci in ka mu ciang ka nuntakna aitaa in amate do tu in ngamngi kaantan khu hi, tuaciang Topa in amate hong zosak hi. Tua ahikom tu in kei hong sim tu in banghangin hong pai nu ziam?” ci hi." 
Judges12:4 Tua zawkciang Jephthah in Gilead mite theampo khawmtua a, Ephraim mite simin zo uh hi. (Ephraim te in, ‘Ephraim le Manasseh a om no Gilead te sia Ephraim te a taisante nu hi’ ci uh hi.)" 
Judges12:5 Ephraim te a suatak ngawl natu in, Gilead te ii Jordan a kaantan thei natu mun teng la uh hi. Ephraim mite khat pawpo suakta nuamin kaantan tu a ngen le, Gilead te in, “Nang Ephraim te na hi ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Ama in, “Hi ngawl khi hi” a ci le," 
Judges12:6 tuasia ciang, “Shibboleth ci in” ci in sawl hi. Ahihang ama in “Sibboleth” ci hi, banghang ziam cile ama in tua kammal sia a maan in a lo thei bua hi. Tuasia ciang ama manin Jordan kaantanna teng mun khat ah thatlum uh hi. Tua hun sungin Ephraim mite 42,000 that uh hi." 
Judges12:7 Jephthah in Israel te kum luk sung lampui hi. Tua zawkciang ama thi a, Gilead ngam a khua sungah phum uh hi." 
Judges12:8 Jephthah zawkciang Bethlehem pan Ibzan in Israel te lampui hi. 
Judges12:9 Ama in tapa 30 le tanu 30 nei hi. Ama in a tanute sia phung dangte taw teangsak hi, a tapate atu phung dang panin mo 30 pui hi. Ibzan in Israel te kum sali lampui hi," 
Judges12:10 tua zawkciang ama thi a Bethlehem ah kiphum hi. 
Judges12:11 Ibzan zawkciang Zebulun pan Elon in Israel te kum sawm sung lampui hi. 
Judges12:12 Tua zawkciang ama thi a, Zebulun ngam Aijalon ah kiphum hi." 
Judges12:13 Elon zawkciang, Pirathon pan Hillel tapa Abdon in Israel te lampui hi." 
Judges12:14 Ama in tapa 40 le tupa 30 nei a, tuate in laa 70 tungah to uh hi. Abdon in kum liat sung Israel te lampui hi." 
Judges12:15 Tuaciang ama thi a, Amalek te mualtung ngam, Ephraim ngamsung Pirathon khua ah kiphum hi." 
Judges13:1 Israel te in Topa tungah maw kik a, tuaciang Topa in amate sia Philistine te in kum 40 sung uksak hi." 
Judges13:2 Tua hun laitakin Zorah khua ah Manoah a ci pasal khat om hi. Ama sia Dan nam sung pan ahi hi. A zi in ta nei thei ngawl hi. 
Judges13:3 Topa vantunglalang khat ama kungah kilangh a, “Nang sia ta nei thei ngawl ni hi, ahihang hai ngawlin na ngai tu a, tapa khat na nei tu hi." 
Judges13:4 Sapittui, beer ahibuale a kikhaam an khat pawpo na neak ngawl het natu kidawm in;" 
Judges13:5 na tapa a pian zawkciang, a sam meetsak ngeingawl het tu ni hi, banghang ziam cile a pian ni pan kipan ama sia Pathian atu a kituam koi nazirite khat in ki aap tu hi. Ama in Philistine te khut sung pan Israel te suataksak natu nasep kipan tu hi,” ci hi." 
Judges13:6 Tua zawkciang tua nu a pasal kungah pai in, “Pathian mi khat hong pai a, ama sia Pathian vantunglalang bangin kiitakhuai mama hi. Ama hong paina mun ka dongh bua a, a min hong son bua hi." 
Judges13:7 Ahizong ama in kei sia naupaai in tapa khat nei tu hong ci hi. Ama in sapittui le beer, ahibuale a kikhaam an peuma ka neak ngawl natu in thu hong pia hi, banghang ziam cile patang sia a nuntak lai teng Pathian tungah nazirite khat bangin ki aaptuam tu hi,” hong ci hi." 
Judges13:8 Tuaciang Manoah in Topa tungah thungen a, “ Topa awng nong hesuakna in, ko nong puak Pathian mipa ma hong paisak kik ta'n a, pano sia a sua ciang bangbang ngamta tu khu ziam ci in hong sonsak ta'n,” ci hi." 
Judges13:9 Pathian in Manoah nget bangin, vantunglalang sia tua nu lo sungah a to laitakin pai kiksak hi. A pasal Manoah sia ama taw a om bua hi," 
Judges13:10 Tua ahikom ama thakhatin tai a, a pasal mun ah, “En in! Khatvei ni a, hong pai pa ma kei kungah hong kilangh kik hi,” ci hi." 
Judges13:11 Manoah hong dingin a zi nung zui hi. Tua pa kungah pai in, “Ka zi kungah thuson sia nangma na hi ziam?” ci in dongh hi. “Hi khi hi” ci in zo hi." 
Judges13:12 Tuaciang Manoah in, “Na paunate hong taangtun tak ciang patang sia in bang teng a vawt kul tu ziam? Bangbang nuntak zia taw nungta tu ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Judges13:13 Vantunglalang in, “Na zi in ka sonsa theampo a vawt hamtang kul tu hi." 
Judges13:14 Ama in sapitkung pan a piang peuma ne ngawl het tu hi; sapittui, beer ahibuale a kikhaam an ne ngawl het tu hi. Ama tungah ka sonsa theampo cing takin a sep kul tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Judges13:15 Manoah in tua pa sia Pathian ii vantunglalang ahi hunlam he ngawl ahikom, ama mun ah, “Hesuakna taw na pai heak lai in. Nangma atu kealmoi khat huan phot tawng,” ci hi. Ahihang vantunglalang in, “Ka tawlnga zii zonghin, na an ne ngawl tu khi hi. Ahizong na vawt veve nuam le tuasia Topa atu meihal biakpiakna in nei in,” ci hi." 
Judges13:16  
Judges13:17 Manoah in, “Na min hong son ta'n, tua hile na pauna teng a tun tak ciang, kong patoai thei tu uh hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Judges13:18 Vantunglalang in zo a, “Banghangin ka min he nuam ni ziam? Ka min sia a lamdang min hi,” ci hi." 
Judges13:19 Tua ahikom Manoah in kealmoi khat la a, antang pawlkhat taw kopin nalamdang te a seam Topa atu biakna suangtau tungah biakpiakna in pia hi." 
Judges13:20 Biaknatau tung panin meikuang a paito laitakin, Manoah le a zi in Topa ii vantunglalang sia meikuang sung panin vantung a zotto mu hi. Manoah in tua pa sia Topa ii vantunglalang hi ci in phawk a, a zi taw amate nii sia lei ah a bok lamin kisepsuk uh hi. Amate in tua vantunglalang sia a mu kik nawn bua uh hi." 
Judges13:21  
Judges13:22 Manoah in a zi munah, “Eima ih thi kul tu hi, banghang ziam cile eima in Pathian ih mu zo hi,” ci hi." 
Judges13:23 Ahihang a zi in, “ Topa in ei hong thatlum nuam hi thong le ih biakpiakna te hong saang ngawl tu hi; ama in hite theampo hong lak ngawl tu a, tu in hi bang thute hong son ngawl tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Judges13:24 Tua nu in tapa khat hong hing a, a min sia Samson phuak hi. Tapano sia hong khang a, Topa in thupha pia hi." 
Judges13:25 Zorah le Eshtaol kilaklaw Dan ii Ngiaphual sungah a om laitakin, Topa vaangletna in ama thahatsak tu in kipan hi." 
Judges14:1 Ni khat ni in Samson sia Timnah khua a pai le tua munah Philistine ngaknu khat mu in hoaikhol hi. 
Judges14:2 Ama a inn ah cia kikin a pa le a nu tungah, “Timnah khua ah ka thin hong la Philistine ngaknu khat om hi. Hong puisak tavun; ama teenpui nuam khi hi.” ci hi." 
Judges14:3 Ahihang a pa le a nu in “Zi khat nga natu in tua Pathian he ngawl Philistine te kungah pai kul na ziam? Eima mi sung teng, ih bee ih phung sungah ngaknu khat mu zo ngawl ni ziam?” ci in dong hi. Ahihang Samson in a pa munah, “Kei atu nong puisak tu ka dei sia ama bekma hi. Ama diksa khi hi,” ci hi." 
Judges14:4 Samson ii hi bang a hina sia Pathian lamlakna ahi hunlam a pa le a nu in he ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile Topa in Philistine te a sim natu hunpha khat a zonna ahi hi. Hi hun sia Philistine te ii Israel a uk hun sung ahi hi." 
Judges14:5 Tua ahikom Samson sia a pa le a nu taw Timnah ah pai suk hi. Amate sapithuan sung kaantan in a pai laitak tawpi moi khat a hawk za hi. 
Judges14:6 Thakhat thu in Topa vaangletna in Samson hatsak a, tuaciang a khutnguak taw tawpi sia kealmoi khat bangin baltham hi. Ahihang a ngamtatna teng a pa le a nu a hil bua hi." 
Judges14:7 Tuaciang ama pai in tua ngaknu paupui a, diksa hi." 
Judges14:8 Ni tawmvei zawkciang ama teenpui tu in Samson pai kik hi. A cia lamin tawpi a thalup sia en tu in lampialin a pai le tua tawpi ii luanghawm sungah khuai honkhat le khuaitui mu a lamdang sa hi. 
Judges14:9 Ama in khuaitui sia a khut taw la in a lampai kawmin ne hi. Tuaciang a pa le a nu kungah pai in pawlkhat pia hi. Amate in ne ahihang Samson in tua khuaitui sia tawpi thisa pum sung pan a laak hunlam a son bua hi. 
Judges14:10 A pa sia ngaknu nu ii inn ah pai a, tuaciang Samson in anneakpoai khat tua munah vawt hi. Tuasia in tangvalte ngeina khat ahi hi." 
Judges14:11 Philistine te in ama a mu uh ciangin ama a ompui tu tangval 30 puak uh hi. 
Judges14:12 Samson in amate munah, “Thukheldokna khat hong dong tong. Mopoai ni sali a bo ma in, a khiakna na son thei uh le khat sim, puanneal hoi khat tek le puansilh laihna khat tek kong khaam ngam hi, nong son thei bua uh le puanneal hoi khat tek hong pia tu nu hi” a ci ciang, “Na thukheldokna sia hong son ta'n, ko za nuam ung,” ci uh hi." 
Judges14:13  
Judges14:14 Ama in, “A ne sia ii sung pan neak tu khat hong piang; A hat sia ii sung pan a thum khat hong piang,” ci hi. Ni thum zawkciang zong amate in khel dokna a tel zo bua lai uh hi." 
Judges14:15 A ni li ni ciangin amate in Samson zi munah, “Na pasal ii thukheldok ii a khiakna hong son natu in theambawl in. Tuabang na hi buale na pa inn mei taw ka hal tu uh a, nangma taw cipin kong hal tu uh hi. No nii in ko teng nong sutol nopna in hong sam na hi bua uh ziam?” ci hi." 
Judges14:16 Tua ahikom Samson zi zongh thitui taw a kungah pai in, “Kei hong it ngawl ni hi! Hong ensan hi bek ni hi! Ka ngualtamhte thukhel khat dongh a ciang, kei munah a khiakna hong son ngawl ni hi!” ci hi. Ama in, “En in! Ka pa le ka nu zongh son ngawl khi hi. Banghangin nang hong son tu khi ziam?” ci hi." 
Judges14:17 Mopoai sung ni sali tawntung a zi kap hi. Ahihang a ni sali ni ciang a nakheng cimh manin ama in thukheldokna ii khiakna son hi, Tuasia ciang a zi in Philistine te tungah son hi." 
Judges14:18 Tua ahiciang a ni sali ni in Samson ii lupna a zot ma in, khuapi sung mite in ama munah, “Khuaitui sangin a thum zaw bang om thei ziam? Tawpi sangin a hatzaw bang om thei ziam?” ci uh hi. Samson in, “Ka khuipui taw lo tho khawm ngawl hi le uhte tu in a khiakna, na he buatu uh hi.” ci in zo kik hi." 
Judges14:19 Thakhat thu in Topa vaangletna in Samson hatsak a, tuaciang ama Ashkelon ah paisuk hi, tua munah pasal 30 thatlum in, a puansilh uh suusak a, thukheldokna a zo thei teng tua puan hoite pia hi. Tuasia zawkciang thupiang teng hu in a thinso ahikom, ama inn ah cia kik a," 
Judges14:20 tuaciang a zi sia a kiteen lai in ama a dinpuipa kipia hi. 
Judges15:1 Hun tawmvei zawkciang Samson sia, zungtaang laak hun laitakin, kealmoi khat kai in a zi kungah haw hi. A sunghpa munah, “Ka zi omna inndoi sungah pai nuam khi hi,” ci hi. Ahihang ama in a tum tu a oai bua hi." 
Judges15:2 Samson munah, “Ensan takpi hi vak teh ci in kong um a, tua ahikom na lawmpa hong piaksak khi hi. Ahihang a nau nu sia ama sangin a mealpha zawsap hi. A taangin ama la thei ni hi,” ci hi." 
Judges15:3 Samson in, “Tu in, Philistine mite tungah ka vawt po kei hong kimawsiat thei ngawl tu hi!” ci hi." 
Judges15:4 Tua ahikom ama pai in, ngia zathum man hi. A meite nii veu nii veu in sawm khawm a, a sawmna khaubawk ah meisip thiat hi." 
Judges15:5 Tuasia zawkciang meisipte halin Philistine te ii zungtaang lo sungah tha hi. Hi bangin ama in zungtaang a kila sa te bek hi ngawlin, laak ngawl laite le olive ciinna huante zongh haltham hi." 
Judges15:6 Philistine te in akua in vawt ziam ci in a kat uh ciang Samson ii vawt hi a, banghang tuabangin vawt ziam cile Timnah khua ah a sunghpa in Samson ii zi sia Samson ii lawmte khat a piaksak hang ahi hunlam tel uh hi. Tua ahikom Philistine te va pai a tua nu a hal lup zawk uh ciang a pa inn zongh haltumsak uh hi." 
Judges15:7 Samson in amate munah, “Tua ahile no hi bangin ngamta nu hi! Hite kong thuk kik mateng tawp ngawl tu in kiciam khi hi!” ci hi." 
Judges15:8 Ama in amate sim ngawp a, tam ma thatlum hi. Tua zawkciang ama pai in Etam lianghawng sungah om hi." 
Judges15:9 Philistine te hong pai in Judah ah ngiaphual saat a, Lehi khua sim uh hi." 
Judges15:10 Tuaciang, Judah mite in “Banghangin ko hong sim nu ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Amate in “Samson man tu le ama ii ko hong vawt bangin ama tungah vawt tu in hong pai khu hi,” ci in zo uh hi." 
Judges15:11 Tua ahikom Judah te mihing 3000 sia Etam liang hawng ah pai in Samson munah, “Philistine te sia ei hong ukte ahi hunlam he ngawl ni ziam? Ko bang hong law thong ni ziam?” ci uh hi. Ama in, “Kei tungah hong vawt bangin amate tungah vawt khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Judges15:12 Amate in, “Hi sungah kong paina uh sia nangma letheen tu le amate tungah nangma aap tu in hong pai khu hi,” ci uh hi. Samson in, “Noma tatak ma ii nong thalup ngawl natu kamciam hong pia tavun,” ci in ngen hi." 
Judges15:13 Amate in, “Pha hi, hong letheen bek tu a, amate tungah hong aap tu khu hi. Ko nang hong that ngawl tu khu hi,” ci uh hi. Tuabangin amate in khauzeen thak nii taw heen cip in lianghawng pan cia pui uh hi." 
Judges15:14 Lehi a thet ciang, Philistine te in ama ausan in hong del uh hi. Thakhat thu in Topa vaangletna in ama hatsak hi, tuaciang ama in a khut le a baan a heenna khauzeente sia khauzam kaanghdeau sa bang phetin saantat hi." 
Judges15:15 Tuaciang ama in a thi tuung laa khat ii khangu mu hi. Ama kunsuk in tawm a, tua taw pasal tulkhat thatlum hi." 
Judges15:16 Tua ahikom Samson in, “Laa khangu taw miza a tul that ing nge, Laa khangu taw a luang uh kangthing bang siah ing,” ci in lasa hi." 
Judges15:17 Tuasia zawkciang, a laa khangu vawk hi. Hi bang a pianna mun sia Ramath Lehi kici hi." 
Judges15:18 Samson sia a dangko mama a, Topa tungah hi bangin ko hi, “Zawna lianpi hong pia zo ni hi; tu in dangko in thi tu khi ziam, hi Pathian he ngawl Philistine te in hong man tu ziam?” ci hi." 
Judges15:19 Tuasia ciang Pathian in tua mun Lehi ah leivang khat honsak a, tua ii sung pan tui hong pusuak hi. Samson in tua tui dawn a, ama a om nuamtuam zawhiat hi. Tua ahikom tua ciktui sia Hakkore kici a, Lehi ah om nginge lai hi." 
Judges15:20 Philistine te ii uk hun sung ma ah Samson in Israel kum kul sung lampui hi. 
Judges16:1 Ni khat Samson sia Philistine te khuapi Gaza ah pai in, tua munah pumpi kizuak numei khat mu a, tua nu lup pui hi." 
Judges16:2 Gaza mite in Samson sia tua munah om ci in he ahikom amate in tua mun kiim uum a, zankhuateakin khuapi kongpi ah ama ngakin om uh hi. Zankhuateak in amate thim khipkhep in om a, “Khua hong vak dongin ih ngak tu a, tuasia ciang ama ih thatlum tu hi,” ci in ngaisun uh hi." 
Judges16:3 Ahihang Samson sia lupna tungah zankim dong bek om hi. Tua zawkciang ama tho a khuapi kongpi hong zamh a — kongkhate, khuamte le kongkalnate theampo phai keak hi. Ama in tuate a liang ah kisuanh siat in, mualtung Hebron a kimu suk theina mun dong pua to hi." 
Judges16:4 Hisia zawkciang Samson in Sorek Kuam sungah a teang Delilah kici numei khat taw ki it hi. 
Judges16:5 Philistine kumpi ngate sia tua nu kungah pai in, “Ama sia banghangin tuza in hat a, bangbang hi leang ama kizo thei tu a, letheen in a cimaw in kikoi thei tu ziam ci in nangma tung hong son thei natu in, Samson theam vawt in. Ko khat simin ngunntang tul le zakhat tek hong pia tu khu hi,” ci uh hi." 
Judges16:6 Tua ahikom Delilah in Samson mun ah, “Nong hesuakna in hong son ta'n, nang sia bang in hong hatsak mama ziam? Khat po in nang hong letheen nuam in hong cimawsak nuam le bangbangin hong hi tu ziam, hong son ta'n,” ci hi." 
Judges16:7 Samson in, “Thalkhau thak a ko ngawl lai sali taw hong kiletheen le ngualdang khat pawpo bangma in ka tha zawm tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Judges16:8 Tua ahikom Philistine kumpite in Delilah kungah thalkhau thak a ko ngawl lai zam sali hong paipui uh a, ama in Samson khii cip hi." 
Judges16:9 Ama in pasal pawlkhat sia doituam dangkhat sungah ngaksak a, tuate zaak tu in, “Samson! Philistine te hong pai hi!” ci in au hi. Ahihang ama in khauzamte mei taw a kithutha ciang a tat bangin a thalkhaute hong saantat hi. Tuabangin amate in Samson ii thahat theina thuku sia he zo ngawl lai hi." 
Judges16:10 Delilah in Samson munah, “En in, nang kei sia a mawmaw bangin hong vawt ni hi, thumaan hong son ngawl ni hi. Nong hesuakna in hong son ta'n, bangbang hi le khat po in nang hong letheen thei tu ziam?” ci hi." 
Judges16:11 Ama in, “Amate in a kizangh ngeingawl lai khauzeen thak taw hong sawm le ngualdang khat pawpo bangin ka tha zawm tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Judges16:12 Tua ahikom Delilah in khauzeen thak te la in a heen zawkciang, “Samson! Philistine te hong pai hi,” ci in au hi. Inndoi khat sungah pasal pawlkhat in ngak nginge hi. Ahihang Samson in a khut heen na khauzeente khauzam bang phetin saantat hi." 
Judges16:13 Delilah in Samson munah, “Kei sia a mawmaw khat vawtin hong vawt lai ni hi, thumaan hong son ngawl ni hi. Khat po in nang bangbangin hong letheen thei tu ziam, hong son ta'n,” ci hi. Ama in, “Ka sampheak lom sali teng hong pheaksakin, thiamtana sungah taanelh in tuk kilhna khat taw hong ngatsak le ngualdang khat bangin ka tha zawm tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Judges16:14 Delilah in ama a mut natu in oai a, a samlom sali teng thiamtana khat sungah taanelh hi. Ama in a sam tukkilhna taw a ngatsak zawkciang “Samson! Philistine te hong pai,” ci in au hi. Ahihang ama hong khanglo a, a sam sia thiamtana pan hong nuk keak hi." 
Judges16:15 Tua ahiciang Delilah in ama tungah, “Nong it tak ngawl po bangbangin kong it ci thei ni ziam? Thumvei vaset a mawmaw bangin hong vawt zo ni hi, bang in tuza ta in hong hatsak ci sia hong son ngawl lai ni hi,” ci hi." 
Judges16:16 Ama in ni sim, ni simin dongh hi. Ama in tua nu ii a kut tawntung sia cimtak pi in cimtak a," 
Judges16:17 a khakbel ciang a thu maan son hi. Ama in “Ka sam sia hong kimeetsak ngeingawl hi, kei sia ka sua pan kipan Pathian tungah nazirite khat in hong ki aaptuam hi. Ka sam hong kimeetsak hi le, ka thahatna ka taan tu a, ngualdang khat pawpo bangma in ka tha zawm tu hi,” ci hi." 
Judges16:18 Delilah in Samson ii thumaan a son hunlam a phaw ciangin, Philistine kumpipa te tungah thupuak in, “Khatvei ma hong pai kik tavun. Ama in thumaan hong son zo hi,” ci hi. Tuasia ciang amate hong pai a, a sum teng hong keng uh hi." 
Judges16:19 Delilah in Samson sia a kaang ah a lu sialin a mut natu oai a, tuasia zawkciang pasal khat samin, a sam lom sali teng meetsak hi. Tua zawkciang ama in Samson sia vawt sia zazaan hi, banghang ziam cile a hatna teng taan zo hi." 
Judges16:20 Tua zawkciang ama in, “Samson! Philistine te hong pai hi!” ci in au hi. Ama khanglo a, “Ka kisuut tu a, a ngei bangma in ka suakta tu hi,” ci in ngaisun hi. Topa ii ama a nusiat hunlam a he bua hi." 
Judges16:21 Philistine te in ama man a, a mittangte khelkeaksak uh hi. Amate in ama sia Gaza ah paipui a, taau khau taw khii in, thonginn sung an ngoaina ah naseamsak uh hi." 
Judges16:22 Ahihang a sam sia hong sau kik hi. 
Judges16:23 Philistine kumpite sia amate ii biak Dagon pathian tungah sangaw biakpiakna lianpi khat taw lungdam poai khaam tu in kikhawm tua uh hi. Amate lasa in, “Ih pathian in ih ngal pa Samson hong zosak hi!” ci uh hi." 
Judges16:24 Amate diksa mama ahiciang in, “Samson sam tavun a, ih et nop tu in ngamtasak tawng!” ci hi. Amate in Samson thong sung pan pusua a, amate mu nop tu in a ngamtatsak zawkciang khuampite kilaklaw ah dingsak uh hi. A mihonte in ama a mu uh ciang, amate ii pathian tungah pokna lasa uh hi: “Ih pathian in ih ngalpa, ih ngam lalcipsak a eite tam mama hong that pa hong zosak hi.”" 
Judges16:25  
Judges16:26 Ama khut pan len in a paipui tangvalpa munah Samson in, “Innpi a dingsak khuampite hong thamsak ta'n, tuate neal nuam khi hi,” ci hi." 
Judges16:27 A inn sia numei le pasal a dimteak in om hi. Philistine kumpi nga te zongh tua munah om a, tuaciang innkhum tungah numei le pasal kingawm mihing tulthum khawng zongh Samson ii poai lak en in om uh hi." 
Judges16:28 Tuasia ciang Samson in thu ngen a, “Vaanglianpipa Topa awng, kei hong phawk ta'n; nong hesuakna in Pathian awng, ka mittang te ngeal hong khelsak Philistine te tungah hi ka hatna khatvei zangh in phu ka lam zawk natu in ka thahatna khatvei bekma hong pia lai ta'n,” ci hi." 
Judges16:29 Tua ahikom Samson in innpi a dingsak a laizang a po suut khuampite nii zamh hi. A khut lang le lang taw tua suut khuamte nii len in sawnvawk a," 
Judges16:30 tuaciang “Philistine te taw hong thi khawmsak ta'n ci in au hi. Ama in a tha nei theampo taw sawn a, tuasia ciang inn hong cimh in, kumpi nga teng le a dang theampo delcip hi. Samson in a nuntak lai a thalup sangin a thi ciangin a tamzaw thatlum hi." 
Judges16:31 A suapuipate le a innkuanpui dangte hong paisuk a, a luang phaam hi. Amate in ciapui a, Zorah le Eshtaol kilaklaw, a pa Manoah ii thaan sungah phum uh hi. Ama sia Israel lampui kum kul seam hi." 
Judges17:1 Khatvei lai in, Ephraim mualtung ngam a teang Micah a kici pasal khat om hi." 
Judges17:1 Khatvei lai in, Ephraim mualtung ngam a teang Micah a kici pasal khat om hi." 
Judges17:2 Ama in a nu munah, “Tua ngunntang tul le zakhat nang tung pan khat ii hong nguksak lai in, nguta pa na tomlaw hi. Na tomlaw hong za khi hi. En in! A dangka keima in nei khi hi. A la sia keima khi hi,” ci hi. A nu in, “ Topa in nang thupha hong pia tahen, ka tapa awng!” ci hi." 
Judges17:3 Ama in a sum teng a nu piakik a, a nu in, “Haamsiatna ka tapa tung hong tun ngawl natu in, keima mama in tua ngunntang Topa tungah ciliap huai takin aaptuam khi hi. Ngunn taw a kituam thingngel milim khat vawtna in kizangh tu hi. Tua ahikom tu in tua ngunntang teng nang hong pia kik tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
Judges17:4 Tua zawkciang ama in tuate a nu piakik hi. A nu in ngunntang 200 la in thikseak te khat pia hi, tua pa in thingngel milim khat vawt a, ngunn taw tuam hi. Tua milim sia Micah ii inn ah koi hi." 
Judges17:4 Tua zawkciang ama in tuate a nu piakik hi. A nu in ngunntang 200 la in thikseak te khat pia hi, tua pa in thingngel milim khat vawt a, ngunn taw tuam hi. Tua milim sia Micah ii inn ah koi hi." 
Judges17:5 Micah in ama biakpiakna mun a tuamin nei hi. Ama in milim pawlkhat le ephod khat vawt a, tuaciang a tapate khat sia thiampi in koi hi."

Judges17:8 Ama in Bethlehem nusia in a teen natu mun khat zong hi. Ama sia khual a haw laitakin, Ephraim mualtung ngam Micah inn hong theng hi."

Judges17:9 Micah in, “Koisung pan hong pai ni ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Ama in zo kik a, “Kei sia Judah ngam Bethlehem khua pan Levi te khat ka hi a, ten natu mun zong khi hi,” ci hi." 
Judges17:9 Micah in, “Koisung pan hong pai ni ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Ama in zo kik a, “Kei sia Judah ngam Bethlehem khua pan Levi te khat ka hi a, ten natu mun zong khi hi,” ci hi." 
Judges17:10 Micah in, “Keima kungah hong om ta'n. Ka thudokpa ka thiampipa hong hi ta'n a, kum khat in ngunntang sawm taw na puansilh le na anneak tu kong pia tu hi,” ci hi."

Judges18:1 Tua hun lai in Israel ngam ah kumpi om ngawl hi. Tua hun laitak ma in Dan nam in amate laak tu ngam zong uh hi, banghang ziam cile Israel namte sung panin amate tan tu in ngam nga mun nei ngawl lai hi." 
Judges18:2 Tua ahikom Dan mite thuhe pasal nga sia amate ii nam innkuan teng sung pan teal in, Zorah khua le Eshtaol khua pan paisak a, ngamsung vil kawkoai tu le thu kankuu tu in sawl uh hi. Amate Ephraim mualtung ngam hong thet uh ciang Micah ii inn ah tung uh hi." 
Judges18:2 Tua ahikom Dan mite thuhe pasal nga sia amate ii nam innkuan teng sung pan teal in, Zorah khua le Eshtaol khua pan paisak a, ngamsung vil kawkoai tu le thu kankuu tu in sawl uh hi. Amate Ephraim mualtung ngam hong thet uh ciang Micah ii inn ah tung uh hi." 
Judges18:3 Amate tua munah a taam sung Levi te khangmoi pa khat ii pau za uh hi, tua ahikom tua pa kungah amate pai in, “Hi sungah bang hi ni ziam? Akua in nang hi sungah hong paipui ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi." 
Judges18:4 Tua pa in zo a, “Keima in Micah taw vaihawmna khat ka nei uh a, ama ii thiampi seam tu in sum taw hong tham hi,” ci hi." 
Judges18:4 Tua pa in zo a, “Keima in Micah taw vaihawmna khat ka nei uh a, ama ii thiampi seam tu in sum taw hong tham hi,” ci hi." 
Judges18:5 Amate in ama munah, “Nong hesuakna in Pathian dongh in a, ko khualhawna vai a vang natu ziam?” ci hi." 
Judges18:6 Thiampipa in zo kik a, “No thin toi tu bangma om bo. Topa in no sia hi khualhawna uh ah hong keam hi,” ci hi." 
Judges18:7 Tua ahikom pasal nga teng sia Laish khua ah pai hi. Amate in tua mite sia Sidon mite bangma in ngammuang takin a teang mu uh hi. Amate sia a kilem, dai khipkhep a om mite hi a, kuama taw bangma kituu ngeingawl hi; a kitaangsap uh theampo nei uh hi. Amate sia Sidon mite kung pan a khuala mama na ah teang in, midang taw bangma kizopna a nei bua uh hi." 
Judges18:8 Pasal nga teng Zorah le Eshtaol ah hong cia kik ciang, a ngammipuite in bang teng mu ni ziam ci in dongh uh hi." 
Judges18:9 Amate in, “Hong pai tavun, Laish te sim tawng. A ngam ka mu zo uh a, ngam pha mama khat hi. Hi sungah bangma vawt ngawlin om thawthong heak vun; hong manlang tavun! Pai in tua ngam la vun!" 
Judges18:10 Tua mun na thet uh ciang a mite sia bangma khuaphawk meal ngawlin a om na mu tu uh hi. Tuasia ngamlian khat hi; mihing khat ii dei thei theampo nei a, Pathian in no tungah tua ngam hong pia zo hi,” ci uh hi." 
Judges18:11 Tua ahikom Dan nam sung pan pasal 600 sia Zorah le Eshtaol ah pai in ngal sim tu in kinging uh hi. 
Judges18:12 Amate kuanto a Judah ngamsung Kiriath Jearim ah ngiaphual saat uh hi. Tua hu in a mun sia Dan Ngiaphual kici top lai hi. 
Judges18:13 Amate tua mun pan paisuak in Ephraim mualtung ngam Micah ii inn theng uh hi. 
Judges18:13 Amate tua mun pan paisuak in Ephraim mualtung ngam Micah ii inn theng uh hi. 
Judges18:14 Tuaciang Laish khua kiim ngam vil tu in a pai pasal nga teng in a kitholpuite mun ah, “Hi sung innte khat sungah thingngel milim ngunn taw a kituam khat a om sia na he uh ziam? Milim dangte le ephod khat zongh om hi. Tuate bang law leang na ci uh ziam?” ci hi." 
Judges18:15 Tua ahikom amate Micah inn sung khangmoi Levi pa omna ah pai a, Levi pa munah bang na cici ziam ci in dongh uh hi."

Judges18:16 Tua lanin Dan pan ngalkap 600 ngalsim tu a kinging teng sia kongpi ah ding uh hi. 
Judges18:17 Thiampipa kongpi ah ngalkap zaluk te taw a om lanin thudawpku nga teng sia inn sungah tangtan in hong tum uh a, ngunn taw a kituam thingngel milim, milim dangte le ephod te a la uh hi." 
Judges18:18 Tua pasalte Micah inn sungah tumin biakna vanhte a laak uh ciang thiampipa in dongh a, “Bang vawt nu ziam?” ci hi."

Judges18:20 Hi kammalte in thiampi pa sia lungkimsak mama ahikom ama in biakna vanh thiangthote la in amate taw ton hi. 
Judges18:21 Amate kiheak a, a tate, a ngannote le a neisa teng taw dingkhia uh hi."

Judges18:24 Micah in zo kik a, “‘Bang thu om ziam’ na cisia, bang na cinopna ziam? Noma in ka thiampipa le pathian ka vawtte la in, paipui hi ngawl nu ziam?! Kei atu bang om nawn thong ziam?” ci hi." 
Judges18:25 Dan pasalte in, “Hi mite thin uuksakin, nangma hong sim tu na uuk lui bua nale bangma dang pau ngawlin om lete phazaw hi. Tua ahibuale nang le na innkuan bupin thi tu nu hi,” ci hi." 
Judges18:26 Tuasia zawkciang amate paisuak uh hi. Micah in amate sia ama atu thahat leih ci in mu ahikom ama heak kikin inn ah cia hi.

Judges18:27 Dan pasalte in thiampipa le Micah ii vawt vanhte a laak zawk uh ciang pai a, Bethrehob taw a kuam sung a omkhawm, ngamdai mite ii khua, Laish sim uh hi. Amate in tua munah a teangte thatlum in a khua haltham uh hi. Amate a hun tu kuama a om bua hi, banghang ziam cile amate sia Sidon pan kikhuala si, midang kuama taw kizopna nei ngawl si hi. Dan mite in a khua saat kikin tua munah teang uh hi."

Dan mite in a khua saat kikin tua munah teang uh hi." 
Judges18:28  
Judges18:29 Amate in a khua min zongh Laish pan Dan ci in Jacob ii tapa a taanghpupi uh Dan min lawna in kheal uh hi. 
Judges18:30 Dan mite in tua milim sia biak tu in koi uh a, tuaciang, Gershom ii tapa, Moses ii tupa Jonathan in Dan nam atu in thiampi seam a, tuaciang ama ii suan le paalte zongh tua mite sal tang tu in a kipaipui hun dong thiampi veu seam uh hi." 
Judges18:31 Shiloh ah Pathian biakna Puanbuk a om lai theampo in Micah ii milim sia tua munah taang top hi.

Judges19:1 Tua hun lai Israel kumpi a nei ma in, Ephraim mualtung ngam pek ah Levi te khat teang hi. Ama in Judah ngam Bethlehem khua panin numei khat a zino tu in la hi," 
Judges19:2 ahihang tua nu sia ama tungah thin uuk ahikom Bethlehem khua a pa inn ah cia kik a, tha li taam hi." 
Judges19:3 Tuasia ciang pasal pa in ama sam kik a, heak pui kik tu in zol sawm hi. Ama in a naseampa le laa nii keng hi. Tua nu in Levi pa inn sungah tumpui a, a pa in a mu ciang pha takin zindo hi." 
Judges19:4 A pa in a taam natu a ngenget ciang ni thum taam hi. Amate nupa an nekhawm in, tua munah zan taam uh hi." 
Judges19:5 A ni li ni zing ciang, zingtuung in tho a, vaiding tu in kithoai uh hi. Ahihang Levi pa munah a pa in, “Bang khat po ne phot vun. Noma atu phazaw tu hi. A zawkciang na ding thei tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Judges19:6 Tua ahikom pasalte nii zong hong to in, nekhawm dawnkhawm in om uh hi. Tua zawkciang a pa in, “Nong hesuakna in hi sungah zan taam lai vun a, nuam takin om vun,” ci hi." 
Judges19:7 Levi mi pa sia pai tu a kipat ciang a pa in taam lai a sawl ahikom zan khat taam thua hi. 
Judges19:8 A ni nga ni zingtuung in vaiding tu a kipat ciang a pa in, “Nong hesuakna in bang khat po ne vun. Nisaang dong ngak vun,” ci hi. Tua ahikom pasalte nii an nekhawm uh hi." 
Judges19:9 Pasal pa, a zino le a naseampa khatvei ma vaiding tu hong kipat ciangin, a pa in, “En vun! tu sia nitak hi dektak zo hi; zan taam lai tavun. Hai ngawlin khua hong zing tu hi; hi sungah taamin nuam takin om vun. Zing ciang khualhaw tu in na tho pal tu uh a, na cia tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Judges19:10 Ahihang pasal pa in tua munah zan khat taam thua nuam ngawl ahikom ama le a zino, a naseampa le a tung tona kungh kithua sa a laate nii taw vaiding hi. Amate Jebus (Jerusalem hi) nai hong thet uh ciang ni niam zo ahikom naseampa in a topa munah, “Banghangin hi Jebus khuapi ah tawlnga in zan taam maw tu hi ziam?” ci hi." 
Judges19:11  
Judges19:12 Ahihang a topa in, “Israel mite teenna ahi ngawl khuapi ah ei ih tawlnga buatu hi. Ih paitan tu a, tawm a khuala zawna Gibeah ahibuale Ramah ah zan ih taam tu hi,” ci hi." 
Judges19:13  
Judges19:14 Tua ahikom amate in Jebus kaantan in paisuak uh hi. Benjamin namte ii ngamsung Gibeah khua hong thet ciangin ni tum hi. 
Judges19:15 Amate lampi pan pial in tua munah zan taam tu in hong zuan uh hi. Amate khuapi sungah hong tum in, khuapi khawlmun ah hong to uh a, ahihang amate a inn ah zan ngiak tu in a paa a om bua hi." 
Judges19:16 Amate tua munah a om laitakin, pasal huai khat sia a lo nasep a tawp zawkciang a kung nai ah hong cia hi. Ama pianna sia Ephraim mualtung ngam hi a, ahihang tu in Gibeah ah teang hi. (Tua munah midangte ahi uh le Benjamin nam pan veu hi)." 
Judges19:17 Pasal huai pa in khuapi khawlmun ah khualhaw pa mu a, “Koisung pan hong pai a, koisung zuan tu nu ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Judges19:18 Levi mi pa in zo kik a “Ko Judah ngam Bethlehem khua ah haw khu hi, tu in ka inn uh Ephraim mualtung ngam thukna ah cia tu khu hi." 
Judges19:19 ka laate atu sa an le taangphaw zongh nei a, anluum le sapittui zongh ka zino le kei le ka naseampa atu taw nei napi kuama in zan hong ngiaksak ngawl hi, Ka kisap theampo ma nei khu hi." 
Judges19:20 Pasal huai pa in, “Ka inn ah hong saang khi hi! Pha takin hong keam tu khi hi; khuapi khawlmun ah ngia kul ngawl hi,” ci hi." 
Judges19:21 Tuabangin amate ciapui a, a laate vaaksak hi. A zinte a peang uh sil in, an ne uh hi." 
Judges19:22 Amate nuam takin a om laitak thakhat thu in khua sung pan numei le pa vai in a paktat pawlkhat in kiim uum a, kongkha nawmngawp uh hi. Amate in pasal huai pa munah, “Nang taw hong cia khawm pa sia hong pusua ta'n! Numei ompui bangin ompui nuam khu hi!” ci uh hi."
