Judges19:23 Ahihang pasal huai pa doipua ah pusuak a, amate tungah, “Lawmte awng, nong hesuakna in, tuabang hi heak vun! Tuabang tatsiat kiihuai ngamtatna te vawt heak vun! Hi sia pa sia keima zin hi." 
Judges19:24 En vun! Hi sungah ama zino le ka tanu om hi, ka tanu sia ngaknu thiangtho hi. Amate tu in kong pusua tu a, ompui thei nu hi. Na uk bangin vawt vun. Ahizong hisia pa tungah tuabang a lipkhaphuai in ngamta heak vun!” ci hi." 
Judges19:25 Ahihang tua mihingte in ama a thudon bua uh hi. Tua ahikom Levi pa in a zino la in doipua sang amate kungah koi hi. Amate in ama sia zankhuateak buanin zingsang dong tawlnga ngawlin vawtsia uh hi. 
Judges19:26 Khuavak ciangin numei nu sia a pasal omna, pasal huai pa ii inn kongkha ah hong pai in puk hi. Khuavak tel dong ama sia tua munah om lai hi." 
Judges19:27 A pasal sia zing tho a, kongkha hongin khualhaw tu in a pusua le, a zino sia inn mai ah a liik sa in om a, a khutte sia kongkha zamh tubangin a om mu hi." 
Judges19:28 Ama in, “Tho in. Pai tawng,” ci hi. Ahihang bangma a zo bua hi. Tua ahikom ama in a luang sia laa tungah a phei lamin suan a, inn ah cia pui hi." 
Judges19:29 Inn a thet ciang inn sungah tumin naam khat la hi. Ama in a zino luang sia see sawm le see nii sua hi, tuaciang see khat tek Israel nam sawm le nii sim ii a nga tu in thaak hi." 
Judges19:30 A mu theampo in, “Hi bang thu peuma za ngei bua hing! Israel te ii Egypt a nusiat zawk peuma in hi bang mama piang ngeingawl hi! Hisia huvau bang khat po ih hi kul tu hi! Ih vawt tu sia bang ahi tu ziam?” ci tek uh hi." 
Judges20:1 Israel mite theampo saksang ah Dan pan thang sangah Beersheba dong le, nisuana sang ah Gilead ngamte dongin tua ngalkona sia za in saang uh hi. Amate in Topa ii mai Mizpah ah pumkhat in hong kikhawm uh hi." 
Judges20:2 Israel nam lampui theampo hi Pathian mite kikhopna ah om in, lei ngalkap sia 400,000 pha uh hi." 
Judges20:3 Tua laitak ma in Benjamin mite in a dang Israel te a vekpi in Mizpah ah kingawmtua hi ci in za uh hi. Israel te in, “Hi khialna lian sia koibang piang ci sia hong son tavun,” ci in dongh uh hi." 
Judges20:4 A zino a kisuamlum Levi pa in zo a, “Ka zino le kei sia Benjamin te ngam Gibeah ah zantaam tu in ka pai uh hi." 
Judges20:5 Gibeah pasalte sia kei hong sim tu in zanin hong pai a inn hong kiim uum uh hi. Amate in kei hong thatlum nuam hi; ahihang kei taangin ka zino sia buanin thi hi. 
Judges20:6 Ama luang la in ka sem zawkciang Israel nam khat sim see khat tek ka thaak hi. Hi mite in ei sungah tatsiatna le paktat ngamtatna vawt hi. 
Judges20:7 Hi sungah a om no teng theampo sia Israel mite vive hi nu hi. Hi thu huvau bangbangin ngamta tu hi ziam?” ci uh hi. 
Judges20:8 Mihing theampo hong ding khawm tek in, “Ei a kuama po puanbuk ah ih teang zong, inn sung ih teang zong, cia ngawl tu hi hing." 
Judges20:9 Ih sep tu sia hisia hi: laimee ih sawk tu a, Gibeah a sim tu pasal pawlkhat ih teal tu hi." 
Judges20:10 Israel mi teng sung pan sawm ciang khat veu in ngalkaphonpi atu an sik tu a, a dang teng sia kuan in, hi paktat tatsiatna Israel ah hong vawt hu in Gibeah te daan ih pia tu hi." 
Judges20:11 Tua ahikom Israel mite theampo Gibeah khua sim natu vaihawm tu in kikhawm uh hi. 
Judges20:12 Israel namte in Benjamin nam ii ngamsung tangciing kamtai paisak in, “Hi khialna lian na vawt uh sia bang hi thong ziam?" 
Judges20:13 Gibeah ah a ngottatte, tu in hong aap tavun, tua hile amate thatlum thei in, hi tatsiatna sia Israel panin ka heam thei tu uh hi,” cisak hi. Ahihang Benjamin mite in Israel dangte a awlmawk bua uh hi." 
Judges20:14 Amate Benjamin ngamsung khuapite theampo panin Israel dang teng a do tu in Gibeah zuan uh hi. 
Judges20:15 Amate in tua ni in a khuapite uh pan ngalkap 26,000 sam uh hi. Hiteng tungsia ah Gibeah ngammite in a kitealtuam. a veilawng 700 khawmtua uh hi. Amate khat simin saili taw suangtang khat a kaap uh ciang samzam zongh a khial ngei bua uh hi." 
Judges20:16  
Judges20:17 Israel nam a taanglai teng sung pan ngalkap thiam sa 400,000 khawmtua uh hi." 
Judges20:18 Israel mite Bethel biakna munah pai in Pathian tungah amate in, “Bang nam in Benjamin te sim masa tu ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi. Topa in zo a, “Judah nam” ci hi." 
Judges20:19 Tua ahikom Israel te a zing kik ciang hong kipan uh a, Gibeah khuapi hui ah ngiaphual saat uh hi." 
Judges20:20 Amate Benjamin ngalkaphonpi sim tu in hong pai uh a, tuaciang a ngalkapte in khuapi maingatsak uh hi." 
Judges20:21 Benjamin ngalkaphonpi khuapi sung pan hong pusuak uh a, nitum ma in Israel ngalkapte 22,000 thatlum uh hi." 
Judges20:22 Tua zawkciangin Israel te biakna munah hong pai uh a, nitak dong Topa mai ah tau uh hi. Amate in ama tung ah, “Koma suapui Benjamin te taw kido tu in ka kuan kik tu uh ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi. Topa in zo a, “Kuan vun!” ci hi. Tua ahikom Israel ngalkaphonpi sia tha nga a, a zeini in a om bangma in a ngalkapte sia a dinmun ngei ah koi kik uh hi." 
Judges20:23  
Judges20:24 Amate Benjamin ngalkaphonpi sim tu in a nii veina hong kuan uh hi. 
Judges20:25 Tuaciang Benjamin te zongh a nii veina Gibeah pan hong pusuak uh hi, hisia hun ciang Israel ngalkap thiam sa 18,000 thatlum uh hi." 
Judges20:26 Tuasia ciang Israel mite theampo Bethel ah pai in tau uh hi. Amate Topa ii ompuina tua munah to in, nitak dong an a ne bua uh hi. Amate in pawlkhop sangaw biakpiakna le meihal sangaw biakpiakna pawlkhat a bupin hal uh hi — tua theampo Topa mai ah vawt uh hi." 
Judges20:27 Pathian ii Thuciamna Thingkuang sia tua hun lai in Bethel ah kikoi hi, tuaciang Eleazer tapa, Aaron ii tupa Phinehas in tuasia keam hi. Mihingte in Topa tungah, “Ka suapui Benjamin te ka sim kik tu uh ziam maw, ka tawp heu tu uh ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi. Topa in, “Sim vun, zing ciangin noma in amate hong zosak tu khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Judges20:28  
Judges20:29 Tua hikom Israel te in ngalkap pawlkhat Gibeah kiim ah buusak hi. 
Judges20:30 Tuaciang ni kizom a ni thum ni in amate in Benjamin ngalkaphonpi sangah kuan a, tuaciang nidang bangma in a sim tu kinging sa ngalkapte sia Gibeah maingat in dinmun lasak hi." 
Judges20:31 Benjamin te ngal do tu in hong pusuak uh a, khuapi panin kipaipui suak hi. A masa bangma amate in Bethel paina lampi le Gibeah paina lampi tung a taanzauna mun tengah Israel te pawlkhat thatlum tu hong kipan uh hi. Amate in Israel te 30 khawng that uh hi." 
Judges20:32 Benjamin te in, “Tu masia ih zaw bangin zozo hing,” ci uh hi. Ahihang, amate khuapi pan pusuaksak a, lampi tungah a zolna in Israel te a nungkin kik tu in ngeal uh hi." 
Judges20:33 Tua bangin Israel te ii ngalkaphonpi a tamzawte hong nungkin a, Baaltamar ah hong kingawmtua kik ciangin, Gibeah khua a uumci mi teng sia amate bukna khuapi kiim suang tamna ngamsung pan pusuak in thakhat thu hong del uh hi." 
Judges20:34 A kitealtuam Israel mi tulsawm teng in Gibeah a sim uh ciang, a kidona nasia mama hi. Benjamin te in amate sia kisucip tu ci in a he bua uh hi." 
Judges20:35 Topa in Benjamin te tungah zawna Israel te pia hi. Israel te in a ngalte 25,100 tua ni in thatlum uh a," 
Judges20:36 tuaciang Benjamin te in ngallel ahi hunlam hong phawk uh hi. Israel ngalkaphonpi sung pan a sim pi tu teng Benjamin te kung pan a nungkin sia banghang ziam cile amate in Gibeah kiim ah a buksak mite a suan hang ahi hi. 
Judges20:37 Hi mite Gibeah sangah manlang tak tai a; amate khuapi sungah kiphalin tuasung ah a om theampo thatlum uh hi. 
Judges20:38 Israel ngalkaphonpi sia le a buk sak mite in lim taw kilak natu khat vaihawm uh hi. Amate in meikhu lom lian khat khua sung pan a zaamto a mu uh ciang," 
Judges20:39 ngalphual a om Israel te sia kilee kik tu hi. Tusia hunin Benjamin te in Israel te 30 thatlum zo hi. Amate khat le khat hi bang kici uh hi, “Hi hi, tu masia ih zaw bangma ih zo zo hi,” ci uh hi." 
Judges20:40 Tuasia ciang lim sia hong kilangh hi; meikhu lom khat khua sung pan hong zaamto hi. Benjamin te in nungsang a et uh ciang a khuapi bup mei kaangh sia mu in lamdang sa uh hi. 
Judges20:41 Tuasia ciang Israel te hong heak kik a, Benjamin te sia patau in peak keak uh hi, banghang ziam cile amate sia kisucip nai tu ci in phawk uh hi." 
Judges20:42 Amate Israel te kung pan nungkin a, ngam taanzauna sangah tai uh hi, ahihang suakta zo ngawl uh hi. Amate sia Israel ngalkaphonpite le khuapi sung pan hong pusuak mite kilaklaw ah tangciak a, amate sia kisucip hi." 
Judges20:43 Israel te in ngalte sia thaang sung a awk bangin vawt hi, tuaciang tawlnga ngawlin Gibeah ii nisuana sang mun khat dong del in, a del kawmin that uh hi." 
Judges20:44 Benjamin ngalkapte sung pan a phabel tulsawm le tulliat that uh hi. 
Judges20:45 A dangte sia kiheak a, Rimmon Suangpi a kicina mun awngna ngam ah tai uh hi. Lamdung ah amate tulnga that hi. Israel te in Gidom dong a taanglai teng del tan in 2,000 that uh hi." 
Judges20:46 A vekpi kingawmin Benjamin te 25,000 tua ni in that a — a vekpi ngalhang ngalkap vive ahi hi." 
Judges20:47 Ahizong, mihing 600 in Rimmon Suangpi a kicina mun awngna ngam ah suakta uh a, tuaciang tua munah amate tha li taam uh hi." 
Judges20:48 Israel te heak kikin Benjamin te a taanglai teng — pasal, numei, patang te le nganno te zongh a kibangin thatlum siat uh hi. Tua ngamsung khua theampo haltham siat uh hi." 
Judges21:1 Israel te in Mizpah ah a kikhoptua uh laitakin Topa tungah ciliap huai kamciam khat pia uh hi: “Ko sungah kuama in Benjamin mite ii zi tu in ka tanute pia ngawl tu khu hi,” ci hi." 
Judges21:2 Tua ahikom tu in Israel mite Bethel ah hong pai in, tualai Topa ii mai ah nitak dong to uh hi. Nging tak le thinbot takin amate mau tek uh hi:" 
Judges21:3 “Israel ii Topa Pathian awng, banghangin hi thu piang ziam? Banghangin Benjamin nam sia Israel sung pan bomang tu in kithoai ziam?” ci hi." 
Judges21:4 A zing ciang, zing tuungin mite in tua munah biaknatau khat sa in, pawlkhop sangaw biakpiaknate le sangaw biakpiakna pawlkhat a bup in hal uh hi." 
Judges21:5 Amate in,” Topa mai Mizpah ah Israel te kikhoptua lai in Israel nam theampo pan a kihel ngawl pawl a om ziam? (Amate in Mizpah ah a pai ngawl peuma kithatlum tu hi, ci in ciliap huai kiciamna khat vawt hi.)" 
Judges21:6 Israel mite sia a suapui uh Benjamin mite atu khuangai hi, tuaciang amate in, “Tu ni in Israel in a namte sung pan nam khat taan uh hi." 
Judges21:7 Benjamin mi a taang laite zi tu, bang law tu hi ziam? Topa tungah ciliap huai kamciam ih vawtna pan, ih tanute khat zongh amate zi tu in ih pia buatu hi, ih ci hi,” ci hi." 
Judges21:8 Mizpah ah a kikhopna sungah Israel namte sung pan hong kikhawm ngawl akua te pawl om ziam ci in a kat uh ciang, Gilead ngam Jabesh panin kuama hong kikhawm ngawl uh hi;" 
Judges21:9 ngalkaphonpi sungah min kisap lai in Jabesh panin kuama in zo ngawl hi. 
Judges21:10 Tua ahikom a kikhopna pan mihing a hangbel tulsawm le tulnii te thupia a, “Jabesh ah pai vun a, mi theampo, numei patang dong thatlum tavun." 
Judges21:11 Pa a minpiang theampo thatlum vun a, numei a thiangtho ngawl peuma that vun,” ci hi." 
Judges21:12 Jabesh mite sungah ngaknu thiangtho 400 mu ahikom, Canaan ngam sungah a om Shiloh ngiaphual ah paipui uh hi." 
Judges21:13 Tuasia ciang a kikhop honna pan Rimmon Suangpi a om Benjamin te munah ngal kilem natu thu zasak hi. 
Judges21:14 Benjamin te hong pai kik in Israel a dangte in amate tungah Jabesh pan ngaknu a thalup ngawlte pia uh hi. Ahihang tua ngaknute amate atu in a kicing zo bua hi. 
Judges21:15 Benjamin te atu in mipite khuangai hi, banghang ziam cile, Topa in Israel namte ii kilomtangh na sia sutham hi." 
Judges21:16 Tua ahikom a kikhawmte ii lampuite in, “Benjamin nam sungah numei om nawn ngawl hi. A taanglai pate ii zi tu, bang law tu hi ziam?" 
Judges21:17 Israel in nam sawm le nam nii sung pan nam khat sia bosua thei ngawl het tu hi. Benjamin namte a bo ngawl natu in lampi khat ih zon kul tu hi," 
Judges21:18 ahihang amate in ih tanute a teenpui tu ki oai ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile eima in Benjamin te khat ii zi tu a tanu a pia pawpo sia ih haamsiat sa hi zo hi,” ci hi." 
Judges21:19 Tua zawkciang amate in, “Kum sim a kivawt Topa poaipi sia Shiloh ah tung dektak zo hi,” ci sia ngaisun uh hi. (Shiloh sia Bethel saksang, Lebonah ii thangsang Bethel le Shechem kilaklaw a lampi sia ii nisuana sangah om hi.)." 
Judges21:20 Amate in Benjamin te munah, “Pai vun a, sapithuante sungah buu vun," 
Judges21:21 tuaciang encik vun. Shiloh ngaknute poai sungah a laam tu hong pusua uh ciangin sapithuante sung pan hong pusuak tavun. Noma khat simin tua ngaknute sung pan zi khat tek zawthawk thu taw la vun a, Benjamin ngam ah cia pui vun." 
Judges21:22 Amate ii pate, suapuite in no kungah hong pai in lungkim ngawlna hong pau le, ‘Nong hesuakna in hong keamsak po tavun, banghang ziam cile amate sia ka zi tu a ngal kidona pan ka laak uh hi ngawl hi. Tuaciang no zongh in ko nong piak uh hi ngawl ahiciang, na kamciam uh a paltan suak ngawl nu hi,’ ci thei tu nu hi,” ci uh hi." 
Judges21:23 Benjamin te in tuabang ma in ngamta uh hi; Shiloh ah a laam ngaknute sung pan amate atu tek tealin a ngam ah ciapui in, khua saat kikin tua munah teang uh hi." 
Judges21:24 Tuasia hun laitak ma in a taanglai Israel te zongh tua mun nusia in, mi simin ama ii nam, a innkuanpuite kung, a neisa omna ah cia uh hi." 
Judges21:25 Tua hun laitakin Israel ngam ah kumpi a om bua hi. Mi theampo in amate uuk bangin ngamta uh hi. 
Ruth1:1 Khua ngeipi hun lai, Israel te ii kumpi a nei ma in, a ngam sungah kialpi hong tung hi. Tua ahikom Ephrath bee le phung sung pan, Judah ngam Bethlehem khua a teang Elimelech a kici pasal khat sia a zi Naomi le a tapate nii, Mahlon le Chilion taw Moab ngam ah tawmvei sung teang tu in pai hi. Tua munah a teen lai in," 
Ruth1:2  
Ruth1:3 Elimelech hong thi hi, tuaciang Naomi sia Moab numeite Orpah le Ruth" 
Ruth1:4 a teenpui a tapate nii taw bek taang hi. Kum sawm bang zawkciang 
Ruth1:5 Mahlon le Chilion zongh thi uh hi, tuaciang Naomi sia pasal ngawl ta ngawl taw taang hi." 
Ruth1:6 Tua zawk tawmvei ciangin, Topa in ama ii mite sia thupha pia a, an tam mama la hi ci in Naomi in za hi; tua ahikom a mote nii taw Moab ngam nusia tu in kithoai hi." 
Ruth1:7 Judah ngam zuan kik tu in amate kipan khawm tek hi, ahihang lam a pai kawmin" 
Ruth1:8 Naomi in amate mun ah, “Cia kik tavun a, na nute uh taw om tavun. Kei tung le a thisate tungah nong thuthiam uh bangma in Topa in no tungah hong thuthiam tahen." 
Ruth1:9 Tuaciang Topa in no ngeal sia pasal nei kikin innkuan khat veve nei kik tu in hong siam tahen,” ci hi. Tua ahikom a vaithakna in Naomi in a mote nii namh hi, ahihang amate kap a," 
Ruth1:10 “Heak kik ngawl tu khu hi! Nangma taw na mipuite kungah hong zui tu khu hi,” ci uh hi." 
Ruth1:11 “Ka tanute awng, na heak kik uh kul tu hi,” ci in Naomi in zo hi. “Kei taw banghangin paikhawm nuam nu ziam? Na teenpui tu in tapate vei hing kik thei lai tu hong um nu ziam?" 
Ruth1:12 Cia kik tavun, banghang ziam cile kei sia pasal nei kik tu in huai lei zo khi hi. Lam et om lai hi ci ngaisunin tu nitak mama, pasal nei in tapate nei hial leng zong," 
Ruth1:13 a khan ngak zo tu nu ziam? Hi bang taw ngualdang na teenpui tu uh kikhaksak nuam nu ziam? Hi ngawl hi, ka tanute awng, tuabang suak thei ngawl hi ci sia he nu hi. Topa in kei hong nungngat zo hi, tuaciang no atu in khuangai mama khi hi,” ci hi." 
Ruth1:14 Amate kap tu in hong kipan leleau hi. Tua zawkciang Orpah in a to nupi a vaithakna in namh a, tuaciang cia hi. Ahihang Ruth in a thasua nuam bua hi." 
Ruth1:15 Tua ahikom Naomi in ama tungah, “Ruth awng, na unu sia a mite le a pathian kung zuan kik zo hi. Ama taw cia khawm ta'n,” ci hi." 
Ruth1:16 Ahihang Ruth in, “Nang hong nusiasak heak in. Nangma taw hong paikhawmsak po ta'n. Na paina theampo ah ka pai tu a; na teenna po ah ka teang tu hi. Na mite sia keima mite hi tu a, na Pathian sia ka Pathian hi tu hi." 
Ruth1:17 Na thina po ah ka thi tu a, tua mun sia hong kiphumna mun hi tu hi. Thina ngawl buang, kei sia nang taw ka kikhen ta le Topa in daan nasiabel kei tungah hong tungsak tahen,” ci in zo hi." 
Ruth1:18 Naomi in Ruth sia ama taw paikhawm tu in a thin khensat zo ci in a mu ciang a pau nawn bua hi. 
Ruth1:19 Bethlehem a thet dong amate paitan uh hi. Amate tua khua a thet uh ciang a khuathing bup liinglawng a, numei te in, “Hi sia Naomi hi takpi ziam?” ci in au uh hi." 
Ruth1:20 Ama in, “Kei Naomi hong ci heak vun, Marah hong ci tavun, banghang ziam cile Vaanglianbelpa Pathian in ka nuntakna hong haksasak hi." 
Ruth1:21 Hi sung ka nusiat lai in na tam mama ka nei hi, ahihang Topa in bangma ngawl taw hong ciasak kik hi. Topa Vaanglianbelpa in hong puanil zo a, ngimna hong pia zo ahiciang banghangin Naomi hong cici lai nu ziam?” ci in zo hi." 
Ruth1:22 Moab mi a monu Ruth taw Naomi ii hong ciana sia tu a bang ahi hi. Bethlehem hong thet hun lai in mangtaang at hun a kipat laitak ahi hi. 
Ruth2:1 Naomi in a pasal Elimelech ii bangkua sung pan a hau le a thudok khat ahi Boaz a kici mealheak khat nei hi. 
Ruth2:2 Ni khat ni in, Ruth in Naomi munah “Lo sungah hong paisak ta'n a, naseamte kheet ansangh te va khon tong. Na hong seamsak tu mihing khat peuma mu nanak tu khi hi,” ci hi. Naomi in, “Ka tanu awng, va pai ta'n,” ci in zo hi." 
Ruth2:3 Tua ahikom Ruth pai a, naseamte ii nung pan zui in, an a kheet te la hi. Ama ii sepna lo sia Boaz ii lo na hi luilam hi." 
Ruth2:4 Tua zawk tawm vei ciang Bethlehem panin Boaz hong theng a, naseamte paupui in, “ Topa in hong ompui tahen!” ci hi. Amate in, “ Topa in thupha hong pia tahen!” ci uh hi." 
Ruth2:5 Boaz in, naseam uk pa munah “Zia sungah numei khangmoi sia akua ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Ruth2:6 Tua pa in, “Ama sia Moab pan Naomi ii hong ciapui numei sia hi." 
Ruth2:7 Ama in keima munah, naseamte nung pan zui in ansanghte a laak natu in hong ngen hi. Ama in zingsang tuung panin seam zo a, tu mahiat ma in thinglim ah tawmvei tawlnga hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Ruth2:8 Boaz in Ruth munah, “Ngaisutna khat hong piasak ta'n. Hi lo sung simngawl koima dang ah ansangh tawm heak in. Hi sungah numeite taw naseam khawm in;" 
Ruth2:9 amate koisungah la ci in en in, amate taw kithua in. Nang hong vawtsiat ngawl natu in ka mite thupia zo khi hi. Na dangko simin amate dipsa tuibealte sung pan tui dawn in,” ci hi." 
Ruth2:10 Ruth in a maitang lei pha dong kunsuk a Boaz tungah, “Nang a banghang kei huvau hong thinnuammaw mama ni ziam? Banghangin ngamdangmi khat tungah hong dik mama ni ziam?” ci hi." 
Ruth2:11 Boaz in, “Na pasal thi pan kipan na tonupi atu na sep na vawt theampo hong za siat khi hi. Na pa na nu le na ngam nusia in, na heak ngeingawl mite kawm ah teang tu in hong pai na hi sia ka he hi." 
Ruth2:12 Na sepsa na vawtsa tungtaang Topa in thaman hong pia tahen. Ama ii hong pao hong dal tu in Israel te Topa Pathian na belh hu in ama in thaman kicing hong pia tahen!” ci in zo hi. 
Ruth2:13 Ruth in, “Topa awng, nang kei tungah hong dik mama ni hi; Kei na naseamte khat taw zong kikim zo ngawl kasap kamthiam taw nong paupui ciang ka om nuam zaw paih hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Ruth2:14 Anneak hun ciang Boaz in Ruth mun ah, “Hong pai ta'n a, anluum bek khat la in meetui sungah pap in,” ci hi. Tua ahikom ama naseamte taw hong tokhawm a, tuaciang Boaz in an em pawlkhat pia hi. Ama in a kham dong a neak zawkciang a neak vaal pawlkhat nei lai hi." 
Ruth2:15 Ama ansangh tawm lai tu in a pai zawkciang Boaz in naseamte thupia a, “Taangvawngte a kikoina phual dong ma an lasak vun a, anlaak a tawp natu in bangma ci heak vun. Tua bek dom ngawlin taangvawngte pan pawlkhat dok vun a ama top tu in nusiat vun,” ci hi." 
Ruth2:16  
Ruth2:17 Tua hi a Ruth in lo sungah nitak dong ansangh tawm a, tuaciang a cil ciangin kilogramme 10 dektak pha hi." 
Ruth2:18 Ama in a anlaakte khua sungah cia pui in a tonupi a nga za lak hi. A anneak vaal teng zongh a tonupi pia hi. 
Ruth2:19 Naomi in ama munah, “Hiteng theampo koisung pan kaikhawm ni ziam? Akua lo sungah naseam ni ziam? Nang hong kin pa tungah Topa in thupha pia tahen!” ci hi. Tua ahikom Ruth in Naomi munah ama sia Boaz a kici pasal khat ii lo sungah na a sep son hi." 
Ruth2:20 Naomi in, “ Topa in Boaz thupha pia tahen!” ci in au hi. “ Topa in a kamciam sia a nungta lai te le a thisate tung dong ah kholet tawntung hi.” A kampau zom lai a, “Tua pasal sia eima mealheak kuung khat hi a, ei hong kep tu vaipuak a nei khat ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Ruth2:21 Tuasia ciang Ruth in, “A phabel hile, ama in an laak man dong a naseamte taw ansangh tawmin hong sawl sia ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Ruth2:22 Naomi in Ruth mun ah, “Ahi ma hi, ka tanu awng, Boaz lo sungah tua numeite taw nasep khop tu ma phabel tu hi,” ci hi." 
Ruth2:23 Tua hi a, Ruth in mangtaang le zungtaang laak teng a man dong amate taw seam khawmin an kaikhawm hi. Tuaciang ama sia a tonupi taw ma in teang khawm top hi." 
Ruth3:1 Tawmvei zawkciang Naomi in Ruth munah, “Inn tuam taw na om thei natu in pasal khat kong zonsak kul tu hi." 
Ruth3:2 Nangma nasep pui numeite ii Topa Boaz sia ih mealheak ahi hunlam ciamtee in. Tu in hong ngai ta'n. Nitak ciang ama in mangtaang na cil tu hi. 
Ruth3:3 Tua ahikom kibualin a, paaknamtui tawm kinoai in, tuaciang na puan phabel teng silh in. Tua zawkciang ama taang cilna ah va pai ta'n a, ahizong a neak a dawn zawk mateng tua munah na om hunlam hesak heak in." 
Ruth3:4 Ama koi sungah lum ziam pha tak ciamtee in, tuaciang a mut zawkciang a puanvan hawk in a, a khuadop ah lum in. Ama in na ngamtat natu teng hong son tu hi,” ci hi." 
Ruth3:5 Ruth in, “Na ci theampo ka vawt tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Ruth3:6 Tua ahikom Ruth sia ancilna munah pai in, a tonupi sawl bangin ngamta hi." 
Ruth3:7 Boaz sia a neak a dawn zawkciang a om nuam hi. Ama taangvawng lomte omna ah pai in mu nuam in lum hi. Ruth hong pai vadeen a, a puanvan hawkin ama khuadop ah lum hi." 
Ruth3:8 Zan lai in Boaz thakhatin hong khanglo in, kilumheak a, numei khat a khuadop ah a lum mu in lamdang sa hi." 
Ruth3:9 “Nang akua ni ziam?” ci in dongh hi. “Ruth khi hi, Topa awng. Nang sia mealheak kuung khat na hi ciang kei nong et tu vaipuak nei ni hi. Nong hesuakna in hong teenpui ta'n,” ci in zo hi." 
Ruth3:10 “ Topa in nang thupha hong pia tahen. Na tonupi atu na sepna sa te sangin, tu in na ngamtatna taw ih bangkua sungah na thumaanna lian zaw lai hi. A hau a zawng tangval khat po zong thei na hi hang tuabangin zong ngawl ni hi." 
Ruth3:11 Ruth awng tu in, na thinngim heak in. Nong nget theampo vawt tu khi hi; khua sungah a om a kuama theampo in nang sia numei pha khat na hi sia hong he hi." 
Ruth3:12 Kei sia na mealheak kuung khat hi a, nang tungah vaipuak kong nei na in a maan thu hi, ahihang kei sangin a kuung zaw mealheak pasal khat om hi." 
Ruth3:13 Hi sungah zankhuateakin om vet in a, zingsang ciangin tua pa in nang vaipuak hong la tu ziam, hong la ngawl tu ziam ih en tu hi. Vaipuak hong la tu ahile a dik a pha hi, hong la bua ahile a nungta Topa tungah kiciamna vawt hi tong, keima in vaipuak la tu khi hi. Tu in hi sungah zingsang ciang dong lum po in,” ci hi." 
Ruth3:14 Tua ahikom ama in Boaz ii khuadop ah lum top hi, ahizong ama a kimu ngawl natu in khuavak mahiat in tho hi, banghang ziam cile Boaz in ama tualai ah a om sia kuama in a hesak nuam bua hi." 
Ruth3:15 Boaz in ama munah, “Na puantual suut in a, hi sungah pha in,” ci hi. Ama in tuabangin pha a, Boaz in mangtaang kilogramme 20 dektak sun hi, tuaciang a liang ah a puak tu in suanh hi. Tua zawkciang khua sungah a vanh taw ama heak kik hi." 
Ruth3:16 Inn a thet ciang a tonupi in, “Bangbang nong hi ziam? ka tanu awng,” ci in dongh hi. Ruth in Boaz ii ama atu in, a sep a vawtsak theampo son hi." 
Ruth3:17 A son lai na pan, “Nangma kungah khut hawm nguakin kong cia ngawl natu in hi mangtaang teng zongh hong pia hi,” ci hi." 
Ruth3:18 Naomi in ama mun ah, “Tu in na thin sausak in, Ruth awng, hi thu teng koibang ciang hong theng tu ziam na mu dong ngak in. Boaz sia tuni in hi thu a thian mateng om thong ngawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
Ruth4:1 Boaz sia a khua kongpi ah pai in tua kikhopna munah to hi. Tua zawkciang Elimelech ii mealheak naihuaibel, Boaz ii son sia pa hong pai hi, Boaz in ama sam in, “Hi sungah hong pai ta'n, ka lawm pa awng, hong to ta'n,” ci hi. Tuasia ciang ama pai in to hi." 
Ruth4:2 Tua zawkciang Boaz in a khua lampuite sawm zongh samin tua mun ma ah to a sawl hi. 
Ruth4:3 Amate a tosak zawkciang a mealheak pa munah, “Tu in Naomi sia Moab panin hong ciakik a, ih beepa Elimelech neisa a lo sia ama in zuak nuam hi," 
Ruth4:4 tuaciang hi thu na heak uh kul ka sa hi. Na dei le hi sungah a to mite mai ah lei in. Ahi hang na dei buale lei nuam bong ci in, banghang ziam cile lei thei natu thu a nei masabel sia nang hi a, tua zawkciang kei hi pheang khi hi,” ci hi. Tua pa in, “Tuasia lei tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
Ruth4:5 Boaz in, “Pha mama hi, ahizong Naomi kung panin lo na lei le, Moab meingong nu Ruth zongh a lei suak tu ni hi, tuasia ciang bekin a lo sia mithi pa ii bangkua sungah om tu hi,” ci hi." 
Ruth4:6 Tua pasal pa in, “Tuabang thu ahile lo lei theina ka thuneina sia thasua tong, banghang ziam cile ka tate in tua lo lua thei ngawl tu uh hi. Nangma lei in, tuasia kei lei bua zaw tong,” ci in zo hi." 
Ruth4:7 Tua hunlai in, sum kizuak kilei na ahizong, vanh kithena ahizong, kipsak na tu in a zuak pa in peangdap suut in a lei pa tungah a piak sia a ngeina hi. Israel te in hi bangin thukip thukho suaksak hi." 
Ruth4:8 Tua ahikom pasal pa in Boaz mun ah, “Tuasia nangma lei in,” a ci ciang, a peangdap suutin Boaz pia hi." 
Ruth4:9 Tuasia ciang Boaz in lampuite le a om dangte mun ah, “No sia tu ni in Elimelech le a tapate Chilion le Mahlon ii neisa theampo Naomi tung pan ka leina tetti hi siat nu hi." 
Ruth4:10 Tua bek dom ngawlin Mahlon zi meingong nu Moab mi Ruth sia keima zi suak hi. Hi sia in mithi pa bangkua sungah a neisa teng kip tu hi, ama ii innkuan khang zongh a mite sung le a khua sungah kizom tan tu hi. No teng sia hi thu huvau in tetti hi siat nu hi,” ci hi." 
Ruth4:11 Lampuite le a dangte in, “Hi hi, tetti te hi khu hi. Topa in na zi sia Jacob atu ta tam mama a piangsak Rachel le Leah bang hong hisak tahen. Ephrath bee le ngui sungah hau in Bethlehem khua sungah na minthang tahen." 
Ruth4:12 Topa ii hi nupi khangmoi tung pan hong piak tu tate sia Judah le Tamar tapa Perez bangkua bang hong hisak tahen,” ci hi." 
Ruth4:13 Tua ahikom Boaz in Ruth sia a zi tu in ciapui hi. Topa in Ruth thupha pia a, nau hong paai in, tapa khat hong hing hi." 
Ruth4:14 Numei te in Naomi tung ah, “ Topa pok in! Ama in nang hong en kik tu tupa khat tuni hong pia hi. Hi patang sia Israel ah minthang tahen!" 
Ruth4:15 Na monu in nang hong it hi, tuaciang ama in tapa sali sang zongin nang atu tam hong sepsak zo zaw hi. Tuaciang tu in ama in tupa khat hong pia a, tua pa in nang atu nuntakna thak le na huai ciang ngam muanna hong pia tu hi,” ci uh hi." 
Ruth4:16 Naomi in nau sia la in toai bikbek a, pha takin omh hi." 
Ruth4:17 Innpaam nupi te in tua pano min sia Obed phuak uh hi. Amate in ngual mun theampo ah, “Naomi in tapa khat hong nei hi!,” ci uh hi. Obed sia Jesse ii pa suak a, Jesse sia David ii pa hi." 
Ruth4:18 Hiteng sia Perez pan David dong khangsimna ahi hi: Perez, Hezron, Ram, Amminadab, Nahshon, Salmon, Boaz, Obed, Jesse, David ahi hi." 
Ruth4:19  
Ruth4:20  
Ruth4:21  
Ruth4:22  
1Samuel1:1 Ephraim mualtung ngam Ramah khua ah Ephraim nam ahi Elkanah a kici pasal khat om hi. Ama sia Jeroham ii ta, Elihu ii tupa hi a, Tohu baangkua, Zuph bee le phung sung pan ahi hi." 
1Samuel1:2 Elkanah in zi nii nei a, Hannah le Peninnah ahi hi. Peninnah in ta nei ahihang Hannah in nei ngawl hi." 
1Samuel1:3 Kum simin Elkanah sia Topa Vaanglianbelpa bia tu le sangaw biakpiakna vawt tu in Ramah pan Shiloh ah pai hi, tua munah Eli ii tapa nii te Hophni le Phinehas sia Topa ii thiampi seam uh hi." 
1Samuel1:4 Elkanah in sangaw biakpiakna a vawt simin, tel khat Peninnah pia a, tel khat tek sia a tate pia hi." 
1Samuel1:5 Tuaciang ama in Hannah it mama hi napi tel khat bek pia thei hi, banghang ziam cile Topa in ta neisak ngawl hi." 
1Samuel1:6 A kidem pui Peninnah in ama sia nunau zazaan in, a maizum thethei tu in vawt sia hi, banghang ziam cile Topa in Hannah sia ta selsak hi." 
1Samuel1:7 Kum khat zawk kum khat hi bangin papai a; Topa ii inn ah a pai uh simin Peninnah in Hannah a thin lalsak mama ahikom Hannah sia kap a, bangma a ne nuam bua hi." 
1Samuel1:8 A pasal Elkanah in, “Hannah awng, banghangin kap ni ziam? Banghangin an ne nuam ngawl ni ziam? Banghangin hee tawntung ni ziam? Tapa sawm sangin kei sia nang atu manpha zaw hi ngawl khi ziam?” ci in dong hi." 
1Samuel1:9 Ni khat, amate Shiloh khua, Topa inn sungah an a neak zawk uh ciang, Hannah hong dingto hi. Ama sia a thin na sa mama a, kap ngawpin Topa tungah thungen hi. Tua hun sung tengin Eli thiampipa sia ama omna kongkha hui ah to nginge hi." 
1Samuel1:10  
1Samuel1:11 Hannah in a ciliap huai kamciam khat pia hi: Vaanglianbelpa “ Topa awng, na naseamnu hong en ta'n! Ka ngimna hong en ta'n a, hong phawk ta'n! Hong mangil heak in! Tapa khat nong pia le, ama nuntakna buppi nang tungah tuam aap tu in kong kamciam hi, ama in a sam meet ngeingawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel1:12 Hannah in Topa tungah hun saupi sung thungen top a, tuaciang Eli in ama ii muk en hi." 
1Samuel1:13 Ama sia a thimthamin thungen hi; a muk phun ahihang a aw suaksak ngawl hi. Tua ahikom Eli in ama sapittui kham hi tu in um hi," 
1Samuel1:14 tuaciang ama munah, “Na zukham ngamtatna teng tawp in! Zu ne nawn heak in a, na zu neak tawp in!” ci hi." 
1Samuel1:15 Ama in, “Hi ngawl khi hi, kei zu kham hi ngawl khi hi, topa awng, zu ne sa in om ngawl khi hi! A cimaw ka hi hi, thu ngengen in ka ngimna teng Topa tungah sung khi hi." 
1Samuel1:16 Nupi mannung ngawl hong sa heak in. Lungmang mama ka hikom hi bangin thu ngengen khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
1Samuel1:17 “Thinnuam in va pai ta'n, Israel te ii Pathian in na nget teng hong pia tahen,” Eli in ci hi." 
1Samuel1:18 “A tawntungin cikna thiamna taw kei hong phawk ta'n,” ama in ci hi. Tuasia zawkciang an tawm ne in paikhia a, a khuangai nawn bua hi." 
1Samuel1:19 A zingsang kik ciang Elkanah le a innkuanpuite tho pal in, Topa a biak zawk uh ciang Ramah khua ah ciakik uh hi. Elkanah in a zi Hannah ompui a, Topa in a zi thungetna zo hi." 
1Samuel1:20 Tuabangin ama naungil om a, tapa khat hing hi. Ama in a min Samuel phuak a, “Ama sia Topa tung pan ka nget hi” a cina ahi hi." 
1Samuel1:21 Elkanah le a innkuanpuite Shiloh ah pai in Topa tungah kum sim sangaw biakpiakna le a kamciam tuam sangaw biakpiakna a piak tu hun hong cing kik hi. 
1Samuel1:22 Ahihang tusia hunin Hannah hong pai bua hi. Ama in a pasal munah, “Nau in noai a ten po ciang a nuntak sung teng a om natu in Topa inn ah ka paipui tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel1:23 Elkanah in zo kik a, “Pha hi, phabel na sak bangin vawt in; nau noai na tensak dong inn ah om in. Tuaciang Topa in na kamciam hong taangtungsak hen,” ci hi. Tua ahikom Hannah sia inn ah om a, a nau keam hi." 
1Samuel1:24 Ama in nau noai a tensak zawkciang Shiloh ah paipui a, kum thum a pha khuital khat, anvui kilogramme 10 le savun ip sungah sapittui a dim keng hi. Ama in Samuel sia moi mama ahihang Topa inn Shiloh ah paipui hi." 
1Samuel1:25 Amate in khuital a ngaw zawkciang nauno sia Eli kungah paipui uh hi. 
1Samuel1:26 Hannah in ama munah, “Topa awng hong ngai zii ta'n. Kei nong ciamtee lai ziam? Kei sia hi munah dingin Topa tungah thu a ngengen nong mu numei sia khi hi." 
1Samuel1:27 Hi patang sia ama munah ka ngen a, ka nget bangin hong pia hi." 
1Samuel1:28 Tua ahikom Topa tungah ama aaptuam khi hi. A nuntak lai theampo ama sia Topa neisa suak tu hi,” ci hi. Tua zawkciang amate in tua munah Topa bia uh hi." 
1Samuel2:1 Hannah in hi bangin thungen hi: “ Topa in ka lungtang sia lungdamna taw hong dimh hi; Ama ii sepna sate hu in bangza in ka lungdam ziam! Ka ngalte ka nuisan hi; Pathian in hong hu ahikom bangza in ka thinnuam ziam! 
1Samuel2:2 “ Topa bangin a thiangtho kuama om ngawl hi; Ama taw a kibang kuama om ngawl hi, Ih Pathian bangin hong dal kuama om ngawl hi." 
1Samuel2:3 Na kisuantaak vazakna uh teng kheal vun; Na kiphatsak kampaute thimsak vun. Banghang ziam cile Topa sia a he a tel Pathian hi a, mihingte sepna vawtna theampo tungah thu khen hi." 
1Samuel2:4 Ngalkap thahat te ii thalte taltan a, ahihang a thazawmte thahat tawto hi." 
1Samuel2:5 Khatvei lai in pha takin a kivaakte, tu in an thalaw bek a, ngual cial sa in om hi, ahihang a ngilkialte sia kial nawn ngawl hi. Tasel zi sia ta sali hong nei hi, ahihang ta tam mama te ii nu kungah kuama a taang nawn bua hi." 
1Samuel2:6 Topa in thatlum a, tuaciang nungtasak kik hi; ama in mihingte sia mithi khua ah puak hi, tuaciangin heakpui kik hi." 
1Samuel2:7 Ama in mihing pawlkhat zawngkhalsak a, pawlkhat hausak hi; pawlkhat sia ama in kiniamkhiaksak a, pawlkhat liansak hi." 
1Samuel2:8 Ama in mizawngte leivui panin laamto a, a kitasamhte a lungmanna panin phongto hi. Amate sia kumpipa tapate taw kithawlsakin, ki upat vawtna munah koi hi. Simlei ii phungkawng sia Topa aa hi; tuate ii tungah ama in leitung sato hi." 
1Samuel2:9 “Ama in a thumaan a mite ii nuntakna dal hi, ahihang a seksolte sia khuazing sungah mang hi; mihing khat in ama hantang tha ngum hatna taw mualsuak zo ngawl hi." 
1Samuel2:10 Topa ii ngalte sia kisusia cip tu hi; Topa in amate vantung panin vanto bangin langpan tu hi. Topa in leitung buppi thu hong khen tu hi; ama in a kumpipa tungah vaangletna pia tu hi, ama ii teal kumpipa in zosak tu hi." 
1Samuel2:11 Tua zawkciang Elkanah sia Ramah ah cia kik hi, ahihang Samuel patangno sia Shiloh ah taang a, thiampi Eli khutnuai ah Topa naseam hi." 
1Samuel2:12 Eli ii tapate sia mihing phelphol vive hi. Amate in Topa a awlmaw bua uh hi," 
1Samuel2:13 tua bek dom ngawlin thiampite ii mipite tung pan a nget thei tu te a nadon bua uh hi. Tua taangin mihing khat ii sangaw biakpiakna a om ciangin thiampi pa ii naseampa in kaa thum nei thiktung zum khat taw hong pai uh hi. A sa a kihuan saan laitakin 
1Samuel2:14 ama in beal sungah a thiktung kaa taw sun a, a laak po sia thiampipa ii neisa ahi hi. Shiloh ah sangaw biakpiakna pia tu in hong pai Israel mite theampo sia hi bangin kivawt hi." 
1Samuel2:15 Tua banah ngan thau hoai in a kihal ma in, thiampipa ii naseampa hong pai a, sangaw biakpiakna a pia pa munah, “Sa pawlkhat thiampipa em tu hong pia ta'n; ama in na sa huansa hong saang ngawl tu hi, sasial bek dei hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel2:16 Tua pa in, “A maan bangin ngamta tawng, a thau hal phot tawng; tua zawkciang na dei po la in,” ci in a zo ciang, “Hi ngawl hi! tu ma in hong pia ta'n! Nong pia buale zawthawk thu taw la tu khi hi!” thiampipa ii naseampa in ci tu hi." 
1Samuel2:17 Hi bangin Eli ii tapate mawna sia Topa muna ah nasia leih hi, banghang ziam cile amate in Topa tungah biakpiaknate tuabangin simmawk vawt uh hi." 
1Samuel2:18 Tua hun sungin patang Samuel sia puanneal kawngsawm thiangtho khat taw Topa na seam hi. 
1Samuel2:19 A nu in a pasal ii kum sim sangaw biakpiakna a vawt simin a pai khop uh ciangin, puantual khat veu ama atu in khuisak a, puak hi." 
1Samuel2:20 Tua hun ciang Eli in Elkanah le a zi thupha pia a, Elkanah munah, “ Topa atu na piaktuam na tapa taangin hi numei nu tung panin ta dangte zongh hong pia tahen,” ci hi. Tua zawkciang amate inn ah cia kik uh hi." 
1Samuel2:21 Topa in Hannah sia thupha pia takpi a, tapa thum le tanu nii nei thua hi. Patang Samuel sia Topa na a sepna sungah khangto hi." 
1Samuel2:22 Tu in Eli sia huai mama zo hi. Ama in a tate ii Israel mite tungah a ngamtatna theampo zaza a, Topa ompuina Puanbuk kongbiang a na a seam numeite ngawngawn luppui uh hi, ci in za hi." 
1Samuel2:23 Tua ahikom amate munah, “Banghangin hi bangte vawt nu ziam? Mihing theampo in siatna na vawt uhte hong son hi." 
1Samuel2:24 Kheal vun, ka tate awng! Hi thu sia a lipkhaphuai mama in Topa mite ii son ahi hi!" 
1Samuel2:25 Mihing khat in midang khat tungah a maw le Pathian in sungsia thei hi, ahihang Topa tungah a mawte sia akua in sungsia thei tu ziam?” ci hi. Ahihang amate in a pa thu a ni bua uh hi, tua ahikom Topa in amate thalup tu in khensat zo hi." 
1Samuel2:26 Patang Samuel sia hong khang tawto a, Topa le mihingte mai ah maipha nga hi." 
1Samuel2:27 Topa kung pan hi thu puak in kamsaang khat Eli kungah hong pai hi: “Na taanghpupi Aaron le innkuanpuite Egypt kumpipa salin a om lai in, Aaron tungah keima ka kilaak hi." 
1Samuel2:28 Israel minam theampo ii sung pan keima thiampi tu, biaknatau ah a seam tu, ngimnamtui hal tu, ephod silh a, keima thu hong dongh tu in amate innkuan ka teal hi. Tuaciangin biaknatau tungah a kihal sangaw biakpiakna te tel khat sia amate tan thei natu thu ka pia hi." 
1Samuel2:29 Tua hikasap ka mite tung pan, ka nget biakpiaknate le sangaw biakpiaknate banghang duhopna thin taw en ni ziam? Eli awng, ka mite ii kei tungah hong piak sangaw biakpiakna theampo pan sabak phabel teng taw na tate a thau dong amate le amate na kivaaksakna taw banghangin kei sangin na tate upat vawt zaw ni ziam?" 
1Samuel2:30 Keima, Israel te ii Topa Pathian in na innkuan le na phung sia keima thiampi seam tawntung tu hi, ci in a bosa hun sungah kamciam ka pia hi. Ahihang tu ahile kong cina pan, tuasia len nawn ngawl khi hi! Tua sangin kei hong patoai te ka patoai tu a, kei hong simmaw te ka ngaimawk vawt tu hi." 
1Samuel2:31 Ngai in, na bangkua sungah kuama a khanhaam in a nuntak ngawl natu, na bee na ngui sungah tangval khangmoi teng ka thalup siat tu hun hong theng tu hi." 
1Samuel2:32 Nangma in ngim na nga tu a, Israel midangte thupha ka piakte na eang tu hi, ahihang na bangkua sungah kuama a khanhaam dong a nungta buatu hi." 
1Samuel2:33 Ahitazong na suan na paalte khat sia keamin ka nungtasak tu a, thiampi in ka na seam tu hi. Ahihang ama sia a mittaw in, a lam etna theampo bo tu hi, tuaciang na suan na paal theampo sia thi ngamh in thi tu hi." 
1Samuel2:34 Na tapate nii Hophni le Phinehas, ni khat thu in hong thi khop ciang kong son teng tung hi ci in hong lak tu hi." 
1Samuel2:35 Vawt le ka oai theampo vawt a, kei tungah hong thumaan tu thiampi dang khat ka teal tu hi. Ama sia suan le paal ka pia tu a, amate in ka teal kumpipa omna ah seam tawntung tu uh hi." 
1Samuel2:36 Na suan na paal sung pan a luhai lai te in tua thiampipa kungah pai in sum le anneak tu ngen tu a, tuaciang a neak tawm tu a zonna in thiampite nasep a hu thei natu in ngen tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel3:1 Tua hun lai, patang Samuel in Eli ii lamlakna bang a Topa atu a sep lai in, Topa tung pan thu hong pai sia tawm mama hi, tuaciang mang muna te tam ngawl hi." 
1Samuel3:2 Tu in a mit a taw cip dektak Eli sia, zan khat, ama inndoi sungah mu in om hi;" 
1Samuel3:3 Samuel sia Thuciamna Thingkuang thiangtho omna biakpiakna munah mu in om hi. Khuavak ma, meiinn a taan laitak ma in," 
1Samuel3:4 Topa in Samuel sam hi. Ama in “Hi sungah om ing, topa!” ci in zo hi," 
1Samuel3:5 tuaciang Eli kungah tai a, “Kei nong sap sia, hi sung ma ah om khi hi,” ci hi. Ahihang Eli in zo a, “Nang hong sam ngawl khi hi; lum kik ta'n,” ci hi. Tua ahikom Samuel sia a lupna zuan kik hi." 
1Samuel3:6 Topa in Samuel sam kik hi. Patangpa in Topa ahi hunlam a he bua hi, banghang ziam cile tua masia in Topa in ama a paupui ngei bua hi. Tua ahikom ama tho in Eli kungah pai a, “Nong sap sia hi sungah om khi hi,” ci hi. Ahihang Eli in, “Ka tapa awng, hong sam ngawl khi hi; lum kik ta'n,” ci hi." 
1Samuel3:7  
1Samuel3:8 Topa in Samuel sia a thum veina sam hi; ama tho a, Eli kungah pai in, “Nong sap sia, hi sungah om khi hi,” ci hi. Tuasia ciang Eli in patang a sam sia Topa ahi hunlam phawk hi." 
1Samuel3:9 tua ahikom ama munah, “Lupna zuan kik ta'n; tuaciang ama in hong sam kik le hi bangin ci in, ‘ Topa awng pau in, na naseampa in hong ngai khi hi,’ ci ta'n,” ci hi. Tua ahikom Samuel sia lupna zuan kik hi." 
1Samuel3:10 Topa hong pai a tua munah dingin, a masa bangma in sam kik a, “Samuel! Samuel!” ci hi. Samuel in zo a, “Hong paupui ta'n; na naseampa in hong ngai khi hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel3:11 Topa in ama munah, “Ni khat ni ciang Israel mite tungah a lauhuai mama khat ka vawt tu a, a za peuma lau ngawp tu hi." 
1Samuel3:12 Tua ni in Eli innkuante ka tawnna theampo a kipat pan a tawp dong ka tungsak tu hi. 
1Samuel3:13 Ama munah a bangkua sia a tawntung daan ka piak tu son zo khi hi, banghang ziam cile a tapate kei hong langpanin kamsia pau uh hi. Eli in hite sia he nginge ahihang tho ngawl hi." 
1Samuel3:14 Tua ahikom Eli ii bangkua tungah sangaw biakpiakna ahizong, piakkhiatna ahizong bangma in, hi a lipkhaphuai mama mawna taw a kizui a piang tu te pengsak zo ngawl tu hi ci in ciliap huai takin ka taangko hi." 
1Samuel3:15 Samuel sia zingsang dong lupna tungah om hi; tua zawkciang tho in, Topa inn kongkha hong hi. A mangmuna huvau Eli tungah a son tu sia lau hi." 
1Samuel3:16 Eli in, “Samuel, ka patangpa awng!” ci in sam hi. “Om khi hi, topa” ci in Samuel in zo hi." 
1Samuel3:17 Eli in, “ Topa in bang hong son ziam?” ci in dongh hi. “Kei tungah bangma hong iim heak in. Hong son theampo nong son buale Pathian in nasia takin daan hong pia tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel3:18 Tua ahikom Samuel in ama tungah na theampo son a, bangma kheet a nei bua hi. Eli in, “Ama sia Topa hi; phabel a sak bangin ama in seam tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel3:19 Samuel hong khan ciang Topa sia ama taw omkhawm a, Samuel ii son teng a vekpi in taangtungsak hi." 
1Samuel3:20 Tua ahikom Israel mi theampo, a ngam mong pan a mong khat dongin, Samuel sia Topa kamsaang takpi hi ci in he uh hi." 
1Samuel3:21 Topa in ama le ama sia Shiloh ah a kizomin Samuel tungah hong kilaak a, paupui hi. Tuaciang Samuel ii a pau ciang, Israel theampo in ngai uh hi." 
1Samuel4:1 Tua hun laitakin Philistine te in Israel sim tu in kikaikhawm ahikom Israel te sia amate do tu in kuan uh hi. Israel te in Ebenezer ah, Philistine te in Aphek ah ngiaphual saat uh hi." 
1Samuel4:2 Philistine te in simin, a nasia mama in a kido zawk uh ciang Israel te zo a, ngalphual ah mihing 4,000 bang that uh hi." 
1Samuel4:3 A thimong teng ngiaphual hong thet kik uh ciangin Israel lampuite in, “Banghangin Topa in tuni in ei hong lelsak ziam? Topa ei taw tonkhawmin ih ngalte khut pan hong hut natu in Shiloh ah pai in Topa ii Thuciamna Thingkuang va la tawng,” ci uh hi." 
1Samuel4:4 Tua ahikom amate in kamtaite Shiloh ah paisak a, tha nei cherubim te ii tungah kumpi in a maang Vaanglianbelpa Topa ii Thuciamna Thingkuang sia lasak hi. Tuaciang Eli ii tapate nii Hophni le Phinehas te Thuciamna Thingkuang taw hong ton uh hi." 
1Samuel4:5 Thuciamna Thingkuang hong thet ciangin Israel te nasia takin lungdamna taw au ahi uh ciang, lei liing liang hi." 
1Samuel4:6 Philistine te in a au uh za in, “Hebrew te ngiaphual ah a auna ngai vun! A khiakna bang ziam?” ci uh hi. Topa ii Thuciamna Thingkuang sia Hebrew ngiaphual ah a thet a heak uh ciang," 
1Samuel4:7 amate lau in, “Pathian khat amate ngiaphual theng hi! Eite mansa hi hing! Tu ma sia in hi bang peuma piang ngeingawl hi!" 
1Samuel4:8 Tua a vaangnei pathiante tung pan ei akua in hong hun zo tu ziam? Tua pathiante sia sennealngam sungah Egypt te a monte ahi hi! 
1Samuel4:9 Hang vun, Philistine te awng! Pasal bangin do vun, tua ahibuale amate eima sila ahi bangma, amate ii sila ih suak tu hi. Tua ahikom pasal bangin do vun!” kici uh hi." 
1Samuel4:10 Philistine te in nasia takin do in, Israel te zo uh a, amate sia a inn zuanin tai uh hi. Nasia takin kithalupna om a: Israel ngalkapte 30,000 thi uh hi." 
1Samuel4:11 Pathian ii Thuciamna Thingkuang matsak a, Eli tapate Hophni le Phinehas te ngeal thatlum hi." 
1Samuel4:12 Benjamin namte pasal khat ngalphual panin Shiloh ah tai vingveng a, hong ni tut hi. A khuangaina lianpi a lak natu in a puansilhte hong eaukeak a, a lu tungah leivui koi hi." 
1Samuel4:13 Thuciamna Thingkuang atu a thinngim mama Eli sia lampi hui tokhum tungah to in mun khat salh nginge hi. Pasal pa in khuasung bup ah thu thangsak a, a kuama theampo in lau in au keak uh hi." 
1Samuel4:14 Eli in ngamlumna aw za in donghsak hi. “Hi ngamlumna aw sia bang thu ziam?” ci hi. Eli kungah a thuson tu in tua pa manlang takin hong pai hi. 
1Samuel4:15 (Eli sia tu in kum 98 pha in a mittaw cip dek tak zo hi.) 
1Samuel4:16 Pasal pa in, “Kei ngal kisimna pan suakta in, tuni in hisung dong lam tawntung kong tai hi,” ci hi. Eli in ama dongh a, “Bang thu piang ziam, ka tapa awng?” ci hi." 
1Samuel4:17 Kamtai pa in, “Israel te sia Philistine te mai pan taikeak hi; ei atu a nasia mama lelna hi! Tua banah na tapate nii Hophni le Phinehas sia hong thalupsak hi, tuaciang Pathian ii Thuciamna Thingkuang hong kimatsak hi!” ci hi." 
1Samuel4:18 Pasal pa ii Thuciamna Thingkuang thu a son ciang, kongpi hui a tona pan Eli thalpu hi. Ama huai mama a, thau si ahikom a puksukna in a ngawng tal a, thi hi. Ama sia Israel ah kum 40 lampui seam hi." 
1Samuel4:19 Eli monu, Phinehas ii zi sia naungil om in nausua tu hun theng dektak hi. Pathian ii Thuciamna Thingkuang kiman a, a topasal le a pasal thina thu a zaak ciang thakhat thu in a nau tun in ta nei hi." 
1Samuel4:20 Ama a thi nai tu ciang ama a hu numei sia in, “Na thinliansak in! Tapa khat nei ni hi!” ci hi. Ahihang ama in nangai ngawlin, a zo bua hi." 
1Samuel4:21 Ama in a tapa min sia Ichabod phuak hi, a khiakna sia, “Pathian ii vaangletna in Israel nusia zo,” a cina hi, Thuciamna Thingkuang kimatna le a topasal le a pasal thina teng kilhtua in a phua khop ahi hi." 
1Samuel4:22 Ama in, “Pathian ii vaangletna in Israel nusia zo hi, banghang ziam cile Pathian ii Thuciamna Thingkuang sia hong kimatsak hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel5:1 Philistine te in Thuciamna Thingkuang a matsak zawkciang, Ebenezer panin amate khuapi Ashdod ah pua uh a," 
1Samuel5:2 amate ii Dagon pathian biakinn sungah tumpui in, a milim hui ah koi uh hi." 
1Samuel5:3 A zing ciang zingtuungin Ashdod mite ii milim sia Thuciamna Thingkuang mai lei ah lutu in a puk mu uh hi. Tua ahikom amate in phongto in a omna ngei ah koi kik uh hi. 
1Samuel5:4 A zing kik ciang zingtuungin amate in a milim sia Topa Thuciamna Thingkuang mai ah a pukin mu kik uh hi. Tusia ciang a lu le a khutte nii taltan in kongbiang ah liik a; a pumpi bekma kinusia hi. 
1Samuel5:5 (Tua hu in tuni dong ma Dagon thiampite le Ashdod a biakpiakna a vawt mite theampo in tua mun sia a pai ngei bangin pai ngawlin kan valian uh hi.) 
1Samuel5:6 Topa in Ashdod mite sia nasia takin daan pia a, lausak ngawp hi. Amate le a kiim a paam a om mite sia Topa in daan pia a, meima pui veu veisak hi." 
1Samuel5:7 Amate in tua thupiangte a mu uh ciang, “Israel ii Pathian in ei le ih Dagon pathian daan hong pia hi. Thuciamna Thingkuang sia hi lai ei kungah ki omsak thei nawn ngawl tu hi,” ci uh hi." 
1Samuel5:8 Tua ahikom a kamtai te in Philistine kumpi nga teng samsak a, “Israel ii Pathian ii Thuciamna Thingkuang sia bang law tu hi ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi. Amate in, “Tuasia Gath ah paipui tavun,” ci in zo uh hi; tua ahikom amate in Philistine khuapi dang khat ahi Gath ah paipui uh hi." 
1Samuel5:9 Ahihang tuasung a thet ciang Topa in tua khuapi zongh daan ma pia a, patauna nasia takin om hi. Khuapi sungah mihing theampo, a huai a khang a kibangin meima pui veisak hi." 
1Samuel5:10 Tua ahikom amate in Thuciamna Thingkuang sia Ekron a kici Philistine te khuapi dang khat ah puak uh hi; ahihang tuasung a thet ciang, mihingte au keak in, “Israel te ii Pathian ii Thuciamna Thingkuang sia amate in ei theampo hong thalup natu in hi sung hong then hi!” ci uh hi." 
1Samuel5:11 Tua ahikom Philistine kumpite theampo sam kikin, “Israel ii Thuciamna Thingkuang sia, ei le ih innkuanpuite hong thalup ngawl natu in, a omna ngei ah puak kik tavun,” ci uh hi. Pathian in amate nasia takin daan pia ahikom khuapi sung bup ah patauna om hi." 
1Samuel5:12 A thi ngawlte zongh meimapui vei ahikom mipite in amate ii pathiante munah hu ngenin au uh hi. 
1Samuel6:1 Philistia ngam ah Thuciamna Thingkuang tha sali a om zawkciang," 
1Samuel6:2 mipite in thiampite le mitbum he te sam in, “ Topa ii Thuciamna Thingkuang sia bang law tu hi ziam? A omna ngei ah puak kik tu ih hile, bang taw tha tu hi ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi." 
1Samuel6:3 Amate in, “Israel te ii Pathian ii Thuciamna Thingkuang na heak kiksak tu uh le na mawphel natu uh in ama atu letsong khat taw na kikopsak uh kul tu hi. Thuciamna Thingkuang sia letsong khat ngawl taw heak kik thei ngawl het tu hi. Tuabang taw in note na dam tu uh a, banghangin ama in no daan hong pia tawntung ziam ci sia na he tu uh hi,” ci uh hi." 
1Samuel6:4 “Ama bang letsong pia tu hi ziam?” ci in mite in dongh uh hi. Amate in zo kik a, “Khamh taw a kivawt meimapui lim nga le Philistine kumpi khat sim atu khamh sanchiim lim nga hi tu hi. Ngimna lianpi sia a kibangin no theampo tung le kumpi nga teng tungah hong tung hi." 
1Samuel6:5 Na ngam buppi ah ngim hong pia meimapui le sanchiim lim te vawt hamtang in Israel te ii Pathian sia upat vawt nanak tu nu hi. Tua hile ama in noma, na pathian te le na ngam daan hong piakna tawp tha tu hi." 
1Samuel6:6 Egypt kumpipa le Egypt mite bangin banghangin na thinpuisak tu nu ziam? Israel mite ii Egypt a nusiat mateng Pathian in Egypt te a mawmaw bangin a vawt sia ciamtee vun. 
1Samuel6:7 Tua ahikom leang thak khat vawt vun a, kanhak a kibul ngeingawl khuipui nii la in, leang ah thua vun, a khuinote sia khuibuk sungah beng kik vun." 
1Samuel6:8 Topa ii Thuciamna Thingkuang la in, leang tungah suan vun, tuaciang na mawna phelna in letsong na piak tu uh, khamh lim note sia thingkuang dang khat sungah heangin tuasia kungah koi vun. Khuileang a pai natu lampi ah ama thuthu in a pai natu in kipansak vun." 
1Samuel6:9 Tua zawkciang a paina en vun; Beth Shemesh sang a zuan le Israel te ii Pathian in hi a kiitakhuai tuasiatna hong puak hi, a cina hi. Tuabang a zuan buale, ngimnate sia ama ii hong puak hi ngawl a; a luilamna in a piang hi bek hi, ci in ih he tu hi,” ci uh hi." 
1Samuel6:10 Amate in a kisawl bangin ngamta uh hi: amate in khuipui nii la in leang ah thua uh a, khuinote sia khuibuk sungah khumcip uh hi." 
1Samuel6:11 Amate in Thuciamna Thingkuang sia meimapui le sanchiim limte a kikoina thingkuang taw leang tungah koi khawm uh hi. 
1Samuel6:12 Khuikaap in Beth Shemesh paina sang zuan tu in kipan in, tua khua sangah tangtan in pai a, lam a pial bua hi. Tuate sia a pai kawmin haam uh hi. Philistine kumpi nga teng in Beth Shemesh ngamngi dong zui uh hi." 
1Samuel6:13 Beth Shemesh khua mite, kuam sungah zungtaang at in a om laitak, thakhat thu in a etto uh le Thuciamna Thingkuang mu uh hi. Amate in a mu ciangin lungdam leilam uh hi." 
1Samuel6:14 Beth Shemesh khua ah a teang Joshua a kici pasal khat ii lo sungah a leang pai a, suangpi khat ii hui ah tawlnga hi. Mite in leang sia sem tham a, khuipuite ngoin, Topa tungah meihal sangaw biakpiakna in nei uh hi." 
1Samuel6:14 Beth Shemesh khua ah a teang Joshua a kici pasal khat ii lo sungah a leang pai a, suangpi khat ii hui ah tawlnga hi. Mite in leang sia sem tham a, khuipuite ngoin, Topa tungah meihal sangaw biakpiakna in nei uh hi." 
1Samuel6:15 Levi te in Topa ii Thuciamna Thingkuang le khamh limnote a kikoi thingkuang sia laamto in, suangpi lian sia tungah koi uh hi. Tua zawkciang Beth Shemesh khua mite in meihal sangaw biakpiakna le a dang sangaw biakpiakna te Topa tungah vawt uh hi." 
1Samuel6:16 Philistine kumpi nga teng in hisia en uh a, tua zawkciang tua ni ma in Ekron ah cia kik uh hi." 
1Samuel6:17 Philistine mite in a khuapi ngate Ashdod, Gaza, Ashkelon, Gath, le Ekron te atu in khua khat ah khat tek a khamh meima pui nga sia Topa tungah mawphel natu in pia uh hi." 
1Samuel6:18 Philistine kumpi ngate ii uk ahi a ki uum khuate hikale, a ki uum ngawl khuanote hikale khuapi sim atu in khamh sanchiim lim khat tek zongh pia si hi. Topa ii Thuciamna Thingkuang koina Beth Shemesh khua mi Joshua lo sungah a om tua suangpi sia tualai ah a piang thu te ii tetti in tuni dongin om lai hi." 
1Samuel6:18 Philistine kumpi ngate ii uk ahi a ki uum khuate hikale, a ki uum ngawl khuanote hikale khuapi sim atu in khamh sanchiim lim khat tek zongh pia si hi. Topa ii Thuciamna Thingkuang koina Beth Shemesh khua mi Joshua lo sungah a om tua suangpi sia tualai ah a piang thu te ii tetti in tuni dongin om lai hi." 
1Samuel6:19 Thuciamna Thingkuang sungsang a et hu in Beth Shemesh khua mite 70 Topa in thatlum hi. Tuaciang Topa in tuabangin nasia tak thalupna a thuaksak hu in mipite khuangai in tau uh hi. 
1Samuel6:20 Tua ahikom Beth Shemesh mite in, “Hi a thiangtho Pathian, Topa mai ah akua peuma dingtang zo tu hi ziam? Ei taw a kikhuala thei natu in ama koisungah puak tu hi ziam?” ci uh hi." 
1Samuel6:21 Amate in kamtaite paisak a, Kiriath Jearim mite munah, “Philistine te in Topa Thuciamna Thingkuang hong heaksak kik zo hi. Hong paisuk tavun a, tua vun,” ci uh hi." 
1Samuel7:1 Tua ahikom Kiriath Jearim mite in Topa Thuciamna Thingkuang sia la in, mualtung a teang Abinadab a kici pasal khat ii inn ah tun uh hi. Amate in a tapa Eleazar sia a keam tu in thiansua uh hi." 
1Samuel7:2 Topa ii Thuciamna Thingkuang sia Kiriath Jearim ah khuangeipi om a, kum kul bang om hi. Hisia hun sung tawntung Israel te theampo in Topa tungah hu ngen in au uh hi." 
1Samuel7:3 Samuel in Israel mite munah, “Na thinsung theampo taw Topa sangah na kihei tu uh le, ngamdang pathiante le Astarte numeipathian ii limte na vawk siat uh kul tu hi. Topa tungah noma le noma kipum aapna nei vun a, ama bek bia vun, tuaciang ama in Philistine te khut sung pan hong suatak tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel7:4 Tua ahikom Israel mite in Baal le Astarte ii milim theampo vawkin Topa bek bia uh hi. 
1Samuel7:5 Tua zawkciang Samuel in Israel te theampo Mizpah ah kisitua tu in sam a, hi bangin ci hi, “Tua munah no atu in Topa tungah thu ka ngen tu hi.”" 
1Samuel7:6 Tua ahikom amate theampo Mizpah ah kikhawm uh hi. Amate in tui tawm toai a, Topa biakpiakna in tua tui sung in, tua ni bup an tang uh hi. Amate in, “ Topa tungah maw zo khu hi,” ci uh hi. (Israel mite sungah kamtam kinialnate Samuel ii a khensakna mun sia Mizpah ahi hi.)" 
1Samuel7:7 Israel te Mizpah ah kikhawm zo hi ci in Philistine te in a zaak ciang a kumpipa nga teng in a mite taw amate sim tu in kuan uh hi. Israel te in tua thu za in lau uh a," 
1Samuel7:8 tuaciang Samuel munah, “Philistine te kung pan hong hut natu Topa ih Pathian tungah thu ngen tawntung in,” ci uh hi." 
1Samuel7:9 Samuel in tuuno khat ngoin, a bupin hal a, Topa tungah sangaw biakpiakna nei hi. Tua zawkciang ama in Topa ii Israel te a hu natu thungen a, tuaciang Topa in a thungetna zo hi." 
1Samuel7:10 Samuel in sangaw biakpiakna a vawt laitakin, Philistine te in a sim tu in mai hong kaa uh hi; ahizong tuasia po ciang Topa in vantung panin amate tungah vanto keaksak hi. Amate sia a lungmang cip a, patau in tai uh hi." 
1Samuel7:11 Israel te kuan in Mizpah pan Bethcar a thet dektak dong, Philistine te zuizen a, lampi ah thathat uh hi." 
1Samuel7:12 Tua zawkciang Samuel in suangtum khat la in Mizpah le Shen kilaklaw ah phut in, “ Topa in lam tawntung hong hu hi” ci in a min sia “Huna Suangpi” (Ebenezer) vaw hi." 
1Samuel7:13 Tuabangin Philistine te in lel a, Samuel nuntak lai teng Israel ngam a sim tu Topa in khaam hi." 
1Samuel7:14 Ekron le Gath kilak law Philistine te ii a laak khuapi teng Israel te kipia kik ahiciang Israel te in a ngam theampo nga kik hi. Tuaciang Israel te le Canaan mite sung zongh ah ngal kilemna om hi. 
1Samuel7:15 Samuel in a nuntak lai teng Israel te uk hi. 
1Samuel7:16 Kum simin ama in Bethel, Gilgal, le Mizpah ah paikot in hi munte ah kamtam kinialnate thu khensak hi." 
1Samuel7:17 Tua zawkciang ama sia Ramah ah cia kik in, tua munah thukhenmang seam hi. Ramah ah Topa atu biaknatau khat saa hi." 
1Samuel8:1 Samuel a huai ciangin, a tapate Israel thukhenmang seamsak hi." 
1Samuel8:2 A u min sia Joel hi a, a nau zaw sia Abijah hi; amate sia Beersheba ah thukhen hi." 
1Samuel8:2 A u min sia Joel hi a, a nau zaw sia Abijah hi; amate sia Beersheba ah thukhen hi." 
1Samuel8:3 Ahihang amate in a pa nasep bangin a seam bua uh hi; amate in sum vawt tu bek kin ahikom, sumnguk ne in thumaan thutang taw thu a khen bua uh hi." 
1Samuel8:4 Tuasia ciang Israel lampui theampo kikhawmtua in, Ramah ah a om Samuel kungah pai a," 
1Samuel8:5 “En in, nang sia haam vaial zo a, tuaciang na tate sia nang sul hong zui ngawl hi. Tuabang ahikom ngamdangte ii nei bangin, ko hong uk tu kumpipa khat hong tealsak ta'n,” ci hi." 
1Samuel8:6 Samuel sia amate ii kumpipa khat a ngetna huvau lungkim ngawl hi; tua ahikom ama in Topa tungah thungen hi," 
1Samuel8:7 tuaciang Topa in, “Mipite ii nang tungah hong son theampo ngai in. Amate ii nial sia nang hi ngawl ni hi; keima sia a kumpipa ka hina hong nial hi." 
1Samuel8:8 Egypt panin amate ka pusua pui pan kipan, amate in kei hong nusia in pathian dangte bia uh hi; kei tungah hong vawt tawntung teng tu in nang tungah hong vawt hi." 
1Samuel8:9 Tuabang ahikom, amate thu ngai in a, ahizong a kumpipate in amate bangbangin vawt tu ziam ci sia a kidop khol natu a pha tatakin son in,” ci hi." 
1Samuel8:10 Samuel in kumpipa khat a ngen mipite tungah, Topa ii ama tungah a ci teng son siat hi." 
1Samuel8:11 Samuel in, “Hisia in na kumpipa ii no hong vawt tu dan ahi hi. Ama in na tapate ngalkap suaksak tu hi; pawlkhat sia a siphu ngalleang te uksak tu hi, a dangte sia siphu ngalkap suaksak tu a, tuaciang pawlkhat sia siphu ngalleangte ii mai ah taisak tu hi." 
1Samuel8:12 Ama in pawlkhat te sia mihing tulkhat ukin koi tu a, pawlkhat sia mihing sawmnga uk in koi tu hi. Na tapate in ama lote a thawsak uh kul tu a, a an laaksakin, a ngalhiamte le siphu ngalleang sungah a kizangh vanhte vawtsak tu hi." 
1Samuel8:13 Na tanute sia ama ii sathau namtui vawtsak in, a anhuan, a moh emte hisak tu hi." 
1Samuel8:14 Ama in noma lo phabel te, sapithuante le olive kungte la in a uliante pia tu hi." 
1Samuel8:15 Noma lo an sawm a khat le na sapit uh sawm a khat la in, a kumpi inn sung uliante le zum naseam dangte hawmsak tu hi." 
1Samuel8:16 Ama in na naseamte, na khui phabelte le laate la tu a, na seamsak tu hi." 
1Samuel8:17 Na tuu honte sung pan sawm a khat ama in la tu hi. Tuaciang noma mama zongh ama ii silate na suak tu uh hi. 
1Samuel8:18 Tua hun hong thet ciang, noma ii tealsa na kumpipa hangin nasia takin na phun na mau tu uh hi, ahihang Topa in na phun na mauna uhte hong ngai ngawl tu hi,” ci in sonthiang hi." 
1Samuel8:19 Mipite in Samuel nadon ngawlin, “Phamaw bo!" 
1Samuel8:20 Ngamdangte taw ka kiban natu in ko zongh kumpipa khat dei khu hi, ko hong uk tu le ngalmai si in a do tu kumpi tuam dei khu hi,” ci uh hi." 
1Samuel8:21 Samuel in amate ii son theampo ngai a, tua zawkciang pai a, Topa tungah son hi." 
1Samuel8:22 Topa in, “Amate dei bangin vawt in a, kumpipa khat amate pia ta'n,” ci in zo hi. Tua zawkciang Samuel in Israel mite theampo a inn uh ah cia kikin sawl hi." 
1Samuel9:1 Benjamin nam pan Kish a kici mihau, mihing thupi khat om hi; ama sia Abiel ta, Zeror ii tu, Becorath bangkua sung pan hi a, Aphiah ii phung sung mi ahi hi." 
1Samuel9:2 Ama in Saul a kici tapa, a mealpha khang tungto khat nei hi. Saul sia Israel sungah ngual dang theampo sangin lu tun khat bang saang zaw a, a meal zongh phazaw hi." 
1Samuel9:3 Kish ii laate pawlkhat vakthap a, tua ahikom ama in Saul munah, “Naseamte khat taw ih laa va zong ta'n,” ci hi." 
1Samuel9:4 Amate in Ephraim mualtung ngam teng le Shalishah ngamkhawk sung teng zong uh a, a zon uh hang a mu bua uh hi; tua ahikom amate in Shalishah ngam khawk kaantan in pai lai ahihang a laa om ngawl hi; tuasia ciang Benjamin ngam zongh kaantan ahihang a mu peang bua uh hi." 
1Samuel9:5 Zuph ngamkhawk sung a thet uh ciangin, Saul in a naseampa munah, “Cia tawng, tua ahibuale ka pa sia laate huvau ngaisun nawn ngawlin eima atu thinngim tha tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel9:6 A naseampa in, “Na om zii in! Hi khuapi sungah mi thiangtho khat om a, ngual in nasia takin thasia hi, banghang ziam cile ama ci theampo taangtung hi. Ama kungah pai tawng, ama in laate koisungah kimu thei tu ci in hong son thei tha tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
1Samuel9:7 Saul in, “Ama kungah pai leang ama bang pia thei natu hi ziam?” ci hi. “Ih ip sungah an om nawn ngawl a, ama ih piak tu bangma om ngawl, hi ngawl ziam?” ci hi." 
1Samuel9:8 A naseampa in zo a, “Ngunn tang no khat nei khi hi, tuasia ama pia thei khi hi, tua hile a omna mun hong son tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel9:9 Saul in zo kik a, “Na ngaisutna pha hi! Pai tawng,” ci hi. Tua ahikom amate mi thiangtho pa ii teenna khua sungah pai uh hi. Amate khua suana mual ah a kaa tawto laitakin, tuitoai tu ngaknu pawlkhat taw kisi uh hi. Ngaknute munah, “A mukhol theipa khua sungah a om ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi. (Tua hun lai in kamsaangte sia a mukhol thei pa kici a, khat po in Pathian munah thu a dok nop ciang, “A mukhol thei pa kungah pai tawng,” ci uh hi.)" 
1Samuel9:10  
1Samuel9:11  
1Samuel9:12 Ngaknute in, “Om hi, ama sia noma mai hiat ma ah pai hi. Manlang le uhte pha lai tu nu hi. Khua sung na tum uh po ciang ama mu tu nu hi. Ama sia khua sungah tuni in hong theng hi, banghang ziam cile mipite in mualtung biaknatau ah sangaw biakpiakna nei nuam hi. Tua munah a kisam mite sia ama thet mateng an ne ngawl tu hi, banghang ziam cile ama in tua biakpiakna sia thupha a piak phot kul hi. Tu laitakin pai le uhte mual tungah an ne tu in a kaato ma in kimu thei tu nu hi,” ci uh hi." 
1Samuel9:13  
1Samuel9:14 Tua ahikom Saul le a naseampa khuapi sangah paitan a, a sung a tum uh ciang biakna munah zuan a, hong papai Samuel mu uh hi." 
1Samuel9:15 Topa in a zeini tu sia hunin Samuel tungah," 
1Samuel9:16 “Zing ciang tubang hunin Benjamin nam mihing khat na kungah hong puak tu khi hi, ka mi Israel te a ukpa tu in sathau na noai in, tuaciang ama in amate sia Philistine te khut sung pan suatak tu hi. Ka mite thuakna ka mu zo a, hu ngenin a auna ka za zo hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel9:17 Samuel in Saul a mu ciang, Topa in ama munah, “Hisia pa sia kong sonsa sia hi. Ama in ka mite uk tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel9:18 Tuasia ciang Saul sia kongkha hui ah a om Samuel kungah pai in, “A mukhol thei pa koi sungah teang ziam, hong son ta'n,” ci in dongh hi." 
1Samuel9:19 Samuel in, “Keima a mukhol theipa khi hi. Biakna mun ka mai ah pai vun. No nii sia tuni in kei taw an nekhawm tu nu hi. Zing ciang zingsang in nong dok teng theampo hong son tu khi hi, tua zawkciang na pai natu po ah hong paisak tu khi hi." 
1Samuel9:20 Tu nung ni thum lai in a bo laate ahile thinngim heak in; tuate kimu zo hi. Ahizong, Israel mite ii a dei a lungngul mama sia akua ziam? Nangma ni hi — nang le na pa ii innkuan ahi hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel9:21 Saul in zo a, “Kei sia Israel sungah nam nobel Benjamin nam pan khi hi, tuaciang ka bangkua sia tua nam sung pan a thupi ngawlbel hi. Tua ahiciang banghangin tubangin thu hong son ni ziam?” ci hi." 
1Samuel9:22 Tua zawkciang Samuel in Saul le a naseampa inndoi lian khat sungah tumpui a, leangna 30 khawng ii tona sabuai lu ah tosak hi." 
1Samuel9:23 Samuel in an huan pa munah, sabak khat tuamkoi in ci a kong piak sia hong la ta'n,” ci hi." 
1Samuel9:24 Tua ahikom anhuanpa in a deiteal a pheisa bak khat hong la in, Saul mai ah hong lui hi. Samuel in, “En in, hi sungah sabak nang atu a kikoituam sia om hi. Hisia ne in. Mihing ka samte taw tu laitak na neak tu in kong khealsiasak hi,” ci hi. Tuabangin tua ni in Saul sia Samuel taw an nekhawm hi." 
1Samuel9:25 Biakna mun panin khua sungah a tuaksuk zawk uh ciang, amate in innkhum tungah Saul atu lupna vawtsak uh hi," 
1Samuel9:26 tuaciang ama tua munah lum hi. Khuavak ciang Samuel in innkhum tungah Saul sam to a, “Tho in, na pai natu munah hong paisak tu khi hi,” ci hi. Saul tho in Samuel taw lampi zui in paikhawm hi." 
1Samuel9:27 Khua mong a thet uh ciang, Samuel in Saul munah, “Naseampa ei mai ah paisak in,” ci hi. Naseampa in amate nusia a, Samuel in, “Tawmvei no sung hi sungah na om zii in, Pathian ii hong cina teng hong son tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel10:1 Tua zawkciang Samuel in olive thau thawl khat la a, Saul lu tungah buakin ama a nap zawkciang, “ Topa in a Israel mite uk tu in nang sathau hong noai hi. Ama mite nangma uk in, a ngalte theampo kung panin amate na hung tu hi. Tuaciang Topa ii a mite a uk tu nang hong teal takpina sia hi bangin kilak tu hi:" 
1Samuel10:2 Tuni kei nong nusiat ciang Benjamin ngam Zelzah khua Rachel ii thaan ah mihing nii taw na kisi tu hi. Amate in laa na zonte kimu kik zo a, na pa sia tuate atu thinngim nawn ngawl hi, nangma atu thinngim a, hi bangin dok sasaan hi, “Ka tapa vai bang law tu khi ziam?” hong ci tu hi." 
1Samuel10:3 Tabor ah biakna thingkung omna san na thet dong na papai tu a, tua munah mihing thum, Bethel ah Pathian tung sangaw biakpiakna pia tu in a paite taw na kisi tu hi. Tuate khat in kealngual thum kai tu a, a dang khat in anluum luum thum, a thumna sia in savun thawl a dim sapittui pua tu hi." 
1Samuel10:4 Amate in nang hong muak in, anluum luum nii hong pia tu a, tuate na saang tu hi." 
1Samuel10:5 Tua zawkciang, Philistine te ngiaphual saatna khat a omna, Gibeah ngamsung Pathian Mual ah na pai tu hi. Khua sung tumna ah kamsaang pawlkhat, mualtung biaknatau pan tengtongh, khuang, tamngai le liamlo te tumin hong tuaksuk te taw na kisi tu uh hi. Amate laam in a au tu uh hi." 
1Samuel10:6 Thakhat thu in Topa thaa in nang hong uk in, amate biakna taw kisai a lapna le a auna te na pawm tu a, mihing tuamdang khat na suak tu hi." 
1Samuel10:7 Hite hong pian ciangin Pathian ii na vawt tu a hong lampui pawpo sia vawt in. 
1Samuel10:8 Keima mai Gilgal ah na paikhol tu a, tua munah ih kimu tu hi, tuaciang meihal sangaw biakpiaknate le pawlkhop sangaw biakpiaknate ka pia tu hi. Keima hong pai in, na sep na vawt tu teng kong son dong ni sali hong ngak tu ni hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel10:9 Samuel nusia tu in Saul a kiheak ciang, Pathian in Saul sia pianzia thak khat pia hi. Tuaciang Samuel son theampo tua ni in piang hi." 
1Samuel10:10 Saul le a naseampa Gibeah hong thet uh ciang, kamsaang pawlkhat taw kisi hi. Thakhat thu in Pathian thaa in ama uk a, tua ciang amate ii lawp ngawpin a ngualnop lapna le a auna pawm hi." 
1Samuel10:11 Nidang in ama a he ngeite in hi bangin a om a mu uh ciang amate khat le khat kidongh a, “Kish ii tapa bang tawk ziam? Saul sia kamsaang khat suak zo ziam?” ci uh hi." 
1Samuel10:12 Tua munah a teang pasal khat in, “Hi kamsaang dangte thu bangbangziam? — a pate sia akua bangte hi tu na um uh ziam?” Hisia sia, “Saul ngawngawn kamsaang khat suak zo ziam?” ci paunak ii kipatna ahi hi." 
1Samuel10:13 Saul zongh lawp ngawpin a lap le a au teng a man zawkciang mualtung biaknatau ah paito hi. 
1Samuel10:14 Saul ii pano in ama le a naseampa mu a, “Koisung theng man nu ziam?” ci in dongh hi. “Laa zong khu hi,” ci in Saul in zo hi. “Ka mu zawk ngawl uh ciang Samuel taw kimu tu in pai khu hi,” ci uh hi." 
1Samuel10:15 “Tuaciang ama in bang hong ci ziam?” ci in Saul pano in dongh hi. 
1Samuel10:16 Saul in, “Ama in ngannote kimu zo hi ci in hong son hi,” ci in zo hi — ahihang ama ii kumpipa a suana tu huvau Samuel ii ci teng a pano tungah a son bua hi." 
1Samuel10:17 Samuel in Mizpah ah mipite biakkikhop khat sam a," 
1Samuel10:18 tuaciang amate tungah, “ Topa Israel te ii Pathian in, ‘Egypt ngam panin kong pusua pui a, Egypt te le no hong nengniam midang te kung panin kong suatak hi." 
1Samuel10:19 Keima sia na Pathian ka hi a, noma ngimna theampo le haksatna theampo panin hong suatak pa khi hi, ahihang tuni in hong nial in, kumpipa khat piak tu in nong ngen uh hi. Pha mama hi, tua ahile, Topa mai ah a nam le a bee a phung zui in hong kikhawm tavun,’ ” ci in son hi." 
1Samuel10:20 Tuasia ciang Samuel in a nam simin mai ah paisak a, Topa in Benjamin nam tangkal hi." 
1Samuel10:21 Tuaciang Samuel in Benjamin namte sung pan a innkuan tek sia mai ah a paisak ciang Matri ii innkuan kiteal hi. Matri ii innkuan pan pasalte a mai ah hong pai a, tuaciang Kish ii tapa Saul kiteal hi. Amate in ama zongin a mu zawk ngawl ciang," 
1Samuel10:22 amate in Topa dongh a, “A dang khat ma a om lai ziam?” ci uh hi. Topa in zo a, “Saul sia zia sungah om hi, vanh honte nungah buu hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel10:23 Tua ahikom amate va tai in Saul sia mipite kungah hong paipui uh hi, tuaciang ama sia midang khat pawpo sangin lu tun khat saangzaw in mu thei uh hi." 
1Samuel10:24 Samuel in mipite munah, “Hi munah Topa ii teal sia pa om hi! Ei sungah ama taw a kibang kuama dang om ngawl hi,” ci hi. Mipite au siat in, “Kumpipa a khansau tahen!” ci uh hi." 
1Samuel10:25 Samuel in kumpipa khat ii sep thei te le a vaipuakte mipite tungah sonthiangin, laibu sungah a at zawkciang a thiangtho mun khat ah koi hi. Tua zawkciang ama in a kuama theampo inn tek ah ciasak hi." 
1Samuel10:26 Saul zongh Gibeah a inn ah cia hi. Pathian ii a lungtang a thuthaak pasal thahat pawlkhat in ama tonpui hi. 
1Samuel10:27 Ahihang mihing mannung ngawl pawlkhat in, “Hi sia pa in ei tungah a pha khat po bangbangin hong vawt thei thong tu ziam?” ci uh hi. Saul sia simmaw in letsong bangma a puak bua uh hi." 
1Samuel11:1 Tha khat bang zawkciang Ammon kumpipa Nahash in Gilead ngam sung, Jabesh khua sia a ngalkaphonpi kuanpui in uumci hi. Jabesh mite in Nahash munah, “Ko taw thukimna kho khat vawt in, tuaciang hong ukpa tu in kong saang tu uh hi,” ci uh hi." 
1Samuel11:2 Nahash ii zo kikna pan, “Thu khat na lungkim uh le no taw thukimna kho khat vawt ma tawng: Israel mi bup mindai natu in khat sim ii mittang ziatsang khelsak tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel11:3 Jabesh lampuite in, “Israel ngam bup ah kamtaite ka paisak natu in ni sali hun hong pia ta'n. Kuama in hong hu tuak buale kong tum tu uh hi,” ci uh hi." 
1Samuel11:4 Kamtaite Saul ii teenna Gibeah hong thengin, a thu teng a kison ciang mihingte sia thinkiamin kap uh hi." 
1Samuel11:5 Saul sia a khuitalte taw lo panin hong cia zawk hiat bek hi a, “Bang tat nu ziam? Banghang mihing theampo kap ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Amate in Jabesh pan kamtaite ii thupuak teng son uh hi." 
1Samuel11:6 Saul in hi thu a zaak ciang, Pathian thaa in ama uk a, a thinso hi." 
1Samuel11:7 Ama in khuital nii ngoin, a bak a bak in a sem zawkciang, Israel ngam bup ah kamtaite sabak kengin paisak a, a kidop natu thu puaksak hi: “Ngal kisimna sungah Saul le Samuel nung a zui ngawl peuma a khuital tek uh tuabang ma in kivawtsak tu hi,” ci hi. Israel mite sia Topa in bang khat po a law thak tu lau in, khat zongh kikhe ngawlin hong paikhawm tek uh hi." 
1Samuel11:8 Saul in amate Bezak ah khawmtua a: Israel pan 300,000 le Judah pan 30,000 pha uh hi." 
1Samuel11:9 Amate in Jabesh pan kamtai te munah, “Na mipuite munah son vun, zing ciang nisun ma in amate kisuatak tu hi.” Jabesh a mite in tua thupuak a nga ciangin lungdam leilam uh a," 
1Samuel11:10 tuaciang Nahash munah, “Zing ciangin hong tum tu khu hi, nong law nop po hong law ta'n,” ci uh hi." 
1Samuel11:11 Tua zanin Saul in a mite pawl thum in khen a, khuavak ciang ngalte ngiaphual sungah tum ngawpin Ammon te sim uh hi. Ni sun hun in amate thatlum ngawp uh hi. A suakta sun te khakhat in tai thaap uh hi." 
1Samuel11:12 Tuasia ciang Israel mite in Samuel munah, “Saul sia ih kumpi seamsak ngawl tu hi a ci te koi sungah om siat ziam? Ko tungah hong aap tavun, thatlum siat tu khu hi!” ci hi." 
1Samuel11:13 Ahihang Saul in, “Tuni in kuama kithisak ngawl tu hi, banghang ziam cile Topa in Israel a suatak ni hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel11:14 Tuaciang Samuel in amate munah, “Ih vekpi Gilgal ah pai in, Saul sia ih kumpipa hi ci in khatvei taangko lai tawng,” ci hi." 
1Samuel11:15 Tua ahikom amate Gilgal ah pai siat a, tuasung mun thiangthona ah Saul sia kumpipa hi ci in thangsak uh hi. Amate in pawlkhop sangaw biakpiaknate pia in, Saul le Israel mite theampo tua thu huvau in poai khaam uh hi." 
1Samuel12:1 Tuaciang Samuel in Israel mite munah, “Nong nget uh theampo hong vawtsak zo khi hi. Kumpipa khat no hong uk tu in hong pia zo khi hi," 
1Samuel12:2 tu in no lam hong pui tu ama nei zo nu hi. Kei ka hi le huai in ka puakkaang zo hi, tuaciang ka tate sia no taw omkhawm nu hi. Ka khangno lai pan kipan tu dong noma lampui seam zo khi hi." 
1Samuel12:3 Hi sungah om khi hi. Ka sep ka vawt khat po ahi ngawl a om le tu in Topa le a tealsa kumpipa mai ah maw hong suan tavun. Mihing khat po ii khui ahizong, laa ahizong kong laaksak ngei ziam? Akua khat po kong theam ngei, kong nengniam ngei ziam? Khat po tung pan sumnguk kong saang ngei ziam? Hi bang khat pawpo ka ngamta ngei le ka laak babang pia kik tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel12:4 Mipite in zo a, “Hong theamin hong nengniam ngeingawl ni hi; kuama tung pan bangma la ngeingawl ni hi,” ci uh hi." 
1Samuel12:5 Samuel ii a zo kikna pan, “Kei a maw ngawl het in nong mu uh sia Topa le ama ii tealsa kumpipa sia tuni in tetti ahi hi,” ci hi. “Hi ma hi, Topa sia kote ii tetti hi,” amate in ci in zo uh hi." 
1Samuel12:6 Samuel in zom suak a, “ Topa sia Moses le Aaron a teal, Egypt pan na taanghpupite hong pusuapui sia hi." 
1Samuel12:7 Tu in na omna tek ah ding vun, Topa ii noma le na taanghpupite a hut natu a nasep lianpite theampo no kong phawksak tu a, Topa mai ah note maw kong suan tu hi." 
1Samuel12:8 Jacob le a innkuanpuite Egypt ah a pai lai in, Egypt te in nengniam ahiciang, na taanghpupite in Topa munah hu ngenin au uh hi, tuaciang ama in Moses le Aaron paisak in, Egypt ngam pan amate pusua pui a, hi ngam ah teangsak hi." 
1Samuel12:9 Ahihang mite in Topa a Pathian mangil a, tuasia ciang ama in Philistine te, Moab kumpipa le Hazor khuapi ii ngalkaphonpi ukpa Sisera te in na taanghpupite simsak a, zothal hi." 
1Samuel12:10 Tua zawkciang amate in Topa tungah hu ngenin, ‘Ko sia maw zo khu hi, banghang ziam cile nang kung panin kiheak khu hi, Topa awng, tuaciang Baal le Astarte milimte bia khu hi. Ka ngalte kung pan hong suatak ta'n, tuaciang nangma hong bia tu khu hi!’ ci in au uh hi." 
1Samuel12:11 Tuaciang, Topa in Gideon, Barak, Jephthah, a khakbel in kei hong paisak hi. Kote khat simin na ngalte khut sung pan no kong suatak uh hi, tuaciangin ngammuang takin na teang uh hi." 
1Samuel12:12 Ahihang Ammon te kumpipa Nahash in no hong sim tu in a kithoai laitak, Topa sia na kumpipa a hina na nial uh hi, tuaciang kei munah, ‘Ko hong uk tu kumpipa khat dei khu hi,’ nong ci uh hi." 
1Samuel12:13 “Tu in hi sungah noma teal kumpipa om hi; na nget uh sia ama hi a, tuaciang Topa in no hong pia hi." 
1Samuel12:14 Topa na Pathian zatak vawtin a na seam in, tuaciang a thu ni in, a thupiakte na ni uh a, noma le na kumpipa in ama nung na zui uh le na theampo a dik a pha in hong piang tu hi." 
1Samuel12:15 Ahihang Topa ii pau ngai ngawlin, a thupiakte na ni bua uh le ama in no le na kumpipa hong langpan tu hi." 
1Samuel12:16 Tua ahikom na dinmun uh kholet vun, tua hile Topa hong sep tu na lianpite na mu tu uh hi." 
1Samuel12:17 Tu hun sia khuakhaal laitak hi kana ngawl ziam? Ahihang thu kong ngen tu a, Topa in vanto sakin nguatui hong puak tu hi. Hi bangin hong pian ciang kumpipa khat na nget uh sia Topa tungah nasia takin maw na hi uh hunlam na kiphawk tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel12:18 Tua ahikom Samuel in thungen a, tua ni ma in Topa in vanto sakin nguazusak hi. Tuasia ciang mi theampo in Topa le Samuel kiita uh hi," 
1Samuel12:19 tuaciang Samuel munah, “Topa awng, nong hesuakna in, ka thi ngawl natu Topa na Pathian tungah thu hong ngetsak ta'n. Tu in koma mawna dangte tungsia ah kumpipa khat ka ngetna ah maw zo ka hi uh hunlam ka phawk uh hi,” ci uh hi." 
1Samuel12:20 Samuel in, “Lau heak vun, siatna khaatna tuaza in vawt na hi uh hangin, Topa nusia heak vun, ahihang na thin theampo taw ama na na seam vun." 
1Samuel12:21 A maan ngawl pathian te zuan heak vun; amate in hong hu thei ngawl, hong ngum thei ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile amate sia a tatak hi ngawl hi." 
1Samuel12:22 Topa in a ciliap huai kamciamna vawt zo a, ama in no hong nusia ngawl tu hi, banghang ziam cile no sia ama mite hong hisak tu in khensat zo hi." 
1Samuel12:23 Kei ka hile note atu thunget nawn ngawlna taw ama tungah mawna ka vawt ngawl natu Topa in thu hong pia hi. No vawt tu a pha le a maan thute kong hil zaw tu hi. 
1Samuel12:24 Topa thu ni vun a, thumaan takin na thin theampo taw ama ii na seam vun. Na lianpi no atu hong sepsak te ciamtee vun." 
1Samuel12:25 Ahihang mawna na vawvawt lai uh le no le na kumpipa uh hong kisusia tu hi. 
1Samuel13:1  
1Samuel13:2 Saul in pasal tulthum teal a, ama in tulnii sia Michmash le Bethel mualtung ngam ah ama taw a om tu in koi a, tulkhat sia a tapa Jonathan taw Benjamin namte ii ngam Gibeah ah puak hi. Tua ngawl teng Saul in a inn tek ah ciasak hi." 
1Samuel13:3 Jonathan in Philistine ngalkap ukpa sia Geba ah that hi, tuaciang Philistine mi theampo in tua thu za uh hi. Tuasia ciang Saul in kamtaite paisak a, ngam bup sungah Hebrew mite ngal sim tu a samna in lemle tumsak kawkoai hi." 
1Samuel13:4 Saul in Philistine ngalkap ukpa a thalupna thu, Israel mite theampo kizasak a, tuaciang Philistine te in amate ensan hi; tua ahikom mite in Gilgal ah Saul koppui tu in a sap bangin pai uh hi." 
1Samuel13:5 Philistine te sia Israel te sim tu in kikhawmtua uh hi; amate in siphu ngalleang 30,000, siphu ngalkap 6,000 nei a, ngalkapte sia tuipivaal a sen za in tam hi. Amate Bethaven nisuana sang Michmash ah kuanin, tuasung ah ngiaphual saat uh hi." 
1Samuel13:6 Tua zawkciang amate in Israel te nasia takin sim a, Israel te a cimaw dinmun ah koi hi. Israel mi pawlkhatte sia suanghawng, leihawng le suangpi kawm ahibuale leidum le tuikhuk sungah buu uh a;" 
1Samuel13:7 a dangte Jordan ngun kan in, Gad le Gilead te ngamsung zuan uh hi. Saul sia Gilgal ma ah om lai a, ama taw a om mite lau in liing uh hi." 
1Samuel13:8 Ama in ni sali sung Samuel ii sawl bangin Samuel ngak hi. Ahihang Samuel sia Gilgal ah hong pai peang bua hi. Mipite in Saul taisan tu kipan uh hi," 
1Samuel13:9 tua ahikom ama in amate munah, “Meihal biakpiakna le pawlkhop sangaw biakpiakna ka kungah hong paipui tavun,” ci hi. Ama in meihal sangaw biakpiakna khat vawt a," 
1Samuel13:10 a man lian laitakin Samuel hong theng hi. Saul in pai in muak a," 
1Samuel13:11 ahizong Samuel in, “Bang vawt thong ni ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Saul in zo a, “Mipite in hong taisan a, kong pai tu na ci bangin hong pai ngawl ni hi; tua banah Philistine te sia Michmash ah kikhawmtua hi." 
1Samuel13:12 Tua ahikom, ‘Philistine te in hi sung Gilgal ah kei hong sim tu in om a, tuaciangin Topa maipha ka nga natu sep ka nei bua hi. Tua ahikom sangaw biakpiakna khat ka piak kul vak,’ ci in ka ngaisun hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel13:13 “Tuasia mawmawt nasep hi,” ci in Samuel in zo hi. “Nang in na Topa Pathian ii thupiak bangin ngamta ngawl ni hi. A thu ni hi lete nang le na suan na paalte in a tawntungin Israel hong uksak tu hi." 
1Samuel13:14 Ahizong na ukna sia kizom suak ngawl tu hi. Nangma in a thu ni ngawl na hikom ama ii dei bang mihing zong tu a, a mite uk tu in vawt tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel13:15 Samuel in Gilgal nusia a, ama pai natu ah pai hi. A dangte in Saul sia a ngalkapte kungah a pai ciang zui uh hi. Amate sia Gilgal pan Benjamin te ngamsung Gibeah ah pai uh hi. Saul in a ngalkap 600 khawng teng sit hi." 
1Samuel13:16 Saul, a tapa Jonathan le a mite sia Benjamin te ngam Geba ah ngiaphual saat uh hi; Philistine te ngiaphual sia Michmash ah om hi." 
1Samuel13:17 Philistine te in pawl thum kisua in a ngiaphual tek pan veu in sim uh hi: pawlkhen khat in Shual te ngamkhen Ophrah ah pai uh a," 
1Samuel13:18 a dang pawlkhat in Beth Horon zuanin, tuaciang a dangkhat te in Zeboim Kuam le duisung a kingalmu theina ngamngi ah pai uh hi." 
1Samuel13:19 Israel te sungah thikseak kuama a om bua hi, banghang ziam cile Hebrew te ii namsau le tei a nei ngawl natu in Philistine te in nasia takin khak uh hi." 
1Samuel13:20 (Israel te in a hei, a tu, a phiau uh a hiamsak nop ciangin Philistine te kung veu ah pai uh hi." 
1Samuel13:21 A hiamsak man sia hei le ngan hawlna ciang dawn ah a kisuan thik ahile ngunn dangkatang khat, lo thawna le tumanh ahile ngunntang tang nii piasak uh hi.)" 
1Samuel13:22 Tua ahikom ngal kido ni in Saul le a tapa Jonathan simngawl ngalkap dangte in namsau le tei a nei bua uh hi. 
1Samuel13:23 Philistine te in ngalkap pawlkhat Michmash mualciangh cing tu in paisak hi. 
1Samuel14:1 Ni khat ni in Jonathan in ngalhiamte a pua pa munah, “Philistine te ngiaphual kaantan in pai tawng,” ci hi. Ahihang Jonathan in a pa Saul munah a son bua hi," 
1Samuel14:2 a pa sia Gibeah pan a khuala ngawl Migron khua, talee kung nuai khat ah ngiaphual saat hi; ama in a kithuapui mihing 600 bang nei hi."
