1Samuel14:3 (Ephod a silh thiampi sia Ichabod ii suapuipa Ahitub ii tapa Ahijah hi a, tua pa sia Phinehas ii tapa, Eli ii tupa hi a, Shiloh ah Topa ii thiampi ahi hi.) Jonathan ii paisat hunlam sia a mite in he ngawl hi." 
1Samuel14:4 Philistine te ngiaphual a thet thei natu in a kaantan tu a kul Michmash mualciangh ah suangpi dok nii a lang le a lang ah om a: tuate khat sia Bozez kici a, a dang khat sia Seneh kici hi." 
1Samuel14:5 Khat zaw sia Michmash maingat a, mualciangh saksang ah om in, a khat sia a thang sangah Geba sang nga in om hi." 
1Samuel14:6 Jonathan in tangvalpa munah, “Pathian he ngawl Philistine te ngiaphual kaantan tawng. Topa in hong hu thei tu hi; hong hu a ahile bangza in ih tawmbel hang, zawna hong piak natu sia bangma in khak ngawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel14:7 Tangvalpa in, “Na vawt nop babang hi hen, kei sia nangma taw pang khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
1Samuel14:8 Jonathan in, “Pha hi. Ei ih paitan tu a Philistine te in ih musak tu hi." 
1Samuel14:9 Ama te ei kungah hong pai nuam a, ngakin hong sawl le ih omna mun san ah ih om nginge tu hi." 
1Samuel14:10 Ahihang amate kungah pai in hong sawl le ih pai tu hi, banghang ziam ci le tuasia sia Topa ii ngal zaw natu lim hong piakna hi tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel14:11 Tuabangin amate sia Philistine te in mu in, “En vun! Hebrew mite pawlkhat leihawng sung a bukna pan hong pusuak hi!” ci hi." 
1Samuel14:12 Tua zawkciang amate in Jonathan le tangvalpa oksan in, “Hi sungah hong paito tavun! Kong son nop khat om hi!” ci in sam hi. Jonathan in tangvalpa munah, “Hong zui ta'n. Topa in amate tungah Israel te zawna hong pia zo hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel14:13 Jonathan sia mualciangh pan a khut le a khup taw bokvak in kaato a, tangvalpa in zui hi. Jonathan in Philistine te simin vaatvawk a, tangvalpa in zongh tua teng that hi." 
1Samuel14:14 A kithalupna masa phitbel tuasung acre lang bang a zaina munah Jonathan le tangvalpa in mihing kul bang thatlum uh hi. 
1Samuel14:15 Ngam sungah a om Philistine te theampo lau ngawp uh hi; a suttolte le ngiaphual a om ngalkapte lau in liing uh hi; lei liingin patauna lianpi om hi. 
1Samuel14:16 Benjamin ngamsung Gibeah encik in a om, Saul ii mite in Philistine te lungmangin a tai mu uh hi." 
1Samuel14:17 Tua ahikom Saul in a mite munah, “Ih ngalkap teng sim sin vun, akua om ngawl ziam, kan vun,” ci hi. Amate in tuabangin ahi uh ciang Jonathan le a ngalhiam pua tangvalpa a om ngawl hunlam he uh hi." 
1Samuel14:18 “Ephod sia hi sungah hong paipui tavun,” Saul in thiampipa Ahijah munah ci hi. (Tua ni in Ahijah in tuasia Israel mite mai ah pua hi.)" 
1Samuel14:19 Saul sia Ahijah taw a papau laitakin, Philistine ngiaphual ah nasia buai vaial ahikom Saul in, “ Topa tung thu dok tu hun om nawn ngawl hi!” ci hi." 
1Samuel14:20 Tuaciangin ama le a mite sia amate khat le khat kitel meal ngawlin a kido Philistine te sim tuin hong kuan uh hi. 
1Samuel14:21 Hebrew mi pawlkhat Philistine te sang pang phot a, amate ngiaphual ah a paikhawm sa te sia hong heak kikin, Saul le Jonathan taw hong kop kik uh hi." 
1Samuel14:22 Ephraim mual tungah a om a dangte in Philistine te tai keak hi ci-in za ahikom amate zongh hong kipawlin Philistine te sim a," 
1Samuel14:23 Bethaven kalh dongin do uh hi. Topa in tua ni in Israel hun hi. 
1Samuel14:24 Israel te sia tua ni in ngilkial in thazawm uh hi, banghang ziam cile Saul in ciliap huai kiciamna taw thupia hi: “Ka ngalte tungah phulaakna ka nei uh mateng tu ni in an a ne sia peuma haamsiatna thuak tahen,” ci hi. Tua ahikom kuama in ni buppi bangma ne ngawl hi." 
1Samuel14:25 A vekpi in thingtaam khat sung hong thengin, mun theampo ah khuaitui mu hi." 
1Samuel14:26 Taam sungah khuaitui dimteak ahihang kuama in a ne bua hi, banghang ziam cile amate in Saul ii haamsiatna sia kiita uh hi." 
1Samuel14:27 Ahihang Jonathan in a pa ii haamsiatna taw a tawnna za ngawl a, tua ahikom a ciangkang toai sia taw khuaiphaanglu sung sunin khuaitui tawm ne hi. Thakhat thu in ama hong hat zawhiat paih hi." 
1Samuel14:28 Ahihang a mite khat in, “Ko sia ngilkial in pukhong khu hi, ahihang na pa in haamsiatna taw hong tawng a, ‘Tuni in an a ne peuma tungah haamsiatna tung tahen hong ci hi,’ ” ci in son hi." 
1Samuel14:29 Jonathan in, “Ka pa in ih mite tungah bang zata in, a kiitakhuai mama in ngamta thong ziam? En vun, khuaitui tawm ka neak hu in bangza in ka om nuam tuam paih ziam!" 
1Samuel14:30 Ih mipuite in ngalte a zaw uh ciang a laak uh ante ne le tuni bangza in pha tuam seseam tu ziam? Philistine te bangza a tamzaw that zo tu hi ziam, ngaisun vun,” ci hi." 
1Samuel14:31 Tua ni in Israel te in Philistine te zo a, Michmash pan Aijalon dong lam khom teakin sim uh hi. Hi sia hunin Israel te sia ngilkial in zawm mama uh hi," 
1Samuel14:32 tua ahikom amate in ngalte khut sung pan a matte la tu in del uh hi, tuu le kealte la in tua munah ngo paih in, a chi thai ngawlin a sa ne uh hi." 
1Samuel14:33 Saul munah hi thu kikhia a, “En in, mipite in sa le a chi ne khawmin Topa tungah mawna vawt hi,” ci uh hi. Saul au in, “No sia pawl zuakte nu hi! Suangtum lian khat hi sung keima kungah hong liik tavun,” ci hi." 
1Samuel14:34 Tua zawkciang ama in thupiakna dang khat nei a, “Mite sungah pai tavun a, khui le tuute hi sungah hong paipui natu sonsiat vun. Amate in tua ngante ngoin hi sung ma ah ne tu hi; amate in sa le chi neak khopna taw Topa tungah maw thei ngawl het tu hi,” ci hi. Tua ahikom tua ni takin amate in a nganno te hong paipui a tua munah ngo uh hi." 
1Samuel14:35 Saul in Topa atu biaknatau khat sa a, a masabel a vawt biaknatau ahi hi." 
1Samuel14:36 Saul in a mite munah, “Zan lai paisuk in, Philistine te sim tawng, khuavak dong a neisa te phuulin, thatlum siat tawng,” ci hi. “Phabel tu na up bang po vawt in,” ci in amate in zo uh hi. Ahizong thiampipa in, “Pathian dongh phot tawng,” ci hi." 
1Samuel14:37 Tua ahikom Saul in Topa dongh a, “Philistine te ka sim tu ziam? Ko nong zosak tu ziam?” ci hi. Ahihang Pathian in tua ni in zo ngawl hi." 
1Samuel14:38 Tuasia ciang Saul in mipi lampuite munah, “Hi sungah hong pai tavun a, tuni in bang mawna vawt hi ziam, kan vun." 
1Samuel14:39 Israel zawna hong pia a nungta Topa taw kamciam vawt khi hi, ka tapa Jonathan keak ahizong, a maw sia kithatlum tu hi,” ci hi. Ahihang kuama in bangma son ngawl hi." 
1Samuel14:40 Tuaciang Saul in amate tungah, “Na vekpi in zia lai ah va ding tavun, Jonathan le kei hi sungah kong ding tu uh hi,” ci hi. Amate in, “Phabel tu na up bang po vawt in,” ci in zo uh hi." 
1Samuel14:41 Saul in Topa Israel ii Pathian munah, “ Topa, banghangin tuni ka pau hong zo ngawl ni ziam? Topa, Israel ii Pathian awng, a thiangtho suangte panin hong zo ta'n. Tua mawna sia Jonathan ahibuale kei mawna ahile, Urim panin hong zo ta'n; ahizong na Israel mite ii mawna hang ahile Thummim panin hong zo ta'n,” ci hi. A zona sia Jonathan le Saul tungah tu a, mipite kithiangsak hi." 
1Samuel14:42 Tuasia ciang Saul in, “Ka tapa Jonathan le kei akua hi zaw khu ziam hong khensat ta'n,” ci hi. Tuaciang Jonathan kikawk hi." 
1Samuel14:43 Tua zawkciang Saul in Jonathan munah, “Bang vawt thong ni ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Jonathan in, “Ka ciang toai sia taw khuaitui tawm ne khi hi. Hi lai ah om khi hi — a thi tu in kinging khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
1Samuel14:44 Saul in Jonathan tungah, “Nang hong kithisak bua le, keima Pathian in hong vaatlum tahen,” ci hi." 
1Samuel14:45 Ahihang mipite in Saul munah, “Israel atu ngalzawna lianpi hong neisak Jonathan sia thisak tu hi ziam? Hi thei ngawl hi! A nungta Topa min taw kamciam pia khu hi, a luzang samzam khat zongh sumsi thei ngawl tu hi. Tuni in a sep a vawt sia, Pathian ii huna taw a vawt hi,” ci uh hi. Tuabangin mipite in Jonathan sia thi natu pan hun uh hi." 
1Samuel14:46 Tua zawkciang Saul in Philistine te del nawn ngawl a, amate ngam ah cia kik uh hi." 
1Samuel14:47 Saul sia Israel kumpipa a sua zawkciang, mun theampo ah a ngalte sim hi: Moab, Ammon le Edom mite, Zobah kumpite le Philistine te do hi. Ngal a simna po ama in zo hi." 
1Samuel14:48 Ama in hangsan takin ngalsim a, Amalek te ngawngawn zo hi. Ama in Israel te hong kisimna theampo panin hun hi." 
1Samuel14:49 Saul ii tapate sia, Jonathan, Ishvi le Malchishua ahi hi. Ama ii tanu uzaw sia ii min Merab hi a, a nau zaw sia Michal hi." 
1Samuel14:50 A zi sia Ahimaaz ii tanu Ahinoam hi; a ngalkaphonpi ukpa sia a pano Ner ii tapa, a suapui sealh Abner ahi hi." 
1Samuel14:51 Saul ii pa Kish le Abner ii pa Ner sia Abiel tate ahi uh hi. 
1Samuel14:52 A nuntak sung tawntung Saul in Philistine te hangsan takin a sim kul hi. Tua ahikom a thahat, a hang pasal khat a mu na le ngalkap tumsak hi." 
1Samuel15:1 Samuel in Saul munah, “A Israel mite kumpipa tu in nang sathau noai a Topa ii hong sawl sia keima khi hi. Tu in Topa Vaanglianpipa son teng ngai in." 
1Samuel15:2 Ama in Amalek te daan pia nuam hi, banghang ziam cile amate ii taanghpupite in Israel mite Egypt ngam pan a pusua lai in na nalh uh hi." 
1Samuel15:3 Kuan ta'n a, Amalek te a neisa theampo uh taw a vekpi in susia cip in. Na khat zongh khoaikhe heak in: pasal, numei, patang le nausen; a khui, a tuu, a kalaoh le a laate thatlum siat in,” ci hi." 
1Samuel15:4 Saul in a ngalkapte Telem ah khawmtua in sit hi. Israel panin ngalkap 200,000 le Judah pan 10,000 pha uh hi." 
1Samuel15:5 Tuaciang ama le a ngalkapte Amalek te khuapi ah kuanin ngun luanna munko khat pan a suam tu in pang uh hi. 
1Samuel15:6 Ama in a taanghpupite in Egypt pan a pusua uh lai in Israel te tungah a dik Ken te tungah a kidop natu kam thaak hi. Tuate munah, “Pai vun a Amalek te nusia vun, amate taw cipin kong thalup ngawl natu in tai vun,” ci hi. Tua ahikom Ken te in khua a nusia uh hi." 
1Samuel15:7 Saul in Amalek te, Havilah pan Egypt nisuana Shur dongin zo a;" 
1Samuel15:8 ama in Amalek kumpipa Agag a hingtang in man a, tuaciang a mite theampo thatlum hi." 
1Samuel15:9 Ahihang Saul le a mite in Agag ii nuntakna sia khoaikhe a, tuaciang a tuu le a khui a phabel teng, khuino le tuuno a phabel teng le na a pha theampo khe in, a man nei ngawl le a mannung ngawl teng bek susia uh hi." 
1Samuel15:10 Topa in Samuel tungah," 
1Samuel15:11 “Saul sia kumpipa in ka koi sia khuangai khi hi; ama in kei hong nusia a, tuaciang ka thupiakna hong ni ngawl hi,” ci hi. Samuel thin uuk a, zan khua in Topa tungah pakaai hi." 
1Samuel15:12 A khuavak ni zing tuungin Saul zong tu in ama pai hi. Saul sia Carmel khua ah pai in tua munah ama atu in khansuang khat phut a, tua zawkciang Gilgal ah paisuak hi ci in za hi." 
1Samuel15:13 Samuel in Saul omna dong va pai in, Saul in muak a paupui hi, “ Topa in thupha hong pia tahen, Samuel awng! Topa thupiak ni khi hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel15:14 Samuel in, “Tua ahile khui ham aw le tuu ham aw te banghangin za khi ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
1Samuel15:15 Saul in, “Ka mite in Amalek te tung pan la hi. Tuu le khui a phabel teng la in Topa na Pathian tungah sangaw biakpiakna in nei sawm uh hi, a dang teng sia maaimot siat hi,” ci in zo hi." 
1Samuel15:16 Samuel in, “Na pau tawp in, tu zanin Topa ii kei hong son teng hong sonsawn tu khi hi,” ci in thupia hi. Saul in, “Hong son ta'n,” ci hi." 
1Samuel15:17 Samuel in, “Nangma le nangma sia thupi na kisak ngawl hang, nang sia Israel te ii lampui pa ni hi. Topa in Israel Kumpipa tu in sathau hong noi sa ni hi," 
1Samuel15:18 tuaciang ama in nang sia tua a seksol Amalek te a lalcipsak tu in hong paisak hi. Amate na thalup siat dong sim tu ni hi ci in thu hong pia hi. 
1Samuel15:19 Tua ahile banghangin a thu ni ngawl ni ziam? Banghangin a neisa uhte phuul tu in kinaw liang in Topa ii diksak ngawl tu in ngamta ni ziam?” ci in zo hi. 
1Samuel15:20 Saul in, “ Topa thu ni khi hi. Hong sawl bangin ka kuan a, kumpipa Agag ka ciapui hi, Amalek te theampo ka thatlum hi." 
1Samuel15:21 Ahihang ka mite in tuu le khui a matte sung pan a phabel teng a thatlum bua uh hi; tuabang ahi luangin Topa na Pathian tungah sangaw biakpiakna tu in, hi sung Gilgal ah hong paipui uh hi,’ ci in zo hi." 
1Samuel15:22 Samuel in, “Thunitna ahibuale biakpiaknate le sangaw biakpiakna Topa in koisia dei zaw ziam? Ama tungah tuu phabel taw sangaw biakpiakna sangin thunitna phazaw hi." 
1Samuel15:23 Ama leedona in bum le aitoaina bangma in sia a, kiphatsakna sia milim biakna za in mawna hi. Nangma in Topa thupiakna nial na hi man, ama in nang ii kumpi na hina hong nial zo hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel15:24 “Hi hi, maw zo khi hi,” ci in Saul in zo kik hi. “ Topa thu piakna le nong hilna te ni ngawl khi hi. Ka mite ka kiitak manin amate dei bangin ngamta khi hi." 
1Samuel15:25 Ahihang tu in ka mawna hong maisak ta'n a, Topa ka biak thei natu in kei taw paikhawm kik tawng,” ci hi." 
1Samuel15:26 “Nang taw pai kik ngawl tu khi hi. Nang in Topa thupiaknate nial na hikom, ama in nang sia Israel kumpipa na hina hong nial zo hi,” ci in Samuel in zo hi." 
1Samuel15:27 Tua zawkciang Samuel sia ama nusia tu in hong kiheak a, ahihang Saul in a puanpuasilh pan a let le a puan ki eau hi." 
1Samuel15:28 Samuel in ama munah, “ Topa in Israel kumpi ngam sia tuni in na khut sung pan hong eaukeaksak zo hi, tuaciang nang sangin a phazaw mihing khat tungah pia zo hi." 
1Samuel15:29 Israel ii minthang kumpi Pathian sia leilot ngawl, a thin kheal ngawl hi. Ama sia mihing khat hi ngawl hi — a thin kheal ngawl hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel15:30 Saul in, “Keima maw zo khi hi. Ahihang ka mite ii lampuite le Israel theampo ii mai ah zatakna beak hong lak ta'n. Keima taw hong heak kik ta'n a, Topa na Pathian ka biak thei natu hong hi ta'n,” ci in zo kik hi." 
1Samuel15:31 Tua ahikom Samuel sia Saul taw heak kik a, tuaciang Saul in Topa bia hi." 
1Samuel15:32 “Kumpipa Agag hi lai kei kungah hong paipui tavun,” ci in Samuel in thupia hi. Agag sia ama kungah lau vadil in hong pai a, “Thi tu sia bangza in na ziam?’. ci in ngaisun hi." 
1Samuel15:33 Samuel in, “Na namsau in nute tam mama ta selsak ahi bangma, tu in na nu zongh tasel tu hi,” ci hi. Tuabangin Samuel in Agag sia Gilgal biaknatau mai ah neensem hi." 
1Samuel15:34 Tua zawkciang Samuel sia Ramah ah pai a, Saul kumpipa sia Gibeah khua a inn ah cia hi." 
1Samuel15:35 Samuel ii nuntak sungah kumpipa a mu kik ngei nawn bua hi; ahihang ama tungtaang khuangai hi. Saul sia Israel kumpipa in a koi hu in Topa hee hi. 
1Samuel16:1 Topa in Samuel munah, “Saul tungtaang bang tanvei khuangai tu ni ziam? Israel kumpipa a hina nial zo khi hi. Ahihang tu in olive thau tawm la in a, Bethlehem khua ah pai in Jesse a kici pasal khat sia kungah haw ta'n, banghang ziam cile ama ii tapate khat kumpi tu in teal zo khi hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel16:2 “Banghang tuabangin ngamta thei tu khi ziam, Saul in tua thu za le keima hong that tu hi,” ci in Samuel in dongh hi. Topa in, “Khuino khat keng in a Topa tungah sangaw biakpiakna tua munah ka vawt tu ci in." 
1Samuel16:3 Sangaw biakpiakna ah Jesse sam in a, tuaciang na sep tu teng kong son tu hi. Keima ii kong son tu pa sia kumpi in sathau noai tu ni hi,” ci in zo hi." 
1Samuel16:4 Samuel in Topa sawl teng vawt tu in Bethlehem ah pai hi, tua munah ama muak tu in khuapi lampuite liing liangin hong pai uh a, “A mukhol thei pa awng, nong hawna sia kilem thu hi buang hi ngawl ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi." 
1Samuel16:5 Ama in, “Hi hi, Topa tungah sangaw biakpiakna khat vawt tu in kong pai hi. Kithiansua vun a, hong pai tavun,” ci in zo hi. Ama in Jesse le a tapate zongh amate le amate kithiansua tu in sawl a, sangaw biakpiakna munah sam hi." 
1Samuel16:6 Amate hong thet ciang, Samuel in Jesse ii tapa Eliab mu a, “Sia pa, hi sung Topa mai ah a dingpa sia ama ii teal sia hi nanak tu hi,” ci in ngaisun hi." 
1Samuel16:7 Ahihang Topa in ama munah, “A tun saanna le a mealphatnate awlmawk heak in. Ama sia nial zo khi hi, banghang ziam cile, mihing thukhen bangin thu ka khen bua hi. Mihing in a pua sang pianzia bek en hi, ahihang kei ka hile a thinsung ka en hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel16:8 Tua zawkciang Jesse in a tapa Abinadab samin Samuel kungah paipui hi. Ahihang Samuel in, “Hi bo, Topa in ama zongh teal ngawl hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel16:9 Jesse in tua zawkciang Shammah paipui hi. “Hi bo, Topa in ama zongh teal bo,” Samuel in ci hi." 
1Samuel16:10 Hi bangin Jesse in a tapa salite Samuel kungah paipui hi. Samuel in ama tungah, “Hi bo, Topa in hite kuama teal ngawl hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel16:11 Tuaciang Samuel in ama tungah, “Tapa dang na nei lai ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Jesse in, “A nobel sia om lai hi, ahihang ama sia tuute cingin om hi,” ci in zo hi. Samuel in, “Hi sungah hong pai natu sawl in,” ci hi. “Sangaw biakpiakna sia ama hong pai mateng kivawt ngawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel16:12 Tua ahikom Jesse in ama samsak hi. Ama sia tangval mealpha, a ciidam, a mit tee vakil khat ahi hi. Topa in Samuel tungah, “Hi sia pa hi — sathau noai in!” ci hi." 
1Samuel16:13 Samuel in olive thau la in a suapuite mai ah David sathau noai hi. Thakhat ma in Topa thaa in David uk a, tua ni pan kipan ama taw omkhawm top hi. Tua zawkciang Samuel sia Ramah ah heak kik hi." 
1Samuel16:14 Topa thaa in Saul nusia a, tuaciang Topa ii paisak thaa ngilo khat in ama vawtsia hi." 
1Samuel16:15 A naseamte in ama munah, “ Topa ii hong paisak thaa ngilo khat in nang hong vawtsiat sia he khu hi." 
1Samuel16:16 Tua ahikom thu hong pia ta'n, topa awng, tengtongh tum a thiam khat ka zong tu uh hi. Tua hile thaa ngilo sia nang tung hong thet ciang, tua pa in tengtongh hong tum tu a, nangma na dam kik tu hi,” ci uh hi." 
1Samuel16:17 Saul in amate thupia a, “Tumthei tum thiam khat zong tavun a, keima kungah hong paipui tavun,” ci hi." 
1Samuel16:18 Ama a cingte khat in, “Bethlehem khua mi Jesse in music a thiam tapa khat nei hi. Ama sia a hang, a mealpha, ngalkap pha khat hi a, thu son thiam khat zongh ahi hi. Topa sia ama taw omkhawm hi,” ci uh hi." 
1Samuel16:19 Tua ahikom Saul in kamtaite Jesse kungah paisak a, “Na tapa David, tuu cing thei sia hong puak ta'n,” cisak hi." 
1Samuel16:20 Jesse in David sia Saul kungah paisak a, kealngual khat, anluum a pua laa khat le savun ip dim sapittui kengsak hi." 
1Samuel16:21 David sia Saul kungah pai a, a naseam in tum hi. Saul in ama diksa mama a, a ngalhiamte pua tu in teal hi." 
1Samuel16:22 Tua zawkciang Saul in Jesse kam thaak hi: “David diksa khi hi. Keima ii naseam in hi munah hong omsak ta'n,” ci hi." 
1Samuel16:23 Tua hun pan kipan Pathian ii puak thaa ngilo sia Saul tungah a thet simin David in a tengtongh tum hi. Thaa ngilo in nusia a, Saul sia a om nuamtuamin hong dam kik hi." 
1Samuel17:1 Judah ngam Socoh khua ah Philistine te ngalsim tu in hong kikhawmtua uh hi; Socoh le Azekah kilaklaw Ephes Dammim a cina mun khat ah ngiaphual saat uh hi. 
1Samuel17:2 Saul le Israel te kikhawmtua in Elah Kuam sungah ngiaphual saat a, Philistine te a do tu in kinging uh hi." 
1Samuel17:3 Philistine te mual khat tungah kingual a, Israel te sia a dang mual tung khat ah kingual in, a kilaklaw ah kuam khat om hi." 
1Samuel17:4 Gath khuapi pan Goliath a kici pasal khat Israel te thato tu in Philistine ngiaphual panin hong pusuak hi. Ama sia a tun meter 3 dektak saang a," 
1Samuel17:5 kilogramme 57 bang a ngit ngaldalna taaupuan silhin taau lukhu khu hi. 
1Samuel17:6 A peangte zongh taau ngaldalna taw tuam a, a liangko ah taau tei khat kua hi." 
1Samuel17:7 A teibul sia thiamtana pumlawng cia pha a, a teipalh sia kilogramme 7 bang ngit hi. Ama mai ah lum a puaksak ngalkap khat pai hi." 
1Samuel17:8 Goliath ding in Israel te ausan a, “Tuasung ah bang hi nu ziam, ngalsim tu in kingual nu ziam? Saul ii silate awng, kei sia Philistine mi khat khi hi! Na mite khat kei taw kido tu in hong teal tavun." 
1Samuel17:9 Ama in kei hong zo in hong thatlum le, ko sia na sila suak tu khu hi; ahihang keima in zo in a ma ka that zo le no sia koma sila suak tu nu hi." 
1Samuel17:10 Tu mama in Israel ngalkaphonpi hong thato khi hi. Kei taw a kido ngam tu khat hong kidok ka sin vun,” ci hi." 
1Samuel17:11 Saul le a mite in hi thu a zaak uh ciang patau ngawp uh hi. 
1Samuel17:12 28 David sia Jesse ii tapa hi a, Judah ngam Bethlehem khua pan Ephrath mi ahi hi. Jesse in tapa liat nei a, Saul kumpi a sep lai hunin ama sia huai mama zo hi." 
1Samuel17:13 A tapa lianbel thum te Saul taw ngalsimin kuan zo uh hi. A ubel sia Eliab hi a, a zom sia Abinadab, a thumna sia Shammah ahi hi." 
1Samuel17:14 David sia a nobel hi a, a ubel thum teng Saul taw a om laitakin," 
1Samuel17:15 David sia Bethlehem khua ah a pa ii tuute cing tu in cia vazek hi. 
1Samuel17:16 Goliath in Israel te zing sim nitak sim, ni sawmli sung sitset thato hi." 
1Samuel17:17 Ni khat ni in Jesse in David munah, “Hi an em min sa kilogramme sawm le anluum sawm teng la in na ute omna ngiaphual ah manlang in va pai ta'n." 
1Samuel17:18 Tuaciang hi noaikhal sawm teng sia a ngalkap mang pa va puak ta'n. Na ute bangbangin om ziam hong kan ta'n a, amate taw ciidam in na kimuna nong lak natu in bang ziam khat hong ciapui ta'n." 
1Samuel17:19 Kumpipa Saul, na ute le Israel dang teng sia Elah Kuam ah Philistine te do in om hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel17:20 A zing ciang zing tuungin David tho in, tuute a en tu mi dang khat vaipuak pia a nguai an heang in, Jesse sawlna ah pai hi. Israel te ngalmai ah ngalsim tu in kuan a, hanla a sam laitakin David theng hi." 
1Samuel17:21 Philistine te le Israel te in kido natu mun la a, kimaitua in om uh hi." 
1Samuel17:22 David in a nguai an teng an zeak ngalkapmang pa aap a, ngalmai ah tai in a ute kungah bangbang na hi uh ziam ci in dongh hi." 
1Samuel17:23 Ama te a kipaupui laitakin Goliath sia mai ah hong pai a, nidang a hi ngei bangma in Israel te thato hi. Tuaciang David in ama aw za hi." 
1Samuel17:24 Israel te in Goliath a mu uh ciang lau in taikeak uh hi. 
1Samuel17:25 “Ama en vun! A thatona ngai vun! Kumpipa Saul in ama a that zo sia tel lian khat piak tu in kamciam hi; kumpipa in a teenpui tu in a tanu pia si tu a, a pa bangkua zongh phiangshia piasak ngawl tu hi,” ci in amate khat le khat kison uh hi." 
1Samuel17:26 David in ama kung nai a omte munah, “Hi Philistine pa that zo a, Israel mite mindaina pan a suaktasak sia in bang nga tu ziam? A peuma in hi Pathian he ngawl Philistine pa sia akua ka hi ci a, a nungta Pathian ii ngalkaphonpi nalh ngam ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
1Samuel17:27 Amate in Goliath a that pa ii nga tu teng son uh hi. 
1Samuel17:28 David ii a u lianbel Eliab in David le mite kipaupui na teng za hi. Ama thin uuk a David tungah, “Nang hi sungah bang hong zong ni ziam? Dui sungah na tuute akua in keam tu ziam? Kin ngawl tu teng a kin, nang thong awng! Ngal kido en tu bekin hong pai na hi ziam!” ci hi." 
1Samuel17:29 David in, “Tu in bang vawt na khi ziam? Thu khat beak zongh hong dongh thei ngawl tu khi ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
1Samuel17:30 Ama in midang khat sang nga in tua teng ma dongh hi, a dok simin tuabang vive ma in kizo hi." 
1Samuel17:31 Pawlkhat in David ii pau teng za a, Saul tungah son uh hi, tuaciang Saul in ama samsak hi." 
1Samuel17:32 David in Saul munah, “Kumpipa awng, hi Philistine pa sia kuama ii kiitak kul ngawl hi! Keima pai in ama do tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel17:33 Saul in, “Hi ngawl hi, bangbangin ama do zo tu ni ziam? Nang sia patang hi lai in, ama sia a khan tawntung ngalkap a seam sa hi!” ci in zo hi." 
1Samuel17:34 David in, “Kumpipa awng, kei sia ka pa ii tuute a keamcing pa khi hi. Tawpi in ahizong vompui in ahizong tuuno khat hong tuasak sim ma in," 
1Samuel17:35 del in ka sim a, tuuno ka suatak hi. Tuasia ciang tawpi ahibuale vompui in kei sang hong zot ciang, a longtawl pan zamh in, ka teak lum hi." 
1Samuel17:36 Tawpite le vompuite ka that zo a, a nungta Pathian ii ngalkap hon a nalh pa, Pathian he ngawl Philistine pa sia tuabang ma in vawt tu khi hi." 
1Samuel17:37 Topa in tawpi le vompuite panin hong hut sa khi hi; ama in hi Philistine pa khut sung pan hong hun tu hi,” ci hi. Saul in, “Pha hi, va pai ta'n a, Topa nang taw hong omkhawm tahen,” ci hi." 
1Samuel17:38 Ama ii ngaldalnate David pia a; David lu tungah taau lukhu khusakin, ngaldalna puan silhsak hi." 
1Samuel17:39 David in Saul ii namsau sia a ngaldalna puan tung pan kua in lampai tu a kisin le a pai thei bua hi, banghang ziam cile ama in tuate silh ngeingawl hi. Saul munah, “Hiteng taw kei ngalsim thei ngawl tu khi hi. Kei kingeinasee ngawl khi hi,” ci hi. Tua ahikom tua teng suutsiat hi." 
1Samuel17:40 Ama in a tuu cinna ciang la in, lui sung pan suangtang ngil nga tawmin, a thung sungah heang hi. A saili taw a kinging sa in Goliath taw kisi tu in kuan hi." 
1Samuel17:41 Philistine pa sia David sangah a kalsuan hong kipan a, a lumtoaipa sia a mai ah pai hi. A nai vaial in ama hong pai a," 
1Samuel17:42 Ama in David pha takin a et zawkciang simmawkna taw hong kidim hi, banghang ziam cile David sia a etlawm a mealpha patang khat hi lel hi." 
1Samuel17:43 Ama in David munah, “Na ciang toai sia bang tu ziam? Kei sia ui po hong sa ni ziam?” ci hi. Ama ii pathian min taw David haamsiat hi." 
1Samuel17:44 Ama in David thato a, “Hong kuan ta'n, na pumpi sia vacimte le ngamsate neak tu in pia tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel17:45 David in, “Nang sia kei hong sim tu in namsau, teipi le thikzum taw hong kuan ni hi, ahihang kei ka hile na nalh tawntung sa Topa Vaanglianbelpa, Israel ngalkaphonpite ii Pathian min taw hong kuan khi hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel17:46 Tuni mama in Topa in nang sia keima khut sungah hong pia tu hi; kong zo tu a, na lu ka tan tu hi. Tuaciang Philistine ngalkapte luang sia vacimte le ngamsate neak tu in ka pia tu hi. Tuasia tak ciang leitung buppi in Israel ii Pathian khat a nei hunlam he tu hi," 
1Samuel17:47 tuaciang hi sungah a om mi sim in, a mite a hut natu in Topa in namsau le teite kisamh ngawl hi ci in musak tu hi. Ama sia ngalphual ah a zo pa hi a, no teng sia ko khutnuai ah hong koi tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
1Samuel17:48 Goliath in David sang zuan tu in hong kipan leleau hi, tuaciang David sia ama do tu in Philistine ngalmai sangah manlang in hong tai hi." 
1Samuel17:49 Ama in a thung sung sawk in, a saili tang la a, Goliath kap hi. Goliath ii talki kha a, a lungu tamh in Goliath sia a khup lam in lei ah puksuk hi." 
1Samuel17:50 Tuabangin namsau ngawl taw, saili le suangtang khat taw David in Goliath zo in thatlum hi!" 
1Samuel17:51 Ama tai in Goliath tungah a din zawkciang Goliath ii namsau a paai sung pan dok a, a ngawng tan in that hi. Philistine te in a ngalhang pa thi a mu ciangin taimang uh hi." 
1Samuel17:52 Israel mite le Judah mite au in amate del a, Gath le Ekron kongpite dong zuizen uh hi. Shaaraim paina lampi Gath le Ekron dong lamdung ah Philistine te liamin puk uh hi." 
1Samuel17:53 Israel te in Philistine te a zuizenna pan hong cia kik ciang a ngiaphual phuulsak uh hi. 
1Samuel17:54 David in Goliath lutang tawm in Jerusalem ah paipui hi, ahihang Goliath ii ngalhiamte sia ama puanbuk sungah keam hi." 
1Samuel17:55 Saul in Goliath taw kido tu in a pai David a mu ciang, a ngalkaphonpi ukpa Abner munah, “Abner awng, ama akua tapa ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Abner in, “Kumpipa awng, akua tapa ziam ngaisun zo ngawl khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
1Samuel17:56 Saul in, “Tua ahile va kan ta'n,” ci in thupia hi." 
1Samuel17:57 Tua ahikom Goliath thatlum zo a, ngalphual ah David hong heak kik ciang in, Abner in Saul kungah paipui hi. David in Goliath lutang pua nginge lai hi." 
1Samuel17:58 Saul in, “Tangvalpa awng, nang akua tapa ni ziam?” ci in dongh hi. David in, “Bethlehem khua mi na naseampa Jesse ii tapa khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
1Samuel18:1 Saul le David a thuson man zo hi. Tuasia zawkciang Saul ii tapa Jonathan sia David tungah nasia takin a lung tu a, ama le ama a ki it za in David hong it hi." 
1Samuel18:2 Saul in David sia tua ni pan kipan keam in, a inn ah a cia kiksak nawn bua hi." 
1Samuel18:3 Jonathan in David it mama ahikom a tawntung kilawmtat natu in kiciam hi. 
1Samuel18:4 Ama in a puantual silh lai sia suutin David pia hi, tua taw kikop in a ngaldalna puan, tuaciang a namsau, a thal le a kawngkhaute zongh pia hi." 
1Samuel18:5 David sia Saul ii puakna po ah a nasep theampo zo ahikom Saul in ngalkap mang khat in koi hi. Hisia in Saul ii ngalkap bute le a mite lungkimsak hi. 
1Samuel18:6 David in Goliath a thalup zawkciang hong heak kik a, tuaciang ngalkapte inn ah hong cia kik laitakin Israel ngamsung khua theampo pan numeite in Saul kumpipa muak tu in hong pai uh hi. Amate lungnopna late sa in laam a, daalkual khuangnote le liamlote tum uh hi." 
1Samuel18:7 A poai vawtna sungah numeite in lasa in, “Saul in a tul in that a, ahihang David in a tulsawm simin that hi,” ci uh hi." 
1Samuel18:8 Saul in hisia diksa ngawl a, a thin uuk mama hi. Ama in, “David atu in amate in a tulsawm simin that ci a, kei ciang a tul simin that hong ci bek hi. Amate in a kik ciang ama sia kumpipa suaksak tu hi!” ci hi." 
1Samuel18:9 Tua hi a, tua ni pan kipan sia ama in David eang a, telkhial vilvel hi." 
1Samuel18:10 A zing ciang Pathian kung pan thaa ngilo khat in thakhat thu in Saul hong uk a, a inn sungah a thin amh khat bangin kitom ngawp hi. David sia ni simin a tum ngei tengtongh tutum a, tuaciang Saul sia tei khat toai hi." 
1Samuel18:11 Saul in, “Pang taw cipin ama khaw let tong,” ama le ama kici a, ama in a tei taw niivei khaw hi; ahihang David in a khaw sim ma in pial hi." 
1Samuel18:12 Saul in David kiita hi, banghang ziam cile Topa in David ompui a, ama nusia hi." 
1Samuel18:13 Tua ahikom Saul in ama sia, a khualana ah ngalkap tulkhat uk tu in paisak hi. David in a mite ngalsimna sungah lampui a," 
1Samuel18:14 tuaciang a sim theampo zo hi, banghang ziam ci le Topa in ama ompui hi." 
1Samuel18:15 David ii zawnate Saul in heaksak a, kiita seseam hi." 
1Samuel18:16 Ahihang Israel le Judah ngam a mihingte theampo in David it uh hi, banghang ziam cile tuabangin nasep a zo lampui thiam khat ahi hi." 
1Samuel18:17 Tua zawkciang Saul in David munah, “Hi sungah ka tanu u zaw Merab om hi. Ngalhang le ngalkap thumaan khat bangin keima na, hong sepsak in, Topa ii ngal dosak po lete na zi tu in ama hong pia tu khi hi,” ci hi. (Saul in ama ii David a thalup kul ngawl a, Philistine te ii hi bangin thalup tu in a ngaisun hi.)" 
1Samuel18:18 David in, “Kei akua hi a kumpipa ii maakpa ka sua natu ka bangkua bang hi na ziam?” ci in zo hi." 
1Samuel18:19 Ahihang David atu Merab sia mo in thaak tu hun hong thet peetma ciang Meholah pan Adriel ci pasal khat kipia zaw hi. 
1Samuel18:20 Saul ii tanu Michal ahile David taw ki it a, hi thu Saul in a zaak ciang lungkim hi." 
1Samuel18:21 Ama le ama hi bangin kici hi, “Michal sia David ka pia tu a; ama thaang ka sia natu ka tanu zangh tu khi hi, tuasia ciang Philistine te in ama thatlum tu hi.” Tua ahikom Saul in David munah a nii veina in, “Nang sia ka maakpa hi tu ni hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel18:22 A ngalkapmangte in ama munah hi bangin ci kusak hi. “Kumpipa sia nang tungah lungkim a, tuaciang a ulian theampo in nang dik hong sa hi; tu laitak sia a tanu na teenpui tu hunpha hi,” ci uh hi." 
1Samuel18:23 Tua ahikom amate in David munah tu a teng son uh hi, tuaciang ama in, “Bangma a thupi sim thamman ngawl mizawng kei bang atu kumpipa ii maakpa sua tu sia kithupi vawtna lian lei hi,” ci in zo hi." 
1Samuel18:24 Uliante in Saul munah David ci teng a son uh ciang," 
1Samuel18:25 Saul in amate thupia in, “Kumpipa ii nang tung pan a dei mo man sia, a ngalte tung a phulam na in, Philistine mithi zakhatte ii vunteap hi,” cisak hi. (Hi sia Philistine te in David a thalup thei natu Saul ii ngealna ahi hi.)" 
1Samuel18:26 Saul ii uliante in Saul pauna teng David tungah son kik a, David sia kumpipa maakpa a sua tu ngaisun in a lungdam hi. Kiteen tu ni a see ma in," 
1Samuel18:27 David le a mite kuan in Philistine te 200 thatlum uh hi. Ama in kumpipa mai ah amate vunteap teng paipui in a maakpa a sua thei natu in a mai pan sim siat hi. Tua ahikom Saul in a tanu Michal sia David taw kiteang tu in a piak kul hi. 
1Samuel18:28 Saul in David taw, Topa omkhawm a, a tanu Michal zonghin David it ci in telthiang hi." 
1Samuel18:29 Tua ahikom ama in David kiita seseam a, a nuntak lai teng ngal in nei hi." 
1Samuel18:30 Philistine ngalkaphonpite hong pai in sim bul hi, ahihang kidona theampo ah David sia Saul ii ngalkap mang dangte sangin ngalzo thei zaw hi. Ta sia taw kizui in David hong minthang mama hi." 
1Samuel19:1 Saul in a tapa Jonathan le a uliante theampo tungah David thalup tu a ngealna son hi. Ahihang Jonathan in David it mama ahikom," 
1Samuel19:2 ama munah, “Ka pa in nang hong thatlum tu in hanciam hi. Zingsang ciangin kidawm in; kuama heak ngawlna mun khat ah buu in a, tuak ah om top in." 
1Samuel19:3 Na bukna lo sung ka pa kungah pai in ka ding tu a, nangma ii thu ka son tu hi. Thu thak khat pawpo ka mu le kong hesak tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel19:4 Jonathan in Saul tungah David pok in, “Topa awng, na naseampa David tungah khial tha heak in. Ama in nang tungah hong khial ngeingawl hi; tuabang hi kana teng ci bua hing, a sep a vawt theampo nangma atu hu na lianpi vive hi." 
1Samuel19:5 Goliath a thalup lai zongh in, ama ii luangkhaam a, tuaciang Topa in Israel te atu zawna lianpi nga hi. Tua na mu ciangin na lungdam hi. Tua ahile banghangin, a maw ngawl khat tungah tu in khialna vawt nuamin, bangma a thu om ngawl bul David thatlum nuam ni ziam?” ci hi." 
1Samuel19:6 Jonathan ci teng Saul in tel thei a, David that ngawl tu ci in Topa min taw kiciamna vawt hi." 
1Samuel19:7 Tua ahikom Jonathan in David sam a, a thu theampo son hi; tuaciang Saul kungah ama paipui in a sep maksak lai bangin David in kumpipa na seam hi." 
1Samuel19:8 Philistine te taw ngal hong piang kik hi. David in sim a, nasia takin zo ahikom, amate taikeak uh hi." 
1Samuel19:9 Ni khat ni in Topa kung pan thaa ngilo khat in Saul uk hi. Ama sia a inn sungah tei khat toai in to a, tuaciang David sia tengtongh tumin tua munah om hi." 
1Samuel19:10 Saul in David sia pang taw cipin a tei taw khaw hi, ahihang David in pial in a tei sia pang tungah po hi. David tai in suakta hi." 
1Samuel19:11 Tua zan ma in Saul in pasal pawlkhat David inn encik tu le zingsang ciang ama thatlum tu in paisak hi. David ii zi Michal in a kidop natu in sonkhol a, “Tuni tak na kiheam buale zingsang ciang thi tu ni hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel19:12 A zi in khelki panin khiasuk a, ama tai in suakta hi." 
1Samuel19:13 Tua zawkciang Michal in a innkuan ii biak milim sia la in, lupna tungah a sial zawkciang, kealmul taw a kivawt lukham khamhsak in sitna khat taw siin hi." 
1Samuel19:14 Saul ii mite in David that tu in hong pai uh ciang, Michal in ama a ciina hi ci hi." 
1Samuel19:15 Ahihang Saul in paisak kik a, amate mama ii David a etcian natu thupia hi. Ama in, “A lupna taw hi sungah hong zawng tavun, keima that tu khi hi,” ci in thupia hi." 
1Samuel19:16 Amate inn sungah pai kik a, lupna tungah innkuan ii biak milim sia kealmul lukham khamhin a om mu uh hi." 
1Samuel19:17 Saul in Michal munah, “Banghang hi bangin kei hong theamin, ka ngalpa suaktasak ni ziam,” ci in dongh hi. Ama in, “A suatak natu hu bua leng, kei kong that tu hong ci hi,” ci in zo hi." 
1Samuel19:18 David suakta in Ramah khua, Samuel kungah pai in Saul ii ama a vawtna te a vekpi in son hi. Tua zawkciang ama le Samuel sia Naioth ah pai in tua munah taam uh hi." 
1Samuel19:19 David sia Ramah khua sung Naioth ah om hi ci in Saul tungah kison hi," 
1Samuel19:20 tua ahikom ama man tu in mihing pawlkhat paisak hi. Amate in Samuel a lampui in nei a, kamsaang honkhat laamin au in a om mu uh hi. Tuasia ciang Pathian thaa in Saul ii mite uk a, amate zongh a lap a au hong kipan uh hi." 
1Samuel19:21 Saul in hi thu a zaak ciang kamtai pawlkhat pai thuasak a, amate zongh laam tu au tu in hong kipan uh hi. Ama in kamtaite a thum veina paisak a, amate zongh tuabang ma in ngamta uh hi." 
1Samuel19:22 Tuaciang ama mama Ramah ah pai tu in vai ding hi. Secu ah tuikhuk lian khat a thet ciangin Samuel le David koi sungah om ziam, ci in dongh a, amate Naioth ah om hi ci in kison hi." 
1Samuel19:23 Ama tuak sangah a pai ciang Pathian thaa in ama zongh uk a, Naioth dong lam tawntung laamin au hi." 
1Samuel19:24 Ama in Samuel omna ah a puan suutin laam in au a, a pumnguak in tua ni le tua zan lum hi. (Hisung panin, “Saul ngawngawn kamsaang suak zo ziam?” a ci paunak hong piang hi.)" 
1Samuel20:1 Tua zawkciang Ramah khua Naioth panin David tai a, Jonathan kung zuan hi. Ama in, “Kei a bang vawt na khi ziam?Bang khialna lian vawt khi ziam? Na pa tungah bang tat khialna ka nei hu in kei hong that nuam liang ziam?” ci hi." 
1Samuel20:2 Jonathan in, “Pathian in na thi tu oai ngawl hi! Thupi kale thupi ta buale, ka pa in a sep a vawt theampo kei hong son a phualseal ngeingawl tu hi. Tuabang ma hi ngawl ziam?” ci in zo hi." 
1Samuel20:3 Ahizong David in, “Kei bangza in hong it na hi sia na pa in tel mama hi, tuaciang na pa in a ngealnate nang hong heaksak ngawl natu khensat zo hi, banghang ziam ci le nasia takin na thinna tu hi. A nungta Topa taw kiciam ngam in kong son nop pan, kei sia ka thi natu kal khat bek in samh hi!” ci in zo hi." 
1Samuel20:4 Jonathan in, “Nangma uk babangin seam tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel20:5 David in, “Zing ciang sia Tha Thak Poai ni hi. Tuaciang kei sia kumpipa taw an nekhawm tu in hong kingaisun hi. Ahizong nangma in phamaw na sa bua nale lo sungah pai in thai nitak sang dong buu tu khi hi." 
1Samuel20:6 Na pa in sabuai ah ka to ngawl hunlam hong phawk le Bethlehem khua ah a innkuan bup atu in kumcin sangaw biakpiakna vawt tu hun ahi hu in kei tungah manlang takin a cia natu hong ngen hi ci in na son in. 
1Samuel20:7 Ama in, ‘Pha hi,’ a ci le kei ngammuang tu khi hi; ahihang ama hong thin uuk le kei hong susia tu in khensat ahi sia na he tu hi." 
1Samuel20:8 Nong hesuakna in, hi a thiangtho kamciamna kei tungah nong piak sia na kho let in. Ahizong keima mama a maw ka hile nangma in hong thatlum ta'n. Banghangin na pa ii hong thalup tu in hong paipui tu ni ziam?” ci in zo kik hi." 
1Samuel20:9 Jonathan in, “Tuabangte ngaisut zongin nei vet heak in! Ka pa in nang hong susia nuam ci in he tatak leng hong son ngawl tu khi ziam?” ci in zo hi." 
1Samuel20:10 Tuasia ciang David in, “Tua ahile na pa ii thin uuk awsua taw hong zo le hong zo ngawl sia akua in kei hong hesak tu ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
1Samuel20:11 Jonathan in, “Lo sungah pai ka tawng,” ci in zo hi. Tuabangin amate pai uh hi," 
1Samuel20:12 Jonathan in David munah, “Israel ii Topa Pathian sia ih tetti hi hen! Zing ciang, hi hun le a zing kik ciangin ka pa dongh tu khi hi. Ama ii nang hong ngaisutzia a pha le kong zasak tu hi." 
1Samuel20:13 Ama in nang, suksiat hong sawmin, tua thu kong hesak bua a, kong suaktasak buale Topa in kei hong vaatlum tahen. Topa sia ka pa taw a omkhop bangin nang taw zong hong omkhawm tahen!" 
1Samuel20:14 A nungta in ka om le, a thiangtho na kamciamna keam in a, kei tungah hong thumaan ta'n; ahihang ka thi le," 
1Samuel20:15 ka innkuanpuite tungah tuabang thumaanna na lak tawntung in. Tuaciangin Topa in na ngalte a vekpi in a maaimot zawkciang," 
1Samuel20:16 ei ii khat le khat tungah ih kamciam sia peal ngawlin kho lai tahen. Tuasia na ciampeal le Pathian in nang daan hong pia tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel20:17 Khatvei ma Jonathan in ama a it natu David in kamciam piasak kik hi, banghang ziam cile Jonathan in David sia ama pumpi a it za in it hi." 
1Samuel20:18 Tuaciang Jonathan in, “Zing ciang Tha Thak Poai ahiciang an neakna ah om buale teh, na om ngawl hunlam kician tu hi." 
1Samuel20:19 Thai ciangin na om ngawl hunlam kitel seseam tu hi; tua ahikom va pai in tu nung a na bukna suang kholna lia ah na buu in. 
1Samuel20:20 Tua suangkhol sia phutuun bangin thaltang tang thum taw kong kap tu hi. 
1Samuel20:21 Tuaciang ka naseampa munah tua thaltangte zongin ka sawl tu hi. Tuaciang ama munah, ‘En in, thaltangte nangma ii hi sangah om hi, tawm in,’ ka ci le nangma ngammuang takin hong pusuak thei tu ni hi. A nungta Topa taw ka kiciam hi, na lau tu bangma om ngawl tu hi." 
1Samuel20:22 Ahihang ama munah, ‘Thaltangte nangma ii langkhat ah om hi,’ ka ci le na tai in, banghang ziam ci le Topa in nang hong kiheamsak ahi tu hi." 
1Samuel20:23 Eima khat le khat kamciam ih kipiakna sia Topa in ih kepcing tawntung natu in hong piangsak tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel20:24 Tua ahikom David sia lo sungah buu hi. Tha Thak Poai ah Saul kumpipa anneakna ah hong pai a," 
1Samuel20:25 tuaciang ama to ngeina mun pang hui ah to hi. Abner sia ama kungah to a, Jonathan sia ama taw kimaingat in to hi. David tona sia awng thong hi," 
1Samuel20:26 ahihang tua ni in Saul in bangma son ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile, “Ama bang khat po tat hi tha tu hi, tuaciang a zeksa ngeina taw kisai in thiang ngawl po zongh hi thei tu hi,” ci in ngaisun hi." 
1Samuel20:27 Tha Thak Poai khuavak ni in, David ii tona awngthong lai a, tuaciang Saul in Jonathan munah, “Banghangin David in zeini zongh, tuni zongh an ne tu in hong pai ngawl ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
1Samuel20:28 Jonathan in, “Bethlehem khua ah a pai natu in kei munah hong ngen hi." 
1Samuel20:29 Ama in, ‘Nong hesuakna in hong paisak ta'n, banghang ziam cile ka innkuan uh in sangaw biakpiakna poai khua sungah vawt tu khu hi, tuaciang ka suapuipa in tua munah om tu in thu hong pia hi. Tua ahikom ka ngualtamh na hi le hong paisak ta'n a, ka mealheakte taw hong kimusak ta'n,’ hong ci hi. Tua hu in ama sia na sabuai ah om thei ngawl hi,” ci in zo hi." 
1Samuel20:30 Saul sia Jonathan tungah a thinso a, “Bangza ta in na nu in ngual langpan a thumaan ngawl ziam! Tu in David sangah pang na hi sia hong tel khi hi, tuaciang nangma le tua na nu min daisak ni hi!" 
1Samuel20:31 David nuntak lai teng nang sia bangma hun hi ngam ii kumpipa suak ngeingawl tu na hi hunlam na he ziam? Tu in va pai ta'n a, hi sungah ama hong paipui ta'n — ama a thi kul hi!” ci hi." 
1Samuel20:32 Jonathan in, “Banghang thi liang tu ziam? Ama in bang seam na ziam?” ci in zo kik hi." 
1Samuel20:33 Tuasia ciang, Saul in Jonathan that nuamin tei taw khaw hi, tuaciang Jonathan in a pa ii David a thalup nop takpi hunlam tel hi." 
1Samuel20:34 Jonathan thin uuk mama in sabuai pan dingto a, tua ni bup bangma ne ngawl hi — tuasia Tha Thak Poai a ni nii ni ahi hi. David huvau in ama nasia takin a thinnuam ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile Saul in ama zawnsak vawt hi." 
1Samuel20:35 A zingsang ciangin a thukim sa om bangma Jonathan sia David taw kisi tu in lo sungah pai hi. Ama in patang khat pai pui a," 
1Samuel20:36 tuaciang ama munah, “Thaltang ka kaa tu sia tai in va zong ta'n,” ci hi. Patang sia tai a, Jonathan in a thaltang khat patang ii mai a kalh tu in kap hi." 
1Samuel20:37 Patang pa in a thaltang tukna a thet ciang Jonathan in oksan a, “Thaltang sia a khuala zawna ah tu hi!" 
1Samuel20:38 Tua munah ding top heak in! Manlang in!” ci hi. Patang no sia thaltang tawmin a topa kungah heak kik hi," 
1Samuel20:39 a topa cinopna theampo a tel bua hi; Jonathan le David bek in he uh hi. 
1Samuel20:40 Jonathan in patang sia a ngalhiam pia a, khua sungah ciapui in sawl hi." 
1Samuel20:41 Patang ii a nusiat zawkciang, David sia suangkholna nung panin dingto a, hong khupdin in a maitang lei pha in thumvei hong kun hi. Jonathan le ama kinamh in kap khawm uh hi; David ii khuangaina sia Jonathan aa sangin nasia zaw lai hi." 
1Samuel20:42 Tua zawkciang Jonathan in David munah, “Pathian nang taw hong om tahen. Topa in nang le kei, nang ii suan le paalte le kei aa te khat le khat tungah a thiangtho kamciam ih vawt sa te hong keamcingsak thei tahen,” ci hi. Tua zawkciang David in nusia a, Jonathan sia khua sung zuan kik hi." 
1Samuel21:1 Nob khua ah a om thiampi Ahimelech kungah David pai hi. Ahimelech a liing sa in ama muak tu in pai a, “Nangma nguakin hi sungah banghang hong pai ni ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
1Samuel21:2 “Kumpipa vai taw kei hi sungah kong pai hi,” ci in David in zo hi. “Ama in ka sep tu te kuama ka heaksak ngawl tu in hong paisak hi. Ka mite ahile mun khat ah kisiktua tu in ka sawl hi." 
1Samuel21:3 Tua hi a, tu in nguai an bang teng nei ni ziam? Anluum nga ahibuale zong a dang na nei khat po hong pia ta'n!” ci hi." 
1Samuel21:4 Thiampipa in, “Anluum thawthong nei ngawl khi hi, a kithiansua sa anluum bek nei khi hi; na mite in tu nai sungin numei taw a omkhawm bua na uh le tuate nga thei ni hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel21:5 David in, “Tuabang omkhawm ngawl hi, ka mite sia a kisawl thawthong khat ah seam tu a pai bek zong, a zeksa in amate le amate kithiangsak tawntung hi, tua ahile tu a ko hong kisawl tuamna ah ka pai uh ciang thiang seseam ngawl tu khu ziam?,” ci in zo hi." 
1Samuel21:6 Tua ahikom thiampipa in David sia a thiangtho anluumte pia hi, banghang ziam cile anluum a nei sun teng Pathian a kipia hi a, sabuai thiang panin a kisot sa hi a, anluum thak taw a kilaih sa hi." 
1Samuel21:7 (Saul ii Edom pan a tuucing ukpa Doeg sia tua ni in tua munah biakna vai sepna khat a khuangkhimsak tu in na om luilam hi.) 
1Samuel21:8 David in Ahimelech munah, “Tei ahizong namsau ahizong khat kei nong piak tu na nei ziam? Kumpipa thupiakte in tuabang manlang tatakin hong paisak ahikom ka namsau ahizong ngalhiam dang khat po ahizong laak tu hun ka nei nawn bua hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel21:9 Ahimelech in, “Elah Kuam sungah na thalup Philistine te Goliath ii namsau nei khi hi; tuasia ephod ii nungah puan taw kituun in om hi. Na dei le la in — hi sungah a om ngalhiam sia tuasia bekma hi,” ci in zo hi. David in, “Hong pia ta'n, tuasia sangin a phazaw namsau dang koima ah om ngawl hi!” ci hi." 
1Samuel21:10 Tuabangin David in Saul kung pan tai in, tua mun zongh nusia in, Gath ah kumpipa Achish kung zuan hi." 
1Samuel21:11 Kumpipa ii uliante in, “Hisia David hi kana ngawl ziam? Ama ii ngam sungah kumpipa hi ngawl ziam? Numeite a lap kawmin la a sak uh, ‘Saul in a tul in that a, David in a tulsawm in that hi’ a ci sia hi ngawl ziam?” ci uh hi." 
1Samuel21:12 Amate ii kammalte in David thinsung nasia takin patausak hi, tuaciang ama in Kumpipa Achish sia kiita mama hi." 
1Samuel21:13 Tua ahikom amate a kiim le a paam ah hong om uh ciang David sia a thin kiamhsak in, a letcip nop uh ciang, mihing mawmaw te bangin kithoai hi; khuapi kongpite tung ngelh zazaan in, a khamul tungah a cil kaaisak dimdum hi." 
1Samuel21:14 Tua ahikom Achish in uliante munah, “En vun! Hisia pa mawmaw hi! Banghang kei kungah hong paipui nu ziam?" 
1Samuel21:15 Mihing mawmaw a kicing khomkhat nei zo hi ngawl khi ziam? Hi lai ka bangkua sungah ama ii mawmawt ngamtatna te taw ka thin hong nawngkaisak tu in banghang midang khat hong paipui nu ziam?” ci hi. 
1Samuel22:1 David sia Gath khuapi panin tai in Adullam khua nai suanghawng khat zuan hi. A suapuipate le a innkuanpui dangte in tua thu a zaak ciang ama pawm uh hi. 
1Samuel22:2 Mihing a kinengniamte, leiba neite ahibuale lungkim ngawlna a nei pawpo in ama kungah zuanin, a vekpi a kingawm in pasal 400 bang pha a, ama sia amate lampui suak hi." 
1Samuel22:3 David in tua mun panin Moab ngam Mizpah ah paitan a, Moab kumpipa munah, “Pathian in kei atu bang hong vawtsak tu ci ka heak dong, ka pa le ka nu sia nang kungah na omsak natu in hesuak kong ngen hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel22:4 Tuabangin David in a pa le a nu sia Moab kumpipa kungah nusia a, David ii suanghawng sung a buk lai teng amate tua munah om uh hi." 
1Samuel22:5 Tua ciangin kamsaang Gad sia David kungah pai a, “Hi sungah om heak in; Judah ngam ah tu mama in pai in,” ci hi. Tua ahikom David in tua mun nusia in Hereth duisung zuan hi." 
1Samuel22:6 Ni khat ni in Saul sia Gibeah ngamsung mualtung makeang kung khat nuai ah tei toai in om a, a ulian teng ama kiim ah dingin om hi. David le a mite sia kimu zo hi ci in ama tungah thu kiko a," 
1Samuel22:7 tuaciang ama in a uliante munah, “Benjamin mite awng, ngai vun! David in note theampo lote le sapithuante hong pia in, ama ngalkaphonpi sungah ngalkap ulian hong pia tu in muangmaw nu ziam?" 
1Samuel22:8 Tuasia hu in kei suam tu hong sawm na hi uh ziam? Ka tapa tilteal in David taw a kipawl hunlam no sung pan khat zongh in hong son ngawl nu hi. Kuama in kei hong thinnuam maw ngawlin, keima mi khat ahi David in tu hun tatak ma in kei hong thalup natu hunpha khat zon saan a, ka tapa in ama hanthawn ahi hunlam hong son ngawl nu hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel22:9 Doeg sia Saul ii uliante taw tua munah a dinkhop laitak ama in, “Nob khua ah Ahitub ii tapa Ahimelech thiampipa kungah David a pai mu khi hi." 
1Samuel22:10 David in bang teng vawt kul tu ziam ci in Ahimelech in Topa dongh a, tua zawkciang David an tawm pia in, Philistine mi Goliath ii namsau sia pia hi,” ci in son hi." 
1Samuel22:11 Kumpipa Saul in thiampi Ahimelech le Nob ah thiampite ma ahi a mealheak teng samsak a, hong pai tek hi." 
1Samuel22:12 Saul in Ahimelech munah, “Ahimelech awng, hong ngai ta'n,” ci hi. Ama in, “Nong sawl po seam tu khi hi, topa,” ci in zo hi." 
1Samuel22:13 Saul in thu dongh a, “Nang le David in banghangin kei hong thasawm nu ziam? Banghangin ama an tawm le namsau pia in, Pathian munah ama atu thu doksak ni ziam? Tu in ama in kei hong langpan a, hong thalup natu hunpha khat ngakin a om laitak hi!” ci hi." 
1Samuel22:14 Ahimelech in, “David sia nangma nei a thumaanbel ulian hi! Ama sia na maakpa, nangma hong cingte ii ngalkap mang pa, tuaciang kumpipa inn sungah a om theampo ii a zatak mama pa hi." 
1Samuel22:15 Hi hi, ama atu Pathian tungah thu dongh peu khi hi, ahizong hisia a masa phitbel hi ngawl hi. Nang hong kithasawm na taw kisai in, kumpipa awng, kei ka hizong, ka innkuan sungah a dang khat pawpo ahizong maw hong suan thei ngawl tu ni hi. Hi thu huvau bangma he ngawl khi hi!” ci in zo hi." 
1Samuel22:16 Kumpipa in, “Ahimelech awng, nang le na mealheak theampo na thi uh kul hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel22:17 Tua zawkciang ama a cing, a kungah a dingte munah, “ Topa ii thiampite that vun! Amate in David taw kikum ku in, ama a taimang zongh he napi hong son ngawl hi,” ci hi. Ahihang amate in Topa ii thiampite thalup natu a khut tungsak nuam ngawl uh hi." 
1Samuel22:18 Tua ahikom Saul in Doeg munah, “Amate nangma that in!” ci a — tuasia ciang Doeg in thatlum siat hi. Tua ni in ephod a silh thei sa thiampi 85 that hi." 
1Samuel22:19 Saul in thiampite khuapi Nob khua sungah a teang dangte theampo zongh thalup natu thupia a: pasal, numei, patang le nausen, khuite, laate le tuute — tuate theampo kithat hi." 
1Samuel22:20 Ahihang Abiathar a kici Ahimelech ii tapa khat suakta a, ama in David zuanin pawm hi." 
1Samuel22:21 Saul ii Topa thiampite a thalupna vai ama in son hi. 
1Samuel22:22 David in ama tungah, “Tua ni in Doeg tua munah ka mu ciang, ama in Saul tungah a son vangiat tu ka heak ma hi. Tua ahikom, na mealheakte theampo ii thina sia keima hang ahi hi." 
1Samuel22:23 Keima kungah hong om ta'n a, lau heak in. Saul in nang le kei hong thatlum khawm nuam hi, ahihang nang sia kei taw ngammuangin om tu ni hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel23:1 Philistine te in Keilah khua sim a, a anthak laak sa te a nguksak uh sia David in za hi." 
1Samuel23:2 Tua ahikom ama in Topa dongh a, “Philistine te sim tu in ka kuan tu ziam?” ci hi. “Hi hi, amate sim in a, Keilah hun in,” ci in Topa in zo hi." 
1Samuel23:3 Ahihang a mite in David munah, “Hi lai Judah ah ih kiitak tu a khom om hi; Keilah ah pai in Philistine ngalkapte sim leang pha ngawl seseam tu hi,” ci uh hi." 
1Samuel23:4 Tua ahikom David in Topa dongh kik a, tuaciang Topa in, “Pai in a, Keilah sim tavun, banghang ziam cile Philistine te kong zosak tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel23:5 Tua ahikom David le a mite Keilah ah kuanin, Philistine te sim uh hi; amate in tam ma thatin, a ngannote laaksak uh hi. Tuabangin David in tua khuapi hun hi." 
1Samuel23:6 Ahimelech ii tapa Abiathar suakta in Keilah khua ah David a pop ciang ephod keng hi. 
1Samuel23:7 David ii Keilah a zotna thu Saul tungah a kison ciang, “Pathian in ama sia ka khut sungah hong pia zo hi. David in ngalnanna luphung kongpite a nei khuapi sung sangah a tumna taw ama le ama thaang kisia zo hi,” Saul in ci hi." 
1Samuel23:8 Tua ahikom Saul in a ngalkapte samin, Keilah khua ah David le a mite uumci sawm hi." 
1Samuel23:9 Saul ii amate sim tu in a ngealna thu David in a zaak ciang, thiampi Abiathar munah, “Hi sungah Ephod hong paipui ta'n,” ci hi." 
1Samuel23:10 Tua zawkciang David in, “ Topa Israel ii Pathian awng, kei na naseampa hu in Saul sia Keilah khua ah pai in suksiat sawm hi ci in za khi hi." 
1Samuel23:11 Keilah khua mite in kei Saul khut sungah hong aap tu ziam? Ka zaak bangin Saul hong pai takpi tu ziam? Topa Israel ii Pathian awng, nong zo natu hesuak kong ngen hi!” ci hi. Topa in, “Saul hong pai tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
1Samuel23:12 “Tua ahile Keilah khua mite in kei le ka mite Saul khut sungah hong aap tu ziam?” ci in David in dongh kik hi. “Amate in no hong aap tu hi,” ci in Topa in zo hi." 
1Samuel23:13 Tua ahikom David le a mite — a vekpi 600 khawng — Keilah khua thakhat ma in nusia a, paisuak uh hi. Saul in Keilah khua pan David a suatak hunlam a zaak ciang a ngealna kheal hi." 
1Samuel23:14 Ziph khuapi naina duisung, mualtung ngam ah David buu in om hi. Saul in zong tawntung a, ahihang Pathian in David sia ama ii khut sungah a aap bua hi." 
1Samuel23:15 David in Saul ii ama a thalup nopna sia phawk hi. David sia Ziph khua paam duisung, Horesh ah om hi." 
1Samuel23:16 Tua mun ama kungah Jonathan pai a, Pathian ii sungsiatna a muan natu in hanthotna pia hi," 
1Samuel23:17 tuaciang ama munah, “Lau heak in, ka pa Saul in nang bangma hong law zo ngawl tu hi. Ama in nang Israel kumpipa tu hi a, kei sia nangma zom a zalian kik bel ka hi tu sia tel mama hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel23:18 Amate nii khat le khat kilawmtatna in a thiangtho kamciam kipia hi. David sia Horesh ah taamin, Jonathan inn ah cia hi." 
1Samuel23:19 Ziph khuapi panin mihing pawlkhat Gibeah, Saul kungah hong pai in, “David sia Judah thangsang duisung, koma ngam Horesh a om Hachilah Mualtung ah buu hi." 
1Samuel23:20 Kumpipa awng, ama bangza in man nuam na hi sia hong he khu hi; tua ahikom koma ngam sungah hong pai ta'n, na mat thei natu koma in vawt hamtang tu khu hi,” ci uh hi." 
1Samuel23:21 Saul in, “Kei tungah hong dik mama na hi uh ciang, Topa in thupha hong pia tahen!" 
1Samuel23:22 Pai tavun a, khatvei ma hong telthiang tavun; ama koisung tatak ah om ziam, tua munah akua in mu ziam, a man in hong kan tavun. Ama sia kukal mama hi ci in za khi hi." 
1Samuel23:23 A bukna mun tatak hong zong tavun a, kei kungah thu hong puaksak paih nanak tavun. Tua zawkciang noma kong zui tu a, ama tua ngam sungah a om lai le Judah ngam buppi vai a kul zong ka zong tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
1Samuel23:24 Tua ahikom amate Saul mai ah pai a, Ziph ah heak kik uh hi. David le a mite Judah ngam thangsang duisung ngamtongta kuam, Maon duisung ah om uh hi." 
1Samuel23:25 Saul le a mite in David zong tu in pusuak uh hi, ahizong ama in a thu za in, Maon ngampa sung mual khat zuan in tuak ah taam hi. Saul in hi thu a zaak ciang David zuizen hi." 
1Samuel23:26 Saul le a mite sia mualpangh langkhat ah om in, a lang pangh a om David le a mite taw mual in daa hi. Saul le a mite in amate hong neak a, man dektak ahiciang, amate zong manlang takin tai uh hi." 
1Samuel23:27 Tua zawk bek lianin kamtai khat hong theng a, Saul munah, “Philistine te in ih ngam hong sim hi! Thakhat ma in hong heak kik ta'n!” ci hi." 
1Samuel23:28 Tua ahikom Saul sia David a zuizenna tawlnga in, Philistine te do tu in kuan hi. Tua hu in tua mun sia Kikhenna Mual kici hi." 
1Samuel23:29 David in tua mun nusia in Engedi ngam sungah buu hi. 
1Samuel24:1 Philistine te a simna pan Saul hong cia kik ciang, David sia Engedi nai dui sungah om hi ci in Saul munah kison hi." 
1Samuel24:2 Saul in Israel ngamsung ngalkap phabel 3,000 la in David le a mite zong tu in Ngam Keal Suangpi ii nisuana sangah hong pai uh hi." 
1Samuel24:3 Ama in tuukhawk pawlkhat taw a kinai lampi hui suanghawng khat ah awnghaw tu in tum hi. Tua sia David le a mite ii a sung tawngh ah a bukna suanghawng na hi luilam hi. 
1Samuel24:4 Amate in ama munah, “Tusia nangma ii hunpha hi! Topa in na ngalte nangma khut sungah kong koi tu hi hong ci sa hi, ama tungah na law nop po law thei tu ni hi,” ci uh hi. David bokvak in pai a, Saul heak ngawl lan in a puantual mong bek khat at tansak hi." 
1Samuel24:5 Ahihang tuasia hun laitakin David thinnuam ngawl a," 
1Samuel24:6 ama in a mite tungah, “ Topa ii kumpipa in a teal ka topa tungah siatna ka vawt ngawl natu Topa in hong keamcing tahen! Ama tawm zongh ka suksiat thaak ngawl tu kisam hi, banghang ziam cile Topa ii tealsa kumpipa ahi hi!” ci hi." 
1Samuel24:7 Tua ahikom David in a mite sia Saul a sim ngawl natu in a thinzosak hi. Saul dingto a, suanghawng nusia in ama pai natu ah pai tu in kipan hi." 
1Samuel24:8 Tua zawkciang David pusuakin a nung panin zui a, “Kumpipa awng!” ci in ama biakpui hi. Saul hong kiheak a, tuaciang David lei ah bok suk in zatak a piak zawkciang," 
1Samuel24:9 ama in, “Banghangin keima nang vawtsiat tu hanciam hi ci a, thu hong son mihingte thu ngai ni ziam?" 
1Samuel24:10 Tu ma hiat ma in Topa in nang sia suanghawng sung keima khut sungah hong piak sia nangma tatak ma in mu thei ni, hi. Ka mite pawlkhat in nang thatlum in hong sawl hi, ahihang khuangai huai kong sa a, tawm zongh nasak ngawl tu khi hi ka ci hi, banghang ziam cile nang sia Topa ii kumpipa tu in hong teal na hi hi." 
1Samuel24:11 Ka pa awng hong en ta'n, na puantual mong bek ka khut sungah ka toai sia en in! Hong thatlum thei khi hi, tuabang hi ngawlin hisia bek at keak zaw khi hi. Hisia in nang langpanin kong leedo nop ngawlna le nang bangma kong law nop ngawlna thu hong telsak tu hi. Nang tungah bangma hong khial ngawl napi kei hong that nuam in hong vaizui ni hi." 
1Samuel24:12 Topa in ei nii akua maw hi ziam thu hong khen tahen! Kei tungah nong ngamtatna hu in Topa in nang daan hong pia tahen, banghang ziam cile nang sia bangma hong law ngawl tu khi hi." 
1Samuel24:13 Taanghkam teptee khat, ‘Siatna sia misiate bek in vawt hi’ a ci sia he ni hi. Tua ahikom nang sia bangma hong law ngawl tu khi hi." 
1Samuel24:14 Israel kumpipa ii a thalup nop sia en vun! A del thapaai sia bang ziam en vun! Ui thisa khat, uili khat hi lel ziam!" 
1Samuel24:15 Ei ngeal akua maw hi ziam Topa in thu hong khen tu hi. Hi thu ama in hong en cian tahen, kei hong hung in, nang khut sung pan hong hun tahen,” ci hi." 
1Samuel24:16 David ii thuson zawkciang, Saul in, “Ka ta David awng, nangma tatak ma ni ziam?” ci hi. Tuaciang ama hong kap hi." 
1Samuel24:17 Tua zawkciang David munah, “Nangma maan a, kei khial khi hi. Kei ii nang tungah khialna ta za kong nei kawmsung panin, hong dik mama ni hi!" 
1Samuel24:18 Tu ni in nang sia kei tungah bangza in hong dik ni ziam ci in hong lak zo ni hi, banghang ziam cile Topa in na khut sungah kei hong aap hi napi nong thatlum bua hi." 
1Samuel24:19 Mihing khat in a ngalpa man zo kasap vawtsia ngawlin bang tanvei suaktasak kik ngei ziam? Tuni in kei tungah nong vawt teng hu in Topa in nang thupha hong pia tahen! 
1Samuel24:20 Tu in ka tel thu in nang sia Israel te kumpipa suak tu a, kumpi ngam sia nangma ukna nuai ah kizom suak tu hi." 
1Samuel24:21 Ahihang ka min le ka innkuan ii min a kimakngil bit ngawl natu in, ka suan ka paalte nong khoaikhetsak natu Topa min taw kamciam hong pia ta'n,” ci hi." 
1Samuel24:22 David in tuabang ka hi tu hi ci in kamciam pia hi. Tuaciang Saul a inn ah cia kikin, David le a mite sia a bukna mun zuan kik uh hi." 
1Samuel25:1 Samuel thi a, Israel mi bup hong pai in, ama nusiat hu in khuangai tek hi. Tua zawkciang ama ii teenna Ramah ah phum uh hi. Tua zawkciang Paran duisung ah David pai hi." 
1Samuel25:2 Tua munah Caleb ii phung sung pan Nabal a ci pasal khat om hi, ama sia Maon khua pan hi a, Carmel khua hui ah leitang nei hi. Ama sia a hau mama pa khat hi a, tuu 3,000 le keal 1,000 nei hi. A zi Abigail sia a mealhoi in pil hi, ahihang a pasal sia a iiciil a thin tom khat hi. Carmel khua ah Nabal in a tuute mul meet in om a," 
1Samuel25:3  
1Samuel25:4 tuaciang duisung ah a om David in ama ii thu za hi," 
1Samuel25:5 tua ahikom ama in tangval sawm paisak a, Carmel ah Nabal zongsak in, nuksetna kam thaak hi." 
1Samuel25:6 Ama in Nabal tungah amate pau natu teng hil a: “David in hong nukset hi, ka lawmpa awng, nangma atu, na innkuan bup atu le na neisa theampo atu in, a phabel deisakna hong zasak hi." 
1Samuel25:7 Ama in nang sia tuumul meetin om ci hong za a, na tuucingte zongh ko taw omkhawmin, bangma kong law ngawl uh sia na heak tu ka dei hi. Carmel ah a om sung tawntung amate ii neisa na khat zongh kinguksak ngeingawl hi." 
1Samuel25:8 Amate dongh lete ahi bangin hong son tu hi. Poai khaam ni in ko hong pai khu hi, David in pha takin zin nong do natu hong ngen hi. Nong hesuakna in nong piak thei po ko, na naseamte le na it na lawmpa David hong pia ta'n,” cisak hi." 
1Samuel25:9 David mihingte in hi kam vaithak teng David min suangin Nabal tungah son uh hi. Tua zawkciang amate in tua munah ngak uh a," 
1Samuel25:10 tuaciang Nabal in a khakbel ciangin, “David sia akua ziam? Za zongh za ngei bong! Ih ngamsung sia sila tai khawng taw tu laitak kidim hi!" 
1Samuel25:11 Ka an le ka tui, ka tuumul meette atu ngan ka ngawte ii sa la in hong paina mun zongh ka heak ngawl mite pia ngawl tu khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
1Samuel25:12 David ii mite heak kikin Nabal ii ci teng David tungah son kik uh hi. 
1Samuel25:13 David in, “Na namsau uh kua vun!” ci in thupia a, amate in tuabang ma in vawt uh hi. David zongh ama namsau kua in, tuaciang a mite 400 khawng taw kuan in, nungsang ah vanhte taw 200 nusia hi." 
1Samuel25:14 Nabal ii naseamte khat in Nabal zi Abigail munah, “Na za zo ziam? David in duisung pan kamtaite paisak a, ih topa munah, nuksetna kam puaksak kasap ama in ci zazaan hi." 
1Samuel25:15 Tuabang hi nave, amate ei tungah hong dik mama uh hi; ko hong nawngkaisak ngeingawl hi, tuaciang lo sungah amate taw ka om sung tawntung, ka neisa uh bangma hong kinguksak ngeingawl hi." 
1Samuel25:16 Tuu honte cingin ka om uh laitakin amate in sun taw zan taw ko hong hung hi. 
1Samuel25:17 Nong hesuakna in hi thu a pha tak ngaisun in, na vawt tu sia khensat in. Hi sia in ih topa le a innkuanpuite atu lalna piangsak thei tu hi. Ama sia mawmaw thinpui khat hi a, kuama nadon ngawl hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel25:18 Abigail in manlang takin anluum 200, savun tuithawl nii dim sapittui, tuu pum em nga, an puakkan kilogramme 17, sapitko bom zakhat, theiko moh luum 200 khawmtua in laa tungah suanh hi." 
1Samuel25:19 Tua zawkciang a naseamte munah, “No, mai ah pai vun, kei, nung pan kong zui tu hi,” ci hi. Ahihang a pasal munah bangma son ngawl hi." 
1Samuel25:20 Ama a laa tung to in a pai le muallimvei khat ah thakhatin David le a mite hong pai taw kikealsik uh hi. 
1Samuel25:21 David in, “Banghangin hisia pa ii neisate hilai duisung ah hun sasak ka na khi ziam? Ama ii neisa khat zongh kinguksak ngeingawl hi, tu in ka huna sa teng hi bangin hong thukkikna ahi ve!" 
1Samuel25:22 Zingsang khuavak ma in tua pasalte khat zongh kikhe ngawlin ka that siat buale Pathian in keima hong vaat tahen!” ci in ngaisun hi," 
1Samuel25:23 Abigail in David a mu ciang manlang takin a laa tung pan tuakin," 
1Samuel25:24 David peang kung lei ah kisepin, “Topa awng, nong hesuakna in hong ngai ta'n! Keima a mawpu hi tong." 
1Samuel25:25 Bangma kimanna a nei ngawl Nabal sia awlmaw heak in! Ama sia a min ii khiakna — ‘A Mawmaw’ ci sia ma hi takpi hi! Na naseamte hong thet lai in tua munah keima om ngawl luilam khi hi, topa awng." 
1Samuel25:26 Phulam in na ngalte na thalup ngawl natu pan hong keamcing sia Topa hi. Tuaciang tu in a nungta Topa taw ka kiciamna pan, na ngalte le nang hong susia nuamte theampo sia Nabal bangin daan thuak tu hi." 
1Samuel25:27 Nong hesuakna in topa awng, kong paipui hi letsong sia hong saang ta'n, na mite pia in." 
1Samuel25:28 Ka khialna a om le nong hesuakna in hong maisak ta'n. Topa in nangma le na suan na paalte zongh kumpi hong suaksak tu hi, banghang ziam cile ama ii ngalte nangma in na simsak hi; tuaciang na nuntak sung tawntung na tatkha ngei buatu hi." 
1Samuel25:29 Tuaciang mihing khat po in nang hong simin that tu in hong hanciam le Topa na Pathian in sumngum manphate a kep bangin nang hong keamcing tu hi. Na ngalte ahile, mihing khat ii saili taw suangtang a kaa bangin ama in lawnthal tu hi." 
1Samuel25:30 Tuaciangin Topa in nang atu hong kamciamsa napha theampo hong tungsak a, Israel kumpipa hong suasak ciangin," 
1Samuel25:31 topa awng a thu om ngawl bulin ngual na thalupna ahibuale nangma thu in, phu na lamnate hu in kisii na, thin nop ngawlna na nei buatu hi. Tuaciang Topa in thupha hong piak zawkciangin, topa, kei hong mangil heak in,” ci hi." 
1Samuel25:32 David in ama munah, “Tuni in kei taw kisi tu a nang hong puak Israel te ii Pathian Topa pok tawng!" 
1Samuel25:33 Na khua ngaisut thiamna, tuaciang mihing thalupna khialna lian ka vawt tu le keima thu in phu ka lam natu pan tuni nong kep natu in, na sep na vawt teng hu in Pathian ka pok hi." 
1Samuel25:34 Topa in nang kong suksiat ngawl natu in kei hong keam zo hi. Ahihang a nungta Israel te ii Pathian taw kiciam in kong sonna pan, keima taw kisi tu in a manlang tatak hong pai buathong le te tu zingsang in, Nabal ii mite theampo thi siat tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel25:35 Tua zawkciang David in ama kungah hong puak letsong teng saang a, “Va cia kik ta'n a, thinngim heak in. Na dei bangin vawt tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel25:36 Abigail sia kumpipa khat atu a kilawm poai khat, a inn ah a khaam Nabal kungah ciakik hi. Zu khamin maimua nuamin om a, tua ahikom a zingsang ciang mateng ama ii munah bangma son ngawl hi." 
1Samuel25:37 A zukham hong thai ciang ama in thu theampo son hi. Thakhatin ama sia pumzaw natna hong nga a, a tung thei nawn bua hi." 
1Samuel25:38 Ni sawm khawng zawkciang Topa in Nabal sia vaatin thi hi. 
1Samuel25:39 Nabal ii thina David in a zaak ciang, “ Topa pok vun! Nabal tungah ama in kei hong nunau hu in phu hong lamsak a, kei a naseampa ii ka khial ngawl natu hong keamcing hi. Topa in Nabal sia a khansiat hu in daan tat hi,” ci hi. Tua zawkciang David in kiteen natu mo dokna Abigail tungah thaak hi." 
1Samuel25:40 A naseamte Carmel ah pai in, “David in a zi tu, nang hong pui tu in ko hong sawl hi,” ci uh hi." 
1Samuel25:41 Abigail lei ah kun sukin, hi bangin ci hi, “Keima a naseamnu hi a, a naseamte ii peang a silsak tu naseam ka hi hi.”" 
1Samuel25:42 Ama manlang tak tho in a laa tungah to hi. A lalang numei nga teng taw David ii naseamte taw ton in, a zi suak hi." 
1Samuel25:43 David in Jezreel mi Ahinoam teenpui zo a, tu in Abigail zongh a zi hong suak hi." 
1Samuel25:44 Tua lanin Saul in David ii zi ahi a tanu Michal sia Gallim khua Laish ii tapa Palti a piaksak hi. 
1Samuel26:1 Ziph khua panin pasal pawlkhat Saul omna Gibeah ah hong pai in David sia Hachilah Mual Judah ngampa ii mong ah buu hi ci in son uh hi. 
1Samuel26:2 Thakhat ma in Saul in Israel ngalkap phabel 3,000 tonpui in Ziph duisung ah David zong tu in pai a," 
1Samuel26:3 tuaciang Hachilah Mualtung lampi hui ah ngiaphual saat uh hi. David sia duisung ah om lai a, ama zong tu in Saul hong pai ci in a heak ciang," 
1Samuel26:4 ngalvilte a paisak le, Saul sia tua munah na om takpi hi." 
1Samuel26:5 Ama thakhatin pai a, Saul le Ner ii tapa Abner, Saul ii ngalkap hon ukpipa lupna mun tatak ma mu hi. Saul sia ngiaphual sung sangah lum a, a mite sia ama ii kiim ah ngiaphual saat uh hi." 
1Samuel26:6 Tuasia ciang David in Hit mi Ahimelech le Joab ii suapuipa Abishai (A nu uh sia Zeruiah hi), te munah, “No nii akua zaw in Saul ii ngiaphual ah hong zui tu nu ziam?” a ci ciang, Abishai in, “Keima hong zui tong,” ci hi." 
1Samuel26:7 Tua zanin, David le Abishai te Saul ii ngiaphual sung sangah tum in, Saul sia ngiaphual laizang ah mutchip in a om mu a, a luthung ah a tei phut hi. Abner le ngalkapte a kiim ah mu uh hi." 
1Samuel26:8 Abishai in David munah, “Pathian in na ngalpa na khut sungah tu zanin hong pia hi. Tu in ama ii tei taw ma in keima in ama lei taw cip in hong sunletsak ta'n, khatvei sut taw kiman tu hi — niivei ka sut kul ngawl tu hi!” ci hi." 
1Samuel26:9 Ahihang David in, “Ama susia ngawl het tu ni hi! Topa in ama ii tealsa kumpipa a susia peuma daan pia nanak tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel26:10 David in a pau zomto lai in, “Thi kum tungin, thi ngei a thi tu ahizong, ngalphual ah thi tu ahizong, Topa ama mama in Saul sia thatlum tu ci in a nungta Topa tungtawnin he khi hi." 
1Samuel26:11 Topa in ama ii koisa kumpipa sia ka suksiat tu oai ngawl hi! A tei le a tuithawl la in, pai ka tawng,” ci hi." 
1Samuel26:12 Tuabangin David in Saul ii tei le a tuithawl Saul ii luthung pan la a, ama le Abishai in nusia uh hi. Kuama a mu om ngawl, bang thu piang ci in a he zongh om ngawlin, a khanglo beak zongh a om bua uh hi — amate a vekpi in mutchip dipdeap uh hi, banghang ziam cile Topa in a mutciiksak hi." 
1Samuel26:13 David in a kuam langkhat kaantan in mualdawn, a khuala khopna mun khat panin," 
1Samuel26:14 Saul ii ngalkapte le Abner ama in oksan a, “Abner awng! Nong za thei ziam?” ci hi. Abner in, “Kumpipa phawng tu in a au sia akua ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
1Samuel26:15 David in “Abner, nang sia Israel ngam ah mi lianbel hi ka na ngawl ni ziam? Banghangin na topa kumpipa hung zo ngawl ni ziam? Tu ma hiat in na topa thatlum tu in mihing khat ngiaphual sungah hong tum hi." 
1Samuel26:16 Na vaipuak lel ni hi, Abner awng! A nungta Topa taw kiciamin kong cina pan, no theampo a thi tu kilawm nu hi, banghang ziam cile Topa ii kumpipa a suasak na topa uh hung ngawl nu hi. En in! Kumpipa ii tei koisungah om ziam? A lu hui a tuithawl sia koisung om ziam?” ci in zo hi." 
1Samuel26:17 Saul in David ii aw tel a, “David ka tapa awng, nangma ni ziam?” ci in dongh hi. “Hi khi hi, kumpipa awng,” ci in David in zo hi." 
1Samuel26:18 Tuaciang ama in, “Topa awng, kei na naseampa banghangin hong delkot lai ni ziam? Bang vawt na khi ziam? Bang khialna lian vawt khi ziam?" 
1Samuel26:19 Kumpipa awng, kong son tu sia na ngai in. Kei nong langpan natu hong vawt pa sia Topa ahile ama tung a biakpiakna khat vawt leang a thin khealsak tu hi; ahihang mihingte ii vawt ahile Topa haamsiatna amate tungah tung tahen. Banghang ziam cile Topa ii ngam le lei panin ngamdang pathiante bek ka biak thei natu ngam ah kei hong kinotkeak hi." 
1Samuel26:20 Topa taw a kikhuala ngamdang leitang tungah thalup hong thuaksak heak in. Banghangin Israel ii kumpipa in kei uili khat bang ahi sia that tu in hong pai ziam? Ngam sungah vacimte khat vai bangin ama in banghang hong vai zui hi tu ziam?” ci lai hi. 
1Samuel26:21 Saul in, “Keima khial zo khi hi. Hong heak kik ta'n, David ka tapa awng. Bangma hong law kik ngawl tu khi hi, banghang ziam cile tu zanin ka nuntakna hong khoaikhe ni hi. Kei sia mawmaw khi hi! A lipkhaphuai mama na khat vawt zo thong khi hi!” ci in zo hi." 
1Samuel26:22 David in, “Kumpipa awng, hi sungah na tei om hi. Na mihingte khat hong paisak in hong lasak ta'n." 
1Samuel26:23 Topa in a thumaante le a thutangte tel pia hi. Tuni in ama in nang, keima khut sungah hong pia hi, ahihang Topa ii kumpipa in hong koisa nang sia kong susia bua hi." 
1Samuel26:24 Na nuntakna tuni in kong khoaikhet bangma in, Topa in kei tungah hong vawt in ngim ngana theampo pan hong suaktasak tahen!” ci in zo kik hi." 
1Samuel26:25 Saul in David munah, “Pathian in thupha hong pia tahen, ka tapa awng! Na sep na vawt theampo zo tu ni hi!” ci hi. Tuabangin David, ama ii pai natu ah pai a, Saul sia inn ah ciakik hi." 
1Samuel27:1 David in ama le ama hi bangin kici hi, “Ni khat teteei ciang Saul in kei hong thatlum tu hi. Kei ngamtat natu a phabel sia Philistia ah tai in ka suatak tu ahi hi. Tuasia ciang Saul in kei Israel ngam sungah hong zon sia kheal tu a, ka ngammuang tu hi.”" 
1Samuel27:2 Tua ahikom David le a mite 600 sia thakhat ma in Gath kumpipa Maoch ii tapa Achish kung zuan uh hi. 
1Samuel27:3 David le a mite sia a innkuanpuite taw Gath ah peam uh hi. David taw a kop a zite nii sia Jezreel pan Ahinoam le Carmel pan Nabal ii zi meingongnu Abigail ahi uh hi. 
1Samuel27:4 Saul in David Gath ah a tai a zaak ciang David a zon tawntung kheal hi. 
1Samuel27:5 David in Achish munah, “Nang ka lawm na hile ka teen natu khuano khat hong ngasak ta'n. Topa awng khuapi sungah nang taw ka teenkhop tu sia kisam ngawl hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel27:6 Tua ahiciang Achish in Ziklag khua pia a, tua hu in Ziklag sia Judah kumpite neisa hi top hi." 
1Samuel27:7 David in Philistia ah tha sawm le tha luk teang hi. 
1Samuel27:8 Tua hun sung tengin David le a mite in tua Geshur, Girzi, le Amalek ngamkhente sungah khuangeipi a teang sa mite sim uh hi. Ama in amate ii ngam sia Shur dong, Egypt paina lamdung theampo simsuk hi," 
1Samuel27:9 a pasalte le a nupite that in, a tuu, a khui, a laa le a kalaoh te le puan ngawngawn laaksak uh hi. Tua zawkciang Achish kung veu ah cia kik hi," 
1Samuel27:10 tua pa in, “Tutung koisungah ngal sim ni ziam?” ci in dongh bul a, tuaciang David in, Judah thangsang ngam, ahibuale Jerahmeel bee le phungte ngam, ahibuale zong Ken te ii teenna ngamte ka sim hi ci hi." 
1Samuel27:11 David in, ama le a mite ii ngamtatna sa teng kuama ii Gath ah cia in a son thei ngawl natu in, pasal le numei theampo thatlum siat hi. Hisia in Philistia ah a teen sung tawntung David ngamtatna ahi hi." 
1Samuel27:12 Ahihang Achish in David muang a, ama le ama hi bang kici hi, “Ama sia a mipui Israel te in ensan mama ahiciang a nuntak tawntung keima na hong sepsak tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel28:1 Tua zawk tawmvei ciangin Philistine te in Israel sim tu in a ngalkapte uh khawmtua hi, tuaciang Achish in David munah, “Nang le na mite in kei sang pan ngal sim tu ci sia na tel sa hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel28:2 David in, “Hi mama hi. Kei na naseampa khi hi, tuaciang bang ciang vawt thei khi ziam ci sia nangma mama in nong mu tu hi,” ci in zo hi. Achish in, “Pha hi! A tawntungin keima hong cing pa kong suaksak tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel28:3 Tu in Samuel thi zo a, Israel theampo ama ii a nusiat hangin khuangai in, ama ii khua Ramah ah phum uh hi. Saul in aisaan theite le thaa sam theite theampo zawthawk thu taw Israel panin hawlkhia zo hi." 
1Samuel28:4 Philistine ngalkapte kikhawmtua a, Shunem khua hui ah ngiaphual saat uh hi; Saul in Israel te khawmtua in Gilboa Mual ah ngiaphual saat hi." 
1Samuel28:5 Saul in Philistine ngalkapte a mu ciang lau mama hi," 
1Samuel28:6 tua ahikom ama in Topa munah bang law tu khi ziam ci in dongh hi. Ahihang Topa in mang sung pan ahizong, Urim le Thummim tung pan ahizong, kamsaangte tung pan ahizong, a zo mama bua hi." 
1Samuel28:7 Tuasia ciang Saul in a uliante thupia a, “Thaa sam thei nupi khat va zong tavun, keima pai in thu dongh tu khi hi,” ci hi. Amate in, “Endor ah khat om hi,” ci in zo uh hi." 
1Samuel28:8 Tua ahikom Saul kimealseal a, puan dang silh in, khuazin zawkciang a mite nii taw tua nupi nu taw kisi tu in pai hi. Ama in, “Thaate tungah dongh in a, bang thu piang tu ziam hong son ta'n. A min kong law pasal khat ii thaa sam in,” ci hi." 
1Samuel28:9 Nupi nu in zo a, “Kumpipa Saul ngamtatna teng na heak siat sa hi a, Israel ngamsung panin aisaan theite le thaa sam theite theampo hawlkeak hi. Tua ahiciang, banghangin kei thaang hong sia in hong kithatlumsak tu ni ziam?” ci in zo hi." 
1Samuel28:10 Tuasia ciang Saul in kiciamna thiangtho khat vawt hi. Ama in, “A nungta Topa min taw kamciam hong pia khi hi, hisia na sep hu in daan hong kipia ngawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel28:11 “Akua thaa hong samsak tu khi ziam?” nupi nu in ci hi. Ama in, “Samuel” ci in zo hi." 
1Samuel28:12 Tua nu in Samuel a mu ciang ciik au in Saul munah, “Banghang hong theam ni ziam? Nang Saul kumpipa ni hi!” ci hi." 
1Samuel28:13 “Lau heak in! Bang na mu ziam?” Kumpipa in ci hi. Nupi nu in, “Thaa khat sia lei panin hong pai to ka mu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
1Samuel28:14 Ama in, “Tuasia bang taw kibang ziam?” ci in dongh hi. “Pasal huai khat hong pai to hi. Ama in puantual tungsilh silh hi,” ci in nupi nu in zo hi. Tuasia ciang Saul in Samuel hi ci in he a, ama a zatakna in lei ah bok hi." 
1Samuel28:15 Samuel in Saul munah, “Banghangin kei hong nawngkaisak ni ziam? Banghangin hong pai kiksak ni ziam?” ci hi. Saul in, “Ngimna lianpi sungah om khi hi! Philistine te sia kei ngalin hong pang hi, tuaciang Pathian in kei hong nusia hi. Ama in kamsaangte tungtawn ahizong, mang tungtawn ahizong ka thudok hong zo nawn ngawl hi. Tua ahikom bang vawt tu khi ziam nong son natu nang hong sam khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
1Samuel28:16 Samuel in, “ Topa in nang hong nusia zo a, na ngal a sua zawk nungsang, banghangin kei hong sam ni ziam?" 
1Samuel28:17 Topa in kei tungah hong sonsa bangma in ama in nang tungah hong seam zo hi: ama in kumpi ngam sia na khut sung pan la keakin David hong piaksak zo hi. 
1Samuel28:18 Nangma in Topa thupiak ni ngawlin, Amalek te le a neisa theampo a vaikhua in susia cip ngawl ni hi. Tua hu in Topa in hisia tu in nang tungah hong vawt hi." 
1Samuel28:19 Topa in nang le Israel sia Philistine te khut sungah hong aap tu hi. Zing ciangin nang le na tapate in kei kung nong theng tu uh a, Topa in Israel ngalkaphonpi zongh Philistine te aap tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel28:20 Samuel ii pau teng hu in thakhat ma in Saul puksuk a, lau leilam in lei ah kithuang hi. Ama sia ni bup le zan tawntung bangma neak nei ngawl ahikom in a tha zawm hi." 
1Samuel28:21 Nupinu in ama kungah hong pai in lau ngawpin om a mu ciang, “Topa awng, nong hesuakna in ka luang aitaa in, nong sawl teng hong vawtsak khi hi." 
1Samuel28:22 Tu in nong hesuakna in kong nget bangin hong ngamta ta'n. Nang atu an tawm kong vawtsak tu hi. Na khualhaw thei khom natu na thahat natu in an na neak kul tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel28:23 Saul in bangma ne ngawl tu khi hi ci in nial hi. Ahihang a uliante zongh in ama an ne in sawl uh hi. A khakbel ciang ama in zawp in lei pan tho to a, lupna tungah hong to hi." 
1Samuel28:24 Nupinu in a thau tu in a vaak top khuino sia ngo hi. Tuaciang ama in anvui pawlkhat la a, tol saw ngawl anluum in hong em hi." 
1Samuel28:25 Ama in Saul le a uliante mai ah a an lui a, amate in ne uh hi. Amate tua zan ma in ding kik uh hi." 
1Samuel29:1 Philistine te in a ngalkap theampo Aphek ah hong paipui uh hi, tua laitakin Israel te sia Jezreel Kuam sungah a om cik ah ngiaphual saat uh hi." 
1Samuel29:2 Philistine kumpi nga teng in amate mi tek a za pawl, a tul pawl taw kuan uh hi; David le a mite, Achish kumpipa taw a nungsang pan kuan uh hi." 
1Samuel29:3 Philistine ngalkap maangte in amate mu in, “Hi Hebrew te, hi sungah bang hong hi ziam?” ci uh hi. Achish in, “Hi sia David hi, Israel kumpipa Saul ii ulian khat hi. Tu in ama sia kei taw khuangeipi ma omkhawm zo khu hi. Ama kei kung hong zot pan kipan ka mawsak natu a ngamtatna bangma mu ngawl khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
1Samuel29:4 Ahihang Philistine ngalkap maangte in Achish tungah thin uuk in, ama munah, “Tuasia pa na piaksa khua ah puak kik in. Ngal kidona phual ah ei taw kuansak heak in; ngal kido sungin ama in ei hong langpan kik thei tha tu hi. A topa ii maipha a nga kik natu in ih mite thina sangin ama atu a phazaw dang bang om ziam?" 
1Samuel29:5 A tatakin ci leang, ama sia David hi a, numeite laamin lasa a, ‘Saul in a tul a tul in that a, David in a tulsawm, a tulsawm in that hi,’ a ci sia pa hi ngawl ziam?” ci uh hi." 
1Samuel29:6 Achish in David sam a, “Israel ii a nungta Pathian taw kiciam hi tong, nang sia kei tungah hong thumaan ni hi; hi kidona sungah kei taw kikop in ngal hong simsak leng lungkim tu khi hi. Kei kung nong zot ni pan kipan nang tungah mawna kong sot tu bangma om ngawl hi. Ahihang kumpi dangte in hong thukimpui ngawl hi." 
1Samuel29:7 Tua ahikom inn ah thinnuam takin cia kik ta'n a, amate lungkim ngawl tu bangma vawt heak in,” ci hi." 
1Samuel29:8 David in, “Bang ka sep khial om ziam, topa awng. Na ci bangin nang kung kong zot a kipan na na ka sepna sungah sep khial vawt khial nei ngawl ka hile, nang ka topa le ka kumpipa taw kuankhawm in na ngalte hong dosak ngawl tu khi ziam,” ci in zo hi." 
1Samuel29:9 Achish in, “Na ci teng thukim khi hi, nang sia Pathian vantung mi khat za in hong thumaan hi ci in kong ngaisun hi. Ahihang kumpi dangte in nang sia ngal sungah ko taw kuan khawm thei ngawl tu hong ci hi." 
1Samuel29:10 Tua ahikom David awng, Saul nusia in, kei kungah hong pai note theampo sia zing ciang, thopal in khuavak po ciang nong nusiat uh kul tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel29:11 Tuabangin David le a mite, a zing ciang zing tuungin Philistia zuan kik a, Philistine te sia Jezreel ah paitan uh hi." 
1Samuel30:1 Ni nii zawkciang David le a mite Ziklag theng kik uh hi. Amalek te in Judah thangsang sim zo a, Ziklag sim uh hi. Amate in a khua haltham a,"
