1Samuel30:2 numei teng man hi; kuama that ngawl ahihang a nusiat uh ciang a kuama theampo paipui uh hi. 
1Samuel30:3 David le a mite hong thet uh ciang, a khua kihal tham sa in mu a, a zite, a tapate, a tanute kipaipui siat zo hi." 
1Samuel30:4 David le a mite kakap in, a tha bo vanek dong tawp ngawl uh hi." 
1Samuel30:5 David zite nii, Ahinoam le Abigail ngawngawn laaksak uh hi." 
1Samuel30:6 David sia tu in a thinngim mama hi, banghang ziam cile a mite a vekpi in a tate a bosua hu in a thin uh na mama a, amate in David suang taw denlup tu in tawng hi; ahihang Topa a Pathian in ama thinletna pia hi." 
1Samuel30:7 David in Ahimelech ii tapa thiampi Abiathar munah, “Ephod hong paipui tavun,” ci a, Abiathar in ama kungah paipui hi." 
1Samuel30:8 David in Topa tungah, “Tua hong simthamte ka del tu ziam? Amate ka man zo tu ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Ama in, “Del in; amate man zo lai tu ni hi, tuaciang a matte zongh suatak tu ni hi,” ci in zo hi." 
1Samuel30:9 Tua ahikom David le ama mi 600 teng hong kipan a, Besor Lui a thet uh ciangin amate pawlkhat tua munah taam hi." 
1Samuel30:10 David in mihing 400 taw paisuak a; a dang 200 teng lui kaan tu in toi lei ahikom nungah taam uh hi. 
1Samuel30:11 David taw a kithua mite in Egypt te patangno khat ngam sungah mu in, David kungah paipui uh hi. Amate in an le tui tawm," 
1Samuel30:12 theinga ngawm tawm le sapit ko ngawm bom nii pia uh hi. An a neak zawkciang a tha hong hat kik hi; ama in an ahizong tui ahizong a neak ngawl zawk ni thum hi zo hi. 
1Samuel30:13 David in, “Na topa akua hi a, koisung pan hong pai ni ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Ama in, “Kei Egypt te khat hi a, Amalek te khat ii sila ka hi hi. Ka topa in tu nung ni thum lai in ka ciina ahikom hong nusia hi." 
1Samuel30:14 Judah ngam thangsang ah a om Chereth te ngam le Caleb bee le phung te ii ngam teng simtham in, Ziklag sia ka hal tum uh hi,” ci in zo hi." 
1Samuel30:15 David in, “Tua hong simthamte kungah nong paipui tu ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Ama in, “Kei nong thalup ngawl natu le ka topa kungah nong aap ngawl natu Pathian min taw kamciam hong pia po lete, hong paipui tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
1Samuel30:16 Tuaciang ama in David sia amate kungah paipui hi. Tua a simthamte sia Philistia le Judah ngam pan a laak uh vanh tam mama te ai in poai khaam uh a, an ne, zu dawn in, mun theampo ah kithethaang uh hi." 
1Samuel30:17 A khuavak ni zing tuungin David in sim a, nitak dong kido uh hi. Kalaoh tung to in a tai khangno 400 simngawl kuama a suakta om ngawl hi." 
1Samuel30:18 David in Amalek te ii laak sa na theampo le a mat teng ama zite nii dongin suatak a; 
1Samuel30:19 bangma a sumsi om ngawl hi. David in a mite ii tapate, tanute le Amalek te ii laak sa na theampo nga kik hi." 
1Samuel30:20 Ama in tuu hon le khui hon te zongh nga kik a; a mite in amate mai ah nganno theampo hawl a, tuaciang, “Hi teng David ii neisa hi!” ci uh hi." 
1Samuel30:21 Tua zawkciang David in Besor Lui ah tha zawm leih in nungsang ah a taam 200 te kungah pai kik hi. Amate sia David le a mite muak tu in hong pai a, tuaciang David in pha takin amate nukset hi." 
1Samuel30:22 Ahihang mihing mannung ngawl thusel pawlkhat in, “Amate ei taw hong kuan khawm ngawl ahiciang, ih vanh ngate hawm ngawl tu hi. Amate in a zite le a tate la in cia thei tu hi,” ci uh hi." 
1Samuel30:23 Ahihang David in, “Ka suapuite awng, Topa ii hong piak vanhte tungtaang ah tuabangin ngamta thei ngawl tu nu hi! Ama in ei hong keamcing a, hong simthamte tungah zawna hong ngasak hi." 
1Samuel30:24 No ii ci bang sia kuama in hong thukim pui thei ngawl tu hi! Ih vekpi a kibangin ih hawm kul tu hi: a kuama po nungsang ah vanhcing te zongh, ngalphual ah a kuante nga za ma nga tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
1Samuel30:25 David in hi thuthun vawt a, tuate Israel ngam ah tua hun pan kipan kizui tan hi." 
1Samuel30:26 David in Ziklag ah hong heak kik ciangin, vanh a laakte pawlkhat sia a lawmte ahi Judah lampuite munah, “Hi sungah Topa ii ngalte vanh ka laaksak uh sung pan no atu letsong hi,” cisak in puak hi.”" 
1Samuel30:27 Ama in tua letsong sia Bethel khua mite, Judah thangsang ngam a om Ramah khua mite, tuaciang Jattir," 
1Samuel30:28 Aroer, Siphmoth, Eshtemoa," 
1Samuel30:29 le Racal khua mite; Jerahmeel bee le phung, Ken mite," 
1Samuel30:30 tuaciang Hormah, Borashan le Athach," 
1Samuel30:31 le Hebron khua mite teng tungah puak hi. Ama in ama le a mite vaa kotna mun theampo ah tua letsong puak siat hi. 
1Samuel31:1 Gilboa Mual ngal kidona ah Philistine te in Israel te do uh hi. Israel te tam mama tua munah thi in, a taang laiteng, Kumpipa Saul le a tapate zongh tai uh hi." 
1Samuel31:2 Ahihang Philistine te in amate pha in Saul ii tapate thum, Jonathan, Abinadab le Malchishua te that uh hi." 
1Samuel31:3 Saul ii kiim ah nasia tak ngal kidona om a, Saul ama mama ngalte thaltangte in kha in, nasia liam mama hi." 
1Samuel31:4 Ama in a ngalhiam pua tangvalpa munah, “Pathian sel Philistine te ii selno a hong thalup ngawl natu in, na namsau dokin hong that ta'n,” ci hi. Ahihang tangvalpa in tuabang a ngamtat tu lau mama hi. Tua ahikom Saul in ama namsau ma la in tua dawnah ama le ama kisep hi." 
1Samuel31:5 Tangvalpa in Saul thi zo ci in a mu ciang, ama zongh ama ii namsau dawn ma ah kisepin Saul taw thi khawm hi." 
1Samuel31:6 Tuabangin Saul, a tapate thum le tangvalpa thi uh hi; Saul ii mite theampo tua ni in thi siat uh hi." 
1Samuel31:7 Jezreel Kuam ii langkhat Jordan ngun nisuana sang a om Israel te in, Israel ngalkaphonpi taikeak zo a, Saul le a tapate kithat zo ci a zaak uh ciang amate a khua uh nusia in tai uh hi. Philistine te pai in tua khuate la uh hi." 
1Samuel31:8 Ngal kido khuavak ni in Philistine te a thite vanh laaksak tu in hong pai uh ciang Saul le a tapate thum ii luang Gilboa Mualvum ah a kisial mu uh hi. 
1Samuel31:9 Amate in Saul ii ngawng tan in, a ngal dalna teng suut a, tuate taw kamtaite Philistia ngamsung tangciing amate ii milimte le a mite tungah a lungdamna thu taangko tu in paisak hi." 
1Samuel31:10 Tua zawkciang amate in Saul ii ngalhiamte a Astarte numeipathian biakinn sungah koi in, a luang sia Beth Shan khuapi luphung tungah kilh uh hi." 
1Samuel31:11 Gilead ngam Jabesh mite in Saul tungah Philistine te ngamtatna a zaak uh ciang," 
1Samuel31:12 pasal hangbel teng hong kipanin Beth Shan ah zankhuateak a pai uh hi. Amate in Saul le a tapate ii luang teng luphung tung pan la in, Jabesh ah ciapui kik a, tua munah hal uh hi." 
1Samuel31:13 Tuaciang a ngu teng la a, khua sung makeang thingkung nuai ah phum in ni sali sung an tang uh hi." 
2Samuel1:1 Saul ii thi zawkciang, David sia Amalek te a zawna pan hong cia a, Ziklag ah ni nii taam hi." 
2Samuel1:2 A zing ciangin khangno khat Saul ii ngiaphual panin hong theng hi. Ama khuangaina a lak natu in a puante eaukeak in a lu tungah leivui kipoai hi. Ama in David kungah pai in, zatak piakna in lei ah bok hi." 
2Samuel1:3 David in, “Koisung pan hong pai ni ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Ama in, “Israel te ngiaphual panin hong suakta khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
2Samuel1:4 “Bang thu teng piang ziam hong son ta'n,” David in ci hi. “Ih ngalkaphonpi ngalphual panin taikeak hi, tuaciang ih mite tam ma kithatlum hi. Saul le a tapa Jonathan zongh kithat hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
2Samuel1:5 “Bangbangin Saul le Jonathan thi hunlam he ni ziam?” ci in David in dongh hi. 
2Samuel1:6 Ama in, “Kei Gilboa Mualvum tungah ka om luilam a, Saul sia a tei neal in om hi, tuaciang siphu ngalleang le siphu ngalkapte in ama a neak vaial ka mu hi." 
2Samuel1:7 Tuasia ciang ama hong kiheak a, kei hong mu in hong sam hi. ‘Topa!’ ci in ka zo hi." 
2Samuel1:8 Ama in akua ni ziam ci in hong dongh a, Amalek te ka hi hi, ci in ka son hi." 
2Samuel1:9 Tuasia ciang ama in, ‘Hong pai ta'n a, hong that ta'n! Kei ka liamna nasia a, a thi tu hi zo khi hi,’ hong ci hi." 
2Samuel1:10 Tua ahikom ama kung ka zuan a, ka that hi, banghang ziam cile ama puksuk pole a thi tu veve ahi sia ka he hi. Tua zawkciang, ama lu pan a kumpilukhu le a baan pan a haak la in, nangma hong puak khi hi, topa awng,” ci hi." 
2Samuel1:11 David khuangai in a puan eaukeak a, a mite theampo tuabang ma in ngamta uh hi." 
2Samuel1:12 Saul le Jonathan, tuaciang Israel te Topa ii mite ngalphual ah tam mama kithat ahikom, amate hee in mau in, nitak dong an tang uh hi." 
2Samuel1:13 A thu hong puak khangno pa munah, “Nang koisung pan ni ziam?” ci in David in dongh hi. Ama in, “Kei Amalek te ka hi a, ahizong nangma ngam sungah ka teang hi,” ci in zo hi." 
2Samuel1:14 David in, “Banghangin Topa ii tealsa kumpipa that ngam ni ziam?” ci hi." 
2Samuel1:15 Tuaciang, David in a mite khat sam a, “Hi sia pa that in!” ci in sawl hi. Tua pa in Amalek pa vaat vawk a, nasia liam mama hi," 
2Samuel1:16 tuaciang David in Amalek pa tungah, “Hi sia nangma kivawt hi. Topa ii a teal kumpipa khat ka thatlum na ci hu in nangma le nangma kipuavawk ni hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel1:17 David in Saul le a tapa Jonathan atu hi kaa la sa a," 
2Samuel1:18 tuasia Judah mite tungah hil sawn tu in thupia hi. (Tuasia Jashar Thubu sungah kikhum hi.) 
2Samuel1:19 “Israel mualte tungah ih lampuite thi hi! Ih ngalkap hangbel teng thi zo hi! 
2Samuel1:20 Tuasia Gath ah taangko heak vun, Ashkelon lampite ah zongh taangko heak vun. Philistia numeite lungdamsak bua tawng; doai biate ii tanute lungdamsak bua tawng!" 
2Samuel1:21 “Gilboa mualte tungah nguatui le daaitui kia heak hen; a lote kolh tawntung tahen! Banghang ziam cile tua munah a hangsan te ii lum teng mindaina taw liik a; Saul ii lum sia sathau taw kizut nawn ngawl hi. 
2Samuel1:22 Jonathan ii thal sia thi theina hi a, Saul ii namsau in hesuakna selin, a thahat te vaat vawk a, ngalte thatlum hi." 
2Samuel1:23 “Saul le Jonathan, lamdangin ithuai a, a nunna ah nungta khawm, a thina ah thi khawm hi; muvanlaite sangin zuan ngang zaw, tawpi te sangin hat zaw hi." 
2Samuel1:24 “Israel numeite awng, Saul atu khuangai vun! ama in puansan hoite nang hong silhsak a, suang manphate le khamh taw hong zeam hi." 
2Samuel1:25 “Ngalkap hangte puk zo a, amate ngalphual ah kithatlum uh hi. Jonathan sia mual tungah thi in lum hi." 
2Samuel1:26 “Nang atu in hee khi hi, ka suapui Jonathan awng; bangza in kei atu in ithuai ni ziam! Kei nong itna bangza in lamdang ziam, Numeite ii itna sang zongin nasia zaw hi." 
2Samuel1:27 “Ngalkap hangte puk siat zo a, a ngalhiamte kimanna selin kinusia hi.”" 
2Samuel2:1 Hisia zawkciang David in Topa dongh a, “Keima pai in Judah khuate khat ka uk tu ziam?” ci hi. “Uk in,” ci in Topa in zo hi. David in “Koisia ziam?” ci in, dongh hi. Topa in, “Hebron” ci hi." 
2Samuel2:2 Tua ahikom David in Hebron ah a zite nii ahi Jezreel pan Ahinoam le Carmel pan Nabal ii zi meingongnu Abigail te kengin pai hi. 
2Samuel2:3 Ama in a mite le tuate ii innkuanpuite zongh paipui a, Hebron kiim a khuate ah teang uh hi." 
2Samuel2:4 Tua zawkciang Judah pan a mite Hebron ah hong pai in David sia Judah kumpipa tu in sathau noai uh hi. Gilead ngamsung Jabesh mite in Saul luang a phum sia David in a zaak ciangin," 
2Samuel2:5 tualai ah mihing pawlkhat paisak a, kam vaitha hi: “Na kumpipa tungah a luang na vuina taw thumaanna na lak uh a, na lak uh hu in Topa in thupha hong pia tahen." 
2Samuel2:6 Tu in Topa dikna, a thumaanna no tungah hong tung tahen. Noma nasepna sa te hangin kei zongh no hong phatvawt tu khi hi." 
2Samuel2:7 Hat vun a, hang vun! Noma kumpipa Saul thi zo a, Judah mite in kei sia a kumpipa ci in sathau hong noai zo hi.”" 
2Samuel2:8 Saul ii ngalkaphonpi ukpa Ner ii tapa Abner sia Saul ii tapa Ishbosheth taw Jordan ngun kaantan in Mahanaim ah tai khawm hi. 
2Samuel2:9 Tua sungah Abner in Ishbosheth sia Gilead, Asher, Jezreel, Ephraim le Benjamin ngam teng ii kumpipa in koi a, a tatakin Israel ngam buppi uk hi." 
2Samuel2:10 Israel kumpipa in a kikoi hun in, ama sia kum 40 pha a, kum nii sung uk hi. Ahihang Judah nam in David tungah thumaan ahiciang," 
2Samuel2:11 ama in Hebron panin Judah te kum sali le kum lang sung uk hi. 
2Samuel2:12 Abner le Ishbosheth ii uliante Mahanaim pan Gibeon khuapi ah pai uh hi. 
2Samuel2:13 Zeruiah ii tapa Joab le David ii ulian dangte sia amate taw tuicing khat hui ah kisii uh hi, tua munah amate teng, pawlkhat sia tuicing ii langkhat ah, pawldang khat sia tuicing ii a langkhat ah to hi." 
2Samuel2:14 Abner in Joab munah, “Eima sang tek panin khangnote pawlkhat veve sawlin kido kidemsak tawng,” ci hi. Joab in, “Hi hen,” ci hi." 
2Samuel2:15 Tua ahikom Ishbosheth le Benjamin namte taangin mihing sawm le nii, le David mihing sawm le nii te kidosak hi." 
2Samuel2:16 Misim in a kido pui tek sia a lu pan kizamh in, namsau taw a pangh tek kihol uh ahiciang mihing 24 sia pukin thi siat uh hi. Tua ahikom Gibeon ah tua mun sia, “Namsaute Lo” kici hi." 
2Samuel2:17 Tua zawkciang kidona nasia mama khat hong nei in, David mite in Abner le Israel te zo uh hi." 
2Samuel2:18 Zeruiah ii tapate thum tua sungah kihel hi: Joab, Abishai, le Asahel ahi uh hi. Asahel sia ngamsa, sangai bangin a tai ngang a," 
2Samuel2:19 Abner del tan pai hi. 
2Samuel2:20 Abner in nung lee et kik a, “Nangma Asahel ni ziam?” ci hi. Ama in, “Hi khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
2Samuel2:21 Abner in, “Kei hong del heak in! Ngalkapte khat del in a, a nei po laaksak in,” ci hi. Ahihang Asahel in ama del tan lai hi." 
2Samuel2:22 Khatvei ma Abner in, “Hong del heak in! Banghang nang hong thatlumsak hamtang tu ni ziam? Tuabang hi leng bangbangin na suapui pa Joab mai mu ngam tu khi ziam?” ci hi." 
2Samuel2:23 Ahihang Asahel a tawlnga nuam bua hi; tua ahikom Abner in a tei taw a nungsang a khaw le Asahel ngil kha in a nungah pailet hi. Asahel lei ah topsuk in thi hi, tuaciang tuak a luang sialna munah hong pai peuma in tawlnga in en uh hi." 
2Samuel2:24 Ahihang Joab le Abishai in Abner ii nung zuizenin, nitum ciangin Giah ngam nisuana sang, Gibeon duisung paina lampi tung, Ammah mual theng hi." 
2Samuel2:25 Benjamin nam pan pasalte Abner ii kiim ah kikhawmtua kikin mualdawn khat tungah ngalnanna mun la uh hi. 
2Samuel2:26 Abner in Joab oksan a, “Tawp hun nei ngawlin kido tan tu hi ziam? A khakbel ciang thin lalna simngawl bangma dang taang nawn ngawl tu ci in mu thei ngawl nu ziam? Ko sia na ngammipuite khu hi. Na mite munah ko hong del a tawp natu thu na piak tu, bang tanvei hai tu ziam?” ci hi." 
2Samuel2:27 Joab in, “Pau ngawl hi thong lete ka mite in zingsang khuavak dong hong del tu hi, ci in a nungta Pathian taw kiciam ngam khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
2Samuel2:28 Tua zawkciang Joab in Israel te a del a mi teng a tawlngak natu in lemle tum hi; tuabangin kidona tawp uh hi. 
2Samuel2:29 Abner le a mite sia Jordan Kuam dungah zankhua in pai uh hi; amate Jordan ngun kaantan in, a zingsang kik hunsung bup a pai suak zawkciang, Mahanaim theng kik uh hi." 
2Samuel2:30 Joab in ngal del a tawp zawkciang a mi teng a khoptua le, Asahel kihel in a kingawm mihing sawm le kua kisamh hi." 
2Samuel2:31 David ii mite in Benjamin nam Abner ii mite 360 that uh hi. 
2Samuel2:32 Joab le a mite in Asahel luang phaam in, Bethlehem khua a innkuan ii thaan ah phum uh hi. Tua zawkciang zankhua in pai a, zingsang khuavak bek in Hebron theng kik uh hi." 
2Samuel3:1 Saul ii bangkua sang a pangte le David ii bangkua sang a pangte ii kidona sia khuangei hi. David hong hat vaial ciang, ama a langpante hong thazawm vaial hi." 
2Samuel3:2 David ii tapa luk Hebron ah a suak teng sia a piankum zui in: Amnon, a nu sia Jezreel panin Ahinoam;" 
2Samuel3:3 Chileab, a nu sia Carmel panin Nabal ii zi meingong nu Abigail; Absalom, a nu sia Geshur kumpipa Talmai ii tanu Maacah;" 
2Samuel3:4 Adonijah, a nu sia Haggith; Shephatiah, a nu sia Abital;" 
2Samuel3:5 Ithream, a nu sia Eglah hi. Hi tapate theampo sia Hebron ah piang siat uh hi." 
2Samuel3:6 David ii ngalkapte le Saul ii bangkua tung a thumaan ngalkapte a kido tawto uh ciang, Saul ii nungzuite sung pan Abner hong thahat vaial hi." 
2Samuel3:7 Ni khat ni in Saul ii tapa Ishbosheth in Abner sia Saul ii zino Aiah ii tanu Rizpah taw lumkhawm hi ci in mawsuanh hi. 
2Samuel3:8 Hisia in Abner thinsosak hi. “Saul leeheak tu in hong um ni ziam? Judah te atu na a seseam hong sa takpi ni ziam?” ci ngawp hi. “A kipat peuma pan na pa Saul, a suapuite le a ngualtamhte tungah thumaan khi hi, tuaciang David ii hong zaw natu pan hong hun khi hi; ahitazong tuni in numei khat huvau in maw hong zong ni hi!" 
2Samuel3:9 Topa in David munah kamciam pia a, ama in kumpi ngam sia Saul le a suan a paalte tung pan la in, David sia ngam mong khat pan mong khat dong a uk Israel le Judah kumpipa suaksak tu hi. Tu in hi thu ka taangtungsak buale Pathian in hong saatlum tahen!” ci hi." 
2Samuel3:10  
2Samuel3:11 Ishbosheth in Abner kiita mama ahikom kam khat zongh pau ngam ngawl hi. 
2Samuel3:12 Abner in tua laitak Hebron ah a om David kungah kamtaite paisak a, “Akua in hi ngam hi lei uk tu ziam? Keima taw thukimna khat hong vawt ta'n, tuaciang Israel ngam bup nangma sangah na nga natu kong hu tu hi,” cisak hi." 
2Samuel3:13 David in, “Pha hi! nang taw thukimna vawt tu khi hi, ahihang nong hisak tu khat sia: kei taw kimu tu nong pai ciang Saul ii tanu Michal hong keng nanak tu ni hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel3:14 David in Ishbosheth tung zongh ah kam thaak a, “Ka zi Michal hong pia kik ta'n, ama ka teenpui natu in Philistine te ii vunteap zakhat taw ka tat sa hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel3:15 Tua ahikom Ishboseth in Michal sia Laish ii tapa, a pasal Paltiel kung panin la khe hi." 
2Samuel3:16 Paltiel in lam tawntung ma in kap kawmin Bahurim khua dong zui hi. Ahihang Abner in, “Inn ah ciakik ta'n,” a ci ciang ama cia hi." 
2Samuel3:17 Abner sia Israel lampuite kungah pai in, “Khua ngeipi ma David sia na kumpipa tu in dei nu hi." 
2Samuel3:18 Tu in hisia no atu hunpha hi. Topa in hi bang a ci sia ciamtee vun, ‘Ka naseampa David in, Israel ka mite sia Philistine te le ngal a dangte theampo panin a suatak natu in zangh tu khi hi,’ ” ci hi." 
2Samuel3:19 Abner in Benjamin nam pan mite tung zongh ah a son zawkciang Benjamin mite le Israel te ii a vawt tu thukimna teng David munah a son tu in Hebron ah pai hi. 
2Samuel3:20 Hebron khua David kungah mihing kul taw Abner hong pai ciangin David in amate atu poai vawtsak hi. 
2Samuel3:21 Abner in David munah, “Tu in ka na pai tu a, Israel buppi kumpipa nangma sangah kong pangsak tu hi. Amate in nang sia kumpipa in hong saang tu hi, tuaciangin nangma in na dei teng na nga siat tu a, ngam buppi na uk tu hi” ci hi. David in Abner sia ngammuan natu thukho khat pia in paisak hi." 
2Samuel3:22 A zawkciang, Joab le David ii ulian dangte ngalsimna panin a sutol uh vanh tam mama taw hong cia hi. Abner ahile tua mun Hebron ah David taw a om nawn bua hi, banghang ziam cile David in ama sia ngammuanna thukho taw thaa hi." 
2Samuel3:23 Joab le a mite hong thet uh ciangin ama tungah Abner sia David kumpipa kungah haw zo a, ngammuan natu kamciam pia in a kipaisakna thu kison hi." 
2Samuel3:24 Tua ahikom Joab sia kumpipa kungah pai in, “Bang vawt thong ni ziam? Abner nang kungah hong pai ci leang — banghangin thaa thong ni ziam?" 
2Samuel3:25 Ama hi sungah hong pai sia nang hong theam tu, na sep na vawt theampo le na paina theampo a kan tu in hong pai hi. Tuasia na heak ma hi ngawl ziam!” ci hi." 
2Samuel3:26 Joab in David a nusiat zawkciang Abner sam tu in kamtaite paisak a, tuaciang amate in Sirah tuikhuk panin ama hong ciapui kik hi; ahihang David in bangma heak pui ngawl hi." 
2Samuel3:27 Hebron ah Abner hong thet ciangin, Joab in ama nguak taw thu son tubangin kongpi ah a tuamin paipui a, tua munah a ngil pan naam taw hol hi. Tuabangin Abner sia kisuamlum hi, banghang ziam cile ama in Joab ii suapuipa Asahel thalupsak hi." 
2Samuel3:28 David in tua thu a zaak ciang, “ Topa in kei le ka uk sung mite Abner kisuamlupna tungtaang ah bekcik zongh maw ngawl hi ci in hong he hi." 
2Samuel3:29 Tua atu in daan piakna Joab le a innkuan bup in thuak tahen! Khangsimin a bangkua sungah numei le pa omkhopna pan a piang natna a vei khat, ahibuale a lauhuai vun natna khat, ahibuale numei nasep teng a seam thei bek khat, tua ahibuale ngal sungah a thi khat, ahibuale an neak tu nei ngawl khat veu om vaciat tahen!” ci hi." 
2Samuel3:30 Tuabangin Joab le a suapuipa Abishai in Gibeon kidona ah amate ii suapuipa Asahel a thatlum pa Abner tungah phulam uh hi. 
2Samuel3:31 Tua zawkciang David in Joab le a mite a puan uh eaukeak in, khau-ip puan silh a, Abner thina hangin a khuangai natu in thupia hi. Tuaciang thi vuina ah Kumpipa David mama mithi kuang nung pan zui in pai hi." 
2Samuel3:32 Abner sia Hebron ah kiphumin, kumpipa sia a thaan ah a ngingin kap a, mite theampo zongh kap tek hi." 
2Samuel3:33 David in hi kaa la Abner sak hi: “Banghangin Abner sia a mawmaw pa bangin thi ziam? 
2Samuel3:34 A khut te kiletheen ngawl hi, a peangte kisawm ngawl hi; Ama sia khialna lian vawtte ii thalup mi khat bangin thi hi!” Tuaciang mipite in ama kaa kik leleau uh hi." 
2Samuel3:35 Mipite nitangtum hanciamin David in bang khat po nesak nuam ahihang ama in a ciliap huai kamciam vawt a, “Nitum ma in neak khat po ka nei le Pathian in hong vaatlum tahen!” ci hi." 
2Samuel3:36 Amate in hisia ciamtee a, lungkim mama uh hi. A tatakin, David ii vawt theampo in mipite lungkimsak hi." 
2Samuel3:37 David ii a mi teng le Israel mi theampo in Abner kisuamlupna ah kumpipa a kihel ngawlna thu tel uh hi. 
2Samuel3:38 Kumpipa in a uliante munah, “Tuni in Israel ngam sungah lampui lian khat thi ahi hunlam phawk ngawl nu ziam?" 
2Samuel3:39 Keima sia Pathian ii teal kumpipa ka hisaap hang, tuni in ka tha zawm hi. Hi Zeruiah ii tapate sia kei atu in ngoltol lei hi. Hi khialna lian vawtte a kilawm bangin Topa in daan pia tahen,” ci hi." 
2Samuel4:1 Hebron khua ah Abner kisuamlupna thu, Saul ii tapa Ishbosheth in a zaak ciang lau mama a, Israel mite theampo patau uh hi." 
2Samuel4:2 Ishbosheth in ulian nii nei a, ngalsim lampuite veu ahi hi, amate Benjamin nam, Beeroth khua pan Rimmon ii tapate hi a, Baanah le Rechab ahi uh hi. (Beeroth sia Benjamin ngam in kiciamtee hi." 
2Samuel4:3 A teangciil te sia Gittaim ah a tai pan kipan tua munah teang uh hi.) 
2Samuel4:4 Saul ii suan le paal dang khat sia Jonathan ii tapa Mephibosheth hi a, kum nga a phak laitakin Saul le Jonathan ngal sungah kithat hi. Jezreel khuapi panin amate ii thina a kizaak ciang, ama a omh nu in zamh a taipui hi; ahihang ama manlang nuam mama ahikom a nau taaksua tha a, a peangbai khat suak hi." 
2Samuel4:5 Rechab le Baanah te Ishbosheth inn ah a haw tu in hong pai in, sun hun ama ii tawlngak laitakin tualai ah theng uh hi." 
2Samuel4:6 Numei kongkhacing sia zungtaang kheapin a omna ah lusu in mu zo hi, tua ahikom Rechab le Baanah te tum ku uh hi." 
2Samuel4:7 Amate inn sung hong thet poma ciang Ishbosheth ii lupna inndoi sungah tum in, ama mutthip in om sia thatlum hi. Tua zawkciang a lu tansak a, Jordan Kuam zui in zankhua paipui uh hi." 
2Samuel4:8 Amate in a lutang sia Hebron ah David pia a, “Nang hong that tu a hanciam na ngalpa Saul ii tapa Ishbosheth lutang hi sungah om hi. Tuni in Topa in kumpipa nang sia Saul le a suan a paal te tungah phulaak tu hong oai hi,” ci uh hi." 
2Samuel4:9 David in, “Launa theampo pan hong hun a nungta Topa taw ka kiciam hi!" 
2Samuel4:10 Kamtaipa sia kei kung Ziglag ah hong pai a, Saul ii thina sia lungdamhuai thu sa in kei hong son hi. Ama man in thatsak khi hi. Ama hong puak lungdamhuai thu hu a, tel ka piak sia tuabang hi!" 
2Samuel4:11 Mawnei ngawl, ama inn sungah a mu mihing khat a suamlum mi ngilote atu in bangza in sia zaw lai tu ziam! Tu in ama na suamlup uh hu in a phulamsak tu khi hi, tuaciang no sia lei maitang panin hong zutmaai tu khi hi!” ci in zo hi." 
2Samuel4:12 David in thupia a, a ngalkapte in Rechab le Baanah te thatlum in, a khutte a peangte a tansak zawk uh ciang, Hebron tuicing hui ah khai uh hi. Amate in Ishbosheth lutang la in Hebron khua Abner ii thaankuul ah phum uh hi." 
2Samuel5:1 Tua zawkciang Israel namte theampo Hebron khua David kungah hong pai in ama munah, “Ko sia nangma ii chi le sa hi khu hi." 
2Samuel5:2 A bosa hun sung Saul sia ih kumpipa ahi lai ngawngawn in, nangma in Israel mite ngal kidona sungah na lampui a, tuaciang Topa in na mite na lampui natu le a ukpa na sua natu kamciam hong pia hi,” ci uh hi." 
2Samuel5:3 Tuabangin Israel lampui theampo David Kumpipa kung Hebron ah hong pai uh hi. Ama in amate taw a thiangtho kipawlpuina vawt a, amate in ama sathau noai in, Israel kumpipa suak hi." 
2Samuel5:4 David sia kumpipa a sua hunin kum 30 pha a, kum 40 sung uk hi." 
2Samuel5:5 Ama in Hebron panin Judah te kum sali le lang sung uk a, Jerusalem panin Israel le Judah te theampo kum 33 sung uk hi." 
2Samuel5:6 Kumpipa David le a mite ii Jerusalem sim tu in a kuan tu hun hong theng hi. Tua munah a teang Jebus te in tua khuapi sia David in zothal zo tu in um ngawl ahikom ama tung ah, “Hi lai ah nang hong tum ngeingawl tu ni hi; mittawte le peangbaite ngawngawn in hong nolh keak zo tu hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel5:7 (Ahihang David in amate Zion kulhpi suan takpi in tua hun pan kipan “David Khuapi” kici hi.) 
2Samuel5:8 Tua ni in David in, a mite tungah, “Jebus mite kei ii ngaimawk za in a ngaimaw hi sungah na om uh ziam? Thalup nop dongin a ensan na om uh ziam? Tua ahile tui laakna lei tawlet sia zui in pai tavun a, tua a khuangai huai mittaw peangbaite sim tavun,” ci hi. (Tua hu in, “Mittawte le a peangbaite sia Topa inn sungah tum thei ngawl tu hi kici hi.)" 
2Samuel5:9 Kulhpi a suan zawkciang a sungah David teang a, “David khuapi” ci in minvaw hi. Ama in tuasia ii kiimkot ah khuapi sa a, nisuana sang mualpangh ah lei a dipna pan hong pan hi." 
2Samuel5:10 Ama thahat vaial tawntung hi, banghang ziam cile Vaanglianbelpa Topa Pathian ama taw omkhawm hi." 
2Samuel5:11 Tyre khua a om Kumpipa Hiram in David kungah sum zuak sum lei vai taw in taangmi paisak hi; ama in a zak tu in kumpi inn sak natu cedar thingluangte, inn sa thiamte, suang ciang thiamte puak hi." 
2Samuel5:12 Tuabangin David in Topa ii ama Israel kumpipa tu in a kipsakna le, a mite atu in a kumpi ngam a khantosakna thu phawk hi." 
2Samuel5:13 Hebron pan Jerusalem ah a kikhiin zawk uh ciang David in zinote le zite la thua in tapa tanu a tamzaw lai nei hi. 
2Samuel5:14 Jerusalem ah a suak a tate hi bang teng hi: Shammua, Shobab, Nathan, Solomon," 
2Samuel5:15 Ibhar, Elishua, Nepheg, Japhia," 
2Samuel5:16 Elishama, Eliada, le Eliphelet te ahi uh hi." 
2Samuel5:17 Philistine te munah David sia Israel kumpipa kisuaksak zo hi ci in kison ahikom amate ii ngalkaphonpi sia ama man tu in hong kuan uh hi. Hi thu David in a zaak ciangin ngalnanna kulh khat sungah tuaksuk hi. 
2Samuel5:18 Philistine te Rephaim Kuam sung hong theng a tua mun laa uh hi. 
2Samuel5:19 David in Topa dongh a, “Philistine te ka sim tu ziam? Zawna kei nong pia tu ziam?” ci hi. Topa in, “Hi hi, sim in! Zawna kong pia tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
2Samuel5:20 Tua ahikom David sia Baal Perazim ah kuan a Phillistine te zo hi. Ama in, “ Topa in ka ngalte khuanawl tuipawm bangin nawk keak hi,” ci hi. Tua ahikom tua mun sia Baal Perazim kina hi." 
2Samuel5:21 Philistine te a taikeak uh ciang a milimte nusia uh a, tuate David le a mite in laksak uh hi." 
2Samuel5:22 Tua zawkciang Philistine te in Rephaim Kuam ah heak kikin tua mun la kik uh hi. 
2Samuel5:23 Khatvei ma David in dongh lai a, Topa in, “Hi sung panin sim heak in a, kot pai in, balsam thingkungte omna nai, a pang langkhat sang panin sim tu in kinging vun." 
2Samuel5:24 Thingkung dawn teng ah mihon khuasuan nging na zaak uh ciang sim vun, banghang ziam cile Philistine ngalkaphonpi a zo tu in keima noma mai ah a papai hi tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel5:25 David in Topa thupiak bangin ngamta a, tuaciang ama in Philistine te Geba pan lam tawntung Gezer dong not kik zo hi." 
2Samuel6:1 Khatvei ma David in Israel ngalkap phabel teng khawmtua a, a vekpi in 30,000 pha uh hi," 
2Samuel6:2 tuaciang ama in amate Judah ngam Baalah ah paipui hi, tuaciang cherub te tungah kumpi in a kitosak, Vaanglianpipa Topa ii min a pu, Pathian ii Thuciamna Thingkuang sia tua mun panin laak tu ahi hi." 
2Samuel6:3 Amate in tuasia mualtung a om Abinadab inn pan la in, leangthak khat tungah suan uh hi. Aminadab ii tapate Uzzah le Ahio in khuileang lampui in," 
2Samuel6:4 leang mai ah Ahio pai hi. 
2Samuel6:5 David le Israel buppi sia a tha nei za uh taw Topa patoaina in lasa in laam uh hi. Tengtongh, liamlo, khuang, nguasemh le daalkopsai te tum uh hi." 
2Samuel6:6 Amate Nacon ii ancilna mun hong thet uh ciangin a khuitalte hong lutu a, Uzzah in Thuciamna Thingkuang hong zamh hi." 
2Samuel6:7 Tua Thuciamna Thingkuang sia a thasia vawt ngawl hu in thakhat thu in Uzzah tungah Topa Pathian thin uuk a, thatlum hi. Uzzah sia Thuciamna Thingkuang hui ah thi hi," 
2Samuel6:8 tua ahiciang tua hun pan kipan tua mun sia Perez Uzzah kici hi. David sia a thinso hi, banghang ziam cile Topa in Uzzah sia thin uukna taw daan a piak hang ahi hi." 
2Samuel6:9 Tua zawkciang David in Topa kiita a, “Bangbangin Thuciamna Thingkuang sia tu in keima in tonpui ngam nawn tu khi ziam?” ci hi." 
2Samuel6:10 Tua ahikom ama in Jerusalem khua ah ciapui ngawl tu in khensat hi; tuasia taangin lampialpui a, Gath khua mi Obed Edom inn ah tun hi." 
2Samuel6:11 Thuciamna Thingkuang sia tua munah tha thum kitaamsak a, Topa in Obed Edom le a bangkua thupha pia hi." 
2Samuel6:12 Kumpipa David in Thuciamna Thingkuang hu in, Topa in Obed Edom bangkua le a neisa theampo thupha pia hi ci in za a; tua ahikom ama in Thuciamna Thingkuang sia Obed inn panin la in, poai khaamna lianpi taw Jerusalem ah ciapui hi." 
2Samuel6:13 Thuciamna Thingkuang a pua mihingte kal luk hong suan zawkciang David in tawlngasak a, khuital khat le khuino thau khat sangaw biakpiakna in pia hi." 
2Samuel6:14 David sia a kawngah dial khat teang bekin, Topa a patoaina in a tha neiza taw laam hi." 
2Samuel6:15 Tuabangin ama le Israel mite theampo in Thuciamna Thingkuang Jerusalem ah lawpin auna le lemle aw te taw paipui uh hi. 
2Samuel6:16 Tua thingkuang khuapi sung a kithetpui laitakin Saul ii tanu Michal in khelki panin khua a et le David kumpipa Pathian mai ah laamin tawnin a om a mu ciang, hoi maw sa hi." 
2Samuel6:17 Amate in tua Thingkuang sia David ii tua atu a saksak Puanbuk sungah koi uh hi. Tua zawkciang ama in Topa tungah sangaw biakpiakna le kipawlkhop biakpiaknate pia hi. 
2Samuel6:18 Sangaw biakpiakna a man zawkciang David in Vaanglianbelpa Topa min taw mipite thupha pia in," 
2Samuel6:19 amate an hawmsak hi. Ama in Israel pasal le numei khat simin anluum khat tek, sa em bak khat tek le sapitko tawm tek pia hi. Tua zawkciang a kuama po inn ah cia uh hi." 
2Samuel6:20 Tua zawkciang David in a innkuanpuite nukset tu in hong cia ciang, Michal sia ama taw kisi tu in hong pusuak hi. “Tuni in Israel kumpipa in ama min let natu khat vawt hi! Ama uliante ii naseam numeite mu na ah a mawmaw bangin kipholaak hi!” ci hi." 
2Samuel6:21 David in, “Na pa le ama ii bangkua taangin Israel lampui tu in kei hong teal, ka Topa ka patoaina in laam khi hi," 
2Samuel6:22 tuaciang tu a sang zongin a nasia zaw lai in keima le keima kisimmawk vawt zaw lai tu khi hi. Nang na hile kei, bangma in hong heang ngawl tha tu ni hi, ahihang tua numeite in kei, hong thupi sim mama tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
2Samuel6:23 Saul ii tanu Michal sia a khan sung ta nei ngawl hi. 
2Samuel7:1 Kumpipa David sia a kumpi inn sungah om a, tuaciang Topa in a ngalte theampo kung panin keamcing hi." 
2Samuel7:2 Tua zawkciang kumpipa in kamsaang pa Nathan munah, “Kei hi sungah cedar thing taw a kisa inn sungah teang khi hi, ahihang Pathian ii Thuciamna Thingkuang sia puanbuk sungah kikeam hi!” ci hi." 
2Samuel7:3 Nathan in, “Na thinsung a om babangin vawt in, banghang ziam cile nangma taw Topa hong omkhawm hi,” ci in zo hi." 
2Samuel7:4 Ahihang tua zanin Topa in Nathan munah," 
2Samuel7:5 “Va pai ta'n a, ka naseampa David munah hi bangin ka ci teng va son ta'n, ‘Kei teen natu biakinn a sa tu sia nang hi ngawl ni hi." 
2Samuel7:6 Egypt ngam panin ka mite ka suatak hun pan kipan tu hun dong biakinn sungah teang ngeingawl khi hi; puanbuk sungah teangin khualhaw kot khi hi. 
2Samuel7:7 Israel mite taw ka khualhawna theampo ah a lampui in ka koite khat po tung zongh ah banghangin cedar thing taw a kisa biakinn hong saksak ngawl nu ziam, ci ngeingawl khi hi.’" 
2Samuel7:8 “Tua ahikom ka naseampa David munah na son in a, Kei, Vaanglianbelpa Topa in, ‘Lo sungah tuu cingin na omna panin nang kong la a, Israel ka mite a uk pa kong suaksak hi." 
2Samuel7:9 Na paina po ah nang taw kong omkhawm a, maisang na manaw ciang na ngalte theampo ka zo siat hi. Leitung ah lampui lianbel te bangin kong minthangsak tu hi." 
2Samuel7:10 Ka mi Israel te ten natu mun khat ka teal zo a, tua munah amate kinengniam nawn ngawlin nungta tu uh hi. Ngam hisia sungah amate hong tum pan kipan mihing ngoltolte in sim tawntung ahihang hi bangte piang kik nawn ngawl tu hi. Na ngalte kung pan kong kepcing natu le suan le paal na nei natu in kamciam kong pia zo hi." 
2Samuel7:11  
2Samuel7:12 Nang thi in na taanghpupite taw na kiphum khop zawkciang zong na tapate sung pan khat kumpipa ka suaksak tu a, a kumpi ngam ka thahatsak tu hi." 
2Samuel7:13 Ama sia biakinn khat kei atu a sa tu pa hi tu a, a kumpi khangngui a tawntungin ka kizomsak tu hi." 
2Samuel7:14 Keima in ama ii pa ka hi tu a, ama ka tapa hi tu hi. Sep khial vawt khial a nei ciangin pa ii tapa a daan a piak bangin ka tek tu hi." 
2Samuel7:15 Ahihang nangma kumpipa na sua thei natu in Saul ka huna ka dawkeak bangin tua na tapa sia ka huna ka dawkkeak buatu hi. 
2Samuel7:16 Nangma in suan le paal na nei tawntung tu a, na kumpi ngam ka khomsuansak tu hi. Na kumpi khangngui sia a mong ngei buatu hi,’ ” ci hi." 
2Samuel7:17 Pathian ii a pualaak teng a vekpi in Nathan in David munah son hi. 
2Samuel7:18 Tua zawkciang David kumpipa sia Topa ompuina Puanbuk sung zuan a, to in hi bangin thungen hi: “Vaanglianpipa Topa awng, kei tung ahizong ka innkuanpuite tung ahizong nong septe ka kiphu ka kilawmna uh om ngawl hi." 
2Samuel7:19 Tua hi napi tu in a nasia zaw lai in hong seam ni hi, Vaanglianpipa Topa awng; maisang hong pai lai tu kumte ah ka suan ka paalte atu dongin kamciam nong pia zo hi. Tuaciang hisia mihing khat in musak ni hi, Vaanglianpipa awng!" 
2Samuel7:20 Nang tungah bang kong ci lalai thei tu ziam! Kei na naseampa hong he ni hi. 
2Samuel7:21 Hi bang nong vawt tu sia nangma deina le tupna hi; nangma in hi na lianpite kei nong hil natu in na vawt ahi hi. 
2Samuel7:22 Bangza in lian ni ziam, Vaanglianpipa Topa awng! Nang taw a kibang khat zongh om ngawl hi; nangma bekma Pathian na hi sia kong he tawntung uh hi." 
2Samuel7:23 Nangma mi tatak a suak tu in na suatak Israel bang peuma leitung ah a dang minam om ngawl hi. Amate atu in na vawt a lian le a lamdang nate in na minthanna leitung buppi kizelsak hi. Egypt ngam pan nangma mi tu in na suataksak na mite maisang a nawk ciangin minam dangte le a pathian te na notkeak hi. 
2Samuel7:24 Nangma in Israel te a tawntungin nangma mi na suaksak a, Topa awng, tuaciang nangma sia amate ii Pathian suak zo ni hi." 
2Samuel7:25 “Tuaciang tu in, Topa Pathian awng, kei le ka suan ka paalte atu kamciam na vawt sia a tawntung atu in hong taangtungsak ta'n, ka seam tu na ci te hong seam ta'n." 
2Samuel7:26 Na minthanna nasia tu a, tuaciang mite in a tawntungin, ‘ Topa Vaanglianbelpa sia Israel ii Pathian hi,’ hong ci tu uh hi. Tuaciang nangma in ka kumpi khangngui sia a tawntung nong kepsak tu hi." 
2Samuel7:27 Topa Vaanglianpipa, Israel ii Pathian awng! Hi thungetna nang tungah hang takin kong ngen ngam hi, banghang ziam cile, nangma in kei na naseampa tungah hi teng nong lak zo a, tuaciang ka suan ka paalte kumpi na suasak tu sia nong son zo hi." 
2Samuel7:28 “Tuaciang tu in, Vaanglianpipa Topa, nangma in Pathian na hi hi; na kamciamte na len tawntung a, hi a lamdang kamciam sia kei tungah nong pia zo hi." 
2Samuel7:29 Nangma piak hamphat nate taw a nopsak tan natu in ka suan ka paalte thupha nong piaksak natu kong ngen hi. Nang, Vaanglianpipa Topa in, hisia nong kamciam zo a, na thupha sia ka suan ka paalte tungah a tawntungin kip tu hi.”" 
2Samuel8:1 Hun tawmvei zawkciang Kumpipa David in Philistine te sim kik in zo ahiciang, amate in a ngam uh uk nawn ngawl hi." 
2Samuel8:2 Tua zawkciang Moab te zo hi. A ngal matte lei ah lumsakin thum sung pan nii veu thatlum hi. Tua ahikom Moab te sia a khutnuai mi hong suakin, ama tungah shia pia uh hi." 
2Samuel8:3 Tuaciang, ama in Syria ngamsung Zobah ngamuk kumpipa Rehob ii tapa Hadadezer sia Euphrates ngun naak sangah ngamukna la kik tu in a paina lampi ah ama in zo hi." 
2Samuel8:4 David in siphu ngalkap 1,700 le, lei ngalkap 20,000 matsak hi. Ama in siphu ngalleang zakhat atu a kicing khom siphu la in, a dang teng theampo a peangbaisak siat hi." 
2Samuel8:5 Damascus a om Syria te in Kumpipa Hadadezer hu tu in ngalkaphonpi khat a paisak le David in tuate simin 22,000 that hi." 
2Samuel8:6 Tua zawkciang ama in amate ngam sungah ngal ngiaphualte saat a, amate sia a khutnuai mite hong suakin, shia pia uh hi. Topa in David sia mun theampo ah ngal zosak hi." 
2Samuel8:7 Hadadezer ii a uliante ii toai khamh lumte David in sut a, Jerusalem ah cia pui hi." 
2Samuel8:8 Ama in Hadadezer ii uk khuapite ahi Betah le Berothai pan taau zongh tam mama la hi. 
2Samuel8:9 David in Kumpipa Hadadezer ii ngalkaphonpi zo zo hi ci in Hamath kumpipa Toi in za hi. 
2Samuel8:10 Toi taw tamvei ma a kido ngei Hadadezer sia David in zo ahikom a tapa Joram in muaksak a, tuabangin a lungdampuina ko hi. Joram in David kungah khamh, ngunn le taau taw a kivawt letsongte puak hi." 
2Samuel8:11 Kumpipa David in tuate sia a zawthal sa ngamte ahi 
2Samuel8:12 Edom, Moab, Ammon, Philistia, le Amalek te tung pan a laaksak ngunn le khamh te le Hadadezer kung pan a laaksak vanh pawlkhatte taw zong kopin biakna ah a zak tu in koituam hi." 
2Samuel8:13 Ci Kuam sungah Edom mite 18,000 a thalupna pan a cia kik ciang David minthang zawkan hi." 
2Samuel8:14 Ama in Edom ngamsung theampo ah ngalkap phualte saat a, tuaciang tua munah a om mite ama ii khutnuai mi suak uh hi. Topa in David mun theampo ah ngal zosak hi." 
2Samuel8:15 David in Israel buppi uk a, a mite thumaan tak le a pha takin a kivawt tawntung natu in uk hi." 
2Samuel8:16 A nu Zeruiah ahi Joab sia ngalkaphonpi a ukpa hi; Ahilud ii tapa Jehoshaphat sia thu tepteena teng a lenpa hi; 
2Samuel8:17 Ahitub ii tapa Zadok le Abiathar ii tapa Ahimelech te sia thiampite ahi hi; Seraiah sia kumpipa zum sung thuzeakpi ahi hi; 
2Samuel8:18 Jehoiada ii tapa Benaiah sia David a cingte a ukpa hi a, David ii tapate sia thiampite ahi uh hi." 
2Samuel9:1 Ni khat ni in David in, “Saul ii bangkua sung pan a nungta lai om ziam? Tuabang a om le Jonathan hu in dikna lak nuam khi hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel9:2 Saul ii innkuan naseampa Ziba a kici khat om a, David kungah ama kipaisak hi. “Nang Ziba ni ziam?” ci in kumpipa in dongh hi. “Na naseampa hi khi hi, topa,” ci in ama in zo hi." 
2Samuel9:3 “Pathian tungah kamciamna ka piak bangma, Saul ii bangkua tungah thumaanna le dikna ka lak natu in Saul ii bangkua sungah khat po a kikhe a om ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Ziba in, “Jonathan ii tapa khat om lai hi; Ama a peangbai hi,” ci in zo hi." 
2Samuel9:4 Kumpipa in, “Koi sungah ama om ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Ziba in “Lodebar khua, Ammiel ii tapa Machir inn ah om hi,” ci in zo hi." 
2Samuel9:5 Tua ahikom David kumpipa in ama samsak hi. 
2Samuel9:6 Saul ii tupa, Jonathan ii tapa, Mephibosheth a thet ciang David mai ah zatak pia in kun hi. David in, “Mephibosheth awng,” ci in sam a, ama in “Na naseampa hi khi hi, topa,” ci in zo hi." 
2Samuel9:7 David in, “Lau heak in. Na pa Jonathan hu in nang tungah hong dik tu khi hi. Na pu Saul ii leitang theampo nang kong pia kik tu a, tuaciang nang sia ka sabuai ah an na ne tawntung tu hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel9:8 Mephibosheth kun kik a, “Kei sia ui thisa khat bang bek hi khi hi, topa awng! Banghangin kei tungah tuaza in hong dik tu ni ziam?” ci hi." 
2Samuel9:9 Tua zawkciang kumpipa in Saul ii naseampa Ziba sam a, “Na topa ii tupa Mephibosheth tungah Saul le a bangkua ii neisa theampo pia khi hi." 
2Samuel9:10 Nang, na tapate le na naseamte in na topa Saul ii innkuanpuite atu tua leitang tho in, lo an tun ciang amate na puak tu uh hi. Ahihang Mephibosheth ahile keima sabuai ah leangna thupi khat hi tawntung tu hi,” ci hi. (Ziba in tapa sawm le nga le naseam kul nei hi.)" 
2Samuel9:11 Ziba in, “Kumpipa ii nong thupiak babang ka seam tu hi,” ci in zo hi. Tuabangin Mephibosheth in kumpipa ii tapate khat bangin kumpi sabuai ah an ne hi." 
2Samuel9:12 Mephibosheth in tapano Mica a kici khat nei hi. Ziba ii innkuanpuite theampo Mephibosheth ii naseamte suak siat uh hi. 
2Samuel9:13 Tua ahikom, a peangte ngeal a zaw Mephibosheth sia Jerusalem khua ah teangin, a an neak theampo kumpi sabuai ah ne hi." 
2Samuel10:1 Tua zawk tawm vei ciangin Ammon kumpipa Nahash thi a, a tapa Hanun sia kumpi suak hi." 
2Samuel10:2 Kumpipa David in, “A pa Nahash ii kei tungah hong vawt bangin Hanun tungah thumaan kilawmtatna ka lak nanak tu hi,” ci hi. Tua hi a, David in a khuangai puina a ko tu in kamtaite paisak hi. Amate Ammon a thet uh ciang," 
2Samuel10:3 Ammon lampuite in kumpipa tungah, “David in na pa a upatna taw, khuangai puina a lakna in hi mite hong paisak, hi tu in um ni ziam? Hi peuma ngawl hi! Ama in hi sungah amate hong puakna sia ei hong zawthal thei natu in ih khuapi thu a dawp tu ngalvilin hong paisak hi!” ci hi." 
2Samuel10:4 Hanun in David ii kamtaite mansak a, a khamul a lang meetkol sakin, a puansilhte a kawng ciangin tansak a, tha kik uh hi." 
2Samuel10:5 Amate inn lam a zot kik tu uh sia maizum leih hi. David in bang thu piang ci a zaak ciang amate tungah kam thaak a, na khamul uh a po kik mateng hong heak kik heak vun a, Jericho khua ah na taam vun ci in zasak hi." 
2Samuel10:6 Amate in David sia a ngal uh suaksak ci in Ammon te in tel zo ahiciang Bethrehob le Zobah pan Syria ngalkap 20,000, Tob pan 12,000, tuaciang Maacah kumpipa le a mite tulkhat teng ngalcial uh hi." 
2Samuel10:7 David in hi thu za a, tuaciang amate do tu in Joab le a ngalkaphonpi bup kuansak hi." 
2Samuel10:8 Ammon te kuanin amate khuapi Rabbah tumna ah mun la uh a, tua laitak a dangte, Syria te le Tob le Maacah pan mite in ngam taanzauna ah mun la uh hi." 
2Samuel10:9 Ngalte in mai pan le nung panin a sim tu hunlam Joab in mu ahikom Israel ngalkap phabel teng tealin Syria te maingat in mun lasak hi. 
2Samuel10:10 Ngalkap a om lai teng sia a suapui pa Abishai in uksak a, Ammon te maingat in koi hi." 
2Samuel10:11 Joab in ama munah, “Syria te in kei hong zo tu bangin na mu le hong pai ta'n a hong hu ta'n, tuaciang Ammon te in nang hong zo tu bang ahile keima hong pai in kong hu tu hi." 
2Samuel10:12 Hat in a, na thinliansak in! Ih Pathian khuapite le ih mite atu in nasia takin do tawng. Tuaciang Topa ii deina babangin piang tahen!” ci hi." 
2Samuel10:13 Joab le a mite in a sim tu mai a nawk ciang, Syria te tai keak uh hi." 
2Samuel10:14 Ammon te in Syria te tai a mu uh ciang amate zongh Abishai kung panin tai a, a khuapi sung tu uh hi. Tuasia ciang Joab sia Ammon te a simna pan hong heak kikin Jerusalem khua zuan hi." 
2Samuel10:15 Syria te in Israel te a lel hunlam phawk ahikom a ngalkap theampo khawmtua uh hi. 
2Samuel10:16 Kumpipa Hadadezer in Euphrates ngun ii nisuana sangah a om Syria te sam a, tuaciang Zobah kumpipa Hadadezer ii ngalkaphonpi ukpa Shobach ukna nuai Helam khua ah amate hong pai uh hi." 
2Samuel10:17 David in tua thu a zaak ciang Israel ngalkap theampo khawmtua a, Jordan ngun kaantan in Helam ah kuan hi, tua munah Syria te in ama maingat in mun la uh hi. Kidona hong kipan a," 
2Samuel10:18 tuaciang Israel te in Syria ngalkaphonpi notkeak kik uh hi. David le a mite in Syria siphu ngalleang ukte 700, siphu ngalkap 40,000 thatin, ngalte ngalkap ukpa Shobach liamsak a, ngalphual ah thi uh hi." 
2Samuel10:19 Hadadezer khutnuai a om kumpite in Israel te a lel hunlam a kiphaw uh ciangin ngal kilemna vawtin, amate khutnuai ah om uh hi. Tuaciangin Syria te in Ammon te hu ngam nawn ngawl uh hi." 
2Samuel11:1 Kumpipate in ngalsim veu in a kuan hun khaal kipat kik ciangin David in Joab sia a ngalkap bute le ngalkaphonpite taw kuansak hi; amate in Ammon te zo in, Rabbah khuapi uumci uh hi. Ahihang David ama sia Jerusalem ah om hi." 
2Samuel11:2 Nikhat, ni kai zawkciang David sia a mutna pan hong tho a, kumpi innkhum tungah kaato hi. Ama tualai ah a vavaa ciang numei khat kibual in a om mu hi. Ama a mealpha mama hi." 
2Samuel11:3 Tua ahikom ama in kamtaite paisak in, tua nu sia akua ziam ci in a katsak ciang, Hit mi Eliam ii tanu, Uriah ii zi Bathsheba hi ci in he hi." 
2Samuel11:4 David in ama a sam tu in kamtaite paisak hi; amate in tua nu ama kung then hi, tuaciang ama in luppui hi. (Ama sia tha simin a zeksa kithiansuana a man zawk hiat bek ahi hi.) Tua zawkciang ama cia kik hi." 
2Samuel11:5 A zawkciang ama ngai ahi hunlam kiphawk a, David munah a son tu in kamtai paisak hi." 
2Samuel11:6 Tuasia ciang David in Joab tungah kam thaak a: “Hit mi Uriah hong puak ta'n,” cisak hi. Tua ahikom Joab in David kungah ama paisak hi." 
2Samuel11:7 Uriah hong thet ciang David in Joab le a ngalkapte a ciidam ziam, ngal kidona bangbang hi ziam ci in dongh hi." 
2Samuel11:8 Tuaciang, ama in Uriah munah, “Cia in a, tawm vei tawlngak hun la ta'n,” ci hi. Uriah in nusia a, tuaciang David in a inn ah letsong puaksak hi." 
2Samuel11:9 Ahihang Uriah cia ngawl a; kumpi inn kongpi ah kumpipa a cingte taw lum hi. 
2Samuel11:10 Uriah sia inn ah a cia ngawl hunlam David in a zaak ciang ama dongh a, “Hun saupi inn taw kikhen a, nong heak kik zawk bek hi ngawl ziam; banghangin cia ngawl ni ziam?” ci hi." 
2Samuel11:11 Uriah in, “Israel te le Judah te ngal sungah om a, tuaciang Thuciamna Thingkuang zongh amate taw om hi; kei hong ukpa Joab le a bute zongh mun taanzauna ah ngiaphual saat hi. Bangbangin kei inn zuan a, ne in dawn in ka zi taw lum thei thong tu khi ziam? Tuabang peuma in ngamta ngeingawl tu khi hi ci in biakna taw kisai a thiangtho theampo taw ka kiciam hi,” ci in zo hi." 
2Samuel11:12 Tua ahikom David in, “Tua ahile tuni in hi sungah taam lai in, zing ciangin kong puak kik tu hi,” ci hi. Tua ahikom Uriah sia tua ni le a zing ciang dong Jerusalem ah taam hi." 
2Samuel11:13 David in nitak an ne tu in Uriah sam a, zu khamsak hi. Ahihang tua zan zongh Uriah a inn ah cia peang ngawl hi; kumpi inn a cingte inndoi sungah ama puanvan tungah mu zaw hi." 
2Samuel11:14 A zingsang ciang David in Joab lai thaak a, Uriah in a lai puaksak hi." 
2Samuel11:15 Ama in a lai sungah: “Uriah sia ngal kisim a nasia belna, ngal mai ah koi in, tuaciang nungkin vun a, ama thalup thuaksak vun,” ci in at hi." 
2Samuel11:16 Tua ahikom Joab in khuapi a uumci laitakin ngalte thahatna munah Uriah puak hi. 
2Samuel11:17 Ngalte ngalkapte khuapi panin hong pusuak in, Joab ngalkapte sim uh hi; David ii ngalkapmang pawlkhat kithat a, Uriah zongh thi hi." 
2Samuel11:18 Tua zawkciang Joab in David munah ngal kidona thu zasak hi," 
2Samuel11:19 tuaciang ama in kamtai pa pau natu hil a, “Kumpipa tungah ngal kidona thu teng na son siat zawkciang," 
2Samuel11:20 ama thin uukin, hi bangin hong dongh thei tu hi. ‘Banghangin amate sim tu in khuapi taw a kinai lei na dong pai nu ziam? Khuapi luphungte tung panin thaltangte hong kap tu ci in he ngawl nu ziam?" 
2Samuel11:21 Gideon ii tapa Abimelech a kithalupna ciamtee nawn ngawl nu ziam? A mun sia Thebez hi a, numei khat ii anngoaina suang khat taw luphung tung pan a densuk sia in ama khalum hi. Tua ahile banghangin luphung neak leih in pai nu ziam?’ Kumpipa in tu a bangin hong dongh le ama munah, ‘Na ngalkap mangpa Uriah zongh kithat hi,’ ci vun,” ci hi." 
2Samuel11:22 Tua ahikom kamtai pa, David kungah hong pai in Joab ii a thupiak bangin son hi." 
2Samuel11:23 Ama in, “Ih ngalte sia ei sangin hat zaw a, mun taanzauna ah ei hong sim tu khuapi sung pan hong pusuak hi, ahihang amate sia khuapi kongpi dong ka nawt kik uh hi." 
2Samuel11:24 Tuasia ciang amate in luphung tung pan thaltang taw hong kap in, na kumpi ngalkapmang pawlkhat hong thalupsak a, Uriah zongh thi hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel11:25 Kamtaipa munah David in, “Joab na hanthawn in a, ngal kidona sung sia akua teng thi tu ci in kison thei ngeingawl ahi nungsang a thin lal ngawl natu son in. Khuapi sia nasia seseam in sim a, a laak natu son in,” ci hi." 
2Samuel11:26 Bathsheba in a pasal kithat ci in a zaak ciang khuangai in tau hi. 
2Samuel11:27 A khuangai tu hun teng a bo ciangin David in ama sia kumpi inn ah sam hi; ama ii zi hong suak a, tapa khat hing hi. Ahihang David ii ngamtatna huvau Topa lungkim ngawl hi." 
2Samuel12:1 Topa in kamsaang pa Nathan sia David kungah paisak hi. Ama kungah Nathan pai in, “Pasal nii khuapi khat sungah teang khawm hi; khat sia hau a, a khat sia zawng hi." 
2Samuel12:2 A hau pa in khui le tuu tam mama nei hi," 
2Samuel12:3 a zawng pa ahile a leisa tuuno khat bek nei hi. Ama in tuasia pha takin khoai a, a inn ah a tate taw khang khawmsak hi. Ama ii neak lai an pawlkhat taw vaakin, a hai taw tui dawnsak a, a kaang sungah toai hi. Tuuno sia ama atu in tanu khat taw kibang hi." 
2Samuel12:4 Ni khat ni in leangna khat a hau pa inn ah zin hong tung hi. Tua pa neak tu in mihaupa in a nganno khat zongh ngaw nuam ngawl hi; ama in mizawngpa ii tuuno laaksak in a zinpa neak tu in huan hi,” ci in son hi." 
2Samuel12:5 David sia tua mihau pa tungah thin uuk mama a, “A nungta Topa taw kiciam hi tong, hi bangin a ngamta pa a thi tu kilawm hi!" 
2Samuel12:6 Hi bangin a tatsiat hu in a laak za tungah a zaa li in a lo kik kul tu hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel12:7 “Nangma tuasia pa ni hi,” Nathan in David munah ci hi. “Tuaciang hisia Israel ii Topa Pathian in ci hi: ‘Saul khut sung pan kong suatak a, Israel kumpipa kong suaksak hi." 
2Samuel12:8 Ama ii kumpi ngam le a zite nang kong pia hi; Israel le Judah kumpipa kong suaksak hi. Hi sia kicing ngawl lai ahile a zaa nii in a tamzaw hong pia zo tu khi hi. 
2Samuel12:9 Tua ahile banghangin kong thupiakte ni ngawl ni ziam? Banghangin hi tatsiatna ngamtat in nei ni ziam? Nang in Uriah sia ngal sungah na thisak hi: Ammon te in na thatlumsak hi, tua zawkciang a zi na la hi!" 
2Samuel12:10 Tu in na khang simin na suan na paalte pawlkhat sia thisia thi ngamh in thi tu hi, banghang ziam cile nang in ka thu nong ni bua a, tuaciang Uriah ii zi na la hi." 
2Samuel12:11 Nangma innkuan sung pan ma in khat ma in nangma ngim hong piak natu in ka kiciam hi. Na zite nangma kung pan la in midang khat ka piak ciangin hi thu na mu tu hi; ama in suntangin amate luppui tu hi. 
2Samuel12:12 A thimtham in mawna vawt ku ni hi, ahihang Israel theampo ii a mu tu in suntangin tuabang ka piangsak tu hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel12:13 David in, “ Topa tungah maw zo khi hi,” ci hi. Nathan in, “ Topa in hong maisak hi; thi ngawl tu ni hi." 
2Samuel12:14 Ahihang hi bangin na ngamtatna panin Topa simmawkna lak zo na hikom na ta sia thi tu hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
2Samuel12:15 Tua zawkciang Nathan inn ah cia hi. Uriah zi taw a hin David ii ta sia Topa in a ciinasak mama hi. 
2Samuel12:16 David in a ta dam natu Pathian tungah thu ngen hi. Ama in bangma ne nuam ngawl a, zan simin ama ii inndoi sungah pai in suat tungah lum hi." 
2Samuel12:17 A kumpi inn uliante in thosak nuamin hanciam hikale tho nuam ngawl a, amate taw bangma nekhawm nuam ngawl hi." 
2Samuel12:18 Nipi khat zawkciang a ta hong thi a, tuaciang David ii uliante in tua thu ama tungah son ngam ngawl uh hi. Amate in, “A ta nuntak lai zongin ih paupui ciang David in hong zo nuam ngawl hi. Na ta thi zo hi ci in bangbangin son thei tu hi ziam? Ama le ama bang khat po kilaw tha tu hi!” ci uh hi." 
2Samuel12:19 David in amate kihuau a mu ciang a tano thi zo hi, ci in phawk thei hi. Tua ahikom ama in amate munah, “Tano thi zo ziam?” ci in dongh hi. “Hi hi, thi zo hi,” ci in amate in zo uh hi." 
2Samuel12:20 Suat tung pan David thoto a, kibualin, a sam pot a, a puan laih hi. Tua zawkciang ama Topa ii inn sungah pai in biakna vawt hi. Kumpi inn ah a heak kik ciangin an ngen a, a kilui po ciangin ne paih hi." 
2Samuel12:21 Ama uliante in ama munah, “Hi thu sia tel zo ngawl khu hi. Tano luhai lai in ama na kaa a, an na ne bua hi; ahihang a thi po ciang thoto in an na ne hi!” ci uh hi." 
2Samuel12:22 “Hi hi, a nuntak hunsung teng kapin an tang peu khi hi. Topa in kei hong hesuak tha tu a tano thisak ngawl tu hi ci in ka ngaisun hi." 
2Samuel12:23 Ahihang tu in thi zo ahiciang banghangin an tatang lai tu khi ziam? Tano nungtasak kik thei tu khi ziam? Ni khat ni ciang ama omna ah kei pai tu khi hi, ahihang ama kei kungah hong pai kik thei ngeingawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel12:24 Tua zawkciang David in a zi Bathsheba heeneam hi. Ama in luppui in, tapa khat nei kik a, David in Solomon ci in a min phuak hi. Topa in patangno sia it hi," 
2Samuel12:25 tuaciang Topa in kamsaangpa Nathan thupia a, patangno min Jedidiah phuaksak hi, banghang ziam cile Topa in ama it hi." 
2Samuel12:26 Tua lanin Joab in Ammon te khuapi Rabbah a simna zom suak a, la zo dektak hi." 
2Samuel12:27 Ama in kamtaite paisak a, David tungah, “Rabbah sim zo khi hi, tuaciang a tui laakna zongh suan zo khi hi." 
2Samuel12:28 Tu in na ngalkap om lai teng hong khawmtua ta'n a, a khuapi simin, nangma tatak ma in la in. Tua khuapi la hi ci in min nga nuam ngawl khi hi,” ci in kosak hi." 
2Samuel12:29 Tua ahikom David in a ngalkapte khawmtua a, Rabbah ah kuanin sim a, zothal hi." 
2Samuel12:30 Ammon te ii biak milim pathian Molech ii lu tung pan David in kilogramme 35 bang a ngit suangmanpha khat a kisuan khamh kumpilukhu sia la hi. David in tua suangmanpha la in ama lukhu tungah suang hi. Ama ii khuapi sung pan a laaksak vanh zongh tam mama a," 
2Samuel12:31 a khua mite sia thing at naam, thik tumanh, thik heite taw naseamsakin, zawthawk thu taw uksuang seaksak hi. Ammon khua dangte sung a om mite zongh tuabang ma in seamsak hi. Tua zawkciang ama le a mite Jerusalem ah heak kik uh hi." 
2Samuel13:1 David ii tapa Absalom in a mealpha pasal nei ngawl lai suapuinumei Tamar a kici khat nei hi. Amnon a kici David ii tapa dang khat in ama dei hi. 
2Samuel13:2 Ama in tua nu dei mama ahikom nat law liang hi, banghang ziam cile a teenpui tu suak thei tuak ngawl hi; ngaknu thiangtho a hina taw kizui in ama sia pate taw kimu ngawlin kikoi hi." 
2Samuel13:3 Ahihang ama in a pilvang mama, David ii suapuipa Shammah ii tapa Jonadab kici ngualtamh khat nei hi." 
2Samuel13:4 Jonadab in Amnon munah, “Nang sia kumpipa ii tapa hi napi, ni khat zawkciang ni khat hee mai taw om ni hi. Bang tat ni ziam?” ci hi. Ama in, “Ka suapui sealh Absalom ii suapuinu Tamar dei khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
2Samuel13:5 Jonadab in, “Na ci kinasak in lupna zuan in. Na pa in nang ve tu in hong pai ciang, ama munah hi bangin ci in, ‘Nong hesuakna in ka suapuinu Tamar hong paisak in an hong piasak ta'n. Hi sungah ka mu tangin an hong huansak hen a, ama mama in an hong piasak ta'n ci in,’ ” ci in sawl hi." 
2Samuel13:6 Tua ahikom Amnon sia kizawmsakin lupna tung zuan hi. Kumpipa David in ama ve tu in pai a, tuaciang Amnon in, “Nong hesuakna in Tamar hi sungah hong paisak ta'n a, ama ka mu thei natu munah anluum nip pawlkhat hong vawtsak tahen, tuaciang ama mama in hong pia tahen,” ci hi." 
2Samuel13:7 Tua ahikom Kumpipa David in kumpi inn sungah Tamar kam thaak a; “Amnon ii inn ah va pai ta'n a, an tawm vawtsak ta'n,” ci hi." 
2Samuel13:8 Ama pai in lupna tungah a lup mu hi. Tua nu in anvui thauh sa pawlkhat la in, ama ii mu thei natu munah moh pawlkhat vawt hi. Tua zawkciang muhte em a," 
2Samuel13:9 ama ii neak tu in beal sung pan sua hi, ahihang ama in ne nuam ngawl hi. Ama in, “A om theampo pusuaksak in,” ci a — tua ciang amate a vekpi ma in pusuak uh hi." 
2Samuel13:10 Tua zawkciang, ama munah “Muhte hi sung ka lupna ah hong paipui ta'n a nangma hong lui ta'n,” ci hi." 
2Samuel13:11 Ama in muhte la in paipui hi. Tuate a piak ciangin, Amnon in zamh a, “Hong pai ta'n, lumkhawm tawng!” ci hi." 
2Samuel13:12 “Tuabangin zawthawk thu taw ka minsiat natu hong ngamtasak heak in! Mu thadahuai mama hi! 
2Samuel13:13 Bangbangin mipi kawm ah khuadak ngam nawn tu khi ziam? Tuaciang, nangma Israel ngam sungah min siacip tu ni hi. Nong hesuakna in kumpipa paupui po lete ama in kei, nang atu hong pia leilam tu um khi hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel13:14 Ahihang ama in a nangai bua hi; tuaciang ama sia tha hatzaw ahikom buanin khialpui hi. 
2Samuel13:15 Tua zawkciang Amnon in tua nu nasia takin ngaimaw hi; a masa lai a itna sangin tu in a ngaimawkna nasia zaw kan hi. Ama in, “Tai in!” ci hi." 
2Samuel13:16 Ama in, “Tai ngawl tu khi hi. Tu bang a nong betkeak sia, na vawt sa khialna sangin zongh a lianzaw khialna ahi hi!” ci in zo hi. Ahihang Amnon in ama ii pau a ngai nuam bua hi;" 
2Samuel13:17 ama in a aituam naseamte samin, “Hi numei ka muna ah omsak heak vun! Doipua ah notkeak vun a, kong kalh vun!” ci in sawl hi." 
2Samuel13:18 Naseampa in ama doipua ah koi in kongkha kalh san uh hi. Tamar sia tua hun lai in kumpipa tanu, pasal nei ngawl lai te kizepna ahi puantual baan sau silh hi." 
2Samuel13:19 Ama in a lu tungah vut kipoai a, a puantual eaukeak in, a khut sungah a mai phumin kap kawmin paisan hi." 
2Samuel13:20 A suapuipa Absalom in ama a mu ciang, “Amnon in hong vawtsia ahi bua ziam? Suapui nu awng, tuaza in na thin lalsak heak in. Ama na suapui sealh hi, tua ahikom kuama munah son heak in!” ci hi. Tuabangin Tamar sia Absalom ii inn ah hee in lungzuangin om hi." 
2Samuel13:21 Kumpipa David in thupiang teng a zaak ciang a thinso hi. 
2Samuel13:22 Tuaciang Absalom in Amnon sia a suapuinu a buansak hu in huatsa mama a, pau zongh paupui nawn ngawl hi." 
2Samuel13:23 Kum nii zawkciang Ephraim khua hui, Baal Hazor ah Absalom in a tuumul meetsak a, ama in kumpipa tapate theampo tua munah sam hi." 
2Samuel13:24 Ama in Kumpipa David kungah pai in, “Kumpipa awng, ka tuute mul meetsak khi hi. Nang le na uliante hong pai in tua poai ah nong kihel tu uh ziam?” ci hi." 
2Samuel13:25 “Hong kihel thei ngawl tu khu hi, ka tapa awng, ka vekpi in hong pai thong le ung, nang atu ngim huai lei tu hi,” kumpipa in ci hi. Absalom in sam hamtang ahihang kumpipa uuk ngawlin, Absalom cia a sawl hi." 
2Samuel13:26 Ahihang Absalom in, “Tua ahile pha hi, ka suapuipa Amnon beak nong paisak buatu ziam?” ci hi. “Banghangin ama hong pai kul tu ziam?” ci in kumpipa in dongh hi." 
2Samuel13:27 Ahihang a khakbel ciang David in Amnon le a tapa dangte theampo Absalom taw a paisak dong ngen hamtang hi. Absalom in kumpipa taw a kiphu an neak poaipi khat vawt hi," 
2Samuel13:28 tuaciang a naseamte thupia a: “Amnon ii zu a kham mama hun hong he tavun a, thu kong piak ciangin ama that vun. Lau heak vun. Keima in vaipuak la khi hi. Hang vun a, haisaang heak vun,” ci hi." 
2Samuel13:29 Tuabangin naseamte in Absalom thupiak bangin Amnon that uh hi. David ii tapa dang teng sia a laate tung to in taikeak uh hi. 
2Samuel13:30 Amate inn lam a zawzot laitakin, David munah thu kiko a: “Absalom in na tapate theampo thatlum zo hi — khat zongh kikhe ngawl hi!”" 
2Samuel13:31 Kumpipa hong ding a, a puansilh lai sia heena taw eaukeak in, leiliik hi. Ama taw a omkhawm naseamte zongh a puante eaukeak uh hi." 
2Samuel13:32 Ahihang David ii suapuipa Shammah ii tapa Jonadab in, “Kumpipa awng, amate in na tapa theampo that siat ngawl hi. Amnon bek thi hi. Amnon in Absalom suapuinu Tamar a buan pan kipan hi bangin a ngamtat tu sia a khensat sa ahi hunlam Absalom na et ciang son thei ni hi." 
2Samuel13:33 Tua ahikom na tapate theampo thi hi ci thuthang sia um heak in; Amnon bekma kithat hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel13:34 Tua lanin Absalom tai zo hi. Tua zawk bekin ngal encik ngalkappa in Horonaim sang pan mualtung lampi hong tawnsuk mihonpi khat mu hi. Ama in kumpipa kungah pai in a mu teng ko hi. 
2Samuel13:35 Jonadab in David munah, “Tuate sia kong sonsa bangin na tapate hong cia hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel13:36 Hi teng a son zawk po ciang, David ii tapate hong tum a: amate kap a, David le a uliante zongh nasia takin kap uh hi." 
2Samuel13:37 Absalom sia tai in, Ammihud ii tapa Talmai, Geshur kumpipa kung zuan a, tuaciang tua munah kum thum sung om hi. David in a tapa Amnon atu khuangei pi ma khuangai hi;" 
2Samuel13:38  
2Samuel13:39 ahihang Amnon thina huvau a khuangaina a theau zawkciang a tapa Absalom bebek thangai in hong om hi. 
2Samuel14:1 Kumpipa David in Absalom ngai mama hi ci in Joab in he hi," 
2Samuel14:2 tua ahikom ama in nupi pilvang khat Tekoa ah a teang sia samsak hi. Ama hong thet ciang Joab in ama munah, “Kikhuangaisak in; na khuangai puante silh in a, na sam pot heak in. Khuangei mama khuangai in a omsa nupi khat bangin kithoai in." 
2Samuel14:3 Tuaciang nupi nu sia kumpipa kungah va pai ta'n a, ci a kong sawl teng va ci ta'n,” ci hi. Tua zawkciang Joab in a pau natu teng hil hi." 
2Samuel14:4 Numei nu kumpipa kungah pai in, zatak piakna in lei ah bok hi, tuaciang hi bangin ci hi, “Hong hu ta'n, Kumpipa awng!”" 
2Samuel14:5 “Bang dei ni ziam?” ci in ama in dongh hi. Tua nu in, “Kei sia a zawng meingong nu khi hi, topa awng. Ka pasal sia thi zo hi." 
2Samuel14:6 Topa awng, keima in tapa nii ka nei a, ni khat ni ciang kuama a khen tu a om ngawlna lo sungah kihau in, khat in a dang khat sia thatlum hi." 
2Samuel14:7 Tuaciang tu in, topa awng, ka mealheakte theampo in hong langpan hi, a suapuipa a thalup hu in ama zongh a thalup thei natu in ka tapa sia amate khut sungah aapin hong sawl hi. Hi bangin amate hong ngamta le tapa nei nawn ngawl tu khi hi. Amate in ka lam etna a khakbel sia hong suk siatsak tu a, ka pasal min kilaw natu zongh tapa om nawn ngawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel14:8 Kumpipa in, “Inn ah cia kik ta'n, keima in hi thu kong thintoisak tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
2Samuel14:9 “Kumpipa awng, bang po na vawt zong, hi thu tungtaang ah kei le ka bangkua in mawsiat thuak taw ung; nang le kumpi innkuan sia maw ngawl tu nu hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel14:10 Kumpipa in, “Khat po in hong tawng le keima kungah ama hong paipui ta'n, tua hile ngim hong pia kik ngeingawl tu hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
2Samuel14:11 Ama in, “Kumpipa awng, nong hesuakna in, Topa na Pathian tungah ka mealheakte ka tapa thi huvau phulam natu vaipuak nei sia in ka tapa a om lai sia a thalupna taw khialna lianzaw lai a vawt ngawl natu in thu hong ngetsak ta'n,” ci hi. “A nungta Topa min taw kamciam hong pia khi hi, na tapa sia tawmno zongh bangma tat ngawl tu hi,” David in ci hi." 
2Samuel14:12 “Kumpipa awng, nong hesuakna in, kam khat hong pausak lai ta'n,” nupi nu in ci hi. Ama in, “Son in,” ci in zo hi." 
2Samuel14:13 Nupi nu in ama munah, “Banghangin Pathian mite tungah tuabang khialna vawt ni ziam? Nangma zongh na tapa sia lei dangah a peamna pan cia kiksak ngawl ni hi, tua ahikom tu mahiat a na pau teng taw nangma le nangma mawpu kisua ni hi." 
2Samuel14:14 Ei ih vekpi in thi tu hi hing; ei sia lei ah tuibua taw kibangin, kiluak kik thei ngawl hi. Pathian ngawngawn in a thisate nungtasak kik ngawl hi, ahihang kumpipa in peamta in a om mihing khat sia a nobel in a cia kik natu lam zonsak thei ni hi." 
2Samuel14:15 Tu in, kumpipa awng, nang kungah hong pai a hi bangin thu kong sonna sia, tua mite in kei hong tawn hang hi, tua ahikom nangma tungah hong son leng kong nget sia hong vawtsak tu ci in keima le keima lametna nei kisa khi hi." 
2Samuel14:16 Pathian ii a mite a piak ngam le lei pan kei le ka tapa hong heam nuamin ko thalup hong sawm sia kung pan zong nangma in kong son teng hong ngai a, hong hun tu um khi hi." 
2Samuel14:17 Keima le keima tungah ka kicina pan, topa, na kamciamna in keima hong ngammuangsak tu hi, banghang ziam cile kumpipa sia Pathian ii vantung mi taw kibangin a pha le a sia khentel thei hi. Topa na Pathian nang taw omkhawm tahen!” ci hi." 
2Samuel14:18 Kumpipa in, “Thu khat hong dongh tu khi hi, tuaciang ahi babangin hong son nanak tu ni hi,” ci in zo hi. Tua nu in, “Kumpipa awng, nong dok nop po hong dongh ta'n,” ci in zo hi." 
2Samuel14:19 Ama in, “Tu a bang teng nong sep sia Joab ii hong sawl ahi ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Tua nu in “A thiangtho nate theampo taw kiciam khi hi, Kumpipa awng nong thudok sia ka pial thei natu mama a lam om ngawl hi. Na ulianpa Joab in ka sep tu le ka pau tu teng hong son takpi hi." 
2Samuel14:20 Ahihang ama in hi vai teng thiangsak nuam ahi hu in a vawt ahi hi. Kumpipa nang sia Pathian ii vantunglalang bangin ciim a thupiang theampo he ni hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel14:21 A zawkciang kumpipa in Joab munah, “Na dei bangin sep tu ka khensat zo hi. Va pai ta'n a tua khangno Absalom sia hi sungah hong ciapui ta'n,” ci hi." 
2Samuel14:22 Joab in David ii mai ah zatakna taw kileisee sukin, “Pathian in thupha hong pia tahen, Kumpipa awng! Tu in kei tungah nong lungkim hunlam sia kong nget teng nong piak ciangin ka he hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel14:23 Tua zawkciang ama thoto in Geshur ah pai a, Absalom sia Jerusalem ah ciapui hi." 
2Samuel14:24 Ahihang kumpipa in Absalom sia kumpi inn sungah a teen ngawl natu in thupia hi. Kumpipa in, “Ama mu nuam ngawl khi hi,” ci hi. Tua ahikom Absalom sia ama inn ah teangin kumpipa mai ah kilaak ngawl hi." 
2Samuel14:25 Israel ngam sungah mealphatna lam sang Absalom bangin a minthang kuama om ngawl hi; a lu pan a peang dong sit baanna nei ngawl hi. 
2Samuel14:26 A sam saa mama a, sau leih in a ngit leih ciang kum sim khatvei veu tan hi. A sam ngitna sia kumpi khaiteena taw tee ciang, kilogramme 2 vaal pha hi," 
2Samuel14:27 Absalom in tapa thum le Tamar kici tanu khat nei a, a mealpha mama numei khat ahi hi." 
2Samuel14:28 Absalom sia kumpipa taw kimu ngawlin kum nii sung Jerusalem ah teang hi. 
2Samuel14:29 Tua zawkciang ama vai in Joab sia kumpipa kung paisak nuam a, samsak hi; ahihang Joab hong pai ngawl hi. Khatvei ma Absalom in Joab samsak kik ahihang Joab pai nuam peang ngawl hi." 
2Samuel14:30 Tua ahikom Absalom in a naseamte munah, “En vun, Joab ii lo sia keima taw kingizawng hi, tuaciang a sungah mangtaang kiciing hi. Pai tavun a va hal tavun,” ci hi. Tua ahiciang amate pai in tua lo hal uh hi." 
2Samuel14:31 Absalom inn ah Joab pai in, “Banghangin na naseamte in ka lo hong halsak ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
2Samuel14:32 Absalom in, “Banghang ziam cile kong sam sasak hang nang hong pai ngawl ni hi. Kumpipa kungah pai in, kei taangin thu hong doksak lete oai khi hi: ‘Banghangin Geshur nusia in hi sungah hong pai kana khi ziam? Tua munah om po leng phazaw tu hi ve,’ ci hi. Absalom in zom to a, “Kumpipa taw ka kimu natu hong vaihawm ta'n, tuaciang kei maw ka hi le hong thatlum tahen,” ci hi." 
2Samuel14:33 Tua ahikom Joab sia Kumpipa David kungah pai a, Absalom ii ci teng son hi. Kumpipa in Absalom samsak a, ama pai in kumpipa mai lei ah hong kun suk hi. Kumpipa in ama muakin namh hi." 
2Samuel15:1 Hisia zawkciang Absalom in ama atu siphu ngalleang khat le siphu pawlkhat heang a, ama a cing mihing 50 koi hi." 
2Samuel15:2 Ama zing tuungin tho a, khuapi kongpi hui lampi ah ding hi. Mihing khat po sia ngual taw thu kinei a, kumpipa khensak nuam in hong pai a om simin, Absalom in sam a, koisung pan hong pai ni ziam ci in dongh bul hi. Tuaciang ama tungah a nam min sia a son zawkciang," 
2Samuel15:3 Absalom in, “En in, thukham in nang hong panpui hi, ahihang kumpipa luangin nang thu hong sitin thu hong khen tu kuama om ngawl hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel15:4 Tuaciang hi bang veu belap a, “Keima thukhenmang hi leng uuk meak ing! Tua hile ngual taw thu kinei, ahibuale ama ii neisa a nga kik nuam khat pawpo kei kungah hong pai thei tu a, thu khaikimin ka khensak tu hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel15:5 Tuabangin mihing khat Absalom mai ah kun in hong neak ciangin Absalom in a khut thaakin koai a, namh hi." 
2Samuel15:6 Kumpipa tung pan thu khaikim khenna thangai a hong pai Israel mi theampo Absalom in hi bang veu in vawt ahikom amate ii panpuina maan nga hi. 
2Samuel15:7 Kum li zawkciang Absalom in David kumpipa munah, “Topa awng, Hebron ah hong paisak ta'n, Topa tungah ka piak kamciam teng seam nuam khi hi." 
2Samuel15:8 Syria ngam Geshur ah ka teen lai in, Topa tungah kamciam ka piakna pan, ama in kei, Jerusalem ah hong la kik le Hebron ah ama bia tu khi hi, ka ci hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel15:9 “Thin nuam takin va pai ta'n,” kumpipa in ci hi. Tua ahikom Absalom sia Hebron ah pai hi." 
2Samuel15:10 Ahihang ama in Israel namte theampo kungah kamtai paisak in, “Lemle aw na zaak uh ciang, ‘Hebron ah Absalom sia kumpi suak zo hi!’ ci in a au natu in sonsak hi.”" 
2Samuel15:11 Absalom ii sapna taw Jerusalem ah ama taw a paikhawm mihing 200 pha hi; amate in a sawmna thu bangma he ngawlin, thinpha lungpha taw pai uh hi." 
2Samuel15:12 Tuaciang Absalom in Kumpipa David ii thudokte khat ahi Gilo khua ah Ahithophel zongh sangaw biakpiakna a vawt laitakin samsak hi. Kumpipa langpan tu a sawmna sia hong thahatin, Absalom ii nungzuite tam vaial hi." 
2Samuel15:13 Kamtai khat in David munah, “Israel te in Absalom tungah a thumaan natu in kamciam pia hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel15:14 Tua ahikom David in Jerusalem ah ama taw a om a uliante theampo munah, “Absalom khut panin ih suakta nuam le thakhat ma ih tai kul tu hi! Manlang vun! Tua ahibuale ama hai ngawlin hi mun hong theng tu a, hong zo in khuapi sungah a om theampo hong that tu hi!” ci hi." 
2Samuel15:15 Amate in, “Hi hi, Kumpipa awng, na ci babangin ngamta tu in kinging khu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
2Samuel15:16 Tua ahikom kumpipa sia kumpi inn en tu a nusiat a zino sawm teng simngawl, a innkuanpui dang teng le a uliante taw tai uh hi." 
2Samuel15:17 Kumpipa le a mite theampo khuapi a nusiat tu ciangin. inn mong khakbel sia ah tawlnga uh hi. 
2Samuel15:18 Kumpi a cing teng sia ama mai kaantan in a pai suak laitak a uliante theampo zongh ama hui ah ding tek hi. Gath pan a zui ngalkap 600 te zongh hong kaantan uh a," 
2Samuel15:19 tuaciang kumpipa in amate lampuipa Ittai munah, “Banghangin ko taw hong paikhawm tu ni ziam? Heak kik in a, kumpi thak sia taw om ta'n. Nang sia ngamdangmi ni hi, na ngam panin ngaltai khat hi ni hi." 
2Samuel15:20 Hi sungah tawmvei sung bekma hong teang na hi ciang, banghangin nang, kei taw hong vakthap kawkoaisak tu khi ziam? Koisung zuan tu khi ziam ci in keima zongh in he ngawl khi hi. Heak kik in a, na ngammipuite zongh tonpui ta'n — Topa in no tungah hong dik tahen a hong thumaan tahen,” ci hi." 
2Samuel15:21 Ahihang Ittai in, “Kumpipa awng, Topa min taw kiciam khi hi, thi tu keak a kul zong na paina po ah pai tawntung tu khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
2Samuel15:22 David in, “Pha hi! Pai suak in!” ci in zo hi. Tua ahikom Ittai sia a mi teng le ama a bealhte theampo taw pai suak uh hi." 
2Samuel15:23 David nungzuite in a nusiat tak ciang mipite a ngingin hong kap uh hi. Kumpipa in Kidron lui kaantan a, a mite in zui in amate duisung manaw in paikhawm hon uh hi." 
2Samuel15:24 Thiampi Zadok, tuaciang ama taw Thuciamna Thingkuang thiangtho a pua Levi mite zongh tualai ah kihel in om uh hi. Amate in Thuciamna Thingkuang lei ah koisukin, mi theampo ii khuapi a nusiat dong kisuanh kik ngawl uh hi. Thiampi Abiathar zongh tua munah om hi." 
2Samuel15:25 Tuasia ciang kumpipa in Zadok munah, “Thuciamna Thingkuang khuapi sungah heak pui kik ta'n. Topa in kei tungah hong lungkim ahile ni khat ni ciangin kei hong heak kiksak tu a, tuasia le a omna mun hong musak tu hi." 
2Samuel15:26 Ahihang Topa in kei tungah hong lungkim buale — tuasia ciang ama uuk bang po hong vawt tahen,” ci hi." 
2Samuel15:27 Tuaciang ama in Zadok munah a ci lai na pan, “En in, na tapa Ahimaaz le Abiathar ii tapa Jonathan tonpui in khuapi sung ma ah thinnuam takin zuan kik tavun." 
2Samuel15:28 Tua lanin nang tung pan thuthak ka zaak dong ngun kanna pan kong ngak tu hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel15:29 Tua ahikom Zadok le Abiathar in Jerusalem ah Thuciamna Thingkuang puak kik in tua khua ah om uh hi. 
2Samuel15:30 David in Olive Mual ah a kapsa in kaato a; khuangaina lim lak in a peangnguakin om a, a lu siin hi. Ama a zuite theampo in zongh a lu uh puan taw siinin kap uh hi." 
2Samuel15:31 Ahithophel in Absalom ii leedona ah pawm hi ci in David tungah a kison ciangin, “ Topa awng, nong hesuakna in Ahithophel ii ngaisut piakna sia a lui thawthong suaksak in!” ci in thu ngen hi." 
2Samuel15:32 Biakna mun khat sia ii a omna mual tungah David hong thet ciangin, Arch mi ahi a lawm muan Hushai taw kimu a, ama sia a puan ki eaukeak in a lu tungah leivui kibuak hi." 
2Samuel15:33 David in ama munah, “Kei taw nong tonkhop hang kei nong hu theina bangma om ngawl hi," 
2Samuel15:34 ahihang khuapi ah heak kik in Absalom munah na pa atu na ka sep bangma, tu in nangma atu thumaan takin hong sepsak tu khi hi, va ci lete kei hong hu thei zaw tu ni hi. Tuaciang Ahithophel ii ngaisut piakna peuma na hi thei za in nalh in." 
2Samuel15:35 Thiampi Zadok le thiampi Abiathar te tua munah om tu hi; kumpi inn sungah na zaak theampo amate tungah son in. 
2Samuel15:36 Amate ii a tapate Ahimaaz le Jonathan amate kungah om hi, tuaciang thu na kaikhop theampo amate in kei hong puaksak thei tu ni hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel15:37 Tua ahikom David lawmpa Hushai sia Absalom hong thet bek laitakin khuapi sungah heak kik hi. 
2Samuel16:1 David in mualdawn a kan zawkciang thakhat thu in Mephibosheth ii naseampa Ziba taw kisi hi, ama in laa nii hong keng a, a laate in anluum luum 200, sapitko bom zakhat, thingnga hing bom zakhat le savun ip khat dim sapittui hong pua hi." 
2Samuel16:2 Kumpipa David in, “Tuate theampo bang tu ci ni ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Ziba in, “Laate sia kumpipa innkuanpuite to natu hi a, anluum le thingngate sia mihingte neak tu, tuaciang sapittui sia dui sungah amate a toi ciang a dawn tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
2Samuel16:3 Kumpipa in, “Na topa Saul ii tupa Mephibosheth koisung a om ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Ziba in, “Ama Jerusalem ah om hi, banghang ziam cile tu in a pu Saul ii neisa theampo, Israel te in ama tungah pia tu in um tatak hi,” ci in zo hi." 
2Samuel16:4 Kumpipa in Ziba munah, “Mephibosheth ii neisa theampo nangma tang tu ni hi,” ci hi. Ziba in “Kei na naseampa khi hi. Kumpipa nang hong lungkimsak tawntung tu pa hong suaksak ta'n,” ci in zo kik hi." 
2Samuel16:5 Kumpipa David sia Bahurim a thet ciangin Saul mealheak khat, Gera ii tapa Shimei sia ama taw kisi tu in hong pai in ama haamsiat hi." 
2Samuel16:6 David sia ama uliante le a cingte in kiim uum napi Shimei in suang taw deang hi. 
2Samuel16:7 Shimei in haamsiat a, “Tai in! Tai in! Mi that pa! Mimaw mikhial pa!" 
2Samuel16:8 Nang in Saul ii kumpi ngam na suan a, tu in Topa in Saul ii innkuanpuite na suamlup hu in daan hong pia hi. Topa in kumpi ngam sia na tapa Absalom hong piaksak hi, tu in lalcip zo ni hi, nang mi that pa!” ci hi." 
2Samuel16:9 A nu Zeruiah ahi Abishai in, “Kumpipa awng, banghangin ui hisia in nang haamsiatsak ni ziam? Ama ii kungah hong paisak ta'n a, a lu hong tansak ta'n!” ci hi." 
2Samuel16:10 Kumpipa in Abishai le a suapuipa Joab munah, “Hisia no taw bangma kisai bo. Topa ii sawl hu in hong haamsiat ahile akua in khaam thei tu ziam?” ci hi." 
2Samuel16:11 Tuaciang David in Abishai le a uliante theampo munah, “Keima tapa in kei hong thatlum nuam a hanciam hi; tua ahiciang Benjamin mi khat ii ngamtatna banghangin lamdang sa nu ziam? Topa in a haamsiat natu in sawl hi; tua ahiciang ama nguak koi po vun a, tuabang hisak vun." 
2Samuel16:12 Topa in ka lungmanna hong heaksak tha tu a, ama ii hong haamsiatna sia taangin kei atu thupha pawlkhat hong pia nuam hi tu hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel16:13 Tua ahikom David le a mite a lampai zom suak hi. Mualpangh a paina ah Shimei in amate pha valep a; a pai kawkawm in amate haamsiat a, suang le lei taw deang hi." 
2Samuel16:14 Kumpipa le a mite theampo Jordan ngun a thet ciangin, amate a tha uh zawm mama zo ahikom tua munah tawlnga uh hi." 
2Samuel16:15 Absalom le ama taw kikop Israel te theampo Jerusalem khua ah tum a, Ahithophel zongh amate taw om hi." 
2Samuel16:16 David ii muan a lawmpa Hushai in Absalom taw a kisik ciang, “Kumpipa a khansau tahen! Kumpipa a khansau tahen!” ci in au hi." 
2Samuel16:17 Absalom in, “Na lawmpa David tungah na thumaanna teng bang suak ziam? Banghangin ama taw ton ngawl ni ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
2Samuel16:18 Hushai in, “Banghangin ton thei tu khi ziam? Topa ii tealpa, mipite ii teal pa, le Israel mi bup ii teal pa sangah pang khi hi. Kei nang taw om tu khi hi." 
2Samuel16:19 A khakbel in ci leang, ka topa ii tapa atu ka seam buale akua dang atu seam tu khi ziam? Na pa atu ka sepsak bangma in tu in nang atu hong sepsak tu khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
2Samuel16:20 Tua zawkciang Absalom in Ahithophel sang nga in, “Tu in hi sungah ei teng om ci leang ih ngamtat natu ngaisutna bang hong pia tu ni ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
2Samuel16:21 Ahithophel in, “Va pai ta'n a, na pa ii kumpi inn a cing tu in a nusiat a zinote luppui in. Tua hile Israel a om theampo in nang sia na pa in a ngalin hong nei hi, ci in he tu uh hi, tuaciang na nungzuite nasia takin kihansua tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
2Samuel16:22 Tua ahikom amate in kumpi inn khuvum tungah Absalom atu puanbuk khat khaksak a, Absalom tumin ngual theampo mu tangin, a pa ii zinote luppui hi." 
2Samuel16:23 Tua hunin Ahithophel ii ngaisut piak pawpo sia Pathian kammal bang keak ma in kisaang a; David le Absalom in zui khawm uh hi. 
2Samuel17:1 Tua zawk a ngeingawlin, Ahithophel in Absalom munah, “Pasal tulsawm le tulnii hong tealsak ta'n a, tu nitakin David ka na del tu hi." 
2Samuel17:2 Ama a toi laitak le a thinkiam laitakin ka na sim tu hi. Ama lau tu a, a mite theampo taikeak tu hi. Keima in kumpipa bekma ka that tu a," 
2Samuel17:3 tuaciang mo khat a pasal kung a zot kik bangin nangma kungah a mite kong paipui tu hi. Na thalup nop sia mihing khat bekma hi a; a dang teng bangma tat ngawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel17:4 Hi ngaisutna sia Absalom le Israel lampuite atu in ngaisutna pha hi tuak sa uh hi. 
2Samuel17:5 Absalom in “Tu in Hushai sam vun, ama in bang ci nop a nei ziam ngai sin tawng,” ci hi." 
2Samuel17:6 Hushai a thet ciang, Absalom in ama munah son a, “Ahithophel ii ngaisut hong piak hi bang teng hi; tuasia ih zui tu ziam? Ih zui buatu le, ih ngamtat natu nangma hong son ta'n,” ci hi." 
2Samuel17:7 Hushai in, “Tu tungin Ahithophel ii ngaisutna hong piak sia pha ngawl hi." 
2Samuel17:8 Na pa David le a mite sia ngalsim a hatte hi a, a note a kilaaksak vompui a kiitakhuai za in kiitakhuai hi. Na pa sia ngalsim zia a he sa khat hi a, zanin a mite taw mun khat ah omkhawm ngawl tu hi." 
2Samuel17:9 Tu laitak lian bangin ama sia suanghawng sung khat ziam a dang mun khat ziam ah om tu hi. David ii na mite a sim po ciang tua thu a za pawpo in na mite ngallel sa hi ci tu uh hi. 
2Samuel17:10 Tawpite bangin kiitak a nei ngawl a hangsan belte ngawngawn lau tu hi, banghang ziam cile Israel ngam a om a kuama po in na pa sia ngalkap lian khat hi a, a mite zongh ngalsim a hatte vive hi ci in he uh hi." 
2Samuel17:11 Kei ii ngaisut kong piak nopna pan, tuipivaal a senneal za bangin a tam Israel te, ngam mong khat pan mong khat dong khawmtua in a, tuaciangin ngalsimna ah nangma mama in lampui in." 
2Samuel17:12 David sia a omna po ah ih mu tu a, tuaciang ama in bang piang ziam ci a heak ma in ih sim tu hi. Ama ahizong a mite ahizong a suakta om ngawl tu hi." 
2Samuel17:13 Ama in khuapi sung tuu in a nungkin le zong, ih mite in khauzeente keng tek tu a, a khuapi mama a nuaisang kuam sungah ih kaisuk tu hi. Tua mual tungah suangtum khat dongin kikhe ngawl tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
2Samuel17:14 Absalom le Israel te theampo in, “Hushai ii ngaisut piakna sia Ahithophel aa sangin phazaw hi,” ci uh hi. Absalom ii tuasiatna hong tun natu in Ahithophel ii ngaisut pha a piak sia a kizui ngawl natu in Topa in khensat zo hi." 
2Samuel17:15 Tua zawkciang Hushai in thiampite Zadok le Abiathar te munah, Absalom le Israel lampuite tungah ama in bang ngaisutna teng pia a, Ahithophel in bang ngaisutna teng pia ziam ci in son hi." 
2Samuel17:16 Hushai in belap a, “Tu in manlang vun! Ama le a mite kiman in a kithalup ngawl natu in, ngun kaantanna dui sungah zanin om heak hen a, Jordan ngun thakhat a kaantan paih natu David tungah thu puak vun,” cisak hi." 
2Samuel17:17 Abiathar ii tapa Jonathan le Zadok ii tapa Ahimaaz te in Jerusalem khua puasia a om Enrogel cik panin ngak uh hi, banghang ziam cile amate in khuapi sung a tum sia kimusak ngam ngawl hi. Naseam numei khat hun maanmaan in pai a, bang thu veu om ziam ci in amate tungah son hi, amate in Kumpipa David kungah pai in tua thute sonsawn uh hi."
