2Samuel17:18 Ahihang ni khat ni ciangin patang khat in amate mu luilam hi, tuaciang ama in Absalom munah son hi; tua ahikom amate in manlang takin tai a Bahurim khua sung pasal khat ii inn ah buu uh hi. Ama in a inn hui ah tuikhuk khat nei a, tua ii sungah tuaksuk uh hi." 
2Samuel17:19 Pasal pa ii zi in a sit natu khat la in tuikhuk vang tungah zalh a, antang pawlkhat a tungah poai hi, tua ahiciang kuama in bangma a lamdang a mu bua uh hi." 
2Samuel17:20 Absalom ii uliante hong pai a, tuaciang numeinu munah, “Ahimaaz le Jonathan koi sungah om ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Tua nu in, “Amate ngun kaanin pai zo hi,” ci hi. Pasalte in tuate ngeal zong ahihang mu zo ngawl ahiciang, Jerusalem ah heak kik uh hi." 
2Samuel17:21 Amate ii pai zawkciang Ahimaaz le Jonathan te tuikhuk sung pan pusuakin, David kumpipa kungah pai a tua thu ko hi. Ahithophel ii ama langpanin a ngealna teng ko a, tuaciang, “Manlang vun a, ngun kaantan vun,” ci uh hi." 
2Samuel17:22 Tua ahiciang David le a mite Jordan ngun kaantan a, khuavak bek in amate theampo a ngalkhat theng siat zo uh hi." 
2Samuel17:23 Ahithophel in ama ii ngaisut piakna kizui ngawl hi ci in a mu ciang, a laa tung to in ama ii khuapi ah cia kik hi. Ama vai tuatuamte ahi tu bangin a vawt siat zawkciang ama le ama awklum hi. Ama sia a innkuan ii thaan ah kiphum hi." 
2Samuel17:24 Absalom le Israel te ii Jordan ngun a kaantan hunin, David sia Mahanaim khua theng zo hi." 
2Samuel17:25 (Absalom in Joab taangin Amasa sia ngalkaphonpi ukpa in koi hi. Amasa sia Ishmael mi Jether ii tapa hi a; ama ii nu sia Nahash ii tanu, Joab ii nu Zaruiah ii suapuinu Abigail ahi hi.)" 
2Samuel17:26 Absalom le a mite in Gilead ngam ah ngiaphual saat uh hi. 
2Samuel17:27 David sia Mahanaim hong thet ciang Ammon ngam Rabbah khuapi pan Nahash ii tapa Shobi, Lodebar pan Ammiel ii tapa Machir le Gilead ngam Rogelim pan Barzillai te in muak uh hi." 
2Samuel17:28 Amate in meekuangte, tungbealte, zanpuan, tuaciang an zongh David le a mite atu in hong puak hi; zungtaang, mangtaang, anvui, antang kan, benaang, be, khuaitui, noaikhal, noaidiat le tuu pawlkhat hong puak uh hi. Amate in David le a mite dui sungah a toi tu, ngilkial dangtaak in a om tu hunlam he uh hi." 
2Samuel17:29  
2Samuel18:1 Kumpipa David in a mite theampo khawmtua in, tulkhat pawl, zakhat pawl ci in khen a, a uk tu uliante koi hi." 
2Samuel18:2 Tuaciang ama in tuate pawl thum in kuansak a, Joab le a suapuipa Abishai, Gath pan Ittai te thum in tua pawlte khat tek uksak hi. Tuaciang kumpipa in, “Keima zongh no taw kuankhawm tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel18:3 Amate in, “Ko taw hong kuankhawm ngawl tu ni hi. Ei a taanglai teng kiheak in ih tai ahizong, ei a lang ma hong kithat ahizong ih ngalte atu bangma kilamdanna om ngawl tu hi; ahihang nang na hile ko tulsawm taw na man neina kikim hi. Hi lai khuapi sungah om in huna hong puak lete phazaw tu hi,” ci uh hi." 
2Samuel18:4 Kumpipa in, “Pha na sakbel uh bangin ngamta tu khi hi,” ci in zo hi. Tuasia zawkciang a ngalkapte tulkhat pawl, zakhat pawl, a pawl a pawl in a kuan ciangin, David sia kongpi hui ah ding hi." 
2Samuel18:5 Ama in Joab, Abishai le Ittai te munah thupia a, “Keima nong ngaisutna in, tangvalpa Absalom bangma na law heak vun,” ci hi. Ngalkap mite theampo in David ii a uliante tungah hi a thupiakna sia za kim uh hi." 
2Samuel18:6 David ii ngalkaphonpi sia ngamsung theampo ah hong kuanin, Ephraim duisung ah Israel te sim uh hi." 
2Samuel18:7 Israel te in David ii mite lel uh hi; tua ni in nasia lel mama uh a, tulkul kithatlum uh hi." 
2Samuel18:8 Ngamsung bup ah kidona hong kilaw a, duisung ah a thi sia ngalphual ah a kithat sangin tamzaw hi." 
2Samuel18:9 Thakhat thu in Absalom in David ii mite taw kisi uh hi. Absalom sia laa tungah to in, a laa sia oak thingkung lian nuai khat ah a pai laitak thingbaak kawm ah, Absalom ii lutang awk hi." 
2Samuel18:10 David ii mite khat in ama mu a, Joab tungah, “Topa awng, Absalom sia oak thingkung tungah a kaai ka mu hi,” ci in ko hi." 
2Samuel18:11 Joab in, “Mu na hi le banghangin a munah thatlum paih ngawl ni ziam? Keima mama in ngunn tang sawm le kawngkhau khat hong pia zawsap tu khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
2Samuel18:12 Ahihang tua pa in, “Ngunn tang tulkhat keak nong pia hial zong kumpi pa tapa tungah ka khutme khat zongh laamto ngawl tu khi hi. Kumpipa in nang le Abishai, Ittai tungah, ‘Keima nong ngaisutna in khangno pa Absalom sia bangma na law heak vun’ ci in thu hong piak sia za tek khu hi." 
2Samuel18:13 Ahihang kumpipa thupiak mang ngawlin Absalom that hi leng, kumpipa in za nanak tu hi — ama in thu theampo za hi — tuaciang nangma in kei hong hung ngawl tu ni hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel18:14 Joab in “Nang taw hun sauzaw bosak thawthong nawn bua tong,” ci hi. Joab in tei thum la in, oak thing tung a kikhai a nungta lai Absalom ii awm hol hi." 
2Samuel18:15 Tuaciang Joab ngalkap sawm in Absalom hong neak in, thatlum vet uh hi." 
2Samuel18:16 Ngal kido tawlngak natu in Joab in lemle tum natu thupia a, a ngalkapte Israel te a delna uh pan heak kik uh hi." 
2Samuel18:17 Amate in Absalom ii luang la in duisung dum thuk khat sungah a lotsuk zawk uh ciang suangtum honpui khat taw siin uh hi. Israel te theampo taimang in a inn tek zuan uh hi. 
2Samuel18:18 Absalom in a nuntak lai in, a min kilaw natu tapa nei ngawl ahikom, Kumpipa Kuam a kicina munah ama atu in khansuang vawt in phut hi. Tua bangin ama min ma kivaw a, tuni dong ciang Absalom ii Khan kici lai hi." 
2Samuel18:19 Tuasia ciang Zadok ii tapa Ahimaaz in Joab munah, “ Topa in a ngalte khut sung pan ama a hutna thupha kumpipa tungah son tu in hong taisak ta'n,” ci hi." 
2Samuel18:20 Joab in, “Hi ngawl hi, tuni in thupha bangma puak ngawl tu ni hi. Nidang khat pawpo ciang na uuk le hi thei hi, ahihang tuni in puak ngawl tu ni hi, banghang ziam ci le kumpipa ii tapa thi hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel18:21 Tua zawkciang Ethiopia a sila pa tungah, “Pai in, na mu teng kumpipa tungah son ta'n,” ci hi. Sila pa sia kun a tai paih hi." 
2Samuel18:22 Ahimaaz in, “Bang thu po piang kale awlmaw bong; nong hesuakna in tua thu zong keima hong puaksak po ta'n,” ci veve hi. Joab in, “Ka tapa awng, bang tu ci kenkon ni ziam? Tua atu in letsong bangma nga beak ngawl tu ni hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel18:23 “Bangpo a piang zong pai nuam khi hi,” Ahimaaz in ci kik hi. Joab in, “Tua ahile va pai ta'n,” ci hi. Ahimaaz zongh lam ah hong taisuk in, Jordan Kuam kaantan a, hai ngawlin silapa suangkhial hi." 
2Samuel18:24 David sia khuapi kongpi puanung le sungnung kilaklaw mun awngna ah to hi. Ngal vilpa sia khuapi uumna luphung vuum tungah kaato a, kongpi ii tung innkhum tungah ding hi; ama in khua a et le pasal khat ama nguakin hong tai mu hi." 
2Samuel18:25 Ama in oksan suk a kumpipa munah son hi, tuaciang kumpipa in, “Ama nguak ahile thupha hong puak hi tu hi,” ci hi. A tai pa sia hong nai vaial hi." 
2Samuel18:26 Tuaciang ngalvil pa in pasal dang khat ma ama nguakin hong tai mu leleau a, kongkhapi cing pa oksan suk hi. “En in! Zia sungah pasal dang khat ma hong tai hi!” ci hi. Kumpipa in, “Hisia zongh in thupha hong puak hi” ci in zo hi." 
2Samuel18:27 Ngalvil pa in, “A masa a hong tai sia Ahimaaz ii tai bangin tai hi,” ci hi. Kumpipa in, “Ama mihing pha khat hi a, thupha hong puak hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel18:28 Ahimaaz in kumpipa nuksetna kam pau in ama mai lei ah kisepsuk hi, tuaciang, “Kumpipa awng Topa na Pathian pok in, ama in na lang pan hong leedo mite hong zosak hi!” ci hi." 
2Samuel18:29 “Tangvalpa Absalom a suakta ziam?” ci in kumpipa in dongh hi. Ahimaaz in, “Topa awng, na ulianpa Joab in kei hong paisak lai in a buai lialua khat ka mu a, bang ziam ci in ka son thei bua hi,” ci in zo hi." 
2Samuel18:30 “Zia lai ah ding in,” kumpipa in ci a; tuaciang ama tua munah ding hi." 
2Samuel18:31 Tua zawkciang Ethiopia silapa hong theng a, kumpipa munah, “Kumpipa awng, nang atu thupha khat hong puak khi hi! Tuni in Topa in nang hong leedo te theampo hong zosak hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel18:32 “Tangvalpa Absalom a suak ta na ziam?” ci in kumpipa in dongh hi. Sila pa in, “Ama thuak sia na ngalte theampo le, tuaciang nang hong leedo theampo in thuak le ka oai hi,” ci in zo hi." 
2Samuel18:33 Kumpipa khuangai mama hi. Kongpi suazoai tung inndoi sungah kaato in kap hi. A pai kawkawmin, “Aw, ka tapa! Ka tapa Absalom! Absalom ka ta awng! Nang ka tapa ii thi luangin kei thi zaw leng maw! Absalom ka tapa!” ci in au hi." 
2Samuel19:1 Kumpipa David sia Absalom hu in khuangai a, kakap hi ci in Joab tungah kison hi." 
2Samuel19:2 Tuabangin ngalzawna lungdamna sia tua ni in David ii a ngalkapte atu in heena hong suak hi, banghang ziam cile a tapa thi hu in kumpipa a tauna teng amate in za hi." 
2Samuel19:3 Ngal kisimna phual panin a tai a maizum ngalkapte bangin, amate sia khuapi sungah thim takin hong tum kik uh hi." 
2Samuel19:4 Kumpipa in a mai hum in nging takin, “Aw ka tapa! Ka tapa Absalom! Absalom ka tapa!” ci in kap hi." 
2Samuel19:5 Kumpipa ii inn ah Joab pai in ama munah, “Tuni in na mite — nang le na tapate na tanute, na zite le na zinote nuntakna hong huu mite maimawlsak ni hi." 
2Samuel19:6 Nang hong it teng na langpan a, nang hong ensan teng na panpui hi. Na uliante le na mite sia bangma in hong heang ngawl na hi sia kitelthiangsak zo ni hi. Tuni in Absalom nungta hen a, ko teng theampo thi zaw le ung na lungdam zaw phial tu in hong mu khi hi." 
2Samuel19:7 Tu in va pai ta'n a, na mite lungmuangsak kik ta'n. Topa min lo in ka kiciamna pan, tuabangin nong vawt buale zingsang ciangin amate sung pan khat zongh in nang hong koppui nawn ngawl tu hi. Tuasia in na khan tawntung tuasiatna nasia belh na thuak hi tu hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel19:8 Tuasia ciang kumpipa kikhuangkho a, hong pai in khuapi kongpi hui ah to hi. A mite in ama sia tualai ah a om hunlam a zaak uh ciangin ama kiim ah hong kikaikhawm uh hi. Tua hun sungin Israel te theampo tai in amate inn tek zuan uh hi." 
2Samuel19:9 Ngam buppi sungah amate le amate hong kihau uh hi. “Kumpipa David in ih ngalte khut sung panin hong suatak hi,” khat le khat kici uh hi. “Ama in Philistine te khut sung panin hong suatak a, ahihang ama sia tu in Absalom kung pan tai in ngam nusia zo hi." 
2Samuel19:10 Absalom sia ih kumpipa tu in sathau ih noai hi, ahihang ama ngalphual ah kithat hi. Tua ahiciang banghangin khat po in Kumpipa David ciapui kik tu hanciam ngawl ziam?” ci uh hi." 
2Samuel19:11 Israel te ii pauna teng David kungah kison hi. Tua ahikom thiampi Zadok le Abiathar te Judah lampuite a dongh tu in samsak hi. Ama in, “A kumpi inn sungah kumpipa a cia kik natu a hute sung pan banghangin note a hu khakbel hi tu nu ziam?" 
2Samuel19:12 No sia ka mealheakte nu hi, ka chi le ka sa nu hi; banghangin ka cia kik natu hong hu khakbel te hi nu ziam?” ci in donghsak hi." 
2Samuel19:13 David in Amasa tungah hi bangin cisak si hi, “Nang ka mealheak ni hi. Tu pan kipan Joab taangin ka ngalkaphonpi ukpa in hong koi khi hi. Tuabangin ka vawt buale Pathian in hong vaatlum tahen!” ci hi." 
2Samuel19:14 David kammalte in Judah mite theampo ii thumaan takin a panpuina a cingin piangsak a, amate in ama le a uliante hong heak kik natu kam thaak hi." 
2Samuel19:15 Kumpipa hong cia kik lamin Judah mite in Jordan ngun ah muak in, a ngun kan na ah a cing tu in Gilgal ah amate hong pai ahi uh hi." 
2Samuel19:16 Tua hun ma in, Bahurim pan Gera ii tapa, Benjaminte Shimei zongh Jordan ah Kumpipa David taw kisi tu in manlang in hong pai hi." 
2Samuel19:17 Ama in Benjamin namte tulkhat tonpui hi. Tuaciang Saul ii innkuan naseampa Ziba zongh a tapa sawm le nga le a naseam kul taw hong pai in, kumpipa thet ma in Jordan theng hi." 
2Samuel19:18 Kumpipa le a pawlte ngun a kan laitak a cing tu le kumpipa ii dei babangin a seam tu in amate ngun hong kan uh hi. Kumpipa ii ngun kaantan tu a kithoai laitak Shimei hong pai in ama mai ah hong kilei see suk a," 
2Samuel19:19 “Kumpipa awng, nong hesuakna in Jerusalem na nusiat ni in nang tungah ka ngamtat khialna teng hong makngilsak ta'n. Tuasia taw kei hong langpan heak in a, thinngil laingil ah na paai heak in." 
2Samuel19:20 Topa awng mawna vawt zo ka hi hunlam kihe khi hi, tuaciang tua hu ma in saksang namte sung pan tuni in kumpipa taw kisi tu in hong pai phitbel pa khi hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel19:21 Zeruiah ii tapa Abishai hong pau a: “Shimei sia thalup tu hi, banghang ziam cile Topa ii kumpi tu in a teal pa haamsiat hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel19:22 Ahizong David in Abishai le a suapuipa Joab munah, “A kua in no ngaisutna hong ngen ziam? Ngim hong pia tu nu ziam? Tu in kei Israel ii kumpipa hi zo khi hi, tuaciang tu ni in Israel te kuama kithatlum ngawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel19:23 Tuaciang Shimei munah, “Nang hong kithatlum ngawl tu hi ci in kamciam hong pia khi hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel19:24 Tua zawkciang Saul ii tupa Mephibosheth sia David taw kisi tu in hong pai hi. Ama in kumpipa ii Jerusalem a nusiat hun pan ngalzo a hong cia kik dong, a peang le sil ngawl, a khamul le meet ngawl, a puan le sawp ngawlin omcip hi." 
2Samuel19:25 Kumpipa taw kimu tu in Jerusalem ah Mephibosheth hong thet ciangin, kumpipa in, “Mephibosheth awng, nang kei taw hong paikhawm ngawl ni hi. Banghang ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
2Samuel19:26 Ama in, “Kumpipa awng, na heaksa bangma, kei sia ka peang zaw hi. Ka naseampa munah ka laa a kungh hong thuasak ta'n, kumpipa taw tonkhawm nuam khi hi, ka ci hang ama in kei hong leeheak hi." 
2Samuel19:27 Ama in kei huvau Kumpipa nangma tungah leilot hi, ahihang nang sia Pathian ii vantunglalang taw na kibang hi, tua ahikom maan na sak bangin ngamta in." 
2Samuel19:28 Ka pa ii innkuanpuite theampo kumpipa ii na thisak sia ahi tu ma hi, ahihang nangma in na sabuai ah an ka neak thei natu thu hong pia ni hi. Kumpipa tung pan hamphatna dang kong nget thuathua lai natu thu om ngawl hi,” ci in zo hi." 
2Samuel19:29 Kumpipa in, “Bangma son thua kul nawn bo. Nang le Ziba in Saul ii ngamh teng na hawm natu khensat zo khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
2Samuel19:30 “Ziba in tang siat tahen. Kumpipa nangma ciidam in inn nong cia kik sia kei atu pha zo hi,” ci in Mephibosheth in zo hi." 
2Samuel19:31 Gilead pan Barzillai zongh kumpipa ii Jordan a kan ciang a cing tu in Rogelim pan hong paisuk hi. 
2Samuel19:32 Barzillai sia kum sawmliat a pha pasal huai mama khat ahi hi. Ama hau mama a, Mahanaim ah a taam sung kumpipa anvaak hi." 
2Samuel19:33 Kumpipa in ama tungah, “Kei taw Jerusalem ah ih paikhawm tu a, nang kong en tu hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel19:34 Ahihang Barzillai in, “Kei sia ngei nungta nawn ngawl tu khi hi, banghangin kumpipa taw Jerusalem ah pai tu khi ziam?" 
2Samuel19:35 Kei kum sawmliat pha zo a, bangma in nopsak hong pia nawn ngawl hi. Ka neak ka dawnte ii limna le he nawn ngawl, lasa te ii aw le za thei nawn ngawl khi hi. Kumpipa nang atu vanh ngitpi khat suak bek tu khi hi." 
2Samuel19:36 Tuabang tel lian a saang tu in kiphu nawn ngawl khi hi. Tua ahikom Jordan ngal khat tawm khawng dong hong pai lai bek tu khi hi. 
2Samuel19:37 Tua zawkciang hong ciasak ta'n a, ka nute ka pate ii thaan hui ka inn ah thi ka tong. Hi munah ka tapa Chimham om hi, ama in nangma na hong sepsak tu hi; ama nangma paipui in, kumpipa awng, nangma ii pha na sakbel bangin ama atu vawtsak ta'n,” ci hi." 
2Samuel19:38 Kumpipa in, “Ama paipui tu khi hi, tuaciang vawt a na oai babangin ama tungah ka vawt tu hi. Tuaciang nong nget pawpo nang atu in hong vawtsak tu khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
2Samuel19:39 Tua zawkciang David le a mite theampo in Jordan ngun kan uh hi. Ama in Barzillai namh in, thupha pia a, tuaciang inn ah Barzillai cia kik hi." 
2Samuel19:40 Judah mi theampo le Israel mi teng ii a lang in kumpipa cing in ngun a kan zawkciang, ama Gilgal ah paitan a. Chimham sia ama taw paikhawm hi." 
2Samuel19:41 Tuaciang Israel te a om theampo kumpipa kungah pai in, ama munah, “Kumpipa awng, koma suapui Judah mite in nang hong la khe a, nangma, na innkuanpuite le na mite ii Jordan na kan uh ciang hong cin natu banghangin thu nei kisa ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi." 
2Samuel19:42 Judah mite in, “Banghangin tuabang ngamta khu ziam cile kumpipa sia koma mi khat hi. Tua ahikom banghangin hisia hu in thin uuk thei nu ziam? Ama in ka an neak tu uh la hong leisak bo, a dang zongh bangma piak hong nei ngawl hi,” ci in zo uh hi." 
2Samuel19:43 Israel te in, “Ama sia noma mi khat hikale David kumpipa tungtaang ah no sangin koma in see sawm bang a tamzaw in thu nei khu hi. Banghangin hong no mu nu ziam? Kumpipa ciapui kik natu kam a nging phitsak sia koma khu hi, mangil heak vun,” ci in zo kik hi. Ahihang Judah mite ii a cite sia Israel mite kampauna sangin nasia zaw in khalh zaw hi." 
2Samuel20:1 Gilgal ah Benjamin mi Bikri ii tapa Sheba a kici mihing mannung ngawl khat om hi. Ama in lemle tumin au a, “David taak hen! Ei ama zui ngawl tu hi hing! Israel pasalte awng inn ah cia tawng!” ci hi." 
2Samuel20:2 Tua ahikom Israel te in David nusia in Sheba zui ahihang Judah mite sia thumaan top in, Jordan pan Jerusalem ah David zui uh hi." 
2Samuel20:3 Jerusalem khua a kumpi inn ah David a thet ciangin kumpi inn cing tu in ama nusiat zino sawm teng la in, a cingte ii khutnuai ah koi hi. Amate ii taangsapna babangin sik hi, ahihang amate taw nupa vai in omkhawm ngawl hi. A nuntak lai teng kikhumcip in meingong bangin nungta hi." 
2Samuel20:4 Kumpipa in Amasa munah, “Judah mite khawmtua in, thai ciangin amate taw hi lai ah hong heak kik tavun,” ci hi." 
2Samuel20:5 Amasa in amate khawmtua tu in pai hi, ahihang kumpipa hunciam lapin a theng kik bua hi." 
2Samuel20:6 Tua ahikom kumpipa in Abishai munah, “Absalom sangin Sheba in ngim hong pia zaw tu hi. Ka mite la in a, ama del in, tua ahibuale kulh taw a ki uum khua pawlkhat hong la tha tu a, ei kung pan suakta tu hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel20:7 Tua ahikom Joab ii mite, kumpi cingte le ngalkap dang teng in Abishai taw Jerusalem nusia in Sheba del uh hi." 
2Samuel20:8 Amate suangpi khat sia omna Gibeon a thet uh ciang Amasa taw kisi uh hi. Joab sia ngalsim natu puansilh in, a namsau sia a paai taw a kawngkhau tungah khit hi. Ama mai sangah a pai laitak a namsau taaksua hi." 
2Samuel20:9 Joab in Amasa munah, “Bang na ci ziam, ka lawmpa awng,” ci in, ama namh tu bangin a khut ziatsang taw a khamul len hi." 
2Samuel20:10 Amasa sia Joab ii a khut langkhat ah a toai namsau sia pan kidal ngawl ahikom Joab in a ngil panin sun a, a ngilzang teng lei ah keekeak hi. Ama thakhatin thi paih a, Joab ii a sat kik kul ngawl hi. Tuaciang Joab le a suapui pa Abishai in Sheba del uh hi." 
2Samuel20:11 Joab ii mi khat Amasa ii luang hui ah ding a, “Joab le David mi ahi theampo in Joab nung zui vun!” ci in au hi." 
2Samuel20:12 Chi taw a kidim Amasa ii luang sia lampi laizang ah liik hi. Joab ii mihing pa in, a kuama theampo in tawlnga in a et thong uh bek a mu ciang, ama in a luang sia lampi pan lo sungah kai in, puanvan taw siin hi." 
2Samuel20:13 A luang lampi pan a khiin zawkciang a kuama po in Joab zui in Sheba del uh hi. 
2Samuel20:14 Sheba in Israel nam theampo ii ngam kaantan in, Abel Beth Maacah khuapi ah pai hi, tuaciang Bikri ii bee le phungte hong kikhawm a, khuapi sungah ama nung zui uh hi." 
2Samuel20:15 Joab ii mite in Sheba sia tua munah a om hunlam za uh ahikom amate pai in khuapi uumci uh hi. Luphung puanung pangh panin lei vum tosak a, a luphung cip thei natu in a nuai pan zong lei to hi." 
2Samuel20:16 Tua khuapi sungah nupi ciim khat om a, tua nu in luphung panin au a, “Na ngai vun! Na ngai vun! Joab hi sungah hong pai natu in na son vun; ama taw thu son nuam khi hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel20:17 Joab pai a, tuaciang tua nu in, “Nang Joab na hi ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Ama in, “Hi hi, keima khi hi,” ci in zo hi. Tua nu in “Topa awng hong ngai ta'n,” ci hi. Ama in, “Hong ngai tu khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
2Samuel20:18 Tua nu in, “Nidang tawngh lai in, ‘Abel khuapi ah pai in a, hong zo kikna ngai in’ — kici a, tuabang ma in kingamta hi." 
2Samuel20:19 Ko khuapi sia lian a, Israel ngam ah kilemna a om bel, a thumaanbel khuapi khat ahi hi. Banghangin tuasia suksiat tu hanciam ni ziam? Pathian ii neisa sia zaanciimsak nuam ni ziam?” ci hi." 
2Samuel20:20 Joab in, “Hi ngei ngawl tu khi hi! Na khuapi sia bangma hunin zaanciimsak, ahibuale hong suksiatsak ngeingawl tu khi hi!" 
2Samuel20:21 Tuabang sia ko ngealna hi ngawl hi. Ephraim mualtung ngam pan Bikri ii tapa Sheba a ci sia in Kumpipa David langpanin leedo hi. Hi sia pa hong aap lete, khuapi pan nungkin tu khi hi,” ci in zo hi. “Ama lutang sia luphung tung kan in no kungah kong lawn tu hi,” tua nu in ci hi." 
2Samuel20:22 Tua zawkciang ama tua khua mite kungah ama ii ngealna taw pai hi, amate in Sheba ii lu tan in, luphung kaantan in Joab kungah lawn uh hi. Ama in a mite khuapi a nusiat natu in lemle tum a, amate inn ah ciakik uh hi. Taciang Jerusalem kumpipa kungah Joab heak kik hi." 
2Samuel20:23 Joab sia Israel ngalkaphonpi ukpa hi; Jehoiada ii tapa Benaiah sia David a cingte a ukpa hi; 
2Samuel20:24 Adoniram in zawthawk thu taw kisawlin na a sepsakna teng uk a; Ahilud ii tapa Jehoshaphat in tepteena lai teng sai hi; 
2Samuel20:25 Sheva sia kumpi zum thuzeakpa ahi hi; Zadok le Abiathar te sia thiampi te ahi uh hi," 
2Samuel20:26 Tuaciang Jair khua pan Ira zongh David ii thiampi khat ahi hi. 
2Samuel21:1 David ii kumpi in a maan hunsungin kum thum sitset kialpi nasia khat tung hi. Tua hi a, David in Topa munah tuasia thu a dok ciang, Topa in, “Saul le a bangkua in mihing that mawna vawt hi; ama in Gibeon mite thatlum hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel21:2 (Gibeon mite sia Israel mi hi ngawl a; amate sia, Israel te in hut tu dal tu in kamciam a piaksa Amor mi pawlkhat hi napi, Israel mite in Judah mite atu a deisak leilam manin Saul in tuate mot tu in hanciam hi.)" 
2Samuel21:3 Tua ahikom David in Gibeon mite samsak a, “No atu bang hong vawtsak thei tu khi ziam? Topa ii mite tungah thupha na piak natu in no tungah hong tatkhialna te hong lul kik nuam khi hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel21:4 Amate in, “Saul le a bangkua taw ka kihauna uh sia ngunn le khamh taw thu kisaatsat thei ngawl bek dom ngawlin Israel mite khat zongh thatlum nuam ngawl khu hi,” ci in zo hi. David in, “Tua ahile no atu in kei bang hong vawtsak tu ci in na ngaisun uh ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
2Samuel21:5 Amate in, “Saul in ko sia hong maaimot nuam hi, tuaciang Israel ngamsung koima ah khat zongh a nungta in hong koi nuam ngawl hi." 
2Samuel21:6 Tua ahikom Saul ii suan le paal pasal sali hong aap tavun, Topa ii kumpi tu a teal Saul ii khua Gibeah ah amate sia Topa mai ah ka awksak tu uh hi,” ci in zo uh hi. Kumpipa in, “Amate hong aap tu khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
2Samuel21:7 Ahihang Jonathan taw a thiangtho kamciamna a piak hu in, David in Saul ii tupa, Jonathan ii tapa, Mephibosheth khoaikhe hi." 
2Samuel21:8 Ahihang ama in Aiah ii tanu Rizpah ii Saul taw a hin tapate nii, Armoni le Mephibosheth la hi; ama in Saul ii tanu Merab le Meholah pan Barzillai ii tapa Adriel taw a hin tapa nga teng zongh la hi." 
2Samuel21:9 David in amate teng Gibeon mite tungah aap a, tuate in Topa mai mual tungah awklumsak uh hi — tuaciang a sali ma in thi khawm uh hi. Tua a thi hun sia phalbi bo kuan hi a, mangtaang at a kipatsawng hi." 
2Samuel21:10 Tuaciangin Saul ii zino, Aiah tanu Rizpah sia mithiluangte kisialna suangpi tungah khau-ip buk vawtin anlaak kipat pan kipan tangngam ngua a zuk dong om hi. Ama in sun in mithiluangte a ne tu vacimte hung a, zanin ngamsate neak tu pan dal hi." 
2Samuel21:11 David in Rizpah ii ngamtatna a zaak ciangin," 
2Samuel21:12 ama pai a, Gilead ngam Jabesh mite kung panin Saul le a tapa Jonathan ii ngu la hi. (Amate in Gilboa mualvum tung a Saul a kithalup ni in Philistine te ii a luang a khaina Beth Shan taangpi khawlmun panin ngu uh hi.)" 
2Samuel21:13 David in Saul le Jonathan ii ngute le a ki awklumsak pasal sali teng ii ngute zongh khawmtua hi. 
2Samuel21:14 Tua zawkciang amate in kumpipa sawl babangin, Saul le Jonathan ii ngute Benjamin ngamsung Zela khua, Saul ii pa Kish ii thaan sungah phum uh hi. Tuasia zawkciang amate ngam atu a thungetna teng Pathian in zo hi." 
2Samuel21:15 Philistine te le Israel te ngal kisimna khat om kik a, David le a mite pai in Philistine te do uh hi. Kido hun sung khat ah David toi zo ta hi." 
2Samuel21:16 Thatang lian mama Ishbibenob a kici khat sia taau taw a kivawt kilogramme thum le lang a ngit teipi khat toai in, namsau thak khat kua a, David that thei tu in ki um hi." 
2Samuel21:17 Ahihang Zeruiah ii tapa Abishai in David hu a, thatang lianpa simin thatlum hi. Tua zawkciang David ii mite in David peuma amate taw ngalsim khawm tu in a kuan kik nawn ngawl natu in kamciam piasak hi. Amate in, “Nang sia Israel te ii lam etna ni hi, nang hong taan nuam ngawl khu hi,” ci uh hi." 
2Samuel21:18 Hisia zawkciang Gob ah Philistine te taw kidona khat om kik a, Hushah pan Sibbecai in Saph a kici thatang lian mama khat thatlum hi." 
2Samuel21:19 Gob ma ah Philistine te taw kidona khat om a, Bethlehem pan Jair ii tapa Elhanan in Gath mi Goliath that hi, ama ii teibul sia thiamtakte ii thiambanna pumlawng cia pha hi." 
2Samuel21:20 Tuaciang Gath ah ngal kidona dang khat om a, tua munah thatang lian mama ngal sim uuk mama khat om hi. Ama in a khutte ah khutme luk veve le a peangte ah peangme luk veve nei hi." 
2Samuel21:21 Ama in Israel te nalh hi, tuaciang David ii suapuipa Shammah ii tapa Jonathan in ama thatlum hi." 
2Samuel21:22 Hi mihing li teng sia Gath mi thatang lian te suan vive hi a, David le a mite in thatlum uh hi." 
2Samuel22:1 Topa in David sia Saul le a ngal dangte kung panin a hutkhiat ciangin David in Topa tungah hi la a sak hi. 
2Samuel22:2 Topa in kei hong dal pa hi; ama sia ka kulh kho ahi hi. 
2Samuel22:3 Ka Pathian sia ka kidalna hi a, tuaciangin ama hangin kei ka ngammuang hi. Ama in lum bangin kei hong sung hi; ama in kei hong hung a, kei hong keamcing hi. Ama in ka ngumpa hi; Ama in a ngoltolte kung panin kei hong dalin hong hun hi." 
2Samuel22:4 Topa ka biakpui a, ama in ka ngalte kung panin hong hun hi. Topa pok vun!" 
2Samuel22:5 Thina tuihualte ka kiim theampo ah om a; lalna tuihualte kei tungah hong kihual hi. 
2Samuel22:6 Thina ii lau huaina ka kiim ah hong om a, tuaciang thaankuul in kei thaang hong sia hi." 
2Samuel22:7 Ngim ka nga ciangin Topa ka biakpui a; ka Pathian munah hu ka ngen hi. A biakinn sung pan ka aw hong za a; hu ngen in ka auna aw ama in hong ngai hi. 
2Samuel22:8 Tua zawkciang leitung sia liingin ngawk a; van ii a bul a zungte kivei in liing hi, banghang ziam cile Pathian a thin uuk hi!" 
2Samuel22:9 A naak hawng panin meikhu hong pusuak a, a kam sung pan a kaanghtumsak thei meikuang le meikam leang hi." 
2Samuel22:10 Ama in vantung balkeakin hong pai suk a, a peang nuai ah meeivom kaai hi." 
2Samuel22:11 Ama in cherub tha tungah to in manlang takin leang a; vui ii thakhui te tungah khualhaw hi. 
2Samuel22:12 Ama le ama khuazing taw kituam a; tui taw kidim meeikaai saate in ama kiim uum hi; 
2Samuel22:13 khualeng in meikamte ama mai ah kuangsak hi. 
2Samuel22:14 Tuaciang Topa in van pan vanto nging bang hisak a, Vaanglianbelpa Pathian ii aw kiza hi." 
2Samuel22:15 Ama in a thaltangte kap a, a ngalte kithethaangsak hi; khualeng kuang taw amate taisak hi." 
2Samuel22:16 Topa in a ngalte a teih ciang le a thin uukin a hawksan ciangin, Tuipi ii tawdap kihawk a, leitung ii tawdap kilawt hi" 
2Samuel22:17 Topa in tungsang panin hong baan suk a, kei hong len hi; ama in tuithukna panin kei hong kaito hi." 
2Samuel22:18 A thahat ka ngalte kung pan ahizong kei hong ensan theampo te kung pan ahizong hong suatak hi — kei atu in amate hat leih uh hi. 
2Samuel22:19 Ngim ka nga ciang, amate in kei hong sim a, ahizong Topa in kei hong dal hi." 
2Samuel22:20 Ama in launa pan hong hu a; kei tungah hong lungkim hu in kei hong hun hi. 
2Samuel22:21 A maan bang ngamta ka hikom Topa in kei, tel hong pia hi; paubaang ngawl ka hikom ama in thupha hong pia hi." 
2Samuel22:22 Topa thukham ka ni a; ka Pathian kung pan ka puapial bua hi. 
2Samuel22:23 Ama ii thukham theampo ka tang a; a thupiakte ni ngawlin ka om bua hi. 
2Samuel22:24 Ama in ka maw ngawl hunlam hong he a, a maan ngawl ngamtatnate pan ka kikep hong he hi." 
2Samuel22:25 A maan bang ngamta ka hikom ama in tel hong pia hi, banghang ziam cile paubaang ngawl ka hi hong he hi." 
2Samuel22:26 Topa awng, nang tungah hong thumaante tungah na thumaan a, a cialcingte tungah na phatna kicing hi." 
2Samuel22:27 Nangma in a thiangtho te ii tungah na thiangtho a, ahizong a seksolte na ngal vawt hi." 
2Samuel22:28 A kiniamkhiakte na ngum a, ahizong a kiphasakte na kiniamkhiaksak hi." 
2Samuel22:29 Nangma, Topa, ka khuavak na hi hi; ka khuazing na nilkeak hi." 
2Samuel22:30 Ka ngalte ka sim natu in thahatna nong pia a, amate kihuuknate ka zaw zawk natu in vaangletna nong pia hi." 
2Samuel22:31 Hi Pathian — bangza in ama nasepnate cialcing a, ama kammalte suan taak ziam! Ama hong dalna a zong theampo atu in ama in lum khat taw kibang hi." 
2Samuel22:32 Topa bekma Pathian hi a; Pathian bekma ih kihuukna ahi hi. 
2Samuel22:33 Hi Pathian in a kip a kho ka bukna hi; Ama in ka lampi ngammuangsak hi. 
2Samuel22:34 Ama in ka peangte sangai bangin kho takin hong khuasuansak a; mualte tungah kei hong keamcing hi. 
2Samuel22:35 Ama in ngal kisim hong sinsak a, tuasia ciang thalkawng a khobel zongh ka zangh thei hi." 
2Samuel22:36 Oh, Topa, nangma in nong dal a, nong hun hi; nong huna in keima hong thupisak hi." 
2Samuel22:37 Hong kimat natu panin nong keam a, bangma hunin ka puk ngei bua hi." 
2Samuel22:38 Ka ngalte ka del a ka zo hi; amate ka mot mateng ka tawp bua hi. 
2Samuel22:39 Amate ka vaat vawk a, a thoto zo bua uh hi; amate ka mai ah ngallel in puk uh hi." 
2Samuel22:40 Ngal do natu in thahatna nong pia a; ka ngalte nong zosak hi. 
2Samuel22:41 Ka ngalte ka kung panin na taisak a; kei hong ensan te ka mon hi. 
2Samuel22:42 Amate in huna zong ka le kuama in hun ngawl hi; amate in Topa biakpui hikale ama in zo ngawl hi. 
2Samuel22:43 Amate ka sucip a, leivui bang suak uh hi; lampi ah a om buan bangin amate ka tuanhcil hi." 
2Samuel22:44 Hong leedo ka mite kung pan nong hun a minamte ka ukna nong kipsak hi; tu in ka heak ngeingawl mihingte ka khutnuai mi suak uh hi. 
2Samuel22:45 Ngamdangmite ka mai ah hong kun a; amate in ka kammal a zaak ciang hong ni hi. 
2Samuel22:46 Amate a thin letna uh bosua in, a kulhte sung pan liing vadil in hong pai uh hi." 
2Samuel22:47 Topa nungta hi! Kei hong hunpa pok vun! Kei hong hun a thahat Pathian ii letna thangsak vun. 
2Samuel22:48 Ama in ka ngalte hong zosak hi! minamte ka khutnuai ah ama in huthe ngam ngawlin koi a; 
2Samuel22:49 ka ngalte kung pan kei hong hun hi. Oh Topa, ka ngalte nong zosak a, a ngoltol mite kung panin nong dal hi." 
2Samuel22:50 Tua ahiciang minamte sungah nang kong pok a; na tungah pokna late kong sak hi. 
2Samuel22:51 Pathian in a kumpipa tungah zawna liante pia hi; ama in a tealsa khat ii tungah itna kip lak a, David le a suan a paalte tungah itna kip a tawntungin lak hi." 
2Samuel23:1 Jesse ii tapa, David sia Pathian ii mi thupi tu in a vawt, Jacob te ii Pathian in kumpipa tu in a teal hi a, Israel atu in la hoite a phuakpa ahi hi. Hi teng sia David ii a khakbel a pau kammalte ahi hi:" 
2Samuel23:2 Topa ii thaa in kei tungtawnin pau hi; ama ii thu puak sia ka muk tungah om hi. 
2Samuel23:3 Israel ii Pathian pau zo hi; Israel a dal pa in kei tungah hong ci hi: “Thutang khenna taw a uk kumpipa, Pathian thu ni in a uk pa sia," 
2Samuel23:4 meeikaai om ngawl zing khuavak tuung nitaang taw kibang hi, ngua theau zawkciang lopate a teesak vasip ni taw kibang hi." 
2Samuel23:5 Pathian ii ka suan ka paalte thupha a piak tu zia sia tuabang ahi hi, banghang ziam cile ama in kei taw tawntung thuciamna khat hong vawt hi, a kipaltan ngawl tu thukimna khat, a kikheal ngeingawl tu kamciam piakna khat ahi hi. Kei dei sia tua teng lian ahi hi; tua in ka zawna hi tu a, Pathian in taangtungsak nanak tu hi." 
2Samuel23:6 Ahihang Pathian a selte sia, a kivawk lingte taw kibang hi; Kuama in khutnguak taw amate tham thei ngawl hi." 
2Samuel23:7 Thik vanhzak ahibuale tei khat na zak kul tu a; amate kaanghtum tu hi. 
2Samuel23:8 David ii a minthang ngalkapte sia hite ahi hi: a masa phitbel sia Tachemon pan Josheb Basshebeth hi a, ama sia “Thum teng” ii lampui pa ahi hi; ama in ngal kisimna khat sungah a teipi taw ngalte 800 do in thatlum siat hi." 
2Samuel23:9 A minthang thum sung pan a niina sia Ahoh phung sung pan Dodo ii tapa Eleazar hi. Ni khat ni in ama le David in ngaldo tu a kikhawmtua Philistine te thato uh hi. Israel te nungkin a," 
2Samuel23:10 ahihang ama ding topin do in, a khut khikcip ahikom namsau tha thei nawn ngawl hi. Topa in tua ni in zawna lianpi nga hi. Ngal a zaw zawkciang Israel te Eleazar kungah heak kikin a thite ii ngaldalna teng suut uh hi." 
2Samuel23:11 A minthang thum sungah a thumna sia Harar pan Agee ii tapa Shammah hi. Philistine te sia be ciinna lo khat omna Lehi ah kikhawmtua uh hi. Israel te Philistine te mai panin tai keak uh a," 
2Samuel23:12 ahizong Shammah ahile lo sungah a dinmun nusia ngawlin ngalnang a, Philistine te that hi. Topa in tua ni in zawna lianpi nga hi." 
2Samuel23:13 Anlaak hun kipat nai ciang, “Sawmthumte” sung pan thum sia David omna Adullam suanghawng sungah pai in, Philistine te ahile Rephaim Kuam ah ngiaphual saat uh hi." 
2Samuel23:14 Tua hun laitakin David sia ngalnanna tu in a ki uum mualtung khat ah om a, Philistine te pawlkhat in Bethlehem khua la uh hi." 
2Samuel23:15 David in inn sang ngai mama in, “Bethlehem kongpi hui tuikhuk panin ka dawn tu tui, mi khat po in hong paipui le paw uuk na peu ing!” ci hi." 
2Samuel23:16 Ngalkap minthang thumte in a pai natu Philistine te phual nawkkeak in, tuikhuk pan tui tawm a laak zawkciang David kungah paipui uh hi. Ahihang David in a dawn nuam bua hi; tua sangin Topa tungah piakkhiatna in lei ah sung zaw a," 
2Samuel23:17 tuaciang, “ Topa awng, hi tui ka ne thei ngei buatu hi! A nuntakna a khaam mite ii chi a ne taw ka kibang tu hi,” ci hi. Tua ahikom ama in tui a neak tu nial hi. Ngalkap minthang thumte ii ngalhan nasepnate tuabang ahi hi." 
2Samuel23:18 Joab ii suapuipa Abishai (a nu sia Zeruiah hi) sia “A minthang Sawmthumte” ii lampui ahi hi. Ama in tei taw a ngalte zathum do a, that siat hi, tuabangin ama “Sawmthumte” sungah minthang hi." 
2Samuel23:19 Ama sia “Sawmthumte” sungah a minthangbel hi a, amate ii lampui hong suak hi, ahihang tua “Thumte” za in minthang ngawl hi." 
2Samuel23:20 Kabzeel pan Jehoiada ii tapa Benaiah sia ngalkap minthang dang khat hi; ama in ngalhang nasep lian tam mama a seamsa hi a, tuasung pan Moab ngalhang kiciante nii a thalup kihel hi. Vuuk taak ni khat in, dum khat sungah ama tuaksuk in tawpi khat thatlum hi." 
2Samuel23:21 Ama in a thatang lian mama Egypt te tei toai khat that hi. Benaiah in a molpum taw Egypt pa sim a, a tei sutin tua taw that hi." 
2Samuel23:22 “Sawmthumte” sungah khat ahi Benaiah ii ngalhan nasepnate tuabang ahi hi. 
2Samuel23:23 Ama sia “Sawmthumte” sung panin kician a, ahihang “Thum teng” za in minthang zo ngawl hi. David in ama a cingte ukpa in koi hi." 
2Samuel24:1 Topa sia Israel te ii tungah khatvei ma thin uuk kik a, amate tungah David in ngim piasak hi. Topa in ama mun ah, “Va pai ta'n a, Israel te le Judah te mi phaza sim ta'n,” ci hi." 
2Samuel24:2 Tua ahikom David in ngalkaphonpi ukpa Joab munah thupia hi: “Na uliante taw Israel nam theampo sung, ngam mong khat pan mong khat dong paitan a, mi phaza sim tavun. Bangza pha ziam he nuam khi hi.”" 
2Samuel24:3 Ahihang Joab in kumpipa munah, “Kumpipa awng, Topa na Pathian in Israel mite, tu a zaa sangin a zaa zakhat a tamzaw in hong pungsak tahen a, tuaciang tuabang a punsakna sia a mu tu in nangma hong nungtasak tahen. Ahihang, kumpipa awng banghang hisia vawt nuam ni ziam?” ci in zo hi." 
2Samuel24:4 Ahihang kumpipa in Joab le a uliante in a thu nisak a; amate in kumpipa omna nusia a, Israel mite a phakza sim tu in pai uh hi." 
2Samuel24:5 Amate in Jordan ngun kaantan a, Gad ngamkuam laizang a Aroer khuapi ii thang sangah ngiaphual saat uh hi. Tua mun panin amate in saksang Jazer ah," 
2Samuel24:6 tua mun pan Hit te ngamsung Gilead le Kadesh ah pai uh hi. Tua zawkciang amate in Dan ah pai in, Dan pan nitumna sangah Sidon zuan uh hi." 
2Samuel24:7 Tua mun pan amate thangsang zuan a, kulh taw a ki uum Tyre khuapi, Hiv le Canaan te khuapi theampo, a khakbel in Judah ngam thangsang Beersheba ah pai uh hi." 
2Samuel24:8 Tuabangin amate ngamsung buppi ah khualhaw uh a, tha kua le ni kul zawkciang Jerusalem ah heak kik uh hi." 
2Samuel24:9 Amate in kumpipa tungah, ngalkap seam thei pasal sia: Israel ngam ah 800,000 om in, Judah ngam ah 500,000 om hi, ci in son uh hi." 
2Samuel24:10 Ahihang David in mi simna sazian a laaksak zawkciang ama kithasungin a thin hong ngim a, Topa munah, “Hi nasep ka sep sia maw mama khi hi! Nong hesuakna in hong maisak ta'n. Mawmawt nasep a seam hi thong khi hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel24:11 Topa in David ii kamsaang Gad munah, “David kungah pai in son ta'n, ama ii teal tu thu nam thum pia khi hi. Ama teal po vawt tu khi hi,” ci hi. A zing ciang zingsang, David ii thaw zawkciang," 
2Samuel24:12  
2Samuel24:13 ama kungah Gad pai a, Topa ii sawl teng son hi, tuaciang ama in, “Koisia teal tu ni ziam? Na ngam sungah kum thum kialpi tungsak tu ni ziam, ahibuale na ngalte mai pan tha thum sung tai zaw tu ni ziam, tua ahibuale ni thum sung na ngam sungah natsia tungsak nuam zaw ni ziam? Tu in ngaisun ta'n a, Topa munah ka puak kik tu na zona hong son ta'n,” ci in dongh hi." 
2Samuel24:14 David in, “A heehuai mama dinmun ah om khi hi! Ahihang mihingte ii daan hong piak tu uuk ngawl khi hi. Topa khat bek ma ko daan hong pia tu pa hi hen, banghang ziam cile ama sia ngual hesuakna thin nei hi,” ci in zo hi." 
2Samuel24:15 Tua ahikom tua ni zing pan kipan ama ii tealna hun a cin dong Topa in Israel tungah natsia tungsak hi. Ngam mong khat pan mong khat dong Israel mi tul sawmsali thi uh hi. 
2Samuel24:16 Topa ii vantunglalang in Jerusalem lalcipsak tu in a kipat ciangin Topa in mihingte daan a piak huvau a thin kheal kik a, amate a that vantunglalang munah, “Tawp in! Pha zo!” ci hi. Vantunglalang sia Jebus mi Araunah ii ancilna nai theng hi." 
2Samuel24:17 David in mite a that vantunglalang sia mu a, Topa munah, “A maw sia keima khi hi, a seam khialpa sia keima khi hi. Hi a khuangai huai mihingte in bang seam thong na ziam? Keima le ko innkuan daan nong piak tu hi zaw khu hi,” ci hi." 
2Samuel24:18 Tua ni ma in Gad sia David kungah hong pai a, “Araunah ii ancilna munah va pai ta'n a, tua munah biaknatau khat Topa atu sa ta'n,” ci hi." 
2Samuel24:19 David in Topa ii thupiak ni in Gad ii sawl bangin pai hi. 
2Samuel24:20 Araunah in a etsuk le kumpipa le a uliante ama kungah hong paito mu hi. Ama in David ii mai lei ah kisepsuk in," 
2Samuel24:21 “Kumpipa awng, banghangin hi sungah hong om ni ziam?” ci in dongh hi. David in, “Na ancilna mun a lei tu le, natsiatna a thai natu in. Topa atu biaknatau khat sa tu hong pai khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
2Samuel24:22 “Tuasia la in, kumpipa awng, tuaciang Topa tungah na uuk babangin biakpiakna pia in. Hi sung biaknatau tungah na biakpiak natu in khuital te om hi, tuaciang hi munah khuite ii kanhakte le ancilna thingpheakte om hi, mei thu natu in zangh in,” Araunah in ci hi." 
2Samuel24:23 Araunah in kumpipa tungah a vekpi in pia siat hi, tuaciang ama munah, “ Topa na Pathian in na biakpiakna hong saang tahen,” ci hi." 
2Samuel24:24 Ahihang kumpipa in zo a, “Hi ngawl hi. Tuate ii man hong pia tu khi hi. Topa ka Pathian tungah keima ii man piak ngawlin ka nga sangaw biakpiaknate pia ngawl tu khi hi,” ci in zo hi. Ama in ancilna mun le khuitalte ngunntang 50 taw lei hi." 
2Samuel24:25 Tua zawkciang ama in Topa tungah biaknatau sa in, meihal biakpiakna le kipawlkhop biakpiakna pia hi. Topa in a thungetna saang a, Israel ngam sungah tua natna kamh hi." 
1Kings1:1 Kumpipa David sia tu in pasal huai mama khat hi a, a naseamte in puanvante thuapin silhsak hikale a khualum thei ngawl hi." 
1Kings1:2 Tua ahikom a uliante in ama munah, “Kumpipa awng, nang taw om in hong ou tu numei khangmoi khat hong zonsak tu khu hi. Ama in nangma kungah lum tu a, na khua hong lumsak tu hi,” ci uh hi." 
1Kings1:3 Israel ngam bup ah ngaknu mealpha khat kizong a, tuabang a mealpha Abishag a kici khat Shunem ah mu a, kumpipa kungah kipaipui hi." 
1Kings1:4 Ama sia a mealpha mama a, kumpipa zongh ou hi, ahihang ama in nupa vai a nei pui bua hi." 
1Kings1:5 Tu in Absalom a thi tak ciang David ii Haggith taw a tapa Adonijah sia a nungta lai te sung pan a tapa lianbel ahi hi. Ama sia a mealhoi mama mihing khat ahi hi. David in ama sia bangma hunin teih ngeingawl a, tuaciang ama zongh kumpipa suak nuam mama hi. Ama atu in siphu ngalleangte, siphu te le ama a cing mihing 50 koi hi." 
1Kings1:6  
1Kings1:7 Ama in Joab (A nu Zeruiah) le thiampi Abiathar taw thu kikum uh hi, tuaciang amate in ama panpui tu in lungkim uh hi." 
1Kings1:8 Ahihang thiampi Zadok, Jehoiada ii tapa Benaiah, kamsaangpa Nathan, Shimei, Rei le David a cing te sia Adonijah sangah a pang bua uh hi." 
1Kings1:9 Ni khat ni in Adonijah in Enrogel cik hui Ngul Suangpi a kicina munah tuute, khuitalte, khuino thaute taw sangaw biakpiakna khat nei hi. Ama in David kumpipa ii tapa dangte le Judah pan kumpipa ii uliante tua sangaw biakpiakna anneakpoai sungah sam hi," 
1Kings1:10 ahihang ama in a suapui sealh Solomon, kamsaangpa Nathan, Benaiah le kumpipa a cingpa sam ngawl hi." 
1Kings1:11 Tua zawkciang Nathan in Solomon ii nu Bathsheba kungah pai in ama munah, “Haggith ii tapa Adonijah in ama le ama kumpipa a kisuasak hunlam za ngawl ni ziam? Tuaciang Kumpipa David in hi thu bangma he ngawl hi!" 
1Kings1:12 Nangma le na tapa Solomon ii nuntakna na hu nuam le, ngaisutna hong pia khi hi," 
1Kings1:13 tu mama in Kumpipa David kungah pai in a, ‘Kumpipa awng, ciliap huai takin kei tungah kamciam nong piakna ah ka tapa Solomon in na kumpi za hong laih tu ci ka na ngawl ni ziam? Tua ahile Adonijah sia bangbangin kumpi suak thei ziam?’ ci in va dongh ta'n,” ci hi." 
1Kings1:14 Tuaciang Nathan in, “Tuasia ciang Kumpipa David taw na papau laitakin kei kong tum tu a, na thuson teng maan hi kong ci tu hi,” ci lai hi." 
1Kings1:15 Tua ahikom Bathsheba in kumpipa lupna inndoi sungah ama taw kimu tu in pai hi. Ama huai mama zo a, Shunem panin Abishag in ou hi." 
1Kings1:16 Bathsheba sia kumpipa mai ah a niamin hong kun a, tuaciang ama in, “Bang uuk ni ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
1Kings1:17 Ama in, “Kumpipa awng, Topa na Pathian ii min taw kei tungah ciliap huai takin kamciam nong piakna ah, nang zawkciang kumpi a suak tu sia ka tapa Solomon hi tu hi ci ni hi." 
1Kings1:18 Ahihang Adonijah sia kumpipa suak zo a, tuaciang hi thu huvau nang bangma he ngawl ni hi." 
1Kings1:19 Ama in khuital tam ma, tuute, khuino thaute sangaw biakpiakna in pia a, ama in biakpiakna poai ah na tapate, thiampipa Abiathar, na ngalkaphonpi ukpa Joab sam hi, ahihang ama in na tapa Solomon sam ngawl hi." 
1Kings1:20 Kumpipa awng, Israel mite theampo in na kumpi za hong laih tu sia na son tu hong ngak tek hi." 
1Kings1:21 Tuabang na hi buale na thi pawpo ciang ka tapa Solomon le kei sia thumaan ngawlte a vawt bangin hong kivawt tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
1Kings1:22 Bathsheba a papau laitakin, kumpipa inn sungah Nathan tum hi." 
1Kings1:23 Nathan a om hunlam kumpipa tungah kison a, kamsaangpa Nathan sungtangin kumpipa mai ah kun hi." 
1Kings1:24 Tua zawkciang ama in, “Kumpipa awng, Adonijah sia nang hong laih tu kumpipa ci in taangko zo ni ziam?" 
1Kings1:25 Tu ni mama in ama pai a, khuital tam ma, tuu le khuino thaute sangaw biakpiakna in pia hi. Ama in na tapate theampo, na ngalkaphonpi ukpa Joab, tuaciang thiampipa Abiathar te sam a, tu in amate poai khaam in, ‘Kumpipa Adonijah a khansau tahen!” ci in au uh hi." 
1Kings1:26 Ahihang ama in kei hong sam ngawl hi, topa awng, thiampipa Zadok ahizong, Benaiah ahizong, Solomon ahizong sam ngawl hi." 
1Kings1:27 Hiteng sia kumpipa ii na thukim ma ziam, nang hong laih tu sia na uliante ngawngawn zongh na son ngawl ma ahi ziam?” ci hi." 
1Kings1:28 Kumpipa David in, “Bathsheba hong tumsak kik tavun,” a ci ciang ama hong pai a, ama mai ah ding hi." 
1Kings1:29 Tuaciang ama munah, “Ka ngim nga na theampo pan hong suatakpa, a nungta Topa min taw nang tungah kamciam hong pia khi hi," 
1Kings1:30 tu ni in Topa Israel te ii Pathian min taw kamciam kong piak sia kholet tu khi hi, na tapa Solomon in keima kumpi za hong laih tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings1:31 Bathsheba kunsuk in, “Ka topa kumpipa nungta tawntung tahen!” ci hi." 
1Kings1:32 Tua zawkciang David kumpipa in Zadok, Nathan le Benaiah samsak hi. Amate hong pai ciangin," 
1Kings1:33 ama in, “Ka zum uliante keng vun a; ka tapa Solomon sia ka laa tungah tosak in, Gihon cik ah tha suk tavun," 
1Kings1:34 tua munah Zadok le Nathan in Israel kumpipa tu in sathau noai tahen. Tua zawkciang lemle tum vun a, ‘Solomon kumpipa a khansau tahen!’ ci in au vun." 
1Kings1:35 Ka kumpi tokhum tungah to tu in hi munah hong heak kik ciangin, a nung zui vun. Ama in ka kumpi za hong laih tu hi banghang ziam cile ama sia Israel le Judah uk tu in ka tealsa ahi hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings1:36 Benaiah in, “Na dei bangin ka seam tu hi, tuaciangin Topa in hong kipsak tahen." 
1Kings1:37 Topa in nang kumpipa hong ompui bangin Solomon taw zong hong omkhawm tahen, tuaciang ama ii kumpi maanna zongh nang sangin mainawt zaw lai tahen,” ci in zo hi." 
1Kings1:38 Tua ahikom Zadok, Nathan, Benaiah le kumpipa a cingte in Solomon sia Kumpipa David ii laa tungah suan in, Gihon cik ah tha uh hi." 
1Kings1:39 Zadok in Topa ompuina puanbuk pan a paipui olive thau bung la in, Solomon sathau noai hi. Amate in lemle tum a, mipite theampo au in, “Kumpipa Solomon a khansau tahen!” ci uh hi." 
1Kings1:40 Tua zawkciang amate theampo in ama nungzui kik a, lungdam in a auna le tamngai a tumna hu in, lei liing khop dongin a aw uh nging hi." 
1Kings1:41 Adonijah le a leangnate theampo a poai a man kuan ciang, tua awnging za uh hi. Tuaciang Joab in lemle aw a zaak ciang, “Khuapi sungah awnging sia bang khiakna nei ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
1Kings1:42 A pau a man ma in thiampi Abiathar ii tapa Jonathan hong theng hi. Adonijah in, “Hong pai ta'n, nang pasal pha khat ni hi, thupha khat hong puak hi nanak tu ni hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings1:43 Jonathan in, “Thupha hong puak ngawl khi hi,” ci in zo hi. “Kumpi ahi David kumpipa in Solomon sia kumpipa suaksak hi." 
1Kings1:44 Ama in Zadok, Nathan, Benaiah le kumpipa cingte in thasak hi. Amate in kumpipa laa tungah Solomon tosak uh hi," 
1Kings1:45 tuaciang Zadok le Nathan in Gihon cik ah sathau noai in kumpi suaksak hi. Tua zawkciang amate lungdamna taw au kawmin khuapi sungah tum uh a, tuasia ciang tu in mipite ngamlum lialua uh hi. Tuasia, tu a na zaak uh awnging sia ahi hi." 
1Kings1:46 Solomon sia tu in kumpipa suak zo hi. 
1Kings1:47 Tua teng bek dom ngawlin kumpipa ii uliante pai a, Kumpipa David zatakna pia in, ‘Na Pathian in Solomon sia nang sang zongh in minthangsak zaw lai tahen, tuaciang Solomon kumpi maanna sia nang aa sangin nopci zaw lai tahen,’ ci uh hi. Tua zawkciang Kumpipa David in a lupna tungah kun in biakpiakna vawt a," 
1Kings1:48 tuaciang in thungen hi, ‘Ka suan ka paalte khat tuni in kei hong laih in kumpi a suasak sia a mu tu in hong nungtasak Israel ii Pathian Topa pok tek tawng,’ ” ci hi." 
1Kings1:49 Tuasia ciang Adonijah ii leangnate lau in, a vekpi ding a, amate a sansak tek ah pai uh hi." 
1Kings1:50 Adonijah in Solomon kiita mama ahikom Topa ii ompuina puanbuk sungah pai a, biaknatau kiil lenin om hi." 
1Kings1:51 Adonijah in ama kiita ahikom biaknatau king lenin om a, ama in, “A masa phitbel in Kumpi Solomon in kei hong thalup ngawl natu kamciam hong pia le dei khi hi,” a ci teng Solomon tungah kison hi." 
1Kings1:52 Solomon in, “Ama kei tungah hong thumaan po le a luzang samzam khat zongh kithutha ngawl tu hi; ahihang hong thumaan bua ahile thi tu hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
1Kings1:53 Tua zawkciang, Solomon kumpipa in Adonijah sia biaknatau panin samsak hi. Adonijah hong pai in kumpipa ii mai ah kun suk a, tuaciang kumpipa in ama munah, “Nang cia thei ni hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings2:1 David in a thi tu nai ciang a tapa Solomon sam a, a khakbel hilna teng son hi:" 
1Kings2:2 “Ka thi tu hun hong theng zo hi. Kimuang in a, takkha in;" 
1Kings2:3 tuaciang Topa na Pathian ii vawt a hong sawl teng vawt in. A thukhamte le a thupiakna te a vekpi in Moses ii thukham sungah a ki at babang zui in, tua hile na paina po, na sepna pawpo ah na nuamsa thei tu hi." 
1Kings2:4 Ama thu na ni le, Topa ii kei tungah hong piak ka suan ka paalte in thumaan tak le thintak lungtak taw ama ii thupiakte a nit tu a kidop uh laiteng in, Israel ngam uk tu hi ci in kamciam sia ama in kholet tu hi." 
1Kings2:5 “Thudang khat om lai hi. Joab in kei tungah hong ngamtatna ciamtee tu ni hi, ama in Israel te ngalkaphonpite a uk, Ner ii tapa Abner le Jether ii tapa Amasa te nii hong thalupsak hi. Ngal sungah thina hangin ngal kilem hun sungah phulam in tualthat ahi sia na phawk tu hi. Ama in mihing mawnei ngawlte that ahikom tu in ama ngamtatna teng keima pu khi hi, tuasia taw kizui in a piang babang thuak khi hi." 
1Kings2:6 Na vawt tu bangziam ci in he ni hi; ama sia thi ngei bang thawthongin thisak ngawl tu ni hi. 
1Kings2:7 “Ahihang Gilead pan Barzillai tapate tungah hesuakna lak ta'n a, a pha takin ou ta'n, banghang ziam cile na suapuipa Absalom kung pan ka tai lai in amate in kei hong hesuak hi." 
1Kings2:8 “Benjamin ngam Bahurim khua panin Gera ii tapa Shimei a ci khat zongh om hi. Mahanaim ka zot lai in nasia takin hong haamsiat hi, ahihang Jordan ngun ah ka kisik ciangin ama a kithalup ngawl natu in Topa min taw a ciliap huai kamciam ka pia hi." 
1Kings2:9 Ahihang ama daan piak ngawlin thaa thong ngawl het tu ni hi. Bang vawt tu ci in nangma he ni hi, ama a kithisak natu na vaihawm kul tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings2:10 David thi a David khuapi ah kiphum hi. 
1Kings2:11 Ama in kum 40 sung Israel kumpi seam a, Hebron ah kum sali, Jerusalem ah kum 33 sung maang hi." 
1Kings2:12 Solomon in a pa David ii kumpi za lua a, ama ii kumpi vaangletna kip hi." 
1Kings2:13 Tua zawkciang Haggith ii tapa, Adonijah sia Solomon ii nu Bathsheba kungah haw hi. “Kilem vai in hong vak na hi ziam?” ci in Bathsheba in dongh hi. Adonijah in, “Hi hi,” ci in zo hi," 
1Kings2:14 tuaciang, “Kong nget nop khat om hi,” ci lai hi. Ama in, “Tua sia bang ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
1Kings2:15 Ama in, “Na heaksa bangin kei sia kumpi ka sua natu hi, Israel ngam ah mi theampo in tuabangin muangmaw hi. Ahihang a tuam dang khat in hong piang a, ka suapuipa sia kumpipa suak hi, banghang ziam cile tuasia Topa deina hi." 
1Kings2:16 Tu in nget nop khat hong nei khi hi; nong hesuakna in hong nial heak in,” ci in zo hi. Bathsheba in, “A bang ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
1Kings2:17 Ama in, “Nong hesuakna in Kumpipa Solomon tungah Shunem panin numei Abishag sia ka zi tu in hong ngetsak ta'n — nang sia ama in hong nial ngawl tu ci in he khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
1Kings2:18 Tua nu in, “Pha mama hi nang atu Kumpipa tungah kong sonsak tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
1Kings2:19 Tua ahikom Bathsheba sia kumpipa kungah Adonijah taangin a paupui tu in pai hi. Kumpipa sia a nu muak tu in dingto a, a nu kun hi. Tuasia zawkciang ama kumpi tokhum tungah to a, a nu atu tokhum dang khat lasak in a ziatsang ah tosak hi." 
1Kings2:20 Ama in, “Hamphatna no khat hong ngen nuam khi hi; nong hesuakna in hong nial heak in,” ci hi; Ama in, “Bang ziam nu awng?Hong nial bong,” ci hi." 
1Kings2:21 A nu in, “Na suapuipa Adonijah ii zi tu in Abishag pia in,” ci hi." 
1Kings2:22 Kumpipa in, “Banghangin ama piak tu in Abishag hong ngen ni ziam?” ci in dongh hi. “Kumpi tokhum zongh ngetsak vet in. Adonijah sia ka u ahikom, thiampi Abiathar le Joab zongh ama ii sangah pang hi!” ci hi." 
1Kings2:23 Tua zawkciang Solomon in Topa min taw kiciam a, “Adonijah in hi bang hong nget hu in ama nuntakna taw ka lulsak bua ngawngaw le Pathian in kei hong vualum tahen!" 
1Kings2:24 Topa in ka pa David ii kumpi tokhum tungah kip takin kei hong koi zo hi; ama in a kamciam kholet in kumpi ngam sia ka suan ka paalte dongin hong pia zo hi. Adonijah sia tu ni mama in thi tu hi ci in a nungta Topa taw kiciam khi hi!” ci hi. 
1Kings2:25 Tua ahikom Solomon kumpipa in Benaiah thupia a, tua pa va pai in Adonijah that hi." 
1Kings2:26 Tua zawkciang Kumpipa Solomon in Abiathar thiampipa tungah, “Na teenna ngam Anathoth ah cia ta'n. A thi tu kilawm ni hi, ahizong ka pa David taw na om lai in Topa Thuciamna Thingkuang a keam pa na hi hu le ama ii ngim ngana theampo a thuakpui pa zongh na hi hu in, tu in hong thisak ngawl tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings2:27 Tua zawkciang Solomon in thiampi Abiathar sia Topa ii thiampi a sepna pan tawpsak hi, tuabangin Topa ii Shiloh ah thiampi Eli le a suan a paalte huvau a pauna taangtungsak hi." 
1Kings2:28 Joab in thupiang teng za hi. (Ama in Absalom panpui ngawl ahihang Adonijah panpui hi.) Tua ahikom ama tai in Topa ii ompuina puanbuk sungah biaknatau ii kingte lenin om hi. 
1Kings2:29 Kumpipa Solomon in Joab sia puanbuk bealh tu in tai a, biaknatau hui ah a om hunlam a zaak ciang, Kumpipa Solomon in kamtai khat sawlin Joab munah banghangin biaknatau a bealh tu in tai ni ziam ci in donghsak hi. Joab in Topa kungah ka tai sia Solomon ka kiitak hang hi ci in zo hi. Tua ahikom Kumpipa Solomon in Joab a that tu in Benaiah paisak hi." 
1Kings2:30 Ama Topa ii ompuina Puanbuk ah pai in Joab munah, “Kumpipa in pusuak a hong sawl hi,” ci hi. Joab in, “Hong pusuak ngawl tu khi hi. Hi sungah thi zaw tu khi hi,” ci in zo hi. Benaiah heak kikin kumpipa munah Joab pauna teng son hi." 
1Kings2:31 “Joab ii ci bangin vawt in. Ama that in a, phum in. Tuasia ciangin kei ka hi zong, David ii suan le paal dangte ahizong Joab ii mawnei ngawl a thalupte huvau ah vaipuak ka nei nawn buatu hi." 
1Kings2:32 Ka pa David ii heak ngawl laanin, mihing a thana hu in Topa in Joab daan pia tu hi. Joab in ama sangin mi pha ahizaw, a maw ngawl mihing nii thatlum a: Israel te ngalkaphonpi ukpa Abner le Judah te ngalkaphonpi ukpa Amasa te ahi hi." 
1Kings2:33 Amate ii mihing thanate hu in daan piakna sia Joab le a suan a paalte tungah a tawntungin tung tu hi. Ahihang Topa in David suan le paal te ama ii kumpi tokhum tungah a to peuma zawna pia tawntung tu hi,” Solomon in ci in zo hi." 
1Kings2:34 Tua ahikom Benaiah in Topa ompuina Puanbuk ah pai in Joab that hi, tuaciang ama sia ama ii inn, ngam taanzauna ah kiphum hi." 
1Kings2:35 Kumpipa in Benaiah sia Joab taangin ngalkaphonpi ukpa suaksak a, thiampipa Zadok in Abiathar za laihsak hi." 
1Kings2:36 Tua zawkciang kumpipa in Shimei samsak a, “Hi sung Jerusalem ah nangma atu in inn khat sa in. A sungah teang in a, khuapi nusia heak in." 
1Kings2:37 Inn nusia in Kidron lui na kaantan le thi tatak tu ni hi — tuaciang nangma mawna hi tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings2:38 Shimei in, “Pha mama hi, Kumpipa awng, na ci babangin ngamta tu khi hi,” ci in zo kik hi. Tuabangin ama Jerusalem ah ngei ma teang hi." 
1Kings2:39 Ahizong kum thum zawkciang, Shimei ii silate nii sia, Maacah ii tapa Achish, Gath kumpipa tuu in tai uh hi. Shimei in amate sia Gath ah om hi ci in a zaak ciangin," 
1Kings2:40 a laa tung to in Gath khua Achish kumpipa kungah pai a tua silate zong hi. Amate mu in inn ah hong cia pui kik hi. 
1Kings2:41 Solomon in Shimei ngamtatna teng a zaak ciangin," 
1Kings2:42 ama samsak a, “Jerusalem na nusiat ngawl natu in Topa min taw kamciam kong piasak hi. Tuaciang na nusia napo le thi tatak tu ni hi ci in na kidop natu thu kong piaksa hi. Tuabang thukim in na thu kong ni tu hi nong cisa hi ngawl ziam?" 
1Kings2:43 Tua ahile banghangin ciampeal in kong thupiakna hong mang ngawl ni ziam? 
1Kings2:44 Ka pa David tungah na tatkhialnate theampo he nginge ni hi. Topa in nang tua hu in daan hong pia tu hi. 
1Kings2:45 Ahihang ama in kei thupha hong pia tu a, David ii kumpi ngam sia ngammuangsak tawntung tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings2:46 Tua zawkciang kumpipa thupiak bangin Benaiah pusuak a, Shimei that hi. Tu in Solomon in uk siat hi." 
1Kings3:1 Solomon in Egypt kumpipa tanu a teenpuina taw ngal vai a kipawlna khat nei hi. Ama in tua nu sia a kumpi inn, Biakinnpi le Jerusalem khua uumna luphungte a sak man dong David khuapi ah a teang tu in ciapui hi." 
1Kings3:2 Topa atu in biakinn kisa ngawl lai hi, tua ahikom mipite in sangaw biakpiaknate mun tuatuam ah vawt uh hi." 
1Kings3:3 Solomon in Topa it a, a pa David ii hil bangin ngamta hi, ahihang ama in ngannote ngo a, biaknatau tuatuamte ah sangaw biakpiaknate zongh nei hi." 
1Kings3:4 Khatvei, ama sia Gibeon ah sangaw biakpiakna vawt tu in pai hi, banghang ziam cile tua munah biaknatau a minthangbel sia om hi. Ama in hun bosa sungah tua munah meihal biakpiaknate a za simin pia zo hi." 
1Kings3:5 Tua zanin Topa sia a mang sungah hong kilaak a, “Bang kong piak tu na uukbel ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
1Kings3:6 Solomon in, “Nangma in ka pa David, na naseampa sia itna lianpi na lak tawntung hi, tuaciang ama pha a, thutakin nang taw a kizopna sungah thumaan hi. Tuaciangin ama panmun ah tu ni in ngam a uk nangma in a kizom paisuakin tapa khat na piakna taw a lian na itna kip na lak hi." 
1Kings3:7 Oh Topa Pathian, keima sia ka khanmoi mama in ngam ukzia he ngawl ka hihang, nangma in ka pa ii kumpi za nong laihsak zo hi." 
1Kings3:8 Hi sungah nangma atu na tealsa mite tam leihin a kisim zo ngawlte sungah om khi hi. 
1Kings3:9 Tua ahikom na mite thutang khenna taw ka uk thei natu le a pha le a sia ka khentel thei natu in ciimna hong pia ta'n. Tua ahibuale bangbangin hi na mihonpite uk thei tu khi ziam?” ci hi 
1Kings3:10 Solomon ii hisia a nget sia Topa lungkim hi," 
1Kings3:11 tua ahikom ama munah, “Nangma atu in khansauna ahizong, hau natu ahibuale na ngalte thi natu ahizong, hong ngen ngawlin thutang takin uk thei natu ciimna hong ngenzaw na hikom," 
1Kings3:12 nong nget bangin kong pia tu hi. Ciimna le tel theina sia tu masia le maisang zong kuama peuma ii a tamzaw in a nei ngeingawl tu za kong pia tu hi. 
1Kings3:13 Nong nget ngawlte zongh hong pia si tu khi hi: na khan tawntung hauna le minphatna zongh kumpipa dang khat pawpo sangin tamzaw nga tu ni hi. 
1Kings3:14 Tuaciang na pa David bangin kei thu nong ni a ka thukhamte le ka thupiakte na keamcing le khansauna hong pia tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings3:15 Solomon khanglo a, Pathian in a mang sungah a paupui hunlam phawk hi. Tua zawkciang ama Jerusalem ah pai in Thuciamna Thingkuang mai ah dingin Topa tungah meihal biakpiakna le kipawlkhop biakpiakna vawt hi. Tua zawkciangin a uliante theampo atu anneak poai khat vawt hi." 
1Kings3:16 Ni khat ni in pumpi kizuak numei nii hong pai a, Kumpipa Solomon mai ah amate ii thu teng son uh hi." 
1Kings3:17 Khat sia in, “Kumpipa awng, hi numei le keima sia inn khat sungah teang khawm khu hi, tuaciang keima in ama om sung ma in inn ah nausen pano khat ka nei hi." 
1Kings3:18 Ka nau a sua zawk ni nii ciang ama zongh in nau pano khat nei hi. Koma nii bekma tua inn sungah teang a — kuama dang om ngawl hi. 
1Kings3:19 Tua zawk zan khat ciangin ama in a nau tungah kilumliik tha in, a nau dellum hi." 
1Kings3:20 Ama zan lai in tho a, ka mut lanin ka tapa sia ka pangh pan hong la a, ama ii lupna ah paipui hi; tua zawkciang ama in nausen thisa sia keima ii lupna ah koi hi." 
1Kings3:21 A zing ciang zingsang ka khanlaw ciangin ka nau noai pia tu ka hile a thisa ahi sia ka mu hi. Nausen pha takin ka etcian ciang ka ta ahi ngawl sia ka mu hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings3:22 Ahihang nupi dang khat sia in, “Hi ngawl hi! Nau thisa sia nang aa hi a, a nungta sia kei aa hi!” ci hi. Nupi a pau masa sia in, “Hi ngawl hi! Nau a thi sia nang aa hi a, a nungta sia keima aa hi!” ci kik hi. Tuabangin kumpipa mai ah kinial uh hi." 
1Kings3:23 Tua zawkciang Kumpipa Solomon in, “Na nii uh ma in, nau a nungta sia kei aa hi ci in a thisa sia ahile ama aa hi ci nu hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings3:24 Ama in namsau khat lasak a, hong thet ciang," 
1Kings3:25 ama in, “Nau a nungta sia phalbat in a, nupite a lang veve hawmsak in,” ci hi." 
1Kings3:26 A nu tatak sia in a tapa a itna taw kidim ahikom kumpipa munah, “Kumpipa awng, nong hesuakna in nau sia that heak in! Ama pia in!” ci hi. Ahihang nupi dang khat sia in, “Koma khat zongh hong pia heak in; khen nii ma hong suasak po ta'n,” ci hi." 
1Kings3:27 Tuasia ciang Solomon in, “Nau sia that heak in! Nupi a pau masa sia pia in — ama sia a nu tatak hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings3:28 Israel mipite in Solomon ii thu khenna a zaak uh ciang ama ii tungah zatakna nasia tak nei uh hi, banghang ziam cile tuasia tak ciang ama sia thu kituu te tang takin a khen thei natu Pathian in ciimna pia hi, ci in he uh hi." 
1Kings4:1 Solomon sia Israel ngam bup ii kumpipa hi a," 
1Kings4:2 tuaciang hite sia a uliante ahi uh hi: Thiampi: Zadok ii tapa Azariah 
1Kings4:3 Zum thuzeakpite: Shisha tapate Elihoreph le Ahijah Thu ciamtee pipa: Ahilud tapa Jehoshaphat 
1Kings4:4 Ngalkaphonpi ukpa: Jehoiada tapa Benaiah Thiampite: Zadok le Abiathar 
1Kings4:5 Ngamkhen uk mangte a ukpipa: Nathan tapa Azariah Kumpi thudokpa: Nathan tapa thiampi Zabud 
1Kings4:6 Kumpi inn sung naseamte a ukpa: Ahishar Zawthawk thu taw na a kiseam sakte a ukpa: Abda ii tapa Adoniram ahi hi. 
1Kings4:7 Solomon in Israel ngam sungah ngamkhen uk mangte sawm le nii koi hi. Kumpipa le a bangkua ii kum khat bup a neak tu sia tua mangte khat simin a uk sung ngamkhen tek panin tha sim a banin piasak hi. 
1Kings4:8 Tua ulian sawm le niite le amate ii ukna ngamkhente sia hi bang ahi hi: Benhur: Ephraim mualtung ngam teng 
1Kings4:9 Bendeker: Makaz, Shaalbim, Beth Shemesh, Elon le Beth Hanan khuapite" 
1Kings4:10 Benhesed: Arubboth le Socoh khuapite le Hepher ngam theampo 
1Kings4:11 Solomon tanu Taphath ii pasal Benabinadab: Dor ngamkhen buppi 
1Kings4:12 Ahilud tapa Baana: Taanach le Megiddo khuapite le Jezreel khua thangsang, Beth Shan le Zarethan nai khuate ah a om ngamkhen theampo, Abel Meholah khuapi le Jokmeam khuapi dong" 
1Kings4:13 Bengeber: Gilead ngam Ramoth khuapi, tuaciang Manasseh ii suan ahi Jair ii bee le phung neisa Gilead ah khuanote le Bashan ngamsung Argob ngamkhen, a vekpi in khua lian sawmluk hi a, luphung taw a ki uum le kongpite taau taw a kikalh te" 
1Kings4:14 Iddo tapa Ahinadab: Mahanaim ngamkhen 
1Kings4:15 Solomon ii tanu dang khat Basemath ii pasal Ahimaaz: Naphtali ngam 
1Kings4:16 Hushai tapa Baana: Asher ngamkhen le Bealoth khua 
1Kings4:17 Paruah tapa Jehoshaphat: Issachar ngam 
1Kings4:18 Ela tapa Shimei: Benjamin ngam 
1Kings4:19 Uri tapa Geber: Amor kumpipa Sihon le Bashan kumpipa Og ii a ukna sa Gilead ngamkhen Hi ngam uk sawm le niite ii tungsia ah ngam bup a uk mang khat om hi. 
1Kings4:20 Judah le Israel mite sia tuipivaal a senmal za in tam hi; amate in ne in, dawnin, lungdam uh hi." 
1Kings4:21 Solomon ii kumpi ngam sia Euphrates ngun pan Philistia le Egypt te ngamngi dong ngam theampo kihel hi. Amate in shia pia in, ama nuntak sung tawntung a khutnuai ah om uh hi." 
1Kings4:22 Solomon ii ni sim a tulmawk ante sia, zungtaang vui neal litre 5,000, an litre 10,000," 
1Kings4:23 sangai, saza, sanang le akte bek dom ngawlin, inn ah a kivaak khui sawm, ngam sungah a kitha khui kul le tuu zakhat te ahi uh hi." 
1Kings4:24 Solomon in Euphrates Ngun ii nitumna sang ngam theampo, Tiphsah khua omna Euphrates pan nitumna sang Gaza khuapi dong uk hi. Tuaciang Euphrates ii nitumna sang kumpipate theampo sia ama khutnuai hi a, ngamngi kizawng ngamte theampo taw kilem hi." 
1Kings4:25 Ama nuntak lai tengin Judah le Israel ngamsung a teang mite ngammuangin, innkuan simin a sapitkungte le a thei kungte taw nuamsa uh hi." 
1Kings4:26 Solomon in ngalleang kai siphute atu siphu buk 40,000 le siphu ngalkap 12,000 nei hi." 
1Kings4:27 Ngamuk mang sawm le niite in Solomon le a kumpi inn sungah an ne theampo atu an sia tha simin a piak tu za tek pia uh hi; amate in a kisamh theampo a tawntungin pia uh hi. 
1Kings4:28 Ngamkhen uk mang khat simin a kisamh babang taangpi le taangphawte zongh, ngalsimna siphute le naseam nganhingte an tu sik uh hi." 
1Kings4:29 Pathian in Solomon sia a tuampian ciimna le thuthuk mu theina, a kitee thei ngawl heakna lianpi pia hi." 
1Kings4:30 Solomon sia Nisuana sang a miciimte ahibuale Egypt miciimte sangin ciim zaw hi. 
1Kings4:31 Ama sia mihing a minpiang a ciimbel ahi hi: Ezrah mi Ethan, tuaciang, Mahol ii tate ahi Heman, Calcol le Darda, sangin ciimzaw a, ama ii minthanna sia kiim le paam ngam theampo dongin kizel hi." 
1Kings4:31 Ama sia mihing a minpiang a ciimbel ahi hi: Ezrah mi Ethan, tuaciang, Mahol ii tate ahi Heman, Calcol le Darda, sangin ciimzaw a, ama ii minthanna sia kiim le paam ngam theampo dongin kizel hi." 
1Kings4:32 Ama in paunak 3,000 le la ngui tul vaal phuak hi." 
1Kings4:33 Ama in thingkung le lopate thu thusonin nei a, Lebanon a cedar te pan pang tung a po hyssop te thu dong son thei hi; ama in ngamsate, vacimte, awmtaal nganhingte le ngasate ii thu son hi." 
1Kings4:34 Leitung bup a kumpite in a ciimna za a, a thuson ngai tu in thataak mite paisak uh hi." 
1Kings5:1 Tyre kumpipa Hiram sia David ii lawm khat hi tawntung a, tuaciang Solomon in a pa David ii kumpiza laih zo hi ci in a zaak ciang tongciinte ama kungah paisak hi." 
1Kings5:2 Solomon in Hiram tungah hi kamte thaak kik hi: 
1Kings5:3 “Na heak bangma ka pa David in a kiim a om ngam theampo taw ngal kisim tawntung ahi hu in Topa in a ngalte theampo tungah zawna a piak mateng ama in Topa a Pathian a biak natu biakinn a sa thei bua hi. 
1Kings5:4 Ahihang tu in Topa ka Pathian in ka ngamngi dung theampo ah kilemna hong pia zo hi. Ngal nei nawn ngawl khi hi, tuaciang hong kisim tu zongh lau om ngawl hi." 
1Kings5:5 Topa in ka pa David munah, ‘Nang zawkciang kumpi ka suasak tu na tapa in kei atu biakinn hong saksak tu hi,’ ci in kamciam pia hi. Tuaciang tu in Topa ka Pathian a kibiak natu tua biakinn khat sak tu ka khensat zo hi." 
1Kings5:6 Tua ahikom kei atu Lebanon ah cedar kungte phuk tu in na mite na paisak in. Keima mite zongh amate taw diangkhawm tu a, tuaciang nangma ii khensat babang thaman pia tu khi hi. Na heak bangma, ka mite in thingphuzia sia na mite thiam bangin thiam ngawl hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings5:7 Solomon ii kam thaakte a saan ciang Hiram lungkim mama a, “Ngamlian tuasia uk tu in David a laih tu kumpi tapa ciim khat a piak hu in Topa tu ni in pok vun!” ci hi." 
1Kings5:8 Tua zawkciang Hiram in Solomon munah hi bangin kam thaak hi: “Na kam hong thaak nga khi hi, tuaciang nong nget bangin seam tu kithoai zo khi hi. Cedar thing le taakthing teng hong sik tu khi hi." 
1Kings5:9 Ka mite in thingluangte Lebanon panin tuipi dong hong paipui tu a, tuate sawmkhawm in phong ka vawtsak zawkciang nangma tealna tuipi vaal mun khat ah hong taaisuksak tu khi hi. Tua munah ka mite in phel in, tuaciang na mite in vaipuak la tu hi. Nangma in ka mite nguai an nong piaksak tu ka dei hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings5:10 Tua ahikom Hiram in Solomon sia cedar luang le taak luang a dei za sik hi," 
1Kings5:11 tuaciang, Solomon in Hiram sia kum simin a mite a vaak natu zungtaang taan 2,000 le olive thau thiang litre 400,000 sik hi." 
1Kings5:12 Topa in a kamciam lenin Solomon sia ciimna pia hi. Hiram le Solomon kilaklaw ah kilemna om hi, tuaciang amate ngeal sia khat le khat kihu natu thukimna lai kho khat vawt hi." 
1Kings5:13 Kumpipa Solomon in Israel ngam bup panin zawthawk thu taw a kisawl naseam tu 30,000 khon hi," 
1Kings5:14 tuaciang Adoniram sia tuate uk tu in koi hi. Ama in tua mi teng sia pawlkhat ciang mihing 10,000 veu pawl thum in khen a, Lebanon ah thakhat veu diangsakin, tha nii veu ciasak hi." 
1Kings5:15 Solomon in mualtung ngam ah suang to tu mihing 80,000, tua suangte a pua tu mihing 70,000 nei a," 
1Kings5:16 ama in tuate ii nasep a encik tu in a uk 3300 koi hi. 
1Kings5:17 Solomon ii thupiakna taw Biakinnpi tawdap atu a hoi suangtum liante tosak hi. 
1Kings5:18 Solomon le Hiram ii naseamte le Byblos khuapi pan pasalte in suangtum le thingte Biakinnpi sak natu in pua pha hi. 
1Kings6:1 Israel mite ii Egypt a nusiat zawk kum zali le kum sawmliat zawk, Solomon ii maan zawk kum lina, a tha niina, Ziv tha sungah Solomon in Biakinnpi sak kipan hi." 
1Kings6:2 A sungsang a sauna metre 27 pha a, metre 9 zai in, metre 13.5 saang hi." 
1Kings6:3 A tumna inndoi sia metre 4.5 saangin, a zaina metre 9 hi a, biakinnpi cia ma zai hi." 
1Kings6:4 Biakinnpi ii pangte ah a om a hawngvang te sia a sungsang sangin a puasang ciakzaw hi. 
1Kings6:5 Biakinnpi ii panghte le a nungsangah inn pepna inndawl thum khat sia a pang puasang nealin sa a, dawl khat simin metre 2.2 veu saang hi." 
1Kings6:6 A dawl nuainungbel ii a inndoi khat sim metre 2.2 veu zai a, a dawl laizang sia metre 2.7 zai in, a dawl tungnungbel sia metre 3.1 zai hi. Suatte tungah om biakinn pang sia a nuai suat ah omte sangin pazaw ahiciang a inndoite sia pang sungah suatthal phum kul ngawl a, pang tungah kinga thei hi." 
1Kings6:7 Biakinnpi a sak tatak ciang sek, hei, le thik vanhzakte ii ngin a kizaak ngawl tu in, Biakinnpi sak natu suangtumte sia suangkhuk sungah kivawt khol hi." 
1Kings6:8 Innpi pepna ii a dawl nuainungbel tumna sia Biakinnpi ii thang sangah om a, tua mun panin a dawl niina le a thumna pai natu kealleite kithung hi." 
1Kings6:9 Tuabangin Solomon kumpipa in Biakinnpi a sak man hi. Ama in innciingdap sia cedar thingpheakte le innsunhte taw vawt hi. 
1Kings6:10 Dawl thum a pha inn pepna sia metre 2.2 saang a, inndoi simin Biakinnpi pang pua nung sia neal in kisa a, cedar innsunhte taw kipee-awsak hi." 
1Kings6:11 Topa in Solomon munah," 
1Kings6:12 “Ka thukhamte le ka thupiak te na zui le na pa David tungah sep tu a ka kamciam teng nang atu seam tu khi hi. 
1Kings6:13 Tu a na sak hi Biakinnpi sung, Israel ka mite sungah kong teang tu a, tuaciangin amate ka nusia ngei buatu hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings6:14 Tuabangin Solomon in Biakinnpi a sak man hi. 
1Kings6:15 Biakinnpi sung sang pangte sia suat tung pan innciingdap dong cedar thing pheakte taw kituam a, tuaciang a suat teng taakthing kizangh hi." 
1Kings6:16 A sung sang inndoi khat, Thiangtho belh Mun a kici sia Biakinnpi ii nungsangah kisa hi. Tua sia metre 9 sau in, cedar thingpheak a kilhkhopte taw kidoi a, suat tung panin innciingdap dong phato hi." 
1Kings6:17 Thiangthobel Mun ii mai ah a om inndoi sia metre 18 sau hi. 
1Kings6:18 Cedar thingpheakte sia uum ngate le paak a kikhuak limte taw kizeam hi; a sungsang bup sia cedar thingpheak taw kituam a, tua hu in pangin a kiciang suangte kimu thei ngawl hi." 
1Kings6:19 Biakinnpi nungsangah Topa ii Thuciamna Thingkuang koi natu in inn sungnung inndoi khat kisa hi. 
1Kings6:20 Hi inn sungsang inndoi sia metre 9 sau a, metre 9 zai in, metre 9 saang hi, a buppi in khamh ciitak taw kituam hi. Biaknatau sia cedar thingpheakte taw kituam hi." 
1Kings6:21 Biakinnpi sungsang sia khamh taw kituam a, khamh taw ma a kituam a inndoi sungnung tumna sia khaamtan in khamh kual kipeete kithung hi." 
1Kings6:22 Biakinnpi sungsang buppi khamh taw kituam a, Thiangthobel Mun aa biaknatau sia zongh khamh taw kituam hi." 
1Kings6:23 Meter 4.4 veve a saang Cherub lim nii sia olive thing taw kivawt a, Thiangthobel Mun ah kikoi hi." 
1Kings6:24 Tuate ngeal a letna le a lim a meal kibang hi. Khatsimin tha nii tek nei hi. Tuaciang a thate khat ciang metre 2.2 sau hi, tua ahikom a kiphal a tha dawn khat pan dawn khat dong metre 4.4 pha hi." 
1Kings6:25  
1Kings6:26  
1Kings6:27 Tuate ngeal sia Thiangthobel Mun ah a kicial in kikoi in, a tha kiphalte dawn veve a inndoi laizang santak ah kiphasak a, tuaciang a tha dangte nii in pangte pha uh hi." 
1Kings6:28 Cherub te a nii in khamh taw kituam hi. 
1Kings6:29 A inndoipi pangte le a sungnung inndoi pangte sia a khetkuak cherub te ii limte, palm thingkung limte le paak limte taw kizeam siat hi." 
1Kings6:30 A suat ngawngawn khamh taw kituam hi. 
1Kings6:31 Olive thing taw a kivawt bangkua a kipee nii te sia Thiangthobel Mun tumna ah kikoi hi; a kongbiang tung santak sia a tung zumin a kawn khat hi. 
1Kings6:32 Kongkhate sia cherub lim te, palm thingkung limte le paak limte taw kizeam a, khamh taw kituam hi." 
1Kings6:33 Inndoipi sung tumna kongkhamung sia siik li nei in olive thing taw kivawt hi. 
1Kings6:34 Kongkha kithep thei nii sia taakthing taw kivawt a," 
1Kings6:35 cherub limte, palm thingkung lim le paak lim te taw kizeam hi, tuate sia a kibang kim in khamh taw kituam hi." 
1Kings6:36 Zum sungnung sia Biakinnpi ii mai ah kisa a, pangte taw ki uum in, tuate atu in suang ngual thuap thum simin cedar thingpim ngual khat veu kician nelh hi." 
1Kings6:37 Biakinnpi ii tawdap sia Solomon kumpi maan zawk a kum lina a tha niina Ziv tha sungah kiciang hi. 
1Kings6:38 Solomon ii maan zawk a kum sawm le kum khat a tha liatna Bul tha sung ah, a kingeal bang lianin kiman thiang hi. Solomon atu tuasia a sak na in kum sali hai hi." 
1Kings7:1 Solomon in ama atu zong kumpi inn khat sa si a, kum sawm le kum thum hai hi." 
1Kings7:2 Lebanon Thingtaam Inndoipi sia metre 44 sau a, metre 22 zai in, metre 13.5 saang hi. Cedar khuam sawm le nga veu ngual thum om a, tuate khat sim tungah a kinga zawlliang kithung hi. Innciingdap sia cedar hi a, vanh kholna inndoite tung liap hi, tuate sia khuamte taw kinang hi." 
1Kings7:3  
1Kings7:4 A pangte ngeal ah khelki ngual thum veu om hi. 
1Kings7:5 Tua kongbiangte le a khelkite sia a pangh kikim king li nei veu hi a, tuaciang pang khat sim tungah khelki ngual thumte in a langkhat ngualte maingat hi." 
1Kings7:6 Khuamngual te ii Inndoipi sia metre 22 sau a, metre 13.5 zai hi. A tung siin nei a, khuamte in nang hi." 
1Kings7:7 Kumpi Tokhum omna Inndoi sia Thukhenna Inndoi zongh kici a, Solomon ii a thukhenna mun ahi hi, tuasia suat tung panin tuukpite dong cedar thingpheakte taw kivawt hi." 
1Kings7:8 Solomon teenna inn sia Thukhenna Inndoi ii nungsangah inn dangte sak bangma in kisa hi. A zi, Egypt kumpipa ii tanu atu zongh tua taw kibangin inn saksak hi." 
1Kings7:9 Hi innte theampo le a suum lianpi sia a tawdap pan kipan bitha dong suangphate taw kivawt hi. A suangte sia a suangkhuk ah a pha tu cia kivawt khol a, a sungsang le a puasang panghte sia thingatnam taw kingiamh hi." 
1Kings7:10 A tawdap tu sia suangtum liante taw suangkhuk ah kivawt a, pawlkhat sia metre 3:5, pawlkhat sia metre 4 sau hi." 
1Kings7:11 Tuate ii tungah a phabek tu a at sa suang dangte le cedar thingpim te taw kisa hi. 
1Kings7:12 Kumpi inn suum, Biakinnpi suum sungnung le Biakinnpi tumna inndoite ii pangte sia suang tansa ngual thum simin cedar thingpim ngual khat veu thekin kisa hi." 
1Kings7:13 Solomon kumpipa in taau taw nasep a thiam Tyre khuapi ah a teang, khutthiamna a nei Huram a kici pasal khat sam hi." 
1Kings7:14 A thi zo a pa sia Tyre pan hi a, ama zongh taau taw nasep a thiam khat ma hi; a nu sia Naphtali nam pan ahi hi. Huram sia a pil, khutthiam nasep a seam ngeisa ahi hi. Ama in taau taw nasepna theampo a uk tu in Solomon kumpipa ii sapna a saang hi." 
1Kings7:15 Huram in taau khuampi nii vawt hi, khat simin metre 8 saang a, a kiimkot sia metre 5.3 pha hi, tuate sia Biakinnpi tumna munah koi hi." 
1Kings7:16 Ama in tua khuampite ii tungkhu tu in taau metre 2.2 veve a sau zongh vawt si hi. 
1Kings7:17 Khuampite ii a dawn veve sia thikkhau kipheakte ii lim la in 
1Kings7:18 taau taw a kivawt talee nga lim ngual nii veve taw zongh zeam hi. 
1Kings7:19 A tung khu sia unok paak bangin kivawt in, metre 1.8 sau a," 
1Kings7:20 tuate sia a kawnin a kivawt a tungkhu thikkhau pheak bang ahi sia ii tungah kikoi hi. A tungkhu khat sim ii kiim ah talee nga ngual nii in a kingual pum 200 om hi. 
1Kings7:21 Huram in hi taau khuampite nii sia Biakinnpi tumna mai ah koi hi: a thangsang a sia Jachin ci a, a saksang a sia Boaz kici hi." 
1Kings7:22 Unok paak taw kibang taau tungkhute sia tua khuampite dawn ah kinga hi. Tuabangin khuampite taw kisai nasepna kiman hi. 
1Kings7:23 Huram in tuikuang khat sia a beamin vawt hi, metre 2.2 thuk a, a khuangmai sia metre 4.4 ahi hi, a kiimkot sia metre 13.2 ahi hi." 
1Kings7:24 Tuikuang ii a ngong puasang kiil kiim theampo taau uum nga lim ngual nii om a tuikuang taw sakhat suak in taau kisung hi. 
1Kings7:25 Tuikuang sia a puasang a ngaa, khuital lim sawm le nii te ii nungzaang ah tosak hi, thum veu khen in mun khat sang tek ngaa sak hi." 
1Kings7:26 Tuikuang ii pangh sia millimetre 75 saa hi. A ngong sia hai ngong taw kibang a, a pua sangah paal in, unok paakpalh bang ahi hi. Tua tuikuang sungah litre 40,000 bang taa hi." 
1Kings7:27 Huram in taau taw leang sawm vawt si hi; khat simin metre 1.8 sau a, metre 1.8 zai in, metre 1.3 saang hi." 
1Kings7:28 Tuate sia a paona nei kiing li kikim taau a pheakte taw kivawt a," 
1Kings7:29 tawpi lim, khuital lim le cherub limte tua taaupheakte tungah kingelh hi; a paona mungte tungah a om tawpi le khuital limte ii tung le, a kivial limte om hi." 
1Kings7:30 Leang khat simin taau mui li veu, taau zawlte tungah kibul hi. A leang ii king li simin kuangpui nanna, taau taw a kivawt khuam note om a; tuate sia a kivial limte taw kizeam hi." 
1Kings7:31 Tua tungah kuangpui ngak natu valh kawn khat om hi. Tuasia in leang tungah centimetre 45 dok to a, tuasia sungah centimetre 18 tum suk hi. Tuasia ii kiim ah thing ngelhte kivawt hi." 
1Kings7:32 Leangmuite sia centimetre 66 saang hi; Tuate sia taaupheakte nuai ah om a, a leang zawlte sia a leangte taw sakhat in kivawt hi." 
1Kings7:33 Leangmuite sia siphu ngalleangmuite taw kibang hi; leangzawlte, a mui kiil te le a mui letna ciangte le a mui kamhnate sia taau vive ahi hi." 
1Kings7:34 Leang khat ii a king sim ah a nuai pan a nannate zongh leang taw sa khat ma ahi hi. 
1Kings7:35 Centimetre 22 a beak taau kual khat veu leang khat sim tungah om hi; tua ii nannate le taaupheakte sia leang taw sa khat ahi hi. 
1Kings7:36 A nannate le taaupheakte sia cherubim, tawpite le palm thingkung limte taw a awng napo ah kizeamin, lim a kivialte taw a kiimkot theampo ah kizeam hi." 
1Kings7:37 Tua hi a, hi bangin leangte kivawt hi; tuate khat le khat kibang hi, a phakcia le a pianzia kibang kim hi." 
1Kings7:38 Huram in leang khat atu khat veu kuangpui sawm vawt si hi. Kuangpuite khat sim ii a khuangmai metre 1.8 veu zai a, tuaciang kuang simin litre 800 taa hi." 
1Kings7:39 Ama in leang nga sia Biakinnpi thang sangah koi a, a om lai nga teng saksang ah koi hi; tuikuang sia nisuana thang sang king ah koi hi." 
1Kings7:40 Huram in bealte, leiluana kawkeaute le kuangte zongh vawt hi. Ama in Solomon kumpipa atu in Topa Biakinnpi atu a nasep theampo khuangkhim zo hi. Hi sia ama ii vawt teng ahi hi; Khuampi niite Khuampi dawn ah kuangno taw a kibang khuam tungkhu nii, Khuam tungkhu khat sim tungah a kipheak thikkhau Khuam tungkhu kiimkot ah 100 veu ngual nii in a kisuai, talee nga lim 400 Leang sawmte, Kuangpui sawmte Tuikuang Tuikuang ngakna khuital sawm le nii Bealte, kawkeaute le kuangte Hi Biakinnpi vanh zak tu in Huram ii Solomon kumpipa atu a vawtte sia a kinawt sa taau taw kivawt hi." 
1Kings7:41  
1Kings7:42  
1Kings7:43  
1Kings7:44  
1Kings7:45  
1Kings7:46 Kumpipa in tuate theampo sia Jordan Kuam sung Sukkoth le Zarethan kilaklaw ah a om thikseakna munah vawtsak hi. 
1Kings7:47 Solomon in hi taau vanh te khaitee sak ngawl hi, banghang ziam ci le tam lei ahikom a ngitna kituat ngeingawl hi." 
1Kings7:48 Solomon in Biakinnpi atu khamh vanhzakte zongh vawtsak hi: biaknatau, Pathian tung anluum piakna sabuai," 
1Kings7:49 Thiangthobel Mun ii mai ah a ding meivak khuam sawm, a saksang ah nga, a thang sangah nga a koite; paakte, meiinnte le taiteete;" 
1Kings7:50 haite, taitee, kuangte, meikam toaina bealte; Thiangthobel Mun kongkhate le Biakinnpi puasang kongkhate ii pattaate ahi hi. Hi na zakte theampo sia khamh taw kivawt hi." 
1Kings7:51 Kumpipa Solomon in Biakinnpi tungtaang ah nasep tu teng a man ciangin a pa David ii Topa tungah a aap tuamsa na teng — ngunn, khamh le a dang nate sia biakinn vanh kholna inndoite sungah koi hi." 
1Kings8:1 Tua zawkciang Kumpipa Solomon in Topa ii Thuciamna Thingkuang sia David ii khuapi Zion panin Biakinnpi ah a tua tu in Israel ngamsung namte le, bee le phungte ii lampui theampo Jerusalem ama kungah hong pai tu in sam hi." 
1Kings8:2 Amate teng in Ethanim tha, a tha sali tha Buk Poai hun sungin kikhawmtua uh hi." 
1Kings8:3 A lampuite theampo a kikaikhop zawkciang, thiampite in Thuciamna Thingkuang laamto uh a,"
