1Kings8:4 tuaciang Biakinnpi ah hong pua uh hi. Levi te le thiampite in Topa ii ompuina Puanbuk le tua taw kisai vanh teng zongh Biakinnpi ah khiin uh hi. 
1Kings8:5 Kumpipa Solomon le Israel mite theampo Thuciamna Thingkuang ii mai ah hong kikhawmtua in, khui le tuu tam mama sangaw biakpiakna in nei uh hi — tam lei ahikom kisim zo ngawl hi." 
1Kings8:6 Tua zawkciang thiampite in Thuciamna Thingkuang sia Biakinnpi sungah hong tum pui in, cherub te ii nuai Thiangthobel Mun sungah koi uh hi." 
1Kings8:7 A thakhui kizalhte in thingkuang le a puakna molte siin uh hi. 
1Kings8:8 Thiangthobel Mun ii mai san tak ah a dingte bek in tua molte ii mongte mu thei a, koima dang pan kimu thei ngawl hi. (Molpumte sia tu ni in tua munah om lai hi.)" 
1Kings8:9 Thuciamna Thingkuang sungah, Egypt ngam panin Israel mite a pusua lai in Sinai mual tungah Topa in amate taw thuciamna a vawt ciangin Moses ii koi tua suangpheak nii te simngawl, nadang bangma om ngawl hi." 
1Kings8:10 Thiampite in Biakinnpi a nusiat laitak thakhat thu in tuasia meeikaai taw kidim in," 
1Kings8:11 Topa ii ompuina hu in khuavak taang velvol sia taw kidim a, amate sia a vaipuakte seam tu in pai kik thei nawn ngawl hi." 
1Kings8:12 Tua zawkciang Solomon in thungen hi: “Nang, Topa in van ah ni na koi hi, tua hi napi nang in meeikaai sung le khuazing sungah om tu na teal zo hi." 
1Kings8:13 Tu in a tuanngen biakinn khat nang atu kong saksak zo hi, a tawntungin na ten natu mun ahi hi.”" 
1Kings8:14 Mipite tua munah a din uh ciangin Kumpipa Solomon in amate maingat tu in kihei a, tuaciang ama in mipite atu in Pathian thupha ngetsak hi." 
1Kings8:15 Ama in, “Israel ii Topa Pathian pok vun! Ama in ka pa David tungah hi bangin a ci, a kamciam kholet a," 
1Kings8:16 ‘Egypt ngam panin ka mite ka paipui hun pan kipan, Israel ngam bup sungah kei hong kibiak natu in biakinnpi sak natu khuapi khat zongh ka teal bua hi. Ahihang, ka mite uk tu in David nang kong teal hi,’ ” a ci hi." 
1Kings8:17 Tuaciang Solomon in a thuson zom a, “Ka pa David in Israel ii Topa Pathian a biak natu biakinn khat sak tu ngeal hi," 
1Kings8:18 ahihang Topa in ama munah, ‘Kei atu biakinn na sak nop sia maan ni hi," 
1Kings8:19 ahihang nang in na sa ngei buatu hi. Na tapa, nangma ii tapa tilteal in ka biakinn sa tu hi,’ a ci hi." 
1Kings8:20 “Tu in Topa in a kamciam kholet hi. Israel kumpi suak in ka pa za ka laih zo hi, tuaciang Israel ii Topa Pathian biak natu in Biakinnpi ka sa zo hi." 
1Kings8:21 Egypt ngam panin ih taanghpupite a pusua pui lai in Topa in amate taw thuciamna suangpheak nii a om Thuciamna Thingkuang koi natu mun khat zongh Biakinnpi sungah ka vawtsak hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings8:22 Tuaciang mipite omna biaknatau mai ah Solomon ding a, a khut laamin," 
1Kings8:23 thu ngen hi, “Israel ii Topa Pathian awng, a tungsang vantung ah ahizong, a nuaisang lei tungah ahizong nang taw a kibang pathian om ngawl hi! Na mite taw na thuciamna na kholet a, amate in thin theampo taw na thu hong ni in a nuntak ciangin na itna na lak hi." 
1Kings8:24 Ka pa David tungah na kamciam sia na kholet hi; tu ni in na kammalte theampo taangtung zo hi. 
1Kings8:25 Tuaciang tu in Israel ii Topa Pathian awng, ka pa tungah kamciam na vawt dang khat ahi, ama ii na thu hong nit bangin amate in kidopna taw thuni pole, ama suan le paalte sung pan khat in Israel kumpi in maang tawntung tu hi, na ci sia zongh nong taangtunsak natu thu kong ngen hi." 
1Kings8:26 Tua ahikom tu in Israel ii Pathian awng, na naseampa ka pa David tungah kamciam na piakte theampo zongh taangtungsak in." 
1Kings8:27 “Ahihang, Oh Pathian awng, nang leitung ah teang thei takpi tu ni ziam? Vantung theampo zongh nang hong huam tu in lian tham ngawl hi, tua ahikom hi Biakinnpi kei ii sak sia lian khom thong tu ziam?" 
1Kings8:28 Topa ka Pathian awng, kei sia na naseampa khi hi. Ka thungetna hong za ta'n a, tu ni a kong ngetnate hong pia ta'n." 
1Kings8:29 Hi Biakinnpi, nang hong kibiak natu in na tealsa hi mun sia a sun a zanin na cing in. Hi mun maingat in thu kong nget ciangin hong za ta'n." 
1Kings8:30 Kei ii thungetna le na mite ii hi mun maingat in thu hong nget ciang hong za ta'n. Vantung na inn sung panin hong za ta'n a, kote hong maisak ta'n." 
1Kings8:31 “Mihing khat sia midang khat tungah khial hi ci in a kimawsiat ciangin, a khial ngawlna thu a kilangh natu in kiciamna nei tu in hi Biakinnpi sung na biaknatau ah a kipaipui ciang," 
1Kings8:32 Oh Topa, vantung pan na ngai in a, na naseamte tungah thu hong khen ta'n. A maw sia tungah a kiphu bangin daan na pia in, a maw ngawl sia na tha in." 
1Kings8:33 “Na Israel mite sia nangma tungah hong maw hu in a ngalte in zo hi, tuaciang amate in nang sang hong heak a, kiniamkhiakin maw maisak natu in thu hong ngen le," 
1Kings8:34 vantung panin na ngai in. Na mite ii mawna khialnate maisak in a, tuaciang a taanghpupite tungah na piak ngam le lei ah na ciapui kik in." 
1Kings8:35 Na mite in nang tungah hong maw zo ahi hu in nguatuite na hansak ciang le, amate kisiik in hi Biakinnpi sang nga in kiniamkhiakin thu hong nget ciang," 
1Kings8:36 vantung pan na ngai in. Kumpipa le Israel mite ii mawna khialna te, na maisak in. A maan bang a ngamtat natu amate na hil in. Tuaciang, Oh Topa, na mite ii a tawntung a neisa tu in na piak hi na leitang tungah nguatui na puak in." 
1Kings8:37 “Ngam sungah kialpi, ahibuale natsia tungin, ahibuale ankungte vuisa, ahibuale khaumaw hon in a lalsak ciang, tua ahibuale na mite a ngalte in a sim ciang, tua ahibualaile amate sungah natna satna a om ciang," 
1Kings8:38 amate ii thungetna na ngai in. Israel na mite khat pawpo in thin heena tatak lakin, hi Biakinnpi sangah a khut uh zan in thu hong ngen le," 
1Kings8:39 ama te thungetna za in. Vantung na inn sung panin amate ngetna na ngai in a, a mawna maisak in, na hu in. Nangma bekma in mihing thinsung ngaisutna te he ni hi. Mi simin ama taw a kiphu bangin a tungah na vawt in," 
1Kings8:40 tua hile koma a taanghpupite tungah na piak ngam le lei tungah amate ii teen sung tawntung na thu hong ni tu hi. 
1Kings8:41 “A khuala a om ngamdang mi khat in na minthanna le, na mite atu na lianpi na sepna te za in, hi Biakinnpi ah nangma bia tu hong pai in thu hong ngen le," 
1Kings8:42  
1Kings8:43 a thungetna na ngai in. Vantung na teenna pan za in a, vawtsak tu in hong nget teng vawtsak in, tua hile leitung mite theampo in Israel na mite ii hong heak bangma hong he thei in, na thu hong ni tu uh hi. Tuasia ciang amate in hi Biakinnpi ka sak sia nangma biak natu mun ahi hunlam he tu uh hi." 
1Kings8:44 “A ngalte uh taw kido tu in kuan a, na sawl ciang na mite in nang tungah thu hong ngen a, koisung po ah a om zong na tealsa hi khuapi le nang atu ka sak Biakinnpi te maingat in thu hong nget ciangin" 
1Kings8:45 amate ii thungetna na ngai in. Vantung panin na za in a, zawna na pia in." 
1Kings8:46 “Na mite in khialna vawtin nang hong langpan ciang — a maw ngawl khat zongh om ngawl ahiciang — na thin uukin a, a ngalte in zosak in ngamdang ah thongtaak tu in amate a paipui ciang bangza po in tua ngam sia a khuala ta zong," 
1Kings8:47 na mite ii thungetna ngai in. Tua ngam pan amate kisik kikin na tungah a seksolna le a mawna pualaak in thu hong ngen le, amate thungetna na ngai in, Oh Topa awng." 
1Kings8:48 Tua ngam ah amate in thin tak le thu maan takin kisiik a, ka taanghpupite tungah na piak sa, hi ngam, na tealsa hi khuapi le nang atu ka sak hi Biakinnpi sia maingat in thu hong ngen le," 
1Kings8:49 tuasia ciang amate ii thungetna na ngai in. Vantung na inn sung panin tuate za in a, amate tungah hesuakna na nei in." 
1Kings8:50 Amate ii mawna khialna le hong le do na sia maisak in a, tuaciang a ngalte sia amate tungah dikna na laksak in." 
1Kings8:51 Amate sia na mihingte hi a, tua meiphual lingh na Egypt pan na pusuasakte ahi hi." 
1Kings8:52 “Vaanglianpipa Topa, na Israel mite le a kumpipa tungah maipha na pia tawntung in a, amate in hu ngen in hong sap simin a thungetna uh na za in." 
1Kings8:53 Koma taanghpupite Egypt pan na pusuapui lai in na naseampa Moses tungah na sonsa bangma in mihing theampo sung pan amate sia nangma mi tu in na teal hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings8:54 Solomon in Topa tungah a thunget a man zawkciang khut laamin khupdin a, a om na biaknatau mai pan dingto hi." 
1Kings8:55 Ama in tua munah a kikhawm mite theampo tungah Pathian ii thuphate a tun natu in awnging tak taw ngen hi. Ama in," 
1Kings8:56 Ama mite munah ngal kilemna a piak tu in, a kamciam bangma ngal kilemna hong pia “ Topa pok vun. A naseampa Moses tungtawnin ngo takin a piak kamciam theampo len hi." 
1Kings8:57 Topa ih Pathian in ih taanghpupite taw a omkhop bangin ei taw hong omkhawm tahen; hong nusia ngei heak hen a, hong taisan heak hen;" 
1Kings8:58 ama dei bangin ih nuntak tawntung thei natu le ih taanghpupite tungah a piak thukhamte le thupiakna te theampo ih kepcing thei natu, ama ii thu a ni thei tu in hong vawt tahen." 
1Kings8:59 Topa ih Pathian in ama tungah hi thu ngetna le thuumna ka vawtte a tawntungin hong tepteesak tahen. Israel mite le a kumpipa tungah ni simin a kitaangsap uh bangin ama in hong hesuak tawntung tahen. 
1Kings8:60 Tuabangin leitung minamte theampo in Topa ama bek Pathian hi a — a dang Pathian om ngawl hi ci in he tu uh hi. 
1Kings8:61 No, ama mite in Topa ih Pathian tungah thumaan tawntung vun a, a thukhamte le a thupiakte tu ni a na zui uh bangin zui thei tawntung tavun.”" 
1Kings8:62 Tua zawkciang Kumpipa Solomon le mite theampo in Topa tungah sangaw biakpiakna vawt uh hi. 
1Kings8:63 Ama in khui 22,000 le tuu 120,000 sia kipawlkhop biakpiakna in pia hi. Tuabangin kumpipa le a mite theampo in Biakinnpi aaptuam uh hi." 
1Kings8:64 Tua ni ma in ama in Biakinnpi mai leitual laizang sia, thiangthosak hi, tua munah ama in pum bup a kihal sangaw biakpiaknate, antang biakpiaknate le nganno ii thau te taw kipawlkhop biakpiaknate vawt hi. Ama ii hi bangin a vawtna sia hi biakpiakna theampo atu, taau biaknatau teng sia biakpiak natu in no leih ahihang hi." 
1Kings8:65 Tua mun Biakinnpi ah Solomon le mite theampo in a Buk Poai sia ni sali sung vawt uh hi. Tua munah saksang Hamath Mualciangh pek pan le thangsang Egypt ngamngi pan hong pai mihon tam mama om hi. 
1Kings8:66 A ni liat ni ciang Solomon in mipite ciasak hi. Amate theampo in ama pok a, lungdam in cia uh hi, banghang ziam cile Topa in a naseampa David le a mi Israel te thuphate a piak hu ahi hi." 
1Kings9:1 Solomon kumpipa in Biakinnpi, kumpi inn le a dang a sak nop teng a sak zawkciang," 
1Kings9:2 Gibeon ah Topa a kilaak bangin ama tungah kilaak kik hi. 
1Kings9:3 Topa in ama munah, “Na thungetna hong za zo khi hi. A tawntungin kei hong kibiak natu in na sak, hi Biakinnpi koituam khi hi. Ka encik tu a ka keamcing tawntung tu hi." 
1Kings9:4 Thumaanna le phinciingna taw na pa David ii sep bangin keima ii na seamin, ka thukhamte na zui a, kong thupiak theampo na vawt le," 
1Kings9:5 na pa David tungah kamciam ka piak, Israel sia ama ii suan le paalte in uk tawntung tu hi, ka ci sia ka kholet tu hi." 
1Kings9:6 Ahihang nangma ahibuale na suan na paalte in kei nong zui nawn bua uh a, ka thukhamte le kong thupiakte zui ngawlin pathian dangte na bia uh le," 
1Kings9:7 tuasia ciang ka Israel mite sia ka piaksa ngam panin ka heam tu hi. Kei hong kibiak natu in ka koituam sa, hi Biakinnpi zongh ka nusia tu hi. Mun theampo pan mihingte in Israel sia nunau tu a, simmaw tu hi." 
1Kings9:8 Hi Biakinnpi sia zaanciim in kisengneng tu a, a kaantan in a pai theampo liinglawng tu uh a lamdang sa in, ‘Banghangin Topa in hi ngam le hi Biakinnpi tungah hi bangin ngamta ziam?’ ci in kidongh tu uh hi." 
1Kings9:9 Mihingte in ‘Banghang ziam cile Egypt ngam panin a taanghpupite a pusua, a Pathian a nusiat uh hu hi. Pathian dangte tungah kinga a, a biak hu in Topa in hi tuasiatna amate tungah tungsak hi,’ ci in kizo tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings9:10 Biakinnpi le ama kumpi innte a sak hun kum kul ngei hi. 
1Kings9:11 Tyre kumpipa Hiram in hi nasepna atu a kisamh cedar thing le taakthing teng ahizong, khamh theampo ahizong sik siat hi. Tuasia a kiman zawkciang Solomon kumpipa in Hiram sia Galilee ngamkhen sungah khua kul pia hi." 
1Kings9:12 Hiram pai in a mu ciangin tua khuate dei ngawl hi. 
1Kings9:13 Tua ahikom ama in Solomon munah, “Tua ahile, suapui awng, kei nong piak khuate hi teng ahi ziam!” ci hi. Hi sia hu in tua mun le ngam teng Cabul kici lai hi." 
1Kings9:14 Hiram in Solomon khamh kilogramme tul li vaal pia hi. 
1Kings9:15 Kumpipa Solomon in Biakinnpi sak natu, kumpi inn sak natu le khuapi ii nisuana sang teng lei vuk natu le khuapi luphung cian natu in, zawthawk thu taw a kisawl naseamte zangh hi. Amate in khuapite ahi Hazor, Megiddo, le Gezer khuate saat natu in tuate ma zangh hi." 
1Kings9:16 (Egypt kumpipa in Gezer simin la zo a, a teang khua mite thatin, a khuapi haltum hi. Tua zawkciang tua khuapi sia a tanu le Solomon hong kiteen uh ciang mo thaakna letsong in pia hi." 
1Kings9:17 Tuaciang Solomon in sa kik hi.) Zawthawk thu taw a kisawl naseamte ma zangh a, Solomon in Beth Horon khua Nuainung zongh saat kik hi." 
1Kings9:18 Baalath, Judah duisung ah a om Tamar," 
1Kings9:19 a anneak a vanh zakte kholna khuapite, a siphute le a siphu ngalleangte kholna khuapite, inn a sak nopna dang theampo ah Jerusalem, Lebanon le a uk sung mun dangte sung zongh ah tua naseamte zangh hi." 
1Kings9:20 Solomon in zawthawk thu taw a kisawl nasep seam tu in Israel mite ii a ngam a suan lai in a thalup mong Canaan mite ii suan le paalte zangh uh hi. Hite sungah Amor te, Hit te, Periz te, Hiv te le Jebus te kihel in, tuate ii suan le paalte sia tu ni dong sila ahi uh hi." 
1Kings9:21  
1Kings9:22 Solomon in Israel te sila in a khoai bua hi; amate in a ngalkap no, ngalkap bu, ngalkap uk, siphu ngalleang uk le siphu ngalkap veu seamsak uh hi." 
1Kings9:23 Solomon ii inn sak natu nasep tuatuamte sungah ulian 550 in zawthawk thu taw a kisawl naseamte uk uh hi. 
1Kings9:24 Solomon in a zi, Egypt kumpipa tanu atu a saksak kumpi inn ah David khuapi pan a khiin zawkciang, khuapi ii nisuana sang teng lei vuksak hi." 
1Kings9:25 Kum khat sung thumvei veu Solomon in meihal biakpiakna le kipawlkhop biakpiaknate Topa atu a sak sa biaknatau tungah pia hi. Ama in Topa atu ngimnamtuite zongh hal hi. Tuabangin ama in Biakinnpi sakna man hi. 
1Kings9:26 Solomon in Edom ngam Aqaba Tuidok vaal ah a om Elath taw kinai, Eziongeber ah teambaw honkhat vawt hi." 
1Kings9:27 Kumpipa Hiram in a teambaw naseam thiam sa pawlkhat Solomon mite taw seam khawm tu in puak hi. 
1Kings9:28 Amate in Ophir ngam ah teambaw taw pai in khamh kilogramme 14,000 bang Solomon kungah cia pui uh hi." 
1Kings10:1 Sheba kumpinu in Solomon minthanna za a, tuaciang thudokna haksa pawlkhat taw ama ze et tu in Jerusalem ah haw hi." 
1Kings10:2 Ama in a lalangte honpui khat, hel namtuite, suangmanpha le khamh tam ma a pua kalaoh te hong paipui hi. Ama le Solomon a kisik ciangin a ngaisut thei za taw thu doknate nei hi." 
1Kings10:3 Solomon in tua teng zo thei siat hi; ama a tu zo mawk tu a haksa leih bangma om ngawl hi. 
1Kings10:4 Sheba kumpinu in Solomon ii ciimna za a, kumpi inn a sak sia mu hi." 
1Kings10:5 Kumpinu in kumpipa sabuai ah a kilui ante, a uliante ii teenna innte, kumpi inn sung naseamte ii nasep hawm zia le a puansilhte, poaipi khaam ciang a sabuai ngak naseamte le Biakinnpi sungah a sangaw biakpiaknate mu hi. Ama in husamh liangin lamdang sa hi." 
1Kings10:6 Ama in Kumpipa Solomon munah, “Ka ngam panin na ciimna le nangma thu kong zaakte maan siat hi!" 
1Kings10:7 Ahihang hong pai a keima tatak ma in ka mu mateng ka um thei bua hi. Ahihang a lang zongh za ngawl lai hi nginge khi hi; na ciimna le na hauna te kei tungah hong kiko za sangin nasia zaw lai hi. 
1Kings10:8 Na zite bangza in hampha uh ziam! Na ciimna kammalte hong za tawntung, na kung a om, na naseamte zongh hampha mama hi!" 
1Kings10:9 Topa na Pathian pok in! Ama in nang Israel kumpipa hong suasak ciang nang tungah a lungkimzia ama in lak zo hi. Ama ii Israel te hong itna kip tawntung ahikom, nang sia thukham le thutang khenna na kepcing thei natu in, amate kumpi hong suaksak zo hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings10:10 Ama in Solomon kumpipa tungah letsong hong paipui teng: khamh kilogramme 4,000 vaal, hel namtuite le suangmanpha tam mama pia hi. Tua hel namtui teng sia ama ii vanh saan ngei theampo sung pan a nasiabel ahi hi." 
1Kings10:11 (Ophir panin khamh hong ciapui Hiram ii teambaw te in juniper thing le suangmanpha zongh hong ciapui hi. 
1Kings10:12 Solomon in tua thingte taw Biakinnpi le kumpi inn dalna te, tuaciang music thiamte atu tengtongh le liamlo vawtna in nei hi. Tuate sia Israel ngam sungah a kiciapui ngei juniper thing phabel teng po pan a phabel hi; hi bangte bangma hunin kimu kik ngei nawn ngawl hi.)" 
1Kings10:13 Kumpipa Solomon in Sheba kumpinu sia ngo takin a kipiak ngei letsongte vaalin a nget theampo pia hi. Tua zawkciang ama le a lalangte Sheba ngam ah cia uh hi. 
1Kings10:14 Kum simin Solomon Kumpipa in khamh kilogramme 23,000 dektak nga hi," 
1Kings10:15 tua banah sumvawtte ii shia piakte, sumzuak sumleina tung pan a meet, le Arab kumpite le Israel ngamkhen uk mangte ii piak shia te zongh nga hi." 
1Kings10:16 Solomon in lum a lian 200 vawtsak a, khat simin khamh kilogramme 7 dektak taw veu zeamsak hi." 
1Kings10:17 Ama in lum a no zaw 300 zongh vawtsak a, khamh kilogramme 2 dektak taw veu zeamsak hi. Ama in hi lumte teng Lebanon Thingtaam Inndoipi sungah koisak hi." 
1Kings10:18 Ama in kumpipa tokhum lian khat zongh vawtsak hi. Tuasia ii khen khat sia saiha taw tuam a, a taanglai teng khamh phabel taw tuam hi." 
1Kings10:19 Kumpi tokhum kung thet to natu keallei dawl luk om in, a dawl khat ii mong sim ah tawpi lim khat veu taw a vekpi tawpi lim sawm le nii om hi. Kumpi tokhum ii nungsangah khuital lu ii lim suang a, a khut ngakna baan te nii pangh ah tawpi lim khat veve kivawt hi. Kumpi ngam koima dang ah hi bang kumpi tokhum om ngeingawl hi." 
1Kings10:20  
1Kings10:21 Solomon ii hai theampo khamh taw kivawt hi, tuaciang Lebanon Thingtaam Inndoipi sung a, ankuang ankeau theampo khamh ciitak taw kivawt hi. Solomon hun lai in ngunn sia a manpha in kingaisun ngawl ahikom ngunn kizangh ngawl hi." 
1Kings10:22 Ama in tuipi teambaw hon nei a, Hiram ii teambaw hon taw paikhawmsak hi. Kum thum simin ama teambaw hon sia heak kik in, khamh, ngunn, saiha, zawng te le mei nei ngawl zawngku puite ciapui hi." 
1Kings10:23 Solomon kumpipa sia kumpi dang khat pawpo sangin hau zawin ciim zaw hi," 
1Kings10:24 tuaciang, leitung bup in Pathian ii piaksa ama ii ciim kam pauna te ngai tu in hong pai nuam uh hi." 
1Kings10:25 Hong pai peuma in ama letsong khat veu — ngunn le khamh taw a kivawt nate, puantualte, ngalhiam te, hel namtuite, siphute le laate puak hi. Kum khat zawk kum khat tuabangin kipia tan hi." 
1Kings10:26 Solomon in siphu ngalleang 1,400, ngalsim siphu 12,000 nei hi. Tuate pawlkhat Jerusalem ah koi a, a dang teng khuapi dang ah koi kawkoai hi." 
1Kings10:27 Ama ii uk hun sungin ngunn sia suang bangma in Jerusalem khua sungah om a, cedar sia sycomore thing thawthong za in Judah mualpeangte ah tam hi." 
1Kings10:28 Kumpipa ii taang mite in Musri le Cilicia pan ngamdang a puak tu siphute," 
1Kings10:29 tuaciang Egypt pan ngamdang a puak tu siphu ngalleangte saisak uh hi. Amate in Hit mite le Syria kumpipate atu, siphu le siphu ngalleangte vaihawmsak in, siphu ngalleang khat ciang ngunntang 600, siphu khat ngunntang 150 taw zuak uh hi." 
1Kings11:1 Solomon in ngamdang numeite tam ma it hi. Egypt kumpipa ii tanu bek hi ngawl, Hit, Moab, Ammon, Edom le Sidon pan numeite teenpui hi." 
1Kings11:2 Topa in Israel te sia hi mite taw a kiteen ngawl natu thupia hi, banghang ziam cile tua mite in Israel mite sia pathian dangte tungah thumaan zaw tu ahi hang hi, tua hi napi ama in amate teenpui hi." 
1Kings11:3 Solomon in kumpi tanute 700 teenpui a, zino 300 nei si hi. Amate in Solomon sia Pathian nung ngat in omsak hi," 
1Kings11:4 tuaciang a khanhaam hun ciangin amate in ngamdang pathiante biakna sungah tumpui hi. Ama in Topa a Pathian tungah a pa David ii thumaan bangza in thumaan ngawl hi. 
1Kings11:5 Ama in Sidon te ii numeipathian Astarte, tuaciang Ammon te ii a thasiathuai pathian Molech bia hi." 
1Kings11:6 A pa David bang hi ngawl a, ama in Topa tungah khialin a tungah thumaan ngawl hi." 
1Kings11:7 Jerusalem nisuana sang mual tungah Moab te ii a thasiathuai pathian Chemosh biak natu mun khat, tuaciang Ammon te ii a thasiathuai pathian Molech biak natu mun vawt hi." 
1Kings11:8 A ngamdang zite ii ngimnamtui a hal natu le sangaw biakpiaknate amate tek ii pathiante tungah a nei thei natu in biakna munte zongh vawtsak hi. 
1Kings11:9 Topa, Israel te ii Pathian in niivei tak Solomon tungah kilaak a, ngamdang pathiante a biak ngawl natu thupia hikale Topa thu ni ngawlin nungngat hi. Tua ahikom Topa sia Solomon tungah thin uuk a," 
1Kings11:10  
1Kings11:11 ama tungah, “Nang sia kei taw na thuciamna palsat kaltang in, ka thupiakte zui ngawl na hikom na kumpi ngam kong laaksak tu a, na uliante khat pia tu in ka kamciam om hi." 
1Kings11:12 Ahihang na pa David ka khualna in hisia na nuntak sungin ka vawt buatu a, na tapa ii uk hun sungin piang tu hi." 
1Kings11:13 Tuaciang ama ii kumpi ngam bup ka la buatu hi; ama atu sia ka naseampa David le keima atu ka vawtsa Jerusalem khuapi ka khualna in minam khat ka nusiat zaw tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings11:14 Tua ahikom Topa in Edom kumpi bangkua pan Hadad sia Solomon langpansak hi. 
1Kings11:15 Hi hun ma pek in, David in Edom a zawthal lai in, a ngalkaphonpi ukpa Joab sia tua munah a thite ii luang phum tu in pai zo hi. Ama le a mite Edom ah tha luk a taam hun sungin Edom mite pa a minpiang," 
1Kings11:16  
1Kings11:17 Hadad le a pa ii naseam Edom mi pawlkhat Egypt ngam zuan in a suakta teng simngawl thatlum siat hi. (Tua hun lai in Hadad sia patangno khat hi pheang hi.) 
1Kings11:18 Amate in Midian nusia in Paran ah pai a, tua munah mi pawlkhat in amate pawm hi. Tua zawkciang amate Egypt ngam ah khualhaw in, kumpipa kung a pai ciang Hadad sia leitang pawlkhat le inn khat pia hi, tuaciang anvaak hi." 
1Kings11:19 Hadad sia kumpipa in pawl vawt a, kumpipa in a nuphal nu, Kumpinu Tahpenes ii suapuinu sia Hadad ii zi tu in pia hi." 
1Kings11:20 Tua nu in Hadad taw tapa khat hing in, a min Genubath hi a, ama sia kumpinu in kumpi inn sungah khangsak a, kumpipa tapate taw teang khawm hi." 
1Kings11:21 David ii thina le ngalkaphonpi ukpa Joab ii thina thu Egypt ah Hadad in a zaak ciang Hadad in kumpipa munah, “Ka ngam ah hong cia kiksak ta'n,” ci in ngen hi." 
1Kings11:22 Kumpipa in, “Banghangin maw? Kong piak tu khat po kong piak ngawl om ziam? Tua hu in cia kik nuam ni ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Hadad in, “Hong ciasak lel po ta'n,” ci in kumpipa tungah zo hi. Tuaciang a ngam ah ama ciakik hi. Edom kumpipa a hina taw ama sia Israel te atu a ngilo a ngal cipha khat ahi hi." 
1Kings11:23 Pathian in Eliada ii tapa Rezon zongh Solomon a langpan tu in vawt hi. Rezon sia a topa Zobah kumpipa Hadadezer kung pan tai a," 
1Kings11:24 tuaciang ama sia thukham nei ngawl mihing tatsia pawlkhat ii lampui suak hi. (Hisia David ii Hadadezer a zaw zawk, a kipawlpui Syria te a thalup zawkciang ahi hi.) Rezon le a mite Damascus ah pai in tua munah teang uh hi, tua munah a mite in ama Syria kumpi suaksak uh hi." 
1Kings11:25 Ama sia Solomon khan sung Israel te ii ngal ahi hi. 
1Kings11:26 Solomon kumpi a langpan midang khat sia a uliante khat ahi Jeroboam hi a, Ephraim ngam Zeredah pan Nebat ii tapa hi. A nu sia meingong khat hi a Zeruah hi." 
1Kings11:27 Hisia tualngal thawna taanghthu hi. Solomon sia Jerusalem ii nisuana sangah lei dimh in, khuapi luphungte pua hi." 
1Kings11:28 Solomon in Jeroboam sia a kiveakseak nasep hanciam khangno khat hi ci in a mu ciang Manasseh le Ephraim ngamsung om zawthawk thu taw a kisawl naseam theampo uksak hi. 
1Kings11:29 Ni khat ni in Jeroboam sia Jerusalem pan khualhaw in a pai laitak ama nguak hong pai Shiloh pan kamsaang pa Ahijah taw, ngam taanzauna khat lampi tungah kisi uh hi." 
1Kings11:30 Ahijah in a puantual thak silh lai sia suutin, khen sawm le khen nii sua in eautham hi," 
1Kings11:31 tuaciang, Jeroboam munah, “Puanbek sawm nangma la in, banghang ziam cile Topa, Israel ii Pathian in nangma tungah, ‘Keima in Solomon khut sung pan kumpi ngam ka la tu a, nang sia mi nam sawm hong pia tu khi hi." 
1Kings11:32 Ka naseampa David le Israel ngam bup sung pan ka khuapi tu ka tealsa Jerusalem ka khualna in, Solomon in nam khat keam lai tu hi." 
1Kings11:33 Hi bangin seam tu khi hi, banghang ziam cile Solomon in kei hong nial in ngamdang pathiante: Sidon te ii numeipathian Astarte;, Moab te ii pathian Chemosh; Ammon te ii pathian Molech te bia hi. Solomon in ka thu hong ni ngawl hi; ama in khialna vawt zo hi, a pa David ii a zui bangin ka thukhamte le ka thupiakte zui ngawl hi." 
1Kings11:34 Ahihang Solomon tung pan kumpi ngam bup la ngawl tu khi hi, a nuntak lai teng vaang nei in ka koi tu hi. Ka teal pa, ka thukhamte le ka thupiakte hong zui ka naseampa David ii hu in hi bangin vawt tu khi hi." 
1Kings11:35 Solomon ii tapa tung pan kumpi ngam laaksak in no minam sawmte hong pia tu khi hi," 
1Kings11:36 ahihang Solomon ii tapa in nam khat ka keamsak tu hi, tuasia ciang ka naseampa David ii suan khat in kei hong kibiakna munin ka tealsa khuapi, Jerusalem panin a uk tawntung tu hi." 
1Kings11:37 Jeroboam awng, nang sia Israel kumpipa hong suaksak tu khi hi, tuaciang ngam na dei zaza na uk tu hi." 
1Kings11:38 ka thu a cing takin nong ni a, ka thukhamte taw nungta in, ka thupiak sia David ii hong nit bangin nong ni le nang taw kong omkhawm tawntung tu hi. Israel kumpipa kong suaksak tu a na suan le na paalte in nang zawkciang, David a tu ka vawt bangma in, ka uksak tu hi." 
1Kings11:39 Solomon ii mawna hu in David ii suan le paalte daan ka pia tu hi, ahihang a tawntung hi ngawl tu hi, hong ci hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings11:40 Tua ahikom Solomon in Jeroboam thalup tu in hanciam ahihang Egypt kumpipa Shishak bealh in tua munah Solomon ii thi dong om hi. 
1Kings11:41 Solomon ii sep le vawt dang teng theampo, a nuntak sung a sepna le a ciimna teng Solomon ii Taanghthu sungah kikhum siat hi." 
1Kings11:42 Ama in Jerusalem ah Israel bup uk in kum 40 kumpi seam hi. 
1Kings11:43 Ama thi a, David Khuapi sungah kiphum hi, tuaciang a tapa Rehoboam in ama ii kumpi za laih hi." 
1Kings12:1 Rehoboam sia Shechem ah pai a, tua munah Israel saksang mite theampo in ama kumpi suaksak tu in kikhawm uh hi." 
1Kings12:2 Solomon kumpipa khut sung pan suakta tu in Egypt ngam ah a tai Nebat ii tapa Jeroboam in hi thu za a, Egypt ngam panin ama cia kik hi." 
1Kings12:3 Saksang namte sung pan mite in ama samsak hi, tua zawkciang amate theampo Rehoboam kungah pai in ama tungah," 
1Kings12:4 “Na pa Solomon in ko hong siat vawt a, vanhngit pi hong suan hi. Hi vanhngitte nong zaangsak a, nuntakna a ol zawhiat tu in nong vawt le ko sia a thumaan na uk sung mite hi tu khu hi,” ci uh hi." 
1Kings12:5 “Ni thum zawkciang hong pai kik tavun, hong zo kik tu khi hi,” ci in ama in zo hi. Tua ahikom amate in nusia hi." 
1Kings12:6 Kumpipa Rehoboam in a pa Solomon ii thudok uhaamzawte dongh hi. Ama in, “Hi mite tungah bangbangin zo tu khi ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
1Kings12:7 Amate in, “Hi mite atu a pha in a na na sepsak nuam le amate ii hong ngetnate tungtaang ah zawp in, tua hile amate in thumaan takin nang na hong sepsak tawntung tu hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
1Kings12:8 Ahihang ama in uhaamzawte ii ngaisut piakna sia melsia a, ama taw a khangkhawm, tu in a thudokin a koi khangmoite kungah pai zaw hi." 
1Kings12:9 Ama in, “Ka ngamtat natu in bangbangin ngaisutna hong pia tu nu ziam? A vanhngit uh zaangsak zaw tu in hong ngen mite tungah bangbangin ci tu khi ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
1Kings12:10 Amate in, “Amate tungah hi bangin ci in: ‘Ka khutme nobel sia ka pa kawng sangin lian zaw hi!’" 
1Kings12:11 Amate tungah, ‘Ka pa in no, vanhngit hong suan hi; keima in tua sangin ngitsak zaw lai tu khi hi. Ama in khauhual kibul ciang taw hong saat hi; kei ka hi le siphu saatna taw hong vel tu khi hi va ci ta'n!’ ” ci in zo kik hi." 
1Kings12:12 Ni thum zawkciang Jeroboam le mipite theampo Kumpipa Rehoboam kungah ama ii sawl bangin hong heak kik uh hi. 
1Kings12:13 Kumpipa in uhaamzawte ii ngaisutna piakte melsia in tua mite tungah," 
1Kings12:14 khangmoite ii ngaisut piak bangin aw ham taw pau hi. Ama in, “Ka pa in no vanhngit hong suan hi; tuate sangin a ngit zaw lai in ka vawt tu hi. Ama in khauhual kibul ciang taw hong saat hi; kei ka hile siphu velna taw kong vel tu hi!” ci hi." 
1Kings12:15 Shiloh panin kamsaang Ahijah tungtawn a, Nebat tapa Jeroboam tungah a sonsa, Topa ii deina sia a taangtun natu in a pau ahi hi. Hisia hu in kumpipa in mipite bangma thudon ngawl hi." 
1Kings12:16 Mipite in kumpipa ii a thudon ngawl a mu uh ciang in amate au hi. David le a innkuante kiamsuk tahen! Ei atu amate in bang hong vawtsak ngei na ziam? Israel mite awng, cia lel tawng! Rehoboam sia ama le ama kikeam tahen!” ci uh hi. Tua ahikom Israel mite tualngal tho a," 
1Kings12:17 Rehoboam sia Judah ngam khen sungah a teang mite bek ii kumpipa tu in nusia uh hi. 
1Kings12:18 Tua zawkciang Kumpipa Rehoboam in zawthawk thu taw a kisawl naseamte a uk Adoniram samin Israel te kungah paisak hi, ahihang amate in Adoniram suang taw deanglum uh hi. Tuasia ciang Rehoboam sia a siphu ngalleang tungah manlang takin kaato a, Jerusalem khua ah suakta hi." 
1Kings12:19 Tua hun pan kipan Israel saksang kumpi ngammite in David ii kumpi nam sia leedo tan uh hi. 
1Kings12:20 Israel mite in Jeroboam sia Egypt pan hong ciakik zo ci in a zaak uh ciang, amate in mipite kikhopna khat ah sam in, Israel kumpipa suaksak hi. Judah nam bek David ii suan le paalte tungah thumaan lai uh hi." 
1Kings12:21 Rehoboam sia Jerusalem khua a thet ciangin ama in Judah nam le Benjamin namte sung pan ngalkap phabel 180,000 sam hi. Ama in saksang Israel namte simin uk kik sawm hi." 
1Kings12:22 Ahihang Pathian in kamsaang pa Shemaiah kungah," 
1Kings12:23 Rehoboam, Judah le Benjamin namte theampo tungah hi thu puakin sawl hi:" 
1Kings12:24 “Na suapui tilteal ahi Israel mite sim heak vun. Na vekpi inn ah cia kik vun. Thu piang sa sia keima ii deina hi,” cisak hi. Amate in Topa ii thupiakna mang siat in inn ah cia kik uh hi." 
1Kings12:25 Israel kumpipa Jeroboam in Ephraim mualtung ngam ah Shechem khua kulh taw uumin tua munah tawmvei teang hi. Tua zawkciang ama in tua mun nusia in Penuel khua ah kulh vawt hi. 
1Kings12:26 Ama le ama hi bangin kici hi, “Tu a thu omzia bangin ka mite Jerusalem khua ah pai in Topa atu sangaw biakpiaknate tua mun Biakinnpi sungah vawt thong le amate in Judah kumpipa Rehoboam panpui leleau tu a, kei hong that tu hi.”" 
1Kings12:27  
1Kings12:28 Khua a ngai susut zawkciang ama in khamh khuital no nii ii lim vawtin a mite tungah, “Biakna vawt tu in Jerusalem ah na pai zawk uh ngei zo hi. Israel mite awng, hi sungah Egypt pan hong pusuasak na pathiante om hi!” ci hi." 
1Kings12:29 Ama in a khamh khuital note khat Bethel ah koi a, khat sia Dan ah koi hi." 
1Kings12:30 Tuabangin mipite in biakpiakna pia tu in Bethel le Dan ah a pai hu in maw uh hi. 
1Kings12:31 Jeroboam in mualdawnte ah biak natu munte zongh vawtin, Levi nam ahi ngawl innkuante sung panin thiampite teal hi." 
1Kings12:32 Judah poaipi taw kibangin Jeroboam in biakna poaipi khat zongh tha liat tha, ni sawm le ni nga ni in phuan hi. Ama in Bethel biaknatau tungah a khamh khuitalno a vawtte a tu in biakpiaknate pia a, ama saksa Bethel biakna tu munte ah a seam tu in thiampite koi hi." 
1Kings12:33 Tuaciang tha liatna ni sawm le ni nga ni, ama ii see ni in, ama Bethel ah pai a. Israel te atu ama ii phot tawm poai khaamsak in biaknatau tungah sangaw biakpiakna khat pia hi." 
1Kings13:1 Topa ii sawlna taw Judah panin kamsaang khat Bethel ah hong pai a, sangaw biakpiakna pia tu in Jeroboam biaknatau mai ah hong din laitak hong theng hi." 
1Kings13:2 Topa ii sawlna zui in kamsaangpa in biaknatau sia siat son hi: “Oh biaknatau, biaknatau awng, hisia Topa ii pauna hi: David ii bangkua sungah Josiah a kici nausen khat hong piang tu hi. Ama in doai biaknataute tungah seam in nang tungah sangaw biakpiakna a vawt thiampite nangma tungah that tu a, mihing ngute nang tungah hal tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings13:3 Tuaciang kamsaang pa in a ci lai na pan, “Hi biaknatau sia cimhtham tu a, a tungah vutte kithezau tu hi. Tuasia ciang Pathian in kei tungtawn a hong pau zo hi ci in na he tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings13:4 Kumpipa Jeroboam in hi thu a zaak ciang ama kawkin thupia hi: “Pasal ziasia man vun!” Thakhat thu in kumpipa ii baan zaw a, dok kik thei nawn ngawl hi." 
1Kings13:5 Thakhat thu in biaknatau sia cimhtham a, Topa min taw kamsaang pa ii sonkhol bangma in vutte lei ah kithezau hi." 
1Kings13:6 Kumpipa Jeroboam in kamsaangpa munah, “Ka khut hong damsak natu in Topa na Pathian tungah nong hesuak na in thu hong ngetsak ta'n!” ci hi. Kamsaang pa in Topa tungah thu a nget le kumpipa baan dam hi." 
1Kings13:7 Tuasia ciang kumpipa in kamsaangpa munah, “Kei taw cia khawm in bang khat po ne tawng. Na sepsa te hu in thaman hong pia tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings13:8 Kamsaangpa in, “Na hauna a lang keak nong pia hial tu ahizong nang taw paikhawm ngawl tu khi hi, ahibuale zong nang taw bangma ne ngawl dawn ngawl tu khi hi," 
1Kings13:9 Topa in bangma ne ngawl dawn ngawl tu in thu hong pia a, kong paina lampi tawnin a ciakik ngawl tu in hong sawl hi,” ci in zo hi." 
1Kings13:10 Tua ahikom ama in a paina lampi pan ciakik ngawlin lampi dang khat tawn hi. 
1Kings13:11 Tua hun laitakin Bethel ah a teang kamsaang pasal huai khat om hi. A tapate hong pai a Judah pan a kamsaang khat ii Bethel ah a ngamtatna teng le Jeroboam kumpipa tungah a pauna teng ama munah son hi. 
1Kings13:12 “A heakkik ciangin koisung tawn ziam” ci in kamsaang huaipa in amate dongh hi. Amate in a lampi lak a," 
1Kings13:13 tuaciang amate in a laa kungh thuasak in sawl hi. Amate in a sawl bang a vawt zawk uh ciang ama sia laa tungah to in pai a," 
1Kings13:14 Judah panin kamsaang pa ii nung pan a zui le oak thingkung nuai khat ah a to mu hi. “Nang Judah pan a kamsaangpa na hi ziam?” ci in dongh hi. “Hi khi hi,” ci in pasalpa in zo hi." 
1Kings13:15 Ama in, “Inn ah cia in, kei taw an nekhawm tawng,” ci hi." 
1Kings13:16 Ahihang Judah panin kamsaangpa in “Nang taw cia khawmin nong zindo nopna hong saang zo ngawl tu khi hi, tuaciang hilai ah nang taw bangma nekhawm ngawl tu khi hi," 
1Kings13:17 banghang ziam cile Topa in bangma ka neak ka dawn ngawl natu le ka paina lam tawnin ka cia kik ngawl natu thu hong pia hi,” ci in zo hi." 
1Kings13:18 Tuasia ciang Bethel pan kamsaang huai pa in ama munah, “Kei zongh nangma bangma kamsaang khat khi hi, tuaciang Topa ii sawlna taw vantunglalang khat in nang sia inn ah ciapui in zindo in hong sawl hi,” ci hi. Ahihang kamsaang huai pa sia leilot thu son ahi hi." 
1Kings13:19 Tua ahikom Judah pan kamsaangpa sia kamsaang huaipa taw ciakhawm in ama taw an nekhawm hi. 
1Kings13:20 Sabuai ah an ne in a to laitak Topa kammal sia kamsaang huai pa tungah hong theng hi," 
1Kings13:21 tuaciang ama in tua Judah kamsaang pa tungah, “ Topa in ama ii thu ni ngawlin, a thupiak bang seam ngawl hi hong ci hi." 
1Kings13:22 Tua taangin na heakkik a, an ne ngawl a hong sawlna munah tumin an na ne hi. Hi sia hangin nang sia thalup na thuak tu a, na luang sia na innkuan thaan ah kivui ngawl tu hi,” ci in au hi." 
1Kings13:23 Anneak zawkciang kamsaang huai pa in Judah pan kamsaangpa atu a laa kungh thuasak a," 
1Kings13:24 ama sia laa tungah tosak hi. Lampi ah tawpi khat taw kisi a, tawpi in ama thatlum hi. A luang sia lampi tungah kisial a, a laa le tawpi te sia a luang hui ah ding uh hi." 
1Kings13:25 Mihing pawlkhat in tua mun hong kaantan a, lampi tungah a luang mu uh hi, tawpi sia a kungah dingin om hi. Amate sia Bethel ah paisuak in, amate ii mu teng son hi." 
1Kings13:26 Kamsaang huai pa in tua thu a zaak ciang, ama in, “Tuasia Topa ii thupiakna a ni ngawl kamsaang pa hi! Tua ahikom Topa in ama a that tu in tawpi paisak hi, Topa ii ka vawt tu a ci bangma in kivawt hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings13:27 Tuasia zawkciang a tapate munah, “Ka laa kungh hong thuasak tavun,” ci hi. Amate in tuabangin seam uh a," 
1Kings13:28 tuaciang ama laa tungah to in a pai le kamsaang pa ii luang lampi ah kisial in mu hi, laa le tawpi zongh a kungah dingkhawm nginge lai hi. Tawpi in mithi luang le ne ngawl a, laa zongh bangma law ngawl hi." 
1Kings13:29 Tua tungtangin a khuangai natu le a phum natu in kamsaang huai pa in a luang phaam a, laa tungah suanin Bethel ah ciapui hi." 
1Kings13:30 Ama in a innkuan thaan ah phum a, tuaciang ama le a tapate khuangai in, “Oh, ka suapui, ka suapui awng!” ci hi." 
1Kings13:31 A phum zawk uh ciang, kamsaangpa in a tapate munah, “Ka thi ciangin hi thaan sungah ama ii luang hui ah hong phum tavun." 
1Kings13:32 Topa ii thupiakna taw Bethel ah biaknatau le Samaria khuate sungah a biakna munte langpanin a pau teng sia tung takpi tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings13:33 Israel kumpipa Jeroboam in ama tatsiatnate kheal tuan ngawl a, ama saksa biaknataute ah thiampi seam tute sia bangkua thawthongte panin teal lai hi. Ama in thiampi a uuk pawpo thiampi in koi hi." 
1Kings13:34 Hi mawna in siatna le ama ii kinguizui kumpi ukna a bo cimitna suak hi. 
1Kings14:1 Tua hun laitakin Kumpipa Jeroboam ii tapa Abijah a ciina hi. 
1Kings14:2 Jeroboam in a zi munah, “Nangma le nangma, kuama ii hong tel ngawl natu in kimealseal in a, kei sia Israel kumpipa suak tu hong ci, Shiloh a teang kamsaangpa Ahijah kungah va pai ta'n." 
1Kings14:3 Anluum luum sawm, moh pawlkhat le khuaitui thawl khat va puak ta'n. Ih tapa bang suak tu ziam ama munah dongh ta'n, hong son tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings14:4 Tua ahikom ama Shiloh khua Ahijah inn ah pai hi. Khanghaam zo ahikom Ahijah sia a mittaw hi. 
1Kings14:5 A tapa ciina sia huvau dongh tu in Jeroboam ii zi sia ama kungah a pai tu hunlam Topa in son zo hi. Tuaciang Topa in Ahijah ii pau natu teng hil zo hi. Jeroboam ii zi hong thet ciangin, ama sia ngualdang khat bangin hong kivawt tawm hi." 
1Kings14:6 Ahihang Ahijah in ama ii bangkua sung sangah hong tum a zaak ciang, “Hong tum ta'n, Jeroboam ii zi na hi sia hong he khi hi. Midang khat bangin banghangin kithoai ni ziam? Nang atu thupha ngawl kong son tu nei khi hi." 
1Kings14:7 Pai in a Jeroboam munah va son ta'n, Israel ii Pathian Topa in ama tungah hi bangin ci hi: ‘Mite sung pan nang kong teal a, ka Israel mite uk pa in kong koi hi." 
1Kings14:8 David suan le paalte khut sung panin kumpi ngam ka lakeak a, nang kong pia hi. Ahihang nang sia ka naseampa David bang na hi bua hi, ama sia kei tungah hong thumaan tinten a, ka thupiakte ni in, ka thukim teng bek seam hi." 
1Kings14:9 Nang in na mai a ngamukte sangin mawna lianzawte na vawt hi. Nang in kei nong nial a, tuaciang ka thin uuk natu in milimte vawtin thik milimte na biak tu in na vawt hi." 
1Kings14:10 Hi sia hu in na kumpi khang zui in tuasiatna kong tungsak tu a, tuaciang na suan na paal sung panin pa a minpiang a moi a haam a kibangin ka thatlum siat tu hi. Na bangkua kong heam tu a; eak bangin kiphiat keak tu hi." 
1Kings14:11 Khuapi sungah a thi na innkuanpuite sa sia ui in ne tu a, ngam taanzauna a thite sa sia vaciik in ne tu hi. Keima, Topa in pau zo khi hi,’ ” ci hi." 
1Kings14:12 Tuaciang Ahijah in Jeroboam ii zi tungah a ci lai na pan, “Tu in inn ah cia ta'n. Khua sung na tum po ciangin na tapa thi tu hi." 
1Kings14:13 Israel mi bup in ama atu khuangaina lakin phum tu hi. Jeroboam bangkua sung pan ama bekma pha takin kivui tu hi, banghang ziam cile ama ii tung bekma ah Israel ii Pathian Topa lungkim hi." 
1Kings14:14 Topa in Israel te tungah kumpi khat koi tu a, ama in Jeroboam ii kumpi khangngui sia bosak tu hi." 
1Kings14:15 Topa in Israel daan pia tu a, tuaciang lui sungah pumpate bangin ngawk tu hi. A taanghpupite tungah a piaksa hi leitang phate tung panin ama in Israel mite zunglok tu a, Euphrates ngun kalhin thethaang tu hi, banghang ziam cile amate in Asherah numeipathian sia ii limte a vawt hu in ama a thin uuksak hi." 
1Kings14:16 Topa in Israel taisan tu hi banghang ziam cile Jeroboam in mawna vawt a, Israel mite mawna sungah lampui hi.”" 
1Kings14:17 Jeroboam ii zi sia Tirzah ah ciakik hi. A inn sung a tum bek lian ciangin a tapa thi hi. 
1Kings14:18 A naseam pa, kamsaangpa Ahijah tungah Topa ii sonkhol bangma in Israel mite ama atu khuangai in phum hi." 
1Kings14:19 Jeroboam ii sep le vawt a dang theampo, a ngal dona ahizong a uk zia ahizong Israel kumpite ii Taanghthu sungah kikhum hi." 
1Kings14:20 Jeroboam in kum 22 sung kumpi in maang hi. Ama thi in kiphum a, a tapa Nadab in a kumpi za laih hi." 
1Kings14:21 Solomon ii tapa Rehoboam sia Judah kumpipa a sua lai in, kum 41 pha hi, tuaciang Israel ngam bup sungah Topa a kibiak natu mun Topa ii tealsa Jerusalem khuapi pan kum sawm le kum sali uk hi. Rehoboam ii nu sia Ammon panin Naamah ahi hi." 
1Kings14:22 Judah mite in Topa tungah maw a, ama thin uuk natu in a taanghpupite theampo ii vawt sangin a tamzaw in vawt uh hi." 
1Kings14:23 Amate in pathian theamte biak natu in biakna munte vawt a, mualtung le thinglim nuaite ah biak tu in Asherah limte le suangkhuamte phut uh hi." 
1Kings14:24 A siatbelna sia, tua doai biakna munte ah numeite le pasalte sia pumpi zuakin om uh hi. Israel mite ii tua ngamsung a zot uh lai in Topa ii a nawkeak mite ii a maizumhuai ngamtatnate ma Judah mite in ngamtatna in nei uh hi." 
1Kings14:25 Rehoboam ii uk zawk a kum ngana ciangin Egypt kumpipa Shishak in Jerusalem sim hi. 
1Kings14:26 Ama in Biakinnpi sung le kumpi inn sung a sumngum theampo la siat hi, tuate sungah Solomon ii vawt sa khamh lumte zongh kihel hi." 
1Kings14:27 Tuate taangin Kumpipa Rehoboam in taau lumte vawt a, kumpi inn kongkhacing uliante tungah a kepcing tu in aap hi." 
1Kings14:28 Kumpipa Biakinnpi ah a pai simin a cingte in tua lumte paipui in, tua zawkciang a cingte omna inndoi ah ciapui kik uh hi." 
1Kings14:29 Kumpipa Rehoboam ii sep le vawt dangte theampo sia Judah Kumpite Taanghthu sungah kikhum hi. 
1Kings14:30 Hi hunte theampo sungah Rehoboam le Jeroboam sia a tawntungin khat le khat kido uh hi. 
1Kings14:31 Rehoboam thi a, David Khuapi sung kumpi thaan ah kiphumin, a tapa Abijah in a kumpi za laih hi." 
1Kings15:1 Israel kumpipa Jeroboam ii maan zawk a kum sawm le liatna ciangin Abijah sia Judah kumpipa suak a," 
1Kings15:2 tuaciang, ama in Jerusalem panin kum thum sung uk hi. Ama ii nu sia Absalom ii tanu Maacah ahi hi." 
1Kings15:3 Ama in a pa ii a vawt mawnate ma vawtin, a pu selawn David bangin Topa a Pathian tungah thumaan siat zo ngawl hi." 
1Kings15:4 Ahihang David hangin Topa a Pathian in ama zawkciang Jerusalem a uk tu le Jerusalem ngammuangsak tu in Abijah sia tapa khat pia hi. 
1Kings15:5 Topa in hi bangin a vawt sia banghang ziam cile David in ama ii lungkimte bek seam a, Hit mi Uriah taw a vai khat simngawl po, a thukham peuma zui ngawl nei ngeingawl hi." 
1Kings15:6 Abijah ii khan hunsung theampo ma Rehoboam le Jeroboam ii hun pan a kipan kidona sia kizom suak lai hi. 
1Kings15:7 Tuaciangin Abijah ii sep le vawt dangte theampo sia Judah Kumpipate Taanghthu sungah kikhum siat hi. 
1Kings15:8 Abijah thi in David Khuapi sungah kiphum hi, tuaciang a tapa Asa in ama kumpi za laih hi." 
1Kings15:9 Israel kumpipa Jeroboam ii maan zawk a kum kul na ciangin Asa sia Judah kumpipa suak hi," 
1Kings15:10 tuaciangin ama in Jerusalem ah kum 41 sung uk hi. A pi sia Absalom ii tanu Maacah ahi hi. 
1Kings15:11 A taanghpupi David ii ngamtat bangin Asa in Topa lungkim tu in ngamta hi. 
1Kings15:12 Ama in ngamsung panin numei le pasal pumpi zuak a, doai biakna munte ah a om theampo hawlkhia hi, tuaciang ama ii mai ah a seamte ii vawt milim theampo heam hi." 
1Kings15:13 Ama in a pi Maacah sia, kumpinu ii nu a hina panin heam hi, banghang ziam cile ama in ta tam nei natu a siam Asherah numeipathian ii a kiihuai milim khat vawt hi. Asa in tua milim sia sattan in Kidron kuam ah hal hi." 
1Kings15:14 Asa in doai biakna mun theampo susia ngawl ahihang Topa tungah a nuntak tawntung thumaan top hi. 
1Kings15:15 Biakinnpi sungah a pa ii Pathian atu a piaktuam na teng le khamh le ngunn taw a kivawt ama ii piaktuam nate zongh koi hi. 
1Kings15:16 Judah kumpipa Asa le Israel kumpipa Baasha sia vaang a nei uh lai teng in kido tawntung hi. 
1Kings15:17 Baasha in Judah sim a, Judah ngam pan a pusuak a sungtang thei te theampo a khatan natu in Ramah sia kulh taw uum hi." 
1Kings15:18 Tua ahikom Kumpipa Asa in Biakinnpi le kumpi inn sung a khamh le ngunn a om laiteng la in Damascus ah, Tabrimmon ii tapa, Hezion tupa, Syria kumpipa Benhadad kungah a uliante pawl khat in puaksak a, hi bang kam teng taw thaak hi:" 
1Kings15:19 “Ih pate sia ngal a kipawl ahi bangma ei zongh kipawl khawm tawng. Hi ngunn le khamhte sia nangma atu letsong kong piak hi. Tu in ka ngamsung pan a ngalkapte a laak kik nanak natu in, Israel kumpipa Baasha taw na kipawl na sia na pheltan in,” ci hi." 
1Kings15:20 Benhadad kumpipa in Asa ii ci teng thukim a, Israel khuapite sim tu in ngalkap ukte le ngalkaphonpite kuansak hi. Amate in Ijon, Dan, Abel Beth Maacah, Galilee Tuili hui ngam teng, Naphtali ngam bup la hi." 
1Kings15:21 Kumpipa Baasha in thupiang teng a zaak ciang Ramah khua ah a kulhpi vawt teng tawpin Tirzah zuan hi. 
1Kings15:22 Tua zawkciang Kumpipa Asa in Judah ngam bup ah khat zongh kikhe ngawlin, Baasha ii kulh vawtna a zak suang le thingte Ramah panin puasiat tu in thupia hi. Asa in Mizpah le Benjamin ngam ah Geba khuapi sia hi vanhte taw ngalnanna kulh in vawt hi." 
1Kings15:23 Asa ii a sep a vawt dang theampo, a hanna le kulh a vawt khuate ii thu teng Judah Kumpipate ii Taanghthu sungah kikhum hi. Ahihang a khanhaam ciangin ama sia peang natna taw zawcip hi." 
1Kings15:24 Asa thi a, David Khuapi sung kumpi thaan ah kiphum hi, tuaciang a tapa Jehoshaphat in a kumpi za laih hi." 
1Kings15:25 Judah kumpipa Asa ii maan zawk a kum niina hun sungah Kumpipa Jeroboam ii tapa Nadab sia Israel kumpipa hong suak a kum nii sung uk hi. 
1Kings15:26 Ama ii mai ah a pa bangma in Topa tungah ama maw a, Israel te mawna sungah lampui hi." 
1Kings15:27 Issachar nam Ahijah ii tapa Baasha in Nadab thasawm in, Nadab le a ngalkaphonpi in Philistia ngam Gibbethon khuapi a uumci laitakin ama thatlum hi." 
1Kings15:28 Hi thu sia Kumpipa Asa ii Judah ah a maan zawk a kum thumna sungah piang hi. Tua bangin, Baasha in Nadab ii Israel kumpi za laih hi." 
1Kings15:29 Thakhat thu in ama in Jeroboam ii innkuanpuite that siat hi, Shiloh pan kamsaang pa Ahijah ii Topa kammal a sonsa bang tatakin Jeroboam ii innkuanpui teng that siat a; khat zongh khe ngawl hi." 
1Kings15:30 Hi bang a pian sia banghang ziam cile Jeroboam in Israel ii Pathian Topa sia ama mawna hang le Israel mite mawna a vawtsak hu in thin uuksak ahi hang hi. 
1Kings15:31 Nadab ii a sep a vawt dang theampo sia Israel Kumpite ii Taanghthu sungah kikhum hi. 
1Kings15:32 Judah kumpipa Asa le Israel kumpipa Baasha te ngeal sia a vaang nei uh lai teng khat le khat kido tan uh hi. 
1Kings15:33 Judah kumpipa Asa ii maan zawk a kum thumna ah Ahijah ii tapa Baasha sia Israel kumpipa suak a, Tirzah panin kum 24 sung uk hi." 
1Kings15:34 Ama ii mai ah Kumpipa Jeroboam bangma in Topa tungah ama maw a, Israel te mawna sungah lampui hi." 
1Kings16:1 Hanani ii tapa kamsaang pa Jehu tungah Baasha atu kam hi teng Topa in pau hi: 
1Kings16:2 “Nang sia bangma ahi ngawl khat hi napi ka Israel mite lampui in hong koi khi hi. Tuaciang tu in nang zongh Jeroboam bangma in mawna na vawt a, ka mite mawna sungah lampui zo ni hi. Amate ii mawnate in kei hong thin uuksak hi," 
1Kings16:3 tua ahikom Jeroboam ka vawt bangma in nang le na bangkua kong heam tu hi. 
1Kings16:4 Na innkuanpuite khuapi sungah a thi peuma ui in ne tu a, ngam taanzauna sungah a thi peuma vaciik in ne tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings16:5 Baasha ii a sep a vawt dang theampo Israel Kumpipate Taanghthu sungah kikhum hi. 
1Kings16:6 Baasha thi a Tirzah ah kiphum hi, tuaciang a tapa Elah in a kumpi za laih hi." 
1Kings16:7 Baasha le a bangkua langpanna, tua Topa kammalte sia kamsaangpa Jehu in pia hi, banghang ziam cile Baasha in Topa tungah mawna vawt hi. Ama in Topa thin uuksak hi, banghang ziam cile ama in tatkhakna sia ama mai a, Jeroboam vawt bangin a vawt dom ngawlin, Jeroboam ii innkuanpuite theampo zongh that siat hi." 
1Kings16:8 Judah kumpipa Asa ii maan zawk a kum 26 na in, Baasha ii tapa Elah sia Israel kumpipa suakin Tirzah pan kum nii sung uk hi." 
1Kings16:9 A uliante khat, kumpipa siphu ngalleangte ii kimkhen khat a ukpa Zimri in ama suam sawm hi. Ni khat ni in Tirzah ah Elah sia kumpi inn ukpa Arza ii inn ah zu kham hi." 
1Kings16:10 Zimri sia inn sungah tum a, Elah suamlum in kumpi za laih hi. Hi bang a pian hun sia Judah kumpipa Asa a maan zawk kum 27 na kum ahi hi." 
1Kings16:11 Zimri kumpi a sua po ciangin Baasha ii innkuanpuite theampo thatlum siat hi. A mealheak le a lawm ahi theampo pasal a minpiang thatlumsak siat hi. 
1Kings16:12 Tuabangin kamsaangpa Jehu tungtawnin Topa ii Baasha huvau a son bang tatakin Zimri in Baasha innkuanpui theampo thatlum siat hi. 
1Kings16:13 Amate ii milim a biak hu le Israel mite mawna sung a thet pui hu in Baasha le a tapa Elah in Israel ii Pathian, Topa a thin uuksak hi." 
1Kings16:14 Elah ii sep le vawt a dangte theampo Israel Kumpipate Taanghthu sungah kikhum siat hi. 
1Kings16:15 Judah kumpipa Asa maan zawk kum 27 na ciang Zimri in Tirzah pan Israel sia ni sali sung uk hi. Israel ngalkapte in Philistia ngam Gibbethon khuapi uumci uh hi," 
1Kings16:16 tuaciang amate in Zimri ii kumpipa a suamlup a zaak uh ciang, tua hun tua munah amate ngalkap ukpa Omri sia Israel kumpipa in thangsak uh hi." 
1Kings16:17 Omri le a ngalkapte in Gibbethon nusia in Tirzah ah pai a uumci uh hi. 
1Kings16:18 Zimri in khuapi sia kila zo ci in a mu ciang kumpi inn ii a sungsang kulh ah tumin kumpi inn hal a, ama zongh meikuang sungah thi hi." 
1Kings16:19 Hi bangin a pian sia ama in Topa tungah a maw hang hi. Ama mai ah a maang Jeroboam bangma in ama mawna hu le Israel mite mawna sungah a lampui hu in, Topa lungkim ngawlna piang hi." 
1Kings16:20 Zimri ii a sep a vawt dangte theampo a sawmna thu zongh Israel Kumpipate Taanghthu sungah kikhum siat hi. 
1Kings16:21 Israel mite sia kikhen hi: pawlkhat te in Ginath ii tapa Tibni kumpi suaksak nuam a, a dangte in Omri dei uh hi." 
1Kings16:22 A khakbel ciang Omri deite in zo zaw hi; Tibri thi a, Omri sia kumpi suak hi." 
1Kings16:23 Tuabangin Judah kumpipa Asa maan zawk a kum 31 na kumin Omri sia Israel kumpipa suak hi, tuaciang ama in kum sawm le kum nii sung uk hi. A masa kum luk teng sia ama in Tirzah pan uk a," 
1Kings16:24 tua zawkciang Samaria ngam mual khat sia Shemer a kici pasal khat ii tung pan ngunntang 6,000 taw lei hi. Omri in tua mual sia kulh vawt in tua munah khua khat saat a, a min sia mual nei lui pa min Shemer la in Samaria phuak hi." 
1Kings16:25 Omri in ama mai a te sangin Topa tungah a nasia zawin maw hi. 
1Kings16:26 Ama ii mai ah Jeroboam bangma in ama mawna te hu le a mite sia mawna le milim biakna sungah a thet pui hu in Israel ii Pathian Topa thin uukna piangsak hi. 
1Kings16:27 Omri ii a sep a vawt dangte le ama zawnate sia Israel Kumpipate Taanghthu sungah kikhum hi. 
1Kings16:28 Omri thi a, Samaria ah kiphumin, a tapa Ahab in a kumpi za laih hi." 
1Kings16:29 Judah kumpipa Asa ii maan zawk a kum 38 na kumin Omri ii tapa Ahab sia Israel kumpipa suak a, Samaria ah kum 22 sung uk hi." 
1Kings16:30 Ama in ama ii mai a kumpi dangte sangin Topa tungah mawna tam vawtzaw hi. 
1Kings16:31 Ama atu in Kumpipa Jeroboam bangin a maw tu sia pha zo sa ngawl hi; ama in tua kaanin ngamta a, Jezebel a kici Sidon kumpipa Ethbaal ii tanu teenpui in Baal pathian bia hi." 
1Kings16:32 Ama in Samaria ah Baal atu biakinn saksakin, biaknatau khat vawtin biakinn sungah koi hi." 
1Kings16:33 Ama in numeipathian Asherah milim khat zongh vawt hi. Israel ii Pathian Topa thin uuk natu in ama ii masia a, Israel kumpi theampo sangin ama in vawt zaw lai hi." 
1Kings16:34 Ama ii maan sungin Bethel panin Hiel in Jericho sa kik hi. Nun ii tapa Joshua tungah Topa ii sonkhol bangma in Hiel in a tapa lianbel Abiram sia Jericho khua ii tawdap a vawt laitakin thi sua a, tuaciang a tapa a nobel Segub zong kongpite a vawt ciang thisua hi." 
1Kings16:34 Ama ii maan sungin Bethel panin Hiel in Jericho sa kik hi. Nun ii tapa Joshua tungah Topa ii sonkhol bangma in Hiel in a tapa lianbel Abiram sia Jericho khua ii tawdap a vawt laitakin thi sua a, tuaciang a tapa a nobel Segub zong kongpite a vawt ciang thisua hi." 
1Kings17:1 Gilead ngam Tishbe panin Elijah a kici kamsaangpa in Ahab kumpipa munah, “A na ka sepsak Israel te ii a nungta Pathian, Topa min taw keima in nang tungah kong sonna pan keima ii kong son kik mateng kum nii ahibuale kum thum sung daaitui ahizong, nguatui ahizong hang tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings17:2 Tua zawkciang Topa in Elijah munah," 
1Kings17:3 “Hi mun nusia in a, nisuana sangah pai in Cherith luino hui ah buu ta'n." 
1Kings17:4 Tua luino in na zak tu tui hong sik tu a, tuaciang va-akte in nangma tua munah an hong puak tu in thupia zo khi hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings17:5 Elijah in Topa ii thupiakna zui in, Cherith luino ah pai in tua munah taam hi." 
1Kings17:6 Ama in Luitui dawnin, va-akte in zing sim nitak simin anluum le sa puak hi." 
1Kings17:7 Tawm vei zawkciang nguatui kisap hu in lui sia kang hi. 
1Kings17:8 Tua zawkciang Topa in Elijah munah," 
1Kings17:9 “Tu in Sidon nai ah a om Zarephath khua ah pai in a, tua munah om ta'n. Tua munah meingong nupi khat nang an hong vaak tu in thupia zo khi hi” ci hi." 
1Kings17:10 Tua ahikom Elijah sia Zarephath ah pai a, khua kongpi a thet ciang, meingongnu khat thingtom in om mu hi. Ama in, “Tui neak khat hong puak ta'n,” tua nu tungah ci hi." 
1Kings17:11 Tui laksak tu in a pai ciang, “Nong hesuakna in anluum zongh hong paipui ta'n,” ci thua hi." 
1Kings17:12 Ama in, “Anluum nei ngawl het khi hi ci in a nungta Topa na Pathian min taw ka kiciam ngam hi. Ka nei theampo sia kuang sungah anvui khut hum khat le thawl sungah olive thau tawmcik bek hi. Hi sungah kong pai sia thing tawm tom a ciapui in, ka nei sun teng ka tapa le keima neak tu in vawt tu khi hi. Tuasia koma an neak khakbel hi tu a, tua zawkciang pukthi tu khu hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings17:13 Elijah in, “Thintoi heak in, va pai ta'n a, an na vawt ta'n. Ahihang a masa phitin na nei sung pan kei atu anluumno khat hong vawtsak ta'n a, kei hong puak ta'n, tua zawkciang nang le na tapa atu a om lai teng vawt in." 
1Kings17:14 Banghang ziam cile hisia sia Topa, Israel te ii Pathian ii pauna hi: ‘Kuang sungah anvui thot ngeingawl tu a, thawl sungah sathau sia, keima Topa ii nguatui ka puak ni mateng kang ngeingawl tu hi,’ ” ci hi." 
1Kings17:15 Meingong nu in Elijah sawl bangin pai in ngamta a, tuaciang amate in ni tam mama sung a khom tu an nei uh hi." 
1Kings17:16 Topa ii Elijah tungtawn a kamciam a piak bangin, kuang sungah anvuite thot ngawlin, thawl sungah sathau a kang bua hi." 
1Kings17:17 Tua zawk tawmvei ciangin meingong nu ii tapa a ci na hi; ama zawm vaial in a khakbel ciang thi hi. 
1Kings17:18 Ama in Elijah munah, “Pathian mipa awng, banghangin hi bangin kei hong vawt ni ziam? Hi sungah nong pai sia ka mawna teng Pathian in phawksak a, ka tapa thi natu in hong vawt ni ziam?” ci hi." 
1Kings17:19 Elijah in, “Patang sia keima hong pia ta'n,” ci hi. Ama in patang sia a khut sung pan la a, ama ii omna inn tung inndoi ah toai to in, lupna tungah sial hi." 
1Kings17:20 Tua zawkciang nging takin thungen a, “Oh, Topa ka Pathian awng, banghangin hi bang meingongnu tungah a lauhuai mama in vawt ni ziam? Ama dik a kei hong vaak kasap tu in a tapa thalupsak ni hi!” ci hi." 
1Kings17:21 Tua zawkciang Elijah in patang sia tungah thumvei bokin kizalh a, “Oh, Topa ka Pathian awng, hi patang a nuntakna pia kik in!” ci in thungen hi." 
1Kings17:22 Topa in Elijah ii thungetna zo a; patang sia a hu hong sang kikin hong nungta kik hi. 
1Kings17:23 Elijah in patangpa sia inn nuaidawl a nu kungah paipui suk kikin a nu munah, “En in, na tapa nungta hi!” ci hi." 
1Kings17:24 Ama in, “Tu ahile nang sia Pathian ii mi khat hi a, tuaciang Topa in nang tungtawnin hong pau takpi hi, ci in hong he khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
1Kings18:1 Nguatui a hanh zawk kum thum a phak zawk hiat ciangin Topa in Elijah munah, “Va pai ta'n a, Kumpipa Ahab mai ah kilak ta'n, tuaciang ngua kong zusak tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings18:2 Tua ahikom Elijah hong kipan hi. Samaria a kialpi tung sia a nasia bel laitak ahi hi," 
1Kings18:3 tua ahikom Ahab in kumpi inn a uk pa Obadiah sam hi. (Obadiah sia Topa a bia thu um khat hi a," 
1Kings18:3 tua ahikom Ahab in kumpi inn a uk pa Obadiah sam hi. (Obadiah sia Topa a bia thu um khat hi a," 
1Kings18:4 Jezebel in Topa ii kamsaangte a thalup lai in, Obadiah in tua kamsaangte zakhat la in, suanghawng sungah pawl khat ciang 50 veu khen in pawl nii in seal a, an le tui sik hi.)" 
1Kings18:4 Jezebel in Topa ii kamsaangte a thalup lai in, Obadiah in tua kamsaangte zakhat la in, suanghawng sungah pawl khat ciang 50 veu khen in pawl nii in seal a, an le tui sik hi.)" 
1Kings18:5 Ahab in Obadiah munah, “Ih siphute le laate a nungta in ih kep thei natu in lopa a kicing ih mu zo ziam maw, ngamsung tuinaak theampo le ngun omna theampo ah pai in zong sin tawng. Ih ngannote khat zongh ih thalup kul ngawl tha tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings18:5 Ahab in Obadiah munah, “Ih siphute le laate a nungta in ih kep thei natu in lopa a kicing ih mu zo ziam maw, ngamsung tuinaak theampo le ngun omna theampo ah pai in zong sin tawng. Ih ngannote khat zongh ih thalup kul ngawl tha tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings18:6 Amate ngamsung koisungsan ah akua pai in zong tu ziam ci in thukimna vawt a, mun tuatuam ah vaiding tek uh hi." 
1Kings18:7 Obadiah in a paina lam tungah thakhat thu in Elijah taw kisi hi. Ama in tel a, ama ii mai ah a niamin kunsuk a, “Topa awng, nangma tatak ma ni ziam,” ci in dongh hi." 
1Kings18:7 Obadiah in a paina lam tungah thakhat thu in Elijah taw kisi hi. Ama in tel a, ama ii mai ah a niamin kunsuk a, “Topa awng, nangma tatak ma ni ziam,” ci in dongh hi." 
1Kings18:8 Ama in, “Hi khi hi, keima Elijah khi hi” ci in zo hi. “Pai in a, na topa, kumpipa munah hi sungah ka om hunlam va son ta'n,” ci hi." 
1Kings18:9 Obadiah in, “Kumpipa Ahab ii hong thalup tu launa sungah nong koi natu in bang khialna nei khi ziam?" 
1Kings18:9 Obadiah in, “Kumpipa Ahab ii hong thalup tu launa sungah nong koi natu in bang khialna nei khi ziam?" 
1Kings18:10 A nungta Topa, na Pathian taw kiciam ngam khi hi, leitung ngam theampo ah kumpipa in nang hong zongsak zo hi. Ngam khat a ukpa in nang sia ama ii ngam sungah om ngawl hi ci in thu a puak le Ahab in tua ngam ah nang hong kimu zawk ngawlna thu sia tua ngamukpa kiciamsak hi." 
1Kings18:11 Tuaciang tu in nang hi sungah na om sia son tu in ama kungah pai le hong oai ni ziam? 
1Kings18:12 Ka pai po ciang Pathian ii thaa in nang sia heak ngeingawlna mundang khat pawpo ah hong tua luilam le bang law tu khi ziam? Tuasia ciang Ahab munah nang hi sungah om hi ka ci ciang, ama in hong mu zo buale kei hong thatlum tu hi. Ka no ciang a thu um, Topa a biapa ka hi hunlam sia ciamtee in." 
1Kings18:13 Jezebel in Topa kamsaangte a thalup lai in amate suanghawng sungah 50 veu pawl nii sua in, zakhat ka seal a, an le tui ka vaakna thu za ngeingawl ni ziam?" 
1Kings18:14 Tua ahikom bangbangin nang hi sungah na omna thu kumpipa kungah son tu in hong sawl thei ni ziam! Ama in kei hong that tu hi!” ci in zo hi. 
1Kings18:15 Elijah in, “A na a seam keima in a nungta Topa taw kiciam khi hi, kumpipa mai ah tu ni kilak tu in kiciam khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
1Kings18:16 Tua ahikom Obadiah in Ahab kumpipa kungah pai in a son ciang, Ahab sia Elijah taw kimu tu in vaiding hi." 
1Kings18:16 Tua ahikom Obadiah in Ahab kumpipa kungah pai in a son ciang, Ahab sia Elijah taw kimu tu in vaiding hi." 
1Kings18:17 Ahab in a mu ciangin ama munah, “Zialai ah nang — Israel ngam sungah ngimna a nasiabel a piangsak pa om na hi ziam!” ci hi." 
1Kings18:18 “Kei ngimna a piangsak pa hi ngawl khi hi,” ci in Elijah in zo hi. “Nangma ni hi — nangma le na pa na hi uh hi. Nangma in Topa ii thupiakte zui ngawlin Baal milimte bia ni hi." 
1Kings18:19 Tu in Israel mite theampo kei taw Carmel mual ah kisi tu in thupia in. Baal kamsaang 450 le numeipathian Asherah kamsaang 400, kumpinu Jezebel ii a vaak teng hong paipui tavun,” ci hi." 
1Kings18:20 Tua ahikom Ahab in Israel mite theampo le Baal kamsaangte sia Carmel Mual ah sam hi. 
1Kings18:21 Elijah in mite kungah paito in, “Na thin uh na khensat natu in bang tanvei hai lai tu nu ziam? Topa sia Pathian ahile ama bia vun; ahihang Baal sia Pathian ahile bia vun!” ci hi. Ahihang mite in kam khat zongh pau ngawl uh hi." 
1Kings18:22 Tuasia ciang Elijah in, “ Topa kamsaang sia kei bekma taanglai khi hi, ahihang Baal kamsaangte sia 450 om hi." 
1Kings18:23 Khuital nii hong paipui tavun; Baal kamsaangte in khat lasak vun a, tua sia ngoin, semneen in thingkangte tungah koisak vun — ahihang meitaw heak vun. Keima in khuital dang khat sia tuabang ma in ka vawt tu hi." 
1Kings18:24 Tua zawkciang Baal kamsaangte in amate ii pathian tungah thu ngen hen, tuaciang keima in Topa tungah thu ka ngen tu a, tuaciang meikuang hong puakna taw thunget hong zo pa — ama sia Pathian hi,” ci hi. Mipite lungkim in au uh hi." 
1Kings18:25 Tuaciang Elijah in Baal kamsaangte munah, “No tam mama na hi uh ciang, noma khuital khat la in kinging khol masa vun. Noma pathian tungah thungen vun, ahizong thingkang te tungah meitaw heak vun,” ci hi." 
1Kings18:26 Amate kungah a kipaipui khuital sia amate in la a, a vawt tu bang vawtin nisun dong Baal tungah thu ngen uh hi. Amate in, “Hong zo ta'n, Baal awng!” ci in au a, amate ii a sak biaknatau sia ii kiimkot ah laam top uh hi. Ahihang zona hong pai bua hi." 
1Kings18:27 Sun hun ciang Elijah in amate nunau tu hong kipan hi: “A nging zaw in thungen ve vun! Ama sia pathian khat hi! Ama mangngai in om ziam, awnghaw ziam, tua ahibuale khualhaw ziam khat hi thei tu hi! Tua ahibuale zong a mut laitak hi thei tu hi, na phok uh kul tu hi!” ci hi." 
1Kings18:28 Tua ahikom kamsaangte in nging zaw lai in thu hong ngen in, amate ii zeksa ngeina om bangin naamte, naamzumte taw amate le amate chisan a luan dongin ki at uh hi." 
1Kings18:29 Sun ni kaai dongin amate au lialua in om top lai uh hi; ahihang zona hong pai ngawl a, aw khat zongh kiza ngawl hi." 
1Kings18:30 Elijah in mipite munah, “Ka kung nai hong neak zaw tavun,” a ci ciang amate in ama kiimkot ah kikhawm uh hi. Topa biaknatau a kibaltham sia hong pua kik hi." 
1Kings18:31 Israel ci in Topa ii Israel min a piakpa Jacob tate min a kivaw nam sawm le nam nii sim atu in suangtum sawm le nii la hi. 
1Kings18:32 Hi suangte taw ama in Topa biak natu biaknatau sa kik hi. Ama in tua kiimkot ah tui litre 14 dektak a ta thei tu dum to hi. 
1Kings18:33 Tua zawkciang ama in thingkangte biaknatau tungah koi in, khuital sia semneen a, thingkangte tungah koi hi. Ama in, “Tui pheal li hong dim tavun, a biakpiakna tung le thing tungah hong sung tavun,” ci hi. Amate in tuabang ma in vawt a," 
1Kings18:34 tuaciang ama in, “Hi kik vun,” ci hi — amate in sung kik hi. Ama in, “Khatvei ma hi lai vun,” ci hi — tuaciang amate in tuabang ma seam uh hi." 
1Kings18:35 Tui sia biaknatau kiim ah hong luang a, dum sung hong dim hi." 
1Kings18:36 Nikai sang sangaw biakpiakna hun tak ciang Elijah in biaknatau neak in thungen hi. “Oh Topa, Abraham, Isaac le Jacob te ii Pathian awng, tu in nang Israel ii Pathian hi a, tuaciang kei sia na naseampa ka hina taw nong sawl bangin hi bang teng ngamta ka hina thu sia hong lak ta'n." 
1Kings18:37 Hong zo ta'n Topa, kei hong zo ta'n, tua hile hi mite in nang Topa Pathian hi a, tuaciang amate nang kungah heak kiksak tu ni hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings18:38 Topa in meikuang hong puaksuk a, sangaw biakpiakna, thingkangte, suangtumte kaanghtham in, lei zongh kaangh upsak a, dum sungah tuite kosak hi." 
1Kings18:39 Mipite in hisia a mu uh ciang amate le amate lei ah hong bok suk a, “ Topa sia Pathian hi; Topa bekma Pathian hi!” ci in au uh hi" 
1Kings18:40 Elijah in thupia a, “Baal kamsaangte man vun; kuama suaktasak heak vun!” ci hi. Mipite in amate man siat a, tuaciang Elijah in Kishon Ngun ah paipui sukin amate thatlum hi." 
1Kings18:41 Tua zawkciang Elijah in Kumpipa Ahab kungah, “Tu in va pai ta'n a, an va ne ta'n. Nguazu nuam kisa in a hawk bangza khi hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings18:42 Ahab an ne tu a pai laitakin Elijah sia Carmel Mualdawn ah kaato a, lei ah kun sukin, a khup sungah a lu phum hi." 
1Kings18:43 A naseampa munah, “Va pai ta'n a, tuipi sang va en ta'n,” ci hi. A naseampa pai a hong heak kik in, “Bangma mu bong,” ci hi. Salivei vaset Elijah in a naseampa pai in en a sawl hi." 
1Kings18:44 A sali veina ciangin ama hong heakkik a, “Meeikaai no khat mihing khut saang a lianzaw ngawl khat tuipi panin hong paito ka mu hi,” ci hi. Elijah in a naseampa thupia a, “Kumpipa Ahab kungah va pai ta'n a, ama siphu ngalleang sungah to in, ngua ii khaktan ma inn ah a ciakik natu va son ta'n,” ci hi." 
1Kings18:45 Hun tawm no sungin van sia meeivom dim in, vui va a, ngua nasia takin zuk tu kipan hi. Ahab zongh siphu ngalleang sungah to in, Jezreel ah cia kik hi." 
1Kings18:46 Topa ii thahatna Elijah tungah hong theng a; ama in a puante a kawng ah ngat takin sawmin, Jezreel a thet dong Ahab ii mai ah tai hi." 
1Kings19:1 Kumpipa Ahab in a zi Jezebel munah, Elijah ii ngamtatna theampo son a, Baal kamsaang theampo a thalup na thu teng son siat hi." 
1Kings19:2 Tua nu in Elijah kam khat thaak hi: “Kamsaangte tungah na vawt bang keak in zing ciang tu hunin nang tungah kong vawt bua tale pathiante in kei hong vaatlum tahen,” ci hi." 
1Kings19:3 Elijah lau a, a nuntakna kihuk natu in, a naseampa taw Judah ngam Beersheba zuan in tai hi. A naseampa tua munah nusia a," 
1Kings19:4 Elijah sia nitangtum duisung ah a peangin pai hi. Ama in thinglim nuai khat ah tawlnga in to a, tuaciang thithei le uuk hi. “Nasia leih hi, Topa awng, ka nuntakna hong laaksak ta'n; thi leng zong phazaw tu hi,” ci in thungen hi." 
1Kings19:5 Ama in thingkung nuai ah lumin mu hi. Thakhat thu in vantunglalang khat in tham a, tuaciang, “Tho in a ne in,” ci hi." 
1Kings19:6 A kiimkot a et ciang a luthung ah anluum khat le tuidam thawl khat mu hi. Ama in tuate ne a, tua zawkciang lum kik hi." 
1Kings19:7 Topa ii vantunglalang heakkik in a nii veina in phong a, “Tho in a, an ne in, tua ahibuale na khualhaw natu sia nang atu haksa lei tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings19:8 Elijah tho in a neak ciang tua an in ni 40 sung mual thiangtho Sinai dong a pai khom natu thangui thatang nguan hi. 
1Kings19:9 Tua munah zan ngiak tu in suanghawng khat ii sungah tum hi. Thakhat thu in Topa in, “Elijah, hi sungah bang vawt ni ziam?” ci hi." 
1Kings19:10 Ama in, “ Topa Pathian Vaanglianbelpa awng, nangma ii na — nangma bekma ii na hong sepsak tawntung khi hi. Ahihang Israel mite in nang taw a thuciamna paltan in, na biaknataute baltham a, na kamsaangte thatlum siat hi. Keima bekma taanglai khi hi — tuaciang amate in kei hong that nuam in hanciam uh hi!” ci in zo hi." 
1Kings19:11 Topa in ama tungah “Pusuak in a, mualdawn keima mai ah hong ding ta'n,” ci hi. Tua zawkciang Topa in kaantan a, vuipi nasia mama khat vasak in, mualnote kikhenthamsak a, suangtumpuite neenthamsak hi — ahihang tua vui sungah Topa om ngawl hi. Vui vak thim a, tua zawkciang zinliing hi — ahihang zinliing na sungah Topa om ngawl hi." 
1Kings19:12 Zinliin zawkciang meikuang khat om a, — ahihang tua meikuang sungah Topa om ngawl hi. Tua meikuang sia zawkciangin kihuauna awneal no khat za hi." 
1Kings19:13 Elijah in tua a zaak ciang a maitang a puantual taw sealin pusuak a suanghawngkua mai ah ding hi. Aw khat in ama tungah, “Elijah, hi sungah bang hi ni ziam?” ci hi." 
1Kings19:14 Ama in, “ Topa Pathian Vaanglianbelpa nangma ii na — nangma bekma ii na hong sepsak tawntung khi hi. Ahihang Israel mite in nang taw a thuciamna paltan in, na biaknataute baltham a, na kamsaangte thatlum siat hi, Keima bekma taanglai khi hi — tuaciang amate in kei hong that nuam in hanciam hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings19:15 Topa in ama munah, “Damascus naina duisung ah heak kik ta'n a, khuapi sungah tumin, Hazael sia Syria kumpipa tu in sathau noai ta'n;" 
1Kings19:16 Nimshi ii tapa Jehu sia Israel kumpipa tu in sathau noai ta'n, tuaciang Abel Meholah pan a, Shaphat ii tapa Elisha sia nang hong laih kamsaang tu in sathau noai ta'n." 
1Kings19:17 Hazael ii thalup natu pan a suakta a om le Jehu in thatlum tu a, Jehu ii thalup tu pan a suakta a om le Elisha in thatlum tu hi." 
1Kings19:18 Ahihang Israel ngam ah a nungta in mihing tulsali khe lai tu khi hi — tuate sia kei tungah hong thumaan theampo le Baal mai ah a kun ngawl, a milim a namh ngawlte ahi uh hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings19:19 Elijah in tua mun nusia in a pai le Elisha sia khui kap taw lotho in a om mu hi; ama mai ah kap sawm le kap khat om a ama sia a khakbel kap sia taw lotho hi. Elijah in a puantual suut a Elisha silhsak hi. 
1Kings19:20 Tuasia ciang Elisha in a khuitalte nusia in Elijah del a, “Ka pa le ka nu ka vaithakna in va namh phot tong, tua zawkciang nangma taw tonkhawm tu khi hi,” ci hi. Elijah in, “Pha hi, cia kik ta'n. Hong khaam ngawl khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
1Kings19:21 Tua zawkciang Elisha sia ama ii khuikaapte ngoin, a khui hakkolte mei thuna thingin zangh in a sa huan hi. Ama in a sa sia mipite hawmsak a, ne uh hi. Tua zawkciang ama in Elijah ii hupa in a nungzui hi." 
1Kings20:1 Syria kumpipa Benhadad in a ngalkap theampo khawm a, ngam uk 32 te ii huna siphu le siphu ngalleang te taw kuanto in Samaria khuapi uumci in sim hi." 
1Kings20:2 Ama in khuapi sungah kamtaite paisak in Israel kumpipa Ahab munah, “Kumpipa Benhadad in" 
1Kings20:3 ama tungah na ngunn, na khamh, na numeite le na tate a hatbel teng taw na lut tu hong tangkal hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings20:4 Ahab in “Kumpipa Benhadad ka topa munah ka lungkimna thu son tavun; ama in kei le ka neisa theampo tang thei hi,” ci in zo hi." 
1Kings20:5 A zawkciang kamtaite in, Benhadad tung pan ngetna dang khat taw Ahab kungah hong heak kik uh hi. “Na ngunn, na khamh, na numeite le na tate nong aap natu kam hong thaak khi hi." 
1Kings20:6 Ahizong tu in, ka uliante kong paisak tu a, na kumpi inn le na uliante ii innte tok in, manpha a sak theampo la tu hi. Amate zing ciang tubang hun khawngin hong theng tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings20:7 Kumpipa Ahab in ngamsung a lampui theampo samin, “Na mu uh hi a, hisia pa in ei hong susia nuam hi. Ama in kam hong thaak a, ka zite ka tate le ka ngunn ka khamh teng hong ngen hi, tuaciang kei lungkim khi hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings20:8 Lampuite le mipite in, “Ama bangma awlmaw heak in; lut heak in!” ci in zo hi." 
1Kings20:9 Tua ahikom Ahab in Benhadad ii kamtaite munah, “Hong nget masak teng thukim khi hi, ahihang a niina sia thukim zo ngawl khi hi, ka topa kumpipa munah va ci tavun,” ci in zo kik hi. Kamtaite va pai a, tua zawkciang hong heak kikin" 
1Kings20:10 Benhadad tung pan kamthaak dang khat hong keng hi: “Na khuapi hisia a susia zo tu le amate khut tek taw suangbek teng a vawk siat zo tu mihing a khom kong paipui tu hi. Tuabangin ka ngamta bua ta le pathiante in hong vaatlum tahen!” ci hi. 
1Kings20:11 Kumpipa Ahab in, “Kumpipa Benhadad munah son tavun a, ngalkap citak khat in ngal kido zawkciang kisuangtaak pheang a, kido ma in kisuangtaak ngawl hi,” ci in zo hi." 
1Kings20:12 Benhadad in Ahab ii zona kam sia ama le a kipawlpui ngamuk dangte taw a puanbukte sungah zu a neak laitakin kison hi. Ama in a mite, khuapi sim tu kinging in sawl a, tua ahikom amate sia dinmun la tu in kuan uh hi." 
1Kings20:13 Tua laitakin kamsaang khat Kumpipa Ahab kungah hong pai a, “ Topa in, ‘Tua ngalkap hon lian sia kiita heak hen! Tuni in tuasia nangma in kong zosak tu hi, tuasia ciang keima Topa ka hi hunlam nong he tu hi,’ ” ci in son hi." 
1Kings20:14 Ahab in, “Akua in kidona lampui tu ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Ngamkhen uk mangte ii nuai ah a seam khangmoi ngalkapte in lampui tu hi “ Topa in ci hi,” ci in kamsaangpa in zo hi. Kumpipa in, “Ngalkaphonpi sia akua in uk tu ziam?” ci in dongh hi. “Nangma,” ci in kamsaangpa in zo hi." 
1Kings20:15 Tua ahikom kumpipa in ngamkhen uk mangte ii nuai a ngalkap khangmoi te sam a, a vekpi sia 232 pha hi. Tua zawkciang ama in Israel ngalkaphonpi sam a, a vekpi in 7,000 pha hi." 
1Kings20:16 Kisimna sia sun laitakin kipan a Benhadad le a pawlpui 32 te a puanbukte sungah zu khamin a om laitak ahi hi. 
1Kings20:17 Ngalkap khangmoite kuan masa uh hi. Benhadad ii paisak ngalvilte in Samaria pan ngalkap pawlkhat hong pai hi ci in ama tungah ko uh hi. 
1Kings20:18 Ama in thupia a, “Hong sim tu in hong kuan ahizong, kilemna ngen nuam in hong pai ahizong, amate a nungta in pummat siat vun,” ci hi." 
1Kings20:19 Ngalkap khangmoite in kisimna lampui in, Israel ngalkaphonpi in zuisak a," 
1Kings20:20 tuaciang mi simin ama ii kido pui tek that hi. Syria te tai in, Israel te in del ngawp paih ahihang Benhadad sia siphu tung to in tai a suakta hi, ama sia siphu ngalkap pawlkhat in tonpui hi." 
1Kings20:21 Kumpipa Ahab sia ngalphual ah hong kuan a, siphute le siphu ngalleang te manin, Syria te in nasia takin lel hi." 
1Kings20:22 Tua zawkciang kamsaangpa zongh kumpipa Ahab kungah pai a, “Cia kik in a, na ngalkapte puuapha in, tuaciang a pha takin ngealkhol in, banghang ziam cile Syria kumpipa in mai khaal kipat ciang hong sim kik tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings20:23 Kumpipa Benhadad ii uliante in, “Israel ii pathiante sia mualpi pathiante hi a, tua hu in Israel te in ei hong zo hi. Ahizong, zaangtam ah simin hi leang zo nanak tu hi hing ci uh hi." 
1Kings20:24 Tu in ngamukmang sawmthum le nii te tawpsak in a, ngal a sim ngalkap maangte taw theak in." 
1Kings20:25 Tuaciang nang hong taisan sa ngalkapte za in a tam ngalkaphonpi sam in, siphute le siphu ngalleangte zongh tua za ma sam in. Israel te zaangtamna ah ih sim tu a, tu sia ciangin amate ih zo tu hi,” ci hi Kumpipa Benhadad in amate ii ngaisut piakna sia thukim a, tuabangin ngamta hi." 
1Kings20:26 Khaal kipat hun hong thet kik ciangin ama in ngalkapte sam a, Aphek khuapi ah Israel te sim tu in kuan uh hi." 
1Kings20:27 Israel te sia kisam a, ngalvanh a cing in a kinguan sa hi; amate a kuan ciang pawl nii in kikhen a. Syria te taw kimaingat in ngiaphual saat uh hi. Israel ngalkapte sia Syria te ngamsung theampo ah a kizel te taw teengat ciang keal hon tawmno nii bang ahi hi." 
1Kings20:28 Kamsaang khat Kumpipa Ahab kungah hong pai a, “ Topa in hi bangin ci hi: ‘Syria te in kei sia mualte pathian khat hi a, zaangtam te ii pathian hi ngawl hi hong ci hu in, hi ngalkap hon lian sia kong zosak tu a, tuasia ciang nang le na mite in keima Topa ka hi hunlam nong he tu uh hi, ci hi,’ ” ci in son hi." 
1Kings20:29 Ni sali sung Syria te le Israel te sia kimaitua in a ngiaphual tek ah om uh hi. A ni sali ni ciang amate a kido kipan a, Israel te in Syria te tul zakhat thatlum hi." 
1Kings20:30 A suakta lai teng sia Aphek khuapi sungah tai a, a khuapi luphung cimh in, tua 27,000 te tung san ah taak suk hi. Benhadad zongh khuapi sungah suakta a, inn nung inndoi khat sungah om hi." 
1Kings20:31 Uliante ama kungah pai in, “Israel kumpipate sia ngual hesuak thei hi ci in za khu hi, Koma kawng ah khau-ip puan teangin ka ngawng uh ah khauhual te aw in, Israel kumpipa kungah ko hong paisak ta'n, tua hi le ama in na nuntakna hong khoaikhe tha tu hi,” ci uh hi." 
1Kings20:32 Tua ahikom amate in a kawngah khau-ip puan teang uh a, a ngawng ah khauhualte vial in Ahab kungah, “Na naseampa Benhadad in a nungta in a suatak natu hong maangkaa hi,” ci uh hi. Ahab in, “Ama nungta lai ziam? Pha hi! ama sia ka suapui khat bangma hi!” ci in zo hi." 
1Kings20:33 Benhadad ii uliante in limpha khat ngaingam in a om laitak Ahab in “suapuipa” a ci poma ciang, amate in thakhatin zawp in, “Na ci bangma in Benhadad sia na suapui pa hi!” ci uh hi. “Ama keima kungah hong paipui tavun,” ci in Ahab in thupia hi. Benhadad hong thet ciang Ahab in siphu ngalleang sungah a tokhawm tu in sam hi." 
1Kings20:34 Benhadad in ama munah, “Ka pa ii na pa tung pan khua a laak teng hong pia kik tu khi hi, tuaciang Damascus khua ah nangma atu sumzuak sum leina phual khat zongh ka pa ii Samaria ah a koi bangin koi thei tu ni hi,” ci hi. Ahab in, “Hi thukimna tungtawnin nang hong suatak tu khi hi,” ci in zo kik hi. Ama in kiciamna khat vawtin, Benhadad paisak hi." 
1Kings20:35 Topa ii sawlna bangin kamsaang pawlkhat sung pan khat in a kamsaang pui khat mun ma ah, ama vua in sawl hi. Ahihang tua pa in nial hi," 
1Kings20:36 tua ahikom ama in tua pa tungah, “ Topa ii thupiakna nial na hikom kei nong nusiat po ciang tawpi khat in nang hong thatlum tu hi,” ci hi. Tuaciangin a nusiat po ciang tawpi khat in zui paih a, ama that hi." 
1Kings20:37 Tua zawkciang tua kamsaangpa ma in a dang khat ii munah, “Hong vua ta'n!” ci hi. Hi sia pa in vua hi; ama in nasia takin vua a liamsua hi." 
1Kings20:38 A kimealseal natu in kamsaangpa in a maitang puan taw tuamin pai a, lampi hui ah Israel kumpipa hong kaantan tu ngakin ding hi." 
1Kings20:39 Kumpipa hong kaantan ciang kamsaang pa in biakpui a, “Kumpipa awng, ngal ka do laitakin ngalkap khat in a ngal mat khat kei kungah hong paipui a, ‘Hi sia pa cing in; a suakta napo le na nuntakna taw lul tu ni hi, tua ahibuale zong ngunntang tulthum liau tu ni hi,’ hong ci hi." 
1Kings20:40 Ahihang vai dang taw komla ka hikom tua pa suakta hi” ci hi. Kumpipa in, “Nangma le nangma thu kikhen ni hi, daan na thuak kul tu hi,’ ci in zo hi." 
1Kings20:41 Kamsaangpa in a maituamna puan eaukeak a, thakhat thu in kumpipa in kamsaang khat ahi hunlam tel paih hi." 
1Kings20:42 Tuasia ciang kamsaangpa in kumpipa munah, “Hi sia Topa ii kammal hi: ‘Thalup tu in kong thupiak pa suaktasak na hikom nangma in na nuntakna taw lul tu ni hi, tuaciang ama ii ngalkaphonpi na suataksak hu in nangma ngalkaphonpi kisusia tu hi,’ ” ci hi." 
1Kings20:43 Kumpipa sia Samaria a inn ah cia kikin thinngim in a thin kiam hi. 
1Kings21:1 Jezreel khua sung Kumpipa Ahab ii kumpi inn hui ah Naboth a kici pasal khat ii sapithuan om hi. 
1Kings21:2 Ni khat ni in Ahab in Naboth munah, “Na sapithuan kei hong pia ta'n; ka kumpi inn taw kinai a, tua leitang sia antee lamsang ciin na huan tu dei khi hi. Sapit huan a phazaw khat hong pia tu khi hi, ahibuale na deizaw le a man kilawm khat hong pia tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings21:3 Naboth in, “Hi sapithuan sia ka taanghpupite tung pan ka luasuk hi a, Topa in nang kong piak tu hong khaam hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
1Kings21:4 Ahab inn ah cia a, Naboth ii kampau teng hu in thin uukin a thinnuam ngawlin om hi. A lupna tungah lum a, pang sang nga in an ne nuam ngawl hi." 
1Kings21:5 A zi Jezebel sia ama kungah pai in, “Banghangin tuaza in na thinnuam ngawl ziam? Banghang an ne ngawl tu ni ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
1Kings21:6 Ama in, “Naboth ii kei tungah hong ci teng hang hi. A sapithuan lei tu in ka paupui a, a uuk le zong huan dang khat piak tu in ka ci hi, ahihang ama in tua huan sia na neisa suak thei ngawl tu hong ci hi!” ci in zo hi." 
1Kings21:7 Jezebel in, “Tua le, nang kumpipa ni ziam maw hi ngawl ni ziam? Na lupna pan tho in, na maitaisakin a, an ne in. Naboth ii sapithuan keima hong ngasak tu khi hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
1Kings21:8 Tua zawkciang ama in laithak pawlkhat at in, Ahab min bul a, tazeik tuum in, Jezreel khua a uliante le lampuite thaak hi." 
1Kings21:9 A laithakte sungah: “An tan ni khat taangko vun, mipite sam vun, tuaciang Naboth sia upat vawt vun." 
1Kings21:10 Mihing pha ngawl nii in a maitang panin Pathian le kumpipa a haamsiatna huvau mawsuansak vun. Tua zawkciang khuapi puasia ah paipui in suangtum taw deanglum vun,” ci hi." 
1Kings21:11 Jezreel khua uliante le khua mi lampuite in Jezebel ii thupiak bangin ngamta uh hi. 
1Kings21:12 Amate in antan ni khat taangko in mipi sam a, Naboth sia upat vawt uh hi." 
1Kings21:13 Misia te nii in ama sia mipi mai ah Pathian le kumpipa haamsiat hi ci in mawsuanh hi, tua ahikom ama sia khuapi puasia ah kipaipui in suangtum taw kideanglum hi." 
1Kings21:14 Jezebel tungah kam kithaak a: “Naboth kithatlum zo hi,” ci hi."
