1Kings21:15 Jezebel in kam kithaak sia a nga po ciang, Ahab munah, “Naboth sia thi zo hi. Tu in a sapithuan nang hong zuak nop ngawl sia la in tang in,” ci hi." 
1Kings21:16 Thakhatin Ahab pai in sapithuan sia a neisa tu in la hi. 
1Kings21:17 Tuaciang Topa in Tishbe panin kamsaangpa Elijah munah," 
1Kings21:18 “Samaria ah Kumpipa Ahab kungah va pai ta'n. Ama sia Naboth ii sapithuan sungah tua huan sia a neisa sua tu in kithoai na mu tu hi. 
1Kings21:19 Ama munah son in, keima Topa in ama munah, ‘Pasalpa na suamlup zawkciang a neisa la tu in kithoai lalai ni ziam,’ ci khi hi. Ama tungah hi teng son in: ‘Naboth ii chisan uite ii a lia na mun ma ah nangma chisan zongh tua uite in liak tu hi!’ ci in son ta'n,” ci hi." 
1Kings21:20 Ahab in Elijah a mu ciang, “Ka ngal pa awng, kei hong pha zo ngawngaw ni ziam?” ci hi. Elijah in “Hi hi, hong pha zo khi hi,” ci in zo hi. “ Topa muna ah khialna hi teng na vawt natu in nangma le nangma kipumpiak ni hi." 
1Kings21:21 Tua ahikom Topa in, ‘Tuasiatna nang tungah kong piangsak tu hi. Nangma le na innkuan sungah pa a minpiang a haam a moi theampo kong heam siat tu hi." 
1Kings21:22 Na bangkua sia Nebat ii tapa Kumpipa Jeroboam bangkua bang hi tu a, Ahijah ii tapa Kumpipa Baasha ii bangkua bang hi tu hi, banghang ziam cile nangma in ka thin uuk natu in nong sau a, Israel te sia mawna sungah lam na pui hi,’ hong ci hi." 
1Kings21:23 Topa in Jezebel taw kisai in, a luang Jezreel khuapi sungah ui in ne tu hi, ci hi." 
1Kings21:24 Na mealheakte khuapi sungah a thite ui in ne tu a, ngam taanzauna munah a thite vaciik in ne tu hi,” ci hi," 
1Kings21:25 (Topa muna ah Ahab bangin khialna vawt natu a kipumpiak kuama dang om ngawl hi — tua theampo a zi Jezebel ii hanthotna panin piang ahi hi. 
1Kings21:26 Israel mite maisang a nawk lai in ngamsung pan Topa ii nawkeak Amor te ii biak bangma in ama in milim biakna taw maizumhuaibel mawnate vawt hi.) 
1Kings21:27 Elijah ii a pau tu teng a man ciang Ahab in a puansilh lai te baltham in, suut a, khau-ip puan silh hi. Ama in an ne ngawlin khau-ippuan te taw lum a, mainuu in thin lalin vavak hi." 
1Kings21:28 Topa in kamsaangpa Elijah munah," 
1Kings21:29 “Ahab in keima mai ah bangzata kiniamkhiak in a om sia na mu ziam? Hi bangin ngamta ahiciang ama khan sungah tuasiatna piangsak ngawl tu khi hi; a tapa ii khan sung in Ahab bangkua sungah tuasiatna piangsak tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings22:1 Israel te le Syria te kilaklaw ah tua zawk kum nii sung ngal kilemna om hi," 
1Kings22:2 ahihang a kum thumna ciang Judah kumpipa Jehoshaphat in Israel kumpipa Ahab taw kisi tu in hong pai hi. 
1Kings22:3 Ahab in a uliante munah, “Banghangin Syria kumpipa tung pan Gilead ngam Ramoth khua laak kik natu bangma seam ngawl hi ziam? Tuasia eima neisa hi!” ci in dongh hi." 
1Kings22:4 Tuaciang Ahab in Jehoshaphat munah, “Ramoth sim tu in kei taw nong paikhawm tu ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Jehoshaphat in, “Nangma ii kingin hunin, kei zongh kinging sa in om khi hi,” ci in zo hi, “Ka ngalkapte le ka siphu ngalkapte zongh tuabang ma hi," 
1Kings22:5 ahizong Topa dongh phot tawng,” ci hi." 
1Kings22:6 Tua ahikom Ahab in kamsaangte 400 bang samin, “Kei pai in Ramoth sim tu khi ziam maw, sim ngawl tu khi ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Amate in, “Sim in, Topa in zawna hong pia tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
1Kings22:7 Ahihang Jehoshaphat in, “ Topa ih dok thei natu in kamsaang dang om nawn ngawl ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
1Kings22:8 Ahab in, “Khat om lai hi, Imlah ii tapa Micaiah hi. Ahihang ama ensan khi hi, banghang ziam cile ama in kei atu a pha bangma sonkhol ngeingawl hi; a pha ngawl khat veu hi tawntung hi,” ci in zo hi. Jehoshaphat in “Tuabangin ci heak in!” ci in zo kik hi." 
1Kings22:9 Tuasia ciang, Ahab in zum uliante khat sam a, Micaiah thakhatin hong paipui ta'n, ci in sawl hi." 
1Kings22:10 Kumpipate nii sia kumpi puantualte silh a, Samaria kongpi pua sang ancilna ah kumpi tokhumte tungah a to laitakin, kamsaang theampo in amate mai ah thusuakte son uh hi." 
1Kings22:11 Amate sung pan khat, Chenaanah ii tapa Zedekiah in thik kiite vawt a, Ahab munah, “Hisia Topa ii pauna hi: ‘Hite taw Syria te na sim tu a, na zocip tu hi,’ ” ci hi." 
1Kings22:12 Kamsaang dang theampo in tuabang vive ma in ci uh hi. “Ramoth a sim tu kuan tavun, zo tu nu hi,” ci uh hi. “ Topa in zawna hong pia tu hi.”" 
1Kings22:13 Tua laitakin Micaiah sam tu in a pai ulian pa in, “Kamsaang dangte theampo in kumpipa zawna tu bebek son zo hi, nang zongh tuabang ma son hamtang lete pha tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings22:14 Ahihang Micaiah in, “A nungta Topa min lo in kamciam ka piakna pan ama ii son a hong sawl teng son tu khi hi!” ci in zo hi." 
1Kings22:15 Ama Kumpipa Ahab mai ah hong kipaipui ciang, kumpipa in, “Micaiah awng, Kumpipa Jehoshaphat le kei Ramoth ah kuanin sim tu khu ziam maw, sim ngawl tu khu ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Micaiah in, “Sim vun! Noma zo tu nu hi. Topa in zawna hong pia tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
1Kings22:16 Ahihang Ahab in, “ Topa min taw kei tungah nong pau ciangin thumaan thutak son in! Bang tanvei tuabangin hong ci tu khi ziam?” ci in zo kik hi." 
1Kings22:17 Micaiah in, “Israel ngalkapte sia mualtung tengah tuu cing pa om ngawl a tuute kithezau bangin ka mu hi. Tuaciang Topa in, ‘Hi mite in lampui nei ngawl hi; inn ah thinnuam takin cia hen,’ ” ci hi." 
1Kings22:18 Ahab in Jehoshaphat munah, “Ama in kei huvau peuma a pha khat zongh hong sonkholsak ngeingawl hi, kong ci sa hi ka na ngawl ziam; a sia khat veu hi tawntung hi!” ci hi." 
1Kings22:19 Micaiah in zomto a, “Tu in Topa pauna teng ngai vun! Topa sia vantung a kumpi tokhum tungah to a, ama ii vantunglalangte a kiim ah a ding ka mu hi.”" 
1Kings22:20 Topa in, ‘Ramoth ah Ahab pai in a kithalup natu in akua in ama theam tu nu ziam?’ ci in dongh hi. Vantunglalang pawlkhat in son khat nei a, a dangte in thudang khat a son uh hi," 
1Kings22:21 a khakbelin thaa khat sia mai ah hong pai a, Topa kung zuanin, ‘Keima in ama theam tu khi hi,’ a ci hi." 
1Kings22:22 Topa in ‘Bangbangin maw?’ ci in dongh hi. Tua thaa in, ‘Keima pai in Ahab ii kamsaangte theampo leilot thu ka sonsak tu hi!’ ci in zo kik hi. Topa in, ‘Va pai ta'n a, va theam ta'n, theam zo tu ni hi,’ ” ci hi." 
1Kings22:23 Tuaciang Micaiah in thu khup a, “A piang thu in hisia hi. Topa in na kamsaang hite nang tungah leilot thu hong sonsak hi. Ahihang ama mama in nang tuasiatna nga tu in a thutan sa hi!” ci hi." 
1Kings22:24 Tuaciangin kamsaangpa Zedekiah in Micaiah kungah paito in, a maitang beang hi, tuaciang, “Bang hun pan kipan Topa thaa in kei hong nusia a, nang tungah hong pau ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
1Kings22:25 Micaiah in, “Inn nungsang inndoi sung khat ah a buu tu in na pai ciangin mu tu ni hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
1Kings22:26 Tua zawkciang Kumpipa Ahab in a uliante khat munah, “Micaiah man in a, khuapi ukpa Amon le Kumpipa tapa Joash tungah paipui vun." 
1Kings22:27 Amate in ama thong sungah koi hen a, bangma tat ngawlin kong heak kik dong anluum le tui bek taw na vaak hen, ci in son in,” ci in thupia hi." 
1Kings22:28 “Bangma tat ngawlin nong heak kik le Topa in kei tungtawn a hong pau ngawl hi tu hi,” ci in Micaiah in ci ngaw hi. Tuaciang ama in, “Ka ci sa teng kuama po in hong ngai tavun!” ci lai hi." 
1Kings22:29 Tua zawkciang Israel kumpipa Ahab le Judah kumpipa Jehoshaphat te in Gilead ah Ramoth khuapi sim tu in pai uh hi. 
1Kings22:30 Ahab in Jehoshaphat munah, “Ngal kisim ciangin kei kong kimealseal tu a, nang na hile kumpi puan teng ma nong silh tu hi,” ci hi. Tuabangin Israel kumpipa kidona phual ah kimealseal in pai hi." 
1Kings22:31 Syria kumpipa in a siphu ngalleang uk 32 te munah, Israel kumpipa ngawlpo a dang khat zong sim ngawl tu nu hi ci hi." 
1Kings22:32 Tua ahikom amate in Kumpipa Jehoshaphat a mu uh ciangin a vekpi ma in Israel kumpipa sa ahiciang ama sim tu in kiheak uh hi. Ahihang ama hong au keak ciangin 
1Kings22:33 ama sia Israel kumpipa ahi ngawl hunlam phawk uh hi, tuaciang amate in sim nawn ngawl uh hi." 
1Kings22:34 Ahizong Syria ngalkapte khat ii kap thaltang khat in Kumpipa Ahab ii thikpuan kipeena pan kha luilam hi, “Kei liam khi hi! Ngalphual panin kiheam in!” ci in a siphu ngalleang hawlpa oksan hi." 
1Kings22:35 A kido saan lai tengin Kumpipa Ahab sia a siphu ngalleang sungah kikhuangkho in to a, Syria te maingat hi. A liamna ma pan chi luang in siphu ngalleang nuai tawdap teng tuam a, a nitak sang ciangin ama thi hi." 
1Kings22:36 Nitum kuan ciangin Israel ngalkapte a lian a no tungah thupiakna hong pai a: “Mi simin a ngam le a khuapi tek ah cia hen!,” ci hi." 
1Kings22:37 Tuabangin Kumpipa Ahab thi hi. A luang Samaria ah kiciapui a, kiphum hi." 
1Kings22:38 Topa ii piang tu hi a ci bangma in, a siphu ngalleang sia Samaria tuili no ah kisil a, tua munah a chi ui in liak a, pumpi kizuak numeite kisil hi." 
1Kings22:39 Saiha taw a zep a kumpi inn le ama ii a sak khuapite thu a kihel Kumpipa Ahab ii a sep a vawt dangte theampo sia Israel Kumpipate Taanghthu sungah kikhum hi. 
1Kings22:40 Ama ii thi ciangin a tapa Ahazia in a kumpi za laih hi. 
1Kings22:41 Israel kumpipa Ahab ii maan zawk a kum lina ciang, Asa ii tapa Jehoshaphat sia Judah kumpipa suak hi," 
1Kings22:42 ama kum 35 pha a, Jerusalem panin kum 25 sung uk hi. A nu sia Azubah hi a, Shilhi ii tanu ahi hi." 
1Kings22:43 Ama mai ah a pa Asa bangma in ama in Topa muna ah a maanin ngamta hi; ahihang doai biakna munte sia kisusia ngawl a, mipite in tua munah sangaw biakpiaknate le ngimnamtui halna in zangh suak uh hi." 
1Kings22:44 Jehoshaphat in Israel kumpipa taw kilemna vawt hi. 
1Kings22:45 Jehoshaphat ii a sep a vawt na dangte theampo, a hanna, a ngal donate theampo Judah Kumpipate ii Taanghthu sungah kikhum hi." 
1Kings22:46 Ama in doai biate ii biaknataute ah a pa Asa hun panin a taanglai numei ahizong, pasal ahizong pumpizuakte heam siat hi." 
1Kings22:47 Edom ngam in kumpi nei ngawl a; Judah kumpipa ii koi a khutdawn khat in uk hi. 
1Kings22:48 Kumpipa Jehoshaphat in Ophir ngam pan khamh pua in a pai natu tuipi teambawte vawt hi; ahihang tua teambawte Eziongeber ah lal a, tuipi sungah hong pai ngeingawl hi." 
1Kings22:49 Tua zawkciang Israel kumpipa Ahaziah in ama mite le Jehoshaphat ii mite tuipi sungah khualhaw khawm tu in paisak hi, ahihang Jehoshaphat in saang ngawl hi." 
1Kings22:50 Jehoshaphat thi a, David Khuapi sung kumpite thaan ah kiphum hi, tuaciang a tapa Jehoram in a kumpi za laih hi." 
1Kings22:51 Judah kumpipa Jehoshaphat ii maan zawk kum sawm le kum sali kumin Ahab ii tapa Ahaziah sia Israel kumpi suak hi, tuaciang ama in Samaria panin kum nii sung uk hi." 
1Kings22:52 Israel te sia mawna sungah a then, a pa Ahab ii seksol ngamtatna bang le, a nu Jezebel le Kumpipa Jeroboam bangma in ama in Topa tungah maw hi." 
1Kings22:53 Ama in a mai a, a pa bangma in Baal bia in, a na sepsak hi, ama in Israel ii Pathian Topa a thin uuksak hi." 
2Kings1:1 Israel kumpipa Ahab thi zawkciang Moab ngam in Israel langpanin leedo hi. 
2Kings1:2 Israel kumpipa Ahaziah sia ama ii Samaria kumpi inn tung dawl thaam tung panin taak a, nasia takin liam hi. Tua ahikom ama in Philistine khuapi Ekron ah kamtai paisak a, a dam kik tu le a dam nawn ngawl tu Philistine te pathian Baalzebub donghsak hi." 
2Kings1:3 Ahihang Topa ii vantunglalang khat in Tishbe pan kamsaang Elijah sia Kumpipa Ahaziah ii kamtaite taw kisi tu in paisak a, “Banghangin Ekron pathian Baalzebub tungah thu dongh tu nu ziam?" 
2Kings1:4 Israel ngam ah pathian om ngawl hi ci in na ngaisut uh hang ziam ci in amate donghsak hi. Topa in, ‘Na liamna pan dam kik ngawl tu ni hi; thi tu ni hi hong ci hi!’ ci in kumpipa tungah son in,” ci hi. Elijah in Topa thupiak bangin ngamta a," 
2Kings1:5 tuaciang kamtaite kumpipa kungah heak kik uh hi. “Banghangin hong heak kik nu ziam?” ci in ama in dongh hi. 
2Kings1:6 Amate in, “Pasal khat taw ka kisik uh ciang, ama in heak kik in hong sawl a, Topa ii nang tungah, ‘Banghangin Ekron pathian Baalzebub kungah thu dongh tu in kamtaite paisak ni ziam? Israel ngam ah pathian om ngawl hi, ci in ngaisun ni ziam? Na liamna pan dam kik ngawl tu ni hi, thi tu ni hi!’ ” hong ci teng sonin hong sawl hi." 
2Kings1:7 Kumpipa in, “Pasal pa ii pianzia bangbang ahi ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
2Kings1:8 “Ama in nganhing phaw taw a kivawt puantual khat silh a, tuaciang savun kawngkhau taw sawm hi,” ci in amate in zo hi. “Ama Elijah hi!” kumpi pa in ci hi." 
2Kings1:9 Tua zawkciang ama in ulian khat le pasal 50 sia Elijah sam tu in paisak hi. A ulian pa in ama mualtung khat ah to in mu a, ama munah, “Pathian ii mipa awng, kumpipa in nong paisuk natu thu hong pia hi,” ci hi." 
2Kings1:10 Elijah in, “Kei Pathian ii mi ka hi le van panin meikuang hong paisuk tahen a, nang le na mite hong thatlum tahen!” ci in zo hi. Thakhat thu in meikuang hong pai suk a, ulian pa le a mite thatlum siat hi." 
2Kings1:11 Kumpipa in ulian dang khat le pasal sawmnga sawl kik a, amate paito in, Elijah munah, “Pathian ii mipa awng, kumpipa in thakhatin nong paisuk natu thu hong pia hi!” ci hi." 
2Kings1:12 “Kei, Pathian ii mi ka hile, vantung panin meikuang hong paisuk tahen a, nang le na mite hong thatlum tahen,” ci in Elijah in zo hi. Thakhat thu in Pathian ii meikuang hong paisuk a ulian pa le a mite thatlum hi." 
2Kings1:13 Khatvei ma kumpipa in ulian khat le mihing sawmnga sawl hi. Ama mual tungah kaato in, Elijah mai ah khupdinin, “Pathian ii mipa awng, kei le ka mite hong hesuak ta'n. Ka nuntakna uh hong khoaikhe ta'n!" 
2Kings1:14 Ulian dangte nii le a mite sia vantung pan meikuang in thatlum siat hi; ahizong kei ka hile hong hesuak ta'n!” ci hi. 
2Kings1:15 Topa ii vantunglalang in Elijah munah, “Ama taw paisuk ta'n a, lau heak in,” ci hi. Tua ahikom Elijah sia ulianpa taw kumpipa kungah pai in," 
2Kings1:16 ama munah, “ Topa in hi bangin ci hi: ‘Israel ngam ah thudok tu pathian om ngawl bang keak in — Ekron te ii pathian Baalzebub kungah kamtaite paisak na hikom — nang dam kik ngawl tu ni hi; thi tu ni hi!’ ” ci in son hi." 
2Kings1:17 Topa ii Elijah tungtawnin a son bangma Ahaziah thi hi. Ahaziah in tapa nei ngawl hi, tua ahikom a suapuipa Joram in a kumpiza laih a, tua laitak sia Judah kumpipa, Jehoshaphat ii tapa Jehoram ii maan zawk a kum niina ahi hi." 
2Kings1:18 Kumpipa Ahaziah ii sep le vawt dang theampo sia Israel Kumpite Taanghthu sungah kikhum hi. 
2Kings2:1 Elijah sia suumpei taw vantung ah Topa ii a laakto tu hun hong theng hi. Elijah le Elisha sia Gilgal panin vaiding a," 
2Kings2:2 tuaciang, a lampai kawmin Elijah in Elisha tungah, “Tu in hi sungah na om in; Topa in Bethel ah pai in hong sawl hi,” ci hi. Ahihang Elisha in, “Nang hong nusia ngawl tu khi hi, ci in a nungta Topa tung le nang tungah ka thumaanna taw kiciam khi hi,” ci in zo hi. Tua ahikom amate Bethel ah paisuak uh hi." 
2Kings2:3 Tua munah a teang kamsaang honkhat in Elisha kungah pai in, “ Topa in na topa sia tu ni in nang kung pan la tu ahi hunlam na he ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi. Elisha in, “Hi hi, he khi hi. Ahihang tua thu son bua tawng,” ci in zo hi." 
2Kings2:4 Tuasia ciang Elijah in Elisha munah, “Tu in hi sungah na om in; Topa in Jericho khua ah pai in hong sawl zo hi,” ci hi. Ahihang Elisha in, “Nang hong nusia ngawl tu khi hi, ci in a nungta Topa tung le nang tungah ka thumaanna taw kiciam khi hi,” ci in zo hi. Tua ahikom amate Jericho ah paisuak uh hi." 
2Kings2:5 Tua munah a teang kamsaang honkhat in Elisha kungah pai in, “ Topa in tu ni in na topa nang kung pan la tu ahi na he ziam?” ci in ama dongh uh hi. Elisha in, “Hi hi, he khi hi. Ahihang tua thu son bua tawng,” ci hi." 
2Kings2:6 Tuasia zawkciang Elijah in Elisha munah, “Tu in hi sungah na om in; Topa in kei Jordan ngun ah pai in hong sawl hi,” ci hi. Ahihang Elisha in, “Nang hong nusia ngawl tu khi hi, ci in a nungta Topa tung le nang tungah ka thumaanna taw kiciam khi hi,” ci hi. Tua ahikom amate paisuak a," 
2Kings2:7 kamsaangte sung pan 50 in amate Jordan dong zui uh hi. Elijah le Elisha te ngun hui ah tawlnga in, a kamsaang 50 teng sia tawm a kikhuala na ah ding uh hi." 
2Kings2:8 Tuaciang Elijah in a puantual suutin, a zial zawkciang tui saatna in nei hi; tui hong kikhen a, ama le Elisha in a langkhat ah leiko tung tawnin kaantan uh hi." 
2Kings2:9 Tuaciang, Elijah in Elisha munah, “Kei hong kilaak ma in nang atu bang kong vawtsak tu dei ni ziam hong son ta'n,” ci hi. Elisha in, “Na zaa kong laih thei natu in na vaangletna tel ka saan tu za (a zaa nii) hong ngasak ta'n,” ci hi." 
2Kings2:10 Elijah in, “Tuasia piak tu a haksa mama ngetna hi,” ci in zo kik hi. “Ahihang nang kung panin kei hong kilaak nong mu le, tua ngetna sia na nga tu hi; nong mu buale na nga buatu hi,” ci hi." 
2Kings2:11 Amate lam a pai kawmin thu son uh hi; tuaciang thakhat thu in meikuang siphute ii kai meikuang siphu ngalleang khat amate nii kilaklaw ah hong pai a, Elijah sia vantung ah suumpei in kaato pui hi." 
2Kings2:12 Elisha in mu in, Elijah oksan a, “Ka pa, ka pa! Israel a dal a thahat pa! Nang pai zo hi teh!” ci hi. Tuaciang ama in Elijah mu kik nawn ngawl hi. Elisha khuangai in a puantual eau a khen nii sua hi." 
2Kings2:13 Tuaciang hong taaksuk Elijah ii puantual sia tawm in hong heak kik a, Jordan ngun vaal ah ding hi." 
2Kings2:14 Ama in nguntui sia Elijah ii puantual taw vaat a, “Elijah ii Pathian Topa a koi sungah om ziam?” ci hi. Tuaciang ama in tui vaat kik in, tui hong kikhen a, ngun langkhat ah pai hi." 
2Kings2:15 Jericho pan kamsaang 50 teng in ama mu a, “Elijah ii vaangletna Elisha tungah om hi!” ci uh hi. Amate pai a, ama taw kisi in, a mai ah kun uh hi," 
2Kings2:16 tuaciang, “Hi sungah a thahat tingtengh pasal sawmnga om khu hi. Na topa zong tu in pai tek tawng. Topa ii thaa in ama paipui a, mualtung khat, luam sung khat po ah nusia hi tha tu hi,” ci uh hi. Elisha in, “Hi ngawl hi. Pai ngawl het tu nu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
2Kings2:17 Ahihang amate a thukim dawdong a nget uh ciang paisak hi. Sawmnga teng in mun saang mun niamna ah Elijah sia ni thum sung zong ahihang mu ngawl uh hi. 
2Kings2:18 Tuaciang Jericho ah amate ngakin a om Elisha kungah hong heak kik ciang, ama in, “Pai heak vun kong ci ma hi ngawl ziam?” ci hi." 
2Kings2:19 Jericho panin pasal pawlkhat Elisha kungah pai a, “Na heak bangma, topa awng, hisia in khuapi pha khat hi, ahihang a tui pha ngawl a, nau tolsak thei hi,” ci uh hi." 
2Kings2:20 Ama in, “Kuang thak khat sungah ci tawm hong paipui tavun,” ci in thupia hi. Amate in ama kungah tuasia paipui uh hi," 
2Kings2:21 tuaciang ama in cik ah pai in, tui sungah a ci lawn a, “Hisia Topa ii kammal hi: ‘Tui hisia thiangthosak khi hi, tua tui in thina ahizong, nautolna ahizong piangsak nawn ngawl tu hi,’ ” ci hi." 
2Kings2:22 Tuaciang tua tui Elisha ii son bangma in tua hun pan kipan thiangtho hi. 
2Kings2:23 Elisha in Jericho nusia in Bethel ah a pai le, patang pawlkhat khua khat panin hong pusuak in, ama ciammuina in nei a, “Hi sung pan tai in, lutol pa awng,” ci in oksan uh hi." 
2Kings2:24 Elisha hong kingeilee in, amate salh a, Topa min taw haamsiat hi. Tua zawkciang vompui nii duisung pan hong pai in, patangte sung pan 42 laaitham uh hi." 
2Kings2:25 Elisha Carmel Mual ah kaato a, tua zawkciang Samaria ah heak kik hi." 
2Kings3:1 Judah kumpipa Jehoshaphat a maan zawk a kum sawm le liat laitakin, Ahab ii tapa Joram sia Israel kumpipa suak a, tuaciang ama in Samaria panin kum sawm le kum nii sung uk hi." 
2Kings3:2 Ama sia Topa tungah mawna vawt a, ahizong a pa ahibuale a nu Jezebel za in sia ngawl hi; ama in a pa ii vawt Baal biak natu milim sia kaivawk hi." 
2Kings3:3 Ahizong, ama mai ah a maang Nebat ii tapa, Kumpipa Jeroboam bangma in mawna sungah Israel lampui a, kheal nuam ngawl hi." 
2Kings3:4 Moab Kumpipa Mesha in tuu khoai a, kum simin Israel kumpipa tungah tuuno 100,000 le tuu 100,000 ii mul teng shia in pia hi." 
2Kings3:5 Ahihang Israel kumpipa Ahab a thi ciang Kumpipa Mesha in Israel te langpanin leedo hi. 
2Kings3:6 Thakhat thu in Kumpipa Joram in Samaria nusia in a ngalkapte khawmtua hi. 
2Kings3:7 Ama in Judah kumpipa Jehoshaphat tungah kam thaak a: “Moab kumpipa in kei langpanin hong leedo hi; ama sim tu in kei nong pawm tu ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Kumpipa Jehoshaphat in, “Hong pawm tu khi hi,” ci in zo hi. “Keima, ka mite le ka siphute, na dei babangin zeak in." 
2Kings3:8 Ama ih sim natu koisung lampi tawn tu hi ziam?” ci hi. “Edom duisung kaantan in a pai lam sau sia ih tawn tu hi,” ci in Joram in zo hi." 
2Kings3:9 Tua ahikom Kumpipa Joram, Judah le Edom kumpipate ngamkuan uh hi. Ni sali a pai zawk uh ciang a tui neak tu uh bo a, mihingte atu ahizong, vanh pua ngannote atu ahizong bangma om nawn ngawl hi." 
2Kings3:10 Kumpipa Jehoshaphat in, “Man sa hi hing!” ci hi. “ Topa in ei teng thum sia Moab kumpipa ii a uuk po hong vawt tu in hong koi hi!” ci hi." 
2Kings3:11 Kumpipa Jehoshaphat in, “Ama tungtawnin Topa ih dok thei tu hi sungah kamsaang khat om hi ngawl ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Kumpipa Joram ii ngalkap bu khat in, “Shaphat ii tapa Elisha hi sungah om hi. Ama sia Elijah ii khutdawn pa ahi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
2Kings3:12 Kumpipa Jehoshaphat in, “Ama sia kamsaang maan khat hi,” ci hi. Tua ahikom kumpipate thum sia Elisha kungah pai uh hi." 
2Kings3:13 Elisha in Israel kumpipa munah, “Banghangin nang hong hu tu khi ziam?” ci hi. “Na pa le na nu ii thudok tua kamsaangte dongh tu in va pai ta'n,” ci hi. Joram in, “Hi ngawl hi, Topa in ko kumpi thum teng sia Moab kumpipa ii a uuk po hong law tu in hong koi sa hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
2Kings3:14 Elisha in, “A na ka sepsak a nungta Topa taw kiciam khi hi, na kipawl puipa Judah kumpipa Jehoshaphat ka zatak hang hi buale nang taw bangma kipee-aw nuam ngawl khi hi." 
2Kings3:15 Tu in music thiam khat hong sam tavun,” ci in zo hi. Music thiampa in a tengtongh hong tum tak ciang Topa ii vaangletna Elisha tungah hong pai a," 
2Kings3:16 tuaciang, ama in, “Hi sia Topa pauna hi: ‘Hi luamko dung theampo ah dum to vun." 
2Kings3:17 Vui ahizong ngua ahizong na mu mun uh a om ngawl hang, hi luam sia tui taw kidim tu a, noma, na ngannote uh le na vanh pua ngannote ii dawn tu kicing piikpeak tu hi,’ ” ci hi." 
2Kings3:18 Tuaciang Elisha in zomto a, “Ahihang hisia in Topa sep tu in a ol mama nasep khat hi; Moab te zongh hong zosak lai tu hi." 
2Kings3:19 Noma in amate ii a hoi mama a kip a kho in a vawt khuapi theampo na zothal tu uh hi; amate ii thingnga kung theampo phuktan in, a tuinaak teng kangsak tu nu hi, tuaciang, leipha a lo teng theampo suang dimsak in, na siasak tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
2Kings3:20 A zing ciang zingsangin, sangaw biakpiakna vawt ngei hun laitakin, Edom sang pan tui hong luang a, lei khuum hi." 
2Kings3:21 Tua kumpi thum teng amate sim tu in hong pai hunlam Moab te in a zaak uh ciang pa a minpiang ngalhiam toai thei theampo a moibel pan a haambel dong kiko in, ngamngi ah amate panmun la sak uh hi." 
2Kings3:22 A zing ciang zingsang a thaw uh ciang, tui tungah ni hong taang a, tui sia chi bang a sanin kimusak hi." 
2Kings3:23 “Chisan hi!” ci in amate in au uh hi. “Ngalte ngalkaphonpi thum sia amate le amate kido in kithat hi tu hi! A ngiaphual ah pai in phuul tawng,” ci uh hi." 
2Kings3:24 Ahihang amate tua ngiaphual a thet uh ciang, Israel te in simin, not kik uh hi. Israel te in del tan in, Moab te that uh a," 
2Kings3:25 a khuapite lalthamsak uh hi. Leipha lo khat pawpo a kaantan uh ciangin Israel mi simin tua lo sung teng theampo suang a dim dongin suang khat tek lawn uh hi; amate in ciktui naakte zongh kangsak in, thingnga kungte phuk uh hi. A khakbel ciangin Kir Heres khuapi bek taanglai a, tuaciang saili kapte in uumci in sim uh hi." 
2Kings3:26 Moab kumpipa in a ngallelna a phaw tak ciang ama in namsau zangh thiam mihing 700 taw a ngalte kawm panin Syria kumpipa kungah suatak tu hanciam ahihang, suak zo ngawl hi." 
2Kings3:27 Tua ahikom ama in ama za laih tu a tapa lianbel sia la in, khuapi luphung tung pan Moab pathian tungah sangaw biakpiakna in pia hi. Israel te sia lau ngawp ahikom tua khuapi pan nungkin in amate ngam ah heak kik uh hi." 
2Kings4:1 Kamsaang honkhat sung a kihel khat ii zi meingong nu sia Elisha kungah pai in, “Topa awng, ka pasal thi zo hi! Na heak bangma in ama sia Pathian kiita pasal khat hi, ahihang tu in a leibatna pasal khat in, ka pasal ii leiba taangin ka tate nii sila in a la tu hong pai zo hi,” ci in son hi." 
2Kings4:2 Ama in, “Nang atu bang hong vawtsak tu khi ziam?” ci in dongh hi. “Inn ah bang nei ni ziam, hong son ta'n,” ci hi. Ama in, “Olive thau thawl khat simngawl a dang nei mama ngawl khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
2Kings4:3 Elisha in, “Na innpaamte kungah va pai ta'n a, bealhawm a tam thei zaza zawng in,” ci in sawl hi." 
2Kings4:4 “Tua zawkciang nangma le na tapate inn sungah tum in, kongkha khak vun a, bealte ii sungah sathau sung tavun. Khat a dim simin a hui ah heam vun,” ci hi." 
2Kings4:5 Tua ahikom nupi nu in a tapate taw inn sungah tumin, bangkua a kha zawkciang olive thau a om thawlno sia la in a tapate ii hong paipui bealte sungah sathau sungsuk hi." 
2Kings4:6 Amate in bealte a dip siat zawk uh ciang nupi nu in a dang a om lai ziam ci in dongh hi. A tapate khat in, “Tuasia a khakbel hi,” ci in zo hi. Tuasia ciang olive thau luang nawn ngawl hi." 
2Kings4:7 Ama kamsaangpa Elisha kungah pai kik a, kamsaang pa in ama munah, “Olive thaute zuak tavun a, na leiba theampo lo tavun, tuaciang nang le na tapate kivaak khom natu in sum a khomkhat ma hong vaal lai tu hi,” ci hi." 
2Kings4:8 Ni khat ni in nupi hau khat ii a teenna Shunem khua ah Elisha haw hi. Ama in kamsaang pa an ne tu in sam a, tuasia pan kipan Shunem ah a pai simin ama inn ah an ne hi." 
2Kings4:9 Ama in a pasal munah, “Hi sungah hong pai tawntung pasal sia mi thiangtho khat hi vangiat tu hi." 
2Kings4:10 Innkhum tungah inndoino khat vawtsak in, lupna khat, sabuai khat, tokhum khat le meiinn khat tua inndoi sungah koisak tawng, ama hong haw simin tua munah om thei tu hi,” ci hi." 
2Kings4:11 Ni khat ni ciang Elisha sia Shunem ah hong zuan kik a, toitang tu in a inndoi ah kaato hi." 
2Kings4:12 Ama in a naseampa Gehazi sawl in, nupinu samsak hi. Tua nu hong pai ciang," 
2Kings4:13 ama in Gehazi munah, “Ei ii ih kitaangsap teng hong sik natu hong ngim law hu in ama atu bang ka vawtsak thei tu ziam ci in dongh in. Kumpipa tungah ahizong ngalkaphonpi ukpa tungah ahizong ama atu kampha khat po sonsak le hong oai hi tha tu hi,” ci hi. Tua nu in, “Hi sungah ka mite kawmah ka kisap theampo nei khi zam,” ci hi." 
2Kings4:14 Elisha in Gehazi munah, “Tua ahile ama atu bang vawtsak thei tu khi ziam?” ci dongh hi. Ama in, “Pha hi, tua nu in tapa nei ngawl a, a pasal le huai zo hi,” ci hi." 
2Kings4:15 Elisha in, “Ama hi sungah hong pai natu son in,” ci in thupia hi. Ama hong pai a, bangkua ah hong ding hi," 
2Kings4:16 tuaciang Elisha in ama munah, “Mai ciang tubang hun in tapa khat na khut sungah toai tu ni hi,” ci hi. Ama in, “Oh! Topa awng nong hesuakna in leilot thu hong son heak in. Nang sia Pathian mihing khat na hi hi!” ci hi." 
2Kings4:17 Ahihang Elisha ii ci bangin a mai kum tua hun khawng ciangin ama in tapa khat hing hi. 
2Kings4:18 Kum tawmvei zawkciang anlaak hun laitakin, patangno sia zing khat, a pa kung zuan tu in pusuak hi, a pa sia lo sungah an late taw diang hi." 
2Kings4:19 Thakhatin patangno sia in a pa tung ah, “Ka lutang na hi! Ka lutang na hi!” ci hi. A pa in, “Patangno sia a nu kungah na puak ta'n,” ci in naseam khat sawl hi." 
2Kings4:20 Naseam pa in patangno sia a nu kungah puak kik a, a nu in ni sun dong a kaang sungah toai hi, tua hunsung in a ta thi hi." 
2Kings4:21 A nu in patangno sia Elisha ii inndoi ah toai to in lupna tungah sial a nusia hi, tuaciang kongkha khak hi." 
2Kings4:22 Tua zawkciang ama in a pasal samin, ama munah, “Naseamte khat hi sungah laa taw hong paisak ta'n. Kamsaang pa Elisha kungah ka pai kul tu hi. A manlang thei belin hong heak kik tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
2Kings4:23 “Banghang tu ni na pai kul tu ziam? Tu ni sia Sabbath le hi ngawl Thathak Poai ni le hi ngawl hi,” a pasal in ci hi. Tua nu in, “Pha maw bo,” ci in zo hi." 
2Kings4:24 Tuaciang ama in laa kungh thuasakin, naseampa tung ah, “Laa sia a manlang thei za in paisak in, keima kong sawl ngawl po haisak heak in,” ci in thupia hi." 
2Kings4:25 Tuabangin ama vaiding in Elisha ii omna Carmel Mual ah pai hi. Ama ii hong pai sia Elisha in a khuala thithim na pan mu a, a naseampa Gehazi munah, “En in — zia sungah Shunem pan nupinu hong pai hi!" 
2Kings4:26 Manlang in va pai ta'n a, ama ahizong a pasal ahizong a tapa ahizong a dam tek ziam, va dawp ta'n,” ci hi. Nupinu in Gehazi munah na theampo pha hi ci hi," 
2Kings4:27 ahihang Elisha kung a thet ciang a mai ah kun sukin a peangte pom hi. Gehazi in ama sawn tu in kithoai ahihang Elisha in, “Koi po in. Ama nasia takin a thin hee ahi hunlam mu thei ngawl ni ziam? Tuaciang Topa in a thu khat zong kei hong son ngawl het hi,” ci hi." 
2Kings4:28 Nupi nu in ama tungah, “Topa awng, tapa khat nang tungah hong ngen kana khi ziam? Lametna saangpi ka nei thaak tu in hong hi heak in hong ci hi ka na ngawl khi ziam?” ci hi." 
2Kings4:29 Elisha sia Gehazi sangah kiheakin, ama munah, “Manlang in! Ka ciangkhut la in va pai ta'n. Lampi ah na kisik pui pawpo paupui tu in tawlnga heak in, tuaciang khat po in hong paupui le zong ama na zo kik natu hun bosak heak in. A inn ah tangtan in va pai ta'n a, patangno sia tungah ka ciangkhut va nga ta'n,” ci hi." 
2Kings4:30 Nupi nu in Elisha munah, “A nungta Topa tung le nang tungah ka thumaanna taw kiciam khi hi, nang hong nusia ngawl tu khi hi!” ci hi. Tua bangin amate nii hong heak kik khawm uh hi." 
2Kings4:31 Gehazi sia mai ah paikhol a, Elisha ciangkhut sia patangno ii tungah nga ahihang bangma a nging le om ngawl, nuntakna lim a dang le a om bua hi. Tua ahikom ama Elisha taw kimu tu in hong pai kik a, tuaciang, “Patangno sia khanglo ngawl hi,” ci hi." 
2Kings4:32 Elisha hong thet ciangin, ama nguak inndoi sungah hong tum a, patangno a lupna tungah a thisa in mu hi." 
2Kings4:33 Ama in kongkha khak in Topa tungah thu ngen hi. 
2Kings4:34 Tua zawkciang ama in patangno tungah boksuk a, a kam le a kam, a mit le a mit, a khut le a khut kisisak hi. Tuabangin patangno ii tungah kizanin a om ciang patangno ii ci lum tu in hong kipan hi." 
2Kings4:35 Elisha tho a, inndoi sung tengah vakin, tua zawkciang hong pai kik a, patangno ii tungah khatvei ma kizan kik hi. Patangno sia salivei hetchia lo a, tua sia zawkciang a mit hak hi." 
2Kings4:36 Elisha in Gehazi sam in, patangno ii nu sam a sawl hi. A nu hong sungtan ciang ama in, “Hi sungah, na tapa om hi!” ci hi." 
2Kings4:37 Ama in Elisha peang ah boksuk a, a mai lei phasak hi; tua zawkciang a tapa la in paisan hi." 
2Kings4:38 Khatvei lai, ngam bup sungah kialpi khat a tun lai in Elisha sia Gilgal ah heak kik hi. Ama in kamsaangte honkhat a hil laitakin, a naseampa munah amate atu bealpui khat taw mei tungah sa tuihuan in sawl hi." 
2Kings4:39 A naseamte khat lo sungah ngamh an pawlkhat la in pai hi. Ama in uum ngui khat mu a, uum nga a puak zawk za lo hi. Ama in tuate ciapui in bang ziam ci in he ngawl bul ma in, a sem zawkciang satui sungah tha hi." 
2Kings4:40 Pasalte neak tu in satui thuuk hi, ahihang amate in a tep po uh ciang, Elisha munah “Hisia ngu kisaw hi!” ci in a ne bua uh hi." 
2Kings4:41 Elisha in, an tawm ngenin beal sungah tha hi, tuaciangin ama in, “Amate ii neak tu satui tawm thuuk thua lai vun,” ci hi. Tua zawkciang satui sia bangma siat huai nawn ngawl hi." 
2Kings4:42 Hun dang khat ciang, Baal Shalishah panin pasal khat hong pai a, tua kum in a lak anpal mangtaang taw a vawt anluum luum kul le a balh tawm vaimim ngap pawlkhat hong paipui hi. Elisha in a naseampa munah tua kamsaangte, tuate taw vaakin sawl hi," 
2Kings4:43 ahihang naseampa in, “Mihing zakhat atu hi teng kikhom tu in um ni ziam?” ci in zo hi. Elisha in, “A neak tu in amate pia in, banghang ziam cile amate in ne tu a, a neak vaal zongh om tu hi, Topa in ci hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
2Kings4:44 Tua ahikom a naseampa in an lui a, tuaciang Topa ii ci bangma in, amate theampo in ne a, pawlkhat vaal lai hi." 
2Kings5:1 Syria ngalkaphonpi ukpa Naaman sia Syria kumpipa in nasia takin zakta in upat vawt hi, banghang ziam cile Naaman tungtawnin Topa in Syria ngalkapte zawna pia hi. Ama sia ngalkap mang lian khat hi, ahihang ama in a kiitakhuai mama vun natna khat thuak hi." 
2Kings5:2 Amate ii Israel a sim hunlai khat ah Syria te in Israel numeino khat ciapui in, tua nu sia Naaman zi ii naseamnu suak hi." 
2Kings5:3 Ni khat ni in ama in a tonu tungah, “Samaria a teang kamsaangpa kungah ka topa pai thei le ka oai hi! Ama in a natna teng damsak tu hi,” ci hi." 
2Kings5:4 Naaman in hi thu a zaak ciang kumpipa kungah pai in, numeino ii pauna teng son hi." 
2Kings5:5 Kumpipa in, “Israel kumpipa kungah va pai ta'n a, hi ka laithak sia na puak ta'n,” ci hi. Tua ahikom Naaman vai ding in, ngunntang 30,000, khamh tang 6,000, puan laih natu puan hoi sawm keng hi." 
2Kings5:6 Ama ii puak laithak sungah hi bang ki at hi: “Hi laithak in ka ngalkap bu Naaman kong heaksakna hi. A natna pan na damsak natu ka dei hi,” ci hi." 
2Kings5:7 Israel kumpipa in tua laithak a sim ciangin, thinkiamna taw a puante eaukeak in, “Bangbangin Syria kumpipa in hisia pa damsak thei tu in kei hong um ziam? Nuntakna le thina tungah vaang a nei Pathian vei hong sa ziam? Ama kei taw kihau nuam in hanciam ahi hunlam kician hi!” ci in au hi." 
2Kings5:8 Kamsaangpa Elisha in bang thu piang ci in a zaak ciangin ama in kumpipa tungah kam thaak hi: “Banghang tuaza in na thinngim ziam? Tua pa keima kungah hong puak ta'n, Israel ngam sungah kamsaang khat a om nginge hunlam lak tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
2Kings5:9 Tua ahikom Naaman in a siphu te le a siphu ngalleang taw pai in Elisha ii kongbiang ah tawlnga hi. 
2Kings5:10 Elisha in a naseam khat paisak in, ama munah Jordan ngun sungah salivei kisil tahen, tua hile a natna pan dam thiang tu hi cisak hi." 
2Kings5:11 Ahihang Naaman a thinso in tua mun nusia a, “Kei ngaisutna pan a nobel in ama kei kungah hong pusuak in, Topa a Pathian munah thu hong ngetsak tu a, ka natna mun santak teng tungah a khut hong vaan le, hong damsak tu in ka um hi!" 
2Kings5:12 Tua banah Damascus ah Abana ngun le Pharpar ngun te Israel ngam sungah ngun khat pawpo sangin phazaw hi ngawl ziam? Tuate sungah kibual in dam thei tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
2Kings5:13 A naseamte ama kungah pai in, “Topa awng, kamsaangpa in a haksa vawt tu in hong sawl le zong vawt tu ni hi. Tu in ama ci bangin banghangin na dam natu in ngun sungah kibual paih lel ngawl tu ni ziam?” ci hi." 
2Kings5:14 Tua ahikom Jordan ngun ah Naaman paisuk in, Elisha ii ci bangin ngun tui sungah ama le ama salivei kipap a, tuaciang ama dam thiang sitset hi. Ama ii sa sia hong ciip in a ciidam a, nauno khat ii cii le sa bang ahi hi." 
2Kings5:15 Ama in a mite theampo taw Elisha kungah hong heak kik a, “Tu in Israel ii Pathian ngawl pathian dang om ngawl hi ci in ka he hi; tua ahiciang topa awng, nong hesuakna in, kong piak letsong khat hong saang ta'n,” ci hi." 
2Kings5:16 Elisha in, “A na ka sepsak a nungta Topa taw kiciam khi hi, letsong khat zongh saang ngawl tu khi hi,” ci in zo hi. Naaman in a saan natu in kunh top ahihang ama in saang nuam ngawl hi." 
2Kings5:17 Tua ahikom Naaman in, “Ka letsong hong saang ngawl tu na hile laa nii ii puakkhop leitang hong ciapuisak ta'n, banghang ziam cile tu pan kipan Topa tung simngawl pathian dang peuma tungah sangaw biakpiakna ahibuale meihal biakpiakna te pia nawn ngawl tu khi hi." 
2Kings5:18 Tuabangin hi leng, Rimmon biakinn ah Syria pathian a biak tu in ka kumpipa ka zui ciang Topa in kei hong maisak tu in ka lamen hi. Topa in hong maisak tatak tu hi,” ci hi." 
2Kings5:19 Elisha in, “Thinnuamin va pai ta'n,” ci hi. Tuaciang Naaman in paisan hi. Ama lam khuala a thet ma in," 
2Kings5:20 Elisha naseampa Gehazi in, ama le ama hi bangin, “Ka topa in Naaman sia bangma piasak ngawlin paithongsak hi. Tua Syria pa ii piak teng sia a saan tatak tu ahi hi. A nungta Topa min taw ama nung pan del in, na khat pawpo ama tung pan nga tong,” kici hi." 
2Kings5:21 Tua ahikom ama in Naaman ii nung panin del hi. Naaman in ama nung pan mihing khat ii a del a mu ciangin a leang tung pan tuak a, ama taw kisi in, “A phamaw khat po om ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
2Kings5:22 Gehazi in “Om ngawl hi,” ci in zo hi. “Ahihang ka topa in nangma tungah sonin hong sawlna pan, tu ma hiat in Ephraim mualtung ngam panin kamsaangte pawl sung pan nii hong theng a, amate ngunntang tulthum le puan laih natu kop nii pia le hong oai hi,” ci hi." 
2Kings5:23 Naaman in, “Nong hesuakna taw ngunntang tulluk la in,” ci in zo hi. Ama in lasak hamtang hi, ngunntangte ip nii sungah sawm in, puansilh laihna kop nii pia a, a naseamte nii aap in, Gehazi mai ah tua vanhte taw pai masa sak hi." 
2Kings5:24 Amate sia Elisha teenna mualtung a thet ciang Gehazi in ipte nii saangin inn sungah sungtan pui hi. Tua zawkciang ama in Naaman ii naseamte ciasak hi. 
2Kings5:25 Ama inn sungah tum kik a, tuaciang Elisha in ama munah, “Koisung pai ni ziam?” ci in dongh hi. “Topa awng, koima pai bong,” ci in ama in zo hi." 
2Kings5:26 Ahihang Elisha in, “A mihingpa in nang taw kisi tu in leang tung pan hong tuak lai in, kei zongh ka thaa taw hong om ngawl ka na khi ziam? Hi bang sum ahizong, puan le olive huante ahizong, sapithuante ahizong, tuu le khuite ahizong, letsong saan tu hun hi ngawl hi." 
2Kings5:27 Tu in Naaman ii natna teng nang tungah hong theng tu a, nang le na suan na paal theampo in tua natna a tawntungin vei tu nu hi!” ci hi. Gehazi a pusua ciang ama in tua natna nga in — a vun sia vuuk bangin kaang hi." 
2Kings6:1 Ni khat ni in, Elisha ii uk kamsaang pawlkhat te in Elisha tungah amate lungkim ngawlna zasak uh hi, “Ka teenna mun uh no leih hi!" 
2Kings6:2 Tua ahikom, ka teen natu uh inn ka sak natu Jordan ngun ah pai a, thing pawlkhat hong phuksak thei ta'n,” ci uh hi. Elisha in, “Pha hi,” ci in zo hi." 
2Kings6:3 Amate sung pan khat in amate taw ton tu in Elisha paa a, ama lungkim in paikhawm uh hi." 
2Kings6:4 Jordan a thet uh ciangin amate sia naseam tu in hong kipan uh hi. 
2Kings6:5 Amate sung pan khat in thing khat a phu ciangin thakhat thu in a heitang zuukin tui sungah taak hi. Ama in Elisha munah, “Bang law tu khi ziam, Topa awng? Hei sia a kikawm hi!” ci hi." 
2Kings6:6 Elisha in, “Koisung santak ah taak ziam?” ci in dongh hi. A taakna san a lak ciang Elisha in ciangkang khat saattan in, tui tungah a lot le a heitang tui tungah hong kilaamto hi." 
2Kings6:7 “La in,” ci in a sawl ciang tua pa kun sukin heitang tawm hi." 
2Kings6:8 Syria kumpipa sia Israel taw kido hi. Ama in uliante taw kikum a, ngiaphual saat natu mun khat teal hi." 
2Kings6:9 Ahihang Elisha in Israel kumpipa tungah tua mun ii nai ah pai ngawlin a kidop natu kam thaak hi, banghang ziam cile Syria te in tua mun pan a suam tu in pang hi." 
2Kings6:10 Tua ahikom Israel kumpipa in tua mun nai ah a om mihingte munah kidop natu thu puak hi, tuaciang amate sia ngal nang tu kithoai sa in om uh hi. Hi bangin tamvei ma hong piang hi." 
2Kings6:11 Syria kumpipa sia hisia huvau in nasia takin a thin buai hi; ama in a uliante sam in, “No sung pan akua sia Israel kumpipa sangah pang nu ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
2Kings6:12 Khat in, “Kumpipa awng, kuama a pang om ngawl hi. Kamsaangpa Elisha in Israel kumpipa tungah na inndoi sungah thuku na son theampo zong son siat hi,” ci in zo hi." 
2Kings6:13 Kumpipa in, “Ama koisungah om ziam? Zong vun! Ama man tu khi hi,” ci hi. Elisha sia Dathan ah om hi ci in a kison ciangin ama in," 
2Kings6:14 tua munah ngalkap le siphu ngalleang tam ma puak hi. Amate sia tua khua ah zan in theng a, uumci uh hi." 
2Kings6:15 A khuavak ni zing tuungin Elisha ii naseampa hong tho a, inn pua ah pusuakin khua a et ciang, khua kiimkot ah ngalkapte, siphu ngalleangte le siphute mu hi. Ama in inn sungah tum kikin, Elisha munah, “A lal hi zo hing, topa awng, bang ih law tu ziam?” ci hi." 
2Kings6:16 Elisha in, “Lau heak in, amate sangah a pangte sangin ei sangah hong pangte tamzaw hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
2Kings6:17 Tua zawkciang ama thungen a, “Oh, Topa, ama mittangte khua a mu thei natu honsak in,” ci hi. Topa in Elisha thungetna zo a, tuaciang Elisha ii naseampa in a et to le Elisha ii kiimkot mual pangh te sia siphu le meikuang siphu ngalleangte taw kidim in mu hi." 
2Kings6:18 Syria te ii sim ciang Elisha in thungen a, “Oh Topa, hi mite a mit uh tawcipsak in!” ci hi. Topa in a thungetna zo a, a ngalte a mittaw cipsak hi." 
2Kings6:19 Tuaciang Elisha in amate kungah pai in, “No sia lam khial nu hi, khua na zon uh sia hi sung hi ngawl hi. Mihing na zon uh sia kungah keima hong paipui tu khi hi,” ci hi. Tuaciang ama in amate sia Samaria zotpui hi." 
2Kings6:20 Amate khuapi sung a tum po ciang Elisha in thu ngen a, “A mittang uh honsak in, Topa awng, amate khuamusak thei in,” ci hi. Topa in a thungetna saang in, amate khuamusak kik a, tuaciang khua a et uh ciang amate sia Samaria sungsang ah om ahi hunlam kimu uh hi." 
2Kings6:21 Israel kumpipa in Syria te a mu ciang Elisha mun ah, “Ka thatlum tu ziam, topa ka thatlum tu ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
2Kings6:22 “Thatlum heak in, kidona phual ah na matsa ngalkapte zongh thisak ngawl tu ni hi. Amate neak tu dawn tu khat po pia in a, amate ii kumpipa kungah cia kiksak in,” ci hi." 
2Kings6:23 Tua ahikom Israel kumpipa in amate atu anneakpoai lian khat vawtsak a, amate ii a neak a dawn zawkciang Syria kumpipa kungah ciasak hi. Tua hun pan kipan Syria te in Israel ngam a sim tawntung teng kheal uh hi." 
2Kings6:24 Tua zawk tawm vei ciang Syria kumpipa Benhadad in ama ii ngalkaphonpi bup lampui in Samaria uumci hi. 
2Kings6:25 Tuabang a ki uumci hu in khuapi sungah anneak tu haksa mama a, laa khat ii lutang sia ngunntang 80 man a, inn vakhu eak gram 200 ciang ngunntang nga man hi." 
2Kings6:26 Israel kumpipa, khuapi luphungte tungah a vak laitak, numei khat au in, “Hong hu ta'n, Kumpipa awng!” ci hi." 
2Kings6:27 Ama in zo a, “ Topa in nang hong hu buale kei in nang bang hong pia zo tu khi ziam? Zungtaang ahibuale sapittui nei na khi ziam?" 
2Kings6:28 Na haksatna sia bang tatak ziam?” ci hi. Tua nu in, “Ning zeini in hi lai a numei sia in ngaisutna hong pia a, kei nauno sia tua ni in ne tu, a zing ciang ama ii nau sia ne tu ci in ka thukim uh hi." 
2Kings6:29 Tua ahikom ka nauno sia ka huan uh a ka ne uh hi. A khuavak ni ciang ama nau sia ne tu ka ci le ama in phual hi,’ ci in zo hi." 
2Kings6:30 Kumpipa in hi thu a zaak ciang a khuangai in a puansilh lai eautham hi, tuaciang ama kung nai ah a pai mite in a puansilhte ii sungsang ah khau-ip puan a silh sia mu uh hi." 
2Kings6:31 Ama au in, “Nitum ma in Elisha ii lu a kitan buale Pathian in hong vaat lum tahen!” ci hi." 
2Kings6:32 Tuaciang ama in Elisha man tu in kamtai paisak hi. Tua laitakin Elisha sia a inn ah a haw upa pawlkhat taw om uh hi. Kumpipa ii kamtaite hong thet ma in, Elisha in upate munah, “Mithatpa in kei that tu in khat hong paisak hi! Tu in ama hi sung hong thet ciang kongkha khak vun a, tumsak heak vun. Kumpipa ama mama zongh a nung hiat pan hong pai tu hi,” ci hi." 
2Kings6:33 Hi teng a pau zongh man tak ngawl lai in kumpipa hong pai a, “Hi ngimna ei tungah hong puak sia Topa hi. Ama ii na khat pawpo a vawt tu ngakin banghangin om top tu khi ziam?” ci hi." 
2Kings7:1 Elisha in, “ Topa pauna ngai in! Zing ciang tu hunin Samaria ngam sungah zungtaang phabel kilogramme thum ahibuale mangtaang kilogramme luk ciang ngunntang khat taw lei thei tu nu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
2Kings7:2 Kumpipa a cing tuam pa in Elisha mun ah, “Tuabang piang thei ngawl tu hi — Topa in thakhat thu in antang hong puak hial zong piang thei ngawl tu hi!” ci hi. Elisha in, “Tuabang a pian sia mu tu ni hi, ahihang nang in tua an peuma na ne ngei buatu hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
2Kings7:3 A lauhuai vun natna a vei pasal li sia Samaria kongpi pua sangah om in, amate khat le khat a kipaupuina ah, “Banghangin hi sungah ih thi dong ngak tu hi ziam?" 
2Kings7:4 Khuapi sungah ih tum tu le lui thawthong hi, banghang ziam cile, tua munah ih pukthi tu hi; ahihang hi sungah om leang zong ih thi veve tu hi. Tua ahikom Syria te ii ngiaphual sungah tum ka tawng; a siabel amate ii hong vawt thei sia hong thatlum tu hi, ahizong ih nuntakna hong khoaikhe tha tu hi,” ci uh hi." 
2Kings7:5 Tua ahikom khuazing tu a kithoai ciang, amate in Syria te ngiaphual ah pai uh hi, ahihang tua mun a thet uh ciangin, kuama a na om bua hi." 
2Kings7:6 Topa in Syria te ii zaakna ah siphu te le siphu ngalleangte taw ngalkap honpui kuan in a nging bang khat zasak a, tuaciang Israel kumpipa in Hit le Egypt kumpite ngalcialin, amate simsak hi ci in Syria te in ngaisun uh hi." 
2Kings7:7 Tua ahikom tua nitakin Syria te in amate nuntakna kihuk natu in taikeak in, a puanbukte, siphute, laate le a ngiaphual uh sia a om babangin nusia uh hi." 
2Kings7:8 Tua pasal li teng in ngiaphual kiing a thet uh ciang, puanbuk khat sungah tum in, tua munah a mu po ne in dawn uh hi, ngunn, khamh le puansilh a mu po zongh zamh a, pusua pui in phual uh hi; tua zawkciang amate hong heak kik a, puanbuk dang khat ah tum in tuabang ma in ngamta uh hi." 
2Kings7:9 Ahihang amate khat le khat ii tung ah, “Hi bangin ih ngamtat tu hi ngawl hi! Eima in thupha nga kasap, eima bek ii ih kep tu hi ngawl hi. Tua thu ih son natu in zingsang dong ih ngak le daan hong kipia nanak tu hi. Thakhatin pai in, kumpipa ii uliante munah ko tawng!” ci uh hi." 
2Kings7:10 Tua ahikom amate sia Syria te ngiaphual nusia in Samaria ah heak kik a, kongpi cingte oksan in, “Ko teng Syria te ngiaphual ah ka pai uh le kuama mu ngawlin, a pau a haam zongh za ngawl khu hi; a siphute le a laate zongh a khau uh kisuut ngawl hi; tuaciang puanbukte zongh Syria te ii nusiat bang linlian in om hi,” ci uh hi." 
2Kings7:11 Kongpi cingte in tua thu taangko in, kumpi inn sungah tua thu hong kiko hi." 
2Kings7:12 Zan lai ma hi napi kumpipa hong tho a, a uliante munah, “Syria te ii ngealna teng hong son tu khi hi! Amate in hi sungah kialpi a tun sia he hi, tua ahikom amate in ngiaphual nusia a, ngam sungah a bu tu in pai hi. Amate in ei sia an zong a khuapi nusia tu in hong um hi, tuaciang amate in ei hong hing mat tu a, khuapi hong suan tu hi,” ci hi." 
2Kings7:13 Ama uliante khat in, “Hilai khuapi sung a mite sia bangbang po ahizong a thisate taw kibangin a lal hi zo hi hing. Tua ahikom thupiang teng ih mu thei natu in, a thi mong siphu nga teng taw pasal pawlkhat paisak tawng,” ci hi." 
2Kings7:14 Amate in pasal pawlkhat teal in, kumpipa in siphu ngalleang nii taw paisak a, Syria ngalkaphonpi bang tat ziam ci in dawpsak hi." 
2Kings7:15 Pasalte Jordan ngun dong pai in, lamdung ah Syria ngalkapte ii a tai kawmin a nusiat puan le vanh te mu uh hi. Tua zawkciang amate hong heak kik in, kumpipa tungah thu ko uh hi." 
2Kings7:16 Samaria mite manlang tak hong pusuak in Syria te ngiaphual phuul uh hi. Tuaciangin Topa ii ci sa bangma in a zungtaang phabel kilogramme 3 ahibuale mangtaang kilogramme 6 ciangin ngunntang khat taw kizuak hi. 
2Kings7:17 Israel kumpipa in ama a cing tuam ulian pa sia khuapi kongpi uk tu in na koi luilam hi. Tua ulian pa sia tualai ah mipite in siiklum hi, kumpipa in ama taw kimu tu in a pai laitak Elisha ii sonkhol bangin thi hi." 
2Kings7:18 Elisha in kumpipa munah a zing ciang tua hunin zungtaang a phabel kilogramme 3 ahibuale mangtaang kilogramme 6 ciang ngunntang khat taw kizuak tu hi a ci lai in," 
2Kings7:19 tua ulian pa in, “Tuabang piang thei ngawl tu hi — Topa mama in thakhat thu in antang hong puak hial zong piang thei ngawl tu hi!” ci in zo hi. Tuaciang Elisha in, “Tuasia a pian mu tu ni hi, ahihang nang in na ne ngei buatu hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
2Kings7:20 Tuasia bang tatakin ama ii tungah piang a, ama thi hi — khuapi kongpi ah mite in ama tuanhlum hi." 
2Kings8:1 Tu in Elisha in Shunem ah a teang, a tapa a nuntak kiksak nupinu munah, Topa in kum sali sung a ngei tu kialpi khat a ngam sungah a tunsak natu le ama sia leidang khat ah a innkuanpuite taw pai in a teen tu a kulna thu son hi." 
2Kings8:2 Ama in a sawlna mangin a innkuanpuite taw Philistia ah kum sali sung teang hi. 
2Kings8:3 Kum sali bo zawkciang ama Israel ngam ah hong heak kik a, kumpipa ii munah a inn le a leitangte ama tungah a kipiak kik natu ngen hi." 
2Kings8:4 Ama in kumpipa sia Elisha ii naseampa Gehazi taw kipaupui in om mu hi; kumpipa in Elisha ii a lamdang nasepte he nuam hi. 
2Kings8:5 Gehazi in Elisha ii a thisa mi khat a thawsak kikna thu kumpipa tungah a sawson laitakin tua nu in kumpipa tungah thuumna nei hi. Gehazi in, “Kumpipa awng, tua nupi sia le Elisha ii a nuntak kiksak a tapa sia hi sungah om hi,” ci in son hi." 
2Kings8:6 Kumpipa ii dokna te a zona in Gehazi ii son teng sia maan hi ci in nupi nu in son hi, tuasia ciang kumpipa in a uliante khat samin, ama ii neisa teng theampo a piak kik natu le kum sali a om ngawl sung theampo a, a lo sung pan a piang ante theampo ii man taw ama ii a neisa teng theampo a piak kik tu in thupia hi." 
2Kings8:7 Syria te ii Kumpipa Benhadad ii ciinat hun khat laitakin Elisha sia Damascus khua ah pai hi. Elisha tua munah om ci in kumpipa tungah a kison ciang," 
2Kings8:8 ama in a uliante khat ahi Hazael munah, “Kamsaangpa letsong khat na puak ta'n a, kei ka ciidam tu ziam, dam ngawl tu khi ziam Topa hong doksak tahen,” ci hi." 
2Kings8:9 Tua ahikom Hazael in Damascus pan a piang vanh phabel teng kalaoh 40 tungah suanhin Elisha kungah pai hi. Hazael in ama taw a kimu ciang ama in, “Na naseampa Kumpipa Benhadad in nang kungah pai in ama ii natna sia dam tu ziam dam nawn ngawl tu ziam ci sia nang kungah pai in dongh tu in hong sawl hi,” ci hi." 
2Kings8:10 Elisha in zo a, “ Topa in ama thi tu hi ci in hong lak hi; ahihang ama ii kungah va pai ta'n a, ama dam kik tu hi na ci ta'n,” ci hi." 
2Kings8:11 Tuasia zawkciang Elisha in a lauhuai mama mai puak taw Hazael ii om nuam ngawl a sak dong a maitang salh hi. Thakhat thu in Elisha a thitui luang hi. 
2Kings8:12 Hazael in, “Banghangin kap ni ziam, topa awng,” ci in dongh hi. “Israel mite tungah a lipkhaphuai mama na ngamtat tu teng ka heak hu hi,” ci in zo kik hi. Nangma in a kulhpite na haltum tu a, a khangmoi tangval a phabel teng na thatlum tu a, patangnote na vaatlum tu hi, naungil omte ii ngil na khuakeak tu hi,” Elisha in ci hi." 
2Kings8:13 “Banghangin tua zata in vaanglian thei tu khi ziam kei sia bangma ka hi bua hi,” Hazael in ci hi. “ Topa in hong son zo hi, nang sia Syria te ii kumpipa na suak tu hi,” ci in Elisha in zo hi." 
2Kings8:14 Hazael sia Benhadad kungah heak kikin, ama in, “Elisha in bang hong ci ziam?” ci in dongh hi. “Ama in nang sia dam kik tatak tu hi, hong ci hi,” Hazael in ci hi." 
2Kings8:15 Ahihang a khuavak ni ciang Hazael in puanvan khat tui sungah pap a, tuasia taw kumpipa ii nuntakna sumit hi. Tuaciang Hazael in Syria Kumpipa Benhadad ii za laih hi." 
2Kings8:16 Israel te Kumpipa Ahab ii tapa Joram ii maan zawk a kum ngana ciang Judah te Kumpipa Jehoshaphat ii tapa Jehoram sia kumpipa suak hi," 
2Kings8:17 ama ii kum, kum 32 pha a, tuaciang ama in Jerusalem panin kum liat sung uk hi." 
2Kings8:18 A zi sia Ahab ii tanu hi a, tuaciang Ahab ii innkuante bangma in ama in Israel kumpipa ii ngamtat siat teng ma zui hi. Ama in Topa tungah maw hi," 
2Kings8:19 ahihang Topa in Judah sia a susia nuam bua hi, banghang ziam cile ama in a naseampa David munah, a suan a paalte in a kizom suakin uk tu hi ci in kamciam pia zo hi." 
2Kings8:20 Jehoram ii maan sungin Edom te in Judah te langpanin leedo uh a, amate le amate a ki uk kumpi ngam hong suak hi." 
2Kings8:21 Tua ahikom Jehoram in ama ii siphu ngalleang theampo taw Zair ah kuan a, tua munah Edom ngalkap honte in amate uumci uh hi. Zan lai in ama le a siphu ngalleang ukte in a kikiim uumna phultham thei in, suakta uh a, a ngalkapte sia amate inn tek ah kithethaang uh hi." 
2Kings8:22 Edom sia tua hun pan kipan Judah te khutnuai pan amate le amate a ki uk suak hi. Hi hun sung ma in Libnah khuapi zongh in leedo hi. 
2Kings8:23 Jehoram ii a sep a vawt dangte theampo Judah Kumpite ii Taanghthu sungah kiciamtee hi. 
2Kings8:24 Jehoram thi a, David khuapi sung kumpite thaan ah kiphumin, a tapa Ahaziah in a kumpi za lua hi." 
2Kings8:25 Israel te ii kumpipa Ahab ii tapa Joram a maan zawk kum sawm le kum nii na ciang Jehoram ii tapa Ahaziah sia Judah te ii kumpipa suak hi," 
2Kings8:26 ama kum 22 pha a, ama in Jerusalem panin kum khat sung uk hi. A nu sia Athalia hi a, kumpipa Ahab ii tanu, Israel kumpipa Omri ii tunu hi." 
2Kings8:27 Ahaziah sia a zi hangin Ahab ii mealheak khat a sua bangin, Ahab ii innkuanpuite bangma in ama in Topa tungah maw hi." 
2Kings8:28 Kumpipa Ahaziah in Israel te kumpipa Joram taw kipawl khawm in Syria te ii kumpipa Hazael do uh hi. Ngalkap honte sia Gilead ngam Ramoth ah hong kisii uh a, Joram sia ngal kisimna sungah liam hi." 
2Kings8:29 Ama in Jezreel khuapi ah heak kikin, a liamna pan a dam kik tu ngak hi, tuaciang Ahaziah in tua munah pai in ve hi." 
2Kings9:1 Tua hun sungin kamsaangpa Elisha in kamsaang khangmoi khat munah, “Kithoai in a, Gilead ah a om Ramoth ah va pai ta'n. Hi olive thau thawl sia keng ta'n a," 
2Kings9:2 tuaciang tua mun na thet ciang Jehoshaphat ii tapa, Namshi ii tupa Jehu na zong ta'n. A lawmte kung pan samkhia in inndoi tuam khat sungah paipui in a," 
2Kings9:3 hi olive thau sia a lu tungah buakin, ‘ Topa in nang sia Israel te ii kumpipa tu in taangko hi,’ ci ta'n. Tua zawkciang tua mun sia a manlang thei zaza in nusia in,” ci hi." 
2Kings9:4 Tua ahikom kamsaang khangmoi pa Ramoth ah pai in," 
2Kings9:5 tua munah ngalkap maangte thu kikum mu hi. Ama in, “Topa awng, nang atu kamthaak khat hong keng khi hi,” ci hi. Jehu in, “Ko teng sungah akua hong paupui ni ziam?” ci in dongh hi. “Topa awng, nangma ni hi,” ci in ama in zo kik hi." 
2Kings9:6 Tua zawkciang amate nii sia inn doituam sungah tum a, tuaciang kamsaang khangmoipa in Jehu ii lu tungah olive thau buakin ama munah, “ Topa Israel te ii Pathian in taangko hi: ‘Keima in nang sia Israel te ii kumpipa tu in sathau hong noai khi hi." 
2Kings9:7 Jezebel ii ka kamsaangte le a dang ka naseamte a thalup hu in daan ka piak natu in, nangma in na topa, kumpipa Ahab ii tapa sia thatlum tu ni hi." 
2Kings9:8 Ahab ii innkuanpuite le a suan a paalte a thi siat kul tu hi; a moi a haam a kibangin a bangkua sungah pa a minpiang heamkhia tu khi hi. 
2Kings9:9 Ama ii bangkua tungah Israel te ii Kumpipa Jeroboam tung ahizong, Israel te kumpipa Baasha ii tungah ahizong, ka vawt bangin vawt tu khi hi." 
2Kings9:10 Jezebel sia kiphum ngawl tu hi; a luang sia Jezreel ngamkhen sungah ui in ne tu hi,’ ” ci hi. Hi teng a ci zawkciang kamsaang moi pa pusuakin tai hi." 
2Kings9:11 Jehu sia a ngalkap maang puite kungah pai kik a, amate in, “Na theampo a pha na'am? Tua a mawmawt tuak pa sia in nang tung pan bang dei ziam?” ci uh hi. Jehu in, “Ama ii dei sia he nu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
2Kings9:12 Amate in, “Ko he ngawl khu hi, hong son ta'n,” ci in zo uh hi. Ama in keima munah, Topa in hi bangin taangko hi: “Nangma sia Israel te ii kumpipa tu in sathau hong noai khi hi,” ci in hong son hi." 
2Kings9:13 Thakhat thu in Jehu ii ngalkap maang puite in a puantual uh keallei tungah Jehu ii dinpha tu in pha uh a, lemle tumin, “Jehu sia Kumpipa hi!” ci in au uh hi." 
2Kings9:14 Tua zawkciang Jehu in Kumpipa Joram suamlup tu sawm hi, ama sia Syria Kumpipa Hazael taw Ramoth ah a kidona a liamna pan a dam kik natu in Jezreel ah om hi. Tua ahikom Jehu in ama ii ngalkap maang puite munah kei sangah nong pang uh ahile Jezreel ah mipite kidop natu son tu in Ramoth pan kuama pai ku heak vun,” ci hi." 
2Kings9:15  
2Kings9:16 Tua zawkciang ama a siphu ngalleang tungah hong kaa in Jezreel zuan tu in vaiding hi. Joram sia dam kik ngawl lai hi, Judah te kumpipa Ahaziah zongh ama ve in om lai hi." 
2Kings9:17 Jezreel tausaang tung pan ngalvil vaipuak a nei sia in, Jehu le a mite hong neak sia mu hi. “Mihing pawlkhat siphu tung to in hong pai ka mu hi,” ci in au hi. Joram in, “Tual ziam maw ngal ziam siphu ngalkap khat pai in kansak vun,” ci in zo hi." 
2Kings9:18 Kamtai pa Jehu kungah pai in, ama munah, “Kumpipa in nang sia lawm khat bangin nong pai ziam ci in he nuam hi,” ci hi. Jehu in, “Tuasia nang taw bangma kisai bo, ka nung panin hong zui ta'n,” ci in zo hi. Tausaang tung a ngalvil pa in, kamtai pa sia hong paite taw kisii napi hong heak kik ngawl hi ci in thu ko hi." 
2Kings9:19 Kamtai dang khat ma paisak uh a, ama in Jehu sia a mai a pa ii dok teng ma dongh hi. Tuaciang Jehu in “Tuasia nang taw bangma kisai bo, ka nung uh pan hong zui ta'n,” ci in zo leleau hi." 
2Kings9:20 Khatvei ma khuapi cing pa in, kamtaipa le hong papai pawlte kimu napi ama hong heak kik nawn ngawl hi, ci hi. Ama ii belapna ah, “Hong pai pawlte ii lampui pa in a siphu ngalleang sia mihing thin amh bang phet in nasia takin hawl hi, Jehu taw kibang hi,” ci hi." 
2Kings9:21 “Ka siphu ngalleang a pai tu kithoaisak vun,” ci in kumpipa Joram in thupia hi. Tuabang ma in, ama le kumpipa Ahaziah sia amate siphu ngalleang tek tung to in Jehu taw kisi tu in hong pai uh hi. Amate in Naboth ii lo sungah ama taw kisi uh hi." 
2Kings9:22 “Lem thu taw hong pai nu ziam?” ci in Joram in dongh hi. Jehu in, “Bangbangin lem thu om thei tu ziam, Na nu Jezebel ii patsa bum le ai toaite ahizong, milim biakna ahizong, ih nei lai teng lem thu om thei ngawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
2Kings9:23 “Ahaziah awng, hisia kilee heakna hi,” ci in Joram au a, a siphu ngalleang heak in, tai hi." 
2Kings9:24 Jehu in a thal eal in a tha nei za taw a kap le Joram ii cingzaang pan kha in a lungtang sunlet a, Joram sia ama siphu ngalleang sungah pukin thi hi," 
2Kings9:25 tuaciang, Jehu in ama a hu pa Bidkar munah, “A luang la in a, Naboth ii lo sungah vawk in. Nang le kei kumpipa Ahab ii nung pan siphu tung to in ih pai lai in, Topa in Ahab huvau," 
2Kings9:26 ‘Zeini in Naboth le a tate a kisuamlupna ka mu hi. Tuaciang kamciam kong piakna pan, lo hisia sung mama ah nang daan hong pia tu khi hi’ ci in a pau sia na ciamtee lai ziam? Tua ahikom Joram ii luang la in, Topa ii kamciam sia a taangtun natu in, Naboth ii lo sungah vawk in,” Jehu in ci hi." 
2Kings9:27 Kumpipa Ahaziah in bang teng piang ci in mu a, a siphu ngalleang taw Beth Haggan khua sangah tai a, Jehu in del hi. “Ama zongh that vun,” ci in Jehu in a mite sawl hi, tuaciangin ama a siphu ngalleang Ibleam khua hui Gur sang lam tungah hawlto a, amate in liamsua hi. Ahihang Megiddo khuapi a thet dong a leang hawl thei a, tua mun a thet ciang thi hi." 
2Kings9:28 Ama ii uliante in a luang siphu ngalleang khat taw pua in, David Khuapi sung kumpi thaan ah phum hi." 
2Kings9:29 Israel te Kumpipa Ahab ii tapa Joram a maan zawk a kum sawm le khat kum in Ahaziah sia Judah te kumpipa suak hi. 
2Kings9:30 Jehu sia Jezreel khua ah theng hi. Jezebel in bang thu teng piang ci in za zo a, a ma in mitkhu vom za kinoai in, a sam pot in, kumpi inn tung khelki panin lampi ensuk hi." 
2Kings9:31 Jehu sia khuapi kongpi sungah a tum ciangin ama in oksan a, “Nang Zimri! Nang tual that pa! Hi sungah bang hi ni ziam?” ci hi." 
2Kings9:32 Jehu in ento a, “Akua teng kei sangah hong pang nu ziam?” ci hi. Kumpi inn sung uliante nii khawng thum khawng in khelki pan en suk hi," 
2Kings9:33 tuaciang Jehu in, “Ama hong vawk suk tavun,” ci hi. Amate in a vawksuk uh le pangte tungah a chi kithe a, siphute tung zongh ah kithe hi. Jehu in a siphu le a leang ama ii luang tungah hawl a," 
2Kings9:34 kumpi inn sungah tum hi, tuaciangin an ne hi. Tua zawkciang bekma in hi bang ci hi. “Tua a kitomlaw sa numei sia la vun a phum vun; a tatakin ci leang ama zongh kumpipa tanu khat hi,” ci hi." 
2Kings9:35 Ahihang ama phum tu a pai te in a lungu le a khut ngu, a peang ngu simngawl bangma mu nawn ngawl uh hi." 
2Kings9:36 Hi thu amate in Jehu munah a ko uh ciangin Jehu in, “Hi sia Topa ii naseampa Elijah tungah a sonsa bangin a piang hi: ‘Jezreel ii ngamkhen sungah uite in Jezebel luang ne tu hi." 
2Kings9:37 Ama ii pumpi sia eak bangin kithethaang tu hi, tuasia ciang kuama in ama pumpi ahi hunlam son thei ngawl tu hi,’ ci hi,” ci in son hi." 
2Kings10:1 Samaria khuapi ah Ahab ii suan le paalte mihing 70 om uh hi. Jehu in khuapi ukte, khuapi sungah lampuite le Ahab ii suan le paalte a keamte munah lai at a thaak hi. A laithak sungah:" 
2Kings10:2 “No sia kumpipa ii suan le paalte a keam te nu hi, tuaciang na uuk po na zak tu uh siphu ngalleang te, siphute, ngalhiamte le kulh taw a ki uum khuapite nei nu hi. Tua ahikom hi laithak na nga uh po ciang" 
2Kings10:3 kumpipa ii suan le paal sung pan a kilawmbel khat teal in, kumpipa suaksak vun a, tuaciang ama hung tu in ngal do vun,” ci in at hi." 
2Kings10:4 Samaria ukpite sia lau mama uh hi. “Kumpipa Joram le kumpipa Ahaziah ii zaw ngawl Jehu sia ei in bangbangin nalh zo tu hi ziam?” ci uh hi. 
2Kings10:5 Tua ahikom kumpi inn ah vaipuak neite, khuapi tungah vaipuak neite kikopin, ngammite lampuite le kumpipa bangkua a keamte in hi kamthaak sia Jehu tungah puak uh hi; “Ko sia na naseamte khu hi, nangma ii ci po a seam tu in kinging khu hi. Ahihang kuama kumpipa in koi ngawl tu khu hi; phabel na sak bangin hong seam ta'n,” ci uh hi." 
2Kings10:6 Jehu in laithak dang khat puak hi: “Kei sangah nong pang uh a, tuaciang ka thupiak babang zui tu na hi uh le, zing ciang tu hunin Kumpipa Ahab ii suan le paal teng ii lutang hong puak tavun,” ci hi. Kumpipa Ahab ii suan le paal 70 teng sia Samaria ngammi lampuite ii kep le ou ahi hi." 
2Kings10:7 Jehu laithak a kinga ciangin, Samaria lampuite in Ahab ii suan le paal 70 teng thatlum in a lutang uh bawm sungah heangin Jehu omna Jezreel ah puak uh hi." 
2Kings10:8 Ahab ii suan le paalte ii lutang teng hong kipaipui zo hi ci in Jehu tungah a kison ciang ama in tua lutangte khuapi kongpi hui ah kholh nii in sengin a zingsang kik dong tua munah a kinusiat tu in thupia hi. 
2Kings10:9 A zingsang ciangin ama khuapi kongpi ah pai in, tua munah a om mite munah, “Kumpipa Joram suam tu a sawm sia keima khi hi; no sia tua tungtaang ah bangma vaipuak nei ngawl nu hi. Ahihang hite sia akua in thatlum ziam?" 
2Kings10:10 Hi sia in Ahab ii suan le paalte huvau Topa ii kamsaang Elijah ii tungtawnin a pau teng taangtung hi,” ci in lak hi." 
2Kings10:11 Tua zawkciang Jehu in Ahab ii bee le phung dangte, Jezreel a om theampo le a uliante, a ngualtamhte, a thiampite, khat zongh a nungta in kikhoaikhe ngawl hi." 
2Kings10:12 Jehu in Samaria khua ah pai tu in Jezreel khua nusia hi. Lampi tung mun khat, “Tuucingte Ngiaphual” a kicina munah," 
2Kings10:13 A thisa Judah kumpipa Ahaziah ii mealheakte pawlkhat taw kisi in amate tungah, “A kuate nu ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Amate in, “Ahaziah ii mealheakte khu hi! Kumpinu Jezebel tate le kumpi innkuanpui a taanglaite zatakna pia tu in Jezreel ah pai tu khu hi,” ci in zo uh hi." 
2Kings10:14 Jehu in, “Hing mat siat vun!” ci in a ngalkapte thupia hi. A ngalkapte in amate manin Jehu in dum khat ii hui ah that siat hi. A vekpi in mihing 42 pha a, khat zongh khoaikhe ngawl hi." 
2Kings10:15 Jehu vaiding kik a, lampi ah Rechab ii tapa Jonadab taw kisi uh hi. Jehu in paupui a, “Nang le kei ih khua ngaisutna kibang hi, Kei nong panpui tu ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Jonadab in, “Hong panpui tu khi hi,” ci in zo hi. “Na khut hong thaak ta'n,” Jehu in ci hi. Amate kilen uh hi, tuaciang Jehu in ama sia siphu ngalleang tungah a kaato zawk natu kaito in," 
2Kings10:16 “Keima taw paikhawm tawng, Topa tungah bangza in kipia khi ziam nangma ma in hong mu ta'n,” ci in son kawm hi. Tuaciang amate Samaria ah leang taw paikhawm uh hi." 
2Kings10:17 Tua mun a thet ciang Jehu in Ahab ii mealheak theampo khat zongh khoaikhe ngawlin thatlum siat hi. Hi sia in Topa ii Elijah munah piang tu hi ci in a sonsa teng ahi hi. 
2Kings10:18 Jehu in Samaria ngammite kaikhawm in hi bang ci hi, “Kumpipa Ahab in Baal pathian sia tawmno bia hi, ahihang keima in tua sangin a nasia zaw in ka bia tu hi." 
2Kings10:19 Baal ii kamsaangte theampo le ama a biate theampo, ama thiampite theampo a vekpi hong sam siat tavun. Kuama kamzong thei ngawl tu hi; Baal tungah sangaw biakpiakna nasia takin vawt tu khi hi, tuaciang hi sungah hong kihel ngawl peuma kithisak tu hi,” ci hi. (Hi sia in Jehu ii a theamna hi a, Baal a biate theampo a thalup nopna hi.)" 
2Kings10:20 Tua zawkciang Jehu in thupia a, “Baal zatak piak natu biakna ni khat thangsak vun,” ci hi. Thu thansakna kivawt a," 
2Kings10:21 tuaciang Jehu in Israel ngam bup ah kam zasak hi. Baal a bia theampo hong pai uh hi, hong pai ngawl khat zongh om ngawl hi. Amate theampo Baal biakinn sungah tum uh a, biakinn monglang pan monglang dong dim uh hi." 
2Kings10:22 Tuaciang Jehu in puantual thiangtho a keam thiampipa munah puantualte pusua in biakpiakna a vawtte pia in sawl hi. 
2Kings10:23 Tua zawkciang Jehu ama mama zongh biakinn sungah, Rechab ii tapa Jonadab taw tum a, tuaciang tuasung ah om mihingte munah, “Baal biate bek a sungah om tu a, tuaciang Topa a biate kuama a kihel ngawl natu in a pha takin en vun,” ci in sawl hi." 
2Kings10:24 Tua zawkciang ama le Jonadab in pai in sangaw biakpiakna, meihal biakpiakna Baal tungah pia hi. Ama in pasal 80 biakinn pua sangah koi a, hi bangin thupia hi. “Hi mihingte a vekpi in thatlum siat tu nu hi, khat po in amate a suaktasak a om le ama ii nuntakna taw lul tu hi!” ci hi." 
2Kings10:25 Jehu in biakpiakna a vawt zawkciang a cingte munah, “Tum vun a, a vekpi in thatlum siat vun; khat zongh suaktasak heak vun,” ci hi. Amate namsau daw sa in tum a, a vekpi in thatlum siat in, amate luang sia doipua ah kaikeak uh hi. Tua zawkciang amate a sungnung biakna munah tumin," 
2Kings10:26 a thiangtho khuam sia pusua uh a, haltum uh hi." 
2Kings10:27 Tuabangin amate in a thiangtho khuam sia susia in biakinn zongh susia uh a, a biakinn sia eakbuk suaksak uh hi, tu ni dong ma in tuabangin om lai hi." 
2Kings10:28 Tuabangin Jehu in Israel ngam ah Baal biakna phiat siat hi. 
2Kings10:29 Ahihang khamh khuital limte Bethel le Dan ah koi in Israel te in biasak a, mawna sungah a lampui kumpipa Jeroboam ii ngamtatna teng ama in zui hi." 
2Kings10:30 Topa in Jehu tungah, “Ahab le a suan a paalte tungah vawt a kong oai theampo vawt zo ni hi. Tua ahikom na suante khang li dong Israel te kumpipa in koi tu khi hi ci in kamciam hong pia khi hi,” ci hi." 
2Kings10:31 Ahihang Jehu in a thin theampo taw Topa Israel te ii Pathian thukhamte ni ngawl a, ama in Israel te mawna sungah a then Jeroboam ngamtatna zuizaw hi." 
2Kings10:32 Tua hun laitakin Topa in Israel ngam ii a zaina khiam tu in hong kipan hi. Syria Kumpipa Hazael in Israel te ii ngam theampo zo hi," 
2Kings10:33 Jordan ii nisuana Aroer khuapi thangsang Arnon Ngun hui dong zo hi — tuasung ah Gilead le Bashan ngamkhen te, Gad, Reuben le Nisuana Manasseh te ii teenna teng kihel hi." 
2Kings10:34 Jehu ii a sep a vawt dangte theampo ama ii hanna nasepte dong Israel Kumpipate Taanghthu sungah kikhum hi. 
2Kings10:35 Ama thi a Samaria ah kiphum hi, tuaciang ama ii tapa Jehoahaz in a kumpi za laih hi." 
2Kings10:36 Jehu in Israel kumpipa khat a hina taw Samaria panin kum 28 sung uk hi. 
2Kings11:1 Kumpipa Ahaziah ii nu Athaliah in a tapa ii kisuamlupna a zaak po ciang kumpipa innkuan pui theampo thalup natu thupia hi. 
2Kings11:2 Ahaziah ii tapa Joash bekma suakta hi. Ama sia a dangte taw kithatlum dektak a, ahihang a ni Jehosheba in suatak hi, tua nu sia Kumpi Jehoram ii tanu hi a, Ahaziah ii suapui sealh ahi hi. Ama in Joash sia a keam nu taw la in Biakinnpi sung lupna inndoi khat sungah koi a, kithalup ngawl natu in Athaliah ii mu natu pan seal hi." 
2Kings11:3 Kum luk sung Jehosheba in patangno sia biakinn sungah Athaliah ii Kumpinu a sep sung theampo phual hi. 
2Kings11:4 Ahihang a kum sali na ciangin thiampi Jehoiada in kumpipa a cingte le kumpi inn a cingte a uk uliante Biakinn ah samin, ama ii ngealna bang a ngamtat nop natu kiciamna taw thukimna vawtsak hi. Ama in Kumpipa Ahaziah ii tapa Joash amate lak hi," 
2Kings11:5 tuaciang hi thupiakna teng pia hi: “Sabbath ni in vaipuak la tu in nong pai uh ciang, no sung pan see thum sua see khat in kumpi inn cing tu nu hi;" 
2Kings11:6 a dang see thum sua see khat sia Sur Kongpi cingin om tu nu hi, tuaciang a om lai see thum sua see khat te inn kongpi ah kong cingte nung pan cing sawn tu nu hi." 
2Kings11:7 Sabbath ni a vaipuak nei ngawl a om pawl nii te sia kumpipa hung tu in Biakinnpi ah a cingin om tu nu hi. 
2Kings11:8 Kumpipa Joash sia noma in namsau daw sa in cing tu a, ama ii paina theampo ah ama ompui tu nu hi. No ii nai ah hong pai khat po a om le thatlum tu nu hi,” ci hi." 
2Kings11:9 Uliante in Jehoiada ii hil bangin ni a, a mite ama kungah paipui hi — Sabbath ni a vaipuak nei ngawlte le vaipuak neite paipui uh hi." 
2Kings11:10 Ama in uliante sia David ii neisa, Biakinnpi sungah a kikeam tei le lum te pia a," 
2Kings11:11 tuaciang ama in kumpipa cing tu in ngalkapte sia a namsau daw sa in Biakinn mai kiimkot ah koi hi. 
2Kings11:12 Tua zawkciang Jehoiada in Joash pusua pui in, kumpilukhu a lu tungah koi a, kumpite ii zak tu thukham laibu bu khat Joash pia hi. Tua zawkciang Joash sia sathau noai in kumpipa hi ci in taangko uh hi. Mipite in a khut uh beang uh a, “Kumpipa a khansau tahen!” ci uh hi." 
2Kings11:13 Kumpinu Athaliah in a cing ngalkapte le mipite ii awsa za ahikom, mihonpi kikhawm in a omna Biakinnpi ah manlang in pai hi." 
2Kings11:14 Ngeina om bangin kumpipa thak sia Biakinnpi tumna khuampi kungah dingin a om sia kumpinu in mu hi. Ama sia uliante le lemle tumte in kiim uum uh a, mipite a vekpi in lungnuam takin au in, lemle tum uh hi. Athaliah in a puansilh baltham in, “Hong leeheak hi! Hong leeheak hi!” ci in au hi." 
2Kings11:15 Jehoiada in Athaliah sia biakinnpi huang sungah a kithalup tu oai ngawl ahikom ama in ngalkap uliante munah: “A ngual a ngualin a cingte kilaklaw panin ama la in paipui vun, ama suatak a sawm pawpo that vun,” ci in thupia hi." 
2Kings11:16 Amate in Athaliah manin, kumpi inn ah paipui uh a, tua mun Siphu Kongpi ah ama thatlum uh hi." 
2Kings11:17 Thiampi Jehoiada in Kumpipa Joash le mipite, Topa ii mite a sua natu in Topa taw thuciamna vawtsak hi; ama in kumpipa le mipite kilaklaw ah zongh thuciamna vawtsak hi." 
2Kings11:18 Tua zawkciang mipite in Baal ii biakinn ah pai uh a, biakinn baltham uh hi; amate in biaknataute le milimte saat tham uh a, tuaciang Baal ii thiampi Mattan sia biaknatau ii mai ah thatlum hi. Jehoiada in Biakinn ah a cingte koi in," 
2Kings11:19 tua zawkciang ama sia ngalkap uliante, kumpipa a cing ngalkapte, le kumpi inn a cingte in kumpipa sia Biakinnpi pan kumpi inn ah paipui uh a, mihonpite in zui uh hi. Joash in Cinna Kongpi panin tumin, kumpi tokhum tungah ama ii mun hong la hi." 
2Kings11:20 Mipi theampo sia lungdam uh a, kumpi inn sungah Athaliah zongh kithat zo ahikom khuapi sung sia ngamdai in om uh hi." 
2Kings11:21 Joash sia kum sali a phak laitakin Judah te kumpipa suak hi. 
2Kings12:1 Israel ah Jehu Kumpipa a maan zawk a kum salina ciang Joash sia Judah te ii kumpipa suakin, ama in Jerusalem panin kum sawmli sung uk hi. A nu sia Beersheba khua panin Zibiah ahi hi." 
2Kings12:2 A khan tawntung ama in Topa ii diksak tu bebekin ngamta hi, banghang ziam cile Jehoiada thiampipa in ama hil hi." 
2Kings12:3 Ahitazong doai biakna munte kisusia ngawl a, tuaciang mihingte in sangaw biakpiakna le ngimnamtui halna te tua munah vawt tan lai uh hi." 
2Kings12:4 Joash in thiampite sam a, Biakinnpi sungah sangaw biakpiakna tungtaang sum a kipiate, hun maan a sangaw biakpiakna tung pan sumte ahizong amate tungah a thin zawna taw piakte ahizong, tua sumte a top natu in thupia hi." 
2Kings12:5 Thiampi sim in ama ii sepsak mite tung pan a nga uh sumte vaipuak in a laak natu le a kisamh bangin Biakinnpi puua natu a kizak natu in thupia hi. 
2Kings12:6 Ahihang Joash ii maan zawk a kum 23 dong sia thiampite in Biakinnpi puuana khat zongh nei ngawl uh hi. 
2Kings12:7 Tua ahikom ama in Jehoiada le a dang thiampite samin, “Banghangin Biakinnpi puua ngawl nu ziam? Tu pan kipan sum na saan uhte noma keam nawn ngawl tu nu hi; Biakinnpi puua natu in aap tu nu hi,” ci in sawl hi." 
2Kings12:8 Thiampite lungkim uh a, Biakinnpi amate ii puua kul ngawl tu sia zongh thukim uh hi." 
2Kings12:9 Tua zawkciang Jehoiada in thingkuang khat la in, a sitna tungah a hawng khat vut hi, tuaciang a thingkuang sia biaknatau ii kung, Biakinnpi sung tumna ii ziatsang ah koi hi. Tumna munah vaipuak a nei thiampi sia in biakpiakna a piate ii sum theampo thingkuang sungah khia hi." 
2Kings12:10 Thingkuang sungah sum tam a om simin kumpipa ii thuzeakpa le Thiampi Lianbelpa hong pai in, ngunn teng a tui thapsak zawkciang khai tee uh hi." 
2Kings12:11 A pha za tatak a kiteptee zawkciang Biakinnpi sung nasepte a ukpa tungah a ngunnte aap in, tua pa in lettamate, inn sate," 
2Kings12:12 uksuang ciangte, suang at te pia in, inn puua natu in a kisamh thing le suangte theampo lei a, a dang zak tu a kisam theampo pia uh hi." 
2Kings12:13 Ahizong a sumte sung panin ngunn haite, kuangte, lemle te, meiinn taw kisai vanhzakte, ngunn le khamh taw a kivawt vanh te ii manh tu in kizangh ngawl hi." 
2Kings12:14 Tua sumte sia naseamte thaman le biakinn puuana sung a kizangh vanhte leina bekin kizangh hi. 
2Kings12:15 Tua nasep taw kisai in a ukte sia thumaan takpi ahikom tua sumte tungtaang ah sazian koi kul ngawl hi. 
2Kings12:16 Khialphel biakpiakna le mawphel biakpiakna atu a kipia sumte sia thingkuang sungah kikoi ngawl hi; tuate sia thiampite neisa ahi hi. 
2Kings12:17 Tua hunin, Syria te ii Kumpipa Hazael in Gath khuapi simin zo hi; tua zawkciang ama in Jerusalem sim tu sawm hi." 
2Kings12:18 Judah te Kumpipa Joash in ama ii mai ah a maang Jehoshaphat, Jehoram, le Ahaziah te ii Topa tungah a aapsa uh piakkhiatnate la in ama ii piakkhiatna taw ngawm a, Biakinnpi sung le kumpi inn sungah khamh theampo taw kop in Kumpipa Hazael letsongin a piak ciang, tua kumpipa in a ngalkapte Jerusalem panin leidang zot pui hi." 
2Kings12:19 Kumpipa Joash ii a sep a vawt a dang theampo sia Judah Kumpite Taanghthu sungah kikhum hi. 
2Kings12:20 Kumpipa Joash ii uliante in ama thalup sawm uh a, tuate sung pan nii, Shimeath ii tapa Jozacar le Shomer ii tapa Jehozabad in Jerusalem nisuana sangah lei kihukna mun Silla paisukna lampi tungah a kisa inn sia sungah thatlum uh hi. Joash sia David ii Khuapi sung kumpi thaan ah kiphum a, a tapa Amaziah in a kumpipa za laih hi." 
2Kings12:21  
2Kings13:1 Judah te Kumpipa Ahaziah ii tapa Joash maan zawk a kum 23 kumin, Jehu ii tapa Jehoahaz sia Israel te ii kumpipa suak a, ama in Samaria panin kum sawm le kum sali uk hi." 
2Kings13:2 Ama mai ah kumpipa Jeroboam bangma in ama in Topa tungah maw a, Israel mite mawna sungah thetpui hi; ama in a ngilo ngamtatnate kheal ngawl hi." 
2Kings13:3 Tua ahikom Topa sia Israel tungah thin uuk hi, tuaciang ama in Syria te kumpipa Hazael le a tapa Benhadad in Israel sia hun khat zawk hun khat zosak hi." 
2Kings13:4 Tua zawkciang Jehoahaz in Topa tungah thungen a, tuaciang Topa in Syria te ii kumpipa in Israel mite nasia takin a kinengcip a mu ciang a thungetna zo hi." 
2Kings13:5 Topa in Israel te lampui khat puak a, Syria te khut sung pan ama in suatak hi, tuaciang nidang bangma in, Israel sia ngammuangin om uh hi." 
2Kings13:6 Ahihang amate in Kumpipa Jeroboam ii Israel mite mawna sungah a lampuina te nusia ngawl uh a, tua mawnate ma vawt suak lai uh hi, tuaciang numeipathian Asherah ii lim sia Samaria ah taanglai hi." 
2Kings13:7 Jehoahaz in siphu ngalkap 50, siphu ngalleang sawm le ngalkap 10000 simngawl ngalkap nei ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile Syria kumpipa in a dang teng susia in leivui bangin amate tuanhcil hi." 
2Kings13:8 Jehoahaz ii a sep a vawt le a hanna dang teng sia Israel Kumpite Taanghthu sungah kikhum hi. 
2Kings13:9 Ama thi a, Samaria ah kiphum hi, tuaciang a tapa Jehoash in a kumpi za lua hi." 
2Kings13:10 Judah te Kumpipa Joash ii maan zawk a kum 37 kumin Jehoahaz ii tapa Jehoash sia Israel te ii kumpipa suak hi, tuaciang ama in Samaria pan kum sawm le kum luk sung uk hi." 
2Kings13:11 Ama in zongh Israel te mawna sungah a lampui, Kumpipa Jeroboam ii siatna teng zui in Topa tungah maw hi." 
2Kings13:12 Ama ii sep le vawt dangte, Judah te kumpipa Amaziah taw a kidona sungah a hanna theampo a kihel in Israel Kumpipate ii Taanghthu sungah kikhum hi." 
2Kings13:13 Jehoash thi a Samaria khua kumpi thaan ah kiphum a, a tapa Jeroboam II in a kumpi za laih hi." 
2Kings13:14 Kamsaangpa Elisha sia thithei natna taw na a, ama thi tu in a lupna ah Israel te Kumpipa Jehoash in ve hi. “Ka pa awng, ka pa awng!” ci in au in kap hi. “Nang sia Israel a hung a thahat pa ni hi!” ci hi." 
2Kings13:15 Elisha in, Jehoash tungah, “Thal khat le thaltang pawlkhat hong la ta'n,” ci in thupia hi. Jehoash in tuate la a," 
2Kings13:16 Elisha in tua thal kaap tu in kinging in sawl hi. Kumpipa in a sawl bangin mang a, tuaciang Elisha in a khut sia kumpipa khut tungah koi hi." 
2Kings13:17 Tua zawkciang kamsaangpa ii sawl bangin Syria ngam sang a nga khelki sia kumpipa in hong hi. “Thaltang kap in!” ci in Elisha in thupia hi. Kumpipa ii thaltang a kaa zawk po ciang kamsaangpa pau a, “Nang sia Topa ii thaltang ni hi, tua taw Topa in Syria te zo tu hi. Nangma in Aphek ah Syria te na zaw dong na do tu hi,” ci hi." 
2Kings13:18 Tua zawkciang Elisha in kumpipa munah thaltang dang teng zongh la in lei saatna nei in ci in sawl hi. Kumpipa in lei thumvei saat a, tua zawkciang tawp hi." 
2Kings13:19 Hi sia in Elisha thin uuksak a, ama in kumpipa munah, “Nga vei lukvei bang na saat tu hi ve, tua hile Syria te zo siat tu ve teh, tu in amate thumvei bekma zo tu ni hi,” ci hi." 
2Kings13:20 Elisha thi in ama kiphum hi. Kum simin Moab te in a hon veu in Israel ngam sim uh hi. 
2Kings13:21 Khatvei mithi khat a kivui laitakin tua ngalte honkhat kingal mu a, tuaciang mithi puate in a thiluang sia Elisha ii thaan sungah lawnsuk uh a, amate taikeak uh hi. Elisha ii ngu taw a kiphak po ciang mithi sia nungta kik a, ding to hi." 
2Kings13:22 Syria Kumpipa Hazael in Jehoahaz ii maan sung theampo Israel nengcip ngawp a," 
2Kings13:23 ahizong Topa in amate tungah thuthiamin hesuak hi. Amate a kimaimot mang tu oai ngawlin, hu zaw hi, banghang ziam cile Abraham, Isaac le Jacob te tungah thuciamna a vawt hang ahi hi. Ama in a mite mangil ngeingawl hi." 
2Kings13:24 Syria Kumpipa Hazael a thi ciang a tapa Benhadad kumpi suak hi. 
2Kings13:25 Tua zawkciang Israel Kumpipa Jehoash in Benhadad sia thumvei zo zo a, tuaciang a pa Jehoahaz ii khan lai a Benhadad ii suan sa khuapite ama in la kik hi." 
2Kings14:1 Israel te Kumpipa Jehoahaz ii tapa Jehoash ii maan zawk a kum nii na ciang, Joash ii tapa Amaziah sia Judah te kumpipa suak hi," 
2Kings14:2 ama kum 25 pha a, ama in Jerusalem panin kum 29 sung uk hi. A nu sia Jerusalem pan a Jehoaddin hi." 
2Kings14:3 Ama in Topa ii diksak bangin ngamta a, ahihang ama sia a taanghpupi David bang hi ngawlin, a pa Joash ii ngamtat bangin ngamta zaw hi." 
2Kings14:4 Ama in doai biakna munte baltham ngawl a, tuaciang mihingte in sangaw biakpiakna le ngimnamtui halna te tua munah zom to suak uh hi." 
2Kings14:5 Amaziah in a thuneina a kip po ciang, a pa kumpipa a that uliante thatsak hi." 
2Kings14:6 Ahihang ama in tuate ii tate thatlum ngawl a, Moses Thukham sungah Topa ii thupiak ahi: “A tate ii a vawt khialnate hu in nute pate kithisak ngawl tu a, pate nute ii a vawt khialnate hu in tate kithisak ngawl tu hi; mihing khat sia ama ii khialna hang bekin kithisak tu hi,” a cite zui hi." 
2Kings14:7 Amaziah in Edom ngalkapte 10,000 sia Ci Kuam sungah that hi; ama in Sela khuapi sia kidona sungah suan a, Joktheel ci in a min phuak a, tu dong ma tua min pua lai hi." 
2Kings14:8 Tuaciang Amaziah in Israel te Kumpipa Jehoash tungah kamtaite paisakin kido natu thato hi. 
2Kings14:9 Ahihang Kumpipa Jehoash in hi bang zo kikna thaak kik hi: “Khatvei lai in lingkung khat Lebanon Mual tungah a om sia in cedar kung khat ii munah: ‘Na tanu sia ka tapa ii zi tu hong pia ta'n,’ ci hi. Ngamsa khat hong pai in lingkung sia tuanhcil hi." 
2Kings14:10 Tu in Amaziah awng, nang in Edom te na zaw hu in kisathei ni hi. Na minthanna taw lungkim in a, inn ah om po in. Nang le na mite lalna bek hong pia tu ngimna banghangin piangsak nuam ni ziam?” ci hi." 
2Kings14:11 Ahihang Amaziah in ngai nuam ngawl hi, tua ahikom Kumpipa Jehoash in a mite taw kuanin Judah ngam Beth Shemesh ah kido uh hi."
