2Kings14:12 Amaziah ii ngalkap honte in lel a, a ngalkap te theampo amate inn tek ah tai uh hi." 
2Kings14:13 Jehoash in Amaziah sia manin thongtaaksak hi, Jerusalem ah paisuak in a khuapi ii luphung sia Ephraim Kongpi pan A Kiing Kongpi dong metre 200 dektak kikaal sung teng baltham hi." 
2Kings14:14 Ama in ngunn le khamh a mu theampo, biakinn vanh theampo le kumpi inn sungah sumngum te la in Samaria ah ciapui hi. Ama in mihing pawlkhat zongh a kitan kik tu in ciapui hi." 
2Kings14:15 Jehoash ii a sep a vawt dangte theampo, kumpipa Amaziah taw a kidona sungah a hannate huamin, Israel te ii Kumpipate Taanghthu sungah kikhum hi." 
2Kings14:16 Jehoash thi a, ama sia Samaria khua kumpi thaan ah kiphum hi, tuaciang a tapa Jeroboam II in ama ii kumpi za laih hi." 
2Kings14:17 Israel Kumpipa Jehoash ii thi zawk kum sawm le kum nga dong Judah te kumpipa Amaziah nungta hi. 
2Kings14:18 Amaziah ii a sep a vawt dangte theampo sia Judah te Kumpipate ii Taanghthu sungah kikhum hi. 
2Kings14:19 Amaziah suamlup natu in Jerusalem ah sawmna khat om hi, tua ahikom ama sia Laschish khuapi ah tai hi, ahihang a ngalte in tua munah zuizen in thatlum uh hi." 
2Kings14:20 A luang sia siphu khat tungah suanh in Jerusalem ah ciapui uh hi, David khuapi kumpi thaan ah ama kiphum hi." 
2Kings14:21 Judah mite in a tapa kum sawm le kum luk a pha Uzziah sia kumpilukhu khusakin kumpi suaksak hi. 
2Kings14:22 A pa thi zawkciang Uzziah in Elath khua suan kikin sa kik hi. 
2Kings14:23 Judah te kumpipa Joash ii tapa Amaziah maan zawk a kum sawm le kum nga kum in Jehoash ii tapa Jeroboam sia Israel te ii kumpipa suak hi, tuaciang ama in Samaria pan kum 41 sung uk hi." 
2Kings14:24 Ama in, Israel sia mawna sungah a then, ama mai ah a seam masa Nebat ii tapa Kumpipa Jeroboam ii a ngitlo ngamtatna teng zui in Topa tungah maw hi." 
2Kings14:25 Ama in Israel te ii neisa ngamkhen theampo, saksang pan Hammath Mualciangh, thangsang pan Tuipi Thi dong zo kik hi. Hisia in Jonah Gath Hepher khua pan a kamsaangpa Amittai ii tapa Oonah tungah Topa, Israel te ii Pathian ii a kamciamsa sia ahi hi." 
2Kings14:25 Ama in Israel te ii neisa ngamkhen theampo, saksang pan Hammath Mualciangh, thangsang pan Tuipi Thi dong zo kik hi. Hisia in Jonah Gath Hepher khua pan a kamsaangpa Amittai ii tapa Oonah tungah Topa, Israel te ii Pathian ii a kamciamsa sia ahi hi." 
2Kings14:26 Topa in Israel te ii a cizathuai mama thuakna sia mu hi; tuaciang amate a hu tu kuama om ngawl hi. 
2Kings14:27 Ahihang Israel te a bo cimit tu sia Topa ii tupna hi ngawl hi. Tua ahikom ama in amate sia Kumpipa Jeroboam II tungtawnin suatak hi. 
2Kings14:28 Jeroboam II ii a sep a vawt dangte theampo, ngal sung a hanna le Damascus le Hamath khuate, Israel te atu a laak kikna theampo sia Israel Kumpipate Taanghthu sungah kikhum hi." 
2Kings14:29 Jeroboam thi a, kumpi thaan ah kiphumin, tuaciang a tapa Zechariah in a kumpi za lua hi." 
2Kings14:29 Jeroboam thi a, kumpi thaan ah kiphumin, tuaciang a tapa Zechariah in a kumpi za lua hi." 
2Kings15:1 Israel kumpipa Jeroboam II kumpi a sep zawk a kum 27 kumin Amaziah tapa Uzziah sia Judah te kumpipa suak a," 
2Kings15:2 ama kum sia kum sawm le kum luk pha in, Jerusalem pan kum 52 sung uk hi. A nu sia Jerusalem pan a Jecoliah ahi hi." 
2Kings15:3 A pa ii ngamtatna zui in ama in Topa ii diksak bangin ngamta hi. 
2Kings15:4 Ahihang doai biate ii biakna munte kisusia ngawl a, mihingte in sangaw biakpiakna le ngimnamtui halnate tua munah vawt suak lai uh hi." 
2Kings15:5 Topa in Uzziah sia a kiitakhuai vun natna taw vaat a, a thi dong tua natna vei hi. Ama in ama ii aituam inn khat ah teang a, a vaipuak theampo kipengsakin, a tapa Jotham in ngam uk hi." 
2Kings15:6 Uzziah ii a sep a vawt dangte theampo sia Judah Kumpipate Taanghthu sungah kikhum hi. 
2Kings15:7 Uzziah thi a, David ii khuapi sung kumpi thaan ah kivui a, a tapa Jotham in a kumpi za laih hi." 
2Kings15:8 Judah kumpipa Uzziah maan zawk a kum 38 kumin Israel te ii kumpipa Jeroboam II ii tapa Zechariah sia Israel te ii kumpipa suak a, tuaciang ama in Samaria pan tha luk sung uk hi." 
2Kings15:8 Judah kumpipa Uzziah maan zawk a kum 38 kumin Israel te ii kumpipa Jeroboam II ii tapa Zechariah sia Israel te ii kumpipa suak a, tuaciang ama in Samaria pan tha luk sung uk hi." 
2Kings15:9 Ama in, ama mai ah a seam masa te bangma in Topa tungah maw hi. Ama in Nebat ii tapa kumpipa Jeroboam ngitlo ngamtat sia teng zui in, Israel te mawna sungah lampui hi." 
2Kings15:10 Jabesh ii tapa Shallum in Kumpipa Zechariah suam tu a sawm bangin Ibleam ah thatlum hi, tuaciang a kumpi za ama in lua hi." 
2Kings15:10 Jabesh ii tapa Shallum in Kumpipa Zechariah suam tu a sawm bangin Ibleam ah thatlum hi, tuaciang a kumpi za ama in lua hi." 
2Kings15:11 Zechariah ii sep le vawt a dangte theampo sia Israel Kumpipate Taanghthu sungah kikhum hi. 
2Kings15:11 Zechariah ii sep le vawt a dangte theampo sia Israel Kumpipate Taanghthu sungah kikhum hi. 
2Kings15:12 Tua ahikom Topa ii Kumpipa Jehu tungah kamciam a piak, “Na suan na paalte khang li dong Israel kumpipate suak tu hi,” a ci sia taangtung hi." 
2Kings15:13 Judah Kumpipa Uzziah a maan zawk a kum 39 kumin, Jabesh ii tapa Shallum sia Israel te ii kumpipa suak hi, tuaciang ama in Samaria pan tha khat sung uk hi." 
2Kings15:14 Gadi ii tapa Menahem in Tirzah pan Samaria ah pai a, Shallum suamlum in a kumpi za lua hi." 
2Kings15:15 Shallum ii a sep a vawt dangte theampo, a ngual suamna thute a kihel in Israel Kumpipate ii Taanghthu sungah kikhum hi." 
2Kings15:16 Menahem in Tirzah panin a pai ciangin Tappuah khuapi, a sungah a teangte le a kiim a paam ngamkhen teng susia cip hi, banghang ziam cile ama tungah ki aap ngawl hi. Nau ngai numeite theampo ii ngilpi ngawngawn khuakeak hi." 
2Kings15:17 Judah Kumpipa Uzziah ii maan zawk a kum 39 kum in Gadi ii tapa Menahem sia Israel te ii Kumpipa suak hi, tuaciang ama in Samaria pan kum sawm sung uk hi." 
2Kings15:18 Ama in, a thi dong Israel te mawna sungah a lampui Nebat ii tapa kumpipa Jeroboam tatsiatna teng zui in, Topa tungah maw hi." 
2Kings15:19 Assyria te ii kumpilianpa Tiglath Pileser in Israel sim a, tuaciang Menahem in, ngam sungah ama ii vaangletna a kip natu tua kumpipa ii panpui natu in ngunn kilogramme 34,000 pia hi." 
2Kings15:20 Menahem in tua dangka te sia Israel ngam ah mihaute khat sim tung pan ngunntang 50 tek zawthawk thu taw khonin a nga ahi hi. Tua ahikom Tiglath Pileser sia ama ngam ah cia kik hi. 
2Kings15:21 Menahem ii a sep a vawt dangte theampo sia Israel Kumpite ii Taanghthu sungah kikhum hi. 
2Kings15:22 Ama thi in kiphum a, a tapa Pekahiah in ama kumpi za laih hi." 
2Kings15:23 Judah Kumpipa Uzziah ii maan zawk a kum 50 kumin Menahem ii tapa Pekahiah sia Israel te ii kumpipa suak hi, tuaciang ama in Samaria panin kum nii sung uk hi." 
2Kings15:24 Ama in, Israel sia mawna sungah a lampui Nebat ii tapa Kumpipa Jeroboam ii ngitlo ngamtat teng zui in, Topa tungah maw hi." 
2Kings15:25 Pekahiah ii ngalkap ulian khat ahi Remaliah ii tapa Pekah in Gilead khua pan mihing 50 taw ama thasawmin, Samaria kumpi inn a sungnung kulh sungah Pekahiah sia suamlum a, ama in a kumpi za lua hi." 
2Kings15:26 Pekahiah ii a sep a vawt dangte theampo Israel Kumpipate ii Taanghthu sungah kikhum hi. 
2Kings15:27 Judah Kumpipa Uzziah ii a maan zawk a kum 52 kumin Remaliah ii tapa Pekah sia Israel te kumpipa suak a, ama in Samaria ah kum kul sung maang hi." 
2Kings15:28 Ama in Israel te mawna sungah a lampui Nebat ii tapa Kumpipa Jeroboam ii ngitlo ngamtatna teng zui in, Topa tungah maw hi." 
2Kings15:29 Pekah kumpipa ahi hun laitakin Assyria te ii kumpilianpa Tiglath Pileser in, Ijon, Abel Beth Maacah, Janoah, Kedesh le Hazor khuapi teng le Gilead ii ngamkhen, Galilee le Naphtali teng suan hi, tuaciang a mihingte sia Assyria ah thongtaak tu in ciapui hi." 
2Kings15:30 Judah kumpipa Uzziah ii tapa Jotham ii maan zawk a kum kul lai in Elah ii tapa Hoshea in kumpipa Pekah sia thasawmin, suamlup zawkciang a kumpi za sia ama in lua hi." 
2Kings15:31 Pekah ii a sep a vawt dangte theampo sia Israel Kumpipate ii Taanghthu sungah kikhum hi. 
2Kings15:32 Remaliah ii tapa Pekah ii Israel kumpi in a maan zawk a kum nii kumin Uzziah ii tapa Jotham sia Judah te kumpipa suak hi," 
2Kings15:33 ama ii kum sia kum 25 pha a, Jerusalem panin kum sawm le kum luk sung uk hi. A nu sia Zadok ii tanu Jerusha hi." 
2Kings15:34 A pa Uzziah ii ngamtatna zui in Jotham in Topa ii diksak te ngamtatna in nei hi. 
2Kings15:35 Ahihang doai biate ii biakna munte kisusia ngawl hi, tuaciang mihingte in sangaw biakpiakna le ngimnamtui halna te tua munah vawt suak lai uh hi. Biakinnpi ii Saksang Kongpi a sa sia Jotham ahi hi." 
2Kings15:36 Jotham ii sep le vawt a dangte theampo sia Judah Kumpipate ii Taanghthu sungah kikhum siat hi. 
2Kings15:37 Ama kumpipa ahi laitakin Topa in Judah te sim tu in Syria te kumpipa Rezin puak masa a, tuaciang Israel te kumpipa Pekah puak hi." 
2Kings15:38 Jotham thi a David ii Khuapi sung kumpi thaan ah kiphumin a tapa Ahaz in a kumpi za laih hi. 
2Kings16:1 Remaliah ii tapa Israel te ii kumpipa Pekah ii maan zawk kum sawm le kum sali kum in Jotham ii tapa Ahaz sia Judah te kumpipa suak hi," 
2Kings16:2 ama kum kul pha a, Jerusalem panin kum sawm le kum luk sung uk hi. Ama in a taanghpupi David ii ngamtatna phate zui ngawl a; Topa Pathian ii diksak ngawlte vawt zaw hi," 
2Kings16:3 tuaciang ama in Israel kumpipate ii ngamtatna te veu zui hi. Ama in, Israel mite hong mainawt uh lai in, Topa ii a ngamsung pan a nawkeakte ii a thasiathuai ngamtatnate zui a, a tapa ngawngawn milim biakna meihal biakpiakna in nei hi." 
2Kings16:4 Doai biate ii biakna mun, mualte ii tung, le thinglim nuai sim ah, Ahaz in sangaw biakpiakna le ngimnamtui halnate piakhia hi." 
2Kings16:5 Syria te kumpipa Rezin le Israel kumpipa Pekah in Jerusalem sim a, uumci ahihang Ahaz sia zo zo ngawl uh hi." 
2Kings16:6 (Tua hun sung ma in Edom te kumpipa in Elath khuapi la kik a, Judah mi tua munah a teangte notkeak hi. Edom te Elath a teang a, teang top lai uh hi.)" 
2Kings16:7 Ahaz in Assyria te ii kumpilianpa Tiglath Pileser munah kamtaite paisak a: “Keima in a thumaan na naseampa khi hi. Hong pai ta'n a, Syria le Israel kumpipate khut sung pan hong hun khia ta'n, amate in kei hong sim hi.” cisak hi." 
2Kings16:8 Ahaz in ngunn le khamhte Biakinn pan le kumpi inn sung sum kholna pan la in, kumpilianpa tungah letsong in thaak hi." 
2Kings16:9 Ahaz ii maangkaa na a zona in Tiglath Pileser in a ngalkap hon taw Damascus ah kuan in, tua khuapi suan a, kumpipa Rezin thatlum in a mite sia thongtaak tu in Kir khua ah paipui hi." 
2Kings16:10 Kumpipa Ahaz in Damascus ah Kumpilianpa Tiglath Pileser taw kimu tu in a pai ciang, tua munah a om biaknatau sia mu hi, ama in tua biaknatau ii lim sia kheet nei ngawlin a kicing tatakin suai a, Uriah thiampipa thaak kik hi." 
2Kings16:11 Tua ahikom Uriah in biaknatau tuasia taw a kibang linlian khat vawtsak a, Ahaz hong heak kik ma in man hi." 
2Kings16:12 Damascus pan hong cia kik ciang Ahaz in biaknatau sia a kiman sa in mu hi," 
2Kings16:13 tua ahikom ama in nganhingte taw sangaw biakpiakna le antang biakpiakna tua biaknatau tungah vawt a, tuaciang sapittui biakna le kipawlkhop biakpiakna chi te bungh suk hi." 
2Kings16:14 Taau taw kivawt biaknatau Topa tungah a ki aapsa sia biaknatau thak le Biakinnpi kilaklaw ah koi uh a, tua ahikom Ahaz in biaknatau thak sia ii saksang ah khiin hi." 
2Kings16:15 Tua zawkciang ama in Uriah munah, “Hi keima aa ahi biaknatau lian sia zingsang meihal biakpiakna le nitak antang biakpiakna, kumpipa le a mipite meihal biakpiakna le antang biakpiak natu le mipite ii sapittui biakpiak natu in zangh in. Nganhing sangaw biakpiakna a kizangh theampo ii chi sia a tungah sung in. Ahihang taau biaknatau sia keima ii aisaanna ah ka zak tu in na koi in,” ci in thupia hi." 
2Kings16:16 Uriah in kumpipa thupiak bangin seam hi. 
2Kings16:17 Kumpipa Ahaz in Biakinnpi sungah a kizangh taau leang sia a tuamin la a, tua tungah a om kuangpuite heam hi; ama in taau khuital sawm le nii te nungzaang pan taau tuikuangte zongh la in suangtum doppha tungah koi hi." 
2Kings16:18 Assyria te kumpilianpa a lungkimsak natu in Ahaz in Biakinnpi sung pan kumpi tokhum koina dawtuam sia heamkhia in, kumpipa ii Biakinnpi sung aituam tumna bangkua zongh khakbil hi." 
2Kings16:19 Ahaz Kumpipa ii a sep a vawt dangte theampo sia Judah Kumpipate Taanghthu sungah kikhum siat hi. 
2Kings16:20 Ahaz thi a, David Khuapi sung kumpi thaan ah kiphumin, a tapa Hezekiah in a kumpi za laih hi." 
2Kings17:1 Judah ah kumpipa Ahaz a maan zawk a kum sawm le kum nii kumin Elah ii tapa Hoshea sia Israel te kumpipa suak a, ama in Samaria pan kum kua sung uk hi." 
2Kings17:2 Ama in Topa tungah maw a, ahizong ama mai ah Israel a uk kumpipa dangte za in maw ngawl hi." 
2Kings17:3 Assyria kumpilianpa Shalmaneser in ama tungah ngal phuang hi; Hoshea in Shalmaneser tungah tum in, kum simin shia pia hi." 
2Kings17:4 Ahihang Hoshea in kum khat ciang, Egypt kumpipa So tungah hu ngen tu in kamtai paisak hi, tuaciang Assyria te tungah shia a piak sia tawp hi. Shalmaneser in hi thu a heak ciang Hoshea mansak in thong sungah khum hi." 
2Kings17:5 Tua zawkciang Shalmaneser in Israel simin Samaria uumci hi. A uumci zawk a kum thum kum," 
2Kings17:6 Hoshea ii maan zawk a kum kua a phak kumin Assyria te ii kumpilianpa in Samaria suan hi, Israel te thongtaak tu in ciapui a, tuate sung pan pawlkhat sia Halah khuapi ah, pawlkhat sia Gozan ngamkhen sung Habor Ngun hui ah, tuaciang pawlkhat sia Media te khuapite ah teangsak hi." 
2Kings17:7 Samaria khua bona sia Egypt ngam panin amate a pusua pui, Egypt kumpipa khut sung pan a hunkhia Topa a Pathian tungah a maw uh hang ahi hi. Amate in pathian dangte bia uh a," 
2Kings17:8 a mite ii a mainawt ciang Topa ii a nawkeak mite ii ngeina te zui pui in, Israel kumpipate ii a piansak tawm ngeinate zuisak uh hi." 
2Kings17:9 Israel te in Topa a Pathian ii thukimpui ngawl nate seam uh hi. Amate in doai biate ii biakna munte khua theampo, khuanobel pan khuapi lianbel dongah sa uh hi." 
2Kings17:10 Mualtung theampo le thinglim nuai sim ah, Asherah numeipathian ii milim le suangkhuamte phut uh hi," 
2Kings17:11 tuaciang, Topa ii a ngam pan a betkeak mihingte ii ngamtatna zui in amate in ngimnamtuite doai biate tau tungah hal uh hi. Amate in Topa thin uuk natu in amate ii ngitlo ngamtatna te taw piangsak a," 
2Kings17:12 milim biak ngawl natu Topa ii thupiakte ni ngawl uh hi. 
2Kings17:13 Topa in a kamtai te le a kamsaangte paisakin Israel le Judah te a kidop natu in sawl a: “Na ngamtat siatna uhte nusia vun a, na taanghpupite uh ka piak Thukhamte sungah a om, ka naseam ka kamsaangte tungtawnin no tungah kong piak kong sawlna te ni vun,” ci hi." 
2Kings17:14 Ahihang amate in a thu ni ngawl uh hi; Topa a muang ngawl a taanghpupite uh bangma in thinpui uh hi. 
2Kings17:15 Ama ii hilnate nit tu nial hi, a taanghpupite taw thuciamna a vawtte zongh keam ngawl uh a, kidop natu a piakte zongh thu in sim ngawl uh hi. Amate in a mannung ngawl milimte bia uh a, amate mama zongh a mannung ngawl suak uh hi, amate in a kiim a paam ah mite ii ngeinate zui uh a, Topa ii zui heak vun ci in a thupiakna sia ni ngawl uh hi." 
2Kings17:16 Topa a Pathian ii thukham theampo amate in paltan uh a, amate in thik taw a kivawt khuital nii ii lim a biak tu in vawt uh hi; amate in Asherah numeipathian ii milim zongh vawt a, aksite bia in, Baal pathian ii naseam uh hi." 
2Kings17:17 Amate in a tapa a tanute doai biate ii pathiante tungah meihal biakpiakna in pia uh hi; amate in thaa sam theite le aisaan theite thu dongh uh hi, tuaciang amate in Topa ii muna ah a maan ngawlte vawt tu in kipum aap uh a, Topa thin uukna piangsak hi." 
2Kings17:18 Topa sia Israel tungah thin uuk ahikom ama ii mu na pan bengkeak a, Judah kumpi ngam bek khe hi." 
2Kings17:19 Ahihang Judah mite ngawngawn in zongh Topa a Pathian ii thukhamte ni ngawl uh a; Israel te ii ngeina a zak uhte zui uh hi. 
2Kings17:20 Topa in Israel te nial in, daan pia a, a ngilo ngalte khut sungah aap hi, a khakbel ciang ama ii muna pan bengkeak hi." 
2Kings17:21 Topa in Israel le Judah a khen zawkciang Israel te in Nebat ii tapa Jeroboam sia kumpi suaksak uh hi. Jeroboam in Israel te a Topa taisansak in a kiitakhuai mama mawna sungah then hi. 
2Kings17:22 Amate in Jeroboam zui in ama ii mawna a vawt theampo vawt paisuak uh a," 
2Kings17:23 a naseam kamsaangte tungah Topa ii ka vawt tu hi ci in a kidop natu a sonkhol bangin a khakbel ciang ama ii mu na pan betkeakna a thuak uh dong amate in mawna vawt uh hi. Tua ahikom Israel mite sia Assyria ah sal in kiciapui a, tu ni dong tua munah teang lai uh hi." 
2Kings17:24 Assyria kumpilianpa in Babylon, Cuth, Ivvah, Hamath le Sepharvaim khuapite pan mihingte paipui in, saltaang Israel te ii teenna mun Samaria te khuapite ah teangsak hi. Hi khuapite, amate ii neisa sua in tua munah teang uh hi." 
2Kings17:25 Amate tua munah a ten phit sawngin Topa bia ngawl uh ahikom Topa in tawpi te puakin, amate pawlkhat thatlumsak hi." 
2Kings17:26 Assyria te ii kumpilianpa munah, Samaria khuapite ah mihing a teensakte in tua ngam ii pathian thukhamte he ngawl ahikom a pathian in tawpi puakin thatsak hi, ci in son hi." 
2Kings17:27 Tua ahikom kumpilianpa in: “Thiampi ih ciapui thongtaak te sung pan khat puak kik vun a; a ngam ii pathianzia a mite tungah a hil tu in tua munah cia kik in teangsak vun,” ci in thupia hi." 
2Kings17:28 Tua ahikom Samaria pan a kihawlkhia Israel thiampi khat sia pai in, Bethel ah teang a, tua mun pan Topa bangbangin bia tu ci in a mihingte hil hi." 
2Kings17:29 Ahihang Samaria ah a teang mite in amate ii milim tek ma vawt suak uh a, Israel te ii vawt sa biakpiakna buk sungah koi uh hi. A kibang ngawl pawl tuatuam sim in amate ii teenna khuapite ah a milimte vawt tek uh hi;" 
2Kings17:30 Babylon mite in Succoth Benoth pathian ii milimte vawt a; Cuth mite in Nergal pathian milimte; Hamath mite in Ashima milimte; 
2Kings17:31 Ivvah mite in Nibhaz le Tartak milimte; tuaciang Sepharvaim mite in a pathian uh Adrammelech le Anammelech tungah meihal biakpiakna in a tate pia uh hi. 
2Kings17:32 Hi mite in Topa zongh bia uh hi, tuaciang doai biate ii biakna munte sangaw biakpiakna munte ah thiampi seam tu le amate taangin sangaw biakpiakna a pia tu in amate sung pan mi tuatuamte teal uh hi." 
2Kings17:33 Tuabangin amate in Topa bia uh a, ahihang amate hong paina a ngamte ii ngeinate bangma in amate tek ii pathiante zongh bia uh hi." 
2Kings17:34 Amate in a ngeina luite tu ni dongin zom suak lai uh hi. Amate in Topa bia ngawl a, Israel ci in min a piak Jacob ii suan le paalte tung a piak thukham le thupiaknate zongh ni ngawl uh hi." 
2Kings17:35 Topa in amate taw thuciamna vawt in, “A dang pathiante bia ngawl tu nu hi; tuate mai ah kun ngawl tu nu hi tuaciang a na seam ngawl tu nu hi, tua ahibuale zong sangaw biakpiakna pia ngawl tu nu hi." 
2Kings17:36 No te Egypt ngam pan vaangletna le thahatna taw hong pusuapui keima Topa ii thu hong ni tu nu hi, note kei mai ah hong kun tu nu hi, tuaciang sangaw biakna zongh hong pia tu nu hi." 
2Kings17:37 Note a tu ka at thukhamte le thupiakte a tawntungin ni tu nu hi. A dang pathiante bia ngawl tu nu hi," 
2Kings17:38 tuaciang no taw thuciam ka vawtte mangil ngawl tu nu hi. 
2Kings17:39 Keima Topa, na Pathian ii thu nong ni tu uh a, tuasia ciang, na ngalte kung pan kong suatak tu hi,” ci in thupia hi," 
2Kings17:40 Ahihang tua mite in ngai ngawl uh a, amate ii ngeina luite ma zui veve uh hi." 
2Kings17:41 Tua hi a, tua mite in Topa bia uh hi, ahihang amate ii a milimte zongh bia uh hi; tuni dong ma in a suan a paalte in tuabangin ngamta lai uh hi." 
2Kings18:1 Israel ah Elah ii tapa Hoshea ii maan zawk a kum thum kum Ahaz ii tapa Hezekiah sia 
2Kings18:2 ama kum 25 a phak laitakin Judah te ii Kumpipa suak a, Jerusalem panin kum 29 sung uk hi. A nu sia Zechariah tanu Abijah hi." 
2Kings18:2 ama kum 25 a phak laitakin Judah te ii Kumpipa suak a, Jerusalem panin kum 29 sung uk hi. A nu sia Zechariah tanu Abijah hi." 
2Kings18:3 A taanghpupi David ii ngamtatna zui in ama in Topa ii diksak tu in ngamta hi. 
2Kings18:4 Ama in doai biate ii biakpiakna munte sutham hi, suangkhuamte sutan in, tuaciang numeipathian Asherah limte zongh sattan siat hi. Moses ii vawt taau ngul, Nehushtan a kici sia zongh sutham hi. Tua hun dong sia Israel mite in tua taaungul upat vawtna in ngimnamtui hal uh hi." 
2Kings18:5 Hezekiah in Topa Israel te ii Pathian muang hi; Judah mite in ama ii hun ma hikale ama ii hun zawkciang hikale ama taw a kibang kumpipa nei ngeingawl uh hi. 
2Kings18:6 Ama in Topa tungah thumaan in, bangma hunin a thu ni ngawlin a om ngei bua hi, Topa ii Moses tungah a piak thupiakna te phinciing takin keamcing hi." 
2Kings18:7 Tua ahikom Topa sia ama taw omkhawm a, tuaciangin ama sia a sep a vawt theampo ah zawna nga hi. Ama in Assyria te ii kumpilianpa langpanin leedo a ama khutnuai ah tum nuam ngawl hi." 
2Kings18:8 Ama in Philistine te zo in, Gaza le a kiim a paam ngamte kihel amate ii teenna khuanobel te pan kipan khuapi lianbel te dong kuanin sim hi." 
2Kings18:9 Hezekiah ii a maan zawk a kum li kum ciang — tuasia Israel te tungah kumpipa Hoshea ii maan zawk a kum sali kum hi a — Assyria te ii Kumpilianpa Shalmaneser in Israel simin Samaria uumci hi. 
2Kings18:10 A uumci zawk a kum thum kum ciangin Samaria khua bo a; Hezekiah ii maan zawk a kum lukna hi a, Hoshea ii maan zawk a kum kua kum ahi hi." 
2Kings18:11 Assyria te ii kumpilianpa in Israel te thongtaak tu in paipui a, pawlkhat sia Halah khuapi sungah, pawlkhat Gozan ngamkhen sung Habor Ngun hui ah, pawlkhat sia Media te khuapite ah teangsak hi." 
2Kings18:12 Samaria khua bo hi, banghang ziam cile Israel in Topa a Pathian ii thu ni ngawl hi, tua banah amate taw thuciam a vawt te zongh paltan uh a, Topa naseampa Moses ii thukham a piakte theampo zongh ni ngawl uh hi. Amate in za nuam ngawl a, ni nuam ngawl uh hi." 
2Kings18:13 Kumpipa Hezekiah ii a maan zawk a kum sawm le kum li ciangin, Assyria te ii kumpilianpa Sennacherib in Judah te ii kulh taw a ki uum khuapite simin zo hi." 
2Kings18:14 Hezekiah in Lachish a om Sennacherib tungah, “Keima in seam khial zo khi hi; nong hesuakna in hong sim nawn heak in, nong nget pawpo kong pia tu hi,” ci in kamthaak hi. Kumpilianpa in zo kik a, Hezekiah in ngunn kilogramme 10,000 le khamh kilogramme tulkhat ama a puak tu in sawl hi." 
2Kings18:15 Hezekiah in Biakinnpi sung le kumpi inn sumkholna sungah ngunn teng thaak hi," 
2Kings18:16 ama in Biakinnpi kongbiang khuamte tung pan khamhte zongh khokin, tuaciang ama mama ii kongbiang khuamte a tuamna khamhte la in Sennacherib thaak siat hi." 
2Kings18:17 Assyria kumpilianpa in ngalkaphon lian khat Jerusalem ah Hezekiah sim tu in paisak hi; tua ngalkaphonpi sia ama ii uliante a za lianbel thum teng in uksak hi. Amate Jerusalem a thet uh ciangin, amate in tuili tungnung sia pan tui hong luanna hawkluam sia ii hui ah a om puantak naseamte ii omna lampi sia lua uh hi." 
2Kings18:18 Tuaciang amate in Hezekiah samsak uh hi, tuaciang ama ii uliante thum in amate taw kisi tu in pai uh hi: tuate sia kumpi inn a keam pa Hilkiah ii tapa Eliakim, zum lai atpa Shebna; le thu tepteena teng a uk Asaph ii tapa Joah ahi uh hi." 
2Kings18:19 Assyria uliante khat in, kumpipa Hezekiah sia a bang teng in hi zata in ngammuangsak thei ziam ci sia kumpilianpa in he nuam hi, ci in son hi." 
2Kings18:20 Ama in, “Ngalkap lam sang thiamna le hatna te sia kam le muk taw kizo thei hi ci in um nu ziam? Assyria te nong leedo uh sia akua in hong hu tu in um nu ziam?" 
2Kings18:21 Egypt te in no hong hu tu in um nu hi, ahihang tua ngaisutna sia pumpa kung ciangkhut in zak taw kibang tu hi — hong tal tu a, na khut uh hong sun tu hi. Egypt kumpipa sia ama a suang pawpo atu tuasia taw kibang hi,” ci hi." 
2Kings18:22 Assyria ulianpa in, “Tua ahibuale zong noma in na Topa Pathian uh suang nu ziam? Topa ii biakpiakna bukte le biaknataute a sutham sia Hezekiah hi, ama in Judah mite tungah Jerusalem biaknatau bekma ah biakpiakna vawt thei tu nu hi, ci in thupia hi." 
2Kings18:23 Kumpilianpa min taw thukimna khat no taw ka vawt tu hi. A tungah a to tu mihing tuaza in a tam na mu zo uh le siphu tulnii hong pia tu khi hi. 
2Kings18:24 No sia Assyria te sung pan a za nobel sia taw zong kitee ngat thei ngawl lai nu hi, hi napi Egypt te in siphu ngalleang le siphu ngalkapte puak tu in na muangmaw uh hi!" 
2Kings18:25 Topa ii hong huna kihel ngawlin na ngam uh sim tu in hong um nu ziam? Topa ama mama in simin susia in ci in kei hong sawl hi,” ci hi." 
2Kings18:26 Tuasia ciang Eliakim, Shebna le Joah in ulian pa munah, “Aramaic kam in hong pau ta'n, topa awng, tua kam tel khu hi. Hebrew kam in hong pau heak vun, luphung tungah a to mite theampo in hong ngai hi,” ci hi." 
2Kings18:27 Ama in zo kik a, “Kumpilianpa in hite theampo sia no le na kumpipa zaak tu bek in son a hong sawl sa nu ziam? Hi ngawl hi, noma bang keakin, a eak uh ne a, a zun uh a dawn tu, luphung tungah a to te ii zaak tu in ka pau ahi hi,” ci hi." 
2Kings18:28 Tua zawkciang ulian pa hong dingto in Hebrew kam in hong au hi, “Assyria kumpilianpa ii hong son teng ngai vun!" 
2Kings18:29 Ama in Hezekiah ii hong theam ngawl natu kidopna hong pia hi. Hezekiah in no hong hun zo ngawl tu hi. 
2Kings18:30 Tuaciang Topa a suang tu in ama in zolsak zo heak vun. Topa in no hong hun tu in um heak vun, tuaciang Assyrian ngalkapte ii na khuapi hong lak tu hong khak zo tu um nu ziam?" 
2Kings18:31 Hezekiah ii thu son ngai heak vun. Assyria te kumpilianpa in, khuapi panin hong pusuak tavun a hong tum tavun ci in thu hong pia hi. Noma sapitkungte panin sapitte hong kinesak tu a, na thingkung uhte panin thei ngate hong kinesak tu hi, tuaciang na tuikhuk uh pan tui hong kidawnsak tu hi —" 
2Kings18:32 tua teng sia kumpilianpa ii note teen kik natu ngam hong piak dong hi tu a, tua ngam sia noma ngam taw ma kibang tu hi, sapittui na neak natu uh sapithuan om a, anluum vawt natu antang om tu hi: tua ngam sia olive kung le olive thau, le khuaitui omna ngam hi. Ama ii hong thupiak bangin na ngamta uh le na thi buatu uh a, na nungta tu uh hi. Topa in note hong suatak tu hi ci in Hezekiah in theamsak heak vun." 
2Kings18:33 Ngamdangte ii pathiante in zongh a ngam uh sia Assyria kumpilianpa ii khut sung pan hunkhia ngei na ziam? 
2Kings18:34 Amate tu in koisungah om ziam? Hamath le Arpad ii pathiante, koisungah om ziam? Sepharvaim, Hena, le Ivvah te ii pathiante koisungah om ziam? Samaria akua in hun ngei ziam?" 
2Kings18:35 Ko ii kumpilianpa khut sung pan hi pathiante khat pawpo in hi ngamte hun ngei ka na ziam? Tua ahile Topa in Jerusalem hun thei tu hi ci in bang in hong ngaisunsak ziam?” ci hi. 
2Kings18:36 Mihingte sia kumpipa Hezekiah ii sawl bangma in dai khipkhep in om uh a; amate in kam khat zongh pau ngawl uh hi. 
2Kings18:37 Tuaciangin Eliakim Shebna le Joah te in heena taw a puansilh uh baltham uh a, tuaciangin Assyria ulian pa ii pauna teng kumpipa munah son uh hi." 
2Kings19:1 Kumpipa Hezekiah in amate ii a puak thu a zaak po ciang he mama in a puansilh eaukeak in, khau-ip puan silhin Topa Biakinnpi sungah tum hi." 
2Kings19:2 Ama in kumpi inn a keam pa Eliakim, zum lai at pa Shebna le thiampi uhaam pa sia Amoz ii tapa kamsaangpa Isaiah kungah paisak hi. Amate theampo zongh khau-ip puan silh uh hi." 
2Kings19:2 Ama in kumpi inn a keam pa Eliakim, zum lai at pa Shebna le thiampi uhaam pa sia Amoz ii tapa kamsaangpa Isaiah kungah paisak hi. Amate theampo zongh khau-ip puan silh uh hi." 
2Kings19:3 Amate ii Isaiah tungah kammal thaak tu a piak sia hi teng hi. “Tuni sia haksatna ih thuak ni hi; ei hong kidaantat a, hong kimaimawlsak hi. Ei sia numei khat nausuak tu kipan ahihang tha mama nei ngawl khat taw ih kibang hi." 
2Kings19:3 Amate ii Isaiah tungah kammal thaak tu a piak sia hi teng hi. “Tuni sia haksatna ih thuak ni hi; ei hong kidaantat a, hong kimaimawlsak hi. Ei sia numei khat nausuak tu kipan ahihang tha mama nei ngawl khat taw ih kibang hi." 
2Kings19:4 Assyria kumpilianpa in ama ii ulianbel pa a nungta Pathian a selno tu in hong paisak hi. Na Topa Pathian in hi a selnonate za hen a, tuabang a paute daan pia tahen. Tua ahikom Pathian tungah ih mihingte a nungta lai teng atu thu ngen in,” ci uh hi." 
2Kings19:5 Isaiah in kumpipa Hezekiah ii kamthaak teng a nga ciang," 
2Kings19:5 Isaiah in kumpipa Hezekiah ii kamthaak teng a nga ciang," 
2Kings19:6 ama in, “ Topa in nang hong hun thei bo a ci, Assyria te ii pauna te in pautausak heak in." 
2Kings19:7 Topa in kumpilianpa sia a ngam ah a ciakik natu kamleang khat zasak tu hi, ama tua munah kithat lumsak tu hi, ci in Topa in nang hong son hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
2Kings19:8 Assyria ulian pa in kumpilianpa sia Lachish khua nusia in a nai na Libnah khuapi ah ngaldo hi ci in za hi; tua ahikom ama in ama taw kamkum tu in pai hi. 
2Kings19:9 Egypt te ngalkap honte Ethiopia kumpipa Tirhakah in lampui in amate sim tu hi ci in Assyria te in thu za uh hi. Kumpilianpa in hi thu a zaak ciang ama in Judah te kumpipa Hezekiah tung ah," 
2Kings19:10 “Na muanna Pathian in nang sia kei khut sungah taak ngawl tu ni hi hong ci hi, ahihang tua in nang theamsak heak in." 
2Kings19:11 Assyria kumpilianpa khat in ama ii siatsak nop ngam khat pawpo sia bang law ziam na zaaksa hi. Nang suakta thei tu ki um ni ziam? 
2Kings19:12 Ka taanghpupite in khuapite ahi Gozan, Haran le Rezeph te susia a, Telasar a teang Bethedan mite zongh mon hi, amate ii pathiante in hun thei ngawl hi." 
2Kings19:13 Hamath, Arpad, Sepharvaim, Hena le Ivvah khuapi te ii a kumpipate koi sungah om ziam?” ci in lai khat thak hi." 
2Kings19:14 Tuaciang Hezekiah in kamtaipa tung pan a laithak sia la in sim hi. Tua zawkciang ama Biakinnpi sungah tumin Topa ii ompuina ah laithak sia koi hi," 
2Kings19:15 tuaciang, “Cherubim te ii tungsia na tokhum tungah a to, Topa Israel te ii Pathian awng, nang bekma Pathian na hi hi, leitung kumpi ngam theampo a uk pa na hi hi. Nangma in lei le van na bitphua hi." 
2Kings19:16 Tu in Topa awng, ko tungah thu hong piangte en in. Nang a nungta Pathian hong selnona Sennacherib ii pau teng ngai in." 
2Kings19:17 Topa awng, Assyria te kumpilianpa in ngam tam mama susia a, a leitangte ngamkhing in omsak hi," 
2Kings19:18 tuaciang pathian hi ngawl het a, mihing khut bek taw a kivawt thing le suang milim ahi, a pathian uhte haltham ahi hunlam kote theampo in he khu hi." 
2Kings19:19 Tu in, Topa ka Pathian awng, Assyria te kung panin hong hun ta'n, tuasia ciang leitung ngamte theampo in nang, Topa bek Pathian na hi hunlam hong he tu hi,” ci in thungen uh hi." 
2Kings19:20 Tua zawkciang Isaiah in Kumpipa Hezekiah tungah kumpipa ii thungetna a zo kikna teng sia 
2Kings19:20 Tua zawkciang Isaiah in Kumpipa Hezekiah tungah kumpipa ii thungetna a zo kikna teng sia 
2Kings19:21 Topa in, “Sennacherib awng, Jerusalem khuapi in nang hong nuisan hi, hong thusim ngawl hi." 
2Kings19:22 Nang in akua thusim ngawl a, akua selno in kingaisun ni ziam? Nang in kei, Israel ii a thiangtho Pathian nong zatak vawt bua hi." 
2Kings19:23 Na siphu ngalleangte taw Lebanon mualsaangbel te na zawthalna thu kisuangtaak tu in kei kungah na kamtai te nong paisak hi. Nangma in cedar thingkung saangbelte le cypress thing phabelte ka phuktan a, dui thuk belna mun ka theng hi ci in na kisuangtaak hi." 
2Kings19:24 Ngamdang ah tuikhuk to in tui ka dawn hi na ci a, na ngalkapte in Nile ngun tuanh in kosak hi ci in na kisuangtaak hi." 
2Kings19:25 “Hi teng sia khuangeipi lai in ka ngeal sa ahi hunlam za ngeingawl ni ziam? Tuciangin tuasia taaksua zo khi hi. Kulh taw a ki uum khuapite niinthuk kikholte suaksak tu in thahatna kong pia hi. 
2Kings19:26 Tua munah a teang mihingte sia thahatna nei ngawl hi; amate lau in khing liang uh hi. Amate sia lo sungah lopate ahibuale nisuana pan vuisa ii seam keak innkhum tungah a po lopate taw kibang hi. 
2Kings19:27 “Ahihang nang huvau theampo, bang vawt a koi sungah pai, ci in kong he hi. Kei hong langpanin na kitom ngawp kong he hi." 
2Kings19:28 Tua na kitomna thu le na kiphatsakna hong kikona te ka za hi, tu in na naak pailet in thikkoai kong thaak tu a, na kam sungah kamkhau kong khii tu hi, nong paina lampi sia ma tawnin kong leekai kik tu hi,” a ci teng sonsak hi." 
2Kings19:29 Tua zawkciang Isaiah in Kumpipa Hezekiah munah, “Hong piang tu thu ii lim sia hisia hi. Tu kum le mai ciangin ngamh ante bek na ne tu uh hi, ahizong a kum kik ciang na ciin sa uh ante na at tu a, na suan sa uh sapitngate na ne tu hi." 
2Kings19:29 Tua zawkciang Isaiah in Kumpipa Hezekiah munah, “Hong piang tu thu ii lim sia hisia hi. Tu kum le mai ciangin ngamh ante bek na ne tu uh hi, ahizong a kum kik ciang na ciin sa uh ante na at tu a, na suan sa uh sapitngate na ne tu hi." 
2Kings19:30 Judah ngam ah a luhai lai teng sia thingno bangin khang tu a, lei ah zung thuk tha in, a nga bangin nopci tu hi." 
2Kings19:31 Jerusalem ah mite om tu a, Zion Mual ah a luhai in om tu hi, banghang ziam cile Topa in hisia a pian natu khensat hi." 
2Kings19:32 “Assyria kumpilianpa huvau Topa ii ci sia hisia hi: ‘Ama in hi khuapi sungah tum ngawl tu a, thaltang khat zongh hi khuapi ngatin kap ngawl tu hi. Lum toai ngalkap khat zongh in hi khuapi hong neak ngawl tu a, tuaciang a uumci natu in a kiim ah leivum khat zongh kivawt ngawl tu hi." 
2Kings19:33 Ama hi khuapi sungah tum ngawlin hong paina lampi ma tawnin heak kik tu hi, Keima, Topa pau zo khi hi." 
2Kings19:34 Keima vaang atu le ka naseampa David tungah ka kamciamna hangin hi khuapi sia dal in hung tu khi hi’ ” ci hi. 
2Kings19:35 Tua zanin Topa vantunglalang khat Assyria te ngiaphual ah pai in ngalkap 185,000 thatlum hi. A zingsang khuavak ciang amate a thisa in tua munah liik siat hi!" 
2Kings19:36 Tua zawkciang Assyria kumpilianpa Sennacherib nungkin in Nineveh khua ah heak kik hi. 
2Kings19:37 Ni khat ni in ama in a pathian Nisroch ii biakinn sungah ama bia in a om laitak a tapate nii, Adrammelech le Sharezer te in a namsau uh taw thatlum hi, tuaciang amate Ararat ngam ah tai in suakta uh hi. A tapa dangkhat Esarhaddon in a za laih a kumpilianpa suak hi." 
2Kings20:1 Hi hun sung khawngin Kumpipa Hezekiah sia a ciina in thi dektak hi. Amoz ii tapa, kamsaangpa Isaiah in ama taw kimu tu in pai a, ama munah, “ Topa in nang tungah na theampo a kilawm bangin hong koi tahen, banghang ziam cile dam kik ngawl tu ni hi. A thi tu kinging hen hong ci hi,” ci in son hi." 
2Kings20:1 Hi hun sung khawngin Kumpipa Hezekiah sia a ciina in thi dektak hi. Amoz ii tapa, kamsaangpa Isaiah in ama taw kimu tu in pai a, ama munah, “ Topa in nang tungah na theampo a kilawm bangin hong koi tahen, banghang ziam cile dam kik ngawl tu ni hi. A thi tu kinging hen hong ci hi,” ci in son hi." 
2Kings20:2 Hezekiah in a maitang pang sang nga in," 
2Kings20:3 “ Topa awng, nang tungah thumaanna le citakna taw in nong oai theampo hanciam in ka sep tawntung sia hong phawk ta'n,” ci in thungen hi. Tuaciang ama nasia takin kap hi." 
2Kings20:4 Isaiah in kumpipa paisan ahihang kumpi inn leitual laita sia a kaantan ma in 
2Kings20:4 Isaiah in kumpipa paisan ahihang kumpi inn leitual laita sia a kaantan ma in 
2Kings20:5 Topa in mite a ukpa Hezekiah kungah Isaiah pai kik in sawl a, ama munah, “Kei, Topa, na taanghpupi David ii Pathian in na thungetna kong za zo a, na thitui luan ka mu zo hi. Nang hong damsak tu khi hi, tuaciang tu zo ni thum ciangin Biakinnpi ah pai tu ni hi." 
2Kings20:5 Topa in mite a ukpa Hezekiah kungah Isaiah pai kik in sawl a, ama munah, “Kei, Topa, na taanghpupi David ii Pathian in na thungetna kong za zo a, na thitui luan ka mu zo hi. Nang hong damsak tu khi hi, tuaciang tu zo ni thum ciangin Biakinnpi ah pai tu ni hi." 
2Kings20:6 Kum sawm le kum nga hong nungtasak lai tu khi hi. Assyria kumpilianpa khut sung pan nang le hi Jerusalem khuapi sia hong suatak tu khi hi. Keima vaang tu le ka naseampa David tungah kamciam ka piak hu in hi khuapi hung tu khi hi,” ci in sonsak hi." 
2Kings20:7 Tua zawkciang Isaiah in kumpipa a ou te munah theinga panin a kivawt noi thei khat a uilut noai le uhte ama dam tu hi, ci in sawl hi." 
2Kings20:7 Tua zawkciang Isaiah in kumpipa a ou te munah theinga panin a kivawt noi thei khat a uilut noai le uhte ama dam tu hi, ci in sawl hi." 
2Kings20:8 Kumpipa Hezekiah in, “ Topa in hong damsak tu a, ni thum ciangin Biakinnpi ah ka pai thei tu sia bang lim taw tel tu khi ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
2Kings20:9 Isaiah in, “ Topa in a kamciam bang len tu hi ci in hong lakna in lim khat hong pia tu hi. Tu in keallei tungah a limh sia a mai sangah kal sawm paisak tu deizaw ni ziam ahibuale a nungsangah kal sawm nungkinsak nuam zaw ni ziam?” ci kik hi." 
2Kings20:9 Isaiah in, “ Topa in a kamciam bang len tu hi ci in hong lakna in lim khat hong pia tu hi. Tu in keallei tungah a limh sia a mai sangah kal sawm paisak tu deizaw ni ziam ahibuale a nungsangah kal sawm nungkinsak nuam zaw ni ziam?” ci kik hi." 
2Kings20:10 Hezekiah in, “A limh liap sia a mai ah kal sawm paisak tu ol hi! Kal sawm nungkinsak in,” ci in zo hi." 
2Kings20:11 Isaiah in Topa tungah thungen a, Kumpipa Ahaz ii vawt keallei tungah a limh sia kal sawm Topa in nungkinsak hi." 
2Kings20:11 Isaiah in Topa tungah thungen a, Kumpipa Ahaz ii vawt keallei tungah a limh sia kal sawm Topa in nungkinsak hi." 
2Kings20:12 Tua hun khawngma in Babylon kumpi ahi Baladan ii tapa Merodach Baladan in Hezekiah kumpipa ciinat za ahikom ama in lai thaak khat le letsong khat thaak hi. 
2Kings20:13 Hezekiah in tua kamtaite pha takin vaidawn a, tuaciang a hauna teng amate lak hi — ama ii ngunn le khamhte, hel namtuite le paaknamtuite tuaciang a ngal vanh teng lak hi. Ama ii vanh kholna inndoi sung ahizong ama ii kumpi ngam sungah ahizong a lak ngawl vanh khat beak zongh a om bua hi." 
2Kings20:14 Tua zawkciang kamsaangpa Isaiah sia Hezekiah kumpipa kungah pai in, “Mihing hite koisung pan hong pai a, amate in nang tungah bang hong ci ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Hezekiah in, “Amate ngam khuala mama na Babylon panin hong pai hi,” ci in zo hi." 
2Kings20:14 Tua zawkciang kamsaangpa Isaiah sia Hezekiah kumpipa kungah pai in, “Mihing hite koisung pan hong pai a, amate in nang tungah bang hong ci ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Hezekiah in, “Amate ngam khuala mama na Babylon panin hong pai hi,” ci in zo hi." 
2Kings20:15 “Kumpi inn sungah amate in bang teng mu ziam?” ci in dongh hi. “Amate in na theampo mu siat hi. Vanh kholna inndoite sungah ka lak ngawl bangma om ngawl hi,” ci hi." 
2Kings20:16 Tuasia ciang, Isaiah in kumpipa tungah, “ Topa Vaanglianbelpa in," 
2Kings20:16 Tuasia ciang, Isaiah in kumpipa tungah, “ Topa Vaanglianbelpa in," 
2Kings20:17 na kumpi inn sungah vanh om theampo, na taanghpupite ii tuni dong a kholsa theampo Babylon ah a kipuak tu hun khat hong theng tu hi. Bangma kikhe ngawl tu hi." 
2Kings20:18 Nangma ii suan le paal tatak te pawlkhat kipaipui tu a, a cil uh kinget in Babylon kumpi inn sungah numei uk kiseamsak tu hi ci hi,” ci in son hi." 
2Kings20:19 Kumpipa Hezekiah in hi teng sia ama ii nuntak sungah ngal kilemna le ngam muanna om tu hi cinopna in saang ahiciangin, “ Topa tung pan nong thu piak teng sia thupha hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
2Kings20:20 Hezekiah kumpipa ii a sep a vawt dang teng, a ngal hanna, tuikholna khat a vawtna le khuapi sungah tui a luan natu lei a tawletna thute theampo sia Judah Kumpipate Taanghthu sungah kikhum siat hi." 
2Kings20:21 Hezekiah thi a, a tapa Manasseh in a kumpi za laih hi." 
2Kings21:1 Manasseh sia Judah kumpipa a sua hunin ama kum sawm le kum nii pha hi, tuaciang ama in Jerusalem panin kum 55 sung uk hi. A nu sia Hephzibah hi." 
2Kings21:2 Topa ii mite mai sang hong nawk ciang a kinotkeak minamte ii a thasiathuai ngamtatna te zui in Manasseh in Topa tungah maw hi. 
2Kings21:3 A pa Hezekiah ii a suksiatcip sa doai biate ii biakpiakna munte ama in sa kik hi; Israel kumpipa Ahab ii vawt bang keak ma in ama in Baal biak natu biaknataute sa in, Asherah numeipathian ii milim vawt hi. Manasseh in aksite zongh bia hi." 
2Kings21:4 Ama in Topa ii ama a kibiak natu mun hi a ci Biakinnpi sungah doai sepna taute sa hi. 
2Kings21:5 Biakinnpi ii leitualte nii sungah aksite a biak natu biaknatau te vawt hi. 
2Kings21:6 A tapa sia meihal biakpiakna in pia hi. Ama in aisaan le mitbumna zangh in, tuaciang aisaan theite le thaa sam theite kungah thu veu dongh hi. Ama in Topa tungah nasia takin maw a, a thin uukna piangsak hi." 
2Kings21:7 Ama in numeipathian Asherah ii lim sia Biakinnpi sungah koi hi, tua mun sia Topa ii David le a tapa Solomon tungah: “Hi Jerusalem khua ah hi Biakinnpi sung sia kei hong kibiak natu in minam sawm le niite ii ngamsung bup pan ka teal ahi hi." 
2Kings21:8 Tuaciang Israel mite theampo in ka thupiakna te theampo ni in, ka naseampa Moses ii amate a piak thukham buppi te a keamcing le amate ii taanghpupite tungah ka piak ngam le lei panin a kinawkeak tu ka oai buatu hi,” a cina mun ahi hi." 
2Kings21:9 Ahihang Judah mite in Topa thu ni ngawl a, Manasseh in a mite mai sang a nawk hun lai a, Topa ii a nawkeak mite sangin mawna nasia zaw a vawt natu ngawngawn in lampui hi." 
2Kings21:10 A naseam kamsaangte tungtawnin Topa in," 
2Kings21:11 “Kumpipa Manasseh in hi a thasiathuai mama nate Canaan mite vawt bang sangin a nasia zaw lai in vawt hi; tuaciang ama ii milimte taw Judah mite mawna sungah lampui hi. 
2Kings21:12 Tua ahikom kei, Israel te Topa, Pathian in Jerusalem le Judah tungah tuasiatna ka piangsak tu a, a za theampo khing liang tu hi." 
2Kings21:13 Samaria daan ka piak bang le Israel kumpipa Ahab le a suan a paalte ka vawt bangin Jerusalem daan ka pia tu hi. Jerusalem sia a mite bo dongin ka nawt siat tu a, a kinawt thiang a khup lam a kikoi pakan khat bangin ka vawt tu hi." 
2Kings21:14 A nungta lai teng ka nusia tu a, a ngalte khut sungah ka aap tu hi, tuate in amate zothal tu a, a leitang nopzak tu hi." 
2Kings21:15 Hi bangin ka vawt tu sia banghang ziam cile ka mite in kei tungah hong maw a, Egypt ngam pan a taanghpupite ii a pusua pan kipan tuni dong ma ka thin hong uuksak tawntung hi,” ci hi." 
2Kings21:16 Manasseh in mawna nei ngawl mihing tam mama thatlum a, Jerusalem lampite chisan luang hi; hi teng banah ama in a mite milim biakna ah lampui a, Topa tungah mawsak hi." 
2Kings21:17 Manasseh ii sep le vawt a dangte theampo mawna a vawtte theampo kihel in, Judah Kumpipate Taanghthu sungah kikhum hi." 
2Kings21:18 Manasseh thi a, kumpi inn huang sung Uzza huan ah kiphum hi, tuaciang a tapa Amon in a kumpi za laih hi." 
2Kings21:19 Amon sia Judah te kumpipa a sua hunin kum 22 pha a, Jerusalem panin kum nii sung uk hi. A nu sia Meshullemeth hi a, Jotbah khua pan Haruz ii tanu ahi hi." 
2Kings21:20 A pa Manasseh bangma in ama in Topa tungah maw hi; 
2Kings21:21 ama in a pa ii ngamtatna teng zui in a pa ii biak milimte bia hi. 
2Kings21:22 Ama in a taanghpupite ii Pathian, Topa nial a, Topa ii thupiak ni ngawl hi." 
2Kings21:23 Amon ii uliante in ama thasawm in, kumpi inn sungah ama thatlum uh hi." 
2Kings21:24 Judah mite in Amon a that teng thatlumin, a tapa Josiah kumpi suaksak hi." 
2Kings21:25 Amon ii a sep a vawt dangte theampo Judah Kumpipate Taanghthu sungah kikhum hi. 
2Kings21:26 Amon sia Uzza huan sung thaan ah kiphum a, a tapa Josiah in a kumpi za laih hi." 
2Kings22:1 Josiah sia Judah kumpipa a sua hunin kum liat pha hi, tuaciang ama in Jerusalem pan kum 31 sung uk hi. A nu sia Bozkath khua pan Adaiah ii tanu Jedidah hi." 
2Kings22:2 Josiah in Topa ii diksak te vawt hi; ama in a taanghpupi David ii lamlak bangin ngamta a, Pathian thukhamte theampo belcing takin zui hi." 
2Kings22:3 Kumpipa Josiah in a maan zawk kum sawm le kum liat laitakin, Meshullam ii tupa, Azaliah ii tapa zum thuzeakpi Shaphan sia Biakinnpi ah samsak a:" 
2Kings22:4 “Thiampi Lianbelpa Hilkiah kungah pai in a, Biakinnpi tumna a vaipuak nei thiampite ii mipite tung pan a khon sumte bangza pha ziam sazian hong la ta'n." 
2Kings22:5 A sum sia Biakinnpi puate a ukte tungah a piak tu in son in. Amate in 
2Kings22:6 lettamate, inn sate, uksuang ciangte thaman pia in, thing le suang biakinn pua natu a kizangh teng leina in nei tahen." 
2Kings22:7 Nasepnate a ukte sia thumaan mama ahikom a sum zakna uh sazian vawtsak kul ngawl hi,” ci in thupia hi." 
2Kings22:8 Shaphan in kumpipa thupiakna teng Hilkiah tungah son a, tuaciang Hilkiah in Biakinnpi sungah Thukham laibu ka mu hi ci in son hi. Hilkiah in tua laibu sia pia a Shaphan in sim hi." 
2Kings22:9 Tua zawkciang ama kumpipa kungah pai kik a: “Na naseamte in Biakinnpi sung a om sum teng la in, innpuuate a ukte tungah aap siat zo hi,” ci hi." 
2Kings22:10 Tua zawkciang ama in, “Hi sungah Hilkiah ii hong piak laibu khat nei khi hi,” ci hi. Tuaciang ama in kumpipa tungah a nging in sim hi." 
2Kings22:11 Kumpipa in laibu a kisim sia thu a zaak ciang, thinnop ngawlna taw a puan eaukeak a," 
2Kings22:12 tuaciang Hilkiah thiampipa, Shaphan tapa Ahikam, Micaiah tapa Achbor, zum thuzeakpi Shaphan te tung le kumpipa koppui pa Asaiah te tungah:" 
2Kings22:13 “Pai tavun a, hi laibu ii hong hilna thute Topa tungah keima le Judah mi teng a tu in hong dongh tavun. Topa sia ei tungah thin uuk hi, banghang ziam cile ih taanghpupite in hi laibu ii vawt hamtang tu a ci bangin seam ngawl uh hi,” ci in thupia hi." 
2Kings22:14 Jerusalem khua ii a khenthak sungah a teang Huldah a kici numei kamsaang khat munah thu dongh tu in, Hilkiah, Ahikam, Achbor, Shaphan le Asaiah te pai uh hi. (A pasal Shallum sia, Tikvah ii tapa, Harhas ii tupa hi a, ama in biakinn sungah a zak puantualte a keampa ahi hi.) Amate in thupiang teng ama munah son uh hi," 
2Kings22:15 tuaciang ama in amate sia kumpipa kungah cia kikin sawl a," 
2Kings22:16 Topa ii thupiak hi teng kumpipa puakin sawl hi: “Keima in Jerusalem le a mite theampo kumpipa ii sim laibu sia sungah a ki at bangin daan ka pia tu hi. 
2Kings22:17 Amate in kei hong nial a, tuaciang pathian dangte tungah sangaw biakpiakna pia zo hi, tua ahikom amate ii sep le vawt theampo in ka thin uukna piangsak hi. Ka thin uukna sia Jerusalem tungah tu hi, tuaciang tua ka thin uukna sia veng ngawl tu hi." 
2Kings22:18 Kumpipa ama a tu in hi bangin kei, Topa Israel ii Pathian in ci khi hi: nangma in laibu sung a ki at teng nadon zo ni hi," 
2Kings22:19 tuaciang Jerusalem le a mite daan piak tu ka tawn na te na zaak ciang kisiik kikin kiniamkhiakna taw ka mai ah na puansilh eaukeak in kap ni hi. Mit mu bek zongin a lauhuai mama na mun ka suaksak tu a, mihingte in tua mun ii min sia haamsiatna kammal in a zangh tu hi. Ahihang na thungetna hong za zo khi hi," 
2Kings22:20 tuaciang Jerusalem khua daan ka piak tu sia zongh na thi zawk mateng in tung ngawl tu hi, thinnuam in kong thisak tu hi.” Tua pasalte in hi a thupuak teng taw kumpipa Josiah kungah heak kik uh hi." 
2Kings23:1 Kumpipa Josiah in Judah ngam le Jerusalem khua ii lampuite theampo khawmtua hi," 
2Kings23:2 tuaciang amate sia Biakinnpi ah thiampite le kamsaangte, tuaciang a taanglai mite theampo taw a hau a zawng kibangin paikhawm uh hi. Kumpipa in amate mai ah Biakinnpi sungah a kimu tua thuciamna laibu buppi a ngingin sim hi." 
2Kings23:3 Ama in kumpi khuam sia kungah dingin ama ii thu a ni tu, a thupiakte le a thukhamte thin theampo ngaisutna theampo taw a keamcing tu le thuciamna taw hong tangkal ngetnate zongh laibu sungah a ki at bangin a seam a vawt tu in Topa taw thuciamna khat vawt uh hi. Tuaciang mite theampo in thuciamna keamcing tu in kamciam pia uh hi." 
2Kings23:4 Tua zawkciang Josiah in Thiampi Lianbel Hilkiah, a khutdawn thiampite, Biakinnpi tumna kongkhacingte munah, Biakinnpi sungah Baal biakna, numeipathian Asherah biakna le aksite biakna vanh theampo pusua siat tu in thupia hi. Kumpipa in hi vanh teng khuapi puasang Kidron kuam hui ah haltum in, a vaam teng sia Bethel ah paipuisak hi." 
2Kings23:5 Ama in Judah khuapite le Jerusalem nai ah a om sangaw biakpiakna le doai sepna taute tungah a seam Judah kumpi masa te ii kipsak thiampite — Baal tung a sangaw biakpiakna a pia, ni, tha, solh le aksi te biakna ah a seam thiampi theampo heamkhia hi." 
2Kings23:6 Ama in Biakinnpi sung pan Asherah numeipathian ii lim sia la keakin khuapi pua sang Kidron kuam ah a haltum zawkciang a vaamte a zaancip dong sucip in nautaangte kiphumna munah poai hi. 
2Kings23:7 Ama in pumpi zuakte teenna Biakinnpi sung inndoite baltham hi. (Numeite in tua munah Asherah biak natu a kizangh puantualte tak uh hi.) 
2Kings23:8 Ama in Judah khuapite a om thiampite Jerusalem ah paipui hi, tuaciang ngam bup sungah sangaw biakpiakna vawtna biaknataute phiat hi. Khuapi kongpi sung tum ciang veisang ah a om khuapi uk Joshua ii vawt keal-doai biakna biaknataute zongh baltham hi." 
2Kings23:8 Ama in Judah khuapite a om thiampite Jerusalem ah paipui hi, tuaciang ngam bup sungah sangaw biakpiakna vawtna biaknataute phiat hi. Khuapi kongpi sung tum ciang veisang ah a om khuapi uk Joshua ii vawt keal-doai biakna biaknataute zongh baltham hi." 
2Kings23:9 Tua thiampite sia Biakinnpi sungah a sep tu ki oai ngawl hi, ahihang amate in a thiampi seppuite a kipia tol saw ngawl anluumte ne thei uh hi." 
2Kings23:10 Kuama in a tapa ahibuale a tanu, Molech pathian tungah meihal biakpiakna in a nei thei ngawl natu in, Josiah kumpipa in Hinnom Kuam a om Topheth a kici doaibiakna mun sia zongh lalthamsak hi." 
2Kings23:11 Ama in Judah kumpite ii ni biakna in a zak siphute heam a, hi biakpiakna sungah a kizangh leangte haltum hi. (Hite sia ulian mama khat ahi Nathan Melech ii teenna innte ii nai, biakinn leitual sung, kongpi hui ah kikoi hi.)" 
2Kings23:12 Kumpipa Josiah in Ahaz kumpipa teenna inndoite ii tung kumpi innkhum tungah Judah kumpipate ii saksa biaknataute le Manasseh kumpipa ii Biakinnpi leitualte nii sungah a koi biaknataute vaattham hi; ama in biaknataute saatneen in a bek a bek in Kidron kuam ah vawk hi. 
2Kings23:13 Josiah in Kumpipa Solomon ii saksa Jerusalem nisuana sang Olive Mual thang sangah a om a thasiathuai milim biaknataute — Sidon numeipathian Astarte, Moab pathian Chemosh, Ammon pathian Molech milim biaknate lalsak hi." 
2Kings23:14 Kumpipa Josiah in suangkhuamte vaattan in, Asherah numeipathian tepteena limte zongh sattan a, tuaciang tuate ii dinna mun sia mithi ngute taw siin hi." 
2Kings23:15 Josiah in Israel te mawna sungah a lampui Nebat ii tapa Kumpipa Jeroboam ii saksa Bethel a om biakpiakna mun sia zongh baltham hi. Josiah in biaknatau kaivawk a, a suangte a bekin sutham in leivui suak tu in seakcip hi; ama in Asherah ii lim zongh haltum hi." 
2Kings23:16 Tua zawkciang Josiah in a kiimkot a et le mual tungah thaankuul pawlkhat mu hi; ama in mithi ngute la in biaknatau tungah halsak hi. Kumpipa Jeroboam sia poaikhaam sungin biaknatau hui ah a din laitak kamsaang khat ii nidang pek lai in a sonkhol sa bangin ama in vawt a, hi bangin biaknataute lalsak hi. Kumpipa Josiah in a kiimkot a et le tua bang a sonkhol kamsaangpa ii thaankuul mu hi." 
2Kings23:17 Ama in “Zia sia akua thaan ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Bethel mite in, “Tuasia Judah panin hong pai kamsaang khat ii thaan hi a, hi biaknatau tungah na vawt tu teng a sonkhol sia hi,” ci uh hi." 
2Kings23:18 Josiah in, “A om bangin omsak po vun,” ci in thupia hi. “Ama ii ngute sia khiin tu hi ngawl hi,” ci hi. Tua ahikom a ngute sia kikhiin ngawl a, Samaria pan hong pai kamsaangte ii ngu zongh kikhiin ngawl hi." 
2Kings23:19 Kumpipa Josiah in Israel khuapi theampo ah Topa thin uukna piangsak Israel kumpite ii vawt doai biakna munte susia siat hi. Tua biaknataute Bethel a te a vawt bangin vawt hi. 
2Kings23:20 Ama in doai bia thiampi theampo sia amate ii doai sepna biaknatau tungah thatlum a, tuaciang ama in biaknatau sim tungah mithi ngute hal hi. Tua zawkciang ama Jerusalem ah heak kik hi." 
2Kings23:21 Kumpipa Josiah in mipite munah thuciam laibu sungah a ki at bangin Topa amate ii Pathian zatakna Paisan Poai vawtin sawl hi. 
2Kings23:22 Hi bang Paisan Poai khat Israel kumpipate ahibuale Judah kumpipate peuma in Thukhenmangte ii ngam a uk zawk nungsang in vawt ngeingawl hi. 
2Kings23:23 Tu in a khakbel ciang Josiah ii kumpi maan zawk a kum sawm le liat na hun ciang Jerusalem khua sungah Paisan Poai kivawt hi. 
2Kings23:24 Thiampi Lianbel Hilkiah ii Biakinnpi sung pan a mu Thukham laibu sungah a ki at te bang ngamtatsak natu in Kumpipa Josiah in Jerusalem pan le Judah ngam lei dang panin, thaa sam thei te theampo, aisaan theite, bangkua pathiante, milimte, a dang doai sepna in a zak nate a vekpi in heam siat hi." 
2Kings23:25 Ama ii Topa atu a thin theampo, a ngaisutna theampo le a thatang theampo taw seam a, Moses ii thukham theampo a zui bangin ama ii masia ah kumpi khat zongh om ngeingawl hi; ama zawkciang zong tuabang kumpi khat zongh om ngawl hi." 
2Kings23:26 Ahihang Topa ii a nasia mama a thin uukna sia Kumpipa Manasseh ii ngamtatna hangin Judah te tungah hong tung a, tu dong ma in thai ngawl hi." 
2Kings23:27 Topa in, “Israel tungah ka vawt sa bangma Judah tungah vawt tu khi hi: Judah mite sia ka muna pan hawlkhia tu khi hi, tuaciang ka tealsa Jerusalem khuapi le keima hong kibiakna mun tu hi ka ci Biakinnpi te zongh, ka nil tu hi,” ci hi." 
2Kings23:28 Kumpipa Josiah ii a sep a vawt dangte theampo sia Judah Kumpipate Taanghthu sungah kikhum hi. 
2Kings23:29 Josiah sia kumpi ahi laitakin, Egypt kumpipa Neco in Assyria kumpilianpa a hu tu in ngalkaphonpi taw Euphrates ngun ah kuan hi. Kumpipa Josiah in Megiddo ah Egypt ngalkaphonpi khak tu in hanciam a, ama ngal kisimna ah kithat hi." 
2Kings23:30 Ama ii uliante in a luang sia siphu leang tungah suan a Jerusalem ah ciapui in, kumpite thaan ah kiphum hi. Judah mite in Josiah ii tapa Joahaz tealin kumpi suaksak hi." 
2Kings23:31 Joahaz sia Judah kumpi a sua hunin kum 23 pha hi, tuaciang ama in Jerusalem pan tha thum sung uk hi. A nu sia Hamutal hi a, Libnah khuapi pan Jeremiah ii tanu ahi hi." 
2Kings23:31 Joahaz sia Judah kumpi a sua hunin kum 23 pha hi, tuaciang ama in Jerusalem pan tha thum sung uk hi. A nu sia Hamutal hi a, Libnah khuapi pan Jeremiah ii tanu ahi hi." 
2Kings23:32 A taanghpupite ii ngamtat zui in ama in Topa tungah maw hi. 
2Kings23:33 Ama ii kumpi maan hun sia Egypt kumpipa Neco in Hamath ngam Riblah ah thong a taaksak ciang bo a, Judah in ngunn kilogramme 3,400 le khamh kilogramme 34 shia in piasak hi." 
2Kings23:34 Kumpipa Neco in Josiah ii tapa Eliakim sia Josiah laih tu Judah kumpipa in koi a, a min Jehoiakim ci in khealsak hi. Joahaz sia Kumpipa Neco in Egypt ah ciapui a, tuasung ah thi hi." 
2Kings23:35 Kumpipa Jehoiakim in a mipite tung pan amate hauna taw kizui in shia sia, Egypt kumpipa ii nget za a cingin a piak zawk natu in a kisamh bangin khon hi." 
2Kings23:36 Jehoiakim sia Judah kumpipa a sua hunin ama kum 25 pha hi, tuaciang ama in Jerusalem panin kum sawm le kum khat sung uk hi. A nu sia Zebidah hi a, Rumah khua panin Pedaiah ii tanu hi." 
2Kings23:37 A taanghpupite ii ngamtat zui in ama in Topa tungah maw hi. 
2Kings24:1 Jehoiakim sia kumpipa ahi laitakin Babylon kumpipa Nebuchadnezzar in Judah sim hi, tuaciang kum thum sung Jehoiakim sia ama ii ukna nuai ah lutsak hi; tua zawkciang ama in leedo hi." 
2Kings24:2 Topa in Babylon te, Syria te, Moab te le Ammon te ii ngalkapte ngalsim tu in Judah ah paisak a, Jehoiakim langpanin Topa in a naseam a kamsaangte tungtawnin ka vawt tu hi a ci bangin Judah lalsak tu in kuan uh hi." 
2Kings24:3 Hisia Topa ii thupiakna taw a piang hi a, Kumpipa Manasseh ii mawna teng hu in Judah mite sia ama muna pan a betkeak thei natu a piang ahi hi," 
2Kings24:4 tuaciang, a tuan in mawnei ngawlte theampo zongh a thalup hu ahi hi. Topa in Manasseh ii tuabang ahikom in maisak zo ngawl hi." 
2Kings24:5 Jehoiakim ii sep le vawt theampo sia Judah Kumpipate Taanghthu sungah kikhum hi. 
2Kings24:6 Jehoiakim thi a, a tapa Jehoiachin in a kumpi za laih hi." 
2Kings24:7 Egypt kumpipa le a ngalkaphonpi in Egypt pua sia ah kuan kik nawn ngawl uh hi, banghang ziam cile Babylon kumpipa in tu in Egypt te ii ngam theampo, Euphrates ngun pan Egypt saksang ngamngi dong uk hi." 
2Kings24:8 Jehoiachin sia Judah kumpipa a sua hunin kum sawm le kum liat pha a, ama in Jerusalem pan tha thum sung uk hi. A nu sia Nehushta hi a, Jerusalem khua pan Elnathan ii tanu hi." 
2Kings24:9 A pa ii ngamtat teng zui in Jehoiachin in Topa tungah maw hi. 
2Kings24:10 Ama ii kumpi maan hun sungah Nebuchadnezzar uliante ii a uk Babylon ngalkaphonpi sia Jerusalem sim tu in kuan pui in, tua khuapi uumci uh hi." 
2Kings24:11 Tuabang a uumci sungin Nebuchadnezzar ama mama Jerusalem ah pai hi," 
2Kings24:12 tuaciang Kumpipa Jehoiachin sia a nu, a tapate, a uliante, le kumpi inn uliante taw Babylon te tungah tum uh hi. Nebuchadnezzar in a kumpi maan a kum liatna hun sungin Jehoiachin sia thong taak tu in" 
2Kings24:13 Babylon ah paipui a, Biakinnpi sung le kumpi inn sungah sum le vanh manpha theampo pua siat hi. Topa ii sonkhol bangma in Nebuchadnezzar in Biakinnpi sungah zak tu Solomon kumpipa ii vawt khamh ankuang ankeaute sutham siat hi." 
2Kings24:14 Nebuchadnezzar in Jerusalem mite, kumpipa tapate le lampuite theampo thongtaak tu in ciapui hi, a vekpi kingawm 10,000 pha hi. Ama in khutthiamna nei theampo, thikseakte zongh ciapui hi, Judah ah mizawngbel teng bek nusia hi." 
2Kings24:15 Nebuchadnezzar in Jehoiachin sia Babylon ah thongtaak tu in ciapui a, Jehoiachin ii nu, a zite, a uliante le Judah mi lampuite theampo taw zong ciapui hi." 
2Kings24:16 Nebuchadnezzar in mihing thupi theampo Babylon ah puak hi, a vekpi in 7,000 pha uh hi, tuaciang a ciapui thikseakte kihel, nasep thiamte 1,000 sia ngalkap seam thei tu cinghtengh vive ahi uh hi." 
2Kings24:17 Nebuchadnezzar in Jehoiachin ii pano, Mattaniah sia Judah kumpipa suaksak a, a min Zedekiah ci in khealsak hi." 
2Kings24:18 Judah kumpipa ii kumpipa a sua hunin Zedekiah sia kum 21 pha hi, tuaciang ama in Jerusalem pan kum sawm le kum khat sung uk hi. A nu sia Hamutal hi a, Libnah khua mi Jeremiah ii tanu ahi hi." 
2Kings24:18 Judah kumpipa ii kumpipa a sua hunin Zedekiah sia kum 21 pha hi, tuaciang ama in Jerusalem pan kum sawm le kum khat sung uk hi. A nu sia Hamutal hi a, Libnah khua mi Jeremiah ii tanu ahi hi." 
2Kings24:19 Kumpipa Zedekiah in Topa tungah Kumpipa Jehoiakim maw bang tatakin maw hi. 
2Kings24:20 Topa sia Jerusalem le Judah mite tungah thin uuk mama ahikom ama muna pan bengkeak hi. 
2Kings25:1 Zedekiah in Babylon kumpipa Nebuchadnezzar leedo ahikom Nebuchadnezzar in a ngalkap hon theampo taw Jerusalem sia Zedekiah ii kumpi maan a kum kua kum, a tha sawm, ni sawm ni in sim hi. Amate in khuapi pua sangah ngiaphual saat a, a uumci natu in pangte vawtin," 
2Kings25:2 Zedekiah ii a ngam ukna, kum sawm le kum khat a cin dong uumci hi." 
2Kings25:3 Tua kum a tha lina, a ni sawm ni in, kialpi nasia mama a, mite neak tu bangma om nawn ngawl ahikom" 
2Kings25:4 a mite in a khuapi luphung sulet hi. Babylon te in khuapi kiim uum ahihang ngalkap theampo sia zanin suakta uh hi. Amate in kumpi huan pan luphungte nii kipeena kongpi lam tawn in Jordan Kuam sangah tai uh hi. 
2Kings25:5 Ahihang Babylon ngalkaphonpi in Zedekiah kumpipa zuizen a, Jericho khuahui zaangtamna munah man hi, ama sia a ngalkapte theampo in taisan hi." 
2Kings25:6 Zedekiah sia Riblah ah a om Kumpipa Nebuchadnezzar kungah kipaipui a, tua mun ah Nebuchadnezzar in Zedekiah tungah thukhen hi." 
2Kings25:7 Zedekiah ii mu tangin a tapate kithatlum hi; tua zawkciang Nebuchadnezzar in Zedekiah ii mittangte khelkeaksak a, thikkol bulin Babylon ah paipui hi." 
2Kings25:8 Babylon kumpipa Nebuchadnezzar ii kumpi maan kum sawm le kum kua kum, a tha nga na, a ni sali ni in kumpipa thudokpa le a ngalkaphonpi ukpa Nebuzaradan sia Jerusalem ah tum hi." 
2Kings25:9 Ama in Biakinnpi, kumpi inn le Jerusalem ah mihing thupi theampo ii innte haltham hi," 
2Kings25:10 tuaciang ama ii ngalkapte in khuapi luphungte pheltham hi. 
2Kings25:11 Tua zawkciang Nebuzaradan in khuapi sungah a kinusia mite, a om lai sun nasep thiamte le Babylon te panpui tu in a tai teng Babylon ah paipui hi." 
2Kings25:12 Ahihang ama in mizawngbel, neisa bangma a nei ngawl pawlkhat teng sia Judah ah nusia in sapithuan sung le lo sungah na seamsak hi." 
2Kings25:13 Babylon te in Biakinnpi sungah a om taau khuamte le leangte, tuaciang taau tuikuang lian sia semtham in taau om theampo Babylon ah paipui hi." 
2Kings25:14 Amate in kawkeaute, biaknatau thiansakna a zak vut kuangte, meiinn detna vanh zakte, sangaw biakpiakna a sachi donna kuangte, ngimnamtui halna kuangte le a dang taau taw a kivawt biakinn sung na zakte zongh la hi." 
2Kings25:15 Amate in khamh le ngunn taw a kivawt peuma, meikam toaina kuangtung kuangdal te dongin la uh hi." 
2Kings25:16 Kumpipa Solomon ii Biakinnpi atu a vawt taau vanhte, — khuam niite, leangte, tuikuangpui — hite sia ngit leih ahikom khai kitee ngawl hi." 
2Kings25:17 Khuampi nii a kiphutte sia kikim in metre 8 veu saang hi, a dawn a tungkhuna sia taau ma hi a, metre 1.3 saang hi. Tua khuamlu kiimkot simin taau taw a kivawt a tungkhu om a, tuate taau taw kivawt talee nga taw kizeam hi." 
2Kings25:18 Tuate ban ah, ngalkap maangpa Nebuzaradan in Thiampi Lianbel Seraiah le a dom thiampi Zephaniah le a dang biakinn a seam ulian thupi thum teng paipui hi." 
2Kings25:18 Tuate ban ah, ngalkap maangpa Nebuzaradan in Thiampi Lianbel Seraiah le a dom thiampi Zephaniah le a dang biakinn a seam ulian thupi thum teng paipui hi." 
2Kings25:19 Khuapi sung panin ngalkap uk ulianpa, khuapi sung ma ah a om lai kumpipa ii aituam thudokte nga, ngalkap vai theampo tepteena keam ngalkap ukpa ii khutdawn pa le a dang mihing thupi 60 paipui hi." 
2Kings25:20 Nebuzaradan in amate Hamath ngamsung Riblah khuapi ah om Babylon kumpipa kungah paipui hi. 
2Kings25:21 Tua munah kumpipa in amate velsak a, thatlumsak hi. Tua ahikom Judah mite sia amate ngam panin salin kipaipui hi." 
2Kings25:22 Babylon kumpipa Nebuchadnezzar in Shaphan ii tupa, Ahikam ii tapa Gedaliah sia Judah ngamuk mangpa in koi hi, tuaciang Babylon ah a kipaipui ngawlte uksak hi." 
2Kings25:23 Ngalte khut sungah a tum ngawl Judean ngalkap maangte le ngalkapte in hi thu a zaak ciang Mizpah ah Gedaliah taw kikop uh hi. Hi ngalkap maangte sia Nethania ii tapa Ishmael, Kareah ii tapa Johanan, Netophah khua pan Tanhumeth ii tapa Seraiah le Maacah pan Jezaniah te ahi uh hi." 
2Kings25:24 Gedaliah in amate tungah, “Babylon uliante kiitak om ngawl hi hong ci ngam khi hi. Hi ngam sungah teang vun a, Babylon kumpipa atu na na sepsak vun, tua hile na theampo a pha a dikin hong piang tu hi,” ci hi." 
2Kings25:25 Ahihang tua kum sung a tha salina ciang, kumpi innkuan sung pan khat zongh ahi, Elishama ii tupa, Nethaniah ii tapa Ishmael sia Mizpah ah mihing sawm taw pai a, Gedaliah simin thatlum uh hi. Ama taw tualai ah a om Israel mite le Babylon te zongh that hi." 
2Kings25:26 Tua zawkciang Israel te theampo a hau a zawng, a kibangin ngalkap uliante taw tua mun nusia in Egypt ah tai uh hi, banghang ziam cile amate in Babylon te kiita uh hi." 
2Kings25:27 Evilmerodach sia Babylon kumpipa a sua kumin, ama in Judah kumpipa Jehoiachin tungah hesuakna a lakna in thong panin pusuaksak hi. Hi bangin thu hong pian sia Jehoiachin ii luangtaak zawk a kum 37 na, tha sawm le tha nii, ni 27 ni hi." 
2Kings25:28 Evilmerodach in ama sia hesuak a, ama taw Babylon ah sal tang khawm kumpi dangte sangin phat vawt zaw a, vaang neizaw dinmun pia hi." 
2Kings25:29 Tuabangin Jehoiachin sia a thongpuante kilaihsak a, a nuntak sung teng kumpipa sabuai ah an kinesak hi.," 
2Kings25:30 Ama ii a nuntak sung teng ni simin a taangsap bang a zak tu sum zongh a hun maan in kipia hi. 
1Chronicles1:1 Adam ii tapa Seth, Seth ii tapa Enosh, Enosh ii tapa Kenan," 
1Chronicles1:2 Kenan ii tapa Mahalalel, Mahalalel ii tapa Jared," 
1Chronicles1:3 Jared ii tapa Enoch, Enoch ii tapa Methuselah, Mathuselah ii tapa Lamech," 
1Chronicles1:4 Lamech ii tapa Noah ahi uh hi. Noah in tapa thum nei a Shem, Ham le Japheth te ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles1:5 Japheth ii tapate — Gomer, Magog, Madai, Javan, Tubal, Meshech le Tiras hi a — amate min a tap mite ii taanghpupite ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles1:6 Gomer ii suan le paalte sia Ashkenaz, Riphath le Togarmah mite ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles1:7 Javan ii suan le paalte sia Elishah, Spain, Cyprus le Rhodes mite ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles1:8 Ham ii tapate — Cush, Egypt, Libya le Canaan hi a — amate min a tap mite ii taanghpupite ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles1:9 Cush ii suan le paalte sia Seba, Havilah, Sabtah, Raamah le Sabteca mite ahi uh hi. Raamah ii suan le paalte sia Sheba le Dedan mite ahi uh hi. (" 
1Chronicles1:10 Cush in Nimrod a kici tapa khat nei in, Nimrod sia leitung ah a minthang ngual zo masabel ahi hi.)" 
1Chronicles1:11 Egypt ii suan le paalte sia Lydia, Anam, Lehab, Naphtuh," 
1Chronicles1:12 Pathrus, Casluh le Crete mite ahi uh hi, (Philistine mite sia tuasia ii suan le paalte ahi uh hi)." 
1Chronicles1:13 Canaan ii tapate — a lianbel Sidon le Heth — sia amate ii min a tap mite ii taanghpupite ahi uh hi. 
1Chronicles1:14 Canaan sia Jebus te, Amor te, Girgash te," 
1Chronicles1:15 Hiv te, Ark te, Sin te," 
1Chronicles1:16 Arvad te, Zemar te le Hamath te zongh ii taanghpupi ahi hi." 
1Chronicles1:17 Shem ii tapate — Elam, Asshur, Arpachshad, Lud, Aram, Uz, Hul, Gether le Meshek — hi uh a, amate ii min a tap mite ii taanghpupite ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles1:18 Arpachshad sia Shelah ii pa hi a, Shelah sia Eber ii pa ahi hi." 
1Chronicles1:19 Eber in tapa nii nei a; khat pa ii min sia Peleg hi, banghang ziam cile ama khan sungin mihingte kikhen tham siat hi, a tapa dang khat ii min sia Joktan hi." 
1Chronicles1:20 Joktan ii suan le paalte sia Almodad, Sheleph, Hazarmaveth, Jerah,"

1Chronicles1:22 Ebal, Abimael, Sheba,"

1Chronicles1:27 Abram (Abraham zongh kici) te hi. 
1Chronicles1:28 Abraham in tapa nii nei in, Isaac le Ishmael ahi uh hi."

1Chronicles1:30 Mishma, Dumah, Massa, Hadad, Tema," 
1Chronicles1:31 Jetur, Naphish le Kedemah te hi." 
1Chronicles1:32 Abraham in a zino Keturah taw in tapa luk nei a: Zimran, Jokshan, Medan, Midian, Ishbak le Shuah te hi. Jokshan in tapa nii nei a: Sheba le Dedan te hi." 
1Chronicles1:33 Midian in tapa nga nei a: Ephah, Epher, Hanoch, Abida le Eldaah te hi." 
1Chronicles1:34 Abraham ii tapa Isaac in tapa nii nei a, Esau le Jacob ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles1:35 Esau ii tapate sia Eliphaz, Reuel, Jeush, Jalam le Korah te ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles1:36 Eliphaz in a nuai a minamte ii taanghpupi hong suak a: Teman, Omar, Zephi, Gatam, Kenaz, Timna le Amalek te hi." 
1Chronicles1:37 Reuel sia Nahath, Zerah, Shammah le Mizzah minamte ii taanghpupi suak hi." 
1Chronicles1:38 Edom ah a teang ciilte sia a nuai a Seir ii tapate pan khang kizomsuk ahi uh hi. Lotan sia Hori le Homam bee le phungte ii taanghpupi hi. (Lotan in Timna a kici suapuinumei khat nei hi) Shobal sia Alvan, Manahath, Ebal, Shephi le Onam bee le phungte ii taanghpupi hi. Zibeon in tapa nii nei a, Aiah le Anah ahi uh hi. Anah sia Dishon ii pa hi a, Dishon sia Hamran, Eshban, Ithran le Cheran bee le phungte ii taanghpupi hi. Ezer sia Bilhan, Zaavan le Jaakan bee le phung ii taanghpupi hi. Dishan sia Uz le Aran bee le phungte ii taanghpupi hi."

1Chronicles2:2 Dan, Joseph, Benjamin, Naphtali, Gad le Asher te hi." 
1Chronicles2:3 Judah in tapa a vekpi nga nei hi. Canaan numei a zi Bathshua taw tapa thum nei hi: Er, Onan le Shelah te ahi uh hi. A tapa lianbel Er sia ngilo lei ahikom Topa in that hi." 
1Chronicles2:4 A monu Tamar taw Judah in tapa nii nei thua a, Perez le Zerah ahi uh hi."

1Chronicles2:6 A suapui pa Zerah in tapa nga nei hi: Zimri, Ethan, Heman, Calcol le Darda ahi uh hi."

1Chronicles2:8 Ethan in tapa khat nei a, Azariah ahi hi." 
1Chronicles2:9 Hezron in tapa thum nei hi: Jerahmeel, Ram le Caleb ahi uh hi."

1Chronicles2:11 Salmon, Boaz,"

1Chronicles2:14 Nethanel, Raddai," 
1Chronicles2:15 Ozem le David te hi. 
1Chronicles2:16 Ama in tanu nii zongh nei in, Zeruiah le Abigail te hi. Jesse ii tanu Zeruiah in tapa thum nei hi: Abishai, Joab le Asahel te hi." 
1Chronicles2:17 A tanu dang ahi Abigail in Ishmael ii suan ahi Jether teenpui a, amate in Amasa kici tapa khat nei hi." 
1Chronicles2:18 Hezron ii tapa Caleb in Azubah teenpui a, Jerioth kici tanu khat nei hi. Tua nu in tapa thum nei hi: Jesher, Shobab le Ardon te hi." 
1Chronicles2:19 Azubah a thi zawkciang Caleb in Ephrath teenpui a, Hur kici tapa khat nei hi." 
1Chronicles2:20 Hur ii tapa sia Uri hi in, a tupa sia Bezalel ahi hi." 
1Chronicles2:21 Heron in kum 60 a phak ciang Machir ii tanu, Gilead ii suapuinu teenpui hi. Amate in Segub kici tapa khat nei a," 
1Chronicles2:22 Segub in Jair kici tapa khat nei hi. Jair in Gilead ngam ah khuapi 23 uk hi. 
1Chronicles2:23 Ahihang Geshur le Aram kumpi ngamte in tua munah khua 60 zothal a, tuasung ah Jair le Kenath khuanote le a kiim a khuate kihel hi. Tua munah a teang mite theampo sia Gilead ii pa Machir ii suan le paalte ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles2:24 Hezron thi zawkciang a tapa Caleb in a pa ii zi meingongnu Ephrath teenpui hi. Amate in Ashhur kici tapa khat nei a, Ashhur sia Tekoa khua saatpa ahi hi." 
1Chronicles2:25 Hezron ii tapa lianbel Jerahmeel in tapa nga nei hi: a lianbel sia Ram hi a, Bunah, Oren, Ozem, le Ahijah te hi." 
1Chronicles2:26 Ram in tapa thum nei hi: Maaz, Jamin le Eker te ahi uh hi. Jerahmeel in Atarah kici zi dang khat nei a, amate in Onam kici tapa khat nei hi." 
1Chronicles2:27

1Chronicles2:30 Abishur ii suapuipa Nadab in tapa nii Seled le Appaim nei a, ahihang Seled sia tapa nei ngawlin thi hi." 
1Chronicles2:31 Appaim sia Ishi ii pa hi a, Ishi sia Sheshan ii pa hi in, Sheshan sia Ahlai ii pa ahi hi."

1Chronicles2:33 Jonathan in tapa nii, Peleth le Zaza nei hi. Hite theampo sia Jerahmeel ii suan le paalte ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles2:34 Sheshan in tapa nei ngawlin, tanu bebek nei hi. Ama in Egypt mi Jarha kici naseam khat nei a," 
1Chronicles2:35 tuasia pa le a tanute khat teangsak hi. Amate in Attai kici tapa khat nei hi.

1Chronicles2:42 Jerahmeel ii suapuipa Caleb ii tapa lianbel sia Mesha kici hi. Mesha sia Ziph ii pa, Ziph sia Mareshah ii pa, Mareshah sia Hebron ii pa ahi hi." 
1Chronicles2:43 Hebron in tapa li nei hi: Korah, Tappuah, Rekem le Shema te ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles2:44 Shema sia Raham ii pa hi a, Jorkeam ii pu ahi hi. Shema ii suapuipa Rekem sia Shammai ii pa hi." 
1Chronicles2:45 Shammai sia Maon ii pa hi a, Maon sia Bethzur ii pa hi." 
1Chronicles2:46 Caleb in Ephah kici zino khat nei a, tua nu taw tapa thum nei thua hi: Haran, Moza le Gazez te hi. Haran zongh in Gazez kici tapa khat nei hi." 
1Chronicles2:47 (Jahdai a kici pa in tapa luk nei hi: Regem, Jotham, Geshan, Pelet, Ephah le Shaaph te hi.)" 
1Chronicles2:48 Caleb in zino dang Maacah nei in tua nu taw tapa nii nei a, Sheber le Tirhanah te hi." 
1Chronicles2:49 Tua zawkciang tua nu in tapa nii nei thua a: Madmannah khua saat pa Shaaph; Machbenah le Gibea khua saat pa Shevah ahi uh hi. Caleb in Achsah kici tanu khat nei thua hi. 
1Chronicles2:50 A nuai a teng zongh Caleb ii suan le paalte ahi uh hi. Caleb le a zi Ephrath ii a tapa lianbel sia Hur hi. Hur ii tapa Shobal in Kiriath Jearim," 
1Chronicles2:51 a tapa niina Salma in Bethlehem khua, tuaciang a tapa thumna Hareph in Bethgader khua saat tek hi." 
1Chronicles2:52 Kiriath Jearim khua a saat Shobal sia Haroeh mite, Menuhoth ah a teangte a lang," 
1Chronicles2:53 tuaciang Kiriath Jearim ah a teang a nuai a bee le phung teng: Ithri te, Puth te, Shumath te le Mishrai te ii taanghpupi hi. (Zorah le Eshtaol khuapi mite sia hi bee le phungte ii mite hi.)" 
1Chronicles2:54 Bethlehem khuasaatpa Salma sia Netophath, Atroth Beth Joab le Zor mite ii taanghpupi hi a, Zor te sia tua Manahath ah a teang bee le phung nam nii sung pan nam khat hi." 
1Chronicles2:55 (Jabez khua ah a nuai a lai at thiamte le laikuu thiam bee le phung teng: Tirath, Shimeath le Sucath te teang uh hi. Amate sia Rechab mite taw zi le pasal in a kiman Ken mite ahi hi.)" 
1Chronicles3:1 Hebron ah David a ten lai in a nei tapate a kum zui in a nuai a bang ahi hi: Amnon, a nu sia Jezreel pan Ahinoam, Daniel, a nu sia Carmel pan Abigail, Absalom, a nu sia Geshur kumpipa Talmai ii tanu Maacah, Adonijah, a nu sia Haggith, Shephatiah, a nu sia Abital, Ithream, a nu sia Eglah te hi." 
1Chronicles3:1 Hebron ah David a ten lai in a nei tapate a kum zui in a nuai a bang ahi hi: Amnon, a nu sia Jezreel pan Ahinoam, Daniel, a nu sia Carmel pan Abigail, Absalom, a nu sia Geshur kumpipa Talmai ii tanu Maacah, Adonijah, a nu sia Haggith, Shephatiah, a nu sia Abital, Ithream, a nu sia Eglah te hi."

1Chronicles3:18 Malchiram, Pedaiah, Shenazzar, Jekamiah, Hoshama le Nedabiah te ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles3:19 Pedaiah in tapa nii nei in, Zerubbabel le Shimei te ahi uh hi. Zerubbabel sia tapa nii ahi, Meshullam le Hananiah te le tanu khat ahi Shelomith te ii pa ahi hi." 
1Chronicles3:20 Ama in a dang tapa nga zongh nei hi: Hashubah, Ohel, Berechiah, Hasadiah le Jushab Hesed te ahi hi." 
1Chronicles3:21 Hananiah in tapa nii nei in, Pelatiah le Jeshaiah te ahi uh hi. Jeshaiah sia Rephaiah ii pa, Rephaiah sia Arnan ii pa, Arnan sia Obadiah ii pa, Obadiah sia Shecaniah ii pa ahi hi." 
1Chronicles3:21 Hananiah in tapa nii nei in, Pelatiah le Jeshaiah te ahi uh hi. Jeshaiah sia Rephaiah ii pa, Rephaiah sia Arnan ii pa, Arnan sia Obadiah ii pa, Obadiah sia Shecaniah ii pa ahi hi." 
1Chronicles3:22 Shecaniah in tapa khat Shemaiah le tupa nga nei hi: Hattush, Igal, Bariah, Neariah le Shaphat te ahi hi." 
1Chronicles3:23 Neariah in tapa thum nei hi: Elioenai, Hizkiah le Azrikam te ahi hi." 
1Chronicles3:24 Elioenai in tapa sali nei hi: Hodaviah, Eliashib, Pelaiah, Akkub, Johanan, Delaiah le Anani te ahi hi." 
1Chronicles4:1 Hite sia Judah suan le paalte pawlkhat ahi hi: Perez, Hezron, Carmi, Hur le Shobal te ahi hi." 
1Chronicles4:2 Shobal sia Reaiah ii pa, Reaiah sia Jahath ii pa, Jahath sia Ahumai le Lahad te ii pa hi a, amate sia Zorah ah a teang mite ii taanghpupite ahi hi." 
1Chronicles4:3 Hur sia Caleb ii a zi Ephrath taw a tapa lianbel hi a, ama suan le paalte sia Bethlehem khuapi saat ciilte ahi uh hi. Hur in tapa thum nei hi: Etam, Penuel le Ezer te ahi hi. Etam in tapa thum nei hi: Jezreel, Ishma le Idbash hi a, Hazzelelponi kici tanu khat nei hi. Penuel in Gedor khuapi saat a, Ezer in Hushah khuapi saat hi." 
1Chronicles4:4  
1Chronicles4:5 Tekoa khua saatpa Ashhur in zi nii nei a, Helah le Naarah te ahi hi." 
1Chronicles4:6 Ama in Naarah taw tapa li nei hi: Ahuzzam, Hepher, Temeni le Haahashtari te ahi hi." 
1Chronicles4:7 Ashhur le Helah in tapa thum nei hi: Zereth, Izhar le Ethnan te ahi hi." 
1Chronicles4:8 Koz sia Anub le Zobebah ii pa hi a, Harum tapa Aharhel ii suan bee le phungte ii taanghpupi hi." 
1Chronicles4:9 Jabez kici pasal khat om a, ama innkuan sung panin a zatakbel uh ahi hi. A sua lai, a nu in na sa mama ahikom Jabez ci in min phuak hi." 
1Chronicles4:10 Ahihang Jabez in Israel te ii Pathian tungah thungen in, “Pathian awng, thupha hong pia ta'n a, ngam zai khat hong pia ta'n. Hong ompui ta'n a kei hong nasak thei tu siatna khat pawpo pan hong keam ta'n,” ci hi. A thunget bangin Pathian in pia hi." 
1Chronicles4:11 Shuhah ii suapuipa Caleb in tapa Mehir nei hi. Mehir sia Eshton ii pa hi a," 
1Chronicles4:12 Eshton in tapa thum nei hi: Bethrapha, Paseah le Tehinnah te ahi hi. Tehinnah sia Nahash khuapi saatpa hi. Hi mite ii suan le paalte sia Recah ah teang uh hi." 
1Chronicles4:13 Kenaz in tapa nii nei a, Othniel le Seraiah te ahi uh hi. Othniel zongh in tapa nii nei a, Hathath le Meonothai te ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles4:14 Meonothai sia Ophrah ii pa hi. Seraiah sia Joab ii pa hi a, nasep thiam mite bebek ii teenna Khutthiamte Kuam a saatpa hi."

Mered in zongh Judah nam numei khat teenpui in tapa thum nei hi: Gedor khua saatpa Jered; Soco khua saatpa Heber; le Zanoah khua saatpa Jekuthiel te ahi hi."

1Chronicles7:1 Issachar in tapa li nei a: Tola, Puah, Jashub, le Shimron te ahi hi." 
1Chronicles7:2 Tola in tapa luk nei a: Uzzi, Rephaiah, Jeriel, Jahmai, Ibsam, le Shemuel te ahi hi. Amate Tola bee le phung sung innkuan lutangte vive hi in ngalkap minthangte ahi uh hi. Amate suan le paal sia David kumpipa hun lai in 22,600 pha hi." 
1Chronicles7:3 Uzzi in tapa khat nei a, Izrahiah hi. Izrahiah le a tapa lite ahi, Michael, Obadiah, Joel, le Isshiah te a vekpi in innkuan lutangte ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles7:3 Uzzi in tapa khat nei a, Izrahiah hi. Izrahiah le a tapa lite ahi, Michael, Obadiah, Joel, le Isshiah te a vekpi in innkuan lutangte ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles7:3 Uzzi in tapa khat nei a, Izrahiah hi. Izrahiah le a tapa lite ahi, Michael, Obadiah, Joel, le Isshiah te a vekpi in innkuan lutangte ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles7:4 Amate in zi tam mama le ta tam mama nei a, a suan a paalte ngalkap seam thei 36,000 pha hi." 
1Chronicles7:5 Issachar nam innkuante theampo zum laibu sungah ngalkap seam thei pasal 87,000 om hi ci in kiciamtee hi." 
1Chronicles7:6 Benjamin in tapa thum nei a: Bela, Becher, le Jediael te ahi hi." 
1Chronicles7:7 Bela in tapa nga nei a: Ezbon, Uzzi, Uzziel, Jerimoth le Iri te ahi hi. Amate sia bee le phung sung innkuan lutangte le ngalkap minthangte vive ahi uh hi. A suan a paal ngalkap seam thei pasal 22,034 om hi." 
1Chronicles7:8 Becher in tapa kua nei a: Zemirah, Joash, Eliezer, Eleoenai, Omri, Jeremoth, Abijah, Anathoth le Alemeth te ahi hi." 
1Chronicles7:9 Zum laibu sungah a suan a paalte a innkuan zui in a tepteena ah ngalkap seam thei pasal 20,200 om hi." 
1Chronicles7:10 Jediael in tapa khat Bilhan nei a, Bilhan in tapa sali nei a: Jeush, Benjamin, Ehud, Chenaanah, Zethan, Tarshish, le Ahishahar te ahi hi." 
1Chronicles7:11 Amate theampo sia bee le phung sung innkuan lutangte le ngalkap minthangte veu ahi uh hi. Amate ii suan le paal sungah ngalkap seam thei pasal 17,200 om hi." 
1Chronicles7:12 Shuppim le Huppim zongh hi namte ahi hi. Dan in tapa khat, Hushim nei hi." 
1Chronicles7:13 Naphtali in tapa li nei a: Jahziel, Guni, Jezer, le Shallum te ahi hi. (Amate sia Bilhah ii suan le paalte ahi hi.)" 
1Chronicles7:14 Manasseh in a zino Aramean taw tapa nii nei in, Asriel le Machir te ahi uh hi. Machir sia Gilead ii pa hi." 
1Chronicles7:15 Machir in Huppim le Shuppim zi khat veve neisak hi. Ama suapuinu ii min Maacah hi. Machir ii tapa niina sia Zelophehad hi a, ama in tanu bek nei hi."
