1Chronicles10:1 Philistine mite in Israel te Gilboa mual tungah sim uh hi. Israel te tam mama tua munah kithatlum in a taanglai teng, Saul kumpipa le a tapate zongh tai uh hi." 
1Chronicles10:2 Ahihang Philistine te in amate delin pha a Saul ii tapate thum, Jonathan, Abinadab le Malchisua te thatlum uh hi." 
1Chronicles10:3 Saul ii omna kiim ah kidona nasia in, ama ngalte thaltangte in kha a, nasia takin liam hi." 
1Chronicles10:4 Ama in ama ngalhiamte a pua tangvalpa tungah, “Pathian sel Philistine te ii hong simmawk vawt ngawl natu in na namsau dokin hong that ka heu in,” ci hi. Ahihang tuabang ahi tu sia tangvalpa lau mama in seam ngam ngawl hi. Tua ahikom Saul in ama namsau la in a namsau tungah kisepsuk in thi hi." 
1Chronicles10:5 Tangvalpa in Saul ii thi a mu ciang ama zongh a namsau tungah kisepsuk in thi hi. 
1Chronicles10:6 Tuabangin Saul le a tapate thum sia mun khat ah thi khawm siatin, a suan a paalte kuama in ngam uk ngei nawn ngawl hi." 
1Chronicles10:7 Jezreel Kuam ah a teang Israel mite in ngalkaphonpi a taimang le Saul le a tapate a thi a zaak uh ciangin a khuate nusia in taimang uh hi. Tuasia ciang Philistine te pai in a khuate suan uh hi. 
1Chronicles10:8 Ngal kisim khuavak ni in a thite ii vanh la tu in a pai Philistine te in Saul le a tapate ii luang Gilboa mual tungah mu uh hi. 
1Chronicles10:9 Amate in Saul lu tan in a ngaldalna suutsak a, Philistia ngam bup ah a mite le a milimte tungah hi lungdamna thu ko tu in kamtaite paisak uh hi." 
1Chronicles10:10 Amate in a biakinnte khat ii sungah Saul ii ngalhiamte koi a, a lutang sia Dagon pathian biakinn sungah khai uh hi." 
1Chronicles10:11 Gilead ngam Jebesh mite in Philistine te ii Saul tungah a vawtna thu a zaak uh ciangin," 
1Chronicles10:12 ngalhang belte va pai a, Saul le a tapate ii luangte la in Jabesh khua ah ciapui uh hi. Amate in oak thingkung khat ii nuai ah a luangte phumin ni sali sung an tang uh hi." 
1Chronicles10:13 Topa tungah a thumaan ngawl hangin Saul thi hi. Ama in Topa thupiakte zui ngawl hi; ama in lamlakna a zonna in mithite thaate tungah thudok tu hanciam a," 
1Chronicles10:14 Topa tungah thu dongh ngawl zaw hi. Tua ahikom Topa in ama thatin Jesse ii tapa David tungah ngamukna za pia hi. 
1Chronicles11:1 Israel mite theampo David omna Hebron ah pai in ama tungah “Ko sia nangma ii chi le na sa ka hi uh hi. 
1Chronicles11:2 Tu masia Saul ii kote kumpi a sep lai ngawngawn zonghin Israel mite nangma in ngalsimna ah na lampui a, a mite lampui tu le uk tu in Topa na Pathian in nang tungah kamciam hong pia zo hi,” ci uh hi." 
1Chronicles11:3 Tua ahikom, David kumpipa omna Hebron ah Israel lampuite theampo pai uh hi. Ama in amate taw Pathian mai ah a thiangtho kipawlna khat vawt hi, Samuel tungtawn a Topa ii kamciamsa om bangin amate in David sathau noai in Israel kumpi suaksak uh hi." 
1Chronicles11:4 David kumpipa le Israel mite theampo pai in Jerusalem khuapi sim uh hi. Tualai in Jerusalem khuapi sia Jebus kici a tua munah a teang masa Jebus te ma teang lai uh hi. 
1Chronicles11:5 Jebus mite in David tungah, khuapi sungah tum zo ngeingawl tu ni hi ci uh hi, ahihang David in amate Zion kulh sia la a, tuasia “David ii Khuapi” ci in kiciamtee hi." 
1Chronicles11:6 David in, “Jebus mi khat a thatlum masa belpa ngalkaphonpi ukpa suak tu hi!” ci hi. A nu Zeruiah ahi Joab in ngalsimna ah lampui a, ama sia ngalkapmang suak hi." 
1Chronicles11:7 Tua kulh huang sungah David pai in teang ahikom tua sia “David ii Khuapi” kici hi. 
1Chronicles11:8 David in tua mual ii nisuana sang lei kidimna mun pan kipanin khuapi sa kik a, Joab in khuapi sungah puua tu a om lai teng puuapha kik hi." 
1Chronicles11:9 Vaanglianbelpa Topa in ompui ahikom David a thahat vaial hi. 
1Chronicles11:10 Hite in David ii ngalkap minthangte ahi uh hi. Amate in Israel mi a om lai teng taw kipawl in, Topa kamciamna omsa bangin, ama kumpi a sua natu in hu uh a, a kumpi ngam thahatsak uh hi." 
1Chronicles11:11 A masa belpa sia Hachmon bee le phung pan “Mihing Thumte” ii lampuipa Jashobeam ahi hi. Ama in a teipi taw a ngalte 300 sim a, sim khatin that siat hi." 
1Chronicles11:12 “Mihing Thumte” sung pan a minthang kik pa sia Ahoh bee le phung pan Dodo ii tapa Eleazar hi. 
1Chronicles11:13 Ama in Pas Dammim ngal kisimna ah David sang pan pangin Philistine te sim hi. Israel te taikeak tu a kipat laitakin ama mangtaang lo sungah om a," 
1Chronicles11:14 tuabangin ama le a mite sia lo lai ah dinmun la in Philistine te do uh hi. Topa in ama ngalzawna lianpi pia hi. 
1Chronicles11:15 Ni khat ni in Philistine ngalkapte Rephraim Kuam ah ngiaphual saatin a om laitak ngalkap lampui 30 sung pan thum sia Adullam suanghawng nai David omna suangpi khat ii kungah pai uh hi. 
1Chronicles11:16 Tua hun laitakin David sia kulh taw ki uum mualtung khat ah om a, Bethlehem khua sia Philistine te pawlkhat in la uh hi." 
1Chronicles11:17 David in inn sang ngai in, “Bethlehem kongpi hui tuikhuk panin ka dawn tu tui, khat in hong puak le paw uk na peu ing!” ci hi." 
1Chronicles11:18 Ngalkap minthang thumte pai in Philistine ngiaphual nawktan a tua tuikhuk pan tui tawm toai in David puak uh hi. Ahizong tua tui ama in dawn ngawl hi; Topa biakpiakna in bua a," 
1Chronicles11:19 “Hi tui ka ne ngei buatu hi! Tuasia a nuntakna a khaam, hi mite ii chi neak taw kibang tu hi!” ci hi. Tuabangin ama in tui neak tu nial hi. Hite sia a minthang ngalkap thumte ii ngalhan nasepte hi." 
1Chronicles11:20 Joab ii suapuipa Abishai sia, “A Minthang Sawmthumte” lampuipa hi. Ama in a teipi taw mihing 300 that a, “Sawmthumte” sungah a minthang suak hi." 
1Chronicles11:21 Ama, “Sawmthumte” sungah minthang belh a amate lampui suak hi, ahizong, “Mihing Thumte” minthan za in minthang ngawl hi." 
1Chronicles11:22 Kabzeel ah Jehoiada ii tapa Benaiah sia ngalkap minthang khat hi a; ama in ngalhan nasep tam mama seamin Moab te ngalhang mama nii zongh that hi. Khatvei vuuk taak ni khat in ama leidum sungah tuaksuk a tawpi khat that hi. 
1Chronicles11:23 Ama in tei lian mama khat a toai metre 2 vaal a saang mihing thatang lian Egypt te khat zongh that hi. Tua pa sia Benaiah in Egypt pa moltum taw simin a khut sung pan a teipi a suu zawkciang, tua tei taw ama that hi." 
1Chronicles11:24 Tuate sia Benaiah ii ngalhan nasepte hi a, ama “Sawmthum” sungah khat ahi hi." 
1Chronicles11:25 Ama sia “Sawmthum” sungah a mindok tuam khat hi a, ahizong “Mihing Thumte” za in minthang ngawl hi. David in ama sia ama a cingte a uk tu in koi hi." 
1Chronicles12:1 Saul kumpipa khut sung pan suakta tu in a tai na, Ziklag ah David teang hi. Tualai ah ama sia ngalsim ngeisa, a muanhuai ngalkapte," 
1Chronicles12:2 Saul pianna Benjamin namte in pawm uh hi. Amate in a khut ziatsang zongh, a veisang zongh taw thal le saili kap khawm thei uh hi." 
1Chronicles12:3 Amate sia Gibeah pan Shemaah ii tapate ahi Ahiezer le Joash te ii ukna nuai ah om uh hi. Hite sia a ngalkapte ahi uh hi: Azmaveth ii tapate Jeziel le Pelet, Anathoth pan Beracah le Jehu Ngalkap minthang khat le, “Sawmthum” sungah lampui khat ahi Gibeon pan Ishmaiah Gederah pan Jeremiah, Jahaziel, Johannan le Jozabad Hariph pan Eluzai, Jerimoth, Bealiah, Shemariah, le Shephatiah Korah bee le phung pan Elkanah, Isshiah, Azarel, Joezer, le Jashobeam Gedor pan Jeroham ii tapate Joelah le Zebadiah te hi."

Hite sia a ngalkapte ahi uh hi: Azmaveth ii tapate Jeziel le Pelet, Anathoth pan Beracah le Jehu Ngalkap minthang khat le, “Sawmthum” sungah lampui khat ahi Gibeon pan Ishmaiah Gederah pan Jeremiah, Jahaziel, Johannan le Jozabad Hariph pan Eluzai, Jerimoth, Bealiah, Shemariah, le Shephatiah Korah bee le phung pan Elkanah, Isshiah, Azarel, Joezer, le Jashobeam Gedor pan Jeroham ii tapate Joelah le Zebadiah te hi."

1Chronicles12:14 Hi Gad nam pan pawlkhat ngalkap tulkhat uk ngalkapmang liante hi a, a dangte sia ngalkap zakhat uk ngalkapmang nozawte ahi hi." 
1Chronicles12:15 Kum khat ii tha masabel hun Jordan nguntui pawmin a vaalbo ah tui a let lai in amate in ngun kaantan a ngun ii nisuana sang le nitumna sang kuamte ah a teang mite kithethaangsak uh hi. 
1Chronicles12:16 Khatvei lai in Benjamin le Judah namte sung pan pasal honkhat David omna kulh ah pai uh hi. 
1Chronicles12:17 David in amate muakin, “Keima hu tu ka lawm te bangin hong pai na hi uh le hong muak khi hi. Ih kipawl tu hi! Ahihang ka ngalte kungah nong zuak tu uh le keima in hong nasak ngawl tu ka hi hang, ih taanghpupite ii Pathian in he tu a, note daan hong pia tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Chronicles12:18 Khatvei ciangin “Sawmthum” te lampui a suakpa, amate sung pan khat ahi Amasai sia Pathian thaa in uk a, ama in, “Jesse ii tapa David awng, kote sia nangma mi ka hi uh hi! Nang tung le nangma hong hute tungah zawna om tahen! Nang sang ah Pathian om hi,” ci in a nging in au hi. David in amate phatvawt in, a ngalkap bute suaksak hi." 
1Chronicles12:19 David le Philistine mite ii Saul kumpipa do tu in a kuan lai in Manasseh nam sung pan ngalkap pawlkhat David ii sangah tai uh hi. A tatakin ama in Philistine te hu ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile Philistine kumpite in ama ii a topa masa ahi Saul tungah amate a zuak tu a lau hu in Ziklag ah heak kiksak hi." 
1Chronicles12:20 Hite sia Ziklag ah David a heak kik lai in David sang a tai Manasseh nam sung pan ngalkapte hi a: Adnah, Jozabad, Jediael, Michael, Jozabad, Elihu, le Zillethai te ahi hi. Manasseh nam sungah amate theampo sia mi tulkhat ukte veu ahi hi." 
1Chronicles12:21 Amate a vekpi ngalkap thiamte veu ahi uh komin David ii ngalkap bute veu suak uh hi. A khak sang ciangin amate sia Israel ngalkap bute veu suak hi. 
1Chronicles12:22 Ni sim phialin David ngalkapte sungah mithak tum ahikom hai ngawlin ama ngalkaphonpi sia lian mama hi. 
1Chronicles12:23 Topa kamciamsa bangin Hebron ah David a om lai in, Saul taangin ama kumpi a sua natu in a hu, ngalsim a sinsa ngalkap tam mama in ama ii ngalkaphonpi sia pawm uh hi. A mi phaza a nuai a bang hi:" 
1Chronicles12:24 Judah: ngalvanh kicing taw lum le tei toai pasal 6,800; Simeon: ngalkap thiam sa pasal 7,100; Levi: pasal 4,600; Aaron suan Jehoiada ii nungzuite pasal 3,700; Ngalsim thei khangno khat ahi Zadok ii mealheakte: lampui pasal 22; Benjamin (Saul ii nam): pasal 3,000 (Benjamin mite a tamzaw sia Saul tungah thumaan top uh hi); Ephraim: amate bee le phungte sungah a minthang pasal 20,800; Nitumna sang Manasseh panin: David kumpi a suaksak tu in, a kiteal pasal 18,000: Issachar: amate ukna nuai ah om mite taw a kingawm lampui 200, (hi lampuite in Israel te ii a vawt tu sia le a vawt tu a phabel hun a he uh hi); Zebulun: ngalsim tu a kinging, ngalhiam theampo a zangh thei, a thumaan le a muanhuai pasal 50,000; Naphtali: lampuite 1,000 le lum le tei toai pasal 37,000; Dan: ngalsim a sinsa pasal 28,600; Asher: ngalsim tu a kithoaisa pasal 40,000; Jordan ngun ii nisuana sangah a om minamte — Reuben, Gad le nisuana sang Manasseh te: ngalhiam a nanam a zakna a kisin saksa pasal 120,000 te ahi hi." 
1Chronicles12:25 Ngal sim tu in a kithoai hi ngalkapte theampo in Israel ngam theampo atu David sia kumpi suaksak tu in khensat a, Hebron ah pai uh hi. A taanglai Israel mi theampo in tuabang ma tupna nei uh hi." 
1Chronicles12:26 A ngammipuite ii a vaihawmsak sa an le tuite David taw ni thum sung tualai ah nekhawm dawn khawmin om uh hi. 
1Chronicles12:27 Saksang namte ahi Issachar, Zebulun, le Naphtali pan mite dong ngawngawn in laa, kalaoh, siphu le khuitalte taw neak thei — anvui, thei, sapitngawm, sapittui le olive thaute a khopteak hong paipui uh hi. Amate in ngaw tu le neak tu in khui le tuu zongh paipui uh hi. Hi teng theampo sia a ngam bup ii lungdamna a lakna ahi hi." 
1Chronicles13:1 David kumpipa sia mi tulkhat ukte le zakhat uk ngalkapmangte theampo taw thu kikum uh hi. 
1Chronicles13:2 Tuaciang Israel mite theampo tungah ama in, “Note lungkim in, Topa ih Pathian ii deina a om le ih ngammi om lai te, thiampite le a khua ah a om Levi te kungah kamtaite paisak in, eima taw hi sungah hong kikhawm tek tu in vaitha tawng." 
1Chronicles13:3 Tua zawkciang eite pai in, Saul ii kumpi a sep lai a, a ki awlmawk ngawl Pathian ii Thuciamna Thingkuang sia ih la tu hi,” ci in taangko hi." 
1Chronicles13:4 Mipite sia tua ngaisutna thukim in lungdam uh hi. 
1Chronicles13:5 Tua hi a, David in Israel ngamsung theampo, thangsang Egypt ngamngi pan saksang Hamath Mualciangh dong ah a teang Israel mite Kiriath Jearim pan Jerusalem khuapi ah Thuciamna Thingkuang paipui tu in kikhawmsak hi." 
1Chronicles13:6 David le mipite sia Judah ngam Kiriath Jearim ahi Baalah khuapi ah Cherubim tungah a tosak Topa min a pua Pathian ii Thuciamna Thingkuang la tu in pai uh hi. 
1Chronicles13:7 Amate in Abinadab inn pan Thuciamna Thingkuang pusua in khuileang thak khat tungah suan uh hi. Uzzah le Ahio in khuileang hawlin," 
1Chronicles13:8 David le Israel mite theampo Pathian patoai in a tha neiza taw laam uh hi. Amate lasa in, tengtongh, khuang, daalkopsai le lemle te tum uh hi." 
1Chronicles13:9 Amate Chidon kici ancilna mun a thet laitakin khuitalte liik a, tuaciang Uzzah in a khut zanin Thuciamna Thingkuang zamh a len hi." 
1Chronicles13:10 Thakhatin Uzzah tungah Topa thin uuk a, tua thingkuang a tham hu in thatlum paih hi. Ama tua mun Pathian mai ah thi a," 
1Chronicles13:11 tuasia hu in, tua mun sia tua hun pan kipan Perez Uzzah kici hi. Uzzah tungah Topa thin uuk in daan a piak hu in David a thinso hi." 
1Chronicles13:12 Tuasia ciang David in Pathian kiita in, “Hi Thuciamna Thingkuang tu in koi bangin paipui thei tu khi ziam?” ci hi." 
1Chronicles13:13 Tua ahikom David in Thuciamna Thingkuang sia Jerusalem ah tonpui ngawl hi. Gath khuapi mi Obed Edom kici pa inn ah nusia zaw hi. 
1Chronicles13:14 Tua munah Thuciamna Thingkuang tha thum sung om a, Topa in Obed Edom innkuan le a neisa theampo thupha pia hi." 
1Chronicles14:1 Tyre kumpipa Hiram in David kungah sumlei sumzuak vai thu son tu palai paisak a; kumpi inn a sak natu in Cedar thingluangte, a sa tu in suangciangte le lettamate taw puak hi." 
1Chronicles14:2 Tuasia ciang Topa in ama Israel kumpi in kipsak zo a, ama mite atu in a kumpi ngam khangtosak ahi hunlam David in phawk hi." 
1Chronicles14:3 Jerusalem ah David in zi tam ma nei thua in, tanu tapa tam ma toai thua hi." 
1Chronicles14:4 Jerusalem pan a nei tate, a nuai a bang hi a: Shammua, Shobab, Nathan, Solomon," 
1Chronicles14:5 Ibhar, Elishua, Elpelet," 
1Chronicles14:6 Nogah, Nepheg, Japhia," 
1Chronicles14:7 Elishama, Beeliada, le Eliphelet te ahi hi." 
1Chronicles14:8 Tu in David sia Israel ngam bup kumpipa kisuaksak zo ci in Philistine te in a zaak uh ciang a man tu in a ngalkaphonpi paisak hi. Tua ahiciang David in amate sim tu in kuan hi. 
1Chronicles14:9 Philistine te Rephaim Kuam theng a, vanh suttol tu kipan uh hi." 
1Chronicles14:10 David in Pathian tungah, “Philistine te ka sim tu ziam? Ngalzawna nong pia tu ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Topa in, “Hi hi, sim in! Zawna kong pia tu hi!” ci in zo hi." 
1Chronicles14:11 Tuasia ciang David in amate Baal Perazim ah simin zo hi. Ama in, “Tuikhang bangin ngalte ngalkaphonpi a phul let tu in Pathian in keima hong zangh hi,” ci hi. Tua hu in tua mun sia Baal Perazim kici hi." 
1Chronicles14:12 Philistine te a taikeak ciang a milimte nusia a, David in tua milimte hal tu in thupia hi." 
1Chronicles14:13 Hai ngawlin Philistine te tua kuam ah heak kikin vanh suttol tu in kipan kik uh hi. 
1Chronicles14:14 Khatvei ma David in dongh kik a, Pathian in, “Hi sung pan sim heak in a, kiimveal in, a langkhat sang balsam thingkungte nai pan sim tu in kithoai in." 
1Chronicles14:15 Thingkung dawnte tungah kalsuan nging na zaak uh ciang, sim vun, banghang ziam cile Philistine ngalkaphonpi zaw natu in na mai ah ka pai tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
1Chronicles14:16 David in Pathian thupiak bangin seam ahikom Philistine te Gibeon pan Gezer dongin not kik hi. 
1Chronicles14:17 David ii minthanna mun theampo ah kizel a, Topa in minam theampo in ama kiitasak hi." 
1Chronicles15:1 David in ama aituam zak tu in David khuapi sungah innte sa hi. Ama in Pathian ii Thuciamna Thingkuang atu in mun khat vawtin puanbuk khat zongh saksak hi. 
1Chronicles15:2 Tuaciang David in, “Thuciamna Thingkuang sia Levi te bek in pua thei tu hi, banghang ziam cile amate sia Pathian in Thuciamna Thingkuang pua tu le a tawntung ama ii na a seam tu in a tealsa te ahi uh hi,” ci hi." 
1Chronicles15:3 A vawt kholsa munah Thuciamna Thingkuang paipui tu in David in Israel mite theampo Jerusalem ah sam hi. 
1Chronicles15:4 Tua zawkciang ama in Levi te le Aaron suan le paalte sam hi. 
1Chronicles15:5 Levi te Kohath bee le phung sung pan ama ii mihing 120 a uk Uriel hong pai hi; 
1Chronicles15:6 Merari bee le phung sung pan mihing 220 a uk Asaiah hong pai hi; 
1Chronicles15:7 Gershon bee le phung sung pan mihing 130 a uk Joel hong pai hi; 
1Chronicles15:7 Gershon bee le phung sung pan mihing 130 a uk Joel hong pai hi; 
1Chronicles15:8 Elizaphan bee le phung sung pan mihing 200 a uk Shemaiah hong pai hi; 
1Chronicles15:9 Hebron bee le phung sung pan mihing 80 a uk Eliel hong pai hi; 
1Chronicles15:10 Uzziel bee le phung sung pan mihing 112 a uk Amminadab hong pai hi. 
1Chronicles15:11 David in thiampi Zadok le Abiathar le Levi mi luk ahi Uriel, Asaiah, Joel, Shemaiah, Eliel le Amminadab te sam hi." 
1Chronicles15:11 David in thiampi Zadok le Abiathar le Levi mi luk ahi Uriel, Asaiah, Joel, Shemaiah, Eliel le Amminadab te sam hi." 
1Chronicles15:12 Ama in Levi te tungah, “Note sia Levi bee le phung lampuite na hi uh hi. Ka vawt kholsa munah Israel Topa Pathian ii Thuciamna Thingkuang na paipui thei natu uh in noma le noma kithiansua vun a, na Levi mipuite zongh thiansua vun." 
1Chronicles15:13 A masa lai in tua munah Thuciamna Thingkuang pua tu in nong om bua uh a, ama ih biak tu bangin ih biak ngawl hu in, Topa ih Pathian in eite daan hong pia hi,” ci hi." 
1Chronicles15:14 Tua zawkciang Israel te Topa Pathian ii Thuciamna Thingkuang khiin tu in thiampite le Levi te amate le amate kithiansua uh hi. 
1Chronicles15:15 Moses tungtawnin Topa thupiak bangin Levi te in Thuciamna Thingkuang sia a liangko tungah molte taw zawngin pua uh hi. 
1Chronicles15:16 David in Levi te lampuite tungah lungdamna lasa tu, tengtongh tum tu, daalkopsai tum tu, Levi mi tuatuamte a see tu in thupia hi." 
1Chronicles15:17 Amate in lasa te ii bee le phungte sung pan taau daalkopsai tum tu in a nuai a mite teal a: Joel ii tapa Heman, a beepa Berechiah ii tapa Asaph, le Merari bee le phung pan Kushaiah ii tapa Ethan te ahi hi. Amate in tuate a hu tu in a nuai a Levi te, tengtongh aw eute tum tu in teal a: Zechariah, Jaaziel, Shemiramoth, Jehiel, Unni, Eliab, Maaseiah, le Benaiah te ahi hi. Tengtongh aw unte tum tu in amate in a nuai a Levi te teal a: Mattithiah, Eliphelehu, Mikneiah, Azaziah, le biakinn cingte Obed Edom, le Jeiel te ahi hi." 
1Chronicles15:17 Amate in lasa te ii bee le phungte sung pan taau daalkopsai tum tu in a nuai a mite teal a: Joel ii tapa Heman, a beepa Berechiah ii tapa Asaph, le Merari bee le phung pan Kushaiah ii tapa Ethan te ahi hi. Amate in tuate a hu tu in a nuai a Levi te, tengtongh aw eute tum tu in teal a: Zechariah, Jaaziel, Shemiramoth, Jehiel, Unni, Eliab, Maaseiah, le Benaiah te ahi hi. Tengtongh aw unte tum tu in amate in a nuai a Levi te teal a: Mattithiah, Eliphelehu, Mikneiah, Azaziah, le biakinn cingte Obed Edom, le Jeiel te ahi hi." 
1Chronicles15:17 Amate in lasa te ii bee le phungte sung pan taau daalkopsai tum tu in a nuai a mite teal a: Joel ii tapa Heman, a beepa Berechiah ii tapa Asaph, le Merari bee le phung pan Kushaiah ii tapa Ethan te ahi hi. Amate in tuate a hu tu in a nuai a Levi te, tengtongh aw eute tum tu in teal a: Zechariah, Jaaziel, Shemiramoth, Jehiel, Unni, Eliab, Maaseiah, le Benaiah te ahi hi. Tengtongh aw unte tum tu in amate in a nuai a Levi te teal a: Mattithiah, Eliphelehu, Mikneiah, Azaziah, le biakinn cingte Obed Edom, le Jeiel te ahi hi."

1Chronicles15:22 Music a thiam hu in Chenaniah sia Levi music thiamte uk tu in kiteal hi. 
1Chronicles15:23 Berechiah le Elkanah sia Obed Edom le Jehiah taw Thuciamna Thingkuang cing tu in kiteal hi. Thuciamna Thingkuang mai ah lemle tum tu in thiampi ahi Shebaniah, Joshaphat, Nethanel, Amasai, Zechariah, Benaiah le Eliezer te kiteal hi." 
1Chronicles15:23 Berechiah le Elkanah sia Obed Edom le Jehiah taw Thuciamna Thingkuang cing tu in kiteal hi. Thuciamna Thingkuang mai ah lemle tum tu in thiampi ahi Shebaniah, Joshaphat, Nethanel, Amasai, Zechariah, Benaiah le Eliezer te kiteal hi." 
1Chronicles15:24  
1Chronicles15:25 Tuabangin David kumpipa, Israel lampuite le ngalkapmangte Thuciamna Thingkuang la tu in Obed Edom inn ah pai in thupi takin poai vawt uh hi." 
1Chronicles15:26 Amate in Thuciamna Thingkuang a pua Levi te in Pathian huna a nga nanak natu in khuital sali le tuu salite sangaw biakpiakna in pia uh hi. 
1Chronicles15:27 David le music thiamte, a lampui Chenaniah le Thuciamna Thingkuang a pua Levi te zong in puanneal phabel taw a kivawt puantualte veu silh uh hi. David zongh puanneal ephod khat silh hi." 
1Chronicles15:28 Tuabangin Israel te theampo in Thuciamna Thingkuang sia lungdamna taw au in lemle, sakii, daalkopsai le tengtonghte tum kawmin Jerusalem khua ah tonpui uh hi." 
1Chronicles15:29 Thuciamna Thingkuang sia khuapi sungah a tumpui laitak Saul ii tanu Michal in khelki pan en a, David kumpipa lungdamna taw laamin a lelen a mu ciangin mu thada huai sa hi." 
1Chronicles16:1 Amate in Thuciamna Thingkuang a koi natu in David ii a saksa puanbuk sungah tua in koi uh hi. Tua zawkciang amate in Pathian tungah sangaw biakpiaknate le kipawlkhop biakpiaknate pia uh hi. 
1Chronicles16:2 David in sangaw biakpiaknate a man zawkciang Topa min taw mipite thupha pia in," 
1Chronicles16:3 an zongh a vekpi in hawmsak hi. Ama in Israel mite theampo pasal, numei khat sim anluum khat tek, sa em bek khat tek le sapitngawm tawm tek pia hi." 
1Chronicles16:4 David in Thuciamna Thingkuang mai ah lasakna le ama pokna taw Topa Israel te ii Pathian biakna ah lampui tu in Levi mite pawlkhat panmun pia hi. 
1Chronicles16:5 Asaph sia lampui in koi a, a hupa tu in Zechariah koi hi. Jeiel, Shemiramoth, Jehiel, Mattithiah, Eliab, Benaiah, Obed Edom le Jeiel te sia tengtongh tum tu in koi hi. Asaph sia daalkopsai tum tu pa hi a," 
1Chronicles16:5 Asaph sia lampui in koi a, a hupa tu in Zechariah koi hi. Jeiel, Shemiramoth, Jehiel, Mattithiah, Eliab, Benaiah, Obed Edom le Jeiel te sia tengtongh tum tu in koi hi. Asaph sia daalkopsai tum tu pa hi a," 
1Chronicles16:6 thiampi nii ahi Benaiah le Jahaziel sia Thuciamna Thingkuang mai ah a huhun in lemle a tum tu te ahi hi. 
1Chronicles16:7 Tua hunin David in Asaph le a Levi mipuite Topa tungah pokna late sa tu in nasep pia masa hi. 
1Chronicles16:8 Topa tungah lungdamko vun, ama ii letna thangsak vun; ama ii sepsate minamte tungah son vun." 
1Chronicles16:9 Topa tungah pokna lasa vun; a lamdang a nasep sate son vun. 
1Chronicles16:10 Ama aa ih hi sia lungdam vun; ama a biate theampo lungdam thinnuam tahen! 
1Chronicles16:11 Huna ngen tu in Topa zuan vun; tatsat ngawlin ama bia vun. 
1Chronicles16:12 No Pathian ii naseampa Jacob ii suan le paalte, Pathian ii teal Israel ii suan le paalte awng, Pathian ii nalamdang laknate le a thukhennate phawk vun." 
1Chronicles16:13  
1Chronicles16:14 Topa sia ih Pathian hi; a thupiakte sia leitung bup atu hi. 
1Chronicles16:15 A tawntung a kip tu a vawt Pathian ii thuciamna 
1Chronicles16:16 Abraham taw a vawt thuciamna, Isaac tungah a kamciamna mangil ngei heak vun." 
1Chronicles16:17 Topa in Jacob taw thuciamna khat vawt a, a tawntung a kip tu khat ahi hi." 
1Chronicles16:18 Ama in, “Canaan ngam nang kong pia tu a, nangma aituam neisa tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Chronicles16:19 Pathian ii mite tawm a, Canaan ngam ah khualmi suak uh hi." 
1Chronicles16:20 Amate ngam khat pan ngam khat, kumpi ngam khat pan kumpi ngam khat ah vak kawkoai uh hi." 
1Chronicles16:21 Ahizong Pathian in amate kuama in nengcipsak ngawl hi; amate a dal tu in Pathian in kumpite hi bangin thupia hi: 
1Chronicles16:22 “Ka tealsa ka naseamte bangma law heak vun; ka kamsaangte thutha heak vun.” 
1Chronicles16:23 Leitung bup awng, Topa tungah lasa vun! ama ii eite hong ngupna lungdamna thuphate ni simin thangsak vun." 
1Chronicles16:24 Minamte tungah a minthanna thangsak vun, mite theampo tungah a nasep liante thangsak vun." 
1Chronicles16:25 Topa sia lian a, nasia tak pok tu ahi hi; ama sia pathiante theampo sangin patoai zawk tu ahi hi." 
1Chronicles16:26 A dang minam theampote ii pathiante sia milim bekma hi a, ahihang Topa in vantungte bitphua hi." 
1Chronicles16:27 Minthanna le vaangneina in ama kiim uumin, a Biakinnpi vaangletna le lungdamna taw kidim hi." 
1Chronicles16:28 Leitung mi theampo awng Topa pok vun, a minthanna le a thahatna pok vun." 
1Chronicles16:29 Topa ii minthanna pok vun; biakpiakna khat kengin a Biakinnpi sungah pai vun. Tua Thiangtho Pa a kilangh ciangin a mai ah kun vun; 
1Chronicles16:30 leitung mi theampo awng a mai ah liingin om vun! Leitung sia a kip a kho in kikoi a, kikhiin thei ngawl hi." 
1Chronicles16:31 Van le lei awng lungdam vun! Topa sia kumpipa hi ci in minamte son vun. 
1Chronicles16:32 Tuipi awng, na sungah a om nganhingte theampo taw hawk vun; lote awng, na sungah a om theampo taw lungdam vun!" 
1Chronicles16:33 Leitung uk tu in Topa hong pai ciang, thingtaam sung a om thingkungte lungdam in au tu hi." 
1Chronicles16:34 Topa tungah lungdamko vun, banghang ziam cile ama pha hi; ama ii itna in mong nei ngawl hi." 
1Chronicles16:35 Ama tungah, “Kote ii Ngumpa Pathian awng, ko hong ngum ta'n; kote hong khawmtua ta'n; lungdam takin na min thiangtho kong pok thei natu in minamte khut sung pan hong suatak ta'n,” ci vun." 
1Chronicles16:36 Israel te ii Pathian Topa pok vun! Tu le a tawntungin ama pok vun! Tuasia ciang mi theampo in, “Amen,” ci in Topa pok uh hi." 
1Chronicles16:37 David kumpipa in Asaph le a Levi mipuite Thuciamna Thingkuang a kikepna munah a kivawt biakpiakna sungah a uk tawntung tu in koi hi. Amate in ni khat zawk ni khat amate nasep tek tua munah seam tu uh hi. 
1Chronicles16:38 Amate sia Jeduthun ii tapa Obed Edom le ama bee le phung pan pasal 68 te in hu tu hi. Hosah le Obed Edom te sia kongcing ukte ahi hi. 
1Chronicles16:39 Ahizong thiampi Zadok le a thiampi seppuite sia Gibeon ah a om Topa biakpiakna munah a ukte ahi uh hi. 
1Chronicles16:40 Topa in Israel te tungah a piak thukham sungah a ki at bangin amate in zing sim, nitak sim sangaw biakpiaknate biaknatau tungah a pum bup halin pia tu uh hi." 
1Chronicles16:41 A mong nei ngawl Topa hong itna pokna la Topa tungah sa tu in Heman le Jeduthun te le a kitealtuam dangte zongh amate taw tua munah omkhawm uh hi. 
1Chronicles16:42 Pokna late a sak uh ciang a tum uh lemle, daalkopsai te le a dang tumthei vanhte Heman le Jeduthun zongh in uksak hi. Jeduthun ii bee le phungte sia kongcing ukte ahi hi." 
1Chronicles16:43 Tua zawkciang a kuama po a inn ah cia tek in, David zongh a innkuanpuite taw hun khat zangh khawm tu in cia hi." 
1Chronicles17:1 Tu in David kumpipa sia a kumpi inn ah teang hi. Ni khat ni in David in kamsaangpa Nathan samin ama tungah, “Kei hi sung cedar thing taw a kisa inn sungah teang khi hi, ahihang Topa ii Thuciamna Thingkuang sia puanbuk sungah kikeam hi!” ci hi." 
1Chronicles17:2 Nathan in, “Na thinsung a om babangin seam in, banghang ziam cile Pathian nang taw omkhawm hi,” ci in zo hi." 
1Chronicles17:3 Ahizong tua zanin Pathian in Nathan tungah," 
1Chronicles17:4 “Ka naseampa David kungah va pai ta'n a, ka ci teng son in, ‘Ka teen natu biakinn khat a sa tu sia nang na hi bua hi." 
1Chronicles17:5 Israel mite Egypt ngam pan ka suatak ni pan kipan tu dong biakinn khat sungah ka teang ngei bua hi; puanbukte sungah teang tawntung in, mun khat pan mun khat ah ka kikhiin hi." 
1Chronicles17:6 Israel mite taw ka khualhawna theampo ah a lampui in ka koite khat pawpo ii tungah banghangin kei atu cedar thing taw biakinn hong saksak ngawl nu ziam ci in ka dongh ngei bua hi,’ ci hi." 
1Chronicles17:7 “Tua ahiciangin ka naseampa David tungah keima Vaanglianbelpa Topa in hi bangin ka ci sia va son ta'n, ‘Lo sung na tuu cinna panin nangma kong la a, ka Israel mite ukpa kong suaksak hi." 
1Chronicles17:8 Na paina theampo ah kong ompui a, na mai ah na ngal theampo kong zawsak hi. Leitung ah lampui lianbelte bangin na min kong thangsak tu hi." 
1Chronicles17:9 Israel ka mite atu in mun khat ka tealsak a, tua munah ka teangsak zo hi, amate tua munah kuama in nengcip nawn ngawl tu hi. Amate hi ngam a thet ni pan kipan a ngoltol mite in sim bul uh hi, ahizong tuabang piang kik nawn ngawl tu hi. Na ngalte theampo na zaw natu uh le suan le paalte na nei natu uh in kong kamciam hi." 
1Chronicles17:10  
1Chronicles17:11 Na thi ciang le na taanghpupite taw hong kiphum khop ciangin na tapate sung pan khat, kumpi ka suaksak tu a, a kumpi ngam thahat paisuaksak tu khi hi." 
1Chronicles17:12 Ama sia keima atu in biakinn a sa pa hi tu a, a kumpi khangngui ka kizom suaksak tu hi." 
1Chronicles17:13 Keima in a pa ka hi tu a, ama sia ka ta hi tu hi. Nangma kumpi na sua thei natu in Saul ka hepkeak bangin ama ka khuangkhosakna ka dok kik buatu hi." 
1Chronicles17:14 Ka mite le ka kumpi ngam a tawntungin ka uksak tu hi. Ama kumpi khangngui sia a bo ngei buatu hi,’ ” a ci hi." 
1Chronicles17:15 Pathian ii ama tung a, a pualaak thu theampo Nathan in David tungah son hi." 
1Chronicles17:16 Tuaciang David kumpipa sia Topa ompuina Puanbuk sungah pai a, to in thungen hi, “ Topa Pathian awng, kei tung ahizong ka innkuanpuite tung ahizong nong septe ka kiphu ka kilawm bua hi." 
1Chronicles17:17 Tua hi napi tu in a tamzaw lai in nong seam hi; mai sangah ka suan ka paalte atu dong kamciamte nong pia zo hi, Topa Pathian awng, nangma in kei mi lian khat bangin nong thupi vawt zo hi." 
1Chronicles17:18 Bangdang hong ci thei lai tu khi ziam! Na naseampa kei nong he mama a, ahihang nong upat lalai hi." 
1Chronicles17:19 Hi bangin nong hina sia kei atu in na deina le na tupna om a, mai sangah ka let natu nong lakna hi." 
1Chronicles17:20 Topa awng nang taw a kibang kuama om ngawl hi; nangma bek Pathian na hi hunlam kong he tawntung zo uh hi. 
1Chronicles17:21 Nangma aituam mite hong suak tu in sila pan na suatak Israel mite taw a kibang leitung ah minam dang om ngawl hi. Amate tungah a lamdang na liante na vawtna taw leitung bup ah na minthanna kizel hi. Egypt panin na mite suatak a, amate mailam a nawk ciang minam dangte na notkeak hi." 
1Chronicles17:22 Israel mite a tawntungin nangma mi tu in na vawt zo a, nangma Topa in amate ii Pathian na suak zo hi." 
1Chronicles17:23 “Tuaciang tu in, Topa awng, kei le ka suan ka paalte nong piak kamciamna sia a tawntung atu in hong taangtungsak ta'n a, ka seam tu na ci te seam in." 
1Chronicles17:24 Na minthanna sia lian tu a, mite in a tawntungin, ‘ Topa Vaanglianbelpa sia Israel ii Pathian hi,’ ci tu uh hi. Tuaciang nangma in ka kumpi khangngui sia hun theampo ah nong kepsak tu hi." 
1Chronicles17:25 Nang tungah hi thungetna hang takin kong ngen ngam hi, banghang ziam cile, nangma in kei na naseampa tungah hi teng nong pualaak zo a, ka suan ka paalte kumpi na suasak tu nong son zo hi." 
1Chronicles17:26 Topa awng, nang Pathian na hi a, hi a lamdang kamciamna nong pia zo hi." 
1Chronicles17:27 Na maipha a nga tawntung tu in ka suan le ka paalte thupha nong piaksak natu in kong ngen hi. Topa awng, nangma in amate thupha na pia zo a, na piak thupha a tawntungin kip tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Chronicles18:1 Hun tawmvei zawkciang David kumpipa in Philistine te sim kikin zo hi. Ama in amate ii a uk Gath khuapi le a kiim ah khuanote la hi. 
1Chronicles18:2 Moab te zongh zo a, a khutnuai suak in David tungah shia pia uh hi." 
1Chronicles18:3 Tua zawkciang David in Syria ngamsung Zobah ngam ukpa Hadadezer kumpipa sia Hamath ngam nai na ah sim hi. Banghang ziam cile ama in Eupharates ngunnaak sangah a om ngam sia uk tu hanciam hi. 
1Chronicles18:4 David in a siphu ngalleang tulkhat, siphu ngalkap 7,000 le lei ngalkap 20,000 man hi. Ama in leang zakhat kai tu siphu kisam za khe in a dangte theampo a peangbaisak siat hi." 
1Chronicles18:5 Damascus ah a om Syria te in Hadadezer kumpipa hu tu in a ngalkaphonpi a paisak ciang, David in simin, 22,000 thatlum hi." 
1Chronicles18:6 Tua zawkciang ama in amate ii ngam sungah ngalkap ngiaphualte saat a, amate a khutnuai suaksakin phiangshia piasak hi. Topa in David sia mun theampo ah zawna pia hi." 
1Chronicles18:7 Hadadezer ii uliante puak khamh ngaldalna lumte David in matsakin Jerusalem ah ciapui hi. 
1Chronicles18:8 Ama in Hadadezer ukna Tibhath le Kun khuapite panin taau tam mama zongh la hi. (Solomon in a khaksang ciang, tuate taw Biakinnpi atu kuang le beal te, khuam te le tuikuang vawt hi.)" 
1Chronicles18:9 David in Hadadezer ii ngalkaphonpi bup zo siat ci thu Hamath kumpipa Toi in za hi. 
1Chronicles18:10 Tua ahiciang David kumpipa muak tu le Toi ii tamvei mama a sim bul Hadadezer a zawna lungdamko tu in ama in a tapa Joram paisak hi. Joram in khamh, ngunn, le taau taw a kivawt letsongte David puak hi." 
1Chronicles18:11 Tua te sia David kumpipa in a zawthal ngamte — Edom, Moab, Ammon, Philistia le Amalek pan a laak ngunn le khamhte taw biakna ah zak tu in aap khawm hi." 
1Chronicles18:12 A nu Zeruiah ahi Abishai in Ci Kuam ah Edom te zo in 18,000 that hi." 
1Chronicles18:13 Ama in Edom ngamsung theampo ah ngalkap ngiaphualte saat in tua munah a teang mite David kumpipa khutnuai suak hi. Topa in David sia mun theampo ah ngalzosak hi. 
1Chronicles18:14 David in Israel ngam bup ukin, a mite a tawntungin a kilawm bang le thumaan thutang taw a kithupi vawt natu in vaihawmsak hi." 
1Chronicles18:15 Abishai ii suapui pa Joab sia ngalkaphonpi ukpa; Ahilud ii tapa Jehoshaphat sia thu theampo tepteena ukpa; 
1Chronicles18:16 Ahitub ii tapa Zadok le Abiathar ii tapa Ahimelech te in thiampi; Seraiah in zum thuzeakpi; 
1Chronicles18:17 Jehoiada ii tapa Benaiah sia David a cingte ukpa; tuaciang David kumpipa tapate in a kumpi sepna sungah a za lian te ahi uh hi. 
1Chronicles19:1 Tawmvei zawkciang Ammon kumpipa Nahash thi in, a tapa Hanun kumpi suak hi." 
1Chronicles19:2 David kumpipa in, “A pa Nahash in kei tungah thumaan kilawmtatna hong nei bangin Hanun tungah ka vawt kik tu hi,” ci hi. Tua hi a David in a khuangaipuina thu lak tu in kamtaite paisak hi. Amate Ammon ngam thengin Hanun kumpipa kungah a pai uh ciang" 
1Chronicles19:3 Ammon lampuite in kumpipa tungah, “Nang khuangai puina hong lak tu in, David in hi kamtaite hong paisak sia na pa a zatak hang hi tu in na um ziam? Hi ngawl het hi! Ama in hong zawthal thei natu in ngamsung en kawkoai tu in ngalvilte hi sungah hong paisak hi,” ci uh hi." 
1Chronicles19:4 David ii kamtaite Hanun in manin, a khamul meetsakin a puante a ngoaibul ciang a tansak zawkciang tha kik hi." 
1Chronicles19:5 Amate inn a zot tu a maizum mama uh hi. Tua thu David in a zaak ciang, amate a khamul sau kik dong cia ngawlin Jericho ah a taam natu in kam vaitha hi." 
1Chronicles19:6 Amate in David sia a ngal a suasak hunlam Hanun kumpipa le Ammon te in a tel uh ciang Mesopotamia tungnung le Syria ngam Maacah le Zobah te pan siphu ngalleangte le siphu ngalleang ukte cial natu in ngunn kilogramme 34,000 pia uh hi." 
1Chronicles19:7 A cial siphu ngalleang 32,000 te le Maacah kumpipa ngalkaphonpi pai in Medeba khua hui ah ngiaphual saat uh hi. Ammon mite zongh a khuapi theampo pan pai tekin ngalsim tu in kinging uh hi." 
1Chronicles19:8 Tua thu David in a zaak ciang Joab le a ngalkaphonpi bup paisak hi. 
1Chronicles19:9 Ammon mite hong kuanin amate khuapi ahi Rabbah khua suazoai ah panmun la in amate hu tu in hong pai kumpite in ngam taanzauna ah panmun la uh hi. 
1Chronicles19:10 Joab in a ngalte in maisang le nungsang panin hong sim nuam hi ci a mu ciang Israel ngalkap phabel teng tealin Syria te maingat in panmun lasak hi. 
1Chronicles19:11 Ama in a ngalkap om lai teng a suapuipa Abishai lampuisak a Ammon te maingat in panmun lasak hi. 
1Chronicles19:12 Joab in ama tungah, “Syria te in kei hong zaw nong mu le hong pai in hong hu ta'n a, Ammon te in nang hong zo le pai in kong hu tu hi." 
1Chronicles19:13 Thahat in a, hang in! Ih mipuite atu le ih Pathian ii khuapite atu in nasia takin ngal ih do tu hi. Topa deina bang hi tahen,” ci hi." 
1Chronicles19:14 Joab le a mite in sim tu in a manaw uh ciang Syria te taimang uh hi. 
1Chronicles19:15 Ammon te in Syria te a taimang a mu uh ciang amate zongh Abishai kung pan tai in khuapi sungah nungkin uh hi. Tua zawkciang Joab Jerusalem ah cia kik hi. 
1Chronicles19:16 Israel te ii zaw hunlam Syria te in a heak uh ciang Euphrates ngun nisuana sang Syria ngamte pan ngalkapte keng in, Zobah ngam uk Hadadezer kumpipa ii ngalkaphonpi a uk Shobach khutnuai ah koi hi." 
1Chronicles19:17 Tua thu David in a zaak ciang Israel ngalkapte khawmtua a, Jordan ngun kaanin Syria ngalkapte maingat in panmun la uh hi. A kisim uh ciangin," 
1Chronicles19:18 Israel te in Syria ngalkaphonpi not kik uh hi. David le a mite in Syria siphu ngalleang hawlte 7,000 le lei ngalkap 40,000 that uh hi. Amate in Syria ngalkapmang Shobach zongh that uh hi." 
1Chronicles19:19 Hadadezer kumpipa khutnuai a om kumpite in Israel ii amate a zaw hunlam a heak uh ciang David taw kilemna vawt in, David khutnuai mi suak uh hi. Syria te in Ammon mite hu kik nuam ngeingawl uh hi." 
1Chronicles20:1 Kumpite ii ngalsim hun veu ahi khuakhaal hun a thet kik ciang Joab in ngalkaphonpi lampui in Ammon ngam sim uh hi; ahizong David kumpipa sia Jerusalem ah om hi. Amate in Rabbah khuapi uumci in sim a, lalcipsak hi." 
1Chronicles20:2 Ammon te biak milim Molech in kilogramme 34 bang a ngit khamh kumpilukhu khat nei hi. Tua ii sungah suangmanpha khat om a, tuasia David in la in ama kumpilukhu tungah suang hi. Ama in khuapi sung pan vanh a laakte honpi khat zongh ciapui hi." 
1Chronicles20:3 Ama in khuapi sung mite paipui in thingatnam, thik tumanh, le heite taw na seamsak hi. Ammon ngam khua dangte theampo ah a om mite zong tuabang ma in seamsak hi. Tua zawkciang ama le a mite Jerusalem ah heak kik uh hi." 
1Chronicles20:4 Tawmvei zawkciang Philistine te taw Gezer ah ngal kidona om kik hi. Tua tungin Hushah pan Sibbecai in a thatang lian Sippai a kici pa thatin, Philistine te zo hi." 
1Chronicles20:5 Philistine te taw ngal kisimna dangkhat om kik in, Jair ii tapa Elhanan in Gath pan Goliath suapuipa Lahmi that hi. Lahmi ii a tei sia thiamtana pumlawng cia saa hi." 
1Chronicles20:6 Gath ah khatvei ma ngal kisimna khat om in, tua khua sungah a khut te nii ah khutme luk veve, a peang te nii ah peangme luk veve a nei thatang lian khat om hi. Ama sia nidang lai in mihing thatang liante suan khat hi." 
1Chronicles20:7 Tua pa in Israel te nalh ahikom David ii suapuipa Shammah ii tapa Jonathan in thatlum hi. 
1Chronicles20:8 David le a mite ii a thalup hi mihing thumte sia Gath khua ah a om thatang liante ii suan le paalte ahi uh hi. 
1Chronicles21:1 Satan in Israel mite tungah ngimna thengsak nuam ahikom ama in David sia mi simna vawt tu in khensatsak hi. 
1Chronicles21:2 David in Joab le a ngalkapmang dangte tungah, “Israel ngam mong khat pan mong khat dong pai in mi phaza sim vun. Mihing bangza pha ziam he nuam khi hi,” ci hi." 
1Chronicles21:3 Joab in, “ Topa in Israel mite tu a zaa sangin a see zakhat in pungsak zaw tahen! Kumpipa awng, amate theampo nangma naseamte hi. Banghangin na minam bup mawpu tu in hi mi simna vawt nuam ni ziam?,” ci in zo hi." 
1Chronicles21:4 Ahihang kumpipa in Joab sia tua thupiakna nisak hi. Joab pai in Israel ngamsung buppi khualhaw a, tua zawkciang Jerusalem ah heak kik hi." 
1Chronicles21:5 Ama in David kumpipa tungah ngalkap seam thei pasal avekpi: Israel ah 1,100,000 le Judah ah 470,000 om hi ci in son hi." 
1Chronicles21:6 Joab in kumpipa ii thupiak lungkim ngawl ahiciang Levi le Benjamin namte ii mi simna vawt ngawl hi. 
1Chronicles21:7 Hi bang a kisepna sia Pathian lungkim ngawl ahiciang Israel te daan pia hi. 
1Chronicles21:8 David in Pathian tungah, “Hi bangin ka ngamtatna taw mawna a lauhuai mama khat vawt zo khi hi! Nong hesuakna in hong maisak ta'n. A mawmawthuai in ngamta zo khi hi,” ci hi." 
1Chronicles21:9 Tuaciang Topa in David ii kamsaangpa Gad tungah," 
1Chronicles21:10 “Va pai ta'n a, a teal tu in thu nam thum ka piak sia David tungah son ta'n. A teal bang pawpo vawt tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
1Chronicles21:11 Gad sia David kungah pai in Topa ii ci teng son a, “Koi sia na teal tu ziam?" 
1Chronicles21:12 Kum thum sung kial tung tu maw? Ahibuale tha thum sung na ngalte ii ngalkaphonpite mai pan tai tu maw? Ahibuale Topa in a namsau taw nang ni thum sung hong simin a vantunglalang zanghin Israel ngamsung theampo ah a kilaw thei natna hong puak a, thina hong tungsak tu maw? Topa tungah na zo na koisia son tu khi ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
1Chronicles21:13 David in Gad tungah, “Ka ci ka law he ngawl khi hi! Ahihang mihingte ii daan hong piak tu ka nuam bua hi. Kei daan hong pia tu sia Topa ama ma hi tahen, banghang ziam cile ama hesuakna thin nei hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
1Chronicles21:14 Tua ahikom Topa in Israel mite tungah a kilaw thei natna tungsakin amate sung pan 70,000 thi hi." 
1Chronicles21:15 Topa in Jerusalem susia tu in vantunglalang khat paisak a, ahihang a thin kheal kikin vantunglalang tungah, “Tawlnga in! Tu a za pha zo hi!” ci hi. Vantunglalang sia Jebus mi Araunah ii ancilna hui ah ding nginge hi." 
1Chronicles21:16 Jerusalem susia tu in a kithoai, a khut sungah namsau a toai vantunglalang sia vui sungah a ding David in mu hi. Tuaciang David le Israel lampuite — a vekpi khau-ip puan silh siatin — a mai lei pha dongin kunsuk uh hi." 
1Chronicles21:17 David in, “Pathian awng, a khial sia keima khi hi. Misim natu thu a pia sia keima khi hi. Hi mizawngte in bang vawt nei na ziam? Topa ka Pathian awng, keima le ka innkuanpuite daan hong pia ta'n a, na mite khoaikhe in,” ci in thungen hi." 
1Chronicles21:18 Topa vantunglalang in Gad tungah, Topa atu in Araunah ii ancilna munah, David paisak in biaknatau khat a sak natu thupia in." 
1Chronicles21:19 Gad ii son bangma Topa thupiak mang in David pai hi. 
1Chronicles21:20 Ancilna munah Araunah le a tapa li teng zungtaang cil in a om laitak hi a, vantunglalang a mu ciang a tapate tai in buu uh hi." 
1Chronicles21:21 Araunah in David kumpipa ama sang zuanin hong pai a mu poma ciang a ancilna mun nusia in a mai lei a phak dongin kun hi. 
1Chronicles21:22 David in ama tungah, “Natna kilaw thei sia a theau natu Topa atu biaknatau khat ka sak thei natu na ancilna mun hong zuak ta'n. Tua ahibuale a kilaw thei pulnatna thai ngawl tu hi. A man sia a cing in nangma hong pia tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
1Chronicles21:23 Araunah in, “Kumpipa awng, tuasia la in a, na dei bang po in zangh in. Biaknatau tungah biakpiakna in a hal tu khuitalte hi sungah om hi; thingthu tu in ancilna ah a kidaw suatte om a, biakpiak natu in zungtaangte om hi. A vekpi in nang kong pia hi,” ci hi." 
1Chronicles21:24 Ahizong kumpipa in, “Hi ngawl hi, a man a cingin hong pia tu khi hi. Topa biakpiakna in nangma neisa khat pawpo zangh ngawl tu khi hi, a man ka piak ngawl khat peuma hi ngawl tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
1Chronicles21:25 Tuaciang ama in ancilna mun atu in khamh dangkatang 600 Araunah tungah pia hi. 
1Chronicles21:26 Ama in tua munah Topa atu in biaknatau khat sa in meihal biakpiakna le kipawlkhop biakpiakna pia hi. Ama in thungen a, Topa in a thungetna saang ahikom biaknatau tungah biakpiaknate a kaanghsak tu in vantung pan meikuang khiaksuk hi." 
1Chronicles21:27 Topa in a vantunglalang tungah a namsau sot kikin sawl ahikom vantunglalang in a thu ni hi. 
1Chronicles21:28 Tua thu David in a mu ciang Topa in ka thungetna hong saang hi ci in tel ahikom ama in Araunah ii ancilna mun biaknatau tungah sangaw biakpiakna pia hi. 
1Chronicles21:29 Moses ii duisung ngampa sungah a sak Topa ompuina Puanbuk le sangaw biakpiaknate a halna biaknatau te sia tua a biakna mun Gibeon ah tu hun zong om lai hi; 
1Chronicles21:30 ahihang David sia Topa bia tu in tua munah pai thei ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile Topa vantunglalang ii namsau kiita hi." 
1Chronicles22:1 Tua ahiciang David in, “Hi mun sia Topa Pathian Biakinnpi om natu mun hi. Hi lai ah Israel mite ii meihal biakpiaknate a piak natu biaknatau om hi,” ci hi." 
1Chronicles22:2 David kumpipa in Israel ngam sungah a teang ngamdangmite theampo a kikhoptua natu thupia in na seamsak hi. Amate pawlkhat in Biakinnpi sak natu in suang king neite vawtkhol uh hi. 
1Chronicles22:3 Ama in thikpim le thing kongkhapi te letnate vawt natu in a piak thik tam mama zo a, tuaciang taau a piak zongh tam leih ahikom kuama in toaitee zo ngawl hi." 
1Chronicles22:4 Ama in Tyre le Sidon mite sia ama atu in Cedar thingluang tam mama puaksak hi. 
1Chronicles22:5 David in, “Ka tapa Solomon ii a sak tu Biakinnpi sia nasia mama tu a, leitung ah a minthang hi tu hi. Ahihang ama moi lai a, bangma seam ngeingawl lai ahikom keima in ka kingin kholsak kul tu hi,” ci in ngaisun hi. Tua ahikom David in a thi ma in vanh tam mama nga khol zo hi." 
1Chronicles22:6 David in a tapa Solomon samin Topa, Israel te ii Pathian biakinn khat sa tu in thupia hi." 
1Chronicles22:7 David in ama tungah, “Ka tapa awng, Topa, ka Pathian patoai natu in biakinn khat sa nuam khi hi." 
1Chronicles22:8 Ahihang Topa in ngal tam mama simin mihing tam mama that zo ni hi, hong ci hi. Tuabangin chi ka luansakte theampo hu in ama atu in biakinn hong sasak ngawl hi." 
1Chronicles22:9 Ahitazong ama in kamciam khat hong pia hi. Ama in, ‘Tapa khat na nei tu a tua na tapa in kilemna taw ngam uk tu hi, banghang ziam cile a ngalte theampo taw ngal kilemna ama ka pia tu hi. Ama min sia Solomon hi tu hi, banghang ziam cile ama kumpi maan hun sung tengin Israel ngam sungah kilemna le ngammuanna ka pia tu hi." 
1Chronicles22:10 Ama in keima atu in biakinn khat sa tu hi. Ama sia ka tapa hi tu a keima a pa ka hi tu hi. Ama kumpi khangngui zui in Israel ngam a tawntungin uk tu hi,’ ” ci hi." 
1Chronicles22:11 David in a kampau zomin, “Tu in ka tapa awng, Topa na Pathian sia nang taw omkhawm tahen, ama atu in biakinn khat na sak zawk natu in ama in a kamciam taangtungsak tahen." 
1Chronicles22:12 Israel ngam sia ama Thukham bangin na uk thei natu in Topa na Pathian in a thuk mu tel theina le ciimna hong pia tahen. 
1Chronicles22:13 Topa ii Israel te atu in Moses tungah a piak thukhamte theampo na zui le zawna nga tu ni hi. Citakin kimuang in a, bangma in patausak heak in." 
1Chronicles22:14 Biakinnpi taw kisai in ka hanciamna taw Biakinnpi sakna ah zak tu in khamh tann 34,000 vaal le ngunn tann 34,000 vaal ka khol zo hi. Tua dom ngawlin taau le thik a kiciangtan om ngawl za dongin om hi. Kei zongh in thing le suangte khol zo khi hi, ahizong na belap kul tu hi." 
1Chronicles22:15 Naseam mi tam mama nei ni hi. Suangkhuk ah naseamte, suangciangte, lettama te, tuaciang khut thiamna tuatuam a nei," 
1Chronicles22:16 khamh, ngunn, taau le thik taw nasep a thiam zongh tam mama om hi. Tu in nasep kipan in a, Topa in hong ompui tahen,” ci hi." 
1Chronicles22:17 David in Solomon hu tu in Israel lampui theampo thupia hi. 
1Chronicles22:18 Ama in, “ Topa na Pathian sia nang taw omkhawm zo a, na kiim na paam theampo ah kilemna hong pia zo hi. Ama in keima sia ih ngam ah a teang ngei mite theampo hong zosak siat zo a, tu in amate sia nangma le Topa khutnuai ah om uh hi." 
1Chronicles22:19 Tu in na thinsung theampo le na thaa theampo taw Topa na Pathian na seam in. Topa Thuciamna Thingkuang le ama biakna ah a kizangh vanh thiangtho dangte theampo a sungah na koi thei natu in tua Biakinnpi sak kipan in,” ci hi." 
1Chronicles23:1 David a huai mama ciang ama in a tapa Solomon Israel kumpi suaksak hi. 
1Chronicles23:2 David kumpipa in Israel lampuite theampo le thiampite le Levi te theampo kaikhawm hi. 
1Chronicles23:3 Ama in Levi mi pasal kum 30 le a tungsia theampo mi simna vawt hi. A vekpi in 38,000 pha hi." 
1Chronicles23:4 Kumpipa in 24,000 sia Biakinnpi nasep uk tu in koi a, 6,000 sia thu tepteena laibu keam tu le thukhen tu in koi hi," 
1Chronicles23:5 4,000 in kongkha cingsak a, a dang 4,000 in kumpipa ii Topa pok natu a piak music vanhte zangh uh hi." 
1Chronicles23:6 David in Levi te sia amate bee le phung zui in pawl thum in khen a: Gershon, Kohath, le Merarite ahi hi." 
1Chronicles23:7 Gershon in tapa nii nei a: Ladan le Shimei te hi. 
1Chronicles23:8 Ladan in tapa thum nei a: Jehiel, Zetham le Joel te hi a," 
1Chronicles23:8 Ladan in tapa thum nei a: Jehiel, Zetham le Joel te hi a," 
1Chronicles23:9 Ladan ii suan bee le phung lampuite veu hi. (Shimei in tapa thum nei a: Shelomoth, Haziel, le Haran te hi.)" 
1Chronicles23:10 Shimei in tapa li nei a: a piankum zui in Jahath, Zina, Jeush, le Beriah te hi. Jeush le Beriah in suan le paal tam nei ngawl ahikom amate sia bee le phung khat in kisim hi." 
1Chronicles23:11  
1Chronicles23:12 Kohath in tapa li nei a: Amram, Izhar, Hebron, le Uzziel te hi." 
1Chronicles23:13 A tapa lianbel Amram sia Aaron le Moses ii pa hi. (Aaron le ama suan le paalte sia biakna vanh thiangthote a keam tawntung tu, Topa a biak uh ciang paaknamtui hal tu, ama naseam tu le ama min taw mite thupha pia tu in kikoituam hi." 
1Chronicles23:14 Ahizong Pathian mihing Moses ii tapate sia Levi te sungah kihel hi.) 
1Chronicles23:15 Moses in tapa nii nei a, Gershom le Eliezer te hi." 
1Chronicles23:16 Gershon ii tapate sungah a lampuipa sia Shebuel hi. 
1Chronicles23:17 Eliezer in tapa Rehabiah bek nei a, ahizong Rehabiah in suan le paal tam mama nei hi." 
1Chronicles23:18 Kohath ii tapa niina, Izhar in tapa khat Shelomith nei a, bee le phung lutang hi." 
1Chronicles23:19 Kohath ii tapa thumna, Hebron in tapa li nei a: Jeriah, Amariah, Jahaziel, le Jekameam te hi." 
1Chronicles23:20 Kohath ii tapa lina, Uzziel in tapa nii nei a, Micah le Isshiah te ahi hi." 
1Chronicles23:20 Kohath ii tapa lina, Uzziel in tapa nii nei a, Micah le Isshiah te ahi hi." 
1Chronicles23:21 Merari in tapa nii nei a, Mahli le Mushi te hi. Mahli zongh in tapa nii nei a, Eleazar le Kish te hi," 
1Chronicles23:22 ahizong Eleazar sia tanu bek nei a, tapa nei ngawlin thi hi. A tanute in a suapui sealhte ahi Kish ii tapate teenpui hi." 
1Chronicles23:23 Merari ii tapa niina, Mushi in tapa thum nei a: Mahli, Eder, le Jeremoth te hi." 
1Chronicles23:24 Hite sia Levi suan le paal hi a, a bee le phung le a innkuan zui in mi sim a min taw a kiciamtee te hi. Ama suan le paalte kum kul le a tungsia khat simin Topa Biakinnpi sungah nasep hawmna khat tek nei hi." 
1Chronicles23:25 David in, “Israel ii Topa Pathian in a mite tungah kilemna pia zo a, ama mama a tawntungin Jerusalem ah teang tu hi." 
1Chronicles23:26 Tua ahikom Topa ompuina Puanbuk le biakna ah a kizangh vanhte theampo Levi mite in puak kul nawn ngawl hi,” ci hi." 
1Chronicles23:27 David ii a khakbel a thupiakna doppha in amate kum kul a cin ciang naseam tu in a min kiciamtee hi," 
1Chronicles23:28 tuaciang amate a nuai a bangin vaipuak kisee hi: Aaron ii suan le paal thiampite ii biakinn ah biakna vawt a hu tu, suum sung teng le a inndoite keamcing tu, le biakna vanh thiangthote theampo ninsak ngawl tu;" 
1Chronicles23:29 Pathian tungah a kipia anluum, biakpiakna in a kizangh zungtaang vuite, tol kisaw ngawl muhpheangte, a ki em biakpiak nate, olive thau a kihel zungtaang vuite; biakinn ah a kipia vanhte toaikhai tu le teesak tu;" 
1Chronicles23:30 zing sim nitak simin Topa pok tu le a min thansak tu; 
1Chronicles23:31 tuaciang Topa tungah biakpiaknate Sabbath ni, Thadet Poai le poai dangte ah a kihal simin Topa pok tu le ama min thansak tu ahi hi. Hun simin hi nasep a seam tu Levi mi phaza a see na in a zui tu ngeina te kivawt hi. Hun theampo ah Topa biak natu vaipuak sia Levi te kiseesiat hi." 
1Chronicles23:32 Amate sia Topa ompuina Puanbuk le Biakinnpi kepcing tu le biakinn biakpiakna sungah a mealheakte ahi Aaron suan thiampite hu tu in nasep kipia hi. 
1Chronicles24:1 Aaron suan le paalte sia hi bangin a pawlin kikhen hi. Aaron in tapa li nei a: Nadab, Abihu, Eleazar, le Ithamar te hi." 
1Chronicles24:2 Nadab le Abihu sia a pa thi ma in thi a, suan le paal nei ngawl ahikom a suapuite Eleazar le Ithamar thiampi suak hi." 
1Chronicles24:3 David kumpipa in Aaron suan le paalte sia amate nasep taw kizui in a pawlin khen hi. Hi nasep khenna ah ama sia Eleazar ii suan Zadok le Ithamar ii suan Ahimelech in hu hi. 
1Chronicles24:4 Eleazar ii suan le paalte sia pawl sawm le pawl luk in kikhen a, Ithamar ii suan le paalte sia pawl liat in kikhen hi; hi bangin a khen sia Eleazar ii suan le paalte sungah bangkua sim pan pasal tamzaw ahihang hi." 
1Chronicles24:5 Eleazar le Ithamar ii suan le paalte sungah biakinn uliante le thaa lamsang lampuite om ahikom lai meetang sawk in nasep hawm hi. 
1Chronicles24:6 Eleazar le Ithamar suan le paalte abaan abaan in lai meetang sawk hi. Tua zawkciang amate min sia Levi mi thuzeakpa, Nethanel tapa Shemaiah in lai taw ciamtee hi. Kumpipa, a uliante, thiampi Zadok, Abiathar tapa Ahimelech, thiampi innkuante le Levi mi innkuante ii lutangte sia tetti te vive hi siat hi." 
1Chronicles24:7 Hi sia innkuan pawl 24 te nasep kipiakna hi a: 
1Chronicles24:8  1. Jehoiarib 2. Jedaiah 3. Harim 4. Seorim 5. Malchijah 6. Mijamin 7. Hakkoz 8. Abijah 9. Jeshua 10. Shecaniah 11. Eliashib 12. Jakim 13. Huppah 14. Jeshebeab 15. Bilgah 16. Immer 17. Hezir 18. Happizzez 19. Pethahiah 20. Jehezkel 21. Jachin 22. Gamul 23. Delaiah 24. Maaziah te ahi hi. 
1Chronicles24:9 Hi mite sia Israel te Topa Pathian ii thupiak a zui na in a taanghpupi Aaron ii nasep tuatuam a omsak na bang in Biakinnpi ah pai tu le vaipuakte a sep natu a kisee na zui in a min uh kiciamtee hi. 
1Chronicles24:10 Hite sia Levi suan innkuan dangte ii lutangte hi a: Shebuel panin Amram ii suan Jehdeiah; 
1Chronicles24:11 Rehabiah ii suan Isshiah; 
1Chronicles24:12 Shelomith panin Izhar ii suan Jahath; 
1Chronicles24:13 Hebron tapate sung pan a piankum zui in Jeriah, Amariah, Jehaziel, le Jekameam;" 
1Chronicles24:14 Micah panin Uzziel ii suan Shamir; 
1Chronicles24:14 Micah panin Uzziel ii suan Shamir; 
1Chronicles24:15 Micah suapuipa Isshiah panin Uzziel suan Zechariah; 
1Chronicles24:15 Micah suapuipa Isshiah panin Uzziel suan Zechariah; 
1Chronicles24:15 Micah suapuipa Isshiah panin Uzziel suan Zechariah; 
1Chronicles24:16 Merari suan le paalte ahi Mahli, Mushi, le Jaaziah te ahi hi." 
1Chronicles24:17 Jaaziah in tapa thum nei a: Shoham, Zaccur le Ibri te ahi hi." 
1Chronicles24:18 Mahli in tapa nii Eleazar le Kish nei hi. Eleazar in tapa nei ngawl ahihang Kish in tapa khat, Jerahmeel nei hi." 
1Chronicles24:19  
1Chronicles24:20 Mushi in tapa thum nei a: Mahli, Eder, le Jeremoth te ahi hi. Hiteng sia Levi te ii innkuante hi." 
1Chronicles24:21 A mealheakte, Aaron suan thiampite ii a vawt bangma in naseam tu a see ciang innkuan sim pabel le a nau pate khat in lai meetang sawk hi. David kumpipa, Zadok, Ahimelech, tuaciang thiampi te le Levi te ii innkuan pabelte sia a tetti te ahi hi." 
1Chronicles25:1 David kumpipa le Levi lampuite in a nuai a Levi bee le phungte sia biakna lampui tu in teal a: Asaph, Heman, le Jeduthun te ahi hi. Amate sia tengtongh le daalkopsai tumna taw thua in Pathian thu thangsak tute ahi hi. Hi sia in a pawl sim ii biakna vawtzia zui a, lampui tu in a kiteal mihingte min tepteena ahi hi:" 
1Chronicles25:2 Asaph tapa li teng: Zaccur, Joseph, Nethaniah, le Asharelah te ahi hi. Amate sia Asaph khutnuai hi a, ama sia kumpipa ii thupiak simin Pathian thu a thangsak pa hi." 
1Chronicles25:3 Jeduthun ii tapa luk teng: Gedaliah, Zeri, Jeshaiah, Shimei, Hashabiah, le Mattithiah te ahi hi. A pa sawl bangin amate in tengtongh te tum kawmin Pathian thu thangsak a, Topa tungah pokna le lungdamkona lasak uh hi." 
1Chronicles25:4 Heman tapa sawm le li teng: Bukkiah, Mattaniah, Uzziel, Shebuel; Jerimoth, Hananiah, Hanani, Eliathah, Giddalti, Romamti Ezer, Joshbekashah, Mallothi, Hothir, le Mahazioth te ahi hi." 
1Chronicles25:5 Pathian in a kamciamsa om bangin kumpipa ii kamsaangpa Heman tungah vaang a piakna in hi tapa sawm le li, le tanu thum te zongh pia hi." 
1Chronicles25:6 Biakinn biak kikhopna ah a pa sawl bangin lampui in a tapate theampo in tengtongh le daalkopsai te tum uh hi. Asaph, Jeduthun, le Heman te sia kumpipa thupiak bangin ngamta uh hi." 
1Chronicles25:7 Hi pasal 24 sia a vekpi in music vai a thiam mamate ahi hi; tuaciang a nasep pui Levi te sia music sinsa te veu hi. A vekpi in pasal 288 pha hi. 
1Chronicles25:8 Nasep a kisee ciang khangmoi ahizong, khanghaam ahizong, a thiam sate ahibuale, a sin tuungte ahizong a vekpi in lai meetang sawk tek hi." 
1Chronicles26:1 Hite sia biakinn a cing Levi te ii nasep kiseena ahi hi. Korah bee le phung panin Asaph innkuanpui Kore tapa Meshelemiah om hi. 
1Chronicles26:2 Ama in tapa sali nei a, a piankum zui in: Zechariah, Jediael, Zebadiah, Jathniel," 
1Chronicles26:2 Ama in tapa sali nei a, a piankum zui in: Zechariah, Jediael, Zebadiah, Jathniel," 
1Chronicles26:3 Elam, Jehohanan, le Eliehoenai te ahi hi." 
1Chronicles26:4 Tapa liat piakna taw Pathian ii thupha a piak Obed Edom zongh om a, tua a tapate sia a piankum zui in: Shemaiah, Jehozabad, Joah, Sachar, Nethanel," 
1Chronicles26:5 Ammiel, Issachar, le Peullethai te ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles26:6 Obed Edom ii tapa lianbel Shemaiah in tapa luk nei a: Othni, Rephael, Obed, Elzabad, Elihu, le Semachiah te ahi hi. Amate sia thiamna lian a nei uh hu in a bee le phung sungah mihing thupite ahi hi; a khakte nii sia thiam tuan hi." 
1Chronicles26:7  
1Chronicles26:8 Hi nasepna ah Obed Edom innkuan in a thiam mama sa mihing a vekpi in 62 pia hi. 
1Chronicles26:9 Meshelemiah ii innkuan in a thiamsa mihing sawm le liat pia hi. 
1Chronicles26:10 Merari bee le phung pan Hosah om in, ama in tapa li nei a: Shimri (a tapa lianbel ahi ngawl hang a pa in lampui pia hi)," 
1Chronicles26:11 Hilkiah, Tebaliah, le Zechariah te ahi hi. Hosah innkuan sung pan biakinn cingte sia a vekpi in sawm le thum pha hi." 
1Chronicles26:11 Hilkiah, Tebaliah, le Zechariah te ahi hi. Hosah innkuan sung pan biakinn cingte sia a vekpi in sawm le thum pha hi." 
1Chronicles26:12 Levi dangte bangma in biakinn cingte sia innkuan zui in a pawlin kikhen a, Biakinnpi nasep kisee hi." 
1Chronicles26:13 Kongpi koisia akua in cing tu cisia innkuan tam le tawm ci tuan ngawlin innkuan simin lai meetang sawk hi. 
1Chronicles26:14 Shelemiah in nisuana sang kongpi, tuaciang ngual tungah ngaisutna pha a pia tawntung a tapa Zechariah in saksang kongpi nga hi." 
1Chronicles26:14 Shelemiah in nisuana sang kongpi, tuaciang ngual tungah ngaisutna pha a pia tawntung a tapa Zechariah in saksang kongpi nga hi." 
1Chronicles26:15 Obed Edom sia thangsang kongpi, tuaciang a tapate sia vanh kholna inndoite kicingsak hi." 
1Chronicles26:16 Shuppim le Hosah te sia nitumna sang kongpi le lam tungnung ah a om Shallecheth Kongpite kicingsak hi. Kong cin vaipuak sia a hun a hun in kisee hi. 
1Chronicles26:17 Nisuana sangah ni simin kongcing luk, saksang ah li, tuaciang thangsang ah li kisee hi. Vanh kholna inndoite sia ni sim a cing li kikoi a, inndoi khat mihing nii veu in cing hi." 
1Chronicles26:18 Nitumna sang a om vanh kholna inndoi nai lampi hui ah a cing li om a, inncing tatak sia nii om hi." 
1Chronicles26:19 Hisia Korah le Merari bee le phung te ii kongcing nasep kiseena ahi hi. 
1Chronicles26:20 A Levi mipui dangte in biakinn sum kholna le Pathian tungah a ki aap letsongte koina inndoite uk hi. 
1Chronicles26:21 Gershon tapate khat ahi Ladan sia innkuan pawl tam mama te ii taanghpupi hi a, a tapa Jehiel ii innkuan zongh kihel hi." 
1Chronicles26:22 Ladan tapa dangte nii ahi Zetham le Joel sia biakinn sum kholna le vanh kholna inndoite uk hi. 
1Chronicles26:22 Ladan tapa dangte nii ahi Zetham le Joel sia biakinn sum kholna le vanh kholna inndoite uk hi. 
1Chronicles26:23 Amram, Izhar, Hebron, le Uzziel ii suan le paalte tung zongh ah nasepte kisee hi." 
1Chronicles26:24 Moses tapa Gershom bee le phung pan Shebuel sia biakinn sum kholna a sai ulianbel hi. 
1Chronicles26:25 Gershom ii suapui Eliezer taw kisai in ama sia Shelomith taw kimealhe hi. Eliezer sia Jeshiah ii pa ahi Rehabiah ii pa, Joram ii pa, Zichri ii pa, Shelomith ii pa hi." 
1Chronicles26:26 Shelomith le a innkuanpuite in Pathian tungah David kumpipa, bangkua pabelte, bee le phungte ii lampuite le ngalkap bute ii a aaptuam letsongte theampo keamcing hi." 
1Chronicles26:27 Amate in ngalsimna pan a laaksak vanhte pawlkhat la in Biakinnpi ah zak tu in aaptuam uh hi. 
1Chronicles26:28 Shelomith le a innkuan sia Biakinnpi sung zak tu in a ki aaptuam hi vanhte theampo a saipa hi in, tua ii sungah kamsaang Samuel, Saul kumpipa, Ner tapa Abner, le Zeruiah tapa Joab te ii a puak letsongte zongh kihel hi." 
1Chronicles26:29 Izhar ih suan le paalte sung pan Chenaniah le a tapate sia ki ukna nasepte kisee a: thu tepteena laibute kepcingna le Israel mite thu kineinate ah thukhensak nasepte ahi hi. 
1Chronicles26:30 Hebron ii suan le paalte sung pan Hashabiah le a mealheak a kikhai tuam pasal 1,700 te sia Jordan ngun nitumna sang Israel ngam ah biakna paaina vai theampo le mipite ii vai theampo ki ukna ah a vaihawmte ahi hi." 
1Chronicles26:31 Jeriah sia Hebron suan le paalte lampuipa hi. David ii kumpi a sep zawk a kum 40 kum in Hebron ii suan le paal innkuan khangngui a kikat ciang hi innkuan sung pan ngalkap mindok pawlkhat Gilead ngam Jazer khua ah a teen sia kihe hi. 
1Chronicles26:32 David kumpipa in Jeriah mealheakte sung pan a mindok innkuan pabel 2,700 teal a, Jordan ngun nisuana sang Israel ngam — Reuben ngam, Gad ngam le Manasseh nisuana ngam sungah biakna paaina vai le mipite ii vai theampo uksak hi." 
1Chronicles27:1 Hisia in, kumpi ngam atu nasepna a uk Israel innkuan lutangte le bee le phung lampuite, tuaciang kumpi ngamsung nasep a uk uliante min tepteena hi. Kumkhat sungah tha khat simin pawl tuatuam nasep kilaih a, pawlkhat ah pasal 24,000 in tua tha khat sung atu ngalkapmangpa ii khutnuai ah seam uh hi." 
1Chronicles28:1 David kumpipa in Israel ngamsung ulian theampo Jerusalem ah a kikhop natu in thupia hi. Tua ahikom a nam sim ii uliante, kumpi ngamsung nasep uk uliante, bee le phung lampuite, kumpipa le a tapate ii neisa vanhte le ngannote a cing a keamte theampo — a tatakin kumpi inn ah uliante, ngalkap lampuite le mihing thupi theampo — Jerusalem ah kikhawm uh hi." 
1Chronicles28:2 David in amate mai ah ding a, amate tungah, “Ka ngammite awng hong ngai tavun. Topa ih Pathian peang ngakna Thuciamna Thingkuang koi natu in a om tawntung tu inn kip khat sa nuam khi hi. Pathian patoaina in biakinn khat sa tu ka kinging zo hi," 
1Chronicles28:3 ahizong keima in ngalkap khat hi a, chisan tam mama ka luansak hu in Topa in tua sia ka sep tu hong khaam hi." 
1Chronicles28:4 Topa Israel te ii Pathian in Israel a uk tawntung tu in keima le ka suan ka paalte hong teal hi. Ama in a lampui tu in Judah nam teal a, Judah nam sung pan ka pa teal hi. Tua innkuan bup sung pan ama uuk bangin kei hong laa a, Israel ngam theampo a uk kumpi hong suaksak hi." 
1Chronicles28:5 Ama in tapa tam hong pia a tuate theampo sung pan Topa ii kumpi ngam Israel uk tu in Solomon teal hi. 
1Chronicles28:6 “ Topa in kei tungah, ‘Ka Biakinnpi a sa tu pa sia na tapa Solomon hi. Ama ka ta tu in ka teal zo a, keima a pa ka hi tu hi." 
1Chronicles28:7 Ka thukhamte le ka thupiakte theampo tu a, a zui bangin pha tak a zui zom le a kumpi ngam sia a tawntungin ka khomsuansak tu hi,’ hong ci hi." 
1Chronicles28:8 “Tua ahikom tu in ka mite awng, hi ngampha sia na nei tawntung thei natu le khang khat zawk khang khat a kizomin na nei suak thei natu, Topa ih Pathian ii thupiakte theampo pha takin na zui natu in ih Pathian mai le Topa ii mi, Israel mite theampo kikhopna ah thu kong pia hi,” ci hi." 
1Chronicles28:9 Tua ciang Solomon tungah ama in, “Ka tapa awng, na pa ii Pathian sia thusim in a, lungkaa ngawlin uuk tatakna taw ama na seam in. Ama in ih thinsung tawngh le ih ngaisutna theampo he siat hi. Ama kung na zuan le ama in nang hong saang tu a; na taisan le a tawntungin nang hong nungngat tu hi." 
1Chronicles28:10 Topa in ama Biakinnpi thiangtho a sa tu in nang hong teal zo ahi hunlam na tel kul hi. Tua nasep sia tu in seam in — citakna taw seam in,” ci hi." 
1Chronicles28:11 David in Solomon tungah biakinn saknate, vanh kholna inndoite, inndoi dangte theampo ngealna le mawmaisakna Thiangthobel Mun atu ngealnate pia hi." 
1Chronicles28:12 Ama ngaisut sate theampo ahi leitualte le a kiimkot ah a om inndoite, biakinn vanh le Topa tungah a ki aaptuam letsongte kholna inndoite atu ngealnate zongh pia hi." 
1Chronicles28:13 Thiampite le Levi te kikaikhawm in a vawt tu nasepte ahi Biakinnpi ah a nasep tute le biakinn vanh ankuang anbealte theampo kepthiam natu ngealnate zongh David in pia hi. 
1Chronicles28:14 Ama in kuang le bealte vawt natu in ngunn le khamh bangza zangh tu a," 
1Chronicles28:15 meiinn le a detna khuam khat sim atu," 
1Chronicles28:16 ngunn sabuaite le Pathian a kipia anluumte koina khamh sabuai khat sim atu in ngunn le khamh bangza zak kul tu ci in ngealnate pia hi. 
1Chronicles28:17 Ama in thikkeaukaate, kuangte le thawl ngong neite atu khamh ciitak bangza, pakante vawt natu in ngunn le khamh bangza kizangh tu," 
1Chronicles28:18 tuaciang ngimnamtui halna biaknatau le Topa Thuciamna Thingkuang tungah a thate phalin a om Cherubim tona leang vawt natu in khamh ciitak bangza kizangh tu cisia thupia hi. 
1Chronicles28:19 David kumpipa in, “Hiteng theampo sia Topa ama mama in ka sep ka vawt tu hong sawl na bang zui in a ki at sa ngealna sia sungah om hi,” ci hi." 
1Chronicles28:20 David kumpipa in a tapa Solomon tungah, “Kimuang in na thin takkha in. Nasep kipan in a, bangma in khaktansak heak in. A na ka sep Topa Pathian sia nang taw hong omkhawm tu hi. Ama in nang hong nusia ngawl tu a, ama Biakinnpi nasep teng na man dong nang taw hong omkhawm tu hi." 
1Chronicles28:21 Thiampite le Levi mite sia Biakinnpi sungah a nasep tute kiseesak zo hi. Thiamna namkim a nei naseamte sia nangma hong hu tu sia thalawp a, mite theampo le a lampuite sia nangma sawl babang seam tu in om uh hi,” ci hi." 
1Chronicles29:1 David kumpipa in a kikhawmte theampo tungah, “Ka tapa Solomon sia Pathian tealsa hi, ahihang ama sia khangmoi lai a, a heakna kisam lai hi. A nasep tu sia thupi mama hi banghang ziam cile mihing atu kumpi inn a sa hi ngawl a, Topa Pathian atu biakinn sa hi." 
1Chronicles29:2 Ka hi zawkza in Biakinnpi sak natu vanhte — khamh, ngunn, taau, thik, thing, suangmanphate le gem suangte, a zepna suangnamte le marble tam ma ka kinging zo hi." 
1Chronicles29:3 Hi ka kholsa vanhte bek dom ngawlin Pathian Biakinnpi atu ka deisak manin keima aituam neisa khamh le ngunn zongh ka pia hi. 
1Chronicles29:4 Biakinnpi pangte zep natu in khamh phabel tann zakhat vaal le ngunn ciitak tann zanii le sawmli dektak sia 
1Chronicles29:5 Nasep thiamte ii vawt tu nate theampo atu zongh ka pia zo hi. Tu in akua dang in Topa tungah ngotakin pia nuam lai nu ziam?” ci hi. 
1Chronicles29:6 Tuasia ciang bee le phung lutangte, minam uliante, ngalkaphonpi ukte le kumpi neisa vanh zeakte in" 
1Chronicles29:7 Biakinnpi sak natu in a nuai ah vanhte: khamh tann 170 vaal, ngunn tann 340 vaal, taau tann 620 dektak, le thik tann 3,400 vaal sia a uuk thu in pia uh hi." 
1Chronicles29:8 Suangmanpha neite in Gershon bee le phung pan Levi mi Jehiel ii a uk biakinn sum kholna ah pia tek hi. 
1Chronicles29:9 Mipite in lawpna taw tazata a tam vanhte Topa tungah a piak sia lungdam uh hi. David kumpipa zongh a lungdam peuma hi. 
1Chronicles29:10 David kumpipa in a kikhawm mihonpi bup mai ah Topa pok hi. Ama in, “Ka taanghpupi Jacob ii Topa Pathian awng, a tawntung a tawntungin nangma kipok tahen!" 
1Chronicles29:11 Nangma sia a lian, a vaanglian, a minthang, a lamdang le a tuanngen na hi hi. Leitung vantung ah a om theampo nangma aa hi a, nangma kumpi na hi a, tuate theampo a ukpipa na hi hi." 
1Chronicles29:12 Hauna le nei le lamh theampo nangma kung pan hong pai hi a; na vaangletna le na thahatna taw na theampo na uk hi; tuaciang kuama po a lian le a thahat na suaksak thei hi. 
1Chronicles29:13 Tu in ka Pathian awng ka lungdamnate kong ko uh a na minthang kong pok uh hi. 
1Chronicles29:14 “Ahitazong kei le ka mite in a tatakin bangma kong pia thei bua uh hi; banghang ziam cile na theampo nangma ii nong piakthong hi a, nangma aa tengma hong pia kik hi bek khu hi." 
1Chronicles29:15 Oh Topa, nong heak hi a, ka nuntakna uh sia ka taanghpupite bangma in, saltaangte le khualmite bangin ka nungta uh hi. Ka ni ka hunte sia hong kaantan limh khat bang hi a, thina pan ka suakta thei bua uh hi." 
1Chronicles29:16 Oh Topa, kote Pathian awng, na min thiangtho patoai natu biakinn khat sak natu in, hi nei le lamh theampo kong paipui tek uh hi; ahihang tuate theampo sia nangma kung pan hong paite veu hi a, a vekpi in nangma aa ahi hi." 
1Chronicles29:17 Mi theampo ii thinsung na ze et a, a citak mite tungah na lungkim hunlam ka he hi. Thumaanna le thinsung takpi taw keima uuk thu in hi teng theampo kong pia zo hi, tuaciang hi munah hong kikhawm na mite in nang kungah biakpiakna hong paipui tu sia bangza in lungdam ziam ci sia ka mu zo hi." 
1Chronicles29:18 Ka taanghpupite uh ahi Abraham, Isaac, le Jacob ii Topa Pathian awng, tuabang hong kipiakna sia nangma mite thinsung ah a tawntungin khosak in a, nangma tungah a thumaante ahi natu in keamcing tawntung in." 
1Chronicles29:19 Na thupiak theampo a zui zawk natu le hi bangin Biakinnpi a sak natu ka kinginkhol nate taw a sak nop natu in ka tapa Solomon thin le lung sungah uuk takpina hong piaksak ta'n,” ci hi." 
1Chronicles29:20 Tua zawkciang David in mipite tungah: “ Topa na Pathian pok vun!” ci in thupia hi. A kikhawm mihonpi bup in Topa a taanghpupite ii Pathian pok in, a lu uh kun in Topa zatakna pia uh a, kumpipa zongh upatna pia uh hi." 
1Chronicles29:21 A zing ciang amate in sangaw biakpiakna in ngannote ngo a Topa tungah aap hi, tua zawkciang, a neak tu in mipite pia uh hi. Tuaban ah amate in khuital tulkhat, tuutal tulkhat le, tuuno tulkhat te sia biaknatau tungah a pum bup in sangaw biakpiakna in hal uh hi. Amate in sapittui biakpiaknate zongh paipui uh hi." 
1Chronicles29:22 Tuabangin tua ni in amate sia Topa mai ah anne tuidawn in lungdam ngualnuam mama in om uh hi. Amate in Solomon sia kumpi in a nii veina in thangsak uh hi. Amate in Solomon sia a ukpa tu in Topa min taw sathau noai a, Zadok sia thiampi seamsak uh hi." 
1Chronicles29:23 Tuabangin Topa ii kipsak kumpi tokhum tungah a pa David za laih in Solomon to hi. Ama in a cialcing kumpipa khat hi a, Israel minam bup in a thu ni uh hi." 
1Chronicles29:24 Uliante le ngalkapte theampo, tuaciang David ii tapa dangte theampo ngawngawn in Solomon kumpipa tungah kong thumaan tu uh ci in kamciam pia uh hi." 
1Chronicles29:25 Solomon sia a ngam buppi in kiita in zakta a, Topa in Israel a uk kumpi dang a kuama po sangin a minthang zaw kumpi suaksak hi." 
1Chronicles29:26 Jesse tapa David in Israel ngam theampo sia," 
1Chronicles29:27 kum 40 sung uk hi. Ama in Hebron khua pan kum sali sung uk a, Jerusalem khua pan kum 33 sung uk hi." 
1Chronicles29:28 Ama hau in kizakta a, a khan haam mama zawkciang thi in, a tapa Solomon in a kumpiza laih hi." 
1Chronicles29:29 David kumpipa ii taanghthu sia a kipat pan a tawpna dongin kamsaang thumte ahi, Samuel, Nathan, le Gad ii taanghthu khumnate sungah kiciamtee hi." 
1Chronicles29:30 Tua tepteenate in a ngam ukzia, vaang a neizia sia ama tung, Israel tung le a kiim a paam kumpi ngamte tungah a piang thute theampo hong lak hi." 
2Chronicles1:1 David kumpipa ii tapa Solomon in Israel kumpi ngam a kho takin uk a, Topa a Pathian in ama thupha pia in a vaang liansak mama hi." 
2Chronicles1:2 Solomon kumpipa in a ngalkap tulkhat a uk le zakhat a uk ngalkapmangte theampo, kumpi naseam ulian theampo, innkuan lutangte theampo le a taanglai mite tungah," 
2Chronicles1:3 Gibeon khua biakna munah ama taw a pai khop natu thupia hi. Amate tua munah a pai uh hi, banghang ziam cile tua mun sia Topa naseampa Moses ii duisung ngampa ah a vawt Topa ompuina Puanbuk omna mun hi." 
2Chronicles1:4 (Thuciamna Thingkuang sia ahile David kumpipa ii Kiriath Jearim pan a laak lai in, Jerusalem khua ah a sak puanbuk khat sungah kikeam hi.)" 
2Chronicles1:5 Hur ii tupa, Uri ii tapa Bezalel ii taau taw a vawt biaknatau sia zongh Gibeon khua Topa ompuina Puanbuk mai ah om hi. Tua munah Solomon kumpipa le mipite theampo in Topa bia uh hi." 
2Chronicles1:6 Puanbuk mai ah tua biaknatau tungah kumpipa in sangaw biakpiaknate taw Topa bia a; nganno tulkhat ngosakin tuasia tungah a pum bup in haltum hi. 
2Chronicles1:7 Tua zanin Solomon kungah Pathian kilangh a, “Bang hong pia leng na uuk ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
2Chronicles1:8 Solomon in, “Ka pa David tungah itna lian na lak tawntung a, tuaciang tu in a kumpi za nong laihsak zo hi." 
2Chronicles1:9 Topa Pathian awng, ka pa tungah na kamciamte taangtungsak in. A kisim zo ngawl za dongin a tam mama mite tungah kumpi nong suaksak hi," 
2Chronicles1:10 tua ahikom amate ka uk natu in ka taangsap ciimna le heakna hong pia ta'n. Tua hi buathong le, hi za a tam na mipite koibang uk zo tu khi ziam?” ci in zo hi." 
2Chronicles1:11 Topa in Solomon tungah, “A maan sia na teal zo hi. Ka mite uk tu in nangma kumpi in kong teal zo a, tua ka mite na uk thei natu in nei le lamh, sum le vanh manpha, minthanna, na ngalte thi natu, nangma khansau natu nong nget taangin ciimna le heakna nong ngen zaw hi." 
2Chronicles1:12 Keima in ciimna le heakna nang kong pia tu hi. Tua bek dom ngawlin kumpi khat pawpo zongh ii a nei ngeingawl ahibuale a nei kik ngeingawl tu nei le lamh, sum le vanh manpha, le minthanna a tamzaw kong pia tu hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
2Chronicles1:13 Tua ahiciang Solomon in Topa ompuina Puanbuk omna ahi Gibeon khua biakna mun nusia in Jerusalem ah heak kik hi. Tua mun panin ama in Israel ngam uk hi. 
2Chronicles1:14 Ama in ngalsim natu in siphu ngalleang 1,400, siphu ngalkap 12,000 khawmtua hi. Tuate pawlkhat sia Jerusalem ah keam in, pawlkhat sia khuapi dang tuatuamte ah koi hi." 
2Chronicles1:15 Ama kumpi maan sungin Jerusalem ah ngunn le khamh sia suang bangma in tam a, Judah ngam ah cedar thingkung sia sycomore thingkung thawthong za in tam hi." 
2Chronicles1:16 Kumpipa atu taangmite in Musri le Cilicia pan ngamdang a puak siphu le 
2Chronicles1:17 Egypt pan ngamdang ah siphu ngalleangte puakna vai zeak uh hi. Amate in Hit te le Syria kumpite tungah siphute le siphu ngalleangte zuakin, siphu ngalleang khat ciang ngunn dangkatang 600 le siphu khat ciang ngunn dangkatang 150 taw veu in zuak uh hi." 
2Chronicles2:1 Solomon kumpipa in Topa biak natu biakinn khat le ama ii teen natu kumpi inn khat sak tu in khensat hi. 
2Chronicles2:2 Ama in vanhte a puak tu in mihing 70,000 le mualtung ngam ah suangkhuk to tu in mihing 80,000 koi hi. Nasepna a uk tu in mihing 3,600 om hi." 
2Chronicles2:3 Solomon in Tyre kumpipa Hiram tungah a vaithakna panin: “A kumpi inn sak natu in ka pa David kumpipa tungah cedar thingluangte na zuak bangma in kei taw zong na hong seam ta'n. 
2Chronicles2:4 Topa ka Pathian ka patoai natu in biakinn khat ka sak laitak hi. Tua mun sia mun thiangtho hi tu a, keima le ka mite in zing sim nitak sim, Sabbath ni zongh, Thadet Poaite le a dang ni thiangtho nite ah Topa ih Pathian patoaina in meihal biakpiakna mun hi tu a, tatsat ngawlin ama tungah anluum thiangtho piakna mun, hel namtui, ngimnamtui tuatuamte halna taw ama ka biana mun hi tu hi. Tusia a tawntungin vawt tu in Topa in Israel te thupia zo hi." 
2Chronicles2:5 Ih Pathian in pathian dang khat pawpo sangin lianzaw ahikom biakinn lian khat sak tu ka sawm hi. 
2Chronicles2:6 Ahizong vantung zaina theampo ngawngawn in ama tasak zo ngawl tu ahikom kuama in Pathian atu biakinn sa thei tatak ngawl tu hi. Tuasia ci leang Pathian tungah ngimnamtui hal natu mun ci tung kaan keima in bangbang biakinn khat sa thei tu khi ziam? 
2Chronicles2:7 Tu in khetlet lim ngelh thiamna nei a, khamh, ngunn, taau le thik a zeamthiam, vancii meal, a sandup le a san puannip a thiam pasal khat hong puak ta'n. Ama in Judah le Jerusalem ah ka pa David ii tealsa khut thiamna nei te taw seam khawm tu hi." 
2Chronicles2:8 Nangma ii thingvawt nasep thiamzia ka heak ahikom Lebanon panin cedar thing, cypress thing le juniper thingluangte hong puak ta'n. Thing tam tatak vawtkholna ah na mihingte a hu tu in ka mihing puak tu in kinging khi hi," 
2Chronicles2:9 banghang ziam cile sak tu a ka tup biakinn sia lian tu a, hoi mama tu hi." 
2Chronicles2:10 Na thing atte neak tu in zungtaang tann tulnii, mangtaang tann tul nii, sapittui litre tulzali le olive thau litre tulzali kong puak tu hi.”" 
2Chronicles2:11 Hiram kumpipa in Solomon tungah lai thuk kik hi. A lai sungah, “ Topa in a mite a it hu in nangma sia amate kumpi hong suaksak zo hi." 
2Chronicles2:12 Leitung le vantung a bitphua pa Israel te Topa Pathian pok vun! Tu in Topa atu biakinn khat le ama a tu kumpi inn khat sak a sawm, heaktheina le thiamna taw a kidim tapa ciim khat, ama in David kumpipa pia zo hi." 
2Chronicles2:13 Huram kici a ciim le khutthiam mama khat kong puak hi. 
2Chronicles2:14 A nu sia Dan nam pan hi a, a pa sia Tyre khua mi ahi hi. Ama in khamh, ngunn, taau, thik, suang le thing te taw nate koibang piangsak tu ci theampo he siat hi. Ama in vancii, a sandup, a san le puanneal te zongh vawt thei hi. Ama in khetlet thiamna nam tuatuam vawt thei a, ama tungah a kison ngealkhol lim khat pawpo bangin seam thei hi. Na khutthiamte le na pa David kumpipa naseamte taw ama seam khawmsak in." 
2Chronicles2:15 Tua hi a, tu in nong kamciamsa zungtaang, mangtaang, sapittui le olive thaute hong puak ta'n." 
2Chronicles2:16 Lebanon mual te tungah na kisap za cedar thing ih phuk tu a, kopsawm in, phongte vawtin Joppa ciang tuipi tungah kitaaisak tu hi. Tua mun pan nangma in tuate Jerusalem ah na nawn thei tu hi,” ci in at hi." 
2Chronicles2:17 A pa David ii mi simna a vawt bangin Solomon kumpipa in Israel ngam sungah a teang ngamdangmite theampo mi simna vawt hi. Ngamdangmi a vekpi 153,600 teang hi." 
2Chronicles2:18 Ama in tuate sung pan 70,000 sia vanh nawn tu, 80,000 sia mual tungah suang at tu in see a nasep zaw nanak natu in 3,600 te sia naseamte uk tu in panmun pia hi." 
2Chronicles3:1 Solomon ii pa David kumpipa in Biakinnpi atu in a mun tu khat kinging khol zo hi. Tua mun sia Jerusalem khua sung Moriah mualtung Jebus mi Araunah ii ancilna, David kungah Topa kilakna mun ahi hi. Solomon kumpipa ii inn sak tu a kipat hun sia" 
2Chronicles3:2 ama ii kumpi sep zawk a kum li kum tha nii tha sung ahi hi. 
2Chronicles3:3 Solomon kumpipa sak Biakinnpi sia metre 27 sau a metre 9 zai hi. 
2Chronicles3:4 Inn sung tumna mailim inndoi sia Biakinnpi zaina taw kikim a, metre 9 zai in metre 54 saang hi. A inndoi sungsang sia khamh ciitak taw kizut hi." 
2Chronicles3:5 A inndoipi sia cedar thing taw kidal a, khamh pha taw tuamin palm thingkung limte le a kual kipee limte kisuai hi." 
2Chronicles3:6 Kumpipa in Biakinnpi sia a hoi mama suangmanpha te le Parvaim ngam pan a kilei khamh taw in zeam hi. 
2Chronicles3:7 Ama in biakinn pangte, zawlsaute, tumna lampi le kongkhate sia khamh taw tuam hi. A seamte in a pang tungah cherubim limte ngelh hi." 
2Chronicles3:8 A sungsang inndoi, Thiangthobel Mun a kicina sia metre 9 sau in, metre 9 zai a, Biakinnpi zaina za ma hi. Thiangthobel Mun pangte tuamna in khamh tann 20 vaal kizangh hi;" 
2Chronicles3:9 khamh thikpim vawtna in khamh gram 570 kizangh a, inn tung inndoi pangte zongh khamh taw kituam hi." 
2Chronicles3:10 Kumpipa in a naseamte zongh Cherubim lim nii thik taw vawt a, khamh taw tuamin, Thiangthobel Mun ah a koi natu thupia hi," 
2Chronicles3:11 tua munah tuate sia inn sung tumna sang nga in a kicial in ding hi. Khatsim in tha nii veu nei a, a thate khat sia metre 2.2 veu sau a, a thate a inndoi laizang ah a kipha in kiphal hi, tuabangin metre 9 bang a zai a inndoi dim in a pangh lang le lang dong a tha in pha siat hi." 
2Chronicles3:12  
2Chronicles3:13  
2Chronicles3:14 A Thiangthobel Mun atu in puanneal le a dang taw puankhai khat kivawt a, vancii, a sandup le a san taw kinimh in, a tungah cherubim lim kisuai hi."
