2Chronicles3:15 Kumpipa in metre 15.5 veu a saang khuam nii vawtsak a, Biakinnpi mai ah phut hi. Khuam khat in metre 2.2 a saang a dawnbawk khat veu nei hi." 
2Chronicles3:16 Khuamte ii dawn sia thik kipheak te le taau taw kivawt talee nga lim zakhat taw kizeam hi. 
2Chronicles3:17 Tua khuamte biakinn tumna panghte ah kiphut a: thangsang a om khuam sia Jachin, saksang a om khuam sia Boaz kici hi." 
2Chronicles4:1 Solomon kumpipa in king khat metre 9 veu a zai, a saanna metre 4.5 a pha, king li nei biaknatau khat taau taw vawtsak hi." 
2Chronicles4:2 Ama in metre 2.2 a thuk, a khuangmai zaina metre 4.4 a pha, a kiimkot sauna metre 13.2 a pha, taau tuikuang beam khat zongh vawt hi." 
2Chronicles4:3 Tuikuang ngongvang puasang a king kiimkot ah a kithuap ngual nii in zeam hi. A zepnate sia khuital lim hi a, tuikuang taw sa khat in a kisung ahi hi." 
2Chronicles4:4 Tua tuikuang sia a puasang a nga, taau khuital sawm le nii te nungzaang ah kinga a, tua khuitalte in thum sim veu in ngatna khat tek nei hi." 
2Chronicles4:5 Tuikuang panghte sia millimetre 75 saa hi. A ngong sia haingong taw kibang a, paakpalh bangin a puasang ah deal hi. Tuikuang sungah tui litre 60,000 bang ta hi." 
2Chronicles4:6 Amate in kuangtung sawm zongh vawtin nga sia Biakinnpi thangsang ah koi in, a saksang ah nga koi hi. Tuate sia sangaw biakpiakna in a kihal sabakte silna in zak tu ahi hi. Kuangpui sungah tui sia thiampite kisil natu hi." 
2Chronicles4:7 Amate in a vawt ngei bangin khamh meidetna khuam sawm le sabuai sawm vawtin Biakinnpi ii a lai inndoi sungah koi in, a lang le lang ah meidetna khuam nga le sabuai nga veu kikoi hi. Khamh khawbeam zakhat zongh kivawt hi." 
2Chronicles4:8  
2Chronicles4:9 Amate in thiampite atu in a sungsang leitual vawt a, a puasang leitual khat zongh vawt hi. A kilaklaw ah a om kongpite ii kongkhate sia taau taw kituam hi." 
2Chronicles4:10 Tuikuang sia Biakinnpi ii nisuana thangsang king nai ah kikoi hi. 
2Chronicles4:11 Huram in bealte, kawkeaute le khawbeamte zongh vawt hi. Ama in Biakinnpi atu in, Solomon kumpipa tungah a vawt tu a kamciamsa nate theampo vawt siat a: Khuam nii Khuam dawn ah kuang taw a kibang khuam dawnbawk nii Khuam dawnbawk sim ii tungah a kipheak thikkualte Khuam dawnbawk khat sim kiimkot ngual nii in, a kingual taau talee nga zali Khuileang sawm Kuangtung sawm Tuikuang Tuikuang ngakna khuital sawm le nii Bealte, kawkeaute le thikkeaukaate ahi hi. Khutthiam syapipa Huram in hi vanhte theampo sia Solomon kumpipa thupiak bangin Topa Biakinnpi sungah zak tu in taaunawtsa taw in vawt hi." 
2Chronicles4:12  
2Chronicles4:13  
2Chronicles4:14  
2Chronicles4:15  
2Chronicles4:16  
2Chronicles4:17 Kumpipa in hi teng theampo sia Sukkoth le Zeredah kilaklaw Jordan kuam taau seakna munah vawtsak hi. 
2Chronicles4:18 A vawtsa na tam mama ahikom taau a kizangh theampo ii ngitna kuama in he zo ngawl hi. 
2Chronicles4:19 Solomon kumpipa in Biakinnpi a zak tu a cingin khamh van zakte zong vawt hi: biaknatau le Topa atu biakpiakna anluum sabuaite; 
2Chronicles4:20 Ngealna om bangin meidetna khuamte le Thiangthobel Mun mai ah det tu khamh pha taw a kivawt meiinnte; 
2Chronicles4:21 paak zepna te, meiinnte, taitee te;" 
2Chronicles4:22 meiinn ciang te, kuangte, ngimnamtui halna pakante le meikam toaina bealpeute ahi hi. Hi nazakte a vekpi in khamh ciitak taw kivawt hi. Biakinnpi puasang kongkhate le Thiangthobel Mun sang kongkhate sia khamh taw kituam hi." 
2Chronicles5:1 Solomon kumpipa in Biakinnpi vai nasep teng a man siat zawkciangin a pa David ii Topa tungah a aapsa nate — ngunn, khamh le a dang nazakte theampo biakinn vanh kholna inndoite sungah koi hi." 
2Chronicles5:2 Tuaciang Solomon kumpipa in Israel namte le a bee a phungte ii lampuite theampo sia David Khuapi Zion panin Topa Thuciamna Thingkuang Biakinnpi ah a pua tu in Jerusalem ah a kikhop natu sam hi. 
2Chronicles5:3 Amate a vekpi in Buk Poai vawt hunin kikhawm uh hi. 
2Chronicles5:4 A lampui theampo a cin zawkciangin Levi mite in Thuciamna Thingkuang domto in," 
2Chronicles5:5 Biakinnpi ah puak uh hi. Thiampite le Levi mite zongh in Topa ompuina Puanbuk le a vanh theampo Biakinnpi ah tua siat uh hi. 
2Chronicles5:6 Solomon kumpipa le Israel mite theampo Thuciamna Thingkuang mai ah kikhawm in tuu le khui honpui khat — a kisim zo ngawl za dongin a tam taw sangaw biakpiakna nei uh hi. 
2Chronicles5:7 Tuaciang Thiampite in Topa Thuciamna Thingkuang pua in Biakinnpi sungah tumpui a, Thiangthobelna Mun Cherubim nuai ah koi uh hi." 
2Chronicles5:8 A tha kiphalte in Thingkuang le a puakna molte liap hi. 
2Chronicles5:9 A puakna molte ii mongte sia Thiangthobel Mun mai santak ah a ding khat pawpo in mu thei a, ahihang mundang pan kimu thei ngawl hi. (Tua molte tuni dongin om lai hi.)" 
2Chronicles5:10 Thuciamna Thingkuang sungah, Israel mite Egypt ngam pan hong pai in Topa taw thuciamna a vawt lai a, Moses ii Sinai mual tung, tualai ah a koi suangpheakte nii simngawl bangma dang om ngawl hi." 
2Chronicles5:11 Thiampite a om theampo sia akua pawl akua pawl ci om tuan ngawlin amate le amate kithiansua tek uh hi. Tua zawkciang Levi mi music thiamte — Asaph, Heman le Jeduthun le amate ii bee le phungte sung mite theampo — puanneal silh uh hi. Levi mite sia biaknatau nisuana sang nai ah daalkopsai le tengtonghte taw ding in, amate taw thiampite 120 sia lemle tumin om uh hi. La sate in lemle, daalkopsai le a dang tumtheite taw aw kihual tatakin Topa pok in lasa hi: “ Topa pok vun, banghang ziam cile ama pha hi, Hong itna kip tawntung hi.” Thiampite ii Biakinnpi a nusiat po ciang tuasia Topa ompuina khuavak taang velvol sia le a taang meeikaai khat taw thakhatin kidim a, amate in biakna zom thei nawn ngawl hi." 
2Chronicles5:12  
2Chronicles5:13  
2Chronicles5:14  
2Chronicles6:1 Tuasia ciang Solomon kumpipa thungen a, “ Topa awng meei sung le khuazing sungah teen tu na teal hi." 
2Chronicles6:2 A tawntungin na teen natu mun ahi, tu in, a tuanngen biakinn khat kong saksak zo hi,” ci hi." 
2Chronicles6:3 Tua munah Israel mipite theampo ding uh hi. Kumpipa in amate sang maingatin amate atu Pathian thupha ngetsak hi. 
2Chronicles6:4 Ama in “Israel Topa Pathian pok vun! Ama in ka pa David tungah a kamciam keamcing a, ama in ka pa tungah," 
2Chronicles6:5 ‘Egypt pan ka mite ka pusua pui hun pan kipan tu dong Israel ngam sungah keima hong kibiak natu mun biakinn khat sak natu in khuapi khat pawpo ka teal bua a, Israel ka mite lampui tu in khat pawpo zongh ka teal bua hi." 
2Chronicles6:6 Ahihang tu in keima nong biak natu mun Jerusalem ka teal zo a, ka mite uk tu in nangma David kong teal zo hi.’ ci hi.”" 
2Chronicles6:7 Solomon in, “Ka pa David in Israel te ii Topa Pathian biak natu in biakinn khat sak tu ngeal hi," 
2Chronicles6:8 ahihang Topa in ama tungah, ‘Kei atu biakinn khat na sak nop sia maan hi," 
2Chronicles6:9 ahizong nangma in na sa ngei buatu hi. Ka biakinn sa tu sia na tapa, nangma ii tapa tatak hi,’ ci lai hi." 
2Chronicles6:10 “Tu in Topa in a kamciam taangtungsak zo hi: keima in ka pa ii Israel kumpi za ka laih zo a, Israel Topa Pathian biak natu in biakinn khat ka sa zo hi." 
2Chronicles6:11 Topa in Israel mite taw a vawt thuciamna tepteena suangpheakte omna Thuciamna Thingkuang sia Biakinnpi sungah ka koi zo hi.” 
2Chronicles6:12 Tua zawkciang mihonte omna biaknatau mai ah Solomon pai in ding a, a khutte laamin thungen hi. (" 
2Chronicles6:13 Solomon in dawtuam khat taau taw vawtin leitual laizang ah koi hi. Tua kingli nei dawtuam sia king khat metre 2.2 veu zai in, metre 1.3 saang hi. Ama in hi dawtuam tungah kaato in mi sim ii mu theina munah khupdin in a khutte vantung sangah laamto hi.)" 
2Chronicles6:14 Ama in, “Israel ii Topa Pathian awng, vantung le leitung theampo ah nangma taw a kibang pathian dang om ngawl hi. Na mite taw na thuciamna na kholet a, tuaciang a thin tatak taw na thu hong ni in a nuntak ciang na itna amate tungah na lak hi." 
2Chronicles6:15 Ka pa David tungah na kamciamte na kholet hi; tu ni in kammalte theampo taangtung zo hi. 
2Chronicles6:16 Tu in Israel Topa Pathian awng, ama ii na Thukham hong zui bangin amate in kidopna taw zui pole, na suan na paalte sung pan khat in Israel kumpi in maang tawntung tu hi ci a, ka pa tungah kamciam na vawt dang khat sia zongh nong taangtutsak natu thu kong ngen hi." 
2Chronicles6:17 Tua ahikom tu in Israel ii Topa Pathian awng, na naseampa David tungah kamciam na piakte theampo taangtungsak in." 
2Chronicles6:18 “Ahihang, Oh Pathian awng, nang leitung mihingte sungah teang thei takpi tu ni ziam? Vantung theampo zongh nang hong huam tu in lian tham ngawl hi, tua ahikom hi Biakinnpi keima sak sia lian khom thei tu ziam?" 
2Chronicles6:19 Topa ka Pathian awng, keima na naseampa khi hi. Ka thungetna hong ngai ta'n. Kong ngetnate hong pia ta'n." 
2Chronicles6:20 Hi Biakinnpi a sun a zanin na cing in. Hisia nang hong kibiak natu mun hi ci in nong kamciamsa hi, tua ahiciang hi Biakinnpi sang nga in thu kong nget ciangin hong za ta'n." 
2Chronicles6:21 Kei ii thungetnate le na Israel mite ii hi mun maingat in a thungetnate hong za ta'n. Vantung na inn sung panin hong za ta'n a, ko hong maisak ta'n." 
2Chronicles6:22 “Mihing khat sia midang khat tungah khial hi ci a kimawsiat in, a maw ngawl hunlam a kiciam tu in hi Biakinnpi sung na biaknatau ah a kipaipui ciang," 
2Chronicles6:23 Oh Topa, vantung panin na ngai in a, na naseamte tungah thu khen in. A maw sia tungah a kiphu bangin daan pia in, a maw ngawl sia suaktasak in." 
2Chronicles6:24 “Na Israel mite sia nangma tungah hong khial hu in a ngalte in zo a, tuasia ciang nang sang hong heak in, hi Biakinnpi ah pai a, amate kiniamkhiakin maw maisak natu in thu hong ngen le," 
2Chronicles6:25 vantung panin na ngai in. Na mite ii mawna khialnate maisak in a, tuaciang amate le a taanghpupite tungah na piaksa ngam le lei ah na paipui kik in." 
2Chronicles6:26 Na mite nang tungah hong maw hu in nguatui na hansak ciang le, amate kisiik in hi Biakinnpi sang nga in kiniamkhiakin thu hong nget ciang," 
2Chronicles6:27 Oh, Topa awng, vantung panin ngai in a, na naseamte le Israel mite ii mawna khialnate na maisak in, tuaciang a maan a sep natu amate na hil in. Tuaciang Oh Topa, na mite ii a tawntung a neisa tu in na piak hi na leitang tungah nguatui puak in." 
2Chronicles6:28 “Ngam sungah kialpi, ahibuale natsia a tung ahizong, ankungte vuisa ahibuale khaumaw hon in a lalsak ciang ahizong, na mite a ngalte in a sim ciang ahizong, amate sungah natna satna a om ciang ahizong," 
2Chronicles6:29 amate ii thungetna na ngai in. Israel na mite khat pawpo in a thin hee lawlawm man po in, hi Biakinnpi sangah a khut uh zan in thu hong ngen le," 
2Chronicles6:30 amate ii thungetna na za in. Vantung na inn sung panin amate na ngai in a, na maisak in. Nangma bekma in mihingte thinsung ngaisutnate he ni hi. mi simin ama taw a kiphu bangin a tungah na vawt in," 
2Chronicles6:31 tuasia ciangin koma taanghpupite tungah na piaksa ngam sungah a teen hun sung theampo amate in nangma hong zakta in na thu hong ni tu hi. 
2Chronicles6:32 “A khuala a teang ngamdangmite in na letna, na vaang neina le a seam tu a tawntung na kinginnate za a, hi Biakinnpi ah hong pai in thu hong nget ciang," 
2Chronicles6:33 amate thungetnate na ngai in. Vantung na teenna mun pan na za in a, vawtsak tu in hong nget teng na vawtsak in, tua hile leitung mite theampo te in Israel na mite ii hong heak bangin hong he thei in, na thu hong ni tu uh hi. Tuasia ciang amate in hi Biakinnpi nang atu ka sak sia nangma biak natu mun ahi hunlam he tu uh hi." 
2Chronicles6:34 “A ngalte taw kido tu in na mite kuanin na sawl a, amate in nang tungah thu hong nget ciang, koisung po ah a om zong na tealsa hi khuapi le nang atu ka sak hi Biakinnpi sang hong nga in thu hong ngen le," 
2Chronicles6:35 amate ii thungetnate na ngai in. Vantung panin na za in a, amate zawna na pia in." 
2Chronicles6:36 “Na mite in mawna hong vawt ciang — a maw ngawl kuama om ngawl ahiciang — na thin uukin a ngalte in zosak a, ngamdang ah thongtaak tu in a paipui ciangin tua ngam sia a khuala ta zong," 
2Chronicles6:37 na mite ii thungetnate ngai in. Tua ngam pan amate kisiik kikin a mawna le a seksolna pualaak in thu hong ngen le, amate thungetnate na ngai in, Oh ka Topa awng." 
2Chronicles6:38 Tua ngam ah amate in thintak le a maan takin kisiik in, ka taanghpupite tungah na piak hi ngam, na tealsa hi khuapi, nang atu ka sak hi Biakinnpi maingat in thu hong ngen le," 
2Chronicles6:39 tuasia ciang amate ii thungetnate na ngai in. Vantung na inn sung panin amate thungetna na za in a, tuaciang amate hesuakin, na mite ii a mawna a khialna te theampo na maisak in." 
2Chronicles6:40 “Oh ka Pathian awng, tu in kote hong en ta'n a, hi mun pan kong thungetnate hong ngai ta'n." 
2Chronicles6:41 Topa Pathian awng, tu in thoto in a, na vaangletna lim ahi Thuciamna Thingkuang taw Biakinnpi sungah tumin hi sungah a tawntungin om in. Na thiampite a nasepna theampo ah thupha pia in a, amate tungah na phatna hangin na mite theampo lungdam tahen." 
2Chronicles6:42 Topa Pathian awng, na tealsa kumpipa nial heak in. Na naseampa David tungah na nei itna phawk tawntung in,” ci in thungen hi." 
2Chronicles7:1 Solomon kumpipa in a thunget a man ciangin vantung pan meikuang hong paisuk a, sangaw biakpiaknate kaanghtum in, Topa ompuina khuavak taang velvol sia Biakinnpi dim hi." 
2Chronicles7:2 Biakinnpi sia tua khuavak taang velvol sia taw kidim ahikom thiampite a sungah tum thei ngawl hi. 
2Chronicles7:3 Israel mite in Biakinnpi ah van panin meikuang taaksuk le khuavak taang a dim a mu uh ciang a lam totna tungah a lu kunin Pathian bia a, a phatna le a itna kip pok uh hi." 
2Chronicles7:4 Tua zawkciang Solomon le mite theampo in Topa tungah sangaw biakpiakna pia uh hi. 
2Chronicles7:5 Ama in kipawlkhop biakpiakna in khui 22,000 le tuu 120,000 pia hi. Tuabangin ama le mipite in Biakinnpi aapna nei uh hi." 
2Chronicles7:6 Thiampite sia a kiseena mun tek ah ding a, amate maingat in Levi te dingin David kumpipa ii piak tumthei tuatuamte taw, “Ama hong itna in kip tawntung hi!” ci in lasa a David sawlna om bangin Topa pok uh hi. Thiampite ii lemle a tum sung teng mipi theampo ding uh hi." 
2Chronicles7:7 Solomon in Biakinnpi mai leitual laizang a thiansua zawkciang tua munah pumhal sangaw biakpiakna, antang taw biakpiakna le kipawlkhop biakpiaknate panin a thau te pia hi. Hi bang a vawtna sia ama vawt taau biaknatau sia hi biakpiaknate theampo atu in no lei ahihang hi." 
2Chronicles7:8 Solomon le Israel mite theampo in ni sali sung Buk Poai khaam uh hi. Tua poai ah mihonpi hong pai a, saksang ah Hamath Mualciangh le thangsang ah Egypt ngamngi dong a teang mite ahi uh hi." 
2Chronicles7:9 Amate in ni sali sung biaknatau aapna vawtin tua zawkciang a dang ni sali sung ma poai vawt thua uh hi. A ni khakbel ni in amate in poai manna vawt a," 
2Chronicles7:10 a zing ciang tha sali tha ni 23 ni in Solomon in mipite inn ah ciasak hi. Topa ii a Israel mite tung, David tung le Solomon tungah thupha theampo a piak manin amate lungdam uh hi." 
2Chronicles7:11 Solomon kumpipa in Biakinnpi le kumpi inn a sak teng man zo a, tuate atu a ngealna theampo pha takin a zaw thiang sitset zawkciang," 
2Chronicles7:12 ama tungah zanin Topa kilangh hi. Topa in ama tungah, “Na thungetna ka za zo a, hi Biakinnpi sia ka tungah sangaw biakpiaknate nong nei natu munin ka saang hi." 
2Chronicles7:13 Nguatui ka hansak po ciang ahibuale lo ante a ne khawng tu in khaumawte ka paisak po ciang ahibuale ka mite tungah a kilaw thei natna khat ka tunsak po ciang," 
2Chronicles7:14 amate in kei tungah thungenin kisiik kikin a tatsiat ngamtatnate a nungngat le, tuaciang a thungetnate vantung pan ka za tu a, a mawnate maisak in a ngam a lei ngamnuam ka suaksak kik tu hi." 
2Chronicles7:15 Hi Biakinnpi ka mitsuan tu a, hi mun panin thungetnate theampo a za tu in ka kinging tu hi," 
2Chronicles7:16 banghang ziam cile hi Biakinnpi ka tealsa hi a, a tawntungin keima hong kibiakna mun tu in ka thiansua sa ahi hi. Tuasia ka mitsuan tu a, a tawntungin ka hung tu hi." 
2Chronicles7:17 Na pa David ii sep bangin ka thukhamte zui in na tungah kong sawlte theampo seamin thumaan takin ka na na seam le," 
2Chronicles7:18 na suan na paalte in Israel ngam uk tawntung tu hi ci a, na pa David tungah ka son, ka kamciam sia ka len tu hi." 
2Chronicles7:19 Ahihang nangma le na mite in nangma tungah kong piak thukhamte le thupiakte zui ngawlin pathian dangte na bia uh le," 
2Chronicles7:20 kong piaksa ngam panin kong heam tu hi, tuaciang keima hong kibiak natu mun tu in ka thiansua sa, hi Biakinnpi ka nusia tu hi. Israel sia mihing theampo in zawnsak vawtin ngaimaw tu uh hi." 
2Chronicles7:21 “Tu in tua Biakinn nasia takin kipatoai ahihang tuasia a kaantan pawpo in lamdang sa in, ‘Banghangin Topa in hi ngam le hi Biakinnpi tungah hi bangza in vawt ziam?’ ci in dongh tu uh hi." 
2Chronicles7:22 Mipite in ‘A taanghpupite Egypt ngam pan a pusua pui Topa a Pathian a nusiat hang hi. Amate in pathian dangte pom in bia uh hi. Tuasia hangin Topa in hi tuasiatna teng amate tungah tungsak hi,’ ci in zo tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
2Chronicles8:1 Solomon in Biakinnpi le a kumpi innte kum kul sung sa hi. 
2Chronicles8:2 Ama in Hiram kumpipa ii a piak khuapite zongh pua kik a tua khuapite sungah Israel mite puakin teangsak hi. 
2Chronicles8:3 Ama in Hamath le Zobah ngam la in," 
2Chronicles8:4 sennealngam a om Palmyra khuapi sia kulh taw uum hi. Ama a ankholna mun tu in Hamath ngam ah khuapite theampo pua kik hi. 
2Chronicles8:5 Solomon in a nuai a khuapite zongh pua kik hi: Beth Horon Tungnung le Beth Horon Nuainung, (a kikalh thei kongpite a nei, ngal dalna kulh taw ki uum khuapite hi.)" 
2Chronicles8:6 Baalath khuapi, ankholna khuapi theampo le a siphute le a siphu ngalleangte koina khuapite ahi hi. Ama in Jerusalem khua, Lebanon ngam le a ukna ngamsung theampo ah sak tu in a tup a sawm theampo taangtun siat hi." 
2Chronicles8:7 Israel te ii Canaan ngam a laak lai in a thalup ngawl Canaan mite ii suan le paal teng sia Solomon in zawthawk thu taw sawlin naseamsak hi. Hite sungah Hit mi, Amor mi, Periz mi, Hiv mi le Jebus mite kihel in a suan a paalte sia tu hun dongin sila hi suak lai uh hi." 
2Chronicles8:8  
2Chronicles8:9 Israel mite sia zawthawk thu taw na kiseamsak ngawl ahihang ngalkap, ulian, siphu ngalleang uk le siphu ngalkap nasep kiseamsak hi." 
2Chronicles8:10 Inn sakna tuatuamte ah zawthawk thu taw a kisawl naseamte uk tu in ulian 250 om hi. 
2Chronicles8:11 Solomon in Egypt kumpipa tanu a zi sia David Khuapi pan ama atu a sak inn sia ah khiin hi. Solomon in, “Ama sia Israel kumpipa David kumpi inn ah teang thei ngawl het hi, banghang ziam cile Thuciamna Thingkuang omna pawpo thiangtho hi,” ci hi." 
2Chronicles8:12 Solomon in Biakinnpi mai ah a sak biaknatau tungah Topa atu in sangaw biakpiaknate pia hi. 
2Chronicles8:13 Ama in Moses Thukham bangin meihal biakpiaknate ni thiangtho ni sim atu in pia hi: Sabbath nite, Thadet Poaite le kum sim a kivawt poai thumte — Tol kisaw ngawl Anluum Poai, Anlaak Poai le Buk Poai te ahi hi." 
2Chronicles8:14 A pa David ii zui tu a vawt ngeinate zui in thiampite ii ni sim a nasep tu le lasakna le a nasepna ah thiampite a hu Levi mite ii a nasep tu sia ama in vaihawmsak hi. Pathian mi David ii thupiak bangin biakinn cingte in a vaipuak neina kongpi tek ah ni sim a nasep natu in pawl khensak hi. 
2Chronicles8:15 David ii thiampite le Levi mite tungah vanh kholna innte le a dangte taw kisai in a thupiakte kheet nei ngawlin kivawtsak hi. 
2Chronicles8:16 Hi hun in Solomon ii nasepna theampo kizo thiang hi. Topa Biakinnpi tawdap a kiphu pan kipanin a zaw thiang dong nasep theampo ah a kisuangsamh mun om ngawl hi. 
2Chronicles8:17 Tua zawkciang Solomon sia Edom ngam, Aqaba Tuidok hui ah a om teambaw tawlngakna te ahi Eziongeber le Elath ah pai hi." 
2Chronicles8:18 Hiram kumpipa in a khutnuai uliante ii a uk le teambaw naseam thiamsate ii a zui teambawte Solomon puak hi. Amate in Solomon ii uliante taw Ophir ngam ah paikhawmin Solomon tungah khamh kilogramme 15,000 vaal puak kik uh hi." 
2Chronicles9:1 Sheba kumpinu in Solomon kumpipa minthanna za a thudokna haksate taw ama ze et tu in Jerusalem ah haw hi. Ama in a lalangte honpui khat le hel namtuite, suangmanphate le khamh tam mama a pua kalaoh te keng hi. Solomon taw a kimu uh ciang ama in a thu ngaisut thei theampo dongh hi." 
2Chronicles9:2 Solomon in tuate zo thei siat hi; ama ii a zo kik tu in thu haksa leih bangma om ngawl hi. 
2Chronicles9:3 Sheba kumpinu in Solomon ii ciimna he a, a sak sa kumpi inn zongh mu hi." 
2Chronicles9:4 Ama in kumpi sabuai tungah a kilui ante, a uliante teenna innte, kumpi inn sung a naseamte omzia le a kibang a puansilhte, poai vawt ni in ama a cing a naseamte ii puansilhte le Biakinnpi ah a piak biakpiaknate mu hi. Tuate ama in lamdang sa in ingh liang hi." 
2Chronicles9:5 Ama in kumpipa tungah, “Ka ngam panin na ciimna le na thu ka zaakte maan hi!" 
2Chronicles9:6 Keima mama hong pai in ka mu matengin ngual ii hong sonte ka um bua hi. Na ciimna ii a lang zongh a za ngawl khi hi. Ngual hong sonna sangin ciimzaw lai ni hi. 
2Chronicles9:7 Nangma taw omkhawm tawntungin na hong sepsak mite, ciim kam na pauna a zate sia bang zata in hampha ziam!" 
2Chronicles9:8 Topa na Pathian pok in! Ama min suangin a uk kumpipa hong suasak ciang nang tungah ama bangza in lungkim ziam ci in hong lak hi. Ama in a Israel mite it a, a tawntungin a kep nopna hu in, thukham le thutang khenna na kipsak thei natu in nangma sia amate ii kumpi hong suaksak zo hi,” ci hi." 
2Chronicles9:9 Ama in Solomon kumpipa tungah a ken letsongte: khamh kilogramme 4,000 vaal le hel namtuite le suangmanpha tam mama pia hi. Sheba kumpinu ii Solomon kumpipa tungah a piak hel namtuite sangin a phazaw dang om ngeingawl hi." 
2Chronicles9:10 (Ophir pan khamh hong paipui Hiram kumpipa le Solomon kumpipa ii mihingte in juniper thing le suangmanpha te zongh paipui uh hi. 
2Chronicles9:11 Solomon in tua thingte sia Biakinnpi le ama kumpi inn keallei vawtna, music thiamte atu tengtongh le liamlo te vawtna in zangh hi. Tua masia in Judah ngam sungah tuabang te kimu ngeingawl hi.)" 
2Chronicles9:12 Solomon kumpipa in Sheba kumpinu ii a nget theampo pia hi. Hite sia Sheba kumpinu ii ama a piak letsongte a thukna in a piakte ahi hi. Tua zawkciang ama le a lalangte Sheba ngam ah heak kik uh hi. 
2Chronicles9:13 Solomon kumpipa in kum simin khamh kilogramme 23,000 dektak nga a," 
2Chronicles9:14 sumvawtte le sumbukte ii phiangshia a piakte ban ah a nga ahi hi. Arabia kumpite le Israel ngamkhen ukte zongh in ngunn le khamh puak uh hi. 
2Chronicles9:15 Solomon in ngaldalna lumlian 200 vawtin lum khat ciangin a kiseak khamh kilogramme 7 bang taw tuam hi," 
2Chronicles9:16 tuaciang ngaldalna lum a no zaw 300 vawt a, khat ciangin a kiseak khamh kilogramme 3 bang taw tuam hi. Ama in tuate a vekpi in Lebanon Thingtaam Khaanpui sungah koi hi." 
2Chronicles9:17 Kumpipa in kumpi tokhum lian mama khat zongh vawt hi. Tua tokhum khen khat sia saiha taw kituam a, a dang teng sia khamh ciitak taw kituam hi." 
2Chronicles9:18 Tua tokhum tungah a kaa natu in keallei dawl luk pha khat kidaw a, khamh taw a kituam dinpha khat kibel in om hi. To khum lang le lang ah khut ngakna om a, tawpi lim khat veve dingsak hi." 
2Chronicles9:19 Keallei dawl luk te khat sim ii lang le lang ah tawpi lim 12 om hi. Hi bang kumpi tokhum sia kumpi ngam mundang peuma ah om ngeingawl hi. 
2Chronicles9:20 Solomon kumpipa ii zak haite theampo khamh taw kivawt a, Lebanon Thingtaam Khaanpui sungah a kikoi vanhzak kuang le keau te theampo sia khamh ciitak veu hi. Solomon hun lai in ngunn sia a man nei in kingaisun ngawl hi." 
2Chronicles9:21 Solomon in Hiram kumpipa ii teambawte taw a paikhawm tuipi teambaw honkhat nei hi. Kum thum simin ama teambawte hong heak kik ciang khamh, ngunn, saiha, mei nei ngawl zawngpuite le zawngte hong pua uh hi." 
2Chronicles9:22 Solomon kumpipa sia leitung kumpi dangte sangin ciimzaw a hauzaw hi. 
2Chronicles9:23 Pathian ii a piak ciimna thu he nuamin tua kumpite theampo in ama thu dongh hi. 
2Chronicles9:24 Amate khat simin Solomon atu letsongte — khamh, ngunn, puantualte, ngalhiamte, hel namtuite, siphute le laate puak hi. Kum khat zawk kum khat tuabangin kizom suak hi." 
2Chronicles9:25 Solomon kumpipa in a siphu ngalleang le a siphute koi natu in siphu khawk 4,000 le siphu ngalkap 12,000 zongh nei hi. Tuate pawlkhat sia Jerusalem ah keam in a taanglai teng khuapi dangte ah koi hi." 
2Chronicles9:26 Ama sia Euphrates Ngun panin Philistia le Egypt ngamngi dong a om kumpi theampo a ukpipa ahi hi. 
2Chronicles9:27 Ama kumpi in a maan lai in Jerusalem ah ngunn sia suang bangin tam a cedar thingkung sia Judah mualpeangte ah a om sycomore thingkung thawthongte bangin tam hi. 
2Chronicles9:28 Solomon in siphute Musri le ngamdang theampo panin lei hi. 
2Chronicles9:29 Solomon ii taanghthu dang teng sia a kipat pan a tawpna dong Kamsaang Nathan Taanghthu sung, Shiloh khua mi Ahijah ii Kamsaanna sung le Kamsaang Iddo ii Mukholnate sungah kiciamtee a, tua te Israel kumpipa Jeroboam ii kumpi maanna thu taw zongh kizom hi." 
2Chronicles9:30 Solomon in Israel ngam buppi sia Jerusalem khua panin kum sawmli sung uk hi. 
2Chronicles9:31 Ama thi a, David Khuapi sungah kiphumin a tapa Rehoboam in a kumpi za laih hi." 
2Chronicles10:1 Rehoboam sia ama kumpi suaksak tu in Saksang Israel mite theampo ii kikhopna Shechem ah pai hi. 
2Chronicles10:2 Solomon kumpipa kung pan suakta in Egypt ngam ah a tai Nebat ii tapa Jeroboam in tua thu a zaak ciang inn ah cia kik hi. 
2Chronicles10:3 Saksang namte pan mite in ama sam a, a vekpi in Rehoboam kungah pai in ama tungah," 
2Chronicles10:4 “Na pa in ko tungah vanhngit hong suan hi. Hi vanhngitte nong zaangsak zaw a, ko atu in nuntakna nong olsak zaw le nangma khutnuai ah a thumaan mi hi tu khu hi,” ci uh hi." 
2Chronicles10:5 Rehoboam in, “Hi thu ka ngaisut natu in ni thum hun hong pia tavun. Tua zawkciang hong pai kik tavun,” ci in zo kik hi. Tua ahiciang mipite in nusia hi." 
2Chronicles10:6 Kumpipa Rehoboam in a pa Solomon tungah ngaisutna a pia uhaamte, thu dongh hi. Ama in, “Hi mite tungah bangbangin a kam zo tu khi ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
2Chronicles10:7 Amate in, “Hi mite tungah dik lete a, amate lungkim natu in thu hong dokte kikhualna taw zo lete, thumaan takin na na hong sepsak tawntung tu hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
2Chronicles10:8 Ahihang ama in uhaamte ngaisut piakna melsia a, ama taw a khangkhawm, tu in ngaisutna a piate ahi khangmoite kungah pai hi." 
2Chronicles10:9 Ama in, “Ka ngamtat natu in bang ngaisutna hong pia tu nu ziam? A vanhngit uh zaangsak zaw tu in hong ngen mite tungah bangbang ci tu khi ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
2Chronicles10:10 Amate in, “Tua mite tungah hi bangin ci in: ‘Ka khutmeleng sia ka pa kawng sangin saa zaw hi." 
2Chronicles10:11 Ka pa in no vanhngit hong suan hi; keima in tua vanhngitte a ngit zaw lai in ka vawt tu hi. Ama in khauhual kibul ciang taw hong saat hi; kei ka hi le siphu saatna taw hong vel tu khi hi!,’ ” ci in zo kik hi." 
2Chronicles10:12 Ni thum zawkciang Jeroboam le mipite theampo Kumpipa Rehoboam kungah ama sawl bangin hong heak kik uh hi. 
2Chronicles10:13 Kumpipa in uhaamte ii ngaisutna a piakte melsia in mipite tungah," 
2Chronicles10:14 khangmoizawte ii ngaisut piak bangin kamham pau hi. Ama in, “Ka pa in vanhngit hong suan hi; tuate a ngit zaw lai in ka vawt tu hi. Ama in khauhual kibul ciang taw hong saat hi; kei ka hile siphu velna taw kong vel tu hi!” ci hi." 
2Chronicles10:15 Tuasia in Shiloh pan kamsaang Ahijah tungtawn a, Nebat tapa Jeroboam tungah a sonna a taangtun natu in Topa Pathian ii deina ahi hi. Hisia hu in kumpipa in mipite bangma thudon ngawl hi." 
2Chronicles10:16 Mipite in kumpipa ii amate a thudon ngawl a mu ciangin, “David le a innkuan te taak hen! Ei atu amate in bang hong vawtsak ngei na ziam? Israel mite awng, cia tek ka tawng! Rehoboam ama le ama ki en tahen!” ci in au uh hi. Tuabangin Israel mite in leedo a," 
2Chronicles10:17 Rehoboam sia Judah ngam sungah a teangte bek ii kumpipa tu in nusia uh hi. 
2Chronicles10:18 Tua zawkciang Kumpipa Rehoboam in zawthawk thu taw a kisawl nasepna a uk Adoniram samin Israel te kungah paisak hi, ahihang amate in ama suang taw deanglum uh hi. Tuasia ciang Rehoboam sia a siphu ngalleang tungah manlang takin kaato a, Jerusalem khua ah suakta hi." 
2Chronicles10:19 Tua hun pan kipan Israel saksang kumpi ngammite in David kumpi khangngui langpanin leedo tan uh hi. 
2Chronicles11:1 Rehoboam kumpipa Jerusalem a thet ciang, Judah le Benjamin namte sung pan ngalkap thiambel 180,000 khawm hi. Ama in saksang ah a teang Israel minamte simin uk kik sawm hi." 
2Chronicles11:2 Ahizong Topa in kamsaang Shemaiah tungah 
2Chronicles11:3 Kumpipa Rehoboam le Judah le Benjamin namte theampo tungah hi thu puak in sawl hi: 
2Chronicles11:4 “Na Israel mipuite sim heak vun. Na vekpi na inn tek ah cia vun. Hi bangin thupiang sia keima deina hi.” Amate in Topa thupiak ni in Jeroboam sim tu in pai nawn ngawl uh hi. 
2Chronicles11:5 Rehoboam sia Jerusalem ah om lai a, Judah le Benjamin ngam sungah a om, a nuai a khuapite kulh taw uumsak hi:" 
2Chronicles11:6 Bethlehem, Etam, Tekoa," 
2Chronicles11:7 Bethzur, Soco, Adullam," 
2Chronicles11:8 Gath, Mareshah, Ziph," 
2Chronicles11:9 Adoraim, Lachish, Azekah," 
2Chronicles11:10 Zorah, Aijalon le Hebron te ahi hi." 
2Chronicles11:11 Ama in hi khuapite sia nasia takin kulh taw uum a, khua sim ah a uk khat tek koi in, tua zawkciang ama in khua sim ah an, olive thau le sapittui," 
2Chronicles11:12 tuaciang lum le teite zongh koi hi. Hi bangin ama in Judah le Benjamin ama ukna nuai ah keam hi. 
2Chronicles11:13 Israel ngam theampo panin thiampite le Levi te sia thangsang Judah ah pai uh hi. 
2Chronicles11:14 Israel kumpipa Jeroboam le a zalaihte in Levi mite sia Topa thiampite bangin a sepsak nop ngawl hu in Levi te in nganthana le a leitang dang teng nusia in Judah ngam le Jerusalem ah kikhiin uh hi. 
2Chronicles11:15 Jeroboam in doai sepna munte ah a seam tu le doai te le khuitalno lim in a vawt milimte biakna ah naseam tu in ama aituam thiampite panmun pia hi. 
2Chronicles11:16 Israel te ii nam theampo sung panin Topa, Israel ii Pathian a bia nuam takpi te in Topa, a taanghpupite ii Pathian tungah sangaw biakpiakna a piak thei natu in Jerusalem ah Levi mite zui uh hi." 
2Chronicles11:17 Hi sia in Judah kumpi ngam thahatsak a, kum thum sung Solomon tapa Rehoboam tha pia in, David kumpipa le Solomon kumpipa uk sungah a om bangma in nungta in panpui uh hi." 
2Chronicles11:18 Rehoboam in Mahalath teenpui hi, Mahalath ii pa sia David ii tapa Jerimoth hi a, a nu sia Eliab ii tanu Abihail hi a, Jesse ii tunu hi." 
2Chronicles11:19 Amate in tapa thum nei a, Jeush, Shemariah le Zaham te hi." 
2Chronicles11:20 Tua nungciang ama in Absalom ii tanu Maacah teenpui a, amate in tapa li nei a: Abijah, Attai, Ziza le Shelomith te ahi hi." 
2Chronicles11:21 Rehoboam in a vekpi zi sawm le liat le zino sawmluk nei a, tapa kul le liat le tanu sawmluk nei hi. A zite le a zinote theampo sung pan ama in Maacah itbel hi," 
2Chronicles11:22 ama in a ta dangte theampo sung pan Maacah taw a nei a tapa Abijah it tuamin a kumpi za laih tu in teal hi. 
2Chronicles11:23 Rehoboam in a tapate tungah nasepte pha tak seesak a, Judah le Benjamin ngamsung theampo, kulh taw a ki uum khuapite ah koi hi. Ama in amate atu haza ngawlin a dei bang ngo takin pia a, zi tam mama zongh puisak hi." 
2Chronicles12:1 Rehoboam in a kumpi thuneina a kip zawk po ma ciang ama le a mite theampo in Topa Thukham nusia uh hi. 
2Chronicles12:2 Rehoboam in a kumpi maan zawk a kum nga kumin Topa tungah a thumaan ngawl hu in amate daan kipia hi. Egypt kumpipa Shishak in Jerusalem sia," 
2Chronicles12:3 siphu ngalleang 1,200 siphu ngalkap 60,000 le Libyan, Sukki le Ethiopia ngalkap te a kihel ngalkap a kisim zo ngawl taw sim hi." 
2Chronicles12:4 Ama in kulh taw a ki uum Judah khuapite la in Jerusalem khua dong nawk hi. 
2Chronicles12:5 Shishak khut sung pan a suatak natu in Jerusalem ah a kikhawm Rehoboam kumpipa le Judah lampuite kungah kamsaang Shemaiah pai in, amate tungah “ Topa ii no atu thupuak sia hi bang hi: ‘Keima nong nusiat uh bangma tu in note Shishak khut sungah kong nusia zo hi,’ ” ci hi." 
2Chronicles12:6 Kumpipa le tua lampuite in maw zo khu hi ci a, amate in “ Topa ii sepna maan hi,” ci hi." 
2Chronicles12:7 Topa in hi thu a mu ciang Shemaiah kungah a son kikna pan, “A mawna pualaak ahiciang amate ka susia buatu hi. Ahihang Shishak in a sim ciang a suakta valiai bekma hi tu uh hi. Jerusalem in ka thin uuk tutna a cingin thuak ngawl tu hi," 
2Chronicles12:8 ahizong Shishak in amate zothal tu a, amate in keima na a sep le leitung ngamukte ii na a sep, a kilamdanna he tu uh hi,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles12:9 Jerusalem ah Shishak kumpipa pai in Biakinnpi pan le kumpi inn panin sum le vanh manphate la hi, ama in na theampo la in, a laaksak sungah Solomon kumpipa vawt khamh lumte zongh kihel hi." 
2Chronicles12:10 Tuate laih natu in Rehoboam in taau lumte vawtin kumpi inn kongpi cing ngalkap bute tungah aap hi. 
2Chronicles12:11 Kumpipa Biakinnpi ah a pai simin a cingte in lumte pua in, tuasia zawkciang a cingte ii inndoi ah koi kik uh hi." 
2Chronicles12:12 Ama in Topa tungah kiniamkhiak ahikom Topa thin uukna in ama susia bup ngawl a, Judah atu in na te a dik a pha in piang hi." 
2Chronicles12:13 Rehoboam in Jerusalem pan uk a, a kumpi hina vaang khang hi. Ama kumpi a sua laitakin kum 41 pha a, Israel ngam bup pan Topa in ama biak natu a teal Jerusalem khuapi pan ama in kum sawm le kum sali sung uk hi. Rehoboam ii nu sia Ammon ngam pan Naamah hi." 
2Chronicles12:14 Rehoboam in thusia vawt hi, banghang ziam cile ama in Topa deina zong ngawl hi." 
2Chronicles12:15 Rehoboam ii ngamtatnate a kipatna pan a tawpna dong le a innkuan thutepteena sia Kamsaang Shemaiah Taanghthu le Kamsaang Iddo Taanghthu sungah kimu hi. Rehoboam le Jeroboam sia khat le khat kido tan uh hi. 
2Chronicles12:16 Rehoboam thi in David Khuapi sung kumpi thaan ah kiphum a, a tapa Abijah in a kumpi za laih hi." 
2Chronicles13:1 Israel kumpipa Jeroboam ii kumpi maanna a kum sawm le kum liat kum in Abijah sia Judah kumpi suak a," 
2Chronicles13:2 tuaciang ama in Jerusalem khua pan kum thum sung ngam uk hi. A nu sia Gibeah khuapi pan Uriel ii tanu Micaiah hi. Abijah le Jeroboam kilaklaw ah ngal piang hi. 
2Chronicles13:3 Abijah in ngalkaphonpi 400,000 khawm a, tuaciang Jeroboam in ngalkaphonpi 800,000 taw nang hi." 
2Chronicles13:4 Ephraim mualtung ngam ah a ngalkaphonpite kisi uh hi. Zemaraim Mual ah Abijah kumpipa paito in, Jeroboam le Israel mite oksan a: “Hong ngai tavun!" 
2Chronicles13:5 Topa, Israel ii Pathian in David taw a kipalsat thei ngawl thuciamna khat vawt a, David le a suan a paalte sia Israel tungah kumpi seam tawntung tu in kumpi za a piak hunlam he ngawl nu ziam?" 
2Chronicles13:6 Nebat ii tapa Jeroboam in a kumpipa Solomon leedo hi. 
2Chronicles13:7 Tua zawkciang ama in a ngina ngawl mihing ngilo te samin, amate in Solomon ii tapa Rehoboam sia amate deina bang a vawt tu in zawthawk thu taw sawl hi, Rehoboam sia amate a nang zo tu in khangmoi leih in a heakna kicing ngawl lai hi." 
2Chronicles13:8 Topa in David suan le paalte tungah a piak a kumpi thuneina sia tu in do tu in na vaihawm uh hi. Ngalkaphonpi tam mama le na pathian tu in Jeroboam ii hong vawtsa khamh khui milimte na nei uh hi. 
2Chronicles13:9 Aaron ii suan le paal, Topa ii thiampite le Levi te na notkeak uh hi. Amate taangin a dang minamte ii vawt bangin thiampite panmun na pia uh hi. Khuital khat ahibuale tuu sali taw hong pai pawpo sia noma pathiante ii thiampi khat a suak tu in ama le ama ki aapsak thei hi." 
2Chronicles13:10 “Ahihang kote in Topa ka Pathian nusia ngawlin ama na ka seam lai uh hi. Aaron suan thiampite in thiampi na seamin Levi te in amate hu uh hi. 
2Chronicles13:11 Zing sim nitak simin amate in ama tungah ngimnamtui biakpiakna le nganno taw pumhal sangaw biakpiaknate nei uh hi. Amate in zeksa ngeina bangin a thiangtho sabuai tungah anluum biakpiakna pia a, tuaciang nitak simin khamh meivak khuam tungah meiinnte de uh hi. Kote in Topa thupiak bang ka seam uh hi, ahihang note in ama na nusia uh hi." 
2Chronicles13:12 Pathian ama mama kote lampui hi a, ama ii thiampite sia hi sungah lemle taw om in, noma a sim tu in hong sapna lemle tum tu in kinging uh hi. Israel mite awng, na taanghpupite ii Pathian, Topa do heak vun! Zo zo ngawl tu nu hi!” ci in au hi." 
2Chronicles13:13 Tua laitakin Jeroboam in a ngalkapte pawlkhat sia Judah ngalkaphonpite nungsang pan a suam tu in kuansak a, a dang teng in a mai pan pangsak hi." 
2Chronicles13:14 Judah te in a kiim a paam en kawkoai a, amate a ki uumci sia mu uh hi. Amate in Topa tungah hu ngenin au a, thiampite in lemle tum hi." 
2Chronicles13:15 Judah te au vazak in Abijah lampuina taw ngalsim hi; Pathian in Jeroboam le Israel ngalkaphonpite zo hi. 
2Chronicles13:16 Judah te kung pan Israel te tai a, Pathian in Judah mite in amate zothawsak hi." 
2Chronicles13:17 Abijah le a ngalkaphonpite in Israel te zocip a, — Israel ngalkap phabel tul za nga that uh hi." 
2Chronicles13:18 Tuabangin Judah mite in Israel tungah zawna nga hi, banghang ziam cile amate in a taanghpupite ii Pathian, Topa suang uh hi." 
2Chronicles13:19 Abijah in Jeroboam ii ngalkaphonpi del a, a khuapite pawlkhat sut hi: Bethel, Jeshanah le Ephron, tuaciang, hi khuapite khat sim ii nai ah khuanote ahi uh hi." 
2Chronicles13:20 Abijah ii kumpi maan sungin Jeroboam sia thahat kik ngei nawn ngawl hi. A khakbel ciang Topa in ama vaatvawk in thi hi. 
2Chronicles13:21 Abijah ahile a tha hat vaial hi. Ama in zi sawm le li nei a, tapa 22 le tanumei sawm le luk te ii pa ahi hi." 
2Chronicles13:22 Abijah ii taanghthu dangte, ama sonte le a nasepnate Kamsaang Iddo Taanghthu sungah ki at hi." 
2Chronicles14:1 Abijah kumpipa thi a, David Khuapi sung kumpi thaan ah kiphum hi. A tapa Asa in a kumpi za laih a, Asa khutnuai ah a ngam sia kum sawm sung kilem in nuam sa uh hi." 
2Chronicles14:2 Asa sia a maan le a pha in naseam ahikom Topa, a Pathian lungkimsak hi." 
2Chronicles14:3 Ama in ngamdangte biaknataute le a doai sepna mun te phiat a, biakna suangkhuam te saattham in a numeipathian Asherah ii limte phuktan hi." 
2Chronicles14:4 Ama in a taanghpupite ii Pathian, Topa deina bang vawt tu le a hil nate le a thupiakte zui tu in Judah mite thupia hi." 
2Chronicles14:5 Ama in Judah ngamsung khuapi theampo ah doai sepna munte le ngimnamtui halna biaknataute a phiat hu in a kumpi ngam sungah kilemna om hi. 
2Chronicles14:6 Hi hun sungin ama in Judah khuapite atu ngaldalna kulhte vawt a, Topa in kilemna pia ahikom kum tam mama sung ngal om ngawl hi." 
2Chronicles14:7 Ama in Judah mite tungah, “Ih khuapite sia luphungte, khua etna tausaangte, a kikhak thei le a kikalh thei kongpite vawtin ih dal tu hi. Topa ih Pathian ii deina bang ih vawt hu in ih ngam sia pha takin ih len zo hi. Ama in mun theampo ah hong pao hong dal a, ngammuanna hong pia hi” ci hi. Tuabangin amate in vawt a, nuam sa uh hi." 
2Chronicles14:8 Asa kumpipa in Judah ngalkaphonpi, lum le tei toai pasal 300,000 nei a, Benjamin ngalkaphonpi lum le thal toai pasal 280,000 nei hi. A vekpi in ngalkap thiamsa le ngalhangte veu ahi uh hi." 
2Chronicles14:9 Ethiopia te Zerah a kici pa in ngalkaphonpi awn khat le siphu ngalleang 300 taw Judah ngam sim a, Mareshah khua dong kuan uh hi." 
2Chronicles14:10 Asa in ama sim tu in pai a, Mareshah khuahui Zephathah Kuam sungah a panmun tek la uh hi." 
2Chronicles14:11 Asa in Topa a Pathian tungah thungen a, “ Topa awng, ngalkaphonpi thahat khat na hu bangin a thazawm ngalkaphonpi khat zongh ol takin na hu thei hi. Topa kote Pathian awng tu in hong hu ta'n, banghang ziam cile nangma kong muang kong suang uh a, nangma min suangin hi za in a tam ngalkaphonpite sim tu in ka kuan uh hi. Topa awng nang sia kote Pathian na hi hi; nangma zozo tu in a ki um ngam kuama om ngawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
2Chronicles14:12 Asa le Judah ngalkaphonpite in Ethiopia ngalkaphonpi a sim ciang Topa in Ethiopia ngalkaphonpi zawsak hi. Amate tai a," 
2Chronicles14:13 Asa le a ngalkapte in Gerar dong del uh hi. Ethiopia te tam mama kithat ahikom a ngalkaphonpite ngalsim tu in kikaikhawm kik zo ngawl hi. Topa le a ngalkaphonpite in amate zothaw ngawp ahikom a vanh tam mama laaksak uh hi. 
2Chronicles14:14 Tua munah a om mite in Topa a kiitak lei hu in ama te in Gerar kiim a om khuapite siasak thei uh hi. Tua khuapite theampo ngalkaphonpite in phuul in a vanh tam mama laaksak uh hi. 
2Chronicles14:15 Amate in tuucingte pawlkhat ii ngiaphualte zongh simin tuu le kalaoh tam mama matsak uh hi. Tua zawkciang amate Jerusalem ah heak kik uh hi. 
2Chronicles15:1 Pathian ii thaa sia Oded ii tapa Azariah tungah theng a," 
2Chronicles15:2 tuaciang, Azariah sia Asa kumpipa taw kimu tu in pai hi. Ama in, “Asa kumpipa, no Judah mite le Benjamin mite awng, hong ngai tavun! Topa na bel uh laiteng ama in hong ompui tu hi. Ama na zong uh le ama hong musak tu a, ahizong na nungngat uh le ama in hong nusia tu hi." 
2Chronicles15:3 Israel sia khuangei hialma Pathian maan nei ngawl a, a hil tu thiampite le thukham zongh nei ngawlin nungta uh hi." 
2Chronicles15:4 Ahizong a ngim nga uh ciang amate in Topa, Israel te ii Pathian zuan uh hi. Amate in ama zongin mu uh hi." 
2Chronicles15:5 Tua hun lai in kuama ngammuangin a vak a cia ngam om ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile ngam theampo ah ngimna le buaina om hi." 
2Chronicles15:6 Pathian in ngimna le heena amate tungah tungsak ahikom minam khat le minam khat, khuapi khat le khuapi khat kinengcip uh hi." 
2Chronicles15:7 Ahizong note tha hat vun a thinkiam peuma heak vun. Na nasepna thaman hong kipia tu hi,” ci in au hi." 
2Chronicles15:8 Asa in Oded ii tapa Azariah ii kamsaanna a son sia a zaak ciang tha nga hi. Ama in Judah le Benjamin ngam sungah a om milimte theampo le Ephraim mualtung ngam pan a laak khuapite sungah a om milimte theampo vawk siat hi. Ama in biakinn leitual ah a om Topa ii biaknatau zongh pua kik hi. 
2Chronicles15:9 Ephraim, Manasseh le Simeon ngam te panin mi tam mama Asa sangah pai in a kumpi ngam sungah teang uh hi, banghang ziam cile Topa ii ama taw a omkhop hunlam amate in mu uh hi. Asa in amate theampo le Judah le Benjamin mite sam hi." 
2Chronicles15:10 Amate sia Asa ii kumpi a sep zawk kum sawm le kum nga kum, a tha thum tha in Jerusalem ah kikhawm uh hi." 
2Chronicles15:11 Amate in a ngalte vanh a laaksakte sung pan: khui 700 le tuu 7,000 Topa tungah sangaw biakpiakna in tua ni in pia uh hi." 
2Chronicles15:12 A thin theampo le a thaa theampo taw a taanghpupite ii Pathian, Topa biak tu in amate lungkimin thuciamna khat vawt uh hi." 
2Chronicles15:13 A moi a haam ahizong, numei pasal ahizong ama a bia ngawl pawpo thalup tu ahi hi." 
2Chronicles15:14 Tua thuciamna a kepcing natu in Topa min taw awnging in kiciamna nei hi, tua zawkciang amate au in lemle tum uh hi." 
2Chronicles15:15 A thin theampo uh taw hi thuciamna vawt zo ahikom Judah mite theampo lungdam uh hi. Topa a biakna ah amate a lungdam uh ciang ama in saang a, mun theampo ah amate kilemna pia hi." 
2Chronicles15:16 Asa kumpipa in a pi Maacah sia ta a neisak thei Asherah numeipathian milim kiihuai khat a vawt hu in ama ii nu, kumpinu a hina pan heam hi. Asa in tua milim phuktanin ektham a, Kidron kuam sungah a bek teng haltum hi." 
2Chronicles15:17 Asa in Israel ngamsung doai sepna mun theampo susia siat ngawl ahihang a nuntak sung teng Topa tungah thumaan hi. 
2Chronicles15:18 Ama in Pathian tungah a pa Abijah ii a aap vanhte theampo le ama mama ii a aapsa ngunn le khamh taw a kivawt nate zongh Biakinnpi sungah koi hi. 
2Chronicles15:19 Ama ii kumpi maan sung kum 35 kum ciang dong ngal om nawn ngawl hi. 
2Chronicles16:1 Judah kumpipa Asa ii kumpi maanna kum 36 kumin Israel kumpipa Baasha in Judah ngam sim a, Judah ngam ah a tum a pusuak leang theampo a khaam nop manin Ramah sia kulh taw a uum kipan hi." 
2Chronicles16:2 Tua ahiciang Asa in Biakinnpi sumkholnate le kumpi inn pan khamh le ngunn la in Damascus ah Syria kumpipa Benhadad tungah thaak a, hi kam teng vaitha hi:" 
2Chronicles16:3 “Ih pate a kipawl bangma in ei zongh kipawl tawng. Hi khamh le ngunnte sia letsong in kong puak hi. Tu in Israel kumpipa Baasha taw na kipawlna sia tatsak vun, tua hile ka ngam pan ama ii ngalkapte ciasak kik tu hi.”" 
2Chronicles16:4 Asa ii kam vaithak sia Benhadad lungkimin, a ngalkapmangte le a ngalkaphonpite Israel khuapite sim tu in paisak hi. Amate in Ijon, Dan, Abel Beth Maacah le ankholna Naphtali khuapite theampo la hi." 
2Chronicles16:5 Baasha kumpipa in tua thu a zaak ciang Ramah khua a kulh vawt tawlnga in a nasep nusia hi. 
2Chronicles16:6 Tuasia ciang Asa kumpipa in Judah ngamsung theampo pan mihing khawmtua in Baasha ii Ramah ah a zak suang le thingte puasakin Geba le Mizpah khuapi kulhte vawtna in zangh hi. 
2Chronicles16:7 Tua hunin kamsaang Hanani sia Kumpipa Asa kungah pai a, “ Topa na Pathian suang ngawlin Syria kumpipa na suan zawk hu in Israel kumpipa ii ngalkaphonpi sia nangma khut sung pan suakta zo hi." 
2Chronicles16:8 Ethiopia le Libyan te in siphu ngalleang tam mama le siphu ngalkap tam mama taw ngalkaphonpite nei hi ngawl ka na ziam? Ahihang Topa muangin suang na hikom ama in amate hong zosak hi. 
2Chronicles16:9 Topa in ama tungah thumaanna a neite tungah thahatna pia nuam in leitung buppi encik nginge hi. Na mawmawt ngamtatna hu in tu pan kipan ngal do tawntung tu ni hi,” ci hi." 
2Chronicles16:10 Hi thu in kamsaangpa tungah Asa thin uuksak mama ahikom ama in kamsaangpa thikkol bulsak hi. Hi hunsung teng mama in Asa in a mite pawlkhat a vawtsiat kipan hi. 
2Chronicles16:11 Asa ii kumpi maan sungin a piang thute theampo a kipat pan a tawpna dong Judah le Israel Kumpite Taanghthu sungah kiciamtee hi. 
2Chronicles16:12 Asa ii kumpi a sep a kum 39 kumin a peang ah meima ngilo khatvei in a peang bai hi; ahihang tuasia hun ngawngawn in ama in Topa tungah hu ngen ngawlin syavuante in bawlsak zaw hi. 
2Chronicles16:13 Tua zawk a kum nii ciang ama thi a," 
2Chronicles16:14 David Khuapi sungah ama mama ii khuaksa suangkuul sungah kiphum hi. Amate in a luang phum natu a puuana in a tungah hel namtuite le paaknamtui thau te zut in ama ii thi a khuangaina in a lian mama meimang khat sep uh hi. 
2Chronicles17:1 Jehoshaphat in a pa Asa ii kumpi za laih a Israel te sim tu in ama dinmun khosak hi. 
2Chronicles17:2 Ama in kulh taw a ki uum Judah khuapite sung, Judah ngam nawl sung le a pa ii a laak Ephraim ngamsung khuapite ah a ngalkapte koi hi." 
2Chronicles17:3 Jehoshaphat in a pa ii kumpi a sua sawng lai bangma in ngamta a, Baal bia ngawl ahikom Topa in thupha pia hi." 
2Chronicles17:4 Ama in a pa ii Pathian na seamin Pathian thupiakte zui a, Israel kumpite ngamtat bangin ngamta ngawl hi." 
2Chronicles17:5 Topa in Jehoshaphat sia Judah kumpi ngam kho takin uksak a, a ngammite theampo in letsong a puak tek uh ciang ama hau in nasia takin ki upat hi." 
2Chronicles17:6 Ama in Topa na a sep sia ki angtang in Judah ngam sungah doai sepna munte theampo le Asherah numeipathian limte zongh sumai hi. 
2Chronicles17:7 Ama ii kumpi maan zawk a kum thum kumin ama in Judah khuapite ah thuhil tu in a nuai a ulian teng paisak hi: Benhail, Obadiah, Zechariah, Nethanel le Micaiah te ahi uh hi." 
2Chronicles17:7 Ama ii kumpi maan zawk a kum thum kumin ama in Judah khuapite ah thuhil tu in a nuai a ulian teng paisak hi: Benhail, Obadiah, Zechariah, Nethanel le Micaiah te ahi uh hi." 
2Chronicles17:7 Ama ii kumpi maan zawk a kum thum kumin ama in Judah khuapite ah thuhil tu in a nuai a ulian teng paisak hi: Benhail, Obadiah, Zechariah, Nethanel le Micaiah te ahi uh hi." 
2Chronicles17:8 Amate sia Levi te kua le thiampi nii in zui hi. Levi te sia Shemaiah, Nethaniah, Zebadiah, Asahel, Shemiramoth, Jehonathan, Adonijah, Tobijah le Tobadonijah hi a; thiampite sia Elishama le Jehoram te ahi hi." 
2Chronicles17:9 Amate in Topa Thukham laibu kengin Judah khuate theampo ah pai in mihonpite hil kawkoai hi. 
2Chronicles17:10 Topa in Jehoshaphat kumpipa sia tua a kiim a paam kumpi ngam theampo in simsak ngam ngawl hi. 
2Chronicles17:11 Philistine te pawlkhat in Jehoshaphat tungah ngunn tam mama le letsong dangte puak in, Arab te pawlkhat in tuu 7,700 le keal 7,700 puak uh hi." 
2Chronicles17:12 Tuabangin Jehoshaphat sia a vaanglian vaial hi. Judah ngamsung theampo ah ama in kulhte vawt in khuapite saat a," 
2Chronicles17:13 an te a vuum a saal kholna in nei hi. Ama in Jerusalem khua sungah a mindok tuam ngalkapbute sia," 
2Chronicles17:14 a bee le a phung zui in koi hi. Adnah sia Judah bee le phungte sung pan ngalkapmang hi a, a khutnuai ah ngalkap 300,000 nei hi." 
2Chronicles17:15 A zom a niina sia Jehohanan hi a, ngalkap 280,000 nei hi," 
2Chronicles17:16 a zom a thumna sia Zichri tapa Amasiah hi a, ngalkap 200,000 nei hi. (Amasiah sia Topa naseam tu in ama le ama kipia hi.)" 
2Chronicles17:17 Benjamin bee le phungte sung panin ngalkap maangpa sia a mindok tuam ngalkap Eliada hi a, lum le thal toai ngalkap 200,000 uk hi." 
2Chronicles17:18 A zom a niina pa sia Jehozabad hi a, ngalhiam toai cinghteng pasal 180,000 uk hi." 
2Chronicles17:19 Hi mite in Jerusalem ah kumpipa na a seamte hi a, tua ban ah kulh taw a ki uum Judah khuapi dangte sung zongh ah ngalkap dangte koi thua lai hi." 
2Chronicles18:1 Judah kumpipa Jehoshaphat hau in a minthan ciang a innkuanpui khat le Israel kumpipa Ahab ii innkuanpui khat a kiteen natu in vaihawm hi. 
2Chronicles18:2 Kum tawmvei zawkciang Jehoshaphat sia Ahab kung haw tu in Samaria khuapi ah pai hi. Jehoshaphat le a kithol puite a patoaina in Ahab in anneakpoai atu in khui le tuu tam mama ngo hi. Ahab in Gilead ngam Ramoth khuapi a simpui tu in Jehoshaphat paa hi. 
2Chronicles18:3 Ahab in Jehoshaphat tungah, “Ramoth khua a sim khawm tu in nong kuan tu ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Jehoshaphat in, “Na kithoai man ciang hong son ta'n, keima le ka ngalkaphonpi a kinging sa in om khu hi. Hong pawm tu khu hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
2Chronicles18:4 Tuasia ciang, “Ahihang Topa dongh phot tawng,” ci lai hi." 
2Chronicles18:5 Tua ahikom Ahab in kamsaangte 400 bang samin, “Kei pai in Ramoth sim tu khi ziam maw, sim ngawl tu khi ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Amate in, “Sim in, Pathian in zawna hong pia tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
2Chronicles18:6 Ahihang Jehoshaphat in, “ Topa ih dok thei natu in kamsaang dang om nawn ngawl ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
2Chronicles18:7 Ahab in, “Khat om lai hi, Imlah ii tapa Micaiah hi. Ahihang ama ensan khi hi, banghang ziam cile ama in kei atu a pha bangma sonkhol ngeingawl hi; a pha ngawl khat veu hi tawntung hi,” ci in zo hi. Jehoshaphat in “Tuabangin ci heak in!” ci in zo kik hi." 
2Chronicles18:8 Tua ahiciang, Ahab kumpipa in zum uliante khat sam a, Micaiah thakhatin hong paipui ta'n, ci in sawl hi." 
2Chronicles18:9 Kumpipate nii sia kumpi puantualte silh a, Samaria kongpi pua sang ancilna ah kumpi tokhumte tungah a to laitakin, kamsaang theampo in amate mai ah thusuakte son uh hi." 
2Chronicles18:10 Amate sung pan khat, Chenaanah ii tapa Zedekiah in thik kiite vawt a, Ahab munah, “Hisia Topa ii pauna hi: ‘Hite taw Syria te na sim tu a, na zocip tu hi,’ ” ci hi." 
2Chronicles18:11 Kamsaang dang theampo in tuabang vive ma in ci uh hi. “Ramoth a sim tu kuan tavun, zo tu nu hi,” ci uh hi. Topa in zawna hong pia tu hi.”" 
2Chronicles18:12 Tua lanin Micaiah sam tu in a pai ulian pa in, “Kamsaang dangte theampo in kumpipa zawna tu bebek son zo hi, nang zongh tuabang ma son hamtang lete pha tu hi,” ci hi." 
2Chronicles18:13 Ahihang Micaiah in, “A nungta Topa min lo in ka Pathian ii son a hong sawl teng son tu khi hi!” ci in zo hi." 
2Chronicles18:14 Ama Kumpipa Ahab mai ah hong kipaipui ciang, kumpipa in, “Micaiah awng, Kumpipa Jehoshaphat le kei Ramoth ah kuanin sim tu khu ziam maw, sim ngawl tu khu ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Micaiah in, “Sim vun! Na zo tu uh hi. Topa in zawna hong pia tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
2Chronicles18:15 Ahihang Ahab in, “ Topa min taw kei tungah nong pau ciangin thumaan thutak son in! Bang tanvei tuabangin hong ci tu khi ziam?” ci in zo kik hi." 
2Chronicles18:16 Micaiah in, “Israel ngalkapte sia mualtung tengah tuu cing pa om ngawl a tuute kithezau bangin ka mu hi. Tuaciang Topa in, ‘Hi mite in lampui nei ngawl hi; inn ah thinnuam takin cia hen,’ ” ci hi." 
2Chronicles18:17 Ahab in Jehoshaphat munah, “Ama in kei huvau peuma a pha khat zongh hong sonkholsak ngeingawl hi, kong ci sa hi ka na ngawl ziam; a sia khat veu hi tawntung hi!” ci hi." 
2Chronicles18:18 Micaiah in zomto a, “Tu in Topa pauna teng ngai vun! Topa sia vantung a kumpi tokhum tungah to a, ama ii vantunglalangte a kiim ah a ding ka mu hi.”" 
2Chronicles18:19 Topa in, ‘Ramoth ah Ahab pai in a kithalup natu in akua in ama theam tu nu ziam?’ ci in dongh hi. Vantunglalang pawlkhat in son khat nei a, a dangte in thudang khat a son uh hi," 
2Chronicles18:20 a khakbelin thaa khat sia mai ah hong pai a, Topa kung zuanin, ‘Keima in ama theam tu khi hi,’ a ci hi. Topa in ‘Bangbangin maw?’ ci in dongh hi." 
2Chronicles18:21 Tua thaa in, ‘Keima pai in Ahab ii kamsaangte theampo leilot thu ka sonsak tu hi!’ ci in zo kik hi. Topa in, ‘Va pai ta'n a, va theam ta'n, theam zo tu ni hi,’ ” ci hi." 
2Chronicles18:22 Tuaciang Micaiah in thu khup a, “A piang thu in hisia hi. Topa in na kamsaang hite nang tungah leilot thu hong sonsak hi. Ahihang ama mama in nang tuasiatna nga tu in a thutan sa hi!” ci hi." 
2Chronicles18:23 Tuaciangin kamsaangpa Zedekiah in Micaiah kungah paito in, a maitang beang hi, tuaciang, “Bang hun pan kipan Topa thaa in kei hong nusia a, nang tungah hong pau ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
2Chronicles18:24 Micaiah in, “Inn nungsang inndoi sung khat ah a buu tu in na pai ciangin mu tu ni hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
2Chronicles18:25 Tua zawkciang Kumpipa Ahab in a uliante khat munah, “Micaiah man in a, khuapi ukpa Amon le Kumpipa tapa Joash tungah paipui vun." 
2Chronicles18:26 Amate in ama thong sungah koi hen a, bangma tat ngawlin kong heak kik dong anluum le tui bek taw na vaak hen, ci in son in,” ci in thupia hi." 
2Chronicles18:27 “Bangma tat ngawlin nong heak kik le Topa in kei tungtawn a hong pau ngawl hi tu hi,” ci in Micaiah in ci ngaw hi. Tuaciang ama in, “Ka ci sa teng kuama po in hong ngai tavun!” ci lai hi." 
2Chronicles18:28 Tua zawkciang Israel kumpipa Ahab le Judah kumpipa Jehoshaphat te in Gilead ah Ramoth khuapi sim tu in pai uh hi. 
2Chronicles18:29 Ahab in Jehoshaphat munah, “Ngal kisim ciangin kei kong kimealseal tu a, nang na hile kumpi puan teng ma nong silh tu hi,” ci hi. Tuabangin Israel kumpipa kidona phual ah kimealseal in pai hi." 
2Chronicles18:30 Syria kumpipa in a siphu ngalleang ukte munah, Israel kumpipa ngawl buang a dang khat zongh sim ngawl tu nu hi ci hi." 
2Chronicles18:31 Tua ahikom amate in Kumpipa Jehoshaphat a mu uh ciangin a vekpi ma in Israel kumpipa sa ahiciang ama sim tu in kiheak uh hi. Ahihang ama hong au keak ahiciang Topa Pathian in suatak a, ama kung pan a simte kileesak kik hi." 
2Chronicles18:32 Siphu ngalleang ukte in ama sia Israel kumpipa ahi ngawl hunlam mu ahiciang amate in del nawn ngawl uh hi. 
2Chronicles18:33 Ahizong Syria ngalkapte khat ii kap thaltang khat in Kumpipa Ahab ii thikpuan kipeena pan kha luilam hi, “Kei liam khi hi! Ngalphual panin kiheam in!” ci in a siphu ngalleang hawlpa oksan hi." 
2Chronicles18:34 A kido saan lai tengin Kumpipa Ahab sia a siphu ngalleang sungah kikhuangkho in to a, Syria te maingat hi. Nitum laitakin ama thi hi." 
2Chronicles19:1 Judah kumpipa Jehoshaphat sia Jerusalem a kumpi inn ah ciidamin heak kik hi. 
2Chronicles19:2 Hanani ii tapa kamsaang Jehu sia kumpipa taw kisi tu in pai a, ama tungah, “Mihing seksolte hu tu le Topa a huatsa mite panpui tu sia maan sa ni ziam? Hi bangin na ngamtatna hangin Topa thin uukna na tungah thengsak ni hi." 
2Chronicles19:3 Tuabang ahitazong nang sungah phatna pawlkhat om veve hi. Nangma in mite biak Asherah numeipathian milim teng na vawk siat a, Pathian ii deina zui tu na hanciam hi,” ci hi." 
2Chronicles19:4 Jehoshaphat kumpipa sia Jerusalem khuapi ah teang hi napi a taanghpupite ii Pathian, Topa kungah mite sam kik tu in thangsang Beersheba pan saksang Ephraim mualtung ngammong dong a huhunin mite sungah khualhaw hi." 
2Chronicles19:5 Ama in kulh taw a ki uum Judah khuapi theampo ah thukhenmangte khanin," 
2Chronicles19:6 amate hi bangin thuhil hi: “Thu na khen uh ciang kidawm vun; mihing thuneina taw ngamtat tu hi ngawl a, Topa thuneina bang hizaw hi, tuaciang thu na khen uh ciang noma taw Topa hong omkhawm hi." 
2Chronicles19:7 Topa zakta vun a, ngamtatna kidawm vun, banghang ziam cile Topa ih Pathian in thumaan ngawl thimthelna, mi doidan kingupna le sumnguk neaknate dei ngawl hi,” ci hi." 
2Chronicles19:8 Jerusalem khua sungah Jehoshaphat in Levi mi, thiampite le khua sung lampuite pawlkhat sia Topa Thukham a paltan ciang ahibuale khua mite kihau in thu a nei uh ciang thu a khen tu in thukhenmang panmun pia hi." 
2Chronicles19:9 Ama in amate tungah hi bangin hil hi: “ Topa thasia vun a, na nasepna theampo ah ama thu ni in, thumaan in a muanhuai in seam tavun." 
2Chronicles19:10 Khuapite khat pawpo pan na mipuite in mihing thisakna ahizong, a dang thukham khat ahibuale thupiakna khat pawpo palsatna ahizong note kungah thu hong thetpui uh ciang amate Topa tungah a khial a maw a sua ngawl natu in thu a kisit laitakin bangbang ngamta tu ci sia pha takin hil hamtang tavun. Tuabang na seam bua uh le noma le na mipuite in Topa thin uukna na thuak tu uh hi. Ahitazong tuabang na na seam uh le mawpu ngawl tu nu hi." 
2Chronicles19:11 Biakna paaina taw kisai thu theampo ah Thiampi Lianbel Amariah in thu neibel tu a, Judah ngamuk mangpa Ishmael ii tapa Zebadiah sia khua mite taw kisai thu theampo ah thuneibel tu hi. Levi te in thukhenzum pan a thukhennate bangin kiseam suak ziam ci a etcik tu vaipuak nei hi. Kihansua vun a, hi hilnate bangin seam suak vun, Topa in a maanna sangah hong pang tahen!” ci hi." 
2Chronicles20:1 Tawmvei zawkciangin Moab le Ammon ngalkaphonpite in amate pawlpui Meun te taw Judah ngam sim uh hi. 
2Chronicles20:2 Kamtai pawlkhat hong pai in Jehoshaphat kumpipa tungah hi bangin ko hi: “Edom ngalkap honpui khat Tuipi Thi langkhat panin hong sim tu hong kuan hi. Amate in Hazazon Tamar khua la zo hi.” (Hi sia Engedi ii a min dang khat hi.) 
2Chronicles20:3 Jehoshaphat patau a, lam a lak natu in Topa tungah thungen hi. Tua zawkciang ama in ngamsung theampo ah an tanna khat nei natu in thupia hi." 
2Chronicles20:4 Khuapi sim pan Judah mite Topa lamlakna ngen tu in Jerusalem ah manlang tak hong pai in," 
2Chronicles20:5 amate le Jerusalem khua mite Biakinnpi leitual thak ah kikhawm uh hi. Jehoshaphat kumpipa hong pai in amate mai ah ding a," 
2Chronicles20:6 a ngingin, “Oh Topa ka taanghpupite ii Pathian awng, vantung le leitung ngam theampo na uk siat hi. Nangma sia a vaanglian a thahat na hi a, kuama in hong nalh zo ngawl hi." 
2Chronicles20:7 Nangma in koma Pathian na hi hi. Israel na mite hi ngam sungah hong kikhiin ciang, hi sungah a teang mite na nawtkeak a, ngam le lei teng sia na lawm Abraham suan le paal te tungah a tawntung a tu in na pia hi." 
2Chronicles20:8 Amate hi ngam sungah teangin nangma hong patoaina in biakinn khat sa zo a," 
2Chronicles20:9 amate daan na piakna in tuasiatna khat pawpo — ngal kidona, a kilaw thei natna ahibuale kialpi — na tunsak ciang amate hong pai in nangma hong biakna hi Biakinnpi mai ah a din thei hunlam he uh hi. Amate in a ngim ngana huvau na tungah thu hong ngen thei a, tuaciang nangma in za in na suatak hi." 
2Chronicles20:10 “Tu in Ammon mi, Moab mi le Edom mite in ko hong sim zo hi. Ka taanghpupite Egypt ngam pan a pusua lai in tua ngamte sung a tum tu oai ngawl na hi komin ka taanghpupite in hi ngamte kiimvealin susia ngawl uh hi." 
2Chronicles20:11 Ko tungah amate hong lo kikna sia hi bang hi — nong piaksa ngam pan hong notkeak tu in amate hong pai uh hi. 
2Chronicles20:12 Nangma in koma Pathian na hi hi! Amate daan pia in. Banghang ziam cile ko hong sim, hi ngalkaphonpite mai ah ka ci ka law uh he ngawl khu hi. Bang vawt tu ci sia ka heak ngawl uh hangin nangma ii nong hu tu lam en khu hi,” ci in thungen hi." 
2Chronicles20:13 Judah mi theampo a zite a tate taw tualai Biakinnpi ah ding uh hi. 
2Chronicles20:14 Mihonpi sungah a om Levi te khat ii tungah Topa thaa hong theng hi. Ama min Jahaziel hi a Zechariah ii tapa ahi hi. Ama sia Asaph bee le phung pan hi a, Mattaniah, Jeiel le Benaiah te ii sungsuak, Asaph suan ahi hi." 
2Chronicles20:14 Mihonpi sungah a om Levi te khat ii tungah Topa thaa hong theng hi. Ama min Jahaziel hi a Zechariah ii tapa ahi hi. Ama sia Asaph bee le phung pan hi a, Mattaniah, Jeiel le Benaiah te ii sungsuak, Asaph suan ahi hi." 
2Chronicles20:15 Jahaziel in, “Nangma kumpipa le no Judah le Jerusalem mite theampo awng, na ngalte a tam hangin thinkiamin lau ngawl het tu nu hi, Topa in hong ci hi. Ngal kisimna sia Pathian ii sep tu hi a, no taw kisai ngawl hi." 
2Chronicles20:16 Zing ciang amate Ziz mualciangh lam hong totto laitakin sim vun. Jeruel nai ngam tawnghtol sang paina leikuam tawpna ah na kisi tu uh hi. 
2Chronicles20:17 Note in hi ngal do kul ngawl tu hi. Panmunte la po vun a, ngak vun; Topa ii zawna hong piak na mu tu uh hi. Judah mite le Jerusalem mite awng, haisaang heak vun a lau heak vun. Ngalsim tu in kuan vun, Topa in note hong ompui tu hi!” ci hi." 
2Chronicles20:18 Tuasia ciang Jehoshaphat kumpipa sia a mai lei pha dongin kun a, mipi teng zongh kunin Topa bia uh hi." 
2Chronicles20:19 Levi te ahi Kohath le Korah ii bee le phungte dingto in a nging tatakin au a, Israel te ii Pathian, Topa pok uh hi." 
2Chronicles20:20 A zing ciang zingtuungin mihonte Tekoa hui ngamsung zuan uh hi. A vaidin uh ciang Jehoshaphat in amate tungah kam vaitha hi: “Judah mite le Jerusalem mite awng! Topa na Pathian muang vun, tua hile kip takin na ding thei tu uh hi. Ama kamsaangte ii hong sonte um vun, tua hile na ma na tun tu uh hi.”" 
2Chronicles20:21 Mipite thu a kikuppui zawkciang kumpipa in music thiam pawlkhat sia biakna poai vawt ciang amate silh bul puantualte silhsak a, ngalkaphonpi mai ah paisak a: “ Topa pok vun! Ama hong itna kip tawntung hi!” ci in lasa sak hi." 
2Chronicles20:22 Tuabangin lasak a kipat po uh ciang Topa in ngal a sim ngalkaphonpite tungah patauna tungsak hi. 
2Chronicles20:23 Ammon te le Moab te in Edom ngalkaphonpite simin a suksiat cip zawkciang amate le amate nasia takin kisim uh hi. 
2Chronicles20:24 Judah ngalkaphonpi in sennealngamsung tausaang khat a thet uh ciang a ngalte sang a et le amate a vekpi in lei ah thi peakpuk sia mu uh hi. Khat zongh suakta ngawl hi. 
2Chronicles20:25 Jehoshaphat le a ngalkapte sia a ngalte vanh laksak tu in pai a, khui, neak le dawn, puansilhte le vanh manpha dangte mu uh hi. Amate in ni thum sung vanhte khawmtua napi tamleih ahikom a vekpi in la siat zo ngawl uh hi." 
2Chronicles20:26 A ni li ni in amate sia Beracah Kuam ah kikhawm a, ama ii vawtsa theampo atu in Topa pok uh hi. Tua ahikom tua kuam sia “Beracah” kici hi." 
2Chronicles20:27 Topa in a ngalte zawsak zo ahikom Jehoshaphat lampui in, a ngalkapte Jerusalem ah zawna le lungdamna taw cia kik uh hi." 
2Chronicles20:28 Amate khuapi a thet ciang tengtongh le lemlete tumin Biakinnpi zuan uh hi. 
2Chronicles20:29 Topa in Israel ii ngalte a zawsakna thu a za ngam theampo lau mama uh hi. 
2Chronicles20:30 Tuabangin Pathian in a kiim a paam pan ngammuangsak ahikom Jehoshaphat in dai takin ngam uk hi. 
2Chronicles20:31 Jehoshaphat sia kum 35 a phakin Judah kumpi suak a, Jerusalem panin kum 25 sung uk hi. A nu sia Shilhi ii tanu Azubah ahi hi." 
2Chronicles20:32 Ama mai ah a pa Asa bangma in Topa muna ah a maan in seam hi; 
2Chronicles20:33 ahihang doai sepna munte susia ngawl hi. Mipite in a taanghpupite ii Pathian biakna sang ah thintak lungtak taw kiheak ngawl lai uh hi. 
2Chronicles20:34 Jehoshaphat ii nasep dangte theampo a kumpi maan kipat pan a bo dong Israel Kumpipate ii Taanghthu sungah a kihel Hanani ii Tapa Jehu Taanghthu sungah kiciamtee hi. 
2Chronicles20:35 Hun khat lai in Judah kumpipa Jehoshaphat in thusia tam mama a vawt, Israel kumpipa Ahaziah taw kipawlna khat vawt hi." 
2Chronicles20:36 Amate in teambaw tawlngakna Eziongeber ah tuipi teambawte vawt uh hi. 
2Chronicles20:37 Ahihang Mareshah khua mi, Dodavahu ii tapa Eliezer in Jehoshaphat tungah, “Ahaziah taw kipawlna na vawt hu in na vawtsa nate Topa in lalsak tu hi,” ci in a kidop natu son hi. Tuaciang a teambawte siatham a, tuipi tungah paisak ngei nawn ngawl hi." 
2Chronicles21:1 Jehoshaphat thi a, David Khuapi sung kumpi thaan ah kiphumin a tapa Jehoram in a kumpi za laih hi." 
2Chronicles21:2 Judah kumpipa Jehoshaphat ii tapa Jehoram in suapui pasal luk nei a: Azariah, Jehiel, Zechariah, Azariahu, Michael le Shephatiah ahi hi." 
2Chronicles21:2 Judah kumpipa Jehoshaphat ii tapa Jehoram in suapui pasal luk nei a: Azariah, Jehiel, Zechariah, Azariahu, Michael le Shephatiah ahi hi." 
2Chronicles21:3 A pa in amate khamh, ngunn le a neisa na manpha tam ma pia a, Judah ngamsung kulh taw a ki uum khuapite khat tek uksak hi. Ahihang Jehoram sia a lianbel ahikom Jehoshaphat in ama za laihsak hi." 
2Chronicles21:4 Jehoram in a kumpi ngamukna a kip ciang, a suapui pasalte teng le Israel uliante pawlkhat zongh thatsak hi." 
2Chronicles21:5 Jehoram sia kum 32 a phak kumin kumpi suak a, Jerusalem khua pan kum liat sung uk hi." 
2Chronicles21:6 Ahab ii tanute khat a teenpui hu in ama in Ahab kumpipa le Israel kumpi dangte ii seksol ngamtatna zui hi. Ama in Topa tungah mawna khialna vawt hi," 
2Chronicles21:7 ahihang Topa in David taw thuciamna khat vawt zo a, David suan le paalte in ngam uk tawntung tu hi ci in kamciam ahikom Topa in David ii kumpi khangngui susia nuam ngawl hi." 
2Chronicles21:8 Jehoram ii kumpi maan sungin Edom ngam in Judah ngam leedo in, a suakta kumpi ngam khat suak hi." 
2Chronicles21:9 Tuabangin Jehoram le a ngalkap bute in siphu ngalleang taw kuanin Edom ngamsung tumin sim uh hi. Tua munah Edom te ngalkaphonpi in amate kiim uum a, ahihang zanin amate pusuak thei in suakta uh hi." 
2Chronicles21:10 Tua hun pan kipan Edom sia Judah khut sung pan suatakna nga hi. Jehoram in a taanghpupite ii Pathian, Topa a nusiat hu in hi hun sung mama in Libnah khuapi zongh in leedo hi." 
2Chronicles21:11 Ama in Judah ngam mualsaangte tungah doai sepna munte ngawngawn vawtin, Judah le Jerusalem mite Topa langpanin mawna sung then hi." 
2Chronicles21:12 Kamsaangpa Elijah in Jehoram laithak a, a lai sungah: “Na pa Jehoshaphat kumpipa ahibuale na pu Asa kumpite ii lamlakna bangin na zui ngawl hu in na taanghpupi David ii Pathian, Topa in nang hong puavawk hi." 
2Chronicles21:13 Israel kumpite lamlakna zuizaw in Ahab le ama za a laih te ii Israel te sia thumaanna panin a pialpui bangma Judah le Jerusalem mite Pathian tungah thumaan ngawl tu in lam na pui hi. Nangma sangin mi phazaw na suapuite ngawngawn na suamlum hi. 
2Chronicles21:14 Tua ahikom Topa in na mite, na tate le na zite nasia takin daan pia tu a, na neisate susia tu hi." 
2Chronicles21:15 Nangma mama in ngilzang natna khat na nga tu a, ni khat sangin ni khat nasia vaial tu hi,” ci in at hi." 
2Chronicles21:16 Philistine te le Arab te pawlkhat sia Ethiopia te pawlkhat teenna tuipi dung teng ah teang uh hi. Tua mite sia Jehoram a sim tu in Topa in thawn hi. 
2Chronicles21:17 Amate in Judah ngam simin kumpipa inn phuul a, a tapa nobel Ahaziah simngawl a zite le a tapate theampo paipui in thongtaaksak hi." 
2Chronicles21:18 Hiteng theampo a pian zawkciang Topa in kumpipa sia a bot mama ngilsung natna khat veisak hi. 
2Chronicles21:19 A natna nasia vaial in kum nii dektak zawkciang thuak zo ngawlin thi hi. A khutnuai ngammite ii a taanghpupite atu a vawtsak ngei bangin thina huvau khuangaina lakna in meimang sep ngawl uh hi. 
2Chronicles21:20 Jehoram kum 32 a phak ciang kumpi suak a, Jerusalem khua pan kum liat sung uk hi. A thi ciang kuama khuangai ngawl hi. Amate in ama sia David Khuapi sungah phum ahihang kumpi thaan ah phum ngawl uh hi." 
2Chronicles22:1 Arab te pawlkhat in Jerusalem simin Jehoram kumpipa ii tapa teng a nobel Ahaziah simngawl thatlum siat hi. Tua ahikom tu in Jerusalem khua mite in Ahaziah sia a pa ii kumpiza laihsak hi. 
2Chronicles22:2 Ahaziah kum 22 a phakin kumpi suak a, Jerusalem khua pan kum khat sung uk hi. A nu Athaliah — Israel kumpipa Omri ii tunu, Ahab kumpipa ii tanu — ii ngaisutna a piak hu in ama a tatsia suaksak a Ahaziah zongh Ahab kumpipa innkuan ii ngamtatna zui hi." 
2Chronicles22:3  
2Chronicles22:4 A pa thi zawkciang Ahab kumpipa innkuanpui dang teng sia ama ngaisutna a piate suak ahi hu in Topa tungah maw in tuate in ama puksak hi. 
2Chronicles22:5 Amate ii ngaisutna piak bangin ama in zui a Syria kumpipa Hazael taw ngal kidona ah Israel kumpipa Joram pawlpui hi. Gilead ngam Ramoth ah ngalkaphonpite kisim a, ngalsimna ah Joram liam hi." 
2Chronicles22:6 A liamna kibawl tu in Joram sia Jezreel khuapi ah heak kik a, tua munah Ahaziah in ve hi." 
2Chronicles22:7 Hi bangin Joram a ve in a pai sia Pathian in Ahaziah ii puk natu in a zak ahi hi. Tua mun ah Ahaziah a taam sungin Ahab kumpi khang ngui siasak tu in Topa ii tealsa Nimshi ii tapa Jehu in ama le Joram thato hi. 
2Chronicles22:8 Pathian ii tua khangngui tungah a thukhen bang Jehu in a taksuasak laitakin Ahaziah khualhawna ah a zui Ahaziah ii tute le Judah lampuite pawlkhat taw kisii uh hi. Jehu in amate that siat hi. 
2Chronicles22:9 Ahaziah a kizon ciang a bukna Samaria khua sungah mu hi. Amate in ama sia Jehu kungah paipui in thatsak hi. Ahihang amate in Topa atu a sep thei za a seam a pu Jehoshaphat kumpipa a zatakna uh taw Ahaziah ii luang sia phum hi. Ahaziah innkuan sungah kumpi ngam uk thei tu khat zongh taang ngawl hi. 
2Chronicles22:10 Ahaziah kumpipa ii nu Athaliah in a tapa a kithalupsak sia a heak po ciang Judah kumpi innkuanpui theampo a kithalup natu in thupia hi. 
2Chronicles22:11 Ahaziah in thiampi Jehoiada taw a kiteang Jehosheba a kici suapui sealh numei khat nei hi. Tua nu in Ahaziah ii tapate khat a hi Joash a kici pa suatak ku in, a kithat tu kumpi tapa dangte kung panin la a, nau omh khat taw Biakinnpi sung lupna inndoi khat sungah phual hi. Tuabangin a seal hu in Jehosheba in Joash sia Athaliah khut sungah a thi natu panin suatak hi." 
2Chronicles22:12 Athaliah ii kumpinu a sep kum luk sung theampo tua munah ama buu top hi. 
2Chronicles23:1 Kum luk sung a ngak zawkciang thiampi Jehoiada in a sep tu hun hong theng zo hi ci in khensat hi. Ama in ngalkapbu ngate: Jeroham ii tapa Azariah, Jehohanan ii tapa Ishmael, Obed ii tapa Azariah, Adaiah ii tapa Maaseiah le Zichri ii tapa Elishaphat te taw thukimna khat vawt uh hi." 
2Chronicles23:2 Amate Judah khuapi theampo ah khualhaw in Levi te le, bee le phung lutangte a vekpi in Jerusalem ah paipui kik uh hi." 
2Chronicles23:3 Amate a vekpi in Biakinnpi sungah kikhawmtua in kumpipa ii tapa Joash taw thuciamna khat vawt uh hi. Jehoiada in amate tungah, “Hong thi san sa kumpipa ii a tapa sia hi lai ah om hi! David suan le paalte kumpi seam tu hi ci a, Topa ii kamciamsa thu om bangin ama zongh tu in kumpi suak tu hi." 
2Chronicles23:4 Ih vawt tu sia hisia hi. Thiampite le Levi te, Sabbath ni in vaipuak nei tu in hong pai uh ciangin khen thum sua khen khat in biakinn kongpite cing tu a," 
2Chronicles23:5 a dang khen thum sua khen khat in kumpi inn cing tu hi, a taanglai teng in Kongpi Bulpi ah om tu uh hi. Mite theampo biakinn leitual ah kikhawm tu uh hi." 
2Chronicles23:6 A vaipuak a seam thiampite le Levi te simngawl kuama biakna innte sungah tumsak ngawl hi. Amate sia a ki aap sate ahikom tum thei hi, a dangte ahile Topa thupiak bang peal ngawlin zui in, a pua sangah a om tu hi." 
2Chronicles23:7 Levi te in namsau doksa in kumpipa cingin, a paina pawpo ah om tu uh hi. Biakinnpi sung tum a sawm pawpo sia kithatlum tu hi,” ci hi." 
2Chronicles23:8 Levi te le Judah mipite in Jehoiada thupiak bangin seam suak uh hi. Sabbath ni in vaipuak a pengte ciasak ngawl ahikom nasep ukte in naseam tu hong kuante le nasep a mansa a cia tute zongh na seamsak thei hi. 
2Chronicles23:9 Jehoiada in Biakinnpi sungah a kep David kumpipa ii neisa lumte le teite uliante pia hi. 
2Chronicles23:10 Ama in kumpipa cing tu in pasalte namsau dok sa in Biakinnpi mai kiimkot ah koi hi. 
2Chronicles23:11 Tua zawkciang Jehoiada in Joash pusuapui a, kumpilukhu khusakin kumpi ki ukna thukham laibu khat pia hi. Tuabangin ama kumpi kisuaksak hi. Thiampi Jehoaiada le a tapate in Joash sathau noai a, a om theampo in, “Kumpipa a khansau tahen,” ci in au uh hi." 
2Chronicles23:12 Mihonpite ii kumpipa a pokna aw Athaliah in a zaak ciang mihon kikhopna Biakinnpi ah manlang takin pai hi. 
2Chronicles23:13 Ama in tua munah kumpi thak pa zongh kumpipa atu in a kituam koi Khuam sia kung, biakinn tumna ah ngalkap bute le lemle tumte in kiim uum in a ding mu hi. A om theampo lungdamin au a lemle tum hi, biakinn music thiamte in tumtheite taw tua poai lampui uh hi. Athaliah khuangai a, a puante baltham in “Hong leeheak hi! Hong leeheak hi!” ci in au hi." 
2Chronicles23:14 Jehoiada in Athaliah sia biakinn huang sungah a kithalup tu dei ngawl ahikom a ngalkap bute pawlkhat sam a, “Ama la in, a ngualin a om a cingte kilaklaw panin paipui vun, ama suatak tu a sawm pawpo that vun,” ci hi." 
2Chronicles23:15 Amate in ama zamh in kumpi inn ah paipui a tua mun Siphu Kongpi ah thatlum uh hi. 
2Chronicles23:16 Thiampi Jehoiada in Joash kumpipa le mipite ama taw kingawm in Topa mi ahi natu in thuciamna khat vawt hi. 
2Chronicles23:17 Tua zawkciang amate Baal biakinn ah pai siatin biakinn susia hi. Amate in tua munah biaknataute le milimte saattham siatin biaknatau mai ah Baal thiampi Mattan thatlum hi. 
2Chronicles23:18 Jehoiada in thiampite le Levi te Biakinnpi ah nasep a uk tu in koi hi. Amate in David kumpipa ii a see sa nasep om bangin a sep suak tu le Moses Thukham om bangin Topa tungah a kipia sangaw biakpiaknate a hal tu ahi hi. Amate in tumthei te le poai vawtna te zongh uk uh hi. 
2Chronicles23:19 Jehoiada in biakpiakna ah a thiang ngawlte peuma a khaam tu in biakinn kongcingte zongh koi hi. 
2Chronicles23:20 Ngalkap bute, khua mi lampuite, ulian te le mipite theampo in Jehoiada pawm a, a kingual sa in Biakinnpi pan kumpi inn ah kumpipa paipui uh hi. Amate kongpi lianbel panin tumin tuaciang kumpi tokhum tungah kumpipa hong to hi." 
2Chronicles23:21 Tu in Athaliah kithatlum zo ahikom khuapi thimdide in mi theampo lungdamna taw kidim uh hi. 
2Chronicles24:1 Joash sia kum sali a phak kumin Judah kumpi suak a, Jerusalem pan kum 40 sung uk hi. A nu sia Beersheba khua mi Zibiah ahi hi." 
2Chronicles24:2 Ama in thiampi Jehoiada nuntak laitengin a sep a vawtna ah Topa lungdamsak hi. 
2Chronicles24:3 Jehoiada in Joash kumpipa atu in zi nii tealsak a, a zite taw tanute tapate toai hi." 
2Chronicles24:4 Tawmvei kumpi a sep zawkciang Joash in Biakinnpi puuaphat tu in khensat hi. 
2Chronicles24:5 Ama in thiampite le Levi te Judah ngamsung khuapi theampo ah paisak in kum sim Biakinnpi puua natu a kisam za sum khon tu in sawl hi. Ama in manlang a vawt paih natu in sawl ahihang Levi te haisaang ahiciang," 
2Chronicles24:6 ama in amate lampui Jehoiada samin, “ Topa ompuina Puanbuk atu in mipite in panpuina phiangshia pia tahen ci a Topa naseampa Moses ii tangkal bangin, banghangin Levi te in Judah mite le Jerusalem mite tung pan shia khonsak ngawl ni ziam?” ci in thu dongh hi." 
2Chronicles24:7 (Nupi thimthel Athaliah ii nungzuite in Biakinnpi susia in biakinn vanh thiangtho tam mamate Baal biakna in zangh zo hi.) 
2Chronicles24:8 Kumpipa in Levi te tungah sum khiakte khol natu thingkuang khat vawtin biakinn kongpi ah a koi natu in thupia hi. 
2Chronicles24:9 Amate in Pathian naseampa Moses ii a masabel in duisung ngampa ah a khon phiangshia sia kuama po in Topa tungah a piak natu in Jerusalem le Judah ngamsung theampo ah zasak kawkoai uh hi. 
2Chronicles24:10 Hi thu in mipite le a lampuite lungdamsak a, amate in a shia sumte hong paipui tekin thingkuang dim hi." 
2Chronicles24:11 Ni simin Levi te in tua vaipuak nei kumpi ulian khat tungah tua thingkuang puak uh hi. Thingkuang a dim simin kumpi thuzeakpa le Thiampi Lianpa ii taangmipa in a sumte la in a thingkuang sia a omna ngei ah koi kik uh hi. Tuabangin amate in sum tam ma khon uh hi. 
2Chronicles24:12 Kumpipa le Jehoiada in tua sumte sia Biakinnpi puuana a saite tungah pia uh hi, amate in a puua tu in suang ciangte, lettamate le thik vawt te cial uh hi." 
2Chronicles24:13 Naseamte theampo in nasep hanciam tekin Biakinnpi sia a sakciil bang linlian in a kho mama in puuapha kik uh hi. 
2Chronicles24:14 A puuanate a man zawkciang khamh le ngunn a taanglaite sia kumpipa le Jehoiada pia a, amate in Biakinnpi atu a kisamh kuangnote le nazak dangte vawtna in zangh uh hi. Jehoiada nuntak lai tengin Biakinnpi ah sangaw biakpiakna te a hun maan in kipia hi." 
2Chronicles24:15 Huai mama in kum 130 a phak zawkciang ama thi hi. 
2Chronicles24:16 Israel mipi atu, Pathian atu le Biakinnpi atu a nasep kiheaksak na in amate in David Khuapi, kumpi thaan ah phum uh hi." 
2Chronicles24:17 Ahihang Jehoiada thi zawk po ciang Judah lampuite in Joash kumpipa sia amate thu ngai tu in zol zaw hi. 
2Chronicles24:18 Tua ahikom, mipite in a taanghpupite ii Pathian, Topa Biakinnpi sungah biakna vawt nawn ngawlin milimte le Asherah numeipathian limte bia tu kipan uh hi. Hi mawna khialna a vawt nate taw Judah le Jerusalem tungah Topa thin uuksak hi." 
2Chronicles24:19 Topa in ama a zot kik natu a phawksak tu in amate kungah kamsaangte a puak hang mite in nangai ngawl uh hi. 
2Chronicles24:20 Tuasia ciang Pathian thaa in thiampi Jehoiada ii tapa Zechariah tungah theng hi. Ama mipite mu theina ah dingin, “ Topa Pathian in banghangin a thupiakte zui ngawlin noma le noma tungah tuasiatna tungsak nu ziam! Note in ama nusia nu hi, tua hu in ama in note hong nusia hi!” ci in aukeak hi." 
2Chronicles24:20 Tuasia ciang Pathian thaa in thiampi Jehoiada ii tapa Zechariah tungah theng hi. Ama mipite mu theina ah dingin, “ Topa Pathian in banghangin a thupiakte zui ngawlin noma le noma tungah tuasiatna tungsak nu ziam! Note in ama nusia nu hi, tua hu in ama in note hong nusia hi!” ci in aukeak hi." 
2Chronicles24:21 Joash kumpipa in Zechariah a kithasawmna ah pawmin, kumpipa thupiakna taw mipite in biakinn tual ah Zechariah suang taw deanglum uh hi." 
2Chronicles24:21 Joash kumpipa in Zechariah a kithasawmna ah pawmin, kumpipa thupiakna taw mipite in biakinn tual ah Zechariah suang taw deanglum uh hi." 
2Chronicles24:22 Kumpipa in Zechariah ii pa Jehoiada ii ama tungah a thumaan nasepnate mangil a, Zechariah thatsak hi. Zechariah in a thi dektak ciang, “Na vawt uh sia Topa in hong mu in note daan hong pia tahen!” ci in au san hi." 
2Chronicles24:22 Kumpipa in Zechariah ii pa Jehoiada ii ama tungah a thumaan nasepnate mangil a, Zechariah thatsak hi. Zechariah in a thi dektak ciang, “Na vawt uh sia Topa in hong mu in note daan hong pia tahen!” ci in au san hi." 
2Chronicles24:23 Tua kum tangngam phalbi kipat hun ciang Syria ngalkaphonpi in Judah le Jerusalem simin a lampui theampo that a, vanh tam mama laksak in Damascus ah ciapui hi." 
2Chronicles24:24 Syria ngalkapte tawm ahihang, Judah mite in a taanghpupite ii Pathian, Topa a taisat hu in Topa in a tamzaw pek Judah ngalkaphonpite zosak hi. Hi bangin Joash kumpipa daan kithuaksak hi." 
2Chronicles24:25 Ama nasia takin liam a, ngalte a nungkin zawkciang thiampi Jehoiada ii tapa a thalup hu in a ulian te nii in thasawm a, a phulamna in a lupna tungah thatlum hi. Ama David Khuapi sungah kiphum ahihang kumpi thaan ah kiphum ngawl hi." 
2Chronicles24:26 (Joash a suamte sia Ammon numei Shimeath ii tapa Zabad le Moab numei Shimrith ii tapa Jehozabad ahi hi.) 
2Chronicles24:27 Kumpite ii Thubu Sontelna sungah Joash tapate taanghthu, ama atu a pha ngawl kamsaanna te le Biakinnpi a sak kikna thu tepteenate kihel hi. A tapa Amaziah in a kumpiza laih hi." 
2Chronicles25:1 Amaziah sia kum 25 a phakin kumpi suak a, Jerusalem pan kum 29 sung uk hi. A nu sia Jerusalem khua mi Jehoaddin hi." 
2Chronicles25:2 Ama in Topa diksak bang seam ahihang a sepna ah thalawp ngawl hi.
