2Chronicles25:3 Ama thuneina a kip po ciang, a pa a that ulian teng that hi." 
2Chronicles25:4 Ahihang ama in Moses Thukham sungah Topa thupiak bang zui in tua ulian te ii tate that ngawl hi, Moses Thukham sungah: “A tate ii khialna liante hangin a nu le a pa kithat ngawl tu a, a nu le a pa khialna liante hangin a tate kithat ngawl tu hi; mihing khat sia ama mama ii vawt khialna lian hang bekin kithisak tu hi,” ci in om hi." 
2Chronicles25:5 Amaziah kumpipa in Judah le Benjamin namte sung pan pasal theampo ngalkap tumsak a, a bee a phung zui in khen hi, tuaciang tulkhat uk le zakhat uk tu in ngalkapbute koi hi. Hi sungah kum kul le a tungsia theampo kihel a, a vekpi in 300,000 pha hi. Amate sia ngalkap a khop tuamte hi a, ngalsim thei paih tu lum le tei toai thiam sa te vive hi." 
2Chronicles25:6 Tua bek dom ngawlin ama in ngunn kilogramme 3,400 bang thaman pia in, Israel ngalkap 100,000 cial hi." 
2Chronicles25:7 Ahihang kamsaang khat kumpipa kungah pai in, “Hi Israel ngalkapte la heak in. Hi saksang kumpi ngam pan mite Topa in ompui ngawl hi." 
2Chronicles25:8 Amate in ngal kisimna ah nang hong thahatsak zaw tu hi, ci in um tha tu ni hi, ahihang zawna le lelna a pia vaang a nei sia Pathian hi a, ama in na ngalte hong lelsak tu hi,” ci hi." 
2Chronicles25:9 Amaziah kumpipa in kamsaangpa tungah, “Tua ahile ka piaksa ngunnte theampo a thawthong suak tu ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Kamsaangpa in, “Tuasia sangin a tamzaw Topa in nang hong pia kik thei hi!” ci in zo kik hi." 
2Chronicles25:10 Tua ahiciang Amaziah in a cial ngalkapte ciasak kik hi. Tuabangin amate cia a, Judah mite tungah thin uuk mama uh hi." 
2Chronicles25:11 Amaziah ama le ama kihansua in Ci Kuam ah a ngalkaphonpi paipui hi. Tua munah amate in Edom ngalkapte simin 10,000 thatin" 
2Chronicles25:12 a dang 10,000 man uh hi. Amate in thongtaakte Sela khuapi liangbo sia tungah paipui a, a nuai suang tungah a kiseplum tu in lawnsuk hi." 
2Chronicles25:13 Tua hun laitakin Amaziah ii a ngalsim khoppui tu in a oai ngawl Israel ngalkapte in Samaria le Beth Horon kilaklaw a om Judah khuapite sim a, pasal 3,000 thatin, vanh tam mama laaksak uh hi." 
2Chronicles25:14 Amaziah sia Edom ngalkapte zo in a cia kik ciang, amate ii biak milimte ciapui a, omna pia a, tuaciang ngimnamtui halin bia hi." 
2Chronicles25:15 Hisia in Topa thin uuksak ahiciang, Amaziah kungah kamsaang khat paisak hi. Kamsaangpa in, “Nangma khut sung pan ngawngawn in a mipuite a hun zo ngawl ngamdang pathiante banghangin bia ni ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
2Chronicles25:16 A kampau suan a, Amaziah in, “Bang hun pan kipanin kumpipa ngaisutna pia tu in hong koi khu ziam? Pau nawn heak in, tua ahibuale hong thatsak tu khi hi!” ci hi. Kamsaangpa in, “Hi bang teng ngamta zo a, ngaisutna kong piak sia awlmawk ngawl na hi hu in Pathian in nangma hong susia tu in khensat zo ahi sia tu in ka he hi,” a ci zawkciang a pau tawp pheang hi." 
2Chronicles25:17 Judah kumpipa Amaziah le ama thu dokte in Israel ngam sim sawm uh hi. Tuaciang ama in Jehoahaz ii tapa, Jehu ii tupa Israel kumpipa Jehoash tungah thu puakin a do natu in thato hi." 
2Chronicles25:18 Jehoash in Amaziah tungah hi bangin zo kik hi: “Khatvei lai in Lebanon Mualte tung pan lingkung khat in cedar thing kung tungah thu khat puak hi: ‘Ka tapa zi tu in na tanu hong pia ta'n,’ ci hi. Ngamsa khat pai in tua lingkung siikcil hi" 
2Chronicles25:19 Tu in Amaziah awng Edom te na zaw hu in kiphasak ni hi, ahihang na inn ah om hithiat lete hong oai zaw khi hi. Banghangin nangma le na mite tuasiat natu bekin ngim zong vealvul ni ziam?”" 
2Chronicles25:20 Ahihang Amaziah in tua thu nadon ngawl hi. Hi bang a Amaziah ii a ngallel tu sia Pathian ii deina hi a, ama ii Edom milimte a biak hang ahi hi." 
2Chronicles25:21 Tuabangin Israel kumpipa Jehoash in Judah kumpipa Amaziah sim tu in kuan hi. Amate Judah ngam Beth Shemesh ah kisii a," 
2Chronicles25:22 Judah ngalkaphonpite ngallel in, a inn tek ah tai siat uh hi." 
2Chronicles25:23 Jehoash in Amaziah manin Jerusalem ah paipui hi. Tua munah ama in khuapi uumna luphung sia Ephraim Kongpi panin Khuakiing Kongpi ciang metre 200 dektak a sau sia sutham uh hi. 
2Chronicles25:24 Ama in Biakinnpi sung pan a laaksak ngunn le khamh te theampo, Obed Edom ii suan le paalte ii a cin biakinn vanhzakte le kumpi inn sungah a om sum le vanh manpha theampo Samaria ah paipui kik hi. A ngalmatte zongh tonpui hi." 
2Chronicles25:25 Judah kumpipa Amaziah sia Israel kumpipa Jehoash sangin kum sawm le kum nga a khansauzaw hi. 
2Chronicles25:26 Amaziah ii kumpi maanna a kipat pan a bo dong a vawt dangte theampo Judah le Israel Kumpite Taanghthu sungah kiciamtee hi. 
2Chronicles25:27 Amaziah ii Topa a leedo hun pan kipan Jerusalem khua ah ama kithasawm hi. A khakbel ciang ama sia Lachish khuapi ah tai ahihang, a ngalte in zui in tua munah that hi." 
2Chronicles25:28 A luang sia Jerusalem ah siphu taw kipua in, David Khuapi sung kumpite thaan ah kiphum hi." 
2Chronicles26:1 Judah mite theampo in Amaziah ii tapa kum sawm le kum luk a pha Uzziah sia a pa ii kumpiza laih tu in teal uh hi. 
2Chronicles26:2 (Amaziah ii thi zawkciang Uzziah in Elath khuapi la kikin puua kik hi.) 
2Chronicles26:3 Uzziah sia kum sawm le kum luk a phakin kumpi suak a, ama in Jerusalem khua pan kum 52 sung uk hi. A nu sia Jerusalem khua mi Jecoliah ahi hi." 
2Chronicles26:4 A pa ngamtat zui in, Topa ii diksak te seam hi." 
2Chronicles26:5 Biakna vai a thudok Zechariah ii nuntak lai teng Uzziah in thumaan takin Topa na seam ahikom Pathian in ama thupha pia hi. 
2Chronicles26:5 Biakna vai a thudok Zechariah ii nuntak lai teng Uzziah in thumaan takin Topa na seam ahikom Pathian in ama thupha pia hi. 
2Chronicles26:6 Uzziah in Philistine te taw kisim hi. Ama in Gath, Jamnia le Ashdod khuapite uumna luphungte sutham in Ashdod nai le Philistia ngam mun dangte ah kulh taw a ki uum khuapite saat hi." 
2Chronicles26:7 Pathian in Philistine te, Gurbaal ah a teang Arab te le Meun te Uzziah ii a zaw natu in hu hi." 
2Chronicles26:8 Ammon te in Uzziah tungah phiangshia pia a, ama vaanglian ahikom a minthanna sia Egypt ngam dong ngawngawn ah kizel hi." 
2Chronicles26:9 Uzziah in Khuakiing Kongpi, Kuam Kongpi le luphung kiheakna king teng ah ngal vilna tausaangte a sakna taw in Jerusalem uumna kulh sia khosak vaial hi." 
2Chronicles26:10 Ama in ngam taanzauna zongh ah kulh taw a ki uum tausaangte sa hi, nganno tam mama nei ahikom nitumna sang mualpeang le zaangtamte ah tuikhuk tam ma to hi. Ama in lothaw nasep kin ahikom, mualtung ngamte le lei phana theampo tho in sapithuan vawt tu in mite hanthawn hi." 
2Chronicles26:11 Ama in ngalsim thei paih tu ngalkap honpui khat nei hi. A thu tepteena teng kumpi zum naseam khat ahi Hananiah khutnuai ah a thuzeakpi ahi Jeiel le Maaseiah in len uh hi. 
2Chronicles26:12 Tua ngalkaphonpi sia ngalkapbu 2,600 in uk hi." 
2Chronicles26:13 Amate khutnuai ah kumpipa atu ngalte a sim zo takpi tu ngalkap thiam 307,500 om hi." 
2Chronicles26:14 Uzziah in a ngalkaphonpite sia lum, tei, thik lukhu, thikpuan, thal le thaltangte, le saili suangtangte pia hi." 
2Chronicles26:15 Jerusalem khua ngal vilna tausaangte le khuapi luphung kingte tung pan thal kaap natu le suang liante lot natu in a kisamh na teng ngalhiam vawt thiamte in vawt uh hi. Pathian ii ompui hu in Uzziah sia thahat mama a, mun theampo ah minthang hi." 
2Chronicles26:16 Ahihang Uzziah kumpipa a tha a hat ciang a kisakthei vaial na in ama puksak hi. Ama in ngimnamtui halna biaknatau tungah ngimnamtui hal tu in Biakinnpi sungah a tumna taw Topa a Pathian melsia hi. 
2Chronicles26:17 Thiampi Azariah le, a hat le a hang thiampi 80 te in" 
2Chronicles26:18 kumpipa nalh tu in a nung pan zui uh hi. Amate in, “Uzziah awng! Topa tungah ngimnamtui hal tu sia nang sep tu hi ngawl hi. Aaron suan thiampite bek sia hi na seam tu in ki aaptuam hi. Hi mun thiangtho nusia in. Topa Pathian tungah khial zo na hikom ama thupha na saang nawn bua hi,” ci uh hi." 
2Chronicles26:19 Uzziah sia Biakinnpi sung ngimnamtui biaknatau kungah ngimnamtui halna khat toai in ding hi. Thiampite tungah thin uuk ahikom thakhat thu in ama ii talki tungah a kiitakhuai vun natna khat theng hi. 
2Chronicles26:20 Azariah le thiampi dangte lau in kumpipa talki salh a, Biakinnpi sung pan hawlkhia uh hi. Ama sia Topa in daan pia zo ahikom manlang takin pusuak hi." 
2Chronicles26:21 Uzziah kumpipa sia tua hun pan a nuntak lai teng theampo a natna hu in biakna taw kisai in thiangtho nawn ngawl hi. Biakinnpi sungah tum thei nawn ngawlin ama inn bek ah teangin, a nasep theampo pan kitongsak hi, tuaciang a tapa Jotham in ngam uk hi." 
2Chronicles26:22 Uzziah kumpipa ii kumpi maan sung, a nasep dang theampo sia Amoz tapa, kamsaang Isaiah in ciamtee hi." 
2Chronicles26:22 Uzziah kumpipa ii kumpi maan sung, a nasep dang theampo sia Amoz tapa, kamsaang Isaiah in ciamtee hi." 
2Chronicles26:23 Uzziah thi a, kumpi thaan huang sungah kiphum ahihang a natna hu in kumpi thaankuul sungah kiphum ngawl hi. A tapa Jotham in a kumpiza laih hi." 
2Chronicles27:1 Jotham sia kum 25 a phakin kumpi suak a, Jerusalem pan kum sawm le kum luk sung uk hi. A nu sia Zadok ii tanu Jerushah ahi hi." 
2Chronicles27:2 Ama in a pa ngamtat bangin, Topa ii dik a sak te seam hi; ahihang a pa bang hi ngawlin Biakinnpi sungah ngimnamtui halin maw ngawl hi. A mite ahile mawna vawt veve uh hi." 
2Chronicles27:3 Biakinnpi Saksang Kongpi a vawtpa le Jerusalem khua huam sung Ophel a kicina munah khuapi uumna luphung nasia tak a vawtpa sia Jotham ahi hi. 
2Chronicles27:4 Ama in Judah mualtung teng ah khuapite saatin dui sungah kulhte le tausaangte sa hi. 
2Chronicles27:5 Ama in Ammon kumpipa le a ngalkaphonpi simin zo hi. Tua zawkciang ama tungah zawthawk thu taw Ammon mite in phiangshia te kum simin kum thum sung a nuai a bangin piasak a: ngunn kilogramme 3,400, zungtaang tann 1,000 le mangtaang tann 1,000 ahi hi." 
2Chronicles27:6 Thutakna taw Topa a Pathian thu a nit hu in Jotham thahat vaial hi. 
2Chronicles27:7 Jotham ii kumpi maan sung thupiang dang teng, a ngal simnate le a paizia thute sia Israel le Judah Kumpipate Taanghthu sungah kiciamtee siat hi." 
2Chronicles27:8 Jotham sia kum 25 a phak kumin kumpi suak a, Jerusalem pan kum sawm le kum luk sung uk hi." 
2Chronicles27:9 Ama thi in, David Khuapi sungah kiphum a, tuaciang a tapa Ahaz in a kumpiza laih hi." 
2Chronicles28:1 Ahaz sia kum kul a phakin kumpi suak a, Jerusalem pan kum sawm le kum luk sung uk hi. Ama in a taanghpupi David kumpipa ii ngamtatna phate zui ngawl a, Topa diksak ngawlte vawtin," 
2Chronicles28:2 Israel kumpite ngamtatna zui zaw hi. Ama in thik taw Baal milimte vawtsak a," 
2Chronicles28:3 Hinnom Kuam ah ngimnamtui halin, Israel mite maisang a manaw hun lai a, Topa ii a ngamsung pan a nawkeak mite ii a zak a kiihuai nasepte zui in a tapate ngawngawn meihal biakpiakna in milimte pia hi." 
2Chronicles28:4 Doai biakna mun mualtung le thinglim nuai theampo ah Ahaz in sangaw biakpiaknate nei in ngimnamtui hal hi. 
2Chronicles28:5 Ahaz kumpipa mawna hangin Topa a Pathian in ama Syria kumpipa in zosak a, Judah mi tam mama manin Damascus ah thongtaak tu in paipui hi. Topa in Ahaz sia Remaliah ii tapa Israel kumpipa Pekah zongh in zosak a, ni khat thu in Judah ngalkap ngalhangbel 120,000 thatsak hi. Judah mite in a taanghpupite ii Pathian, Topa a nusiat hu in hi bangin piang hi." 
2Chronicles28:6  
2Chronicles28:7 Israel ngalkap Zichri a kici pa in Ahaz kumpipa ii tapa Maaseiah, kumpi inn uk Azrikam le kumpipa dom a thunei Elkanah that hi." 
2Chronicles28:8 Judah mite sia amate ii mipui hi napi Israel ngalkapte in numei le patang 200,000 thongtaak tu in man a, a laaksak vanh tam mama te taw Samaria ah heakpui uh hi." 
2Chronicles28:9 Oded kici Topa kamsaang pa khat sia Samaria khuapi ah teang hi. Ama zongh ngalsimna pan Judah mi thongtaakte taw hong heak kik Israel ngalkaphonpi khuapi sungah a tum dektakte taw kisi a, ama in, “Judah te tungah na taanghpupite Topa Pathian a thin uuk hu in amate hong zosak hi, ahihang tu in tatsia in amate tam lei na thalup uh sia ama in za zo hi." 
2Chronicles28:10 Tu in Jerusalem le Judah ngam panin numei pasalte noma sila na suaksak nuam uh hi. Topa na Pathian tungah zongh mawna khialna na vawt uh hunlam kihe ngawl nu ziam?. 
2Chronicles28:11 Hong ngai tavun! Hi thongtaakte sia na suapuinumeite le na suapui pasalte veu hi. Tha kik siat vun, tua ahibuale Topa a thin uuk in note daan hong pia tu hi,” ci hi." 
2Chronicles28:12 Saksang kumpi ngam pan a lampui pasal li ahi Jehohanan ii tapa Azariah, Meshillemoth ii tapa Berechiah, Shallum ii tapa Jehizkiah le Hadlai ii tapa Amasa te zongh in ngalkapte ngamtatna nalh uh hi." 
2Chronicles28:13 Amate in, “Tua thongtaakte hi sungah hong paipui heak vun! Topa tungah ih maw zo a, daan hong piak khom natu in a thin ih uuksak zo hi. Tu in ih mawna a khan seseam natu khat sep na sawm uh hi,” ci uh hi." 
2Chronicles28:14 Tuasia ciang ngalkaphonpi in thongtaakte le a laaksak vanhte sia mipite le a lampuite tungah a aap tu le," 
2Chronicles28:15 tuate sung pan puansilhte a thongtaak teng tungah a hawmsak tu in tua mi lite panmun kipia hi. Amate in a silh tu in puante, a thua tu peangdapte le an le tui a khom tu pia in a liammate olive thau noisak hi. Thazawmin lampai zo ngawlte laa tungah tosakin a mat thongtaakte theampo Judah ngam Palm thingkung khuapi a kici Jericho ah kipaipui kik hi. Tua zawkciang Israel mite Samaria ah cia kik uh hi." 
2Chronicles28:16 Edom te in Judah ngam sim kik in, thongtaak tu tam mama man hi, tua ahikom Ahaz kumpipa in Assyria kumpilianpa Tiglath Pileser tungah hu ngen hi." 
2Chronicles28:17  
2Chronicles28:18 Tua laitak ma in Philistine mite in nitumna sang mualpeang le Judah thangsang a om khuate sim hi. Amate in Beth Shemesh, Aijalon le Gederoth khuapite a laak zawkciang Soco, Timnah le Gimzo khuapite le a kiim ah khuanote la a, tua munah teang suak uh hi." 
2Chronicles28:19 Judah Kumpipa Ahaz in a mite ii a nga tuakte pheltan a, Topa ii thu nial ahikom Judah ngam ah Topa in ngimnate tungsak hi." 
2Chronicles28:20 Assyria kumpilianpa in Ahaz kumpipa hu ngawl bek dom ngawlin langpanin thinngimna piazaw hi. 
2Chronicles28:21 Tua ahiciang Ahaz in Biakinnpi, kumpi inn le mipi lampuite inn panin khamh teng la a, tua kumpilianpa pia hi, ahitazong hu nuam tuan ngawl hi." 
2Chronicles28:22 Ahaz sia a thinngimbel hun hong thet ciang Topa tungah nidang sangin zongh maw zaw lai hi. 
2Chronicles28:23 Ama in ama a zo Syria mite ii pathiante tungah sangaw biakpiakna pia hi. Ama in, “Syria pathiante ii Syria kumpite a hu bangma in, tua sangaw biakpiaknate pia lei leng kei zongh hong hu tu hi,” ci hi. Tuasia hu in ama le a mite tungah tuasiatna tung hi." 
2Chronicles28:24 Tua dom ngawlin ama in, biakinn sung vanhzak theampo la in sutham siat hi. Ama in Topa Biakinnpi khakbil in Jerusalem khua sungah biaknatau sa kawkoai hi." 
2Chronicles28:25 Judah ngam khuapite le khua lian theampo ah ama in ngamdang pathiante tungah ngimnamtui hal natu in doai sepna mun vawt kawkoai hi. Tubangin ama in a taanghpupite ii Pathian, Topa thin uukna ama tung ma ah thengsak hi." 
2Chronicles28:26 A kumpi maan hun sungin a dang thupiangte theampo sia a kipat pan a tawp dongin Judah te le Israel Kumpipate Taanghthu sungah kiciamtee hi. 
2Chronicles28:27 Kumpipa Ahaz thi a, Jerusalem khua sungah kiphum ahihang kumpite thaan sungah kiphum ngawl hi. A tapa Hezekiah in a kumpiza laih hi." 
2Chronicles29:1 Hezekiah sia kum 25 a phak kumin kumpi suak a, Jerusalem khua pan kum 29 sung uk hi. A nu sia Zechariah ii tanu Abijah ahi hi." 
2Chronicles29:1 Hezekiah sia kum 25 a phak kumin kumpi suak a, Jerusalem khua pan kum 29 sung uk hi. A nu sia Zechariah ii tanu Abijah ahi hi." 
2Chronicles29:2 Ama in a taanghpupi David kumpipa ngamtatna zui in, Topa diksak nate seam hi." 
2Chronicles29:3 Hezekiah ii kumpi a sua kum a tha khat tha in ama in Biakinnpi kongpite hong kik in puuasak kik hi. 
2Chronicles29:4 Ama in Biakinnpi nisuana sang leitual ah thiampite le Levi te pawlkhat khawmtua in," 
2Chronicles29:5 thu son hi. Ama in “Levi te awng noma le noma a thiang tak ki aap vun a, na taanghpupite ii Pathian, Topa Biakinnpi thiangthosak vun. Biakinnpi a ninsak te theampo Biakinnpi pan heam vun." 
2Chronicles29:6 Ih taanghpupite in Topa ih Pathian tungah thumaan ngawl a, Topa diksak ngawlte vawt uh hi. Amate in Topa nusia in ama teenna mun nungngat uh hi." 
2Chronicles29:7 Amate in Biakinnpi kongkhate khakbil a, meivakte mitsak in, Israel te ii Pathian ii Biakinnpi sungah ngimnamtui hal nawn ngawlin; meihai biakpiaknate vawt nawn ngawl uh hi." 
2Chronicles29:8 Tua hu in Judah le Jerusalem tungah Topa thin uuk mama a, amate tungah a vawt thute in a kuama po ingh in lausak hi. Tua thu na he tek uh hi." 
2Chronicles29:9 Ih pate ngal sungah kithat in, ih zite le ih tate sia thongtaak tu in kipaipui uh hi." 
2Chronicles29:10 “Hi bang teng ahikom ei tungah Topa Israel te ii Pathian sia a thin a uuk nawn ngawl natu in ama taw tu in thuciamna khat vawt tu in ka khensat zo hi. 
2Chronicles29:11 Ka tapate awng, hun bothongsak heak vun. Note sia ama atu ngimnamtui hal tu le ama biakna ah mipite lampui tu in, Topa tealsa mite na hi uh hi.”" 
2Chronicles29:12 A nuai a Levi te sia tua munah om hi: Kohath bee le phung pan Amasai ii tapa Mahath le Azariah ii tapa Joel Merari bee le phung pan Abdi ii tapa Kish le Jehallelel ii tapa Azariah Gershon bee le phung pan Zimnah ii tapa Joah le Joah ii tapa Eden Elizaphan bee le phung pan Shimri le Jeuel Asaph bee le phung pan Zechariah le Mattaniah Heman bee le phung pan Jehuel le Shimei Jeduthun bee le phung pan Shemaiah le Uzziel
