2Chronicles29:14  
2Chronicles29:15 Hi mite in Levi mipuite khawmtua in amate le amate a zeksa om bang kithiangsak siat uh hi. Tua zawkciang kumpipa thupiak bangin Topa Thukham zui in a zeksa om bangin Biakinnpi thiansua tu kipan uh hi. 
2Chronicles29:16 Biakinnpi thiansua tu in a sungah thiampite tumin a zeksa taw kisai in a thiangtho ngawl vanh theampo biakinn leitual ah pusua uh hi. Tua mun panin Levi te in tua vanhte la a, khuapi pua sang Kidron Kuam ah tua siat uh hi." 
2Chronicles29:17 Amate nasep sia tha masabel, a ni masabel ni in kipan a, ni liat ni in, biakinn sung tumna inndoi zongh kihel in zo siat hi. Tua zawkciang amate in a dang ni liat sung ma seam a, tua tha ni sawm le ni luk ni in biakna vawt natu in Biakinnpi puuakhol uh hi." 
2Chronicles29:18 Levi te in Hezekiah kumpipa tungah a nuai a bangin thu zaaksakna nei hi: “Biakinnpi buppi, meihal biakpiak natu in biaknatau anluum thiangtho koina sabuai le vanhzakte theampo a zeksa om bangin ka thiansua siat zo uh hi." 
2Chronicles29:19 Ahaz kumpipa ii Topa tungah a thumaan ngawl hun sungin a laak vanhzakte theampo zongh paipui kikin, Pathian tungah ka aap kik zo uh hi. Tuate theampo Topa ii biaknatau mai ah om hi,” ci hi." 
2Chronicles29:20 Hezekiah kumpipa in haisaang ngawlin khua sung lampuite kaikhawm a, Biakinnpi ah paikhawm tek hi." 
2Chronicles29:21 Amate in kumpi bangkua le Judah mite mawphel biakpiak natu le Biakinnpi thiansua natu in khuital sali, tuu sali, tuuno sali le keal sali paipui uh hi. Kumpipa in tua ngannote biaknatau tungah sangaw biakpiakna in piak tu in Aaron suan le paal thiampite sawl hi." 
2Chronicles29:22 Thiampite in a masabel in khuitalte ngo a, tua zawkciang tuute le tuunote ngoin khat sim ii chi veu biaknatau tungah the uh hi." 
2Chronicles29:23 A khakbelin amate in kealte, kumpipa le biakna a vawt dangte kungah paipui in tua kealte tungah a khut uh nga tek hi." 
2Chronicles29:24 Tua zawkciang Israel mite theampo atu in meihal biakpiakna le mawphel biakpiakna a vawt tu in kumpipa in thupia ahikom thiampite in kealte ngo a, a chi sia mipite theampo mawmai natu in biaknatau tungah sung uh hi." 
2Chronicles29:25 Topa in David kumpipa atu in a kamsaangpa Gad le kamsaang Nathan tungtawnin a piak hilnate kumpipa in zui hi; ama in Levi te Biakinnpi sungah tengtongh le daalkopsai te," 
2Chronicles29:26 David kumpipa ii zaksa tumtheite taw panmun lasak hi. Thiampite zongh lemle taw tualai ah ding hi. 
2Chronicles29:27 Meihal biakpiaknate piak natu in Hezekiah in thupia a; biakpiakna a kipat ciang mipite in Topa pokna lasa in music thiam te in lemle le tumthei dang theampo tum uh hi. 
2Chronicles29:28 Tua munah a om mi theampo in biakna vawt khawmin lasakna le a dang tumtheite zongh sangaw biakpiaknate a kihal siat dong kizom suak hi. 
2Chronicles29:29 Tuasia ciang Hezekiah kumpipa le mipite theampo khupdin in Pathian bia uh hi. 
2Chronicles29:30 Kumpipa le ngam lampuite in David le kamsaang Asaph ii a phua pokna late Topa tungah a sak natu in Levi te sawl uh hi. A sawl bangma in a kuama po in lungdamna lianpi taw khupdin in lasa a, Pathian bia uh hi." 
2Chronicles29:31 Hezekiah in mipite tungah, “Tu in note a zeksa om bangin thiang zo na hi uh ciang Topa tungah lungdamko biakpiakna in sangaw biakpiakna hong paipui tavun,” ci hi. Amate zongh thuni in vawt a, pawlkhatte in meihal biakpiak natu in amate thu in nganno ngaw tute paipui uh hi." 
2Chronicles29:32 Amate in Topa tungah meihal biakpiak natu in khuital 70, tuu 100 le tuuno 200 paipui uh hi;" 
2Chronicles29:33 amate in mipite neak tu in sangaw biakpiakna in khuital 600 le tuu 3,000 zongh paipui uh hi." 
2Chronicles29:34 Nganno hiza a ngo tu in thiampite kicing zo ngawl ahikom Levi te in nasep a man dong hu uh hi. Tuasia hunin thiampite a tamzaw a zeksa om bangin kithiangsak zo hi. (A zeksa kithiansakna thu ah thiampite sangin Levi te thumaan zaw uh hi.) 
2Chronicles29:35 Pum bup hal sangaw biakpiakna ah a piak banah mipite neak tu in sangaw biakpiakna pan ngan ii thaute a hal tu le meihal biakpiakna taw a kipia sapittui a sung tu sia thiampite ii nasep ahi hi. Tuabangin Biakinnpi ah biakna vawt kipan kik hi. 
2Chronicles29:36 Pathian huna taw hi nasep theampo manlang takin zo ahikom Hezekiah kumpipa le mipite lungdam hi. 
2Chronicles30:1 A zeksa ngeina om bangin a kithiansua sa thiampite a kicing khom om ngawl a, mipite zongh Jerusalem khua ah tam kikhawmtua ngawl ahikom mite ii Paisan Poai sia a tha masa sung a vawt ngei hunin vawt thei ngawl uh hi. Tua ahikom Hezekiah kumpipa, a uliante le Jerusalem mite in a tha niina tha sungin Paisan Poai vawt tu thukim uh hi, kumpipa in Israel le Judah mite theampo tungah tua thu kam vaitha hi. Israel te ii Pathian, Topa patoai natu in Jerusalem Biakinnpi ah Paisan Poai hong siim natu in Hezekiah kumpipa in Ephraim le Manasseh namte atu kin vawt tuanin sapna lai thaak tuam hi." 
2Chronicles30:2  
2Chronicles30:3  
2Chronicles30:4 Kumpipa le mite in amate ngealna uh diksa hi," 
2Chronicles30:5 tua ahi bangma, amate in saksang pan Dan, thangsang pan Beersheba dong a om, Israel mite theampo a pai ngei za sangin a tamzaw pek Jerusalem ah a pai tek natu Thukham om bangin Paisan Poai vawt tu in sam uh hi." 
2Chronicles30:6 Kumpipa le a uliante ii thu piakna om bangin Judah ngam le Israel ngamsung theampo ah kamtaite paisak kawkoai in hi bangin samsak hi: “Israel mite awng, Assyria te ii hong zawthalna ngam pan na suakta uh hi. Tu in Abraham ii Pathian, Isaac ii Pathian, Jacob ii Pathian, Topa zuan kik tavun, tuaciang ama zongh no kung hong zuan kik tu hi." 
2Chronicles30:7 Amate ii Pathian, Topa tungah a thumaan ngawl, na taanghpupite le Israel na mipuite bangin om heak vun. Na mu thei bangma in, Topa in nasia takin daan thuaksak hi." 
2Chronicles30:8 Amate bangin thinpui ngawlin Topa thu ni vun. Topa note Pathian in no tungah a thin uuk nawn ngawl natu in a tawntungin a thianthosak sa Jerusalem Biakinnpi ah hong pai in ama bia vun. 
2Chronicles30:9 Topa na zuan kik uh le na mealheakte, thong a taaksakte in amate khuangai huai sa in inn ah hong ciasak kik tu hi. Topa note Pathian dikin, ngual hesuak thei a, ama na zuan kik uh le ama in hong saang tu hi,” ci hi." 
2Chronicles30:10 Kamtaite sia Ephraim le Manasseh namte ii ngamsung khuapi theampo ah pai a, saksang khakbel Zebulun namte teenna dong theng hi, ahihang mite in amate nuisan in selno uh hi." 
2Chronicles30:11 Tua kawm pan Asher, Manasseh le Zebulun namte sung pan Jerusalem khua ah a pai nuam veve pawlkhat om lai hi." 
2Chronicles30:12 Judah mite sung zongh ah Pathian in naseam a, kumpipa le a uliante thupiakte a thunitna taw ama deina a zui tu in mipite a kibangin thin khensatna neisak hi." 
2Chronicles30:13 A tha nii tha in Tol Kisaw Ngawl Anluum Poai vawt tu in mi honpui khat Jerusalem ah kikhawmtua uh hi. 
2Chronicles30:14 Amate in Jerusalem khua sungah sangaw biakpiakna le ngimnamtui halna in a kizangh biaknataute theampo la in Kidron kuam ah vawk uh hi. 
2Chronicles30:15 Tuaciang tua tha a ni sawm le ni li ni in amate in Paisan Poai sangaw biakpiakna atu tuute ngo uh hi. A zeksa om bangin a thiang ngawl lai thiampite le Levi te sia a maizum mama in Topa mai ah amate le amate ki aaptuam hi; tuasia ciang tu in amate in Biakinnpi sungah meihal biakpiakna pia thei hi. 
2Chronicles30:16 Pathian mi Moses ii Thukham sungah a thupiak bangin amate in Biakinnpi sungah omna mun la tek hi. Levi te in sangaw biakpiaknate ii a chite thiampite pia a, thiampite in biaknatau tungah the uh hi." 
2Chronicles30:17 Mipite tam mama sia a zeksa om bangin thiang ngawl ahi hu in Paisan Poai tuute ngo thei ngawl ahikom amate taangin Levi te in ngoin Topa tungah tuuno te aap uh hi. 
2Chronicles30:18 Tuaban ah, Ephraim, Manasseh, Issachar le Zebulun namte sung panin hong pai mihing tam mama te in a zeksa thiansuana vawt ngawl ahikom amate in Paisan Poai sia a ngeina zui ngawlin tang uh hi. Hezekiah kumpipa in amate atu in hi bangin thungetsak hi:" 
2Chronicles30:19 “Ka taanghpupite ii Pathian, Topa awng, a zeksa om bangin thiang ngawl ahitazong a thinsung theampo taw nang hong bia amate tungah na thin phatna taw maisak in,” ci hi." 
2Chronicles30:20 Topa in Hezekiah thungetna saang a; tua mite mawna maisak in, ngim ngasak ngawl hi." 
2Chronicles30:21 Jerusalem khua ah a kikhawmtua mite theampo in Tol Kisaw Ngawl Anluum Poai sia lungdamna lianpi taw ni sali sung vawt hi; ni khat zawkciang ni khat thiampite le Levi te in a tha neiza taw Topa pok uh hi. 
2Chronicles30:22 Hezekiah in Topa biakna vawt a thiam Levi te pok hi. A taanghpupite ii Pathian, Topa a pokna in ni sali sung sangaw biakpiaknate a nei zawkciang" 
2Chronicles30:23 amate teng in a dang ni sali sung ma poai vawt natu in khensat hi. Tuabangin amate lungdam takin poai vawt uh hi. 
2Chronicles30:24 Hezekiah kumpipa in tua poai ah mipite neak tu in khuital 1,000 le tuu 7,000 pia in a uliante in a dang khuital 1,000 le tuu 10,000 pia uh hi. Thiampi tam mama in a zeksa kithiansuana vawt uh hi." 
2Chronicles30:25 Tua ahikom mite theampo — Judah mi, thiampite, Levi te, saksang ngam pan hong pai mite le Israel le Judah ngam sungah a teang suak ngamdangmite, a kuama po lungdam uh hi." 
2Chronicles30:26 Jerusalem khuapi sia lungdamna taw kidim hi, banghang ziam cile tuabang lungdamnate David ii tapa Solomon kumpipa hunlai pan kipan om ngeingawl hi." 
2Chronicles30:27 Thiampite le Levi te in mipite atu in Topa tungah thupha ngetsak hi. Vantung a inn pan Pathian in amate thungetna za in saang hi. 
2Chronicles31:1 Tua poai a man zawkciang Israel mite theampo Judah khuapi teng ah pai a, suangkhuamte sutan in Asherah numeipathian ii limte phuktan in biaknatau te le doai sepna munte sutham hi. Amate in a taanglai Judah ngam theampo, tuaciang Ephraim, Benjamin le Manasseh ngamte ah tuabang ma in vawt hi; tua zawkciang amate inn zuan kik siat uh hi." 
2Chronicles31:2 Hezekiah kumpipa in thiampite le Levi te ii nasep kipawlna puuapha kik a, tuabangin mi simin vaipuak nei tek hi. Tuate in meihal biakpiaknate, kipawlkhop biakpiaknate, biakinn biakpiakna sungah kihelna, Biakinnpi sung mun tuatuam ah Pathian min pokna le Pathian tungah lungdamkonate ahi hi." 
2Chronicles31:3 Zing le nitak veu in a kiseam meihal biakpiaknate le Sabbath ni le Tha Thak Poai atu ahizong, Topa Thukham om bangin vawt a kul Poai dangte atu ahizong Hezekiah in ama ii khuihon le a tuu honte sung pan nganno te pia hi." 
2Chronicles31:4 Tua banah Topa Pathian Thukham om bangin thiampite le Levi te in a hun nei zaza a piak thei natu in amate nga tu a hi piakkhiatnate a piak tek natu in kumpipa in Jerusalem khua mite thupia hi. 
2Chronicles31:5 Tuabangin thu a piak zawk po ciang Israel mite in a antang, sapittui, olive thau, khuaitui te le a dang lo an sung pan a phabel teng letsong in pia hi, tuaciang a neisa theampo sung pan sawm a khat zongh paipui hi." 
2Chronicles31:6 Judah khuapite ah a teang mite theampo in a khui le a tuute sawm a khat puakin, amate ii Pathian, Topa tungah a aapsa letsongte tam mama zongh puak si uh hi." 
2Chronicles31:7 A tha thumna tha sungin letsongte hong puak a, tha li sung a kipee in hong thengin kiciangto hi." 
2Chronicles31:8 Hezekiah kumpipa le a uliante in tuabangza a tam letsong a kipiak a mu uh ciang, amate in Topa le Israel a mite pok hi." 
2Chronicles31:9 Hi letsongte thu kumpipa in thiampite le Levi te tungah a son ciang," 
2Chronicles31:10 Zadok ii suan Thiampi Lianbel Azariah in Ama tungah, “Mihonpite in a letsongte Biakinnpi ah hong paipui pan kipan, neak tu kicingin tam mama zongh vaal lai hi. Tu bangza theampo ih nei na sia Topa in a mite thupha hong piak hang hi,” ci hi." 
2Chronicles31:11 Kumpipa thupiak bangin amate in Biakinnpi suum sungah vanh kholna inndoite vawt a," 
2Chronicles31:12 tua inndoite sungah letsongte le sawm a khat te theampo kikeamcing hi. Amate in tua sia Levi te Conaniah in uksak a, a suapuipa Shimei in husak hi." 
2Chronicles31:13 Amate khutnuai ah na seam tu in Levi te sawm kisee a: Jehiel, Azaziah, Nahath, Asahel, Jerimoth, Jozabad, Eliel, Ismachiah, Mahath le Benaiah te ahi hi. Hite theampo sia Hezekiah kumpipa le Thiampi Lianbel Azariah thu taw a kiseam ahi hi." 
2Chronicles31:14 Biakinnpi Nisuana sang Kongpi a cingpipa Levi mi Imnah ii tapa Kore sia Topa tungah a kipia letsongte a sang tu le tuate a hawmna ah a ukpa ahi hi. 
2Chronicles31:15 Thiampite teenna khuapi dangte ah hi Levi dangte in thumaan takin ama nasep a hu te sia: Eden, Miniamin, Jeshua, Shemaiah, Amariah le Shecaniah te ahi hi. Ante sia amate sepna bang zui in Levi mipui te tungah kim hawm a," 
2Chronicles31:16 bee le phung zui in hawm ngawl hi. Amate Biakinnpi ah ni sim vaipuak nei pasal kum 30 ahibuale a tungsia theampo a nasep na mun zui in hawmsak uh hi. 
2Chronicles31:17 Thiampite sia bee le phung zui in nasep kiseesak a, Levi te pasal kum kul le a tungsiate sia a pawl nasepna zui in kisee hi." 
2Chronicles31:18 Amate ii a thiangtho nasep thupite bang hun pawpo in sep na tu kingin kul ahikom amate, a zi a tate le a bealh dangte taw a min theampo kiciamtee hi." 
2Chronicles31:19 Thiampi bangkua sungah a om pa a minpiang le Levi bee le phung min tepteena sungah min om theampote, an a hawmsak tu in vaipuak nei pasal teng sia Aaron suan le paalte atu a kisee khuapite ahibuale hi khuapite ii neisa nganthana munte sungah a teang thiampite sung pan veu a hi hi." 
2Chronicles31:20 Judah ngamsung theampo ah Hezekiah kumpipa in a maan sia le Topa a Pathian ii diksak teng seam hi. 
2Chronicles31:21 Ama ii Biakinnpi a tu a sep theampo ahibuale Thukham zuina thu ah thutakin a thin takpi taw a Pathian a biak hu in a maa tun hi. 
2Chronicles32:1 Hezekiah kumpipa in thumaan takin Topa na seam a, hi bang thupiang teng zawkciang Assyria kumpilianpa Sennacherib in Judah ngam sim hi. Ama in kulh taw a ki uum khuapite uumci in a ngalkaphonpite tungah luphungte sulet in a kaantan natu thupia hi." 
2Chronicles32:2 Sennacherib in Jerusalem khuapi zongh sim a sawm hunlam Hezekiah in a phaw ciang," 
2Chronicles32:3 Assyria te Jerusalem khua hong nai ciang tui a nga ngawl natu in ama le a uliante in khuapi pua sang pan tuinaakte khakcip tu in khensat uh hi. Uliante lampui in khua mite tam mama kuan tek a, tui a suak nawn ngawl natu in tuinaak theampo khakcip uh hi." 
2Chronicles32:4  
2Chronicles32:5 Kumpipa in khuapi uumna luphungte puuapha in, a tungah ngal vilna tausaangte sa in khuapi uumna pua sangah luphung cian thuana taw ngal nannate khosak hi. Tuaban ah, ama in Jerusalem khua lui mun khen khat ii nisuana sang lei kidipna tungah ngalnanna a sakte zongh puua kik hi. Ama in lum le tei tam mama zongh vawtsak hi." 
2Chronicles32:6 Ama in khuapi sung pasal om theampo ngalkap bute khutnuai ah koi in khuapi kongpi leitual ah a kikhoptua natu thupia hi. Ama in amate tungah," 
2Chronicles32:7 “Citakin kimuang vun, Assyria kumpilianpa ahibuale a lampui ngalkaphonpi sia kiita heak vun. Ama sangah a nei thahatna sangin ei sangah a om thahatna nasia zaw hi." 
2Chronicles32:8 Ama in mihing thahatna nei ahihang eite in hong hu tu le ih ngalte hong simsak tu in Topa ih Pathian kinei hi,” ci hi. A kumpipa ii hi kammalte in mite hanthawn hi." 
2Chronicles32:9 Tawmvei zawkciang Sennacherib le a ngalkaphonpite Lachish ah a om hun laitakin, Sennacherib in Jerusalem khua ah a om Hezekiah kumpipa le ama taw a omkhawm Judah mite tungah hi thu teng puak hi:" 
2Chronicles32:10 “Keima Assyria kumpilianpa Sennacherib in kong dok nopna pan, a ki uumci Jerusalem khua sungah na om ngam lai natu sia bang in kimuanna hong pia ziam?" 
2Chronicles32:11 Ko khut sung panin Topa na Pathian in no hong hun tu hi ci in Hezekiah in hong son hi, ahihang Hezekiah in note hong theam a, ngilkial dangtaak in hong thisak tu hi." 
2Chronicles32:12 Topa biakna munte le biaknataute a sutham sia ama hi a, Judah le Jerusalem mite tungah biaknatau khat bek ah biakna vawt in ngimnamtui a halsak sia zongh ama ma hi." 
2Chronicles32:13 Ngamdangmite tungah ka taanghpupite le keima ngamtatna he ngawl nu ziam? Ngamdang khat pawpo ii pathiante in a mite Assyria kumpilianpa khut sung panin a hun ngei ziam? 
2Chronicles32:14 Bang hunin tua ngam teng ii pathiante khat pawpo in a ngam sia ko khut sung pan hun ngei na ziam? Tua ahile na pathian in nang hong hun thei hi ci sia, bang in hong ngaisunsak ziam?" 
2Chronicles32:15 Tu in Hezekiah in tuabangin theamsak heak vun a, tuabangin lamkhial puisak heak vun. Ama um heak vun! Ngam khat pawpo ii pathian in a mite sia Assyria kumpilianpa khat pawpo khut sung pan hun zo ngeingawl hi. Tua ahiciang hi note pathian in note hong hun takpi zo ngawl tu hi!” ci hi." 
2Chronicles32:16 Assyria uliante in Topa Pathian le Topa naseampa Hezekiah te siat son zaw lai uh hi. 
2Chronicles32:17 Kumpilianpa in Israel te ii Pathian Topa a dona lai thaak a tuasung ah, “Tua ngamte ii pathiante in keima khut sung panin a mite hun ngawl hi, Hezekiah ii pathian in ka khut sung pan a mite hun ngawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
2Chronicles32:18 Tua uliante in tua khuapi a ol zaw in a laak thei natu in luphung tungah a om Jerusalem mite a lau natu le a thinkiam natu in Hebrew kam taw, a tung a teng ci in au hi." 
2Chronicles32:19 Amate in mihing khut taw a kivawt tawm milimte, midangte ii pathiante a sonna taw ma kibangin Jerusalem Pathian zongh sonsak lel uh hi." 
2Chronicles32:20 Tuasia ciang Hezekiah kumpipa le Amoz ii tapa, kamsaang Isaiah te in Pathian tungah thungen a, au in huna ngen uh hi." 
2Chronicles32:20 Tuasia ciang Hezekiah kumpipa le Amoz ii tapa, kamsaang Isaiah te in Pathian tungah thungen a, au in huna ngen uh hi." 
2Chronicles32:21 Topa in vantunglalang khat paisakin Assyria ngalkap te le a ngalkapbute thatsak hi. Tua ahikom a kumpilianpa sia maimawlin Assyria ngam ah heak kik hi. Ni khat ni in ama sia a pathian biakinn sungah a om laitakin a tapate pawlkhat in a namsau uh taw ama thatlum hi. 
2Chronicles32:22 Tuabangin Topa in Hezekiah kumpipa le Jerusalem mi teng Assyria kumpilianpa Sennacherib le a ngal dangte khut sung pan zongh suatak hi. Ama in a mite sia a kiim le a paam ngam theampo taw kilemin teangsak hi. 
2Chronicles32:23 Mihing tam mama in Topa tungah a piak tu biakpiakna te le Hezekiah tungah a piak tu letsongte kengin Jerusalem ah hong pai uh hi, tuabangin tua hun pan kipan minam theampo mai ah Hezekiah sia kizakta in kithasia mama hi." 
2Chronicles32:24 Tua hun khawngin Kumpipa Hezekiah a ciina in thi dek tak hi. Ama in thungen a, Topa in a dam natu lim khat lak hi." 
2Chronicles32:25 Ahihang Hezekiah kiphasak leih in Topa ii ama atu a vawtsak nate hangin lungdamko ngawl hi, tuaciang Judah le Jerusalem mite in ngim nga law uh hi." 
2Chronicles32:26 Ahizong a khakbel ciang Hezekiah le Jerusalem mite kiniamkhiak kik ahikom Topa in Hezekiah ii thi dong tua mite daan pia ngawl hi. 
2Chronicles32:27 Hezekiah kumpipa hau mama a, kuama po in vaang pia hi. Ama in a neisa ngunn, khamh, suangmanpha te, hel namtuite, lumte le vanh manpha dangte khol natu in vanh kholna inndoite sa hi." 
2Chronicles32:28 Tuaban ah ante, sapittui le olive thau kholna tu inndoite; a khuite atu in khuibukte; tuaciang a tuute atu tuu khawk te sasak hi." 
2Chronicles32:29 Tuaban ah Pathian in tuu le khui te pia in a dang nei le lamh tam mama pia ahikom ama in khuapi tam ma saat hi. 
2Chronicles32:30 Gihon Ciktui ii pusuana vang khaktan in Jerusalem luphung sungsang mun khat dongin leinuai ah tui kheetna luam a vawt sia Hezekiah kumpipa ahi hi. A sep a vawt theampo Hezekiah in taangtun a," 
2Chronicles32:31 a ngam sungah a lamdang a piang thu kan tu in Babylon tongciinte a pai laitak ngawngawnin a ngamtatna a heak ku nopna in Pathian in Hezekiah sia ama uuk thu in ngamtasak hi. 
2Chronicles32:32 Hezekiah kumpipa ii a nasep dang teng le Topa tungah a kipiaknate theampo sia Amoz Tapa Kamsaang Isaiah ii Mukholna sung le Judah le Israel Kumpipate ii Taanghthu sungah kiciamtee hi. 
2Chronicles32:32 Hezekiah kumpipa ii a nasep dang teng le Topa tungah a kipiaknate theampo sia Amoz Tapa Kamsaang Isaiah ii Mukholna sung le Judah le Israel Kumpipate ii Taanghthu sungah kiciamtee hi. 
2Chronicles32:33 Hezekiah thi a, kumpite thaan tungnung ah kiphum hi. A thi ciang, Judah le Jerusalem mite theampo in zatakna lianpi pia uh hi. A tapa Manasseh in a kumpiza laih hi." 
2Chronicles33:1 Manasseh sia kum sawm le kum nii a phak ciangin Judah kumpi suak a, ama in Jerusalem pan kum 55 sung uk hi." 
2Chronicles33:2 Israel mite maisang a manaw lai in tua ngamsung pan Topa ii a nawkeak minamte ii a kiihuai ngamtatna te zui in Manasseh sia Topa tungah maw hi. 
2Chronicles33:3 Ama in a pa Hezekiah ii suksiat sa doai biakna munte sa kik hi. Ama in Baal biakna tu in biaknataute sa a, Asherah numeipathian limte vawtin aksite bia hi." 
2Chronicles33:4 Topa ii ama a tawntungin a kibiak natu mun a cina Biakinnpi sungah ama in doai biaknataute vawt hi. 
2Chronicles33:5 Ama in Biakinnpi leitual nii te ah aksite biakna tu in biaknataute vawt hi. 
2Chronicles33:6 Ama in a tapate Hinnom Kuam ah meihal biakpiakna in nei hi. Ama in mitbum le aisaanna zangh a, maisang thu a sontheite le thaa sam theite thu dongh hi. Ama in Topa tungah maw mama in a thin uuksak hi." 
2Chronicles33:7 Ama in Topa Biakinnpi sungah milim khat koi a, tua mun in Pathian ii David le a tapa Solomon tungah, “Hi lai Jerusalem khua sung, hi Biakinnpi sung sia keima hong kibiak natu in, Israel minam sawm le niite ii ngamsung theampo panin ka tealna mun ahi hi." 
2Chronicles33:8 Israel mite in ka thukham theampo zui in ka naseampa Moses ii amate a piak Thukham buppi a zui uh le a taanghpupite tungah ka piak ngam panin a kinawkeak tu ka oai buatu hi,” a ci sa hi." 
2Chronicles33:9 Topa mihing Israel mite maisang a manaw lai in, tua ngamsung pan Topa ii nawkeak minamte ii mawna sang zong a lianzaw te ngawngawn a vawt tu in Manasseh in Judah mite lampui hi." 
2Chronicles33:10 Topa in Manasseh le a mite a kidop natu in son hi napi amate in nangai ngawl uh hi. 
2Chronicles33:11 Tua ahikom Topa in Assyria ngalkapmangte in Judah ngam simsak hi. Amate in Manasseh manin thikkawn le kol bulin Babylon ah paipui uh hi. 
2Chronicles33:12 Hi bangin a thuakna hu in ama kiniamkhiak in Topa a Pathian zuanin huna ngen hi. 
2Chronicles33:13 Manasseh ii thungetna sia Pathian in saang a, Jerusalem ah heak kiksakin a ngam uksak kik hi. Hisia in Topa ma Pathian a hina thu Manasseh in telsak hi." 
2Chronicles33:14 Tuasia zawkciang Manasseh in David Khuapi nisuana sangah a om luphung puanung sia Gihon Cik hui Kuam sung panin saksang ah Ngasa Kongpi le Ophel kici khuapi huam ciang dong saangsak vaial hi. Judah ngam sungah kulh taw a ki uum khuapi sim ah ngalkap honkhat le a uk ngalkapbu khat veu koi hi. 
2Chronicles33:15 Ama in Biakinnpi sung panin ngamdang pathiante le tua munah ama koi milim sia ahizong, Biakinnpi omna mualtung le Jerusalem khua sung mun dangte ah a om doai sepna biaknataute ahizong khiin hi; ama in hite theampo Jerusalem khua pua sangah paipui in vawk siat hi." 
2Chronicles33:16 Ama in Topa a kibiakna biaknatau zongh puua kikin tua tungah kipawlkhop biakpiaknate le lungdamko biakpiaknate pia hi. Ama in Israel te ii Pathian, Topa a biak natu in Judah mite theampo thupia hi." 
2Chronicles33:17 Mite in biakna mun dangte ah sangaw biakpiaknate pia suak ahitazong amate in Topa tung bekma ah pia uh hi. 
2Chronicles33:18 Manasseh ii a nasep dangte theampo a Pathian tungah a thungetna le Topa Israel ii Pathian min taw kamsaangte ii ama tungah a thupuakte theampo Israel Kumpipate Taanghthu sungah kiciamtee hi. 
2Chronicles33:19 Kumpipa ii thungetna le Pathian zo kikna, a kisiik kik ma in a vawt mawna khialna — a sia a vawtte, doai sepna munte le numeipathian Asherah lim, tuaciang a biak milimte — theampo sia Kamsaangte Taanghthu sungah kiciamtee hi." 
2Chronicles33:20 Manasseh thi a, kumpi inn ah kiphumin, a tapa Amon in a kumpiza laih hi." 
2Chronicles33:21 Amon in Judah kumpi a sua lai in kum 22 pha a, Jerusalem panin kum nii sung uk hi." 
2Chronicles33:22 A pa Manasseh bangma in ama in Topa tungah maw in a pa ii biak milimte bia hi. 
2Chronicles33:23 Ahihang ama ahile a pa bang hi ngawl a, kiniamkhiak ngawlin Topa kung zuan ngawl hi; a pa sang zong mawzaw lai hi." 
2Chronicles33:24 Amon sia a uliante ma in thasawm a, kumpi inn sungah thatlum hi." 
2Chronicles33:25 Amon a suamte sia Judah mite in thatin, a tapa Josiah kumpi suaksak uh hi." 
2Chronicles34:1 Josiah in kum liat a phak ciang Judah kumpi suak a, Jerusalem panin kum 31 sung uk hi." 
2Chronicles34:2 Ama in Topa diksak nate vawt a; a taanghpupi David ngamtatna zui in Pathian ii thukham theampo pha takin zui hi. 
2Chronicles34:3 Josiah a kumpi sua zawk kum liat a phak kumin khangmoi mama lai ahihang ama in a taanghpupi David kumpipa ii Pathian a biak kipan hi. Kum li zawkciang ama in doai sepna munte, Asherah numeipathian limte le a dang milimte theampo a suksiat kipan hi." 
2Chronicles34:4 Ama ii thupiak bangin a mite in Baal biakna biaknataute sutham in a kungah ngimnamtui halna biaknataute pheltham hi. Amate in Asherah milimte le a dang milimte theampo suuvui in, a vui teng sia tua milimte sangaw biakpiakna a pia mite ii thaan tungah the uh hi." 
2Chronicles34:5 Ama in doai seam thiampite ii ngu teng amate ii biaknataute tungah hal hi. Hi bang teng taw Josiah in Judah le Jerusalem sia a zeksa ngeina om bangin thiansua kik hi. 
2Chronicles34:6 Ama in khuapite sung le Manasseh ngam, Ephraim ngam le Simeon ngamsung a zawna mun theampo, tuaciang saksang ah Naphtali dongin tuabang ma in vawt siat hi." 
2Chronicles34:7 Saksang kumpi ngam theampo ah ama in biaknataute le Asherah limte sutham in milimte suuvui a, ngimnamtui halna biaknataute theampo sem tham hi. Tua zawkciang ama Jerusalem ah heak kik hi." 
2Chronicles34:8 Josiah kumpipa in a kumpi maan zawk kum sawm le kum liat kumin, a ngam le Biakinnpi sia doai biakna a bosakna taw a thiansua zawkciang ama in Topa Pathian Biakinnpi puua kik tu in pasal thum paisak a: Azaliah tapa Shaphan, Jerusalem a uk mangpa Maaseiah le ulian khat ahi Joahaz ii tapa Joah ahi hi." 
2Chronicles34:9 Levi biakinn cingte ii Biakinnpi sung pan a khon sum teng Thiampi Lianbel Hilkiah tungah ki aap hi. (Tua sumte sia Ephraim mi, Manasseh mi le a taanglai Saksang kumpingam mite, Judah mi, Benjamin mi, Jerusalem mite tung pan a kikhonte hi.)" 
2Chronicles34:10 Tua sum teng biakinn puua kikna a ukte thum tungah ki aap a, amate in" 
2Chronicles34:11 Judah kumpite ii a muatsak innte puua natu a kizangh suang le thing lei natu in lettamate le inn sate a piak tu ahi hi. 
2Chronicles34:12 Tua na a seamte thumaan tatak hi. Amate sia Levi mite li ahi Merari bee le phung pan Jahath le Obadiah, Kohath bee le phung pan Zechariah le Meshullam te in uk uh hi. (Tua Levi te sia a vekpi in music thiam uh hi.)" 
2Chronicles34:12 Tua na a seamte thumaan tatak hi. Amate sia Levi mite li ahi Merari bee le phung pan Jahath le Obadiah, Kohath bee le phung pan Zechariah le Meshullam te in uk uh hi. (Tua Levi te sia a vekpi in music thiam uh hi.)" 
2Chronicles34:12 Tua na a seamte thumaan tatak hi. Amate sia Levi mite li ahi Merari bee le phung pan Jahath le Obadiah, Kohath bee le phung pan Zechariah le Meshullam te in uk uh hi. (Tua Levi te sia a vekpi in music thiam uh hi.)" 
2Chronicles34:13 A dang Levi te in vanh nawn na le nasep dang tuatuam a seamte uk in, a dangte sia thu tepteena a keamte ahibuale a cingte ahi uh hi." 
2Chronicles34:14 Vanh kholna inndoi sung pan sum a laak laitakin Hilkiah in Moses tungah Pathian piak Thukham, Topa Thukham laibu sia mu hi." 
2Chronicles34:15 Ama in Shaphan munah, “Hi Biakinnpi sungah Thukham laibu mu khi hi,” ci hi. Ama in tua laibu Shaphan pia a," 
2Chronicles34:16 Shaphan in kumpipa kungah paipui hi. Ama in, “Nong sawl theampo ka seam siat zo uh hi." 
2Chronicles34:17 Biakinnpi sungah a kep sum teng ka la zo uh hi, tuasia naseamte le a ukte tungah ka pia zo uh hi,” ci in son hi." 
2Chronicles34:18 Tuaciang ama in, “Hi sungah Hilkiah ii hong piak laibu khat om hi,” ci lai hi. Tuaciang ama in tuasia kumpipa tungah nging vazak in sim hi." 
2Chronicles34:19 Kumpipa in laibu a kisim na bang a zaak ciang, thin nop ngawlna taw a puansilh lai eaukeak a," 
2Chronicles34:20 tuaciang Hilkiah, Shaphan tapa Ahikam, Micaiah tapa Abdon, zum thuzeakpipa Shaphan le kumpipa cing pa Asaiah te tungah hi bang thupia hi:" 
2Chronicles34:21 “Pai tavun a, kei taang le Israel le Judah ah a om lai mite taangin Topa ii thu dongh tavun. Hi laibu ii hilnate hong kan tavun. Ei tungah Topa thin uuk hi, banghang ziam cile ih taanghpupite in Topa kammal zui ngawl a, hi laibu ii sep hamtang tu a cite seam ngawl hi,” ci hi." 
2Chronicles34:22 Kumpipa thupiak bangin Jerusalem ii a khen khuathak mun khat sungah a teang Huldah a kici numei kamsaang khat munah thu dongh tu in, Hilkiah, Ahikam, Achbor, Shaphan le Asaiah te pai uh hi. (Tua nu ii pasal sia, Tikvah ii tapa, Harhas ii tupa Shallum hi a, ama in biakinn puantualte a keam pa hi.) Amate in thupiang teng ama munah son uh hi," 
2Chronicles34:23 tuaciang ama in kumpipa kungah amate pai kikin sawl a," 
2Chronicles34:24 A nuai a Topa thupiak teng puak hi: “Keima in Jerusalem le a mite theampo kumpipa tungah a kisim laibu sia sungah a ki at haamsiatna te taw daan ka pia tu hi. 
2Chronicles34:25 Amate in kei hong nial a, pathian dangte tungah sangaw biakpiaknate pia ahikom a ngamtatna theampo panin ka thin uukna piang hi. Ka thin uukna sia Jerusalem tungah tu hi, tuaciang tua sia veng ngawl tu hi." 
2Chronicles34:26 Kumpipa mama atu in hi bangin kei, Israel ii Topa Pathian in ci khi hi: Nangma in laibu sungah a ki at teng nadon ni hi," 
2Chronicles34:27 tuaciang Jerusalem le a mite daan piak tu ka tawnna na zaak ciang kiniamkhiakna le kisii kikna taw ka mai ah na puansilh eaukeak in kap ni hi. Na thungetna hong za zo khi hi. 
2Chronicles34:28 Tuaciang Jerusalem ka piak tu daan sia na thi zawk ciang mateng in tungsak ngawl tu khi hi. Thinnuam in kong thisak tu hi,” ci hi. Tua pasalte hi thupiak teng taw Josiah kumpipa kungah heak kik uh hi." 
2Chronicles34:29 Kumpipa Josiah in Judah le Jerusalem lampui teng sam a," 
2Chronicles34:30 tuaciang amate a pai uh ciangin, thiampite le Levi te in tonpui in, a taanglai mi theampo taw a hau a zawng kibangin Biakinnpi ah paikhawm tek hi. Kumpipa in amate ii mai ah Biakinnpi sungah a kimu thuciamna laibu bup a ngingin sim hi." 
2Chronicles34:31 Ama in kumpi khuam sia kungah dingin Topa thu a ni tu, a thukham te le a thupiakte sia a thin theampo le a ngaisutna theampo taw a keamcing tu, tuaciang thuciamna taw a kithua tua laibu sungah hong tangkal theampo a seam a vawt tu in ama taw thuciamna khat vawt uh hi." 
2Chronicles34:32 Ama in tua thuciamna a zui kik natu in Benjamin mite le Jerusalem ah a om dang teng theampo kiciamsak hi. Tuabangin Jerusalem mite in a taanghpupite ii Pathian taw a vawt sa thuciamna ii dei nate zui tek hi. 
2Chronicles34:33 Josiah kumpipa in Israel te neisa a ngam sungah a om a kiihuai milim theampo susia hi, tuaciang ama nuntak lai teng mipite in amate taanghpupite ii Pathian, Topa na seamsak hi." 
2Chronicles35:1 Josiah kumpipa in Topa patoaina in Jerusalem khua ah Paisan Poai vawt hi; a tha masabel, ni sawm le ni li ni in tua poai atu in ngannote kingo hi." 
2Chronicles35:2 Ama in thiampite ii Biakinnpi sungah a nasep tu seesakin amate nasep tek a phatak a sep natu in hanthawn hi. 
2Chronicles35:3 Ama in Topa tungah a ki aap Israel syate ahi Levi te tungah hi thute hil hi: “David tapa Solomon kumpipa ii a sak Biakinnpi sungah tua Thuciamna Thingkuang thiangtho koi vun. Tua sia mun khat pan mun khat ah khiin kawkoai nawn heak vun, Topa na Pathian le Israel a mite ii na seam tunu hi." 
2Chronicles35:4 David kumpipa le a tapa Solomon ii nasep hong seesak bangin Biakinnpi sungah bee le phung zui in panmun la tek vun a," 
2Chronicles35:5 Noma pawlkhat in Israel mi sungah bangkua khat sim hu a kul ciang, na hu paih thei natu noma ma vaihawm vun." 
2Chronicles35:6 Noma in Paisan Poai atu in tuunote le kealte ngo tu nu hi. Tu in Topa ii Moses tungah a piak thuhilnate Israel na mipuite ii a zui thei natu in noma le noma a zeksa om bangin kithiangsak vun a, sangaw biakpiaknate pia tu in kinging vun,” ci hi." 
2Chronicles35:7 Josiah kumpipa in Paisan Poai hun sung mipite zak tu in ama ii khoai nganhonte sung pan tuute, tuunote le kealnote a vekpi 30,000 le khuital 3,000 pia hi." 
2Chronicles35:8 A uliante zongh in mipite, thiampite le Levi te zak tu in pia tek hi. Biakinnpi uk uliante — Thiampi Lianbel Hilkiah, Zechariah le Jehiel — in tua poai sungah sangaw biakpiaknate a tu in thiampite tungah tuuno le kealno 2,600 le khuital 300 pia uh hi." 
2Chronicles35:8 A uliante zongh in mipite, thiampite le Levi te zak tu in pia tek hi. Biakinnpi uk uliante — Thiampi Lianbel Hilkiah, Zechariah le Jehiel — in tua poai sungah sangaw biakpiaknate a tu in thiampite tungah tuuno le kealno 2,600 le khuital 300 pia uh hi." 
2Chronicles35:9 Levi lampuite — Conaniah, Shemaiah le a suapuipa Nethanel, Hashabiah, Jeiel le Jozabad — in tuuno le kealno 5,000 le khuital 500 sia Levi te ii sangaw biakpiaknate a tu in pia uh hi." 
2Chronicles35:10 Paisan Poai atu in na theampo a vaihawm siat zawkciang kumpipa ii thupiak bangin thiampite le Levi te in amate nasepna mun tek ah om uh hi. 
2Chronicles35:11 Tuu le keal a kingaw zawkciang Levi te in a vun hoai in thiampite in biaknatau tungah a chi the uh hi. 
2Chronicles35:12 Tua zawkciang Moses Thukham sungah hilna om bangin a piak thei tu in meihal biakpiaknate a tu ngannote sia amate in a innkuan pawl tuatuamte zui in mipite hawmsak hi. 
2Chronicles35:13 Levi te in ngeina om bangin Paisan Poai sangawte sia mei tungah em in a thiangtho biakpiakna sate sia bealte, bealpeu a lian a no te sungah huanin mipite tungah manlang takin hawmsak hi." 
2Chronicles35:14 Hiteng a vawt zawkciang Levi te in amate atu le Aaron suan thiampite atu in sa hawm uh hi, banghang ziam cile ngannote pum bup halna le sangaw biakpiaknate pan a sathaute a halna in thiampite zan dongin komla uh hi." 
2Chronicles35:15 Asaph bee le phung pan a nuai a Levi music thiamte sia David kumpipa thupiakna bangin nasep kiseena munte ah om tek hi: Asaph, Heman le kumpipa ii kamsaang Jeduthun ahi uh hi. Biakinn kongpi cingte in a cinna mun tek nusiat kul ngawl hi; banghang ziam cile amate atu in Levi dangte in Paisan Poai kingingsak uh hi." 
2Chronicles35:16 Tua ahikom Josiah kumpipa thupiak bangin Topa biakna Paisan Poai vawtna a tu le biaknatau tungah meihal biakpiaknate a tu teng tua ni in a vekpi kivawt siat hi. 
2Chronicles35:17 Tua munah a om Israel mite a vekpi in Paisan Poai le Tol Kisaw ngawl Anluum Poai ni sali sung vawt uh hi. 
2Chronicles35:18 Kamsaangpa Samuel hun lai pan kipan Paisan Poai hi bangin kivawt ngeingawl hi. Paisan Poai sia Josiah kumpipa, thiampite, Levi te le Judah, Israel le Jerusalem mite ii" 
2Chronicles35:19 Josiah kumpi maan zawk kum sawm le kum liat kum in, a vawt bangin tua masia kumpite kuama in vawt ngeingawl hi." 
2Chronicles35:20 Josiah kumpipa in Biakinnpi atu in hite theampo a vawt zawkciang Egypt kumpipa Neco in Euphrates ngun tungah a om Carchemish ah ngalsim tu in a ngalkaphonpi paipui hi. Josiah in ama tawlngaksak tu in hanciam hi," 
2Chronicles35:21 ahizong Neco in Josiah tungah hi bangin thupuak hi: “Judah kumpipa awng, ka ngalsim tu sia nang taw kisai ngawl hi. Nang hong sim tu in hong pai hi ngawl a, ka ngalte a sim tu in a kuan ka hi hi. Pathian in manlangin hong sawl hi. Pathian in keima sangah pang ahikom kei hong nalh heak in, tua ahibuale ama in nang hong susia tu hi.”" 
2Chronicles35:22 Ahihang Josiah in sim sawm veve hi. Ama in Pathian ii Neco kumpipa tungtawnin a thusonte na ngai ngawlin kimealseal in Megiddo zaangtam ah ngalsim hi. 
2Chronicles35:23 Ngal kisim sungin Egypt te ii thaltangte in Josiah kumpipa kha hi. Ama in a naseamte tungah, “Hong taipui tavun; nasia liam khi hi!” ci in thupia hi." 
2Chronicles35:24 Amate in a siphu ngalleang tung panin toai in tua munah a om ama siphu ngalleang niina sia tungah suanh in Jerusalem ah paipui uh hi. Tua munah ama thi in kumpite thaan ah kiphum hi. Judah le Jerusalem mite theampo ama thi hu in khuangai tek uh hi. 
2Chronicles35:25 Kamsaangpa Jeremiah in Josiah kumpipa atu in khuangai la khat phuak hi. Ama atu khuangai in a kaa uh ciang la sate in nupite ahizong pasalte ahizong hi khuangai la a zak uh sia Israel te ngeina suak hi. Tua late sia khuangai late khoptuana sungah kimu hi. 
2Chronicles35:25 Kamsaangpa Jeremiah in Josiah kumpipa atu in khuangai la khat phuak hi. Ama atu khuangai in a kaa uh ciang la sate in nupite ahizong pasalte ahizong hi khuangai la a zak uh sia Israel te ngeina suak hi. Tua late sia khuangai late khoptuana sungah kimu hi. 
2Chronicles35:26 Josiah ii a sep theampo — Topa tungah a kipiakna, Thukham a zuina," 
2Chronicles35:27 le ama taanghthu a kipatna pan a tawpna dong — Israel le Judah Kumpipate Taanghthu sungah kiciamtee siat hi. 
2Chronicles36:1 Judah mite in Josiah ii tapa Joahaz teal a Jerusalem khua ah ama sathau noai in kumpi suaksak hi. 
2Chronicles36:2 Judah kumpi a sua lai in Joahaz kum 23 pha a, Jerusalem pan tha thum sung uk hi." 
2Chronicles36:3 Egypt kumpipa Neco in ama thongtaaksak a, Judah panin Neco tungah ngunn kilogramme 3,400 le khamh kilogramme 34 phiangshia in piasak hi." 
2Chronicles36:4 Neco in Joahaz ii suapuipa Eliakim Judah kumpi suaksak a, a min Jehoiakim ci in laihsak hi. Joahaz sia Neco in Egypt ngam ah paipui hi." 
2Chronicles36:5 Jehoiakim sia Judah kumpi a sua lai in kum 25 pha a, Jerusalem pan kum sawm le kum khat sung uk hi. Ama in Topa a Pathian tungah maw hi." 
2Chronicles36:6 Babylon kumpipa Nebuchadnezzar in Judah ngam sim in, Jehoiakim man a thikkol bulin Babylon ah paipui hi." 
2Chronicles36:7 Nebuchadnezzar in Biakinnpi vanh manpha pawlkhat pua in Babylon a kumpi inn ah koi hi. 
2Chronicles36:8 Jehoiakim ii a sep a vawt theampo, a kiihuai ngamtatnate le a tatsiatnate dongin Israel le Judah kumpipate Taanghthu sungah kiciamtee hi. A tapa Jehoiachin in a kumpiza laih hi." 
2Chronicles36:9 Jehoiachin sia Judah kumpi a sua lai in kum sawm le kum liat pha a, ama in Jerusalem pan tha thum le ni sawm sung uk hi. Ama zongh Topa tungah maw hi." 
2Chronicles36:10 Khuakhaal kipat ciang Nebuchadnezzar kumpipa in Jehoiachin sia thongtaak tu in Babylon ah paipui hi. Biakinnpi sum le vanh manphate zongh pua hi. Tua zawkciang Nebuchadnezzar in Jehoiachin ii pano Zedekiah sia Judah le Jerusalem kumpi suaksak hi. 
2Chronicles36:11 Zedekiah sia Judah kumpi a sua lai in kum 21 pha a, ama in Jerusalem pan kum sawm le kum khat sung uk hi." 
2Chronicles36:12 Ama in Topa tungah maw in Topa kammal a son kamsaangpa Jeremiah ii thusonte kiniamkhiakna taw ngai ngawl hi. 
2Chronicles36:12 Ama in Topa tungah maw in Topa kammal a son kamsaangpa Jeremiah ii thusonte kiniamkhiakna taw ngai ngawl hi. 
2Chronicles36:13 Nebuchadnezzar kumpipa ii ama tungah a thumaan tu in Pathian min taw hamtangpi in a kiciamsak Zedekiah in ama leedo hi. Zedekiah thinpui in kisiik kik nuam ngawlin Israel te ii Pathian, Topa kung zuan kik nuam ngawl hi." 
2Chronicles36:14 Tua banah Judah lampuite, thiampite le mipite in a kiim ah a om minamte ii mawna khialnate zui in milim bia uh hi, tuabangin amate in Topa mama ii a thiansak Biakinnpi ninsak uh hi." 
2Chronicles36:15 A taanghpupite ii Pathian, Topa in amate le a Biakinnpi a huuk nop manin a mite kidop thei natu in kamsaangte tatsat ngawlin paisak hi." 
2Chronicles36:16 Ahizong amate in Pathian ii kamtaite nunau in, a kammalte awlmawk ngawl a, kamsaangte nuisan uh hi, a khakbel ciang a mite tungah Topa thin uukna nasia tatak ahikom suatak natu lampi om ngawl hi." 
2Chronicles36:17 Tua ahiciang Topa in amate sim tu in Babylon kumpipa paisak hi. Kumpipa in Judah tangvalte Biakinnpi sung ngawngawn ah thatlum hi. Kumpipa in a moi a haam, numei pasal, a ciina a ciidam ci doi ngawlin kuama hesuak ngawl hi. Pathian in amate a vekpi ma ama tungah aap hi." 
2Chronicles36:18 Babylon kumpipa in Biakinnpi sung, biakinn sum le vanh manpha, kumpipa le a uliante nei le lam teng theampo laksak a Babylon ah pua kik hi." 
2Chronicles36:19 Ama in Biakinnpi le khuapi sia a kumpi innte le a nei a lam theampo taw haltum in khuapi uumna luphungte sutham hi. 
2Chronicles36:20 Ama in a nungta lai theampo Babylon ah ciapui a, tua munah amate in sila bangin Persia kumpilianpa hong khan dong ama le a suan a paalte ii na seam uh hi." 
2Chronicles36:21 Tuabangin kamsaang Jeremiah tungtawn a, Topa ii hi bang a sonkhol sa sia taangtung hi: “Sabbath tawlngakna a kitang ngawl teng lo kik natu in a ngam sia kum sawmsali sung ngamtongta hi tu hi.”" 
2Chronicles36:21 Tuabangin kamsaang Jeremiah tungtawn a, Topa ii hi bang a sonkhol sa sia taangtung hi: “Sabbath tawlngakna a kitang ngawl teng lo kik natu in a ngam sia kum sawmsali sung ngamtongta hi tu hi.”" 
2Chronicles36:22 Persia mi Cyrus, kumpilianpa a sep, a kum khat na kumin Topa in kamsaang Jeremiah tungtawn a, a thusonte taangtungsak hi. A nuai a, a thupiaknate a suasak tu le ama ii ukna ngam theampo ah a nging a sim tu in lai at in a thaak natu Topa in Cyrus thawn hi:" 
2Chronicles36:22 Persia mi Cyrus, kumpilianpa a sep, a kum khat na kumin Topa in kamsaang Jeremiah tungtawn a, a thusonte taangtungsak hi. A nuai a, a thupiaknate a suasak tu le ama ii ukna ngam theampo ah a nging a sim tu in lai at in a thaak natu Topa in Cyrus thawn hi:" 
2Chronicles36:23 “Hisia in Persia kumpilianpa Cyrus ii thupiakna ahi hi. Vantung Pathian, Topa in leitung buppi uk pa in keima hong koi zo a, Judah ngam Jerusalem ah ama atu biakinn khat sa tu in vaipuak hong pia zo hi. Tu in no, Pathian mite theampo awng, tualai ah va pai tavun a, Topa na Pathian note taw hong omkhawm tahen.”" 
Ezra1:1 Persia mi Cyrus in kumpilianpa a sep, a kum khat kumin Topa in kamsaang Jeremiah tungtawn a, a thusonte taangtungsak hi. Topa ii thotna taw a nuai a thupiakna teng Cyrus in ama ukna ngamsung theampo ah a nging takin a sim tu lai khat at in thaak hi:" 
Ezra1:1 Persia mi Cyrus in kumpilianpa a sep, a kum khat kumin Topa in kamsaang Jeremiah tungtawn a, a thusonte taangtungsak hi. Topa ii thotna taw a nuai a thupiakna teng Cyrus in ama ukna ngamsung theampo ah a nging takin a sim tu lai khat at in thaak hi:" 
Ezra1:2 “Hisia in Persia kumpilianpa Cyrus ii thupiakna ahi hi. Vantung Pathian, Topa in leitung bup uk tu in keima hong koi zo a, Judah ngam Jerusalem ah ama atu biakinn khat sa tu in vaipuak hong pia zo hi." 
Ezra1:3 Ama mi ahi note theampo taw Pathian hong omkhawm tahen. Note Jerusalem ah pai tavun a, Jerusalem ah a kibia Pathian, Israel te ii Pathian, Topa ii Biakinnpi sa kik vun." 
Ezra1:4 Saltaang a mite a cia kik natu in hu tu a kul le, a innpaamte in amate hi bangin hu tu hi. Tua a innpaamte in ngunn le khamh, nguai an le vanh pua nganhingte sia, Jerusalem Pathian Biakinnpi sungah a piak tu biakpiaknate taw amate tungah pia khawm tu hi.”" 
Ezra1:5 Tuaciang Judah le Benjamin namte sung pan bee le phung lutangte, thiampite le Levi te, tuaciang Pathian ii a thin a phawnsak dangte theampo in Jerusalem ah, Topa Biakinnpi sa kik tu in kithoai uh hi." 
Ezra1:6 A innpaamte theampo in na tam mama pia in amate hu uh hi: ngunn taw kivawt vanhzakte, khamh, nguai ante, vanh pua nganhingte, na manpha dangte le Biakinnpi atu in biakpiaknate ahi hi." 
Ezra1:7 Cyrus kumpilianpa in Nebuchadnezzar kumpipa ii Jerusalem Biakinnpi sung pan a laaksak, ama ii pathiante biakinn sungah a koi kuang le hai te amate pia kik hi." 
Ezra1:8 Ama in tua teng Judah ngamukmangpa Sheshbazzar a piak tu in tepteena lai a vawt kumpi sumkeampi pa Mithredath tungah aap hi," 
Ezra1:9 a piak vanhte a nuai a bang ahi hi: biakpiakna khamh khawbeamte 30 biakpiakna ngunn khawbeamte 1000 khawbeam dangte 29 khamh khawbeam note 30 ngunn khawbeam note 410 vanhzak dangte 1000 
Ezra1:10  
Ezra1:11 Khamh le ngunn taw kivawt khawbeamte le nadang tuatuamte a vekpi in 5,400 pha a, Babylon pan Jerusalem ah ama le a dang saltaangte a cia uh ciang Sheshbazzar in tua teng ciapui hi." 
Ezra2:1 Saltaang tam mama te in Babylon nusia in Jerusalem le Judah ngam a khuapi tek ah ciakik uh hi. Nebuchadnezzar kumpipa in tualai ah thongtaak tu in a mat pan kipan amate a innkuan a innkuanin Babylon ngam ah saltaangin teang uh hi. 
Ezra2:2 A lampuite sia Zerubbabel, Joshua, Nehemiah, Seraiah, Reelaiah, Mordecai, Bilshan, Mispar, Bigvai, Rehum le Baanah te ahi uh hi. Hisia saltanna pan a ciakik Israel bee le phungte sung pan a bee a phung zui in mi phaza tepteena ahi hi." 
Ezra2:2 A lampuite sia Zerubbabel, Joshua, Nehemiah, Seraiah, Reelaiah, Mordecai, Bilshan, Mispar, Bigvai, Rehum le Baanah te ahi uh hi. Hisia saltanna pan a ciakik Israel bee le phungte sung pan a bee a phung zui in mi phaza tepteena ahi hi." 
Ezra2:2 A lampuite sia Zerubbabel, Joshua, Nehemiah, Seraiah, Reelaiah, Mordecai, Bilshan, Mispar, Bigvai, Rehum le Baanah te ahi uh hi. Hisia saltanna pan a ciakik Israel bee le phungte sung pan a bee a phung zui in mi phaza tepteena ahi hi." 
Ezra3:1 A tha sali tha in Israel mite a khua tek ah teang siat hi. Tua zawkciang amate a vekpi in Jerusalem ah kikhawm uh a," 
Ezra3:2 Jehozadak ii tapa Joshua, a thiampi puite le Shealtiel ii tapa Zerubbabel le a beete teng in Pathian ii mihing Moses ii Thukham sungah a ki at hilnate bangin sangaw biakpiaknate a hal thei natu in Israel ii Pathian biaknatau sa kik uh hi." 
Ezra3:2 Jehozadak ii tapa Joshua, a thiampi puite le Shealtiel ii tapa Zerubbabel le a beete teng in Pathian ii mihing Moses ii Thukham sungah a ki at hilnate bangin sangaw biakpiaknate a hal thei natu in Israel ii Pathian biaknatau sa kik uh hi." 
Ezra3:3 Saltanna pan a cia kikte in tua ngam ah a teang mite kiita ahitazong, amate in biaknatau sia a om maksakna mun ma ah sa kik uh hi. Tua zawkciang amate ii a vawt ngei zing le nitak sangaw biakpiaknate tua tungah hal tu in khatvei ma kipan kik uh hi." 
Ezra3:4 Amate in zui tu ngeina om bangin Buk Poai khaam a; ni khat sim atu a kisamh babang tua ni in biakpiakna pia uh hi; 
Ezra3:5 tuaban ah amate in a piak tawntung pum bup meihal sangaw biakpiakna, Tha Thak Poai biakpiakna le a vawt ngengei Topa biak kikhopna dang teng theampo le Topa tungah amate thin zawna taw a piak biakpiaknate theampo zongh pia uh hi." 
Ezra3:6 Mipite in Biakinnpi sakkik tu kipan ngawl lai hikale, amate in a tha salina ni khat ni in Topa tungah meihal sangaw biakpiaknate kipan uh hi." 
Ezra3:7 Mipite in suangciangte le lettamate a piak tu sum khia in, tuipi lam tawnin Joppa khua ah a kipua tu Lebanon pan Cedar thingte the natu in, Tyre le Sidon khuapite ah an le tui, olive thaute pia si uh hi. Hite theampo Persia kumpilianpa Cyrus ii thukimna la in kivawt hi." 
Ezra3:8 Tuabangin Jerusalem Biakinnpi sak natu munah amate a ciakik kum, a tha nii tha in nasep kipan uh hi. Zerubbabel, Joshua le a taanglai ngamsung a mipuite, thiampite le Levi mite, a tatakin saltanna pan Jerusalem ah a cia kikte theampo in sep pui tek hi. Kum kul le a tungsia Levi te theampo Biakinnpi sak kikna ah nasep ki uksak hi." 
Ezra3:8 Tuabangin Jerusalem Biakinnpi sak natu munah amate a ciakik kum, a tha nii tha in nasep kipan uh hi. Zerubbabel, Joshua le a taanglai ngamsung a mipuite, thiampite le Levi mite, a tatakin saltanna pan Jerusalem ah a cia kikte theampo in sep pui tek hi. Kum kul le a tungsia Levi te theampo Biakinnpi sak kikna ah nasep ki uksak hi." 
Ezra3:9 Levi mi Jeshua le a tapate le a mealheakte, tuaciang Kadmiel le a tapate (Hodaviah ii bee le phung) in Biakinnpi a sak kikna uk khawm uh hi. (Amate sia Henadad bee le phung pan Levi te in hu uh hi.)" 
Ezra3:10 Inn sate ii Biakinn tawdap a vawt kipat ciang puantual silh Thiampite in a khut ah lemle toai in dinmun la uh a, Asaph bee le phung Levi te in daalkopsai taw tua munah ding uh hi. Amate in David kumpipa hun pan a kihilnate bangin Topa pok uh hi." 
Ezra3:11 Amate in hi Topa pokna la sa kikik hi: “ Topa pha hi, Israel a itna kip tawntung hi.” A kuama po in a tha neiza tek taw au in Topa pok uh hi, banghang ziam cile Biakinnpi tawdap a vawt kipan zo hi." 
Ezra3:12 Khanghaam thiampite, Levi te le bee le phung lutangte tam ma in a masa Biakinnpi mu ngei zo a, hi Biakinnpi tawdap a kipha a mu uh ciang amate au in kap uh hi. Ahizong tua munah a om dangte lungdamin au uh hi." 
Ezra3:13 Amate aw sa taw ngamlum mama in a khuala na pan kiza thei ahiciang kuama in kaa na aw maw lungdamna aw maw khen thei ngawl uh hi. 
Ezra4:1 Judah le Benjamin mite ii ngalte in saltaang a cia kikte ii Israel te ii Pathian, Topa Biakinnpi a sak kikna thu za uh hi." 
Ezra4:2 Tua ahiciang amate pai a Zerubbabel le a bee a phung lutangte taw a kimu uh ciang, “Ko zongh Biakinnpi sakna ah hong kihelsak tavun. Noma biak Pathian ma kote in bia khu hi, Assyria kumpilianpa Esarhaddon in hi lai ah teang tu in hong paisak pan kipan ama tungah sangaw biakpiakna pia khu hi,” ci uh hi." 
Ezra4:3 Zerubbabel, Joshua le a bee a phung lutangte in amate tungah, “ Topa kote Pathian biakinn sak natu in nong hu tu ka kisamh bua uh hi. Persia kumpilianpa Cyrus ii hong thupiakna bangin koma teng ma in ka sa tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Ezra4:3 Zerubbabel, Joshua le a bee a phung lutangte in amate tungah, “ Topa kote Pathian biakinn sak natu in nong hu tu ka kisamh bua uh hi. Persia kumpilianpa Cyrus ii hong thupiakna bangin koma teng ma in ka sa tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Ezra4:4 Tuaciang tua ngam sungah a teang mite in a sak ngawl natu in Jew te thinkiam sakin lauthawn tu hanciam uh hi. 
Ezra4:5 Amate a langpan natu in Persia kumpi uliante zongh sumnguk pia uh hi. Amate in Cyrus kumpi maan hun sung theampo le Darius kumpi maan hun dongin tubangin langpan tan uh hi. 
Ezra4:6 Xerxes kumpilianpa maan hun a kipat ciang Judah le Jerusalem ah a teangte ii ngalte in amate a langpanna lai pia uh hi. 
Ezra4:7 Persia kumpilianpa Artaxerxes maan hun ciangin Bishlam, Mithredath, Tabeel le a pawlpuite in kumpilianpa tungah laithak at kik uh hi. Tua laithak sia Aramaic lai taw in ki at a, a kisim ciang pheen kik kul hi." 
Ezra4:8 Ngamukmangpa Rehum le ngamsung thuzeakpi Shimshai te zongh in Jerusalem khua thu taw kisai kumpilianpa Artaxerxes tungah a nuai a bangin laithak at uh hi: 
Ezra4:9 “Ngamukmangpa Rehum le ngamsung thuzeakpi Shimshai, a pawlpuite, thukhente le Elam ngam sungah a om Erech, Babylon le Susa khuate ah a teang ulian dang theampote tung pan" 
Ezra4:10 tuaciang a lian le a thahat Ashurbanipal ii amate inn pan a khiin Samaria khuapi sung le Euphrates nitumna ngamsung mundang ah a teensak midangte theampo tung panin kong thaak khop uh lai ahi hi.” 
Ezra4:11 A laithak sia a nuai a bang hi: “Euphrates nitumna sangah a teang na naseamte in kumpilianpa Artaxerxes tungah lai kong thaak uh hi. 
Ezra4:12 “Nangma vaanglian kumpipa in, na ngam tuatuam panin hi mun ah hong pai Jew te ii Jerusalem khua ah teang a, a ngilo khuapi le kumpi leedo thei, tua khuapi a saat kikna thu he le te kong oai uh hi. Amate in luphung cian tu kipan zo a, hai ngawlin zo tu hi." 
Ezra4:13 Vaanglian kumpipa awng, hi khuapi kisa kikin a luphungte kimanthiang le a mite in phiangshia piak tawlnga in, na kumpi sum tum kiam tu hi." 
Ezra4:14 Tu in kote sia nangma a vaanglian kumpipa khutnuai ah a seamte ka hi uh ciang, hi bangin a pian tu sia mu nuam ngawl khu hi, tua hi a," 
Ezra4:15 na taanghpupite nusiat thu tepteena laibu sungah na kat kik tu in ngaisutna kong pia uh hi. Tuabangin kan kik le te hi khuapi sia kumpi leedo tawntung khuapi a hina le taanghlai hun a kipan kumpite le ngam ukte a buaisakna thu na mu tu hi. A mite sia uk hak tawntung hi. Tua hangin a khua kilalsak hi. 
Ezra4:16 Hi khua kisaat kikin a luphungte kizo thiang thong le vaanglian kumpipa nangma in Euphrates nitumna ngam teng uk zo nawn ngawl tu ci thu telthiang khu hi.” 
Ezra4:17 Kumpilianpa in hi bangin lai thuk hi: “Ngam uk mangpa Rehum, ngamsung thuzeakpi Shimshai le Samaria le Euphrates nitumna sangah a teang pawl le lawmte awng kong paupui hi." 
Ezra4:18 “Nong laithak kipheen kik in keima hong kisim hi. 
Ezra4:19 A thu kan tu in ka sawl a, thu a kat ciang nidang tawngh hun pan Jerusalem sia kumpi a langpan tawntung a, a leedote le thu nawngkai vawtte taw a kidimna kimu takpi hi." 
Ezra4:20 A thahat kumpite maang in Euphrates nitumna sang theampo uk in shia le phiangshia khon uh hi. 
Ezra4:21 Tua ahikom thu kong piak kik mateng tua mite in khuapi a sakkik nawn ngawl natu in thupia tu nu hi. 
Ezra4:22 Ka ngam phattuam nate a kilalsak ngawl natu in thakhat thu in tuasia seam paih vun,” ci hi." 
Ezra4:23 Hi Artaxerxes ii laithak sia Rehum, Shimshai le a pawlpuite tungah a kisim po ciang amate Jerusalem ah manlang takin pai in Jew te khuapi a sakkik sia zawthawk thu taw tawlngasak uh hi." 
Ezra4:24 Biakinnpi sakkik sia kitawlngasak a, Persia kumpilianpa Darius ii kumpi maan a kum nii kum dong bangma seam ngawlin omcip hi." 
Ezra5:1 Tua hun lai in kamsaang niite ahi Haggai le Iddo ii tapa Zechariah in Judah le Jerusalem ah a teang Jew te tungah Israel ii Pathian min suangin thu son kipan uh hi. 
Ezra5:1 Tua hun lai in kamsaang niite ahi Haggai le Iddo ii tapa Zechariah in Judah le Jerusalem ah a teang Jew te tungah Israel ii Pathian min suangin thu son kipan uh hi. 
Ezra5:1 Tua hun lai in kamsaang niite ahi Haggai le Iddo ii tapa Zechariah in Judah le Jerusalem ah a teang Jew te tungah Israel ii Pathian min suangin thu son kipan uh hi. 
Ezra5:2 Shealtiel ii tapa Zerubbabel le Jehozadak ii tapa Joshua te in a thusonte a zaak uh ciang Jerusalem Biakinnpi sakkik kipan a, kamsaangte nii in hu uh hi." 
Ezra5:2 Shealtiel ii tapa Zerubbabel le Jehozadak ii tapa Joshua te in a thusonte a zaak uh ciang Jerusalem Biakinnpi sakkik kipan a, kamsaangte nii in hu uh hi." 
Ezra5:3 Thakhat thu phialma in Euphrates nitumna sang ngamukmangpa Tattenai, Shethar Bozenai le a seppui uliante Jerusalem ah pai in, “Hi Biakinnpi sak tu le a sungah vanh teng a nguan tu in akua in thu hong pia ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi." 
Ezra5:4 Amate in Biakinnpi sakna ah a hu teng ii min zongh dongh uh hi. 
Ezra5:5 Ahizong Pathian in Jew lampuite mitsuan nginge a, Persia uliante in kumpilianpa Darius tungah laithak in a zo kik mateng bangma law ngawl tu in khensat uh hi." 
Ezra5:6 Amate in hi bangin kumpilianpa tungah thu zasak uh hi. 
Ezra5:7 “Darius kumpilianpa awng, thinnopna taw ngam uk thei ta in." 
Ezra5:8 “Nangma Kumpipa awng, kote Judah ngam sungah ka pai uh a, a lian Pathian ii Biakinnpi sia suangtum lian mamate taw kisa in, a pang zongh thing pangluaite a kithung in ka mu uh a, tua thu he lete kong oai uh hi. A nasep belcing mama a, ngaih vahuut uh hi." 
Ezra5:9 Tuasia ciang akua ii thu taw hi Biakinnpi kisa kik a, a vanhte kinguan ziam, hong son natu in a lampuite ka dongh uh hi." 
Ezra5:10 Hi nasep a lampuite akua teng ziam kong son thei natu in amate min zongh ka dongh hi. 
Ezra5:11 “Amate in, ‘Kote vantung le leitung Pathian ii naseamte hi in, a vaanglian Israel kumpipa khat ii kum tam mama lai in a sak phit le vanh a kinguan Biakinnpi sia a sa kik ka hi uh hi." 
Ezra5:12 Ahizong ka taanghpupite in vantung Pathian thin uuksak ahiciang, Chaldean kumpi ngui sung pan Babylon kumpipa Nebuchadnezzar in amate zosak hi. Biakinnpi sia kisia sakin tua mipite Babylon ah sal in kila hi." 
Ezra5:13 Tua zawkciang Cyrus kumpilianpa in Babylon kumpilianpa ahi zawk a kum khat kumin Biakinnpi a kisak kik natu thupia hi. 
Ezra5:14 Nebuchadnezzar ii Jerusalem Biakinnpi pan a laak Babylon biakinn ah a koi biakinn a zak khamh le ngunn, Biakinn vanh zakte puuapha kik hi. Cyrus in tua teng Judah ngamukmang tu in a koi Sheshbazzar tungah pia hi." 
Ezra5:15 Tua kumpilianpa in tua vanhte la a, Jerusalem Biakinnpi ah koi kikin nidang a sakna ngei mun ma ah Biakinnpi a sakkik natu in ama sawl hi." 
Ezra5:16 Tua ahiciang Sheshbazzar hong pai in a tawdap phaasak hi; tua hun pan kipan tu dong Biakinnpi kisa zom a, ahizong kiman ngawl lai hi,’ ci in zo hi." 
Ezra5:17 “Tu in, Nang Vaanglianpa, na lung a kim le Babylon kumpi thu tepteenate sungah Cyrus in hi Jerusalem Biakinnpi sakkik natu in thu a piak le a piak ngawl kansak in a, hi thu taw kisai nangma deina bang hong zasak ta'n,” ci hi." 
Ezra6:1 Tuaciang Darius kumpilianpa in Babylon khua ah a kikeam kumpite thu tepteena laibu sungah tua thute kan tu in thupia hi. 
Ezra6:2 Ahizong Media ngamsung Ecbatana khua sungah a nuai a bang thu tepteena a om laizial khat kimu hi: 
Ezra6:3 “Ama ii kumpi maan zawk a kum khat kum in Cyrus kumpilianpa in sangaw biakpiakna le meihal biakpiakna mun tu in Jerusalem Biakinnpi a kisak kik natu thupia hi. Biakinnpi sia metre 27 saangin metre 27 zai tu hi. 
Ezra6:4 A pangte suangtum dawl thum a cian simin thing dawl khat taw kisa tu hi. A sum bo theampo kumpi sum sung pan kipia tu hi. 
Ezra6:5 Nebuchadnezzar kumpipa ii Jerusalem Biakinnpi pan Babylon ah a paipui khamh le ngunn, vanh zakte zongh Jerusalem Biakinnpi sung a omna ngei tek ah kikoi kik tu hi,” ci in a kitepteena mu uh hi." 
Ezra6:6 Tuasia ciang Darius in a nuai a bangin zasak kik hi: “Euphrates nitumna ngamuk mangpa Tattenai, Shethar Bozenai le Euphrates nitumna ngam ah a om a nasep pui uliante awng, “Biakinnpi pan kiheam vun a," 
Ezra6:7 Biakinn sakna nawngkaisak heak vun. Judah ngamukmangpa le Jew lampuite in Pathian Biakinnpi sia a om na ngei ma ah sa kiksak vun. 
Ezra6:8 Amate ii a sak kikna na hu natu uh in hi lai sungah thu kong pia hi. Hi nasep a kisuangsamh ngawl natu in Euphrates nitumna sang pan phiangshia a kinga kumpi sum sung pan a bona teng theampo manlang takin kipiaksak tu hi. 
Ezra6:9 Jerusalem ah a om thiampite ii ni simin kisamh hi hong ci pawpo peal ngawlin pia tu nu hi: vantung Pathian tungah meihal biakpiak natu in khuitalnote, tuute ahibuale tuunote ahibuale zungtaang, ci, sapittui ahibuale olive thau ahi hi." 
Ezra6:10 Vantung Pathian ii a saan thei tu in sangaw biakpiakna a piak thei natu le keima le ka tapate atu in thupha nong nget thei natu in hisia sep tu ahi hi. 
Ezra6:11 Tua banah hi thupiakna a zui ngawl a om le a inn zawlliang khat kidawkeaksak tu a, a mong khat kizumin tuaciang ama pumpi kisunlet tu hi. A inn sia ninthuk kisua tu hi." 
Ezra6:12 Ama a kibiak natu mun Jerusalem khuapi a teal Pathian in hi thupiakna nial a, tua Biakinnpi a lalsak nuam kumpi ahibuale minam peuma susia tahen. Keima Darius in hi thu kong pia zo hi. Ka thupiak sia na zui siat tu uh ahi hi.”" 
Ezra6:13 Tuasia ciang ngamukmang Tattenai, Shethar Bozenai le a naseppui uliante in kumpilianpa thupiak bang linlian in vawt siat uh hi." 
Ezra6:14 Jew lampuite in kamsaang Haggai le Zechariah te ii hanthotna taw a Biakinnpi sak ngai tawto uh hi. Amate in Biakinnpi sia Israel te ii Pathian le Persia kumpiliante ahi Cyrus, Darius le Artaxerxes te ii thupiak bangin zo thiang uh hi." 
Ezra6:14 Jew lampuite in kamsaang Haggai le Zechariah te ii hanthotna taw a Biakinnpi sak ngai tawto uh hi. Amate in Biakinnpi sia Israel te ii Pathian le Persia kumpiliante ahi Cyrus, Darius le Artaxerxes te ii thupiak bangin zo thiang uh hi." 
Ezra6:14 Jew lampuite in kamsaang Haggai le Zechariah te ii hanthotna taw a Biakinnpi sak ngai tawto uh hi. Amate in Biakinnpi sia Israel te ii Pathian le Persia kumpiliante ahi Cyrus, Darius le Artaxerxes te ii thupiak bangin zo thiang uh hi." 
Ezra6:15 Amate in Darius ii kumpilian a sep zawk a kum luk kum Adar tha, ni thum ni in Biakinnpi zo uh hi." 
Ezra6:16 Tua zawkciang Israel mite — thiampite, Levi te le saltanna pan a cia kik midang theampote in lungdam takin Biakinnpi aap uh hi." 
Ezra6:17 Biakinnpi aapna in amate in khuital 100, tuu 200, le tuuno 400 te sangaw biakpiakna in pia a, Israel nam sim atu mawphel biakpiakna in keal khat tek, keal 12 pia uh hi." 
Ezra6:18 Amate in Moses laibu sungah kihilna om bangin Jerusalem biakinn naseam tu in thiampite le Levi te zongh kaikhawm uh hi. 
Ezra6:19 Saltanna pan hong cia kik mite in a kum kik, a tha masa, ni sawm le ni li ni in Paisan Poai khaam uh hi." 
Ezra6:20 Thiampite le Levi te theampo in amate le amate kithiansua in a zeksa om bangin thiangtho uh hi. Levi te in hong cia kik mite theampo atu le thiampite le amate mama atu in Paisan Poai sangaw biakpiakna in ngannote ngo uh hi. 
Ezra6:21 Tua biakpiakna sate saltanna pan hong cia kik Israel te theampo le tua ngam ah a teang doai biate ii biakna nusia a Israel ii Topa Pathian bia tu in hong paite in ne uh hi. 
Ezra6:22 Ni sali sung lungdam takin Tol saw ngawl Anluum Poai khaam uh hi. Israel te ii Pathian ii Biakinnpi a sakkikna ah a hu natu Topa in Assyria kumpilianpa sia Jew te ngup nopna thin neisak ahikom amate lungdamna taw kidim hi. 
Ezra7:1 Kum tam mama a ngei zawk, Artaxerxes sia Persia kumpilianpa a sua ciang Ezra kici mihing khat om hi. Ama in a taanghpupite Thiampi Lianbel Aaron dong a kat kik ciang a nuai a bang hi: Ezra sia Seriah ii tapa, Seriah sia Azariah ii tapa, Azariah sia Hilkiah ii tapa," 
Ezra7:2 Hilkiah sia Shallum ii tapa, Shallum sia Zadok ii tapa, Zadok sia Ahitub ii tapa," 
Ezra7:3 Ahitub sia Amariah ii tapa, Amariah sia Azariah ii tapa, Azariah sia Meraioth ii tapa," 
Ezra7:4 Meraioth sia Zerahiah ii tapa, Zerahiah sia Uzzi ii tapa, Uzzi sia Bukki ii tapa," 
Ezra7:5 Bukki sia Abishua ii tapa, Abishua sia Phinehas ii tapa, Phinehas sia Eleazar ii tapa, Eleazar sia Aaron ii tapa ahi hi." 
Ezra7:6 Ezra sia lai thiam mipil khat hi a, Topa, Israel te ii Pathian ii Moses tungah a piak Thukham teng he sitset hi. Ezra in Topa a Pathian thupha nga ahikom, a nget theampo kumpilianpa in pia hi. Artaxerxes ii kumpi maan hun a kum sali kumin Ezra sia thiampite, Levi te, biakinn music thiamte, biakinn cingte le naseamte a kihel Israel te honkhat taw Babylon pan Jerusalem zuan hi." 
Ezra7:7  
Ezra7:8 Amate in a tha masabel tha, a ni khat ni in Babylon nusia in, Pathian ii huna taw in a tha nga tha, ni khat ni in Jerusalem theng uh hi." 
Ezra7:9  
Ezra7:10 Ezra in a nuntakna sia Topa Thukham sinna, a sinsate zuina, le Israel mite tungah thukham le ngeina theampo hilna in zangh hi." 
Ezra7:11 Artaxerxes in a nuai a lai sia Topa ii Israel tungah a piak thukhamte le thupiakte a he sitset, thiampi le lai thiam mipil, Ezra tungah pia hi:" 
Ezra7:12 “Kumpilianpa Artaxerxes tung pan Vantung Pathian Thukham a he mipil thiampi Ezra tungah: 
Ezra7:13 “Ka kumpi ukna ngamsung theampo ah a om Israel mite theampo, thiampite le Levi te Jerusalem ah a cia nuam peuma nangma taw a pai thei natu in thu ka pia hi." 
Ezra7:14 Keima le ka thudok salite in nangma muangin hong ki aap, na Pathian Thukham teng Judah le Jerusalem ah bangza ciang pha takin kizui ci thu kan tu in kong sawl hi." 
Ezra7:15 Israel te ii Pathian, Jerusalem Biakinnpi a nei pa tungah keima le ka thudokte ii ka piak nop uh khamh le ngunn biakpiakna teng na keng tu hi." 
Ezra7:16 Israel mite le a thiampite ii Jerusalem Pathian Biakinnpi atu in a piak piakkhiatnate le noma ii Babylon ngamsung pan na kaikhop uh ngunn le khamh theampo zongh paipui tu ni hi. 
Ezra7:17 “Hi dangka teng khuital, tuutal, tuuno, antang le sapittui leina in pha takpi na zangh tu a, tua vanhte Jerusalem Biakinnpi biaknatau tungah na pia tu hi." 
Ezra7:18 A taanglai ngunn le khamhte na Pathian ii deina taw kizui in nangma le na ngamsung mite deina po ah zangh thei tu ni hi. 
Ezra7:19 Biakinn sung nasepna ah zak tu in nangma hong kipia vanhzakte theampo Jerusalem khua Pathian tungah pia tu ni hi. 
Ezra7:20 Tuaciang Biakinnpi atu in na kisap dangte sia kumpi sum le vanh manpha sung panin nga thei tu ni hi. 
Ezra7:21 “Keima in thiampi le Vantung Pathian ii Thukham a he, mipil Ezra ii hong nget theampo thakhat thu piak tu in Euphrates Nitumna Ngam sungah a om sum lamsang a len uliante theampo thu ka pia hi," 
Ezra7:22 piak tu a kiciangtan za sia, ngunn kilogramme 3,400, zungtaang kilogramme 10,000, sapittui litre 2,000, olive thau litre 2,000, le ci al a kisamh zaza hi tu hi." 
Ezra7:23 Vantung Pathian in a Biakinnpi atu in a tulmawk theampo pha takin pia nanak tu nu hi; tuasia in keima tung le kei zawkciang ngamukte tungah a thin a uuk ngei nawn ngawl natu ahi hi. 
Ezra7:24 Nangma in thiampite, Levi te, music thiamte, a cingte, naseamte ahibuale Biakinnpi taw a kizom midang khat pawpo tung pan shia na khon thei buatu hi." 
Ezra7:25 “Nangma Ezra in na Pathian hong piaksa ciimna zanghin, na Pathian Thukham bangin a nungta Euphrates Nitumna sang mite theampo a uk tu ngamukte le Thukhente panmun na pia tu hi. A he ngawl laite theampo tungah tua Thukham na hil hamtang tu hi." 
Ezra7:26 Mihing khat pawpo in na Pathian thukhamte, ahibuale kumpi ngamsung upadi te a zui buale ama sia thidaan ahizong, hawlkhiatna taw ahibuale a na theampo laaksakna ahibuale, thongtaaksakna taw thakhat thu in daan kipia tu hi,” ci hi." 
Ezra7:27 Ezra in, “Ih taanghpupite ii Pathian, Topa pok vun! Ama in kumpilianpa sia Topa ii Jerusalem Biakinnpi, hi bangin patoai nopna thin neisak hi." 
Ezra7:28 Pathian ii thuthiamna taw kumpilianpa, a thudokte le a thahat ulian theampote ii maipha ka nga zo hi; Topa ka Pathian in thinletna hong pia zo a, keima taw cia khawm tu in Israel bee le phung lampui tam mama ka zol thei hi,” ci hi." 
Ezra8:1 Hiteng sia Artaxerxes ii kumpilian a sep ciangin Babylon saltanna pan Jerusalem ah Ezra taw a ciakik bee le phung lutangte hi: 
Ezra8:2 Phinehas bee le phung pan Gershom Ithamar bee le phung pan Daniel David bee le phung pan Shecaniah ii tapa Hattush, Parosh bee le phung pan Zechariah le a bee a phung pan pasal 150 (a pianna innkuan tepteena lai om hi) Pahath Moab bee le phung pan Zerahiah ii tapa Eliehoenai taw pasal 200 Zattu bee le phung pan Jahaziel ii tapa Shecaniah taw pasal 300 Adin bee le phung pan Jonathan ii tapa Ebed taw pasal 50 Elam bee le phung pan Athaliah ii tapa Jeshaiah taw pasal 70 Shephatiah bee le phung pan Michael ii tapa Zebadiah taw pasal 80 Joab bee le phung pan Jehiel ii tapa Obadiah taw pasal 218 Bani bee le phung pan Josiphiah ii tapa Shelomith taw pasal 160 Bebai bee le phung pan Bebai ii tapa Zechariah taw pasal 28 Azgad bee le phung pan Hakkatan ii tapa Johanan taw pasal 110 Adonikam bee le phung pan Eliphelet, Jeuel le Shemaiah taw pasal 60 (A khak sang a ciate hi) Bigvai bee le phung pan Uthai le Zaccur taw pasal 70"

Ezra8:2 Phinehas bee le phung pan Gershom Ithamar bee le phung pan Daniel David bee le phung pan Shecaniah ii tapa Hattush, Parosh bee le phung pan Zechariah le a bee a phung pan pasal 150 (a pianna innkuan tepteena lai om hi) Pahath Moab bee le phung pan Zerahiah ii tapa Eliehoenai taw pasal 200 Zattu bee le phung pan Jahaziel ii tapa Shecaniah taw pasal 300 Adin bee le phung pan Jonathan ii tapa Ebed taw pasal 50 Elam bee le phung pan Athaliah ii tapa Jeshaiah taw pasal 70 Shephatiah bee le phung pan Michael ii tapa Zebadiah taw pasal 80 Joab bee le phung pan Jehiel ii tapa Obadiah taw pasal 218 Bani bee le phung pan Josiphiah ii tapa Shelomith taw pasal 160 Bebai bee le phung pan Bebai ii tapa Zechariah taw pasal 28 Azgad bee le phung pan Hakkatan ii tapa Johanan taw pasal 110 Adonikam bee le phung pan Eliphelet, Jeuel le Shemaiah taw pasal 60 (A khak sang a ciate hi) Bigvai bee le phung pan Uthai le Zaccur taw pasal 70" 
Ezra8:3 Ahava a kitotawm Tuiluam hui ah mihon bup ka kaikhawm a, tua munah ni thum sung ngiaphual ka saat uh hi. Tua mihon sungah thiampite om a, ahizong Levi te ka mu bua hi." 
Ezra8:4 Tuaciang lampui kuate: Eliezer, Ariel, Shemaiah, Elnathan, Jarib, Elnathan, Nathan, Zechariah le Meshullam le sya niite ahi Joiarib le Elnathan te ka sam hi." 
Ezra8:4 Tuaciang lampui kuate: Eliezer, Ariel, Shemaiah, Elnathan, Jarib, Elnathan, Nathan, Zechariah le Meshullam le sya niite ahi Joiarib le Elnathan te ka sam hi." 
Ezra8:5 Casiphia khua taangpi lutang ahi Iddo kungah amate ka paisak a, ama le a pawlte, biakinn naseamte in Biakinnpi sungah Pathian naseam tu mihing hong puak natu ka ngensak hi." 
Ezra8:6 Pathian ii thuthiamna tungtawnin amate in Mahli bee le phung sung pan Levi te a pilvang Sherebiah hong puak a, a tapate le a suapuipate sawm le liat taw hong pai uh hi." 
Ezra8:7 Amate in Merari bee le phung sung pan Hashabiah le Jeshaiah te zongh a mealheakte kul taw hong puak hi. 
Ezra8:8 Tua banah Levi te a hu tu in David kumpipa le a uliante ii a taanghpupite pan nasep a piaksa biakinn naseam 220 om hi. Amate min teng zongh kikhum siat hi. 
Ezra8:9 A kitotawm Ahava Tuiluam hui ah ka vekpi uh in antang in kote ii Pathian mai ah kiniamkhiak a, ka khualhawna uh ah hong lampui in, koma, ka tate uh le ka neisa theampo taw hong kep natu ama tungah hesuak ngen tu in ka sawl hi." 
Ezra8:10 Ih khualhaw sungin ngalte khut sung pan hong keam tu in kumpilianpa tungah ngalkapte ka nget tu sia maizum naap khi hi, banghang ziam cile ama munah koma Pathian in ama a muang pawpo thupha pia a, ahizong ama a nungngat pawpo tungah lungkim ngawlin daan a piakna thu ka son zo hi." 
Ezra8:11 Tua bangin kote in Pathian hong dal natu an tangin thu ka ngen uh a, kote ii thungetnate ama in hong zo hi." 
Ezra8:12 Thiampi lampuite sung panin Sherebiah, Hashabiah le a dang sawm ka teal hi." 
Ezra8:13 Tua zawkciang kumpilianpa, ama ngaisutna a piate le, uliante, tuaciang Israel mite ii Biakinnpi sungah zak tu in a piak ngunn, khamh le vanhzakte toai ka tee a, tua teng thiampite tungah ka pia hi." 
Ezra8:14 Hi teng sia amate ka piakte hi: Ngunn - tann 22 Ngunn vanh zakte 100 - kilogramme 70 Khamh - kilogramme 3,400 Khamh khawbeam 20 - kilogramme 8.4 Taau ciitak kuangte 2, kham khawbeam taw a man kibang hi." 
Ezra8:15  
Ezra8:16 Keima in amate tungah, “Note in na taanghpupite ii Pathian, Topa tungah biakna taw kisai na thiangtho uh bangma in ama kungah thinzaw biakpiakna in na paipui ngunn le khamh vanhzakte zongh thiangtho hi." 
Ezra8:17 Biakinnpi na thet uh dong tua teng pha takin keamcing tavun. Tua teng thiampite inndoi ah toaitee in Jerusalem ah a om thiampi lampuite, Levi lampuite le Israel te lampuite tungah aap vun,” ka ci hi." 
Ezra8:18 Tua ahiciang thiampite le Levi te in ngunn, khamh le vanh zakte Jerusalem Biakinnpi ah paipui tu in vaipuak la uh hi." 
Ezra8:19 A tha khat tha, ni sawm le ni nii ni in Jerusalem zuan tu in Ahava a kitotawm Tuiluam ka nusia uh hi. Khualhawna ah kote ii Pathian in hong ompui a, ngalte hong simna le hong suam natu panin hong dal hi." 
Ezra8:20 Jerusalem ka thet uh ciang, ni thum sung ka tawlnga uh hi." 
Ezra8:21 Tua zawk ni li ni in Biakinnpi ah pai in tua ngunn, khamh le vanh zakte toai ka tee zawkciang in Uriah ii tapa thiampi Meremoth tungah ka aap uh hi. Ama taw in Phinehas ii tapa Eleazar le Levi te nii ahi, Jeshua ii tapa Jozabad le Binnui ii tapa Noadiah zong om uh hi." 
Ezra8:22 Na theampo kisimin toai kitee a, tepteena cing takin kivawt paih hi." 
Ezra8:23 Saltanna pan hong cia kikte theampo in Israel te ii Pathian tungah sangaw biakpiakna a hal tu in biakpiaknate hong paipui uh hi. Amate in Israel mite theampo atu in khuital 12, tuutal 96, le tuuno 77 pia in mawna pan amate le amate a kithiansua natu in keal 12 zongh pia uh hi. Hi ngannote theampo Topa tungah sangaw biakpiakna in hal uh hi." 
Ezra8:24 Amate in kumpilianpa ii a piak lai sia zongh kengin Euphrates nitumna ngamukmangte le uliante tungah pia a, tuate in mipite le biakinn sung biakpiakna ah huna pia hi." 
Ezra9:1 Hi teng a kisep zawkciang Israel mite lampui pawlkhat hong pai in, mipite, thiampite le Levi te sia a innpaamte ahi Ammon, Moab le Egypt ngammite sung pan ahizong, Canaan te, Hit te, Periz te, Jebus te le Amor te sung pan ahizong a tuamin a om ngawlna thu ka tungah hong son uh hi. Amate in hi mite ii a vawt a kiihuai nate ma vawt uh hi." 
Ezra9:2 Jew pate in ngamdang numeite teenpui ahikom Pathian ii mi thiangthote mi thiangtho ngawl suaksak uh hi. A khial belte sia lampuite le uliante veu ahi hi. 
Ezra9:3 Hi thu ka zaak ciang thinkiam in ka puan ka eaukeak a, ka sam le ka khamul bot in khuangai in ka to cip hi." 
Ezra9:4 Khuangai in tualai ah nitak sangaw biakpiak hun dong ka to a, ka kiim ah mipite — a vekpi ka kungah hong kikhawm uh hi, tuate sia saltanna pan a cia kikte ii mawna khialna thu Israel te ii Pathian ii a son hu in a laute ahi hi." 
Ezra9:5 Nitak sangaw biakpiak hun hong thet ciang khuangai in ka omna mun pan thoto in ka puan ek sil lai teng ma taw khupdin in ka khutte laamin Topa ka Pathian tungah thu ka ngen hi. 
Ezra9:6 Keima in, “Pathian awng, na mai ah vandak in ka om tu ka maizum lei hi. Ka mawna uh sia ka lu sang in a saang zawin kiciang a; vantungte a dong tu za in saang hi." 
Ezra9:7 Ka taanghpupite hun pan tu hun dongin koma, na mite nasia takin maw zo khu hi. Kote mawna hangin koma, ka kumpite le ka thiampite sia ngamdang kumpite khutnuai theng in, hong kisuamin, hong kisuttol a, thongtaak tu in hong kipaipui hi. Tuni ciang dongin maimawl minsiatna ka thuak dikdek lai uh hi." 
Ezra9:8 Tu in hun tomno sung teng kote Pathian, Topa awng, ko tungah nong thuthiam a, mi pawlkhat sila pan nong suatak a, hi mun thiangthona ah thin muang takin nong teangsak hi. Saltanna pan nong suaktasak a, nuntakna thak nong pia hi." 
Ezra9:9 Kote sila ka hi uh hang saltaangin nong nusia bua hi. Persia kumpiliante in nong ngumsak a, hi lai Judah le Jerusalem ah ngammuanna ka nei thei natu uh le a lalsa na Biakinnpi sa kik tu in nong nungtasak hi." 
Ezra9:10 “Ahizong tu in Pathian awng, tuabang teng a sua zawkciang bang son thei nawn tu khu ziam?" 
Ezra9:11 Kamsaang na naseamte tungtawn a nong thupiakte ka zui bua leleau uh hi. Amate in ka laak tu uh ngam sia thiangtho ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile tualai ah a teang mite in tua ngam mong khat pan mong khat a kiihuai, a thasiathuai ngamtatnate taw kidimsak hi hong ci uh hi." 
Ezra9:12 Amate hong cina pan, tua ngam sungah nuamsa in na suan na paalte in a tawntung na luasak nuam uh le tua mite taw na kiteangthaang ngei buatu uh a, a khanto natu le a matut natu in hu ngeingawl tu nu hi, hong ci hi." 
Ezra9:13 Ka mawnate le ka khialnate hangin hiza daan ka thuak zawk uh ciang zong in nangma, kote Pathian in kote thuak tu a kilawm za sangin a tawm zaw nong thuaksak a, nong nuntaksak lai sia he khu hi." 
Ezra9:14 Tua ahiciang nong thupiakte thu sim ngawl kikin hi mihing seksolte taw kiteang kik thei tu khu ziam? Tuabang ka ngamta uh le na thin uuk mama in khat zongh hong hing khoai ngawlin nong mon siat tu hi. 
Ezra9:15 Israel ii Topa Pathian awng, nang thutang ni hi, ahihang kote nong nungtasak hi. Ka mawnate na tungah kong pualaak uh hi; na mai ah kong pai natu thu a om bua hi,” ka ci hi." 
Ezra10:1 Biakinnpi mai ah Ezra kapin hi mawna khialnate pualaakin kunin a thunget laitak a kiim ah Israel te — pasalte, nupite le patangte — kikhawm a, nasia takin kap uh hi." 
Ezra10:2 Tuaciang Elam bee le phung sung pan Jehiel ii tapa Shecaniah in Ezra tungah, “Ngamdang numeite teenpuina hangin Pathian taw ciampeal khu hi, ahitazong Israel atu in lam et om lai hi." 
Ezra10:3 Tu in hi numeite le a tate puak kik natu in ih Pathian tungah a ciliap huai kamciamna khat vawt hamtang tu khu hi. Kote in nangma le Pathian thupiak a zakta dangte ii vawt tu hong ci bangin ka vawt tu uh hi. Pathian Thukham ii ci bangin ka vawt tu uh hi. 
Ezra10:4 Tuasia in sep tu na vaipuak ahi hi. Kote na nungah om khu hi, tua hi a pai in a, seam suak vet in,” ci hi." 
Ezra10:5 Tua ahiciang Ezra in Shecaniah ii a ci bangin thiampi lampuite, Levi lampuite le a taanglai mihon lampuite sep tu in kiciamsak hi." 
Ezra10:6 Tua zawkciang ama sia Biakinnpi mai pan pai in Eliashib ii tapa Jehohanan inn sungah tumin zan taam hi, tua munah saltaangte thumaan ngawlnate hangin khuangai in om hi. Ama in bang mama ne ngawl dawn ngawl hi." 
Ezra10:7 Saltanna pan a cia kik theampo Jerusalem khua ah a kikhop natu thu Jerusalem le Judah ngam mun theampo ah 
Ezra10:8 mipi lampuite ii thupiak bangin kizasak hi. Ni thum sungin a pai ngawl a om le, a neisa theampo kimatsak tu a, taangpite sungah pawlmi suak thei nawn ngawl tu hi." 
Ezra10:9 Tua ni thum sung, a tha kuana, ni kul ni in Judah le Benjamin ngam sungah a teang pasal theampo, Jerusalem khua ah pai in biakinn leitual ah kikhawm uh hi. Tua hun sung ngua tam mama zu ahikom khua hun phat ngawl hang le kikhopna a thupina hangin mipi theampo ling vakil uh hi." 
Ezra10:10 Thiampi Ezra dingto in amate tungah, “Note in upna na nei bua uh a, ngamdang zi na nei uh manin, Israel tungah khialna na tungsak uh hi." 
Ezra10:11 Tua ahiciang tu in na taanghpupite ii Pathian, Topa tungah na mawnate pualaak vun a, ama diksak bangin ngamta vun. Ih ngam sungah a teang ngamdangmite kung pan a tuamin om vun a, na ngamdang zite taw kikhen vun,” ci hi." 
Ezra10:12 Mipite au in, “Na ci babangin vawt tu khu hi,” ci in zo uh hi." 
Ezra10:13 Ahizong amate in, “Mihonpi tam leih a, ngua zongh tam mama hi. Hi bangin kote doipua sangah ding zo nawn ngawl tu khu hi. Hi mawna sungah eite tam mama kihel ih hi ciang, ni khat ni nii sungin a kiseam thei tu nasep hi ngawl hi." 
Ezra10:14 Ih uliante Jerusalem ah taamsakin hi thu seam tahen. Tuasia ciang ngamdang zi nei pawpo in a kiciam hunin a khuapi tek pan tuabangin lampuite le a thukhente taw hong paikhawm tahen. Hi bangin sepna taw Pathian ii thin uukna sia thai thei tu hi,” ci thua uh hi." 
Ezra10:15 Hi ngealna sia Asahel ii tapa Jonathan le Tikvah ii tapa Jahzeiah te sim ngawlin nial ngawl a, amate sia Melshullam le Levi mi Shabbethai te in panpui uh hi." 
Ezra10:16 Saltanna pan a cia kikte in tua ngealna sia thukim ahikom thiampi Ezra in bee le phung lutang teng tung pan pasal upate panmun pia in, a min teng khum hi. Amate in a tha sawmna, ni khat ni in a thu kat kipan in," 
Ezra10:17 tua zawk tha thum sungin amate in ngamdang zi neite taw kisai thu theampo kan siat uh hi. 
Ezra10:18 Hi sia in ngamdang zinei pasalte tepteena hi: Joshua le a suapuite ii bee le phung pan Jehozadak ii tapate: Maaseiah, Eliezer, Jarib le Gedaliah te ahi hi." 
Ezra10:18 Hi sia in ngamdang zinei pasalte tepteena hi: Joshua le a suapuite ii bee le phung pan Jehozadak ii tapate: Maaseiah, Eliezer, Jarib le Gedaliah te ahi hi." 
Ezra10:19 Amate in a zite khul tu in kamciam pia a, a mawnate hangin tuutal khat taw sangaw biakpiakna nei uh hi." 
Ezra10:20 Immer bee le phung: Hanani le Zebadiah 
Ezra10:21 Harim bee le phung: Maaseiah, Elijah, Shemaiah, Jehiel le Uzziah" 
Ezra10:22 Pashhur bee le phung: Elioenai, Maaseiah, Ishmael, Nethanel, Jozabad le Elasah" 
Ezra10:23 Jozabad, Shimei, Kelaiah, (Kelita zongh kici), Pethahiah, Judah le Eliezer" 
Ezra10:24 Eliashib Shallum, Telem le Uri" 
Ezra10:25 Parosh bee le phung: Ramiah, Izziah, Malchijah, Mijamin, Eleazar, Malchijah le Benaiah" 
Ezra10:26 Elam bee le phung: Mattaniah, Zechariah, Jehiel, Abdi, Jeremoth le Elijah" 
Ezra10:26 Elam bee le phung: Mattaniah, Zechariah, Jehiel, Abdi, Jeremoth le Elijah" 
Ezra10:27 Zattu bee le phung: Elioenai, Eliashib, Mattaniah, Jeremoth, Zabad, le Aziza" 
Ezra10:28 Bebai bee le phung: Jehohanan, Hananiah, Zabbai le Athlai" 
Ezra10:29 Bani bee le phung: Meshullam, Malluch, Adaiah, Jashub, Sheal le Jeremoth" 
Ezra10:30 Pahath Moab bee le phung: Adna, Chelal, Benaiah, Maaseiah, Mattaniah, Bezalel, Binnui le Manasseh" 
Ezra10:31 Harim bee le phung: Eliezer, Isshijah, Malchijah, Shemaiah, Shimeon, Benjamin, Malluch le Shemariah" 
Ezra10:32  
Ezra10:33 Hashum bee le phung: Mattenai, Mattattah Zabad, Eliphelet, Jeremai, Manasseh le Shimei" 
Ezra10:34 Bani bee le phung: Maadai, Amram, Uel, Benaiah, Bedeiah, Cheluhi, Vaniah, Meremoth, Eliashib, Mattaniah, Mattenai le Jaasu"
