Ezra10:43 Nebo bee le phung: Jeiel, Mattithiah, Zabad, Zebina, Jaddai, Joel le Benaiah" 
Ezra10:43 Nebo bee le phung: Jeiel, Mattithiah, Zabad, Zebina, Jaddai, Joel le Benaiah" 
Ezra10:44 Hi pasalte theampo ngamdang zineite veu hi. Amate in a zite khulin a tate taw ciasak siat uh hi. 
Nehemiah1:1 Hi sia in Hacaliah ii tapa Nehemiah ii a zawsa nasep teng tepteena ahi hi. Artaxerxes ii Persia kumpilian a sep a kum kul kum, Kislev tha in Susa khuapi ah keima Nehemiah ka om hi." 
Nehemiah1:2 Ka suapui khat ahi, Hanani sia midang pawlkhat taw Judah pan hong theng a, amate tungah Jerusalem khuapi thu le Babylon saltanna pan a cia kik Jew mipuite thu ka dongh hi." 
Nehemiah1:3 Amate in, kei tungah a nungta lai teng a khua a tui a zot uh ciang haksatna lianpi a thuaknate le a kiim a paam a teang ngamdangmite ii a nomuna thu teng hong ko uh hi. Amate in Jerusalem luphungte a cimhtham in om lai a, kongpite a kihaltum pan kipan a kivawt kik ngawl laina thute zongh hong son uh hi." 
Nehemiah1:4 Hi thu teng ka zaak ciang to suk in ka kap hi. Ni tam mama khuangai in ka mau a an ka ne bua hi. Pathian tungah thu ka ngen a," 
Nehemiah1:5 “Vantung ah a mang Topa Pathian awng! Nang na lian a, nangma kiita in ka om uh hi. Nangma hong itte le na thupiak a zuite tungah na thuciamna thumaan takin na len hi." 
Nehemiah1:6 Topa awng, hong en ta'n a, Israel mi na naseamte atu a sun a zanin ka thungetna hong ngai ta'n. Koma Israel mite mawna khialna teng hong pualaak khi hi. Ka taanghpupite le keima ka maw zo uh hi." 
Nehemiah1:7 Seksol ngamtatna taw nang kong langpan zo uh a, nong thupiakte ka zui bua uh hi. Na naseampa Moses tungtawnin nong piak thukhamte ka zui bua uh hi." 
Nehemiah1:8 Nangma ii Moses tungah: ‘No Israel mite ka tungah nong thumaan bua uh le minam dangte sungah kong thethaang tu hi. 
Nehemiah1:9 Ahizong ka kungah hong zuan kikin kong thupiakte na zui uh le, leimong dongin kithethaang zo na hi uh hangin keima nong biak natu in ka tealsa munah kong paipui kik tu hi,’ na ci thute tu in phawk kik ta'n." 
Nehemiah1:10 “ Topa awng, hite in nangma mi, na naseamte ahi uh hi. Na vaangletna le na thahatna taw amate na suatak hi." 
Nehemiah1:11 Tu in ka thungetna le nangma hong patoai nuam na naseam dangte theampo ii thungetnate hong ngai ta'n. Tuni in taangtutna hong pia ta'n a, kumpilianpa in hong hesuaksak ta'n.” Tua hun lai in keima in kumpilianpa sapittui a pia pa ka hi hi." 
Nehemiah2:1 A tha li zawk ni khat ni in Artaxerxes kumpilianpa ii an a neak laitakin sapittui ka pia hi. Ama in nidang in ka hee maipuak hong mu ngeingawl ahiciang," 
Nehemiah2:2 ama in, “Banghangin hee tuak mama ni ziam? Na ci le na ngawl ahiciang na thin nop ngawlna om hi tu hi,” ci in hong dongh hi. Ka patau a," 
Nehemiah2:3 “Kumpipa awng, na khansau tahen! Ka taanghpupite a kiphumna khuapi laltham a, a kongpite kaanghtum siatin a om laitak bangbangin khuangai ngawlin om thei tu khi ziam?,” ci in ka zo hi." 
Nehemiah2:4 Kumpilianpa in, “Na dei sia bang ziam?” ci in hong dongh hi. Vantung Pathian tungah thu ka nget zawkciang," 
Nehemiah2:5 kumpilianpa tungah, “Kumpipa awng kei tungah nong lungkim a, kong ngetna nong pia nuam le ka taanghpupite kiphumna khuapi ka pua kik thei natu in Judah ngam ah hong paisak ta'n,” ka ci hi." 
Nehemiah2:6 Kumpilianpa in kumpiliannu taw tokhawm a, ka ngetna hong saang hi. Ama in bang tanvei ngei tu a, bang hun ciang hong heak kik tu ni ziam ci in hong dongh a, ka son hi." 
Nehemiah2:7 Tua zawkciang, nong hesuak zo le Judah ngam dong hong paisak thei natu in Euphrates Nitumna sang ngamukmangte tungah lai hong thaaksak ta'n, ci in ka ngen hi." 
Nehemiah2:8 Kumpi thingtaamte a keam pa Asaph tungah Biakinnpi cinna kulh kongpite, khuapi luphungte le ka teen natu ka innthingte atu in thing hong piak natu zongh lai hong thaaksak natu ka ngen hi. Pathian in kei hong ompui ahikom ka nget theampo kumpilianpa in hong pia hi." 
Nehemiah2:9 Kumpilianpa in keima taw ngalkapbu pawlkhat le siphu ngalkap pawlkhat hong paisak a, Euphrates Nitumna ngam ah khual ka haw uh hi. Tualai ah kumpilianpa ii laithakte ngamukmangte tungah ka pia hi." 
Nehemiah2:10 Ahizong Beth Horon khua pan Sanballat le Ammon ngamkhen pan ulian Tobiah in Israel mite ii phattuam natu in na a seam tu mihing khat hong pai ci thu a zaak uh ciang thin uuk mama uh hi. 
Nehemiah2:11 Jerusalem ah ka paisuak a, ni thum sung" 
Nehemiah2:12 Jerusalem atu in ka nasep tu Pathian ii hong heaksak thute kuama tungah ka son bua hi. Tuaciang zankim laitakin tho in ka pusuak a, ka lawmte pawlkhat ka paipui hi. Keima tona laa sia ngawl buang nganhing dang ka keng bua uh hi." 
Nehemiah2:13 Zan lai ma in khuapi nusia in nitumna sang Kuam Kongpi tawnin thangsang Ngulpui Tuinaak kaantan in Ninthuk Kongpi ah ka pai hi. Ka pai kawmin khuapi luphung cimhthamte le mei ii kak kongpite ka en kawkoai hi. 
Nehemiah2:14 Tuaciang khuapi nisuana sang pan saksang Tuinaak Kongpi le Kumpipa Tuili ah ka pai hi. Ka tona laa sia in suangkawm ah lampi mu zo ngawl ahikom," 
Nehemiah2:15 Kidron kuam ah ka tuaksuk a, laa tung to kawmin luphung ka en hi. Tuaciang ka paina lampi tawnin ka heak kik a, Kuam Kongpi kaantan in khuapi sungah ka tum kik hi." 
Nehemiah2:16 Tualsung uliante khat zongh in ka omna mun ahibuale ka nasepte he ngawl hi. Jew ka mipuite — thiampite, lampuite, uliante, ahibuale nasepna ah hong kihel mihing khat pawpo tungah tu dong bangma ka son bua hi." 
Nehemiah2:17 Ahizong tu in amate tungah, “Jerusalem lalcip in a kongpite kisusia ahikom ih ngim ngana teng en vun! Khuapi luphungte ciang kikin ih minsiatna teng bosak tawng,” ka ci hi." 
Nehemiah2:18 Tuaciang amate tungah Pathian ii kei hong ompuina a hong panpuina le kumpilianpa ii kei tungah hong ci teng ka son hi. Amate in, “Puua kik tu nasep kipan tawng!” hong ci kik hi. Tuaciang amate nasep kipan tu in kithoai uh hi." 
Nehemiah2:19 Sanballat, Tobiah le Arab mi Geshem in sep tu ka ngealna te a zaak uh ciang amate in hong nuisan a, “Bang teng sep sawm nu ziam, kumpilianpa langpan tu nu ziam?” hong ci uh hi." 
Nehemiah2:20 Keima in, “Vantung Pathian in kote zawna hong pia tu hi. Kote ama naseamte hi a, nasep ka kipan tu uh hi. Ahizong note in Jerusalem ah neisa te taw kisai in thu na nei bua uh a, tuaciang a taanghthute sungah no kihelna uh om ngawl hi,” ci in ka zo hi." 
Nehemiah3:1 Khuapi ii luphung sia hi bangin kiciang kik hi. Thiampi Lianbel Eliashib le a thiampipuite in Tuu Kongpi vawt kik a, aapin, tuaciang kongpite a omna mun tek ah koi uh hi. Amate in luphung sia Zakhat Tausaang le Hananel Tausaang dongin aap uh hi." 
Nehemiah3:2 Jericho mite in tua luphung cian a khen zom sia ciang uh hi. Imri ii tapa Zaccur in a khen zom sia, ciang hi." 
Nehemiah3:3 Hassenaah ii bee le phung in Ngasa Kongpi vawt hi. Amate in a zawlte thung a kongpite bulh in, kongpi kha natu in a kalhnate le a zawlte thua uh hi." 
Nehemiah3:4 Uriah ii tapa, Hakkoz ii tupa ahi Meremoth in a khen zom sia, ciang hi. Berechiah ii tapa, Meshezabel ii tupa ahi Meshullam in a khen zom sia, ciang hi. Baana ii tapa Zadok in a khen zom sia, ciang hi." 
Nehemiah3:5 Tekoa mite in a khen zom sia ciang ahihang, khua sung lampuite in nasep ukte ii amate sep tu a, a see nasepte nial uh hi." 
Nehemiah3:6 Paseah ii tapa Joiada le Besodeiah ii tapa Meshullam te in Jeshanah Kongpi vawt kik uh hi. Amate in a zawlte thung a kongpite bulh in, kongpi kha natu in a kalh nate le a zawlte thua uh hi." 
Nehemiah3:7 Gibeon pan Melatiah, Meronoth pan Jadon, tuaciang Gibeon le Mizpah mite in Euphrates Nitumna ngamukmangpa inn dong a khen zom sia, ciang hi." 
Nehemiah3:8 Khamh seakpa Harhaiah tapa Uzziel in a khen zom sia, ciang hi. Paaknamtui vawt pa Hananiah in Luphung Zai ciang dong a khen zom sia, ciang hi." 
Nehemiah3:9 Jerusalem khenlang a ukpa Hur ii tapa Rephaiah in a khen zom sia, ciang hi." 
Nehemiah3:10 Harumaph ii tapa Jedaiah in ama inn kung a khen zom sia, ciang hi. Hashabneiah ii tapa Hattush in a khen zom sia, ciang hi." 
Nehemiah3:11 Harim ii tapa Malchijah le Pahath Moab ii tapa Hasshub in a khen sia zom sia ciang in Meikhukte Tausaang sa uh hi. 
Nehemiah3:12 Jerusalem khenlang a ukpa Hallohesh ii tapa Shallum in a khen zom sia, ciang hi. (A tanute in nasep hu uh hi.)" 
Nehemiah3:13 Hanun le Zanoah khuapi a, a teangte in Kuam Kongpi vawt kik uh hi. Amate in kongpite a omna munah koi in, kongpite kha natu in a kalhnate le a zawlte bulh a tua luphung sia metre 440 sung Ninthuk Kongpi dong puua kik uh hi." 
Nehemiah3:14 Beth Haccherem ngamkhenno ukpa Rechab ii tapa Machijah in Ninthuk Kongpi vawt kik hi. Ama in kongpite a omna munah koi a, kongpi kha natu in a kalhnate le a zawlte bulh hi." 
Nehemiah3:15 Mizpah ngamkhenno ukpa Colhozeh ii tapa Shallum in Tuinaak Kongpi vawt kik hi. Ama in kongpi tuamin kongpite a omna munah koi in, a kalhnate le a zawlte bulh hi. Ama in kumpi huan ii zom, Shelah Tuili ah a om luphung sia David Khuapi pan tuaksukna keallei dong ciang hi." 
Nehemiah3:16 Bethzur Ngamkhenno ii lang a ukpa Azbuk ii tapa Nehemiah in a khen zom luphung sia David ii thaan, tuili le ngalkap innte dongin ciang hi." 
Nehemiah3:17 A nuai a, Levi te in luphung a khen zom tam mama te ciang kik uh hi: Bani ii tapa Rehum in a khen zom sia ciang hi; Hashabiah, Keilah Ngamkhenno lang ukpa in a ngamkhenno sia taangin a khen zom sia, ciang hi;" 
Nehemiah3:18 Henadad ii tapa Bavvai, Keilah Ngamkhenno ii lang, a taanglai teng a ukpa in a khen zom sia, ciang hi;" 
Nehemiah3:19 Jeshua ii tapa Ezer, Mizpah ngamukpa in ngalhiamte koina mai, luphung a koaina mun dong a khen zom sia, ciang hi;" 
Nehemiah3:20 Zabbai ii tapa Baruch in Thiampi Lianbel Eliashib inn kongbiang dong a khen zom sia, ciang hi;" 
Nehemiah3:21 Uriah ii tapa, Hakkoz ii tupa ahi Meremoth in Eliashib inn mong dong a khen zom sia, ciang hi." 
Nehemiah3:22 A nuai a, thiampite in luphung khen tam mama te ciang kik uh hi: Jerusalem kiim a teang thiampite in a khen zom sia, ciang uh hi;" 
Nehemiah3:23 Benjamin le Hasshub in amate inn mai ah a khen zom sia, ciang uh hi. Maaseiah ii tapa, Ananiah ii tupa ahi Azariah in a inn mai a khen zom sia, ciang hi;" 
Nehemiah3:24 Henadad ii tapa Binnui in Azariah inn pan luphung king dong a khen zom sia, ciang hi." 
Nehemiah3:25 Uzai ii tapa Palal in a cingte zum paam kumpi inn tungnung tausaang le luphung ii king pan kipan a khen zom sia, ciang hi; Parosh ii tapa Pedaiah in nisuana sang Tui Kongpi nai le Biakinnpi cinna tausaang kung dong a khen zom sia, ciang hi. (Hi mun sia Ophel kici khuapi taw a kinaina mun hi a, biakinn naseamte teenna hi.)" 
Nehemiah3:26  
Nehemiah3:27 Tekoa khua mite in Biakinnpi cinna tausaang lian ii langkhat mun khat pan Ophel nai luphung dong a khen zom sia a nii veina in ciang hi. 
Nehemiah3:28 Thiampi pawlkhat in Siphu Kongpi pan saksang zuan in amate inn mai tek ah a khen zom sia, ciang hi." 
Nehemiah3:29 Immer ii tapa Zadok in ama inn mai ah a khen zom sia, ciang hi. Shecaniah ii tapa Shemaiah, Nisuana Kongpi keampa in khen zom sia, ciang hi." 
Nehemiah3:30 Shelemiah ii tapa Hananiah le Zalaph ii tapa lukna Hanun in a khen zom sia a nii veina in ciang hi. Berechiah ii tapa Meshullam in a inn mai ah a khen zom sia, ciang hi." 
Nehemiah3:31 Khamh seakpa Malchijah in nisuana saksang luphung king tung belh ah om inndoi naina, Miphkad Kongpi kung, biakinn naseamte le sumzuakte zak inn dong a khen zom sia, ciang hi." 
Nehemiah3:32 Khamh seakte le sumzuakte in a king a om inndoi sia pan Tuu Kongpi dong a khen khakbel luphung sia, ciang uh hi." 
Nehemiah4:1 Koma Jew te in luphung cian ka kipat kikna thu Sanballat in a zaak ciang a thin uukin, hong selno hi." 
Nehemiah4:2 A lawmte le Samaria ngalkapte mai ah ama in, “Hi a huathuai Jew te in bang teng vawt kisa ziam? Khuapi puua kik nuam ziam? Sangaw biakpiaknate piakna taw ni khat sungin nasep zo thei tu in kingaisun ziam? Uksuang tawng kaanghmong teng taw inn sak natu suang vawt thei tu ki um ziam?” ci hi." 
Nehemiah4:3 Ama kung a ding Tobiah in, “Amate in bang luphung nam ciang thei ngei tu ziam? Ngia khat ngawngawn in tuasia phulvawk zo tu hi!” ci thua hi." 
Nehemiah4:4 Keima in thu ka ngen a, “Pathian awng, ko hong selnonate za in! Hong selnonate amate lu tungah tu tahen. A neisa theampo kisuttol tahen a, ngamdang ah thongtaak tu in kipaipui tahen." 
Nehemiah4:5 A tatsiatnate maisak heak in a, a mawnate mangil heak in, banghang ziam cile amate in ko inn sate hong zawngsak uh hi,” ka ci hi." 
Nehemiah4:6 Tuabangin kote in luphung ciang tawto in, mite naseam thanuam ahikom, hai ngawlin a saanna bup ii lang kizo to paih hi." 
Nehemiah4:7 Jerusalem luphung cian kik a kingaih mama na thu le luphung hawngvangte a kihukna thute Sanballat, Tobiah le Arabia mite, Ammon mite le Ashdod mite in a zaak uh ciang a thin uuk mama uh hi." 
Nehemiah4:8 Tua ahiciang, amate kipawlin Jerusalem simin buaisak sawm uh hi," 
Nehemiah4:9 ahizong ih Pathian tungah thungen in, sun le zanin ngalvil tu mihing ka koi uh hi." 
Nehemiah4:10 Tuaciang amate in Judah mite ii a nei la khat sia sa uh hi: “Eite vanhngit pua in nasep ngimin ih tha kiam a; Uksuang tawng tua tu tam mama hi. Tuni in bangbang luphung ciang zo tu hi ziam?” 
Nehemiah4:11 Ih ngalte in, eite ii ih mu ma in ahibuale a piang teng ih heak ma in ei kung hong thengin hong thatlum tu a, tuabangin nasep hong tawlngasak tu hi, ci in ngaisun uh hi." 
Nehemiah4:12 Ahihang ih ngalte sungah a teang Jew te in ei hong sawm ih ngalte ngealna teng ih kidop thei natu in a hun, a hun in hong ko uh hi." 
Nehemiah4:13 Tua ahikom ka mite namsau, tei le thal te ka pia a, a kiman ngawl lai mun teng pan ngal pang tu in luphung nungsangah a bee le a phung zui in ka omsak hi." 
Nehemiah4:14 Mite thinngimna ka mu ciang amate tung, a lampuite tung le uliante tungah, “Ih ngalte kiita heak vun. Topa bangza lian a bangza kiitakhuai ci sia phawk vun a, na ngammipuite atu, na tate atu, na zite atu le na bangkuate atu in ngalsim tavun,” ka ci hi." 
Nehemiah4:15 Ih ngalte hong sawmna thute ih heak hunlam sia za in, amate ngealnate Pathian ii a lalsak hunlam tel uh hi. Tuaciang luphung cianna ah ka vekpi in ka kuan kik uh hi." 
Nehemiah4:16 Tua hun a kipanin ka mite a lang in naseam a, a lang sia ngal simna puante silhin, tei, lum le thal te toai in ngalvil uh hi. Tuaciang ih lampuite in luphung a ciang mite nasia takin panpui uh hi." 
Nehemiah4:17 Vanhzak a nawn mite ngawngawn in a khut langkhat taw naseam in a langkhat ah ngalhiam toai uh a," 
Nehemiah4:18 naseam peuma in a kawngah namsau khat tek kua hi. Patauna lemle tum tu pa sia keima taw omkhawm hi. 
Nehemiah4:19 Keima in mipite, a uliante le lampuite tungah, “Ih nasepna zai a, kikhuala in luphung tungah khat le khat ih kikhenthaang hi." 
Nehemiah4:20 Lemle aw na za uh le ka kiim ah hong kikhawm tavun. Ih Pathian in ei atu ngal hong simsak tu hi,” ci in ka son hi." 
Nehemiah4:21 Tuabangin, ni simin zing khuavak pan zan aksite a sua dong ko teng a lang in luphung ka cian uh laitak a lang sia tei toai in ngalvilin om khu hi." 
Nehemiah4:22 Tua hun sungin nasep ukte tungah amate le nasep a hute theampo sia zanin khuapi ih cin thei natu le sun zongh in na ih sep thei natu in Jerusalem ah zantaam tu in ka sawl hi. 
Nehemiah4:23 Keima, ka lawmte, ka naseamte le keima hong cingte in zan ngawngawn in ka puante ka suut bua uh hi. Tuaciang ka ngalhiam tek ka toai siat uh hi." 
Nehemiah5:1 Tawmvei zawkciang nupi le pasal, mi tam mama in Judah a mipuite tungah lungkim ngawlin a phun uh kipan hi." 
Nehemiah5:2 Pawlkhat in, “Ko innkuan liante in nuntak natu antang ka kisamh uh hi,” ci hi." 
Nehemiah5:3 A dangte in, “Pukthi ngawl natu in, antang a khom a nga natu ka lote, ka sapithuante le ka innte ka pong uh hi,” ci hi." 
Nehemiah5:4 A dangte in, “Koma lote le sapithuante tungtaang phiangshia piak tu in sum ka puk uh kul hi." 
Nehemiah5:5 Ih Judah mipuite taw minam kibang khu hi. Ka tate amate tate taw kibangin pha hi ngawl ziam? Ahizong ka tate sila ka suasak kul hi. Ka tanute pawlkhat sila in kizuak zo hi. Ko cimaw khu hi, banghang ziam cile koma ii lote le sapithuante hong kilaaksak zo hi,” ci lai uh hi." 
Nehemiah5:6 A phunnate ka zaak ciang ka thin uuk a," 
Nehemiah5:7 ka ngamtat tu ka khensat hi. Mipi lampuite le a uliante ka pau a, “Na suapuite nengcip nu hi!” ka ci hi. Tua buaina taw kisai in mihonpite ka sam a," 
Nehemiah5:8 amate tungah, “Ngamdangte tungah amate le amate a kizuak ih Judah mealheakte sia ih hi theiza in ih tan kik hi. Tu in Judah a mipuite ahi note tungah amate le amate hong kizuak natu in na mealheakte zawthawk vawt nu hi!” ka ci hi. A lampuite thim dide in om a, bangma son thei ngawl uh hi." 
Nehemiah5:9 Tuaciang keima in, “Na ngamtatna uh khial nu hi! Pathian ii thu ni in, a maan bang na sep kul hi. Tua hile ih ngalte ahi Gentile te in ei hong selno natu thu om ngawl tu hi." 
Nehemiah5:10 Mipite in keima tung pan sum le antang ka pusak hi, ka lawmte le ka na a seamte zongh tuabang ma in sum le antang keima tung pan ka pusak hi. Tu in leibate ih not nawn buatu hi." 
Nehemiah5:11 No tungah amate hong bat — dangka, antang, sapittui ahibuale olive thau teng theampo maisak siat tavun. A lote, a sapithuante, a olive huante le a innte thakhat ma in amate pia kik paih vun!” ka ci hi." 
Nehemiah5:12 Lampuite in, “Na ci bangin ka vawt tu uh hi. A neisate ka pia kik tu uh a, leibate zongh ka siik buatu uh hi,” ci in zo kik hi. Thiampite ka sam a, lampuite ii tu mama a, ka kamciam sia a zui natu in, thiampite mai ah lampuite ka kiciamsak hi." 
Nehemiah5:13 Tua zawkciang ka kawngsawmna dial suutin ka thing hi. Keima in, “Na kamciam bang a zui ngawl peuma Pathian in hi bangin hong thing tu a, Pathian in na innte le na neisa theampo la in, bangma hong nusiat ngawl tu hi,” ka ci hi. Tualai ah a omte theampo in, “Amen!” ci in Topa pok uh hi. Tuaciang lampuite in a kamciam len uh hi." 
Nehemiah5:14 Artaxerxes ii kumpilian a sep zawk kum kulna pan kipan kum 32 dong, kum sawm le kum nii sung theampo Judah ngam uk ka sep sungin ngamukmang khat ka hina taw ka nga an sia keima le ka mealheakte in ka ne bua uh hi." 
Nehemiah5:15 Ka mai ah ngamukmang a seam peuma mipite ii vanhngit hi a, ni simin a an tu le a sapittui tu in ngunn dangkatang 40 veu ngen uh hi. A naseamte ngawngawn in mipite nengcip hi. Ahizong keima in Pathian zakta ka hikom tuabangin ka ngamta bua hi." 
Nehemiah5:16 Ka tha ka ngal teng luphung cian kikna ah ka zangh a, keima atu in vanh bangma ka la bua hi. Keima atu na a seam pawpo luphung cianna ah kihel uh hi." 
Nehemiah5:17 Kiim le paam ngam pan ka kungah hong pai mi theampo dom ngawlin, ka an neakna sabuai ah Judah te le a lampuite 150 hunmaanin an ka vaak hi." 
Nehemiah5:18 Ni simin a neak tu khuital khat, tuu limcibel luk, le ak tam mama ka pia a, ni sawm simin sapittui thak ka pia hi. Ahihang mihonpite ii haksatna he ka hikom, ngamukmangpa ii nga tu hamphatnate ka la bua hi." 
Nehemiah5:19 Pathian awng, nang tungah thu kong ngen hi, hi mipite atu in ka septe theampo, keima noptuam natu in hong tepteesak ta'n." 
Nehemiah6:1 Kongpi lam ah kongpite bulh ngawl lai ka hi uh hang, luphung cian ka man zawkna uh thu le a hawngvang mun a om nawn ngawlna thu Sanballat, Tobiah, Geshem le ka ngal dangte in za uh hi." 
Nehemiah6:2 Tuaciang Sanballat le Geshem in Ono Zaangtam khuanote khat ah amate taw kimu nuamin kam hong vaitha hi. Hisia sia keima bang khat po hong law nop manin hong theamna hi. 
Nehemiah6:3 Amate kungah kamtaite ka paisak a, “Nasep thupi ka vawt laitak hi in tualai ah paisuk thei ngawl khi hi. Noma taw kimu natu bekin nasep tawlngasakin kong pai buatu hi,” ka cisak hi." 
Nehemiah6:4 Amate in tuabangin livei kam hong vaitha a, tua hun simin tuabang veu ma in ka zo kik hi." 
Nehemiah6:5 Tuasia ciang a nga veina ah Sanballat in tazeik tup ngawl laithak khat, a naseamte khat in hong piasak hi." 
Nehemiah6:6 Tua lai sungah: “Geshem in kei tung hong son a, nangma le Jew mite in ngaltho nuam ahi hu in, luphungte ciang kik hi, ci in kiim le paam mite sungah kison kheukho hi. Tuaciang nangma le nangma kumpi na kisuasak natu in ngeal a," 
Nehemiah6:7 tuaciang nangma Judah kumpi na hina thu, kamsaang pawlkhat in Jerusalem khua sungah a thansak natu in ngealna nei hi, ama in hong ci si hi. Kumpipa in hi thu, za nanak tu ahikom keima taw kimu in thuson khop tu ka ngaisun hi,” ci in ki at hi." 
Nehemiah6:8 Ama tungah lai ka thuk kik a: “Na ci teng a maan om ngawl hi. Nangma phua tawm vive hi,” ka ci hi." 
Nehemiah6:9 Nasep tawlngak thei natu in amate in ko hong lauthawn hi. Thu ka ngen a, “Ahizong tu in Pathian awng, hong thahatsak ta'n!” ka ci hi." 
Nehemiah6:10 Hi hun sung khawngin a inn a nusia thei ngawl, Delaiah ii tapa, Mehetabel ii tupa Shemaiah kungah haw tu in ka pai hi. Ama in kei tungah, “Nangma le keima, Biakinnpi sung Thiangtho Mun ah pai in ih buu khawm tu a, kongkhate ih kalh tu hi, banghang ziam cile nangma that tu in amate hong pai tu hi. Tu in nangma that tu in zan khat pawpo amate hong pai tu uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Nehemiah6:11 Keima in, “Kei sia tai in, a buu thei nam ka hi bua hi. Biakinnpi sung bukna taw ka nuntakna huuk sawm tu in hong ngaisun ni ziam? Tuabangin ka buu buatu hi,” ci in ka zo hi." 
Nehemiah6:12 Ka ngaisut kik ciang Pathian in Shemaiah tungah thu son ngawl ahihang, hi kidop natu thu kei hong son tu in Tobiah le Sanballat in ama sumnguk pia a hina thu ka phawk hi." 
Nehemiah6:13 Amate in ka min hong siatsak natu le maizum ka nga natu in mawna sung ka tum dongin hong lausak tu in Shemaiah cial hi. 
Nehemiah6:14 Thu ka ngen a, “Pathian awng, Tobiah le Sanballat ii ngamtatna phawk in a, amate daan pia in. Kei hong lausak nuam tua numei nu Nodiah le a dang kamsaangte theampo phawk in,” ka ci hi." 
Nehemiah6:15 Ni 52 a kisep zawkciang Elul tha ni 25 ni in luphung bup kiman thiang hi. 
Nehemiah6:16 Ngam kiim tengah a om ih ngalte in hi thu a zaak uh ciangin, Pathian huna taw nasep a kizawna thu a kuama po in he ahiciang, amate atu maizumhuai ahi hunlam phawk tek hi." 
Nehemiah6:17 Hi hun sung theampo Judah lampuite Tobiah taw lai kithaak uh hi. 
Nehemiah6:18 Tobiah ii sunghpa sia Jew mi Arah ii tapa Shecaniah a hi hu in Judah ngamsung mi tam mama ama sangah pang uh hi. Tua banah a tapa Jehohanan in Berechiah ii tapa Meshullam ii tanu teenpui hi. 
Nehemiah6:19 Mite in ka mai ah Tobiah ii na pha a sep theampo son in, ka ci theampo zongh ama tungah son siat uh hi. Tuaciang ama in kei lau natu hanciam a, lai hong thaak tawntung hi." 
Nehemiah7:1 Tu in luphung cian kik kiman zo a, kongpite kibul siatin biakinn cingte, a thiangtho biakna lasa pawlte le a dang Levi te a nasep tek kihawmsak zo hi." 
Nehemiah7:2 Jerusalem khuapi a uk tu in mihing nii ka koi a, ka suapuipa Hanani le kulhpi a uk ngalkapmangpa Hananiah ahi hi. Hananiah sia a muanhuai le Pathian a kiita khat hi a, kuama taw kibang ngawl hi." 
Nehemiah7:3 Amate tungah, Jerusalem kongpite zingsang nisua zawk mateng a kihon ngawl natu le nitum ciang kongcingte a cia ma in kongpi a kha natu in ka sawl hi. Amate tungah Jerusalem ah a teang mite sung pan khuapi cingte panmun pia a, pawlkhat sia a kisamh na munte ah, a dangte sia amate innhuang tek a cing tu in a koi natu zongh ka vaitha hi." 
Nehemiah7:4 Jerusalem sia khuapi lian khat hi napi a sungah mihing tam teang ngawl a, inn tam kisa ngawl lai hi." 
Nehemiah7:5 Mipite, a lampuite le a uliante kaikhawm tu le, a innkuan sung mihing tepteena lai sit tu in Pathian in ka thin hong thawn hi. Saltanna pan hong cia masabelte tepteenate ka mu a, a nuai a bang ahi hi:" 
Nehemiah7:6 Saltaang tam mamate in Babylon ngam nusia in amate khuapi tek ahi, Jerusalem le Judah ah ciakik uh hi. A innkuanpuite sia Nebuchadnezzar kumpipa ii amate thongtaak tu a, a paipui pan kipan Babylon ah saltaangin teang uh hi." 
Nehemiah7:7 A lampuite sia Zerubbabel, Joshua, Nehemiah, Azariah, Raamiah, Nahamani, Mordecai, Bilshan, Mispereth, Bigvai, Nehum le Baanah ahi uh hi."

Nehemiah8:1 A tha sali tha in Israel mite theampo a khua tek ah teang thei hi. Tua tha ni khat ni in amate theampo Jerusalem Tui Kongpi sungsang leitual ah kikhawm uh hi. Amate in Topa ii Moses tungtawn a, Israel a piak Thukham laibu a la tu in thiampipa, Thukham he mipil Ezra sawl uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:1 A tha sali tha in Israel mite theampo a khua tek ah teang thei hi. Tua tha ni khat ni in amate theampo Jerusalem Tui Kongpi sungsang leitual ah kikhawm uh hi. Amate in Topa ii Moses tungtawn a, Israel a piak Thukham laibu a la tu in thiampipa, Thukham he mipil Ezra sawl uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:2 Tua ahiciang Ezra in mipite ahi — pasal, numei le thutel thei sa patangte kikhopna munah tua laibu paipui hi." 
Nehemiah8:2 Tua ahiciang Ezra in mipite ahi — pasal, numei le thutel thei sa patangte kikhopna munah tua laibu paipui hi." 
Nehemiah8:3 Tualai kongpi hui leitual ah ama in Thukham laibu sia zing khuavak pan nisun dong amate tungah simh in pha takpi in ngai tek uh hi. 
Nehemiah8:4 Tua hunsung thuson natu in a vawt thing dawtuam tungah Ezra ding hi. Ama ziatsang ah a ding teng: Mattithiah, Shema, Anaiah, Uriah, Hilkiah le Maaseiah; ama veisang ah a ding teng: Pedaiah, Mishael, Malchijah, Hashum, Hashbaddanah, Zechariah le Meshullam ahi uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:4 Tua hunsung thuson natu in a vawt thing dawtuam tungah Ezra ding hi. Ama ziatsang ah a ding teng: Mattithiah, Shema, Anaiah, Uriah, Hilkiah le Maaseiah; ama veisang ah a ding teng: Pedaiah, Mishael, Malchijah, Hashum, Hashbaddanah, Zechariah le Meshullam ahi uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:4 Tua hunsung thuson natu in a vawt thing dawtuam tungah Ezra ding hi. Ama ziatsang ah a ding teng: Mattithiah, Shema, Anaiah, Uriah, Hilkiah le Maaseiah; ama veisang ah a ding teng: Pedaiah, Mishael, Malchijah, Hashum, Hashbaddanah, Zechariah le Meshullam ahi uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:5 Dawtuam saangna ah a ding Ezra sia, amate in mitsuan nginge uh hi. Ezra in laibu a hon po ciang amate ding siat uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:5 Dawtuam saangna ah a ding Ezra sia, amate in mitsuan nginge uh hi. Ezra in laibu a hon po ciang amate ding siat uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:6 Ezra in, “A lian Pathian, Topa pok vun!” ci hi. Mihing theampo in a khutte laamto in, “Amen! Amen!” ci in zo uh hi. Mipite khupdin in a maitang lei a phak dong kunin bia uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:6 Ezra in, “A lian Pathian, Topa pok vun!” ci hi. Mihing theampo in a khutte laamto in, “Amen! Amen!” ci in zo uh hi. Mipite khupdin in a maitang lei a phak dong kunin bia uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:7 Tua zawkciang amate a omna tek ah ding to in, a nuai a Levi te: Jeshua, Bani, Sherebiah, Jamin, Akkub, Shabbethai, Hodiah, Maaseiah, Kelita, Azariah, Jozabad, Hanan le Pelaiah te in amate tungah thukham sonthiang uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:8 Mipite ii a tel thei natu in amate in Pathian Thukham sia pheenin thiang son uh hi. 
Nehemiah8:9 Mipite in Thukham ii tangkalte a zaak uh ciang a thin suu in kap uh hi. Tua ahiciang ngamukmangpa Nehemiah, thiampi le Thukham he mipil Ezra le mipite tungah Thukham a thiangson Levi te in mite theampo tungah, “Tuni sia na Pathian, Topa atu in thiangtho ahikom, khuangai in a kap tu na hi bua uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:9 Mipite in Thukham ii tangkalte a zaak uh ciang a thin suu in kap uh hi. Tua ahiciang ngamukmangpa Nehemiah, thiampi le Thukham he mipil Ezra le mipite tungah Thukham a thiangson Levi te in mite theampo tungah, “Tuni sia na Pathian, Topa atu in thiangtho ahikom, khuangai in a kap tu na hi bua uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:10 Tu in cia tavun a, anlim tuilim neakna vawt tavun. Na an le na sapittuite, neak tu a kitaangsamhte hawm tavun. Tuni sia ih Topa atu in thiangtho ahikom hee heak vun. Topa ii hong piak lungdamna in note hong thahatsak tu hi,” ci in son hi." 
Nehemiah8:11 Levi te in mipite dai khipkhepin om sak a, tubang ni thiangtho ni in a hee ngawl natu in son kawkoai uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:12 Amate tungah a kisim thukhamte a telthiang hu in mipite a inn uh ah cia a, lungdam takin an le tui ne in, a nei pawpo ngualdangte hawm uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:13 A zing ciang in bee le phung lutangte sia thiampite le Levi te taw Thukham hilnate sin tu in Ezra kungah pai uh hi. 
Nehemiah8:13 A zing ciang in bee le phung lutangte sia thiampite le Levi te taw Thukham hilnate sin tu in Ezra kungah pai uh hi. 
Nehemiah8:14 Topa ii Moses tungtawnin a piak Thukham in Israel mite thaampheang buk te sungah thinnuam takin a teen zii natu a sawlna thu, amate in mu uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:15 Tua ahikom amate in Jerusalem le a dang khuapite, khua theampo ah zui tu in a nuai a bangin thupia uh hi: “Thukham sungah zui tu in a ki at bangin mual tungah pai vun a, buk sak natu in taakthing baak, olive baak, myrtle baak, palm baakte le a dang thingbaakte la vun,” ci hi." 
Nehemiah8:16 Tua ahiciang mipite in thingbaakte saat in amate innkhum tam tung, a leitual, biakinn suumsung le, Tui Kongpi le Ephraim Kongpi hui ah a om taangpi khawlmunte ah bukte sa uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:17 A kimat na pan a cia kik mite theampo in buk sa in tuate sungah teang uh hi. Hisia in Nun ii tapa Joshua hun zawkciang, a kivawt ciil hi a, a kuama po ii thin phawngin lungdam uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:17 A kimat na pan a cia kik mite theampo in buk sa in tuate sungah teang uh hi. Hisia in Nun ii tapa Joshua hun zawkciang, a kivawt ciil hi a, a kuama po ii thin phawngin lungdam uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:18 Amate in poai hunsung ni masa pan kipan ni tawp ni dong ni simin Pathian ii Thukham khen khat veu sim uh hi. Amate in ni sali sung poaikhaam in, Thukham ii deina bangin ni liat ni in poai khupna vawt uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:1 Tua tha ni 24 ni in, a mawnate hangin khuangaina lakna in antang tu in Israel mite kikhawm uh hi. Amate sia ngamdangmite theampo taw kikhen zo uh hi. Amate in a khuangai lakna in khau-ip puan silhin a lu tungah leivui poai uh hi. Tua zawkciang dingin amate le a taanghpupite mawnate a pualaak tu kipan uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:2  
Nehemiah9:3 Nai thum sung Topa a Pathian ii Thukham teng amate tungah kisim a, tua zawk nai thum sung a mawnate pualaak in, Topa a Pathian bia uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:4 Levi te atu in dawtuam khat om a, tua ii tungah Jeshua, Bani, Kadmiel, Shebaniah, Bunni, Sherebiah, Bani le Chenani te ding uh hi. Amate in Topa a Pathian tungah a ngingin thungen uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:5 A nuai a Levi te: Jeshua, Kadmiel, Bani, Hashabneiah, Sherebiah, Hodiah, Shebaniah le Pethahiah te in biak sapna sam uh hi. Amate in: “Ding vun a, Topa na Pathian pok vun; a tawntung a tawntungin ama pok vun! mihing pokna sia a cingtaak zo bua zong, a minthang ama min mi theampo in pok tahen.”" 
Nehemiah9:6 Tua zawkciang Israel mite in hi bangin thungen uh hi. “ Topa awng, nangma bek Topa na hi a; Vantungte le van a aksite na vawt hi. Lei le tuipi le a sungah, na theampo na piangsak a; nuntakna na pia siat hi. Vantung ah a vaangnei theampote in kun a nang hong bia uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:7 Topa Pathian awng, nangma in Abram tealin, Babylon ngam Ur khua pan na paipui a; a min Abraham ci in na kheal hi." 
Nehemiah9:8 Na tungah hong thumaanna na mu a, ama taw thuciamna khat na vawt hi. Nangma in Canaan te ngam, Hit te le Amor te ngam, Periz te, Jebus te, Girgash te ngam teng a suan a paalte teenna ngam tu in ama piak tu in kamciam na pia hi. Nangma thumaan na hikom na kamciam na len hi." 
Nehemiah9:9 “Egypt ah koma ii taanghpupite ii thuakna na mu a; San Tuipi ah hu hong ngetna na za hi. 
Nehemiah9:10 Kumpipa, a uliante le a ngammite langpanin nalamdang laknate na vawt hi, banghang ziam cile amate in na mite a zawnsakna na he hi. Tuni dongin na nei minthanna sia tua hunlai pan na nga ahi hi." 
Nehemiah9:11 Na mite atu in tuipi kaantanin lampi khat na vawt a, leiko tungah amate na paipui hi. Tuipi kihual sungah suangtum khat a tumsuk bangin, amate a del a ngalte tuithuk sungah tuitaa uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:12 Sun in amate meei taw lam na pui a, zanin mei taw a lampite na taangsak hi." 
Nehemiah9:13 Vantung panin Sinai Mual tungah na tuaksuk a; na mite paupui in thukham phate le hilna maante na pia hi. 
Nehemiah9:14 Na Sabbath nite a thianthosak natu in amate na hil a, na naseampa Moses tungtawnin na thukhamte na pia hi." 
Nehemiah9:15 “Amate a ngilkial ciang vantung pan anluum na pia a, a dangko ciang suang sung pan tui na pia hi. Amate tungah piak tu in na kamciam sa ngam le lei uk tu in amate na sawl hi." 
Nehemiah9:16 Ahizong koma ii taanghpupite kiphasak in thinpui a, na thupiakte zui tu nial uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:17 Na thu ni nuam ngawl a; na nasep sate theampo amate in mangil uh hi, na vawtsa nalamdang laknate mangil uh hi. Saltanna Egypt ah a heakpui kik tu in, kiphatsakna taw amate in lampui khat teal uh hi. Ahizong nangma in maw maisak Pathian na hi a; thuthiamna le itna nei in na thin uai hi. Na hesuakna lian a; amate na nusia bua hi." 
Nehemiah9:18 Amate in khuitalno bang milim khat vawtin Egypt pan a paipui pathian hi ci uh hi! Topa awng amate in bangzata nang hong selno ziam! 
Nehemiah9:19 Ahizong tualai sennealngam ah amate na nusia bua hi, banghang ziam cile na hesuakna lian hi. Sun le zanin amate lampi a lak tua meei ahibuale tua mei na lakeak bua hi." 
Nehemiah9:20 Na phatna taw a sep tu te na son a; manna taw vaakin a neak tu tui na pia hi. 
Nehemiah9:21 Sennealngam ah kum sawmli tawntung a kisap theampo na sik a; a puante sia ngeingawlin, a peangte nasa in tum ngawl hi." 
Nehemiah9:22 “Minamte le kumpi ngamte, amate taw a kingamngi mun le ngamte na zothalsak hi. Amate in Sihon ukna Heshbon ngam le Og ii kumpi a sepna Bashan ngam te zothal uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:23 Van ah aksite za in amate ta tam mama na pia a, a taanghpupite tungah piak tu in na kamciamsa ngam le lei sia na zothalsak a, tuaciang tua ngam ah na teangsak hi." 
Nehemiah9:24 Amate in Canaan ngam zothal a; nangma in tualai a teang mite na zo hi. Canaan kumpite le a mite tungah, a uuk bang po a vawt natu in na mite vaangletna na pia hi." 
Nehemiah9:25 Na mite in kulh taw a ki uum khuapite, ngamphate, nei le lamh taw a kidim innte, a kito sa tuikhukte, olive kungte, thingnga kungte, le sapithuante la uh hi. Amate in a du a dei theampo ne in thau uh hi; amate in na piak naphate theampo taw lungdamin nuamsa uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:26 “Ahizong na mite in nang hong leedo a, na thu hong nial hi; amate in na Thukham nungngat uh hi. Amate in nangma kung hong heak kik natu a son, a kidop thei natu in thu a pia kamsaangte that uh hi. Amate in hun khat zawk hun khat nang hong simmaw uh a," 
Nehemiah9:27 tua ahikom a ngalte in na zothalsak a, na uksak hi. Ngim nga in, na hu tu dei a nang hong ko uh ciang, vantung panin na zo hi. Na hesuakna lianpi taw lampuite na puak a, amate in a ngalte khut sung pan suatak uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:28 Kilemna a om kik ciang amate hong khial kik a, a ngalte in amate na zothalsak kik hi. Ahitazong amate kisiik kikin, hut tu hong nget ciang vantung pan na za a, hun khat zawk hun khat na hesuakna lian taw amate na suatak hi." 
Nehemiah9:29 Na hilnate ni in a kidop natu thu na pia a, ahizong na Thukham zuina in nuntakna lampi hi napi, amate kiphasak a, na thukhamte nial uh hi. Amate a thin sahin a thinpui a, thu ni ngawl uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:30 Kum khat zawk kum khat amate kidop natu thinsau takin na hil hi. Na kamsaangte thinsung ah a thuson tu na hil a, ahizong na mite in nangonthaak ahikom, minam dangte in amate na zothalsak hi." 
Nehemiah9:31 Ahitazong na hesuakna lian ahikom amate na nusia bup bua a, na lalsak bua hi. Nang sia hesuakna le thuthiamna a nei Pathian na hi hi!" 
Nehemiah9:32 “Oh, Pathian, kote Pathian awng, bangzata lian ni ziam! Bangzata kiitakhuai a, bangzata na vaanglian ziam! Na thuciamte thumaan takin na len hi. Assyria kumpite ii kote hong nencip hun pan kipan, tu dong ciang ngawngawn bangzata ngimna thuak khu ziam! Koma ii kumpite, lampuite, thiampite le kamsaangte, taanghpupite le mite theampo in ngimna thuak uh hi. Bangzata ngim nga zo khu ziam hong phawk ta'n!" 
Nehemiah9:33 Kote daan nong piak sia nong piak tu ma hi a; kote maw kale ung zongh nang na thumaan hi. 
Nehemiah9:34 Koma taanghpupite, kumpite, lampuite le thiampite in na Thukham zui ngawl uh hi. Amate in na thupiakte le a kidop natu thu te ngai ngawl uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:35 Amate na piak ngamzai le kamsaangte, ngampha na ah a teen ciangin, na thupha piakna taw kumpite in na mite uk hi; ahizong amate in a mawna a khialna kisiik ngawlin, na na seam ngawl uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:36 Tu in nong piakna ngam, kote an hong vaak, hi ngampha ah sila ka suak uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:37 Ngamsung pan a piang peuma kumpite kipia a, kote mawnei ka hi uh kom, amate in nong uksak hi. Amate in ko le ka ngannote a uuk bang po in hong vawt uh a, kote ka khuangai mama uh hi!”" 
Nehemiah9:38 Hi thupiangte theampo hangin ko Israel mite in ciliap huai takin thukimna lai khat ka vawt uh a, tuaciang koma ii lampuite, Levi te le thiampite in tua lai tungah a tazeik uh tum hi." 
Nehemiah10:1 A min a thu masabel sia Hacaliah ii tapa ngamukmang Nehemiah hi a, tua zawkciang Zedekiah in a minthu hi. A nuai a te zongh in a minthu uh hi:" 
Nehemiah10:2 Seraiah, Azariah, Jeremiah, Pashhur, Amariah, Malchijah, Hattush, Shebaniah, Malluch, Harim, Meremoth, Obadiah, Daniel, Ginnethon, Baruch, Meshullam, Abijah, Mijamin, Maaziah, Bilgai le Shemaiah." 
Nehemiah10:2 Seraiah, Azariah, Jeremiah, Pashhur, Amariah, Malchijah, Hattush, Shebaniah, Malluch, Harim, Meremoth, Obadiah, Daniel, Ginnethon, Baruch, Meshullam, Abijah, Mijamin, Maaziah, Bilgai le Shemaiah." 
Nehemiah10:2 Seraiah, Azariah, Jeremiah, Pashhur, Amariah, Malchijah, Hattush, Shebaniah, Malluch, Harim, Meremoth, Obadiah, Daniel, Ginnethon, Baruch, Meshullam, Abijah, Mijamin, Maaziah, Bilgai le Shemaiah." 
Nehemiah10:2 Seraiah, Azariah, Jeremiah, Pashhur, Amariah, Malchijah, Hattush, Shebaniah, Malluch, Harim, Meremoth, Obadiah, Daniel, Ginnethon, Baruch, Meshullam, Abijah, Mijamin, Maaziah, Bilgai le Shemaiah." 
Nehemiah10:3 Azaniah ii tapa Jeshua, Henadad bee le phung Binnui, Kadmiel, Shebaniah, Hodiah, Kelita, Pelaiah, Hanan, Mica, Rehob, Hashabiah, Zaccur, Sherebiah, Shebaniah, Hodiah, Bani, le Beninu." 
Nehemiah10:4 Parosh, Pahath Moab, Elam, Zattu, Bani, Bunni, Azgad, Bebai, Adonijah, Bigvai, Adin, Ater, Hezekiah, Azzur, Hodiah, Hashum, Bezai, Hariph, Anathoth, Nebai Magpiash, Meshullam, Hezir, Meshezabel, Zadok, Jaddua, Pelatiah, Hanan, Anaiah, Hoshea, Hananiah, Hasshub, Hallohesh, Pilha, Shobek, Rehum, Hashabnah, Maaseiah, Ahiah, Hanan, Anan, Malluch, Harim, le Baanah ahi uh hi." 
Nehemiah10:5 Ko, Israel mite, thiampite, Levi te, biakinn cingte, biakinn music thiamte, biakinn naseamte le a dangte theampo in Pathian Thukham a zuina in ih ngam sungah a teang ngamdangmite kung pan ka tuam om zawk uh ciang, ka zite le, khua hesa ka tate theampo in," 
Nehemiah10:6 hong lampuite taw mun khat ah kingawmin, tuasia ka paltan uh le, haamsiatna daan thuak tu in, Pathian ii Moses tungtawn a, a piak Pathian Thukham bang ka nungta tu ci in kiciam khu hi; Topa ii thupiak theampo zui tu le, a thukham le a ngeina theampo zui tu in hi kiciamna ka vawt khawm uh hi." 
Nehemiah10:7 Ih ngam sungah a teang ngamdangmite taw ka kiteangthaang buatu uh hi. 
Nehemiah10:8 Ngamdangmite in Sabbath ni ahibuale a thiangtho ni khat pawpo ah antang le a dang na khat pawpo hong zuak le ka lei buatu uh hi. Kum sali a cin simin lo ka tho buatu uh a, leiba theampo ka bosak tu uh hi." 
Nehemiah10:9 Kum simin Biakinnpi sum zaknate ah mi simin ngunntang gram 5 veu ka pia tu uh hi. 
Nehemiah10:10 Kote in biakinn biakpiak natu in a nuai a teng a thiangtho anluum, ni sim biakpiakna antang, ni sim biakpiakna ah a kihal tu ngannote, Sabbath te atu in a thiangtho sumpite, Tha Thak Poaite le a dang poaite, a dang a thiangtho biakpiaknate, Israel te mawphel natu biakpiaknate, le Biakinnpi atu a kisamh nadang theampo ka pia tu uh hi." 
Nehemiah10:11 Kote, mipite, thiampite, le Levi te in zui tu thukham sungah a om bangin Topa ih Pathian tungah sangaw biakpiaknate a kihal ciang akua bee le phungte in thing si tu ziam a khensat natu in kum simin lai meetang ka sawk tu uh hi." 
Nehemiah10:12 Kote in kum simin ka laak uh anpal le thingnga minciilte, Biakinnpi ah biakpiakna in ka paipui tu uh hi." 
Nehemiah10:13 Thukham sung a om bangin Biakinnpi sung thiampite kungah ka tapa suakciil tek paipui in, Pathian tungah ka aap tu uh hi. Kote in ka khui, ka tuu ahibuale ka keal khat sim pan a no suakciil teng zongh ka aap tu uh hi." 
Nehemiah10:14 Kote in Biakinnpi sung thiampite kungah kum simin a tungciil antang taw a kivawt anvui muhlom, le biakpiak natu a dang sapittui, olive thau, le thingnga namcin teng ka paipui tu uh hi. Ko lotho khuate ah sawm a khat sumpi a dong Levi te tungah ka leitang tung pan a piang sawm a khat ka pia tu uh hi." 
Nehemiah10:15 Aaron suan thiampite sia sawm a khat sumpi a kikhon ciang Levi te taw kingawm tu a, Levi te khonsa tua sumpi teng sung pan sawm a khat sia Biakinnpi zak tu in biakinn vanh kholna inndoite ah Levi te in paipui tu hi." 
Nehemiah10:16 Israel mite le Levi te in a kipia an, sapittui le olive thaute Biakinnpi vanhzakte kepna vanh kholna inndoite le thiampite nasepna mun, biakinn cingte le biakinn music thiamte omna inndoite ah tua tu uh hi. Eite in ih Pathian innpi ih ngaingon buatu hi." 
Nehemiah11:1 Jerusalem ah lampuite teang in, a taanglai mite sung pan innkuan sawm ciang innkuan khat veu, Jerusalem khuapi thiangtho sungah teang tu in lai meetang sawkin teal a, a dang teng sia khuapi le khua dangte ah teangsak hi." 
Nehemiah11:2 Jerusalem ah ama uk thu in a teang nuam dang pawpo mipite in pok uh hi. 
Nehemiah11:3 A dang khua te le khuapi te sungah Israel mite, thiampite, Levi te, biakinn naseamte le Solomon naseamte ii suan le paalte sia amate khua tek, amate leitang tung tek ah teang uh hi. Judah ngam Jerusalem khua sungah a teang lampuite min tepteena a nuai a bang ahi hi:" 
Nehemiah11:4 Uzziah ii tapa le Zechariah ii tupa Athaiah. A taanghpupi dangte sungah Amariah, Shephatiah le Mahalalel kihel a, Judah ii tapa Perez ii suan le paalte veu hi." 
Nehemiah11:4 Uzziah ii tapa le Zechariah ii tupa Athaiah. A taanghpupi dangte sungah Amariah, Shephatiah le Mahalalel kihel a, Judah ii tapa Perez ii suan le paalte veu hi." 
Nehemiah11:5 Baruch ii tapa le Colhozeh ii tupa Maaseiah. A taanghpupi dangte sungah Hazaiah, Adaiah, Joiarib le Zechariah kihel a, Judah ii tapa Shelah ii suan le paalte veu hi." 
Nehemiah11:5 Baruch ii tapa le Colhozeh ii tupa Maaseiah. A taanghpupi dangte sungah Hazaiah, Adaiah, Joiarib le Zechariah kihel a, Judah ii tapa Shelah ii suan le paalte veu hi." 
Nehemiah11:6 Perez ii suan le paal sung pan pasal kiciantuam 468 te, Jerusalem ah teang uh hi." 
Nehemiah11:7 Meshullam ii tapa, Joed ii tupa ahi Sallu. Ama taanghpupi dangte sungah Pedaiah, Kolaiah, Maaseiah, Ithiel le Jeshaiah kihel uh hi." 
Nehemiah11:8 Sallu ii mealheak kuungte ahi Gabbai le Sallai. Benjamin mite a vekpi 928 pha in Jerusalem ah teang uh hi. 
Nehemiah11:9 Zichri ii tapa Joel sia amate lampui hi a, Hassenuah ii tapa Judah sia tua khuapi sungah ulianbel a niina ahi hi." 
Nehemiah11:9 Zichri ii tapa Joel sia amate lampui hi a, Hassenuah ii tapa Judah sia tua khuapi sungah ulianbel a niina ahi hi." 
Nehemiah11:10 Joiarib ii tapa Jedaiah le Jachin. 
Nehemiah11:11 Hilkiah ii tapa, Meshullam ii tupa ahi Seraiah. A taanghpupite sungah Zadok, Meraioth le Thiampi Lianbel Ahitub kihel uh hi." 
Nehemiah11:12 Hi bee le phung sung pan a vekpi 822 pha in Biakinnpi sungah naseam uh hi. Jeroham ii tapa, Pelaliah ii tupa ahi Adaiah. A taanghpupite sungah Amzi, Zechariah, Pashhur le Malchijah kihel hi." 
Nehemiah11:12 Hi bee le phung sung pan a vekpi 822 pha in Biakinnpi sungah naseam uh hi. Jeroham ii tapa, Pelaliah ii tupa ahi Adaiah. A taanghpupite sungah Amzi, Zechariah, Pashhur le Malchijah kihel hi." 
Nehemiah11:13 Hi bee le phung sung pan a vekpi 242 te sia innkuan lutangte veu hi. Azarel ii tapa, Ahzai ii tupa ahi Amashsai. A taanghpupite sungah Meshillemoth le Immer kihel uh hi." 
Nehemiah11:14 Hi bee le phung sung pan ngalkap mindok tuam 128 om hi. Amate lampui sia Zabdiel hi a, bangkua kician sung pan ahi hi." 
Nehemiah11:15 Hasshub ii tapa, Azrikam ii tupa ahi Shemaiah. A taanghpupite sungah Hashabiah le Bunni kihel uh hi." 
Nehemiah11:16 Levipa Shabbethai le Jozabad sia Biakinnpi puasang nasep uk a kiciante ahi uh hi. 
Nehemiah11:17 Asaph suan, Mica ii tapa, Zabdi ii tupa ahi Mattaniah. Ama in lungdamko thungetna ah biakinn lasa pawlte lampui hi. Mattaniah nasep a huu pa Bakbukiah. Jeduthun suan, Shammua ii tapa, Galal ii tupa ahi Abda." 
Nehemiah11:18 Levite a vekpi in 284 pha a, Jerusalem khuapi thiangtho sungah teang uh hi." 
Nehemiah11:19 Akkub, Talmon le a mealheakte a vekpi in 172 pha hi." 
Nehemiah11:20 A taanglai Israel mite le a om lai thiampite le Levi te sia Judah khuate le a dang khuapi te ah amate ii neisa leitang tungah teang uh hi. 
Nehemiah11:21 Ophel a kicina mun Jerusalem ah biakinn naseamte teang in, Ziha le Gishpa khutnuai ah naseam uh hi." 
Nehemiah11:22 Uzzi sia Jerusalem a teang Levi te nasep a ukpa hi a, Bani ii tapa, Hashabiah ii tupa ahi hi. A taanghpupite sungah Mattaniah le Mica kihel a, ama sia biakinn biak kikhopna ah music vaipuak a nei Asaph bee le phung pan hi." 
Nehemiah11:23 Bee le phung tuatuamte kilaih in ni simin biakinn music lampuina ah a sep zia taw kisai in a zui tu kumpi ngeinate om hi. 
Nehemiah11:24 Judah nam, Zerah bee le phung. Meshezabel ii tapa Pethahiah in Persia te ii thukhenzum ah Israel mite taang in ding hi." 
Nehemiah11:25 Mihing tam mama sia a lo thawna paam khuate ah teang uh hi. Judah namte sia Kiriath Arba, Dibon le Jekabzeel le hi khuapite ii nai khuanote ah teang uh hi." 
Nehemiah11:26 Amate Jeshua, Moladah, Bethpelet," 
Nehemiah11:27 le Hazarshual khuapi te tuaciang Beersheba khuapi le a kiim a om khuanote zongh ah teang uh hi. 
Nehemiah11:28 Amate sia Ziklag khuapi, Meconah le a khuanote sungah," 
Nehemiah11:29 Enrimmon, Zorah, Jarmuth," 
Nehemiah11:30 Zanoah, Adullam khua te sung le hi khua te ii a kiim a paam khuanote ah teang uh hi. Amate Lachish le a naina lote sungah le Azekah khua le a khuanote ah teang uh hi. Judah mite teenna ngam sia thangsang ah Beersheba le saksangah Hinnom Kuam kilaklaw teng kici thei hi." 
Nehemiah11:31 Benjamin nam pan mite Geba, Michmash, Ai, Bethel le a nai na khuano te," 
Nehemiah11:32 Anathoth, Nob, Ananiah," 
Nehemiah11:33 Hazor, Ramah, Gittaim," 
Nehemiah11:34 Hadid, Zeboim, Neballat," 
Nehemiah11:35 Lod le Ono le Khutthiamte Kual sungah teang uh hi. 
Nehemiah11:36 Judah ngamsung a teang Levi mi pawlkhatte sia Benjamin mite taw teang khawmsak hi.

Nehemiah12:10 Joshua sia Joiakim ii pa hi a; Joiakim sia Eliashib ii pa hi; Eliashib sia Joiada ii pa hi; 
Nehemiah12:11 Joiada sia Jonathan ii pa hi a; Jonathan sia Jaddua ii pa ahi hi. 
Nehemiah12:12 Joiakim ii Thiampi Lianbel a sep lai in thiampi bee lutangte sia a nuai a thiampite veu hi: Meraiah Seraiah Hananiah Jeremiah Meshullam Ezra Jehohanan Amariah Jonathan Malluchi Joseph Shebaniah Adna Harim Helkai Meraioth Zechariah Iddo Meshullam Ginnethon Zichri Abijah … Miniamin Piltai Moadiah Shammua Bilgah Jehonathan Shemaiah Mattenai Joiarib Uzzi Jedaiah Kallai Sallai Eber Amok Hashabiah Hilkiah Nethanel Jedaiah

Nehemiah12:22 Thiampi Lianbel te: Eliashib, Joiada, Jonathan le Jaddua te nuntak hun sungin Levi innkuan lutangte le thiampi innkuan lutangte tepteena khat kikoi hi. Hi tepteena sia Darius ii Persia kumpilianpa a sep lai in kizo siat hi." 
Nehemiah12:23 Levi innkuan lutangte tepteena lai ahile Eliashib ii tupa Jonathan hun dong bekma zumlai tepteena sungah kikhum hi. 
Nehemiah12:24 Hashabiah, Sherebiah, Jeshua, Binnui le Kadmiel te sawlna taw Levi te a pawl a pawl veu sua hi. Pathian mi David kumpipa thupiakna taw kizui in, pawl nii veu in kilaih in Pathian pok a, lungdamko uh hi." 
Nehemiah12:25 Biakinnpi kongpite hui ah vanh kholna inndoi a cingte a uk biakinn cingte sia a nuai a teng hi: Mattaniah, Bakbukiah, Obadiah, Meshullam, Talmon le Akkub." 
Nehemiah12:25 Biakinnpi kongpite hui ah vanh kholna inndoi a cingte a uk biakinn cingte sia a nuai a teng hi: Mattaniah, Bakbukiah, Obadiah, Meshullam, Talmon le Akkub." 
Nehemiah12:26 Hi mite sia Joshua ii tapa, Jehozadak ii tupa ahi Joiakim hun, le ngamukmang Nehemiah le Thukham a he, thiampi mipil Ezra te hun lai in a omte veu hi." 
Nehemiah12:26 Hi mite sia Joshua ii tapa, Jehozadak ii tupa ahi Joiakim hun, le ngamukmang Nehemiah le Thukham a he, thiampi mipil Ezra te hun lai in a omte veu hi." 
Nehemiah12:26 Hi mite sia Joshua ii tapa, Jehozadak ii tupa ahi Joiakim hun, le ngamukmang Nehemiah le Thukham a he, thiampi mipil Ezra te hun lai in a omte veu hi." 
Nehemiah12:27 Jerusalem khuapi luphung a ki aap ciang, daakbute le tengtonghte tumin lungdamkona late taw a ki aapna poai ah a kihel thei natu in Levi te sia a teenna tek pan kikaikhawm hi." 
Nehemiah12:28 Levi innkuan la sate sia Jerusalem khua kiim a teenna tek pan le Netophah kiim khuate pan," 
Nehemiah12:29 tuaciang Bethgilgal, Geba le Azmaveth panin kikhawmtua uh hi." 
Nehemiah12:30 Thiampite le Levi te in amate, mipite, kongpite le khuapi luphung atu in a zeksa thiansuana seam hi." 
Nehemiah12:31 Luphung tungah Judah lampuite ka khawmtua a, Pathian tungah lungdamko in, khuapi a kiimkot tu pawl lian niite ka uksak hi. A masa pawl sia luphung tung ziatsang Ninthuk Kongpi sang manaw in pai uh hi." 
Nehemiah12:32 La sate nung pan Hoshaiah pai a, Judah lampuite a lang in zui uh hi." 
Nehemiah12:33 A zom kik a nuai a thiampi teng in lemle tumin pai uh hi: Azariah, Ezra, Meshullam, Judah, Benjamin, Shemaiah le Jeremiah. Tua zawkciang Jonathan ii tapa Shemaiah ii tupa ahi, Zechariah in zui hi. (A taanghpupite sungah Asaph bee le phungte ahi Mattaniah, Micaiah le Zaccur te zongh kihel hi.)"

Tua zawkciang Jonathan ii tapa Shemaiah ii tupa ahi, Zechariah in zui hi. (A taanghpupite sungah Asaph bee le phungte ahi Mattaniah, Micaiah le Zaccur te zongh kihel hi.)"

Nehemiah12:34  
Nehemiah12:35  
Nehemiah12:36 Zechariah sia a bee le phung sung pan a dangte — Shemaiah, Azarel, Milalai, Gilalai, Maai, Nethanel, Judah le Hanani — a vekpi in Pathian mi David kumpipa ii a tum thei music vanh namte keng uh hi. Hi pawl sia a pai ciang laithiam mipil Ezra in lampui hi." 
Nehemiah12:36 Zechariah sia a bee le phung sung pan a dangte — Shemaiah, Azarel, Milalai, Gilalai, Maai, Nethanel, Judah le Hanani — a vekpi in Pathian mi David kumpipa ii a tum thei music vanh namte keng uh hi. Hi pawl sia a pai ciang laithiam mipil Ezra in lampui hi." 
Nehemiah12:36 Zechariah sia a bee le phung sung pan a dangte — Shemaiah, Azarel, Milalai, Gilalai, Maai, Nethanel, Judah le Hanani — a vekpi in Pathian mi David kumpipa ii a tum thei music vanh namte keng uh hi. Hi pawl sia a pai ciang laithiam mipil Ezra in lampui hi." 
Nehemiah12:37 Tuinaak Kongpi pan David Khuapi sangah kaato in, David kumpi inn kaantan a, khuapi nisuana sang Tui Kongpi luphung ah heak kik uh hi." 
Nehemiah12:38 Lungdam a ko pawldang khat sia luphung tung a veisang tawnin pai a, keima le mipite a lang in ka zui uh hi. Meikhukte Tausaang kaantan in Luphung Zai sia ah pai in," 
Nehemiah12:39 tua mun pan Ephraim Kongpi, Jeshanah Kongpi, Ngasa Kongpi, Hananel Tausaang le Zakhat Tausaang te kaantan in Tuu Kongpi ah ka pai uh a, Biakinnpi kongpi hui ah ka tawp uh hi." 
Nehemiah12:40 Tuabangin Pathian tung lungdam a ko tua pawl niite biakinn suumsung theng uh hi. Keima taw a omkhawm lampuite ban ah 
Nehemiah12:41 ka pawl sungah lemle tum a nuai a thiampite: Eliakim, Maaseiah, Miniamin, Micaiah, Elioenai, Zechariah le Hananiah te kihel a;" 
Nehemiah12:41 ka pawl sungah lemle tum a nuai a thiampite: Eliakim, Maaseiah, Miniamin, Micaiah, Elioenai, Zechariah le Hananiah te kihel a;" 
Nehemiah12:42 tuaciang amate nung pan Maaseiah, Shemaiah, Eleazar, Uzzi, Jehohanan, Malchijah, Elam le Ezer te in zui uh hi. Jezrahiah ii lampui lasate in a aw neiza taw lasa uh hi." 
Nehemiah12:43 Tua ni in sangaw biakpiakna tam mama kipia a, mipite lungdamna taw kidim uh hi, banghang ziam cile Pathian in amate lungdamsak mama hi. Numeite le patangte tua poai ah kihel in, amate ii awngingte a khualana pan kiza kawkoai thei hi." 
Nehemiah12:44 Tua hunlai in sawm a khat sumpite, kum sim anpalte le a minciil thingngate a kihel Biakinnpi atu a kipiate kikepna vanh kholna inndoite a uk tu in pasalte kikoi hi. Hi mite in Thukham sungah a om bangin khuapi tuatuam naina ah a om lote pan thiampite le Levi te atu a kipiate, kaikhop tu vaipuak nei uh hi. Judah mi theampo thiampite le Levi te tungah lungkim uh hi," 
Nehemiah12:45 banghang ziam cile amate in Pathian thupiakna bangin kithiansuana poaite le a zeksa dangte vawtsak hi. David kumpipa le a tapa Solomon ii zui tu ngeina a piakte bangin biakinn music thiamte le biakinn cingte zongh in pha takin a sep tute seam uh hi. 
Nehemiah12:46 Nidang lai, David kumpipa le music thiam Asaph hun pan kipan lasate in Pathian pokna late le lungdamkona lasaknate lampui uh hi." 
Nehemiah12:47 Zerubbabel le Nehemiah hun ciang zonghin biakinn music thiamte le biakinn cingte kivaak natu in Israel mi theampo in ni simin letsong pia uh hi. Mipite in Levi te tungah a thiangtho biakpiaknate pia a, Levi te in a kisamh za thiampite pia uh hi." 
Nehemiah13:1 Mipite tungah nging takin Moses ii Thukham a kisim ciang Ammon te le Moab te sia Pathian mite sungah kihel thei ngawl tu hi a cina laingual mu uh hi. 
Nehemiah13:2 Tuasia banghang ziam cile Israel mite Egypt pan a pusua lai in, lampi ah Ammon le Moab mite in an le tui a piak ngawl hang hi. Amate in Israel a haamsiat tu in Balaam sum pia ahihang ih Pathian in tua haamsiatna sia thupha khat suaksak zaw pum hi." 
Nehemiah13:3 Israel mite in hi thukham a kisim a zaak ciang amate mi sungah ngamdangmi theampo kihelsak ngawl uh hi. 
Nehemiah13:4 Biakinn vanh kholna inndoite a uk thiampi Eliashib sia Tobiah taw khuangei hialma a thu kisi in om uh hi. 
Nehemiah13:5 Ama in Tobiah sia antang le ngimnamtui biakpiaknate, Biakinnpi sungah a kizangh vanhte, thiampite atu biakpiaknate le, tuaciang Levi te, biakinn music thiamte le biakinn cingte a kipia antang, sapittui le olive thau, sawm a khat te bek khol natu a, a kingaisun inndoi lian sia zong zanghsak hi." 
Nehemiah13:6 Hi bang teng ahi hunlai in Jerusalem ah ka om bua hi, banghang ziam cile Artaxerxes ii Babylon kumpi a sep zawk kum 32 kum in, ama kungah thupuak tu in ka pai kik hi. Hun tawmvei zawkciang ama oaina taw" 
Nehemiah13:7 Jerusalem ah ka heak kik hi. Tualai ah Eliashib in Biakinnpi inndoi khat Tobiah a zaksak ka mu ciang ka patau hi. 
Nehemiah13:8 Ka thinso a, Tobiah neisa vanh theampo ka lotkeaksak hi." 
Nehemiah13:9 Tua inndoite a zeksa om bangin a kithianthosak natu le biakinn vanhte, biakpiakna ante le ngimnamtuite a kikoi kik natu in thu ka pia hi." 
Nehemiah13:10 Mipite in a khamkhop tu an pia zo ngawl ahikom biakinn music thiamte le a dang Levi te in Jerusalem nusia in a lo tek a zot kik zongh ka za hi. 
Nehemiah13:11 Biakinnpi a kingaingonsak hu in tua uliante ka teih zazaan hi. Tuaciang Levi te le music thiamte Biakinnpi ah ka kaikhawm kik a, a nasep ka seamsak kik hi." 
Nehemiah13:12 Tua zawkciang Israel mite theampo in biakinn vanh kholna inndoite ah sawm a khat a piak antang, sapittui le olive thaute a puak kipan kik uh hi." 
Nehemiah13:13 Vanh kholna inndoite uk tu in, a nuai a teng: thiampi Shelemiah; thukham a he mipil Zadok; le Levi mi Pedaiah ka koi hi. Mattaniah ii tupa, Zaccur ii tapa ahi Hanan in amate hu tu hi. Hi mite in a naseppuite tungah thumaanna taw an hawm tu in a muanhuai mite ahi sia ka he hi." 
Nehemiah13:14 Ka Pathian awng, na Biakinnpi atu le a biakpiak natu in hi ka nasepnate theampo hong phawsak ta'n." 
Nehemiah13:15 Tua hunlai Judah ngam ah mite in Sabbath ni in sapittui a suuk uh ka mu hi. Midangte in an, sapittui, sapitngate, thei ngate le, nadang teng a laate tungah suanhin Jerusalem ah a tumpui ka mu a; Sabbath ni in bangma a zuak ngawl natu in a kidop natu thu ka pia hi." 
Nehemiah13:16 Tyre khuapi mite pawlkhat Jerusalem ah teang a, tuate in Sabbath ni in ka mite tungah a zuak tu ngasate le vanh tuatuamte khuapi sungah hong paipui uh hi." 
Nehemiah13:17 Jew lampuite ka teih a, amate tungah, “A sia na vawt uhte en ve vun! Sabbath ni ninsak nu hi." 
Nehemiah13:18 Hi bang linlian in na taanghpupite ngamta ahikom Pathian in daan pia a, hi khuapi lalcipsak hi. Tua hi napi Sabbath ni nitsakna taw Israel tungah Pathian thin uuk seseam natu in vawt veve nu hi,” ka ci hi." 
Nehemiah13:19 Tua ahikom Sabbath a kipat sim, nitak kipat po ciang khuapi kongpite a kikha natu le Sabbath hun a bo mateng a kihon kik ngawl natu in thu ka pia hi. Sabbath ni in khuapi sungah bangma a kitumpui ngawl het natu in ka mihingte pawlkhat in kongpite ka cingsak hi." 
Nehemiah13:20 Vanh namcin a zuakte khatvei niivei khawng khuapi luphung pua sangah nipi zawk Ni nga ni zanin ngiak uh hi. 
Nehemiah13:21 Tua mite tungah, “Zingsang ciang dong na ngak uh hang a kimanna om bo. Hi bang na om kik uh le, zawthawk thu kong zak kul tu hi,” ci in a kidop natu in thu ka pia hi. Tua hun a kipan Sabbath ni in amate hong pai kik ngawl uh hi." 
Nehemiah13:22 Levi te amate le amate kithiansua natu le Sabbath a thianthosak nanak natu in, kongpite pha tak a cin natu thu ka pia hi. Pathian awng, hi thu zongh ah hong phawk ta'n a, itna lian nei na hikom kei hong suaktasak ta'n." 
Nehemiah13:23 Tua hun in Judah pasal tam mama in Ashdod, Ammon le Moab numeite a teenpui uh zongh ka mu hi." 
Nehemiah13:24 A tate a lang in Ashdod kam ahibuale kamdang khat pau in om a, amate in koma kam pau thei ngawl uh hi." 
Nehemiah13:25 Tua pasalte teih in ka haamsiat ngawp a, saatin, a sam ka nuk zazaan hi. Tua zawkciang amate ahizong a tate ahizong ngamdangmite taw a ten kik ngei nawn ngawl natu in Pathian min taw ka kiciamsak hi." 
Nehemiah13:26 Keima in, “Solomon kumpipa a mawsak a khialsak sia ngamdang numeite hi. Ama in minam dangte ii kumpite sangin a lianzaw pa hi. Pathian in ama it a, Israel theampo ii kumpi suaksak napi, hi mawna khialna sungah puk hi." 
Nehemiah13:27 Kote in na ngamtatna hong zui in ngamdang numeite teenpuina taw ih Pathian thu nial tu khu ziam?” ka ci hi. 
Nehemiah13:28 Joiada sia Thiampi Lianbel Eliashib ii tapa hi a, ahizong Joiada ii tapate khat in Beth Horon khua pan Sanballat ii tanu teenpui ahikom Jerusalem pan Joiada ka hawlkhia hi." 
Nehemiah13:29 Pathian awng, hi mite in thiampi nasepna mun le thiampite le Levi te taw na vawt thuciamna te a nitsakna thu phawk in." 
Nehemiah13:30 Ngamdang taw a kipee-awna theampo pan mipite ka thiansua a, amate nasep tu tek a heak natu in thiampite le Levi te zui tu ngeinate ka vawtsak hi." 
Nehemiah13:31 A hun ciang biakpiaknate halna ah a kizangh thingte a kipaipui natu le mipite ii a anpalte le thingnga minciilte taw biakpiaknate a paipui natu in ka vaihawmsak hi. Pathian awng, hite theampo phawk in a, tuaciang keima hong kiphaw natu hong hisak ta'n." 
Esther1:1 Persia ngam khuapi Susa khua kumpi tokhum tung panin Xerxes kumpipa in India pan Ethiopia dong ngamke 127 uk hi. 
Esther1:2  
Esther1:3 Kumpi a sep a kum thum kumin a uliante theampo le zum ukte atu in anneakpoai khat vawt hi. Tualai ah, Persia le Media ngalkaphonpite, ngamuk mangte le kumpi uliante om hi." 
Esther1:4 Kumpipa in a ngam haunate le kumpi zum ii vaang neina, nasiatna taw a thupiziate tha luk sung bup lak hi." 
Esther1:5 Tua zawkciang kumpipa in Susa khuapi sungah a om pasal theampo a hau, a zawng a kibangin anneakpoai khat vawtsak hi. Tua poai nipi khat sung bup kumpi inn huante sungah kivawt hi." 
Esther1:6 Tua mun a suumsung sia patpuankhai vancii le a kaangte taw kizeam a, tua puankhakte a ci pha puanneal sandup khaute taw marble suangkaang khuamte tungah ngunnkualte taw kikhii hi. Tua suumsung teng marble suang a kaang, a san, a tee keptang le vancii meal suangmanpha bangte kipha in, a tungah khamh le ngunn taw a kivawt tokhumte kikoi hi." 
Esther1:7 Sapittui te khat le khat a kibang ngawl khamh hai taw kihawm vazia a, kumpipa in a kumpi sapittui te ciil vawt ngawl hi." 
Esther1:8 Sapittui neak tu za ciangtan om ngawl a; a kuama po in a du za a neak natu in kumpipa in kumpi inn sung naseamte thupia hi. 
Esther1:9 Tua poai hun sungin Vashti kumpinu in kumpi inn sungah numeite atu in anneakpoai khat vawtsak hi. 
Esther1:10 A poaikhaam ni sali ni in kumpipa sapittui ne in nuamsa ahikom ama aituam naseam, numei uk cilnge sa pasal sali Mehuman, Biztha, Harbona, Bigtha, Abagtha, Zethar le Carkas te sam hi." 
Esther1:11 Kumpipa in amate tungah Vashti kumpinu a kumpilukhu khu in ama kungah a paipui natu in thupia hi. Kumpinu sia numei mealpha khat hi a, kumpipa in uliante le a leangnate theampo tungah kumpinu mealhoina lak nuam hi." 
Esther1:12 Ahizong a naseamte in kumpipa thupiakna Vashti kumpinu tungah a son uh ciang kumpinu in nialin pai nuam ngawl hi. Tua hu in kumpipa thinso hi. 
Esther1:13 Tu in upadi zui natu ngeina huvau thudokna a pian ciang, ama in a pil a thiamte ngaisutna a dok tu sia kumpi ngeina ahikom ama in bang vawt tu ci a he, ngaisutna a piate sam hi." 
Esther1:14 Ama ii ngaisutna a dok tawntung belte sia Carshena, Shethar, Admatha, Tarshish, Meres, Marsena le Memucan — Persia le Media ngam ulian salite hi a, kumpi ngam sungah zum lianbelte uk uh hi." 
Esther1:15 Ama in hi uliante tungah, “Keima Xerxes kumpipa in ka naseamte sawlin Vashti kumpinu ka samsak a, ahizong ama in ka thu hong nial hi! Ama tungah ih vawt tu sia upadi in bang ci ziam,” ci hi." 
Esther1:16 Tuasia ciang Memucan in kumpipa le a uliante tungah: “Vashti kumpinu in kumpipa bek hi ngawlin, a uliante — a tatakin ci leang kumpi uk sungah a om pasal theampo hong zawngsak hi!" 
Esther1:17 Kumpinu ngamtatna a zaak pawpo ciang, kumpi uk sungah a om numei theampo in amate ii pasal tek nomu paih tu hi. Amate in, ‘Xerxes kumpipa in Vashti kumpinu sia ama kungah a pai natu thupia napi a thu nial hi,’ ci tu uh hi." 
Esther1:18 Persia le Media ngamsung uliante ii zite in kumpinu ngamtatna teng a zaak po ciang nitum ma in tua thu a pasalte tungah son tu uh hi. Mun theampo ah zite in a pasalte zakta nawn ngawl tu a, a pasalte sia a zite tungah thin uuk tu uh hi." 
Esther1:19 Kumpipa na lung a kim le, Vashti sia kumpipa mai ah a kilak kik ngei nawn ngawl natu in kumpi thu thansakna khat vawt in. Tuasia a kilaih kik thei nawn ngawl tu in Persia le Media te upadi sungah a ki at natu thupia in. Tua zawkciang ama kumpinu dinmun ah numei phazaw khat koi in." 
Esther1:20 Na thu thansakna sia a lian mama hi kumpi ukna ngam theampo ah a kiheak ciang numei theampo in amate ii pasalte hau kale zawng kale pha takin zatak vawt tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Esther1:21 Kumpipa le a uliante in hi ngaisutna pha sa a, Memucan ii ngaisutna a piak bangin kumpipa ngamta hi." 
Esther1:22 Zi neisa pasal theampo sia amate ii bangkua tek ii topa hi tu a, a thuneibel hi tu hi ci in, ama in tua kumpi ukna ngam sim ah a kampau tek le a lai tek taw thu zaaksakna khat puak hi." 
Esther2:1 Tua nungciang kumpipa ii thin uukna a thai zawkciang ngawngawnin ama in Vashti ngamtatna le a tungah a thu thansakna sia ngaisun top hi. 
Esther2:2 Tua ahiciang kumpipa kung a om a thudok pawlkhatte in, “Banghangin ngaknu thiangtho mealpha pawlkhat zongsak ngawl ni ziam?" 
Esther2:3 Na ukna ngamke theampo ah ngaknu mealpha teng hi lai Susa khuapi sung numeite teenna munah hong puak tu in uliante panmun pia thei ni hi. Na numeite a uk cilnge sa Hegai ii kep tu in koi in a, amate tualai ah a mealphat natu in kipuuasak in." 
Esther2:4 Tuasia ciang pha na sakbel numei sia la in a, Vashti taangin kumpinu suaksak in” ci in ngaisutna pia uh hi. Kumpipa in hi ngaisutna sia phasa in zui hi." 
Esther2:5 Tualai Susa khuapi ah Jew te Jair tapa Mordecai kici khat teang hi; ama sia Benjamin minam hi a, Kish le Shimei ii suan khat hi." 
Esther2:6 Babylon kumpipa Nebuchadnezzar in Judah kumpipa Jehoiachin le a ngalmat honkhat Jerusalem pan saltaang tu in a paipui lai in Mordecai kihel hi. 
Esther2:7 Ama in suapuiseal khat nei in, Hebrew min, Hadassah kici Esther hi a; tua nu a mealpha in a khanhoi hi. A nute a pate a thi ciang Esther sia Mordecai in la a, ama tanu tatak bangin khoi in khangsak hi." 
Esther2:8 Kumpipa in tua thu thansakna thak a suasak ciang Susa ah ngaknu tam mama hong kipaipui a, Esther kihel hi. Ama zongh numeite teenna a uk Hegai khutnuai kumpi inn sungah kikoi hi." 
Esther2:9 Hegai in Esther diksa in maipha pia hi. Ama in Esther mealphat natu in kin vawt a, kimetsak in, an tuam taw vaak hi. Ama in tua nu numeite teenna munah omna phabel pia a, kumpi inn pan a kitealtuam numei salite in khoisak hi." 
Esther2:10 Tu in Mordecai ii ngaisutna a piak bangin Esther in Jew te a hina thu iimcip hi. 
Esther2:11 Ni simin Mordecai in Esther bang bang in om a, bang suak lai tu ci in a heak natu in numeite teenna leitual mai ah kilee nithi hi." 
Esther2:12 Numeite mealphat natu a kipua hun kum khat sung hi a — myrrh sathau namtui taw tha luk sung le balsam sathau taw tha luk sung kimet hi. Tua zawkciang numeite khat zawkciang khat kumpi Xerxes kungah kipaipui tu hi. 
Esther2:13 Numeite teenna pan kumpi inn sungah ama a pai ciang puan a silh nop po silh thei hi. 
Esther2:14 Tualai ah ama nitak sang in pai a, a zingsang ciang numeite teenna mundang ah kipaipui kikin kumpipa zinote a uk cil kingetpa Shaashgaz tungah ki aap tu hi. Kumpipa in diksa a, a min taw a sam kik buanale ama sia kumpipa kung pai kik ngawl tu hi." 
Esther2:15 Kumpipa kungah Esther a pai tu hun hong theng hi. Esther sia Abihail ii tanu hi a, a tanu tu in a la Mordecai ii suapui sealh hi; Esther sia a mu pawpo in hoisa hi. Ama pai hun a thet ciang numeite teenna a uk, cil kingetpa Hegai ii a sawl bang linlian in puansilh hi." 
Esther2:16 Tuabangin Xerxes ii kumpi a sep a kum sali kum, a tha sawmna, Tebeth tha in Esther sia kumpi inn sung Kumpi Xerxes kungah kipaipui hi." 
Esther2:17 Kumpipa in ngaknu dangte sangin ama hoi sa zaw a, a dangte sangin maipha pia zaw in, it zaw hi. Ama in a lu tungah kumpilukhu khusak a, Vashti dinmun ah kumpinu suaksak hi." 
Esther2:18 Tua zawkciang kumpipa in Esther patoaina in anneakpoai lian khat vawt a, a uliante le zum nasep uk theampo sam siat hi. Ama in kumpi ukna ngamsung bup zum kha ni khat tu in thangsak a, kumpipa taw a kiphu, a kilawm letsongte hawm hi." 
Esther2:19 Tua hun sungin kumpipa in Mordecai sia nasep uk dinmun khat pia hi. 
Esther2:20 Esther in ahile Jew te a hina kihesak ngawl lai hi. Mordecai in kuama tung a son ngawl natu sawl a, a no lai a thu a nit bangma in hi thu huvau zong ah a thu ni hi." 
Esther2:21 Mordecai in kumpi inn ah zum na a sep hun sungin, kumpipa inndoi sung tumna a cing numei uk cil kinget niite ahi, Bigthana le Teresh in Xerxes kumpipa ngalvawtin, thalup sawm ku uh hi." 
Esther2:22 Mordecai in tua thu a heak ciang Esther kumpinu tungah son a, Mordecai ii a heak thute ama in kumpipa tungah son hi." 
Esther2:23 Hi thute a kat ciang thumaan a hina mu ahikom tuate ngeal sia ngui ki awklumsak hi. Hi thu teng theampo kumpi ukna ngamsung zum thu tepteena te sungah a kikhum natu in kumpipa in thupia hi. 
Esther3:1 Tawmvei zawkciang Xerxes kumpipa in Haman a kici khat sia vuanzi lianbel in a za khanto hi. Haman sia Agag suan Hammedatha tapa ahi hi. 
Esther3:2 Zatakna piakna in Haman mai ah khupdin in a kun natu Kumpipa in a khutnuai ulian theampo tungah thupia hi. A dang teng in tuabangin zatakna pia napi Mordecai in nial hi. 
Esther3:3 Kumpi ulian dangte in kumpipa thupiakna sia banghangin zui nuam ngawl ni ziam, ci in dongh uh hi;" 
Esther3:4 amate in ni khat zawk ni khat a zui natu sawsawl napi Mordecai in thudon nuam tuan ngawl hi. Ama in, “Keima in Jew mi hi a, Haman mai ah ka kun thei buatu hi,” ci in thiang son hi. Tua ahiciang amate in Mordecai ii ngamtatna a thuak zo ka tawm ci in ngaisun kawm ma in Haman tungah hi thu son uh hi." 
Esther3:5 Mordecai ii khupdin in a kun ngawlna thu Haman in a heak ciang a thinso hi," 
Esther3:6 tuaciang, Mordecai sia Jew mi a hina thu ama in a heak ciang Mordecai khat bek daan piak ngawl tu in, khensat hi. Ama in Persia kumpi ukna ngam bup ah a teang Jew mi theampo mot siat tu in ngeal hi." 
Esther3:7 Xerxes kumpipa ii kumpi a sep a kum sawm le kum nii kum, tha masa, Nisan tha in, a sawmna bang a vawt natu in bang ni bang tha phabel ziam he nuam ahikom (“purim” a kici) lai mee vawt tu in Haman in thupia hi. Adar tha, tha sawm le tha niina, ni sawm le ni thum ni in vawt tu khensat hi." 
Esther3:8 Tua ahiciang Haman in kumpipa tungah, “Na kumpi ukna ngamsung theampo ah a kithethaang le ngamke theampo ah a kimu minam khat om hi. Amate ii zui a ngeinate sia midangte a taw kibang ngawl hi. Tua banah na kumpi ukna ngamsung upadi te zui nuam ngawl ahikom tuate na koithong tu sia nang atu in pha ngawl hi." 
Esther3:9 Kumpipa awng, na lung a kim le, amate a kithalup natu in thutan in. Tuabangin thu na tan le kumpi ukna ngam vaihawmna sungah zak tu in kumpi sum le vanh manpha sungah keima ngunntang kilogramme 340,000 vaal kong piak tu in kong kamciam hi,” ci in son hi." 
Esther3:10 Kumpipa in tua thuthansakna sia zum thu a sua thei natu laitupna in a kizangh a khutzungbu suut a, Jew mite ngal Agag suan Hammedatha tapa Haman tungah pia hi." 
Esther3:11 Kumpipa in ama tungah, “Tua mite le a dangkate nangma aa hi; na uk bang po vawt in,” ci hi." 
Esther3:12 Tua ahiciang tha masabel ni sawm le ni thum ni in, Haman in kumpipa ii thuzeakte sam a, kumpi ukna sungah a om kampau nam theampo le amate ii zak lai taw pheen in at tu in thuthansakna khat sonin atsak hi. Tua lai sia ngamukte, ngamukmangte le uliante theampo tungah puak tu ahi hi. Tua lai sia Xerxes kumpipa min taw a kisuaksak hi a, a khutzungbu kituum hi." 
Esther3:13 Laitaite in hi thuthansakna sia kumpi ukna ngamsung a om ngamke theampo ah puak uh hi. Tuasia sungah Adar tha, ni sawm le ni thum ni, ni khat sungin Jew te theampo — a moi le a haam, numeite le patangte — a kimot natu thupiakna teng om hi. Amate kihesuak ngawlin kithat tu a, a neisa teng kilaaksak tu hi." 
Esther3:14 Tua ni hong thet ciang a kuama po a kingin thei natu in tua thuthansakna teng ngamke theampo ah ngammite heak tu in kizasak tu hi. 
Esther3:15 Kumpipa ii thupiakna taw Susa khuapi ah tua thutanna a heak kim natu in kizasak a, laitaite in tua thuthak sia ngamkete ah puak uh hi. Susa khuapi sungah a buaisak laitakin kumpipa le Haman tokhawm in zu ne uh hi." 
Esther4:1 Mordecai in hi thu vawtna teng a heak ciang a thinna sa in a puan balkeak hi. Tua zawkciang khau-ip puan silhin a lu tungah vut poai a, nasia tak kapin tau in," 
Esther4:2 khuapi kaantan a, kumpi inn kongbiang a thet dong pai hi. A sungah ama tum ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile khau-ip puan silhte a sungah kuama kitumsak ngawl hi." 
Esther4:3 Kumpipa thuthansakna a kiheaksakna ngamke theampo ah Jew te nasia tak khuangai in om hi. Amate an tang a, kapin tau in, a tamzaw khau-ip puan silhin vut sungah lum uh hi." 
Esther4:4 Esther naseam numeite le numei uk cil kingette in Mordecai ngamtatna teng ama tungah a son uh ciang nasia takin Esther thinngim hi. Esther in Mordecai sia khau-ip puan a silh taangin a silh tu puan pawlkhat piasak ahihang ama in saang nuam ngawl hi. 
Esther4:5 Tuasia ciang Esther in kumpipa ii ama naseam tu a koi numei uk cil kingetpa Hathach samin, Mordecai kungah paisak a, thupiang teng a pian theina thu kan in sawl hi." 
Esther4:6 Hathach sia Mordecai omna ahi kumpi inn tumna khuapi leitual ah pai hi. 
Esther4:7 Mordecai in thupiang theampo son siat a, Jew te theampo a kimon le, kumpi sum le vanh manpha tungah dangka a piak tu za Haman in kamciam a piakna dongin son siat hi." 
Esther4:8 Jew te a suksiat natu thu Susa khuapi pan a laihawm dal khat sia ama in Hathach pia hi. Mordecai in Esther tungah tua lai a piak natu, thupiang teng a son siat natu le kumpipa kungah Esther pai in ama mipuite atu hesuak a nget natu in vaitha hi." 
Esther4:9 Mordecai vaithak bangin Hathach in seam a," 
Esther4:10 tuaciang Esther in Mordecai tungah hi thu teng ama ma in puaksak kik hi; 
Esther4:11 “Mihing khat pawpo, pa ahizong numei ahizong sapna nga ngawlin kumpipa taw kimu nuam in suum sungnung ah a tum le ama a thi kul hi. Tua in upadi hi a; kumpipa thudokte a kipan ngamsung mi theampo ii heak ahi hi. Hi upadi pial thei natu lampi khat bek om hi: kumpipa in mihing khat tungah a khamh ciangkhut a lapto le, tuasia ciang ama nuntakna kikhoaikhe hi. Keima zongh kumpipa ii hong sap ngawl zawk tha khat pha zo hi,” ci in sonsak hi." 
Esther4:12 Esther ii kam vaithak teng Mordecai in a nga ciang," 
Esther4:13 ama in hi bangin a kidop natu thupuak hi: “Kumpi inn sungah na om hu in Jew dangte sangin ngammuang zaw tu in kingaisun heak in. 
Esther4:14 Hi bang hun sungah thimthu in na om le, vantung pan Jew te atu huna hong pai in, Jew te kihun tu a, ahizong nangma na thi tu a, na pa ii bangkua mong tu hi. Ahitazong, akua in he tu ziam? — nangma kumpinu hong kisuasak zongh hi bang hun atu in a suak na hina meal kihe ngawl hi,” ci hi." 
Esther4:15 Esther in Mordecai tungah hi bang zo kik hi: 
Esther4:16 “Pai in a, Susa khuapi sungah a om Jew mi theampo khawm in; antang in kei atu thu hong ngetsak tavun. Sun thum le zan thum sung an ahizong tui ahizong bangma ne heak vun. Ka khangmoi numeite le keima zongh tuabang ma in ka na vawt tu uh hi. Tua zawkciang, upadi bang ahibuatazong kumpipa kungah ka pai tu hi. Tuabang ka pai hu in ka thi a kul le zong a thi ka hi tu hi” ci hi." 
Esther4:17 Tuasia ciang Mordecai in tua mun nusia in, Esther ii vawt tu a sawl theampo vawt hi." 
Esther5:1 A antan ni thum ni ciang Esther in a kumpinu puantual silh a, kumpi inn suum sungnung ah pai in, kumpi tokhum omna inndoi sang maingat in ding hi. Kumpipa sia a sungsang tokhum tungah to in kongbiang maingat hi." 
Esther5:2 Kumpipa in Esther kumpinu doipua sangah ding a mu ciang maipha pia in ama sangah a khamh ciangkhut laamto hi. Tuasia ciang Esther hong paito in, tua ciangkhut dawn len hi." 
Esther5:3 Kumpipa in dongh a, “Esther kumpinu awng, bang ziam? Na dei sia hong son tan — ka ukna ngam a lang keak ahizong nga tu ni hi,” ci hi." 
Esther5:4 Esther in, “Kumpipa awng na lung a kim nale, noma atu in ka vawt anneakpoai ah ka leangna in nangma le Haman tu nitak hong haw le uhte uuk khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Esther5:5 Tuasia ciang Esther ii leangna tu in kumpipa in Haman manlang tak a pai natu in samsak hi. Tuabangin kumpipa le Haman sia Esther ii anneakpoai ah pai uh hi. 
Esther5:6 Sapittui a neak kawmin kumpipa in Esther tungah, “Na dei sia hong son ta'n, kong pia tu hi. Ka ngam phellang keak ahizong nong ngen le kong pia tu hi,” ci hi." 
Esther5:7 Esther in," 
Esther5:8 “Kumpipa awng, na dik a kong nget sia nong pia zo tu ahile, zing nitak ciangin noma kong ngintaakna anneakpoai dang khat ah nangma le Haman ka leangna tu in kong dei hi. Tua hun ciang ka dei sia kong son tu hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Esther5:9 Tua anneakpoai pan Haman lungdam thinnuam in cia hi. Ahizong ama in kumpi inn kongbiang ah Mordecai mu a, ama mai a kaan ciang Mordecai in din ngawl, bangma zatakna lak ngawl ahikom Haman sia ama tungah thin uuk mama hi." 
Esther5:10 Ahizong ama in vei kenkon in a inn ah cia hi. Tuaciang a inn ah a lawmte sam a, a zi Zeresh zongh kihelsak hi." 
Esther5:11 Ama in a hauna teng, a tapa nei teng, kumpipa ii a za a laptona thu, le kumpi ulian dangte sangin a thupi zawkna thu teng amate tungah kisuangtaak hi." 
Esther5:12 Haman in, “Hi teng bek hi ngawl lai hi. Esther kumpinu in kuama dang anvaak ngeingawl a, ahizong kumpipa le keima an hong vaak a, zing ciang zong hong sam kik hi." 
Esther5:13 Ahizong kumpi inn kongbiang ah a to Jew mi Mordecai ka mu lai teng hi thute theampo kei atu in khiakna nei ngawl hi,” ci lai hi." 
Esther5:14 Tua ahiciang a zi le a lawmte theampo in, “Banghangin mihing a ki awklupsak natu in metre kul le nii a saang khuam khat vawt ngawl tu ni ziam? Zingsang ciang tuasia tungah Mordecai awklup natu in kumpipa tungah na ngen tu a, tua zawkciang lungdam takin an neakna poai ah na pai thei tu hi,” ci in ngaisutna pia uh hi. Haman in hi ngaisutna phasa ahikom a awklupsak natu in khuam phut hi." 
Esther6:1 Tua zan ma in kumpipa mu thei ngawl ahikom a kumpi ukna ngamsung thu tepteena zum laite lasakin ama tungah simsak hi. 
Esther6:2 Tua lai sungah kumpipa a kisuam nopna — a inndoite a cing cil kinget kumpi inn sung numei uk niite ahi Bigthana le Teresh in kumpipa a thalup nopna a phawk Mordecai ii pualaakna thu kihel hi. 
Esther6:3 Kumpipa in, “Hi thu hangin Mordecai tungah patoaina le tel piakna bangbang om kana ziam?” ci in dongh hi. A naseamte in, “Ama atu bangma kivawtsak ngawl hi,” ci in zo uh hi." 
Esther6:4 Kumpipa in, “Kumpi inn sungah ka uliante akua om ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Tu in Haman sia zum suumsung hong tum zawk bek hi; ama in Mordecai awklup natu khuam taw kinging zo a, a awklupsak thei natu in kumpipa tungah a ngen tu hong pai zo hi." 
Esther6:5 Tua ahiciang a naseamte in, “Hi lai ah Haman om a, nangma taw kimu tu in hong ngak hi,” ci in zo uh hi. Kumpipa in, “Sungtangsak vun,” ci hi." 
Esther6:6 Tuabangin Haman tum a, kumpipa in ama tungah, “Ka patoai nop mama mi khat om hi. Tua pa atu bang vawt tu khi ziam?” ci hi. Haman in, “Tu in kumpipa in hi zata a, a patoai nop sia akua hi thei tu ziam? Keima hi nak vak ing!” ci in ngaisun hi." 
Esther6:7 Tua ahikom ama in kumpipa tungah, “Tua pa atu kumpi puan — nangma mama ii na silh puantual sia tuasia pa atu in lasak in. Kumpi kizepna teng na siphu tungah koisak in." 
Esther6:8  
Esther6:9 Tua zawkciang na kumpi ulian sung pan ulianbel khat in tua pa hi puantualte silhsak in a, siphu tungah tosakin khuapi khawlmun kaantan in paisak in. Amate a pai kawmin tua pa in: ‘Kumpipa in a patoai nop pa bangbangin tel pia ci sia, en vun!’ ci in taangko tahen” ci in zo hi." 
Esther6:10 Tuasia ciang kumpipa in Haman tungah, “Manlangin pai in a, kumpi puantual le ka siphu la in, tua patoai natu teng Jew mi Mordecai atu vawt ta'n. Tu a ngaisutna nong piak bangin ama tungah vawt siat in. Ama kumpi inn kongbiang ah a to na mu tu hi,” ci hi." 
Esther6:11 Tua ahiciang Haman in puantualte le siphu la in, puantualte Mordecai in silhsak hi. Mordecai siphu tung to in khuapi khawlmun kaantan a, a paipui kawmin mipite tungah Haman in: “Kumpipa in a patoai nop pa bangbangin tel pia ci sia en vun!” ci in taangko hi." 
Esther6:12 Tua zawkciang Mordecai kumpi inn kongbiang ah heak kik a, Haman ahile maizumin a mai sealsa in inn ah manlang tak cia hi." 
Esther6:13 Ama tungah thupiang teng a zi le a lawmte theampo tungah son siat hi. Tuasia ciang a zi le a lawm mipilte in, “Na vaang teng Mordecai tungah a theng tu hi zo hi. Ama Jew mi hi a, zo thei ngawl tu ni hi. Ama in nang hong zo nanak tu hi,” ci uh hi." 
Esther6:14 Amate hi thu teng a son laitak Esther ii vawt anneakpoai ah Haman paipui tu in kumpi inn pan numei uk cil kingette manlang tak hong theng uh hi. 
Esther7:1 Tua ahiciang Esther taw an nekhawm tu in kumpipa le Haman sia," 
Esther7:2 a nii veina pai uh hi. Sapittui a neak kawmin kumpipa in Esther thu dongh kik a, “Tu in Esther kumpinu awng, bang dei ni ziam? Hong son po ta'n, kong pia tu hi. Kumpi ukna ngam phellang keak ahizong hong pia tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
Esther7:3 Esther kumpinu in, “Kumpipa na lung a kim a, kiniamkhiakna taw kong ngetna nong pia zo tu le, keima le ka mite hong nungtasak thei lete uuk khi hi." 
Esther7:4 Ka mite le keima, thalup tu in hong kizuak zo hi. Saltaang tu in hong kizuak hi zaw le, pau ngawlin ka om lel tu a, kong nawngkaisak buatu hi, ahizong kote hong kithatlum — hong kimon tu hi zo hi!” ci in zo hi." 
Esther7:5 Tuasia ciang Xerxes kumpipa in Esther kumpinu awng, “Tua bangte akua in vawt ngam tu ziam? Hisia pa koisungah om ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Esther7:6 Esther in, “Kote ii ngal le kote hong vawtsia pa sia, hi mihing tatsia Haman hi!” ci in zo hi. Haman sia kumpipa le kumpinu maitang salh a lau citakin lau hi." 
Esther7:7 Kumpipa a thinso sa in dingto a, inndoi sung pan pusuakin doi puasang kumpi huan sungah pai hi. Kumpipa in hi thu hangin daan a piak hunlam Haman in mu thei ahikom Esther kumpinu tungah a nuntak natu hesuak ngen nuam in nungsang ah taanglai hi." 
Esther7:8 Haman in hesuak ngen tu in Esther tona ah a to suk bek laitakin huan sung pan kumpipa inndoi sungah hong sungtang kik hi. Hi bang a mu ciang kumpipa au in, “Hisia pa in ka kumpi inn sung hi lai, keima mai tatak ah kumpinu buanin khialpui nuam ziam?” ci hi. Kumpipa ii a kampau a man ma in numei uk cil kingette in Haman lutang puan khu uh hi."
