Esther7:9 Tua zawkciang Harbonah a kici te sung pan khat in, “Kumpipa nangma nuntakna a hu Mordecai a awklupsak thei natu in, a khuam ngawngawn Haman in a inn ah phut zo hi, tuasia metre kul le nii saang hi,” ci hi. Kumpipa in, “Tuasia tungah Haman awklumsak tavun,” ci in thupia hi." 
Esther7:10 Tuabangin Mordecai atu ama ii phusa khuam sia tungah Haman ki awklumsak hi. Tua zawkciang kumpipa thin uukna thai hi. 
Esther8:1 Tua ni ma in Xerxes kumpipa in Esther kumpinu tungah Jew te ngalpa Haman neisa theampo pia hi. Esther in Mordecai taw mealheak khat a hina thu kumpipa tungah son a, tua hun a kipan Mordecai sia kumpipa omna ah kitumsak thei hi." 
Esther8:2 Kumpipa in a min tupna a om a khutzungbu suutin, (Haman tung pan a laak kik sia ahi hi.) Mordecai pia hi. Esther in Haman neisa teng a keam tu in Mordecai koi hi." 
Esther8:3 Tua zawkciang Esther in kumpipa paupui kik a, a peang ah kisepsuk in kap hi. Ama in kumpipa tungah Agag suan Haman ii Jew te tungah thusia vawt in a thasawm nopna thu a tawlngaksak natu in ngen hi." 
Esther8:4 Kumpipa in a khamh ciangkhut Esther sangah laamto ahikom ama dingto in," 
Esther8:5 “Kumpipa awng, na lung a kim na le kei nong khualna in, hi thu maan tuak na sa le, nong hesuakna in Haman thupiak nate bangin a kisep suak ngawl natu — Agag suan Hammedatha tapa ii na kumpi ngamsung tengah Jew te theampo suksiat natu in tua thupiaknate khaktan natu thu thansakna hong suaksak ta'n." 
Esther8:6 Ka mite tungah hi tuasiatna tungin, ka mealheakte kithat le, bangbangin thuak zo thong tu khi ziam?” ci hi." 
Esther8:7 Tuasia ciang Xerxes kumpipa in Esther kumpinu le Jew mi Mordecai tungah, “En vun, keima in Jew te a thasawm hu in Haman ka awklumsak zo a, a neisa teng Esther tungah ka pia zo hi." 
Esther8:8 Ahizong kumpipa min taw kumpi tazeik kituum in a suaksa thu thansakna sia kidawk kik thei ngawl tu hi. Ahizong Jew te tungah na dei bang po in lai at thei tu nu hi; tuaciang ka min taw lai at vun a, tua lai tungah kumpipa tazeik tuum thei tu nu hi,” ci hi." 
Esther8:9 Sivan tha, a tha thumna, ni 23 ni in hi thu piang hi. Mordecai in kumpipa ii thuzeakte samin India pan Ethiopia dong ngamke 127 teng ah Jew te, ngamukmangte, zum vaihawmte le uliante tungah a laithak tu teng khaw hi. Tua laithakte sia ngamke sim ah a zak kampau tek le a lai tek taw ki at a, Jew te tungah amate kam le a lai taw in ki at hi." 
Esther8:10 Mordecai in tua laithakte Xerxes kumpipa min taw atsak a, ama in tua laite kumpi tazeik tuum hi. Tua laite kumpi siphu buk pan siphu tai ngaangte tung a tote in hawmsak hi." 
Esther8:11 Tua laithakte sungah kumpipa in khuapi theampo ah Jew te kipawl in amate le amate a kihuuk thei natu thu a omsakna thiang son hi. Ngamke khat pawpo ah ngam minam khat pawpo in ngalhiamte taw Jew pasalte, a patangte, a numeite a sim le Jew te in a simte do kik thei a; tuate khat zongh khoaikhe ngawlin thatlum thei tu a, a neisa teng laaksak thei tu hi." 
Esther8:12 Hi thutanna sia Persia ngamsung theampo ah Jew te a kithalup tu ni, tha sawm le tha niina, Adar tha ni sawm le ni thum ni pan kisimin, taangtunsak natu ahi hi." 
Esther8:13 Hi thu sia upadi in kithangsak tu a, tua ni a thet ciang Jew te in a ngalte tungah phulam tu in a kingin khol thei natu in ngamke theampo ah mi theampo ii heak tu in kizasak tu hi." 
Esther8:14 Kumpipa thupiak bangin kumpi siphu tungto laitaite a manlang thei tawpin kipaisak hi. Tua thutanna sia Susa khuapi sung zongh ah kithangsak hi. 
Esther8:15 Mordecai sia vancii le a kaang ngelh kumpi puantual le a sa pha puanneal sandup te silh in, a etlawm mama khamh lukhu khu in kumpi inn pan pusuak hi. Tuasia ciang Susa khuapi lamdung teng ah patoaina aw te le lungdam in aunate hong nging hi." 
Esther8:16 Jew te atu in thinnopna le suatakna, lungdamna le ngualzawna hong om hi." 
Esther8:17 Kumpipa ii thu thansakna lai a kisimna mun theampo, khuapi sim le ngamke sim ah Jew te in lungdam anneakpoai vawtin, lungdam poaikham ni nei kawkoai uh hi. A tatakin ci leang tu in midang tam mama in Jew te a kiitak hu in, Jew te suak uh hi." 
Esther9:1 Adar tha ni sawm le ni thum ni theng a, tua ni sia kumpi thu thansakna, a kisim tu ni, Jew te tung a ngalte ii ngalzo tu in a kilamet ni ahi hi. Ahizong Jew te in amate zo pumsai uh hi." 
Esther9:2 Kumpi ukna ngamsung khuapi sim, Jew te omna khawk teng ah Jew te a ngal vawt nuam khat pawpo a sim kik tu in amate sia a kipawl sa in om hi. Koima po ah a om mite in Jew te kiita in, khat zongh in langpan ngam ngawl hi." 
Esther9:3 A tatakin ci leang ngamke kumpi ulian theampo — ngamukmangte, zum vaihawmte le kumpi palaite — in Jew te panpui zaw uh hi, banghang ziam cile amate theampo in Mordecai kiita uh hi." 
Esther9:4 Mordecai sia tu in kumpi inn sungah a vaang nei pa hi ci in, kumpi ukna ngam theampo ah a minthang a, tuaciang a vaangletna khang vaial hi." 
Esther9:5 Tua ahikom Jew te in a ngalte tungah a uuk bang po in vawt thei uh hi. Amate in a ngalte namsau taw simin thatlum uh hi. 
Esther9:6 Susa khuapi sung mama ah Jew te in pasal 500 thatlum uh hi. 
Esther9:7 Tuate sungah Jew te ii a ngalpa, Hammedatha tapa Haman ii tapate sawm — Parshandatha, Dalphon, Aspatha, Poratha, Adalia, Aridatha, Parmashta, Arisai, Aridai le Vaizatha te kihel uh hi. Ahizong a neisa bangma kilaaksak ngawl hi." 
Esther9:8  
Esther9:9  
Esther9:10  
Esther9:11 Tua ni ma in Susa khuapi sungah mihing a kithat za kumpipa tungah thu kizasak hi. 
Esther9:12 Tuaciang kumpipa in Esther kumpinu tungah, “Susa bebek ah Jew te in pasal za nga thatlum zo a, Haman tapate sawm kihel hi. Ngamke te sungah bang teng suaksak zo tu ziam! Tu in bang dei ni ziam? Na nga tu hi. Bang dang dei lai ni ziam hong son ta'n, na nga tu hi,” ci hi." 
Esther9:13 Esther in, “Kumpipa awng, na lung a kim le Jew te ii tu ni Susa ah a kingamtatsak thei bangma in zing ciangin ngamta kik tahen. Tuaciang Haman tapate sawm ii luanghawmte sia ngui awkna khuam tungah khaisak in,” ci in zo hi." 
Esther9:14 Kumpipa in Esther kumpinu ci bangin sep tu thupia a, Susa khuapi sungah thangsak hi. Haman tapate sawm ii luanghawm sia ngual muna ah kikhai hi." 
Esther9:15 Adar tha, ni sawm le ni li ni in Susa a om Jew te kikaikhawm kikin, khuapi sungah pasal 300 that thua uh hi. Ahizong a neisa bangma laaksak tuan ngawl uh hi." 
Esther9:16 Ngamke tuatuam sungah a om Jew te zongh kipawl in amate le amate kihuu uh hi. Amate a ngaimaw, a ngalte75,000 a thalup na taw amate le amate kihuu uh hi. Ahizong a neisa bangma laaksak ngawl uh hi." 
Esther9:17 Tua ni sia Adar tha, ni sawm le ni thum ni hi. A zing ciang, ni sawm le ni li ni sia, kithalupna om nawn ngawl a, lungnop anneakpoai vawt ni in zangh uh hi." 
Esther9:18 Ahizong Susa a om Jew te in sawm le thum ni le sawm le li ni in a ngalte that a, tuaciang sawm le nga ni in tawlnga ahikom ni sawm le ni nga ni sia tawlngak ni suaksak hi." 
Esther9:19 Hi thu hangin khuanote sungah a teang Jew te in Adar tha, ni sawm le li ni sia lungdam tawlngak ni, anneakpoai vawt hun le khat le khat an letsong a kipiak hun in zangh uh hi." 
Esther9:20 Mordecai in hi thupiangte lai taw at in, Persia te ii kumpi ukna ngamsung theampo, a nai le a khuala a om Jew te tungah laithak kawkoai hi," 
Esther9:21 kum simin Adar tha, sawm le li ni le sawm le nga nite sia tawlngak ni in a zak natu in son hi." 
Esther9:22 Tua nite sia Jew te ii a ngalte a bosak ni hi a; tua tha sia heena le thinkiamna hun pan thinnopna le lungdamna hunin a kilaih tha ahi hi. Hi ni niite ngualnopna le anneakpoai in zangh tu a, khat le khat tung le a zawngte tungah an letsong kipiakna ni in a zak natu in amate kison hi." 
Esther9:23 Tuabangin Mordecai ii a zaaksak thute Jew te in zui in, tua poai sia kum simin a kivawt ngeina poai suak hi." 
Esther9:24 Agag suan Jew mite ii a ngal pa — Hammedatha ii tapa Haman in Jew te mot natu a ni ciangtan tu in, (“purim” a kici) lai meetang lawnin khensat hi; Haman in Jew te mot siat tu ngeal hi." 
Esther9:25 Ahizong kumpipa kungah Esther pai a, kumpipa in thupiakna lai suaksak in, Jew te thuak tu a ngealna sia Haman tungah tu kik zaw hi. Ama le a tapate sia ngui awkna khuam tungah ki awklumsak hi." 
Esther9:26 Tua hangin tawlngak nite sia Purim kici hi. Mordecai ii laithakna hang le amate tungah thupiang teng hangin," 
Esther9:27 Jew te in amate mama atu, a suan a paalte atu, Jew a suak thei tu khat pawpo atu in hi ni niite kum simin Mordecai thupiak bangin a hun maan in a kitan natu ngeina khat in vawt uh hi." 
Esther9:28 Jew te innkuan simin, khang khat zawk khang khat, ngamke le khuapi theampo ah hi Purim ni te phawk a, a tan tawntung tu in khensat hi." 
Esther9:29 Tua zawkciang Abihail tanu, Esther kumpinu zongh in Mordecai taw laithak khat zongh at khawm a, Mordecai ii a at sa Purim thu teng nung pan ama thuneina bup omsak hi." 
Esther9:30 Tua Esther laithak sia Jew te theampo tungah thak a, Persia te ii kumpi ukna ngamsung ngamke 127 ah kihawm hi. Tuasia in Jew te ii kilem natu le ngammuan natu deisak a," 
Esther9:31 amate ii an tanna le khuangai hunte atu in ngeina a neisa bangin, Purim poai nite sia amate le a suan a paalte in a hun maan in a tan natu lamlak hi. Hi thu sia Mordecai le Esther kumpinu ii a piakkhop thupiakna ahi hi." 
Esther9:32 Purim poai taw kisai zui tu ngeinate a kipsak Esther ii thupiakna sia laizial khat sungah ki at hi. 
Esther10:1 Xerxes kumpipa in a ukna ngamsung tuipi hui ngamkhente ah a teangte le a ngamsung sangah a teang mite sia zawthawk thu taw sawlin na seamsak hi. 
Esther10:2 Ama ii a thupi mama le a lamdang mama a nasepnate theampo le Mordecai sia dinmun saang ah a za a khattona thu teng, Persia le Media kumpite ii zum thu tepteena sungah kikhum siat hi." 
Esther10:3 Jew mi Mordecai sia Xerxes kumpipa mama ii a dom kik ulianbel ahi hi. Ama sia Jew a mipuite in zakta a, diksa mama uh hi. Ama in a mipuite phat natu le a suan a paalte theampo ii ngammuan natu in naseam hi." 
Job1:1 Uz ngam ah a teang Job kici mi khat om a, ama in Pathian bia in, ama ii tungah thumaan hi. Ama mihing pha khat hi a, siatna peuma a vawt ngawl natu in kidawm hi." 
Job1:2 Ama in tapa sali le tanu thum nei a," 
Job1:3 tuaciang tuu 7,000 kalaoh 3,000 khui 1,000 le laa 500 nei hi. Ama in naseam tam mama zongh nei a, Nisuana ngam sungah a haubel pa hi." 
Job1:4 Job ii tapate in a ban a banin anneakpoai vawt nithi hi, tua poai ah a dangte theampo pai in a suapuinumeite thum zongh a kihel tu in sam tawntung uh hi." 
Job1:5 A anneakpoai khuavak ni zing simin Job sia zingtuung in tho a, a tate khat sim a thiansua natu in sangaw biakpiakna vawt hi. Ama in hi bangin vawt tawntung hi, banghang ziam cile a tapate khat po in, a tupkhol ngawl bul Pathian a simmawkna taw in khialna nei tha thei tu hi ci in, a ngaisut hang hi." 
Job1:6 Topa mai ah vantung mite a kilak tu ni a tun ciang tuate sungah Satan kihel hi. 
Job1:7 Topa in Satan tungah, “Bang teng vawt ni ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Satan in, “Mun khat pan mun khat ah pai in simleitung kiimveal in ka vak kawkoai hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Job1:8 Topa in, “Ka naseampa Job na phawk tha ziam? Leitung ah ama bangin a thumaan le a pha kuama om ngawl hi. Ama in kei hong bia a, a sia a vawt ngawl natu kidawm hi,” ci hi." 
Job1:9 Satan in, “Hong biak hu in bangma nga buale Job in nang hong bia na tu ziam?" 
Job1:10 Ama le a innkuan le a neisa theampo nangma in na huuksak tawntung hi. A sep a vawt theampo thupha na pia a, ngam bup dim tu za dongin ngannote na pia hi." 
Job1:11 Ahihang tu in a neisa theampo nangma in laaksak ci tawng — na maitang pan hong haamsiat tu hi!” ci in zo kik hi. 
Job1:12 Topa in Satan tungah, “Pha hi, a neisa theampo nangma khut sungah om hi, ahihang Job pumpi tatak susia ngawl het tu ni hi,” ci hi. Tua ahiciang Satan in paisan hi." 
Job1:13 Ni khat ni Job ii tate a upabel pa ii inn ah anneakpoai a vawt laitakin," 
Job1:14 Job kungah kamtai khat hong tai hi. Ama in, “Kote lo sungah khuikaap taw naseam in om a, laate lo hui nganthana ah taa uh hi." 
Job1:15 Thakhat thu in Sabean te in hong sim a, tua nganno teng ngu siat hi. Amate in keima simngawl na naseam teng thatlum uh hi. Nang tungah thu ko tu in keima bekma suakta khi hi,” ci hi." 
Job1:16 A thu son man tak ngawl lai in naseam dang khat hong theng a, ama in, “Khualeng in na tuute le a cingte hal lum siat hi. Nang tungah thu ko tu in keima bekma suakta khi hi,” ci hi." 
Job1:17 A thu son man tak ngawl lai in naseam dang khat hong theng a, ama in, “Chaldean ngalnguk seamte pawl thum in hong sim a, kalaoh theampo ciapui in na naseamte keima simngawl thatlum siat hi. Nang tungah thu ko tu in kei bekma suakta khi hi,” ci hi." 
Job1:18 A thu son man tak ngawl lai in naseam dang khat hong theng a, ama in, “Na tate na tapa ulianbel sia ii inn ah anneakpoai vawt in a om laitak," 
Job1:19 sennealngam sang pan vuipi suangval hong va hi. Tuasia in a inn seamvawk a, amate theampo thisak siat hi. Na tungah thu ko tu in keima bekma suakta khi hi,” ci hi." 
Job1:20 Tuasia ciang Job dingto a, khuangai in a puansilh teng baltham hi. A sam meet a, lei ah bokcip hi." 
Job1:21 Ama in, “Ka pian lai in ka nguaktang in ka suak a, ka nguaktang in ka thi tu hi. Topa in hong pia a, tu in Topa in la kik hi. Ama min kipok tahen!” ci hi." 
Job1:22 Ama tungah hi bangin thu piang napi Job in Pathian mawsiat ngawlin mawna vawt ngawl hi. 
Job2:1 Topa mai ah vantung mite a kilak kik tu ni a thet ciang tuate sungah Satan om hi. 
Job2:2 Topa in Satan tungah, “Koisung teng theng zo ni ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Satan in, “Mun khat pan mun khat ah pai in simleitung ah ka vak kawkoai hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Job2:3 Topa in, “Ka naseampa Job na phawk tha ziam? Leitung ah ama bangin a thumaan le a pha kuama om ngawl hi. Ama in kei hong bia a, a sia a vawt ngawl natu kidawm hi. Bangma thu om ngawl bulin ama na suksiat natu in kei nong kun a, ahihang Job sia a ngei bangma in thumaan lai hi,” ci hi." 
Job2:4 Satan in, “Mihing khat pawpo in a nuntak natu in a nei theampo pia khia tu hi." 
Job2:5 Ahihang tu in sonteena in nangma in a pumpi nasak lete — ama in na maitang panin hong haamsiat tu hi!” ci in zo kik hi. 
Job2:6 Tuasia ciang Topa in Satan tungah, “Pha hi, ama na khut sungah om hi, ahihang ama thatlum ngawl tu ni hi,” ci hi." 
Job2:7 Tuasia ciang Topa omna pan Satan pusuak in, ama in, Job ii pumpi tung theampo ah meima puite piangsak hi." 
Job2:8 Job in nin kholna hui ah to in a meimate a khuat natu in tungbeal tamhbek khat la hi. 
Job2:9 A zi in ama tungah, “Na thumaan ngei ma in thumaan lalai na hi ziam? Banghangin Pathian haamsiat in thi heu ngawl ni ziam?” ci hi." 
Job2:10 Job in, “A lui thawthongin pau ni hi! Pathian in napha khat po hong puak ciang lawp takin ih saang hi. Ngimna hong puak ciang banghangin phun thei tu hi ziam?” ci in zo hi. Hite theampo a thuak kawm sung panin, Job in Pathian tungah kam ngaldo bangma pau ngawl hi." 
Job2:11 Job ii lawmte thum sia Teman khuapi panin Eliphaz, Shuah ngam panin Bildad, le Naamah ngam panin Zophar te ahi hi. Job ii hi bang zata a ngim thuakna thu a zaak uh ciang amate in Job kungah pai in heeneam tu in khensat uh hi." 
Job2:12 Amate in a khuala pan Job ngalmu a, ahihang tel ngawl uh hi. A tel tak uh ciang amate nasia tak kapin, khuangai in a puansilhte baltham a, leivui lawnto in a lu tungah the uh hi." 
Job2:13 Tua zawkciang amate in Job taw kam khat zongh pau ngawlin sun sali le zan sali lei ah topui uh hi, banghang ziam cile ama in bang zata in thuak ci sia amate in mu uh hi." 
Job3:1 A khakbel ciang Job pau in, ama pian ni haamsiat hi." 
Job3:2 Pathian awng, ka sua ni haamsiat in; ka nu ngil sungah ka om phit ni zan haamsiat in!" 
Job3:3  
Job3:4 Tua ni sia khuazing suaksak in, Pathian awng. Tua ni phawk kik ngei nawn heak in; tua ni in khuavak taang kiksak nawn heak in." 
Job3:5 Tua ni sia a thim le a zingcip ni hisak in; meeikaai taw tuamcip in a, ni phiatkeak in." 
Job3:6 Tua zan sia kum simna sung pan phiatkeak in a, kisim kiksak nawn heak in;" 
Job3:7 tua zan sia a ngamkhing, lungdamna a om ngawl zan hisak in." 
Job3:8 Leviathan nganhing pui a uk thei bum le ai toaite in, tua ni sia haamsiatsak in!" 
Job3:9 Nikonghong aksi taangsak heak in; Tua zan sia khuavak tu lametna omsak heak in. 
Job3:10 Ngimna le heena sungah kei hong omsak in, kei hong piansak hu in tua zan haamsiat in." 
Job3:11 Ka nu sulh sungah thi ka na leng tua ahi buale ka sua po ciang thi ka na leng uuk ing. 
Job3:12 Banghangin ka nu in a khup tungah hong toai ziam? Banghangin a noaitui taw hong vaak ziam? 
Job3:13 Tualai in thi hi leng, tu in ka tawlnga tu a," 
Job3:14 taanghlai kumpi innte a sa kik kumpite le ngamukte bangin ka mu tu hi. 
Job3:15 Khamh le ngunn taw a inn uh a dim kumpi tate bangin ka mu zo tu a," 
Job3:16 ahibuale a thisa in a suak nausen bangin mu zo tu khi hi. 
Job3:17 Thaankuul sungah mi ngilote in a tatsiatna uh kheal a, a toi naseamte in a khakbel ciang tawlnga tu uh hi." 
Job3:18 Thongtaakte ngawngawn thinnuamin om hun nga a, ausatna le thu piakna kamhamte taw kipeal hi." 
Job3:19 Tua munah a minthang le a kihe ngawl mi theampo om a, salte a khakbel in suakta hi." 
Job3:20 Banghangin mihingte thinngimna nei in nungtasak tan ni ziam? Banghangin a khuangaite khuavak pia ni ziam? 
Job3:21 Amate in a thi tu ngak ahihang tuasia theng ngeingawl hi; amate in sumngum khat po sangin thaankuul deizaw uh hi. 
Job3:22 Thi in a kiphum mateng amate lungdam ngawl hi. 
Job3:23 Pathian in amate mailam seal a, tuaciang a kiimkot panin nengcip hi." 
Job3:24 Anneak tu taangin ka kap a, tauna pan ka tawp thei ngei bua hi." 
Job3:25 Ka kiitak theampo le ka launa teng hong tung takpi hi. 
Job3:26 Keima in thinnop le tawlngak hun nei ngawlin, ka ngimnate a bo ngei nawn bua hi." 
Job4:1 Job awng, kei pau leng na thin a nawngkai tu ziam? Huthe ngawlin om thei nawn ngawl khi hi." 
Job4:2  
Job4:3 Mi tam na hil zo a, tha zawngkhalte tha na pia zo hi." 
Job4:4 Khat po lutu in, toi in, tha zawmin a om ciang, na kammalte in hanthawn a, ama dingtangsak hi." 
Job4:5 Tu in na ngim nga tu hun hong tung a, a thuak zo ngawl tu dongin na thinngim leih hi." 
Job4:6 Nangma in Pathian na bia a, na nuntakzia sitbaang ngawl hi; tua ahikom kimuanna le lametna na nei tu ahi hi." 
Job4:7 Tu in ngaisun kik in. Thutang mi khat ii tuasiatna a thuak ngei khat son in. 
Job4:8 Mite in tatsiatna lo bangin tho a, ngitlona ancii poai bangin a poai ka mu hi; tu in amate in siatna le ngitlona teng anlaak bangin la uh hi." 
Job4:9 Vuipi suangval bangin Pathian thin uukna in amate susia hi. 
Job4:10 Mi ngilote sia tawpite bangin hawkin ngalh hi, ahihang Pathian in amate thimsak a, a hate suktansak hi." 
Job4:11 Mat tu neak tu a nei ngawl tawpite bangin, amate thi a, a tate theampo kithethaang hi." 
Job4:12 Khatvei thu khat, aw thim taw hong theng a, dam pau mama ahikom ka za thei bua liang hi." 
Job4:13 Zan mangsia bangin tua in ka mut hong phawng hi. 
Job4:14 Liingin ka ngawk hi; ka pumpi bup lau in, kithing hi." 
Job4:15 Vuiva vahiau khat in ka maitang hong seam a, lau in ka khuasik mul suak hi." 
Job4:16 Tua munah a ding khat ka mu thei hi; sal kaleng zong a bang tatak ziam ka son thei bua hi. Tuasia ciang a thim dide sung pan aw khat ka za hi: 
Job4:17 “Pathian ii muna ah mi khat pawpo a thutang om thei tu ziam, tua ahibuale ama a bitphua pa mai ah a thiangtho om thei tu ziam?" 
Job4:18 Pathian in a vantung naseamte muang ngawl hi; ama in a vantunglalangte ii khialna ngawngawn mu hi. 
Job4:19 Tungman taw kivawt a nungta khat, leivui sung pan a piang na khat pingpaleap bangin ol takin a kimetcip thei khat sia ama in muang tu in na um ziam?" 
Job4:20 Mihing khat sia zingsang in nungta tha tu a, ahihang nitak hun a thet ma in kuama heak ngawlin thi hi." 
Job4:21 Ama ii nei theampo kilaaksak a; ciimna nei ngawl lai in thi hi.” 
Job5:1 Job awng, biakpui in. Hong zo a om ziam en in. Na bel thei tu vantunglalang khat po a om ziam?" 
Job5:2 Thin natna teng taw na thi dong na thinngim tu sia mawmawt huai hi, khiakna om ngawl ngamtatna hi." 
Job5:3 Ngammuang a kisa, mihing mawmawte ka mu ngei hi, ahihang a bangkuate thakhat thu in ka haamsiat hi." 
Job5:4 A tapate in ngal muanna mu zo ngeingawl a, kuama in amate hung tu in zum sungah dinpui ngawl hi." 
Job5:5 A ngilkial mite in a mawmaw sia ii lo an — ling kawm ah a po lo ante ngawngawn — neaksak tu uh hi. tuaciang a dangko mite in ama ii nei le lamh te eang tu uh hi. 
Job5:6 Siatna sia lei sungah po ngawl a, ngimna zongh lei panin po ngawl hi." 
Job5:7 A hi ngawl tatak ma hi! Mihing in ama le ama ngim kipia a, mei eakte mei sung pan a peakto bang tatak ahi hi." 
Job5:8 Nang hi leng Pathian kung tuu in, ama tungah ka thu ka sung tu hi." 
Job5:9 Ama ii nasep lian a septe ih tel zo bua a, nalamdang a laknate bo hun nei ngawl hi." 
Job5:10 Ama in leitang tungah nguazusak a lote tui buak hi. 
Job5:11 Hi hi, a kiniamkhiakte a laamto le, a khuangai theampo lungdamna a pia sia Pathian hi." 
Job5:12 Ama in mihing kukalte ii ngealnate lumleesak a, miciimte zongh a tup a sawmnate sung ma ah thaangsia hi, tuabangin amate ii sepna bangma a taangtung ngawl tu in vawt hi;" 
Job5:13  
Job5:14 Amate suntang ngawngawnin khuazing a lei zawtin pai uh hi. 
Job5:15 Ahihang Pathian in mizawngte thina pan hun hi; Ama in a cimawte zawthawkna pan hun hi. 
Job5:16 Ama in mizawngte lametna pia a, mi ngilote thimsak hi." 
Job5:17 Pathian ii puua kik sia mi hampha ahi hi! Pathian in hong teih le thin uuk heak in. 
Job5:18 Pathian in ama liamsuate ii meimate tuamsak hi; a khut taw nang hong nasak a, a khut taw nang hong damsak hi." 
Job5:19 Hun khat zawk hun khat ama in nang lal theina pan hong hun tu hi; 
Job5:20 kialpi a tun ciang ama in nang hong nungtasak tu a, tuaciang ngal sungah thina pan nang hong dal tu hi." 
Job5:21 Pathian in nang sia sonsiatna pan hong suatak tu a, lalna a tun ciang nang hong hun tu hi." 
Job5:22 Nangma in ngoltolnate le ngilkialnate na nuisan tu a, tuaciang ngamsate na kiita buatu hi." 
Job5:23 Na lo thawna munah suang om ngawl tu hi; ngamsate in nang hong sim ngeingawl tu hi. 
Job5:24 Tuaciang na puanbuk sungah thinnuamin na teang tu hi; na tuute na et ciang bit takin a om na mu tu hi. 
Job5:25 Ngan thana munah lopa teete zaa in ta tam mama na nei tu hi. 
Job5:26 Anlaak hun dong a min mangtaang huite bangin a huai a teakin na nungta tu hi. 
Job5:27 Job awng, hi thute koma ii khuangeipi ka sin ka heaksa uh hi. Thumaan thu ahikom tu in saang thiam in." 
Job6:1 Ka ngimna le ka khuangainate khai kitee le 
Job6:2  
Job6:3 tuipi vaal a senvuite sangin ngitzaw tu hi, tua hi a kamkhal ka paunate in note lamdang hong sasak heak hen." 
Job6:4 Vaanglianbel Pathian in thaltangte taw hong kap a, tuaciang a nguu in ka pumpi zenh hi. Pathian in a kiitakhuai nate ka mai ah ngual hi." 
Job6:5 Laa in lopa a neak ciang lungkim a, khuipui in taangphaw a neak ciang thim dide hi." 
Job6:6 Ahizong akua in limna nei ngawl, ci al ngawl an ne zo tu ziam? Aktuui dida sungah bang limna om na ziam?" 
Job6:7 Tuabang ante lim ka sa bua a, ka neak peuma in hong sungnimsak hi." 
Job6:8 Pathian in ka nget sia banghang hong pia ngawl hi tu ziam? Banghangin ka thunget hong zo ngawl hi tu ziam? 
Job6:9 Ama in kei hong that vet pole maw! 
Job6:10 Tuabang hong tha nop tu sia he leng ka natna bangza in a lian tazong, lungdamin ka kilawn tu hi, Pathian thiangtho hi, ci in he khi hi; ama ii hong thupiak po nalh ngeingawl khi hi." 
Job6:11 Ka luhai lai natu in bang thahatna nei na khi ziam? Muanmawkna ka nei ngawl nungsang banghang nung tataa lai tu khi ziam? 
Job6:12 Kei suang taw kivawt khi ziam? Ka pumpi sia taau ahi ziam? 
Job6:13 Keima le keima ka kihut natu tha nei ngawl khi hi; hu ngen in ka tai thei tu mun om ngawl hi. 
Job6:14 Pathian nusia ka hi a, ka hi bua zong — hi bang ngimna ah lawm le ngual thumaan kisamh khi hi," 
Job6:15 Ahihang no ka lawmte awng, nguazuk ngawl ciang a kang luite bangin hong theam nu hi." 
Job6:16 Luite vuuk le tuikhalte in khakcip a," 
Job6:17 ahizong nisa sungah tuate bo a, lui taw teng kongaw in om hi." 
Job6:18 Sennealngam khualhawte tui a zonna in ngam amh a; amate sennealngam sungah vakkotin thi uh hi. 
Job6:19 Sheba pan le Tema pan tua khualhawte in tui zong uh hi," 
Job6:20 ahihang luiko hui teng ah a lametna uh bo hi. 
Job6:21 No teng sia kei atu in tua luikote taw kibang nu hi, ka thuak teng na mu uh ciang lau in nungkin nu hi." 
Job6:22 Letsong khat nong piak tu ahizong, kei taangin khat po sumnguk nong piaksak tu in ahizong," 
Job6:23 ngal khat po ahibuale zawthawk thu a zangh thei khat pawpo pan ahizong nong hut tu in kong ngen ziam? 
Job6:24 Pha hi, hong hil tavun, ka khialnate hong son tavun. Thim dide in ka om tu a, kong ngai tu hi." 
Job6:25 Thumaan kammalte up taak hi, ahihang no nawnsan nu hi." 
Job6:26 Ka kam pan vui bek pusuak in a pau hong sa nu hi; tua ahile thinkiam a ka paute banghang hong zo nu ziam? 
Job6:27 Tanga silate na nga natu in aisaanna nuangtangte ngawngawn na lawn uh a, tuaciang na lawm phabelte duupin na hau natu zong nu hi!" 
Job6:28 Ka maitang hong en tavun. Leilot ngawl tu khi hi. 
Job6:29 A vaal kai in pau zo nu hi. Na thumaan ngawlna uh kheal vun. Hong puanil heak vun. Kei sia thumaan khi hi. 
Job6:30 Ahihang leilot thuson hong sa nu hi — a maan le a maan ngawl khentel in son thei ngawl hong sa nu hi. 
Job7:1 Mihing nuntakna in zawthawk thu taw ngalkap nasep bang, na ham sepna taw nuntakna bang le" 
Job7:2 sila khat ii nilim vot a lungngul bang, naseampa khat ii a thasum ngakin a om bang ahi hi." 
Job7:3 Tha khat zawk tha khat, ka nuntak pui tu bangma ka nei bua a; zan khat zawk zan khat in khuangai lungzuan hong pia hi." 
Job7:4 A mu tu in ka lupsuk ciang naite cing hak a; zankhuateak kilumlet in khuavak tu kaal ka ngakla hi. 
Job7:5 Ka pumpi sia thanh taw kidim hi; meima khiik in tuamcip hi; Ka meima pan meima nai luang hi. 
Job7:6 Ka ni ka hunte muanmawk lam et om ngawlin bawbo a, thiamtakte khauphei kithalee sia sangin manlang zaw hi." 
Job7:7 Pathian awng, na phawk in, ka nuntakna husan khat hi bek hi; ka lungdamna bo zo hi." 
Job7:8 Tu in hong mu ni hi, ahizong hong mu kik ngeingawl tu ni hi. Kei nong zong le om nawn ngawl tu khi hi." 
Job7:9 Meeikaai khat a bo vadi bangin, mihing khat thi a heak kik ngeingawl hi; ama a hete theampo in ama mangil uh hi." 
Job7:10  
Job7:11 Hi ngawl hi! Thim om thei ngawl tu khi hi! Ka thin uuk a, ka thin veeila khi hi. Ka pau kul hi." 
Job7:12 Banghangin kei hong cing nu ziam? Tuipi nganhing pui khat hong sa nu ziam? 
Job7:13 Lumsuk in tawlngak tu ka hanciam hi; ka natna pan noptuamna ka zong hi. 
Job7:14 Ahihang nangma mama in mangte taw nong lausak a; mukholnate le mangsiate nong puak hi," 
Job7:15 hi bang a ngimhuai pumpi taw ka nuntak sangin ka tawl hong kisaanlup tu uukzaw liang khi hi. 
Job7:16 Ka thinkiam zo hi; nuntakna cimtak khi hi. Kei nguak hong nusia tavun. Ka nuntak man om ngawl hi. 
Job7:17 Banghangin nang atu in mihingte sia thupi mama ziam? Amate ii sep sia banghang thinnopmawkpui ni ziam? 
Job7:18 Zing simin ama na vil a, a minit simin ama na ze et hi." 
Job7:19 Ka ciltee valh tu hun sung beak leidang en ngawl tu ni ziam? 
Job7:20 Thongcing pa awng, ka mawna in nang hong nasak ziam? Banghang phutuun sinna in kei hong zangh ni ziam? Nang atu in vanh ngitpi ka hi ziam?" 
Job7:21 Ka mawna hong maisak thei ngeingawl tu ni ziam? Ka sep khialna hong hesuak thei ngawl tu ni ziam? Hai ngawlin ka thaankuul sungah ka om tu hi, tuaciang kei nong zon ciang ka om nawn buatu hi." 
Job8:1 Na hawpai kamtam thuson teng na man zo ziam? 
Job8:2  
Job8:3 Pathian in thutang lumlet ngeingawl hi; ama in a maan ngawl vawt ngeingawl hi. 
Job8:4 Pathian tungah na tate khial hi nanak tu hi, tua ahikom amate taw a kilawm bangin ama in daan pia hi." 
Job8:5 Ahihang tu in kiheak in a, Vaanglianbelpa Pathian tungah thuum ta'n;" 
Job8:6 na thumaan mama a, na thiangtho le, Pathian hong pai a, nang hong hu tu hi, tuaciang na bangkua sia na thaman tu in puuapha tu hi." 
Job8:7 Nei le lamh na bosua theampo sia tua hun ciang Pathian hong piak tute taw en khawm leang son thamman ngawl tu hi. 
Job8:8 Taanghlai hun a ciimna kan pak in; ih taanghpupite heak thumaan thutak te ngaisun in. 
Job8:9 Ih khantom a, bangma ih heak om ngawl hi; leitung nuntakna sia limhte taw kibangin ih kaantan hi." 
Job8:10 Ahihang taanghpupi miciimte in hilsak in; amate hong sonna teng ngai in: 
Job8:11 “Pumpa sia tui om ngawlna ah po thei ngawl hi, ciknawng omna puasia ah tuate kimu ngeingawl hi." 
Job8:12 No lei lai a, zak tu in saat thamman ngawl lai ahitazong, tui a kang le tuate sia a vul phit tute hi." 
Job8:13 Pathian selte sia tua pumpate taw kibang hi; Pathian a makngil uh po ciang a lametna bo hi. 
Job8:14 Amate in khau zam khat — momkhau khat muang uh hi," 
Job8:15 amate in pangpaan kaai khat neal le tuasia in amate do zo tu ziam? amate in khauzam khat zamh le tuasia in amate khuangkho zo tu ziam? 
Job8:16 Mi ngilote sia nitaang sungah lopate po bangin, huan bup lopa beakte taw kibangin po a, zel keak hi." 
Job8:17 A zungte in suangte vial a, tuaciang suangtum om theampo man tinten hi." 
Job8:18 Ahihang tuate bot le uhte — tuate tua munah om ngei ahi hunlam a he khat zongh om ngawl tu hi. 
Job8:19 Hi hi, mi ngilote ii lungdamna sia tuabang teng hi; tu in midangte hong pai in a omna suan uh hi." 
Job8:20 Ahihang Pathian in a thumaante taisan ngeingawl tu a, a tatsia mite huna pia ngeingawl tu hi." 
Job8:21 Ama in nang hong nuisakin hong ausak kik tu a," 
Job8:22 ahizong ama in nang hong ensante tungah minsiatna tungsak tu hi, tuaciang mi ngilote bangkua teng bomang tu hi." 
Job9:1 Hi hi, tuate theampo sia ka zaak ngeisa vive hi. Ahizong, mihing khat in Pathian langpanna thu ah, bangbangin thu zo thei tu ziam?" 
Job9:2  
Job9:3 Bangbangin mihing khat po in Pathian nial zo tu ziam? Ama in kuama ii zo thei ngeingawl tu thu dokna tul khat, dongh thei tu hi." 
Job9:4 Pathian sia ciim peuma a, vaanglian hi; kuama in ama langpan zo ngawl hi." 
Job9:5 Ama in kidop natu thu son khol ngawlin mualpite khiin a, tuaciang a thin uukna taw tuate susia hi." 
Job9:6 Pathian in zinliingsak a, lei ngawksak hi, ama in leitung a nang khuamte thiing hi." 
Job9:7 Ama in ni a sua ngawl natu in khak thei a, tuaciang zanin aksite taangsak ngawl thei hi." 
Job9:8 Pathian ii vantungte a phalh ciang ahizong tuipi nganhing pui sia ii thibin a totcip ciang ahizong kuama in hu ngawl hi. 
Job9:9 Pathian in aksite — Solh, Siluk, Zawlzawng te le thangsang aksite van ah khai hi." 
Job9:10 Na lianpi ama ii septe ih tel zo bua hi, tuaciang ama ii lamdang laknate bo hun nei ngawl hi." 
Job9:11 Pathian in hong kaantan hi, ahizong ama ka mu thei bua hi." 
Job9:12 Ama in a dei po la a, kuama in tho thei ngawl hi; kuama in, “Nang bang vawt ni ziam?” ci in dongh ngam ngawl uh hi." 
Job9:13 Pathian ii thin uukna sia thai ngeingawl hi. Ama in ama langpan tuipi nganhing pui Rahab tha a pia a ngalte ngoaicip hi. 
Job9:14 Tua ahikom Pathian kam ka zo natu kammalte koi bangin mu thei tu khi ziam? 
Job9:15 Mawbaang ngawl ka hihang ka vawt theibel sia Pathian ka thukhenpa munah hesuak nget tu ahi hi. 
Job9:16 Tuasia ciang ngawngawn in, ka pau tu hong oai hial le zong, ama in hong ngai tu in ka um thei bua hi." 
Job9:17 Ama in ahang thu om ngawl bulin kei hong nawk tu le hong liamsak tu vuipi suangvalte hong paisak hi. 
Job9:18 Ama in ka hu zongh hong diiksak man bua hi, ka nuntakna a sia a kha taw hong dimh hi." 
Job9:19 Thazaw ka suang tu ziam? Pathian tungah thazaw kisuang thei ziam? Thukhenzum ah ama then tu khi ziam? Akua in ama paisak thei tu ziam? 
Job9:20 Mawbaang ngawlin thumaan ka hi hang ka kammalte sia a mawte ii awsua bang ka hi hi, tuaciang ka pau theampo in kei hong puanil taw kibang hi." 
Job9:21 Mawbaang ngawl khi hi, ahizong awlmaw zo nawn bong. Nuntak tu ngaisun zo ngawl khi hi, thupi ka sak om nawn ngawl hi; maw ka leang, maw bua ka leang Pathian in eite hong lalsak tu hi." 
Job9:22  
Job9:23 A maw ngawl mi khat thakhat thu in a thi ciang Pathian nui hi. 
Job9:24 Pathian in leitung sia mi ngilote pia hi. Ama in thukhenmangte theampo mittawsak siat hi. Tuabang sia Pathian ii vawt ahibuale akua vawt ziam? 
Job9:25 Ka ni hunte pai vahan a, khat zongh a pha om ngawl hi." 
Job9:26 Ngunkuang manlangbel sia bangin ka nuntakna bo vazangh a, muvanlai ii bilpi khat man tu in a suktun bangin manlang hi." 
Job9:27 Zumnui maitai in ka natnate makngil sawm leng ngim ka thuakna theampo in hong lauthawn tu in hong vil kik hi. Pathian in kei sia a maw ma in hong koi hunlam ka he hi. 
Job9:28  
Job9:29 Maw hong kiputsak zawk nungsang banghang awlmawk tu khi ziam? 
Job9:30 Ka mawnate hong silthiang zo tu satpia om ngawl hi. 
Job9:31 Pathian in a kiihuai dum sungah kei hong lawn suk a, ka puansilhte ngawngawn in kei hong maizum pui hi." 
Job9:32 Pathian sia mihing hile a kam zo thei khi hi; ka kihauna uh thukhen tu in zum ah pai thei tu khu hi. 
Job9:33 Ahihang ko kilaklaw ah palai hong seam tu kuama om ngawl — Pathian le kei thu hong khen khawm tu kuama om ngawl hi. 
Job9:34 Pathian awng, kei daan nong piak tawp in! A kiitakhuai na vawt te heam in!" 
Job9:35 Kei lau ngawl khi hi, pau tu khi hi, banghang ziam cile ka thinsung keima in he khi hi." 
Job10:1 Ka nuntak cimtak khi hi, lungkim ngawl a, ka phun ka mauna hong ngai ta'n." 
Job10:2 Hong puavawk heak in Pathian awng. Kei nong mawsakna a bang hi thong ziam? Hong son ta'n! 
Job10:3 Tua zata bang na ngitlo sia maan tu ziam? Nangma vawtsate ma zawnsak vawt tu ni ziam? Tuaciang mi ngilote sawmna tungtaang ah maipha pia tu ni ziam? 
Job10:4 Kote muna bangin tuate na mu ziam? 
Job10:5 Ko ma bangin na khantom ziam? 
Job10:6 Tua ahile banghang ka mawna theampo hong sul zui in, ka sep khial theampo banghang hong vaizui ni ziam?" 
Job10:7 Maw ngawl ka hi hunlam le, na khut sung pan kei hong hun thei kuama om ngawl ci sia na he hi." 
Job10:8 Na khutte in kei hong piangsak a hong zeam hi, tuaciang tu in tua khutte ma in kei hong lalsak hi." 
Job10:9 Tungman panin nong vawt sia phawk kik in a, leivui suak tu in hong ngoaivui kik tu ni ziam?" 
Job10:10 Nangma in kei pian natu in ka pa thahatna na pia a; ka nu sulh sungah nong khangsak hi. 
Job10:11 Ka pumpi sia ngute le sazangte taw na vawt hi, tuaciang tua ngute sia sangol le vun te taw na tuam hi." 
Job10:12 Nuntakna le a kikhomsuan itna nong pia zo a, tuaciang nong khoi nong kepna taw kei nong nungtasak zo hi." 
Job10:13 Ahihang tua hun sung theampo ah nong natsak natu na ngeal ku sia tu in ka he hi. 
Job10:14 Ka mawna nong maisak nop ngawl hu in mawna a vawt ziam ci in nong encik hi. 
Job10:15 Ka maw poma ciang ngim nong thuaksak a, ahihang a maanin ka ngamtat ciang maipha ka nga bua hi. A cimaw a maizum in ka om hi." 
Job10:16 Zawna khat pawpo nei lei leng zong, tawpi khat taw kibangin nong vai hi; hong liamsua tu in nalamdang laknate ngawngawn na vawt hi." 
Job10:17 Kei hong langpanin a ding tu tetti na nei tawntung hi; Kei tungah na thin uukna khang vaial hi; kei nong sim natu ngealna thak na nei tawntung hi. 
Job10:18 Pathian awng, banghang hong piangsak ni ziam? Kuama ii hong mu ma in ka thi tu hi zo kana ve." 
Job10:19 Sulh sung pan thaankhuk ah paitan paih hi leng a om ngeingawl sia bang hi tu kana ve. 
Job10:20 Ka khan bo dektak zo hi ngawl ziam? Kei nguak hong omsak kapo in! Ka hun nei lai sun teng a nuamin hong zanghsak ta'n. 
Job10:21 Hai ngawlin ka pai tu a, kong heak kik nawn buatu hi — ka zot natu ngam sia thinkiamhuai in, khuamial in khuazing cip a," 
Job10:22 khuazinna, limhte taw a kiliana le lungman buaina ngam hi a, khuavak sia khuazing a hina mun ahi hi." 
Job11:1 Hi nawnsan thute theampo kuama in zo kik ngawl tu ziam? Kam tam pauna in mihing khat a maan suaksak ziam? 
Job11:2  
Job11:3 Job awng, koma in hong zo kik thei ngawl tu hong um ni ziam? Nong nunauna kammalte in kote pau ngawlin hong koi tu ziam?" 
Job11:4 Na pau teng thumaan hi ci ni hi; Pathian muna ah ka thiang ci ni hi. 
Job11:5 Pathian in na kam hong zo le uuk na peu ing! 
Job11:6 Ama in ciimna nam tam a om sia nang hong son tu hi; mihingte heak zawk ngawl thuthukte a om sia nang hong son tu hi. Pathian in na kilawmna za sangin a tawm zaw daan hong pia hi. 
Job11:7 Pathian ii letna le a vaang ii a phakcia le a mongte na mu thei ziam? 
Job11:8 Van sia Pathian atu mong nei ngawl ahihang, tuasia nang bat zawk hi ngawl hi. Pathian in mithi khua he ahihang nang in na he bua hi." 
Job11:9 Pathian letna sia simlei sangin zaizaw a, tuipi sang zong zaizaw hi." 
Job11:10 Pathian in nangma hong manin, thusit tu in hong puak le ama a khaktan tu akua om ziam?" 
Job11:11 Pathian in akua teng mannung ngawl ci sia he hi; ama in amate tatsiatna theampo mu hi. 
Job11:12 Ngam laate a zual sa in a pian ciang mi ngoaite a ciim hong kipan tu hi. 
Job11:13 Job awng, na thin maansak in, Pathian zuan in." 
Job11:14 Na bangkua sung pan siatna le tatkhialna teng heam in. 
Job11:15 Tuasia zawkciang dinmun kho le hangsanna taw leitung vaite maingat kik in. 
Job11:16 Tuasia ciang, na ngimna theampo na ngaisutna pan a bosa namthuam bangin kiciamtee nawn ngawl tu hi." 
Job11:17 Na nuntakna sia sunkim laitak nitaang sangin taang zaw tu a, tuaciang na nuntakna a zingbel hunte zing khuavak bangin taang tu hi." 
Job11:18 Ngal muanna le lametna taw kidim in na nungta tu hi; Pathian in nang hong dal tu a, tawlngakna hong pia tu hi." 
Job11:19 Na ngalte na kiita buatu hi; mihing tam mama in huna hong ngen tu hi. 
Job11:20 Ahihang mihing ngilote thinkiam in, a kiim a paam en tu a, tuaciang suatak natu lam om ngawl cisia mu tu hi. Amate lametna khat sia thina hong pai tu ci thu bek ahi hi." 
Job12:1 Hi hi, na kampau sia mihonpite ii a ci nop teng hi. Na thi uh ciang ciimna sia note taw thi khawm tu hi." 
Job12:2  
Job12:3 Ahihang, kei zongh no ngaisut za ma ngaisun thei khi hi; Note sang in kei nangh zaw tuan ngawl khi hi; na sonsa theampo sia a kuama po ii heaksa thu hi." 
Job12:4 Tu in ka ngualtamhte ngawngawn in kei hong nuisan hi; kei thutang in sit baang ngawl hi napi hong kinuisan hi; ahihang Pathian in ka thungetna hong zo kik hun om ngei hi. 
Job12:5 Note ngim nga ngawl nu hi, ahihang ciammuina in hong nei nu hi; mihing a puk dek khat vel nu hi." 
Job12:6 Ahihang ngutate le Pathian a selte sia amate ii tha le ngal bekma a pathian hi napi thinnuamin nungta uh hi. 
Job12:7 Vacimte le nganhingte ngawngawn in no hong hil thei natu thu tam ma nei hi," 
Job12:8 leitung le tuipi nganhingte ii ciimna ngen in. 
Job12:9 Amate theampo in Topa khut ii a vawt hunlam he uh hi. 
Job12:10 A piansaksa te ii nuntakna lam a lak sia Pathian hi; mihing theampo nuntakna sia ama ii khut sungah om hi. 
Job12:11 Ahihang na leei in an tep a, diksa ahi bangma na bil in kammalte a zaak sia diksa hi." 
Job12:12 Pasal haamte in ciimna nei hi, ahihang Pathian in ciimna le vaangletna nei hi. Pasal haamte in thuthuk mu hi; Pathian in thuthuk muna le vaangletna nei hi." 
Job12:13  
Job12:14 Pathian in a balthap ciang akua in sa kik thei a, Pathian ii thong a khiak sia akua in suatak thei tu ziam?" 
Job12:15 Pathian in nguatui a khaam ciang nguatui hang a; tuite a tha ciang namthuam hi. 
Job12:16 Pathian sia thahat a, a tawntungin ngalzo hi; ngual theamte le theam thuakte ama khut sungah om hi." 
Job12:17 Ama in ngamukte ii ciimna laaksak a, ngam lampuite sia a mawmawte bangin ngamtasak hi." 
Job12:18 Ama in kumpite za taaksak a, thong sungah khum hi;" 
Job12:19 Ama in thiampite le vaang nei mite kiniamkhiaksak hi. 
Job12:20 Ama in a kimuang mite thimthusak a, tuaciang uhaamte ii ciimna laaksak hi." 
Job12:21 Ama in vaangletna a neite min siasak a, ngamukte ii thahatna bosak hi." 
Job12:22 Ama in thina bang ahi khuazingna munte ah khuavak puak hi. 
Job12:23 Ama in ngamte thahatsakin liansak hi, ahihang a zawkciang tuate zo in lalsak hi." 
Job12:24 Ama in a lampuite mawmawsak a, lungmang sa le ngammang sa in vakvaisak hi;" 
Job12:25 amate khuazing sungah zawtin vak uh a, zukhamte bangin hoi vatut uh hi." 
Job13:1 Na son theampo ka zaak ngeisa vive hi. Tuate ka tel siat a; na heak za uh ma ka he hi. Kei, no sangin nangh zaw tuan ngawl khi hi." 
Job13:2  
Job13:3 Ahizong ka thu kinialpui sia Pathian hi a, no hi ngawl nu hi; ka thu sia ama taw kinial nuam khi hi." 
Job13:4 Na heak ngawl uh teng leilot thu taw seal nu hi; no sia kuama a damsak zo ngawl syavuante taw kibang nu hi. 
Job13:5 Bangma son ngawlin om vun, tuasia ciang khat po in a ciim hong sa tha tu hi!" 
Job13:6 Ka thu kong pualaak ciang ngai vun. 
Job13:7 Banghangin leilot nu ziam? Na leilotnate in Pathian phatuamsak tu in ngaisun nu ziam? 
Job13:8 Ama sungsia tu hanciam nu ziam? Ama ii thu sia zum ah kinial nuam nu ziam? 
Job13:9 Pathian in no hong en cian le a pha khat pawpo a mu tu ziam? Ngual na theam uh bangin Pathian theam thei tu in ki um nu ziam? 
Job13:10 Doidan nopna na seal uh hang ama in no hong teih tu a," 
Job13:11 tuaciang ama thahatna in no hong lausak tu hi. 
Job13:12 Na paunakte vut taw kibangin kimanna om ngawl hi; na ngatang seenate tungman bangin topcip hi. 
Job13:13 Thim khipkhep vun a, thuson tu hun khat kei hong pia tavun, a sua nop po suak hi tahen." 
Job13:14 Keima in ka nuntakna pia tu in ka kinging hi. 
Job13:15 Ka lametna theampo bosua zo ci leang Pathian in hong that hial zong bang phamaw ziam? Ama tungah ka thu sung tu khi hi. 
Job13:16 Ka hangsanna zongh in hong hun thei lai hi, banghang ziam cile mi ngilo khat peuma in Pathian mai si ngam ngawl hi." 
Job13:17 Tu in ka son telna kammalte ngai vun. 
Job13:18 Ka thu sung tu in kinging zo khi hi, banghang ziam cile keima ka maan hunlam kihe khi hi." 
Job13:19 Pathian awng, kei maw hong suan tu in hong pai ni ziam? Tuabang hong pai na hile thim om in a thi tu kinging khi hi." 
Job13:20 Thu nam nii hong ngensak ta'n; tuate thukim lete nang kung pan buk tu hanciam ngawl tu khi hi; 
Job13:21 Kei daan nong piak tawp in a, launa taw kei hong sucip heak in." 
Job13:22 Pathian awng, pau masa in, hong zo tu khi hi. Tua ahibuale kei hong pausak ta'n a, hong zo ta'n." 
Job13:23 Ka mawnate bang teng ziam? Khialna ka vawt bang om ziam? Bang khialna liante taw kei hong kimawsak ziam? 
Job13:24 Banghangin kei hong pial ni ziam? Banghangin hong ngal vawt ni ziam? 
Job13:25 Kei hong lauthawn nuam ni ziam? Kei sia thingtee khat hi lel khi hi; taangphaw ko sa khat a ngal vawvawt na hi hi. 
Job13:26 Kei tungah nasia takin maw nong suanh hi, ka khanmoi lai ka ngamtatna ngawngawn taw nong mawsak hi." 
Job13:27 Ka peangte thikkol nong bulh hi, ka kalsuan sim nong encik a, ka khuanite ngawngawn na en cian hi." 
Job13:28 Tua hu in thing muatsa bangin ka topcip a, nget ii neaksa puanpuasilh bangin ka om hi." 
Job14:1 Eite theampo sia a thaneam a cimaw sa in ih piang hi. A vekpi in khantom nuntak haksatna le ngimnate a kibang in kidim hi. 
Job14:2 Ih khangto a, paakte bangin manlang takin ih vul hi; limhte bangin ih bo hi." 
Job14:3 Pathian awng, kei nong en beak tu ziam, ahibuale thu hongsit in kei tungah thu nong khen tu ziam?" 
Job14:4 Mihing bang a thiang ngawl na khat pawpo sung pan a thiangtho na piang thei ngeingawl hi. 
Job14:5 Ama khansau za tu — a nuntak hun tha pha za tu sia a masia in kikhensat zo hi. Nangma in tuate na khensat zo a, tuasia kilai kik thei ngawl tu hi." 
Job14:6 Mundang en in a, ama nguak nusia in; Ama in a thuak zo tu ahile — a nuntakna haksa sungah nuamsasak in." 
Job14:7 Thingkung kiphuk sa khat atu in lametna om hi; tuasia nungta kikin meang hi. 
Job14:8 A zungte haamin, a bul lei sungah thi kale" 
Job14:9 tui a nga thingkung no bangin meang tu hi. 
Job14:10 Ahihang mihingte thi a, tua in amate tawpna hi; amate thi hi, tuasia zawkciang amate koisungah om ziam?" 
Job14:11 Ngun a luan tawp te, tuili a kangte bangma in," 
Job14:12 mihingte thi in, a tho kik ngei buatu hi. Vanpi a kip laiteng amate khanglo ngeingawl tu hi; amate a mutna pan tung nawn ngawl tu hi." 
Job14:13 Mithi khua ah kei hong seal heu lete uuk nang; na thin uuk thai dong hong seal ka ven, tuasia zawkciang kei nong phaw kik natu hun khat ciangtan in." 
Job14:14 Mihingte thi le amate nungta kik thei ziam? Ahihang hi ngim ngana hunte a bo dong hun phazawte ngak tu khi hi. 
Job14:15 Tuasia ciang nong sam tu a, kong zo tu hi, tuaciang nong bitphua sa kei tungah na lungkim tu hi." 
Job14:16 Tua zawkciang ka kalsuan simin nong encik tu a, ahizong ka mawna ka khialna te nong sul zui buatu hi." 
Job14:17 Nangma in tuate na maisak tu a, na heam tu hi; ka vawt a maan ngawlte theampo na niilkeak tu hi." 
Job14:18 Mualte a cip tu hun le a kip suangliangte a kikhin tu hun hong theng tu hi. 
Job14:19 Tui in suangpite seu tu a, tuaciang nguapi in leinealte tai tu hi; tuabang keakin kote ii nuntak tu lametna teng na lalsak hi." 
Job14:20 Mihing khat na zothaw a ama a tawntung na hawlkhia hi. A thi ciang a meal mang hi. 
Job14:21 A tapate in minphatna nga kale ama in heaksak ngeingawl hi, amate a min siat ciang ama tungah kison ngawl hi." 
Job14:22 Ama in ama ii a pumpi natna le a thin heena teng bek phawk hi. 
Job15:1 Job awng! na kammalte a hawmpi hi, a hawmpi hi!" 
Job15:2  
Job15:3 Miciim kuama in nang pau bangin pau ngawl hi, ama le ama tuabang khiakna nei ngawl kammalte taw a kidal om ngawl hi." 
Job15:4 Nangma ci bang suak thei thong le kuama in Pathian kiita ngawl tu a; ama tungah kuama in thungen ngawl tu hi. 
Job15:5 Na seksolna sia na pauna panin kilangh hi; na pilna kammalte taw kiseal sawm ni hi. 
Job15:6 Kei in nang kong puanil tu kul tuan bo; na pau kammal theampo taw nangma kipuanil ni hi. 
Job15:7 Nang sia mihing a piang phitbelpa kisa ni ziam? Pathian in mualte a vawt lai in om ni ziam? 
Job15:8 Pathian vaihawmnate za ku ni ziam? Mihing ciimna sia nang bek in nei kisa ni ziam? 
Job15:9 Ko ii heak ngawl thu khat pawpo na heak om tuan ngawl hi. 
Job15:10 Ka ciimna uh sia na pa ii pian ma in a piangte — puakkaang sa mite tung pan ka heak uh hi. 
Job15:11 Pathian in nang heenepna hong pia hi; banghangin nolh lalai ni ziam? Ama taangin kam-uai in kamthiam taw pau khu hi. 
Job15:12 Ahihang nang na hile, patau in thin uukna taw ko nong sal hi." 
Job15:13 Pathian tungah na thin uuk a, ama na son sia hi." 
Job15:14 Mihing khat pawpo sia thiangtho takpi thei tu ziam? Mihing khat pawpo sia Pathian muna ah maan thei tu ziam? 
Job15:15 Ahang sia Pathian in a vantunglalangte ngawngawn muang ngawl hi; amate zongh ama muna ah thiangtho ngawl hi. 
Job15:16 Tuaciang, mite in siatna sia tui bang phetin dawn uh hi; hi hi, amate lal in mannei ngawl hi." 
Job15:17 Job awng, ka heak kong son sia tu in ngai in." 
Job15:18 Miciimte in a taanghpupite tung pan a heak uh thumaan thutak te kei hong hil zo hi, tuaciang amate in thukute seal nei ngawl uh hi." 
Job15:19 A ngam sungah ngamdangmi om ngawl hi; Pathian taw amate a kikhualasak tu kuama om ngawl hi. 
Job15:20 Ngualdang a zothaw mihing seksol khat sia, a khan tawntungin ngim thuak tu hi." 
Job15:21 A lauhuai awte a nakheng sungah ciik au tu hi, ngammuang a kisak laitak phalakte in ama sim tu hi." 
Job15:22 Amate in khuazing sung pan a suatak tu lametna nei ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile namsau khat in amate that tu in mun khat pan ngak hi," 
Job15:23 tuaciang amate ii luang ne tu in vaciikte in ngak hi. Amate in a mailam khuazing ahi sia he a; 
Job15:24 a thahat kumpipa khat bangin tuasiatna in amate sim tu in ngak nginge hi. 
Job15:25 Tuasia in Pathian khuttum a ngat, Vaanglianbelpa a nalh mihing khat ii thuak tu a tangsa ahi hi." 
Job15:26 Amate kiphasak a leedo kin uh hi; amate in thinpui takin a lum laamto a, Pathian do tu in tai uh hi." 
Job15:27  
Job15:28 Amate sia khuapite a la le a neite ii taisat sa innte a suan te hi a, ahihang ngal in tua khuapite le innte lalthamsak tu hi." 
Job15:29 Amate khuangei hau ngawl tu hi; a neisa bangma kikhomsuan ngawl tu hi. A limh uhte ngawngawn bo tu a," 
Job15:30 tuaciang amate khuazing sung pan suakta ngawl tu hi. Amate sia a baakte mei ii a kak, a paakte vui ii seamkeak thingkung te bang hi tu hi." 
Job15:31 Amate in siatna a suang tu in a mawmaw lawlawm uh le siatna sia amate ii tel hi tu hi. 
Job15:32 A hun a cin ma in amate vulcip tu uh hi, thingbaak khat bangin vulin hing kik ngei nawn ngawl tu hi." 
Job15:33 Amate a nga ung lai teng a pul sapitkung bang hi tu hi; amate sia a paak pul sa olive kung bang hi tu hi. 
Job15:34 Pathian a sel mite atu in suan le paal om ngawl tu a, sumnguk taw a kisa innte kaanghmei tawk in laltham tu hi." 
Job15:35 Hi mite sia ngual ngim piak sawm in, siatna a vawtte hi a; amate thinsung sia ngualtheam nopna taw kidim tawntung hi." 
Job16:1 Kammal tuabangte tu masia in ka za ngei zo hi; heenepna nong piak uh sia ngim kipiakna hi bek hi. 
Job16:2  
Job16:3 Pau tan viuveu tu nu ziam? kam a pau khak tu sia na uukna in kam tungnut kitu nu ziam? 
Job16:4 Kei dinmun ah no om le uhte a, no dinmun ah kei ding leng, no pau theampo kei zong pau thei tu khi hi. Tel takin ka lu pei a, kam tam mama kong son thei tu hi." 
Job16:5 Ngaisut piakna taw no kong thahatsak thei tu a, heeneam tu in no kong pau pupui tu hi." 
Job16:6 Ahihang ka thusonte in bangma hong hu ngawl a, ka thim om ciang zong ka natna nuamtuam tuan ngawl hi." 
Job16:7 Pathian awng, hong toisak niknek zo ni hi, ka innkuan in hong kithalup tu na oai zo hi." 
Job16:8 Nangma in nong pummat zo a; ka ngal na hi hi. Ka vun le ka ngu nguak bekin ka om a, tuasia zongh ka maw hunlam a kilakna in mite in ngaisun hi." 
Job16:9 Pathian in thin uukna taw ka ngu ka taang khat zawkciang khat thiaktan a; etsatna taw kei hong ngau hi. 
Job16:10 Mite in kei hong nunau a; amate in hong kiim uum in ka maitang hong beang hi. 
Job16:11 Pathian in kei sia mi ngilote khut sungah hong aap zo hi. 
Job16:12 Thinnuam in ka om a, ahihang Pathian in ka longtawl pan hong zamh a, hong vel in hong sucip hi. Pathian in phutuunna in hong nei a," 
Job16:13 tuaciang ka kiimkot pan thaltangte taw hong kap a — tuate in hong sun in hong liamsua hi, tuasia ciang zong ama in hong hesuak tuan bua hi." 
Job16:14 Ama in kei hong liamsua kikik hi; Ngual a huatsa leilam ngalkap khat bangin ama in kei hong sim hi. 
Job16:15 Khuangai in khau-ip puan ka silh a, hi sung leivui sungah ngallel in ka tocip hi." 
Job16:16 Ka mai a san dongin ka kap a, ka mit tumin ka mitkhu bolin dup hi," 
Job16:17 ahihang ngongtat mawna khat zongh ka vawt bua hi, tuaciang Pathian tungah thin tak taw thu ka ngen hi." 
Job16:18 Simlei awng, kei tungah hong kivawt khialnate seal heak in! Thukhaikim natu ka sapna aw thimsak heak in!" 
Job16:19 Kei atu hong ding tu le kei hong panpui tu vantung ah khat om hi. 
Job16:20 Ka lawmte in kei hong lang a; ka mit pan ka thituite Pathian mai ah taak hi. 
Job16:21 Mihing khat in a lawmpa atu a maangkaasak bangin kei atu in Pathian tungah hong thuumsak tu khat ka kisamh hi. 
Job16:22 Tu in ka kumte bawbo a, a kiheak kik ngawl tu lampi ka tawn hi." 
Job17:1 Ka nuntak hun a bo tu nai zo a, ka hu zongh ka sang lalaa hi; thaankuul simngawl kei atu bangma om nawn ngawl hi." 
Job17:2 Ngual theampo ii hong nunau zazaan nate ka en bek hi. 
Job17:3 Pathian awng, kei thumaan khi hi. Ka kammal hong saang ta'n. Ka pauna hong panpui tu kuama om ngawl hi." 
Job17:4 Amate khua ngaisut thiamna teng na khak hi, tu in amate in kei hong zosak heak in." 
Job17:5 Paunak lui sungah mihing khat in sum huvau in a lawmte leeheak a, tua hu in a tate in thuak hi." 
Job17:6 Tu in mite in hi paunak sia kei tungah hong zangh hi; Amate hong pai in ka maitang cil hong phii hi. 
Job17:7 Ka heena in ka mit hong tawsak phial hi; ka khut le ka peang te sia limhte bangin zeen kiangkuang hi. 
Job17:8 Thumaan khu hi a kicite in ciza in ingh a, amate theampo in kei sia Pathian sel ci in hong ningkhiin uh hi." 
Job17:9 Zatakhuai khu hi a kicite in amate ngaisutna maan kisa vaial uh hi. 
Job17:10 Ahihang amate a vekpi hong pai in ka mai ah hong ding tek le, amate sungah a ciim khat beak zongh ka mu buatu hi." 
Job17:11 Ka ni hunte bawbo a; ka tupnate taangtung ngawl hi; ka lametna bo hi. 
Job17:12 Ahihang ka lawmte in zan sia sun hi ci a; khuavak nai hi ci hi, ahihang khuazing sungah om lai ka hi hunlam ka he hi." 
Job17:13 Ka lametna in mithi khua bek hi a, tua mun khuazing sungah a mu tu in ka lumsuk tu hi." 
Job17:14 Thaankuul sia ka pa ka ci tu a, kei hong ne thanh te sia ka nu le ka suapuinumeite ka ci tu hi." 
Job17:15 Kei atu lametna khat pawpo koi sungah om ziam? akua in tua lametna mu tu ziam? 
Job17:16 Mithi khua ka zotsuk ciang kei taw lametna tonkhawm ngawl tu hi. 
Job18:1 Job awng, nang bang mihingte thim om thei ngeingawl tu ahi bua ziam? Na pau tawlnga in hong ngai po lete hong paupui thei tu khu hi." 
Job18:2  
Job18:3 Ko sia khui khawng bangin mawmaw ci in akua in nang hong ngaisunsak ziam? 
Job18:4 Na thin uukna taw nangma le nangma a kinatsua hi bek ni hi. Na thin uuk hang po in leitung kinusia tu ziam? Pathian in na lungkim natu in mualte a khiin tu ziam? 
Job18:5 Mi ngilote ii khuavak taang kimitsak lai tu hi; a meikuang kuang kik ngei nawn ngawl tu hi. 
Job18:6 A tuipuan bukte sungah a meiinn sia kimit tu hi. 
Job18:7 A kalsuannate kho hi, ahizong tu in amate lutu hi; amate ma ii ngaisut a kipiakna taw amate puk hi." 
Job18:8 Ngen khat sungah amate vak a, a peangte awk hi;" 
Job18:9 thaangsia na khat sungah a khuatulte awk a, lencip hi." 
Job18:10 Lei ah thaangkhau khat kiseal a, a lampi ah thaang khat kisiah zo hi." 
Job18:11 A kiimkot panin launa in ngak hi; tua in a kalsuan simin amate zuizen hi. 
Job18:12 Amate hau ngei hi, ahihang tu in ngilkial in vak hi; tuasiatna in a kung panin ngak hi." 
Job18:13 A kiitakhuai natna khat amate ii pumpi tungah kizel a, a khut le a peangte muatsak hi." 
Job18:14 Amate ngammuang takin a teenna tuipuan bukte panin kinuaicip a, Thina Kumpipa mai ah kikaikeak hi." 
Job18:15 Tu ahile natna a nga thei ngawl natu in kaan a kithe zawkciang, a kuama po a tuipuan buk sungah teang thei hi!" 
Job18:16 Tuate ii a baakte le a zungte sia vulin ko hi. 
Job18:17 Amate ii minthanna sia tualsung le ngamdang ah bo vangeu a; kuama in amate phawk nawn ngawl hi. 
Job18:18 Amate a nungtate ngam pan kinotkeak tu a, khuavakna pan khuazingna ah kinot tu hi." 
Job18:19 Amate in suan le paal nei ngawl a, kuama taang nawn ngawl hi." 
Job18:20 Nisuana pan nitumna dong amate ii thuakna a za theampo lau in liinglawng hi. 
Job18:21 Tuasia in mi seksolte ii thuak tu hi a, Pathian a awlmaw ngawlte thuak tu a tangsa ahi hi." 
Job19:1 Banghangin kammalte taw kei hong vawtsia tawntung nu ziam? 
Job19:2  
Job19:3 Hun khat zawk hun khat kei nong selno tawntung uh a, nong vawtsiat hu in maizum ngawl nu hi." 
Job19:4 Sep khial keak ka nei zong, tua in no koibang hong nasak ziam?" 
Job19:5 No hile kei sangin phazaw kisa nu hi, tuaciang ka ngimnate, ka maw hu in a piang sa nu hi." 
Job19:6 Hi sia a seam sia Pathian a hi sia mu thei ngawl nu ziam? Ama in kei hong mat natu in thaang hong sia hi. 
Job19:7 Ama ii ngongtatna lungkim ngawlin, nial leei kaleng kuama in hong ngai ngawl hi; thukhaikim ka deina in ka au sia kuama in za ngawl hi." 
Job19:8 Pathian in lampi khak zo a, ka paisuak thei bua hi; ama in khuazing sungah ka lampi seal zo hi." 
Job19:9 Ama in ka nei ka lamh theampo la siat zo a, ka minthanna siasak zo hi." 
Job19:10 Ama in ka ci tung mun theampo hong vel zazaan hi, ka lametna hong zunglok a, vul in a thi tu in kei hong nusia hi." 
Job19:11 Pathian thin uukin kei tungah a thin hong so hi; ama ii ngal ciphabel bangin kei hong vawt hi. 
Job19:12 Kei hong sim tu in a ngalkaphonpite hong paisak hi; amate in kulhte to in ka tuipuan buk uumci uh hi. 
Job19:13 Ka suapuipate ii hong taisat sia Pathian ii vawt hi; Kei hong hete atu in kei sia khualmi ka suak hi. 
Job19:14 Ka beete le ka ngualtamhte bo siat zo hi. 
Job19:15 Ka inn ah zin hong tung ngeite in kei hong mangil zo hi; ka naseam numeite in khualmi khat le ngamdangmi khat bangin kei hong vawt hi. 
Job19:16 Naseam khat ka biapui ciang, ama tung hu ka nget ciang, hong zo ngawl hi." 
Job19:17 Ka zi in ka husan ngim namh zo ngawl a, ka suapuipate in hong neak ngawl uh hi." 
Job19:18 Patangte in hong mu ciang hong zawngsak in hong nuisan uh hi. 
Job19:19 Ka ngualtamh pha belte in hong et ciang hong lipkhap uh hi; ka it belte ka lang ah pang uh hi. 
Job19:20 Ka ngute tungah ka vuntunte kaai vadul hi; a nungta valiai bekma in ka suakta hi. 
Job19:21 Note ka ngualtamhte nu hi! Hesuak mulkimna hong nei tavun! Pathian khut in kei hong vaatvawk zo hi. 
Job19:22 Pathian ii kei hong vawt siat bangin, banghangin note in hong vawtsia hamtang tu nu ziam? Nong vawtsiatna uh tu za pha heu zo ngawl ziam?" 
Job19:23 Mihing khat in ka kammalte phawk in, laibu khat sungah ciamtee le paw oai napeu ing!" 
Job19:24 Tua ahibuale sikkhu khat taw suang tungah ka kammalte a tawntung a kip tu in khen le oai napeu ing. 
Job19:25 Ahizong vantung ah a om khat om a, a khakbel ciang kei hong hung tu in ama hong pai tu sia ka he hi." 
Job19:26 Natna in ka vunte a neaktum zawk ngawngawn in hi ka pumpi sia taw ma Pathian ka mu tu hi. 
Job19:27 Ama ka mittang mama taw ka mu tu hi, tuaciang ama sia khualmi khat hi ngawl tu hi. Ka thin letna bo hi, banghang ziam cile" 
Job19:28 noma in, “Bangbangin ama ii nat natu vawt zazaan thei tu hi ziam?” na ci uh hi. Kei nong sim natu uh paulap khat na zong uh hi." 
Job19:29 Ahihang tu in tua namsau — mawna tungah Pathian thin uukna a thengsak namsau sia kiita vun, tua hile thukhen tu khat a om sia he tu nu hi." 
Job20:1 Job awng, ka ngaisutna hong lumlet ni hi, tu in kong zo tu kaal ngakla khi hi." 
Job20:2  
Job20:3 Na paunate zawnsakna kammal vive hi, ahizong kong zo natu daan he khi hi." 
Job20:4 Taanglai pek pan leitung ah mihing a kikoi ciil lai in 
Job20:5 mi ngilote khuangei a lungdam ngawl hunlam he nanak tu ni hi. 
Job20:6 Amate van nawl in khangto a, nasia khan mama ahiciang a lutang in meeikaai te dongto thei hikale" 
Job20:7 ama sia leivui bangin kiseamkeak tu hi. Amate a he ngeite in amate ii thetna hawna he ngawlin a lung uh mang tu hi. 
Job20:8 Amate sia mang khat bang, zanlai mangmu bangin mangthang tu a, kimu kik ngei nawn ngawl tu hi." 
Job20:9 A teen ngeina mun pan amate bo tu hi; 
Job20:10 tuaciang mizawngte ii na a nguksak sia a tapate in piakik tu hi. 
Job20:11 A pumpi moi in hat mama ngei hikale hai ngawlin leivui suak tu hi. 
Job20:12 Ama in siatna sia limsa mama a, namtui sa in a kam sungah pawlkhat muam hi." 
Job20:13  
Job20:14 Ahihang a an neakte a ngil sungah a sia a khaa suak a, nguu bangma in khaa tu hi." 
Job20:15 Mi seksol pa in a nguktak haunate lua kik siat hi; Pathian in a ngilsung pan ngawngawn in tuate la kik hi. 
Job20:16 Mi ngilo pa ii a valh sia nguu taw kibang hi; tua in ngulnguu hangte tuk bangin ama thatlum hi. 
Job20:17 Ama sia olive thau a luang ngunte ahibuale noai le khuaitui a luang luite mu tu in nungta ngawl tu hi. 
Job20:18 Ama in a sepna sa theampo nusia tu a; a haunate nopsakna in nei man ngawl tu hi," 
Job20:19 banghang ziam cile ama in mizawngte nengcip in awlmaw ngawl a, tuaciang ngualdang khat po ii sak sa innte sut hi." 
Job20:20 A duhopna huvau in lungkim ci om ngeingawl hi. 
Job20:21 Amate an a neak uh ciang a khamvaal om ngei ngawl hi, ahihang tu in a nopsakna bo vangeu hi." 
Job20:22 A daupai bel laitakin thinngimna takngimna theampo in sukhuanin zawmcip tu hi. 
Job20:23 A du a dei theampo ne tahen! Pathian a thinso, a thin uukin ama daan pia tu hi." 
Job20:24 Thik namsau pan suatak tu a hanciam ciang taau thal in ama kap vawk tu hi. 
Job20:25 Thaltang khat in a pum sung pailet in tangciak a, a tee thaltang dawn pan a chi mal taak hi, tuaciang a thin laucip hi." 
Job20:26 A kholsa na theampo kilalthamsak a, mihing khut taw a kitaw ahi ngawl meikuang khat in ama le a innkuan bup kaangh hi." 
Job20:27 Vantung in hisia pa ii mawna pualaak a, leitung in ama mawsiatna tetti pang hi." 
Job20:28 Ama ii nei le lamh theampo Pathian thin uukna tuipawm sungah kisiasak tu hi. 
Job20:29 Hisia mi ngilote thuak tu tangsa hi a, tua in amate thuak tu in Pathian ii seesa ahi hi." 
Job21:1 Kong son tu teng hong ngai tavun; Heenep natu kong nget sia, tua teng lian ma hi." 
Job21:2  
Job21:3 Pau tu hun hong pia tavun a, ka man zawkciang nong nunau nuam uh le noma thu hi." 
Job21:4 A thithei mihingte taw a kihau hi ngawl khi hi; ka thin vei laakna sia ahang thupi khat om hi. 
Job21:5 Kei hong en tavun. Ingh in, thim om in, hong salhsak tham liang hi ngawl ziam?" 
Job21:6 Kei tungah hong piangsate ka ngaisut ciang lung amh in liingin ka ci ngawk hi. 
Job21:7 Banghangin Pathian in misia te a huai dong a nuamsa in nungtasak ziam? 
Job21:8 Amate in tate le tute nei a, tuate khan en tu in nungta hi." 
Job21:9 Pathian in a bangkua uh ah tuasiatna tungsak ngawl hi, amate thaa lau in nungta ngeingawl hi." 
Job21:10 Hi hi, a khuite theampo pungin a no sua ciang haksa ngawl hi." 
Job21:11 A note sia tuunote bangin tai in kimai uh a," 
Job21:12 tengtongh le tamngaite aw taw laam uh hi. 
Job21:13 Amate thinnuam in nungta a, tuaciang ngimna thuak ngawlin nuam takin thi uh hi." 
Job21:14 Mi ngilote in Pathian tungah koma nguak hong nusia ta'n ci uh hi; amate in a nuntakna sungah Pathian ii deina he nuam ngawl uh hi. 
Job21:15 Amate in Pathian atu sep kul sa ngawl hi, a tungah thunget zongh phattuamna omsa ngawl hi." 
Job21:16 Amate in a nei tha le ngal taw zawna ka nga uh ci hi, ahihang amate khua ngaisutzia ka saang thei bua hi." 
Job21:17 Mi ngilopa ii meivak sia kimitsak ngei ziam? Amate khat in tuasiatna thuak ngei ziam? Pathian thin uukin a ngilote daan pia ngei ziam? 
Job21:18 tuaciang vui ii taangphaw a seam bangin ahibuale vuipi suangval ii leivui a let bangin amate seamkeak ngei ziam? 
Job21:19 A pa ii mawnate hu in a tate khat ii tungah Pathian in daan pia hi ci nu hi. Hi ngawl hi! Mawneite amate mama Pathian in daan pia hen; Amate mawna hu in ama ii tuabang a vawtna thu ama in lak hen. 
Job21:20 Mi mawte in amate aituamin daan thuak tahen; Amate in Vaanglianbel pa Pathian thin uukna thuak tahen. 
Job21:21 Eite ih khan man zawkciang ih tate ii a lungdam le a lungdam ngawl ih awlmawk takpi ziam? 
Job21:22 A saangna munah a omte ngawngawn thu a khen Pathian tungah mihing khat pawpo in hilcian thei ziam? 
Job21:23 Mihing pawlkhat sia a thi ni dong ciidam in nungta a; a pumpi uh zongh pha takin kivaak a, sa pha in, lungdamin olno takin thi uh hi." 
Job21:24  
Job21:25 A dangte in lungdamna nei vet ngawl hi; amate thinsia in nungta a, thinsia in thi uh hi." 
Job21:26 Ahihang a vekpi, a kibangin thi a, a kibangin kiphum hi; amate a vekpi thanhte taw kituam hi." 
Job21:27 Elna thin kukal na nei uh hong he khi hi. 
Job21:28 “Tu in siatna a vawt mi liante ii innte koisung om ka na ziam?” ci in na dongh uh hi. 
Job21:29 Khualhaw mite taw thu kumkhawm ngawl nu ziam? Amate ii hong ko kik thute he ngawl nu ziam? 
Job21:30 Pathian thin uuk a daan a piak ni in mi ngilote sia kikhoaikhe tawntung hi. 
Job21:31 Mi ngilote a mawsiat tu kuama om ngawl hi, tua ahibuale ama ii sepsate theampo a thuk kik tu kuama om ngawl hi." 
Job21:32 Pha takin a kicing a thaankuul omna thaanmual ah amate a kipuak ciang," 
Job21:33 mihing a tul simin thaan kuanpui a, a luangte tungah lei ngawngawn in dam takin vuknelh hi." 
Job21:34 Tuaciang no na hi uh le! Thu nawnsan teng po taw kei heenep nong sawm uh hi! Nong zo kikna peuma leilot thu vive hi! 
Job22:1 Mihing khat pawpo, a ciimbel ngawngawn Pathian ii zak thei a suak ngei om ziam?" 
Job22:2  
Job22:3 A maan na sep na vawtte in Pathian phatuamsak ziam, tua ahibuale a peuma in na phatna in ama hu ziam?" 
Job22:4 Nangma in Pathian na zatak hu in ama in nang hong hil a, hong sitna hi ngawl hi." 
Job22:5 Hi ngawl hi, tuasia na maw lei lam hang hi a; na tatsiatna teng theampo hang ahi hi." 
Job22:6 Na suapui khat ii hong bat sum na losakna in a puan teng na laaksak a, bangma na kheetsak bua hi." 
Job22:7 A toite tui na pia nuam bua a, tuaciang a ngilkialte an na pia nuam bua hi." 
Job22:8 Leitang theampo na sungsuam natu in na vaang neina le na za neina na zangh hi. 
Job22:9 Meingongte na hu nop ngawl bek dom ngawlin tangate zongh na suttol a, na vawtsia hi." 
Job22:10 Tua ahikom tu in na kiim theampo ah na taak natu vuumte om a, tuaciang thakhat thu in launa taw na kidim hi." 
Job22:11 Khua hong zing mama ahikom khua na mu thei bua a, tuaciang namthuam in nang hong khuum hi." 
Job22:12 Pathian sia a saangbel vantungte ah teangin, tuaciang aksite a omna saang napi ensuk hi ngawl ziam?" 
Job22:13 Ahitazong nangma in, “Pathian in bang he ziam? Ama meeikaai in seal hi — bangbangin ama in ei tungah thu hong khen thei tu ziam?” ci in na dongh lalai hi." 
Job22:14 Van khuvum tungah ama a pai ciang meeikaai saate in khua a mu ngawl tu in ama seal hi ci in, na ngaisun hi." 
Job22:15 Mi ngilote tot tawntung na lampi ma tawn tu in na khensat ziam? 
Job22:16 A hun uh a tun ma ngawngawnin namthuam in amate taaikeak hi. 
Job22:17 Hi mite sia Pathian a nialte le Pathian in amate bangma law zo ngawl tu in a um mite ahi hi. 
Job22:18 Ahihang amate nuamsa in a khangtosak sia Pathian hi a — mi ngilote thinsung ka tel thei bua hi. 
Job22:19 Mi ngilote daan a kipiak a mu uh ciang miphate lungdamin maw baanna nei ngawl mite nui uh hi. 
Job22:20 Mi ngilote neisa theampo kisusia siat a, tuaciang a taanglai sun peuma kaanghmei in kaanghtum hi." 
Job22:21 Job awng, tu in Pathian taw kilemna vawt in a, ngalte khat bang a ama na vawtna teng tawlnga in, tuabang hi lete ama in nangma thupha hong pia tu hi." 
Job22:22 Ama ii hong thuhilnate saang in a, a kammalte na thinsung ah ciamtee in." 
Job22:23 Hi hi, Pathian kungah kiniamkhiakna taw heak kik hamtangin, na bangkua sungah a sia ngamtatna theampo na bosak ta in." 
Job22:24 Na khamhte vawk in; na khamh pha belte luamko sungah sung in. 
Job22:25 Vaanglianbelpa Pathian sia na khamh hisak in, nang atu a saangin a kiciang ngunn hisak in." 
Job22:26 Tuasia ciang Pathian na muang tawntung tu a, ama, na lungdamna ii naak ahi hunlam na mu tu hi." 
Job22:27 Thu na nget ciang ama in hong zo tu a, tuaciang na kiciamnate na len tu hi." 
Job22:28 Na sep na vawt theampo na taangtun tu a, na paina lampi ah khuavak taang tu hi." 
Job22:29 Pathian in a kiphasakte khia suk a, a kiniamkhiakte hun hi." 
Job22:30 Na sepna maanin, maw baanna na nei buale ama in nang hong suatak tu hi." 
Job23:1 Lungkim ngawlna pualaakin Pathian langpan lai khi hi; tau ngawlin ka om thei bua hi. 
Job23:2  
Job23:3 Koisungah ama mu thei tu khi ziam, tuaciang ama omna munah koibangin pai tu khi ziam ci sia ka he nuam hi." 
Job23:4 A mai ah ka thu teng ka son tu a keima sang pan ka nial nopna teng ka sung tu hi. 
Job23:5 Ama ii a son tu sia le bangbangin kei hong zo kik tu ci ka he nuam hi. 
Job23:6 Pathian in a thahatna theampo kei tungah hong zangh tu ziam? hong zangh ngawl tu hi, ama in ka thusonte hong ngai tu hi." 
Job23:7 Keima in thutak son khi hi; Pathian taw kam kikum thei tu khi hi; ama in kei, mawbaang ngawl hi ci in a tawntung atu in khatvei lian pualaak tu hi." 
Job23:8 Ni suana sangah ka zong zo a, ahihang tua munah Pathian om ngawl hi; Nitumna sang ka zon hang ama ka mu bua hi." 
Job23:9 Pathian sia saksang le thang sangah na seam hi, ahihang ama ka mu bualai hi." 
Job23:10 Tua hi napi Pathian in ka kalsuanna theampo he hi; Ama in kei hong sit le a thiangin hong mu tu hi. 
Job23:11 Ama ii a teal lampi sia thumaan takin ka zui a, lam ka pial ngei bua hi." 
Job23:12 Pathian ii thupiakte ka seam tawntung hi; ama ii deina ka zui a, keima ii uuk bangin ka ngamta bua hi." 
Job23:13 Ama kikheal ngeingawl hi. Kuama in ama nalh zo ngawl hi, tua ahibuale a vawt nopte kuama in khaam zo ngawl hi." 
Job23:14 Kei atu a ngealsa sia ama in taangtungsak tu hi; tuasia ama ngealna tam mama sung pan khat bek hi. 
Job23:15 Ama mai ah lau in ka liing vadil hi. 
Job23:16 Vaanglianbelpa Pathian in ka thin hanna bosak hi. Khuazing in ka mit hong tawsak ahitazong hong patausak sia khuazing hi ngawl a Pathian ahi hi. 
Job23:17  
Job24:1 Banghangin Pathian in thukhen natu hun khat, ama na a seamte atu in thutang khen ni khat ciangtan ngawl ziam?" 
Job24:2 Mite in leitang tamzaw a nga natu in, longi khiin uh hi; amate in tuute ngu in amate tuuhonte taw koi khawm uh hi." 
Job24:3 Amate in tangate neisa laanote la in, a leiba a lo dong meingong nu ii khuital keam hi." 
Job24:4 Amate in mizawngte ii a nga thei tute khaktan in; tuaciang a zawngkhalte zawthawkna taw taisakin buusak uh hi. 
Job24:5 Tua ahikom mizawngte sia, ngam laate bangin, duisung ngam kona sungah an zong uh hi; amate in koima dang po ah a tate an tu mu zo ngawl uh hi." 
Job24:6 Amate in amate ii neisa ahi ngawl lo ante a laak kul hi, tuaciang mi ngilote ii sapithuan sungah sapitngate lo uh hi." 
Job24:7 Zanin amate bangma silh ngawlin lum a, khuasik dal natu puan nei ngawl uh hi." 
Job24:8 Mualtung ah ngua a zute in amate tuamcipsak a, suangpite kung a kipha tinten in bealh uh hi." 
Job24:9 Misiate in pasel patang note sal suaksak a, mizawngte ii tate leiba taangin la uh hi." 
Job24:10 Mizawngte ahile a kiseal natu puan nei ngawlin a vak kul a, mangtaang a at laitakin a ngil uh kial nanak tu hi." 
Job24:11 Amate in olive ngate sathau in ngoai a, sapitngate a tui suuk hi, ahihang amate mama a dang uh ko hi." 
Job24:12 Khuapite sungah a liamte le a thi dekte in au in a ko uh hang Pathian in amate thungetnate awlmawk ngawl hi. 
Job24:13 Khuavak a nial mite om hi; Amate in tuasia tel ngawl hi, ahibuale a lamlakna mun zuan ngawl hi." 
Job24:14 Khuavak ciang mi thatpa tho in mizawngte thatlum tu in kuan hi, zanin ama in ngual ii na nguksak hi." 
Job24:15 Palngul mawna a vawt sia in khuangial tu ngak hi; Ama in kuama ii mu thei ngawl tu in a maitang seal hi. 
Job24:16 Zanin ngutate in innte phuul a, ahihang sunin amate buu in khuavak pial uh hi." 
Job24:17 Amate in sun khuavak kiita a, ahihang amate atu in khuazing kiitakhuai ngawl hi." 
Job24:18 Mi ngilopa sia khuanawl tuipawm in taaikeak a, tuaciang a neisa leitang Pathian in haamsiat hi; ama a sapithuan sungah naseam tu in kuan nawn ngawl hi." 
Job24:19 Nisa khua kona sungah vuuk a tuithap vadi bangin mimaw khat sia a nungtate ii ngam panin bo vangeu hi. 
Job24:20 Tu in a nu ngawngawn in ama phawk nawn ngawl hi; ama thanh in ne a, thing puk khat bangin kimuatsak hi." 
Job24:21 Tuabangin a pian sia meingongte a vawtsiat hang le tasel nupite tungah cikna thiamna a lak ngawl hang hi. 
Job24:22 Pathian in ama ii thahatna taw a thahatbelpa susia a; Pathian hong dian tak ciang mi ngilo pa thi hi. 
Job24:23 Pathian in ama ngal muangin nungtasak thei hikale ama encik tan viuveu hi. 
Job24:24 Tawmvei sung teng mi ngilo pa nuamsa hi, ahihang tua zawkciang ama lopa khat bangin vul a, ankung vui kisaattante bang ahi hi." 
Job24:25 Tu a ka ci bang hi bo ci in khat po in a nial thei tu ziam? Ka kammalte maan ngawl hi ci in, khat po in a lak thei tu ziam?" 
Job25:1 Pathian vaanglian hi; mi theampo in ama kiita in zakta hen; ama in a vantung ngam sungah kilemna omsak tan hi. 
Job25:2  
Job25:3 Ama ii na a seam vantunglalangte akua in a phakza sim zo tu ziam? Pathian ii khuavak a taan ngawlna mun om ziam? 
Job25:4 Pathian muna ah a thutang ahibuale a thiang, akua om tu ziam?" 
Job25:5 Ama mit sungah tha ngawngawn taang sitset ngawl a, aksite zongh thiang ngawl hi." 
Job25:6 Tua ahile tangteal, lungno ahi tua mihing sia bangbang hi tu ziam? Pathian mit muna ah mihing sia man nei tham ziam?" 
Job26:1 A zawngkhal a thazawm mi kei — atu in nong huna bangza in pha ziam! 
Job26:2  
Job26:3 Tuabang ngaisutna pha nong pia a, kei bangin a mawmaw khat sia na heakna nong hawm hi!" 
Job26:4 Na kammal theampo akua in za tu in um ni ziam? Hi bang pau tu in akua in nang hong thaw ziam? 
Job26:5 A thisate ii thaate sia leinuai ah a om tui sungah liinglawng hi. 
Job26:6 Mithi khua kihongin Pathian mai ah kilangh hi. Ama ii a mu thei ngawl natu in a khak a dal bangma om ngawl hi. 
Job26:7 Pathian in van saksang teng phalh a, tuaciang leitung sia mun awngpi sungah kaaisak hi." 
Job26:8 Meeite tui taw a kidimsak sia Pathian hi, ama in tuate a ngitna taw a puathap ngawl natu in keam hi." 
Job26:9 Ama in thalik sia meeikaai khat ii nungah seal hi. 
Job26:10 Ama in khuazing pan khuavak sia tuipi maitang tungah a kisuai a beampui khat sia taw khen hi. 
Job26:11 Ama in van a len khuamte a teih ciang tuate lau a kilok in liing uh hi. 
Job26:12 Ama ii thahatna in tuipi zothal hi; ama in a thiamna taw nganhingpui Rahab thatlum hi. 
Job26:13 Ama ii husan sia in van thiangsak a, tuaciang ama khut in a suakta nganhing pui sia that hi." 
Job26:14 Ahihang hite ama thahatna ii a hiauhiau hi bek a, ngual ii kihuau in a son vasipte ih zaak hi bek hi. Pathian bangbang tatakin lian cisia akua in he thei tu ziam?" 
Job27:1 Thukhaikim thu hong pia nuam ngawl, ka nuntakna a lalsak, a nungta Vaanglianbelpa Pathian taw ka kiciam hi." 
Job27:2  
Job27:3 Pathian in husanna hong piak laiteng in 
Job27:4 ka kam ka muk in a sia peuma pau ngeingawl tu a, ka leei in leilot thu khat zongh son ngeingawl tu hi." 
Job27:5 No pasalte maan nu hi ci ngeingawl tu khi hi; ka mawban ngawlna sia ka thi dongin ka thasua buatu hi. 
Job27:6 Maan khi hi ka ci sia bangma hunin thasua ngawl tu khi hi; hi thu ah kithasunna om ngawlin ka thin thiang hi. 
Job27:7 Kei hong langpanin kei hong ngal vawtte a vekpi in mi seksolte le thutang ngawlte bangin daan kipia tahen. 
Job27:8 Pathian selte nuntakna sia Pathian ii a tangkal hun ciang bang lametna om na ziam? 
Job27:9 Ngimna hong tun ciang Pathian in amate auna za tu ziam? 
Job27:10 Amate in Pathian piak lungdamna sia a dei tu uh hi a, ama ii tungah tatsat ngawlin thu a nget tu ahi hi." 
Job27:11 Pathian ii vaangletna bangza in lian ziam, hong hilsak tavun a, tuaciang Vaanglianbelpa Pathian in bang ngeal ziam ci sia no hong sonthiangsak tavun." 
Job27:12 Ahihang, kong hil bua zong noma mama in mu tek zo nu hi; tua ahiciang banghangin tuabang nawnsan thu son nu ziam?" 
Job27:13 Hisia in vaanglianbelpa Pathian ii a ngilo, a ngongtat mite daan a piakzia hi." 
Job27:14 Amate in tapa tam mama nei thei tha tu hi, ahihang ngal sungah a vekpi kithat tu a; amate ii tanote in neak tu a kicing nei ngeingawl hi." 
Job27:15 A nungta sunte zongh natna taw thi tu a, tuaciang a meingongte ngawngawn in a thi huvau in khuangai ngawl tu uh hi." 
Job27:16 Mi seksol sia in sim zawk ngawl ngunntang nei tu a, khat pawpo ii kisap za sangin a tamzaw puansilhte nei tu hi;" 
Job27:17 ahihang mipha khat po in tua puante silh tu a, tuaciang mi thumaan khat po in tua ngunte tang tu uh hi." 
Job27:18 Mi seksol pa in mombu bangin innte sa a, tua ahibuale lote a cing sila khat ii buk bangin sa hi." 
Job27:19 Hun khakbel khat sungah amate a hau in lum tu a, a khanlaw uh ciangin, a nei a lamh teng a bo siat mu tu uh hi." 
Job27:20 Thakhat thu in khuanawl suak bangin launa in nawk tu a; zanin vui in amate seamkeak tu hi; 
Job27:21 ni suana vui in amate a inn uh panin lenkeak tu hi; 
Job27:22 amate ii suatak natu a hanciam mama laitakin tua vui in amate dual ngawl hetin nuaimang tu hi. 
Job27:23 Amate a tai uh ciang, vui nging himhum in, lalsak theina hatna taw amate hawk a lausak hi." 
Job28:1 Ngunn a kitawna mun ah a khukte om a, Khamh a kithiansakna munte zongh om hi." 
Job28:2 Khuktote in thik sia lei sung pan to in, Tuaciang suang panin taausan tuisak hi." 
Job28:3 Amate in khuazing thukbelna sungah zong uh hi. Amate in lei taw thukna ah zongin Tuaciang khuazing sungah suangte to uh hi. 
Job28:4 Mihing khat pawpo ii teenna mun Tua ahibuale mihing peang taw khual a haw ngeina mun taw a kikhualana ah Mihingte in suangkhuk tumna hawngte to uh hi. Tua mun dum thukte sungah Ama in khau luai a lungzuangin naseam hi. 
Job28:5 Thaw ante leitang pan piang hi, Ahihang tua leitang sia ii nuai ah Na theampo kilaaikeak in kisutham hi." 
Job28:6 Leisung suangte ii sungah sapphire suangmanpha vomte om a, Tuaciang a leivui sungah khamh kihel hi." 
Job28:7 Suangkhukte paina lampite a mu ngei muthi om ngawl hi, Tuaciang tuate tungah vaciik leang ngeingawl hi." 
Job28:8 Tawpi ahibuale a kiitakhuai ngamsa ngilo dangte in Tua a ngamkhing lampite tawn ngeingawl hi. 
Job28:9 Suangkhuk naseamte in suangsak belte to a, Mualte sia mual peang dong totham hi." 
Job28:10 Suangte sungsang a tawletna hawng vangte panin Amate in suangmanphate mu uh hi. 
Job28:11 Amate in ngun naakte dong to in, a kiseal nate a kilangh taakna ah paipui uh hi." 
Job28:12 Ahihang ciimna koisungah kimu thei ziam? Tel thei natu in koisungah ih sin thei tu ziam? 
Job28:13 Ciimna sia a thithei mite sungah kimu ngawl tu hi. Kuama in a manphatna tatak he ngawl hi. 
Job28:14 Tuipi liante le tuipi peuma ii a thuknate in zongh Tua munah ciimna om ngawl hi ci uh hi. 
Job28:15 Ciimna sia ngunn le khamh taw kilei thei ngawl hi. 
Job28:16 Ciimna ii manphatna sia A phabel khamh le suangmanpha te taw kitee thei ngawl hi. 
Job28:17 Ciimna sia khamh sangin manpha zaw a, Khamh paakbung khat ahibuale maanhai pha belte sangin manpha zaw hi." 
Job28:18 Ciimna ii manphatna sia tuipi muanpaakte, suangkaangte ahibuale suangmanpha sante ii manphatna sangin mannei zaw hi." 
Job28:19 Topaz suangmanpha pha belte le khamh ciitak ii man sia Ciimna ii manphatna taw kisontee thei ngawl hi. 
Job28:20 Tua ahile, ciimna ii naak koisung om ziam? Koisungah tel thei natu in ih sin thei tu ziam?" 
Job28:21 A nungta nganhing in tuasia mu thei ngawl hi, A leang vacim khat zongh in mu thei ngawl hi." 
Job28:22 Thina le lalna ngawngawn zongh in mu ngawl a, ngual ii kamdawn bek za khu hi ci hi." 
Job28:23 Pathian bek in a lampi he a, Ciimna a kimuna mun he hi." 
Job28:24 Banghang ziam cile ama in leimongte dong mu a, Van ii nuai ah a om na theampo mu hi." 
Job28:25 Pathian in vui ii a thahatna a piak ciang, tuipi ii phakcia tu a khensat ciang;" 
Job28:26 Pathian in nguazuk natu mun, Tuaciang vanto khualeng meeite lampi tu a khensat ciang;" 
Job28:27 Tuasia ciangin ama in ciimna mu a, a man neina sit hi — Ama lungkim in kipsak hi." 
Job28:28 Pathian in mite mun ah, “Na ciim natu uh in, Topa thasia nanak tu nu hi. Na heak thei natu uh in siatna pial hamtang tu nu hi,” ci hi." 
Job29:1 Job a thuson kipan kik hi. 
Job29:2 Pathian ii hong et hong kepcing hun lai bangkeakin ka nuntakna khatvei kipan kik thei le oai meak ing. 
Job29:3 Tualai in kei taw Pathian omkhawm tawntung a, khuazing kaantan in ka va ciang khuavak hong pia hi." 
Job29:4 Tua hun lai sia ka nopsak hunlai hi a, Pathian ii hong pawlmatna in ka bangkua hum hi." 
Job29:5 Tualai in kei taw Vaanglianbelpa Pathian omkhawm a, kei sia ka tate theampo in hong kiim uum vaniau hi." 
Job29:6 Ka khuipuite le ka kealpuite in noai tam mama hong pia a, ka olive kungte suang tam belna lei sungah po hi." 
Job29:7 Khuapi upate a kikhop simin amate sungah ka kihel ciangin," 
Job29:8 khangmoite in kei hong mu po le hong pial a, tuaciang khanghaamte in zatak piakna in hong din uh hi." 
Job29:9 Mipite ii lampuite zongh a pau uh tawlnga uh hi; 
Job29:10 a thupibel mite zongh huthe ngawlin om uh hi. 
Job29:11 Kei hong mu theampo ahibuale kei hong za mite theampo in ka sep ka vawt sate a pha in hong son uh hi. 
Job29:12 Mizawngte a au uh ciang ka hu hi; Zot natu mun a nei ngawl tangate ka hu hi. 
Job29:13 Ngim le kham nasiabel a thuak mite in kei hong pok uh hi, tuaciang meingongte ngam muanna a nga natu in ka hu hi." 
Job29:14 Thutang le khualna taw ka ngamta tawntung hi. 
Job29:15 Mittawte atu in mittangte ka hi a, peangbaite atu in peangte ka hi hi." 
Job29:16 Mizawngte atu in pa dinmun ah ka ding a, khualmi a ngimngate sangah ka pang hi." 
Job29:17 Mihing cizat nei ngawlte ii thahatna ka susia a, a vawtsiat mite ka suatak hi." 
Job29:18 Khansau in nuntak tu le nuam takin inn ah thi tu ka ngaisun tawntung hi. 
Job29:19 Kei sia a zungte, tui a nga tawntung le a baakte daaitui a kawt thingkung khat bang ka hi hi." 
Job29:20 Mi theampo in kei hong pok tawntung a, ka thahatna kiam ngeingawl hi." 
Job29:21 Ngaisutna ka piak ciang mite huthe ngawlin om a, ka son sia pha takin hong ngai hi;" 
Job29:22 ka man zawkciang zong bangma belap natu nei ngawl uh hi. Ka kammalte a sungah nguamalte bangin tum hi; 
Job29:23 khaal kipat hun a lothote in khuapi ngua a saan thiam bangin a kuama po in ka kammalte saan thiam uh hi. 
Job29:24 A thin uh a kiam ciang amate ka maitui a; ka maitaina in amate tha ngasak hi. 
Job29:25 Amate ka huai ka keam a, a vaite ka hawmsak hi. Kumpi khat ii a ngalkapte a lampui bangin amate lam ka pui a, a thinngim ciangin amate ka heeneam hi."
