Job30:1 Ahihang tu in kei sangin a khan moi zaw pasalte in kei sia ciammuina po in hong nei uh hi! A pate mannung mama ngawl tawntung ahiciang ka uite ii tuu cinna ah ka husak bua hi. 
Job30:2 Amate sia pasal tha tual sa honkhat hi a, kei atu na khat pawpo a seam tu in thazawm lei hi." 
Job30:3 Amate zawng mama in a ngilkial ahikom duisung ngampa ngamtongtana munah zanin thingzung ko te khim uh hi. 
Job30:4 Amate in sennealngam ah thingno pote botin ne uh hi, limna a nei ngawl belh munphia kung ii zung ngawngawn ne uh hi!" 
Job30:5 Nguta khawngte ausat bang phetin a kuama po in amate ausan in notkeak uh hi. 
Job30:6 Amate sia liang maitang ah a kito vang lianghawngte sungah teang tu uh hi. 
Job30:7 Amate ngamsate bangin dui sungah au in, sawlpaang nuai ah khawl om uh hi." 
Job30:8 A mannung ngawl, a son thamman ngawl, min memeal nei ngawlte veu ahi hi! Amate sia ngamsung pan kinotkeak hi." 
Job30:9 Tu in amate hong pai in kei hong nuisan uh hi; kei sia amate atu in ciammuina bang bek ka suak hi. 
Job30:10 Amate in kei kiihuai hong sa uh hi; amate in kei taw a kiteengat ciang pha mama kisa uh a, hong pai in ka maitang ngawngawn cil hong phii uh hi." 
Job30:11 Pathian in a thazawm le a cimaw in kei hong vawt zo ahikom amate in a thinsona taw kei hong langpan uh hi. 
Job30:12 Hi a ngilo nuam mihonte in hong talphul a kei hong simin, hong taisak hi; amate in a khakbel hong sim natu kithoai uh hi." 
Job30:13 Amate in ka suatak natu khaktan a, hong susia tu in hanciam uh hi; tuaciang amate a tho tu kuama om ngawl hi." 
Job30:14 Ka kidalnate hong phullet a hong nawk in, ka tung pan hong sucip suk uh hi." 
Job30:15 Launa in kei hong zo hi; ka vaang sia vui muut khat bangin bo hi; ka nopsaknate meeikaai khat bangin tai hi. 
Job30:16 Tu in thi dektak khi hi; ka ngim thuakna sia nuamtuam tuan ngawl hi. 
Job30:17 Zanin ka ngu ka taang theampo na hi; kei hong nene natna sia tawp hun nei ngawl hi. 
Job30:18 Pathian in ka laktong ngawngliip pan hong zamh a, ka puante meakcip in mealhemsak hi." 
Job30:19 Ama in buannoai sungah kei hong lawn suk a, leivui taw in ka kibang hi." 
Job30:20 Pathian awng, hong biakpui khi hi, ahihang nong zo ngei bua hi; thu kong nget ciang nong nadon bua hi." 
Job30:21 Kei tungah nong ngilo mama a; na tha neiza taw nong vawtsia hi. 
Job30:22 Vui in nong seamkeaksak hi; vuipi suangval sungah nong lawlok hi. 
Job30:23 Mihing theampo atu in a kisee kholsa thina sungah nong puak hunlam ka he hi. 
Job30:24 Hesuak nget simngawl a dang bangma a vawt thei nawn ngawl, a lalsa pasal khat sia, banghangin sim nu ziam?" 
Job30:25 A ngim nga mite taw kap khawm ngawl a a cimaw a kitasamhte atu keima khuangai ngawl ka na khi ziam? 
Job30:26 Lungdamna le khuavak ka lam en a ahizong ngimna le khuazing hong theng zaw hi. 
Job30:27 Thinngimna le natna in kei hong baltham a ni khat zawk ni khat ka thuak hi. 
Job30:28 Thinngim lungngimin nitaang mu ngawlin ka vavak a; ngualhon sungah dingin huna ka ngen hi. 
Job30:29 Ka aw sia ngam ui ahibuale kalaoh vacim aw bang hi a, heehuai in lungzuanhuai hi;" 
Job30:30 Ka vun dup zo a, ka ci suuk ngawp hi." 
Job30:31 Khatvei lai in a zaaknop huai music la awte ka zaakna munah tu in khuangai in mauna le kaana aw bek ka za hi. 
Job31:1 Ci le sa deina taw numei khat po ka et ngeingawl natu in a ciliap huai kamciam khat ka vawt zo hi. 
Job31:2 Vaanglianbelpa Pathian in ei tungah bang hong vawt ziam? Ama in mihingte nasepna bangbangin thuk kik ziam? 
Job31:3 Ama in, a maan ngawl a seamte tungah tuasiatna le lalna tungsak hi." 
Job31:4 Pathian in ka vawt theampo he a; ka kalsuanna theampo mu hi. 
Job31:5 Ngitlo ngamtatna nei ngeingawlin, ngualtheam tu hanciam ngeingawl khi hi ci in ka kiciam hi." 
Job31:6 Pathian in a maan khaikhin tungah ka ngitna hong tee tahen, tuaciang ama in ka mawban ngawlna mu tu hi." 
Job31:7 Lam maan panin ka pial a, ahibuale siatna in ka zolsak a, ka khutte mawna taw a nin le" 
Job31:8 tuasia ciang ka lo ante laltham tahen a, ahibuale, ka anciinte ngualdang in ne tahen." 
Job31:9 Ka innpaam pa ii zi ka dei a, a kongbiang pua sangah buu in ka ngak le" 
Job31:10 tuasia ciang ka zi in pasal dang khat ii an huansak tahen a, pasal dang khat ii lupna ah lum tahen." 
Job31:11 Tuabang a ngamtatsia te thidaan nga tu hi. 
Job31:12 Tuasia in ka nei theampo a kuangtumsak, a lalcipsak thei, hell mei bang khat hi tu hi." 
Job31:13 Ka naseamte khat in ka tungah a lungkim ngawlna hong pualaak ciang, ngai in ama tungah a pha ka vawt hi." 
Job31:14 Tuabang a pha vawt bua leng bangbangin Pathian maitang si ngam tu khi ziam? Kei tungah thukhen tu in Pathian hong pai ciang a bang son thei thong tu khi ziam? 
Job31:15 Kei hong bitphua Pathian in ka naseamte zongh bitphua hi. 
Job31:16 Mizawngte hu tu ka nial ngei bua hi; meingongte thinkiam in ka omsak ngei bua hi," 
Job31:17 tua ahibuale neak tu ka nei laiteng tangate a ngil ka kialsak bua hi. 
Job31:18 Ka khan tawntungin amate pha takin ka en hi. 
Job31:19 Zawng leih a, puansilh lei zo ngawl a kitasamh khat ka mu ciang," 
Job31:20 keima ii tuu hon sung pan a piang samulte taw a kivawt puansilhte ka pia tu hi. Tuasia ciang ama in a thinsung theampo taw kei hong pok hi. 
Job31:21 Thukhenzum ah ka zaw thei tu he in tanga khat ka theam le," 
Job31:22 tuasia ciang ka baante taltan tahen; tuate ka liangko panin kileamkeak tahen. 
Job31:23 Pathian ii daan ka kiitak hu in tuabangin ka ngamta ngei buatu hi. 
Job31:24 Hauna ka muang ngei bua a," 
Job31:25 tua ahibuale ka neisa tungah ka kiphasak ngei bua hi. 
Job31:26 A taang mama ni ahibuale, a hoi mama tha ka bia ngei bua hi." 
Job31:27 Ka khut nam in amate zatak ka pia ngei bua a, amate upat pia tu in lam hong kipialsak ngei ngawl hi." 
Job31:28 Tuabang mawna sia thidaan piak tu ahi hi; tuasia in Vaanglianbelpa Pathian nial hi. 
Job31:29 Ka ngalte ii a thuak ciang ka lungdam ngeingawl hi, tua ahibuale tuasiatna a thuak ciang dik ka sa ngei bua hi;" 
Job31:30 Amate thi natu thungetna taw ka maw ngei bua hi. 
Job31:31 Kei atu na hong sepsak mite theampo in khualmite pha takin vai ka mua tawntung hunlam hong he hi. 
Job31:32 Khualhaw mite ka inn ah tung tu in ka sam a, lampi tungah ka lumsak ngei bua hi." 
Job31:33 Midangte in a mawna a khialna te uh seal tu hanciam a, kei ka hile ka phualseal ngei bua hi." 
Job31:34 Mite ii hong ci tu sia ka kiita ngei bua hi; amate hong ci zazaan tu ka lau bua hi thim om in inn sungah ka omcip ngei bua hi," 
Job31:35 Ka pau teng kuama in ngai ngawl tu ziam? Ka kammal theampo thumaan hi ci in ka kiciam hi. Vaanglianbelpa Pathian in ka kam hong zo tahen. Hong langpante ii hong mawsaknate ka mu thei natu in ki at le 
Job31:36 Ka liangko tungah kiphasak liuliau in ka suang tu a, kumpilukhu khat bangin ka lu tungah ka khu tu hi." 
Job31:37 Pathian tungah ka sep sa theampo ka son tu a, ama mai ah awlmaw ngawlin ka om liuliau tu hi." 
Job31:38 Ka thaw leitang sia ka nguk ahi a, a nei tatakte tung pan ka laksak ahile —" 
Job31:39 tua munah a kiciing ante ne in, tua ante a ciing lothote ka pukthisakin ahile —" 
Job31:40 tuasia ciang zungtaang le mangtaangte a po luangin lopa le lingkungte po tahen. Job ii thu sonte a tawpna hi. 
Job32:1 Job sia ama mawbaang kisa ngawl ahikom pasal thum teng in zo kikik tu hanciam nawn ngawl hi. 
Job32:2 Ahihang a kungah a ding Elihu a kici pasal khat in a thin uukna vei zo nawn ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile Job in ama le ama kitangsakin, Pathian mawsiat hi. (Elihu sia Buz ii suan Barakel ii tapa hi a, Ram ii bee le phung pan hi.)" 
Job32:3 Ama sia Job ii ngualtamh thumte tungah a thin uuk si hi. Amate in Job ii kam a zo natu he thei tuan ngawl hi, tuasia in Pathian sia a khial bang suaksak hi." 
Job32:4 Elihu ahile tualai ah a moibel ahikom ngual theampo ii thuson man dong ngak hi. 
Job32:5 Tua pasal te thum in Job kam a zo thei ngawl a mu ciang ama thin uukin," 
Job32:6 thuson tu hong kipan hi. Kei moi lai a, no haam zo nu hi, tua ahikom ka ngaisutna kong son tu ka lauthawng hi." 
Job32:7 Noma na pau tu uh ma hi a, no uhaamzawte in na ciimna nong hop tu uh ma hi ci in kei le kei ka kici hi." 
Job32:8 Ahihang mihingte kungah pai in ciimna a pia sia Vaanglianbelpa Pathian ii thaa hi. 
Job32:9 Khanghaamna in mihingte ciimsak ngawl a, a maan sia hesak tuan ngawl hi." 
Job32:10 Tua ahikom tu in nong nangai tu uh ka dei hi; ka ngaisutna teng hong sonsak tavun. 
Job32:11 Na thu son uh lai in thinsau takin kong ngai a, tuaciang ciim kammalte na zon uh laitakin kong ngak nginge hi." 
Job32:12 Pha takin kong ngai a, na lel uh ka he hi; Job paunate na nial thei tuan bua uh hi." 
Job32:13 Bangbangin ciimna ka mu zo uh ci thei tu nu ziam? Pathian in Job kam a zo kul tu hi, banghang ziam cile noma in Job na lel uh hi." 
Job32:14 Job in kei hong paupui hi ngawl a, noma hong paupui hi. ahihang no ii zo bangin ka zo ngei buatu hi." 
Job32:15 Job awng, amate in a kammal zak tu he tuan ngawl hi; nang hong zo thei ngawl hi." 
Job32:16 Amate pau ngawl a om laitak ngak kenkon tu khi ziam? Amate tua munah dingin a pau tu he nawn ngawl uh hi. 
Job32:17 Hi ngawl hi, tu in keima in kong zo tu a, ka ngaisutna kong son tu hi." 
Job32:18 Pau ngawlin ka om thei nawn bua hi. Ka pau tute ka iip thei nawn bua hi. 
Job32:19 Pau tu hun nga buathong leng, sapittui thak a dim savun thawl bang in puaktham tu khi hi." 
Job32:20 Thuak zo nawn ngawl khi hi; ka pau tu kul hi. 
Job32:21 Hi kam kinialna sungah pan tuam mun nei ngawl tu khi hi; kuama sialpok ngawl tu khi hi. 
Job32:22 Sialpok dan zongh thiam ngawl khi hi, ngual ka sialpok le Pathian in manlang takin kei daan hong pia tu hi." 
Job33:1 Job awng, tu in ka son tu theampo pha takin hong ngai ta'n." 
Job33:2 Ka thin sungah a om teng son tu in kinging khi hi. 
Job33:3 Ka kammalte theampo ka ci takpi ma hi a, thumaan thutak ka son hi." 
Job33:4 Pathian ii thaa in kei hong vawt a, nuntakna hong pia hi." 
Job33:5 Nong zo thei le hong zo ta'n. Nong nial natu kinging khol in. 
Job33:6 Nang le kei sia Pathian ii muna ah ih kibang a, ih nii in tungman pan hong kivawt hi." 
Job33:7 Tua ahikom kei nong kiitak natu bangma thu om ngawl hi; Nang hong neethaw ngawl tu khi hi. 
Job33:8 Tu in hi teng sia na pau vangiat ka zaak ahi hi: 
Job33:9 “Kei maw ngawl khi hi; a maan ngawl vawt ngawl khi hi. Kei sia mawbanna nei ngawlin mawna khialna pan peng khi hi. 
Job33:10 Ahihang Pathian in kei hong sim nop hu in paulap tu thu mu a, ngalte khat bangin hong vawt hi." 
Job33:11 Ama in ka peang thikkol bulh a, ka tukna ka dianna theampo hong encik hi,” ci ni hi." 
Job33:12 Job awng, ahihang hong son khi hi, nangma khial ni hi. Mihing khat pawpo sangin Pathian lianzaw hi." 
Job33:13 Banghangin eite ii lungkim ngawlnate hong zo ngeingawl hi ci in Pathian mawsiat ni ziam? 
Job33:14 Pathian in thuson kik a, son kikik ahihang ama paunate kuama in nangai ngawl hi." 
Job33:15 Zan lai mihingte mut lanin Pathian in mang le mukholsakna te taw hong paupui hi. 
Job33:16 Pathian in ama ii paunate amate in ngaisak hi, tuaciang kidop natu a son kholnate in amate lausak hi." 
Job33:17 Pathian in amate tungah mawna khialna a vawt nawn ngawl natu le a kiphatsak nawn ngawl natu in pau hi. 
Job33:18 Ama in amate lalsak ngawl tu hi; ama in thina mama panin amate hun hi. 
Job33:19 Pathian in mihingte, natna thuaksakna le a pumpi tung natna dimsakna taw in hil hi." 
Job33:20 Ciina khat in a ankam lim ngawl a, an limbel zongh sungnim huai sa hi." 
Job33:21 A ci a sa theampo kiam a; a ngu nguak bek a om na mu thei hi. 
Job33:22 Ama mithi khua zuan tu in kipapan hi. 
Job33:23 Mite ii a nasep a phawksak kik, vantunglalang khat — Pathian ii vantunglalang a tul sim sung pan khat, amate hu tu in hong pai thei tha tu hi." 
Job33:24 A hesuakna taw vantunglalang in, “Ama suatak in! Ama mithi khua ah a pai tu hi ngawl hi. Ama a suatak natu in hi lai ah a kitatna om hi,” ci tu hi." 
Job33:25 A pumpi moi sua kikin thahat kik tu hi; thu a nget ciang Pathian in zo tu hi; 
Job33:26 ama in lungdamna taw Pathian bia tu hi. Pathian in ama atu in na tuatuamte a maan in lemh kik tu hi. 
Job33:27 Ama in mihonte tungah, “Maw zo khi hi. A maan bang seam ngawl ka hihang, Pathian in hong khoaikhe hi." 
Job33:28 Mithi khua ah ka pai ngawl natu in ama in hong keamcing a, ka nungta lai hi” ci tu hi." 
Job33:29 Pathian in hite theampo seam kikik hi," 
Job33:30 Ama in mihing khat ii nuntakna hun a, tuaciang nuntak sung lungnopna pia hi;" 
Job33:31 Tu in Job awng, ka son tu sia hong ngai ta'n; thim khipkhep in a, kei hong pausak ta'n." 
Job33:32 Ahihang son nop khat po na nei le tuasia za nuam khi hi; lungdam takin maan hi ci ngam tu khi hi. 
Job33:33 Ahihang tuabangin na son buale, thim om in hong ngai ta'n, na ciim natu zia hong hilcian tu khi hi." 
Job34:1 No pasalte ciim mama a, pil mama nu hi; tu in ka son sia hong ngai tavun." 
Job34:2  
Job34:3 An na tep uh ciang a lim sia he nu hi, ahizong ciim kammalte na zaak uh ciang he ngawl nu hi." 
Job34:4 Hi sia eima ii khensat tu bek hi. 
Job34:5 Job in mawbanna nei bong, Pathian in kei, thumaan hong danh hi." 
Job34:6 Ama in dongh a, “Banghangin leilot in khial khi hi ci thei tu khi ziam? Kei sia thithei natu za in liam khi hi, ahihang mawna nei ngawl khi hi,” ci hi." 
Job34:7 Hi pasal pa Job bang mi khat pawpo na mu ngei uh ziam? ama in Pathian zatakna lak ngeingawl hi. 
Job34:8 Ama in misiate taw kithawl le mi mawte taw vaa kot nuamsa hi. 
Job34:9 Ama in Pathian ii deina zui tu in hanciam sia a phatna om ngei peuma bo ci hi. 
Job34:10 No a tel thei pasalte awng, hong ngai tavun! Vaanglianbelpa Pathian in a maan ngawl naseam tu ziam?" 
Job34:11 Ama in mite a sepna bangin tel pia a, amate tungah a kiphu a kilawm bangin vawt hi." 
Job34:12 Vaanglianbelpa Pathian in siatna vawt ngawl hi; ama in kuama tungah thumaan ngawlin seam ngeingawl hi. 
Job34:13 Pathian in a vaangletna ngualdang khat tung pan nga ziam? Ama leitung uk tu in khat po in koi ziam? 
Job34:14 Pathian in nuntakna husan sia la kik le," 
Job34:15 tuasia ciang a nungta theampo thi tu a leivui suak kik tu hi. 
Job34:16 Na ciim uh le tu in kei thuson hong ngai tavun. 
Job34:17 A thutang Pathian ningkhiin nu ziam? Ama in thumaan thu ngaimaw sa nu ziam? 
Job34:18 Pathian in kumpite le ngamukte sia a nginat ngawl ciang ahibuale a seksol ciangin ningkhiin hi. 
Job34:19 Ama in ngamukte sangah pang ngawl hi, mizawngte puavawk a, a haute maipha pia tuan ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile mi theampo ama ii bitphua sa vive hi." 
Job34:20 Mihing khat sia zanin thakhat thu in thithei hi. Pathian in mihingte vaatvawkin amate bo hi; a thahatte zongh ol takin ama in thatlum hi. 
Job34:21 Ama in ih kalsuanna theampo encik hi. 
Job34:22 Mimaw khat Pathian muna pan a seal zo tu khuazing om ngawl hi. 
Job34:23 Eite pai in ama ii thukhenna ih thuak tu hun Pathian in ciangtan kul sa ngawl hi. 
Job34:24 Ama in lampuite heam in ngualdang taw a laih natu in, thu katna, thusitna khat kul sa ngawl hi." 
Job34:25 Banghang ziam cile ama in amate sep sia he hi, ama in zanin amate lawnthal a sucip hi." 
Job34:26 Ama in mi theampo ii mu theina munah mi mawte daan pia hi," 
Job34:27 banghang ziam cile amate in ama nung zui nawn ngawlin a thupiakte theampo thusim ngawl uh hi. 
Job34:28 Amate in mizawngte sia zawthawk thu taw ausak in Pathian kosak hi, tuaciang Pathian in hu ngenin a au nate za hi." 
Job34:29 Pathian in bangma vawt ngawl tu in a khensat hial le zong kuama in ama mawsak thei ngawl hi. Ama in a mai seal le eite ih cimaw tu hi. 
Job34:30 Mi a neng niam Pathian selte ii amate a uk ngawl natu in minamte ii vawt thei bangma om ngawl hi. 
Job34:31 Job awng, na mawnate Pathian tungah pualaak zo ni ziam, tuaciang na maw kik ngawl natu in kamciam pia zo ni ziam?" 
Job34:32 Na khialnate hong lak natu in Pathian tungah ngen zo ni ziam? siatna vawt a kheal tu in na thukim zo ziam? 
Job34:33 Pathian sepna sia na nial nungsang na dei bang hong vawtsak tu muangmaw thei lai ni ziam? Nangma ii khensat tu hi a, kei khensat tu hi ngawl hi; tu in na ngaisutna ko hong son ta'n." 
Job34:34 Mihing khuangaisun thei khat pawpo in thukim tatak tu hi; tuaciang ka pauna hong za miciim khat in 
Job34:35 Job sia tel ngawl vai taw papau a, a pauna po khiakna nei vaset zongh om ngawl hi, ci tu hi." 
Job34:36 Job ii pauna theampo ngaisun vun; ama misia khat bangin a pau hunlam na mu tu uh hi. 
Job34:37 Pathian a leedona taw a mawna a khialna belap hi; eite theampo ii mai ah ama in Pathian nunau hi. 
Job35:1 Job awng, Pathian muna ah maw ka baang bua hi na ci tu sia maan ngawl hi," 
Job35:2  
Job35:3 tua ahibuale Pathian tungah, “Ka mawna in nang bang hong tatsak ziam? Ka maw ngawl ciang bang phattuamna nga khi ziam?” ci a na dok tu kilawm ngawl hi." 
Job35:4 Nangma le na lawmte kam zongh kong zo tu hi. 
Job35:5 Van ento in! meeikaaite bangza in saang ziam! 
Job35:6 Na maw le tua in Pathian sia bangma tatsak ngawl hi. A maan ngawl tamvei na vawtna in ama bang a tatsak tu ziam? 
Job35:7 Thutang mama na hina taw in Pathian na hu ziam? Pathian in nang tung pan kitaangsap nei ngawl hi. 
Job35:8 Na maw na khial hu in a thuak sia na mipuite hi a, phatna na vawtna in amate hu hi." 
Job35:9 Mihingte a kinenniam ciang tau a; a hun tu in amate in khat po ko uh hi. 
Job35:10 Ahihang in amate in a haksatbel hun sungin lametna a pia amate a bitphuapa Pathian kung zuan ngawl uh hi. 
Job35:11 Amate in eite hong ciim sak, nganhing ahibuale vacim khat pawpo sangin a ciim zaw in hong vawt Pathian kung zuan ngawl uh hi." 
Job35:12 Amate hu ngenin au ahihang Pathian in zo ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile amate a kiphasak misiate ahi hi." 
Job35:13 Amate ii aukeakna zongh a lui thawthong hi; Vaanglianbelpa Pathian in amate mu ngawlin za ngawl hi. 
Job35:14 Job awng, Pathian mu thei bong ci ni hi; ahihang thinsau takin ngak in — na vai sia ama mai ah om nginge hi." 
Job35:15 Pathian in daan pia ngawl a, mawna zongh thusim ngawl hi, ci in ngaisun ni hi." 
Job35:16 Na papau hang phattuamna om ngawl hi; na thuson teng mama a tel ngawl na hi sia kilangh hi. 
Job36:1 Na thin sausak in a, Pathian taangin ka paunate tawmvei hong ngai lai ta'n." 
Job36:2  
Job36:3 Ka heakna zai hi; kei hong bitphuapa Pathian sia thutang a hina a lak tu in ka heak teng ka zangh tu hi. 
Job36:4 Nang tungah kong sawl khial bua hi; na mai ah a ciim takpi mi khat na mu hi. 
Job36:5 Pathian bangza in hat ziam! Ama in kuama nomu ngawl hi; Ama ii a tel ngawl bangma om ngawl hi. 
Job36:6 Ama in mawneite nungtasak tan ngawl a, mizawngte tungah a khaikimin vawt tawntung hi." 
Job36:7 Ama in thutangte sungsia hi; kumpite bangin amate in uksak a, a tawntungin kipatoaisak hi." 
Job36:8 Ahihang mite sia a sep a vawt hu in thikkol bul a thuak le," 
Job36:9 Pathian in amate kiphatsakna le a mawnate a lak ahi hi. 
Job36:10 Siatna pan a kikheal natu, a kidop natu in a sonkholte amate in ngaisak hi." 
Job36:11 Amate in Pathian thu ni in ama atu na a seam uh le a khan tawntung thinnuam in nuamsa tu uh hi. 
Job36:12 Tuabang in a ngamta bua uh le, amate sia a tel ngawl ma in thi tu a, tuaciang lui kaantan in mithi khua zuan tu uh hi." 
Job36:13 Pathian selte sia thin uuk tawntung hi, daan a kipiak ciang zongin, huna a nga natu in thungen ngawl uh hi." 
Job36:14 Amate khanthi uh hi, a nuntakna uh maizumna taw bo hi." 
Job36:15 Ahihang Pathian in mihingte ngim thuakna tungtawnin hil a, thinngimna sia a mit kihon natu in zangh hi." 
Job36:16 Pathian in nang ngimna sung pan hong la khia a, tuaciang ngammuangin hong lungnuamsak a, na sabuai tungah anlim nawno hong kilui veuvo hi." 
Job36:17 Ahihang tu in nang, na kilawm bangin daan hong kipia hi." 
Job36:18 Sumnguk neaknate ii na theamsak ngawl natu ahibuale haunate ii lam hong pialsak ngawl natu in kidawm in. 
Job36:19 Hu ngen a auna in bangma a pha hong sua ngawl tu hi; na thatang theampo in tu in nang hong hu thei ngawl hi. 
Job36:20 Minamte lalcip natu hun, tua zan hong thet tu ngakla heak in." 
Job36:21 Siatna sangah na kihei ngawl natu in kidawm in; tuasia pan na kikep natu in ngim thuakna hong kipuak hi. 
Job36:22 Pathian ii vaangletna sia bangza in lian ci sia ciamtee in; Ama sia sya theampo sung pan a lianbel hi. 
Job36:23 Kuama in Pathian munah bang seam tu ci in sawl thei ngawl hi, ahibuale siatna vawt hi ci in kuama in mawsak thei ngawl hi." 
Job36:24 A nasep tungtaang ah ama kipok tawntung hi; nang zongh ama na pok kul tu hi. 
Job36:25 A kuama po in ama sepsate mu uh hi; ahihang eite in ih ngal et thei bek hi. 
Job36:26 Ama ii letna a cingin ih he thei bua hi; ahibuale ama kumte ih sim thei bua hi. 
Job36:27 Lei pan tui la in nguamalte a suaksak sia Pathian hi. 
Job36:28 Ama in meeikaaite panin mihing nam theampo atu nguazusak hi. 
Job36:29 Meeikaaite koi bangin kikhiin a, ahibuale Pathian teenna van lenglet in bangbangin vanto ziam ci sia kuama in he ngawl hi." 
Job36:30 Ama in van theampo lenglet in khualengsak a, ahihang tuipi thuknate zing veve hi." 
Job36:31 Hisia in ama ii mite a vaak zia le an tam mama a nguan zia ahi hi. 
Job36:32 Ama in khualeng sia a khut taw zamh a tuaciang a tuunna mun santak khasak hi. 
Job36:33 Vanto in vuipi nguapi hong pai tu taangko a, ngannote in hong pai hi ci in he uh hi." 
Job37:1 Vuipi suangval in nasia takin ka thin hong patausak hi. 
Job37:2 Note theampo awng, Pathian ii aw, a kam sung pan hong pai vanto awnging ngai vun." 
Job37:3 Ama in khualeng sia vanpi kaantan in leimong khat pan mong khat dongah puak hi. 
Job37:4 Tua zawkciang a vaanglian vanto awnging ahi ama hawkna aw kiza a, tua hun sung teng khualeng tee vazal hi." 
Job37:5 Pathian thupiakna taw nalamdangte, ih tel zawk ngawl a tumdang nate piang hi." 
Job37:6 Ama in vuuk, lei ah a kia tu in thu pia a, nguatui tam mama zusak hi." 
Job37:7 Ama in eite nasep hong tawlngasak a; ama vawt theite eite hong lak hi. 
Job37:8 Ngamsate in amate ii kua tek zuan uh hi. 
Job37:9 Suangval vui sia thangsang pan hong va a, hong vut vaval khuasik sia saksang pan hong pai hi." 
Job37:10 Pathian ii husan in tuite khalsak a, vuukkhal suaksak hi." 
Job37:11 Khualeng sia meeikaai sung pan taang vazai hi," 
Job37:12 Pathian ii deina bang in tuate kikhiin uh hi. Simleitung mun theampo ah tuate in Pathian thupiak theampo seam uh hi. 
Job37:13 Pathian in lei kawtsak tu in nguatui puak hi; mihingte daan a pia tu ahibuale a deisakna lak tu in ama in nguazusak thei hi. 
Job37:14 Job awng, tawmvei tawlnga in ngai in; Pathian ii a lamdang a nasepte ngaisun in." 
Job37:15 Pathian in thupia in meei sung pan khualeng a piansak zia na he ziam? 
Job37:16 Koi bangin meeite van ah kikhaangin, Pathian ii a lamdang a nasep thiamna na he ziam?" 
Job37:17 He ngawl ni hi, thangsang vui hong va in ngamsung a nawk ciang sa saa in ngim thuak bek ni hi." 
Job37:18 Pathian in van zalh in tua sia thik taat sa bang, a sak in a vawt lai, nang hu thei ni ziam?" 
Job37:19 Pathian tungah ka son tu uhte hong hil ta'n; kote thinsung ah bangma om ngawl hi; son tu bangma nei ngawl khu hi. 
Job37:20 Pathian taw kipaupui tu ngen ngawl tu khi hi; banghangin kei hong lalsak natu hunpha pia tu khi ziam? 
Job37:21 Tu in van a khuavak tee vanai hi; tuasia ih et tu in taang leih hi, tuaciang van sia vui in muut thiang zo hi." 
Job37:22 A taang khamh ci khat saksang ah kimu hi, tuaciang Pathian ii vaangletna in zatakna taw kidim a hong lausak hi." 
Job37:23 Pathian ii vaangletna lian mama ahikom ama ih neak thei bua hi; eite taw ih kizopna ah ama thutang thumaan hi. 
Job37:24 Tua hi a, mihing theampo in ama a zatak, a kiitak uh sia lamdang ngawl hi, tuaciang ama in a kiciimsakte a awlmawk ngawl sia zongh lamdang ngawl hi." 
Job38:1 Tua zawkciang vuipi suangval sung pan Topa in Job paupui hi. 
Job38:2 Na heak ngawlna le khiakna om ngawl na kammalte taw kei ciimna nong dok sia nang akua ni ziam? 
Job38:3 Tu in ding tang in a, kong thudokte hong zo ta'n." 
Job38:4 Simlei ka vawt lai in nang na om ziam? He mama na kisa le tua thu kei hong son ta'n. 
Job38:5 Leitung letna bangcia pha tu cisia akua in khensat ziam? Akua in a tungah pikhau kai in tee ziam? Hite theampo hong zo thei tu ni ziam? 
Job38:6 Leitung anang khuamte, bang in len ziam? Simlei ii a king suangpi sia akua in khia ziam?" 
Job38:7 Tua ni vaktuung in aksite lasa khawmin, vantung mite lungdam in au uh hi." 
Job38:8 Lei sung pan tuipi a puathap lai in tua tuipi khaktan tu in akua in kongpite khak ziam? 
Job38:9 meeikaai taw tuipi a tuam le tuasia khuazing taw a tuam pa sia keima khi hi. 
Job38:10 Tuipi atu in ngamngi khat ka vawt a, a kongpi kikalhte nungah ka keam hi." 
Job38:11 Keima in tuasia ii munah, “Hi ciang bek pai in, pai leet heak in! Hi sungah a thahat, na tuihualte a tawlngak kul tu hi” ka ci hi." 
Job38:12 Job awng, na khan sung theampo ah ni khat beak khua a vak tu in thu na pia ngei ziam?" 
Job38:13 Leitang a zamh tu le a pummat tu, mi ngilote a bukna pan a thingkeak tu in khuavak tungah thu na pia ziam?" 
Job38:14 Puan kithepte le tungman tungah tazeik khet sia a kilangh bangin sun nitaang in mualte le ngamkuamte kilanghsak hi. 
Job38:15 Sun khuavak sia mi ngilote atu taang leih a, amate ii ngongtat natu te khak hi." 
Job38:16 Tuipi thuknate sung cikte ah na om ngei ziam? Tuipi liante ii tawdap lei ah na vak ngei ziam? 
Job38:17 Khuazing na mithi khua a cing kongpite hong lak khat po a om ngei ziam? 
Job38:18 Simlei bangza in lian cisia ngaisutna khat pawpo na nei ziam? na he le hong zo ta'n. 
Job38:19 Khuavak koisung pan hong pai a, khuazing ii a kipatna naak sia bang ziam ci in na he ziam?" 
Job38:20 Tuate tungah bang tan khuala pai tu cisia na lak thei ziam? ahibuale tuate na heak kiksak thei tu ziam? 
Job38:21 Tuabang hi thei tu in kong um takpi hi, nang na khan haam mama zo a, leitung a kivawt lai in om zo na hi hang hi!" 
Job38:22 Vuuk le ngial ka kholna mun ah na haw ngei ziam? 
Job38:23 Tuate ngim nga hun le ngal kido hunte atu in ka kinginna hi. 
Job38:24 Ni a suatona mun ah, ahibuale nisuana vui hong vakna munah na om ngei ziam?" 
Job38:25 A kua in nguatui hong luan natu in luam to a, akua in vanto keakkiat natu in lam sialsak ziam?" 
Job38:26 A kua in kuama ten ngawlna munah nguazusak ziam? 
Job38:27 A kua in lopa meen natu in leiko, lei dangtaakte tuibuak ziam?" 
Job38:28 Nguatui ahibuale daaitui in pa a nei ziam? 
Job38:29 Vuuk le thuamluak ii nu akua ziam? 
Job38:30 Tui sia suang a suaksak le tuipi maitang a khalsak sia akua ziam? 
Job38:31 Pleiades aksite na sawm khawm thei ziam? ahibuale Orion aksi a sawm khawm khaute na suut thei tu ziam? 
Job38:32 Aksite hun khat zawk hun khat lam na pui thei ziam? Tuaciang Bear aksi lian le Bear aksi no tungah lam na lak thei ziam? 
Job38:33 Vante a uk upadi te na he ziam, tuaciang tuate leitung ah na zanghsak thei tu ziam?" 
Job38:34 Meeikaaite tungah au in nang tui hong tuamsak nguatui a suak tu in thu na pia thei tu ziam? 
Job38:35 Tuaciang khualeng a taang vazak tu in thupia lete tuasia nang kungah hong pai in, “Nong sawl babang hong sepsak tong” hong ci tu ziam?" 
Job38:36 Nile ngun bang hun ciang pawm tu ci sia akua in vakaangte hil ziam? ahibuale nguazuk tu hunlam akua in aklui hil ziam? 
Job38:37 Leivuite leitangh a suaksak ngua a zuk natu in meeite simin a lumlet thei ciimna kicing sia akua in nei ziam? 
Job38:38  
Job38:39 Tawpite a leihawngte sungah a buk ciang a neak tu an na zonsak ziam," 
Job38:40 tuaciang a ngilkial tawpi note an ngakin a kuate sungah a lup laitak, a lung na kimsak ziam?" 
Job38:41 Va-ak ngilkialte a len kawkoai ciang, a note andu in kei hong ko in a au ciang an a vaak sia akua ziam?" 
Job39:1 Sathakte bang hunin suak cisia na he ziam? Sangaite a no sua tu ngakin na en ngei ziam? 
Job39:2 Tuate in a no bang tanvei paai ci sia na he ziam? Tuate sua hun tu na he ziam? 
Job39:3 A no suak tu in lei ah a baw suk tu hun le a note leitung ngam sungah a tatpui tu hun na he ziam? 
Job39:4 A note duisung ah khangin a thahat uh hi; amate paikhia in heak kik nawn ngawl uh hi. 
Job39:5 Ngam laate akua in suatakna pia ziam? Akua in thazau in, vakzausak ziam?" 
Job39:6 A inn tu in senneal ngam ka pia a tuate ci al zaangtam ah ka teangsak hi. 
Job39:7 Tuate awsana khuapite taw a kikhualana ah om uh a, kuama in zualin naseamsak thei ngawl hi." 
Job39:8 Mualte sia tuate ii kivaak natu a tatna mun hi a, tua munah a neak tu in lohing pawpo zong uh hi." 
Job39:9 Ngam khuital khat in nang na hong sepsak tu ziam? Na nganbuk sungah zan a ngiak nuam tu ziam? 
Job39:10 Tuate khat khaukhii in lo na thosak thei tu ziam? Ahibuale na lo sungah lei kalthapna thik ha na kaisak thei tu ziam? 
Job39:11 A thahatna lian, na suang thei tu ziam, nang ii nasep lian a seam tu in na muangmaw ngam tu ziam?" 
Job39:12 Na anlaakte hong puaksak tu le na taang cilna phual panin antangte hong kaikhopsak tu in na muangmaw ziam? 
Job39:13 Kalaoh vacim khat ii thaphil sia bangza in manlang ziam! Ahihang kalaoh vacim sia hilniang vacimlian khat bangin leang thei ngawl hi. 
Job39:14 Kalaoh vacim puite in a tuuite lei sa ii a lumsak tu in lei ah nusia hi. 
Job39:15 A tuuite sia peang khat po in siiktham thei ahibuale ngamsa khat po in tamhsak thei tu cisia phawk ngawl hi. 
Job39:16 Tua a tuuite ama tuui hi ngawl bang phetin ngamta in, a thasaan nate a lui thawthong a sua tu sia zongh thinbot ngawl hi." 
Job39:17 A mawmaw sak, ciimna a pia ngawl sia keima khi hi." 
Job39:18 Ahihang ama a tai ciang siphu khat le a tung to khat pawpo sia nuisan bek hi. 
Job39:19 Job awng, siphute thahatsak in, a ngawng mul kaai niingniangte a pia sia nangma na hi ziam?" 
Job39:20 Khaumaw bangin amate na kipeaksak ziam? tuaciang a naak thinna taw mihingte na lausak ziam? 
Job39:21 Tuate in ngamkuam sungah lawp takin lei khuat hi; a tha nei za taw ngal kisimna phual del uh hi. 
Job39:22 Tuate in launa a cisia he ngawl uh hi, tuaciang namsau in heak kiksak thei ngawl hi." 
Job39:23 A tung a tote ii ngalhiam kente, nging lialua in nisa sungah tee vazial hi." 
Job39:24 Siphute patauna taw a ci liingin mai ah tai uh hi; lemle kitum ciangin ding thong thei ngawl hi. 
Job39:25 Lemle kitum simin a naak uh thing hi; ngal kisimna mun nai a thet ma in ngal ngimnam za thei a, tuaciang tuate in ngalkapbute ii au in a thupiakte za uh hi." 
Job39:26 Muthi khat in thangsang zuan tu in a tha a phalh ciang, a len thei natu sia nang tung pan hong sin ziam?" 
Job39:27 Muvanlai khat in mualsaang dawnte ah bu a tom nop ciang nangma thupiak tu hong ngak ziam? 
Job39:28 Tuasia in a saangbel suangpite tungah a bu vawt a, tuaciang suanghiamte a kulh in mang hi." 
Job39:29 Tua mun panin ama in a nai, a khuala ah bang khat po that in a neak tu a om ziam ci in encik hi." 
Job39:30 Sathite kiimkot ah muvanlaite kikhawm a, muvanlai note in a chi dawn uh hi." 
Job40:1 Job awng, nang in Vaanglianbelpa Pathian thato ni hi; tu in tawlnga tu ni ziam ahibuale a kam zo tu ni ziam?" 
Job40:2  
Job40:3 Topa awng, a mawmawthuai kam pau khi hi. Bang kong zo thei tu ziam? Bangma dang ka son nawn buatu hi." 
Job40:4  
Job40:5 Ka pau tu za sangin tamzaw pau zo khi hi. 
Job40:6 Tuasia ciang vuipi suangval sung panin Topa in Job khatvei paupui kik hi. 
Job40:7 Tu in dingtang in a, kong dok thute hong zo ta'n." 
Job40:8 Kei thutang ngawl hi hong ci nuam in hanciam a — kei a khial hong tangsak a nang le nang kimaansak nuam ni ziam? 
Job40:9 Nang keima bangin hat ni ziam? Na aw keima vanto aw bangin na ngingsak thei ziam? 
Job40:10 Tuabang ahile na vaang neina le na kisuantaak na taw ding in; nang le nang vaangletna le minthanna puan silh in. 
Job40:11 A kiphasakte en in; na thin uukna lak in a, amate kiniamkhiaksak in." 
Job40:12 Hi hi, amate en in a, khiasuk in; mi ngilote a dinna munah sucip in." 
Job40:13 A vekpi in lei sungah phum in; mithi khua ah heencip in. 
Job40:14 Tuasia ciang nang hong pok masa phit tu sia keima hi tu khi hi, nangma ma in zawna nga hi, kong ci tu hi." 
Job40:15 Behemoth nganhing pui sia en in; ama ka bitphua a, tuaciang nangma kong bitphua hi. Ama in khuipui khat bangin lopa ne hi," 
Job40:16 ahizong a pumpi sungah bang thahatna om a, a sangol sungah bang vaangletna om ziam!" 
Job40:17 A mei sia cedar thingkung bangin dingto a, a peang thangolte hat hi." 
Job40:18 A ngute taau bangin khoh a, a peangte thikpum bang ahi hi." 
Job40:19 Nganhing nungta theampo sung pan a lamdangbel ma hi! Ama a Bitphuapa bek in ama zo thei hi. 
Job40:20 Ngamsate kimaina mualte tungah ama ii kivaak natu lopa po hi. 
Job40:21 Lingkungte nuai ah ama lumin, nawng sung pumpate kawm ah buu hi." 
Job40:22 Ama sia luihui a po lingkungte le pakngiamte in a lim bealhsak hi. 
Job40:23 Ama in nguntui luang vahawn sia kiita ngawl hi; ama Jordan nguntui in a maitang a the ciang om hiithiat lel hi. 
Job40:24 Akua in a mittawsakin man thei tu ziam? Ahibuale akua in thaang sungah a naak awksak thei tu ziam? 
Job41:1 Leviathan awle sia ngasa tangthaakna taw na man thei tu ziam? ahibuale khau taw a leei na khii thei tu ziam? 
Job41:2 A naakphe khau thun thei tu ni ziam? ahibuale a khangute pailet in thikkoai bul thei tu ni ziam? 
Job41:3 Ama in hong thaa ta'n ci in hong ngen tu ziam? Nang tungah hesuak hong ngen tu ziam? 
Job41:4 Ama in nangma taw thukimna vawtin a tawntungin na na a seam tu in hong kamciam tu ziam? 
Job41:5 Na naseam numeite nuizak natu khat in vacim khat khoai bangin ama khau na khi tu ziam? 
Job41:6 Ngasa paaite in a man a tuuk tu ziam? Sumzuakte in a zuak tu in a sa sem tu ziam? 
Job41:7 Ngasa matna teite taw a vun tung dimin ahibuale ngasa khawna teite taw a lu na hol let thei tu ziam? 
Job41:8 Khatvei ama tham lete bangma hun na tham kik nuam nawn buatu hi; na kidona na mangil ngei buatu hi! 
Job41:9 Leviathan awle a mu pawpo lau in lei ah puk hi. 
Job41:10 Ama a thin uuk ciang kiitakhuai mama hi; a mai ah kuama ding ngam ngawl tu hi. 
Job41:11 Ama ngalvawt a simin, bangma a tat thei ngawl akua om tu ziam? Tuabang ahithei tu leitung theampo ah kuama om ngawl tu hi." 
Job41:12 Leviathan awle ii peangte thu le ama ii letna le hatna thu na tungah hong sonsak ta'n. 
Job41:13 A puanpuasilh sia kuama in leamkeak zo ngawl hi, ahibuale a ngaldalna a silh sia kuama in sunlet thei ngawl hi." 
Job41:14 A kiitakhuai hate a po iim-iam ama ii kha ngu sia akua in bal thei tu ziam? 
Job41:15 A cingzaang teng ah a hawlipte a ngui in kithuap cinten a, suang bangin sak hi." 
Job41:16 Tua a hawlipte khat le khat ngat takin kimatcip bikbek a, a kawm pan vui zong tum zo ngawl hi." 
Job41:17 Tuate theampo kho takin kimatcip ahikom bangma in khentham thei ngeingawl hi. 
Job41:18 Ama a naak thing in hetchia a law ciang khualeng vazal a, a mittangte ni suaktuung bangin tee hi." 
Job41:19 A kam sung pan meikuang leng a, mei eak leang vazai hi." 
Job41:20 Beal khat nuai pan lopa kaangh khu suak bangin a naak sung pan meikhu pusuak hi. 
Job41:21 A husan in mei piangsak a; a kam sung pan meikuang lengto hi. 
Job41:22 A ngawng thahat mama ahikom ama taw a kisi peuma lau vadil hi. 
Job41:23 Ama ii vun tungah a nip mun om ngawl a; a kiseak zo ngawl thik bangin a vun sak hi. 
Job41:24 A suang lungtang in kiitak nei ngawl a, a tam thei ngawl an ngoaina suang khat bangin sak hi." 
Job41:25 Ama a thawto ciang a hat belte zongh in kiita a; lau in cimaw uh hi. 
Job41:26 Ama a liamsua thei namsau om ngawl hi; ama a nasak thei tei ahibuale thaltang ahibuale teipalh om ngawl hi. 
Job41:27 Ama atu in thik sia taangphaw ko bangin ngeam a, taau sia thingmuat bangin nip hi." 
Job41:28 Ama a taisak thei thaltang om ngawl hi; ama a kidenna suangte taangphaw bekte taw kibang hi. 
Job41:29 Ama atu in khetbuk khat sia taangphaw bek khat bang bek hi a, pasalte ii tei taw a khaw uh ciang ama nui hi." 
Job41:30 A ngilvun taalte leibeal tamhbek kiilte bang hi a; tuate in taangcilna leang khat bangin lei buanna sautham hi. 
Job41:31 Ama in tuipi sia tuiso bangin kiloksak a, tuaciang sathau beal khat bangin phuansak hi." 
Job41:32 Ama paina sa lampi sia taang a, tuaciang tuipi tui sia a kaang phuan suaksak hi." 
Job41:33 Leitung ah ama taw a teengat tu bangma om ngawl hi; ama sia kiitak a nei ngawl nganhing khat ahi hi. 
Job41:34 Nganhing kiphasak belte ngawngawn ama in nomu hi; ama sia ngamsa theampo ii kumpi ahi hi. 
Job42:1 Tua zawkciang Job in Topa kam zo hi. 
Job42:2 Topa awng, vaangletna theampo na nei hi; na vawt nop theampo na vawt theina thu ka he hi." 
Job42:3 Bangma tel ngawl pi in na ciimna kong dok ngamna thu taw kisai in nong dongh hi. Keima in ka tel ngawl thute, kei heak tu in lamdangin a nasia leih thute a son ka hi hi." 
Job42:4 Na pau laitakin kong ngai tu le nong doknate kong zo tu hanciam in nong sawl hi. 
Job42:5 Hun bosa sungah ngual ii hong son teng bekma ka he hi, ahihang tu in ka mittangte taw ma in nang kong mu zo hi." 
Job42:6 Tua ahikom ka pau sa theampo tungtaang ka maizum a, kisik kik in leivui sung le vut sungah ka om hi." 
Job42:7 Topa in Job a paupuina teng a man zawkciang ama in Eliphaz tungah, “Nangma le na lawmte nii tungah ka thin uuk hi, banghang ziam cile, kei huvau ka naseampa Job ii son bangin note in thumaan thutak na son bua uh hi." 
Job42:8 Tu in khuital sali le tuutal sali Job kungah paipui vun a, noma atu in sangaw biakpiakna in tuate pia vun. Job in no atu thu hong ngetsak tu hi, tuaciang ama ii thungetna ka zo tu a, na kilawm uh bangin kong maimawlsak buatu hi. Ama ii son bangin kei huvau thumaan na son bua uh hi,” ci hi." 
Job42:9 Eliphaz, Bildad le Zophar te in Topa ii amate sep tu a sawl bangin a sep uh ciang Topa in Job thungetna zo hi." 
Job42:10 Tuaciang Job in ama ii a lawmte thum atu thu a ngetsak zawkciang Topa in Job sia nuamsasak kik a, nidangin a nei ngeiza ii a zaa nii pia hi." 
Job42:11 Job ii a suapui pate, a suapuinumeite le, a ngualtamh luite theampo ama inn ah hawin ama taw anneakpoai vawt uh hi. Amate in Topa ii ama tung a tunsak ngimnate theampo hu in khuangai pui in heeneam uh hi. Amate khat simin sum pawlkhat le khamh khutzungbu khat tek ama pia uh hi" 
Job42:12 Topa in Job sia a khaksang a nuntak sungin a masa a nuntakna sangin thupha tamzaw lai pia hi. Job in tuu 14000, kalaoh 6000, khui 2000, le la 1000 nei hi." 
Job42:13 Ama sia tapa salite le tanu thumte ii pa suak hi. 
Job42:14 Ama in a tanu lianbel sia Jemimah, a niina sia Keziah, tuaciang a nobel sia Keren Hapuch ci in min phuak hi." 
Job42:15 Leitung bup ah Job ii tanute bangin a mealpha numei dang om ngawl hi. A pa in a suapui pate a piak bangma in a tanute ngamh khensak hi. 
Job42:16 Job in hisia zawkciang a tute le a tu selawnte a mu tu dongin kum 140 khansau in nungta hi. 
Job42:17 Tuaciang ama kum haam tatakin thi hi. 
Psalms1:1 Mihing lungdam ih ci te in mihing ngilote ii ngaisut piakna a nialte, mawneite zia a zui ngawlte, Pathian ii zak ngawlte taw a kizom ngawlte ahi hi." 
Psalms1:2 Amate in Topa Thukham zuina sungah lungnopna mu zaw uh a, tua thute sun taw zan taw ngaisusun uh hi." 
Psalms1:3 Amate in luihui ah a po thingkungte bang hi a, a nga hunin nga a, a teete a vul bua hi. A sep a vawt theampo a zo uh hi." 
Psalms1:4 Ahizong mihing ngilote in tuabang hi vet ngawl a, vui ii letkeak taangphaw taw kibang uh hi." 
Psalms1:5 Mawneite Pathian in puavawk tu a, Pathian ii mite sung pan a tuamin koi tu hi." 
Psalms1:6 Thutangte Topa in lamlakin dal a, ahizong a ngilote sia amate lalcip natu munah a pai uh hi." 
Psalms2:1 Banghangin minamte in leedo sawm thong ziam? Banghangin mihingte in a thimthaam tupnate vawt ziam? 
Psalms2:2 A kumpite in leedo a, a ukpite taw Topa le a teal kumpipa a thimthamin langpan khawm uh hi." 
Psalms2:3 Amate in “Hong ukna pan ei le ei kisuatak tawng i, hong letna vawk keak tawng” ci uh hi." 
Psalms2:4 Vantung ah a om ama tokhum tung pan Topa nui a, amate ii a ngina ngawl ngealnate nunau lel hi." 
Psalms2:5 Tuaciang ama in thin uukna taw amate kidop natu thupia a, a thinsona hangin amate patausak uh hi." 
Psalms2:6 Ama in “Ka mual thiangtho Zion ah ka kumpipa ka koi zo hi,” ci hi." 
Psalms2:7 Kumpipa in “ Topa thu khensatna son tu khi hi,” ci hi. Ama in kei tungah hi bangin hong ci hi, “Nang sia ka tapa na hi hi, tuni in na pa ka suak zo hi.”" 
Psalms2:8 Hong ngen ta'n, minamte theampo kong pia tu a, leitung bup nangma aa hi tu hi." 
Psalms2:9 Nangma in amate thikmol taw na veltham tu a, leibeal tam bek bangin amate na sutham tu hi." 
Psalms2:10 Tu in no kumpi te awng, hi kidop natu thu hong ngai tavun. No leitung ukte awng, hi thu tel tavun." 
Psalms2:11 Kiitakna taw Topa ii na seam vun a," 
Psalms2:12 ama mai ah liinna taw kun vun; tua ahibuale ama thin uuk vat tu a, thakhat thu in na thi tu uh hi. Ama a bealte in a lungdamte ahi uh hi." 
Psalms3:1 Ngal tam ka nei lawlawm hi, Topa awng, kei hong langpan tam lawlawm hi." 
Psalms3:2 Amate in kei thu son a, “Pathian in ama hu ngawl tu hi” hong ci uh hi." 
Psalms3:3 Ahihang, Topa awng, nang sia a tawntungin launa pan hong dal ka lum na hi hi. Nangma in zawna nong pia a, thinletna taw nong dimh kik hi." 
Psalms3:4 Hu ngenin Topa ka biakpui a ama in a mual thiangtho panin hong zo hi. 
Psalms3:5 Lum in ka mu a, zankhuateakin Topa in hong dal hi." 
Psalms3:6 Ka kiimkot pan hong uumci ka ngal tul tampite ka kiita bua hi. 
Psalms3:7 Hong pai ta'n, Topa awng hong hun ta'n, ka Pathian awng, nangma in ka ngalte theampo daan na pia a, kei hong natsak natu vaang na selsak hi." 
Psalms3:8 Ngalzawna sia Topa kung pan hong pai hi — Ama in ama ii mihingte thupha pia tahen. 
Psalms4:1 Thu kong nget ciang hong zo ta'n, Pathian, kei hong hungpa awng! Ngimna sungah ka om ciangin nong hu hi. Hong dik ta'n a, tu in ka thungetna hong za ta'n." 
Psalms4:2 No mihingte in bang tanvei kei hong zawnsak vawt tu nu ziam? Luithawthong khat sia bang tanvei dei in thumaan ahi ngawl khat bang tanvei del tu nu ziam? 
Psalms4:3 Topa in a thutangte ama atu in tealtuamin ka biapui ciang hong zaak hunlam phawk tavun. 
Psalms4:4 Kiitakna taw liingin mawna vawt nawn heak vun; na lupnate tungah thim dide in na lup uh ciang, hi thu a thukin ngaisun vun." 
Psalms4:5 A maan sangaw biakpiaknate Topa tungah pia vun, na muanna uh ama tungah koi vun." 
Psalms4:6 Mihing tam mamate in “ Topa awng, thupha tamzaw hong pia ta'n a, kote maipha hong pia ta'n” ci in thungen uh hi." 
Psalms4:7 Amate ii an le sapittui a neisa theampo tungtawn a, a lungdam na sangin lungdamna a lianzaw ka thinsung ah nong pia zo hi." 
Psalms4:8 Ka lupsuk ciangin thinnuam in ka mu hi, Aw Topa awng, nangma bek in bit takin nong keamcing hi." 
Psalms5:1 Ka kammalte hong ngai ta'n a ka huuisaknate hong za ta'n, Topa awng" 
Psalms5:2 Hu ngenin ka auna aw hong ngai ta'n, ka Pathian le ka kumpipa awng! Topa awng, na tungah thu kong ngen hi," 
Psalms5:3 zingsangin ka aw nong za hi; ni sua ciang kong ngetnate na mai ah kong lui a, nong zo tu kong ngak hi." 
Psalms5:4 Banghang ziam cile nang sia tatsiatna a dei Pathian na hi bua hi; nang omna munah ngitlonate na oai bua hi. 
Psalms5:5 A kiphasakte sia na mai ah a ding thei buatu hi; mihing seksol theampo na ensan hi. 
Psalms5:6 Nangma in leilot thusonte na susia a, a ngoltolte le ngual theamte na thusim bua hi." 
Psalms5:7 Ahihang kei sia nong itna lian ahikom na inn sungah kong tum thei hi, na Biakinnpi thiangtho sang nga in nangma thasiana taw kong bia tu hi." 
Psalms5:8 Topa awng, ngal ka hau lawlawm hi! na deina bang a vawt tu in lam hong pui ta'n; ka zui tu in na lampi tamkimsak in." 
Psalms5:9 Ka ngalte ii kampaute kimuang thei ngeingawl hi, amate in lalcipsak tu bek uuk hi. Amate kampau te sia kisial pokna hi a, zaak nop huai hi, ahihang, thina hong then thei kitheamna taw kidim hi." 
Psalms5:10 Pathian awng, amate puavawk in daan pia in: amate ii thimtham tupna taw amate puk tahen; a khialna tam mamate le nang hong leedo hu in na kung pan amate notkeak in." 
Psalms5:11 Ahihang nangma hong bealte theampo lungdam tahen. Amate in lungdamna taw lasa thei tawntung tahen. Nang hong itte na dal in, nang hu in amate lungdam takpi hi." 
Psalms5:12 Nang thu hong nite thupha na pia hi, Topa awng; nangma itna in amate lum bangin sung hi." 
Psalms6:1 Topa awng, thin uuk in hong teih heak in a; thin uuk in daan hong pia heak in!" 
Psalms6:2 Ka tha zawm vangeu zo hi, Aw Topa; hong hesuak ta'n! tha hatna hong pia ta'n, zawmcip zo khi hi," 
Psalms6:3 ka pumpi bup ngim lawlawm hi. Topa awng, nong hu tu bang tanvei haisaang lai tu ziam?" 
Psalms6:4 Hong pai ta'n a, hong hun ta'n Topa awng; nong hesuakna taw thina pan hong suatak ta'n." 
Psalms6:5 Mithi khua ah nang hong kiphawk ngawl hi; tua munah nang kuama in hong pok thei ngawl hi. 
Psalms6:6 Khuangaina taw ka zawmcip hi; zan simin ka kakaana in, ka lupna kawtcip hi; Ka lukham, thitui in tuamh hi." 
Psalms6:7 Khua ka mu thei tak bua hi; ka ngalte vawtna in ka kakaana in ka mit bol hi. 
Psalms6:8 No a ngilo te kei kung pan kiheam vun! Ka Topa in ka kaana hong za hi; 
Psalms6:9 hu ngenin ka kaana ama in hong ngai a, ka thungetna hong zo tu hi." 
Psalms6:10 Ka ngalte in ngallel maizumna he tu hi; thakhat thu hi biaibuai in amate kinotkeak tu hi. 
Psalms7:1 Topa ka Pathian awng, ka kidal natu in nang kong zuan hi, kei hong zuizente panin hong suatak ta'n a, hong hun ta'n;" 
Psalms7:2 tua ahibuale hong hun thei tu a om ngawlna munah tawpi bangin kei hong kai tu a, tua munah amate in kei hong baltham tu hi." 
Psalms7:3 Topa ka Pathian awng, khat pawpo tungah khialin ka lawm khat theamin ka zuak zong tua ahibuale a thu om ngawlin ka ngal pa tungah ka ngoltol le —" 
Psalms7:4  
Psalms7:5 tuasia ciang, ka ngalte in hong del tahen a hong man tahen, hong saatvawk tahen a, hong that tahen, tuaciang ka luanghawm sia lei ah hong nusia tahen." 
Psalms7:6 Topa awng, na thin uukna taw hong tho to ta'n! ka ngalte thinsona a nalh tu in nangma hong ding ta'n; nangma le nangma hong kithaw ta'n a, hong hu ta'n! Nong tangkal sia thutang khenna ahi hi," 
Psalms7:7 mihingte theampo na kiimkot ah khawmtua in a, amate ii tungsia panin hong uk ta'n." 
Psalms7:8 Nangma in minam theampo ii thukhenpa na hi hi. Topa awng, keima sang pangin thu hong khen ta'n, kei ka maw ngawl hunlam nong he hi." 
Psalms7:9 Nangma in a thutang Pathian na hi a, kote ngaisutna le ka deinate thu nong khen hi. A ngilote ii seksolnate tawpsakin, miphate thaman pia in." 
Psalms7:10 Pathian in kei hong dal pa ahi hi, ama in a thu a nite hun hi." 
Psalms7:11 Pathian sia thutang thukhenpa ahi hi, tuaciang a tawntungin a seksolte a nil hi." 
Psalms7:12 A kisiik nuam ngawl a om le Pathian in a namsau tat hiam tu hi; ama in a thal keaksa in kinging zo hi; 
Psalms7:13 a kiitakhuai a ngalhiamte la zo hi, a meikuang thaltangte taw tuung zo hi." 
Psalms7:14 Mihing seksolte in bangbangin ngitlo tu ngaisun ziam ci sia he in; ngimna vawt nuam a, leilot thu zangh hi." 
Psalms7:15 Amate in ngual thaangsia a, tua thaang sungah amate awk uh hi." 
Psalms7:16 A ngamtat phat ngawlna teng sia amate tungah tu kik a, amate ii ngoltolna in amate nasak hi." 
Psalms7:17 Topa sia ama thutang ahi hu in lungdam ka ko hi; A Saangbel Pa sia pokna la ka sak tu hi. 
Psalms8:1 Topa kote ii Topa awng, na letna sia leitung theampo ah kimu hi! Hong kipokna vantungte dong theng to hi;" 
Psalms8:2 patangte le nausente in tua lasa uh hi. Na ngalte ii bangma hong law thei ngawl natu in, a kip a kho in na om hi. Nang hong langpan peuma na khaam hi." 
Psalms8:3 Na vawt sa vantung le a omna mun tek ah na koi, tha le aksite ka et ciang —" 
Psalms8:4 mihingte sia bang hi a, banghang phawk ni ziam; a thithei mihingte po bangbangin thinbot ni ziam?" 
Psalms8:5 Nangma bekma sangin a niam zawhiat in na vawt a, minthanna le patoaina na pia hi." 
Psalms8:6 Na vawt sa na theampo uk tu in na sep hi; bitphua sa theampo ii tungah na koi hi: 
Psalms8:7 tuute, khuite, ngamsate;" 
Psalms8:8 vacimte le ngasate, tuipi nganhing namcinte zongh na uksak hi." 
Psalms8:9 Topa, kote ii Topa awng, leitung theampo ah na letna kimu hi!" 
Psalms9:1 Topa awng, ka thin theampo taw nang kong pok tu hi; a lamdang na nasepnate ka son tu hi." 
Psalms9:2 Nangma hangin lungdamna taw la ka sa tu uh hi. Vaanglianbel Pathian awng, na min pokna la ka sa tu hi." 
Psalms9:3 Nang nong kilaak ciangin ka ngalte nungkin kik a amate lutu in thi uh hi. 
Psalms9:4 Nangma thumaan thutang taw thu na khen a, kei sangah nong pang hi." 
Psalms9:5 Pathian he ngawlte na puavawk zo a, mihing seksolte na lalthamsak zo hi; amate kiphawk kik nawn ngawl tu hi." 
Psalms9:6 Ngalte sia a tawntungin bo siat zo hi, a khuapite na lalthamsak zo a, amate kimangil cip zo hi." 
Psalms9:7 Ahihang Topa sia a tawntungin kumpi hi a, ama in a thukhenna kumpi tokhum phut zo hi." 
Psalms9:8 Ama in thutang taw leitung uk a; ama in minamte thukhaikim taw thukhen hi. 
Psalms9:9 Zawthawk a thuakte atu in Topa sia bukna kip ahi hi, ngimna hun sungah ngammuanna mun ahi hi." 
Psalms9:10 Topa awng, nang hong hete in nang hong muang tu hi; nang hong zuante na nusia bua hi." 
Psalms9:11 Zion pan a uk Topa tungah pokna lasa vun! Ama nasepnate minam theampo tungah son vun! 
Psalms9:12 Pathian in a ngimngate phawk a, a kaana aw a mangil bua hi; tuaciang amate tungah a khialte daan pia hi." 
Psalms9:13 Kei hong hesuak ta'n, Topa awng! ka ngalte tung pan ka thuaknate hong en ta'n! thina pan hong suatak ta'n Topa awng," 
Psalms9:14 tua hi le Jerusalem mihingte mai ah ding thei a, nangma kong pokna thute theampo ka son thei tu hi. Nangma in kei nong hut manin ka lungdam tu hi." 
Psalms9:15 Pathian he ngawlte in amate ii taw sa dum sungah taaksuk uh hi, a thaangsiana sungah amate awk zo hi." 
Psalms9:16 Topa in thutang khennate taw ama le ama hong kilaak hi, mihing seksolte sia amate ii a sep a vawtte taw ma in awk hi." 
Psalms9:17 Pathian a nial theampo le a seksol theampo ii lam tawpna sia thina hi. 
Psalms9:18 A cimawte kimangil tawntung ngawl tu hi, a zawngte lametna zongh a tawntungin kisucip ngawl tu hi." 
Psalms9:19 Topa awng, hong pai ta'n, mihingte in nang nalhsak heak in; Pathian he ngawlte na mai ah samin, amate tungah thu khen in." 
Psalms9:20 Topa awng, amate lausak in; a thithei te ahi lel hunlam kitelsak in." 
Psalms10:1 Banghangin a khuala ah om ni ziam, Topa awng? Ngimna ka nga uh hun sungah banghangin buu ni ziam?" 
Psalms10:2 Mi seksolte in kiphasak a, mizawngte vawtsia hi, amate ii thaangsia sungah amate ma awksak in." 
Psalms10:3 A seksol pa in ama ii a sia deinate kiphatsak pui hi, a duhop pa in Topa haamsiat in nial hi." 
Psalms10:4 Mihing seksol pa in Topa awlmaw ngawl a, a kiphatsakna in, Pathian thupi sim ngawl hi." 
Psalms10:5 Mi seksol pa in na theampo sungah zawna nga hi, Pathian thukhennate tel thei ngawl hi; amate in ngalte nunau uh hi." 
Psalms10:6 Amate in, “Kei lel ngei bua vak ing; ngim nga ngei bua vak ing” amate le amate kici uh hi." 
Psalms10:7 A kam uh sia haamsiatna, theamna le ngual tawnna taw kidim a; amate in ngaimawkna le ngitlona kammalte pau memeang hi." 
Psalms10:8 Khuanote sungah amate mama buu in, mawnei ngawl mite that tu in pang hi. Akua cimaw ziam ci in kankuu uh a;" 
Psalms10:9 tawpite bangma in ama in a bukna pan mizawngte pang hi. A thaang sungah amate manin kaikeak hi. 
Psalms10:10 Mat a thuak a cimawte kisucip hi; ngoltol thahatna in amate zo zo hi. 
Psalms10:11 Mi seksolte in amate le amate, “Pathian in phamaw sa ngawl hi! Ama a mit si a, hong mu ngeingawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
Psalms10:12 Topa awng, mihing seksolte daan pia in! ngim a thuakte phawk in!" 
Psalms10:13 Banghangin mihing seksol pa in Pathian sia thusim ngawlin a thinsung ah “Daan hong pia buan te” ci thei ziam? 
Psalms10:14 Ahihang nang in a ngimna le a thuaknate na mu a, a hu tu in na kinging tawntung hi. A cimawte in nang tungah hong ki aap a, a kitaangsamh te na hu tawntung hi." 
Psalms10:15 Mihing seksolte le mihing ngilote ii thahatna nuaitan in; khialna a vawt kik nawn ngawl dong daan na pia in. 
Psalms10:16 Topa in a tawntung a tawntungin kumpipa ahi hi; pathian dang a biate sia ama ii leitang tung panin mong tu hi. 
Psalms10:17 Topa awng, mihing a kinengniamte ii thungetna na ngai tu hi; amate thinletna na pia tu hi." 
Psalms10:18 Zawthawk thuakte le tangate kaana na za tu hi; a thithei mihingte ii liinna launa a piansak nawn ngawl natu in amate sang pangin thu na khen tu hi. 
Psalms11:1 Topa sia ngammuanna nga natu in ka muang hi. Hi bang na ci uh sia bangza in mawmawthuai ziam? “Vacim bangin mualte ah leang ta in," 
Psalms11:2 banghang ziam cile, mi seksolte in thal keak a, amate in thaltangte taw mihing phate a buliana panin kap tu in tuung zo hi." 
Psalms11:3 Na theampo a cipthap zawkciang mihing phate vawt thei tu bangma a om nawn bua hi.” 
Psalms11:4 Topa, ama ii biakinn thiangtho sungah om hi; Topa ii kumpi tokhum in vantung ah om hi. Mun theampo a om mihingte encik a, amate bang vawvawt ci sia he hi." 
Psalms11:5 Topa in a miphate le a seksolte a kibangin encian khawm hi, tuaciangin a maitatte a thinsung theampo taw ensan hi." 
Psalms11:6 Ama in a seksolte tungah suangmeihol kaamte le kaan meikuangte buaksuk hi; ama in amate a sa mama vuite taw daan pia hi. 
Psalms11:7 Topa in thutang a, na pha sepna dei hi; tuabang a, a seamte sia ama ii omna munah teang tu uh hi." 
Psalms12:1 Topa awng, ko hong hu ta'n. Mipha khat zongh kikhe nawn ngawl hi; mihing thumaante kimu zo nawn ngawl hi." 
Psalms12:2 Amate in khat le khat kitheam uh hi; Amate in khat le khat kisial pokna taw kitheam uh hi. 
Psalms12:3 Topa awng, sialpok thei te ii a leeite na thimsak in! Hi bang a, kihisakna taw a paute ii kam na huksak in." 
Psalms12:4 “Ka kammal uh taw ka dei uh po nga khu hi. Ka uuk bang po in ka pau lel tu uh a, kuama in hong khaam thei ngawl tu hi,” ci uh hi." 
Psalms12:5 “Ahihang tu in hong pai tu khi hi,” Topa in ci hi, “Banghang ziam cile a cimawte kizothaw a, vawtsiatna a thuakte in na a sakna taw tau uh hi. Amate ii dei ngammuanna ka pia tu hi.”" 
Psalms12:6 Topa kamciamte in muanhuai hi; tuate in pummei sungah salivei a kithiangsak ngunn tatakte taw kibang hi. 
Psalms12:7 Mi seksolte mun theampo ah om uh a, tuaciangin a kuama theampo in ngitlona sia pok uh hi. Topa awng, ko hong keam tawntung ta'n a, tuabang mihingte ii kung panin hong keam ta'n." 
Psalms12:8  
Psalms13:1 Topa awng, bang tanvei hong mangil lai tu ni ziam? A tawntung ziam? Kei kung pan bang tanvei na kiseal lai tu ziam?" 
Psalms13:2 Ngimnate bang tanvei thuak lai tu khi ziam? Sun taw zan taw bang tanvei heena taw kidim lai tu khi ziam? Ka ngalte in bang tanvei kei tungah hong zo lai tu ziam? 
Psalms13:3 Topa ka Pathian awng, kei hong en ta'n a, hong zo ta'n. Ka thatang hong dimh kik ta'n a, hong thisak heak in." 
Psalms13:4 Ka ngalte in “Ama ka zo zo uh hi” cisak heak in; kei puna hu in amate na kisatheisak heak in. 
Psalms13:5 A kip nong itna hong suang khi hi; ka lungdam tu hi, banghang ziam cile nangma in nong suatak tu hi." 
Psalms13:6 Topa awng, nang, la kong sak tu hi, banghang ziam cile nang in kei tungah nong pha hi." 
Psalms14:1 Mihing mawmawte in, “Pathian om bo!” ci uh hi. Amate theampo siatna khaatna taw kidim siat a, a cizathuai nate seam zo uh hi; a maan a seam kuama a om bua hi." 
Psalms14:2 Mihing khat po a ciim a om ziam, ama a bia khat po a om ziam ci in, Topa in vantung panin mihingte ensuk hi." 
Psalms14:3 Ahihang amate lampial siat zo uh hi; amate a kibangin sia siat hi. A maan a ngamta khat zongh om ngawl, khat beak zongh om ngawl hi." 
Psalms14:4 “Ama te in he ngawl ziam?” Topa in dongh hi. “Hi a tatsiate in awlmawk nei ngawl ziam? Amate in ka mite neisa sutolna taw nungta a, kei tungah zongh thu hong ngen ngeingawl hi.”" 
Psalms14:5 Ahihang tuasia ciangin amate laungawp tu uh hi, banghang ziam cile Pathian in ama thu a nite taw omkhawm hi." 
Psalms14:6 Ngitlo tatsiatna a vawtte in mihing kiniamkhiak pa ii ngealnate nawngkaisak hi, ahihang Topa sia ama ii kidalna ahi hi." 
Psalms14:7 Zion panin Israel te ii zawna hong pai natu in bangza in thungen khi ziam. Topa in Israel te a khantosak kik hun ciang bangza in amate lungdam tu ziam! 
Psalms15:1 Topa awng, na Biakinnpi sungah akua bangte tum thei tu ziam? Akua bangte in na mual thiangtho Zion tungah biakpiakna vawt thei tu ziam?" 
Psalms15:2 Na theampo sungah Pathian thu ni a, a tawntungin a maan nasep seam in, a kammalte maanin taknei tu a," 
Psalms15:3 tuaciang ama in ngualdangte ngensia ngawl tu hi. Ama in a lawmte tungah tat khialna nei ngawl tu a, a innpaamte huvau kamleang kizelsak ngawl tu hi." 
Psalms15:4 Pathian ii nilte sia amate zongh in thusim ngawl tu hi, ahihang Topa thu a nite sia amate in patoai tu hi. Bangza po supna keak a om tu ahi hial zong, amate in a kamciam bangin vawt tawntung hi." 
Psalms15:5 Amate in a meet ngawl taw sum pukthaak hi, tuaciang a maw ngawlte langpanna tetti tu in sumnguk ne ngawl hi. A kuama po hi bang a, a ngamta sia in ngam muanna nei tawntung tu hi." 
Psalms16:1 Pathian awng, hong sungsia ta'n; bit takin ka om thei natu nang kong muang hi." 
Psalms16:2 Topa tungah “Nangma in ka Topa na hi hi; na pha ka nei theampo nangma kung panin hong pai hi,” ka ci hi." 
Psalms16:3 Topa ii a thumaan mihingte sia bangza in pha ziam! Amate taw kithol sia ka nopsakbel ahi hi. 
Psalms16:4 Pathian dang a del mihingte in amate tungah ngimna tam mama tungsak hi. Amate ii sangaw biakpiakna sungah ka kihel buatu a, amate ii pathiante ka bia buatu hi." 
Psalms16:5 Topa awng, Nangma in ka nei a minpiang a buppi na hi a, tuaciang ka kisap theampo nong pia hi; maisang ka nuntak natu na khut sungah om hi." 
Psalms16:6 Tel a nong piakte kei atu bangza in lamdang ziam; tuate in bangza in pha ziam! 
Psalms16:7 Topa ka pok hi, banghang ziam cile ama in hong lampui hi, tuaciang zanIN ka thinsung phawtheina in hong hilkhol hi." 
Psalms16:8 Topa hong ompuina a tawntungin ka phawk hi; ama in kei taw kinai in hong om hi, bangma in hong liinglawngsak zo ngawl tu hi." 
Psalms16:9 Tua ahikom kei sia lungdamko nopna le lungdamna taw ka kidim hi, tuaciangin ngammuanna a cing takin nei ka kisa hi," 
Psalms16:10 thina vaangletna panin hong sungsia na hikom thumaan takin nang atu kong seam hi, tua hi a mithi khua ah nong nusia buatu hi." 
Psalms16:11 Nangma in nuntakna sung hong then lampi nong lak tu hi; nangma II nong ompuina in lungdamna taw hong kidimsak a, nopsakna a tawntungin hong puak hi." 
Psalms17:1 Hong ngai ta'n, Topa awng, thutang khen natu a kong ngetna hong za ta'n! Hu ngen a kong auna hong ngai ta'n! Thin tak taw thu kong ngetna hong ngai ta'n." 
Psalms17:2 Nangma in kei sang pangin thu nong khen tu hi, banghang ziam cile nangma in a maan sia na he hi." 
Psalms17:3 Ka thinsung hong he ni hi. Zanin kei kungah nong pai hi; nong veal ngiingeei zo a, ka sungah ngitlo nopna nong mu bua hi." 
Psalms17:4 Ngualdangte bangin kamsia ka pau bua hi; na thupiakna kong ni a ngoltolna lampi ka tawn bua hi. 
Psalms17:5 Nangma lampi ka zui tawntung a ka pial tha ngei bua hi. 
Psalms17:6 Nangma tungah thu kong ngen hi, Pathian awng, banghang ziam cile nangma in kong ngetna nong zo hi; tua ahikom kei sang hong nga ta'n a ka kammalte hong ngai ta'n." 
Psalms17:7 A lamdang na itna hong pualaak ta'n a, hong hun ta'n; nang kungah ka om ciang ngal le sa panin ka ngammuang hi." 
Psalms17:8 Na mittang mama na kep bangin kei hong keam ta'n a," 
Psalms17:9 a seksolte ii hong dona panin na thakhui ii limh sungah hong seal ta'n. Thi theina ngalte in kei hong kiim uum a," 
Psalms17:10 amate in mulkimna nei ngawlin kiphatsak kam pau uh hi. 
Psalms17:11 Tu in koisang po ka nga zong amate ka kiimkot ah om siat a, hong kuaivawk tu in hong pang hi." 
Psalms17:12 Amate in tawpite bang hi a, hong balneen nuamin hong ngak hi." 
Psalms17:13 Topa awng, hong pai ta'n! Ka ngalte langpanin a, zothal in! Mihing seksolte kung panin na namsau taw hong hun ta'n;" 
Psalms17:14 hi leitung nuntakna sungah a dei uh po a neite khut sung panin hong hun ta'n. Amate atu na khealsia ngimnate taw amate daan pia in; tua daante sia a tate atu zongin kicing lai tahen a, a tate ii tate dong pawlkhat khomsuan lai tahen." 
Psalms17:15 Ahihang kei in nang kong mu tu hi, banghang ziam cile ngamtat khialna ka nei bua hi; tuaciang ka khanlaw ciang nong ompuina in lungnopna taw hong kidimsak tu hi." 
Psalms18:1 Topa awng, bangza in nang hong it khi ziam! Nangma in kei hong hungpa na hi hi." 
Psalms18:2 Topa in kei hong dal pa hi a, ama sia a kip a kho ka kulhpi `ahi hi. Ka Pathian in ka kidalna hi, ama taw ka kikop ciang kei ka ngammuang hi. Ama in lum bangin kei hong dal hi, ama in kei hong dal a, hong sungsia hi." 
Psalms18:3 Topa ka biakpui a, ama in ka ngalte khut sung panin hong hun hi. Topa pok tawng!" 
Psalms18:4 A lauhuai thina in kei hong uumci a, lalna tuihual in kei hong nawk hi." 
Psalms18:5 A lauhuai thina in kei hong uumci a, thaankuul in a thaang taw kei hong sia hi." 
Psalms18:6 Ngimna kawmkaal pan Topa ka biakpui hi; hong hu tu in Pathian ka biakpui hi. A biakinn sungah ka aw hong za hi; hu ngenin ka auna ama in hong ngai hi. 
Psalms18:7 Tuasia ciang leitung sia liingin ngawk hi; mualte ii tawdapte kilokin phe vadil hi, banghang ziam cile Pathian thin uuk hi." 
Psalms18:8 A naak hawng sung panin meikhute hong buak hi, a kam sung panin a kaanghtumsak thei meikamte le meikuangte hong pusuak hi." 
Psalms18:9 Ama in van sia eautham in meeikaaivom sisanh in hong tuaksuk hi. 
Psalms18:10 Ama in Cherub khat tungah to in manlang takin leang hi; ama in vui ii thate tungah khualhaw hi. 
Psalms18:11 Ama le ama khuazing taw kituam a, tui taw a kidim meeikaai saate in kiim uum hi." 
Psalms18:12 Ngialtangte le meileng vazalte ama mai khualeng panin hong pai a meeizingte phullet hi. 
Psalms18:13 Tuaciang Topa in van panin vanto bangin hong pau a, Saangbel Pa aw kiza hi." 
Psalms18:14 Ama in a thaltangte hong kap a, a ngalte kithethaangsak hi; khualeng tee vazialte taw amate taisak hi." 
Psalms18:15 Topa awng, na ngalte na teih ciang le thin uukin amate na oksat ciang, tuipi taw le lei tawdapte kilawt hi." 
Psalms18:16 Topa in ka tung panin hong zamsuk a kei hong len hi; ama in tuithukte panin hong kaito hi. 
Psalms18:17 A thahat ka ngalte le kei hong ensante kung panin hong suatak hi — amate in kei atu in hat lei hi. 
Psalms18:18 Ka ngim nga laitakin amate in kei hong sim hi, ahihang Topa in hong dal hi." 
Psalms18:19 Ama in launa sung panin hong hu hi, banghang ziam cile ama in kei sia dik hong sa a, hong hun hi." 
Psalms18:20 Topa in kei thaman hong pia hi banghang ziam cile a maante sep le vawtin ka nei hi; ama in keima thupha hong pia hi, banghang ziam cile kei mawna ka nei bua hi." 
Psalms18:21 Topa thukham ka zui zo a, ka Pathian kung panin ka pial bua hi." 
Psalms18:22 Ama thukhamte theampo ka tang zo a, ama thupiakte ka nit ngawl a om bua hi." 
Psalms18:23 Ama in ka sitbaan ngawlna, khial ngawl tu in ka kikepna hong he hi." 
Psalms18:24 Tua ahikom ama in telte hong pia hi, banghang ziam cile a maan na seamin ka maw ngawl hunlam hong he hi." 
Psalms18:25 Topa awng, hong thumaante tungah na thumaan hi; a cialcingte ii tungah a kicingin na dik hi." 
Psalms18:26 A thiangthote tungah na thiangtho hi; ahihang a seksolte na ngal vawt hi. 
Psalms18:27 A kiniamkhiak te na hun hi, ahihang a kiphasakte na niamsak hi." 
Psalms18:28 Topa awng, kei khuavak nong pia hi; ka khuazing na bosak hi." 
Psalms18:29 Ka ngalte ka sim natu in thahatna nong pia hi, tuaciang amate ii kinannate ka zaw natu tha nong pia hi." 
Psalms18:30 Hi Pathian ii nasepnate bangza in cialcing ziam! Ama kammalte bangza in suan thamman ziam! Ama ii huuk tu a zongte theampo atu in Ama in lum taw kibang hi. 
Psalms18:31 Topa bekma Pathian ahi hi; Pathian bekma ei kinanna ahi hi. 
Psalms18:32 Ama in kei hong thahatsak Pathian hi a, ka lampi bitsak hi." 
Psalms18:33 Ama in sangai bangin ka peang hong khosak a, mual tungah hong keamcing hi." 
Psalms18:34 Thal khobel sia ka zak thei natu in ama in ngal kido zia hong sinsak hi. 
Psalms18:35 Topa awng, nangma in nong dal a nong hun hi; nangma ii nong khoina in hong liansak a, na vaangletna in hong keamcing hi." 
Psalms18:36 Kipummat natu panin nong keam a ngalte khut sung ka theng ngei bua hi. 
Psalms18:37 Ka ngalte ka del a, amate ka man hi; amate ka lalsak mateng in ka tawlnga bua hi." 
Psalms18:38 Amate ka vaatvawk a, a tho kik thei bua uh hi; ka mai ah ngallel in amate liik uh hi." 
Psalms18:39 Nangma in kidona sung a zak tu thahatna nong pia a ka ngalte nong zosak hi. 
Psalms18:40 Ka ngalte ka kung panin a tai natu in na vawt hi; kei hong ensante ka lalsak hi. 
Psalms18:41 Amate in hu ngenin au ahihang kuama in amate hun ngawl hi. Amate in Topa biakpui hi, ahihang Ama in a zo bua hi." 
Psalms18:42 Amate leivui bang ahi dongin ka sucip a, vui ii let leivuite bang ahi uh hi. Lampite ah buan omte bangin amate ka tuanhcil hi." 
Psalms18:43 Ngal phuang mihingte kung panin nong hun a tua ngamte a uk tu in kei nong siam hi; ka heak ngeingawl mite, tu in ka khutnuai mi suak uh hi." 
Psalms18:44 Ngamdangmite sia ka mai ah kun uh hi; ka thu hong zaak ciangin ka thu ni uh hi. 
Psalms18:45 Amate in thinkiamin a kulhte uh sung pan a liing sa in hong pai uh hi. 
Psalms18:46 Topa nungta hi! Kei hong hungpa pok vun! Kei hong hun Pathian letna thangsak vun. 
Psalms18:47 Ama in ka ngalte hong zosak hi; ngam tuatuamte ka khutnuai ah biiksak vakheau a," 
Psalms18:48 kei sia ka ngalte khut sung panin hong hun hi. Topa awng, ka ngalte nong zosak hi; tuaciang a ngoltol mihingte khut sung panin nong dal hi." 
Psalms18:49 Tua ahikom ngam tuatuamte kawm ah nang kong pok hi; nang tungah pokna la kong sak hi. 
Psalms18:50 Pathian in zawna lian mamate a kumpipa tungah pia hi; ama in itna kip sia ama tealsa David le ama suan le paalte tungah a tawntungin lak hi. 
Psalms19:1 Van in Pathian minthanna thiang takin kilanghsak hi! Ama nasepna huvau in a kician mama in lak hi! 
Psalms19:2 Ni simin tua thu kisawson a, zan simin kison kikik hi." 
Psalms19:3 Thusonna ahibuale kammalte kizangh ngawl a, awnging zongh kiza ngawl hi;" 
Psalms19:4 ahitazong amate ii thupuak sia leitung bup ah kizel a leimong dongin kiza hi. Pathian in ni atu in van ah inn khat vawtsak hi; 
Psalms19:5 a lungdam zinei pa bangin zingsang in hong pusuak hi, tai kidem tu a lawp kimai thiamte bang ahi hi." 
Psalms19:6 Van mong khat pan hong kipan a, van laizang kaantanin a langkhat dongah pai hi. Ama ii satna sia bangma in lia thei ngawl hi." 
Psalms19:7 Topa thukham sia cialcing a; thahatna thak a pia hi. Topa thupiaknate sia muan thamman a, a kitaangsamhte atu in ciimna pia hi." 
Psalms19:8 Topa ii thukhamte maan hi, tuaciang tua thukham a nite lungdam hi. Topa thupiakte tang a, thinsung heakna pia hi." 
Psalms19:9 Topa thasiana sia pha a, a tawntungin kizom paisuak tu hi. Topa thukhennate sia tang a, tuate sia a tawntungin maan hi." 
Psalms19:10 Tuate sia khamh pha belte sangin dei huai zaw a, khuaitui thiangbel sangin thum zaw lai hi." 
Psalms19:11 Tuate in na naseampa, keima heakna hong pia a; tuate ka nit hu in tel ka saang hi." 
Psalms19:12 Kuama in ama mama ii khialnate a mu thei bua hi; Topa awng, a kiseal khialnate panin hong hung ta'n!" 
Psalms19:13 Vawtluih mawnate panin hong keamcing si ta'n a; tuate in kei hong uksak heak in. Tua hile ka cialcing tu a, mawna ii siatna khaatna pan ka suakta tu hi." 
Psalms19:14 Ka bukna le hong tanpa ka Topa awng, ka ngaisutnate le ka kampaunate nong saan thei hi tahen!" 
Psalms20:1 Ngimna na nga ciangin Topa in na biapuina hong zo tahen; Jacob ii Pathian in nang hong dal tahen! 
Psalms20:2 Ama in a Biakinnpi panin nang kungah huna hong puak tahen, tuaciangin Zion Mual panin panpuina hong pia tahen!" 
Psalms20:3 Na piakkhiatnate theampo ama in hong saang tahen a, na sangaw biakpiaknate theampo ama lungkim tahen." 
Psalms20:4 Na dei sia ama in hong pia tahen a na tupna theampo ah zawna hong ngasak tahen. 
Psalms20:5 Tuasia ciang nang ii zawna tungtaang ah lungdamna taw kong au tu uh hi, Eite ii Pathian pokna taw na zawna poai ka khaam tu uh hi. Topa in na nget theampo hong tungsak tahen." 
Psalms20:6 Topa in ama tealsa kumpipa sia zawna pia hi ci, tu in ka he hi; ama in a thiangtho vantung panin ama ii ngetnate zo hi, tuaciang ama ii vaangletna taw zawna lianpi te pia hi." 
Psalms20:7 Pawlkhat in amate ii ngalsimna siphu ngalleangte muang hi, a dangte in a siphute muang uh hi, ahihang eite in Topa ih Pathian ii vaangletna ih muang hi." 
Psalms20:8 Tuabang mihingte sia lutu in liik tu uh hi, ahihang eite tho in kip takin ih ding tu hi." 
Psalms20:9 Topa awng, kumpipa tungah zawna na pia in a, kong biapui uh ciangin hong zo ta'n." 
Psalms21:1 Topa awng, kumpipa lungdam hi, banghang ziam cile ama thahatna na pia hi; ama ngalzo pa na suasak manin lungdam hi." 
Psalms21:2 Ama ii lungngul sia na pia zo a, hong ngetna bangin na zo kik zo hi." 
Psalms21:3 Ama kungah thupha lianpite taw nong pai a a lu tungah khamh kumpilukhu na khusak hi. 
Psalms21:4 Ama in nuntakna hong ngen a, tuasia ma na pia hi, khansau le a kikhomsuan nuntakna na pia hi." 
Psalms21:5 Nangma huna hangin ama ii minthanna lian a, ama sia minthanna le uk theina vaang na pia hi." 
Psalms21:6 Na thuphate ama tungah a tawntungin om a, na ompuina hu in ama sia lungnopna taw kidim hi." 
Psalms21:7 Kumpipa in Vaanglianbelpa Topa muang a, Topa ii a kip itna hu in ama sia a ngam muang tawntung tu hi." 
Psalms21:8 Kumpipa in a ngalte pummat siat tu a, ama a ensan theampo man tu hi." 
Psalms21:9 Ama hong kilaak tak ciang amate sia meilingh pui ii a kak bangin susia tu hi. Topa in a thin uukna taw amate valh tu a, meikuang in amate kaanghtum tu hi." 
Psalms21:10 Kumpipa in thatlum siat tu a, a suan a paal kuama a taang buatu hi." 
Psalms21:11 Amate in kumpipa thasawm uh a, ahihang a taangtung buatu hi." 
Psalms21:12 Ama in a thaltangte taw amate kap tu a, nungsangah leetaisak tu hi." 
Psalms21:13 Topa awng, Na thahatna lianpi hu in kong pok uh hi! Na vaangletna pokin, la kong sak tu uh hi." 
Psalms22:1 Ka Pathian, ka Pathian awng, banghangin kei hong nusia ni ziam? Cimaw in, nong hu natu hong ausan khi hi, ahihang huna hong pai tuan ngawl lai hi." 
Psalms22:2 Ka Pathian awng, sunin kong biakpui hi, ahihang nong zo bua hi; zanin kong biakpui hi, ahihang thin muanna ka nga tuan bua hi." 
Psalms22:3 Ahihang nang sia Israel te ii a pok, a Thiangtho Pa in na maang hi." 
Psalms22:4 Ka taanghpupite in nang hong muang hi; amate in nang hong muang a, nang in amate na hun hi." 
Psalms22:5 Amate in nang hong ko a, launa panin suakta uh hi; amate in nang hong muang a, thinkiamna a thuak bua uh hi." 
Psalms22:6 Ahihang kei sia mihing zongh hi nawn ngawl khi hi; lungno khat ka hi a mihing theampo in hong thusim ngawlin hong nunau uh hi; 
Psalms22:7 Hong mu theampo in hong selno hi; a leei uh hong daw a, a lu uh hong pei san hi." 
Psalms22:8 “Nangma in Topa na suang hi. Banghangin nang hong hun ngawl ziam? Topa in hong it ahi le banghangin nang hong hu ngawl ziam?” amate in hong ci san hi. 
Psalms22:9 Bit tak a hong piangsak sia nangma na hi a, tuaciang nausen ka hi lai in nong keamcing hi." 
Psalms22:10 Ka pian ni panin nang kong suang a, nang sia ka Pathian na hi tawntung hi." 
Psalms22:11 Ngimna hong nai a, hong hu tu kuama om ngawl ahiciang, kei kung pan kiheam heak in." 
Psalms22:12 Khuitalte bangin ka ngalte in hong kiim uum a; ka kiimkot ah om uh hi, amate sia a kiitakhuai Bashan ngam khuitalte bang ahi uh hi." 
Psalms22:13 Amate in tawpite bangin a kam uh kaa a, hawkin kei hong laai uh hi." 
Psalms22:14 Ka tha tual zo a, lei ah tui buak bangin bo vangeu hi. ka ngu kipeenate zongh kipealkhial siat zo a, ka lungtang sia khuainun tuitham bang hi." 
Psalms22:15 Ka longtawl sia leivui bangin ko a, ka leei sia ka vadang ah kibelto hi. Leivui sungah a thi tu in nong nusia zo hi." 
Psalms22:16 Mihing ngilo honkhat sia ka kiim ah hong om a, uihonte bangin kei hong neak hi; amate in ka khut le ka peang pan hong laai hi." 
Psalms22:17 Ka ngu ka taangte sia lawt siat a, ka ngalte in hong en a hong sal uh hi." 
Psalms22:18 Amate in ka puante a hawm natu in aisaan hi. 
Psalms22:19 Topa awng, kei kung panin kiheam heakin a, kei hong suatak tu in a manlangin hong pai ta'n." 
Psalms22:20 Namsau panin hong hun ta'n a, hi uite panin ka nuntakna hong hun ta'n." 
Psalms22:21 Hi tawpite panin hong suatak ta'n; hi ngam khuitalte mai ah cimaw in ka om hi. 
Psalms22:22 Ka mipuite tungah nangma ii nong sepsaksate ka son tu a, amate kikhopna sungah nang kong pok tu hi." 
Psalms22:23 “ Topa naseamte awng, ama pok vun! Jacob suante awng, ama zatakna pia vun! no Israel mite awng, ama bia vun!" 
Psalms22:24 Ama in a zawngte ngaingon in ahibuale amate thuaknate awlmawk ngawlin a om bua hi; amate a nungngat bua a, hu ngenin a biapui uh ciang ama in zo hi." 
Psalms22:25 Mihonpite kikhopna sungah nangma ii nong sepsaksate ka pok tu hi; nang hong biate ii omna munah ka kamciamsa sangaw biakpiakna ka pia tu hi. 
Psalms22:26 Mizawngte in a du zaza ne tu uh a, Topa kung a zuan peuma in ama a pok tu uh hi. Amate in a tawntungin nuamsa tahen!" 
Psalms22:27 Ngam theampo in Topa a phawk tu uh hi. Leitung mun tuatuamte panin ama a zuan tu a minam theampo in ama a bia tu uh hi. 
Psalms22:28 Topa sia kumpipa hi a, ama in ngam theampo uk hi." 
Psalms22:29 Mihing kiphasak theampo in ama mai ah kun tu a, a thithei theampo in ama mai ah kun tu hi." 
Psalms22:30 Maisang khangkikte in ama atu seam tu uh hi; amate in hong khang pheang tute tungah Topa thu son tu uh hi. 
Psalms22:31 A piang pheang tu mite tungah “Topa in a mite hun hi” ci in kison tu hi. 
Psalms23:1 Topa in tuu bangin kei hong cing pa “Jehovah Ra-ah” ahi hi; bangma ka kitaangsamh bua hi. 
Psalms23:2 Ama in lo hingna sungah hong lumsak a, tuithiang cingna munah hong paipui hi." 
Psalms23:3 Ama in thahatna thak hong pia hi. Ama hong kamciamsa bangin lampi maan tawn tu in lam hong pui hi. 
Psalms23:4 Thina luamkuam khuazing thuk belna sung keak kaantanin ka tawn zongin ka lau buatu hi, banghang ziam cile, Topa awng, nangma in kei taw nong omkhawm a, na tuucinna molpum le na ciangkhut in kei hong dal hi." 
Psalms23:5 Ka ngalte mu tangin an neakna poai nong vawtsak hi. Leangna pipa bangin nong muak a, ka lu sathau nong thiisak hi; ka hai a dim letin nong buh hi." 
Psalms23:6 Ka khan tawntungin na phatna le na itna in kei hong ompui tu a, na inn sungah a tawntungin ka teang tu hi." 
Psalms24:1 Simleitung le a sungah a om theampo sia Topa neisa ahi hi; leitung le a tungah a teang theampo sia ama aa ahi hi. 
Psalms24:2 Ama in tuipi taw ah, inn tawdap pha a, leinuai tuithukpite tungah sa hi." 
Psalms24:3 Topa ii mual tungah pai thei natu akua in thu nei ziam? Ama ii a thiangtho Biakinnpi sungah akua tum thei tu ziam? 
Psalms24:4 Ngaisutna le ngamtatna a thiangthote, milim a bia ngawlte tua ahibuale a maan ngawl kamciam a vawt ngawlte pai thei tu hi." 
Psalms24:5 Tuabangte sia Topa in thupha pia in hun tu hi; Pathian in amate sia maw ngawl hi ci tu hi. 
Psalms24:6 Pathian kungah hong pai, Jacob ii Pathian kung a zuan tu te sia tuabang mite ahi hi." 
Psalms24:7 Kongpite hongkeak vun a, taangh kongkhate hong tavun, minthang kumpipa hong tum tu hi." 
Psalms24:8 Minthang kumpipa sia akua ziam? Ama sia Topa hi a, a thahat le a thakho, ngal a zo Topa hi." 
Psalms24:9 Kongpite hongkeak vun a, taangh kongkhate hong tavun, minthang kumpipa hong tum tu hi." 
Psalms24:10 Minthang kumpipa sia akua ziam? Zawna mualsua Topa — ama sia minthang kumpipa ahi hi. 
Psalms25:1 Topa awng, nang tungah, thu kong ngen hi;" 
Psalms25:2 ka Pathian awng, nang sungah muanna kong nei hi. Lel a maizumna panin hong hun ta'n a, ka ngalte kei tungah hong kisatheisak heak in;" 
Psalms25:3 Nang hong muangte kuama in nguallel ngawl tu hi, ahihang nang hong langpan papaihte nguallel tu hi." 
Psalms25:4 Topa awng, na zia na tong hong hil ta'n a, tuate hong telsak ta'n." 
Psalms25:5 Na thumaanna taw kizui in ka nuntak thei natu hong hil ta'n, banghang ziam cile nangma in kei hong hunpa ka Pathian na hi hi. Nang kong muang tawntung hi." 
Psalms25:6 Topa awng, taanghlai panin nong lak, na cikna le na itna kip sia na phawk ta'n." 
Psalms25:7 Topa awng, ka khangno lai a ka mawnate le ka khialnate hong maisak ta'n a, Na itna kip sung le na phatna sungah hong phawk ta'n." 
Psalms25:8 Topa sia pha a thutang ahikom mawneite tungah a tot tu uh lampi hil hi. 
Psalms25:9 Ama in a kiniamkhiakte lam maan lakin ama deina hil hi. 
Psalms25:10 A thuciam le a thupiak a nite theampo itna le thumaanna taw lampui hi. 
Psalms25:11 Topa awng, na kamciam kipsak in a, ka mawnate hong maisak ta'n, banghang ziam ci le ka mawna tam mama hi." 
Psalms25:12 Topa a thasiate in a tot tu uh lampi sia ama tung panin a he tu uh hi. 
Psalms25:13 Amate in nuamsa tawntung tu a, a tate in ngam le lei a lua tu uh hi." 
Psalms25:14 Topa sia ama' thu a nite ii lawm hi a, amate tungah a thuciam kipsak hi." 
Psalms25:15 Huna nga tu in a tawntungin Topa ka ento a, ama in launa pan hong suatak hi." 
Psalms25:16 Topa awng, kei hong maingat ta'n a, kei hong hesuak ta'n, banghang ziam cile ka lungzuangin ka tha zawm hi." 
Psalms25:17 Ka thinngimnate pan hong suut ta'n a, ka ngim nganate pan hong hun ta'n." 
Psalms25:18 Ka ngimna le ka thuaknate hong heakpui ta'n a, ka mawnate theampo hong maisak ta'n." 
Psalms25:19 Ka ngalte bangza in tam a, bangza in hong ngaimaw ci sia hong heaksak ta'n." 
Psalms25:20 Kei hong dalin, hong hun ta'n a, hong lelsak heak in. Ngammuan natu in nang kong zuan hi." 
Psalms25:21 Ka phatna le ka thumaanna in kei hong keam tahen, banghang ziam cile kei in nang kong muang hi." 
Psalms25:22 Pathian awng, na minam Israel mite a ngim ngana theampo panin na hun in." 
Psalms26:1 Topa awng, maw ngawl hi hong ci ta'n, banghang ziam cile a maan in ka seam a, nang muan citakin hong muang khi hi." 
Psalms26:2 Topa awng, hong veal ta'n a, hong sittel ta'n, ka deinate le ka khua ngaisutnate thu hong khen ta'n." 
Psalms26:3 Nong itna kip in kei lam hong lak a, na thumaanna in a tawntungin lam hong pui hi." 
Psalms26:4 A mannung ngawlte taw ka kithawl bua a, a kihitheamsakte bangma in ka sim bua hi." 
Psalms26:5 Mihing ngilote ii hong pawlpuina ka ngaimaw a, a seksolte ka pial hi." 
Psalms26:6 Topa awng, mawbaang ngawl ka hi hunlam ka khut silin kong lak a, na biaknatau kiim ah pai in kong bia hi." 
Psalms26:7 Lungdamkona la kong sak a, a lamdang na nasepna theampo ka son hi." 
Psalms26:8 Topa awng, na minthanna a omna mun, na teenna inn ka it hi." 
Psalms26:9 Mawneite taw hong susia khawm heak in a, ngual suamlumte thuak tute panin hong tongsak ta'n," 
Psalms26:10 ngitlona a vawt tawntungte le sumnguk a ne nuam tawntungte ii thuak tute hong thuaksak heak in. 
Psalms26:11 Kei ka hi le a maanin ka seam hi. Kei hong hesuak ta'n a, hong hun ta'n." 
Psalms26:12 Launa theampo panin ka ngammuang a, ama mihingte ii kikhopna sungah Topa ka pok hi." 
Psalms27:1 Topa in ka khuavak le kei hong ngumpa hi a, kuama ka kiita buatu hi. Topa in launa theampo panin hong sungsia a, ka lau ngei buatu hi." 
Psalms27:2 Mihing ngilote in that tu in hong sim ciangin, amate lutu in puk uh hi." 
Psalms27:3 Ngalkap hon buppi in hong kiim uum hial zong ka lau buatu hi; ka ngalte in hong sim le zong Pathian ka muang veve tu hi. 
Psalms27:4 Topa tungah na khat ka ngen a, ka dei khat bek a om hi; ka khan tawntung Topa inn sungah teang a, ama ii phatna lamdang ka sak tu le lam hong laknate nget tu ahi hi." 
Psalms27:5 Ngimna hun sungah ama in hong lia tu a, ama Biakinnpi sungah hong keamcing tu hi, tuaciang suangpi saang tungah ngammuangin hong koi tu hi." 
Psalms27:6 Tua ahikom ka kiim a ka ngalte tungah zawna mualsua na ka nei tu hi. Lungdamna taw au in a Biakinnpi sungah sangaw biakpiakna ka pia tu a; lasa in Topa ka pok tu hi. 
Psalms27:7 Topa awng kong biapui ciang hong za ta'n! Hong hesuak ta'n a hong zo ta'n. 
Psalms27:8 “Hong pai ta'n a hong bia ta'n” nong ci ciang, “Hong pai tu khi hi, Topa awng," 
Psalms27:9 kei kung pan nangma le nangma hong kiseal heak in,” ci in ka zo hi. Kei tungah hong thin uuk heak in a, na naseampa hong nungngat heak in. Nangma in kei hong hupa na hi ngei zo hi; hong paisan heak in a, hong nusia heak in, Pathian, kei hong ngumpa awng." 
Psalms27:10 Ka pa le ka nu in hong nusia thei tha tu hi, ahihang Topa in kei hong keamcing tu hi." 
Psalms27:11 Topa awng, nong sepsak nop thute, hong hil ta'n, Ngal tam mama ka nei hu in, a ngammuanhuai lampi ah lam hong pui ta'n." 
Psalms27:12 Leilot thu le tawnna taw hong ngalvawt ka ngalte khut sungah hong nusia heak in. 
Psalms27:13 Hi nuntakna hun sung mama ah Topa phatna mu lai tu ci in ka kihe hi. 
Psalms27:14 Topa muang in, upna nei in, thinkiam heak in. Topa muang in!" 
Psalms28:1 Topa kei hong hungpa awng, nang kong biakpui hi. Ka auna hong za ta'n! Nong zo bua ahile, kei sia mithi khua a zuan suk te sungah ka kihel tu hi."
