Psalms28:2 Nang tungah hu ngenin kong au ciang le na Biakinnpi thiangtho sungah ka khut kong lap ciangin hong za ta'n. 
Psalms28:3 Mihing seksolte taw hong puavawk heak in, ngitlo nasep a seamte, a kam teng taw lawm bang a kithoai ahihang a thinsung uh ah etsatna a neite taw hong puavawk khawm heak in." 
Psalms28:4 Amate sep le vawt a ngitlo ngamtatnate hu in daan na pia in. Amate sepna theampo taw a kilawm in daan na pia in. 
Psalms28:5 Amate in Topa ii sep le vawt sate a awlmawk bua uh hi; tua ahikom amate sia ama in daan pia tu a a tawntungin a susia tu hi. 
Psalms28:6 Topa pokna pia vun; ama in hu ngen a, ka auna hong za zo hi." 
Psalms28:7 Topa in hong dal a hong hung hi; ama ka muang hi. Ama in huna hong pia a hong lungdamsak hi. Lungdamna lasa in ama ka pok hi. 
Psalms28:8 Topa in ama mite sungsia hi; ama in a tealsa a kumpipa hungin hun hi. 
Psalms28:9 Topa awng, na mite hun in a, nangma neisate thupha pia in. Amate ii tuucingpa hi in a, amate keamcing tawntung in." 
Psalms29:1 No vantung mite awng; Topa pok vun, Ama ii minthanna le vaangletna pok vun." 
Psalms29:2 A minthang Topa ii min pok vun a, Thiangtho Pa hong kilangh ciangin a mai ah kunsuk vun." 
Psalms29:3 Topa ii awnging sia tuipite tungah kiza hi; a minthang Pathian in vanto bangin nging a, ama awnging tuipi lian tungah hawl hi." 
Psalms29:4 Topa awnging sia a thahatna le vaang theampo taw kidim hi. 
Psalms29:5 Topa awnging in cedar kungte taltansak hi, Lebanon mual tungah cedar kungte ngawngawn thiaktan hi." 
Psalms29:6 Ama in Lebanon mualte sia khuino bangin leang va eetsak a, Hermon mual sia khuital moi bangin kinuntawsak hi." 
Psalms29:7 Topa awnging in khualeng taangkeaksak hi. 
Psalms29:8 Ama awnging in sennealngam liingsak a, Kadesh sennealngam sia thing zazaan hi." 
Psalms29:9 Topa aw in oak thingkungte ngawksak a, a teete a kung tung pan thong siat hi, tua laitakin, a Biakinnpi sung a om theampo in “Pathian minthang hen” ci in au uh hi." 
Psalms29:10 Topa in kumpi a hina taw tui thukte a tawntungin uk hi. 
Psalms29:11 Topa in a mite thahatna pia a, kilemna thupha zongh pia hi." 
Psalms30:1 Topa awng, Nangma in kei hong hun zo na hikom, Nang kong pok hi, tuaciang kei tungah ka ngalte in nong enthawsak bua hi." 
Psalms30:2 Topa ka Pathian awng, huna ngenin kong au ciang kei nong damsak a, thaankuul panin nong keam hi." 
Psalms30:3 Leinuai a thuk zaw na zuanin ka pai laitakin nuntakna a thak nong pia kik hi. 
Psalms30:4 A thumaan ama ii mihingte theampo awng! Topa tungah pok na lasa vun! A Thiangtho Pa in bang teng seam zo ziam ci in phawk vun a, ama tungah lungdamko vun!" 
Psalms30:5 A thin uukna in tawmvei sung teng bek hi a, a phatna in khan tawntung ahi hi. Zanin thitui zongh taak tha tu ahitazong zing sang ciangin lungdamna hong pai hi." 
Psalms30:6 Ngammuang ka kisa a, keima le keima “Hong kinuaisia ngeingawl tu hi” ka kici hi." 
Psalms30:7 Topa awng, nang in kei tungah nong dik hi; mualtung ngalnanna kulhpi bangin kei nong dal hi. Ahihang ka mai panin nong kiseal a, tuaciang ka lau hi." 
Psalms30:8 Topa awng, nang kong biakpui a, nong hu natu in kong thum hi." 
Psalms30:9 “Ka thina tungtaang ah bang meetna nei tu ni ziam? Thaankuul sung ka zotsuk ciang bang phattuamna om ziam? Mithite in nang hong pok thei tu ziam? A lalmaw na phatna amate in thangsak thei tu ziam? 
Psalms30:10 Topa awng, hong ngai ta'n a, hong hesuak ta'n! Topa awng, hong hu ta'n!" 
Psalms30:11 Ka khuangaina sia lungdam lapna taw nong laihsak zo hi; ka khuangaina nong laaksak zo a lungdamna taw nong uap zo hi. 
Psalms30:12 Tua ahikom ka thim om buatu a, nang pokna la kong sak tu hi. Topa awng, nangma in ka Pathian na hi a, a tawntungin lungdam kong ko tu hi." 
Psalms31:1 Topa awng, nong sungsiat tu in nang hong tu ka hikom lelna hong thuaksak ngei heak in. Nangma in a thutang Pathian na hikom; hong hun ta'n, thu kong ngen hi!" 
Psalms31:2 Hong za ta'n a, tu mama in hong hun ta'n! Ka bukna hong hi ta'n a, hong dal ta'n; ka kihuukna hong hi ta'n a hong hun ta'n." 
Psalms31:3 Nangma in ka bukna le ka kihuukna na hi a, nong ciamsa bangma in lamlakin lam hong pui ta'n." 
Psalms31:4 Kei hong kisiana thaang panin hong keamcing ta'n a; launa panin hong khoi hong pao ta'n. 
Psalms31:5 Nong kepna sungah keima le keima kong ki aap hi. Topa awng, nong hun tu hi. Nang sia a thumaan Pathian na hi hi." 
Psalms31:6 A maan ngawl pathiante, a biate na ensan hi, ahizong kei ka hile nangma kong muang hi." 
Psalms31:7 Ka lungdam in ka lawp tu hi, banghang ziam cile nong itna in kip hi. Ka thuakna nong musak a, ka ngim ngana nong heaksak hi." 
Psalms31:8 Ka ngalte in kei nong pummatsak bua a, ka pai nopna po ka pai thei natu in suatakna nong pia hi." 
Psalms31:9 Topa awng, kei hong hesuak ta'n, banghang ziam cile ngimna ka thuak a, ka kakaana in ka mit taak in, ka tha zawcip hi." 
Psalms31:10 Khuangaina in ka tha hong tatsak a, kaana in ka khan hong tomsak hi. Ka ngimna theampo hu in ka thazawm a, ka ngute ngawngawn ngot hi." 
Psalms31:11 Ka ngalte theampo le a tuanin ka innpaamte in hong zawngsak hi; kei hong hete in hong kiita a, lam lai ah hong mu uh ciangin tai uh hi." 
Psalms31:12 A kuama po in kei sia a thisa bangin hong mangil siat zo a, a kivawksa na khat bang ka hi hi." 
Psalms31:13 Ngal tam mamate ii a kihuau ka za a, liinna launa sia ka kiimkot ah om hi. Amate in kei hong langpanin ngealna nei uh a, kei hong thasawm uh hi." 
Psalms31:14 Ahihang kei ii lung muanna in nangma na hi hi, Topa awng, nangma in ka Pathian na hi hi." 
Psalms31:15 Kei sia nangma khoina sungah ka om tawntung hi; ka ngalte kung pan le hong vawtsiate kung panin hong hun ta'n. 
Psalms31:16 Na naseampa sia cikna taw hong en ta'n a, na itna kip taw hong hun ta'n." 
Psalms31:17 Topa awng, nang kong biakpui hi; maizumna hong thuaksak heak in, mihing seksolte maizumna thuak tahen; amate ahile mithi khua thim takin zuansuk tahen." 
Psalms31:18 A leilot theite, a kiphasakte, a kisathei le thutangte zawnsakna kam a paute na thimsak in." 
Psalms31:19 Nang hong upatte atu in a lamdang mama nate na khealsia hi! A kuama po in nangma bangza inpha ci sia hong he tek hi, nang hong muangte sia ngammuang takin na sungsiatna hong he uh hi." 
Psalms31:20 Amate sia mihingte ii thasawmna pan le ngalte selnona panin nangma omna ngam muanna ah na seal hi. 
Psalms31:21 Topa pok vun! Kei hong ki uumci a, hong kisim lai in, kei tungah itna hong lak sia bangza in lamdang ziam!" 
Psalms31:22 Ama omna panin kei hong hawlkeak zo vei bua na ziam ci in ka lau hi. Ahihang huna ngenin ka biapui ciangin ka auna hong za hi. 
Psalms31:23 A thumaan ama ii mihing theampo awng Topa it vun. Topa in a thumaante hung hi, ahihang a kiphasakte ahile amate taw kiphu in daan pia hi." 
Psalms31:24 Topa sungah lametna a neite theampo awng, na tha uh khosak vun a, na thin uh hangsak vun." 
Psalms32:1 A mawna uh kimaisak a, a khialna uh a kipengsakte in mihing lungdamte ahi uh hi." 
Psalms32:2 Topa ii ngamta khial hi ci a, maw a sot ngawlte le, theamna cite theampo taw a kipealte in mihing lungdamte ahi hi." 
Psalms32:3 Ka mawnate ka pualaak ngawl ciangin, sunkhuateak in ka kakaana taw ka zawm ngiingeei hi." 
Psalms32:4 Topa awng, sun taw zan taw daan nong pia hi, khaal nisa ii tuikhu a kosak bangin ka thazawm dikdek hi." 
Psalms32:5 Tuasia ciangin nang tungah ka mawnate kong pualaak a, ka tatkhialnate ka seal bua hi. Tuate nang tungah pualaak tu in ka khensat hi, tuaciang nangma in ka mawnate theampo nong maisak hi." 
Psalms32:6 Tua ahikom a thumaan na mihingte in a taangsap hun sung nang tungah thu hong nget tu ahi hi; ngimna in namthuam lianpi bangin hong pai in hong nawkngawp ciang, amate a baan buatu hi." 
Psalms32:7 Nangma in ka bukna mun na hi a, ngim ngana panin nong hun tu hi. Nging takin, na ngupna thu, la in ka sa hi, banghang ziam cile nangma in kei nong sungsia hi." 
Psalms32:8 Topa in, “Na pai natu lampi kong hil tu hi; keima in kong lak tu a, ngaisutna kong pia tu hi." 
Psalms32:9 A ki uk thei natu in kamkhau bul a kul siphu ahibuale laa bangin na mawmaw heak vun” ci hi. 
Psalms32:10 Mihing seksolte a thuak uh kul hi, ahihang Topa a muangte sia ama ii itna kip in dal hi." 
Psalms32:11 No thutangte awng, lungdam in lawp vun, Topa sep sate hu in lungdam vun. Ama thu a nite awng, lungdam in au keak vun!" 
Psalms33:1 No a thutangte awng, Topa ii a sep sate hu in lungdamin au vun; ama thu a nite awng, ama pok vun." 
Psalms33:2 Topa tungah lungdamkona in tengtonghte tumin, khau a kithua tumtheite tumin ama ii tungah lasa vun." 
Psalms33:3 Ama ii tungah lathak sa vun, thiamna taw tengtonghte tum vun a, lungdam in au vun." 
Psalms33:4 Topa kammalte in maan hi, tuaciangin ama ii nasepnate theampo sia suan thamman hi." 
Psalms33:5 Topa in a thutang le a maan dei a, ama ii itna kip leitung ah dim hi." 
Psalms33:6 Topa in a thupiakna taw vantungte bitphua hi, ni, tha le aksite a kammal taw piangsak hi." 
Psalms33:7 Ama in tuipi theampo mun khat ah khawmtua a, tuipi thukte khakin a bitna sungah khol hi." 
Psalms33:8 Leitung theampo awng, Topa bia vun! Leitung mihingte theampo awng, ama vaang pia vun!" 
Psalms33:9 Ama a pau ciangin leitung kibitphua a, ama thupiakna taw na theampo piang hi." 
Psalms33:10 Topa in minam tuatuamte ii tupnate nawngkaisak a, amate ii ngealnate a vawt suak zawk ngawl natu in khak hi." 
Psalms33:11 Ahihang ama ngealnate in a tawntungin kip a, ama tupnate in a tawntungin kikhomsuan hi." 
Psalms33:12 Pathian sia Topa in a neite, minam lungdamte hi uh a, Ama ii mi tu in a teal sate sia mihing lungdamte ahi uh hi." 
Psalms33:13 Topa in vantung panin ensuk a mihing nam bup mu hi. 
Psalms33:14 Ama ukna mun panin leitung ah a teangte theampo ensuk hi. 
Psalms33:15 Amate khua ngaisut theina theampo sia ama ii piak hi a, amate sep le vawt theampo he hi." 
Psalms33:16 Kumpipa khat in ama ngalkaphon thahat hu in ngalzo hi ngawl a, ngalkap khat in ama thahatna hu in zawna mualsua hi ngawl hi." 
Psalms33:17 Ngal simna siphute sia ngalzaw natu in mannung ngawl a, amate ii a lian thahatna in hun thei ngawl hi." 
Psalms33:18 Topa in ama thu a nite le ama ii itna kip a muangte encing hi. 
Psalms33:19 Ama in thina panin amate hun a, kialpi tun hun sungin nungtasak hi." 
Psalms33:20 Eite in ih lametna sia Topa sungah ih nga a, ama sia eite kidalna le hong hu pa ahi hi." 
Psalms33:21 Eite in ama hangin ih lungdam a, ama ii min thiangtho ih muang hi." 
Psalms33:22 Topa awng, Nang sungah lametna kong nei uh bangma in nong itna kip sia ko taw hong omkhawm tawntung tahen." 
Psalms34:1 Topa tungah lungdam ka ko tawntung tu a, ama pokna ka tawlnga ngei buatu hi." 
Psalms34:2 Ama ii sepnate hangin ama ka pok tu a, a kizothaw theampo in ngai in lungdam tahen." 
Psalms34:3 keima taw kopin Topa letna thangsak in, ama min pok khawm tek tawng." 
Psalms34:4 Topa tungah thu ka ngen a, ama in hong zo hi; ama in ka launa theampo panin hong suaktasak hi." 
Psalms34:5 A kizothaw theampo in ama mitsuan uh a, lungdam uh hi; amate in a thinkiam ngeingawl tu hi." 
Psalms34:6 A cimawte in ama biakpui a, tuaciang ama in zo hi; amate ngimna theampo panin ama in hun hi." 
Psalms34:7 Topa a zaktate sia a vantunglalang in cing a, launa sung panin suatak hi." 
Psalms34:8 Topa sia bangza in pha ziam ci sia noma le noma in zong tavun. Ama sungah ngammuanna a ngate in mihing lungdamte ahi uh hi. 
Psalms34:9 Ama ii mi theampo awng, Topa patoai vun; ama ii thu a nite in a kitaangsap theampo nga uh hi." 
Psalms34:10 Tawpite ngawngawn an neak tu samh in ngilkial thei a, ahihang Topa thu a nite in na pha bangma a kisamh bua uh hi." 
Psalms34:11 A khangmoi ka lawmte awng, hong pai tavun a, hong ngai tavun, Pathian patoai tu zia kong hil tu hi." 
Psalms34:12 A nuamin na nungta nuam uh ziam? Khansauna le lungdamna na dei uh ziam? 
Psalms34:13 Tua ahile kam ngilo pauna le leilot thusonnate pan kikeam vun. 
Psalms34:14 Ngitlonate nungngatin a pha vawt vun; na thin theampo uh taw kilemna a om natu in hanciam vun. 
Psalms34:15 Topa in thutangte encing a, amate aunate ngai hi;" 
Psalms34:16 ahihang siatna a vawtte sia ama in langpan a, tua in amate a thi uh ciangin a kimakngil pal natu ahi hi." 
Psalms34:17 Thutangte in Topa biakpui uh a, ama in ngai hi; amate ngimna theampo panin suatak hi." 
Psalms34:18 Topa in a thinkiam mihingte taw a kinai in om a, lametna a nei nawn ngawlte hun hi." 
Psalms34:19 Miphate in ngimna tam mama thuak a, ahihang Topa in tuate theampo panin ama hun hi;" 
Psalms34:20 Topa in ama pha takin keam a, a ngute khat zongh tal ngawl hi." 
Psalms34:21 Ngitlona in mihing seksolpa that tu a, thutangte a ensante in daan thuak tu hi." 
Psalms34:22 Topa in ama mite hun tu a, ama a bealhte kikhoaikhe tu hi." 
Psalms35:1 Topa awng, kei hong langpante na langpan in; kei hong dote na do in." 
Psalms35:2 Na lum le na thikpuante zamhin kei hong suatak tu in hong pai ta'n. 
Psalms35:3 Kei hong delte sangah na tei le na hei hong vik ta'n a, kei nong hut natu kamciam hong pia ta'n." 
Psalms35:4 Kei hong tha sawmte in lelna le maizumna thuak tahen a, kei hong thasawmte nungkin in lungmang tahen!" 
Psalms35:5 Topa ii vantunglalang in a del ciang amate sia vui ii taangphaw a letkeak bang hi tahen. 
Psalms35:6 Topa ii vantunglalang in a vaat vawk laitakin amate lampi sia khuazing in leinaal tahen. 
Psalms35:7 Bangma ahang om ngawl bulin amate in keima thaang hong sia hi, tuaciangin kei hong mat natu in vuum thuk khat to uh hi." 
Psalms35:8 Ahihang amate ii tel ma in, siatna thuak tu a, amate ii thaang sungah amate awkin lalna sungah taaksuk tu hi." 
Psalms35:9 Tuasia ciangin keima in Topa hangin ka lungdam tu hi; banghang ziam cile ama in hong hun hi. 
Psalms35:10 Topa tungah “Nang bang ahi kuama om ngawl hi; a hatte khut sung pan a thazawmte na sungsia a, a zawngte sia a zothawte khut sung pan na hung hi” ka thin theampo taw ka ci tu hi." 
Psalms35:11 Mi ngilote in kei lang ah tetti in hong ding uh a, ka heak ngawl khialna liante hong suan hi." 
Psalms35:12 Amate in a pha ka vawtte, a sia taw hong thuk a, thin kiamin ka topsuk hi." 
Psalms35:13 Ahihang amate a ciinat uh ciangin khau-ip puan silhin ka heena taw an ka tang a," 
Psalms35:14 suapui laipee ahibuale ngualtamh khat atu thu ka ngetsak tu bangma in kun in thu ka ngen hi. A nu atu in a tau mihing khat bangin, tau in a kun sa in ka vavak hi." 
Psalms35:15 Ahihang ngim ka nga ciang amate lungdam siat a, hong selno tu in hong kikhawm uh hi; khualmite in hong vel a hong sasaat hi." 
Psalms35:16 Peangzawte nunau tu bangin amate in kei sia etsatna taw hong salh uh hi. 
Psalms35:17 Topa awng, bang tanvei, hong en thong lalai tu ni ziam? Amate ii hong simnate pan hong suatak ta'n a, hi tawpite panin ka nuntakna hong hun ta'n." 
Psalms35:18 Tuasia ciang na mipawlte kikhopna munah lungdam kong ko tu a, amate theampo mai ah nang kong pok tu hi." 
Psalms35:19 Tua a leilot thei ka ngalte sia kei ii lelna hangin na kisatheisak heak in. Bangma ahang om ngawl bul a kei hong ensante in kei ii khuangaina hangin lungdamna taw hong nuisansak heak in. 
Psalms35:20 Amate in ngualtamh bangin pau ngawl uh hi; kilemna a dei mihingte taw kisai in, leilot thu a tuatuamte phuak tawm zawsap hi." 
Psalms35:21 “Nang bang seam cisia hong mu khu hi” ci in amate au in maw hong suan uh hi. 
Psalms35:22 Ahihang, Topa awng, nangma in hite sia na mu sa ahi hi. Tua ahikom om thim heak in, Topa; a khuala na ah hong kiheam heak in!" 
Psalms35:23 Topa awng, nangma le nangma hong kithawn ta'n a, hong panpui ta'n; ka Pathian awng, hong tho ta'n a, ka thu hong sonsak ta'n." 
Psalms35:24 Topa awng, nang sia thutang na hikom kei, maw ngawl hi ci in hong pualaak ta'n; ka ngalte in kei tungah hong kisatheisak heak in." 
Psalms35:25 Amate le amate tungah, “Ama taw kipeal thei hing! Ih oai bang keak hi!” cisak heak in!" 
Psalms35:26 Kei thuakna tungtaang ah a kisatheite lel kha ma in na lelsak in a, lungmang biaibuai tahen; kei sangin pha a kisa zawte maizumna le min siatna in tuam tahen." 
Psalms35:27 Maw ngawl hi ci in kei tungah thukhensat natu a mu nuamte in “ Topa bangza in lian ziam! Ama in a naseampa ii zawna tungah lungkim hi.” ci in lungdamna taw au kikik tahen. 
Psalms35:28 Tuasia ciang na thutang ka thangsak tu a, nitangtumin kong pok tu hi." 
Psalms36:1 Mihing seksol pa thinsung tawngh ah, mawna in thu son hi; Pathian nialin ama thasiana a nei bua hi." 
Psalms36:2 Ama le ama nasia mama kisa ahikom Pathian in a mawna mu ngawl tu a puavawkna thuaksak ngawl tu hi ci in um uh hi. 
Psalms36:3 Ama ii kampauna in seksolna le leilotnate taw kidim a, ama in ciimna le phatna taw seam nawn ngawl hi." 
Psalms36:4 Lupna tungah a lup laitak zong ngitlo vai veu amate in ngeal uh hi; a sep pawpo a pha om ngawl a, a sia khat beak zongh nial ngeingawl hi." 
Psalms36:5 Topa awng, na itna kip in vantungte ban a, na thumaanna in vante ah kizelto hi." 
Psalms36:6 Na thutang sia mualpite bangin saang a, na thutang khenna in tuipi bangin thuk hi. Mihingte le nganhingte in nangma khoina sungah om hi." 
Psalms36:7 Pathian awng, na itna kip sia, bangza in manpha ziam! Na thakhui ii limh nuai ah kote in kidalna ka nga uh hi." 
Psalms36:8 Tam mama nong piak ante ne in nuam ka sa uh a, na phatna sia nguntui bangin nong dawnsak thei hi." 
Psalms36:9 Nang sia nuntakna theampo ii naak na hi a, nangma ii khuavak hangin khuavak ka mu uh hi." 
Psalms36:10 Nang hong hete sia it suak in a, a thutangte tungah a pha in hong seam suak ta'n." 
Psalms36:11 Mihing kiphasakte in hong ngalvawtsak heak in a, mihing seksolte in hong notsak heak in." 
Psalms36:12 Mi ngilote liikna san en vun. Tua munah amate pukin thoto zo ngawl hi. 
Psalms37:1 Mihing seksolte hangin thinngim heak vun; khialna a vawtte eang heak vun. 
Psalms37:2 Amate in lopa ko bangin bo pal tu hi; thingno vulte bangin thi tu hi. 
Psalms37:3 Topa muangin ngamtat pha ngamta vun; tua leitang tungah teangin ngammuang tavun. 
Psalms37:4 Na lungdamna uh sia Topa sungah zong vun, tuasia ciang ama in na lungngulna bang hong pia tu hi." 
Psalms37:5 Nangma le nangma Topa tungah ki aap in; ama muang in, ama in nang hong hu tu hi;" 
Psalms37:6 ama in na thutang sia sun ni bangin hong taangsak tu hi. 
Psalms37:7 Thinsau in Topa sep tu ngak in; a nuamsate le a sia ngealna neite ii maa tutnate hangin thinngim heak vun. 
Psalms37:8 Thinngimna le thin uukna in na zosak heak vun, tuate in ngimna sung hong then bek hi." 
Psalms37:9 Topa a muangte in ngam le lei a lua tu hi; ahihang a seksolte kinotkeak tu hi. 
Psalms37:10 Hai ngawlin a seksolte hong bo tu hi; na zawzon hangin na mu nawn buatu hi. 
Psalms37:11 A kiniamkhiakte in ngam le lei lua tu a, nopsakna le thinnopna nga tu uh hi." 
Psalms37:12 Mihing seksolte in mihing phate thasawmin etsatna taw salh uh hi. 
Psalms37:13 Ahihang Topa in mihing seksolte nuisan lel hi, banghang ziam cile amate hai ngawlin kilalcipsak tu hi ci in he hi." 
Psalms37:14 A zawngte le a cimawte thatlum nuam a, a maan na a seamte thatlum nuamin, mihing seksolte in a namsau dokin a thal uh keak uh hi;" 
Psalms37:15 ahihang amate le amate a namsau uh taw ma kithatlum tu uh a, tuaciang a thal uhte laltham tu hi." 
Psalms37:16 Mihing pha khat ii tawmno khat a nei teng sia mihing seksol theampo ii hauna sangin man neizaw hi," 
Psalms37:17 banghang ziam cile Topa in a seksolte ii thahatna laaksak tu a, ahihang mihing phate sungsia tu hi." 
Psalms37:18 Topa in ama ii thu a nite khoi a, a ngam le a lei sia a tawntungin amate atu hi tu hi." 
Psalms37:19 Hunsia hong tun ciangin, amate in thuak ngawl tu uh hi; kialpi tun hunin a khom tu uh an nei tu hi." 
Psalms37:20 Ahihang mihing seksolte thi tu uh hi; Topa ngalte sia ngamsung paakte bangin mangthang tu hi; amate meikhu bangin a bo tu uh hi. 
Psalms37:21 Mihing seksolte in leitoai in, lo kik ngeingawl a, ahihang mihing phate in ngo takin pia hi." 
Psalms37:22 Topa ii thupha a piakte in ngam le lei lua tu uh a, ama ii haamsiatna a thuakte ahile, kinotkeak tu hi." 
Psalms37:23 Topa in mihing khat sia a pai natu lak a, ama a lungkimsakte hung hi." 
Psalms37:24 Amate sia a puk zongin a topcip buatu uh hi, banghang ziam cile Topa in domto tu hi." 
Psalms37:25 Tu in ka huai zo a, hun sau ma ka nungta zo hi. Ahihang mihing pha khat Topa in nusia ahibuale a tate khutdaw an ngenin vaak ci thu ka mu ngei bualai hi." 
Psalms37:26 Amate in midangte tungah ol takin pia in, pukthaak tawntung a, tuaciang a tate sia a thupha saanna khat ahi hi." 
Psalms37:27 Ngitlona panin kiheak vun a, a pha vawt vun, tuasia ciang na suan na paalte in tua leitang tungah teang tawntung tu hi;" 
Psalms37:28 banghang ziam cile Topa in a maan dei a, a thumaan a mihingte a nusia bua hi. Amate a tawntungin sungsia a, ahihang a seksolte ii suan le paalte sia kinotkeak tu hi." 
Psalms37:29 Thutangte in ngam le lei lua in a sungah teang tawntung tu hi. 
Psalms37:30 Miphate ii kammalte sia ciimkam hi a, thutang hi tawntung hi." 
Psalms37:31 Amate’ Pathian ii thukham sia a thinsung ah keam a, tua thukham panin a pial ngei bua hi." 
Psalms37:32 Mihing pha khat sia mihing seksol khat in encik a thalup tu in hanciam hi; 
Psalms37:33 Ahihang Topa in a ngalpa khutsa sungah a nusia buatu a, ahibuale thu a kisit ciangin mawputsakna a thuak buatu hi." 
Psalms37:34 Topa tungah lametna nei vun a, a thupiakte ni vun; ngam le lei hong piakna taw ama in note hong patoai tu hi, tuaciang mihing seksolte a nawkeak na mu tu hi." 
Psalms37:35 Khatvei lai in mihing seksol ahi ngual a zothaw ngawp thei khat ka he ngei hi; ama in Lebanon mualtung ah cedar thingkung khat bangin ngual tungtuangin om hi; 
Psalms37:36 ahihang ka pai kik ciang a na om nawn bua hi; ama ka zon hang ka mu zo bua hi. 
Psalms37:37 Mihing pha pa en vun a, thutang pa entel vun; kilemna a nei mihingte in suan le paal nei hi," 
Psalms37:38 ahihang mimawte sia kilal cimitsak siat a, a suan a paalte sia kimon siat hi." 
Psalms37:39 Topa in mihing thutangte hun a, ngimna hun sungah amate sungsia hi." 
Psalms37:40 Topa in amate hu a suatak hi; ama in mihing ngilote khut sung panin hun hi, banghang ziam cile amate a dal tu in ama zuan uh hi." 
Psalms38:1 Topa awng, na thin uukna taw daan hong pia heak in!" 
Psalms38:2 Na thaltangte taw nong liamsak zo a, nong vaatvawk zo hi." 
Psalms38:3 Na thin uuk hu in nasia takin natna ka thuak hi; ka mawnate hu in ka pumpi bup natna ka vei hi. 
Psalms38:4 Ka mawna namthuam sungah tui ka ta zo hi; tuate kei puak tu in ngit leih hi. 
Psalms38:5 Ka mawmawt hu in ka meimate uih in muat hi. 
Psalms38:6 Keima bawngcip in, hong kisupeak zo a, sunkhuateak in ka tau hi." 
Psalms38:7 Ka ci sa mama a, sukin, ka thi dektak hi." 
Psalms38:8 Keima sia zawm dikdek in nasia tak hong kisupeak zo hi. Ka thinngim a, na sa in ka tau hi." 
Psalms38:9 Topa awng, nangma in ka thangai teng na he a, ka tauna theampo nong za hi." 
Psalms38:10 Ka lungpeal ngam vasauh in ka tha bo vangeu a, ka mit zongh ciim vaset meal ngawl hi." 
Psalms38:11 Ka meimate hangin ka lawmte le ka innpaamte in hong neak ngawl tu hi; ka innkuanpuite ngawngawn zongh ka kung pan kiheam uh hi. 
Psalms38:12 Kei hong thatlum nuamte in thaang hong sia a; hong liamsua nuamte in susia tu in hong tawng hi; amate in kei hong thasawmna a tawp ngei bua uh hi. 
Psalms38:13 Kei sia nangong khat bangin khua ka za thei bua a, a ngoai khat bangin ka pau thei bua hi." 
Psalms38:14 Khua zaak thei ngawl man po ngual paupuina a zo ngawl khat taw ka kibang hi. 
Psalms38:15 Ahihang Topa awng, nang kong muang hi; Topa ka Pathian awng, nangma in kei nong zo kik tu hi." 
Psalms38:16 Ka ngalte sia kei ngim ngana tungah kisathei heak hen a, ka kiamsukna huvau in amate kisuangtaaksak heak in!" 
Psalms38:17 Kei, a puk dektak ka hi zo a, tatsat ngawlin na ka sa hi." 
Psalms38:18 Ka mawnate kong pualaak hi; tuate in ka thin hong ngimsak hi. 
Psalms38:19 Ka ngalte sia ciidamin thahat hi; bangma thu om ngawl bulin hong ensan tam mama hi. 
Psalms38:20 A pha khat a sia taw a thukte in kei hong langpan hi; banghang ziam cile a pha sep tu ka hanciam hang ahi hi. 
Psalms38:21 Topa awng, kei hong nusia heakin, ka Pathian awng, a khuala na ah om heak in!" 
Psalms38:22 Topa kei hong hunpa awng, tu tatak ma in hong hu ta'n!" 
Psalms39:1 “Ka sep po kidawmin seam tong tuaciang ka leei zongh in mawna vawtsak bua tong; mihing ngilote hong nai laitakin bangma pau bua tong” ka ci hi. 
Psalms39:2 Ka thim om a, kam khat zongh ka huthe bua hi, a phate ngawngawn zongh ka son bua hi! Ahihang ka thuakna sia khang vaial bekin," 
Psalms39:3 ka thinngim cip hi. Ka ngaisut a tam vaial ciang, ka thinngim vaial a; hi bangin dongh ngawlin ka om thei bua hi:" 
Psalms39:4 “ Topa awng, bang tanvei nungta tu khi ziam? Bang hun ciang thi tu khi ziam? Ka nuntakna bangza in bo pal tu ziam hong son ta'n.”" 
Psalms39:5 Ka khan bangza in hong tomsak zo ni ziam! Nang muna ah kei ii khan khat sia bangma ngawl bang ahi hi. A tatakin a nungta mihing khat sia vui muut khat za hi bek a," 
Psalms39:6 limh khat bang hi lel hi. Ama sep le vawtte bangma in a kimang bua hi; ama in nei le lamh khawmtua ahitazong akua in lua tu ziam ci in a he bua hi. 
Psalms39:7 Tua ahile Topa awng, bang lamen thei tu khi ziam? Ka lametna in nangma sung ahi hi." 
Psalms39:8 Ka mawna theampo panin hong hun ta'n a, mihing mawmawte in hong nuisansak heak in." 
Psalms39:9 Thim takin ka om tu a, kam khat zongh ka huthe buatu hi, banghang ziam cile hi bang a, hong thuaksak sia nangma na hi hi." 
Psalms39:10 Daan hong pia nawn heak in! Nong vuakna taw ka thi dek zo hi. 
Psalms39:11 Ko ii mawnate sia nangma ii teihna taw daan nong pia hi, tuaciang koma ii itte sia nget ii neak bangin na lalsak hi! A tatakin kote sia husan khat za kan ha hi bua uh hi!" 
Psalms39:12 Topa awng, kong thungetna hong za ta'n a, ka auna hong ngai ta'n; ka kaa ciangin kei hong hu tu in hong pai ta'n. Ka taanghpupite theampo bangma in keima in tawmvei no sung atu bekin na leangna ka hi hi." 
Psalms39:13 Ka thi ma thinnopna tawm ka nga thei natu in keima nguak hong omsak ta'n. 
Psalms40:1 Topa huna nga tu in thinsau takin ka ngak hi; ama in hong ngai a ka auna hong za hi. 
Psalms40:2 Ama in a lauhuai dum sung le, thi theina sennawng sung panin hong kaito hi. Ama in suangpi tungah lau om ngawlin hong suanhto a ngam muanna hong pia hi." 
Psalms40:3 Ama in Pathian pokna la thak sak tu khat hong hil a, ih Pathian pokna la ahi hi. Hi thu teng a mu mi tam mamate in kidop theina nga tu a, Topa tungah muanna nei tu uh hi." 
Psalms40:4 Milim sang zuan ngawlin ahibuale pathian maan ngawl a biate taw kop ngawlin, Topa a muangte in mihing lungdamte ahi uh hi." 
Psalms40:5 Topa kote Pathian awng, ko atu na tam mama nong sepsak zo hi; nang taw a kibang khat zongh om ngawl hi! Ko atu in a lamdang ngealnate tam mama nong vawtsak zo hi. Tuate tam lei ahikom a vekpi in ka son zo ngei buatu hi!" 
Psalms40:6 Sangaw biakpiakna le piakkhiatnate na dei bua hi; biaknatau tungah nganhing pumhal tu nong ngen bua hi, tua ahibuale zong mawnate laak keak natu in sangaw biaknate nong ngen bua hi. Tuate taangin na aw ka zaak thei natu in bil nong pia hi," 
Psalms40:7 tuaciangin, keima in “Hi lai ah om khi hi; na thukham laibu sungah keima atu na thupiakte om nginge hi." 
Psalms40:8 Na deina bangin sep tu sia bangza in uuk khi ziam, ka Pathian awng! Nong hilnate ka thinsung ah ka keam hi,” ci in ka zo hi." 
Psalms40:9 Topa awng, na mite theampo ii kikhopna sungah, kote nong ngupkhiat lungdamna thupha ka son hi. Tawp hun nei ngawlin ka son tu sia nong he hi." 
Psalms40:10 Ngupna thute sia keima aituam atu in bilh thong ngawl khi hi; na thumaanna le nong huna sia ka son tawntung zo hi. Na mite theampo kikhopna sungah na thumaanna le na itna kipte son ngawlin ka om bua hi. 
Psalms40:11 Topa awng, kei nong hesuakna sia tawp ngeingawl tu hi, ci in ka he hi. Nong itna le na thumaanna in kei hong keamcing tawntung tu hi." 
Psalms40:12 Sim zawk zongh ahi ngawl ngimna tam mama in kei hong kiim uum hi. Khuamu thei ngawl za dongin, ka mawnate in, kei hong khunel zo hi; amate ka samzam phaza sangin tamzaw a, ka thin kiamcip hi." 
Psalms40:13 Topa awng, kei hong hun ta'n! Tu ma in hong hu ta'n!" 
Psalms40:14 Kei thalup tu hong sawmte lelna le buaina thuak siat tahen. Kei ii ngimna hu a, a lungdamte sia nungkinin maizum thuak tahen." 
Psalms40:15 Kei hong selnote amate ii lelna hu in a thin lal tahen. 
Psalms40:16 Nang kung hong zuan theampo lungdam in thinnuam tahen. Nong ngupkhiatna tungtaang ah a lungdam theite theampo in, “Topa bangza lian ziam” ci tawntung tahen." 
Psalms40:17 Topa awng, kei sia thazawm in ka zawngkhal a, ahihang nong mangil bua hi. Nang sia ka hunpa le ka Pathian na hikom, hong hu memeang ta'n!" 
Psalms41:1 Mizawngte a thinnuammawte sia mihing lungdamte ahi uh hi; amate ngim a nga uh ciangin Topa in hu tu hi. 
Psalms41:2 Topa in sungsia in a nuntakna uh kepsak tu hi; amate a ngam a lei sungah a lungdamsak tu hi; a ngalte khut sungah amate a nusiat buatu hi. 
Psalms41:3 A ci uh a nat ciang Topa in hu tu a, ciidamna pia kik tu hi." 
Psalms41:4 “ Topa awng, nang tungah kong maw zo hi; hong hesuak ta'n a hong damsak ta'n” kong ci hi." 
Psalms41:5 Ka ngalte in kei huvau kam ngilo pau uh hi. Amate in kei sia thi leng a hong kimangil le oai uh hi. 
Psalms41:6 Kei hong ve tu a hong pai te zongh a thin takpi hi ngawl hi; kei huvau thusiate khawmtua a, tua zawkciang pai in mun theampo ah son uh hi." 
Psalms41:7 Hong ensan theampo in kei hong ngenin khat le khat kihuau uh a, kei taw kisai a siabel teng ngaisut in nei uh hi." 
Psalms41:8 Amate in, “Ama sia thi tu in a na hi zo hi; a lupmuntung ngak top tu hi” ci uh hi." 
Psalms41:9 Ka lawm phabel, ka muanbel, ka ankuang uumpui sia ngawngawn in kei hong langpan hi." 
Psalms41:10 Topa awng, hong hesuak ta'n a, ciidamna hong pia kik ta'n, tuasia ciang ka ngalte ka thuk kik tu hi." 
Psalms41:11 Amate in kei hong zo ngawl tu a, tuaciang nong lungkimpui hunlam ka he tu hi." 
Psalms41:12 Nangma in kei nong hu tu hi, banghang ziam cile a maan sia ka seam hi; na omna munah kei nong keam tawntung tu hi." 
Psalms41:13 Israel te ii Pathian Topa pok vun! Tu le a tawntungin pok vun! Amen! Amen! 
Psalms42:1 Pathian awng, sangai in luitui vot vakil a thangai bangin, nang kong thangai hi." 
Psalms42:2 Nang a nungta Pathian sia tui du bangin kong thangai hi; bang hun ciang nang omna munah hong pai in hong bia thei tu khi ziam? 
Psalms42:3 “Na Pathian koi sungah om na ziam?” ci in ka ngalte ii hong dok hunsung bup, sun taw zan taw kapin ka thitui bek an in ka nei hi." 
Psalms42:4 A bosa hun sungah lasakna le auna taw Pathian a pok a lungdam mihing hon khat keima in lampui in Pathian inn ah ka paina uh ka ngaisut ciangin ka thin tamhtham hi. 
Psalms42:5 Banghangin tuaza in khuangai khi ziam? Banghangin tuaza in ngim nga khi ziam? Pathian sungah ka lametna ka koi tu a, ka hunpa le ka Pathian khatvei ma ka pok kik tu hi." 
Psalms42:6 Hi sung ka saltanna ah ka thin tamhtham ahikom, ka ngaisutna te nang sangah kong heak a, khuangaina tuihualte ka thaa sungah ama in hong puak hi; lungmanna te in namthuam bangin keima hong hawk a, Hermon mual le Mizar mual tung pan Jordan ngun dong tuiteau nging bang ahi hi." 
Psalms42:7  
Psalms42:8 Ka nuntakna ahi Pathian tungah zanin la khat ka sak thei natu le thungetna khat ka nei thei natu in Topa in sun lai in a itna kip hong lak tahen. 
Psalms42:9 Kei hong hungpa Pathian tungah, “Banghangin hong mangil zo ni ziam? Ka ngalte tatsiatna banghangin thuak tan lai tu khi ziam?” ka ci hi." 
Psalms42:10 “Na Pathian sia koisungah om ziam?” ci in amate ii hong dawdok ciangin amate ii hong selnonate in kei hong supeak hi. 
Psalms42:11 Banghangin tuaza in khuangai khi ziam? Banghangin tuaza in ngim nga khi ziam? Ka lametna Pathian tungah ka koi tu a, ka hunpa le ka Pathian khatvei ka pok kik tu hi." 
Psalms43:1 Pathian awng, ka maw ngawlna sonlaak in a, Pathianzia bang ahi ngawlte taw thu ka kineina uh pan hong hung ta'n. a leilot, a ngilo mihingte kung pan hong hunkhia ta'n." 
Psalms43:2 Nang sia kei hong dalpa na hi hi; banghangin hong nusia ni ziam? Ka ngalte ii tatsiatna banghang thuak tan lai tu khi ziam? 
Psalms43:3 Na khuavak le na thumaan thutak hong puak ta'n; tuate in na mual thiangtho Zion ah hong lampui tahen a, na teenna na Biakinnpi ah hong then kik tahen." 
Psalms43:4 Tuasia ciang na biaknatau ah kong pai tu hi, Pathian awng; nangma in ka lungdamna ii a naak na hi hi. Ka tengtongh ka tum tu a, pokna la kong sak tu hi, Pathian, ka Pathian awng." 
Psalms43:5 Banghangin tuaza in khuangai khi ziam? Banghangin tuaza in ngim nga khi ziam? Ka lametna sia Pathian sungah ka koi tu a, ka hunpa ka Pathian khatvei ma ka pok kik tu hi." 
Psalms44:1 Pathian awng, ngei tawngh lai in na sep na vawtte ka taanghpupite in hong son zo a, ka bil uh taw ka za zo uh hi:" 
Psalms44:2 Nangma mama in Pathian he ngawlte bangbang na notkeak a, amate ii leitang tungah na mite bangbang na koi a; minam dangte bangbang daan pia in, na mite bangbang khangtosak ci thu ka za uh hi." 
Psalms44:3 Na mite in tua leitang sia amate ii a namsau taw zothal hi ngawl hi; amate vaangletna taw a zothal hi ngawl hi; nangma vaangletna le thahatna taw ahizong, nangma ompuina taw ahizong a zo hi a, tua in amate na itna na lakna ahi hi." 
Psalms44:4 Nangma in ka kumpipa le ka Pathian na hi hi; na mite tungah zawna na pia a," 
Psalms44:5 tuaciangin nangma vaangletna taw ngalte ka zo uh hi. 
Psalms44:6 Kei hong hun tu in ka thal ahibuale ka namsau ka muang bua hi; 
Psalms44:7 ahihang nangma in ka ngalte khut sung panin nong hun zo a, hong ensante na zo zo hi." 
Psalms44:8 Nang kong pok tawntung tu a, a tawntungin lungdam kong ko tu uh hi." 
Psalms44:9 Ahihang tu laitakin nong nial a, lelna nong thuaksak hi; ka ngalkap honte nong tonpui nawn bua hi." 
Psalms44:10 Koma ngalte kung panin nong taisak a, ko neisate amate atu in la uh hi." 
Psalms44:11 Tuute bangin nong kingolumsak hi; ngamdang ah nong thethaang hi. 
Psalms44:12 Bangma man a nei lei ngawlte bang phetin na mite takpi man tawmno taw nong zuak zo hi. 
Psalms44:13 Ka innpaamte in ko tungah nong ngamtatna teng hong mu a, amate in ko hong selno in hong nuisan uh hi." 
Psalms44:14 Minam tuatuamte sungah ko sia ngual zawnsak tu in nong koi hi; amate in a lu uh hong thin in hong nunau uh hi. 
Psalms44:15 Kei sia a tawntungin minsiat ka thuak hi; maizumna in hong khunel hi," 
Psalms44:16 ka ngalte le hong ensante ii hong nunauna le hong selnona ka zaak ciangin ka mai zumna in hong khulum hi. 
Psalms44:17 Nang hong mangil ngawl ahibuale ko taw na vawt thuciamna paltan ngawl hi napi, hi bangte ko tungah hong piang siat zo hi." 
Psalms44:18 Nang tungah thumaan ngawlin ka om ngei bua uh hi; nong thupiakte kong nial bua uh hi. 
Psalms44:19 Tua hi napi ngamsate kawm ah a cimaw in nong nusia hi; a thukbel khuazing sungah nong nusia hi. 
Psalms44:20 Ka Pathian kong biakna tawlnga hi le ung a, ngamdangte pathian tungah thungen hi le ung," 
Psalms44:21 hong mu tatak zo tu ni hi, banghang ziam cile ka ngaisut kute dongin nong he siat hi." 
Psalms44:22 Ahihang nang hu in kote thalupna ka thuak tawntung uh a, ngawlup tu tuute bangin hong kivawt hi." 
Psalms44:23 Topa awng, hong khanglo ta'n! Banghangin mu ni ziam? Nangma le nangma hong thoto ta'n! A tawntungin ko hong nial heak in!" 
Psalms44:24 Banghangin ko kung panin buu ni ziam? Ka thuakna uh le ka ngimnate hong makngilsak heak in! 
Psalms44:25 Lei ah pukin ka topcip zo uh hi; leivui sungah lelna taw ka liik zo uh hi. 
Psalms44:26 Ko hong hu tu in hong pai ta'n! Nong itna kip hangin hong hun ta'n! 
Psalms45:1 Kumpipa atu hi la ka phua laitakin ka khua ngaisutna in kammal hoi nawno taw kidim hi. Lai at thiampa laikung bangin ka leei sia lamal phuak tu in kinging hi. 
Psalms45:2 Nangma in pasal a minpiang a mealphabel na hi hi; kampau thiam pa na hi hi. Pathian in nangma thupha hong pia tawntung hi. 
Psalms45:3 Vaanglian Kumpipa awng; na namsau hong kua tan nangma in minthang in uk zawkna vaang nei ni hi. 
Psalms45:4 Thumaan le thutang khenna a huu tu in zawna sungah na uk theina vaang taw hong pai ta'n. Na thahatna in zawna lianpite hong ngasak tu hi. 
Psalms45:5 Na thaltangte hiam a, na ngalte lungtangte vutlet hi; minam tuatuamte in na peang ah puksuk hi." 
Psalms45:6 Pathian ii hong piak kumpi ngam sia a tawntung a tawntungin kikhomsuan tu hi. Na mite thukhaikim taw na uk hi; 
Psalms45:7 a maan na dei a, a siate na ensan hi. Tua hu in nangma ii Pathian in nang hong teal zo a, kumpi dang khat po sangin na tungah lungdamna a tamzaw hong buak zo hi." 
Psalms45:8 Myrrh le aloe a namtuite thau, na puan tungah nam hi; saiha taw a kizeam kumpi inn sungah music thiamte in nang hong lungdamsak hi." 
Psalms45:9 Na suumsung sang a om numeite sia kumpite tanute veu hi a, tuaciang na kumpi tokhum ziatsang ah kumpinu dingin, ama in khamh phabel taw a kivawt kizepnate taw kizeam hi." 
Psalms45:10 Kumpipa zi tu monu awng, kong thuson sia ngai in, na mite le na beete mangil in." 
Psalms45:11 Na mealphatna hangin kumpipa in hong dei tu hi; ama in na topa ahikom ama thu na ni tu hi. 
Psalms45:12 Tyre mihingte in nang atu letsong hong paipui tu hi; sumhaute in maipha na piak tu hong hanciam tu hi. 
Psalms45:13 Kumpipa tanu kumpi inn sungah om hi — ama bangza in a mealpha ziam! A puantual sia khamh khau taw kitak hi. 
Psalms45:14 Mealcii tuatuam a nei puantual pawl silhin kumpipa kungah ama kipaipui a, ama a zui moliate zongh kumpipa kungah a vekpi in kipaipui hi." 
Psalms45:15 Lungdamna le thinnopna taw amate hong pai a kumpipa inn sungah hong tum uh hi. 
Psalms45:16 Nang ka kumpipa in, na taanghpupite kumpiza a laih tu tapa tam mama na nei tu hi. Tuaciang amate sia leitung bup a ukte na suaksak tu hi." 
Psalms45:17 Ka laphua in na minthanna sia a tawntungin nungtasak tu a, mihing theampo in hong pai lai tu hun theampo sungah nang hong pok tu hi." 
Psalms46:1 Pathian in ih belhna le ih thahatna hi a, ngimna hun sungah hong hun tu in a kinging sa in om tawntung hi." 
Psalms46:2 Tua ahikom leitung keak a ngawk ngawp a mualte tuipi thuk sungah a kisep hial zong; 
Psalms46:3 tuipite hawkin kilok a, mualte liing ngawp le zong ih lau buatu hi." 
Psalms46:4 A Saangbel Pa ii inn thiangtho, Pathian khuapi a lungdamsak ngun khat a om hi." 
Psalms46:5 Pathian in tua khuapi sungah om a, tua khuapi a lal ngei buatu hi; zing khuavak tuungin a hu tu in ama hong pai tu hi." 
Psalms46:6 Minamte lau uh a, kumpi ngam liinglawng hi. Pathian aw ngingin, tuaciang leitung tuitham hi." 
Psalms46:7 Topa, Vaanglianbelpa in ei taw omkhawm hi; Jacob ii Pathian sia ih bukna ahi hi." 
Psalms46:8 Pathian ii sep sa le vawt sate en tu in hong pai tavun; leitung ah a vawt na lamdangte en in. 
Psalms46:9 Ama in leitung theampo ah ngal kidonate thimsak hi; ama in thalkawngte thiaktan a, teite susia in, lumte haltham hi." 
Psalms46:10 “Kisim kidona tawp vun a, Pathian ka hina hong tel tavun, minamte ii sungah a lianbel le leitung ii tungsia ah a lianbel ka hi hi” ci hi." 
Psalms46:11 Vaanglianbelpa Topa in ei taw hong omkhawm hi. Jacob ii Pathian sia ih bukna ahi hi. 
Psalms47:1 Lungdamin na khut uh beang vun, mihing theampo awng! A nging lasaknate taw Pathian pok vun!" 
Psalms47:2 Topa a Saangbel Pa sia kiitak tu ahi hi; Ama in leitung theampo a uk kumpilian pa ahi hi. 
Psalms47:3 Ama in mihingte tungah zawna ei hong pia hi; minamte hong uksak hi. 
Psalms47:4 Hong it ama mihingte ii kiphatsakpui tu neisa ahi ih teenna leitang sia ama in hong tealsak hi. 
Psalms47:5 Pathian in ama ii kumpi tokhum zuan to hi. Topa a pai to laitak lungdamna taw auna le lemle awte nging hi. 
Psalms47:6 Pathian tungah pokna lasa vun; ih kumpipa tungah pokna lasa vun! 
Psalms47:7 Pathian in leitung theampo ii kumpipa ahi hi; lasaknate taw ama pok vun. 
Psalms47:8 Pathian in ama ii kumpi tokhum thiangtho tungah to hi; ama in minamte uk hi. 
Psalms47:9 Minam tuatuam a ukte in Abraham ii Pathian ii mite taw hong kikhawm uh hi. Ngalkap hon theampo sangin ama thahat zaw hi; a lianbel in ama maang hi. 
Psalms48:1 Topa sia lian a, ih Pathian khuapi sung le a mual thiangtho tungah nasia takin pok tu ahi hi." 
Psalms48:2 Zion, Pathian mual sia, saangin hoi hi; kumpilianpa khuapi in leitung theampo lungdamna hong puak hi." 
Psalms48:3 Pathian in a khuapi kulhte sungah ngammuanna om hi ci in lak hi. 
Psalms48:4 Kumpite kikhawmtua in Zion Mual sim tu in hong kuan uh hi. 
Psalms48:5 Ahihang tuasia a mu uh ciangin lamdang sa hi; amate lau in taikeak uh hi. 
Psalms48:6 Tua munah amate sia launa le thinngimna taw nausuak tu a tun numei khat bang hi a," 
Psalms48:7 lauhuai vuipi suangval sungah a kilok teambawte taw kibang hi. 
Psalms48:8 Pathian vawt sa le sep sate ih zaaksa hi a, tu in Vaanglianbel Topa ih Pathian khuapi sungah tuate ih mu zo hi; ama in tua khuapi sia a tawntungin keamcing tu hi." 
Psalms48:9 Pathian awng, na Biakinnpi sungah, nong itna kip ka ngaisun uh hi." 
Psalms48:10 Mun theampo ah nang hong kipok a, leitung theampo ah na minthanna kizel hi. Thutang khenna taw nangma in na uk hi;" 
Psalms48:11 Zion mihingte lungdam tahen! Nangma in a maan thukhennate na pia hi; Judah khuapite sungah lungdamna om tahen! 
Psalms48:12 Pathian mite awng, Zion kiimkot ah pai vun a, ngalvilna tausaangte a phakza sim vun;" 
Psalms48:13 khang kikte tungah na son thei natu in luphungte le kulhpite ciamtee in, veal vun a, hi bangin ci vun:" 
Psalms48:14 “Hi Pathian in a tawntung a tawntung atu eite Pathian ahi hi; hong pai lai tu hunte theampo sungah ama in eite lam hong pui tu hi.” 
Psalms49:1 A kuama po in hi thu za vun! Mun theampo a om mihingte awng," 
Psalms49:2 A lian, a no, a hau, a zawng a kibangin ngai khawm tek vun." 
Psalms49:3 Ka ngaisutte kitelthiang tu hi; ciimna kammalte ka pau tu hi. 
Psalms49:4 Paunakte kong zangh tu a tengtongh ka tum ciang a khiakna kong sontel tu hi. 
Psalms49:5 Ka ngalte in hong kiim uum a, launa hun sungah ka om ciang ka lau bua hi." 
Psalms49:6 A hauna uh muangin a neisate uh a kiphatsakpui mihing ngilote in hong kiim uum hangin ka kiita buatu hi. 
Psalms49:7 Mihing khat in ama le ama kitan thei ngeingawl hi; a nuntakna ii man Pathian tungah lo zo ngeingawl hi," 
Psalms49:8 banghang ziam cile mihing khat ii nuntakna ii a man sia tam leih hi. 
Psalms49:9 Thaankuul a thet ngawl natu le tawntung nuntak natu in ama ii piak thei tute a kicing ngei buatu hi. 
Psalms49:10 Mihing mawmawte le a nanghte bangma in mihing a ciimte zongh thi hi ci in a kuama theampo ii mu thei ahi hi. Amate theampo in a hauna uh sia a suan a paalte nusiat hi. 
Psalms49:11 Amate in leitangte nei ngei ahihang Amate ii thaankuulte sia a tawntungin a inn uh hi a; tua munah a tawntungin teang uh hi. 
Psalms49:12 Mihing khat ii letna in thina panin ama hun thei ngeingawl hi; ama sia nganhingte bangin thi veve tu hi. 
Psalms49:13 A hauna uh taw a lungkimte ii tawpna le amate le amate a kimuangte bang tawk ziam ci sia en vun — 
Psalms49:14 amate sia tuute bangin a thi tu in kisee a, Thina sia amate tuucing pa a hi tu hi. Amate pumpi sia manlang takin muatin amate ii inn taw a kikhuala mithi khua ah a om uh ciang thutangte in amate tungah zawna mualsua tu hi." 
Psalms49:15 Ahihang Pathian in kei hong suatak tu hi; thina vaangletna panin kei hong hun tu hi. 
Psalms49:16 Mihing khat a hau ciang le ama haunate a khan seseam ciang zongin na thinnuammaw heak vun; 
Psalms49:17 ama in a thi ciangin keng thei tuan ngawl hi; a hauna sia ama in thaan ah tonpui thei ngawl hi. 
Psalms49:18 Mihing khat in hi nuntakna sungah lungkim in ama zawnate hu in kipok kale," 
Psalms49:19 ama in thi in a tawntung khua zingna mun a taanghpupite kung zuan tu hi. 
Psalms49:20 Mihing khat ii letna in thina panin ama hun zo ngeingawl hi; ama sia nganhingte bangin thi lai tu hi. 
Psalms50:1 Vaanglianbel Pathian ahi Topa hong pau hi; ama in leitung bup nisuana le nitumna kilaklaw ah a om theampo khawm hi. 
Psalms50:2 A hoina taw a kicing Zion khuapi panin Pathian vaang hong taang hi. 
Psalms50:3 Eite Pathian hong pai a, ahihang a thimtham in hong pai bua hi; ama mai ah a lengkeak meikuang om a, vuipi suangval in a kiim uum hi." 
Psalms50:4 Ama in a mite tungah thu a khen ciangin a tetti tu in van le lei sam hi. 
Psalms50:5 Ama in, “Sangaw biakpiakna nei in, kei taw thuciamna a vawt, a thumaan ka mihingte kei kungah hong khawmtua tavun” ci hi." 
Psalms50:6 Vantungte in Pathian sia thutang a, ama in thukhenpa ma hi ci in thangsak hi." 
Psalms50:7 “Ka mite awng, na ngai vun, hong son tu khi hi; Israel te awng, note langpanna tetti pang tu khi hi. Kei sia Pathian ka hi a, note Pathian ka hi hi." 
Psalms50:8 Na sangaw biakpiaknate hu le nong piak tawntung uh meihal biakpiaknate hu in kong mawsak bua hi. 
Psalms50:9 Na lo sung pan na khuitalte ahizong, na nganhon sung pan kealte ahizong ka kitaangsamh bua hi;" 
Psalms50:10 duisung nganhing theampo le mual tul tam mamate tungah nganhonte sia keima aa ahi hi. 
Psalms50:11 Ngamsung vacimte theampo le nuntakna a nei theampo zongh keima neisa ahi hi. 
Psalms50:12 “Ka ngil a kial le nang tungah an kong ngen buatu hi, banghang ziam cile leitung le a sungah om na theampo sia keima neisa ahi hi." 
Psalms50:13 Khuitalte ii sa ne in, ahibuale kealte ii chi dawn na khi ziam?" 
Psalms50:14 Pathian tungah lungdamkona sia nangma sangaw biakpiakna hi zaw tahen, Vaanglianbelpa tungah piak tu a, na kamciam bangin pia siat in." 
Psalms50:15 Ngimna hong pai ciangin keima hong ko tavun; Noma kong hun tu a kei nong pok tu uh hi.” 
Psalms50:16 Ahihang Pathian in mi seksolte munah, “Banghangin ka thupiakte lotnga nu ziam? Banghangin ka thuciam sia thu sonin nei tu nu ziam?" 
Psalms50:17 No kong puuaphat tu nong oai bua uh a, ka thupiakte na nial uh hi." 
Psalms50:18 Nguta na mu theampo ii lawm na hi uh a palngul mawneite taw na kipawl uh hi. 
Psalms50:19 Ngitlona thuson tu in a tawntungin a kinging sa in na om uh hi; Leilot thute na son tu na haisaang ngei bua uh hi. 
Psalms50:20 Na suapuite uh mawsiat tu in na kinging uh a, a khial natu na zong uh hi." 
Psalms50:21 Hite theampo na sep uh hangin, bangma kong ci bua hi, tuasia ciang kei sia noma taw a kibangin nong tuat uh hi. Ahihang tu in kong mawsak a, a thu kong telthiangsak hi." 
Psalms50:22 “No, kei hong ngaingonte awng, hi thu ngai vun, tua ahibuale kong susia tu hi, tuaciang no hong hun tu kuama a om buatu hi." 
Psalms50:23 Lungdamkona sia kei vaang hong pia sangaw biakpiakna hi a, kei thu hong nite theampo ka hun takpi tu hi” ci hi." 
Psalms51:1 Pathian awng, nong itna kip hu in kei hong hesuak ta'n, A lian na hesuakna hu in ka mawnate hong melsak ta'n!" 
Psalms51:2 Ka ngitlona theampo hong silsak ta'n a, ka mawna panin hong thiangthosak ta'n!" 
Psalms51:3 Ka tatkhialnate ka he a, ka mawnate ka phawk tawntung hi." 
Psalms51:4 Nangma tung tatak ah hong maw zo khi hi, sia na sakte ka vawt zo hi. Tua ahiciangin, thu nong khenna sia maan hi; kei nong mawsak sia khial ngawl ni hi." 
Psalms51:5 Ka pian ni pan ma in a sia ka hi hi; ka nu ngil sungah ka om lai pan ma in mimaw ka hi zo hi. 
Psalms51:6 Citakna le thumaanna sia na dei thu ahi hi; ka khua ngaisutna sia na ciimna taw hong dim ta'n. 
Psalms51:7 Ka mawna hong laakkeaksak ta'n, tua hile ka thiangtho tu hi, hong sil ta'n, tua hile vuuk sang ka ngo zaw tu hi." 
Psalms51:8 Thinnopna le lungdamna awte hong zasak ta'n; na delpeak, na sukthap sa ka hi tazong khatvei ma ka lungdam kik tu hi." 
Psalms51:9 Ka mawnate hong etsak heak in a, ka siatnate theampo hong melmaisak ta'n." 
Psalms51:10 Pathian awng, ka sungah thin thiangtho hong bitphua ta'n a, a thak le a thumaan thaa hong nguan ta'n." 
Psalms51:11 Na omna mun panin hong beng heak in; ka tung panin na thaa thiangtho lakeak heak in. 
Psalms51:12 Na ngupna tungtawn a hong pai lungdamna sia hong pia kik ta'n a, na thu a ni nuam tu in hong siam ta'n." 
Psalms51:13 Tuasia ciangin mimawte sia nangma thupiakte ka hil tu a, amate in nang hong zuan kik tu uh hi." 
Psalms51:14 Pathian awng, ka nuntakna hong khoaikhe ta'n a, hong hun ta'n, tuaciang thutang na hina lungdam takin ka thangsak tu hi." 
Psalms51:15 Topa awng, ka pau thei natu in hong hu ta'n, tuaciang nangma kong pok tu hi." 
Psalms51:16 Sangaw biakpiaknate na dei bua hi, tua hi buale tuate kong pia zo tu hi; meihal biakpiaknate taw na lung a kim zo bua hi." 
Psalms51:17 Pathian dei sangaw biakpiakna sia a kiniamkhiak thinsung ahi hi; Pathian awng, a kiniamkhiak le a kisiik kik thinsung na nial bua hi." 
Psalms51:18 Pathian awng, Zion tungah thuthiam in na hu in; Jerusalem luphungte na ciangto kik in." 
Psalms51:19 Tuasia ciang a kilawm sangaw biakpiaknate le koma ii meihal biakpiaknate dik na sa tu hi; tuaciang na biaknatau tungah khuitalte biakpiakna in hong kipia tu hi. 
Psalms52:1 Milian pa awng banghangin na siatna kiphatsak pui ni ziam? Pathian thumaanna sia a tawntungin kip hi. 
Psalms52:2 Ngualdangte lal natu in na ngeal uh hi; na leei sia mulnam hiam khat taw kibang a, leilot thu na phuaktawm tawntung uh hi." 
Psalms52:3 Siatna sia phatna sangin na lamnai zaw uh a, thumaan sangin a maan ngawl thu na deizaw uh hi." 
Psalms52:4 Nang a leilot thei sia awng, na kammalte taw mite natsak tu na lamnai hi." 
Psalms52:5 Tua ahikom Pathian in nang sia hong lalcipsak top tu hi; ama in nang hong man tu a, na inn panin hong tua tu hi; a nungtate omna leitung panin nang hong khiin tu hi." 
Psalms52:6 A thutangte in hisia mu tu a, amate lauthawng tu uh hi; tuaciang amate in nang hong nuisan tu a," 
Psalms52:7 “En vun, ngammuan natu Pathian a suang ngawl, hi sungah mihing khat om a, ama in a nei a lamh tampite suang a, seksol ngamtatna taw ngammuanna zon a sawm zaw hi,” hong ci tu uh hi." 
Psalms52:8 Ahihang kei ka hile Pathian inn sungah a po olive thingkung bang ka hi hi; ama ii hong itna kip sia a tawntung, a tawntungin ka muang hi." 
Psalms52:9 Pathian awng, na sepsa nate hu in lungdam kong ko tawntung tu hi; na mite omna munah nang sia a pha na hi hunlam ka thangsak tu hi." 
Psalms53:1 Mihing mawmawte in, “Pathian om bo!” ci uh hi. Amate theampo siatna khaatna taw kidim siat a, a cizathuai nate seam zo uh hi; a maan a seam kuama a om bua hi." 
Psalms53:2 Mihing khat po a ciim a om ziam, ama a bia khat po a om ziam ci in, Topa in vantung panin mihingte ensuk hi." 
Psalms53:3 Ahihang amate lampial siat zo uh hi; amate a kibangin sia siat hi. A maan a ngamta khat zongh om ngawl, khat beak zongh om ngawl hi." 
Psalms53:4 “Ama te in he ngawl ziam?” Topa in dongh hi. “Hi a tatsiate in heakna nei ngawl ziam? Amate in ka mite neisa sutolna taw nungta a, kei tungah thu hong ngen ngeingawl hi.”" 
Psalms53:5 Ahihang amate in nidangin a thuak ngeingawl uh launa nasia thuak tu uh hi, banghang ziam cile Pathian in a mite ii ngalte ii ngute sia thethaang tu hi. Pathian in amate nial zo ahikom, Israel in amate zothal siat tu hi." 
Psalms53:6 Zion panin Israel te ii zawna hong pai natu in bangza in thungen khi ziam. Topa in Israel te a khantosak kik hun ciang bangza in amate lungdam tu ziam! 
Psalms54:1 Pathian awng, na vaangletna taw hong hun ta'n; na thahatna taw hong suatak ta'n!" 
Psalms54:2 Pathian awng, kong thungetna hong za ta'n; ka kammalte hong ngai ta'n!" 
Psalms54:3 Mihing kiphasakte in kei hong sim tu in hong kuan hi; Pathian a awlmawk ngawl mihing ngilote in kei thalup tu in hanciam hi. 
Psalms54:4 Ahihang Pathian in kei hong hupa hi. Topa in kei hong hungpa ahi hi. 
Psalms54:5 Pathian in amate ngitlona sia ka ngalte daan piakna in nei tahen. Ama in amate sucip tu hi, banghang ziam cile ama thumaan hi." 
Psalms54:6 Topa awng, lungdam takin sangaw biakpiakna khat kong pia tu hi; lungdam kong ko tu hi banghang ziam cile nangma na pha hi." 
Psalms54:7 Ka ngimnate theampo sung pan nong suatak zo a, ka ngalte a kizaw sia ka mu zo hi." 
Psalms55:1 Pathian awng, ka thungetna hong za ta'n; kong thuumna panin hong nungngat heak in!" 
Psalms55:2 Hong ngai ta'n a hong zo ta'n; ka thinngimna taw zawmcip zo khi hi. 
Psalms55:3 Ka ngalte hong tawnna hu in ka lau a, mihing seksolte hong zawthawkna hangin ka topcip zo hi. Amate in ka tungah ngimna hong puak hi; amate kei tungah hong thin uukin hong ensan hi." 
Psalms55:4 Ka lau mama a, thi tu launa in hong nengcip hi." 
Psalms55:5 Liinna le launa in kei hong lencip hi; patauna in kei hong zo hi. 
Psalms55:6 Vakhu bangin tha nei leng ka uuk hi. Leangin tawlngakna ka mu tu hi. 
Psalms55:7 A khualana ah ka leang tu a, duisung ah ka teang tu hi." 
Psalms55:8 A thin uuk vuipi suangvalte panin bukna khat manlang takin ka mu tu hi. 
Psalms55:9 Topa awng, ka ngalte kampau uh hi bialbualsak in. Khuapi sungah, ngoltolna le buainate ka mu hi." 
Psalms55:10 Sun taw zan taw tua khuapi kiim uum uh a, tua khuapi sia khut khialna le ngimna taw kidimsak uh hi." 
Psalms55:11 Mun theampo ah lalna om hi; lampite sia zawthawkna le kitheamna taw kidim hi. 
Psalms55:12 Kei hong nunau sia ka ngal khat hile thuak zo tu khi hi; kei hong langpan khat ii ka tungah hong kiphatsakna hile ama kung panin ka buu thei tu hi. 
Psalms55:13 Ahihang tuasia in ka kitholpui, ka pawl, ka lawm cii pha ahi nangma hi thong ni hi." 
Psalms55:14 Khat le khat sia thu ih kumkhawm a, Biakinnpi sungah ih bia khawm hi." 
Psalms55:15 Ka ngalte sia amate hun a cin ma in thi tahen; mithi khua ah amate a hingtang in zuansuk tahen! Siatna sia a inn sung le a thinsung uh ah om hi. 
Psalms55:16 Ahihang hong hu tu in Topa Pathian ka sam a, tuaciang ama in kei hong hun tu hi." 
Psalms55:17 Zingsang, sun le zan in ka thuumnate le ka taunate ama kungah paito a, tua ahikom ama in ka aw hong za tu hi." 
Psalms55:18 Ngal tazata ka simnate pan ama in kei bit takin hong ciapui kik tu hi. 
Psalms55:19 Tawntung hun pan a, hong uk Pathian in kei hong za tu a, amate a zo tu hi; banghang ziam cile amate kikheal nuam ngawlin, ama a kiita bua uh hi." 
Psalms55:20 Tu ma sia a, ka kitholpui pa in a lawmte sim hi; a kamciamte a peal hi." 
Psalms55:21 A kammal ahile noaidiat sangin neal zaw ahihang, a thinsung ah etsatna om hi; a kammalte sia sathau bangin neal a, ahihang tuate in namsau hiamte bangin bantan hi." 
Psalms55:22 Na ngimna uh te Topa nusiat vun, tua hile ama in hong hung tu hi; ama in mihing thumaante bangma hunin lelna thuaksak ngeingawl hi." 
Psalms55:23 Ahihang, Pathian awng, mihing thatte le a leilotte nangma in amate khanlang a cin ma in a thaankuulte ah na paipui tu hi. Kei ka hile nang kong muang tu hi." 
Psalms56:1 Pathian awng, Kei hong hesuak ta'n, banghang ziam cile kei hong kisim hi; ka ngalte in a tawntungin kei hong vawtsia hi." 
Psalms56:2 Kei hong langpante in nitangtumin kei hong sim hi. Kei hong simte tam mama hi. 
Psalms56:3 Vaanglianbelpa Topa awng ka lau ciang, ka muanna nang sungah kong nga hi." 
Psalms56:4 Pathian ka muang a, ka lau bua hi; ama ii hong kamciam hu in ama ka pok hi. Mihing lelel khat in kei bang hong law thei tu ziam?" 
Psalms56:5 Ka ngalte in nitangtumin ngim hong pia hi; kei hong liamsua natu in amate in ngeal tawntung hi! 
Psalms56:6 Amate in a buliana munte ah kikhawm in, hong thatlum thei tu in ki um uh a, ka ngamtatna theampo hong encik hi." 
Psalms56:7 Pathian awng, amate ngitlona hu in amate daan pia in; na thin uukna taw tua mite zothal in." 
Psalms56:8 Bangza in ngim nga ka hi sia nong he hi; nangma in ka thituite nong tepteesak zo hi. Na laibu sungah tuate kiciamtee hi ka na ngawl ziam? 
Psalms56:9 Nang kong sam ni in ka ngalte kiheak kiksak tu hi. Hi thu ka he hi: Pathian sia keima sangah hong pang — 
Psalms56:10 a kamciamte ka pok Topa ahi hi. 
Psalms56:11 Ama ka muang a, ka lau buatu hi. Mihing lelel khat in kei bang hong law thei tu ziam?" 
Psalms56:12 Pathian awng, kong kamciamsa sia kong pia tu hi; lungdamko piakkhiatna kong pia tu hi," 
Psalms56:13 banghang ziam cile nangma in thina panin nong suatak a, lelna panin nong keam hi. Tua ahikom Pathian ii mai, a nungtate tungah a taang khuavak sia sungah ka vak hi." 
Psalms57:1 Kei hong hesuak ta'n, Pathian awng, kei hong hesuak ta'n, banghang ziam cile ngammuanna nga natu in nang kong zuan hi. A nasia mama vuipi suangvalte a thim dong na thakhui ii limh nuai ah kidalna ka nga hi." 
Psalms57:2 Saangbel Pathian, ka kisapna theampo hong pia Pathian ka biakpui hi." 
Psalms57:3 Ama in vantung panin hong zo tu a hong hun tu hi; kei hong zothawte ama in zothal tu hi. Pathian in a itna kip le a thumaanna kei hong lak tu hi. 
Psalms57:4 Ngalte in kei hong kiim uum a, amate sia mihing sa a du tawpite bang ahi uh hi. Amate ii hatangte sia tei bang thaltang bang ahi uh hi; amate ii leeite sia a hiam namsau bang ahi uh hi." 
Psalms57:5 Van ah na letna lak in Pathian awng, leitung theampo ah na minthanna lak in." 
Psalms57:6 Ka ngalte in kei hong mat natu in ngeen khat phalh hi; thinngimna taw ka kidim hi. Amate in ka lampi ah vuum khat to uh a, ahihang amate ma tua ii sungah taaksuk uh hi." 
Psalms57:7 Pathian awng, muanna kicing ka nei hi; la ka sa tu a, nang kong pok tu hi!" 
Psalms57:8 Ka thaa awng, khanglo in! Ka tengtongh le ka liamlo awng, hong khanglo tavun. Tung sunni ka phong tu hi." 
Psalms57:9 Topa awng, minam tuatuamte sungah, lungdam kong ko tu hi. mihingte sungah nang kong pok tu hi." 
Psalms57:10 Na itna kip in vantungte ban hi; na thumaanna in van dong pha hi. 
Psalms57:11 Na letna van ah lak in, Pathian awng, na minthanna leitung theampo ah lak in." 
Psalms58:1 No ngamukte in a maan khensatna na pia ngei uh ziam? Mihing khat sim ii tungah thutang in thu na khen uh ziam? 
Psalms58:2 Khen ngawl nu hi! a sia na vawt thei tu uh teng bekma na ngaisun uh a, tuaciang ngam le lei ah ngoltol khialna liante vawt nu hi." 
Psalms58:3 Mihing ngilote in a khan tawntung ngamtatna maan ngawl taw nungta uh hi; a pian ni pan kipan leilot thuson uh hi. 
Psalms58:4 Amate sia ngulte bangin nguu taw kidim hi; amate in ngulsok nangong bangin a bil uh huh hi," 
Psalms58:5 tuate in ngul zol thiamte aw le za ngawl, mitbum thiamte phuisamna le za ngawl uh hi." 
Psalms58:6 Pathian awng, hi a kiitakhuai tawpite ii hate thiaktan in." 
Psalms58:7 Lei sungah tui tum bangin amate mang vadi tahen; lampi lai lopate bangin kisiikcil tahen. 
Psalms58:8 Amate sia buan ii khulup toktolte bang hi tahen; khuavak a mu ngeingawl a thisa a suak nausen khat bang hi tahen. 
Psalms58:9 Amate in zongh tel man ngawlin lopa bangin kivaattan hi; a lauhuai thin uukna taw Pathian in amate a nuntak lai ma in muutkeak tu hi. 
Psalms58:10 Mawneite daan a kipiak a mu uh ciang thutangte lungdam tu hi; amate in a seksolte ii chisan sung siikin tan tu uh hi. 
Psalms58:11 Mihingte in “Thutangte sia thaman kipia takpi hi; Leitung ah thu a khen Pathian khat om takpi hi,” a ci tu uh hi." 
Psalms59:1 Ka Pathian awng, ka ngalte khut sung panin hong hun ta'n; kei hong simte kung panin hong dal ta'n!" 
Psalms59:2 Tua mihing ngilote kung panin hong hun ta'n; tua mihing thatte kung pan hong suatak ta'n! 
Psalms59:3 En in! Amate in kei that tu in hong pang hi; mihing tatsiate ka lang ah hong kikhawmtua uh hi. Amate ii tuabang a, manlang tak a kei hong sim natu mun a zot uh sia, mawna khat po hang ahibuale ka tatkhialna khat po hang," 
Psalms59:4 tua ahibuale keima ii kicin laakna khat po hang zongh hi ngawl hi, Topa awng." 
Psalms59:5 Tho in, Topa Vaanglianbelpa Pathian awng, kei hong hu tu in hong kuan ta'n; Israel te ii Pathian awng, nangma ma in en in! Khanglo in, Pathian he ngawlte daan pia in; a ngilo ngual leeheak theite tungah hesuakna lak heak in!" 
Psalms59:6 Amate in nitak sangin hong heak kik a, ui bangin ngual ngalh a, khuapi sungah vak kawkoai uh hi." 
Psalms59:7 Amate ii hong selnonate le hong tawnnate ngai in. Amate ii kam sungah om a leei sia namsau taw kibang ahitazong, kuama in amate pau za ngawl tu in um uh hi." 
Psalms59:8 Ahihang Topa awng, nangma in amate na nuisan a, Pathian he ngawl theampo na selno hi." 
Psalms59:9 Na thahatna kong muang hi; nang sia ka bukna na hi hi, Pathian awng." 
Psalms59:10 Ka Pathian in kei hong it a, kei kungah hong pai tu hi; ama in ka ngalte ii ngallelna kei hong musak tu hi." 
Psalms59:11 Amate thatlum heak in, Pathian awng, tuabang hi thong le te ka mite in mangil tha thei tu hi. Topa, kote hong dal pa awng, Na thahatna taw amate thethaang in a, zo cip in." 
Psalms59:12 Mawna sia amate muk ah om hi; amate kammal theampo mawna vive ahi hi; a kiphatsakna sungah amate awkvalh tahen! Amate in longsia le leilot thu zangh ahikom," 
Psalms59:13 na thin uukna taw amate susia in; susia cimit in. Tuasia ciang a kuama po in Pathian in Israel te a uk hunlam he tu a, a ukna sia leitung bup ah kithung ahi hunlam tel tu hi." 
Psalms59:14 Ka ngalte in nitak sangin hong heak kik in, ui bangin ngual ngalh a, khuapi sungah vak kawkoai uh hi," 
Psalms59:15 an zongin a vak uite taw kibang a, an a kicingin mu buale mau uh hi." 
Psalms59:16 Ahihang na thahatna thu, la in ka sa tu hi; na itna kip sia zing simin a ngingin, la in ka sa tu hi. Nang sia ka bukna na hi zo a, ngimna sungah ka belhna na hi hi." 
Psalms59:17 Kei hong hungpa awng, nangma kong pok tu hi. Ka bukna sia Pathian hi a, kei hong it Pathian ahi hi." 
Psalms60:1 Nangma in kote nong nial zo a, Pathian awng, nong zothal zo hi. Ko tungah na thin uuk zo hi — ahihang tu in kote hong maingat kik ta'n." 
Psalms60:2 Leitangte nangma in na liingsak a na kekthamsak hi; tu in a keknate kimatsak kik in banghang ziam cile cimhtham tu in kithoai hi. 
Psalms60:3 Na mite nasia takin nong thuaksak hi; zukham bang keakin ka hoi uh hi. 
Psalms60:4 Nang hong thasiate tungah kidop natu thu na pia zo a, tua taw amate in lalna tu pan suakta thei tu uh hi." 
Psalms60:5 Na thahatna taw kote hong hun ta'n; na it, na mite a suatak natu in ko thungetna hong zo ta'n." 
Psalms60:6 Ama ii a thiangtho mun panin Pathian in, “Zawna mualsuana taw Shechem ka khentham tu a, Sukkoth Ngamkuam sia ka mite ka hawmsak tu hi." 
Psalms60:7 Gilead sia keima aa hi a, Manasseh zongh keima aa ahi hi. Ephraim sia ka thik lukhu hi a, Judah sia ka kumpi ciangkhut hi." 
Psalms60:8 Ahihang Moab sia kisilna kuangin ka zangh tu a, keima neisa ahi hunlam a kitel natu in ka peangdap taw Edom ka deang tu hi. Philistine te in kei tungah zawna mualsua in au tu ki um ziam?” ci hi." 
Psalms60:9 Pathian awng, luphung taw a ki uum khuapi sungah akua in kei hong paipui tu ziam? Edom ah akua in kei lam hong pui tu ziam?" 
Psalms60:10 Kote hong nial takpi zo ni ziam? Ka ngalkap honte taw hong mainawt pui ngawl tu ni ziam? 
Psalms60:11 Ngal hong dopui ta'n; mihingte hong huna sia mannung ngawl hi. 
Psalms60:12 Pathian ei sangah hong pang pole ih zo tu hi; ama in ih ngalte zo tu hi. 
Psalms61:1 Pathian awng, ka auna hong za ta'n; ka thungetna hong ngai ta'n." 
Psalms61:2 Thin kiamin inn taw a kikhuala na pan nang kong biakpui hi! A muanhuai bukna ah hong zotpui ta'n," 
Psalms61:3 banghang ziam cile nangma in ka kidalna na hi hi, ngalte ka nan natu a kho ngalnanna na hi hi." 
Psalms61:4 Ka khan tawntung na inn thiangtho sungah hong teangsak ta'n; na thakhui nuai ah ngammuanna hong ngasak ta'n. 
Psalms61:5 Pathian awng, kong kamciamsate nong za zo a, nang vaang hong piate ii neisate kei nong pia zo hi." 
Psalms61:6 Kumpipa ii nuntakna kum tampi belapsak in; a nuntakna sausak in. 
Psalms61:7 Pathian awng, nangma ompuina sungah ama in ngam uk tawntung tahen; na itna kip le na thumaanna taw ama sungsia in." 
Psalms61:8 Tua hi a, kong kamciamsate nang tungah ni simin kong piak ciang pokna la kong sak tawntung tu hi." 
Psalms62:1 Kei hong hun tu in Pathian thinsau takin ka ngak hi; Ama bekma ka suang hi. 
Psalms62:2 Ama bekma in kei hong sungsia a, hong hun hi; ama sia kei hong hungpa hi a, hong kizo thal ngei buatu hi." 
Psalms62:3 Dal a puk sa sia sangin a kho ngawl zaw mihing khat sia note theampo in bang tanvei sisim lai tu nu ziam? 
Psalms62:4 Ama vaang a kipiakna dinmun panin a khiasuk nuam bek hi thong nu hi; note in leilot thusonna sungah nuam na sa uh hi. Thupha piakna kammalte na zak uh hang, na thinsung uh ah ama na haamsiat uh hi." 
Psalms62:5 Keima in Pathian bek ka suang hi; ama ii sungah ka lametna ka koi hi. 
Psalms62:6 Ama bekma in kei hong sungsia a, hong hun hi; ama sia kei hong hungpa hi a, hong kizo thal ngei buatu hi." 
Psalms62:7 Kei hong kingupna le hong ki upatna sia Pathian tung pan bek hi; ama in a thahat kei hong sungsia pa ahi hi; ama in ka belhna ahi hi. 
Psalms62:8 Hun theampo sungah Pathian muang vun, ka mite awng. Na ngimna theampo ama ko vun, banghang ziam cile ama sia ih bukna hi." 
Psalms62:9 Mihingte sia, husan khat bang bek hi siat hi; a lian a no a kibangin man nei ngawl hi. Khaikhin tungah koi leang bangma ngit ngawl hi; tuate sia husan khat sangin zaangzaw lai hi." 
Psalms62:10 Ngoltolna sungah thin muang heak vun; sutolna taw meetna bangma nga tu in ki um heak vun; na haunate a khangto hial zongin tuate suang heak vun. 
Psalms62:11 Pathian in vaangletna sia ama aa hi a, ama ii itna sia kip hi ci in a son tamvei ma ka za hi." 
Psalms62:12 Topa awng, nangma tatak ma in mihing sim atu, a sep babangin thaman na pia hi." 
Psalms63:1 Pathian awng, nangma in ka Pathian na hi a, nangma kong thangai hi. Ka nuntakna buppi in nang hong dei hi; tui om ngawl, munko, lei tulsate in tui a du bangin ka thaa in nang hong du hi." 
Psalms63:2 Inn thiangtho sungah nang hong musak ta'n; nang sia bangza in minthang a thahat cisia hong musak ta'n. 
Psalms63:3 Nong itna kip sia nuntakna sangin phazaw hi, tua ahikom nang kong pok tu hi." 
Psalms63:4 Ka nuntak lai teng lungdam kong ko tu hi; ka khutte laamto in thu kong ngen tu hi. 
Psalms63:5 Ka thaa in kibuailamna an ne in lungkim tu a, pokna lungdamna late nang kong sak tu hi." 
Psalms63:6 Lupna tungah ka lup ciangin nang kong phawk a, zankhuateakin nang kong ngaisun hi;" 
Psalms63:7 banghang ziam cile nangma in a tawntungin kei hong hu pa na hi hi. Na thakhui ii limh nuai ah lungdam in la ka sa hi. 
Psalms63:8 Nangma kong luai a, na khut in hong keamcing hi." 
Psalms63:9 Kei hong thatlum nuamte mithi khua zuansuk tu uh hi. 
Psalms63:10 Ngal kisimna sungah amate kithatlum tu a, ngiapuite in a luangte ne tu uh hi." 
Psalms63:11 Pathian in ama zawna pia ahikom, kumpipa a lungdam tu hi. Pathian min taw kamciam a piate in ama pok tu a, ahihang leilot theite kam kihuksak tu hi." 
Psalms64:1 Ngim nga khi hi, Pathian awng, ka thungetna hong ngai ta'n! Ka ngalte kiita khi hi, ka nuntakna hong hun ta'n!" 
Psalms64:2 Mihing seksolte le mi ngilo honte ii hong thasawmna panin hong dal ta'n. 
Psalms64:3 Amate in a leei uh namsau bangin taat hiam uh a, tuaciang kamsia pau tu in thaltang kap tu bangin eal uh hi." 
Psalms64:4 Amate in zummawk leilot thute manlang takin kizelsak hi; amate in mihing phate lauthauh vai taw sonsia in lalsak uh hi. 
Psalms64:5 Amate in khat le khat sia ngual sawmku tu in kihanthawn uh hi; a thaangsia na mun tu kikum in, “Kuama in amate mu thei buan te” ci uh hi." 
Psalms64:6 Amate in a sia tupnate ngeal kholin, “A cingtaak khialna lian ngeal zo hing” ci uh hi. Mihingte thinsung le lungsung sia telhak thu hi." 
Psalms64:7 Ahihang Pathian in a thaltangte taw amate kap a, thakhat thu in liam uh hi." 
Psalms64:8 Ama in tua kammalte hu in amate susia tu hi; amate a mu theampo in a lu pei san tu uh hi. 
Psalms64:9 Amate theampo lau tu uh hi; Amate in Pathian sep sa nate ngaisun tu uh a, tuaciang ama ii sepnate sawson tu uh hi." 
Psalms64:10 Thutang mihing theampo in Topa sepnate hangin lungdam tu uh hi. Amate in ama sungah ngammuang tu uh hi; mipha theampo in ama pok tu uh hi. 
Psalms65:1 Pathian awng, Zion khua sungah nang kong pok tu uh le nang tungah ka kamciamna uh ka kholet tu uh sia a maan ahi hi," 
Psalms65:2 banghang ziam cile nangma in thungetnate na zo hi. Mun theampo panin mihingte in 
Psalms65:3 amate mawnate hangin nang hong zuan tu uh hi. Koma khialnate in hong zo hi, ahihang nangma in tuate na maisak hi." 
Psalms65:4 Na inn thiangtho sungah teang tu in na paipui, na teal sate mi nuamsate ahi uh hi. Na inn sungah na phate, na Biakinnpi thiangtho ii thuphate hangin ka lung uh kim tu hi." 
Psalms65:5 Zawna nong piakna taw kote ngetna nong zo a, ko nong ngup natu in nalamdangte na vawt hi. Leitung bup mihingte le a khuala tuipi ngal khat ah a omte in nang hong muang hi." 
Psalms65:6 Na vaangletna lian lakin, nangma in mualte na thahatna taw a om natu munah na koi hi." 
Psalms65:7 Nangma in tuipite hawkna le tui kihual ngingte na thimsak hi; nangma in mihingte ii ngamlumna na thimsak hi. 
Psalms65:8 Leitung bup in na sepsa na liante lamdang sa in om uh hi. Na nasepnate in lungdam aunate leimong khat pan leimong khat dong thengsak hi. 
Psalms65:9 Leitang na thinbotna na lakna in nguatui na puak a; leipha leihoi in na vawt hi. Luamte tui taw na dimsak hi; leitung ah an na piangsak hi. Na sepzia in hi bang ahi hi: 
Psalms65:10 a kitho sa lote tungah nguatui a kicing piikpeak in na zusak a, lei na zenhsak hi; nangma in leitangte sia nguatui taw na nipsak a, thingno ankungte na khangsak hi." 
Psalms65:11 Na phatna in bangza in an hauna piangsak ziam! Na paina theampo ah na a kicing takin om hi. 
Psalms65:12 Nganthana munte sia nganhon taw kidim hi; muallimveite sia lungdamna taw kidim hi; 
Psalms65:13 Lote sia tuu taw kidim a; ngamkuamte sia zungtaang taw kidim hi. Na theampo lungdamna taw au in lasa uh hi. 
Psalms66:1 Mihing theampo awng, lungdamin auna taw Pathian pok vun!" 
Psalms66:2 Ama ii minthanna la in sa vun a, a minthang pokna ama pia vun!" 
Psalms66:3 Pathian mun ah, “Na sep na vawtte bangza in lamdang ziam! Na vaangletna in lian lawlawm a, na ngalte in kiitakna taw na mai ah kun uh hi." 
Psalms66:4 Leitung mihing theampo in nangma hong bia uh hi; amate in pokna la hong sak uh a, amate in na min pokna la nang hong sak uh hi” ci vun." 
Psalms66:5 Hong pai tavun a, Pathian sepna sate, mihingte atu a lamdang a septe hong en tavun." 
Psalms66:6 Ama in tuipi sia leiko suaksak hi; ih taanghpupite in a peang uh taw ngun kaantan hi. Tua munah eite in ama ii sepna hu in ih lawp hi. 
Psalms66:7 Ama in a thahatna taw a tawntungin uk a, minam tuatuamte mitsuan hi. Ama langpanin kuama in tualngal tho heak hen." 
Psalms66:8 Minam theampo awng, ih Pathian pok vun; na pokna uh kiza tahen." 
Psalms66:9 Ama in eite a nungta in hong keam a, ih liik tu a oai bua hi." 
Psalms66:10 Pathian awng, kote hong sit zo ni hi; ngunn sia meisa taw a kithiansak bangin kote nong sittel zo hi." 
Psalms66:11 Thaang sungah nong awksak a, ka nungzaang uh ah vanhngit nong suan hi." 
Psalms66:12 Ka ngalte in nong tuanhcilsak hi; meikuang le namthuam kaantanin ka pai uh hi, ahihang tu in nangma in ngammuanna mun khat nong then hi." 
Psalms66:13 Na inn ah meihal biakpiakna kong paipui tu hi; kong kamciam sia kong pia tu hi. 
Psalms66:14 Ngim ka nga hun lai kong pia tu hi ci in kong kamciam teng kong pia tu hi. 
Psalms66:15 Biaknatau tungah hal tu in tuute ka pia tu hi; khuitalte le kealte sangaw biakpiakna in ka nei tu a, a meikhu in van ah kaato tu hi." 
Psalms66:16 Pathian a patoaite theampo awng, hong pai tavun a ngai vun, tuasia ciang kei atu ama sep theampo kong son tu hi." 
Psalms66:17 Hu ngenin ama ka biakpui hi; late taw ama ka pok hi. 
Psalms66:18 Ka mawnate awlmawk ngawl hi leng Topa in kei hong nangai ngawl tu hi. 
Psalms66:19 Ahihang Pathian in kei hong za takpi zo hi; ka thungetna hong ngai zo hi. 
Psalms66:20 Pathian ka pok hi, banghang ziam cile ama in ka thungetna hong nial ngawl a, hong itna kip sia kei kung panin la kik ngawl hi." 
Psalms67:1 Pathian awng, kote hong hesuak ta'n a, thupha hong pia ta'n; cikna taw kote hong en ta'n," 
Psalms67:2 tua hile leitung bup in na deina he thei tu hi; minam tuatuamte in na ngupna he thei tu hi. 
Psalms67:3 Pathian awng, mihingte in nang hong pok tahen; mihing theampo in nang hong pok tahen!" 
Psalms67:4 Minam tuatuamte lungdam in lawpna taw lasa hen, banghang ziam cile thukhaikim in mihingte tungah thu na khen hi; tuaciang leitung minam theampo lam na lak hi." 
Psalms67:5 Pathian awng, mihingte in nang hong pok tahen; mihing theampo in nang hong pok tahen!" 
Psalms67:6 Leitang in lo ante piangsak zo hi; Pathian, eite Pathian in thupha hong pia zo hi." 
Psalms67:7 Pathian in eite thupha hong pia zo hi; mun theampo ah om mihingte in ama upat thei tahen. 
Psalms68:1 Pathian hong dingto a, a ngalte kithethaangsak hi. Ama a ensante in lelna taw taikeak uh hi." 
Psalms68:2 Meikhu a kiseamkeak bangin amate hawlkeak hi; khuainunte meikuang mai ah a tuithap bangin, mihing seksolte Pathian mai ah a mangthang uh hi." 
Psalms68:3 Ahihang thutangte in ama ii omna ah lungdam in lawp uh hi; amate lungdam in, lawpna taw au uh hi." 
Psalms68:4 Pathian tungah lasa vun, ama min pokna lasa vun; meei tungah a to pa atu in lampi sial khol vun. Ama min sia Topa hi a, ama ii mai ah lungdam vun!" 
Psalms68:5 Ama ii Biakinnpi thiangtho sungah a teang Pathian in tangate khoi a, meingongte sungsia hi." 
Psalms68:6 Ama in pawl nei ngawl, a ngamkhingte ii teen natu inn khat pia a, thongtaakte lungdam suatakna sungah lampui hi; ahihang a leedote ngam tawnghtolna munah teang tu uh hi." 
Psalms68:7 Pathian awng, na mihingte lam na pui hun, sennealngam kaantan in mai na nawk pui ciangin," 
Psalms68:8 Sinai Pathian ahi Israel te ii Pathian hong paina hangin, lei kiliing a, van in nguatui buaksuk hi." 
Psalms68:9 Nangma in ngua na zusak piikpeak a, a tul sa na leitang na puuapha kik hi;" 
Psalms68:10 na mite in tua munah a inn sa uh hi; na phatna taw mizawngte kisap teng na sik hi. 
Psalms68:11 Topa in thupia a, numeite tam mama in tua thu son uh hi:" 
Psalms68:12 “Kumpipate le a ngalkap honte taikeak hi!” ci uh hi. Inn ngak nupite in ngalte neisa a kiman teng hawm uh hi: 
Psalms68:13 a thakhui khamh cipha taw a tee vakil, ngunn taw a kituam vakhu limte zongh kihel hi. (Banghangin ngal kido ni in note pawlkhat tuu khawk sungah om nu ziam?)" 
Psalms68:14 Vaanglianbelpa Pathian in kumpipate Zalmon Mual tungah a thethaang ciang tua munah ama in vuuk taaksak hi. 
Psalms68:15 Bashan mual sia mualdawn tam mama a nei mual khat hi a, bangza in a nasia mual ahi ziam!" 
Psalms68:16 Banghangin a nasia na mualdawn saangte panin Pathian ii a ten natu a teal mualtung sia zawnsakna taw en ni ziam? Topa sia tua munah a tawntungin teang tu hi! 
Psalms68:17 A thahat siphu ngalleang tul tampite taw Topa in Sinai panin a thiangtho mun zuan hi. 
Psalms68:18 Ama in a saangna munte ah kaato a, a ngalmat sa tam mama tonpui hi; ama in a leedo mite tung panin letsong saang hi. Tua munah Topa Pathian teang tu hi." 
Psalms68:19 Ni khat zawkciang ni khat ih vanhngit hong puaksak Topa pok vun; ama in eite hong hunkhia Pathian ahi hi. 
Psalms68:20 Eite Pathian sia hong hunkhia Pathian ahi hi; ama in Topa, eite Topa hi a, thina panin eite hong suatak hi." 
Psalms68:21 A mawna a kheal nuam ngawl, a ngalte ii lutang sia Pathian in sutham takpi tu hi." 
Psalms68:22 Topa in, “Na ngalte Bashan panin kong paipui kik tu hi; tuipi thukna panin amate ka lato kik tu hi," 
Psalms68:23 tua hile amate chisan sung siikin na tan thei tu uh a, na uite in a du zaza liak thei tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Psalms68:24 Pathian awng, zawna mualsuana taw ka kumpipa, ka Pathian ii a biakinn thiangtho sung a zotna sia a kuama po in mu tek hi." 
Psalms68:25 La sate masa a, music thiamte nungkhak in, a lai ah numeite in daalkual khuangnote tumin pai uh hi." 
Psalms68:26 “A mite kikhopna sungah Pathian pok vun; No Jacob suan theampo awng, Topa pok tek vun!” ci uh hi." 
Psalms68:27 A masa phitin unau sungah a nobel ahi Benjamin suante hong pai a, a zom in Judah suan lampuite le amate pawlte, a nung panin Zebulun le Nephtali suante ii lampuite in zui uh hi." 
Psalms68:28 Pathian awng, kumpipate ii nang letsong hong piakna Jerusalem na Biakinnpi pan, ko atu na zak, na vaangletnate hong lak ta'n." 
Psalms68:29  
Psalms68:30 Pumpa sungah a om ngamsa ahi, Egypt te teih in; khuinote taw a omkhawm khuital hon ahi, minamte theampo na mai ah kunin a ngunn nei uhte nang hong piak mateng in, teih in. Ngal a kin mihingte thethaang in." 
Psalms68:31 Egypt ngam panin tongciin uliante hong pai tu hi; Ethiopia mite in Pathian tungah a khutte laamto in thungen tu uh hi. 
Psalms68:32 Leitung kumpi ngamte awng, Pathian tungah lasa vun, Topa pokna lasa vun." 
Psalms68:33 Taanghlai a, a om van, tua van ah a to pa pok vun. Ama ii a vaanglian awpui ngai vun." 
Psalms68:34 Pathian ii vaangletna thangsak vun; A uk theina vaang sia Israel te tungah om a, ama thahatna sia van ah om hi." 
Psalms68:35 Israel te ii Pathian a thiangtho inn pan hong pai ciangin bangza in kiitakhuai ziam! Ama in thahatna le vaangletna a mite tungah pia hi. Pathian pok vun! 
Psalms69:1 Hong hun ta'n, Pathian awng! Tui in ka ngawng ciang hong khum hi;" 
Psalms69:2 Buan thuk sungah ka tum suk a, lei ngum mun om ngawl hi; tui thukna sung ka theng a, tuihualte hangin tui ka ta dektak hi." 
Psalms69:3 Hu ngenin ka biapupuina taw ka tha bo a, ka longtawl taak hi. Nong hu tu kong zawzonna ka mit taak zo hi." 
Psalms69:4 Bangma thu om ngawl a, kei hong ensante sia ka lu a samzamte sangin tamzaw hi. Ka ngalte in kei langpanna leilot thu son hi; amate hat a, kei hong thatlum nuam hi. Ka nguk ngawl bul nate amate in hong pia kiksak hi." 
Psalms69:5 Pathian awng, ka mawnate nang kung panin kiseal ngawl hi; bangzata mawmaw ka hi sia nong he hi." 
Psalms69:6 Nangma hong muangte maizum a pia hong hisak heak in, Vaanglianpipa Topa Vaanglianbelpa awng! Nangma hong biate tungah a mindaisak hong hisak heak in, Israel te ii Pathian awng." 
Psalms69:7 Kei hong kiselnona sia nangma hang hi a, maizumna taw ka kikhucip hi." 
Psalms69:8 Kei sia ka suapuite atu in khualmi bang ka hi a, ka innkuanpuite atu in ngamdangmi bang ka hi hi." 
Psalms69:9 Na Biakinnpi atu ka thangaina in ka sungah mei bangin kuang liang hi. nang hong kiselnona kammalte kei tung hong tu hi. 
Psalms69:10 An tanna taw keima le keima kiniamkhiak in ka om ciang, mihingte in hong phunsan hi;" 
Psalms69:11 heena lakna puante ka silh hi, tuaciangin amate in hong nuisan hi." 
Psalms69:12 Amate in lampite ah kei thu son a, zukhamte in kei huvau la phuak uh hi." 
Psalms69:13 Ahihang, Topa awng, kei ka hile nang tungah thu kong ngen tu hi; na teal hun khat ciangin kong ngetna hong zo ta'n, Pathian awng. Nong itna lianpi hu in hong zo ta'n, banghang ziam cile kong hun tu ci na kamciam sia na kipsak hi." 
Psalms69:14 Buannawng sungah ka tumsuk natu panin hong hun ta'n; ka ngalte kung panin hong keamcing ta'n, tuithuk sung panin hong hun ta'n." 
Psalms69:15 Tuiliim namthuam in hong khumsak heak in; tui thukna ah hong tasak heak in a, thaankuul sungah hong taaksuksak heak in." 
Psalms69:16 Topa awng, nong itna kip ii phatna sungah, kong ngetna hong zo ta'n; nong ciliapna lian taw kei sang hong nga ta'n!" 
Psalms69:17 Na naseampa kung pan nangma le nangma kiseal heak in; kei sia ngimna lianpi thuak khi hi — tu mama in hong zo ta'n! 
Psalms69:18 Kei kungah hong pai ta'n a, hong hun ta'n; ka ngalte khut sung panin hong suatak ta'n." 
Psalms69:19 Kei hong kiselnona, hong min daisaknate le, hong ngen ngasaknate na he hi; ka ngalte theampo na mu hi." 
Psalms69:20 Hong kiselnona in ka thin hong tamhsak a, thinkiam in ka om hi. Hesuakna ka lamet hang koima ah a om bua hi; heenepna muangmaw ka hihang ka mu zo bua hi." 
Psalms69:21 Ka ngilkial ciangin amate in nguu hong pia hi; ka dangko ciangin amate in zuhau hong pia hi. 
Psalms69:22 Amate ii poai khaamnate in amate lalna hi tahen; amate ii a thiangtho kibuailamna sia amate kiamsuk natu hi tahen. 
Psalms69:23 Amate a mit tawsakin! Amate a tawntungin a cingngu zawsak in! 
Psalms69:24 Na thin uukna amate tungah tungsak in; na thangsiatna sia amate tungah tu tahen. 
Psalms69:25 Amate ii ngiaphualte kinusia tahen; amate ii buk sungah kuama kihingkhoai heak hen. 
Psalms69:26 Nangma ii daan na piak sate amate in vawtsia hi; nangma ii na liamsakte ii thuaknate amate in thuson in nei uh hi. 
Psalms69:27 Amate mawna theampo tepteena khat nei in; nang ii ngupna sungah amate kihelsak heak in. 
Psalms69:28 Nuntakna laibu sung pan amate min sia kimel tahen; na mite a kitepteena lai sungah amate kihel heak hen. 
Psalms69:29 Ahihang kei sia na sa in thinkiam in ka om hi; Pathian awng, hong laamto ta'n a, hong hun ta'n!" 
Psalms69:30 La khat taw Pathian ka pok tu hi; ama ii letna sia ama tungah lungdamkona taw ka thangsak tu hi. 
Psalms69:31 Hisia in khuite taw ama biakpiakna sangin khuital khanthin sa khat taw sangaw biakpiakna a piak sangin Topa lungdamsak zaw tu hi. 
Psalms69:32 A kizothawte in hisia a mu uh ciangin a lungdam tu uh hi; Pathian a biate kihansua tu hi. 
Psalms69:33 Topa in a kitaangsamhte ngetna ngai a, thongtaak a mihingte a mangil bua hi."
