Psalms69:34 Vantung le leitung awng, tuipi le a sung a om a nungta theampo awng, Pathian pok vun." 
Psalms69:35 Ama in Jerusalem hun tu a, Judah khuapite sa kik tu hi. Ama mite tua munah teang tu a, tua leitang lua tu uh hi;" 
Psalms69:36 a naseamte ii suan le paalte in tua ngam lua tu a, ama a itte tua munah teang tu uh hi." 
Psalms70:1 Pathian awng, hong hun ta'n! Topa awng, tu ma in kei hong hu ta'n!" 
Psalms70:2 Kei hong thasawmte in lelna le thinbuaina thuak tahen. Kei ngim nganate hu in, a lungdamte in nungkin kik tahen a, maimawl tahen." 
Psalms70:3 Kei hong selnote in a lelna hu in thinkiam tahen. 
Psalms70:4 Nang hong zuan theampo lungdam in thinnuam tahen. Nangma ii nong ngupna hu a, lungdam a ko thei theampo in, “Pathian bangza in lian ziam!” ci tawntung tahen." 
Psalms70:5 Ka tha zawmin zawngkhal khi hi; ka kungah manlangin hong pai ta'n, Pathian awng. Nangma in kei hong ngumpa le ka Topa na hi a — kei hong hu memeang ta'n!" 
Psalms71:1 Topa awng, kidalna nga natu in nang kong zuan zo hi; lelna hong thuaksak ngei heak in!" 
Psalms71:2 Nangma in thutang na hikom hong hu ta'n a, hong suatak ta'n. Kong ngetna hong ngai ta'n a, hong hun ta'n!" 
Psalms71:3 Kei atu in a muanhuai belna mun le kei hong dal tu a kho kulhpi hong hi ta'n; nangma in ka bukna le ka kihuukna na hi hi. 
Psalms71:4 Ka Pathian awng, mihing tatsiate kung pan le, mihing ngilote le a khansiate thahatna panin kei hong suatak ta'n." 
Psalms71:5 Vaanglianpipa Topa awng, ka lametna sia nang sungah kong koi hi; ka khanmoi hun lai pan kipanin nangma kong muang hi." 
Psalms71:6 Ka khan tawntung nangma kong suang zo hi; ka pian ni pan kipan nangma in nong hung nong dal tawntung zo hi. A tawntungin nang kong pok tu hi. 
Psalms71:7 Ka nuntakzia sia mihing tam mama ii ettee ahi hi, banghang ziam cile nangma in a thahat hong hungpa na hi hi." 
Psalms71:8 Nitangtum in nang kong pok a, na minthanna ka thangsak hi." 
Psalms71:9 Tu in ka khanhaam ciangin kei hong nial heak in a; ka thatual ciangin kei hong nusia heak in. 
Psalms71:10 Ka ngalte in kei hong thatlum nuam a; amate in kikumin kei hong thasawm uh hi. 
Psalms71:11 Amate in, “Pathian in ama nusia zo hi; a nung pan zui in ama man tawng; ama a hun tu kuama om ngawl hi,” ci uh hi." 
Psalms71:12 Pathian awng, tuaza a khuala na ah om heak in ka Pathian awng; kei hong hu tu in hong manlang ta'n!" 
Psalms71:13 Kei hong simte in lelna le lalcipna thuak tahen. Kei hong liamsua nuamte in maizumna le minsiatna thuak tahen. 
Psalms71:14 Ka lametna nang sungah kong koi tawntung tu a; nang sia kong pok thawthua lai tu hi. 
Psalms71:15 Na phatnate ka son tu a; tua thu sia kei ii tel zawk zongh hi ngawl hi nave, nitangtumin, na ngupna thu ka son tu hi." 
Psalms71:16 Na vaangletna ka pok tu hi, Vaanglianpipa Topa awng; nangma bek ii nei, na phatnate ka thangsak tu hi." 
Psalms71:17 Ka khanmoi hun lai pan kipan nangma in nong hil zo a, tu dong ma in a lamdang na septe ka son lai hi." 
Psalms71:18 Tu in ka huai zo a ka puak zongh kaang zo hi. Kei hong nusia heak in, Pathian awng! hong pai pheang tu khang kikte tungah na vaangletna le na thahatna ka thansak laitakin keima taw hong omkhawm ta'n." 
Psalms71:19 Pathian awng, thutang na hina in van ban hi. Nangma in na liante na seam zo a; nang taw a kibang kuama om ngawl hi." 
Psalms71:20 Ngimna le thuaknate kei tungah nong tungsak zo hi, ahihang nangma in ka tha ka ngal nong dim kik tu a; thaankuul panin nong keam tu hi." 
Psalms71:21 Nong liansak seseam tu a; nong heeneam kik tu hi. 
Psalms71:22 Tengtongh tumna taw nang kong pok tatak tu hi. Na thu maanna kong pok tu hi, ka Pathian awng. Israel te ii a Thiangtho Pa awng, ka tengtongh tumin pokna la kong sak tu hi." 
Psalms71:23 Tumtheite nang tungah kong tum ciangin lungdamna taw ka au tu hi; ka thin ka tak theampo taw la ka sa tu hi banghang ziam cile nangma in nong hun zo hi. 
Psalms71:24 Nitangtum in thutang na hina ka son tu hi, banghang ziam cile kei hong vawtsia nuamte kizo thal zo a, kimaizumsak zo hi." 
Psalms72:1 Pathian awng, na thutang taw thu a khen natu in kumpipa thuhil in; nangma ii a kikhaikim thukhenna sia ama hawm in," 
Psalms72:2 tua hile ama in na mite thutang taw uk tu a, a kizothawte thumaanna taw uk tu hi." 
Psalms72:3 Ngam le lei in khantona nga tahen a, thutanna he tahen." 
Psalms72:4 Kumpipa in mizawngte tungah thutang in thukhen tahen a; a cimawte hu tahen a, Amate a zothawte zothal tahen." 
Psalms72:5 Hong pai tu khang hunte sungah ni a taan laiteng, tha ii khuavak a piak laiteng na mite in nang hong bia tahen." 
Psalms72:6 Kumpipa sia lo sungah nguazu bang, leitang tungah nguatui buak bang hi tahen." 
Psalms72:7 Ama khan sungah thutanna khangto tahen a, khantona sia tha in khuavak a piak lai theampo in om tahen." 
Psalms72:8 Ama ukna kumpi ngam sia tuipi khat pan tuipi khat dong kithung tu a, Euphrates ngun pan leimong dong hi tu hi." 
Psalms72:9 Sennealngammite in ama mai ah a kun tu uh hi; a ngalte lei ah a bok tu uh hi. 
Psalms72:10 Spain le tuikulhte kumpipate in ama letsong pia tu uh hi; Arabia le Ethiopia kumpipate in ama tel pia tu uh hi. 
Psalms72:11 Kumpipa a kici theampo in ama mai ah kun tu uh a; minam theampo in ama atu sepsak tu uh hi. 
Psalms72:12 Ama a ko mizawngte theampo le a cimaw a kingaingonte theampo sia ama in suaktasak hi. 
Psalms72:13 Ama in mizawngte le a thazawmte mulkim a, a kitaangsamh te ii nuntakna a hun hi." 
Psalms72:14 Ama in amate sia kizawthawkna le ngoltolna panin suatak hi; amate nuntak sia ama atu in man nei hi. 
Psalms72:15 Kumpipa a khansau tahen! Ama sia Arabia pan khamhte kipia tahen; ama atu in thungetna a tawntung kivawt tahen; Pathian thupha ama tungah om tawntung tahen! 
Psalms72:16 Ngam sungah antang tam mama om tahen; mualte sia lo ante taw kituam tahen, tua lo ante sia Lebanon ah ankungte bangin tak nei in nga thiam tahen. Ngampa sung lopate taw kidim bang keakin khuapite sia mite taw kidim tahen." 
Psalms72:17 Kumpipa min kimangil ngei heak hen a; ni a taan laiteng ama minthang tahen. Kumpipa tungah ama in thupha a piak bangin minam tuatuamte in Pathian tungah thupha ngen tahen. 
Psalms72:18 Israel te ii Pathian, Topa pok vun! Ama bekma in hi nalamdangte vawt hi." 
Psalms72:19 Ama min tuanngen sia a tawntungin pok vun! Ama ii minthanna in leitung bup ah dim tahen. Amen! Amen! 
Psalms72:20 Hisia in Jesse ii tapa David ii thungetna a tawpna ahi hi. 
Psalms73:1 Pathian in thinsung thiangtho a nei Israel te atu in pha tatak hi. 
Psalms73:2 Ahihang ka thinmuanna ka thasua dedek a; ka upna bo dektak hi," 
Psalms73:3 banghang ziam cile keima in mihing seksolte atu in na theampo a dik veu in a pian ka mu ciangin a kiphasakte ka eang hi. 
Psalms73:4 Amate in natna thuak ngawl a; thahat in a ciidam uh hi. 
Psalms73:5 Midangte bangin amate in thuak ngawl uh a; ngualdangte ngim nga bangin amate ngim nga ngawl hi. 
Psalms73:6 Tua ahikom amate in kiphatsakna sia khi bangin aw a, ngoltolna sia puantual bangin sil uh hi;" 
Psalms73:7 amate thinsung in ngitlona pusua in, a thinsung uh sia seksol tupnate taw komla uh hi." 
Psalms73:8 Amate in midangte nuisan zazaan in kamsia veu pau uh a; kiphasak in ngualdangte zawthawk sawm uh hi. 
Psalms73:9 Amate in vantung ah a om Pathian sonsia in leitung ah mihingte sia kiletsakna taw thupia uh hi," 
Psalms73:10 tuabangin Pathian ii mihingte ngawngawn in amate sangah kiheak in tuaciang amate son theampo a um papaih uh hi. 
Psalms73:11 Amate in: “Pathian in he buan te; A saangbel Pa in phawk buan te” ci uh hi. 
Psalms73:12 Mihing seksolte in tuabang ahi uh hi. Amate hau a, nga thawthua lai uh hi." 
Psalms73:13 Tua ahile a thiangtho in kikeam a, mawna ka vawt ngawl sia a luithawthong ahi tu ziam?" 
Psalms73:14 Pathian awng, nangma in nitangtumin nong thuaksak a; zing simin daan nong pia hi." 
Psalms73:15 Tuabangin kampau ka hi le, na mite khat ii ngamtat tu bangin a kilawm in ngamta ngawl ka hi tu hi." 
Psalms73:16 Hi thu haksa sia ngaisun tu in ka hanciam a," 
Psalms73:17 ahihang na Biakinn sung ka tum mateng in, kei atu haksa lei hi. Tua zawkciang mihing seksolte tungah bang piang tu ci in ka tel hi." 
Psalms73:18 Nangma in amate sia a naalna munah na koi tu a, siatcipna sungah na liiksak tu hi." 
Psalms73:19 Amate thakhat thu in kisusia in, a kiitakhuai sungah bocip uh hi." 
Psalms73:20 Amate sia zingsang a, a bo vangeu zanmang bang ahi hi; nangma nong thaw tak ciang, Topa awng, amate mang vadi hi." 
Psalms73:21 Ka ngaisutna a siat ciang le ka thin a nat ciang," 
Psalms73:22 kei sia nganhingte bangin ka mawmaw hi; nang kong tel bua hi. 
Psalms73:23 Ahihang nang kungah a nai in kong om tawntung a, nangma in ka khut panin nong len hi." 
Psalms73:24 Nong hilnate taw lam nong lak a, a tawpna ah nangma in upat minphatna taw nong saang tu hi." 
Psalms73:25 Vantung ah nang simngawl bangdang ka nei ziam? Nang kong nei zawk nungsang leitung ah bangdang ka dei lai tu ziam? 
Psalms73:26 Ka khua ngaisutna le ka pumpi thazawm tu hi. Ahihang Pathian sia ka thahatna hi; a tawntungin ka kisap sia ama bekma ahi hi. 
Psalms73:27 Nang hong taisante lalcip nanak tu a; nang tungah hong thumaan ngawlte na susia tu hi. 
Psalms73:28 Ahihang kei ka hile, Pathian nai ah ka om tu, Topa Pathian ka belh tu le ama ii vawt sate theampo ka thansak tu sia bangza in pha ziam!" 
Psalms74:1 Banghangin hi bangin kote hong nusia ni ziam, Pathian awng? Nangma mite tungah a tawntungin na thin uuksak tu ni ziam?" 
Psalms74:2 Khuangei lai pek a, nangma mama atu na tealsa mihingte phawk in, saltanna sung pan nangma minam tu a, na tat sate phawk in. Khatvei lai a, na teenna mun Zion Mual sia phawk in." 
Psalms74:3 Hi a laltham sate munah pai in; ih ngalte in Biakinn sungah na theampo lalsak zo hi. 
Psalms74:4 Na ngalte in na Biakinn sungah zawna mualsuana taw au zo uh hi; amate in tua munah zawna lim in laandial khai zo hi. 
Psalms74:5 Amate in hei taw thing a phuk, thingphukte taw kibang hi." 
Psalms74:6 Amate in a kizeam thingpheak theampo a hei le a sekpuite taw saattham uh hi. 
Psalms74:7 Amate in nangma ii Biakinn lalsakin mei taw hal uh hi; amate in nang hong kibiakna mun ninsak hi. 
Psalms74:8 Amate in eite hong sucip nuam hi; ngamsung a thiangthona mun theampo haltum uh hi. 
Psalms74:9 Koma ii tepteena lim thiangtho theampo bo siat zo hi; kamsaangte kuama taang nawn ngawl a, hisia bang tanvei khuangei tu ziam ci in kuama in he ngawl hi." 
Psalms74:10 Pathian awng, bang tanvei, ih ngalte in nang hong nuisan tu ziam? Na min a tawntungin hong selno tu ziam?" 
Psalms74:11 Banghangin kote nong hu tu sia nial ni ziam? banghangin na khutte na nungsangah seal ni ziam? 
Psalms74:12 Ahihang Pathian awng, nang sia a kipat panin koma kumpipa na hi hi; nangma in kote tamvei ma nong hun zo hi." 
Psalms74:13 Na thahatna lian taw tuipi na khen a, tuipi sung nganhing lianpuite lutang na sutham hi;" 
Psalms74:14 Leviathan nganhing lianpui ii lutang na sutham a, a luang sia sennealngam sungah, nganhingte vaakna in na nei hi." 
Psalms74:15 Ciktui le tuisamhte na luangsak a, ngun liante na kangsak hi." 
Psalms74:16 Nangma in sun le zan na bitphua a, ni le tha a omna tek ah na koi hi;" 
Psalms74:17 nangma in leitung ii mong na omsak hi; khuakhaal le phalbi hun na vawt hi. 
Psalms74:18 Ahihang Topa awng, na ngalte ii nang hong nuisat uh sia ciamtee in, pathian sel amate in nang hong zawngsak uh hi." 
Psalms74:19 A cimaw na mite a ngilo a ngalte khut sungah nusia heak in; a kivawtsia, na mite mangil heak in!" 
Psalms74:20 Kote taw na vawt thuciamna sia ciamtee in. Ngam kingsong a zingna mun theampo ah zawthawk buaina om hi. 
Psalms74:21 A kinengcip mihingte maizumsak heak in; tua mizawng le mi cimawte in hong pok tahen. 
Psalms74:22 Pathian awng, nangma thu in hong kithawn ta'n a, na thu khosak in! Sunkhuateak in pathian sel mihingte in nang hong nuisan zazan ahi hunlam ciamtee in." 
Psalms74:23 Na ngalte ii thin uuk auna le nang hong langpante ii a tawntung ngamlumna na mangil heak in. 
Psalms75:1 Pathian awng, lungdam kong ko uh a, nang tungah lungdam hong ko hi ung! Nang bangza lian ci ka thangsak uh a, na vawtsa a lamdang nate ka son uh hi." 
Psalms75:2 Pathian in “Thukhen natu hun khat ka ciangtan zo a, thu maanna taw thu ka khen tu hi." 
Psalms75:3 Bitphua sa a nungta theampo liingin leitung mama a ngawk zongin a tawdapte a kho in ka koi tu hi. 
Psalms75:4 A seksolte a kisakthei ngawl natu ka son hi; 
Psalms75:5 a kisuantaakna uh a kheal natu ka son hi,” ci hi." 
Psalms75:6 Thukhenna sia nisuana le nitumna pan ahizong saksang pan le thangsang pan ahizong hong pai ngawl hi. 
Psalms75:7 Thukhenpa sia Pathian hi; ama in pawlkhat sia mawsak a, pawlkhat sia suaktasak hi." 
Psalms75:8 Topa in a khut sungah hai khat toai in, a thin uukna zu ciik taw kidim hi. Ama in tua zu bungh keak in a seksol theampo in ne uh hi; a mal bo dongin amate in ne siat uh hi." 
Psalms75:9 Ahihang kei ka hile Jacob ii Pathian thu ka son tu le ama pokna la ka sak tu tawp ngeingawl tu khi hi. 
Psalms75:10 Ama in mihing seksolte thahatna suktansak tu a, ahihang thutangte thahatna sia kikhanto tu hi." 
Psalms76:1 Pathian sia Judah ngam sungah kihe hi; ama min sia Israel ngam sungah ki upat hi. 
Psalms76:2 Jerusalem ah ama ii inn om hi; Zion Mual tungah teang hi. 
Psalms76:3 Tua munah ama in ngalte ii ngalhiam theampo ahi a thaltangte, a lumte le a namsaute sutham hi." 
Psalms76:4 Pathian awng, na minthang lawlawm hi! Na ngalte na zawna mual pan nong heak kik ciang, na vaanglian lawlawm hi." 
Psalms76:5 A ngalkap hangte sia a neisa theampo uh kiluak siatin amate in tu in a thite mutna ah a mut laitak hi a, amate hatna le thiamna theampo sia kimanna a nei bua hi." 
Psalms76:6 Jacob ii Pathian awng, nangma in amate na tawn ciang siphute le a tung tote pukin thi uh hi." 
Psalms76:7 Ahihang Topa awng, nang sia a kuama theampo in hong kiita hi. Na thin uuk ciang na mai ah kuama ding zo ngawl hi." 
Psalms76:8 Vantung panin na thukhenna na kitelsak hi; leitung ah a kinengcip theampo hut natu," 
Psalms76:9 thukhen tu in nong dinto tak ciang, leitung sia lau in thim khipkhep hi." 
Psalms76:10 Mihingte thin uukna in nang atu in pokna tam vaial a pian natu hi bek hi; ngal kidona pan a taang laite in nangma ii poai khaam tan tu uh hi. 
Psalms76:11 Ama piak tu in na kamciamte Topa na Pathian ii tungah pia vun; no a nai ah a om minamte theampo awng ama atu letsongte puak vun. Pathian in ama kiita tu in mihingte a vawt hi; 
Psalms76:12 ama in a kiphasak kumpipa tapate kiniamkhiaksak in, kumpi liante sia lausak vadil hi." 
Psalms77:1 Pathian tungah nging takin ka au hi; nging takin ka au ciang ama in hong za hi. 
Psalms77:2 Ngimna hun sung Topa tungah thu ka ngen hi; zankhuateakin thungen in ka khut ka laamto hi, ahihang heenepna ka mu bua hi." 
Psalms77:3 Pathian ka ngaisut ciangin ka vuisa hi; khua ka ngai susut ciang ka thinkiam hi. 
Psalms77:4 Ama in zankhuateak khangciim in hong koi hi; ka thinngim mama ahikom ka pau zo bua hi. 
Psalms77:5 A bosa nite ka ngaisun a, taanghlai kumte ka phawk hi." 
Psalms77:6 Zan hunte khua ngaisusutna in ka zangh hi; ka ngaisusun a, hi bangin keima le keima ka kidongh hi:" 
Psalms77:7 “Topa in hong nial top tu ziam? Ama in eite dik hong sa ngei nawn ngawl tu ziam? 
Psalms77:8 Ama in eite hong it nawn ngawl ziam? A kamciamte kip nawn ngawl ziam? 
Psalms77:9 Pathian in hesuakna a nei tu mangil zo ziam? A thin uukna taw khuangai huai a sak theina theak zo ziam? 
Psalms77:10 Tuaciangin, “Na ka sakbel in hi thu ahi hi — Pathian sia a vaang lian nawn ngawl ci thu hi,” ka ci hi." 
Psalms77:11 Topa awng, na nasepna liante ka phawk tu hi; hun bosa sungah a lamdang na sepnate ka phawk kik tu hi." 
Psalms77:12 Na sepsa theampo ka ngaisun tu hi; a nasia mama na sepna theampo ka ngaisusun tu hi. 
Psalms77:13 Pathian awng, na sep na vawt theampo thiangtho hi. Nang za in a lian pathian om ngawl hi." 
Psalms77:14 Nangma in nalamdang a vawt Pathian na hi hi; na thahatna sia minam tuatuamte tungah na lak hi. 
Psalms77:15 Jacob le Joseph suan na mite, na vaangletna taw na hun hi." 
Psalms77:16 Pathian awng, tuite in nangma hong mu ciang lau uh a, tuipi tawtawngte liing hi." 
Psalms77:17 Meeikaaite in nguatui buak suk hi; van panin vanto ngingkeak a, khualengte mun theampo ah taangkeak hi." 
Psalms77:18 Na vanto sia a kipee in ngingkeak a, khualeng in leitung taangsak hi; leitung liingin ngawk hi." 
Psalms77:19 Tui kihualte tungah na vak hi; tuipi thuk, na kaantan hangin, na khuanite a kimu thei bua hi." 
Psalms77:20 Nangma in Moses le Aaron ii a uk, na mite sia tuucingpa bangin lam na pui hi." 
Psalms78:1 Ka mite awng, kong hilna hong ngai tavun a, ka pauna hong nadon tavun." 
Psalms78:2 Ciim kamtepteete kong zangh tu a, hun bosa sung a, a telhak thute," 
Psalms78:3 ih taanghpupite hong son, ih zaaksa ih heaksa te, kong sonthiang tu hi." 
Psalms78:4 Hi thute ih tate tungah ih iim buatu hi. Topa ii a vaangletna, a sepna liante le a vawtsa a lamdang nate sia khang kikte tungah ih son tu hi." 
Psalms78:5 Ama in Israel mite tungah thukhamte pia a, Jacob suan le paalte tungah thupiakte pia hi. Amate ii tate tungah ama ii thukhamte hil tu in ama in ih taanghpupite sawl hi." 
Psalms78:6 Tua hile khangkikte in tua thute he thei tu a, amate in a tate tungah sonsawn nanak tu uh hi." 
Psalms78:7 Hi bangin amate in zongh Pathian muang a, ama ii sepna sate mangil ngawlin, ama thupiakte ni tawntung tu uh hi." 
Psalms78:8 Amate in a langpante le thu ni ngawl, Pathian a upna uh a kho ngawl, ama tungah a thumaan top ngawl a taanghpupite bang ahi buatu uh hi." 
Psalms78:9 Ephraim mite in thal le thaltang taw kithoai napi ngal kido ni in taikeak uh hi. 
Psalms78:10 Amate in Pathian taw a thuciamna a len bua uh hi; ama thukham a zui bua uh hi. 
Psalms78:11 Ama sep sate le, nalamdang lakna a vawt a mu uhte amate in a mangil zo uh hi." 
Psalms78:12 A taanghpupite ii mu tangin Egypt ngam Zoan zaangleitam ah Pathian in nalamdang laknate vawt hi. 
Psalms78:13 Ama in tuipi kikhensakin amate kaantansak hi; tuite sia pang bangin dingtosak hi. 
Psalms78:14 Ama in sun in meeikaai taw, zankhuateakin meikuang taang taw amate lampui hi." 
Psalms78:15 Ama in senneal ngamsung suangpite khentham in lei thukna pan a piang tui sia amate pia hi. 
Psalms78:16 Ama in suangpi sung pan lui khat piangsak a, ngun bangin tui luangsak hi." 
Psalms78:17 Ahihang amate in Pathian tungah khialna vawvawt lai uh a, sennealngam sungah amate in Saangbel Pa a langpan uh hi." 
Psalms78:18 A duci ante ngetna taw Pathian ze et hamtang uh hi. 
Psalms78:19 Amate in Pathian langpanin: “Pathian in sennealngam sungah an pia thei tu ziam? 
Psalms78:20 Ama in suangpi saat in tui luangsak vahawn peu hi; ahihang ama in eite anluum zongh hong pia thei tu ziam? tuaciang ama ii mite sa pia thei tu ziam?” ci uh hi. 
Psalms78:21 Tua ahikom tuabangin amate pauna a zaak ciang Pathian a thin uuk hi; ama in a mite meikuang taw sim a, amate tungah a thin uukna sia khang seseam hi;" 
Psalms78:22 banghang ziam cile amate in ama sungah upna nei ngawl a, amate hun tu in um ngawl hi." 
Psalms78:23 Ahihang ama in a tung a om van paupui a, a kongkhate a kihon natu thupia hi;" 
Psalms78:24 Ama in vantung panin amate antang pia a, amate neak tu in manna khiaksuk hi." 
Psalms78:25 Tuabangin amate in vantunglalangte ii an ne uh a, Pathian in a du zaza pia hi." 
Psalms78:26 Ama in nisuana sang vui vasak si a, ama ii vaangletna taw thangsang vui hamsak hi;" 
Psalms78:27 tuaciang a mite atu vacimte puaksuk a, vaalbo ah a om senneal za in tam hi;" 
Psalms78:28 ngiaphual saatna laizang a buk kiimkot theampo ah tua vacimte taak hi. 
Psalms78:29 Tua ahiciang mite an ne in a lungkim uh hi; Pathian in amate a duci teng pia hi. 
Psalms78:30 Ahihang amate duna sia thai ngawl a, a neneak laitak ma in," 
Psalms78:31 Pathian sia amate tungah thin uuk a, amate sung pan a hatbel pasalte le Israel khangno sung pan a phabel teng thatlum hi." 
Psalms78:32 Hi zata hi napi mihingte in mawna vawt lalai uh hi; Ama nalamdang laknate om napi amate in ama a muang bua uh hi. 
Psalms78:33 Tua ahikom amate ii ni sia husan khat bangin ama in bosak a, a nuntakna sia thakhat thu in lalna taw bosak hi." 
Psalms78:34 Amate sung pan pawlkhat a thalup sim, a om lai teng in ama ii kung zuan a, kisiikin thin tak taw thungen uh hi." 
Psalms78:35 Amate in Pathian sia amate a hungpa hi a, amate hu tu in Vaanglianbelpa hong pai ahi hunlam phawk uh hi." 
Psalms78:36 Ahihang a pauna uhte leilot thu vive hi a, bangma ci takpi thu a om bua hi." 
Psalms78:37 Ama tungah amate in thumaan ngawl hi; ama taw a thuciamna tungah amate thumaan ngawl hi. 
Psalms78:38 Ahihang Pathian in ama mite hesuak hi. Amate mawna maisak a, a susia bua hi. Ama in tamvei mama a thin uukna iip in a thinsona vei kenkon hi." 
Psalms78:39 Amate sia a thi theite ahi lel hunlam, vuiva a, a bo kik paih bang ahi hunlam ama in phawk hi." 
Psalms78:40 Sennealngam sungah amate in ama bang tanvei langpan in, bang tanvei ama heesak ziam!" 
Psalms78:41 Amate in Pathian ze et kikik uh a, Israel ii a thiangtho Pathian tungah thin natna piangsak hi." 
Psalms78:42 Amate in ama ii vaangletna lian le a ngalte khut sung pan a suataksak ni mangil uh a," 
Psalms78:43 Egypt ngam Zoan zaangleitam ah ama ii a nasia mama sepnate le nalamdang a laknate amate in mangil uh hi. 
Psalms78:44 Ama in ngunte chisan suaksak a, Egypt mite in tui neak tu a nei bua uh hi." 
Psalms78:45 Ama in tua mihingte sungah ngim pia tu in thote puak a, a leitangte lalsak tu in ulolte paisak hi." 
Psalms78:46 Ama in amate lo an a ne tu le a lote a lalsak tu in khaumawte puak hi. 
Psalms78:47 Ama in amate ii sapitkungte ngial taw, a thei kungte vuuk taw thisak hi." 
Psalms78:48 Ama in a ngante ngial taw, a tuu a keal honte keaktang taw in thatlum hi." 
Psalms78:49 Thina vantung mite bangin hong pai ama ii thin uukna le thinsona a buaksukna taw ama in nasia takin amate thinngimna pia hi. 
Psalms78:50 Ama in a thin uukna iip ngawlin amate nuntakna uh khoaikhetsak ngawlin, pul natna taw amate thatlum hi." 
Psalms78:51 Ama in Egypt ngammite innkuan theampo sung pan a tapaciil teng thatlum hi. 
Psalms78:52 Tuaciangin ama in tuucingpa bangin a mite lampui in pusuapui a, sennealngam kaantan pui hi." 
Psalms78:53 Ama in amate ngammuang takin lampui a, amate a lau bua uh hi; ahihang tuipi in a ngalte khulum hi." 
Psalms78:54 Ama in a zaw sa mualte tung, a thiangthona leitang ah amate paipui hi." 
Psalms78:55 A mite a mainaw uh ciang tua ngamah a teang mite ama in notkeak hi; tua leitang sia Israel minamte hawmsakin amate ii innte sia a mite pia hi. 
Psalms78:56 Ahihang amate in Vaanglianbelpa Pathian langpan in, a zia en uh hi. Amate in a thupiakte a zui bua uh hi," 
Psalms78:57 ahihang amate sia a taanghpupite bangma in, langpan nopna thin le thumaan nop ngawlna thin nei uh a, thaltang koai khat bangma in muanhuai ngawl hi." 
Psalms78:58 Amate in Pathian he ngawlte biakna munte taw ama thin uuksak uh a, amate ii milimte taw ama thinsosak uh hi." 
Psalms78:59 Pathian in tuate a mu ciang a thin uuk ahikom, ama mite a nial thiang hi." 
Psalms78:60 Ama in eite taw hong teenkhopna sa a inn ahi Shiloh a om ama buk sia nusia hi. 
Psalms78:61 Ama in ama ii vaangletna le minthanna lim ahi Thuciamna Thingkuang sia eima ngalte in mansak hi. 
Psalms78:62 Ama ii mite tungah ama thin uuk ahikom a ngalte in ama ii mite thatsak hi. 
Psalms78:63 Tangvalte sia ngal sungah kithatlum a, ngaknute ii a teenpui tu kuama a om bua hi." 
Psalms78:64 Thiampite ngual ii khutsa taw in thi a, amate ii zi meingongte sia a kaa tu zongh ki oai ngawl hi." 
Psalms78:65 A khakbel ciangin Topa sia a mutho bangin hong thoto hi; ama in sapittui ii a thot pasal thahat pa bang ahi hi. 
Psalms78:66 Ama in a ngalte sia a kikhomsuan tu maizumhuai lelna sungah not kik hi. 
Psalms78:67 Ahihang ama in Joseph suante a nial hi; ama in Ephraim minamte a tealtuam bua hi. 
Psalms78:68 Tuate taangin ama in Judah minam le a it mama Zion Mual teal zaw hi. 
Psalms78:69 Ama in vantung a om a inn taw a kibang Biakinn sia tua munah sa hi; A tawntung a kho tu in tuasia leitung taw ma kibangin ama in kipsak hi. 
Psalms78:70 Ama in a naseampa David teal hi; 
Psalms78:71 Ama in David sia ngantatna munte ah tuuhon a cinna pan la a, Pathian mihingte ii tuucingpa ahi Israel te ii kumpipa suaksak hi." 
Psalms78:72 David in ama ii kaang sung tu bek ngaisun ngawlin kipiakna taw amate khoi a, thiamna taw lampui hi." 
Psalms79:1 Pathian awng, Pathian he ngawlte in na ngam hong sim zo hi. Amate in a thiangtho na Biakinn sia ninsak uh a, Jerusalem sia a zaancip in nusia uh hi." 
Psalms79:2 Amate in na mite luang vaciikte neak tu le na naseamte luang ngamsate neak tu in nusia uh hi. 
Psalms79:3 Amate in na mite chisan sia tui bangin keesak hi; Jerusalem khuathing ah chisan sia tui bangin luang a, a thite a phum tu kuama taang nawn ngawl hi." 
Psalms79:4 Kiimkot minamte in kote hong selno zazaan hi; amate in kote hong selno zazaan a hong nunau uh hi. 
Psalms79:5 Topa awng, kote tungah a tawntungin na thin hong uuk tu ni ziam? Na thin uukna sia mei bangin kuang tan tu ziam?" 
Psalms79:6 Nang hong bia ngawl minamte le nang tungah thu hong ngen ngawlte tungah thin uuk ta'n. 
Psalms79:7 Banghang ziam cile amate in na mite thatlum zo hi; na ngam zaancipsak hi. 
Psalms79:8 Ka taanghpupite mawna hu in kote daan hong pia heak in. Lametna theampo ka bosua siat zo uh a, tu in kote hong hesuak ta'n." 
Psalms79:9 Pathian awng, kote hong hu ta'n a hong hun ta'n; nangma mama na ki upat natu in, kote hong suatak ta'n a, ka mawnate uh hong maisak ta'n." 
Psalms79:10 Banghangin minamte in “Na Pathian uh koi sungah om ziam?” ci in hong dongh tu ziam? Na naseamte chisan a buaksak hu in tua minamte tungah daan na piak sia kote in hong musak ta'n. 
Psalms79:11 Thongtaakte ii a taunate ngai ta'n a, na vaangletna lianpi taw a thi tu in a kikoisate suatakin." 
Psalms79:12 Topa awng, minam dangte ii nang hong selnona hu in amate tungah a see sali in thuk kik in." 
Psalms79:13 Tuasia ciang na nganhon sungah tuute ahi ko na mite in a tawntungin lungdam kong ko tu uh a, hong pai lai tu hun theampo sungah nang kong pok tu uh hi." 
Psalms80:1 Israel te ii Tuucing pa awng, hong ngai ta'n; Na tuu hon lampuipa awng, hong za ta'n. Cherub te ii tung sang, na kumpi tokhum tungah a to pa awng," 
Psalms80:2 Ephraim, Benjamin le Manasseh minamte tungah nangma le nangma hong kilaak ta'n. Na thahatna kote hong lak ta'n; hong pai ta'n a, hong hun ta'n!" 
Psalms80:3 Hong ciapui kik ta'n, Pathian awng! Na hesuakna hong lak ta'n, tua hile ka suakta tu uh hi!" 
Psalms80:4 Topa Vaanglianbelpa Pathian awng, bang tanvei dong na mihingte thungetna tungah hong thin uuk tu ni ziam?" 
Psalms80:5 Heena sia neak tu in kote nong pia zo a, dawn tu in thitui haipui khat nong pia zo hi." 
Psalms80:6 Kote ii kiimkot ah ngamte kote ii leitang kituu in na kisimsak hi; ka ngalte in kote hong selno zazaan hi. 
Psalms80:7 Hong puuapha kik ta'n, Vaanglianbelpa Pathian awng! Na hesuakna hong lak ta'n, tua hile ka suakta tu uh hi." 
Psalms80:8 Nangma in sapitkung khat Egypt panin na la a, minam dangte hawlkeak in amate leitang tungah tuasia na suan hi." 
Psalms80:9 Nangma in tuasia a khan natu in mun khat na thiangsak hi; zung thuk thasuk a ngam bup huamin zaam hi. 
Psalms80:10 A limh taw mualte siin hi; a baakte in Cedar thingkung liante deap hi. 
Psalms80:11 A baakte sia Mediterranean Tuipi dongin beak a, Euphrates ngun dong zaam hi." 
Psalms80:12 Banghangin a kiimkot uumna dalte talthamsak ni ziam? Tu in tua mun a kaantan pawpo in sapitngate ngu thei hi; 
Psalms80:13 ngalhte in siikcil a, ngamsate in an in nei hi." 
Psalms80:14 Vaanglianbelpa Pathian awng, ko sang hong nga ta'n! Vantung panin hong ensuk ta'n; hong pai ta'n a, na mite hong hun ta'n!" 
Psalms80:15 Hong pai ta'n a, hi na suan sa sapitkung le a limcii tu na suan sapitkung moi sia hong hung ta'n!" 
Psalms80:16 Ih ngalte in tua sapitkung sia mei taw halin saattan zo hi; amate sia thin uukna taw ngau in a, lalsak in!" 
Psalms80:17 A thahat mama in na vawt minam, na tealsa mite dalin keamcing in." 
Psalms80:18 Nang kung panin ka tai kik ngei buatu uh hi; kote hong nungtasak ta'n, tua hile nang kong pok tu uh hi." 
Psalms80:19 Hong puuapha kik ta'n, Topa Pathian Vaanglianbelpa awng. Na hesuakna hong lak ta'n, tuasia ciang ka suakta tu uh hi." 
Psalms81:1 Ei hong hungpa Pathian tungah lungdam in au vun; Jacob ii Pathian tungah pokna lasa vun! 
Psalms81:2 Music tum kipan vun a, daalkual khuangnote tum vun; tengtonghte le liamlote taw aw hoite ngingsak vun." 
Psalms81:3 Thadet ciang le thalik ciangin poaikhaam natu in lemle tum vun. 
Psalms81:4 Hisia in Israel ngamsung thukham hi a, Jacob' Pathian ii thupiak ahi hi." 
Psalms81:5 Ama in Egypt ngam a sim ciangin Israel mite tungah tua thukham a piak ahi hi. Heak ngeingawl aw khat in hi bangin a ci ka za hi," 
Psalms81:6 “Note nungzaang panin na vanhngit uh kong laakkeaksak hi; na puak uh uksuangte kong khiaksuksak hi. 
Psalms81:7 Ngim na nga laitakin nong sam uh a, kong hun hi. Ka bukna vuipi sung panin kong zo a, Meribah cikte ah note kong ze et hi." 
Psalms81:8 Ka mite awng, kidop natu kong sonte ngai vun; Israel awng, ka thu nong ngai tu uh ka thangai mama hi!" 
Psalms81:9 Note in pathian dang peuma na bia ngei buatu uh hi. 
Psalms81:10 Keima in Egypt ngam pan note hong pusua pui Topa na Pathian ka hi hi. Na kam uh kaa vun, an kong vaak tu hi." 
Psalms81:11 “Ahihang ka mite in ka thu hong ngai nuam ngawl a, Israel te in ka thu hong ni ngawl tu hi." 
Psalms81:12 Tua ahikom amate sia a thinpuina uh taw kizui in a uuk bang po ka paisak a, a vawt nop po ka vawtsak hi." 
Psalms81:13 Ka mite in ka pau hong ngai hen a, ka thu hong ni le ka oai mama hi!" 
Psalms81:14 A ngalte manlang takin ka zawsak tu a, a ngal a sa theampo ka zawthalsak tu hi." 
Psalms81:15 Kei hong ensante in kiitakna taw ka mai ah hong kun tu uh hi; amate ii thuak daan sia a tawntungin kikhomsuan tu uh hi. 
Psalms81:16 Ahihang note sia a limbel zungtaang taw kong vaak tu a, ngam khuaitui taw kong lungkimsak tu hi.”" 
Psalms82:1 Pathian in vantung council kikhopna ah hun uk hi; tua pathiante kikhopna sungah ama in thukhensat hi: 
Psalms82:2 “A maan ngawl thukhennate kheal vun; mihing seksolte ngum nawn heak vun! 
Psalms82:3 A zawngte le tangate panpui tavun; kitaangsapna a neite le a cimawte tungah a kilawm in en vun. 
Psalms82:4 Amate mihing seksolte khut sung panin suatak tavun. 
Psalms82:5 “Note in bangza in tel ngawl nu ziam! Bangza in nangh nu ziam! Note na ngamta khial siat zo uh a, leitung ah thumaan ngamtatna bo zo hi." 
Psalms82:6 ‘Note in pathiante na hi uh hi’ kong ci hi; ‘note theampo sia a Saangbel Pa ii tate, na hi uh hi.’" 
Psalms82:7 Ahihang mihingte bangma in na thi tu uh hi; na nuntakna uh sia kumpipa tate khat pawpo ii nuntakna bangin bo tu hi.” 
Psalms82:8 Hong pai ta'n, Pathian awng, leitung hong uk ta'n; ngam theampo sia nangma neisa ahi hi." 
Psalms83:1 Pathian awng, thim om heak in; huthe ngawlin om heak in, dai takin om heak in!" 
Psalms83:2 En in! Na ngalte in hong langpan a, nang hong ensante in hong langpan nginge uh hi." 
Psalms83:3 Amate in na mite langkhat panin thu ngealku uh a, nangma ii na panpui mite thasawm uh hi." 
Psalms83:4 Amate in, “Hong pai tavun, amate ngam sutham tawng, tua hile Israel te sia a tawntungin kimangil tu hi,” ci uh hi." 
Psalms83:5 Amate in a ngealna tungah lungkim tek a, nang hong langpan tu kipawlna khat vawt uh hi:" 
Psalms83:6 Tuate sia Edom le Ishmael te; Moab le Hagri te; 
Psalms83:7 Gebal, Ammon le Amalek mite, Philistia le Tyre mite ahi uh hi." 
Psalms83:8 Lot ii suan Ammon le Moab ii pawlpui a thahat Assyria te zongh amate sangah pang hi. 
Psalms83:9 Midian mite le Kishon Ngun a om Sisera le Jabin tungah na vawt bangin amate tungah vawt in. 
Psalms83:10 Endor ah nangma in amate na zothal a, amate luang lei ah a muat uh hi." 
Psalms83:11 “Pathian neisa leitang theampo eima atu in la tawng” a ci Oreb le Zeeb tungah na vawt bangin amate lampuite tungah vawt in; Zebah le Zalmunna te na zaw thal bangma in amate a ukte theampo zo thal in. 
Psalms83:12  
Psalms83:13 Pathian awng, amate sia leivui bangin thezau in a, vui ii seamkeak taangphawte bang hisak in." 
Psalms83:14 Duithuk mei ii a kak bang, mualte a kaanghsak meikuang bangin" 
Psalms83:15 na vuipi suangval taw amate del in a, a kiitakhuai na vuipi taw amate lausak in." 
Psalms83:16 Amate maitang sia maizumna taw na tuam in, Topa awng, amate in na vaangletna telsak in." 
Psalms83:17 Amate lelna thuakin a tawntungin lau ngawp tahen a, maimawlna sungah amate thi tahen." 
Psalms83:18 Nangma bekma in Topa na hi hunlam, leitung bup a lianbel ukpa na hi hunlam amate in he tahen." 
Psalms84:1 Vaanglianbelpa Topa awng, na Biakinn bangza in thangai khi ziam!" 
Psalms84:2 Tua munah bangza in om nuam khi ziam! Topa Biakinn sungah om tu ka thangai hi. Ka nuntakna buppi taw a nungta Pathian tungah lungdam in la ka sa hi. 
Psalms84:3 Tonbawmte ngawngawn in bu vawt a, pialpiate in amate buk tek nei hi; amate in na biaknatau taw a kinaina ah a note keam uh hi, Vaanglianbelpa Topa ka kumpipa le ka Pathian awng." 
Psalms84:4 Na Biakinn sungah teang a, a tawntung nang tungah pokna la a sate in mi lungdamte ahi uh hi." 
Psalms84:5 Nangma kung pan thahatna a ngate le a thiangtho Zion Mual ah Pathian biak tu a lawpte in bangza in lungdam ziam! 
Psalms84:6 Amate in Baca kongaw mualkuam a kaantan uh ciangin tua mun sia ciktui phulna mun hong suak hi; tangngam ngua in tuicin theina munte dimsak siat hi. 
Psalms84:7 Amate a papai uh ciang, hat vaial a, amate in pathiante ii Pathian sia Zion mual tungah a mu tu uh hi." 
Psalms84:8 Topa Vaanglianbelpa Pathian awng, ka thungetna hong za ta'n. Hong ngai ta'n, Jacob ii Pathian awng!" 
Psalms84:9 Pathian awng, na tealsa kumpipa kote kumpipa thupha hong piaksak ta'n." 
Psalms84:10 Na Biakinn sungah ni khat hun zakna sia leidang mun khat pawpo ah kum tulkhat zak sangin phazaw hi; Mihing seksolte inn sungah ka teen sangin ka Pathian inn kongkha ah ka ding nuamzaw hi. 
Psalms84:11 Topa in ei hong sungsia pa le a minthang kumpipa hi a, ama in cikna le minphatna taw eite thupha hong pia hi. A maan a seamte tungah ama in naphate khat zongh a haza bua hi." 
Psalms84:12 Vaanglianbelpa Topa awng, nang hong muangte in bangza in a lungdam uh ziam!" 
Psalms85:1 Topa awng, na leitang na hesuak zo hi; nangma in Israel te na nuamsasak kik zo hi." 
Psalms85:2 Nangma in na mite ii mawnate na maisak zo a, amate ii tatkhialna theampo na pengsak zo hi." 
Psalms85:3 Amate tungah na thin uukna teng na thaisak zo a, na thin uuk thangsiatna zongh na vei kenkon kik zo hi." 
Psalms85:4 Hong puuapha kik ta'n, Pathian kote ngumpa awng, kote dik nong sak ngawlna thaisak in!" 
Psalms85:5 Ko tungah a tawntungin nong thin uuk tu ziam? Na thin uukna thai ngei nawn ngawl tu ziam? 
Psalms85:6 Kote hong thahatsak kik ta'n; tua hile ko na mite in nangma kong pok kik tu uh hi. 
Psalms85:7 Topa awng, nong itna kip hong lak ta'n, tuaciang nangma ii ngupna le huna kote hong pia ta'n." 
Psalms85:8 Topa Pathian paunate ka ngai nginge hi; ih mawmawtziate zui kik bua po leang ama in ei a mite tungah kilemna hong kamciam hi. 
Psalms85:9 Ama a upatte hun tu in ama kinging takpi a, ama hong ompuina taw hong huutna in ih ngam ih lei ah kho top tu hi." 
Psalms85:10 Itna le thumaanna kisitua tu hi; thutang le kilemna kingawngkoai tu hi. 
Psalms85:11 Mihingte thumaanna in lei panin van banto tu a, tuaciang Pathian thutang in vantung panin ensuk tu hi." 
Psalms85:12 Topa in eite hong nuamsasak tu a, ih leitang in anlaak tu tam mama piangsak tu hi." 
Psalms85:13 Thutang suana sia Topa mai ah pai tu a, ama atu lampi sial khol tu hi." 
Psalms86:1 Topa awng, hong ngai ta'n a, hong zo ta'n, banghang ziam cile kei sia cimaw in thazawm khi hi." 
Psalms86:2 Kei sia na tungah hong thumaan ka hikom thina pan hong hun ta'n; kei sia na naseampa hi a nang hong muang ka hi ciang, hong hun ta'n." 
Psalms86:3 Nangma in ka Pathian na hikom, kei hong hesuak ta'n; sunkhuateak nang tungah thu kong ngen hi." 
Psalms86:4 Topa awng, na naseampa hong lungdamsak ta'n, banghang ziam cile ka thungetnate nang kungah hong paito hi." 
Psalms86:5 Ko tungah nangma na pha a, nong maisak hi, nang tungah thu hong ngente theampo atu in itna kip taw na kidim hi." 
Psalms86:6 Topa awng, ka thungetna hong ngai ta'n; hu ngen a kong auna hong za ta'n." 
Psalms86:7 Ngimna hunte sungah nang kong ko hi, banghang ziam cile nangma in ka thungetnate nong zo hi." 
Psalms86:8 Topa awng, nang taw a kibang pathian om ngawl hi, nang sep bang a seam kuama om ngawl hi." 
Psalms86:9 Na bitphua sa minam theampo hong pai in na mai ah kun tu hi; amate in na letna hong pok tu hi. 
Psalms86:10 Nangma in thahat in a lamdang nate na vawt hi; nangma bek Pathian na hi hi. 
Psalms86:11 Seam a nong oaite hong hil ta'n, Topa awng, thumaan takin na thu kong ni tu hi; a kicing kipiakna taw, na na ka sep natu hong hil ta'n." 
Psalms86:12 Topa ka Pathian awng, ka thin theampo taw nang kong pok tu hi; Na letna sia a tawntungin ka thangsak tu hi." 
Psalms86:13 Nong itna kip sia kei atu bangza in lian ziam! thaankuul pan mama in nangma in kei nong hun zo hi. 
Psalms86:14 Pathian awng, mihing kiphasakte in kei hong langpan tu in hong pai hi; mihing tatkha hon pawlkhat kei thatlum tu in hong hanciam hi — nang hong thusim ngawl mihingte ahi uh hi." 
Psalms86:15 Ahihang Topa awng, nang sia, a hesuak thei le a it thei Pathian na hi a, a thin uai tawntung, a dik tawntung le a thumaan tawntung na hi hi." 
Psalms86:16 Kei sang hong nga ta'n a kei hong hesuak ta'n; hong thakhosak ta'n a hong hun ta'n, banghang ziam cile ka nu ii sep bangma in na na ka seam hi." 
Psalms86:17 Na phatna a kitelna hong lak ta'n, Topa awng; kei hong ensante in heenepna le huna nong piak a mu uh ciangin a maizum tu uh hi." 
Psalms87:1 Mual thiangtho tungah Topa in ama ii khuapi saat hi; 
Psalms87:2 Ama in Israel ngam sung mun dang theampo sangin Jerusalem khuapi it zaw hi. 
Psalms87:3 Pathian khuapi awng, nang huvau a lamdang ama ii sonte ngai in:" 
Psalms87:4 “Kei thu hong ni minam tuatuamte tepteena lai ka vawt ciangin Egypt le Babylon ka hel tu hi; Philistia, Tyre le Ethiopia te sia Jerusalem ah a teangte tepteena lai sungah ka khum tu hi,” ci hi." 
Psalms87:5 Zion taw kisai in, hi minam theampo sia ama ii neisa hi a, Vaanglianbelpa in ama sia a tha khosak tu hi, kici tu hi." 
Psalms87:6 Topa in mihing phaza tepteena lai vawt tu a, tua mite theampo sia Jerusalem khua mite suaksak tu hi." 
Psalms87:7 Amate laam in lasa uh a, “Thupha ka saan uh theampo ii naak sia Zion ah om hi” ci uh hi." 
Psalms88:1 Topa Pathian ka ngumpa awng, nitangtumin au a hu kong ngen hi, tuaciangin zanin na mai ah kong pai hi." 
Psalms88:2 Ka thungetna hong ngai ta'n; hu ngen a kong auna hong ngai ta'n! 
Psalms88:3 Ngimna tam mama kei tungah hong tung zo a, ka thi dektak hi." 
Psalms88:4 A thi tu in a om midangte theampo bangma ka hi hi; ka thahatna theampo bo siat zo hi. 
Psalms88:5 Mithite sungah kei hong kinusia hi; thalup thuak a, thaankuul sungah a lumte, nangma ii na makngil biing, na hu nawn ngawlte taw ka kibang hi." 
Psalms88:6 Nangma in kei sia thaankhuk thukte sung, a zingbel le a thukbel dum sungah nong lawn suk zo hi." 
Psalms88:7 Na thin uukna kei atu ngit mama a, tua ii tuihual in keima hong delpeak zo hi." 
Psalms88:8 Ka ngualtamhte in kei hong taisansak zo ni hi; amate atu in kei sia a kiihuai nong suaksak zo hi. Kei sia hong kikhabil a, ka suakta thei bua hi;" 
Psalms88:9 ka thuakna hangin ka mitte thazawm hi. Topa awng, ni simin nang kong biakpui a, ka khutte laamto in nang tungah thu kong ngen hi." 
Psalms88:10 Mithi sate atu nalamdang laknate vawt kana ni ziam? Amate hong tho in nang hong pok kana ziam? 
Psalms88:11 Thaankuul sungah na itna kip kison kana ziam? tua ahibuale siatna omna munah nang ii thumaanna om kana ziam? 
Psalms88:12 Tua khuazingna munah nang ii nalamdang laknate kimu ziam, tua ahibuale a kimangil cip sate ii ngam sungah nang ii phatnate kimu ziam?" 
Psalms88:13 Topa awng, nang tungah hu ngenin kong biakpui hi; zing simin nang tungah thu kong ngen hi." 
Psalms88:14 Topa awng, banghangin kei hong nial ni ziam? Banghangin kei hong nungngat ni ziam?" 
Psalms88:15 Ka khanmoi lai pan ma in ka thuak a, thina taw ka kinai ngei hi; Daan nong piakna vanhngit hu in kei ka tul zo hi." 
Psalms88:16 A nasia mama na thin uukna in kei hong delpeak hi; a kiitakhuai nong donate in kei hong lalsak hi. 
Psalms88:17 Tuate in keima sia namthuam bangin sunkhuateakin hong kiim um hi; mun theampo panin kei hong neak hi. 
Psalms88:18 Ka ngualtamh phabelte ngawngawn in nong nusaisak zo a, khuazing bekma sia kei kitholpui ahi hi." 
Psalms89:1 Topa awng, nong itna kip sia la in ka sa tawntung tu hi; na thumaanna a tawntungin ka thangsak tu hi." 
Psalms89:2 Na itna in a tawntung atu in kikhomsuan tu ci in ka he a, na thumaanna in van bangin kip hi." 
Psalms89:3 Nangma in, “Ka teal mihing pa taw thuciamna khat ka vawt zo hi; ka naseampa David tungah kamciam ka pia zo a," 
Psalms89:4 ‘Nangma ii suan khat sia kumpi in maang tawntung tu hi; na kumpi khangngui sia a tawntungin kong kepsak tu hi,’ ka ci hi,” na ci hi." 
Psalms89:5 Vantungte in a lamdang na vawtte la in hong sak hi; Topa awng amate in na thumaanna la in sa uh hi. 
Psalms89:6 Topa awng vantung ah nang taw a kibang kuama om ngawl hi; vantung mi a minpiang nang taw a kibang kuama om ngawl hi. 
Psalms89:7 Mi thiangthote council kikhopna ah nang hong kikiita hi; amate theampo in nang hong thasia in ding uh hi. 
Psalms89:8 Vaanglianbelpa Topa Pathian awng, nang za in kuama thahat ngawl hi; Topa awng na theampo ah nang na thumaan hi." 
Psalms89:9 A thahat tuipi na uk hi; tuasia ii a thin uuk tuihualte na thimsak hi. 
Psalms89:10 Nganhingpui Rahab sia na sucip a, na thatlum hi; Na thahatna lianpi taw na ngalte na zothal hi." 
Psalms89:11 Vantung in nangma aa hi a leitung zongh nangma neisa ma ahi hi; simlei le a sung a om theampo nangma vawt hi. 
Psalms89:12 Saksang le thangsang na bitphua hi; Tabor Mual le Hermon Mualte in lungdam in nangma la hong sak hi. 
Psalms89:13 Bangza in na vaanglian ziam! Bangza in na thahatna lian ziam! 
Psalms89:14 Na kumpi ngam sia thumaan le thutang tungah kidoppha hi; itna le thumaanna sia na sep na vawt theampo ii sungah kilangh hi. 
Psalms89:15 Lasakna taw nangma hong biate le na dikna khuavak sungah a teangte sia mi lungdamte ahi uh hi. 
Psalms89:16 Nangma hangin amate sia sunkhua in lawpna nei uh a, amate in na phatna hu in nang hong pok uh hi." 
Psalms89:17 Nangma in zawna lianpite nong pia hi; na itna sungah zawna nong mualsuasak hi. 
Psalms89:18 Topa awng, nangma in kote hong dalpa nong tealsak hi; Israel ii a Thiangtho Pathian awng, nangma in ko atu kumpipa nong pia hi." 
Psalms89:19 A thumaan na naseamte tungah taanghlai in mukholna khat na piak sungah, “Ngalkap minthang khat huna ka pia zo hi; mihingte sung pan ka tealsa khat kumpi tokhum ka pia zo hi." 
Psalms89:20 Ka naseampa David sia sathau thiang noina taw kumpi in ka koi zo hi. 
Psalms89:21 Ka thahatna ama taw om tawntung tu a, ka vaangletna in ama hatsak tu hi." 
Psalms89:22 A ngalte in ama zo ngeingawl tu hi; mihing seksolte in ama zo ngawl tu hi. 
Psalms89:23 A ngalte ka sucip tu a ama a ensan theampo ka that tu hi. 
Psalms89:24 Ama ka it tu a, ama tungah ka thumaan tu hi; ngalzo tawntung tu in ama ka siam tu hi." 
Psalms89:25 Mediterranean panin Euphrates ngun dong a kumpi ngam ka keau tu hi. 
Psalms89:26 Ama in kei tungah ‘Nangma in ka pa le ka Pathian na hi hi; nangma in kei hong dalpa le hong ngumpa na hi hi’ hong ci tu hi. 
Psalms89:27 Ama sia ka tapaciil in ka vawt tu a, kumpi theampo sung pan a lianbel hi tu hi." 
Psalms89:28 Ama tungah ka kamciam ka kholet tu a, ama taw ka thuciamna sia a tawntungin a kikhomsuan tu hi." 
Psalms89:29 Ama ii kumpi khangngui sia van bangin kip tu hi; ama ii suan khat sia kumpi in maang tawntung tu hi. 
Psalms89:30 “Ahihang a suan a paalte in ka thukham a ni bua a, ka thupiakte bangin a nungta bua uh le," 
Psalms89:31 amate in ka hilnate a melsia a, ka thupiakte a len bua ahile," 
Psalms89:32 amate mawnate huvau in daan ka pia tu hi; amate khialnate huvau in ka thuaksak tu hi. 
Psalms89:33 Ahihang David ka itna ka bosak buatu a, ama tungah ka kamciam ka peal buatu hi." 
Psalms89:34 Ama taw ka thuciamna ka tatsak buatu a, a tungah ka piak ka kamciamsa khat zongh ka dok kik buatu hi." 
Psalms89:35 “A tawntung atu in khatvei lian, ka min thiangtho taw kamciam ka vawt zo a: David tungah ka leilot ngei buatu hi." 
Psalms89:36 Ama in suan le paal nei tawntung tu a, ni a taan lai theampo in keima in a kumpi ngam ka etsak tu hi." 
Psalms89:37 Tuasia in van ah a om thumaan tetti a pang soltha bangin kip tu hi.” na ci hi. 
Psalms89:38 Ahihang na tealsa kumpipa tungah na thin uuk hi; ama taisan in na nil hi. 
Psalms89:39 Na naseampa taw na thuciamna sia na tatsak zo a, a kumpilukhu sia buan sungah na vawk zo hi." 
Psalms89:40 Nangma in a khuapi luphungte na sutham zo a a kulhpite a cimh sa in na nusiat hi. 
Psalms89:41 Kaantan in a pai po in a neisate nguksak hi; a innpaamte theampo in ama nui san uh hi. 
Psalms89:42 Ama ngalte sia ngalzawna na pia zo hi; amate theampo a lung na damsak hi. 
Psalms89:43 Ama ngalhiamte a luithong na suaksak zo a, ngal kidona sungah na lelsak zo hi." 
Psalms89:44 A kumpi ciangkhut na laaksak zo a, a kumpi tokhum sia lei denna in na neizo hi." 
Psalms89:45 A hun ngawlin ama na huaisak zo a, maimawlna taw ama na tuam hi." 
Psalms89:46 Topa awng, nangma le nangma a tawntungin kiseal tu ni ziam? Na thin uukna bang tanvei mei bangin kuang tu ziam?" 
Psalms89:47 Ka nuntakna bangza in tom ziam ci sia hong phawsak ta'n; kote theampo sia a thithei tu a nong bitphua ahi hunlam phawk in! 
Psalms89:48 Akua thi ngeingawlin, nungta thei tu ziam? Mihing in thaankhuk pan bangbangin ama le ama kikeam thei tu ziam?" 
Psalms89:49 Topa awng, tu ma sia a, na itna tetti te koisung om ziam? David tung kamciam na vawtte koisung om ziam?" 
Psalms89:50 Kei na naseampa hong kilan zazaanna le Pathian he ngawlte hong haamsiatna ka thuakte hong makngilsak heak in. 
Psalms89:51 Topa awng, thaankhuk panin na ngalte in na tealsa kumpipa selno zazaan hi! a paina po ah amate in selno zazaan uh hi." 
Psalms89:52 A tawntungin Topa pok vun! Amen! Amen!. 
Psalms90:1 Topa awng, nangma in a tawntungin kote inn na hi hi." 
Psalms90:2 Mualte na bitphua ma, simlei na piansak ma in nangma in a om tawntung Pathian na hi a, a tawntungin Pathian na hi tu hi." 
Psalms90:3 Kote sia ka hina uh ah cia kikin nong sawl hi; kote leivui nong suak kiksak hi. 
Psalms90:4 Kum tulkhat sia nang atu in ni khat bang ahi hi; tuate in a bosa zeini taw kibang a, zan lai hun tomno khat taw kibang hi." 
Psalms90:5 Nangma in tuipawm ii taai bangin kote nong paipui hi; mangmat khat bang zaa ka hi bek uh hi. Kote sia zingsang in meang a," 
Psalms90:6 khangto in a paak, nitak sang ciang vulin a thi lopate taw ka kibang uh hi." 
Psalms90:7 Na thin uukna in ko hong susia hi; thinso in na nge ngawpna in ko hong lausak hi. 
Psalms90:8 Ko ii mawnate na mai ah koi in, ko ii maw kunaste na mu theina ah na koi hi." 
Psalms90:9 Na thin uukna in ka khan uh hong tomsak hi; ka khan uh sia kihuau khat bangin mang vadi hi. 
Psalms90:10 Kote ii hun nei theampo in kum sawmsali hi — ka hat uh le kum sawmliat hi; Tuate in thinngimna le heena teng bekma hong puak hi; nuntakna sia hai ngawlin bo a, kote sia mu mun ka om nawn bua uh hi." 
Psalms90:11 Na thin uukna ii thahatna buppi akua in thuak ngei ziam? Na thinsona sia bangza lauhuai thei ci sia akua in he ziam? 
Psalms90:12 Ka ciim thei natu uh in ka nuntakna uh bangza in tom ziam ci sia hong hil ta'n. 
Psalms90:13 Na thin uukna bang tan khuangei lai tu ziam? Topa awng, na naseamte tungah mulkimna hong nei ta'n!" 
Psalms90:14 Ka nuntak tawntung lungdam in la ka sak thei natu uh in zing simin na itna kip hong dim ta'n. 
Psalms90:15 Lungmanna ka thuak uh kumte theampo sungah heena nong piak za ma in tu in lungdamna hong pia ta'n. 
Psalms90:16 Ko, na naseamte in na lianpi na sepnate hong musak ta'n; ko ii suan le paalte in a minthang, na thahatna musak in." 
Psalms90:17 Topa kote Pathian awng, na thuphate ko taw hong om tahen. Ka sep ka vawt uh theampo sungah zawna hong pia ta'n!" 
Psalms91:1 Ngammuan natu in Topa kung a pai, akua po ahizong Vaanglianbelpa dalna sungah a om pawpo in" 
Psalms91:2 ama tungah: “Nangma in kei hong hungpa le hong dalpa na hi hi; Nangma in ka Pathian na hi hi; nang sungah muanna kong nei hi,” ci thei hi." 
Psalms91:3 Ama in a kiseal launa theampo pan le thithei natna theampo panin, nang hong keam tu hi." 
Psalms91:4 Ama in a thakhuite taw nang hong uap tu hi; ama khoina sungah na ngammuang tu hi; Ama thumaanna in nang hong dal tu a, hong hung tu hi." 
Psalms91:5 Zan in launate le sun in thakhat thu in hong sim theite na kiita buatu hi," 
Psalms91:6 ahibuale khuazing sungah hong vaat thei pul natnate ahizong suntangin hong thatlum thei a ngilote ahizong na kiita buatu hi. 
Psalms91:7 Na kungah mihing tulkhat pukin a thi zong, na kiimkot ah tulsawm a thi hialzong nang bangma hong kilaw ngawl tu hi." 
Psalms91:8 A seksolte daan a kipiakzia en in, na mu tu hi." 
Psalms91:9 Nangma in Topa sia nang hong hungpa in na nei zo a, a Saangbelpa sia nang hong sungsia pa in na nei zo hi," 
Psalms91:10 tua ahikom siatna khat pawpo in nang hong vaat ngawl tu a, na inn nai ah ngoltolna hong theng ngawl tu hi." 
Psalms91:11 Pathian in a vantunglalangte nang hong cing tu, na paina po ah hong dal tu in tavaw tu hi." 
Psalms91:12 Na peang in suang sui tha in na liam ngawl natu, amate in a khut taw nang hong dom tu hi." 
Psalms91:13 Tawpite le ngulte, a kiitak huai tawpite le ngul nguu neite na tuanhcil tu hi." 
Psalms91:14 Pathian in, “Kei hong itte ka hun tu a, Topa a hong saangte ka hung tu hi." 
Psalms91:15 Kei hong biapui ciangin amate ka zo tu hi; ngim a nga ciangin amate taw ka omkhawm tu hi. Amate ka suatak tu a, ka upat tu hi." 
Psalms91:16 Amate sia khansauna tel ka pia tu a, amate ka ngum tu hi,” ci hi." 
Psalms92:1 Topa awng, nang tungah lungdamko tu le Saang Bel Pathian awng, nangma upatna la sak tu sia bangza in pha ziam," 
Psalms92:2 zing simin tatsat ngawl na itna thangsak tu, zan simin na thumaanna pualaak tu le" 
Psalms92:3 khau taw a kithua tum theite le tengtongh taw music hoite tumin lungdamkona sia bangza in pha ziam. 
Psalms92:4 Topa awng, a lian mama na sepnate in kei hong lungdamsak hi; na sepsa na vawtsate hu in lawpin la ka sa hi." 
Psalms92:5 Topa awng, na tuk na diannate bangza in lian ziam! Na ngaisutnate bangza in thuk ziam!" 
Psalms92:6 Hi thu in mihing mawmaw khat ii heak zawk hi ngawl hi; a nangh khat in tel zo ngawl hi: 
Psalms92:7 a seksolte sia lopa bangin po thei tu a, a maan ngawlin a seamte nuamsa thei tu hi; ahitazong amate kilalcipsak tu hi," 
Psalms92:8 banghang ziam cile Topa awng, nang sia a tawntungin a lianbel na hi hi." 
Psalms92:9 Na ngalte thi tu hi ci in ka he uh a, a seksol theampo kizothal tu hi." 
Psalms92:10 Ngam khuital bangin nong hatsak zo hi; lungdamna taw thupha nong pia zo hi. 
Psalms92:11 Ka ngalte ngallelna ka mu zo a, a seksolte ii kaanate ka za zo hi." 
Psalms92:12 Thutangte palm kungte bangin limci tu hi; amate Lebanon ah Cedar thingkungte bangin khang tu hi. 
Psalms92:13 Amate sia Topa inn sungah a kisuan, ih Pathian Biakinnpi sungah a palh," 
Psalms92:14 haam napi nga a nga lai, a tawntung a hing, a kho thingkungte bang ahi hi." 
Psalms92:15 Hisia in Topa thumaan a, kei hong hungpa sia khial ngawl hi ci in lak hi." 
Psalms93:1 Topa in kumpipa hi. Ama in uk zawkna le thahatna sia puan bangin silh hi. Leitung sia a omna munah kho takin kiphut a, kikhiin thei ngawl hi." 
Psalms93:2 Topa awng, na kumpi tokhum sia a kipat pan ma khotop a, hun kipat ma in nangma na omkhol zo hi." 
Psalms93:3 Topa awng, tuipi thukte in a aw uh ngingsak hi; tuate in a aw uh khanin hawk uh hi." 
Psalms93:4 Topa in vantung ah a lianbel in maang hi, tuipi liante hawkna sangin lianzaw a, tuipi ii tuihualte sangin thahatzaw hi." 
Psalms93:5 Topa awng, na thukhamte a tawntungin kho a, a tawntung a tawntungin na Biakinnpi sia thiangtho takpi hi." 
Psalms94:1 Topa awng, nangma in daan a pia Pathian na hi hi; na thin uukna kilanghsak in!" 
Psalms94:2 Nang sia mihing theampo ii thukhenpa na hi hi; hong tho ta'n a, a kiphasakte amate taw a kiphu bangin daan na pia in!" 
Psalms94:3 Mihing seksolte bang tanvei lungdam lai tu ziam? Topa awng, bang tan khuangei lai tu ziam?" 
Psalms94:4 Khialna lian neite bang tanvei kiphasak lai tu a, amate khialna liante tungah bang tanvei kisuangtaak lai tu ziam?" 
Psalms94:5 Topa awng, amate in na mite sucip hi; amate in nangma ii mite nengcip hi." 
Psalms94:6 Amate in meingong tangate thatlum uh a, ih ngam sungah a teang khualmite suamlum uh hi." 
Psalms94:7 Amate in, “ Topa in ei hong mu ngawl hi; Israel te ii Pathian in hong phawk ngawl hi,” ci uh hi." 
Psalms94:8 Ka mite awng, bangbangin tuaza dongin mawmaw in ngoai thei nu ziam? Bang hun ciangin tel tu nu ziam?" 
Psalms94:9 Eite bil a vawt Pathian in za thei ngawl tu ziam? Eite mittang a vawt Pathian in mu thei ngawl tu ziam? 
Psalms94:10 Minamte a hil a pau pa in amate daan pia ngawl tu ziam? Mihing theampo ii syapa ahi ama in pilna nei ngawl ziam? 
Psalms94:11 Amate ngaisut sia Topa in he hi; Amate khua ngaisutna telmeal a om ngawlzia ama in he hi. 
Psalms94:12 Topa awng, nangma ii na lamlakte, nangma ii na thukham na hil mite in bangza a lungdamte ahi ziam!" 
Psalms94:13 Mihing seksolte mat natu in vuum a kitaw dong nangma in ama sia ngimna hunte pan na ommuangsak hi. 
Psalms94:14 Topa in a mite nusia ngawl tu hi; ama ii neisa mihingte taisan ngawl tu hi. 
Psalms94:15 Thukhenzumte ah thutang khenna hong piang kik tu a, a thutang mihing theampo in tua thutang khenna panpui tu hi." 
Psalms94:16 Mihing seksolte langpanin kei atu akua ding ziam? Siatna a vawtte langpanin kei sangah akua hong pang ziam? 
Psalms94:17 Topa in hong hu ngawl hi ka pole a thimthuna ngam, a manlang tak ka zot zawk ngei zo tu hi." 
Psalms94:18 “Kei ka liik laitak hi” ka ci hi; ahihang Topa awng, nong itna kip in hong khuangkhosak hi." 
Psalms94:19 Thintoi a ka thin a ngim simin, nangma in nong heeneam a nong lungdamsak hi." 
Psalms94:20 Sumnguk ne thei thukhenmangte, a khaikim ngawl thu, thutak a suate," 
Psalms94:21 Mihing phate a thasawmte a maw ngawl khat thidaan a piate sia nang taw a kipawl thei bua uh hi. 
Psalms94:22 Ahihang Topa in kei hong hung hi; ka Pathian in kei hong dal hi. 
Psalms94:23 Ama in amate ngitlo hu in daan pia tu a, a mawnate hu in susia tu hi; Topa ih Pathian in amate lalcipsak tu hi." 
Psalms95:1 Hong pai tavun, Topa pok tek tawng! Ei hong dal Pathian tungah ih lungdamna hangin lasa tek tawng!" 
Psalms95:2 Ama mai ah lungdamkona taw pai in, a lungdamhuai pokna late sa tawng." 
Psalms95:3 Banghang ziam cile Topa in a vaanglian Pathian hi a, pathian dang theampo tungsia ah a vaanglian kumpipa ahi hi." 
Psalms95:4 Ama in lianghawng thuk belte panin mualsaang belte dong leitung buppi uk hi. 
Psalms95:5 Ama in a vawtsa tuipi uk hi; ama mama ii a piansak leitung zongh uk hi. 
Psalms95:6 Hong pai tavun, kunin ama bia tek tawng; eite hong Vawtpa, Topa mai ah khupdin tek tawng!" 
Psalms95:7 Ama in eite Pathian ahi hi; eite sia ama hong khoi mite ih hi a, ama ii hong vaak tuuhonte ih hi hi. Tuni in ama son teng ngai vun:" 
Psalms95:8 “Na taanghpupite ii Meribah ngam Massah sennealngam sungah a om lai bangin na thinpuisak heak vun. 
Psalms95:9 Tua munah amate atu ka vawt theampo sia amate in mu napi amate in kei hong sit in hong phin zazaan hi. 
Psalms95:10 Kum sawmli sitset tua mite tungah ka lung a kim bua hi. ‘Amate in bangza in thumaanna sel ziam! Amate in ka thupiakte a zui nuam bua uh hi’ ka ci hi. 
Psalms95:11 Ka thin uuk a, a ciliap huai kiciamna ka vawt hi: ‘Muang takin na tawlngak natu a kong khapsa ngam sungah na tum ngei buatu uh hi’ ka ci hi,” ci hi." 
Psalms96:1 Topa tungah la thak khat sa vun! Leitung theampo awng, Topa tungah lasa vun!" 
Psalms96:2 Topa tungah lasa vun a, ama pok vun! Ama ii eite hong ngupna lungdamna thupha ni simin thangsak vun." 
Psalms96:3 Ama ii minthanna minamte tungah thangsak vun, ama ii a vaanglian nasep nate mihing theampo tungah thangsak vun." 
Psalms96:4 Topa sia lian a, nasia tatakin pok tu ahi hi; pathian dang theampo sangin ama vaang piak zawk tu ahi hi." 
Psalms96:5 Minam dangte theampo ii pathiante sia milim hi lel bek hi, ahihang Topa in vantungte bitphua hi." 
Psalms96:6 Minthanna le vaangletna in ama kiim uum hi; a Biakinnpi sia vaangletna le hoina taw kidim hi. 
Psalms96:7 leitung mihing theampo awng, Topa pok vun. A minthanna le a thahatna pok vun." 
Psalms96:8 Topa ii a minthang a min pok vun; biakpiakna khat kengin ama Biakinnpi sungah pai vun. 
Psalms96:9 A thiangtho Pa hong kilangh ciangin ama mai ah kun vun; leitung bup awng ama mai ah liingin om vun! 
Psalms96:10 Minam theampo munah “ Topa in kumpipa hi! Simlei sia kho takin kiphut a kikhiin thei ngawl hi; ama in mihingte thukhaikim taw thu tan tu hi” ci vun. 
Psalms96:11 Lei le van awng, lungdam vun! Tuipi awng, na sungah a om nuntakna nei teng taw hawk vun;" 
Psalms96:12 lote awng na sungah a om teng taw lungdam vun! Taam sungah a om thingkungte in 
Psalms96:13 leitung uk tu in Topa hong pai ciang, lungdam in au tu uh hi. Ama in leitung mite sia thukhaikim taw a pha in a uk tu hi." 
Psalms97:1 Topa sia kumpipa hi! Leitung awng lungdam in! Tuipi sungah a om, no tuikulhte awng, lawp tek vun!" 
Psalms97:2 Meeikaai le khuazing in ama kiim uum hi; ama in thutang le thukhaikim taw uk hi. 
Psalms97:3 Meikuang sia a mai ah pai a, a kiimkot ah a om a ngalte kaanghtum hi." 
Psalms97:4 Ama ii khualeng in simlei taangsak hi; tuasia leitung in mu in liing hi. 
Psalms97:5 Mualte sia Topa ii mai, leitung theampo ii Topa mai ah khuainun bangin tui tham hi." 
Psalms97:6 Vantungte in ama thutang thangsak uh a, minam theampo in ama ii minthanna mu uh hi." 
Psalms97:7 Milim a bia peuma maizum kingasak tu hi; pathian theampo in Topa mai ah kun uh hi. 
Psalms97:8 Zion mite lungdam uh a, Judah khuapite lawp tek uh hi, banghang ziam cile na thukhenna hang ahi hi, Topa awng." 
Psalms97:9 Vaanglianbelpa Topa awng, nang sia leitung theampo a ukpa na hi hi; pathian dangte theampo sangin na lianzaw lai hi." 
Psalms97:10 Topa in siatna a ensante it hi; ama in ama mite ii nuntakna dal hi; mihing seksolte ii thahatna panin amate suatak hi. 
Psalms97:11 Thutangte tungah khuavak taang a, miphate tungah lungdamna om hi." 
Psalms97:12 No a thutang theampo awng, Topa ii a sep sate hu in lungdam vun! A thiangtho Pathian in bang teng seam zo ci sia phawk vun a, ama tungah lungdamko vun." 
Psalms98:1 Topa tungah la thak khat sa vun; ama in nalamdangte vawt zo hi! ama ii neisa vaangletna le a thiangtho thahatna taw ama in zawna nga zo hi. 
Psalms98:2 Topa in a zawna thu thangsak hi; ama ngupna vaangletna sia minamte in hesak hi. 
Psalms98:3 Ama in Israel te tungah a kamciam sia thumaanna le itna kip taw kholet hi. Mun theampo ah a om mihingte in ih Pathian ii zawna mu zo uh hi. 
Psalms98:4 leitung theampo awng, Topa tungah lungdamna lasa vun; late le lungdam aunate taw ama pok vun!" 
Psalms98:5 Topa tungah pokna late sa vun! tengtonghte taw music tum vun! 
Psalms98:6 Lemle le sakii te tum vun a, Topa, ih kumpipa tungah lungdam in au vun." 
Psalms98:7 Tuipi awng, na sungah nuntakna nei teng taw hawk vun; leitung awng, na tungah a teang theampo taw lasa vun!" 
Psalms98:8 Ngunte awng, khutbeang vun; no mualte awng, Topa mai ah lungdamna taw lasa khawm vun," 
Psalms98:9 banghang ziam cile ama in leitung uk tu in hong pai hi. Ama in leitung mite sia thumaanna taw a pha in uk tu hi. 
Psalms99:1 Topa sia kumpipa ahi hi; tuaciang mihingte liinglawng uh hi. Ama in Cherub te ii tung sang, a kumpi tokhum tungah to a, leitung sia kilok hi." 
Psalms99:2 Topa sia Zion ah thahat hi; ama sia minam theampo tungah a lianbel ahi hi. 
Psalms99:3 Mihing sim in, a lian le a vaang nei ama ii min pok tu uh hi. Ama thiangtho hi!" 
Psalms99:4 A thahat kumpipa awng, nangma in a maan nate na dei hi; nangma in Israel ngam sungah thutang khenna omsak zo ni hi; nangma in thutang le phatna nong paipui hi." 
Psalms99:5 Topa ih Pathian pok vun; a kumpi tokhum mai ah bia vun! Ama thiangtho hi! 
Psalms99:6 Moses le Aaron in ama ii thiampite hi a, Samuel sia ama tungah thu ngen pa ahi hi; amate in Topa biakpui a, ama in zo kik hi." 
Psalms99:7 Ama in meeikhuam panin amate paupui hi; amate tungah ama ii piak thukhamte le a thupiakte amate in zui uh hi. 
Psalms99:8 Topa kote Pathian awng, na mite ngetna na zo kik hi; A mawnate hu in amate daan na piak hial hangin, mawmaisakna a pia Pathian khat na hi hunlam amate na lak hi." 
Psalms99:9 Topa ih Pathian pok vun a, ama mual thiangtho ah bia vun! Topa ih Pathian thiangtho hi." 
Psalms100:1 Simlei bup awng, Topa tungah lasa vun!" 
Psalms100:2 Topa sia lungdamna taw bia vun; ama ii mai ah lungdamna late taw hong pai tavun. 
Psalms100:3 Topa sia Pathian hi ci in ciamtee vun. Ama in eite hong vawt a, eite in ama aa ih hi hi; eite sia ama ii mihingte ih hi a, ama tuuhonte ih hi hi." 
Psalms100:4 Biakinn kongpite sungah lungdamkona taw tum vun; pokna taw a suum sungah pai vun. Ama tungah lungdamko in ama pok vun. 
Psalms100:5 Topa pha hi; ama ii itna in bomaw a, ama thumaanna sia a tawntungin kikhomsuan hi." 
Psalms101:1 Keima ii la in thumaanna le thukhaikim huvau hi a, nangma kong sak hi, Topa awng." 
Psalms101:2 Ka ngamtatna sia sitbaang ngawl tu hi. Bang hun ciang kei kungah hong pai tu ni ziam? Ka inn sungah nuntakna thiangtho taw ka nungta tu a," 
Psalms101:3 a pha ngawl sia ka thuak zo buatu hi. Pathian kung pan a nungkinte ii ngamtatnate ka ngaimaw hi; amate taw kipee-awna bangma ka nei buatu hi. 
Psalms101:4 Thumaan ngawlin ka om buatu a, ngitlona sungah ka kihel buatu hi." 
Psalms101:5 Ngualdang khat po a thimtham in a ngensia thei te ka pawlvawt buatu hi; a kiphasak a kisathei mihing khat sia ka dual zo buatu hi. 
Psalms101:6 Pathian tungah a thumaante sia ka thukim tu a amate sia ka kumpi inn sungah ka teangsak tu hi. A thumaan a citakte sia keima na ka seamsak thei tu hi. 
Psalms101:7 Ka kumpi inn sungah leilot thu son thei kuama a teang buatu hi; a kihi theamsak peuma kei omna munah a om buatu hi. 
Psalms101:8 Ih ngam sungah a om mihing seksolte sia ni khat zawk ni khat ka susia tu hi; mi ngilo theampo Topa khuapi panin ka hawlkhia siat tu hi. 
Psalms102:1 Topa awng, kong thungetna hong ngai ta'n a, hu ngen a ka auna aw hong za ta'n!" 
Psalms102:2 Ngim ka nga laitakin hong nungngat heak in! Kei hong ngai ta'n a kong biapui ciangin a manlang in hong zo ta'n! 
Psalms102:3 Ka nuntakna sia meikhu bangin bo vadi hi; ka pumpi sia mei bangin kuang hi. 
Psalms102:4 Lopa ko bangin hong kivaat hi; an zongh ka du nawn bua hi. 
Psalms102:5 A ngingin ka tau hi; ka vun le ka ngu bek taw ka om hi. 
Psalms102:6 Keima in sennealngam sungah a om sane vacim khat bang le, a zaancip a kinusia mun sungah a om simbu khat bang ka hi hi." 
Psalms102:7 Khangciim in ka lum hi; innkhum tungah om vacim lungzuang khat bang ka hi hi. 
Psalms102:8 Nitangtum in ka ngalte in hong selno hi; kei hong nunaute in keima min tomlawna in zangh uh hi. 
Psalms102:9 Na thin uukna le na thinsona hu in, vut sia an in ka nei a, ka thituite sia ka tuineak taw kihel hi. Nangma in nong tawm a nong vawk hi." 
Psalms102:10  
Psalms102:11 Ka nuntakna in nitak niliap bang hi a, keima in lopa ko taw ka kibang hi." 
Psalms102:12 Ahihang Topa awng, nangma in kumpipa na hi tawntung hi; khang theampo in nang hong phawk tu hi." 
Psalms102:13 Nangma in tho in Zion tungah mulkimna na nei tu hi; tua khuapi tungah hesuakna na nei tu hun hong theng zo hi! Hi sia in a kiciangtan hun hi. 
Psalms102:14 Tua khua sia kisusia zo hi napi na naseamte in it hi, tuasia zaancip zo ahitazong amate in khuangaihuai sa hi." 
Psalms102:15 Minam tuatuamte in Topa kiita tu hi; leitung ah kumpite theampo in ama ii vaangletna kiita tu hi. 
Psalms102:16 Topa in Zion a sakkik ciangin ama in ama ii letna pualaak tu hi. 
Psalms102:17 A kitaisan sa a mite thungetna ama in ngai tu a, za tu hi." 
Psalms102:18 Mihing a piang ngawl laite in Topa a pok thei natu, khangkik te atu in ama sep sate lai taw khum tavun." 
Psalms102:19 Topa in a saangna a om ama ii thiangtho mun panin hong ensuk a, ama in vantung panin simlei ensuk hi." 
Psalms102:20 Ama in thongtaakte tauna za a, thi daan a kipiate suaktasak hi." 
Psalms102:21 Tua ahikom ama min sia Zion ah kithangsak tu a, Jerusalem ah ama kipok tu hi." 
Psalms102:22 Topa bia tu in minamte le kumpi ngam tuatuamte hong kikhop ciangin tuabangin kipok tu hi. 
Psalms102:23 Topa in ka khanmoi kimlai ma in hong thazawmsak hi; ama in ka khan hong tomsak zo hi. 
Psalms102:24 Pathian awng, ka huai maa, tu in kei hong la heak in. Topa awng, nangma in a tawntungin na nungta hi;" 
Psalms102:25 khuangeipi lai in nangma in leitung na bitphua a, nangma khut mama taw vantungte na vawt hi." 
Psalms102:26 Amate sia bo vangeu tu a, ahihang nang sia na om lai tu hi; amate in puan bangin tul tu hi. Nangma in amate puan bangin na vawk tu a, amate a bo tu hi." 
Psalms102:27 Ahihang nangma in a tawntungin na kibang a, na nuntakna a bo ngei bua hi." 
Psalms102:28 Ih tate sia thin muang takin nungta tu a, nangma ii dalna sungah amate suan le paalte sia ngammuang tu uh hi." 
Psalms103:1 Ka thaa awng, Topa pok in! Ka nuntakna theampo awng, ama min thiangtho pok in!" 
Psalms103:2 Ka thaa awng, Topa pok in a, ama bangza dik ziam ci sia mangil heak in." 
Psalms103:3 Ka mawna theampo ama in hong maisak a, ka natna theampo hong damsak hi." 
Psalms103:4 Ama in thaankuul thet natu panin hong keam a, itna le hesuakna taw thupha hong pia hi." 
Psalms103:5 Muvanlai bangin hatin ka moisua kik natu in ka nuntakna sia naphate taw ama in hong dimh hi. 
Psalms103:6 A kinengcipte panpuina taw Topa in thukhen a, amate ii nga tuakte pia hi." 
Psalms103:7 Ama ii ngealnate Moses tungah ama in pualaak a, ama ii sepna liante Israel mite musak hi." 
Psalms103:8 Topa in hong hesuak a hong it in, thin uuk hak a, itna kip taw kidim hi." 
Psalms103:9 Ama in hong teih thapaai ngawl hi; a tawntungin a thin uuk ngawl hi. 
Psalms103:10 Ama in eite taw a kiphu bangin daan hong pia ngawl a, ih mawnate le ih tat khialnate bangin hong thuk ngawl hi." 
Psalms103:11 Van sia lei panin a saan za in ama a zaktate a itna sia lian mama hi. 
Psalms103:12 Nisuana sia nitumna pan a kikhualat za in ih mawnate sia eite sung pan tuabangza ma kikhuala in hong khiinsak hi. 
Psalms103:13 Pa khat in a tate tungah dik ahi bangma Topa sia ama a zaktate tungah dik hi. 
Psalms103:14 Eite sia bang taw kivawt ci sia ama in he hi; ama in eite leivui ih hi sia phawk nginge hi. 
Psalms103:15 Eite ih hile ih nuntakna sia lopa bang ahi hi. Ngam paak khat bangin ih khang a ih palh hi; 
Psalms103:16 Tua zawkciang a tungah vui hong va a, tua paak bo in- kuama in mu kik ngawl hi." 
Psalms103:17 Ahihang Topa a zaktate atu in ama ii itna in a tawntungin kikhomsuan a, ama phatna sia khang tawntungin kikhom hi," 
Psalms103:18 Ama thuciamna sungah a thumaante le ama thupiakte citakna taw a zuite atu in ama phatna sia khang tawntungin kikhom hi. 
Psalms103:19 Topa in a kumpi tokhum sia vantung ah koi hi; ama in mun theampo a uk kumpipa ahi hi. 
Psalms103:20 Ama thupiakte zui a, ama ci bang a ni, no, a thahat vantunglalangte awng Topa pok vun." 
Psalms103:21 Ama deina bangin a ngamta no, ama naseam, vantung a om vaang nei theampo awng, Topa pok vun!" 
Psalms103:22 Topa pok vun, ama ukna sung mun theampo ah ama ii bitphua sate awng. Topa pok in, ka tha awng!" 
Psalms104:1 Ka thaa awng, Topa pok in! Topa ka Pathian awng, nang bangza in na lian ziam! Kumpi zaletna le minthanna," 
Psalms104:2 nangma in puan bangin na silh hi; Nangma le nangma khuavak taw na kituam hi. Vantungte tuipuan buk khat bangin na phalh hi. 
Psalms104:3 Tuaciangin na inn sia tungsang a om tuite tungah na sa hi. Meeite sia siphu ngalleang bangin na zangh a, vui ii thate tungah na to hi." 
Psalms104:4 Vui sia kamtaite bangin na zangh a, khualeng sia na naseamte bangin na zangh hi." 
Psalms104:5 Simlei sia a tawdapte ii tungah kho takin na phut a, a kikhiin ngei buatu hi." 
Psalms104:6 A tungah tuipi sia puantual khat bangin na koi a, tui in mualte a khum hi." 
Psalms104:7 Tuite na teih ciangin amate tai uh hi; na thupiakna aw hong zaak ciangin nawtai uh hi. 
Psalms104:8 Tua tuite sia mualte tung le leikuamte sungah luang a, na see sa mun zuan uh hi." 
Psalms104:9 Leitung a khuum kik nawn ngawl tu, a kaantan thei ngeingawl natu in ngamngi na omsak hi." 
Psalms104:10 Ciktuite munkuam sungah na luangsak a, ngunte mualte kilaklaw ah na luangsak hi." 
Psalms104:11 Tuate in ngamsate atu tui ngasak hi; tua munah ngam laate a dangcim uh hi. 
Psalms104:12 A hui ah a om thingkungte tungah vacimte bu vawtin lasa uh hi. 
Psalms104:13 Mualte tungah van panin nguatui na puaksuk a, leitung sia na thuphate taw kidim hi." 
Psalms104:14 Khuite atu in lopa na posak a, mihingte zak tu in thingnote na posak hi, tua ahikom amate in lo ante ciing thei a," 
Psalms104:15 a lungdam natu in sapittui, a maitai natu in olive thau, a thahat natu in anluumte piangsak hi." 
Psalms104:16 Lebanon mual tungah Topa ii a suan a neisa Cedar thingkungte in nguatui tam mama a nga uh hi. 
Psalms104:17 Tua munah vacimte in a bu vawt uh hi; hilniang vacimliante in mang taakthing tungah a bu vawt uh hi. 
Psalms104:18 Sathakte in mualdawn saangte tungah teang a, ngalhvangte in suangliangte ah buu uh hi." 
Psalms104:19 A ni a thate teptee natu in tha na bitphua hi; ni in a tum tu hun he hi. 
Psalms104:20 Nangma in zan na vawt a, khuazing sungah ngamsa theampo pusuak hi." 
Psalms104:21 Tawpi moite in sa a vai ciang hawk uh a, Pathian ii piak an zong uh hi." 
Psalms104:22 Ni a sua ciangin amate akua zuanin lum uh hi. 
Psalms104:23 Tuasia ciangin mihingte in naseam tu in kuan a nitak dongin na seam suak uh hi. 
Psalms104:24 Topa awng, nangma in na tam mama na vawt zo hi! Ciimna taw tuate theampo na vawt hi! Simlei sia na bitphua nuntakna neite taw kidim hi." 
Psalms104:25 A kisim zo ngawl nganhingte a lian, a no a teen khopna tuipi sia lianin zai hi." 
Psalms104:26 A tungah teambawte khualhaw a, a sungah na vawtsa tuipi nganhingpui Leviathan kimai hi." 
Psalms104:27 Tuate theampo in an a taangsap hun ciang a pia tu in nang hong suang hi. 
Psalms104:28 Nangma in amate an na pia a, a ne uh hi; an na piak ciang amate a lungkim uh hi." 
Psalms104:29 Na nungngat ciangin amate lau uh hi; a husan na laak ciangin amate thi in, amate pianna leivui ah cia kik uh hi." 
Psalms104:30 Ahihang amate hu na mop ciang a kibitphua uh hi; Nangma in leitung ah nuntakna thak na pia hi. 
Psalms104:31 Topa minthanna kikhomsuan tahen! Ama vawt sate tungtaang ah Topa lungdam tahen! 
Psalms104:32 Ama in simlei en a, leitung a liing hi; ama in mualte tham a, tuate sung pan meikhu pusuak hi." 
Psalms104:33 Ka nuntak lai tawntung Topa tungah la ka sa tu hi; ka nuntak laiteng ka Pathian tungah pokna la ka sa tu hi. 
Psalms104:34 Ka la in ama lungkimsak tahen, banghang ziam cile ka lungdamna sia ama kung pan hong pai ahi hi." 
Psalms104:35 Mawneite leitung panin kilalcipsak tahen; mihing seksolte om nawn heak hen. Ka thaa awng, Topa pok in! Topa pok in!" 
Psalms105:1 Topa tungah lungdamkona pia vun a, ama ii letna thangsak vun; ama ii sep sate minam tuatuamte tungah son vun." 
Psalms105:2 Topa tungah pokna lasa vun; a lamdang a sep sa nate thu son vun. 
Psalms105:3 Ama ii neisa ih hi hu in lungdam vun; ama a bia theampo lawp tahen. 
Psalms105:4 Hu ngen tu in Topa zuan vun; a kizom suakin ama bia vun. 
Psalms105:5 A naseampa Abraham ii suante, a teal pa Jacob ii suante awng: Pathian ii a sep nalamdang laknate le a thukhennate phawk vun." 
Psalms105:6  
Psalms105:7 Topa in ih Pathian hi; ama thupiakte in leitung bup atu ahi hi. 
Psalms105:8 Ama in a thuciam sia a tawntung kholet tu a, ama kamciamte khang tul dongin kipsak tu hi." 
Psalms105:9 Abraham taw a vawt thukimna sia le Isaac tungah a kamciam sia ama in kipsak tu hi. 
Psalms105:10 A tawntungin a kikhom tu thuciamna khat Topa in Jacob taw vawt hi. 
Psalms105:11 “Canaan ngam nang kong pia tu a, nangma ii neisa hi tu hi,” ama in ci hi." 
Psalms105:12 Pathian mite sia citawm a, Canaan ngam ah zin tang uh hi." 
Psalms105:13 Amate sia ngam khat pan ngam khat ah, kumpi ngam khat pan ngam khat ah vak kawkoai uh hi." 
Psalms105:14 Ahihang Pathian in amate kuama in a zothawsak bua hi; amate a dal natu in kumpipate tungah hi bangin kidop natu thupia hi: 
Psalms105:15 “Ka tealsa ka naseamte susia heak vun; ka kamsaangte thutha heak vun,” ci hi." 
Psalms105:16 Topa in amate ngam ah kialpi tungsak a, a an uh a vekpi in laaksak hi." 
Psalms105:17 Ahihang ama in sal bangin a kizuak Joseph a kici mihing khat amate mai ah paikholsak hi. 
Psalms105:18 Ama sonkhol thu a taangtun mateng in Joseph ii peangte thikkhau kibul a, thikkol sia a ngawng ah kibul hi." 
Psalms105:19 Pathian kammal in ama sia maan hi ci in lak hi. 
Psalms105:20 Tuasia ciangin Egypt ngam kumpipa in ama suaktasak hi; minamte a ukpa in ama suaktasak hi. 
Psalms105:21 Ama in Joseph sia a ngamukna teng lampui tu le, a ngam bup ukpa tu in koi a," 
Psalms105:22 kumpipa ii uliante tungsia ah vaangneina le kumpipa ngaisutna a piate lamlak tu in thuneina pia hi. 
Psalms105:23 Tua zawkciang Jacob sia Egypt ngam ah pai a, tua ngam ah teang hi." 
Psalms105:24 Topa in a mite tungah ta tam mama pia a, a ngalte sangin hatsak zaw hi." 
Psalms105:25 Ama in a mite Egypt te ii a ngaimawk natu in vawt a, ama in a naseamte theambawl hi." 
Psalms105:26 Tua zawkciang ama in a naseampa Moses le a teal pa Aaron paisak hi. 
Psalms105:27 Amate in Pathian ii a nasia mama sepnate seam a Egypt ngam ah a lamdang laknate vawt hi. 
Psalms105:28 Tua ngam sungah Pathian in khuazing puak hi, ahihang Egypt te in ama thupiakna a ni bua uh hi." 
Psalms105:29 Ama in nguntuite chisan suaksak a, a ngasate theampo thisak hi." 
Psalms105:30 A ngam bup sia ulolte dimteak a, kumpipa inn ngawngawn ulol taw kidim hi." 
Psalms105:31 Pathian in thupia a, tho le thataa sia a ngam sung bup ah a hataak in om hi." 
Psalms105:32 Nguatui taangin ngialtang le khualeng te amate ngam sungah puak hi; 
Psalms105:33 amate ii sapitkungte le theikungte lalsak a, thingkungte theampo nuaitan hi." 
Psalms105:34 Ama in thupia a khaumawte hong pai in, sim zawk ngawl awn tampi pha uh hi:" 
Psalms105:35 tuate in a ngam sungah thingno lopa theampo netum uh a, lo ante theampo khawng siat uh hi." 
Psalms105:36 Ama in Egypt ngam ah innkuante theampo sung pan tapaciil teng thatlum hi. 
Psalms105:37 Tua zawkciang ama in Israel te pusua pui hi; amate in ngunn le khamh pua uh a, amate a vekpi in ciidam in thahat uh hi." 
Psalms105:38 Egypt te in amate kiita ahikom amate ii a nusiat ciangin a lungdam uh hi. 
Psalms105:39 Pathian in a mite tungah meeilom khat koi a, zan in khuavak pia tu in mei khat koi hi." 
Psalms105:40 Amate in ngen a, ama in vamimte puak hi; ama in amate lungkim natu in vantung pan an khiak hi." 
Psalms105:41 Ama in suangpi khat hong a, tui hong phulkeak hi, tua tui in sennealngam sungah ngun bangin luang hi." 
Psalms105:42 A naseampa Abraham tungah a kamciam thiangtho a piak teng ama in ciamtee hi. 
Psalms105:43 Tua ahikom ama in a tealsa a mite pusuapui a, amate in lawpna taw lasa in au uh hi." 
Psalms105:44 Ama in midangte ii leitangte amate tungah pia a, tuaciang a lo teng a tansak sia," 
Psalms105:45 a mihingte in ama thukhamte a zui natu le a thupiak theampo a zui natu in a vawt ahi hi. Topa pok vun! 
Psalms106:1 Topa pok vun! Topa tungah lungdamko vun, banghang ziam cile ama pha hi; ama ii itna in a tawntungin kip hi." 
Psalms106:2 A sep sa na liante theampo akua in son zo tu ziam? Akua in a kicingin pok thei tu ziam? 
Psalms106:3 Ama thupiakte ni a, a tawntungin a maan in a seamte sia mihing lungdamte ahi hi." 
Psalms106:4 Topa awng, na mite na hu ciangin kei hong phawk ta'n; amate na ngup ciang kei zongh hong hel ta'n." 
Psalms106:5 Na mihingte nopsakna hong musak ta'n a, na minam ii lungdamna, na mihingte ii lungdam angtannate hong siimsak ta'n." 
Psalms106:6 Ka taanghpupite ii maw bangma in ko zongh ka maw zo uh hi; kote in seksolin ka ngilo uh hi. 
Psalms106:7 Egypt ngam ah ka taanghpupite in Pathian ii a lamdang a sepnate tel ngawl hi; tamvei tak, a itna a lak hunte amate in mangil hi, tuaciangin San Tuipi ah amate in Vaanglianbelpa langpan uh hi." 
Psalms106:8 Ahihang ama in a kamciamsa bangin a vaangletna lian a lakna in amate hun hi. 
Psalms106:9 Ama in San Tuipi thupia a, tua tuipi kang hi; ama in a mite leiko tung tawnsak in lampui hi." 
Psalms106:10 A ensante khut sung panin amate hun hi; a ngalte khut sung panin amate suatak hi. 
Psalms106:11 Ahihang a ngalte ahile tuitaa siat hi; khat zongh a taang bua hi. 
Psalms106:12 Tuasia ciang a mite in ama kamciamte um in pokna la a sak uh hi. 
Psalms106:13 Ahihang amate in ama sep sa teng mangil pai uh a, ama ii ngaisut piakna ngak ngawlin ngamta uh hi." 
Psalms106:14 Senneal sungah amate duhopna taw kidim a, Pathian ze et uh hi;" 
Psalms106:15 tua ahikom amate nget teng ama in pia a, a kiitakhuai mama natna khat zongh amate sungah puak hi." 
Psalms106:16 Tua sennealngam sungah amate in Moses le Topa ii a thiangtho naseampa Aaron a eang uh hi. 
Psalms106:17 Tuasia ciang lei kihong in, Dathan sia lei in valh a, Abiram le a innkuanpuite lei in hukcip hi;" 
Psalms106:18 a nungzuite tungah meikuang paisuk a, tua mihing seksolte kaanghtum hi." 
Psalms106:19 Amate in Sinai ah khamh taw khuitalno lim khat vawtin tua milim bia uh hi; 
Psalms106:20 amate in Pathian minthanna sia lopa a ne nganhing khat ii lim taw theak uh hi. 
Psalms106:21 Egypt ngam sungah ama ii a nasia mama sepnate taw amate a hun Pathian, amate in mangil uh hi." 
Psalms106:22 Tua munah ama in bang a lamdang nate vawt ziam! San Tuipi ah ama in bang a lamdangsak huaite vawt ziam! 
Psalms106:23 Pathian in a mite ka lalsak tu a ci ciangin ama ii teal a naseampa, Moses in Pathian mai ah dingin a thin uukna taw amate a lalsak ngawl natu in khaam hi." 
Psalms106:24 Tua zawkciang amate in tua ngamnuam a nolh uh hi, banghang ziam cile amate in Pathian kamciam a um bua uh hi." 
Psalms106:25 Amate in a tuipuan buk sungah om in phun a, Topa aw a nangai nuam bua uh hi." 
Psalms106:26 Tua ahikom amate sia sennealngam sungah a thisak natu ahizong 
Psalms106:27 a suan a paalte Pathian he ngawlte kawm ah a kithethaangsak natu ahizong, ngamdang ah a thisak natu ahizong ama in a ciliap huai kidop thei natu thupia hi." 
Psalms106:28 Tuaciang Peor ah Pathian ii mihingte in Baal biakna pawm uh a, nuntakna nei ngawl pathiante tungah a kipia sangaw biak piaknate ne uh hi." 
Psalms106:29 Amate in a ngamtatna taw Topa thin uukna toklosak uh a, a kiitakhuai natna khat amate sungah hong tung hi." 
Psalms106:30 Ahihang Phinehas dingto in a mawte daan a piak ciang, tua pul natna thai hi." 
Psalms106:31 Hi thu sia ama maipha nga natu in tua hun pan kipan kiciamtee a, hong pai lai tu hun theampo sungah kiphawk tu hi." 
Psalms106:32 Meribah ciktui ah tua mite in Topa thin uuksak uh a, amate hu in Moses ngim nga hi." 
Psalms106:33 Amate in Moses ii thin siasak ahikom ngaisun phot ngawlin ama pau hi. 
Psalms106:34 Amate in Topa thupiak bangin Pathian he ngawlte a that bua uh hi," 
Psalms106:35 tuabang ci thada amate taw nupa in kiteang uh a, doaibiate ii ziate zui uh hi." 
Psalms106:36 Pathian mite in milim bia uh a, tua in amate lalna piangsak hi." 
Psalms106:37 Amate in a tapate a tanute sia Canaan milimte tungah sangaw biakpiakna in nei uh hi. 
Psalms106:38 Amate in tua mawnei ngawl patangno numeinote thatlum uh a, tua kithalupnate in ngam ninsak hi." 
Psalms106:39 A ngamtatna uh taw amate le amate kininsak in Pathian tungah a thumaan bua uh hi. 
Psalms106:40 Tua ahikom Topa sia ama mite tungah thin uuk hi; ama in thasiathuai sa hi. 
Psalms106:41 Pathian in amate sia Pathian he ngawlte ii khut sungah nusia a, a ngalte in amate uk uh hi." 
Psalms106:42 Amate sia a ngalte in zothaw a, amate khutnuai theng siat uh hi." 
Psalms106:43 Tamvei ma Topa in a mite suatak ahihang, amate in Topa langpan tu teal zaw ahikom amate sia mawna sungah a thuk zaw in taaksuk uh hi." 
Psalms106:44 Ahizong amate ii au in a biapui ciang Topa in za a, amate ii dongtawnate phawsak hi."
