Psalms106:45 Amate atu in a thuciamna phawk a, ama ii itna lianpi hu in amate maisak hi." 
Psalms106:46 Pathian in amate a vawtsia mihing theampo sungah, hesuakna thin neisak hi." 
Psalms106:47 Topa kote Pathian awng, hong hun ta'n, nang tungah lungdam kong ko thei natu le na min thiangtho kong pok thei natu in, minam tuatuamte sung panin, hong kaikhawm kik ta'n." 
Psalms106:48 Israel te ii Pathian, Topa pok vun; tu le a tawntungin ama pok vun! A kuama theampo in “Amen!” ci tahen. Topa pok vun!" 
Psalms107:1 “ Topa tungah lungdamko vun, banghang ziam cile ama pha hi; ama ii hong itna in kikhomsuan hi!”" 
Psalms107:2 Ama hong ngup sa note theampo in hi kammalte lo kikikin Topa pok vun. Ama in na ngalte kung panin hong suatak a," 
Psalms107:3 ngamdang pan le nisuana, nitumna, sak le thang panin no hong ciapui kik hi." 
Psalms107:4 Pawlkhatte in senneal ngamsung lampi om ngawlna ah vakthap a, a teen natu khuapi paina lampi a mu zo bua uh hi." 
Psalms107:5 Amate a ngilkialin a dangtaak a, lametna bangma a nei nawn bua uh hi." 
Psalms107:6 Tuasia ciang a ngim ngana sung pan amate in Topa biakpui uh a, ama in a cimawkna uh sung pan hun hi." 
Psalms107:7 Ama in lampi tang khat tawnin amate lampui a, a teen thei natu khuapi khat ah then hi." 
Psalms107:8 Amate atu nalamdang a septe hang le ama ii itna kip hu in amate in Topa tungah lungdamko tu uh hi. 
Psalms107:9 Ama in a dangkote dangcimsak a, a ngilkialte an phate taw ngilvasak hi." 
Psalms107:10 Pawlkhatte khuangaina le khuazing sungah teang a, luangta in thikkol kibul uh hi," 
Psalms107:11 banghang ziam cile amate in Vaanglianbelpa Pathian thupiakte nalh a, ama hilnate nial uh hi." 
Psalms107:12 Amate in na ham sepna taw a tha uh tul hi; amate puk tu a, kuama in a hu buatu uh hi." 
Psalms107:13 A ngim nga uh ciang amate in Topa biakpui a, ama in a cimawkna uh panin hun hi." 
Psalms107:14 Topa in amate sia khuangaina le khuazing sung pan pusua a, a thikkolte sukthapsak hi." 
Psalms107:15 Amate atu a lamdang na a septe hang le a itna kip hu in amate in Topa tungah lungdamko hamtang tu uh hi. 
Psalms107:16 Taau taw kivawt kongkhate ama in saattham a, a ki uumna thikzawlte sutan hi." 
Psalms107:17 Pawlkhatte mawmaw a, a mawna hu le a ngitlo hu in thuak uh hi;" 
Psalms107:18 amate in an kii a, thi dedek in om uh hi." 
Psalms107:19 Tuaciang a ngim nga uh ciangin amate in Topa sam a, amate cimawkna sung pan Topa in hun hi." 
Psalms107:20 Ama in a thupiakna taw amate damsak a, thaankuul panin hun hi." 
Psalms107:21 Amate atu a lamdang na a septe hang le a itna kip hu in amate in Topa tungah lungdamko hamtang tu uh hi. 
Psalms107:22 Ama tungah sangaw biakpiakna taw lungdamko hamtang tu a, lungdam lasakna taw ama sep sa theampo son hamtang tu hi." 
Psalms107:23 Pawlkhatte in tuipite tungah teambawte taw khualhaw in tuipi tung panin a nuntak natu zong uh hi. 
Psalms107:24 Amate in Topa vawt thei nate mu uh a, tuipi tungah a lamdang a vawtte mu uh hi." 
Psalms107:25 Ama in thupia a, vuipi nasia mama khat hong va a, tua in tuihualte thawn hi." 
Psalms107:26 Teambawte vui sung a saangna ah kilawnto in, a thukna ah tumsuk hi. Tuabang lauhuaina sungah teambaw naseamte a thinkiam uh hi;" 
Psalms107:27 amate sia zukhamte bangin lutu in hoi vatut uh a, amate thiamna theampo sia a kizangh thei bua hi." 
Psalms107:28 A ngim nga uh ciang amate in Topa biakpui a, a cimawkna uh panin ama in hun hi." 
Psalms107:29 Ama in a kinuai vuipi suangvalte thimsak a, tuihualte dai hi." 
Psalms107:30 Tua tuihualte a thim hu in amate lungdam a, amate thet nopna teambaw tawlngakna mun ngammuanna taw ama in then hi." 
Psalms107:31 Amate atu nalamdang a septe hang le a itna kip hu in amate in Topa tungah lungdamko hamtang tu uh hi. 
Psalms107:32 Mihingte kikhopna sungah amate in ama ii letna thangsak hamtang tu a, upate thu kikupna mai ah ama pok tu uh hi." 
Psalms107:33 Topa in ngunte kangcipsak a, ciktuite luangsak nawn ngawl hi." 
Psalms107:34 Tua munah a teangte ii seksolna hangin, ama in leiphate ci al lei ngamtul suaksak hi." 
Psalms107:35 Ama in sennealngam sia tuicingna mun suaksak a, lei kona mun sia ciktui luanna in kheal hi." 
Psalms107:36 Ama in a ngilkialte tua munah teangsak a, amate in a teen natu in khuapi khat saat uh hi." 
Psalms107:37 Amate in lote ah thaicii tu in sapitkung suan uh a, anlaak hun ciangin an tam mama la uh hi." 
Psalms107:38 A mite ama in thupha pia a, ta tam mama hing uh hi; Khui honte zongh a kiam ngawl natu in ama in kepsak hi." 
Psalms107:39 Ngitlo zawthawkna le ngim nganate hangin, Pathian mite ngallel in zawnsak a thuak uh ciang," 
Psalms107:40 amate a zothawte ama in ngaimawkna lak a, lampi om ngawlna sennealngam sungah vakthapsak hi." 
Psalms107:41 Ahihang taangsapna a neite sia amate lungmanna panin ama in suatak a, a innkuanpuite tuu hon bangin pungsak hi." 
Psalms107:42 Thutang mite in hi thu mu in lungdam uh a, ahihang a seksol theampo thimsak hi." 
Psalms107:43 A ciimte in hi thute ngaisun thei tahen; Topa ii itna kip ngaisun thei tahen. 
Psalms108:1 Lungmuanna a cingin ka nei hi, Pathian awng! La ka sa tu a, kong pok tu hi! Khanglo in, ka thaa awng!" 
Psalms108:2 Ka tengtongh le liamlo te awng, khanglo vun! Tung sunni zongh ka phong tu hi." 
Psalms108:3 Topa awng, minamte sung nangma tungah lungdam kong ko tu hi. Mihingte kawm panin nang kong pok tu hi." 
Psalms108:4 Na itna kip in vantungte kalh hi; na thumaanna in vante ban hi. 
Psalms108:5 Pathian awng, van ah na letna le leitung bup ah na minthanna lak in." 
Psalms108:6 Na thahatna taw kote hong hun ta'n; na it, na mite a suatak thei natu in ka thungetna hong zo ta'n." 
Psalms108:7 A inn thiangtho pan Pathian in, “Zawna mualsuana taw Shechem ka khentham tu a, Sukkoth ngamkuam sia ka mihingte ka hawmsak tu hi." 
Psalms108:8 Gilead sia kei aa hi a, Manasseh zongh kei aa, ahi hi; Ephraim sia ka thik lukhu hi a, Judah sia ka kumpi ciangkhut hi." 
Psalms108:9 Ahihang Moab sia ka kisilna kuangin ka zangh tu a, ka neisa hi ci in a kitel natu in Edom tungah ka peangdap ka lawn tu hi. Philistine te tungah zawna mualsua in ka au tu hi,” ci hi." 
Psalms108:10 Pathian awng, ngalnan natu in a ki uumcip khuapi sungah akua in kei hong tumpui tu ziam? Edom ah akua in kei lam hong pui tu ziam?" 
Psalms108:11 Hong nial takpi zo ni ziam? Ka ngalkap honte taw mainawt in hong kuanpui ngawl tu ni ziam? 
Psalms108:12 Ngalte langpanin ko hong hu ta'n; Mihingte kihuna in mannung ngawl hi. 
Psalms108:13 Pathian ei sang hong pang le eite in ih zo tu hi; ama in ih ngalte a zothal tu hi. 
Psalms109:1 Pathian awng, nang kong pok hi; thim om top heak in!" 
Psalms109:2 Mihing seksolte le leilot theite in kei hong sim hi. Amate in kei huvau leilot thu son hi," 
Psalms109:3 Kei hong siatson hi, a thu om ngawl bulin kei hong sim hi." 
Psalms109:4 Amate it in amate atu thungetsak ka hi hangin amate in kei hong ngalvawt hi. 
Psalms109:5 Amate in kei tungah phatna sia siatna taw, itna sia etsatna taw hong thuk kik hi." 
Psalms109:6 Ka ngalpa tungah thusit tu in a maan ngawl thukhenpa khat teal in a, ama ngalte khat ma in ama mawsiatsak in." 
Psalms109:7 Ama sia thu kisit in, a maw hunlam kilangh tahen; ama ii thungetna ngawngawn khialna lian khat bangin kituat tahen!" 
Psalms109:8 A nuntakna hai ngawlin bo tahen; midang khat in a nasep lua tahen! 
Psalms109:9 A tate sia tanga suak tahen a, a zi meingong tahen!" 
Psalms109:10 A tate inn nei ngawl khutdaw ngente suak tahen; a siacip sa a teenna pan amate kinot tahen! 
Psalms109:11 A leibatnate in a neisa theampo laaksak tahen a, ama sep thaman theampo khualmite in nga tahen." 
Psalms109:12 Kuama in ama tungah dik ngei heak hen a, ama ii nusiat tangate sia kuama in khoi a keam heak hen." 
Psalms109:13 A suan a paal theampo mong tahen a, khang kik sungah a min kimangil tahen." 
Psalms109:14 A taanghpupite ngitlona sia Topa in ciamtee hen a, a nu mawnate maisak ngei heak hen." 
Psalms109:15 Amate mawna sia Topa in a tawntungin ciamtee tahen a, ahizong amate sia kimangil biing tahen." 
Psalms109:16 Tua pa in cikna thiamna ngaisun ngeingawl hi; ama in a zawng, taangsapna a neite le a hu tu a nei ngawlte vawtsia in thatlum hi." 
Psalms109:17 Ama in ngual tomlaw thanuam ahikom, ama kitomlaw tahen! Ama in thupha pia nuam ngawlhet ahikom, kuama in ama thupha pia heak hen!" 
Psalms109:18 Ama in haamsiatna sia a puansilh bangin ngeina see hi; haamsiatnate in ama ii pumpi tui bangin tuamh tahen a, a ngu a taang sungah sathau bangin zenh tahen!" 
Psalms109:19 Tua haamsiatnate in ama sia puan bangin tuam tahen a, kawngkhau bangin ama vial top tahen!" 
Psalms109:20 Topa awng, kei hong langpanin kamsia a pau ka ngalte tungah tuabangin daan pia in." 
Psalms109:21 Ahihang Vaanglianpipa ka Topa awng, nong kamciamsa bangin kei hong hu ta'n a, a pha na itna hangin kei hong suatak ta'n." 
Psalms109:22 Keima in zawngin ka kitaangsamh hi; ka thinsung tawngh dongin na hi. 
Psalms109:23 Nitak niliap bangin ka bo dektak hi; lungno khat bangin hong kiseamkeak zo hi. 
Psalms109:24 Anneak kisap hu in ka khupte huang hi; keima in vun le ngu bek taw ka om hi. 
Psalms109:25 Mihingte in kei hong mu ciangin hong nuisan uh hi; selnona taw a lu uh hong pei san hi. 
Psalms109:26 Topa ka Pathian awng, kei hong hu ta'n; na itna kip hu in hong hun ta'n!" 
Psalms109:27 Kei hong hunpa sia nangma na hi hunlam ka ngalte in hesak in. 
Psalms109:28 Amate in kei hong tomlaw thei tu ahihang nangma in thupha nong pia tu hi. Kei hong vawtsiate in lelna thuak tahen a, keima, na naseampa hong lungdamsak ta'n." 
Psalms109:29 Ka ngalte sia mindaina taw kituam tahen; amate in a maizumna sia puantual bangin silh tahen. 
Psalms109:30 Topa tungah lungdamkona nging takin ka pia tu hi; mihingte kikhopna sungah ama ka pok tu hi," 
Psalms109:31 banghang ziam cile ama in mizawng pa hung a, a thi natu in a puavawkte kung panin amate suatak hi." 
Psalms110:1 Ka topa tungah Topa in, “Na ngalte na peang nuai ah ka koi dong hi sung ka ziatsang ah to in” ci hi." 
Psalms110:2 Zion panin Topa in na kumpi vaangletna hong khang tu hi. Ama in, “Na ngalte uk in” ci hi." 
Psalms110:3 Na ngalte na sim ni ciangin na mite in amate uuk thu in nang hong pawm tu hi. Zingsang tuung daaitui bangin na khangnote in nang kung mual thiangthote tungah hong pai tu hi. 
Psalms110:4 Topa in ciliap huai kamciam khat vawt a dok kik ngawl tu hi: “Nangma in Melchizedek pan a kinguizui thiampi nam sungah a tawntungin thiampi khat na hi tu hi,” ci in kamciam pia hi." 
Psalms110:5 Topa sia na ziatsang ah om hi; ama a thin a uuk ciangin kumpite zothal siat tu hi. 
Psalms110:6 Minam tuatuamte tungah ama in thutan tu a, ngal kisimna phual sia mithiluang taw kidimsak tu hi; leitung kumpite theampo zo siat tu hi." 
Psalms110:7 Kumpipa in lamhui ah a luang luitui ne tu a, tuasia ciang kithakho sua in, zawna taw a ding tu hi." 
Psalms111:1 Topa pok vun! Ama ii mite kikhopna ah ka thin theampo taw Topa ka pok tu hi. 
Psalms111:2 Topa ii septe bangza in lamdang ziam! Tuate hu in a lungpilte in tuate thu a tel nuam uh hi. 
Psalms111:3 Ama ii sep theampo sia patoaina le vaangneina taw kidim hi; ama ii thutang in kip tawntung hi. 
Psalms111:4 Topa in ama ii a lamdang a septe eite makngil tu a dei bua hi; ama dik a hesuak thei hi. 
Psalms111:5 Ama a zaktate atu in ama in an pia hi; ama ii thuciam a mangil ngei bua hi. 
Psalms111:6 Ngamdang mite ii leitangte amate a piakna taw in a mite tungah ama in a vaang lak hi. 
Psalms111:7 A sep a vawt theampo sungah ama thumaanin thutang hi; ama ii thupiakna theampo in muan thamman hi. 
Psalms111:8 Tuate in a tawntungin kikhomsuan hi; thumaan thutak le thutang taw a kipia ahi hi. 
Psalms111:9 Ama in a mite suaktasak a, amate taw a kip tawntung thuciamna khat vawt hi. Ama thiangtho in vaanglian hi!" 
Psalms111:10 Topa zatakna in ciim natu lampi ahi hi; ama thupiakte a zui theampo tungah thu khentel thiamna pia hi. Ama sia a tawntungin pok tu ahi hi. 
Psalms112:1 Topa pok vun! Topa zakta a, a thupiakte zui tu nuam a sa sia in mihing lungdam ahi hi." 
Psalms112:2 Mihing pha khat ii tate sia a ngam sungah thahat tu uh hi; ama ii suan le paalte thupha kipia tu hi. 
Psalms112:3 Ama ii bangkua sia nei le lamh taw kicing tu a, ama a tawntungin nuamsa tu hi." 
Psalms112:4 Mihing phate, ngual a hesuak theite, a dikte le thutangte atu in khuazing sungah khuavak a taang hi." 
Psalms112:5 Ngual tungah ngo takin sum pukthaak a, a nasepna thumaanna taw a seam sia in mihing lungdam ahi hi." 
Psalms112:6 Mipha khat in lelna thuak ngeingawl tu hi; ama sia kiphawk tawntung tu hi. 
Psalms112:7 Ama in thusia zaak tu a patau bua hi; ama ii upna kho a, ama in Topa muang hi." 
Psalms112:8 Ama sia thinngim ngawlin a lau bua hi; a ngalte ii a lel tu uh sia ama in mu nanak tu hi. 
Psalms112:9 A kitaangsamhte tungah ama in ngo takin pia a, ama ii cikna thiamna sia bo ngeingawl hi; ama thahat tu a, kizakta tu hi." 
Psalms112:10 Mihing seksolte in hi thu mu in a thin uh uuk hi; amate in etsatna taw salh in tua teng taw amate a bo uh hi; amate lametnate a tawntungin mangthang hi. 
Psalms113:1 Topa pok vun! Topa naseamte awng, ama min pok vun!" 
Psalms113:2 Tu le a tawntungin ama min kipok tahen. 
Psalms113:3 Nisuana pan nitumna ah Topa min pok vun! 
Psalms113:4 Topa in minam theampo uk hi; Ama ii minthanna sia vantungte sangin saang zaw hi. 
Psalms113:5 Topa ih Pathian taw a kibang kuama dang om ngawl hi. Ama sia tungsang a saangna ah teang a," 
Psalms113:6 ahihang ama in vantungte le leitung en tu in kunsuk hi. 
Psalms113:7 Ama in leivui sung panin mizawngte phongto hi; a kitasamhte a lungmanna panin laamto hi," 
Psalms113:8 tuaciang a mite ii kumpipa tapate ahi, kumpipa tapate taw kithawlsak hi." 
Psalms113:9 Ama in tasel nupi sia a inn sungah patoai a; ama in tanu tapa piakna taw ama lungdamsak hi. Topa pok vun! 
Psalms114:1 Israel te in Egypt ngam pan pusuak a, Jacob suante in tua ngamdang sia a nusiat ciang," 
Psalms114:2 Judah sia Topa ii minam thiangtho suak a, Israel te sia ama ii neisa suak hi." 
Psalms114:3 San Tuipi in en a, taisan hi; Jordan Ngun a luan tawlnga hi." 
Psalms114:4 Mualpite sia keal bangin leang valet uh hi; mualnote sia tuunote bangin kilawn kawkoai hi. 
Psalms114:5 Tuipi awng, nang tuabangin na taikeak natu bang thu piang ziam? Tuaciang, Jordan awng, banghangin na luan tawlnga ni ziam?" 
Psalms114:6 No, mualpite awng, banghangin kealte bangin leang valet nu ziam? No, mualnote awng, banghang tuunote bangin kilawn kawkoai nu ziam?" 
Psalms114:7 Topa hong pai ciang, Jacob ii Pathian mai ah leitung awng, liing in;" 
Psalms114:8 suangpite sia tuicingte, suangliang kipte sia ciktui luangte in a kheal sia ama ahi hi." 
Psalms115:1 Topa awng, na itna kip le na thumaanna hangin na minthanna sia kote tungah hi ngawlin, nang tung bek ah om tahen." 
Psalms115:2 Banghangin minam tuatuamte in, “Na Pathian uh koisungah om ziam?” ci in hong dongh tu ziam?" 
Psalms115:3 Ih Pathian in vantung ah om hi; ama in a uuk pawpo seam hi. 
Psalms115:4 Amate ii pathiante sia ngunn le khamh taw kivawt a, mihing khutte taw kivawt hi." 
Psalms115:5 Tua pathiante in kamte nei ahihang pau thei ngawl a, mittangte nei ahihang, khuamu thei ngawl hi." 
Psalms115:6 Amate in bilte nei ahihang khua za thei ngawl a, naakte nei ahihang a ngim za thei ngawl hi." 
Psalms115:7 Amate in khutte nei ahihang tham thei ngawl a, peangte nei ahihang lampai thei ngawl hi; amate in aw ngingsak thei ngawl hi." 
Psalms115:8 Tuabangte vawt a tuate ma a muangte in amate vawt milimte bang suak siat tahen. 
Psalms115:9 No, Israel te awng, Topa muang vun. Ama in no hong hu a hong dal hi." 
Psalms115:10 No, Pathian thiampite awng Topa muang vun. Ama in no hong hu a hong dal hi." 
Psalms115:11 No, ama a biate theampo awng, Topa muang vun. Ama in no hong hu a hong dal hi." 
Psalms115:12 Topa in eite hong phawk a thupha hong pia tu hi; ama in Israel te le Pathian thiampite theampo thupha pia tu hi. 
Psalms115:13 Ama a zaktate theampo a lian, a no a kibangin ama in thupha pia tu hi." 
Psalms115:14 Topa in no le na suan na paalte uh tungah hin le toai hong pia tahen! 
Psalms115:15 Van le lei a vawt Topa in note thupha hong pia tahen. 
Psalms115:16 Vantung sia, Topa bek ii neisa hi a, ahihang simlei sia mihingte atu in pia hi." 
Psalms115:17 Topa sia, ngam thimna a zuansuk mithite peuma in pok ngawl uh hi." 
Psalms115:18 Ahihang ei a nungtate in tu le a tawntungin ama tungah lungdam ih ko tu hi. Topa pok vun! 
Psalms116:1 Topa ka it hi, banghang ziam cile ama in ka aw hong za hi; ama in ka thungetnate hong ngai hi." 
Psalms116:2 Ka biapui simin ama in hong ngai hi. 
Psalms116:3 Thi tu lau huaina sia ka kiimkot ah om hi; thaankuul kiitakhuaina in kei hong neak hi; kei sia launa le thintoina taw ka kidim hi. 
Psalms116:4 Tuasia ciang Topa sia hi bangin ka sam a, “Hong thuum khi hi, Topa awng, kei hong hun ta'n!” ka ci hi." 
Psalms116:5 Topa sia hesuak thei a, pha hi; ih Pathian in khuangai huai hong sa thei hi." 
Psalms116:6 A hun tu a nei ngawlte Topa in sungsia a; a lau huaina sungah ka om ciangin ama in kei hong hun hi. 
Psalms116:7 Ka lungtang awng, kimuang in, banghang ziam cile Topa in kei tungah pha hi." 
Psalms116:8 Topa in thina panin kei hong suatak hi; ama in ka thitui hong khaamsak a, hong lelsak ngawl hi." 
Psalms116:9 Tua ahikom Topa ii mai, a nungtate teenna leitung ah ka vak hi." 
Psalms116:10 “Hong kisucip hi,” ka ci ciang ngawngawn ahizong," 
Psalms116:11 kei lau in, “Kuama muan thei tu om bo” ka ci ciang ngawngawn zongin ka upna ka thasua bua hi." 
Psalms116:12 Topa ii kei tungah a phatna theampo hu in ama bang pia thei tu khi ziam? 
Psalms116:13 Kei hong hutna lungdamkona in Topa tungah sapittui biakpiakna ka pia tu hi. 
Psalms116:14 A mite theampo kikhopna ah ka kamciamsa sia ama ka pia tu hi. 
Psalms116:15 A mite khat a thi ciangin Topa in bangza in na sa ziam! 
Psalms116:16 Kei sia na naseampa khi hi, Topa awng; ka nu ii nang atu hong sepsak bangma in kei zongh in nang atu ka seam hi. Thina panin nong hun zo hi." 
Psalms116:17 Lungdamko biakpiakna kong pia tu a, nang tungah thungetna kong nei tu hi." 
Psalms116:18 Na mite theampo kikhopna mun, Jerusalem na Biakinnpi thiangtho sungah, ka kamciamsa sia kong pia tu hi. Topa pok vun!" 
Psalms116:19  
Psalms117:1 Topa pok vun, minamte theampo awng! Ama pok vun, mite theampo awng!" 
Psalms117:2 Ama ii eite hong itna in lian a, a thumaanna sia a tawntung atu ahi hi. Topa pok vun!" 
Psalms118:1 Topa tungah lungdamko vun, banghang ziam cile ama pha hi, tuaciang ama hong itna in a tawntung kip hi." 
Psalms118:2 Israel te in: “Ama ii itna kip tawntung hi” ci tahen. 
Psalms118:3 Pathian thiampite in “Ama ii itna kip tawntung hi” ci tahen. 
Psalms118:4 Ama a bia theampo in “Ama ii itna kip tawntung hi” ci tahen. 
Psalms118:5 Ka ngim ngana sungah Topa ka biakpui hi; ama in hong zo a hong suaktasak hi. 
Psalms118:6 Topa in keima taw hong omkhawm a, kei ka lau buatu hi; akua in kei bang hong law thei tu ziam?" 
Psalms118:7 Topa sia kei hong hu pa hi a, ka ngalte ii lelna a thuak sia ka mu tu hi." 
Psalms118:8 Topa muanna in mihing suan tu sangin phazaw hi. 
Psalms118:9 Topa muanna in mihing lampuite suan tu sangin phazaw hi. 
Psalms118:10 Ngal tam mamate ka kiim ah om hi; ahihang Topa vaang taw amate ka susia hi! 
Psalms118:11 Amate ka kiimkot mun theampo ah a om uh hi; ahihang Topa vaang taw amate ka susia hi! 
Psalms118:12 Ka kiimkot panin amate in khuai bangin hong uumci hi, ahihang lingkung kawm kaanghmei bangin amate kaanghtum paih hi; Topa vaang taw amate ka susia hi." 
Psalms118:13 Kei sia nasia takin hong kisim a hong zo uh hi, ahihang Topa in kei hong hu hi." 
Psalms118:14 Topa in vaang hong pia a hong hatsak hi; ama in kei hong hun zo hi. 
Psalms118:15 Pathian mite tuipuan bukte sungah zawna lungdamna taw a auna ngai vun: “ Topa vaanglet thahatna in tu a bang a suaksak hi! 
Psalms118:16 Kidona sungah ama vaanglet thahatna in eite zawna ah hong then zo hi!” ci uh hi. 
Psalms118:17 Kei ka thi buatu hi; ka nungta zaw tu a, Topa sepsate ka thangsak tu hi." 
Psalms118:18 Ama in nasia takin kei daan hong pia zo hi, ahihang ama in kei hong thisak bua hi." 
Psalms118:19 Biakinn kongpite kei hong hon tavun; a sungah tumin, Topa tungah lungdam ka ko tu hi!" 
Psalms118:20 Hisia in Topa kongpi hi; thutangte bek tum thei hi. 
Psalms118:21 Topa awng, nang kong pok hi, banghang ziam cile nangma in ka aw nong za a, zawna nong pia zo hi." 
Psalms118:22 Inn sate in mannung sa ngawl a, a nil suangtum sia a thupibel hong suak hi." 
Psalms118:23 Hisia in Topa ii sepsa ahi hi; tua in bangza mu nop huai ziam! 
Psalms118:24 Hisia in Topa zawna ni ahi hi; lungdam in poai vawt tawng! 
Psalms118:25 Hong hun ta'n, Topa awng, hong hun ta'n! Kote zawna hong pia ta'n, Topa awng!" 
Psalms118:26 Topa min taw hong pai pa, Pathian in thupha pia tahen! Topa Biakinn panin nang thupha kong pia uh hi." 
Psalms118:27 Topa sia Pathian hi; ama in ei tungah hong pha hi. Na khut sung uh ah thingsawlte toai in poai khaamna kipan vun a, biaknatau kiimkot in pai vun." 
Psalms118:28 Nangma in ka Pathian na hi a, lungdam kong ko hi; na letna ka thangsak tu hi." 
Psalms118:29 Topa tungah lungdamko vun, banghang ziam cile ama pha hi, tuaciang ama ii itna a tawntungin kip hi." 
Psalms119:1 Topa thukham bangin nungta a, a nuntakna a sit baang ngawlte in mihing lungdamte ahi hi." 
Psalms119:2 Ama thupiakna a zuite, a thin theampo taw ama thu a nite in mihing lungdamte ahi uh hi." 
Psalms119:3 Amate in ngamtat khial a nei ngei bua uh hi; Topa lampi a tawn uh hi. 
Psalms119:4 Topa awng, na thukhamte ko nong pia zo a, thumaan takin ka zui natu nong sawl hi." 
Psalms119:5 Nong hilnate thumaan tak a, ka kepcing natu sia bangza in lametna nei khi ziam!" 
Psalms119:6 Na thupiakte theampo ka nadon le, ka mai hong zumsak buatu hi." 
Psalms119:7 Thutang taw na thu khennate ka heheak ciangin, thinsung thiangtho taw nang kong pok tu hi." 
Psalms119:8 Na thukhamte ka zui tu hi; Kei hong nusia ngei heak in! 
Psalms119:9 Khangno khat in ama nuntakna bangbangin a thiangtho in a keam thei tu ziam? Na thupiakte zuina taw keam thei tu hi. 
Psalms119:10 Ka thin theampo taw nang atu sep tu ka hanciam hi; na thupiakte a zui ngawlin hong koi heak in. 
Psalms119:11 Nang tungah kong maw ngawl natu in na thukham ka thinsung ah ka keam hi. 
Psalms119:12 Nang kong pok hi, Topa awng; nangma paiziate hong hil ta'n." 
Psalms119:13 Nong piaksa thukhamte theampo nging takin ka lo kik tu hi. 
Psalms119:14 Hau mama tu sangin na thupiakte zuina sungah lungpilna ka nei zaw hi. 
Psalms119:15 Nong lamlaknate ka kantel hi; nong hilnate ka mitsuan hi. 
Psalms119:16 Na thukhamte sungah nuam ka sa hi; nong thupiaknate ka mangil buatu hi. 
Psalms119:17 Ka nuntak thei natu le nong hilnate kong nit thei natu in, kei na naseampa tungah hong dik ta'n." 
Psalms119:18 Na thukham sungah a lamdang thumaante ka mu thei natu in ka mit hong honsak ta'n. 
Psalms119:19 Hi sung leitung ah tawm vei bek ka om tu hi; na thupiakte kei kung pan seal heak in. 
Psalms119:20 Na thu khennate a tawntungin ka he nuam a, thangai in ka thin na hi." 
Psalms119:21 A kiphasakte na mawsak hi; na thupiakte a ni ngawlte haamsiatna thuak tahen. 
Psalms119:22 Na thukhamte ka kepcing hu in kei hong selno a, hong nomute taw hong kipealsak ta'n." 
Psalms119:23 Ngam ukte kisitua in kei hong thasawm uh hi, ahihang nangma hilnate ka kantel tu hi." 
Psalms119:24 Na lamlaknate in kei thinnopna hong pia hi; tuate in ngaisutna hong piate ahi hi. 
Psalms119:25 Leivui sungah lelna taw ka lum hi; nong kamciamsa bangma in hong hingsak ta'n. 
Psalms119:26 Ka sepsa theampo nang tungah kong pualaak a, nangma in nong zo hi; nangma ii paiziate hong hil ta'n." 
Psalms119:27 Na thukhamte ka tel thei natu in hong hu ta'n, tua ciangin a lamdang nong hilnate ka ngaisusun tu hi." 
Psalms119:28 Heena in keima hong khucip hi; nong kamciamsa bangin hong hatsak ta'n. 
Psalms119:29 A maan ngawl lampi ka zui ngawl natu in hong keam ta'n a, na phatna zui in na thukham hong hil ta'n." 
Psalms119:30 Thu nit tu ka teal zo hi; na thu khennate ka nadon zo hi. 
Psalms119:31 Na lamlakna ka zui zo hi, Topa awng; maizum hong ngasak heak in." 
Psalms119:32 Na thupiakte thalawp takin ka zui tu hi, banghang ziam cile nangma in tel theina a tamzaw nong pia tu hi." 
Psalms119:33 Topa awng, na thukhamte ii khiakna hong hil ta'n, tua hile a tawntungin ka zui tu hi." 
Psalms119:34 Na thukham kei tungah hong thiangson ta'n, tua hile ka zui tu hi; ka thin theampo taw ka keam tu hi." 
Psalms119:35 Na thupiakte hong zuisak ta'n, banghang ziam cile tuate sungah lungdamna ka mu hi." 
Psalms119:36 Hau natu sangin na thukhamte zui nopna thin hong pia zaw ta'n. 
Psalms119:37 A man nei ngawl nate nadon na panin hong keamcing ta'n a, nong ciamsa bangma kei tungah hong dik ta'n." 
Psalms119:38 Na thu hong nite tungah na piak kamciam sia na naseampa kei tungah hong tungsak ta'n. 
Psalms119:39 Selnona thuak tu ka launa panin hong hun ta'n; na thu khennate bangza in lamdang ziam! 
Psalms119:40 Na thupiakte ka zui nuam hi; nuntakna thak hong pia ta'n, banghang ziam cile nangma in thumaan thutang na hi hi." 
Psalms119:41 Topa awng, kei bangza hong it ni ziam hong lak ta'n a, na kamciamsa taw kizui in, kei hong ngum ta'n." 
Psalms119:42 Tuasia ciang kei hong selnote pauna ka zo thei tu hi banghang ziam cile na kammal ka muang hi. 
Psalms119:43 A tawntungin thumaan hong pausak thei ta'n, banghang ziam cile ka lametna sia nangma thukhen nate sungah om hi." 
Psalms119:44 Na thukham sia a tawntung a tawntungin ka zui tu hi. 
Psalms119:45 A cialcing suatakna sungah ka nungta tu hi, banghang ziam cile na hilnate zui tu ka hanciam hi." 
Psalms119:46 Kumpipate munah na thupiaknate ka son tu a, ka mai a zum buatu hi." 
Psalms119:47 Na thupiakte zuina sungah thinnopna ka nga hi, banghang ziam cile tuate ka it hi." 
Psalms119:48 Na thupiakte thasia in ka it hi; na lamlaknate thuk takin ka ngaisusun tu hi. 
Psalms119:49 Na naseampa kei tung a, nong kamciam sia phawk in; tuasia in lametna hong pia hi." 
Psalms119:50 Ka ngimna sung ngawngawn ah keima hong kiheneam hi, banghang ziam cile na kamciamna in kei nuntakna hong pia hi." 
Psalms119:51 A kiphasakte in kei hong zawnsak tawntung hang, na thukham panin ka pial ngei bua hi." 
Psalms119:52 Topa awng, taanghlai a na thukhennate ka ciamtee a, tuate in heenepna hong pia hi." 
Psalms119:53 Mihing seksolte ii na thukham a paltan ka mu ciangin thin uukna taw ka kidim hi. 
Psalms119:54 Leitung ka nuntak hun tom no sungah na thupiakte huvau la in ka phuak hi. 
Psalms119:55 Topa awng, zanin nang kong phawk a, na thukham ka ngaisun hi." 
Psalms119:56 Na thupiakte zuina in ka lungdamna ahi hi. 
Psalms119:57 Topa awng, ka dei theampo sia nangma na hi hi; na thukhamte zui tu in kong kamciam hi." 
Psalms119:58 Nong kamciamsa bangma kei tungah hesuakna nong nei natu in ka thin theampo taw kong ngen hi! 
Psalms119:59 Ka ngamtat nate ka ngaisun zo a, nong lamlaknate zui natu kamciam kong pia hi." 
Psalms119:60 Na thupiakte zui natu ka haisaang bua a, ka manlang hi." 
Psalms119:61 Mihing seksolte in kei thaang hong sia zo hi, ahihang na thukham ka mangil bua hi." 
Psalms119:62 Thutang taw na thu khennate hangin nangma pok tu in zan kimlai in ka khanglo hi. 
Psalms119:63 Keima in nang atu hong sepsakte theampo le, na thukhamte a zuite theampo ii lawm ka hi hi." 
Psalms119:64 Topa awng, leitung in na itna kip taw kidim hi; na thupiakte hong hil ta'n." 
Psalms119:65 Topa awng, na kamciam, na kholet zo a, na naseampa keima ii tungah nong dik hi." 
Psalms119:66 Ciimna le heakna hong pia ta'n, banghang ziam cile na thupiaknate ka muang hi." 
Psalms119:67 Daan nong piak ma in ka pai khial bul hi, ahihang tu in na pau kong ni hi." 
Psalms119:68 Nang sia na pha a, na thuthiam hi! Na thupiakte hong hil ta'n." 
Psalms119:69 Mihing kiphasakte in kei huvau leilot thu son zo uh hi, ahihang na lamlaknate ka thinsung theampo taw ka zui hi." 
Psalms119:70 Hi mihingte in tel theina bangma nei ngawl hi, ahihang kei in na thukham sungah nuam ka sa hi." 
Psalms119:71 Daan ka thuakna in kei atu in pha hi, banghang ziam cile na thupiakte hong hesak hi." 
Psalms119:72 Leitung ah a om sum le vanh manpha theampo sangin nong piak na thukham in kei atu in khiakna nei zaw hi. 
Psalms119:73 Nangma in kei nong bitphua a, nong keamcing hi; tel theina hong pia ta'n, tua hile na thukhamte ka he tu hi." 
Psalms119:74 Nang hong upatte in kei hong mu ciangin a lung uh dam tu hi, banghang ziam cile na kamciam ka muang hi." 
Psalms119:75 Topa awng, na thukhennate tang hi ci in ka he hi, tuaciang daan nong piak zongh nangma thumaan hang ahi hi." 
Psalms119:76 Na naseampa kei tungah nong kamciamsa bangma in na itna kip in kei hong heeneam tahen. 
Psalms119:77 Kei hong hesuak ta'n, tua hile ka nungta tu hi, banghang ziam cile na thukham sungah thinnopna ka nei hi." 
Psalms119:78 A kiphasakte in a maan ngawl bulin kei hong suanhkhial ahikom maizumna nga tahen; kei ka hile nangma lamlaknate thuk takin ka ngaisusun tu hi. 
Psalms119:79 Nang hong zaktate na thupiakte a hete theampo kei kungah hong pai tahen. 
Psalms119:80 Lelna maizumna taw ka kipeal natu in na thupiakte a cing takin hong zuisak thei ta'n. 
Psalms119:81 Topa awng, nong ngup tu kong ngakna in, ka tha tul zo hi; na kammal sungah muanna ka nei hi." 
Psalms119:82 “Bang hun ciang hong hu tu ni ziam?” ci in kong dok kawmin nong kamciamte muangmaw a ka e etna in ka mit taak zo hi. 
Psalms119:83 A kivawk sa savun tuithawl bangin kei sia kimanna ka nei nawn bua hi; ahihang na thupiakte ka mangil bua hi. 
Psalms119:84 Bang tanvei hong ngak lai tu khi ziam? Kei hong vawtsiate bang hun ciangin daan pia tu ni ziam? 
Psalms119:85 Na thukham a zui ngawl mihing kiphasakte in kei thaang hong sia natu in vuum a to zo uh hi. 
Psalms119:86 Na thupiak theampo muan thamman hi; mihingte in leilot thu taw kei ngim hong pia hi — kei hong hu ta'n! 
Psalms119:87 Amate in kei hong thatlum dektak zo hi, ahihang na thupiakte ka ngaingon ngei bua hi." 
Psalms119:88 Na itna kip hu in kei tungah hong dik ta'n, tua hile na thukhamte ka zui thei tu hi." 
Psalms119:89 Topa awng, na kammal in kikhomsuan tu hi; tua in vantung ah kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms119:90 Na thumaanna sia khang theampo dong kikhomsuan hi; nangma in simlei sia a om natu munah na nga a, tuabang ma in om top hi." 
Psalms119:91 Tuni dong na theampo amate om babang tekin om hi, banghang ziam cile nangma thupiak hang le amate theampo sia na naseamte a hi siat uh hang ahi hi." 
Psalms119:92 Na thukham in ka lungdamna ii naak hi buathong le ka thuaknate taw ka thi zo tu hi. 
Psalms119:93 Na lamlaknate ka ngaingon ngei buatu hi, banghang ziam cile tuate taw keima a nungta in nong keam hi." 
Psalms119:94 Kei sia nangma aa ka hi hi — kei hong hun ta'n! Na thupiakte zui tu ka hanciam zo hi. 
Psalms119:95 Mihing seksolte in kei hong thatlum tu in hong ngak hi, ahihang na thukhamte a thukin ka ngaisusun hi." 
Psalms119:96 Na theampo sia a kiciangtan in om hi ci in ka he hi; ahihang na thupiakna sia sitbaang ngawl hi. 
Psalms119:97 Na thukham bangza in it khi ziam! Tua thu nitangtumin ka ngaisun hi. 
Psalms119:98 Na thupiak sia kei taw a tawntungin omkhawm a, kei sia ka ngalte sangin hong ciimsak zaw hi." 
Psalms119:99 Ka syate theampo sangin ka tel zaw hi, banghang ziam cile keima in nong lamlaknate thuk takin ka ngaisusun hi." 
Psalms119:100 Pasal haamte sangin ciimna lianzaw ka nei hi, banghang ziam cile na thupiakte ka zui hi." 
Psalms119:101 Ngamtat sia theampo ka pial hi; banghang ziam cile na thu ka ni nuam hi. 
Psalms119:102 Na lamlaknate ka ngaingon bua hi; banghang ziam cile nangma in ka syapa na hi hi. 
Psalms119:103 Na lamlaknate thum mama a, khuaitui sang ngawngawn in thum zaw hi!" 
Psalms119:104 Na thukhamte panin ciimna ka nga hi; tua ahikom a sia ngamtatna theampo ka ensan hi. 
Psalms119:105 Na kammal in kei lam hong lak tu meiinn hi a ka lampi atu khuavak ahi hi. 
Psalms119:106 Na lamlakna maante zui natu in, a ciliaphuai ka kamciam sia ka len tu hi." 
Psalms119:107 Topa awng, ka thuaknate sia lauhuai takpi hi; nong kamciamsa bangma in hong nungtasak ta'n." 
Psalms119:108 Topa awng, lungdamko ka thungetna hong saang ta'n a, na thupiakte hong hil ta'n." 
Psalms119:109 Ka nuntakna khaamh tu in ka kinging tawntung hi; na thukham ka mangil bua hi. 
Psalms119:110 Mihing seksolte in thaang taw kei hong sia hi; ahihang na thupiakte zui ngawlin ka om bua hi. 
Psalms119:111 Na thupiakte sia a tawntungin keima neisa ahi hi; tuate in ka lungdamna ahi hi. 
Psalms119:112 Ka thi ni matengin na thukhamte zui tu in ka khensat zo hi. 
Psalms119:113 Nang tungah a pha tak hong thumaan ngawlte ka ensan hi, ahihang na thukham ka it hi." 
Psalms119:114 Nangma in kei hong hungpa le hong dalpa na hi a; na kamciam sungah lametna ka nei hi. 
Psalms119:115 No, mawnei mite awng, kei kung panin tai vun. Ka Pathian thupiakte ka zui tu hi." 
Psalms119:116 Nong ciamsa bangma in thahatna hong pia ta'n, tua hile ka nungta tu hi; ka lametna sungah hong thinkiamsak heak in!" 
Psalms119:117 Ka ngammuan natu in hong len ta'n, tuaciang na thupiakte a tawntungin ka nadon tu hi." 
Psalms119:118 Na thukhamte a zui ngawl peuma na nial hi; amate thimthel ngiimnate sia a mannung bua hi. 
Psalms119:119 A seksol theampo sia ninteak bangin na ngaisun hi, tua ahikom na lamlaknate ka it hi." 
Psalms119:120 Nangma hu in ka lau hi; na thukhennate hu in launa taw ka kidim hi. 
Psalms119:121 A phate le a maante ka seam zo hi; ka ngalte khut sungah hong nusia heak in! 
Psalms119:122 Na naseampa na hu tu sia kamciam pia in; a kiphasakte in hong zothawsak heak in. 
Psalms119:123 Nong hut natu kong etna, nong kamciamsa ngupna ka etna in ka mit taak zo hi." 
Psalms119:124 Nong itna kip taw kizui in kei tungah hong vawt ta'n a, na thupiakte hong hil ta'n." 
Psalms119:125 Keima in na naseampa ka hi hi; na hilnate ka heak thei tu in, tel theina hong pia ta'n." 
Psalms119:126 Topa awng, na sep tu hun zo hi, banghang ziam cile, mihingte in na thukham hong zui ngawl hi." 
Psalms119:127 Khamh le, khamh ciitak sangin na thupiakte ka itzaw hi." 
Psalms119:128 Tua ahiciang na lamlaknate theampo ka zui a, lam khialna theampo ka ngaimaw hi." 
Psalms119:129 Na hilnate lamdang hi; ka thin theampo taw ka zui hi. 
Psalms119:130 Na hilnate na thiang sonna in khuavak pia a, a he ngawlte ciimna pia hi." 
Psalms119:131 Na thupiakte ka deina hangin kamkaa in ka haihaw liang hi. 
Psalms119:132 Kei sang hong nga ta'n a, nang hong itte theampo tungah na ngamtat bangmain kei hong hesuak ta'n." 
Psalms119:133 Nong kamciamsa bangin liik natu pan hong keam ta'n; siatna in hong zosak heak in. 
Psalms119:134 Na thupiakte ka zui thei natu in kei hong zothawte kung panin hong hun ta'n. 
Psalms119:135 Nong ompuina taw thupha hong pia ta'n a, na thukhamte hong hil ta'n." 
Psalms119:136 Mihingte in na thukham hong zui ngawl hu in ka thitui ngun bangin luang hi. 
Psalms119:137 Topa awng, nangma in thumaan thutang na hi a, na thukhamte maan hi;" 
Psalms119:138 zui tu ngeina na piakte sia pha tatak a, maan hi." 
Psalms119:139 Ka ngalte in, na thupiakte thusim ngawl ahikom ka thin uukna sia, ka sungah mei bangin kuang hi." 
Psalms119:140 Na kamciam sia bangza in maan ziam! Tuasia bangza in diksa khi ziam! 
Psalms119:141 Kei sia a thupi ngawl ka hi a, zawnsak ka thuak hi, ahihang na hilnate ka ngaingon bua hi." 
Psalms119:142 Na thutang sia a tawntungin kikhomsuan tu a, na thukham sia maan tawntung hi." 
Psalms119:143 Ngimna le thintoina taw ka kidim hi, ahihang na thupiakte in lungdamna hong puak hi." 
Psalms119:144 Na lamlaknate a tawntungin thutang ahi hi; telthiamna hong pia ta'n, tua hile ka nungta tu hi." 
Psalms119:145 Ka thin theampo taw nang kong sam hi; Topa awng, hong zo ta'n, tuaciang na thupiakte ka zui tu hi!" 
Psalms119:146 Nang kong sam hi; hong hun ta'n, na thukhamte ka tang tu hi." 
Psalms119:147 Nisua ma in hu ngenin nang kong sam hi; na kamciam sungah ka lametna om hi. 
Psalms119:148 Na lamlaknate ka thuk ngaisusutna in zankhuateakin khangciim in ka lum hi," 
Psalms119:149 Topa awng, nong itna in kip ahikom hong za ta'n; nong hesuakna hong lak ta'n a, ka nuntakna hong keamcing ta'n." 
Psalms119:150 A ngilo kei hong vawtsiate in hong neak vaial hi; amate sia na thukham a tang ngeingawlte ahi hi. 
Psalms119:151 Ahihang Topa awng, nangma in keima nai ah nong om a, na thupiakte theampo kho top hi." 
Psalms119:152 Na lamlaknate ka heak zawk ngei zo hi; tuate sia a kikhomsuan tu in na vawt ahi hi. 
Psalms119:153 Ka thuakna hong en ta'n a, hong ngum ta'n, banghang ziam cile na thukham ka ngaingon bua hi." 
Psalms119:154 Ka vai hong panpui ta'n a, hong suaktasak ta'n; nong kamciamsa bangin hong hun ta'n." 
Psalms119:155 A seksolte kingum ngawl tu hi, banghang ziam cile amate in na thukhamte a ni bua uh hi." 
Psalms119:156 Ahihang, Topa awng, na mulkimna in lian hi; na hesuakna hong lak ta'n a hong hun ta'n!" 
Psalms119:157 Keima in ngalte le hong zothaw theite tam mama ka nei hi, ahihang na thukhamte ka zui khial ngei bua hi." 
Psalms119:158 Tua ngual leeheak theite ka et ciangin kiihuai ka sa hi, banghang ziam cile amate in na thupiakte a len bua uh hi." 
Psalms119:159 Topa awng, na lamlaknate bangza in it khi ziam cisia, hong mu ta'n. Na itna in kikheal ngeingawl ahiciang hong hun ta'n!" 
Psalms119:160 Na thukham laingil in thumaanna hi a, a tangin na thukhennate theampo sia kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms119:161 Mihing vaang neite in a maan ngawlin kei hong do hi, ahihang na thukham ka thasia hi." 
Psalms119:162 Na kamciamte hu in bangza ka lungdam ziam — Sumngum kikholna a mu khat bangin ka lungdam hi. 
Psalms119:163 Leilot thu theampo ngaimaw in ka huatsa hi, ahihang na thukham ka it hi." 
Psalms119:164 A tang na thukhennate hu in ni simin salivei nang tungah lungdam kong ko hi. 
Psalms119:165 Na thukham a itte in ngammuanna tatak nei a, amate a puksak thei bangma a om bua hi." 
Psalms119:166 Topa awng, nong ngup tu ngakin ka om a, nong sawl po ka seam hi." 
Psalms119:167 Na hilnate ka ni hi; ka thinsung theampo taw tuate ka it hi. 
Psalms119:168 Na thupiakte le nong lamlaknate ka zui hi; ka sep ka vawt theampo na mu hi. 
Psalms119:169 Hu ngen a kong auna nang kung hong theng tahen, Topa awng! Nong kamciamsa bangin tel theina hong pia ta'n!" 
Psalms119:170 Kong thungetna hong ngai ta'n a, na kamciamsa om bangin hong hun ta'n!" 
Psalms119:171 A tawntungin nang kong pok tu hi, banghang ziam cile nangma in na thukhamte nong hil hi." 
Psalms119:172 Na thukham tungtaang ah la ka sa tu hi, banghang ziam cile na thupiaknate maan hi." 
Psalms119:173 Kei hong hu tu in a tawntungin hong kinging ta'n, banghang ziam cile na thupiakte ka zui hi." 
Psalms119:174 Topa awng, hong ngum tu nong huna sia bangza in thangai khi ziam! na thukham sungah lungdamna ka mu hi." 
Psalms119:175 Nang kong pok thei natu in nuntakna hong pia ta'n; na lamlaknate in kei hong hu tahen. 
Psalms119:176 Ngam amh tuuno khat bangin ka vakthap hi; Tua ahikom hong pai in, na naseampa keima hong zong ta'n, banghang ziam cile na thukhamte ka ngaingon bua hi." 
Psalms120:1 Ngim ka nga ciangin Topa ka sam a, ama in hong zo hi." 
Psalms120:2 Topa awng, leilot theite le ngualtheam theite kung pan hong hun ta'n." 
Psalms120:3 No a leilot theite awng, Pathian in bang hong law tu ziam? Bangbangin daan hong pia tu ziam?" 
Psalms120:4 Ngalkapte thaltang hiamte le meikam sa taw daan hong pia tu hi. 
Psalms120:5 Note kawm ah teen sia Meshech ah teen bang, Kedar mite kawm sungah teen bangin sia hi." 
Psalms120:6 Kilemna a ngaimawte taw ka teen khop zawk ngei lei zo hi! 
Psalms120:7 Kilemna vai ka son ciangin amate in ngalvai vaihawm uh hi. 
Psalms121:1 Kei hong kihuna koisung pan hong pai tu ziam ci in mualtung ka ento hi. 
Psalms121:2 Kei hong kihu natu sia van le lei a vawt Topa kung panin hong pai hi. 
Psalms121:3 Ama in nang hong puksak ngawl tu hi; nang hong dalpa in a tawntungin khangciim hi. 
Psalms121:4 Israel te a dalpa in lusu ngeingawlin mu ngeingawl hi. 
Psalms121:5 Topa in nang hong cing tu hi; ama sia na kungah nang hong dal tu in om hi. 
Psalms121:6 Sunin ni in nang hong liamsua ngawl tu a, zanin tha in zongh nang hong nasak ngawl tu hi." 
Psalms121:7 Topa in nang sia launa theampo panin hong dal tu hi; ama in nang hong keamcing tu hi. 
Psalms121:8 Ama in na sungtanna le, na pusuana ah tu le a tawntungin nang hong dal tu hi." 
Psalms122:1 “ Topa inn ah pai tek tawng” hong ci a om ciangin ka lungdam hi. 
Psalms122:2 Tu in eite sia hi sung Jerusalem kongpite sung sangah ih ding hi! 
Psalms122:3 Jerusalem sia a etlawm, a hoi in a kipua kik khuapi khat ahi hi." 
Psalms122:4 Topa thupiak bangin ama tungah lungdamko tu in, Israel minamte hong paina mun ahi hi." 
Psalms122:5 Israel kumpipate in a mite tungah thukhen tu in hi sungah to uh hi. 
Psalms122:6 Jerusalem khuapi ah kilemna a om thei natu thungen vun: “Nang hong itte khangto tahen. 
Psalms122:7 Na suumsung sangah kilemna om tahen a, na kumpi innte ah ngal muanna om tahen,” ci vun." 
Psalms122:8 Ka mealheakte le ka ngualtamhte ka ngaisutna in Jerusalem tungah, “Kilemna om tahen!” ka ci hi." 
Psalms122:9 Topa ih Pathian inn atu in na nopsak natu thu ka ngen hi. 
Psalms123:1 Topa awng, na ukna vantung le, nangma kong ento hi." 
Psalms123:2 Topa kote Pathian awng, naseampa khat in a topa suang a, naseamnu khat in a tonu a suan bangma, kote tungah hesuakna nong nei mateng in nang kong ento tawntung tu uh hi." 
Psalms123:3 Kote hong hesuak ta'n, Topa awng, hong hesuak ta'n; kote hong kizawnsak vawt mama zo hi." 
Psalms123:4 Kote sia sumhaute in hong nunau zawk ngei lei zo a, tuaciang a kiphasak hong zothawte in hong zawngsak uh hi." 
Psalms124:1 Topa in ei sangah hong pang ngawl hile bang suak tu hi ziam? Hong zo tavun, Israel te awng!" 
Psalms124:2 “ Topa ei sangah hong pang ngawl hi thong le," 
Psalms124:3 ih ngalte ii hong sim ciang, thinsona taw eite a hingtang in hong valhlum zo tu hi;" 
Psalms124:4 tuaciang namthuam in hong taikeak zo tu a, tui in hong khum zo tu hi," 
Psalms124:5 a lauhuai khuanawl in tui hong tasak zo tu hi.” 
Psalms124:6 Ih ngalte ii hong lalthapsak tu, a oai ngawl Topa tungah lungdamko tawng." 
Psalms124:7 Savaipa thaang sung pan a suakta vacim khat bangin ei zongh ih suakta zo hi; a thaang taltham zo a, eite suakta hi hing!" 
Psalms124:8 Simlei vantung a vawt Topa kung panin eite hong huna hong pai ahi hi. 
Psalms125:1 Topa a muangte in a ngawk thei ngeingawl, a kikhiin thei ngeingawl Zion Mual bang ahi hi." 
Psalms125:2 Mualpite in Jerusalem kiim uum in a om bangma Topa in a mite kiim ah tu le a tawntungin om hi. 
Psalms125:3 Thutangte ii ngam le lei sia mihing seksolte in a tawntungin a uk buatu hi; uk tawntung thong le a thutangte mama in zongh siatna vawt thei tha tu hi. 
Psalms125:4 Topa awng, mihing phate tungah dik in a, na thupiakna a zuite phat vawt ta'n." 
Psalms125:5 Ahihang mihing seksolte daan na piak ciangin nangma ii thu le la a taisante zongh daan na pia in. Israel te tungah kilemna om tahen! 
Psalms126:1 Topa in Jerusalem ah hong ciapui kik ciangin mang bang phet ma ahi hi! 
Psalms126:2 Bangza in ih nui a, lungdam in la ih sa ziam! Tuasia ciang minam dangte in ei huvau sia, “ Topa in amate atu in na lianpi seam zo hi” a ci uh hi." 
Psalms126:3 Na lianpite ei atu hong seam takpi zo hi; bangza in ih lungdam ziam! 
Psalms126:4 Nguntui kang a, a kona munah ngua in tui a puak kik bangin, Topa awng, ko hong nuamsasak kik ta'n." 
Psalms126:5 Thitui taak a, thaicii a tute sia lungdamna taw an lasak in!" 
Psalms126:6 Thitui taak a thaicii pua in a kuante sia anla a hong cia kik uh ciangin lungdam in la a sa tu uh hi. 
Psalms127:1 Topa in inn a sa buale inn sate ii dianna in a luithawthong ahi hi; Topa in khuapi a dal buale ngalvilte ii cinna sia a luithawthong ahi hi. 
Psalms127:2 Zingsang thopal a, nitak lum hakin kivaak kitaa natu nasia takin nasep sia, a luithawthong ahi hi. Banghang ziam cile Topa in ama ii itte a mutthip lanin hu hi." 
Psalms127:3 Tanu tapate sia Topa hong piak letsong hi; amate sia thupha tatak khat ahi hi. 
Psalms127:4 Mihing khat ii a khanmoi lai a hin tapate sia ngalkap khat ii khut sungah a om thaltangte bang ahi hi. 
Psalms127:5 Tuabang thaltang tam a neipa sia mihing lungdam ahi hi. Thukhenna munah a ngalte taw a kisik ciangin ama in a lel ngei buatu hi. 
Psalms128:1 Topa thu ni a, a thupiakte babangin a nungtate in mihing lungdamte ahi uh hi." 
Psalms128:2 Na nasepna in na kisap tu teng hong sik tu hi; nangma in na lungdam tu a, na nuamsa tu hi." 
Psalms128:3 Na zi in na inn sungah a ngathiam sapitkung taw kibang tu a, na sabuai kiim ah na tate in olive kung moite taw kibang tu hi." 
Psalms128:4 Topa thu a ni mihing khat sia, tu a bang keakin thupha kipia takpi tu hi." 
Psalms128:5 Topa in Zion panin nangma thupha hong pia tahen! Na khan tawntung Jerusalem nopsakna hong musak tahen! 
Psalms128:6 Tunu tupa mealmu tu in hong nungtasak tahen! Israel te tungah kilemna om tahen! 
Psalms129:1 Israel te awng, na khangmoi lai pan ma kipan na ngalte in bangza in hong vawtsia zo ziam ko tungah hong son ta'n." 
Psalms129:2 “Khangmoi ka hi lai pan ma kipan ka ngalte in hong vawtsia zazaan hi, ahihang amate in hong zo zo ngawl hi." 
Psalms129:3 Amate in ka nungzaang nasia takin hong liamsak a, lo kitho vuungsa khat bangin hong vawt hi." 
Psalms129:4 Ahihang a thutang pa Topa in saltanna panin hong suatak zo hi.” 
Psalms129:5 Zion a ensante theampo in lelna le nawkeakna thuak tahen. 
Psalms129:6 Amate sia innkhum tungah a po, a khan ma a kocip lopate bang hi tahen;" 
Psalms129:7 tuate sia kuama in khawmtua ngawl a, a lom in zongh kipua ngawl hi." 
Psalms129:8 Tuate kaantan in a pai a kuama po in, “ Topa in thupha hong pia tahen! Topa min taw thupha hong pia khu hi” ci ngawl tu hi." 
Psalms130:1 Topa awng, ka thinkiam dikdekna panin nang kong biakpui hi." 
Psalms130:2 Topa awng, ka auna hong za ta'n; hu ngen a kong sapna hong ngai ta'n!" 
Psalms130:3 Nangma in ko mawnate hong tepteesak hi thong lete akua peuma puavawkna pan suakta thei tu ziam? 
Psalms130:4 Ahihang nangma hong thasia in kong din thei natu uh in, nangma in tua mawnate nong maisak hi." 
Psalms130:5 Topa hong hu natu lawpin ka ngakla a, ama kammal ka muang hi." 
Psalms130:6 Ngalvilte in zingsang khuavak tu kaal a ngalaak mama sangin, Topa ka ngakla zaw hi." 
Psalms130:7 Israel te awng, Topa muang vun, banghang ziam cile ama ii itna in kip a, ama in hong hunnuam tawntung hi." 
Psalms130:8 Ama in Israel a mite sia amate mawna theampo panin ngum tu hi. 
Psalms131:1 Topa awng, ka kiphatsaknate ka kheal zo a, ka kisaktheinate ka nungngat zo hi. Thu liante ahizong, kei atu a haksa leilam thute ahizong patau in ka nei bua hi." 
Psalms131:2 Tua taangin lungkim thinnuamin ka om zaw hi. Nute kaang sungah nauno khat ommuangin a lup bangin ka sungah lungmuanna om hi. 
Psalms131:3 Israel te awng, Topa sia, tu le a tawntungin muang tavun." 
Psalms132:1 Topa awng, David le ama ii thuak haksatnate mangil heak in." 
Psalms132:2 Topa awng, a vaanglian Jacob ii Pathian, nangma tungah hong kamciamna, hong kiciamnate phawk in:" 
Psalms132:3 “Inn ah ka cia buatu a, lupna ka zuan buatu hi;" 
Psalms132:4 Topa atu mun khat, a vaanglian Jacob ii Pathian teenna tu inn khat, ka piak mateng," 
Psalms132:5 ka tawlnga buatu a, ka mu buatu hi,” ci hi." 
Psalms132:6 Bethlehem khua ah Thuciamna Thingkuang huvau ka za uh a, Jearim lote sungah tua thingkuang ka mu uh hi." 
Psalms132:7 “ Topa inn ah pai tawng; a kumpi tokhum mai pan bia tawng” ka ci uh hi. 
Psalms132:8 Topa awng, na vaangletna lim ahi, na Thuciamna Thingkuang taw na Biakinnpi sungah hong pai ta'n a, hi sungah a tawntungin hong om ta'n." 
Psalms132:9 Na thiampite in a maan sepnate vawt tawntung tahen; na mihingte in lungdamna taw au tahen! 
Psalms132:10 Na naseampa David tungah kamciamna khat na pia hi; Topa awng, na tealsa kumpipa nial heak in." 
Psalms132:11 David tungah ciliap huai takin kamciamna khat na pia hi; tua kamciam sia na dawk kik tu in na piak ahi bua hi; “Na tapate sung panin khat kumpi ka suaksak tu a, ama in nang zawkciang ngam a uk tu hi." 
Psalms132:12 Na tate in ka thuciamna sungah thumaan a, amate tungah ka piak thute a zui le, amate ii tate zongh in a tawntungin kumpi suakin na za hong lua tu hi,” na ci hi." 
Psalms132:13 Topa in Zion sia teal zo hi; ama teenna tu in vawt nuam hi. 
Psalms132:14 “Hi sia in a tawntungin, ka teen natu mun ahi hi; hi mun in ka uk nopna mun ahi hi." 
Psalms132:15 Zion tungah ama kisap theampo kicing takin ka pia tu hi; a mizawngte an pia in ka lungkimsak tu hi. 
Psalms132:16 A thiampite sia a sepna theampo ah thupha ka pia tu a, ama mihingte in lasa in lungdamna taw a au tu uh hi." 
Psalms132:17 Hi sungah David ii suan khat sia kumpi lian khatin ka siam tu hi; hi sungah ka tealsa kumpipa ukna ka keamcing tu hi. 
Psalms132:18 A ngalte sia maizumna taw ka tuam tu a, ahizong ama ii kumpingam khangto in nuamsa tu hi,” na ci hi." 
Psalms133:1 Pathian ii mihingte kituiton takin a teen khop uh ciang bangza in lamdang a, bangza in nuam ziam!" 
Psalms133:2 Tua in Aaron lu tungah a kibuak a luzang pan a khamul ah a puantual kithepna mong dong a luangsuk sathau manpha sia taw kibang hi. 
Psalms133:3 Hermon Mualvum tungah daaitui Zion mualte tungah a kia sia taw kibang hi. Tuasia in tawpna a nei ngawl nuntakna a kici Topa ii thupha piak tu a kamciamna mun ahi hi. 
Psalms134:1 Zan hun sung Biakinn sungah a naseam, ama ii naseamte theampo awng, hong pai tavun a, Topa pok vun!" 
Psalms134:2 Ama Biakinn sungah thungetna taw na khut uh laam vun a, Topa pok vun!" 
Psalms134:3 Van le lei a vawt Topa in Zion panin, note thupha hong pia tahen!" 
Psalms135:1 Topa pok vun! No Topa naseamte awng, ama min pok vun." 
Psalms135:2 Topa ii inn sung le, ih Pathian Biakinnpi sungah a dingte awng, Topa pok vun!" 
Psalms135:3 Topa pok vun, banghang ziam cile ama pha hi; ama ii min pokna late sa vun, banghang ziam cile ama dik hi." 
Psalms135:4 Ama in ama atu in Jacob teal a, ama aituam tu in Israel mite teal hi." 
Psalms135:5 Ih Topa lian hi ci in ka he a, pathian dang theampo sangin lianzaw hi." 
Psalms135:6 Vantung le leitung ah ahizong, tuipi sung le a nuai a thuknate ah ahizong ama uuk pawpo a vawt hi." 
Psalms135:7 Ama in leitung mong panin vuipi meeite hong puak hi; ama in vuipi suangvalte atu in khualeng vawt a, tuaciangin vuite sia ama ii kholna sung panin pusua hi." 
Psalms135:8 Egypt ngam ah ama in mihing le nganhingte ii taciil tek a kibangin thatlum hi. 
Psalms135:9 Tua munah nalamdangte le a lamdadangte kumpipa le a upate daan piak natu in vawt hi. 
Psalms135:10 Ama in ngam tuatuam tam ma susia a, a thahat kumpite thatlum hi." 
Psalms135:11 Tuate sungah Amor kumpipa Sihon, Bashan kumpipa Og, le Canaan kumpi theampo kihel hi." 
Psalms135:12 Amate ii leitangte sia ama in a mite pia hi; ama in tuate Israel mite pia hi. 
Psalms135:13 Topa awng, nangma sia Pathian hi ci in a tawntungin hong kithangsak tu hi; khang theampo in nang hong phawk tu hi." 
Psalms135:14 Topa in ama ii mihingte hung tu hi; ama in a naseamte hesuak tu hi. 
Psalms135:15 Tua minamte ii pathiante sia mihingte ii khut taw a vawt tawm khamh le ngunn taw a kivawtte ahi hi. 
Psalms135:16 Amate in kam nei ahihang a pau thei bua hi, mit nei ahihang a mu thei bua uh hi." 
Psalms135:17 Amate in bil nei ahihang khua a za thei bua uh hi; amate sia hu ngawngawn a sang thei bua uh hi. 
Psalms135:18 Tuate a vawtte le a muangte theampo sia amate vawt sa milimte bangma suak tahen! 
Psalms135:19 Israel mite awng, Topa pok vun; no Pathian thiampite awng, ama pok vun!" 
Psalms135:20 No Levi mite awng, Topa pok vun; no ama a biate theampo awng, ama pok vun!" 
Psalms135:21 Topa sia Zion ah pok vun, a inn ahi Jerusalem ah pok vun. Topa pok vun!" 
Psalms136:1 Topa tungah lungdamko vun, banghang ziam cile ama pha hi; ama ii itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:2 Pathiante theampo sung pan a lianbel pa tungah lungdamko vun, ama ii itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:3 To theampo sung pan a thahatbel pa tungah lungdamko vun, ama ii itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:4 Ama bek in nalamdang lakna liante vawt hi; ama ii itna kip tawntung hi. 
Psalms136:5 Ama ciimna taw vantungte vawt hi; ama ii itna kip tawntung hi. 
Psalms136:6 Ama in simlei sia tuithukna tungah sa hi; ama ii itna kip tawntung hi. 
Psalms136:7 Ama in ni le tha vawt hi; ama ii itna kip tawntung hi. 
Psalms136:8 Ni in sun hun a uksak hi; ama ii itna kip tawntung hi; 
Psalms136:9 tha le aksi te in zan hun uksak hi; ama ii itna kip tawntung hi. 
Psalms136:10 Ama in Egypt te ii tapaciil teng that hi; ama ii itna kip tawntung hi. 
Psalms136:11 Ama in Israel mite Egypt ngam panin pusuapui hi; ama ii itna kip tawntung hi; 
Psalms136:12 a khut tha khona, a vaanglian baan taw pusuapui hi; ama ii itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:13 Ama in San Tuipi khen hi; ama ii itna kip tawntung hi. 
Psalms136:14 tuasia kaantan in a mite lampui hi; ama ii itna kip tawntung hi; 
Psalms136:15 ahihang Egypt kumpipa le a ngalkap teng tuitaasak hi; ama ii itna kip tawntung hi. 
Psalms136:16 Ama in a mite sennealngam kaantan in lampui hi; ama ii itna kip tawntung hi. 
Psalms136:17 Ama in a thahat kumpite that hi; ama ii itna kip tawntung hi; 
Psalms136:18 Ama in kumpi minthangte thatlum hi; ama ii itna kip tawntung hi. 
Psalms136:19 Amor mite kumpipa, Sihon thatlum hi; ama ii itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:20 tuaciang Bashan kumpipa Og thatlum hi, ama ii itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:21 Amate ngam teng a mite piaksak hi; ama ii itna kip tawntung hi. 
Psalms136:22 A naseam Israel te tungah tua ngamte pia hi; ama ii itna kip tawntung hi. 
Psalms136:23 Ngal ih lel ciangin ama in hong mangil ngawl hi; ama ii itna kip tawntung hi. 
Psalms136:24 Ama in ih ngalte khut sung panin hong suatak hi; ama ii itna kip tawntung hi. 
Psalms136:25 Ama in nuntakna nei theampo an pia hi; ama ii itna kip tawntung hi. 
Psalms136:26 Vantung a om Pathian tungah lungdamko vun, ama ii itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms137:1 Babylon ngunte hui ah ka to uh hi; tua munah Zion ka phawk uh ciangin ka kap uh hi. 
Psalms137:2 A nai a om pakngiam kungte tungah ka tengtonghte uh ka khai uh hi; 
Psalms137:3 Ko hong pummatte in lasa in hong sawl hi. Amate ngualnop natu in “Zion la hong sak tavun” hong ci uh hi. 
Psalms137:4 Ngual ngam ngual lei ah bangbangin Topa tungah lasa thei tu khu ziam? 
Psalms137:5 Jerusalem awng, nang kong mangil le tengtongh zongh tum thei ngei nawn bua tong!" 
Psalms137:6 Nang sia ka lungdamna lianbel na hi hunlam kong ngaisun bua a, nang kong mangil le, la zongh sa kik thei ngei nawn bua tong!" 
Psalms137:7 Topa awng, Jerusalem a kilaak ni in Edom te ngamtatna na phawk in. “A bul dongin sutham vun” a ci kikik uh sia na phawk in." 
Psalms137:8 Babylon awng, nang sia hong kilalsak tu hi. Kote tungah nong vawtna sa teng hong thuk kik te —" 
Psalms137:9 na nausente uh hong laaksak in suangpi tungah hong teaklupsak te sia mihing lungdamte ahi uh hi. 
Psalms138:1 Topa awng, ka thin theampo taw lungdam kong ko hi; tua pathiante mai ah nangma pokna la kong sak hi." 
Psalms138:2 A thiangtho na Biakinnpi sang maingatin, kunin na min kong pok hi, banghang ziam cile itna kip le na thumaanna hang ahi hi, na min le na thupiaknate sia a lianbel in nong lak hang hi." 
Psalms138:3 Kong sam ciangin nong zo kik hi, na thahatna taw kei nong thakhosak hi." 
Psalms138:4 Topa awng, leitung ah kumpi theampo in nang hong pok tu hi, banghang ziam cile na kamciamte amate in za zo uh hi." 
Psalms138:5 Amate in na sep na vawt sate le na minthanna liante huvau in la hong sak tu hi. 
Psalms138:6 Nang sia tungsang ah, saang mama na hihang, a kiniamkhiakte na khoi a, a kiphasakte sia nang kung panin a buu thei bua hi." 
Psalms138:7 Ngimnate in kei hong uumci ciangin nangma in nong keamcing hi. A thin uuk ka ngalte nong dosak a na vaangletna taw kei nong hun hi. 
Psalms138:8 Na kamciamsa theampo na seam tu hi; Topa awng, na itna kip tawntung hi. Na patsa nasep sia a khuangkhim dongin hong seam ta'n." 
Psalms139:1 Topa awng, nangma in nong sit ngiingeei zo a nong he hi." 
Psalms139:2 Nangma in ka sep ka vawt theampo na he hi; ka ngaisutna theampo a khuala na panin na he hi. 
Psalms139:3 Na ka sep laitak ahizong, ka tawlngak laitak ahizong, nong mu hi; ka ngamtatna theampo na he hi." 
Psalms139:4 Ka pau ma ngawngawn in ka son tu teng na he zo hi. 
Psalms139:5 Nangma in ka kiimkot mun theampo ah na om hi; na vaangletna taw kei nong dal hi. 
Psalms139:6 Kei nong heakna sia thuk mama a; kei tel zawk ahi bua hi. 
Psalms139:7 Nangma pial in koisung zuan thei tu khi ziam? Nang omna pan koisungah ka tai thei tu ziam? 
Psalms139:8 Vantung ah paito kaleng zong tua munah na om hi; mithi khua ah lum kaleng zong tua munah na om hi. 
Psalms139:9 Nisuana kalhin ka leang hial zong ahibuale nitumna sang a khuala belna ah teang kaleng zong 
Psalms139:10 kei hong lampui tu in tua mun ma ah na om tu hi, kei hong hu tu in tua mun ma ah na om tu hi." 
Psalms139:11 Khuazing ii hong sealcip natu, tua ahibuale ka kiimkot khuavak sia zan a suak tu in ka ngen thei hi," 
Psalms139:12 ahihang khuazing ngawngawn nang atu zing tuan ngawl a, zan sia sun bangin a taang hi. Khuazing le khuavak sia nang atu in kibang hi." 
Psalms139:13 Nangma in ka pumpi sungah a om na theampo na bitphua hi; Ka nu naubu sungah ka pumpi nong ngawmtua hi. 
Psalms139:14 Nangma kong pok hi, banghang ziam cile nangma in kiitak tu na hi hi; na sep na vawt theampo tumdangin lamdang hi. Tuasia ka thinsung theampo taw ka he hi." 
Psalms139:15 Ka ngute kipiangsak in, ka nu naubu sungah pha takin kingawmtua a, a thimtham in ka khanto hunin, tua munah ka om hunlam nong he hi." 
Psalms139:16 Ka sua ma in kei nong mu zo hi. Kei atu hong kisee sa ni le hunte a kipat ma in na laibu sungah kiciamtee siat zo hi. 
Psalms139:17 Pathian awng, na khua ngaisutnate sia kei tel tu bangza haksa ziam, bangzata tam ziam!" 
Psalms139:18 Keima in tuate sim hi leng senvui za sangin tamzaw tu hi. Ka khanlaw ciang zong nangma taw ma ka omkhawm lai hi. 
Psalms139:19 Pathian awng, mihing seksolte hong thalupsak le te ka uuk hi! mihing ngoltolte, kei hong nusia in tai le ka uuk hi!" 
Psalms139:20 Amate in nangma taw kisai in seksol kamte hong zangh uh hi; na min siat thethei natu in pau uh hi. 
Psalms139:21 Topa awng, nang hong ngaimawte bangza in ngaimaw khi ziam! Nang hong langpante bangza in ensan khi ziam!" 
Psalms139:22 Amate sia ngaimawk tawpin ka ngaimaw hi; amate keima ngal bangin ka nei hi. 
Psalms139:23 Kei hong sit ta'n, Pathian awng, ka thinsung hong he ta'n; hong sittel ta'n a, ka ngaisutnate a thakin na mu in." 
Psalms139:24 Ka sungah siatna a om ziam hong mu ta'n a, tawntung lampi ah kei lam hong pui ta'n." 
Psalms140:1 Mihing tatsiate kung panin hong hun ta'n, Topa awng, mihing ngoltolte kung panin hong keamcing ta'n." 
Psalms140:2 Amate in a tawntungin a sia vawt tu a sawm ku uh a, kihau thei natu in ngual a hol tawntung uh hi." 
Psalms140:3 Amate ii leeite sia hong thisak thei ngulte taw kibang a; amate kammal in ngulsok ii nguu bang ahi hi. 
Psalms140:4 A seksolte thahatna panin hong dal tan Topa awng, ka puk natu hong sawm ku a ngoltol mite kung panin hong keamcing ta'n." 
Psalms140:5 Mihing kiphasak te in thaang hong sia hi; amate in khau thaangte pha in lamdung ah kei hong mat natu in thaangte keaksa in koi uh hi. 
Psalms140:6 “Nangma in ka Pathian na hi hi,” Topa tungah ka ci hi. Topa awng, hu ngen a kong auna hong za ta'n!" 
Psalms140:7 Vaanglianpipa ka Topa awng, a tha kho kei hong hungpa, nangma in ngal kidona sungah nong dal zo hi." 
Psalms140:8 Topa awng, a seksolte ii deite pia heak in; amate sawmku thute taangtungsak heak in." 
Psalms140:9 Ka ngalte in hong zosak heak in; amate ii kei hong tawn nate amate tungah tusak kik in. 
Psalms140:10 Meikam san vahem te amate tungah taak tahen; dum sungah amate kilawn suk tahen a, pusuak ngei nawn heak hen." 
Psalms140:11 Midangte maw a suan khialte, zawna nga heak hen; mihing ngoltolte sia siatna in ban tahen a, lalsak tahen." 
Psalms140:12 Topa awng, nangma in mizawngte vai le, a cimawte ii nga tu a kilawm thute ah na panpui sia ka he hi." 
Psalms140:13 A thutangte in nang hong pok takpi tu hi; amate sia nangma ii omna munah teang tu uh hi. 
Psalms141:1 Nang kong sam hi, Topa; tu in hong hu ta'n! Kong sam ciangin hong ngai ta'n." 
Psalms141:2 Kong thungetna a namtui biakpiakna in hong saang ta'n a, ka khutte kong lapto sia nitak sangaw biakpiakna khat bangin hong saang ta'n." 
Psalms141:3 Topa, ka kam ah a cing tu khat, ka muk kongkha ah a cing khat koi in." 
Psalms141:4 A maan ngawl sep nopna le, mihing tatsiate seksolnate panpui nopna pan hong keam ta'n. Amate ii anneak poai sungah ka kihel ngei buatu hi." 
Psalms141:5 Mihing pha khat in deisakna taw hong teih in daan zongh hong pia thei hi, ahihang mihing ngilote ii upatna ka saang ngei buatu hi, banghang ziam cile amate ngamtat siatnate langpanin thu ka ngen tawntung hi." 
Psalms141:6 Amate a ukte sia suangliang tung panin a kilotsuk tak ciang mihingte in ka kammalte sia maan sa tu uh hi. 
Psalms141:7 A bebek in a ki ektham thing bangin amate ii ngute sia thaan kiil ah kithethaang tu hi. 
Psalms141:8 Ahihang nang kong muang tawntung hi, Vaanglianpipa ka Topa awng. Nong dalna ka zong hi; Hong thisak heak in!" 
Psalms141:9 Amate ii kei hong siana thaangte panin hong dal ta'n a, thusia vawtte khauthaang panin hong hung ta'n." 
Psalms141:10 Kei bangma tat ngawlin ka pai laitakin, a seksolte sia amate ii thaang sung ma ah awk tahen." 
Psalms142:1 Hu ngenin Topa ka sam hi; ama ka maangkaa hi," 
Psalms142:2 Ka lungkim ngawlna theampo ama ka puak hi; ka ngim ngana theampo ama tungah ka son hi. 
Psalms142:3 A cimaw hi zo ing ci tu in ka kithoai ciang, ama in ka ngamtat natu he hi. Ka lampi totna ah ka ngalte in kei thaang hong sia ku zo hi." 
Psalms142:4 Ka kiim ka paam ka et ciangin kei hong hu tu kuama ka mu bua hi, kuama hong dal tu a om bua hi. Kuama in kei hong awlmawk bua hi." 
Psalms142:5 Topa awng, nang tungah hu ngenin kong au hi; Topa, nangma in kei hong dalpa na hi hi; hi nuntakna sungah ka dei theampo kicinna in nangma na hi hi." 
Psalms142:6 Hu ngen a, kong auna hong ngai ta'n, banghang ziam cile ka thin kiamcip zo hi. Ka ngalte kung panin hong hun ta'n; amate sia kei atu in hat lei hi." 
Psalms142:7 Ka thinngimna pan suatakna hong pia ta'n, tuasia ciang kei tungah nong phatna hangin na mite kikhopna sungah nang kong pok tu hi." 
Psalms143:1 Topa awng, ka thungetna hong za ta'n! Na thutang sungah kong maangkaana hong ngai ta'n; na thumaanna hangin kei hong zo ta'n!" 
Psalms143:2 Kei na naseampa thusitna hong thuaksak heak in; nang muna ah a maw ngawl kuama a om bua hi. 
Psalms143:3 Ka ngalpa in savai bangin hong vai a hong zothal hi. Ama in thongzing khat sungah hong khum zo a, ngei tawngh lai ah a thisate bang ka hi hi." 
Psalms143:4 Tua ahikom, a cimaw hi zo ing ci tu in ka kithoai a, ka thinkiam dikdek hi." 
Psalms143:5 A bosa nite ka phawk hi, na sepsa theampo ka ngaisun hi, na ngamtatna sa theampo ka thin sungah ka sut kikik hi." 
Psalms143:6 Thungenin ka khutte nang kungah kong laamto hi; lei ko bangin ka thaa in nang hong dangtaak law hi. 
Psalms143:7 Tu ma in hong zo ta'n, Topa! lametna theampo ka bosua zo hi. Kei kung panin buu heak in, na buu le kei sia mithi khua a zuansukte taw ka omkhawm tu hi." 
Psalms143:8 Zing simin na itna kip hong phawksak kik ta'n, banghang ziam cile nangma kong muang hi. Ka thungetnate nang kung hong theng hi, ka tot tu lampi hong lak ta'n." 
Psalms143:9 Kidalna nga tu in nang kungah kong pai hi, Topa; ka ngalte kung panin hong suatak ta'n." 
Psalms143:10 Nangma in ka Pathian na hi hi; na deina bang ka vawt thei natu hong hil ta'n. Kei tungah hong dik ta'n a, a muanhuai lampi ah lam hong pui ta'n." 
Psalms143:11 Topa awng, nong kamciamsa bangma in hong suatak ta'n; na phatna taw ka ngim ngana sung pan hong hun ta'n!" 
Psalms143:12 Kei nong itna hu in ka ngalte that in a, kei hong zothaw theampo na susia in, banghang ziam cile kei sia na naseampa ka hi hi." 
Psalms144:1 Kei hong sungsia pa Topa pok vun! Ama in ngal kidozia kei hong hil a, ngalsim tu in hong kingingtasak hi." 
Psalms144:2 Ama in kei hong dalpa le hong hungpa ahi hi, ka belhna le ka ngumpa, ngammuan natu in, ka muanpa ahi hi. Ama in minamte ka khutnuai ah om tu in hong zawsak hi." 
Psalms144:3 Topa awng, nangma in na phaw tham tu in a thithei mihingte bang hi a; a thithei lelte po banghangin thusim ni ziam?" 
Psalms144:4 Amate sia vui muut khat taw kibang hi; amate ii khan sia a kaantan ziau limh khat bang ahi hi. 
Psalms144:5 Topa awng, van khentham in hong pai suk ta'n; mualte tham in, tua hile tuate in meikhu pusua tu hi." 
Psalms144:6 Khualeng tee vazalte tha in a, na ngalte thethaang in; na thaltangte kap in a, amate taikeaksak in." 
Psalms144:7 Tungsang panin hong baansuk ta'n. Tuithukna pan hong dokto ta'n a, hong suatak ta'n; ngamdang mite thahatna panin hong hun ta'n," 
Psalms144:8 amate in thumaan son ngeingawl a, kiciam napi leilot lai hi." 
Psalms144:9 Nang tungah la thak khat kong sak tu hi, Pathian awng; tengtongh tumin la kong sak tu hi." 
Psalms144:10 Kumpipate tungah zawna na pia a, na naseampa David na suatak hi." 
Psalms144:11 A ngilo ka ngalte kung panin hong hun ta'n; thumaan son ngeingawl a, kiciamna ngawngawn taw a leilot lai, ngamdangmite thahatna panin hong suatak ta'n." 
Psalms144:12 Ka tapate uh a khanmoi lai in thahatin a khang thingkungte bang hi tahen. Ka tanute uh sia kumpi inn kingte a zeam khuam hoite taw kibang tahen. 
Psalms144:13 Ka ansaal uhte an namcin taw kidim tahen a, ka lo sungah tuute in a tul a then in pung tahen." 
Psalms144:14 Ka khuite uh zongh a no tol, a sumsi om ngawlin ta tam mama nei tahen. Khua sung ih lampite ah ngim nga kikona aw nging heak hen." 
Psalms144:15 Hi thute bangin a piang minam sia mi nuamsa ahi hi; Pathian sia Topa in a nei mite in mihing lungdamte ahi uh hi. 
Psalms145:1 Na letna ka thangsak tu hi, ka Pathian le ka kumpipa awng; a tawntung a tawntungin lungdam kong ko tu hi." 
Psalms145:2 Ni simin nang tungah lungdam kong ko tu hi; a tawntung a tawntungin nang kong pok tu hi. 
Psalms145:3 Topa sia lian ahikom, nasia takin pok tu ahi hi; ama ii letna in tel zawk ahi bua hi." 
Psalms145:4 Na sepsate hu in khang khat panin khang khat ah hong kipok tu hi; amate in a nasia mama na sepnate thangsak tu hi. 
Psalms145:5 Amate in na minthanna le na letnazia son tu uh a, a lamdang na sepnate thuk takin ka ngaisusun tu hi." 
Psalms145:6 Mihingte in a lianpi na sepnate son tu a, na letna ka thangsak tu hi." 
Psalms145:7 Amate in na phatna theampo son tu a, na thuthiamna la in sa tu uh hi." 
Psalms145:8 Topa in itna le hesuakna nei a, thinsau in itna kip taw kidim hi." 
Psalms145:9 Ama sia mihing sim tungah pha in, a vawt theampo tungah mulkimna nei hi." 
Psalms145:10 Topa awng, na bitphua sa nuntakna nei theampo in nang hong pok tu a, na mite theampo in lungdam hong ko tu hi." 
Psalms145:11 Amate in na kumpi vaangletna ii minthanna sia thuson in nei tu a, na thakhona thu son tu uh hi," 
Psalms145:12 tuasia ciang mihing theampo in na sepna lianpite he tu a, na kumpingam sungah na minthanzia hong he tu uh hi." 
Psalms145:13 Na ukna kip tawntung a, nang sia a tawntungin kumpipa na hi hi. Topa in a kamciamnate tungah thumaan a, a ngamtatna sung theampo ah hesuak thei hi." 
Psalms145:14 Ama in ngim a ngate theampo hu hi; a puksa theampo phongto hi. 
Psalms145:15 Nuntakna a nei theampo in lametna taw nang hong mitsuan a, amate kisap ciangin an na pia hi." 
Psalms145:16 Amate a kikhom in na pia a, kitaangsapna theampo ah a lung na kimsak hi." 
Psalms145:17 Topa in ama ii sepna theampo sungah thutang a, a ngamtatna sung theampo ah hesuak thei hi." 
Psalms145:18 Ama a kote, thintak taw a samte nai ah ama om hi." 
Psalms145:19 Ama a zaktate ii kitaangsapnate ama in sik hi; amate auna za in hun hi. 
Psalms145:20 Ama a it theampo ama in sungsia hi, ahihang a seksolte susia tu hi." 
Psalms145:21 Topa ka pok tawntung tu hi; ama bitphua sa nuntakna nei theampo in a min thiangtho a tawntungin pok tahen. 
Psalms146:1 Topa pok vun! Ka thaa awng, Topa pok in!" 
Psalms146:2 Ka nuntak lai teng ama ka pok tu hi; ka khan tawntung ka Pathian tungah la ka sa tu hi. 
Psalms146:3 Na muanna uh sia mihing lampuite tungah koi heak vun; mihing kuama in no hong hun thei ngawl hi. 
Psalms146:4 Amate a thi ciangin leivui ah cia kik uh hi; tua ni in amate ngealna theampo bo hi. 
Psalms146:5 Jacob ii Pathian sia ama ii hupa in a neipa le Topa sia amate ii Pathian in, a muangte sia mi nuamsate hi a," 
Psalms146:6 ama sia vantung, leitung le tuipi, tua teng sung a om theampo a Bitphuapa ahi hi. Ama in a kamciamte kholet tawntung hi;" 
Psalms146:7 Zawthawk a thuakte sangah pangin thukhen a, a ngilkialte an pia hi. Topa in thongtaakte suaktasak hi," 
Psalms146:8 mittawte khua musak hi. Ama in a puk sate phongto hi; a thutang ama mite it hi. 
Psalms146:9 Ih ngam sungah khualmi hong teangte ama in sungsia hi; ama in meingongte le tangate hu hi, ahihang a seksolte sia siatcip natu munah then hi." 
Psalms146:10 Topa sia a tawntung kumpipa ahi hi. Zion awng, na Pathian sia hun theampo ah maang tu hi. Topa pok vun!" 
Psalms147:1 Topa pok vun! Ih Pathian tungah, pokna la sak tu pha hi; ama pok tu sia nuam a maan hi." 
Psalms147:2 Topa in Jerusalem thaksua kik a, ngamdang ah saltaangte hong ciapui kik hi." 
Psalms147:3 Ama in thin kitamhte damsak a, a liammate tuamsak hi." 
Psalms147:4 Ama in aksite a phakza tu see a, khat sim a min taw sam hi." 
Psalms147:5 A lian a thakho sia eite Topa hi; ama ciimna in kitee thei ngawl hi. 
Psalms147:6 Ama in a kiniamkhiak te laamto a, ahihang a seksolte lei ah sucip hi." 
Psalms147:7 Topa tungah pokna biakna late sak vun; Ih Pathian tungah tengtongh taw music tum vun! 
Psalms147:8 Ama in van ah meeite phalh hi; ama in leitung atu in nguatui pia a, mualte tungah lopa posak hi." 
Psalms147:9 Ama in nganhingte an pia a, va-ak note a au uh ciang anvaak hi." 
Psalms147:10 Ama ii nuam a sak sia siphu thahatte hi ngawl a, ama ii dik a sak zongh ngalkap hangte ahi bua hi." 
Psalms147:11 Ahihang ama in ama a zaktate le ama ii itna kip a muangte tungah lungkim hi. 
Psalms147:12 Topa pok in, Jerusalem awng! Na Pathian pok in, Zion awng!" 
Psalms147:13 Ama in na kongpite khosak a, na mite thupha pia hi." 
Psalms147:14 Na ngamngi uhte bitsak a, zungtaang phabelte taw hong lungkimsak hi." 
Psalms147:15 Ama in simleitung ah thupia a, ama ci babang, a manlang in kiseam hi." 
Psalms147:16 Ama in vuuk sia puanvan khat taw kibangin phalh a, thuamluak sia leivui bangin thethaang hi." 
Psalms147:17 Ama in ngial sia suangpim bangin puak a, ama puak khuasik sia kuama in a thuak zo bua hi." 
Psalms147:18 Tuasia ciang ama in thupia a, tuikhalte tuitham hi; ama in vui vasak a, tui luangsak hi." 
Psalms147:19 Ama in a mite tungah thupuak a, lamlaknate le thukhamte Israel te pia hi." 
Psalms147:20 Ama in minam dangte tungah hi bangin a seam bua hi; amate in ama thukhamte a he bua uh hi. Topa pok vun! 
Psalms148:1 Topa pok vun! No, tungsang a saangna a teangte awng, vantung panin Topa pok vun." 
Psalms148:2 Ama ii vantunglalang theampo, ama ii vantung ngalkaphonpi theampo awng, ama pok vun." 
Psalms148:3 Ni le tha awng, ama pok vun; a taang aksite awng, ama pok vun." 
Psalms148:4 A saangbel vantungte le van ii tungsia a om tuite awng, ama pok vun." 
Psalms148:5 Amate theampo in Topa ii min pok tek tahen! Ama in thupia a, amate kibitphua hi;" 
Psalms148:6 Ama thupiakna taw amate sia a om na sasan tek ah a tawntungin kikoi a, tuaciang amate in a thu ni ngawlin a om thei bua hi." 
Psalms148:7 Leitung panin Topa pok vun, tuipi nganhingpuite le tuipi thukte;" 
Psalms148:8 a thupiak a zui khualeng le ngialte, vuuk le meeite, vui thahatte awng." 
Psalms148:9 Pok vun, mualniamte le mualsaangte, a nga thei thingkungte le taamthingte;" 
Psalms148:10 innsa ngamsa nganhing theampo, a awmtaal nganhingte le vacimte awng." 
Psalms148:11 Ama pok vun, kumpipate le mihing theampo, kumpi tate le a dang ngamukte;" 
Psalms148:12 ngaknunote le tangvalnote, khanghaamte le patangnote zongh in pok vun." 
Psalms148:13 Amate theampo in Topa ii min pok tek tahen! Ama ii min in a dang theampo sangin lianzaw hi; ama ii minthanna in van le lei ii tungsia ahi hi. 
Psalms148:14 Ama ii a it mama Israel mite ahi ama mite theampo in ama a pok natu in ama in ama ii minam thahatsak hi. Topa pok vun! 
Psalms149:1 Topa pok vun! Topa tungah la thak khat sa vun; a thumaan a mite kikhopna sungah ama pok vun! 
Psalms149:2 Israel te awng, nang hong Bitphuapa hangin lungdam vun; Zion mite awng, na kumpipa hangin lawp vun." 
Psalms149:3 Ama min sia lapna taw pok vun; ama pokna in khuang le tengtonghte tum vun. 
Psalms149:4 Topa in a mite tungtaang ah thinnopna nei hi; ama in a kiniamkhiak te zawna taw patoai hi. 
Psalms149:5 Pathian ii mihingte in zawna mualsuana tungah lawp in zankhuateak lungdam takin late sa tek tahen. 
Psalms149:6 Pathian a pok ciang nasia takin au tahen," 
Psalms149:7 minam dangte zaw natu le, a mihingte daan piak natu;" 
Psalms149:8 a kumpipate thikkhau a khii natu, a lampuite uh thikkol a bul natu le," 
Psalms149:9 Pathian thupiak bangin minam dangte daan a piak natu in a khut sungah namsau hiamte toai kawm tahen. Hisia in Pathian mite ii zawna ahi hi. Topa pok vun! 
Psalms150:1 Topa pok vun! Pathian sia ama Biakinnpi sungah pok vun! Vantung ah ama ii thahatna pok vun! 
Psalms150:2 A sep sa na lianpite hu in ama pok vun. Ama ii letna lianpi pok vun. 
Psalms150:3 Lemlete taw ama pok vun! Tengtonghte le liamlo te taw ama pok vun. 
Psalms150:4 Khuangte le lapna taw ama pok vun. Tengtonghte le tamngaite taw ama pok vun. 
Psalms150:5 Daalkopsaite taw ama pok vun. Daalkopsai nging tatak taw ama pok vun. 
Psalms150:6 Nuntakna a nei theampo in Topa pok vun! Topa pok vun! 
Proverbs1:1 Israel kumpipa David tapa Solomon ii paunakte ahi hi. 
Proverbs1:2 Hisung a paunakte in ciimna le ngaisutpha khentel natu le a khiakna thuk kamtepteete tel natu in hong hu tu hi. 
Proverbs1:3 Tuate in pilvangna taw bangbangin nungta tu, bangbangin thumaan tu a, thutang tu, thukhual tu ci in nang hong hil thei tu hi." 
Proverbs1:4 Tuate in heakna a nei ngawl lai khat pilsak thei tu a, tuaciang in khangnote kicinna a nei thei natu dan hil hi." 
Proverbs1:5 Hi paunakte in a ciimte ii heakna ngawngawn belap thei a, pilna saang a neite lamlak hi," 
Proverbs1:6 tuasia ciangin amate in paunakte ii a kiseal khiaknate he thei tu a, mihing ciimte dok thu telhakte zongh tel thei tu uh hi." 
Proverbs1:7 Heakna na nei natu in Topa thasiana na nei phot kul hi. Mihing mawmawte in ciimna awlmawk ngawlin kan nuam ngawl hi. 
Proverbs1:8 Na pa le na nu hong sonte pha takin nadon in, ka tapa awng." 
Proverbs1:9 Amate hong hilnate in a et hoi dial khat, khi khat ii na meal hong hoi tuamsak bangin na pianzia hong etlawmsak tu hi." 
Proverbs1:10 Ka tapa awng, mimawte hong ze et ciangin zui heak in." 
Proverbs1:11 A zezen in, amate in “Hong pai ta'n; ih thalup tu khat zong ka tawng! Mawna nei ngawl khat cimthoina in ngalvawt sin ve tawng!" 
Proverbs1:12 Amate ih mu tangin nungta a, ciidam hikale amate tungah ih law nop teng ih man zawkciang thi siat tu hi!" 
Proverbs1:13 Hauna namcin le ih innte sia ih sutol vanhte taw a kidim in ih mu tu hi! 
Proverbs1:14 Hong pai ta'n a hong pawm ta'n, ih nguk theampo ih hawm tek tu hi,” hong ci tu hi." 
Proverbs1:15 Ka tapa awng, mihing tuabangte taw kithawl heak in. Amate kung pan kiheam in." 
Proverbs1:16 Amate in a sia khat a vawt tu ngakla hi. Amate in thatlum tu in kinging tawntung hi. 
Proverbs1:17 Na mat nop vacim sia ii mu tangin thaang nasia hang, bangma phatuam ngawl hi," 
Proverbs1:18 ahihang mihing tuabangte in amate le amate thaang kisia uh a, tua thaang sungah amate thi tu uh hi." 
Proverbs1:19 Mihing suamna in a suamte nuntakna siik kik vaciat hi, ngoltolna taw a nungta khat pawpo tungah tuabang ma in tung hi." 
Proverbs1:20 Ngai in! Ciimna in khuapi lampi liante sung le vanhzuakna phual ah hong sam hi," 
Proverbs1:21 khuapi kongpite le mihingte kisiktuana munte ah a nging tatakin hong sam hi: 
Proverbs1:22 “Mihing mawmawte awng! bang tanvei mawmaw nuam nu ziam? Heakna bang tanvei ciammui vawt tu nu ziam? Heak tu sawm nawn ngawl nu ziam? 
Proverbs1:23 Kong teih ciangin hong ngai tavun; ngaisutna pha kong pia tu a, ka heaknate kong hawm tu hi." 
Proverbs1:24 Hong sasam khi hi, hong pai tavun ci in hong thaw khi hi, ahihang hong ngai nuam ngawl nu hi. Kei sia hong nadon nuam ngawl nu hi." 
Proverbs1:25 Ngaisutna kong piak theampo thusim ngawl nu hi, kong hil kong pau tu zongh nong oai ngei bua uh hi." 
Proverbs1:26 Tua ahikom ngim na nga ciang, kong nuisan tu hi. Launa lian tatakin nang hong nawk a," 
Proverbs1:27 na tungah vuipi suangval bangin hong va a, ngimna vuipi hong puak hi, nang sia natna le cimawkna taw na om hun ciangin kong nunau tu hi." 
Proverbs1:28 Tuaciang ciimna nong kan tu a, ahihang kong zo buatu hi. Mun theampo ah hong zong ka lete zong nong mu buatu hi." 
Proverbs1:29 Heakna bangma hunin na thusim ngei bua a Topa thu nit tu zongh na nial tawntung hi. 
Proverbs1:30 Ngaisutna kong piakte na dei ngei bua a, kong hil kong pau ciangin nong nadon bua hi." 
Proverbs1:31 Tua ahikom, nangma taw a kiphu bangin na nga tu hi, tuaciang nangma ngamtatna ma in na ci hong nasak tu hi." 
Proverbs1:32 Heakna nei ngeingawlte thi hi, banghang ziam cile amate in ciimna nial uh hi. A mawmawte sia awlmawk a neithei ngawlna in amate lalsak hi." 
Proverbs1:33 Ahihang a kuama po kei thu hong ngaite in ngammuanna nei tu hi. Ama sia thinmuang in om tu a, a launa tu bangma thu a om buatu hi.”" 
Proverbs2:1 Ka tapa awng, kong hilte sin in a, vawt a kong sawlte bangma hunin mangil heak in." 
Proverbs2:2 Ciimna thute ngai in a, tuate heak tu in hanciam in." 
Proverbs2:3 Hi hi, ciimna ngen in; a thuk mu theina nei natu maangkaa in." 
Proverbs2:4 Ngunn ahizong a kiseal sum manphate ahizong na zon tu bangin nasia takin zong in. 
Proverbs2:5 Tuabangin na ngamta le Topa kiitakna sia bang ziam ci in na he tu a, Pathian thu heakna in na nei tu hi." 
Proverbs2:6 Ciimna a pia sia in Topa hi; ama kung pan heakna le tel theina hong pai hi. 
Proverbs2:7 Ama in huna pia a, thutang, thumaante a sungsia hi." 
Proverbs2:8 Midangte tungah a kilawm tu bangin a ngamtate ama in sungsia a, ama tungah a kipiate ama in cing hi." 
Proverbs2:9 Ka pau nong ngai le, a maan, a tang le a kilawmte na he tu hi. Na vawt tute na he tu hi." 
Proverbs2:10 A ciim na suak tu a, na heakna in nopsakna hong pia tu hi." 
Proverbs2:11 A thuk na mu theina le na telna in nang hong sungsia tu hi," 
Proverbs2:12 tuaciang a maan ngawlte na vawt ngawl natu in hong khaam tu hi. Amate pauna taw ngimna a piangsak mite kung panin tuate in hong keam tu hi," 
Proverbs2:13 tuabang mite in thutang nuntakzia nusia in mawna khuazing sungah a teang uh hi," 
Proverbs2:14 tuabang mite in a maan ngawl sepna sungah nuamsa a, tuaciang in khiakna nei ngawl siatnate ah thanuam uh hi," 
Proverbs2:15 amate sia mihing suantaak ngawl a muan thamman ngawlte ahi uh hi. 
Proverbs2:16 Nangma in numei paktat khat po ii kamthum taw hong zolnate na nalh zo tu hi," 
Proverbs2:17 ama in a pasal tungah thumaan ngawlin kiciamna thiangthote a mangil nu ahi hi. 
Proverbs2:18 Ama inn ah na haw le thina lampi ah khual a hawhaw na hi hi. Tua munah pai tu sia mithi khua a neak na hi hi. 
Proverbs2:19 Ama kung a haw peuma hong heak kik ngeingawl hi. Tua pa in nuntakna lampi ah hong kilee kik ngei nawn ngawl hi. 
Proverbs2:20 Tua ahikom mihing phate lamlaknate zui in thutang nuntakna taw nungta hamtang in. 
Proverbs2:21 Thutang mi, thumaan takkhate, hisung eima ii leitang tungah a nungta tu hi." 
Proverbs2:22 Ahihang Pathian in mihing seksolte leitung panin dokkhe tu a, hi mawneite leitung panin thingnote baw bangin bot tu hi." 
Proverbs3:1 Ka tapa awng, kong hilte mangil heak in. Vawt a, kong sawlte a tawntungin ciamtee in." 
Proverbs3:2 Kong hilnate in khansauna le nuntakna nuam hong pia tu hi. 
Proverbs3:3 Thuciipna le thumaanna thasua ngei heak in. Na ngawng kiimkot ah vet in a; na lungtang tungah at in. 
Proverbs3:4 Hi bangin na ngamta le Pathian le mihingte in nang dik hong sa tu hi. 
Proverbs3:5 Na thin theampo taw Topa muang in. Nangma ii he na kisakte bangma hunin muang heak in. 
Proverbs3:6 Na sep na vawt theampo sungah Topa phawk in, tua hile ama in a maan lampi hong lak tu hi."
