Proverbs3:7 Na hi bang sangin a ciim zaw in kituat heak in, Topa ii thu ni lel in a, a maan ngawlte vawt tu nial in." 
Proverbs3:8 Tuabangin na hile zatui pha bang hong hi tu a, na liamnate hong damsak in, na natnate hong nuamtuamsak tu hi." 
Proverbs3:9 Leitang tung pan a piang theampo sung pan a phabel sia piakna taw Topa patoai in. 
Proverbs3:10 Tuabangin na hile na ansaal sia antangte taw kidim tu a, na khol natu om ngawl liang dongin sapittui tam mama na nei tu hi." 
Proverbs3:11 Ka tapa awng, Topa in tekna, hilna hong nei ciangin pha takpi in nadon in a, kidop natu hong piak thu hi ci in saang in." 
Proverbs3:12 Nu le pate in a kiphatsak pui a ta khat, a tek a hil bangma Topa in ama ii itte tek hi." 
Proverbs3:13 A ciim a hong kikheal mihing — telthiamna a nei pa in mihing lungdam ahi hi. 
Proverbs3:14 Tua ii sungah ngunn sangin meetna tam om zaw hi; nang atu in khamh sangin man neizaw hi. 
Proverbs3:15 Ciimna sia suang manphate sangin manpha zaw hi; deihuai na sak na khat pawpo taw zong a kitee ngat thei bua hi. 
Proverbs3:16 Ciimna in khansauna hong pia a, hauna le minphatna zongh hong pia hi." 
Proverbs3:17 Ciimna in na nuntakna hong nuamsak tu a, thinmuang takin hong tonpui tu hi." 
Proverbs3:18 Mihing ciimte sia a lungdamte ahi uh hi; ciimna in nuntakna pia tu hi. 
Proverbs3:19 Topa in simlei sia ama ciimna taw bitphua hi; ama heakna taw van sia a omna munah koi hi. 
Proverbs3:20 Ama ciimna in ngunte luangsak hi, tuaciang leitang atu in meeikaaite in nguatui piasak hi." 
Proverbs3:21 Ka tapa awng, na ciimna le a thuk na muna sia keamcing in kholet in. Na kung panin taisua heak in." 
Proverbs3:22 Tuate in nangma nuntakna hong pia tu hi, a nuam le lungdam nuntakna hong pia tu hi." 
Proverbs3:23 Na paina lampi ah sumsina om ngawlin na pai tu a, zongh na lutu beak buatu hi." 
Proverbs3:24 Lupna na zot ciang zong na lau buatu a, zankhuateakin mut citakin na mu tu hi." 
Proverbs3:25 Mi seksolte tungah vuipi suangval bangin thakhatthu a tung thei lal theinate patau in na nei buatu hi. 
Proverbs3:26 Topa in nang hong keamcing tu hi. Ama in thaang sungah nang hong awksak buatu hi. 
Proverbs3:27 Bang hun po ahizong, na hi thei lai teng a kitaangsamhte tungah phatna vawt in." 
Proverbs3:28 Tutawm in na hu thei tu ahi nale zing ciang dong na innpaamte in ngaksak heak in. 
Proverbs3:29 Na innpaamte tungah siatna a piangsak thei bangma sawmku heak in; amate in nang hong muangin na nai ah hong teang hi. 
Proverbs3:30 Nang tungah siatna hong vawt ngeingawl mihing khat taw bangbang po thu om kale kam kinial heak in. 
Proverbs3:31 Mihing ngoltolte eang heak in a, amate ngamtat bangin ngamta tu in khensat heak in," 
Proverbs3:32 banghang ziam cile Topa in ngamtat pha ngawl a vawtte ngaimaw a, ahizong thutangte sia ama mimuan in koi hi." 
Proverbs3:33 Topa in mi seksolte inn ah haamsiatna koi a, ahihang a thutangte inn sia thupha pia hi." 
Proverbs3:34 Ama in a kisatheite zangh ngawlin, a kiniamkhiakte maipha pia hi." 
Proverbs3:35 Mihing ciimte in a pok huai minphatna nga tu a, ahizong mihing mawmawte in maimawlna bekma nga thua tu hi." 
Proverbs4:1 Ka tapa awng, na pa hong hilnate ngai in. Pha takin nadon lete telthiamna na nei tu hi." 
Proverbs4:2 Nang kong hil sia pha ahikom a vekpi in ciamtee in. 
Proverbs4:3 Ka nu le ka pa ii tapa khat bek ahi keima ka patangno lai in," 
Proverbs4:4 ka pa in hong hil hi. Ama in, “Ka ci theampo ciamtee in a, mangil ngei heak in. Kong sawl bangin ngamta in, tua hile na nungta tu hi." 
Proverbs4:5 Ciimna le thuthuk mu theina kan in! Kong cite sia mangil heak in a, awlmawk ngawlin om heak in." 
Proverbs4:6 Ciimna taisan heak in; tua hile tuasia in nang hong hung tu hi; ama it in, tua in nang hong keamcing tu hi." 
Proverbs4:7 Ciimna ngana sia na vawt thei sung pan a thupibel ahi hi. A dang theampo na nga tazong thuthuk muna ma kan in. 
Proverbs4:8 Ciimna thangai in, nang hong liansak tu hi. Ciimna pom in, minphatna hong pia tu hi." 
Proverbs4:9 Ciimna in na minthanna lukhu ahi tu hi,” hong ci hi." 
Proverbs4:10 Ka tapa awng, hong ngai ta'n. Kong son tute thupi laak in, tua hile khansau in na nungta tu hi." 
Proverbs4:11 Ciimna le a maan lampi taw nuntakzia hong hil zo khi hi. 
Proverbs4:12 Ciim takin kal na suan le bangma in na lampi hong khak ngawl tu a, na tai ciangin na lutu buatu hi." 
Proverbs4:13 Na sinsate a tawntungin ciamtee in. Na sin pilna sia na nuntakna ahi hi — pha takin keamcing in. 
Proverbs4:14 Mi ngilote paina ah pai heak in. Mi seksolte ngamtatna ettee in zui heak in. 
Proverbs4:15 Tuabangin vawt heak in! Siatna pan kikeam in! Nial in a, na pai ngei bangin pai in." 
Proverbs4:16 Mi seksolte sia a maan ngawl ngamtatna khat peuma a vawt bua uh le mutthip thei ngawl uh hi. Khat po a liamsua bua uh le amate mutthip thei ngawl uh hi. 
Proverbs4:17 Seksolna le ngoltolna sia amate atu in an le tui bang ahi uh hi. 
Proverbs4:18 Thutangte tot lampi sia sun dongin, a taang vaial nisuak taw kibang hi." 
Proverbs4:19 Mi seksolte lampi ahile zan bangin zing hi. Amate in liik ahihang bang tungah, lutu ziam ci in a mu thei bua uh hi." 
Proverbs4:20 Ka tapa awng, ka ci teng pha takin nadon in. Ka kammalte ngai in." 
Proverbs4:21 Tuate in nangma taisansak heak in. Tuate ciamtee in a, na thinsung ah keam in." 
Proverbs4:22 Tuate in a tel theite tungah nuntakna le ciidamna pia tu hi. 
Proverbs4:23 Na khua ngaisut dan kidawm in; na nuntakzia sia na khua ngaisutna in zeam hi. 
Proverbs4:24 A maan ngawl peuma bangma son ngei heak in. Ngual theamna le leilot thu peuma zangh heak in. 
Proverbs4:25 Citak kimuanna taw maisang mitsuan in; maizumna taw kun heak in. 
Proverbs4:26 Na sep po pha takin ngeal phot in, tua hile nasep theampo a maan suak tu hi." 
Proverbs4:27 Siatnate pial in a, tang takin mai sangah kalsuan in. A maan lampi panin kal khat zongh pial heak in." 
Proverbs5:1 Ka tapa awng, hong nadon ta'n a, ka ciimna le thuthuk ka muna hong ngai ta'n." 
Proverbs5:2 Tuaciang ngamtat luheakzia ahi tu bang na he tu a, na kammalte in heakna na nei hunlam hong lak tu hi." 
Proverbs5:3 Pasal dang khat ii a zi muk sia khuaitui bangin thum tha tu a, ama ii hong napna in olive thau bangin neal tu hi," 
Proverbs5:4 ahihang a zawkciang tua nu in a sia a kha le natna bek hong nusiat hi. 
Proverbs5:5 Ama in mithi khua hong zotpui tu hi; ama tot lampi in thina lampi hi. 
Proverbs5:6 Ama in nuntakna lampi tungah a om bua hi; vakthapin bang teng piang ziam ci zongh a tel bua hi. 
Proverbs5:7 Tu in hong ngai tavun, ka tapate awng, ka pau teng mangil ngei heak vun." 
Proverbs5:8 Tuabang numei sia ii kung panin kikeam vun! Ama ii bangkua nai ngawngawn zongh neak tha heak vun! 
Proverbs5:9 Na neak uh le, nidang na nei ngei kizataknate sia midangte in lua tu a, hesuakna sel mite khutsa taw na khanthi tu uh hi." 
Proverbs5:10 Hi hi, khualmite in na hauna theampo la siat tu a, na thalaw sa theampo sia ngualdang khat atu hi tu hi." 
Proverbs5:11 Na thi natu lupmun tungah na tatau tu a, na sazang le na thangolte kine tum tu hi," 
Proverbs5:12 tuasia ciang, “Banghangin he thei ngawl khi ziam? Banghangin khat po in teksak ngeingawl ka na khi ziam?" 
Proverbs5:13 Ka syate thu ka ngai bua a, amate ka thusim bua hi." 
Proverbs5:14 Tuaciang thakhat thu in mipi mai ah maizum minsiat ka thuak sia keima le keima ka kihe hi,” na ci tu hi." 
Proverbs5:15 Na zi tungah thumaan in a, na itna sia ama bekma pia in." 
Proverbs5:16 Numei dang taw na nei na tate in bangma phattuamna hong pia ngawl tu hi. 
Proverbs5:17 Nangma tate nangma hong hu tu in hong khang tu a, ngualdang a hu tu ahi bua hi." 
Proverbs5:18 Tua ahikom na zi taw lungdam vun a, na teenpui nu taw thinnuamin om in —" 
Proverbs5:19 ama sia sangai bangin ngaibaang in thuzawk huai hi. Ama ngaibannate taw na lungdamsak in; ama hong itna in nangma tuamsak in. 
Proverbs5:20 Ka tapa awng, banghangin na itna sia numei dang khat pia tu ni ziam? Banghangin ngualdang khat zi ii ngaibannate lungngul zaw tu ni ziam?" 
Proverbs5:21 Topa in na ngamtatna theampo hong mu hi. Na paina theampo ama in hong encik hi. 
Proverbs5:22 Mi seksol khat ii mawnate sia thaang khat ahi hi. Amate mama ii mawna ngeen sungah amate awk uh hi. 
Proverbs5:23 Amate in a pumpi ki uk zo ngawl ahikom thi uh hi. Amate mawmawt leilamna in a thaankuul uh ah amate puak tu hi. 
Proverbs6:1 Ka tapa awng, ngualdang khat ii leibatte vaipuak la tu in kamciam na vawt ngei ziam?" 
Proverbs6:2 Nangma kammal ma in hong man kik ngei a, nangma kamciam in thaang hong sia ngei ziam?" 
Proverbs6:3 Tua ahile ka tapa awng, nang sia tua mihing pa khut sungah om ni hi, ahihang hisia vai taw na kipeal natu a manlang in ama va zuan ta'n a, hong maap natu in hesuak ngen ta'n." 
Proverbs6:4 Nangma le nangma sia mut hun ahizong tawlngak hun ahizong kipia heak in. 
Proverbs6:5 Savaipa thaang panin vacim ahizong, sangai ahizong a suatak bangin tua thaang panin pusuak in." 
Proverbs6:6 Mihing dathamte in mitsate nuntakzia tung pan sin tahen. 
Proverbs6:7 Amate in lampui ahizong, hausa, ukpi ahizong nei ngawl hi," 
Proverbs6:8 ahihang amate in phalbi sung atu a kinginna in khaal lai in an koikhol hi. 
Proverbs6:9 Mihing datham pa in bang tanvei lupna tungah lum tu ziam? Bang hun ciang hong tho peetma tu ziam? 
Proverbs6:10 Ama in, “Tawmvei mu zok tong, leekoai in tawmvei sung tawlnga sin tong” ci hi." 
Proverbs6:11 Ahihang a mut lanin zawnna in hiamh toai ngualsuamte bangin ama sim tu hi. 
Proverbs6:12 Mihing ngautaak ngawl, mi seksolte in leilot thu sonin vak kawkoai hi." 
Proverbs6:13 Amate nang hong theam natu in a mit suukin a khut uh vik hi," 
Proverbs6:14 tuasung theampo ah siatna taw kidim in a khel thinsung taw mun theampo ah nawngkaina piangsak tu in hol kawkoai hi. 
Proverbs6:15 Hi thu hangin amate heakkhol ngawlin lalna in amate vaat tu a, tuaciangin amate sia thi theina ciang dongin liam tu uh hi." 
Proverbs6:16 Topa ii a etsat le a dual zawk ngawl thu nam sali om hi: Kiphatsakna maipuak, a theam thei leei, mawnei ngawlte a thatlum khut, seksol sawmin a ngaisun thinsung, siatna vawt tu a, a zuan ngang peangte, leilot thu khat zawkciang khat a son tetti, lawm le ngual sungah buaina pian natu a heltua pa cite ahi hi." 
Proverbs6:17  
Proverbs6:18  
Proverbs6:19  
Proverbs6:20 Ka tapa awng, na pa hong sonte vawt in a, na nu hong hilte mangil ngei heak in." 
Proverbs6:21 Amate ii kammalte phawk tawntungin a, na thinsung ah kip takin ciamtee in." 
Proverbs6:22 Amate hong hilnate in khual na haw ciangin hong hu tu hi, zanin hong hung tu hi, tuaciang sunin ngaisutna pha hong pia tu hi." 
Proverbs6:23 Amate hong hilnate sia a taang khuavak hi; amate hong teknate in nuntakzia hong hil thei hi. 
Proverbs6:24 Tua hilnate in numei pha ngawlte kung panin hong keam tu hi; midangte zite ii zolna kammalte pan hong keam tu hi. 
Proverbs6:25 Amate mealphatna ip la heak in. Amate sikvil mit hana sungah awk heak in. 
Proverbs6:26 Pasal khat in anluum khat man za taw pumpi zuak numei khat nga thei hi, ahihang palngul mawna in a neisa theampo bosak tu hi." 
Proverbs6:27 Na puan kaangh ngawl hetin na awm ah meikuang na toai thei tu ziam? 
Proverbs6:28 Na peang kaangh ngawl hetin meikam tungah na pai thei tu ziam? 
Proverbs6:29 Ngual zi a luppui sia tuabangza ma in lauhuai hi. Tuabang a ngamta theampo in ngimna thuak tu hi. 
Proverbs6:30 A ngilkial laitak a, an a ngu nguta khat sia mihingte in zawngsak ngawl hi;" 
Proverbs6:31 ahitazong ama a kiman le a see sali in liau tu hi — a neisa theampo a piak siat kul tu hi. 
Proverbs6:32 Ahihang palngul mawna a vawt mihing khat in ngaisut kaakna nei ngawl ahi hi. Ama le ama a kilalsua hi lel hi. 
Proverbs6:33 Ama a min kisiasak tu a, kivelpheang tu hi; a tawntungin maimawl tu hi." 
Proverbs6:34 Pasal khat in a zi a muan nawn ngawl ciang a thin uuk za sangin a thin uuk zawk hun om ngawl hi; ama ii thuk kikna in ciangtan nei ngawl hi. 
Proverbs6:35 Ama in liausum bangma a saang buatu hi; letsong bangza po in a tam ta zongin a thin uukna thai zo ngawl tu hi. 
Proverbs7:1 Ka tapa awng, ka paunate ciamtee in a, kong sawlte vawt tu mangil ngei heak in." 
Proverbs7:2 Kong sawlte seam lete na nungta tu hi. Na mittangte na huuk bangin kong hilnate kidawm in zui in. 
Proverbs7:3 Kong hilnate a tawntung keamcing in; na lungtang tungah at in. 
Proverbs7:4 Ciimna sia na suapuinu bangin ngaisun in a, thuthuk muna sia na ngualtamh phabel bangin ngaisun in." 
Proverbs7:5 Tuate in ngual zite kung panin nang hong keam tu hi, zolna kampau thei numeite kung panin hong keam tu hi." 
Proverbs7:6 Khatvei lai in ka khelki panin a pua sang khua ka et le 
Proverbs7:7 bangma a khua he seam ngawl lai tangval tam mama ka mu hi, tuate sungah a mawmaw khat a tuamin ka ciamtee hi." 
Proverbs7:8 Ama in numei khat ii teenna nai, lampi sia tawnin pai hi," 
Proverbs7:9 tua hun sia nitak khuazin zawk ahi hi. 
Proverbs7:10 Tuasia ciang tua nu in ama taw kisi hi; tua nu sia pumpi zuak numeite bangin kizeam a, tuaciang ama in niimna khat nei hi." 
Proverbs7:11 Ama sia hangin a maizum maw numei khat hi a, lampi ah vak tawntungin tua ahibuale" 
Proverbs7:12 lamking pan ngakin ding hi, khat vevei sia lampi ah, khat vevei le vanhzuakna phual ah ngakin om hi." 
Proverbs7:13 Ama in tangvalpa ngawngkoai in namh a, a mittang salhin," 
Proverbs7:14 “Tuni in biakpiakna ka vawt a, sangaw biakpiakna pan sa zongh ka nei hi." 
Proverbs7:15 Tua ahikom nangma zong tu in kong pusuak hi. Kong mu nop bangma in hi sungah na om hi! 
Proverbs7:16 Ka lupna sia Egypt pan puanneal a pawlkhat taw ka siin zo hi. 
Proverbs7:17 Tua lupna sia myrrh, aloe le cinnamon thingnamtuite taw ka namtuisak zo hi." 
Proverbs7:18 Hong pai ta'n! Zankhuateakin lumkhawm tawng. Khat le khat kikoai in nuamsa tawng. 
Proverbs7:19 Ka pasal sia inn ah om ngawl hi. Khual khuala a haw laitak hi. 
Proverbs7:20 Ama in sum tam ma keng a, nipi nii sung hong cia ngawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
Proverbs7:21 Tuabangin ama in tangvalpa sia ama thiamna taw zol a, numei ii kamthum kamzol in tangvalpa zo hi." 
Proverbs7:22 Thakhat thu in ama sia ngaw tu in a kipaipui khuital bangin numei nu taw pai a, thaang sungah a awk tu sangai bangin kilawn in tai hi;" 
Proverbs7:23 tua thaang sia thaltang ii a lungtang a vutlet natu mun hi. Ama sia ngeen sungah a tum vacim bang hi a — ama nuntakna lauhuai ahi hunlam a he bua hi. 
Proverbs7:24 Tu in, ka tapate awng, hong ngai tavun. Ka pauna hong nadon tavun." 
Proverbs7:25 Tuabang numei khat in na thinzosak heak vun: ama ii nung zuikot heak vun. 
Proverbs7:26 Ama in pasal tam mamate ii lalcipna hi a, a kisim zo ngawl mihing tam mamate ii thina piangsak hi." 
Proverbs7:27 Ama inn ah na haw le mithi khua a zuazuan na hi hi. Tua in thi natu lamban khat ahi hi. 
Proverbs8:1 Ngai vun! Ciimna in hong sam hi. Thu tuatna in ama le ama hong kihiil hi. 
Proverbs8:2 Lampi hui mualdawnte le lamkaate ah ding hi. 
Proverbs8:3 Khuapi sung tumna mun, kongpite hui ah ama in hi bangin au hi:" 
Proverbs8:4 “Mihingte awng, hong maangkaa khi hi; leitung ah a om theampo sam khi hi." 
Proverbs8:5 Puicing ngawl lai nu ziam? Puicin natu in kisin vun. Mawmaw nu ziam? Ngaisut theina na nei natu in sin vun. 
Proverbs8:6 Ka kammal pha mamate hong ngai tavun; kong son theampo maan hi. 
Proverbs8:7 Ka ci teng thumaan hi; leilot thu ngaimaw khi hi. 
Proverbs8:8 Ka pau theampo thumaan hi; a maan ngawl ahibuale lampui khialna bangma om ngawl hi. 
Proverbs8:9 Thuthuk a mu thei mihing khat atu in thiang sitset hi; pha tak a, a kihil sa khat atu in tel ol hi." 
Proverbs8:10 Ngunn sangin kong lamlakna teal zaw vun; khamh phabel sangin heakna teal zaw vun. 
Proverbs8:11 “Keima in Ciimna ka hi hi, suangmanphate sangin ka phazaw hi; na dei theampo, kei taw a kitee ngat thei bangma om ngawl hi." 
Proverbs8:12 Keima in Ciimna ka hi hi, thuthuk mu theina ka nei hi; keima in heakna le thukhenna maan ka nei hi." 
Proverbs8:13 Topa zatakna in a sia ngaimawkna ahi hi; kiphatsakna le kisaktheina, siatna lampite le a maan ngawl kammalte ka ngaimaw hi." 
Proverbs8:14 Ngealnate ka nei a, tuabangin ka seam suak hi. Telthiamna ka nei a, ka thahat hi." 
Proverbs8:15 Kumpite ngamukna le ngamukte ii upadi phate a vawtna ah ka hu hi. 
Proverbs8:16 Leitung ah ngam uk theampo in keima huna taw ngam uk hi, ngam uliante ahizong nam liante ahizong ka hu hi." 
Proverbs8:17 Kei hong itte ka it hi; kei hong zong po in hong mu thei hi. 
Proverbs8:18 Haunate le minphatna, nopsakna le matutna piak tu ka nei hi." 
Proverbs8:19 Kei tung pan na ngate in khamh phabel sangin phazaw a, ngunn ciitak sangin phazaw hi." 
Proverbs8:20 Thutang lampi ka tawn a; thukhaikim lampi ka zui hi," 
Proverbs8:21 kei hong itte hauna ka pia hi, a innte uh sum le vanh manpha te taw ka dimsak hi." 
Proverbs8:22 “ Topa in a masa phitbel in kei hong bitphua a, khuangeipi lai in a nasep phitbel ka hi hi." 
Proverbs8:23 A kipatciil hun mama in kei hong kivawt hi, simlei a kipat ma in a masabel ka hi hi." 
Proverbs8:24 Tuipite a pian ma, ciktui te a om ma in ka piang zo hi." 
Proverbs8:25 Mualpite pian ma, mualnote a om natu tek ah a kikoi ma in ka piang zo hi," 
Proverbs8:26 Pathian in leitung le a lote a vawt ma, ahibuale leitang masabel sia khutdim a vawt ma ngawngawnin ka piang zo hi." 
Proverbs8:27 Van sia a om natu munah ama ii a koi hun lai, tuipi kaantan in vanmong a phalh lai," 
Proverbs8:28 van ah meeikaaite a koi lai, tuipi tuinaakte a hon lai le," 
Proverbs8:29 tuipi tuite ama ii ciza sangin a saangzawin a khanto ngawl natu thu a piak lai, leitung tawdapte a phaa lai in tua munah kei ka om zo hi." 
Proverbs8:30 Keima in ama kungah inn limsuaithiamte bangin ka om hi, kei sia ni simin ama ii lungdamna naak ka hi hi, tuaciang ama taw ka om sia nuam ka sa tawntung hi," 
Proverbs8:31 simlei taw lungdam in mihing namte dik a sa pa ka hi hi. 
Proverbs8:32 “Tu in, khangmoite awng, hong ngai tavun. Ka ci bangin vawt vun, na lung uh dam tu hi." 
Proverbs8:33 No hong kihilte ngai vun. Ciim vun a; ngaingon heak vun. 
Proverbs8:34 Kei thu hong ngaipa in lungdam tu hi — Ni simin ka kongbiang ah om a, ka inn sung tumna pan hong ngak pa sia mihing lungdam ahi hi." 
Proverbs8:35 Kei hong mu pa in nuntakna mu a, tuaciang Topa in ama diksa tu hi." 
Proverbs8:36 Kei hong mu ngawl pa in ama le ama kiliamsua hi; a kuama po kei hong ensan sia in thina dei ahi hi.” 
Proverbs9:1 Ciimna in a inn sa a, khuam sali phut hi." 
Proverbs9:2 Ama in poai vawt natu nganno khat ngosakin, sapittui sungah hel thei tuatuamte a hel zawkciang sabuai phaasak hi." 
Proverbs9:3 Ama in a naseam numeite sam a, khua sung a saang belna mun pan hi bangin ausak hi;" 
Proverbs9:4 “Heakna nei ngawl mite awng, hong tum tavun!” Tuaciang mi mawmawte munah ama in;" 
Proverbs9:5 “Hong pai tavun a, ka an ne in, ka hel sa sapittui ne vun." 
Proverbs9:6 Heakna nei ngawl mihingte taw kitholna nusia vun a, nungta vun. Heakna lampi zui in” ci hi." 
Proverbs9:7 Mihing kisathei khat na hil na pau le hong lanna bek na thuak tu hi. Mihing tatsia khat na teih le thinnatna bekma na nga tu hi. 
Proverbs9:8 A kisathei khat bangma hunin hilin pau heak in; ama in tua hu in nang hong ensan tu hi. Ahihang mihing ciim khat hilin pau lete ama in nang hong zakta tu hi. 
Proverbs9:9 A ciimte khat ii tungah na ci pawpo in ama ciimsak seseam tu hi. A thutang khat ii tungah na son khat sia in ama ii heakna belap hi. 
Proverbs9:10 Ciim natu in Topa na thasia maksak kul hi. A Thiangtho Pa na he le telthiamna nei na hi hi. 
Proverbs9:11 Ciimna in kum tam mama na khan hong sausak tu hi. 
Proverbs9:12 Ciimna na nei le a hampha tu sia in nangma na hi a, ciimna na nial le a thuak tu sia nangma na hi hi." 
Proverbs9:13 Mawmawtna sia a au vazak, heakna nei ngawl, a maizum maw numei khat taw kibang hi." 
Proverbs9:14 Ama in a kongbiang ah to a, ahibuale khua sung a saangbelna munah to in," 
Proverbs9:15 amate nasep tek ngaisun a, hong papai mihingte tungah:" 
Proverbs9:16 “Hong tum tavun, heakna nei ngawl mihingte awng!” ci hi. A mawmawte mun ah:" 
Proverbs9:17 “A kingu tuidam in thum zaw hi. A kingu anluum in lim zaw hi” ci hi. 
Proverbs9:18 Ama ii inn sungah a tumte thi a, a tum sate sia tu in mithi khua, a thukbelna ah a om hunlam tua numeinu ii a theam zawkte in a he bua uh hi." 
Proverbs10:1 Hite sia Solomon ii paunakte ahi hi: Tapa ciim in a pa angtangsak a; a mawmaw sia in a nu khuangaisak hi. 
Proverbs10:2 Thumaan ngawlna taw na nga hauna in bangma phattuamna hong pia ngawl tu hi, ahihang thumaanna in na nuntakna hong ngum thei hi." 
Proverbs10:3 Topa in mihing phate ngilkialsak ngawl tu hi; ahihang a seksolte sia amate ii deite a ngasak buatu hi. 
Proverbs10:4 Dathamna in zawnna piangsak tu a, ahizong nasep hatna in hong hausak tu hi." 
Proverbs10:5 Mihing khuangaisun thei khat in a hunlai in lo ante kaikhawm hi; anlaak hun sung teng mutna in mindaina hi. 
Proverbs10:6 Mihing pha khat in thupha saang tu hi. Mihing seksol khat ii kammalte in a ngoltol pianzia phualseal hi. 
Proverbs10:7 Mihing phate sia thupha saanna hi ci in kiciamtee tu hi, ahihang mihing seksolte sia kimangil pal tu hi." 
Proverbs10:8 Mihing khuangaisun theite in ngaisut pha piakna saang thei hi. Mawmawt kam a pau mite sia siatna sung theng tu hi. 
Proverbs10:9 Thumaan mihingte thinmuang hiithiat a, ahizong thumaan ngawlte mat thuak tu hi." 
Proverbs10:10 Thumaan thutak a iim te in buaina piangsak a, ahizong phualseal ngawlin a son ngamte in kilem natu in naseam ahi uh hi." 
Proverbs10:11 Mihing pha khat ii kampaute in nuntakna tuinaak hi a, ahizong a seksol khat ii kammal in a ngoltol pianzia phualseal hi." 
Proverbs10:12 Ki etsatna in buaina thawn a, ahizong itna in tatkhialna theampo maisak hi." 
Proverbs10:13 Mihing a pilte in khiakna nei in pau a, ahizong a mawmawte daan piak kul hi." 
Proverbs10:14 A ciimte in heakna a nga thei za in la a, ahizong mihing mawmawte hong pau ciang buaina taw kinai hi." 
Proverbs10:15 Hauna in a haute hung a; zawnna in a zawngte susia hi. 
Proverbs10:16 Nasep pha sepna thaman in nuntakna hi a, ahizong mawna in mawna dang tamzaw lai sung hong then hi." 
Proverbs10:17 Kihil kipau ciangin a ngai mihingte nungta tu a, ahizong amate khialna a pualaak nuam ngawlte atu in lauhuai hi." 
Proverbs10:18 Mihing khat ama ii etsatna a phualseal sia in leilot pa ahi hi. Thu nawnsan a kizelsak sia in mihing mawmaw ahi hi. 
Proverbs10:19 Kam tam pau vaial lete mawna vawt vaial hi thei tha tu ni hi. Mihing ciim na hile pau ngawlin om khipkhep tu ni hi. 
Proverbs10:20 Mihing pha khat ii kammalte in ngunn ciitak bang hi a, a seksol khat ii ngaisutnate in man nei ngawl hi." 
Proverbs10:21 Mihing pha khat ii kammalte in mihing tam mama phattuamna pia tu a, ahizong nangma le nangma sia mawmawtna taw na kithatlum thei tu hi." 
Proverbs10:22 Nang hong hausak sia in Topa ii thupha ahi hi. Nasep hanciamna in hong hauzawsak thei ngawl hi. 
Proverbs10:23 A maan ngawl sep diksakna sia mawmawtna hi. Mihing pilte in ciimna sungah nuamsa uh hi. 
Proverbs10:24 A thutangte in amate deite nga a, ahizong a seksolte in a kiitakbel teng nga tu hi." 
Proverbs10:25 Vuipi suangval hong pai in a seksolte seamkeak a, ahizong mihing thumaante a tawntung suakta hi." 
Proverbs10:26 Bangma hunin mihing datham pa khat in nang atu bangma seamsak ngei heak in; ama sia na ha le zuhau a kilem ngawl bang ahibuale na mittang sungah meikhu bangin hong nuammawsak tu hi. 
Proverbs10:27 Topa thu ni lete na khansauzaw tu hi. Mihing seksolte sia thi hun ngawlin khanthi uh hi. 
Proverbs10:28 Mihing phate ii lametnate in thinnopna sung hong then a, ahizong mihing seksolte in mai sangah lamet tu bangma a nei thei bua uh hi." 
Proverbs10:29 Topa in thumaan mihingte sungsia hi; ahizong a ngamta khialte susia hi. 
Proverbs10:30 A thutang mite in ngammuanna nei tawntung tu a, ahizong mihing seksolte a ngam sungah a nungta buatu hi." 
Proverbs10:31 A thutang mihingte in ciimkam pau uh a, ahizong kamsia a pau leei sia kitawlngasak tu hi." 
Proverbs10:32 A thutang mihingte in a dik thute pau tu he a, ahihang a seksolte in ngual thin nat natu bek pau nithi uh hi." 
Proverbs11:1 Topa in khaikhin maan ngawl a zanghte ensan hi. Toaisuang maante hangin ama lungdam hi. 
Proverbs11:2 Mihing kiphasak te hai ngawlin maimawl tu hi. Kiniamkhiakna sia ciimna hizaw hi. 
Proverbs11:3 Mihing pha na hile thumaanna in lam hong lak hi. Mihing a muanhuai ngawlte sia amate thumaan ngawlna in susia hi. 
Proverbs11:4 Na thi ni hong thet ciang haunate in bangma phattuamna hong pia zo ngawl tu hi, ahihang thumaanna in na nuntakna hong ngum thei hi." 
Proverbs11:5 Thumaanna in mihing pha khat ii nuntakna olsak zaw hi, ahihang mihing seksol khat in ama puk natu ama mama in piangsak tu hi." 
Proverbs11:6 Thutang hina in a thumaante suatak hi, ahihang a muanhuai ngawlte sia amate duhopna thaang sungah awk hi." 
Proverbs11:7 Mihing seksol khat a thi ciangin ama lametna zongh ama taw thi khawm hi. Haunate sungah thinmuanna sia bangma ahi bua hi. 
Proverbs11:8 A thutangte sia ngimna pan kidal hi; a seksolte tungah ngimna tung zaw hi. 
Proverbs11:9 Pathian sel mihingte thu sonna in nang hong lalsak thei a, ahizong thutangte ciimna in nang hong hun thei hi." 
Proverbs11:10 A thumaante in hamphatna a nei uh ciangin khuapi sungah lungdamna om a, a seksolte a thi uh ciang lungdamna aw nging hi." 
Proverbs11:11 A thutangte ii thupha a piak uh ciangin khuapi khat sia khua thupi suak hi; ahihang khuapi khat sia a seksolte kammalte taw kilalsak hi. 
Proverbs11:12 Ngual zawnsak kampauna in mawmawtna hi. Khuangaisun thei khat na hile na thim khipkhep tu hi. 
Proverbs11:13 Thu nawnsan son khat sia thuku huvau ah kimuang thei ngawl hi, ahihang a muan taak khat sia na muang thei hi." 
Proverbs11:14 Lampuina a nei ngawl minam khat sia puk tu hi. Ngaisutna a pia thei tam mama a om le ngammuanna om hi. 
Proverbs11:15 Khualmi khat ii leiba losak tu in kamciam na pia le na kisiik tu hi. Kamkumh bua lete nangma atu in phazaw hi. 
Proverbs11:16 A thuthiam numei khat kizakta a, ahizong ngamtat pha ngawl numei khat sia a maizum huai khat ahi hi. A datham mihing khat in sum a nei ngei buatu a, ahihang a hanciam mama khat sia hau tu hi." 
Proverbs11:17 Na dik le nangma le nangma kiphatvawt na hi hi. na ngilo le nangma le nangma kiliamsua na hi bek hi. 
Proverbs11:18 Mihing seksolte in a tatakin bangma meetna a nga bua hi, ahihang a maan in na ngamta le thaman hong kipia takpi tu hi." 
Proverbs11:19 A maan a, ngamta tu khensatna a nei sia nungta tu hi, ahihang akua po ahizong a maan ngawl ngamtatna a vawt hamtang sia thi tu hi." 
Proverbs11:20 Topa in mihing thinsiate ngaimaw hi, ahizong a maan a ngamtate it hi." 
Proverbs11:21 Mihing ngilote daan kipia tu ci sia a pealmaw hi, ahihang thutang mite ahile suakta tu hi." 
Proverbs11:22 Thu khensatna pha a nei ngawl numei khat ii mealphatna in vok naak ah khamh naakba taw kibang hi. 
Proverbs11:23 Mihing phate ii deite sia phatna taw tawp tawntung hi; mihing seksolte ii a deite a nga uh ciang a kuama po thin uuk hi. 
Proverbs11:24 Mihing pawlkhat sia a sum uh zangh vapeak a hau vaial hi. A dangte sia kidawm in zangh hi napi zawng vaial hi. 
Proverbs11:25 Ngo vapeak vun, tua hile na nuamsa tu uh hi. Ngual hu vun, no zongh hong kihu tu hi." 
Proverbs11:26 A man khan tu ngak a, antang a kholte sia mihingte in haamsiat hi, ahihang tuabang khol ngawlin a zuak paihte sia ngual in pok hi." 
Proverbs11:27 Na mungtupnate a pha le nang hong kizakta tu hi, ahihang ngimna na zong le tuasia ma na nga tu hi." 
Proverbs11:28 A hauna uh a suangte in tangngam lai a, thingteete bangin a pul tu uh hi, ahihang thutangte in khaal lai a, thingteete bangin a khang tu uh hi." 
Proverbs11:29 Amate ii bangkuate sungah ngimna a piangsakte in a tawpna ah bangma a nei buatu uh hi. Mi mawmawte sia miciimte ii naseam a suak tawntung tu uh hi. 
Proverbs11:30 Thutang in nuntakna pia a, ahihang ngoltolna in nuntakna bosak hi." 
Proverbs11:31 Mihing phate hi leitung ah thaman kipia ahiciang mihing seksolte le mimawte daan kipia tu hi ci sia na he hamtang tu hi. 
Proverbs12:1 A kuama po heakna a deite in a khial ciangin hil tu uuk hi. Kihil kipau tu dei ngawlna in mawmawtna hi. 
Proverbs12:2 Topa in mihing phate tungah lungkim a, ahizong siatna a ngealte puavawk hi." 
Proverbs12:3 Seksol tatsiatna in thinmuanna pia ngawl a, ahizong mihing thutangte in dinmun kip nei hi." 
Proverbs12:4 Zi pha khat in a pasal ii angtanna le lungdamna ahi hi; ahihang a pasal a maizumsak zi khat in a pasal ii ngu sungah cancer natna khat taw kibang ahi hi. 
Proverbs12:5 A thumaan mihingte in a kilawm bangin hong vawt tu hi; mihing seksolte in theam tu bek hong sawm hi. 
Proverbs12:6 Mihing seksolte ii kammalte in mihing thatlum thei a, ahihang a thutangte ii kammalte in tawnna a thuakte suatak hi." 
Proverbs12:7 Mihing seksolte in kiamsukin suan le paal nei ngawl a, ahihang thutangte ii bangkuate sia nungta paisuak hi." 
Proverbs12:8 Na pil le, nang hong kipok tu hi; na mawmaw le nang hong kinomu tu hi." 
Proverbs12:9 Milian khat bang kiheang in ngilkial a ih om sangin nuntak natu a thalaw mihing thawthong khat hi leang phazaw hi. 
Proverbs12:10 Mihing pha khat in a ngannote pha takin en a, ahihang mihing seksolte in nganno tungah tatkha hi." 
Proverbs12:11 Nasep hanciam lotho mi khat in neak tu tam mama nei hi, ahihang kimanna om ngawl nasepnate taw hun bosakna in mawmawtna hi." 
Proverbs12:12 Mihing seksolte ii uuk theampo sia, a sia vawt tu zonna ahi hi, ahihang thutangte a dinmun kho hi." 
Proverbs12:13 Mihing seksolte khat in ama ii pauna taw thaang sungah awk hi, ahihang a thumaan khat in ama le ama ngimna pan kipusua hi." 
Proverbs12:14 Na thaman sia na pauna le na sepna tung pan kituat tu hi; nang taw a kiphu bang na nga tu hi. 
Proverbs12:15 Mihing mawmawte in amate le amate maan kisa tawntung hi. Mihing ciimte in ngaisut piakna ngai hi. 
Proverbs12:16 A mawmaw khat in diksak ngawlna a nei ciang manlang takin kilanghsak hi. Mihing khuangaisun theite in ngual ii lanna kam a awlmaw buatu hi. 
Proverbs12:17 Thumaan na son ciangin thutang khenna piang hi; ahihang leilotna in a kikhaikim ngawl thukhenna piangsak hi. 
Proverbs12:18 Ngaisun phot ngawl a, pauna in namsau taw saat bangin thuk bunin liamsak thei hi, ahihang ciim kampauna in damsak thei hi." 
Proverbs12:19 Leilot thu sia ngei kho ngawl a, thumaan thutak sia a tawntungin nungta hi." 
Proverbs12:20 Siatna a ngealte in muanmawk ngawl thusia khat tawk tu a, ahihang phatna a seamte in lungdamna nga tu hi." 
Proverbs12:21 Thutang mite tungah a sia na khat zongh tung ngawl hi, ahihang a seksolte in ngimna simngawl bangma a nei bua uh hi." 
Proverbs12:22 Topa in leilot theite ensan hi, ahihang a kampau sa a kholette diksa hi." 
Proverbs12:23 Mihing khuangaisun theite in a heak uh thute son vazai ngawl hi, ahihang mihing mawmawte in a heak ngawlna uh teng ma thangsak hi." 
Proverbs12:24 Nasep hamciamna in thahatna hong pia tu hi; na dathamna in sal hong sua tu hi. 
Proverbs12:25 Thinngimna in lungdamna hong suttol thei hi, ahihang kamthiam in hong lungpilsak tu hi." 
Proverbs12:26 A thutang pa sia a lawm pa atu in lamhilpa hi tu a, ahihang a seksol khat ii lampi in amate lam pialpui hi." 
Proverbs12:27 Na da a tham le na zon sia na nga ngei buatu a, ahizong nasep na hanciam le hauna na nga tu hi." 
Proverbs12:28 Thutang hina in nuntakna lampi hi; seksolna sia thina lampi ahi hi. 
Proverbs13:1 Tapa ciim khat in a pa ii a hil a pau ciangin nadon a, ahihang a kisathei mihing khat in khial khi hi a ci ngei bua hi." 
Proverbs13:2 Mihing phate sia amate pauna tung panin thaman kipia tu a, ahihang ngualtheam theite sia andu ngilkial bangin ngoltol ngamtatna dei hi." 
Proverbs13:3 Na pau po kidawm in a, na nuntakna huu in. Kidawm ngawlin a pau khat in ama le ama kisiatsua hi." 
Proverbs13:4 A datham khat in na khat pawpo bangza in a dei hang, a nga ngei buatu hi. Naseam hat khat in a dei po nga tu hi." 
Proverbs13:5 Mihing thumaante in leilot thute ngaimaw hi, ahihang mihing seksolte ii kammal in maizumhuai a, minpaan huai hi." 
Proverbs13:6 Thutang hina in a maw ngawlte hung hi; seksolna in mawneite ii pukna hi. 
Proverbs13:7 Mihing pawlkhat sia a hau bangin kiheang ahihang, bangma a nei bua uh hi. A dang pawlkhat sia a zawng bangin kiheang ahihang, nei le lamh a nei uh hi." 
Proverbs13:8 Sumhau khat in a nuntakna a huuk natu in a sum a zak kul a, ahihang a zawng khat sia ama a tawng tu kuama a om bua hi." 
Proverbs13:9 Thutangte sia khuavak taang kiukiau khat taw kibang hi; a seksolte sia meiinn a mit vangeu taw kibang hi. 
Proverbs13:10 Kisak theina in ngim ngana simngawl bangma dang a piangsak bua hi. Ngaisutna ngetna in ciim zawkna hi. 
Proverbs13:11 Ol takin hauna na nga le na bosak pal tu hi. A haksa zaw in na thalaw le a tamzaw na nei tu hi. 
Proverbs13:12 Lametna a bo ciang ngaisutna zongh lal a, ahihang na uukna khat a taangtun ciang thinnopna taw hong kidimsak hi." 
Proverbs13:13 Ngaisutna phate na nial le ngimna a zong na hi hi; tuasia zui lete na ngammuang tu hi. 
Proverbs13:14 A ciimte hong hilnate sia nuntakna ii tuinaak hi; tuate in launa sungah na om ciang hong suaktasak tu hi. 
Proverbs13:15 Pilna in kithasiana piangsak a, ahihang a muanhuai ngawlte sia lalna lampi a tawn uh hi." 
Proverbs13:16 Khuangaisun thei mihingte in a ngamtat ma in ngaisun phot tawntung hi, ahihang mihing mawmawte in a heak ngawlna uh thangsak hi." 
Proverbs13:17 A muan thamman ngawl kamtaite in ngimna piangsak hi, ahihang a muanhuaite in kilemna hong then hi." 
Proverbs13:18 Kihilna a ni nuam ngawl po sia zawngin mindai tu hi. A kuama po kihil kipauna a ngai sia kizakta hi. 
Proverbs13:19 Na dei po na nga tu sia bangza in pha ziam! Mihing mawmawte in siatna nusia nuam ngawl hi. 
Proverbs13:20 A ciimte taw na kithawl le na ciim tu hi. Mihing mawmawte taw na kipawl le na lal tu hi. 
Proverbs13:21 Ngimna in mawneite mun theampo ah zuizen a, ahihang mihing thutangte sia a thaman in naphate kipia tu hi." 
Proverbs13:22 Mihing pha khat in a tute atu hauna nusiat tu hi, ahihang mawneite hauna sia thutangte kung zuan tu hi." 
Proverbs13:23 A kitho ngawl lote in mizawngte atu, an tam mama piangsak thei hi, ahihang a maanin a ngamta ngawlte in mizawngte thaw tu khaktan hi." 
Proverbs13:24 Na tapa na hilna in daan na pia buale ama a it ngawl na hi hi. Ama na it nale hil in. 
Proverbs13:25 Thutangte in a neak tu a kicing nei a, ahihang a seksolte sia a ngil uh kial tawntung hi." 
Proverbs14:1 Numeite ii ciimna taw inn sung nuntakzia kipuua a, ahihang mawmawtna in tuate susia hi." 
Proverbs14:2 Thumaan in, tua hile Topa thasiana a lak na hi hi; thumaan heak in, tua hile Topa na thasia ngawlna a lak na hi hi." 
Proverbs14:3 A mawmaw a kiphasakte kam tam pau hi; a ciimte ii kammal in amate huu hi. 
Proverbs14:4 Lotho tu khuital a om buale na ansaal hawm tu a, ahihang tua khuitalte a om hu in na ansaal sia antang taw kidim tu hi." 
Proverbs14:5 A muan taak tetti khat in thutak son tawntung a, ahihang a muan thamman ngawl khat in leilot thu simngawl a dang a son bua hi." 
Proverbs14:6 A kinasiasak mihingte bangma hun a ciim thei ngei buatu hi, ahihang mihing pilvangte in olno takin tel thei hi." 
Proverbs14:7 Mihing mawmawte kung pan kikeam in; amate in nang hong hil tu bangma a nei bua uh hi. 
Proverbs14:8 Banghangin mihing pil khat sia ciim ziam? Banghang ziam cile ama in a sep tu he hi. A nangh khat sia banghangin mawmaw ziam? Banghang ziam cile ama in he siat kisa hi. 
Proverbs14:9 Mihing mawmawte in mawna a vawt le zong phamaw sa ngawl hi, ahihang mihing phate in maw kimaisak tu dei hi." 
Proverbs14:10 Na thinnopna sia nangma ii aituam hi; na thin natna zongh nangma ii aituam hi. Kuama in tuate nang taw hawm thei ngawl hi. 
Proverbs14:11 Mihing pha khat ii inn sia mihing ngilo khat ii inn a kisuksiat zawkciang zong kip lai tu hi. 
Proverbs14:12 Lampi maan na sak khat in thina sung hong then thei hi. 
Proverbs14:13 Nuina in heena seal thei hi. Lungdamna a bo zawkciang heena sia tua munah om tawntung hi. 
Proverbs14:14 Mihing pha ngawlte in amate taw a kiphu bangin nga tu hi. Mihing phate in amate sepnate tung pan thaman nga tu hi. 
Proverbs14:15 A mawmaw khat in na theampo um tu hi; khuangaisun theite in a kalsuan natu kidawm hi. 
Proverbs14:16 Mihing ciimte in ngim ngana pan a kikep thei natu kidawm hi, ahihang mihing mawmawte sia kidawm ngawlin ngamta memeang hi." 
Proverbs14:17 A thinngeam mihingte in a mawmawthuai nate seam hi; a ciimzawte in dai takin om hi. 
Proverbs14:18 Heakna nei ngawlte in a mawmawtna taw a kiphu bang nga uh hi, ahihang a pilte tungah heakna sia thaman in kipia hi." 
Proverbs14:19 Mihing ngilote in thutangte mai ah kiniamkhiak in kun a, maipha a zong tu hi." 
Proverbs14:20 Mizawng khat sia kuama in a dei bua hi, a innpaamte ngawngawn in, a dei bua uh hi, ahihang a hau khat in lawm tam ma nei hi." 
Proverbs14:21 Na lungdam nuam le a zawngte tungah dik in; mi khat po zawnsakna sia mawna ahi hi. 
Proverbs14:22 A pha na vawt le ngualdang ii muanna le zatakna na thalaw tu hi; a sia na vawt le a ngamta khial na hi hi. 
Proverbs14:23 Na na seam le nuntak natu na thalaw tu hi; thuson in na to thawthong le na zawng tu hi. 
Proverbs14:24 Mihing ciimte in hauna thaman saang a, ahihang a mawmawte sia amate ciim ngawlna panin kihe hi." 
Proverbs14:25 Tetti khat in thumaan a son ciangin ngual nuntakna huu hi; ama in leilot thu a son ciangin ngual leeheak ahi hi. 
Proverbs14:26 Topa thasiana in mihing khat le a innkuanpuite atu in kimuanna le ngammuanna pia hi. 
Proverbs14:27 Thina na pial nuam ziam? Topa thasiana in nuntakna tuinaak ahi hi. 
Proverbs14:28 Kumpipa khat ii letna sia mihing bangza uk ziam, ci thu taw kisai hi; a uk tu mihing a nei buale ama in bangma ahi bua hi." 
Proverbs14:29 Dai takin na om le nang sia a ciim na hi hi, ahihang na thin a ngeam le, bangza mawmaw ci a lak hi bek ni hi." 
Proverbs14:30 Thinnopna in pumpi ciidamsak hi, ahihang eenna thin in cancer natna taw kibang hi." 
Proverbs14:31 Mizawngte na nengcip le a vawt pa Pathian simmaw na hi hi; ahihang mizawngte tungah dikna in biakpiakna nam khat ahi hi. 
Proverbs14:32 Mihing seksolte in amate tatsiatnate taw amate le amate ii a kiamsuk natu uh piangsak hi, ahihang mihing phate sia amate takkhana in huu hi." 
Proverbs14:33 Ciimna sia mihing pilvangte ii ngaisutna theampo sungah om hi; a mawmawte in ciimna huvau bangma a he bua hi. 
Proverbs14:34 Thutang hina in minam lian khat suaksak hi; mawna in minam khat ii min daisak hi. 
Proverbs14:35 Kumpipate in nasep thiam uliante diksa uh a, ahihang nasep thiam ngawlte daan pia uh hi." 
Proverbs15:1 Awneam taw kizona in thin uukna thaisak a, ahihang awtawlok in thinsosak hi." 
Proverbs15:2 Mihing ciimte a pau uh ciang heakna deihuaisak a, ahihang mihing mawmawte in nawnsan thu son nuam uh hi." 
Proverbs15:3 Topa in mun theampo ah bang teng piang ci in mu hi; na pha ih seam a, a sia ih seam zong ama in hong en nginge hi." 
Proverbs15:4 Kamthiam in nuntakna piangsak a, ahihang ngitlo kampauna in na thin hong siasak hi." 
Proverbs15:5 Na pa hong hilnate na awlmawk ngawl tu sia mawmawthuai hi; ama ii hong hilna hong paunate saan theina in ciimna ahi hi. 
Proverbs15:6 A thutang mihingte in a hauna uh keamcing hi, ahihang mihing seksolte in hun haksa hong thet ciang a neisate bosua uh hi." 
Proverbs15:7 Heakna sia mihing a ciimte in kizelsak a, mihing mawmawte ii kizelsak hi ngawl hi." 
Proverbs15:8 Mihing phate thunget ciang Topa lungkim hi; ahihang mihing seksolte hong paipui sa ngaw biakpiaknate ensan hi. 
Proverbs15:9 Topa in mihing ngilote ngamtatziate ensan hi, ahihang a maan a seamte it hi." 
Proverbs15:10 A maan ngawl sep na nei le nasia takin daan hong kipia tu hi; kipuuaphat tu na uuk buale na thi tu hi. 
Proverbs15:11 Mithi khua ngawngawn in, tua munah bang om ziam ci in Topa ii heak tu sia khaam thei ngawl hi; tua ahile bangbangin mihingte in amate khua ngaisutna sia Pathian mai ah seal thei tu ziam?" 
Proverbs15:12 A kisathei mihingte in kipau kihil tu a uuk bua uh hi; a ciimzawte tung panin ngaisutna a ngen ngei bua hi. 
Proverbs15:13 Mihingte sia a lungdam uh ciangin maitui uh a, ahihang a hee uh ciangin thinkiamna maipuak nei uh hi." 
Proverbs15:14 Mihing pilvangte in he thua nuam hi, ahizong a nanghte in heak ngawlna taw lungkim uh hi." 
Proverbs15:15 Mizawng khat ii nuntakna sia a tawntung thasaalin dianna hi a, ahihang mihing lungdamte in a nuntak nuamsa tawntung uh hi." 
Proverbs15:16 Hau a ngim nga tu sangin, zawng a Topa kiitakna in phazaw hi." 
Proverbs15:17 Ki etsatna a omna munah sa a limbel neak sangin na it mihingte taw antee neak khop sia phazaw hi. 
Proverbs15:18 Thinngeamna in kam kinialna piangsak a, ahihang thinsauna in kilemna hong puak hi." 
Proverbs15:19 Na da a tham le mun theampo ah haksatna na thuak tu a, ahihang na thumaan le ngim na nga buatu hi." 
Proverbs15:20 Ta ciimte in a pate lungdamsak hi. A mawmawte bek in a nute maimawlsak hi. 
Proverbs15:21 Mihing ciim ngawlte in a mawmawtna taw lungdam uh hi, ahihang a ciimte in a maan sia bek seam tu hi." 
Proverbs15:22 Ngaisut piakna na nga thei theampo la lete zawna na nga tu hi; tua ngawl taw zawna na nga buatu hi. 
Proverbs15:23 A hun taw a kilawm a kiphu tu kammal zak thei sia bangza in thinnopna om ziam! 
Proverbs15:24 Mihing ciimte in nuntakna lampi ah paito uh a, thina lampi a tawnsuk bua uh hi." 
Proverbs15:25 A kisathei mite ii bangkua sia Topa in susia tu a, ahihang ama in meingong khat ii neisa sia a huu tu hi." 
Proverbs15:26 Topa in ngitlo ngaisutnate ngaimaw hi; ahihang ama in kamthiamte diksa hi. 
Proverbs15:27 Thumaan ngawlin meetna nga tu na sawm le na innkuan in ngimna sung na theng tu hi. Sumnguk ne heak in tua hile na khansauzaw tu hi. 
Proverbs15:28 Mihing phate in ngual kam a zo ma in ngaisun masa uh hi. Mihing ngilote in manlang takin zo kik a, ahihang buaina piangsak hi." 
Proverbs15:29 Mihing phate thu a nget ciang Topa in ngai hi, ahihang ama in a ngilote a awlmawk bua hi." 
Proverbs15:30 A maitaite in nang hong lungdamsak hi, tuaciang lungdamhuai thute in na thin hong nuamzawsak hi." 
Proverbs15:31 Nang hong kihil hong kipau ciangin na nadon le a ciim na hi hi. 
Proverbs15:32 Heak nopna na nei buale nangma le nangma kisiatvawt na hi hi. Kipau kitekna na saang thei le na ciim seseam tu hi. 
Proverbs15:33 Topa thasiana in pilna heakna khat ahi hi. Patoaina na saan thei ma in na kiniamkhiak masak kul tu hi. 
Proverbs16:1 Eite in tupna sawmna vawt ka leang Pathian ii deina bang bekin taangtung hi. 
Proverbs16:2 Na sep na vawt theampo maan hi ci in ngaisun tha tu ni hi, ahihang Topa in na tupna laingil tungah thu hong khen hi." 
Proverbs16:3 Na ngealnate Topa in thupha hong piak natu in ngen in, tua hile na sep tak ciang zawna taw, ma na tun tu hi." 
Proverbs16:4 Topa vawt sa khat simin a tawp natu khat tek om hi; a seksolte tawp natu sia lalna ahi hi. 
Proverbs16:5 A kisathei pawpo Topa in ensan hi; ama in amate daan thuak natu panin a suaktasak buatu hi. 
Proverbs16:6 Thumaan vun a, citak vun, Pathian in na mawna hong maisak tu hi. Topa ii thu ni vun, thusia bangma na tungah hong tung ngawl tu hi." 
Proverbs16:7 Topa na lungkimsak ciangin na ngalte zongh lawm le ngual na suaksak thei tu hi. 
Proverbs16:8 Thumaan ngawlna taw sum tam mama nga sangin thumaan takin thalaw vateeina taw sum tawmno khat nei sia phazaw hi. 
Proverbs16:9 Nangma in ngealna vawt thei tu na hihang Pathian in na ngamtatnate hong zeak hi. 
Proverbs16:10 Kumpipa in Pathian ii thuneisakna taw pau hi; ama thukhennate sia maan tawntung hi. 
Proverbs16:11 Topa in toaisuangte le khaikhin a maan tu dei a, vanhzuak theampo a kilawm in zuak tu dei hi." 
Proverbs16:12 Kumpipate in ngitlona dual zo ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile a khaikim thukhenna in kumpi khat thahatsak hi." 
Proverbs16:13 Kumpipa khat in thumaan thutak za nuam a, thumaan a sonte ama in maipha pia tu hi." 
Proverbs16:14 Mihing ciim khat in kumpipa lungdam in a om thei natu hanciam tu hi; kumpipa a thin a uuk le khat po in thi law thei hi. 
Proverbs16:15 Kumpipa ii maipha a piakte sia khuakhaal kipat hun a, nguazusak meeikaaite bang ahi hi. Tuasung ah nuntakna om hi." 
Proverbs16:16 Khamh le ngunn sangin ciimna le heakna nei tu phazaw hi — phazaw pek hi. 
Proverbs16:17 Miphate in siatna a pial lampi tawn in khualhaw hi; tua ahikom na pai natu en in kidawm ta'n — tua in na nuntakna hong hun thei tu hi. 
Proverbs16:18 Kiphatsakna in siatna sungah hong then a, kisaktheina in kiamsukna sung hong then hi." 
Proverbs16:19 A kisatheite ii sungah kihel a, ih pawlte ii a sutol vanh hawmte ih nga sangin, kiniamkhiakin a zawngin om leang phazaw hi." 
Proverbs16:20 Nang hong kihilnate nadon in tua hile zawna na nga tu hi; Topa muang lete na lungdam tu hi. 
Proverbs16:21 A ciim a puicing mihing khat sia ama ii tel theina a neina pan kihe hi. Ama sia kamthum pau vaial a, ngual huai vaial hi." 
Proverbs16:22 A ciimte atu in ciimna sia nuntakna tuinaak ahi hi, ahihang mihing mawmawte pilsak tu hanciamna sia hun bo thawthong hi." 
Proverbs16:23 Mihing pilvangte in a pau ma in ngaisun khol uh hi; tuasia ciang amate pauna sia ngual zaak nop suak seseam hi. 
Proverbs16:24 Kamthiam paunate sia khuaitui bangin thum a, ciidam natu in pha hi." 
Proverbs16:25 A maan lampi hi ci in na up sia in thina sung hong then thei hi. 
Proverbs16:26 Nasep haksa seam khat ii ankam limna in a nasep hatsak zaw hi, banghang ziam cile ama in a ngilvasak nuam hi." 
Proverbs16:27 Mihing ngilote in ngualdangte ngim nga natu in lam zong uh hi; amate kammalte mama ngitlona taw kuang hi. 
Proverbs16:28 Ngual ngensiatna sia mihing seksolte in kizelsak hi; amate in buaina piangsakin, ngualtamh hina zongh khentham hi." 
Proverbs16:29 A ngoltol mihingte in a lawmte theamin lalna sungah tumpui hi. 
Proverbs16:30 Nang hong maitui a hong mitsuk te kidawm in; amate in a sia pawlkhat ngaisun zo hi. 
Proverbs16:31 Khansauna sia a thutangte ii thaman ahi hi; puakkaanna in minthanna kumpilukhu ahi hi. 
Proverbs16:32 Thahatna sangin thinsauna phazaw hi. Khuapite na uk siat sangin nangma le nangma na ki uk zawk tu sia phazaw hi. 
Proverbs16:33 Mihingte in Pathian ii deina a heak natu in aisaan uh a, ahizong a zo kikna sia Pathian ii khensatna bang bek ahi hi." 
Proverbs17:1 Thinngimna taw kidim inn khat sung anneakpoai ah anneak sangin anluum ko bekkhat thinnuam a, neak sia phazaw hi." 
Proverbs17:2 A pil naseam khat in a mannung ngawl a topa ii tapa tungah thunei tu a, a ngamh sung pan khen khat lua tu hi." 
Proverbs17:3 Khamh le ngunn sia mei taw hal in kisit hi, Topa in mihing khat ii thinsung sit hi." 
Proverbs17:4 Mihing ngilote in ngitlo ngaisutnate diksa a, leilot theite in leilot thu diksa hi." 
Proverbs17:5 Mihing zawngte na nuisan le, amate a vawt Pathian a selno na hi hi. Midang khat ii kaamsiatna tungtaang ah diksa in na om le daan na thuak tu hi." 
Proverbs17:6 Patangnote in a pate huvau in a angtan uh bangin pasal haamte in a tute huvau in angtang uh hi. 
Proverbs17:7 Ngual ii zatakte in leilot thu son ngawl hi, tuaciang mihing mawmawte in a mannei thuson tu bangma he ngawl hi." 
Proverbs17:8 Mihing pawlkhat in sumnguk piakna sia mitbum bang hi thei tu in ngaisun uh hi; amate in sumnguk piakna taw na theampo seam thei tu in um hi. 
Proverbs17:9 Mihingte ii hong it tu na nuam uh le no tungah hong khial ciangin maisak vun. Tatkhialnate teptee in nei leang ngualtamh hina khentham thei hi. 
Proverbs17:10 A mawmaw khat sia zakhatvei saatna taw a heak tu sangin, a pilvang khat in khatvei teihna taw tamzaw he thei hi." 
Proverbs17:11 Buaina a piangsak tawntung mihing seksolte kungah thina sia kamtai ngilo khat bangin hong pai tu hi. 
Proverbs17:12 A mawmawthuai tupna taw a komla mihing mawmaw pawlkhat taw kimu tu sangin, a note a kimatsak vompui khat taw kisi leang phazaw hi." 
Proverbs17:13 Thupha khat sia thusia taw na thuk le na bangkua sungah siatna a veng ngei buatu hi. 
Proverbs17:14 Kam kinial kipatna in tuicimna phung pan tuikee kipat bang hi; a nasiat ma in tawp vun. 
Proverbs17:15 A maw ngawl khat mawsakna ahizong mi seksol khat tha thongna ahizong Topa atu in ngaimawkhuai khawm hi. 
Proverbs17:16 Mihing mawmaw khat ii tungah pilna sin natu sum bosakna in phat tuamna om ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile ama in pianpui khentel theina nei ngawl hi." 
Proverbs17:17 Ngualtamhte in a ki itna kilak tawntung uh hi. Ngimna thuak khawm tek tu ih hi buale unau khat ih hi man bang om ziam? 
Proverbs17:18 Khuangaisun ngawl te bekma in ngual leiba losak tu in kamciam tu hi. 
Proverbs17:19 Mawna a lamnai sia in ngimna vawt a lamnai ahi hi. A tawntungin na kisuangtaak le ngimna a zawzong na hi hi. 
Proverbs17:20 A sia vive ngaisun a, a paute in a pha mu tu lamet thei om ngawl a — siatna bek mu tu hi." 
Proverbs17:21 Mawmawthuai nasepte a seam tate ii nu le pa atu in heena le khuangaina simngawl a dang bangma a om bua hi. 
Proverbs17:22 Maituina in na ci hong damsak hi. A tawntung mainuu a omna in vuitat zok ngawl thina ahi hi. 
Proverbs17:23 A maan ngawl thukhenmangte in sumnguk ne ku hi, tuasia ciang a khaikim thukhenna kivawt nawn ngawl hi." 
Proverbs17:24 Mihing pil khat in ciim ngamtat tu tumh hi, ahihang a mawmaw khat in a tuatuam tumh hi." 
Proverbs17:25 Ta mawmawte in a pate atu in heena le a nute atu in thinnat khuangaina piangsak hi. 
Proverbs17:26 A maw ngawl khat liau piak tu sia maan ngawl hi; mihing phate daan a khak ciangin thukhaikim lam pan pialsak hi. 
Proverbs17:27 Ama le ama a kimuang khat sia pau tawntung ngawl hi. A om hithiat mihingte sia thuthuk tatak muna nei hi. 
Proverbs17:28 A tawpna ah, mihing mawmaw khat ngawngawn zongh pau bua hen a, a kam iim in om le a ciim a pilvang ma kisa thei hi." 
Proverbs18:1 Ngual taw a kituiton thei ngawl mihingte sia amate bek a kikinte ahi hi; midangte ii maan hi ci in a heakte a thukim pui buatu hi. 
Proverbs18:2 Mihing mawmaw khat in na khat a tel le a tel ngawl sia phamaw a sa bua hi; ama ii uuk sia ama bangza in pil khi ziam, ci in a lak nuam hi bek hi." 
Proverbs18:3 Mawna le maizumna tonkhawm hi; na zatakhuaina taan lete a luangin zawnsakna na nga tu hi. 
Proverbs18:4 Mihing khat ii kammalte in ciimna ii naak, tuipi bangin a thuk le a thiang luamtui luang bang hi thei hi." 
Proverbs18:5 A mawte angvan a, a maw ngawlte tungah a kikhaikim in thukhen ngawlna sia maan ngawl hi." 
Proverbs18:6 A mawmaw khat po in kam kinialna a phuang le, ngual ii vel tu a zong ahi hi." 
Proverbs18:7 A mawmaw khat a pau ciangin ama le ama kilalsak hi a; ama kampaute taw thaang sungah awk hi. 
Proverbs18:8 Ngual ngensiatna sia lim mama a, bangza in kivalh suk nuam ziam!" 
Proverbs18:9 A datham mihing khat sia ngual a lalsak thei khat za in sia hi. 
Proverbs18:10 Topa sia, tausaang kho taw kibang a, thutangte in zuanin ngammuanna nga thei hi." 
Proverbs18:11 Mihaute ahile amate hauna in, a saang a kho khuapi luphungte bangin, amate dal hi ci in ngaisun hi." 
Proverbs18:12 A kiniamkhiak ngawlte kuama in a zakta bua hi; mihing a kisatheite sia lalna lampi zuan ahi hi. 
Proverbs18:13 Ngual kam na zo ma in ngai masa in. Tuabangin na hi buale nang sia mawmaw a, ngual a thusim ngawl na suak hi." 
Proverbs18:14 Na nat ciangin nuntak nopna thin in nang hong luhaisak thei hi, ahihang tuasia na bosua tha le na lamet khakbel sia bo hi." 
Proverbs18:15 Mihing pilvangte in lawp tawntung a, pilna sin tu kingingsa in om uh hi." 
Proverbs18:16 Mihing thupi khat taw na kisi nuam ziam? Letsong khat puak lete ol takin na kisi thei tu hi. 
Proverbs18:17 Thukhenzum sungah, a pau phitbel pa sia a langkhat pa ii thu a dok mateng a maan son bang hi tawntung hi." 
Proverbs18:18 Thukhenzum sungah a thahat mihing nii sia thu nei in a kilangpan tan le mee sawksak in thu saatsat thei hi. 
Proverbs18:19 Na mealheakte hu lete amate in khuapi luphung kho khat bangin nang hong dal tu hi, ahihang amate taw na kihau le a innkha uh hong khasan tu hi." 
Proverbs18:20 Na ci pawpo taw kizui in thupiangte na nuntakpui kul tu hi. 
Proverbs18:21 Na kampauna in nuntakna hong keam thei a, tua ahibuale zong hong lalsak thei hi; tua ahikom na kammal tung pan a piang thute lungkimin na thuak kul hi." 
Proverbs18:22 Zi khat na nei ciang na pha khat mu na hi hi; tuasia in nang tungah Topa pha hi ci in hong lak hi. 
Proverbs18:23 Mizawng khat in a pau ciangin kamthiam a zak kul hi, ahihang mihau khat in ngual kam a zo ciangin kamkhal zangh hi." 
Proverbs18:24 Kingualtamhna pawlkhat sia kho ngawl hi, ahihang ngualtamh pawlkhatte ahile suapui laipeete sangin thumaan zaw hi." 
Proverbs19:1 A leilot thei a mawmaw khat hi tu sangin, zawng napi a thumaan khat ih hi tu phazaw hi." 
Proverbs19:2 Heakna om ngawl thalawpna in pha ngawl hi; thin vei laakna in ngimna sungah hong then tu hi. 
Proverbs19:3 Mihing pawlkhatte in amate ii mawmawt ngamtatnate taw kilal sua a, tuasia ciang Topa mawsiat uh hi." 
Proverbs19:4 Mihaute in ngualtamh thakte mu tawntung hi, ahihang a zawngte in ngualtamh tawmno a nei sun teng keam zo ngawl hi." 
Proverbs19:5 Thukhenzum sungah leilot thu na son le daan na thuak tu hi — suatakna a om buatu hi. 
Proverbs19:6 Mihing thupite tung pan maipha nga tu in a kuama po hanciam uh hi; a kuama po in phattuamna a pia theite sia ka ngualtamh hi ci tek uh hi. 
Proverbs19:7 Mizawng khat in a mealheakte ngawngawn konlaw thei ngawl hi, ama ii ngualtamh a nei ngawl sia lamdang ngawl hi. Bangza in hanciam kale kuama a nga zo bua hi." 
Proverbs19:8 Nangma le nangma kiphatvawt in a, na sin thei theampo sin in; tuaciang na sin sa teng ciamtee in, tua hile na khangto tu hi." 
Proverbs19:9 Thukhenzum sungah leilot thu a sonte peuma daan piakna pan suakta ngawl tu hi; ama a lal ahi hi. 
Proverbs19:10 A mawmawte a nuam leilam in nungta heak hen a, salte in lianzaw tate uk heak hen." 
Proverbs19:11 Khuangaisun thei khat na hile na thin tomna na uk zo tu hi. Nang tung hong taa khial khat a om ciang awlmawk ngawlin om theina in phatna lian khat ahi hi. 
Proverbs19:12 Kumpipa ii thin uukna in tawpi hawk bang ahi hi. Ahihang ama ii hong phatvawtna sia ih dei laitak a zu nguatui bang ahi hi. 
Proverbs19:13 A mawmaw tate in a nu le a pate lalna sung then thei hi. A nawnsan zi sia mal khakhat in a taak vakek tui taw kibang hi. 
Proverbs19:14 Mihing khat in a nu le a pa tung panin inn le sumte lua thei a, ahihang Topa bek in khuangaisun thei zi khat pia thei hi." 
Proverbs19:15 Na datham nuam le datham in; mumu lel in, ahihang ngilkial in na om tu hi." 
Proverbs19:16 Pathian thukhamte tang in, na khansauzaw tu hi; na thusim buale na thi tu hi." 
Proverbs19:17 A zawngte tungah na piak ciangin Topa tungah pukthaak bang hi a, Topa in hong lo kik tu hi." 
Proverbs19:18 Na tate heak thei natu in a khanmoi lai in tek in. Tuabangin na vawt buale amate le amate a kilalsua natu in a hu na hi tu hi. 
Proverbs19:19 Mihing khat a thin a ngam le ama in a piang thute thuaksak in. Ngim nga natu panin khatvei na hun ngei le na hut kik kul tu hi. 
Proverbs19:20 Ngaisut piakna ngai in heakna sin tu na lungngul le ni khat ni ciang na ciim tu hi. 
Proverbs19:21 Mihingte in na namcin ngeal thei hi, ahihang Topa deina bang bekin piang tu hi." 
Proverbs19:22 Duhopna in min paanna hi; mizawngte in a leilot theite sangin phazaw lai hi. 
Proverbs19:23 Topa thu ni in na om le khansau in na nungta tu hi, lungkim in siatna pan suakta in na om tu hi." 
Proverbs19:24 Mihing pawlkhatte a kam sungah an zongh kibak naap ngawl za dongin datham mama hi. 
Proverbs19:25 A phazaw ngamtatna a he ngawlte ii a heak thei natu in, kisaktheinate sia daan kipia tu hi. Na ciim le nang tungah hong kipau hong kihil ciangin na tel tu hi." 
Proverbs19:26 A maizumhuai, a minpaan pa bek in a pa vawtsia tu a, ahibuale a inn panin a nu not tu hi." 
Proverbs19:27 Tapa awng, pilna sinna na tawp le na heak sate zongh hai ngawlin na ngaingon tu hi." 
Proverbs19:28 Tetti khat in mihing khat pawpo supna baina pia nuamin a khensat zawkciang thumaan thukhenna om thei nawn ngawl hi. A seksol mihingte in a sia nate sin tu lamnai hi. 
Proverbs19:29 A kihisak a mawmaw khat in velna vuakna nga tatak tu hi. 
Proverbs20:1 Zu tamlei neakna in aw saangsak a, hong mawmawsak hi. Zu khamna sia mawmawthuai hi." 
Proverbs20:2 Hong ngalh tawpi khat na kiitak tu bangin a thin uuk kumpipa khat kiita in; ama thin uuksakna in eima le eima kithalupna hi. 
Proverbs20:3 Kam kinialnate sia a mawmaw khat po in pan thei hi; tuate panin kikepna in a zatak huai ngamtatna ahi hi. 
Proverbs20:4 A hun lai in lothaw tu a datham mama lotho pa khat in anlaak tu a nei buatu hi. 
Proverbs20:5 Mihing khat ii khua ngaisutnate sia, tuikhuk thuk sung a tui bang ahi hi, ahihang thuthuk mu thei khat in tua tui toai thei hi." 
Proverbs20:6 Mihing theampo in bangza thumaanin citak khi ziam ci thei tek uh hi, ahihang tuabang ahi takpi mihing ih mu zo tu ziam!" 
Proverbs20:7 A pa uh thumaan a, a maan nasep a seam le, a tate sia hampha uh hi." 
Proverbs20:8 Kumpipa in thukhenna ah to a, a sia a mu ciang khentel hi." 
Proverbs20:9 Khat pawpo in ama thinsung thiangtho a, mawna taw kipeal zo ing a ci thei takpi tu ziam?" 
Proverbs20:10 Topa in a maan ngawl khaikhin toaisuangte le vanh teena a zangh mihingte ensan hi. 
Proverbs20:11 Patangnote zongh amate ii sep le vawt taw amate sia bang ziam ci in lak hi; amate thumaan ziam, pha ziam na son thei tu hi." 
Proverbs20:12 Topa in khuamu thei natu mittangte le khua zaak thei natu bilte hong pia hi. 
Proverbs20:13 Na hunte mumutna in na zangh le na zawng tu hi; komla in, tua hile neak tu tam mama na nei tu hi." 
Proverbs20:14 Vanh lei thei khat in a manham lei hi ci in phun a, tua zawkciang a man a nee zawkna sia kiphatsak pui hi." 
Proverbs20:15 Na son sia bang ziam ci in na he le, khamh le suangmanpha te sangin a manpha zaw na khat a nei na hi hi." 
Proverbs20:16 Khualmi khat ii leiba teng losak tu in kamciam a pia mi mawmaw khat sia ama ii neisate laaksakin a lo dong vaukhamna in koisak khol kul hi. 
Proverbs20:17 Thumaan ngawlna taw na nga nate sia an limbel neak bangin diksa tha tu ni hi, ahihang hai ngawlin hun khat ciang, tuate in kamdim senvui baak bang hi tu hi." 
Proverbs20:18 Ngaisut piakna pha saang in, zawna na nga tu hi; ngealna om ngawlin ngalsim thawthong heak in." 
Proverbs20:19 Ngualngen khat in thuku a keam thei ngei buatu hi. Mihing a kam tamleite kung pan kikeam in. 
Proverbs20:20 Na nu le na pa na tomlaw le na nuntakna sia khuazing sungah meiinn mit bangin bo tu hi. 
Proverbs20:21 Hauna ol vaial in na nga le nang atu pha ngawl vaial tu hi. 
Proverbs20:22 Ngual ii nang tungah hong khialnate thuk kik tu in ngaisun heak in. Topa muang in, ama in a maanin seam tu hi." 
Proverbs20:23 Topa in a maan ngawl khaikhin le toaisuang a zangh mihingte ensan hi. 
Proverbs20:24 Topa in ih tot tu lampi khensat zo hi; tua ahile bangbangin khat pawpo in ama nuntakna ii zotna sang a tel thei tu ziam? 
Proverbs20:25 Pathian tungah piak tu kamciam na vawt ma in, pha tak ngaisun phot in. A zawkciang khuangai tha tu ni hi." 
Proverbs20:26 A ciim kumpipa khat in akua in a maan ngawl seam ziam ci in he tu a, tua pa hesuak ngawlin daan pia tu hi." 
Proverbs20:27 Topa in khua ngaisut theina le a pha a sia heak theina hong pia hi; eima le eima ih kiphualseal zo bua hi. 
Proverbs20:28 Kumpipa khat in thumaan, thukhaikim le a kilawm bangin a uk laiteng a vaangletna kip tu hi." 
Proverbs20:29 Khangnote ii thahatna thupi ih sa a, khanghaamte puakkaang ih zakta hi." 
Proverbs20:30 Khat vevei thuakna haksa khat in, ih nuntakzia hong khealsak hi." 
Proverbs21:1 Topa in luitui luanna lam ol takin a heak bangin kumpipa khat ii ngaisutna uk hi. 
Proverbs21:2 Na sep na vawt theampo maan sa tha tu ni hi; ahihang Topa in na tupna laingilte tungah thukhen hi ci in ciamtee in. 
Proverbs21:3 A maan le ahi tu bangin seam in; tua in sangaw biakpiakna sangin Topa lungdamsak zaw hi. 
Proverbs21:4 Mihing seksolte sia amate ii a kihisakna le a kisaktheina in uk hi, tuaciang hisia in mawna ahi hi." 
Proverbs21:5 Pha takpi ngeal in, tam mama na nei tu hi; na lawplai leih le a kicing na nei ngei buatu hi." 
Proverbs21:6 Thumaan ngawlna taw na nga hauna bo pal tu a, ahihang thina thaang sung hong tumpui ma in bo ngawl tu hi." 
Proverbs21:7 Mihing seksolte sia amate ii ngoltolna taw lal uh a, amate in a maan sep tu nial uh hi." 
Proverbs21:8 Mimawte in lampi koai tawn uh hi; a maw ngawlte in a maan seam hi. 
Proverbs21:9 A nge hat zi khat taw inn khat sung teenkhop sangin innkhum tungah teang leang phazaw hi. 
Proverbs21:10 Mi seksolte in ngilkial andu bangin siatna vawt nuam hi; amate in kuama tungah hesuakna nei ngawl hi. 
Proverbs21:11 A kihisak khat in daan a khak ciangin khuangaisun meal ngawl khat ngawngawn in pil law hi. A ciim khat in ama a kihilna tung panin pilna nga tu hi. 
Proverbs21:12 Thumaan thutang ahi Pathian in, mihing seksolte inn sungah bang piang ziam ci in he a, a seksolte siacipsak tu hi." 
Proverbs21:13 Mizawngte auna aw ngai tu na nial le, hu tu dei a, nangma ii hu ngetna aw hong kizaaksak ngawl tu hi." 
Proverbs21:14 Mihing khat po in nang tungah hong thin uuk le letsong khat piak ku na taw ama thim tu hi. 
Proverbs21:15 Thukhaikimin a kisep ciang, mihing phate lungdam uh hi. Ahihang mihing ngilote thinkiamsak hi." 
Proverbs21:16 A kilawm ngamtatna pan, a puapial pawpo thina in ngak nginge hi." 
Proverbs21:17 A nuam leilam nuntaknate, sapittui le anlim neak lei nate in nang hong hausak ngeingawl tu hi." 
Proverbs21:18 Mihing seksolte in mihing phate tungah thuaksak tu a hanciam ngimna teng, amate tung ma ah theng kik hi." 
Proverbs21:19 A ngenge, a phuphun zi khat taw teenkhop sangin sennealngam sungah teang leang phazaw hi." 
Proverbs21:20 Mihing ciimte in hauna le nopsakna taw nungta uh hi, ahihang mihing mawmawte in sum a nga pawpo a manlang thei zaza in zangh uh hi." 
Proverbs21:21 Dik in a, thumaan in, tua hile khansau in na nungta tu hi; ngual dangte in hong zakta tu a, ahi tu bangin hong phatvawt tu hi." 
Proverbs21:22 A pil a thiam ngalkapmang khat in mihing thahatte ii a cin khuapi khat sia la zo hi, tuaciangin amate ii muan khuapi luphungte susia hi." 
Proverbs21:23 Buaina taw na kipeal nuam le, na kampau kidawm in." 
Proverbs21:24 A kihisak mihing khat hong lak ta'n, tua hile a kisathei, a kiphasak le ngual atu a ngaisun ngawl mihing khat kong lak tu hi." 
Proverbs21:25 Nasep tu a nial mihing datham khat in ama le ama kithat hi bek hi; 
Proverbs21:26 a dei teng a nga natu a ngaisut sia ama nasep hi bek hi. Thumaan thutang khat ahile ngual pia thei a, ngo takin pia hi." 
Proverbs21:27 Mihing seksolte ii sangaw biakna a piak ciang, a tuanin ngitlo thin taw a pia le Topa in huatsa hi." 
Proverbs21:28 A leilot khat ii tetti panna sia ki um ngawl hi, ahihang thu a ngaisun kaak mihing khat ii kammal sia kisaang hi." 
Proverbs21:29 Thumaan thutang mihingte in amate le amate kimuang uh hi; a seksol mihingte in a thiam thei za in a kivawttawm uh kul hi. 
Proverbs21:30 Mihingte ciimna pilna, kivakna le thuthuk muna cite sia — Topa in nang hong langpan le, kimanna nei ngawl hi." 
Proverbs21:31 Ngalsim natu in siphute na kinging kholsak thei hi. Ahihang ngalzawna hong pia pa in Topa ahi hi. 
Proverbs22:1 Minphatna le hau mamana khat sasang teal tu hi le uhte minphatna teal vun. 
Proverbs22:2 A haute le a zawngte in hisia nei khawm hi: Amate nii sia Topa ii vawt khop ahi hi. 
Proverbs22:3 Mihing khuangaisun theite in ngimna hong pai ciangin mu thei a pial uh hi, ahihang khuangaisun meal ngawl khat sia tua ii sungah tum vacin tu a, a zawkciang kisiik tu hi." 
Proverbs22:4 Topa ii thu ni vun a, kiniamkhiak vun, tua hile hauna, patoaina le khansauna na nga tu uh hi." 
Proverbs22:5 Na nuntakna na it le, lamdung ah a kisia mihing seksolte matna thaangte na pial vun." 
Proverbs22:6 Patang khat ii a nuntakzia tu na hil vun, tua hile a khan tawntungin ciamtee tu hi." 
Proverbs22:7 Mizawngte in sumhaute ii sal ahi uh hi. Sum na pu le leeitopa ii sal na suak hi. 
Proverbs22:8 A maan ngawl thaicii na tu uh le siatna hong po to tu hi, tuaciang ngual na zawthawkna uh sia a tawpna hong hi tu hi." 
Proverbs22:9 Piakna sungah na ngo vun a, na an uh mizawngte na hawm vun. Tua hu in thupha na saang tu hi." 
Proverbs22:10 A kihisak mihing sia na pial vun, tua hile kam kinialna, kihauna le min kisiatsakna a om nawn buatu hi." 
Proverbs22:11 Thinsung thianthona le kamthiam paunate zak tu dik na sa le kumpipa ii lawm na hi tu hi. 
Proverbs22:12 Leilot theite ii kammalte maan ngawl hi ci in lakna taw Topa in thumaan thutak sia keamcing hi. 
Proverbs22:13 Pasal datham pa in inn veu ah om hi; pusuak leng tawpi in hong man thei tha tu hi ci hi. 
Proverbs22:14 Palngulna sia thaang hi a — Topa thin uukna a thuakte tua thaang sungah awk hi. 
Proverbs22:15 Patangte ii mawmawthuai ngamtatna le bawlpelnate a nei sia a ngeina hi lel hi, ahihang a kilawm bang a, ngoaibul bekna taw amate ngamtat zia tu kihil thei hi." 
Proverbs22:16 Na hau natu in mihaute tungah letsong na pia a, ahibuale mizawngte na zothaw le nangma zongh na zawng tu hi." 
Proverbs22:17 Ngai vun, mihing ciimte pauna kong hil tu hi. Amate ii hilciannate kan vun," 
Proverbs22:18 tuaciang ciamtee in, na zangh kik thei le na lungdam tu hi." 
Proverbs22:19 Topa na pummuan tu ka dei hi; tua hu in tu in hong son tu khi hi. 
Proverbs22:20 Nang atu in paunak sawmthum kong at zo hi. Tuate sungah heakna le ngaisut pha piaknate om hi," 
Proverbs22:21 tuaciang tuate in thumaan thutak sia bang tatak ziam ci in hong hil tu hi. Tua zawkciang tuate a zong tu in hong kipaisak ciang a maan thu nong ciapui tu hi. 
Proverbs22:22 Hi thei tang ci in mizawngte tung pan hamphatna la heak vun; thukhenzum ah cimaw in a dingte tung pan hamphatna la heak vun. 
Proverbs22:23 Topa in amate ii thu sia amate taangin nialsak tu a, amate nuntakna a lauthawn po ii nuntakna kilauthawn tu hi." 
Proverbs22:24 Mihing thinngam, thin ngeamte ngualtamh in na man heak vun." 
Proverbs22:25 Amate omziate na zui tha tu a, na kikheal kik zo buatu uh hi." 
Proverbs22:26 Mi dangkhat ii leibate losak tu in kamciam pia heak vun. 
Proverbs22:27 Lo zawk ngawlna khat nei lete na lupna dongin amate in hong laaksak tu hi. 
Proverbs22:28 Na taanghpupite ii ngisuang luite na khiin heak vun. 
Proverbs22:29 Nasep pha tak a, a seam mihing khat hong lak tavun, tuaciang mihing tam mamate sang a phazaw, kumpite kitholpui tu dong a, a kilawm khat kong lak tu hi." 
Proverbs23:1 Mihing thupi khat taw an nekhawm tu in na to uh ciang, ama sia akua ziam ci in phawk nginge tavun." 
Proverbs23:2 An na du mama uh zong na kidawm tavun. 
Proverbs23:3 Ama hong lui anlimte neak nopin nei leih heak vun; hong aitaana khat po zongh hi thei tha tu hi. 
Proverbs23:4 Hau tu na hanciamna ah nangma le nangma na tha a bo ngawl natu in ciimna a khom na nei in. 
Proverbs23:5 Na sumte sia muvanlai khat a tha hong po in a len bangma in thakhat thu in bo thei hi. 
Proverbs23:6 Mihing a iiciilte sabuai ah an na ne heak vun, tua ahibuale zong anlim hong luite hu in duhop neak heak vun." 
Proverbs23:7 “Tawm beak ne lai in” hong ci kale hong ci takpi hi ngawl thei hi. Ama ii ngaisutna sia ama tatak ma ahi hi. 
Proverbs23:8 Na neak sa teng na lua kik tu a, na sialpokna theampo a vaal thong hi tu hi." 
Proverbs23:9 Mihing mawmaw khat sia a khua heak thei natu in na sonpui heak vun; ama in thupi sa thei meal ngawl hi. 
Proverbs23:10 Bangma hunin ngisuang luite na khiin ngei heak vun, ahibuale tangate neisa leitang na sut heak vun." 
Proverbs23:11 Topa sia amate ii a vaanglian a dal pa hi a, nang hong langpanin amate ii sang panin hong pau tu hi." 
Proverbs23:12 Na syapa ii hong hilna pha tak nadon in a, na sin thei theampo sin in." 
Proverbs23:13 Patangte tungah tek tu le pau tu haisaang heak in. A kilawm bang a, a ngoaibul bekna in ama thisak ngawl tu hi." 
Proverbs23:14 A tatakin ci leang ama ii nuntakna kihun zongh hi thei hi. 
Proverbs23:15 Tapa awng, nong ciim le ka lungdam mama tu hi." 
Proverbs23:16 Ciim kamte na pau ka zaak ciang ka angtang tu hi. 
Proverbs23:17 Mimawte eang heak in; Topa thasiana sia na nuntak sung na thintoi thu hisak in. 
Proverbs23:18 Tuabang hi lete na maivang tu hi. 
Proverbs23:19 Ngai in ka tapa awng, ciim in a na nuntakzia thuk takin ngaisun in." 
Proverbs23:20 Sapittui tam lei a nete, ahibuale an a bebente taw na kithawl heak in." 
Proverbs23:21 Zukhamte le antuangte zawng vaial tu hi. Anneak le mut sia nasep in na nei le hai ngawlin puansia ngapkaai na silh tu hi. 
Proverbs23:22 Na pa thuson ngai in; ama ngawl taw piang thei ngawl tu ni hi. Na nu a khanhaam ciangin ama thupi na saknate lak in. 
Proverbs23:23 Thumaan thutak, ciimna, sintheina le khua ngaisut theina, hite sia a man piak taak a, ahizong na zuak tu in manpha lei hi." 
Proverbs23:24 Mihing thutang khat ii pa in a lungdam natu thu om hi. Tapa ciim khat tungtaang ah na angtang thei hi. 
Proverbs23:25 Na pa le na nu sia nang huvau in angtang tahen; tua lungdamna sia na nu pia in. 
Proverbs23:26 Tapa awng, hong nadon ta'n a, ka nuntakna sia nangma ettee tu hisak in." 
Proverbs23:27 Pumpi zuak numeite le a paktat numeite sia a lauhuai thi theina thaang ahi uh hi. 
Proverbs23:28 Amate in ngualsuam phalakte bangin hong ngakin pasal tam mamate thumaan ngawl suaksak hi. 
Proverbs23:29 Zu tam ne leilam a, a nam thak a ne nuam lai khat kei hong lak ta'n, tuaciang a thinngim mama, khuangaihuai a kisa, ngual buaisak tawntung le lungkim ngawlin a phun tawntung khat kong lak tu hi. A mit san neinoi a, a pial thei tu hi napi liamnate nei hi." 
Proverbs23:30  
Proverbs23:31 Sapittui sia bangza po in san kilkel in, hai sungah tee vasip a, valhsuk ol hikale na ze etsak heak vun." 
Proverbs23:32 A khuavak ni zing ciang ngul nguu nei ii tuk bang hi na sa tu hi. 
Proverbs23:33 A kiitakhuai lului na mu tu a, na ngaisutna le na kampauna a thiangtho vaset buatu hi." 
Proverbs23:34 Tuipi tungah teambaw nguih bang, teambaw kilok tung to a, a saangna ah hong veito bang na hi tu hi." 
Proverbs23:35 “Hong kivua hi nak tu hi ve aw,” na ci tu a, “Vel zazaan thuak hi vak ing, ahihang ka phawk bua hi. Banghang khangciim thei ngawl khi ziam? Zu tawm ma kisamh lai ing,” na ci tu hi." 
Proverbs24:1 Mihing tatsiate na eang heak vun a, amate pawlpui tu in na hanciam heak vun." 
Proverbs24:2 Buaina piansak tu sia amate ngaisut pi hi lel hi; amate a pau simin mihing khat pawpo ii thin nasak tu hi. 
Proverbs24:3 Innkuante in ciimna le telthiamna doppha in kisa hi. 
Proverbs24:4 Heakna omna munah inn doituamte sia a manpha na hoite taw kizeam hi. 
Proverbs24:5 Ciimna in thahatna sangin phazaw hi. Hi hi, heakna sia thahatna sangin thupi zaw hi." 
Proverbs24:6 A tawpkhakna ah ngal na do ma in pha takpi na ngeal uh kul a, tuaciang ngaisut piakna pha tam na ngana zui in zawna zongh na nga zaw thei tu hi." 
Proverbs24:7 Ciimkam tepteete sia mihing mawmaw khat ii tel tu in thuk lei hi. Amate in a thupi kikupnate sungah a son tu bangma he ngawl hi. 
Proverbs24:8 Thusia bebek na ngeal le, buaina piangsak pa ci in na minthang tu hi." 
Proverbs24:9 Mihing mawmaw khat ii ngaisut tupnate sia mawna taw kidim hi. Midangte siatson bebek a kinte ngual in ensan hi. 
Proverbs24:10 Phatmawk hun sungah, na thaneam le a thaneam takpi ma na hi hi." 
Proverbs24:11 Mihing khat sia thumaan ngawl thu taw a kithat tu na mu le ama na hut natu in haisaang heak in. 
Proverbs24:12 Kei taw bang kisai ziam ci tha tu ni hi, ahihang Pathian in na thinsung tawngh hong he a, tua tungah thu hong khen tu hi. Ama in nang hong en nginge hi; ama in he hi. Tuaciang na sep babangin ama in thaman hong pia tu hi." 
Proverbs24:13 Tapa awng, khuaitui ne in; khuaitui pha hi. Khuai lu sung a, khuaitui sia na leei tungah thum ahi bangma" 
Proverbs24:14 ciimna sia na thaa atu in pha hi ci in na telthiang tu hi. Ciimna nga in, tua hi le na mai vang tu hi." 
Proverbs24:15 Mihing thumaan khat suttol tu a tum, ahibuale a inn a laaksak nuam mihing seksol pa bang hi heak vun." 
Proverbs24:16 Mihing thumaan khat in bang tanvei po a puk hial zong tho kik tawntung tu hi; ahizong lalna in mihing seksolte siasak tu hi. 
Proverbs24:17 Na ngal pa lalna a thuak ciangin lungdam heakin a, tuaciang a lutu ciangin lungdam heak vun." 
Proverbs24:18 Ngual tungtuan nopna na nei le Topa in hong he tu a, a dei buatu hi; tuasia ciang Topa in amate daan piak awl thei tu hi." 
Proverbs24:19 Mihing ngilote hangin na thinngimsak heak in; amate eang heak in. 
Proverbs24:20 Mihing seksol khat sia a mai bing hi — lamet tu a nei bua hi. 
Proverbs24:21 Ka tapa awng, Topa thasiana nei in a, kumpipa zongh zakta in. Kumpipa langpanin a leedote taw bangma kipee-awna nei heak in;" 
Proverbs24:22 tuabang mihingte tawmvei no sungin siacip thei hi. Pathian ahibuale kumpipa piansak thei lalna sia na he ziam? 
Proverbs24:23 Mihing ciimte in hite zongh na ci lai hi: Thukhen pa khat atu in doidan nopna a nei sia maan ngawl hi. 
Proverbs24:24 Mikhial khat khial ngawl hi a cile ama sia mihing theampo in haamsiat in ensan tu hi. 
Proverbs24:25 A mawte daan a pia thukhenmangte ahile khangto tu a, ngual phat sonna nga tu hi." 
Proverbs24:26 A thumaan kam zo kikna in lawm tatak hina lim khat ahi hi. 
Proverbs24:27 Na lo ante laak pha zo a, na nuntak natu thalaw thei tu in na kimuan mateng, na inn sa heak in a, innkuan phut heakin." 
Proverbs24:28 A thu om ngawlin ngualdang khat langpanin tetti pang heak in, ahibuale zong ama ii huvau telkhial thei thute phuang heak in." 
Proverbs24:29 “Ama ii kei hong vawt bangin ama tungah vawt tong! Ama thuk tong!” ci heak vun. 
Proverbs24:30 Pasal datham le a mawmaw khat ii lo sung le sapithuan sungah ka vak hi. 
Proverbs24:31 Tua munte sia lingkungte le lopate in khunel hi. A huang uumna phungte zongh cimh zo hi. 
Proverbs24:32 Hite ka en a, khua ka ngaisut ciang tua tung panin hi bang heakna khat ka nga hi:" 
Proverbs24:33 na uuk le tawmvei sung mu zok in. Leekoai in tawmvei tawlnga in," 
Proverbs24:34 ahihang na mut lanin zawnna in hiamh toai phalak khat bangin hong sim tu hi. 
Proverbs25:1 Judah Kumpipa Hezekiah kumpi zum sung pan ettee in a ki at kik Solomon paunakte om thua lai hi. 
Proverbs25:2 Pathian ii a seal thute hu in ama zatak ih pia hi; kumpipate sia tua thu a thiangin a sontel uh hu in zatak ih pia hi. 
Proverbs25:3 Kumpipa khat ii ngaisut sia na he ngei bua uh hi; ama ngaisutnate in ei bat zawk ahi ngawl, van saang bang, tuipi thuk bang ahi hi." 
Proverbs25:4 Ngunn sung panin a nin teng a laakkeak ciangin ngunn seakpa in na hoi mama khat piangsak thei hi. 
Proverbs25:5 Kumpipa kung panin ngaisutna pia mihing siate heam le uhte a kumpi ukna sia thukhaikim thu om hi ci in thang tu hi. 
Proverbs25:6 Kumpipa mai ah na din uh ciangin hong nasia ngaisut natu in hanciam heak vun a, mihing thupi bangin kiheang heak vun." 
Proverbs25:7 A thupi zaw ngualdang khat atu na dinmun awn a hong kisawl sangin dinmun saangzawna ah kaato a hong kisawl tu sia phazaw hi. 
Proverbs25:8 Na muna uh khat taw kisai in thukhenzum theng papaih heak vun. Tetti dang khat in nang muna sia maan ngawl hi ci in hong lak thei le bang law tu ni ziam? 
Proverbs25:9 Na innpaamte taw ngaisut kisik ngawlna khat na nei uh le noma sungah kilemtua tavun a, thuku khat po pualaak se heak vun." 
Proverbs25:10 Tua ahibuale mihing theampo in thuku keamcing thei ngawlte ci in hong he tu a, tua maizumna na pu zo ngei buatu uh hi." 
Proverbs25:11 Ngaisutna khat pha tak a, pualaak theina in ngunn tung khamh taw zep bang ahi hi." 
Proverbs25:12 Thuakna a nei ngeisa mihing khat ii kidop tu thupiakna a saang nuamte sia khamh khutzungbute ahibuale khamh pha belte taw a kivawt kizepnate sangin phazaw hi. 
Proverbs25:13 A muanhuai kamtaipa sia anlaak hun nisat laitak tuivot bangin, a sawlpa atu lungpilna ahi hi." 
Proverbs25:14 Piak tu kamciam napi a pia ngeingawlte sia nguatui paai ngawl meeikaai le vuite bang ahi hi. 
Proverbs25:15 Thin sau takin zolna in a tha khobel kinanna sutham thei a, ngamukte thinsung ngawngawn zo thei hi." 
Proverbs25:16 Na kisap za sangin a tamzaw khuaitui ne heak vun; a tam lei le hong luasak tha tu hi. 
Proverbs25:17 Na innpaamte mun haw vazut leih heak vun; amate in hong cimtak tu a, hong ngaimaw thei tu hi." 
Proverbs25:18 A maan ngawl kimawsakna sia, namsau, moltawng, ahibuale thaltang hiam bangin kiitakhuai hi." 
Proverbs25:19 Phatmawk hun sungah a muanhuai ngawl khat muan thaakna sia ha ngawk sa taw an thai nop bang, ahibuale peangbai sa in lampai taw kibang hi." 
Proverbs25:20 A thin kiamcip khat kungah lasakna sia khuasik laitak a puan suusakna, ahibuale a liamma sung ci noisakna taw kibang hi." 
Proverbs25:21 Na ngalte a ngil a kial le an pia in; a dang a ko le amate ii dawn tu khat pia in. 
Proverbs25:22 Maizumna taw ama na kaanghsak tu a, tuaciang Topa in thaman hong pia tu hi." 
Proverbs25:23 Saksang vui in ngua hong puak bangma ngual ngensiatna in thin uukna hong puak takpi hi. 
Proverbs25:24 A nge hat zi khat taw inn khat sungah teenkhop sangin innkhum tungah teang leang phazaw hi. 
Proverbs25:25 A khak belin, a khualana mun pan thupha zaakna in na dangko laitak tuivot neak bang ahi hi." 
Proverbs25:26 Mihing pha khat in mihing ngilo khat ii thu a zawp ciang ciktui nin ahibuale nguu a kitha tuikhuk khat hong phawksak hi. 
Proverbs25:27 Khuaitui tam lei sia nang atu pha ngawl hi, tuasia bangma, pokna tam lei nga tu hanciam zongh pha ngawl hi." 
Proverbs25:28 Na thin uukna na khaam zo buale luphung taw a ki uum ngawl, a kisim thei khuapi dongdai bangin na cimaw tu hi." 
Proverbs26:1 A mawmaw khat pok natu sia khaal lai vuuk taak, ahibuale anlaak hunlai nguazu tu bang keakin suak thei ngawl hi." 
Proverbs26:2 A thuak tu ma in na kilawm bua nale haamsiatna in bangma hong law zo ngawl tu hi. Tuate in leleang a, tawlngak hun a nei ngawl vacimte taw kibang hi." 
Proverbs26:3 Siphu khat sia saat kul a, laa khat sia kamkhau bul kul a, tuaciang a mawmaw khat sia vel kul hi." 
Proverbs26:4 A mawmawthuai dokna khat na zo le, a dongh pa bangma a mawmaw na hi hi." 
Proverbs26:5 A mawmawthuai dokna khat sia a mawmawthuai ma in zo kik lete, a dongh sia in ama kingaisut bangin a pil ngawl hunlam kiphawk tu hi." 
Proverbs26:6 Mihing mawmaw khat kamtai in na sawl le, nangma peang a saattan bang na hi thei hi; buai natu a zong na hi hi." 
Proverbs26:7 A mawmaw khat in paunak khat a zak theina sia a koncip khat ii a peang a zak thei bang bek hi. 
Proverbs26:8 A mawmaw khat po pokna in saili kuung tungah suangtang kikhit bang bek ahi hi. 
Proverbs26:9 A mawmaw khat in ciimkam teptee a zak ciang zukham khat ii a khut sung pan ling tangciak a daw nop hong phawksak hi. 
Proverbs26:10 Thacialpa khat in, hong vak thawthong a mawmaw khat po tha a cial le, a kisai theampo nasak bek hi." 
Proverbs26:11 A mawmaw khat in mawmawt vai khat a nii veina in a vawt kik le a luak sa a ne kik ui khat taw kibang hi. 
Proverbs26:12 A ciim ngawl khat ciim a kisa sia sangin, a mawmawbel khat phazaw lai hi." 
Proverbs26:13 Mihing dathamte banghangin a inn uh pan pusuak ngeingawl ziam? Amate in bang kiita ziam? Tawpite ziam? 
Proverbs26:14 Mihing dathamte sia a lupna tungah kilum lelet uh hi. Innkha khat pattaa tungah a kihei za sangin, tua pa in a khuala zaw theng ngawl hi." 
Proverbs26:15 Mi pawlkhatte sia ama le ama a kam sungah an a kibak tu takpi zongh datham hi. 
Proverbs26:16 A datham mihing khat in, amate ii ngaisut thiamna a lak thei pasal sali sangin pilvangzaw in kingaisun tu hi." 
Proverbs26:17 Nang taw kisai ngawl thu khat taw kam kinialna sungah kihelna sia khua sung lampi tawnin ui khat a bil pan zap taw kibang hi. 
Proverbs26:18 Mihing khat in ngualtheam a, a zawkciang ka ciammuina zam a cite sia, a lauhuai ngalhiam taw a kimai mihing thin amh khat taw kibang hi." 
Proverbs26:19  
Proverbs26:20 Thing om buale mei mit hi; thu nawnsan om buale kihauna bo hi. 
Proverbs26:21 Meihol in meikamte linghsak a, thing in mei kuangsak hi, buaina a piangsakte in kam kinialna kipee suaksak hi." 
Proverbs26:22 Thu nawnsan sia lim mama hi! Bangza in valh thanuam hi ziam! 
Proverbs26:23 Na ngaisut takpi teng seal a, thumaan son ngawlna in a man ol leibeal zutna in a kizangh cimbeng taw kibang hi." 
Proverbs26:24 A kihitheamsak mihing khat in ngual a etsatna sia kisialpokna kammalte taw seal hi. 
Proverbs26:25 A kampaunate ahile zaaknophuai tha tu hi, ahihang um heak vun, banghang ziam cile a thinsung ah ki etsatna a dim in om hi." 
Proverbs26:26 A ngual etsatna sia phualseal zo tha tu hikale, mihing theampo in a ngitlo ngamtatnate mu tu hi." 
Proverbs26:27 Ngual thaang a sia mihingte sia amate ma awk kik vacin hi. Min a cimhsak mihingte sia min in vuknelh hi.
