Isaiah4:2 Topa in ngam sungah a om ankung le thingkung theampo a khantosak tu le, a limciitsak tu hun hong thetheng tu hi. A nungta lai Israel mihing theampo in a ngamsung pan a piang an kungte hu in lungpilna le kiphatsak puina nei tu uh hi." 
Isaiah4:3 Jerusalem ah a taanglai, Pathian ii a nungta lai tu a tealsa theampo sia, a thiangtho kici tu hi." 
Isaiah4:4 Topa in ama ii vaangletna taw minam tung thukhenin thiansua tu a, Jerusalem ii mawna le tua munah chi kibua sia silthiang tu hi." 
Isaiah4:5 Tua zawkciang Zion mualtung le tua munah a kikhawmte theampo tungah, sun hunin meeikaai khat, zan hunin meikhu le meikuang taang sitset khat, Topa in puak tu hi. Pathian ii minthanna in khuapi bup huamin dal tu hi." 
Isaiah4:6 Ama ii minthanna in tua khuapi sia sun ni satna pan lia tu a, vuipi le nguapi pan bukna le belhna muan mun khat hisak tu hi." 
Isaiah5:1 Hi la kong sak laitak hong ngai ta'n, ka lawmpa le ama sapithuan taw kisai la khat hi: Ka lawmpa in leipha mama mual khat ah sapithuan khat nei hi." 
Isaiah5:2 Ama in leito in suang teng vawk a; sapitkung pha belte suan hi. Ama in tuate a cin natu in tausaang khat sa in, sapitngate a cil natu in leidum khat to hi. Ama in sapit a min tu ngak a, ahihang sapitnga theampo thuk siat hi." 
Isaiah5:3 Tuabang hi a, tu in ka lawmpa in, “Jerusalem le Judah ngam ah a teang no mite awng, kei le ka sapithuan kilaklaw ah thu hong khen tavun." 
Isaiah5:4 Hisia atu ka sep laak bang om ziam? Tuaciang ka muanmawk bang sapit phate piang ngawl a, banghang sapit thuk piang thong ziam?" 
Isaiah5:5 “Hi bangin ka sapithuan tungah ka vawt tu hi; a kiim uumna dalte ka lakeak tu a, a dalna ngawlte thiaktanin, ngamsate in ka nesak tu a, ka tuanhcilsak tu hi." 
Isaiah5:6 Lopa in ka khunelsak tu hi. Sapit baakte ka heu buatu a, a lei zongh ka tho buatu hi; tuasia luangin, lingte ling kungte in ka khunelsak tu hi. Ngua a zuksak ngawl natu in meeite ngawngawn ka khaam tu hi,” ci hi." 
Isaiah5:7 Israel sia Vaanglianbelpa Topa ii sapithuan hi; Judah mite sia ama suan sa sapitkungte ahi hi. Topa in amate a pha vawt tu in muangmaw a, ahihang amate in tual that zaw uh hi. Ama in amate sia a maan bang seam tu in muangmaw a, ahihang amate ii a vawtsiatte in thumaanna dei in kap uh hi." 
Isaiah5:8 Note a lal na hi uh hi! Na neisa inn le lote belap natu in na lei thawthua uh hi. Hai ngawlin midangte teen natu mun om ngawl tu a, tua leitang tungah noma bekma na teang tu uh hi." 
Isaiah5:9 Vaanglianbelpa Topa in, “Hi a lian a pha inn theampo a hawm suakin lal tu hi." 
Isaiah5:10 Sapitkung hectare sawm ciinna leitang in sapittui litre liat bekma piangsak tu hi. Anci litre za le sawm liat in vaimim litre sawm le liat bek piangsak tu hi,” a ci ka za zo hi." 
Isaiah5:11 Note a lal na hi uh hi. Zingsang zu ne tu in na thopal uh a, nitak ngei hial veu zu ne zu khamin na om uh hi." 
Isaiah5:12 Na poai sung uh ah tengtongh, daalkual khuangnote, tamngaite, na tum uh a — tuaciang sapittui na ne uh hi. Ahihang Topa in bang seam cisia na tel bua uh hi," 
Isaiah5:13 tua ahikom thongtaakte bangin hong kipaipui tu hi. Na lampuite ngilkialin pukthi tu a, nautaang mite dangko in thi tu uh hi." 
Isaiah5:14 Mithi khua in amate ne tu in kamkat hi. Tua in Jerusalem mithupite sia a ngamlum nautaang mihonte taw valhtum khawm tu hi. 
Isaiah5:15 A kuama po kimaimawlsak tu a, a kiphasak theampo kiniamsuksak tu hi." 
Isaiah5:16 Ahihang Vaanglianbelpa Topa in ama ii letna sia thutang sepna taw lak a, ama thianthona sia a mite tungah a thu khenna taw pualaak hi." 
Isaiah5:17 A sia sa khuapite sungah tuute in lopa ne tu a, kealnote in a tatna tu mun mu tu hi." 
Isaiah5:18 Note a lal na hi uh hi! Na mawnate uh pan suatak natu in na kisaan zo bua uh hi. 
Isaiah5:19 Note in, “ Topa in ka vawt tu hi a ci sia hi vabil in vawt tahen, tua hile ih mu thei tu hi. Israel ii a thiangtho Pathian in ama ngealnate vawt hen; a thinsung ah bang ngaisun ziam en tek tawng,” na ci uh hi." 
Isaiah5:20 Note a lal na hi uh hi! Note in a siate pha hi, a phate sia hi na ci uh hi. Note in khuazing sia khuavak ah, khuavak sia khuazing ah na heak uh hi. Note in a kha sia a thum, a thum sia a kha na sua uh hi." 
Isaiah5:21 Note a lal na hi uh hi! Noma sia ciim kisa, pilvang mama kisa si nu hi." 
Isaiah5:22 Note a lal na hi uh hi! Sapittui ne in a hangsan te awng! Zu helin na neak tu uh hangsan in launa nei ngawlte awng! 
Isaiah5:23 Ahihang sumnguk khat po taw a maw mite na suaktasak zeang uh a, a maw ngawlte ii thukhaikim thu khenna a nga natu na khaam uh hi." 
Isaiah5:24 Tua ahiciang tu in, taangphaw le lopa ko ngimngeamte mei a kak bangma in, na zungte muatin na paakpalhte kongaw tu a, vui in lenkeak tu hi, banghang ziam cile, noma in Vaanglianbelpa Topa Israel te ii a thiangtho Pathian ii ei hong hilna thu na nial zo uh hi." 
Isaiah5:25 Topa sia a mite tungah thin uukin amate daan pia tu in a khut vaan zo hi. Mualte liing tu a, mithi luangte ninteak bangin lampi tungah kinusia tu hi. Tuasia ngawngawn zong Topa thin uukna thai zo ngawl lai tu a, daan pia tu in a khut vaan lai tu hi." 
Isaiah5:26 Topa in, a khualana ah a om minam khat sapna tu in limlakna khat pia hi. Amate leimong pan hong pai natu in Topa in phit tum in sam hi. Tuasia ciang amate hi sungah manlang takin hong pai paih hi!" 
Isaiah5:27 Amate kuama toi ngawl a; lutu in a liik om ngawl hi. Amate mutsuak in lusu ngeingawl, mu ngeingawl hi. Kawngkhau khat zongh kawm ngawl hi; peangdap khau khat zongh tat ngawl hi." 
Isaiah5:28 Amate thaltangte hiam a, a thalte kaa tawm tu bekin eal pinpen uh hi. A siphu peangcinte thausuang bangin sak a, a muite suumpei bangin pei hi." 
Isaiah5:29 Ngalkapte sia, tawpite in ngam sa khat man a, amate kung pan kuama ii a laaksak thei ngawl natu munah tua in, a hawk bangin au uh hi." 
Isaiah5:30 Tua ni a thet ciang, amate in tuipi nging bangin nging takin Israel mite hawksan tu uh hi. Ngam hisia en vun! Khuazinna le ngim thuakna! Khuavak sia khuazing in valhtum hi." 
Isaiah6:1 Uzziah Kumpipa ii thi kumin, Topa ka mu hi. Ama sia a kisaangkhai kumpi tokhum tungah to a, a puantual sia Biakinnpi bup dim hi." 
Isaiah6:2 Ama kiimkot ah a ding, meikuang bang ahi Seraphim vantung mite khat simin tha luk tek nei hi. Tha nii taw a mai tek uh, tha nii taw a pumpi tek uh tuam a, a tha dangte nii tek taw leang uh hi." 
Isaiah6:3 Amate khat le khat ki oksan in: “Thiangtho, thiangtho, thiangtho! Vaanglianbelpa Topa sia thiangtho hi! Ama ii minthanna in leitung zel hi,” ci in au uh hi." 
Isaiah6:4 Amate awnging in Biakinnpi tawdappha liingsak a, tuaciang Biakinnpi mama meikhu taw kidim hi." 
Isaiah6:5 Keima in, “Kei atu bangma lam et om ngawl hi! Kei a lal hi ing, banghang ziam cile ka muk pan a pusuak kammal sim sia mawna veu hi a, a kampau sim mawna veu ahi mite sungah ka teang hi. Tuabang teng ahitazong, Kumpipa, Vaanglianbelpa Topa sia ka mittang vateak taw ma in ka mu zo hi,” ka ci hi." 
Isaiah6:6 Tuasia ciang Seraphim vantunglalangte khat sia biaknatau pan taitee taw a laak meikam khat dep a, toai in ka kungah hong leang suk hi." 
Isaiah6:7 Ama in meikam taw ka muk hong bitsak a, “Hisia in na muk hong bi zo hi, tu in na mawna bo siat zo a, na mawna teng kimaisak zo hi,” hong ci hi." 
Isaiah6:8 Tuaciang Topa in, “Akua sawl tu khi ziam? Akua in eite kamtai hi tu ziam a ci ka za hi. “Keima pai tu khi hi! Hong sawl ta'n!” ci in keima in ka zo hi." 
Isaiah6:9 Tuaciang ama in nangma va pai ta'n a, hi thu mihingte tungah son ta'n ci in hong sawl hi: “Bang zata na ngai uh zong, na tel thei buatu uh hi. Bang zata na en uh zong bang piang cisia na he buatu uh hi”." 
Isaiah6:10 Tuaciang ama in keima tungah, “Hi mihingte lungmusakin, a na ngongsak in a, a mittawsak in, tua hile amate khuamu thei ngawl, khua za thei ngawl, tel thei ngawl tu hi. Tuabang hile ka kung hong zuan thei in, a ci ka damsak tu hi,” hong ci hi." 
Isaiah6:11 Keima in, “ Topa awng, hi bang ahi tu sia bang tanvei ngei tu ziam?” ci in ka dongh hi. Ama in, “Khuapite siacipin, a lei awngthong dong — innte innhawm a sua dong — a leitang kolh in leitul a sua dong ngamkhingin om tu hi." 
Isaiah6:12 Keima in mihingte a khuala na ah puakin a ngam bup ka ngamkhing didesak tu hi. 
Isaiah6:13 A ngam sungah mihing sawm sung pan khat bek a taang ta zongin, tuasia pa ngawngawn kilalcipsak tu hi; ama in a kiphuktan sa lim thingkung bul khat taw kibang tu hi,” ci in hong zo hi. (Tua thingbul sia Pathian ii mihingte kipat thakna lim a lak ahi hi.)" 
Isaiah7:1 Jotham ii tapa, Uzziah ii tupa ahi, Ahaz kumpipa in Judah ngam a uk lai in ngal piang hi. Syria kumpipa Rezin le Israel te kumpipa Remaliah ii tapa Pekah in Jerusalem khua sim a, ahihang la zo ngawl hi." 
Isaiah7:2 Syria ngalkap honte Israel ngamsung theng zo hi ci thu Judah kumpipa kung a thet ciang, ama le a mite theampo lausak mama ahikom, vui ii seam thingkungte bangin liing vadil uh hi." 
Isaiah7:3 Topa in Isaiah tungah, “Kumpipa Ahaz taw kimu tu in na tapa Shear Jashub paipui in. Ama sia puan khuite nasepna phual paina lampi tung, tuicing tungnung kung pan tui laakna luam tawpna ah mu tu nu hi." 
Isaiah7:4 Ama kinging sa in a om khinkhian natu le a thin patau ngawl natu in son in. Kumpipa Rezin le ama ii Syria mite le Pekah kumpipa ii thin uukna te sia meikuang valiat thingkhua nii panin meikhu sia sangin lauhuai ngawl zaw hi. 
Isaiah7:5 Syria sia Israel le a kumpipa taw a sia khat vawt tu tum hi. 
Isaiah7:6 Amate in Judah ngam simin, amate sangah Judah mite a pawl natu in lausakin, Tabeel ii tapa kumpi tu in koi sawm uh hi." 
Isaiah7:7 “Ahihang Topa ahi, Keima in, hi thu piang ngeingawl tu hi, ci in ka thangsak hi:" 
Isaiah7:8 Banghang ziam? Syria sia a khuapi Damascus sangin thahat zaw ngawl a, Damascus sia Kumpipa Rezin sangin thahat zaw ngawl ahihang hi. Israel ngam ahile, ngam khat in a din zawk nawn ngawl natu in kum sawmluk le kum nga sungin kitamhtham dipdeap tu hi." 
Isaiah7:9 Israel sia a khuapi Samaria sangin thahat zaw ngawl a, Samaria sia Pekah kumpipa sangin thahat zaw ngawl hi. “Na upna a kip buale nang na kip zo buatu hi,” ci hi." 
Isaiah7:10 Topa in Ahaz tungah thudang khat puak hi: 
Isaiah7:11 “Limlakna khat hong piak natu in, Topa na Pathian tungah ngen in. Tuasia in a thukna mithi khua pan ahibuale a saangna vantung pan hi thei hi,” ci hi." 
Isaiah7:12 Ahaz in, “Limlakna ngen ngawl tu khi hi. Topa ze et nuam ngawl khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Isaiah7:13 Isaiah in, “David kumpipa suan le paalte awng, tu in ngai vun. Mihingte na thin na veilaaksakna uh sia no atu in sia khop zo hi — Pathian zongh a thin vei la sak lai tu nu ziam?" 
Isaiah7:14 Tua ahile pha zo hi, Topa ama mama in limlakna khat hong pia tu hi: ngaknu moi khat naungil om in tapa khat nei tu a, ama min ‘Immanuel’ ci in phuak tu hi." 
Isaiah7:15 Ama thu in a sia a pha khen thei tu in hong let hun ciang, mihingte in khuinoai dawn in khuaitui ne tu hi." 
Isaiah7:16 Tua hun hong thet ma ngawngawn in, note hong lausak kumpi niite ii ngamte kinusia cip tu hi." 
Isaiah7:17 “Judah ngam pan Israel kumpi ngam a kikhen zawk a, a tung ngeingawl ngim ngana nite sia Topa in nangma, na mite tung le kumpi innkuan bup tungah tungsak tu hi — ama in Assyria kumpipa hong puak tu hi." 
Isaiah7:18 “Tua hun hong thet ciang Egypt te atu, Nile ngunnaak a khuala belna pan tho bangin hong pai natu le, Assyria te atu in amate ngam pan khuai bangin hong pai natu, a limlakna in, Topa in phiit tum tu hi." 
Isaiah7:19 Amate mualkawm, luamkawm, suanghawngte sungah hong pai tu a, lingkung sawlpaang kawm theampo le ngantatna mun theampo ah hong kiliim nitnut tu uh hi." 
Isaiah7:20 “Tua hun hong thet ciang, Topa in sam meet pa khat — Assyria kumpilianpa! — sia Euphrates ngunngal khat pan sam tu a, ama in na khamulte, na sam le na pumpi tung mul teng meet tu hi." 
Isaiah7:21 “Tua hun hong thet ciang, lothopa khat in khuila khat le keal nii bekma suatak zo ahitazong in," 
Isaiah7:22 tuate in noaitui tam mama pia tu a, ama kisap theampo nei siat tu hi. Hi hi, ngam sungah a taanglai, a nungta lai tawmno teng in a neak tu khuinoai le khuaitui nei tu uh hi." 
Isaiah7:23 “Tua hun a thet ciang, sapithuan pha mama, sapitkung tulkhat a om huan khat ciang, ngunn dangka tulkhat a mante sia lingkung le lingngui te in khannelh tu hi." 
Isaiah7:24 Mihingte in thal le thaltangte taw tua munah sa vai tu uh hi. Hi hi, a ngam bup sia lingkung le lingnguite taw kidim tu hi." 
Isaiah7:25 Khatvei lai a, ankung kiciinna mualte theampo sia lingte in po nelh siat tu a, tua munah kuama pai ngawl tu hi. Khui le tuute tatna mun hi tu hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Isaiah8:1 Topa in ka tungah, “Lai atna suangpheak lian khat la in a, tua tungah laimal lian taw: ‘Manlang Suttol, Manlang Laaksak’ ci in at in." 
Isaiah8:2 Hong heakpui tu in a muanhuai tetti nii, thiampi Uriah le Jeberechiah ii tapa Zechariah sam in,” hong ci hi." 
Isaiah8:2 Hong heakpui tu in a muanhuai tetti nii, thiampi Uriah le Jeberechiah ii tapa Zechariah sam in,” hong ci hi." 
Isaiah8:3 Tua zawk tawmvei ciang ka zi naungil om hi. Ka tapa uh a sua ciang, Topa in, “A min, ‘Manlang Suttol, Manlang Laaksak’ ci in phuak in." 
Isaiah8:4 Patang in, ‘Nu awng’, ‘Pa awng’ a ci thei ma in, Damascus khua hauna theampo le Samaria khua pan a kisuttol vanhte theampo, Assyria kumpipa in la in pua siat tu hi,” hong ci hi." 
Isaiah8:5 Topa in kei hong paupui kik hi. 
Isaiah8:6 Ama in, “Hi mihingte in dam tak a luang Shiloah luitui nial zo ahikom Rezin le Pekah kumpite mai ah lau in liing vadil tu a," 
Isaiah8:7 Topa ahi Keima in, Judah ngam sim tu in Assyria kumpipa le a ngalkapte theampo ka paipui tu hi. Euphrates nguntui pawmin, ngun vaalbote theampo a khup siat bangin amate kuan tu uh hi." 
Isaiah8:8 Judah ngam sungah tuipawm bangin amate pai tu a, liangko dong tui khangin na theampo khum siat tu hi,” ci hi. Pathian sia eite taw omkhawm hi! Ama ii tha kiphalte in ngam hu hi." 
Isaiah8:9 No, minamte awng, kiitakna taw kikhawm tua vun! No, ngam khuala ah a omte awng, na ngai vun. Ngalsim tu in kinging vun, ahihang kiita vun! Hi hi, kinging vun, ahihang kiita vun!" 
Isaiah8:10 Ngealnate na nei vun! Ahihang tuate taangtung ngeingawl tu hi. Na uuk zaza son vun! Ahihang a luithawthong vive hi, banghang ziam cile Pathian sia eite taw om hi." 
Isaiah8:11 Mihingte tot lampi ka tot thaak ngawl natu in Topa in ka kidop natu a vaangletna taw thu hong hil hi. Ama in," 
Isaiah8:12 “Hi mihingte vaihawmnate pawlpui heak in a, amate kiitakte kiita heak in." 
Isaiah8:13 Keima, Vaanglianbelpa Topa ka thiantho hunlam na ciamtee in; na kiitak tatak tu sia keima ka hi hi." 
Isaiah8:14 Keima ii a lamdang thianthona hangin mihingte lutu theina suangtum khat taw ka kibang hi; keima in Judah le Israel kumpi ngammite le Jerusalem khua mite a awksak tu thaang khat taw ka kibang hi. 
Isaiah8:15 Amate tam mama lutu tu hi; amate pukin, kisucip tu hi. Amate thaang khat sungah kiman tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Isaiah8:16 No, ka nungzuite sia, kei tungah Pathian hong piak thute a keamcing thiam tute na hi uh hi." 
Isaiah8:17 Topa sia ama mite ii a mu thei ngawl natu in ama le ama kiseal hi, ahizong keima in ama ka muang a, ka lametna ama tungah om hi." 
Isaiah8:18 Topa ii hong piaksa tate taw hi munah ka om hi. A kumpi tokhum Zion mual tungah a om, Vaanglianbelpa Topa in, Israel mite kungah a nungta thupuakte bangin eite hong puak hi." 
Isaiah8:19 Ahihang mihingte in, maisang thu tu a phun vasup aisaan theite le thaa sam theite tungah thu dongh in hong sawl tu hi. Amate in, “A tatakin ci leang, mihingte in thaa te ii thusuakte nget tu hi a, tuaciang a nungtate atu in a thisate tung thu dok tu ahi hi,” hong ci tu uh hi." 
Isaiah8:20 Amate tungah, “ Topa in no hong hilna thute ngai vun! Thaa sam theite thu ngai heak vun — amate hong son thute ngimna taw hong kipealsak thei ngawl tu hi,” ci in zo vun." 
Isaiah8:21 Mihingte ngam sungah thinkiam ngilkial in vak kawkoai tu uh hi. Amate ngilkial thin uuk in a kumpipa le a Pathian haamsiat tu uh hi. Amate in vantung a ento zong, ahibuale" 
Isaiah8:22 lei a salhsuk zong ngimna khamna le khuazing ngawl buang bangma mu ngawl tu hi, amate sia a lauhuai khuazing sungah kihawlkeak tu hi." 
Isaiah9:1 Amate hi bang ngimna hun sung pan a suatak natu lampi om ngawl tu hi. Zebulun minamte le Naphtali minamte teenna ngam sia minsiatna thuak ngei a, ahizong mai sangah hi ngam sia Mediterranean tuipi nisuana ngam sang pan kipan Jordan ngunngal khat dong le ngamdangmite teenna Galilee ngam ngawngawn dongin ngam thupi suak tu hi." 
Isaiah9:2 Khuazing sung a vak mihingte in khuavak lian khat mu zo hi; Amate sia a limh zingna ngam khat ah teang uh a, ahizong tu in amate tungah khuavak taang hi." 
Isaiah9:3 Topa awng, nangma in amate lungdamna lian na pia zo hi; nangma in amate na lungdamsak zo hi. Amate in nangma sepsak sate sungah lungdam uh a, mihingte in an a laak ciangin ahibuale a vanh matte a hawm uh ciangin a lungdam bangma in lungdam uh hi." 
Isaiah9:4 Banghang ziam cile, nangma in amate ii vanhngit puakna hakkol le amate ii liangko a saat, ciangkhut na thiaktan zo hi. Nidang lai a Midian ngalkaphonpi na zaw bangkeak ma in na mite nengcipin hong zothaw minam sia na zo zo hi." 
Isaiah9:5 Ngalsim a hong kuan ngalkapte ii peangdapte le chi baang amate puante theampo sia mei taw kihal tu hi. 
Isaiah9:6 Eite atu nausen khat hong suak hi! Ei atu tapa khat hong kipia hi! Tuaciang ama in eite hong ukpa hi tu hi. Ama sia, “Lamdang, Thu lakpa” “Vaanglian Pathian,” “Tawntung Pa,” “Kilemna Kumpi” kici tu hi." 
Isaiah9:7 Ama ii kumpi vaangletna sia kizomin khang tawto tu a; ama ii kumpi ngam sungah kilemna a tawntungin om tu hi. Ama in David kumpipa ii za lai tu a, ama ii vaangletna in a maan le thukhaikim bulphu in tu pan kipan hun bo dongin uk tu hi. Vaanglianbelpa Topa in hite theampo khensatin seam tu hi." 
Isaiah9:8 Topa in Israel kumpi ukna, Jacob suan le paalte tungah thukhenna pia zo hi." 
Isaiah9:9 Israel mite theampo, Samaria khuapi sung a teang pawpo te in hi thu Topa in vawt zo hi ci in he tu hi. Tu in amate kiphasak in kisathei uh hi. Amate in," 
Isaiah9:10 “Uksuang innte pukcip zo hi, ahihang suanginn taw ka laih tu hi. Sycamore thing zawlsaute ki attan zo hi, ahihang a phabel cedar thing taw ka laih tu hi,” ci uh hi." 
Isaiah9:11 Amate sim tu in, Topa in a ngalte hol hi." 
Isaiah9:12 Nisuana sang pan Syria le nitumna sang pan Philistia in Israel valhtum tu in a kam uh kaa zo hi. Tuabangza ngawngawn zongin Topa thin uukna thaisak zo ngawl a; daan pia tu in a khut vaan lai hi. 
Isaiah9:13 Israel mihingte kisiik kik ngawl hi; Vaanglianbelpa Topa in amate daan a piak zawk ngawngawn zongin, Topa kung zuan kik tuan ngawl uh hi." 
Isaiah9:14 Ni khat sungin Topa in Israel lampuite le a mihingte daan pia tu a; a lu le a mei saattan tu hi. 
Isaiah9:15 A khanghaam le a zatak huai pasalte sia a lu hi a — leilot thu a hil kamsaangte sia a mei ahi hi! 
Isaiah9:16 Hi mihingte lampuite in amate lamkhialsak a, lungmang bikbeksak hi." 
Isaiah9:17 Tua ahiciang Topa in tangvalte khat zongh suaktasak ngawl tu a, meingongte le tangate khat zongh hesuak ngawl tu hi, banghang ziam cile mihing theampo in Pathian sel a, seksol in kamsia nawno pau uh hi. Tua hang zongin Topa thin uukna thai zo ngawl a, daan pia tu in a khut kivaan lai tu hi." 
Isaiah9:18 Mihingte ii seksolna in lingkungte le a mulnei lingkungte a kaanghtumsak mei bangin kuang hi. Meikhu lomtangh a piangsak ngamkaang bangin kuang hi. 
Isaiah9:19 Vaanglianbelpa Topa thin uukna hangin ama ii daan piakna sia ngam le lei ah meikuang taw hal bangin mihingte lalsak hi, kuama po in ama atu bek ngaisun hi." 
Isaiah9:20 Ngamsung koima po ah, mihingte in a zontawm, a mutawm an bekno khat pawpo ne a, ahihang a ngil uh va ngeingawl hi. Amate in a tate ii sa ngawngawn ne uh hi!" 
Isaiah9:21 Manasseh mihingte le Ephraim mihingte khat le khat kisim a, tuaciang amate in Judah sim khawm uh hi. Tuabangza ngawngawn zongin Topa thin uukna thaisak zo ngawlin; daan pia tu in a khut kivavaan lai hi." 
Isaiah10:1 Note a lal na hi uh hi! Note in ka mite zawthawk natu in a thukhaikim ngawl thukhamte na vawt uh hi. 
Isaiah10:2 Tuabangin mizawngte tung pan amate taw kisai a nga tuakte le amate ii thutang khenna nga natu te khaktanin na taansak uh hi. Tuate sia meingongte le tangate ii neisate na sutolzia uh ahi hi. 
Isaiah10:3 Pathian in note daan hong piak ciang note in bang na law tu uh ziam? Ama in ngam khuala khat panin ngimna, siatna note tungah hong tunsak ciang bang na law tu uh ziam? Hong hu tu zongin koisungah na tai tu uh ziam? Na nei na lamte koisungah na phual tu uh ziam?" 
Isaiah10:4 Note ngal kisimna sungah hong kithatlum tu hi, ahibuale zong thongtaakte bangin hong kikai keak tu hi. Tuabang ngawngawn taw zongh in Topa thin uukna thai ngawl lai tu a; daan pia tu in a khut kivaan lai tu hi." 
Isaiah10:5 Topa in, “Assyria awng! Nang sia ka thin hong uuksakte daan piakna khetbuk khat bangin kong zangh hi." 
Isaiah10:6 Kei hong thin uuksak mite ahi Pathian sel minam khat a sim tu in Assyria ka puak hi. Keima in amate sia vanh suttol tu, vanh ngu tu le lampi tung a leivui bangin mite tuanhcil tu in ka sawl hi,” ci hi." 
Isaiah10:7 Ahihang Assyria kumpilianpa in ngoltol ngealnate nei hi. Ngam tam mama siatsak sawm hi. 
Isaiah10:8 Ama sia kiphasak in, “Ka ngalkap maangte sia kumpi veu ahi hi!" 
Isaiah10:9 Keima in Calno le Carchemish khuapite, Hamath le Arpad khuapite ka zo zo hi. Samaria le Damascus ka zo hi." 
Isaiah10:10 Milim a bia tua kumpi ngamte daan pia tu in ka khut ka eal hi, a milimte sia Jerusalem le Samaria ah a om milimte sangin tamzaw hi." 
Isaiah10:11 Samaria le a milim theampo ka sucip siat zo a, tuabang keak ma in Jerusalem le tua munah a kibia milimte ka siasak tu hi,” ci hi." 
Isaiah10:12 Ahihang Topa in, “Zion mual tung le Jerusalem khua sungah ka nasep teng ka man ciang, Assyria kumpipa sia ama ii kisuantaakna le kiphatsakna theampo hu in daan ka pia tu hi,” ci hi." 
Isaiah10:13 Assyria kumpilianpa in, “Keima mama in a vekpi in vawt zo ing. Ka hat a, ka ciim a, ka pil hi. Ngam khat le ngam khat kilaklaw ngamngite bosakin amate kholsa vanhte ka sut siat hi. Keima in khuital khat bangin tualai ah a teang mite ka tuanhthal zo hi." 
Isaiah10:14 Leitung ngamte sia vacim bu khat taw kibang a, a tuuite ol zeang tak khoptua bangin keima in amate haunate ka khawmtua ziau hi. Kei hong lauthawn tu in a thaphil ngam le om bo; kei hong ausan tu in a kamkaa khat beak le om bo!” ci in kisuangtaak hi." 
Isaiah10:15 Ahihang Topa in, “Hei khat in a zangh pa sang lian zaw ing ci thei tu ziam? Thingatnam khat in a zangh pa sangin thupi zaw ziam? Khetbuk khat in mihing khat laamto ngawl a; mihing khat in khetbuk laamto hi,” ci hi." 
Isaiah10:16 Tu laitakin pha tak a, a kivaak phitphet tua mite daan pia tu in Vaanglianbelpa Topa in natna puak tu hi. Amate ii pumpi sungah a kuang tan mei khat om tu hi." 
Isaiah10:17 Israel te ii khuavak ahi, Pathian sia mei khat suak tu hi. Israel te ii a thiangtho Pathian sia meikuang khat suak tu a, tua in ni khat thu in na theampo, lingkung le lingpaakte ngawngawn kaanghtum tu hi." 
Isaiah10:18 Taam thuk te le lo ngampha te sia natsia khat ii mihing khat a lalsak bangin, siacipsak tu hi." 
Isaiah10:19 Duisung ah thingkung a taanglai tawm mama tu a, patang khat ngawngawn in a kung phaza sim thei tu hi." 
Isaiah10:20 Israel mi a suakta teng in amate a mong siatsak dektak minam sia a suan nawn ngawl natu hun khat hong theng tu hi. Amate in Israel te ii a thiangtho Pathian Topa muang takpi tu hi. 
Isaiah10:21 Israel mite sung pan mihing tawm bek amate ii vaanglian Pathian kungah cia kik tu uh hi. 
Isaiah10:22 Tu in Israel mite sia tuipi hui a om senvui za in tam mama ahitazong mi tawm bek cia kik tu uh hi. Mihingte atu in lalna sia a kikoi sa hi a, thuak tu in a kilawm tatak ma ahi hi." 
Isaiah10:23 Hi hi, Vaanglianpipa, Vaanglianbelpa Topa in vawt tu khi hi, a ci sa bangma in ama in ngamsung theampo ah siatna tungsak tu hi." 
Isaiah10:24 Vaanglianpipa Topa Vaanglianbelpa in Zion ah a teang a mite tungah, “Egypt te in note hong zawthawk vawt tawntung bangin, Assyria te in note hong zothaw hial zongin amate kiita heak vun." 
Isaiah10:25 Tawmvei no sungin, note daan kong piak sia ka man tu a, tua zawkciang amate ka lalcipsak tu hi." 
Isaiah10:26 Vaanglianbelpa Topa keima in, Oreb Suangpi ah Midian mite ka saat bangin, ka ciangkhut taw amate ka saat tu hi. Egypt mite daan ka piak bangin Assyria mite daan ka pia tu hi." 
Isaiah10:27 Tua hun hong thet ciang Assyria te ii khut sung pan note kong suaktasak tu a, amate hakkol sia note liangko tungah vanhngit hi nawn ngawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
Isaiah10:28 Ngalte ii ngalkaphonpi in Ai khuapi la zo hi! Amate in Migron khua kaantan zo hi! A nguai ante Michmash ah nusia uh hi! 
Isaiah10:29 Amate in mualciangh kaantan in Geba khua ah zan ngiak uh hi! Ramah khua mite lau in, Saul kumpipa ii khua Gibeah khua mite taikeak uh hi." 
Isaiah10:30 Gallim mite awng, au vun! Laishah mite awng, ngai vun! Anathoth mite awng, a pau zo vun!" 
Isaiah10:31 Madmenah le Gebim khua mite a suatak natu in tai uh hi. 
Isaiah10:32 Tuni in ngalte Nob khua sungah om a, tua mun panin amate in Jerusalem khuapi, Zion Mual a khuttum lak uh hi." 
Isaiah10:33 Vaanglianbelpa Topa in amate sia thingbaakte heu bangin saattan tu hi. Amate sung pan a kiphasakbel le a saangbelte zongh kisaat tan in kiniamsak tu hi. 
Isaiah10:34 Ngam tawnghtol sungah thingte hei taw a kiphu tan bangin, Lebanon mual ah thing hoibelte ngawngawn a puk bangin, Topa in amate phuktan tu hi." 
Isaiah11:1 David kumpi khang kizopna sia a kiphuktan sa thingkung khat taw kibang hi; ahihang thingbul khat pan a baak meang thak a po bangma in, David suan le paalte sung panin kumpi thak khat khangto tu hi." 
Isaiah11:2 A mite a uk natu in Topa ii thaa in ama sia ciimna pilna le heakna pia tu hi. Ama in Topa deina he in thasiana nei tu a," 
Isaiah11:3 Topa thunitna sungah nuamsa tu hi. Ama in a puasang muna le thu ngalzaakna bangin thukhen ngawl tu hi; 
Isaiah11:4 ama in mizawngte a pha in thukhen a, a cimaw mite ii a nga tuak te panpui tu hi. Ama thupiak bangin mite daan kipia in, mi siate thi tu uh hi." 
Isaiah11:5 Ama in a mite thukhaikim le thutak taw uk tu hi. 
Isaiah11:6 Ngiate le tuute kilemin teang khawmin, pawlbeamte sia kealnote taw lumkhawm tek tu hi. khuinote le tawpi note an nekhawm tu uh a, patangnote in amate cing tu uh hi." 
Isaiah11:7 Khuipuite le vompuite an nekhawm tu uh a, a note kilem in lumkhawm tek tu uh hi. Khuite in taangphaw a neak bangma in tawpite zongh in taangphaw ne tu uh hi." 
Isaiah11:8 Nauno khat nguu a nei ngul khat kungah kimai in a om hial zongh in bangma kilaw ngawl tu uh hi. 
Isaiah11:9 Pathian ii mual thiangtho Zion tungah liamna baina, a sia a kha bangma om ngawl tu hi. Tuipite sia tui taw a kidim bangma in leitung sia Topa thu heakna taw kidim tu hi." 
Isaiah11:10 David kumpi suan pan kumpi thak khat sia minam tam mama te atu in lim khat ahi natu ni khat hong theng tu hi. Amate sia a kumpi khuapi sungah kikhawm in ama zatakna pia tu uh hi. 
Isaiah11:11 Tua ni a thet ciang, Topa in ama ii vaangletna khatvei zangh kik tu a, ama ii mite sung pan Assyria le Egypt ngamsung, Pathros, Ethiopia, Elam, Babylon, Hamath ngamsung teng le tuipi tuikulhte tung, le tuipi dung ngamte ah a kinusia mite, a inn uh ah puak kik tu hi." 
Isaiah11:12 Topa in a kithethaang Israel le Judah mite kaikhawm kikin, leitung kiing li panin a ciapui kik natu thute sia minamte a lak natu in lim lakna laandial khat phut tu hi." 
Isaiah11:13 Israel kumpi ngam in Judah ngam eang nawn ngawlin, Judah te sia Israel te ngal hi ngawl tu hi." 
Isaiah11:14 Amate in nitumna sangah a teang Philistine mite sim khawm tu a, nisuana sangah a teang mite do khawmin suttol tu uh hi. Amate in Edom le Moab mite zothal tu a, Ammon mite in amate thu ni tu uh hi." 
Isaiah11:15 Topa in Suez Tuidok kangsak tu a, tuaciang Euphrates ngun tui a kan natu in vuisa vasak hi, mi theampo ii a kaantan zawk tu in luino sali bek khe lai tu hi." 
Isaiah11:16 A taanghpupite in Egypt ngam a nusiat lai in amate atu lampi lian khat a om bangma in, tua munah a nungta lai Israel a mite atu in Assyria ngam pan a suatak natu lampi lian khat om tu hi." 
Isaiah12:1 Mihingte in hi bang la a sak tu ni khat hong theng tu hi, “Nang kong pok hi, Topa awng! nang in kei tungah nong thin uuk hi, ahihang tu in nong heeneam a, na thin uuk nawn ngawl hi." 
Isaiah12:2 Pathian sia kei hong ngumpa hi; Ama muangin, ka lau buatu hi. Topa in vaangletna le thahatna kei hong pia a; ama sia kei hong ngumpa ahi hi." 
Isaiah12:3 Tui thiang in a dangko te, a lungdamsak bangma in, Pathian ii mihingte zongh ama ii a ngup ciangin lungdam uh hi.”" 
Isaiah12:4 Mihingte in hi bang la a sak tu ni khat hong theng tu hi, “ Topa tungah lungdamko vun! Nang hong hu tu in ama sam vun! Ama sep teng minam theampo tungah son vun! Ama bang zata lian ziam cisia mihingte tungah son vun!" 
Isaiah12:5 Topa in na lianpite seam zo ahikom ama tungah lasa vun. Hi thuthang sia leitung buppi in za tahen. 
Isaiah12:6 Zion ah a teang mi theampo au in lasa tahen! Israel te ii a thiangtho Pathian sia lian a, ama in a mite sungah teang hi.”" 
Isaiah13:1 Hisia sia Babylon taw kisai, Amoz ii tapa Isaiah ii Pathian tung pan a nga thupuak khat ahi hi." 
Isaiah13:2 Mual kolh khat tungah ngal simna laandial khaito vun! A kiphasak khuapi kongpite a sim natu limlakna in na ngalkapte oksan in a, na khut laamto in." 
Isaiah13:3 Topa in a thiangtho ngal khat sim tu le ama a thin a uuksakte daan pia tu in, a kiphasak le a muanhuai a ngalkapte sam zo hi." 
Isaiah13:4 Mualtung ngamlumna — mihonpite aw, a kikhawm tua minamte le kumpi ngamte ii ngamlumna awte ngai vun. Ngalkaphonpite ii Topa in a ngalkapte ngalsim tu in kithoaisak hi." 
Isaiah13:5 Amate sia leimong ah a om ngam khualate pan hong pai uh hi. Topa sia a thin uukna taw ngam bup lalthamsak tu in hong pai hi. 
Isaiah13:6 Na sa in kap keak vun! Vaanglianbelpa ii sukcip tu ni, Topa ni, hong nai hi." 
Isaiah13:7 Mihing theampo ii khutte zaw vanek tu a, a thinhanna uh kiam tu hi." 
Isaiah13:8 Amate a vekpi in launa le nasak mamana thuak tu uh a, numei nausuak tun bangin na sa tu hi. Amate khat le khat launa taw ki en tu a, maizum in a mai uh san tu hi." 
Isaiah13:9 Topa ni — a kiitakhuai, a thin uuk, a thinso vilvel, ni ngilo ni hong theng tu hi. Leitung sia dui kisuaksakin, mawnei theampo kilalcipsak siat tu hi." 
Isaiah13:10 Aksi theampo le aksi honpite taang nawn ngawlin, ni a sua ciang mial tu a, tha zongh taang ngawl tu hi." 
Isaiah13:11 Topa in, “Leitung ah ngimna siatna ka thengsak tu a, mi seksolte theampo a mawnate hu in daan ka pia tu hi. A kiphasak theampo ka niamsak tu a, a kisathei theampo le a ngilote theampo daan ka pia tu hi." 
Isaiah13:12 A nungta sunte khamh sangin ka tawmsak zaw tu hi. 
Isaiah13:13 Vaanglianbelpa Topa keima in, ka thin uukna ka lak ni in, vantungte ka liingsak tu a, leitung sia ama omna pan kithingkeak tu hi." 
Isaiah13:14 “Babylon ah a teang ngamdangmite sia savaite kung pan a suakta sangai bang le a cing om ngawl tuute bangin amate ngam tek ah tai in kithethaang tu uh hi. 
Isaiah13:15 Mat a thuak pawpo kihollum tu hi. 
Isaiah13:16 A nausente kivellupsak tu a, a innte kiphuul in, a zite a kibuansak tu sia cimaw in en thong tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Isaiah13:17 Topa in, “Babylon sim tu in Medeste ka hol tu hi. Amate in ngunn sia bangma thusim ngawlin, khamh zongh awlmawk ngawl uh hi." 
Isaiah13:18 Amate in a thal le a thaltangte taw tangvalte thatlum tu uh hi. Amate in nausente hesuak ngawlin, patangte khuangai huai sa ngawl tu uh hi." 
Isaiah13:19 Babylon sia kumpi ngam theampo sung pan a et hoibel hi a; tuasia in a mite kiphatsakna ahi hi. Ahihang Topa ahi, keima in, Sodom le Gomorrah ka vawt bangin Babylon ka lawnthal tu hi!" 
Isaiah13:20 Tua munah kuama teang kik ngei nawn ngawl tu hi. A vak kawkoai Arab mite, kuama in tua munah puanbuk phut ngei nawn ngawl tu a, tuucingpa in tua munah a tuu honte tha ngeingawl tu hi." 
Isaiah13:21 Tua mun sia sennealngam ngamsate teenna le simbute bu tomna mun hi tu hi. Tua munah kalaoh vacimte teangin, sathakte a sia a lalte sungah kinuntaw tu uh hi." 
Isaiah13:22 Tausaangte le kumpi innte sungah ngam ui le ngiate auna aw hawl tu hi. Babylon khuapi a siat tu hun theng zo hi! A nite cing dektak zo hi,” ci hi." 
Isaiah14:1 Topa in ama ii mihing Israel te khatvei ma hesuak kik leleau tu a, ama aituam mi in teal tu hi. Topa in amate a leitang tungah teangsak kik tu a, ngamdangmite pai in tua munah amate taw teang khawm tu uh hi." 
Isaiah14:2 Topa ii Israel mite a piaksa ngam ah a cia kik natu in minam tam mama in hu tu a, tua munah minamte sia Israel ii sila suak tu uh hi. Khatvei lai in Israel te a mante sia tu in Israel te in man tu a, khatvei lai amate a zothawte sia Israel mite in uk tu hi." 
Isaiah14:3 Topa in Israel mite natna ngimna a thuakna pan le nasep ham a kisepsakna panin damna le tawlngak toithaina pia tu hi. 
Isaiah14:4 Topa in hi bang a piak ciang, Israel mite in Babylon kumpipa sia: “A ngilo kumpipa pukvawk zo! Ama in kuama zawthawk vawt kik ngei nawn ngawl tu hi!" 
Isaiah14:5 Thin uukna taw a mite a zawthawk vawtte le, a zaw sa minamte a vawtsia tan tawntung a tatsia ngamukte ii thahatna Topa in bosak zo hi." 
Isaiah14:6  
Isaiah14:7 Tu tak ciang leitung bup ah tawlngakna le kilemna om a, kuama po thinnuam lungnuam in lasa uh hi." 
Isaiah14:8 A zataak kumpipa hu in Lebanon ngam a om cypress le cedar thingkungte lungdam uh hi, banghang ziam cile tu in ama thi zo a, amate a phuktan tu kuama om nawn ngawl hi!" 
Isaiah14:9 “Babylon kumpipa muak tu in mithi khua kinging hi. Leitung ah a thahat mite ii thaate vak hiithuut kawkoai hi. Kumpite ii thaate sia a kumpi tokhumte pan tho uh hi. 
Isaiah14:10 Amate a vekpi in ama ausan in, ‘Tu in nang sia koma bangma in thazawm zo ni hi! Nang sia koma khat bangma na hi hi!" 
Isaiah14:11 Tengtongh music te taw hong kipok bul hi, ahihang tuciang hi mun mithi khua theng ni hi. Thanhte na luppha hi a, lungte na puanvan ahi hi.’" 
Isaiah14:12 “Babylon kumpipa nikonghong aksi awng, vantung panin na taak suk zo hi! Nidangin minamte na zo a, ahizong tu in lei ah hong kikhiasuk zo ta hi." 
Isaiah14:13 Nangma in, vantung ah kaato in, na kumpi tokhum sia a saangbel aksite ii tung pek ah koi tu in na khensat hi. Nangma in pathiante kikhopna tua saksang mual tungah kumpi khat bangin to tu in na kingaisun hi." 
Isaiah14:14 Nangma in meei dawnte ah ka kaato tu a, Vaanglianbelpa taw ka kibang tu hi, na ci hi." 
Isaiah14:15 Ahizong mithi khua a thuk belna munah nang hong kipuak suk zo zaw hi. 
Isaiah14:16 “Mithite in nang hong salh tu a, lamdang sa in hong kamkat tu hi. Amate in, ‘Hisia pa in leitung lok a, kumpi ngamte a liingsak pa hi ngawl ziam?" 
Isaiah14:17 Hisia pa in khuapite lalcipsakin, leitung sennealngam a suaksak pa hi ngawl ziam? Hisia pa in a thongtaakte suatak ngeingawl, a inn uh ah a ciasak ngeingawl pa hi ngawl ziam?’ ci in dongh tu hi." 
Isaiah14:18 Leitung kumpi theampo sia amate ii a nasia mama thaankuul ah kiphum uh a," 
Isaiah14:19 ahihang nangma in thaankuul nei ngawlin, na luang sia a muatcip tu in kivawk hi. Na luang sia ngal kisimna sungah a kithatlum ngalkapte ii luangte in khunel a, suanghawng sung khat ah kivawk khawmin kituanhcil hi." 
Isaiah14:20 Nangma in na ngam susia a, na mite mama na thatlup hu in nang sia kumpi dangte bangin hong kiphum ngawl tu hi. A tatsia na innkuan sungah kuama nungta ngawl tu hi." 
Isaiah14:21 Mihon kithalupna kipan hen! Hi kumpipa ii tapate sia a taanghpupite mawnate hangin thi tu uh hi. Amate kuama in leitung uk ngei nawn ngawl tu a, khuapite saat zo ngei nawn ngawl tu hi,” ci in nunau tu uh hi." 
Isaiah14:22 Vaanglianbelpa Topa in, “Babylon simin, ka siasak tu hi. Keima in nausente pan kipan kuama ka khoaikhe buatu hi, a nungta kuama om ngawl tu hi. Keima, Topa in, ka son zo hi." 
Isaiah14:23 Keima in Babylon khuapi buannawng pui khat ka suaksak tu a, tua munah simbute teang tu hi. Babylon sia munphia khat taw ka phiat tu a, tua in na theampo phiatkeak tu hi. Keima vaanglianbelpa Topa in ka son zo hi,” ci hi." 
Isaiah14:24 Vaanglianbelpa Topa in: “Ka ngeal bangin piang tu hi. Vawt tu in ka khensat sa bangin kivawt tu hi. 
Isaiah14:25 Israel, ka ngam sungah Assyria te ka lalcipsak tu a, ka mualte tungah amate ka tuanhcil tu hi. Ka mihingte sia Assyria te ii hakkol pan le a puak tu a vanhngitte pan ka suatak tu hi." 
Isaiah14:26 Hi ngealna sia leitung atu hi a, minamte daan pia tu in ka khut ka vaan hi,” ci in kiciam hi." 
Isaiah14:27 Vaanglianbelpa Topa in hisia vawt tu in khensat zo hi; ama in daan pia tu in a khut vaan zo a, kuama in khaam thei ngawl hi." 
Isaiah14:28 Hi thu sia Ahaz Kumpipa ii thi kumin, a kipualaak thu ahi hi." 
Isaiah14:29 Philistia mite awng, note hong saat ciangkhut sia kithiaktan hi, ahihang note lungdamna tu thu om ngawl hi. Ngul khat a thi ciang, a ngilo zaw khat a taangin hong pai hi. Ngul ii tuui panin a leang thei ngulpui khat keu hi." 
Isaiah14:30 Topa in ama mi a cimaw mizawngte ii tuucing pa hi tu a, thinmuang takin nungtasak tu hi. Ahizong ama in no Philistine mite tungah nasia takin kialpi hong tungsak tu a, khat zongh hong hingkhoai ngawl tu hi." 
Isaiah14:31 No Philistine khuapi theampo awng, huna ngenin kapin au vun! Na vekpi uh in lauthawngin om vun! Saksang pan ngalkapte hong paina leivui khu sia meei bang hi a — tua ngalkaphon sungah a lauthauh khat zongh om ngawl hi." 
Isaiah14:32 Philistia ngam pan hong pai kamtaite tung bangbang son tu khu ziam? Topa in Zion khua kipsak zo hi, tuaciang a ngim nga ama ii mite sia tua munah ngammuanna nga tu hi, ci in amate ka son tu uh hi." 
Isaiah15:1 Hisia sia Moab taw kisai thupuak khat ahi hi. Zan khat thu in Ar le Kir khuapite kilalcipsak a, Moab ngam thim dide hi." 
Isaiah15:2 Dibon khua mihingte a thiangtho biakna mun mual tungah kap tu in kaato uh hi. Nebo le Medeba khuapite tungtaang ah khuangai in Moab khua mite nasia takin kap uh hi; a khuangai hu in a samte le a khamulte meet uh hi. 
Isaiah15:3 Lampi tungah a om mite khau-ip puan kisilhsak a; innkhum dawn le khuapi khawlmunte ah a om mite tau in kap uh hi. 
Isaiah15:4 Heshbon le Elealeh khua mite kapin, amate kaana awnging sia Jahaz khua dongin kiza thei hi. Ngalkapte ngawngawn liingin; a hanna teng bo siat hi." 
Isaiah15:5 Ka thin takpi taw Moab atu in ka kap hi! Mihingte Zoar khua le Eglath Shelishiyah ah tai zo uh hi. Pawlkhat te Luhith paina lampi ah kap kawmin paito uh a; pawlkhat ahile Horonaim khua ah suakta a, khuangai in ngamlum siasua uh hi." 
Isaiah15:6 Nimrim Luitui kang hi, tua luihui ah a po lopate vul zo a, lohing mun om nawn ngawl hi." 
Isaiah15:7 Mihingte sia amate ii neisa theampo taw a suatak natu hanciam in Pakngiam Kuam kaantan in pai uh hi. 
Isaiah15:8 Moab ii ngamngi theampo ah kaana awnging kiza hi. Eglaim le Beerelim khuate ah kaana aw kiza hi. 
Isaiah15:9 Dibon khua ah nguntui sia chisan taw kidim a, Pathian in tualai ah a om mite atu in a sia zawlai pawlkhat nei hi. Hi hi, Moab ngam sungah a kikhe lai mi theampo chisan luangin hon kithalupna khat om tu hi." 
Isaiah16:1 Sennealngam sungah a om Sela khuapi pan Moab mihingte in Jerusalem ah a om ngamukpa tungah tuuno khat letsong in puak uh hi. 
Isaiah16:2 Amate in Arnon Ngun vaalbo tung pan ngak a, vacimte a bu uh pan a kinawkeak ciang a ci a law a heak ngawl bangin vak kawkoai uh hi." 
Isaiah16:3 Amate in Judah mihingte tungah, “Bang seam tu khu ziam hong son tavun. Thingkung khat in suntang ni sat kimlai in, a limh vot khat a piak bangma in noma in hong dal tavun a, na limh sungah hong tawlngasak tavun. Ko sia ngaltaite ka hi uh hi, kuama ii hong mu thei ngawlna munah hong seal tavun." 
Isaiah16:4 Na ngam sungah ko hong teangsak tavun. Kote hong susia nuamte kung pan hong dal tavun,” ci uh hi. (Zawthawkna le suksiat nate bo tu a, ngam lalsak mite thotsak tu hi." 
Isaiah16:5 Tua zawkciang, David suan le paal sung pan khat sia kumpi suak tu a, ama in mihingte thumaanna le itna taw uk tu hi. Ama in a maan sia seam papaih tu a, thukhaikim thu omsak tu hi.)" 
Isaiah16:6 Judah mihingte in, “Moab mihingte bang zata in kiphasak ci thu ih za zo hi. Amate a kisaktheina le a kiletsakna ih he hi, ahihang amate ii kisuantaakna sia a luithawthong hi,” ci uh hi." 
Isaiah16:7 Moab mite sia ngimna a thuak hu in kap tu uh hi. Kir Heres khuapi sungah a om lai in a neak bul uh anlimte a phaw kik uh ciangin, amate a vekpi in kap tu uh hi. A thin kiam tu uh hi." 
Isaiah16:8 Heshbon khua hui a lote le Sibmah ii sapithuante kilalsak hi — tua sapithuan pan a piang sapittuite in minam ukte zu khamsak ngei bul hi. Khatvei lai in a khualana Jazer khuapi dong, nisuana sang sennealngam dong, nitumna sang Tuipi Thi ngalkhat dong sapitkungte zaam hi." 
Isaiah16:9 Tu in Jazer atu ka kaa bangma in tu in Sibmah ii sapitkungte atu in ka kap hi. Mihingte lungdamsak natu in anlaak poai om ngawl ahikom Heshbon le Elealeh atu in ka thitui taak hi. 
Isaiah16:10 Tu in lo ngam pha sungah kuama lungdam ngawl hi. Sapit huan sungah kuama au ngawlin lasa ngawl uh hi. Sapittui vawt tu in kuama in sapitngate cil ngawl uh hi; lungdam in, au nate bo hi." 
Isaiah16:11 Moab atu in khuangai in Kir Heres atu in ka tau hi. 
Isaiah16:12 Moab mihingte in mualtung a thiangtho biakna munte le a biakinnte ah thungen tu in pai a, thapaai thawthong in, amate atu bangma phattuamna om ngawl hi." 
Isaiah16:13 Tuasia in Moab taw kisai Topa thupuak maksak ahi hi. 
Isaiah16:14 Tu in Topa in, “Kum thum a cin lianin Moab ii hauna letnate mangthang tu a, a mite tam mama sung pan amate tawm bek nungta lai in, thazawm tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Isaiah17:1 Topa in, “Damascus sia khuapi khat hi nawn ngawl tu hi; ninthuk kholna khat bek hi tu hi." 
Isaiah17:2 Syria khuapite kinusia top tu hi. Tua mun sia tuu le khui tatna mun hi tu a, kuama in tuate bengkeak ngawl tu hi." 
Isaiah17:3 Israel sia a dal tu om ngawl tu a, Damascus te sia a suatakna taan tu hi. Syria mi a nungta laite sia Israel mite bangma in maimawl tu uh hi. Keima, Vaanglianbelpa Topa in ka son zo hi,” ci hi." 
Isaiah17:4 Topa in, “Israel ii letna a bo tu ni khat hong theng tu a, a hauna sia zawnna taw kilaih tu hi." 
Isaiah17:5 Israel sia ankung a kisaattan, an kila sa lo khat, Rephaim kuam sung lo kolh khat taw kibang tu hi." 
Isaiah17:6 Israel mi tawm bekma nungta lai tu a, a kungdawn pek ah a nga pum nii pum thum simngawl, ahibuale a nuaisang a baakte tungah a kikhe lai tawmno teng simngawl, a nga dang teng theampo a kilo siat sa olive kung khat taw kibang tu hi. Keima, Topa Israel te ii Pathian in, ka son zo hi,” ci hi." 
Isaiah17:7 Tua ni a thet ciang, mihingte in amate a Bitphuapa ahi, Israel te ii a thiangtho Pathian kungah hu ngenin zuan tu uh hi." 
Isaiah17:8 Amate in a khut uh taw a vawttawm biaknataute suang nawn ngawl tu a, ahibuale a khut vateak taw a vawt sa — Asherah numeipathian limte le ngimnamtui halna taute muang nawn ngawl tu hi." 
Isaiah17:9 Tua ni a thet ciang pha tak a kidal khuapite sia Israel te kung pan a taikeak Hiv te le Amor te ii nusiat khuapite bangin lalcipin taisan tu hi. 
Isaiah17:10 Israel awng, nang hong suatak a, a thahat suangpi khat bang a hong dal Pathian sia na mangil zo hi. Tuasia taangin, ngamdang pathian khat biak natu in huan thiangthote na vawt hi." 
Isaiah17:11 A kungte na suan ni zing mama in meangin, a paak hial zongin an laak tu na nei peang buatu hi. Ngimna le a dam thei ngawl natna bek om tu hi." 
Isaiah17:12 Ngam thahatte ii ngam sungah tuipi nging bang, tuihual puite kisuk bangin buaina om lialua hi." 
Isaiah17:13 Minamte sia tuihualte bangin maisang manaw in pai uh hi, ahihang Pathian in amate teih in pau ahikom nungkin kik a, suumpei sungah taangphawte bang le mualpangh ah leivui bangin kinotkeak hi." 
Isaiah17:14 Nitak sangin amate kiitakhuai mama a, ahihang zingsang in bo hi. Tuasia in ih ngam ih lei hong suttolte theampo ii thuak tu ahi hi." 
Isaiah18:1 Ethiopia ngunte ngalkhat ah ngam khat om a, tualai ah thaphil nging kiza hi." 
Isaiah18:2 Tua ngam panin, tongciinte sia pumpa taw a kivawt ngunkuang taw Nile ngun zui in paisuk uh hi. Sawl tangzang kamtaite awng, na inn uh ah cia kik vun! Nguntuite ii a khentanna ngam ah a om a thahat, a vaanglian minam, a tun saangin a ciineal, leitung theampo ii kiitak na mite teng tungah thu khat puak kik vun." 
Isaiah18:3 Ngai vun, leitung ah a teang mite theampo awng! Mualdawn ah a kikhai tu limlakna laandial khat zong vun! Lemle a kitum tu aw ngai vun!" 
Isaiah18:4 Topa in kei tungah, “Keima in anlaak hun zan khualum lai daaituite a taak bang vakhial le, sun lai nitaang kiukiau bangin vantung pan kong ensuk tu hi." 
Isaiah18:5 Sapit ngate a kikaikhop ma, a paakte pul siat in a ngate a min ciang, sapitkung pan a baakte nam taw ol takin a kiheu bangin, ngalte in Ethiopia te susia tu hi." 
Isaiah18:6 A ngalkap te ii mithi luangte sia vacimte le ngamsate atu in kinusia thal tu hi. Khaal sungin vacimte le, phalbi sungin ngamsate in tuate taw kivaak tu uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Isaiah18:7 Ngunte ii khentan hi ngam, a thahat a vaanglian hi minam, a tun saangin a ciineal, leitung theampo ii a kiitak hi mihingte tung panin biakpiaknate Vaanglianbelpa Topa ii a saan thei tu hun khat hong theng tu hi. Vaanglianbelpa Topa a kibiakna mun, Zion Mual tungah amate hong pai tu uh hi." 
Isaiah19:1 Hisia sia Egypt ngam taw kisai thupuak ahi hi. Topa sia meei tungah to in, manlang mama in Egypt ngam ah hong pai hi. Ama mai ah Egypt milimte liingin, Egypt mihingte a hanna bo hi." 
Isaiah19:2 Topa in, “Egypt ngam sungah tualngal thosakin, unau khat le khat, innpaam khat le khat ka kidosak tu hi. A kidem khuapite khat le khat kido in, a kidem kumpite khat le khat vaangletna kituu in kihau tu uh hi." 
Isaiah19:3 Egypt te ii ngealnate lalsakin, a thin kho nate ka siasak tu hi. Amate in a milimte tungah huna ngenin, thaa sam theite thu dongh in, mithite ii thaa te tungah ngaisutna ngen tu uh hi." 
Isaiah19:4 A ngoltol a tatkha, zawthawk thu taw a ngilo kumpi khat tungah Egypt te aapin ka uksak tu hi. Keima, Vaanglianbelpa Topa in ka son zo hi,” ci hi." 
Isaiah19:5 Nile nguntui kiamsuk in, ngun sia dadamin kang tu hi." 
Isaiah19:6 Nguntui luanna tuilamte dadamin ko in ui tu hi. Pumpa kung le phaipheang kungte ko ngaw tu a," 
Isaiah19:7 Nile ngundung vaalbo tungah a kiciing ankung theampo ko ngaw in, hui in seamkeak tu hi." 
Isaiah19:8 Nile ngun sungah ngasa mat taw nuntakna a zong theampo tau in kap tu uh hi; a ngasa tangthaakna le a ngeente kimanna om ngawl tu hi. 
Isaiah19:9 Puanneal puan a takte thinkiam tu uh hi; 
Isaiah19:10 thiamtakte le khutthiam naseamte thin tamthamin a thin lal tu uh hi. 
Isaiah19:11 Zoan khua lampuite sia mi mawmawte ahi uh hi! Egypt mipil belte in a mawmawthuai ngaisutna pia uh hi! Amate in taanghlai mipilte le kumpite zalaih tu ka hi uh hi ci in bangbangin kumpipa tungah son ngam ziam? 
Isaiah19:12 Egypt kumpipa awng, ngaisutna a pia thei tu tua na mipilte koisungah om ziam? Egypt atu in Vaanglianbelpa Topa in bang ngealnate nei cisia amate in nang tungah hong son thei tha tu hi." 
Isaiah19:13 Zoan le Memphis lampuite mawmaw uh hi. Amate sia minam lampui tute ma in kingaisun ahihang lampui khial uh hi. 
Isaiah19:14 Topa in a lungmanhuai bialbual ngaisutna amate in piasak hi. Tua hu in, Egypt te in a maan ngawl theampo seamin, ama luak naal tawk thei zukham pa khat bangin hoi vatut hi." 
Isaiah19:15 Egypt ngam sungah a om, a hau a zawng, mi thupi mi thupi ngawl, kuama in Egypt te hu thei ngawl hi." 
Isaiah19:16 Egypt mihingte sia numeite bangin meidoai tu hun khat theng tu hi. Vaanglianbelpa Topa in amate daan pia tu in a khut a vaan sia a mu uh ciang, amate lau in liing tu uh hi." 
Isaiah19:17 Vaanglianbelpa Topa ii Egypt mihingte daan piak tu in a seesa thu a phaw kik simin Egypt mihingte in Judah te kiita tu uh hi. 
Isaiah19:18 Tua hun a thet ciang, Egypt khuapi ngate sungah Hebrew kam kipau tu hi. Tualai a mihingte in Vaanglianbelpa Topa min suangin kiciamnate vawt tu uh hi. Khuapite sung pan khuapi khat sia, “Ni ii Khuapi” kici tu hi." 
Isaiah19:19 Tuasia hun a thet ciang, Egypt ngam sungah Topa biaknatau khat om tu a Egypt ngamngi ah, ama min in khansuang khat kiphut tu hi." 
Isaiah19:20 Tuate sia Vaanglianbelpa Topa ii Egypt ngam sungah a om hunlam a kilakna limte hi tu hi. Tualai ah a om mite kizothaw in Topa tungah huna a nget uh ciang, ama in amate a suatak tu mihing khat puak tu hi." 
Isaiah19:21 Topa sia Egypt mihingte tungah ama mama kilangh tu hi, tuaciang amate in ama he in, bia tu a, sangaw biakpiakna le meihal biakpiaknate pia tu uh hi. Amate in Topa tungah a ciliap huai kamciamnate pia in, tua a kamciamna bangin seam tu uh hi." 
Isaiah19:22 Topa in Egypt te daan pia tu hi, ahihang tua zawkciang damsak tu hi. Amate in Topa sangah kiheak tu uh a, ama in a thungetnate za in a ci uh damsak tu hi." 
Isaiah19:23 Tua hun a thet ciang, Egypt le Assyria ngam kilaklaw ah lampi lian khat om tu hi. Tua ngam nii te pan mihingte khat le khat kihaw in minam niite in Topa bia khawm tu uh hi." 
Isaiah19:24 Tuasia hun ciang, Israel sia Egypt le Assyria taw za kikim tu a, hi minam thumte leitung theampo atu in thupha a hi tu uh hi." 
Isaiah19:25 Vaanglianbelpa Topa in amate thupha pia in, “Ka mi Egypt te awng; no kong bitphua sa Assyria te awng; tuaciang no kong teal mi Israel te awng, thupha kong pia tu hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah20:1 Assyria kumpilianpa Sargon thupiakna taw in, Assyria ngalkapmang lianbelpa in Philistine khuapi Ashdod sim hi." 
Isaiah20:2 Tua hun ma kum thum lai in Topa in Amoz ii tapa Isaiah tungah a silh khau-ip puan le a peangdapte suut tu in sawl hi. Ama in thu ni in a pumnguak le a peangnguakin vak kawkoai hi. 
Isaiah20:3 Ashdod khua a kilaak zawkciang, Topa in, “Ka naseampa Isaiah sia a pumnguak, a peangnguakin kum thum sung vak kawkoai hi. Hi thu in Egypt le Ethiopia te tungah maisang bang teng piang tu cisia, lakna lim ahi hi." 
Isaiah20:4 Tua ngamte nii pan a ngal matte sia a pumnguakin Assyria kumpilianpa in paipui tu hi. Egypt mite maizum kipia tu hi, a moi a haam ci tuan om ngawlin, a ngoaibulte zongh kiseal ngawlin a pumnguak le a peangnguakin vak tu uh hi." 
Isaiah20:5 Ethiopia te muangin, Egypt te hangin a kiphasak tha te a khial hunlam kiphawksak tu a, a lametna uh bo siat tu hi." 
Isaiah20:6 Tuasia hun a thet ciang, Philistia ngam tuipi dung ah a teang mite in, ‘Assyria kumpipa kung pan ei hong dal tu in ih suan ih muanbel mite bang tat thong ziam, en vun! Eite bangbang nungta nawn thong tu hi ziam’ a ci tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Isaiah21:1 Hisia sia Babylon taw kisai thupuak ahi hi. A lauhuai ngam khat panin suumpei khat bangin sennealngam kaantan in, tuasiatna hong pai tu hi." 
Isaiah21:2 A ngitlo huai thupiangte mukholna khat ka mu a, kilee heakna le lalcipna ahi hi. Elam ngalkapte awng, sim vun! Media ngalkapte awng, khuapite kiim uum vun! Babylon ii a piansak ngimna a thuakna sia Pathian in bosak tu hi." 
Isaiah21:3 Mukholna sungah ka zaak le ka mute in hong lausakin, numei khat nau a tut ciangin na a sak bangin na ka sa hi." 
Isaiah21:4 Ka lu hong vai in, lau in ka liing hi. Nitak hong thet tu ka thangai a, ahihang hong thet takpi ciang liinna le launa bekma hong puak hi." 
Isaiah21:5 Ka mukholna ah anneakpoai khat kingingin ka mu hi; leangnate to natu in puan saate kipha hi. Amate an ne tui dawnin a om laitak thakhat thu in thupiakna khat nging hi; “Uliante awng! Na lumte pua khol vun!” ci hi. 
Isaiah21:6 Tua zawkciang Topa in kei tungah, “Pai in a ngal encik khat koi in, a mu bangin thu hong puak tu in sawl in." 
Isaiah21:7 Mihing nii veu, nii veu siphu tungto in hong pai ahizong, mihingte laa tung le kalaoh tung to in hong pai ahizong ama in a mu le, pha takin tuate a etcik tu ahi hi,” hong ci hi." 
Isaiah21:8 Ngal encik pa au in, “Topa awng, a sun a zanin ngalvilin ka ding tan hi,” ci hi." 
Isaiah21:9 Thakhat thu in amate hong theng hi! Mihing nii veu nii veu siphu tung to hi. Ngal encik pa in, thu puak in, “Babylon bo zo hi! Amate ii biak milim theampo lei ah tamhtham dipdeapin om hi,” ci hi." 
Isaiah21:10 Israel ka mite awng, mangtaang bangin no hong kicil zo hi, ahihang tu in Israel te ii Pathian ahi, Vaanglianbelpa Topa tung pan ka zaak, a zaaknophuai thuphate kong son zo hi." 
Isaiah21:11 Hisia in Edom taw kisai thupuak ahi hi. Edom pan khat in kei hong samin, “Phualcing pa awng, zan hun a bo nai tu ziam? A bo pal tu ziam hong son ta'n,” hong ci hi." 
Isaiah21:12 Ka zo kikna pan, “Zingsang hong thetheng hi, ahizong zan hun hong theng kik leleau tu hi. Nong dongh kik nuam le hong heak kikin hong dongh ta'n,” ka ci hi." 
Isaiah21:13 Hisia in Arabia taw kisai thupuak ahi hi. Dedan mi, Arabia ngamkol sungah kalaoh hon taw ngiaphual saatin a om note awng," 
Isaiah21:14 note kungah hong pai tuidu dangtaak mihingte tui pia vun. Tema ngammi note awng, ngaltaite an pia vun." 
Isaiah21:15 Namsau taw kithalupna pan, thal taw kikaplupna pan le ngal launa theampo pan a suakta tu in mihingte tai uh hi." 
Isaiah21:16 Tua zawkciang Topa in kei tungah, “Kum khat sung lianin Kedar minamte ii a letna bo tu hi." 
Isaiah21:17 Kedar mite sung pan thal toaite sia ngalhang belte hi a, ahihang amate sung pan tawm bek taang lai tu hi. Keima, Israel te ii Topa Pathian in ka son zo hi,” hong ci hi." 
Isaiah22:1 Hisia in Mukholna Kuam taw kisai thupuak ahi hi. Bang thu piang ziam? Banghangin khua mite theampo in innkhum tungah poai vawtin om uh ziam? 
Isaiah22:2 Khuapi bup ngamlum siasua a, aw sa le thin patauna taw kidim hi. Hi ngal sungah a thi na mite sia ngal simin a thi hi ngawl hi." 
Isaiah22:3 Na lampuite theampo taikeak in, thaltang khat beak zongh a kaap ma in kiman uh hi." 
Isaiah22:4 Ka mihing a thite theampo atu in nasia tak ka kaa thei natu in, tu in keima nguak hong nusia ta'n. Hong heeneam heak in." 
Isaiah22:5 Hi hun sia Mukholna Kuam sungah a liinglawng patauna, ngallelna le ahi biaibuai a pian hun hi a, tuate sia Vaanglianbelpa Topa Vaanglianpipa in ei tungah hong thengsak hi. Ih khuapi uumna luphungte kisaattham zo a, huna ngenin auna awte mualte kawm ah hawl hi." 
Isaiah22:6 Elam ngam pan ngalkapte thal le thaltang toai in siphu tung to in, hong pai uh hi. Kir ngam pan ngalkapte a lum tek taw kithoai sa in om uh hi." 
Isaiah22:7 Lei pha mama Judah kuamte sia siphu ngalleangte taw kidim hi; siphu ngalkapte Jerusalem kongpite mai ah ding uh hi. 
Isaiah22:8 Judah te ngal dalnate theampo cimhtham hi. Tuabang a pian ciang, ngalvanh koina phual pan ngalhiamte na la uh hi." 
Isaiah22:9 Jerusalem luphung koisung teng pua tuak cisia na mu hi. Jerusalem khua ah a om innte theampo na en kawkoai a, khuapi luphungte pua kik natu in, zak tu suangte nga natu inn pawlkhat na pheltham hi. Tui khol natu in," 
Isaiah22:10  
Isaiah22:11 tuikhuk a lui sia pan a luangsuk tuite khol natu in khuapi sung sangah tuibeam khat na vawt uh hi. Ahihang nidang lai pekin, hite theampo hong ngealsak le a piangsak Pathian na thusim bua uh hi." 
Isaiah22:12 Tuaciang Vaanglianpipa Topa, Vaanglianbelpa in a kap tu a mau tu le sam meettol in, khau-ip puan silh tu in note hong sam hi." 
Isaiah22:13 Tua taangin note nuiza in poai na vawt uh hi. Neak tu in tuu le khuite na ngo uh a, sapittui na dawn uh hi. Noma in, “Ei teng zongh ne in dawnin ih om thei tha tu hi! Zing ciangin a thi tu ih hi hi,” na ci uh hi." 
Isaiah22:14 Vaanglianpipa Topa, Vaanglianbelpa ama mama in kei hong paupui a, “Amate a nuntak lai teng a siatna kimaisak ngeingawl tu hi. Keima, Vaanglianpipa Topa Vaanglianbelpa ka pau zo hi,” hong ci hi." 
Isaiah22:15 Vaanglianbelpa Topa in keima tungah kumpi innkuan sung thuzeakpa ahi, Shebna kungah pai in hi bangin va ci ta'n," 
Isaiah22:16 “Nang akua kisa ni ziam? Mualpangh suang sungah nangma atu thaan khuk khuak tu in bang thu nei ni ziam? 
Isaiah22:17 Thupi zongh thupi tha tu ni hi, ahihang Topa in nang hong zamhin hong vawk tu hi." 
Isaiah22:18 Ama in bawlung top bangin nang hong tawm tu a, a lian zaw na ngam khat ah hong vawk tu hi. Na kiphatsak pui mama ahi siphu ngalleangte ii kungah na thi tu hi. Na topa te innkuan maimawlsak ni hi." 
Isaiah22:19 Topa in na zum panin hong not tu a, na za letna pan hong khia suk tu hi,” hong ci hi." 
Isaiah22:20 Topa in Shebna tungah, “Tuabang a pian ciang, Hilkiah ii tapa, ka naseampa Eliakim ka samsak tu hi." 
Isaiah22:21 Na zum puantual ama ka silsak tu a, na kawngkhau thuasak in, na thuneina theampo ama ka pia tu hi. Ama in Jerusalem le Judah mite tungah pa khat bang hi tu hi." 
Isaiah22:22 David ii suan le paal kumpipa nuai ah a pawlcing thuneina ama ka pia tu hi. Ama in zum tawtangte nei tu hi; ama hon sia, kuama in khak ngawl tu a, ama kha sia, kuama in hong ngawl tu hi." 
Isaiah22:23 Ama sia vanh khaina khat sawm bangin kip takin ka koi tu a, ama ii innkuan bup atu in maipha ngana ii a naak hi tu hi." 
Isaiah22:24 “Ahizong a beete le ama a bealhte theampo sia ama atu in vanhngit khat suak tu hi. Amate sia vanh khaina ah um le bealte a kikhai bangin ama tungah kibomkhai tu hi! 
Isaiah22:25 Tuabang a pian ciang kho takin a kikhen vanh khaina sia zuukin taak tu hi. Tua in a tungah a kikhai nate theampo ii bona hi tu hi,” ci hi. Topa pau zo hi." 
Isaiah23:1 Hisia in Tyre taw kisai thupuak ahi hi. Tuipi tung a pai teambaw hawlte awng, khuangai in kap vun! Teambaw tawlngakna na khuapi Tyre sia kilalsak zo hi; a innte le teambaw tawlngakna munte lalcip in om hi. Na teambawte Cyprus pan hong heak kik ciang hi thute na za uh hi." 
Isaiah23:2 Sidon sumvawtte awng, tau in kap vun!" 
Isaiah23:3 Egypt ngam ah a piang ante a lei a zuak tu le ngam theampo taw sum vawt kipee tu in tuipi kaantan in mihingte na paisak uh hi. 
Isaiah23:4 Sidon khuapi awng, na maimawl hi! Tuipi le tuipi thuk liante in nang hong nialin, “Kei ta khat zongh nei ngei bong. Tapate, tanute ka vaak ka taa ngei bua hi” ci hi." 
Isaiah23:5 Tyre khua lalna thu a zaak uh ciang Egypt mite ngawngawn liinglawngin thinkiam tu uh hi. 
Isaiah23:6 No Phoenicia mite awng, he in kap vun! Na suatak natu in Spain ngam zot tu hanciam vun!" 
Isaiah23:7 Hisia in taanghlai pekin a kisaat Tyre khua nuam hi thei na tu ziam? Tuipi kaantan in ngamthakte saatin a teang tu mite a puak sia hi khuapi ahi ziam? 
Isaiah23:8 Kumpi khuapi ahi, leitung ah ngual ii zatak, sumvawt thiamte ii khuapi ahi, Tyre khua ah hi bang theampo a pian natu in akua in ngeal ziam?" 
Isaiah23:9 Vaanglianbelpa Topa in ngeal hi. Amate ii nasepna tungah a kiphatsak nate a bo natu le a zatak mite maizum natu in Topa in ngeal hi. 
Isaiah23:10 Spain ngam ah ngamthak saatin a teang no mihingte awng, pai in lotho vun! No hong khoi tu kuama om nawn ngawl hi." 
Isaiah23:11 Topa in tuipi tungah a khut vaan in kumpi ngamte lawnthal zo hi. Phoenicia sum vawtna phualpite a kilalsak natu in ama in thupia zo hi. 
Isaiah23:12 Sidon khuapi awng, na lungdamna bo zo in, na mite in zawthawk thuak uh hi. Amate Cyprus ah a suakta zongin, ngammuang tuan ngawl tu uh hi." 
Isaiah23:13 (Tyre khuapi ngamsate tatna a suaksak sia Assyrian te hi ngawlin, Babylon te ahi uh hi. Ngal matna tausaangte a sa, Tyre khua kulhte a pheltham le khuapi susia in a nusiate sia Babylon te ahi hi.)" 
Isaiah23:14 Tuipi tung a pai teambaw naseamte awng, khuangai in kap vun! Na muan uh khuapi sia kilalcipsak zo hi." 
Isaiah23:15 Tyre khua sia kumpi khang khat, kum sawmsali sung a kimakngil tu hun hong theng tu hi. Tua kumte a cin zawkciang, Tyre sia hi la sungah pumpi kizuak numei bang hi tu hi:" 
Isaiah23:16 Kuama ii phaw ngawl, a khuangai huai pumpi kizuak numei awng, na tengtongh la in khuapi kiimkot in pai in! Pate khatvei na kung hong zot kik thei natu in tengtongh tumin na lasakte sa kik in." 
Isaiah23:17 Kum sawmsali a cin ciang, Topa in Tyre khuapi sia ama sep ngei sia ma seam kiksak tu a, leitung kumpi ngam theampo ah ama le ama a pumpi kizuak tu hi." 
Isaiah23:18 Ama ii sumvawtna pan a thalaw sumte Topa tungah ki aap tu hi. Ama in tua sumte kholcip thawthong ngawlin, Topa a bia mite in amate atu a kisamh an le puante leina in zangh tu hi." 
Isaiah24:1 Topa in leitang lalsakin ngamkhingsak tu hi. Ama in lei maitang heakcipin, a mite thethaang tu hi." 
Isaiah24:2 Mihing theampo — thiampite le mihingte silate le tote, vanh leite le vanh zuakte, sum pukthaakte le sumpute, a hau a zawng, a thuakna uh kibang kim tu hi." 
Isaiah24:3 Leitang tamhtham in kisiacip tu hi. Topa in son zo a tuabangin kivawt tu hi. 
Isaiah24:4 Leitang ko ngaw in tul hi; leitung buppi zawngkhal hi; lei le van a nii in lal hi. 
Isaiah24:5 Mihingte in Pathian thukhamte paltan na taw le a tawntungin a kikhomsuan tu a vawt thuciamna a siatsakna taw leitang ninsak uh hi. 
Isaiah24:6 Tua ahikom Pathian in leitang haamsiat zo hi. A mite in amate ii vawt bangin thuak uh hi. A nungta mihing tawm vaial hi. 
Isaiah24:7 Sapitkungte vul in sapittui tawm hi. Khatvei lai in a lungdamte tu in khuangai a," 
Isaiah24:8 a lungdamhuai tengtongh le khuang ngingte thim zo hi. 
Isaiah24:9 Sapittui a neak uh hang lungdam in lasa thei nawn ngawlin; kuama in a limna he nawn ngawl hi. 
Isaiah24:10 Khuapi sungah na theampo kibuai in om a, kihuk natu in amate a inn sung tek ah kikhabil uh hi." 
Isaiah24:11 Sapittui a om nawn ngawl hu in mihingte lampi ah au uh hi. Lungdamna mangtatam siat zo a, leitung pan kibosak zo hi." 
Isaiah24:12 Khuapi sia siacip in, a kongpite kisaat tham zo hi." 
Isaiah24:13 Hi sia in leitung theampo ah a om minam sim tungah a piang tu thu ahi hi. Tuasia in Olive ngate kithing siatin, sapitkung tung pan sapit sanghte a kilaw siat zawkciang an kila siat sa lo taw kibang tu hi." 
Isaiah24:14 A suakta sunte lungdam in lasa tu uh hi. Nitumna sangah a omte in Topa ii letna thu son tu a," 
Isaiah24:15 nisuana sangah a omte in ama pok tu uh hi. Tuipi dung ah a teang mihingte in Israel te ii Pathian, Topa pok tu uh hi." 
Isaiah24:16 Leitung a khuala belnate panin a thumaan Israel minamte a kipokna late ih za tu hi. Ahihang kei atu in lametna bangma om ngawl hi! Kei zawm dikdek ing! Ngual a leeheakte in tawp ngawlin thetheam lai a, ngual a leeheakna nasia vaial hi." 
Isaiah24:17 Mihing theampo awng, hong ngai tavun! Launate, dumte le thaangsia nate in note hong ngak nginge hi." 
Isaiah24:18 A lauhuai patauna pan suatak tu a hanciam pawpo dum sungah taak tu a, dum sung pan a suakta pawpo thaang sungah kiman tu hi. Vantung pan a biing a bealin a sun bangin nguazu tu a, lei tawdapte liing tu hi." 
Isaiah24:19 Leitang kektham, tamhtham in, kikhen keak tu hi." 
Isaiah24:20 Leitang mama sia zukham khat bangin hoi vatut tu a, vuipi sungah vui ii seam buk bangin huang tu hi. Leitung sia a mawnate in nengcip ngawpin, puk in tho kik ngei nawn ngawl tu hi." 
Isaiah24:21 Topa ii, tungsang vaang neite le leitung ukte daan a piak tu hun khat hong theng tu hi." 
Isaiah24:22 Dum sungah thongtaakte bangin Pathian in kumpi honkhat kaikhawm tu hi. Amate daan piak tu hun hong thet mateng Topa in thong sungah khabil tu hi. 
Isaiah24:23 Tha mial tu a, ni taang nawn ngawl tu hi, banghang ziam cile, Vaanglianbelpa Topa sia kumpi hi tu hi. Jerusalem khua Zion Mual panin ama in uk tu a, mipi lampuite in a vaangletna mu tu uh hi." 
Isaiah25:1 Topa awng, nangma in ka Pathian na hi hi; nang kong patoai tu a, na min ka pok tu hi. Nangma in nalamdangte na vawt siat zo hi; taanghlai pek a na ngealnate thumaan takin na vawt siat zo hi." 
Isaiah25:2 Khuapite na siasak zo a, a kulhte na lalcipsak zo hi. Ih ngalte ii sak kumpi innte bo zo hi." 
Isaiah25:3 A thahat ngammite in nang hong pok tu hi; a ngilo mite ii khuapite sungah nang hong kikiita tu hi. 
Isaiah25:4 Mizawngte le a cimawte in nang hong beal zo a, ngim le kham hun sungah ngammuanna nga uh hi. Vuipi vak ciang bukna na pia a, ni sat ciang nilim na pia hi. A ngilo mite in phalbi vuipi bangin le," 
Isaiah25:5 kongaw ngam ah nguatui hang bangin sim hi. Ahihang Topa nangma in ka ngalte na thimsak zo hi; mihing ngilote ii aunate, sun nisa sia meei ii a votsak bangin, na thimsak hi." 
Isaiah25:6 Vaanglianbelpa Topa in hi sung Zion Mual tungah leitung minamte theampo atu in anneakpoai khat — a limbel an le a phabel sapittui taw na vawtsak tu hi. 
Isaiah25:7 Hi lai ah minam theampo ii heena meeikaaite ama in thakhat thu in hepsak tu hi. 
Isaiah25:8 Vaanglianpipa Topa in thina a tawntungin mangthangsak tu hi! Ama in mihing theampo ii thitui nawlsak in, a mite ii leitung mun theampo ah a thuak maimawl na sia laaksak tu hi. Topa ama mama in ci zo hi!" 
Isaiah25:9 Tuasia a pian ciang, mihing theampo in, “Ama ih Pathian hi! Ama ka muang zo uh a, ama in hong suatak zo hi. Ama in Topa hi! Ama ka muang zo uh a, ama in kote hong ngum zo ahikom. tu in lungdam thinnuamin ka om uh hi” ci tu uh hi." 
Isaiah25:10 Topa in Zion Mual dal tu hi, ahihang nganhing eak sungah taangphawte a kitotcil bangin Moab mite kituanhcil tu hi." 
Isaiah25:11 Amate in tui op tu hanciam bangin a khut vaan tu uh hi, ahihang Pathian in amate niamsuksak tu a, a khutte cimaw in khuumsuk tu hi." 
Isaiah25:12 Topa in Moab te ii a muanhuai luphung saangte susia in leivui suaksak tu hi. 
Isaiah26:1 Judah ngam sungah mihingte in hi la a sak tu ni khat hong theng tu hi; Ih khuapi muanhuai hi! Pathian mama in tua luphungte hung hi! 
Isaiah26:2 Khuapi kongpite hongin a thumaan minam, a maan a seam a mihingte tumsak vun." 
Isaiah26:3 Topa awng, nang hong muangin, tupna kho a nei mihingte a kicing thinnopna na pia hi." 
Isaiah26:4 A tawntung Topa muang in; ama in a tawntungin eite hong dal tu hi. 
Isaiah26:5 Ama in mihing kiphasakte kiniamkhiaksak hi; amate teenna a muanhuai khuapi lalsakin, a kulhte cimhthamsakin leivui suaksak hi." 
Isaiah26:6 Zawthawk vawt a thuak mihingte in tu in tua khua zothal a, a peang nuai ah tuanhcil uh hi." 
Isaiah26:7 Topa awng, mihing phate atu in a lampi ngilsakin; a khualhawna lampi na tamkimsak hi." 
Isaiah26:8 Na deina bang kong zui uh a, nang sungah lametna kong nei uh hi; Kote deina theampo sia nangma na hi hi." 
Isaiah26:9 Zan in ka thin theampo taw nang kong thangai uh hi; leitung le a mihingte tungah thu na khen ciang amate theampo in thukhaikim thu sia he tu uh hi. 
Isaiah26:10 Mihing seksolte tungah nang dik napi in, amate in a maan a vawt tu he ngeingawl uh hi. Mihing thutangte teenna hi ngam ngawngawn zongh ah amate in khialna vawt veve lai hi; amate in na letna thusim ngawlin nial uh hi." 
Isaiah26:11 Na ngalte in amate daan na piak tu hunlam he ngawl uh hi. Topa awng, amate maizumsak in a, ngim ngasak in; amate atu in, na koisak sa daan piaknate thuaksak in. Na mite na it mama zia amate lak in." 
Isaiah26:12 Topa awng, kote mavan daupaina nong pia tu hi; kote ii matutna theampo sia nangma ii sepna hang ahi hi." 
Isaiah26:13 Kote Topa Pathian awng, kote sia ngual dangte in hong uk zo a, ahihang nangma bekma in kote Topa na hi hi." 
Isaiah26:14 Tu in amate thi zo a, nungta kik ngawl tu uh hi; amate ii thaa te thoto ngawl tu uh hi, banghang ziam cile nangma in amate daan na pia zo a, na lalsak zo hi. Kuama in amate phawk nawn ngawl hi." 
Isaiah26:15 Topa awng, nangma in koma ii minamte nong khangtosak a, a ngamngi theampo na keak hi, hi thu in nang hong thupisak hi." 
Isaiah26:16 Topa awng, na mihingte daan na pia hi, a thinna sa in nang tungah thu hong ngen uh hi." 
Isaiah26:17 Numei nausuak tu a tut ciang na sa in a au bangin Topa awng, kote nong ausak zo hi." 
Isaiah26:18 Kote in na sa bot sa in om ka hi uh hang bangma a piang bua hi. Kote ngam atu in ngalzawna bangma ka nei bua uh hi; bangma taangtut ka nei bua uh hi. 
Isaiah26:19 Ka mipui a thisate nungta kik tu uh hi! A pumpi uh nungta kik tu uh hi. Thaan sungah a mute theampo thoto tu a, lungdamin lasa tu uh hi. A tee vasip daaitui in leitung thathak a piak bangin Topa in taanghlai pek a, a thisate nungtasak tu hi." 
Isaiah26:20 Ka mihingte awng, na inn sung uh ah tum vun a, na inn uh khak vun. Pathian ii thin uukna a thai dong tawmvei sung buu zii vun." 
Isaiah26:21 Topa in vantung a teenna mun panin leitung mihingte mawna hangin daan pia tu in hong pai tu hi. Leitung ah a kithatlum ku mihingte kipualaak tu a, leitang in tua a kithatlumte seal nawn ngawl tu hi." 
Isaiah27:1 Tua ni in tuipi sungah a om nganhing pui sia a that tu le kizialin a kual, a kiitakhuai Leviathan ngul sia daan pia tu in Topa in a vaang nei, thisakna namsau zangh tu hi." 
Isaiah27:2 Tua ni in a dei huai sapithuan thu Topa in son tu a," 
Isaiah27:3 “Keima in tua huan cingin tui ka buak tawntung hi. Kuama ii suk siat thei ngawl tu in sun le zanin ka cing hi. 
Isaiah27:4 Sapit huan tungah ka thin uuk nawn ngawl hi. Mot tu ling le lingkungte a om le ka haltum tu hi. 
Isaiah27:5 Ahihang ka mite ii ngalte in, kei ii huuk tu a dei le, keima taw kilemna hong vawt tahen. Hi hi, amate in kei taw kilemna vawt tahen,” ci tu hi." 
Isaiah27:6 Mailam sangah, Jacob ii suan le paal ahi Israel mite, thingkung khat bangin zung tha tu a, hong mom in a paak palh tu hi. Leitung sia amate ii nga taw kidim tu hi." 
Isaiah27:7 Topa in Israel te ii ngalte nasia takin daan a piak za in Israel te daan pia ngawl a, a thi a bo zongh tam ngawl hi." 
Isaiah27:8 Topa in a mihingte ngamdang ah saltaang tu in a puakna taw daan pia hi. Topa in amate sia nisuana sang pan hong va vui ngilo in seamkeaksak hi. 
Isaiah27:9 Ahizong, Israel te ii mawnate sia, lawkite ii biaknatau suangte, leikaang bangin a kingoaicip zawkciang le Asherah numeipathian lim te a bo zawkciang, le ngimnamtui halna biaknataute a om nawn ngawl ciang bekin, kimaisak bek tu hi." 
Isaiah27:10 A muanhuai khuapi sia lalcip in om hi. Ngamkol khat bangin kinusia hi. Ngan thana le ngan lup thei na mun suak hi. 
Isaiah27:11 Thingbaakte kongaw in taltan a, numeite in thingkang tu in tom uh hi. Banghang ziam cile mihingte in bangma tel ngawl ahikom amate a Bitphuapa Pathian in amate khuangai huai sa ngawl tu a, hesuakna lak ngawl tu hi." 
Isaiah27:12 Tua ni in, Euphrates ngun pan kipan Egypt ngamngi dong, taangcilte khat po in a zungtaang a tak le a si a khen bangin, Topa in a mihingte khat zawkciang khat kaikhawm tu hi." 
Isaiah27:13 Tua ni a thet ciang, Assyria le Egypt ngam ah saltaang in a om Israel te theampo tua mun pan sap kikna tu lemle khat kitum tu hi. Amate hong cia a, Jerusalem khua ama ii mual thiangtho tungah Topa bia tu uh hi." 
Isaiah28:1 Israel kumpi ngam sia a lal ahi hi! Ama ii minthanna sia zukham a lampuite ii lu tungah a khuk paak taw a kivawt kumpi lukhute taw kibangin mang vadi tu hi. Paaknamtui pha tak kinoai napi in a kiphasak amate ii lutangte sia, zu a kham hu in khuaphawk ngawlin tua munah lumcip uh hi." 
Isaiah28:2 Topa in amate sim tu in a kinging a vaanglian, a thahat khat nei a, tua pa sia hui le ngial bang, ngua a biing a bealin sun bang, tuipawm hawktai bang, tuiliim bangin hong pai in tua ngam zothal tu hi." 
Isaiah28:3 Tua zukham lampuite kiphatsakna sia peang nuai ah kituanhcil tu hi. 
Isaiah28:4 Tua a kiphasak lampuite ii a kiamsuk minthanna sia theipal min hun ciang a min masa pawpo kilo in, a kine khawng papai bangin mang vangeu tu hi." 
Isaiah28:5 Vaanglianbelpa Topa sia a nungta lai ama mihingte atu in, paak taw a kivawt, a minthang kumpilukhu bang ahi tu ni khat hong theng tu hi." 
Isaiah28:6 Ama in thukhenmangte tungah thutang khennate heak theina thin pia tu a, khuapi kongpi cingte sia ngalte hong sim ciang thinhanna pia tu hi." 
Isaiah28:7 Kamsaangte le thiampite ngawngawn zu kham in hoi vatut uh hi. Sapittui le zuhang tam ne lei ahikom amate lungmangin lutu uh hi. Kamsaangte zukham lei ahikom Pathian ii a musak khol thute tel zo ngawl uh a, thiampite zongh zukham lei ahikom amate kungah a kipuak thute khensat thei ngawl uh hi." 
Isaiah28:8 A tona sabuai theampo luak taw kidim in, a thiangtho mun khat zongh om ngawl hi." 
Isaiah28:9 Amate in kei hong phunsan uh hi. Amate in, “Tua pa in akua ka hihil ci in kingaisun ziam? Akua in ama ii thupuak dei ziam? Ama ii thupuak sia a nu noai a ten tuung naunote atu bekin pha hi!" 
Isaiah28:10 Laimal khat zawkciang mal khat, lailam khat zawkciang lam khat, thu khat zawkciang thu khat ama in ei hong hil tiuteu tu hanciam hi,” ci uh hi." 
Isaiah28:11 Kei thuson nong ngai bua uh ahile, no tungah thu hong hil tu in kam tumdang a pau ngamdangmite Pathian in zangh tu hi." 
Isaiah28:12 Topa in note theampo tungah tawlngakna le noptuamna hong pia napi ama thu na ngai nuam bua uh hi. 
Isaiah28:13 Tua hu in laimal khat zawk mal khat, lailam khat zawk lam khat, thu khat zawk thu khat, Topa in no hong hil tu ahi hi. Tua zawkciang kal khat na suan simin na lutu tu uh hi. Note hong kiliamsak tu a, thaang sungah hong ki awksakin, thong hong kitaaksak tu hi." 
Isaiah28:14 Hisung Jerusalem khua panin hi mihingte a uk, no a kisathei mite awng, tu in Topa thu ngai vun." 
Isaiah28:15 Note in, thina taw thuciamna khat ka vawt zo uh a, mithi khua taw thukimna khat ka nei zo uh hi, ci in na kisuangtaak uh hi. Siatna hong pai ciang, hong pial tu hi ci in na kimuang uh hi, banghang ziam cile no hong huu tu in theamna le leilot thute na suang uh hi." 
Isaiah28:16 Tu in Vaanglianpipa Topa in, “Keima in Zion ah a kip a kho inn tawdap khat ka koi hi. Tua ii sungah innking suang sak khat ka phut a, tua tungah hi bang kammalte ki at hi, ‘A kho upna sia a thin zongh sau hi.’" 
Isaiah28:17 Thutang khenna sia inn tawdap atu in a teena khau hi a, thumaanna sia a thikbawk khaukhai hi tu hi,” ci hi. Ngialtang le vuipi in na belh na suan leilot thute theampo seamkeak tu a, tuikhangte in na ngam muanna bosak tu hi." 
Isaiah28:18 Thina taw na kiciam na kiphiat tu a, mithi khua taw na thukimna kiphiat tu hi. Siatna ii hong nawk ciang, note hong zothal tu hi." 
Isaiah28:19 Tuasia in note sia zing khat zawk zing khat hong suu kikik tu hi. Sun zong zan zong na thuak uh kul tu hi. Topa kung pan hong pai thuthak khat sim in, patauna thak veu hong puak tu hi!" 
Isaiah28:20 A kikhuathuang tham ngawl lupna tom mama khat tungah lum a, a kicing zo ngawl puanvan no mama khat silhin, mut tu a hanciam, paunak sungah mihing khat pa taw na kibang tu hi." 
Isaiah28:21 Topa in ama ngamtatna te a lamdang bang ahi hial zong — ama ii vawt tu a ngaisut sia vawt tu in Perazim Mualtung le Gibeon kuam ah ngal a sim bangin sim tu hi. Ama in ama ii a tel hak a nasepna khuang khim tu hi. 
Isaiah28:22 Keima ii kidop natu kong thupiak sia nuisan heak vun! Na nuisan uh le, na suatak natu uh haksa vaial zaw tu hi. Ngam buppi lalcipsak natu in Vaanglianbelpa Topa ii thukhensat nate ka za zo hi." 
Isaiah28:23 Kong paunate ngai vun; kong sonte nadon vun. 
Isaiah28:24 Lotho pa khat in an ciin natu a kingin ciang in tawlnga ngawl liangin lo laaih thapaai ngawl hi. 
Isaiah28:25 Khatvei lei laaihin a puua zawkciang ama in taang cite le an namtuisak ankung cite poai hi. Ama in zungtaang le mangtaang te a ngual in tu a, a lo hui sangah ancii dangte tu hi." 
Isaiah28:26 Ama in a nasep tu zia he hi, banghang ziam cile Pathian in ama hil zo hi." 
Isaiah28:27 Ama in simit ciite le an namtuisak ankung ciite saat natu in khetbuk ngit khat zangh ngeingawl hi; tua taangin ama in a zaang a pha bek ciangte zangh hi. 
Isaiah28:28 Ama in zungtaangte a lal tu liang dongin, a cil tan viuveu hi ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile antangte a zaantham ngawl tu in leang taw cilna zia ama in he hi." 
Isaiah28:29 Hi bang ciimna heakna theampo sia Vaanglianbelpa Topa kung pan hong pai ahi hi. Pathian ii ngealnate sia ciimna taw a ngeal hi a, tuate a tawntungin taangtung hi." 
Isaiah29:1 Pathian ii biaknatau ahi Jerusalem mama a lal ahi hi! David ii ngiana khuapi sia a lal ahi hi! A an neak poaite le poai khaamnate taw kum khat, kum nii omsak zii po vun," 
Isaiah29:2 tua zawkciang, “Pathian ii biaknatau” a kici khuapi tungah Pathian in siatna thengsak tu hi. Kaana le tauna om tu a, a khuapi buppi sia chi taw a kituam biaknatau khat bang hi tu hi." 
Isaiah29:3 Pathian in tua khuapi sia kiim uum in, sim tu in uumci tu hi." 
Isaiah29:4 Jerusalem sia leinuai pan pau nuamin a kisaan thithaa khat bang le leivui sung pan hong suak aw theap khat taw kibang tu hi. 
Isaiah29:5 Jerusalem awng, nang hong sim ngamdangmite theampo leivui bangin kimut keak tu a, a kiitakhuai ngalkapte sia taangphaw bangin leangkeak tu hi. Muanmawk ngawl het le thakhat thu in," 
Isaiah29:6 Vaanglianbelpa Topa in vanto le zinliing taw nang hong suatak tu hi. Ama in vuipi nguapi le a kuang vazak mei khiak tu a," 
Isaiah29:7 tuasia ciang Pathian ii biaknatau khuapi a sim minamte ii ngalkap hon theampo, a ngalhiam le a ngalvanh a vekpi — na theampo — zanin khua ngaisut bang, mangmat khat bangin mang vadi tu hi." 
Isaiah29:8 Jerusalem sim tu in a kikhawmtua minamte theampo sia, andu ngilkial in a pukthi dek mihing khat in a mang in an ne a, a khanlaw ciang a ngilva tuan ngawl, ahibuale tuidu dangtaak mihing khat in a mang in tui ne a, a khanlaw ciang a dangko in a thoto taw kibang tu hi." 
Isaiah29:9 Paisuak vun a, mawmaw in om vun! Paisuak vun a, mittaw in om vun! Sapittui ne ngawl bulin kham vun! Zu mal khat zongh ne ngawlin hoi vatut vun!" 
Isaiah29:10 Mutthip natu in Topa in na mut hong suaksak hi. Kamsaangte sia mihingte ii mittang hi tu a, ahihang Pathian in amate mit humcipsak hi." 
Isaiah29:11 Kamsaan mukholnate theampo ii a khiakna sia note hong lak ngawl tu hi; a kikhakcip laizial khat taw kibang tu hi. Laisim thei khat kungah paipui in, nang hong sim tu in sawl le te a laizial kikhak cip ahikom kei sim thei bong hong ci tu hi." 
Isaiah29:12 Laisim thei ngawl khat tungah tua lai pia in hong simsak ta'n ci in sawl le te, ama in kei sim thei bong ci in hong zo kik tu hi." 
Isaiah29:13 Topa in, “Hi mihingte in kong bia tu uh hi hong ci a, ahihang amate kammalte sia khiakna nei ngawlin, a thinsung in thudang ngaisun hi. Amate biakna sia bangma hi ngawlin, a teptee pak uh mihingte zui tu ngeinate bekma hi lel hi." 
Isaiah29:14 Tua ahiciang keima in amate muanmawk khol ngawlin a kiitakhuai tuasiatna, khat zawkciang khat ka tungsak tu a, lamdang ka sasak tu hi. Mihing ciimte a mawmaw suakin, a pilna theampo sia kimanna nei ngawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
Isaiah29:15 A ngealnate Topa tungah a iimcip nuamte, a lal ahi hi! Amate a tup a sawmte vawt ku uh a, kuama in hong mu buan te, hong he buan te ci in ngaisun uh hi." 
Isaiah29:16 Amate in na theampo lumlet uh hi. Beal seakpa le tungman a koisia thupi zaw ziam? Mihing khat ii a vawt sa na khat in a vawt pa tungah, “Nang in kei nong vawt bua hi,” ahibuale, “Na vawt sia nangma in na he bua hi,” ci thei tu ziam?" 
Isaiah29:17 Kam tepteena sungah, khuangei ngawlin taam thukpui sia lo ngam hong suak tu a, tuaciang lo ngam sia taam suak kik tu hi, ci hi." 
Isaiah29:18 Tua ni ciang, nangongte in laibu a ngingin a kisim sia za thei tu a, khuazing sungah a om mittawte in, a mit uh hakin khuamu tu uh hi." 
Isaiah29:19 Zawngkhal in, a kiniamkhiak mihingte in, Topa ahi, Israel ii a thiangtho Pathian ii a piak lungdamna sia khatvei nga kik tu uh hi." 
Isaiah29:20 Tuasia sia midangte a zawthawk vawtte le Pathian a melsiate ii bona hi tu hi. Mawnei theampo kilalsak tu hi. 
Isaiah29:21 Ngual dang a sonsiate, khialna lian neite, daan piak tu a khaktante le thumaan mihingte tungah thu khaikim in thu a khen thei ngawl natu leilot thusonte sia Pathian in lalsak tu hi." 
Isaiah29:22 Tua ahikom tu in ngimna pan Abraham a suatak, Israel te ii Pathian Topa in, “Ka mite awng, note hong kimaimawlsak nawn ngawl tu a, maizumna taw na mai uh daang nawn ngawl tu hi." 
Isaiah29:23 Keima kong piak tu tanote na mu uh ciang, keima sia Israel ii a thiangtho Pathian ka hi hunlam na tel tu uh hi. Zatakna nong pia tu uh a, lamdang sa in launa taw ka mai ah na ding tu uh hi." 
Isaiah29:24 Mihing mawmawte in thu tel thei tu a, a phuphun mihingte in a kihil tu uh sia lungdam tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Isaiah30:1 Topa in: “Judah ngamukte a lal ahi hi, banghang ziam cile amate in kei hong langpan uh hi. Amate in kei ngealna ahi ngawlte zui in, kei deina langpanin thuciamnate vawt a, mawna khat zawkciang khat vawt thawthua uh hi." 
Isaiah30:2 Amate in kei ngaisutna hong dongh ngawlin huna ngen tu in Egypt ah pai uh hi. Egypt te ii huuk tu a thangai manin, Egypt kumpipa muang uh hi." 
Isaiah30:3 Ahihang kumpipa in amate hu zo ngawl tu a, Egypt te ii huukna in siatna taw tawp tu hi." 
Isaiah30:4 Amate ii tongciinte sia Egypt te ii khuapite ahi, Zoan le Hanes theng zo napi," 
Isaiah30:5 Judah mite in huna a muanmawk uh bang a pia zo ngawl, a muanhuai ngawl minam khat sia a muan thaak phawphot uh a kisiik tu hi,” ci in son zo hi." 
Isaiah30:6 Hi thu sia thangsang sennealngam sungah a om nganhingte taw kisai Pathian thupuak ahi hi: “Tongciinte sia tawpite teenna, a nguu nei ngulte le a leang thei ngulpui omna, a lauhuai ngam sungah vak kawkoai uh hi.
