Jeremiah25:30 “Jeremiah awng, ka son theampo nangma in taangko tu ni hi. Hi mihingte tungah, ‘ Topa in vantung panin hawk tu a, vantung a saangna panin vanto tu hi. Ama in a mite hawksan tu a; sapitnga a cilpa khat bangin ama au tu hi. Leitung ah a om theampo in ama aw za tu a," 
Jeremiah25:31 leimong dongin a aw hawl tu hi. Topa in minamte tungah thu vawt khat nei hi. Ama in mihingte theampo thu sit tu in paipui tu a, mi seksolte thisak tu hi. Topa in son zo hi,’ ci in,” son tu ni hi." 
Jeremiah25:32 Vaanglianbelpa Topa in tuasiatna sia ngam khat zawkciang ngam khat ah theng tu a, vuipi suangval khat sia leimong a khuala na munah va tu hi, ci hi." 
Jeremiah25:33 Tua ni in Topa ii thalup sa mithi luangte sia leimong khat panin leimong khat ah kithethaang in om tu hi. Kuama in amate kaa ngawl tu a, a luangte phaam in phum ngawl tu hi. Amate sia ninthuk kiseng bangin lei tungah kiseng tu hi." 
Jeremiah25:34 No lampuite awng, kap vun, ka mite a cing a keamte awng, a ngingin kap vun! Tau in leivui sungah liik vun. Note hong kithalup tu hun hong theng zo a, tuutalte bangin note hong kisem tu hi." 
Jeremiah25:35 Na suatakna tu uh lampi om ngawl tu hi. 
Jeremiah25:36 Thinngimin tau in kap vun, banghang ziam cile Topa in a thin uukna taw in na minam hong susia zo a, na ngamnuam uh a siacipsa in nusia zo hi." 
Jeremiah25:37  
Jeremiah25:38 Tawpi khat in akua a nusiat bangin Topa in a mite nusia zo hi. A lauhuai ngal kidona le Topa ii a kiitakhuai thin uukna in hi ngam sennealngam suaksak zo hi. 
Jeremiah26:1 Josiah ii tapa Jehoiakim, Judah kumpi a sua zawk po ciang," 
Jeremiah26:2 Topa in keima tungah, “Biakinnpi huang sungah ding in a, Judah ngam khuapite pan tua munah Pathian bia tu in hong pai mihingte tungah son tu a kong sawlte theampo thangsak in. Kheet nei heak in." 
Jeremiah26:3 Tua mihingte in na thu hong ngai tu a, a ngamtat siatnate kheal thei tha tu hi. A kikheal uh le, amate ii seksol ngamtatna hang a, amate suksiat tu in ka tup ka ngaisut sia ka kheal kik tu hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah26:4 Topa in mipite tungah son in ci a hong sawlna panin, “Keima, Topa ii kong hilcianna sia na zuina uh taw ahizong" 
Jeremiah26:5 note kungah kong paisak nithi ka naseam kamsaangte ii kammalte na nadonna uh taw ahizong, ka thu nong nit tu kisamh hi, ci in hong son zo khi hi. Amate ii a sonte na ni ngei bua uh hi." 
Jeremiah26:6 Thu na ni bua lalai uh le, Shiloh khua tungah ka vawt bangin hi Biakinnpi tungah ka vawt tu a, leitung minamte theampo in hi khuapi ii min sia kihaamsiatna in zangh tu uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah26:7 Thiampite, kamsaangte le mihing om theampo in Biakinnpi sungah ka son hi thute za uh hi." 
Jeremiah26:8 Topa ii hong thupiak theampo ka son tu ka man zawkciang amate in kei hong man in, “Hi bang na son hu in thalup tu in kilawm ni hi!" 
Jeremiah26:9 Banghangin Topa min suangin hi Biakinnpi sia Shiloh khua bang suak tu a, tuaciang hi khuapi kisusia cip in kuama teang ngawl tu hi ci ni ziam,” ci in au keak uh hi. Tuaciang mihonte in kei hong uumci uh hi." 
Jeremiah26:10 Judah ngam lampuite in hi thu a zaak uh ciang, kumpi inn pan Biakinnpi ah manlangin pai uh a, Kongpi Thak ah omna la uh hi." 
Jeremiah26:11 Tuasia ciang thiampite le kamsaangte in ngam lampuite le mihonte tungah, “Hisia pa thidaan piak tu kilawm hi, banghang ziam cile ih khuapi siatson hi. Na bil uh taw na za tek zo uh hi,” ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah26:12 Tuaciang keima in, “Hi Biakinnpi le hi khuapi ka siat sonna na zaak uhte theampo sia, Topa in taangko tu a kei hong sawl thute hi." 
Jeremiah26:13 Na nuntakzia le na sep uhte kheal nanak vun a, Topa na Pathian thu ni vun. Tuabangin na hi uh le, no tungah siatna thengsak tu in a sonsa sia pan Topa in a thin kheal tu hi." 
Jeremiah26:14 Kei ka hile, noma khut sungah ka om hi! Pha na sak, maan na sak uh bang pawpo in ka tungah hong vawt tavun." 
Jeremiah26:15 Ahihang hi thu telcian vun: kei nong that uh le noma le hi khuapi sung mihingte sia a mawbaang ngawl mihing khat that a mawnei na tang tu uh hi, banghang ziam cile hi kidop natu thu, no tungah son tu in hong sawl pa sia Topa ahi hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah26:16 Tuaciang ngam lampuite le mihonte in thiampite le kamsaangte tungah “Hisia pa in Topa ih Pathian min suangin ei tungah thu hong son hi; ama kithatlum ngawl tu hi,” ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah26:17 Tua zawkciang, upate pawlkhat ding to in a kikhawm mipite tungah," 
Jeremiah26:18 “Hezekiah sia Judah kumpi ahi lai in, Moresheth khua mi kamsaang Micah in mi theampo tungah Vaanglianbelpa Topa in hi bangin, ci hi, ‘Zion sia lo khat bangin kitho tu hi; Jerusalem sia ninthuk suak tu a, Biakinnpi dinna mual sia dui suak tu hi.’" 
Jeremiah26:18 “Hezekiah sia Judah kumpi ahi lai in, Moresheth khua mi kamsaang Micah in mi theampo tungah Vaanglianbelpa Topa in hi bangin, ci hi, ‘Zion sia lo khat bangin kitho tu hi; Jerusalem sia ninthuk suak tu a, Biakinnpi dinna mual sia dui suak tu hi.’" 
Jeremiah26:19 Hezekiah kumpipa le Judah mite in Micah thatlum ngawl uh hi. Hezekiah in Topa zatak vawtin Topa ii mai pha a nga natu in hanciam zaw lai hi. Amate tungah tuasiatna ka thengsak tu hi a ci sia Topa in a thin kheal kik hi. Tu in eima in a lauhuai tuasiatna khat eima tung ma ah ih thengsak dektak hi!” ci uh hi. 
Jeremiah26:19 Hezekiah kumpipa le Judah mite in Micah thatlum ngawl uh hi. Hezekiah in Topa zatak vawtin Topa ii mai pha a nga natu in hanciam zaw lai hi. Amate tungah tuasiatna ka thengsak tu hi a ci sia Topa in a thin kheal kik hi. Tu in eima in a lauhuai tuasiatna khat eima tung ma ah ih thengsak dektak hi!” ci uh hi. 
Jeremiah26:20 (Kiriath Jearim khua pan Shemaiah ii tapa Uriah a kici midang khat om hi. Ama in Jeremiah bang keak ma in Topa min suangin hi khuapi le minamte son sia hi. 
Jeremiah26:21 Jehoiakim kumpipa le a ngalkapte le uliante in Uriah ii thuson a zaak uh ciang, kumpipa in Uriah a kithalup natu in hanciam hi. Ahihang tua thu Uriah in za hi; tuaciang ama lau in Egypt ngam ah tai a, suakta hi." 
Jeremiah26:22 Ahizong Jehoiakim kumpipa in Achbor ii tapa Elnathan le midang pawlkhat sia Uriah man tu in Egypt ngam ah paisak hi. 
Jeremiah26:23 Amate in Uriah sia Jehoiakim kumpipa kungah puak kik uh hi. Kumpipa in Uriah thatlumsak in a luang sia nautaang kiphumna thaan sungah vawk hi.) 
Jeremiah26:24 Ahihang keima sia Shaphan ii tapa Ahikam in hong panpui ahikom thalup tu in mipite khut sungah thalup tu hong ki aap ngawl hi. 
Jeremiah27:1 Josiah ii tapa Zedekiah in Judah ngam kumpi a sua tuungin Topa in keima tungah," 
Jeremiah27:2 savun khau le thing hakkol khat vawtin ka ngawng ah bul tu in hong sawl hi. 
Jeremiah27:3 Tuaciang Jerusalem khua ah Zedekiah kumpipa taw kimu tu a hong pai tongciinte tungtawnin Edom, Moab, Ammon, Tyre, le Sidon kumpite tungah thu khat puak tu in Topa in keima hong sawl hi." 
Jeremiah27:4 Vaanglianbelpa Topa, Israel ii Pathian, Topa in hi bangin ci hi ci in a kumpite tungah a son natu in a tongciinte thupia tu in kei hong sawl hi:" 
Jeremiah27:5 “Ka vaangletna le ka thahatna taw in leitung mihing nam le leitung ah a teang nganhingte theampo ka bitphua a; tuate sia ka piak nop pawpo tungah ka pia hi. 
Jeremiah27:6 Ka naseam Babylon kumpipa Nebuchadnezzar khutnuai ah hi minamte theampo a koi pa sia Keima ka hi hi, tuaciang ngamsate ngawngawn in ama ii na ka seamsak hi." 
Jeremiah27:7 Minam theampo in ama ii na seam tu uh a, ama ngam a bo tu hun a thet mateng in minamte in ama ii tapa le a tupa ii na sepsak tu uh hi. Tua zawkciang ama minam in a thahat minamte le kumpi liante ii na sepsak tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah27:8 “Ahihang minam khat pawpo, ahibuale kumpi ngam khat in, Nebuchadnezzar ii ukna sungah a tum bua ahile tua minam sia, Nebuchadnezzar ii ka suksiat cipsak mateng in keima in ngal, kialpi le natna taw in daan ka pia tu hi." 
Jeremiah27:9 Na kamsaangte ahibuale, mangmatna taw ahizong, mithite ii thaa samna taw ahizong mitbum taw ahizong mailam thupiang tute a sonkhol thei a ci khat pawpo ii thu ngai heak vun. Amate theampo in Babylon kumpipa khutnuai ah na tum ngawl natu in no hong son hi." 
Jeremiah27:10 Amate in no hong theam a, na ngam uh panin a khuala na ah na paina tu uh hong vawt tu uh hi. Keima in no kong hawlkeak tu a, hong kisusia tu hi." 
Jeremiah27:11 Ahihang minam khat pawpo in Babylon kumpipa khut sungah tum a, a na a seam le, a ngam ah lotho tu le a teang tu in ka om suaksak tu hi. Keima, Topa in ka ci zo hi,” hong cisak hi." 
Jeremiah27:12 Judah kumpipa Zedekiah tungah ta bangma in, ka son a, “Babylon kumpipa khutnuai ah tum in. Ama le a mite ii na sepsak in, tua hile na nungta tu hi." 
Jeremiah27:13 Banghangin nang le na mite sia ngal ahibuale kialpi ahibuale natna taw in thi tu nu ziam? Tua thu sia Babylon kumpipa khutnuai ah a tum ngawl minam khat pawpo tungah piang tu hi ci a, Topa ii sonsa thu ahi hi." 
Jeremiah27:14 Babylon kumpipa khutnuai ah na tum ngawl natu in hong son kamsaangte ii thu ngai heak vun. Amate in no hong theam hi. 
Jeremiah27:15 Kamsaangte sia ka sawl hi ngawl a, keima min suangin leilot thu hong son hi, Topa mama in ci hi. Tua ahikom ama in no hong bengkeak tu a, noma le hi leilot thute hong son kamsaangte kithatlum tu hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah27:16 Tuaciang Topa ii hi bangin a ci sia thiampite le mipite tungah ka son hi: “Biakinn sum le vanh manphate Babylon panin kila kik pal tu hi ci a, kamsaangte thuson sia ngai heak vun. Amate in no hong theam hi." 
Jeremiah27:17 Amate ii thuson ngai heak vun! Babylon kumpipa khutnuai ah tum vun, tua hile na nungta tu uh hi! Banghangin hi khuapi sia ninthuk suak tu ziam?" 
Jeremiah27:18 Amate in kamsaang tatakte hi in, ka thupuak a nei uh le, Biakinnpi sung le kumpi inn sungah a om lai sum le vanh manphate Babylon ah a kipuaksak ngawl natu in keima, Vaanglianbelpa Topa tungah hong ngen ta uh hen.”" 
Jeremiah27:19 (Nebuchadnezzar kumpipa in Judah kumpipa, Jehoiakim ii tapa Jehoiachin le Judah ngam le Jerusalem khua lampuite Babylon ah a paipui lai in khuamte, taau tuikuang, leangte le a dang biakinn sum le vanh manpha pawlkhat nusia hi.)" 
Jeremiah27:20  
Jeremiah27:21 “Jerusalem khua sung Biakinnpi sung le kumpi inn sungah a kinusia sum le vanh manphate taw kisai in Keima, Vaanglianbelpa Topa Israel ii Pathian in hi bang kong son sia ngai vun:" 
Jeremiah27:22 Tuate sia Babylon ah kipua tu a, keima ii ka kat mateng in tua munah om suak tu hi. Tua zawkciang tuate ka la kik tu a, hi munah ka koi kik tu hi. Keima, Topa in ka ci zo hi,” ci in ka son hi." 
Jeremiah28:1 Zedekiah kumpi a sua zawk a kum lina ii a tha ngana, tua kum sung ma in Gibeon khua mi Azzur ii tapa kamsaang Hananiah in Biakinnpi sungah kei hong paupui hi. Thiampite le mipite om honna ah ama in keima tungah," 
Jeremiah28:2 Vaanglianbelpa Topa, Israel ii Pathian in “Babylon kumpipa vaangletna ka susia zo hi." 
Jeremiah28:3 Nebuchadnezzar kumpipa ii Babylon ah a paipui biakinn sum le vanh manpha vanh manphate theampo kum nii sungin hi munah ka ciapui kik tu hi. 
Jeremiah28:4 Keima in Judah kumpipa, Jehoiakim ii tapa Jehoiachin zongh Babylon ah saltaang a, a pai Judah mite theampo ka ciapui kik tu hi. Hi hi. Keima in Babylon kumpipa vaangletna ka susia tu hi. Keima, Topa in ka ci zo hi,” ci in hong son hi." 
Jeremiah28:5 Tuasia ciang thiampite le Biakinnpi sungah a ding mipite theampo ii mai ah, keima in Hananiah tungah:" 
Jeremiah28:6 “Lamdang hi! Topa in hisia seam tu in lamen khi hi! Topa in na sonkholna sia taangtungsak tu a, thongtaakte bangin a kikai mihing theampo le Biakinnpi sum le vanh manpha vanh manphate theampo Babylon panin hong ciapui kik tu hi ci in ka um takpi hi." 
Jeremiah28:7 Ahihang nang tung le mipite tungah ka son thu sia ngai in. 
Jeremiah28:8 Nang le kei ii om hun ma in a om, taanghlai a thuson kamsaangte in minam tam mamate tung le a thahat a kumpi ngamte tungah ngal, kialpi le natna theng tu hi ci in sonkhol zo uh hi." 
Jeremiah28:9 Ahihang kilemna le thinnopna hong theng tu hi ci in a sonkhol kamsaang pa sia, ama ii sonkholnate a taangtung takpi ahile Pathian ii sawl tatak kamsaang in kisaang thei pheang tu hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah28:10 Tuasia ciang Hananiah in ka ngawng pan hakkol hong la in, a bebekin thiaktan hi," 
Jeremiah28:11 tuaciang ama in mipi mai ah: “Nebuchadnezzar kumpipa ii minam theampo ii ngawng ah a bul hakkol sia hi bangin ka thiaktan tu hi Topa in ci hi; tuaciang ama in hi nasep sia kum nii sung sang seam tu hi,” ci in son hi. Tua zawkciang ka nusia hi." 
Jeremiah28:12 Hisia zawk tawmvei ciang Topa in keima tungah," 
Jeremiah28:13 pai in a, Hananiah kungah hi bang son tan: “ Topa in, thing hakkol khat sia thiaktan zo peu tu ni hi, ahihang thik hakkol khat taw ka laih tu ci hi." 
Jeremiah28:14 Vaanglianbelpa Topa, Israel ii Pathian in hi minamte theampo tungah thik hakkol ka bul tu a, amate in Babylon kumpipa Nebuchadnezzar ii na a seam tu uh hi, ci hi. Topa in ngamsate ngawngawn in Nebuchadnezzar ii na ka seamsak tu ci hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah28:15 Tua zawkciang Hananiah tungah hi thu ka son zawkciang, “Ngai in, Hananiah awng! Nang sia Topa ii hong sawl na hi bua hi. Hi mite leilot thu na umsak hi." 
Jeremiah28:16 Tua ahikom Topa ama mama in nang kong heam tu hi ci hi. Tu kum bo ma in na thi tu hi, banghang ziam cile Topa langpan tu in mipite na son zo hi,” ka ci lai hi." 
Jeremiah28:17 Tua kum a tha sali tha in Hananiah thi hi. 
Jeremiah29:1 Jerusalem khua panin Nebuchadnezzar in Babylon ah thongtaak in a paipui thiampite, kamsaangte, mipi lampuite le a dangte theampo ii tungah lai khat ka thaak hi." 
Jeremiah29:2 Hi lai sia Jehoiachin kumpipa, a nu, kumpi inn sung uliante, Judah ngam le Jerusalem lampuite, khutthiam mite le naseam thiamte a saltanna munah a kipaipui zawkciang ka at ahi hi." 
Jeremiah29:3 Tua laithak sia Judah kumpipa Zedekiah ii Babylon kumpipa Nebuchadnezzar tungah a thaak hi a Shaphan ii tapa Elasah le Hilkiah ii tapa Gemariah khut tungah ka pia hi. Tua laithak sungah: 
Jeremiah29:4 “Vaanglianbelpa Topa Israel ii Pathian in Jerusalem panin Babylon ah Nebuchadnezzar ii thongtaakin a paipuisak tua mite theampo tungah hi bangin ci hi: 
Jeremiah29:5 ‘Inn sa vun a teang vun. Huan vawt vun a, a sungah na ciin uhte ne vun." 
Jeremiah29:6 Kiteang vun a ta nei vun. Ama te zongh ta a nei thei natu in na tate uh kiteangsak vun. Na pungto tu uh a, na kiamsuk buatu uh hi." 
Jeremiah29:7 Thongtaak a kong paisakna khuapite ii phattuam natu in naseam vun. Amate taangin ka tungah thu ngen vun, banghang ziam cile amate a nuamsa uh le no zong na nuamsa tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah29:8 Note sungah a teang kamsaangte in hikale maisang thu ka sonkhol thei hi a ci midangte in hikale na theamsak ngawl natu in Keima, Topa Israel ii Pathian in na kidop natu kong hilkhol hi. Amate ii mangmatte na thudon heak vun." 
Jeremiah29:9 Amate in ka min suangin no tungah leilot thu hong son uh hi. Amate ka sawl bua hi. Keima, Vaanglianbelpa Topa in ka son zo hi,’ ci hi." 
Jeremiah29:10 “ Topa in, ‘Babylon ah na om zawk uh kum sawmsali a cin ciang no kong thin nopmawkna kong lak tu a, na khua na tui uh ah na cia kik natu uh in ka kamciam ka len tu hi." 
Jeremiah29:11 No atu in tupna ka neite sia na tuasiat natu hi ngawlin mi nuamsa na sua natu le mai sangah lametna kong piak natu ngealnate ahi hunlam keima bek in ka he hi. 
Jeremiah29:12 Tuaciang kei nong sam tu uh hi. Kei kung hong zuanin thu nong ngen tu uh hi, tuaciang kong zo tu hi." 
Jeremiah29:13 Kei nong zong tu uh a, nong mu tu uh hi, banghang ziam cile na thinsung theampo taw nong zon tu uh hang ahi hi." 
Jeremiah29:14 Hi hi, Kei nong mu tu uh a, na ngam uh ah kong koi kik tu hi, ka ci hi. Note kong thethaangna ngam theampo le mun theampo panin kong kaikhawm kik tu a, saltaang a kong puak ma na omna munah kong ciapui kik tu hi. Keima, Topa in ka ci zo hi.’" 
Jeremiah29:15 “ Topa in Babylon pan kamsaangte note hong pia hi, ci nu hi." 
Jeremiah29:16 David ii kumpi ngam a uk kumpipa le hi khuapi mite ahi noma taw thongtaak bangin a paikhawm ngawl na mealheakte taw kisai in Topa thusonte ngai vun. 
Jeremiah29:17 Vaanglianbelpa Topa in, ‘Keima in amate tungah ngal, kialpi le natna ka tungsak tu a, amate sia neak thei ngawl theinga muat bang ka hisak tu hi." 
Jeremiah29:18 Ngal, kialpi le natna taw amate ka zuizen tu a, leitung minam theampo in tuasia a mu uh ciang lau tu uh hi. Mun theampo ah amate ka thethaang tu a, amate tung thupiangte hangin mihingte ingh in lau tu uh hi. Mihingte in amate nunau in, a min uh sia kihaamsiatna in zangh tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah29:19 Hi thu sia amate tungah tung tu hi, banghang ziam cile amate in ka naseam kamsaangte tungtawn a ka puak tawntung ahi ka thupuak sia a nit ngawl uh hang ahi hi. Amate in ngai nuam ngawl uh hi." 
Jeremiah29:20 Babylon ah saltaang in kong puak note theampo awng, Keima, Topa ii ka son sia ngai vun,’ ci hi." 
Jeremiah29:21 “Vaanglianbelpa Topa, Israel ii Pathian in, ama min suangin no tungah leilot thu hong son, Kolaiah ii tapa Ahab le Maaseiah ii tapa Zedekiah te ii thu son zo hi. Topa in amate sia Babylon kumpipa Nebuchadnezzar khut sungah aap tu a, ama in noma mu tang ma in thatlum tu hi, ci zo hi." 
Jeremiah29:22 Jerusalem pan Babylon ah thongtaak bangin a kipuak mite in khat pawpo a haamsiat nop uh ciang, ‘Babylon kumpipa ii a hingtang a mei sung a em Zedekiah le Ahab bangin Topa in nang hong vawt tahen!’ ci tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah29:23 Hi bangin a thuak tu uh ma ahi hi, banghang ziam cile amate in a lauhuai mawna khialnate — palngul mawna vawtin Topa ii min suangin leilot thute son uh hi. Hi thu sia Topa ii dei ngawl ahi hi; ama in amate ii vawt theampo he a, ama sia a langpan tetti khat ahi hi. Topa in ci zo hi,” ci in ki at hi." 
Jeremiah29:24 Vaanglianbelpa Topa, Israel ii Pathian in Nehelam mi Shemaiah atu in thupuak khat kei hong pia hi, Shemaiah in ama min mama taw in Jerusalem khua mite theampo le Maaseiah ii tapa thiampi Zephaniah tung le thiampi dangte theampo ii tungah lai khat thaak hi. Shemaiah in Zephaniah tungah a thaak hi lai sungah:" 
Jeremiah29:24 Vaanglianbelpa Topa, Israel ii Pathian in Nehelam mi Shemaiah atu in thupuak khat kei hong pia hi, Shemaiah in ama min mama taw in Jerusalem khua mite theampo le Maaseiah ii tapa thiampi Zephaniah tung le thiampi dangte theampo ii tungah lai khat thaak hi. Shemaiah in Zephaniah tungah a thaak hi lai sungah:" 
Jeremiah29:25  
Jeremiah29:26 “ Topa in Jehoiada taangin nangma thiampi in hong koi zo hi, tua ahiciang tu in nang sia Biakinnpi sungah ulianbel na hi hi. Kamsaang khat in a kivawt tawm a mawmaw theampo ii ngawng ah thikkual bulin na khii tu sia nangma vaipuak ahi hi." 
Jeremiah29:27 Banghangin mipite tungah kamsaang khat bang a thu a son Anathoth khua mi Jeremiah tungah hi bangin vawt ngawl ni ziam? 
Jeremiah29:28 Ama thu son tu sia khaam kul hi, banghang ziam ci le ama in Babylon ah a om mipite tungah, tua munah khuangei ma thongtaak tu uh hi, inn na sa tu a, teangin, huan vawt a, na ciinte na ne tu uh hi, a ci hang ahi hi,” ci in at hi." 
Jeremiah29:29 Zephaniah in tua laithak sia kei hong sim hi," 
Jeremiah29:29 Zephaniah in tua laithak sia kei hong sim hi," 
Jeremiah29:30 tuasia ciang Topa in," 
Jeremiah29:31 Shemaiah ii thu taw kisai in Babylon ah thongtaakte theampo tungah hi thu puak in ci in kei hong sawl hi: “Keima, Topa in, Shemaiah le a suan a paalte theampo daan ka pia tu hi. Ama in ka sawl ngawl bulin kamsaang khat bangin no tungah thu hong son in leilot thute no hong umsak uh hi. Ama in no sungah suan le paal nei ngawl tu hi. Ama sia ka mite atu in a pha ka vawt tu nate a mu tu in nungta ngawl tu hi, banghang ziam cile ka mite ii hong langpan natu in ama in sawl hi. Keima, Topa in ka ci zo hi.”" 
Jeremiah29:32  
Jeremiah30:1 Topa, Israel ii Pathian in," 
Jeremiah30:2 keima tungah: “Kong son theampo laibu khat sungah at in," 
Jeremiah30:3 banghang ziam cile Israel le Judah ka mite a ngam ka piak kik tu hun hong theng tu hi. A taanghpupite tungah ka piaksa ngam ah ka heak kik sak tu a, amate in tua ngam tang kik tu uh hi. Keima, Topa in ka son zo hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah30:4 Topa in Israel le Judah mite tungah: 
Jeremiah30:5 “Launa le, patauna aw khat ka za a, thinnopna aw ahi bua hi." 
Jeremiah30:6 Tu in tawlnga in ngaisun vun! Pasal khat in nau a nei thei ziam? Tua ahile banghangin pasal sim in numei nautun bangin a ngil hum ziam? Banghangin a kuama po a mai daang ziam? 
Jeremiah30:7 A lauhuai mama ni khat hong theng tu a; nidang taw kitee thei ngawl tu hi — ka mite ii ngimna thuak hun hi tu a, ahihang amate suakta veve tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah30:8 Vaanglianbelpa Topa in: “Tua ni hong thet ciang, a ngawng uh ah a kibul hakkol ka thiaktan tu a, a thikkolte ka vawk tu hi, amate in ngamdangmite ii silate hi nawn ngawl tu hi." 
Jeremiah30:9 Amate in Topa a Pathian le, kumpi ka suasak tu David ii suan le paal khat ii na seam zaw tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah30:10 “Ka mite awng, lau heak vun; Israel mite awng, patau heak vun. Na thongtaakna a khualana ngam panin kong suatak tu hi. Inn ah nong cia kik tu uh a, thinnuam takin na teang tu uh hi; na ngammuang tu uh a, kuama in no hong lausak ngawl tu hi." 
Jeremiah30:11 Note kungah kong pai tu a kong ngum tu hi. Kong thethaangna ngammite theampo ka susia tu a, ahihang no kong susia buatu hi. Daan thuak ngawlin no kong omsak buatu hi; ahihang daan kong piak ciang, a kilawm in kong pia tu hi. Keima, Topa in ka son zo hi,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah30:12 Topa in a mite tungah, “Na meima uhte kibawl thei ngawl a, Na liammate uh kidamsak thei ngawl hi." 
Jeremiah30:13 No hong ou tu kuama om ngawl a, Na meima bawl natu uh zatui om ngawlin, na dam tu uh sia muanmawk om ngawl hi." 
Jeremiah30:14 Na itte theampo in no hong mangil zo a; amate in no hong awlmaw nawn ngawl hi. Keima in note sia ngal khat bangin kong sim a, na mawnate tam a, na seksolna uh lian ahikom na daan thuak uh nasia mama hi." 
Jeremiah30:15 Na liammate hangin phuphun nawn heak vun; Na kibawl thei buatu hi. Na mawnate tam a, na seksolna uh lian ahikom hi bangin daan kong pia hi." 
Jeremiah30:16 Ahihang tu in no hong valhtumte theampo kivalhtum tu a, na ngalte theampo thongtaak tu in kipaipui tu uh hi. No hong zawthawk vawtte theampo kizawthawk vawt tu a, no hong suttolte theampo sutolna thuak tu hi." 
Jeremiah30:17 No kong damsak kik tu hi; Na ngalte in, ‘Zion sia a kipuavawk sa khat hi a; kuama in awlmaw ngawl uh hi,’ a ci tazong na liammate ka damsak tu hi. Keima, Topa in ka son zo hi,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah30:18 Topa in, “Ka mite a ngam ka pia kik tu a, a innkuan sim tungah hesuakna ka nei tu hi; Jerusalem khuapi kisa kik tu a, a kumpi inn sia a omna ngei ma ah kikoi kik tu hi." 
Jeremiah30:19 Tua munah a teang mihingte in pokna lasa tu uh a; lungdam in au tu uh hi. Ka thupha piakna taw amate pung tu uh a; ka thupha piakna in amate upatna ngasak tu hi. 
Jeremiah30:20 Nidang a, a nei vaangletna ka pia kik tu a, a minam kip takin ka phut kik tu hi; amate a zothaw theampo daan ka pia tu hi." 
Jeremiah30:21 Amate a uk tu sia amate ii minam sung pan ma in hong pai tu a, amate ii kumpitapa sia a minam sung pan ma in hong pai tu hi. Ka sam ciang ama in kei hong zuan tu hi, banghang ziam cile sam ngawlin akua hong pai ngam tu ziam? Amate sia ka mite hi tu uh a, keima in amate ii Pathian ka hi tu hi. Keima, Topa in ka son zo hi,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah30:22  
Jeremiah30:23 Topa ii thin uukna sia vuipi nguapi hi a, mi seksolte lu tungah kinuaingawp tu hi. Vawt tu in a tup theampo a taangtun siat mateng in ama tawlnga ngawl tu hi. Maisang hun ah a mite in hi thu telthiang tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah30:24  
Jeremiah31:1 Topa in, “Israel minamte theampo ii Pathian ka hi hun hong theng tu a, amate in ka mite hi tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah31:2 Thina pan a suakta tua mite sennealngam sungah hesuakna ka lak hi. Israel mite toithaina a thangai uh ciang," 
Jeremiah31:3 a khualana pan amate kungah ka kilangh hi. Israel mite awng, no kong it tawntung hi, tua ahikom itna kip kong lak tan tu hi." 
Jeremiah31:4 Khatvei ma kong pua kik tu hi. Khatvei ma na daalkual khuangnote na la kik tu uh a, lungdam in na laam tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah31:5 Khatvei ma Samaria mual tungah sapithuan na vawt kik tu uh a, tua sapit a suante in sapithuan pan a piangte ne tu nu hi." 
Jeremiah31:6 Hi hi, ngalvilte in Ephraim mualtung panin, ‘Ih Topa Pathian kung Zion ah paito ka tawng’ ci in a sam tu hun hong theng tu hi,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah31:7 Topa in, “Minamte sung panin a lianbel, Israel atu in lungdamin lasa vun. Pokna lasa vun, ‘ Topa in a mite ngum zo a; a taanglaite theampo suatak zo hi,’ ci vun." 
Jeremiah31:8 Keima in amate saksang pan ka paipui tu a, leimong pan ka kaikhawm tu hi. Mittaw peangbaite, numei naupaaite le nausuak dektakte zongh amate taw hong pai tu uh hi, Amate sia minam lian khatin hong cia kik tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah31:9 Ka mite lampui in ka heakpui kik laitak amate kap kawm, thungen kawmin hong heak kik tu uh hi. Tui omna lui ah amate lam ka pui tu a, lam nuamna ah amate lutu ngawl tu uh hi. Keima in Israel te ii pa khat bang ka hi a, Ephraim sia ka tapa lianbel ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah31:10 Topa in, “Minamte awng, hong ngai tavun a, ka kammalte a khuala na tuipi vaalbo ah thangsak vun. Ka mite ka thethaang hi, ahihang amate ka kaikhawm tu a, tuucing pa in a tuuhon a cin bangin ka keam tu hi." 
Jeremiah31:11 Israel mite ka suaktasak zo a, a thahat minam khat ii khut sung panin ka hun zo hi." 
Jeremiah31:12 Amate hong pai in Zion mual tungah lungdam in lasa tu uh a, ka letsongte taw lungdam mama tu uh hi — Ka letsongte sia antang, sapittui, olive thau, tuu le khuite ahi hi. Amate sia pha tak a, tui a kibuak husuan khat taw kibang tu a; amate in a kisap theampo nei tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah31:13 Tuaciang ngaknute laam a, lungdam tu uh hi, tuaciang pasal, khangmoi, khanghaam te lawp in om tu hi. Amate ka heeneam tu a, a kaana te thinnopna, a heenate lungdamna ka suaksak tu hi." 
Jeremiah31:14 Thiampite an phabel taw ka vaak tu a, ka mite ii a taangsap theampo ka pia tu hi. Keima, Topa in ka son zo hi,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah31:15 Topa in, “Ramah khua ah aw khat kiza a, thin nat tatakna taw kaana aw ahi hi. Rachel sia a tate atu in kap hi; a tate om nawn ngawl a, ama sia heenep tu uuk ngawl hi." 
Jeremiah31:16 Kap nawn heak in a, na thituite nawl in. Na tate atu in na sep theampo thaman nga ngawlin na nguaksuak buatu hi; amate sia ngalte ii ngam panin hong heak kik tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah31:17 Na mai sang atu in lametna om hi; na tate inn hong cia kik tu uh hi. Keima, Topa in ka ci zo hi." 
Jeremiah31:18 “Israel mite khuangai in a mau ka za hi, ‘ Topa awng, ko sia a kizual ngawl nganhing khat bang ka hi uh hi, ahihang thu ni tu in kote nong hil hi. Ko hong ciapui kik ta'n; na kungah hong cia tu in kithoai khu hi, Topa kote Pathian awng." 
Jeremiah31:19 Nangma kung pan ka puapial uh hi, ahihang kong heak kik paih nuam uh hi. Daan nong piak zawkciangin khuangai in ka kun uh hi. Ka no lai a mawna khialna ka vawt uh hu in maizum, minpaan in ka om uh hi’." 
Jeremiah31:20 “Israel awng, nang sia ka thangaibel ka tapa na hi a, ka itbel ka ta na hi hi. Na min ka law simin itna taw kong phawk hi. Nangma kong ngaisun tawntung a; kong hesuak tu hi." 
Jeremiah31:21 Lampi ah lamlaknate phutin, lampi ciamtee in; na nusiat lampi sia zong kik in. Hong heak kik tavun, Israel mite awng, na nusiat uh khuate ah hong cia kik tavun." 
Jeremiah31:22 Bang tanvei haisaang tu nu ziam, upna nei ngawl mihingte awng? A thak le a tumdang na khat ka bitphua zo a, numei khat in pasal khat a sungsiat bangin tumdang hi,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah31:23 Vaanglianbelpa Topa Israel ii Pathian in, “Mihingte a ngam ka piak kik ciang, Judah ngamsung le a khuate sungah amate in, ‘ Topa in Jerusalem mual thiangtho, ama teenna mun thiangtho sia, thupha pia tahen’ khatvei ma ci kik tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah31:24 Judah ngamsung le a khuate theampo sungah mihingte teang tu a, lothote, tuucingte, a tuuhonte taw om tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah31:25 A ngim a toi mihingte thathak ka nguan tu a, ngilkial in, a tha zawmte theampo an ka vaak tu hi." 
Jeremiah31:26 Tuasia ciang mihingte in, ‘Lum in ka mu a, thathak taw ka khanlaw nuam hi,’ ci tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah31:27 “Keima, Topa in Israel le Judah ngam sia mihingte le nganhingte taw ka kidimsak tu hun hong theng tu hi, ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah31:28 Kidawm takin amate ka zunglok, ka kaikeak, ka lotthal, ka suksiat le ka lalsak lai bangma in kidawm takin amate ka suan kik tu a ka laamto kik tu hi." 
Jeremiah31:29 Tua hun hong thet ciang, mihingte in, ‘Nu le pate in a thuk sapitngate ne a, Ahihang a tate a ha uh khim hi,’ ci nawn ngawl tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah31:30 Tuabang hi ngawlin, Sapit nga thuk a ne pawpo a hakhim tu a; a kuama po ama ii mawna hangin thi tu hi,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah31:31 Topa in, “Israel mite le Judah mite taw thuciamna thak khat ka vawt tu hun hong theng tu hi." 
Jeremiah31:32 Tua thuciamna sia a taanghpupite a khut uh pan kai in Egypt ngam pan ka pusua pui lai a, a taanghpupite taw ka vawt uh thuciamna lui taw kibang ngawl tu hi. Keima sia amate ii a pasal bang hi napi amate in tua thuciamna zui ngawl uh hi." 
Jeremiah31:33 Israel mite taw ka vawt tu thuciamna thak sia hi bang hi tu hi: amate sung sangah ka thukham ka koi tu a, a lungtang tungah tuate ka at tu hi. Keima in amate ii Pathian ka hi tu a, amate sia ka mite ahi tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah31:34 Topa a heak natu uh in amate sia a mipuite kuama ii thu hil kul ngawl tu hi, banghang ziam cile a nobel pan a lianbel dongin kei hong he siat tu uh hi. Keima in amate ii a mawnate ka maisak tu a, a khialnate ka ciamtee nawn buatu hi. Keima, Topa in ka son zo hi,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah31:35 Topa in sunin khuavaksak tu in ni hong pia a, zan in a taang tu in tha le aksite hong pia hi. Ama in tuipi kiloksak in hawksak hi; ama ii min sia Vaanglianbelpa Topa ahi hi." 
Jeremiah31:36 Leitung paizia a kip lai theampo in, Israel sia minam khat in om tu hi ci in, kamciam pia hi." 
Jeremiah31:37 Vantung a kitee thei ni ciang le lei ii a taw dopphate a ki ettel thei hun khat ni khat ni ciang in amate ii a sep a vawt te theampo hu in ama in Israel mite nial pheang tu hi. Topa in ci zo hi. 
Jeremiah31:38 Topa in, “Hananel Tausaang panin nitumna sang Kiing Kongpi dong Jerusalem khua buppi sia keima ii khuapi in a kisak kik tu hun hong theng tu hi." 
Jeremiah31:39 Tuaciang ngamngi sia tua mun panin nitumna sang Gareb mual dong le Goah kiimkot teng hi tu hi. 
Jeremiah31:40 Mithi phumna le ninteak vawkna leikuam buppi le Kidron lui tungsia ah lote theampo, nisuana sang Siphu Kongpi ciang dong, keima a tu in mun thiangtho hi tu hi. Khuapi sia kipheltham, kisusia kik ngei nawn ngawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah32:1 Topa in Zedekiah ii Judah kumpi a sua zawk kum sawm a cin kum, Kumpi Nebuchadnezzar zongh Babylon kumpi a sua zawk kum sawm le kum liat a cin kum in kei hong paupui hi." 
Jeremiah32:2 Tua hunin Babylon kumpipa ii ngalkaphonpi in Jerusalem sim a, kumpipa innhuang sungah kei hong khacip hi." 
Jeremiah32:3 Zedekiah kumpipa in kei sia tua munah thong hong khum a, Topa ii son bang a ka taangko hu in kei hong mawsiat hi, Topa sonna pan, “Babylon kumpipa in hi khuapi ka lasak tu a," 
Jeremiah32:4 Zedekiah kumpipa suakta ngawl tu hi. Ama sia Babylon kumpipa khut sungah ki aap tu a, ama taw maitang kisi in thuson tu hi." 
Jeremiah32:5 Zedekiah sia Babylon ah kipaipui tu a, ama kungah ka kihiil kik mateng tua munah om zii tu hi. Babylon te a do hial zongin, zo ngawl tu hi. Keima, Topa in ka ci zo hi”." 
Jeremiah32:6 Topa in kei hong sonna panin," 
Jeremiah32:7 ka pano Shallum ii tapa Hanamel sia ka kungah hong pai tu a, Benjamin ngamsung Anathoth khua ah a lo sia hong lei ta'n, banghang ziam cile a lei thei tu sung panin ka mealheak kuungbel nangma na om hi, hong ci tu hi." 
Jeremiah32:8 Tua zawkciang, Topa ii hong son bangma in, Hanamel sia ka omna zum huang sung, ka kungah hong pai in tua lo lei tu in kei hong sawl hi. Tua ahikom Topa in keima tungah hong son tatak hunlam ka he hi." 
Jeremiah32:9 Hanamel tung panin tua lo ka lei a, ama atu in khaiteena taw ka tee hi; a man sia ngunntang sawm le sali tung hi." 
Jeremiah32:10 Thukimna lai vawtin letmat ka thu a, thu hong heak pui tu in tetti te sam in, sumteena taw sum ka tee hi." 
Jeremiah32:11 Lo kileina lai nii — khat sia tazeik kituum ngawl a, a dang khat sia tazeik kituumin thukimna teng kikhum hi — keima kungah a nii ma in ka la a," 
Jeremiah32:12 Mahseiah ii tupa, Neriah ii tapa Baruch tungah tua laite ka pia hi. Tua thukimna laite sia ama tungah Hanamel le lo kilei thukimna lai tungah letmat a thu tetti te le zum huang sungah a to mihingte mai ah ka pia hi." 
Jeremiah32:13 Amate theampo mai ah keima in Baruch tungah," 
Jeremiah32:14 “Vaanglianbelpa Topa Israel ii Pathian in hi thukimna laite tazeik kituum sia hikale a kituum ngawl sia hikale a nii ma in la a, kum tampi a omcing thei tu in leibeal sungah na koi natu in thu hong pia zo hi." 
Jeremiah32:15 Vaanglianbelpa Topa, Israel ii Pathian in hi ngam sungah a om innte, lote le sapithuante kilei kik tu hi, ci zo hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah32:16 Lo kileina lai sia Baruch tungah ka piak zawkciang thu ka ngen a," 
Jeremiah32:17 “Vaanglianpipa Topa awng, nangma in lei le van sia na vaangletna le na thahatna taw na vawt hi; nang atu in a haksa lei bangma om ngawl hi." 
Jeremiah32:18 Mihing tul tampi te tungah tawntung itna na lak zo a, ahihang a nu a pate ii mawna khialnate hu in mihingte daan na pia si hi. Nangma in a lian, a vaang nei Pathian na hi a; Vaanglianbelpa Topa na hi hi." 
Jeremiah32:19 Nangma in ngealna phate na nei a, naliante na seam hi; mihingte ii a sep a vawt theampo na mu a, amate ii diannate taw kizui in thaman na pia hi." 
Jeremiah32:20 Nidang lai in Egypt ngam ah nalamdang laknate le a tumdang nate na vawt a, tu ciang dongin Israel mite sung hikale minam dangte theampo sungah hikale na vawt lai hi, tuasia hu in, tu in mun theampo ah hong kihe hi." 
Jeremiah32:21 Ih ngalte a patausak nalamdang le a tumdang nate lakna taw in Egypt ngam panin Israel na mite na paipui natu in na vaangletna le na thahatna na zangh hi. 
Jeremiah32:22 A taanghpupite tungah na kamciamsa bangma in, hi a hau ngam le leipha ngam sia amate na pia hi." 
Jeremiah32:23 Ahihang amate in hi ngam hong theng a, ngam a nei uh ciangin na thupiak ni ngawl a, na thuhilna bangin ngamta ngawl uh hi; vawt tu a na thupiakte bang mama vawt ngawl uh hi. Tuasia hu in hi suksiatna theampo amate tungah na thengsak hi." 
Jeremiah32:24 “Babylon te in khuapi a laak natu in khuapi kiimkot ah leivum ciangin uumci a, tuaciang sim uh hi. Ngal, kialpi le natna in hi khuapi sia amate ii khut sung thengsak tu hi. Na son sate theampo a taangtun na mu thei hi." 
Jeremiah32:25 Ahizong, khuapi sia Babylon te in a la tu hi zo napi tetti te mai ah lo lei tu a, thu hong pia sia nangma Vaanglianpipa Topa na hi veve hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah32:26 Tuaciang Topa in keima tungah," 
Jeremiah32:27 “Keima in Topa ka hi a, minam theampo ii Pathian ka hi hi. Kei atu in a haksa lei bangma om ngawl hi." 
Jeremiah32:28 Hi khuapi sia Babylon kumpipa Nebuchadnezzar le a ngalkaphonpi khut sungah ka pia tu a; amate in la in," 
Jeremiah32:29 mei taw hal tu uh hi. Kei hong thin uuksak a innkhum tung a Baal atu ngimnamtui a halna le a dang pathian te atu sapittui sungsukin a biakpiakna mun ahi innte haltum tu hi. 
Jeremiah32:30 Amate taanghthu a kipatciil pan a sep a vawtna uh taw Israel mite le Judah mite in ka thin hong nuamsak ngawl a, ka thin hong uuksak hi." 
Jeremiah32:31 Hi khua mite in khuapi a sak ni pan kipan ka thin hong uuksak a hong thangsiasak hi. Tua khuapi sia suksiat tu in ka khensat zo hi," 
Jeremiah32:32 banghang ziam cile Judah mite le Jerusalem khua mite in a kumpite le a lampuite, a thiampite le a kamsaangte uh taw a sia a vawt uh hang ahi hi." 
Jeremiah32:33 Amate in kei hong nungngat uh a, ka hil tawntung hi napi hong ngai nuam ngawlin he nuam ngawl uh hi." 
Jeremiah32:34 Kei hong biak natu a, a kisa Biakinnpi sungah amate in a kiihuai milimte ngawngawn koi a, ninsak zo uh hi." 
Jeremiah32:35 Amate in a tapate le a tanute taw Molech pathian a biakpiak thei natu in Hinnom Kuam sungah Baal a tu biaknataute vawt uh hi. Hi bang a vawt tu sia amate tungah thu ka pia bua hi. Tuabang khat a vawt tu le tuaciang Judah mite mawna vawt a suasak tu sia ka ngaisun tha ngei bua hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah32:36 Topa Israel ii Pathian in kei tungah, “Jeremiah awng, mipite in, ngal kidona, kialpi le natna in hi khuapi sia Babylon kumpipa khut sungah thengsak tu hi ci uh hi. Tu in kong son tu thudang sia ngai in." 
Jeremiah32:37 Ka thin uuk, ka thinsona taw in ka thethaangna ngamte theampo pan mihingte ka kaikhawm tu hi, hi munah ka ciapui kik tu a, ngam muang in ka teangsak tu hi." 
Jeremiah32:38 Tua zawkciang amate sia ka mite hi tu a, keima sia amate ii Pathian ka hi tu hi." 
Jeremiah32:39 A nuntakna uh ah tupna khat bek ka pia tu hi: tua tupna sia amate ii phat natu le a suan le a paalte ii phat natu in, a tawntung keima hong zatak vawt tu uh ahi hi." 
Jeremiah32:40 Amate taw a tawntung atu in thuciamna khat ka vawt tu hi. Amate atu in na pha ka vawtte ka tawlnga ngei buatu a, keima kung pan a puapial ngeingawl natu in a thinsung theampo taw keima hong kiitak natu in ka vawt tu hi." 
Jeremiah32:41 Amate atu in naphate ka vawtna ah dik ka sa tu a, hi ngam sungah amate ka teang suaksak tu hi." 
Jeremiah32:42 “Hi mite tungah hi tuasiatna ka thetsak bangma in ka khapsa na pha theampo amate ka pia tu hi. 
Jeremiah32:43 Mihingte in, hi ngam sia mihing hikale nganhing hikale ii ten ngawlna sennealngam bang hi tu a, tua ngam sia Babylon te khut sungah kipia tu hi, ci uh hi. Ahihang hi ngam sungah a om lote khatvei kilei kik tu hi." 
Jeremiah32:44 Mihingte in tua lote lei in lo kileina lai tungah min thu, tazeik tuum tu a, tetti nei tu uh hi. Hi thu sia Benjamin ngam, Jerusalem kiim ah khuanote, Judah ngam khuate le tuaciang mualtung ngam, mualpeang ngam le Judah thangsang ngam ah om khuate ah piang tu hi. Keima in mihingte a ngam ah ka teangsak kik tu hi. Keima, Topa in ka son zo hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah33:1 Kumpi innhuang sungah thongtaak a ka om laitakin Topa ii thupuak sia ka kung hong theng kik hi. 
Jeremiah33:2 Leitung a vawt, a piangsak le a omna munah a koi Topa in keima hong paupui hi. A min Topa a kici, ama in," 
Jeremiah33:3 “Kei nong sam uh le kong zo tu hi; a thu na heak ngawl lai a lamdangte le thu tumdangte kong son tu hi. 
Jeremiah33:4 Keima, Topa, Israel ii Pathian in Jerusalem innte le Judah kumpi inn sia ngalte in kiim uum a, a sim hu in siatham tu hi ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah33:5 Mihing kimkhatte in Babylon te do tu uh hi, amate in ka thin uuk ka thangsiatna taw ka velvawk tu mithi luangte taw innte dimsak tu uh hi. A mite ii a tatsiatnate hu in hi khuapi ka nungngat zo hi." 
Jeremiah33:6 Ahihang hi khuapi le a mite ka puuapha kik tu hi, ciidamna amate ka pia kik tu hi. Amate a kicing thinnopna le ngammuanna ka lak tu hi." 
Jeremiah33:7 Judah mite le Israel mite ka nuamsasak tu a, nidang a om ngei bangin ka pua kik tu hi." 
Jeremiah33:8 Keima tungah hong vawt mawna khialnate panin ka thiansua tu a, amate ii mawna khialnate le hong langpannate ka maisak tu hi." 
Jeremiah33:9 Jerusalem sia kei atu in lungdamna, patoaina le kiphatsakna ii kipatna hi tu hi; leitung ah minam om theampo in Jerusalem atu na pha ka vawtnate le hi khuapi atu nopsakna ka piakna thute a zaak uh ciang, lau in liing tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah33:10 Topa in, “Mihingte in hi mun sia, mihing zongh nganhing zongh ii teen ngawlna senneal ngam taw kibang hi ci uh hi. Amate ci bang hi peu hi; Judah khuate le Jerusalem khua lampite awngthong a; tua munah mihing zongh nganhing zongh teang ngawl hi. Ahihang hi munte ah," 
Jeremiah33:11 Lungdam thinnuam in au nate, tuaciang mopoai ngualnopna awngingte na za kik tu uh hi. Mihingte in ka Biakinnpi ah lungdamko biakpiaknate pia in la a sak na za tu uh hi; amate in, ‘Vaanglianbelpa Topa tungah lungdamko vun, banghang ziam cile ama pha a, ama ii hong itna kip tawntung hi,’ ci tu uh hi. Hi ngam sia nidang bangma in ka nuamsasak kik tu hi. Keima Topa in ka son zo hi,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah33:12 Vaanglianbelpa Topa in, “Mihing nganhing a teang ngawl sennealngam bang ahi, hi ngam sungah nganthana tu mun om kik tu a, tua munah tuucingte in a tuute cing tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah33:13 Mualtung ngam, mualpeangte le, Judah ngam thangsang, Benjamin ngamsung khuate, Jerusalem kiim a khuanote le Judah ngamsung khuate ah tuucingte in a tuute phakza khatvei ma sim kik tu uh hi. Keima, Topa in ka son zo hi,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah33:14 Topa in, “Israel le Judah mite tungah kamciam ka piak sia ka taangtunsak tu hun hong theng tu hi." 
Jeremiah33:15 Tua hun ciang David ii suan le paal sung pan thumaan thutang khat kumpi in ka teal tu hi. Tua kumpipa in ngamsung theampo ah thudik le thutang in a maan sia seam tu hi. 
Jeremiah33:16 Judah mite le Jerusalem mite sia kisuatak tu a, ngam muangin teang tu uh hi. Tua khuapi sia ‘ Topa, Eite Ngupna’ kici tu hi." 
Jeremiah33:17 Keima, Topa in Israel kumpi tu in David suan le paal khat om tawntung tu a," 
Jeremiah33:18 Levi minam sung pan meihal biakpiaknate, antang taw biakpiakna le sangaw biakpiaknate vawtna ah ka na a seam tu in thiampite om tawntung tu hi ci sia kong kamciam hi,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah33:19 Topa in keima tungah," 
Jeremiah33:20 “A hun tek a tun simin hong pai tawntung thei natu in sun hun le zan hun taw thuciamna ka vawt zo hi; tua ahiciang tua thuciamna kiphel tan thei ngeingawl tu hi. 
Jeremiah33:21 Tuasia bangma in a suan khat kumpi a hi tawntung natu sia ka naseam David taw thuciamna khat ka vawt zo hi, tuaciang Levi minam sung pan a thiampite taw zong ka na hong sepsak tawntung natu in kiciamna khat ka vawt zo hi; tua thuciamnate kiphel tan thei ngeingawl tu hi." 
Jeremiah33:22 Van ah aksite le tuipivaal ah sennealte a kisim zawk ngawl bangma in amate phakza sim zawk ngawl ahi natu in keima in ka naseampa David ii suan le paalte le Levi minam sung panin thiampite ka pungsak tu hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah33:23 Topa in keima tungah," 
Jeremiah33:24 “Ka tealsa innkuan nii, Israel le Judah te sia keima in niil zo hi ci a mihingte ii a son na phawk ziam? Tua ahikom amate in ka mite nomu a minam khat in ngaisun nawn ngawl uh hi." 
Jeremiah33:25 Ahihang keima Topa in sun le zan taw thuciamna khat ka vawt zo a, lei le van a uk thukhamte ka vawt zo hi." 
Jeremiah33:26 Hi nate ka vawt takpi bangma in, Jacob ii suan le paalte le ka naseam David taw ka vawt thuciamna sia ka len nginge tu hi. Abraham, Isaac le Jacob ii suan le paalte a uk tu in David ii suan le paalte khat ka teal tu hi. Ka mite ka hesuak tu a, ka nuamsasak kik tu hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah34:1 Babylon kumpipa Nebuchadnezzar, ama ngalkaphonpi le amate a hu a khutnuai ah a om minamte theampo ii ngalkapte in Jerusalem le a naina khuate a sim uh lai in Topa in keima hong paupui hi." 
Jeremiah34:2 Topa Israel ii Pathian in Judah kumpipa Zedekiah kungah pai in hi bangin son ta'n, “Keima, Topa in hi khuapi sia Babylon kumpipa khut sungah ka aap tu a, ama in haltham tu hi." 
Jeremiah34:3 Na suakta buatu hi; hong kiman tu a, ama tungah hong ki aap tu hi. Nangma in ama na mu tu a, maitang kisi in na paupui tu hi, tua zawkciang Babylon ah na pai tu hi." 
Jeremiah34:4 Zedekiah awng, nangma taw kisai thu kong son sia ngai in. Nang sia ngal sungah hong kithatlum ngawl tu hi." 
Jeremiah34:5 Thin nuam takin na thi tu hi, tuaciang nangma mai ah kumpite ahi, na taanghpupite a kiphum uh ciang mihingte ii ngimnamtui a hal bangma amate in nang atu in ngimnamtui hal tu uh hi. Amate in, ‘Ih kumpipa thi thong ei!’ ci in nang hong kaa tu uh hi. Keima, Topa in ka son zo hi” ci in hong sawl hi." 
Jeremiah34:6 Tuaciang hi thu sia Jerusalem khua sung Zedekiah kumpipa kungah ka puak hi," 
Jeremiah34:7 tua hun sia Babylon kumpipa ii ngalkaphonpi in tua khuapi a sim laitak ahi hi. Tua ngalkaphonpi in Judah ngam sungah a taanglai kulh taw a ki uum khuapi dang ahi Lachish le Azekiah zongh sim uh hi. 
Jeremiah34:8 Kuama in Israel a mipuite sila in a nei ngawl natu in Zedekiah kumpipa le Jerusalem mite in pa ahizong numei ahizong Hebrew a mipui silate a suatak natu in thukimna khat vawt uh hi. 
Jeremiah34:9  
Jeremiah34:10 Mipite le a lampui theampo in a silate a suatak tu uh le sila a, a kai kik nawn ngawl natu thukim uh hi. Amate in a silate suaktasak uh hi," 
Jeremiah34:11 ahihang nungsang ciang amate in a thin kheal kik a, sila suak tu ma in kai kik uh hi." 
Jeremiah34:12 Tua zawkciang Topa 
Jeremiah34:13 Israel ii Pathian in mipite tungah thuson tu in keima hong sawl na pan in: “Keima in na taanghpupite uh a sila kaaina Egypt ngam pan ka suatak lai in amate taw thuciamna khat ka vawt hi. 
Jeremiah34:14 Keima in Hebrew sila khat pawpo sia kum luk sung na na uh hong sepsak zawkciang kum sali a cin simin na suaktasak tu uh hi ci in amate tungah ka son hi. Ahihang na taanghpupite in ka thu hong nadon bua uh a ka sawl bang hong mang bua uh hi. 
Jeremiah34:15 Tu nung hiat ma in na thin na kheal uh a, ka diksakte nong seam uh hi. Na vekpi ma in Israel na mipuite sia suataksak tu na thukim uh a, keima hong kibiakna Biakinnpi sung ka mai ah thuciamna khat na vawt uh hi." 
Jeremiah34:16 Ahihang na thin uh na kheal leleau uh a, ka min nong daisak uh hi. Amate ii uukna bang a na suataksak sa uh silate sia note theampo in na la kik uh a, sila in na kai kik uh hi." 
Jeremiah34:17 Tua ahikom keima, Topa in ka thu nong ni bua uh hi kong ci hi: na Israel mipuite suatakna na pia bua uh hi. Tua ahile pha mama hi, suatakna kong pia tu hi: tua suatakna sia ngal, natna le kialpi taw thina ahi hi. No tungah kong vawtna taw leitung mite theampo ka lausak tu hi." 
Jeremiah34:18 Judah te le Jerusalem uliante in kumpi inn sungah uliante, thiampite le lampuite theampo taw kikopin amate ii tum nii a sua khuital khat ii a phel niite kilaklaw ah lampaina taw in keima taw thuciamna khat a vawt uh hi. Ahihang amate in tua thuciamna palsat in thuciamna sung thu omte mang ngawl uh hi. Tua ahikom amate ii khuital tung a vawt bangin hi mite tungah ka vawt tu hi." 
Jeremiah34:19  
Jeremiah34:20 Amate sia amate a thatlum nuam a ngalte ii khut sungah ka aap tu a, a luangte sia vacimte le ngamsate in ne tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah34:21 Judah ngam Zedekiah kumpipa le a uliante zongh amate a thatlum nuamte ii khut sungah ka aap tu hi. Amate sia noma hong simna pan a tawlnga Babylon ngalkaphonpi khut sungah ka aap tu hi. 
Jeremiah34:22 Keima in thu ka pia tu a, hi khuapi ah amate hong heak kik tu uh hi. Amate in tua khuapi simin la tu a, mei taw haltham tu uh hi. Keima in Judah ngam khuate sia kuama ii teen ngawlna sennealngam khat bang ka suaksak tu hi. Keima, Topa in ka son zo hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah35:1 Josiah ii tapa Jehoiakim sia Judah ngam ah kumpi a sep lai in, Topa in keima tungah," 
Jeremiah35:2 “Rechab ii bee le phungte kungah va pai ta'n a paupui ta'n. Tuaciang Biakinnpi sung inndoi khat ah amate paipui in sapittui pia in,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah35:3 Tuaciang Rechab ii bee le phungte a vekpi — (Habazziniah ii tapa ahi a dang Jeremiah ii tapa) Jaazaniah le a suapuipate theampo le a tapate theampo — 
Jeremiah35:4 Biakinnpi ah ka paipui hi. Igdaliah ii tapa kamsaang Hanan ii nungzuite ii inndoi sungah amate ka paipui hi. Hi inndoi sia Biakinnpi sungah ulian thupi khat ahi, Shallum ii tapa Maaseiah ii inndoi tungah om a, ulian dangte ii inndoite taw zong kinai hi." 
Jeremiah35:5 Tuaciang sapittui taw a kidim hai le kuangte sia Rechab mite mai ah ka lui a, amate tungah, “Sapittui ne vun,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah35:6 Ahihang amate in, “Sapittui ne ngawl khu hi. Ka taanghpupi uh Rechab ii tapa Jonadab in eima ih hizong ih suan ih paalte ahizong sapittui peuma ih ne ngei buahet tu hi hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah35:7 Ama in inn sa heak vun, lotho heak vun, sapithuan vawt heak vun ahibuale tuate lei heak vun hong ci lai hi. Kote khualmi bangin ka teenna uh hi ngam sungah ka om suak thei natu in puanbuk sungah ka ten tawntung natu thu hong pia hi." 
Jeremiah35:8 Jonadab ii kote thu hong hilna theampo ka zui uh hi. Koma mama in sapittui ka ne ngei bua uh a, ka zite, ka tapate, ka tanute zongh in a ne ngei bua uh hi." 
Jeremiah35:9 Ko ten natu in inn ka sa bua uh a — puanbukte sungah teangin — sapithuante, lote, ahibuale an zongh ka nei bua uh hi. Kote taanghpupi Jonadab ii hong sawl theampo ka seam siat uh hi." 
Jeremiah35:10  
Jeremiah35:11 Ahihang Nebuchadnezzar kumpipa in hi ngam a sim ciang Babylon le Syria ngalkaphonpite a pial tu in Jerusalem khua zot tu ka khensat uh hi. Tua hu in Jerusalem ah ka teang uh hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Jeremiah35:12 Tuaciang Vaanglianbelpa Topa, Israel ii Pathian in, va pai ta'n a Judah mite le Jerusalem mite tungah “Keima, Topa in, banghangin ka thu ngai nuam ngawl a kong thupiakte mang nuam ngawl nu ziam ci in no kong dongh hi." 
Jeremiah35:13  
Jeremiah35:14 Sapittui neak ngawl natu in Jonadab ii a thupiak sia, a tu a tate in zui a, tuni ciang dong kuama in ne ngawl hi. No tungah kong sawson hangin, ka thu nong ni bua uh hi." 
Jeremiah35:15 Ka naseam kamsaangte theampo kong puak tawntung zo a, na ngamtatna a siate kheal in a maan sia nasep natu hong son zo uh hi. Noma le na taanghpupite tungah kong piaksa ngam sungah na ten top thei natu uh in, pathian dangte bia ngawl, a na seam ngawlin na kidop natu uh thu hong hil khol hi. Ahihang note in ka thu nong ngai nuam bua uh a nong awlmawk bua uh hi." 
Jeremiah35:16 Jonadab ii tu le tate in a taanghpupite ii thupiakna mang uh hi, ahihang note in ka thu nong ni bua uh hi." 
Jeremiah35:17 Tua ahikom tu in, Keima, Vaanglianbelpa Topa, Israel ii Pathian in no, Judah mite le Jerusalem mite tungah ka kamciamsa suksiatna theampo kong tungsak tu hi. Hi bangin note kong vawt tu hi, banghang ziam cile thu kong son ciang nong ngai bua uh a, kong sam ciang nong zo bua uh hi,” a ci teng a son tu in kei hong sawl hi." 
Jeremiah35:18 Tuaciang, Vaanglianbelpa Topa, Israel ii Pathian in Rechab bee le phung tung ah, “Na taanghpupi Jonadab ii hong thupiak sia na mang zo uh a; hong thuhil nate theampo zui in, hong sawl theampo na seam zo uh hi." 
Jeremiah35:19 Tua ahikom, Keima, Vaanglianbelpa Topa, Israel ii Pathian in a na a seam tu sia Rechab ii tapa Jonadab suan le paal pa khat nei tawntung tu in kong kamciam hi,” ci in son hi." 
Jeremiah36:1 Josiah ii tapa Jehoiakim ii Judah ngam kumpi a sua zawk a kum lina kumin, Topa in keima tungah," 
Jeremiah36:2 “Laizial khat la in a tua tungah Israel le Judah le minamte theampo ii thu kong sonte at in. Josiah kumpi a sep lai in, na tungah kong son masak phit pan kipan tuni dong kong sonte theampo at in." 
Jeremiah36:3 Judah mite in amate susia tu a ka sawmna thute theampo a zaak uh ciang, a tatsiatnate panin kikheal tha tu uh hi. Tuasia ciang a seksolna le a maw a khialnate ka maisak tu hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah36:4 Tua ahiciang Neriah ii tapa Baruch samin Topa ii ka tungah hong son te theampo at tu in ka khaw hi. Tuaciang Baruch in laizial sungah at siat hi. 
Jeremiah36:5 Tuaciang keima in Baruch tungah a nuai ah kihilnate ka pia hi: “Keima in Biakinnpi sungah pai thei natu thu ka nga nawn bua hi. 
Jeremiah36:6 Ahihang mipite ii antan kik hun ciangin tua munah nangma pai lete kong oai hi. Topa ii hong sonte le keima ii nang tungah kong khawte theampo amate ii a zaak thei natu in tua laizial sia nging takin nong sim tu hi. Mihing theampo, a khua tek pan hong pai Judah mite zongh ii hong zaak thei natu munah sim in." 
Jeremiah36:7 Topa in a lauhuai thin uukna le a thinsona taw hi mihingte tawng zo ahikom amate in Topa tungah thu ngenin, a tatsiatnate panin kikheal thei tha tu uh hi.”" 
Jeremiah36:8 Tuaciang Baruch in ka sawl bang tatak ma in Biakinnpi sungah Topa ii kammalte sim hi. 
Jeremiah36:9 Jehoiakim ii Judah kumpi a sep zawk a kum ngana, a tha kua tha in mihingte in Topa maipha nga nuam in antang uh hi. Jerusalem khua ah a teang theampo le Judah khuate pan hong pai theampo antang uh hi." 
Jeremiah36:10 Tua zawkciang mihingte theampo ii a ngai laitakin, laizial sungah a kikhum ka thusonte theampo Baruch in sim hi. Biakinnpi sung, Shaphan ii tapa, zum thuzeakpa Gemariah ii inndoi panin Baruch in sim hi. Ama inndoi sia Biakinnpi tumna Kongpi Thak kung a zum tung dawl ah om hi." 
Jeremiah36:11 Baruch ii laizial sung pan Topa kammal a sim sia Gemariah tapa Shaphan ii tupa Micaiah in za hi. 
Jeremiah36:12 Tuaciang Micaiah sia kumpi inn sung thuzeakpipa ii zum inndoi ah ulian theampo kikhop laitakin pai hi. Zum thu zeakpipa Elishama, Shemaiah ii tapa Delaiah, Achbor ii tapa Elnathan, Shaphan ii tapa Gemariah, Hananiah ii tapa Zedekiah le a dang uliante theampo tua munah om uh hi." 
Jeremiah36:13 Baruch ii mipite tungah a sim thu teng Micaiah in a zaak theampo amate tungah son hi. 
Jeremiah36:14 Tuaciang uliante in Jehudi (Nethaniah tapa, Shelemiah ii tupa le Cushi ii tu selawn) sia Baruch kungah paisak a, mipite tungah a sim laizial sia hong paipui natu in sonsak hi. Baruch in tua laizial sia amate kungah paipui hi." 
Jeremiah36:15 “To in a tua laizial sia ko hong sim ta'n” amate in ci uh hi. A ci bangin Baruch in sim hi. 
Jeremiah36:16 Baruch in tualai a sim zawkciang amate patau a khat le khat ki en in Baruch tung ah, “Kumpipa munah hi thu ka son uh kul tu hi,” ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah36:17 Tua zawkciang amate in, “Tu in hong son ta'n, hite theampo bangbangin at thei ni ziam? Jeremiah in hong khaw ziam?” ci in Baruch dongh uh hi." 
Jeremiah36:18 Baruch in, “Jeremiah in kammal theampo hong khaw a, keima in hi laizial tungah laitui taw ka at hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Jeremiah36:19 Tua zawkciang amate in Baruch tungah, “Nang le Jeremiah sia na buk uh kul tu hi. Na omna uh kuama in hesak heak vun,” ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah36:20 Uliante in tua laizial sia zum thuzeakpa, Elishama ii inndoi sungah koi in, kumpipa zum ah pai in tua munah a thu a vekpi in kumpipa tungah ko uh hi." 
Jeremiah36:21 Tuasia ciang tua laizial la tu in kumpipa in Jehudi sawl hi. Ama in Elishama ii a inndoi panin tua laizial la a, kumpipa le a kiim ah a ding uliante theampo a sim hi." 
Jeremiah36:22 Tua hun sia phalbi hun lai hi a, kumpipa sia a phalbi kumpi inn sungah mei oai in to hi." 
Jeremiah36:23 Jehudi in lai khawk thum khawk li bang a sim zawk po ciang, kumpipa in naamno khat taw tua laizial attan in meikhuk sungah lawn hi. Laizial buppi a kaktum dongin ama in meikhuk sungah hal hi." 
Jeremiah36:24 Ahihang kumpipa ahizong hi thute theampo a za siat a uliante ahizong launa heena lim lak ngawl uh hi. 
Jeremiah36:25 Elnathan, Delaiah le Gemariah in laizial a hal ngawl natu in hesuak ngen hi napi, kumpipa in amate bangma awlmawk ngawl hi." 
Jeremiah36:26 Tua zawkciang kumpipa in keima le ka thuzeakpa Baruch man tu in kumpipa tapa Jerahmeel sia Azriel ii tapa Seraiah le Abdeel ii tapa Shelemiah taw zongh thupia khawm hi. Ahihang Topa in ko hong phual hi. 
Jeremiah36:27 Baruch tungah ka khaw bangin a ki at laizial sia Jehoiakim kumpipa in a haltum zawkciang Topa in, keima" 
Jeremiah36:28 laizial dang khat la in, a masa laizial sungah a omte theampo tuasia sungah at tu in hong sawl hi." 
Jeremiah36:29 Topa in kumpipa tungah hi bangin ci ta'n ci in kei hong sawl hi, “Laizial na haltum zo hi, tuaciang Jeremiah tungah, Babylon kumpipa hong pai tu a, hi ngam susia in a mite le a ngannote thatlum tu hi ci in banghangin at ni ziam ci in dongh zo ni hi." 
Jeremiah36:30 Tua ahikom Topa Keima in tu in nang Jehoiakim kumpipa tungah David ii kumpi ngam sia na suan na paalte kuama in uk ngeingawl tu hi kong ci hi. Na luang sia sunin nisa, zanin daaitui thuak tu in kivawk tu hi." 
Jeremiah36:31 Na vekpi na vawt uh mawna khialnate hu in nangma, na suan na paalte le na uliante daan kong pia tu hi. Nang na hi zong, Jerusalem le Judah mite ahizong, kidop natu kong son te nong nadon bua uh hi. Tua ahikom kong tawnkhol sa tuasiatna sia na vekpi tungah kong tungsak tu hi.”" 
Jeremiah36:32 Tuaciang laizial dang khat la in ka thuzeakpa Baruch tungah ka pia a, ka khaw theampo ama in at hi. Laizial masa sia sungah a om sate theampo le ama tungah ka khaw a kibang thute zongh ama in khum siat hi." 
Jeremiah37:1 Babylon kumpipa Nebuchadnezzar in Josiah ii tapa Zedekiah sia Jehoiakim ii tapa Jehoiachin taangin Judah ngam kumpi in koi hi. 
Jeremiah37:2 Ahihang Zedekiah, a uliante le mipite in Topa ii ka tungah thu hong piak sia mang nuam ngawl uh hi." 
Jeremiah37:3 Ih minam luangin Topa ih Pathian tungah keima sia thungen tu hong sawl tu in, Zedekiah kumpipa in Shelemiah ii tapa Jehucal le Maaseiah ii tapa thiampi Zephaniah hong paisak hi." 
Jeremiah37:3 Ih minam luangin Topa ih Pathian tungah keima sia thungen tu hong sawl tu in, Zedekiah kumpipa in Shelemiah ii tapa Jehucal le Maaseiah ii tapa thiampi Zephaniah hong paisak hi." 
Jeremiah37:4 Tualai hunin thong sungah kei hong kikhum ngawl lai a, mihonpite sungah ka vak kawkoai thei lai hi." 
Jeremiah37:5 Babylon ngalkaphonpi in Jerusalem kiim uum zo uh hi, ahihang Egypt ngalkaphonpi in Egypt ngamngi kaantan zo hi ci thu a zaak uh ciang amate nungkin kik uh hi." 
Jeremiah37:6 Tua zawkciang Topa, Israel ii Pathian in," 
Jeremiah37:7 Zedekiah tungah son tu in hi bangin keima hong sawl hi, “Egypt ngalkaphonpi sia nangma hong hu tu in hong pai a, ahihang a ngam ah heak kik tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah37:8 Tuasia ciang Babylon te hong pai kik tu a, Jerusalem khuapi simin, la in, mei taw haltum tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah37:9 Babylon te hong pai kik nawn ngawl tu hi ci a na ngaisut thak ngawl natu, noma le noma na kitheam ngawl natu, Keima, Topa in kidop natu thu kong hilkhol hi, banghang ziam cile amate hong pai kik nanak tu hi." 
Jeremiah37:10 Babylon ngalkap buppi na zo zong, a taanglai a liamte bekma puanbuk sungah lum lai ahi hial uh zong, tuate ma hong thoto veve tu a, hi khuapi haltum tu uh hi.”" 
Jeremiah37:11 Egypt ngalkaphonpite hong nai hu in Babylon ngalkaphonpi sia Jerusalem pan nungkin hi. 
Jeremiah37:12 Ka inn kuan neisa teng sung pan ka nga tu ka tel la tu in Jerusalem khua pan dingin Benjamin ngam ah ka pai hi. 
Jeremiah37:13 Ahihang Benjamin Kongpi ka thet ciang tualai ah kongpi cing ngalkapte a uk bupa, Shelemiah ii tapa, Hananiah ii tupa Irijah in ka pai tu hong khaam a, “Babylon te kungah a taiku hi ngawl ni ziam?” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah37:14 “Tuabang hi ngawl hi! Tai ku ngawl khi hi,” ci in ka zo hi. Ahihang Irijah in ka thuson hong ngai bua hi. Ama in kei hong manin uliante kungah hong paipui zawsap hi." 
Jeremiah37:15 Amate ka tungah thin uuk mama in hong saatsak in zum thuzeakpa Jonathan ii inn, thonginn a, a kivawt inn sia sungah hong khum in taw hong kalhcip uh hi." 
Jeremiah37:16 Leinuai inndoi khat sungah kei hong khum a, tua munah khuangei hialma hong koi hi." 
Jeremiah37:17 Tua zawkciang Zedekiah kumpipa in keima hong sam a, kumpi inn sungah ama in, “ Topa kung panin bang thu hong pai ziam?” ci in kei hong dongh tuam hi. “Thu om hi” ci in ka zo a, “Nang sia Babylon kumpipa khut sungah hong ki aap tu hi,” ci in ka son belap hi." 
Jeremiah37:18 Tua zawkciang keima in, “Thong sungah nong khum natu in nangma tungah ahizong na uliante tungah ahizong, hi mipite tungah ahizong bang khialna lian vawt khi ziam?" 
Jeremiah37:19 Babylon kumpipa in nang le hi ngam hong sim ngawl tu hi ci a, nang tungah hong son, na kamsaangte bang tat ziam?" 
Jeremiah37:20 Tu in Kumpipa awng, ka thu son nong ngai natu le kong nget sia nong vawtsak natu in hesuak kong ngen hi. Nong hesuakna in Jonathan ii inn thong sungah hong puak kik heak in. Nong puak kik ahile, tua munah thi takpi tu khi hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah37:21 Tua ahikom Zedekiah kumpipa in kumpi innhuang sungah kei hong kikhum natu in thu hong pia hi. Tua munah ka om a, khua sungah anluum a bo siat dong ni simin anluum lum khat veu anluum vawtna panin kei hong kipia hi." 
Jeremiah38:1 Mattan ii tapa Shephatiah, Pashhur ii tapa Gedaliah, Shelemiah ii tapa Jehucal, le Malchiah ii tapa Pashhur te in mipite tungah," 
Jeremiah38:2 Topa in, “Khuapi sungah a om suak peuma ngal taw ahibuale kialpi taw, ahibuale natna taw in thi tu uh hi. Ahihang pusuak in Babylon te khut sungah a tum pawpo kithatlum ngawl tu a; a nuntakna beak peuma suatak tu hi, ci hi,” ci a ka son sia za uh hi." 
Jeremiah38:3 Topa in, “Keima in hi khuapi sia Babylon ngalkaphonpi khut sungah ka pia tu a, amate in la tu uh hi,” a ci sia zongh amate tungah ka son si hi." 
Jeremiah38:4 Tua zawkciang uliante sia kumpipa kungah pai in, “Hisia pa thisak kul tu hi. Hi bang a, a pau hu in khuapi sungah a om ngalkapte le khuapi sungah a taanglai midangte theampo sia thin kiamsak uh hi. Ama in mihingte hu tu hanciam ngawl a; nasak nuam bek hi,” ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah38:5 Zedekiah kumpipa in, “Tua ahile pha mama hi. Na vawt nop bang po in ama vawt vun; hong khak thei ngawl khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Jeremiah38:6 Tuaciang amate in kei hong paipui a, kumpi innhuang sungah a om, kumpipa tapa Malchaiah ii tuikhuk sungah khau taw hong khiasuk uh hi. Tuikhuk sungah tui om ngawlin, buan bek om a, tua buan sungah ka tumsuk hi." 
Jeremiah38:7 Ahitazong, kumpi inn sungah na a seam Ethiopia mi cilnge sa Ebedmelech in amate ii tuikhuk sungah hong khiak thu za hi. Tua laitakin kumpipa sia Benjamin Kongpi ah thukhen a, a to laitak ahi hi." 
Jeremiah38:8 Tua ahikom Ebemelech sia tua munah pai in kumpipa tungah," 
Jeremiah38:9 “Kumpipa awng, hi mihingte ngamta khial hi. Amate in Jeremiah sia tuikhuk sungah khia uh a, tua munah ngilkial in thi tu hi, banghang ziam cile khua sungah an om nawn ngawl hi,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah38:10 Tuaciang kumpipa in Ebedmelech sia mihing thum taw paikhawmsak a, ka thi ma in tuikhuk sung pan keima hong laak kik natu in thupia hi." 
Jeremiah38:11 Tua hikom Ebedmelech sia tua mihingte taw kumpipa inn sung vanh kholna inndoi ah pai a puansia pawlkhat la in, keima omna tuikhuk sungah tuate khau taw hong khiaksuk hi." 
Jeremiah38:12 Khau ii hong hiat ngawl natu in ama in ka lenuai ah puansia dapin hong sawl hi. Hong sawl bangin ka vawt a," 
Jeremiah38:13 tuasia ciang amate in tuikhuk sung panin kei hong kaito in hong pusua hi. Tua zawkciang kumpi innhuang sungah kei hong keam hi. 
Jeremiah38:14 Khatvei ciang in Zedekiah kumpipa in Biakinnpi tumna a thumna sia ah hong sam a, ama in “Thu khat kong dongh tu a, thumaan sia hong son siat lete ka oai hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah38:15 Keima in, “Thumaan sia hong son leng, nong that tu a, ngaisutna hong pia leng le, nong ngai buatu hi,” ci in ka zo hi." 
Jeremiah38:16 Tuasia ciang Zedekiah kumpipa in, “Nang kong that buatu a, nang hong that nuam mite khut sungah kong aap buatu hi ci in eite nuntakna hong pia Pathian, a nungta Pathian min taw ka kiciam hi,” ci in hong kamciam hi." 
Jeremiah38:17 Tuasia ciang Zedekiah tungah Vaanglianbelpa Topa Israel ii Pathian in, “Babylon kumpipa ii uliante khutnuai ah na tum le, na nuntakna hong kikhoaikhe tu a, hi khuapi kihaltum ngawl tu hi. Nangma le na innkuanpuite kikhoaikhe khawm tu hi." 
Jeremiah38:18 Ahihang na tum bua le, hi khuapi sia Babylon te khut sungah ki aap tu a, amate in haltum in amate ii khut sung panin na suakta buatu hi,” a ci teng ka son hi." 
Jeremiah38:19 Ahihang kumpipa in, “Babylon te kungah a tai ih ngammite ka kiita hi. Amate ii khut sungah kei hong ki aap thei tu a, hong vawtsia tu uh hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Jeremiah38:20 Keima in, “Nang sia amate khut sungah hong ki aap ngawl tu hi. Topa ii thupuak sia na nit natu in hesuak kong ngen hi; tua hile na theampo nang atu in pha tu a, na nuntakna hong kikhoaikhe tu hi." 
Jeremiah38:21 Ahihang a khutnuai ah na tum nuam buale bang hong piang tu ci sia Topa in ka mukholna sungah hong lak zo hi. 
Jeremiah38:22 Tua ka mukholna ah Judah kumpi inn sungah a kinusia numeite theampo Babylon kumpipa ii uliante kungah a kipaipui ka mu hi. Amate a pai kawmin, a thusonte ngai vun: ‘Kumpipa ii lawm phabelte in ama lampui khial a, amate in ama zothaw hi. Tuaciang tu in ama peangte buan sungah tumsuk zo a, a lawmte in ama nusia zo uh hi,’ ci uh hi.” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah38:23 Tua zawkciang keima in, “Na zite le na tate theampo sia Babylon te kungah kipaipui tu a, nang zongh na suakta buatu hi. Nang sia Babylon kumpipa in thong hong taksak tu a, hi khuapi sia mei taw kihaltum tu hi,” ka ci lai hi." 
Jeremiah38:24 Zedekiah in, “Hi ih kipaupuina thute kuama in hesak heak in, tua hile na nuntakna lauhuai ngawl tu hi." 
Jeremiah38:25 Nang taw thu ka son hunlam uliante in hong za thong le, amate hong pai in ih thusonte hong dongh tu uh hi. A vekpi in nong son le kong that buatu hi ci in amate in hong kamciam tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah38:26 Thong sungah a thi tu in hong puak kik ngawl natu in ka ngen hi ci bek po in,” ci in hong zo kik hi." 
Jeremiah38:27 Tua zawkciang uliante theampo hong pai in thu hong dongh a, kumpipa hong sawl bang tatak ma in amate tungah ka son hi. Amate ii vawt thei tu bangma dang om ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile ka kipaupuina hong za ku kuama om ngawl hi." 
Jeremiah38:28 Jerusalem khua a kilaak ni dong kumpi innhuang sungah kei hong keam hi. 
Jeremiah39:1 Zedekiah ii Judah kumpi a sua zawk a kum kuana, a tha sawm tha in Babylon kumpipa Nebuchadnezzar sia a ngalkap buppi taw hong pai in Jerusalem sim hi." 
Jeremiah39:2 Zedekiah ii kumpi a sua zawk kum sawm le kum khatna, a tha li tha, ni kua ni in khuapi luphungte kisulet hi." 
Jeremiah39:3 (Jerusalem khuapi a kilaak ciang Babylon kumpipa ii uliante theampo hong pai in Kongpi Laita ah mun hong la uh hi. Tuate sungah Nergal Sarezer, Samgar Nebo, Sarsechim le Nergal Sarezer dangkhat kihel hi.)" 
Jeremiah39:4 Zedekiah kumpipa le a ngalkapte theampo in a piang thu a mu uh ciang zanlai in khuapi pan a suatak natu hanciam uh hi. Amate sia kumpi huan sung lam tawnin luphungte ngeal kikawnna kongpi lam tawnin, Jordan Kuam sangah suakta uh hi." 
Jeremiah39:5 Ahihang Babylon ngalkaphonpi in delin Jericho khua nai zaangtam ah Zedekiah man uh hi. Tuasia ciang amate in Zedekiah sia Hamath ngamsung Riblah khua ah a om Nebuchadnezzar kumpipa kungah paipui uh a, tua munah Nebuchadnezzar in ama tungah thukhen hi." 
Jeremiah39:6 Riblah khua ah Nebuchadnezzar kumpipa in Zedekiah ii mu tang ma in a tapate thatlum a, Judah ngam kumpi uliante zongh thatlumsak hi." 
Jeremiah39:7 Tua zawkciang Zedekiah ii mittangte khelsak a, Babylon ah paipui tu in kol bulsak hi." 
Jeremiah39:8 Tua hun sung ma in Babylon te in kumpi inn le mipite ii innte haltum a Jerusalem khua luphungte sutham uh hi. 
Jeremiah39:9 A khakbel in ngalkap hon ukpa, Nebuzaradan in khuapi sungah a taanglai mite sia ama kung a zuan teng taw Babylon ah thongtaak tu in paipui khawm hi." 
Jeremiah39:10 Ama in bangma nei ngawl a, a zawngkhalbel mihing pawlkhat sia Judah ngam ah nusia in sapithuante le lote pia hi." 
Jeremiah39:11 Ahihang Nebuchadnezzar kumpipa in a nuai a thute a piak natu in ngalkap hon ukpa, Nebuzaradan tungah thupia hi:" 
Jeremiah39:12 “Pai in Jeremiah na mu ciang pha takin keam in. Vawtsia heak in, a dei pawpo vawtsak in,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah39:13 Tua ahikom Nebuzaradan in kumpi uliante Nebushazban le Nergal Sarezer le Babylon kumpipa ii ulian dangte theampo taw 
Jeremiah39:14 kumpi innhuang sung panin kei hong la uh hi. Amate in Shaphan ii tupa, Ahikam ii tapa Gedaliah kungah, keima inn ah ngam muang takin hong thet natu le pha tak hong kep tu in hong aap uh hi. Tuabangin tua mun ah om mite sungah ka teang hi." 
Jeremiah39:15 Kumpi innhuang sungah thong hong kitaaksak lai in, Vaanglianbelpa Topa, Israel ii Pathian in hi bangin a ci teng sia," 
Jeremiah39:16 Ethiopia mi Ebedmelech tungah a son tu in Topa in kei hong sawl hi. “Ka vawt tu hi ka ci bangin hi khuapi tungah nopsakna ahi ngawl siatna ka tungsak tu hi. Hi bangin hong pian ciang a mu tu in tua munah na om tu hi. 
Jeremiah39:17 Ahihang Keima, Topa in nang kong dal tu a, na kiitak mihingte khut sungah hong ki aap ngawl tu hi." 
Jeremiah39:18 Nang sia kong keamcing tu a, hong kithatlum ngawl tu hi. Kei hong muang na hikom na nuntakna suakta tu hi. Keima, Topa in ka ci zo hi.”" 
Jeremiah40:1 Ngalkap mangpa Nebuzaradan in Ramah khua ah kei hong suatak zawkciang, Topa in kei hong paupui hi. Keima sia kol bul sa in, Babylon ah luangta tu in a kipaipui Jerusalem le Judah pan midangte theampo taw tua mun ah hong kipaipui khawm zo hi." 
Jeremiah40:2 Ngalkap mangpa in keima hong sam tuam a, “Na Topa Pathian in hi ngam sia suksiat tu in tawng a," 
Jeremiah40:3 ama in ka vawt tu hi a ci sia tu in vawt zo hi. Na mite in Topa tungah mawna vawtin a thu ni ngawl a hi hu in hite theampo piang hi. 
Jeremiah40:4 Tu in na khut ah a kibul kolte kong suutsak tu a kong thaa tu hi. Keima taw Babylon ah na pai nuam le na pai thei a, nang kong keam tu hi. Ahihang na pai nuam buale pai kul ngawl hi. Hi ngam buppi sungah na uukna mun teal in, na uukna po ah pai thei ni hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah40:5 Bangma zo kik ngawl a ka om ciang, Nebuzaradan in, “Babylon kumpipa ii Judah ngam khuate uk tu in a koi ngamkhen ukpa Shaphan ii tupa, Ahikam ii tapa Gedaliah ii kungah pai kik ta'n. Ama taw om ta'n a, a mite sungah teang thei ni hi, tua ahibuale na pai nopna mun po ah pai thei ni hi,” hong ci hi. Tua zawkciang ama in letsong khat le nguai an hong henin ka pai nopna ah hong paisak hi." 
Jeremiah40:6 Mizpah ah Gedaliah taw om tu in ka pai a, ngam sungah a taanglai mite sungah ka teang hi." 
Jeremiah40:7 Judah ngalkapmang pawlkhatte le ngalkapte sia a ngalte khut sungah tum ngawl uh hi. Babylon kumpipa in Gedaliah sia ngamkhen ukpa tu in koi zo a, Babylon ah a kipaipui ngawl theampo — ngamsung pan a zawngbel mite teng uk tu in a kikoina thu amate in za uh hi." 
Jeremiah40:8 Tuasia ciang Nathaniah ii tapa Ishmael, Kareah ii tapa Johanan, Tanhumeth ii tapa Seraiah, Netophah pan Ephai ii tapate le Maacah pan Jezaniah sia a mite taw Mizpah khua ah a om Gedaliah kungah pai uh hi." 
Jeremiah40:9 Gedaliah in amate tungah, “Babylon te nuai ah na tum tu uh sia lau kul ngawl hi kong ci hi. Hi ngam sungah teangin Babylon kumpipa ii na seam le uhte no atu in pha siat tu hi." 
Jeremiah40:10 Keima mama Mizpah ah ka teang tu a, Babylon te hi munah hong pai ciangin noma taangmi ka hi tu hi. Ahihang sapittui, thingnga le olive sathaute khawmin khol vun a, na laak uh khuate ah teang vun,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah40:11 Tuasia hunin Moab ngam, Ammon ngam, Edom ngam le ngamdangte ah a om Israel te theampo in Babylon kumpipa ii Israel te pawlkhat Judah ngam sungah a teen suaksakna thu le Gedaliah sia a ngam khen ukpa in a koina thu za uh hi." 
Jeremiah40:12 Tua ahi manin, amate sia a kithethaang na ngamte nusia in Judah ngam ah cia kik uh hi. Amate Mizpah khua Gedaliah kungah pai in, tua munah sapittui le thingnga tam mama khawmtua uh hi." 
Jeremiah40:13 Hisia zawkciang a tum nuam ngawl Johanan le ngalkapte ii lampuite sia Mizpah khua Gedaliah kungah pai in," 
Jeremiah40:14 ama tungah, “Ammon kumpipa Baalis in nangma hong suam tu in Ishmael hong paisak sia he ngawl ni ziam?” ci hi. Ahihang Gedaliah in tua thu um ngawl hi." 
Jeremiah40:15 Tua zawkciang Johanan in ama tungah, “Keima hong paisak ta'n a Ishmael hong thatsak ta'n, tua hile a that sia pa kuama in he ngawl tu hi. Banghangin ama in nang hong suam thei thong tu ziam? Nang hong kisuam le tua in na kiim ah hong kikhawm Jew mite theampo kithethaangsak tu a, Judah ngam ah a taanglai mite theampo ii tungah tuasiatna thengsak tu hi,” ci ku hi." 
Jeremiah40:16 Ahihang Gedaliah in, “Tua sia hi heak in! Ishmael thu na son sia maan ngawl hi!” ci in zo hi." 
Jeremiah41:1 Tua kum a tha sali tha in, kumpi innkuan sung pan le kumpipa ii a ulianbelte sung pan khat ahi, Elishama ii tupa, Nethaniah ii tapa Ishmael sia mihing sawm taw Mizpah ah Gedaliah taw kimu tu in pai uh hi. Amate teng an a neakkhop laitakin," 
Jeremiah41:2 Ishmael le tua mihing sawmte in a namsau uh dokin Gedaliah thatlum uh hi. 
Jeremiah41:3 Ishmael in Mizpah khua Gedaliah kungah a om Israel mite theampo le Babylon ngalkap tua munah a omte zongh thatlum hi. 
Jeremiah41:4 A zing ciang, Gedaliah a kisuamlupna thu kuama heak ma in" 
Jeremiah41:5 Shechem, Shiloh le Samaria panin mihing sawmliat hong theng uh hi. Amate sia a khamul uh meetin a puan uh eaukeak in, amate le amate tetek kiliamsua ngawp uh hi. Amate in Biakinnpi ah piak tu in antang le paaknamtui keng uh hi." 
Jeremiah41:6 Tua ahikom Ishmael sia amate muak tu in Mizpah panin kap kawkawm in pai hi. Amate kung a thet ciang Ishmael in, “Gedaliah en tu in hong tum ka ve vun,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah41:7 Khuapi sung a tum po uh ciang, Ishmael le a mite in amate thatin a luang uh tuikhuk khat sungah vawk uh hi." 
Jeremiah41:8 Ahihang amate ii pawlsung panin mihing sawm in Ishmael tungah, “Ko hong that heak in! Zungtaang, mangtaang, olive thau le khuaitui lo lai ah phual ku nei khu hi,” ci hi. Tua ahikom Ishmael in amate khoaikhe hi." 
Jeremiah41:9 Ishmael ii thalup mithi luangte a vawkna tuikhuk sia Israel kumpipa Baasha ii Asa kumpipa a sim lai a, Asa kumpipa ii taw tuikhuk lian khat sia ahi hi. Ishmael in tua tuikhuk sia mithi luang taw kidimsak hi." 
Jeremiah41:10 Tua zawkciang Gedaliah ii kep tu in ngalkap maang pa Nebuzaradan ii a koi, kumpipa tanute le Mizpah khua ah a om lai mite theampo sia Ishmael in thongtaaksak hi. Ishmael ii thong a taaksak tua mite Ammon ngam sang zot pui hi." 
Jeremiah41:11 Johanan le ama taw a omkhawm ngalkap lampuite theampo in Ishmael ii khialna lian a vawtna thu za uh hi. 
Jeremiah41:12 Tuasia hu in amate sia a mite taw ama del a Gideon tuili pui hui ah pha uh hi. 
Jeremiah41:13 Ishmael ii mat thongtaakte in Johanan le ama taw hong paikhawm ngalkap lampuite a mu uh ciang a lungdam in," 
Jeremiah41:14 amate sang kiheak in tai uh hi. 
Jeremiah41:15 Ahihang Ishmael le a mihing liatte sia Johanan khut sung panin tai in, Ammon ngam ah suakta uh hi." 
Jeremiah41:16 Tua zawkciang Ishmael ii Gedaliah a thalup zawkciang Mizpah pan thongtaak a, a paipuite — ngalkapte, numeite, patangte le kumpi inn naseam, numei uk pasal cilnge sate sia Johanan le ama taw a om ngalkap lampui te in uk uh hi." 
Jeremiah41:17 Babylon kumpipa ii ngamkhen uk in a koi Gedaliah sia Ishmael in suamlum ahikom amate in Babylon te kiita uh hi. Tua ahikom amate sia Babylon te taw a kipeal thei natu in Egypt ngam ah tai uh hi. Amate sia a paina lampi Bethlehem khua hui Chimham ah tawlnga uh hi. 
Jeremiah41:18  
Jeremiah42:1 Tua zawkciang ngalkap lampuite theampo, Kareah ii tapa Johanan le Heshaiah ii tapa Azariah le mihonte a lian a no ka kungah hong pai uh a," 
Jeremiah42:2 “Kong nget uh sia hong vawtsak ta'n! Topa ih Pathian tungah kote atu in thu hong ngetsak ta'n. A nungta lai kote theampo atu in thu hong ngetsak ta'n. Khatvei lai in mihing tam mama ka hi uh a; tu ahile nangma nong mu bangin mihing tawmno bek ma ka taang lai uh hi. 
Jeremiah42:3 Kote pai natu lampi le ko ii sep tu nate Topa ih Pathian in hong lak natu in thu hong ngetsak ta'n,” hong ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah42:4 Keima in, “Tua ahile pha mama hi. Nong nget uh bangin Topa ih Pathian tungah thu ka ngen tu a, ama ii hong ci babang kong son tu hi. Bangma kong iim buatu hi,” ci in ka zo hi." 
Jeremiah42:5 Tuasia ciang amate in keima tungah, “Ko atu a Topa ih Pathian ii hong thupiakte theampo ka ni bua uh le Topa sia ko ii lang ah thumaan le thutak tetti hi tahen." 
Jeremiah42:6 Koma dik ka sa a dik ka sa bua uh zong ama ii tungah thungetsak tu in kong sawl uh Topa, ih Pathian ii thu ka ni tu uh hi. Ama ii thu ka ni uhle ka mai uh vangin pha tu hi,” hong ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah42:7 Ni sawm zawkciang Topa in kei hong paupui hi; 
Jeremiah42:8 tua ahikom keima in Johanan, a ompui ngalkap lampui te theampo le mihing dang teng taw ka sam khawm hi." 
Jeremiah42:9 Keima in amate tungah, “A kungah hesuak ngetna taw nong puak na pa ahi Topa Israel ii Pathian in," 
Jeremiah42:10 ‘Hi ngam ah na teang suak nuam uh le, kong laamto tu a, kong lalsak buatu hi; kong phut tu a, kong phaikeak buatu hi. Siatna kong thetsak sia in hong heesak mama hi." 
Jeremiah42:11 Babylon kumpipa kiita nawn heak vun. Noma kong ompui a, ama khut sung panin kong suatak tu hi." 
Jeremiah42:12 Keima sia a hesuak thei pa ka hi manin, ama in no tungah hesuak theina ka neisak tu a, na inn le lo ah hong ciasak kik tu hi. Keima, Topa in ka son zo hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah42:13 “Ahihang Judah ngam sungah a taanglai note in Topa na Pathian na nial buatu uh a, hi ngam ah ten tu na nial peuma buatu uh hi. Noma in, ‘Hi ngawl hi, ngal kido nawn ngawlna, ngalsim tu kithotna aw zaak nawn ngawlna ahibuale ngilkial ngawlna mun ahi, Egypt ngam ah pai in ka teang tu uh hi.’ na ci bua het tu uh hi. Hi bangin na ci uh le Vaanglianbelpa Topa, Israel ii Pathian in, ‘Egypt ah pai in teen tu na tum tatak uh le," 
Jeremiah42:14  
Jeremiah42:15  
Jeremiah42:16 na kiitak uh ngal in no hong pha tu a, na kiitak uh kialpi in hong zui in, tua mun Egypt ah na thi tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah42:17 Egypt ngam ah tai a, teen tatak tu a sawm mihingte theampo sia ngal ahibuale kialpi ahibuale natna taw thi tu uh hi. Khat zongh nungta ngawl tu a, amate tungah ka thetsak tu tuasiatna sia taw khat zong kipeal thei ngawl tu hi,’ hong ci tu hi." 
Jeremiah42:18 “ Topa, Israel, ii Pathian in, ‘Ka thin uukna le ka thinsona Jerusalem khua mite tungah a kibuak bangma in, Egypt ngam ah na pai uh le ka thinsona sia note tungah hong kibuak tu hi. Midangte ii hong muna ah a cizathuai na suak tu uh hi; Mite in note ciammuina in hong nei tu a na min uh sia haamsiatna in zang tu uh hi. Hi mun sia na mu kik ngei nawn buatu uh hi,’ ci hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah42:19 Tuaciang ka zomto lai a, “ Topa in Judah ngam ah a taang lai note, Egypt ngam ah na pai ngawl natu in hong son zo hi. Tua ahikom tu in na kidop natu uh pan," 
Jeremiah42:20 na pai uh ahile thithei natu dongin a khial na hi tu uh hi. Noma atu in Topa ih Pathian tungah thungetsak tu in nong sawl uh a, ama ii hong thupiak theampo seam tu in kamciam nong pia uh hi." 
Jeremiah42:21 Tu in no tungah kong son zo hi, ahihang Topa ih Pathian in hong sonsak theampo na ni bua uh hi." 
Jeremiah42:22 Tua ahikom, hi thu ciamtee vun: noma pai nopna le ten nopna ngam ah ngal ahibuale ngilkialna, ahi buale natna taw in na thi tu uh hi,” ci in ka son hi." 
Jeremiah43:1 Topa, amate ii Pathian in amate tungah a vekpi a son tu in hong thataak keima in mipite tungah ka son zo hi." 
Jeremiah43:2 Tuaciang Hoshaiah ii tapa Azariah le Kareah ii tapa Johanan le a kisa thei midangte theampo in kei tungah, “Leilot ni hi. Topa ih Pathian in kote Egypt ngam ah pai a ka teen ngawl natu uh hong son tu in nang hong sawl ngawl hi." 
Jeremiah43:3 Babylon te in ko hong zothaw tu a, hong that thei ahibuale Babylon khua ah hong paipui thei natu in Neriah ii tapa Baruch in ko hong langpan in, nang hong thawn hi,” hong ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah43:4 Tua ahikom Judah ngam sungah om tu a Topa ii thupiak sia, Johanan hikale ngalkapbu te hikale mipite hikale khat zongh in ni ngawl uh hi." 
Jeremiah43:5 Tuaciang Johanan le ngalkapbu te theampo in Judah ngam ah a taanglai teng peuma sia, a kithethaang na ngamte pan hong heak kik mihingte theampo taw Egypt ngam ah paipui uh hi;" 
Jeremiah43:6 tua hong heakkikte sia pasalte, numeite, patangte le kumpipa ii tanute ahi uh hi. Amate in ngalkap hon ukpa Nebuzaradan ii Gedaliah kep tu a, a nusiat mihingte theampo le Baruch le keima zong hong paipui uh hi." 
Jeremiah43:7 Amate in Topa ii thupiak sia ni ngawlin Egypt ngam Tahpanhes khua ciang dong pai uh hi. 
Jeremiah43:8 Tua munah Topa in ka tungah," 
Jeremiah43:9 “Suangtum lian pawlkhat la in a, hi khuapi sung kumpi zum inn tumna mai lampi hui a, a kipha suang ii nuai ah phum in; tuabang na vawt sia Israel mi pawlkhat in musak in." 
Jeremiah43:10 Tua zawkciang, Vaanglianbelpa Topa Israel ii Pathian, keima in, ka naseam Babylon kumpipa Nebuchadnezzar sia hi munah kong puak tu a, ama in tua na phum suangtumte tungah a kumpi tokhum koi tu hi, a kumpi puanbuk sia tuate ii tung ma ah phalh tu hi, ci sia amate tungah son in." 
Jeremiah43:11 Nebuchadnezzar hong pai tu a, Egypt zo tu hi. Natna taw thi tu in a see sa tua mihingte sia natna taw thi tu a, thong a tak tu in a kisee sate thongtaak tu a, tuaciang ngal sungah kithat tu in a kisee sate, ngal sungah kithat tu hi." 
Jeremiah43:12 Egypt te pathiante ii biakinn teng mei taw ka hal tu a, tuaciang Babylon kumpipa in a pathiante mei taw hal, ahibuale pua in paipui tu hi. Tuucing pa in a puan tung pan khate vawkin a thiansak bangin, Babylon kumpipa in Egypt ngam thiangsak tu a, tua zawkciang ngalzo in cia tu hi." 
Jeremiah43:13 Ama in Egypt ngam Heliopolis khua a, khansuang thiangthote susia tu a, Egypt pathiante ii biakinnte haltum tu hi,” hong ci hi."
