Jeremiah44:1 Egypt ngamsung Migdol, Tahpanhes, Memphis khuapite le Egypt ngam thang sangah a teang Israel te theampo taw kisai in Topa in kei tungah thu hong son hi." 
Jeremiah44:2 Vaanglianbelpa Topa Israel ii Pathian in, “Jerusalem khuapi tung le Judah ngam khuapi dangte theampo ii tungah suksiatna ka thetsak sia noma mama in na mu zo uh hi. Tua khuapite sia tu dong ma in siacip lai a, kuama teang ngawl hi," 
Jeremiah44:3 banghang ziam cile tua khua mite in a sia vawtin ka thin hong uksak uh hi. Amate ahizong noma na hi uh zong, na taanghpupite ahizong ii biak ngeingawl pathian dangte tungah amate in biakpiakna pia in a na seam uh hi." 
Jeremiah44:4 Ka naseam kamsaangte note kungah tatsat ngawlin kong paisak a, amate in ka ngaimawk a lauhuai, hi na sia na vawt ngawl natu in note hong son uh hi." 
Jeremiah44:5 Ahihang note in ngai ngawlin nadon ngawl nu hi. Pathian dangte tungah a sia biakpiakna na vawt uh sia na kheal nuam bua uh hi. 
Jeremiah44:6 Tua ahikom ka thin uukna le ka thinsona sia Judah ngam khuate le Jerusalem lampite tungah ka buak a, tuate sia mei taw ka hal hi. Tuni a na mu uh bangma in tuate sia a kisiacip in om a, a lipkhaphuai suak hi." 
Jeremiah44:7 “Tua ahikom Vaanglianbelpa Topa, Israel ii Pathian keima in, banghang tuabang thusia khat noma le noma tungah vawt nu ziam ci in tu in kong dongh hi. Na mite kuama a kikheet ngawl natu in, pasal, numei, patang le nausente tungah siatna thengsak nuam nu ziam?" 
Jeremiah44:8 A teang tu in na thetna uh hi Egypt ngamah, na milim biakna le a dang pathiante tungah na biakpiakna uh taw in banghangin kei hong thin uuksak nu ziam? Leitung minam theampo in no hong nunau natu le kihaamsiatna in na min a zak natu in noma le noma na kisiatsak natu bekin hisia vawt nu ziam?" 
Jeremiah44:9 Judah ngam khuate sung le Jerusalem khua lampi tungah na taanghpupite, Judah kumpite le a zite, noma le na zite ii a sia theampo na vawt uh sia mangil zo nu ziam?" 
Jeremiah44:10 Ahihang tuni dong ciang noma le noma na kiniamkhiak bua uh hi. Keima zatakna nong nei bua uh a, noma le na taanghpupite tungah kong piak thukham theampo bangin na nungta bua uh hi." 
Jeremiah44:11 “Tua ahikom, Vaanglianbelpa Topa Israel ii Pathian keima in, note kong langpan tu a Judah ngam theampo ka susia tu hi." 
Jeremiah44:12 A taanglai Judah mite, Egypt ngam ah pai in teen tatak tu a thin khensat teng sia ka lalcipsak siat tu hi. A lian a no amate a vekpi in Egypt ngam ah ngalsung ahibuale kialpi taw in thi tu uh hi. Amate sia mihingte muna ah a lauhuai suak tu uh hi, amate kinunau tu a, a min uh kihaamsiatna in zangh tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah44:13 Jerusalem daan ka piak bangma in Egypt ngam ah a teang mihingte ngal, kialpi le natna taw in daan ka pia tu hi." 
Jeremiah44:14 Judah mi a taanglai, Egypt ngam ah teang tu a hong paite kuama suakta ngawlin nungta ngawl tu uh hi. Khatvei a ten kik nopna mun Judah ngam ah kuama heak kik ngawl tu uh hi. Ngaltai tawmno simngawl kuama heak kik ngawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah44:15 Tuaciang a zite in pathian dangte tungah biakpiakna a nei hunlam a he pasal theampo le tua munah a ding numei theampo a kipan Egypt ngam thang sangah a teang Israel te — tua mihonpi in — keima tungah," 
Jeremiah44:16 “ Topa min suangin thu nong sonte hong ngai nuam ngawl khu hi. 
Jeremiah44:17 Vawt tu ka cite theampo ka vawt tu uh hi. Koma le ka taanghpupite, kumpipa le lampuite in Judah ngam khuate le Jerusalem khua lampite ah ka vawt ngei uh bangma in, kote numeipathian Vantung Kumpinu tungah sangaw biakpiakna pia in, ama tungah biakpiakna sapittui ka buak tu uh hi. Tuasia ciang an hau in, nuamsa in, ngimna ka nei bua uh hi." 
Jeremiah44:18 Ahihang Vantung Kumpinu tungah sangaw biakpiakna nei nawn ngawl a, biakpiakna sapittui ka buak nawn ngawl uh hun pan kipan bangma ka nei nawn bua uh hi, ka mite sia ngal le kialpi taw in thi uh hi,” hong ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah44:19 Tuaciang numeite in, “Vantung Kumpinu ii lim taw kibang moh vawt a, biakpiakna pia in sapittui ama tungah ka buak uh ciang koma ngamtatna sia ka pasalte a lungkim uh hi,” ci lai uh hi." 
Jeremiah44:20 Tua zawkciang ka pauna hi bang a hong zo kik pasalte le numeite theampo ii tungah keima in," 
Jeremiah44:21 “Noma le no ii taanghpupite, kumpipate le lampuite, ngamsung mipite vawt Judah khuate le Jerusalem khua lampite tungah na biakpiakna uhte Topa in he ngawl ahibuale a mangilin ngaisun nu ziam?" 
Jeremiah44:22 Tuni mama in na ngam uh sia a lalcip sa in om a, a sungah kuama teang ngawl hi. Na seksolna uh le a sia na vawtna uhte Topa in thuak zo nawn ngawl ahikom na ngam uh sia a lipkhaphuai mun suak a mihingte in a min sia kihaamsiatna in nei uh hi." 
Jeremiah44:23 Topa ii hong thupiakte theampo ni ngawlin ama tungah na maw uh hang le milim pathian dangte tungah biakpiakna na piak uh hu in hi bang tuasiatna no tungah hong theng hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah44:24 Keima in mihingte theampo, a tuan in numeite tung ah, Egypt ngamsung a teang Judah mite tungah Vaanglianbelpa Topa, Israel ii Pathian ii a ci sia ka son hi: “Noma le na zite in Vantung Kumpinu kungah a ciliap huai kamciamte na pia zo uh hi. Ama ii tungah sangaw biakpiaknate le biakpiakna sapittui na buak natu in na kamciam zo a, tua kamciam len tu in na kamciam zo uh hi. Tua ahile, pha hi! Na kamciam uh len vun! Noma kamciam bangin seam vun!" 
Jeremiah44:25  
Jeremiah44:26 Ahihang Keima, Topa in Egypt ngam ah a teang no Israel mite theampo tungah a vaanglian ka min taw kamciam ka piak sia, tu in ngai vun: ‘A nungta Vaanglianpipa Topa taw ka kiciam hi!’ ci in note khat pawpo kiciam natu in ka min kong zanghsak kik ngei buatu hi!" 
Jeremiah44:27 Note a nuamsa ngawlin kong vawt tu hi, bek dom ngawlin kong susia tu hi. Note khat zongh kikhe ngawlin, ngal taw ahizong, natna taw ahizong na lalcip tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah44:28 Ahihang note tawm bek thina pan na suakta tu uh a, Egypt ngam panin Judah ngam ah na heak kik tu uh hi. Tuasia ciang a nungta laiteng in akua ii kammal sia taangtung zo a maan ziam, keima kammal maw, amate ii kammal, ci sia he tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah44:29 Hi munah daan kong pia tu a, tuaciang note tungah siatna kong thengsak tu hi ci a ka kamciam sia a taangtun takpi na Keima, Topa in note kong lak tu hi." 
Jeremiah44:30 Judah Kumpipa Zedekiah sia ama a thatlum nuam a ngalpa Babylon kumpipa Nebuchadnezzar tungah ka aap bangma in, Egypt kumpipa Hophra sia ama a thatlum nuam a ngalte khut sungah ka aap tu hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah45:1 Josiah ii tapa Jehoiakim ii Judah ngam kumpi a sua zawk a kum lina kum in Baruch in ama tungah ka khaw bangin lai at hi. Tuaciang keima in ama tungah," 
Jeremiah45:2 Topa Israel ii Pathian in hi bangin ci hi, “Baruch awng," 
Jeremiah45:3 ‘kei paw cimaw zo ing! Topa in ka haksatnate khuangaina taw hong belap hi. Ka tatauna taw ka ngim zo a ka toi thai thei ngawl hi!’ na ci hi. 
Jeremiah45:4 “Ahihang, Keima, Topa in ka sak sate ka baltham tu a ka phu sate ka botkeak tu hi. Leitung buppi sia hi bangin ka vawt tu hi." 
Jeremiah45:5 Nang atu a tuam vilvel a hong kivawt natu zong na hi ziam? Zong heak in! Mihing nam buppi tungah siatna ka thengsak tu a, ahihang nang sia na paina po ah thi ngawlin na suakta valiai tu hi. Keima Topa in ka ci zo hi.”" 
Jeremiah46:1 5 Topa in minamte ii thu ka tungah hong son a," 
Jeremiah46:2 Egypt ii thu taw in hong pan hi. Jehoiakim ii Judah kumpi a sua zawk a kum lina kumin Eupharates ngunhui Carchemish ah Babylon kumpipa Nebuchadnezzar ii a zaw Egypt kumpipa Neco ii ngalkaphonpi thu sia Topa in hi bangin ci hi: 
Jeremiah46:3 “Egypt ngalkapbu te au in, ‘Na lumte kinging vun a, ngalsim na ah kuan vun!" 
Jeremiah46:4 Na siphute kamkhau thua vun a, a tungah to vun! A ngui in kingual vun a na thik lukhute khu vun! Na teite taat vun! Na thik puante silh vun!’ ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah46:5 Topa in “Ahihang keima in bang mu khi ziam?” ci in dongh hi. “Amate lau in heak kik uh hi. A ngalkapte kinot kik hi; a ngalte kiita mama ahikom a ngang thei zaza in tai a, a nungsang en kik ngawl uh hi." 
Jeremiah46:6 A manlang a taite zongh taisuak thei ngawl a; a ngalkapte suakta zo ngawl uh hi. Saksang, Euphrates ngun hui ah amate lutu in puk uh hi." 
Jeremiah46:7 Nile ngun bangin khang a, ngunvaal leet a, a pawm bang ahi sia akua ziam?" 
Jeremiah46:8 Nile ngun bangin khang a, ngunvaal leet bang a, a pawm sia Egypt ahi hi. Egypt in, ‘Ka khangto tu a, leitung ka khuum tu hi; khuapite le khuapi sungah a teang mihingte ka susia tu hi." 
Jeremiah46:9 Siphute a pai natu le siphu ngalleangte a mui a pei natu thupia vun! Ngalkapte kuansak vun: Ethiopia le Libya pan lum toaite le, Lydia mi thalkaap thiamte kuansak vun’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah46:10 Tuni sia Vaanglianpipa Topa, Vaanglianbelpa ii ni hi: tuni in ama in phula tu hi; tuni in ama in a ngalte daan pia tu hi. A namsau in a kham dong amate ne tu a, a lungkim dong a chi dawn tu hi. Tuni in Vaanglianbelpa in saksang Euphrates ngunhui ah a ngalmatte biakpiakna in nei hi." 
Jeremiah46:11 Egypt mite awng, Gilead ah pai vun a zatui zong tavun! Na zatuite theampo kimanna nei ngawl a; bangma in no hong damsak thei ngawl hi." 
Jeremiah46:12 Minamte theampo in na maizumna za zo a; na kaana mihing theampo in za zo hi. Ngalkapte khat le khat kituan tha a, a nii in lei ah puk uh hi." 
Jeremiah46:13 Babylon kumpipa Nebuchadnezzar sia Egypt sim tu in hong pai ciang, Topa in kei hong paupui hi. Ama in," 
Jeremiah46:14 “Egypt ngamsung khuate Migdol, Memphis le Tahpanhes ah thangsak in: ‘Noma le noma a kihu tu in kinging vun; noma neisa theampo ngal kisimna sungah kisusia tu hi!" 
Jeremiah46:15 Banghangin a thahat note pathian Apis taaksuk zo ziam? Topa in ama saat vawk hi!’ 
Jeremiah46:16 Noma ngalkapte lutu in puk zo hi; amate khat le khat ii tungah, ‘Manlang vun! Ih mite ii inn ah cia in ngalte namsau pan suakta tawng!’ kici uh hi." 
Jeremiah46:17 “Egypt kumpipa min thak khat vaw vun — ‘Kiphatsak Kam bebek pau a, a Hunpha a Taanpa’ ci vun." 
Jeremiah46:18 Vaanglianbelpa Topa Keima sia kumpipa ka hi hi. A nungta Pathian ka hi hi. Mual dangte sangin Tabor mual a saan zawk bangin, Carmel mual sia tuipi tungah dawk to in a saan bangma in, No hong sim sia pa ii thahatna zongh lian tu hi." 
Jeremiah46:19 Egypt mite awng, luangta tu in kinging vun! Memphis khua sia sennealngam kisuaksak tu a, kisiacip in kuama teang ngawl hi." 
Jeremiah46:20 Egypt ngam sia saksang panin hong leang thataa ii a pe khuipui limci khat taw kibang hi. 
Jeremiah46:21 A cialsa ngalkapte ngawngawn khuinote bangin cimaw uh hi. Amate in nang kenkon in do ngawl a; nungkin in tai siat uh hi. Amate ii a lal ni le a siat hun hong theng zo hi. 
Jeremiah46:22 A ngalte ii ngalkapte in a neak vaial uh ciang, Egypt sia ngul khat a haam bangin haam in taikeak hi. Thingphuk thei mite in taam ngam a sukthap uh bangin," 
Jeremiah46:23 amate in tua ngam sia hei taw sim uh hi. A mite sia sim zawk ngawl tu za in tam lei a, a ngalkapte sia khaumawte sangin tamzaw uh hi." 
Jeremiah46:24 Egypt mite sia maizum ngasak a; saksang mite in amate zothal uh hi. Keima, Topa in ka son zo hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah46:25 Vaanglianbelpa Topa, Israel te ii Pathian in, “Thebes te pathian Amon sia Egypt le a pathiante sia a kumpipate taw daan ka pia khawm tu hi. Egypt kumpipa le ama a muang theampo ka la tu a," 
Jeremiah46:26 amate a that nuam Babylon kumpipa Nebuchadnezzar le a ngalkaphonpi khut sungah ka aap tu hi. Ahihang hun khat ciang, nidang hun a ten ngei bangma in Egypt ngam ah mihingte teang kik tu uh hi. Keima, Topa in ka son zo hi,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah46:27 “Ka mite awng, lau heak vun, Israel mite awng, patau heak vun. Na thongtaakna uh ngam khuala na pan kong suatak tu hi. Note na inn na lo ah na cia kik tu uh a thinnuam in na teang tu uh hi; note ngam muangin na om tu uh a, hong lausak kuama om ngawl tu hi." 
Jeremiah46:28 Note kungah kong pai tu a kong ngum tu hi. Note kong thethaang na ngam theampo ka susia tu a, ahihang no kong susia buatu hi. Daan piak ngawlin note kong tha thong buatu hi; ahihang a kilawm za in daan kong pia tu hi. Keima, Topa in ka son zo hi,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah47:1 Egypt kumpipa in Gaza khua a sim ma in Philistia mite taw kisai in Topa in keima tungah thu hong son hi. 
Jeremiah47:2 Ama in: “En in! Sak sangah tui khang a, nguntui pawm bangin luang tu hi. Tua tuite in leitung le a tungah a om na theampo, khuapite le a sungah a teang mihingte khuum tu hi. Mihingte in hu ngenin au tu uh a; lei tungah om theampo in nasia takin kap tu hi." 
Jeremiah47:3 Amate in, siphu khuasuan ngingte, siphu ngalleang ngingte, a mui ngingte za tu uh hi. Nute pate sia a tate en kik tu in hong heak kik ngawl tu uh a; amate ii khutte a pangh ah kaai suk niingniang tu hi." 
Jeremiah47:4 Philistia suksiat tu hun, Tyre le Sidon pan a, a nga sun hunate theampo khatan tu hun hong theng zo hi. Keima, Topa in Crete tuikulh pan a hong pai Philistia te theampo ka susia tu hi." 
Jeremiah47:5 Gaza mite tungah heena lian theng zo a, Ashkelon ii mite dai dide in om uh hi. Philistia mi a om laiteng bang tanvei kap tu uh ziam?" 
Jeremiah47:6 ‘ Topa ii Namsau awng! Bang tanvei vaat lai tu ni ziam? Na paai zuan kik in a, tua munah om in tawlnga in!’ ci in na au uh hi." 
Jeremiah47:7 Ahihang a sep tu nasep ka piaksa ahiciang, bangbangin tawlnga thei tu ziam? Ashkelon le tuipi hui ah a teang mite sim tu in thu ka pia zo hi,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah48:1 Vaanglianbelpa Topa in Moab ngam taw kisai hi bangin ci hi: “Nebo khua mite hesuak vun — a khua kisusia hi! Kiriathaim khua kila zo a, a kulh lianpi kipheltham zo hi, a mite maizum kingasak zo hi;" 
Jeremiah48:2 Moab ngam ii a hoina teng bo zo hi. Ngalte in Heshbon la zo a, Moab minamte suksiat tu sawm ku uh hi. Madmen khua kithimsak tu a; ngalkaphonpi in tuanhcil tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah48:3 Horonaim mite in, ‘Ngoltolna! Kisuksiatna!’ ci in au uh hi." 
Jeremiah48:4 “Moab sia kisusia zo hi; patangte kaana aw ngai vun. 
Jeremiah48:5 Luhith mual kaatona lam tawntung ah amate naangin a kaana awte, Horonaim khuapi paisukna lampi ah ngimin khamin a kaana awte ngai vun." 
Jeremiah48:6 ‘Manlang vun, na suatak natu uh in tai vun! Sennealngam a om ngam laate bangin tai vun!’ amate in ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah48:7 “Moab awng, na hatna le na hauna na suang hi, ahihang tu in nang ngawngawn hong kizo tu a; na pathian Chemosh sia a kumpi tapate le a thiampite taw saltaang khawm tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah48:8 Khua khat beak zongh suksiatna pan suakta ngawl tu a; mualkuam le zaangtam zong kisiasak khawm tu hi. Keima, Topa in ka ci zo hi." 
Jeremiah48:9 Moab atu in thaansuang khat phut vun; hai ngawlin kisia tu hi. A khuate a sia in kinusia tu a, tuasung ah kuama teang kik ngawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah48:10 (A thin theampo taw To pa ii na a seam ngawl pa sia haamsiat vun! Mihing a vaattan ngawl, a that ngawl pa haamsiat vun!)" 
Jeremiah48:11 Topa in, “Moab sia thin muangin om tawntung a, ngamdang ah sal kitangsak ngeingawl hi. Ama sia beal khat pan beal khat sungah a kisung ngeingawl a omcing sapittui taw kibang hi. A ngim lal ngeingawlin lim tawntung hi." 
Jeremiah48:12 “Tua ahiciang tu in sapittui bang a Moab mite a sungkeak tu in mihingte ka paisak hun hong theng tu hi. Amate in a sapit beal hawmsak tu a, tua zawkciang sutham tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah48:13 Tuasia ciang Israel mite ii up le muan Bethel pathian a upkhialna pan a maan mu uh a, a thinkiam bangma in Moab mite zongh, Chemosh a pathian huvau in a thinkiam uh hi." 
Jeremiah48:14 “Moab mite awng, banghangin ngalhangte ka hi uh a, ngalsim thiam ngalkapte ka hi uh kici nu ziam?" 
Jeremiah48:15 Moab le a khuapite kisiasak zo a; a tangval a taktaibel teng kithatlum zo hi. Keima sia kumpipa, Vaanglianbelpa Topa ka hi hi, tuaciang keima in ka ci zo hi." 
Jeremiah48:16 Moab ngam ii lal tu nai zo a; a siat natu hong theng pal tu hi. 
Jeremiah48:17 A nai ah a teangte le a minthanna a he mihingte theampo awng, Tua ngam atu in khuangai vun. ‘A nasia mama a ngamukna vaang bo zo a, a minthanna le a vaangletna om nawn ngawl hi,’ ci vun." 
Jeremiah48:18 No, Dibon khua ah a teangte awng, na minphatna mun panin hong tuaksuk tavun a leivui sungah hong to tavun; Moab a siasak pa sia hi sungah om a, a kulhte siacip in nusia zo hi." 
Jeremiah48:19 Aroer khua ah a teang note awng, lamhui ah dingin ngak vun; a taikeak mihingte tungah bang thu piang ziam ci sia dongh in he vun." 
Jeremiah48:20 ‘Moab puk zo hi, tuasia atu in kap vun; mindaina thuak hi. Moab ngam kisiatna thu sia Arnon ngundung ah taangko vun!’ ci in amate in hong zo tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah48:21 “Mual zaangtam tungah a om khuapite; Holon, Jahzah, Mephath," 
Jeremiah48:22 Dibon, Nebo, Beth Diblathaim," 
Jeremiah48:23 Kiriathaim, Bethgamul, Bethmeon," 
Jeremiah48:24 Kerioth le Bozrah te tungah thukhenna theng zo hi. A khuala le a nai a om Moab ngam khuapite theampo ii tungah thukhenna theng zo hi. 
Jeremiah48:25 Moab ii thahatna kisucip zo a; a vaangletna kisiasak zo hi. Keima, Topa in ka son zo hi,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah48:26 Topa in, “Moab vaisak vun, banghang ziam cile ama in kei hong langpan hi. Moab sia ama luak sungah leiliik tu a midangte nui tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah48:27 Moab awng, Israel mite na nunau sia phawk in. Mihing suamte pawl taw a kiman khawm bangin amate na vawt uh hi." 
Jeremiah48:28 “No, Moab ngam ah a teang mite awng, na khua uh nusia vun! Pai in liangtung ah teang vun! Liangmai ah bu a vawt vakhu sia taw kibang tavun." 
Jeremiah48:29 Moab sia kiphasak mama hi! A mite kiphatsakna, a kisak theina, a kiletsakna le bang zata amate le amate kithupi ngaisut ziam ci thute ka za zo hi." 
Jeremiah48:30 Keima, Topa in amate ii a kihisakna thu ka he hi. Amate ii kisuantaakna sia bangma penh zo ngawl a, a vawtnate sia ngei kho ngawl tu hi." 
Jeremiah48:31 Tua ahikom Moab ngamsung a om mi sim atu le Kir Heres mite atu in ka kap tu hi. 
Jeremiah48:32 Jazer mite atu sangin Sibmah mite atu in ka kaana nasia zaw tu hi. Sibmah khuapi awng, nangma in a baakte Tuipi Thi kaantan a, Jazer ciang dong a zaam sapitkung khat taw na kibang hi. Ahihang tu in na khaal thingngate le na sapitngate kisusia zo hi." 
Jeremiah48:33 Lungdamna le thinnopna sia Moab ngam leiphana panin kila zo hi. Sapit ngoaina panin sapittui a luan ka tawpsak hi; sapit um a lungdam in a au tu kuama om ngawl hi. 
Jeremiah48:34 “Heshbon khuamite le Elealeh mite kap uh a, a kaana aw sia Jahaz ciang dongin kiza thei hi; tua kaana aw sia Zoar khua mite in za thei uh a Horonaim le Eglath Shelishiyah khuate dongin kiza hi. Nimrim lui ngawngawn kang zo hi." 
Jeremiah48:35 Moab mite sia a biakna munte ah meihal biakpiaknate le a pathiante tungah a sangaw biakpiaknate a piak ngawl natu in ka khaktan tu hi. Keima, Topa in ka ci zo hi." 
Jeremiah48:36 “Tua ahikom mithi vuina taamngai a tum khat bangin Moab atu le Kir Heres mite atu in ka khuangai hi; banghang ziam cile a neisa theampo a bo siat hang ahi hi. 
Jeremiah48:37 Amate a vekpi a sam le a khamulte meet uh hi. Amate a vekpi in a khut ki at uh a, mi simin khau-ip puan silh hi." 
Jeremiah48:38 Moab ngamsung innkhum theampo le taangpi khawlmun theampo ah khuangaina ci ngawl bangma dang om ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile kuama dei ngawl thambeal khat bangin Moab ka sutham zo hi." 
Jeremiah48:39 Moab ngam kitamhtham zo hi! Kap vun! Moab kimaimawlsak zo hi. Moab kisiacip zo a, a kiim a paam minamte theampo in nuisan uh hi. Keima, Topa in ka son zo hi,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah48:40 A tha a phalh muvanlai khat bangin minam khat sia Moab ngam tungah hong suktun tu hi ci in Topa in kamciam zo hi," 
Jeremiah48:41 tuaciang a khuate le a kulhte kila tu hi. Tua ni in Moab ngalkapte sia numei nausuak tu khat bangin patau tu uh hi. 
Jeremiah48:42 Moab sia kisusia tu a, minam khat suak zo nawn ngawl tu hi, banghang ziam cile ama in kei hong langpan hi." 
Jeremiah48:43 Patauna, dumte le thaangte in Moab mite ngak nginge hi. Topa in ci zo hi." 
Jeremiah48:44 A patauna pan suatak tu a hanciam pawpo dum sungah taak tu uh a, dum sung panin a kaato pawpo thaang sungah kiman tu uh hi, banghang ziam cile Moab mite lal natu in Topa in hun ciangtan zo hi." 
Jeremiah48:45 A cimaw ngaltaite in Sihon kumpipa ii khatvei a uk ngei na Heshbon khuapi sungah bel natu zong in hanciam uh hi, ahihang tua khuapi sia mei in kaanghtum hi. Ngalsim a kin Moab mite ii ngamngi sang teng le mualsaangte sia mei in kaanghtham zo hi." 
Jeremiah48:46 Moab mite hesuak vun! Chemosh a bia mite kisusia zo a, a tapate le a tanute thongtaak tu in kipaipui zo hi." 
Jeremiah48:47 Ahihang mailam sangah Topa in Moab sia nuamsasak kik tu hi. Hite theampo sia Moab tungah a piang tu thu Topa ii sonsa ahi hi. 
Jeremiah49:1 Ammon thu Topa in hi bangin son hi: “Israel pasalte koisungah om ziam? A ngam a hung tu kuama om ngawl ziam? Banghangin Gad minamte ii ngam sia Molech pathian a bia mihingte in lasakin tua munah teangsak ziam? 
Jeremiah49:2 Ahizong Rabbah khuapi ah a teang mihingte in ngal kidona aw ka zaaksak tu hun hong theng tu a, a khuapi kisiacip in a khuanote kihaltum tu hi. Tuasia ciang Israel in a ngam hong laaksak mite kung pan a ngam la kik tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah49:3 Heshbon mihingte awng, au in kap vun! Ai sia kisiasak zo hi! Rabbah numeite awng khuangai in kap vun! Khau-ip puan silhin kap vun! Lungmangin tai kawkoai vun. Na pathian Molech sia a thiampite le a kumpi tapate taw saltaang tu in kipaipui tu hi." 
Jeremiah49:4 A thumaan ngawl mihingte awng banghangin kisathei nu ziam? Na thahatna kiam susuk hi. Banghangin na thahatna uh suangin kuama in ko hong sim ngam buan te ci nu ziam? 
Jeremiah49:5 Na kiim na paam panin launa kong thengsak tu hi. Na taikeak siat tu uh hi. Na suatak natu in na tai tek tu uh a, na ngalkapte a kaikhawm kik tu kuama om ngawl tu hi." 
Jeremiah49:6 “Ahihang nidang ciang Ammon sia ka nuamsasak kik tu hi. Keima, Topa in ka ci zo hi.”" 
Jeremiah49:7 Vaanglianbelpa Topa in Edom te ii thu hi bangin son hi: “Edom mite in a thumaan a khen thei na sia bosua zo ziam? Ngaisutna a pia theite in a vawt tu bangin son thei nawn ngawl ziam? A pilna theampo bosua zo ziam? 
Jeremiah49:8 Dedan mite awng, kiheak vun a tai vun! Buu vun! Esau ii suan le paalte ka susia tu hi, banghang ziam cile amate daan ka piak tu hun hong theng zo hi." 
Jeremiah49:9 Mihingte in sapitnga a law uh ciang a kung tungah tawm khe a, tuaciang ngutate zanin hong pai ciang amate dei teng bek la uh hi." 
Jeremiah49:10 Ahihang Esau ii suan le paalte a puan ka suutsak siat zo a tuaciang a buk thei nawn ngawl natu in a bukna munte ka kilanghsak zo hi. Edom mite a vekpi in kisusia zo hi. Khat zongh taang ngawl hi. 
Jeremiah49:11 Na tangate ka kungah hong nusiat tavun. Keima in amate ka keam tu hi. Na meingongte in kei hong bealh thei hi. 
Jeremiah49:12 “Daan piak tu a, a kilawm ngawl mite ngawngawn in daan thuakna hai pan dawn tu ahile no, daan piak ngawlin om tu in ki um nu ziam? Hi ngawl hi, tua hai pan dawn hamtang tu nu hi!" 
Jeremiah49:13 Bozrah khuapi sia a lipkhaphuai mun le senneal ngam suak tu hi ci in keima mama in ka kiciam zo hi; mihingte in tua khua sia ciammuina in nei in, a min sia kihaamsiatna in zangh tu uh hi. A nai a om khuanote theampo a tawntungin kisiacip tu hi. Keima, Topa in ka ci zo hi.”" 
Jeremiah49:14 Keima in, “Edom awng, Topa kung panin thu khat ka nga zo hi. Minamte in a ngalkaphonpi a khoptua natu le nang hong sim tu in a kingin natu thu a son tu in Topa in ama te kungah kamtai khat paisak zo hi." 
Jeremiah49:15 Topa in nang hong thazawmsak tu a, kuama in nang hong zakta ngawl tu hi." 
Jeremiah49:16 Na kiphatsakna in nang hong theam zo hi. Amate in nangma hong kiita tu na upza in kuama in nang hong kiita ngawl hi. Nang sia suangliang tung le mualdawn saangna ah na teang a; muvanlai khat bangin a saangna ah na ten hangin Topa in nang hong khiasuk veve tu hi. Topa in son zo hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah49:17 Topa in, “Edom tungah a theng tu suksiatna sia nasia mama tu a, a kaantan theampo lau in ingh tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah49:18 Sodom khua, Gomorrah khua le a kiim a khuate a kisiatsak lai bangin Edom khua kisiasak tu hi. Tua munah kuama teang kik ngeingawl tu hi. Keima, Topa in ka ci zo hi." 
Jeremiah49:19 Tawpi in ngam tawnghtol sung pan hong pusuak a, lopa hingna Jordan ngundung zui in a pai bangin, keima kong pai tu a, Edom mite a ngam uh panin thakhat thu in ka taikeaksak tu hi. Tuasia ciang keima ii teal lampuipa in ngam uk tu hi. Kei taw kitee ngat thei tu akua om ziam? Akua in kei hong thato ngam tu ziam? Kei hong nalh zo tu ukpa akua om ziam?" 
Jeremiah49:20 Tua ahikom Edom mite suksiat natu ka tupna le Teman khuapi mite tungah vawt tu ka tupnate ngai vun. A patangte uh ngawngawn kikaikeak tu a, a kuama po liinglawng tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah49:21 Edom a siat ciang leitung buppi kiliing tu za in a nging khat om tu a, patau auna le kaana awte sia Aqaba tuipi dok dongin kiza tu hi." 
Jeremiah49:22 Muvanlai in a tha phalhin a suktun taw kibangin ngalte in Bozrah sim tu hi. Tua ni in Edom ngalkapte sia nausuak tu a tun numei bangin thin patau in om tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah49:23 Topa in Damascus ii thu hi bangin son hi: “Hamath le Arpad khuapite sungah a teang mihingte sia thusia a zaak uh manin patau a, thinngimin om uh hi. A patauna te tuipi bangin amate tungah kiliim a, thim om thei ngawl uh hi." 
Jeremiah49:24 Damascus mite sia a tha zawm a lau in taikeak uh hi. Numei nausuak tu a tun bang keakin na sa in ngim thuakin om uh hi. 
Jeremiah49:25 Tua a minthang, a lungdam bul khuapi sia kinusia cip zo hi." 
Jeremiah49:26 Tua ni in a tangvalte sia khuapi sung lampi tungah kithat tu a, a ngalkapte theampo kimaimot tu hi." 
Jeremiah49:27 Damascus luphungte mei taw ka hal tu a, Benhadad ii kumpi innte sia ka haltum tu hi. Keima, Vaanglianbelpa Topa in ka son zo hi,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah49:28 Babylon kumpipa Nebuchadnezzar ii a zaw Kedar minam le Hazor ii uk ngamkhennote taw kisai in Topa ii cina pan: “Kedar mite sim vun a, nisuana sangah a om minam sia susia vun!" 
Jeremiah49:29 A puanbukte le a tuu honte, a buk kongkha puankhaite le a buk sungah a om nate theampo laksak vun. A kalaoh te la vun a, a mite tungah, ‘Na kiim na paam theampo ah launa om hi’ ci in son vun." 
Jeremiah49:30 “Hazor mihingte awng, a khuala na ah tai vun a buu vun ci in keima, Topa in kong sonkhol hi. Babylon kumpipa Nebuchadnezzar in no hong thasawm a, ama in," 
Jeremiah49:31 ‘Hong pai tavun! Ngammuang a kisa mite ih sim tu hi! A khuapi in kongpi le nei ngawl, tawkalh natu tawbu le nei ngawl a, kidal vet ngawl hi,’ ci hi." 
Jeremiah49:32 “A kalaoh te le nganno a hul a khoaite theampo la vun! A sam uh a tom in a meet mihingte sia mun theampo ah ka thethaang tu a, mun theampo pan amate tungah tuasiatna ka thengsak tu hi." 
Jeremiah49:33 Hazor ngam sia a tawntungin sennealngam kisuaksak tu a, ngiate bek tua munah teang tu hi. Tua munah kuama teang kik ngeingawl tu hi. Keima, Topa in ka son zo hi,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah49:34 Zedekiah ii Judah kumpi a sua zawk po ciang, Vaanglianbelpa Topa in Elam ngam thu ka tungah hong son hi." 
Jeremiah49:35 Ama in, “Elam ngam a thahatsak mama thalkaap thiamte theampo ka that tu hi." 
Jeremiah49:36 Mun theampo panin Elam ngam sia vui in ka seamsak tu a, a ngaltai mite a thet ngawlna ngam khat beak om ngawl dongin a mite mun theampo ah ka thethaang tu hi." 
Jeremiah49:37 Amate a that nuam a ngalte Elam mite in ka kiitasak tu hi. Ka thin uuk mama na taw in Elam mite ka susia tu a, ka lalcipsak dongin amate a do tu in ngalkaphonpi ka puak tu hi." 
Jeremiah49:38 A kumpite le a lampuite ka susia tu a, tua munah ka kumpi tokhum ka nga tu hi." 
Jeremiah49:39 Ahihang nidang ciang Elam mite ka nuamsasak kik tu hi. Keima, Topa in ka son zo hi,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah50:1 Babylon khuapi le a mite taw kisai in Topa in hi bangin a thupuak sia ka tungah hong son hi: 
Jeremiah50:2 “Minamte tungah hi thu son in! Hi thu thangsak in! Limlakna pia in a, a thu taangko in! Thuku in koi heak in! Babylon taak zo hi! A pathian Marduk kisemtham zo hi! Babylon ii milimte kimaizumsak zo hi; a kiihuai a milimte kisutham hi!" 
Jeremiah50:3 “Saksang panin minam khat Babylon sim tu in hong theng zo a tua sia sennealngam suaksak tu hi. Mihing le nganhingte taikeak tu uh a, tua munah kuama teang ngawl tu hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah50:4 Topa in, “Tua hun hong thet ciang, Israel le Judah mite kap kawmin hong paikhawm tu uh a, amate ii Pathian, keima hong zong tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:5 Amate in Zion lampi dongh tu uh a, tua zawkciang tua sang ah pai tu uh hi. Amate in keima taw a tawntung kiciamna khat vawt tu uh a, bangma hunin palsat ngeingawl tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:6 “Ka mite sia tuucingte ii mualtung tengah a bosua tuute taw kibang hi. Amate sia tuute bangin mual khat pan mual khat ah vakthap kawkoai uh a, a inn omna mun mangil zo uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:7 Amate sia a mute theampo in sim uh hi. A ngalte in, ‘Amate sia Topa tungah maw uh hi, tua ahikom hi bang a amate tungah ih vawt sia kikhial ngawl hi. A taanghpupite in Topa muang hi, tua ahiciang amate mama sia Topa tungah a thumaan top tu uh ahi hi,’ ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:8 “Israel mite awng, Babylon panin taikeak vun! Hi ngam nusia vun! A nusia phitbel hi vun!" 
Jeremiah50:9 Sak sangah a om ngam thahat pawlkhat ka thawn tu a Babylon ka simsak tu hi. Amate in tua ngam sim tu in a thuangin kingual tu a, zo tu uh hi. Amate sia thal taw muiliim savai thiamte ahi uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:10 Babylon khuapi kiphuul tu a, a phuulte in a dei theampo la tu uh hi. Keima, Topa in ka son zo hi,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah50:11 Topa in, “Babylon mite awng, ka minam na suttol uh hi. Note lungdam in na kipaak uh a, khuipui an cicil ahibuale a hahaam siphu khat bangin vak kawkoai nu hi," 
Jeremiah50:12 ahihang na khuapi lian uh sia a vaang kibosak tu a, kimaizumsak tu hi. Babylon sia ngam theampo sung panin a thupi ngawlbel ngam suak tu a, a kongaw le tui om ngawl sennealngam suak tu hi." 
Jeremiah50:13 Ka thin uukna hu in Babylon ah kuama teang ngawl tu hi; a siacip in kinusia tu a, tua mun kaantan in a paite theampo in ingh in lamdang sa tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:14 “Thal toaite awng, Babylon sim tu in kingual vun a kiim uum vun. Na thaltang theampo uh taw Babylon kap vun, banghang ziam cile ama in keima Topa tungah hong maw zo hi." 
Jeremiah50:15 Khuapi kiimkot ah ngal thotna aw taw au vun! Tu in Babylon in ngallel zo hi. A khuapi luphungte sulet zo a cimhtham zo hi. Keima in Babylon te tungah phu ka la hi. Tua ahikom amate tungah phulam vun a, midangte tungah a vawt uh bangin amate tungah vawt vun." 
Jeremiah50:16 Tua ngam sungah thaicii kituu heak hen a, an kila heak hen. Tua munah a teang ngamdangmite theampo in Babylon a sim ngalkaphonpi sia kiita tu a, a inn a lo ah cia kik tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah50:17 Topa in, “Israel mite sia tawpite in delmang a, a kithethaang tuute taw kibang uh hi. A masabel in amate sia Assyria kumpipa in sim a, tua zawkciang Babylon kumpipa Nebuchadnezzar in a ngu khimtham hi." 
Jeremiah50:18 Tua ahikom, Keima, Vaanglianbelpa Topa, Israel ii Pathian in, Assyria kumpilianpa daan ka piak bangma in Nebuchadnezzar kumpipa le a ngam daan ka pia tu hi." 
Jeremiah50:19 Israel mite a ngam ah ka teangsak kik tu hi. Amate in Carmel mual tung le Bashan ngam sungah a ciin ante ne tu uh a, Ephraim le Gilead ngamte sungah a piang ante theampo a du bangin in ne tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:20 Tua hun a thet ciang, Israel ngam ah mawna khialna kimu ngawl tu a, Judah ngam ah seksolna om ngawl tu hi, banghang ziam cile a nuntakna ka kheet lai mihingte ii mawna ka maisak tu hi. Keima, Topa in ka son zo hi,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah50:21 Topa in, “Merathaim mite le Pekod mite sim vun. That vun a susia vun. Kong thupiak theampo seam vun. Keima, Topa in ka ci zo hi." 
Jeremiah50:22 Hi ngam ah ngal kisimna aw kiza a, suksiatna nasia takin om hi." 
Jeremiah50:23 Babylon in leitung buppi sek taw seaktham a, tu in tua sek sia taltan zo hi! Tua ngam ah a piang thute minam theampo in lamdang sa in ingh uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:24 Babylon awng, kei nong do hi, na heak ngawl hang bek hi a, thaang kong siana sungah na awk zo hi." 
Jeremiah50:25 Ka ngalhiamte koina mun ka hong zo hi, ka thin uuk in tua ngalhiamte ka pusua keak zo hi, banghang ziam cile Keima, Vaanglianpipa Topa, Vaanglianbelpa in Babylon ah nasep tu ka nei hang ahi hi." 
Jeremiah50:26 Mun theampo pan sim vun a, a antang kholna munte hong keak vun! Na suttol vanhte antang sen bangin seng to vun! A ngam susia vun! Bang mama khe heak vun!" 
Jeremiah50:27 A ngalkapte theampo that vun! Amate mon vun! Babylon mite a lal a hi uh hi! Amate daan piak tu hun hong theng zo hi!” ci hi. 
Jeremiah50:28 (Ngaltaite Babylon pan suakta in Jerusalem theng uh a, Babylon te ii a Biakinnpi tungah a vawt nate hu in Topa ih Pathian in bangbangin phula ci sia amate in son uh hi.)" 
Jeremiah50:29 “Babylon sim tu in thalkaap thiamte son vun. Thal le thaltang a zangh thiamte theampo kuansak vun. A khuapi kiim uum vun a khat zongh suaktasak heak vun. A sep a vawt theampo thuk kik vun, midangte tungah a vawt bangin a tungah vawt vun, banghang ziam cile a kiphatsakna taw diang in Israel ii a Thiangtho Pa, hong langpan hi." 
Jeremiah50:30 Tua ahikom a tangvalte sia khuapi sung lampi tungah kithatlum tu a, a ngalkapte theampo sia tua ni in kilalcipsak tu hi. Keima, Topa in ka ci zo hi." 
Jeremiah50:31 “Babylon awng, nang sia kiphatsakna taw kidim ni hi. Tua hu in Vaanglianpipa Topa Vaanglianbelpa, Keima in nang kong langpan hi! Nang daan kong piak tu hun hong theng zo hi." 
Jeremiah50:32 A kiphasak na ngam sia lutu in puk tu a, kuama in nang hong phongto ngawl tu hi. Na khuapite ka hal tu a, a kiim ah a om theampo kaanghtum tu hi,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah50:33 Vaanglianbelpa Topa in, “Israel mite le Judah mite in zawthawk vawtna thuak uh hi. Amate a mante theampo in amate hi cinten in cingin pusuaksak ngawl tu hi." 
Jeremiah50:34 Ahihang amate a suatak tu pa sia thahat a — ama min sia Vaanglianbelpa Topa ahi hi. Ama mama in amate vai teng vaansak tu a, leitung ah kilemna thengsak tu hi, ahihang Babylon mite tungah ngimna thengsak tu hi,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah50:35 Topa in, “Babylon ah thina theng hen! A mihingte, a ukte le a mipilte tungah thina theng hen." 
Jeremiah50:36 Leilot kamsaangte tungah thina theng tahen — bang ka mawmawt uh ci ziam! A ngalkapte tungah thina theng tahen — bangza in lauhuai ziam! 
Jeremiah50:37 A siphute le a siphu ngalleangte susia vun! A cial ngalkapte tungah thina theng tahen — bangza in zawm ziam! A sum a paaite susia vun, suttol in laksak vun." 
Jeremiah50:38 A ngam ah nguatui hangsak vun a, a ngunte kangsak vun. Babylon sia a kiitakhuai milim biakna ngam hi a, tua milimte in mihing mawmawte suaksak uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:39 “Tua ahikom Babylon sia doaite, tha ngilote le vacim thiangtho ngawlte teenna ngam suak tu hi. Tua munah bangma hun in mihing teang kik ngei nawn ngawl tu hi." 
Jeremiah50:40 Sodom khua, Gomorrah khua le a nai a khuate ka suksiat bangin Babylon ka susia tu hi. Tua munah kuama teang kik ngeingawl tu hi. Keima, Topa in ka ci zo hi." 
Jeremiah50:41 “Sak sang ngam panin a khuala ah a om a thahat minam khat hong pai hi; kumpi tam mamate ngal do tu in kithoai uh hi. 
Jeremiah50:42 Amate in a thal le namsaute toai uh hi; Amate sia ngilo a ngual hesuakna nei ngawl uh hi. A siphute tung a to uh ciang, tuipi hawk bangin nging hi. Babylon sim tu in amate kithoai uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:43 Babylon kumpipa in tua thu za a, a khutte zaw vanek hi. Ama in numei nautun a nat bangin thinngimna le tak ngimna thuak hi." 
Jeremiah50:44 “Jordan ngundung taam thuk sung pan pusuak in, lopa hingna munah a pai to tawpi khat bangin Keima, Topa kong pai tu a, Babylon te a khuapi uh pan thakhatthu in ka taikeaksak tu hi. Tuasia zawkciang lampui ka tealpa in ngam uk tu hi. Kei taw kitee ngat thei tu akua om ziam? Akua in kei hong thato ngam tu ziam? Hong langpan ngam tu kumpi akua bang om ziam?" 
Jeremiah50:45 Tua ahikom Babylon khuapi suksiat natu ka tupna le a mite tungah ka vawt tu zia ka sawmna teng hong ngai tavun. A patangte ngawngawn kikaikeak tu a, mihing theampo patausak tu hi." 
Jeremiah50:46 Babylon a bo ciang, awnging nasia tu ahikom leitung buppi liing tu hi. Patau in a auna awte minam dangte in za tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah51:1 Topa in, “Babylon le a mite a lalsak vuipi khat ka vasak tu hi." 
Jeremiah51:2 Vuipi in taangphaw a seamkeak bangin Babylon susia tu in ngamdangmite ka puak tu hi. Tua suksiatna ni a thet ciang, amate in mun theampo pan sim tu a, a ngam sia a kolh in nusia tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah51:3 A ngalkapte a thalkaap tu le a thik puan a silh tu hun pia heak vun. A tangvalte khoaikhe heak vun! A ngalkap buppi mon vun. 
Jeremiah51:4 Amate sia a khuapi sung lampi tungah kiliamsak tu a, thi tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah51:5 Amate in Israel ii a Thiangtho Pa, Keima tungah hong maw zo ahitazong Keima, Topa Pathian Vaanglianbelpa in Israel le Judah ka taisan bua hi." 
Jeremiah51:6 Babylon panin tai vun! Na suatak natu in tai vun! Babylon ii mawna khialna hangin thalup thuak heak vun. Keima in tu in phu ka la a, a kilawm bangin daan ka pia hi." 
Jeremiah51:7 Babylon sia leitung buppi a vai sak ka khut sungah a om khamh hai khat taw kibang hi. Minamte in a sapittui ne in a thin ciim ngawl uh hi. 
Jeremiah51:8 Babylon sia thakhat thu pukin kisiacipsak hi! Tuasia khuangai pui vun! A liamma bawl natu in zatui la vun; dam thei lai tha tu hi. 
Jeremiah51:9 Tua munah a teang ngamdangmite in, ‘Babylon hu tu in ka hanciam uh hang hai lei zo hi. Tu in nusia in ih inn ih lo zuan kik ka tawng. Pathian in Babylon sia a tha neiza theampo taw daan pia zo a, siasak dipdeap zo hi,’ ci uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah51:10 Topa in, “Ka mite au a, ‘ Topa in a maan ih hinate lak zo hi. Pai in Topa ih Pathian ii nasepte Jerusalem mite tungah son ka tawng’ ci uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah51:11 Topa in Babylon suksiat tu a sawm hu in Media kumpite thawn zo hi. A Biakinnpi a suksiat hu in ama in hi bangin phulam tu ahi hi. Ngal a sim ngalkapmangte in, “Na thaltang hiamsak vun! Na lum uh la in kithoai vun!" 
Jeremiah51:12 Babylon ii luphungte sim tu in lim lak vun. Phualcingte belapin thahatsak vun! Ngalvilte koi vun! A suam tu mite koi vun!” ci in thupia hi. Topa in Babylon mite tungah ka vawt tu hi a ci sia vawt zo hi. 
Jeremiah51:13 Tua ngam in ngun tam mama nei a, nei le lamh hau mama hi, ahihang a hun bo zo a, a nuntakna khauzam sia kisaattan zo hi." 
Jeremiah51:14 Vaanglianbelpa Topa in Babylon sim tu in mihing tam mama, khaumaw honpui bangin paipui tu a, ngalzawna taw amate au tu uh hi ci in a nuntakna taw kiciam zo hi." 
Jeremiah51:15 Topa in a vaangletna taw lei vawt a; ama ciimna taw leitung bitphua in vantungte phalh hi. 
Jeremiah51:16 Ama ii thupiakna taw van ii tungsia ah a om tuite hawk a; ama in leimong panin meeite paipui hi. Ama in nguatui sungah khua lengsak a, a bumngua kholna inn panin vui vasak hi." 
Jeremiah51:17 Hisia a mu uh ciang, mihingte khuaphawk ngawlin mawmaw kisa uh hi; Milim a vawtte a thinkiam uh hi, banghang ziam cile amate ii vawt pathiante sia, a maan hi ngawl a, nuntakna nei ngawl hi." 
Jeremiah51:18 Tuate sia manh nei ngawl a, no mu tu ahi hi; Topa ii amate taw kisi tu hong pai ciang amate kisiasak tu hi." 
Jeremiah51:19 Jacob ii Pathian sia amate bang hi ngawl hi; Ama sia na theampo a vawtpa hi a, ama mi tatak tu in Israel teal zo hi. Ama min sia Vaanglianbelpa Topa ahi hi." 
Jeremiah51:20 Topa in, “Babylon awng nang sia ka sek na hi a, ka ngalhiam na hi hi. Minamte le kumpi ngamte sukcip natu," 
Jeremiah51:21 Siphu le a tung tote seakthap natu, Siphu ngalleang le a hawlte seakthap natu," 
Jeremiah51:22 pasalte le numeite thalup natu, Khanghaamte le khangmoite thalup natu, tangvalnote le ngaknunote thalup natu," 
Jeremiah51:23 tuucingte le a tuu honte thalup natu, lothote le a siphute thalup natu, ngamukte le uliante sukcip natu in nang kong zangh hi,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah51:24 Topa in, “Jerusalem tungah siatna a vawtte theampo hu in Babylon le a mite tungah ka thuk kik sia na mu tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah51:25 Babylon awng, nang sia leitung buppi a susia mual khat taw na kibang hi, ahihang Keima, Topa sia na ngal ka hi hi. Nang kong man tu a, lei taw kim in vut sungah kong nusia tu hi." 
Jeremiah51:26 Na siatnate a kikholna sung panin suang khat zongh inn sak natu in kizangh kik ngeingawl tu hi. A tawntungin sennealngam khat bang na hi tu hi. Keima, Topa in ka ci zo hi." 
Jeremiah51:27 “Ngalsim natu in heaksakna lim pia vun! Minamte ii zaak thei tu in lemle tum vun! Babylon sim tu in minamte kithoaisak vun! Ngalsim tu in Ararat ngam, Minni ngam le Ashkenaz ngamte son vun. Ngalsim lampui tu in ngalkap mang khat see vun. Khaumaw honkhat bangin siphute keng vun." 
Jeremiah51:28 Babylon sim tu in minamte kithoaisak vun. Media kumpite, a lampuite le a uliante le amate ii uk ngamte theampo ii ngalkaphonpite vaitha vun." 
Jeremiah51:29 Leitung sia lau in liing hi; banghang ziam cile Babylon ngam sia kuama ii ten ngawlna sennealngam suaksak tu a, Topa in a ngealna a taangtutsak hang ahi hi." 
Jeremiah51:30 Babylon ngalkapte ngalsim nawn ngawlin a kulh sungah om uh hi. Amate a thin uh no in numeite bang hi zo hi. A khuapi kongpite taltan zo a, a innte kaangh hi." 
Jeremiah51:31 Ama ii khuapi sia a pangh theampo panin kisutham zo hi ci in Babylon kumpipa tungah ko tu in kamtai khat zawkciang khat tai hi. 
Jeremiah51:32 Ngalte in ngun kaantanna mun sia la zo a ngalpanna kulh teng hal zo hi. Babylon ngalkapte patau khat sua hi. 
Jeremiah51:33 Khuangeingawlin ngalte in ancilna munah taangcil bangin amate saat vawkin tuanhcil tu uh hi. Keima, Vaanglianbelpa Topa Israel ii Pathian in ka ci zo hi,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah51:34 Babylon kumpipa in, Jerusalem sia saattan in ne hi. Ama in thambeal khat bangin khuapi hawm suaksak a; ngulpui khat bangin ama in valh hi, ama in a dei teng la in a dang teng vawk hi." 
Jeremiah51:35 Zion mite in, “Hong ngoltol vawtna hangin Babylon in mawpu tahen!” ci ta uh hen. Jerusalem mite in, “Koma ii thuakna hu in Babylon in mawsiat thuak tahen!” ci ta uh hen." 
Jeremiah51:36 Tua ahikom Topa in Jerusalem mite tungah, “Na thu kong panpui tu a no tungah hong vawtna hu in na ngalte ka thuaksak tu hi. Babylon te ii tuinaak le a ngunte ka kangsak tu hi." 
Jeremiah51:37 Tua ngam sia ngamsate teenna ninthuk suak tu hi. Tua mun sia thaadam huai mun hi tu a; kuama teang ngawl tu hi, a mute theampo in lau tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah51:38 Babylon te theampo sia tawpite bangin hawk tu a, tawpi note bangin thuum tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah51:39 Amate duhop uh ziam? Amate atu in anneakpoai khat ka vawt tu a, zukham lungdam in ka omsak tu hi. Amate mu tu uh a khanglo ngeingawl tu hi." 
Jeremiah51:40 Tuunote, kealte le tuutalte bangin amate thalup tu in ka paipui tu hi. Keima, Topa in ka son zo hi,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah51:41 Topa in Babylon thu hi bangin son hi; “Leitung buppi ii pok khuapi sia kila zo hi! Minamte atu in Babylon sia a thaadam huai suak zo hi!. 
Jeremiah51:42 Tuipi sia Babylon khua tungah kinil zo a, tuihual te hawk in khum zo hi." 
Jeremiah51:43 Khuate thaadam huai suak zo a, kuama teen ngawl, khualhaw ngawlna, tui om ngawl sennealngam bang ahi hi." 
Jeremiah51:44 Babylon ii pathian Bel sia daan ka pia tu a, a vanh nguk teng ka pia kiksak tu hi; minamte in ama bia nawn ngawl tu uh hi. “Babylon ii luphungte cimh zo hi." 
Jeremiah51:45 Israel mite awng, tua mun panin tai vun! Na nuntak natu in ka thin uuk tutna pan tai vun." 
Jeremiah51:46 Kamleang na zakte hu in na thin uh kiamsak heak vun a, lau heak vun. Kum simin a kibang ngawl kamleang — ngamsung le kumpi khat le khat kidona, ngongtatna vai kamleangte kizel hi." 
Jeremiah51:47 Tua ahikom Babylon ii milimte daan ka piak tu hun hong theng hi. A ngam buppi kimaizumsak tu a, a mite theampo kithatlum tu hi." 
Jeremiah51:48 Saksang pan a susia tu in hong pai mite khut sungah Babylon a taak ciang lei le van ah a omte theampo lungdam in au tu uh hi. 
Jeremiah51:49 Babylon in leitung theampo a mihingte thisak hi, Israel te tam mama thisak ahikom tu in Babylon bo tu hi. Keima, Topa in ka son zo hi,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah51:50 Topa in Babylon a om a mite tungah: “Thina panin suakta zo nu hi! Tu in pai vun! Ngak heak vun! Inn taw kikhuala na hi uh hangin Keima na Topa hong ngaisun tavun a Jerusalem phawk vun. 
Jeremiah51:51 Note in, ‘Ih min hong kidaisak zo a hong kimaizumsak zo hi; Ngamdangmite in Biakinnpi sung a thiangtho na munte la zo ahikom cimaw cip ka kisa uh hi,’ na ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah51:52 Tua ahikom Babylon khua a milimte tungah daan ka piak tu hun le ngamsung theampo ah a liamte a tau tu hun hong theng tu hi ka ci hi. 
Jeremiah51:53 Babylon sia van ah kaato thei in, tua munah kulh kho khat a vawt thei hial zongin tua kulh susia tu in mihing ka puak veve tu hi. Keima, Topa in ka son zo hi,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah51:54 Topa in, “Babylon khua sungah kaana aw le, ngamsung kisuksiatna hu in khuangaina aw ngai vun." 
Jeremiah51:55 Babylon ka susia tu a, ka ngamkhingsak tu hi. Ngalkaphonpite in tuihual bangin del in a nging tatakin au in sim uh hi." 
Jeremiah51:56 Amate Babylon susia tu in hong pai zo hi; a ngalkapte kiman a, a thalte kithiaktan hi. A ngilote daan a pia sia Pathian Keima ka hi a, a kiphu bangin Babylon daan ka pia tu hi." 
Jeremiah51:57 A ngamukte — mipilte, lampuite le ngalkapte ka vaisak tu hi. Amate mu in khanglo ngeingawl tu uh hi. Keima kumpipa in ka ci zo hi; Keima in Vaanglianbelpa Topa ka hi hi." 
Jeremiah51:58 A thahat Babylon luphungte lei ah kilawnsuk tu a, A saang khuapi kongpite kihaltum tu hi. Minamte ii nasepna sia bangma in kimang ngawl hi; a hanciamnate kaanghtum hi. Keima, Vaanglianbelpa Topa in ka son zo hi,” ci hi." 
Jeremiah51:59 Zedekiah kumpipa a hu pa sia, Mahseiah ii tupa, Neriah ii tapa Seraiah ahi hi. Zedekiah ii Judah kumpi a sua zawk a kum lina kumin, Seraiah sia ama taw Babylon ah paikhawm hi, keima in Seraiah tungah thu pawlkhat ka hil hi." 
Jeremiah51:60 Babylon tungah a theng tu suksiatna thu theampo le Babylon taw kisai hi thudangte theampo laibu khat sungah ka ciamtee hi. 
Jeremiah51:61 Keima in Seraiah tungah, “Babylon na thet ciang hi laibu sungah a ki at thute theampo mipite tungah a ngingin sim in." 
Jeremiah51:62 Tua zawkciang, hi bang thu na ngen in, ‘ Topa awng, hi mun sia a nungta, mihing hikale nganhing hikale a om ngawlna tu le a tawntung sennealngam bang ahi natu in ka susia tu na ci zo hi.’" 
Jeremiah51:63 Seraiah awng, hi laibu sia mipite tungah na sim zawkciang, suangtum khat tungah khit in a, Euphrates ngun sungah vawk in," 
Jeremiah51:64 tuaciang, ‘Hi bangin Babylon tungah tung tu hi — Babylon sia tui sungah tumsuk tu a lawtto kik ngeingawl tu hi. Banghang ziam cile Topa in suksiatna sia Babylon tungah a thetsak tu hang ahi hi,’ ci in,” ka ci hi. Jeremiah ii kammalte sia tu teng ahi hi." 
Jeremiah52:1 Zedekiah sia Judah kumpi a sua lai in kum kul le kum khat pha a, Jerusalem ah kum sawm le kum khat uk hi. A nu ii min sia Hamutal hi a, Libnah khuapi ah a teang Jeremiah ii tanu ahi hi." 
Jeremiah52:2 Jehoiakim kumpipa ii mawna khialna a vawt bangma in Zedekiah kumpipa in Topa tungah maw hi. 
Jeremiah52:3 Topa sia Jerusalem le Judah mite tungah thin uuk mama ahikom a mit muna pan hawlkhia hi. Zedekiah in Babylon kumpipa Nebuchadnezzar leedo hi," 
Jeremiah52:4 tua ahiciang Zedekiah ii kumpi a sua zawk kum kua kum, a tha sawmna ni sawm ni in Nebuchadnezzar in a ngalkapte theampo taw pai in Jerusalem sim uh hi. Amate in khuapi pua sangah ngiaphual saatin, khuapi kiimkot ah ngal uumci na luphung vawt a," 
Jeremiah52:5 tuaciang Zedekiah kumpipa maan zawk kum sawm le kum khat a phak dong tua khuapi uumci uh hi. 
Jeremiah52:6 Tua kum a tha lina ni kua ni in kialpi nasia mama a, mite neak tu bangma taang nawn ngawl ahikom," 
Jeremiah52:7 khuapi uumna luphungte kisulet hi. Babylon te in khuapi uumci hi napi, tua ngalkapte theampo zan lai in suakta uh hi. Amate sia kumpi huan paina lam zui in luphung te ni ii a kikawnna kongpi sia kaantan in Jordan Kuam sang zuanin tai uh hi." 
Jeremiah52:8 Ahihang Babylon ngalkaphonpi in Zedekiah kumpipa delkot in Jericho khua nai zaangtam ah man uh hi, a ngalkapte theampo in Zedekiah taisan uh hi." 
Jeremiah52:9 Zedekiah sia Nebuchadnezzar kumpipa kungah kipaipui hi, tualai in Nebuchadnezzar sia Hamath ngam Riblah khuapi ah om a tua munah Nebuchadnezzar in ama tungah thukhen hi." 
Jeremiah52:10 Riblah ah Nebuchadnezzar in Zedekiah ii tapate sia a pa ii mu tang ma in that hi, tuaciang ama in Judah uliante zongh thatsak hi." 
Jeremiah52:11 Tua zawkciang, ama in Zedekiah ii mittangte khelsak a kol thaakin Babylon ah paipui hi. Zedekiah sia a thi ni dong Babylon thong sungah om hi." 
Jeremiah52:12 Nebuchadnezzar ii Babylon kumpi a sep zawk kum sawm le kum kua kum a tha ngana, ni sawm ni in, kumpipa tungah ngaisutna a pia pa le a ngalkaphonpi ukpa Nebuzaradan sia Jerusalem khua ah tum hi." 
Jeremiah52:13 Ama in Biakinnpi, kumpi inn le Jerusalem khua sungah mi thupi theampo ii innte mei taw haltum hi;" 
Jeremiah52:14 tuaciang a ngalkapte in khuapi luphungte sutham uh hi. 
Jeremiah52:15 Tuaciang Nebuzaradan in khua sungah a taanglai mite, khutthiam mi a taanglaite le Babylon te kungah hong taite Babylon ah paipui hi." 
Jeremiah52:16 Ahihang ama in nei le lamh a nei ngawl, a zawngbel mihing pawlkhat, Judah ngam sungah nusia in sapithuan le lo sungah naseam tu in koi hi." 
Jeremiah52:17 Babylon te in Biakinnpi sungah a om taau khuamte le khuileangte le taau tuikuang lian sia sutham hi, tuaciang taaute theampo amate in Babylon ah paipui uh hi." 
Jeremiah52:18 Amate in kawkeaute, biaknatau thianthosakna a, a kizangh vut kuangte, meiinn puuana a, a nazakte, sangaw biakpiakna chi donna kuangte, ngimnamtui halna kuangte le biakinn kikhopna a, a kizangh taau taw a kivawt nate theampo zongh la uh hi." 
Jeremiah52:19 Amate in khamh ahibuale ngunn taw a kivawt nate theampo la uh hi: tuate sia kuangnote, meikam toaina bealpeute, sangaw biakpiakna a chi donna kuangte, vut kuangte, meiinn ngaknate, ngimnamtui halna kuangte le sapittui sunna biakpiakna haite ahi uh hi." 
Jeremiah52:20 Solomon kumpipa ii Biakinnpi a tu a vawt taau vanhte — khuam niite, khuileangte, tuikuang lian sia le, a nanna khuital sawm le niite — sia khaitee tu in ngit leih hi." 
Jeremiah52:21 A khuam niite sia kibang linlian hi: khat sia metre 8 saang a, a kiimkot metre 5.3 pha hi. Tuate sia a sung hawm a, a thik sia millimetre 75 saa hi. Khuam dawn ah taau taw a kivawt a tungkhu khat veve om a, metre 2.2 saang hi, a kiimkot sia talee thingnga lim taw a kizeam thikpaona om a, a vekpi in taau taw kivawt hi." 
Jeremiah52:22  
Jeremiah52:23 Khuam khat sim ii tungkhuna theampo tungah talee nga zakhat veu om a, sawmkua le luk sia lei panin kimu thei hi." 
Jeremiah52:24 Tua bek dom ngawlin ngalkaphonpi ukpa, Nebuzaradan in Thiampi Lianbelpa Seraiah, thiampi dom Zephaniah le a thupi biakinn ulian dang thum te thongtaak tu in paipui hi." 
Jeremiah52:24 Tua bek dom ngawlin ngalkaphonpi ukpa, Nebuzaradan in Thiampi Lianbelpa Seraiah, thiampi dom Zephaniah le a thupi biakinn ulian dang thum te thongtaak tu in paipui hi." 
Jeremiah52:25 Khuapi sung panin ngalkapte a uk ngalkap mangpa, khua sungah a taanglai, kumpipa ngaisutna a piate sung pan mihing sali, ngalkap zum lai a keam, ngalkapmang pa a hupa le a dang mihing thupi sawmlukte ama in paipui hi." 
Jeremiah52:26 Nebuzaradan in amate sia Riblah khuapi ah a om, Babylon kumpipa kungah paipui hi," 
Jeremiah52:27 tua khuapi sia Hamath ngam sungah om hi. Tua munah kumpipa in amate saatsak in thatlum hi. Tua ahikom Judah mite sia a ngam panin saltaang tu in kipaipui hi. 
Jeremiah52:28 Hisia in Nebuchadnezzar ii thongtaak a, a paipui mite teng kitepteena ahi hi: Ama ii kumpi a sep zawk a kum sali kum in ama in mihing 3,023 paipui hi;" 
Jeremiah52:29 a kum sawm le kum liat kum in, Jerusalem panin 832;" 
Jeremiah52:30 tuaciang a kum kul le kum thum kumin, 745 — Nebuzaradan in paipui hi. A vekpi in mihing 4,600 kipaipui hi." 
Jeremiah52:31 Evilmerodach sia Babylon kumpi a sua kumin, ama in Judah kumpipa Jehoiachin sia thong panin a pusuasakna taw a dik na lak hi. Hi bang a suataksak ni sia Jehoiachin thongtaak a, a kipaipui zawk kum sawmthum le kum sali kum, a tha sawm le tha niina ni kul le ni nga ni ahi hi." 
Jeremiah52:32 Evilmerodach in Jehoiachin phat vawt a, Babylon ah ama taw saltaang khawm kumpi dangte sangin a vaang piakna lian zaw hi." 
Jeremiah52:33 Tua ahikom Jehoiachin sia a thong puante kilaihsakin a nuntak lai teng kumpipa ii sabuai ah an kinesak hi. 
Jeremiah52:34 A nuntak sung ni sim a kisap na ah a zak tu in ama sia dangka kipia tawntung hi. 
Lamentations1:1 Khatvei lai in mihing taw a kidim Jerusalem khuapi bangza in ngamkhing ziam! Leitung ii khatvei a zatak ngei sia tu in meingongnu khat taw kibang hi; khuapi teng po pan a tuanngenbel sia sila dinmun ah taak zo hi. 
Lamentations1:2 Zankhuateakin ama kap a; a biangkho ah thitui luang suk vahii hi. A lawm a ngual masa te khat zongh ama heeneam tu taang ngawl hi, A kipawlpuite in ama leeheak zo a, tu in langpan tek ta uh hi." 
Lamentations1:3 Judah ii mite sia inn pan zawthawk thu taw a kihawlkeak a cimaw silate ahi uh hi. Ngamdang ah amate sila in om a, a mun, a ngam ci tu nei ngawl uh hi — Ngalte in kiim uum a, a suatak natu lam bing hi." 
Lamentations1:4 Ni thiangtho nite ah biakna vawt tu in, Biakinnpi ah kuama hong pai ngawl hi. Tua munah lasa ngaknute in ngim thuak a, a thiampite mau vangui thei bek hi. Khuapi kongpite hawm a, Zion in ngim thuak hi." 
Lamentations1:5 A ngalte in ama zo a; amate khutnuai ah koi hi. A khialna tam mamate hangin Topa in ngim thuaksak hi; A tate kipummat in kipaipui hi. 
Lamentations1:6 Jerusalem phatna sia bo zo hi. A lampuite sia sangai ngilkial a thazawm, savaite mai ah a tai ciang a tha bo dedek te bang ahi hi." 
Lamentations1:7 Tu in a ngamkhing, a siacip sa Jerusalem khua in nidang a phatna nung phaw kik hi. A ngalte khut sung a thet ciang a hu tu kuama om ngawl hi; A ngallelna sia ama a zote in nuisan uh hi." 
Lamentations1:8 A minphatna teng bo a; a pumnguak in om a ngual zawnsak thuak hi. Ama tau a maizum in a mai seal hi. Jerusalem in lipkhaphuai mawna taw ama le ama kininsak hi. 
Lamentations1:9 A thiantho ngawlna ol tak kimu a, ahizong a thuak tu sia awlmawk ngawl hi. Ama lelna sia nasia leilam a kuama in heeneam zo ngawl hi. A ngalte in zothal ahiciang, Topa tungah hesuak ngen in kap hi." 
Lamentations1:10 A ngalte in ama ii a nei a lamh theampo suttol hi. Topa ii Gentile te pai tu a khaamna mun Biakinnpi sung mama ah a ngalte a tum sia ama in mu hi. 
Lamentations1:11 A mite in bang khat po neak tu a zon uh ciang mau vangui uh hi; Amate in a nuntak thei natu in a nei a lamhte an taw theak uh hi. “Kei hong en ka ven, Topa awng; ka ngim nga zia hong mu ta'n,” ci in a khuapi bup in ko hi." 
Lamentations1:12 “Kei hong en ka ven!” ci in ama kaantan in a pai theampo tungah ko hi. “Kei nat bangin kuama in a na thuak ngeingawl hi. Topa in a thin uuk laitak hong thuaksak natna a hi hi. 
Lamentations1:13 “Ama in tungsang pan mei hong khiaksuk a, tua mei in ka sung hong kaangh hi. Ama in kei thaang hong sia a, lei ah hong sial hi. Tua zawkciang ama in hong taisan a, a na thuak tan tu in hong nusia hi." 
Lamentations1:14 “Ama in ka mawna theampo ciamtee a, a vekpi in sawm khawm hi; Tuate ka ngawng kiim ah hong awsak a, a ngitna thuak la in ka thazawm hi. Topa in ka ngalte khut sungah hong aap a, ka cimaw hi." 
Lamentations1:15 “Topa in ka ngalkap thahatbelte theampo nuisan lel a; Ama in ka tangvalte a lalsak tu in ngalkaphonpi khat puak hi. Sapit ngoaina sungah sapitngate kingoai thap bangin ka mite ama in sucip hi. 
Lamentations1:16 “Tua hu in ka mittangte thitui taw kidim leet hi. Kuama in hong heeneam thei ngawl a; kuama in hong hanthawn thei ngawl hi. Ngalte in hong zothal a; ka mite in bangma nei nawn ngawl uh hi. 
Lamentations1:17 “Ka khutte zan kaleng kuama in hong hu ngawl hi. Mun theampo pan kei hong langpan tu ngalte Topa in sam zo hi. Amate in a kiihuai nate bangin kei hong vawt hi. 
Lamentations1:18 “Ahihang Topa sia a maan hi a, keima in a thu ka nit ngawl hang hi zaw hi. Hong ngai tavun, mun theampo a om mite awng; a na ka thuak hong en tavun. Ka ngaknute le ka tangvalte sia ngalmat in kipaipui siat zo hi." 
Lamentations1:19 “Ka pawlpuite ka sam a, ahihang amate in hong hu nuam ngawl hi. Thiampite le lampuite sia nuntak natu an a zon laitak ma in khuapi lampite tungah thi uh hi." 
Lamentations1:20 “ Topa awng, na ka sak nate, ka thinbot vangui nate hong en ta'n! Ka mawnate hangin khuangai in ka thin tamhtham hi. Lampite ah kithalupna om a; innsuum sungsang ngawngawn ah thina theng hi." 
Lamentations1:21 “Ka tau nate hong ngai ta'n; hong heeneam tu kuama om ngawl hi. Tuasiatna nong thuaksak manin ka ngalte lungdam uh hi. Nong kamciam ni hong thengsak ta'n a; keima thuak bangin ka ngalte thuaksak in. 
Lamentations1:22 “Amate seksolnate theampo hu in amate ningkhiin in; Ka mawnate hu in daan nong piak bangma in amate daan pia in. Thasiatna taw ka tau a, ka thin na hi.”" 
Lamentations2:1 Topa a thin uuk in Zion sia khuazing taw tuam zo hi. A vantung hoina te ama in sia sak zo hi. A thin uuk ni in a Biakinnpi ngawngawn nusia hi. 
Lamentations2:2 Topa in Judah ngam khuano theampo hesuak ngawlin lalthamsak a, Ngam huukna kulhpite baltham hi. Ama in kumpi ngam le a ukte maizum pia hi." 
Lamentations2:3 Ama in a thinso in Israel te thahatna saattham hi. Ngalte hong kuan ciang ama in hong hu nuam ngawl hi. Kaanghmei bangin ama in ei hong zaap keak a, na theampo lalthamsak hi." 
Lamentations2:4 Eite sia ngal bang phetin a thaltangte taw hong tuung hi; Ih lungdamna le ih diksak theampo ama in thatlum hi. Hi lai Jerusalem ah ama ii thin uukna meikuang eite in ih thuak hi. 
Lamentations2:5 Topa in ngal khat bangin Israel susia zo hi. Ama in a kulhte le kumpi innte a zaancip sa in nusia hi. Ama in Judah mite tungah a bo thei ngawl heena tungsak hi. 
Lamentations2:6 Ama ih biakna mun Biakinnpi sia ama in a bebekin sutham hi. Ama in ni thiangthote le Sabbath te bosak zo hi. Kumpipa le thiampipa in ama thin uukna a kibangin thuak khawm uh hi. 
Lamentations2:7 Topa in a biaknatau nial a, ama ii a thiangtho Biakinnpi taisan hi. Ama in Biakinn pangte sia ngalte in balthamsak hi. Khatvei lai in lungdamna taw ih biakna munah amate ngalzo in au uh hi." 
Lamentations2:8 Zion khuapi luphungte a cipthap tu sia Topa in ciangtan zo hi. A vekpi a sia tu in ama in see zo hi. Tu in tausaangte le luphungte lal khawm hi. 
Lamentations2:9 Kongpite sia leivum suangvum sungah kivuknelh a, a zawlte a bebekin kivaat tham zo hi. Kumpipa le namliante tu in saltaang in om hi. Thukham kihil nawn ngawlin, kamsaangte in mu kholnate Topa ii tung pan nga ngawl hi." 
Lamentations2:10 Jerusalem ii pasal huaite sia huthe ngawlin lei ah to khipkhep uh hi. A lu tungah leivui kithe in khau-ip puan silh uh hi. Ngaknu note lei ah a lu kun uh hi. 
Lamentations2:11 Ka ka kaana in ka mitte paat zo a, ka thin na mama hi. Ka mite lalna hangin hee in ka tha zawm ngawp hi. Patangnote le nausente khuapi lampite ah butthi uh hi." 
Lamentations2:12 Amate ngilkial dangtaak in a nute kaa uh hi. Amate sia a liamte bang phetin lampi ah puk uh a, Tuaciang a nute ii kaang sungah dadam in thi uh hi." 
Lamentations2:13 Jerusalem awng, kong it Jerusalem awng, bang kong ci thei tu ziam? Bangbangin nang hong heeneam thei tu khi ziam? Kuama in hi bang peuma in thuak ngeingawl hi. Na tuasiatna sia tuipi bangin mong nei ngawl a; bangma muanmawk thei tu om ngawl hi." 
Lamentations2:14 Na kamsaangte in leilot thu ngawl po nang tungah son tu nei ngawl hi. Na mawna a pholaak ngeingawl amate thuhilna taw nang hong theam ahi hi. Amate in na kisii kik tu a kul ngawl tu dongin hong ngaisunsak hi. 
Lamentations2:15 Khuapi kaantan in a pai mihingte in nangma hong ngaimawk et uh hi. Amate in Jerusalem ii zaanthapna sia a lu pei in nuisan uh hi: “Hisia, tua khuapi hoi sia ma hi kana ziam? Hisia, leitung bup ii kiphatsakpui sia hi ka na ziam?”" 
Lamentations2:16 Na ngalte theampo in hong selno in etsatna taw nang hong salh uh hi. Amate mukmen in “Khuapi lalthamsak zo hing! hisia ih ngalaakbel ni hi!” ci in selno uh hi. 
Lamentations2:17 Topa in hong tawnna teng a khak belin tungsak hi. Ama in hun saupi lai a eite kidop natu hong hil sa bangin hesuakna om ngawlin hong lalsak hi. Ama in ih ngalte ngalzosak a, ih ngallelna ah amate lungdamsak hi." 
Lamentations2:18 Jerusalem awng, na luphungte mama in Topa ko tahen! Na thituite a sun a zanin ngun bangin luangsak in; kaana le khuangaina taw nangma le nangma kingawt in!" 
Lamentations2:19 Zankhuateak Topa tungah ko tu in tho kikik in! Na thin na lung takpi taw na patangte — lampi king sim ah neak tu nei ngawl pukhong in a thi tu na patangte atu in ama tungah hesuak ngen in. 
Lamentations2:20 En in, Topa awng! Banghang hi bangin daan hong thuaksak ni ziam! Nupite in a it a tate ii sa ne uh hi! Thiampite le kamsaangte sia Biakinnpi sung mama ah kithatlum hi!" 
Lamentations2:21 A moi a haam a kibangin lampi ah thi uh hi. Ngalte in ngaknu le tangval teng namsau taw thatlum uh hi. Na thin uuk ni in hesuak ngawlin amate na thatlum hi. 
Lamentations2:22 Nangma in keima ii kiim ah hong lausak poai vawt tu in ka ngalte na sam a, Tuaciang tua na thin uuk ni in kuama suakta zo ngawl hi. Amate in itna taw ka vak ka taa sa tanote suamlum uh hi." 
Lamentations3:1 Pathian ii daan piakna bangbang tatak hi tu ziam ci in a he sia keima ka hi hi. 
Lamentations3:2 Ama in khuazing sungah a thuk vaial, a thuk vaial in kei hong hawlkeak hi." 
Lamentations3:3 Tuaciang ama in hong hesuak ngawlin kei hong vevel hi. 
Lamentations3:4 Ama in ka samal sia a at babangin nusia a, ka ngu ka taang thiaktan hi." 
Lamentations3:5 Ama in thasiatna le mauna thong sungah hong khum hi. 
Lamentations3:6 Ama in a uih thina khuazing sungah kei hong teangsak hamtang hi. 
Lamentations3:7 Ama in thikkhau taw hong heen a; suatak tu muanmawk om ngawl thongtaak a, a luangta khat ka hi hi." 
Lamentations3:8 Hu ngenin nging takin ka kap a, ahizong Pathian in hong ngai nuam ngawl hi;" 
Lamentations3:9 Lam ka pai ciang ka hoi vadai a; ka heakna mun theampo ah suangpangte in ka mai hong khak hi. 
Lamentations3:10 Vompui khat bangin ama in kei hong pang nginge a; tawpi khat bangin ama in hong baw hi. 
Lamentations3:11 Ama in lam puasia ah kei hong del a, hong balneen in hong nusia hi." 
Lamentations3:12 Ama in a thal keak a, kei sia a thaltangte taw phutuunna in hong nei hi." 
Lamentations3:13 Ama in a thaltangte taw ka pumpi thuk bunin hong kap hi. 
Lamentations3:14 Mihingte in sunkhuateak in kei hong nuisan a; amate theampo atu in kei sia ciammuina ka suak hi. 
Lamentations3:15 An le tui hong piak taangin ama in nasia takin hong thuaksak hi. 
Lamentations3:16 Ama in ka maitang lei ah hong tat a, suangtum tungah ka hate sutan hi." 
Lamentations3:17 Cidamna, thinnopna le lungdamna cite bang ziam ci sia ka mangil zo hi." 
Lamentations3:18 Khuangei nungta nawn ngawl tu khi hi; Topa sungah ka lametna bo zo hi; 
Lamentations3:19 Natna ka thuakna, inn le lo nei ngawlin ka omnate ka ngaisut sia nguu ahi hi." 
Lamentations3:20 A tawntungin tuate ka ngaisun a, ka thin kiam hi." 
Lamentations3:21 Ahizong hi thu khat ka phaw ciang, lametna hong piang kik hi:" 
Lamentations3:22 A kiam ngeingawl Topa ii hong itna le hong hesuakna kizom suak lai a; 
Lamentations3:23 zing khuavak bangin thak suak tawntung a, nisuak pealmaw bang ahi hi." 
Lamentations3:24 Topa bekma ka nei hi a, ama tung bek ah ka lametna ka koi hi." 
Lamentations3:25 Ama a muangte theampo tungah Topa pha hi. 
Lamentations3:26 Tua ahikom eite atu in, thin sauna taw ama ngakin ih om tu — eite hong ngum tu in ama ngakin ih om tu — phabel hi." 
Lamentations3:27 Ih khan moi lai in hi thinsauna sin tu phabel hi. 
Lamentations3:28 Ngimna ih thuak ciang thinsauna taw thimdide in eima nguak ih to tu ahi hi; 
Lamentations3:29 Kipum aapin ih kun tu ahi hi, banghang ziam cile lametna om thei lai tu hi." 
Lamentations3:30 Hong kivua in hong kizawngsak kale tuate theampo ih saang thiam tu hi. 
Lamentations3:31 Topa sia hesuakna taw kidim a, a tawntungin eite hong nial ngawl tu hi." 
Lamentations3:32 Ama in eite heena hong thuaksak thei tu hi, ahihang ama ii eite hong itna sia maan in kho hi." 
Lamentations3:33 Ama in eite hong khuangaisak, hong natsak sia nuamsa tuan ngawl hi." 
Lamentations3:34 Topa in thong sungah thinngimna ih thuak ciang hong heaksak a; 
Lamentations3:35 Ama ii eite hong piak hamphatna te ih taan ciang hong heaksak hi; 
Lamentations3:36 thukhenzum ah thutang khenna a om ngawl ciang, ama in he hi." 
Lamentations3:37 Topa deina sia bekma kiseam suak tawntung hi. 
Lamentations3:38 Ama thu piakna zui in a pha le a sia a kibangin piang hi. 
Lamentations3:39 Ih mawna hangin daan hong kipiak ciang banghang phuphun tu hi ziam? 
Lamentations3:40 Ih kalsuan nate en pha kikin Topa kungah heak kik tawng. 
Lamentations3:41 Vantung a om ih Pathian tungah ih thinsung kongkha hongin thungen tawng," 
Lamentations3:42 “ Topa awng, kote mawin, kong langpan zo uh a, nangma in nong maisak bua hi." 
Lamentations3:43 “Nangma in kote nong zuizen a nong thatlum hi; na thin uukna in na hesuakna seal hi," 
Lamentations3:44 na thinsona meeikaai sia saa leih ahikom kote thungetnate nang kungah hong theng zo ngawl hi. 
Lamentations3:45 Nangma in kote simlei ninthuk nong sua hi. 
Lamentations3:46 “Ka ngalte theampo in kote hong selno in hong nunau uh hi. 
Lamentations3:47 Kote in tuasiatna le siatna ka thuak zo uh a, launa le kiitakna sungah ka nungta uh hi." 
Lamentations3:48 Ka mite siatna hu in ka thituite ngun bangin luang hi. 
Lamentations3:49 “Ka thituite sia 
Lamentations3:50 Topa in vantung pan hong ensuk a, eite hong mu dong a kangmaw lui bangin luang vapua top hi." 
Lamentations3:51 Khuapi sungah numeite bang tawk ziam ci sia ka mu ciang ka khuangai mama hi. 
Lamentations3:52 “Kei hong ngaimawk natu thu a nei ngawl ngalte in, vacim khat bangin thaang sungah kei hong awksak hi." 
Lamentations3:53 Amate in leidum khat sungah hingtangin hong khiasuk a suang khat taw akua vang khak uh hi. 
Lamentations3:54 Tui in hong khuum tu in kithoai a, tuaciang thina a nai sia ka ngaisun hi." 
Lamentations3:55 “ Topa awng, dum tawtawngh panin nang kong sam hi," 
Lamentations3:56 Kong sapna hong ngai ta'n ci in kong nget ciangin nong za hi. 
Lamentations3:57 Nong zo a, lau heak in nong ci hi." 
Lamentations3:58 “ Topa awng, kei hong suatak tu in nong pai a, ka nuntakna nong hun hi." 
Lamentations3:59 Kei sangah pangin thu hong khen ta'n; kei tungah a maan ngawl hong kivawtnate na he hi. 
Lamentations3:60 Ka ngalte ii hong etsatzia le hong thasawm zia na he hi. 
Lamentations3:61 “ Topa awng, amate ii kei hong lan nate na za zo hi, amate ii hong thasawm nate theampo na he hi." 
Lamentations3:62 Amate in sunkhuateak in kei thu kikum in vaihawm uh hi. 
Lamentations3:63 Amate in kei sia zingsang pan khuazan dong ciammuina in hong nei uh hi. 
Lamentations3:64 “ Topa awng, amate a ngamtatnate hu in daan pia in;" 
Lamentations3:65 Amate haamsiat in, thinkiamna taw kidimsak in!" 
Lamentations3:66 Amate vai zui in a, leitung pan phiat keak in!”" 
Lamentations4:1 Ih khamh tee vakilte mualmang zo hi; Biakinnpi sakna suangte lampi ah kithethaang in om hi. 
Lamentations4:2 Zion ii tangvalnote sia khamh bangin ei atu in manpha hi, ahihang tu in leibeal thawthongte bangin kivawt hi." 
Lamentations4:3 Ngiapui khat ngawngawn zongh in a note ou tu hi, ahihang ka mite ahile a tate tungah a ngilo kalaoh vacim puite bang ahi hi." 
Lamentations4:4 Amate in a nausente ngilkial dangtaak in thisak hi; tanote in an ngen a, ahihang kuama in amate an pia ngawl tu hi." 
Lamentations4:5 An phabel a ne ngei mihingte sia lampi ah anngawlin pukthi uh hi; a nuamsa in a khangte in an zongin ninbung tok uh hi. 
Lamentations4:6 Ka mite sia thakhat thu in Pathian khut sa a thuak Sodom a teang mihingte sangin nasia zaw in daan kipia hi. 
Lamentations4:7 Ih kumpi tapate sia kiihuai ngawl hi, vuuk bangin thiangtho a, thahat in taktai a ciidam sitset uh hi." 
Lamentations4:8 Tu in amate sia kuama heak ngawlin lampi ah kisial uh a; thi in a mai mual uh hi; a vun uh tun a, thingko bangin ko in a ngute tungah bel hi." 
Lamentations4:9 Ngal sungah a thite sia nuntak zawk natu an om ngawl a, dadam in a thi, a thi khakte sangin phazaw lai hi." 
Lamentations4:10 Ka mite tungah a tung tuasiatna sia cizat huai mama hi, a nute in a neak tu in a tanote huan uh hi." 
Lamentations4:11 Topa in a thinsona teng nasia takin hong buak hi. ama in mei taw Zion halin kaanghtumsak hi. 
Lamentations4:12 A kuama peuma, ngamdang ngamukte ngawngawn in Jerusalem ii kongpite sungah ngalte tum thei tu ci in um ngawl uh hi." 
Lamentations4:13 Ahihang hisia thu piang hi, banghang ziam cile a kamsaangte maw a, a thiampite in mawnei ngawl mihingte a a thisak uh hang ahi hi." 
Lamentations4:14 Mittawte bangin a lampuite lampite ah vakvai uh a, chisan baang ngawp ahikom kuama in amate tham ngam ngawl uh hi." 
Lamentations4:15 Mihingte in amate oksan a, “Tai vun! note kiihuai nu hi! Kei hong thutha heak vun!” ci uh hi. Tua ahikom amate ngam khat pan ngam khat ah pai kawkoai a, kuama in muak ngawl hi." 
Lamentations4:16 Topa in amate awlmaw nawn ngawl a; amate thethaang hi. Ama in ih thiampite le ih lampuite bangma in hong hensak ngawl hi. 
Lamentations4:17 Eite in hong pai ngeingawl tu bul huna lamen in khuadak zawk nawn ngawl tu dong khua ih dadak hi. Eite in piak tu a nei ngawl ngam khat tung pan huna ih ngangak hi. 
Lamentations4:18 Ngalte in eite hong encik a; lampite ah vak zongh ih vak thei bua hi. Ih nite bo zo a; a tawpna hong theng zo hi. 
Lamentations4:19 Muvanlaite van pan suktun a hong len sang a manlang zaw in amate in ei hong zuizen suk hi. Amate in mual tungah ei hong sul zui a; sennealngam ah muanmawk ngawlin ei hong phaa hi. 
Lamentations4:20 Amate in ngalte khut sung pan hong dal zo tu in ih muan, ih nuntakna ii naak a hi, Topa tealsa kumpipa sia man uh hi." 
Lamentations4:21 Edom le Uz mite awng, nui vun; na lungdam thei uh lai teng lungdam vun. Na tuasiat natu uh zongh hong tung tu hi; note zongh maizumna taw na pumnguakin na hoi vacit tu uh hi." 
Lamentations4:22 Zion in a mawna thaman pia zo a; Topa in eite saltaang in hong koi nawn ngawl tu hi. Ahihang Edom awng, Topa in nang daan hong pia tu hi; ama in na ngamtat khialnate pholaak tu hi." 
Lamentations5:1 Topa awng, ko tungah hong piang thute phawk in. Kote hong en ta'n a, ka maizumna uh mu in." 
Lamentations5:2 Kote neisa sia khualmite khut sungah om a; ngamdangmite sia koma inn sungah teang uh hi. 
Lamentations5:3 Koma pate sia ngalte in thatlum zo a, tu in koma nute sia meingong suak uh hi." 
Lamentations5:4 Kote dawn tu tuite man piak kul a, kote thu tu thingkangte lei kul hi." 
Lamentations5:5 Kalaohte le laate bangin hong kihawl ngawp a, toi mama hikale ung hong tawlngasak ngawl hi." 
Lamentations5:6 Nuntak khom natu an ka nga natu uh in Egypt le Assyria ah an ngenin ka pai uh hi. 
Lamentations5:7 Koma taanghpupite mawna hi a; ahihang tu in amate om nawn ngawl hi, amate mawna hu in kote in ngimna ka thuak uh hi." 
Lamentations5:8 Silate sangin a phazaw tuan ngawl mihingte in ko hong uk a, amate khut sung pan kuama in hong hun zo ngawl hi." 
Lamentations5:9 Ngam sungah mithatte vak kawkoai a, an ka zon uh ciang, luangkhaamin ka zong uh hi." 
Lamentations5:10 Ngilkialna in ka ci uh hong suuksak a, koma vunte meikhuk bangin a sat dong ka thuak uh hi." 
Lamentations5:11 Zion Mualtung mama ah koma ii zite hong buansak uh a; Judah ngam khuano theampo ah koma ii tanute zothaw in khialpui uh hi. 
Lamentations5:12 Koma ii lampuite hong matsakin ngui awksak a; koma ii pasal huaite hong zataksak bua uh hi. 
Lamentations5:13 Koma ii tangvalte sia silate bangin zawthawk thu taw an ngoaisak uh a; patangnote sia a thing puak uh khopin hoi vatut uh hi. 
Lamentations5:14 Khanghaamte khuapi kongpi ah to nawn ngawl a, khangmoite sia tengtongh tum nawn ngawl uh hi." 
Lamentations5:15 Kote nuntakna sungah lungdamna bo zo a; kote ngualnop lapna teng sia khuangaina taw kilaih zo hi. 
Lamentations5:16 Ko kiphatsakpui nate khat zongh taang nawn ngawl hi. Kote ka maw uh a, tu in a bo ka hi uh hi." 
Lamentations5:17 Kote ii ka thin ka lung mama uh na a, ka thituite uh hangin pha tak khua ka mu thei bua uh hi," 
Lamentations5:18 Zion Mual sia ngamkhing ngamdai in kinusia ahikom tua a kisia sa munte ah ngam uite vak hi. 
Lamentations5:19 Ahihang Topa awng, nangma sia a tawntung kumpipa na hi a, hun tawp dongin na uk tu hi." 
Lamentations5:20 Banghangin tu tanvei kote hong nusia ni ziam? Kote nong phawk kik ngei tu ziam? 
Lamentations5:21 Na kungah ko hong ciapui kik ta'n, Topa! Hong ciapui kik ta'n! Taanghlai in koma minthanna teng hong pia kik ta'n!" 
Lamentations5:22 Tua ahibuale kote a tawntungin hong nial tu ni ziam? Na thin uukna in ciangtan nei ngawl ahi ziam? 
Ezekiel1:1 Kum sawmthum kum a tha li na a ni nga ni in Babylon ngam Chebar ngunhui ah keima Buzi ii tapa thiampi Ezekiel in Judah mi saltaangte taw ka teang khawm hi. Van kihong a, tuaciang Pathian ii lak mukholna khat ka mu hi. (" 
Ezekiel1:2 Tua hun sia Jehoiachin kumpipa sal in a kipaipui zawk a kum nga kum ahi hi.) 
Ezekiel1:3 Chebar ngunhui tua Babylon ngamah, Topa hong paupuina ka za a, ama ii vaangletna ka phawk hi." 
Ezekiel1:4 Khua ka dakto le saksang pan vuipi suangval hong pai ka mu hi. Meeikaai lian pui khat sung pan khualeng vazak a, a kiimkot van taang hi. Khualeng tee vazalna munah taau bang khat taang hi." 
Ezekiel1:5 Vuipi suangval laizang ah mihing pianlim bang ahi cherubim li ka mu hi," 
Ezekiel1:6 ahihang tuate khat simin maitang li le tha li tek nei uh hi. 
Ezekiel1:7 A peangte maam a, amate in khuital peangcin bang nei uh hi. Tuate sia taau nawt thiang bang keakin tee uh hi." 
Ezekiel1:8 Maitang li le tha li te bek hi ngawlin, amate in a tha khat tek ii nuai ah mihing khut li tek nei uh hi." 
Ezekiel1:9 Cherub te khat simin, a tha te nii tek phalhin, a tha dawn veve tek kiphasak a, king li nei khat suak hi. Amate tungin a kikhiin nop ciang, a pum uh kiheak kul ngawlin a hon in kikhiin uh hi." 
Ezekiel1:10 Cherub khat simin a kibang ngawl maitang nam li nei uh hi: tuate sia a maisang ah mihing maitang, a ziatsang ah tawpi maitang, a veisang ah khuital maitang le a nungsangah muvanlai maitang ahi hi." 
Ezekiel1:11 Nganhing khat sim a thate nii tek kilaamto a, a hui pan a dang khat ii thadawnte taw kisisak hi, tuaciang amate ii a tha dangte nii tek sia a pum tung tek ah zep uh hi." 
Ezekiel1:12 Nganhing khat simin a mun li teng nga ahiciang lu heak kul ngawlin a uuk na po ah a hon in pai thei uh hi. 
Ezekiel1:13 Cherub te sungah meisip kuang bang khat om a, tua meikuang sia a tawntungin kikhiin hi. Tua meikuang sia leng vazak in khua lengsak vazal hi." 
Ezekiel1:14 Tua cherub te sia khualeng manlangza in nung le mai ah a manlangin tai uh hi. 
Ezekiel1:15 Nganhing lite ka et ciangin khat ii pangh ah khat a om lei taw kipha a mui li teng ka mu hi. 
Ezekiel1:16 Tua a mui li teng kibang siat hi; tuate khat simin suangmanpha bangin taang hi. Tuaciang a muite khat simin, a sungah a mui dang khat tang takin a kiphaa in kithua hi," 
Ezekiel1:17 tuabangin a muite sia mun li ah a ukna sang pawpo pai thei uh hi. 
Ezekiel1:18 Tua a muite ii kiil teng sia mittangte taw kidim uh hi. 
Ezekiel1:19 Cherub te a kikhiin simin leangte taw kikhiin khawm a, cherub te lei panin a kikhaanto ciangin, a muite zongh a kikhaangto uh hi." 
Ezekiel1:20 Cherub te sia amate ukna po ah pai uh a, a muite zongh a cherub te bang tatak ma in pai uh hi, banghang ziam cile cherub te in a muite uk uh hi." 
Ezekiel1:21 Tua ahikom cherub te a kikhiin sim a tawlngak sim ahibuale vui sungah a kikhaangto simin a muite zongh in tuabang tatak ma in zui uh hi. 
Ezekiel1:22 Tua cherub te lu ii tung san ah a tee vazal limlangh taw a kivawt kikhupsiin in a kikoi taw a kibang khat om hi. 
Ezekiel1:23 Tua a kikhup siin sia ii nuai ah cherub te dingin, khat simin a thate nii tek a hui a om sia ii sang ah phalh a, a dang tha niite taw a pumpi seal hi." 
Ezekiel1:24 A len uh ciang a thaphil nging ka za hi; tua awnging sia tuipi hawk bang hi a, ngalkap honpui lampai nging bang, Vaanglianbelpa Pathian ii aw bang ahi hi. A len a tawlngak ciang, a thate khup uh hi." 
Ezekiel1:25 Ahihang amate lu tungah a om a kikhup siin sia ii tung panin aw nging khat om lai hi. 
Ezekiel1:26 Tua a kikhup siin sia ii tungah Sapphire suangmanpha taw a kivawt kumpi tokhum taw a kibang khat om a, tua tokhum tungah mihing taw a kibang lim khat to hi." 
Ezekiel1:27 Tua lim sia meikhuk laizang ah a om taau bangin taang hi. Tua in a kiim a paam theampo nasia takin khuavak taangsak hi. 
Ezekiel1:28 Tua ii sungah sangun ii meal namcin om hi. Tuasia in Topa ii ompuina a kilanghsak khuavak taang velvol sia ahi hi. Hisia ka mu ciangin ka maisang ah ka puksuk hi. 
Ezekiel2:1 Tuaciang aw khat ka za a, “A thithei mihing awng, ding in. Nang hong paupui nuam khi hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel2:2 Tua aw ii pau laitakin Pathian ii thaa ka sungah hong tum a, hong phong in ka peang taw ka dingto hi; tuaciang tua aw in," 
Ezekiel2:3 “A thithei mihing awng, Israel mite kungah kong puak tu hi. Amate in hong langpan a, a taanghpupite bangma in hong langpanin tualngalte suak lai uh hi." 
Ezekiel2:4 Amate a thinpui in kei hong zakta bua uh hi, tua ahikom keima Vaanglianpipa Topa in amate tungah ka cinopte a son tu in nang kong puak hi." 
Ezekiel2:5 Tua tualngalte in nang thu hong ngai zong hong ngai bua zong, amate sungah kamsaang khat om ci sia he tu uh hi." 
Ezekiel2:6 “Ahihang a thithei mihing awng, amate ahizong, amate hong ci pawpo ahizong, na kiita bua het tu hi. Amate in nang hong nalh in hong zawngsak tu hi; aikam hon kawm a teen bang hi tu hi. Tuabang ahihang tua tualngalte ahizong, amate ii cite ahizong kiita peang heak in." 
Ezekiel2:7 Amate in hong ngai zong hong ngai bua zong son tu a kong sawl babang na son tu hi. Amate sia bangbang tualngalte ziam cisia ciamtee ta'n. 
Ezekiel2:8 “A thithei mihing awng, kong sonte hong ngai ta'n. Amate bangin tualngal suak heak in. Na kam kaa in a, kong piak tu sia ne ta'n,” a ci sia ka za thua lai hi." 
Ezekiel2:9 Khut khat kei sang hong kithaak ka mu a, laizial khat a toai hi." 
Ezekiel2:10 Tua khut in tua laizial sia phalh a, tuaciang a lang le lang ah lai ki at te — khuangai a kaana te le mauna taunate a ki at ka mu hi." 
Ezekiel3:1 Pathian in, “A thithei mihing awng, laizial hisia ne in; tua zawkciang Israel mite kungah pai in paupui ta'n,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel3:2 Tua ahikom ka kam ka kaa a, tuasia ciangin ama in laizial sia ka neak tu in hong pia hi." 
Ezekiel3:3 Ama in, “A thithei mihing awng, kong piak hi laizial sia ne in; tua taw na ngil vasak in,” hong ci hi. Ka neak ciang, khuaitui bangin thum hi." 
Ezekiel3:4 Tua zawkciang Pathian in, “A thithei mihing awng, Israel mite kungah va pai ta'n a, son a kong sawl po va son ta'n." 
Ezekiel3:5 A telhak ngamdang kam haksa khat a pauna ngam ah kong paisak bua a, Israel te kungah kong paisak hi." 
Ezekiel3:6 Na tel ngawl kam haksa a pau ngamliante kungah hong paisak hi leng, amate in nang thu hong ngai tu hi." 
Ezekiel3:7 Ahihang Israel mite khat zongh in hong ngai nuam ngawl tu hi, amate in kei pau ngawngawn hong ngai ngawl tu hi. Amate theampo sia thinpui in nalh nopna thin vive nei uh hi." 
Ezekiel3:8 Tu in nang sia amate bangma in na thin kong puisak tu a, na thin kong khosak tu hi." 
Ezekiel3:9 Suangpi bangin kong kipsak tu a, diamond suang manpha bangin kong saksak tu hi; tua tualngalte kiita vet heak in,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel3:10 Pathian in, “A thithei mihing awng, pha takin hong ngai ta'n, kong son pawpo ciamtee in." 
Ezekiel3:11 Tua zawkciang saltaang a om, na ngammipuite kungah pai in, na pau hong ngai zong hong ngai bua zong, kei Vaanglianpipa Topa ii amate tungah ka ci teng va son ta'n,” hong ci thua hi." 
Ezekiel3:12 Tua zawkciang, Pathian thaa in kei hong laamto a, tuaciang ka nung pan a hawk, awnging vazak khat ka za a, “Vantung ah a om Topa minthanna pok vun!” ci hi." 
Ezekiel3:13 Vui sungah cherub te thaphil khopna aw le zinliing nging za in a nging, a muite aw ka za hi." 
Ezekiel3:14 Topa ii vaangletna sia ka tungah thahatna lianpi taw hong theng a, tuaciang ama thaa in kei hong paipui ciangin dik ka sa bua a ka thin a uuk hi." 
Ezekiel3:15 Tua ahikom, saltaangte teenna Chebar ngunhui Tel Abib ah pai in tua munah ni sali sung ka taam a, ka mu ka zaak thu in hong ngawtcip hi." 
Ezekiel3:16 Ni sali a cin zawkciang, Topa in kei hong paupui hi."
