Ezekiel39:23 Minamte in kei tungah mawna khialna hong vawt nate hangin Israel te sal tang a hina thu a tel tu uh hi. Amate nungngat in a ngalte in ka zosak a, ngal sungah ka thatlumsak hi." 
Ezekiel39:24 Amate a ninnoi na le a seksol nate taw a kilawm bangin ka thuaksak a, amate ka nungngat hi,” ci hi." 
Ezekiel39:25 Vaanglianpipa Topa in, “Ahihang tu in Jacob suan le paal Israel mite ka hesuak tu a, ka nuamsasak kik tu hi. Ka min thiangtho ka sungsia tu hi." 
Ezekiel39:26 Amate kuama in tawng nawn ngawlin, a ngam sungah ngammuangin khatvei a teen kik ciangin, keima hong leeheak hu in, bangbangin a mindai ci sia a mangil thei tu uh hi." 
Ezekiel39:27 Keima thiangtho ka hi hunlam sia minam tampi ka lak natu in, a ngalte teenna ngam theampo panin ka mite ka pui kik tu hi." 
Ezekiel39:28 Tua hun ciangin, ka minamte in Keima, Topa a Pathian ka hi hunlam hong he tu uh hi. Hi thu amate ii a tel theina sia, keima in amate matsa in ka puak a, tu in khawm kikin, khat zongh kikhe ngawlin, a ngam ah ka puak kik hu ahi hi." 
Ezekiel39:29 Israel mite tungah ka thaa ka buak tu a, amate ka nungngat kik ngei buatu hi. Keima, Vaanglianpipa Topa in son zo khi hi,” ci hi." 
Ezekiel40:1 Tua hun sia ih sal tan zawk kum kul le kum nga kum, Jerusalem khua a kilaak zawk kum sawm le kum lina kumthak ni sawm ni hi. Tua ni in Topa ii nasia tak hong ompui hunlam ka phawk a, ama in mundang ah hong paipui hi." 
Ezekiel40:2 Mukholna khat sungah Pathian in Israel ngam sungah hong paipui a, mualsaang khat tungah hong koi hi. Ka mai ah khuapi khat taw a kibang inn honkhat ka mu hi." 
Ezekiel40:3 Ama in a nai zaw in hong neaksak a, tuaciang taau bangin a taang mihing khat ka mu hi. Ama in puanneal pikhau khat le piciang khat toai in kongpi hui khat ah ding hi." 
Ezekiel40:4 Ama in “A thithei mihing awng, en in. Pha takin hong ngai ta'n a kong lak na theampo nasia takin kin vawt in, banghang ziam cile nang sia hi thu huvau in hi sungah hong kipuak hi. Na mu theampo Israel mite tungah na son tu ahi hi,” kei tungah hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel40:5 Ka mu sia Biakinnpi hi a, a kiimkot ah luphung khat om hi. Tua pa in metre thum a sau ama piciang la in tua luphung tee hi. Tua sia metre thum saang a, metre thum saa hi." 
Ezekiel40:6 Tua zawkciang nisuana sang a maingat kongpi vangah ama pai hi. Keallei tungah ama kaato in a dawn ah a tumna tee a; metre thum thuk hi. 
Ezekiel40:7 Tua ngal khat ah lamzin khat om a, a cingte inndoi thum veu a lang veve ah om hi. Tua inndoite in a kikim king li tek nei a, a pangh sia metre thum veu sau hi, a inndoite kilaklaw pangte metre nii le lang saa hi. A cingte inndoite ngal ah metre thum a sau lamzin khat om a, Biakinnpi a maingat sungtanna inndoi paina ahi hi." 
Ezekiel40:8 Ama in hi inndoi tee a, metre lithuk hi. Tua inndoi sia Biakinnpi taw a kinaibel kongpi vang tawpna hi a, a mongbel ah pangte sia metre khat saa hi." 
Ezekiel40:9  
Ezekiel40:10 (Hi a cingte inndoi lamzin lang le lang ah a omte sia a letna kikim linlian siat a, a kilaklaw pangte zongh a saana kibang siat hi.)" 
Ezekiel40:11 Tua zawkciang tua pa in kongpi vang sung lamzin ii zaina tee hi. Tuasia a kingawm in metre luk le lang pha a, a kihong kongpite kilaklaw sia metre nga pha hi." 
Ezekiel40:12 A cingte inndoi sim ii mai ah pang a niam, centimetre sawm nga a saang le centimetre sawm nga a saa khat om hi. (A inndoi kiimkot pangte ii pangh khat sia metre thum veu pha hi.)" 
Ezekiel40:13 Tua zawkciang, inndoi khat ii a nung pang pan a langkhat lamzin kaantan in inndoi ii nungsang pang dong ama in tee a, metre sawm le nii le a lang pha hi." 
Ezekiel40:14 Inndoi mong khakbel sia suumsung paina hi. Tua inndoi sia ama in tee a, metre sawm zai hi." 
Ezekiel40:15 Kongpi vang sauna sia a puasang pang pan a khakbel inndoi ii pangh dong sia a kingawm in metre kul le nga sau hi. 
Ezekiel40:16 Pusuana suazoai note sia a inndoi theampo ii a puasang pangte sung le inndoite kilaklaw a sungsang pangte zongh ah om siat hi. Lamzin a maingat a sungsang pangte tungah palm kung limte kisuai hi. 
Ezekiel40:17 Tua pa in suum puanung ah kongpi vang zui in hong paipui hi. Tua munah a puasang pangte nealin inndoi sawmthum kivawt a, tuate mai ah suang kipha hi," 
Ezekiel40:18 suum puanung kiimkot dongah kipha hi. Hi suum puanung sia suum sungnung sangin niam zaw hi. 
Ezekiel40:19 A suumsung nung pai natu in kongpi vang khat a saang zawna munah om hi. Tua pa in kongpi vangte nii kilaklaw pitee a, metre 50 kikhuala hi." 
Ezekiel40:20 Tua zawkciang tua pa in suum puanung paina a saksang kongpi vang tee hi. 
Ezekiel40:21 A cinna inndoi thum, lamzin lang le lang ah a omte, a kilaklaw a om pangte le sungtanna inndoi theampo sia nisuana kongpivang sang a omte bang linlian veu ahi hi. Kongpivang ii sauna bup sia metre 25 hi a, a zaina sia metre 12.5 hi." 
Ezekiel40:22 Sungtanna innkhan, khelkite le palm lim kisuaite sia nisuana kongpi ah a omte taw kibang hi. Kongpi dong kal sali kisuan a, sungtanna inndoi sia suumsung sang maingat in a mong ah om hi." 
Ezekiel40:23 Suumsung langkhat ah hi a saksang kongpi vang pan suum sungnung paina a dang kongpi vang khat om a, nisuana sangah a omte bangma ahi hi. Tua pa in kongpivangte nii kilaklaw tee a, metre 50 pha hi." 
Ezekiel40:24 Tua zawkciang tua pa in thang sangah hong paipui a, tua munah kongpivang dang khat ka mu uh hi. Ama in a sungsang pangte le a sungtanna inndoi tee a, a dangte taw ma kikim hi." 
Ezekiel40:25 Hi kongpivang ii inndoite sungah a dangte sung bangma in khelkite om hi. Kongpivang ii sauna a vekpi metre 25 pha a, metre 12.5 zai hi." 
Ezekiel40:26 Kal sali suan ciang kongpivang kitheng a, sungtanna inndoi zongh suumsung maingatin a mong ah om hi. Pusuana lampi a maingat a sungnung pangte tungah palm kungte lim kisuai hi." 
Ezekiel40:27 Hi lai zongh ah suum sungnung paina kongpivang om hi. Tua pa in hi a niina kongpi dong tee a, metre 50 pha hi." 
Ezekiel40:28 Tua pa in thangsang kongpivang kaantan in suum sungnung ah hong tumpui hi. Ama in kongpi vang tee a, a puasang pangh ah a om kongpivangte taw kikim hi." 
Ezekiel40:29 A cingte inndoi, sungtanna inndoi le a sungnung pangte sia a dang kongpivangte ah a omte taw kibang hi. Hi kongpivang ii inndoite ah khelkite zongh om hi. A sauna bup sia metre 25 hi a, metre 12.5 zai hi." 
Ezekiel40:30  
Ezekiel40:31 Sungtanna inndoi sia suumsung dang khat sang nga a, palm kung limte sia lamzin dung pangte tungah kisuai hi. Hi kongpi dong kal liat kisuan hi." 
Ezekiel40:32 Tua pa in nisuana kongpivang zui in suum sungnung ah hong tumpui hi. Ama in kongpi tee a, a dangte taw kikim hi." 
Ezekiel40:33 A cingte innkhan, sungtanna inndoi le a sungnung pangte sia a dang kongpivang ah a omte taw kikim hi. A kiimkot khelki om kawkoai a, sung tumna inndoi sung zongh ah om hi. A sauna vekpi sia metre 25 hi a, metre 12.5 zai hi." 
Ezekiel40:34 Sungtanna inndoi in suum puanung maingat hi. Palm limte sia lamzin dung pangte tungah kisuai hi. Hi kongpi dong kal liat kisuan hi. 
Ezekiel40:35 Tua zawkciang tua pa in saksang kongpivang ah hong paipui hi. Ama in tuasia tee a, a dangte taw in kikim hi." 
Ezekiel40:36 Tuate bangma in tuasia in a cingte inndoite, a kizeam sungnung pangte, sungtanna inndoi le a kiimkot theampo ah khelkite nei hi. A sauna vekpi sia metre 25 hi a, a zaina sia metre 12.5 ahi hi." 
Ezekiel40:37 Sungtanna inndoi in a suum puanung maingat hi. Palm kungte lim lamzin dung pangte tungah kisuai hi. Hi kongpi dong kal liat pha hi. 
Ezekiel40:38 Suum puanung ah saksang sungnung kongpi vang taw kipee in a kipeam inndoi khat om hi. Suum sung a maingat sungtanna inndoi dong kihong a, tualai ah sangaw biakpiakna in a kihal tu nganhing luangte amate in tui taw sil uh hi." 
Ezekiel40:39 Hi sungtanna inndoi sungah sabuai li om a, a lang le lang ah ni veve kikoi hi. Hi sabuaite tungah amate in sangaw biakpiakna in a nei nganhingte, a pum bupin kihal tu ahizong mawna le khialna hang a biakna ah piak tu nganhingte ahizong ngo uh hi." 
Ezekiel40:40 Inndoi pua sangah a kibang sabuai li om a, saksang kongpi tumna lang le lang ah nii veve kikoi hi." 
Ezekiel40:41 Biakpiakna nganhingte a tungah a kingawlup thei natu in a vekpi in sabuai liat om a: sabuai li sia a inndoi sung sangah a dang li sia a suum pua ah om hi. 
Ezekiel40:42 Innpeam sungah a om pum bup meihal biakpiakna vawt natu in a kizangh sabuai li te sia a ki attan suangtum taw a kivawt ahi hi. Tuate sia centimetre 50 saang a, a dawn kiimkot a kikim pangh li te sia centimetre 25 veu pha hi. Sangaw biakpiakna ah ngan ngawna a zak vanh teng tua sabuaite tungah kikeam hi." 
Ezekiel40:43 Sabuaite mong kiimkot ah millimetre 25 a zai khinte a paisuak in om hi. Sabuaite tungah biakpiakna nganhing sate theampo kikoi hi. 
Ezekiel40:44 Tua zawkciang ama in a suum sungnung ah hong tumpui hi. Suum sungnung sangah a nga inndoi nii om a, khat in saksang kongpivang hui pan thangsang maingat a, khat in thangsang kongpivang hui pan saksang maingat hi." 
Ezekiel40:45 Tua pa in thangsang a nga inndoi sia Biakinnpi ah a seam thiampite atu hi a," 
Ezekiel40:46 saksang a nga inndoi sia biaknatau ah a seam thiampite atu hi hong ci hi. Thiampi theampo sia Zadok ii suan le paalte hi a; amate sia Topa omna munah ama naseam tu in a kipaisak Levi minamte bek ahi uh hi. 
Ezekiel40:47 Tua pa in suum sungnung tee a, a pangh li khat simin metre 50 veu pha hi. Nitumna sangah Biakinnpi om a, tua ii mai ah biaknatau om hi." 
Ezekiel40:48 Tua zawkciang ama in Biakinnpi sung tumna inndoi ah kei hong tumpui hi. Sungtanna teng ama in tee a; metre 2.5 thuk a, metre zai in, metre 6.5 a saa pangte a lang le lang ah om hi." 
Ezekiel40:49 Sungtanna inndoi sia metre 10 zai in, metre 6 thuk a, tua mun thet natu in keallei kithung hi. A sung tumna a lang le a lang ah khuam khat veve om hi." 
Ezekiel41:1 Tua zawkciang, tua pa in A Thiangtho Mun, a laizang inndoi sungah hong paipui hi. Ama in tuasung tumna lamzin sia tee a: metre thum thuk in," 
Ezekiel41:2 metre nga zai a, a lang le a lang pangte metre nii le lang veu saa hi. Ama in tua inndoi mama tee a: metre kul sau in metre sawm zai hi." 
Ezekiel41:3 Tuaciang ama sia a sungnung khakbel inndoi ah pai hi. Ama in tuasung tumna lamzin tee a: metre 1 thukin metre 3 zai hi, a lang le a lang pangte metre 3.5 veve saa hi." 
Ezekiel41:4 Ama in tua inndoi mama tee a, a pang simin metre 10 veu pha hi. Hi inndoi sia a laizang inndoi ii ngalkhat ah om hi. Ama in kei tungah “Hi sia a Thiangtho Bel Mun hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel41:5 Tua pa in Biakinn ii sungnung pang saana tee a, metre 3 pha hi. Biakinnpi kiimkot ah hi pang nealin, metre 2 veu a zai inndoi note a kipee in kisa hi." 
Ezekiel41:6 Hi inndoite dawl thum pha a, dawl khat simin inndoi sawmthum om hi. Biakinnpi ii a dawl simin a puasang pang sia a nuaidawl pang sangin pa zaw hi, tuabangin a tung inndoite pang tungah kilh kul ngawlin kinga hi." 
Ezekiel41:7 Biakinn pangte a puasang pan et ciang, a vekpi in a dawn dong a saana a kikim bangin kimu hi. Biakinnpi ii puanung pang nealin inndoite pua sangah a zai keallei ni kidaw a, tuabangin a nuaidawl pan a lai dawl le a tungnungbel dawlte ah kikaato thei hi." 
Ezekiel41:8 Hi inndoite ii puasang pang sia metre 2.5 saa a; Biakinnpi saksang inndoite tumna innkha khat om a, thangsang inndoite tumna innkha khat om hi. Biakinnpi kiimkot ah metre 2.5 a zai a cial khat ka mu a; lei pan metre 3 saang hi, Biakinn pangte kungah a om inndoite tawdap taw kikim hi. Tua a cial le thiampite zak innte kilaklaw ah metre 10 a sau mun awng khat, Biakinnpi ii panghte ii dung tengah om hi." 
Ezekiel41:9  
Ezekiel41:10  
Ezekiel41:11  
Ezekiel41:12 Mun awngthong ii mongbel, Biakinnpi ii nitumna sangah metre 45 a sau metre 35 a zai inn khat om a; a kiimkot pang sia metre 2.5 saa hi." 
Ezekiel41:13 Biakinnpi puasang teng tua pa in tee a, metre 50 sau hi. Biakinnpi nungsang pan mun awngna kaantan in nitumna innpangh dong zongh metre 50 pha hi." 
Ezekiel41:14 Biakinnpi mai, a lang le lang ah a om mun awngthong a kihel sia zongh metre 50 pha hi." 
Ezekiel41:15 Nitumna sang inn sia ii sauna ama in tee a, a lang le a lang ah a om dawtuam a kihel in metre 50 ma pha hi. Biakinnpi sungtanna innkhan, a Thiangtho Mun le A Thiangtho Bel Mun teng theampo sia" 
Ezekiel41:16 suat pan khelki dong thing taw ki uum hi. Hi khelkite sia kituam thei hi. 
Ezekiel41:17 Biakinnpi pang sungsangte tung, innkhate tung sia a saangna dong ah, palm le cherubim lim kisuai te taw kidim hi." 
Ezekiel41:18 Inndoi sung theampo ah palm kung le cherubim limte a kithekin kisuai hi. Cherub simin maitang nii veu nei hi: 
Ezekiel41:19 a langkhat ah palm kung sang a maingat mihing maitang khat om a, a langkhat ah thingkung sang a maingat tawpi maitang khat om hi. Tuasia pang tung theampo," 
Ezekiel41:20 suat pan innkhate tung dong kibang siat hi. 
Ezekiel41:21 A Thiangtho Mun ii innkha khuamte sia a saanna le a zaina, a pangh li teng kikim hi. A Thiangtho Bel Mun tumna ii mai ah" 
Ezekiel41:22 thing biaknatau taw kibang na khat om hi. Tuasia sia metre 1.5 saang a, metre 1 zai hi. A king khuamte, a bul le a pangh theampo thing taw kivawt hi. Tua pa in kei tungah, “Hi sabuai sia Topa ompuina ah a ding sia ahi hi.” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel41:23 A Thiangtho Mun paina lamzin tawpna ah innkha khat om a, a Thiangtho Bel Mun paina lamzin ah a dang khat zongh om hi." 
Ezekiel41:24 Tuate sia a lai pan a kihong thei kongkha kithuapte ahi hi. 
Ezekiel41:25 Pangte tungah a kisuai bangin a Thiangtho Mun kongkhate tungah palm kung le cherub te lim kisuai hi. Sungtanna inndoi ii innkha puasang sia thing taw kituam hi. 
Ezekiel41:26 Hi inndoi panghte ah khelkite om a, a pangte sia palm kung limte taw a kizeam hi." 
Ezekiel42:1 Tua zawkciang tua pa in suum puanung sungah hong tumpui a Biakinnpi saksang ah hong paipui hi, tuaciang Biakinnpi saksang ah a om inn khat ah hong paipui hi, tua inn sia Biakinnpi nitumna sang a mong ah a om inn taw kikhuala ngawl hi." 
Ezekiel42:2 Hi inn sia metre 50 sau a, metre 25 zai hi." 
Ezekiel42:3 Inn pangh khat in Biakinnpi dung ah a om metre 10 a zai mun awng sia maingat a, a pangh khat in suum puanung ah suang kipha lam sia maingat hi. Tua inn sia dawl thum in kivawt a, a tung dawlte sim sia a nuaidawl sangin nungsang neak zaw in kivawt hi." 
Ezekiel42:4 Hi inn ii saksang pangh dungah metre 5 a zai, metre 50 a sau lamzin khat le sung tumna kongte om hi." 
Ezekiel42:5 A dawl tungnung inndoite sia a lai le a nuaidawl a omte sangin ciak zaw hi, banghang ziam cile a nungsang neak zaw in a kivawt hang ahi hi." 
Ezekiel42:6 A dawl thum sung theampo ah a inndoite sia, a cialte tungah om a, suum sungah a om inn dangte bangin khuam nei ngawl hi." 
Ezekiel42:7 A nuaidawl ah inn puanung pang sia metre 225 pha a, a sauna ii lang ahi hi; a taanglai metre 25 sungah inndoite om hi. A dawl tungbel ah innpi a dung sauna bup zui in a sungah inndoite om hi." 
Ezekiel42:8  
Ezekiel42:9 Hi inndoite nii nuai, nisuana sang inn mong, suumsung pang kipatna munah, suum puanung tumna kongkha khat om hi, Biakinnpi thang sangah Biakinnpi nitumna mong, innpi taw a kikhuala ngawlna ah a kibang linlian inn khat om hi." 
Ezekiel42:10  
Ezekiel42:11 Inndoite mai ah saksang a om sia taw a kibang lamzin khat om hi. A zaina le a sauna kikim a, a vawtzia le sung tumnate zongh kibang hi." 
Ezekiel42:12 A inn ii thangsang nisuana mong, a pang kipatna inndoite nuai ah kongkha khat om hi." 
Ezekiel42:13 Tua pa in keima tungah hong ci hi, “Hi innte ngeal thiangtho hi. A sungsang Topa ompuina ah a tum thiampite in a thiangthobel biakpiakna ante ne uh hi. A inndoite thiangtho ahi manin thiampite in a thiangthobel biakpiaknate: antang biakpiaknate, mawna hang sangaw biakpiaknate, ahibuale mawphel biakpiaknate tua munah koi tu uh hi." 
Ezekiel42:14 Thiampite in Biakinnpi sung a tum zawkciang le a suum puanung ah a pai nop ciang, hi inndoite sungah Topa atu na a sep laitak, a silh puan thiangthote a nusiat kul hi. Ama te sia mipite kikhop na ah a pai ma in puan dang a sil uh kul tu hi”." 
Ezekiel42:15 Biakinnpi mun sung teng tua pa in a tee zawkciang, ama in nisuana kongpi pan hong pusua pui a, a mun puasang teng tee hi." 
Ezekiel42:16 Ama in piciang la in, nisuana sang teng tee a, metre 250 pha hi." 
Ezekiel42:17 Tua zawkciang ama in saksang, thangsang le nitumna sang teng tee a; a sauna kibangin metre 250 tek pha hi," 
Ezekiel42:18  
Ezekiel42:19  
Ezekiel42:20 tuabangin a pang ii lang le lang ah a pangh li teng a kikim, pangh khat in metre 250 a pha khat tek uum hi. Tua pang sia a thiangtho mun le a thiangtho ngawl mun a kidaakna hi." 
Ezekiel43:1 Tua pa in nisuana sang a nga kongpi ah kei hong paipui a," 
Ezekiel43:2 tualai ah Israel te ii Pathian ii ompuina ahi khuavak taang velvol khat nisuana sang pan hong pai ka mu hi. Tui kihual nging bangin, Pathian aw nging a, khuavak taang velvol sia in leitung taangsak hemhom hi." 
Ezekiel43:3 Hi mukholna in Pathian ii Jerusalem khua siasak tu hong pai lai in ka mu sia le Chebar ngunhui ah ka mu mukholna khat taw kibang hi. Tuaciang, keima le keima ka khup lamin lei ah ka bok hi." 
Ezekiel43:4 Khuavak taang velvol sia in nisuana kongpi kaantan a, Biakinnpi sungah tum hi." 
Ezekiel43:5 Topa ii thaa in kei hong laamto in, a suum sungnung ah hong paipui a, tua munah Biakinnpi sia Topa vaangletna taw kidim ka mu hi." 
Ezekiel43:6 Tua munah tua pa sia ka kungah hong ding a, Biakinn sung pan Topa hong paupui ka za hi." 
Ezekiel43:7 “A thithei mihing awng, hi lai ah ka kumpi tokhum om hi. Hi lai Israel mite sungah teangin, amate a tawntung ka uk tu hi. Israel mite le a kumpite in pathian dangte biakna taw ahizong, a kumpite luang hi munah phumna taw ahizong, ka min thiangtho daisak kik nawn ngawl tu hi." 
Ezekiel43:8 Kumpite in a kumpi inn kongkha khuamte le a saamkiilte sia ka Biakinnpi kongkha le kongkha saamkiilte nealin vawt a, tua ahikom ka kilaklaw uh pang khat bek in daa hi. Amate in a kiihuai a sep nate theampo taw ka min thiangtho daisak ahikom, ka thin uukna taw amate ka lalcipsak hi." 
Ezekiel43:9 Tu in amate sia pathian dangte bia nawn ngawl tu a, a kumpite ii luangte heam tu uh hi. Tuabang a ngamta le, amate sungah ka teang tawntung tu hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel43:10 Topa in a pau zom a, “A thithei mihing awng, Israel mite tungah Biakinnpi thu son in a, a kivawt ngealnate amate kansak in. Khialna mawna a vawtte hangin amate maizumsak in." 
Ezekiel43:11 A vawt sate hu in a mai uh a zum le, Biakinnpi sak tu ngealnate amate thiangson in: a vawt tu lim, a sung tumna le pusuana, a pung, na theampo vawt tu zia le a zui tu thute le ngeinate theampo son in. Hi thute theampo amate atu in at in, tua hile na theampo bangbang kingeal ci sia mu thei tu a, ngeina zeksa theampo vawt thei tu uh hi." 
Ezekiel43:12 Hi thu sia Biakinnpi thukham ahi hi: Biakinnpi omna mualdawn le a kiimkot mun theampo sia ciliaphuai in thiangtho hi,” ci hi." 
Ezekiel43:13 Hite sia biaknatau teenate ahi hi. Biakinnpi teena ah a kizangh piciang pikhaute ma kizangh hi. Biakinnpi ii a bul kiimkot ah centimetre 50 a thuk, centimetre 50 a zai, a ngong nei tuiluanna khat om a, a puasang mong ah centimetre 25 saang hi." 
Ezekiel43:14 Biaknatau nuainungbel khen sia a dawn pan a bul metre 1 saang hi. A khen kik sia a kiil pan a nungah centimetre 50 zai in a kiimkot ah kivawt a, metre 2 saang hi. A khen zom kik sia zongh a kiil pan a nungah centimetre 50 zai in a kiimkot ah kivawt hi." 
Ezekiel43:15 A tungbel dawl biakpiaknate halna sia zongh metre 2 saang hi. A king li tungah a dokte sia a dawn dangte saangin saangzaw hi. 
Ezekiel43:16 Biaknatau dawn sia a kikim pangh li nei hi a, pangh khat sia metre 6 veu pha hi." 
Ezekiel43:17 A laizang khen zongh a dung a vai kikim a, pangh khat metre 7 veu hi a, a pua sang mong ah centimetre 25 a saang a ngong tuamna nei hi. (Tui luanna sia centimetre 50 zai hi.) Nisuana sangah biaknatau tung kaatona kealleite om hi." 
Ezekiel43:18 Vaanglianpipa Topa in, kei tungah, “A thithei mihing awng, kong sonte hong ngai ta'n. Biaknatau a kisak ciangin, meihal biakpiakna le sangaw biakpiakna ah a kingo nganhingte ii chi a tungah the in aapna vawt tu nu hi." 
Ezekiel43:19 Zadok suan le paal ahi Levi minam thiampite bek in keima ompuina ah hong pai in ka na seam tu uh hi. Keima, Vaanglianpipa Topa in hi thu kong pia hi. Amate tungah mawphel sangaw biakpiak natu in, khuital moi khat na pia tu hi." 
Ezekiel43:20 Nang in a chi pawlkhat na la tu a, biaknatau dawn king li tung a dokte le a lai khen biaknatau kingte tung le a mong kiimkot theampo ah na koi tu hi. Hi bangin biaknatau na thiansua tu uh a na aap tu uh hi." 
Ezekiel43:21 Mawphel biakpiakna in a kipia khuital sia nang in na la tu a, biakinn mun ii a puasang, a kiciangtan sa munah na hal tu hi." 
Ezekiel43:22 A zing ciangin a mealhem ngawl kealtal khat kengin mawphel biakpiakna in pia tu ni hi. Biaknatau sia khuital chi taw na thiansua bangma in, kealtal chi taw thiansua in." 
Ezekiel43:23 Tua teng na man zawkciang, a nii ngealin a mealhem ngawl khuital moi khat le tuutal moi khat kengin," 
Ezekiel43:24 keima kungah hong paipui ta'n. Thiampite in tua cherub te tungah ci al the tu a, keima hong biakpiakna in hal tu uh hi." 
Ezekiel43:25 Ni sali sung ni simin mawphel biakpiakna in keal khat, khuital khat le tuutal khat pia tu nu hi. A vekpi in a mealhem ngawl het te hi tu hi." 
Ezekiel43:26 Ni sali sung thiampite in biaknatau aap tu a, zak thei tu in kinging kholsak tu hi." 
Ezekiel43:27 Tua nipi kaal a bo zawkciang thiampite in meihal biakpiakna le mite kipawlkhop biakpiaknate biaknatau tungah a piak kipan tu uh hi. Tua hun ciang note theampo tungah ka lungdam tu hi. Keima, Vaanglianpipa Topa pau zo khi hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel44:1 Tua pa in biakinn mun nisuana sangah a om a puasang kongpi ah hong paipui hi. Kongpi kikhak a," 
Ezekiel44:2 Topa in kei tungah, “Hi kongpi kikhak top tu a, kihong kik ngeingawl tu hi. Mihing kuama in kizanghsak ngawl tu hi, banghang ziam cile, Keima, Israel Topa Pathian in tua kongpi kaantanin ka tum zo hi. Hi kongpi kikhak top tu hi." 
Ezekiel44:3 Ngamukpa ahile keima omna ah a thiangtho an ne tu in pai thei tu hi. Ama in kongpi vang pan sungtanna inndoi lian sia tawn a, tum in pusuak tu hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel44:4 Tuaciang tua pa in saksang kongpi tawnin Biakinnpi mai ah kei hong paipui hi. Ka et ciang Topa Biakinnpi sia ama ompuina khuavak taang velvol sia taw kidim ka mu hi. Keima le keima lei ah ka boksuk hi," 
Ezekiel44:5 tuaciang Topa in kei tungah, “A thithei mihing awng, na mu theampo le na zaak theampo pha takin ngaisun in. Biakinnpi taw kisai zui tu thute le ngeinate kong son tu hi. Biakinnpi sungah a kitumsak tu a kipusuaksak tu mihingte le a tum ngawl tu a pusuak ngawl tu mihingte pha takin ciamtee in." 
Ezekiel44:6 “Israel mi kei hong langpante tungah, Keima, Vaanglianpipa Topa in a kiihuai amate ngamtatnate thuak zo nawn ngawl tu khi hi ci sia son in." 
Ezekiel44:7 Keima sangaw biakpiakna ii a thau le a chi hong kipiak ciangin amate in ka thu a ni ngawl, vunteap at ngawl ngamdangmite sia Biakinnpi sungah a tumsak hu in ka Biakinnpi ninsak uh hi. Tua ahikom a kiihuai a ngamtatnate taw ka mite in ka thuciamna paltan uh hi." 
Ezekiel44:8 Ka Biakinnpi sungah a zeksa a thiangtho biakpiaknate ah amate in uk ngawlin ngamdangmite in uksak zaw uh hi. 
Ezekiel44:9 “Keima, Vaanglianpipa Topa in vunteap at ngawl ngamdangmi, ka thu hong ni ngawl peuma, Israel mite taw a teang khawm ngamdangmi khat ngawngawn ka Biakinnpi sungah tum thei ngawl tu hi, ci thu ka thangsak hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel44:10 Topa in kei tungah, “Israel midangte taw kei hong taisan khawm a, milim a bia Levi mite daan ka pia tu hi." 
Ezekiel44:11 Amate in ka Biakinnpi sungah kongpite cingin Biakinnpi nasepte seamin keima na a seam thei tu uh hi. Amate in mihingte ii meihal le sangaw biakpiakna ah a piak nganhing te ngo thei tu a, mihingte kisapnate sepsak tu uh hi." 
Ezekiel44:12 Ahihang amate in Israel mite atu in milim biakna vawtsak a, tuabangin mite mawna sungah paipui ahikom, Keima, Vaanglianpipa Topa in, amate daan piak kul tu hi, ci in ciliap huai kiciamna ka vawt hi." 
Ezekiel44:13 Amate in thiampite bangin keima ii na seam ngawl tu hi, kei atu a thiangtho khat pawpo ii a nai neak ngawl tu, ahibuale Thiangthobel Mun ah tum ngawl tu hi. Hite in a kiihuai a ngamtatnate hu in daan piakna ahi hi." 
Ezekiel44:14 Biakinnpi sungah nasep nawno teng sia amate sep tu in ka see tu hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel44:15 Vaanglianpipa Topa in, “Tua Levi minam Zadok ii suan le paal thiampite ahile Israel midangte ii kei hong taisat zawkciang, Biakinnpi sungah thumaan takin ka na seam suak uh hi. Tua ahiciang tu in amate sia ka na seam a, ka omna ah hong pai in sangaw biakpiakna a thau le a chi taw biakpiakna hong nei tute ahi uh hi." 
Ezekiel44:16 Amate bekma ka Biakinnpi sung tum in biaknatau ah seam tu a, biakinn sungah biakna vawt tu hi." 
Ezekiel44:17 Amate Biakinnpi suum sungnung paina kongpi vang a tum ciangin puanneal silh tu uh hi. Biakinnpi suum sungnung, ahibuale Biakinnpi sungah na a sep laitakin amate in samul taw kivawt khat pawpo silh ngawl tu uh hi." 
Ezekiel44:18 A khua ul ngawl natu in amate in puanneal dial khim tu a, puanneal ngoaipuan tual teangin, kawngkhau sawm ngawl tu uh hi." 
Ezekiel44:19 Mihonpite omna suum puanung ah a pai ma in, amate in Biakinnpi sung a nasepna ah a silh puante sut tu a, a thiangtho inndoite sungah nusiat kul tu hi. A thiangtho biakpiakna puante ii mite ngim a piak ngawl natu in amate in puan dang silh tu uh hi." 
Ezekiel44:20 “Thiampite in a sam meettol ngawl tu a, a sam sausak ngawl tu uh hi. Amate in a sam a pha bekin hoai tu uh hi." 
Ezekiel44:21 Thiampite in suum sungnung ah a pai ma in, sapittui ne ngawl het tu hi." 
Ezekiel44:22 Thiampi khat in a kikhul sa numei khat teenpui ngawl tu hi; Israel numei thiangtho khat ahibuale thiampi dang khat ii zi, meingong nu bek taw teang tu hi." 
Ezekiel44:23 “Thiampite in ka mite tungah biakna taw kisai a thiangtho le a thiangtho ngawlte kilamdanna le a zeksa ngeina thiangtho le a thiangtho ngawlte hil tu hi. 
Ezekiel44:24 Thukhen tu thu khat a pian ciang, thiampite in keima thukhamte bangin thukhen tu hi. Amate in biakna poaite sia a zui tu ka piak thute le ngeinate bangin vawt tu a, ka Sabbath thiangthosak tu uh hi." 
Ezekiel44:25 “Thiampi khat sia mithi luang a thamna taw in zeksa ngeina taw in nin tu hi, ahihang a thi sia ama ii a nu a pa khat, a tate khat ahibuale a suapui pa khat ahibuale pasal nei ngawl lai a suapuinu khat ahile a nin suak ngawl tu hi." 
Ezekiel44:26 Ama a thiantho kik zawkciang, ni sali sung ngak tu a," 
Ezekiel44:27 tuaciang Biakinnpi suum sungnung ah pai in, a kithiansua natu in sangaw biakpiakna pia tu hi, tua hile ama in Biakinnpi sungah na seam kik thei tu hi. Keima, Vaanglianpipa Topa ka pau zo hi." 
Ezekiel44:28 “Israel tungah ka piaksa khang khat pan khang dangkhat ah a ki aap susuk tu thiampiza sia thiampite ii a saan tel ahi hi. Israel ngam ah thiampite in nei le lamh nei ngawl tu a; amate kisap theampo sia keima ka hi hi. 
Ezekiel44:29 Antang taw biakpiakna, mawna le khialna kiphel natu biakpiakna le kitatna in a kipia biakpiakna theampo sia thiampite an hi tu a, Israel ngam ah keima atu in a kipia tuam theampo amate nga tu ahi hi." 
Ezekiel44:30 Thiampite in anpal teng sung pan a limci belte le kei tungah a dang hong kipia theampo tang tu uh hi. Mihingte in anluum a em simin, a em maksakbel sia biakpiakna in thiampite tungah pia tu uh hi, tuasia ciang amate inn sungah ka thupha tung tu hi" 
Ezekiel44:31 Ama thu in a thi thawthong vacim le nganhing ii sa ahibuale nganhing dang khat ii thalup sia ii sa thiampite in ne ngawl tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Ezekiel45:1 Minam sim tungah piak tu leitang khenin a kihawm ciang, khen khat sia Topa tungah ki aap tu hi. Tuasia kilometre 12.5 sau in kilometre 10 zai tu hi. Hi mun bup sia thiangtho tu hi." 
Ezekiel45:2 Hi munah Biakinnpi atu a pangh a kikim king li nei khen khat om tu a, a pangh sim in metre 250 pha tu hi, a kiimkot ah metre 25 a zai mun awng khat om tu hi." 
Ezekiel45:3 Hi mun ii lang, kilometre 12.5 a sau, kilometre 5 a zai khen khat kitee tu a; a vekpi sung pan a thiangthobel mun ahi Biakinnpi om tu hi." 
Ezekiel45:4 Tuasia ngam ii a thiangthona mun khat hi tu a, Topa Biakinnpi ah a seam thiampite atu a kikoituam mun ahi hi. Tua ii sungah amate innte le Biakinnpi mun atu leitang om tu hi." 
Ezekiel45:5 A dang a mun lang teng sia Biakinnpi ah a seam Levi te neisa in kikoituam tu hi. Tua munah amate teenna tu khuate om tu hi. 
Ezekiel45:6 A thiangtho mun ii zom ah kilometre 12.5 a sau, kilometre 2.5 a zai khen dang khat sia Israel mi pawpo teen thei natu mun, khuapi khat atu in kikoituam tu hi." 
Ezekiel45:7 Kumpipa atu leitang zongh kikoituam tu hi. Mun thiangtho ii nitumna ngamngi pan nitumna sang Mediterranean tuipi dong; nisuana ngamngi pan nisuana sang ngam mong dong hi tu a, Israel minamte atu a kipia mun khat ii a sauna za in sau tu hi." 
Ezekiel45:8 Hi mun sia kumpipa ii nga tu Israel ngam leitang hi tu hi, tua ahikom ama in mite zawthawk vawt nawn ngawl tu a, ahihang a om lai ngam theampo sia Israel minamte neisa hisak tu hi." 
Ezekiel45:9 Vaanglianpipa Topa in, “No Israel ngamukte awng, mawna khialna na vawt uh khuangei lei zo hi! Na ngoltolna uh le ngual na zawthawk vawtnate tawlnga vun. A pha le a maan bek vawt vun. Ka minamte a ngam uh pan hawlkeak kik ngeingawl tu nu hi. Keima, Vaanglianpipa Topa in hi teng kong son hi." 
Ezekiel45:10 “Mihing sim in a ngit teena maan le teena maante a zak kul tu hi. 
Ezekiel45:11 “A ko teena ephahs sia a tui teena bath taw kibang tu hi. Homer sia zak maanbel teena ahi hi. Teenate a nuai a bang ahi hi: 1 homer = 10 ephahs = 10 baths 
Ezekiel45:12 “A ngit teenate a nuai a bang hi tu hi: 20 gerahs = 1 shekel 60 shekels = 1 mina 
Ezekiel45:13 “Hite doppha in na biakpiaknate na pia tu uh hi: Zungtaang: a piang theampo sung pan 1/60 Mangtaang: a piang theampo sung pan 1/60 Olive thau: a kungte pan a piang theampo sung pan 1/100 (Bath taw teena: 10 baths = 1 homer = 1 kor) Tuu: Israel lo hingna te pan a piangte 200 sung pan 1 “Antang taw biakpiakna, nganhing pum bup meihal biakpiakna, kipawlkhop biakpiakna atu nganhingte nong paipui tu uh hi, tua hile noma mawna khialnate hong kimaisak tu hi. Keima, Vaanglianpipa Topa in thu kong pia hi." 
Ezekiel45:14  
Ezekiel45:15  
Ezekiel45:16 “Ngamsung mite theampo in hi biakpiaknate Israel ngamukpa kungah paipui nanak tu hi. 
Ezekiel45:17 Ama in Israel minam bup ii Thadet Poaite, Sabbath te le a dang poaite theampo atu in nganhing pum bup meihal biakpiak natu nganhingte, antang biakpiakna le sapittui biakpiaknate a piak tu sia ama vaipuak ahi hi. Ama in mawphel biakpiakna, antang biakpiakna, nganhing pum bup meihal biakpiakna le kipawlkhop biakpiaknate sia Israel mite ii mawna khialnate kiphel natu in pia tu hi,” ci hi." 
Ezekiel45:18 Vaanglianpipa Topa in, “Tha masabel thadet ni in noma in khuital mealhem ngawl khat taw sangaw biakpiakna taw Biakinnpi thiansua tu nu hi." 
Ezekiel45:19 Thiampipa in mawphel biakpiakna pan a chi pawlkhat la tu a, Biakinnpi innkha khuamte tung, biaknatau king li te tung le suum sungnung kongpi vang khuamte tungah koi tu hi." 
Ezekiel45:20 Tha sim ni sali ni in, a heak ngawl hu in ahibuale a ngaisut khol ngawl bulin mawna a vawt khat pawpo luangin tuasia a kibangin na vawt tu uh hi. Hi bangin Biakinnpi na thiangthosak tu uh hi." 
Ezekiel45:21 “Tha masabel ni sawm le ni li ni in noma in Paisan poai vawt tu in na kipan tu uh hi. mi simin ni sali sung teng tol saw ngawl anluum ne tu hi. 
Ezekiel45:22 Poai ii ni masabel ni in ngamukpa in khuital khat sia ama mawna khialnate le a mite theampo ii mawna khialnate atu in mawphel biakpiakna in pia tu hi. 
Ezekiel45:23 Ama in ni sali sung ni simin a mealhem ngawl khuital sali le tuutal salite Topa tungah a pum bupin meihal biakpiakna in pia tu hi. Ama in ni simin kealtal khat taw zong mawphel biakpiakna nei tu hi. 
Ezekiel45:24 Khuital khat le tuutal khat sangaw biakpiakna in a kingaw simin antang taw biakpiak natu in antang litre sawm le sali le a lang le olive thau litre thum pia tu hi. 
Ezekiel45:25 “Tha sali tha ni sawm le ni nga ni a kipan Buk Poai atu sia a kibang ma in mawphel biakpiakna, a pum bup meihal biakpiakna le antang le olive thau taw biakpiaknate ni sali sung ni simin ngamukpa in pia tu hi,” ci hi." 
Ezekiel46:1 Vaanglianpipa Topa in, “Suum sungnung tumna nisuana sang kongpi vang sia, ni luk nasep sung kikhak tu a, ahihang Sabbath le Thadet Poai ah kihong tu hi." 
Ezekiel46:2 Kumpipa sia suum puanung pan kongpi vang tawnin sungtanna inndoi sungah pai tu a, thiampite in ama ii pum bup sangaw biakpiaknate le kipawlkhop biakpiakna a vawt hun sung teng kongpi khuamte hui ah ding tu hi. Tua mun kongpi ah ama in biakna a vawt kul tu a tua zawkciang pusuak kik tu hi. Kongpi sia nitak dong kikhak ngawl het tu hi." 
Ezekiel46:3 Sabbath sim le Thadet Poai simin, mihingte theampo zongh in kunin kongpi mai ah Topa bia tu uh hi." 
Ezekiel46:4 Sabbath ni in kumpipa in Topa tungah a mealhem ngawl tuuno luk le tuutal khat, pum bup meihal biakpiak natu in paipui tu hi." 
Ezekiel46:5 Ama in tuutal khat simin antang litre sawm le sali le a lang biakpiakna in paipui tu a, tuaciang tuuno khat sim atu in a piak nop pawpo paipui tu hi. Tuabang antang biakpiakna a nei simin olive thau litre thum veu ama in paipui tu hi." 
Ezekiel46:6 Thadet Poai sungah a mealhem ngawl khuital moi khat, tuuno luk le tuutal khat ama in pia tu hi." 
Ezekiel46:7 Khuital khat le tuutal khat a piak simin, antang litre sawm le sali le a lang pia tu a, tuaciang tuuno khat a piak simin kumpipa in a piak nop po taw pia khawm tu hi. Tuabang antang biakpiakna a piak simin olive thau litre thum pia tu hi." 
Ezekiel46:8 Kumpipa in kongpi vang ii sungtanna inndoi sia a nusiat ciang a tumna lampi sia ma zui in a pusua kul tu hi. 
Ezekiel46:9 “Poai khat pawpo ah mihingte in Topa bia tu hong pai ciang, saksang kongpi pan a tumte in, biakna a vawt zawkciang, thangsang kongpi pan pusuak tu a, thangsang kongpi pan a tumte in saksang kongpi pan pusuak tu hi. Kuama in a tumna lampi pan pusuak thei ngawl tu a, a kingalsai kongpi pan pusuak tu hi." 
Ezekiel46:10 Kumpipa sia mihingte pai ciang tum tu a, mihingte pusua ciangin pusuak tu hi." 
Ezekiel46:11 Poai vawt nite le Poaite ah khuital, ahibuale tuutal khat a piak simin antang litre sawm le sali le a lang taw pia tu a, tuuno khat a piak simin biakpiakna a vawt pa in a piak nop pawpo pia tu hi. Olive thau litre thum sia tuabang antang biakpiakna taw veu pia khawm tu hi." 
Ezekiel46:12 “Kumpipa in Topa tungah a thinzaw za biakpiakna sia pum bup meihal biakpiakna taw ahizong, kipawlkhop biakpiakna taw ahizong, a nei nop ciang suum sungnung paina nisuana sang kongpi kihon tu hi. Ama in Sabbath ni a biakpiakna a vawt bangin biakpiakna vawt tu a, kongpi sia ama pusua kik zawkciang kikhak tu hi,” ci hi." 
Ezekiel46:13 Topa in, “Zing simin, a mealhem ngawl kum khat a pha tuuno khat sia Topa tungah a pum bup biakpiakna in hal tu hi. Hi biakpiakna sia ni simin kinei nanak tu hi." 
Ezekiel46:14 Zing sim biakpiakna ah zungtaang vui kilogramme 2 le tua taw hel tu in olive thau litre khat taw zong pia khawm tu hi. Topa tungah hi biakpiakna ngeinate sia a tawntungin zui tu ahi hi. 
Ezekiel46:15 Tuuno, zungtaang vui le olive thaute sia Topa tungah zing sim a tawntungin biakpiakna in piak tu ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Ezekiel46:16 Vaanglianpipa Topa in thupia hi: “Kumpipa in a neisa leitang mun khat pawpo a tapate khat tungah letsongin a pia le tua tapa in tang tu a, a innkuan ii neisa khat bang hi tu hi." 
Ezekiel46:17 Ahihang kumpipa in a neisa leitang khat pawpo sia a naseam khat po tungah a pia le Puakik Kum a thet ciang, kumpipa ii neisa suak kik tu hi. Tua leitang sia ama ii neisa hi a, ama le a tapate bek in a tawntungin nei thei tu hi." 
Ezekiel46:18 Kumpipa in a mite ii neisa te peuma laaksak ngawl tu hi. Ama in a tapate tungah a piak leitang khat pawpo sia ama atu a kikoisia sung pan bek hi tu a, tua hile, ama in ka mite khat pawpo sia amate leitang laaksakna taw zothaw ngawl tu hi." 
Ezekiel46:19 Tua zawkciang, tua pa in saksang a ngaa, suum sungnung thangsang kongpi mai ah a om inndoite tumna ah kei hong paipui hi. Hite sia thiampite atu a thiangtho inndoite ahi uh hi. Inndoite ii nitumna sang mun khat ama in kawk a," 
Ezekiel46:20 tuaciang “Hi mun sia thiampite ii mawphel sangaw biakpiakna sate huan natu mun, ahibuale kitat natu biakpiakna le biakpiakna anvuite em natu mun ahi hi, tuabangin a thiangtho na khat pawpo mihingte ngim a piak thei natu mun suum puanung ah kipaipui ngawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
Ezekiel46:21 Tua zawkciang ama in a suum puanung ah kei hong paipui a, a king li sim ah suum nozaw metre 20 a sau metre 15 a zai khat tek a om sia hong lak hi." 
Ezekiel46:22  
Ezekiel46:23 Tuate khat sim sia suang pang taw ki um a, pang bealhin meikhukte kivawt hi." 
Ezekiel46:24 Tua pa in kei tungah, “Hite sia mite piak sangaw biakpiakna a sate biakinn ah naseamte ii a huanna mun anbukte ahi hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel47:1 Tua pa in Biakinnpi sung tumna ah hong heakpui kik hi. Tua tumna nuai pan tui hong phul a, Biakinnpi maingatna nisuana sangah luang hi. Tuasia biakinn thangsang a nuai pan biaknatau thangsang tawnin luangsuk hi." 
Ezekiel47:2 Tuaciang tua pa in saksang kongpi lam tawnin biakinn mun pua sangah kei hong paipui a, nisuana sang a ngaa kongpi ah hong paipui kawkoai hi. Luino khat sia kongpi thang sangah luang hi." 
Ezekiel47:3 Tua pa in a piciang taw nisuana sang luidung zuisuk in metre 590 tee a, tuaciang ama in tuak ah luitui tan tu in hong sawl hi. Tui sia ka siakmit ciang bek pha hi." 
Ezekiel47:4 Tua zawkciang ama in a dang metre 500 tee a, tuaciang tui sia ka khup ciang pha hi. A dang metre 500 tee suk lai a, tui sia ka kawng ciang dong pha hi." 
Ezekiel47:5 Ama in metre 500 tee thua a, tualai ah tuithuk mama ahikom tui ka tan zo bua hi. Tui thuk lei ahikom tui op ngawlin kikaantan zo ngawl hi." 
Ezekiel47:6 Ama in kei tungah, “A thithei mihing awng, hi thu theampo pha takin ciamtee in,” hong ci hi. Tua zawkciang tua pa in ngunvaal ah hong heakpui kik a," 
Ezekiel47:7 tua mun ka thet ciang, thingkung tam mama ngunvaal lang le lang ah a om ka mu hi," 
Ezekiel47:8 Ama in kei tungah, “Hi tui sia nisuana sang tawnin Jordan Kuam le Tuipi Thi dongah luang suk hi. Tuipi Thi sungah a tum suk ciang, tua tuipi tui al sia tuithiang taw lai hi." 
Ezekiel47:9 Luitui luanna mun theampo ah nganhing namcin le ngasa namcinte om tu hi. Hi luitui in Tuipi Thi sungah tuite thiangsak tu a, tuaciang a luanna mun po ah nuntakna piangsak tu hi." 
Ezekiel47:10 Engedi Cik tuite panin Eneglaim Ciktuite dong tuipi vaalbo tungah ngasa mante om tu a, tua munah a ngeente a ko tu in phalh tu uh hi. Mediterranean Tuipi sungah ngasa namcin tam mama a om bangma in hi luitui sungah ngasa namcin tam mama om tu hi." 
Ezekiel47:11 Ahihang vaalbo dungah a om buannawngte le tuicing note sungah tuite kithiangsak ngawl tu hi. Tua tuite ci al pian natu in tua munah om tawntung tu hi. 
Ezekiel47:12 Lui lang le lang vaalbo tungah an tu in thingkung namcinte po tu hi. A teete vul ngeingawl tu a, a nga pangh ngeingawlin nga tawntung tu hi. Tha simin tuate in nga thakte nga tu hi, banghang ziam cile Biakinnpi pan a luang luitui in tui pia hi. A thingkungte in an piangsak tu a, tuaciang a teete sia mihingte ciidamsak kik natu in kizangh tu hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel47:13 Vaanglianpipa Topa in, “Hite in minam sawm le nii te sungah leitang a kihawm tute ii ngamngite hi a, Joseph minam in ngamkhen nii nga hi." 
Ezekiel47:14 Keima in na taanghpupite tungah hi ngam piak tu in a ciliaphuai takin ka kamciamsa hi; tu in noma sungah a kikim in hawm diimdiam vun. 
Ezekiel47:15 Saksang ngamngi sia Mediterranean Tuipi pan nisuana sangah pai a, Hethlon khuapi, Hamath Ciangh tawnin Zedad khuapi ah," 
Ezekiel47:16 Berothah le Sibraim khuapite (Tua khuapite sia Damascus kumpi ngam le Hamath kumpi ngam kilaklaw ah om hi), tuaciang Ticon khuapi dong (Hauran ngamkhen ngamngi hui ah om) hi tu hi." 
Ezekiel47:17 Tua ahikom saksang ngamngi sia Mediterranean pan nisuana sang Enon khuapi, a saksang pan Damascus le Hamath ngamkhente dong ahi hi." 
Ezekiel47:18 “Nisuana sang ngamngi sia Damascus le Hauran ngam kilaklaw mun khat pan thang sangah paisuk a, nitumna sang Israel ngam le nisuana sang Gilead ngam kilaklaw ngamngi ahi Jordan ngun taw. Tuipi Thi hui ah a om Tamar dong ahi hi." 
Ezekiel47:19 “Thangsang ngamngi sia Tamar pan nitumna thangsang ah pai in Kadesh Meribah ciktui ah, tua zawkciang nitumna saksang Egypt ngamngi dung, Mediterranean Tuipi dong ahi hi." 
Ezekiel47:20 “Nitumna ngamngi sia Mediterranean hi a, saksang ah pai in Hamath Ciangh ii nitumna mun khat dong ahi hi." 
Ezekiel47:21 “Hi leitang sia na minamte sungah hawm vun; 
Ezekiel47:22 tua sia a tawntungin noma neisa hi tu hi. Ngamdangmi noma taw a teang khawm te le hi lai munah a suak a tate zongh in leitang na hawm uh ciang a nga tu bang hawmtel saang tu uh hi. Amate sia Israel ngammi tatakte bangma in kivawt tu a, Israel minamte taw a kihawmna meetang sawk khawmin leitang nga tu uh hi." 
Ezekiel47:23 Ngamdangmi hong teang khat simin a teen khoppui Israel minamte taw a kibangin ama ii tel nga tu hi. Keima, Vaanglianpipa Topa ka pau zo hi,” ci hi." 
Ezekiel48:1 Saksang ngamngi sia Mediterranean tuipi pan nisuana sang ah pai a, Hethlon khuapi, Hamath Ciangh, Enon khuapi, Damascus le Hamath kumpi ngamte kilaklaw ngamngi dong ahi hi. Minam khat simin leitang khen khat tek, nisuana ngamngi pan nitumna sang Mediterranean Tuipi dong, a nuai a kingual bangin sak pan thang dong nga tu hi. Dan Asher Naphtali Manasseh Ephraim Reuben Judah" 
Ezekiel48:2  
Ezekiel48:3  
Ezekiel48:4  
Ezekiel48:5  
Ezekiel48:6  
Ezekiel48:7  
Ezekiel48:8 Tua zom leitang khen sia a zak tuam tu in kituam koi tu hi. Hi sia saksang pan thangsang dong kilometre 12.5 zai a, a minamte leikhen a kipiak bangma in nisuana pan nitumna dong a sauna kibang tu hi. A Biakinnpi sia hi leikhen sungah om tu hi." 
Ezekiel48:9 Hi leikhen ii laisaan ah kilometre 12.5 a sau, kilometre 10 a zai muntuam khat sia Topa atu in kipia tu hi." 
Ezekiel48:10 Hi a thiangtho mun ii leikhawk khat sia thiampite ii neisa hi tu hi. Amate ii leikhawk sia nisuana pan nitumna ah kilometre 12:5, sak pan thang kilometre 5 pha tu hi. Topa ii Biakinnpi sia hi mun ii a laizang santak a kikoi tu hi" 
Ezekiel48:11 Hi mun thiangtho sia Zadok suan le paal thiampite atu ahi hi. Amate in ka na thumaan takin hong sepsak a, Israel dangte ii ngamtat khialnate ah Levi minam sung pan a dangte kihel bangin amate kihel ngawl hi." 
Ezekiel48:12 Tua ahikom amate in Levi te leitang neina mun taw kizomin muntuam khat nei tu a, tuasia a thiangthobel mun hi tu hi." 
Ezekiel48:13 Levi te zongh in muntuam khat nei tu a, thiampite leikhawk ii thangsang hi tu hi. Hi mun zongh nisuana pan nitumna dong kilometre 12.5 hi tu a, saksang pan thangsang dong kilometre 5 hi tu hi." 
Ezekiel48:14 Topa tungah a ki aapna mun sia leitang a phabelna mun hi a, hi mun sia midang khat pawpo tungah kizuak thei ngawl, kitheak thei ngawl, kikhiin thei ngawl tu hi. Tua mun sia thiangtho a, Topa neisa ahi hi." 
Ezekiel48:15 A taanglai a tuam vilvel mun sia kilometre 12.5 sau in kilometre 2.5 zai a, a thiangtho mun ahi ngawl hang mite ii a dei bangin a zak tu ahi hi. Tua munah amate teangin leitangte zangh thei tu hi. A khuapi sia a laizang ah om tu a," 
Ezekiel48:16 tua pangh li teng kikim in, a pangh khat sim metre 2,250 hi tu hi." 
Ezekiel48:17 Khuapi kiimkot sia a pangh simin metre 125 a zai mun awng khat veu om tu hi. 
Ezekiel48:18 Khuapi a kisaat zawkciang mun awng lai leitang, mun thiangtho ii thangsang lian mun khat — kilometre 5 kilometre 2.5 a pha nisuana sang mun le kilometre 5 kilometre 2.5 a pha nitumna sang mun sia ah khuapi sung a teang mite in longam in zangh tu hi." 
Ezekiel48:19 Khuapi sungah a teang pawpo akua minam ahizong tua munah lotho thei tu hi. 
Ezekiel48:20 Tua ahiciang a khen laizang ah a kikoituam mun buppi sia pangh li nei tu a, pangh khat sim kilometre 12.5 pha tu hi, tua ii sungah khuapi mun zongh kihel tu hi." 
Ezekiel48:21 Biakinnpi omna mun ii nisuana sang le nitumna sang ah thiampite leitang, Levi te leitang le khuapi a taanglai leitang teng sia ngamukpa ii neisa ahi hi. Tuasia in nisuana sang ah nisuana ngamngi dong, nitumna sang ah Mediterranean Tuipi dong, saksang pan Judah ngamkhen le thangsang pan Benjamin ngam khen dong ahi hi." 
Ezekiel48:22  
Ezekiel48:23 Hi muntuam ii thangsang, a taanglai Israel minamte in leitang khen khat tek, nisuana sang ngamngi pan nitumna sang Mediterranean Tuipi dong, saksang pan thangsang dong a nuai a bangin nga tu hi. Benjamin Simeon Issachar Zebulun Gad" 
Ezekiel48:24

Ezekiel48:27  
Ezekiel48:28 Gad minam a piakna mun ii thangsang ngamngi sia Tamar pan nitumna thangsang Kadesh Ciktui dong, tua zawkciang Egypt ngamngi dung pan nitumna saksang Mediterranean Tuipi dong ahi hi." 
Ezekiel48:29 Vaanglianpipa Topa in, “Tuabangin Israel minamte ii tan tu in a ngam leitang sia a khen, a khen in kihawm tu hi,” ci hi." 
Ezekiel48:30 Jerusalem khuapi sung tumna sawm le nii om hi. Pang li te sung pan pang khat simin metre 2,250 pha a, tuate khat sim in kongpi thum tek nei in kongpi khat sim minam khat ii min veu kivaw hi. Saksang pang a kongpite ii minte sia Reuben, Judah, le Levi hi a; nisuana sang pang a kongpite sia Joseph, Benjamin le Dan hi a; thangsang pang a kongpite sia Simeon, Issachar le Zebulun te hi a; nitumna sang pang a kongpite sia Gad, Asher le Naphtali ahi hi."

Ezekiel48:34  
Ezekiel48:35 Khuapi ii pangh li teng a kiim uum pang sia ii sauna kingawm sia metre 9,000 pha hi. Tu pan kipan tua khuapi ii min sia, ‘Hi munah Topa om hi!’ “Jehovah Shammah” hi tu hi." 
Daniel1:1 Jehoiakim ii Judah kumpi a sua zawk a kum thum kumin, Babylon kumpipa Nebuchadnezzar in Jerusalem khuapi simin uumci hi." 
Daniel1:2 Topa in, Jehoiakim Kumpipa sia Nebuchadnezzar Kumpipa in mansak a, biakinn na manpha pawlkhatte laaksak hi. Ama in a mat mihing pawlkhatte Babylon khua ama ii pathiante biakinn ah ciapui a, a mat sum le vanh manphate biakinn vanh kholna inndoite sungah koi hi." 
Daniel1:3 Kumpipa in Israel saltaangte sung pan kumpi nam le nampite tangvalno pawlkhat teal tu in a khutnuai ulianbel Ashpenaz thupia hi. 
Daniel1:4 Tua a teal mihingte sia kumpi inn sungah naseam thiamte a sua thei natu in a mealhoi, a pilvang, pha tak nasep a kisinsak sa, thu a he pal le pumpi tung paubanna nei ngawlte hi tu hi. Amate sia Babylon kam taw lai a sim thei natu le a at thei natu in Ashpenaz in hil tu hi." 
Daniel1:5 Kumpi inn sungah a om mihingte bangma in amate sia ni simin an le sapittui a piak natu kumpipa in thupia si hi. Hi bangin kum thum a sin zawkciang kumpipa mai ah kilak tu uh hi. 
Daniel1:6 Tuabang a kitealte sung panin Daniel, Hananiah, Mishael, le Azariah kihel a, a vekpi in Judah nam ahi uh hi." 
Daniel1:7 A ulianbel pa in amate sia min thak phua in: Belteshazzar, Shadrach, Meshach le Abednego ci hi." 
Daniel1:8 Daniel in kumpi inn sung pan a kipia an le sapittui neakna taw in ama le ama biakna sangah a kininsak ngawl natu in a thin khensat ahikom ama in Ashpenaz tungah huna ngen hi," 
Daniel1:9 tuaciang Pathian in Ashpenaz sia Daniel tungah hesuakna thin neisak hi. 
Daniel1:10 Ahizong Ashpenaz in kumpipa kiita ahikom ama in Daniel tungah, “Kumpipa in na neak tu le na dawn tu see sa nei zo ahikom, tangvalno dangte bangza ban zo bua lete ama in kei hong thatlum tu hi” ci hi." 
Daniel1:11 Tuasia ciang Daniel sia ama le a lawm thum teng a uk in Ashpenaz ii a koi a cingpa kungah pai hi. 
Daniel1:12 Ama in, “Ni sawm sung hong sin ta'n a, ka neak tu uh anteete le ka dawn tu tui hong pia ta'n." 
Daniel1:13 Tua zawkciang kumpi an a ne tangvalno dangte taw hong ettee khawm ta'n a, ka meal uh nong muna bangin thu hong khen ta'n” ci hi." 
Daniel1:14 Ashpenaz in ni sawm sung kisinsak tu in thukim hi. 
Daniel1:15 A hun a cin ciang amate sia kumpi an a nete theampo sangin a ciidam tuak zaw, a tha hat tuak zaw uh hi." 
Daniel1:16 Tua ahikom tua ni pan kipan amate a cing pa in kumpipa ii piak an luangin anteete ne suaksak hi. 
Daniel1:17 Pathian in tua tangvalno lite sia heak theina, lai thiam pilna le thuthuk ngaisut theinate pia hi. Tua bek dom ngawlin ama in Daniel sia mukholnate pheen theina le mang khiak thiamna pia hi." 
Daniel1:18 Kumpipa ii ciangtan kum thum a cin ciang, Ashpenaz in tangvalnote theampo sia Nebuchadnezzar kungah paipui hi." 
Daniel1:19 Kumpipa in amate paupui siat a, Daniel, Hananiah, Mishael le Azariah sia a dangte sangin lungkimhuai sa zaw hi. Tua ahikom amate sia kumpipa inn sungah a vaihawm pawlmi suak uh hi." 
Daniel1:20 Kumpipa in a dok pawpo ahibuale bangbang thu haksa nawno dongh kale hi mihing lite in a kumpi ngam bup a om aisaan theite le mitbum thiamte khat pawpo sangin a sawmvei in he zaw uh hi. 
Daniel1:21 Daniel sia kumpi inn ah Persia kumpilianpa Cyrus ii Babylon zo in a uk dong om suak hi. 
Daniel2:1 Nebuchadnezzar in kumpi a sua zawk a kum nii kumin mang khat man hi. Tua mang in ama thinngimsak mama a, mu thei ngawl hi," 
Daniel2:2 tua ahikom ama tungah a mang khiakna son tu in a aisaan theite, mitbum thiamte, bum toaite le ai toaite samsak hi. Amate hong pai in kumpipa mai ah a din uh ciang kumpipa in," 
Daniel2:3 amate tungah, “Mang khat ka mat huvau in ka thinngim hi. Tua ka mang ii a khiakna he nuam khi hi,” ci hi." 
Daniel2:4 Amate in Aramaic kam taw kumpipa tungah, “Kumpipa awng na khansau tawntung tahen! Na mang hong son ta'n, tua hile a khiakna kong sonthiang tu uh hi” ci in zo uh hi." 
Daniel2:5 Kumpipa in amate tungah, “Ka mang nong son kul tu a, tua zawkciang a khiakna nong son nanak natu uh in ka thin khensat zo khi hi. Nong son thei bua uh le, na khut le na peangte kong semthapsak tu a, na inn uh sia niinthuk ka suaksak tu hi." 
Daniel2:6 Ahizong ka mang le a khiakna nong son thei uh le letsong le min phatna lian kong pia tu hi. Tua ahiciang tu in, ka mang sia bang hi a, a khiakna bang ziam cisia hong son tavun,” ci hi." 
Daniel2:7 Amate in kumpipa tungah, “Kumpipa awng na mang hong son phot po lete, a khiakna kong sonthiang tu uh hi” ci kik uh hi." 
Daniel2:8 Tuaciang, kumpipa a nging in au a, “Ka ngaisut sa bangma hi nu hi! Hun haisaang thethei natu hanciam nu hi, banghang ziam cile ka mang nong son bua uh le," 
Daniel2:9 na vekpi a kibangin daan pia tu ci a ka khensat sia na heak uh hang ahi hi. Kei tungah leilot thu nong sawson uh sia na lungkim tek uh ma ahi hi, banghang ziam cile hun hong kilaih tu hi ci in na lamet uh hang ahi hi. Ka mang sia bang ziam hong son tavun, tua hile a khiakna zongh hong son thei si tu ci in ka he tu hi” ci hi." 
Daniel2:10 Kumpipa ii thudokte in, “Kumpipa awng, na heak nop bang sia hong son thei tu, hi leitung ah mihing khat beak om ngawl hi. Kumpipa dom ngawlin, milianbel le a vaanglianbel ngawngawn zongh khat beak in a aisaan theite, mitbum thiamte le bumtoai aitoaite tungah tuabang thute a dongh ngei kuama om ngawl lai hi." 
Daniel2:11 Kumpipa ii nong thu dokna sia haksa mama ahikom pathiante simngawl hong son thei tu kuama om ngawl hi, tuaciang amate sia mihingte sungah teang ngawl hi” ci in zo uh hi." 
Daniel2:12 Tuasia ciang, kumpipa thin uuk mama a, Babylon ngamsung kumpi ii thudokte theampo thalup tu in thupia hi." 
Daniel2:13 Tua ahikom amate theampo thalup siat tu in thu kipia a, tuate sungah Daniel le a lawmte zongh kihel hi." 
Daniel2:14 Tuaciang Daniel sia mihing that tu a kisawl, kumpipa cingte a uk mangpa Arioch kungah pai hi. Kampau kidawm kawmin," 
Daniel2:15 ama in banghangin kumpipa in tuabang thupiak nasia mama khat suaksak ziam ci in, Arioch tungah dongh hi. Tuasia ciang Arioch in Daniel tungah thupiang teng son hi." 
Daniel2:16 Thakhat thu in Daniel pai a, kumpipa ii mang a khiak thei natu in kumpipa tung pan a hun nga thua hi." 
Daniel2:17 Tua zawkciang Daniel sia inn ah cia a, thupiang teng a lawmte Hananiah, Mishael le Azariah tungah son hi." 
Daniel2:18 Vantung Pathian in amate hesuak a, tua thu tumdang sia sonthiang thei in, Babylon ngamsung a kumpi thudok dangte taw a kithalup khop ngawl natu in, ama in a lawmte thungen tu in sawl hi." 
Daniel2:19 Tuasia ciang tua zanin tua thu tumdang sia Daniel mukholna sungah kipualaak hi, tuaciang ama in vantung Pathian a pok hi:" 
Daniel2:20 “Pathian sia ciim in vaanglian hi! Ama a tawntung a tawntungin pok vun. 
Daniel2:21 Ama in hunte le khua hunte uk hi; ama in kumpite panmun pia a, kumpite phiat hi; ciimna le pilna a pia pa sia ama ahi hi." 
Daniel2:22 Ama in thuthukte le thukute pualaak hi; ama in khuazing sungah a kiphualte he a, ama mama sia khuavak in uumci hi." 
Daniel2:23 Ka taanghpupite ii Pathian awng, nang kong pok a, kong zakta hi. Nangma in ciimna le thahatna nong pia zo hi; Ka thungetna nong zo a, kumpipa tungah ka son tu thute nong lak zo hi” ci hi." 
Daniel2:24 Tua ahiciang Daniel sia kumpipa ii thudokte that tu in a sawl pa Arioch kungah pai hi. Daniel in Arioch tungah “Kumpipa ii thudokte that heak in. Kumpipa kungah hong paipui ta'n, a mang khiakna ka son tu hi” ci hi." 
Daniel2:25 Thakhatin Arioch in Daniel sia Nebuchadnezzar kumpipa omna ah paipui in kumpipa tungah, “Kumpipa awng, Judah saltaangte sung panin na mang khiakna hong son thei tu khat mu zo khi hi” ci in son hi." 
Daniel2:26 Kumpipa in (Belteshazzar zongh a kici) Daniel tungah, “Ka mangmat sia le a khiakna nong son thei tu ziam” ci hi." 
Daniel2:27 Daniel in, “Kumpipa awng, tuasia hong son thei tu in, bum lei aitoai, mitbum thiam, aisaan thiam ahibuale aksi en thiam kuama om ngawl hi." 
Daniel2:28 Ahihang thutumdangte a pualaak vantung ah Pathian khat om hi. Ama in maisang thupiang tute, Nangma Kumpipa tungah hong hil zo hi. Na mut laitak a na mu kholna, tua mang sia tu in kong son tu hi." 
Daniel2:29 “Kumpipa awng, na mut laitakin, maisang hong piang tute mang in na man hi; thutumdangte a pualaak Pathian in a piang tu thu hong lak hi." 
Daniel2:30 Tu in midangte saangin ka pil zawk man hi ngawl hi, ahizong Nangma kumpipa ii na mang khiakna le na ngaisut thute na heak natu in hi thu tumdang sia kei tungah hong kipualaak hi." 
Daniel2:31 “Kumpipa awng, na mukholna sungah a taang hemhom a kiitakhuai milim lian mama khat na mai ah a ding na mu hi." 
Daniel2:32 Tua milim lutang sia khamh ciitak taw kivawt a; a awm le a baante sia ngunn taw kivawt in; a kawng le a khealte sia taau taw kivawt hi. 
Daniel2:33 A peangte thik taw kivawt a, a peangpakte khen khat thik taw kivawt in, khen khat tungman taw kivawt hi." 
Daniel2:34 Tua milim na et laitak, kuama ii thuthaak ngawl bulin, liang tung pan suangtum lian khat hong liiksuk a, thik le tungman taw a kivawt milim ii peangte kha in zaanthamsak hi." 
Daniel2:35 Thakhatin thik, tungman, taau, ngunn le khamhte tamhneen ngawp a, khuakhaal lai ancilna mun a leivuite taw kibang hi. Vui in tuate seammang a, bangma taang nawn ngawl hi. Ahizong tua suangtum sia khang in mual cia pha a, leitung buppi huam hi." 
Daniel2:36 “Na mangmat sia tu a bang teng hi. Tu in Nangma Kumpipa tungah a khiakna kong son tu hi. 
Daniel2:37 Kumpipa awng, nangma in kumpi theampo sung panin a lianbel na hi hi. Vantung Pathian in nang sia kumpi lian in hong koi zo a, vaangletna, thahatna le upatna hong pia zo hi." 
Daniel2:38 Ama in nang sia mihing teenna leitung theampo, nganhingte le vacimte theampo a ukpa in hong koi zo hi. Tua khamh lutang sia nangma na hi hi." 
Daniel2:39 Nang zawkciang nangma ngam za in a lian ngawl kumpi ngamlian khat hong piang tu a, tua zawkciang leitung buppi a uk tu taau ahi kumpi ngamlian thumna piang tu hi." 
Daniel2:40 Tua zawkciang na theampo sutham in a zaansak, thik bangin a kho, kumpi ngamlian lina hong piang tu hi. Thik in na theampo a sukthap bangin tua a ngam in kumpi ngamlian masa teng khen tham in sucip tu hi." 
Daniel2:41 A peangpak le a peangmete khen khat sia thik hi a, khen khat tungman a hina zongh na mu hi. Tuasia in a kikhen ngamlian khat hi tu hi, a cina hi. Tungman le thik kingawm ahikom tua in thik ii thahatna a khomkhat nei tu hi." 
Daniel2:42 Peangmete — khen khat thik, khen khat tungman — a hina sia kumpi ngamlian khen khat thahat in khen khat thazawm tu, cinopna ahi hi." 
Daniel2:43 Thik le tungman a kihel khawm zongh na mu hi. Tua kumpi ngamlian ukte in a innkuanpuite kiteensakna taw in ngawmtua tu hanciam tu a, ahihang thik le tungman a kihel thei ngawl bangma in kingawmtua thei ngawl tu uh hi." 
Daniel2:44 Tua ngamukte hun sungin, vantung Pathian in a bo ngeingawl tu kumpi ngam khat phut tu hi. Tua ngam sia kuama in zo zo ngawl tu a, ahizong tua ngam in kumpi ngamliante theampo zo ngawpin kip tawntung tu hi." 
Daniel2:45 Kuama ii thuthaak ngawl bulin liang tung pan hong liik suangtum khat in thik, taau, tungman, ngunn le khamh taw a kivawt milim sia a denthap na mu hi. A lian Pathian in mai sangah a piang tu thu, Nangma Kumpipa tungah hong son hi. Na mangmat sia ahi bang vateak in kong son zo a, a khiakna maan kong son zo hi” ci in zo kik hi." 
Daniel2:46 Tuaciang Nebuchadnezzar kumpipa lei ah kunsuk in, sangaw biakpiaknate le biakpiaknate Daniel tungah vawt tu in thupia hi." 
Daniel2:47 Kumpipa in, “Na Pathian sia pathian theampo sung pan a lianbel, kumpite tungah Topa hi a, thu telhakte a pualaak pa ahi hi. Hi thu ka he hi, banghang ziam cile nangma in hi thu telhak sia na pualaak thei hang hi” ci hi." 
Daniel2:48 Tua zawkciang kumpipa in Daniel sia letsong pha tam ma pia in a za khangsak a, Babylon ngamkhen uksakin, kumpi thudokte theampo ii lutang in koi hi." 
Daniel2:49 Daniel ii ngetna bangma in kumpipa in Shadrach, Meshach le Abednego te sia Babylon ngamkhen sung vaite a uk tu in koi a, Daniel ahile kumpi inn sungah om suak hi." 
Daniel3:1 Kumpipa Nebuchadnezzar in metre 27 a saang le metre 3 dektak a lian khamh milim khat vawt a, Babylon ngamkhen Dura zaangtam ah phut hi." 
Daniel3:2 Tua zawkciang kumpipa in a ulian theampo — kumpinote, ngamkhen ukte, ngamkhen uk domte, menzite, sumkeamte, thukhenmangte le ngamkhente ii ulian dangte theampo a kikhop tek natu in thupia hi. Amate sia Kumpipa Nebuchadnezzar ii milim aapna poai siim tek tu ahi hi." 
Daniel3:3 Hi uliante theampo milim aapna vawt tu in kikhawmtua a, milim mai ah a din uh ciang," 
Daniel3:4 thu puak khat in aw nging takin au a, “Ngam theampo, minam theampo le paunam theampo pan mihingte awng!" 
Daniel3:5 Lemle aw na za tu uh a, tua zomin tum thei oboe te, liamlo te, zither te le tengtonghte; tuaciang a dang tum thei theampo in hunghuan tu hi. Tum thei teng hong kitum po ciang, Nebuchadnezzar ii phu sa khamh milim mai ah kunin na bia tu uh hi." 
Daniel3:6 Kun in a bia ngawl peuma sia thakhat thu in a lingh meiphual sung denna kinei tu hi,” ci hi." 
Daniel3:7 Tuabangin, ngam theampo, minam theampo le paunam theampo pan mihingte in tum theite awte a zaak pawpo uh ciang, kunin Nebuchadnezzar phu sa khamh milim bia uh hi." 
Daniel3:8 Tuasia ciang Babylon mite pawlkhat in Jew mite a siat son natu hunpha khat nga uh hi. 
Daniel3:9 Amate in Nebuchadnezzar kumpipa tungah, “Kumpipa awng, nungta tawntung ta'n!" 
Daniel3:10 Tum theite hong kitum pawpo ciang, mihing theampo kunin khamh milim bia tu hi," 
Daniel3:11 tua milim mai ah a kun ngawl, a bia ngawl peuma meiphual lingh sungah kibum tu hi ci in Nangma Kumpipa in thu na pia zo hi." 
Daniel3:12 Babylon ngam khen uk tu a na koi Nangma Kumpipa ii thu a ni ngawl — Shadrach, Meshach le Abednego — Jew mi pawlkhat om hi. Amate in na pathian le bia ngawl, na phu sa milim mai ah le kun ngawl uh hi,” ci uh hi." 
Daniel3:13 Tuasia po ciang kumpipa a thin uuk ngawp a, tua mihing thumte a mai ah a kipuak natu in thupia hi." 
Daniel3:14 Kumpipa in amate tungah, “Shadrach, Meshach le Abednego awng, keima ii pathian bia nuam ngawl a, ka phu sa khamh milim mai ah kun nuam ngawl hong kici sia a maan ma ahi na'am?" 
Daniel3:15 Tua ahiciang tu in lemlete, oboe te, liamlo te, zither te, tengtonghte le a dang tum thei tuatuam theampo ii aw na zaak po uh ciang kun in tua milim bia vun. Na bia bua uh le, thakhat thu in a lingh meiphual sungah hong kikhia tu hi. No hong hun zo tu pathian khat pawpo om tu in um nu ziam?” ci hi." 
Daniel3:16 Shadrach, Meshach le Abednego in, “Kumpipa awng, ko le ko kihuuk natu hanciam ngawl tu khu hi." 
Daniel3:17 Ka biak ka paai uh Pathian in a naseam kote meiphual sung pan le na khut sung panin hong hun thei ahi nale hong hun tu hi. 
Daniel3:18 Ahizong hong hun buahial zong Nangma Kumpipa awng, na pathian ka bia tuan buatu uh a, na phu sa khamh milim mai ah ka kun buatu uh hi, cisia hong heaksak ta'n” ci in zo uh hi." 
Daniel3:19 Tuasia ciang Nebuchadnezzar kumpipa in Shadrach, Meshach le Abednego tungah a thin uuk mama a, a mai san liang hi. Tua ahikom ama in meiphual sia a sat ngeina sang a salivei in a satsak zawk natu in a mite thupia hi." 
Daniel3:20 Tuaciang ama in a ngalkaphonpi sung pan a thahat belte in hi mihing thum teng heencip in a lingh meiphual sungah khia tu in thupia hi. 
Daniel3:21 Tua ahikom amate thum sia a puansilh theampo a cingin — laktongte, puantualte silh sa le lukhu khu sa in heencip uh a, a lingh meiphual sung denna in nei uh hi." 
Daniel3:22 Tu in, kumpipa in meiphual a sat mama natu in ngat takin thupia ahikom tua mite meikuang sungah a khia a cing teng sia meikuang in kaanghlum hi." 
Daniel3:23 Tuaciang Shadrach, Meshach le Abednego sia heencip sa in a lingh meikuang laizang ah taaksuk hi." 
Daniel3:24 Tha khat thu in Nebuchadnezzar sia lamdang sa in dingto vat hi. Ama in a uliante tungah, “Mihing thumte heencip in meiphual sungah khia zo hi ka na ngawl hi ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Amate in, “Hi hi, Kumpipa awng,” ci in zo uh hi." 
Daniel3:25 “Tua ahile banghangin meikuang sungah mihing li kot vavaa in mu khi ziam?” ci in dongh hi. “Amate kiheencip ngawl a, liam zongh liam tuak beak ngawl uh hi — tuaciang a lina pa sia vantunglalang khat taw kibang hi,” ci hi." 
Daniel3:26 Tuaciang Nebuchadnezzar sia meiphualpi kongkha kungah paito a, “Shadrach! Meshach! Abednego! Lianbel Pathian ii naseamte awng, hong pusuak tavun!” ci in sam hi. Tuaciang amate thakhat thu in pusuak uh hi." 
Daniel3:27 Kumpinote, ngamkhen ukte, ngamkhen uk domte le kumpi ulian dangte theampo in mei ii kak ngawl mihing thumte en tu in hong kikhawm uh hi. Amate a sam kaang ngawl, a puante kaang ngawl a, meikhu ngim zongh nam ngawl uh hi." 
Daniel3:28 Kumpipa in, “Shadrach, Meshach le Abednego ii Pathian pok vun! Ama in a vantunglalang sawl a, ama muangin, ama na a seam hi mihingte suatak hi. Amate in ka thupiakte ni ngawlin amate ii Pathian simngawl pathian dang khat pawpo mai ah kunin a biak tu sangin a nuntak nate khaam zaw uh hi." 
Daniel3:29 “Tuaciang tu in minam, minam khen ahibuale paunam khat po sung pan a kuama po in Shadrach, Meshach le Abednego ii Pathian sonsiatna kampau a om le a khut a peang kisemtham tu a, a inn sia niinthuk kisuaksak tu hi, ci in thu ka pia hi. Hi bangin a suatak thei pathian dang om ngawl hi,” ci hi." 
Daniel3:30 Tuaciang kumpipa in Shadrach, Meshach le Abednego sia Babylon ngamkhen sungah a za uh khangsak hi." 
Daniel4:1 Nebuchadnezzar kumpipa in leitung ah a om ngam theampo, minam theampo le paunam theampo pan mihingte tungah a nuai a bang thu puak hi: “Kong nukset hi!" 
Daniel4:2 Lianbel Pathian ii ka tungah hong lak a lamdangte le nalamdang laknate ngai vun. 
Daniel4:3 “Pathian ii eite hong lak nalamdangte lian lawlawm hi! A vawt nalamdang laknate vaang nei lawlawm hi! Pathian sia a tawntungin kumpi hi a; ama in a tawntungin uk tu hi. 
Daniel4:4 “Keima in kumpi inn sungah ka teang hiithiat a, nuamsa mama in ka om hi." 
Daniel4:5 Ahihang a patau huai mang khat ka man a, ka mut laitakin a lauhuai mu kholnate ka mu hi." 
Daniel4:6 Ka mang khiakna hong son thei tu in, Babylon ngamsung kumpi thudokte theampo ka kungah hong pai natu in thu ka pia hi." 
Daniel4:7 Tuaciang aisaan theite, mitbum thiamte, doaiai neite le aksi enthiamte theampo kisam a, amate tungah ka mang ka son hi, ahizong amate in a khiakna hong son thei bua uh hi." 
Daniel4:8 Tuaciang Daniel (a min dang Belteshazzar, ka pathian min a kitap pa) hong tum hi. A thiangtho pathiante ii thaa sia ama sungah om ahikom, ama tungah ka mang ka son hi. Ama tungah:" 
Daniel4:9 Aisaan theite ukpi Belteshazzar awng, a thiangtho pathiante ii thaa sia na sungah om in thu telhak theampo na tel thei hunlam ka he hi. Hi sia keima mang hi. A khiakna hong son ta'n." 
Daniel4:10 “Ka mut laitakin leitung laizang ah thingkung lian mama khat mukholna khat ka nei hi. 
Daniel4:11 Tua thingkung sia van a phak dongin lian vaial in khangto a, leitung mihing theampo in mu thei uh hi." 
Daniel4:12 A teete et hoi a, tuaciang a ngate taw tuaisuk in — leitung bup ii a neakkhop tu za in nga thiam hi. Ngamsate in a lim bealhin tawlnga a, vacimte sia a baakte tungah bu tom hi, tuaciang nuntakna nei a minpiang theampo in a nga ne uh hi." 
Daniel4:13 “Ka mukholna thu ka ngaisut laitakin khua a phawk vilvel, a mit pilvang vantunglalang khat sia vantung pan hong tuaksuk ka mu hi." 
Daniel4:14 Ama in nging takin, ‘Tua thingkung phuktan in a, a baak teng siiktan in; a tee teng heu thiang in a, a nga thethaang in. A nuai a nganhing teng le thingbaak tungah vacim teng bengkeak in." 
Daniel4:15 Ahizong a bul sia thik le taau kual taw khit in lei sungah nusia in. Tua mun lo sungah lopa taw nusia in. “ ‘Tu in hisia pa tungah daaitui kia tahen a, ama sia nganhingte le thingkungte taw teang khawm tahen." 
Daniel4:16 Ama in kum sali sung mihing ngaisutna nei ngawl tu a, ahizong nganhing ngaisutna nei tu hi." 
Daniel4:17 Hi thu sia a pilvang le a phawk vilvel vantunglalangte ii thukhenna ahi hi. Tua ahiciang mun theampo ah om mihing theampo in, Lianbel Pathian in mihing kumpi ngamte tungah vaang nei a, ama ii teal khat pawpo — mihing thupi ngawl belte ngawngawn tungah zongh kumpi ngamte pia thei hi ci thu he tahen, ci in thangsak hi.’" 
Daniel4:18 “Ka mangmat sia hi bang hi,” Nebuchadnezzar kumpipa in ci hi. “Tu in Belteshazzar awng, a khiakna hong son ta'n. Ka kumpi thudokte kuama in hong son thei ngawl hi, ahizong nang sungah a thiangtho pathiante ii thaa om ahikom nong son thei tu hi,” ci hi." 
Daniel4:19 Tuaciang Belteshazzar zongh a kici Daniel patau mama ahikom bangma pau thei ngawl hi. Kumpipa in ama tungah, “Belteshazzar awng, tua mang le a thu in patausak heak in,” ci hi. Belteshazzar in, “Kumpipa awng, tua mang le a khiakna sia nang tungah hong tung ngawlin na ngalte tungah tung zaw le ka oai hi." 
Daniel4:20 A saang mama van a ban thingkung sia leitung mihing theampo in mu thei uh hi. 
Daniel4:21 A teete et hoi a, leitung bup a vaak khom zo tu in a nga nga thiam hi. Ngamsate a nuai ah tawlnga in, vacimte a baakte tungah bu tom uh hi." 
Daniel4:22 “Kumpipa awng, nangma in a saang, a thahat thingkung sia na hi hi. Khangto in lian mama na hikom vantung na baan to a, na vaangletna sia leitung buppi ah kizel hi." 
Daniel4:23 Kumpipa Nangma in na et laitakin, vantunglalang khat vantung panin hong tuaksuk a, ama in ‘Thingkung phuk in a, susia in, ahizong lei sungah a bul nusia in. A bul ah thik le taau kual vial in a, tua mun lo sungah lopate taw nusia in. Hisia pa tungah daaitui kia tahen a tua munah kum sali sung nganhingte taw teang tahen,’ ci hi." 
Daniel4:24 “Kumpipa awng, a khiakna sia hi bang hi a, nang tungah hong tung tu in Lianbel Pathian ii ci sa ahi hi." 
Daniel4:25 Mihing huamsung panin hong kihawlkeak tu a, ngamsate taw na teang khawm tu hi. Khuital khat bangin kum sali sung lopa ne in lozau sungah zan na ngiak tu a, na tungah daaitui hong kia tu hi. Tuaciang Lianbel Pathian in mihing kumpi ngamte uk a, tuate sia ama ii teal khat pawpo pia thei hi ci sia na saang tu hi." 
Daniel4:26 Vantunglalang in lei sungah tua thingbul a kinusiat natu in thupia hi. Tu sia in leitung theampo Pathian ii uk ahi hunlam na tel tak ciang kumpi na sua kik tu hong sonna ahi hi. 
Daniel4:27 Tua ahiciang kumpipa awng, kong thuhilna hong ni ta'n. Mawna na vawt kheal in a, a maan in seam in, tuaciang a zawngte hesuak in. Tua hile na nuamsa tawto tu hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Daniel4:28 Hi thu theampo Nebuchadnezzar kumpipa tungah tung siat hi. 
Daniel4:29 Tha sawm le tha nii bek zawkciang, ama ii Babylon kumpi inn khuvum tungah a va kawkoai kawmin," 
Daniel4:30 ama in, “En vun, Babylon khua bangzata lian ziam! Ka vaangletna, ka thahatna, ka minthanna le ka letnate lak natu ka khuapi in ka sa hi,” ci hi." 
Daniel4:31 A kammalte zongh khuangkhim ngawl lai in, vantung pan pauna aw khat hong nging a, “Nebuchadnezzar kumpipa awng, ka thu son ngai in! Na kumpi vaangletna sia tu in na tung pan hong kilaaksak hi." 
Daniel4:32 Nangma sia mihing huamsung pan hong kibeng tu a, ngamsate taw teang khawmin, khuital khat bangin kum sali sung lopa na ne tu hi. Tuaciang, Lianbel Pathian in mihing kumpi ngamte uk a, a teal khat pawpo tungah kumpi ngamte pia thei ahi hunlam na he tu hi,” ci hi." 
Daniel4:33 A kammalte thakhat ma taangtung paih hi. Nebuchadnezzar sia mihing huamsung pan kibengkeak a, khuital khat bangin lopa ne hi. A pum tungah daaitui kia in, a sam sia muvanlai thate za in sau a, a khutcinte sia vacimte ii peangcin za in sau hi." 
Daniel4:34 Kumpipa in, “Kum sali a cin zawkciang van ka ento a, ka thin hong ciim kik hi. Lianbel Pathian ka pok a, a nungta tawntung pa khat tungah zatakna le minthanna ka pia hi. “Ama in a tawntungin uk tu a, a kumpi ngam sia kip tawntung tu hi." 
Daniel4:35 Ama in leitung mite bangma in a thusim bua a; vantung a om vantung mite le leitung a om mite ama in uk hi. Ama deina kuama in nalh thei ngawl a, ahibuale a sep a vawtte kuama in dongh kik thei ngawl hi." 
Daniel4:36 “Ka thin a ciim kik ciang ka minphatna, ka kumpi za le ka kumpi ngam ukna vaang hong kipia kik hi. Ka uliante le ka nampi mite in hong muak uh a, nidang sangin a lianzaw minphatna le ka kumpi vaang hong kipia kik hi." 
Daniel4:37 “Tu in keima Nebuchadnezzar in Vantung Kumpipa pok in, zatakna pia in, a min ka thangsak hi. Ama ii a sep a vawt theampo a maan le a thutang hi a, ama in kiphasak a, a ngamta pawpo kiniamkhiaksak thei hi,” ci hi." 
Daniel5:1 Zan khat Belshazzar kumpipa in a uliante tulkhat samin anneak poaipi khat vawt a, sapittui nekhawm uh hi." 
Daniel5:2 Sapittui a neak laitakin a pa Nebuchadnezzar ii Jerusalem Biakinnpi pan a laak khamh hai, ngunn haite le kuangte sungtan pui tu in thupia hi. Kumpipa in ama le a uliante, a zipite le a zinote taw sapittui a neak thei natu in tuate la in a sawl ahi hi." 
Daniel5:3 Thakhat thu in khamh haite le kuangte kitumpui a, a vekpi in tuate taw sapittui ne in" 
Daniel5:4 khamh, ngunn, taau, thik, thing le suang taw a kivawt pathiante pok uh hi." 
Daniel5:5 Thakhat thu in mihing khut khat kilangh a, meiinn mei a taangbelna mun, kumpi inn sung pang tungah lai at hong kipan hi. Kumpipa in lai a at tua khut sia mu hi." 
Daniel5:6 Kumpipa lau mama in, a mai daang a, a khup liing tu kipan hi." 
Daniel5:7 Ama in mitbum thiamte, bum le aitoaite le aksi enthiamte sam tu in oksan hi. Tua a sapte hong thet ciang, kumpipa in amate tungah, “Hi lai a ki at sia a sim thei, a khiakna hong son thei pawpo kumpi puantual sandup kisilhsak tu a, minphatna khamh khi a ngawng ah awsak in kumpi ngam sungah a zalian a thumna in ka koi tu hi,” ci hi." 
Daniel5:8 Tua kumpi thudokte mai ah hong pai uh a, ahihang lai ki at sia a sim thei, a khiakna a son thei kuama om ngawl hi." 
Daniel5:9 Belshazzar kumpipa sia a thinngimna taw in a mai daang vaial a, a uliante in a ci a law he ngawl hi." 
Daniel5:10 Kumpipa ii nu in kumpipa le a uliante ngamlum lialuana aw za a an neakna inndoi sungah tum hi. Ama in, “Kumpipa awng a tawntungin nungta ta in! Nong hesuakna in thinnuam ngawlin maidaangin om heak in." 
Daniel5:11 Na ngam sungah a thiangtho pathiante ii thaa a nei mihing khat om hi. Na pa kumpi ahi lai in, hi sia pa in, pathiante ii ciimna taw kibangin ciimna, heakna le ngaisut thiamna nei hi. Tuaciang na pa, Nebuchadnezzar kumpipa in ama sia aisaan theite, mitbum thiamte, bumtoai aitoaite le aksi enthiamte a ukpi tu in koi hi." 
Daniel5:12 Ama sia a tumdang hi theina nei a, ciim in, mang khiak thei pilna, thu kheldoknate zo theina le thutumdangte sontel theina nei hi; tua ahikom kumpipa in Belteshazzar ci a, a min a phua pa Daniel sam in, tua hile ama in hite theampo ii khiakna hong sonthiang siat tu hi,” ci hi." 
Daniel5:13 Daniel sia thakhatin kumpipa omna ah kipaipui a, kumpipa in Daniel tungah, “Judah ngam pan ka pa, kumpipa ii hi sungah hong pai pui Judah sal Daniel na hi na'am?" 
Daniel5:14 A thiangtho pathiante ii thaa sia na sungah om a thiamna, heakna le ciimna na nei hunlam ka za hi." 
Daniel5:15 Hi a ki at lai a sim tu le a khiakna hong son tu in thudokte le mitbum thiamte hong kipaipui napi amate in a khiakna he zo ngawl hi. 
Daniel5:16 Nangma in a khiakna kiphualsealte le thutumdangte sonthiang thei hi, ci in tu in ka za zo hi. Hi lai ki at sia na sim thei a, a khiakna nong son thei le, kumpipa puantual sandup hong kisilhsak tu a, minphatna khamh khi na ngawng ah aw in, kumpi ngam sungah a zanei a thumna na hi tu hi,” ci hi." 
Daniel5:17 Daniel in, “Na letsongte nangma atu keam po in, ahibuale ngualdang khat po pia in. Kumpipa awng, lai ki at sia kong sim tu a, a khiakna kong son tu hi." 
Daniel5:18 “Lianbel Pathian in na pa Nebuchadnezzar sia kumpi lian khat in koi a, zatakna le vaangletna pia hi." 
Daniel5:19 Ama sia lian mama ahikom ngam theampo, minam theampo le paunam theampo pan mihingte in ama kiita in liing uh hi. Mihing khat pawpo a thatlum nuam le thatlum a, a nungtasak nuam le nungtasak hi. Ama in a upat nop pawpo upat a, a maimawlsak nop pawpo maimawlsak hi." 
Daniel5:20 Ahizong ama sia kiphasak, thinpui, ngilo ahikom a kumpi tokhum pan kinot a, a minthanna taan hi." 
Daniel5:21 Ama sia mihing huamsung pan kihawlkeak a, nganhing ngaisutna hong nei hi. Ama sia ngam laate taw teang khawmin, khuital bangin lopa ne a, daaitui dal tu nei ngawlin a pua sangah lum hi. Lianbel Pathian in mihingte ii kumpi ngam theampo uk a, ama ii dei pawpo tungah tua ngamuknate pia thei hi ci sia a khak belin ama in phawk hi." 
Daniel5:22 “Ahihang nangma, a tapa in, hi thu theampo he hi napi na kiniamkhiak bua hi." 
Daniel5:23 Vantung Topa na langpan a, a Biakinn pan na laak haite kuangte nong paipui hi. Nangma, na uliante, na zite le na zinote in tua haite taw zu ne in, khamh, ngunn, taau, thik, thing le suang taw a kivawt khuamu thei ngawl, khua za thei ngawl a, bangma a he ngawl pathiante na pok uh hi. Ahitazong na thi tu le na nun tu hong khensat a, na sep na vawt theampo hong uk Pathian na upat bua uh hi." 
Daniel5:24 Tua hu in Pathian in hi kammalte at tu in tua khut sawl hi. 
Daniel5:25 “Tua a ki at kammal in hi bang ahi hi: ‘MENE, MENE, TEKEL, U-PARSIN.’ ‘Sim, sim, khaitee, kikhen,’ a cina ahi hi." 
Daniel5:26 A khiakna in hi bang ahi hi: Sim ii a khiakna in Pathian in na kumpi ngam ii hunte hong simsak zo a, a hun bo zo hi;" 
Daniel5:27 Khaitee ii a khiakna in nang sia toaitee na tungah hong kitee zo a, zaang leih in hong kimu hi." 
Daniel5:28 Kikhen ii a khiakna in na ngam kikhentham a Mede mite le Persia mite tungah kipia hi,” ci hi." 
Daniel5:29 Thakhat ma in Belshazzar in Daniel sia kumpi puantual sandup silhsak tu le minphatna khamh khi a ngawng ah awsak tu in a naseamte thupia hi. Tuaciang ama in Daniel sia a ngam sungah zalian a thumna in koi hi. 
Daniel5:30 Tua zan mama in Babylon kumpipa Belshazzar sia kithatlum a," 
Daniel5:31 tua laitak kum sawmluk le kum nii a pha Mede mi Darius in a kumpi za suan hi. 
Daniel6:1 Darius in a kumpi ngamlian sung theampo uk tu in ngamkhen uk, za le kul panmun piak tu in khensat hi." 
Daniel6:2 Tua banah, ukpite a lampui tu le kumpipa deina bang a seam tu in Darius in Daniel le a dang mihing nii teal thua hi." 
Daniel6:3 Daniel in ngamkhen uk dangte, ahibuale nasep uk dangte sangin nasep a thiam zawkna sia hai ngawlin lak hi. Ama sia pil mama ahikom kumpipa in a kumpi ngamlian bup a uk tu in koi tu in ngaisun hi." 
Daniel6:4 Tuasia ciang nasep uk dangte le ngamkhen uk tengin Daniel ii kumpi ngamlian uk nasepna encik a, a khialna zon tu hanciam uh hi. Ahihang Daniel sia muanhuai a, a thumaan le a citak khat ahikom amate in a khialna, a thumaan ngawlna mu zo ngawl uh hi." 
Daniel6:5 Amate khat le khat kikum uh a, “Daniel sia a biakna taw kisai thu khat po taw, ahibuale mawsak natu thudang ih mu buatu hi,” ci uh hi." 
Daniel6:6 Tuaciang amate kumpipa taw kimu tu in pai uh a, “Darius kumpipa awng, Nangma Kumpipa a tawntungin nungta ta'n!" 
Daniel6:7 Na kumpi ngamlian sungah naseam koma teng — nasep ukte, ngamkhen ukte, ngamkhen uk domte le a dang uliante — in kumpipa in ngat tak a zui tu thupiak khat nong suasak tu in thukim zo khu hi. Tu zo ni sawmthum sung teng Nangma Kumpipa tung simngawl, pathian khat pawpo, mihing khat pawpo tungah bangma peuma ngen thei ngawl tu hi, ci in thupia in. Hi thupiakna a paltan peuma tawpi a dim a kikhum dum sungah kikhia tu hi." 
Daniel6:8 Tua ahiciang Nangma Kumpipa in hi thupiakna lai minthu in suaksak in. Tua hile tua thupiakna sia a kikheal thei ngawl Mede te le Persia te thukham suak tu hi,” ci uh hi." 
Daniel6:9 Tuasia bangma in Darius kumpipa in tua thukham tungah a minthu hi. 
Daniel6:10 Kumpipa thukham sia kumpipa in a minthu zo hi, ci thu Daniel in a heak ciang a inn ah cia hi. A inndawl tung inndoi khat sungah Jerusalem khua sang a maingat khelkite om hi. Tua munah, a vawt ngei tawntung bangma in, khelki kihongna te ah khupdin in ni khat sung thumvei veu Pathian tungah thungen hi." 
Daniel6:11 Daniel ii a ngalte in Pathian tungah Daniel thunget a mu uh ciang," 
Daniel6:12 a vekpi in Daniel mawsak tu in kumpipa kungah paikhawm tek hi. Amate in, “Kumpipa awng, tu zo ni sawmthum sung kumpipa tung simngawl, pathian khat pawpo tung, mihing khat pawpo tungah thungen khat a om peuma le tawpi a dim a, a kikhum dum sungah kilawn tu hi ci in thukham sungah na min na thu zo hi,” ci uh hi. Kumpipa in, “Hi hi, tua in a kikheal thei ngawl a ngat thupiakna, Mede te le Persia te thukham khat ahi hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Daniel6:13 Tua zawkciang amate in kumpipa tungah, “Judah salte khat ahi Daniel in Kumpipa Nangma hong zakta ngawl, na suasak thupiakna sia zui ngawl hi. Ama in ni khat sung thumvei peal ngawlin thungen hi,” ci uh hi." 
Daniel6:14 Kumpipa sia hi thu a zaak ciang a thinnuam ngawl het a, Daniel a suatak thei natu lam khat a hi thei tawpin zong nuam hi. Nitum dong hanciamin khuangaisun hi." 
Daniel6:15 Tuasia zawkciang Daniel ii ngalte kumpipa kungah pai kik a, ama tungah, “Kumpipa awng, nangma in Mede te le Persia te upadi te bangin kumpipa ii thu piaksa sia kikheal thei ngawl hi ci thu na he hi,” ci uh hi." 
Daniel6:16 Tuasia ciang kumpipa in Daniel sia a mat natu le tawpi a dim a kikhum dum sungah a khiak natu in thupia hi. Kumpipa in Daniel munah, “Citakna taw a na, na sepsak na Pathian in nang hong suatak tahen,” ci hi." 
Daniel6:17 Kuama in Daniel a suataksak thei ngawl natu in suangtum khat taw tawpi dum vang khakin, suang tungah kumpipa tazeik le a uliante ii tazeik khen uh hi." 
Daniel6:18 Tua zawkciang kumpipa a inn ah cia kikin tua zanin mittang khat zongh si ngawl, an zongh ne ngawl, leangna do ngawlin om hi." 
Daniel6:19 Zingsang khuavak tuungin kumpipa tho in, tawpi khumna dum ah pai hi." 
Daniel6:20 Tua mun a thet ciang, “A nungta Pathian ii naseam Daniel awng! citakna taw a na, na sepsak na Pathian in tawpite kung pan hong hun thei ziam?” ci in thintoina taw biakpui hi." 
Daniel6:21 Daniel in, “Kumpipa Nangma, a tawntungin nungta ta in!" 
Daniel6:22 Pathian in tawpite ii kei hong liamsua ngawl natu tawpite kam a hum tu in a vantunglalang sawl hi. Kumpipa awng ka maw ngawl hunlam le nang tungah kong khial ngawl hunlam Pathian in he a hikom hi bangin vawt hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Daniel6:23 Kumpipa lungdam leilam a, tawpite khumna dum sung pan Daniel a kikaito natu in thupia hi. Tuabangin Daniel kaito uh a, liamna a nei vet ngawl hunlam mu uh hi, banghang ziam cile ama in Pathian muang hi." 
Daniel6:24 Tua zawkciang kumpipa in Daniel a mawsak mihingte theampo mat tu in thupia a, a zite le a tate taw tawpi a dim dum sungah khiasuk hi. Dum taw a thet ma ngawngawn in, tawpi te in amate mat khat sua in a ngu a taang theampo duangleam hi." 
Daniel6:25 Tua zawkciang Darius kumpipa in ngam theampo, minam theampo le paunam theampo pan mite tungah laithak hi: “Kong nukset hi!"
