Haggai2:19 Antang om nawn ngawl a, sapitkungte, theikungte, talee te le olive kungte nga ngawl lai ahitazong, tu pan kipan thupha kong pia tu hi,” ci hi." 
Haggai2:20 Tua tha, ni 24 ni ma in Topa ii Haggai tungah hi thupuak a niina sia," 
Haggai2:21 Judah ngamuk mangpa Zerubbabel atu in puak hi: “Keima in van le lei lok tu in kithoai khi hi," 
Haggai2:22 kumpi ngamte lumletin a thahatna ka bosak tu hi. Ngalleangte le a hawlte ka sawnthal tu hi; siphute thi in, a tung tote khat le khat kithatlum tu hi." 
Haggai2:23 Tua ni ciang ka naseampa Zerubbabel awng, nang kong la tu a, keima min suangin a uk tu in panmun kong pia tu hi. Nangma kong teal sa khat na hi hi.” Vaanglianbelpa Topa in son zo hi." 
Zechariah1:1 Persia kumpilianpa Darius maan zawk a kum niina, a tha liat tha sungah Topa in Iddo tupa, Berechiah tapa kamsaangpa Zechariah tungah hi thu pia hi." 
Zechariah1:2 Vaanglianbelpa Topa in mipite tungah hi thu a son tu in Zechariah sawl a, “Na taanghpupite tungah keima, Topa ka thin uuk mama hi," 
Zechariah1:3 ahihang tu in no tungah kong ci hi, ‘Kei kungah hong heakkik tavun, tuaciang keima no sangah kong kiheak tu hi." 
Zechariah1:4 Na taanghpupite taw kibang nawn heak vun. Khuangeipi lai in kamsaangte in amate kungah ka thupuak sonin, ngamtat sia, mawna taw a nuntak nawn ngawl natu in thuhil uh hi. Ahihang amate in ka thu hong ngai nuam ngawlin hong mang nuam bua uh hi." 
Zechariah1:5 Na taanghpupite le tua kamsaangte nungta nawn ngawl hi. 
Zechariah1:6 Na taanghpupite tungah ka naseam kamsaangte tungtawnin thupiaknate le kidop natu thute ka pia hi, ahihang amate in tuate thusim ngawl a, a ngamtatna taw a kizui in ngimna thuak uh hi. Tuasia ciang amate kisiik kikin, keima, a Vaanglianbelpa Topa in amate taw a kiphu bang le ka sep tu tatak a ka khensat bangin daan ka piak hunlam hong tel uh hi,’ ” cisak hi." 
Zechariah1:7 Darius sia kumpilianpa in a maan zawk a kum niina, a tha sawm le tha khatna (Shebat tha), ni 24 ni zanin Topa in mukholna khat sungah thupuak khat nei hi." 
Zechariah1:8 Siphu san khat tungah a to khat ka mu hi. Ama sia myrtle thingkung pawlkhat kawm, kuam sung khat ah tawlnga a, ama nungsangah siphu dangte — a san, a pawl tiptep le a kaangte om hi." 
Zechariah1:9 Ama ka dongh a, “Topa awng, hi siphute in bang khiakna nei ziam?” ka ci hi. Ama in, “Bang ci nuam ziam kong lak tu hi." 
Zechariah1:10 Topa in tuate leitung a enkot tu in paisak hi,” ci in hong zo hi." 
Zechariah1:11 Amate in tua vantunglalang tungah: “Leitung theampo ah pai zo ung, leitung buppi sia a cimaw, a kizo sa in om hi,” ci uh hi." 
Zechariah1:12 Tua zawkciang vantunglalang in, “Vaanglianbelpa Topa awng, Jerusalem tung le Judah ngam khuapite tungah kum sawmsali sung thin uuk zo ni hi. Amate na hesuak tu bang tanvei hai lai tu ziam?” ci hi." 
Zechariah1:13 Topa in heenepna kammal taw vantunglalang tungah zo kik a," 
Zechariah1:14 tuaciangin hi Vaanglianbelpa Topa pauna thangsak tu in vantunglalang in kei hong sawl hi: “Ka khuapi thiangtho Jerusalem atu in thinbotna le itna thukpi ka nei hi," 
Zechariah1:15 tuaciang kilemna le ngamdaina a nga minamte tungah ka thin uuk mama hi. Banghang ziam cile ka mite tungah ka thin uukna iip kenkonin ka om laitak tua minamte in ka mite thuakna nasiasak seseam hi. 
Zechariah1:16 Tua ahikom Jerusalem khuapi tungah ka hesuakna lak tu in kong pai kik zo hi. Ka Biakinnpi kipua pha kik tu a, khuapi kisa kik tu hi,” ci hi." 
Zechariah1:17 Vantunglalang in Topa kammal hi teng zongh thangsak tu in hong sawl hi: “Vaanglianbelpa Topa in a khuapite nuamsa kik tu a, ama in Jerusalem khatvei hu kikin, ama khuapi in nei kik tu hi, ci hi.”" 
Zechariah1:18 Mukholna dang sungah khuital kii li ka mu hi. 
Zechariah1:19 Keima hong paupui vantunglalang tungah, “Hi sakiite a khiakna bang ziam,” ci in ka dongh hi. Ama in, “Tuate in Judah, Israel le Jerusalem mite a kithethaangsak simlei vaangliante a cinopna ahi hi,” ci in hong zo hi." 
Zechariah1:20 Tuaciang Topa in sek veu a toai naseam pasal li hong lak hi. 
Zechariah1:21 Keima in, “Hi mite bang vawt tu in hong pai ziam?” ci in ka dongh hi. Topa in, “Amate in Judah ngam suthamin a mite a thethaangsak minamte a lausak tu le a lawnthal tu in hong pai hi,” ci in hong zo hi." 
Zechariah2:1 Mukholna dang khat ah a khut sungah piteena khau a toai pasal khat ka mu hi. 
Zechariah2:2 “Koisung pai tu ni ziam?” ci in ka dongh hi. Ama in, “Jerusalem bangza in sau a, bangza in zai ziam, ci in tee tu khi hi,” ci in hong zo hi." 
Zechariah2:3 Tuaciang keima hong paupui vantunglalang sia mai sangah kal hong suan ka mu a, vantunglalang dang khat ama taw kisi tu in hong pai hi." 
Zechariah2:4 A masa sia in a dang khat sia munah, “Zia sung a pikhau toai khangmoipa kungah va tai ta'n a, Jerusalem ah mihing le ngannote tam leilam tu ahiciang luphung taw uum tu in lian lei tu hi." 
Zechariah2:5 Topa in khuapi huu tu in ama mama khuapi kiimkot a mei luphung khat hi tu a, ama tua munah a vaangletna theampo taw a teang tu in kamciam pia zo hi va ci ta'n,” ci hi." 
Zechariah2:6 Topa in a mite tungah, “Mun theampo ah note kong thethaang hi. Ahihang tu in, no saltaangte awng, Babylon panin suakta in Jerusalem ah heak kik tavun." 
Zechariah2:7  
Zechariah2:8 Khat pawpo in note hong saat le, kei a tu manphabel ka sak sia a saat ahi hi,” ci hi. Tua ahikom Vaanglianbelpa Topa in a mite ii vanh a suttol minamte tungah hi thu son tu in keima hong puak hi:" 
Zechariah2:9 “ Topa ama mama in note hong sim tu a, khatvei lai a na naseam ahi ngeite in na vanh uh hong suttol kik tu hi,” hong cisak hi. Hi bangin hong pian tak ciang Vaanglianbelpa Topa in kei hong puak hunlam a kuama po in he tu uh hi." 
Zechariah2:10 Topa in, “Jerusalem mite awng, lungdamin lasa vun! Note sungah a teang tu in kong pai hi!” ci hi." 
Zechariah2:11 Tua hun ciang minam tam mama Topa kungah pai tu a, ama mite suak tu uh hi. Ama in note sungah hong teang tu a, no kungah kei hong puak hunlam na he tu uh hi." 
Zechariah2:12 Judah mite khatvei ma ama ngam thiangtho sungah Topa ii nei tuam hong hi kik tu a, Jerusalem khua sia ama itbel khuapi hong hi kik tu hi." 
Zechariah2:13 Ama sia a teenna mun thiangtho panin hong pai ahiciang mi theampo awng, Topa mai ah thim dide in om vun." 
Zechariah3:1 Mukholna dang khat ah Topa in Thiampi Lianbel Joshua sia Topa vantunglalang mai ah dingin a om hong lak hi. Tuaciang Joshua kungah Satan ding a, ama mawsuan tu in kinging hi." 
Zechariah3:1 Mukholna dang khat ah Topa in Thiampi Lianbel Joshua sia Topa vantunglalang mai ah dingin a om hong lak hi. Tuaciang Joshua kungah Satan ding a, ama mawsuan tu in kinging hi." 
Zechariah3:2 Topa vantunglalang in Satan munah, “ Topa in nang hong puavawk tahen, Satan awng! Jerusalem a it Topa in nang hong puavawk tahen. Hi sia pa in meikhuk sung pan a kiteen kik thingkhua khat taw kibang hi,” ci hi." 
Zechariah3:3 Joshua in puansiate silhin tualai ah ding hi. 
Zechariah3:3 Joshua in puansiate silhin tualai ah ding hi. 
Zechariah3:4 Vantunglalang in a vantung sawllamhte munah, “Hi sia pa ii a silh puansia teng suutkeak vun,” ci hi. Tua zawkciang ama in Joshua munah “Na mawna teng kong laak keaksak zo a, na silh tu puan thakte kong pia tu hi,” ci hi." 
Zechariah3:4 Vantunglalang in a vantung sawllamhte munah, “Hi sia pa ii a silh puansia teng suutkeak vun,” ci hi. Tua zawkciang ama in Joshua munah “Na mawna teng kong laak keaksak zo a, na silh tu puan thakte kong pia tu hi,” ci hi." 
Zechariah3:5 Ama in a sawllamhte munah, Joshua lu tungah dial thiang khat a khipsak natu in thupia hi. Tuabang ma in amate in seam uh a, Topa vantunglalang ii din sung teng ma in puan thakte ama kisilhsak hi." 
Zechariah3:5 Ama in a sawllamhte munah, Joshua lu tungah dial thiang khat a khipsak natu in thupia hi. Tuabang ma in amate in seam uh a, Topa vantunglalang ii din sung teng ma in puan thakte ama kisilhsak hi." 
Zechariah3:6 Tua zawkciang vantunglalang in Joshua tungah," 
Zechariah3:6 Tua zawkciang vantunglalang in Joshua tungah," 
Zechariah3:7 Vaanglianbelpa Topa ii ci teng son hi: “Ka thukhamte zui in kong sawl tuamte na seam le, tuasia ciang ka Biakinnpi le a suumte na uk suak tu hi, tuaciang ka omna munah a om vantunglalangte thungetna ka zaak bangin na thungetnate kong za tu hi." 
Zechariah3:8 Tua ahiciang nang, Thiampi Lianbel ahi Joshua awng, na ngai in; no, a thiampi seppuite awng, mailam hun phate ii limlakna ahite awng, ngai vun: Thingbaak a kici ka naseampa kong pualaak tu hi!" 
Zechariah3:8 Tua ahiciang nang, Thiampi Lianbel ahi Joshua awng, na ngai in; no, a thiampi seppuite awng, mailam hun phate ii limlakna ahite awng, ngai vun: Thingbaak a kici ka naseampa kong pualaak tu hi!" 
Zechariah3:9 Joshua mai ah mai sali a nei suang khat nguak ka koi tu hi. Tua tungah lai kong khen tu a, ni khat thu in hi ngam ii mawna teng ka lakeak tu hi." 
Zechariah3:9 Joshua mai ah mai sali a nei suang khat nguak ka koi tu hi. Tua tungah lai kong khen tu a, ni khat thu in hi ngam ii mawna teng ka lakeak tu hi." 
Zechariah3:10 Tua ni hong thet ciang, note khatsim in na sapitkungte le na theikungte taw a kidimna sungah kilemna le ngal muanna nga tu in hong pai natu na innpaamte tek na sam tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Zechariah4:1 Kei hong pau pupui ngei tua vantunglalang sia hong pai kik a, a mu kimlai phok bang phetin kei hong phong hi." 
Zechariah4:2 “Bang na mu ziam?” ci in hong dongh hi. “Khamh taw a kivawt meivak khuam khat hi. A dawn ah sathau koina kuang khat om hi. Meivak khuam tungah meiinn sali om a, a simin meivakkhau koina nei tek hi." 
Zechariah4:3 Meivak khuam lang le lang ah olive thingkung khat veve om hi,” ci in ka zo hi." 
Zechariah4:4 Tua zawkciang vantunglalang munah, “Topa awng, hite ii khiakna bang ziam?” ci in ka dongh hi." 
Zechariah4:5 Ama in, “He ngawl ni ziam?” hong ci hi. “He ngawl khi hi, topa awng,” ci in ka zo kik hi." 
Zechariah4:6 Vantunglalang in Topa tung pan hong pai hi thu teng Zerubbabel tungah son tu in kei hong sawl hi: “Nangma in ngalkap thahatna hang hi ngawl, nangma thahatna hang hi ngawl, ahihang keima thaa bek taw na ma na tun tu hi." 
Zechariah4:7 Mualte za in a lian hong khak hong hal haksatnate na mai panin mang tu hi. Biakinnpi na sa kik tu hi, tuaciang suang khakbel sia a om natu sanah na cian ciang mite in ‘Hoi hi, Hoi hi!’ ci in au tu uh hi,” ama in ci hi." 
Zechariah4:8 Topa tung panin thupuak dang khat kei tung hong theng hi. 
Zechariah4:9 Ama in, “Zerubbabel in Biakinnpi tawdap phaa zo a, a inn sak zo thiang tu hi. Tuabang hong pian ciang, nang sia keima ii amate kungah kong paisak na hi hunlam ka mite in hong he tu uh hi." 
Zechariah4:10 Vantunglalang in, “Meiinn salite in leitung theampo a mu Topa mittang salite ahi hi,” hong ci hi. Nasepna sungah khantona tawm mama ahiciang amate thinkiam hi. Ahihang amate in Zerubbabel ii Biakinnpi sak tu a zop tawtona a mu uh ciang, a lungdam tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Zechariah4:11 Tuaciang keima in, “Meivak khuam lang le lang ah a om olive kungte nii in bang a cinopna ziam?" 
Zechariah4:12 Olive thau sunna khamh lawng niite pangh ah olive baak niite sia bang a cinopna ziam?” ci in ama ka dongh hi. 
Zechariah4:13 Ama in, “He ngawl ni ziam?” hong ci hi. “He bong, Topa awng” ci in ka zo kik hi." 
Zechariah4:14 Tuasia ciang ama in, “Hite in leitung bup ii Topa na a seam tu in Pathian tealsa le sathau a noisa mihing niite ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Zechariah5:1 Khua ka et kik le vui sungah laizial leang khat ka mu hi. 
Zechariah5:2 Vantunglalang in ka mu sia hong dongh hi. “Laizial khat vui sungah leang hi; tuasia metre kua sau a, metre li le lang zai hi,” ka ci hi." 
Zechariah5:3 Tuaciang ama in kei tungah, “Tuasia tungah ngam bup sungah a tung tu haamsiatna ki at hi. A laizial langkhat ah ngamsung panin nguta a minpiang kinotkeak tu hi; a langkhat ah kiciamna taw leilot thu a son theampo zongh kikaikeak tu hi, ci in ki at hi." 
Zechariah5:4 Vaanglianbelpa Topa in tua haamsiatna ka tungsak tu a, tuasia in nguta pawpo ii inn le, kiciamna taw leilot thuson pawpo ii inn te sungah tum tu hi ci hi. Tua haamsiatna sia amate inn sungah teang tu a, tua innte a lalcipsa in kinusia tu hi,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah5:5 Vantunglalang kilangh kik a, “En in! Na dang khat hong pai hi!” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah5:6 “Bang ziam?” ci in ka dongh hi. Ama in, “Tuasia khum khat hi a, ngam bup ii mawna a lakna hi,” ci in hong zo hi." 
Zechariah5:7 Khum sitna sia haak taw kivawt hi. Ka et le, a sitna hong kilaamto a, tua khum sungah numei khat to hi!" 
Zechariah5:8 Vantunglalang in, “Hi numei in ngitlona lak hi,” ci hi. Tuaciang ama in tua numei sia khum sungah hensuk in, a sitna taw sin kik hi." 
Zechariah5:9 Ka etto ciang hilniang vacimlian ii thate bangin, a hat thate taw keima sangah hong leang numei nii ka mu hi. Amate in khum hong zamh a, lenpui vingveng hi." 
Zechariah5:10 Vantunglalang tungah, “Amate in tuasia koisungah paipui tu ziam?” ci in ka dongh hi." 
Zechariah5:11 Ama in, “Tuasia atu in biakinn khat a saksak natu mun Babylon ah kipaipui tu hi. Biakinn sak a kiman ciang, a biak tu in a sungah tua khum kikoi tu hi,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah6:1 Mukholna dang khat ma ka nei hi. Tusia hun ciang taau mual nii kilaklaw pan siphu ngalleang li hong pusuak ka mu hi. 
Zechariah6:2 Siphu ngalleang khatna sia siphu sante, a niina sia siphu vomte," 
Zechariah6:3 a thumna sia siphu kaangte, a lina sia siphu pawl tiptepte in kai hi." 
Zechariah6:4 Tuaciang vantunglalang munah, “Topa awng, hi siphu ngalleangte ii a khiakna bang ziam?” ka ci hi." 
Zechariah6:5 Ama in, “Hite sia vui lite hi a; tuate in leitung bup ii Topa omna pan hong pai tawm hi,” ci in hong zo hi." 
Zechariah6:6 Siphu vomte ii kai leang sia saksang Babylon zuan tu a, siphu kaangte nitumna sang zuan tu hi, siphu pawl tiptepte thangsang ngam zuan tu uh hi." 
Zechariah6:7 Siphu pawl tiptepte hong pusua ciangin leitung enkot nuam kisa in a pai tu kaal ngakla uh hi. Vantunglalang in, “Pai vun a, leitung enkot tavun!” ci a — tuaciang tuate pai uh hi." 
Zechariah6:8 Tua zawkciang vantunglalang in hong oksan a, “Saksang Babylon ah a pai siphute in Topa thin uukna thimsak zo hi,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah6:9 Topa in hi thu hong pia hi. 
Zechariah6:10 Ama in, “Saltaangte ahi Heldai, Tobijah le Jedaiah te ii piak letsongte la in Zephaniah tapa Josiah inn ah thakhat ma pai in. Hi mite Babylon ah a saltanna pan hong heak kik siat zo hi." 
Zechariah6:10 Ama in, “Saltaangte ahi Heldai, Tobijah le Jedaiah te ii piak letsongte la in Zephaniah tapa Josiah inn ah thakhat ma pai in. Hi mite Babylon ah a saltanna pan hong heak kik siat zo hi." 
Zechariah6:11 Amate hong piak khamh le ngunn te taw kumpilukhu khat vawt in a, Jehozadak tapa Thiampi Lianbel Joshua lu tungah khusak in." 
Zechariah6:11 Amate hong piak khamh le ngunn te taw kumpilukhu khat vawt in a, Jehozadak tapa Thiampi Lianbel Joshua lu tungah khusak in." 
Zechariah6:12 Vaanglianbelpa Topa in, ‘Thingbaak a kici mihing khat ama omna munah khangto tu a, Topa Biakinnpi sa kik tu hi." 
Zechariah6:13 Tuasia a sa tu sia ama hi a, kumpi khat patoai natu a kilawm teng ama in tangin, a mite uk tu hi. Thiampi khat ama kumpi tokhum kungah ding tu a, amate in kilemna le kituiton natu seam khawm tu hi,’ a ci teng ama munah son in." 
Zechariah6:14 Tua kumpilukhu in, Heldai, Tobijah, Jedaiah le Josiah te upatna le phawk natu in Topa Biakinnpi sungah om tu hi,” ci hi." 
Zechariah6:15 A khuala ah a teang mite hong pai tu a, Topa Biakinnpi sakkikna ah hong hu tu hi. A sakkik sia a man ciang, Vaanglianbelpa Topa in kei sia nang kungah hong paisak hunlam na he tu hi. Topa na Pathian hong thupiak teng na zui le hi thu teng theampo hong piang tu hi." 
Zechariah7:1 Darius sia kumpilianpa in a maan zawk a kum lina, a tha kuana (Kislev tha), a ni li ni in Topa in kei tungah thu khat hong pia hi." 
Zechariah7:2 Bethel mite in Sharezer le, Regemmelech le a mite sia Vaanglianbelpa Topa Biakinnpi ah Topa thupha dei in thungen tu le" 
Zechariah7:3 thiampite le kamsaangte tungah hi bangin thu dongh tu in paisak hi, “Biakinnpi a kilalsak hu in kum tam mama sung ka vawt sa uh bangma, tu in a tha nga tha in, an tanna taw khuangai in om lai tu khu ziam?” ci hi." 
Zechariah7:4 Hi thu sia Topa ii thupuak hi a, kei tungah hong theng hi." 
Zechariah7:5 Ama in, “Ngamsung a mite le thiampite ii hi kum sawmsali sung tawntung a tha ngana le a tha sali na ah khuangai in an a tan uh ciang kei hong patoai ahi ngawlna sia amate tungah son ta'n." 
Zechariah7:6 Amate in a neak a dawn ciang amate lungkim natu bek ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Zechariah7:7 Hi thu in Jerusalem khangto a, mihing taw a kidim hun lai, mihing tam mamate tua khuapi kiim a om khuate sung bek ah teang ngawlin thangsang ngamkhen le nitumna sang mualpeang te zongh ah a teen hun lai pekin kamsaang masate tungtawn a, Topa ii sonsa ahi hi." 
Zechariah7:8 Topa in Zechariah tungah hi thu puak hi: 
Zechariah7:9 “Khua ngeipi lai in ka mite munah hi thupiakte ka pia hi: ‘Thukhaikim in seam vun a, khat le khat dikna le kihesuakna nei hamtang tavun." 
Zechariah7:10 No sungah hong teang ngamdangmite, meingong tangate ahizong, a cimaw dangte ahizong, zothaw ngawl tu nu hi. Khat le khat kisuksiat natu a nanamin sawm ngawl tu nu hi.’" 
Zechariah7:11 “Ahihang ka minamte thinpui in hong nangai ngawl uh hi. Amate in a thinsung kongkhate khakin," 
Zechariah7:12 a lungtangte suang bangin saksak uh hi. Khua ngeipi lai a kamsaangte tungtawn a ka hil thute ngai nuam ngawl ahikom, ka thin uuk mama hi." 
Zechariah7:13 Ka pau ciang hong ngai ngawl uh ahikom, thu hong nget uh ciang ka zo bua hi." 
Zechariah7:14 Amate ngamdang ah a teang tu in, vuipi suangval bangin ka niil keak hi. Hi ngampha na sungah a teang om ngawl a, ngamtongta in kinusia hi,” ci hi." 
Zechariah8:1 Vaanglianbelpa Topa in Zechariah tungah hi thupia hi: 
Zechariah8:2 “A mite ka it mama manin Jerusalem ka hu tu kaal ka ngakla hi, tua itna in a ngalte tungah hong thin uuksak hi." 
Zechariah8:3 Ka khuapi thiangtho Jerusalem ah ka cia kik tu a, tualai ah ka teang tu hi. Tua khuapi sia a citak khuapi kici tu a, Vaanglianbelpa Topa mual sia a thiangtho mual kici tu hi." 
Zechariah8:4 Khatvei ma, nupi huai pasal huaite, huai leilam kisa in ciangkhut khunin a vakte sia khuapi khawlmunte ah to tu uh hi." 
Zechariah8:5 Tuaciang lampite sia a kimai numeino patangno te taw kidim kik tu hi. 
Zechariah8:6 “Tu in minam sungah a om laite atu in hi thu sia suak thei ngawl tu bang hikale kei atu in suak maw ngawl hi. 
Zechariah8:7 Ka mite a kilaakna ngamte pan ka suatak tu a," 
Zechariah8:8 Jerusalem ah a teang tu in nisuana le nitumna panin amate ka paipui kik tu hi. Tuaciang amate ka mi hi tu a, keima in amate thumaan le thutang taw a uk a Pathian ka hi tu hi." 
Zechariah8:9 “Hangsan vun! Ka Biakinnpi sa kik tu in, a tawdap a kipha lai hunin kamsaangte pau kammal teng ma, tu in na za uh hi." 
Zechariah8:10 Tua hun masia in kuama in mihing ahizong nganhing ahizong tha cial zo ngawl a, a ngalte kung pan kuama ngammuang ngawl hi. Mihingte khat le khat ka kilangpansak hi." 
Zechariah8:11 Ahihang tu in, hi minam sung pan a nungta laite sia a tuamin ka vawt hi." 
Zechariah8:12 Amate in thinnuam takin lo ante ciing tu hi. A sapitkungte hong nga tu a, leitang in ante piangsak in, ngua tam mama hong zu tu hi. Hi thuphate theampo ka minam sung pan a nungta lai ka mite tungah ka pia tu hi." 
Zechariah8:13 Judah le Israel mite awng! Hun bosa sungah ngamdangmite khat le khat, a kihaamsiat uh ciangin ‘Judah le Israel mite tungah a tung tuasiatnate ma no tungah hong tung tahen’ kici uh hi. Ahihang note kong hun tu a, tuaciang tua ngamdangmite khat le khat in, ‘Judah le Israel te tungah a theng thuphate ma nga tavun!’ kici tu uh hi. Tua ahikom hangsan vun a, lau heak vun.”" 
Zechariah8:14 Vaanglianbelpa Topa in, “Na taanghpupite ii hong thin uuksak ciang, amate tuasiatsak tu ka sawm a, ka thin kheal kik ngawlin ka ngeal bangin ka seam suak hi." 
Zechariah8:15 Ahihang tu in Jerusalem le Judah mite thupha piak ka sawm hi. Tua ahikom lau heak vun. 
Zechariah8:16 Na sep tu uh sia hi teng hi: Khat le khat tungah thumaan thutak kison vun. Thukhenzum ah thutang khenna tatak — kilemna a piangsak thukhenna namte pia vun. 
Zechariah8:17 Khat le khat kinatsak tu tum heak vun. Kiciamna taw leilot tetti pang heak vun. Leilotna, thukhaikim ngawl thukhenna le ngongtatna ka ngaimaw hi,” ci hi." 
Zechariah8:18 Vaanglianbelpa Topa in Zechariah tungah hi thu pia hi: 
Zechariah8:19 “A tha li tha, a tha nga tha, a tha sali tha le a tha sawm tha te sungah antan nate sia Judah mite atu in lungdam thinnop poai hong suak tu hi. Thumaan thutak le kilemna dei hamtang vun.”" 
Zechariah8:20 Vaanglianbelpa Topa in, “Khuapi tam mamate pan mite Jerusalem ah a pai tu hun hong theng tu hi." 
Zechariah8:21 Khuapi khat pan hong pai mite in khuapi dang pan hong pai mite tungah ‘Ko Vaanglianbelpa Topa bia tu le ama thupha nga natu thungen tu in pai tu khu hi. Ko taw hong paikhawm tavun!’ kici tu uh hi. 
Zechariah8:22 Mihing tam mama le minam a hat mamate sia Vaanglianbelpa Topa bia tu le ama thupha nga natu thungen tu in Jerusalem ah pai tu uh hi. 
Zechariah8:23 Tua hun ciang, ngamdangmi sawm in Judah mi khat kungah hong pai tu a, ‘Note taw Pathian om hi ci in za ka hi uh ciang note taw a sia a pha kumkhawm nuam khu hi, ci tu uh hi,’ ” ci hi." 
Zechariah9:1 Hi thu in Topa ii thupuak ahi hi: Ama in Hadrach ngam le Damascus khuapi tungah daan piakna thutan zo hi. Israel namte bek hi ngawlin Syria khuapi zongh Topa neisa hi. 
Zechariah9:2 Hadrach taw a kingamngi Hamath zongh ama ii neisa ahi bangma, Tyre le Sidon khuapite le a khut thiamna te theampo zongh ama ii neisa hi." 
Zechariah9:3 Tyre in ama atu in khuapi kulhpite vawt a, ngunn le khamhte a kholsa tam leilam ahiciangin leivui bang bek hi lel hi!" 
Zechariah9:4 Ahihang a neisa theampo Topa in laak keaksak tu hi. Topa in a nei a lamh teng tuipi sungah vawksak tu a, tua khuapi kihaltum tu hi." 
Zechariah9:5 Ashkelon khuapi in hi teng mu in lau tu hi. Gaza khuapi in tuasia mu in na sa mama tu hi. Ekron zongh tuabang ma hi tu a, a lametnate bo tu hi. Gaza in a kumpi taan tu a, Ashkelon sia kitaisan in kinusia tu hi." 
Zechariah9:6 Minam kihel mite in Ashdod ah teang tu uh hi. Topa in, “Tua a kiphasak Philistine te theampo ka niamsak tu hi." 
Zechariah9:7 Amate in chi baanglai sate ahibuale a kikhaam an dangte ne nawn ngawl tu uh hi. A nungta laite theampo ka mite ii khen khat suak tu a, Judah nam sungah bee le phung khat in om tu hi. Ekron sia Jebus te bangma in ka mite suak tu uh hi." 
Zechariah9:8 Ka ngam ka cing tu a, ngalkaphonpite in ka kaantansak buatu hi. Kumpi ngilote in ka mite ka zothawsak nawn buatu hi. Ka mite thuakna sa teng mu zo khi hi,” ci hi." 
Zechariah9:9 Lungdam vun, lungdam vun, Zion mite awng! No Jerusalem mite awng, lungdam in au vun! En vun, na kumpipa no kungah hong pai hi! Ama in ngalzawna mualsua in lungdamna taw hong pai hi, Ahihang kiniamkhiak in laa khat — Laano, laatal no khat tungah to hi." 
Zechariah9:10 Topa in, “Ngal siphu leangte Israel pan ka heam tu a, Jerusalem pan siphute ka la tu hi; Ngal kisimna sung a kizangh thalte ka lalsak tu hi. Na kumpipa in minam tuatuamte sungah kilemna omsak tu hi; ama in tuipi khat pan tuipi khat dong, Euphrates ngun pan leitung mong dong uk tu hi,” ci hi." 
Zechariah9:11 Topa in, “Sangaw biakpiakna chisan taw a kikipsak ka thuciamna hangin na saltanna mun, tui om ngawlna dum sung pan note kong suaktasak tu hi." 
Zechariah9:12 Tu in lametna a nei no, saltaangte awng, heak kik vun; na ngam muanna munah heak kik tavun. Na thuakna sa theampo hangin a zaa nii in thupha kong piak kik natu thu, tu in note tungah kong son hi." 
Zechariah9:13 Keima in Judah sia ngalkap khat ii thal bangin, Israel sia thaltangte bangin ka zangh tu hi. Greece mite do tu in Zion pasalte sia namsau khat bangin ka zangh tu hi,” ci hi." 
Zechariah9:14 Topa in a mite tungah hong kilangh tu hi; ama in a thaltangte khualeng bangin kap tu hi. Vaanglianpipa Topa in a lemle tum tu a; thangsang pan vuipi suangval bangin hong kuan tu hi. 
Zechariah9:15 Vaanglianbelpa Topa in a mite sungsia tu hi, tuaciang amate in a ngalte susia tu uh hi. Amate sia ngal kisimna sungah zukhamte bangin au in, a ngalte chisan luangsak tu uh hi; tua chisan sia biaknatau tungah beal sung pan a kisung sangaw biakpiakna khat ii chi bangin luang tu hi." 
Zechariah9:16 Tua ni ciangin, tuucingpa in a tuute launa pan a huuk bangin, Topa in a mite hun tu hi. Amate in ama ngam sungah kumpilukhu tungah a suang manphate bangin taang tu uh hi." 
Zechariah9:17 Tua ngam sia bangza in pha a et hoi tu ziam! Khangnote in tua ngam pan a piang thaw an le sapittui neakna taw a thahat tu uh hi. 
Zechariah10:1 Khaal kipat hunin Topa tungah nguatui ngen vun. Ngua a paai meeikaai hong puak a, ngua zusak in, kuama theampo atu lote a hingsak pa sia Topa ahi hi." 
Zechariah10:2 Mite in milimte le aisaan theite thu dongh ahihang a zo kiknate sia leilot thu le luithawthong thu veu hi. Pawl khat in mangkhia a, ahihang tuate in nang hong lampialsak bek hi; amate hong piak thinnopna in man nei ngawl hi. Tua ahikom tuu bote bangin tua mite vakthap uh hi. Amate in lampui nei ngawl ahikom ngim nga uh hi." 
Zechariah10:3 Topa in, “Ka mite a uk ngamdangmite tungah ka thin uuk a, daan ka pia tu hi. Judah mite sia keima aa hi, tuaciang keima Vaanglianbelpa Topa in amate ka keam tu hi. Amate sia a thahat ka ngal siphute hong hi tu uh hi." 
Zechariah10:4 Amate sung panin ka mite a uk tu ngamukte, lampuite le ngalkap maangte hong piang tu hi." 
Zechariah10:5 Judah mite in a ngalte lampi buan sungah a siikcil ngalkapte bangin ngalzo tu uh hi. Topa in amate panpui ahiciang amate in ngalsim tu uh hi, amate in a ngalte siphu ngalkapte ngawngawn zo tu uh hi." 
Zechariah10:6 “Keima in Judah mite ka hatsak tu hi; Israel mite ka suatak tu hi. Keima in amate khuangaihuai ka sa tu a, a vekpi in inn ah ka ciapui kik tu hi. Amate sia ka nial ngeingawl mite bang hi tu hi. Keima in Topa, a Pathian ka hi hi; A thungetnate ka zo tu hi." 
Zechariah10:7 Ngalkapte bangin Israel mite thahat tu uh hi. Sapittui ne te bangin lungdam tu uh hi. Topa nasepna hangin a suan a paalte in hi zawna phawk in, lungdam tu uh hi." 
Zechariah10:8 “Ka mite ka sam tu a, ka kaikhawm tu hi. Amate ka suatak tu a, a ngei bangin ka tamsak mama tu hi." 
Zechariah10:9 Minam tuatuamte sungah amate thethaang hi kaleng, a khualana pan ngawngawn in kei hong phawk tu uh hi. Amate le a tate nungta lai tu a, inn ah cia khawm tu uh hi." 
Zechariah10:10 Egypt le Assyria panin amate inn ah ka ciapui tu a, amate ii mun le ngam ah ka teangsak tu hi. Amate Gilead le Lebanon zongh ah ka teangsak tu hi; ngam bup sia mihing taw kidim tu hi." 
Zechariah10:11 Amate in ngimna tuipi a kaan uh ciang, keima Topa in tuihualte ka saat tu a, Nile ngun thuk nate ko tu hi. A kiphasak Assyria kiniamsuksak tu a, a thahat Egypt in a thahatna taan tu hi." 
Zechariah10:12 Keima in ka mite ka hatsak tu hi; amate in kei hong bia tu a, ka thu hong mang tu hi,” ci hi. Topa in ci zo hi." 
Zechariah11:1 Lebanon awng, mei in na cedar thingkungte a kaktum thei natu in na kongkhate hong in." 
Zechariah11:2 Cypress thingkungte awng, kapin tau vun — cedar thingte puk zo hi; tua thingkung minthangte kisusia zo hi! Bashan oak thingkungte awng, kapin tau vun — taamthing zingte kiphuk zo hi!" 
Zechariah11:3 Ngam ukte khuangai in kap hi; amate minthanna bo zo hi! Tawpite hawk ngai vun: Jordan ngundung, amate ii teenna duithuk sia kisusia zo hi!" 
Zechariah11:4 Topa ka Pathian in kei tungah, “Ngaw tu a kikoi tuu honte a cingpa bang hi in." 
Zechariah11:5 Tua tuute sia a tote in that a, a thatte daan kipia ngawl hi. Amate in a sa zuakin, ‘ Topa pok vun! Ei hau zo hing!’ ci hi. A tuucingte ngawngawn in hesuakna nei ngawl uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah11:6 (Topa in, “Leitung ah kuama hesuak nawn ngawl tu khi hi. Keima mama in a ukte khut sungah mi theampo ka koi tu hi. Hi ngamukte in leitung siacipsak tu a, amate thahatna panin tua leitung ka suatak buatu hi,” ci hi.)" 
Zechariah11:7 Tuu a lei, a zuakte in kei hong cial a, kei sia a kingo tu tuute a cingpa ka suak hi. Ciangkang nii ka la a: khat sia “Maipha piakna” ka ci a, a dang khat sia ‘Kilomkhatna’ ka ci hi. Tuaciang tuuhonte ka cing hi." 
Zechariah11:8 Kei hong ensan tuucing dang thumte tungah ka thin a sau zo bua hi, amate teng sia tha khat sungin ka tawpsak hi." 
Zechariah11:9 Tua zawkciang tuuhonte tungah, “No ii tuucing pa hi nawn ngawl tu khi hi. A thi tu teng thi vun a, a kisusia tu teng kisusia hen. A taanglai teng in amate khat le khat kisucip ta uh hen,” ka ci hi." 
Zechariah11:10 Tua zawkciang ‘Maipha piakna’ a kici ciangkang la in, Topa ii minam theampo taw a vawt thuciamna phiat na tu in tuasia ka thiaktan hi." 
Zechariah11:11 Tua ahikom tua thuciamna sia, tua ni in kiphiat hi, tuu a zuak le a leite in kei hong en nginge a, ka sep ka vawtte tungtawnin Topa in thuson ahi hunlam he uh hi." 
Zechariah11:12 Amate tungah, “Na uuk uh le ka thaman hong pia tavun. Na uuk bua uh le noma tang vun,” ka ci hi. Tua ahikom amate in ka thaman tu in ngunntang sawmthum hong pia hi." 
Zechariah11:13 Topa in, keima tungah “Tua sumte biakinn sumkholna ah koi ta'n hong ci hi. Tua ahikom ngunntang 30 — kei taw kiphu a sak a tam mama sum — tua teng la in biakinn sumkholna ah ka koi hi." 
Zechariah11:14 Tua zawkciang ‘Kilomkhatna’ a kici ciangkang niina sia ka thiaktan a, Judah le Israel kilomkhatna kitamhtham hi." 
Zechariah11:15 Tua zawkciang Topa in keima tungah, “Khatvei ma tuucingpa heang leleau in a, tutung sia a mannung ngawl tuucingpa in, kiheang in." 
Zechariah11:16 Ka tuuhonte uk tu in tuucing khat ka koi hi, ahihang ama in lalna a thuak tu tuute le huu ngawl a; a bote le zong ngawl, a liamte le bawl ngawl, a ciidamte zongh anvaak ngawl hi. Tuabang a sep tu luangin ama in tuu a thaubelte ii sa ne in a peangcinte khok keak hi." 
Zechariah11:17 Tua a mannung ngawl tuucingpa a lal hi zo hi! Ama in a tuuhonte nusia zo hi. Ama thahatna sia ngalte in lalcipsak tu hi. A baan ngawtaak tu a, a mit ziatsang taw tu hi,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah12:1 Hi thupuak in Israel taw kisai vante a phalh, lei a bitphua, mihing nuntakna a pia Topa tung pan ahi hi. Ama in," 
Zechariah12:2 “Jerusalem sia sapittui hai khat bangin ka vawt tu hi; a kiimkot a minam tuatuamte in ne tu a, zu kham bangin hoi vatut tu uh hi. Amate in Jerusalem a uumci uh ciangin, Judah khuapi dangte zongh ki uumci tu hi." 
Zechariah12:3 Ahihang tua hun hong thet ciang, Jerusalem sia a ngit suangtum pui khat bangin ka vawt tu a — tuasia laamto tu a kipan minam pawpo liam tu hi. Leitung minam theampo kipawlin ama sim tu uh hi." 
Zechariah12:4 Tua hun ciang a siphute theampo ka lausak tu a, a tung to teng ka mawmawsak tu hi. Judah mite ka encik tu hi, ahihang a ngalte ii siphute a mit ka tawsak tu hi." 
Zechariah12:5 Tuasia ciang Judah bee le phungte in amate le amate tungah, ‘Vaanglianbelpa Topa in Jerusalem ah a teang a mite thahatna pia hi’ kici tu hi." 
Zechariah12:6 “Tua hun ciang Judah bee le phungte duisung ahibuale, thaw an min lak pha lo sung a meikaang bangin ka vawt tu hi — amate in a kiimkot minamte theampo susia tu uh hi. Jerusalem mite ahile khuapi sungah ngammuangin om tu uh hi." 
Zechariah12:7 “Keima, Topa in Judah ngalkaphonpite zawna ka pia masa tu hi, tua hile David suan le paalte le Jerusalem mite ii a nga tu patoaina sia a taanglai Judah mite nga tu patoaina sangin lian zaw ngawl tu hi." 
Zechariah12:8 Tua hun ciang Topa in Jerusalem a teangte dal tu a, amate sungah a thazawm belte ngawngawn David bangin hat tu uh hi. David suan le paalte in Topa ii vantunglalang bang ahizong Pathian mama bang ahizong amate lampui tu uh hi." 
Zechariah12:9 Tua hun ciang Jerusalem sim tu a kipan minam theampo ka susia tu hi. 
Zechariah12:10 “Keima in David suan le paalte le Jerusalem a teang a dangte sia hesuakna thin le thungetna thin taw ka dimh tu hi. Amate in nam taw a tuplup pa en tu uh a, ta khat bek a nei a thisuate khuangai bangin khuangai tu uh hi. Amate in a tapaciil a khuaite bangin nasia tak khuangai tu uh hi." 
Zechariah12:11 Tua laitakin Jerusalem ah heena kaana sia Megiddo zaangtam a Hadad-rimmon atu heena le kaana za in nasia tu hi. 
Zechariah12:12 Ngamsung innkuan simin khuangai in om tek tu hi: David suante innkuan, Nathan suante innkuan, Levi suante innkuan, Shimei suante innkuan, a dang innkuante hi siat tu hi. Ngamsung innkuan simin khuangai tek in a om ciang, pate ahile numeite taw kihel ngawlin a tuamin khuangai tu uh hi." 
Zechariah12:13  
Zechariah12:14  
Zechariah13:1 Vaanglianbelpa Topa in “Tua hun hong thet ciang, David suan le paalte le Jerusalem mite mawna le milim biakna pan thiansua natu in tuinaak khat hong phuul tu hi." 
Zechariah13:2 Tua hun ciang ngamsung pan milimte min theampo ka phiat tu a, kuama in ciamtee nawn ngawl tu hi. Kamsaang ka hi a ci khat pawpo le, milim biak tu a lungngulna ka heam tu hi." 
Zechariah13:3 Tuaciang khat po in kamsaanna a zom nuam hamtang lai le, a pa le a nu in nang hong kithatlum nanak tu hi, ci tu hi, ama in Topa ii kammalte ka pau ci napi, leilot thu a son hang ahi hi. Ama ii kam a san ciang, a pa le a nu in nam taw hollum tu hi." 
Zechariah13:4 Tua hun hong thet ciang kamsaang kuama in a mukholna hu in kiphasak ngawl tu a, kamsaang khat bangin ngamta ngawlin, kamsaangte puan hampuite ngualtheam natu in silh ngawl tu hi." 
Zechariah13:5 Tua taangin ama in, ‘Kei kamsaang hi bong. Kei lothopa khi hi — ka khan tawntung lo ka tho hi’ ci zaw tu hi." 
Zechariah13:6 Tuasia ciang khat po in, ‘Na awm a liammate bang ziam?’ ci in a dongh le ‘Lawmte khat ii inn pan ka nga hi’ ci in zo tu hi,” ci hi." 
Zechariah13:7 Vaanglianbelpa Topa in, “Namsau awng, khanglo in kei atu a seam tuucingpa sim ta'n! Ama thatlum in, tuaciang tuute kithethaang tu hi. Ka mite ka sim tu a," 
Zechariah13:8 tuaciang, ngam bup sungah mihingte see thum sua see nii thi tu uh hi." 
Zechariah13:9 A nungta lai khen thum sua khen khat teng ka sit tu a, meikuang taw ngunnte a kithiansak bangin amate ka thiangsak tu hi. Khamh a kisit bangin amate ka sit tu hi. Tuaciang amate in thungen tu a, keima in ka zo tu hi. Amate tungah ka mite ahi hunlam ka son tu a, amate in keima Pathian ka hi hunlam pualaak tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Zechariah14:1 Topa sia thukhenin a to tu ni nai zo hi. Tuaciang Jerusalem kiphuul tu a, na mu tangin a vanh laakte kihawm tu hi." 
Zechariah14:2 Topa in Jerusalem sim tu in minam theampo khawmtua tu hi. Khuapi kila in, innte kiphuul tu a, numeite buan in khialpui tu hi. Khua mite a lang sia sal in kipaipui tu a, a taanglai teng ahile khuapi pan kipaipui ngawl tu hi." 
Zechariah14:3 Tua zawkciang, nidang lai in a sim ngei bangma in Topa kuanin tua minamte sim tu hi." 
Zechariah14:4 Tua hun ciang Jerusalem nisuana sang Olive mual tungah ama ding tu hi. Tuaciang Olive Mual sia nisuana sang pan nitumna sangah phel nii in kikhen a kuam lian khat om tu hi. Mual a lang sia saksangah kikhiin tu a, a lang sia thang sangah kikhiin tu hi." 
Zechariah14:5 Mual khen nii in a khen, tua kuam kaantanin no na suakta tu uh hi. Judah kumpipa Uzziah hunsung zinliin lai in, na taanghpupite tai bangin na tai tu uh hi. Topa ka Pathian in vantunglalang theampo hong pai pui tu hi." 
Zechariah14:6 Tua hun hong thet ciang, khuasik, ahibuale thuamluak" 
Zechariah14:7 le khuazing cite om nawn ngawl tu hi. Zan ngawngawn in khuavak top tu hi. Topa bekin hisia a pian tu hun he hi. 
Zechariah14:8 Tua ni hong thet ciang, Jerusalem pan tui thiang hong luang tu a, a lang sia Tuipi Thi ah, a lang sia Mediterranean tuipi ah luang tu hi. Tua tui sia tuk taw khaal taw kum tawntungin, luang tu hi." 
Zechariah14:9 Tua zawkciang Topa sia leitung theampo ii kumpipa in hong mang tu a; ama ii Pathian sia a kuama po in bia tu a, tua min taw ma in ama he tu uh hi." 
Zechariah14:10 Saksang Geba panin thangsang Rimmon dong ngamkuam buppi leitam kisua tu hi. Jerusalem sia kiim le paamte sangin saangzaw tu hi; khuapi in Benjamin kongpi pan nidang kongpi omna ngei Kiing Kongpi dong, tuaciang Hananel Tausaang pan kumpite sapittui suuknate dongin kithung tu hi." 
Zechariah14:11 Mihingte tua munah ngam muangin teang tu a, siatna in a lauthawn nawn buatu uh hi." 
Zechariah14:12 Topa in Jerusalem a sim minamte theampo tungah a kiitak huai mama natna tungsak tu hi. Amate nungta nginge lai in a sa uh muat tu hi; a mitte le a leeite muatcip tu hi. 
Zechariah14:13 Tua hun ciang Topa in amate lungmangsak biaibuai in lausak tu a, a kuama po in a kungah a om khat pawpo zamhin ngal vawt tu hi." 
Zechariah14:14 Judah mite in Jerusalem a huu tu in ngaldo tu uh hi. Amate in minam theampo ii nei le lamh — khamh, ngunn le puan tam mamate laaksak tu hi." 
Zechariah14:15 A kiitak huai mama natna khat sia ngalte ngiaphual a om nganhingte theampo — siphute, laate, kalaohte, laano namte tung zongh ah tung tu hi." 
Zechariah14:16 Tua zawkciang Jerusalem khua a sim minamte sung pan a nungta laite theampo sia Vaanglianbelpa Topa bia tu le Buk Poai khaam tu in kum simin Jerusalem ah pai tu uh hi. 
Zechariah14:17 Minam khat pawpo in Vaanglianbelpa Topa sia kumpi bangin biak tu a nial le amate ngam ah nguazu ngawl tu hi. 
Zechariah14:18 Egypt te in tua Buk Poai khaam tu a nial le, tua poai khaam tu a nial pawpo tung ah Topa ii puak tua natna sia ma taw daan thuak tu hi." 
Zechariah14:19 Tua Buk Poai a khaam nuam ngawl Egypt te le minam dangte tungah hi natna daan tung tu hi. 
Zechariah14:20 Tua hun ciangin siphu ngawlokte tung ngawngawn ah “ Topa atu Kitavaw” ci kammalte ki at lai tu hi. Biakinn sung a an huanna bealte zongh biaknatau mai a kuangte bangma in thiangtho tu hi. 
Zechariah14:21 Jerusalem le Judah ngam bup sung a an huanna beal theampo sia Vaanglianbelpa Topa biakna a zak tu in kituam koi tu hi. Sangaw biakpiakna a pia mite in tua bealte biakpiakna sate huanna in zangh tu hi. Tua hun hong thet ciang Vaanglianbelpa Topa Biakinnpi sungah sumvawtte khat zong om nawn ngawl tu hi. 
Malachi1:1 Hisia in Malachi ii Israel mite tungah a son tu Topa ii a piak thupuak ahi hi. 
Malachi1:2 Topa in a mite tungah, “No kong it tawntung hi,” ci hi. Ahihang amate in, “Bangbangin nong itna hong lak kana ni ziam?” ci in zo kik hi. Topa in, “Esau le Jacob te sia unau laipee ahihang Jacob le a suan a paalte ka it a," 
Malachi1:3 tuaciang Esau le a suan a paalte ka ngaimaw hi. Esau ii mualtung ngam ka susia a, a leitang sia ngiate atu in ka nusiat hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Malachi1:4 Esau suan le paal Edom te in, “Ka khuate hong suksiatsak hi, ahihang tua khuate ka sa kik tu uh hi,” a ci ciang Topa in, “Khua sa kik ma hen — ka nuaitham kik tu hi. Mipite in tuate tungah, ‘Siatna ngam’ le ‘Topa ii a tawntung a thin uukna ngam’ a ci tu hi,” ci in zo kik tu hi." 
Malachi1:5 Israel mite in hite a mittang uh taw mu tu a, tuaciang amate in, “Israel ngam puasia ngawngawn ah Topa thahat hi,” ci tu uh hi." 
Malachi1:6 Vaanglianbelpa Topa in thiampite tungah, “Tapa khat in a pa thasia a, innteang khat in a topa zakta hi. Keima sia na pa ka hi a — banghangin hong patoai ngawl nu ziam? Keima sia na topa khi hi — banghang hong zakta ngawl nu ziam? Note in kei hong zawngsak napi, ‘Bangbangin hong zawngsak khu ziam?’ na ci lai uh hi." 
Malachi1:7 Bangbang ziam cile hi bang hi — ka biaknatau tungah a man nei ngawl ante nong pia uh hi. Tua zawkciang note in, “Bangbangin hong zakta ngawl khu ziam, ci in nong dongh uh hi. Hong son tong — ka biaknatau na zawnsak vawtna, na thusim ngawlna taw nong zatak ngawlna uh kilangh hi." 
Malachi1:8 A mittaw, a ciina, ahibuale a peangbai nganno taw sangaw biakpiakna nong nei uh ciang, tuabangte phamaw sa ngawl na hi uh ziam? Ngamukmangpa tungah tuabang ngannote pia ka sin vun. Note tungah ama lungkimin maipha hong pia tu ziam?” ci hi." 
Malachi1:9 Tu in no thiampite awng, ei tungah Pathian hong dik natu in hong ngen ka sin vun. Ama in na thungetna hong zo ngawl tu a, tua in noma mawna hi tu hi." 
Malachi1:10 Vaanglianbelpa Topa in, “Ka biaknatau tungah a kimang ngawl meite na hal ngawl natu in note khat in biakinn kongkhate khak le uh teh kong oai hi. No tungah ka lungkim ngawl a; kei kung nong paipui biakpiaknate kong saang buatu hi." 
Malachi1:11 Leimong khat pan mong khat ah a om mihingte in kei hong patoai uh hi. Amate in mun theampo ah ngimnamtui hong hal a, tuaciang a saan thamman sangaw biakpiaknate hong pia hi. Amate theampo in kei hong patoai uh hi!" 
Malachi1:12 Ahizong note in keima biaknatau sia bangma man nei ngawlin na son uh ciang le tua biaknatau tungah na nialnamh ante na piak uh ciangin, keima hong simmaw na hi uh hi." 
Malachi1:13 Noma in, ‘Hite bangza in cimtak huai ziam!’ ci in nong mukmen uh hi. Nong biakpiak natu in a kingu nganno ahibuale a peangbai, a nanghno khat nong paipui uh hi. Note tung pan tuabangte hong saang tu in hong um nu ziam?" 
Malachi1:14 A nganhon sung pan keima piak tu in hong kamciam a limci khat nei napi, a man nei ngawl nganno khat taw sangaw biakpiakna nei tu in hong theampa in haamsiatna thuak tahen! Banghang ziam cile keima kumpi lian khat ka hi a, ngam theampo pan mihingte in kei hong kiita uh hi,” ci hi." 
Malachi2:1 Vaanglianbelpa Topa in thiampite tungah, “Hi thupiakna sia note atu hi:" 
Malachi2:2 Na sep, na vawtna taw keima nong patoai uh kul tu hi. Kong ci bangin nong ngai bua uh le no tungah haamsiatna kong tungsak tu hi. Na kivaak natu a, na saan uh vanhte tungah haamsiatna ka tungsak tu hi. A tatakin ci leang, tuate tungah, haamsiatna tungsak zo khi hi, banghang ziam cile kong thupiakte no in na thupi sim bua uh hi." 
Malachi2:3 Na tate daan ka pia tu a, na sangaw biakpiakna nganhingte ii eak sungah na mai kong taat tu hi — tuaciang note eak kholna munah hong kipaipui tu hi." 
Malachi2:4 Tua zawkciang Levi suan le paal thiampite taw ka thuciamna a peal ngawl natu in hi thupiakna kong piak hunlam na he tu uh hi. 
Malachi2:5 “Amate ii hong thasia thei natu in ka thuciamna sungah ka kamciamsa nuntakna le nopsakna ka pia hi. Tua hunlai in amate in kei hong zakta a hong kiita uh hi. 
Malachi2:6 Amate in a maante hil a, a maan ngawlte hil ngawl hi. Amate in kei taw hi vadiamin nungta uh a; amate mama in a maan teng a sep dom ngawlin midang tam mamate zongh siatna a vawt ngawl natu in hu uh hi." 
Malachi2:7 Pathian a maan bang a heak takpi natu in hilna sia thiampite vaipuak ahi hi. Mite in amate kungah pai in ka deina a sin kul hi, banghang ziam cile amate sia Vaanglianbelpa Topa ii kamtaite ahi uh hi." 
Malachi2:8 “Ahihang tu in no thiampite in lampi maan panin na pial zo uh hi. Na hilna in mihing tam mama khialsak hi. No taw ka vawt thuciam sia paltan zo nu hi. 
Malachi2:9 Note in ka deina nong ni bua uh a, ka mite na hil uh ciang zong, khat le khat doidan na hi uh ciang, Israel mite in note kong simmawsak kik tu hi." 
Malachi2:10 Eite theampo in a kibang pa nei kana ngawl hi ziam? A kibang Pathian in eite theampo hong bitphua kana ngawl ziam? Tua ahile eite khat le khat, ih kamciamte banghangin paltan a, ih taanghpupite taw Pathian ii a vawt thuciam sia banghangin zawnsak vawt tu hi ziam?" 
Malachi2:11 Judah mite in Pathian tungah a kamciamte paltan a Jerusalem le ngamsung bup ah a thasiathuai mama khat vawt uh hi. Amate in Pathian ii a it Biakinnpi sia ninsak uh hi. Pate in ngamdang pathiante a bia numeite teenpui zo hi. 
Malachi2:12 A kuama po hi bangin a ngamtate sia Topa in Israel taangpite sung pan heam tahen a, Vaanglianbelpa Topa tungah ih minamte ii a paipui biakpiakna sungah kihel kiksak nawn heak hen." 
Malachi2:13 Na ngamtatna dang khat sia hi bang hi. Ama tungah na biakpiaknate hong saang nawn ngawl ahikom kap a tau in, Topa biaknatau sia na thitui taw na khuumsak uh hi." 
Malachi2:14 Banghangin hong kisaang nawn ngawl ziam ci in na dongh uh hi. Tua thu in na khanmoi lai a na teenpui na zi tungah na kamciamna paltan zo na hi sia a heak hu ahi hi. Na zi sia na koppui hi a, ama tungah a thumaan pasal ka hi tu hi ci in Pathian mai ah kamciam pia napi na paltan zo hi." 
Malachi2:15 Pathian in ama le nang pumkhat thinkhat tu in hong vawt hi kana ngawl ziam? Hi thu ah ama ii tupna bang ziam? Pathian mite tatak ahi tu in tate na nei natu ahi hi. Tua ahikom note kuama in a zi tungah a piak kamciam paltan peuma heak hen. 
Malachi2:16 Israel ii Topa Pathian in, “Nupa kikhulna ngaimaw khi hi. Note khat po in a zi tungah tuabang a ngitlo ciang ngaimaw khi hi. Na zi tungah na thumaan tu a, na kamciam na paltan ngawl natu in kidawm in,” ci hi." 
Malachi2:17 Na kampauna uh taw Topa toisak nu hi. Ahihang, “Ama bangbangin toisak khu ziam?” ci in dongh nu hi. “Vaanglianbelpa Topa in ngamtat siate theampo phasa hi; tuabangte diksa takpi hi,” ci nu hi. Tua ahibuale, “Thutangin ih heen Pathian sia koisungah om hi tu ziam?” ci in dongh nu hi." 
Malachi3:1 Vaanglianbelpa Topa in, “Ka lampi a sialkhol tu in ka kamtaipa ka paisak tu hi. Tua zawkciang na zon uh Topa zongh ama Biakinnpi sungah thakhat thu in hong pai tu hi. Mu tu kaal na ngalaak uh kamtaipa hong pai in, ka thuciamna thangsak tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Malachi3:2 Ahihang ama ii hong pai ni ciang, akua peuma in thuak zo tu hi ziam? Ama hong kilangh ciang akua nungta zo tu ziam? Ama in a pha satpia le thik a thiangsak meikuang taw kibang hi." 
Malachi3:3 Ama in ngunn a thiangsak pa khat bangin thukhen tu in hong pai tu hi. Thik seakpa in khamh le ngunn a thiansak bangin a maan biakpiakna te Topa kungah hong paipui natu in, Topa kamtaipa in thiampite thiansua tu hi." 
Malachi3:4 Tuasia ciang Judah le Jerusalem mite ii paipui biakpiaknate in nidang hun bangma in Topa lungkimsak tu hi. 
Malachi3:5 Vaanglianbelpa Topa in, “Note thukhen tu in no kungah kong kilangh tu a, bum le ai toaite, palngul mawna vawtte, leilot tetti pangte, a naseamte ii thaman a demte, meingong tanga le ngamdangmite tung pan meet natu a zongte — kei hong zakta ngawlte theampo ii langkhat ah tetti ka pang tu hi.”" 
Malachi3:6 “Keima in Topa ka hi a, ka kikheal bua hi. Tuaciang no, Jacob suan le paalte zongh na mong siat bualai uh hi." 
Malachi3:7 Note, na taanghpupi masate bangin ka thukhamte pan na puapial uh a, na zui bua uh hi. Kei kungah hong heak kik tavun, tua hile kei zongh no sang kong nga tu hi. Ahizong ‘Nang kung kong zot kik natu in bang ka sep uh kul tu ziam?’ ci in nong dongh uh hi." 
Malachi3:8 Thu khat hong dongh tong, mihing khat in Pathian a theam tu kilawm ziam? Kilawm mama ngawl hi, tua hi napi note in kei nong theam uh hi. ‘Bangbangin maw?’ ci nu hi. Sumpi sawm a khat le biakpiaknate sungah hong theam nu hi." 
Malachi3:9 No theampo tungah haamsiatna khat hong tung hi, banghang ziam cile minam buppi in kei nong theam uh hi." 
Malachi3:10 Biakinnpi sungah an tam mama a om thei natu in sawm a khat a cingin hong paipui tavun. Kei hong sin tavun, vantung khelkite ka hong tu a, na pha namcinte kicing takin no tungah kong buaksuk na mu tu uh hi." 
Malachi3:11 Lungnote in na lo ante a lalsak buatu a, na sapitkungte sapitnga taw kidimsak tu khi hi." 
Malachi3:12 Tuaciang, na ngam na lei uh sia a teen nophuai mun le ngam pha suak tu ahikom minamte theampo in mi lungdamte hong ci tu uh hi." 
Malachi3:13 Topa in, “Kei taw kisai in a lauhuai thute son nu hi. Ahizong note in, ‘Nang taw kisai bang teng son na khu ziam?’ ci nu hi." 
Malachi3:14 Note in, ‘Pathian na ih sep sia a luithawthong hi. Ama ci bangin ih sep hangin bang kimanna om a, ih sepna sate huvau Vaanglianbelpa Topa mai ah khuangaina ih lak nop hangin bang phat tuamna om ziam?" 
Malachi3:15 Ih mu bangma mihing kiphasak teng ma in a lungdam hi. Mi siate sia nuamsa bek ngawlin a ngamtat siatnate taw Pathian thin sauna ze et napi, bangma tat tuan ngawl hi,’ ” na ci uh hi." 
Malachi3:16 Tuasia ciang Topa a kiitate khat le khat kipaupui hi, tuaciang Topa in amate son teng ngai in za hi. Ama mai ma ah Topa a kiitate le a zaktate tepteena sia laibu khat sungah ki at hi." 
Malachi3:17 Vaanglianbelpa Topa in, “Amate ka mite hi tu hi. Ka dian ni tak ciang amate mama keima neisa hi tu hi. A pa atu a seam tapa tungah pa khat in hesuakna a nei bangin amate hesuak tu khi hi." 
Malachi3:18 Kei atu a seamte le a seam ngawlte, tuaciang thutangte le a seksolte tungah a piang thute ii kilamdanna sia ka mite in khatvei mu kik tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Malachi4:1 Vaanglianbelpa Topa in, “A kiphasakte theampo le misiate theampo taangphaw bangin a kak tu ni hong theng tu hi. Tua ni in amate kaanghtum tu a, amate taw kisai bangma a taang nawn buatu hi." 
Malachi4:2 Ahihang kei thu hong ni note tungah kong ngupna vaangletna sia ni bangin hong suak tu a, nizangte bangin damna hong puak tu hi. Ngankhawk khat sung pan a kitha khuinote bangin suakta in lungdam tu nu hi." 
Malachi4:3 Ka dian ni ciang, mi seksolte na zothal tu uh a, amate sia na peang nuai a leivuite bang hi tu uh hi." 
Malachi4:4 “Israel mite theampo zui tu in, Sinai Mual tungah ka naseampa Moses ka piak thukhamte le thupiaknate, tuaciang hilciannate ciamtee tavun." 
Malachi4:5 “Ahihang a lauhuai le a lian Topa ni hong thet ma in kamsaangpa Elijah kong paisak tu hi. 
Malachi4:6 Ama in pate le tate hong ngawmtua kik tu hi; tuabang ahibuale keima kong pai tu a, na ngam ka suksiat kul tu hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew1:5 Salmon ta Boaz hi. Boaz ii nu sia Rahab ahi hi. Boaz in a zi Ruth taw Obed hing a Obed ta Jesse hi. 
Matthew2:17 Kamsaangpa Jeremiah ii a sonkholna teng hi bangin taangtung a: 
Matthew3:3 Kamsaangpa Isaiah kammal sia John huvau a sonkholna hi a, “Sennealngam sungah mihing khat hong taangko a, ‘Topa atu in lampi pua khol vun; Ama ii khualhaw natu in lamzin tang khat vawtsak vun!’ ” ci hi." 
Matthew4:14 Hi bang a ngamtat sia, kamsaangpa Isaiah pauna teng a taangtun natu ahi hi." 
Matthew8:17 “Ama mama in ih natna satnate hong puaksak a, ih ciluang natna hong laakkeaksak hi,” ci in Isaiah kamsaangpa ci teng a taangtun natu in seam ahi hi." 
Matthew12:17 Hi bangin a vawtna sia kamsaangpa Isaiah ii a sonkhol sa teng a taangtut natu ahi hi. 
Matthew12:39 Jesus in, “Tu hun mihingte sia, bangzata in sia a, Pathian nei ngawl ziam! Nalamdang lakna hong ngen na hi uh ziam? Hong pia ngawl tu khi hi! No tung a hong kipia tu nalamdang lakna in kamsaangpa Jonah, nalamdang lakna sia bek hi tu hi." 
Matthew12:40 Jonah in sun thum le zan thum ngasa lian ii ngil sungah a om bangin, Mihing Tapa zongh sun thum le zan thum leithukna sungah om tu hi." 
Matthew12:41 Thukhenna Ni ciangin Nineveh khua mite hong ding tu a, note hong mawsak tu hi, banghang ziam cile amate in Jonah thuhilna a zaak uh ciangin a mawna uh pan kisiik kik hi; a maan tak kong ci ciang in hi sungah Jonah sangin a lianzaw khat om hi." 
Matthew13:14 Tua ahikom, Isaiah sonkholna sia amate tungah kibul thei hi; ‘Hi mihingte in ngangai ahihang tel ngawl tu hi. Amate in e en ahihang mu ngawl tu hi." 
Matthew15:7 No a kihitheamsakte awng! no huvau Isaiah ii sonkholnate bangza in maan ziam! 
Matthew16:4 Hi hun ah mihingte bangza in khansia a Pathian um ngawl ziam? Nalamdang lakna hong ngen na hi uh ziam? Vawt ngawl tu khi hi! Jonah nalamdang lakna khat sia bekma note tungah hong kipia tu hi,” ci hi. Tuaciang, amate nusia in paisan hi." 
Matthew16:14 “Pawlkhat in Tuiphumpa John hi hong ci a pawlkhat in Elijah hi hong ci hi, tuaciang a dangte in Jeremiah ahibuale kamsaang dang khat hi vak hong ci uh hi,” ci in zo uh hi." 
Matthew23:35 Tua hu in mawna nei ngawl Abel pan a kipan, sangaw na biaknatau le Biakinn kilaklaw a na thalup uh Berechiah tapa Zechariah le mawna nei ngawl bul a na thalup uh theampo hangin thuak tu daan sia note tungah hong tung tu hi." 
Matthew24:15 “Kamsaangpa Daniel ii son ‘A kiitakhuai mama sia’ na mu tu uh hi. Tua in a thiangthona munah ding tu hi.” (Hi lai a sim sia in tel tahen!) 
Matthew27:9 Tuasia ciang kamsaangpa Jeremiah ii sonkhol teng taangtung hi. “Amate in, Israel mite ii ama man tu a, a thukim uh ngunn dangka sawmthum la in," 
Mark1:2 Kamsaangpa Isaiah at sa bangin kipan hi. “Pathian in ‘Ka kamtaipa sia na lampi hong honkholsak tu in, na mai ah ka paisak tu hi.’" 
Mark7:6 Jesus in a zo kikna ah, “Isaiah in note thu a sonkholna bangza in maan ziam! A kihitheamsak minamte awng, ama in hi bangin at hi: ‘Pathian in, hi mite in a kammal bek uh taw, kei zatakna hong pia uh hi, ahihang a thinsung uh kei taw kikhuala uh hi." 
Luke1:5 Judea ngam ah Herod Kumpipa a maan laitakin, Zechariah a kici thiampi khat om a, ama sia thiampi Abijah ii pawlkhen sungah a kihel thiampi khat ahi hi. A zi min Elizabeth hi a, ama zongh thiampi suan ahi hi." 
Luke1:7 Amate in ta a nei bua uh hi, banghang ziam cile Elizabeth sia ta nei thei ngawl a, Zechariah taw amate ngeal huai mama khawm zo uh hi." 
Luke1:8 Ni khat Zechariah sia Biakinn sungah a thiampi nasep seam a, ni sim biakpiakna hunzeakna sungah ama ii hun hong tung hi." 
Luke1:12 Zechariah in ama a mu ciangin, patau in lau hi." 
Luke1:13 Ahihang vantunglalang in hi bangin ci hi, “Zechariah awng, lau heak in! Pathian in na thungetna hong za zo a, na zi Elizabeth in tapa khat hong hin pui tu hi. A min John ci in na phuak tu uh hi." 
Luke1:18 Zechariah in vantunglalang tungah, “Tu a na son teng thutak hi ci in koibang tel thei tu khi ziam? Kei le pasal huai hi zo a, ka zi zongh huai zo hi,” ci hi." 
Luke1:23 Biakinn sungah nasep tu teng a man zawkciangin, Zechariah a inn ah cia hi." 
Luke1:40 Ama in Zechariah inn sungah tum in Elizabeth biakpui hi. 
Luke1:59 Nausen nipi khat a phak ciangin, a vunteap attansak tu in, hong pai uh a, a pa min la in, “Zechariah” ci in phuak uh hi." 
Luke1:63 Zechariah in lai atna thingpheak ngen a, “A min John hi,” ci in at hi. Amate in lamdang sa mama uh hi." 
Luke1:64 Tua hun lian laitakin, Zechariah hong pau thei kik a, Pathian pok hi." 
Luke1:67 John ii pa Zechariah Thaa Thiangtho taw kidim a, tuaciang ama in Pathian kam a saan teng son a:" 
Luke3:2 tuaciang Annas le Caiaphas sia thiampi lianbelte ahi uh hi. Tua hun laitakin sennealngam sungah a om Zechariah ii tapa John tungah Pathian kammal hong theng hi. 
Luke3:4 Kamsaangpa Isaiah laibu sungah a ki at bangma in: “Sennealngam sungah mihing khat hong au a: ‘Topa atu lampi sialkhol vun; ama khualhaw natu in lamzin tang khat vawtsak vun! 
Luke3:25 Mattathias ii tapa Joseph, Amos ii tapa Mattathias, Nahum ii tapa Amos, Esli ii tapa Nahum, Naggai ii tapa Esli," 
Luke3:25 Mattathias ii tapa Joseph, Amos ii tapa Mattathias, Nahum ii tapa Amos, Esli ii tapa Nahum, Naggai ii tapa Esli," 
Luke3:29 Joshua ii tapa Er, Eliezer ii tapa Joshua, Jorim ii tapa Eliezer, Matthat ii tapa Jorim, Levi ii tapa Matthat," 
Luke4:17 tuaciangin kamsaang Isaiah ii laibu aap uh hi. Laizial phel a, hi bang a ki atna mun mu hi." 
Luke11:29 Mipite in Jesus kiim pan in, hong uumci uh ciangin, “Tu hun mihingte bangzata in ngilo ziam! Nalamdang lakna khat hong ngengen hi. Ahizong Jonah ii nalamdang lakna sia simngawl, a dang bangma kipia ngawl tu hi." 
Luke11:30 Nineveh khua mite atu in kamsaangpa Jonah sia, lim lakna khat ahi bangma in, Mihing Tapa zong tu hun mihingte atu in, lim lakna khat hi tu hi." 
Luke11:32 Thukhenna Ni ciangin, Nineveh khua mite hong ding tu a, no hong mawsak tu hi, banghang ziam cile amate in Jonah thuhilna a zaak uh ciangin a mawna uh panin, kisiik kik uh hi; a tatakin ka ci ciang, hi sungah Jonah sangin a lianzaw khat om hi!" 
Luke11:51 Abel kisuamlupna pan kipan biaknatau le Thiangtho Mun, kilaklaw ah Zechariah a kisuamlupna dong huam tu hi. Hi hi, hong son khi hi, tu hun a mihingte tuate theampo hu in, daan kipia tu hi!." 
John1:23 Isaiah kamsaangpa ii sonna teng doppha in, John in hi bangin zo hi: “Kei sia ‘Sennealngam sungah a au khat ii aw ka hi hi: Topa ii khualhaw natu lampi tangsak vun!’ ”" 
John12:38 Tua in kamsaangpa Isaiah ii sonna teng a tun natu ahi hi: “Topa awng, ko ii son thu sia akua in um na ziam? Topa in a kuate tungah a vaangletna pualaak ziam?”" 
John12:39 Tua ahikom amate in um zo ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile Isaiah in hi bangin ci lai hi," 
John12:41 Isaiah ii hi bangin a ci sia Jesus ii vaangletna mu a, ama huvau a son hang ahi hi." 
Acts2:16 Tua hi zaw ngawlin, hisia in kamsaangpa Joel ii sonsa thu hi a:" 
Acts7:45 A khaksang ciangin tua tuipuanbuk a lua, ih taanghpupite in amate mai ah, Pathian ii hawlkeak minamte ii ngam a suan tu in, Joshua taw a pai uh ciangin, tua tuipuan buk sia keng uh hi. David khan hun dong, tua munah om hi." 
Acts8:27 Tua ahikom Philip in kithoai in pai hi. Tu in Ethiopia kumpinu ii sum kholna a uk cil kinget Ethiopia mi a thupi ulian khat sia a inn ah cia tu in pai hi. Ama sia Jerusalem ah Pathian bia tu in a theng hi a, a siphu ngalleang taw cia kik hi. Tuabangin a cia kawmin, Isaiah thubu sim hi." 
Acts8:30 Philip in del a, a phak ciangin, ama in kamsaangpa Isaiah thubu a sim sia za hi. “Na sisim teng na tel ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Acts28:25 Tua ahikom, amate kithukim thei ngawlin, Paul ii hi bangin, a ci zawkciang nusia uh hi. “Thaa Thiangtho in, Isaiah kamsaangpa tungtawnin, na taanghpupite tungah a sonna sia bangza in pha ziam!" 
Romans9:25 Hi thu in Hosea laibu sungah a son teng ahi hi, “Ka mihing ahi ngawlte ‘keima ii mihing’ ka ci tu hi. Ka it ngawl minamte sia ‘ka itte’ awng ka ci tu hi." 
Romans9:27 Tuaciangin Israel mite huvau Isaiah in hi bangin ci hi: “Israel mite tuipi hui ah senvui za in a tam hial zong, amate sung panin tawm bek kingum tu hi;" 
Romans9:29 Isaiah in a masa in hi bangin ci hi. “Vaanglianbelpa Topa in suan le paal tawm hong kheetsak ngawl hi kapo le, eite Sodom bang ih hi tu a, Gomorrah bang ih suak tu hi.”" 
Romans10:16 Ahihang amate theampo in Lungdamna Thupha saang thei ngawl uh hi. Isaiah mama in, “Topa awng, ko thupuakte akua in hong um ziam?” ci hi." 
Romans10:20 Isaiah in hangsan seseam in hi bangin ci hi. “Hong zong ngawlte in kei hong mu hi; Hong kan ngawlte tungah ka kilak hi.” 
Romans15:12 Isaiah zongh in, “Jesse suan khat hong piang tu a; ama in Gentile te a uk tu in hong pai tu hi, tuaciangin amate in ama ii tungah, lametna nei tu hi,” ci hi." 
Colossians4:11 Justus zongh a kici Joshua zongh in paupuina kam hong thaak hi. Hite thum in Jew te sung pan hong kikhealte hi a Pathian ngam atu kei taw na a seam khawmte hi a, amate in nasia takin hong hute ahi uh hi." 
Hebrews4:8 Joshua in Pathian kamciam ahi tawlngak nuam sia mihingte tungah pia zo hi thong le, Pathian in nidang khat ciang son kik nawn ngawl tu hi." 
James5:11 Amate sia mihing lungdamte hi ih ci hi, banghang ziam cile amate in thuak zo uh hi. Job ii thin sauna te na za zo uh a, a tawpna ah Topa ii piakkikna thu na he zo uh hi. Banghang ziam cile, Topa sia hesuakna le ciliapna taw kidim hi."
